Genesis1:1 Eng’ taunet, ko kitoi Kamuktaindet koyai kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony." 
Genesis1:2 Ak kima komi kiy ng’ony ak kima kotinyei iton; ak kimi mesundeito baragutab riret; kiwendoti Tamirmirietab kamuktaindet baragutab beek. 
Genesis1:3 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Ingolapkeit; kolapkeit." 
Genesis1:4 Kigeer anyun Kamuktaindet lapkeiyet, kole mie: ak kiibesio Kamuktaindet lapkeiyet ak mesundeito." 
Genesis1:5 Kiguure Kamuktaindet lapkeiyet Bet, ak kiguure mesundeito Kemoi. Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon, betut agenge." 
Genesis1:6 Kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Ingobiit soet eng’ kwenutab beek, si kobesio beek chu ak beek chun." 
Genesis1:7 Ak kiyai Kamuktaindet soet, ak kiibesio beek che mi kureretab soet ak che mi baragutab soet; ak kiyaak ko u noto." 
Genesis1:8 Kiguure Kamuktaindet soet Kipsengwet. Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon, betut ne bo aeng’." 
Genesis1:9 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Ingoyumjigei beek yeto agenge che mi kureretab kipsengwetisiek, ak ingotook emet ne mami beek; ak kiyaak ko u noto." 
Genesis1:10 Ak kiguure Kamuktaindet emet ne mami beek Ng’ony; ak kiguure beek che kagoyumgei Nyanjosiek; ak kigeer anyun Kamuktaindet kole mie. 
Genesis1:11 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Ingobityo suswek eng’ ng’ony - ketik alak tugul che mengechen che bo timin, che yiei keswek, ak ketik che bo logoek che yiei logoek ko u kergeindanywa che tinyei keswekwak eng’ orinywa eng’ ng’ony; ak kiyaak ko u noto." 
Genesis1:12 Kibityo anyun suswek eng’ ng’ony, ketik alak tugul che mengechen che bo timin che yiei keswek ko u kergeindanywa, ak ketik che yiei logoek, che tinyei keswekwak eng’ orinywa, ko u kergeindanywa, ak kigeer Kamuktaindet kole mie." 
Genesis1:13 Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon, betut ne bo somok." 
Genesis1:14 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Ingobiit tuguk che iluu eng’ soetab kipsengwetisiek si kobiit kobesio bet ak kemoi; si koek choto kaborunoik, che bo arawek, ak betusiek ak kenyisiek;" 
Genesis1:15 ingoek choto che iluu eng’ soetab kipsengwetisiek si kobiit koluuchi ng’ony; ak kiyaak ko u noto. 
Genesis1:16 Kiyai Kamuktaindet tuguk che iluu aeng’ che eechen; si kobiit koboi ne o bet, ak koboi kemoi ne ming’in; kiyai kecheik agichek." 
Genesis1:17 Kiinde Kamuktaindet choto soetab kipsengwetisiek si kobiit koluuchi ng’ony," 
Genesis1:18 si koboi bet ak kemoi, kobesio lapkeiyet ak mesundeito; ak kigeer Kamuktaindet kole mie." 
Genesis1:19 Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon, betut ne bo ang’wan." 
Genesis1:20 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Ingochang’a koek ng’isiat tuguk che soptos eng’ beek, ingotirirenso taritik eng’ baragutab ng’ony eng’ soetab kipsengwetisiek." 
Genesis1:21 Ak kitoi Kamuktaindet koyai njirenik che eechen, ak kiy age tugul ne sobei, ne wendote beek, eng’ chang’indo, ko u kergeindanywa, ak tarit age tugul ne tinyei kebebaik ko u kergeindanyi; ak kigeer Kamuktaindet kole mie." 
Genesis1:22 Kiiberur Kamuktaindet ichek, kolenji, Oiiye, otesage, onyi beekab nyanjosiek, ak ingotesogis taritik eng’ ng’ony." 
Genesis1:23 Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon, betut ne bo mut." 
Genesis1:24 Kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Ingoii ng’ony tuguk che soptos ko u kergeindanywa, tuga, ak che ichuutegei, ak tiong’ik che bo ng’ony ko u kergeindanywa; ak kiyaak ko u noto." 
Genesis1:25 Ak kiyai Kamuktaindet tiong’ik che bo ng’ony ko u kergeindanywa, ak tuga ko u kergeindanywa; ak tuguk tugul che ichuutegei eng’ ng’ony ko u kergeindanywa; ak kigeer Kamuktaindet kole mie." 
Genesis1:26 Kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Ongeyai chito eng’ itondanyo, ko u kergeindanyo: ak ingoboi ichek njirenik che mi nyanjosiek, ak taritik che bo barak, ak tuga, ak ng’ony komugul, ak tiong’ik tugul che ichuutegei ng’ony." 
Genesis1:27 Kitoi anyun Kamuktaindet koyai chito eng’ itondanyi, kitoi koyai chito eng’ itondab Kamuktaindet; kitoi koyai muren ak tie." 
Genesis1:28 Ak kiiberur Kamuktaindet ichek; ak kilenji Kamuktaindet ichek, Oiiye, otesage, si onyi ng’ony; ak obou; ak olaitorane njirenik che bo nyanjosiek, ak taritik che bo barak, ak kiy age tugul ne sobei ne wendote ng’ony." 
Genesis1:29 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Ogeero, kaagonok ketik alak tugul che mengechen che bo timin che tinyei keswek che mi baragutab ng’ony, ak ket age tugul ne tinyei logoekyik keswek, koek amitwogikwok." 
Genesis1:30 Kaagochi anyun ketik alak tugul che mengechen che nyalilen koek amitwogikab tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony; ak tarit age tugul ne bo barak, ak kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony ne tinyei kabusetab sobondo; ak kiyaak ko u noto." 
Genesis1:31 Ak kigeer Kamuktaindet tuguk tugul che kiga koyai kole miachen mising’. Ak kiek koskoleny ak kiek karon, betut ne bo lo." 
Genesis2:1 Kigiges anyun yaetab kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony ak chang’indanywa tugul. 
Genesis2:2 Kiiges Kamuktaindet boisionikyik che kiga koyai eng’ betut ne bo tisab; ak kiimuuny eng’ betut ne bo tisab eng’ boisionikyik tugul che kiga koyai. 
Genesis2:3 Ak kiiberur Kamuktaindet betutab tisab, kotaban: amu kiimuuny eng’ betunoto eng’ boisionikyik tugul che kitoi Kamuktaindet koyai." 
Genesis2:4 Chu taunaik che bo kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony eng’ betunoto ne kiyai Jehovah Kamuktaindet kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony. 
Genesis2:5 Kitomo kobiit ket ne bo kewet eng’ ng’ony, ak kitomo kobityo ketik alak tugul che mengechen che bo kewet: amu kitomo kogochi Jehovah Kamuktaindet korobonji ng’ony, ak kima komi chi ne ibati ng’ony." 
Genesis2:6 Ago kitogosta kibungweret eng’ ng’ony, ak kobis ng’ony komugul." 
Genesis2:7 Ak kiyai Jehovah Kamuktaindet chito eng’ ng’ung’unyek, ak kobusyi serunekyik kabuset ne bo sobondo; kiek anyun chichoto, chito ne sobei." 
Genesis2:8 Kigol Jehovah Kamuktaindet mbaret eng’ Eden eng’ komostab kong’asis, ak konde oloto chichoto kiga koyai." 
Genesis2:9 Ak kiigochi Jehovah Kamuktaindet kobit ket age tugul eng’ ng’ony ne kararan eng’ keeret, ak ne mie eng’ amet; ak ketit ne bo sobondo eng’ kwenutab mbaret, ak ketit ne bo naet ne kinae ne mie ak ne ya." 
Genesis2:10 Ak kimong’une Eden ainet ne ibisi mbaret; yeityo kopcheigei eng’ oloto, koek ainosiek ang’wan." 
Genesis2:11 Kainetab ne bo tai ko Pison: noto ne yiemei emet komugul ne bo Abila ole mi tahabu; 
Genesis2:12 miachen tahabu che bo emonoto: mitei oloto bedola ak soam. 
Genesis2:13 Kiguure ainet ne bo aeng’ Gion: noto ne yiemei emet komugul ne bo Kus. 
Genesis2:14 Kiguure ainet ne bo somok Hidikel, noto ne wendi komostab kong’asis ne bo Asuria. Kiguure ainet ne bo ang’wan Euprate." 
Genesis2:15 Kiimut Jehovah Kamuktaindet chito kwo kotebe mbaretab Eden si kobiit kosemberi ak koribei. 
Genesis2:16 King’at Jehovah Kamuktaindet chichoto kolenji, Imuchi iam logoek che bo ket age tugul ne imache ne mi mbaret;" 
Genesis2:17 ago amat iam che bo ketit ne bo naet ne kinae ne mie ak ne ya; amu eng’ betut ne keam che bo ketoto, imee ne matiny." 
Genesis2:18 Kimwa Jehovah Kamuktaindet kole, Ma mie kotebi chi inegei; ayachini ne toreti ne kergei ak inendet." 
Genesis2:19 Kiyai anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindet tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony eng’ ng’ung’unyek, ak tarit age tugul ne bo barak, ak kokwerichi chichoto tiong’ichoto kogeer ole tochindoi kainaik; ak kainet ne kiguure chichoto kiy age tugul ne sobei, ko kiek kainennyi noto." 
Genesis2:20 Ak kitochi chichoto tuga tugul kainaik, ak taritik che bo barak, ak tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony; ago kima biit ne toreti chichoto ne kergei ak inendet." 
Genesis2:21 Kiigochi anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindet chichoto ruondo ne nyigis, konuuch: ak konem karasta agenge, ak kotuge yoto banyek kogeere karasato:" 
Genesis2:22 ak koyai Jehovah Kamuktaindet karasto kiinemune chichoto, koek kwondo; ak komutyi chichoto." 
Genesis2:23 Ak komwa chichoto kole, Ni anyun nguno ko kowet ne bo kowekyuk, ak banyek che bo banyekab bortanyu: kiguure kainennyi Kwondo, amu kaginemune Muren." 
Genesis2:24 Amu noto anyun, bagaktoi mureno kwandanyi ak kamennyi, ak konamgei ak kwondanyi; ak koek ichek borto agenge." 
Genesis2:25 Ak kitebyei tuwai ach ngor, chichoto ak kwondanyi, ak kima kolilandos." 
Genesis3:1 Ki ng’alindet ndaret kosiir tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony ne kiga koyai Jehovah Kamuktaindet. Kilenji anyun kwondo, Tos, iman kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Amat oam logoek che bo ketit age tugul ne bo mbaret?" 
Genesis3:2 Ak kilenji kwondo ndaret, Kichamwech keam logoek che bo ketikab mbaret:" 
Genesis3:3 ago kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Amat oam logoek che bo ketit ne mi kwenutab mbaret, amat otwa, si mobegu." 
Genesis3:4 Kolenji ndaret kwondo, Iman, mobegu:" 
Genesis3:5 amu ingen Kamuktaindet kole, eng’ betut ne koam che bo ketoto koyatogis konyekwok, ak ogergeitu ak Kamuktaindet, onai ne mie ak ne ya." 
Genesis3:6 Ak ye kingogeer kwondo kole mie ketoto eng’ amet, ak ko kararan eng’ konyek, ak ko ketit ne kichamei ne ing’omiti chi, kobut anyun logoekyik koam; ak kogochi manong’otiondennyi ne kimi tuwai koam agine." 
Genesis3:7 Koyatogis anyun konyekwak ichek tuwai, ak konai kole mi ach ngor; konabanab anyun sogekab mogoiywet, konapchigei ngoroik che kigermenegei." 
Genesis3:8 Ak kigas Jehovah Kamuktaindet kowendoti eng’ mbar ye kiga kogaititit koskoleny; koung’gei koistoegei ole mi Jehovah Kamuktaindet chichoto ak kwondanyi, eng’ ketik orit che mi mbar." 
Genesis3:9 Koguur anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindet chichoto, kolenji, Imi ano?" 
Genesis3:10 Kowolji inendet, kolenji, Kagas kuting’ung’ eng’ mbar, ak kaiywei, amu ami acho ngor, kaung’ge anyun amu noto." 
Genesis3:11 Ak komwa kole, Ng’o ne kamwaun kole, Imi ach ngor? Keam che bo ketoto kiang’atin ale amat iam?" 
Genesis3:12 Kolenji chito, Kwondo ne kiigona ketebi tuwai, inendet ne kagona che bo ketit, ak kaam." 
Genesis3:13 Kolenji Jehovah Kamuktaindet kwondo, Nee ni kaiyai? Kole kwondo, Kagoberbera ndaret ak kaam." 
Genesis3:14 Kolenji Jehovah Kamuktaindet ndaret, Amu kaiyai kii, kagichubin keistaenen tuga tugul, ak tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony; ichuutegei moeng’ung’, ak iame ng’ung’unyek betusieguk tugul ko ta isobe;" 
Genesis3:15 ak ande bunyondit kwenung’wong’ inye ndaret ak kwondo; ak kwenutab iyoteng’ung’ ak nenyi; ak kotui inendet meting’ung’, ak iguoten aginye kwariandennyi." 
Genesis3:16 Kolenji kwondo anyun, Atesun mising’ nyalildang’ung’ eng’ manageng’ung’; isiche lagok eng’ ng’wanindo; ak inyali manong’otiondeng’ung’ eng’ mageng’ung’, ak koboun." 
Genesis3:17 Kolenji anyun Adam, Amu kegas ng’alekab kwondang’ung’, ak kaiam che bo ketit ne kiang’atin, ale, Amat iam che bo ketoto: kagichub ng’ony agobo inye; iame che bo ng’ony eng’ nyalilda betusieguk tugul, kote isobe;" 
Genesis3:18 iiun ng’ony katok ak katablelinik; ak iame ngwek alak tugul che bo emet; 
Genesis3:19 ak iame amigwogik eng’ kaotik che bo togeng’ung’, kot iweekyige ng’ony; amu kiginemunenen yoto; amu i ng’ung’unyek, ak iweekyige ng’ung’unyek." 
Genesis3:20 Ak kiguure Adam kwondanyi Awa; amu inendet kametab tugul che soptos. 
Genesis3:21 Ak kinapchi Jehovah Kamuktaindet Adam ak kwondanyi sumotik, ak kolaakyi." 
Genesis3:22 Ak kimwa Jehovah Kamuktaindet kole, Ogeero; kagogergeit chichi ak age eng’ achek, ne ingen ne mie ak ne ya; ak nguno anyun, ko si mata koyogoito eunnyi, ak kobut agine che bo ketitab sobondo, ak koam ak kosob koigeny:" 
Genesis3:23 eng’ noto anyun, kimaanda Jehovah Kamuktaindet inendet eng’ mbaretab Eden, si kobiit kobat ng’ony ole kiginemune." 
Genesis3:24 Kion anyun chichoto komanda, ak konde Kerubik kotebe komostab kong’asis ne bo mbaretab Eden, ak rotwetab chok ne ilyeli ne tokyingei komosi ak komosi, koribe oret ne wendi oldab ketitab sobondo." 
Genesis4:1 Kiituiyogei chichoto ak kwondanyi Awa; ak kimanach kosich Kaen, ak komwa kole, Kaasich muren eng’ toretab Jehovah." 
Genesis4:2 Ak kisich kogeny ne tupcho Abil. Ak kiiyagi Abil kechirek ago ki kabatindet Kaen ne kiibati ng’ony. 
Genesis4:3 Ak kingobata betusiek alage, koipchi Kaen Jehovah kagochinet ne bo ruratetab mbar." 
Genesis4:4 Ak kikwerichi Abil agine che kigitwatei che bo akwennyi che akwaen. Ak kicham Jehovah Abil ak kagochinennyi. 
Genesis4:5 Ago ma cham Kaen ak kagochinennyi. Ak kinerech Kaen mising’, ak kisiriny togennyi." 
Genesis4:6 Kolenji Jehovah Kaen, Amu nee si inerech inye? Ak kalya si isiriny togeng’ung’?" 
Genesis4:7 Ngot iyai ne mie, ko tos, magitaachin? Ago ngo meyai ne mie, komitei kurget tiseiywotab tengekto: ak tokyiningei magennyi ak ibou inendet." 
Genesis4:8 King’alalji Kaen ng’etab kamet Abil. Ak ye kimi tuwai timin kong’eetyi Kaen ng’etab kam Abil ak kobar. 
Genesis4:9 Koteebe Jehovah Kaen anyun kolenji, Mi ano ng’etab kamet Abil? Ak kole, Mangen: tos, a ribindetab tupchennyu?" 
Genesis4:10 Koteebe kolenji, Keyai nee inye? Rirjina tugetab korotikab ng’etab komet eng’ ng’ony." 
Genesis4:11 I chubot anyun, nguno, eng’ ng’ony, ne kayat kutinnyi kotaach korotikab ng’etab komet eng’ eung’ung’;" 
Genesis4:12 si ye ibati ng’ony ko matesun kimnatetab ruratennyi: ak iegu ne mweoti ak koombenoti eng’ ng’ony. 
Genesis4:13 Kolenji Kaen Jehovah, O birennyu kosiir ne te ne amuchi ala." 
Genesis4:14 Keer anyun-o, keona ra eng’ ng’ony komugul; ak aung’age eng’ togeng’ung’; ak aegu ne mweoti ak koombenoti eng’ ng’ony; ak bara age tugul ne kanyorua." 
Genesis4:15 Kilenji anyun Jehovah, Age tugul ne barei Kaen keyaakyin mugetut konyil tisab. Ak koyai anyun Jehovah kaborunet ago Kaen, si mabar chi age tugul ne kanyor." 
Genesis4:16 Ak kiwa Kaen anyun, eng’ ole mi Jehovah, kwo komeny emetab Not, ne mi komostab kong’asis ne bo Eden." 
Genesis4:17 Ak kiituiyogei Kaen ak osotiondennyi; ak kimanach, kosich Enok; ak kiteech nganaset, ak komwaitae nganasanato kainetab werinnyi Enok." 
Genesis4:18 Kisich Enok Irat: ak kisich Irat Meujael: ak kisich Meujael Metusael: ak kisich Metusael Lamek. 
Genesis4:19 Ak kiitun Lamek kwonyik aeng’: kainetab age ko ki Ada, ak kainetab age ko ki Sila." 
Genesis4:20 Ak kisich Ada Jabel: inendet ko kwandab icheget che kimeng’oti emaisiek, ak kotinyei tuga." 
Genesis4:21 Ak kigiguure kainetab ne tupcho Jubal: inendet kwandab icheget che butei ketubosiek ak ndurerusiek. 
Genesis4:22 Ak kisich Sila Tubal-Kaen agine, ne ki kitang’indetab sugunonik ak karik: ak kigiguure chepkametab Tubal-Kaen Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Ak kimwachi Lamek kwonyikyik kolenji, Ogas kutinnyu, Ada ak Sila; Oepchi it ng’alekyuk, kwonyik che bo Lamek; Amu kabar chito ne kagoguotena, Murenet ne kabira." 
Genesis4:24 Ngot ko kigiyaakyi mugetut Kaen konyil tisab, Ko agot Lamek ko konyil tamanwogik tisab ak tisab." 
Genesis4:25 Ak kiituiyogei Adam ak kwondanyi kogeny: ak kisich werit, ak kiguure kainennyi Set: amu kile, Kagona Kamuktaindet iyotet age kogeere Abil, ne kibar Kaen." 
Genesis4:26 Ak kisich Set agine werit; ak kiguure kainennyi Enos: eng’ betusiechoto anyun, kotoi bik koguur kainetab Jehovah." 
Genesis5:1 Ni ko bukuit ne bo oretab lagokab Adam. Eng’ betut ne kitoi Kamuktaindet koyai chito, kiyai Kamuktaindet ichek eng’ kergeindanyi:" 
Genesis5:2 kitoi koyai muren ak tie; ak koberur, ak kotochi ichek kainet koguure Adam, eng’ betunoto ne kigitau keyai." 
Genesis5:3 Ak kitar Adam kenyisiek bogol ak sosom, kosich werit eng’ kergeindanyi eng’ itondanyi; ak kiguure kainennyi Set:" 
Genesis5:4 ak betusiekab Adam ko ki kenyisiek bogol sisit ye kingo kagosich Set: ak kisich werik ak tibik. 
Genesis5:5 Ak betusiek tugul che kitar Adam ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak sosom; si komee. 
Genesis5:6 Ak kitar Set kenyisiek bogol ak mut, kosich Enos;" 
Genesis5:7 ak kitar Set kenyisiek bogol sisit ak tisab ye kingo kagosich Enos, ak kisich werik ak tibik:" 
Genesis5:8 ak betusiek tugul che bo Set ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak taman ak aeng’; si komee. 
Genesis5:9 Kitar Enos kenyisiek tamanwogik sogol, kosich Kenan:" 
Genesis5:10 ak kitar Enos kenyisiek bogol sisiit ak taman ak mut ye kingo kagosich Kenan, ak kisich werik ak tibik:" 
Genesis5:11 ak betusiek tugul che bo Enos ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak mut; si komee. 
Genesis5:12 Kitar Kenan kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab, kosich Maalalel:" 
Genesis5:13 ak kitar Kenan kenyisiek bogol sisiit ak artam, ye kingo kagosich Maalalel, ak kisich werik ak tibik:" 
Genesis5:14 ak betusiek tugul che bo Kenan ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak taman; si komee. 
Genesis5:15 Kitar Maalalel kenyisiek tamanwogik lo ak mut, kosich Jaret:" 
Genesis5:16 ak kitar Maalalel kenyisiek bogol sisiit ak sosom ye kingo kagosich Jaret, ak kisich werik ak tibik:" 
Genesis5:17 ak betusiek tugul che bo Maalalel ko ki kenyisiek bogol sisiit ak tamanwogik sogol ak mut; si komee. 
Genesis5:18 Kitar Jaret kenyisiek bogol ak tamanwogik lo ak aeng’, kosich Enok:" 
Genesis5:19 ak kitar Jaret kenyisiek bogol sisiit ye kingo kagosich Enok, ak kisich werik ak tibik:" 
Genesis5:20 ak betusiek tugul che bo Jaret ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak tamanwogik lo ak aeng’; si komee. 
Genesis5:21 Kitar Enok kenyisiek tamanwogik lo ak mut, kosich Metusela:" 
Genesis5:22 ak kibendat Enok ak Kamuktaindet eng’ kenyisiek bogol somok ye kingo kagosich Metusela, ak kisich werik ak tibik:" 
Genesis5:23 ak betusiek tugul che bo Enok ko ki kenyisiek bogol somok ak tamanwogik lo ak mut: 
Genesis5:24 ak kibendoti Enok ak Kamuktaindet; ak kimata kotook, amu kiimut Kamuktaindet." 
Genesis5:25 Kitar Metusela kenyisiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak tisab, kosich Lamek:" 
Genesis5:26 ak kitar Metusela kenyisiek bogol tisab ak tamanwogik sisiit ak aeng’ ye kingo kagosich Lamek, ak kisich werik ak tibik:" 
Genesis5:27 ak betusiek tugul che bo Metusela ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak tamanwogik lo ak sogol; si komee. 
Genesis5:28 Kitar Lamek kenyisiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak aeng’, kosich werit." 
Genesis5:29 Ak kiguure kainennyi Noa, kole, Inendet ne igoigoech eng’ boisionikyok ak nyalilwogik che bo eunekyok, amu ng’ony ne kigochub Jehovah." 
Genesis5:30 Ak kitar Lamek kenyisiek bogol mut ak tamanwogik sogol ak mut ye kingo kagosich Noa, ak kisich werik ak tibik:" 
Genesis5:31 ak betusiek tugul che bo Lamek ko ki kenyisiek bogol tisab ak tamanwogik tisab ak tisab; si komee. 
Genesis5:32 Ak ye kingo kagotar Noa kenyisiek bogol mut, kosich Sem, Ham ak Japet." 
Genesis6:1 Ak ye kingotoi kotesogis bik eng’ ng’ony, ak kigisikyi ichek tibik," 
Genesis6:2 kogeer anyun werikab Kamuktaindet tibikab bik kole kororon; ak kiimutygei tugul che kilewen koek kwonyikwak. 
Genesis6:3 Ak kimwa Jehovah kole, Mabortos Tamirmiriennyu ak chi agoi, amu inendet ko borto: eng’ noto anyun, egu betusiekyik kenyisiek bogol ak tiptem." 
Genesis6:4 Kimitei Nepilik ng’ony eng’ betusiechoto, ak kogeny ye kingobata noto, ye kingotuiyogei werikab Kamuktaindet ak tibikab bik, kosikyi ichek lagok: koek lagochoto bik che ki nyigonen, choto ki bo keny, murenik che ki toogunotin." 
Genesis6:5 Ak kigeer Jehovah kole, O mising’ tengektab chi eng’ ng’ony, ak kole, kabwatutik tugul che bo muguleldanyi ko tengekto kityo betut age tugul." 
Genesis6:6 Kiibwat Jehovah kole, kima ko ta mie, koyai chi eng’ ng’ony, ak kigas ng’wanindo eng’ muguleldanyi." 
Genesis6:7 Ak kimwa Jehovah kole, Abere awong’u bik che kiatau ayai eng’ ng’ony komugul; kong’eete chi, ak tiony, ak ne ichuutegei, agoi tarit age tugul ne bo barak; kima ko ta mie ayai ichek." 
Genesis6:8 Ago kichamak Noa eng’ taitab Jehovah. 
Genesis6:9 Chu ko ortinwekab Noa. Ki chito ne bo imanda Noa, kiigesunotgei eng’ ibindanyi: kibendoti Noa ak Kamuktaindet." 
Genesis6:10 Ak kisich Noa werik somok, Sem, Ham ak Japet." 
Genesis6:11 Ak kiga kong’emak ng’ony eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet, ak kiga konyi ng’ony koromnatet." 
Genesis6:12 Ak kigeer Kamuktaindet ng’ony, ogeero, kigong’emak; amu king’em bik tugul ortinwekwak eng’ ng’ony." 
Genesis6:13 Kilenji Kamuktaindet Noa, Kagoit tainnyu kagesunetab borwek tugul; amu kanyi ng’ony koromnatet amu ichek; eng’ noto anyun, ang’eme ichek koboto ng’ony." 
Genesis6:14 Yachigei melit ne bo ketikab taragonik; ak ipchei gorik che mengechen eng’ melit, ak imale manget orit ak sang’." 
Genesis6:15 Ak iyai melit ko u ni: koindanyi ko kakwautik bogol somok che bo eut, ak tebeesindanyi ko kakwautik konom che bo eut, ak koindo ne bo tononennyi ko kakwautik sosom che bo eut." 
Genesis6:16 Ak iyai ole bunu lapkeiyet eng’ melit, ak iyai koek tonon kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut; ak inde kurgennyi tabandab melit ak ipcheune melit somok, ne bo ng’ony, ak ne bo kwen, ak ne bo barak." 
Genesis6:17 Ogeero, aipchini ane ng’ony maranet ne o ne bo beek, si ang’eme borwek tugul, age tugul ne tinyei kabusetab sobondo, eng’ kureretab kipsengwet; ak kome age tugul ne mi ng’ony." 
Genesis6:18 Ago kaagimit kayomisennyu koboten: ak inyo melit, inye, ak weriguk, ak kwondong’ung’, ak kwonyikab weriguk." 
Genesis6:19 Ak igetu alak eng’ tuguk tugul che soptos che bo borwek kobwa melit orit, aeng’ aeng’, che bo oret age tugul, si irib kosopcho koboten; lewen kirgit ak ne kotoy." 
Genesis6:20 Ak che bo taritik ko u kergeindanywa, ak che bo tuga ko u kergeindanywa, ak che bo alak tugul che ichuutegei che bo ng’ony ko u kergeindanywa, kobwanjin aeng’ aeng’ che bo oret age tugul, si irib kosopcho." 
Genesis6:21 Ak iipchige amitwogik alak tugul che kiamei; iyumjige anyun, si koek amitwogiguk, ak chechuak." 
Genesis6:22 Ak kiyai Noa ko u noto; ko u tugul che king’at Kamuktaindet inendet, kiyai anyun." 
Genesis7:1 Kilenjin Jehovah Noa, Obwa melit, inye ak bikab gong’ung’ tugul; amu kaageerin ale i bo imanda eng’ tainnyu eng’ ibini." 
Genesis7:2 Ketu che bo tiong’ik alak tugul che miachen tisab tisab, kirgit ak ne kotoy; ak che bo tiong’ik che ma miachen aeng’, kirgit ak ne kotoy;" 
Genesis7:3 ak che bo taritik che bo barak agichek, tisab, kirgit ak ne kotoy: si kerib kosopcho iyotenywa eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Genesis7:4 Amu tomo betusiek tisabu, si ayokyi ropta ng’ony korobonji betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam; ak abar awong’u eng’ ng’ony komugul kiy age tugul ne sobei ne kiga ayai." 
Genesis7:5 Ak kiyai Noa tugul ko u ye king’at Jehovah inendet. 
Genesis7:6 Ak kiga kotar Noa kenyisiek bogol lo si kobiitu maranet eng’ ng’ony. 
Genesis7:7 Kiba anyun Noa melit ak werikyik, ak kwondanyi, ak kwonyikab werikyik, koboto inendet, si kochililye beekab maranet." 
Genesis7:8 Kiba anyun alak eng’ tiong’ik che miachen, ak che ma miachen, ak taritik, ak kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony," 
Genesis7:9 aeng’ aeng’, ole mi Noa eng’ melit, kirgit ak ne kotoy, ko u ye king’at Kamuktaindet Noa." 
Genesis7:10 Ak kingobata betusiek tisabu, kobiit beekab maranet eng’ ng’ony." 
Genesis7:11 Eng’ kenyit ne kiite Noa kenyisiek bogol lo, arawet ne bo aeng’, betutab taman ak tisab ne bo arawet, eng’ betunoto anyun koyatogis kong’ik che kutune beek che bo riret ne o, ak koyatogis tirisiokab kipsengwetisiek." 
Genesis7:12 Ak kirobonji ng’ony betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam. 
Genesis7:13 Kiba melit Noa eng’ betunoto, koboto Sem, Ham, ak Japet, werikab Noa, ak osotiotab Noa, ak osotik somok che bo werikyik;" 
Genesis7:14 icheget, ak tiony age tugul ko u kergeindanyi, ak tugul che kiyagi ko u kergeindanywa, ak kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony ko u kergeindanyi, ak tarit age tugul ko u kergeindanyi, tarit age tugul ne tirireni." 
Genesis7:15 Kiba melit ole mi Noa, alak tugul che bo borwek, aeng’ aeng’, che tinyei kabusetab sobondo." 
Genesis7:16 Ak ichek che kiba, ko ki kirgit ak ne kotoy, tugul che tinyei borwek, ko u ye king’at Kamuktaindet inendet: ak kigerji Jehovah anyun Noa orit." 
Genesis7:17 Ak kimarane beek ng’ony betusiek artam; kitesak beek, ak koganab melit kwo barak, kot kolooit eng’ ng’ony." 
Genesis7:18 Kigimegitu beek, ak ko tesak mising’ eng’ ng’ony; ak kowendote melit beek barak." 
Genesis7:19 Kigimegitu beek eng’ ng’ony mising’ kosiir; ak kituch tulonok che koen, che mi kureretab kipsengwet komugul." 
Genesis7:20 Kichang’it beek kot kotuch tulonok che itei kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut. 
Genesis7:21 Kibek tugul che bo borwek che kibendote ng’ony, taritik, ak tuga, ak tiong’ik, ak tiong’ik tugul che mengechen che uuoti eng’ ng’ony, ak chi age tugul." 
Genesis7:22 Kibek tugul che tinyei eng’ serunekwak kabusetab tamirmiriet ne sobei, ak tugul che mi emet ne yaamat." 
Genesis7:23 Ak kigibar kiwong’ kiy age tugul ne kisobei, ne kimi ng’ony komugul, chi ak tany, agot ne ichuutegei, ak tarit age tugul ne bo barak; kigibar kiges eng’ ng’ony; Noa kityo ne king’et, koboto ichek che kimitei ak inendet eng’ melit." 
Genesis7:24 Ak kigimegitu beek eng’ ng’ony betusiek bogol ak konom. 
Genesis8:1 Kiibwat anyun Kamuktaindet Noa, ak kiy age tugul ne sobei, ak tuga tugul che kimi koboto inendet eng’ melit: ak kiiyokyi Kamuktaindet usonet kousyi ng’ony, ak kiweeigei beek mutyo;" 
Genesis8:2 ak kigerogis kong’ik che kutune beek che bo riret, ak keger tirisiokab kipsengwet, ak kegirinda ropta ne bunu kipsengwet komugul, si mata korobon;" 
Genesis8:3 ak kiweeigei beek eng’ ng’ony eng’ betusiechoto tugul: ak kingobata betusiek bogolu ak konom kong’ering’itu beek. 
Genesis8:4 Ak kitebe melit tulonokab Ararat eng’ arawetab tisab, betutab taman ak tisab." 
Genesis8:5 Kiweeigei beek mutyo kong’ering’itu kotugul kot koit arawetab taman, ak eng’ arawetab taman eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawanato, kotook walisiekab tulonok." 
Genesis8:6 Ak ye kingobata betusiek artamu, koyat Noa tirisietab melit ne kiga yai." 
Genesis8:7 Kiimaanda chepkugit, kotirirenot kot kotenyo beek eng’ ng’ony." 
Genesis8:8 Kiimaanda anyun cheptuget, si kobiit kogeer ngo kagong’ering’itu beek eng’ emet komugul;" 
Genesis8:9 ago kimanyor cheptuget ole namei, ak koweekyigei Noa eng’ melit, amu kita komi beek ng’ony komugul: ak koyogoito eunnyi, konam koib konyo ole mi eng’ melit." 
Genesis8:10 Ak kita kotebi betusiek alak tisab; yeityo komanda cheptugonoto eng’ melit kogeny. 
Genesis8:11 Ak koweekyigei inendet cheptugonoto koskoleny; ogeero, kiibune kutinnyi sogot ne tuon ne bo emdit ne kisus: kinai Noa eng’ noto anyun kole, teng’oti beek." 
Genesis8:12 Kita kotebi betusiek alak tisab; yeityo komaanda cheptugonoto; ak mata koweekyigei inendet kogeny. 
Genesis8:13 Kitenyo beek anyun eng’ ng’ony eng’ kenyitab bogol lo ak agenge eng’ arawet ne bo tai, betut ne bo tai ne bo arawanato; ak kiisto Noa tuguk che kiga kisiebe melit, ak kogeerot, ogeero, kagosai emet." 
Genesis8:14 Kiyaam anyun ng’ony arawet ne bo aeng’ eng’ betut ne bo tiptem ak tisab ne bo arawanato. 
Genesis8:15 King’alalji anyun Kamuktaindet Noa, kolenji," 
Genesis8:16 Mande eng’ melit, inye ak osotiondeng’ung’, ak weriguk, ak osotikab weriguk." 
Genesis8:17 Yatu komong’ kiy age tugul ne sobei ne mi koboten ne tinyei borto, taritik, ak tuga, ak kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony; si kobiit koiiyo kochang’ait eng’ ng’ony, ak kotesogis eng’ ng’ony." 
Genesis8:18 Kimanda anyun Noa, ak werikyik, ak osotiondennyi, ak osotikab werikyik:" 
Genesis8:19 kimanda anyun eng’ melit tiony age tugul, ak kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei, ak tarit age tugul, ak tugul che bendote ng’ony; ko u ortinwekwak." 
Genesis8:20 Kiteekyi Noa Jehovah kaptisisiet, kinam anyun eng’ tiony age tugul ne mie ak eng’ tarit age tugul ne mie, ak kogoito kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ kaptisisiet." 
Genesis8:21 Ak king’uuchi Jehovah anyinyindo ne bo nyamdutik; ak kole Jehovah eng’ muguleldanyi, Ma achube ng’ony kogeny agobo chi, amu yaachen kabwatutikab muguleldab chi koboch koming’in; ak ma abare kogeny agoi, tuguk tugul che soptos, ko u ye kiayai." 
Genesis8:22 Kota komi ng’ony ko mabegu kolset ak kesisiet, kaititiet ak kiptoret, kemeut ak iwot, bet ak kemoi." 
Genesis9:1 Ak kiiberur Kamuktaindet Noa ak werikyik, ak kolenji, Oiiye, otesage, ak onyi ng’ony kogeny." 
Genesis9:2 Ak koiyweak tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony ak konyor tobotiet agobo okwek, agot tarit age tugul ne bo barak, ak tuguk tugul che bendoti eng’ ng’ony, ak njirenik tugul che bo nyanjet, kaginde eunekwok." 
Genesis9:3 Egu amitwogikwok kiy age tugul ne sobei ne wendoti; kagonok tugul ko u ye kiga agonok ngwek alak tugul che nyalilen. 
Genesis9:4 Ago moam banyek koboto sobondanyi; sobonoto ko korotikyik. 
Genesis9:5 Amagenok iman korotikab sobonwekwok agobo sobondab chi; eng’ tiony age tugul amage korotichoto; ak eng’ chi, agot eng’ tupchetab chi age tugul, amage sobondab chi." 
Genesis9:6 Ak ne tumdoi korotikab chi, kotumdoi chito chechik agine: amu kiyai Kamuktaindet chi eng’ itondanyi." 
Genesis9:7 Oiiye anyun okwek; otesage; oiiye mising’ eng’ ng’ony, otesage eng’ oloto." 
Genesis9:8 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet Noa, ak werikyik che kimi koboto inendet," 
Genesis9:9 Ogeero, kaagimit, ane, kayomisennyu kobotok ak koboto iyoteng’wong’ ne biitu let;" 
Genesis9:10 ak koboto kiy age tugul ne sobei ne mi kobotok, tarit, tany ak tiony age tugul ne mi kobotok eng’ ng’ony; eng’ tugul che mandoi eng’ melit, agot tiony age tugul ne bo ng’ony." 
Genesis9:11 Ak agimit kayomisennyu kobotok, ale, ma kebarei kiwong’u eng’ beek che bo maranet kogeny, tugul che soptos; ak ma kobiitu kogeny maranet ne ng’emei ng’ony." 
Genesis9:12 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet kole, Kaborunet ni, ne bo kayomiset ne kagiyomisge eng’ kwenunnyo ane, ak okwek ak kiy age tugul ne sobei ne mi kobotok ak ibinwek che bendi agoi koigeny." 
Genesis9:13 Kande chemng’isiriet boldet, si koek kaborunet ne bo kayomiset ne mi kwenunnyo ak ng’ony." 
Genesis9:14 Ak ye kaauure boldet ng’ony, kotook anyun eng’ yoto chemng’isiriet eng’ boldet," 
Genesis9:15 abwat anyun kayomisennyu ne mi kwenunnyo ane, ak okwek ak kiy age tugul ne sobei ne tinyei borto; ak ma kobiitu beek kogeny che egu maranet ne iwong’u tugul che bo borwek." 
Genesis9:16 Ak ye took anyun chemng’isiriet eng’ boldet, ageer, si kobiit abwat kayomiset ne tebyei agoi koigeny ne mi kwenutab Kamuktaindet ak kiy age tugul ne sobei ne bo bor, ne mi ng’ony." 
Genesis9:17 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet Noa, Kaborunet ni, ne bo kayomiset ne kaagimit eng’ kwenunnyo ane, ak tugul che bo borwek che mi ng’ony." 
Genesis9:18 Ak werikab Noa che kimong’ eng’ melit, ko ki Sem, Ham, ak Japet: ak Ham ko kwandab Kanan." 
Genesis9:19 Chuto somok ko ki werikab Noa: ak kiyom ng’ony komugul iyotenywa. 
Genesis9:20 Ak kitoi Noa koek kabatindet, ak kimin ketikab sabibuk eng’ mbar:" 
Genesis9:21 yeityo koee maiyek ak kobogit ak koteb ach ngor eng’ emainnyi. 
Genesis9:22 Kigeer Ham, kwandab Kanan, kotebyei kwandanyi ach ngor, ak kimwachi tupchosiekyik aeng’ che kimi sang’." 
Genesis9:23 Ak kiinem Sem ak Japet sambut, komure tigigoikwak ichek tuwai ak kibee batai, ak kotuch ach ngorietab kwandanywa; ak kiituktochi batai, si mageer ach ngorietab kwandanywa." 
Genesis9:24 Ak kisob Noa eng’ bogitennyi, ak konai tuguk che kagoyachi werinnyi ne ming’in." 
Genesis9:25 Ak kile, Ingochubok Kanan; Koek otwogindetab otwogik che bo tupchosiekyik." 
Genesis9:26 Ak kile, Ingoberurok Sem eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu; Ak ingoek Kanan otwogindennyi." 
Genesis9:27 Ingobara Kamuktaindet Japet, Ak ingotebote emaisiekab Sem; Ak ingoek Kanan otwogindennyi." 
Genesis9:28 Ak kitar Noa kenyisiek bogol somok ak konom ye kingobata maranet. 
Genesis9:29 Ak betusiek tugul che bo Noa ko ki kenyisiek bogol sogol ak konom: si komee. 
Genesis10:1 Chu ortinwek che bo werikab Noa, Sem, Ham, ak Japet: ak ye kingobata maranet kosich ichek werik." 
Genesis10:2 Werikab Japet chu: Gomer, Magog, Matai, Jaban, Tubal, Mesek, ak Tiras." 
Genesis10:3 Ak werikab Gomer chu: Askenas, Ripat, Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 Ak werikab Jaban chu: Elisa, Tarsis, Kitim, ak Dodanik." 
Genesis10:5 Kigipchechi ichek ngegusiek che bo bororiosiek eng’ emotinwekwak; age tugul eng’ kutinnyi, ko u ortinwekwak, eng’ bororiosiekwak." 
Genesis10:6 Ak werikab Ham chu: Kus, Misraim, Put, ak Kanan." 
Genesis10:7 Ak werikab Kus: ko Seba, Habila, Sabta, Raama, ak Sabteka: ak werikab Raama: ko Sheba, ak Dedan." 
Genesis10:8 Ak kisich Kus Nimrot: Kitoi koek chito ne nyigan eng’ ng’ony. 
Genesis10:9 Ki kiplogotiot ne nyigan eng’ taitab Jehovah. Ineni kigimwa kele, ko u Nimrot kiplogotiot ne nyigan eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Genesis10:10 Taunetab bounatennyi ko ki Babel, ak Erek, Akat, ak Kalne, eng’ emetab Sinar." 
Genesis10:11 Ak kimanda eng’ emonoto kwo Asuria, si koteech Ninebe, ak nganasetab Rehobot, ak Kala," 
Genesis10:12 ak Resen ne mi kwenutab Ninebe ak Kala (noto ko nganaset ne o). 
Genesis10:13 Ak kisich Misraim Ludik, ak Anamik, ak Leabik, ak Naptuik," 
Genesis10:14 ak Patrusik, ak Kasluhik (icheget che kibunu Pilistik), ak Kaptorik." 
Genesis10:15 Ak kisich Kanan Sidon, werinnyi ne bo tai, ak Het;" 
Genesis10:16 ak Jebusik, Amorik, ak Girgasik." 
Genesis10:17 Ak Hibik, Arkik, ak Sinik;" 
Genesis10:18 ak Aribadik, Semarik, ak Hamatik: ak kingobata kouuot oretab Kanan koyom emet." 
Genesis10:19 Ak kibunei kiwotetab Kananik Sidon, kotokyingei Gerar, agoi Gasa; kotokyingei Sodom ak Gomora ak Atma ak Seboim, agoi Lasa." 
Genesis10:20 Chuto ko werikab Ham, ko u ortinwekwak, ak ko u kutuswekwak, eng’ emotinwekwak, ak eng’ bororiosiekwak." 
Genesis10:21 Kisich Sem agine lagok, inendet ko ki kwandab lagok tugul che bo Eber, ng’etab kamet ne o eng’ Japet." 
Genesis10:22 Werikab Sem chu: Elam, Asur, Arbaksat, Luk ak Aram." 
Genesis10:23 Chu werikab Aram: Us, Hul, Geter, ak Mas." 
Genesis10:24 Ak kisich Arbaksat Sela; ak kisich Sela Eber. 
Genesis10:25 Ak kisich Eber werik aeng’: kainetab age ko ki Peleg; amu kigipchei ng’ony eng’ betusiekyik; ak kainetab ng’etab kamet ko ki Joktan. 
Genesis10:26 Ak kisich Joktan Almotat, Selep, Hasarmabet, Jera:" 
Genesis10:27 Hadoram, Usal, Tikla:" 
Genesis10:28 Obal, Abimael, Sheba:" 
Genesis10:29 Opir, Habila, ak Jobab: chuto tugul ko ki werikab Joktan." 
Genesis10:29 Opir, Habila, ak Jobab: chuto tugul ko ki werikab Joktan." 
Genesis10:30 Ak kiboch meng’otenywa Mesa, kotokyingei Separ, tulwetab kong’asis." 
Genesis10:31 Chuto ko werikab Sem, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u kutuswekwak, eng’ emotinwekwak, ak ko u bororiosiekwak." 
Genesis10:32 Chuto ko ortinwekab werikab Noa, ko u ibinwekwak, eng’ bororiosiekwak: ak kigipchei eng’ chuto bororiosiek eng’ ng’ony, kingo kagobata maranet." 
Genesis11:1 King’alale ng’ony komugul kutit agenge ak ng’alalet agenge. 
Genesis11:2 Ak ye kita kouuote kong’asis, konyor atebwet eng’ emetab Sinar; ak kimeny oloto." 
Genesis11:3 King’alaljigei anyun ichegei kole, Ong’eetye keyai matabaruk ak kebeel komie. Kiboisie matabaruk che kita koik, ak kiboisie lamit komale." 
Genesis11:4 Ak kimwa kole, Obwa keteekyigei nganaset, ak keteech teekset age ne koi ne togostoi barak, ne itei kimonjogunnyi kipsengwetisiek, si keyaige keegu che toogunotin, si mata keyeste eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Genesis11:5 Ak kichorgei Jehovah konyo kogeer nganaset ak teekset ne koi ne kitogosta kwo barak, ne kiteech werikab bik." 
Genesis11:6 Ak kile Jehovah, Ogeero, agenge bichu, ak ko bo tugul kutit agenge; ak kagotoi koyai kiy ne u ni: ak mami kiy ne ranyei ichek si mayai kiy ne machei." 
Genesis11:7 Ongebe, kechortege anyun, kitoiye kutuswekwak si mata kogasyin ichegei eng’ ng’alalet." 
Genesis11:8 Eng’ noto anyun, koiyestaat Jehovah ichek koba eng’ oloto agoi ng’ony komugul: ak kimeto teeksetab nganaset." 
Genesis11:9 Kigiguure nganasanato Babel anyun, amu noto: amu kiitoiye Jehovah oloto kutuswek che bo ng’ony komugul; ak kiiyesta Jehovah ichek koba eng’ oloto, koba ng’ony komugul." 
Genesis11:10 Chu ortinwekab Sem. Kitar Sem kenyisiek bogol, si kosichei Arbaksat eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ye kingo kagobata maranet:" 
Genesis11:11 ak kitar Sem kenyisiek bogol mut ye kingo kagosich Arbaksat, ak kisich werik ak tibik." 
Genesis11:12 Kitar Arbaksat kenyisiek sosom ak mut kosich Sela: 
Genesis11:13 ak kitar Arbaksat kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak somok ye kingo kagosich Sela, ak kisich werik ak tibik." 
Genesis11:14 Kitar Sela kenyisiek sosom, kosich Eber:" 
Genesis11:15 ak kitar Sela kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak somok ye kingo kagosich Eber, ak kisich werik ak tigik." 
Genesis11:16 Kitar Eber kenyisiek sosom ak ang’wan, kosich Peleg:" 
Genesis11:17 ak kitar Eber kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak sosom ye kingo kagosich Peleg, ak kisich werik ak tibik." 
Genesis11:18 Kitar Peleg kenyisiek sosom, kosich Reu:" 
Genesis11:19 kitar Peleg kenyisiek bogol aeng’ ak sogol ye kingo kagosich Reu, ak kisich werik ak tibik." 
Genesis11:20 Kitar Reu kenyisiek sosom ak aeng’, kosich Serug:" 
Genesis11:21 kitar Reu kenyisiek bogol aeng’ ak tisab ye kingo kagosich Serug, ak kisich werik ak tibik." 
Genesis11:22 Kitar Serug kenyisiek sosom, kosich Nahor:" 
Genesis11:23 kitar Serug kenyisiek bogol aeng’ ye kingo kagosich Nahor, ak kisich werik ak tibik." 
Genesis11:24 Kitar Nahor kenyisiek tiptem ak sogol, kosich Tera:" 
Genesis11:25 kitar Nahor kenyisiek bogol ak taman ak sogol ye kingo kagosich Tera, ak kisich werik ak tibik." 
Genesis11:26 Kitar Tera kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab, kosich Abram, Nahor, ak Haran." 
Genesis11:27 Chu ortinwekab Tera. Kisich Tera Abram, Nahor, ak Haran; ak kisich Haran Lot." 
Genesis11:28 Kime Haran eng’ taitab kwandanyi Tera eng’ emet ne kigisikyin, eng’ Ur ne bo Kaldeik." 
Genesis11:29 Ak kiitunis Abram ak Nahor: kigiguure osotiotab Abram Sarai; ak kigiguure osotiotab Nahor Milka, cheptab Haran, kwandab Milka ak Iska." 
Genesis11:30 Kisonen Sarai; kima kotinyei lakwa. 
Genesis11:31 Ak kiimut Tera werinnyi Abram, ak Lot weritab Haran, weritab werinnyi, ak Sarai osotiotab werinnyi Abram; kiba tugul eng’ emetab Ur ne bo Kaldeik, koba emetab Kanan; kiit Haran, koba komeny oloto." 
Genesis11:32 Ak betusiekab Tera ko ki kenyisiek bogol aeng’ ak mut: ak kime Tera eng’ Haran. 
Genesis12:1 Kilenji anyun Jehovah Abram, Ui inye eng’ emeng’ung’, ak eng’oldab tilionutiguk, ak eng’ gotab kwandang’ung’, ui emet ne amache aborun;" 
Genesis12:2 ak ayain iegu bororiet ne o, ak aberurin, atoror kaineng’ung’ koeet; ak iegu kaberuret." 
Genesis12:3 Ak aberuri ichek che iberurin, ak achube agot ne sasin: ak kiberuri ortinwek tugul che bo ng’ony eng’ inye." 
Genesis12:4 Kiwa Abram anyun ko u ye kiga komwachi Jehovah; kiba koboto Lot: kiga kotar Abram kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab ak mut ye kingomandoi eng’ Haran. 
Genesis12:5 Kiimut Abram osotiondennyi Sarai, koboto Lot weritab ng’etab kamet, ak tugukwak tugul che kiga koyumjigei, ak bik che kiga konyor eng’ olin bo Haran; ak kimanda koba emetab Kanan; kiit anyun emetab Kanan." 
Genesis12:6 Ak kibun Abram emet kwenut agoi oldab Sekem, kot koit ketitab More. Ak kimi Kananik emonoto eng’ betusiechoto." 
Genesis12:7 Ak kimong’ji Jehovah Abram, ak kolenji, Agochini iyoteng’ung’ emoni: ak kiteekyi kaptisisiet Jehovah, ne kimong’ji inendet." 
Genesis12:8 Ak kiu kwo eng’ oloto agoi koit tulwet eng’ komostab kong’asis ne bo Betel, ak kiteech emainnyi, kimi Betel komostab cherongo, ak kimi Ai komostab kong’asis: ak kiteekyi kaptisisiet Jehovah eng’ oloto, ak kiguur kainetab Jehovah." 
Genesis12:9 Ak kiu Abram kogeny, kotokyigei Murot ne bo Tai." 
Genesis12:10 Ak kibiit rubet eng’ emonoto: kochortagei anyun Abram kwo Misri ak kotebe oloto; amu kieet rubet mising’ kong’wanit eng’ emet. 
Genesis12:11 Ak ye ki negit komong’ji Misri, kolenji osotiondennyi Sarai, Kas anyun nguno, angen ale i kobogoriot ne kararan;" 
Genesis12:12 ak ye keerin bikab Misri, kole, Osotiondennyi ni: kobara, ak kobagakten isob." 
Genesis12:13 Kaigai imwa ile i tupchennyu, si komieit eng’ ane agobo inye, ak kosob sobondanyu amu inye." 
Genesis12:14 Ak ye kingoit Abram Misri, kogeer bikab Misri kobogoriondonoto kole kararan mising’." 
Genesis12:15 Ak kigeer bounik che bo Parao, kochoi inendet eng’ taitab Parao: ak kigimut kobogoriondonoto kwo gotab Parao." 
Genesis12:16 Ak koyachi Abram ne mie agobo inendet: ak kinyor kechirek, ak tuga, ak kirugikab sigirok, ak otwogik murenik, ak otwogik tibik, ak iyuogikab sigirok, ak tambesik." 
Genesis12:17 Kibir anyun Jehovah Parao ak gonnyi eng’ korotwek che yaachen amu Sarai kwondab Abram. 
Genesis12:18 Ak kiguur Parao anyun Abram ak kolenji, Nee ni kiiyaiywa? Kilya si memwawa ile inendet ko osotiondeng’ung’?" 
Genesis12:19 Kilya si imwa ile, Inendet ko tupchennyu? Ak kiamutyigei anyun amu noto alen koek osotiondennyu: ineno anyun osotiondeng’ung’, imut, ak iwe." 
Genesis12:20 Ak king’at Parao bik agobo inendet: komut eng’ oret koboto osotiondennyi ak tugul che kitinyei. 
Genesis13:1 Ak kitogosta anyun Abram kong’eete Misri, inendet ak osotiondennyi, ak tugul che kitinyei, koboto Lot, koba Murot ne bo Tai." 
Genesis13:2 Ak ki magorio Abram mising’ eng’ tuga, ak feda, ak tahabu." 
Genesis13:3 Ak kiwa eng’ bandanyi, kong’eete Murot ne bo Tai, agoi Betel, agoi koit ole kimi emainnyi eng’ tai, kwenutab Betel ak Ai;" 
Genesis13:4 agoi ole kimi kaptisisiet, ne kiga koteech eng’ tai: ak koguur Abram kainetab Jehovah eng’ oloto." 
Genesis13:5 Ak kitinyei Lot agine nego, ak tuga, ak emaisiek, inendet ne kibendi ak Abram." 
Genesis13:6 Ak kima imuch koyam ichek emonoto, komeny tuwai: amu ki chang’ tugukwak, kot ko mata komuch komeny tuwai amu noto." 
Genesis13:7 Ak kibiit boriet eng’ mestowek che kiiyagi tugab Abram ak che kiiyagi tugab Lot; ak kimenyei Kananik ak Perisik emonoto eng’ betusiechoto. 
Genesis13:8 Kilenji anyun Abram Lot, Ma mie kota kobiit boriet eng’ kwenunnyo, inye ak ane, anan eng’ kwenutab mestowek chechuk ak cheguk; amu kitupche." 
Genesis13:9 Tos mami emet komugul taing’ung’? Kaigai istegei eng’ ole ami: ngot iwe komostab katam, awe anyun komostab tai, anan ngot iwe komostab tai, awe anyun komostab katam." 
Genesis13:10 Kitobendo anyun Lot kogeerot atebwet komugul ne bo Jordan, kole emet ne tinyei beek eng’ olda tugul, ko u mbaretab Jehovah, ko u emetab Misri, ne tokyingei komostab Soar; ye ki tomo kong’em Jehovah Sodom ak Gomora." 
Genesis13:11 Kilewenjigei anyun Lot atebwet komugul ne bo Jordan, ak kouuot Lot kotokyigei kong’asis: ak kopcheigei ichegei." 
Genesis13:12 Kimeny anyun Abram emetab Kanan, ak komeny Lot nganasok che bo atebwet, ak kichecheiyot kot koit Sodom." 
Genesis13:13 Ago ki yaachen bikab Sodom, ak ki kiptengeginik mising’ kosiir, eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Genesis13:14 Kingo kagobesio Lot ak Abram, kolenji Jehovah Abram, Tobende nguno anyun, ak igeerote kong’eete ole imitei komostab katam, ak komostab tai, ak komostab kong’asis, ak komostab cherongo:" 
Genesis13:15 amu agonin emet tugul ne igeere koboto iyoteng’ung’ koigeny. 
Genesis13:16 Ak ayae lagoguk kochang’ait ko u temburiek che bo ng’ony, si ngot komugaksei koiit chi temburiek che bo ng’ony, ko kaga iitoksei lagoguk agichek." 
Genesis13:17 Ng’eet, wendote koindab emoni, ak tebeesindanyi, amu agonin emoni kobunjin." 
Genesis13:18 Ak kiu Abram ak emainnyi, ak kwo komeny ye negite ketik che bo Mamre, che mi Hebron, ak koteekyi Jehovah kaptisisiet eng’ oloto." 
Genesis14:1 Ak kibiit ko u ni eng’ betusiek che bo Amrapel, laitoriatab Sinar, ak Ariok, laitoriatab Elasar, ak Kedolaomer, laitoriatab Elam, ak Tidal, laitoriatab Goim," 
Genesis14:2 kiborio laitorinichuto ak Bera, laitoriatab Sodom, ak Birisa, laitoriatab Gomora, ak Sinab, laitoriatab Adma, ak Semeba, laitoriatab Seboim, ak laitoriatab Bela (noto ko Soar)." 
Genesis14:3 Kiiyomogei chuto tugul eng’ atebwetab Sidim (noto ko Araraita ne bo Munyuk). 
Genesis14:4 Kiot ichek Kedolaomer kenyisiek taman ak aeng’, ak eng’ kenyitab taman ak somok kongelelso." 
Genesis14:5 Ak kinyo Kedolaomer koboto laitorinik che kimi ak inendet, eng’ kenyitab taman ak ang’wan, kwo kobar Repaik eng’ Asterot-Karnaim, ak Susik eng’ Am, ak Emik eng’ Sabe-Kiriataim," 
Genesis14:6 ak Horik, eng’ tulwenywa Seir, agoi El-paran, ne negite ong’atet." 
Genesis14:7 Ak koweek kobwa En-mispet (noto ko Kades) ak kobar koret tugul ne bo Amalekik, ak Amorik agichek, che kimenyei Hasason-tamar." 
Genesis14:8 Ak kimanda laitoriatab Sodom, ak laitoriatab Gomora, ak laitoriatab Adma, ak laitoriatab Seboim, ak laitoriatab Bela (noto ko Soar); kitet luget kotuiyo eng’ atebwetab Sidim," 
Genesis14:9 kiba koborio ak Kedolaomer, laitoriatab Elam, ak Tidal, laitoriatab Goim, ak Amrapel, laitoriatab Sinar, ak Ariok, laitoriatab Elasar; koborio laitorinik ang’wanu ak laitorinik mut." 
Genesis14:10 Ki nyiitat atebwetab Sidim keringonik che bo lamit; ak kimwei laitorinik che bo Sodom ak che bo Gomora, ak kirorokyi oloto, ak kimwechi chun kang’et tulwet." 
Genesis14:11 Ak kiluul tuguk tugul che bo Sodom ak che bo Gomora, ak amitwogikwak tugul, ak koba bandanywa." 
Genesis14:12 Ak kiluul Lot weritab ng’etab kametab Abram, ne kimenyei Sodom, ak tugukyik, ak koba." 
Genesis14:13 Ak kiwa chito ne kigachilil, si komwachi Abram Hebranindet: ne tebune ole negite ketikab Mamre, Amorindet ne tupcho ak Eskol, ng’etab kam bo Aner; ak kinamegei bichuto ak Abram." 
Genesis14:14 Ak kingogas Abram kole, Kageluul ne bo ornywa, koawen koboto otwogikyik che kiginet luget, che kigisikyin gonnyi, bik bogol somok ak taman ak sisit, ak kiisub laitorinichoto agoi koit Dan." 
Genesis14:15 Ak kiyiem inendet ak otwogikyik bunik kemoi, ak kobar ichek, ak kiisub agoi koit Hoba ne mi eutab katam ne bo Damasko." 
Genesis14:16 Ak kisor tuguk tugul, ak koweech Lot ne bo ornywa, ak tugukyik, ak kobogorisiek agichek, ak bik." 
Genesis14:17 Kimong’ anyun laitoriatab Sodom kotorok inendet, ye kiweeksei kobunu baretab Kedolaomer ak laitorinik che kimitei koboto inendet, eng’ atebwetab Sabe (noto ko atebwetab laitoriat)." 
Genesis14:18 Ak kiibu Melkisedek laitoriatab Salem makatinik ak divaik: ki tisiindetab Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’. 
Genesis14:19 Ak kiiberur inendet, ak kole, Ingoberurok Abram eng’ Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’ ne chechik kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony." 
Genesis14:20 Iberurot Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’, ne kiinde buniguk euneguk. Ak kiigochi Abram inendet kebeberta ne bo taman ne bo kiy tugul." 
Genesis14:21 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Sodom Abram, Kona bik, ak iib inye tuguk kobunjin." 
Genesis14:22 Kolenji Abram laitoriatanb Sodom, Kaaiitochi eunnyu Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’, ne chechik kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony," 
Genesis14:23 ale maname agot inet anan tapsiniet, agot kiy age tugul neng’ung’, si memwa ile, Kaayai Abram koek magorio:" 
Genesis14:24 kobate choto che kigoam murenik, ak motwetab bik che kigibe tugul; Aner, ak Eskol, ak Mamre, ingoib ichek kebebertanywa." 
Genesis15:1 Kingobata tuguchu koityi Abram ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ ng’ang’utiet, kolenji, Ameiywei, Abram; a long’eng’ung’ ak melektang’ung’, ne o ne siirtoot." 
Genesis15:2 Kole Abram, Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, igona nee, kawe kalilot amatinye lakwa, ak inendet ne tun indii tugukyuk ko Elieser ne bo Damasko?" 
Genesis15:3 Ak kole Abram, Keer anyun-o, ma igona iyotet: ak inendet ne kigisikyi gonnyu ko noto ne tun indii tugukyuk." 
Genesis15:4 Keero, kiityi inendet ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenji, Ma tun namei chichi tuguguk; ago namei tuguguk ne mong’une bortang’ung’." 
Genesis15:5 Ak kiimut inendet kwo sang’, ak kolenji, Inyal kipsengwet, iit kecheik, ngo tos imuchi iit: ak kolenji, Tenitu choto lagoguk." 
Genesis15:6 Ak kiiyan Jehovah; ak kiityi inendet imanda amu noto. 
Genesis15:7 Ak kilenji, Ane Jehovah ne kiamutun imong’une Ur ne bo Kaldeik, si agonin emoni kobunjin." 
Genesis15:8 Ak kole, Ee, Kiptaiyat Jehovah, anae nee ale tun bunjina?" 
Genesis15:9 Ak kilenji, Namwa roriat ne bo kenyisiek somok, ak subendo ne bo ng’oror ne bo kenyisiek somok, ak mengit ne bo kenyisiek somok, ak cheptuget ak aruetab tarit." 
Genesis15:10 Ak kinam chuto tugul, ak kobet, yeityo konde motwet age tugul kotoorjigei motwennyi: ago ma kibet taritik." 
Genesis15:11 Ak kichorjigei motong’wek banyechato, ak kion Abram." 
Genesis15:12 Ye kingororoktoi asista, kobutyi Abram ruondo ne nyigis; ak ogeero, kiimu inendet mesundeito ne o." 
Genesis15:13 Ak kilenji Jehovah Abram, Nai anyun iman ile, egu lagoguk toek eng’ emet ne ma nenywa, ak koot ichek bichoto; ak konyalil ichek eng’ kenyisiek bogol ang’wan;" 
Genesis15:14 ak tun aruokyini bororionoto agine ne tun bendi lagoguk kootei: ak ye ibata noto komong’ koboto tuguk che chang’. 
Genesis15:15 Ago iwendi inye eng’ kalyet ole mi kwanisieguk; kitubin ye tun ilil. 
Genesis15:16 Ak tun weegugei kogeny kobwanei yu eng’ ibinda ne bo ang’wan: amu tomo konyi tengektab Amorik. 
Genesis15:17 Ak kibiit ko u ni, ye kingororoktoi asista, ko kaimenit, kotook mat ne boto iyeto ak mat ne liblibeni ne bunei kwenutab banyechato." 
Genesis15:18 Ak kiiyomisgei Jehovah betunoto ak Abram, kole, Kiagochi iyoteng’ung’ emoni, koboch ainetab Misri agoi ainet ne o, ne kiguure Euprate:" 
Genesis15:19 kiagochi ichek Kenik, ak Kenisik, ak Kadmonik," 
Genesis15:20 Ak Hitik, ak Perisik, ak Repaik," 
Genesis15:21 ak Amorik, ak Kananik, ak Girgasik, ak Jebusik." 
Genesis16:1 Kitom kosikyi Abram Sarai osotiondennyi lakwa; ago kitinyei chepto ne ki otwogindet, Chemisriot, ne kigiguure kainennyi Hagar," 
Genesis16:2 ak kilenji Sarai Abram, Keero, kirata Jehovah si maii: kaigai iwe oldab chepto otwogindennyu; alen amuchi anyor lagok eng’ inendet. Ak kigas Abram kutitab Sarai." 
Genesis16:3 Ak kingo kagomeny Abram emetab Kanan eng’ kenyisiek taman, komut anyun Sarai kwondab Abram Hagar Chemisriot otwogindennyi ak kogochi Abram manong’otiondennyi koek osotiondennyi." 
Genesis16:4 Ak kiwa Abram ole mi Hagar, ak kimanach: ak kingogeer kole managat, kosas Hagar bounindennyi Sarai." 
Genesis16:5 Kilenji anyun Sarai Abram, Ingobunjin nyalildanyu: kiagonin chepto otwogindennyu koek neng’ung’; ak ye kingogeer kole managat, korenya: ingobesiewech Jehovah." 
Genesis16:6 Ago kilenji Abram Sarai, Keero, mi cheptang’ung’ euneguk; yachi ko u ye igeere ile mie. Ak kiusaus anyun Sarai inendet; kot komwee Hagar inendet." 
Genesis16:7 Kinyorji anyun malaikaiyatab Jehovah inendet ole negite kondab beek eng’ ong’atet, noto ko kondab beek ne mitei oret ne wendi Sur." 
Genesis16:8 Kotwekyi kolenji, Hagar, otwogindetab Sarai, ibunu ano? Ak iwendi ano? Ak kole, Kamweune bounindennyu Sarai." 
Genesis16:9 Kolenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah, Iwekyuige bounindeng’ung’ ak iming’injige inendet." 
Genesis16:10 Yeityo kolenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah, Abaroi mising’ iyoteng’ung’, kot koma kimuchi kiit amu chang’indo." 
Genesis16:11 Ak kolenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah, Keero, i managat, tun isiche werit; ak iguure kainennyi Ismael, amu kogogasun Jehovah nyalildang’ung’." 
Genesis16:12 Ak tun kergeitu inendet ak sigirietab timin eng’ kwenutab bik; mi eunekyik boriet eng’ inendet ak eng’ bik alak; ak tun meng’oti taitab bikab orenywa tugul. 
Genesis16:13 Ak kitochi kainet Jehovah ne king’alaljin inendet, koguure, I Kamuktaindet ne keera: amu kimwa kole, Tos kaageer eng’ yu agot inendet ne keera ak kota asobe?" 
Genesis16:14 Amu noto anyun kigiguure keringonoto bo beek Beer-lahai-roi; keero, mitei kwenutab Kades ak Beret." 
Genesis16:15 Ak kisikyi Hagar Abram werit: ak kitochi Abram werinnyi kainet koguure Ismael, ne kisich Hagar." 
Genesis16:16 Ak ki bo Abram kenyisiek tamanwogik sisiit ak lo, ye kingosikyin Hagar Abram Ismael." 
Genesis17:1 Ak ye kingo bo Abram kenyisiek tamanwogik sogol ak sogol, komong’ji Jehovah Abram, ak kolenji, A Kamuktaindet ne bo Kamuktaet; wendote tainnyu, ak iegu ne igesunotgei." 
Genesis17:2 Ak agonu kayomisennyu konyo kwenunnyo, inye ak ane, ak atesin mising’ kot." 
Genesis17:3 Ak kiibutyi ng’ony Abram: kong’alal Kamuktaindet ak inendet kolenji," 
Genesis17:4 Keero, eng’ ane anyun, komi kayomisennyu koboten, ak tun iegu kwandab bororiosiek che chang’." 
Genesis17:5 Ma keguurenen Abram agoi, ago kagiguurenen Abraham: amu kaagonin iegu kwandab bororiosiek che chang’." 
Genesis17:6 Ak aberurin mising’ eng’ iyotet, ak ayai bororiosiek eng’ inye, ak komong’unenen laitorinik." 
Genesis17:7 Ak agimiti kayomisennyu eng’ kwenunnyo, inye ak ane, ak iyoteng’ung’ ne biitu let eng’ inye, eng’ ibinwekwak tugul, si koek kayomiset ne wendi agoi koigeny, ale aek Kamuktaindet eng’ inye ak eng’ iyoteng’ung’ ne biitu let eng’ inye." 
Genesis17:8 Ak agonin emoni iwendote, inye koboto lagoguk che biitu let eng’ inye, agot emet komugul ne bo Kanan, kobunjok koigeny; ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa." 
Genesis17:9 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet Abraham, Rib anyun inye kayomisennyu, inye ak lagoguk che biitu let eng’ inye, eng’ ibinwekwak tugul." 
Genesis17:10 Kayomisennyu ni, ne kanyol orib, eng’ kwenunnyo, inye ak ane, ak lagoguk che biitu let eng’ inye: kiyatitoi ng’etet age tugul eng’ okwek." 
Genesis17:11 Ak kimuratani iririotab borwekwok, ak egu noto kaborunet ne bo kayomiset eng’ kwenunnyo, ane ak okwek." 
Genesis17:12 Kiyatitoi ng’etet age tugul eng’ okwek ne kagotar betusiek sisiit, ng’etet age tugul eng’ ibinwekwok tugul, ne kisikyin gorikwok, ak ne kigiale fedaisiek eng’ toek alak tugul, ne masalwok." 
Genesis17:13 Kanyol keyatita ne kisikyin gong’ung’, ak ne kiale fedaisieguk: ak kotebe kayomisennyu borwekwok koek kayomiset ne bo koigeny." 
Genesis17:14 Ak ng’etet age tugul ne ma kimuratan iririotab bortanyi, king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik, amu kibut kayomisennyu." 
Genesis17:15 Ak kimwachi Kamuktaindet Abraham, kolenji, Sarai osotiondeng’ung’, ko mata iguure kainennyi Sarai, ago kagoek kainennyi Sara." 
Genesis17:16 Ak aberur inendet, ak ne siirei, ko kaagochi inendet kosigun werit: ee, aberuri inendet, ak egu kametab bororiosiek; ak komong’une inendet laitorinikab bik." 
Genesis17:17 Ak kiing’uruk anyun Abraham, kotokyi togennyi ng’ony, korori ak kole eng’ muguleldanyi, Tos kisikyi lakwet chito ne kigotar kenyisiek bogol? Ak tos ta kosich lakwet Sara agine, ne kigotar kenyisiek tamanwogik sogol?" 
Genesis17:18 Ak kilenji Abraham Kamuktaindet, Kata mie kosob Ismael eng’ taing’ung’." 
Genesis17:19 Ak kile Kamuktaindet, Achicha, sigun iman Sara kaing’ung’ werit; ak tun iguure kainennyi Isak: ak agimiti kayomisennyu koboto inendet ak iyotennyi ne tun biitu let eng’ inendet, si koek kayomiset ne wendi agoi koigeny." 
Genesis17:20 Ak kaagasun ng’alek agobo Ismael: keero, kaaberur inendet, ak agochini inendet iyotet, ak abaroi inendet mising’ inne, ak tun sichei bounik taman ak aeng’ ak agochini koek bororiet ne o." 
Genesis17:21 Ago agimiti kayomisennyu eng’ Isak, inendet ne tun sigun Sara eng’ kenyit ne nyonei eng’ betusiechuto." 
Genesis17:22 Ak kiiges ng’alalet ne king’alali ak inendet, ak kitogosta Kamuktaindet kobagakta Abraham." 
Genesis17:23 Ak kinam Abraham werinnyi Ismael, ak tugul che kigisikyin gonnyi, koboto tugul che kigiale fedaisiek, muren age tugul ne bo gotab Abraham, ak komuratan iririotab borwekwak eng’ betunoto, ko u ye kiga mwachi Kamuktaindet inendet." 
Genesis17:24 Ak kiga kotar Abraham kenyisiek tamanwogik sogol ak sogol, yoto ye kigimuratani inendet." 
Genesis17:25 Ak ki bo Ismael werinnyi kenyisiek taman ak somok, yoto ye kigimuratani." 
Genesis17:26 Kigiyatita betunoto Abraham ak werinnyi Ismael. 
Genesis17:27 Ak kigiyatita koboto inendet murenik tugul che bo gonnyi, agot icheget che kigisikyin gonnyi, ak che kigiale fedaisiek eng’ toek." 
Genesis18:1 Kimong’ji Jehovah Abraham eng’ ye negite ketikab Mamre, ye kitebyei eng’ kurgetab emainnyi ko kang’wanit asis;" 
Genesis18:2 ak kitobendo ak kigeer bik somok kotonondos ko kaitoorjigei inendet: ak ye kingogeer, kolabat eng’ kurgetab emainnyi kotorokta icheget, ak kong’uruk agoi ng’ony." 
Genesis18:3 Ak kole, Kiptaiyandennyu, ngot ko kaanyoru mieindo eng’ taing’ung’, asain ale, amesiirtoe otwogindeng’ung’:" 
Genesis18:4 ingeibwok beek tutigin, si oune kelyekwok, ak omuuny eng’ ketit kel:" 
Genesis18:5 si aibwok amitwogik tutigin, si ogimegitu; ye ibata osiirte: kobwanjini otwogindeng’wong’ agobo noto. Ak kile ichek, Yai ko u yoto kaimwa." 
Genesis18:6 Ak kichakta Abraham kwo go ole mi Sara eng’ emait, ak kolenji, Chob kerutik somok che bo busiek che tambulul ak ichokyi si ikwanykwany ak ibeel kobwa makatinik che lebelen." 
Genesis18:7 Ak kilabat Abraham ole mi tuga kwo koget barnotiot ne mie, ak kogochi otwogindet kochob kochokyi." 
Genesis18:8 Ak konam mwaitab chego, ak chego, ak barnotiondonoto kaga kochob, koipchi konde tainywa; ak kotonon inendet eng’ ole negite ichek eng’ ketit kel. Koamis anyun bichoto." 
Genesis18:9 Ak kilenji ichek inendet, Mi ano Sara kwondong’ung’? Kolenji, Mi go." 
Genesis18:10 Ak kimwa inendet kole, Aweekyininge iman eng’ kenyit ne nyonei eng’ betusiechuto; ak keero, sichei kwondong’ung’ Sara werit. Ak kiebe it Sara, komi kurgetab emait, ne kimi batai." 
Genesis18:11 Ak kiga koosegitu Abraham ak Sara, kiga kotar kenyisiek che chang’; ak kiga kong’et iyotetab Sara." 
Genesis18:12 Kirori anyun Sara eng’ muguleldanyi, kole, Tos ta abaibaitu ago kogotertera osindo, ak kagoosit agine kiptaiyandennyu?" 
Genesis18:13 Ak kilenji Jehovah Abraham, Amu nee si korori Sara, kole, Tos ta amuchi iman ane asich lakwet, ko kaaositu?" 
Genesis18:14 Tos mi kiy age tugul ne temene Jehovah? Aweekyininge eng’ kenyit ne nyonei, eng’ betusiechuto, eng’ betut ne kaachob, ak kosich Sara werit." 
Genesis18:15 Kitiiyo anyun Sara, kole, Ma arori; amu kiiywei. Ak kilenji, Achicha; kerori." 
Genesis18:16 King’eetyo anyun bichoto koba eng’ yoto, kotokyigei Sodom: ak kiwa Abraham koboto icheget koyomis." 
Genesis18:17 Ak kile Jehovah, Tos aung’e Abraham kit ne amache ayai;" 
Genesis18:18 amu tun egu iman Abraham bororiet ne o ne tinyei kimnatet, ak kiberuri bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony eng’ inendet?" 
Genesis18:19 Amu kaalewen inendet si komuch koboi lagokyik ak gonnyi che biitu let eng’ inendet, si kobiit korib oretab Jehovah, koyai ne bo iman ak kiruoget; si kobiit kosuldochi Jehovah Abraham kit ne kimwa agobo inendet." 
Genesis18:20 Ak kile Jehovah, O kateiyetab Sodom ak Gomora, samisen tengekwogikwak mising’;" 
Genesis18:21 kachortege anyun nguno amu noto si ageer ngo kigoyai iman ko u kateiyenywa, ne kigonyonja; ak ngo ma u noto, anai." 
Genesis18:22 Ak kiweeigei bichoto eng’ oloto, koba kotokyigei Sodom: ago kita kotononi Abraham eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Genesis18:23 Ak kirikyi Abraham Jehovah, ak koteebe kolenji, Tos iwong’u bik che bo iman koboto che yaachen?" 
Genesis18:24 Ngot komi bik che bo iman konomu eng’ nganaset: ko tos iwong’u amerire nganaset agobo bichoto konom che bo iman che mi oloto? 
Genesis18:25 Ingolooit eng’ inye, yaet ne u nito, ibar che bo iman koboto che yaachen, si kogergeit che bo iman ak che yaachen; ingolooit eng’ inye: tos mayaei iman Kiruogindet ne bo ng’onyuni komugul?" 
Genesis18:26 Ak kile Jehovah, Ngot anyorji Sodom bik konom che bo iman, arire anyun oloto tugul amu ichek." 
Genesis18:27 Ak kiwolji Abraham kole, Keero, kaagany ang’alalji Kiptaiyat, ago ane ko a temburiek ak ko a orek kityo:" 
Genesis18:28 tos ngot ko ma biit bik mutu eng’ bik konom che bo iman: ko tos ing’em nganaset komugul amu bik mut che mami? Ak kile, Mang’eme agot anyorji bik artam ak mut." 
Genesis18:29 Ak kita kong’alalji kogeny kolenji, Ngot anyun kenyorji artam? Kole, Mayae kiy amu choto artam." 
Genesis18:30 Ak kile, Amat konerech Kiptaiyat, si kota ang’alal: ngot anyun kenyorji sosom? Kole, Mayae kiy, ngot anyorji sosom oloto." 
Genesis18:31 Ak kile, Keero, kaagany ang’alalji Kiptaiyat: ngot anyun kenyorji tiptem oloton? Kole, Mang’eme amu choto tiptem." 
Genesis18:32 Ak kile, amat konerech Kiptaiyat, si kota amwa ni kityo: Ngot anyun kenyorji taman oloto? Kole, Mang’eme amu choto taman." 
Genesis18:33 Kiwa Jehovah anyun bandanyi, ye kingogesgei ng’alalet ne king’alali ak Abraham: ak kiweeigei Abraham kwo oldanyi." 
Genesis19:1 Kiit anyun malaikaisiechoto aeng’u Sodom koskoleny; ak kimi Lot ormarichetab Sodom: ak kigeer Lot ichek, kong’eet kotorokta, ak kong’uruk kot kotiiny togennyi ng’ony;" 
Genesis19:2 ak kole, Kasaak ale, omosu, obwa anyun kiptainikyuk gotab otwogindeng’wong’, ak otebi kemouni komugul, ak oun kelyek, si osib ong’eetye, omuste. Ak kile ichek, Achicha, kitebe sang’ kemout komugul." 
Genesis19:3 Ak kiigaigai Lot mising’; kimasta anyun ichek koba gonnyi: ak kiyachi inendet igorta, kobeelji makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, si koam ichek." 
Genesis19:4 Ago ye kitomo koruiyo, kobwa bikab nganaset, bichoto bo Sodom, neranik koboto che osen, bik tugul che kibun komasta age tugul, kobwa koyiem got:" 
Genesis19:5 ak kiguur Lot kolenji, Ngorjo bik che kabwa gong’ung’ kemouni? Imutwech kobwa sang’, si kobiit kenai ichek." 
Genesis19:6 Ak kimanda Lot kwo ole mi ichek eng’ kurgat, ak koger kurget." 
Genesis19:7 Ak kilenji, Asaak, che kitupche, amoyai sogornatani te ni." 
Genesis19:8 Ogeero, atinye tibik aeng’ che tom kotuiyo ak chi; ochamwa amutwak, si oyachi ko u ye ogeere: ago amoyachi kiy bichu; amu kagobwa gonnyu." 
Genesis19:9 Ak kile, Istege. Ak kole, Kitoondenjinech chichi, ago kaga machei koek kiruogindet: kimache anyun keyaun ne ya kosiir icheget. Ak kirieb mising’ ichek chichoto, noto ko Lot, ak korikyi kurget kolen kobut." 
Genesis19:10 Ak kiiyogoito eunekwak bichoto, kochuut Lot konyo go, ak koger kurget." 
Genesis19:11 Ak kibire koratet bichoto kimitei kurgetab got, che mengechen ak che eechen; agoi kong’etyo kocheng’ei kurget." 
Genesis19:12 Ak koteebe bichoto Lot kolenji, Tos ta itinye alak? Ngo mi sandetab cheptang’ung’, ak weriguk, ak tibiguk, ak chi age tugul ne itinye ne mi nganaset; imut komanda eng’ olito." 
Genesis19:13 Amu kimache keng’em olito, amu kogoeet kateiyenywa eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kagoyokwech Jehovah kebwa keng’em." 
Genesis19:14 Ak kimanda Lot, kwo kong’alal ak sanik che kiitun tibikyik, kolenji, Ong’eetye, oba eng’ olito; amu machei kong’em Jehovah nganasani. Ago ki u inendet eng’ sanichato chito ne urerenjin." 
Genesis19:15 Ak ye kingoeech, kochirji malaikaisiek Lot, kolenji, Ng’eet, imut kaing’ung’, ak tipchuguget aeng’ mitei yu; si ma kiwong’un amu tengektab nganasani" 
Genesis19:16 Ago kiigagei: ak konam bichoto eut, ak eutab osotiondennyi, ak eunekab tibikyik aeng’; amu kirire Jehovah inendet: ak kiimaanda eng’ nganaset, ak kobagakta eng’ sang’." 
Genesis19:17 Ak ye kingo kagomaanda, kolenji, Mwei, soruge; amat igeer let, ametonone oldo tugul eng’ atebwoni; mwechi tulwet, si ma kiwong’un." 
Genesis19:18 Ak kilenji Lot, Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu:" 
Genesis19:19 asain ale, kagonyor otwogindeng’ung’ chamet eng’ taing’ung’, ak kaites rireneng’ung’ bo ge ne kaiborua, amu kesoru sobondanyu; ago anyun, mamuchi amwechi tulwet, si manyorua nyalil, ak kogona ame:" 
Genesis19:20 keer anyun-o, negit nganasani, mie amwechi, amu ming’in: Ee, chamwa amwechi (tos ma nganaset ne ming’in?) Si kosob sobondanyu." 
Genesis19:21 Ak kilenji, Kaagasun agobo ng’olyondonito agine, ale mang’eme awong’u nganasanato kaimwa." 
Genesis19:22 Chakte, mwechi oloto; amu mamuchi ayai kiy agoi iit oloto. Kigiguure Soar nganasanato amu noto." 
Genesis19:23 Kiga kochor asista ye kingoitei Lot Soar. 
Genesis19:24 Eng’ yoto anyun kotumji Jehovah Sodom ak Gomora koik che laldos ak mat che bunu Jehovah eng’ kipsengwet; 
Genesis19:25 ak king’em kobeel nganasochoto, ak atebwet komugul, ak bik tugul che kimenyei nganasochoto, ak tuguk tugul che bitos eng’ ng’ony." 
Genesis19:26 Ago kigusgong’ osotiotab Lot eng’ let, ak kiwalak koek tulwet ne ming’in ne bo munyuk." 
Genesis19:27 Ak king’eet Abraham karon komusta kwo agoi koit ole kitonone eng’ taitab Jehovah: 
Genesis19:28 ak kitobendo kogeerot olin bo Sodom ak Gomora, agot emet tugul ne bo atebwet, ak kigeer iyeto ne bo emet kotogostoi ko u iyeto ne bo mat ne o mising’." 
Genesis19:29 Ak kingo kagong’em Kamuktaindet nganasok che bo atebwet kowong’, kobwat anyun Kamuktaindet Abraham ak komaanda Lot komandae ng’emisiet, ye kingo kagong’em kowong’ nganasok, ole kimenyei Lot." 
Genesis19:30 Kitogosta anyun Lot kwo Soar, kwo komeny tulwet, koboto tibikyik aeng’; amu kiiywei komeny Soar; ak kimeny kebenet, inendet ak tibikyik aeng’." 
Genesis19:31 Kilenji anyun ne o ne ming’in, Kagoosit kwandanyo, ak mami mureno emet komugul ne imuchi korikyech ko u biteetab ng’ony komugul:" 
Genesis19:32 nginage kwandanyo maiyek si kobiit keruiye ak inendet, si kerib iyotetab kwandanyo." 
Genesis19:33 Ak kiinaga kwandanywa maiyek kemounoto ak kiwa ne o kwo koruiyo ak kwandanyi, ak kima nai inendet ye kiruitos tuwai, anan ye king’eetei." 
Genesis19:34 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi noto, kolenji ne o ne ming’in, Keero, kogiruiye lagat ak baba: nginage maiyek kemouni bo ra kogeny; ak iwe inye oruiye tuwai, si kerib iyotetab kwandanyo." 
Genesis19:35 Ak kiinaga maiyek kwandanywa kogeny kemounoto: king’eet anyun ne ming’in, kwo koruiyo ak inendet ak kima nai inendet ye kiruitos tuwai, anan ye king’eetei." 
Genesis19:36 Kimanach anyun tibikab Lot tuwai komanage kwandanywa. 
Genesis19:37 Ak kisich ne o werit, ak kiguure kainennyi Moab: inendet ko kwandab Moabik agoi ra." 
Genesis19:38 Ak kisich ne ming’in agine werit, ak kiguure kainennyi Ben-ami: inendet ko kwandab Amonik agoi ra." 
Genesis20:1 Ak kiu Abraham eng’ oloto kwo emet ne bo Murot ne bo Tai, kwo komeny kwenutab Kades ak Sur: kiek toondet eng’ Gerar." 
Genesis20:2 Kimwa Abraham agobo Sara osotiondennyi, kole, Inendet ko tupchennyu: ak kiiyokto Abimelek laitoriatab Gerar, kimutyi Sara." 
Genesis20:3 Ago kinyonji Kamuktaindet Abimelek eng’ karuotitoet kemoi kolenji, Keero, i chito ne kagome, amu kwondo ne kaimutyige; amu inendet ko osotiotab chi." 
Genesis20:4 Ago kitomo korikyi Abimelek inendet: ak kilenji, Ee Kiptaiyat, tos ibare agot bororiet ne bo iman?" 
Genesis20:5 Tos ma mwawa inendet kole, Inendet ko tupchennyu? Ak kimwa osotiondonoto agine kole, Inendet ko tupchennyu: kiayai nito eng’ muguleldo ne bo iman ak eng’ eunek che tililen." 
Genesis20:6 Ak kimwachi Kamuktaindet inendet eng’ karuotitoet, kolenji, Wei, angen ale kiiyae nito muguleldang’ung’ ne bo iman, ak kiaetenen agane si meyaiywa tengek: noto anyun ma achamun itwa inendet." 
Genesis20:7 Ara anyun imutyi nguno kwonyi chitab kobo; amu maotio inendet si kosa agobo inye, si isob: ago ngo meweekyi, inai ile, imee iman, inye, ak tugul che itinye che mi koboten." 
Genesis20:8 King’eet anyun Abimelek karon mising’, ak koguur otwogikyik tugul, ak komwachi tuguchoto tugul koba itikwak: ak kiiyweis bichoto mising’." 
Genesis20:9 Kiguur anyun Abimelek Abraham, koteebe kolenji, Koiyaiywech nee? Ak nee chalwok ne koayaun, kot igesenja ak bororiennyu tengegi te ni? Koiyaiywa tuguk che manyolu keyai." 
Genesis20:10 Ak kilenji Abimelek Abraham, Koigeer nee, si iyai kii?" 
Genesis20:11 Ak kile Abraham, Kialen, mami olito iman kaiyweetab Kamuktaindet: ak, imuchi kobara amu kwondanyu." 
Genesis20:12 Ago iman, inendet ko tupchennyu, bo sietab chebiosennyo; ak kiatun:" 
Genesis20:13 ak ye kingo kagomoong’wa Kamuktaindet eng’ gotab baba, ak kogona awendot, alenji anyun inendet, Rireneng’ung’ ni ne tun iborua; imwae eng’ komasta age tugul ole kibendi ile, Inendet ko tupchennyu." 
Genesis20:14 Kiigochi anyun Abimelek Abraham kechirek ak tuga, ak otwogik che murenik ak otwogik che tibik, ak koweekyi Abraham Sara osotiondennyi." 
Genesis20:15 Ak kilenji Abimelek, Keero, mi taing’ung’ emoninyu: meny ole ichame." 
Genesis20:16 Ak kilenji Sara, Keero, kaagochi tupcheng’ung’ fedaisiek elfut agenge: ak koek choto che tugun konyek eng’ bik che mi koboten, ak kagiityin imanda eng’ taitab bik tugul." 
Genesis20:17 Kisa anyun Abraham Kamuktaindet, ak kiisoob Kamuktaindet Abimelek, ak osotiondennyi, ak chebaigeinikyik; ak kisich lagok." 
Genesis20:18 Amu kiga korat Jehovah mootinwek tugul che bo gotab Abimelek, amu Sara kwondab Abraham." 
Genesis21:1 Kirutochi Jehovah Sara ko u ye kiga mwa, kiyachi Jehovah Sara ko u ye kiga ng’alalji." 
Genesis21:2 Ak kimanach Sara, ak kisikyi Abraham werit eng’ osindanyi, eng’ betunoto ne kiga koarorji Kamuktaindet." 
Genesis21:3 Ak kiguure Abraham kainetab werinnyi ne kigisikyi, Isak, ne kisikyi Sara." 
Genesis21:4 Ak kiyatita Abraham werinnyi Isak eng’ betut ne bo sisiit, ko u ye kiga ng’at Kamuktaindet inendet." 
Genesis21:5 Ak kiga kotar Abraham kenyisiek bogol, si kesikyin werinnyi Isak." 
Genesis21:6 Ak kile Sara, Kagona Kamuktaindet arori; ak age tugul ne kasei ng’olyondoni kororiei kobota." 
Genesis21:7 Ak kile, Ng’o ne kita mwachin Abraham kolenjin, reriei lagok Sara? Amu kaasikyi werit eng’ osindanyi." 
Genesis21:8 Kiner anyun lakwet, ak kigiluge: ak kiyai Abraham igorta ne o eng’ betut ne kigiluge Isak." 
Genesis21:9 Ak kigeer Sara weritab Hagar Chemisriot, ne kiga sikyi Abraham, kosasei." 
Genesis21:10 Kimwachi anyun Abraham kolenji, On chebiosoni otwogin ak werinnyi: amu manamei tuguk weritab chebiosoni otwogin koboto werinnyu Isak." 
Genesis21:11 Ak kiyait mising’ ng’olyondoni eng’ Abraham agobo werinnyi. 
Genesis21:12 Kimwachi Kamuktaindet Abraham kolenji, Amegeer ko ya ng’olyondoni eng’ inye amu weri, ak amu chebiosoning’ung’ otwogin; kas ng’alekab Sara eng’ tuguchoto tugul kamwaun: amu bunu Isak oretab iyoteng’ung’." 
Genesis21:13 Ak tun ayae weritab chebiosoni otwogin agine koek bororiet, amu inendet ko iyoteng’ung’." 
Genesis21:14 Ak king’eet anyun Abraham karon mising’ ak kiib amitwogik ak sotet ne bo beek, kogochi Hagar ak lakwet, ak kiindechi tigikyennyi, ak kilenji, Ui, anyun: ak kiwa anyun, koombenot eng’ ong’atetab Beer-Seba." 
Genesis21:15 Ak kiigesgei beek eng’ sotet, ak kibagakta lakwet eng’ sondit orit." 
Genesis21:16 Yeityo kwo koteb ng’ony kotoorjigei inendet, eng’ ye loo kitigin, ye itei kipchabet ngemwokto: amu kile, Si mageer meetab lakwet. Kitebi kotoorjigei inendet, ak kiwaach korir." 
Genesis21:17 Ak kigas Kamuktaindet kutitab weroto ak kiguur malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet ne mi kipsengwet Hagar, ak kilenji inendet, Amin nee, Hagar? Ameiywei; amu kagogas Kamuktaindet kutitab lakwet eng’ ole mi." 
Genesis21:18 Ng’eet, ui ing’eet lakwet, ak inamate eng’ eung’ung’; amu tun ayae inendet koek bororiet ne o." 
Genesis21:19 Ak iyat Kamuktaindet konyekab kwonyoto, kogeer keringetab beek; ak kiwa, konyiit beek sotet, ak konaga lakwet." 
Genesis21:20 Kimi Kamuktaindet koboto lakwet, ak kiner koeet; ak kimeng’ot ong’atet, koek mwogindet." 
Genesis21:21 Ak kimeng’ot ong’atetab Paran; ak kocheng’ji kamet Chemisriot kotun. 
Genesis21:22 King’alalji eng’ betusiechoto Abimelek ak Pikol inendet ne ki kiptaiyatab askarikyik, Abraham, kolenji, Mitei Kamuktaindet koboten eng’ tuguk tugul che iyae:" 
Genesis21:23 iyosiewa anyun nguno eng’ Kamuktaindet si metila let, anan eng’ werinnyu, anan eng’ mochogoronikyuk; ago ko u rirenet ne kiayaun iyaiywa aginye ko u noto, agot eng’ emet ole kigeegune toondet." 
Genesis21:24 Ak kilenji Abraham, Ayostosi." 
Genesis21:25 Ak kiger kong’ Abraham Abimelek amu keringetab beek, ne kiga rebe otwogikab Abimelek eng’ koromnatet." 
Genesis21:26 Ak kile Abimelek, Mangen inendet ne kiyai kioto: ak kima imwawa, ak kitomo agas ko u ni, kobate ra." 
Genesis21:27 Kinam anyun Abraham kechirek ak tuga, kogochi Abimelek; ak kiiyomisgei ichek tuwai." 
Genesis21:28 Ak kiitaban Abraham subenwek tisab che bo kechir, koba taban ichegei." 
Genesis21:29 Ak kiteebe Abimelek Abraham, kolenji, Bo nee subenwechu bo kechir tisab chu ketaban ichegei?" 
Genesis21:30 Ak kile, Subenwechu tisab bo kechir, ko mie ikweri eng’ eunnyu, si koek baornatet eng’ ane, kobor kole, ane ne kiabale keringonito bo beek." 
Genesis21:31 Kiguure yoto anyun Beer-Seba amu noto; amu kiiyosiechigei tuwai eng’ oloto. 
Genesis21:32 Kiiyomisgei anyun eng’ Beer-Seba: ak king’eet Abimelek, ak Pikol ne ki kiptaiyatab askarikyik, koweeigei koba emetab Pilistik." 
Genesis21:33 Ak kimin Abraham ketit eng’ Beer-Seba, ak kiguur eng’ oloto kainetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo Koigeny." 
Genesis21:34 Ak kiek toondet Abraham eng’ emetab Pilistik betusiek che chang’. 
Genesis22:1 Kingobata tuguchoto, kotiem Kamuktaindet Abraham, kolenji, Abraham; ak kile, Ami yu." 
Genesis22:2 Kolenji, Imut wering’ung’, noto ne inegei, ne ichame, Isak, ui agoi emetab Moria; si igoite eng’ oloto koek kagochinet ne kibeelei eng’ tulwet age ne tun amwaun." 
Genesis22:3 Ak king’eet Abraham karon mising’ komusta, ak kiito kit ne kitebe eng’ sigiriennyi si kobiit kolany, ak kiimut murenik aeng’ eng’ che kitinyei, koba koboto inendet, ak Isak werinnyi; ak kibet kwenik che bo kagochinet ne kibeelei, yeityo koba ole kiga koarorji Kamuktaindet." 
Genesis22:4 Kitobendo Abraham eng’ betut ne bo somok ak kigeer koronoto kota ko loo. 
Genesis22:5 Ak kilenji Abraham murenjoto chiget, Otebi eng’ yu koboto sigiriet, ak kebe olin ak weri; si kesa, ak keweeige kogeny." 
Genesis22:6 Ak kinam Abraham kwenik che bo kagochinet ne kibeelei, kosutyi Isak werinnyi; ak kiib inendet eng’ eunnyi mat ak rotwet; ak kiba tuwai." 
Genesis22:7 King’alalji anyun Isak kwandanyi Abraham, kolenji, Aba, ak kile, Ami yu, werinnyu. Ak kile, Keero, mi yu mat ak kwenik: ago mi ano aruetab kechir ne egu kagochinet ne kibeelei?" 
Genesis22:8 Ak kilenji Abraham, Werinnyu, cheng’jingei Kamuktaindet aruetab kechir ne egu kagochinet ne kibeelei: yeityo koba tuwai." 
Genesis22:9 Ak kiit koronoto ole kiga koarorji Kamuktaindet; ak koteech Abraham kaptisisiet eng’ oloto, ak kitet kwenik, yeityo korat werinnyi Isak, ak kiinde inendet kwenik barak eng’ kaptisisiet." 
Genesis22:10 Kiiyogoito anyun eunnyi Abraham, konam rotwet kolen kobare werinnyi." 
Genesis22:11 Eng’ yoto anyun koguur inendet malaikayatab Jehovah eng’ kipsengwet kolenji, Abraham, Abraham: kole, Ami yu." 
Genesis22:12 Kolenji, Ametwa lakwet, ameyachi kiy tugul: amu kaanai nguno ale, igonyiti Kamuktaindet, amu ma ietena wering’ung’, ne wering’ung’ ne inegei." 
Genesis22:13 Kotobendo Abraham ak kogusgong’; ogeero, mengit ne kanam sondit kuinoikyik; ak kiwa Abraham koget mengit, si koeny koek kogochinet ne kibeelei, kogeere werinnyi." 
Genesis22:14 Ak kiguure Abraham yoto Jehovah-jireh: ko u ye kimwaei agoi kora, kele, Kigonune tulwetab Jehovah." 
Genesis22:15 Ak kiguur ne bo aeng’ malaikaiyatab Jehovah Abraham eng’ kipsengwet," 
Genesis22:16 kolenji, Kayosiechige anege, mwaei Jehovah, amu keyai kii, ma ietena wering’ung’ ne inegei." 
Genesis22:17 Eng’ kaberuret aberurin, ak eng’ kayabet ayabi iyoteng’ung’ kobarait kotenit kecheik che bo kipsengwetisiek, ak kotenit ng’aniek che bo ngegutab nyanjet; ak tun nyoboni lagoguk kurgetab bunikwak;" 
Genesis22:18 ak tun kiberuri bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony eng’ keswondeng’ung’; amu kegas it kutinnyu. 
Genesis22:19 Ak kiweeigei anyun Abraham kwo ole mi murenjugachiget, ak king’eetyo koba tugul agoi Beer-Seba; ak kimeny Abraham Beer-Seba." 
Genesis22:20 Kingobata tuguchuto, kemwachi Abraham, kelenji, Keero, kogosikyi Milka agine ng’etab komet Nahor lagok;" 
Genesis22:21 lakwet ne bo tai ko ki Us, ak ng’etab kamet Bus, ak Kemuel kwandab Aram;" 
Genesis22:22 ak Kesed, Haso, Pildas, Jidlap, ak Betuel." 
Genesis22:23 Ak kisich Betuel Rebeka: chuto sisiit ko kisikyi Milka Nahor ng’etab kametab Abraham. 
Genesis22:24 Ak kisikyi Reuma chebaigeiyandennyi Teba, Gaham, Tahas, ak Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Kenyisiek che kitar Sara kosobei ko ki bogol ak tiptem ak tisab: chuto ko kenyisiek che kitar Sara kosobei. 
Genesis23:2 Ak kimechi Sara Kiriat-arba (noto Hebron), eng’ emetab Kanan: ak kinyo Abraham konyo kote agobo Sara, ak korirji." 
Genesis23:3 Yeityo kong’eet Abraham eng’ ole kimi musto, ak kong’alal ak bikab Het, kolenji," 
Genesis23:4 A kiprutoiyo ak ko a bunotyo eng’ oling’wong’: ogona yeto eng’ oling’wong’ kobunja eng’ ole kitupchin bik atupchi musto, si ma ageere." 
Genesis23:5 Kiwolji bikab Het Abraham anyun, kolenji," 
Genesis23:6 Kasech, kiptaiyandennyu: i bounindet ne bo Kamuktaindet eng’ kwenunnyo: tupchi musto kererit ne kelewen eng’ kererisiekyok; mami chi eng’ achek ne imuchi koetenen kererinnyi si metupchi musto." 
Genesis23:7 King’eet Abraham anyun, kong’urukyi bikab emet, bikab Het." 
Genesis23:8 Ak king’alal koboto ichek kole, Ngochame atub musto si ma ageere, ko mie ogasa, osomwa eng’ Epron weritab Sohar," 
Genesis23:9 kogona kebenennyi, ne mi Makpela, ne mi kiwotetab mbarennyi; ingogona eng’ taing’wong’ ole kitupchin bik kobunja eng’ kamanutiet ne yamegei ne bo feda." 
Genesis23:10 Kitebe anyun Epron kwenutab werikab Het; ak kiwolji Epron Kitindet Abraham kogasei werikab Het, koboto tugul che kimong’ji ormarichetab nganasennyi, kolenji," 
Genesis23:11 Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, ago kasa: kagonin mbaranato koboto kebenet ne mi oloto; kagonin eng’ taitab werikab bikyuk: tupchi musto." 
Genesis23:12 Kiing’uruk Abraham anyun eng’ taitab bikab emet. 
Genesis23:13 Ak king’alal ak Epron, kogasei bikab emet, kole, Ago ngicham, ko mie igasa; agonin kamanutiet ne yamegei ak mbaranato; ee, taach anyun, si atupchi musto olindo." 
Genesis23:14 Kiwolji Epron Abraham kolenji," 
Genesis23:15 Kiptaiyandennyu, kasa, kimoitosi nee ak inye eng’ mbaret ne yamegei kamanutiennyi ak sekelisiek bogol ang’wan che bo feda? Tub musto." 
Genesis23:16 Kigas anyun Abraham ng’alekab Epron; ak kigerji Abraham Epron fedaisiek che kiga mwa inendet eng’ taitab bikab Het, choto ko sekelisiekab feda bogol ang’wan, che kiboisie chemung’arainik." 
Genesis23:17 Kigigamanji anyun komie Abraham mbaretab Epron, ne kimi Makpela, ne itoorjingei Mamre, mbaret, koboto kebenet ne kimi oloto, ak ketik tugul che kimi mbaranato, che kigiyieme kiwotet tugul," 
Genesis23:18 kigigochi Abraham kobunji eng’ taitab werikab Het, ak eng’ taitab tugul che kimong’ji ormarichetab nganasennyi." 
Genesis23:19 Kingobata choto kotub Abraham Sara osotiondennyi eng’ kebenet ne kimi mbaretab Makpela ne itoorjingei Mamre (noto ko Hebron), eng’ emetab Kanan." 
Genesis23:20 Kigamanji anyun bikab Het Abraham mbaret komie ak kebenet ne kimi oloto, koek ole kitupchin bik." 
Genesis24:1 Ak kiga koosit Abraham; kinegit kwo kalilot; ak kiga koberur Jehovah Abraham eng’ tuguk tugul. 
Genesis24:2 Ak kilenji Abraham otwogindennyi, ne o ne bo gonnyi, ne kibou tugukyik tugul, Kaigai inde eung’ung’ kubestanyu:" 
Genesis24:3 amache iyosie eng’ Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo kipsengwetisiek, Kamuktaindet ne bo ng’ony, ale ametunji werinnyu chepto ne bo Kananik che amenye kwenunywa:" 
Genesis24:4 ago ui agoi emennyu, oldab tilionutikyuk, si imutyi osotiot werinnyu Isak." 
Genesis24:5 Kolenji otwogindet inendet, Abere esioi cheboto kosubwa agoi emoni: ara, tos nyolu amut wering’ung’ emonoto kiibunu?" 
Genesis24:6 Kolenji Abraham, Ripge, amemut werinnyu kwo oloto." 
Genesis24:7 Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo kipsengwetisiek, inendet ne kiimoong’wa eng’ gotab baba, ak eng’ emet ne kigisikyina, inendet ne king’alalwa, ak koyosiewa, kole, Agochini lagoguk emoni; iyoktoi inendet malaikaiyandennyi kondoenen, si imutyi werinnyu osotiot eng’ olindo." 
Genesis24:8 Ak ngot ko macham cheboto kosubun, itiagage anyun eng’ kayosioninyu; ago agot nga no, ko memut werinnyu olindo." 
Genesis24:9 Konde anyun otwogindet eunnyi kubestab Abraham kiptaiyandennyi, ak koyosiechi inendet agobo noto." 
Genesis24:10 Ak kikwei otwogindonoto tambesik taman, eng’ tambesik che bo kiptaiyandennyi, ak kwo; koibei tuguk tugul che miachen che bo kiptaiyandennyi; ak king’eet kwo agoi Mesopotamia, agoi nganasetab Nahor." 
Genesis24:11 Ak kichob tambesik kogutung’so eng’ sang’utab nganaset ole negite keringetab beek koskoleny ye bendi kobogorisiek kosiile beek. 
Genesis24:12 Ak kole, Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo kiptaiyandennyu Abraham, asain ale, iberura rani, iyachi ne mie Abraham kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis24:13 Keero, atononi eng’ yu mi kondab beek; ole nyo kosiile beek tibikab bikab nganaset:" 
Genesis24:14 ingocham chepto ne asome alenjini, Ituu toreng’ung’, aee beek; ak kowolwa kolenja, Nganagin iee, ak asiilji tambesiguk agichek: Ingoek noto chepto ne kiilewenji otwogindeng’ung’ Isak; si anai eng’ noto ale, kaiyachi ne mie kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis24:15 Ak kingotom kogesgei ng’alalennyi, ogeero koit Rebeka (ne kigisikyi Betuel weritab Milka, osotiotab Nahor, ng’etab kametab Abraham), koibu terennyi eng’ tigikyet." 
Genesis24:16 Ki chepto ne kararan kot, bergeiyat, ak kitom kotuiyo ak muren: ak kichortagei agoi koit kondab beek, ak konyiit beek terennyi, ak kotogos kogeny." 
Genesis24:17 Kilabat anyun otwogindonoto kotorokta, ak kolenji, Kaigai inaga beek tutigin aee, chu mi teroning’ung’." 
Genesis24:18 Ak kile, Nganagin iee, kiptaiyandennyu: ak kiitu terennyi kochokyi eng’ eunnyi, ak konaga koee." 
Genesis24:19 Ak ye kingo kagonaga beek koee, kolenji, Kaawe asiilji beek tambesik agichek koee, kot kobiyong’so." 
Genesis24:20 Ak kichakta kwo korong’ji beek moinget kogesyi, ak kolabat si kosiil alak eng’ keringet; kisiilji tambesikyik tugul." 
Genesis24:21 Kigeer chichoto anyun kochiilji kong’, kosis; kole, konai ngo kagoberur Jehovah bandanyi anan ngo ma iberur." 
Genesis24:22 Ak kingo kagoee beek tambesik, konam chichoto peteitab tahabu, ne nyigisindanyi koyamei kebebertab sekel, ak karik aeng’ che bo tahabu che bo eunek che yamei sekelisiek taman;" 
Genesis24:23 ak kiteebe kole, I cheptab ng’o? Kaigai imwawa. Tos mi ole kimuchi keru eng’ gotab kwandang’ung’?" 
Genesis24:24 Kolenji, A cheptab Betuel weritab Milka, ne kisikyi Nahor." 
Genesis24:25 Kolenji kogeny, Kitinye mobek ak amitwogik che chang’ che kigigonor che bo tambesik, ak mi boroindo ole ruitos toek." 
Genesis24:26 Ak kiing’uruk chichoto, kolos Jehovah."
