Genesis24:27 Kole, Iberurot Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kiptaiyandennyu Abraham, ne ma ete kiptaiyandennyu rirenennyi bo ge ak imaninnyi: Jehovah ne kiimutwa eng’ oret agoi aitu gotab tupchosiekab kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis24:28 Kolabat anyun cheboto, ak komwachi bik che bo gotab kamet ng’alechato tugul." 
Genesis24:29 Kitinye Rebeka ng’etab kamet, ne kigiguure Laban; kilabat Laban kwo ole mi chichoto eng’ ole mi kondab beek." 
Genesis24:30 Ak ye kingogeer peteit, ak karik che mi eunekab chepkamet, ak ye kingogas ng’alekab Rebeka chepkamet, komwachin ng’alek che kaga mwachi chichoto; kwo anyun ole mi chichoto; ak ogeero, kita kotononi chichoto eng’ ole negite tambesik ole mi kondab beek." 
Genesis24:31 Kwo kolenji, Nyo inye ne iberurot eng’ Jehovah; amu nee si itonon eng’ sang’? Amu kaachob got, ak ole ruitos tambesik." 
Genesis24:32 Kwo go anyun chichoto, yeityo kotiach tuguk che kilau tambesik; ak kiigochi tambesik mobek ak amitwogik che kiga kigonor, ak kiinaga beek koune kelyekyik ak che bo bik che kimi koboto inendet." 
Genesis24:33 Ak kigiipchi amitwogik kinde tainnyi: ago kile, Ma amisiei agoi amwawok ng’olyot ne kagiyogunena. Kolenji, Mwa anyun." 
Genesis24:34 Komwa anyun kole, A otwogindetab Abraham." 
Genesis24:35 Ak kigoberur Jehovah mising’ kiptaiyandennyu; ak kigotoror koeet: kigogochi inendet akwotisiek che bo kechirek ak che bo tuga, ak feda, ak tahabu, otwogik che murenik, otwogik che tibik, tambesik ak sigirok." 
Genesis24:36 Kisikyi kiptaiyandennyu werit Sara osotiondennyi ye kingo kagoosit: ak kigogochi kiptaiyandennyu werinnyi tuguk tugul che tinyei. 
Genesis24:37 Ak kimakwa kiptaiyandennyu ayosio, kole, Ametunji werinnyu cheptab Kananik, che amenye emenywa:" 
Genesis24:38 ago ui gotab baba, oldab tilionutikyuk, iwe imutyi werinnyu chepto kotun." 
Genesis24:39 Ak kialenji kiptaiyandennyi, Abere matun chamei cheboto kosubwa." 
Genesis24:40 Ak kilenja, Iyogu Jehovah ne awendote tainnyi malaikaiyandennyi obe tuwai, koberur bandang’ung’; iwe imutyi werinnyu chepto eng’ tilionutikyuk eng’ gotab baba kotun:" 
Genesis24:41 eng’ yoto anyun itiagage eng’ kayosiennyu, ye kaiit oldab tilionutikyuk; ak ngo magonin cheboto, itiagage anyun eng’ kayosiennyu." 
Genesis24:42 Ak kaitu rani ye mi kondab beek, ak ale, Ee, Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo kiptaiyandennyu Abraham, ngiberur bandanyu:" 
Genesis24:43 keero, atonone yu negite kondab beek; ak igochi kocham chepto ne nyonei kosiilei beek, ak alenji anyun, Kaigai inaga beek tutigin aee, cho mi tereng’ung’;" 
Genesis24:44 ak kowolwa, kole, Nganagin iee, ak asiilji tambesiguk agichek: ingoek noto osotiot ne kagolewenji Jehovah weritab kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis24:45 Ak ye kata ang’alali eng’ muguleldanyu, keero, kochun Rebeka koibu terennyi eng’ tigikyennyi; kochortagei kwo kondab beek kosiil beek: alenji, Kaigai inaga beek aee." 
Genesis24:46 Ak kotu terennyi ne kami tigikyennyi kochokyi, ak kole, Nganagin iee, ak asiilji tambesiguk agichek: aee anyun, yeityo konaga tambesik agichek." 
Genesis24:47 Ak ateebe alenji, I cheptab ng’o? Ak kolenja, A cheptab Betuel, weritab Nahor, ne kisikyi Milka inendet; ande anyun peteit, ak karik eng’ eunekyik." 
Genesis24:48 Ak ang’uruge asa Jehovah, ak aweekyi kongoi Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo kiptaiyandennyu Abraham, ne kigondoiywa eng’ oret ne mie si amutyi werinnyi cheptab ng’etab kametab kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis24:49 Ak nguno anyun ngocham oyachi kiptaiyandennyu ne mie ak ne bo iman, omwawa: ak ngo ma u noto, omwawa si kobiit aweekyige eutab tai, anan ko eutab katam." 
Genesis24:50 Kowolji Laban ak Betuel anyun, kolenji, Bunu Jehovah ng’olyondoni: magimuchi kemwaun ng’olyot ne ya anan ne mie." 
Genesis24:51 Rebeka no, mi taing’ung’, imut, oba, ingoek osotiotab weritab kiptaiyandeng’ung’, ko u ye kimwa Jehovah." 
Genesis24:52 Ak ye kingogas otwogindetab Abraham ng’alekwak, kong’uruk agoi ng’ony eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Genesis24:53 Kiib anyun otwogindet tuguk che bo feda, ak che bo tahabu, ak ngoroik, kogochi Rebeka; ak kogochi ng’etab kamet ak kamet agine tuguk che kororon." 
Genesis24:54 Kiamis ak koeeiso inendet ak bik che kimi koboto inendet, ak kiruiyo: ak kong’eetyo karon, ak kole, Ochamwa awo oldab kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis24:55 Ak kile ng’etab kamet ak kamet, Ingota kotebi lakwani kobotech betusiek che ng’ering’, che te betusiek taman; ak ye ibata choto, kwo." 
Genesis24:56 Ak kimwachi kolenji, Amata ogaa, amu kigoberur Jehovah bandanyu; ochamwa awo gab kiptayandennyu." 
Genesis24:57 Ak kile, Mie keguur lakwanato, konyo keteebe inendet." 
Genesis24:58 Koguur anyun Rebeka, nyo koteebe, kolenji, Tos ichame obe ak chichi? Kole, Wei, awendi." 
Genesis24:59 Kichamji anyun Rebeka ng’etab kamet kwo, koboto cheblakwennyi, ak otwogindetab Abraham, ak bikyik." 
Genesis24:60 Ak kiiberur Rebeka, kolenji, Ne kitupche, egu kametab elfusiek konyil elfusiek taman, ak konyaban lagoguk kurgotikab che wechei icheget." 
Genesis24:61 King’eet anyun Rebeka, ak tibikyik che otwogik, kolany tambesik, kosub chichoto: komut anyun otwogindonoto Rebeka ak koba." 
Genesis24:62 Ak kinyo Isak kobun oretab Beer-lahai-roi; amu kimenyei inendet emetab Murot ne bo Tai. 
Genesis24:63 Ak kiwendoti Isak eng’ kewet koskoleny kobwatoti; ak kitobendo, kogeer, ak ogeero, tambesik che bwanei." 
Genesis24:64 Ak kitobendo Rebeka, ak ye kingogeer Isak, kochorgei eng’ tambesiet." 
Genesis24:65 Ak kiteebe otwogindent kolenji, Ng’o chichin nyonei eng’ kewanin kotorokwech? Kolenji otwogindet, Kiptaiyandennyu noto: ak kinam ngoriet ne bochin metit agoi kelyek kotugegei." 
Genesis24:66 Komwachi otwogindet Isak anyun tuguk tugul che kiga koyai. 
Genesis24:67 Ak kiimut Isak Rebeka kwo emaitab Sara kamennyi, ak kotun Rebeka koek osotiondennyi; ak kicham inendet kot: ak konyor Isak kagaigaet amu kiga kome kamet." 
Genesis25:1 Ak kiitun Abraham osotiot age ne kiguure Ketura. 
Genesis25:2 Ak kisikyi Simran, Joksan, Medan, Midian, Isbak, ak Sua." 
Genesis25:3 Ak kisich Joksan Sheba, ak Dedan. Ak werikab Dedan ko ki Asurik, Letusik, ak Leumik." 
Genesis25:4 Ak werikab Midian ko ki: Epa, Eper, Hanok, Abida, ak Eldaa. Chuto tugul ko ki lagokab Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Ak kiigochi Abraham Isak tuguk tugul che kitinyei. 
Genesis25:6 Ago kiigochi Abraham werikab chebaigeinikyik, che kitinyei, kagochinoik; ak kilenji koba eng’ ole mi werinnyi Isak, koba emetab kong’asis, ye kita kosobei inendet." 
Genesis25:7 Chu ko kenyisiek che kitar Abraham kosobei, kenyisiek bogol ak tamanwogik tisab ak mut." 
Genesis25:8 Kiilil anyun Abraham koga koosit mising’, boiyot ne kiga konyi betusiekyik; ak kigiyum koboto bikyik." 
Genesis25:9 Ak kitub inendet werikyik Isak ak Ismael eng’ kebenetab Makpela, ne mi mbaretab Epron, weritab Sohar Hitindet, ne tokyingei Mamre;" 
Genesis25:10 mbaret ne kiale Abraham bikab Het: yoto ye kigitupchi Abraham, ak Sara osotiondennyi." 
Genesis25:11 Ak kingo kagobata meetab Abraham, koberur Kamuktaindet Isak werinnyi; ak kimeny Isak ole negite keringetab beek ne kiguure Beer-lahari-roi." 
Genesis25:12 Chu ko ortinwekab Ismael, weritab Abraham, ne kisikyi Hagar Chemisriot otwogindetab Sara, Abraham." 
Genesis25:13 Chu ko kainaikab werikab Ismael, ko u kainaikwak, ko u ortinwekwak: lakwet ne bo tai ne bo Ismael ko Nebaiot; ak Kedar, Adbeel, ak Mibsam," 
Genesis25:14 Misma, Duma ak Masa;" 
Genesis25:15 Hadad, Tema, Jetur, Napis, ak Kedema:" 
Genesis25:16 chu ko werikab Ismael, ak chu kainaikwak, eng’ nganasokwak, ak eng’ meng’otenywa; bounik taman ak aeng’ ko u bororiosiekwak." 
Genesis25:17 Ak chu ko kenyisiekab Ismael che kitar kosobei, kenyisiek bogol ak sosom ak tisab: si kome; ak kigiyum koboto bikyik." 
Genesis25:18 Ak kimeng’ot koboch Abila agoi Sur ne tokyingei Misri, eng’ oret ne wendi Asuria: kiwa komeny oloto eng’ taitab tupchosiekyik tugul." 
Genesis25:19 Chu ko ortinwekab Isak, weritab Abraham: kisichei Abraham Isak:" 
Genesis25:20 ki bo Isak kenyisiek artam si kotuni Rebeka, cheptab Betuel Suriaindet ne bo Padan-aram, chepkametab Laban Suriaindet." 
Genesis25:21 Ak kirirji Isak Jehovah mising’ agobo osotiondennyi, amu ki sonen: ak kigasyi Jehovah rirekyik, ak kimanach Rebeka osotiondennyi." 
Genesis25:22 Ak kiibelgei lagok eng’ moennyi; ak kile, Ngot ko u noto, ko kalya si ateb ko u ni? Ak kiwa koteebe Jehovah." 
Genesis25:23 Ak kilenji Jehovah, Mitei moeng’ung’ bororiosiek aeng’u, Ak tun pcheegei bororiosiek aeng’u che bunu moeng’ung’; Ak kogimitu bororiet age kosiir age; Ak koot ne o ne ming’in." 
Genesis25:24 Ak kingoit anyun betunnyi ne bo siget, ogeero, kimi saramek moennyi." 
Genesis25:25 Ak kiindoi ne o ak ki birir, ki sabul borto tugul ko u sambut; ak kiguure kainennyi Esau." 
Genesis25:26 Ak kongobata noto kesich ng’etab kamet, ak kinamonu kwariatab Esau; ak kigiguure kainennyi Jakobo: ak ki bo Isak kenyisiek tamanwogik lo ye kingosichei osotiondennyi lagochoto." 
Genesis25:27 Kieegitu werjoto: ki kiplogotiot ne ng’om Esau, chito ne bo timin; ak Jakobo ko ki chito ne tala ne kimeng’oti emaisiek." 
Genesis25:28 Ak kichamei Isak Esau, amu kiamei banyek che kiibune loget: ak kichamei Rebeka Jakobo." 
Genesis25:29 Ak kochob Jakobo sogoriek, ak kiit Esau kobunu timin, ko kang’et mising’." 
Genesis25:30 Kolenji anyun Esau Jakobo, Kaigai, ibaena tuguchu biriren amu katanui: kigiguure kainennyi anyun Edom amu noto." 
Genesis25:31 Ak kilenji Jakobo, Aldawa rani etunateng’ung’ ne bo siget." 
Genesis25:32 Ak kole Esau, Keero, negit ame: tos tilei nee eng’ ane etunatet ne bo siget?" 
Genesis25:33 Ak kilenji Jakobo, Iyosiewa rani; ak kiiyosiechi anyun inendet ak kialdochi Jakobo etunatennyi ne bo siget." 
Genesis25:34 Ak kiigochi Jakobo Esau makatiat ak sogoriek; ak kiam ak koee, ak king’eet kwo: mata koiit anyun Esau etunatennyi ne bo siget koek kiy." 
Genesis26:1 Kibiit rubet eng’ emonoto ne ter eng’ rubet ne ki bo tai, ne kimi eng’ betusiekab Abraham. Kiwa Isak oldab Abimelek, laitoriatab Pilistik, agoi Gerar." 
Genesis26:2 Ak kimong’ji Jehovah inendet, ak kolenji, Amerekte iwe Misri; tebe emet ne ta aborun;" 
Genesis26:3 egu toondet eng’ emoni, ami koboten, ak aberurin; amu agonin inye, koboto lagoguk, emotinwechuto tugul, ak agimit kayosiet, ne kiayosiechi kwandang’ung’ Abraham;" 
Genesis26:4 Ak abaroi iyoteng’ung’ ko u kecheik che bo kipsengwetisiek, ak agochini iyoteng’ung’ emotinwechu tugul; ak kiberuri bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony eng’ iyoteng’ung’;" 
Genesis26:5 amu kigas it kutinnyu Abraham, ak kinam kotigonutikyuk, ak karureiywekyuk, ak etanutikyuk, ak ng’atutikyuk." 
Genesis26:6 Ak kimeny Isak Gerar. 
Genesis26:7 Ak kiteebe bikab oloto agobo osotiondennyi; ak kile, Inendet ko chebeiyo: amu kiiywei komwa kole, Osotiondennyu; amu kilen, si mabara bikab emoni agobo Rebeka: amu ki kararan kwonyoto." 
Genesis26:8 Ak ye kingo kagotebe oloto betusiek che chang’, koititoe Abimelek, laitoriatab Pilistik, tirisiet, kogeer kole, urerendos Isak ak Rebeka osotiondennyi." 
Genesis26:9 Ak kiguur Abimelek Isak, nyo kolenji, Osotiondeng’ung’ ni iman: kalya si imwa ile, Inendet ko chebeiyo? Ak kilenji Isak inendet, Kiamwae ko u noto ale, si mamei agobo inendet." 
Genesis26:10 Ak kilenji Abimelek, Nee ni koiyaiywech? Kota iibwech ng’ogisto, amu ko nyamnyum koruiyo chi ak osotiondeng’ung’." 
Genesis26:11 Ak king’at Abimelek bik tugul kolenji, Kibarei chi age tugul ne twaei chichi anan osotiondennyi." 
Genesis26:12 Ak kigolso Isak eng’ emonoto, ak kinyor eng’ kenyinoto konyil bogol: ak kiiberur Jehovah inendet." 
Genesis26:13 Ak kigieet mising’, ak kotesak berurtanyi kot kochang’it agoi koeet kot:" 
Genesis26:14 ak kitinyei akwotisiek che bo kechirek, ak che bo tuga, ak bik che chang’ che bo gonnyi: agoi koam ng’etkong’ Pilistik amu inendet." 
Genesis26:15 Ak kiger Pilistik beek che bo keringonik tugul, che kiga kobal otwogikab kwandanyi Abraham, ak kotime ng’ung’unyek." 
Genesis26:16 Kolenji anyun Abimelek Isak, Istoeneige; amu kiieetu, igimitu, isiirech." 
Genesis26:17 Ak kiwa Isak eng’ oloto, kwo koteech emaisiekyik eng’ atebwetab Gerar, ak komeny oloto." 
Genesis26:18 Ak kibal Isak kogeny keringonikab beek che kiga kebal eng’ betusiekab kwandanyi Abraham; amu kiga kotim Pilistik ye kingo kagome Abraham: ak kiguure kainaik che kiga kotochi kwandanyi. 
Genesis26:19 Ak kibal otwogikab Isak atebwet, konyor keringetab beek che kutu." 
Genesis26:20 Ak kiborio mestowekab Gerar ak che bo Isak, kolen, Chechok beechu: ak kiguure keringonoto bo beek Esek; amu kicham komoitos." 
Genesis26:21 Ak kibal keringetab beek age, ak koboriechi noto agine: ak kiguure noto Sitna." 
Genesis26:22 Ak kiu eng’ oloto, yeityo kwo kobal keringet age; ak kima boriechi noto: ak kiguure noto Rehobot: ak kile, Kagobaroiywech Jehovah emet nguno, si keichi emonito." 
Genesis26:23 Ak kiwa eng’ oloto kotogosta agoi Beer-seba. 
Genesis26:24 Ak kimong’ji Jehovah kemounoto ak kolenji, A Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandang’ung’ Abraham: ameiywei, amu ami koboten, ak aberurin, ak abaroi iyoteng’ung’ amu otwogindennyu Abraham." 
Genesis26:25 Ak kiteech kaptisisiet eng’ oloto: ak koguur kainetab Jehovah ak kiteech emainnyi eng’ oloto: ak kibal otwogikab Isak keringetab beek eng’ oloto. 
Genesis26:26 Kiba oldab Isak Abimelek kobunei Gerar koboto choruennyi Ausat, ak Pikol kiptaiyatab lugennyi." 
Genesis26:27 Ak kiteebe Isak kolenji, Kobwanja amu nee, ak owecha, ak kioonwa eng’ oling’wong’?" 
Genesis26:28 Kilenji ichek, Kigigeer komie kele, mi Jehovah koboten: ak kigile, Ingobiit kayosiet eng’ kwenunnyo, achek ak inye, ak kiyomisge;" 
Genesis26:29 kele, si meyaiywech kiy ne ya, ko u ye kima kitwain, ak ko u ye kigiyaun ne mie kityo, ak kigiuten eng’ kalyet: ak inye nguno ko iberurot eng’ Jehovah." 
Genesis26:30 Kiyachi anyun igorta, ak kiamis ak koeeiso." 
Genesis26:31 King’eetyo karon mising’ koyosiechigei: yeityo kounda Isak ichek ak kiba eng’ kalyet. 
Genesis26:32 Ak eng’ betunoto anyun, kobwa otwogikab Isak, kobwa komwachi agobo keringetab beek ne kiga kobal, kolenji, Kagenyoru beek." 
Genesis26:33 Ak kiguure Siba: noto anyun, kiguure kainetab nganasanato Beer-seba agoi kora." 
Genesis26:34 Kingo kagotar Esau kenyisiek artam kotun Judit cheptab Beri Kitindet, ak Basemat cheptab Elon Hitindet." 
Genesis26:35 Ak kiarogenso Isak ak Rebeka mising’ agobo tipchoto. 
Genesis27:1 Ak kingo kagoosit Isak, ak kiga kogorio konyekyik kot ko ma kogeerei kiy, koguur Esau werinnyi ne o, nyo kolenji, Werinnyu: ak kile, Ami yu." 
Genesis27:2 Ak kilenji, Keero, kaaositu, amangen betut ne amee." 
Genesis27:3 Kaigai, inam anyun kariguk, motieng’ung’ ak kwangeng’ung’, ak iwe kewanin, iibwa banyekab loget;" 
Genesis27:4 ak inyo igerekwa koanyinyitu ko u ye achame, ak iibwa nyo aam; si koberurin muguleldanyu kotom amei." 
Genesis27:5 Ak kigasei Rebeka ye king’alaljin Isak werinnyi Esau. Kiwa Esau anyun loget kewanin si koipchi. 
Genesis27:6 Ak king’alalsechi Rebeka werinnyi Jakobo, kolenji, Keero, kaagas kong’alaldos kwandang’ung’ ak ng’etab komet Esau, kolenjin," 
Genesis27:7 Ibwan banyekab loget, ak inyo igerekwa koanyinyitu, si aam, ak aberurin eng’ taitab Jehovah kotom amei." 
Genesis27:8 Noto anyun werinnyu, kas kutinnyu, ko u ye ang’atin." 
Genesis27:9 Ui nguno ole mi akwet, igetwa arek aeng’ che miachen che bo ng’oror; si agerekyi kwandang’ung’ koanyinyitu, ko u che chamei:" 
Genesis27:10 si iipchi kwandang’ung, koam, si koberurin kotom kome." 
Genesis27:11 Ak kilenji Jakobo kamennyi Rebeka, Keero, sabul Esau tupchennyu; ago tilil bortanyu." 
Genesis27:12 Abere imuchi kosapsaba baba, ak aegu kaberberindet eng’ inendet; si aek ne kisasei, ama anyoru berurto." 
Genesis27:13 Kilenji kamet, Ingobunja sasisieng’ung’, werinnyu: kas kutinnyu kityo, ak iwe igetwa." 
Genesis27:14 Kiwa anyun kogetyi kamet: ak kigerech kamet koanyinyitu, ko u che chamei kwandanyi." 
Genesis27:15 Ak kinam Rebeka ngoroik che kororon che bo Esau werinnyi ne o, che kitinyei eng’ go, ak kolaakyi Jakobo werinnyi ne ming’in." 
Genesis27:16 Ak kiratyi eunekyik ak kaatinnyi ole tilil, magatok che bo arekab ng’oror." 
Genesis27:17 Ak kiigochi Jakobo werinnyi banyechato anyiny ak makatiat, kondechi eunnyi, choto kiga kochob." 
Genesis27:18 Ak kiwa oldab kwandanyi, ak kole, Baba: ak kole, Ami yu; i ng’o, weri?" 
Genesis27:19 Ak kilenji Jakobo kwandanyi, A Esau wering’ung’ ne bo tai; kaayai ko u ye kagemwawa: kaigai, ing’eet, itebi ng’ony, si iam tugukyuk che bo loget, si koberuran muguleldang’ung’." 
Genesis27:20 Ak kiteebe Isak werinnyi kolenji, Nee ni kesib iibu-o, werinnyu? Ak kole, Noto ne kaonwa Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Genesis27:21 Ak kilenji Isak Jakobo, Kaigai, nyo rigu, si asapsabin, werinnyu, anai ngo i werinnyu Esau anan ngo ma i inendet." 
Genesis27:22 Kirikyi anyun Jakobo kwandanyi Isak; ak kosapsab, ak kole, Kutit ko bo Jakobo ago eunek ko bo Esau." 
Genesis27:23 Ak kima inyit inendet, amu ki sabulen eunekyik, ko u eunekab ng’etab kamet Esau: koberur anyun." 
Genesis27:24 Ak kiteebe kolenji, I werinnyu Esau iman? Kole, A inendet." 
Genesis27:25 Ak kilenji, Ibwa korik anyun, si aam banyek che kaibwa werinnyu, si koberurin muguleldanyu. Kiipchi anyun korik, ak kiam: ak kiipchi divaik, koee." 
Genesis27:26 Ak kilenji kwandanyi Isak, Nyo yu negit anyun, werinnyu, si ing’ututa." 
Genesis27:27 Ak kiwa korikta, ak kong’utut: ak king’uchi siptab ngoroikyik, ak kiiberur inendet, kile, Keero, kergei siptab werinnyu Ak ng’uunetab emet ne kiiberur Jehovah:" 
Genesis27:28 Ingogonin Kamuktaindet rewotab kipsengwet, Ak akwaiyetab ng’ony, Ak chang’indab bek ak divaik:" 
Genesis27:29 Ingootin bororiosiek, Ak ingong’urukyin bororiosiek; Egu kiptaiyat eng’ tupchosieguk, Ak ingong’urukyin werikab komet; Chubot inendet ne chubin, Ak iberurot inendet ne iberurin." 
Genesis27:30 Ak kingo kagoges Isak kaberuret ne kiiberuri Jakobo, ak eng’ yoto ko kata kwo Jakobo eng’ ye mi kwandanyi, koit ng’etab kamet Esau kobunu loget." 
Genesis27:31 Kigerech agine banyek koanyinyitu, ak koipchi kwandanyi: ak kilenji kwandanyi, Ingong’eet anyun baba, si koam banyek che kaipchin werinnyi, si koberura muguleldang’ung’." 
Genesis27:32 Koteebe anyun kwandanyi Isak kolenji, I ng’o inye? Ak kile, A wering’ung’, ne o, Esau." 
Genesis27:33 Ak kibotan Isak mising’ kot, ak kole, Ng’o anyun ne kacheng’ tugukab loget ak koibwa, ak kaamisie kotom iitu, ak kaaberur inendet? Ee, ak koberurot inendet." 
Genesis27:34 Ak kingogas Esau ng’alekab kwandanyi, kote eng’ kateet ne o eng’ ng’wanindo, ak kolenji kwandanyi, Iberura agane, ee, baba." 
Genesis27:35 Ak kile, Kanyo ng’etab komet eng’ ng’alset, nyo koreb berurtang’ung’." 
Genesis27:36 Ak kole, Tos kima kitochi kainennyi Jakobo komie? Amu kagotila let konyil aeng’: kirebena etunatetab sigennyu; ak keero, kagorebena nguno berurtanyu. Ak kole, Tos ma itukwa berurto?" 
Genesis27:37 Kiwolji Isak Esau kolenji, Kayai inendet koek kiptaiyandeng’ung’, ak kaagochi tupchosiekyik tugul koek otwogikyik; ak kaagimit inendet eng’ bek ak kivaik: ara, ta ayaun nee anyun, werinnyu?" 
Genesis27:38 Ak kilenji Esau kwandanyi, Tos itinye berurto agenge kityo, baba? Iberura agenge, ee, baba. Kiwaach anyun Esau, korir." 
Genesis27:39 Ak kiwolji Isak kwandanyi kolenji, Keero, looitu meng’oteng’ung’ eng’ oldab akwaiyetab ng’ony, Ak eng’ rewotab kipsengwetisiek ne bunu barak;" 
Genesis27:40 Ak isobe rotweng’ung’ bo chok, ak iote ng’etab komet; Ak ye itiagage, Ilelekte bounatennyi koistoegei kaating’ung’." 
Genesis27:41 Ak kiwech Esau Jakobo amu berurto ne kiiberur kwandanyi: ak kile Esau eng’ muguleldanyi, kagorik betusiek che kerirjin baba; si abar tupchennyu Jakobo." 
Genesis27:42 Ak kigimwachi Rebeka ng’alekab Esau werinnyi ne o; ak kiiyokto keguur Jakobo werinnyi ne ming’in, ak kinyo kolenji inendet, Keero, igoigoegei Esau ng’etab komet, kobwatin, kole, tun kobarin." 
Genesis27:43 Eng’ noto anyun werinnyu, kas ng’olyondennyu; ng’eet, mwechi oldab Laban werit ne kitupche ne menyei Haran;" 
Genesis27:44 ak iwe otebi ak inendet eng’ oloto, betusiek che ng’ering’ agoi kogesgei neregek che ng’wonen che bo ng’etab komet;" 
Genesis27:45 agoi kogesgei neregekab ng’etab komet eng’ inye, ak koutie kit ne kiiyachi inendet: si ayok chi nyo koguurin eng’ oloto: amu nee si obegunena okwek tuwai eng’ betut agenge?" 
Genesis27:46 Kolenji anyun Rebeka Isak, Ageere kaiimetab ge betusiechu amu tibikab Het: ngot kotun Jakobo chepto eng’ tibikab Het che u tipchu bo emoni, kotilei nee sobondanyu?" 
Genesis28:1 Kiguur anyun Isak Jakobo konyo koberur inendet, ak kotigon kolenji, Ametun cheptab Kanan." 
Genesis28:2 Ng’eet ak iwe Padan-aram, gotab Betuel kwandab komet; iwe itun chepto eng’ tibikab Laban ne tupcho ak komet." 
Genesis28:3 Ingoberurin Kamuktaindet ne bo Kamuktaet, ak koyabin eng’ iyotet ak kobarain, si kobiit iegu tuiyetab bik che chang’;" 
Genesis28:4 ingogonin berurto ne bo Abraham, inye, ak lagoguk; si kobunjin emoni iwendote ko i toondet, ne kiigochi Kamuktaindet Abraham." 
Genesis28:5 Ak kiiyokto Isak Jakobo kwo: ak kiwa anyun agoi Padan-aram oldab Laban, weritab Betuel Siriaindet, ng’etab kametab Rebeka, kametab Jakobo ak Esau." 
Genesis28:6 Kigeer anyun Esau kole, kigoberur Isak Jakobo ak koyokto kwo Padan-aram, kwo kotunis eng’ olindo; ak kingoberuri kotigoni kolenjin, Ametun cheptab Kanan;" 
Genesis28:7 ak kigeer kole kogas it Jakobo kwandanyi ak kamet, ak kakwa Padan-aram;" 
Genesis28:8 ak ye kingogeer Esau kole, maiboiboi kwandanyi Isak tibikab Kanan;" 
Genesis28:9 kwo anyun Esau oldab Ismael, kwo kotun osotiot age kosione chun, Maalat cheptab Ismael weritab Abraham, cheptab kametab Nebaiot." 
Genesis28:10 Kiwa Jakobo anyun eng’ Beer-seba, kotokyigei Haran." 
Genesis28:11 Ak kiit komosta age, ak kiru yoto kemounoto, amu kiga kororokta asista; ak kinam koitab oloto kotiie met, ak koru konuuch." 
Genesis28:12 Ak kigeer eng’ karuotitoet long’eiywot ne kagitonon eng’ ng’ony, ne itei kipsengwet: ogeero, malaikaisiek che bo Kamuktaindet che kitogostae ak kochorunegei." 
Genesis28:13 Ak kitononi Jehovah eng’ ye negite inendet, ak kile, A Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandang’ung’ Abraham, A Kamuktaindet ne bo Isak: agonin emoni irue, koboto lagoguk;" 
Genesis28:14 ak tun tenitu lagoguk temburiekab ng’ony, ak iyomu cherongo ak kong’asis, ak murot ne bo katam, ak murot ne bo tai: ak kiberuri ortinwek tugul che bo ng’ony eng’ inye ak eng’ lagoguk." 
Genesis28:15 Ak keero, ami koboten, ak aribotin eng’ oldo tugul ole iwendi, ak tun amutun inyo emoni kogeny; amu mametoin agoi tun ayai tugul che kaamwaun." 
Genesis28:16 Kigos anyun Jakobo eng’ ruondo, ak kole, Mi Jehovah olito iman; ago koma anai." 
Genesis28:17 Ak kiiywei, ak kole, Tia kaiyweisiet ne mi yu! Ni ko gotab Kamuktaindet iman, ak ko kurgetab kipsengwet." 
Genesis28:18 Ak king’eet Jakobo karon mising’, ak konam koita ne koga tiie metit, ak kolumda koek toloita, ak kirong’ji mwaita baragunnyi." 
Genesis28:19 Ak kitochi yoto kainet koguure Betel: ago kigiguure nganasanato eng’ tai Lus. 
Genesis28:20 Ak kiiyosio Jakobo, kole, Ngot koteb Kamuktaindet kobota, ak koribota eng’ orani awendi, ak kobaata, ak kogona ngoroik che alaachi," 
Genesis28:21 agoi tun aweekyige gotab baba eng’ kalyet, koek anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu," 
Genesis28:22 ak koek gotab Kamuktaindet koita ni kalumde koek toloita: ak agonin iman kebeberta ne bo taman eng’ tuguk tugul che igona. 
Genesis29:1 King’eet anyun Jakobo kwo bandanyi, agoi koit emetab bikab kong’asis." 
Genesis29:2 Ak kigeer, ogeero, keringetab beek eng’ kewet, ak ogeero, kimi akwotisiek somogu che bo kechirek koruitos eng’ ole negite keringonoto bo beek; amu kiigoigochi akwotisiekwak eng’ keringonoto be beek: ak ki o koita ne kigigere keringet." 
Genesis29:3 Ak kigituiyechin yoto akwotisiek tugul che bo kechirek: ak kimilda koita ne kigigere keringet, si konaga beek kechirek, ak yeityo koweech koita kwo ole kami kogere keringet." 
Genesis29:4 Kiteebe anyun Jakobo kolenji, Obunu ano, tupchosiekyuk? Ak kilenji, Ki bo Haran." 
Genesis29:5 Ak kiteebe ichek kolenji, Tos ongen Laban weritab Nahor? Ak kile, Kingen inendet." 
Genesis29:6 Ak kiteebe kolenji, Chamegei? Ak kile ichek, Chamegei: keero, nyonei cheptanyi Rael, kogetu kechirek." 
Genesis29:7 Ak kile, Ogeero, ta ko bet, ak tom koyam sait ne kirote tuga: onage beek kechirek, yeityo okweri koba koaget." 
Genesis29:8 Ak kile, Magimuchi agoi kotuiyo akwotisiek tugul, si komilda koita eng’ keringet; yeityo kinage beek kechirek." 
Genesis29:9 Ak ye kingota kong’alaljindos, koit Rael kogetu kechirekab kwandanyi: amu inendet ne kiiyagi." 
Genesis29:10 Ak ye kingogeer Jakobo Rael cheptab Laban tupchetab kamet, koboto kechirek che bo Laban, tupchetab kamet, korikta Jakobo komilda koita eng’ keringet, ak kogoigoch akwetab kechirekab Laban tupchetab kamet." 
Genesis29:11 Ak king’utut Jakobo Rael, yeityo kowaach korir." 
Genesis29:12 Ak kilenji Jakobo Rael, Kitupche ak kwandang’ung’, a weritab Rebeka: kilabat anyun Rael komwachi kwandanyi." 
Genesis29:13 Ak kingogas Laban ng’alekab Jakobo weritab chepkamet, kolabat kotorokta inendet, ak konam koue eunekyik, kong’utut ak komut kwo gonnyi. Ak kimwachi Laban ng’alechu tugul." 
Genesis29:14 Ak kimwachi Laban kolenji, Angen komie ale, i kowekyuk ak banyekyuk. Ak kitebi ak inendet arawet agenge." 
Genesis29:15 Kimwachi anyun Laban Jakobo kolenji, Tos iota buch amu i tupchennyu? Mwawa, nee melektang’ung’?" 
Genesis29:16 Kitinyei Laban tibik aeng’: kigiguure ne o Lea, ak kigiguure ne ming’in Rael." 
Genesis29:17 Ki kubusen konyek Lea, ak kitinyei borto ne kararan ak toget ne kararan Rael." 
Genesis29:18 Ak kicham Jakobo Rael: ak kolenji Laban, Mie aotin kenyisiek tisab, si atun Rael cheptang’ung’ ne ming’in." 
Genesis29:19 Ak kile Laban, Mie agonin kosiir ye kata agochini chi age: tebi kobota." 
Genesis29:20 Ak kiot Jakobo inendet kenyisiek tisab agobo Rael; ak kigeer ko u betusiek che ng’ering’ choto, amu chamnyet ne kiting’e inendet." 
Genesis29:21 Ak kilenji Jakobo Laban, Kona anyun osotiondennyu, amu kagogesgei betusiek, si kobiit kituiyegei." 
Genesis29:22 Ak kiiyum Laban bik tugul che bo yoto, ak koyai igorta." 
Genesis29:23 Ak ye kingo kagoimen, komutyi Laban Jakobo cheptanyi Lea; ak kiituiyogei." 
Genesis29:24 Ak kiigoito Laban Silba otwogindennyi kogochi Lea koek otwogindet. 
Genesis29:25 Ak kingo kagoeech, kogeer kole, Kaga Lea: kolenji Laban, Nee ni koiyaiywa? Kima aotin agobo Rael? Amu nee si igena?" 
Genesis29:26 Ak kile Laban, Ma biteetab olinyo kitun ne ming’in kotom kitun ne o." 
Genesis29:27 Iwong’u betusiek tisab che bo Lea, si kobiit kegonin Rael agine, amu otwognatet ne tun iota kenyisiek alak tisab." 
Genesis29:28 Ak kiyai ko u noto Jakobo, kowong’ betusiechoto tisab, ak kiigochi Laban Jakobo cheptanyi Rael koek osotiondennyi." 
Genesis29:29 Ak kiigoito Laban otwogindennyi Bila kogochi Rael koek otwogindennyi. 
Genesis29:30 Ak kiituiyogei ak Rael agine, ak kichamei Rael kosiir Lea, ak kiot Jakobo Laban kenyisiek alak tisab." 
Genesis29:31 Ak kigeer Jehovah kole, kiwechei Lea, ak kiigochi anyun inendet iyotet: ago kisonen Rael." 
Genesis29:32 Ak kimanach anyun Lea, kosich werit, ak kiguure kainennyi Reuben: amu kile, Kageer Jehovah nyalildanyu; noto anyun imuchi kochama manong’otiondennyu nguno." 
Genesis29:33 Ak kimanach kogeny, ak kosich werit, ak kole, Amu kagas Jehovah weget ne kiwecha, kagona werit nito agine amu noto: ak kiguure kainennyi Simeon." 
Genesis29:34 Ak kimanach kogeny, ak kisich werit; ak kile, Ni ne igochin manong’otiondennyu kenamge, amu kaasikyi werik somok: ak kigiguure kainennyi Lawi amu noto." 
Genesis29:35 Ak kimanach kogeny, ak kisich werit: ak kile, Alosu Jehovah eng’ sigoni: kiguure kainennyi Juda amu noto; ak kitebi, mata kosich lagok." 
Genesis30:1 Ak kingogeer Rael kole, mata kosikyi Jakobo lagok, koam ng’etkong’ Rael agobo chepkamet; ak kilenji Jakobo, Kona lagok, ak ngo megona, amee." 
Genesis30:2 Ak kigoromitu neregekab Jakobo eng’ Rael, kolenji, Tos ko ageeregei Kamuktaindet ne kaetenen iyotet?" 
Genesis30:3 Kolenji Rael Jakobo, Keero, mi otwogindennyu Bila, otuiyegei ak inendet: si kobiit kosigis eng’ kutung’oikyuk, si anyor lagok eng’ inendet." 
Genesis30:4 Ak kiigochi otwogindennyi Bila koek osotiondennyi: ak kiituiyogei Jakobo ak inendet. 
Genesis30:5 Kimanach anyun Bila, ak kisikyi Jakobo werit." 
Genesis30:6 Ak kile Rael, Kagoyaiywa ne mie Kamuktaindet, ak kagogas kutinnyu ak kagogona werit: ak kiguure kainennyi Dan amu noto." 
Genesis30:7 Kimanach kogeny Bila otwogetab Rael, ak kisikyi Jakobo werit ne bo aeng’." 
Genesis30:8 Ak kile Rael, kagibelge ak chebeiyo eng’ kabeletab ge ne o, ak kaaterter: ak kiguure kainennyi Naptali." 
Genesis30:9 Kingo kagogeer Lea kole, mata kosich lagok inendet, konam Silba otwogindennyi kogochi Jakobo koek osotiondennyi." 
Genesis30:10 Ak kisikyi Silba otwogindetab Lea Jakobo werit. 
Genesis30:11 Ak kile Lea, Kagoek sobon ra! Ak kiguure kainennyi Gad." 
Genesis30:12 Ak kisikyi Silba otwogindetab Lea Jakobo werit ne bo aeng’. 
Genesis30:13 Ak kile Lea, Agasige! Amu tun kuurena tibik ne igasegei: ak kiguure kainennyi Aser." 
Genesis30:14 Ak kiwa Reuben eng’ betusiek che bo kesisietab nganok, ak kinyor tuguk che u labotik eng’ kewet, ak kiipchi kamet Lea. Kilenji Rael Lea eng’ yoto, Kaigai igona tuguchoto u labotik, cho kaibu wering’ung’." 
Genesis30:15 Ak kilenji, Tos igeere ile ma kiy ngirebena manong’otiondennyu, ak imache irebena labotikab werinnyu agichek? Ak kile Rael, Mie koru gong’ung’ rani amu labotikab wering’ung’." 
Genesis30:16 Ak ye kibunu Jakobo kewanin koskoleny kwo Lea kotorokta ak kolenji, Kanyol inyo iru gonnyu: amu kaalin eng’ labotikab werinnyu. Kiru anyun gonnyi kemounoto." 
Genesis30:17 Ak kigas Kamuktaindet Lea, ak kimanach, ak kisikyi Jakobo werit ne bo mut." 
Genesis30:18 Ak kile Lea, Kagogona Kamuktaindet melektanyu, amu kiagochi manong’otiondennyu otwogindennyu: ak kiguure kainennyi Isakar." 
Genesis30:19 Ak kimanach Lea kogeny, ak kisikyi Jakobo werit ne bo lo." 
Genesis30:20 Ak kile Lea, Kagogonwa Kamuktaindet kanyiok che miach; koboch nguno ko kagitebi ak manong’otiondennyu, amu kiasikyi werik lo; ak kiguure kainennyi Sebulun." 
Genesis30:21 Ak kingobata choto kosich chepto, ak kiguure kainennyi Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Ak kiibwat Kamuktaindet Rael, ak kigas Kiptaiyat inendet, ak kiitiach moennyi." 
Genesis30:23 Ak kimanach, ak kisich werit: ak kole, Kagoistawa Kamuktaindet chotisiennyu." 
Genesis30:24 Ak kiguure kainennyi Josep, ak kile, Ingoteswa Jehovah werit age." 
Genesis30:25 Ak kingobata chuto, ye kingo kagosich Rael Josep, kolenji Jakobo Laban, Unda awo, si kobiit awo oldanyu, agoi emennyu." 
Genesis30:26 Chamwa osotikyuk ak lagokyuk amu kiaotin agobo icheget, unda awo: amu ingen inye otwognatennyu ne kiaotin." 
Genesis30:27 Ak kilenji Laban, Ngo kianyoru mieindo eng’ taing’ung’, kiageer komie ale kigoberura Jehovah agobo inye." 
Genesis30:28 Ak kilenji, Mwawa melekto ne imache, si agonin." 
Genesis30:29 Ak kiwolji Jakobo kolenji, Ingen inye ole teptoi otet ne kiaotin, ak ateptab tuguk che kiayagi." 
Genesis30:30 Amu kiitinye che ng’ering’ ye kitom aitu, ak kigotesogis kochang’ait; ak kigoberurin Jehovah koboch ngab aitu: ak nguno anyun, ko tos anyoru kotia si achopchi tuguk bikab gonnyu?" 
Genesis30:31 Ak kilenji Laban, Agonin nee? Ak kile Jakobo, Amegona kiy: ngot iyaiywa kii amache, amuchi ayagun akwotisieguk kogeny ak arib." 
Genesis30:32 Achute akwotisieguk tugul rani alewenoti, ak ateri artet age tugul ne ibisia ak ne busie, ak aruet age tugul ne tuui, ak ne ibisia, ak ne busie, eng’ ng’ororek: ak koek choto melektanyu." 
Genesis30:33 Ak tun baorianjina imandanyu, ye tun inyo agobo melektanyu ne mi taing’ung’: ak nginyorja ne ma ibisia ak ne ma busie eng’ ng’ororek, ak ne ma tuui eng’ arek, iit ile kigichorei." 
Genesis30:34 Ak kile Laban, Keero, ingoteb ko u ye kaimwa." 
Genesis30:35 Ak kiiter Laban betunoto kwesik che keronen ak che busienen, ak iyuogik tugul che ibisionen ak che busienen, ak age tugul ne kitinyei che leelach, ak arek tugul che tuuen, kokweri kogochi werikyik;" 
Genesis30:36 ak kiwa Laban koistoegei Jakobo ne te bandab betusiek somok: ak kiiyaga Jakobo nego che bo Laban che kiituuch. 
Genesis30:37 Ak kibut Jakobo korokwek che bo ketik che u siliboik che tuonen, ak che u mobonik ak che u kurinik, ak kiibony kolegenitu si kotook ole leelachen eng’ kirokwechoto." 
Genesis30:38 Ak kilumda kirokwechoto kiibony kotoorji togomwek eng’ ole ee beek nego; ak korisyo ko kabwa nyo koee beek. 
Genesis30:39 Ak kirisyo nego eng’ taitab kirokwek, ak kiiyo nego che keronen ak che ibisionen ak che busienen." 
Genesis30:40 Ak kiitaban Jakobo arek, ak kitokyi nego ole mi che keronen ak tugul che tuuen eng’ negab Laban; ak kiinde akwotisiekyik oldanyua ichegei, ma ituiyo ak che bo Laban." 
Genesis30:41 Ak eng’ ui tugul ye ristos nego che neriotin, konde Jakobo kirokwek eng’ taitab konyekab nego eng’ togomwek, si korisyo eng’ oldab kirokwek:" 
Genesis30:42 ak kima indochi nego che sogitiotin: kibunji anyun Laban choto sogitiotin, ak kobunji Jakobo che neriotin." 
Genesis30:43 Ak kiek magorio chichoto mising’ ak kitinyei akwotisiek che chang’, ak tibik che otwogik ak murenik che otwogik, ak tambesik, ak sigirok." 
Genesis31:1 Ak kigas Jakobo ng’alekab werikab Laban, kolen, Kigokweri Jakobo tugul che bo kwandanyo: ak kigonyor magornatoni te ni eng’ tugukab kwandanyo." 
Genesis31:2 Ak kigeer Jakobo togetab Laban kole, ogeero, ma ko u atkinye tai." 
Genesis31:3 Ak kilenji Jehovah Jakobo, Ketitege, ui emetab kwanisieguk ole kigisikyinin; ak ami koboten." 
Genesis31:4 Ak kiiyokto Jakobo chito kwo kewanin ole mi akwennyi koguur Rael ak Lea," 
Genesis31:5 nyo kolenji, Ageere ale ma ko u togetab kwandang’wong’ atkinye tai; ago kigotebi Kamuktaindet ne bo baba kobota." 
Genesis31:6 Ak ongen ole kiaot kwandang’wong’ eng’ kimnatennyu tugul. 
Genesis31:7 Ak kigoberbera kwandang’wong’ ak kigowal melektanyu konyil taman; ago ma chamji Kamuktaindet koyaiywa ne ya. 
Genesis31:8 Ye kingomwa kole, Egu melektang’ung’ che ibisionen, ko kiiyo anyun tugul che ibisionen: ak ye kingomwa kole, Egu melektang’ung’ che keronen, ko kiiyo anyun tugul che keronen." 
Genesis31:9 U noto anyun kigetune Kamuktaindet kwandang’wong’ akwet si kogona. 
Genesis31:10 Ak ye kingomachei korisyo nego, ageer eng’ karuotitoet, kwesik che lanyei nego ko ki keronen, ak che ibisionen ak che mologonen." 
Genesis31:11 Ak kiguura malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet eng’ karuotitoet, kole, Jakobo: ak kiale, Ami yu." 
Genesis31:12 Ak kile, Keerote, si inai ile, keronen ak ko ibisionen ak ko mologonen kwesik tugul, che lanyei nego: amu kaageer choto tugul che yaun Laban." 
Genesis31:13 Ane Kamuktaindet ne bo Betel, ole kiirong’jine mwaita toloita ole kiiyosieunena: ng’eet anyun, ui eng’ emoni, iweekyige ole kigisikyinin." 
Genesis31:14 Kiwolji anyun Rael ak Lea kolenji, Tos mitei kebeberta anan kiy ne kinyoru eng’ gotab kwandanyo?" 
Genesis31:15 Tos magiitech kele ki bo or age? Amu kigoaldech ak kigoamenech tuguk. 
Genesis31:16 Amu nenyo ak lagokyok magornatoni kigetune Kamuktaindet kwandanyo: ara anyun yai kiy age tugul ne kagomwaun Kamuktaindet. 
Genesis31:17 King’eet anyun Jakobo, ak kichob lagokyik ak osotikyik kolany tambesik." 
Genesis31:18 Ak kikweri akwotisiekyik tugul, ak tugukyik tugul che kiga koyum, agot akwotisiek che kiga konyor, che kiga koyum eng’ Padan-aram, si kobiit kouto anyun koba emetab Kanan, oldab kwandanyi Isak." 
Genesis31:19 Ak kichor Rael kanamonikab kwandanyi Laban, amu kigawa Laban kotil kororikab kechirekyik." 
Genesis31:20 King’al Jakobo Laban Suriaindet, amu ma mwachi kolenji, amache awo; kiung’ategi." 
Genesis31:21 Kimweito anyun tuguk tugul che kitinyei; ak king’eet kolandae ainet, kwo kotokyigei tulwetab Gilead." 
Genesis31:22 Ak betut ne bo somok kemwachi Laban kelenji, Kogomwei Jakobo." 
Genesis31:23 Kiimut tupchosiekyik, koba koboto inendet kosub betusiek tisab; ak kinyorji tulwetab Gilead." 
Genesis31:24 Kinyonji Kamuktaindet Laban Suriaindet kemoi eng’ karuotitoet, kolenji, Ripge, amemwachi Jakobo ng’olyo ne mie anan ne ya." 
Genesis31:25 Ak kiit Laban ole mi Jakobo. Ak kiga teech Jakobo emainnyi eng’ tulwet. Ki inyo koteech Laban ak tupchosiekyik agichek tulwetab Gilead. 
Genesis31:26 Kolenji Laban Jakobo, Kiiyai nee kot ing’ala ak iung’anugei, ak imutu tibikyuk ko u luulenik che kiginame rotwetab chok?" 
Genesis31:27 Kilya si imweu iung’anugei, ing’ala, ama imwawa, si kobiit aunden iwe eng’ boiboiyet ak tienwogik, ak sugutit ne ming’in ak ketubet;" 
Genesis31:28 ak ma igang’wa ang’utut werikyuk ak tibikyuk? Kiiyai eng’ berberindo. 
Genesis31:29 Atinye kimnatet ayaiywok ne ya: ago kong’alalwa Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandang’wong’ amut lagat, kolenja, Ripgei, si memwachi Jakobo kiy ne mie anan ne ya." 
Genesis31:30 Ago angen ale koitau banda, amu amin emo agobo gotab kwandang’ung’, ago kilya si ichorena kanomonikyuk?" 
Genesis31:31 Kowolji Jakobo Laban kolenji, Amu kiaiyweisie, ale, abere imuchi irebena tibiguk eng’ kimnatet." 
Genesis31:32 Meei age tugul ne koi inyorjini kanamoniguk: inyit eng’ taitab tupchosiekyok kiy age tugul neng’ung’ ne atinye, si iib. Amu kima nai Jakobo kole kichor Rael tuguchoto." 
Genesis31:33 Kimanda anyun Laban emait ne bo Jakobo, ak emaitab Lea, ak emaitab otwogik aeng’ che tibik; ago manyor kanamonichoto. Yeityo komong’ eng’ emait ne bo Lea, komanda ne bo Rael." 
Genesis31:34 Ki Rael ne kiga ib kanamonichoto, kwo konde tuguk orit che kiitoe tambesik; yeityo kotebe. Ak kiisiach Laban ola tugul kosapsabat eng’ emait ago manyor." 
Genesis31:35 Ak kilenji Rael kwandanyi, Amat konerekya kiptaiyandennyu, amu mamuchi ang’eet eng’ taing’ung’; amu kanama atebetab kwonyik. Ak kicheng’ kot, ak kima nyor kanamonik." 
Genesis31:36 Ak kinerech Jakobo, kobolyo ak Laban: ak kiwolji Jakobo Laban kolenji, Nee lelutiennyu? Nee chalwoktanyu, kot isubwa ko u ni eng’ neregek?" 
Genesis31:37 Ak kaisiach isapsabate tugukyuk tugul, nee ne bo tugukab gong’ung’ ne kenyoru? Nde yu, taitab tupchosiekyuk ak tupchosieguk, si kobiit kobesiewech achek tuwai." 
Genesis31:38 Kiatebi koboten eng’ kenyisiechu tiptem; ma oos kechireguk ak ng’ororeguk, ama aam mengichikab akweng’ung’." 
Genesis31:39 Ak kima aibun ne kibar tiondo kotonaton; kiageerunenen nenyu; kiimagena noto, ngo ne kigichor bet anan ngo ne kichor kemoi." 
Genesis31:40 Kiatebi ko u noto; kibira kiptoret bet, ak kibara kaititiet kemoi; ak kima kota anuuchi." 
Genesis31:41 Kiatebe gong’ung’ eng’ kenyisiechu tiptem; kiaotin kenyisiek taman ak ang’wan agobo tibiguk aeng’, ak kiaotin kenyisiek lo agobo akwotisieguk: ak kiiwal melektanyu konyil taman." 
Genesis31:42 Ak nda kima komi kobota Kamuktaindet ne bo baba, Kamuktaindet ne bo Abraham, ak Inendet ne iywei Isak, ko kiteona awo buch. Kogogeer Kamuktaindet nyalildanyu ak boisietab eunekguk, sk kogerin kong’ lagat anyun amu noto." 
Genesis31:43 Ak kiwolji Laban Jakobo kolenji, Tipchu ko tibikyuk, ak lagochu ko lagokyuk, ak akwotisiechu ko akwotisiekyuk, ak tukchu tugul igeere ko chechuk: ara alyonjini anyun tipchuchuk rani, ak lagokwak che kigosich?" 
Genesis31:44 Ara anyun, nyo kiyosiechige, inye ak ane; si koek baornatet eng’ kwenunnyo, inye ak ane." 
Genesis31:45 Ak kinam Jakobo koita kolumda koek toloita. 
Genesis31:46 Ak kolenji Jakobo tupchosiekyik, Oyum koik; ak kiiyum koik, yeityo koruruch: ak kiamis eng’ ye negite karurugutionoto bo koik." 
Genesis31:47 Ak kiguure Laban yoto Jegar- saduta: ago kiguure Jakobo Galed. 
Genesis31:48 Ak kile Laban, Karurugutioni kobaornatet eng’ kwenunnyo, inye ak ane ra. Kigiguure anyun kainetab yoto Galed amu noto:" 
Genesis31:49 ak kigiguure kogeny Mispa, amu kile, Ingoek Jehova ribindet eng’ kwenunnyo, inye ak ane, ye magigeerege." 
Genesis31:50 Ngot ko tun ius tibikyuk, anan ngot ko tun itun osotik alak isione tibikyuk, ko mami chi kwenunnyo; keero, baoriat Kamuktaindet eng’ kwenunnyo, inye ak ane." 
Genesis31:51 Ak kilenji Laban Jakobo, Keer karurugutioni, keer toloi, ne kaalumde eng’ kwenunnyo, inye ak ane." 
Genesis31:52 Baoriat karurugutioni, ak baoriat toloi, ale si masiiru karurugutioni nyo ayaun kiy ne ya, ak si mesiiru aginye karurugutioni ak toloi, inyo iyaiywa kiy ne ya." 
Genesis31:53 Ingoruokseiywech Kamuktaindet ne bo Abraham, ak Kamuktaindet ne bo Nahor, Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandanywa. Ak kiiyosio Jakobo agobo Inendet ne iywei Isak kwandanyi." 
Genesis31:54 Ak kiigoito Jakobo tiseiywot eng’ tulwet, yeityo koguur tupchosiekyik kobwa koamis: ak kiamis, ak kiruiyo tulwonoto eng’ lagatunato." 
Genesis31:55 Ak king’eet Laban karon mising’, kong’utut werikyik ak tibikyik, ak kiiberur: kiwa anyun Laban koweektagei oldanyi." 
Genesis32:1 Kiwa anyun Jakobo bandanyi, ak kituiyo ak malaikaisiekab Kamuktaindet." 
Genesis32:2 Ak ye kingogeer Jakobo, kole, Lugetab Kamuktaindet ni: ak kiguure kainetab yoto Maanaim." 
Genesis32:3 Ak kiiyokto Jakobo bik kondoe inendet koba ole mi ng’etab kamet Esau agoi emetab Seir, noto ko koretab Edom." 
Genesis32:4 Ak king’at ichek kolenji, Omwachi kiptaiyandennyu Esau ko u ni; olenji, Kamwa otwogindeng’ung’ Jakobo ko u ni, Kiatoondenji Laban ak kiatebe oloto agoi rani:" 
Genesis32:5 ak atinye eik, ak sigirok ak akwotisiek che bo nego, ak otwogik che murenik, ak otwogik che tibik, ak kaayogu nyo kemwaun inye, kiptaiyandennyu, si kobiit anyor chamet eng’ taing’ung’." 
Genesis32:6 Ak kiweekyigei Jakobo che kiga kiyokto, nyo kole, Kogeit ole mi ng’etab komet Esau, ak nyonei agine kotorogun, nyonei koboto bik bogol ang’wan." 
Genesis32:7 Kiiywei Jakobo mising’ anyun, ak kiarogen: ak kipchei bik che kimi tugul, ak nego, ak tuga, ak tambesik, kopcheune aeng’;" 
Genesis32:8 ak kile, Ngo tuiyo Esau ak che bo tai, ak kobar, komuchi kochililso che bo let." 
Genesis32:9 Ak kile Jakobo, Ee, Kamuktaindet ne bo baba Abraham, ak Kamuktaindet ne bo baba Isak, Ee Jehovah ne kiimwawa ilenja, Iweekyige emeng’ung’, oldab tilionutiguk, ak ayaun ne mie:" 
Genesis32:10 Manyoljina anyor rireneng’ung’ ne bo ge tugul, ak imanit tugul, ne kiiborji otwogindeng’ung’; amu kialandae ainoni bo Jordan ak kiroktanyu kityo; ak nguno, ko kapcheunege aeng’." 
Genesis32:11 Asain ale, isorua eng’ eutab tupchennyu Esau: amu aiywei inendet, ale nyonei nyo kobara, koboto kamet ak lagok." 
Genesis32:12 Ak kiimwa ile, Ayaun ne mie iman, ak ayae iyoteng’ung’ kochang’ait ko u ng’aniekab nyanjet che maiitoksei amu chang’." 
Genesis32:13 Ak kiru yoto lagatunato; ak kichob kagochinet eng’ tugukyik che kitinyei si kogochi ng’etab kamet Esau; 
Genesis32:14 iyuogik bogol aeng’ che bo ng’ororek koboto kwesik tiptem, ak iyuogik bogol aeng’ che bo kechirek, koboto mengichik tiptem," 
Genesis32:15 tambesik che abaen sosom koboto moekwak, ak tuga iyuogik artam koboto kirugik taman, ak iyuogik tiptem che bo sigirok ak moek taman che bo sigirok." 
Genesis32:16 Ak kiigochi otwogikyik kokweri akwet age tugul inegei; ak kilenji otwogikyik, Oba olande ondoena, among’ korikyi akwet age akwet age." 
Genesis32:17 Ak king’at ne bo tai, kolenji, Ye tuiyenen Esau tupchennyu, ak koteebenen kole, I bo ng’o? Ak iwendi ano? Ak bo ng’o chu mi taing’ung’?" 
Genesis32:18 Ilenji anyun, Bo otwogindeng’ung’ Jakobo; kagochinet ne kiyokyin kiptaiyandennyu Esau: ak nyonei inendet eng’ let." 
Genesis32:19 Ak king’at ne bo aeng’ agine, ak ne bo somok, ak tugul che isubi akwotisiek, kolenji, Ye otuiye ak Esau, omwachi ko u ni, olenji," 
Genesis32:20 Keero, nyonei eng’ let otwogindeng’ung’ Jakobo. Amu kile, Amuchi agaigai eng’ kagochinet ne wendi eng’ tainnyu; ye ibata amuchi ageer togennyi; tamangab kocham kotaacha." 
Genesis32:21 Kiindo anyun kagochinet kolanda: ak kiru inendet lagatunato koboto bik. 
Genesis32:22 Ak king’eet lagatunato, komut osotikyik tuwai, ak otwogikyik tuwai che tibik, ak lagokyik taman ak agenge, agoi koyoiyo tabartab Jabok." 
Genesis32:23 Ak kiimut koba kolandae kererunoto, koboto tugukyik che kitinyei." 
Genesis32:24 Ak king’eet Jakobo inegei: ak kibiit chito ne kikwetgei tuwai agoi koeech. 
Genesis32:25 Kingogeer kole mata komuch koterter, kotwa ole tuiyechin kowekab ngoroet; ak king’uliel kubestab Jakobo, ye kikwetegei ak inendet." 
Genesis32:26 Ak kile, Unda awo, amu machei koeech. Ak kilenji, Maundoin ama iberura." 
Genesis32:27 Ak kiteebe, kolenji, Ng’o kaineng’ung’? Ak kilenji, Kiguurena Jakobo." 
Genesis32:28 Ak kilenji, Ma keguurenen Jakobo agoi, ago kagiguurenen Israel: amu kaobelgei ak Kamuktaindet ak bik agichek, ak kaiterter." 
Genesis32:29 Ak kiteebe Jakobo kolenji, Asain ale, mwawa kaineng’ung’. Ak kilenji, Amu nee si iteebena kainennyu? Ak kiiberur eng’ yoto." 
Genesis32:30 Kiguure anyun Jakobo kainetab yoto Peniel: amu kaager togetab Kamuktaindet kimni, ak kota asobe." 
Genesis32:31 Ak kichor asista ye kilandae Penuel, ak kiing’walati amu kubestanyi." 
Genesis32:32 Maamei bikab Israel tigitiotab ngoroet koboch yoto, agoi kora, amu noto: amu kitwa ole tuiyechin kowekab ngoroetab Jakobo eng’ tigitiotab ngoroet." 
Genesis33:1 Kitobendo Jakobo, kogeer konyonei Esau, koboto bik bogol ang’wan. Ak kipchei lagok kopchjechi Lea, ak Rael, ak otwogichoto aeng’ che tibik." 
Genesis33:2 Ak kichob kondo kwonyichoto otwogik ak lagokwak, yeityo korub Lea ak lagokyik, kolet eng’ tugul Rael ak Josep." 
Genesis33:3 Kiindoe inendet ichek, yeityo kong’uruk agoi ng’ony konyil tisab, agoi korikyi ng’etab kamet." 
Genesis33:4 Ak kilabat Esau kotorokta, ak konam koue eut, kosuub kaatinnyi, kong’utut: ak koririo." 
Genesis33:5 Ak kingotobendo, kogeer osotik ak lagok; ak kiteebe kolenji, Ng’o chu omi tugul? Ak kile, Lagok che kiigochi Kamuktaindet otwogindeng’ung’, eng’ rirenennyi bo ge." 
Genesis33:6 Kirik anyun kwonyichoto otwogik ak lagokwak, ak kobwa kong’urukso." 
Genesis33:7 Ak kirik Lea agine ak lagokyik kobwa kong’urukso: ak kingobata korik Josep ak Rael, nyo kong’urukso agichek." 
Genesis33:8 Ak kiteebe kolenji, Bo nee akwotisiechu tugul kaatuiye? Kolenji, Si kobiit anyor chamet eng’ taitab kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis33:9 Ak kile Esau, Atinye che yama, tupchennyu; ingobunjin choto itinye." 
Genesis33:10 Ak kilenji Jakobo, Achicha, asain ale, ngo kaanyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’, ko mie itaach chu kagonin eng’ eunnyu: amu kaageer togeng’ung’, ko u ye kigeerei togetab Kamuktaindet, ak ageere anyun ale ibaibai eng’ ane." 
Genesis33:11 Asain ale, taach inye che kagonin che kagigetun; amu kiyaiywa Kamuktaindet ne mie, ak amu atinye che yama. Ak kiigaigai kot kocham kokweri." 
Genesis33:12 Ak kile Esau, Ongenam banda, kebe, si andoenen." 
Genesis33:13 Ak kilenjin Jakobo Esau, Ingen inye kiptainandennyu, ile mengechen lagok, ak kotinyei nego arek, kotinyei tuga moek: ak ngot kekweri eng’ betut komugul, komuch kobek akwotisiek tugul." 
Genesis33:14 Asain kiptaiyandennyu ale, indoena ane otwogindeng’ung’: si aree ane mutyo, ko u bandab akwet ak ne bo lagok, agoi ait ole mi kiptaiyandennyu eng’ Seir." 
Genesis33:15 Ak kile Esau, Ngabagagun bikyuk alak che mi kobota. Ak kile, Koyai nee? Ingogaswa kiptaiyandennyu ko u noto." 
Genesis33:16 Kiweek anyun Esau betunoto eng’ bandanyi agoi Seir. 
Genesis33:17 Ak kiwa Jakobo agoi Sukot, kwo koteekyigei got, ak kiteech kaptugusiek: kigiguure anyun yoto Sukot." 
Genesis33:18 Kiit Jakobo anyun eng’ kalyet nganasetab Sekem, ne mitei emetab Kanan, ye kibunu Padan-aram; ak kiwa koteech emainnyi ole tokyingei nganaset." 
Genesis33:19 Ak kial koret eng’ bikab Hamor, kwandab Sekem, eng’ fedaisiek bogol agenge, ole kigateech emainnyi." 
Genesis33:20 Ak kiteech kaptisisiet eng’ oloto, ak kiguure kaptisisionoto El-eloe-Israel." 
Genesis34:1 Ak kiwa Dina cheptab Lea, ne kisikyi Jakobo, kwo kogeer tibikab emonoto." 
Genesis34:2 Ak kigeer Sekem, weritab Hamor ne bo Hibik, kiruogindetab emonoto, ak kinam inendet, koruiyo tuwai, ak kotewer." 
Genesis34:3 Ak kicham muguleldanyi Dina cheptab Jakobo, kicham cheboto ak king’alalji inendet kogaigai." 
Genesis34:4 Ak king’alal Sekem ak kwandanyi Hamor, kolenji, Weiywa koito cheboto si kobiit atun." 
Genesis34:5 Ak kigas Jakobo kole, kigong’em chichoto cheptanyi Dina: ak kiiyagisiei werikyik eng’ kewanin: ak kisis Jakobo agoi koit." 
Genesis34:6 Kiwa anyun Hamor kwandab Sekem kong’alaljin ak Jakobo. 
Genesis34:7 Ak kingogas werikab Jakobo, kobwa ga kobunu kewanin: ak kigas ng’wanindo murenjoto, ak kinerekso kot, amu kiyai abusnatet eng’ Israel, amu kiruiyo ak cheptab Jakobo; kit ne magichamei keyai." 
Genesis34:8 Ak king’alal Hamor ak icheget, kolenji, Machei Sekem werinnyu cheptang’wong’ mising’: asomok ale, ogochi inendet kotun." 
Genesis34:9 Mie keegu bik che kigonegei: ogonech tibikwok, ak otun chechok ak okwek." 
Genesis34:10 Ak ongemeng’jine: ak mi emoni taing’wong’; omeng’isie ak oyae mung’aret, ak onyoru magornatet eng’ olito." 
Genesis34:11 Ak kilenji Sekem kwandab Dina ak tupchosiekab Dina, Mie anyor chamet eng’ taing’wong’, ak kiy age tugul ne omwawa amuchi agonok." 
Genesis34:12 Agonok kanyiok che te che omache, ak kagochinoik: ago ogona chepto atun." 
Genesis34:13 Ak kiwolji eng’ ng’alset werikab Jakobo, Sekem koboto kwandanyi Hamor, ak king’alalji, amu kiga ng’em tupchenywa Dina," 
Genesis34:14 ak kilenji, Magimuchi keyai kit ne u nito, kigochi chi ne ma kimuratan tupchennyo; amu egu tewernat noto eng’ achek." 
Genesis34:15 Kimuch kechamnyechi ak okwek eng’ ng’olyondoni kityo, ngocham oige achek, kele keyatita muren age tugul eng’ okwek;" 
Genesis34:16 eng’ noto anyun kegonok tibikyok, ak kitun tibikwok agichek, ak kemeny kobotok, ak keegu agenge." 
Genesis34:17 Ago ngot ko mogasech ak ocham keyatitak; kimuti anyun cheptanyo, ak kebe." 
Genesis34:18 Kicham anyun Hamor, ak Sekem weritab Hamor ng’alekwak." 
Genesis34:19 Ak kima igagei murenonoto koyai ko u noto, amu kiga cham mising’ cheptab Jakobo, ak kigigonyiti inendet kosiir bik tugul che bo gotab kwandanyi." 
Genesis34:20 Ak kiba Hamor ak werinnyi Sekem ormarichetab nganasenywa, ak king’alal ak bikab nganasenywa, kolenjigei," 
Genesis34:21 Kichamdosi ak bichuto; eng’ noto anyun, mie komeny emoni, ak koyai mung’aret eng’ olito, amu baraa emoni, yamei ichek; ongitun tibikwak ak kigochi chechok agichek kotun." 
Genesis34:22 Ago imuchi bichoto kocham komeny kobotech, ak keegu agenge, ngot kechamnyechi kit agenge, noto ko kiyaitia muren age tugul eng’ achek, ko u ye yatitoi ichek." 
Genesis34:23 Tos mabunjinech akwotisiekwak che bo nego ak tugukwak ak tukwak tugul? Ongecham ng’olyondonito kityo, si komeny kobotech." 
Genesis34:24 Ak kicham ng’alekab Hamor ak Sekem werinnyi tugul che kimandae ormarichetab nganasennyi; ak kigiyatita muren age tugul, tugul che kimandae ormarichetab nganasennyi." 
Genesis34:25 Ak eng’ betutab somok ye kimiandos, konam age tugul rotwennyi bo chok, eng’ werjoto aeng’ bo Jakobo, Simeon ak Lawi, tupchosiekab Dina, koba nganaset eng’ nyiganatet, kobar murenik tugul." 
Genesis34:26 Ak kibar Hamor ak Sekem werinnyi eng’ rotwetab chok, ak komut Dina eng’ gotab Sekem, koba oldanyua." 
Genesis34:27 Ak kibwa werikab Jakobo ole mi bik che kagebar, ak kiluul nganaset, amu kiga kong’em chepkametinywa." 
Genesis34:28 Kiluul kechirekwak ak tukwak ak sigirokwak ak kiy age tugul ne kimi nganaset, ak tuguk che kimi mbarenik;" 
Genesis34:29 ak tugukwak tugul, ak lagokwak ak osotikwak, kiluul tugul, kiib agot che kimi gorik." 
Genesis34:30 Ak kilenji Jakobo Simeon ak Lawi, Kaoiima, ak kaogona aek ne kiwechei eng’ bik che menyei emoni, eng’ Kanaik ak Perisik: ak koyumjagei, kobara kowong’wa koboto gonnyu, ago achek, kota ko ki ng’ering’." 
Genesis34:31 Ak kile ichek, Tos kanyolu koyai tupchennyo koek chepkugonio?" 
Genesis35:1 Kilenji Kamuktaindet Jakobo, Ng’eet, ui togoste Betel, imeny olindo: ak iteekyi Kamuktaindet kaptisisiet eng’ oloto, inendet ne kimong’jin ye kiimwee ng’etab komet Esau." 
Genesis35:2 Kimwachi Jakobo anyun bikab gonnyi, ak tugul che kimi koboto inendet, kolenji, Olakte kanaamonik che mi kwenung’wong’ che bo bororiosiek alak, ak oanyingei, ak owal ngoroikwok:" 
Genesis35:3 ong’eetye anyun, kebe ketogoste Betel; si awo ateekyi Kamuktaindet kaptisisiet eng’ olindo, inendet ne kiwolwa eng’ betutab bichiindanyu ne kimi kobota eng’ bandanyu." 
Genesis35:4 Kiigochi anyun bichoto Jakobo kanamonichoto tugul bo bororiosiek alak che kitinyei, ak munaok che kimi itikwak, ak kiuny Jakobo choto eng’ ketit kel ne kimi Sekem." 
Genesis35:5 Kiba anyun: ak kitebe nganasok che kimi ole negite icheget, kamuisetab Kamuktaindet, ak ma isub werikab Jakobo." 
Genesis35:6 Kiit Jakobo Lus anyun (noto ko Betel), ne mi emetab Kanan, inendet ak bik tugul che kimi koboto inendet." 
Genesis35:7 Ak kiteech kaptisisiet eng’ oloto, ak kiguure oloto El-bet-el: amu yoto ko ye king’ang’jinegei Kamuktaindet, ye kimwee ng’etab kamet." 
Genesis35:8 Ak kime Debora cheblakwetab Rebeka, ak kigitupchi ole negite Betel, eng’ ketit kel ne kimi oloto: ak kigiguure ketoto Alon-bakut." 
Genesis35:9 Komong’ji Kamuktaindet Jakobo kogeny, koberur, ye kibunu Padan-aram." 
Genesis35:10 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet inendet, Kaineng’ung’ ko Jakobo: ma keguurenen Jakobo kogeny, ago ngeguurenen Israel, ak kiguure kainennyi Israel." 
Genesis35:11 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet, A Kamuktaindet ne bo Kamuktaet: ii ak itesage; ak tun mong’unenen inye bororiet ak chang’indab bororiosiek, ak mong’une bortang’ung’ laitorinik;" 
Genesis35:12 ak tun agonin emonoto kiagochi Abraham ak Isak, ak agochini lagoguk agichek che tun biitu let." 
Genesis35:13 Ak kiwa anyun Kamuktaindet eng’ yoto kotogosta eng’ ole king’alale. 
Genesis35:14 Ak kilumda Jakobo toloita eng’ yoto king’alale, toloita ne bo koita: ak kirong’ji kagochinet ne bo tuguk che kieei, yeityo korong’ji mwaita." 
Genesis35:15 Ak kiguure Jakobo kainetab yoto Betel ole king’alale ak Kamuktaindet. 
Genesis35:16 Kiba anyun eng’ Betel; ak kingo tom koit Eprat, koam moet Rael, ak kinyor bichiindo eng’ moonato." 
Genesis35:17 Ak ye kimachei kosigis eng’ bichiindo, kolenji korgetab sigisio, Ameiywei amu imache isich ng’etet age nguno." 
Genesis35:18 Ak ye kingo machei kome koguure kainennyi Ben-oni ak kome: ago kiguure inendet kwandanyi Benjamin. 
Genesis35:19 Ak kime Rael, ak kigitupchi oret ne wendi Eprat (yoto ko Bet-lehem)." 
Genesis35:20 Ak kilumda Jakobo toloita eng’ kererinnyi: ak kereritab Rael toloata agoi kora. 
Genesis35:21 Kiu anyun Israel, ak kiteech emainnyi ole negite teekset ne koi ne bo Eder komosin." 
Genesis35:22 Ak ye kita komenyei Israel emonoto, kwo Reuben koipgei ak Bila, chebaigeiyatab kwandanyi: ak kigas Israel ng’olyondonoto. Ki taman ak aeng’ werikab Jakobo:" 
Genesis35:23 Chu ko werikab Lea: ne bo tai ko Reuben, ne o ne bo Jakobo, ak Simeon, Lawi, Juda, Isakar, ak Sebulun." 
Genesis35:24 Chu ko werikab Rael: Josep ak Benjamin. 
Genesis35:25 Chu ko werikab Bila, kwondo ne ki otwogindetab Rael: Dan ak Naptali." 
Genesis35:26 Chu ko werikab Silba, kwondo ne ki otwogindetab Lea: Gad ak Aser: chuto ko ki werikab Jakobo che kisichei eng’ Padan-aram." 
Genesis35:27 Ak kiit Jakobo Mamre, oldab Isak kwandanyi, agoi Kiriat-arba (noto ko Hebron), oloto ole kicham komenyei Abraham ak Isak ye ki ta ko toek." 
Genesis35:28 Ak kenyisiekab Isak ko ki bogol ak tamanwogik sisit. 
Genesis35:29 Ak kiilil Isak, ak kigiyum koboto bikwak, boiyot ne kiga koosit mising’: ak kitub inendet werikyik Esau ak Jakobo." 
Genesis36:1 Chu ko ortinwekab Esau (noto ko Edom). 
Genesis36:2 Kiitun Esau tibikab Kanan; Ada cheptab Elon Hitindet ak Oholibama cheptab Ana ne ki cheptab Sibeon Hibindet; 
Genesis36:3 ak Basemat cheptab Ismael, chepkametab Nebaiot." 
Genesis36:4 Ak kisikyi Ada Esau Elipas; ak kisich Basemat Reuel; 
Genesis36:5 ak kisich Oholibama Jeus, Jalam, ak Kora: choto ko werikab Esau, che kisichei eng’ emetab Kanan." 
Genesis36:6 Ak kiimut Esau osotikyik, ak werikyik, ak tibikyik, ak bik tugul che bo gonnyi, ak tukyik, ak akwotisiekyik tugul, ak tugukyik tugul, che kiga koyumjigei eng’ emetab Kanan; kiu kwo emet age kolooit eng’ ng’etab kamet Jakobo." 
Genesis36:7 Amu ki chang’ tugukwak mising’ kot koma imuch komeng’jin tuwai; ak kima koyamei ichek tuwai emet ne kiegunote toek amu akwotisiekwak. 
Genesis36:8 Kimeny anyun Esau tulwetab Seir: Esau ko Edom. 
Genesis36:9 Chu ko ortinwekab Esau, kwandab Edomik eng’ tulwetab Seir:" 
Genesis36:10 chu ko kainaikab werikab Esau; Elipas weritab Ada osotiotab Esau, Reuel weritab Basemat, osotiotab Esau." 
Genesis36:11 Ak werikab Elipas ko ki Teman, Omar, Sepo, Gatam, ak Kenas." 
Genesis36:12 Timna ko ki chebaigeiyatab Elipas weritab Esau, ak kisikyi Elipas Amalek: chuto ko werikab Ada ne bo Esau." 
Genesis36:13 Ak chu ko werikab Reuel; Nahat, Sera, Sama, ak Misa: choto ko ki werikab Basemat ne bo Esau." 
Genesis36:14 Ak chu ko ki werikab Oholibama osotiotab Esau, cheptab Ana, ne ki cheptab Sibeon: ak kisikyi Esau Jeus, ak Jalam, ak Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Chuto ko kiruogikab werikab Esau: werikab Elipas, ne o ne bo Esau: kiruogindet Teman, kiruogindet Omar, kiruogindet Sepo, ak kiruogindet Kenas," 
Genesis36:16 ak kiruogindet Kora, kiruogindet Gatam, ak kiruogindet Amalek; chuto ko kiruogik che kisichei Elipas eng’ emetab Edom; chuto ko werikab Ada." 
Genesis36:17 Chu ko werikab Reuel weritab Esau; kiruogindet Nahat, kiruogindet Sera, kiruogindet Sama, ak kiruogindet Misa: chuto ko kiruogik che kisichei Reuel eng’ emetab Edom; chuto ko werikab Basemat osotiotab Esau." 
Genesis36:18 Chu ko werikab Oholibama osotiotab Esau; kiruogindet Jeus, kiruogindet Jalam, ak kiruogindet Kora; chuto ko kiruogik che kisichei Oholibama, osotiotab Esau cheptab Ana." 
Genesis36:19 Chuto ko werikab Esau, inendet ko Edom, ak chuto ko kiruogikwak." 
Genesis36:20 Chu ko werikab Seir Horindet, che kimenyei emonoto: Lotan, Sobal, Sibeon, Ana," 
Genesis36:21 Dison, Eser ak Disan: chuto ko kiruogik che kimong’une Horik, bikab Seir eng’ emetab Edom." 
Genesis36:22 Ak lagokab Lotan ko ki Hori ak Hemam; ak chepkametab Lotan ko ki Timna. 
Genesis36:23 Chu ko lagokab Sobal; Alban, Manahat, Ebal, Sepo ak Onam." 
Genesis36:24 Ak chu ko lagokab Sibeon: Aja ak Ana; Ana nito ko ne kinyor kong’ikab beek che beelei bich eng’ ong’atet, ye kiiyagi sigirokab Sibeon kwandanyi." 
Genesis36:25 Chu ko lagokab Ana: Dison ak Oholibama cheptab Ana. 
Genesis36:26 Ak chu ko lagokab Dison: Hemdan, Esban, Itran ak Keran." 
Genesis36:27 Chu ko lagokab Eser: Bilan, Saaban ak Akan." 
Genesis36:28 Chu ko lagokab Disan: Us ak Aran. 
Genesis36:29 Chuto ko kiruogik che kimong’une Horik; kiruogindet Lotan, kiruogindet Sobal, kiruogindet Sibeon, kiruogindet Ana," 
Genesis36:30 kiruogindet Dison, kiruogindet Eser, kiruogindet Disan; chuto ko kiruogik che kimong’une Horik, ko u kiruogikwak eng’ emetab Seir." 
Genesis36:31 Chu laitorinik che kilaitorane emetab Edom, ye kitomo kobiit laitoriat ne bou bikab Israel." 
Genesis36:32 Kilaitorane Edom Bela weritab Beor; kainetab nganasennyi ko ki Dinaba. 
Genesis36:33 Ak kime Bela, ak kinam laitornatennyi Jobab weritab Sera ne bo Bosra." 
Genesis36:33 Ak kime Bela, ak kinam laitornatennyi Jobab weritab Sera ne bo Bosra." 
Genesis36:34 Ak kime Jobab, ak kinam laitornatennyi Husam ne bo emetab Temanik." 
Genesis36:34 Ak kime Jobab, ak kinam laitornatennyi Husam ne bo emetab Temanik." 
Genesis36:35 Ak kime Husam, ak kinam laitornatennyi Hadad weritab Bedad, ne kibar Midianik eng’ turguitab Moab; ak kainetab nganasennyi ko ki Abit." 
Genesis36:36 Ak kime Hadad, ak kinam laitornatennyi Samla ne bo Masreka." 
Genesis36:37 Ak kime Samla, ak kinam laitornatennyi Saul ne bo Rehobot nganaset ne negite ainet." 
Genesis36:38 Ak kime Saul, ak kinam laitornatennyi Baal-hanan weritab Akbor." 
Genesis36:39 Ak kime Baal-hanan weritab Akbor, ak kinam laitornatennyi Hadar: ak kainetab nganasennyi ko ki Pau; ak kainetab osotiondennyi ko ki Meetabel cheptab Matred, cheptab Me- sahab." 
Genesis36:40 Ak chu kainaikab kiruogik che kimong’une Esau, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u korotinwekwak, ko u kainaikwak: kiruogindet Timna, kiruogindet Alba, kiruogindet Jetet;" 
Genesis36:41 kiruogindet Oholibama, kiruogindet Ela, kiruogindet Pinon;" 
Genesis36:42 kiruogindet Kenas, kiruogindet Teman, kiruogindet Mibsar;" 
Genesis36:43 kiruogindet Magdiel, kiruogindet Iram: chuto ko kiruogikab Edom, ko u meng’otenywa eng’ emet ne ki nenywa: nito ko Esau kwandab Edomik." 
Genesis37:1 Kimeny anyun Jakobo emetab Kanan ole kiegunote kwandanyi toondet. 
Genesis37:2 Chu ortinwekab Jakobo. Kiga koit Josep kenyisiek taman ak tisab, ye kiiyagoti akwetab kerichek koboto tupchosiekyik; ak kimi weroto koboto werikab Bila, ak werikab Silba, osotikab kwandanyi: ak kiibu Josep ng’alekwak che yaachen komwachin kwandanywa." 
Genesis37:3 Ak kichamei Israel Josep kosiir werikyik tugul, amu kisichei koga koosit: ak kinapchi ngoriet ne koi ne bochin agot eunek." 
Genesis37:4 Ak kigeer werik che tupcho kole, chamei kwandanywa inendet kosiir tupchosiekyik tugul; ak kiwech inendet, kot komata kocham kong’alalji inendet eng’ kalyet." 
Genesis37:5 Ak kiiruotyi Josep karuotitoet, ak kimwachi werik che tupcho: ak kites kowech inendet kosiir." 
Genesis37:6 Ak kilenji ichek, Kaigai ogas karuotitaoni koaruotyi:" 
Genesis37:7 ogeero, kogirate bek che mi ak mobek eng’ mbar, ak kong’eetyo bekyuk che koarat, kotononso: ogeero, koyiem bekwok che koorat, bek chechuk ak kong’urukyi." 
Genesis37:8 Ak kilenji werik che tupcho, Ilen tos tun ilaitoranenech? Anan tos tun iboiywech? Ak kites kowech inendet kosiir amu karuotitaosiekyik, ak ng’alekyik." 
Genesis37:9 Ak kiiruotyi karuotitoet age kogeny, ak kimwachi tupchosiekyik kolenji, Ogeero, koaruotyi kogeny karuotitoet; ogeero, koing’urukya asista ak arawet ak kecheik taman ak agenge." 
Genesis37:10 Ak kimwachi kwandanyi ak werik che tupcho: ak kiger kong’ kwandanyi inendet, ak koteebe kolenji, Nee karuotitaoni koiruotyi? Tos king’urukyin agoi ng’ony iman agot ane ak komet ak tupchosieguk?" 
Genesis37:11 Ak kiam ng’et kong’ tupchosiekyik agobo inendet; ago kigonor kwandanyi ng’olyondonoto eng’ muguleldanyi. 
Genesis37:12 Ak kiba tupchosiekyik koyaga akwetab kechirek che bo kwandanywa eng’ Sekem. 
Genesis37:13 Ak kilenji Israel Josep, Tos maiyagi werik che otupche akwet eng’ Sekem? Nyo anyun ayokten iwe ole mi icheget. Ak kilenji inendet, Ami yu." 
Genesis37:14 Ak kilenji, Ui anyun nguno, igeer ngo chamegei tupchosieguk koboto akwet; si inyo imwawa. Kiiyokto anyun kwo eng’ atebwetab Hebron, kiit anyun Sekem." 
Genesis37:15 Ak kinyor inendet chito age, ogeero, kicheng’soti eng’ kewet; ak kiteebe inendet kolenji, Icheng’e nee?" 
Genesis37:16 Ak kile, Acheng’oti werik che kitupche: kaigai imwawa ole iyagisie." 
Genesis37:17 Ak kilenji chichoto, Kogoba eng’ oli: amu kiagas komwaei kolen, Ongebe Dotan. Ak kisub Josep tupchosiekyik, ak kinyorji Dotan." 
Genesis37:18 Ak kigeer icheget inendet kota komi ole loo, ak kingotom korik ole mi, kotil ng’alek ole bartoi inendet." 
Genesis37:19 Ak king’alaljigei kole, Ogeero, nyonei chitab karuotitoet." 
Genesis37:20 Ongebe anyun kebar, si kewirji keringet, ak kemwa kele, Kaam tiondo ne ya: si kegeer kit ne egu karuotitaosiekyik." 
Genesis37:21 Ak kigas Reuben, ak kisor inendet eng’ eunekwak, kolenji, Amongebar." 
Genesis37:22 Kilenji Reuben, Amotumde korotik: owirji keringoni mi ong’atet, amoyachi kiy ne ya: si kosor inendet eng’ eunekwak, si koweekyi inendet kwandanyi." 
Genesis37:23 Ak kingoit Josep ole mi tupchosiekyik, koreegune Josep ngoriennyi, ngorionoto koi ne kiilaachi;" 
Genesis37:24 kiimut anyun inendet, ak kowirji keringet: kimi buch keringonoto, kima komi beek." 
Genesis37:25 Ak kiteb ng’ony koamis: kitobendo anyun, kogeer bikab Ismaelik kobwanei, kobunu Gilead, koboto tambesikwak che kilaei tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak mwanik che kinyaise, ak tuguk che u igomoik, kochortagei Misri." 
Genesis37:26 Ak kilenji Juda werichoto tupcho, Tos mi kelunet nee ngebar tupchennyo ak keuny korotikyik?" 
Genesis37:27 Ongebe anyun kealdochi Ismaelik, ago amongeyachi kiy ne ya; amu inendet ko tupchennyo, ak ko bo korotikyok. Ak kigas tupchosiekyik ng’alekyik." 
Genesis37:28 Yeityo kosiir yoto chemung’arainik che bo Midian; ak kiimoong’ Josep kolong’ eng’ keringet, ak koaldochi Joseph Ismaelik eng’ fedaisiek tiptem. Kiimut anyun Josep kwo Misri." 
Genesis37:29 Ak kiweeigei Reuben kwo ole mi keringet; ak ogeero, kima komi Josep keringet; ak kigerer ngoroikyik." 
Genesis37:30 Kiweektagei anyun kwo ole mi tupchosiekyik, ak kile, Mamitei lakwet; ara, si awo ano anyun?" 
Genesis37:31 Ak kinam ngorietab Josep ak koeny kwesta, ak koiile ngoriet korotik;" 
Genesis37:32 ak kiiyokto ngorionoto koi, keipchi kwandanywa; ak kile, Kaginyoru ngorioni; inyit anyun ngo ngorietab wering’ung’ anan ma nenyi." 
Genesis37:33 Ak kiinyit, ak kole, Ngorietab werinnyu iman; kagoam inendet tiondo ne ya; kagetonaton Josep iman." 
Genesis37:34 Ak kigerer Jakobo ngoroikyik, ak kogermenegei kuniet, ak kirirji werinnyi betusiek che chang’." 
Genesis37:35 Ak king’eetyo werikyik tugul ak tibikyik tugul kole kogaigai inendet; ago kiesio inendet kigaigai; ak kile, Eng’ noto anyun, arirjini werinnyu agoi ait oldab che kigobek. Kirirji anyun kwandanyi inendet." 
Genesis37:36 Ak kialda Midianik Josep kwo Misri, koal Potipar, kiboitiotab Parao, kiptaiyatab ribik." 
Genesis38:1 Kichortagei anyun Juda eng’ betusiechoto, kwo eng’ ole mi tupchosiekyik, agoi ye mi Adulamindet age ne keguure kainennyi Hira." 
Genesis38:2 Ak kigeer Juda eng’ oloto cheptab Kananindet age ne kiguure kainennyi Sua; ak kiitun, ak kiituiyogei ak inendet." 
Genesis38:3 Ak kimanach, ak kisich werit; ak kiguure kainennyi Er." 
Genesis38:4 Ak kimanach kogeny, kosich werit ak kiguure kainennyi Onan." 
Genesis38:5 Ak kisich werit kogeny, ak kiguure kainennyi Sela: ak kimi Juda Chesib ye kingesichei noto." 
Genesis38:6 Ak kiitunji Juda, Er werinnyi ne bo tai, osotiot, ne kigiguure kainennyi Tamar." 
Genesis38:7 Ak ki chi ne sogoran Er eng’ taitab Jehovah, inendet taita ne bo Juda; ak kibar Jehovah inendet." 
Genesis38:8 Ak kilenji Juda Onan, Mie otuiyegei ak osotiotab ng’etab komet, iichi, ilal matab ng’etab komet." 
Genesis38:9 Ak kinai Onan kole, Magimuchi kiityi inendet lagochoto kele kobunji; ak ye kingotuiyogei ak osotiotab ng’etab kamet, kotumji ng’ony, si mailaalji mat ng’etab kamet." 
Genesis38:10 Ak kiyait kioto kiyai eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak kibar inendet agine. 
Genesis38:11 Kolenji anyun Juda Tamar osotiotab werinnyi, Tebe gotab kwandang’ung’, ko i mosok, kot koeet Sela werinnyu: amu kile, Si mame agine ko u werichun tupcho. Kiwa Tamar anyun kotebe gotab kwandanyi." 
Genesis38:12 Ak kingosiirto betusiek alage kome cheptab Sua, kwondab Juda; ak kigigaigai Juda, ak kiwa ole mitei bik che tilei kororikab kechirekyik eng’ Timna, inendet koboto choruennyi Hira Adulamindet." 
Genesis38:13 Ak kigimwachi Tamar, kelenji, Keero, wendi Timna kwandab manong’otiot king’ung’, wendi kotilei kororikab kechirekyik." 
Genesis38:14 Kiireek anyun ngoroikyik che bo mosognatet, ak kiilaach ngoriet ne koi, kotugegei, ak kotaegei ngorionoto, ak kitebe ormarichetab nganaset ne kiguure Enaim, ne mi oret ne wendi Timna: amu kigeer kole kigoeet Sela, ak ma kigochi inendet kotun." 
Genesis38:15 Kingogeer Juda inendet, kolen abere chepkugonio, amu kiga tuch togennyi." 
Genesis38:16 Ak kiwa ole mi eng’ oret taban, ak kolenji, Kaigai icham kituiyegei; amu kima nai kole inendet ko osotiot ki bo werinnyi. Ak kilenji, Igona nee, si kobiit inyonja?" 
Genesis38:17 Ak kile, Ayogun aruetab ng’oror ne bunu akwet. Ak kile, Igona nee koek kayosieng’ung’ agoi iyogu kegetwa?" 
Genesis38:18 Ak kile, Nee kayosiet ne agonin? Ak kilenji, Ng’okseng’ung’ ak rogoet ak siaring’ung’ no iting’e eung’ung’. Ak kiigochi inendet tukchoto, kotuiyogei anyun ak inendet, ak kimanage inendet." 
Genesis38:19 Ak king’eet kwo, ak koreek ngoriennyi ne koi, ak kolaach ngoroikyik che bo mosognatet." 
Genesis38:20 Ak kiiyokto Juda aruetab ng’oror koyoktae eutab choruennyi Adulamindet, si kobiit koweekyi mosoganato tugukab kayosiennyi, ago kimanyor chichoto inendet." 
Genesis38:21 Kiteebe anyun Adulamindonoto murenikab oloto, kolenji, Mi ano chepkugoniot ne kimi oret taban eng’ Enaim? Kowolji ichek kolenji, Kima komi chepkugonio oli koboch keny." 
Genesis38:22 Ak kiweektagei kwo ole mi Juda ak kolenji, Ma anyoru inendet; ak kile murenikab oloto agichek, Kima komi chepkugonio olito koboch keny." 
Genesis38:23 Ak kile Juda, Ingobunji inendet, si ma kitewerech: keero, kaayoktaenen aruani, ago ma inyoru." 
Genesis38:24 Ak kingobata betusiek che negit arawek somok, kemwachi Juda kelenji, Kigoek chepkugonio Tamar osotiotab werit king’ung’; kot ko nguno, kotinyei moet ne bo ibetab ge. Ak kile Juda, Omutu kebeel." 
Genesis38:25 Ak ye kingo kagimut koyokto kemwachi kwandab manong’otiondennyi kelenji, kole, Kiamanage chitab kobo tuguchu atinye: ak kile, Inyit tuguchu kaigai si inai chitab kobo, ng’okset ak rogoet ak siarit." 
Genesis38:26 Kiinyit anyun, ak kole, Bo iman kwonyi kosiira; amu ma agochi inendet Sela werinnyu. Ak kimata kotuiyogei ak inendet kogeny." 
Genesis38:27 Ye kingoit betutab sigisiet, ogeero, kimi saramek moennyi." 
Genesis38:28 Ak ye kisigisiei, komoong’ lakwet age eut: ak kiratyi korgetab sigisio eunoto borowet ne birir, ak kole, Kagondoi nito." 
Genesis38:29 Ak ye kingogetita eunnyi, kesich ng’etab kamet: ak kile korgetab sigisio, Amu nee si imong’u eng’ kimnatet inyegei? Kigiguure anyun kainennyi Peres amu noto." 
Genesis38:30 Ak ye kingobata kesich ng’etab kamet ne tinyei borowet ne birir eng’ eut: ak kigiguure kainennyi Sera. 
Genesis39:1 Kigimut Josep anyun kochortagei kwo Misri; ak kial inendet Potipar kiboitiotab Parao, kiptaiyatab ribik, Misrindet, eng’ eunekab Ismaelik, che kiimuti inendet kwo oloto." 
Genesis39:2 Ak kimi Jehovah koboto Josep, ak ki chito ne iberurot; ak kimi gotab kiptaiyandennyi Misrindet." 
Genesis39:3 Ak kigeer kiptaiyandennyi kole, mi Jehovah koboto inendet, ak kiiberur Jehovah tuguk tugul che kiyaei." 
Genesis39:4 Ak kichamak Josep eng’ inendet, ak kiboisiechin inendet: ak kiinde Potipar inendet koek ribindetab boisiennyi, ak kiinde tugukyik tugul eunekyik." 
Genesis39:5 Ak kiiberur Jehovah gotab Misrindet amu Josep koboch ye kingoboi gonnyi ak tuguk tugul che bo Misrindonoto; ak kitebe berurtab Jehovah tuguk tugul che kitinyei eng’ gonnyi ak eng’ mbarenikyik. 
Genesis39:6 Ak kibagakyi tuguk tugul che kitinyei eunekab Josep; ak kima kota kongen tugukyik, kobate amitwogik che kiamei. Ak ki chito ne kararan kot Josep eng’ bortanyi." 
Genesis39:7 Ak kingobata tuguchoto, kogeer osotiotab kiptaiyandennyi Josep, ak kolenji, Ngeruiye tuwai." 
Genesis39:8 Ago kiesio, ak kolenji osotiotab kiptaiyandennyi, Keero, manaei kiptaiyandennyu agot tugukyik che aribe eng’ gonnyi, ak kigonde eunekyuk tugul che tinyei;" 
Genesis39:9 mami age agoi ne o ne siira; ama mi kiy ne etena kobatenen inye, amu i osotiondennyi. Amuktoi ano anyun ayai tengegi te ni, ak achalwogenji Kamuktaindet?" 
Genesis39:10 Ak kicham kong’alaljin osotiondonoto Josep betut age tugul, ago kima cham kogasyi koruiyo tuwai, anan kotebi ichegei." 
Genesis39:11 Kiwa anyun Josep eng’ betusiechoto koyai boisiennyi eng’ go; ak kima komi mureno age ne bo goyoto koboto inendet eng’ go. 
Genesis39:12 Kinam anyun ngoriennyi, ak kolenji, Ngeruiye tuwai: ak kimetochi Josep ngoriennyi eutab osotiondonoto, ak komwei komanda sang’." 
Genesis39:13 Ak ye kingogeer osotiondonoto kole, kagometochi ngoriet eunnyi ak komwei," 
Genesis39:14 koguur anyun murenik che bo gonnyi, ak kong’alalji kolenji, Ogeero, kigomutwech inendet Hebranindet kochotech; kanyo ole ami kole keruiye tuwai, ak kaawach:" 
Genesis39:15 ak ye kangogas inendet awaach eng’ kutit ne o, kometoiywa ngoriennyi, ak komwei, komanda sang’." 
Genesis39:16 Ak kigonor ngorionoto kwonyoto agoi koit ga kiptaiyatab Josep. 
Genesis39:17 Ak kimwachi ng’alechato, kolenji, Konyonja kochota otwogindet Hebranindet ne kiimutwech:" 
Genesis39:18 ak ye kingawaach eng’ kutit ne o, kometoiywa ngoriennyi, ak komwei, kwo sang’." 
Genesis39:19 Ak ye kingogas kiptaiyandennyi ng’alekab osotiondennyi, che kimwachi kolenji, Kiyaiywa ko u ni otwogindeng’ung’, konerech anyun ne ng’wan." 
Genesis39:20 Ak kinam Josep kiptaiyandennyi ak kotoorji korgoret, ole kigiratyin kimonjororinikab laitoriat: ak kitebe korgoronato." 
Genesis39:21 Ago kimi Jehovah koboto Josep, ak kiriregei inendet, ak kiigochi konyor chamet eng’ bounindetab korgoret." 
Genesis39:22 Ak kiigochi bounindetab korgoret Josep koboi kimonjororinik tugul che kimi korgoret; ak tuguk tugul che kigiyaei eng’ oloto, ko inendet ne kiyaei." 
Genesis39:23 Kima kota koribei bounindetab korgoret kiy age tugul ne kinamu Josep, amu kimi Jehovah koboto inendet; ak kiiberur Jehovah kiy age tugul ne kiyaei Josep." 
Genesis40:1 Ak kingobata tuguchu, kochalwogenji ribindetab tuguk che kieei, ak ribindetab kwang’set, kiptaiyandenywa laitoriatab Misri." 
Genesis40:2 Ak kinerekyi Parao kiboitinikyik tuwai, ne o eng’ che ribei tuguk che kieei, ak ne o eng’ che ribei kwong’set." 
Genesis40:3 Ak kigiger icheget eng’ ole kiga kiratyi Josep. 
Genesis40:4 Ak kiinde kiptaiyatab ribik Josep korib ichek, ak korib: ak kitebi ko kerotin eng’ betusiek che matia." 
Genesis40:5 Ak kiiruotyi tuwai karuotitoet, chi tugul ak karuotitoennyi eng’ kemout agenge, age tugul ko u weeksetab karuotitoennyi, ribindetab tuguk che kieei, ak ribindetab kwang’set ne bo laitoriatab Misri, che kiga kiratyi korgoret." 
Genesis40:6 Ak kinyo Josep karon ole mi ichek, ak kogeer, ogeero, kitinyei arogenet." 
Genesis40:7 Ak kiteebe Josep kiboitinichoto bo Parao che kimi tugul ko ratotin eng’ gotab kiptaiyandennyi, kolenji, Kalya si oarogense rani?" 
Genesis40:8 Ak kilenji, Kogiruotyi karuotitoet, ak mami chi ne imuchi koboruech ole teptoi. Ak kolenji Josep, Tos ma bo Kamuktaindet weekset? Kaigai anyun omwawa." 
Genesis40:9 Kimwachi anyun ribindet ne o ne bo tuguk che kieei, Josep, karuotitoennyi, kolenji, Ogeero, komi tainnyu ketitab sabibuk eng’ karuotitoennyu:" 
Genesis40:10 ak kitinyei ketoto temenik somok: ki u che ing’atos, ak kiyesio taptokyik; ak kii sabibuk che ruriotin:" 
Genesis40:11 ak kimi eunnyu kikombetab Parao, ak kiabut logoechoto, ak abirji kikombetab Parao, ak kiande eutab Parao kikombanato." 
Genesis40:12 Ak kilenji Josep inendet, Ye kiweech ko u ni: temenichoto somok ko betusiek somok:" 
Genesis40:13 kotomo kobata betusiek somogu koeetin Parao, ak koweekyin boisieng’ung’: ak iwe inde eutab Parao kikombennyi, ko u ye kicham iyae yu kita ko i ribindennyi ne bo tuguk che kieei." 
Genesis40:14 Ago mie tun ibwata ye tun kagomieit atebeng’ung’, ak irirena anyun, kaigai, ak imwaite eng’ gab Parao, si kimaanda eng’ goi:" 
Genesis40:15 amu kigichora iman eng’ emetab Hebranik: ak ma ayai kiy eng’ olito ne kigitoorjinena keringet. 
Genesis40:16 Kingogeer ne o eng’ ribik che bou kwang’set kole, mie weeksonoto, kolenji Josep, Koaruotyi agane komi metinnyu aterusiek somoguk che bo makatinik che leelachen;" 
Genesis40:17 ak komitei ne bo barak eng’ tugul amitwogik alak tugul che bo Parao che kwanyei kwong’ik; ak koam taritik amitwogik che bo aterunoto komi metinnyu. 
Genesis40:18 Ak kiwolji Josep kolenji, Ye kiweech ko ni: aterusiechoto somok ko betusiek somok;" 
Genesis40:19 kotom kogesgei betusiek somogu kotil Parao meting’ung’, ak kosongininin eng’ ketit; ak koam taritik bortang’ung’." 
Genesis40:20 Ak eng’ betutab somok, koit betut ne kigisige Parao, koyachi igorta otwogikyik tugul: ak kiieet ribindet ne o ne bo tuguk che kieei, ak ne o ne bo kwang’set eng’ otwogikyik." 
Genesis40:21 Kiweekyi anyun ne o ne bo ribik che bo tuguk che kieei, boisiennyi; ak kiigochi anyun ribindonoto Parao kikombet konam:" 
Genesis40:22 ago kiisonginin ribindet ne o ne bo kwang’set: ko u ye kiga koweekyi Josep ichek ole teptoi karuotitoet. 
Genesis40:23 Ago kima ibwat Josep ne o ne bo tuguk che kieei, ago kiutie." 
Genesis41:1 Ak ye kingogesgei kenyisiek aeng’u, koruotyi Parao, ogeer, kitonone inendet ye negite ainet." 
Genesis41:2 Ak ogeero, kitogosune tuga tisabu ainet, che kororon ak ko neriotin mising’; ak kiagete morong’iot." 
Genesis41:3 Ak ogeero, kitogosune ainet tuga tisabu kosubu chugai, che ma kororon ak ko sogitiotin; ak kitononso eng’ ye mi tuga chun alage eng’ ngegut." 
Genesis41:4 Ak kiam tuga che yaachen che sogitiotin tuga chun tisab che miachen che neriotin. Kosiir anyun Parao eng’ yoto. 
Genesis41:5 Kiinuuch kogeny ak kiiruotyi ne bo aeng’: ogeero, kimong’une mopchot agenge ne bo baiywat itik tisabu che ruriotin ak ko kororon." 
Genesis41:6 Ye kingobata choto komong’ itik tisabu che bo baiywat, che meiyotin, che kiimel usonet ne bunu kong’asis." 
Genesis41:7 Ak kilugui itichoto bo bechato meiyotin chun tisab ruriotin ak ko neriotin. Ak kisiir Parao ak kigeer kole kaga karuotitoet. 
Genesis41:8 Ak kingoeech karon, koiimgei eng’ muguleldanyi; ak kiiyokto keguur sirik tugul che ng’omen che bo Misri, che ng’orsei, ak bik tugul che ng’omen che kimitei: ak kitetyi Parao ichek karuotitoennyi; ago kima biit chi ne kiimuch koguiyechi Parao karuotitaosiekyik." 
Genesis41:9 Ak kimwachi anyun ne o eng’ ribikab tuguk che kieei, Parao, kolenji, Kabwat rani lelutikyuk:" 
Genesis41:10 yu kiga nerekyi Parao otwogikyik, kogera, ane ak ne o eng’ che ribei kwang’set, kogerjech gotab kiptaiyatab ribik:" 
Genesis41:11 ak kigiruotyi karuotitoet achek tuwai eng’ kemout agenge; ak kigiruotyi chi tugul ko u weeksetab karuotitoennyi. 
Genesis41:12 Ak kimi kobotech neranet age, Hebranindet, otwogindetab kiptaiyatab ribik; ak kigimwachi, ak kiiboruech karuotitaosiekyok; kiiweech ko u karuotitoetab chi age tugul." 
Genesis41:13 Ak kiyaak ko u noto kiiborwech; kiiweekya boisiennyu, ak kigisonginin nin age." 
Genesis41:14 Kiiyokto anyun Parao eng’ yoto keguur Josep, ak kigimoong’ inendet eng’ keringet, kechogune: ak kiinen tamnet, ak kowal ngoroikyik, ak kwo ole mi Parao." 
Genesis41:15 Ak kilenji Parao Josep, Koaruotyi karuotitoet, ma biit chi ne koimuch koweech: ak koagas agobo inye kele, ngigas karuotitoet imuchi iweech." 
Genesis41:16 Ak kiwolji Josep Parao kolenji, Mabota ane: igochin Kamuktaindet Parao wolunet ne bo kalyet." 
Genesis41:17 King’alalji anyun Parao Josep, kolenji, Keero, koatononi eng’ ngegutab ainet eng’ karuotitoennyu:" 
Genesis41:18 ak keero, kotogosune ainet tuga tisabu, che neriotin mising’, ak ko kororon; ak koagete morong’iot:" 
Genesis41:19 ak keero, kotogos tuga alage tisabu kosubu chugai, che nyalulyotin ak ko yaachen ak ko sogitiotin, che kitom ageere eng’ emetab Misri komugul che yaachen che u choto:" 
Genesis41:20 ak kiam tuchato sogitiotin ak ko yaachen tuga chun ka bo tai tisab neriotin: 
Genesis41:21 ak ye kingo kagoam, koma kotook kele kagoam; amu kota ko yaachen ko u eng’ tai. Asiiru anyun." 
Genesis41:22 Ak koageer eng’ karuotitoennyu, keero, komong’une itik tisabu mopchot agenge, che ruriotin ak ko miachen:" 
Genesis41:23 keero, kimong’ itik tisabu che resiotin ak ko meiyotin, che kiimel usonet ne bunu kong’asis che koisubu choto:" 
Genesis41:24 ak kolugui itichoto meiyotin itik chun tisab miachen: ak kiamwachi bichoto ng’orsei; ak ma biit ne koimuch koborua. 
Genesis41:25 Ak kilenji Josep Parao, Agenge karuotitoetab Parao: kagoborji Kamuktaindet Parao kit ne machei si koyai ko negit." 
Genesis41:26 Tuchato tisab che miachen ko kenyisiek tisab; ak itichoto tisab miachen ko kenyisiek tisab: agenge karuotitaonito. 
Genesis41:27 Ak tuchato tisab sogitiotin ak ko yaachen che koisubu chun ko kenyisiek tisab, ak kogeny itichoto tisab che ma ruriotin che kiimel usonet ne bunu kong’asis; koegu kenyisiek tisab che bo rubet." 
Genesis41:28 Noto ko kit ne kaamwachi Parao: kagoborji Kamuktaindet Parao kit ne machei si koyai ko negit. 
Genesis41:29 Keero, bwanei kenyisiek tisabu che bo ruratet ne o eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri:" 
Genesis41:30 ak ye ibata choto koit kenyisiek tisabu che bo rubet; ak keutie ruratet eng’ emetab Misri; ak tun iwong’u emet tugul rubet; 
Genesis41:31 ak ma ko naoksei ruratonoto eng’ emet amu rubonato isubu, amu egu rubet ne ng’wan mising’." 
Genesis41:32 Kogiborji anyun Parao karuotitaonito konyil aeng’ amu kigochobok noto eng’ Kamuktaindet, ak chogune Kamuktaindet kiito kosulda." 
Genesis41:33 Ara ingocheng’ Parao chitab ruchinet ak ko ng’om, si konde koboi emetab Misri." 
Genesis41:34 Ingoyai Parao nito, ak ingonde ribik korib emet, si kobas kebeberta agenge eng’ mut eng’ emetab Misri eng’ kenyisiechoto tisab bo ruratet." 
Genesis41:35 Ak ingoyum amitwogik tugul che bo kenyisiechoto tisab miachen, che magoit, ak kogonor bek eng’ bounatetab Parao koek amitwogikab nganasok, ak ingorib." 
Genesis41:36 Ak koek amitwogichoto basanik che kibasyin emet eng’ kenyisiechoto tisab bo rubet, che tun biitu eng’ emetab Misri; si mame emet eng’ rubet."
