Genesis41:37 Ak kimieit ng’olyondonoto eng’ Parao ak eng’ otwogikyik tugul. 
Genesis41:38 Ak kilenji Parao otwogikyik, Kimuktoi ano kenyoru chito ne u chichi ne tinyei Tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet?" 
Genesis41:39 Ak kilenji Parao Josep, Amu kagoborun Kamuktaindet choto tugul, mami anyun age ne tinyei ruchinet ak ng’omnatet ko u inye;" 
Genesis41:40 inye ne kebou gonnyu ak ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’ ko kebou bikyuk tugul; kobate eng’ ng’echeretab laitornatet, ko ane ne o eng’ inye eng’ noto." 
Genesis41:41 Kilenji anyun Parao Josep, Keero, kandein ibou emet komugul ne bo Misri." 
Genesis41:42 Ak kiinemune Parao eunnyin peteinnyi ne bo ng’okset, ak konde eutab Josep, ak kolelesonji inendet eng’ ngoroik che kororon che bo katanit, ak konde sirimdo ne bo tahabu katatinnyi." 
Genesis41:43 Ak kiigochi Parao Josep kolany karinnyi ne bo aeng’ ne kitinyei, ak kiboldos bik eng’ tainnyi kolen, Ogutuny; ak kiinde inendet koboi emet komugul ne bo Misri." 
Genesis41:44 Ak kilenji Parao Josep, A Parao, ak maimuchi chi koiito eunnyi anan keldanyi eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri ama ichamji." 
Genesis41:45 Ak kiguure Parao Josep Sapenatpanea; ak kiigochi kotun Asenat cheptab Potipera tisiindet ne bo On. Ak kiwendot Josep kobunot emetab Misri. 
Genesis41:46 Ak ki bo Josep kenyisiek sosom ye kitononi eng’ taitab Parao, laitoriatab Misri. Ak kiwa Josep eng’ ole mi Parao, ak kibunot emet komugul ne bo Misri." 
Genesis41:47 Ak kirurio bek mising’ eng’ emet eng’ kenyisiechoto tisab bo biyendo. 
Genesis41:48 Ak kiiyum amitwogik tugul che bo kenyisiechoto tisab che kimi emetab Misri, ak kigonore amitwogichoto nganasok; kigonor anyun amitwogikab mbarenik che kigayiem nganaset age tugul, kogonore nganasochato." 
Genesis41:49 Kiiyum Josep bek che chang’ mising’, che te ng’aniekab nyanjet, kot kometo koitet; amu kima kota koiitoksei." 
Genesis41:50 Ak kigisikyi Josep werik aeng’ kotom koit kenyitab rubet, che kisikyi Asenat, cheptab Potipera, tisiindetab On." 
Genesis41:51 Ak kiguure Josep kainetab ne o Manase: kole, Amu kagona Kamuktaindet autie bichiindo tugul ne bo boisionikyuk, ak got tugul ne bo baba." 
Genesis41:52 Ak kiguure ne bo aeng’ Epraim: kole, Amu kagona Kamuktaindet iyotet eng’ emet ne kianyorune nyalilda." 
Genesis41:53 Ak kiigesgei anyun kenyisiechoto tisabu bo ruratet eng’ emetab Misri. 
Genesis41:54 Ak kitoi anyun kobwa kenyisiek tisabu che bo rubet ko u ye kiga mwa Josep: ak kibiit anyun rubet eng’ emotinwek tugul; ago kimi amitwogik emet komugul ne bo Misri. 
Genesis41:55 Ak ye kingoam rubet emetab Misri komugul korirji bik Parao kosom amitwogik; ak kilenji Parao bik tugul che bo Misri, Oba oldab Josep; ak oyai kit age tugul ne kamwawok." 
Genesis41:56 Ak kiyom rubonato ng’ony komugul: koyat anyun Josep chogenik tugul, ak koaldochi Misrik; ak kieet rubonato mising’ eng’ emetab Misri." 
Genesis41:57 Kibwa anyun emotinwek tugul oldab Josep eng’ Misri kobwa koal bek; amu kieet rubonato eng’ ng’ony komugul. 
Genesis42:1 Kigas anyun Jakobo kole mitei bek Misri, ak kolenji Jakobo werikyik, Amu nee si ogeeregei kityo?" 
Genesis42:2 Ak kilenji, Ogeero, koagas kele mitei bek Misri: ochortege olindo oalwech bek eng’ olindo: si kobiit kesopche, si ma kibegu." 
Genesis42:3 Kichortagei anyun werik tamanu che tupche ak Josep koba Misri, koal bek." 
Genesis42:4 Ago kima iyokto Jakobo Benjamin ng’etab kametab Josep, koboto tupchosiekyik; amu kile, Si manyor kiy ne ya." 
Genesis42:5 Ak kibwa anyun werikab Israel koboto che kibwanei koalisiei: amu kimitei rubet emetab Kanan. 
Genesis42:6 Ak ki bounindet Josep ne bo emet: inendet ne kialdochin bek bik tugul che bo emet: ak kibwa anyun tupchosiekab Josep, ak kong’uruk eng’ tainnyi kotokyi metowekwak ng’ony." 
Genesis42:7 Ak kigeer Josep tupchoisiekyik ak konyit, ak kiyaigei koigei chi ne maingen icheget, ak kong’alalji icheget eng’ koromnatet; ak kiteebe kolenji, Obunu ano? Ak kiwolji kolenji, Kibunu emetab Kanan, kibwane keale amitwogik." 
Genesis42:8 Ak kinai Josep tupchosiekyik, ago kima nai ichek inendet." 
Genesis42:9 Ak kiibwat Josep karuotitaosiek che kiga koruotyi agobo ichek, ak kilenji, O segeik; kobwa ogeer nyerotietab emet." 
Genesis42:10 Ak kilenji, Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, ago kagibwane otwogiguk keale amitwogik." 
Genesis42:11 Ki werikab chito agenge achek tugul; ki bik che bo iman, ma ki segeik achek otwogiguk." 
Genesis42:12 Ak kilenji ichek, Achicha, ago kobwa ogeer nyerotietab emet." 
Genesis42:13 Ak kilenji, Kitupche achek otwogiguk, ko ki taman ak aeng’, ki werikab chito agenge ne bo Kanan; keero, mitei ne ming’in agot eng’ betuni koboto kwandanyo, ak kigobetito age." 
Genesis42:14 Ak kilenji Josep ichek, Noto anyun ne kamwawok alenjok, O segeik." 
Genesis42:15 Kimuchi ketiemenak ng’olyondoni: ko u ye sobei Parao, ko momuchi obe eng’ oli, ngo manyo yu ng’etab komet ne ming’in." 
Genesis42:16 Oyokte age eng’ okwek, komut ng’etab komet, ak keratak kot kenai ng’alekwok ngo mi imanit eng’ okwek: ak ngo ma u noto, ko ko u ye sobei Parao, ko kaga o segeik." 
Genesis42:17 Ak kiger tugul kib agenge betusiek somok. 
Genesis42:18 Ak eng’ betutab somok kolenji Josep ichek, Oyai ko u ni, si osopche; amu aiywei Kamuktaindet:" 
Genesis42:19 ngo o bikab iman, kerati agenge eng’ okwek, eng’ got ne kogigerjok; si obe okwek, oib amitwogik amu rubet ne mi gorikwok." 
Genesis42:20 Ak omutwa ng’etab komet ne ming’in; si kotook ng’alekwok ngo bo iman, si mobegu. Ak kiyai ko u noto." 
Genesis42:21 Ak king’alaljigei ichegei kole, Kagonamech kiruoget iman agobo tupchennyo, amu kigigeer nyalildab muguleldanyi, ye kiigaigaech, ak kima kicham kegasyi; kanyonjech anyun nyalili amu noto." 
Genesis42:22 Ak kiwolji Reuben, kolenji, Kima amwawok, alenjok, Amoyachi kiy ne ya lakwet; ak kima ocham ogas? Ogeer anyun-o, kiyaachei korotikyik." 
Genesis42:23 Ak kima nai kole kasei Josep ng’alekwak; amu kimi weegindet ne kiiweechi ng’alekyik. 
Genesis42:24 Ak kiweeigei kotuktochi batai, ak korir; ak kiweleljigei icheget kogeny kong’alalji, ak kiinem Simeon eng’ kwenunywa, korat inendet eng’ tainywa." 
Genesis42:25 King’at Josep anyun kinyiit lolotinwekwak bek, ak keweekyi chi tugul fedaisiekyik kinde kinnyi, ak kogochi amitwogik che bo oret: ak kigiyachi ko u noto." 
Genesis42:26 Ak kiratyi bechato chuaget sigirokwak, ak koba." 
Genesis42:27 Ak kingotiach age lolennyi eng’ gotab toek, kole kogochi sigiriennyi amitwogik che konorotin, kogeer fedaisiekyik ko mi kutitab lolet." 
Genesis42:28 Ak kilenji werik che tupcho, Kageweech fedaisiekyuk; ogeero, mitei iman lolennyu, ak kiarogenso, kogeeregei kobotandos, kolen, Nee ni kayaiywech Kamuktaindet?" 
Genesis42:29 Kiit anyun ichek oldab Jakobo kwandanywa eng’ emetab Kanan, ak kitetyi inendet tuguk tugul che kibiityi eng’ oret, kolenji," 
Genesis42:30 King’alalwech chito, ne kiptaiyatab emet, eng’ koromnatet, amu kilen ki segeik che kisegei emet." 
Genesis42:31 Ak kigilenji, Ki bik che bo iman; ma ki segeik." 
Genesis42:32 Kitupche achek ko ki taman ak aeng’, ki werikab kwandanyo; mami age, ak mi ne ming’in koboto kwandanyo eng’ emetab Kanan." 
Genesis42:33 Ak kilenjech chichoto, kiptaiyat ne bo emonoto, Anaenok ni, ngo o bik che bo iman; obagakwa ng’etab komet age, ak obe oipchi bek bikwok che mitei ga:" 
Genesis42:34 ak omutwa werit ne otupche ne ming’in: si anai anyun ale, ma o segeik, ago kaga o bik che bo iman: ak agonok werit ne otupche kogeny, ak oyai mung’aret eng’ emet." 
Genesis42:35 Ak kingoabuch lolotinwekwak, ogeero, kimi fedaisiek che bo chi tugul lolennyi ko ratotin: ak ye kingogeer ichek koboto kwandanywa fedaisiekwak che ratotin, koarogenso." 
Genesis42:36 Ak kilenji Jakobo kwandanywa, Kiobetena lagokyuk, mami Josep, ak mami Simeon, ak omache omutena Benjamin agine: kabwanja tuguchu tugul." 
Genesis42:37 Ak kilenji Reuben kwandanyi, Tun ibar werikyuk aeng’ ngo mamutun inendet kogeny: kona kotebe eunekyuk, ak amutun inendet kogeny." 
Genesis42:38 Ak kile, Mochortoige koboto werinnyu; amu kigome ng’etab kamet, ak inegei kityo ne ng’etunot: ak ngot konyor kiy ne ya eng’ oret ne obendi, ogona arirat agoi tun amei." 
Genesis43:1 King’wanit rubet mising’ eng’ emet. 
Genesis43:2 Ak kingo kagotar bek che kiibune Misri, kolenji kwandanywa, Oweektagei kogeny, oalwech amitwogik tugigin." 
Genesis43:3 Ak kilenji Juda, Kiigimgimech chichoto kolenjech, Momuchi ogeera togoch ngot ko mobwane ak werit ne otupche:" 
Genesis43:4 ngot iyoktech koboto tupchennyo kechortegei anyun kealun amitwogik: 
Genesis43:5 ago ngot ko mechamji kwo, ko magichortoige: amu kilenjech chichoto, Momuchi ogeera togoch, ngot ko mobwane ak werit ne otupche." 
Genesis43:6 Ak kile Israel, Amu nee si oyaiywa yaitioni te ni, kot ong’ang’ji chichoto olenji, Kitinye werit age ne kitupche?" 
Genesis43:7 Ak kile, Kiginenech mising’ chichoto atebosiekyok, ak ole kigisikyinech, kolen, Ta kosobei kwandang’wong’? Ak, Otinye werit age ne otupche? Ak kigiborji ko u ye kiteeb: Tos kigimuch kenai kele, mwawech kolenjinech, Omutu werit ne otupche kochorgei?" 
Genesis43:8 Ak kilenji Juda kwandanyi Israel, Iyogu werito kebe tuwai, si keng’eetye kebe; si kobiit kesopche, ama kibegu, achek, ak inye, ak lagokyok agichek." 
Genesis43:9 Ingobunja atononji inendet; ak image inendet eunnyu: ngot ko mamutun inendet nyo ande taing’ung’, kobunjina chalwogoto betusiek tugul:" 
Genesis43:10 amu nda kima kigage, ta kiga keweeige iman ne bo aeng’ nguno." 
Genesis43:11 Ak kilenji kwandanywa Israel, Ngo u noto anyun, oyai ko u ni; oib tuguk che miachen mising’ che bo emet eng’ lolotinwekwok, oipchi chichoto kagochinoik ko u mwanik tutigin che kinyaise, koboto kumiat kitigin, ak tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak tuguk che u igomoik, koboto tuguk che u njuguk ak logoek che kiguure almond." 
Genesis43:12 Ak oib eng’ eunekwok fedaisiek otes che yamegei ak kamunutionoto konyil aeng’; ak che kiga kiweech eng’ kutuswekab lolotinwekwok; oweekte choto agichek; abere kima nai bik che kiindoi: 
Genesis43:13 ak omut werit ne otupche agine, ong’eetye oba kogeny oldab chichoto:" 
Genesis43:14 ingorirenak Kamuktaindet ne bo Kamuktaet, eng’ taitab chichoto, si kobiit kotiakwok werit ne otupche nin linda, ak Benjamin. Ak ngo betena lagokyuk ko kagobetyo." 
Genesis43:15 Kiib anyun bichoto kagochinoichoto, ak kiib fedaisiek che yamegei ak kamanutionoto konyil aeng’, ak king’eetyo koboto Benjamin koba Misri, ak kitononso eng’ taitab Josep." 
Genesis43:16 Ak kingogeer Josep Benjamin komi koboto ichek, kolenji ne tononjin gonnyi, Imutu bicho kobwa go, ak oeng’ji, ak ochob kiy tugul; amu kiamisie tugul ak bichoto bet kwen." 
Genesis43:17 Ak kiyai chichoto ko u ye kiga mwachi Josep; ak kiimut anyun chichoto bichoto kobwa gotab Josep. 
Genesis43:18 Ak kiiyweis bichoto, amu kigimut koba gotab Josep; ak kile, Kagimutwech kebwa go amu fedaisiek che kigiweekte eng’ lolotinwekyok yu kiga kibwa tai; si kobiit konyor ng’olyot ne igikyinenech, ak kogerjech go, yeityo koyaech keegu otwogik, koboto sigirokyok." 
Genesis43:19 Ak kirikta ye mi chito ne tononjin gotab Josep, ak kong’alalji inendet eng’ ole negite kurget," 
Genesis43:20 ak kile, Ee kiptaiyandennyu, kigichoruge iman eng’ banda ne bo tai, keal amitwogik:" 
Genesis43:21 ak kingeit anyun gotab toek, kitiach lolotinwekyok, ogeero, kimi fedaisiekab chi tugul kutitab lolennyi; kimi tugul: ak kagiibu choto kogeny." 
Genesis43:22 Ak kagiibu fedaisiek alak che kiale amitwogik: magingen chito ne kiinde fedaisiekyok lolotinwekyok. 
Genesis43:23 Ak kilenji, Ingoteb kalyet eng’ okwek; amoiyweisie: kigonok Kamuktaindeng’wong’, Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandang’wong’, konoruet ne mie ne ung’at eng’ lolotinwekwok: kiataach fedaisiekwok. Ak kiimutyi Simeon komong’." 
Genesis43:24 Kiimut anyun chichoto bichoto koba gotab Josep, ak konaga beek, ak kiun bichoto kelyekwak; ak kibae sigirokwak amitwogik che ki konorotin." 
Genesis43:25 Ak kichopchi ichek Josep kagochinoik eng’ sait ne itune, bet kwen: amu kigas kele tagoi koamisiei eng’ oloto." 
Genesis43:26 Ak kingoit Josep ga, koipchi bichoto inendet kagochinoik che kiibu, kobwa go, ak kiing’uruk eng’ tainnyi agoi ng’ony." 
Genesis43:27 Ak kiteebe icheget chametab ge, kolenji, Chamegei kwandang’wong’, boiyondonoto ne kigomwawa? Tos ta kosobei?" 
Genesis43:28 Ak kilenji, Chamegei otwogindeng’ung’ kwandanyo. Ta kosobei. Ak kiing’urukyi." 
Genesis43:29 Ak kitobendo Josep, ak kigeer tupchennyi Benjamin, ng’etab kamet, ak kile, Tupcheng’wong’ ne ming’in ni, ni kigomwawa? Ak kilenji, Ingorirenen Kamuktaindet, weri." 
Genesis43:30 Ak kichirjiren Josep; amu kieet emosto eng’ muguleldanyi amu ng’etab kamet: ak kicheng’ ole wendi korire; ak kimanda gonnyi ne bo orit, kwo korir." 
Genesis43:31 Ak kiun togennyi, ak komong’: ak kimuita si marir, ak kile, Oibu amitwogik." 
Genesis43:32 Ak kiginde chechik oldanyi inegei, ak kiginde oldanywa chechuak ichegei, ak che bo Misrik oldanywa ichegei, che kicham koamisiei koboto inendet: amu kima kochamei Misrik koamis tugul ak Hebranik; amu ki ng’wan eng’ Misrik koamjin." 
Genesis43:33 Ak kitebe tainnyi werit ne bo tai ko u sigennyi, ak ne ming’in ko u ming’inatennyi: ak kikwong’io bichoto." 
Genesis43:34 Ak kiigochi bichoto kererutikab amitwogik che kimi tainnyi: ago kieet kererutietab Benjamin kosiir che bo alak konyil mut. Ak kieeiso, ak koboiboitu koboto inendet." 
Genesis44:1 King’at anyun chito ne kitononjin gonnyi, kolenji, Inyiit amitwogik lolotinwekab bichu, ko u che imuch koib, ak inde fedaisiekab chi tugul kutitab lolennyi." 
Genesis44:2 Ak inde kikombennyu, noto bo feda, eng’ kutitab loletab towet, koboto fedaisiekyik che bo bek. Ak kiyai ko u ng’olyot ne kiga mwa Josep." 
Genesis44:3 Ye kingoeech kota ko karon, kounda bichoto koba, icheget ak sigirokwak." 
Genesis44:4 Ak ye kingo kagomanda eng’ nganaset, ye kitom kolooegitu, kolenji Josep chito ne kitononjin gonnyi, Ng’eet, isub bichoto; ak ye inyoru ilenji, Amu nee si ogeere yaitiet ne mie?" 
Genesis44:5 Tos ma kikombani ne eeise kiptaiyandennyu, ak kong’orse? Koyai ne ya ngoyai ko u ni." 
Genesis44:6 Kinyor anyun, ak kimwachi ng’alechato." 
Genesis44:7 Ak kilenji ichek, Amu nee si komwa kiptaiyandennyu ng’alek che u choto? Ingolooit eng’ otwogiguk si mayai kiy ne u noto." 
Genesis44:8 Ogeero, fedaisiek, che kiginyorji kutuswekab lolotinwekyok, kogiweekwok kogeny eng’ emetab Kanan: kimuktoi ano anyun kechore gotab kiptaindeng’ung’ feda anan ko tahabu?" 
Genesis44:9 Ingome age tugul eng’ achek otwogiguk ne kenorjin kioto, ak keegu achek otwogikab kiptaiyandennyo." 
Genesis44:10 Ak kile, Ingotebi ko u ng’aleguk: egu inendet ne kenyorjin kioto otwogindennyu; ak magiityinok okwek yaitio." 
Genesis44:11 Ak kiitu chi tugul lolennyi kochokyi, ak kotiach chi tugul nenyi." 
Genesis44:12 Ak kicheng’, kotaune ne o, agoi kogesune ne ming’in; ak kiginorji kikombanato loletab Benjamin." 
Genesis44:13 Kigerer anyun ngoroikwak, ak kiratyi chi tugul tugukyik sigiriennyi, koweektagei koba nganaset." 
Genesis44:14 Kiit anyun Juda ak tupchosiekyik gotab Josep; amu kitom kwo ui Josep: ak kiibutyi ng’ony ichek eng’ tainnyi. 
Genesis44:15 Ak kilenji Josep ichek, Nee ni koyai? Tos mongen ole imuchi kong’orso chito ne u ane?" 
Genesis44:16 Ak kile Juda, Tos kimwaun nee anyun, kiptaiyandennyu? King’alali kelen nee? Anan tos kiityindoitech ano imanda? Kagonai Kamuktaindet tengektab otwogiguk: Ogeero, ki otwogikab kiptaiyandennyo anyun acheget, ak inendet ne kaginyorji kikombet agine." 
Genesis44:17 Ak kile, Ingolooit eng’ ane amayai ko u noto: ago egu otwogindennyu inendet ne kaginyorji kikombet; ago okwek, ko mie obe eng’ kalyet oldab kwandang’wong’." 
Genesis44:18 Kirikyi anyun Juda Josep, ak kolenji, Bwa kiptaiyandennyu, asain ale, chamwa kiptaiyandennyu ane otwogindeng’ung’ amwaun ng’olyo, amenerekya ane, otwogindeng’ung’, eng’ koromnatet: amu i u aginye Parao." 
Genesis44:19 Kiiteebenech achek otwogiguk, kiptaiyandennyu, ile, Otinye kwandang’wong’, ak ko mi werit age ne otupche?" 
Genesis44:20 Ak kigimwaun inye, kiptaiyandennyo, kelenjin, Kitinye baba, boiyot ne os, ak kotinye lakwet ne bo osindanyi, ne ta koming’in; ak kigome ng’etab kamet, ak mi noto inegei ne bo kamenywa, ak kochamei kwandanyi inendet." 
Genesis44:21 Ak kiilenjech, achek otwogiguk, Omutwa, kochorgei ole ami, si kobiit ageer inendet eng’ konyekyuk." 
Genesis44:22 Ak kigimwaun inye, kiptaiyandennyo, kele, Maimuchi kobesio weroto ak kwandanyi: amu ngot kometo inendet kwandanyi, ko tos me kwandanyi." 
Genesis44:23 Ak kiilenjech achek otwogiguk, Ngot ko mobwa ochoruge koboto werit ne otupche ne ming’in ko momuchi ogeera togoch kogeny." 
Genesis44:24 Ak kingeit anyun oldab otwogindeng’ung’ kwandanyu, kemwachi inendet ng’aleguk, inye kiptaiyandennyu." 
Genesis44:25 Ak kilenjech baba, Oba kogeny oalwech amitwogik tutigin." 
Genesis44:26 Ak kigilenji, Magimuchi kechortege: ngo mi tupchennyo ne ming’in kobotech kechortege anyun kebe: amu magimuchi kegeer chichoto togoch kobate kemi ak tupchennyo ne ming’in." 
Genesis44:27 Ak kilenjech otwogindeng’ung’, kwandanyo, Ongen ole kisikwa osotiondennyu werik aeng’:" 
Genesis44:28 ak kibetena age, ak kiale, Angen komie ale kigetonaton; ak koboch yoto, ko mata tun ageer:" 
Genesis44:29 ak ngot omutena nito agine, ak konyor kiy ne ya, ko kogona arirat agoi tun amei." 
Genesis44:30 Noto anyun, ye ait oldab otwogindeng’ung’ baba, ama mi weri kobotech; amu kinamgei sobondanyi ak sobondab werito:" 
Genesis44:31 komei anyun baba ye keer kole mami lakwet, ak kigochini achek otwogiguk baba, otwogindeng’ung’, korirat agoi tun kome." 
Genesis44:32 Amu kibunja ane otwogindeng’ung’ lakwanito, atononjinechi baba, alenji, Ngot ko mamutun inendet, ko kabunja chalwogoto betusiek tugul, eng’ taitab baba." 
Genesis44:33 Eng’ noto anyun, asain ale, Chamwa atebi aek otwogindeng’ung’, inye kiptaiyandennyu, ageeregei weri; ak ingowo weri kotogosta koboto tupchosiekyik." 
Genesis44:34 Amu amuktoi ano anyun awo atogosta oldab baba, ama kimi ak lakwet? Si mageer yaitiet ne tun nyoru baba." 
Genesis45:1 Kima imuch Josep anyun komuita eng’ taitab bik tugul che kitonondos eng’ ole negite inendet; ak kibol kole, Omaande chi tugul kwo eng’ ole ami. Ak ma ng’et chi ne kimi tuwai ak Josep, ye king’ang’jigei inendet tupchosiekyik." 
Genesis45:2 Ak kirir kowaach: ak kigas Misrik, ak kigas gab Parao agichek." 
Genesis45:3 Ak kilenji Josep tupchosiekyik, A Josep; tos ta kosobei baba? Ak kima imuch kowolji tupchosiekyik; amu kiiyweis eng’ tainnyi." 
Genesis45:4 Ak kilenji Josep tupchosiekyik, Kaigai origu yu ami: Ak kirikta anyun. Ak kilenji, A tupcheng’wong’ Josep, ne kioalde kwo Misri." 
Genesis45:5 Noto anyun, amata oarogense, anan onerekyige okwege eng’ okwege, amu kioalda anyo oli: amu Kamuktaindet ne kiiyokwa andounenok si kobiit asor bik." 
Genesis45:6 Amu kigobiit rubet eng’ emet eng’ kenyisiechu aeng’: ak ta komi kenyisiek mutu alage, che mabiitu kabatisiet anan kesisiet." 
Genesis45:7 Ak kiiyokwa Kamuktaindet andounenok, si kobiit aribwok che ng’etu eng’ ng’ony, ak asoruok osopche eng’ sorunet ne o." 
Genesis45:8 Ara anyun, ki ma ko okwek che kiomutwa anyo oli, ago Kamuktaindet: ak kigoyaa aek kwanda eng’ Parao, ak aegu kiptaiyatab gonnyi tugul, ak bounindetab emet komugul ne bo Misri." 
Genesis45:9 Ara anyun, ochakte otogoste ole mi baba, ak olenji, Kamwa ko u ni wering’ung’ Josep, Kiyaa Kamuktaindet aek kiptaiyatab Misri komugul: choruge nyo ole ami, amegage:" 
Genesis45:10 ak inyo imeny emetab Gosen, si inegitena, inye ak lagoguk, ak mochogoroniguk, ak kechireguk ak tuga cheguk, ak tuguk tugul che itinye:" 
Genesis45:11 ak abain eng’ oloto si mebanan, inye ak gong’ung’, ak tugul che itinye; amu ta komi kenyisiek mutu che bwanei che bo rubet." 
Genesis45:12 Ak ogeero, keerei konyekwok, ak kogeerei Benjamin tupchennyu agine, ole, kutinnyu ne ng’alalwok." 
Genesis45:13 Ak omwachi baba teegistanyu tugul eng’ Misri, ak tuguk tugul che kaogeer; ak ochakte omutu baba konyo oli." 
Genesis45:14 Ak kisuub kaatitab ng’etab kamet Benjamin, ak kirir; ak kirir Benjamin agine komi kaatitab Josep." 
Genesis45:15 Ak king’utut tupchosiekyik tugul, ak korir: ak ye ibata noto kong’alalji tupchosiekyik inendet." 
Genesis45:16 Kigigas ng’alechato eng’ gotab Parao, kele, kagoit tupchosiekab Josep: ak kiibaibai Parao noto, koboto otwogikyik." 
Genesis45:17 Ak kilenji Parao Josep, Ilenji tupchosieguk, Oyai ni; oratyi sigirokwok tugukwok, ak obe, agoi emetab Kanan;" 
Genesis45:18 ak omutu kwandang’wong’ ak bikab gorikwok, ak obwa ole ami: si agonok tuguk che miach che bo emetab Misri, ak oam akwaiyetab emet." 
Genesis45:19 Ara anyun, kaging’atak, oyai ko u ni; oib karisiek che bo emetab Misri amu lagokwok, ak osotikwok, ak obwa, omutu kwandang’wong’." 
Genesis45:20 Ago amobwat tugukwok; amu chekwok tuguk tugul che miachen che bo emetab Misri. 
Genesis45:21 Ak kiyai ko u noto werikab Israel: ak kiigochi Josep ichek karisiek, ko u ng’atutietab Parao, ak kiigochi amitwogik che amoti eng’ oret." 
Genesis45:22 Ak kiigochi chi age tugul ngoroik che kiwalawale alak; ago kiigochi Benjamin fedaisiek bogol somok, ak ngoroik mut che walawali." 
Genesis45:23 Ak kiiyokyi kwandanyi tuguk ko u ni; sigirok taman che kilae tuguk che miach che bo Misri, ak sigirok che iyuogik taman che kilae bek ak makatinik ak amitwogik alak che tun amonu eng’ oret." 
Genesis45:24 Kimonorisiechi anyun Josep tupchosiekyik, ak kiba: ak kilenji, Amonerekyinotege eng’ oret." 
Genesis45:25 Kiba anyun kotogosta eng’ Misri agoi koit emetab Kanan oldab Jakobo kwandanywa. 
Genesis45:26 Ak kimwachi kolenji, Ta kosobei Josep, ak inendet ko bounindetab emet komugul ne bo Misri. Ak kitanui muguleldab Jakobo, amu ma iyan icheget." 
Genesis45:27 Ak kimwachi ng’alek tugul che bo Josep, che kiga komwachi Josep werjoto: ak ye kingogeer Jakobo karisiek che kiiyok Josep kimutune inendet, kosob tamirmirietab Jakobo kwandanywa:" 
Genesis45:28 ak kile Israel, Yamei ko u noto; ta kosobei werinnyu Josep; awendi anyun ageere inendet kotom amei." 
Genesis46:1 Ak kinam banda anyun Israel koboto tugul che kitinyei, ak kiit Beer-seba ak kiigochi tiseiywek Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandanyi Isak." 
Genesis46:2 Ak king’alalji Kamuktaindet Israel eng’ ng’ang’utik che bo kemoi, kolenji, Jakobo, Jakobo, Ak kile, Ami yu." 
Genesis46:3 Ak kile, A Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandang’ung’: ameiywei, ichortege iwe Misri; amu ayain iegu bororiet ne o eng’ oloto:" 
Genesis46:4 ak achortege agane koboten awendi Misri; ak tun amutun iman itogosu kogeny; ak kotwae Josep eunnyi konyeguk. 
Genesis46:5 King’eet anyun Jakobo eng’ Beer-seba: ak kiimut werikab Israel Jakobo kwandanywa, ak lagokwak, ak osotikwak, eng’ karisiek che kiga koyok Parao si kobiit kimute inendet." 
Genesis46:6 Kikweri tukwak, ak kiib tugukwak che kiga konyor eng’ emetab Kanan, ak kiit Misri, Jakobo, koboto lagokyik tugul:" 
Genesis46:7 werikyik ak tibikyik koboto mochogoronikyik che werik ak tibik, ak kiimut lagokyik tugul koba Misri." 
Genesis46:8 Chu kainaikab lagokab Israel, che kiit Misri, Jakobo ak werikyik: Reuben, werit ne bo tai ne bo Jakobo." 
Genesis46:9 Ak werikab Reuben chu; Hanok, Palu, Hesron, ak Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 Ak werikab Simeon chu; Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakin, Sohar, ak Shaul weritab Chepkananindet." 
Genesis46:11 Ak werikab Lawi chu; Gerson, Kohat, ak Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Ak werikab Juda chu; Er, Onan, Sela, Peres, ak Sera: ago kibek Er ak Onan eng’ emetab Kanan. Ak werikab Peres ko ki Hesron ak Hamul." 
Genesis46:13 Ak werikab Isakar chu; Tola, Pupa, Job, ak Simron." 
Genesis46:13 Ak werikab Isakar chu; Tola, Pupa, Job, ak Simron." 
Genesis46:14 Ak werikab Sebulun chu, Seret, Elon, ak Jaleel." 
Genesis46:15 Chuto ko werikab Lea che kisikyi Lea Jakobo eng’ Padan-aram, koboto cheptanyi Dina: ki sosom ak somok werikyik koboto tibikyik." 
Genesis46:16 Ak werikab Gad chu; Sipion, Hagi, Suni, Esbon, Eri, Arodi, ak Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Ak werikab Aser chu; Jimna, Isba, Isbi, Beria, ak Sera chekametinywa: ak werikab Beria chu; Heber, ak Malkiel." 
Genesis46:18 Chuto ko werikab Silpa ne kiigochi Laban Lea cheptanyi, kisikyi Jakobo choto, ki bik taman ak lo." 
Genesis46:19 Chu werikab Rael osotiotab Jakobo; Josep ak Benjamin. 
Genesis46:20 Ak kigisikyi Josep eng’ emetab Misri Manase ak Epraim, che kisikyi Asenat cheptab Potipera tisiindet ne bo On." 
Genesis46:21 Ak werikab Benjamin chu; Bela, Beker, Asbel, Gera, Naaman, Ei, Ros, Hupim, ak Ard." 
Genesis46:22 Chuto werikab Rael che kisikyi inendet Jakobo: ki bik taman ak ang’wan. 
Genesis46:23 Ak werikab Dan ko Husim. 
Genesis46:24 Ak werikab Naptali chu; Jaseel, Guni, Jeser, ak Silem." 
Genesis46:25 Chuto ko werikab Bila, ne kiigochi Laban Rael cheptanyi, kisikyi Jakobo chuto: ki bik tisab tugul." 
Genesis46:26 Ak bik tugul che kiit Misri koboto Jakobo, ko ki bik tamanwogik lo ak lo che kimong’une bortab Jakobo, kobate osotikab werikab Jakobo." 
Genesis46:27 Ak werikab Josep, che kigisikyi eng’ Misri, ko ki aeng’: bik tugul che bo gotab Jakobo che kiit Misri, ko ki tamanwogik tisab." 
Genesis46:28 Ak kiiyokto Jakobo Juda kondoe inendet kwo oldab Josep, koarorji oret ne wendi Gosen; ak kiit anyun emonoto kiguure Gosen." 
Genesis46:29 Kichob anyun Josep karinnyi, ak kwo kotorokta kwandanyi Israel agoi Gosen; ak kiiborjigei Josep, ak kotoroigei, ak korir eng’ kaatinnyi konyil ak konyil." 
Genesis46:30 Ak kilenji Israel Josep, Kamee anyun, amu kaageer togeng’ung’, ak kaga taisobe kora." 
Genesis46:31 Ak kilenji Josep tupchosiekyik, ak bikab gotab kwandanyi, Katogoste anyun awe amwachi Parao, alenji, Kagobwanja werik che ketupche, ak bikab gotab baba, che kimi emetab Kanan;" 
Genesis46:32 ak bichoto ko kayogik, ak icheget ko bikab tuga; ak kaget kechirekwak, tukwak ak tugukwak tugul che tinyei." 
Genesis46:33 Ak eng’ yoto anyun ye kuurok Parao, koteebenak kole, Boisieng’wong’ ko nee?" 
Genesis46:34 Olenji, Achek otwogiguk ko ki bikab tuga koboch ko ki mengech agoi kora, achek, ak kwanisiekyok agichek; si kobiit omeny emet ne kiguure Gosen; amu chi age tugul ne iyagisiei ko ng’wan eng’ Misri." 
Genesis47:1 Kiwa anyun Josep komwachi Parao, kolenji, Kagoit baba ak werik che kitupche, ak kechirekwak, ak tukwak, ak tugukwak tugul che tinyei kobunu emetab Kanan; ak keero, mitei nguno emetab Gosen." 
Genesis47:2 Ak kiimut werik mut eng’ werik che tupcho, ak kobarta eng’ taitab Parao." 
Genesis47:3 Ak kiteebe Parao werik che tupcho ak Josep, kolenji, Nee boisieng’wong’? Ak kiwolji Parao, kolenji, Achek otwogiguk, ko ki kiptichin, koboto kwanisiekyok." 
Genesis47:4 Ak kilenji Parao, Kageuchi emoni ko ki toek; amu mami ole kiyage akwotisiekab otwogiguk; amu ng’wan rubet eng’ emetab Kanan: ara anyun, kagisain kele, chamwech achek otwogiguk kemeny emetab Gosen." 
Genesis47:5 Ak king’alalji Parao Josep, kolenji, Kait oldang’ung’ kwandang’ung’ ak werik che otupche:" 
Genesis47:6 mi taing’ung’ emonito bo Misri; igochi kwandang’ung’ ak werik che otupche komeny emet ole kararan mising’ kosiir tugul; ingomeny anyun emetab Gosen: ak ngot ingen bik alak eng’ ichek che ng’omen, igochi korib tukyuk." 
Genesis47:7 Kiimut anyun Josep kwandanyi kwo taitab Parao: ak kiiberur Jakobo Parao. 
Genesis47:8 Ak kiteebe Parao Jakobo, kolenji, Ata betusiekab kenyisieguk?" 
Genesis47:9 Ak kiwolji Jakobo Parao, kolenji, Kenyisiekyuk che kiatar eng’ rutoitanyu ko bogol ak sosom: ng’ering’ ak ko yaachen kenyisiekyuk che kiatar, ak ma it kenyisiekyuk che kiit kenyisiekab kwanisiekyuk eng’ rutoitonywa." 
Genesis47:10 Ak kiiberur Jakobo Parao, yeityo kwo eng’ ole kimi Parao." 
Genesis47:11 Ak kimeng’isiechi Josep kwandanyi ak werik che tupcho, ak kogochi ole bunjin eng’ emetab Misri, eng’ ole kararan kosiir tugul eng’ emonoto, eng’ emetab Rameses, ko u ye kiga ng’at Parao." 
Genesis47:12 Ak kibai anyun Josep kwandanyi, ak tupchosiekyik, ak bik tugul che bo gotab kwandanyi, eng’ amitwogik, ko u ye ki te lagokwak." 
Genesis47:13 Ak kima kota komi amitwogik eng’ emet komugul; amu king’wanit mising’ rubet, ak kinyalul emetab Misri ak emetab Kanan amu rubet." 
Genesis47:14 Ak kiiyum Josep fedaisiek tugul che kibiit eng’ emetab Misri ak emetab Kanan che kigoib koale bek: ak kiib Josep fedaisiechato kobwa gotab Parao. 
Genesis47:15 Ak ye kingogesgei fedaisiek che bo emetab Misri, ak che bo emetab Kanan, kobwanji Misrik tugul Josep, ak kolenji, Konech amitwogik: amu nee si kebegu eng’ taing’ung’? Amu kogogesgei fedaisiek." 
Genesis47:16 Ak kilenji Josep, Ogonu tukwok: ak ngogesgei fedaisiek agonok amitwogik che ogeere tukwok." 
Genesis47:17 Kigetyi anyun Josep tukwak: ak kiigochi Josep amitwogik che kiale mbartanyisiek, ak akwotisiek, ak tuga, ak sigirok: ak kibae kenyinoto amitwogik che kiale tukwak tugul." 
Genesis47:18 Ak ye kingogesgei kenyinoto, kobwanji inendet eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’, kobwa kolenji, Magimuchi keung’e kiptaiyandennyo, kele kogogesgei fedaisiekyok tugul; ak kigobunji tukyok kiptaiyandennyo; ma komi kiy ne ng’etunot ne ta keipchini kiptaiyandennyo, kobate borwekyok kityo, ak emotinwekyok;" 
Genesis47:19 amu nee anyun si kebegu eng’ taing’ung’, achek ak emennyo? Alech achek koboto emennyo, si kenyoru amitwogik, ak kebunji achek Parao koboto emennyo keegu otwogikyik: konech keswek, si kesopche, si ma kibegu, si maguber emet." 
Genesis47:20 Kialji anyun Josep Parao emet komugul ne bo Misri; amu kialda chi tugul eng’ Misrik mbarennyi, ak kieetyi rubet ichek: kibunji anyun Parao emet." 
Genesis47:21 Ak kiyai Josep bik koek otwogikyik kong’eete tabanda age agoi tabanda age ne bo Misri. 
Genesis47:22 Kobate emetab tisiik ne ma al inendet; amu kicham konyoru tisiik amitwogik chechuak eng’ Parao, si koamei kebebertanywa ne kiigochin Parao: kima alda anyun emenywa amu noto." 
Genesis47:23 Kilenji Josep bik anyun, Ogeero, kaalak rani, okwek ak emeng’wong’, obunji Parao: ogeero, irochu keswek, si ogole mbarenik." 
Genesis47:24 Si ye ogesisie ogochi Parao kebeberta ne bo mut, ak kobunjok kebeberwek ang’wanu, si koek keswekab mbarenik, ak koek amitwogikwok, ak che bo bikab gorikwok, ak amitwogik che bo lagokwok." 
Genesis47:25 Ak kile, Kaisoru sobonwekyok: mie kenyoru chamet eng’ taitab kiptaiyandennyo, ak keegu otwogikab Parao." 
Genesis47:26 Ak kiyai Josep ng’olyondonoto koek ng’atutiet eng’ emetab Misri agoi rani, kele kobunji Parao kebeberta ne bo mut; kobate emetab tisiik inegei ne mabunji Parao." 
Genesis47:27 Kimeny anyun Israel emetab Misri, eng’ emetab Gosen; ak kiek magore eng’ oloto, ak kiiyo ak kotesogis mising’." 
Genesis47:28 Ak kimeny Jakobo emetab Misri kenyisiek taman ak tisab: ak kenyisiek tugul che kitar Jakobo kosobei ko ki bogol ak artam ak tisab. 
Genesis47:29 Ak kirik anyun betusiek che bo kalilotetab Israel: kiguur anyun werinnyi Josep, ak kolenji, Ngo kaanyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’, inde anyun eung’ung’ kubestanyu, iyaiywa ne mie, ak ne bo iman; kaigai ametupcha Misri:" 
Genesis47:30 ago ye alil koboto kwanisiekyuk, isuta amanda eng’ Misri, ak itupcha kererisiekwak. Ak kile, Ayae ko u ye kaimwa." 
Genesis47:31 Ak kile, Iyosiewa: ak kiiyosiechi. Ak kiing’uruk Israel eng’ olebo itogunnyi meto." 
Genesis48:1 Ak kingobata tuguchuto, kolenji chito age Josep, Keero, miani kwandang’ung’: ak kiwa komut werikyik tuwai, Manase ak Epraim." 
Genesis48:2 Ak kilenji chito age Jakobo, Ineni wering’ung’ Josep, nyonei ole imi: ak kiigiilgei Israel kong’eet kotebe itogut." 
Genesis48:3 Ak kilenji Jakobo Josep, Kimong’ja Kamuktaindet ne bo Kamuktaet eng’ Lus eng’ emetab Kanan, ak kiiberura," 
Genesis48:4 ak kilenja, Keero, agonin iyotet, ak abarain, ak ayain iegu bororiosiek che chang’; ak tun agochini emoni iyotet ne biitu let eng’ inye, koek nenywa koigeny." 
Genesis48:5 Chechuk anyun nguno werichuguk aeng’u, chu kigisigun eng’ emetab Misri, ye kitom aitu ole imi eng’ Misri; Epraim ak Manase, ko u Reuben ak Simeon." 
Genesis48:6 Ak egu cheguk che tun isiche let eng’ chu; kiguurtoe kainaikab werik che tupcho eng’ bortenywa. 
Genesis48:7 Ak kirebena meet Rael eng’ oret, eng’ oret eng’ Kanan abunu Padan, ye kita ko loo kitigin eng’ Eprat: ak kiatupchi oloto, oretab Eprat (noto ko Bet-lehem)." 
Genesis48:8 Ak kigeer Israel werikab Josep, ak koteebe kolenji, Ng’o chu?" 
Genesis48:9 Ak kilenji Josep kwandanyi, Werikyuk chu che kigona Kamuktaindet eng’ olito. Ak kile, Kaigai imutwa kobwa yu, si aberur." 
Genesis48:10 Ak ki negit kogorio konyekab Israel amu osindo; kima kota komuchi kogeer kiy komie. Ak kiimut lagochoto korikyi inendet, ak king’utut, ak koue eunekyik." 
Genesis48:11 Ak kilenji Israel Josep, Kama kota abwati ale ta ageere togeng’ung’: ago, kagoborua Kamuktaindet lagoguk agichek." 
Genesis48:12 Ak kiisto Josep lagochoto eng’ kutung’oikab Jakobo; ak kiing’uruk inendet agoi ng’ony. 
Genesis48:13 Ak kinam Josep ichek tuwai, kiname Epraim eunnyi ne bo tai kotokyi eutab katam ne bo Israel, ak koname Manase eunnyi ne bo katam kotokyi eutab Israel ne bo tai, ak komut korikyi kwandanyi." 
Genesis48:14 Ak kiito Israel eunnyi ne bo tai kogonoor metitab Epraim, werit ne ming’in, ak kogonoor eunnyi ne bo katam metitab Manase, kiigonoor eunekyik ko u noto, kongen; amu ki werit ne bo tai Manase." 
Genesis48:15 Ak kiiberur Josep, ak kole, Kamuktaindet ne kibendate tainnyi kwanisiekyuk Abraham ak Isak, Kamuktaindet ne kibaata atkinye tugul agoi kora," 
Genesis48:16 malaikaiyat ne kiitiacha eng’ yaitwogik tugul, ingoberur lagochu; ak keguurtoe ichek kainennyu, ak kainaikab kwanisiekyuk agichek, Abraham ak Isak; ak ingotesogis kochang’a eng’ kwenutab ng’ony." 
Genesis48:17 Ak kingogeer Josep kole kagogonoor kwandanyi eunnyi ne bo tai metitab Epraim, koyait eng’ tainnyi: konam anyun eutab kwandanyi kole koisto eng’ metitab Epraim si konde metitab Manase." 
Genesis48:18 Ak kilenji Josep kwandanyi, Ma u noto, baba: amu ni ko werit ne bo tai; igonoor eung’ung’ ne bo tai metinnyi." 
Genesis48:19 Ak kiesio kwandanyi, ak kole, Angen ale u noto, werinnyu, angen: egu agine inendet bororiet, ak tun eetu: ago eetu ng’etab kamet ne ming’in kosiir inendet, ak chang’aitu lagokyik koegu bororiosiek che chang’." 
Genesis48:20 Ak kiiberur ichek betunoto, kolen, Iberuri Israel bik amu inye, kole, Ingoyain Kamuktaindet ogergeitu ak Epraim ak Manase, ak kinam Epraim kondoe Manase." 
Genesis48:21 Ak kilenji Israel Josep, Keero, negit ame: ago mi Kamuktaindet koboten, ak koweekten kogeny iwe emetab kwanisieguk." 
Genesis48:22 Ak kaagonin kebeberta agenge ne siirei che bo tupchosieguk ne kialuule Amorik eng’ rotwennyu bo chok ak kwangennyu. 
Genesis49:1 Ak kiiguur Jakobo werikyik, kolenji, Oyumgei tugul, si kobiit aboruok tuguk che tun bwanjinok eng’ betusiek che bo let." 
Genesis49:2 Oyumgei anyun si ogas, okwek, werikab Jakobo; Ogas Israel kwandang’wong’." 
Genesis49:3 Inyendet Reuben ko i werinnyu ne bo tai, i kamugennyu, agoi taunetab kimnatennyu; Etunatet ne bo tororindo, ak etunatet ne bo kimnatet." 
Genesis49:4 Iwasegei ko u beek, menyoru anyun etunatet; Amu kiiwe itogutab kwandang’ung’:" 
Genesis49:5 Tupcho Simeon ak Lawi; Karikab koromnatet rotokwak bo chok. 
Genesis49:6 Ee, muguleldanyu, amat iwe kapkiruogenywa; Ee, teegistanyu, amonamge ak tuiyenywa: Amu kibar chi eng’ neregekwak, Ak kieb kwariatab eik eng’ kwetyinenywa." 
Genesis49:7 Chubot nyiitatenywa, amu ki bichiien; Ak neregekwak, amu ki koromen: Apchee ichek eng’ Jakobo, Ak aiyeste ichek eng’ Israel." 
Genesis49:8 Inyendet Juda ne tun ilosun tupchosieguk: Indoi eung’ung’ kaatitab buniguk; Ing’urukyinin werikab kwandang’ung’ eng’ taing’ung’. 
Genesis49:9 Juda ko neranetab ng’etundo; Kaiwe werinnyu eng’ ole kaibarji tiondo: Kiing’uruk, koribis ko u ng’etundo, Ak ko u ng’etundo ne nyebuito; ng’o ne ing’eeti?" 
Genesis49:10 Maistoegei Juda siarit ne bo bounatet, Ak mabeti ne igoitoi ng’atutik eng’ iyotennyi, Agoi koit Silo; Ak kase it bik tugul inendet." 
Genesis49:11 Ratyin sigiriennyi ketitab sabibuk, Ak ratyin moitab sigiriennyi ketitab sabibuk ne mie kosiir; Kigomwete ngoroikyik kivaik che bo sabibuk: Ak komwete che tugegei biik che biriren che bo sabibuk:" 
Genesis49:12 Ak kobiriritu konyekyik eng’ divaik, Ak leelagitu kelekyik eng’ chego." 
Genesis49:13 Tun menyei Sebulun ngegutab nyanjet: Ak koek kamuung’etab melisiek: Egu kiwotennyi Sidon. 
Genesis49:14 Sigiriet ne kim Isakar, Ne ribise kwemutab njorusiek che bo kechirek:" 
Genesis49:15 Ak kigeer ole kimuung’e kole mie; Ak kigeer emet kole kararan; Ak kiing’uruk si kolaiso, Ak koek otwogindet ne boisiei." 
Genesis49:16 Iruokyin Dan bikyik, Amu oret agenge inendet eng’ Israel." 
Genesis49:17 Egu Dan ndaret eng’ ole kibunei, Erenet eng’ oret, Ne susei kwarinikab mbartanyisiek, Si kobut kowee batai chito ne lanyei." 
Genesis49:18 Kiagen yetuneng’ung’, ee Jehovah." 
Genesis49:19 Igiichi luget Gad: Ago igiichi inendet ichek agoi konam kwariat. 
Genesis49:20 Ruriotin amitwogik che un bunu Aser, Ak ktun konu tuguk che iboiboi laitorinik." 
Genesis49:21 Kenyelet ne kotoy Naptali ne kagiunda: Ne ng’alali ng’alek che miachen. 
Genesis49:22 Josep ko temetab ketit ne yiei kot, Temet ne yiei kot ne mi ye negite kondab beek; Iwaktoi temenik kosiirei inatut." 
Genesis49:23 Kagogochi inendet ng’wanindo che mwoktoi kotiek, Ak kamwok ak kausaus:" 
Genesis49:24 Ago tebye kwangennyi eng’ kimnatet, Ak kigimegitu eunekyik, Eng’ eunekab Inendet ne Kim ne bo Jakobo, (Mong’une oloto mestowot, inendet koita ne bo Israel)," 
Genesis49:25 Agot eng’ Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandang’ung’, ne tun toretin, Ak eng’ Kamuktaindet ne tun iberurin, Eng’ berurwogik che bo barak kipsengwet, Ak berurwogik che mitune riret, Berurwogik che bo kinaik, ak che bo iyotet." 
Genesis49:26 Kigimegitu berurwogikab kwandang’ung’ kosiir berurwogikab aguiywogikyuk Agoi ole itei tulonok che bo koigeny: Tebe metitab Josep berurwogichoto, Ak eng’ metit barak ne bo inendet ne kigitabane tupchosiekyik." 
Genesis49:27 Benjamin ko suiyot ne tonisiei: Amei karon che bo loget, Ak kopchei koskoleny che kaluul." 
Genesis49:28 Chuto ltugul ko ortinwek ktaman ak aeng’ che bo Israel: ak chuto ko ng’alek che kimwachi kwandanywa koberuri; kiiberur chi tugul ko u ole teptoi berurtanyi. 
Genesis49:29 Ak kiitigon ichek kolenji, Negit kiyuma awa ole mi bikyuk; otuba koboto kwanisiekyuk eng’ kebenet ne mitei mbaretab Epron Hitindet," 
Genesis49:30 eng’ kebenonoto mitei mbaretab Makpela, ne tokyingei Mamre, eng’ emetab Kanan, ne kial Abraham koboto mbaranato eng’ Epron Hitindet, si koek oldab kererisiek:" 
Genesis49:31 kigitupchi yoto Abraham ak osotiondennyi Sara; ak kigitupchi yoto Isak ak Rebeka osotiondennyi agichek; ak kiatupchi Lea yoto agine: 
Genesis49:32 kigiale werikab Het mbaranato ak kebenonoto, ne mi yoto." 
Genesis49:33 Ak ye kingo kagoges Jakobo kotigunutik che kiitigoni werikyik, kogetita kelyekyik koba itok, kiilil anyun ak kigiyum koboto bikyik." 
Genesis50:1 Kiing’uruk anyun Josep kotokyigei togetab kwandanyi, ak kirirji, ak kong’utut." 
Genesis50:2 Ak king’at Josep otwogikyik chepkerichinik konde kerichek mustab kwandanyi: ak kiinde chepkerichinichoto kerichek mustab Israel. 
Genesis50:3 Ak kiigesgei betusiek artamu agobo inendet: amu tenitu choto betusiek che kicham kinde kerichek: ak kirirji Misrik inendet betusiek tamanwogik tisab. 
Genesis50:4 Ak kingo kagobata betusiek che bo rirek, kong’alalji Josep bikab gotab Parao, kolenji, Ngo kianyoru chamet eng’ taing’wong’, ko kaigai omwachi Parao kogas komie eng’ itikyik, olenji," 
Genesis50:5 Kimakwa baba ayosio, ak kile, Keero, kamei: tupcha kererinnyu ne kiachopchige eng’ emetab Kanan. Ara anyun, kaigai igona atogosta awa atub baba, si aweeige." 
Genesis50:6 Ak kilenji Parao, Ui togoste, itub kwandang’ung’, ko u ye kimagun kwandang’ung’ iyosie." 
Genesis50:7 Akiktogosta anyun Josep kwo kotub kwandanyiu: ak kitogosta koboto inendet otwogik tugul che bo Parao, ak boisiekab gonnyi, ak boisiek tugul che bo emetab Misri," 
Genesis50:8 ak kotab Josep komugul, ak ktupchosiekyik, ak bikab gotab kwandanyi: kobata lagokwak, ak kechirekwak ak tuga, che king’et eng’ emetab Gosen." 
Genesis50:9 Ak kiba koboto inendet karisiek ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek: ki bik che chang’ kot. 
Genesis50:10 Ak kiit ruanyut kne kiborse ne bo Atad, ne mitei Jordan bitonin, ak kiiteiyo eng’ oloto eng’ rirek che ng’wonen che bichiien: ak king’at kerirji kwandanyi betusiekd tisab." 
Genesis50:11 Ak ye kingogeer che menyei emototo, Kanaik, rirek eng’ ruanyutab Atak, kole, Eechen rirechu eng’ Misrik: kigiguure anyun yoto Abel-Misraim, ne mitei Jordan bitonin." 
Genesis50:12 Ak kiyachi werikyik ko u ye kiga ng’at inendet ichek: 
Genesis50:13 amu kisut werikyik kwo emetab Kanan, ak kitupchi kebenet ne mi mbaretab Makpela, ne kial Abraham koboto mbaret eng’ Epron Hitindet ne tokyingei Mamre, kobunji inendet, si koek oldab kererisiek." 
Genesis50:14 Ak kingo kagotub Josep kwandanyi, koweektagei kwo Misri, koboto tupchosiekyik, ak ktugul che kiga kotogosta koboto inendet, ye kibendid kotubei kwandanyi." 
Genesis50:15 Ak ye kingogeer werik che ktupcho ak Josep kole kagome kwandanywa, kole, Abere, imuchi kowechech Josep, ak kogeerwech yaitiet tugul ne kiga kiyachi inendet." 
Genesis50:16 Ak kiiyokto chito kwo oldab Josep, kolenji, King’at kwandang’ung’ ye kitomo kome, kole," 
Genesis50:17 Omwachi Josep olenji, Kaigai inyochi kaat tupchosieguk amu bistoenywa, ak tengektanywa, amu kiyaun yaitiet: ara anyun, kisain kele, Nyoiywech kaat achek otwogikab Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandang’ung’. Ak kirir Josep ye king’aleljin icheget inendet." 
Genesis50:18 Kiba anyun werjoto tupcho agichek kobutyi ng’ony eng’ tainnyi; ak kolenji, Keero, achek ko ki otwogiguk." 
Genesis50:19 Ak kilenji Josep, Amoiywei: tos ageerege Kamuktaindet?" 
Genesis50:20 Okwek, ko kiolen kioyaiywa ne ya; ago kiyai Kamuktaindet komieit, si kosulda ko u rani, si kesor bik che chang’." 
Genesis50:21 Amata oiywei anyun nguno: abaok, koboto lagokwok. Ak kiigaigai ichek, ak kong’alalji eng’ talasiet." 
Genesis50:22 Ak kimeny Josep Misri, inendet ak bikab gotab kwandanyi: ak kitar Josep kenyisiek bogol ak taman." 
Genesis50:23 Ak kigeer Josep lagokab Epraim agoi ibinda ne bo somok: ak kigigu lagokab Makir weritab Manase eng’ kutung’oikab Josep. 
Genesis50:24 Ak kilenji Josep tupchosiekyik, Negit ame: ago rutochinok iman Kamuktaindet, ak komaandak otogoste eng’ emoni obe emet ne kiiyosiechi Abraham, ak Isak, ak Jakobo." 
Genesis50:25 Ak kimach Josep kayosiet eng’ lagokab Israel, kole, Rutochinok iman Kamuktaindet, ak oib kowekyuk kotogosta koba eng’ oli," 
Genesis50:26 Kime kanyun Josep, ne kiga kotar kenyisiek bogol ak taman: ak kiinde kerichek mustanyi, ak kiinde moinget eng’ oloto bo Misri." 
Exodus1:1 Chu anyun kainaikab werikab Israel, che kiit Misri; kiwa chi tugul ak gonnyi koboto Jakobo:" 
Exodus1:2 Reuben, Simeon, Lawi, ak Juda;" 
Exodus1:3 Isakar, Sebulun ak Benjamin;" 
Exodus1:4 Dan ak Naptali, Gad ak Aser." 
Exodus1:5 Ki tamanwogik tisab bik tugul che kimong’une bortab Jakobo; ak kimi ine Josep Misri. 
Exodus1:6 Ak kime Josep, ak tupchosiekyik tugul, ak bik tugul che bo ibinato." 
Exodus1:7 Ak kiiyo mising’ bikab Israel, ak kotesogis kochang’ait, ak kogimegitu kot; ak kiyom ichek emet." 
Exodus1:8 Ak kibiit laitoriat age ne kiboi Misri, ne kima kongen Josep." 
Exodus1:9 Ak kilenji bikyik, Ogeero, chang’ bikab werikab Israel kosiirech ago kimen:" 
Exodus1:10 ongeng’omenji anyun, si matesogis; amu nda biitu boriet, konamegei ak bunikyok, ak koborienech, ak koba komanda eng’ emoni." 
Exodus1:11 Kiinde anyun amu noto kiptainikab boisiet si kobiit konyalil ichek eng’ boisionikwak che nyigisen. Kiteekyi anyun Parao nganasok che kigiguure Pitom ak Raamses, ole kigonore tuguk." 
Exodus1:12 Ago ye kingotesak kanyalilet ne kiginyalili ichek, kotesogis agichek kosiir, ak koyom emet. Ak kiimgei kot Misrik agobo lagokab Israel." 
Exodus1:13 Ak kibirji Misrik lagokab Israel kobois kobirtogei: 
Exodus1:14 ak kiigochi sobonwekwak kong’wonegitu eng’ otwognatet ne korom; eng’ boisietab menet ak matabaruk, ak boisionik alak tugul che bo emet, otwognatenywa tugul ne kiyai, kigigochi koyai boisiet kobirtoegei." 
Exodus1:15 Ak king’alalji laitoriatab Misri chebiosokab sigisio che bo Hebranik: kigiguure age Sipra, ak kigiguure age Pua:" 
Exodus1:16 kilenji, Ye osigisiechi kwonyik che bo Hebranik, ak ye ogeer lakwet ne kagisich; ngo ng’etet, obar; ago ngo chepto, obagakte kosob." 
Exodus1:17 Ago kiiywei chebiosochato bo sigisio Kamuktaindet, ak kima yai ko u ye kiga mwachi laitoriatab Misri, ago kisor ng’etik kosopcho." 
Exodus1:18 Ak kiguur laitoriatab Misri, chebiosochato bo sigisio, konyo kolenji, Amu nee si oyai kii, ounde ng’etik kosopcho?" 
Exodus1:19 Ak kilenji chebiosochato bo sigisio Parao, Amu ma kergei kwonyikab Hebranik ak che bo Misrik; amu sib kosichei kotom koit chebiosetab sigisio." 
Exodus1:20 Ak kiyachi Kamuktaindet ne mie chebiosochato bo sigisio: ak kitesogis bik, ak kogimegitu mising’." 
Exodus1:21 Amu kiiywei chebiosochato bo sigisio Kamuktaindet, kiiberur anyun ichek kotesogis ortinwekwak." 
Exodus1:22 Ak king’at Parao bikyik kolenji, Owirjini ainet werit age tugul ne kisichei, ak ounde chepto age tugul kosob." 
Exodus2:1 Kiwa chito ne bo oretab Lawi kotun cheptab Lawi. 
Exodus2:2 Ak kimanach osotiondonoto, ak kisich ng’etet; ak ye kingogeer kole lakwet ne kararan, kouny inendet arawek somok." 
Exodus2:3 Ak ye kima kota komuchi kouny, kocheng’ji inendet moinget ne bo cherungusiek, ak komale lamit ak manget ak konde lakwet orit, ak konde ngegutab ainet, saoset orit." 
Exodus2:4 Ak kitonone chepkamet ole loo, kole kogeer kit ne tos kiyachi." 
Exodus2:5 Ak kichortagei cheptab Parao kwo koungei eng’ ainet; ak kibendat tibik che kimi tugul ak inendet eng’ tabandab ainet; ak kigeer moinget eng’ saoset, ak kiiyokto otwogindennyi kwo koib." 
Exodus2:6 Kiyat anyun, ak kigeer lakwet ne ng’etet, yeityo korir lakwanato. Kirire anyun lakwanato, ak kile, Bo lakwani Hebranik." 
Exodus2:7 Kimwaji anyun chepkametab lakwanato chebo Parao, kolenji, Tos mie awo aguurun cheblakwet eng’ osotikab Hebranik, si koribun lakwanito?" 
Exodus2:8 Ak kilenji cheptab Parao, Ui iguur. Kiwa anyun cheboto koguur kametab lakwet." 
Exodus2:9 Ak kilenji chebo Parao, Imut lakwani, ui iguiywa, si agonin melektang’ung’. Kiimut anyun osotiondonoto lakwet, ak kiireri." 
Exodus2:10 Ak kiner lakwet koeet, ak kiimutyi chebo Parao, ak kiigei werinnyi. Ak kiguure kainennyi Musa, kole, Amu kiamoong’u eng’ beek." 
Exodus2:11 Ak eng’ betusiechoto, ye kiga koeet Musa, kwo ole mi tupchosiekyik, ak kigeer laisenywa: ak kigeer Misrindet kobirei Hebranindet ne ki age eng’ bikyik." 
Exodus2:12 Ak kigeer komosi ak komosi, ak kingogeer kole mami chi, kobar Misrindonoto, ak kotube ng’aniek." 
Exodus2:13 Ak kiwa kogeny eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, ak ogeero, kobortos bik aeng’ che bo Hebranik: ak kilenji inendet ne kichalwogen, Amu nee si ibir ching’wong’?" 
Exodus2:14 Ak kolenji, Ng’o ne koindein iegu bounindet ak kiruogindet iruokwech? Ilen ibara, ko u ye koibar Misrindet? Ak kiiywei Musa, ak kole, Koga kogenai nito." 
Exodus2:15 Kingogas Parao anyun ng’olyondonoto, kocheng’ kobar Musa. Ago kimwei Musa eng’ taitab Parao, kwo komeny emetab Midian: ak kotebi ng’ony eng’ ole negite keringetab beek." 
Exodus2:16 Kitinyei tisiindetab Midian tibik tisab: ak kibwa tipchoto konyo koram beek, ak konyiit beek togomwek si kobiit kogoigoch akwetab kechirekab kwandanywa." 
Exodus2:17 Ak kibwa mestowek nyo koon tipchoto: ago king’eet Musa kotoret, kogoigokyi." 
Exodus2:18 Ak ye kingoit ole mi kwandanywa Reuel, kolenji, Ngosib oweeige rani?" 
Exodus2:19 Ak kolenji, Kaetech Misrindet eng’ eunekab mestowek, ak yeityo koramwech beek, ak kogoigoch akwet." 
Exodus2:20 Ak kilenji tibikyik, Mi ano chichoto? Amu nee si obagakte? Oguur konyo koamis." 
Exodus2:21 Ak kicham Musa kotebi ak chichoto: ak kiigochi cheptanyi Sipora kotun. 
Exodus2:22 Ak kisich werit, ak kiguure kainennyi Gersom: kole, A kiprutoiyo eng’ emetab bororiosiek alak." 
Exodus2:23 Ak ye kingobata betusiek che chang’, kome laitoriatab Misri: ak kitigenso eng’ ng’wanindo lagokab Israel amu otwognatet ak kiririo, ak kiit rirekwak oldab Kamuktaindet amu otwognatet." 
Exodus2:24 Ak kigas Kamuktaindet tigenoikwak, ak kiibwat Kamuktaindet kayomisennyi ne kiiyomisyi Abraham, ak Isak, ak Jakobo." 
Exodus2:25 Ak kigeer Kamuktaindet lagokab Israel, ak kinai Kamuktaindet kit ne u." 
Exodus3:1 Ak kiiyagi Musa akwetab kechirek che bo kabyugoinnyi Jetro, tisiindetab Midian: ak kikweri akwet koba ong’atet komosin, ak kiit tulwetab Kamuktaindet, ne kiguure Horeb." 
Exodus3:2 Ak kimong’ji inendet malaikaiyatab Jehovah eng’ mat ne lalei ne kimong’une kwenutab ketit ne samum: ak kogeer, ogeero, kima lal ketoto kilale mat." 
Exodus3:3 Ak kile Musa, Kawe ageer kwong’utioni te ni, katepto ano si malal ketit." 
Exodus3:4 Ak ye kingogeer Jehovah kole, kawa kogeer, koguur inendet Kamuktaindet eng’ kwenutab ketit, kole, Musa, Musa. Ak kile, Ami yu." 
Exodus3:5 Ak kilenji, Amerigu yu: icheru kweoniguk eng’ kelyeguk amu tilil yoto itonone." 
Exodus3:6 Ak kilenji kogeny, A Kamuktaindet ne bo kwandang’ung’, a Kamuktaindet ne bo Abraham, a Kamuktaindet ne bo Isak, a Kamuktaindet ne bo Jakobo. Ak kiuny Musa togennyi; amu kiiywei kogeer Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus3:7 Ak kilenji Jehovah, Koageer iman nyalilwogikab bikyuk che mi Misri, ak koagas rirekwak amu kayagik che usausi; ak angen ng’wanindanywa;" 
Exodus3:8 kachoruge anyun si kobiit asor ichek eng’ eunekab Misrik, ak amutu ichek kotogos komong’ eng’ emonoto koba emet ne mie ne baraa, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik; oldab Kananik, Hitik, Amorik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik." 
Exodus3:9 Keero, kagobwanja rirekab lagokab Israel; ak koageer kanyalilet ne inyalili ichek Misrik." 
Exodus3:10 Nyo anyun, si ayokten iwe gab Parao, si kobiit imoong’u bikyuk lagokab Israel eng’ Misri." 
Exodus3:11 Ak kilenji Musa Kamuktaindet, A ng’o, ne tos amuch awo gab Parao, ak amoong’u lagokab Israel eng’ Misri?" 
Exodus3:12 Ak kile Jehovah, Amu ami koboten iman; ni kaborunet ne inae ile kayokten: ye kaimoong’u bik eng’ Misri, oboisiechi Kamuktaindet eng’ tulwoni." 
Exodus3:13 Ak kilenji Musa Kamuktaindet, Ye ait ole mi lagokab Israel, ak alenji, Kagoyokwa Kamuktaindet ne bo kwanisiekwok anyonjok; ak ngo teebena kole, Kiguure nee kainennyi? Alenjini nee bichoto?" 
Exodus3:14 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet Musa, ANENDET NE AMI: ak kile, Imwachini lagokab Israel ng’olyondoni, ilenjini, Kagoyokwa anyonjok inendet ne keguure AMI." 
Exodus3:15 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet Musa kogeny, Imwachini lagokab Israel ng’olyondoni ilenjini, Kagoyokwa anyonjok Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo kwanisiekwok, Kamuktaindet ne bo Abraham, Kamuktaindet ne bo Isak, Kamuktaindet ne bo Jakobo; kainennyu nito agoi koigeny, ak kabwatennyu nito agoi ibinwek tugul." 
Exodus3:16 Ui, iyum boisiekab Israel, ak ilenji ichek, Kigomong’ja Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo kwanisiekwok, Kamuktaindet ne bo Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo, kolenja, Kaanyonjok iman, ak kaageer noto ne kiyaiywok eng’ Misri:" 
Exodus3:17 ak kiamwa ale, Amutwok otogosu omong’une nyalildab Misri, agoi oit emetab Kananik, Hitik, Amorik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik." 
Exodus3:18 Ak tun kasei it kuting’ung’: ak iwe gab laitoriatab Misri, inye ak boisiekab Israel, ak olenji, Kogetuiye ak Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo Hebranik: ara anyun, kisain kele, undech kebe bandab betusiek somok eng’ ong’atet, si kobiit keeng’ji Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo tiseiywot." 
Exodus3:19 Ak angen ale machamwok laitoriatab Misri obe, kobate eng’ eut ne kim." 
Exodus3:20 Ak achuul eunnyu abire Misrik boisionikyuk tugul che kikwong’e che amache ayai eng’ kwenunywa: ak ye ibata choto koundak obe. 
Exodus3:21 Ak agochini bichu konyor chamet eng’ taitab Misrik: si ye obe, ko matun obe buch:" 
Exodus3:22 ak ingosom kwondo age tugul chitab kokwennyi, ak eng’ inendet ne tebe gonnyi, tuguk che bo feda, ak tuguk che bo tahabu, ak ngoroik: si olaakyi werikwok, ak tibikwok; ak onyaban anyun tugukab Misrik." 
Exodus4:1 Kiwolji anyun Musa kolenji, Ago, keero, maiyana bichoto, anan kogas kutinnyu: amu mwaei kolen, Machunjin Jehovah." 
Exodus4:2 Ak kilenji Jehovah, Nee ne iting’e eut? Ak kile, Siarit." 
Exodus4:3 Ak kilenji, Wirji ng’ony. Ak kiwirji ng’ony, ak kiwalak koek erenet; ak kimwee Musa." 
Exodus4:4 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Iyogoite eung’ung’, ak inam katutiennyi: (kiiyogoito eunnyi anyun, ak konam, ak kiwalak koek siarit eng’ eunnyi:)" 
Exodus4:5 si kobiit koyan kole, kichunjin Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo kwanisiekwok, Kamuktaindet ne bo Abraham, Kamuktaindet ne bo Isak, Kamuktaindet ne bo Jakobo." 
Exodus4:6 Ak kilenji Jehovah kogeny, Irooch eut tegeng’ung’. Ak kiirooch eunnyi teget: ak ye kingocher eunnyi, ogeero, kitinyei eunnyi mogondosik, kiwalak koleelit ko u teluchi." 
Exodus4:7 Ak kilenji, Ketite eut irookte tegeng’ung’. (Ak kiweech korookto eut tegennyi; ak ye kingonem, ogeero, ko kagomieit ko u yegai.)" 
Exodus4:8 Ak ngo maiyanin, anan ngo magas kaborunet ne bo tai, komuchi koyan kaborunet ne bo let." 
Exodus4:9 Ak ngo maiyan kaborunoichuto aeng’, anan kogas kuting’ung’, iram anyun beek eng’ ainet, si irong’ji ng’ony ole yaamat: si kowalak beechoto kerame ainet koek korotik eng’ emet ne yaamat." 
Exodus4:10 Ak kilenji Musa Jehovah, Bwa Kamuktaindet, mangen ang’alal, koboch agoi, anan koboch ngab ong’alal ak otwogindeng’ung’: amu mangen ang’alal ak ua kut." 
Exodus4:11 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet, Ng’o ne kiyaei kutitab chi? Anan ne yaei chi konamak kut, anan kotimak, anan si kogeerto, anan kogor? Tos ma ane Jehovah?" 
Exodus4:12 Ui anyun, ami koboto kuting’ung’, ak anetin che kanyol imwa." 
Exodus4:13 Ak kile, Bwa Kamuktaindet, asain, iyokte eng’ eutab inendet ne imache iyokte." 
Exodus4:14 Ak kigoromitu neregekab Jehovah eng’ Musa, ak kilenji, Tos mami ng’etab komet Aron Lawindet? Angen ale imuchi kong’alal komie. Ak nyonei inendet agine kotorogun: ak baibai eng’ muguleldanyi ye keerin." 
Exodus4:15 Ak ing’alaljini, inde kutinnyi ng’alechato: ami ane koboto kuting’ung’, ak koboto kutinnyi, ak anetak ne kanyol oyai." 
Exodus4:16 Ak egu inendet ng’alalindet ne ng’alaljin bik: ak egu inendet kuting’ung’, ak iige Kamuktaindet eng’ inendet." 
Exodus4:17 Ak iiboti inye siarini eng’ eung’ung’, ne iyae kaborunoik." 
Exodus4:18 Ak kiweek Musa kwo oldab kabyugoinnyi Jetro, ak kilenji, Kaigai ichamwa awo, aweekyige ole mi bikyuk che mi Misri, ageer ngo ta kosoptos. Ak kilenji Jetro Musa, Ui eng’ kalyet." 
Exodus4:19 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa eng’ olin bo Midian, Ui, ketitege Misri: amu kigobek bik tugul che kicheng’ei kobarin." 
Exodus4:20 Ak kiimut Musa osotiondennyi ak werikyik, ak kichob kolany ichek sigiriet, ak koweek kwo emetab Misri: kiib anyun Musa siaritab Kamuktaindet eng’ eunnyi." 
Exodus4:21 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ye igetitege Misri, irib iyai kwong’utik tugul eng’ taitab Parao, cho kaande eung’ung’: ago auuiiti muguleldanyi, si maigochi bik koba." 
Exodus4:22 Ak ilenji Parao, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Werinnyu Israel, taitanyu:" 
Exodus4:23 ak kaamwaun alenjin, Igochi werinnyu kwo; si kobiit koboisiewa: ak kaiete kwo; keero, abare taitang’ung’." 
Exodus4:24 Ak ye kimi gotab toek kowendi, kotuiyo ak Jehovah, ak kimachei kobar inendet." 
Exodus4:25 Kinam anyun Sipora sengwetiet ne ng’atib, koyatitae werinnyi, ak kiwirji iririot kelyekyik; ak kile, Iman i manong’otiondennyu ne bo korotik." 
Exodus4:26 Ak kibagakta Jehovah inendet. Ak kile osotiondonoto, I manong’otiot ne bo korotik, amu kamuratanet." 
Exodus4:27 Ak kilenji Jehovah Aron, Ui, torokte Musa eng’ ong’atet. Kiwa anyun, ak kituiyechi tulwetab Kamuktaindet, ak king’utut inendet." 
Exodus4:28 Ak komwachi Musa Aron ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah che kiga koyoktoe, ak kaborunoik tugul che kiga koyomisyi." 
Exodus4:29 Ak kiba Musa ak Aron koyum boisiek tugul che bo lagokab Israel: 
Exodus4:30 ak kimwa Aron ng’alek tugul che kiga komwachi Jehovah Musa, ak kiyai kaborunoik eng’ taitab bik." 
Exodus4:31 Ak kiiyan bik: ye kingogas kole kagonyonji Jehovah lagokab Israel, ak kogogeer nyalilwogikwak, kong’urukso anyun." 
Exodus5:1 Ak kingobata choto koba Musa ak Aron kolenji Parao, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo Israel, kole, Unde bikyuk koba, si kobiit koyaiywa igorta eng’ ong’atet." 
Exodus5:2 Ak kile Parao, Ng’o Jehovah, ne tos agas it ng’alekyik kot achamji Israel koba? Mangen Jehovah, ak kogeny, machamjini Israel koba." 
Exodus5:3 Ak kile, Kinyonjech Kamuktaindet ne bo Hebranik: kisain anyun kele, Undech kebe bandab betusiek somok eng’ ong’atet, kebe keeng’ji Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, tiseiywot; si mabirenech koroito, anan ko rotwetab chok." 
Exodus5:4 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Misri ichek, Amu nee si omache otiach bik eng’ boisionikwak, inye Musa ak Aron? Oba ole mi milosiekwok." 
Exodus5:5 Ak kile Parao, Ogeero, kagochang’a bik che mi emet nguno, ak kaogochi kometo laisenywa." 
Exodus5:6 Ak king’at Parao eng’ betunoto kayagikab bik, ak bounik, kolenji," 
Exodus5:7 Amata ogochi bik kogeny mobek che cham koyae matabaruk: ingoba ichegei kocheng’jigei mobek. 
Exodus5:8 Ak obirji koyai matabaruk che yamegei ak che kocham koyaei kotugul; amochuchuch kiy eng’ choto; amu choriren ichek; rirtos anyun amu noto, kolen, Konech kebe keeng’ji Kamuktaindennyo tiseiywot." 
Exodus5:9 Otesyi bichoto boisiet ne nyigis, si kobiit koyai choto, amat koepchi it ichek ng’alek che ma bo iman." 
Exodus5:10 Kimanda anyun kayagikab bik, koboto bounikwak, kong’alalji bik kolenji, Kamwa ko u ni Parao, Magonok mobek." 
Exodus5:11 Oba okwege, ocheng’ eng’ ole omuchi onyorji: ak magichuchuchi kiy eng’ boisieng’wong’." 
Exodus5:12 Kiyestaat anyun bik eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri koyumat kesigenik kogeere mobek. 
Exodus5:13 Ak kiichirjir kayagik bik, kolenji, Owong’u boisionikwok, che kocham oyae betut age tugul, ko u ye kocham oyae otinye mobek." 
Exodus5:14 Kigibir anyun bounikab lagokab Israel, che kiindoi kayagikab Parao, ak kiteebe kolenji, Amu nee si mowong’u motwetab boisiet ne bo amut ak ne bo ra, oyai matabaruk ko u ye kocham oyae oin kora?" 
Exodus5:15 Ak kiba bounikab lagokab Israel korirji Parao, kolenji, Amu nee si iyaiywech achek otwogiguk ko u ni?" 
Exodus5:16 Ma kigochi otwogiguk mobek, ak kolenjinech, Oyai matabaruk: ak kibirech achek otwogiguk: ago mi lelutiet biguk." 
Exodus5:17 Ago kilenji, O choriren, o choriren: noto anyun komwa ole, Konech kebe keeng’ji tiseiywot Jehovah." 
Exodus5:18 Ara anyun, oba oyai boisiet; magigonok mobek, ak kanyol oibu matabaruk che yamegei ak che kogimachei." 
Exodus5:19 Ak kigeer bounikab lagokab Israel kole tinyei nyalilda, ye kingemwa kele, Mochuchuchi kiy eng’ matabarukwok che cham oyae betut age tugul." 
Exodus5:20 Ak kituiyo ak Musa ak Aron, kotonondos eng’ oret, kobunu gab Parao:" 
Exodus5:21 ak kilenji ichek, Ingogeerok Jehovah koruokwok; amu kaoyaech kesamisitu eng’ taitab Parao, ak eng’ taitab otwogikyik, kot onde rotwetab chok eunekwak kobarenech." 
Exodus5:22 Ak kiweekyigei Musa oldab Jehovah, kolenji, Ee, Kamuktaindet, amu nee si iyachi ne ya bichu? Amu nee si iyokwa?" 
Exodus5:23 Amu koboch ngab anyo gab Parao ang’alalji eng’ kaineng’ung’, koyachi bichu ne ya; ak ma isoru biguk agot kitigin." 
Exodus6:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Machei si igeer nguno kit ne amache ayachi Parao: amu igochin ichek koba eng’ eut ne kim, ak koon koba eng’ emennyi eng’ eut ne kim." 
Exodus6:2 Ak king’alalji Kamuktaindet Musa kolenji, A JEHOVAH:" 
Exodus6:3 ak kiamong’ji Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo, ko a Kamuktaindet ne bo Kamuktaet, ago kima naa ichek eng’ kainennyu JEHOVAH." 
Exodus6:4 Ak kiagimit kayomisennyu koboto ichek, ale agochi emetab Kanan, emetab rutoitonywa, ole kirutoote." 
Exodus6:5 Ak koboto noto, ko kiagas tigenoikab lagokab Israel che mi eunekab Misrik ko ratotin; ak kiabwat kayomisennyu." 
Exodus6:6 Ilenji anyun lagokab Israel amu noto, A JEHOVAH, ak amoong’wok omong’une laisetab Misrik, ak asoruok eng’ otwognatenywa ak atiachak eng’ eut ne chuulat, ak eng’ kiruogutik che eechen:" 
Exodus6:7 ak anamak oegu bikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindet eng’ okwek: si onai ole A JEHOVAH Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ne imoong’wok omong’une laisetab Misrik." 
Exodus6:8 Ak amutwak obwa emet ne kiaitochi eunnyu agochi Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo; ak agonok kobunjok: A JEHOVAH." 
Exodus6:9 Ak king’alalji Musa ko u noto lagokab Israel: ago kima kas ichek ng’alekab Musa amu ng’wanindo ne kitinyei eng’ tamirmirikwak, ak otwognatet ne korom." 
Exodus6:10 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa, kolenji," 
Exodus6:11 Mande, ing’alalji Parao laitoriatab Misri ilenji kochamji lagokab Israel komanda eng’ emennyi." 
Exodus6:12 Ak king’alal Musa eng’ taitab Jehovah, kole, Ma kasa lagokab Israel; ko tos imuchi kogasta ano Parao, ak ane atinyei kutit ne tomo kitiach?" 
Exodus6:13 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron, ak kong’at ichek kobechi lagokab Israel, ak Parao laitoriatab Misri, si komanda lagokab Israel eng’ emetab Misri." 
Exodus6:14 Chu ko bounikab gorikab kwanisiekwak: werikab Reuben taitab Israel; Hanok, Palu, Hesron, ak Karmi: chuto ko lagokab gab Reuben." 
Exodus6:15 Ak werikab Simeon ko ki: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jakin, Sohar, ak Shaul weritab cheptab Kanan: chuto ko lagokab gab Simeon." 
Exodus6:16 Ak chu ko kainaikab werikab Lawi ko u ortinwekwak: Gerson, Kohat, ak Merari; ak kenyisiekab Lawi kote kosobei ko ki kenyuisiek bogol ak sosom ak tisab." 
Exodus6:17 Werikab Gerson ko ki: Libni ak Simei, ko u gorikwak." 
Exodus6:18 Ak werikab Kohat ko ki: Amram, Isar, Hebron, ak Usiel; ak kenyisiekab Kohat kote kosobei ko ki kenyisiek bogol ak sosom ak somok." 
Exodus6:19 Ak werikab Merari ko ki: Mali ak Musi. Chuto ko gorikab Lawik ko u ortinwekwak. 
Exodus6:20 Ak kiitun Amram sengennyi Jokebed; ak kisikyi Aron ak Musa: ak kenyisiekab Amram kote kosobei ko ki kenyisiek bogol ak sosom ak tisab. 
Exodus6:21 Ak werikab Isar ko ki: Kora, Nepeg, ak Sikri." 
Exodus6:22 Ak werikab Usiel ko ki: Misael, Elsapan, ak Sitri." 
Exodus6:23 Ak kiitun Aron Eliseba, cheptab Aminadab, chepkametab Nason; ak kisikyi inendet Nadab, Abiu, Eleasar ak Itamar." 
Exodus6:24 Ak werikab Kora ko ki: Asir, Elkana, ak Abiasap; chuto ko gorikab Koraik." 
Exodus6:25 Ak kiitun Eleasar weritab Aron age eng’ tibikab Putiel; ak kisikyi Pineas. Chuto ko bounikab gorik che bo kwanisiekab Lawik ko u gorikwak. 
Exodus6:26 Chuto ko Aron ak Musa che kimwachi Jehovah kolenji, Omoong’u lagokab Israel eng’ emetab Misri ko u lugosiekwak." 
Exodus6:27 Chuto ko icheget che kimwachi Parao laitoriatab Misri, komaanda lagokab Israel eng’ Misri: icheget ko Musa ak Aron." 
Exodus6:28 Ak eng’ betunoto ne king’alaljin Jehovah Musa eng’ emetab Misri," 
Exodus6:29 kong’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji, A Jehovah: mwachi Parao laitoriatab Misri tuguk tugul che amwaun." 
Exodus6:30 Ak kimwa Musa eng’ taitab Jehovah, kole, Atinye kutit ne tomo kitiach; imuchi kogasta ano Parao?" 
Exodus7:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Keero, kayain iige Kamuktaindet eng’ Parao: ak koek ng’etab komet Aron maotiondeng’ung’." 
Exodus7:2 Imwae tugul che ang’atin: ak komwachi ng’etab komet Aron Parao, kounda lagokab Israel komanda eng’ emennyi." 
Exodus7:3 Ak auuiiti muguleldab Parao, ak ates kaborunoikyuk ak kwong’utikyuk eng’ emetab Misri." 
Exodus7:4 Ago maimuchi kogasak Parao, ak ande eunnyu Misri, ak amoong’u lugosiekyuk, bikyuk lagokab Israel, komong’une emetab Misri eng’ kiruogutik che eechen." 
Exodus7:5 Ak tun naei Misrik kole a Jehovah, ye achuul eunnyu atokyi Misri, ak amoong’u lagokab Israel eng’ kwenunywa." 
Exodus7:6 Ak kiyai Musa ak Aron ko u noto; kiyai anyun ko u ye king’at Jehovah. 
Exodus7:7 Ak kiga koit kenyisiekab Musa tamanwogik sisiit, ak che bo Aron ko ki tamanwogik sisit ak somok, yoto king’alaljindos ak Parao." 
Exodus7:8 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron, kolenji," 
Exodus7:9 Ye teebenak Parao kole, Oboru kwong’utiet: ilenji Aron anyun, Nam siaring’ung’, wirji ng’ony eng’ taitab Parao, si kobiit koek erenet." 
Exodus7:10 Kiba Musa ak Aron anyun gab Parao, ak kiyai ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah: ak kiwirji ng’ony Aron siarinnyi eng’ taitab Parao, ak eng’ taitab otwogikyik, ak kiwalak koek erenet." 
Exodus7:11 Kiguur agine anyun Parao bik che ng’omen ak orgoik: ak kiyai ko u noto agichek bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei che bo Misri, eng’ ng’orsenywa." 
Exodus7:12 Kiwirji ng’ony chi age tugul siarinnyi, ak kiwalogis koek erenok: ago kilugui siaritab Aron sairisiekwak." 
Exodus7:13 Ak kiuuiit muguleldab Parao, ak ma kas ichek; ko u ye kiga komwa Jehovah." 
Exodus7:14 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Uui muguleldab Parao, kaesio kounda bik koba." 
Exodus7:15 Ui karon gab Parao; keero, wendi ainet; ak itonone tabandab ainet si otuiyechi yoto; ibe eung’ung’ siarit ne kowalak koek erenet." 
Exodus7:16 Ak ilenji, Kagoyokwa Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo Hebranik, anyonjin, kole, Unde bikyuk koba, si kobiit koboisiewa eng’ ong’atet: keero, tom igas kora." 
Exodus7:17 Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Inae eng’ ni ile a Jehovah; keero, akwere siarini ating’e eunnyu beechu mi ainoni, ak kowalogis koek korotik." 
Exodus7:18 Ak begu njirenik che mi ainet, ak kobul ainet; ak kowech Misrik koee beek che bunu ainet." 
Exodus7:19 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ilenji Aron, Nam siaring’ung’, ak ichuul eung’ung’ itokyi beekab Misri, ak ainosiekwak, ak kererusiekwak, ak tamboinikwak, ak togomwekwak tugul che bo beek, si kobiit koek korotik; ak kobiit korotik eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri, eng’ terenikab beek che bo ketik, ak terenikab beek che bo koik." 
Exodus7:20 Ak kiyai Musa ak Aron ko u noto, ko u ye king’at Jehovah; ak kisut siarinato, kokwere beek che mi ainet, eng’ taitab Parao, ak eng’ taitab otwogikyik; ak kiwalogis beek tugul che mi ainet koek korotik." 
Exodus7:21 Ak kibek njirenik che kimi ainet; ak kibul ainet kot ko mata komuch Misrik koee beekab ainet; ak kobiit korotik eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri. 
Exodus7:22 Ak kiyai ko u noto bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei che bo Misri eng’ ng’orsenywa: ak kiuuit muguleldab Parao, ak kima kas ichek; ko u ye kiga mwa Jehovah." 
Exodus7:23 Kiweektagei anyun Parao kwo gonnyi, ak kima iit agot ng’olyondonito agine koek kiy." 
Exodus7:24 Ak kibalat Misrik tugul ole negite ainet kolen tamangab konyor beek che eei; amu kima imuch koee beekab ainet. 
Exodus7:25 Ak kiiwong’gei betusiek tisabu koboch ngab kokwer Jehovah ainet. 
Exodus8:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ui oldab Parao, ak ilenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Unde bikyuk koba, si kobiit koboisiewa." 
Exodus8:2 Ak ngiete koba, keero, abire emeng’ung’ komugul mororochik:" 
Exodus8:3 ak nyiie ainet mororochik, ak kotogosta koba gong’ung’, ak koba got ne irue, agoi itogung’ung’, ak gorikab otwogiguk, ak oldab biguk, ak kapkoimaung’ung’, ak tereniguk che kikwang’e makatinik:" 
Exodus8:4 ak kotogostaenen, ak biguk, ak otwogiguk tugul." 
Exodus8:5 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ilenji Aron, Chuul eung’ung’ ne iting’e siarit itokyi ainosiek, ak kererusiek, ak tamboinik, si komong’une mororochik komong’ji emetab Misri." 
Exodus8:6 Ak kichuul Aron eunnyi kotokyi beekab Misri; ak kitogos anyun mororochik, ak kinyi emetab Misri." 
Exodus8:7 Ak kiyai bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei ko u noto eng’ ng’orsenywa, ak kiimoong’ji mororochik emetab Misri." 
Exodus8:8 Kiguur Parao anyun Musa ak Aron, kolenji, Orirji Jehovah, si koistaena mororochik, ak eng’ bikyuk; ak aunde bik koba, koba koeng’ji Jehovah tiseiywot." 
Exodus8:9 Ak kilenji Musa Parao, Ilosunenage: asaun au, ak otwogiguk, ak biguk, si kobiit kebar mororochik koistoenengei ak goriguk, ak kotebe ainet kityo?" 
Exodus8:10 Ak kile, Mutai. Ak kilenji, Ingoyaak ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’: si kobiit inai ile mami age ne u Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Exodus8:11 Ak istoenengei mororochik, ak eng’ goriguk ak eng’ otwogiguk ak eng’ biguk; ak kong’etune ainet inegei." 
Exodus8:12 Kimanda anyun Musa ak Aron eng’ gab Parao: ak kirirji Musa Jehovah agobo mororochichoto che kiga ipchi Parao. 
Exodus8:13 Ak kiyai Jehovah ko u ng’olyotab Musa; ak kibek mororochik eng’ gorik, ak eng’ seremusiek, ak emet." 
Exodus8:14 Ak kiiyumat koek keburusiek: ak kibul emet. 
Exodus8:15 Ak kingogeer Parao kole kagomung’do, kouuiit muguleldanyi inendet, ak kima kas ichek; ko u ye kiga komwa Jehovah." 
Exodus8:16 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ilenji Aron, Sut siaring’ung’ ak ikwere temburiekab emet, si kobiit kowalogis temburiechoto koek isirek eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri." 
Exodus8:17 Ak kiyai ko u noto; ak kichuul eunnyi Aron koboto siarinnyi, ak kokwer temburiek che bo ng’ony, ak kibiit isirek che kilany bik ak tiong’ik; kiek temburiek tugul che bo emet komugul ne bo Misri isirek." 
Exodus8:18 Ak kiyai ko u noto bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei eng’ ng’orsenywa si kobiit komoong’ isirek, ago kima imuch: ak kinam isirechoto bik ak tiong’ik." 
Exodus8:19 Kimwachi anyun bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei, Parao, kolenji, Mornetab Kamuktaindet nito: ak kiuuiit muguleldab Parao, ak ma kas ichek; ko u ye kiga komwa Jehovah." 
Exodus8:20 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ng’eet karon, muste ak itonon eng’ taitab Parao; keero, wendi ainet; ak ilenji inendet, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Unde biguk koba, koba koboisiewa." 
Exodus8:21 Ago ngot ko mechamji bikyuk koba, keero, ayogu kalyang’ik eng’ chang’indo kobwanjin ak otwogiguk ak biguk, ak goriguk orit: ak nyiie kalyang’ik gorikab Misri, ak ng’ony ole tonone." 
Exodus8:22 Ak abesie emetab Gosen eng’ betunoto, ole menyei bikyuk, si mait kalyang’ik oloto; si kobiit inai inye ile a Jehovah ne mi barautietab emet." 
Exodus8:23 Ak ande kiwotet kwenutab bikyuk ak biguk: biitu kaborunonoto mutai. 
Exodus8:24 Ak kiyai Jehovah ko u noto; ak kichang’a kalyang’ik ne ya eng’ gotab Parao, ak eng’ gorikab otwogikyik: ak king’emak emet komugul ne bo Misri amu kalyang’ik." 
Exodus8:25 Ak kiiyokto Parao keguur Musa ak Aron, kolenji, Oba, oeng’ji Kamuktaindeng’wong’ tiseiywot eng’ emoni." 
Exodus8:26 Ak kile Musa, Ma nyolu keyai ko u noto; amu kieng’jini Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo tiseiywot ne wechei Misrik: tos kienye che wechei Misrik eng’ tainywa, tos malachech eng’ koik?" 
Exodus8:27 Kibendi banda ne bo betusiek somok eng’ ong’atet, si keeng’ji tiseiywot Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ko u ye ta kong’atech." 
Exodus8:28 Ak kile Parao, Agonok obe si kobiit oeng’ji tiseiywot Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ ong’atet; ago mobendi ole loo mising’: osaiywa." 
Exodus8:29 Ak kile Musa, Keero, kawe eng’ ole imi si asa Jehovah si kobiit koistoe Parao kalyang’ik mutai, ak otwogikyik, ak bikyik; ago amat koboisie kogeny Parao kenisiet ye ete bik koba koeng’ji tiseiywot Jehovah." 
Exodus8:30 Ak kiwa Musa eng’ ole mi Parao, kwo kosa Jehovah." 
Exodus8:31 Ak kiyai Jehovah ko u ng’olyotab Musa; kiistoe Parao kalyang’ik, ak otwogikyik, ak bikyik; ma ng’et agot agenge." 
Exodus8:32 Ak kiiuuiit Parao muguleldanyi eng’ yoto agine, ak ma unda bik koba." 
Exodus9:1 Kilenji anyun Jehovah Musa, Ui gab Parao, ilenji, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, inendet Kamuktaindet ne bo Hebranik kole, Igochi bikyuk koba, koba koboisiewa." 
Exodus9:2 Amu ngot iete ichek koba, kota irany ichek," 
Exodus9:3 keero, mi eutab Jehovah tuga cheguk che mi akwot, ak eng’ mbartanyisiek, ak eng’ sigirok, ak eng’ tambesik, ak eng’ akwotisiek, ak eng’ kechirek: amei ichek koroito ne ng’wan." 
Exodus9:4 Ak ibestos Jehova tugab Israel eng’ tugab Misri: si mame kiy agot agenge eng’ tugul che bo lagokab Israel. 
Exodus9:5 Ak kiinde Jehovah ye egune, kole, Yaei Jehovah kii mutai eng’ emet." 
Exodus9:6 Ak kiyai Jehovah kioto eng’ betut ne kiisubi noto, ak kibek tuga tugul che bo Misri: ago ma me agot agenge eng’ tugab lagokab Israel." 
Exodus9:7 Ak kiiyokto Parao bik, ak ogeero, ma me agot agenge eng’ tugab Israel. Ago kiuuiit muguleldab Parao, ak ma chamji bik koba." 
Exodus9:8 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa ak Aron, Oram orekab mat ne o, ak ingoseerji Musa barak eng’ taitab Parao." 
Exodus9:9 Ak egu choto temburiek che buspus eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri, ak koek ondirik che mong’u kobwandos eng’ bik ak eng’ tiong’ik eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri." 
Exodus9:10 Kiib anyun ichek orekab mat ne o, ak koba kotononso eng’ taitab Parao; ak kiiseerji Musa barak; ak kiek ondirik che mong’u kobwandos eng’ bik ak eng’ tiong’ik." 
Exodus9:11 Ak kima imuch kotononso bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei eng’ taitab Musa amu ondirichoto; amu kinam ondirik bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei, ak Misrik tugul." 
Exodus9:12 Ak kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldab Parao, ak kima kas ichek; ko u ye kiga komwachi Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus9:13 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ng’eet, muste karon, ak iwe itonone taitab Parao, ak ilenji, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, inendet Kamuktaindet ne bo Hebranik kole, Unde bikyuk koba, koba koboisiewa." 
Exodus9:14 Amu ayokyini muguleldang’ung’ korotwekyuk tugul ak otwogiguk, ak biguk; si kobiit inai ile mami ne u ane eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Exodus9:15 Amu kata achuule eunnyu, abarin ak biguk eng’ koroito, ak kata kageisten ibet eng’ ng’ony:" 
Exodus9:16 ago iman kaachamun itebi, si kobiit aborun kimnatennyu, ak si kobiit kemwaita kainennyu eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Exodus9:17 Ak ta ilosuge eng’ bikyuk, ak maigochi koba?" 
Exodus9:18 Keero, agonu korobon mutai kote ni asis koikab ropta che eechen, che tomo kegeerei eng’ Misri koboch ole kigoi." 
Exodus9:19 Iyokte anyun, keget akwotisieguk kobwa, ak tugul che itinye che mitei akwot; amu chorjingei koikab ropta ak barei kobek chi age tugul ak tiony age tugul ne mi timin, ngot ko magiget anan kimut konyo ga." 
Exodus9:20 Inendet ne kiiywei ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ otwogikab Parao ko kiimweito otwogikyik ak akwotisiekyik koba gorik: 
Exodus9:21 ak inendet ne kima iit ng’olyotab Jehovah ko kibagakta otwogikyik ak akwotisiekyik eng’ timin. 
Exodus9:22 Kilenji Jehovah Musa anyun, Chuul eung’ung’ tokyi kipsengwet, si kobiit koikab ropta eng’ emetab Misri komugul, kobir bik, ak tiong’ik, ak ngwot age tugul ne mi emet, eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri." 
Exodus9:23 Ak kichuul Musa siarinnyi kotokyi kipsengwet: ak kiiyok Jehovah tulet ak koikab ropta ak kichorgei mat konyo kobun ng’ony: ak kiisurur Jehovah koikab ropta korong’ji emetab Misri. 
Exodus9:24 Kibiit anyun koikab ropta, ak mat ne burugotgei ak koikab ropta ne korom kot, ne kitomo kobiitu eng’ emetab Misri komugul koboch ngobiit koek boror." 
Exodus9:25 Ak kibir koikab ropta tugul che kimi timin eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri, chi ak tiony; ak kibir ngwot age tugul ne mi emet, ak kiiri ket age tugul ne bo timin." 
Exodus9:26 Emetab Gosen inegei, ole kimi lagokab Israel, ne ma it koikab ropta." 
Exodus9:27 Ak kiiyokto Parao keguur Musa ak Aron, kolenji, Kaayai tengekto eng’ nito: bo imanda Jehovah, ago a kiptengekyo koboto bikyuk." 
Exodus9:28 Osa Jehovah; amu kagoyam tulosiechu kimen ak koik; si agonok obe, amata ogage." 
Exodus9:29 Ak kilenji Musa inendet, Ye kaamande eng’ nganaset, eng’ yoto anyun aiitochi eunekyuk Jehovah; si kosis tulet, ak komung’do koiyat; si kobiit inai ile bo Jehovah ng’ony." 
Exodus9:30 Ago angen ale, ne u inye ak otwogiguk, kotom oiywei Jehovah Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus9:31 Ak kigibir mabutek ak sairik: amu kigaba met sairik ak kiga iyesio taptok. 
Exodus9:32 Ago kima kibir nganok ak bek alak che kiguure kusemet: amu kitomo koeegitu. 
Exodus9:33 Ak kimanda Musa eng’ nganaset kwo eng’ ole mi Parao, ak kiitochi eunekyik Jehovah: ak kisisio tulosiek ak koikab ropta, ak mata korobonji ng’ony." 
Exodus9:34 Ak ye kingogeer Parao kole ma komi ropta ak koikab ropta ak tulosiek, kogetyigei koyai tengekto, ak kouuiit muguleldanyi, inendet ak otwogikyik." 
Exodus9:35 Ak kiuuiit muguleldab Parao, ak kima igochi lagokab Israel koba; ko u ye kiga komwa Jehovah eng’ Musa." 
Exodus10:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ui gab Parao: amu kaauuiit muguleldanyi, ak mugulelwekab otwogikyik, si kobiit abarta kaborunoichu eng’ kwenunywa:" 
Exodus10:2 ak si kobiit imwa kogas wering’ung’, ak mochogoreng’ung’, tuguk che kiayai eng’ Misri, ak kaborunoikyuk che kiayai eng’ kwenunywa; si kobiit onai ole a Jehovah." 
Exodus10:3 Kiba anyun Musa ak Aron gab Parao, ak kolenji, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo Hebranik, Iesioi kot kotianit si iming’inige eng’ tainnyu? Unde bikyuk koba, koba koboisiewa." 
Exodus10:4 Amu ngiesie iunde bikyuk koba, keero, ayokyini chereng’endet mutai emeng’ung’:" 
Exodus10:5 ak tuchei emet, kot ko maimuchi chi kogeer emet: ak koam tuguk tugul che ng’etu, che kong’etwok eng’ koikab ropta, ak koam ketit age tugul, ketikwok che bitos eng’ emet:" 
Exodus10:6 ak nyiiei goriguk ak gorikab otwogiguk, ak gorikab Misrik tugul, che kitomo kogeerei kwanisieguk anan aguiywogiguk, koboch betut ye kingobiit agoi kora. Ak kiwelelgei kwo eng’ ole mi Parao." 
Exodus10:7 Ak king’alal otwogikab Parao, kolenji inendet, Egu mestet chichi eng’ achek kot kotianit? Igochi bik koba, koba koboisiechi Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa: tos tom inai ile kogome Misri?" 
Exodus10:8 Ak kigimutyi Musa ak Aron Parao kogeny: ak kilenji inendet ichek, Oba, oboisiechi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’: ago ngorjo che bendi?" 
Exodus10:9 Ak kile Musa, Kibendi koboto neranikyok, ak boisiekyok, ak werikyok, ak tibikyok, kikwerie nekyok ak tukyok; amu kanyol keyachi Jehovah igorta." 
Exodus10:10 Ak kilenji inendet ichek, Ingoteb Jehovah kobotok ko u ye achamwok obe koboto lagokwok; ogeero, mi kiy ne ya taing’wong’." 
Exodus10:11 Ma u noto: oba okweget murenik, oba oboisiechi Jehovah; amu noto ne omache. Ak kigion ichek koba eng’ ole mi Parao." 
Exodus10:12 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Tokyi eung’ung’ emetab Misri si kobwa chereng’enyinik kotogos emetab Misri, si koam ket age tugul ne tuon ne bo emet, agot tugul che kong’etune koikab ropta." 
Exodus10:13 Ak kitokyi Musa siarinnyi emetab Misri, ak kigon Jehovah usonet ne bunu kong’asis kousyi emet betunoto komugul, ak kemout komugul; ak kingoeech, koib usonetab kong’asis chereng’endet." 
Exodus10:14 Ak kitogos chereng’endet koyom emet komugul ne bo Misri, ak kiru kobochit emet tugul ne bo Misri; ki koromen kot; kitom kobiitu chereng’endet ne u noto, ama kobiitu kogeny ne u noto." 
Exodus10:15 Amu kituch emet komugul, kot koimenit emet; ak kiam ket age tugul ne tuon ne mi emet, ak logoek tugul che bo ketik che king’etune koikab ropta: ak kima ng’et ket age tugul ne nyalil, anan ket age tugul ne tuon ne mi timin, eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri." 
Exodus10:16 Kiiyokto anyun Parao keguur Musa ak Aron kochok; ak kolenji, Kaayachi tengekto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak kaayaiywok okwek." 
Exodus10:17 Noton anyun, asain ale nyoiywa kaat amu tengektanyu nito inegei, ak osa Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, koistoena meoni kityo." 
Exodus10:18 Ak kiwa eng’ ole mi Parao, kwo kosa Jehovah." 
Exodus10:19 Ak kiwal Jehovah usonet ne kim mising’ kousune cherongo, ne kiib chereng’endet, ak koon kwo Nyanjet ne Birir; ma ng’et chereng’endet agot agenge eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri." 
Exodus10:20 Ago kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldo ne bo Parao, ak ma unda lagokab Israel koba." 
Exodus10:21 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Chuul eung’ung’ tokyi kipsengwet, si kobiit mesundeito eng’ emetab Misri, mesundeito ne kitung’dung’ioti." 
Exodus10:22 Ak kichuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi kipsengwet; ak kibiit mesundeito ne o mising’ eng’ emet komugul ne bo Misri eng’ betusiek somok; 
Exodus10:23 kima imuchi chi kogeer chi, ak kima ng’et chi eng’ ye tebe eng’ betusiechoto somok: ago kilapkeen meng’otosiek tugul che bo lagokab Israel." 
Exodus10:24 Ak kiguur Parao Musa, kolenji, Oba, oboisiechi Jehovah; ago obagakte nekwok ak tukwok kotebi: ak omut lagokwok agichek." 
Exodus10:25 Ak kile Musa, Kanyol igonech che kienyei ak kagochinoik che kibeelei, si kobiit keeng’ji tiseiywek Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Exodus10:26 Kikwerie akwotisiekyok agichek; mang’etu agot agenge; amu choto che kekwerie si keboisiechine Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo; ak magingen kit ne kanyol keboisiechine Jehovah, agoi tun keit oloto." 
Exodus10:27 Ago kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldab Parao, ak kima chamji ichek koba." 
Exodus10:28 Ak kilenji Parao Musa, Ui eng’ ole ami, iripge, amata igeera togoch kogeny; amu imee eng’ betut ne igeere togennyu." 
Exodus10:29 Ak kile Musa, Kemwa komie; ma ageerin togoch kogeny." 
Exodus11:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Kang’et koroito agenge ne ta aipchini Parao, ak Misrik; ak ye ibata kochamwok obe eng’ olito: ak ye kagochamwok obe, koonok okwek obe agoi." 
Exodus11:2 Mwachi anyun bik kogas eng’ itikwak, ingosom chi age tugul chitab kokwennyi, ak ingosom kobogoriot age tugul ne bo kokwennyi, tuguk che bo feda, ak tuguk che bo tahabu." 
Exodus11:3 Ak kiigochi Jehovah bik chamet eng’ taitab Misrik. Kogeny ko ki toogunot mising’ Musa eng’ emetab Misri, eng’ taitab otwogikab Parao, ak eng’ taitab bik." 
Exodus11:4 Ak kile Musa, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Alabuli Misri ko negit kemoi kwen:"
