Exodus11:5 ak kobek taiywek tugul eng’ emetab Misri, koboch taita ne bo Parao ne tebe ng’echerennyi ne bo bounatet, agoi taita ne bo kwondo ne otwogindet ne ng’aisei; ak kirgit age tugul ne twatei tiony age tugul." 
Exodus11:6 Ak kobiit kateiyet ne o eng’ emetab Misri komugul, ne kitom kobiitu ne u noto, ak ma kobiitu ne u noto kogeny." 
Exodus11:7 Ago eng’ lagokab Israel ko mami agot seset ne imuchi koseng’eng’ji chi anan tiony: si kobiit onai ole ibestos Jehovah Misrik ak Israel. 
Exodus11:8 Ak kochorgei otwogichuguk kobwa ole ami, kong’urukso eng’ ole ami, kolen, Mande, ak bik tugul che isubin: ak ye ibata noto amande anyun. Ak kiwa Musa eng’ ole mi Parao eng’ neregek che laldos." 
Exodus11:9 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Machamei Parao kogasak; si kobiit kotesogis kochang’a kwong’utikyuk eng’ emetab Misri." 
Exodus11:10 Ak kiyai Musa ak Aron kwong’utichuto tugul eng’ taitab Parao: ak kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldab Parao, ak kima chamji lagokab Israel koba eng’ emennyi." 
Exodus12:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron eng’ emetab Misri, kolenji," 
Exodus12:2 Egu arawani taunetab arawek eng’ okwek: egu arawet ne bo tai ne bo kenyit eng’ okwek. 
Exodus12:3 Omwachi tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel olenji, Ingonam chi age tugul aruet eng’ betutab taman ne bo arawani, ko u ole te gorikab kwanisiekwak, aruet eng’ got age tugul:" 
Exodus12:4 ak ngo ng’ering’ bik eng’ gab chi eng’ aruanato, ko kanyol anyun koyomogei chitab goyoto ak chito ne rubegei gonnyi ak nenyinet, ko u koitetab bik; oiityi got age tugul che te che imuchi koam chi." 
Exodus12:5 Egu arueng’wong’ ne libwob, mengit ne masiirei kenyit agenge: oleweni eng’ kechirek, anan ko eng’ ng’ororek:" 
Exodus12:6 ak otaban agoi koit betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawanito: si koeny tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel aruanato koskoleny. 
Exodus12:7 Ak konam ichek korotik, koiile tugatugik tuwai ak rateiywotab tugatuk, eng’ gorik ole kiame aruanato." 
Exodus12:8 Ak koam banyechato kemounoto, che kagiwatan eng’ ma, koamda makatinik che ma kinde mermerek; koboto ngwek che ng’wonen." 
Exodus12:9 Amoam ko tuonen, amat koyo agot kitigin eng’ beek, ago kiwatani; metit ak kelyek ak tugukab ke." 
Exodus12:10 Amat kong’et agot kitigin kot koeekyi; ago ne kang’et agoi koeech obeel eng’ ma. 
Exodus12:11 Oam anyun ko u ni; ko kaoratge, ko kaolaach kweonikwok, oting’e eunekwok kirokwek: ak oam ochokyini: nito ko paska ne bo Jehovah." 
Exodus12:12 Amu abunoti kwenutab emetab Misri eng’ kemounoto, ak abar taiywek tugul eng’ emetab Misri, che bo bik ak che twatei tiong’ik; ak aruokyi cheptalelisiek tugul che bo Misri: a Jehovah." 
Exodus12:13 Ak koek korotichoto kaborunet eng’ okwek eng’ gorikwok eng’ ole omi; ak ye ageer korotik, asiirtoenok, ak maityinok koroato konyo kong’emak, ye abare emetab Misri." 
Exodus12:14 Ak egu betunito kabwatet eng’ okwek, ak orib kobunji igorta ne bo Jehovah; oyai igorito koek ng’atutiet eng’ ibinwekwok tugul agoi koigeny." 
Exodus12:15 Oam makatinik che ma kinde mermerek betusiek tisab; oistoi eng’ gorikwok mermerek agot eng’ betut ne bo tai: amu king’etoi age tugul eng’ Israel ne kaam makatinik che mi mermerek eng’ betut ne bo tai agoi betut ne bo tisab. 
Exodus12:16 Ak koek eng’ okwek betut ne bo tai kayumetab ge ne itabanat, ak koek eng’ betut ne bo tisab kayumetab ge ne itabanat; magiyaei boisio age tugul eng’ betusiechoto, kobate kochob chi age tugul amitwogik che amei, oyae choto kityo." 
Exodus12:17 Ak orib igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek; amu kaamoong’u eng’ betunito lugosiekwok komong’une emetab Misri: amu noto anyun orib betunito eng’ ibinwekwok tugul koek ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny. 
Exodus12:18 Oame anyun makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, eng’ arawet ne bo tai, eng’ koskoleng’utab betutab taman ak ang’wan, agoi koskoleng’utab betutab tiptem ak agenge." 
Exodus12:19 Maginyorjin gorikwok mermerek eng’ betusiechoto tisab: amu king’etoi eng’ tuiyetab Israel, age tugul ne amei ne kaginde mermerek, ngo ne kiprutoiyo, anan ne kigisikyin emonito." 
Exodus12:20 Moame kiy age tugul ne kaginde mermerek; oame makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul. 
Exodus12:21 Kiguur anyun Musa boisiek tugul che bo Israel, kolenji, Oba olewenote eng’ akwetab kechirek kobeeate gab chi, ak oeny koek tiseiywotab paska." 
Exodus12:22 Ak onam ratutietab ketik che kiguure husop, ak orooch korotik che mi tabet, ak oise rateiywotab tugatuk ak tugatugik tuwai eng’ korotik che mi tabet; amat komanda chi sang’ agoi koeech." 
Exodus12:23 Amu nyo kosiirtoi Jehovah kowendi kobarei Misrik; ak ye keer korotik eng’ rateiywotab tugatuk ak eng’ tugatugik tuwai, kosiirto Jehovah eng’ kurganato, ak ma chamjin ng’emindet komong’ gorikwok nyo kobarak." 
Exodus12:24 Oribe anyun ng’olyondoni koek ng’atutiet eng’ inye ak weriguk koigeny. 
Exodus12:25 Ak ye tun oit emet ne konok Jehovah, ko u ye kigoaror, orib anyun boisionito." 
Exodus12:26 Ak ye tun teebenak lagokwok, kole, Bo nee boisionito?" 
Exodus12:27 Olenji anyun, Tiseiywot ne bo paska ne bo Jehovah, ne kisiirtoe gorikab lagokab Israel eng’ Misri, ye kibarei Misrik, ak kisor gorikyok. Ak kiing’urukso bik kolos Jehovah." 
Exodus12:28 Kiba anyun lagokab Israel koyai ko u noto; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa ak Aron, kiyai anyun ko u noto." 
Exodus12:29 Ak kingoit kemoi kwen, kobar Jehovah taiywek tugul eng’ emetab Misri, koboch taita ne bo Parao ne kitebe ng’echerennyi ne bo bounatet, agoi taita ne bo luulenet ne ki ratat eng’ keringet; ak tugul che kitwatei tiong’ik." 
Exodus12:30 Ak king’eet Parao kemoi, koboto otwogikyik tugul, ak Misrik tugul; ak kibiit kateiyet ne o eng’ Misri; amu kima ng’et got agot agenge ne kima me chi." 
Exodus12:31 Ak kiiyokto keguur Musa ak Aron kemoi, kolenji, Ong’eetye, oba eng’ oldab bikyuk, okwek koboto lagokab Israel; oba, oboisiechi Jehovah, ko u ye kiomwa." 
Exodus12:32 Okweri kechirekwok ak tukwok, ko u ye kiomwa, oba; ak oberura agane." 
Exodus12:33 Ak kiichirjir Misrik bik kochakta komanda eng’ emet; amu kile, Kagibegu tugul." 
Exodus12:34 Kinam anyun bik makatinik che tuonen che tomo kinde mermerek, ak terenikwak che kikwang’e makatinik, ak koratita ngoroikwak, yeityo konde tigigoikwak." 
Exodus12:35 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel ko u ng’olyotab Musa; ak kisom Misrik tugukab feda, ak tugukab tahabu, ak ngoroik:" 
Exodus12:36 ak kiigochi Jehovah Misrik kocham Israelik, ak kiigochi kiy age tugul ne kisom. Ak kinyaban anyun tugukab Misrik." 
Exodus12:37 Kiba anyun lagokab Israel kong’eetye Rameses agoi koit Sukot, ki negit murenik elfusiek bogol lo, che kibendi eng’ kelyek, ko ma kiitito lagok." 
Exodus12:38 Kiba koboto icheget tuiyet ne o ne bo bik alak tugul che terotin; koboto kechirek, ak tuga che chang’." 
Exodus12:39 Ak kibeel makatinik che mengechen che kima kinde mermerek eng’ makatinichoto tuonen che kiibune Misri, amu kima kinde mermerek; amu kigion eng’ Misri, ak kimata komuch kogagei, ak kitom kochopchigei amitwogik alak tugul." 
Exodus12:40 Kiga kotebe anyun lagokab Israel Misri kenyisiek bogol ang’wan ak sosom. 
Exodus12:41 Ak kingobata kenyisiechoto bogol ang’wan ak sosom, komanda eng’ betunoto lugosiek tugul che bo Jehovah eng’ emetab Misri." 
Exodus12:42 Egu kemout ne kanyol kibwate Jehovah amu kiimut ichek komandae emetab Misri: nito ko kemoutab Jehovah, ne ibwati mising’ lagokab Israel tugul eng’ ibinwekwak tugul." 
Exodus12:43 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa ak Aron, Ni ko ng’atutiet ne bo paska; maamei kipsagarin:" 
Exodus12:44 ago amei otwogindet ne kigiale siling’isiek, ne kigiyatita, ne bo chi age tugul." 
Exodus12:45 Maamei bunotyot anan otwogindet ne nyoru melekto. 
Exodus12:46 Kiame got agenge; amat oib beny komanda sang’ agot kitigin; amat oiri kowet age tugul. 
Exodus12:47 Ingoyai ko u noto tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel. 
Exodus12:48 Ak ngo rutochin kiprutoiyot, ne machei koripchi Jehovah paska, ko kanyol kimuratan werikyik tugul, ak korikyi anyun eng’ yoto ak korib; ak kogergeit ak ne kigisikyi emeng’wong’; ago amongoam chi age tugul ne makiyatita." 
Exodus12:49 Mi ng’atutiet agenge eng’ ne kigisikyin emeng’wong’, ak toondet ne rutochinok." 
Exodus12:50 Kiyai ko u noto lagokab Israel tugul; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa ak Aron, kiyai ko u noto anyun." 
Exodus12:51 Ak kiimaanda Jehovah betunoto lagokab Israel eng’ emetab Misri eng’ lugosiekwak. 
Exodus13:1 Ak king’alalji Jehova Musa, kolenji," 
Exodus13:2 Itabanwa taiywek tugul, age tugul ne yatei iyotet eng’ lagokab Israel, eng’ bik ak eng’ che twatei tiong’ik; bunjina choto." 
Exodus13:3 Ak kilenji Musa bik, Obwat betuni, ne kiomong’une Misri, eng’ gotab otwoknatet; amu kiimoong’wok Jehovah eng’ kimnatetab eunnyi, omong’une olito; magiamei makatinik che kaginde mermerek." 
Exodus13:4 Omandoi rani eng’ arawetab Abib. 
Exodus13:5 Ak ye kagomutak Jehovah oit emetab Kananik, ak ne bo Hitik, ak ne bo Amorik, ak ne bo Hibik, ak ne bo Jebusik, emet ne kiiyosiechi inendet kwanisieguk kole tun konok, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik, eng’ yoto anyun orib boisioni oyai kotugul eng’ arawanito." 
Exodus13:6 Oam makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ betusiek tisab, ak koek igortab Jehovah eng’ betutab tisab." 
Exodus13:7 Kiamei eng’ betusiechoto tugul tisab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek; amat kenyorji chi makatinik che kiginde mermerek, ak amat kobiitune emeng’ung’ komugul mermerek." 
Exodus13:8 Ak tun imwachini wering’ung’ eng’ betunoto, ilenjini, Amu nito ne kiyaiywa Jehovah ye kiamong’u eng’ Misri." 
Exodus13:9 Ak tun egu noto kaborunet eng’ eung’ung’, ak koek kabwatet ne mi kwenutab konyeguk, si kobiit kotebe ng’atutikab Jehovah kuting’ung’; amu kiimoong’wok Jehovah omong’une Misri eng’ eut ne kim." 
Exodus13:10 Orib anyun ng’atutioni eng’ betunnyi ne kiging’atyi eng’ kenyit age tugul. 
Exodus13:11 Ak ye tun iitak Jehovah emetab Kananik, ko u ye kiiyosieun ak kwanisieguk, kole konok," 
Exodus13:12 itabani anyun kobunji Jehovah tugul che yatei iyotet ak che twatei tiong’ik; ak bunjin Jehovah ng’etik ak che kirugik. 
Exodus13:13 Ak itiachi ne twatei sigiriet, itiage aruet; ak ngo metiach iiri kaatit: ak itiachi taita age tugul eng’ weriguk." 
Exodus13:14 Ak ye tun teebenen wering’ung’ eng’ betusiek che bwanei, kole, Nee ni? Ilenji anyun, Kiimoong’wech Jehovah eng’ Misri, eng’ gotab otwognatet, eng’ eut ne kim:" 
Exodus13:15 ak ye kingoetenech Parao kebe, kobar anyun Jehovah taita age tugul eng’ emetab Misri, che bo bik, ak che kitwatei tiong’ik; aeng’jini anyun Jehovah tugul che yatei iyotet, che kirugik; ago atiachi werikyuk tugul che yatei iyotet." 
Exodus13:16 Ak egu noto kaborunet eng’ eung’ung’, ak koek ratutik che kirate anok eng’ turietab togeng’ung’: amu kiimutwech Jehovah eng’ eut ne kim kemong’une Misri." 
Exodus13:17 Ak kingo kagounda Parao bik koba, koma indochi Kamuktaindet kobun oret ne bunei emetab Pilistik, agot nganda ki negit; amu kile Kamuktaindet, Si maiyweis bik ye keer luget, ak komach koweekyigei Misri:" 
Exodus13:18 ago kiindochinot Kamuktaindet bik kobun ong’atet ne tokyingei Nyanjet ne Birir: ak kitogosta lagokab Israel komanda eng’ emetab Misri ko kagolaach karik. 
Exodus13:19 Ak kiib Musa kowekab Josep: amu kiga kogimgim inendet lagokab Israel koyosio, kolenji, Tun nyonjinok Jehovah iman; ak tun oib kowekyuk obendi otogostoi eng’ oli." 
Exodus13:20 Kinam anyun bandanywa kong’eetye Sukot, ak kiba komuung’e Etam, ole bochin ong’atet." 
Exodus13:21 Ak kiindoe Jehovah ichek eng’ toloitab boldet bet, kondochi ichek eng’ oret: ak kemoi eng’ toloitab mat, kokweng’ji; si kobiit komuch koba bet ak kemoi:" 
Exodus13:22 Kima isto inendet eng’ taitab bik toloitab boldet bet, ama isto toloata bo mat kemoi." 
Exodus14:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa, kolenji," 
Exodus14:2 Mwachi lagokab Isreal koweek komuung’e taitab Pi-hairot, kwenutab Migdol ak nyanjet, ole itoorjingei Baal-sepon: omuung’e yoto negit nyanjet." 
Exodus14:3 Ak tun mwaei Parao agobo lagokab Israel, kole, Kigobetyo eng’ emet, kigoger ong’atet ichek." 
Exodus14:4 Ak auuiiti muguleldab Parao, si kosub ichek; ak anyorune teegisto Parao, ak lugennyi tugul, ak konai Misrik kole a Jehovah. Ak kiyai ko u noto." 
Exodus14:5 Ak kigimwachi laitoriatab Misri, kelenji, Kogomwei bik: ak kiwalak muguleldab Parao koboto che bo otwogikyik, agobo bikab Israel, ak kile, Nee ni kogiyai, kot kechamji Israelik koba, kometo otwognatet ne kootech?" 
Exodus14:6 Kichob anyun karinnyi, ak komut bikyik:" 
Exodus14:7 ak kiib karisiek bogol lo che kigilewen, ak karisiek tugul che bo Misri, kotinyei kiptainikwak che kibou choto tugul." 
Exodus14:8 Ak kiiuuiit Jehovah muguleldab Parao laitoriatab Misri, ak kiisub lagokab Israel: amu kimanda lagokab Israel eng’ eut ne kim." 
Exodus14:9 Ak kiisub Misrik ichek, ak mbartanyisiek tugul, ak karisiek che bo Parao, ak bikyik che kilanyei mbartanyisiek, ak lugennyi, ak kiba konamji ole kiimuung’e eng’ ye negit nyanjet, korikyin Pi-hairot, ye tokyingei Baal-sepon." 
Exodus14:10 Ak ye kingorikta Parao, kotobendo lagokab Israel, ak kogeer kobwanei Misrik kosubu ichek; kiiyweis mising’: ak kirirji lagokab Israel Jehovah." 
Exodus14:11 Ak kilenji ichek Musa, Kemutwech kebekyi ong’atani, amu kima komi kererisiek Misri? Amu nee si iyaiywech ko u ni, imoong’wech eng’ Misri?" 
Exodus14:12 Tos ma nito ng’olyot ne kigimwaun eng’ Misri, kelenjin, Bagaktech keot Misrik? Amu kita kaigai keot Misrik, kosiir kebekyi ong’atet." 
Exodus14:13 Ak kilenji Musa bik, Amoiywei, otononse kityo, si ogeer yetunetab Jehovah ne yaiywok rani: amu ma ogeere kogeny Misrichu koigeny, chu ogeere rani." 
Exodus14:14 Yaei Jehovah inendet luget agobo okwek; osisie okwek. 
Exodus14:15 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Amu nee si irirja? Ilenji lagokab Israel koba tai." 
Exodus14:16 Ak inamji barak siaring’ung’, ak ichuul eung’ung’ itokyi nyanjet, ak ipcheune aeng’: ak kobun lagokab Israel kwenutab nyanjet, kobun emet ole yaamat." 
Exodus14:17 Keero, auuiiti anendet mugulelwekab Misrik, ak kosub ichek: ak anyorune teegisto Parao, ak lugennyi tugul, ak karisiekyik, ak bikyik che lanyei mbartanyisiek." 
Exodus14:18 Ak konai Misrik kole a Jehovah, ye kaanyorune teegisto Parao, ak karisiekyik, ak bikyik che lanyei mbartanyisiek." 
Exodus14:19 Ak kiwa let malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet ne kiindoe tuiyetab Israel, ak kiwa toloitab boldet ne kimi tainywa, kotonone let:" 
Exodus14:20 ak kitonone kwenutab tuiyetab Misrik ak tuiyetab Israel; ak kimi boldet ak mesundeito, ago kiiluu boldanato kemoi: ak kima rikyin tuiyosiechoto kemout komugul." 
Exodus14:21 Ak kichuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi nyanjet; ak kiiyok Jehovah usonet ne bunu kong’asis kous kemout komugul, koweekta nyanjet kwo let, ak kipcheigei beek." 
Exodus14:22 Ak kiba lagokab Israel kobun emet ne yaamat eng’ kwenutab nyanjet: ak kitoten beek eng’ komostab tai ak eng’ komostab katam. 
Exodus14:23 Ak kiisub Misrik ichek, kochorjigei kwenutab nyanjet, mbartanyisiek tugul che bo Parao, ak karisiekyik, ak bikyik che lanyei mbartanyisiek." 
Exodus14:24 Ak eng’ ripset ne bo karon, kogeerot Jehovah lugetab Misri, kogeerune toloitab mat ak ne bo boldet, ak kiinyalil lugetab Misrik." 
Exodus14:25 Ak kiichun kelyekab karisiekwak, kong’onng’onio, kot ko ye kikwerie, ko uuen: kot kole anyun Misrik, Ongemwee Israelik; amu yaei Jehovah luget agobo ichek, konyo kobarech achek Misrik." 
Exodus14:26 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Chuul eung’ung’ tokyi nyanjet, si kobiit koweeigei beek kotuch Misrik, koboto karisiekwak, ak bikwak che lanyei mbatanyisiek." 
Exodus14:27 Ak kichuul Musa eunnyi kotokyi nyanjet ak kiweeigei beek kotuiyo ko u yegonye ko kaeech; ak kimwei Misrik ye kingogeer beek kotokyingei icheget; ak kitoorji Jehovah Misrik kwenutab nyanjet. 
Exodus14:28 Ak kiweeigei beek, komaluuch karisiek, ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek, agot luget tugul ne bo Parao ne kiisubi ichek kobendi nyanjet; kima ng’et agot agenge eng’ ichek." 
Exodus14:29 Ago kibun lagokab Israel emet ko kagoyaam eng’ kwenutab nyanjet; ak kitoten beek eng’ komosi ak komosi. 
Exodus14:30 Kisor Jehovah anyun Israel ko u noto eng’ betunoto eng’ eunekab Misrik; ak kigeer Israel Misrik ko kagobek komi ngegutab nyanjet. 
Exodus14:31 Ak kigeer Israel boisiet ne kim ne kiyachi Jehovah eng’ Misrik, ak kiiywei bik Jehovah: ak kiiyan Jehovah, ak Musa otwogindennyi." 
Exodus15:1 Kitienji Musa koboto lagokab Israel Jehovah tieni, komwa kole, Atienjini Jehovah, amu kiibelis eng’ kabelisiet ne toror mising’: Kiwirji nyanjet mbartanyit koboto ne kilanyei." 
Exodus15:2 Jehovah kimnatennyu ak tiendanyu, Ak kaek yetunennyu: Nito ko Kamuktaindennyu, ak alosu inendet; Inendet ko Kamuktaindet ne bo baba, atorori inendet." 
Exodus15:3 Jehovah inendet ko ne bo luget: Kainennyi ko Jehovah. 
Exodus15:4 Kiwirji nyanjet karisiekab Parao koboto lugennyi: Ak kiimaluuch Nyanjet ne Birir kiptainikyik che kilewen. 
Exodus15:5 Kituch ichek rirosiek: Kirorokta koba rirosiek ko u koita. 
Exodus15:6 Ee Jehovah, konyitot eung’ung’ ne bo tai eng’ kimnatet, Ee Jehovah, nyinyiri eung’ung’ ne bo tai bunik kotonogis." 
Exodus15:7 Iluuli ichek che ng’eetyinin eng’ oindab telunateng’ung’: Iyoktoi neregeguk, che beelei ichek kowong’gei ko u mobek." 
Exodus15:8 Ak kiiyumgei beek amu kimnatetab kabuset ne bo seruneguk, Kitononso beek kototen; Kinamgei beek kouuegitu eng’ nyanjet kwen." 
Exodus15:9 Kile bunyondet, Asubi, aname, ak apchei che kagiluul: Ak kobiyong’e magennyu ichek; Ang’usu rotwennyu bo chok, ak kobar eunnyu ichek." 
Exodus15:10 Kiiusyi eng’ usoneng’ung’, ak kituch nyanjet ichek: Kirorokyi beek che kimen orit, ko u ngosielait." 
Exodus15:11 Ee Jehovah, tos ngoro ne u inye eng’ cheptalelisiek? Tos ng’o ne u inye, ne konyitot eng’ tililindo, Ne kiywei eng’ kalosunet, ne yaei kwong’utik?" 
Exodus15:12 Kiite eung’ung’ ne bo tai, ak kilugui ng’ony." 
Exodus15:13 Kiindochi inye eng’ rireneng’ung’ bik che kiitiach, komanda: Kiindochi ichek eng’ kimnateng’ung’ koba oldang’ung’ ne tilil." 
Exodus15:14 Kigogas bororiosiek alage, ak kibotanso: Kinyor ng’wanindo che menyei Pilistia." 
Exodus15:15 Kitang’any anyun kiruogik che bo Edom; Botandos che kimen che bo Moabik: Kachootyo tugul che menyei Kanan. 
Exodus15:16 Kanam ichek kamuiset ak kaiyweisiet; Kasisyo ko u koita amu etunatetab eung’ung’; Ee Jehovah, agoi kolanda biguk, Agoi kolanda bik che kiial." 
Exodus15:17 Imutu ichek komong’, ak inde ichek kominogis eng’ tulwetab boroteng’ung’, Komosta ne kiichopchige si imeny, ee Jehovah, Ole tilil, ne kigogimit eung’ung’, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus15:18 Laitorani Jehovah koigeny ak koigeny. 
Exodus15:19 Amu kiba mbartanyisiek che bo Parao nyanjet koboto karisiekyik ak bikyik che lanyei mbartanyisiek, ak kiiweech Jehovah beekab nyanjet kogeny kotuch ichek; ago kibun lagokab Israel emet ne yaamat eng’ kwenutab nyanjet." 
Exodus15:20 Ak kinam Miriam ne kwondo ne maotio, ne chepkametab Aron, sugutit ne ming’in eng’ eunnyi; ak kiisub inendet kobogorisiek tugul che kiibei sugutisiek che mengechen kotienoti." 
Exodus15:21 Ak kiwolji Miriam kolenji, Otienji Jehovah, amu kiibelis eng’ kabelisiet ne toror mising’; Kigiwirji nyanjet mbartanyit koboto ne kilanyei." 
Exodus15:22 Ak kiindochi Musa Israelik koba eng’ Nyanjet ne Birir, ak kiit ong’atetab Sur; ak kiba bandab betusiek somok eng’ ong’atet, ak kimanyor beek." 
Exodus15:23 Ak kingoit Mara, koma komuch koee beekab Mara, amu ki ng’wonen: kigiguure anyun kainennyi Mara amu noto." 
Exodus15:24 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji bik Musa, kolenji, Kiee nee?" 
Exodus15:25 Ak kirirji Jehovah; ak kiiborji Jehovah inendet ketit, ak kiwirji ketoto beek, ak kianyinyitu beek. Ak kichopchi eng’ oloto ng’atutiet ak kiruoget, kotiem ichek eng’ yoto:" 
Exodus15:26 ak kile, Ngot igas iman kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak iyai ne bo iman eng’ tainnyi, ak iepchji it ng’atutikyik, ak isub kotigonutikyik tugul, ko magonin mian age tugul, ne kiagochi Misrik: amu ane ko a Jehovah ne asoobin." 
Exodus15:27 Ak kiit ichek ole kiguure Elim, oloto ole kimi kong’ikab beek tamanu ak aeng’, ak tironik tamanwogik tisab: ak kiimuung’e yoto ole negite beechoto." 
Exodus16:1 Kinam anyun bandanywa kong’eetye Elim, ak kiit tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel ong’atetab Sin, ne mi kwenutab Elim ak Sinai, kiit eng’ betutab taman ak mut ne bo arawetab aeng’ koboch ye kingomong’ eng’ emetab Misri." 
Exodus16:2 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel Musa ak Aron eng’ ong’atet: 
Exodus16:3 ak kilenji lagokab Israel ichek, Kita kaigai kebegu eng’ eutab Jehovah eng’ emetab Misri, ye kigitebe ole negite terenikab banyek, ye kigiamisiei kot kebiyong’se; amu kiomoong’wech kebwa ong’atani, si obare rubet tuiyoni komugul." 
Exodus16:4 Kilenji Jehovah Musa anyun, Keero, arong’wok amitwogik che bunu kipsengwet; ak koba bik betut age tugul koyum che yamei betut, si kobiit atiem ichek, anai ngomuchi kobendate ng’atutiennyu, anan acha." 
Exodus16:5 Ak tebyei ko u ni eng’ betut ne bo lo, chobei ichek choto che kaib kobwa go, tenitu choto ko bo kotugul konyil aeng’." 
Exodus16:6 Ak kilenji Musa ak Aron lagokab Israel tugul, Onae koskoleny ole kiimutwak Jehovah omong’une emetab Misri:" 
Exodus16:7 ak ogeer karon telunatetab Jehovah; amu kasei inendet kang’unyng’unyeng’wong’ ne ong’unyng’ung’jini Jehovah: achek anyun ko ki ng’o si ong’unyng’ung’jech? 
Exodus16:8 Ak kile Musa, Egu ko u ni, konok Jehovah banyek oam koskoleny, ak konok karon amitwogik oam obiye; amu kasei Jehovah kang’unyng’unyeng’wong’ ne ong’unyng’ung’jini inendet: achek ko ki ng’o? Ma achek che ong’unyng’ung’jini, ago ong’unyng’ung’jini Jehovah." 
Exodus16:9 Ak kilenji Musa Aron, Ilenji tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, Obwa orikyi Jehovah: amu kogogas kang’unyng’unyeng’wong’." 
Exodus16:10 Ak ye kita kong’alaljin Aron tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, kotobendo kotokyigei ong’atet, ogeero, kitook lilindab Jehovah eng’ boldet." 
Exodus16:11 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Exodus16:12 Kaagas kang’unyng’unyetab lagokab Israel: mwachi ilenji, Oame banyek koskoleny, ak obiye kimnyet karon; si onai ole a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Exodus16:13 Ak kibwa taok koskoleny, konyi nganaset: ak kiibut rewot karon koyiem nganaset." 
Exodus16:14 Ak ye kingotogosta rewot ne kogaibut, ogeero, kotook eng’ ong’atet tuguk che mengechen, che terteren komi ng’ony, che u chepkoset." 
Exodus16:15 Ak ye kingogeer lagokab Israel tukchoto, koteebegei ichegei, kole, Nee tuguchuto? Amu kima nai tukchoto. Ak kilenji Musa, Amitwogik chuto che kagonok Jehovah oam." 
Exodus16:16 Nito kit ne kong’at Jehovah, Ingoyum chi tugul che yamei koam; yamei chi tugul che bo kerebet ne kiguure omer, che yamei koitetab bikwok, ingoipchi chi age tugul bikyik che mi gonnyi." 
Exodus16:17 Ak kiyai ko u noto lagokab Israel, ak kiiyum alak che chang’, koyum alage che ng’ering’." 
Exodus16:18 Ak ye kingoger eng’ kerebet, ko ma kosiirto che bo inendet ne kagaiyum che chang’, ak kima ng’ering’itu che bo inendet ne kagaiyum che ng’ering’; kiiyum chi tugul che yamei koam." 
Exodus16:19 Ak kilenji Musa ichek, Amat kotuuch chi agoi koeech." 
Exodus16:20 Ago kima kas it kit ne kimwachin Musa; ago kiituuch alage koteb kot koeech, ak kiam kutik, ak kibulyo: ak kinerekyi Musa bichoto." 
Exodus16:21 Ak kiiyumi karonet age tugul, che yamei koam chi tugul: ak kingong’wanit asis, kochootyo." 
Exodus16:22 Ak kiiyum eng’ betut ne bo lo che te che cham koyumi konyil aeng’, kerebonik aeng’ chi tugul: ak kiba bounik tugul che bo tuiyet komwachi Musa." 
Exodus16:23 Ak kilenji Musa ichek, Noto ko kit ne kimwa Jehovah, Mutai ko kamuung’et, sabato ne itabanat eng’ Jehovah: obeel che omache obeel, ak oyoi che omache oyoi; ak ogonorjige che kang’et kobunji mutai." 
Exodus16:24 Ak kigonor kobunji karon, ko u ye kimwachi Musa: ak kima bulyo, ama kinyorji kutik." 
Exodus16:25 Ak kile Musa, Oam choto rani; amu sabato ne bo Jehovah rani: monyorjini rani emet." 
Exodus16:26 Oyumi eng’ betusiek lo; ago betutab tisab ko sabato, mabiitu eng’ betunoto." 
Exodus16:27 Ago kiba alage eng’ betutab tisab, kolen koyumat, ago manyor." 
Exodus16:28 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Oesioi osub ng’atutikyuk ak kayomisutikyuk kot kotianit?" 
Exodus16:29 Ogeero, kagogonok Jehovah sabato, eng’ noto anyun konok amitwogik eng’ betutab lo che yamei betusiek aeng’; ingotebe chi tugul oldanyi, amat kwo chi ui eng’ oldanyin eng’ betutab tisab." 
Exodus16:30 Kiimuuny anyun bik eng’ betutab tisab. 
Exodus16:31 Ak kiguure gotab Israel amitwogichoto Mana: ki kergei tuguchoto ak bek che mubere che leelach; ak kichamu makatinik che mengechen che kigikwanda kumiat. 
Exodus16:32 Ak kile Musa, Nito kit ne kong’at Jehovah, kole, Kinyiit kerebet agenge tuguchoto kegonorji ibinwekwok che biitu let; si kobiit kogeer amitwogichoto che kiabaenak eng’ ong’atet, ye kiamoong’wok omong’une emetab Misri." 
Exodus16:33 Ak kilenji Musa Aron, Inemu teret ne ming’in ak inyiit mana che yamei kerebet agenge, ak igonore taitab Jehovah, kegonorji ibinwekwok che biitu let." 
Exodus16:34 Kigonor anyun Aron eng’ taitab Baornatet kole kerib, ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus16:35 Ak kiam lagokab Israel mana kenyisiek artam, agoi koit emet ne menyei bik; kiam mana agoi koit kiwotisiekab emetab Kanan." 
Exodus16:36 Kerebonoto kigere mana ne kiguure omer ko kebebertab taman ne bo epah. 
Exodus17:1 Kinam banda anyun tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel kong’eetye ong’atetab Sin, ko u banwekwak, ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah, kiba komuung’e Repidim: ak kima komi beek oloto che eei bik." 
Exodus17:2 Kibolji anyun bik Musa amu noto, kolen, Inagech beek kee. Ak kilenji Musa ichek, Amu nee si obolja? Otieme Jehovah amu nee?" 
Exodus17:3 Ak kiam bik melelda eng’ oloto; ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji bik Musa, ak kile, Kilya si imutwech kemong’une Misri, nyo ibarenech melelda achek ak lagokyok ak akwotisiekyok?" 
Exodus17:4 Ak kirirji Musa Jehovah kolenji, Aitoi nee bichu? Negit kolacha." 
Exodus17:5 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ui indoe bik, imut boisiekab Israel alak, ib siaring’ung’, ne kiikwere ainet, ak iwe." 
Exodus17:6 Keero, atonone ruandet eng’ Horeb eng’ taing’ung’; ak ikwer ruandanato, si komong’une beek, si koee bik. Ak kiyai Musa ko u noto eng’ taitab boisiekab Israel." 
Exodus17:7 Ak kiguure yoto Masa, ak Meriba, amu bolatetab lagokab Israel, amu kitiem Jehovah kolen, Tos mi Jehovah kobotech anan mami?" 
Exodus17:8 Kibwa anyun Amalek nyo kobaregei ak Israel eng’ Repidim. 
Exodus17:9 Ak kilenji Musa Josua, Lewenwech bik, ak obe, obarge ak Amalek: awendi atononi mutai eng’ tulwet barak, ating’e siaritab Kamuktaindet eunnyu." 
Exodus17:10 Kiyai anyun Josua ko u ye kiga komwachi Musa, ak kibargei ak Amalek: ak kitogosta anyun Musa tulwet barak ak Aron, ak Hur." 
Exodus17:11 Ak ye kingonamji Musa barak eunnyi, koterteris Israel: ak kingotu eut, koterteris Amalek." 
Exodus17:12 Ago kinyigisitu eunekab Musa; kinam anyun koita, ak konde ole tebe, si kotebe; ak kinam Aron ak Hur eunekyik kotononso, kitonone age komosi, ak age komosi; kitononso eunekyik ko u noto agoi kororokta asis." 
Exodus17:13 Ak kiiterter Josua Amalek ak bikyik eng’ rotokab chok. 
Exodus17:14 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Sirji ng’alechu bukuit si koek kabwatet; ak isomanji Josua: amu abuktoi kabwatetab Amalek kobet eng’ kureretab kipsengwet." 
Exodus17:15 Ak kiteech Musa kaptisisiet, ak koguure yoto Jehova-nisi:" 
Exodus17:16 ak kile, Kagoyosio Jehovah: yaei Jehovah luget ak Amalek eng’ ibinwek tugul." 
Exodus18:1 Kigas anyun Jetro, tisiindetab Midian, kabyugoitab Musa, tugul che kigoyachi Kamuktaindet Musa, ak bikyik Israel, ole kiimutunda Jehovah Israel komong’une Misri." 
Exodus18:2 Ak kiimut Jetro, kabyugoitab Musa, Sipora, osotiotab Musa, amu kiga koweekta inendet kwo," 
Exodus18:3 ak werikyik aeng’; kigiguure age Gerson; amu kile, Kiaegunote kiprutoiyo eng’ emetab bororiosiek alak:" 
Exodus18:4 ak kigiguure age Elieser; amu kile, Kiek toretindennyu Kamuktaindet ne bo baba, ak kisorua eng’ rotwetab chok ne bo Parao:" 
Exodus18:5 kiit anyun Jetro, kabyugoitab Musa, koboto werikab Musa ak osotiondennyi, ole mi Musa eng’ ong’atet, ole kiimuung’e eng’ tulwetab Kamuktaindet:" 
Exodus18:6 ak kilenji inendet Musa, Kaaitu oling’ung’ ane Jetro kabyugoing’ung’, koboto osotiondeng’ung’, ak werikyik aeng’." 
Exodus18:7 Kimanda anyun Musa kwo kotorokta kabyugoinnyi, ak kiing’uruk ak kong’utut; ak kiteebegei ole chamdogei; ak kimanda emait orit." 
Exodus18:8 Ak kimwachi Musa anyun kabyugoinnyi tuguk tugul che kigoyachi Jehovah Parao ak Misrik agobo Israel, ak nyalilwogik tugul che kiyor eng’ oret, ak ole kisorundo Jehovah ichek." 
Exodus18:9 Ak kibaibait Jetro amu mieindo tugul ne kigoyachi Jehovah Israel, amu kisor ichek komong’une eunekab Misrik." 
Exodus18:10 Ak kile Jetro, Iberurot Jehovah, ne kisoruok eng’ eunekab Misrik, ak eng’ eutab Parao; ne kisor bik komong’une bounatetab Misrik." 
Exodus18:11 Angen nguno anyun ale o Jehovah kosiir cheptalelisiek tugul: ee, eng’ kit ne kiyai bichoto eng’ menotet." 
Exodus18:12 Kinam anyun Jetro kabyugoitab Musa kagochinet ne kibeelei ak tiseiywek koeng’ji Kamuktaindet: ak kinyo Aron, koboto boisiek tugul che bo Israel, koamis ak kabyugoitab Musa eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus18:13 Ak eng’ karonet ne bo aeng’, koteb ng’ony Musa koruoksechi bik: ak kitononso bik eng’ ole mi Musa kong’eete karon agoi koimen." 
Exodus18:14 Ak ye kingogeer kabyugoitab Musa tuguk tugul che kiyachin Musa bik, kole, Nee ni iyachini bik? Amu nee si itebi inyege, ak kotonondos bik tugul ko kayiemin koboch karon agoi koimen?" 
Exodus18:15 Ak kilenji Musa kabyugoinnyi, Amu bwanjina bik koteepse Jehovah:" 
Exodus18:16 ye tinyei ng’olyo, kobwanjina; ak abesiechini chi tugul ak chitab kokwennyi, ak aneti ichek konai konetisiosiekab Jehovah, ak ng’atutikyik." 
Exodus18:17 Ak kilenji kabyugoinnyi Musa, Ma mie kii iyae." 
Exodus18:18 Iwong’ugei kimnateng’ung’, inye, ak bichu omitei tugul: amu siirei kimnateng’ung’ nito; memuchi iyai inyege." 
Exodus18:19 Kas anyun ng’olyondennyu, aborun kit ne iyae, ak ingoteb Kamuktaindet koboten: mie iegu ne iipchini Kamuktaindet ng’alekab bik, ak iipchini Kamuktaindet ng’alekwak;" 
Exodus18:20 ak inet ichek konetisiosiek ak ng’atutik, ak iborji oret ne kanyolji kosub, ak boisiet ne kanyolji koyai." 
Exodus18:21 Nyolu kogeny ilewenote, eng’ bik tugul, bik che kimen, che iywei Kamuktaindet, bikab imanit, che wechei tugukab ng’wen, ak inde ichek koboi bik, koek bounikab elfusiek, ak che bo bogolwogik, ak che bo konomusiek, ak che bo tamanusiek:" 
Exodus18:22 ak ingoruoksechi bik bichoto eng’ betusiek tugul: si koibun ng’olyot age tugul ne uui, ago ingobesiechigei ichegei ng’olyot age tugul ne ming’in: si kobiit konyamnyumun, ak ogesen tugul." 
Exodus18:23 Ak ngot iyai kiito anyun, ak ngo ng’atin Kamuktaindet ko u noto, imuch anyun itonon, ak koba bichu tugul agichek oldanywa eng’ kalyet." 
Exodus18:24 Kigas anyun Musa ng’alekab kabyugoinnyi, ak kiyai choto tugul kamwachi inendet." 
Exodus18:25 Ak kilewenot Musa bik che kimen eng’ Israel tugul, ak kiinde koboi bik, koek bounik che bo elfusiek, ak che bo bogolwogik, ak che bo konomusiek, ak che bo tamanusiek." 
Exodus18:26 Ak kiiruoksechi bik eng’ betusiek tugul: kiipchi Musa ng’alek che uuen, ago kiibesiechigei ichegei ng’olyot age tugul ne ming’in." 
Exodus18:27 Ak kichamji Musa kabyugoinnyi kwo; ak kiwa anyun bandanyi agoi emennyi. 
Exodus19:1 Kiit anyun lagokab Israel ong’atetab Sinai eng’ arawetab somok koboch ngab komanda eng’ emetab Misri: kiit eng’ betunoto. 
Exodus19:2 Ak kingo kagoba eng’ Repadim, koit ong’atetab Sinai, komuung’e ong’atet; ak yoto ye kitebe Israel ko katokyigei tulwet." 
Exodus19:3 Ak kitogosta Musa kwo ole mi Kamuktaindet, ak kiguur Jehovah inendet eng’ tulwet, kolenji, Mwachi ko u ni gotab Jakobo, ak imwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji," 
Exodus19:4 Kiogeer kit ne kiayachi Misrik, ak ko u ye kiagesenenak kebebaikab kipsichinik, amutwak obwanja." 
Exodus19:5 Eng’ noto anyun, ngot ogas it kutinnyu iman, ak orib kayomisenny u, oegu anyun eng’ ane chamanikyuk iman, che itabanotin eng’ bik tugul: amu nenyu ng’ony komugul:" 
Exodus19:6 ak oegu eng’ ane bororietab tisiik, ak bororiet ne itabanat. Chuto ng’alek che iwendi imwachini lagokab Israel." 
Exodus19:7 Kinyo anyun Musa koguur boisiekab bichoto, ak kotetyi ichek ng’alechato tugul che king’atyi Jehovah inendet." 
Exodus19:8 Ak kiwol bik tugul kibagenge kole, Kiyae choto tugul kamwa Jehovah. Ak kiipchi Musa Jehovah ng’alekab bik." 
Exodus19:9 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Keero, anyonjinin eng’ boldet ne tuui, si kobiit kogas bik ye ang’alalun, ak koyanin agoi. Ak kimwachi Musa Jehovah ng’alekab bik." 
Exodus19:10 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ui ole mi bik, ianyiny ra ak mutai, ak ingomwet ngoroikwak," 
Exodus19:11 kochopgei agobo betut ne bo somok: amu chorjingei Jehovah tulwetab Sinai eng’ betutab somok eng’ taitab bik tugul. 
Exodus19:12 Ak itilji bik ole iboch, ilenji, Oripge, si motogoste tulwet, anan otwa kiwotennyi: kibarei age tugul ne twaei tulwet:" 
Exodus19:13 magitwaei eng’ eut chito ne katwa, kobate kilage koik, anan kemwok; masobei age tugul, ngo tiony anan chi. Ye kiguut igonditab kuinetab mengit koek keny, kotogos icheget tulwet." 
Exodus19:14 Ak kichortagei Musa anyun kwo ole mi bik, kwo koanyiny bik; ak kimwet ngoroikwak." 
Exodus19:15 Ak kilenji bik, Ochopge ogen betutab somok: amat korikyi chi kobogorio." 
Exodus19:16 Ak eng’ betutab somok, ko kaeech, kobiit tulosiek ak kalyelosiek, ak kiilaach boldet ne tuui tulwet, ak kimi cheetab iriaget ne cheei kot; ak kobotanso bik tugul che kimi nganaset." 
Exodus19:17 Ak kiimut Musa bik komong’ eng’ nganaset koba kotuiyo ak Kamuktaindet; ak kiba kotononie tulwet kel. 
Exodus19:18 Ak kiiyeni tulwet komugul ne bo Sinai, amu kichorjigei Jehovah tulwonoto eng’ mat: ak kitogosta iyetanyi ne u ne bo mat ne o mising’, ak kibotan tulwet komugul mising’." 
Exodus19:19 Ak kingotesak cheetab iriaget kwo barak mising’ kotwek Musa, ak kiwolji Kamuktaindet eng’ tuget." 
Exodus19:20 Ak kichorjigei Jehovah tulwetab Sinai, konyo tulwet barak: ak kiguur Jehovah Musa kwo tulwet barak; ak kitogosta Musa." 
Exodus19:21 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ui iteechi bik, si mabut bik kiwotet ak kogeer Jehovah, ak kobek che chang’." 
Exodus19:22 Ak ingoanyinygei tisiik agichek che rikyin Jehovah, si mabar Jehovah ichek." 
Exodus19:23 Ak kilenji Musa Jehovah, Ma chamdaat eng’ bik kotogos tulwonito bo Sinai: amu kiiteiywech, ilenjech, Onde kiwotet tulwet, ak otaban." 
Exodus19:24 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet, Ui, chortege; si otogosu ak Aron: ago amat kobut bik ak tisiik kiwotet kotogos ole mi Jehovah, si mabar inendet ichek." 
Exodus19:25 Kichortagei anyun Musa kwo ole mi bik, kwo komwachi." 
Exodus20:1 Ak kimwa Kamuktaindet ng’alechu tugul kole," 
Exodus20:2 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung, ne kiimutun imong’une emetab Misri, eng’ gotab otwognatet." 
Exodus20:3 Amecheng’jige cheptalelisiek che ter, kobatena anege." 
Exodus20:4 Ameyachige kanamwet, anan itondab kiy age tugul ne mi barak kipsengwet, anan ne mi ng’ony, anan ne mi nyanjet, ng’ony orit;" 
Exodus20:5 ameng’urukyi anan iot ichek: amu ane Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko a Kamuktaindet ne ama ng’etkong’, ageerjini lagok tengektab kwanisiekwak, agoi ibindab somok ak ne bo ang’wan eng’ ichek che wecha," 
Exodus20:6 ak arire elfusiek eng’ ichek che chama che isubi ng’atutikyuk. 
Exodus20:7 Amemwa kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ tangoi; amu iityin Jehovah ng’ogisto ne mwaei kainennyi eng’ tangoi. 
Exodus20:8 Ibwat betutab sabato, irib, itaban." 
Exodus20:9 Iboisie betusiek lo, ak iyai boisioniguk tugul;" 
Exodus20:10 ago betutab tisab ko sabato ne bo Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; ameyai boisiet eng’ betunoto, inye, anan wering’ung’, anan cheptang’ung’, anan otwogindeng’ung’ ne muren, anan otwogindeng’ung’ ne tie, anan tuguk, anan toondeng’ung’ ne mitei kurgotiguk;" 
Exodus20:11 amu kiyai Jehovah kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony eng’ betusiek lo, ak nyanjet, ak tuguk tugul che mi orinywa, ak kiimuuny eng’ betutab tisab: kiiberur anyun Jehovah betutab sabato amu noto, kiitaban." 
Exodus20:12 Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet: si kochang’a betusieguk eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’. 
Exodus20:13 Amerumisie. 
Exodus20:14 Amoipge. 
Exodus20:15 Amechorse. 
Exodus20:16 Amebaorianji chitab kokweng’ung’ eng’ lembech. 
Exodus20:17 Amegase miat gotab chitab kokweng’ung’, amegase miat osotiotab chitab kokweng’ung’ anan otwogindennyi ne muren, anan otwogindennyi ne tie, anan eitanyi, anan sigiriennyi, anan kiy age tugul ne bo chitab kokweng’ung’." 
Exodus20:18 Ak ye kingogeer bik tugul kalyelosiek ak tulwet ne iyeni, ak kogas tuletab ilotik ak cheetab iriaget, kobotanso, ak kotononso eng’ ole loo." 
Exodus20:19 Ak kilenji ichek Musa, Ng’alalwech inye, si kegasin: ago amengong’alalwech Kamuktaindet si ma kibegu." 
Exodus20:20 Ak kilenji Musa bik, Amoiywei; amu kanyo Kamuktaindennyo kotiemak, si kotebe taing’wong’ kaiyweisiennyi ne oiywei inendet, si moyai tengek." 
Exodus20:21 Ak kitononso bik eng’ ole loo, ak kirikta Musa ole mi Kamuktaindet eng’ boldet ne tuui." 
Exodus20:22 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Mwachi lagokab Israel ko u ni, Kaogeerjige okwege ole, kaang’alalwok ami kipsengwet." 
Exodus20:23 Amat oyachige kanamonik alak otesena, che bo feda, anan kanamonik che bo tahabu." 
Exodus20:24 Teekwa kaptisiet ne bo ng’ung’unyek, ak ieng’wa eng’ kaptisisionoto kagochinoiguk che kibeelei, ak kagochinoiguk che bo kalyet, kechireguk, ak tuga cheguk: anyonjinin ak aberurin eng’ komosta age tugul ole andoi kainennyu kibwate." 
Exodus20:25 Ak ngimache iteekwa kaptisisiet ne bo koik, ko meteege koik che kigiwai: amu ngiwai, ko kaing’wanit." 
Exodus20:26 Ametogoste iwe kaptisisiennyu ibune long’eiywot, si mewe ach ngor." 
Exodus21:1 Chu anyun kiruogutik che indechini tainywa. 
Exodus21:2 Ngial otwogindet ne Hebranindet, koboisiei kenyisiek lo, ak eng’ kenyitab tisab komanda buch kotiagat." 
Exodus21:3 Ngo kinyonei inegei, komandoi inegei: ago ngo kiga kotunis, komandoi ak osotiondennyi." 
Exodus21:4 Ago ngo kiigochin kiptaindennyi osotiot, ak kosikyi werik anan ko tibik; kobunjin osotiondonoto ak lagokyik kiptaiyandennyi, ak komanda chichoto inegei." 
Exodus21:5 Ak ngo mwa komie otwogindet kole, Achame kiptaiyandennyu, ak osotiondennyu, ak lagokyuk; mamandoi, nganda atiagat:" 
Exodus21:6 komut anyun kiptaiyandennyi chichoto konyo taitab Kamuktaindet, ak komut konyo kurgat, anan tugatukyietab kurgat; ak kobarbar itinnyi kiptaiyandennyi eng’ katet; ak koot inendet agoi." 
Exodus21:7 Ak ngo alda chi cheptanyi koek otwogindet, ko mamandoi ko u otwogik che muren." 
Exodus21:8 Ngo maibaibai cheboto kiptaiyandennyi, ne kilewen chichoto kole si tun koek osotiondennyi, kochamda kitiach: matinyei kimnatet koalda kwo bororiosiek alak, amu king’al inendet." 
Exodus21:9 Ak ngogochi inendet werinnyi koek osotiondennyi, koyachi inendet ko u ye yachin tibikyik." 
Exodus21:10 Ak ngo sion, ko mat kochuchuch amitwogikyik, anan ngoroikyik, anan ko u ye nyoljin osotik." 
Exodus21:11 Ak ngo mayachi inendet tuguchoto somok, komuchi osotiondonoto komanda buch, ama eng’ alyet." 
Exodus21:12 Inendet ne birei chi kot kome, kebarei chichoto iman." 
Exodus21:13 Ago chito ne kama kosetyin, ago kiigochi Kamuktaindet inendet konyo eunnyi: achobun ole mwechin." 
Exodus21:14 Ak ngo wechi chito chitab kokwennyi eng’ menotet, kwo kobar inendet eng’ ng’alset; ing’usu eng’ kaptisisiennyu, si kebar." 
Exodus21:15 Ak inendet ne birei kwandanyi, anan kamet, kebarei iman." 
Exodus21:16 Ak inendet ne chorei chi, ak koalda, anan ngenam komi eunekyik, kebarei iman." 
Exodus21:17 Ak inendet ne sasei kwandanyi, anan kamet, kebarei iman." 
Exodus21:18 Ak ngo borio bik, ak kewire age koita, anan ngo luch, ama kome, ago ngo ru eng’ itogunnyi konyagei," 
Exodus21:19 ago ngo ng’eet, kowendot kotebenoti kiroktanyi, keunda anyun ne kibirei: ago igochin tuguk che yamei betusiekyik che kibetyo buch, ak konya inendet komie agoi kosob." 
Exodus21:20 Ak ngo bir chi age tugul otwogindennyi ne muren, anan ne tie, eng’ kirokto, kot komechi eunekyik, kigeerjin chichoto yaitiennyi iman." 
Exodus21:21 Ago ngot koeekyi betut agenge anan ko aeng’ ama me, ko ma kigeerjin kiy; amu kiga al." 
Exodus21:22 Ak ngo borio bik, kot kokwer osotiot ne tamano, ak kororok moet, ama koam kiy osotiondonoto: kogeerjin che yamegei ak che machei manong’otiotab osotiondonoto; igoitoi ko u ye kamwa kiruogik." 
Exodus21:23 Ago ngoyaak kiy ne ya, kigeeri sobondo eng’ sobondo," 
Exodus21:24 konda eng’ konda, keldet eng’ keldet, eut eng’ eut, keldo eng’ keldo," 
Exodus21:25 beelset eng’ beelset, kaguotenet eng’ kaguotenet, biret eng’ biret." 
Exodus21:26 Ak ngo kwer chi kondab otwogindennyi ne muren anan ne tie, kot kotui kong’ato; kounda kwo kotiagat amu kondanyi." 
Exodus21:27 Ak ngo kwer keldetab otwogindennyi ne muren, anan otwogindennyi ne tie kot kochun; kounda kwo kotiagat amu keldannyi." 
Exodus21:28 Ak ngo toor kirgit muren anan kobogorio, ak kome, kelachei kirgoto iman, ak magiamei banyekyik; ak keunda anyun chitab kobo kirgoto." 
Exodus21:29 Ago ngo kocham kobarei bich kirgoto, ak kigemwachi chitab kobo, ama koger inendet, ago kabar muren anan kobogorio; kelachei kirgoto, ak kebar chitab kobo agine." 
Exodus21:30 Ak ngo biit kiy ne itiagegei, kogoito anyun noto kitiage sobondanyi ko u ye kagecham." 
Exodus21:31 Ngo kibar werit, anan chepto, keyachin ko u kiruogonito." 
Exodus21:32 Ak ngo toor kirgit otwogindet ne muren anan otwogindet ne tie; kogoitoi sekelisiek sosom che bo feda, kogochin kiptaiyandenywa, ak kelach kirgoto." 
Exodus21:33 Ak ngo yat chito keringet, anan ngo bal keringet ama koger, ak ngo rorokyi tany anan sigiriet," 
Exodus21:34 kogeeri chitab kobo keringet; ak igochin chitab kobo tuguchoto siling’isiek, ak kobunji noto kagome chitab kobo keringet." 
Exodus21:35 Ak ngo bar kirgit kirgitab chito age kot kome; kealdoi noto sobei, ak kopchei tuguk che kagialdae, ak kopchei banyekab ne kame agine." 
Exodus21:36 Ak ngingen kele kicham kobarisiei kirgoto, ama koger chitab kobo; kowale kirgoto kirgit age, ak kobunji inendet banyekab ne kame." 
Exodus22:1 Ngo chor chi tany, anan kechir, ak koeny, anan koalda; kogonu tuga mut kogeere tanyato, ak kechirek ang’wan kogeere kechirionoto." 
Exodus22:2 Ak ngenam chorindet kobutei oldo age, ak kebar, ko mami tengektab korotik." 
Exodus22:3 Ak ngo chor asis ama kiyachi kiy inendet, komitei tengektab korotik: nyolu kogeer che yamei; ak ngo matinyei kiy, kealda inendet amu chorsennyi." 
Exodus22:4 Ngenyorji eunnyi kioto kachor kota kosobei, ngo tany, anan ngo sigirio, anan ngo kechir; kogeeri konyil aeng’." 
Exodus22:5 Ngoyage chito tennyi mbaretab chito age, anan ko mbaret ne bo sabibuk, kogeerjin chitab kobo mbaret tugukyik che miachen che bo mbarennyi, ak logoekab ketikyik che kororon." 
Exodus22:6 Ngo lal mat, ak konam ng’otwet, si kobeel bek anan bek che iyumotin anan kobeel mbaret inendet; kogeeri iman chito ne kainaami mat." 
Exodus22:7 Ngogochi chi age tugul chitab kokwennyi fedaisiek anan tuguk kogonorji, ak kechor eng’ gotab chichoto; ak ngenam chorindet, kogeeri chorindonoto konyil aeng’." 
Exodus22:8 Ago ngo maginyor chorindet, konyo anyun chitab kobo got taitab Kamuktaindet, si kobiit kotook ngo kinam eunnyi tugukab chitab kokwennyi." 
Exodus22:9 Amu kachiliilutiet age tugul, ngo ne bo tany, anan sigirio, anan kechir, anan ne bo ngoriet, anan kiy age tugul ne kibet, ngo mwa chito kole, Ineni, keib anyun kobwa taitab Kamuktaindet ng’alekwak ichek tuwai; inendet ne iruokyin Kamuktaindet, kogeerjin chitab kokwennyi konyil aeng’." 
Exodus22:10 Ngo manakyi chi age tugul chitab kokwennyi sigiriet, anan eito, anan kechir, anan tany age tugul; ak ngo me, anan ngo mian, anan ngekweri, ama keer chi:" 
Exodus22:11 tebe kayosietab Jehovah kwenutab bichoto tuwai, ngo ma nam eng’ eunnyi tugukab chitab kokwennyi; ak koyan noto chitab kobo, ak magonu kiy." 
Exodus22:12 Ago ngo kaga kigichore inendet iman, kogeerjin chitab kobo che yamei." 
Exodus22:13 Ngot ko kinam tiondo kotonaton, ingoib anyun tanyato nyo koek baornatet; magonu kiy kogeere noto kigibar." 
Exodus22:14 Ak ngo som chi chitab kokwennyi kiy koboisie, ak ngo ng’emak, anan ngo me, ama mi chitab kobo, kogeere age iman." 
Exodus22:15 Ago ngo mi chitab kobo, ko maigeeri: ak ngo teta ne kigibesendo kobois, si kigoito melekto, koyamegei ak melektanyi." 
Exodus22:16 Ak ngogaigai chito bergeiyat ne tom keyachi koito, ak koruiyo ak inendet, ko kanyol koganda tuguk si kobiit kotun." 
Exodus22:17 Ak ngo esio kwandab bergeiyandanato eng’ kimnatet, ko kanyol kogoito tuguk che aechin ak che kigandoe bergeinik." 
Exodus22:18 Ameunde bonindet kosob. 
Exodus22:19 Kibarei age tugul ne ruitos ak che kiyagi. 
Exodus22:20 Chi age tugul ne eng’jin tiseiywot cheptalelit age tugul, ne ma Jehovah inendet, keng’emei kiwong’u." 
Exodus22:21 Ameyachi ne ya too, anan inyalil: amu kio toek ak okwek eng’ emetab Misri." 
Exodus22:22 Amous mosok age tugul, anan lakwet ne matinyei kwanda." 
Exodus22:23 Ngius ichek eng’ kiy age tugul, ak korirja, agasyini iman rirekwak;" 
Exodus22:24 ak kolalyo neregekyuk, ak abarenak rotwetab chok; ak koek mosogik osotikwok, ak koek bonon lagokwok." 
Exodus22:25 Ak ngo besenin bikyuk che kibananok che mi koboten, komat iyaach; amemage keljinet." 
Exodus22:26 Ak nginame besendo ngorietab chitab kokweng’ung’, iweekyini kotom kororokta asista:" 
Exodus22:27 amu noto kityo ne tugegei, amu ngoriet ne tuge bortanyi: tos tugegei nee koruei? Ak ye rirja, agasyini; amu atinye rirenet." 
Exodus22:28 Amat isas Kamuktaindet, amat ichub bounindetab biguk." 
Exodus22:29 Amegage si igoitoi eng’ chang’indab tuguguk, ak che kieei. Igona taitang’ung’ ne werit." 
Exodus22:30 Ak iyai ko u noto eng’ tuga cheguk agichek, ak eng’ kechireguk: igochi kotebi ak kamet betusiek tisab; si igona eng’ betut ne bo sisiit." 
Exodus22:31 Ak oegu bik che itabanotin eng’ ane: eng’ noto anyun amoam banyek alak tugul che kabar tiong’ik eng’ timin; owirji sesenik. 
Exodus23:1 Amemwaate ng’alek che bo lembech: amonamge ak kiptengekyot, iegu baoriat ne ma bo iman." 
Exodus23:2 Amesub tuiyet iwe iyai kiy ne ya; amebaorianji ng’alek isub tuiyet imaas kiruoget: 
Exodus23:3 ametiytii kibanania eng’ ng’alekyik. 
Exodus23:4 Nginyoru tetab bunyondeng’ung’ anan sigiriennyi ne betoti, ikwerichi iman chitab kobo," 
Exodus23:5 Nginyoru sigirietab ne wechin ko kagobut amu tuguk che laei, ak kama imache itoret, ko kanyol itoret ing’eet." 
Exodus23:6 Amat imaas kiruogetab kibananiandeng’ung’ eng’ ng’alekyik. 
Exodus23:7 Istege, looitu eng’ ng’alekab lembech; amebar che matinyei yaitio ak che bo imanda: amu maiityini imanda kiptengekyot." 
Exodus23:8 Ametaach tuguk che bo kagaigaet: amu tuchei konunoik, icheget che ng’omen, ak kogunuri ng’alekab che bo imanda." 
Exodus23:9 Amenyalil toondet amu ongen ole teptoi muguleldab toondet, amu kio toek eng’ emetab Misri." 
Exodus23:10 Igole mbareng’ung’ kenyisiek lo, ak iges ruratennyi;" 
Exodus23:11 ago mete eng’ kenyit ne bo tisab koteb komuuny; si kobiit konyor turonik kibananokab biguk: ak koam tiong’ikab timin che ituuchi bichoto. Iyae ko u noto eng’ mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk, ak eng’ mbareng’ung’ ne bo ketikab emitik che bunu mwanik." 
Exodus23:12 Yai boisieng’ung’ eng’ betusiek lo, ak imuuny eng’ betutab tisab: si kobiit komuuny eitang’ung’ ak sigirieng’ung’, ak konyor kamuung’et weritab otwogindeng’ung’ ne tie, ak toondet." 
Exodus23:13 Ak orib tuguk tugul che kaamwawok: amat omwa kainaikab cheptalelisiek, amat kegasyi kuting’ung’." 
Exodus23:14 Iyaiywa igorta konyil somok eng’ kenyit age tugul. 
Exodus23:15 Rib igortab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek: iame eng’ betusiek tisab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ko u ye kiang’atin, eng’ betut ne kigiaror eng’ arawetab Abib (amu arawanato ne kiomong’une Misri); amat konyo chi tainnyu ak eut buch." 
Exodus23:16 Rib igorta ne bo kesisiet, tongoanikab boisioniguk che igoljini mbar: ak igortab betusiek che kiyumune tugukab mbar, eng’ kagesunetab kenyit, ye iyumyu tugukab boisieng’ung’ eng’ mbar." 
Exodus23:17 Bwanei taitab Kiptaiyat Jehovah murenik tugul konyil somok eng’ kenyit agenge. 
Exodus23:18 Ameibu korotikab tiseiywondennyu koboto makatinik che kaginde mermerek; amengoeekyi mwanikab igortanyu. 
Exodus23:19 Kanyol iibu tuguk che bo tai eng’ tongoanik che bo emeng’ung’ kobwa gotab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’. Ameyoe aruet chegab kamet. 
Exodus23:20 Keero, kayokte malaikaiyat kondoenen koribotin eng’ oret, ko mutin iwe ole kiachob." 
Exodus23:21 Oripge eng’ tainnyi, ak ogas it ng’alekyik; amotach inendet: amu manyoiywok kaat bistoeng’wong’, amu mi kainennyu eng’ inendet." 
Exodus23:22 Ago ngigas it ng’alekyik, ak iyai tugul che amwaun; aegu anyun bunyotab buniguk, ak aegu usindetab che usin." 
Exodus23:23 Amu wendi malaikaiyandennyu kondoenen, komutin iwe ole mi Amorik, Hitik, Perisik, Kananik, Hibik, ak Jebusik, ak aiste ichek awong’u." 
Exodus23:24 Amat isa kanamonikwak, anan iot, anan isub boisionikwak: ago oluul kot ko mang’et kiy, ak obut kotonogis tolochikwak." 
Exodus23:25 Ak oboisiechi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak koberur amitwogiguk ak beeguk; ak aiste mianwek eng’ kweng’ung’." 
Exodus23:26 Ak mabiitu ne rorogu moet, anan ne oosu, anan ne soneni eng’ emeng’ung’; ak ayai kosulda koitetab betusieguk." 
Exodus23:27 Ayoktoi kamuisennyu kondoenen, ak anyalil bik tugul che mi ole iite, ak ayai buniguk tugul komweenen." 
Exodus23:28 Ak ayokte karamiet kondoenen, kwo koon Hibik, Kananik, ak Hitik, koba eng’ taing’ung’." 
Exodus23:29 Maone ichek koba eng’ taing’ung’ eng’ kenyit agenge; si maguber emet, si matesogis tiong’ikab timin ak koiimak." 
Exodus23:30 Aone komutya koba eng’ taing’ung’ agoi itesage, ak inyaban emet." 
Exodus23:31 Ak andoi kiwoteng’ung’ kobochit Nyanjet ne Birir agoi nyanjetab Pilistik, ak kobochit ong’atet agoi Ainet: amu andoi bikab emonoto eunekwok; ak ion ichek koba eng’ taing’ung’." 
Exodus23:32 Amoyai arorut ak ichek, anan agot eng’ kanamonikwak." 
Exodus23:33 Amat komeny emeng’ung’, si magonin iyaiywa tengek: amu ngot iot kanamonikwak, koegu iman mestet nito eng’ inye." 
Exodus24:1 Ak kilenji inendet Musa, Otogosu ole mi Jehovah, inye ak Aron, Nadab ak Abiu, ak boisiek tamanwogik tisab che bo Israel; ak ong’urukya eng’ ye loo:" 
Exodus24:2 ak nyonei Musa inegei korikyin Jehovah; ago marigu ichek; ak matogosu bik koboto inendet. 
Exodus24:3 Ak kinyo anyun Musa konyo komwachi bik ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah, ak kiruogutik tugul: ak kiwol bik tugul eng’ kutit agenge kole, Kiyae ng’alechato tugul kamwa Jehovah." 
Exodus24:4 Ak kisir Musa ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah, ak king’eet karon ko tuui, ak kiteech kaptisisiet eng’ tulwet kel, ak tolochik taman ak aeng’, ko u ortinwek taman ak aeng’ che bo Israel." 
Exodus24:5 Ak kiiyokto murenik che neran che bo lagokab Israel, che kiigoito kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak kieng’ji Jehovah tiseiywekab kalyet, che bo tuga." 
Exodus24:6 Ak kinam Musa korotik kebeber, konde tabok che mengechen; ak kiisote kaptisisiet che king’et eng’ korotichoto." 
Exodus24:7 Ak konam bukuitab arorutiet, ak kosomanji bik kogas: ak kile ichek, Kiyae choto tugul kamwa Jehovah, ak kegas it." 
Exodus24:8 Yeityo konam Musa korotik, ak koisote bik, kolen, Ogeero, korotikab arorutiet ne kagoyai Jehovah kobotok eng’ ng’alechu tugul." 
Exodus24:9 Kitogosta anyun Musa, ak Aron, Nadab, ak Abiu, ak boisiek tamanwogik tisab che bo Israel," 
Exodus24:10 ak kigeer Kamuktaindet ne bo Israel; ak kimi kelyekyik kel koita ne kiguure sapire, ne u sengwetiet inendet, eng’ tililindanyi." 
Exodus24:11 Ak ma twa eng’ eunnyi kandoichoto bo lagokab Israel: ak kigeer Kamuktaindet, ak kiamis ak koee." 
Exodus24:12 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Togosu oli ami eng’ tulwet, ak itebe olito; si agonin koik che lebelen, ak ng’atutik ak kayomisutik, che kiasir, si kobiit kinet ichek." 
Exodus24:13 King’eet anyun Musa ak Josua kiboitiondennyi, ye ibata kotogosta Musa kwo tulwetab Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus24:14 Ak kilenji boisiek, Otebi eng’ yu, ogenech, agoi keweege kogeny ole omi: ogeero, mi Aron ak Hur kobotok: ingonyo ole mi ichek chi age tugul ne tinyei ng’olyo." 
Exodus24:15 Kitogosta anyun Musa kwo tulwet, ak kituch boldet tulwet." 
Exodus24:16 Ak kitebe lilindab Jehovah tulwetab Sinai, ak kituch boldet tulwonoto betusiek lo; ak eng’ betutab tisab koguur Jehovah Musa komong’une kutit boldet orit." 
Exodus24:17 Ak ki u itondab lilindab Jehovah mat ne beelei kowong’u eng’ tulwet barak ko u ye kigeerei lagokab Israel. 
Exodus24:18 Ak kiwa Musa boldet orit, ak kotogosta tulwet; ak kitebe Musa tulwet betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam." 
Exodus25:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Exodus25:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel koibwa konunoik: name konunoichoto chi age tugul ne ichirjini muguleldanyi kogon konunoikyuk. 
Exodus25:3 Chu konunoik che itaache eng’ ichek; tahabu, ak feda, ak sugunonik;" 
Exodus25:4 ak angok che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, ak katanit ne kararan, ak che kiyae kororikab ng’ororek," 
Exodus25:5 ak magatokab mengichik che kigisal kobiriritu, ak magatokab mengichikab beek, ak ketik che u chebitoik che kiguure shita;" 
Exodus25:6 mwaitab kit ne ikweng’sei, ak tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny che bo mwaita ne kiilegei, ak che bo nyamdutik che kibeelei;" 
Exodus25:7 koik che kiguure soam, ak koik che kitetyin epok, ak ngoriet age ne kigilaakyin teget." 
Exodus25:8 Ak ingoteekwa ole tilil; si ameny kwenunywa. 
Exodus25:9 Oyai tugul ko u ye aborun, ole teptoi got, ole teptoi tuguk tugul che kindoi orit." 
Exodus25:10 Ak ingoyai moinget eng’ ketik che kiguure shita: ingoek koindanyi kakwautik che bo eut aeng’ ak kebeber; ak ingoek tebeesindanyi kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber; ak ingoek koindab tononennyi kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber. 
Exodus25:11 Ak iliige tahabu che tililen, iliige orit ak barak, ak itegele tegeleiywotab tahabu iyieme baragunnyi tugul." 
Exodus25:12 Ak itang’ji peteinik ang’wan che bo tahabu, ak inde peteinichoto luita age tugul ne bo moinget ole bo kel; indoi aeng’ komosta age ak aeng’ eng’ komosta age." 
Exodus25:13 Ak iyai ketik che kiname che bo shita, ak iliige tahabu." 
Exodus25:14 Ak irookte ketichoto peteinik, che mi tabanwekab moinget, che kitandane moingonoto." 
Exodus25:15 Tebe ketichato peteinikab moinget; magicheru. 
Exodus25:16 Ak inde moingonoto orit baornatet ne agonin. 
Exodus25:17 Ak iyai keruennyi ne bo rirenet ne bo tahabu che tililen: ingoek koindanyi kakwautik che bo eut aeng’ ak kebeber, ak ingoek tebeesindanyi kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber." 
Exodus25:18 Ak iyai kerubisiek aeng’ eng’ tahabu, ak iyae tahabu che kitanyi, eng’ tabanwek aeng’ che bo keruetab rirenet." 
Exodus25:19 Ak iyai kerubit age kotebe tabanda age, inde age kotaban eng’ komosta age: kinamdos keruet ne bo rirenet, ak kerubit eng’ tabanda age tugul." 
Exodus25:20 Ak koiito kerubisiek kebebaikwak koba barak, kouure kebebaikwak keruetab rirenet, ak kotoorjin togochikwak; ing’ururi kerubisiechoto keruetab rirenet." 
Exodus25:21 Ak inde keruanato bo rirenet baragutab moinget; ak inde moinget orit baornatet ne tun agonin. 
Exodus25:22 Ak ketuiye ak inye eng’ oloto, ak keng’alal ak inye ko katebe keruanato bo rirenet barak, ami kwenutab kerubisiek aeng’ che mi baragutab moingetab baornatet, amwaun tuguk tugul che ang’atin agobo lagokab Israel." 
Exodus25:23 Ak iyai meset eng’ ketikab shita: ingoek koindanyi kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut, ak ingoek tebeesindanyi kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut, ak ingoek kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber, koindab tononennyi." 
Exodus25:24 Ak iliige tahabu che tililen, ak itegele tegeleiywotab tahabu iyieme baragunnyi tugul." 
Exodus25:25 Ak iyachi tegeleiywot ne yamei eut agenge tebeesindanyi, koyiem kioto, ak iyai tegeleiywotab tahabu koyiem tabanwekyik tugul kotegel." 
Exodus25:26 Ak iyachi peteinik ang’wan che bo tahabu, ak inde peteinichoto luukwek ang’wan che mi kelyekyik ang’wan." 
Exodus25:27 Ingorikyi peteinichoto tegeleiywot, koek che chutei ketik che kiibe meset." 
Exodus25:28 Ak iyai ketik che kiibe, che bo shita, ak iliige tahabu, si kobiit keibe meset." 
Exodus25:29 Ak itany tahabu che tililen iyai koek tabokyik, ak kechigosiekyik, ak kikombokyik, ak tageiywekyik, che kirong’jine tuguk." 
Exodus25:30 Ak inde makatinik che bo kabartaet meset kotebe tainnyu kotugul. 
Exodus25:31 Ak iyai keldab tait eng’ tahabu che tililen: iyae keloto tahabu che kitanyi, kelunnyi, ak toloitanyi; kikombokyik, mulonokyik, ak taptokyik, kiropchindos choto tugul koek kiy agenge:" 
Exodus25:32 ak kosach temenik koek lo eng’ toloato; sachei temenik somogu eng’ komosta age ne bo keloto, ak sachei temenik somogu ko u noto eng’ komosin." 
Exodus25:33 Tinyei temet agenge kikombok somok che kigiyai koigei taptok che kiguure almond, ak mulwet ak taptet, tinyei ko u noto temet age ne bo komosta age kikombok somok che kigiyai koigei taptochoto kiguure almond, ak mulwet ak taptet: ko u noto eng’ temenik tugul lo, che sage keloto komugul." 
Exodus25:34 Ak mitei ole bo toloita inendet kikombok ang’wan, che kigiyai kogergeit ak taptokab almond, koboto mulonokyik ak tapokyik." 
Exodus25:35 Ak ye kisage temenik aeng’u, komi kel yoto mulwet, ne kigituiye koek kiy agenge, ak ye kisage kogeny temenik aeng’u, komi kel yoto mulwet, ne kigituiye koek kiy agenge, ak ye kisage kogeny temenik aeng’u, komi kel yoto mulwet, ne kigituiye koek kiy agenge. Mitoti ko u noto eng’ wagichoto tugul ole kisage temenik tugul ko lo." 
Exodus25:36 Namegei mulonokwak ak temenikwak, kiek kiy agenge: kitang’e kioto komugul tahabu che tililen." 
Exodus25:37 Ak iyai taisiekyik koek tisab: ak konam taisiekyik, si kobiit kokweny ole mi." 
Exodus25:38 Ak kiyae tahabu che tililen kanameiywondennyi, ak tabokyik che mengechen." 
Exodus25:39 Kiyae tainato ak tuguchuto tugul tahabu che tililen che yamei talentait agenge. 
Exodus25:40 Rib si iyai tugul ko u kergeindenywa ne kigiborun eng’ tulwet. 
Exodus26:1 Teech got anyun, si isikyi ngoroik taman; inabe katanit ne kararan ne kigila, ak che tuuen ne nyalil, koboto kerubisiek che boisietab laindet ne ng’om." 
Exodus26:2 Ingoek koindab ngoriet age tugul kakwautik tiptem ak sisiit che bo eut, ak ingoek tebeesindab ngoriet age tugul kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut: ingoaechin ngoroik tugul." 
Exodus26:3 Kiropchindos ngoroik mut; ak keropchin ngoroik alak mut agichek. 
Exodus26:4 Ak iyachi belelutik che tuuen ne nyalil eng’ tabandab ngoriet age, eng’ ole kurmanat, eng’ ole kagituiyechi; ak iyai ko u noto eng’ tabandab ngoriet age ne tabanu barak eng’ ole kagituiye ne bo aeng’." 
Exodus26:5 Napchi ngoriet age belelutik konom, ak inapchi belelutik konom eng’ tabandab ngoriet ne bo aeng’, eng’ ole kagituiyechi; tokyindos belelutik tugul." 
Exodus26:6 Ak iyai karik konom che bo tahabu che kiname ngoroik, ak ituiye ngoroik karichato: ak koek agenge got." 
Exodus26:7 Ak inab ngoroikab ng’ororek koek emait ne kituge got: napchi taman ak agenge. 
Exodus26:8 Ingoek koindab ngoriet age tugul kakwautik sosom che bo eut, ak ingoek tebeesindab ngoriet age tugul kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut, ak ingoaechin ngoroichoto tugul tamanu ak agenge." 
Exodus26:9 Ak ituiye ngoroik mut koek agenge, ak ituiye alak lo koek agenge agichek, ak iliich ngorionoto bo lo eng’ ole kimandoe eng’ emait." 
Exodus26:10 Ak iyachi belelutik konom eng’ tabandab ngoriet age ne tabanu barak eng’ ole kituiyechin, ak iyachi belelutik konom eng’ tabandab ngoriet ne bo aeng’ eng’ ole kituiyechin." 
Exodus26:11 Ak iyai karik konom che bo sugunonik, ak irooch karichato belelutik, ak ituiye emait koek agenge." 
Exodus26:12 Ak ne kang’etune ngoroikab emait, kebeberta ne kang’et, kosonginine batetab got." 
Exodus26:13 Ak kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut ne kang’et eng’ komosta age kogeny, ne kang’etune koindab ngoroikab emait, ingosonginine komosi ak komosi ne bo got, si kobiit kotuch." 
Exodus26:14 Ak inab ngoroikab mengichik che kigisal kobiriritu si ketuge emait, ak inab ngoroikab mengichikab beek kotabon barak." 
Exodus26:15 Ak iyai baoinik che bo ketikab shita, che tonondos, kobunji got." 
Exodus26:16 Ingoek kakwautik taman che bo eut koindab baoiyot, ak ingoek tebeesindab baoiyot age tugul kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber." 
Exodus26:17 Iyae baoiyot age tugul konyor ng’elyebwek aeng’ che kiituiyogei; yai ko u noto eng’ baoinik tugul che bo got. 
Exodus26:18 Yai baoinikab got che itei tiptem; inde choto ole tokyingei murot ne bo tai. 
Exodus26:19 Ak ibarbar feda isikyi kong’ik artam, si kotaban kapkelyenutab baoinichoto tiptem; chutei ng’elyebwek aeng’u che bo baoiyot agenge, kong’ik aeng’ che mi kapkelyen; chutei ko u noto ng’elyebwek aeng’u che bo baoiyot age, kong’ik aeng’ che mi kapkelyen:" 
Exodus26:20 ak che bo komosta age ne bo got, ole tokyingei murot ne bo katam, inde baoinik tiptem:" 
Exodus26:21 ak kong’ikwak artam che bo feda, kong’ik aeng’ eng’ kapkelyenutab baoiyot agenge, ak kong’ik aeng’ eng’ kapkelyenutab baoiyot age." 
Exodus26:22 Yai anyun baoinik lo kobunji got batai ole tokyingei cherongo. 
Exodus26:23 Ak iyai baoinik aeng’ kobunji luukwek che bo go che mi batai. 
Exodus26:24 Ak kitwakyindos aeng’ koboch ng’ony agoi barak, ak kituiye tugul peteit: kiyaei ko u noto eng’ tuwai; ak inde choto luukwek aeng’." 
Exodus26:25 Ak egu choto baoinik sisiit, ak kong’ikwak che bo feda taman ak lo; kong’ik aeng’ eng’ kapkelyenutab baoiyot agenge, ak kong’ik aeng’ eng’ kapkelyenutab baoiyot age." 
Exodus26:26 Ak iyai eng’ shita ketik che u rateiywek; iyae mut che bo baoinik che bo komosta agenge ne bo got," 
Exodus26:27 ak rateiywek mut che bo baoinik che bo komosta age ne bo got, ak rateiywek mut che bo baoinik che bo komosta age ne bo got ne mi batai, ole tokyingei cherongo." 
Exodus26:28 Ak ingobochit tabanda age agoi tabanda age rateiywot ne bo kwen ne muroksei, ne mi kwenutab baoinichoto." 
Exodus26:29 Ak iliige tahabu baoinik, ak iyai peteinikwak che bo tahabu koek choto ole kirooktoi rateiywek: ak iliige rateiywechoto tahabu." 
Exodus26:30 Ak ingotonon goyoto ko u ye kiging’at ak kiborun eng’ tulwet. 
Exodus26:31 Ak iyai anget ne kigioiye got ne tuui ne nyalil, ak ne arus ne birir, ak ne birir, ak katanit ne kararan ne kigila: kinapchin anganato kerubisiek che boisietab laindet ne ng’om:" 
Exodus26:32 ak isonginine lumeiywek ang’wan che bo ketikab shita che kiliige tahabu, bo tahabu ireusiekwak, tonone lumeiywechoto kong’ik ang’wan che bo feda che kigibal." 
Exodus26:33 Ak isonginine anganato kapkelyenutab karik che kiname ngoroik ak iibu moinget ne bo baornatet inde got ne bo orit ne tilate anget: si kopcheiywok anganato ole tilil ak ole tilil mising’. 
Exodus26:34 Ak inde keruet ne bo rirenet moinget ne bo baornatet eng’ ole tilil mising’. 
Exodus26:35 Ak inde meset got ne sib kemong’jin, anget ne kigioiye got, ak inde keldab tait kotoorjin ak meset eng’ komostab murot ne bo tai eng’ got: ak inde meset ole tokyingei murot ne bo katam." 
Exodus26:36 Ak inab ngorioet ne kigere kurgetab emait, ne tuui ne nyalil, ak ne arus ne birir, ak ne birir, ak katanit ne kararan ne kigila, boisietab chito ne nabei kondoi lelesta." 
Exodus26:37 Ak iyachi ngorionoto lumeiywek mut che bo ketikab shita, ak iliige tahabu, ak bunjin tahabu ireusiekwak: ak itang’ji eng’ sugunwet kong’ik mut che kilolonda." 
Exodus27:1 Ak iyai kaptisisiet eng’ ketikab shita, ingoek koindo kakwautik mut che bo eut, ak tebeesindo kakwautik mut che bo eut; aechin komoswek tugul ang’wanu che bo kaptisisionoto: ak ingoek koindo ne bo tononennyi kakwautik somok che bo eut." 
Exodus27:2 Ak iyai isikyi kuinoikyik eng’ luukwekyik ang’wan: kitanyi kuinoichoto konomnyo ak kaptisisiet koek kiy agenge: ak iliige sugunwet. 
Exodus27:3 Ak itany terenikyik che kiibe orek, ak kechigosiekyik che eechen, ak tabokyik che mengechen ak karik che sogotin, ak tabokyik alak che kiibe mat: itany tugukyik tugul eng’ sugunonik:" 
Exodus27:4 ak iyachi sugunonik che kiregeri, ak inde sugunonichoto kagireger peteinik ang’wan eng’ luukwekyik ang’wan." 
Exodus27:5 Ak inde karnanato kagireger kapkelyenutab mireiywot ne yiemei kaptisisiet komosta ole bo kel, si komuurmuur kaptisisiet." 
Exodus27:6 Ak iyachi kaptisisiet ketik che kiibe, choto ko ketikab shita, ak iliige sugunwet." 
Exodus27:7 Ak kirooktoi ketichato peteinik, tebe ketichato komoswek aeng’ che bo kaptisisiet, si kobiit keibe." 
Exodus27:8 Itete baoinik koek moinget eng’ kaptisisionoto: ingoyai bik ko u ye kogiborun eng’ tulwet. 
Exodus27:9 Ak iyai seremut ne ng’otat ne bo got: ole tokyingei murot ne bo tai, kindoi ngoroik che u emait ne bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila ne yamei kakwautik bogol agenge che bo eut, ko u koindab seremut eng’ komosta agenge:" 
Exodus27:10 ak egu tiptem lumeiywek che bo sugunonik che keratyin ngoroichoto, ak kong’ikwak tiptem che bo sugunonik, che tononie; bo feda ireusiekab lumeiywek." 
Exodus27:11 Ak u noto agine eng’ komostab murot ne bo katam, eng’ koindo, king’ote ngoroik che u emait che yamei kakwautik bogol agenge che bo eut, ak egu tiptem lumeiywekwak che bo sugunonik, ak kong’ikwak tiptem che bo sugunonik, che tononie; bo feda ireusiekab lumeiywek koboto rateiywekwak che kituiye." 
Exodus27:12 Ak eng’ tebeesindab seremut eng’ komostab cherongo, ing’ote ngoroik che u emait, che yamei kakwautik konom che bo eut: egu taman lumeiywekwak, ak kong’ikwak taman che tononie." 
Exodus27:13 Ak ingoek kakwautik konom che bo eut tebeesindo ne bo seremut ne tokyingei kong’asis. 
Exodus27:14 Ak ingoek kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut ngoroik che u emait che bo komosta age: ak lumeiywekwak somok ak kong’ikwak somok che tononie. 
Exodus27:15 Ak ingoek che bo komosta age ngoroik che yamei kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut; ak lumeiywekwak somok, ak kong’ikwak somok che tononie." 
Exodus27:16 Ak ingoek ngoroik che bo ormarichet ne bo seremut kakwautik tiptem che bo eut, che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, ak katanit ne kararan ne kigila, boisietab chito ne nabei kondoi lelesta: ak ingoek lumeiywek ang’wan, ak kong’ikwak ang’wan che tononie." 
Exodus27:17 Bo feda rateiywek che keratote lumeiywek tugul che yiemei seremut; bo feda ireusiekwak, ak bo sugunonik kong’ikwak che tononie." 
Exodus27:18 Ingoek koindab seremut kakwautik bogol che bo eut, ak ingoek tebeesindo kakwautik konom komosta age tugul, ak ingoek tononet kakwautik mut che bo eut, che bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila, ak ingobunji sugunonik kong’ik che tononie." 
Exodus27:19 Ingobunji sugunonik tuguk tugul che keboisie eng’ boisietab got, ak tigongenikyik tugul, ak tigongenik tugul che bo seremut." 
Exodus27:20 Ak ing’at lagokab Israel, koibun mwaita ne tilil ne bo emitik ne kigitui si kobunji kit ne ikweng’sei, si kobiit kolal tait kotugul." 
Exodus27:21 Ingochobei Aron ak werikyik lapkeiyonoto eng’ taitab Jehovah kong’eete lagat agoi karon, eng’ emait ne kituiyechin eng’ ole sib kemong’jin eng’ anget ne iyoitos got, ne mi tai eng’ baornatet: egu ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ ibinwekwak tugul agobo lagokab Israel." 
Exodus28:1 Ak imutu Aron ng’etab komet konyo ole ami, koboto werikyik, kobwa eng’ ole mi lagokab Israel, si kobiit koboisiewa eng’ boisietab tiseinatet, icheget ko Aron, Nadab, ak Abiu, Eleasar, ak Itamar, choto werikab Aron." 
Exodus28:2 Ak inapchi Aron ng’etab komet ngoroik che itabanotin che bo teegisto ak kororonindo. 
Exodus28:3 Ak ing’alalji tugul che tinyei muguleldo ne bo kaguiyet, che kianyiit tamirmirietab ng’omnatet, si konab ngoroik che bo Aron si kobiit kitaban inendet koboisiewa eng’ boisietab tiseinatet." 
Exodus28:4 Chu ngoroik che nabei ichek: ngoriet ne kilaakyin teget, ak epod, ak ngoriet ne koi, ak age ne koi mising’ ne kigilelesonji, ak nariet, ak birenet; ak konapchi Aron ng’etab komet ak werikyik ngoroik che itabanotin, si koboisiewa eng’ boisietab tiseinatet." 
Exodus28:5 Ak ingoib ichek tahabu, ak che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, ak katanit ne kararan ne kigila." 
Exodus28:6 Ak ingoyai ichek epok eng’ tahabu, ak eng’ che tuuen ne nyalil ak eng’ che arusen ne birir, ak eng’ che biriren, ak eng’ katanit ne kararan ne kigila, boisietab nabindet ne ng’om." 
Exodus28:7 Tinyei eng’ tigigoik kebeberwek che ituitos ngoroichoto tuwai koek ngoriet agenge. 
Exodus28:8 Ak kiginab birenet eng’ ng’omnatet kituiyo kogergeit ak epok si kerategei; kinabe tahabu, ak che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, ak katanit ne kararan ne kigila." 
Exodus28:9 Nam koik aeng’ che kiguure soam, ak iwachi eng’ siret kainaikab lagokab Israel;" 
Exodus28:10 sirji koita age kainaik lo, ak kainaik lo che kang’et, isirji koita age, ko u ortinwekwak." 
Exodus28:11 Sirji koichato aeng’ kainaikab lagokab Israel, eng’ boisietab waindetab koik, ko u waet ne bo ng’okset, ak inde koichato tahabu che kigitogul konam koik." 
Exodus28:12 Ak inde koichato aeng’ tigigoikab epod si koek koichato kabwatet agobo lagokab Israel: si koibot Aron kainaikwak eng’ tigigoikyik aeng’, eng’ taitab Jehovah, koek kabwatet." 
Exodus28:13 Ak iyai tuguk che togulotin eng’ tahabu: 
Exodus28:14 ak sirimoik aeng’ che bo tahabu che tililen; ilet koigei rogoonik: ak iratyi sirimwechoto kagilet tuguchoto togulotin. 
Exodus28:15 Ak inab ngorionoto bo teget ne bo kiruoget, boisietab nabindet ne ng’om; inabe kogergeit ak epok; eng’ tahabu, ak eng’ ne tuui ne nyalil, ak eng’ ne arus ne birir, ak eng’ ne birir, ak eng’ katanit ne kararan ne kigila. Inabe ko u noto." 
Exodus28:16 Ingoaechin koindo ak tebeesindo ko kagiliich: ingoek kakwautiennyi olobo inchisiek sogol eng’ koindo ak eng’ tebeesindo. 
Exodus28:17 Ak inde ngorionoto koik che tetotin eng’ ortinwekwak ang’wan: inde oret ne bo tai sardio, tapasio ak bareqet;" 
Exodus28:18 ak inde oret ne bo aeng’ sumaragdo, sapire ak yaholom;" 
Exodus28:19 ak inde oret ne bo somok huakinto, sebu ak ametusto;" 
Exodus28:20 ak inde oret ne bo ang’wan berulo, soam, ak jasipi: kitetyin koichato kelongonikab tahabu." 
Exodus28:21 Egu koichato taman ak aeng’ ko u kainaikab lagokab Israel; bendi ko u kainaikwak; ko u ye kiwaei ng’okset, tinyei koita age tugul kainennyi, bee ortinwek taman ak aeng’." 
Exodus28:22 Ak inapchi ngorionoto bo teget sirimwek che u rogoonik che bo tahabu che tililen, che kigilet." 
Exodus28:23 Ak inapchi ngorionoto bo teget peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu, ak inde peteinichoto aeng’ tabanwekab luukwek aeng’ che bo ngorionoto bo teget." 
Exodus28:24 Ak inde sirimwechoto aeng’ bo tahabu che kigilet, eng’ peteinik aeng’ che mi tabanwek aeng’ che bo ngorionoto bo teget." 
Exodus28:25 Ak inam komoswechun alak aeng’ che bo sirimwechoto aeng’ kigilet, irooch kelongonik aeng’ che kigitogul, yeityo ituiye ak epod eng’ komostab tigigoik ole tabanu tai." 
Exodus28:26 Ak ichob peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu, yeityo inapchji ngorionoto bo teget eng’ komostab luukwek aeng’, eng’ tabanwekyik, che tabanu komostab orit eng’ epod kel." 
Exodus28:27 Ak ichob peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu, inapchi tuguchoto tigigoikab ngorionoto kiguure epod eng’ komostab kapkelyen ole tabanu tai, eng’ ole negite ye kigituiye, eng’ baragutab birenonoto bo epod, ne kiginab eng’ ng’omnatet." 
Exodus28:28 Ak kogiich ichek ngorietab teget eng’ peteinikyik, koratyin ak peteinikab epod, korate rogoet ne tuui ne nyalil, si kotebe baragutab birenet ne bo epod, ne kigila eng’ ng’omnatet, si mabesio ngorietab teget ak epod;" 
Exodus28:29 si koibei Aron kainaikab lagokab Israel eng’ ngorionoto bo teget ne bo kiruoget eng’ muguleldanyi, ye mandoi ole tilil, koek kabwatet eng’ taitab Jehovah kotugul." 
Exodus28:30 Ak inde ngorionoto bo teget ne bo kiruoget Urim ak Tumim; ak kotebe choto muguleldab Aron, ye mandoi taitab Jehovah; ak koibei Aron kiruogetab lagokab Israel eng’ muguleldanyi eng’ taitab Jehovah kotugul." 
Exodus28:31 Ak inab ngoriet ne kiroochigei, ne bo epod, ne kigisal konyalilit ne ais kityo." 
Exodus28:32 Ak inab ole kirooktoi metit eng’ kwenunnyi: ak igurman kaatit ko u boisietab laindet, ko u ye kichobei ngoroikab luget, si magerer." 
Exodus28:33 Ak inapchi ngorionoto tabandab kel logoek che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, koyiem tabandab kapkelyen tugul; ak itilate chepchingilokab tahabu kot kotuiyo:" 
Exodus28:34 indoi twolyot ne bo tahabu, yeityo inde logoiyandanato korupgei, ak itilate ko u noto korubatgei agoi, eng’ tabandab ngoriet komugul." 
Exodus28:35 Ak ingolaach Aron si koboisie: ak kegas cheetab chepchingilichoto ye wendi ole tilil eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak ye mong’u, si mame." 
Exodus28:36 Ak itany tahabu che tililen kolebelitu, kogergeit ek eurto, ak iwai eng’ baragunywa waet ne u ne bo ng’okset, ile, TILIL ENG’ JEHOVAH." 
Exodus28:37 Ak iratyi rogoet ne tuui ne nyalil, si kotebe nariet chepkulet; ak kotebe nariet ole bo togoch." 
Exodus28:38 Ak kotebe togetab Aron, ak koibot Aron tengektab tuguk che tililen, che itabani lagokab Israel eng’ kagochinoikwak tugul che tililen; ak kotebe noto togetab Aron kotugul, si kobiit kochamogis eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Exodus28:39 Ak inab ngoriet ne koi eng’ katanit ne kararan, ak inab nariet ne bo katanit ne kararan, ak inab birenet, boisietab chito ne nabei kondoi lelesta." 
Exodus28:40 Ak inapchi werikab Aron ngoroik che koen, ak birenaik, ak chepkuloik che mengechen che bo teegisto ak kororindo." 
Exodus28:41 Ak ilaakyi ng’etab komet Aron tuguchoto, ak werikyik agichek; ak iil, ak itororji ichek boisietab tililindo, itaban, si kobiit koboisiewa eng’ boisietab tiseinatet." 
Exodus28:42 Ak inapchi sirualisiek che bo katanit si kobiit kotuge ach ngorinywa; che ng’eete suet agoi kubesoik. 
Exodus28:43 Ak kolaach ichek tuguchoto, Aron ak werikyik, si kobendi emaitab tuiyet, anan ye rikyin kapkorosut si kobiit kobois eng’ ole tilil si manam ichek tengekto, ak kobek: egu nito ng’atutiet eng’ inendet ak eng’ iyotennyi ne biitu let." 
Exodus29:1 Ni kit ne iyachini ichek ianyinyi, si kobiit koboisiewa eng’ boisietab tiseinatet: nam kirgit agenge ne neran ak mengichik aeng’ che libwoben," 
Exodus29:2 koboto makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ak makatinik che mengechen che kigikwang’da mwaiita, ak makatinik che terteren che kigiile mwaita: ichobe busiek che tambulul che bo nganok." 
Exodus29:3 Ak inde aterut agenge, ak ibune aterunoto, koboto kirgit ak mengichichoto aeng’." 
Exodus29:4 Ak imutu Aron ak werikyik kobwa kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, ak iun ichek eng’ beek." 
Exodus29:5 Ak inam ngoroik, ak ilaakyi Aron ngoriet ne koi, ak ngoriet ne bo epod, ak epod, ak ngorietab teget, ak igermen eng’ birenet ne bo epod, ne kiginab eng’ ng’omnatet:" 
Exodus29:6 ak igerjine metinnyi nariet, ak iratyi kioto tilil ne bo tahabu, ne kergei ak eurto, baragutab nariet." 
Exodus29:7 Yeityo inam mwaita ne kiilse, ak irong’ji metinnyi ak iil inendet." 
Exodus29:8 Ak imutu werikyik agichek, ak ilaakyi ngoroik che koen." 
Exodus29:9 Ak igermen eng’ birenaik, Aron ak werikyik, ak igerji metowekwak eng’ chepkuloik che mengechen: ak konam boisionoto bo tiseinatet eng’ ng’atutiet ne bo agoi: ak itororji Aron ak werikyik boisionoto bo tililindo." 
Exodus29:10 Ak igetu kirgit konyo taitab emait ne kituiyechin: ak kogonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab kirgoto. 
Exodus29:11 Yeityo ieny kirgoto eng’ taitab Jehovah, eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Exodus29:12 Ak itaach korotikab kirgoto, ak iile korotik kuinoikab kaptisisiet eng’ morneng’ung’: ak irong’ji korotichoto tugul kaptisisiet kel." 
Exodus29:13 Ak ibut mwanik tugul che kiilaach moet, ak kwambeleliet ne tuchei koet, ak soromok tuwai, ak mwanik che mi soromochoto, ak ibeel choto eng’ kaptisisiet." 
Exodus29:14 Ago beel eng’ mat banyekab kirgoto, ak muitanyi, ak eiyandennyi, eng’ sang’utab nganaset: noto kagochinet ne bo tengekto." 
Exodus29:15 Ak inam mengit agenge agine: ak kogonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab mengoto. 
Exodus29:16 Ak ieny mengit, ak itaach korotikyik, ak iisote kaptisisiet." 
Exodus29:17 Ak itonaton banyekab mengoto, ak iun tugukab ke tugul, ak kelyekyik, ak ituiye ak banyechato kagetonaton, koboto metinnyi." 
Exodus29:18 Ak ibeel mengoto komugul eng’ kaptisisiet: nito ko kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo Jehovah: nyamdutiet ne anyiny, kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat." 
Exodus29:19 Ak inam mengit ne bo aeng’; si kogonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab mengoto. 
Exodus29:20 Yeityo anyun ieny mengoto, ak itaach korotikyik, ak iile walitab itit ne bo tai ne bo Aron, ak eng’ walisiekab itik che bo tai che bo werikyik, ak eng’ morik che eechen che bo eunekwak che bo tai, ak eng’ morik che eechen che bo kelyekwak che bo tai, ak iisote korotichoto kaptisisiet komoswek tugul." 
Exodus29:21 Ak inam korotik che mi kaptisisiet barak, ak mwaita ne kiilse, ak iise Aron, ak ngoroikyik, ak werikyik, ak ngoroikab werikyik che mi koboto inendet: ak kitaban inendet, ak ngoroikyik, ak werikyik, ak ngoroikab werikyik che mi koboto inendet." 
Exodus29:22 Ak inemu mwanikab mengit, ak saruriet, ak mwanik che kiilaach moet, ak kwambeleliet ne bo koet, ak soromok tuwai, koboto sunetikwak, ak kubesto ne bo tai; amu nito ko mengit ne bo boisietab katabanet:" 
Exodus29:23 ak makatiat agenge komugul, ak makatiat ne ming’in ne kagiile mwaita, ak makatiat agenge ne terter, che mi aterut ole mi makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ne mi taitab Jehovah:" 
Exodus29:24 ak inde choto tugul eunekab Aron, ak eunekab werikyik; ak iongoi inye koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Exodus29:25 Icheru tuguchoto eng’ eunekwak, ak ibeel eng’ kaptisisiet eng’ baragutab kagochinet ne kibeelei, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ taitab Jehovah: noto kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat." 
Exodus29:26 Ak iib tagatet ne bo mengitab boisiet ne bo katabanet ne bo Aron, ak iongoi koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah si koek noto kebebertang’ung’." 
Exodus29:27 Ak itaban tagatet ne bo kagochinet ne kiongoi, ak kubesto ne bo kagochinet ne kinamjin barak, ne kiongoi, ak ne kinamjin barak, che bo mengoto bo boisietab katabanet, agot noto bo Aron, ak ne bo werikyik:" 
Exodus29:28 ak kobunji choto Aron ak werikyik koek ng’atutiet ne bo agoi eng’ lagokab Israel: amu kagochinet ne kinamjin barak: ak koek noto kagochinet ne kinamjin barak ne bunu lagokab Israel eng’ tiseiywekab kagochinoikwak che bo kalyet, agot kagochinenywa ne kinamjin barak ne bo Jehovah." 
Exodus29:29 Ak tun bunjin werikyik ngoroichoto itabanotin che bo Aron, ilaachi si kiili, ak kinde boisionoto tilil." 
Exodus29:30 Ak tun ilaachi ngoroichoto betusiek tisab, weroto ne tun namjin inendet boisietab tiseinatet, ye mandoi emait ne kituiyechin si koboisiei eng’ ole tilil." 
Exodus29:31 Ak inam mengit ne bo boisietab katabanet, si iyo banyekyik eng’ ole kigitilil." 
Exodus29:32 Ak koam Aron ak werikyik banyekab mengoto, ak makatinik che mi aterut, eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Exodus29:33 Ak koam tuguchoto che kiyae kagaigaet, ak kinde boisietab tililindo, ak kitaban ichek: ago amat koam toondet, amu tililen tuguchoto." 
Exodus29:34 Ak ngo ng’et banyek che bo noto kigitabanji boisietab katabanet, anan eng’ makatinik, ak ngo tebi kot koeech, ibeel anyun eng’ ma tugul che kong’et: amat keam, amu tililen." 
Exodus29:35 Yachi Aron anyun ko u noto, ak werikyik ko u tugul che kang’atin: inde ichek boisionoto tilil eng’ betusiek tisab." 
Exodus29:36 Ak igoitoi inye betut age tugul kirgit ne neran ne bo kagochinet ne bo tengekto kobunji kagaigaet: ak ianyiny kaptisisiet, ye iyachini kagaigaet agobo inendet; ak iil, itabani." 
Exodus29:37 Iyae kagaigaet agobo kaptisisiet eng’ betusiek tisab, ak itilil: si kotililit kaptisisiet mising’; ak kanyol kotililit kiy age tugul ne twaei kaptisisiet." 
Exodus29:38 Chu che igoitoi eng’ kaptisisio; igoitoi betut age tugul arek aeng’ che bo kechir che masiirei kenyit agenge, koek kit ne bo agoi." 
Exodus29:39 Igoite aruet age karon; ak igoite aruet ne bo aeng’ koskoleny: 
Exodus29:40 ak itesyi aruet age kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo epah ne bo busiek che tambulul che kagiburukto kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin ne bo mwaita ne biitune tuisiet, ak kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin ne bo divaik koek kagochinet ne kirong’u." 
Exodus29:41 Ak igoite aruet age koskoleny, ak iyachi ko u kagochinetab busiek ne bo karon, ak ko u kagochinennyi ne kirong’u, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny, kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah ne bunei mat." 
Exodus29:42 Egu noto kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul eng’ ibinwekwok tugul eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin eng’ taitab Jehovah: eng’ ole kituiyechini ak inye, si ang’alalun eng’ oloto." 
Exodus29:43 Ak kituiyechini yoto ak lagokab Israel; ak itilili torornatennyu yoto.
