Exodus29:44 Ak atilil emait ne kituiyechin, ak kaptisisiet: atabani Aron ak werikyik agichek, si koboisiewa eng’ boisietab tiseinatet." 
Exodus29:45 Ak ameny kwenutab lagokab Israel, ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa." 
Exodus29:46 Ak konai kole a Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ne kiamoong’u eng’ emetab Misri, si kobiit ameny kwenunywa: A Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa." 
Exodus30:1 Ak iyai kapkorosut ole kebeele nyamdutik: yae ketikab shita. 
Exodus30:2 Ingoek koindanyi kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut, ak tebeesindanyi kakwautiet agenge; ingoaechin koindo ak tebeesindo: ak ingoek koindab tononennyi kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut: namegei kapkorosut ak kuinoikyik koegu kit agenge." 
Exodus30:3 Ak iliige tahabu che tililen baragunnyi, ak komoswekyik tugul ak kuinoikyik; ak itany tegeleiywotab tahabu iyieme." 
Exodus30:4 Ak itany peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu, ak inde tuguchoto kotaban tegeleiywot kel, eng’ teget ne bo komosi ak ne bo komosi, iyachi komoswek tuwai, si koek ole kiroochi ketik che kiibe." 
Exodus30:5 Ak iyai ketichato kiibe eng’ ketikab shita, ak iliige tahabu." 
Exodus30:6 Ak inde kapkorosunoto taitab anget ne ioitos got, ye negite moingetab baornatet, ne mitei taitab keruet ne bo rirenet ne mi baragutab baornatet, ole kituiyechini ak inye." 
Exodus30:7 Ak beelei Aron nyamdutik che bo tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny eng’ oloto: karonet age tugul ye chobei taisiek. 
Exodus30:8 Ak beelei Aron ye inaami taisiek koskoleny, koek nyamdutiet ne kibeelei eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ ibinwekwok tugul." 
Exodus30:9 Amobeele oloto nyamdutik che ter, anan tiseiywek che kibeelei anan che bo busiek; amorong’ji kagochinoik alak tugul che kirong’u." 
Exodus30:10 Ak koyai Aron kagaigaet eng’ kuinoikab kaptisisionoto konyil agenge eng’ kenyit age tugul: koyai kagaigaet eng’ korotikab kagochinetab tengekto ne bo kagaigaet konyil agenge eng’ kenyit age tugul eng’ ibinwekwok tugul: tilil noto mising’ eng’ taitab Jehovah. 
Exodus30:11 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Exodus30:12 Ye iit lagokab Israel, ko u che biitu eng’ koitetab bichoto, eng’ yoto anyun kogochi chi tugul Jehovah kit ne itiage sobondanyi, ye iit ichek; si mabiit koroito eng’ kwenunywa, ye iiti ichek." 
Exodus30:13 Chu che konu ichek, konu chi age tugul kebebertab sekel ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil, ye siirtoi kowendi ole mi che kagiit: (yamei sekel agenge gerahisiek tiptem:) egu kebebertab sekel kagochinet ne bunjin Jehovah." 
Exodus30:14 Igochin chi age tugul Jehovah kagochinet, ne siirtoi kowendi ole mi che kagiit, che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak che siirei choto." 
Exodus30:15 Magonu magoriot che siirei choto, ak maichuchuchi kibananok, konu tugul kebebertab sekel, ye igochin Jehovah kagochinet, si oyai kagaigaet ne bo sobonwekwok." 
Exodus30:16 Ak itaach feda che bo kagaigaet eng’ lagokab Israel, ak igoite kobunji boisietab emaitab tuiyet; si koek kabwatet agobo lagokab Israel eng’ taitab Jehovah, si koyai kagaigaet agobo sobonwekwok." 
Exodus30:17 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Exodus30:18 Yai tabet agine ne bo sugunwet, ak iyae sugunwet ng’echerennyi, si kiunse: ak inde kwenutab emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisiet, ak irong’ji beek." 
Exodus30:19 Si koune Aron ak werikyik eunekwak ak kelyekwak: 
Exodus30:20 iunegei ichek ye mandoi emait ne kituiyechin, si mabek; anan ye rikyin kaptisisiet si kobois, si kobeel kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah, kobunei mat:" 
Exodus30:21 iuni anyun eunekwak ak kelyekwak, si mabek: ak koek ng’atutiet ne bo agoi eng’ ichek, eng’ inendet ak eng’ iyotennyi eng’ ibinwekwak tugul." 
Exodus30:22 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kogeny, kolenji," 
Exodus30:23 Inemunote tuguk che miachen kosiir, tuguk che u igomoik, kumiat ne yamei sekelisiek bogol mut, ak kinamon che anyiny che yamei kebebertab choto, agot sekelisiek bogol aeng’ ak konom, ak kalamus che anyiny, sekelisiek bogol aeng’ ak konom," 
Exodus30:24 ak che bo kasia che yamei bogol mut, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil, ak mwaitab emitik ne yamei hin:" 
Exodus30:25 ak ichob tuguchoto koburugogis koek mwaita ne tilil ne kiilse, ne ng’uu ne anyiny, ne boisietab ng’omotiot ne buruchi tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny: egu mwaita ne tilil ne kiilse." 
Exodus30:26 Ak iil emait ne kituiyechin eng’ mwaita, ak moinget ne bo baornatet," 
Exodus30:27 ak meset ak tugukyik tugul, ak keldab tait ak tugukyik, ak kapkorosut ne kibeele nyamdutik," 
Exodus30:28 ak kaptisisiet ne kibeele tiseiywek ak tugukyik tugul, ak tabet ak kelunnyi." 
Exodus30:29 Ak itaban tuguchoto, si kotililitu mising’: ak kanyol kotililit age tugul ne twaei tuguchoto." 
Exodus30:30 Ak iil Aron ak werikyik, ak ianyiny, si koboisiewa eng’ boisietab tiseinatet." 
Exodus30:31 Ak ing’alalji lagokab Israel ilenji, Egu mwai eng’ ane ne tilil ne kiilse, eng’ ibinwekwok tugul." 
Exodus30:32 Magirong’jin bortab chi mwai, amoyai age ne u nito, ne kichobei ko u nito; amu tilil nito, ak egu ne tilil eng’ okwek." 
Exodus30:33 Chi age tugul ne buruchi mwai age tugul koigei nito, anan chi age tugul ne iile mwaiita toondet, king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik." 
Exodus30:34 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Inemunote tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, natap, sekelet, kelbena; tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny koboto tuguk che nyamdut che tililen: ingoaechin tugul eng’ karogendoet agenge." 
Exodus30:35 Ak iyai eng’ choto nyamdutik, tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, ne boisietab ng’omnatet ne buruchi tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, che kitestoi munyuk, che tililen, che kigitaban:" 
Exodus30:36 ak itui alak eng’ choto komengegitu, ak inde choto taitab baornatet eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, ole kituiyechini ak inye: egu ne tilil mising’ eng’ okwek." 
Exodus30:37 Amat oyachigei nyamdutik alak tugul che kergei ak chuto kichobei: egu ne tilil eng’ inye ne bo Jehovah. 
Exodus30:38 Ngo yai chi age tugul alak che u choto, kole kogas ng’uunennyi, king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik." 
Exodus31:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Exodus31:2 Keero, kiaguur Besalel, amwa kainennyi, weritab Uri, weritab Hur, ne bo oretab Juda:" 
Exodus31:3 ak kaanyiit inendet Tamirmiriet ne bo Kamuktaindet, ak ng’omnatet, ak kaguiyet ak naet, konai ole teptoi boisiet age tugul ne bo musoknatet," 
Exodus31:4 ak kobwat ole yaitoi boisionikab musoknatet si koboisie tahabu, ak feda, ak sugunonik," 
Exodus31:5 ak kowai koik che kitetyin kelongonik, ak koyai ketik, ak koyai boisiet age tugul ne bo musoknatet." 
Exodus31:6 Keero, kaalewen ane Oholiab koboto inendet, weritab Aisamak, ne bo oretab Dan; ak kaande ng’omnatet mugulelwekab tugul che tinyei kaguiyet, si kobiit koyai tugul che kaang’atin:" 
Exodus31:7 emait ne kituiyechin, ak moingetab baornatet, ak keruet ne bo rirenet ne mi baragunnyi, ak tuguk tugul che mi Emainato;" 
Exodus31:8 ak meset ak tugukyik, ak keldo ne tilil ne bo tait, ak tugukyik tugul ak kapkorosut ne kibeele nyamdutik;" 
Exodus31:9 ak kaptisisiet ne bo tiseiywek che kibeelei ak tugukyik tugul, ak tabet koboto ng’echerennyi ne tabe;" 
Exodus31:10 ak ngoroik che kisalei kogororonitu, ak ngoroik che itabanotin che bo Aron tisiindet, ak ngoroikab werikyik, si koboisie eng’ boisietab tiseinatet;" 
Exodus31:11 ak mwaita ne kiilse, ak nyamdutikab tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny che bo ole tilil: yaei ichek ko u tugul che kaang’atin." 
Exodus31:12 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Exodus31:13 Ng’alalji lagokab Israel, ilenji, Orib sabatosiekyuk komie: amu noto kaborunet eng’ kwenunnyo, ane ak inye, eng’ ibinwekwok tugul; si kobiit onai ole a Jehovah ne atabanok." 
Exodus31:14 Noto anyun orib sabato; amu itabanat eng’ okwek: kibarei iman age tugul ne imuruoni: amu king’etoi eng’ bikyik chi age tugul ne yaei boisiet age tugul eng’ betunoto. 
Exodus31:15 Kiyaei boisiet betusiek lo; ago betutab tisab ko sabato ne bo kamuung’et ne tilil, ne itabanat eng’ Jehovah: kibarei iman chi age tugul ne yaei boisiet age tugul eng’ betutab sabato." 
Exodus31:16 Eng’ noto anyun, kanyol korib lagokab Israel sabato, kotaban sabato eng’ ibinwekwak tugul, koek arorutiet ne bo koigeny." 
Exodus31:17 Kaborunet nito eng’ kwenunnyu ak lagokab Israel ne bo agoi: amu kiyai Jehovah kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony eng’ betusiek lo, ak kiimuuny eng’ betut ne bo tisab, kotalbis." 
Exodus31:18 Ak ye kingo kagoges Jehovah ng’alalet ne king’alali ak Musa eng’ tulwetab Sinai, kogochi Musa koik aeng’ che lebelen che bo baornatet, che kigisire mornetab Kamuktaindet." 
Exodus32:1 Ak ye kingogeer bik kole kagogagei Musa eng’ tulwet, ama chorgei, kotuiyechi bik ole mi Aron, ak kilenji, Ng’eet, yaiywech kanamonik, che bendi kondoi eng’ achek; amu magingen kit ne kinyor Musa-inito, chichoto kiimutwech kemong’une emetab Misri." 
Exodus32:2 Ak kilenji Aron bichoto, Ocherune munaokab tahabu osotikwok, ak werikwok, ak tibikwok che tinyei eng’ itik, ak oibwa." 
Exodus32:3 Ak kiicher bik tugul anyun munaok tugul che bo tahabu che kimi itikwak, ak koipchi Aron." 
Exodus32:4 Ak kitaach tuguchoto kobunu eunekwak, ak kichob eng’ karnet ne kiboisie, ak kiitany kanamwet ne bo moita ye kingo kagobeel kochootyo; ak kole, Kanamoniguk chu, inye Israel, che kiimutun imong’une emetab Misri." 
Exodus32:5 Ak ye kingogeer Aron kioto, koteech kaptisisiet eng’ taitab kanamwonoto; ak kimwaita Aron kole, Egu igorta ne o mutai eng’ Jehovah." 
Exodus32:6 Ak king’eetyo karon mising’ eng’ betut ne kiisubi betunoto, ak kiigoito kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak kiib kagochinoikab kalyet; ak kiteb ng’ony bik koamis ak koeeiso, ak kong’eetyo kourerenso." 
Exodus32:7 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji, Ui, chortegei; amu kagong’emgei biguk che kiimutu komong’une emetab Misri:" 
Exodus32:8 kosib komasta kometo oret ne kiga ang’atyi: kagoyachigei kanamwet ne bo moita ne kigitany, ak kogutung’ji, ak kagoeng’ji tiseiywek, ak kolen, Kanamoniguk chu, inye Israel, che kiimutun imong’une emetab Misri." 
Exodus32:9 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Koageer ale, uui kaat bichu:" 
Exodus32:10 bagakta anyun, si kolalyo neregekyuk agobo ichek, si kobiit awong’ ichek: ak ayain iegu bororiet ne o." 
Exodus32:11 Ak kiigaigai Musa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, kolenji, Bwa Jehovah, amu nee si kolalyo neregeguk agobo biguk, che kiimutu komong’une emetab Misri eng’ kimnatet ne o ak eng’ eut ne kim?" 
Exodus32:12 Amu nee si komwa tun Misrik kole, Kiga imutyin ichek yaitiet kole si kobar ichek eng’ tulonok, ak kowong’ kobetyo eng’ ng’ony? Ketite neregeguk che laldos, ak iwal kii ya koistoegei biguk." 
Exodus32:13 Ibwat Abraham, Isak, ak Israel, otwogiguk, che kiiyosiechi inyege, ilenji, Abaroi iyoteng’wong’ kotenit kecheikab kipsengwetisiek, ak agochini iyoteng’wong’ emoni komugul ne kiamwawok, ak kobunji ichek koigeny." 
Exodus32:14 Ak kiwal Jehovah kabwatutikyik agobo yaitionoto kiga mwa kole yachjin bikyik. 
Exodus32:15 Ak kiweigei Musa, kochortagei eng’ tulwet, koibe eunnyi koik aeng’ che lebelen che bo baornatet; ki sirotin koichato komoswek tuwai; kiga kisir komosi ak komosi." 
Exodus32:16 Ak ki boisietab Kamuktaindet koichato, ak sirutichoto ko ki sirutikab Kamuktaindet, che kiga kisir kewai eng’ koichato." 
Exodus32:17 Ak ye kingogas Josua bolatetab bik kowaaktos, kolenji Musa, Mi bolatetab boriet nganaset." 
Exodus32:18 Ak kile, Ma bo kutinato icheget che boldos amu kagoterteris, ama bo che boldos amu kagiterter: ago bo bolatonoto agase icheget che tiendos." 
Exodus32:19 Ak ye kingo kagorik nganaset, kogeer kanamwetab moita ak ureriet: ak kilalyo neregekab Musa, ak kowirta koichato eng’ eunekyik, ak kitui eng’ tulwet kel." 
Exodus32:20 Ak kinam kanamwonoto bo moita ne kiga kotany, ak kobeel eng’ ma, ak kong’a koek busio, ak koseerji beek barak, ak kobirji lagokab Israel koee." 
Exodus32:21 Ak kilenji Musa Aron, Nee ne kiyaun bichu, kot iipchi ichek tengegi o?" 
Exodus32:22 Ak kile Aron, Amat kolalyo neregekab kiptaiyandennyu: ingen inye bichu, ile kigotokyigei yaitiet." 
Exodus32:23 Amu kilenja, Yaiywech kanamonik, che bendi kondoenech: amu Musa-inito, chito ne kiimutwech kemong’une emetab Misri, ko magingen kit ne kinyor." 
Exodus32:24 Ak kialenji, Ingocher chi age tugul tahabu che tinyei, ak kogona: ak kiawirji ma, ak kimong’ moi." 
Exodus32:25 Ak ye kingogeer Musa kole kabistoe bik; amu kiigochi Aron kobistoe si koek che kirenyei eng’ kwenutab bunikwak," 
Exodus32:26 kotonon anyun Musa eng’ ormarichetab nganaset, ak kole, Ingonyo age tugul oli ne mi komostab Jehovah." 
Exodus32:27 Ak kilenji ichek, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo Israel, kole, Ingorat chi age tugul rotwennyi bo chok, ak ingwo chi tugul komosi ak komosi kobun kwenutab kurget age agoi kurget age, eng’ nganaset komugul, ak kobar chi tugul ne tupcho, ak kobar chi tugul ne choruennyi, ak chitab kokwennyi." 
Exodus32:28 Ak kiyai werikab gab Lawi ko u ng’olyotab Musa: ak kibek bik betunoto che itei elfusiek somok. 
Exodus32:29 Ak kile Musa, Otabanjigei Jehovah rani, ee, agot chi tugul ne manamegei ak werinnyi, anan ne tupcho; si kogonok inendet berurto rani." 
Exodus32:30 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi betunoto, kolenji Musa bik, Kioyai tengekto ne o: katogoste anyun nguno awe ole mi Jehovah: tamangab ayai kagaigaet agobo tengektang’wong’." 
Exodus32:31 Ak kiweekyigei Musa Jehovah, ak kolenji, Bwa, kiyai bichu tengekto ne o mising’, ak kigoyachigei kanamwet ne bo tahabu." 
Exodus32:32 Ago nguno, ngicham inyochi kaat tengektanywa; ak ngo ma u noto asomin ale, iistaa eng’ bukuing’ung’ ne kiisir." 
Exodus32:33 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Aistoi eng’ bukuinnyu age tugul ne kigoyaiywa tengekto." 
Exodus32:34 Ui anyun, nguno, indochi bik koba kot koit ole kiamwaun: keero, indoun malaikaiyandennyu: agot nganda u noto, ko eng’ betut ne aruokyini, aruokyini amu tengektanywa." 
Exodus32:35 Ak kibir Jehovah bik, amu kiyai kanamwetab moita, ne kiyai Aron." 
Exodus33:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Oba, otogoste eng’ oli, inye ak bik che kiimutu komong’une emetab Misri, agoi oit emet ne kiayosiechi Abraham, Isak ak Jakobo, alenji, Agochini iyoteng’ung’." 
Exodus33:2 Ak ayokte malaikaiyat kondoun; ak aon komanda Kananik, Amorik, Hitik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik," 
Exodus33:3 agoi emonoto ne nyiitat chego ak kumik: amu matogostoi koboten; amu o bik che uuen kaat: si mabarak owong’uge eng’ oret. 
Exodus33:4 Ak ye kingogas bik ng’alechato yaachen, koririo: ak kima ilaach chi tugukab lele." 
Exodus33:5 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, O bik che uuen kaat: ngot awe atogoste kobotok ne matia, abarok ageswok: ara anyun oreegu tugukwok che bo lele, si kobiit ageer kit ne aitoin." 
Exodus33:6 Ak kiireek lagokab Israel tugukwak tugul che bo lele kong’eete tulwetab Horeb ak kwo tai. 
Exodus33:7 Ak kicham koibei Musa emait kwo koteech sang’utab nganaset, eng’ ye loo; ak kiguure emainato Emait ne kituiyechin. Ak chi age tugul ne kichamei kocheng’ Jehovah ko kiwendi emainato kituiyechin, ne kimi sang’utab nganaset." 
Exodus33:8 Ak ye kingomanda Musa kwo ole mi Emait, kong’eetyo bik tugul kotononso, chi age tugul eng’ kurgetab emainnyi, kogeeroti Musa, kowendi agoi komanda Emainato." 
Exodus33:9 Ak ye kingomanda Musa Emainato, kochorgei boldet, konyo kotonone kurgetab Emait: ak kong’alal Jehovah ak Musa." 
Exodus33:10 Ak kigeer bik tugul toloata bo boldet kotonone kurgetab Emait: ak king’eetyo bik tugul kong’urukso, chi age tugul eng’ kurgetab emainnyi." 
Exodus33:11 Ak king’alaljin Jehovah ak Musa kimni, ko u ye ng’alaljindos chi ak choruennyi. Ak kiweek kogeny kwo nganaset: ago mawo eng’ Emainato Josua kiboitiondennyi, weritab Nun, ne neran." 
Exodus33:12 Ak kilenji Musa Jehovah, Keero, kemwawa, ilenja, Imut bichu kotogosta: ak tum imwawa chito ne iyoktoi kebe tuwai. Ago kaimwa ile, Angen kaineng’ung’, ak kaimwa kogeny, ile, Kainyoru chamet eng’ tainnyi." 
Exodus33:13 Ara anyun, asomin ale, ngo kaanyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’ iman, iborua nguno ortinweguk, si kobiit anain, si kobiit anyor chamet eng’ taing’ung’: ak ibwat inye ile bororioni ko biguk." 
Exodus33:14 Ak kile, Kibendi tuwai, ak agonin kamuung’et." 
Exodus33:15 Ak kilenji, Ngo magibendi tuwai, ko memutech kebe eng’ oli." 
Exodus33:16 Amu kinae nee nguno kele, kaanyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’, ak biguk? Tos ma amu kibendi tugul ak inye, si kobiit kitabangei, ane ak biguk, eng’ bik tugul che mi ng’ony?" 
Exodus33:17 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ayae ng’olyondoni kemwa agine: amu kenyoru chamet eng’ tainnyu, ak angen kaineng’ung’." 
Exodus33:18 Ak kile, Asain ale, Iborua lilindang’ung’." 
Exodus33:19 Ak kile, Achamdoi mieindanyu tugul kosiirtoe taing’ung’, ak amwaite kainetab Jehovah eng’ taing’ung’; ak ayachi ne mie ne amache ayachi ne mie, ak aborji rirenetab ge inendet ne yamei aborji rirenetab ge." 
Exodus33:20 Ak kile, Memuchi igeer togennyu: amu mageera chi ak kosob." 
Exodus33:21 Ak kile Jehovah, Keero, mitei oli negitena oldo, ak itonone ruandet barak:" 
Exodus33:22 ak ye siirtoi lilindanyu, andein ruandet ole betat, ak atugenen eunnyu agoi asiirte:" 
Exodus33:23 yeityo aiste eunnyu, ak igeer batennyu: ago magigeerei togennyu." 
Exodus34:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Bet koik aeng’ che lebelen ko u che bo tai: ak asirji koichato ng’alek che kimi koik che bo tai, che kiitui." 
Exodus34:2 Ak chopge karon, ak imusu tulwetab Sinai, ak inyo tainnyu eng’ tulwet barak." 
Exodus34:3 Amat otogosu ak chi age tugul, amat kegeerji chi age tugul tulwet komugul; amat koagetyi kechirek anan tuga ole negite tulwonato." 
Exodus34:4 Ak kibet koik aeng’ che lebelen ko u che bo tai; ak king’eet Musa karon, kotogosta kwo tulwetab Sinai, ko u ye kiga kong’at Jehovah inendet, koibei eng’ eunnyi koichato aeng’." 
Exodus34:5 Ak kichorgei Jehovah eng’ boldet, ak kitonon koboto inendet eng’ yoto, ak kimwaita kainetab Jehovah." 
Exodus34:6 Ak kibun Jehovah tainnyi, ak komwaita kole, Jehovah, Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne nyiitat rirenet ak mieindo, ak masib konerechi, ak ne nyiitat talasiet ak imanit;" 
Exodus34:7 ne italachingei elfusiek, ne nyochin kaat bik tengekto ak bistoet ak chalwokto: ne mabagaktoi kiptengekyot age tugul; igeerjin lagok tengektab kwanisiekwak, ak eng’ lagokab lagokwak, agoi ibindab somok ak ne bo ang’wan." 
Exodus34:8 Ak kichirjiren Musa kong’uruk agoi ng’ony, kolos." 
Exodus34:9 Ak kile, Ngo kaanyoru nguno chamet eng’ taing’ung’, Ee Kiptaiyat, asain ale, ingocham Kiptaiyat kebe tugul; amu uui kaat bichu; ak inyoiywech kaat tengekwogikyok ak chalwogikyok, ak inamech keegu boroteng’ung’." 
Exodus34:10 Ak kile, Keero, kayai arorutiet. Ayae kwong’utik eng’ taitab biguk tugul, che kitom ketau keyaei eng’ ng’ony komugul, anan eng’ bororiet age tugul; ak keerei bik tugul che imi kwenunywa boisietab Jehovah, amu kit ne kiiywei ne ayae eng’ inye." 
Exodus34:11 Rib anyun chuto kang’atin rani. Keero, aone komanda eng’ taing’ung’ Amorik, Kananik, Hitik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik." 
Exodus34:12 Ripge, si meyai arorutiet ak bik che menyei emonoto iwendi, si maek mestet eng’ kwenung’wong’:" 
Exodus34:13 ago obut kapkorosusiekwak, ak otuatui kanamonikwak kotonogis, ak oluul Aserikwak:" 
Exodus34:14 among’urukyi cheptalelit age tugul: amu Jehovah ne kainennyi ko ng’etkong’, inendet Kamuktaindet ne amei ng’etkong’:" 
Exodus34:15 si moyachigei arorutiet koboto bik che menyei emonoto, si maipgei ichek ak kanamonikwak, ak koeng’ji tiseiywek cheptalelisiekwak, ak koguurin age iam che bo tiseiywondennyi:" 
Exodus34:16 ak itunji weriguk tibikwak, ak koipgei tibikwak kosubi kanamonikwak, ak kochuut werikwok koipgei agichek kosubi kanamonikwak." 
Exodus34:17 Ameyachigei kanamonik che kitanyi. 
Exodus34:18 Kanyol irib igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek. Iame makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ betusiek tisab, ko u ye kiang’atin, eng’ betusiek che kigiaror eng’ arawetab Abib: amu kiomong’u eng’ Misri eng’ arawanato bo Abib." 
Exodus34:19 Chechuk tugul che yatei iyotet; ak tugul che twati tuga ak kechirek, che kirugik ak mengichik." 
Exodus34:20 Ak itiachi ne twatei sigiriet itiage aruet: ak ngo metiach, iiri kaatit. Itiachi weriguk tugul che bo tai. Ak manyonei chi oli ami ak eut buch." 
Exodus34:21 Yai boisiet betusiek lo, ago imuuny eng’ betutab tisab: imuuny eng’ betusiekab kabatisiet ak eng’ betusiekab kesisiet." 
Exodus34:22 Ak irib igortab wigisiek, noto ko tongoanikab nganok, ak igortab betusiek che kiyumune tugukab mbar, kogesugei kenyit." 
Exodus34:23 Bwanei mureniguk taitab Kiptaiyat Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo Israel, konyil somok eng’ kenyit." 
Exodus34:24 Amu aone bororiosiek eng’ taing’ung’, ak abaroi kiwotosieguk: ama biitu chi age tugul ne machei emeng’ung’, ye itogostoi iwendi taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ konyil somok eng’ kenyit." 
Exodus34:25 Amegoite korotikab tiseiywondennyu koboto makatiat ne kaginde mermerek; ak amat kong’et kot koeech tiseiywotab igortab paska. 
Exodus34:26 Ibu kobwa gotab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, tuguk che bo tai eng’ tongoaniguk che bo emeng’ung’. Ameyoe aruet chegab kamet." 
Exodus34:27 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Sir ng’alechu: amu kagiyomisge ak inye koboto Israel, ko u ole teptoi ng’alechu." 
Exodus34:28 Ak kitebi Musa ak Jehovah eng’ oloto betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam; ma am amit, anan koee beek. Ak kisirji koichato lebelen ng’alekab arorutiet, ng’atutik taman." 
Exodus34:29 Ak ye kingochorgei Musa eng’ tulwetab Sinai koibu koik aeng’ che bo baornatet eng’ eunnyi, ye kichorgei eng’ tulwet, ko ma nai Musa kole iluu iririotab togennyi amu king’alali Jehovah ak inendet." 
Exodus34:30 Ak ye kingogeer Aron ak lagok tugul che bo Israel, Musa, ogeero, kiiluu togennyi: ak kiiywei korikyi inendet." 
Exodus34:31 Ak kiguur Musa ichek; ak kiweektagei ole mi Musa, Aron ak bounik tugul che bo tuiyet: ak king’alalji Musa ichek." 
Exodus34:32 Ak eng’ let korikyi lagok tugul che bo Israel: ak king’atyi ichek ng’alek tugul che kiga komwachi jehovah inendet eng’ tulwetab Sinai. 
Exodus34:33 Ak ye kingo kagoges Musa ng’alalennyi koboto ichek, kotuge togennyi ngoriet." 
Exodus34:34 Ago kiireegu Musa ngorionoto ye mandoi taitab Jehovah kowendi kong’alaldos ak inendet, agoi komong’; ak kimong’, konyo kong’alal ak lagokab Israel, komwachi che kiging’at;" 
Exodus34:35 ak kigeer lagokab Israel togetab Musa, kole iluu iririotab togetab Musa: ak kituge Musa togennyi ngoriet kogeny, agoi komanda kwo kong’alal ak inendet." 
Exodus35:1 Ak kiiyum Musa tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, ak kolenji, Chu ng’alek che kang’at Jehovah, kole, oyai." 
Exodus35:2 Kiyaei boisiet betusiek lo, ago betutab tisab koegu betut ne itabanat eng’ okwek, sabato ne bo kamuung’et ne tilil eng’ Jehovah: kibarei chi age tugul ne yaei boisiet betunoto." 
Exodus35:3 Amat olaal ma age tugul eng’ meng’otosiekwok eng’ betutab sabato. 
Exodus35:4 Ak king’alalji Musa tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, kolenji, Nito ko kit ne kang’at Jehovah, kole," 
Exodus35:5 Oib eng’ kwenung’wong’ kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah: chi age tugul ne tinyei muguleldo ne chamei, ingoib, kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah: tahabu, feda, ak sugunonik;" 
Exodus35:6 ak angok che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren ak katanit ne kararan, ak kororikab ng’ororek;" 
Exodus35:7 ak magatokab mengichik che kigisal kobiriritu, ak magatokab mengichikab beek, ak ketikab shita." 
Exodus35:8 Ak mwaitab kit ne ikweng’sei, ak tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny che bo mwaita ne kiilse, ak che bo nyamdutik che kibeelei che ng’uu ne anyiny;" 
Exodus35:9 ak koikab soam, ak koik che kitetei che bo epod, ak che bo ngorietab teget." 
Exodus35:10 Ak ingonyo chi age tugul eng’ okwek ne tinyei muguleldo ne bo kaguiyet, si koyai tugul che king’at Jehovah:" 
Exodus35:11 got, ak emainnyi, ak ne kituge, ak karikyik che kiname ngoroik, ak baoinikyik, ak rateiywekyik, ak lumeiywekyik, ak kong’ikyik che tonone:" 
Exodus35:12 ak moinget, ak ketikyik che kiibe, ak keruet ne bo rirenet, ak anget ne kioiye;" 
Exodus35:13 ak meset, ak ketikyik che kiibe, ak tugukyik tugul, ak makatinik che bo kabartaet;" 
Exodus35:14 ak keldab tait agine ne bo kit ne ikweng’sei, ak tugukyik, ak taisiekyik, ak mwaitab kioto ikweng’sei;" 
Exodus35:15 ak kapkorosut ne kibeele nyamdutik, ak ketikyik che kiibe, ak mwaita ne kiilse, ak nyamdutik che kibeelei che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak ngoriet ne bo kurget ne bo got ne sib kemong’jin." 
Exodus35:16 Ak kaptisisiet ne kibeele kagochinoik, ak sugunwennyi ne kigireger, ak ketikyik che kiibe, ak tugukyik tugul, ak tabet ak ng’echerennyi ne tabe." 
Exodus35:17 Ak ngoroik che kisonginindos, che bo seremut, ak lumeiywekyik, ak kong’ikwak che tononie, ak ngorietab kurgetab seremut;" 
Exodus35:18 ak tigongenik che bo got, ak tigongenikab seremut, ak boroonikwak;" 
Exodus35:19 ngoroik che kigisal kogororonitu, si keboisie eng’ ole tilil, ngoroik che itabanotin che bo tisiindet Aron, ak ngoroikab werikyik, si kobois eng’ boisietab tiseinatet." 
Exodus35:20 Ak kiba tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel eng’ ole mi Musa. 
Exodus35:21 Ak kinyo age tugul ne kiichirjir muguleldanyi, ak age tugul ne kiigiil tamirmiriennyi kogon, kiib kagochinoikab Jehovah, che bo boisietab emait ne kituiyechin, ak che bo boisiennyi tugul, ak che bo ngoroik che itabanotin." 
Exodus35:22 Ak kibwa murenik ak gotab kor, icheget che kicham mugulelwekwak, ak kiib peteinikab serunek, ak munaokwak, ak peteinik che bo ng’okset, ak sonoekab kaatit, ki bo choto tugul tahabu; kiigochi chi tugul Jehovah tuguk che bo tahabu." 
Exodus35:23 Ak kiib chi tugul ne kitinyei angok che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, ak che bo katanit ne kararan, ak koroik che bo ng’ororek, ak magatokab mengichik che kigisal kobiriritu, ak magatokab mengichikab beek." 
Exodus35:24 Ak chi age tugul ne kigon kagochinoik che bo feda ak che bo sugunonik, ko kibunji choto kagochinetab Jehovah: ak chi age tugul ne kitinyei ketikab shita, ko kiib choto kobunji boisietab otisiet." 
Exodus35:25 Ak kiilet rogoonik kobogorisiek tugul che tinyei ng’omnatet, yeityo koib che kagolet, che bo che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne ais, ak che biriren, ak che bo katanit ne kararan." 
Exodus35:26 Ak kiilet kororikab ng’ororek kobogorisiek tugul che kiichirjir mugulelwekwak eng’ ng’omnatet. 
Exodus35:27 Ak kiib bounik koikab soam, ak koik che kitetyin epod, ak che kitetyin ngorietab teget;" 
Exodus35:28 ak tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak mwaita; ne bo kit ne ikweng’sei, ak ne bo mwaita ne kiilse, ak che bo nyamdutik che kibeelei che ng’uu ne anyiny." 
Exodus35:29 Kiipji lagokab Israel Jehovah kagochinoik che bo chamnyet; muren age tugul, ak kobogorio age tugul, che kiigiil mugulelwekwak koib tuguk che bo boisionoto tugul, che kiga ng’at Jehovah keyai eng’ Musa." 
Exodus35:30 Ak kilenji Musa lagokab Israel, Ogeero, kagoguur Jehovah Besalel, komwa kainennyi, inendet ko weritab Uri, weritab Hur, ne bo oretab Juda;" 
Exodus35:31 ak kagonyiit inendet Tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet, eng’ ng’omnatet, ak kaguiyet, ak naet, ak konai ole teptoi boisiet age tugul ne bo musognatet;" 
Exodus35:32 ak kobwat ole choptoi boisionikab musognatet, si koboisie tahabu, ak feda, ak sugunonik," 
Exodus35:33 ak kowai koik che kitetyin kelongonik, ak koyai ketik kobois eng’ boisiet tugul ne bo musognatet." 
Exodus35:34 Ak kiinde ng’omnatet muguleldanyi si komuch konet inendet, koboto Oholiab, weritab Aisamak, ne bo oretab Dan." 
Exodus35:35 Kigonyiit inendet ng’omnatet mugulelwekwak, si koyai boisiet tugul ne bo musognatet, ne bo waindet, ak ne bo laindet ne ng’om, ak ne bo nabindet ne nabei kondoi lelesta, eng’ che tuuen ne nyalil, ak eng’ che arusen ne birir, ak eng’ che biriren, ak eng’ katanit ne kararan, agot ne bo regerindet, agot ne bo ichek che yaei boisiet age tugul, ak ne bo icheget che ibwati ole choptoi boisietab musoknatet." 
Exodus36:1 Ingobois anyun Besalel ak Oholiab, ak age tugul ne tinyei muguleldo ne bo kaguiyet, ne kiinde Jehovah muguleldanyi ng’omnatet ak naet, si kobiit konai koyai boisiet ne bo otisietab ole tilil, ko u tugul che kiga ng’at Jehovah." 
Exodus36:2 Ak kiguur Musa Besalel ak Oholiab, ak chi age tugul ne tinyei muguleldo ne bo kaguiyet, ne kiga konde Jehovah ng’omnatet muguleldanyi, agot age tugul ne kiichirji muguleldanyi koyai boisionoto:" 
Exodus36:3 ak kitaach kagochinoik tugul eng’ Musa che kiga koib lagokab Israel kobunji boisietab otisiet ne bo ole tilil, keyae. Ak kiipchi kogeny karonet age tugul kagochinoik alak che bo chamnyet." 
Exodus36:4 Ak kinyo chi tugul kometo boisiennyi ne koyaei, kibwa bik tugul che ng’omen nyo koyai boisiet tugul ne bo ole tilil." 
Exodus36:5 Ak king’alalji ichek Musa kolenji, Ibu bik tuguk che siirei che kimachei eng’ boisietab otisiet, ne king’at Jehovah keyai." 
Exodus36:6 Ak king’at Musa anyun kemwaitaat eng’ nganaset komugul kele, Amat koyai boisiet age tugul mureno anan kobogorio ne bo kagochinetab ole tilil. Kigiete anyun bik si mata koib kogeny." 
Exodus36:7 Amu kiga koyam keyae boisionoto tuguk che kiga keib, kot kosiirto." 
Exodus36:8 Ak kiyai chi age tugul ne ng’om eng’ ichek che boisiei, got, koboto ngoroik taman; che bo katanit ne kararan, ne kigila, ak che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, konapchi ngoroik kerubisiek, ne boisietab nabindet ne nabei kondoi lelesta." 
Exodus36:9 Ki kakwautik che bo eut tiptem ak sisiit koindab ngoriet age tugul, ak ki kakwautik ang’wan tebeesindab ngoriet age tugul: ak kiaechin ngoroichoto tugul." 
Exodus36:10 Ak kiropchindos ngoroik mut: ak kiropchindos chun alak mut agichek, ko u noto." 
Exodus36:11 Ak kinapchi inendet belelutik che tuuen ne nyalil eng’ tabandab ngoriet age eng’ ole kurmanat, eng’ ole tuiyechin; kiyachi ko u noto eng’ tabandab ngoriet ne bo aeng’, ne tabanu barak eng’ ole kigituiye ne bo aeng’." 
Exodus36:12 Kinapchi ngoriet age belelutik konom, ak kinapchi belelutik konom eng’ tabandab ngoriet ne bo aeng’, eng’ ole kigituiye ne bo aeng’, tabandab ngoriet ne bo aeng’: kitokyindos belelutik." 
Exodus36:13 Ak kiyai karik che kiname ngoroik konom che bo tahabu, si kotuiyo ngoroik eng’ kombochoto: kiek agenge anyun got." 
Exodus36:14 Ak kiyai ngoroik che bo kororikab ng’ororek koek emait ne tuge got: kiyai ngoroik taman ak aeng’. 
Exodus36:15 Kiek kakwautik sosom che bo eut koindab ngoriet age tugul, ak tebeesindo ko ki kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut: kiaechin ngoroichoto tugul tamanu ak agenge." 
Exodus36:16 Ak kiituiyo ngoroik mut koek agenge ichegei, ak kiituiyo ngoroik lo kogeny koek agenge ichegei." 
Exodus36:17 Ak kinapchi belelutik konom tabandab ngoriet age ne tabanu barak, eng’ ole kigituiye, ak kinapchi belelutik konom tabandab ngoriet eng’ ole kigituiye ne bo aeng’." 
Exodus36:18 Ak kiitany karik che kiname ngoroik konom che bo sugunonik che ituiye emait, koek agenge." 
Exodus36:19 Ak kinab ngoroikab mengichik che kigisal kobirbiritu, si ketuge emait, ak kinab ngoroik che bo mengichikab beek kotaban barak." 
Exodus36:20 Ak kiyai baoinik che bo ketikab shita kobunji got, che tonondos." 
Exodus36:21 Koindab baoiyot age tugul ko ki kakwautik taman che bo eut, ak kiek tebeesindab baoiyot age tugul kakwautiet agenge ak kebeber." 
Exodus36:22 Kitinyei baoiyot age tugul ng’elyebwek aeng’ che kituiyo: kiyai ko u noto baoinik tugul che bo got. 
Exodus36:23 Ak kiyai baoinik che bo got; kiinde choto tiptem kotaban murot ne bo tai: 
Exodus36:24 ak kibarbar feda kosikyi kong’ik artam, si kotaban kapkelyenutab baoinichoto tiptem; chutei ng’elyebwek aeng’u che bo baoiyot agenge, kong’ik aeng’ che mi kapkelyen, chutei ko u noto ng’elyebwek aeng’u che bo baoiyot age, kong’ik aeng’ che mi kapkelyen." 
Exodus36:25 Ak komosta age ne bo aeng’ ne bo got, ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam, kondoi baoinik tiptem," 
Exodus36:26 ak kong’ichoto artam che bo feda, kong’ik aeng’ eng’ kapkelyenutab baoiyot age." 
Exodus36:27 Kiyai anyun baoinik lo kobunji got batai, ole tokyingei cherongo." 
Exodus36:28 Ak kiyai baoinik aeng’ kobunji luukwek che bo got che mi batai. 
Exodus36:29 Ak kigitwakyin aeng’ koboch ng’ony agoi barak, ak kituiye tugul peteit: kiyachi ko u noto baoinichoto tuwai che bo luukwek aeng’." 
Exodus36:30 Ak kimi baoinik sisitu, ak kong’ikwak che bo feda, taman ak lo; kong’ik aeng’ eng’ kapkelyenutab baoiyot agenge, ak kong’ik aeng’ eng’ kapkelyenutab baoiyot age." 
Exodus36:31 Ak kiyai ketikab shita koek rateiywek; kiyai baoinik mut che bo komosta agenge ne bo got," 
Exodus36:32 ak rateiywek mut che bo baoinik che bo komosta age ne bo got, ak rateiywek mut che bo baoinik che bo komosta age ne bo got, ne mi batai, ole tokyingei cherongo." 
Exodus36:33 Ak kiyai rateiywotab kwen kwo kong’eete tabani agoi tabani, eng’ kwenutab baoinik chun alak." 
Exodus36:34 Ak kiiliige tahabu baoinik, ak kiyai peteinikwak che bo tahabu koek choto ole kiroochi rateiywek, ak kiilige rateiywechoto tahabu." 
Exodus36:35 Ak kiyai ngoriet ne kioiye got eng’ ne tuui ne nyalil, ak ne arus ne birir, ak ne birir, ak eng’ katanit ne kararan ne kigila: kiyai anganato koboto kerubisiek che boisietab laindet ne ng’om." 
Exodus36:36 Ak kiyachi ngorionoto lumeiywek ang’wan che bo shita, ak koliige tahabu: ak ki bo tahabu ireusiekwak; ak kiitang’ji kong’ik ang’wan che bo feda che kigibarbar." 
Exodus36:37 Ak kinab ngoriet ne bo kurgetab Emait, ne bo ne tuui ne nyalil, ak ne arus ne birir, ak ne birir, ak ne bo katanit ne kararan, ne kigila, boisietab chito ne nabei kondoi lelesta;" 
Exodus36:38 ak lumeiywekwak mut, ak ireusiekwak: ak kiiliige tahabu metowekab lumeiywek, koboto rateiywekwak che kituiye: ak kong’ikwak mut ko ki bo sugunonik." 
Exodus37:1 Ak kiyai Besalel moinget eng’ ketikab shita: kakwautik che bo eut aeng’ ak kebeber, koindanyi, ak kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber tebeesindanyi, kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber tononennyi:" 
Exodus37:2 ak kiiliige tahabu che tililen orit ak sang’, ak kitegele tegeleiywotab tahabu koyieme baragunnyi tugul." 
Exodus37:3 Ak kiitang’ji peteinik ang’wan che bo tahabu luukwekwak ang’wan; kiinde aeng’ komosta age, ak aeng’ eng’ komosta age." 
Exodus37:4 Ak kiyai ketik che kiibe che bo shita, ak koliige tahabu." 
Exodus37:5 Ak kiirooch ketichato peteinik che mitei tabanwekab moinget, si keibe." 
Exodus37:6 Ak kiyai keruetab rirenet eng’ tahabu che tililen: koindanyi ko ki kakwautik che bo eut aeng’ ak kebeber, ak tebeesindanyi ko ki kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber." 
Exodus37:7 Ak kiyai kerubisiek aeng’ eng’ tahabu; kiyae tahabu che kitanyi, eng’ tabanwek aeng’ che bo keruetab rirenet;" 
Exodus37:8 kotebe kerubit age komosi ak kotebe age komosin: inaamdos keruetab rirenet ak kerubisiek eng’ tabanwekyik tuwai. 
Exodus37:9 Ak kiito kerubisiek kebebaikwak koba barak, kotuch keruetab rirenet eng’ kebebaikwak, ak kotoorjin togochikwak, ing’ururi togochikab kerubisiechoto keruetab rirenet." 
Exodus37:10 Ak kiyai meset eng’ ketikab shita: koindanyi ko ki kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut, ak tebeesindanyi ko ki kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut, ak tononennyi ko ki kakwautiet ne bo eut agenge ak kebeber." 
Exodus37:11 Ak kiiliige tahabu che tililen, ak kiyachi tegeleiywotab tahabu kotegele, koyieme baragunnyi tugul." 
Exodus37:12 Ak kiyachi tegeleiywot ne yamei eut agenge tebeesindanyi koyiem kioto, ak kiyai tegeleiywotab tahabu koyieme tabanwekyik tugul." 
Exodus37:13 Ak kiitang’ji peteinik ang’wan che bo tahabu, ak kiinde peteinichoto luukwek ang’wan eng’ komoswekab kelyekyik ang’wan." 
Exodus37:14 Kimi peteinichoto ole negite tegeleiywot, ole chutei ketik che keibe meset." 
Exodus37:15 Ak kiyai ketichato eng’ ketikab shita, ak koliige tahabu, si keibe meset." 
Exodus37:16 Ak kiyai eng’ tahabu che tililen tuguk che kimi meset barak, tabokyik, ak kechigosiekyik, ak tageiywekyik, ak kikombokyik che kirong’jine tuguk." 
Exodus37:17 Ak kiitany keldab tait eng’ tahabu che tililen: kiyae keloto bo tait tahabu che kitanyi, kelunnyi ak toloitanyi: kikombokyik, mulonokyik, ak taptokyik, kinamdos choto tugul koek kiy agenge:" 
Exodus37:18 ak kisage temenik lo toloato; kisage temenik somogu komostanyi age ne bo keloto, ak kosage temenik somogu ko u noto komostanin age:" 
Exodus37:19 kitinyei temet agenge kikombok somok che kigiyai koigei taptok che kiguure almond, ak mulwet ak taptet, kitinyei ko u noto temet age ne bo komosta age kokombok somok che kigiyai koigei taptochoto kiguure almond, ak mulwet ak taptet: ko u noto eng’ temenik tugul lo che sachei eng’ kioto." 
Exodus37:20 Ak kimitei ole bo toloita inendet kikombok ang’wanu, che kigiyai kogergeit ak taptokab almond, koboto mulonokyik ak taptokyik." 
Exodus37:21 Ak ye kisage temenik aeng’u, komi kel yoto mulwet, ne kigituiye koek kiy agenge, ak ye kisage kogeny temenik aeng’u, komi kel yoto mulwet, ne kigituiye koek kiy agenge, ak ye kisage kogeny temenik aeng’u, komi kel yoto mulwet, ne kigituiye koek kiy agenge. Mitoti ko u noto eng’ komoswechoto tugul ole kisage temenik tugul ko lo." 
Exodus37:22 Kinamgei mulonokwak ak temenikwak, koek kiy agenge: kigitang’e kioto komugul tahabu che tililen." 
Exodus37:23 Ak kiyai taisiekyik koek tisab, kiyae tahabu che tililen, koboto kanameiywondennyi, ak tabokyik che mengechen." 
Exodus37:24 Kiyai kioto eng’ tahabu che yamei talentait agenge, koboto tugukyik tugul." 
Exodus37:25 Ak kiyai kapkorosut ole kibeele nyamdutik eng’ ketikab shita: ki kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut koindanyi, ak ki kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut tebeesindanyi; kiaechin tebeesindo ak koindo; ak ki kakwautik aeng’ eng’ che bo eut tononennyi; kinamgei kapkorosut ak kuinoikyik koek kiy agenge." 
Exodus37:26 Ak kiiliige tahabu che tililen, baragunnyi, ak komoswekyik tugul kotuiyo, ak kuinoikyik: ak kiitany tegeleiywotab tahabu koyieme." 
Exodus37:27 Ak kiitany peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu, ak kiinde tuguchoto kotaban tegeleiywot kel, eng’ teget ne bo komosi ak komosi, eng’ komoswekyik tuwai, si kobiit kirooch ketik che kiibe," 
Exodus37:28 Ak kiyai ketik che kiibe, eng’ ketikab shita, ak koliige tahabu." 
Exodus37:29 Ak kichob mwaita ne tilil ne kiilse, ak nyamdutik che tililen che kibeelei che bo tuguchoto anyinyen che ng’uu ne anyiny, ne boisietab ng’omotiot ne buruchi tuguk che ng’uu ne kararan." 
Exodus38:1 Ak kiyai kaptisisiet ole kibeele tiseiywek eng’ ketikab shita: koindanyi ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut, ak tebeesindanyi kakwautik mut agine, kiaechin tebeesindo ak koindo: ak tononennyi ko ki kakwautik somok che bo eut." 
Exodus38:2 Ak kiyai kosikyi kuinoik eng’ luukwekyik ang’wan; kigitany kuinoikyik konamgei ak kioto: ak kiiliige sugunwet. 
Exodus38:3 Ak kiitany tuguk tugul che bo kaptisisiet, terenik, ak kechigok che eechen, ak tabok che mengechen, ak karik che kirutune banyek, ak tabok che kiibe mat: kiitany tugukyik tugul eng’ sugunwet." 
Exodus38:4 Ak kiyachi kaptisiet sugunonik che kiregeri, eng’ kapkelyenutab mireiywot ne yiemei kaptisisiet kel, si komuurmuur kioto." 
Exodus38:5 Ak kiitang’ji peteinik ang’wan luukwek ang’wan che bo kioto bo sugunwet ne kigireger, si kirooch ketik che kiibe." 
Exodus38:6 Ak kiyai ketichato eng’ shita, ak kiiliige sugunwet." 
Exodus38:7 Ak kiirooch ketichato peteinik orit che mi komoswekab kaptisisiet si kobiit ketandane; kiyai kioto koek moinget orit. 
Exodus38:8 Ak kiitany tabet ne bo sugunwet, ak kiyae sugunwet ng’echerennyi ne tebe che ki u kioisiek eng’ sugunonik che kigeeregei kobogorisiek, che kiboisiei eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Exodus38:9 Ak kiyai seremut ne ng’otat: ki bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila, ngoroik che tabanu murot ne bo tai; kiyamei kakwautik bogol agenge che bo eut:" 
Exodus38:10 ki tiptem lumeiywekwak, ak ki tiptem kong’ikwak che bo sugunonik, che tononie; ki bo feda ireusiekab lumeiywek, koboto rateiywekwak che kituiye." 
Exodus38:11 Ak kimi ngoroik murot katam che yamei kakwautik bogol che bo eut, ak lumeiywekwak tiptem ak kong’ikwak che tononie tiptem che bo sugunonik, ki bo feda ireusiek che bo lumeiywek, koboto rateiywekwak che kituiye." 
Exodus38:12 Ak kimi ngoroik che yamei kakwautik konom che bo eut, komosta ne tokyingei cherongo, ak lumeiywekwak taman, ak kong’ikwak che tononie taman; ak ki bo feda ireusiekab lumeiywek, koboto rateiywekwak che kituiye." 
Exodus38:13 Ak kitabanu komostab kong’asis ngoroik che yamei kakwautik konom che bo eut. 
Exodus38:14 Ki kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut ngoroik che bo kurget komosta age; ak lumeiywekwak somok, ak kong’ikwak somok;" 
Exodus38:15 ak kiiliige noto komosta ne bo aeng’: kimi kurget ne bo seremut komosi ak komosi ngoroik che yamei kakwautik taman ak mut che bo eut, lumeiywekwak somok, ak kong’ikwak somok." 
Exodus38:16 Ngoroik tugul che kiyiemei seremut ko ki bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila. 
Exodus38:17 Ak ki bo sugunonik kong’ik che kitononie lumeiywek; ak ki bo feda ireusiek che bo lumeiywek koboto rateiywekwak che kituiye; ak kituge feda metowekab lumeiywechoto; ak ki bo feda rateiywek che kigituiyote lumeiywek tugul che bo seremut. 
Exodus38:18 Ak kinab nabindet ne nabei kondoi lelesta, ngoriet ne bo kurgetab seremunoto ng’otat, eng’ che tuuen ne nyalil, ak eng’ che arusen ne birir, ak eng’ che biriren, ak eng’ katanit ne kararan ne kigila: ak kiek koindanyi kakwautik tiptem che bo eut, ki bo kakwautik mut che bo eut tononennyi ak tebeesindanyi, ko u ngoroikab seremut." 
Exodus38:19 Ak ki bo sugunonik lumeiywekwak ang’wanu, ak kong’ikwak che tononie, ang’wan; ak ki bo feda ireusiekwak, ak kigituge feda metowekab lumeiywekwak, ak rateiywekwak che kiga kituiyote." 
Exodus38:20 Ak ki bo sugunonik tigongenik tugul che bo got ak tigongenik tugul che yiemei seremut. 
Exodus38:21 Koitetab tuguk che bo got, chu, agot gotab baornatet, ko u ye kigiit, ko u ng’atutietab Musa, kobunji boisietab Lawik, eng’ eutab Itamar, weritab Aron tisiindet." 
Exodus38:22 Ak kiyai Besalel, weritab Uri, weritab Hur, ne bo oretab Juda, tuguk tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus38:23 Kimi ak inendet Oholiab, weritab Aisamak, ne bo oretab Dan, ki musogindet, laindet ne ng’om, ak ko nabindet ne nabei koindoi lelesta, eng’ che tuuen ne nyalil, ak eng’ che arusen ne birir, ak eng’ che biriren, ak eng’ katanit ne kararan." 
Exodus38:24 Kiek tahabu tugul che kigiboisie eng’ boisiet tugul ne bo ole tilil, agot tahabu che bo kagochinet, kiyamei talentaisiek tiptem ak sogol, ak sekelisiek bogol tisab ak sosom, choto sekelisiek che bo ole tilil." 
Exodus38:25 Ak fedaisiekab icheget che kigiit che bo tuiyet, ko kiyamei talentaisiek bogol, ak sekelisiek elfut agenge ak bogol tisab ak tamanwogik tisab ak mut, choto sekelisiek che bo ole tilil:" 
Exodus38:26 kigon chi tugul beka, noto kebebertab sekel, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil, eng’ chi age tugul ne kisiirtoi kowendi ole mi che kagiit, che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak koba tai, che bunu murenik elfusiek bogol lo ak somok ak bogol mut ak konom." 
Exodus38:27 Ak talentaisiechato bogol agenge che bo feda ko kigitanyi kobwa kong’ik che u kelongonik, che bo ole tilil, ak kong’ik che tononie lumeiywekab ngoriet ne kigioiye got; kong’ik bogol che yamei talentaisiek bogol, yamegei konda agenge ak talentait agenge." 
Exodus38:28 Ak kiitany sekelisiek elfut agenge ak bogol tisab ak tamanwogik tisab ak mut koek ireusiek che bo lumeiywek ak kotuge feda metowekwak, ak koyachi rateiywek che kigituiyote," 
Exodus38:29 ak kiyamei talentaisiek tamanwogik tisab, sugunwet ne bo kagochinet, ak sekelisiek elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol ang’wan." 
Exodus38:30 Ak kiitany chuto koek kong’ik che bo kurget che tononie lumeiywekab emait ne kituiyechin, ak kaptisisiet ne kigitang’e sugunwet; ak karnennyi ne kigireger eng’ sugunonik, ak tuguk tugul che bo kaptisisiet," 
Exodus38:31 ak kong’ik che tononie lumeiywekab seremut, ak tigongenik tugul che bo got, ak tigongenik tugul che yiemei seremut." 
Exodus39:1 Ak kiyai bichoto ngoroik che kigisal kogororonitu eng’ tuguk che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, si keboisie eng’ ole tilil, ak kinapchi Aron ngoroik che itabanotin; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus39:2 Ak kiyai epod eng’ tahabu, ak eng’ che tuuen ne nyalil, ak eng’ che arusen ne birir, ak eng’ che biriren, ak eng’ katanit ne kararan ne kigila." 
Exodus39:3 Ak kiitany tahabu koterteritu, yeityo korar koigei tapsinok, si kobiit kochuljulot eng’ che tuuen ne nyalil, ak eng’ che arusen ne birir, ak eng’ che biriren, ak eng’ katanit ne kararan, boisietab laindet ne ng’om." 
Exodus39:4 Kinapchi kioto kebeberwekab tigigoik, che kigiropchin koek agenge; kigituiyo eng’ luukwekyik aeng’." 
Exodus39:5 Ak birenet ne kila ng’omotik, ne kigirategei, kiginomnyo kogergeit ak epod; ki kergei ak boisiennyi; ki bo tahabu, ak che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, ak che bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus39:6 Ak kiwai koikab soam, che kigindeat tahabu che kigitogul, si konam; ak kigisirji koichato kainaikab lagokab Israel kogergeit ak waet ne bo ng’okset." 
Exodus39:7 Ak kiinde koichato epod ole bo tigigoik, koek koikab kabwatet agobo lagokab Israel; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehova Musa." 
Exodus39:8 Ak kiyai ngorietab teget, boisietab musogindet ne ng’om, ko u boisietab epod; eng’ tahabu, ak eng’ che tuuen ne nyalil, ak eng’ che arusen ne birir, ak eng’ che biriren ak katanit ne kararan ne kigila." 
Exodus39:9 Kiaechin tebeesindo ak koindo; ak kigiliich ngorionoto bo teget koek aeng’; kiek koindanyi olobo inchisiek sogol eng’ koindo ak eng’ tebeesindo, ko kagiliich." 
Exodus39:10 Ak kitetyi kioto ortinwek ang’wan che bo koik: kiinde oret ne bo tai sardio, topasio ak bareqet." 
Exodus39:11 Ak kiinde oret ne bo aeng’, sumaragdo, sapire ak yaholom." 
Exodus39:12 Ak kiinde oret ne bo somok, huakinto, sebu ak ametusto." 
Exodus39:13 Ak kiinde oret ne bo ang’wan, berulo, soam ak jasipi: kigiroogot koichato kelongonikab tahabu che kigitogul." 
Exodus39:14 Ak ki te koichato kainaikab lagokab Israel, ki taman ak aeng’, ko u kainaikwak; ko u waetab ng’okset, tinyei koita age tugul kainennyi, bee ortinwek taman ak aeng’." 
Exodus39:15 Ak kinapchi ngorionoto bo teget sirimwek che u rogoonik che bo tahabu che tililen, che kigilet." 
Exodus39:16 Ak kitogul tahabu koek morik aeng’, ak kiyai peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu, ak kiinde peteinichoto tabanwekab luukwek aeng’ che bo ngorionoto bo teget." 
Exodus39:17 Ak kiirookto sirimwechoto aeng’ bo tahabu, che kigilet, peteinichoto aeng’ che mi tabanwekab luukwek aeng’, che bo ngorionoto bo teget." 
Exodus39:18 Ak kinam komoswechun alak aeng’ che bo sirimwechoto aeng’ kigilet, korooch kelongonik aeng’ che kigitogul, yeityo kituiyo ak epod eng’ komostab tigigoik ole tabanu tai." 
Exodus39:19 Ak kiyai peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu, ak konapchi ngorionoto bo teget ole bo luukwek aeng’, eng’ tabanwekyik, che tabanu komostab orit eng’ epod kel." 
Exodus39:20 Ak kiyai peteinik aeng’ che bo tahabu, ak konapchi tuguchoto tigigoikab epod eng’ ole bo kel, ole tabanu tai, eng’ ole negite ye kigituiye, eng’ baragutab birenonoto bo epod, ne kiginab eng’ ng’omnatet." 
Exodus39:21 Ak kiigiich ichek ngorietab teget eng’ peteinikyik, koratyin ak peteinikab epod, korate rogoet ne tuui ne nyalil, si kotebe baragutab birenet ne kigila eng’ ng’omnatet, si mabesio ngorietab teget ak epod; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus39:22 Ak kinab ngoriet ne kiroochegei, ne bo epod, ne kigisal konyalilit ne ais tugul, ne boisietab laindet;" 
Exodus39:23 ak kinab ngorionoto kwen ole chutei metit, ko u ye kichobei ngoriet ne bo luget, ak kigigurman kong’ata si magerer." 
Exodus39:24 Ak kinapchi ngorionoto tabandab kel logoek che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, ak che bo katanit ne kigila." 
Exodus39:25 Ak kiitany chepchingilok che bo tahabu che tililen, ak kiing’olate chepchingilochoto logoek, koyiem kelutab ngoriet;" 
Exodus39:26 ye kiinde chepchingiliet, ko kiinde logoiyat korupgei, ak kirubatgei ko u noto agoi, eng’ tabandab ngoriet komugul, si keboisie; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus39:27 Ak kinab ngoroik che koen che bo katanit ne kararan che kigila, kobunji Aron, ak werikyik," 
Exodus39:28 ak chepkulet ne bo katanit ne kararan, ak chepkuloik che miachen che mengechen che bo katanit ne kararan, ak sirualisiek che bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila," 
Exodus39:29 ak birenet ne bo katanit ne kararan ne kigila, ak ne bo che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, boisietab nabindet ng’omotiot; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus39:30 Ak kiitany kit ne kergei ak eurto eng’ nariet ne tilil, eng’ tahabu che kororon, ak kisirji sirutik, kogergeit ak waet ne bo ng’okset, kole, TILIL ENG’ JEHOVAH." 
Exodus39:31 Ak kiratyi rogoet ne tuui ne nyalil, kotebe chepkulet ole bo togoch; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus39:32 Kiigesgei anyun boisionik tugul che bo gotab emait ne kituiyechin: ak kiyai lagokab Israel ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa; kiyai ko u noto. 
Exodus39:33 Ak kiipchi ichek got Musa, ne Emait, ak tugukyik tugul, ak karikyik che kiname ngoroik, ak baoinikyik, ak rateiywekyik, ak lumeiywekyik, ak kong’ikwak che tononie;" 
Exodus39:34 ak emaitab magatokab mengichik, che kigisal kobiriritu, ak emait ne bo magatokab mengichikab beek, ak anget ne kioiye got orit;" 
Exodus39:35 ak moingetab baornatet, ak ketikyik che kiibe, ak keruetab rirenet:" 
Exodus39:36 ak meset, ak tugukyik tugul, ak makatinik che bo kabartaet;" 
Exodus39:37 ak keldo ne tilil ne bo tait, koboto taisiekyik, agot taisiek che kitetei komie, ak tugukyik tugul, ak mwanikab kit ne ikweng’sei;" 
Exodus39:38 ak kapkorosutab tahabu, ak mwaita ne kiilse, ak nyamdutik che kibeelei che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak ngoriet ne kisonginine kurgetab Emait;" 
Exodus39:39 ak kaptisisietab sugunwet, ak karnennyi ne kigireger eng’ sugunonik, ketikyik che kiibe, ak tugukyik tugul, ak tabet ne kiunse, ak ng’echerennyi:" 
Exodus39:40 ak ngoroik che songinindos che bo serumut, ak lumeiywekyik, ak kong’ikwak che tononie, ak ngoriet ne bo kurgetab seremut, ak rogoonikyik, ak tigongenikyik, ak tuguk tugul che bo boisietab got, che bo emait ne kituiyechin;" 
Exodus39:41 ak ngoroik che kigisal kogororonitu si keboisie eng’ ole tilil, ak ngoroik che itabanotin che bo tisiindet Aron, ak ngoroikab werikyik, si kobiit kobois eng’ boisietab tiseinatet." 
Exodus39:42 Kiyai anyun lagokab Israel boisiet tugul ne king’at Jehovah Musa. 
Exodus39:43 Ak kigeer Musa boisionichoto tugul, ogeero, kiga koges; kiyai anyun bichoto ko u ye kiga kong’at Jehovah: ak kiiberur Musa ichek." 
Exodus40:1 King’alalji anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Exodus40:2 Lumde goyoto bo emait ne kituiyechin eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawet ne bo tai. 
Exodus40:3 Ak inde moingetab baornatet got orit, ak ituch moinget eng’ ngorionoto kioiye got." 
Exodus40:4 Ak ibu meset inde go, ak itet komie tuguk che tebe baragunnyi; ak ibu keldab tait, inde go, ak inaam taisiek." 
Exodus40:5 Ak inde kapkorosut ne bo tahabu ne kibeele nyamdutik eng’ taitab moingetab baornatet, ak isonginin ngoriet eng’ kurgetab got." 
Exodus40:6 Ak inde kaptisisiet ne kibeele tiseiywek taitab kurgetab goyoto bo emait ne kituiyechin. 
Exodus40:7 Ak inde tabet ne kiunse kwenutab emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisiet, ak irong’ji beek kioto." 
Exodus40:8 Ak lumde ng’otwetab seremut kot kotuiyo, ak isonginin ngorietab kurgetab seremut." 
Exodus40:9 Ak iib mwanik che kiilse, ak iil got, ak tuguk tugul che mi orit, ak itaban, ak tugukyik tugul: si kotililit." 
Exodus40:10 Ak iil kaptisisiet ne kibeele tiseiywek, ak tugukyik tugul, ak itilil kaptisisiet: ak kotililit mising’ kaptisisiet." 
Exodus40:11 Ak iil tabet ne kiunse, ak ng’echerennyi ak itaban." 
Exodus40:12 Ak imutu Aron ak werikyik kobwa kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, ak iune beek." 
Exodus40:13 Ak ilaakyi Aron ngoroik che kigitaban; ak iil inendet, ak itaban, si kobiit koboisiewa eng’ boisietab tiseinatet." 
Exodus40:14 Ak imutu werikyik, ak ilaakyi ngoroik che koen:" 
Exodus40:15 ak iil ichek, ko u ye kiil inye kwandanywa, si kobiit koboisiewa eng’ boisietab tiseinatet: ak koek kaiilsenywa ne kiili ichek tiseinatet ne bo agoi eng’ ibinwekwak tugul." 
Exodus40:16 Kiyai anyun Musa ko u noto: ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah inendet, kiyai anyun ko u noto." 
Exodus40:17 Ak kigilumda goyoto eng’ arawet ne bo tai eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawet. 
Exodus40:18 Ak kilumda Musa anyun got, ak kiiteepto kong’ikwak che tononie, ak kilumda baoinikyik, ak korooch rateiywekyik, ak kolumda lumeiywekyik." 
Exodus40:19 Kiito anyun emait eng’ got barak, ak kotuge ngoroik alak koliich; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus40:20 Yeityo koib baornatet konde moinget orit, ak kiirooch moinget ketik che kiibe, ak koteepto keruetab rirenet eng’ baragutab moinget:" 
Exodus40:21 ak kiib inendet moinget kwo go orit, ak kosonginin ngoriet ne kioiye got, si kotekta moingetab baornatet; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus40:22 Ak kiinde meset got ne kituiyechin, kotaban murot ne bo katam, eng’ got ne sib kemong’jin." 
Exodus40:23 Ak kitet makatinik eng’ meset eng’ taitab Jehovah: kou ye king’at Jehovah Musa. 
Exodus40:24 Ak kiinde keldab tait emait ne kituiyechin, kotoorjin ak meset, kotaban murot ne bo tai eng’ got." 
Exodus40:25 Ak kiinaam taisiek eng’ taitab Jehovah; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa. 
Exodus40:26 Ak kiinde kapkorosut ne bo tahabu got ne kituiyechin eng’ goyoto sib kemong’jin: 
Exodus40:27 ak kibeele kapkorosunoto nyamdutik che bo tuguk che ng’uu ne anyin; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa. 
Exodus40:28 Yeityo kosonginin ngoriet eng’ kurgetab got. 
Exodus40:29 Ak kiinde kaptisisiet ne kibeele tiseiywek eng’ kurgetab got ne bo emait ne kituiyechin, ak kiigoito kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak ne bo busiek, eng’ kaptisisionoto; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus40:30 Ak kiinde tabet ne kiunse kwenutab emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisiet, ak korong’ji beek orit, si kiunse." 
Exodus40:31 Ak kiiun Musa ak Aron ak werikyik eunekwak ak kelyekwak eng’ kioto; 
Exodus40:32 kiiuni ko u noto ye kimandoi emait ne kituiyechin, ak ye kimachei korikyi kaptisisiet: ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Exodus40:33 Ak kilumda ng’otwetab seremut koyiem got ak kaptisisiet, ak kiisonginin ngorietab kurgetab seremut. Kiiges anyun Musa boisionoto." 
Exodus40:34 Kinyo kotuch anyun boldet emait ne kituiyechin, ak kinyi got lilindab Jehovah." 
Exodus40:35 Ak kima imuch Musa komanda emait ne kituiyechin, amu kitebe boldet baragutab goyoto, ak kinyi got lilindab Jehovah." 
Exodus40:36 Ak ye kingetogostae boldet eng’ goyoto, koba anyun lagokab Israel ko u noto eng’ banwekwak tugul:" 
Exodus40:37 ago ye kima kitogostae boldet, ko kima kobendi ui agoi betut ne kagitogostae boldonato." 
Exodus40:38 Amu kitebe boldetab Jehovah got barak bet, ak kimi mat boldonato kemoi kogeerei got komugul ne bo Israel, eng’ banwekwak tugul." 
Leviticus1:1 Kiguur Jehovah Musa ak kong’alalji eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, kolenji," 
Leviticus1:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji, Ye igoitoi chi age tugul eng’ okwek kagochinet, kogochin Jehovah, ogoitoi che bo akwotisiekwok, che bo tuga ak che bo nego." 
Leviticus1:3 Ngo kagochinennyi ko bo tiseiywot ne kibeelei ne bo tuga, kogoitoi kirgit ne libwob: ingokweri kwo emait ne kituiyechin, si kochamak eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus1:4 Ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinonoto kibeelei; ak ketaach noto agobo inendet si kobiit keyachi inendet kagaigaet. 
Leviticus1:5 Ak koeny kirgoto eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak koib korotik tisiik, werikab Aron, ak koisote kaptisisiet komoswek tugul, ne mi ole negite kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus1:6 Ak koeny kagochinonoto kibeelei, yeityo kosach banyechato kobiit kebeberwekyik." 
Leviticus1:7 Ingonde mat kaptisisiet werikab Aron tisiindet ak kotetyi kwenik ma: 
Leviticus1:8 ye ibata kotet tisiik werikab Aron, banyechato kagesach, metit, ak mwanikyik, eng’ kwenik barak che mi mat ne mi kaptisisiet:" 
Leviticus1:9 ago ingoun eng’ beek tugukab ke koboto kelyekyik: ak kobeel tisiindet kirgoto komugul eng’ kaptisisiet, koek tiseiywot ne kibeelei, kagochinet ne bunei mat, nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Leviticus1:10 Ak ngo bo nego kagochinennyi, che bo kechirek, anan che bo ng’ororek, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei; kogoitoi mengit anan kwesta ne libwob." 
Leviticus1:11 Ak ingoeny eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ kaptisisiet ole tokyingei murot ne bo katam: ye ibata koisote korotik tisiik werikab Aron, kaptisisiet komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus1:12 Yeityo kosach banyek, kobiit kebeberwekyik, koboto metitab artanato ak mwanikyik; ak kotet tuguchoto eng’ kwenik barak che mi mat ne mi kaptisisiet:" 
Leviticus1:13 ago ingoun tugukab ke ak kelyek eng’ beek: ak ingogoito tisiindet banyek tugul, ak kobeel eng’ kaptisisiet: kagochinet nito ne kibeelei, kagochinet ne bunei mat, nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Leviticus1:14 Ak ngo bo taritik kagochinennyi ne kigoitoi kebeel, ne igochin Jehovah, kogoitoi anyun kagochinennyi ne bo cheptugenik, anan arekab tarit." 
Leviticus1:15 Yeityo koib tisiindet konyo kaptisisiet; ak koiiny kaatinnyi kong’et metit, ak kobeel eng’ kaptisisiet; ak kochiilji korotikyik tabandab kaptisisiet:" 
Leviticus1:16 ak konem kebonjorennyi ak kororikyik, kowirji kaptisisiet taban, ole tokyingei kong’asis, oldab orek:" 
Leviticus1:17 ak kogerer kopcheune aeng’ kebebaikyik, amat kobesio; yeityo kobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet, eng’ kwenik che mi ma: nito kagochinet ne kigoitoi kebeel, kagochinet ne bunei mat, nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Leviticus2:1 Ak ye igoitoi chi age tugul kagochinet ne bo busiek ne igochin Jehovah, ingoek kagochinennyi busiek che tambulul; ak korong’ji mwaita busiechoto, ak konde tuguk che nyamdut agichek:" 
Leviticus2:2 ak koipchi inendet werikab Aron tisiik: ak komugut konyi eut busiechoto tambulul, koboto mwaitanyi, koboto ubani tugul; ak ingobeel tisiindet koek kabwatet ne bo noto eng’ kaptisisiet, kagochinet ne bunei mat, nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah:" 
Leviticus2:3 ak kobunji Aron ak werikyik che kang’et eng’ kagochinet ne bo busiek: tilil mising’ nito kot kosiir, eng’ kagochinoik tugul che bo Jehovah, che bunei mat." 
Leviticus2:4 Ak ye igoitoi inye kagochinet ne bo busiek che kiwatani eng’ ma, igoitoi makatinik che ma kinde mermerek che bo busiek che tambulul che kagiburukto mwaita, anan makatinik che terteren che kagiile mwaita, che ma kinde mermerek." 
Leviticus2:5 Ak ngo kagochineng’ung’ ko kagochinet ne bo busiek che kagiwatan eng’ karnet ne lebel, ingoek che bo busiek che tambululen che kagiburukto mwaita, che ma kinde mermerek." 
Leviticus2:6 Ak itilate komengegitu, ak irong’ji mwaita: noto kagochinet ne bo busiek." 
Leviticus2:7 Ak ngo bo busiek kagochineng’ung’ che kagiwatan eng’ tabetab karnet, kechobei busiek che tambululen che kagiburukto mwaita." 
Leviticus2:8 Ak iipchi Jehovah kagochinetab busiek che kagechob eng’ tuguchuto: si keipchi tisiindet, ak koib inendet kwo kaptisisiet." 
Leviticus2:9 Yeityo konem tisiindet che bo kabwatet eng’ kagochinonoto bo busiek, ak kobeel noto eng’ kaptisisiet: kagochinet ne kibeelei, ne nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Leviticus2:10 Ak kobunji Aron ak werikyik choto kong’et eng’ kagochinetab busiek: tilil mising’ nito kot kosiir, eng’ kagochinoik tugul che bo Jehovah che bunei mat." 
Leviticus2:11 Amat onde mermerek kagochinet age tugul ne bo busiek ne ogochini Jehovah: amu mobeele mermerek, anan kumiat age tugul, koek kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah, kobunei mat." 
Leviticus2:12 Ogochini Jehovah, koek kagochinetab tongoanik: ago amat keib koba kaptisisiet koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny." 
Leviticus2:13 Ak inde munyuk kagochineng’ung’ age tugul ne bo busiek; amengorartae kagochinetab busiek munyuk che bo kayomisetab Kamuktaindeng’ung’: igoitoi munyuk koboto kagochinoiguk tugul. 
Leviticus2:14 Ak ngigochi Jehovah kagochinetab busiek che bo tongoanik, igoitoi anyun kagochinonoto bo busiek, che bo tongoaniguk, che bunu itikab bek che kaginde ma, bek che neriotin, che kagitui." 
Leviticus2:15 Ak irong’ji mwaita, ak inde tuguk che nyamdut: nito ko kagochinet ne bo busiek." 
Leviticus2:16 Ak kobeel tisiindet kabwatet ne bo noto, kebebertab bekyik che kagitui, ak kebebertab mwaitanyi, koboto ubanikyik tugul: nito kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat." 
Leviticus3:1 Ak ngo kagochinennyi ko tiseiywotab kalyet; ingogoitoi ne bo tuga, ngo kirgit anan ko roriat, kogoitoi ne libwob eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus3:2 Ye ibata kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinennyi, ak koeny eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin: ak koisot tisiik werikab Aron kaptisisiet komoswek tugul eng’ korotik." 
Leviticus3:3 Ak igoitoi inendet eng’ tiseiywotab kalyet kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat; mwanik che kiilaach moet, ak sunetik tugul che bo mo," 
Leviticus3:4 ak soromokyik tuwai koboto mwanikwak, che mi ole negite sugulumdo, ak kwambeleliet ne mitei koet, koboto soromok, ingoisto choto." 
Leviticus3:5 Ak kobeel werikab Aron choto eng’ kaptisisiet konde baragutab tiseiywot ne kibeelei, ne mi kwenik che mi ma: nito kagochinet ne bunei mat, nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Leviticus3:6 Ak ngo bo nego kagochinennyi ne bo tiseiywotab kalyet ne ipchin Jehovah; ngo mengit anan kwesta, anan ko subendo, kogoitoi ne libwob." 
Leviticus3:7 Ak ngogoitoi mengit koek kagochinennyi, kogoitoi eng’ taitab Jehovah;" 
Leviticus3:8 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinennyi, ak koeny eng’ taitab emait ne kituiyechin: ak koisot werikab Aron kaptisisiet komoswek tugul eng’ korotik." 
Leviticus3:9 Ak kogoito che bo tiseiywotab kalyet koek kagochinet ne bunei mat ne kigochin Jehovah; mwanikyik, ak saruriennyi komugul, ingotil koges eng’ kipkitit; ak mwanik che kiilaach moet, ak sunetik tugul che bo mo," 
Leviticus3:10 ak soromok tuwai, ak mwanik che kiilaach soromochoto, che mi ole negite kipkitit, ak kwambeleliet ne mitei koet, koboto soromok, ingonem choto." 
Leviticus3:11 Ak kobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet: choto amitwogikab kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat. 
Leviticus3:12 Ak ngo bo ng’ororiet kagochinennyi, kogoitoi anyun eng’ taitab Jehovah;" 
Leviticus3:13 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab ng’ororianato, yeityo koeny eng’ taitab emait ne kituiyechin: ak koisote werikab Aron kaptisisiet korotik komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus3:14 Ak igochin inendet Jehovah eng’ choto kagochinet ne bunei mat; mwanik che kiilaach moet, ak sunetik tugul che bo mo," 
Leviticus3:15 ak soromok tuwai, ak mwanik che kiilaach soromochoto; che mi ole negite kipkitit, ak kwambeleliet ne mitei koet, koboto soromok, ingonem choto." 
Leviticus3:16 Ak kobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet; amitwogikab kagochinet chuto, che bunei mat, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny: bo Jehovah mwanik tugul." 
Leviticus3:17 Egu nito ng’atutiet ne bo agoi eng’ ibinwekwok tugul eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul, ale amat oam mwanik ak korotik." 
Leviticus4:1 King’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus4:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Ngo yai chi age tugul tengek, ama eng’ kwetyinet, eng’ kiy age tugul ne king’at Jehovah kole, amat oyai, ak ngo yai age tugul eng’ choto;" 
Leviticus4:3 ak ngo yai tengekto tisiindet ne kigiil kot koipchi bik ng’ogisto: ingogoito anyun kirgit ne neran ne libwob kogochi Jehovah, amu tengektanyi ne kogoyai, koek kagochinetab tengekto." 
Leviticus4:4 Ak ingoget kirgoto konyo kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab kirgoto, yeityo koeny kirgoto eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus4:5 Ak kotaach tisiindet ne kigiil korotikab kirgoto, ak koib kobwa emait ne kituiyechin:" 
Leviticus4:6 yeityo korooch mornennyi korotik, ak koisisie korotichoto konyil tisab eng’ taitab Jehovah, eng’ taitab anget ne ioitos got, ne bo ole tilil." 
Leviticus4:7 Ye ibata konde tisiindet alak eng’ korotichoto kuinoikab kapkorosut ne bo nyamdutik che ng’uu ne anyin, che kibeelei eng’ taitab Jehovah, noto mi emait ne kituiyechin; ak ingotumji inendet korotik tugul che bo kirgoto kaptisisiet kel ne kibeele kagochinoik, ne mitei kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus4:8 Ak kobut mwanik tugul che bo kirgoto bo kagochinetab tengekto; mwanik che kiilaach moet, ak sunetik tugul che bo mo;" 
Leviticus4:9 koboto soromok tuwai, ak mwanik che kiilaach moet, che mi ole negite sugulumdo, ak kwambeleliet ne mitei koet, koboto soromok, ingonem choto," 
Leviticus4:10 ko u ye kibutei che bo kirgit ne tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet: yeityo kobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet ne kibeele kagochinoik. 
Leviticus4:11 Ak muitab kirgoto, ak banyekyik tugul, koboto metinnyi, ak kelyekyik, ak tugukyik bo ke, ak eiyandennyi," 
Leviticus4:12 ingoib kirgoto komugul kwo komosta ne tilil eng’ sang’utab nganaset, ole kitumjin orek, ak kobeel eng’ kwenik barak che mi ma: kibeele ole kitumjin orek." 
Leviticus4:13 Ak ngo lel tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel, ak ngo ung’ak lelutionoto eng’ taitab tuiyet, ak ngo kiyai ichek kiy age tugul ne king’at Jehovah kole amat oyai, ak konam ichek tengekto;" 
Leviticus4:14 ak ye kagonaak lelutionoto kayai, kogoitoi anyun tuiyet kirgit ne neran koek kagochinet ne bo tengekto, yeityo koget konyo taitab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus4:15 Ak ingogonoor boisiekab tuiyet eunekwak metitab kirgoto eng’ taitab Jehovah; yeityo kebar kirgoto eng’ taitab Jehovah. 
Leviticus4:16 Ye ibata koib tisiindet ne kigiil korotikab kirgoto kobwa emait ne kituiyechin: 
Leviticus4:17 ak korooch tisiindet mornennyi korotik, ak koisisie eng’ taitab Jehovah konyil tisab, eng’ taitab anganato kigioiye got." 
Leviticus4:18 Yeityo konde korotichoto alak kuinoikab kapkorosut ne mitei taitab Jehovah, ne mi emait ne kituiyechin, ak korong’ji korotik tugul kelutab kaptisisiet ne kibeele kagochinoik, ne mitei kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus4:19 Ak kobut mwanikyik tugul, ak kobeel eng’ kaptisisiet." 
Leviticus4:20 Ingoyachi ko u noto kirgoto; ko u ye kiyachi kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, yachin nito agine ko u noto: ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo ichek, ak kenyochi kaat." 
Leviticus4:21 Ak ingola inendet kirgit kwo sang’utab nganaset, ak kobeel ko u ye kiga beel kirgit ne bo tai: nito ko kagochinetab tengekto ne bo tuiyet." 
Leviticus4:22 Ak ye kalel bounindet, koyai ama nai, kiy age tugul ne king’at Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi kole, amat oyai, ak konam inendet tengekto;" 
Leviticus4:23 ak ngiborji inendet tengektanyi ne kiyai, koget ng’ororiet kobunji kagochinennyi, kwesta ne libwob;" 
Leviticus4:24 ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab ng’ororianato, ak koeny eng’ ole kieng’e kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ taitab Jehovah: nito kagochinetab tengekto." 
Leviticus4:25 Ak konam tisiindet korotichoto bo kagochinetab tengekto, eng’ mornennyi, ak koiilate kuinoikab kaptisisiet ne bo kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak korong’ji korotikyik kelutab kaptisisiet, ne kibeele kagochinoik." 
Leviticus4:26 Ak kobeel mwanikyik tugul eng’ kaptisisiet, ko u ye kiyachin mwanikab tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikab kalyet: ak koyai kagaigaet tisiindet agobo inendet amu tengektanyi, ak kenyochi kaat." 
Leviticus4:27 Ngo lel chi age tugul ne bo tuiyet, kong’em kiy age tugul ne king’at Jehovah kole amat oyai, ak konam tengekto;" 
Leviticus4:28 ak ngiborji inendet tengektanyi ne koyai koget anyun ng’ororiet koek kagochinennyi, iyuoget ne libwob, kobunji tengektanyi ne koyai." 
Leviticus4:29 Ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinonoto bo tengekto, ak koeny kagochinonoto bo tengekto eng’ oldab kagochinoik che kibeelei." 
Leviticus4:30 Ak konam tisiindet korotikab artanato eng’ mornennyi, ak koiilate kuinoikab kaptisisiet ne bo kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak korong’ji korotik tugul che bo artanato, kelutab kaptisisiet." 
Leviticus4:31 Ak kobut mwanikyik tugul, ko u ye kibutei mwanikab tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikab kalyet; yeityo kobeel tisiindet eng’ kaptisisiet koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah; ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet, ak kenyochi kaat." 
Leviticus4:32 Ngo kagochinennyi ne bo tengekto ko kechiriet, koget subendo ne libwob." 
Leviticus4:33 Ak kogonoor eunnyi metitab kagochinonoto bo tengekto, ak koeny koek kagochinetab tengekto eng’ ole kieng’e kagochinoik che kibeelei." 
Leviticus4:34 Ak konam tisiindet korotichoto bo kagochinetab tengekto, eng’ mornennyi, ak koiilate kuinoikab kaptisisiet ne bo kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak korong’ji korotikyik tugul, kelutab kaptisisiet;" 
Leviticus4:35 ak kobut mwanikyik tugul, ko u ye kibutei mwanikab kechiriet ne bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet; ak ingobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet, konde baragutab kagochinoikab Jehovah, che bunei mat; ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet amu tengektanyi ne koyai, ak kenyochi kaat." 
Leviticus5:1 Ak ngo yai chi age tugul tengek, amu kagas ng’olyotab kayosiet, ak koek baoriat, ngo kigeer anan konai, ama kong’any, koibei anyun tengektanyi;" 
Leviticus5:2 anan ngo twa chi age tugul kiy age tugul ne ng’wan ne kame, anan banyekab tuga che ng’wonen, anan banyekab tuguk che ichuutegei ng’ony che ng’wonen, ak ngoung’ak eng’ inendet, komuruonitu, konami inendet anyun tengekto;" 
Leviticus5:3 anan ngo twa muruonindab chi, muruonindo age tugul ne imuruoni inendet, ak koung’ak eng’ inendet, ak ye nai kioto, konam anyun inendet tengekto:" 
Leviticus5:4 anan ngoyosio chi eng’ kutinnyi kosartae, koyai kiy ne ya, anan ne mie, kayosiet age tugul ne iyostos chi kosartae, ak koung’ak eng’ inendet, ak ye nai kioto, konam inendet anyun tengekto eng’ age eng’ tuguchoto:" 
Leviticus5:5 ak ye kagonam inendet tengekto eng’ age eng’ tuguchoto, kong’any anyun tengektanyi ne kogoyai:" 
Leviticus5:6 ak koib kagochinetab chalwoktanyi, koipchi Jehovah amu tengektanyi ne kogoyai, subendo ne bunu akwet, ngo aruetab kechir anan ko ne bo ng’oror, koek kagochinetab tengekto; ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet amu tengektanyi." 
Leviticus5:7 Ak ngo maimuchi koal aruet ne bunu akwet, koib anyun cheptugenik aeng’, anan ko arek aeng’ che bo taritik, koipchi Jehovah, koek kagochinennyi ne bo chalwogoto kogoyai; bo age kagochinetab tengekto, ko bo age kagochinet ne kibeelei." 
Leviticus5:8 Ak ingoipchi choto tisiindet, ne igoitoi korok kagochinet ne bo tengekto, koiiny kaatit ago mapcheune aeng’:" 
Leviticus5:9 yeityo koise korotikab kagochinetab tengekto tabandab kaptisisiet; ak kosochi korotik che kang’et kaptisisiet kel: nito kagochinetab tengekto. 
Leviticus5:10 Ak kogoito ne bo aeng’ koek kagochinet ne kibeelei, ko u ye kiging’at: ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet amu tengektanyi ne kogoyai, ak kenyochi kaat." 
Leviticus5:11 Ak ngo maimuchi koal cheptugenik aeng’, anan ko arek aeng’ che bo taritik, koib anyun kagochinennyi ne bo tengektanyi ne kogoyai, kebebertab taman ne bo epah ne bo busiek che tambulul koek kagochinetab tengekto; amat konde mwaita, anan ubani: amu nito kagochinetab tengekto." 
Leviticus5:12 Ak koipchi tisiindet, ak komugut tisiindet chechik konyi eut eng’ busiechato koek kabwatet ne bo choto, ak kobeel eng’ kaptisisiet, eng’ baragutab kagochinoikab Jehovah che bunei mat: nito kagochinetab tengekto." 
Leviticus5:13 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet amu tengektanyi ne koyai eng’ age tugul eng’ choto, ak kenyochi kaat: ak kobunji tisiindet che kang’et, koek kagochinetab busiek." 
Leviticus5:14 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus5:15 Ngo yai chi age tugul chalwokto, lelutiet ne koma kokwetyin, eng’ tuguk che itabanotin che bo Jehovah; kokwerichi anyun Jehovah kagochinetab chalwoktanyi, mengit ne libwob eng’ akwetab kechirek, ko u kamanutiet ne irogendochini, eng’ sekelisiek che bo feda, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil, koek kagochinetab chalwokto:" 
Leviticus5:16 ak igeeri noto king’em, ne bo kit ne kigitaban, ak kotesyi kebeberta agenge eng’ mut, kogochi tisiindet: ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet eng’ mengoto bo kagochinetab chalwokto, ak kenyochi kaat." 
Leviticus5:17 Ak ngo yai chi age tugul tengek, koyai kiy age tugul eng’ tuguchoto king’at Jehovah kole amat oyai; ago nganda kama kongen, konamei anyun inendet tengekto ui tugul, ak ibei tengektanyi." 
Leviticus5:18 Ak koget anyun mengit ne libwob ne bunu akwetab kechirek, ko u kamanutiet ne irogendochini, koek kagochinetab chalwokto kogetyi tisiindet: ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet amu kioto kiigochi kobel, ama eng’ kwetyinet, ak kenyochi kaat." 
Leviticus5:19 Nito kagochinetab chalwokto: kigonam inendet iman chalwokto eng’ taitab Jehovah. 
Leviticus6:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus6:2 Ngo yai chi age tugul tengek, kolelji Jehovah, ak koberber chitab kokwennyi eng’ tuguk che kigochin kogonor, anan eng’ kamanisiet, anan eng’ rebisiet, anan ngo sastae chitab kokwennyi;" 
Leviticus6:3 anan ngonyor kiy ne kibet, ak komwa lembech, ak koyosio eng’ lembechek; eng’ age tugul ne bo chuto tugul ne kayai chi, koyaei tengek;" 
Leviticus6:4 koek anyun, ngo kayai tengekto, ak konam lelutiet, ingoweech noto kireb, anan kiy ne kiib eng’ sastaet, anan kiy ne kigigochi kogonor, anan kiy ne kinyor ne kiga kobet," 
Leviticus6:5 anan kiy age tugul ne kiiyosio eng’ lembech agobo kioto; ingoweekta kogesta, ak kotesyi kebeberta agenge eng’ mut: kogochi chitab kobo tuguchoto, eng’ betut ne kigigikyine." 
Leviticus6:6 Ak kogetyi Jehovah kagochinennyi ne bo chalwokto, mengit ne libwob ne bunu akwetab kechirek, ko u kamanutiet ne irogendochini, koek kagochinetab chalwokto, kogetyi tisiindet:" 
Leviticus6:7 ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kenyochi kaat; eng’ kiy age tugul ne koyaei si kigikyin." 
Leviticus6:8 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus6:9 Ng’at Aron ak werikyik, ilenji, Ni ng’atutietab kagochinet ne kibeelei: ingotebe ma eng’ kaptisisiet kagochinonoto kigoitoi kebeel, kemout komugul agoi koeech; ingolal matab kaptisisiet agoi." 
Leviticus6:10 Ak ingolaach tisiindet ngoriennyi ne bo katanit, ak ingolaakyi bortanyi sirualisiek che bo katanit; ak koram orek che bo mat ne kibeele kagochinet eng’ kaptisisiet, ak konde ole negite kaptisisiet." 
Leviticus6:11 Yeityo koreek ngoroikyik, ak kolaach ngoroik alak, ak koib orek komanda koba ole mie eng’ sang’utab nganaset." 
Leviticus6:12 Ak ingerib mat ne mi kaptisisiet, kolal agoi, si mame: ak ingonde tisiindet kwenik ma karonet age tugul: ak kotet komie kagochinet ne kibeelei, eng’ baragutab tuguchoto, ak kobeel eng’ oloto mwanikab kagochinoikab kalyet." 
Leviticus6:13 Ingorib mat kolal kotugul eng’ kaptisisiet; amat kemeto kome. 
Leviticus6:14 Ak ni ng’atutietab kagochinetab busiek: igoitoi werikab Aron eng’ taitab Jehovah, eng’ taitab kaptisisionoto." 
Leviticus6:15 Ak ingomugut chechik konyi eut eng’ busiek che tambulul che bo kagochinetab busiek, ak eng’ mwanikyik, koboto ubani tugul che mitei kagochinetab busiek barak, yeityo kobeel eng’ kaptisisionoto koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny, koek kabwatet ne bo noto eng’ Jehovah." 
Leviticus6:16 Ak koam Aron ak werikyik che kong’etune choto; kiamei ama kinde mermerek eng’ komosta ne tilil; ingoam eng’ seremutab emait ne kituiyechin. 
Leviticus6:17 Magibeelei koboto mermerek. Kaagoite noto koek kebebertanywa eng’ kagochinoikyuk che bunei mat; tilil nito mising’, ko u kagochinetab tengekto, ak ko u kagochinetab chalwokto." 
Leviticus6:18 Amei choto age tugul ne muren eng’ lagokab Aron, koek noto ng’atutiet ne bo agoi eng’ ibinwekwok, eng’ kagochinoikab Jehovah che kigochin kobun mat: tililitu chi age tugul ne katwa." 
Leviticus6:19 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus6:20 Ni kagochinetab Aron ak werikyik, ne igochin Jehovah eng’ betut ne kiili inendet; egu kagochinet ne bo kotugul kebebertab taman ne bo epah ne bo busiek che tambulul, kigoitoi kebeberta age karon, kigoitoi ne bo nin age koskoleny." 
Leviticus6:21 Kiwatani koboto mwaita eng’ karnet ne lebel; ak ye kagotuiyo komie ak mwaita, iibu konyo go: igoite kagochinetab busiek che kagewatan ketonaton koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Leviticus6:22 Ak igoitoi tisiindet ne kigiil eng’ werikyik, ne igeeri inendet: kibeeljin Jehovah tugul kigesyin eng’ ng’atutiet ne wendi agoi koigeny." 
Leviticus6:23 Ak kibeelei kogesgei kagochinet age tugul ne bo busiek ne bo tisiindet: magiamei. 
Leviticus6:24 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus6:25 Mwachi Aron ak werikyik, ilenji, Ni ng’atutiet ne bo kagochinetab tengekto: kieng’e kagochinetab tengekto taitab Jehovah, ole kieng’e kagochinet ne kibeelei: tilil noto mising’." 
Leviticus6:26 Amei tisiindet ne igoitoi agobo tengekto: kiamei eng’ komosta ne itabanat, eng’ seremutab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus6:27 Tililitu kiy age tugul ne twaei banyechato: ak ye kasachi korotikab kioto ngor age tugul, imwet ngorionoto anyun eng’ komosta ne tilil." 
Leviticus6:28 Ago kituei teret ne kagiyoe banyechato: ak ngo kagiyoe teretab sugunwet, kesitei, ak kechurukta eng’ beek." 
Leviticus6:29 Amei age tugul ne muren eng’ tisiik, banyechato: tilil nito mising’." 
Leviticus6:30 Magiamei kagochinet age tugul ne bo tengekto, ne kagiib korotikyik alak tugul kobwa emait ne kituiyechin, si kobiit keyai kagaigaet eng’ ole tilil: kibeelei eng’ ma." 
Leviticus7:1 Ni ng’atutietab kagochinetab chalwokto: tilil nito mising’. 
Leviticus7:2 Kieng’e kagochinetab chalwokto ole kieng’e kagochinet ne kibeelei: ak koise korotikyik kaptisisiet komoswek tugul. 
Leviticus7:3 Ak igoitoi inendet eng’ banyechato mwanikyik tugul; saruriet, ak mwanik che kiilaach moet," 
Leviticus7:4 ak soromok tuwai, ak mwanik che kiilaach soromochoto, che mi ole negite kipkitit, ak kwambeleliet ne mitei koet, koboto soromok, ingonem choto:" 
Leviticus7:5 ak kobeel tisiindet choto eng’ kaptisisiet koek kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat: nito kagochinetab chalwokto. 
Leviticus7:6 Amei mureno age tugul eng’ tisiik banyechato: kiamei eng’ komosta ne tilil: tilil nito mising’. 
Leviticus7:7 Ko u ole teptoi kagochinetab tengekto, ko u noto agine kagochinetab chalwokto: agenge ng’atutienywa: bunjin choto tisiindet ne yaei kagaigaet agobo tuguchoto." 
Leviticus7:8 Tisiindet ne igoitoi kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo chi age tugul, kobunjin inendet magatet anan ko muitab kagochinonoto kibeelei, noto kagogoito." 
Leviticus7:9 Bunjin tisiindet ne igoitoi kagochinet, kagochinet age tugul ne bo busiek che kibeelei eng’ ma, ak che kigelei eng’ tabetab karnet, ak che kigelei eng’ karnet ne lebel." 
Leviticus7:10 Ak kagochinet age tugul ne bo busiek, ne kiburuktoi mwaita, anan ko ne yaamat, bunjin choto tugul werikab Aron, pcheei koaechin." 
Leviticus7:11 Ni ng’atutietab tiseiywotab kagochinoik che bo kalyet, ne igochin chi Jehovah." 
Leviticus7:12 Ngogoitoi agobo kongoi, kogoitoi anyun koboto tiseiywotab kongoi, makatinik che mengechen che ma kinde mermerek che kikwang’doi mwaita, ak makatinik che terteren che ma kinde mermerek che kiile mwaita, ak makatinikab busiek che tambulul che kikwang’doi mwaita, che kagotangusitu." 
Leviticus7:13 Igoitoi kagochinennyi koboto makatinik che mengechen che kaginde mermerek, koboto tiseiywotab kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet koek che bo kongoi." 
Leviticus7:14 Ak igoitoi agenge eng’ choto ne bunu kagochinet age tugul, koek kagochinet ne kinamjin barak, kigochin Jehovah; bunjin tisiindet ne isisie korotikab kagochinoikab kalyet." 
Leviticus7:15 Kiamei banyekab tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet, che bo kongoi, eng’ betunoto bo kagochinennyi, maituuchi agot kitigin kot koeekyi." 
Leviticus7:16 Ago ngo kayosiet tiseiywotab kagochinennyi, anan kagochinet ne igoitoi ko u ye kacham, keamei eng’ betunoto igoitoi tiseiywondennyi: ak keamei eng’ betutab aeng’ che kong’et eng’ choto:" 
Leviticus7:17 ago che kong’etune banyekab tiseiywot kot koit betutab somok, kebeelei eng’ ma." 
Leviticus7:18 Ak ngeam banyekab tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet eng’ betutab somok, ko magitaachei, ak magiityin inendet ne igoitoi: kiiti kele kagong’wanit, ak ibei tengektanyi chito ne amei choto." 
Leviticus7:19 Ak magiamei banyek che katwa kiy age tugul ne ng’wan; kibeelei eng’ ma. Ak amei banyechato age tugul ne tilil. 
Leviticus7:20 Ago chito ne amei banyekab tiseiywotab kagochinoik che bo kalyet, che bo Jehovah, kotinyei muruonindanyi, king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik." 
Leviticus7:21 Ak ye katwa chi age tugul kiy ne ng’wan, muruonindab chi, anan tiony ne ng’wan, anan kiy age tugul ne kiwechei ne ng’wan, yeityo koam banyekab tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikab kalyet, che bo Jehovah, king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik." 
Leviticus7:22 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus7:23 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Amat oam mwanik alak tugul, che bo kiruk, anan kechir, anan ko ng’oror." 
Leviticus7:24 Ak kimuchi keboisie eng’ boision alak, mwaitab ne kameei inegei, ak mwaitab ne katon tiong’ik: ago amat oam." 
Leviticus7:25 Amu age tugul ne amei mwaitab tany, ne igoitoi bik koek kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat, king’etoi eng’ bikyik chichoto amei." 
Leviticus7:26 Amat oam korotik alak tugul, agot che bo tarit anan che bo tiony, eng’ meng’otosiekwok alak tugul."
