Leviticus7:27 King’etoi eng’ bikyik chi age tugul ne eei korotik alak tugul. 
Leviticus7:28 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus7:29 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Inendet ne igoitoi tiseiywotab kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet, kogochin Jehovah, koipchin kagochinennyi Jehovah eng’ tiseiywotab kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet:" 
Leviticus7:30 ibu inendet eng’ eunekyik kagochinoikab Jehovah che bunei mat; ibu mwanik koboto tagatet, si keongoi tagatet koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus7:31 Yeityo kobeel tisiindet mwanik eng’ kaptisisiet: ago bunjin Aron ak werikyik tagatet. 
Leviticus7:32 Ak ogochi tisiindet chatit ne bo komostab tai koek kagochinet ne kinamji barak, ne bunu tiseiywekab kagochinoikwok che bo kalyet." 
Leviticus7:33 Ibei inendet eng’ werikab Aron ne igoitoi korotikab kagochinoikab kalyet, ak mwanik, ak chatit ne bo komostab tai, koek kebebertanyi." 
Leviticus7:34 Amu kaataach eng’ lagokab Israel kagochinetab tagatet ne kiongoi, ak kagochinetab chatit ne kinamjin barak, kobunu tiseiywek che bo kagochinoikwak che bo kalyet; ak kaagochi Aron tisiindet ak werikyik tuguchoto, kobunu lagokab Israel, koek ng’atutiet ne wendi agoi koigeny." 
Leviticus7:35 Nito kebebertab kaiilset ne bo Aron, ak kebebertab kaiilset ne bo werikyik, che bunu kagochinoik che kigochin Jehovah, kobunei mat, eng’ betut ne kiindoi inendet ichek koboisiechi Jehovah eng’ boisietab tiseinatet;" 
Leviticus7:36 che king’at Jehovah lagokab Israel kole kigochi, eng’ betut ne kiili inendet ichek. Ng’atutiet nito agoi koigeny eng’ ibinwekwak tugul." 
Leviticus7:37 Nito ng’atutietab kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak ne bo kagochjinetab busiek, ak ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, ak ne bo kagochinetab chalwokto, ak ne bo katabanet, ak ne bo tiseiywotab kagochinoik che bo kalyet;" 
Leviticus7:38 che king’at Jehovah Musa eng’ tulwetab Sinai, eng’ betut ne king’at inendet lagokab Israel, kogochi Jehovah kagochinoikwak, eng’ ong’atetab Sinai." 
Leviticus8:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus8:2 Imut Aron ak werikyik, ak iib ngoroik, ak mwaita ne kiilse, ak kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, ak mengichik aeng’, ak aterut ne mi makatinik che ma kinde mermerek;" 
Leviticus8:3 ak iyum tuiyet komugul eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin. 
Leviticus8:4 Ak kiyai Musa anyun ko u ye king’at Jehovah; ak kiiyumjigei tuiyet kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin. 
Leviticus8:5 Ak kilenji Musa tuiyet, Ni ko kit ne kogong’at Jehovah kole keyai." 
Leviticus8:6 Ak kiimut Musa Aron ak werikyik, ak koun ichek eng’ beek." 
Leviticus8:7 Ak kiilaakyi inendet ngoriet ne koi, ak kiratyi inendet birenet, ak kolaakyi ngoriet age, ak kolaakyi epod ak koratyi inendet birenetab epod, ne kiginab eng’ ng’omnatet, ak kogiich epod eng’ birenonoto." 
Leviticus8:8 Ak kiilaakyi inendet ngorietab teget: ak kiinde ngorionoto Urim ak Tumim. 
Leviticus8:9 Ak kigerji metit eng’ nariet; ak kiinde narianato ole bo togoch eurto ne bo tahabu, narianato tilil; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Leviticus8:10 Ak kinam Musa mwaita ne kiilse, ak koiil got koboto tuguk tugul che kimitei go, ak kotaban." 
Leviticus8:11 Ak kiisochinot mwaata kapkorosut konyil tisab, ak koiil kapkorosut ak tugukyik tugul, ak tabet, koboto kelunnyi, si kotaban tuguchoto." 
Leviticus8:12 Yeityo korong’ji mwaita ne kiilse metitab Aron, ak koiil inendet, si kotaban." 
Leviticus8:13 Ak kiimut Musa werikab Aron, ak kolaakyi ngoroik che koen, ak koratyi ichek birenoik, ak kigerji metowekwak eng’ chepkuloik che mengechen; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Leviticus8:14 Ak kiget kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto: ak kiigonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab kirgoto bo kagochinetab tengekto. 
Leviticus8:15 Ak kieny kirgoto; ak kitaach Musa korotik, ak kiile korotichoto kuinoikab kaptisisiet eng’ mornennyi, ak kiianyiny kaptisisiet, ak kitumji korotik kaptisisiet kel, ak kotaban, koyai kagaigaet agobo noto." 
Leviticus8:16 Ak kibut sunetik tugul che bo mo, ak kwambeleliet ne mitei koet, ak soromok tuwai, ak mwanikwak, ak kibeel Musa choto eng’ kaptisisiet." 
Leviticus8:17 Ago kibeel kirgit, ak muitanyi, ak banyekyik, ak eiyandennyi, eng’ sang’utab nganaset; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Leviticus8:18 Ak kikweri mengitab kagochinet ne kibeelei: ak kiigonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab mengoto. 
Leviticus8:19 Ak koeny: ak kiise Musa korotik kaptisisiet komoswek tugul. 
Leviticus8:20 Ak kitilat mengoto kosach, kobiit kebeberwekyik; ak kobeel Musa metit, ak kebeberwechoto, ak mwanik." 
Leviticus8:21 Ak kiiun eng’ beek tugukab ke ak kelyek; ak kibeel Musa mengoto komugul eng’ kaptisisiet; ki kagochinet noto ne kibeelei koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny: ki kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah kobunei mat; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa. 
Leviticus8:22 Ak kikweri mengit nin age, mengit ne bo boisietab katabanet: ak kiigonoor Aron ak werikyik eunekwak metitab mengoto." 
Leviticus8:23 Ak koeny; ak kitaach Musa korotikab mengoto, ak koiile walitab itit ne bo tai ne bo Aron, ak kiile mornet ne o ne bo eunnyi ne bo tai, ak mornet ne o ne bo keldanyi ne bo tai." 
Leviticus8:24 Yeityo komut werikab Aron, ak konde Musa korotik walitab itikwak che bo tai, ak eng’ morik che eechen che bo eunekwak che bo tai, ak eng’ morik che eechen che bo kelyekwak che bo tai: ak kiise Musa korotik kaptisisiet komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus8:25 Ak kibut mwanik, ak konem saruriet, ak sunetik tugul che bo mo, ak kwambelelietab koet, ak soromok tuwai, ak mwanikwak, ak chatit ne bo komostab tai." 
Leviticus8:26 Ak kiinem eng’ aterut ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ne kimitei taitab Jehovah, makatiat agenge ne ming’in ne ma kinde mermerek, ak makatiat ne ming’in ne kogiile mwaita, ak makatiat agnge ne terter, ak kiigonoor choto mwaita barak, ak eng’ chatit barak ne bo tai." 
Leviticus8:27 Ak kiinde tugul eunekab Aron, ak eng’ eunekab werikyik, ak kiongoi choto eng’ taitab Jehovah koek kagochinet ne kiongoi." 
Leviticus8:28 Ak kiinem Musa tuguchoto eng’ eunekwak, ak koib kobeel eng’ kaptisisiet eng’ baragutab kagochinet ne kibeelei: kiek che itabanotin, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny: ki kagochinet ne bunei mat ne kigochin Jehovah." 
Leviticus8:29 Yeityo koib Musa tagatet, ak kiongoi koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah; ki kebebertab Musa noto eng’ mengoto bo boisietab katabanet; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Leviticus8:30 Kiinem Musa kebebertab mwaata kiilse, ak kebebertab korotik che kimi kaptisisiet, ak kiise Aron ak ngoroikyik, ak werikyik ak ngoroikab werikyik; ak kiianyiny Aron, ak ngoroikyik, ak werikyik, ak ngoroikab werikyik." 
Leviticus8:31 Ak kilenji Musa Aron ak werikyik, Oyoi banyek eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin: ak oam eng’ oloto koboto makatinik che mi aterut ne kigitabanji boisietab katabanet, ko u ye kiang’at, ale, Amei Aron ak werikyik choto." 
Leviticus8:32 Ak obeel eng’ ma banyek ak makatinik che kang’et. 
Leviticus8:33 Ak momandoi eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin eng’ betusiek tisab, agoi kosulda betusiekwok che kitabananenok: amu itabanok eng’ betusiek tisab." 
Leviticus8:34 Ko u ye kageyai rani, ko u noto kagong’at Jehovah keyai, si koyai kagaigaet agobo okwek." 
Leviticus8:35 Ak otebe kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin betusiek tisab bet ak kemoi, oribe kotigonutikab Jehovah, si mobegu: amu kaging’ata ko u noto." 
Leviticus8:36 Kiyai anyun Aron ak werikyik tuguk tugul che king’at Jehovah eng’ Musa. 
Leviticus9:1 Ak eng’ betutab sisiit, koguur Musa Aron ak werikyik koboto boisiekab Israel;" 
Leviticus9:2 ak kolenji Aron, Kweri kirgit ne ming’in koek kagochinetab tengekto, ak mengit koek kagochinet ne kibeelei, che libwoben, igoite eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus9:3 Ak ng’alalji lagokab Israel, ilenji, Okweri kwesta koek kagochinet ne bo tengekto; ak moita ak aruetab kechir, ne masiirei kenyit agenge tuwai, che libwoben kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei:" 
Leviticus9:4 ak kirgit ak mengit kobunji kagochinoikab kalyet, che kienyei eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kagochinetab busiek che kagiburukto mwaita: amu mong’jinok Jehovah rani." 
Leviticus9:5 Ak kiget choto king’at Musa kobwa taitab emait ne kituiyechin: ak kibwa tuiyet komugul korik, nyo kotononso eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus9:6 Ak kimwa Musa kole, Ni kit ne king’at Jehovah kole oyai: ak komong’jok lilindab Jehovah." 
Leviticus9:7 Ak kilenji Musa Aron, Rikyi kaptisisiet, igoite kagochineng’ung’ ne bo tengekto, ak kagochineng’ung’ ne kibeelei, ak iyachigei kagaigaet ak iyachi bik: ak igoite kagochinet ne bo bik: ak iyai kagaigaet agobo ichek; ko u ye king’at Jehovah." 
Leviticus9:8 Ak kirikyi anyun Aron kaptisisiet, ak koeny moita ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, ne kibunji inendet." 
Leviticus9:9 Yeityo kogochi werikyik Aron, korotik; ak kiirookta mornennyi korotik, ak koiilate kuinoikab kaptisisiet, ak kotumji korotik kaptisisiet kel:" 
Leviticus9:10 ago kibeel mwanik, koboto soromok, ak kwambeleliet ne mi koet ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, eng’ kaptisisiet; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Leviticus9:11 Ak kibeel eng’ ma banyek ak muito eng’ sang’utab nganaset. 
Leviticus9:12 Ak kieny kagochinet ne kibeelei; ak kiib werikyik korotik koba ole mi Aron, ak kiisote kaptisiet komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus9:13 Ak kiipchi inendet kagochinet ne kibeelei, kiigoito kobun kebeberwek, ak metit: ak kibeel eng’ kaptisisiet." 
Leviticus9:14 Ak kiun tugukab ke ak kelyek, ak kobeel eng’ baragutab kagochinet ne kibeelei eng’ kaptisisiet." 
Leviticus9:15 Ak kiigoito inendet kagochinetab bik, ak kokweri kwesta ne bo kagochinetab tengekto ne bo bik, ak koeny, ak kogoito agobo tengekto ko u ni ka bo tai." 
Leviticus9:16 Yeityo kogoito kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kogoito ko u ng’atutiet." 
Leviticus9:17 Ak kiigoito kagochinetab busiek, ak kimugut konyi eut, ak kobeel eng’ kaptisisionoto, koboto kagochinet ne kibeelei karon agine." 
Leviticus9:18 Ak kieny kirgit koboto mengit, tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, che ki bo bik: ak kiib werikab Aron korotik kogochi inendet, ak kiise kaptisisiet komoswek tugul," 
Leviticus9:19 ak mwanikab kirgit, ak che bo mengit, ak saruriennyi, ak che kiilaach moet, ak soromok, ak kwambeleliet ne bo koet:" 
Leviticus9:20 ak kiigonoor mwanichoto tagatok, ak kobeel mwanichoto eng’ kaptisisiet:" 
Leviticus9:21 ak kiongoi Aron tagatok ak chatit ne bo komostab tai koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah; ko u ye king’at Musa. 
Leviticus9:22 Ak kiito Aron eunekyik kotokyi ole mi bik, ak koberur ichek; yeityo kochorgei ko kagogoito kagochinetab tengekto, ak kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagochinoikab kalyet." 
Leviticus9:23 Ak kiba Musa ak Aron emait ne kituiyechin, yeityo komong’, ak koberur bik: ak komong’ji lilindab Jehovah bik tugul." 
Leviticus9:24 Ak kimong’ mat kobunu taitab Jehovah, ak kobeel kagochinet ne kibeelei ak mwanik eng’ kaptisisiet: ak ye kingogeer bik tugul, kowaach, ak kobutyo kot kotiiny togochikwak ng’ony." 
Leviticus10:1 Ak kinam Nadab ak Abiu werikab Aron chi tugul terennyi, ak konde mat orit, yeityo konde orit nyamdutik che kibeelei, ak kogoito eng’ taitab Jehovah mat ne ter ne kima ng’at inendet." 
Leviticus10:2 Ak kimong’ mat ne kibun taitab Jehovah, ak kobeel ichek, ak kibek eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus10:3 Kilenji Musa anyun Aron, Ni kit ne kimwa Jehovah, kole, Aegu ne tilil eng’ ichek che rikyina, ak anyoru torornatet eng’ taitab bik tugul. Ak kisis Aron." 
Leviticus10:4 Ak kiguur Musa anyun Misael ak Elsapan, werikab Usiel chitab oretab Aron, konyo kolenji, Obwa origu, osut tupchosiekwok komanda eng’ ole tilil koba sang’utab nganaset." 
Leviticus10:5 Ak kirik anyun bichoto, ak kosut ichek, kotinyei ngoroikwak che koen, koba sang’utab nganaset, ko u ye kiga mwa Musa." 
Leviticus10:6 Ak kilenji Musa Aron, ak Eleasar ak Itamar, werikyik, Amat oyat metowekwok, amogerer ngoroikwok; si mobegu, si manerekyi inendet tuiyet komugul: ago ingoririo tupchosiekwok, got komugul ne bo Israel, amu mat ne kagonaam Jehovah." 
Leviticus10:7 Ak amomande eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, si mobegu; amu mitei eng’ okwek mwaita ne bo Jehovah ne kiilse. Ak kiyai ko u ng’olyotab Musa." 
Leviticus10:8 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Aron kolenji," 
Leviticus10:9 Amat iee divaik anan maiyek alak tugul, inye, ak weriguk che mi koboten, ye obendi emait ne kituiyechin, si mobegu: egu ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ ibinwekwok tugul;" 
Leviticus10:10 si kobiit obesie che itabanotin ak che maitabanotin, ak obesie che ng’wonen ak che tililen;" 
Leviticus10:11 si kobiit onet lagokab Israel ng’atutik tugul che kigomwachi Jehovah ichek eng’ Musa. 
Leviticus10:12 Ak kilenji Musa Aron, Eleasar, ak Itamar, werikyik che king’et, Oib kagochinetab busiek che kang’etune kagochinoik che kigochin Jehovah, che bunei mat, ak oam, amonde mermerek, eng’ ole negite kaptisisiet: amu tililen mising’;" 
Leviticus10:13 ak oam eng’ ole tilil, amu kebebertang’ung’ nito, ak kebebertab weriguk, eng’ kagochinoik che bunei mat che kigochin Jehovah: amu kiging’ata ko u noto." 
Leviticus10:14 Ak oam eng’ komosta ne tilil tagatet ne kiongoi ak chatit ne kinamjin barak; inye ak weriguk, ak tibiguk che mi koboten: amu kagigon choto koek kebebertang’ung’, ak kebeberta ne bo weriguk, eng’ tiseiywekab kagochinoik che bo kalyet che bo lagokab Israel." 
Leviticus10:15 Ibu ichek chatit ne kinamjin barak ak tagatet ne kiongoi koboto kagochinoik che bunei mat che bo mwanik, si koongoi koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah; yeityo kobunjin, ak weriguk, koek ng’atutiet ne wendi agoi koigeny; ko u ye king’at Jehovah." 
Leviticus10:16 Ak kicheng’ Musa mising’ ng’ororiet ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, ak ogeero, kaga kebeel: ak kinerekyi anyun Eleasar ak Itamar, werikab Aron che king’et, kolenji," 
Leviticus10:17 Amu nee si moam kagochinetab tengekto eng’ ole tilil, amu tilil mising’ kot, ak kagogonok inendet noto koib tengektab tuiyet, si koyai kagaigaet agobo ichek eng’ taitab Jehovah?" 
Leviticus10:18 Ogeero, ma kiib korotikyik kobwa ole itabanat orit: kaganyol oam eng’ ole tilil orit ko u ye kagang’atak." 
Leviticus10:19 Ak kilenji Aron Musa, Keero, kaibu ra nyo kogoitoi kagochinennywa ne bo tengekto, ak kagochinenywa ne kibeelei eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kagobwanja anyun tuguk che u chu: ak nda kaga am kagochinetab tengekto rani, ko tos, kata kararan eng’ taitab Jehovah?" 
Leviticus10:20 Ak ye kingogas Musa noto, komieit eng’ inendet." 
Leviticus11:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron, kolenji," 
Leviticus11:2 Omwachi lagokab Israel, olenji, Chu tiong’ik che soptos che oame eng’ tiong’ik tugul che mitei ng’ony." 
Leviticus11:3 Oame age tugul ne pcheotin siok, ak ko betotin komie, che itari baroi." 
Leviticus11:4 Ago moame chu eng’ ichek che itari baroi anan eng’ ichek che pcheotin siok: tambesik, amu itari baroi ago ma pcheotin siok, ng’wan eng’ okwek noto." 
Leviticus11:5 Ak keneriet, amu itari baroi ago ma pcheotin siok, ng’wan eng’ okwek noto." 
Leviticus11:6 Ak kiblengwet, amu itari baroi ago ma pcheotin siok, ng’wan eng’ okwek noto." 
Leviticus11:7 Ak toret, amu pcheotin siok, ak ko betotin, ago maitari baroi, ng’wan eng’ okwek noto." 
Leviticus11:8 Amat oam banyekwak, amat otwa ne kome eng’ tiong’ichoto; ng’wonen eng’ okwek choto." 
Leviticus11:9 Oame chu eng’ che mi beek: age tugul ne tinyei kebebaik ak berik eng’ beek, eng’ nyanjosiek, eng’ ainosiek, oame choto." 
Leviticus11:10 Ak tugul che matinyei kebebaik ak berik eng’ nyanjosiek, ak eng’ ainosiek, ak tugul che bendote beek, ak tuguk tugul che soptos eng’ beek, tuguchoto ko che kiwechei eng’ okwek," 
Leviticus11:11 ak ingoek choto che kiwechei eng’ okwek; amat oam banyekwak, ak egu che kiwechei che onyoru ko kabek eng’ tiong’ichoto." 
Leviticus11:12 Age tugul ne matinyei kebebaik ak berik eng’ beek, egu noto ne kiwechei eng’ okwek." 
Leviticus11:13 Ak owech chu eng’ taritik; magiamei chuto, kiwechei: kipsichit, ak motonda, ak chelogomiet;" 
Leviticus11:14 ak chesireret, ak keeret ak che kergei ak choto;" 
Leviticus11:15 ak chepkugit age tugul ak che kergei; 
Leviticus11:16 ak tiondab songolik, ak keeretab kemoi, ak taritiet ne leel ne bo nyanjet, ak keeret age ak che kergei;" 
Leviticus11:17 ak sugurut ne ming’in, ak taritietab nyanjet, ak sugurut ne o;" 
Leviticus11:18 ak sugurut ne tinyei kuinoik, ak chebokibabaa, ak chepsengwet;" 
Leviticus11:19 ak kong’onyot, ak alak che kergei ak chelogomiet, ak chesululit, ak reresiet." 
Leviticus11:20 Egu che kiwechei eng’ okwek tiong’ik tugul che tinyei kebebaik, che ing’onioti eng’ ng’ony." 
Leviticus11:21 Ago omuchi oam chu, eng’ tiong’ik tugul che bo kebebaik che bendote kelyek ang’wan, che tinyei kelyek che koen che torombene;" 
Leviticus11:22 omuchi oam agot chu eng’ ichek; chereng’endet, ak alak che bo orennyi, ak talamwet ne kiguure kimekwan, ak che bo orennyi, ak keteriat, ak che bo orennyi, ak talamwet, ak che bo orennyi." 
Leviticus11:23 Ago egu che kiwechei eng’ okwek alak tugul che tinyei kebebaik che ing’oniote kelyek ang’wan. 
Leviticus11:24 Ak omuruonitu eng’ tuguchoto: muruonitu age tugul ne twaei bortab tionyoto kagome, agoi koimen:" 
Leviticus11:25 ak age tugul ne ibei kebebertab bortab tionyoto kagome, komwetei ngoroikyik, ak komuruonitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus11:26 Ng’wan eng’ okwek tiony age tugul ne pcheotin siok, ak ko ma betotin komie, ak ne maitari baroi: muruonitu age tugul ne twaei choto." 
Leviticus11:27 Ak alak tugul che bendote mugungonikwak, eng’ tiong’ik tugul che bendote kelyek tugul ang’wan, ng’wonen choto eng’ okwek: muruonitu agoi koimen age tugul ne twaei bortab tionyoto kame." 
Leviticus11:28 Ak ingomwet ngoroikyik ne ibei bortab tionyoto kame, ak komuruonitu agoi koimen; ng’wonen choto eng’ okwek." 
Leviticus11:29 Ng’wonen eng’ okwek chu eng’ che ichuutegei ng’ony: kungundo, muriat ne ming’in, ak ne kergei ak mororochet," 
Leviticus11:30 ak ne bo oretab chepswererit ak nyiritiet, ak chebenetiet, ak kimng’elyegut, ak bung’ung’wet." 
Leviticus11:31 Chuto che ng’wonen eng’ okwek eng’ tugul che ichuutegei: muruonitu age tugul ne twaei ne kagome eng’ choto, agoi koimen." 
Leviticus11:32 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne ibutyin ne kagome eng’ choto, ngo kiy age tugul ne kigiyae ketik, anan ngor, anan mui, anan kuniet, kiy age tugul ne kiboisie, konyolu kirooch beek, ak ng’wanitu agoi koimen; yeityo anyun koanyinyit." 
Leviticus11:33 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne mi oritab teretab ng’ung’unyek, ne kagobutyi age eng’ tiong’ichoto; ak otui teronoto." 
Leviticus11:34 Ak ng’wonegitu amitwogik alak tugul che kechobei eng’ beek: ak ng’wonegitu tuguk alak tugul che kieei che mi age tugul eng’ terenichoto. 
Leviticus11:35 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne ibutyin kebebertab borto ne bo tiondo ne kagome; ngo kapkoimaut, anan terenik; kituei choto: ng’wonen choto, ak kong’wonegitu choto eng’ okwek." 
Leviticus11:36 Ago tililitu konda ne kutune beek anan keringet ne mi beek: ago muruonitu ne twaei bortab tiondo ne kame. 
Leviticus11:37 Ak ngobutyi beny age tugul ne bo tionyoto kame, keswek che kigolei, ko anyinyen." 
Leviticus11:38 Ago nginur keswechoto, ak kobutyi beny age tugul ne bo tiony ne kame, kong’wanitu eng’ okwek." 
Leviticus11:39 Ak ngo me tiony age tugul ne oame: muruonitu inendet ne twaei bortab tionyoto, agoi koimen." 
Leviticus11:40 Ak ingomwet ngoroikyik ne amei banyekab noto kame, ak komuruonitu agoi koimen: ak ingomwet ngoroik inendet ne ibei tionyoto kame, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus11:41 Egu eng’ okwek ne kiwechei kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony; magiamei. 
Leviticus11:42 Kiy age tugul ne ichuute moet ng’ony ak ne bunei kelyek ang’wan, ak age tugul ne tinyei kelyek che chang’, choto tugul che ichuutegei ng’ony, amoam choto; amu kiwechei." 
Leviticus11:43 Amoegu che kiwechei eng’ kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony, amomuruongei eng’ ichek, si kanamak muruonindo." 
Leviticus11:44 Amu ane Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’: otabange anyun, ak oegu che tililen; amu a tilil: amomuruongei eng’ kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony." 
Leviticus11:45 Amu ane Jehovah ne kiamutwak otogosu omong’une emetab Misri, si aek Kamuktaindeng’wong’: otililitu anyun, amu a tilil." 
Leviticus11:46 Ni ng’atutiet anyun, ne bo tiong’ik, ak taritik, ak kiy age tugul ne sobei ne wendoti eng’ beek, ak kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony;" 
Leviticus11:47 si kobiit kobesio che ng’wonen ak che ma ng’wonen, ak che soptos che kiamei ak che soptos che magiamei." 
Leviticus12:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus12:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Ngo manach kwony age tugul, ak kosich ng’etet, komuruonitu anyun betusiek tisab; muruonitu ko u eng’ betusiekab miandanyi ne bo arawet age tugul." 
Leviticus12:3 Ak kimuratani iririotab bortab weroto eng’ betut ne bo sisiit. 
Leviticus12:4 Ingotebe kwonyoto korotikab katililennyi betusiek sosom ak somok; matwaei kiy age tugul ne itabanat, ama mong’u ole tilil agoi kogesgei betusiek che kitilile inendet." 
Leviticus12:5 Ago ngo sich chepto, komuruonitu bebusiek taman ak ang’wan, ko u eng’ betusiekab miandanyi; ak tebyei eng’ korotikab katililennyi betusiek tamanwogik lo ak lo." 
Leviticus12:6 Ak ye kagogesgei betusiekab katililennyi, agobo ng’etet, anan ko chepto, kogetu aruetab kechir ne masiirei kenyit agenge koek kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak aruetab tarit, anan cheptuget, koek kagochinetab tengekto, koipchi tisiindet eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin:" 
Leviticus12:7 ak kogoito inendet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo kwonyoto; ak kitilil amu bandab korotikyik. Bo ng’atutioni inendet ne sigisiei, ngo kagisich ng’etet, anan ko chepto." 
Leviticus12:8 Ak ngo maimuchi koal kwonyoto aruetab kechir, konam anyun cheptugenik aeng’, anan ko arek aeng’ che bo taritik, bo age kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak bo age kagochinet ne bo tengekto: ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet, ak kotililit." 
Leviticus13:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron, kolenji," 
Leviticus13:2 Ngobwa iririotab bortab chi, anan ngo biit moet ne kayaam, anan ole ibwanat ne u ngosiat, ak yeityo koek koroito ne bo mogondos eng’ iririotab bortanyi; kimut anyun kwo ole mi Aron tisiindet, anan ko age eng’ werikyik che tisiik:" 
Leviticus13:3 ak kogeer tisiindet koroyoto mitei iririotab borto: ak ngo kogowalak kororik che mi koroyoto koleelagitu, ak ngo kogororokto moanato kwo orit, ko kagoek koroito ne bo mogondos: ak kogeer tisiindet anyun inendet, ak komwaita kole muruon chichoto." 
Leviticus13:4 Ak ngo leel ngosiat ne mi iririotab bortanyi, ak ma lolondoot, ak ngo mawalak kororikyik koleelagitu, kogerji ui anyun tisiindet eng’ betusiek tisab inendet ne tinyei koroyoto:" 
Leviticus13:5 ak kogeer tisiindet inendet eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ak ngo keer kole ta ko u yegonye koroyoto, ak ma konenderi eng’ iririot, kogerji ui anyun tisiindet inendet betusiek tisab alak:" 
Leviticus13:6 ak kogeer tisiindet inendet kogeny eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ak ngo machei kola, ak ma konenderi koroito eng’ iririot, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, kagotililit chichi: kaga moet ne kayaam: ak komwet ngoroikyik, ak kotililit anyun." 
Leviticus13:7 Ago ngonender moet eng’ iririot, ye kagoborjigei tisiindet eng’ betut ne bo katililennyi, koborjigei anyun tisiindet kogeny:" 
Leviticus13:8 ak kogeer tisiindet, ak ngo keer kole kagonender moet eng’ iririot, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Muruon chichi: mogondos chuto." 
Leviticus13:9 Ye kagonam chito miandab mogondos, kimutyi anyun tisiindet," 
Leviticus13:10 ak kogeer anyun tisiindet, ak ogeero, ngo leel ole ibwanat eng’ iririot, ak ngo kagowal kororik koleelagitu, ak kotook banyek ko u yegonye," 
Leviticus13:11 ko mogondosik che kigoamei keny iririotab bortanyi, komwaita tisiindet kole, Muruon chichi: magerei tisiindet inendet; amu muruon." 
Leviticus13:12 Ak ngo mong’une mogondosik ola tugul eng’ iririonnyi, ak koyom borto tugul ne bo inendet ne tinyei koroito, koboch metinnyi agoi kelyekyik, ne te ne imuchi kogeer tisiindet;" 
Leviticus13:13 kogeer anyun tisiindet; ak ogeero, ngo kogoyom mogondosik bortanyi tugul, komwaita anyun kole, Tilil chichi tinyei koroito; kogowalak borto tugul koleelit: tilil inendet." 
Leviticus13:14 Ago eng’ betut ne katook banyek ko u yegonye, komuruonit anyun inendet." 
Leviticus13:15 Ak kogeer tisiindet banyechato, ak komwaita kole, Muruon chichi; muruon borto; mogondos nito." 
Leviticus13:16 Ak ngowalak banyek kogeny kowalogis koleelagitu, konyo anyun inendet ole mi tisiindet," 
Leviticus13:17 ak kogeer tisiindet inendet: ak ogeero, ngo kagowalak koroito koleelit, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Tilil inendet ne tinyei koroito: tilil inendet." 
Leviticus13:18 Ak ngo biitune iririotab borto ondiriet, ne kiga kosob," 
Leviticus13:19 ak ngo biitune ole kami ondiriet, ole ibwanat ne leel, anan ngosiat ne toogu, ne leel, ne machei ko birir, koborji anyun tisiindet;" 
Leviticus13:20 ak kogeer tisiindet ak ogeero, ngo lolondoot eng’ borto, ak kowalak kororikyik koleelagitu, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Muruon inendet: nito koroito ne bo mogondos, kogomong’une ondiriet." 
Leviticus13:21 Ak ngo keer tisiindet kole mami kororik che leelach, ama lolondoot eng’ iririot, ago ma toogu mising’, kogerji ui anyun tisiindet inendet betusiek tisab:" 
Leviticus13:22 ak ngonenderi eng’ iririot, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Muruon chichi: koroito nito." 
Leviticus13:23 Ago ngo matesak ngosiandanato konender, ko kaga berutietab ondiriet; ak komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Tilil chichi." 
Leviticus13:24 Anan ye tinyei borto ole kolal eng’ iririot, ak kotook banyekyik eng’ oloto kalal, ko u yegonye, ak koigei yoto ngosiat ne leel ne birir anan ko ne leel;" 
Leviticus13:25 kogeer anyun tisiindet kioto: ak ngo kogowalak kororik koleelagitu, ak ko lolondoot; ko mogondosik noto, ne kogomong’une ole kolal: ak komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Muruon chichi: koroito ne bo mogondos nito." 
Leviticus13:26 Ago ngo keer tisiindet kole, mami kororik che leelach ngosiandanato, ak ma lolondoot eng’ iririot, ak ma toogu mising’; kogerji ui anyun tisiindet inendet betusiek tisab:" 
Leviticus13:27 ak kogeer tisiindet anyun inendet kogeny eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ak ngonenderi eng’ iririot, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Muruon chichi: nito koroito ne bo mogondos." 
Leviticus13:28 Ak ngo matesak ngosiandanato konender eng’ iririot, ama toogu mising’; ko kabwanetab ole kolal, ak komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Tilil chichi: amu berutietab ole kolal nito." 
Leviticus13:29 Ak ye tinyei mureno anan kobogorio koroito eng’ metit anan ko eng’ tamnet," 
Leviticus13:30 kogeer anyun tisiindet koroyoto: ak ngo keer ko lolondoot eng’ iririot, ak mitei kororiet ne talelio ak ko tenden, komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Muruon chichi: moet nito ne u kacheet, mogondos nito ne bo metit anan ko tamnet." 
Leviticus13:31 Ak ngo keer tisiindet moanato u kacheet, kole, ma lolondoot eng’ iririot, ama mi kororik che tuuen, kogerji ui anyun tisiindet betusiek tisab inendet ne tinyei koroyoto yaamei:" 
Leviticus13:32 ak kogeer tisiindet koroyoto eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ak ngo ma tesoksei moanato, ama mi kororik che talelionen, ak ngo ma lolondoot moanato eng’ iririot," 
Leviticus13:33 kicherji anyun metit, ago maicheru inendet ole mi kacheet; ak koger tisiindet eng’ betusiek alak tisab chichoto tinyei kacheet:" 
Leviticus13:34 ak eng’ betut ne bo tisab kogeer tisiindet moanato: ak ngo ma tesoksei moet eng’ iririot, ama lolondoot eng’ yoto; komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, Tilil inendet: ak komwet ngoroikyik, ak kotililit." 
Leviticus13:35 Ago ngo tesak moet eng’ iririot ko kagobata katililennyi; 
Leviticus13:36 kogeer anyun tisiindet inendet: ak ogeero, ngo tesoksei moet eng’ iririot, ko macheng’ei anyun tisiindet kororik che talelionen, amu muruon inendet." 
Leviticus13:37 Ago ngo keer kole ma tesoksei kachaanato, ak kole, kogobityo kororik che tuuen eng’ yoto; kagosob, kagotililit: ak komwaita tisiindet kole, Kagotililit." 
Leviticus13:38 Ak ye tinyei mureno anan kobogorio ole ibwanat ne u ngosenik eng’ iririotab borwekwak, agot ngosenik che leelach;" 
Leviticus13:39 kogeer anyun tisiindet: ak ogeero, ngo ma leelachen mising’ ngosenichato eng’ iririotab borwekwak; ko kaga tisonok kityo che komong’une iririot; tilil inendet." 
Leviticus13:40 Ak ngo chur metitab chi, ko chi ne bo bosta; tilil inendet." 
Leviticus13:41 Ago ngo chur metit ole bo togoch, kotinyei bosta eng’ togoch; ko tilil inendet." 
Leviticus13:42 Ago ngo mitei miando ne iboru leelindo ne birir eng’ bosta anan eng’ togoch; noto ko mogondosik che komong’une bostanyi anan ko togennyi. 
Leviticus13:43 Kogeer anyun tisiindet inendet: ak ogeero, ngo leel ne birir miando ne ibwanat eng’ bostanyi, anan ko eng’ togennyi, ko u ye toogu mogondosik eng’ iririotab borto;" 
Leviticus13:44 inendet ko chi ne bo mogondos, muruon: mwaitoi anyun tisiindet kole, Muruon chichi: mi koroito metinnyi." 
Leviticus13:45 Kibetei ngoroikab ne amei mogondosik, chichoto tinyei koroito, ak kiyatei metinnyi, ak kotuch kutit ne bo barak, ak koboloti kolen, A ng’wan, a ng’wan." 
Leviticus13:46 Muruonitu inendet betusiek tugul kote koamei mianoto; muruon inendet: ak komeng’is inegei; mi sang’utab nganaset meng’otennyi. 
Leviticus13:47 Kiborjin tisiindet ngoriet ne mi koroitab mogondosik, agot ngo bo ngorionoto kororikab kechirek, anan ngo bo katanit:" 
Leviticus13:48 anan ngo mitune usisiek che kigitoor anan che kigimur; che bo katanit, anan ngo che bo kororikab kechirek; ngo mitei magatet, anan eng’ kiy age tugul ne kiyae magatet;" 
Leviticus13:49 ngo machei konyalil anan ngo machei kobirir koroyoto eng’ ngoriet, anan eng’ magatet, anan eng’ usisiek che kigitoore anan che kigimure, anan eng’ kiy age tugul ne kigiyae magatet; nito koroito ne bo mogondos." 
Leviticus13:50 Ak kogeer tisiindet koroyoto, ak kogonor kioto tinyei koroito eng’ betusiek tisab:" 
Leviticus13:51 ak kogeer koroyoto eng’ betut ne bo tisab: ngonenderi koroito eng’ ngoriet, ngo mitune usisiek che kigitoore anan che kigimure, anan eng’ magatet ne kiboisie eng’ kiy age tugul; ko mogondosik che ng’emisiei; ng’wan kioto." 
Leviticus13:52 Ak ingobeel ngorionoto anyun, ngo bo usisiek che kigitoor anan che kigimur, ngo che bo kororikab kechirek anan ngo che bo katanit, anan kiy age tugul ne bo magatet, ne tinyei koroito: amu noto ko mogondosik che ng’emisiei; kibeelei eng’ ma." 
Leviticus13:53 Ak ngo keer tisiindet kole ma tesoksei koroyoto eng’ ngoriet, ngo eng’ usisiek che kigitoor anan che kigimur, anan eng’ kiy age tugul ne bo magatet;" 
Leviticus13:54 kong’at anyun tisiindet kole, kemwet kioto tinyei koroito, ak kogonor kioto eng’ betusiek tisab alak:" 
Leviticus13:55 ak kogeer tisiindet, ko kagiundo koroyoto: ak ngo mawalak koroyoto eng’ saleiywekyik, amainenderi koroyoto, ko ng’wan anyun; ibeel eng’ ma: ng’emindet noto, ngo mitune churatet orit anan sang’." 
Leviticus13:56 Ak ngo keer tisiindet kole ma kotoogu komie koroyoto ko kagemwet, kogerer ole mi koroyoto, koisto eng’ ngoriet anan eng’ magatet, anan eng’ usisiek che kigitoore anan che kigimure;" 
Leviticus13:57 ak ngo ta ko toogu eng’ ngoriet, eng’ usisiek che kigitoore anan che kigimure, anan eng’ kiy age tugul ne bo magatet, ko koroito ne inenderi: beel anyun kioto tinyei koroito, eng’ ma." 
Leviticus13:58 Ak ngo kogobagakta koroito ngoriet, ngo ne bo usisiek che kigitoor anan che kigimur, anan kiy age tugul ne bo magatet ne imwete, kemwet anyun ne bo aeng’, ak kotililit." 
Leviticus13:59 Nito ng’atutiet ne bo koroitab mogondosik ne mi ngorietab kororikab kechirek anan ko ne bo katanit, anan eng’ usisiek che kigitoore anan che kigimure, anan eng’ kiy age tugul ne bo magatet, komwaita anyun kole tilil, anan komwaita kole ng’wan." 
Leviticus14:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus14:2 Egu nito ng’atutiet ne bo chito ne amei mogondosik eng’ betut ne bo katililennyi: kimutyin inendet tisiindet: 
Leviticus14:3 ak komanda tisiindet eng’ nganaset; ak kogeer tisiindet, ak ngo kogosob koroitab mogondosik eng’ chichoto komiani;" 
Leviticus14:4 kong’at anyun tisiindet kole, keib taritik aeng’ che tililen che soptos agobo inendet ne kitilili, ak ketitab taragonik, ak ngoriet ne birir, ak husop:" 
Leviticus14:5 ak kong’at tisiindet kole kobar taritiet age eng’ teret ne bo ng’ung’unyek, eng’ baragutab beek che rootei:" 
Leviticus14:6 ak konam tisiindet taritiet ne sobei, ak ketitab taragonik, ak ngoriet ne birir, ak husop, ak korooch choto tugul koboto taritiet ne sobei, korotikab taritianato kagibar eng’ baragutab beek che rootei:" 
Leviticus14:7 ak koise inendet ne kitilili eng’ mogondosik konyil tisab, ak komwaita kole, Tilil, ak kounda taritianato sobei kwo kewanin." 
Leviticus14:8 Ak komwet ngoroikyik chichoto kitilili, ak konem sumeekyik tugul, ak koungei eng’ beek, ak kotililit: ak ye ibata noto konyo nganaset orit, ak kotebe sang’utab emainnyi betusiek tisab." 
Leviticus14:9 Ak eng’ betutab tisab konem sumeekyik tugul eng’ metinnyi ak tamnennyi ak kororikab konyek, inemu agot kororikyik tugul: ak komwet ngoroikyik, ak koungei ak kotililit." 
Leviticus14:10 Ak konam eng’ betut ne bo sisiit arek aeng’ che mengichik che libwoben, ak aruetab kechir, subendo ne libwob, ne masiirei kenyit agenge, ak kebeberwek somok eng’ taman che bo epah agenge che bo busiek che tambulul, koek kagochinetab busiek, che kigiburukto mwaita, ak tabet ne ming’in ne bo mwaita." 
Leviticus14:11 Ak kogoito tisiindet ne itilili inendet, chichoto kitilili ak tuguchoto, eng’ taitab Jehovah, eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin:" 
Leviticus14:12 ak konam tisiindet mengit agenge eng’ arechato bo kechir, ak kogoito koek kagochinetab chalwokto, koboto tabet ne ming’in ne bo mwaita, ak koongoi tuguchoto koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah:" 
Leviticus14:13 ak koeny mengoto ming’in eng’ komosta ne kieng’e kagochinetab tengekto ak kagochinet ne kibeelei, eng’ ole tilil; amu ko u ye bunjin kagochinetab tengekto tisiindet, ko u noto bunjin inendet kagochinetab chalwokto: tilil mising’ kosiir:" 
Leviticus14:14 ak konam tisiindet korotik alak eng’ che bo kagochinetab chalwokto, ak konde tisiindet walitab itit ne bo tai ne bo inendet ne kitilili, ak eng’ mornet ne o ne bo eutab tai, ak eng’ mornet ne o ne bo keldanyi ne bo tai:" 
Leviticus14:15 yeityo konem tisiindet mwanik alak che mi tabet, ak korong’ji rubeitab eunnyi ne bo katam:" 
Leviticus14:16 ak korooch tisiindet mornennyi ne bo tai mwaata mi eunnyi ne bo katam, ak koisisie mwaata eng’ mornennyi eng’ taitab Jehovah konyil tisab;" 
Leviticus14:17 ak mwaita ne kang’etune eutab tisiindet konde walitab itit ne bo tai ne bo inendet ne kitilili, ak eng’ mornet ne o ne bo eunnyi ne bo tai, ak eng’ mornet ne o ne bo keldanyi ne bo tai, eng’ baragutab korotikab kagochinet ne bo chalwokto." 
Leviticus14:18 Ak korong’ji mwaita ne kang’etune eutab tisiindet, metitab inendet ne kitilili: ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus14:19 Ak kogoito tisiindet kagochinetab tengekto, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo inendet ne kitilili amu muruonindanyi; yeityo koeny kagochinet ne kibeelei:" 
Leviticus14:20 ak kogoito kagochinetab busiek eng’ kaptisisiet: ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet, ak kotililit." 
Leviticus14:21 Ak ngo kibanania, ama imuchi konyor che yamegei ak kioto, kokweri anyun mengit agenge ne ming’in koek kagochinet ne bo chalwokto ne kiongoi, si koyai kagaigaet agobo inendet, ak kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo epah agenge ne bo busiek che tambulul che kagiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek, ak tabet ne ming’in ne bo mwaita;" 
Leviticus14:22 ak cheptugenik aeng’, anan arek aeng’ che bo taritik, ko u ye imuchi konyor; ak kobunji age kagochinetab tengekto, ak kobunji age kagochinet ne kibeelei." 
Leviticus14:23 Ak ingoipchi inendet tisiindet tuguchoto eng’ betut ne bo sisiit, kobunji katililennyi, eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus14:24 Ak konam tisiindet aruetab kechir ne bo kagochinetab chalwokto, ak tabetab mwaita, ak koongoi tisiindet choto eng’ taitab Jehovah koek kagochinet ne kiongoi:" 
Leviticus14:25 yeityo koeny aruanato bo kagochinetab chalwokto, ak ingoib tisiindet alak eng’ korotikab kagochinetab chalwokto, ak konde walitab itit ne bo tai ne bo inendet ne kitilili, ak eng’ mornet ne o ne bo eunnyi ne bo tai, ak eng’ mornet ne bo keldanyi ne bo tai:" 
Leviticus14:26 ak korong’ji tisiindet mwanik alak rubeitab eunnyi ne bo katam: 
Leviticus14:27 ak koisisie tisiindet eng’ mornennyi ne bo tai mwanik alak che mi eunnyi ne bo katam konyil tisab eng’ taitab Jehovah: 
Leviticus14:28 ak konde tisiindet mwanichoto alak che mi eunnyi, walitab ititab tai ne bo inendet ne kitilili, ak eng’ mornet ne o ne bo eunnyi ne bo tai, ak eng’ mornet ne o ne bo keldanyi ne bo tai, eng’ baragutab korotikab kagochinet ne bo chalwokto:" 
Leviticus14:29 ak korong’ji tisiindet mwanik che kang’etune eunnyi, metitab inendet ne kitilili, si koyai kagaigaet agobo inendet eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus14:30 Yeityo kogoito agenge eng’ cheptugenik, anan aruet agenge ne bo taritik, ko u ye imuchi konyor;" 
Leviticus14:31 agot ko u ye imuchi konyor, kobunji age kagochinetab tengekto, ak kobunji age kagochinet ne kibeelei, koboto kagochinetab busiek: ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet ne kitilili eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus14:32 Nito ng’atutiet ne bo inendet ne mitei koroitab mogondosik orinnyi, ne maimuchi konyor che yamei kitilile." 
Leviticus14:33 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron, kolenji," 
Leviticus14:34 Ye oit emetab Kanan, ne agonok kobunjok, ak ande koroitab mogondos got age eng’ emet ne bunjinok;" 
Leviticus14:35 konyo anyun chitab kobo goyoto konyo komwachi tisiindet, kolenji, Ageere ale mitei koroito got:" 
Leviticus14:36 kong’at anyun tisiindet kole, kimaanda tuguk tugul eng’ go, kotomo kwo go tisiindet kogeer koroyoto, si mang’wonegitu tuguk tugul che mi goyoto: ak yeityo anyun kwo go tisiindet kogeerot got:" 
Leviticus14:37 ak kogeer koroito, ak ngo mi koroito inatusiekab got, ak ngo mitoti kelongonik che machei ko nyalilen ak che machei ko biriren, ak ngo lolondootin kosiir totet;" 
Leviticus14:38 komanda anyun tisiindet eng’ goyoto agoi kurgat ak koger goyoto betusiek tisab: 
Leviticus14:39 ak konyo tisiindet kogeny eng’ betut ne bo tisab, konyo kogeer: ak ngo keer ko tesoksei koroyoto eng’ inatusiekab got;" 
Leviticus14:40 kong’at anyun tisiindet, kicher koik che tinyei koroito, ak kewirji komosta ne ya eng’ sang’utab nganaset:" 
Leviticus14:41 ak kong’at inendet kole, keng’oing’oi got komoswek tugul eng’ got orit, ak kotumji bichoto tartarik che king’oing’oe goyoto sang’utab nganaset komosta ne ya:" 
Leviticus14:42 ak koib koik alak, konde ole kami koik chugai; ak konam inendet tartarik alak, komale got." 
Leviticus14:43 Ak ngo mong’ koroito kogeny kotook eng’ got, ko kagoib koik koba sang’, ak ko kagong’oing’oi inendet got, ak ko kagemal;" 
Leviticus14:44 konyo anyun tisiindet go konyo kogeer, ak ngo katesak koroito eng’ got, ko mogondosik che ng’emisiei eng’ go: ng’wan anyun goyoto." 
Leviticus14:45 Ingobut goyoto, koikyik, ak ketikyik, ak tartarik tugul che bo goyoto; ak koib choto koba komosta ne ya eng’ sang’utab nganaset." 
Leviticus14:46 Ak kogeny, ngwo chi goyoto kota ko kerat got, kong’wanitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus14:47 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik ne karu goyoto; ak mwetei ngorikyik inendet ne kaamisie goyoto. 
Leviticus14:48 Ak ngwo go tisiindet kogeer, ak ogeero, matesak koroito eng’ goyoto ko kagemal; komwaita anyun tisiindet kole, tilil got, amu kagosob got eng’ koroyoto." 
Leviticus14:49 Ak konam inendet taritik aeng’, ak ketitab taragonik, ak ngoriet ne birir, ak husop, koanyinye got:" 
Leviticus14:50 ak kobar taritiet age eng’ teretab ng’ung’unyek eng’ baragutab beek che rootei: 
Leviticus14:51 ak konam inendet ketitab taragonik, ak husop, ak ngoriet ne birir, koboto taritiet ne sobei, ak korooch tuguchoto korotikab taritiet ne kagebar, ak eng’ beek che rootei, ak koise got konyil tisab." 
Leviticus14:52 Ak koanyiny got eng’ korotik che bo taritianato, ak eng’ beechoto rootei, ak eng’ taritianato sobei, ak eng’ ketitab taragonik, ak eng’ husop, ak eng’ ngoriet ne birir:" 
Leviticus14:53 ago ingounda anyun taritiet ne sobei kotiriren komanda eng’ nganaset kwo kewanin: koyai anyun ko u noto kagaigaet agobo got; ak kotililit. 
Leviticus14:54 Ni ng’atutiet ne bo koroito age tugul ne bo mogondosik, ak ne bo kacheet," 
Leviticus14:55 ak ne bo ngoriet ne tinyei mogondosik, ak ne bo got," 
Leviticus14:56 ak ole ibwansei, ak ole yaamat moet, ak ole ibwanat ne u ngosiat;" 
Leviticus14:57 si kinet ye ng’wonen, ak ye tililen: nito ng’atutietab mogondosik." 
Leviticus15:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa ak Aron, kolenji," 
Leviticus15:2 Omwachi lagokab Israel, olenji, Ye tinyei chi kuseret eng’ bortanyi, komuruonit anyun amu kuseronoto." 
Leviticus15:3 Ak ni muruonindanyi ne bo kuseronoto: agot ngo mandoi tuguchoto eng’ bortanyi anan ngo kerak, ko muruonindanyi noto." 
Leviticus15:4 Ng’wanitu itogut age tugul ne rue inendet ne tinyei kuseret: ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne tebe. 
Leviticus15:5 Ak mwetei chi age tugul ngoriennyi ne twaei itogunnyi, ak koungei eng’ beek, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:6 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik, ak koungei eng’ beek inendet ne tebe kiy age tugul ne katebe chichoto tinyei kuseret, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:7 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne twaei bortab chichoto tinyei kuseret, ak koungei eng’ beek, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:8 Ak ngo ng’utyi ne tinyei kuseronoto chito ne tilil; komwetei anyun ngoroikyik, ak koungei eng’ beek, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:9 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne kiitoi, si kotebe chichoto tinyei kuseronoto." 
Leviticus15:10 Ak muruonitu agoi koimen chi age tugul ne twaei kiy age tugul ne mi ole tebe: ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne ibei tuguchoto, ak koungei eng’ beek, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:11 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik chi age tugul ne katwa noto ne tinyei kuseronoto, ago katomo koun eunekyik, ak koungei, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:12 Ak kituei teret ne kigiyai eng’ ng’ung’unyek ne katwa chichoto tinyei kuseret, ak kiuni eng’ beek kit age tugul ne kigiyae ketit." 
Leviticus15:13 Ak ye sob chichoto eng’ mianoto bo kuseret, koiityigei betusiek tisab che bo kaanyinyennyi, ak komwet ngoroikyik, ak koun bortanyi eng’ beek che rootei, ak kotililit." 
Leviticus15:14 Ak kocheng’jigei eng’ betut ne bo sisiit cheptugenik aeng’, anan arek aeng’ che bo taritik, ak konyo taitab Jehovah agoi kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, kwo kogochi tisiindet:" 
Leviticus15:15 ak kogoito tisiindet choto kobunji age kagochinetab tengekto, ak kobunji age kagochinet ne kibeelei; ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet eng’ taitab Jehovah agobo inendet amu kuserennyi." 
Leviticus15:16 Ak ngoruotito chi age tugul, ak komanda keswekab iyotet eng’ bortanyi, koungei anyun borto tugul eng’ beek, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:17 Ak kemwet ngoriet age tugul, ak muito age tugul, ne katiiny keswechoto, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:18 Ak kwondo agine ne kaituiyogei ak muren, konyolu koungei ichek tuwai, ak komuruonitu tuwai agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:19 Ak ngo tyech ng’ony kobogoriondo, ak konai kole, kaga betunnyi ne bo arawet, kotebe muruonindanyi betusiek tisab: ak komuruonit agoi koimen age tugul ne twaei inendet." 
Leviticus15:20 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne siebei eng’ muruonindanyi: ak komuruonit kiy age tugul ne tebe. 
Leviticus15:21 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik chi age tugul ne twaei itogunnyi, ak koungei, ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:22 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik chi age tugul ne twaei kiy age tugul ne katebe kobogoriondonoto, ak koungei ak komuruonit agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:23 Ak ngo mi tuguchoto itogut, anan ko eng’ kiy age tugul ne katebe kobogoriondonoto, ye katwa inendet kioto, komuruonitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:24 Ak ngo ruiyo chi age tugul ak kobogoriondonoto, ak kotiiny inendet simwekab kobogoriondonoto, komuruonitu betusiek tisab chichoto; ak kong’wanit itogut age tugul ne karue." 
Leviticus15:25 Ak ngo bwanei korotik eng’ kobogoriot eng’ betusiek che chang’ che ma eng’ betusiek che kitabane, anan ngo siir betusiek che bo katabanennyi kobwanei; betusiechoto tugul che bwanei korotik che bo simwo eng’ inendet kogergeitu ak betusiek che kitabani: muruon inendet." 
Leviticus15:26 Kergeitu itogut age tugul ne rue eng’ betusiek che mong’une korotik ak itogutab betusiekab katabanennyi: ak muruonitu kiy age tugul ne tebe ko u muruonindab katabanennyi. 
Leviticus15:27 Ak muruonitu age tugul ne twaei tuguchoto, ak mwetei ngoroikyik, ak koungei, ak muruonitu agoi koimen." 
Leviticus15:28 Ago ngo kagogesgei mandaetab simwekyik, koiityigei anyun betusiek tisab, ak kotililit ye kagobata choto." 
Leviticus15:29 Ak eng’ betut ne bo sisiit konamjigei cheptugenik aeng’, anan arek aeng’ che bo cheptugenik, ak koipchi tisiindet, agoi kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus15:30 Ak kogoito tisiindet age kobunji kagochinetab tengekto, ak age kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei; ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet eng’ taitab Jehovah amu mandaetab simwekyik." 
Leviticus15:31 Otabani lagokab Israel ko u noto agobo simwekwak; si mabek kotinyei simwo, ye imuruon gonnyu ne mitei kwenunywa." 
Leviticus15:32 Bo ng’atutioni inendet ne tinyei kuseret, ak inendet ne mandoe keswekab iyotet, ak muruonitu amu noto;" 
Leviticus15:33 bo kobogoriot ne kitabani amu simwekyik, ak muren ne tinyei kuseret, bo muren, ak ko bo kobogorio, ak ko bo inendet ne ruitos ak kobogorio ne ma tilil." 
Leviticus16:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa, kingobata meetab werik aeng’ che bo Aron, ye kingorikyi taitab Jehovah, ak kobek;" 
Leviticus16:2 ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Mwachi Aron ng’etab komet, si manyonei atkai tugul ole tilil orit ne bo anget ne kigioiye got, eng’ taitab keruetab rirenet ne mi moinget barak; si mame: amu among’u eng’ boldet eng’ baragutab keruetab rirenet." 
Leviticus16:3 Nyonei Aron ole tilil ak chu: kirgit ne neran kobunji kagochinetab tengekto, ak mengit kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei." 
Leviticus16:4 Ingolaach ngoriet ne koi ne itabanat ne bo katanit, ak ingolaach sirualisiek che bo katanit, ak korategei birenet ne bo katanit ak kilaakyi chepkulet ne bo katanit: choto ngoroik che itabanotin; ak iuni bortanyi eng’ beek, si kolaachi ngoroichoto." 
Leviticus16:5 Ak koget eng’ tuiyetab lagokab Israel kwesik aeng’ kobunji kagochinetab tengekto, ak mengit agenge kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei." 
Leviticus16:6 Ak kogoito Aron kirgit kai, ni ko bo kagochinetab tengekto, ne nenyi inegei, ak koyachjigei kagaigaet, ak gonnyi." 
Leviticus16:7 Ak kokweri kwesichoto aeng’, ak konde taitab Jehovah, eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Leviticus16:8 Ak koser Aron barbarek agobo kwesichoto aeng’; bunjin age Jehovah, kobunjin age Asasel." 
Leviticus16:9 Yeityo kogoito Aron kwesta ne kagobutyi barbariat, kobunji Jehovah, ak kogoito koek kagochinetab tengekto." 
Leviticus16:10 Ago kwesta ne kagobutyi barbariat ne bo Asasel, kinde taitab Jehovah kosobei, si keyai kagaigaet agobo inendet, si keonda kwo surkwen kobunji Asasel." 
Leviticus16:11 Yeityo kogoito Aron eito ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, ne nenyi inegei, ak koyachigei kagaigaet, ak gonnyi, ak koeny kirgoto bo kagochinetab tengekto ne nenyi inegei;" 
Leviticus16:12 ak konem teret ne nyiitat ng’etetiot ne bunu matab kaptisisiet ne mi taitab Jehovah, ak ko nyiitat eunekyik nyamdutik che ng’uu ne anyiny che kigitui komengegitu, ak koib koba got ne bo orit, ne kigioiye anget." 
Leviticus16:13 Ak konde inendet nyamdutik ma, eng’ taitab Jehovah si kobiit kotuch iyeto ne bo nyamdutik keruetab rirenet ne mi baragutab baornatet, si mame." 
Leviticus16:14 Ak konem korotik alak che bo kirgoto, ak koise eng’ mornennyi keruetab rirenet ole tokyingei kong’asis; ak koisisie korotik eng’ taitab keruetab rirenet eng’ mornennyi konyil tisab." 
Leviticus16:15 Yeityo koeny kwesta ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, ne bo bik, ak koib korotikab kweata koba got ne bo orit ne kigioiye anget; ak koyachi korotichoto kit ne koyachi korotik che bo kirgit, ak koise keruetab rirenet, ak taitab keruetab rirenet:" 
Leviticus16:16 ak koyai kagaigaet agobo ole tilil, amu muruonindab lagokab Israel, ak bistoenywa, agot tengekwogikwak tugul: ak koyachi ko u noto emait ne kituiyechin, ne meng’isiei koboto ichek eng’ kwenutab muruonindanywa." 
Leviticus16:17 Amat kobiit chi ne mi emait ne kituiyechin, ye wendi tisiindet inendet si koyai kagaigaet eng’ ole tilil, agoi komong’ sang’, ko kagoyachigei kagaigaet, ak gonnyi, ak tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel." 
Leviticus16:18 Yeityo komanda sang’, kwo ole mi kaptisisiet ne mi taitab Jehovah, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo noto; ak konam korotik alak che bo kirgit, ak che bo kwesta, ak koiile kuinoikab kaptisisiet komoswek tugul." 
Leviticus16:19 Ak koise korotik kaptisisiet eng’ mornennyi konyil tisab, ak koanyiny, ak kotilil koistoe muruonindab lagokab Israel." 
Leviticus16:20 Ak ye kagoges kagaigaetab ole tilil, ak emait ne kituiyechin, ak kaptisisiet, kogoito anyun kwesta ne sobei:" 
Leviticus16:21 ak kogonoor Aron eunekyik tuwai metitab kweata sobei, ak kong’any tengekwogik tugul che bo lagokab Israel, ak bistoenywa tugul, kong’ururi artanato; ak kogesenji choto metitab kweata, ak kogochi chito ne kagochopgei kokweri kwo surkwen:" 
Leviticus16:22 ak kogesen anyun kweata tengekwogikwak tugul koba emet ole mamenyei chi: ak kounda artet kwo eng’ oloto bo surkwen. 
Leviticus16:23 Ak konyo Aron agoi emait ne kituiyechin, ak koreek ngoroikab katanit che kailaagoti inendet si kowendi ole tilil, ak kobagakta eng’ oloto:" 
Leviticus16:24 yeityo koungei eng’ komosta ne tilil, ak kolaach ngoroikyik, ak komong’ sang’, ak kogoito kagochinennyi ne kibeelei ak kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo bik, ak koyachigei kagaigaet ak koyachi bik." 
Leviticus16:25 Yeityo kobeel mwanik eng’ kaptisisiet, che bo kagochinetab tengekto." 
Leviticus16:26 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne kweriei kwesta ne bunjin Asasel, ak koungei, ak ye ibata konyo nganaset orit." 
Leviticus16:27 Ak keib koba sang’utab nganaset kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, ak ng’ororiet ne bo kagochinetab tengekto che kagiib korotikwak si keyai kagaigaet eng’ ole tilil, ak kobeel muiywekwak eng’ ma, ak banyekwak, ak eiyandenywa." 
Leviticus16:28 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne kabeelei tuguchoto, ak koungei, ak ye ibata, konyo nganaset orit." 
Leviticus16:29 Ak bunjin koigeny konetisioni eng’ okwek: oming’inge eng’ arawetab tisab, eng’ betutab taman ne bo arawanato, amat oyai boisiet age tugul, inendet ne kisikyin ga, anan bunotyot ne mi kobotok:" 
Leviticus16:30 amu kiyaiywok kagaigaet betunoto, kitililok; ak otililitu anyun eng’ tengekwogikwok eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus16:31 Betunoto ko sabato ne bo kamuung’et eng’ okwek, ak oming’inigei; nito ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny." 
Leviticus16:32 Ak koyai kagaigaet tisiindet ne kiili, ne kitororjin boisietab tililindo, ne igeeri kwandanyi, ak kolaach ngoroikab katanit, ngoroichoto itabanotin:" 
Leviticus16:33 ak koyai kagaigaet agobo got ne tilil, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo emait ne kituiyechin ak kaptisisiet; ak koyai kagaigaet agobo tisiik ak bik tugul che bo tuiyet." 
Leviticus16:34 Ak egu nito ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ okwek, keyai kagaigaet agobo lagokab Israel konyil agenge eng’ kenyit, amu tengekwogikwak tugul. Kiyai anyun inendet ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Leviticus17:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus17:2 Mwachi Aron ak werikyik, ak lagok tugul che bo Israel, ilenji, Ni ng’olyot ne kong’at Jehovah kole," 
Leviticus17:3 Chi age tugul ne bo gotab Israel ne enyei kirgit, anan ne enyei aruetab kechir, anan ng’ororiet, eng’ nganaset, anan ne kagieng’ji sang’utab nganaset," 
Leviticus17:4 ama get konyo kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, si kogoito koek kagochinet ne igochin Jehovah eng’ taitab gotab Jehovah: kiityin chichoto korotik; kagotumda korotik: ak king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik:" 
Leviticus17:5 si kobiit koget lagokab Israel tiseiywekwak che kata enyei eng’ kewanin, kobwa ole mi Jehovah, agoi kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, agoi ole mi tisiindet, ak koeny choto koek tiseiywekab kagochinoik che bo kalyet che kigochin Jehovah." 
Leviticus17:6 Ak koise tisiindet korotik kaptisisietab Jehovah eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, ak kobeel mwanik koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus17:7 Ak si mata koeng’ji oik tiseiywekwak kogeny, che kocham kosuboti koibegei tugul. Egu ng’olyondoni ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ ichek eng’ ibinwekwak tugul." 
Leviticus17:8 Ak ilenji ichek, Chi age tugul ne bo gotab Israel, anan ne bo bunotik che mi koboto ichek, ne igoitoi kagochinet ne kibeelei anan tiseiywot," 
Leviticus17:9 ama get agoi kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, si kobiit koeng’ji Jehovah; king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik." 
Leviticus17:10 Ago ngo am korotik alak tugul chi age tugul ne bo gotab Israel, anan ne bo bunotik che tebyei kobotok; wechei togennyu inendet ne amei korotik, ak ang’etoi inendet eng’ bikyik." 
Leviticus17:11 Amu mi sobondab borto korotik: ak kiagonok korotichoto oyachinegei kagaigaet eng’ kaptisisio amu sobonwekwok: amu korotik che yaei kagaigaet agobo sobondo. 
Leviticus17:12 Kiamwachi anyun lagokab Israel amu noto, alenji, Amat koam chi eng’ okwek korotik, amat koam agine bunotyot age tugul ne mi kobotok, korotichoto." 
Leviticus17:13 Ak ngo bar chi age tugul ne bo lagokab Israel, anan eng’ bunotik che mi koboto ichek, tiony age tugul anan taritiet age tugul ne kiamei; kotumda korotikyik, ak kotuge ng’ung’unyek." 
Leviticus17:14 Amu korotik ko sobondo ne bo borto komugul, ak agenge korotik ak sobondab borto: noto anyun, kialenji lagokab Israel, Amatata oam korotik alak tugul che bo borto age tugul: amu sobondab borto age tugul korotikyik. King’etoi age tugul ne amei." 
Leviticus17:15 Ak chi age tugul ne amei kiy ne kame inegei, anan ne kabar tiong’ik kotonaton, ngo chi ne kisikyin ga anan bunotyot, ingomwet anyun ngoroikyik, ak koungei, ak komuruonit agoi koimen: yeityo anyun koanyinyit." 
Leviticus17:16 Ago ngo ma mwet, anan ngo ma iungei, kotebe inendet anyun tengektanyi." 
Leviticus18:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus18:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus18:3 Amat oyai tuguk che kiyaei emetab Misri, ole kiomenye: amat oyai boisionikab emetab Kanan, ole amutok: amat obendate konetisiosiekwak." 
Leviticus18:4 Oyai kiruogutikyuk, ak orib ng’atutikyuk, obendate choto: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus18:5 Orib anyun ng’atutikyuk, ak kiruogutikyuk: amu ngo yai chito choto, kosobei eng’ choto: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus18:6 Amat korikyi age tugul eng’ okwek ne tilia kong’any ach ngorinnyi: a Jehovah. 
Leviticus18:7 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab kwandang’ung’, anan ne bo komet: amu inendet ko komet; amat ing’any ach ngorinnyi." 
Leviticus18:8 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab osotiotab kwandang’ung’; amu noto ach ngoritab kwandang’ung’. 
Leviticus18:9 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab chepkomet, cheptab kwandang’ung’, anan cheptab komet, ngo kigisikyin ga, anan olda age." 
Leviticus18:10 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab cheptab wering’ung’, anan cheptab cheptang’ung’; amu ach ngorinywa ko neng’ung’." 
Leviticus18:11 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab cheptab osotiotab kwandang’ung’, ne kisichei kwandang’ung’, inendet ko chepkomet." 
Leviticus18:12 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab isengeng’ung’: amu inendet ko kwondo ne negit ne tilia, ne bo kwandang’ung’." 
Leviticus18:13 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab chepkametab komet: amu inendet ko kwondo ne negit ne tilia, ne bo komet." 
Leviticus18:14 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab ng’etab kametab kwandang’ung’, amat irikyi osotiondennyi: amu komet." 
Leviticus18:15 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab osotiotab wering’ung’: amu osotiotab wering’ung’; amat ing’any ach ngorinnyi. 
Leviticus18:16 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab imbomurtang’ung’: amu ach ngoritab ng’etab komet. 
Leviticus18:17 Amat ing’any ach ngoritab kobogorio ak cheptanyi; amemut cheptab werinnyi, anan cheptab cheptanyi sib ing’any ach ngorinnyi; amu icheget ko tibik che tilionut che negityin: sogornatet noto." 
Leviticus18:18 Amat imutyige chepkametab osotiondeng’ung’, si inyar osotiondeng’ung’, si ing’any ach ngorinnyi, koboto nin age kota kosobei." 
Leviticus18:19 Amat irikyi kobogorio ing’any ach ngorinnyi, kota kotinyei muruonindab simwekyik che bo arawet." 
Leviticus18:20 Amat oipgei ak osotiotab chitab kokweng’ung’, omuruonge ak inendet." 
Leviticus18:21 Amegoite iyoteng’ung’ ibeelji Molek, ak amereny kainetab Kamuktaindeng’ung’: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus18:22 Ameruiye ak murenik ko u ye oruitos ak osotik: samis noto. 
Leviticus18:23 Amoruiye ak tiony age tugul si imuruonge: amat kotonon kobogoriondo eng’ taitab tiony, koruiyo tuwai; ng’emisiet noto." 
Leviticus18:24 Amat omuruonge eng’ alak tugul eng’ chuto: amu kiimuruongei eng’ choto tugul bororiosiek che kiaon eng’ taing’wong’: 
Leviticus18:25 ak kigomuruonit emet: ak aiityini tengekto amu noto, ak kiing’ung’da emet bikyik." 
Leviticus18:26 Orib anyun ng’atutikyuk ak kiruogutikyuk amu noto, amat oyai age tugul eng’ tuguchu samis; agot ne kigisikyin ga anan ne bunotyo ne mi kobotok:" 
Leviticus18:27 (amu kiyai bikab emoni choto tugul samisen, che kimenyei olito keny, ak king’wanit emet:)" 
Leviticus18:28 si maing’ung’dak ak okwek emet, ye omuruon, ko u ye kiing’ung’da bororiosiek che kimi kotom oitu." 
Leviticus18:29 Amu king’etoi eng’ bikwak chi age tugul ne yaei kiy age tugul eng’ tuguchu samis. 
Leviticus18:30 Orib anyun kotigonutikyuk amu noto, si moyai age tugul eng’ bitonwechu samis, che kigiyaei kotom oitu, si momuruonege choto: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus19:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus19:2 Mwachi tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, ilenji, Oegu che tililen: amu a tilil ane, Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus19:3 Ingoiywei chi age tugul kamet, ak kwandanyi, ak orib sabatosiekyuk: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus19:4 Amat omaste osub tuguk che matilei kiy, amoyachigei kanamonik che bo karik che kitanyi: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus19:5 Ak ye ogochini Jehovah tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoik che bo kalyet, ogoite anyun si kobiit ketaachak." 
Leviticus19:6 Kiamei eng’ betunoto ogoitoi, ak eng’ betut ne bo aeng’: ak ngo ng’et kiy agoi betut ne bo somok, kebeel anyun choto eng’ ma." 
Leviticus19:7 Egu kit ne kiwechei ngot keam agot kitigin eng’ betut ne bo somok; magitaachei: 
Leviticus19:8 ak ibei tengektanyi chi age tugul ne amei, amu kareny kioto tilil ne b o Jehovah: king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik." 
Leviticus19:9 Ak ye ogesisie eng’ emeng’wong’, ko mat iges igesu luukwekab mbareng’ung’, amat iyumate turonik." 
Leviticus19:10 Ak ameturote mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk, amat ikwei logoek che kagobutyi ng’ony; bagakyi choto kibananok ak toek: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus19:11 Amochorse; amoberberisie, amomwachige lembech." 
Leviticus19:12 Amoyosiechige eng’ kainennyu eng’ lembech, agoi ireny kainetab Kamuktaindeng’ung’; a Jehovah." 
Leviticus19:13 Amesastae chitab kokweng’ung’, anan irebe kiy: amat inamdege melektab otwogindet kot koeech." 
Leviticus19:14 Amat isas chi ne ming’at, amende kiy ne riichei bich taitab ne korat, ak iywei Kamuktaindeng’ung’; a Jehovah." 
Leviticus19:15 Amat oyai ne ma bo iman eng’ kiruoget: ametiytii kibananok, anan igonyit che eechen: ago iruokyi chitab kokweng’ung’ eng’ imanda." 
Leviticus19:16 Amewe komosi ak komosi ichaamate biguk: ameuny ne kabar chitab kokweng’ung’: a Jehovah. 
Leviticus19:17 Amewech ne otupche eng’ muguleldang’ung’: ker kong’ iman chitab kokweng’ung’, si manamin tengekto amu inendet." 
Leviticus19:18 Ameyaakyi mugetut, anan isus ng’al agobo lagokab biguk, ago cham chitab kokweng’ung’ ko u ye ichamegei: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus19:19 Orib ng’atutikyuk. Amengorie tuga cheguk alage che ma tuga: ameyamechi mbareng’ung’ keswek aeng’ che terotin: amelaach ngoriet ne kigiyae usisiek che terotin. 
Leviticus19:20 Ak age tugul ne ruitos ak chepto ne otwogindet, ne kigiamji koito, ne tom kitiach, anan kechamji kwo; kiruokyin tuwai; magibarei, amu kitomo kitiach cheboto." 
Leviticus19:21 Ak ketu chichoto kagochinennyi ne bo chalwokto konyo ole mi Jehovah, agoi kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, egu mengit noto, ne kagochinetab chalwokto." 
Leviticus19:22 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo inendet, koboto mengoto bo kagochinetab chalwokto eng’ taitab Jehovah, amu tengektanyi ne kogoyai: ak kenyochi kaat amu tengektanyi ne kogoyai." 
Leviticus19:23 Ak ye oit emonoto, ak ye kaomin ketik alak tugul che kiamei, oiit anyun logoekwak ole tomo kimuratan: egu eng’ okwek che tom kimuratan eng’ kenyisiek somok; magiamei." 
Leviticus19:24 Ago kianyinyi logoekwak tugul eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan, si kobiit kilosune Jehovah." 
Leviticus19:25 Ak oam logoekwak eng’ kenyit ne bo mut, si kobiit koiiywok logoek alak: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus19:26 Amat oam kiy age tugul koboto korotikyik: amoboisie bonisiet, anan ong’orse." 
Leviticus19:27 Amobior metowekwok, ameng’em tabanwekab tamneng’ung’." 
Leviticus19:28 Amotil borwekwok agobo bik che begu, amobeel soremik alak tugul: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus19:29 Amegoite cheptang’ung’, koyait, koek chepkugonio; si maisub emet kugoinatet, ak konyi emet tengekto." 
Leviticus19:30 Orib sabatosiekyuk, ak ogonyit gonnyu ne tilil: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus19:31 Amobe oldab che boisie oik, anan bonik: amocheng’ate, si maing’wanitak: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus19:32 Tononji ne tinyei kalwalek, ak igonyit boiyo, ak iywei Kamuktaindeng’ung’: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus19:33 Ameyachi ne ya toondet ne mi koboten eng’ emeng’wong’. 
Leviticus19:34 Igeitu toondet ne meng’isiei kobotok ak ne kisikyin ga, cham inendet ko u ye ichamege; amu kio toek eng’ emetab Misri: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus19:35 Amoyai ne ma bo iman eng’ kiruoget anan ye okwai eng’ koindo, anan ye ogere eng’ nyigisindo, anan eng’ karogutik che bo tuguk che bei." 
Leviticus19:36 Oboisie kerutik che aechin che bo iman, ak kamanutik che bo iman eng’ nyigisindo, ak epah ne bo iman; ak hin ne bo iman; a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ne kiamutwak omong’une emetab Misri." 
Leviticus19:37 Ak osub ng’atutikyuk tugul, ak kiruogutikyuk tugul, ak oyai: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus20:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus20:2 Ilenji lagokab Israel, Chi age tugul ne igochin lagokyik Molek, ngo age eng’ lagokab Israel, anan age eng’ bunotik che meng’isiei eng’ Israel, kebarei chichoto iman: lachei bikab emet eng’ koik." 
Leviticus20:3 Ak wechei togennyu agine chichoto, ak ang’etoi eng’ bikyik; amu koigochi inendet lagokyik Molek, si komuruon gonnyu ne tilil, ak koreny kainennyu ne tilil." 
Leviticus20:4 Ak ngo yaigei bikab emet ko u ne mageer chichoto, kouny, ye kagogoito lagokyik kogochi Molek, ama kobar:" 
Leviticus20:5 eng’ yoto anyun aborji chichoto neregekab togennyu, ak bikab gonnyi, ak ang’etoi inendet eng’ bikwak, ak tugul che isubi koyaei ibetab ge koboto inendet, che yaei ibetab ge ak Molek." 
Leviticus20:6 Ak aborjini neregekab togennyu chito ne mastoi kosubi ne boisie oik ak bonik, ne isubi koyaei ibetab ge koboto ichek, ak ang’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik." 
Leviticus20:7 Otabange anyun, oegu che tililen: amu a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus20:8 Ak orib ng’atutikyuk, ak oyai: a Jehovah ne atabanok." 
Leviticus20:9 Amu kibarei chi age tugul ne sasei kwandanyi anan kamet: kagosas inendet kwandanyi ak kamet; tebe inendet korotikyik. 
Leviticus20:10 Chito ne ibegei ak osotiotab chito age, agot ne ibegei ak osotiotab chitab kokwennyi, kibarei iman chichoto ak osotiondonoto." 
Leviticus20:11 Ak chito ne ruitos ak osotiotab kwandanyi, ko kang’any ach ngoritab kwandanyi: kibarei iman tuwai; tebe korotikwak ichek." 
Leviticus20:12 Ak ngo ruiyo chi ak osotiotab werinnyi, kebarei iman tuwai: kagoyai ng’emisiet: tebe korotikwak ichek." 
Leviticus20:13 Ak ngo ruiyo mureno ak muren, ko u ye ruitos ak kobogorisiek, kagoyai tuwai kit ne samis: kibarei iman, tebe ichek korotikwak." 
Leviticus20:14 Ak ngotun chi chepto koboto kamet, ko sogornatet noto: kibeelei icheget eng’ mat, chichoto ak chun aeng’: si mabiitune ng’ogisto kwenung’wong’." 
Leviticus20:15 Ak ngo ruiyo chi ak tiony, kebarei iman chichoto: ak obar tionyoto agine." 
Leviticus20:16 Ak ngo rikyi kobogoriondo tiony age tugul, ak koruiyo tuwai, ibar anyun kobogoriondonoto, ak tionyoto: kibarei ichek iman; tebe korotikwak ichek." 
Leviticus20:17 Ak ngomut chi chepkamet, cheptab kwandanyi, anan cheptab kamet, ak kogeer ach ngorinnyi, ak kogeer cheboto ach ngoritab murenonoto; tewernatet noto; king’etoi ichek tuwai eng’ taitab lagokab bikwak: kagong’any ach ngoritab chepkamet; ibei inendet tengektanyi." 
Leviticus20:18 Ak ngo ruiyo chi ak kobogorio ne katyech ng’ony, ak kong’any bortanyi; ko kagong’any ole rootune korotik, ak kang’any agine kobogoriondonoto ole rootune korotikyik: ak king’etoi ichek tuwai eng’ bikwak." 
Leviticus20:19 Amat ing’any bortab chepkametab komet, anan isengeng’ung’: amu kagong’any bortab tilionutik che negit: ibei ichek tengektanywa." 
Leviticus20:20 Ak ngo ruiyo chi ak osotiotab imamet, ko kagong’any bortab imamet: ibei ichek tengektanywa; begu ama sich lagok." 
Leviticus20:21 Ak ngo ipgei chi ak osotiotab ng’etab kamet, ko muruonindo noto: kagong’any bortab ng’etab kamet; begu ama sich lagok." 
Leviticus20:22 Orib anyun ng’atutikyuk tugul amu noto, ak kiruogutikyuk tugul, ak oyai: si maing’ung’dak emet ole amutok omeny." 
Leviticus20:23 Amobendate bitonwekab bororiet ne aone eng’ taing’wong’, amu kiyai ichek tuguchuto tugul, ak kiawech anyun ichek amu noto." 
Leviticus20:24 Ago kiamwawok alenjok, Onyabani emenywa, ak agonok kobunjok, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ne kiatabanenak bororiosiek." 
Leviticus20:25 Obesie anyun tiong’ik che anyiny ak che ng’wonen, ak taritik che anyiny ak che ng’wonen: amogochi sobonwekwok koek che kiwechei amu tiong’ik, anan taritik, anan kiy age tugul ne wendote ng’ony, che kitabanenak amu ng’wonen." 
Leviticus20:26 Ak oegu che tililen eng’ ane: amu a tilil ane Jehovah, ak kiatabanenak bororiosiek, si oegu chechuk." 
Leviticus20:27 Kibarei iman ne boisie oik, ne muren anan ne kobogorio, anan ne bonin; lachei ichek bichoto eng’ koik: tebe korotikwak ichek." 
Leviticus21:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Mwachi tisiik werikab Aron, ilenji ichek, Amat komuruongei chi eng’ chi ne kame eng’ bikyik;" 
Leviticus21:2 kobate eng’ tilionutikyik che negit, kamet, ak kwandanyi, ak werinnyi, ak cheptanyi, ak ng’etab kamet;" 
Leviticus21:3 ak eng’ chepkamet ne bergeiya, ne bo tiliet ne negit, ne tom kotun chi, imuchi komuruongei amu chepkamet." 
Leviticus21:4 Amat komuruongei, amu inendet ko chito ne toogunot eng’ bikyik, si maimuruongei." 
Leviticus21:5 Amat koruaigei, amat kocher tabanwekab tamnokwak, anan kotil borwekwak." 
Leviticus21:6 Egu che tililen eng’ Kamuktaindenywa, amat koreny kainetab Kamuktaindenywa; amu igoitoi ichek kagochinoik che bunei mat, che bo Jehovah, choto amitwogikab Kamuktaindenywa: egu anyun ichek che tililen amu noto." 
Leviticus21:7 Amat kotun chepkugonio, anan ne muruon; amat kotun osotiot ne kion manong’otiondennyi: amu tilil inendet eng’ Kamuktaindennyi." 
Leviticus21:8 Itilil inendet anyun amu noto; amu inendet ne igoitoi amitwogikab Kamuktaindeng’ung’; ingotililit anyun inendet eng’ inye: amu ane Jehovah ne atililok, ko a tilil." 
Leviticus21:9 Ak ngomuruongei cheptab tisiindet age tugul, komuruongei inegei eng’ kugoinatet, ko kagomuruon kwandanyi: kebeelei eng’ ma." 
Leviticus21:10 Ak inendet ne tisiindet ne o eng’ che tupcho, ne kigirong’ji mwaita ne kiilse metinnyi, ne kigitaban kolaach ngoroik, ko mat koyat metinnyi, anan kogerer ngoroikyik;" 
Leviticus21:11 anan kwo ole mitei musto, anan komuruongei amu kwandanyi anan kamet;" 
Leviticus21:12 amat komanda eng’ ole tilil, anan komuruon ole tilil ne bo Kamuktaindennyi; amu mi metinnyi mwaitab katabanet ne kiilse ne bo Kamuktaindennyi: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus21:13 Ingotun anyun chepto ne bergeiya. 
Leviticus21:14 Amat kotun mosok, anan ne kigeon, anan kobogorio ne muruon, anan chepkugonio: ago ingotun bergeiyat eng’ bikyik." 
Leviticus21:15 Amat konyerat iyotennyi eng’ bikyik: amu a Jehovah ne atilili inendet. 
Leviticus21:16 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus21:17 Mwachi Aron, ilenji, Amat korikta koipchi Kamuktaindennyi amitwogikyik, chi age tugul eng’ iyoteng’ung’ ne ma libwob, eng’ ibinwekwak tugul." 
Leviticus21:18 Amu mariktoi chi age tugul ne ma libwob, ne korat, anan ne ing’wali, anan ne tinyei serut ne lebel, anan ne kigotesak kiy age tugul eng’ bortanyi," 
Leviticus21:19 anan ne kiil keldo, anan ne kiil eut," 
Leviticus21:20 anan ne kibalbut, anan ne kiring’ak bortanyi, anan ne tinyei teta eng’ konda, anan ne tinyei kochek, anan ne tinyei mook che kigoyaamnyo, anan ne kigoyesio kitikyik;" 
Leviticus21:21 amat korikta chi ne ma libwob ne bo lagokab Aron tisiindet, kwo kogoito kagochinoikab Jehovah, che bunei mat; amu ma libwob; marigu nyo kogoitoi amitwogikab Kamuktaindennyi." 
Leviticus21:22 Amei inendet amitwogikab Kamuktaindennyi choto tililen mising’, ak eng’ choto tililen." 
Leviticus21:23 Ago mawendi inendet anget orit ne kigioiye got, anan korikyi kapkorosut, amu ma libwob; si mat komuruon oldinwekyuk che tililen: amu ane Jehovah ne atabani oldinwechoto." 
Leviticus21:24 Ak kimwachi Musa ko u noto Aron ak werikyik, ak lagokab Israel tugul." 
Leviticus22:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus22:2 Ilenji Aron ak werikyik, kotabanegei tuguk che tililen che bo lagokab Israel, che itabanwa, si mareny kainennyu ne tilil: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus22:3 Ilenji, King’etoi eng’ tainnyu chi age tugul ne bo iyoteng’wong’ tugul eng’ ibinekwok tugul, ne rikyin tuguk che tililen, che itabanjin lagokab Israel Jehovah, kotinyei muruonindanyi: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus22:4 Amat koam tuguk che tililen chi age tugul eng’ lagokab Aron ne tinyei mogondos, anan ne tinyei ole mandae tugun, agoi kotililit. Ak age tugul ne twaei ne kigonyor simwo amu musto, anan chito ne mandae keswekab iyotet;" 
Leviticus22:5 anan age tugul ne twaei ne ichuutegei ng’ony, ne ing’waniti chi, anan chi ne imuchi kong’wanit inendet, eng’ muruonindo age tugul ne tinyei;" 
Leviticus22:6 ng’wanitu agoi koimen ne twaei age eng’ choto, ak maamei tuguk che tililen, ngot ko tom koungei." 
Leviticus22:7 Ak koanyinyit, ko karorokto asis; ak yeityo koam tuguk che tililen, amu amitwogikyik choto." 
Leviticus22:8 Amat koam banyekab tiong’ik che begu ichegei, anan che tonatoni tiong’ik, si mat kong’wanitgei eng’ choto: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus22:9 Ribei anyun kotigonutikyuk, si manam ichek tengektab tuguchoto, ak kobekyi tuguchoto ngo reny: ane Jehovah ne atabani ichek." 
Leviticus22:10 Maamei kipsagarin age tugul tuguk che tililen: maamei bunotyot ne bo tisiindet, anan otwogindet ne nyoru melekto," 
Leviticus22:11 ago ngo al tisiindet chi, koale siling’isiekyik, koamei noto tuguchoto; ak che kisikyin gonnyi, amei choto amitwogikyik." 
Leviticus22:12 Ak ngotun cheptab tisiindet kipsagarin, ko maamei cheboto kagochinet ne kinamjin barak, ne bo tuguk che tililen." 
Leviticus22:13 Ago ngo mosok cheptab tisiindet, anan ngo kion manong’otiot, ama sich lakwa, ak koweektagei gotab kwandanyi: ko u ye kita koming’in, koamei inendet amitwogikab kwandanyi: ago maamei kipsagarindet age tugul choto." 
Leviticus22:14 Ak ngo am chi age tugul tuguk che tililen ama nai, kotesyin choto anyun kebebertab mut, ak kogochi tisiindet kioto tilil." 
Leviticus22:15 Amat koreny tuguk che tililen che bo lagokab Israel, che igochin Jehovah;" 
Leviticus22:16 si konyor ng’ogisto, ye amei tugukwak che tililen: amu ane Jehovah ne atilili ichek." 
Leviticus22:17 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus22:18 Mwachi Aron, ak werikyik, ak lagokab Israel tugul, ilenji ichek, Age tugul ne bo gotab Israel, anan che bunotik eng’ Israel, ne igoitoi kagochinennyi, ngo bo kagochinonoto age tugul eng’ arorutikwak, anan ko age tugul eng’ kagochinoikwak che bo chamnyet ne igochin Jehovah koek kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Leviticus22:19 si kobiit ketaachak, ogoitoi kagochinet ne kirgit ne libwob eng’ tuga, anan eng’ kechirek, anan eng’ ng’ororek." 
Leviticus22:20 Ago amat ogoite ne ma libwob; amu magitaachei noto agobo okwek. 
Leviticus22:21 Ak chi age tugul ne igoitoi tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikab kalyet kogochin Jehovah, si kobiit koyai kosulda noto ne kiga koaror, anan kagochinetab chamnyet, ne bo tuga, anan ko ne bo kechirek, kanyol koek ne igesunotgei si kobiit ketaach; ne mabiitune berutiet age tugul." 
Leviticus22:22 Amat ogochi Jehovah chu: ne korat, anan ne kigoil, anan ne kigonyor berut, anan ne rootei tugun, anan ne tinyei kochek, anan ne tinyei kacheet, amoyai koek kagochinet ne bunei mat eng’ kaptisisiet, kele kigochi Jehovah eng’ choto." 
Leviticus22:23 Imuchi igoite koek kagochinetab chamnyet kirgit anan aruetab kechir ne tinyei tuguk che u kunduenik, anan kebeberta ne mami eng’ bortanyi; ago magitaachei ngo bo kit ne kigiaror." 
Leviticus22:24 Amat ogochi Jehovah ne kigibir kitik, anan ne kigitui, anan ne kigong’etyo, anan ne kigitil; amat oyai ko u noto eng’ emeng’wong’." 
Leviticus22:25 Amotaach eng’ eutab kipsagarin amitwogikab Kamuktaindeng’wong’, alak tugul eng’ chu, ole, si ogoite; amu mi ng’emisienywa ichek, tinyei berutik: magitaachei choto agobo okwek." 
Leviticus22:26 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus22:27 Ye kagii kirgit, anan kechiriet, anan ng’ororiet, kotebyei ak kamet betusiek tisab; ak eng’ betut ne bo sisiit ak kwo tai, ketaachei koek kagochinet ne bunei ma ne kigochin Jehovah." 
Leviticus22:28 Amat oeny teta ne kotoy anan kechiriet ne kotoy, koboto moitanyi anan aruennyi betunak." 
Leviticus22:29 Ak ye oeng’ji Jehovah tiseiywotab kongoi, oeng’ji si kobiit ketaachak." 
Leviticus22:30 Kiamei eng’ betunoto; amotuuch kiy kot koeekyi: a Jehovah. 
Leviticus22:31 Orib anyun ng’atutikyuk amu noto, ak oyai: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus22:32 Amoreny kainennyu ne tilil; ago kitabana eng’ lagokab Israel: ane Jehovah ne atabanok," 
Leviticus22:33 ne kiamutwak omong’une emetab Misri, si aek Kamuktaindeng’wong’: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus23:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus23:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji, Igorwekab Jehovah che kiging’at kele omwaite koek kayumosiekab ge che itabanotin, choto igorwekyuk che kiging’at." 
Leviticus23:3 Kiyaei boisiet betusiek lo: ago betutab tisab ko sabato ne kimuung’e, kayumetab ge ne itabanat; amat oyai boisio age tugul: noto ko sabato eng’ Jehovah eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul." 
Leviticus23:4 Chu igorwekab Jehovah che kiging’at, kayumosiekab ge che itabanotin, che omwaitoi eng’ betusiekwak che kiging’at." 
Leviticus23:5 Eng’ arawet ne bo tai, betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawet, koskoleny, noto ko paska ne bo Jehovah." 
Leviticus23:6 Egu igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, eng’ Jehovah, eng’ betutab taman ak mut ne bo arawanato: oame makatinik che ma kinde mermerek betusiek tisab." 
Leviticus23:7 Egu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betut ne bo tai: amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot. 
Leviticus23:8 Ago ogoite kagochinet ne bunei mat ne kigochin Jehovah, eng’ betusiek tisab: egu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betut ne bo tisab; amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot eng’ betunoto." 
Leviticus23:9 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus23:10 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Ye oit emet ne agonok, ak ogesisie eng’ oloto, eng’ yoto anyun oipchi tisiindet bek che togoanik che bo kesisieng’wong’:" 
Leviticus23:11 ak koongoi inendet bechato eng’ taitab Jehovah, si kobiit ketaach agobo okwek: ongoi tisiindet choto eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, ko kagobata sabato." 
Leviticus23:12 Ak eng’ betunoto ongoi okwek bek, ogoite anyun mengit ne libwob ne masiirei kenyit agenge koek kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo Jehovah." 
Leviticus23:13 Ak egu kagochinennyi ne bo busiek kebeberwek aeng’ eng’ taman che bo epah che bo busiek che tambulul che kagiburukto mwaita, kagochinet ne bunei mat kigochin Jehovah, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny; ak egu kagochinennyi ne kieei, divaik, che yamei kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin." 
Leviticus23:14 Amat oam makatia, anan bek che kigelei, anan mesisek, agoi koit betunito, agoi oibu kagochinet ne bo Kamuktaindeng’wong’; ng’atutiet noto ne bo koigeny eng’ ibinwekwok tugul eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul." 
Leviticus23:15 Ak oiityige kong’eete betut ne bo aeng’ ko kagobata sabato, koboch betut ne kioibu bek che bo kagochinet ne kiongoi; egu sabatosiek tisab che nyiitotin:" 
Leviticus23:16 oiit betusiek konom agoi betut ne bo aeng’ ko kagobata sabato ne bo tisab; ak ogochi Jehovah kagochinet ne leel ne bo busiek. 
Leviticus23:17 Oibu eng’ meng’otosiekwok makatinik aeng’ che kiongoi che yamei kebeberwek aeng’ che bo epah: egu busiek che tambulul, che kibeeldoi mermerek, koek tongoanik che bo Jehovah." 
Leviticus23:18 Ak ogoite koboto makatinik arek tisab che libwoben che bo kechir che masiirei kenyit agenge, ak kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengichik aeng’: egu kagochinet ne kibeelei, ne bo Jehovah, koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek, ak kagochinoikwak che kieei, kagochinet ne bunei mat, ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Leviticus23:19 Ak ogoite kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto, ak koek arek aeng’ che mengichik che masiirei kenyit agenge, kobunji tiseiywotab kagochinoik che bo kalyet." 
Leviticus23:20 Ak koongoi tisiindet choto koboto makatinik che bo tongoanik koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah, koboto mengichichoto aeng’: tililitu eng’ Jehovah amu tisiindet." 
Leviticus23:21 Ak oititen eng’ betunoto; biitu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ okwek: amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot: ng’atutiet noto ne bo koigeny eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul eng’ ibinwekwok tugul. 
Leviticus23:22 Ak ye ogesisie eng’ emeng’wong’, ko mat iges igesu luukwekab mbareng’ung’, anan iyumate turonikab kesisieng’ung’: bagakyi kibananok, ak che toek: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus23:23 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus23:24 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Egu kamuung’et eng’ okwek, eng’ arawetab tisab, eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawanato, kabwatet ne bo kuutetab iriagok, kayumetab ge ne itabanat." 
Leviticus23:25 Amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot: ak ogoite kagochinet ne bunei mat kigochin Jehovah. 
Leviticus23:26 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus23:27 Ago egu betutab kagaigaet eng’ betutab taman eng’ arawanito bo tisab: egu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ okwek, ak oming’inge; ak ogoite kagochinet ne bunei mat ne kigochin Jehovah." 
Leviticus23:28 Amat oyai boisio age tugul eng’ betunoto: amu betutab kagaigaet, si keyai kagaigaet amu okwek eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus23:29 Amu chi age tugul ne maiming’inegei eng’ betunoto, king’etoi eng’ bikyik." 
Leviticus23:30 Ak chi age tugul ne yaei boisiet age tugul eng’ betunoto, ang’eme chichoto aistoe bikyik." 
Leviticus23:31 Amat oyai boisio age tugul: ng’atutiet nito eng’ ibinwekwok tugul eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul. 
Leviticus23:32 Egu sabato ne bo kamuung’et eng’ okwek, ak oming’inge: orib sabato neng’wong’ betut ne bo sogol ne bo arawet, koboch koskoleny agoi koskoleny." 
Leviticus23:33 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus23:34 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Egu igortab keriosiek betusiek tisab eng’ Jehovah eng’ betutab taman ak mut ne bo arawanito bo tisab." 
Leviticus23:35 Ak egu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betut ne bo tai: amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot. 
Leviticus23:36 Ogoitoi kagochinet ne bunei mat, ne kigochin Jehovah, eng’ betusiek tisab: egu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ okwek eng’ betut ne bo sisiit; ak ogoitoi kagochinet ne bunei mat, ne kigochin Jehovah: tuiyet ne bo kaming’inetab ge nito; amat oyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot." 
Leviticus23:37 Chu igorwekab Jehovah che kiging’at, che omwaitoi ole, kayumosiekab ge che itabanotin, si ogoite kagochinet ne bunei mat kigochin Jehovah, kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagochinet ne bo busiek, ak tiseiywot, ak kagochinoik che kieei, kagochinet age tugul eng’ betunnyi:" 
Leviticus23:38 che siirei sabatosiek che bo Jehovah, ak che siirei kagochinoikwok, ak che siirei che kioarorte tugul, ak che siirei kagochinoikwok tugul che bo chamnyet, che ogochini Jehovah." 
Leviticus23:39 Ago ye kaoyum ruratetab emet, eng’ betutab taman ak mut, ne bo arawetab tisab, orib koek igortab Jehovah eng’ betusiek tisab: kitere kamuung’et eng’ betut ne bo tai, ak kitere kamuung’et eng’ betut ne bo sisiit."
