Leviticus23:40 Ak obutyige eng’ betut ne bo tai logoekab ketik che kororon, temenikab tironik, ak temenikab ketik che nyigisen, ak ketik che bitie kererusiek; ak oboiboitu eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ betusiek tisab." 
Leviticus23:41 Ak orib noto koek igortab Jehovah eng’ betusiek tisab eng’ kenyit: ng’atutiet noto ne bo koigeny eng’ ibinwekwok: orib anyun igorato eng’ arawetab tisab. 
Leviticus23:42 Omenye keriosiek betusiek tisab; menyei keriosiechoto, tugul che salu Israel:" 
Leviticus23:43 si kobiit konai ibinwekwok che biitu let kole, kiagochi lagokab Israel komeny keriosiek, ye kiamutu ichek komong’une emetab Misri: A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus23:44 Kimwachi anyun Musa lagokab Israel igorwekab Jehovah che kiging’at. 
Leviticus24:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus24:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel koibun mwanikab emitik che tililen che kigitui agobo lapkeiyet, si kolaal tait kotugul." 
Leviticus24:3 Chobei Aron tait eng’ sang’utab anget ne kigioiye got, ne bo baornatet, eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, kong’eete koskoleny agoi karon kotugul eng’ taitab Jehovah: egu ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ ibinwekwok tugul." 
Leviticus24:4 Chobei inendet taisiek eng’ keldab tait ne tilil eng’ taitab Jehovah kotugul. 
Leviticus24:5 Ak inemu busiek che tambulul, ak iwatan makatinik che mengechen, che bo busiechato, taman ak aeng’: yamei makatiat agenge kebeberwek aeng’ eng’ taman che bo epah." 
Leviticus24:6 Ak itet koek ortinwek aeng’, bendi lo oret agenge, kobendi age lo, eng’ meset ne tilil eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus24:7 Ak inde oret age tugul tuguk che tililen che nyamdut, si kobiit koek kabwatet eng’ makatinichoto, kagochinet ne bunei mat ne kigochin Jehovah." 
Leviticus24:8 Tetei inendet kioto eng’ sabato age tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah; noto ko amu lagokab Israel, kayomiset ne bo koigeny." 
Leviticus24:9 Bunjin Aron ak werikyik; ak amei eng’ ole tilil: amu tilil mising’ eng’ inendet eng’ kagochinoik che bunei mat che bo Jehovah eng’ ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny. 
Leviticus24:10 Ak kimanda oldab lagokab Israel weritab kobogoriotab Israel, ne ki Misrindet kwandanyi: ak kiborio weroto bo kobogoriotab Israel ak chitab Israel eng’ nganaset;" 
Leviticus24:11 ak kichub Kainet weroto bo kobogoriotab Israel, ak kisas; ak kiimut ichek inendet kwo ole mi Musa. Ak kigiguure kainetab kamet Selomit, cheptab Dibri, ne bo oretab Dan." 
Leviticus24:12 Ak kigiger, si kobiit kogas ichek kit ne bunu kutitab Jehovah." 
Leviticus24:13 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus24:14 Imoong’u inendet ne kosasis kwo sang’utab nganaset; ak ingogonoor eunekwak metinnyi ichek tugul che kogasei kosasisiei, ak kolage koik tuiyet komugul inendet." 
Leviticus24:15 Ak imwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Ibei tengektanyi age tugul ne sasei Kamuktaindennyi." 
Leviticus24:16 Ak inendet ne chubei kainetab Jehovah kebarei iman; lage koik iman tuiyet komugul chichoto; ngo bunotyo, anan ne kisikyin ga, kibarei ye kachub kainet." 
Leviticus24:17 Kibarei iman chi age tugul ne barei chito age; 
Leviticus24:18 ak igeeri age inendet ne kabar ne bo akwet: sobondo eng’ sobondo. 
Leviticus24:19 Ak ngonde chito berut chitab kokwennyi; ko u ye kiyai, kiyachin ko u noto;" 
Leviticus24:20 moet eng’ moet, konda eng’ konda, keldet eng’ keldet; ko u ye kagonde chito age berutiet, kigeerjin ko u noto agine." 
Leviticus24:21 Ak inendet ne barei ne bo akwet kogeeri age: ak kebarei chito ne barei chi. 
Leviticus24:22 Egu agenge ng’atutieng’wong’, kergeitu ne bunotyo ak ne salwok: amu a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus24:23 Ak king’alalji Musa lagokab Israel, ak kiimut ichek chichoto kisasisiei kwo sang’utab nganaset, ak kelage inendet koik. Kiyai anyun lagokab Israel kou ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Leviticus25:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa eng’ tulwetab Sinai, kolenji," 
Leviticus25:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Ye oit emet ne agonok, korib anyun emet sabato agobo Jehovah." 
Leviticus25:3 Igole mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk kenyisiek lo, ak isabor ketikab logoeguk eng’ kenyisiek lo, ak iyum ruratennyi kobwa ga;" 
Leviticus25:4 ago egu sabato eng’ kenyit ne bo tisab ne imuunyi emet, sabato ne bo Jehovah: amat igol mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk, anan isabor ketikab logoeguk." 
Leviticus25:5 Amat iges kolgeinik che bo mbareng’ung’, amat ibut sabibuk che bo ketiguk che bo logoek che ma kisabor: egu kenyit ne imuunyi emet." 
Leviticus25:6 Ak egu sabatonoto bo emet amitwogikwok; cheguk, ak ko bo otwogindeng’ung’, ak otwogindeng’ung’ ne tie, ak kobo otwigindet ne nyoru melekto ak bunotyot ne mi koboten:" 
Leviticus25:7 ak ko bo tuguk, ak tiong’ik che mi emeng’ung’, egu ruratennyi tugul amitwogikwak." 
Leviticus25:8 Ak iityigei sabatosiek tisab che bo kenyisiek, choto ko kenyisiek tisab konyil tisab; ak koek eng’ inye betusiekab sabatosiek tisab che bo kenyisiek, choto ko kenyisiek artam ak sogol." 
Leviticus25:9 Yeityo iguut iriaget ne cheei mising’, eng’ betutab taman eng’ arawetab tisab; oguute iriaget koyom emeng’wong’ komugul eng’ betutab kagaigaet." 
Leviticus25:10 Ak otaban kenyit ne bo konom, ak omwaite eng’ emet komugul katiagetab tugul che meng’isiei: egu jubilii eng’ okwek; ak wendi chi tugul ole ki nenyi, ak koweekyigei chi tugul oldab bikyik." 
Leviticus25:11 Egu jubilii eng’ okwek kenyinoto bo konom: amogolse, amat oges kolgeinik eng’ oloto, amat obut logoekab ketik che ma kisabor." 
Leviticus25:12 Amu jubilii; egu ne tilil eng’ okwek: oame ruratennyi che bunu mbar. 
Leviticus25:13 Ak oweekyigei chi tugul ole ki nenyi eng’ kenyini bo jubilii. 
Leviticus25:14 Ak ngialdochi kiy chitab kokweng’ung’, anan ngial kiy eng’ chitab kokweng’ung’, ko mat oyachigei ne ya, okwege eng’ okwege." 
Leviticus25:15 Iale chitab kokweng’ung’ ne yamegei ak koitetab kenyisiek, ko kagobata jubilii, ak ingoaldaun che yamegei ak koitetab kenyisiek che bo kesisiet." 
Leviticus25:16 Itese alyennyi ko u chang’indab kenyisiek; ak ichuchuch alyennyi ko u ng’ering’indab kenyisiek; amu aldaun ne yamegei ak kesisiet. 
Leviticus25:17 Ago amoyachigei ne ya, okwege eng’ okwege; ago iywei Kamuktaindeng’ung’: amu a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus25:18 Amu noto anyun oyai ng’atutikyuk, ak orib kiruogutikyuk ak oyai; si omeny emet eng’ kalyet." 
Leviticus25:19 Ak koi emet logoek ak oam obiye, ak omeny oloto eng’ kalyet." 
Leviticus25:20 Ak ngot ole, Kiame nee eng’ kenyitab tisab? Ogeero, magigolsei, ama kigese tugukyok:" 
Leviticus25:21 yeityo ang’at anyun berurtanyu eng’ okwek eng’ kenyit ne bo lo, ak korurio che yamei kenyisiek somok." 
Leviticus25:22 Ak ogolse eng’ kenyitab sisiit, ak oame logoek che konorotin che bo keny; agoi kenyitab sogol, agoi korurio kogeny, oame che bo keny." 
Leviticus25:23 Ak magialdoi emonoto agoi; amu nenyu emet: amu o toek kobota eng’ emonoto ak o kiprutoinik kobota. 
Leviticus25:24 Ak ogoite katiaget ne bo emet, eng’ emeng’wong’ komugul." 
Leviticus25:25 Ak ngoek banan ne otupche, ak koalda kebebertab oldanyi, konyo anyun ne tiliennyi ne negit, konyo kotiach noto kialda tupchennyi." 
Leviticus25:26 Ak ngo matinyei chito chi ne itiachi, ak kagoek magorio, ak kotinyei che yamei kotiage;" 
Leviticus25:27 ingoiit kanyun kenyisiek koboch ngab koalda, ak koweekyi chito ne kiga aldochi, che kang’etune: yeityo koweekyigei oloto ki nenyi." 
Leviticus25:28 Ago ngo maimuch kotiakyigei, kotebe noto eutab inendet ne kiga al, agoi koit kenyitab jubilii, ak komanda koronoto eng’ eunnyi kenyitab jubilii, ak kobunji chichoto ki bo." 
Leviticus25:29 Ak ngo alda chi got ne kimenyei ne mi nganaset ne kigiyieme irimet, komuchi kotiach eng’ kenyit ne isubi noto kialdae; kichamjin kotiach eng’ kenyinoto komugul." 
Leviticus25:30 Ak ngo ma kitiach eng’ kenyinoto komugul, kobunji goyoto mitei nganaset ne kiging’ot, inendet ne kialei, agoi, eng’ ibinwekyik tugul: magitiachi noto eng’ kenyitab jubilii." 
Leviticus25:31 Ago kiiti gorik che mi nganasok che ma kiyieme irimet, kogergeit ak mbarenik che bo emet: kimuchi kitiach choto, mandoi choto eng’ kenyitab jubilii." 
Leviticus25:32 Ago imuchi Lawik kotiach nganasokwak, ak gorik che mi nganasok che chechuak, eng’ betut age tugul." 
Leviticus25:33 Ak ngotiach chito age ne bo Lawik, komandoi anyun goyoto kigialda, koboto nganaset ne nenyi, eng’ kenyitab jubilii: amu chechuaget gorik che mi nganasokab Lawik eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel." 
Leviticus25:34 Ago amat kealda emet ole agete tukwak che bo nganasokwak, amu chechuak agoi." 
Leviticus25:35 Ak ngoek kibanania tupcheng’ung’, ama sich kiy ne toretegei: ko mie itoret anyun inendet: otebi tuwai ko u toondet anan bunotyot." 
Leviticus25:36 Amat image inendet kelunet anan che tesotin: ago iywei Kamuktaindeng’ung’: si kotebi tupcheng’ung’ koboten. 
Leviticus25:37 Amegochi siling’isieguk ile si inyorune che siirtoot, anan igochi amitwogiguk ile si kotesak." 
Leviticus25:38 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ne kiamutwak omong’une emetab Misri, si agonok emetab Kanan, ak aegu Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus25:39 Ak ngoek kibanania tupcheng’ung’ ne mi koboten, ak kochamdagei ial inendet; ko megochi inendet kootin ko u otwogin:" 
Leviticus25:40 ingotebi koboten ko u otwogindet ne nyoru melekto anan ko u bunotyot; ak kootin agoi kenyitab jubilii: 
Leviticus25:41 yeityo anyun komanda eng’ oldang’ung’, inendet koboto lagokyik, ak koweekyigei oldab bikab orenywa, koweekyigei ole mi tugukab kwanisiekyik." 
Leviticus25:42 Amu ichek ko otwogikyuk, che kiamutu komong’une emetab Misri: magialdoi anyun icheget ko u otwogik." 
Leviticus25:43 Amat ibou inendet eng’ kimnatet ne korom; ago iywei Kamuktaindeng’ung’. 
Leviticus25:44 Ak eng’ ng’olyotab otwogiguk che murenik ak che tibik, che ta inyoru, che bo bororosiek che kiyiemak, oale choto." 
Leviticus25:45 Ago oale eng’ lagokab bunotik che meng’isiei eng’ kwenung’wong’, ak eng’ bikwak che mi kobotok che kigisikyin emeng’wong’: egu ichek chekwoget." 
Leviticus25:46 Ak oyai choto koek borotetab lagokwok, che biitu let, si konam kobunji; onyorune ichek otwogikwok agoi: ago amobou eng’ kimnatet ne korom tupchosiekwok, lagokab Israel, okwege eng’ okwege." 
Leviticus25:47 Ak ngot koek magorio ne kipsagarin anan bunotyo ne mi koboten, ak konam bananda tupcheng’ung’ ne mi koboto inendet, ak kochamdagei koal kipsagarindonoto anan bunotyondonoto mi koboten, anan ne salu keswekab oret ne bo chichoto:" 
Leviticus25:48 kimuchi kitiach kogeny ye kagialda; imuchi kotiach age eng’ tupchosiekyik; 
Leviticus25:49 imuchi kotiach inendet chitab orennyi, anan weritab ne bo orennyi, anan tiliet age tugul ne negit ne bo orennyi; anan ngoek magorio komuchi kotiagei." 
Leviticus25:50 Ak koiit koboto chichoto kialei inendet koboch kenyit ne kialdaegei agoi kenyitab jubilii: ak kotenit che kigialdae inendet koitetab kenyisiek; tebyei koboto inendet che yamegei ak betusiekab otwogindet ne nyoru melekto eng’ otisiennyi. 
Leviticus25:51 Ngo ta komi kenyisiek che chang’, koweekyi siling’isiek che yamei katiagennyi eng’ siling’isiek che kiga kiale inendet." 
Leviticus25:52 Ak ngo ta komi kenyisiek che ng’ering’ kityo si koit kenyitab jubilii, koiit anyun tuwai; ak koweekyi siling’isiek che yamei kenyisiek che bo katiagennyi." 
Leviticus25:53 Ak kotebi koboto inendet ko u otwogindet ne nyoru melekto eng’ kenyit agoi kenyit: amat koboi inendet eng’ kimnatet ne korom eng’ taing’ung’. 
Leviticus25:54 Ak ngo ma kitiach chichoto eng’ ortinwechato, komanda anyun kwo eng’ kenyitab jubilii, inendet koboto lagokyik." 
Leviticus25:55 Amu otwogikyuk lagokab Israel; icheget otwogikyuk che kiamutu komong’une emetab Misri. A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’. 
Leviticus26:1 Amat koyachigei tuguk che matilei kiy, amat olumdochige kanamwet ne kigiwai, anan toloita, amat onde koita ne kigiwai eng’ emeng’wong’, ogutung’ji; amu a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Leviticus26:2 Orib sabatosiekyuk, ak ogonyit gonnyu ne tilil. A Jehovah." 
Leviticus26:3 Ngobendate konetisiosiekyuk, ak orib ng’atutikyuk, ak oyai," 
Leviticus26:4 agonok anyun ropta eng’ betusiekyik, ak koii emet, ak koii ketikab mbar logoekwak." 
Leviticus26:5 Ak yamei kesutik che obore, agoi koit ruratetab ketikab logoek, ak itei ruratetab logoek kolset; ak oam amitwogikwok kot obiye, ak omeny emeng’wong’ eng’ kalyet." 
Leviticus26:6 Ak agonu kalyet eng’ emet, ak oruiye, ama biitu ne imuok; ak abeet tiong’ik eng’ emeng’wong’, ama bunei emeng’wong’ rotwetab chok." 
Leviticus26:7 Ak oon bunikwok, ak kobutyo eng’ taing’wong’ eng’ rotwetab chok." 
Leviticus26:8 Ak koon bikwok mutu bik bogol, ak koon bikwok bogolu elfusiek taman: ak kobutyo eng’ rotwetab chok eng’ taing’wong’ bunikwok." 
Leviticus26:9 Ak atokyinok agane togennyu, ak agonok iyotet, ak atesak; ak agimit kayomisennyu kobotok." 
Leviticus26:10 Ak oam tuguk che konorotin che bo keny, ak omoong’u che bo keny si kobiit ole ondoi che ogese." 
Leviticus26:11 Ak ande gonnyu kwenung’wong’; ama wechok sobondanyu. 
Leviticus26:12 Ak awendote kwenung’wong’, ak aegu Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ak oegu bikyuk." 
Leviticus26:13 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ne kiamutwak omong’u eng’ emetab Misri, si mata oegu otwogikwak; ak kiairi ketikab choging’wong’, ak ang’eetak obe komie." 
Leviticus26:14 Ago ngo mogasa it, amoyai ng’atutichoto tugul;" 
Leviticus26:15 ak ngot oesie konetisiosiekyuk, ak ngo wech sobonwekwok kiruogutikyuk, kot ko moyai ng’atutikyuk tugul, ago ngot obut kayomisennyu;" 
Leviticus26:16 ayaiywok ni agane: ang’ate kamuiset konyonjok, ak chebuonit ak eset, che ng’emei konyek, ak kogochi sobondo kosagit; ak ogol keswekwok buch, amu amei bunikwok." 
Leviticus26:17 Ak aboruok neregekyuk, ak kebarak eng’ taitab bunikwok; ak koboiywok che wechok; ak omwei ko maonok chi." 
Leviticus26:18 Ak ngo mogasa it eng’ tuguchuto, abirok anyun konyil tisab kosiir, amu tengekwogikwok." 
Leviticus26:19 Ak airi menotetab kimnateng’ung’; ak ayai kipsengwet neng’wong’ koigei karnet, ak koigei emeng’wong’ sugunwet;" 
Leviticus26:20 ak oboisie buch kimnateng’wong’; amu magonu emeng’wong’ ruratet, ak maiitos ketikab emet logoekwak." 
Leviticus26:21 Ak ngotila let, amogasa it, aibwok korotwek konyil tisab kosiir, ko u tengekwogikwok." 
Leviticus26:22 Ak ayogu tiong’ik che bo timin kobwa kwenung’wong’, che bwanei korebenok lagokwok, ak kobar tukwok, ak koyaak ong’ering’itu; ak koek kipkuberet ortinwekwok." 
Leviticus26:23 Ak ngo mocham anetak eng’ tuguchu, ago ngot otila let," 
Leviticus26:24 atilok let anyun ak okwek; ak abirok anyun anendet konyil tisab amu tengekwogikwok. 
Leviticus26:25 Ak aibwok rotwetab chok, ne yaakwok mugetut ne bo kayomiset; ak oyumjige nganasokwok: ak ayokwok koroito konyo kweng’wong’, ak kindeak eunekab bunikwok." 
Leviticus26:26 Ye atil amitwogikwok kong’ering’itu, kobeel anyun kobogorisiek tamanu amitwogikwok eng’ kapkoimaut agenge, ak kebimanwak amitwogikwok eng’ ratilit; ak oamisiei amobiyonyi." 
Leviticus26:27 Ak ngo mogasa it eng’ tuguchu tugul, ago otila let;" 
Leviticus26:28 atilok let anyun eng’ bandanyu eng’ neregek che bichien, ak abirok agane konyil tisab amu tengekwogikwok." 
Leviticus26:29 Ak oam banyekab borwekab werikwok, ak che bo tibikwok." 
Leviticus26:30 Ak ang’eme awong’u komoswekwok che tororen, ak aluul kanamonikwok che bo asista, ak awirji muswekwok ole mi muswekab kanamonikwok; ak kowechok sobondanyu." 
Leviticus26:31 Ak ayai nganasokwok koek karotwek, ak ayai oldinwekwok che tililen koek kipkuberet; ma achame kong’ucha anyinyindab nyamdutikwok." 
Leviticus26:32 Ak ayai emet koek surkwen: ak kokwong’io bunikwok che menyei oloto. 
Leviticus26:33 Ak aiyestochok bororiosiek alak, ak ang’usu rotwetab chok kosubok: ak koguber emeng’wong’, ak koek karotwek nganasokwok." 
Leviticus26:34 Yeityo kobaibaitune anyun emet sabatosiekyik, eng’ betusiechoto ko kuberot, omi emetab bunikwok; komuuny anyun emet, ak kobaibait eng’ sabatosiekyik." 
Leviticus26:35 Imuunyi emet kota ko kuberot, eng’ kamuung’onoto kimanyor eng’ sabatosiekwok, ye kiomenye oloto." 
Leviticus26:36 Ak eng’ icheget che ng’etu eng’ okwek, ayokyini mugulelwekwak kaiyweisiet eng’ emotinwekab bunikwak; ak koon ichek cheetab sogot ne ibei usonet; ak komwei ichek, ko u chi ne mwee rotwetab chok, ak kobutyoti ye maonei chi." 
Leviticus26:37 Ak koriichgei ichegei eng’ ichegei, ko u eng’ taitab rotwetab chok, ye mami ne onei: ak monyoru kimnatet ne otononie eng’ taitab bunikwok." 
Leviticus26:38 Ak olusyi bororiosiek, ak koluguak emetab bunikwok." 
Leviticus26:39 Ak ichuchui che ng’etu eng’ okwek eng’ tengekwogikwak eng’ emotinwekab bunikwok; ak kogeny amu tengekwogikab kwanisiekwak kochuchui ko u ichek. 
Leviticus26:40 Yeityo kong’any tengekwogikwak, ak che bo kwanisiekwak eng’ kachiliilutikwak che kiyaiywa ichek, ak kogeny amu kitila let," 
Leviticus26:41 ak kiatil let agane ichek, ak amutu ichek kobwa emetab bunikwak: ngoming’ingei anyun mugulelwekwak che ma imuratanotin, ak kotaach biretab tengekwogikwak;" 
Leviticus26:42 abwat anyun kayomisennyu ne kiayomisyi Jakobo; ak kayomisennyu agine ne kayomisyi Isak, ak abwat agine kayomisennyu ne kiayomisyi Abraham; ak abwat emet." 
Leviticus26:43 Ak kometo ichek emet, ak kobaibait eng’ sabatosiekyik, ye tebyei emonoto ko kuberot, ko mami ichek; ak kotaach biretab tengekwogikwak: amu kiesio kiruogutikyuk, ak kiwech sobonwekwak konetisiosiekyuk." 
Leviticus26:44 Agot nganda u choto tugul, ye mi emetab bunikwak, ko maesioi ichek, amaweche, amang’eme awong’u, ak mabute kayomisennyu koboto ichek: amu a Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa:" 
Leviticus26:45 ago abwati amu ichek, kayomiset ne kiayomisyi boisiekwak, che kiamoong’u eng’ emetab Misri kogeeronu bororiosiek, si aek Kamuktaindenywa: a Jehovah." 
Leviticus26:46 Chu anyun konetisiosiek ak kiruogutik ak ng’atutik che kiyai Jehovah ak lagokab Israel eng’ tulwetab Sinai eng’ Musa. 
Leviticus27:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Leviticus27:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji ichek, Ye yaei chi kaarorunet, koek bik che bo Jehovah ko u koiteng’ung’." 
Leviticus27:3 Itaune kamanutieng’ung’ ne irogendochini, murenik che bo kong’eete kenyisiek tiptem agoi che bo kenyisiek tamanwogik lo, ingoek kamanutieng’ung’ ne irogendochini, sekelisiek konom che bo feda, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil." 
Leviticus27:4 Ak ngo kobogorio, koegu kamanutieng’ung’ sekelisiek sosom." 
Leviticus27:5 Ak ngitaune kenyisiek mut agoi kenyisiek tiptem, koegu anyun kamanutieng’ung’ sekelisiek tiptem eng’ muren ak koegu sekelisiek taman eng’ kobogorio." 
Leviticus27:6 Ak ngitaune arawet agenge agoi kenyisiek mut, koegu anyun kamanutieng’ung’ sekelisiek mut che bo feda eng’ muren, ak koek kamanutieng’ung’ sekelisiek somok che bo feda eng’ ne tie." 
Leviticus27:7 Ak ngitaune kenyisiek tamanwogik lo ak kwo tai; ngo muren, koegu kamanutieng’ung’ sekelisiek taman ak mut, ak kobogorio koegu sekelisiek taman." 
Leviticus27:8 Ago ngo banan chichoto kosiir kamanutieng’ung’, kinde inendet taitab tisiindet, si komwa tisiindet che kimage; mwaei tisiindet che kimage chichoto kayai kaarorunet, kogoito ko u kamugennyi." 
Leviticus27:9 Ak ngogoito bik kagochinet ne kigochin Jehovah, ngo ne bo akwet, tugul che bo choto che igochin chi Jehovah, ko tililen." 
Leviticus27:10 Amat kowal, kowal ne ya ne mie, anan ne mie eng’ ne ya: ago ngot kowal tuguchoto bo akwet, kowale age age, ko tililen tuwai, noto ak ne kiwale." 
Leviticus27:11 Ak ngo tiony age tugul ne ng’wan, ne magigoitoi koek kagochinet ne bo Jehovah, konde anyun tionyoto taitab tisiindet:" 
Leviticus27:12 ak koiit tisiindet anyun ole te, ngo mie anan ngo ya: ko u ye keiit inye, tisiindet, kotebyei ko u noto." 
Leviticus27:13 Ago ngo machei iman kotiach tionyoto, kotesyi anyun kamanutiennyi kebeberta agenge eng’ mut." 
Leviticus27:14 Ak ye itabani chi gonnyi koek ne tilil eng’ Jehovah, koiit anyun tisiindet, kogeer ngo mie anan ngo ya: ko u ye kaiit tisiindet, koteb ko u noto." 
Leviticus27:15 Ak ngo machei kotiach gonnyi chichoto koitabani, kotes anyun kebeberta agenge eng’ mut ne bo siling’isiek che bo kamanutieng’ung’, si kobunji inendet got." 
Leviticus27:16 Ak ngotabanji chi Jehovah kebebertab mbarennyi, kotenitu anyun kamanutieng’ung’ kolsetab mbaranato: kiiti kolsetab homer agenge ne bo sairi eng’ sekelisiek konom che bo feda." 
Leviticus27:17 Ngotaban mbarennyi koboch kenyitab jubilii, kotebyei ko u kamanutieng’ung’ ne irogendochini." 
Leviticus27:18 Ago ngotaban inendet mbarennyi ko kagosiirto jubilii, koiiti tisiindet anyun inendet siling’isiek ko u kenyisiek che kang’et agoi koit kenyitab jubilii, ak ketil eng’ kamanutieng’ung’." 
Leviticus27:19 Ak ngotiach iman mbaret inendet ne kiitabani, kotesyi anyun kebeberta agenge eng’ mut ne bo siling’isiekab kamanutieng’ung’ ne irogendochini, ak kobunji inendet iman." 
Leviticus27:20 Ak ngo maitiach inendet mbaranato, anan ngo kigoaldochi chito age mbaranato, ko magitiachi agoi:" 
Leviticus27:21 ago tililitu mbaranato eng’ Jehovah, ye mandoi eng’ jubilii, ko u mbaret ne kigitaban; bunjin tisiindet." 
Leviticus27:22 Ak ngotabanji chichoto Jehovah mbaret ne kigoal, ne ma mbaret ne ki nenyi;" 
Leviticus27:23 koiityi anyun tisiindet inendet ole tenitu kamanutieng’ung’ agoi kenyitab jubilii: ak kogon inendet eng’ betunoto kamanutieng’ung’, koek kiy ne kigitabanji Jehovah." 
Leviticus27:24 Kiweekyin mbaranato chito ne kigiale eng’ kenyitab jubilii, inendet ne ki nenyi mbaret." 
Leviticus27:25 Ak u kamanutiguk tugul sekelisiek che bo ole tilil: tinyei sekel agenge gerahisiek tiptem. 
Leviticus27:26 Che kitwatei eng’ che kiyagi, che kigiyai koek twateiywek che bunjin Jehovah, choto ichegei che maitabani chi; bo Jehovah ne kirgit anan ne kechiriet." 
Leviticus27:27 Ak ngo bo tiong’ik che ng’wonen, kotiach anyun inendet ko u kamanutiet ne irogendochini, ak kotesyi kebeberta agenge eng’ mut ne bo noto: ak ngo magitiachi kealdoi ko u kamanutieng’ung’." 
Leviticus27:28 Ago magialdoi, ama kitiachi kit ne itabanat, ne itabanjin chi Jehovah eng’ tugukyik tugul che tinyei, ngo bo chi anan tiony, anan ne bo mbaret ne nenyi: tilil mising’ eng’ Jehovah kiy age tugul ne kitabani." 
Leviticus27:29 Magitiachi age tugul ne itabanat, ne itabani bik; kibarei noto iman." 
Leviticus27:30 Bo Jehovah kebeberwekab taman che bo emet, ngo keswek che bo emet, anan logoekab ketik: itabanotin eng’ Jehovah." 
Leviticus27:31 Ak ngo machei chi kotiach alak eng’ kebebertanyi ne bo taman, kotes kebeberta agenge eng’ mut." 
Leviticus27:32 Kebeberwek tugul che bo taman che bo tuga anan nego, age tugul ne bunei kureretab kirokto, kitabanji Jehovah, ne bo taman eng’ choto." 
Leviticus27:33 Amat kogilgilye ngo mie anan ngo ya, amat kowal; ak ngot kowal, kobunji Jehovah tuwai, noto ak ne kiwale; ama kitiachi." 
Leviticus27:34 Chuto anyun ng’atutik che king’at Jehovah Musa agobo lagokab Israel eng’ tulwetab Sinai. 
Numbers1:1 King’alalji Jehovah Musa eng’ ong’atetab Sinai, eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, eng’ betut ne bo tai eng’ arawet ne bo aeng’, eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ngab komong’une emetab Misri, kolenji," 
Numbers1:2 Iit tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u koitetab kainaik muren age tugul, ko u metowekwak;" 
Numbers1:3 koboch che kigotar kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che imuchi koba luget eng’ Israel, oiit ak Aron eng’ lugosiekwak." 
Numbers1:4 Ak mi kobotok chitab oret age tugul; age tugul ne o eng’ gotab kwanisiekyik. 
Numbers1:5 Chu kainaikab murenik che tonondos kobotok: eng’ oretab Reuben; Elisur weritab Sedeur. 
Numbers1:6 Eng’ oretab Simeon; Selumiel weritab Surisadai. 
Numbers1:7 Eng’ oretab Juda; Nason weritab Aminadab. 
Numbers1:8 Eng’ oretab Isakar; Natanel weritab Suar. 
Numbers1:9 Eng’ oretab Sebulun; Eliab weritab Helon. 
Numbers1:10 Eng’ lagokab Josep: eng’ che bo Epraim; Elisama weritab Amiud: eng’ che bo Manase; Gamaliel weritab Pedasur. 
Numbers1:11 Eng’ oretab Benjamin; Abidan weritab Gideoni. 
Numbers1:12 Eng’ oretab Dan; Aieser weritab Amisadai. 
Numbers1:13 Eng’ oretab Aser; Pagiel weritab Okran. 
Numbers1:14 Eng’ oretab Gad; Eliasap weritab Deuel. 
Numbers1:15 Eng’ oretab Naptali; Aira weritab Enan. 
Numbers1:16 Chuto che kigiguur eng’ tuiyet, bounik che bo ortinwekab kwanisiekwak; choto che ki metowekab elfusiek che bo Israel." 
Numbers1:17 Kiimut anyun Musa ak Aron murenichoto kagemwa kainaikwak. 
Numbers1:18 Ak kiiyum ichek tuiyet komugul kotuiyo eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawetab aeng’, ak kiibor che salu ko u ortinwekwak, eng’ gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, ko u metowekwak." 
Numbers1:19 Kiit anyun Musa ichek eng’ ong’atetab Sinai ko u ye king’at Jehovah. 
Numbers1:20 Ak lagokab Reuben, werit ne bo tai ne bo Israel, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u koitetab kainaik ko u metowekwak, muren age tugul ne bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:21 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek, che bo oretab Reuben, ko ki elfusiek artam ak lo ak bogol mut." 
Numbers1:22 Ak eng’ lagokab Simeon, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, choto che kigiit eng’ ichek ko u koitetab kainaik, ko u metewekwak, muren age tugul ne bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:23 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Simeon, ko ki elfusiek konom ak sogol ak bogol somok." 
Numbers1:24 Eng’ lagokab Gad, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:25 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Gad ko ki elfusiek artam ak mut ak bogol lo ak konom. 
Numbers1:26 Eng’ lagokab Juda, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:27 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Juda ko ki elfusiek tamanwogik tisab ak ang’wan ak bogol lo. 
Numbers1:28 Eng’ lagokab Isakar, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:29 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Isakar ko ki elfusiek konom ak ang’wan ak bogol ang’wan. 
Numbers1:30 Eng’ lagokab Sebulun, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:31 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Sebulun, ko ki elfusiek konom ak tisab ak bogol ang’wan." 
Numbers1:32 Eng’ lagokab Josep, choto lagokab Epraim, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:33 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Epraim ko ki elfusiek artam ak bogol mut. 
Numbers1:34 Eng’ lagokab Manase, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:35 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Manase ko ki elfusiek sosom ak aeng’ ak bogol aeng’. 
Numbers1:36 Eng’ lagokab Benjamin, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:37 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek, che bo oretab Benjamin, ko ki elfusiek sosom ak mut ak bogol ang’wan." 
Numbers1:38 Eng’ lagokab Dan, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:39 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Dan ko ki elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak aeng’ ak bogol tisab. 
Numbers1:40 Eng’ lagokab Aser, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:41 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek, che bo oretab Aser ko ki elfusiek artam ak agenge ak bogol mut." 
Numbers1:42 Eng’ lagokab Naptali, ibinwekwak, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ole te kainaik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget." 
Numbers1:43 Choto che kigiit eng’ ichek che bo oretab Naptali ko ki elfusiek konom ak somok ak bogol ang’wan. 
Numbers1:44 Chuto ichek che kigiit, che kiit Musa ak Aron koboto bounikab Israel, ki murenik taman ak aeng’, kibunu age tugul gotab kwanisiekyik." 
Numbers1:45 Kiek anyun tugul che kigiit che bo lagokab Israel ko u korikab kwanisiekwak, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, tugul che kiimuchi koba luget eng’ Israel," 
Numbers1:46 kiek tugul che kigiit elfusiek bogol lo ak somok ak bogol mut ak konom. 
Numbers1:47 Ago ma kiitito choto Lawik ko u oretab kwanisiekwak. 
Numbers1:48 Amu kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers1:49 Oretab Lawi inegei ne maiiti, amat iitite lagokab Israel;" 
Numbers1:50 ago inde Lawik koboi gotab baornatet, ak tugukyik che mi orit, ak tugukyik tugul: ichek che ibei got, ak tugukyik che mi orit; ak koboisiechi goyoto, ak komeny koyiem got." 
Numbers1:51 Ak ye kimakyin got kwo tai, ko Lawik che butei: ak ye kimachei kitonon got, ko Lawik che lumei: ak kibarei kipsagarindet ne rikyin." 
Numbers1:52 Ak kiteech lagokab Israel emaisiekwak, chi tugul eng’ nganasennyi, eng’ ole mi songoliennyi, ko u lugosiekwak." 
Numbers1:53 Ago menyei Lawik koyiemei gotab baornatet, si manyonji nereknatetab tuiyetab lagokab Israel: ak korib Lawik gotab baornatet." 
Numbers1:54 Kiyai anyun ko u noto lagokab Israel: kiyai ichek kou ye king’at Jehovah Musa. 
Numbers2:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron, kolenji," 
Numbers2:2 Ingoteech chi age tugul eng’ lagokab Israel ole mitei songoliennyi, koboto itondab meng’otetab gorik che bo kwanisiekwak: ingoteech emaisiekwak kotokyigei emait ne kituiyechin koyiem." 
Numbers2:3 Ingoteech komostab kong’asis ole chorune asista, icheget che ibortoi songolietab nganasetab Juda, ko u lugosiekwak: ak ingoek bounindetab lagokab Juda Nason weritab Aminadab." 
Numbers2:4 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek tamanwogik tisab ak ang’wan ak bogol lo." 
Numbers2:5 Ak ingoteech che bo oretab Isakar korupgei: ak ingoek bounindetab lagokab Isakar Netanel weritab Suar: 
Numbers2:6 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek konom ak ang’wan ak bogol ang’wan:" 
Numbers2:7 ak oretab Sebulun: ak ingoek bounindetab lagokab Sebulun Eliab weritab Helon: 
Numbers2:8 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek konom ak tisab ak bogol ang’wan." 
Numbers2:9 Kiek tugul che kigiit che bo nganasetab Juda, elfusiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak lo ak bogol ang’wan, ko u lugosiekwak. Choto che indoi." 
Numbers2:10 Tebe songoliet ne bo nganasetab Reuben komostab murot ne bo tai, ko u lugosiekwak: ak ingoek bounindetab lagokab Reuben Elisur weritab Sedeur." 
Numbers2:11 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek artam ak lo ak bogol mut." 
Numbers2:12 Ak ingoteech che bo oretab Simeon korupgei: ak ingoek bounindetab lagokab Simeon Selumiel weritab Surisadai. 
Numbers2:13 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek konom ak sogol ak bogol somok:" 
Numbers2:14 ak oretab Gad: ingoek bounindetab lagokab Gad Eliasap weritab Reuel: 
Numbers2:15 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek artam ak mut ak bogol lo ak konom." 
Numbers2:16 Kiek tugul che kigiit che bo nganasetab Reuben elfusiek bogol ak konom ak agenge ak bogol ang’wan ak konom, ko u lugosiekwak. Bendi chuto koegu che bo aeng’." 
Numbers2:17 Yeityo anyun kwo tai emait ne kituiyechin, koboto nganasokab Lawik che mi kwenutab chun alak: ko u ye teechei emaisiekwak, kobendi ko u noto eng’ banda, ingotebe chi tugul komostanyi, ole mi songolikwak." 
Numbers2:18 Tebe songoliet ne bo nganasetab Epraim cherongo ko u lugosiekwak: ak ingoek Elisama weritab Amiud bounindetab lagokab Epraim. 
Numbers2:19 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek artam ak bogol mut." 
Numbers2:20 Ak ne rubei inendet ko oretab Manase: ak ingoek Gamaliel weritab Pedasur bounindetab lagokab Manase: 
Numbers2:21 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek sosom ak aeng’ ak bogol aeng’:" 
Numbers2:22 ak oretab Benjamin: ingoek Abidan weritab Gideoni bounindetab lagokab Benjamin: 
Numbers2:23 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit, eng’ ichek, elfusiek sosom ak mut ak bogol ang’wan." 
Numbers2:24 Kiek tugul che kigiit eng’ nganasetab Epraim elfusiek bogol ak sisiit ak bogol agenge, ko u lugosiekwak. Bendi chuto koegu che bo somok." 
Numbers2:25 Tebe songoliet ne bo nganasetab Dan murot ne bo katam, ko u lugosiekwak: ak ingoek Aieser weritab Amisadai bounindetab lagokab Dan." 
Numbers2:26 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak aeng’ ak bogol tisab." 
Numbers2:27 Ak choto che teechei korupgei ak inendet ko oretab Aser: ak ingoek Pagiel weritab Okran bounindetab lagokab Aser. 
Numbers2:28 Ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek artam ak agenge ak bogol mut:" 
Numbers2:29 ak oretab Naptali: ingoek Aira weritab Enan bounindetab lagokab Naptali: 
Numbers2:30 ak kiek lugennyi koboto choto kigiit eng’ ichek, elfusiek konom ak somok ak bogol ang’wan." 
Numbers2:31 Kiek tugul che kigiit che bo nganasetab Dan elfusiek bogol ak konom ak tisab ak bogol lo. Bendi chuto koletu, ak songolikwak." 
Numbers2:32 Chu che kigiit eng’ lagokab Israel ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak: tugul che kigiit che bo nganasok ko u lugosiekwak ko ki elfusiek bogol lo ak somok ak bogol mut ak konom. 
Numbers2:33 Ago kima kiitito Lawik lagokab Israel; ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa. 
Numbers2:34 Kiyai anyun ko u noto lagokab Israel: ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa, kiteech anyun ko u noto eng’ ole mi songolikwak, ak kiba ko u noto, age tugul ko u orenywa, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak." 
Numbers3:1 Chu ortinwekab Aron ak Musa eng’ betut ne king’alalji Jehovah Musa eng’ tulwetab Sinai. 
Numbers3:2 Chu kainaikab werikab Aron; Nadab ne bo tai, ak Abiu, Eleasar, ak Itamar." 
Numbers3:3 Choto kainaikab werikab Aron, tisiik che kigiil, che kigotaban si kobois eng’ boisietab tiseinatet." 
Numbers3:4 Ak kibek eng’ taitab Jehovah Nadab ak Abiu, ye kingogoito mat ne ter eng’ taitab Jehovah, eng’ ong’atetab Sinai, ak kima kotinyei lagok: ak kibois Eleasar ak Itamar eng’ boisietab tiseinatet eng’ taitab kwandanywa Aron." 
Numbers3:5 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers3:6 Imutu oretab Lawik korik, ak inde ichek taitab Aron tisiindet, si koboisiechi inendet." 
Numbers3:7 Ak korib ichek boisiennyi, ak boisietab tuiyet komugul eng’ taitab emait ne kituiyechin, si koyai boisiet ne bo got." 
Numbers3:8 Ak korib tuguk tugul che bo emait ne kituiyechin orit, ak boisietab lagokab Israel koyai boisiet ne bo got." 
Numbers3:9 Ak igochi Aron ak werikyik Lawik: kagigochi inendet ichek iman eng’ lagokab Israel. 
Numbers3:10 Ak inde Aron ak werikyik, si korib tiseinatenywa: ak kebarei kipsagarindet age tugul ne rikyin." 
Numbers3:11 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers3:12 Anendet, keero, kianam Lawik eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel si ageere werik che bo tai che yatei iyotet eng’ lagokab Israel; bunjina Lawik." 
Numbers3:13 Amu chechuk werik tugul che bo tai; kiatabanjige werik tugul che bo tai eng’ Israel, eng’ bik, ak che twatei che kiyagi, eng’ betut ne kiabar werik tugul che bo tai eng’ emetab Misri: egu chechuk choto; ane a Jehovah." 
Numbers3:14 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa eng’ ong’atetab Sinai, kolenji," 
Numbers3:15 Iit lagokab Lawik ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ortinwekwak: iit ng’etet age tugul koboch che bo arawet agenge ak kwo tai." 
Numbers3:16 Ak kiit Musa anyun ichek ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, ko u ye kiging’at inendet." 
Numbers3:17 Ki kainaikab werikab Lawi chu: Gerson, Kohat, ak Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Chu ko kainaikab werikab Gerson ko u gorikwak; Libni ak Simei. 
Numbers3:19 Werikab Kohat ko u gorikwak; ko ki Amram, Ishar, Hebron, ak Usiel." 
Numbers3:20 Werikab Merari ko u gorikwak; ko ki Mali ak Musi. Chuto ortinwekab Lawik ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak. 
Numbers3:21 Salu Gerson gotab Libnik, ak gotab Simeik: chuto gorikab Gersonik." 
Numbers3:22 Kiek tugul choto kigiit eng’ ichek, koboch che bo arawet agenge ak kwo tai, murenik elfusiek tisab ak bogol mut." 
Numbers3:23 Ingoteech che bo gorikab Gersonik gotab tuiyet batai, eng’ komostab cherongo." 
Numbers3:24 Ak ingoek Eliasap weritab Lael bounindetab Gersonik, eng’ gotab kwanisiekwak." 
Numbers3:25 Ak ingorib werikab Gerson eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, got, ak Emait, ak tugukyik che kituge, ak ngoriet ne kigere kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers3:26 Ak ngoroik che king’ote seremut, ak ngoriet ne kigere kurgetab seremut, ne negite got, ne yiemei kaptisisiet, ak boroonikyik che bo boisienywa tugul." 
Numbers3:27 Salu Kohat gotab Amramik, ak gotab Isarik, ak gotab Hebronik, ak gotab Usielik: chuto gorikab Kohatik." 
Numbers3:28 Kiek tugul che kigiit eng’ ichek, koboch che bo arawet agenge ak kwo tai, murenik elfusiek sisiit ak bogol lo, che kiribei boisietab ole tilil." 
Numbers3:29 Ingoteech gorikab werikab Kohat tabandab got, murot ne bo tai." 
Numbers3:30 Ak ingoek Elisapan werikab Usiel bounindetab got ne bo kwandab gorikab Kohatik. 
Numbers3:31 Ak ingorib ichek moinget, ak meset, ak keldab tait, ak kapkorosusiek, ak tuguk che boisie ichek eng’ ole tilil, ak anget ne kioiye got, ak boisiennyi tugul." 
Numbers3:32 Ak ingoek Eleasar weritab Aron tisiindet ne o eng’ bounikab Lawik, ak korib ichek icheget che ribei boisietab ole tilil." 
Numbers3:33 Salu Merari gotab Malik, ak gotab Musik: chuto gorikab Merari." 
Numbers3:34 Kiek tugul che kigiit eng’ ichek, koboch che bo arawet agenge ak kwo tai, murenik elfusiek lo ak bogol aeng’." 
Numbers3:35 Ak ingoboi Suriel weritab Abiail bounindetab got ne bo kwanisiekab gorikab Merari: ingoteech ichek komostab murot ne bo katam eng’ got. 
Numbers3:36 Ak kigigochi werikab Merari baoinik che bo got, ak rateiywekyik, ak lumeiywekyik, ak kelongonikyik che tononie, ak tugukyik tugul, ak boisionikyik tugul." 
Numbers3:37 Ak lumeiywek che yiemei seremut, ak kelongonikwak che tononie, ak tigongenikwak, ak boroonikwak." 
Numbers3:38 Musa ak Aron ak werikyik che teechei taitab got, komostab kong’asis, ole chorune asis, eng’ taitab emait ne kituiyechin, che ribei boisietab ole tilil agobo boisietab lagokab Israel; ak kibarei kipsagarindet ne rikyin." 
Numbers3:39 Kiek tugul murenik elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’ tugul che kigiit che bo Lawik, che kiit Musa ak Aron eng’ ng’atutietab Jehovah, ko u gorikwak, koboch che bo arawet agenge ak kwo tai." 
Numbers3:40 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Iit ng’etik tugul eng’ lagokab Israel che bo tai eng’ siget, che bo arawet agenge ak kwo tai, ak itet kainaikwak." 
Numbers3:41 Ak inamwa Lawik kobunja (a Jehovah) kewale werik tugul che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel; ak che twatei tuga che bo Lawik kewale che twatei tuga che bo lagokab Israel. 
Numbers3:42 Kiit anyun Musa, werik tugul che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel, ko u ye king’at Jehovah inendet." 
Numbers3:43 Eng’ ichek che kigiit ko kiek werik tugul che bo tai, murenik elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’ ak bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik tisab ak somok, ko u koitetab kainaik, koboch che bo arawet agenge ak kwo tai." 
Numbers3:44 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers3:45 Nam Lawik ak iwale werik tugul che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel, ak inam tugab Lawik iwale tugab Israelik. Bunjina Lawik; a Jehovah." 
Numbers3:46 Ak eng’ katiagetab werik che bo tai che bo lagokab Israel, choto bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik tisab ak somok che siirei Lawik," 
Numbers3:47 iibe chi tugul sekelisiek mut che bo met; iibe ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; (sekel agenge ko gerahisiek tiptem); 
Numbers3:48 Ak igochi Aron ak werikyik sekelisiek che bo choto siirtootin che kitiage bichoto. 
Numbers3:49 Kitaach anyun Musa sekelisiek che bo katiaget eng’ ichek che kisiir Lawik. 
Numbers3:50 Kitaach sekelisiechoto eng’ werikab che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel; kiek sekelisiek elfut agenge ak bogol somok ak tamanwogik lo ak mut, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil." 
Numbers3:51 Kiigochi anyun Musa sekelisiechoto bo katiaget Aron ak werikyik, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Numbers4:1 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa ak Aron kolenji," 
Numbers4:2 Iit werikab Kohat ichegei eng’ lagokab Lawik, ko u ortinwekwak, ak ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak," 
Numbers4:3 koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom agoi che bo kenyisiek konom, tugul che imuchi boisiet, si kobiit koyai boisiet eng’ emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers4:4 Nito boisiet ne bo werikab Kohat eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, agobo tuguk che tililen kosiir." 
Numbers4:5 Ye katoi bik banda, koba go Aron ak werikyik, kocher anyun anget ne kioiye got konyo ng’ony, ak kotuge anganato moingetab baornatet," 
Numbers4:6 ak koliige magatokab mengichikab beek, ak kotuge baragunnyi anget ne tuui ne nyalil kityo, ak korooch ketikyik che kiibe." 
Numbers4:7 Ak ingoitoe bichoto anget ne tuui ne nyalil baragutab meset ne bo makatinik che bo kabartaet, ak konde baragunnyi tabok, ak kechigosiek, ak tageiywek ak kikombok che kirong’jine tuguk; ak kotebe baragunnyi makatinik che bo agoi;" 
Numbers4:8 ak kotuge tukchoto anget ne birir, ak koliige magatokab mengichikab beek, ak korooch ketikyik che kiibe." 
Numbers4:9 Ak ingonam ichek anget ne tuui ne nyalil, ak kotuge keldab kit ne ikweng’sei, ak taisiekyik, ak kanameiywondennyi, ak tabokyik che mengechen, ak tugukyik tugul che bo mwanik, che kiboisiechine." 
Numbers4:10 Ak ingonde tukchoto magatet orit ne bo mengitab beek, ak konde ketik che kiibe." 
Numbers4:11 Ak koitoe anget ne tuui ne nyalil kapkorosut ne bo tahabu, ak koliige magatokab mengichikab beek, ak korooch ketikyik che kiibe:" 
Numbers4:12 ak ingonam ichek tuguk tugul che bo boisiet che kiboisie eng’ ole tilil, ak koliige anget ne tuui ne nyalil, ak kotuge tukchoto magatokab mengichikab beek, ak konde ketik che kiibe." 
Numbers4:13 Ak kingoram orek eng’ kaptisisiet ak kotumda, ak koitoe baragunnyi anget ne arus ne birir;" 
Numbers4:14 ak konde tugukyik tugul baragunnyi che kiboisie eng’ kaptisisionoto, terenik, ak karik che sogotin, ak kechigosiek che eechen, ak tabok che mengechen, tuguk tugul che bo kaptisisiet; ak kotuge tukchoto tugul magatokab mengichikab beek, ak korooch ketikyik che kiibe." 
Numbers4:15 Ak ye kagoges Aron ak werikyik boisiet ne bo tugetab ole tilil, ak tuguk tugul che bo ole tilil, ye machei nganaset kotoi banda; kobwa anyun werikab Kohat koib; ago amat kotwa ole tilil, si mabek. Tuguchuto che laei werikab Kohat eng’ emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers4:16 Egu boisietab Eleasar weritab Aron tisiindet mwaitab kit ne ikweng’sei, ak nyamdutik che kibeelei, ak kagochinetab busiek che bo kotugul, ak mwanik che kiilse, ak ripset tugul ne bo got, ak ne bo tuguk tugul che mi orit, ak ne bo ole tilil koboto tugukyik." 
Numbers4:17 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron kolenji," 
Numbers4:18 Mongobetyo oretab gorikab Kohatik eng’ Lawik; 
Numbers4:19 ago oyachi ko u ni, si kosopcho, amabek, ye rikyin tuguk che tililen mising’ kosiir: bendi go Aron ak werikyik, ak koborji chi age tugul eng’ ichek boisiennyi ak tuguk che laei;" 
Numbers4:20 ago amat koba go kogeer ole tilil, agot kitigin, si mabek." 
Numbers4:21 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers4:22 Iit werikab Gerson agichek, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko u ortinwekwak;" 
Numbers4:23 iiti koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom; tugul che bendi go koboisiei eng’ emait ne kituiyechin. 
Numbers4:24 Ni boisiet ne bo gorikab Gersonik, ye boisiei ak ye laisei:" 
Numbers4:25 ibei ichek ngoroik che bo got, ak emait ne kituiyechin, ak ngoroikyik che kituge, ak ngoroikab mengichikab beek che tabanu baragunnyi, ak ngoroik che kigere kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin;" 
Numbers4:26 ak ngoroik che u emait che kiyieme seremut, ak ngoriet ne bo ye kibunei eng’ ormarichetab seremut, ne yiemei got ak kaptisisiet, ak boroonikwak, ak tuguk tugul che bo boisienywa, ak koyai bichoto kiy age tugul ne bo boisietab tuguchoto." 
Numbers4:27 Bou Aron ak werikyik boisionik tugul che yaei werikab Gersonik, eng’ laisenywa tugul, ak eng’ boisienywa tugul; ak oborji ichek, ong’atyi laisenywa tugul." 
Numbers4:28 Nito boisiet ne bo gorikab werikab Gersonik eng’ emait ne kituiyechin: ak kobou boisienywa Itamar weritab Aron tisiindet. 
Numbers4:29 Ak iit werikab Merari, ko u ortinwekwak, ak ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak;" 
Numbers4:30 iiti koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom, chi age tugul ne wendi boisiet, si kobiit koyai boisietab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers4:31 Ni ng’atutietab laisenywa, ko u boisienywa tugul eng’ emait ne kituiyechin; baoinik che bo got, ak rateiywekyik, ak lumeiywekyik ak kelongonikyik che tononie;" 
Numbers4:32 ak lumeiywek che yiemei seremut kotuiyo, ak kelongonikwak, ak tigongenikwak, ak boroonikwak, koboto tugukwak tugul ak boisienywa: ak oborji chi age tugul kainetab kit ne laei." 
Numbers4:33 Nito boisiet ne bo gorikab werikab Merari, ko u boisienywa tugul, eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, ne bou Itamar weritab Aron tisiindet." 
Numbers4:34 Ak kiit Musa ak Aron ak bounikab tuiyet werikab Kohatik, ko u ortinwekwak, ak gorikab kwanisiekwak," 
Numbers4:35 iiti koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom, chi age tugul ne wendi boisiet, si kobiit koyai boisiet eng’ emait ne kituiyechin:" 
Numbers4:36 ak kiek elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol tisab ak konom che kigiit ko u gorikwak. 
Numbers4:37 Chu che kigiit eng’ gorikab Kohatik, tugul che kiboisiei eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, che kiit Musa ak Aron ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah eng’ Musa." 
Numbers4:38 Ak kiek che kigiit che bo werikab Gerson, ko u ortinwekwak, ak ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak," 
Numbers4:39 koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom, chi age tugul ne wendi boisiet, kobois eng’ emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers4:40 choto che kigiit eng’ ichek, ko u ortinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ko ki elfusiek aeng’ bogol lo ak sosom." 
Numbers4:41 Choto che kigiit eng’ gorikab werikab Gerson, tugul che kiboisiei eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, che kiit Musa ak Aron ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah." 
Numbers4:42 Ak kiek che kigiit che bo ortinwekab werikab Merari, ko u ortinwekwak, ak ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak," 
Numbers4:43 koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom, chi age tugul ne wendi boisiet, si kobois eng’ emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers4:44 choto che kigiit eng’ ichek ko u gorikwak, ko ki elfusiek somok ak bogol aeng’." 
Numbers4:45 Chuto ichek che kigiit che bo gorikab werikab Merari, che kiit Musa ak Aron ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah eng’ Musa." 
Numbers4:46 Choto tugul che kigiit eng’ Lawik, che kiit Musa ak Aron ak bounikab Israel, ko u ortinwekwak, ak ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak," 
Numbers4:47 koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak kwo tai agoi che bo kenyisiek konom, chi age tugul ne kiwa koyai boisiet, ak boisietab laiset ne bo tuguk eng’ emait ne kituiyechin," 
Numbers4:48 choto che kigiit eng’ ichek, ko ki elfusiek sisiit ak bogol mut ak tamanwogik sisiit." 
Numbers4:49 Kigiit eng’ Musa ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah, chi tugul ko u boisiennyi, ak ko u laisennyi. Kigiit anyun ichek ko u noto, ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Numbers5:1 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers5:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel koisto age tugul ne tinyei mogondosik eng’ nganaset, ak age tugul ne tinyei kuseret, ak age tugul ne kang’wanit amu musto." 
Numbers5:3 Oiste che murenik ak gotab kor, oiste choto koba sang’utab nganaset: si mat komuruon nganasenywa, eng’ kwenut ole amenye." 
Numbers5:4 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel ko u noto, ak kiisto koba sang’utab nganaset; kiyai ko u noto anyun lagokab Israel, ko u ye kimwachi Jehovah Musa." 
Numbers5:5 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers5:6 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji, Ye kayai ne muren anan ne kobogorio tengek age tugul ne yaei bik, kolelji Jehovah, ak konam ng’ogisto chichoto;" 
Numbers5:7 kong’any anyun ng’ogistanywa ne kagoyai: ak kogoito kit ne yamegei ak ng’ogistanyi, ak kotesyi kebebertab mut, ak kogochi chichoto kichalwogenji." 
Numbers5:8 Ago ngo matinyei chichoto chito ne tilia ne kimuchi keweekyi tukchoto bo ng’ogisto, kigochin Jehovah tuguchoto keyaaktae ng’ogisto, si kobiit kobunji tisiindet; koboto mengitab kagaigaet ne kiyachine inendet kagaigaet." 
Numbers5:9 Bunjin tisiindet kagochinet age tugul ne kenamjin barak, ne bo tuguk che tililen che bo lagokab Israel che igochin ichek inendet." 
Numbers5:10 Ak bunjin tisiindet tuguk che itabani chi age tugul: bunjin tisiindet kiy age tugul ne igochin chi. 
Numbers5:11 King’alalji anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers5:12 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji, Ngo kesesen osotiotab chi, koyachi ne ya manong’otiot," 
Numbers5:13 ak koipgei ak chi, ak koung’ak kioto, ama nai manong’otiondennyi, ak kimuruon inendet, ama kobiit ne baorianjin, ama kinamji boisionoto:" 
Numbers5:14 ak konyor kang’unyet chichoto eng’ sobondanyi ak konerech agobo osotiondennyi amu koimuruongei osotiondonoto: anan ngonyor kang’unyet chichoto eng’ sobondanyi, ak konerech agobo osotiondennyi, nganda ma imuruongei osotiondonoto:" 
Numbers5:15 komutyi anyun chichoto osotiondennyi tisiindet, ak koib kagochinennyi agobo osotiondonoto, keberbertab taman ne bo epah che bo busiekab sairi; amat korong’ji mwaita, anan konde tuguk che nyamdut; amu kagochinetab busiek che bo ng’etkonda, kagochinetab busiek ne bo kabwatet, ne kibwate tengekto." 
Numbers5:16 Ak komut tisiindet osotiondonoto korik, konde taitab Jehovah:" 
Numbers5:17 yeityo konam tisiindet beek che tililen eng’ tabet ne kigiyae ng’ung’unyek; ak komugut ng’ung’unyek che mi got ng’ony, ak konde beechoto:" 
Numbers5:18 ak konde tisiindet kobogoriondonoto taitab Jehovah, ak kotiach sumeekyik, ak konde kagochinetab busiek che bo kabwatet, eutab kobogoriondonoto, noto kagochinetab busiek che bo ng’etkonda; kotinyei tisiindet eng’ eunnyi beek che bo ng’wanindo che ibu chubisiet;" 
Numbers5:19 ak komwachi tisiindet inendet koyosio, kolenji kobogoriondonoto, Ngo tom oipgei ak chi, anan ngo ma igesesen isub simdo, ago imi bounatetab manong’otiondeng’ung’, itiagage anyun eng’ beechu bo ng’wanindo che ibu chubisiet;" 
Numbers5:20 ago ngo kiigesesen, imong’une bounatetab manong’otiondeng’ung’, ak ngo kiimuruonitu, ak ngo kioipgei ak chi age ne ma manong’otiondeng’ung’," 
Numbers5:21 komwachi anyun tisiindet kobogoriondonoto koyosio kayosiet ne bo chubisiet, ak kolenji tisiindet kobogoriondonoto, Ingoyain Jehovah iegu ne chubot ak kayosiet eng’ biguk, ye kayai Jehovah kubestang’ung’ konun, ak kobwa moeng’ung’;" 
Numbers5:22 ak koba beechu ibu chubisiet agutaniguk, ak kobwa moeng’ung’, ak konun kubestang’ung’; ak kowol kobogoriondonoto, kole, Amen, Amen." 
Numbers5:23 Ak kosirji tisiindet bukuit chubisiosiechuto, ak koundo koba beekab ng’wanindo;" 
Numbers5:24 ak kogochi kobogoriondonoto koee beechoto ibu chubisiet; ak koba beechoto ibu chubisiet bortanyi ak kong’wonegitu. 
Numbers5:25 Yeityo konem tisiindet kagochinetab busiek che bo ng’etkonda, eng’ eutab kobogoriondonoto, ak koongoi kagochinonoto bo busiek eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak koib kobwa kaptisisiet;" 
Numbers5:26 ak komugut tisiindet kagochinonoto bo busiek konyi eut, koek kabwatet ne bo noto, ak kobeel eng’ kaptisisiet, ak ye ibata kogochi kobogoriondonoto beechoto koee." 
Numbers5:27 Ak ye kagogochi koee beechoto, kobiitu anyun ko u ni, ngo kogomuronit kobogoriondonoto, ak ngo kogochiliilji manong’otiondennyi, koba anyun bortanyi beechoto ibu chubisiet ak kong’wonegitu, ak kobwa moennyi, ak konun kubestanyi; ak koek ne chubot kobogoriondonoto eng’ bikyik." 
Numbers5:28 Ago ngo ma muruon kobogoriondonoto, ago kaga tilil; kotiagat anyun, ak komanach." 
Numbers5:29 Nito ng’atutietab ng’etkonda, ye kagesesen osotiot ne komi bounatetab manong’otiondennyi, ak komuruonit;" 
Numbers5:30 anan ye kanyor chi kang’unyet eng’ sobondanyi, ak konerech agobo osotiondennyi; konde anyun kobogoriondonoto taitab Jehovah, ak koyachi tisiindet ng’atutionito." 
Numbers5:31 Ago manyoru chichoto tengekto, ak koib kobogoriondonoto tengektanyi." 
Numbers6:1 King’alalji anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers6:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji, Ye kayai chi ne muren anan ne kobogorio kayosiet ne itabanat, kayosiet ne bo Nasiritindet, kotabanjigei Jehovah," 
Numbers6:3 ingoistoegei divaik ak maiyek; amat koee beek alak tugul che mindilil che bo divaik, anan beek che mindilil che bo maiyek; amat koee beekab sabibuk, anan koam sabibuk che tuonen anan che yaamnyotin." 
Numbers6:4 Amat koam kiy age tugul ne bunu sabibuk eng’ betusiekyik tugul che bo katabanennyi kong’eete tenderikab logoechoto agoi mortet. 
Numbers6:5 Amat kocher metinnyi eng’ betusiekyik tugul che bo kayosiennyi ne bo katabanet, agoi kogesgei betusiechoto, che itabanjinegei Jehovah. Ingotililit inendet anyun ingobityo sumeekyik kogoegitu." 
Numbers6:6 Amat korikyi musto eng’ betusiechoto tugul che itabanjinegei Jehovah. 
Numbers6:7 Amat kong’wanitgei agobo kwondanyi, anan kamet, anan ng’etab kamet, anan chepkamet, ye kabek, amu mi metinnyi katabanennyi ne itabanjigei Kamuktaindet." 
Numbers6:8 Tilil eng’ Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul che bo katabanennyi. 
Numbers6:9 Ak ngo me chi eng’ chokyinet eng’ ole negite inendet, ak komuruon metitab katabanennyi; kocher anyun metinnyi eng’ betut ne kianyinyi inendet, icheru eng’ betutab tisab." 
Numbers6:10 Ak koipchi tisiindet eng’ betutab sisiit cheptugenik aeng’, anan ko arek aeng’ che bo taritik, kobwa kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers6:11 Ak kogoito tisiindet age kobunji kagochinetab tengekto, ak kobunji age kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo inendet, amu konam tengekto agobo ne kome, ak kotilil metinnyi betunoto." 
Numbers6:12 Ak ingotabanji Jehovah betusiekab katabanennyi, ak koget mengit ne masiirei kenyit agenge, koek kagochinetab chalwokto; ago betos buch betusiek che ki bo tai, amu kigimuruon katabanennyi." 
Numbers6:13 Ni ng’atutietab Nasiritindet, ye kagogesgei betusiekab katabanennyi: kimutu konyo kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin:" 
Numbers6:14 yeityo kogochi kagochinennyi Jehovah, mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge, ne libwob, koek kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak subendo agenge ne bo kechir ne masiirei kenyit agenge, ne libwob, koek kagochinetab tengekto, ak mengit agenge ne libwob kobunji kagochinoikab kalyet;" 
Numbers6:15 ak kerebet ne o ne mi makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, makatinik che mengechen che bo busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita, ak makatinik che terteren che makinde mermerek che kigiile mwaita, ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek, ak kagochinoikwak che kieei." 
Numbers6:16 Ak kogoito tisiindet tukchoto eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kogoito kagochinennyi ne bo tengekto, ak kagochinennyi ne kibeelei." 
Numbers6:17 Ak kogoito mengit koek tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikab kalyet kogochi Jehovah, koboto kebebertab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek; ak kogoito tisiindet kagochinetab busiek ne bo noto, koboto kagochinet ne bo noto ne kieei." 
Numbers6:18 Ak konem Nasiritindonoto metinnyi ne bo katabanennyi eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, ak koib sumeechoto bo katabanennyi konde mat ne kibeele tiseiywekab kagochinoikab kalyet." 
Numbers6:19 Yeityo konem tisiindet kusto ne kagiyo ne bo mengit, ak konem eng’ kerebet makatiat agenge ne ming’in ne ma kinde mermerek, ak makatiat agenge ne terter, ne ma kinde mermerek, ak konde tukchoto eunekab Nasiritindet, ye kagonem metit agobo katabanennyi." 
Numbers6:20 Ak koongoi tisiindet choto koek kagochinet ne kiongoi eng’ taitab Jehovah; tilil nito, bo tisiindet, koboto tagatet ne kiongoi ak chatit ne kinamjin barak; ak ye ibata noto anyun komuch Nasiritindet koee divaik." 
Numbers6:21 Ni ng’atutietab Nasiritindet ne ibortae kayosiennyi, ak ne bo kagochinennyi ne igochin Jehovah ne bo katabanennyi, koboto tuguk alak che imuchi konyor; ko u kayosiennyi, nyolu anyun koyai ko u ng’atutietab katabanennyi." 
Numbers6:22 King’alalji anyun Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers6:23 Mwachi Aron ak werikyik ilenji, Oberur lagokab Israel ko u ni; olenjini ichek," 
Numbers6:24 Ingoberurin Jehovah, ak koribin;" 
Numbers6:25 Ingokwenyin lapkeiyetab togetab Jehovah, ak korirenen." 
Numbers6:26 Ingotokyin Jehovah togennyi, ak kogonin kalyet." 
Numbers6:27 Indoi anyun ichek kainennyu lagokab Israel ko u noto; ak aberur ichek. 
Numbers7:1 Ak eng’ betut ne kiga kolumda Musa got, ak koiil ak kotaban, koboto tugukyik tugul, ak kaptisisiet ak tugukyik tugul, ak koiil choto ak kotaban," 
Numbers7:2 kogoito anyun kagochinoik, bounikab Israel, che eechen eng’ gorikab kwanisiekwak; chuto ko ki bounikab ortinwekab Israel, chuto che kibou icheget che kigiit;" 
Numbers7:3 ak kiib bounichoto kagochinoikwak kobwa taitab Jehovah, karisiek lo che tugotin, ak eik taman ak aeng’; ki bo karit agenge bounik aeng’, chi tugul ak eito agenge; ak kiigoito choto eng’ taitab got." 
Numbers7:4 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers7:5 Taach tukchoto eng’ ichek, si kobiit kobunji boisietab emait ne kituiyechin; ak igochi Lawik tukchoto, igochi chi age tugul ko u boisiennyi." 
Numbers7:6 Kitaach Musa anyun karisiek ak eik, ak kogochi Lawik." 
Numbers7:7 Kiigochi werikab Gerson karisiek aeng’ ak eik ang’wan, ko u boisienywa;" 
Numbers7:8 ak kiigochi werikab Merari karisiek ang’wan ak eik sisiit, ko u boisienywa, eng’ bounatetab Itamar weritab Aron tisiindet." 
Numbers7:9 Ago ma igochi kiy werikab Kohat, amu ki nenywa boisietab ole tilil; kiibe tukchoto tigigoikwak." 
Numbers7:10 Ak kiigoito bounik kagochinoik agobo katabanetab kaptisisiet eng’ betut ne kigiile, kiigoito bounik kagochinoikwak eng’ taitab kaptisisiet." 
Numbers7:11 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ingogoito ichek kagochinoikwak, kogoito bounindet age tugul eng’ betunnyi, agobo katabanetab kaptisisiet." 
Numbers7:12 Ak inendet ne kiigoito kagochinennyi eng’ betut ne bo tai, ko ki Nason weritab Aminadab, ne bo oretab Juda." 
Numbers7:13 Kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda, ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai, busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:14 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman ne nyiitat nyamdutik; 
Numbers7:15 ak kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengit agenge, ak mengit age ne masiirei kenyit agenge, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:16 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:17 ak ki bo tiseiywot ne bo kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’, mengichik mut, ak kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Nason weritab Aminadab." 
Numbers7:18 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ Netanel weritab Suar, bounindetab Isakar:" 
Numbers7:19 Sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinet ne bo busiek;" 
Numbers7:20 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman ne nyiitat nyamdutik; 
Numbers7:21 ak kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:22 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:23 ak agobo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’, ak mengichik mut, ak kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Netanel weritab Suar." 
Numbers7:24 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo somok Eliab weritab Helon, bounindetab lagokab Sebulun:" 
Numbers7:25 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:26 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman ne nyiitat nyamdutik; 
Numbers7:27 ak kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengit, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:28 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:29 ak ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, ak mengichik mut, ak kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Eliab weritab Helon." 
Numbers7:30 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo ang’wan Elisur weritab Sedeur, bounindetab lagokab Reuben:" 
Numbers7:31 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:32 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman, ne nyiitat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:33 ak kirgit agenge ne neran ak mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:34 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:35 ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, mengichik mut, kwesik mut, mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Elisur weritab Sedeur." 
Numbers7:36 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo mut Selumiel weritab Surisadai bounindetab lagokab Simeon: 
Numbers7:37 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:38 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman, ne nyiitat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:39 ak kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:40 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:41 ak ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, mengichik mut, kwesik mut, mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Selumiel weritab Surisadai." 
Numbers7:42 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo lo Eliasap weritab Deuel, bounindetab lagokab Gad:" 
Numbers7:43 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; kinyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin, che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:44 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman, ne nyiitat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:45 ak kirgit agenge ne neran ak mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:46 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:47 ak ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, mengichik mut, kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Eliasap weritab Deuel." 
Numbers7:48 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo tisab Elisama weritab Amiud, bounindetab lagokab Epraim:" 
Numbers7:49 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:50 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman, ne nyiitat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:51 ak kirgit agenge ne neran ak mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:52 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:53 ak ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, mengichik mut, kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Elisama weritab Amiud." 
Numbers7:54 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo sisiit Gamaliel weritab Pedasur, bounindetab lagokab Manase:" 
Numbers7:55 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:56 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman, ne nyiitat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:57 ak kirgit agenge ne neran ak mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:58 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:59 ak ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, mengichik mut, kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Gamaliel weritab Pedasur." 
Numbers7:60 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo sogol Abidan weritab Gideoni, bounindetab lagokab Benjamin:" 
Numbers7:61 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:62 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman, ne nyiitat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:63 ak kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:64 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinet ne bo tengekto; 
Numbers7:65 ak ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, mengichik mut, kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Abidan weritab Gideoni." 
Numbers7:66 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo taman Aieser weritab Amisadai, bounindetab lagokab Dan:" 
Numbers7:67 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol agenge ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:68 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu ne yamei sekelisiek taman, ne nyiitat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:69 ak kirgit agenge ne neran ak mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:70 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinet ne bo tengekto; 
Numbers7:71 ak ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, mengichik mut, kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Aieser weritab Amisadai." 
Numbers7:72 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo taman ak agenge Pagiel weritab Okran bounindetab lagokab Aser: 
Numbers7:73 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda, ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:74 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu, ne yamei sekelisiek taman, ne nyiitat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:75 ak kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengit agenge ak mengit ne masiirei kenyit agenge, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:76 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:77 ak ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, mengichik mut, kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge, ki choto kagochinoik che bo Pagiel weritab Okran." 
Numbers7:78 Kiigoito eng’ betut ne bo taman ak aeng’ Aira weritab Enan, bounindetab lagokab Naptali:" 
Numbers7:79 kagochinennyi ko ki sanit agenge ne bo feda, ne yamei nyigisindanyi sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak tabet agenge ne bo feda ne yamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisab, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki nyiitotin tukchoto tuwai busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek;" 
Numbers7:80 ak kibramut agenge ne bo tahabu, ne yamei sekelisiek taman, ne nyiitat nyamdutik;" 
Numbers7:81 ak kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengit agenge, ak mengit agenge ne masiirei kenyit agenge, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei;" 
Numbers7:82 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; 
Numbers7:83 ak ki bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, eik aeng’u, mengichik mut, kwesik mut, ak mengichik mut che masiirei kenyit agenge; ki choto kagochinoik che bo Aira weritab Enan." 
Numbers7:84 Ki katabanet ne bo kaptisisiet, nito, eng’ betut ne kiili bounikab Israel: sanisiek taman ak aeng’ che bo feda ak tabok taman ak aeng’ che bo feda, ak kibramusiek taman ak aeng’ che bo tahabu." 
Numbers7:85 Nyigisindab sanit age tugul ko ki sekelisiek bogol ak sosom, ak kiyamei sekelisiek tamanwogik tisabu tabet age tugul; kiek fedaisiek tugul che bo tukchoto sekelisiek elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol ang’wan, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil." 
Numbers7:86 Kiek nyigisindab kibramusiek taman ak aeng’ che bo tahabu, che nyiitotin nyamdutik, sekelisiek taman age tugul, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil; ki bo sekelisiek bogol agenge ak tiptem, tahabu tugul che bo kibramusiek." 
Numbers7:87 Kiek tuga tugul che bo kagochinet ne kibeelei, kirugik taman ak aeng’, ak mengichik taman ak aeng’, ak mengichik taman ak aeng’ che masiirei kenyit agenge, ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek, ak kwesik taman ak aeng’ che bo kagochinoikab tengekto." 
Numbers7:88 Kiek anyun tuga tugul che bo tiseiywotab kagochinoikab kalyet, kirugik tiptem ak ang’wan, ak mengichik tamanwogik lo, ak mengichik tamanwogik lo che masiirei kenyit agenge. Nito katabanetab kaptisisiet, ye kingo kagiil." 
Numbers7:89 Ak ye kingwo Musa emait ne kituiyechin kwo kong’alal ak inendet, kogas anyun Kutit kong’alalji ne kimong’une baragutab keruetab rirenet ne kimitei moingetab baornatet kimong’une kwenutab kerubisiechoto aeng’: ak king’alalji inendet." 
Numbers8:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa, kolenji," 
Numbers8:2 Mwachi Aron, ilenji, Ye inam taisiek, kokweng’so anyun taisiechoto tisabu eng’ taitab keldab tait." 
Numbers8:3 Kiyai anyun Aron ko u noto; kiinaam taisiekyik si kobiit kokweng’so eng’ taitab keldab tait, ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Numbers8:4 Ki u ni yaetab keldab tait: ki tahabu che kigitany; koboch kel agoi taptokyik, ko kigitany; ko u itonda ne kiga koborji Jehovah Musa, kiyai anyun inendet keldab tait ko u noto." 
Numbers8:5 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa, kolenji," 
Numbers8:6 Iste Lawik eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel, ak ianyiny." 
Numbers8:7 Ak iyachi ichek ko u ni, si ianyinyi: ise beek che bo kagaigaet, ak ingocher kororik che mi borwekwak tugul, ak ingomwet ngoroikwak, ak koanyinygei." 
Numbers8:8 Yeityo koget kirgit ne neran, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita, ak igetu kirgit age ne neran kobunji kagochinetab tengekto." 
Numbers8:9 Ak imut Lawik koba taitab emait ne kituiyechin: ak iyum tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel. 
Numbers8:10 Ak imut Lawik koba taitab Jehovah; ak kogonoor lagokab Israel eunekwak Lawik. 
Numbers8:11 Yeityo kogoito Aron Lawik eng’ taitab Jehovah koek kagochinet ne kiongoi, agobo lagokab Israel, si kobiit koyai boisiet ne bo Jehovah." 
Numbers8:12 Ak kogonoor Lawik eunekwak metowekab kirugichoto; ak igoite inye age kobunji kagochinetab tengekto, ak kobunji age kagochinet ne kibeelei, si koyai kagaigaet agobo Lawik." 
Numbers8:13 Yeityo imut Lawik koba taitab Aron, ak taitab werikyik, ak igochi Jehovah kagochinet ne kiongoi." 
Numbers8:14 Ibesie ko u noto anyun, Lawik eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel; ak kobunja Lawik." 
Numbers8:15 Yeityo koba Lawik go, si koyai boisietab emait ne kituiyechin ak ianyiny ichek, ak igoite koek kagochinet ne kiongoi." 
Numbers8:16 Amu kigigona ichek inne eng’ lagokab Israel; kianam choto kobunja, kewale tugul che yatei iyotet, choto ko werik che bo tai che bo lagokab Israel tugul." 
Numbers8:17 Amu chechuk werik tugul che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel, ak che twatei che kiyagi; kiatabanjige ichek eng’ betut ne kiabar werik tugul che bo tai eng’ emetab Misri." 
Numbers8:18 Ak kianam Lawik kobunja, awale werik tugul che bo tai eng’ lagokab Israel." 
Numbers8:19 Ak kiagoite Lawik kobunji Aron ak werikyik eng’ lagokab Israel, si koyai boisiet ne bo lagokab israel eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, ak koyai kagaigaet agobo lagokab Israel; si mabiit koroito eng’ lagokab Israel, ye rikyin lagokab Israel ole tilil." 
Numbers8:20 Kiyachi ko u noto anyun Musa ak Aron ak tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, Lawik: ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa agobo Lawik, kiyachi ko u noto anyun ichek lagokab Israel." 
Numbers8:21 Kiianyinygei anyun Lawik koistoegei tengekto, ak kimwet ngoroikwak; kiigoito anyun Aron ichek eng’ taitab Jehovah koek kagochinet ne kiongoi; ak kiyai Aron kagaigaet agobo ichek koanyiny." 
Numbers8:22 Ye kingobata noto, koba go Lawik koyai boisienywa eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, eng’ taitab Aron, ak eng’ taitab werikyik; ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa agobo Lawik, kiyachi anyun ichek bichoto ko u noto." 
Numbers8:23 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa, kolenji," 
Numbers8:24 Bo Lawik ni: koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ak kwo tai, kobendi go koyai boisiet ne bo emait ne kituiyechin;" 
Numbers8:25 ak ye kagoit kenyisiekwak konom kobagakta boisionoto, koma koboisie agoi;" 
Numbers8:26 ago tononjin ripset koboto che tupcho eng’ emait ne kituiyechin ago ma koboisiei. Iyachini ko u noto anyun Lawik agobo ripsosiekwak. 
Numbers9:1 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa eng’ ong’atetab Sinai, eng’ arawetab tai ne bo kenyitab aeng’ koboch ngab komong’une emetab Misri, kolenji," 
Numbers9:2 Ingorib anyun lagokab Israel paska eng’ betut ne kiging’at. 
Numbers9:3 Oribe eng’ betunnyi ne kiging’at eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan eng’ arawani, koskoleny; oribe ko u ng’atutikyik tugul, ak ko u kiruogutikyik tugul." 
Numbers9:4 Kimwachi anyun Musa lagokab Israel korib paska. 
Numbers9:5 Ak kirib ichek paska eng’ arawet ne bo tai, eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawanato, koskoleny, eng’ ong’atetab Sinai: ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa, kiyai anyun lagokab Israel ko u noto." 
Numbers9:6 Ak kimitei bik alage che ki ng’wonen agobo mustab chito, kot koma imuch korib paska eng’ betunoto; kibwa anyun taitab Musa ak Aron eng’ betunoto," 
Numbers9:7 ak kilenji bichoton inendet, Ki ng’wonen amu mustab chito: amu nee si keetenech, ama kigoite kagochinetab Jehovah koboto lagokab Israel eng’ betut ne kiging’at?" 
Numbers9:8 Ak kilenji Musa ichek, Ogany, si kobiit agas kit ne ng’atei Jehovah agobo okwek." 
Numbers9:9 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers9:10 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Ngo ng’wanit chi age tugul eng’ okwek anan eng’ ibinwekwok agobo musto, anan ngo mi rutoito ole loo, komuchi koripchi Jehovah paska." 
Numbers9:11 Ingorib ichek paska noto eng’ arawet ne bo aeng’ eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan koskoleny; amei koboto makatinik che ma kinde mermerek ak ngwek che ng’wonen. 
Numbers9:12 Amat kotuuch kot koeekyi, anan koiri kowet; ribei ichek ko u ng’atutiet komugul ne bo paska." 
Numbers9:13 Ago chito ne tilil, ne mamitei rutoito, ama rib paska, king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik; amu ma igoito kagochinetab Jehovah eng’ betunnyi ne kiging’at, ibei chichoto tengektanyi." 
Numbers9:14 Ak ngo mi kipsagarin ne meng’isiei eng’ kwenung’wong’, ak komachei korib paska ne bo Jehovah; yaei ko u ng’atutietab paska, ak ko u ye kigiaror; egu ng’atutiet agenge, eng’ kipsagarindet, ak eng’ inendet ne bo emonito." 
Numbers9:15 Ak kituch boldet got eng’ betunoto ne kigilumdae goyoto, noto emaitab baornatet; ak kimi baragutab got boldanato koskoleny, ak kigergeit ak mat agoi koeech." 
Numbers9:16 Ki u noto kotugul: kituch boldet, ak kitoogu boldanato ko u mat kemoi." 
Numbers9:17 Ak ye kingetogostae boldet eng’ Emainato, ye kingobata, koba anyun lagokab Israel; ak kiteechei lagokab Israel ole katonone boldet." 
Numbers9:18 Kibendi lagokab Israel eng’ ng’atutietab Jehovah, ak kimeng’isiei eng’ ng’atutietab Jehovah; kimeng’isiei betusiek tugul che kitebe boldet goyoto." 
Numbers9:19 Ak ye kingotebe boldet got betusiek che chang’ korib anyun lagokab Israel ng’atutietab Jehovah, ama bendi." 
Numbers9:20 Ak ye kingotebe boldet goyoto betusiek che ng’ering’, komeng’is anyun bichoto ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah, ak kiba ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah." 
Numbers9:21 Ki betusiek alak kotebe boldet goyoto koskoleny agoi karon, ak kingetogostae boldet karon, koba anyun; anan ko ye kingotebe boldanato bet ak kemoi, ko ye kagitogostae boldanato, koba anyun bichoto." 
Numbers9:22 Ak kingotebe boldet baragutab got, ngo betusiek aeng’, anan arawa, anan kenyit, komitei goyoto, kotebi anyun lagokab Israel komeng’is, ama bendi ui: ak ye kingetogostae, koba anyun." 
Numbers9:23 Kimeng’isiei eng’ ng’atutietab Jehovah, ak kibendi eng’ ng’atutietab Jehovah; kiriboti ng’atutietab Jehovah, ko u ye king’at Jehovah, eng’ Musa." 
Numbers10:1 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa, kolenji," 
Numbers10:2 Yachigei igondisiek aeng’ che bo feda; kitanyi, si koboisie tukchoto ye iguure tuiyet, ak eng’ banwekab nganasok." 
Numbers10:3 Ak ye kuut ichek tukchoto, koyumjigei tuiyet komugul ole imi, eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers10:4 Ak ngo kuut igondit agenge, koyumjigei anyun ole imi, bounik, kandoikab elfusiekab Israel." 
Numbers10:5 Ak ye oguut ne bo waagat, kotoi banda anyun nganasok che menyei komostab kong’asis." 
Numbers10:6 Ak ye oguut ne bo waagatab aeng’, kotoi banda anyun nganasok che menyei komostab murot ne bo tai; kuutei anyun ichek ko u noto ne bo waagat kobunji banwekwak." 
Numbers10:7 Ago ye machei koyumgei tuiyet, oguut anyun, ago amoguut ne bo waagat." 
Numbers10:8 Kuutei werikab Aron tisiik igondisiek; ak egu tukchoto ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ okwek eng’ ibinwekwok tugul. 
Numbers10:9 Ak ye obendi luget eng’ emeng’wong’, obendi obaregei ak bunyot ne usok, oguut anyun igondisiechoto bo waagat; ak kibwatak eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak kesoruok eng’ bunikwok." 
Numbers10:10 Ak eng’ betut ne bo kagaseng’wong’ bo ge, ak eng’ igorwekwok che kiging’at, ak ye leeldos arawekwok, oguut anyun igondisiek eng’ baragutab kagochinoikwok che kibeelei, ak eng’ baragutab tiseiywek che bo kagochinoikwok che bo kalyet; ak egu kabwatet eng’ okwek eng’ taitab Kamuktaindeng’wong’: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Numbers10:11 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’, arawetab aeng’, eng’ betut ne bo tiptem ne bo arawanato, ketogostae boldet eng’ gotab baornatet." 
Numbers10:12 Kinam anyun lagokab Israel banwekwak koba eng’ ong’atetab Sinai; ak kitebi boldet eng’ ong’atetab Paran. 
Numbers10:13 Ak kitoi bandanywa ne bo tai ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah eng’ Musa. 
Numbers10:14 Ak kiindo songolietab nganaset ne bo lagokab Juda ko u lugosiekwak: ak kibou lugennyi Nason weritab Aminadab. 
Numbers10:15 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Isakar Netanel weritab Suar. 
Numbers10:16 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Sebulun Eliab weritab Elon. 
Numbers10:17 Ak kigibut got; ak kitoi koba werikab Gerson ak werikab Merari, che kilaei got." 
Numbers10:18 Kitoi banda nganasetab Reuben, kosub songolienywa, ko u lugosiekwak; ak kibou lugennyi Elisur weritab Sedeur." 
Numbers10:19 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Simeon, Selumiel weritab Surisadai." 
Numbers10:20 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Gad Eliasap weritab Deuel. 
Numbers10:21 Kitoi anyun koba Kohatik, kolaei got ne bo ole tilil: ak kolaei chun alage got kota kogeni koit chun alak." 
Numbers10:22 Ak kitoi banda nganasetab lagokab Epraim, ko u lugosiekwak, kosubi songolienywa: ak kibou lugennyi Elisama weritab Amiud." 
Numbers10:23 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Manase, Gamaliel weritab Pedasur." 
Numbers10:24 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Benjamin, Abidan weritab Gideoni." 
Numbers10:25 Ak kitoi banda nganasetab lagokab Dan, ne kiletu eng’ nganasok tugul, kosub songolienywa, ko u lugosiekwak; ak kibou lugennyi Aieser weritab Amisadai." 
Numbers10:26 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Aser Pagiel weritab Okran. 
Numbers10:27 Ak kibou lugetab oret ne bo lagokab Naptali Aira weritab Enan. 
Numbers10:28 Ki u noto banwekab lagokab Israel ko u lugosiekwak; ak kiiyaptogei. 
Numbers10:29 Ak kilenji Musa Hobab, weritab Reuel Midianindet, kabyugoitab Musa, Kibendi ole kiarorwech Jehovah, kole, Agonok. Ongebe tugul, ak kiyaun ne mie; amu kigomwa ne mie Jehovah agobo Israel." 
Numbers10:30 Ak kilenji, Mawendi; ago kaweekyigei emennyu, ole kigisikyina." 
Numbers10:31 Ak kilenji, Asain ale, amebagachech; amu ingen inye ole machei kotepto meng’otennyo eng’ ong’atet, ak iegu konyekyok."
