Numbers10:32 Ak ngot kebe tugul, ko kiy age tugul ne mie ne yaiywech Jehovah, keyaun agachek." 
Numbers10:33 Kitoi banda ne bo betusiek somok anyun ko kong’etye tulwetab Jehovah; ak kiindoe ichek moingetab arorutietab Jehovah bandab betusiek somok, kocheng’jinoti ole imuung’e." 
Numbers10:34 Ak kimi baragunywa boldetab Jehovah bet, ye kingotoi banda eng’ nganaset." 
Numbers10:35 Ak kingwo tai moinget, kole anyun Musa, Ng’eet, ee, Jehovah, ingoiyesta buniguk; ak ingomwei eng’ taing’ung’ che wechin." 
Numbers10:36 Ak kingotonon, kole, Ee Jehovah, weekyige ole mi elfusiek ng’isiat che bo Israel." 
Numbers11:1 Ak ki u ichek bik che ing’unyng’ung’dos, komwaei che yaach eng’ itikab Jehovah; ak kingogas Jehovah, kolalyo neregekyik; ak kilal matab Jehovah eng’ kwenunywa, ak kibeel ole bo tabanwekab nganaset." 
Numbers11:2 Ak kirirji bik Musa; ak kisa Musa Jehovah, ak kogesunotgei mat." 
Numbers11:3 Ak kigiguure yoto Tabera; amu kilal matab Jehovah eng’ kwenunywa. 
Numbers11:4 Ak kisich maget ne ya tuiyet ne o ne bo bik alak tugul che terotin che kimi kwenunywa; ak kiririo lagokab Israel agichek kogeny, kolen, Ng’o ne konech banyek keam?" 
Numbers11:5 Kiibwati njirenik che kigiame buch eng’ Misri; ak ngwek, ak logoek alak, ak kitunguuk che eechen ak che mengechen, ak kitunguuk che ng’wonen;" 
Numbers11:6 ago tinyei sobonwekyok munyasta; mami kiy age tugul: magitinye kiy age ne kigeere kobate mana chu. 
Numbers11:7 Ak ki kergei mana ak bek che mubere che leelach, ki u itondanywa kit ne kiguure bedola." 
Numbers11:8 Kibendoti bik kokweoti, si kobwa kong’a anan kotui eng’ kenusiek, ak koyo eng’ terenik, ak kochob kobwa makatinik; ak kichamu mwaita ne kararan." 
Numbers11:9 Ak kingobutyo rewot nganaset kemoi, kobwanei mana ak rewondonoto." 
Numbers11:10 Ak kigas Musa korirtos bik che bo gorikwak tugul, chi age tugul eng’ kurgetab emainnyi: ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah mising’; ak kiyait noto eng’ Musa agine." 
Numbers11:11 Ak kilenji Musa Jehovah, Amu nee si iyachi ne ya otwogindeng’ung’? Amu nee si manyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’, amu kegesenja lautietab bichu tugul?" 
Numbers11:12 Tos ane ne kiasiche bichu tugul? Tos ane ne kiasich kot ilenja, Kesene tegeng’ung’, ko u ye keseni kwan lakwet ne reriei, ile amut koba emet ne kiiyosiechi kwanisiekwak?" 
Numbers11:13 Anyorjini ano banyek che agochini bichu tugul? Amu rirjina kolen, Konech banyek, keam." 
Numbers11:14 Mamuchi anege agesen bichu, amu nyigis kot eng’ ane." 
Numbers11:15 Ak ngot iyaiywa ko u ni, asain ale, ibara, ngo kianyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’; amat kota igona ageer nyalildanyu." 
Numbers11:16 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Iyumwa boisiek tamanwogik tisab che bo Israel, che ingen ile icheget ko boisiekab bik, ak bounikwak, imutu kobwa emait ne kituiyechin, si kobiit kotononso koboten eng’ oloto." 
Numbers11:17 Ak achoruge anyo keng’alal ak inye eng’ oloto: ak anemunenen kebebertab tamirmiriet ne miten, ak ande bichoto; ak kogesen ichek lautietab bik koboten, si maigeseni inyege." 
Numbers11:18 Ak ilenji bik, Oanyinygei agobo mutai, ak oam banyek; amu kiorirji Jehovah, olen, Ng’o ne konech banyek keam? Amu kigigoigoi kemi Misri: konok anyun Jehovah banyek amu noto, si oam." 
Numbers11:19 Moame eng’ betut agenge, anan eng’ betusiek aeng’, anan eng’ betusiek mut, anan eng’ betusiek taman, anan eng’ betusiek tiptem;" 
Numbers11:20 ago oame eng’ arawet komugul, agoi kong’uchok, kot owech: amu kioesie Jehovah ne mi kweng’wong’, ak orirji ole, Kilya si kemong’u eng’ Misri?" 
Numbers11:21 Ak kile Musa, Bichu ami kwenunywa ko elfusiek bogol lo che murenik che bunei kelyek; ak kaile igochini banyek, si koam eng’ arawet agenge." 
Numbers11:22 Tos kieng’ji kechirek ak tuga, si koyam ichek? Anan kiyumi ngirenik tugul che mi nyanjet, si koyam ichek?" 
Numbers11:23 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Tos nwach eutab Jehovah? Igeere nguno kosuldoi ng’olyondennyu agobo inye, anan achicha." 
Numbers11:24 Kimanda anyun Musa kwo sang’, komwachi bik ng’alekab Jehovah; ak kiiyum murenik tamanwogik tisab eng’ boisiekab bichoto, ak kotet eng’ ole negite Emait." 
Numbers11:25 Ak kichorgei Jehovah eng’ boldet, ak kong’alalji Musa, ak kinam kebebertab tamirmiriet ne kimi inendet, konde boisiechoto tamanwogik tisab; ak ye kingotebe ichek tamirmiriet, koamda anyun ng’alek che bwanei, ago mata tun koyai ko u noto kogeny." 
Numbers11:26 Ago king’etune bik aeng’u nganaset, kigiguure age Eldad, ak kiguure age Medad: ak kitebe ichek tamirmiriet; ak ki boto bichoto, icheget che kiga kisir, ago kima ba ole mi Emait; ak kiamda ng’alek che bwanei eng’ nganaset." 
Numbers11:27 Ak kilabat murenet age ne neran, kwo komwachi Musa, kolenji, Amdoi ng’alek che bwanei Eldad ak Medad eng’ nganaset." 
Numbers11:28 Ak kiwol Josua weritab Nun, kiboitiotab Musa, ne age eng’ murenjoto ki neran, kolenji, Musa, kiptaiyandennyu, ker kong’ ichek." 
Numbers11:29 Ak kilenji Musa inendet, Kaamin ng’et kong’ agobo ane? Mie nda egu maotik bik tugul che bo Jehovah, ak mie nda indoi Jehovah tamirmiriennyi kotebe ichek!" 
Numbers11:30 Ak kiwa Musa nganaset ak boisiekab Israel. 
Numbers11:31 Ak kius usonet ne bunu Jehovah, ak kiib taok eng’ nyanjet, ak kiunda taochoto kobutyi nganaset, ole yamei bandab betut agenge ngeng’eete nganaset eng’ komosi ak komosin keyiem nganaset, ak kitirirendos ne yamei kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut kong’eete ng’ony." 
Numbers11:32 Ak king’eetyo bik betunoto komugul, ak kemounoto komugul, ak eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ komugul, koba koyum taochoto: inendet ne kiiyum che ng’ering’ ko ki yamei homerisiek taman; ak kima taochoto koyieme nganaset." 
Numbers11:33 Ak ye kingota komi kutuswekwak, kotom kolugui, kolalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo bik, ak kibare Jehovah bik koroito ne kieet kot." 
Numbers11:34 Ak kigiguure yoto Kibrot-hataaba, amu kitupchi oloto bik che kinyor maget." 
Numbers11:35 Ak kiba bik eng’ Kibrot-hataaba agoi koit Haserot; ak kimeny Haserot. 
Numbers12:1 Kichaam anyun Miriam ak Aron Musa amu kobogoriotab Kus ne kiitun; amu kiitun Jepkusiot. 
Numbers12:2 Ak kile, Tos ng’alali Jehovah ak Musa inegei? Tos ma ng’alalwech agachek? Ak kigas Jehovah ng’alechato." 
Numbers12:3 Ago ki chi ne tala mising’ Musa, kosiir bik tugul che kimi ng’ony." 
Numbers12:4 Ak kilenji Jehovah eng’ yoto Musa, ak Aron, ak Miriam, Omong’u sang’ okwek somogu, obwa emait ne kituiyechin. Ak kimong’ sang’, tugul ko somok." 
Numbers12:5 Ak kichorgei Jehovah eng’ toloitab boldet, ak kitonone kurgetab Emait, ak kiguur Aron ak Miriam; ak kibwa ichek tuwai." 
Numbers12:6 Kilenji anyun, Ogas anyun ng’alekyuk: ngo mi maotiot kweng’wong’, aborjinige ane Jehovah eng’ ng’ang’utiet, ang’alaljini eng’ karuotitoet." 
Numbers12:7 Ma u noto kiboitiondennyu Musa; bo iman inendet eng’ gonnyu komugul. 
Numbers12:8 King’alaljindosi kimni kotook, ma eng’ kalewenaik; ak kogeerei inendet itondab Jehovah. Kilya anyun si moiywei ochaam kiboitiondennyu Musa?" 
Numbers12:9 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah eng’ ichek; yeityo kwo. 
Numbers12:10 Ak kiwa boldet eng’ Emait: ogeero, kiam mogondosik Miriam, kileelit bortanyi ko u teluchi; ak kigeer Aron Miriam, kotinyei mogondosik." 
Numbers12:11 Ak kilenji Aron Musa, Ee, kiptaiyandennyu, asain ale, amat indeech tengekto, amu kageyai eng’ abusnatet, amu kageyai tengekto." 
Numbers12:12 Asain ale, amat koigei inendet ne kagome, ne negit konun bortanyi kotom kesich komong’ eng’ moetab kamet." 
Numbers12:13 Kirirji anyun Musa Jehovah, kolenji, Ee, Kamuktaindet, asain ale isoob inendet." 
Numbers12:14 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Nda kagang’utyi kwandanyi toget, ko tos kama kolilani betusiek tisab? Ingogerji inendet sang’utab nganaset betusiek tisab, ak ye ibata kimut kogeny konyo ga." 
Numbers12:15 Ak kigigerji anyun Miriam sang’utab nganaset betusiek tisab: ak kima ba bik agoi kimut Miriam kogeny konyo ga. 
Numbers12:16 Ak kingobata noto koba bik eng’ Haserot, koba koteech ong’atetab Paran." 
Numbers13:1 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa, kolenji," 
Numbers13:2 Iyokte murenik koba kosegei emetab Kanan, ne agochini lagokab Israel: oyoktoi chito agenge eng’ oret age tugul ne bo kwanisiekwak, ne age tugul ko kandoindet eng’ ichek." 
Numbers13:3 Kiiyokto anyun Musa bichoto eng’ ong’atetab Paran ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah: icheget tugul ko ki bik che eechen eng’ lagokab Israel. 
Numbers13:4 Ki chu kainaikwak: eng’ oretab Reuben, ko ki Samua weritab Sakur." 
Numbers13:5 Eng’ oretab Simeon, ko ki Sapat weritab Hori." 
Numbers13:6 Eng’ oretab Juda, ko ki Kaleb weritab Jepune." 
Numbers13:7 Eng’ oretab Isakar, ko ki Igal weritab Josep." 
Numbers13:8 Eng’ oretab Epraim, ko ki Hosea weritab Nun." 
Numbers13:8 Eng’ oretab Epraim, ko ki Hosea weritab Nun." 
Numbers13:9 Eng’ oretab Benjamin, ko ki Palti weritab Rapu." 
Numbers13:10 Eng’ oretab Sebulun, ko ki Gadiel weritab Sodi." 
Numbers13:11 Eng’ oretab Josep, ne bo oretab Manase, ko ki Gadi weritab Susi." 
Numbers13:12 Eng’ oretab Dan, ko ki Amiel weritab Gemali." 
Numbers13:13 Eng’ oretab Aser, ko ki Setur weritab Mikael." 
Numbers13:14 Eng’ oretab Naptali, ko ki Nabi weritab Bopsi." 
Numbers13:15 Ak eng’ oretab Gad, ko ki Geuel weritab Maki." 
Numbers13:16 Choto kainaikab murenik che kiiyokto Musa koba kosegei emet. Ak kiguure Musa Hosea weritab Nun, Josua." 
Numbers13:16 Choto kainaikab murenik che kiiyokto Musa koba kosegei emet. Ak kiguure Musa Hosea weritab Nun, Josua." 
Numbers13:17 Kiiyokto anyun Musa koba kosegei emetab Kanan; kilenji anyun bichoto, Obun oret ne wendi Murot ne bo Tai, otogoste tulonok." 
Numbers13:18 Ak ogeer emet, kit ne u; ak bik che menyei oloto, ngo kimen anan ngo nyalulyotin, ngo ng’ering’ anan ngo chang’;" 
Numbers13:19 ak kit ne u emet ne menyei bichoto, ngo kararan anan ngo ya; ak kiye u nganasok che menyei, ngo ma ng’ototin anan ngo tinyei irimoik;" 
Numbers13:20 ak kit ne u emet, ngo akwai anan ngo kemgem, ngo mi ketik anan ngo mami. Onyiganitu anyun, ak oibu logoekab emonoto. Kimachei korurio sabibuk che bo tai eng’ betusiechoto." 
Numbers13:21 Kitogosta anyun bichoto, koba kosegei emet, kong’eete ong’atetab Sin agoi Rehob, agoi koit ye kibunei kebendi Hamat." 
Numbers13:22 Kiba anyun kotogostae Murot ne bo Tai, ak kiit Hebron; ak kimi oloto Ahiman, Sesai, ak Talmai, lagokab Anok. (Kigiteech Hebron kenyisiek tisab kotom keteech Soan ne mi Misri.)" 
Numbers13:23 Ak kiit atebwetab Eskol, ak kitil eng’ oloto temet agenge ne tinyei logoekab sabibuk, ak kiinde ketit si kobiit kotiny kaat bik aeng’; kiib logoek alak agichek, ak logoekab mogoonik." 
Numbers13:24 Kigiguure oloto atebwetab Eskol, amu logoek che kitil lagokab Israel eng’ oloto." 
Numbers13:25 Ak kingogesgei betusiek artamu koweek eng’ segeetab emet. 
Numbers13:26 Kibwa anyun agoi ole mi Musa ak Aron, ak tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, eng’ ong’atetab Paran, agoi Kades; ak kiipchi ichek ng’alek, ak tuiyet komugul, ak koborji logoekab emonoto." 
Numbers13:27 Ak kimwachi bichoto inendet, kolenji, Kigeit emet ne kiiyoktech kebe, iman nyiitat chego ak kumik; logoekab emonoto chu." 
Numbers13:28 Ago kimen bik che menyei emonoto, ak ng’ototin nganasok, ak ko eechen mising’; ak koboto noto, ko kigigeer eng’ oloto lagokab Anak." 
Numbers13:29 Menyei Amalegik komostab Murot ne bo Tai; ak komenyei tulonok Hitik, ak Jebusik, ak Amorik; ak komenyei Kananik ngegutab araraita, ak ngegutab Jordan." 
Numbers13:30 Kimwachi anyun Kaleb bik kosisyo eng’ taitab Musa, ak kolenji, Ongetogoste nguno, keluul emet; amu kimuchi kiterter." 
Numbers13:31 Ago kile bik che kiga togosta koba koboto inendet, Magimuchi kebe kebargei ak bichoto; amu kimen kosiirech." 
Numbers13:32 Ak kiipchi lagokab Israel ng’alek che yaachen agobo emonoto kiga segei, kolenji, Amei bikyik emonoto kigibun kesegei; ak ko koen mising’ bik tugul che kigigeer eng’ oloto." 
Numbers13:33 Ak kigigeerji oloto Nepilik, werikab Anak, che kibunu Nepilik; ak kigi u talamik ye kingirogege bichoto, ak kigi u noto eng’ tainywa." 
Numbers14:1 Kiwaach anyun tuiyet komugul koririo, ak kiiteiyo bik kemounoto." 
Numbers14:2 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji lagokab Israel tugul Musa ak Aron; ak kilenji tuiyet komugul ichek, Ki kaigai nda kiga kibekyi emetab Misri! Anan ko nda kiga kibekyi ong’atani!" 
Numbers14:3 Amu nee si komutwech Jehovah kebwa emoni, si kobiit kebarech eng’ rotwetab chok? Ak koek osotikyok ak lagokyok luulenik: tos ma kaigai keweekyige Misri?" 
Numbers14:4 King’alaljigei anyun ichegei kole, Ongelewen kiptaiyat, si keweige Misri." 
Numbers14:5 Kiing’urukso ng’ony anyun Musa ak Aron kot kotiiny togochikwak ng’ony, eng’ taitab bik tugul che bo tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel." 
Numbers14:6 Ak kibet ngoroikwak Josua weritab Nun ak Kaleb weritab Jepune, che kimi koboto ichek che kiga ba kosegei emet;" 
Numbers14:7 ak king’alalji tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel kolenji, Kararan mising’ kosiir emonoto kigibunate, kesegei." 
Numbers14:8 Ngot kobaibai Jehovah eng’ achek, komutech anyun kebe emonoto, ak kogonech; emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik." 
Numbers14:9 Ago amongelelji Jehovah, anan oiywei bikab emet; amu u amitwogik eng’ achek; kigeistoe ichek uruetab toretet, ak mi Jehovah kobotech; amoiywei ichek." 
Numbers14:10 Ago kimwa tuiyet komugul kole, kelach ichek eng’ koik. Ak kitook lilindab Jehovah eng’ emait ne kituiyechin, komong’ji lagokab Israel tugul." 
Numbers14:11 Ak kiteebe Jehovah Musa kolenji, Renya bichu kot kotianit? Maiyana agoi au, agot nganda kiayai kaborunoik choto tugul eng’ kwenunywa?" 
Numbers14:12 Abare koroito, ak aiste ichek eng’ ane, ak ayain iegu bororiet ne o, ne kim kosiir ichek." 
Numbers14:13 Ak kilenji anyun Musa Jehovah, Kasei anyun Misrik ng’olyondonito; amu kiimutu bichuto kotogos eng’ kwenunywa eng’ kimnateng’ung’;" 
Numbers14:14 yeityo komwachi bikab emonito, Kigogas ichek kole imi inye Jehovah kwenutab bichu; amu i toogu inye Jehovah kimni, ak tonone boldeng’ung’ baragunywa, ak indoe ichek, eng’ toloitab boldet bet, ak eng’ toloitab mat kemoi." 
Numbers14:15 Ngot anyun ibar bichu kibagenge, komwa anyun bororiosiek che kigogas agobo ng’aleguk, kole," 
Numbers14:16 Kigobarji Jehovah bichoto ong’atet amu kima imuch inendet komut ichek koba emet ne kiga koyosiechi. 
Numbers14:17 Asain anyun nguno ale, ingoeet kimnatetab Kiptaiyat, ko u ye kaimwa ile," 
Numbers14:18 Masib konerech Jehovah, ak ko nyiitat rirenet, ne nyochin kaat tengekto ak bistoet, ama nyochin kaat buch kiptengekyot; ago iityin lagok agobo tengektab kwanisiekwak, agoi ibinda ne bo somok ak ne bo ang’wan." 
Numbers14:19 Asain ale, nyochi kaat anyun bichu tengektanywa ko u oindab rireneng’ung’, ak ko u ye kiinyochi kaat bichu koboch Misri agoi kora." 
Numbers14:20 Ak kile Jehovah, Kanyochi kaat ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’;" 
Numbers14:21 ago iman, ko u ye asobe, ak ko u ye tun nyiei ng’ony komugul tororindab Jehovah;" 
Numbers14:22 amu bicho tugul che kigogeer tororindanyu ak kaborunoikyuk, che kiayai eng’ Misri ak eng’ ong’atet, ak kigotiema konyil chu taman, ama epchin it kutinnyu;" 
Numbers14:23 mageerei iman emonoto kiayosiechi kwanisiekwak, ama keerei age tugul eng’ ichek che kisasa;" 
Numbers14:24 kobate kiboitiondennyu Kaleb, amu kitinyei tamirmiriet age, ak kiisuba eng’ kagesunatetab ge, amuti inendet kwo emonoto kigawa; ak kobunji iyotennyi emonoto." 
Numbers14:25 Menyei atebwet Amalegik ak Kananik: oweeige mutai, ak obe ong’atet anyun oret ne wendi Nyanjet ne Birir." 
Numbers14:26 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Musa ak Aron, kolenji," 
Numbers14:27 Amuitoi eng’ tuiyoni ya ne ing’unyng’ung’jina kot kotianit? Koagas kang’unyng’ung’etab lagokab Israel, che ing’unyng’ung’jina." 
Numbers14:28 Ilenji ichek, Kale Jehovah, Ko u ye asobe, ko u ye kaomwawa agas eng’ itikyuk, ayaiywok agane ko u noto;" 
Numbers14:29 obekyini ong’atani; tugul che kigiit eng’ okwek, ko u koiteng’wong’ komugul, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, che kigong’unyng’ung’ja," 
Numbers14:30 moite emonoto iman, ne kiayosiechige ale agonok omeny oloto, kobate Kaleb weritab Jepune, ak Josua weritab Nun, che itei." 
Numbers14:31 Ago amuti lagokwok che kiole egu luulenik koba emonoto, si konai ichek emet ne kioesie." 
Numbers14:32 Ago okwek, obekyini ong’atani." 
Numbers14:33 Ak koyogisiot lagokwok eng’ ong’atani kenyisiek artam, ak koibot kugoinateng’wong’, agoi kiges muswekwok eng’ ong’atet." 
Numbers14:34 Oiboti tengekwogikwok kenyisiek artam ko u koitetab betusiek che kiotar eng’ segeetab emet, eng’ betusiechoto artam, ko betut age tugul ko kenyit, si kobiit onai ye aistoenok kayomisutiennyu." 
Numbers14:35 Kaamwa ane Jehovah ale, ayachini chuto tugul tuiyoni ya, ne katila let; igesyingei ong’atani; bekyin oloto." 
Numbers14:36 Ak kibek bichoto che kiiyokto Musa koba kosegei emet, che kiweek, che kibwa kogochi bik kong’unyng’ung’ji inendet, amu kiib ng’alek che yaach agobo emonoto;" 
Numbers14:37 kibek eng’ koroito eng’ taitab Jehovah bichoto kiib ng’alek che yaach agobo emet. 
Numbers14:38 Ago king’eet Josua weritab Nun, ak Kaleb weritab Jepune kosopcho, eng’ bik che kiga ba kosegei emet." 
Numbers14:39 Ak kimwachi Musa lagokab Israel ng’alechuto tugul; ak kiririo bichoto mising’. 
Numbers14:40 King’eetyo anyun karon mising’, ak kotogosta agoi tulwet barak, kolen, Kimi yu, kagibe ketogoste ole kigomwa Jehovah: amu kogeyai tengekto." 
Numbers14:41 Ak kilenji Musa, Amu nee si obistoe ng’atutietab Jehovah? Amu magiberuri ng’olyot ne u noto." 
Numbers14:42 Amat otogoste, amu mami Jehovah kobotok; si mabarak eng’ taitab bunikwok." 
Numbers14:43 Amu mi taing’wong’ eng’ oloto Amalegik ak Kananik, ak kibarok eng’ rotwetab chok; amu kioweige let ama osub Jehovah, mami anyun Jehovah kobotok amu noto." 
Numbers14:44 Ago kima kas it, kiba kinichek agoi tulwet barak, ago kimawa moingetab arorutietab Jehovah eng’ nganaset, ak kimawa Musa agine." 
Numbers14:45 Kichorgei anyun Amalegik ak Kananik che kimenyei tulwonoto, ak kibar ichek ak kion, agoi koit Horma." 
Numbers15:1 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers15:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Ye oit emetab meng’atosiekwok, ne agonok," 
Numbers15:3 ak omach ochopchi Jehovah kagochinet ne bunei mat, ngo kagochinet ne kibeelei, anan tiseiywot, si kobiit ogesu kayosiet, anan kagochinet ne bo chamnyet, anan eng’ igorwek che kiging’at, si oyachi Jehovah nyamdutiet ne anyiny, ne bo tuga, anan ko ne bo nego:" 
Numbers15:4 ingogoito anyun inendet ne igoitoi kagochinennyi kogochin Jehovah, kagochinet ne bo busiek ne yamei kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo epah, ne bo busiek che tambululen che kigiburukto mwaita ne yamei kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin:" 
Numbers15:5 ak kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin ne bo divaik kobunji kagochinet ne kieei; chob choto koboto kagochinet ne kibeelei, anan ko tiseiywot, si kigoito koboto aruet age tugul ne bo kechir." 
Numbers15:6 Anan ngo mengit, ichob kagochinetab busiek ne yamei kebeberwek aeng’ che bo taman che bo epah che bo busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita ne yamei kebebertab somok ne bo hin:" 
Numbers15:7 ak igoite kagochinet ne kieei ne bo kebebertab somok ne bo hin ne bo divaik, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Numbers15:8 Ak ye ichob kirgit ne ming’in koek kagochinet ne kibeelei, anan ko ne bo tiseiywot, si kobiit igesu kayosiet, anan ko che bo kagochinoikab kalyet eng’ Jehovah:" 
Numbers15:9 ingogoito anyun koboto kirgoto kagochinetab busiek ne yamei kebeberwek somok che bo taman che bo epah che bo busiek che ng’ootin che kigiburukto mwaita ne yamei kebebertab hin. 
Numbers15:10 Ak igoite kebebertab hin ne bo divaik koek kagochinet ne kieei, kobunji kagochinet ne bunei mat, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Numbers15:11 Kiyachin ko u noto kirgit age tugul, anan mengit age tugul, anan aruet age tugul ne bo kechir ne mengit, anan aruetab ng’oror." 
Numbers15:12 Oyachini age tugul ko u koitenywa, ko u koitet ne ochobe." 
Numbers15:13 Yaei ko u noto tugul che salu ga, ye igoitoi kagochinet ne bunei mat, kobunji nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Numbers15:14 Ak ngo mi kipsagarin kobotok, anan chi age tugul ne mi kobotok eng’ ibinwekwok tugul, ak komach kogoito kagochinet ne bunei mat, kobunji nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah; ko u ye oyae, koyaei agine ko u noto." 
Numbers15:15 Agenge ng’atutiet ne bo tuiyet eng’ okwek, ak eng’ kipsagarindet ne meng’isiei kobotok, ng’atutiet ne tebyei agoi eng’ ibinwekwok tugul: ko u ole oteptoi eng’ taitab Jehovah, kotebyei ko u noto agine kipsagarindet." 
Numbers15:16 Egu ng’atutiet agenge ak kiruoget agenge eng’ okwek, ak eng’ kipsagarindet ne mi kobotok." 
Numbers15:17 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers15:18 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji, Ye oit emet ne amutok," 
Numbers15:19 koek anyun, ye oam amitwogikab emonoto, ogoitoi kagochinet ne kinamjin barak, kigochin Jehovah." 
Numbers15:20 Eng’ makatinikwok che bo tai, ogoitoi makatiat ne ming’in kobunji kagochinet ne kinamjin barak: ko u ye oyae agobo ruanyut ne kiborse, onamjini barak ko u noto." 
Numbers15:21 Ogochini Jehovah makatiandeng’wong’ ne bo tai koek kagochinet ne kinamjin barak eng’ ibinwekwok tugul. 
Numbers15:22 Ak ye olel, amorib ng’atutichu tugul kimwachi Jehovah Musa," 
Numbers15:23 tugul che king’atak Jehovah eng’ Musa, koboch ye kigon Jehovah ng’atutik, agoi ibinwekwok tugul:" 
Numbers15:24 koek anyun, ngo lel chi, ama konai tuiyet, kogoito anyun tuiyet komugul kirgit ne neran, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah, koboto kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak kagochinennyi ne kieei, ko u ng’atutiet, ak kwesta agenge ne bo kagochinet agobo tengekto." 
Numbers15:25 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, ak kenyochi kaat; amu ko lelutiet, ak kagoget kagochinenywa, kagochinet ne bunei mat ne kigochin Jehovah, ak kagochinenywa ne bo tengekto eng’ taitab Jehovah, amu lelutienywa:" 
Numbers15:26 ak kenyochi kaat tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, ak kipsagarindet ne meng’isiei eng’ kwenunywa, amu kigiyai kioto amengen bik tugul kole nee." 
Numbers15:27 Ago ngo lel chi age tugul amaingen, kogoito anyun subendab ng’oror ne masiirei kenyit agenge koek kagochinet agobo tengekto." 
Numbers15:28 Ak koyai tisiindet kagaigaet agobo chichoto lelei, ye kayai tengekto amaingen, ingoyai anyun kagaigaet agobo inendet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kenyochi kaat." 
Numbers15:29 Egu ng’atutiet agenge eng’ okwek ne bo chito ne kalel kiy age tugul amaingen, eng’ inendet ne bo lagokab Israel, ak ne bo kipsagarindet ne meng’isiei eng’ kwenunywa." 
Numbers15:30 Ago chito ne yaei kiy age tugul kokwetyin, ngo neng’wong’, anan kipsagarin, ko kachub chichoto Jehovah; ak king’etoi chichoto eng’ bikyik." 
Numbers15:31 Amu kasas ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak kagobut ng’atutiennyi; king’etoi chichoto kobet, tebe tengektanyi inendet." 
Numbers15:32 Ak ye kita komi lagokab Israel ong’atet, konyor chito koyumotin kwenik eng’ betutab sabato." 
Numbers15:33 Ak kiimut bik che kinyoru chichoto koyumi kwenik kwo ole mi Musa ak Aron, agoi ole mi tuiyet komugul." 
Numbers15:34 Ak kigerji inendet go, amu kitom kemwa kit ne kiitoi inendet." 
Numbers15:35 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Kibarei chichoto iman: ingolach tuiyet komugul eng’ koik eng’ sang’utab nganaset." 
Numbers15:36 Ak kiimut tuiyet komugul inendet kwo sang’utab nganaset, ak kolage koik, ak kime; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Numbers15:37 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers15:38 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji konapchigei tuguk che u sawoik eng’ tabanwekab ngoroikwak, eng’ ibinwekwak tugul, ak kogurmane usit ne tuui ne nyalil, baragutab sawoichoto mi tabanda age tugul:" 
Numbers15:39 ak egu usinoto, u sawoiyot eng’ okwek ne ogeere ak obwati ng’atutik tugul che bo Jehovah, ak oyai; si mosub kit ne machei mugulelwekwok, ak konyekwok, che kicham osubi oibegei." 
Numbers15:40 Si kobiit obwat ak oyai ng’atutikyuk tugul, ak oegu che tililen eng’ Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Numbers15:41 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ne kiimoong’wok omong’une emetab Misri, si aek Kamuktaindeng’wong’: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Numbers16:1 Kiiyum bik anyun Kora weritab Isar weritab Kohat weritab Lawi, koboto Datan ak Abiram, werikab Eliab, ak On weritab Pelet, werikab Reuben:" 
Numbers16:2 ak kong’eetyo eng’ taitab Musa koboto lagokab Israel alak, bounik bogol aeng’ ak konom che bo tuiyet che kigiguur kobwa ole katuiyechi bik, bik che toogunotin:" 
Numbers16:3 ak kiiyumgei ichegei si kobiit kotil let Musa ak Aron, ak kolenji, Oeetigei, amu tilil tuiyoni komugul, chi age tugul eng’ ichek, ak mi Jehovah kwenunywa. Amu nee si oeetgei osiir tuiyetab Jehovah?" 
Numbers16:4 Ak ye kingogas Musa ng’olyondonoto, kong’uruk kot koit ng’ony togennyi:" 
Numbers16:5 ak kimwachi Kora ak bikyik kolenji, Iboru Jehovah mutai karon che chechik, ak ne tilil, ak koguur kwo ole mi inendet: chichoto leweni, koguurei korikyi inendet." 
Numbers16:6 Oyai ko u ni; oib terenik okwek, inye Kora, ak biguk tugul;" 
Numbers16:7 ak onde mastinwek terenichoto orit, ak onde mutai karon nyamdutik che kibeelei eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak tilil chichoto leweni Jehovah; kaoeetge okwek, werikab Lawi." 
Numbers16:8 Ak kilenji Musa Kora, Ogaso, okwek, werikab Lawi:" 
Numbers16:9 tos ogeere ole ming’in ng’olyondoni eng’ okwek, amu kiitabanak Kamuktaindetab Israel eng’ tuiyetab Israel, si komutak orikyi inendet; si oyai boisietab gotab Jehovah, ak otononse eng’ taitab tuiyet oot ichek;" 
Numbers16:10 ak kigomutun irigu, ak tupchosieguk tugul werikab Lawi? Tos omache tiseinatet agine?" 
Numbers16:11 Koyumgei anyun inye oegu agenge ak biguk otil let Jehovah: Aron ko ng’o kot ong’unyng’ung’ji? 
Numbers16:12 Ak kiiyokto Musa chito keguur Datan ak Abiram werikab Eliab: ak kile, Magibwane." 
Numbers16:13 Tos igeere ile kiy ne ming’in ye kiimutwech ketogosu eng’ emet ne ki nyiitat chego ak kumik, si ibarjech ong’atani, ak imache iegu bounindet iboiywech?" 
Numbers16:14 Ak koboto noto ko ma imutyech emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik, ama igonech boratetab mbarenik ak che bo sabibuk: tos imache ibalu konyekab bichu? Magibwane." 
Numbers16:15 Ak kinerech Musa mising’, ak kilenji Jehovah, Amecham kagochinenywa: tom aibe ichek agot sigiriet agenge, ak tom anyalil agot chi agenge eng’ ichek." 
Numbers16:16 Yeityo kolenji Musa Kora, Obwa taitab Jehovah mutai, inye ak tuiyeng’wong’ komugul, ak Aron:" 
Numbers16:17 ak koib chi tugul terennyi, ak konde nyamdutik che kibeelei, yeityo koib chi tugul terennyi konyo taitab Jehovah, terenik bogol aeng’ ak konom; ak iibu tereng’ung’ inye ak Aron, chi tugul ak terennyi." 
Numbers16:18 Ak kiib anyun chi tugul terennyi, ak konde mat orit, ak konde tuguk che kibeelei mat barak, ak kotonon eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin koboto Musa ak Aron." 
Numbers16:19 Ak kiiyum Kora tuiyet komugul kotil let ichek eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin: ak kimong’ lilindab Jehovah eng’ taitab tuiyet tugul. 
Numbers16:20 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron kolenji," 
Numbers16:21 Otabanegei tuiyoni okwek, si kobiit awong’ ichek ngunoto." 
Numbers16:22 Ak kiing’urukso kot kotiiny togochikwak ng’ony ak kole, Ee Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne bo tamirmirikab bik tugul, tos inerekyini tuiyet komugul ngo yai chito agenge tengekto?" 
Numbers16:23 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers16:24 Mwachi tuiyet ilenji, Oistoegei meng’otetab Kora ak Datan ak Abiram." 
Numbers16:25 Ak king’eet Musa kwo oldab Datan ak Abiram: ak kiisub inendet boisiekab Israel. 
Numbers16:26 Ak kimwachi tuiyet kolenji, Asaok ale oistoegei emaisiekab kiptengeginichu, amat otwa kiy age tugul nenywa, si ma kiwong’wok eng’ tengekwogikwak." 
Numbers16:27 Kiistogei anyun ichek eng’ meng’otetab Kora ak Datan ak Abiram, eng’ komosta age tugul: ak kibwa sang’ Datan ak Abiram, ak kitononso eng’ kurgetab emaisiekwak, koboto osotikwak, ak werikwak, ak lagokwak." 
Numbers16:28 Ak kile Musa, onae ni ole kiiyokwa Jehovah nyo ayai boisionichu tugul; amu ma ayai eng’ magennyu." 
Numbers16:29 Ngot kobek bichu ko u ye begu bik tugul, anan ngeyachi ichek ko u ye kiyachin bik tugul, ko kaga ma iyokwa Jehovah." 
Numbers16:30 Ago ngot koyai Jehovah kiy ne tounen, ak koyat ng’ony kutinnyi, ak kolugui ichek koboto tugukwak tugul, ak kochortagei keringet kosoptos; onai anyun ole kisas bichu Jehovah." 
Numbers16:31 Ak kingo kagomwa ng’alechato tugul koges, kobetak ng’ony ye kimi." 
Numbers16:32 Ak kiyat ng’ony kutinnyi kolugui ichek, ak bikwak, ak bik tugul che kiga namgei ak Kora, ak tugukwak tugul." 
Numbers16:33 Kirorokyi keringet kosoptos bichoto, ak icheget che kimi tugul: ak kituch ng’ony ichek, ak kilusyo anyun eng’ tuiyet." 
Numbers16:34 Ak kimwei Israelik tugul che kimi ole negite ichek ye kingogas kateenywa: amu kile, Si maluguech ng’ony agachek." 
Numbers16:35 Ak kimong’une mat Jehovah, ak kibeel bichoto bogol aeng’ ak konom che kiigoitoi nyamdutik che kibeelei." 
Numbers16:36 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers16:37 Ilenji Eleasar weritab Aron tisiindet, koisto terenik eng’ mat, ak iwas mat eng’ oloto; amu tililen;" 
Numbers16:38 terenikab kiptengeginichu, kogoruokyigei kot kobek, ak ingitany kolebelitu si ketuge kaptisisiet: amu kiigoito eng’ taitab Jehovah, tililen anyun amu noto: si koek kaborunet eng’ lagokab Israel." 
Numbers16:39 Ak kiib anyun Eleasar terenichoto bo sugunonik, che kiga kogoito icheget che kigibeel; ak kiitany tukchoto si ketuge kaptisisiet:" 
Numbers16:40 si kobiit koek kabwatet eng’ lagokab Israel, si marik toondet ne ma bo oretab Aron nyo kobeel nyamdutik eng’ taitab Jehovah; si maigei Kora, ak tuiyennyi: ko u ye kimwachi Jehovah inendet eng’ Musa." 
Numbers16:41 Ago kiing’unyng’ung’ji Musa ak Aron tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel eng’ betut ne kiisubi betunoto kole, Koobar bikab Jehovah." 
Numbers16:42 Ak ye kingo kagoyumgei tuiyet, si kotil let Musa ak Aron, kogeer ole mi emait ne ketuiyechin; ogeero, kituch boldet emainato, ak kitook lilindab Jehovah." 
Numbers16:43 Ak kiba Musa ak Aron taitab emait ne kituiyechin. 
Numbers16:44 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers16:45 Oistoegei tuiyoni, si kobiit awong’ ichek ngunoto. Ak kiing’uruk kot kotiiny togennyi ng’ony." 
Numbers16:46 Ak kilenji Musa Aron, Ib tereng’ung’ ak inde mat ne bunu kaptisisiet teret orit, ak inde nyamdutik baragunnyi, ak iib ichaktae kwo ole mitei tuiyet, si iyachi kagaigaet: amu kagobun neregek Jehovah; kagotoigei koroito." 
Numbers16:47 Ak kiib Aron terennyi ko u ye kaga mwa Musa; kilabat kwo kwenutab tuiyet; ogeero, kagotoigei koroito eng’ bik: ak kibeel nyamdutik, ak koyachi kagaigaet bik." 
Numbers16:48 Ak kitonon eng’ kwenutab che kagobek ak che soptos; ak kisis koroito. 
Numbers16:49 Ak ichek che kibek eng’ koroito ko ki elfusiek taman ak ang’wan ak bogol tisab, che ma kiitito che kibek amu ng’alekab Kora." 
Numbers16:50 Ak kiweek Aron kwo ole mi Musa agoi kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin: ak kisis koroito. 
Numbers17:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers17:2 Ng’alalji lagokab Israel, ak iibune siarisiek, siarit agenge eng’ got age tugul ne bo kwanisiekwak, eng’ bounikwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, egu siarisiek taman ak aeng’. Sirji kainetab chi age tugul siarinnyi." 
Numbers17:3 Ak isirji siaritab Lawi kainetab Aron: amu bunjin siarit agenge bounindet age tugul ne bo gorikab kwanisiekwak. 
Numbers17:4 Yeityo igonor siarisiechoto eng’ emait ne kituiyechin eng’ taitab baornatet, ole kituiyechini ak okwek." 
Numbers17:5 Yeityo kong’at siaritab chito ne aleweni; ak awong’u eng’ tainnyu kang’unyng’ung’et ne ing’unyng’ung’jinok lagokab Israel. 
Numbers17:6 Ak king’alalji Musa lagokab Israel, ak kiigochi bounikwak tugul siarisiek, siarit agenge eng’ bounindet age tugul, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, siarisiek taman ak aeng’: ak kimitei siaritab Aron koboto siarisiekwak." 
Numbers17:7 Ak kigonor Musa siarisiechoto eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ emaitab baornatet. 
Numbers17:8 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi betunoto, kwo Musa emaitab baornatet orit; ak ogeero, kogong’at siaritab Aron ne bo oretab Lawi, ak koyesio taptok, ak kogoi lagoek che ruriotin che kiguure almond." 
Numbers17:9 Ak kiib Musa siarisiek tugul kobunu taitab Jehovah si konde taitab lagokab Israel tugul: ak kigeer, ak kiinem chi age tugul siarinnyi." 
Numbers17:10 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ketite siaritab Aron kwo taitab baornatet, si kegonor koek kaborunet amu lagokab ngelelik; si kobiit iwong’u kang’unyng’ung’enywa ne ing’unyng’ung’jina, si mabek." 
Numbers17:11 Kiyai anyun Musa ko u noto: ko u ye king’at Jehovah, kiyai ko u noto." 
Numbers17:12 Ak kimwachi lagokab Israel Musa kolenji, Keero, kagibegu, kagilusye, kagilusye tugul." 
Numbers17:13 Meei chi age tugul ne rikyin gotab Jehovah: tos kiwong’uge achek tugul? 
Numbers18:1 Ak kilenji Jehovah Aron, Oibe tengektab ole tilil, inye ak weriguk, ak gotab kwanisieguk: ak oibe tengektab tiseinateng’wong’, inye ak weriguk." 
Numbers18:2 Ak imutu korik tupchosieguk agichek, oretab Lawi, oretab kwandang’ung’, si kobiit onamge ak icheget, ak koboisieun: ago otebe taitab emait ne bo baornatet, inye ak weriguk." 
Numbers18:3 Ak korib ichek ng’atutieng’ung’, ak ng’atutiet ne bo Emait komugul: ago amat kerikyi tuguk che bo ole tilil anan kapkorusut, si mabek ichek, anan ko okwek." 
Numbers18:4 Ak kiyomenen bichoto, ak korib ng’atutietab emait ne kituiyechin, agobo boisiet tugul ne bo Emait: amat korikyok kipsagarindet." 
Numbers18:5 Ak orib ng’atutietab ole tilil, ak ng’atutietab kapkorusut si mata kobiit neregek kogeny agobo lagokab Israel." 
Numbers18:6 Ogeero, kaataban ane tupchosiekwok Lawik eng’ lagokab Israel: egu ichek kagochinet eng’ okwek, ne kigochin Jehovah si kobois eng’ emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers18:7 Ak orib inye ak weriguk tiseinateng’wong’ agobo kiy age tugul ne bo kapkorusut, ak che bo choto mi anget ne kigioye, orit; ak oboisie: kagonok tiseinatet koek boisietab konunet: ak kibarei kipsagarin ne rikyin." 
Numbers18:8 Ak kilenji Jehovah Aron, Keero, kaagonin ripset ne bo konunoikyuk che kinamjin barak, tuguk tugul che itabanotin che bo lagokab Israel, kiagonin ak weriguk tuguchoto amu kaiilset, koek ng’atutiet ne bo agoi." 
Numbers18:9 Egu cheguk tukchoto eng’ che tililen mising’, che kita kibeelei: kiy age tugul ne konu ichek, kagochinenywa age tugul ne bo busiek, ak kagochinenywa age tugul ne bo tengekto, ak kagochjinnenywa age tugul ne bo kachililutiet, che ibwa, tililitu mising’ choto eng’ inye ak weriguk." 
Numbers18:10 Iame tukchoto eng’ ole tilil: amei age tugul ne muren; egu ne tilil eng’ inye. 
Numbers18:11 Ak neng’ung’ ni agine; kagochinenywa ne kinamjin barak ne bo konunenywa, agot kagochinoikwak tugul che kiongoi che bo lagokab Israel: kaagonin choto, koboto weriguk ak tibiguk, ko u ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny: amei chi age tugul ne bo gong’ung’ ne ma ng’wan." 
Numbers18:12 Kaagonin tugul che miachen che bo mwanik, ak divaik tugul che kororon che bo kesisietab sabibuk, ak che bo bek che miachen, tongoanikwak tugul che kigochin Jehovah." 
Numbers18:13 Bunjinin tongoanik che bo tuguk tugul che mi emenywa, che ipchin Jehovah; amei age tugul ne ma ng’wan ne bo gong’ung’." 
Numbers18:14 Bunjinin kiy age tugul ne itabanat eng’ Israel. 
Numbers18:15 Bunjinin age tugul ne yatei iyotet, eng’ bik ak eng’ che kiyagi, che igochin ichek Jehovah: ago itiachi iman che bo tai eng’ siget, ak itiachi che twatei che ng’wonen eng’ che kiyagi." 
Numbers18:16 Ak choto che kitiachi eng’ icheget che bo koboch arawet agenge ak kwo tai, itiachi ko u kamanutiet ne igerjini koek fedaisiekab sekelisiek mut, ko u sekel ne bo ole tilil (noto ko gerahisiek tiptem)." 
Numbers18:17 Ago amat itiach ne twatei teta, anan ne twatei kechiriet, anan ne twatei ng’ororiet; tililen choto: iise kaptisisiet korotikwak, ak ibeel mwanikwak koek kagochinet ne bunei mat, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Numbers18:18 Ak kobunjin banyekwak, ko u ye neng’ung’ tagatet ne keongoi, ak chatit ne bo komostab tai." 
Numbers18:19 Kaagonin koboto weriguk ak tibiguk kagochinoik tugul che kinamjin barak che bo tuguk che tililen, che igochin lagokab Israel Jehovah, ko u ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny; nito kayomisetab munyuk ne bo koigeny eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ inye ak eng’ iyoteng’ung’ koboten." 
Numbers18:20 Ak kilenji Jehovah Aron, Menyoru borotet eng’ emenywa, amenyoru kebeberta age tugul eng’ kwenunywa: ane kebebertang’ung’ ak boroteng’ung’ eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel." 
Numbers18:21 Ogeero, kaagochi lagokab Lawi kebeberwek tugul che bo taman eng’ Israel koek borotenywa, kogeere boisienywa ne yaei, noto boisietab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers18:22 Koboch nguno ko marikyin lagokab Israel emait ne kituiyechin, si manyor tengekto, ak kobek." 
Numbers18:23 Ago yaei Lawik boisietab emait ne kituiyechin, ak koib tengektanywa: egu nito ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ ibinwekwok tugul, ak manyoru borotet ichek eng’ lagokab Israel." 
Numbers18:24 Amu kaagochi Lawik koek borotenywa kebebertab taman ne bo lagokab Israel, ne igochjin ichek Jehovah koek kagochinet ne kinamjin barak: kaamwachi anyun ichek amu noto, alenji, Monyoru borotet eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel." 
Numbers18:25 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers18:26 Mwachi kogeny Lawik, ilenji, Ye otaach kebeberwekab taman eng’ lagokab Israel, choto kaagonok kobunu ichek, koek boroteng’wong’, ogoite anyun kebebertab taman eng’ kebeberato koek kagochinet ne kinamjin barak, kobunji Jehovah." 
Numbers18:27 Ak kiityok kagochineng’wong’ ne kinamjin barak, ko u ye kiiti bek che bo ruanyut ne kiborse, ak ko u nyiietab ole kitue sabibuk." 
Numbers18:28 Ogochini Jehovah ak okwek ko u noto kagochinet ne kinamjin barak ne bo kebeberwekwok tugul che bo taman, che otaache eng’ lagokab Israel; ak ogochi Aron tisiindet kagochinet ne kinamjin barak, ne bo Jehovah, ne bo noto." 
Numbers18:29 Ogoitoi kagochinet age tugul ne kinamjin barak, ne bo Jehovah, eng’ konunoikwok tugul, eng’ choto miachen, kebebertanyi ne kigitaban." 
Numbers18:30 Mwachi anyun ichek amu noto, ilenji, Ye onamjini barak eng’ choto miachen, kiityin anyun Lawik ko u ye kiiti ruratet eng’ ruanyut ne kiborse, ak ko u ye kiiti ruratet eng’ ole kitue sabibuk." 
Numbers18:31 Ak oam choto eng’ komoswek tugul, okwek ak bikab gorikwok: amu choto melekwekwok che bo boisieng’wong’ eng’ emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers18:32 Ak moibe tengekto eng’ noto, ye kaonamji barak che miachen eng’ choto: ak mong’wanit tuguk che tililen che bo lagokab Israel, si mobegu." 
Numbers19:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron kolenji," 
Numbers19:2 Konetisiet ni ne bo ng’atutiet ne kigong’at Jehovah kole, Mwachi lagokab Israel kogetun roriat ne birir ne matinyei berut, ne libwob, ne tomo kerat:" 
Numbers19:3 ak igochi Eleasar tisiindet, ak kokweri kwo sang’utab nganaset, ak koeny chito eng’ tainnyi:" 
Numbers19:4 ak korooch Eleasar mornennyi korotikab roriandanato, ak koisisie korotichoto kotokyi taitab emait ne kituiyechin, konyil tisab:" 
Numbers19:5 ak ingobeel chito roriandanato eng’ tainnyi; koboto muitanyi, ak banyekyik, ak korotikyik, ak eiyandennyi:" 
Numbers19:6 ak konam tisiindet tarakwet, ak husop, ak ngoriet ne birir, ak kowirji mat ne kagibeele roriat." 
Numbers19:7 Yeityo komwet tisiindet ngoroikyik, ak koungei, ak ye ibata, konyo nganaset, ak muruonitu tisiindonoto agoi koimen." 
Numbers19:8 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne beelei roriandanato, ak koungei, ak muruonitu agoi koimen." 
Numbers19:9 Ak ingoyum orekab roriandanato chito ne ma ng’wan, ak konde sang’utab nganaset eng’ komosta ne tilil, ak kegonorji choto tuiyetab lagokab Israel koek beekab katabanet: nito kagochinetab tengekto." 
Numbers19:10 Ak mwetei ngoroikyik ne iyumi orechato, ak komuruonit agoi koimen: ak egu nito ng’atutiet ne bo koigeny eng’ lagokab Israel ak kipsagarindet ne meng’isiei eng’ kwenunywa." 
Numbers19:11 Muruonitu betusiek tisab inendet ne twaei musto ne bo chi age tugul: 
Numbers19:12 ianyinyegei beechoto inendet eng’ betutab somok, ak kotililit eng’ betutab tisab: ago ngot ko meanyinygei eng’ betutab somok, ko matililitu eng’ betutab tisab." 
Numbers19:13 Imuruoni gotab Jehovah age tugul ne twaei mustab chi age tugul ne kame, ama ianyingei; king’etoi chichoto eng’ Israel: amu ma kiise beekab katabanet, muruon anyun inendet; ak ta komi muruonindanyi inendet." 
Numbers19:14 Ng’atutiet ni ne bo chi ne kame eng’ go: muruonitu eng’ betusiek tisab chi age tugul ne wendi emainato orit, ak age tugul ne mi emait." 
Numbers19:15 Ak ng’wan kiy age tugul ne yatat, ne ma kirat kit ne kigere." 
Numbers19:16 Ak muruonitu betusiek tisab age tugul ne twaei eng’ kewanin, chi ne kogibar eng’ rotwetab chok, anan musto anan kowetab chito, anan ko kererit." 
Numbers19:17 Ak ingoib ichek orekab kagochinet ne kagebeel ne bo tengekto, agobo inendet ne muruon, ak kotesyi orechato mi teret beek che rootei;" 
Numbers19:18 ak konam chito ne kigianyiny husop, ak korooch beechoto, ak koise emait, ak tuguk tugul, ak bik che komi oloto, ak inendet ne kotwa kowet, anan ne kogibar, anan musto, anan ko kererit:" 
Numbers19:19 ak kois chito ne kigianyiny, inendet ne muruon, eng’ betutab somok, ak eng’ betutab tisab; ak koanyiny inendet eng’ betutab tisab; ak ingomwet ngoroikyik, ak koungei, ak koanyinyit ko kaimen." 
Numbers19:20 Ak chito ne muruon, ne ma ianyinygei, keistoi chichoto eng’ kwenutab tuiyet, amu kagong’wanit ole tilil ne bo Jehovah: ma kiise inendet beek che bo katabanet; muruon inendet." 
Numbers19:21 Egu ng’atutiet ne bo agoi eng’ ichek: ak mwetei ngoroikyik inendet ne isisie beekab katabanet; ak muruonitu agoi koimen inendet ne twaei beechoto bo katabanet. 
Numbers19:22 Ak ng’wanitu kiy age tugul ne twaei chichoto muruon; ak muruonitu agoi koimen inendet ne twaei kioto. 
Numbers20:1 Ak kiit tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel ong’atet ne bo Sin, eng’ arawet ne bo tai: ak kitebe Kades; ak kimechi Miriam oloto, ak kigitub eng’ oloto." 
Numbers20:2 Ak kimanyor tuiyet beek: ak kiiyumgei bik kobolji Musa ak Aaron. 
Numbers20:3 Ak kibolyo bik ak Musa, komwaei kolen, Nda kiga kibegu ye kibegu tupchosiekyok eng’ taitab Jehovah!" 
Numbers20:4 Amu nee si omutu tuiyetab Jehovah kobwa ong’atani, si kobiit kebegu eng’ oli, ak tukyok?" 
Numbers20:5 Amu nee si omoong’wech ketogosu eng’ Misri, omutwech kebwa oli ya? Koret ne mabitye bek, anan logoekab mogoonik, anan sabibuk, anan logoek che eechen; ama mi beek che keei." 
Numbers20:6 Ak kiba Musa ak Aron eng’ ole mi tuiyet, agoi kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, ak kiing’urukso kot kotiiny togochikwak ng’ony: ak komong’ji lilindab Jehovah ichek." 
Numbers20:7 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers20:8 Nam siarit, ak iyum tuiyet, inye ak Aron, ng’etab komet, yeityo ong’alalji ruandet kogeerei ichek, si kogon beekyik; ak imoong’u beek eng’ ruandet, igochi ichek: si inage beek tuiyet koee ak tukwak." 
Numbers20:9 Ak kiinem Musa siarit eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u ye king’at inendet." 
Numbers20:10 Ak kiiyum Musa ak Aron tuiyet kotuiyo eng’ taitab ruandet, ak kolenji, Ogas anyun nguno okwek ngelelichu; tos kimoong’wok beek eng’ ruandani?" 
Numbers20:11 Ak kinamji Musa eunnyi barak, ak kokwer ruandet eng’ siarinnyi konyil aeng’: ak kiisururgei beek che chang’, ak kiee tuiyet beek ak tukwak." 
Numbers20:12 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa ak Aron, Moiti tuiyoni emet ne kiagochi, amu ma oyana ogonyita eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
Numbers20:13 Bo beechu Meriba; amu kiborio lagokab Israel ak Jehovah, ak kiibarta tililindanyi eng’ tainywa." 
Numbers20:14 Ak kiiyokto Musa bik eng’ Kades koba oldab laitoriatab Edom, kolenji, Kale tupcheng’ung’ Israel, ingen nyalilwogik tugul che kigonyoruech:" 
Numbers20:15 ko u ye kichortagei kwanisiekyok koba Misri, ak kigimeny Misri kenyisiek che chang’; ak kiyaiywech Misrik ne ya, ak kwanisiekyok:" 
Numbers20:16 ak kingerirji Jehovah kogas rirekyok, ak kiiyok malaikaiyat, konyo komutwech kemong’une Misri: ak keero, kimi Kades, nganaset ne mi kiwoteng’ung’ taban." 
Numbers20:17 Kaigai igonech kebun emeng’ung’: magibune mbar anan mbarenikab sabibuk, ak magiee beek che bo keringonik: kibune oret ne o kityo ne bo laitoriat, magimastoi kebendi tai anan katam, agoi kesiir kiwoteng’ung’;" 
Numbers20:18 ak kilenji Edom inendet, Mebune emennyu, si mabokyin ak rotwetab chok." 
Numbers20:19 Ak kilenji lagokab Israel, Kibune oret ne o: ak ngee beeguk, ane ak tukyuk, agonu anyun alyet ne yamegei: kona kityo abun eng’ kelyekyuk, mayae kiy." 
Numbers20:20 Ak kile, Mebune. Ak kimong’ Edom koboto bik che chang’, konyo kobargei ak inendet eng’ kimnatet." 
Numbers20:21 Kiete anyun Edom Israel kobun kiwotennyi: kiweeigei anyun Israel kobagakta inendet. 
Numbers20:22 Ak kiba eng’ Kades: ak kiit tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel tulwetab Hor. 
Numbers20:23 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa ak Aron eng’ tulwetab Hor, eng’ kiwotetab emetab Edom, kolenji," 
Numbers20:24 Tun kiyumi Aron koboto bikyik: amu maitei emet ne kiagochi lagokab Israel, amu kiobistoe ng’olyondennyu eng’ beekab Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Imutu Aron ak werinnyi Eleasar, kobwa tulwetab Hor:" 
Numbers20:26 ak ireegune Aron ngoroikyik, ak ilaakyi Eleasar werinnyi: ak kiyum Aron koboto bikyik, si komechi oloto." 
Numbers20:27 Ak kiyai Musa ko u ye kang’at Jehovah: ak kitogosta koba tulwetab Hor kogeeroti tuiyet komugul. 
Numbers20:28 Ak kiireegune Musa Aron ngoroikyik, ak kolaakyi werinnyi Eleasar; ak kimechji Aron oloto eng’ tulwet barak: ak kichorgei Musa ak Eleasar eng’ tulwet." 
Numbers20:29 Ak ye kingogeer tuiyet komugul kole kagome Aron, korirji Aron betusiek sosom, kirirji got tugul ne bo Israel." 
Numbers21:1 Ak kigas laitoriatab Arad Kananindet ne kimenyei Murot ne bo Tai, kole, bwanei Israelik kobunu oretab Atarim; ak kibargei ak Israel, ak kiluul alak eng’ Israelik." 
Numbers21:2 Ak kiiyosiechi Israelik Jehovah, kolenji, Ngot igona bichu, ang’eme awong’u nganasokwak." 
Numbers21:3 Ak kigas Jehovah ng’alekab Israelik, ak kiigochi Kananik; ak king’em kowong’ ichek koboto nganasokwak: ak kigiguure yoto Horma." 
Numbers21:4 Ak kiba eng’ tulwetab Hor kobun oretab Nyanjet ne Birir, koyiem emetab Edom: ak kichootyo mugulelwekab bik amu oret." 
Numbers21:5 Ak kiing’unyng’ung’ji bik Kamuktaindet koboto Musa, kole, Kilya si omutwech kemong’une Misri kebwa kebekyi ong’atet? Amu mami amitwogik, anan beek; ak wechei sobonwekyok amitwogichu terteren." 
Numbers21:6 Ak kiiyokyi Jehovah bichoto erenok che ng’wonen susenywa ko u mat, ak kisus bik; ak kibek bik che chang’ che bo Israel." 
Numbers21:7 Ak kiba bik oldab Musa, kolenji, Kogeyai tengekto, amu koging’unyng’ung’ji Jehovah koboten; sa Jehovah, si koistoenech erenochu. Ak kisachi Musa bik." 
Numbers21:8 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Itany erenet ne u mat ak inde ketit ne itononi: ak ye keer chi age tugul ne kagesus, kosob." 
Numbers21:9 Ak kiitany Musa erenet ne bo sugunwet, ak kiinde ketit ak kotonon: ak ngo sus erenet chi age tugul, ak konyal erenanato bo sugunwet, kosob." 
Numbers21:10 Ak kiba lagokab Israel, komuung’e Obot." 
Numbers21:11 Ak kiba eng’ Obot, komuung’e Iye-abarim ne mi ong’atet ne tokyingei Moab, komostab kong’asis." 
Numbers21:12 Ak kiba eng’ oloto, komuung’e atebwetab Sered." 
Numbers21:13 Ak kiba eng’ oloto, komuung’e Arnon bitonin, ne mi ong’atet, ne bunu kiwotetab Amorik: amu Arnon kiwotetab Moabik, kwenutab Moabik ak Amorik." 
Numbers21:14 Sirat eng’ bukuitab Lugosiekab Jehovah amu noto, Ne kiyai eng’ Nyanjet ne Birir, Ak atebwosiekab Arnon," 
Numbers21:15 Ak eng’ atebwosiek Che choringei ole menyei Ar, Ne mi ole negite kiwotetab Moab." 
Numbers21:16 Ak kiba eng’ oloto agoi Beer: noto keringetab beek ne kimwachi Jehovah Musa, kolenji, Iyum bik, si anaga beek." 
Numbers21:17 Kitien anyun Israelik tieni: Ee kutu keringoni bo beek; otienji: 
Numbers21:18 Keringet, ne kibalei che toogunotin che bo bik, Koboto ne igoitoi ng’atutik, ak kirokwekwak. Ak kiba eng’ ong’atet agoi Matana:" 
Numbers21:19 ak kiba eng’ Matana agoi Nahaliel: ak kiba eng’ Nahaliel agoi Bamot: 
Numbers21:20 ak kiba eng’ Bamot agoi atebwet ne mi mbaretab Moab, agoi tulwet barak ne bo Pisga, ne ing’ururi ong’atet." 
Numbers21:21 Ak kiiyokto Israelik bik koba oldab Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, kolenji," 
Numbers21:22 Chamwa abun emeng’ung’: magimastoi kebendi mbarenik, anan mbarenikab sabibuk; ama kiee beekab keringonik: kibune oret ne o ne bo laitoriat, agoi kesiir kiwoteng’ung’." 
Numbers21:23 Ago ma chamji Sihon Israelik kobun kiwotennyi: ago kiiyum Sihon bikyik tugul, ak koba kobargei ak Israelik eng’ ong’atet, ak kiit Jahas: ak kibargei ak Israel." 
Numbers21:24 Ak kibar Israel inendet eng’ rotwetab chok, ak kinam emennyi koboch Arnon agoi Jabok, agoi kiwotetab bikab Amon: ak king’otat kiwotetab bikab Amon." 
Numbers21:25 Ak kiluul Israelik nganasochoto tugul: ak kimeny Israelik nganasok tugul che bo Amorik, eng’ Hesbon ak eng’ nganasokyik tugul." 
Numbers21:26 Amu Hesbon ko ki nganasetab Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, ne kiga kobargei ak laitoriatab Moab ne ki bo tai, ak kirebe emennyi komugul ne kimi eunnyi, agoi Arnon." 
Numbers21:27 Mwaei eng’ noto anyun ichek eng’ kalewenaik kole, Obwa Hesbon, Ingeteech nganasetab Sihon ak kigimit:" 
Numbers21:28 Amu kamandae mat Hesbon, Kamandae liblibenetab mat nganasetab Sihon: Kagobeel Ar ne bo Moab, Ak kiptainik che bo ole sutotin che bo Arnon." 
Numbers21:29 Bwo, inye Moab Kaolusye, okwek bikab Kemos: Kagogoito werikyik che kichililso kogochi Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, Koboto tibikyik, koek luulenik." 
Numbers21:30 Kagemwok; kagolus Hesbon agoi Dibon, Ak kageng’em agoi Nopa, Ne itei Medeba." 
Numbers21:31 Kimeny anyun Israelik emetab Amorik. 
Numbers21:32 Ak kiiyokto Musa bik kosegei Jaser, ak kiluul nganasokyik, ak kion Amorik che kimi oloto." 
Numbers21:33 Ak kiweek kotogosta kobun oretab Basan: ak kimanda anyun Og laitoriatab Basan kwo kobargei ak ichek, inendet ak bikyik tugul, kibargei eng’ Edrei." 
Numbers21:34 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Ameiywei inendet: amu kande inendet eung’ung’ koboto bikyik tugul, ak emennyi; ak iyachini inendet ko u ye kiiyachi Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, ne kimenyei Hesbon." 
Numbers21:35 Kibar anyun inendet, koboto werikyik, ak bikyik tugul, kot ko ma ng’etyi inendet agot agenge: ak kibunji ichek emennyi." 
Numbers22:1 Ak kiba lagokab Israel, koba komuung’e warengetab Moab, Jordan bitonin ole negite Jeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Ak kigeer Balak weritab Sipor tuguk tugul che kiyachi Israelik Amorik. 
Numbers22:3 Ak kiiywei Moabik bichoto mising’, amu ki chang’: ak kitoptobenso Moabik amu lagokab Israel." 
Numbers22:4 Ak kilenji Moabik boisiekab Midian, Amei tuiyoni tuguk tugul che negitenech, ko u ye amei tuga suswekab timin. Ak ki laitoriatab Moab betusiechoto Balak weritab Sipor." 
Numbers22:5 Ak kiiyokto inendet bik koba oldab Balaam weritab Beor, agoi Petor, ne negite Ainet, noto emetab bikab bororiennyi; kiba koguur, kolenji, Keero, mi yu bik che kibunu Misri: ak yomu emet, ak menyei ole negitena." 
Numbers22:6 Asain anyun nguno ale, nyo chubwa bichoto; amu kimen kosiira: tamangab aterter, si kobiit kebar, ak aon koba eng’ emoni: amu angen ale ne iberuri kiberuri, ak kichubei ne ichube." 
Numbers22:7 Ak kiba boisiekab Moab ak che bo Midian koibei kagochinoikab ng’orset eng’ eunekwak; ak kiit oldab Balaam, ak kimwachi ng’alekab Balak." 
Numbers22:8 Ak kilenji Balaam bichoto, Oruiye yu kemouni, si aibwok ng’alek kogeny, ko u ye machei komwawa Jehovah: ak kitebi bounikab Moab koboto Balaam." 
Numbers22:9 Ak kinyonji Kamuktaindet Balaam, nyo kolenji, Ng’o bichu omi tugul?" 
Numbers22:10 Ak kilenji Balaam Kamuktaindet, Kagoyok bik Balak weritab Sipor, laitoriatab Moab, kobwa oldanyu, kolenja," 
Numbers22:11 Keero, kayom emet bik che kibunu Misri: ara anyun, nyo chubwa; tamangab amuch kebarge ak ichek, ak aon komanda eng’ emet." 
Numbers22:12 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet Balaam, Amat obe ak icheget; amat ichub bichoto: amu iberurotin ichek." 
Numbers22:13 Ak king’eet Balaam karon, ak kolenji bounikab Balak, Oba emong’wong’: amu kaetena Jehovah kebe ak okwek." 
Numbers22:14 Ak king’eetyo bounikab Moab koba ole mi Balak, ak kolenji, Kaesio Balaam kebwa tugul." 
Numbers22:15 Ak kiiyokto Balak kogeny bounik alak che siirei, ago che konyitotin kosiir che bo tai." 
Numbers22:16 Ak kiit gab Balam, kobwa kolenji, Kale Balak weritab Sipor, Kaigai ameng’ kogerin kiy si menyo ole ami:" 
Numbers22:17 amu aeetin inyoru teegisto ne o, ak ayai kiy age tugul ne imwawa: asain anyun ale, nyo chubwa bichu." 
Numbers22:18 Ak kiwolji Balaam otwogikab Balak kolenji, Agot ngo kona Balak feda ak tahabu che nyiiei gonnyi, ko mamuchi asiir ye boch ng’olyotab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, si machuchuch anan ates che kamwa inendet." 
Numbers22:19 Asomok anyun ale, otebe yu kemouni agine, si kobiit anai ne mwawa Jehovah ne siirei choto." 
Numbers22:20 Ak kinyonji Kamuktaindet Balaam kemoi, konyo kolenji, Ngo kabwa bichu koguurin, ing’eet, obe tugul; ago iyae kityo ng’olyot ne amwaun." 
Numbers22:21 Ak king’eet Balaam karon, koiito kit ne tebe eng’ sigiriennyi, ak kiba ak bounikab Moab." 
Numbers22:22 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah amu kiwa: ak kitonon malaikaiyatab Jehovah eng’ oret koek ne kirindoi inendet. Ak kibunei sigiriennyi, ak kimi koboto inendet otwogikyik aeng’u." 
Numbers22:23 Ak kigeer sigiriet malakaiyatab Jehovah kotononi eng’ oret, ak kiting’e eunnyi rotwetab chok ne kaging’us: ak kiwa taban sigiriet kometo oret, kwo timin: ak kibir Balaam sigiriet, kole koweekyi oret." 
Numbers22:24 Ak kitonon malaikaiyatab Jehovah eng’ oret ne mariich eng’ mbarenikab sabibuk, ole ng’otat komosi ak komosi." 
Numbers22:25 Ak kigeer sigiriet malakaiyatab Jehovah, ak kirus inatut, ak kiruse keldab Balaam inatut: ak kibir sigiriet kogeny." 
Numbers22:26 Ak kiinakta malakaiyatab Jehovah kwo tai, ak kitonone ye mariich, ye kima kimuchi keweekyige komostab tai anan komostab katam." 
Numbers22:27 Ak kigeer sigiriet malakaiyatab Jehovah, ak kiru komi Balam barak: kilalyo neregekab Balaam anyun, ak kibir sigiriet eng’ kiroktanyi." 
Numbers22:28 Ak kiyat Jehovah kutitab sigiriet kotwek, ak kilenji Balaam, Kayaun nee, si ibira konyil chu somok?" 
Numbers22:29 Ak kilenji Balaam sigiriet, Amu kechota; nda katinye rotwet, ta kaabarin." 
Numbers22:30 Ak kiwolji sigiriet Balaam kolenji, Tos ma a sigirieng’ung’, ne kiilanye koboch keny agoi kora? Tos kicham ayaun ko u ni atkinye tugul? Ak kilenji, Achicha." 
Numbers22:31 Kiyat anyun Jehovah konyekab Balaam, ak kigeer malaikaiyatab Jehovah kotononi eng’ oret, koting’e eunnyi rotwetab chok ne kaging’us: ak kiing’uruk, kobutyi ng’ony." 
Numbers22:32 Ak kilenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah, Amu nee si ibir sigirieng’ung’ konyil chu somok? Keero, kanyo aegu kirindoindeng’ung’, amu imaasat oreng’ung’ eng’ tainnyu:" 
Numbers22:33 ak kageera sigiriet, ak kwo taban eng’ tainnyu konyil chuto somok: nda kama wa taban koistoenagei, ta kaabarin iman, ak aunde sigiriet kosob." 
Numbers22:34 Ak kilenji Balaam malaikaiyatab Jehovah, Kaayai tengekto; amu kama angen ale itononi eng’ oret si kobiit igirinda: ara anyun, ngo mechame, ko mie aweek." 
Numbers22:35 Ak kilenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah Balaam, Oba ak bichoto: ago imwae ng’olyot ne amwaun kityo. Kiba anyun Balaam koboto bounikab Balak." 
Numbers22:36 Ak kingogas Balak kole kagonyo Balaam, kwo kotorokta inendet agoi nganasetab Moab, ne mi kiwotetab Arnon, ne mitei tabandab kiwotonoto." 
Numbers22:37 Ak kilenji Balak Balaam, Tos kiga ma agimgimin, aguurin? Amu nee si menyo ole ami? Tos mamuchi aeetin iman inyoru teegisto?" 
Numbers22:38 Ak kilenji Balaam Balak, Keero, kanyonjin: tos atinye kimnatet agot kitigin amwa kiy age tugul? Amwae ng’olyot ne indoi Kamuktaindet kutinnyu." 
Numbers22:39 Ak kiba Balaam ak Balak, ak kiit Kiriat-husot." 
Numbers22:40 Ak kieny Balak tuga ak kechirek, ak kiiyokyi Balaam, ak bounik che kimi koboto inendet." 
Numbers22:41 Ak kingo kagoeech, komut Balak Balaam kotogosta kwo ole mi oldinwek che tororen che bo Baal, ak kigeer eng’ oloto ole bochin bik." 
Numbers23:1 Ak Kilenji Balaam Balak, Teekwa eng’ yu kaptisisiosiek tisab, ak ichobwa eng’ yu kirugik tisab ak mengichik tisab." 
Numbers23:2 Ak kiyai Balak ko u ye kiga mwa Balaam; ak kiigoito Balak ak Balaam kirgit ak mengit eng’ kaptisisiet age tugul. 
Numbers23:3 Yeityo kolenji Balaam Balak, Tonone ye mi kagochineng’ung’ ne kebeelei si awa; tamangab kotorokwa Jehovah: ak amwaun kiy age tugul ne keborua. Ak kiwa tulwet barak ye lapkei." 
Numbers23:4 Ak kituiyo Kamuktaindet ak Balaam: ak kolenji, Kaachob kaptisisiosiek tisab, ak kaagoite kirgit ak mengit eng’ kaptisisiet age tugul." 
Numbers23:5 Ak kiinde Jehovah ng’olyot kutitab Balaam, ak kole, Weekyige Balak, ak ing’alal ko u ni." 
Numbers23:6 Ak kiweekyigei ole mi Balak, ak keero, kitononi eng’ ole mi kagochinennyi ne kebeelei, inendet, ak bounik tugul che bo Moab." 
Numbers23:7 Ak kitoi Balaam kalewenennyi kole, Kiimutwa Balak eng’ Aram, Laitoriatab Moab ne bunu tulonokab kong’asis: Kole, Nyo chubwa Jakobo, Ak nyo nerekyi Israel." 
Numbers23:8 Achuptoi ano ne ma chub Kamuktaindet? Ak anerekyindoi ano ne ma nerekyi Jehovah? 
Numbers23:9 Amu ageere Israel ami ruandosiek barak, Ak ageere inendet ami tulonok: Ogeero, icheget ko bik che meng’isiei ichegei; Ak magiititoi bororiosiek alak." 
Numbers23:10 Ng’o ne imuchi koiit temburiekab Jakobo, Anan ng’o ne imuchi koiit kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo Israel? Ingame meetab che bo iman, Ak ingogergeit kagesunennyu ak nenyinet!" 
Numbers23:11 Ak kilenji Balak Balaam, Keyaiywa nee? Kiamutun inyo ichubwa bunikyuk, ak keero, kaiberur ichek mising’." 
Numbers23:12 Ak kiwolji kolenji, Tos manyolja arib amwa ne indoi Jehovah kutinnyu?" 
Numbers23:13 Ak kilenji Balak inendet, Asain ale, nyo kebe oldo age, ole imuchi igeer bichoto; si igeer ole boch kityo, ole memuchi igeer ichek tugul: ak ichubwa bichoto eng’ oloto." 
Numbers23:14 Ak kiimut inendet anyun agoi koit koretab Sopim, agoi tulwet barak ne kiguure Pisga, ak koteech kaptisisiosiek tisab, ak kiigoito kirgit ak mengit eng’ kaptisisiet age tugul." 
Numbers23:15 Ak kilenji Balaam Balak, Tonone yu mi kagochineng’ung’ ne kebeelei, ye kituitosi ak Jehovah eng’ olin." 
Numbers23:16 Ak kitorok Jehovah Balaam, ak konde ng’olyot kutinnyi, ak kolenji, Weekyige ole mi Balak, ak ing’alal ko u ni." 
Numbers23:17 Ak kiwa anyun ole mi inendet, ak ogeero, kitononi eng’ ole negite kagochinennyi ne kibeelei, koboto bounikab Moab. Ak kiteebe Balak kolenji, Kale nee Jehovah?" 
Numbers23:18 Ak kimwa kalewenennyi kole, Ng’eet, Balak, ak igas; Epcha it, inye weritab Sipor:" 
Numbers23:19 Ma chito Kamuktaindet, kot komwa lembech; Anan weritab chi, kot kosik: Tos kagomwa, ak mayaei? Anan kagomwa, ama yaei kosulda?" 
Numbers23:20 Keero, kaataach ng’atutiet aberur: Ak kagoberur, ak mamuchi aweech." 
Numbers23:21 Tomo kogeerji Jakobo tengekto, Ama keerji Israel kiy ne imaasat. Mi koboto inendet Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, Ak mi cheetab laitoriat kwenunywa." 
Numbers23:22 Kiimutu Kamuktaindet ichek eng’ Misri; Tinyei kimnatet ne u ne bo soet. 
Numbers23:23 Mami iman bondit ne kimuchi kebane Jakobo, Ama mi ng’orset ne kimuchi keng’ore Israel: Kimwaei nguno agobo Jakobo ak Israel, kole, Kiyai ne tia Kamuktaindet!" 
Numbers23:24 Ogeero, kang’eetyo bik ko u ng’etundo ne kotoy, Ak tononi inendet ko u ng’etundo: Maruei agoi koam che bo logennyi, Ak koee korotikab ne kabar." 
Numbers23:25 Ak kilenji Balak Balam, Amat ichub, anan iberur agot kitigin." 
Numbers23:26 Ago iwolji Balaam Balak, kolenji, Tos mamwaun alenji, Kanyol ayai tugul che mwawa Jehovah?" 
Numbers23:27 Ak kilenji Balak Balaam, Nyo anyun amutin komosta age; tamangab kocham Kamuktaindet ichubwa bichoto eng’ oloto." 
Numbers23:28 Ak kiimut anyun Balak Balaam agoi Peor barak, ne ing’ururi ong’atet." 
Numbers23:29 Ak kilenji Balaam Balak, Teekwa eng’ oli kaptisisiosiek tisab, ak ichobwa eng’ yuto kirugik tisab ak mengichik tisab." 
Numbers23:30 Ak kiyai anyun Balak ko u ye kaga mwa Balaam, ak kiigoito kirgit ak mengit eng’ kaptisisiet age tugul." 
Numbers24:1 Ak ye kingogeer Balaam kole chamei Jehovah koberur Israelik, ko mawo kou atgai tai, kwo kocheng’ banitwogik, ago kitokyigei ong’atet." 
Numbers24:2 Ak kitobendo Balaam, ak kigeer Israelik komeng’isiei ko katetgei ko u ortinwekwak; ak kinyonji Tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet inendet." 
Numbers24:3 Ak kigetyigei kalewenennyi, ak kole, Kale Balaam weritab Beor, Kale chito ne ki tugotin konyekyik:" 
Numbers24:4 Kale inendet ne kasei ng’alekab Kamuktaindet, Ne keerei ng’ang’utietab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, Ak kobutyi ng’ony, ko kayatogis konyekyik:" 
Numbers24:5 Ee Jakobo, kororon ne tia emaisieguk, Ee Israel, kororon ne tia goriguk!" 
Numbers24:6 Kauitogei ko u atebwosiek, Ko u mbarenik che mi ngegusiekab ainet, Ko u ketik che kiguure ahalim che kimin Jehovah, Ko u taragonik che negite beek." 
Numbers24:7 Rootune beek terenikyik, Ak tebune iyotennyi beek che chang’, Ak eetu laitoriandennyi kosiir Agag, Ak kieeti bounatennyi." 
Numbers24:8 Kiimutu Kamuktaindet komong’ eng’ Misri; Tinyei kimnatet ne u ne bo soet: Lugui bororiosiek che bunikyik, Ak tonatoni kowekwak komengegitu, Ak mwogei ichek kosore eng’ kipchabonikyik." 
Numbers24:9 Kiribis, koru ko u ng’etundo, Ak ko u ng’etundo ne kotoy; ng’o ne ing’eeti Iberurot age tugul ne iberurin, Ak chubot age tugul ne chubin." 
Numbers24:10 Ak kilalyo neregekab Balak agobo Balaam, ak kirabach eunekyik: ak kilenji Balak Balaam, Kiaguurin inyo ichub bunikyuk, keero, kaiberur ichek iman mising’ konyil chu somok." 
Numbers24:11 Ara mwei ui oldang’ung’ nguno: kialen si aeetin inyoru teegisto ne o; ago keero, kietenen Jehovah teegisoto." 
Numbers24:12 Ak kilenji Balaam Balak, Tos kima amwachi biguk che kiiyogu, alenji," 
Numbers24:13 Agot ngo kona Balak feda ak tahabu che nyiiei gonnyi, ko mamuchi asiir ye boch ng’olyotab Jehovah, ayai ne mie anan ayai ne ya eng’ magennyu; ne mwaei Jehovah ko noto ne amwae?" 
Numbers24:14 Keero, kawe nguno ole mi bikyuk: nyo anyun amwaun kit ne itoi bichu biguk eng’ betusiek che bo let." 
Numbers24:15 Ak kigetyigei kalewenennyi ak kole, Kale Balaam weritab Beor, Kale chito ne ki tugotin konyekyik:" 
Numbers24:16 Mwaei inendet ne kasei ng’alekab Kamuktaindet, Ne ingen ng’omnatetab Inendet ne Toror Mising’, Ne keerei ng’ang’utietab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, Ak kobutyi ng’ony, ko kayatogis konyekyik:" 
Numbers24:17 Ageere, ago ma nguno: Ageere, ago ma negit: Tun mong’une taboiyat Jakobo, Ak ng’eetei siaritab bounatet eng’ Israel, Ak kokwer luukwekab Moab koges, Ak kotui werik tugul che bo icheget che wasegei." 
Numbers24:18 Kiluulei Edom, Ak kiluulei Seir agine che ki bunikyik; Ye yaei Israelik eng’ kimnatet." 
Numbers24:19 Laitorani ne mong’une Jakobo, Ak kong’em che king’et eng’ nganaset." 
Numbers24:20 Yeityo kogeer Amalek, ak komwa kalewenennyi, kole, Bo tai Amalek eng’ bororiosiek; Ago kitindinyi kobetyo eng’ kagesunennyi." 
Numbers24:21 Yeityo kogeer Kenindet ak komwa kalewenennyi, kole, Kim ole imenye, Ak mi kesweng’ung’ ruandet." 
Numbers24:22 Ago kibeeti Kenik, Agoi komutin Asur iegu luulen." 
Numbers24:23 Ak kimwa kalewenennyi kole, Bwo, ng’o ne imuchi kosob ye yai Jehovah noto?" 
Numbers24:24 Ago bunu melisiek ngegutab Kitim, Ak konyalil Asur, ak konyalil Eber, Ak nyoru agine ng’emisiet." 
Numbers24:25 Ak king’eet Balaam, kwo oldanyi: ak kiwa Balak agine orennyi." 
Numbers25:1 Ak kimeny Israel Sitim, ak kitoi koipgei ak tibikab Moabik;" 
Numbers25:2 amu kiguur bik koba ole kigochine kanamonikwak tiseiywek; ak kiamis bik, ak kogutung’ji kanamonik." 
Numbers25:3 Ak kinamgei Israel ak Baal-peor: ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel. 
Numbers25:4 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Nam bounik tugul che bo bik, ak isongininji Jehovah eng’ taitab asista, si koistoegei Israel neregek che koromen che bo Jehovah." 
Numbers25:5 Ak kilenji Musa kiruogikab Israel, Obar chi age tugul eng’ okwek che kogonamgei ak Baal-peor." 
Numbers25:6 Ak ogeero, kinyo Israelindet age komutyin tupchosiekyik kobogoriotab Midianik, eng’ taitab Musa, ak eng’ taitab tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, ye kita korirtos eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
Numbers25:7 Ak kingogeer Pineas weritab Eleasar, weritab Aron tisiindet, kong’eet eng’ kwenutab tuiyet, ak konam ng’otit eng’ eunnyi;" 
Numbers25:8 ak kiisub Israelindonoto agoi emait, ak kotoor ichek tuwai kosore, chichoto bo Israel, ak kobogoriondonoto agine, kosore moennyi. Kisis anyun koroito eng’ lagokab Israel." 
Numbers25:9 Kiek che kibek eng’ koroyoto bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan. 
Numbers25:10 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers25:11 Kiisto Pineas weritab Eleasar weritab Aron tisiindet, neregekyuk eng’ lagokab Israel, amu kitinyei ng’etkonda eng’ ichek amu ane; mata anyun awong’u lagokab Israel eng’ ng’etkondanyu." 
Numbers25:12 Mwa anyun ile, Keero, kaagochi inendet kayomisennyu ne bo kalyet;" 
Numbers25:13 egu kayomiset ne bo tiseinatet ne bo koigeny eng’ inendet ak eng’ iyotennyi ne biitu let; amu kitinyei ng’etkonda agobo Kamuktaindet, ak koyachi kagaigaet lagokab Israel." 
Numbers25:14 Kigiguure chichoto bo Israel ne kigibar, noto kigibarei koboto kobogoriotab Midianik, Simri weritab Salu, bounindetab gotab kwanisiek eng’ oretab Simeon." 
Numbers25:15 Ak kametab kobogoriotab Midianik, noto kigibar, ko ki Kosbi, che bo Sur; ki kandoindetab gotab kwanisiek eng’ Midian." 
Numbers25:16 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers25:17 Iim Midianik, ak ibar:" 
Numbers25:18 amu iimok eng’ kaberberisienywa, ne king’alenak eng’ ng’olyotab Peor, ak eng’ ng’olyotab Kosbi, cheptab bounindetab Midian, chepkamenywa, ne kigibar eng’ betutab koroito amu ng’olyotab Peor." 
Numbers26:1 Ak kingobata koroyoto komwachi Jehovah Musa ak Eleasar weritab Aron tisiindet, kolenji," 
Numbers26:2 Iit tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, tugul che imuchi koba luget eng’ Israel." 
Numbers26:3 Ak kimwachi Musa ak Eleasar ichek eng’ warengetab Moab ole negite Jordan ole bo Jeriko, kolenji," 
Numbers26:4 Oiit bik koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa ak lagokab Israel che kimong’une emetab Misri. 
Numbers26:5 Reuben, werit ne bo tai ne bo Israel: werikab Reuben chu; Hanok, che gotab Hanogik: che bo Palu, che gotab Paluik:" 
Numbers26:6 Hesron, che gotab Hesronik: che bo Karmi, che gotab Karmik." 
Numbers26:7 Chuto ortinwekab bikab Reuben: ak kiek elfusiek artam ak somok ak bogol tisab ak sosom che kigiit eng’ ichek. 
Numbers26:8 Ak ki Eliab weritab Palu. 
Numbers26:9 Ak werikab Eliab chu; Nemuel, Datan, ak Abiram. Choto Datan ak Abiram che kigiguur che bo tuiyet, che kibortos koboto Musa ak Aron eng’ tuiyetab Kora, ye kingoborio ak Jehovah:" 
Numbers26:10 ak kiyat ng’ony kutinnyi, ak kolugui ichek koboto Kora, ye kibegu tuiyonoto; betunoto kibeelei mat bik bogol aeng’ ak konom, ak kiek ichek kaborunet." 
Numbers26:11 Ago kima bek werikab Kora. 
Numbers26:12 Werikab Simeon chu ko u ortinwekwak: Nemuel, che gotab Nemuelik: che bo Jamin, che gotab Jaminik: che bo Jakin, che gotab Jakinik:" 
Numbers26:13 che bo Sera, che gotab Seraik: ak Saul, che gotab Saulik." 
Numbers26:14 Chuto ortinwekab bikab Simeon, kiek elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’ ak bogol aeng’." 
Numbers26:15 Werikab Gad chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Sepon, che gotab Seponik: che bo Hagik, che gotab Hagitik: che bo Suni, che gotab Sunitik:" 
Numbers26:16 che bo Osni, che gotab Osnik: che bo Eri, che gotab Eritik:" 
Numbers26:17 che bo Arod, che gotab Arodik: che bo Areli, che gotab Arelitik." 
Numbers26:18 Chuto ortinwekab werikab Gad; kiek choto che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek artam ak bogol mut. 
Numbers26:19 Werikab Juda chu, Er ak Onan: ak kibekyi emetab Kanan Er ak Onan." 
Numbers26:20 Ak werikab Juda ko u ortinwekwak ko ki: che bo Sela, che gotab Selanik: che bo Peres, che gotab Peresik: che bo Sera, che gotab Seraik." 
Numbers26:21 Ak werikab Peres ko ki: Hesron, che gotab Hesronik: che bo Hamul, che gotab Hamulik." 
Numbers26:22 Chuto ortinwekab Juda; kiek choto che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek tamanwogik tisab ak lo ak bogol mut. 
Numbers26:23 Werikab Isakar chu ko u ortinwekwak: Tola, che gotab Tolaitik: che bo Pua, che gotab Punitik:" 
Numbers26:24 che bo Jasub, che gotab Jasubik: che bo Simron, che gotab Simronik." 
Numbers26:25 Chuto ortinwekab Isakar, kiek choto che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak ang’wan ak bogol somok." 
Numbers26:26 Werikab Sebulun chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Sered, che gotab Seredik: che bo Elon, che gotab Elonik: che bo Jaleel, che gotab Jaleelik." 
Numbers26:27 Chuto ortinwekab Sebulunik; kiek choto che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak bogol mut. 
Numbers26:28 Werikab Josep chu ko u ortinwekwak: Manase ak Epraim. 
Numbers26:29 Werikab Manase chu: che bo Makir, che gotab Makirik: ak kisich Makir Gilead: che bo Gilead, che gotab Gileadik." 
Numbers26:30 Werikab Gilead chu: Ieser, che gotab Iesrik: che bo Helek, che gotab Helegik:" 
Numbers26:31 ak Asriel, che gotab Asrielik: che bo Sekem, che gotab Sekemik;" 
Numbers26:32 ak Semida, che gotab Semidaik: ak Heper, che gotab Heperik." 
Numbers26:33 Ak kima kotinyei werik Selopehad weritab Heper, kobate tibik ichegei; ak kainaikab tibikab Selopehad ko ki Mala, Noa, Hogla, Milka, ak Tirsa." 
Numbers26:34 Chuto ortinwekab Manase; kiek che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek konom ak aeng’ ak bogol tisab. 
Numbers26:35 Werikab Epraim chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Sutela, che gotab Sutelaik; che bo Beker, che gotab Bekerik: che bo Tahan, che gotab Tahanik." 
Numbers26:36 Ak chu werikab Sutela: che bo Eran, che gotab Eranik." 
Numbers26:37 Chuto ortinwekab werikab Epraim; kiek choto che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek sosom ak aeng’ ak bogol mut. Chuto werikab Josep ko u ortinwekwak. 
Numbers26:38 Werikab Benjamin chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Bela, che gotab Belaik: che bo Asbel, che gotab Asbelik: che bo Ahiram, che gotab Ahiramik:" 
Numbers26:39 che bo Sepupam, che gotab Supamik: che bo Hupam, che gotab Hupamik." 
Numbers26:40 Ak Ard ak Naaman ko ki werikab Bela: che bo Ard, che gotab Ardik: che bo Naaman, che gotab Naamanik." 
Numbers26:41 Choto ko werikab Benjamin ko u ortinwekwak; kiek che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek artam ak mut ak bogol lo. 
Numbers26:42 Werikab Dan chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Suham, che gotab Suhamik: chuto ko ortinwekab Dan ko u tilionutikwak." 
Numbers26:43 Kiek tugul che kigiit eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Suhamik, elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak ang’wan ak bogol ang’wan." 
Numbers26:44 Werikab Aser chu ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Imna, che gotab Imnaik: che bo Isbi, che gotab Isbik: che bo Beria, che gotab Beriaik." 
Numbers26:45 Che bo werikab Beria: che bo Heber, che gotab Heberik: che bo Malkiel, che gotab Malkielik." 
Numbers26:46 Ak kainetab cheptab Aser ko ki Sera. 
Numbers26:47 Choto ortinwekab Aser che kigiit; kiek elfusiek konom ak somok ak bogol ang’wan. 
Numbers26:48 Werikab Naptali ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Jaseel, che gotab Jaseelik: che bo Guni, che gotab Gunik:" 
Numbers26:49 che bo Jeser, che gotab Jeserik: che bo Silem, che gotab Silemik." 
Numbers26:50 Choto ko ortinwekab Naptali ko u tilionutikwak; kiek che kigiit eng’ ichek elfusiek artam ak mut ak bogol ang’wan. 
Numbers26:51 Kiek elfusiek bogol lo ak agenge ak bogol tisab ak sosom choto che kigiit eng’ lagokab Israel. 
Numbers26:52 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers26:53 Kipchechin emet chuto koek borotet ko u koitetab kainaik. 
Numbers26:54 Che kasiirto koitenywa itesyini borotet, ak che matianit koitenywa igochini borotet ne ming’in; kigochin chi tugul borotennyi, ko u koitetab bikyik che kigiit." 
Numbers26:55 Ago kipcheei emet eng’ seretab barbarek: nyabani ko u kainaikab ortinwekab kwanisiekwak. 
Numbers26:56 Kipchechin borotenywa ko u ole teptoi seretab barbarek eng’ che chang’ ak eng’ che ng’ering’. 
Numbers26:57 Ak chu che kigiit eng’ Lawik ko u ortinwekwak: che bo Gerson, che gotab Gersonik: che bo Kohat, che gotab Kohatik: che bo Merari, che gotab Merarik." 
Numbers26:58 Chuto ortinwekab Lawik: gotab Libnitik, gotab Hebronik, gotab Malik, gotab Musik, ak gotab Koraik. Ak kisich Kohat Amram." 
Numbers26:59 Ak kainetab osotiotab Amram ko ki Jokebed, cheptab Lawi, ne kigisikyi Lawi eng’ Misri: ak kisikyi Jokebed Amram Aron ak Musa ak Miriam chepkamenywa." 
Numbers26:60 Ak kigisikyi Aron, Nadab, Abihu, Eleasar, ak Itamar." 
Numbers26:61 Ak kibek Nadab ak Abihu ye kiigoitoi mat ne ter eng’ taitab Jehovah. 
Numbers26:62 Ak kiek elfusiek tiptem ak somok che kigiit eng’ ichek, muren age tugul koboch ne bo arawet agenge ak kwo tai: amu kima kiitito bichoto lagokab Israel, amu kima kigochi ichek borotet eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel." 
Numbers26:63 Choto che kiit Musa ak Eleasar tisiindet; che kiit lagokab Israel eng’ warengetab Moab eng’ ole negite Jordan eng’ Jeriko. 
Numbers26:64 Ago eng’ chuto, ko kima biit chi agot agenge eng’ ichek che kiiti Musa ak Aron tisiindet; icheget che kiit lagokab Israel eng’ ong’atetab Sinai." 
Numbers26:65 Amu kiga mwa Jehovah agobo ichek, kole, Bekyin iman ong’atani. Ak kima ng’et chi agot agenge eng’ ichek, kobate Kaleb weritab Jepune, ak Josua weritab Nun." 
Numbers27:1 Kiba korikta anyun tibikab Selopehad weritab Heper, weritab Gilead, weritab Makir, weritab Manase, ne bo ortinwekab Manase weritab Josep: ak chuto kainaikab tibikab Selopehad; Mala, Noa, Hogla, Milka, ak Tirsa." 
Numbers27:2 Ak kitononso ichek eng’ taitab Musa, ak Eleasar tisiindet, ak eng’ taitab kiruogik ak tuiyet komugul, eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin, ak kole," 
Numbers27:3 Kimechi ong’atet kwandanyo, kima ko boto tuiyet ne kiiyumgei ichegei si kotil let Jehovah, eng’ tuiyetab Kora: ago kime amu tengektanyi inegei; ak kima kotinyei werik." 
Numbers27:4 Amu nee si keisto kainetab kwandanyo eng’ orennyi amu kima kotinyei wero? Ogonech borotet koboto tupchosiekab kwandanyo. 
Numbers27:5 Ak kiib Musa ng’alekwak koba taitab Jehovah. 
Numbers27:6 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers27:7 Kamwa iman tibikab Selopehad; igochini iman tipchoto borotet kobunji eng’ tupchosiekab kwandanywa; ak igochi borotetab kwandanywa kobunji. 
Numbers27:8 Ak imwachi lagokab Israel ilenji, Ngo me chi ama tinyei wero, ogochi cheptanyi borotennyi kobunji." 
Numbers27:9 Ak ngo matinyei chepto agine, ogochi anyun tupchosiekyik tugukyik." 
Numbers27:10 Ak ngo matinyei che tupcho, ogochi anyun tupchosiekab kwandanyi tugukyik." 
Numbers27:11 Ak ngo matinyei kwandanyi che tupcho, ogochi anyun borotennyi chi ne tilia ne negit ne bo orennyi, kobunji; ak egu ng’olyondoni ng’atutiet ne bo kiruoget eng’ lagokab Israel, ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Numbers27:12 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Togosu tulwonito bo Abarim, si itoben emet ne kiagochi lagokab Israel." 
Numbers27:13 Ak ye kaigeer, kiyumin aginye iwe ole mi biguk, ko u ye kigiyum ng’etab komet Aron:" 
Numbers27:14 amu kiongelelji ng’olyondennyu eng’ ong’atetab Sin, eng’ boriet ne kibiit eng’ tuiyet, ama ogonyita eng’ ole bo beek kogeerei ichek. (Choto beekab Meriba che bo Kades eng’ ong’atetab Sin.)" 
Numbers27:15 Ak kimwachi Musa Jehovah kolenji," 
Numbers27:16 Ingolewen Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab tamirmirikab bik tugul, chito ne imuchi koboi tuiyet," 
Numbers27:17 ne imuchi kwo sang’ eng’ tainywa, ak komong’u eng’ tainywa, ak komuti koba sang’, ak komutu kobwa ga; si maigei kechirek che matinyei mestowo tuiyetab Jehovah." 
Numbers27:18 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Imutu Josua, weritab Nun, chito ne tinyei tamirmiriet, ak igonoor eung’ung’ inendet;" 
Numbers27:19 yeityo inde inendet taitab Eleasar tisiindet, ak eng’ taitab tuiyet komugul; ak ing’at inendet eng’ tainywa." 
Numbers27:20 Ak inde inendet kebebertab teegistang’ung’, si kobiit kogas it inendet tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel." 
Numbers27:21 Ak kotonon inendet eng’ taitab Eleasar tisiindet, si koteepchi inendet kandoiset eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ kiruogetab Urim: mandoi eng’ ng’olyondennyi, ak komong’u eng’ ng’olyondennyi, inendet ak lagokab Israel tugul, agot tuiyet komugul:" 
Numbers27:22 ak kiyai Musa ko u ye king’at Jehovah inendet: kiimut Josua kotonon eng’ taitab Eleasar tisiindet, ak eng’ taitab tuiyet komugul:" 
Numbers27:23 ak kiigonoor eunekyik inendet, ak king’at inendet, ko u ye kiga mwa Jehovah eng’ Musa." 
Numbers28:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers28:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel ilenji, Orib si ogona eng’ betusiekwok che nyoljin, kagochinennyu, amitwogikyuk che bo kagochinoikyuk che bunei mat, che bo nyamdutik che anyiny eng’ ane." 
Numbers28:3 Ak ilenji, Ni kagochinet ne bunei mat ne ogochini Jehovah; arek che libwoben che mengichik, che masiirei kenyit agenge, aeng’ eng’ betut age tugul, kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei kotugul." 
Numbers28:4 Igoitoi aruet agenge karon, ak igoite age koskoleny;" 
Numbers28:5 koboto kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo epah ne bo busiek che ng’ootin, kobunji kagochinetab busiek, che kiburuktoi mwaita ne kituei ne yamei kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin." 
Numbers28:6 Noto kagochinet ne kibeelei kotugul, ne kiging’at eng’ tulwetab Sinai koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny, kagochinet ne bunei mat, kigochin Jehovah." 
Numbers28:7 Ak ingoek kagochinennyi ne keei kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin eng’ aruet agenge: irong’jini ole tilil kagochinet ne kieei che ng’wonen eng’ taitab Jehovah. 
Numbers28:8 Ak igoite aruet age koskoleny: ko u kagochinetab busiek ne igoitoi karon, igoitoi anyun kagochinet ne bunei mat, nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah." 
Numbers28:9 Ak igoite arek aeng’, che mengichik, che libwoben, che masiirei kenyit agenge, eng’ betutab sabato, koboto kebeberwek aeng’ che bo taman che bo epah che bo busiek che ng’ootin, kobunji kagochinetab busiek, che kiburuktoi mwaita, koboto kagochinennyi ne kieei:" 
Numbers28:10 noto kagochinet ne kibeelei eng’ sabato age tugul, ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, koboto kagochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers28:11 Ak eng’ taunaikab arawekwok, ogochini kagochinet ne kibeelei, kirugik aeng’ che mengechen, ak mengit agenge, arek tisab che mengichik che libwoben, che masiirei kenyit agenge." 
Numbers28:12 Koboto kebeberwek somok che bo taman che bo epah che bo busiek che ng’ootin, che kiburuktoi mwaita, kobunji kagochinetab busiek, eng’ kiruk age tugul; ak kebeberwek aeng’ che bo taman che bo busiek che ng’ootin kobunji kagochinetab busiek, che kiburuktoi mwaita, eng’ mengit agenge;" 
Numbers28:13 ak kebebertab taman ne bo busiek che ng’ootin, che kiburuktoi mwaita koek kagochinetab busiek eng’ aruet age tugul; kobunji kagochinet ne kibeelei, ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny, kagochinet ne bunei mat kigochin Jehovah." 
Numbers28:14 Ak ingoek kagochinoikwak che keei kebebertab hin ne bo divaik eng’ kiruk, ak kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo hin eng’ mengit, ak kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo hin eng’ aruet: nito kagochinet ne kebeelei ne bo arawetab age tugul ne bo kenyit." 
Numbers28:15 Ak kobunji kwesta agenge kagochinetab tengekto eng’ Jehovah; kigoitoi noto ketesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei kotugul, ak kagochinet ne kieei." 
Numbers28:16 Biitu paska ne bo Jehovah eng’ arawet ne bo tai, eng’ betut ne bo taman ak ang’wan." 
Numbers28:17 Ak egu igorta eng’ betut ne bo taman ak mut ne bo arawanito: kiamei makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ betusiek tisab. 
Numbers28:18 Biitu kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betut ne bo tai; amoyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot: 
Numbers28:19 ago ogoite kagochinet ne bunei mat, kagochinet ne kibeelei, ne kigochin Jehovah; kirugik aeng’ che neran, ak mengit agenge, ak arek tisab che mengichik che masiirei kenyit agenge; egu che libwoben eng’ okwek:" 
Numbers28:20 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin, che kiburuktoi mwaita: ogoitoi kebeberwek somok che bo taman eng’ kirgit agenge, ak kebeberwek aeng’ che bo taman eng’ mengit;" 
Numbers28:21 ak igoitoi kebebertab taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato tisab; 
Numbers28:22 kwesta agenge ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, si keyaunenok kagaigaet." 
Numbers28:23 Ogoitoi chuto otesyini kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo karon, ne kagochinet ne kibeelei kotugul." 
Numbers28:24 Ogoitoi ko u noto eng’ betut age tugul, eng’ betusiek tisab, amitwogik che bo kagochinet ne bunei mat, ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah: kigoitoi noto ketesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei kotugul, koboto kagochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers28:25 Ak egu kayumetab ge eng’ betutab tisab; amoyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot. 
Numbers28:26 Kogeny ye ogochini Jehovah, eng’ betutab tongoanik, kagochinet ne bo busiek che leelachen eng’ igortang’wong’ ne bo wigisiek, onyoru kayumetab ge ne itabanat; amoyai boisio age tugul ne bo otwoknot:" 
Numbers28:27 ago ogoite kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah; kirugik aeng’ che neran, ak mengit, ak arek tisab che mengichik che masiirei kenyit agenge;"
