Numbers28:28 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin che kiburuktoi mwaita, kebeberwek somok che bo taman eng’ kiruk age tugul, ak kebeberwek aeng’ che bo taman eng’ mengit," 
Numbers28:29 ak kebebertab taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato tisab; 
Numbers28:30 kwesta agenge, ne kiyaunenok kaigaigaet." 
Numbers28:31 Ogoitoi che kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, (egu che libwoben eng’ okwek), koboto kagochinoikwak che kieei." 
Numbers29:1 Ak onyoru kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ arawet ne bo tisab, eng’ betut ne bo tai eng’ arawanato; amoyai boit age tugul ne bo otwoknot: egu betut ne kiguutei igondisiek eng’ okwek." 
Numbers29:2 Ak ogochi Jehovah kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny; kirgit agenge ne neran, mengit agenge, ak arek tisab che mengichik che libwoben che masiirei kenyit agenge;" 
Numbers29:3 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin che kiburuktoi mwaita, kebeberwek somok che bo taman eng’ kirgit, ak kebeberwek aeng’ che bo taman eng’ mengit," 
Numbers29:4 ak kebeberta agenge ne bo taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato tisab: 
Numbers29:5 ak kwesta agenge kobunji kagochinetab tengekto, si keyaunenok kagaigaet:" 
Numbers29:6 ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo arawet ne kaleel, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak kagochinet ne kibeelei kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak kagochinoikwak che kieei, ko u ng’atutienywa, koek nyamdutiet ne anyiny, kagochinet ne bunei mat kigochin Jehovah." 
Numbers29:7 Ak onyoru kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betutab taman ne bo arawanito bo tisab; ak onyalili sobonwekwok; amoyai boit age tugul: 
Numbers29:8 ago ogochini Jehovah kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny; kirgit agenge ne neran, ak mengit agenge, ak arek tisab che mengichik che masiirei kenyit agenge; egu che libwoben eng’ okwek:" 
Numbers29:9 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin che kiburuktoi mwaita, kebeberwek somok che bo taman eng’ kirgit, kebeberwek aeng’ che bo taman eng’ mengit," 
Numbers29:10 ak kebeberta agenge ne bo taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato tisab: 
Numbers29:11 kwesta agenge ne bo kagochinetab tengekto; kitesyin choto kagochinetab tengekto ne bo kaigaigaet, ak kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak kagochinoikwak che kieei." 
Numbers29:12 Ak onyoru kayumetab ge ne itabanat eng’ betutab taman ak mut eng’ arawetab tisab; amoyai boit age tugul ne bo otwoknot, ak oripchi Jehovah igorta eng’ betusiek tisab:" 
Numbers29:13 ak ogoite kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bunei mat, ne bo nyamdutiet ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah; kirugik taman ak somok che neran, mengichik aeng’, arek che mengichik taman ak ang’wan che masiirei kenyit agenge; egu che libwoben:" 
Numbers29:14 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek che ng’ootin che kiburuktoi mwaita, kebeberwek somok che bo taman eng’ kirgit age tugul eng’ kirugichoto taman ak somok, kebeberwek aeng’ che bo taman eng’ mengit age tugul eng’ mengichoto aeng’," 
Numbers29:15 ak kebebertab taman eng’ aruet age tugul eng’ arechato taman ak ang’wan: 
Numbers29:16 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak kagochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:17 Ak ogoite eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ kirugik taman ak aeng’ che neran, mengichik aeng’, arek taman ak ang’wan che mengichik che libwoben che masiirei kenyit agenge:" 
Numbers29:18 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirugichoto, ak che bo mengichik, ak che bo arek, ko u koitenywa, ko u ng’atutiet:" 
Numbers29:19 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak kagochinoikwak che kieei." 
Numbers29:20 Ak ogoite eng’ betut ne bo somok kirugik taman ak agenge, mengichik aeng’, arek taman ak ang’wan che mengichik che libwoben che masiirei kenyit agenge;" 
Numbers29:21 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirugichoto, ak che bo mengichik, ak che bo arek, ko u koitenywa, ko u ng’atutiet:" 
Numbers29:22 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak kagochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:23 Ak ogoite eng’ betut ne bo ang’wan kirugik taman, mengichik aeng’, arek taman ak ang’wan che mengichik che libwoben che masiirei kenyit agenge:" 
Numbers29:24 ak kagochinenywa ne bo busiek, ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirugichoto, ak che bo mengichik, ak che bo arek, ko u koitenywa, ko u ng’atutiet:" 
Numbers29:25 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek ak kagochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:26 Ak ogoite eng’ betut ne bo mut kirugik sogol, mengichik aeng’, arek taman ak ang’wan che mengichik che libwoben che masiirei kenyit agenge:" 
Numbers29:27 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirugichoto, ak che bo mengichik, ak che bo arek, ko u koitenywa, ko u ng’atutiet:" 
Numbers29:28 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak kagochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:29 Ak ogoite kirugik sisiit eng’ betut ne bo lo, mengichik aeng’, arek taman ak ang’wan che mengichik che libwoben che masiirei kenyit agenge:" 
Numbers29:30 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirugichoto, ak che bo mengichik, ak che bo arek, ko u koitenywa, ko u ng’atutiet:" 
Numbers29:31 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak kagochinoikwak che kieei." 
Numbers29:32 Ak ogoite eng’ betutab tisab kirugik tisab, ak mengichik aeng’, arek taman ak ang’wan che mengichik che libwoben che masiirei kenyit agenge:" 
Numbers29:33 koboto kagochinenywa ne bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei, che bo kirugichoto, ak che bo mengichik, ak che bo arek, ko u koitenywa, ko u ng’atutiet:" 
Numbers29:34 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto, ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek ak kagochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:35 Eng’ betut ne bo sisiit onyoru tuiyetab kaming’inetab ge: amoyai boit age tugul: 
Numbers29:36 ago ogoite kagochinet ne kibeelei, kagochinet ne bunei mat, ne bo nyamdutiet ne ng’uu ne anyiny eng’ Jehovah: kirgit agenge, mengit agenge, arek tisab che mengichik che libwoben che masiirei kenyit agenge:" 
Numbers29:37 bendi ko u koitenywa, ko u ng’atutiet, kagochinenywa ne bo busiek, ak kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo kirgit, che bo mengit, ak che bo arek:" 
Numbers29:38 ak kwesta agenge koek kagochinetab tengekto; ne kitesyin kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek ak kagochinennyi ne kieei." 
Numbers29:39 Ogochini Jehovah chuto eng’ igorwekwok che kiging’at, che kitesyin kaarortaosiekwok, ak kagochinoikwok che ogoitoi eng’ chamnyet, che bo kagochinoikwok che kibeelei, ak che bo kagochinoikwok che bo busiek, ak che bo kagochinoikwok che kieei, ak che bo kagochinoikwok che bo kalyet." 
Numbers29:40 Ak kimwachi Musa lagokab Israel ko u tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa. 
Numbers30:1 Ak kimwachi Musa bounikab ortinwekab lagokab Israel kolenji, Ni kit ne king’at Jehovah." 
Numbers30:2 Ye iarorji chi Jehovah kiy, anan ngoyosio korate sobondanyi ng’atutiet, amat kowal ng’olyondennyi; yaei ko u tugul che kimwa eng’ kutinnyi." 
Numbers30:3 Ak kogeny, ye iarorji kobogoriondo Jehovah kiy, ak korategei ng’atutiet, ye ta komi gotab kwandanyi, kota ko neran;" 
Numbers30:4 ak kogas kwandanyi kaarortaennyi, ak ratutiennyi ne korate sobondanyi, ak kosis kwandanyi; kogimegitu anyun kaarortaosiekyik, ak kogimit ratutiet age tugul ne korate sobondanyi." 
Numbers30:5 Ago ngo ete kwandanyi eng’ betut ne kagas; ko matonondos kaarortaosiekyik, agot agenge, anan ratutikyik che korate sobondanyi; ak konyochi kaat Jehovah, amu kiete kwandanyi." 
Numbers30:6 Ak ngitun kobogoriondonoto kota komitei eng’ inendet kaarortaosiekyik, anan ngo kisartae ng’olyo eng’ kutinnyi, ne korate sobondanyi;" 
Numbers30:7 ak kogas manong’otiondennyi, ak kosis eng’ betut ne kagas: kotononso anyun kaarortaosiekyik, ak ratutik che kiga rate sobondanyi." 
Numbers30:8 Ago ngo ete manong’otiondennyi eng’ betut ne kagas; kowal anyun chichoto kaarortaetab kobogoriondonoto ne kotinyei, koek buch, ak ng’olyot ne kosartae, ne koga rate sobondanyi: ak konyochi kaat Jehovah." 
Numbers30:9 Ago kaarortaetab mosok, anan ko ne bo inendet ne kigibesyo ak manong’otiot; kiy age tugul ne kirate sobondanyi kotononi amu inendet, magibutei." 
Numbers30:10 Ak ngo aror inendet komi gotab manong’otiondennyi, anan korat sobondanyi eng’ ratutietab kayosiet," 
Numbers30:11 ak kogas manong’otiondennyi, ak kosis, ama koete; kotononso anyun kaarortaosiekyik tugul, ak ratutiet age tugul ne kirate sobondanyi." 
Numbers30:12 Ago ngo wal manong’otiondennyi tukchoto koek buch eng’ betut ne kigas; ko matononi anyun kiy age tugul ne mong’une kutinnyi agobo kaarortaosiekyik, anan agobo ratutiet ne kirate sobondanyi: kiyai manong’otiondennyi tukchoto koek buch; ak konyochi kaat Jehovah." 
Numbers30:13 Imuchi kogimit manong’otiot, anan koyai koek buch, kaarortaet age tugul, ak kayosiet age tugul ne ratisiei, ne inyalili sobondo." 
Numbers30:14 Ago ngo sis manong’otiondennyi eng’ inendet betut age tugul; kogimiti anyun kaarortaosiekyik tugul, anan ko ratutikyik tugul che mitei inendet: kigogimit tukchoto amu kisis, ma ete kwonyoto eng’ betut ne kigas." 
Numbers30:15 Ago ngo but koek buch ko kagogas; koib anyun inendet tengektab kwonyoto. 
Numbers30:16 Chuto ng’atutik che king’at Jehovah Musa, che bo chi ak osotiondennyi, ak che bo chepto ak kwandanyi, ye ta ko neran cheboto, eng’ gotab kwandanyi." 
Numbers31:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers31:2 Yaakyi mugetut Midianik amu lagokab Israel: yeityo kiyumin iwe ole mi biguk. 
Numbers31:3 Ak kimwachi Musa bik kolenji, Eng’ murenik che otinye olaakyi alak karik, amu luget, si koba kobargei ak Midianik, koyai yaaktaetab mugetut ne bo Jehovah eng’ Midian." 
Numbers31:4 Oyokte elfut eng’ oret age tugul, eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel, koba luget." 
Numbers31:5 Kigikwei eng’ elfusiekab Israel, elfut eng’ oret age tugul, murenik elfusiek taman ak aeng’ che ratotin ge eng’ karikab luget." 
Numbers31:6 Ak kiiyokto Musa ichek, elfut agenge eng’ oret age tugul, koba luget, icheget koboto Pineas agine weritab Eleasar tisiindet, ak tugukab ole tilil ak igondisiek che kiguutei eng’ waagat, eng’ eunnyi." 
Numbers31:7 Ak kibargei ak Midianik, ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa; ak kibar muren age tugul." 
Numbers31:8 Ak kibar laitorinik che bo Midian, koboto chun alak che kiga kebar; Ebi, Rekem, Sur, Hur, ak Reba, choto laitorinik mut che bo Midian: kibar Balaam weritab Beor agine eng’ rotwetab chok." 
Numbers31:9 Ak kiluul lagokab Israel kwonyikab Midianik ak lagokwak; ak kiluul tukwak tugul, ak nekwak tugul, ak tugukwak tugul." 
Numbers31:10 Ak kibeel nganasokwak tugul ole menyei, ak meng’otosiekwak tugul." 
Numbers31:11 Ak kiib tuguk tugul, ak tugul che kigiluul, eng’ bik ak eng’ che kiyai." 
Numbers31:12 Ak kiimut luulenik, ak akwotisiek, ak tugukwak, kobwa ole mi Musa, ak Eleasar tisiindet, ak tuiyetab lagokab Israel, agoi nganaset ne mitei warengetab Moab, ne mi ole negite Jordan eng’ Jeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Ak kiba Musa, ak Eleasar tisiindet, ak kiruogik tugul che bo tuiyet, kotorokta eng’ sang’utab nganaset." 
Numbers31:14 Ak kinerekyi Musa kandoikab luget, kiptainikab elfusiek ak kiptainikab bogolusiek, che kibunu boisietab luget." 
Numbers31:15 Ak kiteebe Musa, kolenji, Koobagakte kobogorisiek tugul kosopcho?" 
Numbers31:16 Ogeero, chuto che kiigochi lagokab Israel kolelji Jehovah eng’ ng’olyotab Peor, eng’ ng’olyotab Balaam; ak kibiit koroito eng’ tuiyetab Jehovah amu noto." 
Numbers31:17 Ara anyun, obar werit age tugul eng’ lagok, ak obar kwony age tugul ne kigoruiyo ak muren." 
Numbers31:18 Ago orib kosopcho kobunjok tibik tugul che tomo koruiyo ak muren. 
Numbers31:19 Yeityo otebi eng’ sang’utab nganaset betusiek tisab: chi age tugul ne kogobar chi, anan chi age tugul ne kogotwa mustab ne kogibarei, oanyinge eng’ betutab somok ak eng’ betutab tisab, okwek ak luulenikwok." 
Numbers31:20 Ak oanyiny okwege ngoriet age tugul, ak kiy age tugul ne kigiyae muito, anan boisiet age tugul ne bo kororikab ng’ororek, ak tuguk tugul che kigiyae ketik." 
Numbers31:21 Ak kilenji Eleasar murenikab luget che kiba boriet, Nito ng’atutiet ne bo karureiywot ne king’at Jehovah Musa:" 
Numbers31:22 ago tahabu, feda, sugunonik, karik, kibatinik, ak ngosielait," 
Numbers31:23 kiy age tugul ne machootei eng’ mat, obeel anyun choto eng’ ma, si kotililitu; ago kitilili eng’ beek che bo katabanet: ak onde beek tuguk tugul che chootos eng’ mat." 
Numbers31:24 Ak omwet ngoroikwok eng’ betutab tisab, ak oanyinyitu, ak ye ibata, obwa nganaset orit." 
Numbers31:25 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa, kolenji," 
Numbers31:26 Iit luulenik tugul che kigenam, che bik ak che kiyagi, inye ak tisiindet Eleasar, ak bounikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo tuiyet:" 
Numbers31:27 ak ipchei che kioluul kobwa kebeberwek aeng’u; bunjin kebeberta age bik che ingen luget, che kiga ba boriet; kobunji age tuiyet komugul:" 
Numbers31:28 yeityo inemu aisurut ne bo Jehovah eng’ murenikab luget che kiba boriet: agenge eng’ bogol mut, eng’ bik, ak eng’ tuga, ak eng’ sigirok, ak eng’ kechirek:" 
Numbers31:29 onemune choto kebebertanywa ak igochi tisiindet Eleasar, koek kagochinet ne kinamjin barak ne bo Jehovah." 
Numbers31:30 Ak inemu eng’ kebebertab lagokab Israel, agenge eng’ konom, eng’ bik, eng’ akwotisiek, eng’ sigirok, ak eng’ nego, ak eng’ tuga tugul, ak igochi choto Lawik, che ribei boisietab gotab Jehovah." 
Numbers31:31 Ak kiyai Musa ak Eleasar tisiindet ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa. 
Numbers31:32 Ak che king’at eng’ che kinam murenikab luget, ko ki kechirek elfusiek bogol lo ak tamanwogik tisab ak mut," 
Numbers31:33 ak eng’ tuga ko ki elfusiek tamanwogik tisab ak aeng’," 
Numbers31:34 ak sigirok elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak agenge," 
Numbers31:35 ak bik elfusiek sosom ak aeng’ tugul, che kobogorisiek che kitomo koruiyo ak muren." 
Numbers31:36 Koitetab kebeberta, noto bo bik che kiga ba luget, ko ki kechirek elfusiek bogol somok ak sosom ak tisab ak bogol mut:" 
Numbers31:37 ak ki bogol lo ak tamanwogik tisab ak mut aisurutab Jehovah ne bo kechirek. 
Numbers31:38 Ak kiek che bo tuga elfusiek sosom ak lo; ak kiek aisurutab Jehovah eng’ choto, tamanwogik tisab ak aeng’." 
Numbers31:39 Ak sigirok, ko ki elfusiek sosom ak bogol mut; ak kiek aisurutab Jehovah eng’ choto, tamanwogik lo ak agenge." 
Numbers31:40 Ak kiek bik elfusiek taman ak lo; ak kiek aisurutab Jehovah eng’ choto bik sosom ak aeng’. 
Numbers31:41 Ak kiigochi Musa Eleasar tisiindet kebeberta, kagochinet ne kinamjin barak, ne bo Jehovah, ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Numbers31:42 Ak eng’ kebebertab lagokab Israel, ne kiitaban Musa eng’ murenik che kiyai luget," 
Numbers31:43 (kiek kebebertab tuiyet kechirek elfusiek bogol somok ak sosom ak tisab ak bogol mut," 
Numbers31:44 ak che bo tuga elfusiek sosom ak lo," 
Numbers31:45 ak sigirok elfusiek sosom ak bogol mut," 
Numbers31:46 ak bik elfusiek taman ak lo;) 
Numbers31:47 ak kiinem Musa eng’ kebebertab lagokab Israel, agenge eng’ konom, eng’ bik, ak eng’ akwotisiek, ak kogochi Lawik, che kiribei boisietab gotab Jehovah; ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Numbers31:48 Ak kirikyi Musa kandoik che bo elfusiekab luget, ak kiptainikab elfusiek, ak kiptainikab bogolusiek:" 
Numbers31:49 ak kilenji Musa, Kagiit achek otwogiguk murenikab luget che kibou, ak ma bet agot agenge eng’ achek." 
Numbers31:50 Ak kageibu kagochinetab Jehovah kit ne konyor chi age tugul, eng’ tugukab tahabu, ak mugurek che bo kelyek, ak karik che bo eunek, ak peteinik che bo ng’okset, ak munaok, ak sonoek, si koyachi kagaigaet sobonwekyok eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Numbers31:51 Ak kitaach Musa ak Eleasar tisiindet tahabu che bo tukchoto eng’ ichek, agot tuguk tugul che kigitany." 
Numbers31:52 Ak tahabu tugul che bo kagochinet ne kinamjin barak che kiigochi Jehovah, che bo kiptainikab elfusiek, ak che bo kiptainik che bo bogolusiek, ko ki sekelisiek elfusiek taman ak lo ak bogol tisab ak konom." 
Numbers31:53 (Amu kiga koib murenikab luget tuguk che kigiluul, kiipchigei chi tugul chechik.)" 
Numbers31:54 Ak kitaach Musa ak Eleasar tisiindet tahabu eng’ kiptainikab elfusiek ak che bo bogolusiek, ak koib kobwa emait ne kituiyechin, kobunji kabwatet ne bo lagokab Israel eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Numbers32:1 Kitinyei akwotisiek che chang’ mising’ lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad: ak ye kingogeer emetab Jaser, ak emetab Gilead, kole, ogeero, emet ne bo akwotisiek;" 
Numbers32:2 kobwa lagokab Gad ak lagokab Reuben kong’alalji Musa ak Eleasar tisiindet ak bounikab tuiyet, kelenji," 
Numbers32:3 Atarot, Dibon, Jaser, Nimra, Hesbon, Eleale, Sebam, Nebo, ak Beon," 
Numbers32:4 emonoto kibar Jehovah eng’ taitab tuiyetab Israel, ko emetab akwotisiek, ak tinyei otwogiguk akwotisiek." 
Numbers32:5 Ak kile, Ngo koginyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’, ko nyolu kigochi emonito otwogiguk kobunji; amemutech kelandae Jordan." 
Numbers32:6 Ak kilenji Musa lagokab Gad ak lagokab Reuben, Bendi tupchosiekwok luget; otebi okwek eng’ yu?" 
Numbers32:7 Amu nee si omu lagokab Israel si malanda koba emet ne kiigochi Jehovah? 
Numbers32:8 Kiyai kwanisiekwok ko u noto, ye kingayokte eng’ Kades-barnea koba kosegei emet." 
Numbers32:9 Amu ye kingoba atebwetab Eskol, ak kogeer emet, komu lagokab Israel kole si maba emet ne kiga kogochi Jehovah." 
Numbers32:10 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah betunoto, ak kiiyosio kole," 
Numbers32:11 Mami iman eng’ bik che kibunu Misri koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak kwo tai, ne imuchi kogeer emet ne kiayosiechi Abraham, ak Isak, ak Jakobo: amu ma isubwa eng’ kagesunatetab ge." 
Numbers32:12 Kobate Kaleb weritab Jepune Kenisindet, ak Josua weritab Nun: amu kiisub ichek Jehovah eng’ kagesunatetab ge." 
Numbers32:13 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel, ak kiigochi koombeniot eng’ ong’atet eng’ kenyisiek artam, agoi kowong’gei ibinda tugul ne kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Numbers32:14 Ak ogeero, kong’eetye oyai ko u ye kiyai kwanisiekwok, oegu kiptengeginik che tesoksei, otes neregek che koromen che bo Jehovah eng’ Israel." 
Numbers32:15 Amu ngomaste omete inendet, kobagaktoi inendet ichek kogeny eng’ ong’atet; ak ong’em bichu tugul." 
Numbers32:16 Ak kibwa korik ole mi inendet, ak kole, King’ote biusiekab tukyok eng’ olito, ak keteekyi lagokyok nganasok:" 
Numbers32:17 ago ki chobotin achek kilaach karik kebe kindoe lagokab Israel, agoi kiit oldanywa: ak komeny lagokyok nganasok che ng’ototin amu bikab emet." 
Numbers32:18 Magiweeksei kebendi ga agoi konyor lagokab Israel, chi tugul borotennyi." 
Numbers32:19 Amu maginyabani koboto ichek eng’ bitonindo bo Jordan ak olin bo tai; amu mi borotennyo Jordan bitoni tokyingei kong’asis. 
Numbers32:20 Ak kilenji Musa ichek, Ngoyai ko u nito, olaach karik obe luget eng’ taitab Jehovah," 
Numbers32:21 ak ngwo mureno age tugul ne kagolaach karik kolandae Jordan eng’ taitab Jehovah, agoi koon bunikyik eng’ tainnyi." 
Numbers32:22 Ak kiterter emet eng’ taitab Jehovah: oweege anyun, ak oegu che matinyei tengek eng’ taitab Jehovah anan eng’ Israel; ak kobunjok emoni eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Numbers32:23 Ago ngot ko moyai ko u noto, ogeero, ko kaoyai tengekto eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak onai anyun ole ng’ang’dook tengektang’wong’." 
Numbers32:24 Oteekyi nganasok lagokwok, ak ong’otyi kechirekwok biusiek, ak oyai noto kamong’une kuting’wong’." 
Numbers32:25 Ak kimwachi lagokab Gad ak lagokab Reuben Musa kolenji, Yaei otwogiguk ko u ye kang’at kiptaiyandennyu." 
Numbers32:26 Tebe nganasokab Gilead lagokyok, ak osotikyok; ak tukyok, ak che kiyagi tugul:" 
Numbers32:27 ago landoi otwogiguk, mureno age tugul ne kagolaach karik che bo luget, kobendi boriet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u ye kimwa kiptaiyandennyu." 
Numbers32:28 Kiiyomis anyun Musa Eleasar tisiindet, ak Josua weritab Nun, ak kandoikab gorik che bo kwanisiekab ortinwekab lagokab Israel, agobo bichoto." 
Numbers32:29 Ak kilenji Musa, Ngolandae tugul Jordan koboto lagokab Gad ak lagokab Reuben, chi tugul ne kagolaach karikab luget, si kwo boriet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kiterter emet eng’ taing’wong’; ogochi anyun ichek emetab Gilead kobunji:" 
Numbers32:30 ago ngo macham olande tugul kotinyei karik, konyoru borotet eng’ emetab Kanan kobotok." 
Numbers32:31 Ak kiwolji lagokab Gad ak lagokab Reuben kolenji, Kiyae ko u ye kamwachi Jehovah otwogikyik." 
Numbers32:32 Kilandoi eng’ taitab Jehovah, kebendi emetab Kanan, ketinye karik, ak ng’etu eng’ Jordan bitoni, che bunjinech che bo borotennyo." 
Numbers32:33 Ak kiigochi Musa ichek, choto lagokab Gad, ak lagokab Reuben, ak kebebertab oretab Manase weritab Josep, bororietab Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, ak bororietab Og laitoriatab Basan, emet, ko u nganasokwak koboto ole bochin kiwotosiekwak, agot nganasokab emet che kiyiem." 
Numbers32:34 Ak kiteech lagokab Gad Dibon, ak Atarot, ak Aroer;" 
Numbers32:35 Atrot-sopan, Jaser, ak Jogbea;" 
Numbers32:36 Bet-nimra, ak Bet-haran: nganasok che ng’ototin, ak biusiek che bo kechirek." 
Numbers32:37 Ak kiteech lagokab Reuben Hesbon, ak Eleale, ak Kiriataim;" 
Numbers32:38 ak Nebo, ak Baal-meon, (kigiwal kainaikwak,) ak Sibma: ak kitochi kainaik alak nganasok che kiteech." 
Numbers32:39 Ak kiba lagokab Makir weritab Manase Gilead, ak kinam korebe Amorik che kimi oloto." 
Numbers32:40 Ak kiigochi Musa Makir weritab Manase, Gilead; ak kimeny oloto." 
Numbers32:41 Ak kiwa Jair weritab Manase konam nganasokwak, ak koguure Habot-jair." 
Numbers32:42 Ak kiwa Noba konam Kenat, ak nganasokyik che mengechen, ak kiguure Noba, koguurtoe kainennyi." 
Numbers33:1 Chu banwekab lagokab Israel, ye kingomanda eng’ emetab Misri eng’ lugosiekwak kondochin Musa ak Aron." 
Numbers33:2 Ak kisir Musa agobo mandaenywa, ko u banwekwak, ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah: ak chu banwekwak ko u mandaenywa." 
Numbers33:3 Ak kiba kong’eetye Rameses eng’ arawet ne bo tai, eng’ betutab taman ak mut ne bo arawanato bo tai; kimanda lagokab Israel eng’ betut ne kiisubi paska eng’ eutab kimnatet kogeeroti Misrik tugul," 
Numbers33:4 kota kotubei Misrik werikwak tugul che bo tai, che kiga kobar Jehovah eng’ kwenunywa: kiiruokyi Jehovah cheptalelisiekwak agichek." 
Numbers33:5 Ak kiba lagokab Israel eng’ Rameses, koba komuung’e Sukot." 
Numbers33:6 Ak kiba eng’ Sukot, komuung’e Etam, ne mi ole boch ong’atet." 
Numbers33:7 Ak kiba eng’ Etam, ak koweeigei agoi Pi-hairot, ne tokyingei Baal-sepon: ak kiimuung’e taitab Migdol." 
Numbers33:8 Ak kiba eng’ ole tokyingei Hairot, ak kibun kwenutab nyanjet agoi ong’atet: ak kiba bandab betusiek somok eng’ ong’atetab Etam, ak kiba komuung’e Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Ak kiba eng’ Mara, ak kiit Elim: ak kimi Elim kong’ikab beek tamanu ak aeng’, ak tironik tamanwogik tisab; ak kiimuung’e oloto." 
Numbers33:10 Ak kiba eng’ Elim, komuung’e ole negite Nyanjet ne Birir." 
Numbers33:11 Ak kiba eng’ Nyanjet ne Birir, ak kiimuung’e ong’atetab Sin." 
Numbers33:12 Ak kiba eng’ ong’atetab Sin, ak komuung’e Dobka." 
Numbers33:13 Ak kiba eng’ Dobka, ak kiimuuny eng’ Alus." 
Numbers33:14 Ak kiba eng’ Alus, komuung’e Repidim, ole kima komi beek che eei bik." 
Numbers33:15 Ak kiba eng’ Repidim, ak kiimuung’e ong’atetab Sinai." 
Numbers33:16 Ak kiba eng’ ong’atetab Sinai, ak kiimuuny eng’ Kibrot-hataaba." 
Numbers33:17 Ak kiba eng’ Kibrot-hataaba, ak komuung’e Haserot." 
Numbers33:18 Ak kiba eng’ Haserot, ak komuung’e Ritma." 
Numbers33:19 Ak kiba eng’ Ritma, ak kiimuung’e Rimon-peres." 
Numbers33:20 Ak kiba eng’ Rimon-peres, ak kiimuung’e Libna." 
Numbers33:21 Ak kiba eng’ Libna, ak kiimuung’e Risa." 
Numbers33:22 Ak kiba eng’ Risa, ak kiimuung’e Kehelata." 
Numbers33:23 Ak kiba eng’ Kehelata, ak kiimuung’e tulwetab Seper." 
Numbers33:24 Ak kiba eng’ tulwetab Seper, ak kiimuuny eng’ Harada." 
Numbers33:25 Ak kiba eng’ Harada, ak kiimuuny eng’ Makelot." 
Numbers33:26 Ak kiba eng’ Makelot, ak kiimuuny eng’ Tahat." 
Numbers33:27 Ak kiba eng’ Tahat, ak kiimuuny eng’ Tera." 
Numbers33:28 Ak kiba eng’ Tera, ak kiimuuny eng’ Mitka." 
Numbers33:29 Ak kiba eng’ Mitka, ak kiimuuny eng’ Hasmona." 
Numbers33:30 Ak kiba eng’ Hasmona, ak kiimuung’e Moserot." 
Numbers33:31 Ak kiba eng’ Moserot, ak kiimuung’e Bene-jaakan." 
Numbers33:32 Ak kiba eng’ Bene-jaakan, ak kiimuung’e Horagidgad." 
Numbers33:33 Ak kiba eng’ Horagidgad, ak kiimuung’e Jotbata." 
Numbers33:34 Ak kiba eng’ Jotbata, ak kiimuung’e Abrona." 
Numbers33:35 Ak kiba eng’ Abrona, ak kiimuung’e Esion-geber." 
Numbers33:36 Ak kiba eng’ Esion-geber, ak kiimuung’e ong’atetab Sin (noto Kades)." 
Numbers33:37 Ak kiba eng’ Kades, ak kiimuung’e tulwetab Hor, ole bochin kiwotetab emetab Edom." 
Numbers33:38 Ak kitogosta Aron tisiindet tulwetab Hor, eng’ ng’atutietab Jehovah, ak kimechi oloto, eng’ kenyitab artam koboch ngab komong’une lagokab Israel emetab Misri, eng’ arawetab mut, eng’ betut ne bo tai eng’ arawanato." 
Numbers33:39 Ak kiga kotar Aron kenyisiek bogol ak tiptem ak somok ye kingomeei eng’ tulwetab Hor. 
Numbers33:40 Ak kigas Kananindet laitoriatab Arad, ne kimenyei Murot ne bo Tai eng’ emetab Kanan, kole bwanei lagokab Israel." 
Numbers33:41 Ak kiba eng’ tulwetab Hor, ak komuung’e Salmona." 
Numbers33:42 Ak kiba eng’ Salmona, ak kiimuung’e Bunon." 
Numbers33:43 Ak kiba eng’ Bunon, ak kiimuung’e Obot." 
Numbers33:44 Ak kiba eng’ Obot, ak kiimuung’e Iyeabarim, eng’ kiwotetab Moab." 
Numbers33:45 Ak kiba eng’ Iyim, ak kiimuung’e Dibon-gad." 
Numbers33:46 Ak kiba eng’ Dibon-gad, ak kiimuung’e Almon-diblataim." 
Numbers33:47 Ak kiba eng’ Almon-diblataim, ak kiimuung’e tulonokab Abarim, ole tokyingei Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Ak kiba eng’ tulonokab Abarim, ak kiimuung’e warengetab Moab ole negite Jordan eng’ Jeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Ak kiimuung’e ole negite Jordan, koboch Bet-jesimot agoi Abel-sitim eng’ warengetab Moab." 
Numbers33:50 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa eng’ warengetab Moab, ole negit Jordan, eng’ Jeriko kolenji," 
Numbers33:51 Mwachi lagokab Israel, ilenji, Ye olandoe Jordan obe emetab Kanan," 
Numbers33:52 oon anyun bik tugul che menyei emonoto, koba eng’ taing’wong’, ak ong’em koikwak che saei, ak ong’em kanamonikwak che kigitanyi, ak obut oldinwekwak tugul che tororen:" 
Numbers33:53 ak onam emet kobunjok, ak omeny: amu kiagonok emonoto kobunjok." 
Numbers33:54 Ak opchechige emonoto onyabani, eng’ seretab barbarek ko u ortinwekwok; ogochini che chang’ borotet ne o, ak ogochini che ng’ering’ borotet ne ming’in: oldo tugul ole kaibutyi barbariatab chi, koek nenyi noto; onyabani ko u bororiosiekab kwanisiekwok." 
Numbers33:55 Ago ngo moon bik che menyei emet, koba eng’ taing’wong’, kogergeitu eng’ konyekwok ak tuguk che toorei bich, ak katok eng’ karaswekwok, icheget che ochamjini kong’et, ak konyalilak eng’ emet ne omenye." 
Numbers33:56 Ak tun ayaiywok ko u ye kiabwati ale ayachjini ichek. 
Numbers34:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers34:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel ilenji, Ye oit emetab Kanan, (nito emet ne onyoru koek boroteng’wong’, emetab Kanan ko u kiwotosiekyik)," 
Numbers34:3 bochitu anyun komostang’wong’ ne bo murot ne bo tai kong’eete ong’atetab Sin korob tabandab Edom, ak kobochit kiwoteng’wong’ ne bo murot ne bo tai kong’eete tabandab Araraita ne bo Munyuk ne tokyingei kong’asis:" 
Numbers34:4 ak koweigei kiwoteng’wong’ kotokyigei murot ne bo tai eng’ ole kitogostoe kebendi Akrabim, ak kwo agoi Sin: ak itei kiwotosiekyik komostab murot ne bo tai ne bo Kades-barnea; ak kwo agoi Haser-adar, agoi koit Asmon:" 
Numbers34:5 ak koweigei kiwotet kong’eete Asmon agoi koit ainetab Misri, ak kobochit kiwotosiekyik nyanjet." 
Numbers34:6 Ak egu nyanjet ne o kiwoteng’wong’ ne mi cherongo, nito kiwoteng’wong’ ne bo cherongo." 
Numbers34:7 Ak egu ni kiwoteng’wong’ ne bo murot ne bo katam: kong’eete nyanjet ne oaroroti agoi tulwetab Hor: 
Numbers34:8 ak koboch tulwetab Hor, oaroroti agoi ye kimandoe kebendi Hamat; ak bochitu kiwotennyi Sedad:" 
Numbers34:9 ak itei kiwotet Sipron, ak bochitu tabanwekyik Hasarenan: nito kiwoteng’wong’ ne bo murot ne bo katam." 
Numbers34:10 Yeityo oarorote kiwoteng’wong’ ne bo komostab kong’asis koboch Hasar-enan agoi Sepam: 
Numbers34:11 ak kochortagei kiwotet kong’eete Sepam agoi Ribla, eng’ komostab kong’asis ne bo Ain; ak kochortagei kiwotet agoi koit tabandab nyanjetab Kineret eng’ komostab kong’asis:" 
Numbers34:12 ak kochortagei kiwotet agoi Jordan, agoi koit tabanwekyik Araraita ne bo Munyuk: egu nito emeng’wong’ ko u kiwotosiekyik che yiemei tugul." 
Numbers34:13 Ak king’at Musa lagokab Israel kolenji, Nito emet ne onyabani eng’ barbarek, ne kong’at Jehovah kigochi ortinwek sogol, ak kebeberta ne bo oret age:" 
Numbers34:14 amu kigotaach borotenywa oretab lagokab Reuben ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ak kigotaach nenywa oretab lagokab Gad, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ak kigotaach borotenywa kebebertab oretab Manase:" 
Numbers34:15 kigotaach borotenywa ortinwechoto aeng’u ak kebeber eng’ Jordan bitoni eng’ Jeriko ole tokyingei kong’asis. 
Numbers34:16 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers34:17 Chu kainaikab bik che pcheiywok emet koek boroteng’wong’: Eleasar tisiindet, ak Josua weritab Nun." 
Numbers34:18 Ak onam bounindet ne bo oret age tugul, si kopchei emet koek borotet." 
Numbers34:19 Kainaikab bichoto chu: eng’ oretab Juda, Kaleb weritab Jepune." 
Numbers34:20 Ak eng’ oretab lagokab Simeon, ko Semuel weritab Amiud." 
Numbers34:21 Eliad weritab Kislon, eng’ oretab Benjamin." 
Numbers34:22 Ak bounindet Buki weritab Jogli eng’ oretab lagokab Dan. 
Numbers34:23 Bounindet Haniel weritab Epod eng’ lagokab Josep, eng’ oretab lagokab Manase:" 
Numbers34:24 bounindet Kemuel weritab Siptan, eng’ oretab lagokab Epraim." 
Numbers34:25 Ak bounindet Elisapan weritab Parnak, eng’ oretab lagokab Sebulun." 
Numbers34:26 Ak bounindet Paltiel weritab Asan, eng’ oretab lagokab Isakar." 
Numbers34:27 Ak bounindet Aihud weritab Selomi, eng’ oretab lagokab Aser." 
Numbers34:28 Ak bounindet Pedael weritab Amiud, eng’ oretab lagokab Naptali." 
Numbers34:29 Chuto che king’at Jehovah kopchechi lagokab Israel borotet eng’ emetab Kanan. 
Numbers35:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Musa eng’ warengetab Moab ole negite Jordan eng’ ole bo Jeriko, kolenji," 
Numbers35:2 Ng’at lagokab Israel kogochi Lawik nganasok eng’ borotenywa si komeny; ak ogochi Lawik ole agete tuga, eng’ emotinwek che kiyiem nganasok." 
Numbers35:3 Ak komeny nganasochoto, ak kobunji tukwak oloto agete, ak tugukwak, ak tiong’ikwak tugul." 
Numbers35:4 Egu kakwautik elfut agenge che bo eut oloto agete eng’ nganasok che ogochini Lawik, kong’eete irimetab nganaset, koyiem komoswek tugul." 
Numbers35:5 Ak okwa kakwautik elfusiek aeng’ che bo eut eng’ nganaset ole tokyingei kong’asis, ak kakwautik elfusiek aeng’ che bo eut eng’ komostab murot ne bo tai, ak kakwautik elfusiek aeng’ che bo eut eng’ komostab cherongo, ak kakwautik elfusiek aeng’ che bo eut eng’ komostab murot ne bo katam, kokwen nganaset. Egu eng’ ichek ole agete tuga eng’ nganasok." 
Numbers35:6 Egu nganasok che ogochini Lawik, nganasok lo che kimwachin, che ogoitoi si komwechi ne karumis: ak otesyi choto nganasok artam ak aeng’." 
Numbers35:7 Egu artam ak sisiit nganasok tugul che ogochini Lawik: koboto emotinwekwak chugai. 
Numbers35:8 Ak eng’ nganasochoto ogoitoi eng’ che bo lagokab Israel, onemu che chang’ eng’ che tinyei che chang’, ak onemu che ng’ering’ eng’ che tinyei che ng’ering’: ingogochi age tugul Lawik ko u ole te borotennyi ne kinyor." 
Numbers35:9 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Musa kolenji," 
Numbers35:10 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji, Ye olandoe Jordan obe emetab Kanan," 
Numbers35:11 otabanjige nganasok koek nganasok che omwechini; si kobiit komwechi oloto ne karumis eng’ lelset. 
Numbers35:12 Ak egu nganasochoto che omwechini ye komwee ne yaaktoi mugetut; si ma kibar ne karumis, agoi kotonon eng’ taitab tuiyet kiruokyi." 
Numbers35:13 Ak nganasochoto lo ogoitoi, koegu nganasok lo che kimwechin." 
Numbers35:14 Ogoitoi nganasok somok eng’ Jordan bitonin, ak ogoitoi nganasok somok eng’ emetab Kanan; egu nganasok che kimwechin." 
Numbers35:15 Egu nganasochoto lo ole mwechin lagokab Israel, ak ne toondet, ak bunotyot ne mi kwenunywa: si komwechi oloto age tugul ne barei chi eng’ lelset." 
Numbers35:16 Ago ngo kikwere karnet ak kome, ko rumin chichoto: kibarei rumindonoto iman." 
Numbers35:17 Ak ngo kiwire koita ne yamei kobar chi, ak kome, ko rumin inendet: kibarei rumindonoto iman." 
Numbers35:18 Anan ngo kikwere ketit ne yamei kobar chi, ak kome, ko rumindet inendet: kibarei rumindonoto iman." 
Numbers35:19 Barei yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo korotik rumindonoto: ngo tuiyo ak inendet, kobar." 
Numbers35:20 Ak ngo toorta amu wechet, anan ngowir eng’ kiy, kosapchin, ak kome;" 
Numbers35:21 anan ngo rabach eng’ bunyondit, ak kome: kibarei iman inendet ne kerabagisiei; rumin chichoto: barei yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo korotik, rumindonoto, ye katuiyo ak inendet." 
Numbers35:22 Ago ngo toorta eng’ yoto, ama eng’ bunyondit, anan kowire kiy age tugul ama sapchi," 
Numbers35:23 anan eng’ koita ne yamei kobar chi, ama keer inendet, ak kotiech chichoto ak kome, ak kamage bunyondennyi, ak kama komachei koyachi ne ya:" 
Numbers35:24 koruoch anyun tuiyet agobo barindonoto ak yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo korotik ko u ole teptoi kiruogutichu: 
Numbers35:25 ak kosor tuiyet rumindonoto eng’ eutab yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo korotik, ak koweekyi inendet nganasennyi, ole kiga mwechi: ak komeny oloto agoi kome tisiindet ne o, ne kigiile mwaita ne tilil." 
Numbers35:26 Ago ngot kosiir rumindonoto kiwotetab nganasennyi ne kiga mwechi; 
Numbers35:27 ak konyorji inendet yaaktaindetab mugetut agobo korotik sang’utab nganasennyi ne kimwechin, ak kobar ne yaaktoi mugetut agobo korotik, barindet; ko manamei inendet ng’ogistab korotik." 
Numbers35:28 Amu kata nyoljin kotebe nganasennyi ne kimwechin agoi kome tisiindet ne o: ago ye kagome tisiindet ne o koweekyigei anyun rumindet emennyi. 
Numbers35:29 Egu tuguchuto ng’atutietab kiruoget eng’ okwek eng’ ibinwekwok tugul ak eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul. 
Numbers35:30 Age tugul ne barei chi, kibarei rumindonoto eng’ ng’alekab baorinik: ago magibarei chi eng’ baornatetab chito agenge." 
Numbers35:31 Amotaach kiy ne kitiage sobondab rumindet ne nyoljin meet: ago kibarei iman. 
Numbers35:32 Ak motaach kiy ne kitiage chi ne kamwechi nganasennyi ne kimwechin, si kobiit konyo komeng’is eng’ emet, agoi komee tisiindet ne o." 
Numbers35:33 Amomuruon anyun emet ne omi: amu imuruoni emet korotik: ak mami kiy ne kianyinye emet amu korotik che kitumjigei, kobate korotikab inendet ne kitumda korotichoto." 
Numbers35:34 Ameng’wanit anyun emet ne omenye, ne atebe agane: amu ane Jehovah atebe kwenutab lagokab Israel." 
Numbers36:1 Ak kirik che eechen eng’ gorikab kwanisiek che bo oretab lagokab Gilead, weritab Makir, weritab Manase, ne bo ortinwekab werikab Josep, nyo kong’alal eng’ taitab Musa, ak eng’ taitab bounik, che eechen eng’ gorikab kwanisiek che bo lagokab Israel:" 
Numbers36:2 ak kile, King’at Jehovah kiptaiyandennyu kole, kogochi emet lagokab Israel eng’ seretab barbarek koek borotet: ak king’at Jehovah kiptaiyandennyu kogochi tibikab Selopehad tupchennyo, borotetab kwandanywa." 
Numbers36:3 Ak ngotun ichek werikab bororiosiek alak che bo lagokab Israel, keisto anyun borotenywa eng’ borotetab kwanisiekyok, ak ketesyi boretetab oret ne ituni ichek: kiistoi anyun barbariatab borotennyo." 
Numbers36:4 Ak ye kait jubilii ne bo lagokab Israel, ketesyi anyun borotenywa borotetab oret ne bunjin ichek: kiistoi anyun borotenywa eng’ borotetab oretab kwanisiekyok." 
Numbers36:5 Ak king’at Musa lagokab Israel ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenji, Kamwa iman oretab werikab Josep." 
Numbers36:6 Kang’at Jehovah ng’olyondoni agobo tibikab Selopehad, kole, Ingotun ichek che machei; ago ingotun che bo gotab oretab kwandanywa inegei." 
Numbers36:7 Si ma kiuuto borotet age tugul ne bo lagokab Israel, kong’eete oret age kwo oret age: amu kanyol konamgei lagokab Israel, chi tugul ak borotetab oretab kwanisiekyik." 
Numbers36:8 Ak chepto age tugul ne bunjin borotet eng’ bororiet age tugul ne bo lagokab Israel, kituni eng’ gotab oretab bororietab kwandanyi, si kobiit konam chi age tugul eng’ lagokab Israel, borotetab kwanisiekyik." 
Numbers36:9 Si ma kiuuto borotet age tugul kong’eete bororiet age agoi bororiet age, amu namegei bororiosiekab lagokab Israel, chi tugul ak borotennyi." 
Numbers36:10 Kiyai tibikab Selopehad ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa: 
Numbers36:11 amu kiitun Mala, Tirsa, Hogla, Milka, ak Noa, tibikab Selopehad, werikab tupchosiekab kwandanywa." 
Numbers36:12 Kiitun ichek ortinwekab werikab Manase weritab Josep, ak kitebe borotenywa bororietab oretab kwandanywa." 
Numbers36:13 Chuto anyun ng’atutik ak kiruogutik, che king’at Jehovah lagokab Israel eng’ Musa eng’ warengetab Moab ole negite Jordan eng’ Jeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Chu Ng’alek che kimwachi Musa Israelik tugul eng’ Jordan bitonin eng’ ong’atet, eng’ Araba ne tokyingei Sup, kwenutab Paran, ak Topel, ak Laban, ak Haserot, ak Di-sahab." 
Deuteronomy1:2 Bandab betusiek taman ak agenge kong’eete Horeb eng’ oret ne bunei tulwetab Seir agoi Kades-Barnea. 
Deuteronomy1:3 Ak kimwachi Musa lagokab Israel eng’ kenyitab artam, eng’ arawetab taman ak agenge, eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawet; ko u tugul che kiga kogochi Jehovah inendet eng’ ng’atutik, si kogochi ichek;" 
Deuteronomy1:4 ye kingo kagobar Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, ne kimenyei Hesbon, ak Og laitoriatab Basan, ne kimenyei Astarot, eng’ Edrei." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Eng’ Jordan bitonin eng’ emetab Moab, kotoi anyun Musa kobor ng’atutioni, kole," 
Deuteronomy1:6 Kimwawech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo eng’ Horeb, kole, Kogoyam betusiek che kiomeny tulwoni:" 
Deuteronomy1:7 oweege, onam bandang’wong’, ak obe emet ne bo tulonok ne bo Amorik, ak oldinwek tugul che negite oloto, eng’ Araba, eng’ emetab tulonok, ak eng’ warenget, ak eng’ komostab Murot ne bo Tai, ak eng’ ole negite ngegut, emetab Kananik, ak Lebanon, agoi ainet ne o, ainonoto ko Euprate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ogeero, kande emet taing’wong’: omong’ji anyun kobunjok emet ne kiiyosiechi Jehovah kwanisiekwok, Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo, kole igochin ak iyotenywa ne biitu let." 
Deuteronomy1:9 Ak kiamwawok eng’ betunoto alenjok, Mamuchi agesenak anege:" 
Deuteronomy1:10 kigotesaak Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak ogeero, o chang’ rani ko u kecheikab kipsengwet." 
Deuteronomy1:11 Ingotesaak Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwok, konyil elfut kosiir koiteng’wong’ ne bo nguno, ak ingoberurok, ko u ye kigoaroruok!" 
Deuteronomy1:12 Amuktoi ano anege agesen kaiimeng’wong’, ak lautieng’wong’, ak borieng’wong’?" 
Deuteronomy1:13 Olewenjigei bik che ng’omen, che tinyei naet, che toogunotin, ko u ortinwekwok, si agochi kondoiywok." 
Deuteronomy1:14 Ak kiolenja, Mie kioto kemwawech keyai." 
Deuteronomy1:15 Kianam anyun kandoikab ortinwekwok, bik che ng’omen, ak ko toogunotin, ak kiagochi kondoikwok, koek kiptainikab elfusiek, ak kiptainikab bogolusiek, ak kiptainikab konomusiek, ak kiptainikab tamanusiek, ak bounik ko u ortinwekwok." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Ak kiang’at kiruogikwok betunoto alenji, Ogasyi ng’alek tupchosiekwok, oruokyi eng’ imanda chi ak ne tupcho, ak toondet ne mi koboto inendet." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Amotiytii bik eng’ kiruoget; ogasyi ne ming’in ak ne o kogergeit; amoiywei togoch ne bo chi; amu bo kiruoget Kamuktaindet: ak ng’olyot ne katemenak, oibwa, si agas." 
Deuteronomy1:18 Ak kiang’atak eng’ betunoto agobo tuguk tugul che kanyol oyai. 
Deuteronomy1:19 Ak kigibe eng’ Horeb, ak kigibun ong’atet tugul, noto o ak komuisei ne kiogeer; kigibunu oret ne bo emetab tulonok ne bo Amorik, ko u ye king’atech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo; ak kigibwa agoi Kades-barnea." 
Deuteronomy1:20 Ak kialenjok, Kaoitu emetab tulonok ne bo Amorik, ne konech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Ogeero, kagonde Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ emet taing’ung’: togoste anyun, nam kobunjin, ko u ye kimwaun Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisieguk; ameiywei, anan iarogen." 
Deuteronomy1:22 Ak kiobwa ole ami, age tugul eng’ okwek, obwa olenja, Ongiyokte bik kondoenech, koba kosegeiywech emet, si kobwa komwawech ole teptoi oret ne kebune ketogostoi, ak nganasok che kiite." 
Deuteronomy1:23 Ak kiibaibaa kioto komie: ak kianam murenik taman ak aeng’ eng’ okwek, agenge eng’ oret age tugul:" 
Deuteronomy1:24 ak kiweek kotogosta tulwet, ak kiit atebwetab Eskol, ak kisegei oloto." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Ak kibut logoekab emonoto, ak koibwech, ak kiibwech ng’alek agichek, ak kole, Mie emonoto konech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Deuteronomy1:26 Ago kima ocham otogoste oloto, ago kiobistoe ng’atutietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’;" 
Deuteronomy1:27 ak kiong’unyng’ung’se eng’ emaisiekwok, ole, Kiimoong’wech Jehovah eng’ emetab Misri amu kiwechech, si kobiit kondeech eunekab Amorik kobarech." 
Deuteronomy1:28 Kitogostoi kebendi ano, anyun? Kiigochi tupchosiekyok mugulelwekyok kochootyo, kolenjech, Eechen bik ak ko koen kosiirech; eechen nganasok, kigiteech irimosiekwak kot koit kipsengwet; ak ne siirei noto ko kigigeerji oloto werikab Anagik." 
Deuteronomy1:29 Kialenjok anyun, Amongomuok, anan oiywei ichek." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Yaei boriet agobo okwek Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ne indoenok, ko u tugul che kiyaiywok eng’ Misri eng’ taing’wong’," 
Deuteronomy1:31 ak eng’ ong’atet ole kiigeer ile kigesenunenen Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ko u ye keseni chi werinnyi, eng’ ortinwek tugul che kiobunu agoi oitu olito." 
Deuteronomy1:32 Ago ma oyan Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ ng’olyondoni," 
Deuteronomy1:33 inendet ne kiindoenak eng’ oret, si kocheng’wok ole oteeche emaisiekwok, si koboruok eng’ mat oret ne obendi kemoi, ak eng’ boldet bet." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Ak kigas Jehovah twegunetab ng’alekwok, ak kinerech, ak kiiyosio, kole," 
Deuteronomy1:35 Mageerei iman agot agenge eng’ bichu bo ibini ya, emet ne kararan, ne kiayosie ale agochini kwanisiekwok," 
Deuteronomy1:36 kobate Kaleb weritab Jepune; keerei inendet; ak agochini inendet emonoto kitiech, koboto lagokyik: amu kiisub Jehovah eng’ kagesunatetab ge." 
Deuteronomy1:37 Ak kinerekya Jehovah amu okwek, kole, Memandoi aginye oloto:" 
Deuteronomy1:38 itei Josua weritab Nun, inendet ne tononi eng’ taing’ung’: igimit inendet; amu igochin inendet Israel konyaban emonoto." 
Deuteronomy1:39 Ak itei oloto lagokwok che mengech che kiomwa ole egu luulenik, ak lagokwok, che nguno ko maingen ne mie anan ne ya, choto che itei oloto, ak agochini ichek emet kobunji." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Ago oweege okwek, ak onam bandang’wong’ agoi omande ong’atet eng’ oret ne wendi Nyanjet ne Birir." 
Deuteronomy1:41 Kiowolwa anyun olenja, Kigiyachi Jehovah tengekto, kibendi keyai boriet, ko u tugul che king’atech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo. Ak kiorat chi tugul karikyik che bo luget, ak kiosartae obe tulwet." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Ilenji, Amat otogoste anan oyai boriet; amu mami ane kwenung’wong’; si ma kibarak eng’ taitab bunikwok." 
Deuteronomy1:43 Kiang’alalwok anyun ko u noto, ak kima ogas; kiongelelji ng’atutietab Jehovah, ak kiomenege, ak kiotogoste tulwet." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Ak kimong’jok Amorik che kimenyei tulwonoto, nyo koonak, ko u ye onei bich segemik, ak kiiterteranwak ochorjinigei Seir, agoi Horma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Ak kioweege oririe eng’ taitab Jehovah; ago ma kas Jehovah kuting’wong’, ama epchok it." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Kiotebe anyun Kades betusiek che chang’, che te betusiek che kiotar eng’ yoto." 
Deuteronomy2:1 Kigiweege anyun, kenam bandanyo kebe ong’atet eng’ oret ne wendi Nyanjet ne Birir, ko u ye kimwawa Jehovah: ak kigimuut tulwetab Seir betusiek che chang’." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Ak kimwawa Jehovah, kole," 
Deuteronomy2:3 Kogoyam betusiek che kiomuut tulwoni; oweege oba murot ne bo katam. 
Deuteronomy2:4 Ak ing’at bik, ilenji, Kanyol obun kiwotetab tupchosiekwok lagokab Esau, che menyei Seir; ak iyweok: oripge mising’ anyun:" 
Deuteronomy2:5 amomoiye kiy ak icheget; amu magonok emenywa, agot ne yamei kotiech keldo: amu kiagochi Esau tulwetab Seir kobunji." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Oale icheget amitwogik eng’ feda, si oam; ak oale kogeny icheget beek eng’ feda, si oee." 
Deuteronomy2:7 Amu kigoberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ boisiet tugul ne bo euneguk: kigonai bandang’ung’ eng’ ong’atani o: kimi koboten Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ kenyisiechu artam; ma rarun kiy. 
Deuteronomy2:8 Kigirob anyun kiwotetab tupchosiekyok lagokab Esau, che menyei Seir, kebun oretab Araba kebun Elat ak Esiongeber. Ak kigiweege kebun oretab ong’atetab Moab." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Ameiim Moab, anan iborie icheget eng’ luget: amu magonin emennyi kobunjin; amu kiagochi lagokab Lot emetab Ar kobunji." 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Kimenyei Emik oloto keny, bik che kimen, ak ko chang’, ago ko koen, ko u Anagik:" 
Deuteronomy2:11 kiiti icheget kele Repaik, ko u Anagik: ago kuure Moabik ichek Emik." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Ak kimenyei Horik agichek keny Seir, ago kiisubu lagokab Esau bichoto; ak kibar koisto eng’ tainywa, ak komeny oloto kogeer ichek; ko u ye kiyai Israelik eng’ emenywa ne kiigochi Jehovah.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Ong’eetye anyun, olandae kererutab Sered. Ak kigilandae anyun kererunoto bo Sered." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Ak koboch ngab keng’eetye eng’ Kades-barnea, agoi kelandae kererutab Sered, ko ki kenyisiek sosom ak sisiit; agoi kogesgei ibinda tugul ne bo murenikab luget, eng’ nganaset, ko u ye kiiyosichei Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Ak kigirindoi ichek eutab Jehovah si kobar ichek eng’ nganaset kot kogesgei. 
Deuteronomy2:16 Ak kingo kagobek bik tugul che bo luget kowong’gei," 
Deuteronomy2:17 kolenji Jehovah," 
Deuteronomy2:18 Isiirtoe rani Ar, kiwotetab Moab:" 
Deuteronomy2:19 ak ye irikte ole negite lagokab Amonik, ko meiim anan omoiye kiy ak bichoto: amu magonin emetab lagokab Amonik kobunjin: amu kiagochi lagokab Lot kobunji." 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Kiiti kele bo emonoto agine Repaik: kimenyei Repaik keny oloto; ago kuure Amonik bichoto Samsumik; 
Deuteronomy2:21 bik che eechen, ak ko chang’, ak ko koen, ko u Anagik, ago kibar Jehovah ichek eng’ tainywa; ak kibwa yoto, ak komeny kogeer ichek;" 
Deuteronomy2:22 ko u ye kiyachi lagokab Esau, che kimenyei Seir, ye kingobar Horik eng’ tainywa: ak kibwa ichek komeny oloto, kogeer bichoto, agoi ra." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Ak kibwa Kaptorik che kibunu Kaptor kobwa kobar Abik che kimenyei kestonik agoi Gasa, ak komeny oloto kogeer ichek.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Ong’eetye anyun, onam bandang’wong’, olandae atebwetab Arnon: ogeero, kande eung’ung’ Sihon Amorindet laitoriatab Hesbon, koboto emennyi: itau anyun inam kobunjin, ak iyai luget ak inendet." 
Deuteronomy2:25 Atau ra agochini koiywein ak koarogenso agobo inye, bik che mitei kureret tugul ne bo kipsengwet komugul, che ta kogasei ng’aleguk, ak kobotanso; ak konyor ng’wanindo amu inye." 
Deuteronomy2:26 Ak kiayokte bik koba eng’ ong’atetab Kedemot koba oldab Sihon laitoriatab Hesbon koib ng’alek che bo kalyet, kolenji," 
Deuteronomy2:27 Chamwa abun emeng’ung’: abune oret ne o kityo, mamastoi eutab tai anan eutab katam." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Kona amitwogik che aame aal, ak aal beek che ae: chamwa kityo awo asiirto;" 
Deuteronomy2:29 ko u ye kichamwa lagokab Esau che menyei Seir, ak Moabik che menyei Ar; agoi alandae Jordan awa emet ne konech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Deuteronomy2:30 Ago ma chamwech Sihon laitoriatab Hesbon kebun oldanyi: amu kiiuuiit tamirmiriennyi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, kot ko ma chamdagei, si kondeun inendet eung’ung’ ko u rani." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Ogeero, katau anyun ande taing’ung’ Sihon ak emennyi: tau anyun nam si inyaban emennyi." 
Deuteronomy2:32 Ak kimong’jech anyun Sihon, inendet ak bikyik tugul, kobwa koyai luget eng’ Jahas." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Ak kigon Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo inendet eng’ tainnyo; ak kigibar inendet ak werikyik, ak bikyik tugul." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Ak kiginam nganasokyik tugul eng’ betunoto, kiging’em nganaset age tugul ne kigimenyei, koboto kobogorisiek ak lagok; ma kimete agot agenge ne king’et:" 
Deuteronomy2:35 ago kigiluul tuga kobunjech, koboto tuguk che kimi nganasok, che kiga kenam." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Koboch Aroer, ne mi tabandab atebwetab Arnon, ak nganaset ne mi atebwet, agoi Gilead, ma biit nganaset ne kigimit kosiirech: kigon Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo tugul eng’ tainnyo:" 
Deuteronomy2:37 kobate emetab lagokab Amonik ne kima irikyi; komoswek tugul che bo ainetab Jabok, ak nganasok che bo emetab tulonok, ak oldo tugul ne kietenech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Kigiweege anyun ketogoste oret ne wendi Basan: ak kiibokyech Og laitoriatab Basan, inendet ak bikyik tugul, konyo koyai luget eng’ Edrei." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Ameiywei inendet: amu kaande inendet eung’ung’, ak bikyik tugul, ak emennyi; ak iyachi inendet ko u ye kiiyachi Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, ne kimenyei Hesbon." 
Deuteronomy3:3 Ak kiindewech anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo eunekyok Og agine, laitoriatab Basan, ak bikyik tugul: ak kigibar kot komang’etyi agot agenge." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Ak kigilul nganasokyik tugul eng’ betusiechoto; kima biit nganaset agot agenge ne ma kiluul eng’ ichek; nganasok tamanwogik lo, emet komugul ne bo Argob, bororietab Og eng’ Basan." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Kiging’ote nganasochuto tugul irimosiek che koen, ak kurgotik, ak temeleiywek; koboto nganasok che chang’ mising’ che kima king’ot." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Kiging’em anyun kiwong’u, ko u ye kiging’em Sihon laitoriatab Hesbon, kiging’em anyun ko u noto nganaset age tugul ne kimenyei bik, koboto gotab kor ak lagok." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Ago kigiluul kobunjech tuga tugul, ak tuguk che kimi nganasok." 
Deuteronomy3:8 Ak kigireb emet eng’ betusiechoto eng’ eunekab laitorinik aeng’ che bo Amorik che kimi Jordan bitonin, koboch atebwetab Arnon agoi tulwetab Hermon;" 
Deuteronomy3:9 (kuure Sidonik Hermon Sirion, ak kuure Amorik tulwonoto Senir;)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 nganasok tugul che bo warenget, ak Gilead komugul, ak Basan komugul, agoi Saleka ak Edrei, nganasokab bororietab Og eng’ Basan." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Amu king’et Og inegei, laitoriatab Basan, ne bo che king’et eng’ Repaik; ogeero, ki bo karnet itogunnyi; tos ma mi itogunoto Raba ne bo lagokab Amon? Ki kakwautik sogol che bo eut koindanyi, ak ki kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut tebeesindanyi, ko u kakwautietab chito.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Ak kiginam emonoto kobunjech eng’ betusiechoto: koboch Aroer, ne negite atebwetab Arnon, ak kebebertab emetab tulonok ne bo Gilead, ak nganasokyik, kiagochi bikab Reuben ak che bo Gad:" 
Deuteronomy3:13 ak kiagochi noto kebeberta age ne bo emetab Gilead, ak Basan komugul ne bororietab Og, emet tugul ne bo Argob, agot Basan komugul kebebertab oretab Manase. (Kiguure noto, emetab Repaik." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Kiluul Jair weritab Manase emet komugul ne bo Argob, agoi kiwotetab Gesurik ak Maakatik; ak kiguure choto, agot Basan, koguurtoe kainennyi, Habot-Jair, agoi ra.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Ak kiagochi Makir emetab Gilead. 
Deuteronomy3:16 Ak kiagochi bikab Reuben ak bikab Gad koboch Gilead agoi atebwetab Arnon, kwenutab atebwet, ak kiwotennyi, agoi ainetab Jabok, noto kiwotetab lagokab Amon;" 
Deuteronomy3:17 ak Araba agine, ak Jordan koboto kiwotennyi, koboch Kineret agoi araraita ne mitei Araba, ak Araraitab Munyuk, ne mitei kelutab Pisga ole tokyingei kong’asis." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Ak kiang’atak betunoto alenjok, Kigogonok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ emoni kobunjok: olande ko kaolaach karik, ondoe tupchosiekwok lagokab Israel, okwek tugul che bo luget." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Ago ingotebi eng’ nganasokwok che kiagonok osotikwok, ak lagokwok, ak tukwok, (angen ale otinye tuga che chang’;)" 
Deuteronomy3:20 agoi kogochi Jehovah tupchosiekwok kamuung’et, ko u okwek, ak konyaban ichek emet ne igochin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ Jordan bitonin: yeityo oweege anyun chi tugul ole mitei tugukyik che kiagonok." 
Deuteronomy3:21 Ak kiang’at Josua betunoto alenji, Kiigeer eng’ konyeguk tuguk tugul che kiyachi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ laitorinichuto aeng’: yachin ko u noto Jehovah laitornatosiek tugul che mi ole iwendi." 
Deuteronomy3:22 Amoiywei ichek; amu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ne yaei luget agobo okwek. 
Deuteronomy3:23 Ak kiasa Jehovah eng’ betunoto alenji," 
Deuteronomy3:24 Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, kaitau iborji kiboitiondeng’ung’ etunateng’ung’, ak eung’ung’ ne kim: amu tos mi cheptalelit nguno kipsengwetisiek anan ng’ony, ne imuchi koyai ko u boisioniguk, ak ko u biosioniguk che kimen?" 
Deuteronomy3:25 Kasain ale, chamwa alanda awa ageer emet ne kararan ne mi Jordan bitonin, tulwonoto kararan, ak Lebanon." 
Deuteronomy3:26 Ago kinerekya Jehovah agobo okwek, ak ma kaswa: ak kilenja Jehovah, Ingoyamin; amata ing’alalwa kogeny agobo ng’olyondonito." 
Deuteronomy3:27 Togoste Pisga barak, ak toben komostab cherongo, ak murot ne bo katam, ak murot ne bo tai, ak ole tokyingei kong’asis, ak igeerote eng’ konyeguk; amu melandoe Jordanini." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ago ng’at Josua, ak igiil inendet, ak igimit: amu inendet ne landoi kondoe bichu, ak kogoch konyaban emet ne ta igeere." 
Deuteronomy3:29 Kigitebe anyun atebwet ne tokyingei Bet-peor. 
Deuteronomy4:1 Ara anyun, ee Israel, oepchi it ng’atutik ak kiruogutik, che anetok, si kobiit oyai; si osopche, ak obe onam kobunjok emet ne konok Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwok." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Amotesyi kiy ng’olyot ne ang’atok, anan ochuchuch alak, si kobiit orib ng’atutikab Jehovah Kamuktindeng’wong’ che ang’atok." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Kigogeer konyekwok tuguk che kiyai Jehovah agobo Baal-peor: amu kigobar Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ kwenung’ung’ bik tugul che kiisub Baal-peor. 
Deuteronomy4:4 Ago okwek che kionamgei ak Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ kosobei ra age tugul eng’ okwek. 
Deuteronomy4:5 Ogeero, kianetak ng’atutik ak kiruogutik, ko u ye king’ata Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, si kobiit oyai choto eng’ emet ne obendi oname." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Orib anyun ak oyai; amu ng’omnateng’wong’ nito ak naeng’wong’ eng’ taitab bororiosiek, che tun kasei ng’atutichu tugul, ak kole, Ng’om iman bororioni o ak kotinyei naet." 
Deuteronomy4:7 Amu ngoro bororiet ne o, ne negite Jehovah ichek, ko u Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo ne negit eng’ ui tugul ye kiguure inendet?" 
Deuteronomy4:8 Ak tos ngoro bororiet ne o, ne tinyei ng’atutik ak kiruogutik che bo imanda ko u etanutichu tugul, che kande taing’wong’ betuni?" 
Deuteronomy4:9 Ripgei anyun, ak irib sobondang’ung’ eng’ kagiiletab ge, si meutie tuguk che kigeer konyeguk, ak si mamanda eng’ muguleldang’ung’ eng’ betusieguk tugul che bo sobeng’ung’; agoi inet lagoguk tuguchuto ak mochogoroniguk;" 
Deuteronomy4:10 eng’ betut ne kiitonone taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ Horeb, ye kilenja Jehovah, Iyumwa bik, ak agochi kogas ng’alekyuk, si konetgei koiywea eng’ betusiekwak tugul komi ng’ony, ak si konet lagokwak." 
Deuteronomy4:11 Ak kiobwa origu otononse eng’ tulwet kel; ak kilalei mat eng’ tulwet agoi kipsengwetisiek kwen, koboto mesundeito, boldet ak imenindo ne o." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Ak king’alalwok Jehovah ko mi kwenutab mat: kiogas twegunetab ng’alek, ago kima ogeer itondo; kutit kityo." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Ak kimwawok kayomisennyi, ne king’atak oyai, ng’atutichu taman; ak kisirji koik aeng’ che lebelen." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Ak king’ata Jehovah betunoto anetak ng’atutik ak kiruogutik, si kobiit oyai eng’ emet ne obendi oname kobunjok." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Oripge anyun mising’; amu kima ogeer iton age tugul eng’ betut ne king’alalwok Jehovah eng’ Horeb eng’ mat: 
Deuteronomy4:16 si mong’emgei, ak oyachigei kanamwet eng’ kergeindab kiy age tugul, itondab muren anan kobogorio," 
Deuteronomy4:17 anan itondab tiony age tugul ne mi ng’ony, anan itondab tarit age tugul ne tirireni eng’ barak." 
Deuteronomy4:18 Anan itondab kiy age tugul ne ichuutegei ng’ony, anan itondab njiriot age tugul ne mi beek che mi ng’ony orit:" 
Deuteronomy4:19 si ma ye inyal barak, igeer asista ak arawet ak kecheik, agot chang’indo tugul che mi kipsengwetisiek, kochuutin iwe isa tukchoto, ak iot tuguchoto kigopchechi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ bororiosiek tugul che mi kureretab kipsengwetisiek." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Ago konamak Jehovah, ak komutwak omong’une matab karnet, eng’ Misri, oegu bikab borotennyi, ko u rani." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Koboto noto, kinerekya Jehovah agobo okwek, ak kiiyosio kole melandoe Jordan, ameite emonoto kararan, ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, inye Israel, inyaban:" 
Deuteronomy4:22 ago amechini ane emoni, malandoe Jordan: ago olandoi okwek, oname emonoto kararan." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Oripge anyun, si meutie kayomisetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne kiyai kobotok, ak oyai kanamwet eng’ kergeindab kiy age tugul ne kietenen Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Amu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ko mat ne iwong’u, ak kotinyei ng’et kong’." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Ye isich lagok, ak mochogoronik, ak koga omeny emet keny, ak ong’emgei, ak oyai kanamwet eng’ kergeindab kiy age tugul, ak oyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, otach inendet;" 
Deuteronomy4:26 kaguur kipsengwet ak ng’ony kobaorianjin betuni, ale osib olustosi owong’ugei eng’ emet ne obendi olandoe Jordan oname kobunjok; machang’aitu betusiekwok eng’ oloto, ago king’emok owong’ugei." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Ak koiyestak Jehovah oyomu bororiosiek, ak ong’etu che ng’ering’ eng’ bororiosiek, ole imutok Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Ak oot kanamonik eng’ oloto, boisietab eunekab bik, che bo ketik ak koik, che mageerei kiy, ama kastoi, ama amisiei, anan kong’uto." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Ago ngocheng’ eng’ oloto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, inyoru inendet ngicheng’ eng’ muguleldang’ung’ tugul ak eng’ sobondang’ung’ tugul." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Ak ye imitei nyalilda, ak kobwanjin tuguchu tugul, iweekyigei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ anyun eng’ betusiek che bo let, ak igas kutinnyi:" 
Deuteronomy4:31 amu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ko Kamuktaindet ne bo rirenet; mametoin, anan kowong’un, anan koutie kayomisetab kwanisieguk ne kiiyosiechi." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Teeb anyun nguno agobo betusiek che kigosiirto che kiisib kondounenen koboch ngab kotoi Kamuktaindet koyai chi eng’ ng’ony, koboch tabanda age ne bo kipsengwet agoi tabanda age, teeb ngo kigobiit kit age ne o ne u ni, anan ngo kigegasei?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Tos kigogasei bik ole kigoi kutitab Kamuktaindet kong’alali eng’ kwenutab mat, ko u ye kiigas, ak kosopcho?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Anan kitiem Kamuktaindet au komutyigei bororiet eng’ bororiet age, eng’ tiemisiosiek, eng’ kaborunoik, ak eng’ kwong’utik, ak eng’ boriet, ak eng’ eut ne kim, eng’ eut ne chuulat, eng’ kamuisosiek che eechen, ko u tugul che kiyaiywok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ Misri eng’ taitab konyekwok?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Kigiborun inye, si kobiit inai ile, Jehovah inendet ko Kamuktaindent; mami age kobate inendet inegei." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Kigonin igas kutinnyi ne mong’une kipsengwet, si kobiit konetin: ak kigonin igeer mannyi ne o eng’ ng’ony; ak kiigas ng’alekyik komong’une kwenutab mat." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Amu kichamei kwanisieguk, kolewen anyun inendet iyotenywa ne biitu let, ak komoong’un eng’ Misri ko mi koboten, eng’ kimnatennyi ne o;" 
Deuteronomy4:38 si koon bororiosiek eng’ taing’ung’, che eechen ak ko kimen kosiirin, si komutun imong’u olito, kogonin emenywa koek boroteng’ung’, ko u betuni." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Nai anyun rani, ak igonor eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile, Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet eng’ barak kipsengwet ak eng’ ng’ony orit: mami age." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Ak kirib anyun konetisiosiekyik ak ng’atutikyik che kang’atin rani, si komieit eng’ inye, koboto lagoguk che biitu let, ak kochang’ait betusieguk eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, koigeny." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Kiitaban anyun Musa nganasok somok eng’ Jordan bitonin ole bo kong’asis; 
Deuteronomy4:42 si komwechi oloto rumindet, ne kibar chitab kokwennyi eng’ lelset, ne kima kowechei inendet eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto; si kosob ne kamwechi age eng’ nganasochoto:" 
Deuteronomy4:43 choto ko Beser eng’ ong’atet eng’ emetab warenget, kobunji bikab Reuben; ak Ramot eng’ Gilead, kobunji bikab Gad; ak Golan eng’ Basan, kobunji bikab Manase." 
Deuteronomy4:44 Ni ng’atutiet ne kiinde Musa taitab lagokab Israel: 
Deuteronomy4:45 chuto baornatosiek, ak konetisiosiek, ak kiruogutik, che kimwachi Musa lagokab Israel, ye kingo kagomong’une Misri;" 
Deuteronomy4:46 Jordan bitonin, eng’ atebwet ne tokyingei Bet-peor, emetab Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, ne kimenyei Hesbon, ne kibar Musa ak lagokab Israel, kingo kagomong’ ichek eng’ Misri." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Ak konam emennyi kobunji, ak emetab Og laitoriatab Basan; laitorinichoto aeng’ che bo Amorik, che kimenyei Jordan bitonin eng’ komostab kong’asis;" 
Deuteronomy4:48 koboch Aroer, ne mi tabandab atebwetab Arnon, agoi tulwet ne bo Sion, (noto ko Hermon)," 
Deuteronomy4:49 ak Araba tugul ne mi Jordan bitonin eng’ komostab kong’asis, agoi nyanjet ne mi Araba, ne mitei Pisga kel." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Ak kiguur Musa Israel tugul, ak kolenji, Ogaso, ee Israel, konetisiosiek ak kiruogutik che amwawok rani, ogas eng’ itikwok, si kobiit onetgei, ak orib oyai." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Kiyai Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo kayomiset kobotech eng’ Horeb. 
Deuteronomy5:3 Kima yai Jehovah kayomisionito ak kwanisiekyok, ago kiyai kobotech, agot achek, che kimi tugul olito kesoptosi rani." 
Deuteronomy5:4 King’alalwok Jehovah kimni eng’ tulwet eng’ mat," 
Deuteronomy5:5 (kiatonon eng’ kwenung’wong’ ak Jehovah eng’ betunoto, si aboruok ng’olyotab Jehovah: amu kioiyweisie amu mat, ak kima otogoste tulwet;) kolenjok," 
Deuteronomy5:6 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne kiamoong’un eng’ emetab Misri, eng’ gotab otwoknatet." 
Deuteronomy5:7 Amecheng’jigei cheptalelisiek alak, kobatena anege." 
Deuteronomy5:8 Ameyachigei kanamwet, anan itondab kiy age tugul ne mi barak kipsengwet, anan ne mi ng’ony orit, anan ne mi beek eng’ ng’ony orit:" 
Deuteronomy5:9 ameng’urukyi, anan iot: amu ane Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ko a Kamuktaindet ne amei ng’etkong’, ageerjini lagok tengektab kwanisiekwak, agoi ibinda ne bo somok ak ne bo ang’wan eng’ ichek che wecha;" 
Deuteronomy5:10 ak arire elfusiek eng’ ichek che chama, che isubi ng’atutikyuk." 
Deuteronomy5:11 Amemwa kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ tangoi: amu iityin Jehovah ng’ogisto ne mwaei kainennyi eng’ tangoi. 
Deuteronomy5:12 Rib betutab sabato, itaban, ko u ye king’atin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Iboisiei eng’ betusiek lo, ak iyai boisioniguk tugul:" 
Deuteronomy5:14 ago betutab tisab ko sabato ne bo Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: ameyai boisiet betunoto, inye, anan wering’ung’, anan cheptang’ung’, anan otwogeng’ung’ ne muren, anan otwogeng’ung’ ne tie, anan eitang’ung’, anan sigirieng’ung’, anan tuguk, anan toondeng’ung’ ne mi kurgotiguk; si komuuny otwogeng’ung’ ne muren ak otwogeng’ung’ ne tie ko u inye." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Ak ibwat ile ki i otwoget eng’ emetab Misri, ago kiimoong’un Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ oloto, eng’ eut ne kim, ak eng’ eut ne chuulat: king’atin anyun eng’ noto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ irib betutab sabato." 
Deuteronomy5:16 Teech kwandang’ung’ ak komet, ko u ye king’atin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: si kochang’ait betusieguk, ak komieit eng’ inye eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy5:17 Amerumisie. 
Deuteronomy5:18 Amoipge. 
Deuteronomy5:19 Amechorse. 
Deuteronomy5:20 Amebaorianji chitab kokweng’ung’ eng’ lembech. 
Deuteronomy5:21 Amegase miat osotiotab chitab kokweng’ung’; anan imakyige gotab chitab kokweng’ung’, anan emennyi, anan otwogennyi ne muren, anan ne tie, anan eitanyi, anan sigiriennyi, anan kiy age tugul ne bo chitab kokweng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy5:22 Kimwachi Jehovah tuiyeng’wong’ komugul ng’alechuto tugul eng’ tulwet eng’ mat, ak eng’ boldet, ak imenindo ne o, eng’ kutit ne o: ak kima tes alak. Ak kisirji koik aeng’ che lebelen, ak kogona." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Ak kingogas kutit ne kimong’une mesundeito, ye kilalei tulwet, orikya anyun, agot bounikab ortinwekwok, ak boisiekwok;" 
Deuteronomy5:24 ak kole, Ogeero, kaiboruech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo lilindanyi ak etunatennyi, ak kagegas kutinnyi komong’une mat: kagenai rani kele ng’alaljindos Jehovah ak chi, ak kosob." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Kalya anyun si kebegu? Amu iwong’wech mai o: ngot kegas kogeny kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, kebegu." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Chi ng’o eng’ bik tugul, ne kigas kutitab Kamuktaindet ne sobei, kong’alali eng’ mat, ko u ye kigigas, ak kosob?" 
Deuteronomy5:27 Rikte inye, si igas tugul che mwaei Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo: ak inyo imwawech tugul che mwaun Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo; si kegas, ak keyai." 
Deuteronomy5:28 Ak kigas Jehovah ng’alekwok ye kiong’alalwa; ak kilenja Jehovah, Kaagas ng’alekab bichu che kamwaun: miachen tugul che kamwa." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Kata mie nda katinyei muguleldo ne u noto, si koiywea, ak korib kotugul ng’atutikyuk tugul, si komieit eng’ ichek, ak eng’ lagokwak agoi!" 
Deuteronomy5:30 Ui ilenji, Oweekyige emaisiekwok." 
Deuteronomy5:31 Ago tonon inye eng’ yu ami, ak amwaun tugul, ak konetisiosiek, ak kiruogutik, che ineti, si koyai eng’ emet ne agochini konyaban." 
Deuteronomy5:32 Orib anyun si oyai ko u ye king’atak Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’: amomaste obe tai anan katam. 
Deuteronomy5:33 Obun ortinwek tugul che king’atak Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, si osopche, ak komieit eng’ okwek, ak kochang’ait betusiekwok eng’ emet ne oname kobunjok." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Ni ng’atutiet anyun, ak konetisiosiek, ak kiruogutik, che king’at Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ kinetak, si kobiit oyai eng’ emet ne olandoi oname kobunjok." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Si kobiit igonyit Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak irib konetisiosiekyik tugul ak ng’atutikyik, che ang’atin, inye, ak wering’ung’, ak mochogoreng’ung’, betusieguk tugul kote isobe; si kochang’ait betusieguk." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Ogaso, ee Israel, ak orib oyai; si komieit eng’ inye, ak ochang’aitu mising’, eng’ emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik, ko u ye kiiarorun Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisieguk." 
Deuteronomy6:4 Ogaso, ee Israel; agenge Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo:" 
Deuteronomy6:5 ak kanyol icham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ muguleldang’ung’ tugul, ak eng’ sobondang’ung’ tugul, ak eng’ kimnateng’ung’ tugul." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Ak ingotebe muguleldang’ung’ ng’alechu kang’atin raini: 
Deuteronomy6:7 ak inet lagoguk eng’ kagiiletab ge, ak ing’alale ye itebye eng’ gong’ung’, ak ye iwendoti eng’ oret, ak ye irue, ak ye ing’eete." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Ak iratyi eung’ung’ si koek kaborunet, ak koek ratutik che kirate anok eng’ turietab togeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Ak isirji tugatugikab gong’ung’, ak ormarichoguk." 
Deuteronomy6:10 Ak ye kagomutin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ iwe emet ne kiiyosiechi kwanisieguk, Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo, kole konin; nganasok che eechen ak ko miachen che kima iteeche," 
Deuteronomy6:11 ak gorik che nyiitotin tuguk tugul che miachen, che kima inyiiti, ak keringonik che bo beek che kima ibale, mbarenikab sabibuk ak emitik, che kima imine, ak iam ak ibiye;" 
Deuteronomy6:12 ripge anyun si meutie Jehovah, ne kiimutun imong’une emetab Misri, eng’ gotab otwoknatet." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Iywei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; ak iot, ak iyosie eng’ kainennyi." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Amosub kanamonik, agot che bo bororiosiek che negitenok;" 
Deuteronomy6:14 Amosub kanamonik, agot che bo bororiosiek che negitenok;" 
Deuteronomy6:15 amu tinyei ng’etkong’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne mi kwenung’ung’; si malalyo neregekab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ inye, ak kowong’un eng’ ng’ony." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Amotiem Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ko u ye kiotiem eng’ Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Orib ng’atutikab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ kagiiletab ge, ak baornatosiekyik, ak konetisiosiekyik, che king’atin." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Ak iyai ne bo iman ak ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah: si komieit eng’ inye, si iwe inam kobunjin emet ne mie ne kiiyosiechi Jehovah kwanisieguk," 
Deuteronomy6:19 kole onei buniguk tugul eng’ taing’ung’, ko u ye kigomwa Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Ye tun teebenen wering’ung’ kole, Bo nee baornatosiechu, ak konetisiosiek, ak kiruogutik, che king’atak Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo?" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Ilenji anyun wering’ung’, Kigi otwogikab Parao eng’ Misri; ak kiimoong’wech Jehovah eng’ Misri eng’ eut ne kim:" 
Deuteronomy6:22 ak kiibarta Jehovah kaborunoik ak kwong’utik, che eechen, che bichien, che kibire Misri, ak Parao, koboto bikyik tugul, kegeerei:" 
Deuteronomy6:23 kiimutwech eng’ oloto kebwa olito, kogonech emet ne kiiyosiechi kwanisiekyok." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Ak king’atech Jehovah keyai konetisiosiechu tugul, kiywei Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, si ketepte mieindo kotugul, si koribech kesopche ko u ra." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Egu anyun imanda eng’ achek, ngigiilge keyai ng’atutioni tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ko u ye king’atech." 
Deuteronomy7:1 Ye kagoitin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ emet ne iwendi iname kobunjin, ak koon bororiosiek che chang’ eng’ taing’ung’, Hitik, Girgasik, Amorik, Kananik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik, bororiosiek tisab che eechen ak ko kimen kosiirin;" 
Deuteronomy7:2 ak ye kagonin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ibar anyun iwong’u amoarorjige kiy koboto ichek, anan irire:" 
Deuteronomy7:3 anan ogan ge; amegochi cheptang’ung’ werinnyi, anan itunji wering’ung’ cheptanyi." 
Deuteronomy7:4 Amu tun imaasi wering’ung’ si maisuba, ak koot kanamonik: eng’ noto anyun kolalyo neregekab Jehovah eng’ okwek, ak kong’emin kochokyin." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Ago oyachi ko u ni; obut kapkorosusiekwak, ak otonaton tolochikwak, ak oeb Aserik, ak obeel kanamonikwak." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Amu i bororiet ne itabanat eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: kilewenin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ iegu bororiet ne nenyi inegei, eng’ bororiosiek tugul che mi ng’ony." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Amu kima chamak Jehovah, kolewenok, amu ki o chang’ kosiir bik alak (ki o ng’ering’ kosiir bik tugul):" 
Deuteronomy7:8 ago amu kichamak Jehovah, ak kimach korib kayosiet ne kiiyosiechi kwanisiekwok, kiimoong’wok anyun Jehovah eng’ eut ne kim, kotiachak eng’ gotab otwognatet, eng’ eutab Parao, laitoriatab Misri." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Nai anyun ile Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko Kamuktaindet; Kamuktaindet ne bo imanda, ne ribei kayomisiet ak rirenet eng’ ichek che chamei inendet ak koribei ng’atutikyik agoi ibindab elfut;" 
Deuteronomy7:10 ak koyaakyi mugetut che wechei inendet kegeerei, si kong’em ichek: maigaigei eng’ ne wechei, igeerjin kegeerei." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Rib anyun ng’atutik, ak konetisiosiek, ak kiruogutik, che kang’atin rani, iyai." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Amu ye ogase kiruogutichu, ak oribe, ak oyae, korib anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kayomiset ak rirenet eng’ inye ne kiiyosiechi kwanisieguk;" 
Deuteronomy7:13 ak kochamin, ak koberurin, ak kotesin: ak koberur iyoteng’ung’ ak ruratetab emeng’ung’, beguk ak beekab logoeguk, ak mwaniguk, ak bitatetab tuguk ak che bo kechireguk, eng’ emet ne kiiyosiechi kwanisieguk kole konin." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Kiberurin kosiir bik tugul: mabiitu ne soneni ne muren anan ne kobogorio eng’ okwek, anan eng’ tukwok." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Ak koistoenen Jehovah mianwek tugul; ak magonin korotwek che yaach che bo Misri, che ingen, ago igochin tugul che wechin." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Ak iwong’u bororiosiek tugul che konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; amat irire ichek: anan iot kanamonikwak; amu egu mestet eng’ inye noto. 
Deuteronomy7:17 Ngimwa eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile, Chang’ bororiosiechu kosiira; aondoi ano?" 
Deuteronomy7:18 Ameiywei bichoto: ibwat mising’ ne kiyachi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ Parao, ak Misri komugul;" 
Deuteronomy7:19 tiemisiosiek che eechen che kiigeer eng’ konyeguk, ak kaborunoik, ak kwong’utik, ak eut ne kim, ak eut ne chuulat, che kiimoong’unenen Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: yaachin ko u noto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ bororiosiek tugul che iywei." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Ak ne siirei choto koyokyin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ichek karamik, agoi kowong’gei eng’ taing’ung’ che unyegei che kang’et." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Amongomuok: amu mi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kwenung’ung’, Kamuktaindet ne o ne bo kamuiset." 
Deuteronomy7:22 Ak koon Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ bororiosiechoto eng’ taing’ung’ mutyo: manyol ibar iwong’u eng’ yoto, si machang’achin tiong’ikab timin." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Ago konin ichek Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ taing’ung’, ak kobarei ichek eng’ baret ne o, agoi kowong’gei." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Ak konde laitorinikwak euneguk, ak ibet kainenywa eng’ kureretab kipsengwet: mabiitu chi ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taing’ung’, ibare kowong’gei." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Obeel kanamonikab cheptalelisiekwak: amat igase miat feda anan tahabu che mi kanamonichoto, anan iipchige, si mariichin: amu wechei noto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’;" 
Deuteronomy7:26 ameib kit ne kiwechei kwo gong’ung’, si meegu ne istoot ko u kioto: wech mising’, ak iesie kioto; amu kigeisto." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Orib oyai ng’atutiet komugul ne kang’atin rani, si osopche, ak otesage, ak obe onam emet ne kiiyosiechi Jehovah kwanisiekwok." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Ak ibwat oret komugul ne kigomutunenen Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ kenyisiechu artam eng’ ong’atet, si koming’inin, kotiemin, konai kit ne mi muguleldang’ung’, ngichame irib ng’atutik, anan ngo mechame." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Ak kiiming’inin, kigonin koamin rubet, ak kibaenen mana, che kima inai, agot kwanisieguk; si kogonin inai ile masobei chi eng’ amdit kityo, ago sobei chi eng’ kiy age tugul ne mong’une kutitab Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Kima osegitu ngoroiguk che kiilaachi, anan kobwanso kelyeguk, eng’ kenyisiechoto artam." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Ak iguiye eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile, ko u ye itigoni chi werinnyi, ko u noto itigonin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Rib anyun ng’atutikab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ibun ortinwekyik, ak iywei." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Amu keitin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ emet ne kararan, emetab kererusiek, ak kong’ikab beek, ak keringonik che kutune beek eng’ atebwosiek ak tulonok;" 
Deuteronomy8:8 emetab nganok ak sairik, ak sabibuk ak mogoonik ak logoek alak che eechen; emetab emitik che bo mwanik ak kumik;" 
Deuteronomy8:9 emet ne iamisiei ama biitu rubet, ama rerun kiy eng’ oloto; emet ne koikyik ko karik, ak ibale tulonokyik sugunonik." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Ak iamisie ibiye, ak ilosu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ amu emet ne mie ne kagonin." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Ripgei anyun, si meutie Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, imete ng’atutikyik, ak kiruogutikyik, ak konetisiosiekyik, che kang’atin rani:" 
Deuteronomy8:12 si ye kaiamisie ibiye, ak iteech gorik che kororon, ak imeny;" 
Deuteronomy8:13 ak ye katesogis akwotisieguk ak kechireguk, ak fedaisieguk ak tahabu, ak kotesogis tuguk tugul che itinye;" 
Deuteronomy8:14 eng’ noto anyun imen, iutie Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne kiimutun imong’une emetab Misri eng’ gotab otwognatet;" 
Deuteronomy8:15 ne kiindoun eng’ ong’atet ne o ne bo kamuiset, ole mi erenok che ng’wonen susenywa ko u mat ak tagolik, emetab melelda ole mami beek; ne kiinagin beek komong’une ruandet ne uui:" 
Deuteronomy8:16 ne kibaenen mana eng’ ong’atet, che kima nai kwanisieguk; si koming’inin, ak kotiemin, si koyaun ne mie eng’ let:" 
Deuteronomy8:17 ak ile eng’ muguleldang’ung’, Kagona kimnatennyu ak kamugetab eunnyu magornatoni." 
Deuteronomy8:18 Ago ibwat Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, amu inendet ne konin kimnatet ne inyorune magornatet: si kogimit kayomisennyi ne kiiyosiechi kwanisieguk, ko u rani." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Ak ngiutie Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, isub kanamonik, iot, ak igutung’ji, abaoriani agobo okwek rani ale olustosi iman." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Ko u bororiosiek che ng’emei Jehovah eng’ taing’wong’, olustosi ak okwek ko u noto; amu kima ocham ogas kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Ogaso, ee Israel: ilandoe rani Jordan iwendi iluule bororiosiek che eechen che kimen kosiirin, ak nganasok che eechen che kiging’ote irimosiek che itei barak," 
Deuteronomy9:2 bik che eechen che koen, werikab Anagik, che ingen, che kiigase kemwaei ko u ni, Ng’o ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taitab werikab Anak?" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Nai anyun rani ile, Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne landoi kondoenen ko u mat ne iwong’u; ng’emei bichoto, ak kogochi konyeratitu eng’ taing’ung’: ione anyun ko u noto, ing’em ichokyi ko u ye kimwaun Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Amat imwa eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ye kagoon Jehovah ichek eng’ taing’ung’ ile, Kiitya Jehovah emoni kobunja amu imandanyu: ago onei Jehovah bororiosiechu eng’ taing’ung’ amu sogornatenywa." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Ma eng’ imandang’ung’, anan atebeng’ung’ ne mie, ne kagonin inam emenywa: ago onei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ bororiosiechu eng’ taing’ung’ amu sogornatenywa, si kobiit kogimit Jehovah ng’olyot ne kiiyosiechi kwanisieguk Abraham, ak Isak, ak Jakobo." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Nai anyun ile, magonin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kobunjin emoni mie amu imandang’ung’; amu o bik che uuen metowek." 
Deuteronomy9:7 Ibwat, ameutie, chang’indab tagisiet ne kiitach Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ ong’atet: koboch betut ne kiimong’une emetab Misri, agoi oitu yu, ko kiongelelji Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Ak kiotach Jehovah eng’ Horeb agine, kot konerech Jehovah komachei kobarak." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Ye kiatogoste tulwet ataach koik che lebelen, choto ko koikab kayomisiet ne kiyai Jehovah kobotok, atebi anyun eng’ tulwet betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam; maam amit amaee beek." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Ak kigona Jehovah koichato aeng’ che lebelen che kigisir eng’ mornetab Kamuktaindet; kigisirji ko u ng’alek tugul, che kimwawok Jehovah eng’ tulwet komong’une mat eng’ betutab tuiyet." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Ak kingobata betusiechoto artamu ak kemousiek artam, kogona Jehovah koichato aeng’, choto bo kayomiset." 
Deuteronomy9:12 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Ng’eet, chortege chakte; amu kagong’emgei biguk che kiimutune Misri; kesib komasta eng’ oret ne kiang’at; kagoyachigei kanamwet ne kitanyi." 
Deuteronomy9:13 Ak king’alalwa Jehovah kogeny, kole, Kaageer bichu, keero, bik che uuen metowek:" 
Deuteronomy9:14 unda, si awong’, abukto kainenywa eng’ kureretab kipsengwet: ak ayain iegu bororiet ne kim ak ko o kosiir ichek." 
Deuteronomy9:15 Aweege anyun, achoruge eng’ tulwet, ak kilalei mat eng’ tulwet: atinye koichato aeng’ bo kayomiset eng’ eunekyuk tuwai." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Ak kiageer, ogeero, kioyachi tengekto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’; kiga otang’jigei itondab moita: kiga omaste ochakte omete oret ne king’atak Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ak kianam koichato tuwai, ak awirte, ak atui eng’ taing’wong’ ogeere." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Kiabutyi ng’ony eng’ taitab Jehovah betusiek artam, ko u ye kiayai eng’ tai; ma am amit ama ee beek; amu tengektang’wong’ tugul ne kioyai, kioyai ne ya eng’ Jehovah, otach inendet." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Amu kiaiywei neregek ak nyitatet ne ng’wan, ne kinerekyok Jehovah komachei kobarak. Ago kigaswa Jehovah betunoto agine." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Ak kinerekyi Jehovah mising’ Aron komachei kobar: kiasa agobo Aron eng’ yoto agine. 
Deuteronomy9:21 Kiaib anyun tengektang’wong’, moita ne kiga oyai, abeel, atui, ang’a komengegitu, agoi kotambululitu: yeityo arong’ji kererut ne rootune tulwet." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Ak kiotach Jehovah kogeny eng’ Tabera, ak Masa, ak eng’ Kibrot-hataaba." 
Deuteronomy9:23 Ak ye kiiyoktok Jehovah eng’ Kades-barnea kolenjok, Otogoste onam emet ne kiagonok; obistoe ng’atutietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ama oyan inendet, anan ogas it kutinnyi." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Kiongelelji Jehovah koboch betut ne kianaenak. 
Deuteronomy9:25 Kiabutyi ng’ony eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ betusiechoto artam ak kemousiechoto artam; amu kigale Jehovah, Awong’wok." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Ak kiasa Jehovah ale, Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, amewong’u biguk che boroteng’ung’, che kiitaach eng’ etunateng’ung’, che kiimong’u eng’ Misri eng’ eut ne kim." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Ibwat kiboitiniguk, Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo; amat igeer uuindab met ne bo bichu, anan yaitienywa, anan tengektanywa:" 
Deuteronomy9:28 si male emet ne kiimoong’unenech, Amu ma imuch Jehovah komut ichek koit emet ne kiiarorji, ak amu wechei, kiimong’ si kobiit kobar eng’ ong’atet." 
Deuteronomy9:29 Ago icheget ko biguk ak ko boroteng’ung’, che kiimoong’u eng’ kimnateng’ung’ ne o ak eng’ eung’ung’ ne chuulat." 
Deuteronomy10:1 Kilenja anyun Jehovah eng’ betunoto, Wai koik aeng’ che lebelen che u chu ki bo tai, ak itogosu oli ami eng’ tulwet, ak iyai moinget eng’ ketik."
