Deuteronomy10:2 Si asirji koichato ng’alek chu kimi koik che bo tai che kiitue, si inde moinget." 
Deuteronomy10:3 Ayai anyun moinget eng’ ketikab shita, ak awai koik aeng’ che lebelen che u chu ki bo tai, atogoste tulwet, aibe koichato aeng’ eng’ eunnyu." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Ak kisir anyun koichato, ko u siret ne bo tai, ng’atutik taman, che kimwawok Jehovah eng’ tulwet komong’une mat eng’ betutab tuiyet: yeityo kogona Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Aweege anyun, achoruge eng’ tulwet, ande koichato moinget ne kiga ayai; ak mi oloto, ko u ye king’ata Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Ak kiba lagokab Israel eng’ Berot Bene-jaakan agoi koit Mosera: kimechi Aron oloto, ak kigitupchi oloto; ak kiyai Eleasar werinnyi boisietab tiseinatet kogeer inendet." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Kiba eng’ oloto agoi Gudgoda; ak kiba eng’ Gudgoda agoi Jotbata, emet ne mi kererusiek." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Kiitaban Jehovah eng’ betusiechoto oretab Lawi, koib moingetab arorutietab Jehovah, kotononso eng’ taitab Jehovah koboisiechi, koberur bik eng’ kainennyi, agoi ra." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Manyoru Lawik anyun, amu noto, kebeberta anan borotet koboto tupchosiekyik; Jehovah borotennyi, ko u ye kimwachi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 Kiatebi eng’ tulwet anyun ko u tai, betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam: ak kigasa Jehovah betunoto agine; ak mata komach Jehovah kowong’un." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Ng’eet, indochi bik; si koba konam emet ne kiayosiechi kwanisiekwak ale agochini." 
Deuteronomy10:12 Ara anyun Israel, nee ne magenen Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, kobate iywei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, iwendote ortinwekyik tugul, ak icham inendet, ak iot Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ muguleldang’ung’ tugul ak eng’ sobondang’ung’ tugul," 
Deuteronomy10:13 irib ng’atutikab Jehovah, ak konetisiosiekyik, che kaang’atin rani si komieit eng’ inye?" 
Deuteronomy10:14 Keero, bo Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kipsengwet, ak kipsengwet ne bo kipsengwetisiek, ng’ony ak tugul che mitei." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Ago kibaibait Jehovah eng’ kwanisieguk kocham ichek, ak kilewen iyotenywa ne biitu let, okwek choto, eng’ bik tugul, ko u rani." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Omuratan mugulelwekwok anyun, amoegu bik che uuen metowek." 
Deuteronomy10:17 Amu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ko Kamuktaindet ne siirei cheptalelisiek, ak Kiptaiyatab kiptainik, Kamuktaindet ne o, ne bo kamuktaet, ne bo kamuiset, ne matiytii bik, ne mataachei che bo kagaigaet." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Inendet ne yachin imanda ne matinyei kwanda, ak ne mosok, ak kochamei toondet, igochin amitwogik ak ngoroik." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Ocham anyun toek: amu ki o toek eng’ emetab Misri. 
Deuteronomy10:20 Iywei anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; boisiechi inendet; onamgei ak inendet, ak iyosie eng’ kainennyi." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Inendet kalosuneng’ung’, ak ko Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne kiyaun tuguchu eechen che bo kamuiset, che kiigeer." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Ki bik tamanwogik tisab kwanisieguk ye kichorjingei Misri; ago kagoyain Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ itenitu kecheikab kipsengwet eng’ chang’indo. 
Deuteronomy11:1 Cham anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak irib kotigonennyi, ak konetisiosiekyik, ak kiruogutikyik, ak ng’atutikyik kotugul." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Onai ra: amu mang’alaljini lagokwok che tom konai, che tom kogeer kotigonetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, etunatennyi, ak kamuktaennyi, ak eunnyi ne chuulat," 
Deuteronomy11:3 ak kaborunoikyik, ak boisionikyik, che kiyachi Parao laitoriatab Misri ak emennyi komugul, eng’ kwenutab Misri;" 
Deuteronomy11:4 ak kit ne kiyachi lugetab Misri, ak mbartanyisiekwak, ak karisiekwak: ko u ye kiigochi komaluuch beekab Nyanjet ne Birir ye kiisubwok, ak kiiwong’ Jehovah ichek ko u noto agoi rani;" 
Deuteronomy11:5 ak kit ne kiyaiywok eng’ ong’atet, agoi oitu yuto;" 
Deuteronomy11:6 ak kit ne kiyachi Datan ak Abiram, werikab Eliab, weritab Reuben; ko u ye kiyat ng’ony kutinnyi, ak kolugui, koboto bikwak, ak emaisiekwak, ak tuguk tugul che soptos che kikwerioti ichek, eng’ kwenutab Israel tugul:" 
Deuteronomy11:7 ago kigogeer konyekwok boisionik tugul che eechen che kiyai Jehovah. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Orib anyun ng’atutiet komugul ne kaang’atak rani, si ogimegitu, si oit emet ne obendi oname kobunjok;" 
Deuteronomy11:9 si kochang’a betusiekwok eng’ emonoto, ne kiiyosiechi Jehovah kwanisiekwok kole igochin ichek ak iyotenywa ne biitu let, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Amu ma u emet ne obendi oname kobunjok emetab Misri ne kiobunu, ole kiigole kesweguk, ak kiibisisie keldang’ung’, ko u kabungui:" 
Deuteronomy11:11 ago emet ne olang’jini omenye, kotinyei tulonok ak tembwosiek, ne eei beek che bo roptab kipsengwet:" 
Deuteronomy11:12 ribei emonoto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; keerei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ emonoto koboch taunetab kenyit agoi kogesgei kenyit. 
Deuteronomy11:13 Egu anyun, ngot ogas it eng’ kagiiletab ge ng’atutikyuk che kang’atak rani, ngocham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, oboisiechi inendet eng’ mugulelwekwok tugul ak eng’ sobonwekwok tugul," 
Deuteronomy11:14 agonok anyun ropta ne bo emeng’wong’ eng’ betusiekyik, roptab iwotkut ak ne igesunegei, si iges beguk, ak divaiguk, ak mwaniguk." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Ak agonu suswek che bo tuguk eng’ emeng’ung’, ak iamisiei ibiye." 
Deuteronomy11:16 Oripgei anyun, si ma kiberber mugulelwekwok, ak omaste, oot kanamonik ak ogutung’ji;" 
Deuteronomy11:17 ak kolalyo neregekab Jehovah eng’ okwek, ak koger kipsengwet, si ma koroboni, si ma koiyei emet; ak osib obegu eng’ emet ne kararan ne konok Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Ogonore anyun ng’alechuchuk mugulelwekwok ak sobonwekwok; ak oratyi eunekwok koek kaborunet, ak koek ratutik che kirate anok eng’ turietab togochikwok." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Ak onet lagokwok choto, ye ong’alaldosi, ye itebye eng’ gong’ung’, ak ye iwendoti ak ye irue, ak ye ing’eete." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Ak isirji tugatugikab gong’ung’, ak ormarichoguk:" 
Deuteronomy11:21 si ko u ye ta komi kipsengwet ak ng’ony, tesoksei ko u noto betusiekwok, ak betusiekab lagokwok, eng’ emet ne kiiyosiechi Jehovah kwanisiekwok kole igochin." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Amu ngorib eng’ kagiiletab ge ng’atutioni komugul kaang’atak rani, oyai; ocham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, obendate ortinwekyik tugul, ak onamge ak inendet;" 
Deuteronomy11:23 koon anyun Jehovah bororiosiechu tugul eng’ taing’wong’, ak oluul bororiosiek che eechen che kimen kosiirok." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Bunjinok oldo tugul ole katiech kelyekwok: koboch ong’atet, ak Lebanon, koboch ainet, ainonoto Euprate, agoi nyanjet ne tokyingei ole roroktoe asista, oloto kiwoteng’wong’." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Mabiitu chi ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taing’wong’: igochin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ koiyweak ak kogonyitok emet komugul ne otieche, ko u ye kimwawok." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Ogeero, kande taing’wong’ rani kaberuret ak chubisiet:" 
Deuteronomy11:27 egu kaberuret ngogas ng’atutikab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, che kaang’atak rani;" 
Deuteronomy11:28 ak egu chubisiet ngo mogas ng’atutikab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ngomaste eng’ oret ne kaang’atak rani, osub kanamonik, che tom onai." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Ak ye tun kagoitin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ emet ne iname kobunjin, inde kaberuret tulwetab Gerisim, ak inde chubisiet tulwetab Ebal." 
Deuteronomy11:30 Tos mami choto Jordan bitonin, ole tokyingei ole roroktoe asista, eng’ emetab Kananik che menyei Araba, ole tokyingei Gilgal, ole negite ketikab More?" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Amu olandae Jordan obendi oname emet ne konok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, kobunjok, ak omeny oloto." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Ak orib oyai konetisiosiek ak kiruogutik tugul che kande taing’wong’ rani. 
Deuteronomy12:1 Chu konetisiosiek ak kiruogutik che tun oribe oyae eng’ emet ne kigonok Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisieguk, kobunjin kote osoptosi eng’ ng’ony." 
Deuteronomy12:2 Ong’em anyun iman oldinwek tugul, ole kioote kanamonikwak bororiosiek che oluule, che mi tulonok che koen, ak che mi legemosiek, ak che mi ketik che tuonen kel:" 
Deuteronomy12:3 ak obut kapkorosusiekwak ak otonaton tolochikwak, ak obeel Aserik; ak oluul kanamonikwak che kigiwai, ak ong’em kainenywa eng’ oloto." 
Deuteronomy12:4 Amoyachi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ko u noto. 
Deuteronomy12:5 Ago ole leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ ortinwekwok tugul kole konde kainennyi oloto, ocheng’ anyun ole menyei inendet, ak iwe oloto:" 
Deuteronomy12:6 oib kagochinoikwok che kibeelei, ak tiseiywekwok, ak kebeberwekwok, ak kagochinetab eunekwok ne kinamjin barak, ak kaarortaosiekwok, ak kagochinoikab chamnyet, ak che twatei tukwok ak kechirekwok:" 
Deuteronomy12:7 oamisie eng’ oloto eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak oboiboitu eng’ tugul che oyae eunekwok, okwek ak bikwok, eng’ che kaiberurun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Amat oyai tuguk ko u ye kiyae rani, ko u ye keerei chi age tugul kochamei:" 
Deuteronomy12:9 amu tom oit kamuung’et ak borotet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’. 
Deuteronomy12:10 Ago ye kaolande eng’ Jordan, obe omeny emet ne konok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ onyaban, ak kogonok kamuung’et eng’ bunikwok tugul, che mi komoswek tugul, si omeng’isiei eng’ kalyet;" 
Deuteronomy12:11 egu anyun ole leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ konde kainennyi kotebe, oibe koba oloto tugul che ang’atok; kagochinoikwok che kibeelei, tiseiywekwok, kebeberwekwok, kagochinetab eunekwok ne kinamjin barak, ak kaarortaosiekwok tugul che oarorjini Jehovah:" 
Deuteronomy12:12 si oboiboitu eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, okwek, koboto werikwok, ak tibikwok, ak otwogikwok che murenik koboto otwogikwok che tibik, ak Lawindet ne mi kurgotikwok, amu matinyei inendet kebeberta anan borotet kobotok." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Ripgei si megoite kagochinoiguk che kibeelei eng’ oldo tugul ole igeere: 
Deuteronomy12:14 ago eng’ ole leweni Jehovah, eng’ age ne bo ortinweguk, igoite eng’ oloto kagochinoiguk che kibeelei, ak iyai eng’ oloto tugul che ang’atin." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Ago imuchi ieny ak iam banyek eng’ kurgotiguk tugul, ko u ye machei muguleldang’ung’, ko u kaberuretab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne kigogonin: amei ne ng’wan ak ne ma ng’wan, ko u cheptirgichet, ak ko u teweretiot." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Ago amat oam korotik; otumji ng’ony ko u beek. 
Deuteronomy12:17 Amat iam eng’ kurgotiguk kebebertab beguk, anan ne bo divaiguk, anan ne bo mwaniguk, anan che twatei tuguk anan che bo kechireguk, anan kaarortaosieguk alak tugul che iarortoi, anan kagochinoiguk che bo chamnyet, anan kagochinetab eunekwok ne kinamjin barak:" 
Deuteronomy12:18 ago iame tukchoto eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, inye, ak wering’ung’, ak cheptang’ung’, ak otwogeng’ung’ ne muren, ak otwogeng’ung’ ne tie, ak Lawindet ne mi kurgotiguk: ak ibaibaitu eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ kiy age tugul ne iyae euneguk." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Ripgei amebagakte Lawindet ko te isobe eng’ emeng’ung’. 
Deuteronomy12:20 Ye katesun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kiwotet, ko u ye kiiarorun, ak ile, Amache aam banyek, amu machei sobondang’ung’ banyek; imuchi iam banyek, ko u ye machei sobondang’ung’." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Ak ngot ko loo eng’ inye ole leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ konde kainennyi, ieny anyun che bo akweng’ung’ ak che bo kechireguk, che kigogonin Jehovah, ko u ye kiang’atin, ak iam eng’ kurgotiguk, ko u ye machei sobondang’ung’." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Ko u ye kiamei cheptirgichet ak teweretiot, iam anyun ko u noto: amei che ng’wonen ak che ma ng’wonen." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kobate amat iam korotik: amu sobondo korotik; amat iam sobondo koboto banyek. 
Deuteronomy12:24 Amat iam; tumji ng’ony ko u beek. 
Deuteronomy12:25 Amat iam; si komieit eng’ inye, ak eng’ lagoguk che biitu let, ye iyae noto mie eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Koek kityo iibe tuguguk che tililen che itinye, ak kaarortaosieguk, ak iwe ole leweni Jehovah:" 
Deuteronomy12:27 ak igoite kagochinoiguk che kibeelei, banyek koboto korotik, eng’ kaptisisietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: ak kirong’jin korotikab tiseiyweguk kaptisisietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak iam banyek." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Rib ak iepchi it ng’alechu tugul che kang’atin, si komieit eng’ inye ak eng’ lagoguk che biitu let agoi koigeny, ye iyae ne mie ak ne bo iman eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Ye tun ing’eto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ bororiosiek eng’ taing’ung’, eng’ ole iwendi iname ak kobunjin choto, ak imeny emenywa;" 
Deuteronomy12:30 ripgei anyun, si mariichin kot isub ichek, ye kageng’em bichoto eng’ taing’ung’; ak iteeb agobo kanamonikwak, ile Ootitoi ano bororiosiechu kanamonikwak? Si ayai agane ko u noto." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Ameyachi ko u noto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: amu kiy age tugul ne wegot eng’ Jehovah, ne wechei inendet, ko kiyachi ko u noto ichek kanamonikwak; amu beelei agot werikwak ak tibikwak kobeeljin kanamonikwak." 
Deuteronomy12:32 Orib kiy age tugul ne ang’atok oyai: amat ites, anan ichuchuch." 
Deuteronomy13:1 Ngo biit maotiondo, anan karuotitoindo, ak koborun kaborunet anan kwong’utiet," 
Deuteronomy13:2 ak koyaak kaborunonoto anan kwong’utionoto ne kimwaun, kole, Ongisub kanamonik, che kima ingen, ak ongeot choto;" 
Deuteronomy13:3 ko meepchi it ng’alekab maotiondonoto, anan karuotitoindonoto: amu tiemok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, si konai ngochame Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ mugulelwekwok komugul ak eng’ sobonwekwok komugul." 
Deuteronomy13:4 Obendate osub Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, oiywei inendet, ak orib ng’atutikyik, ak ogas it kutinnyi, oboisiechi ak onamge ak inendet." 
Deuteronomy13:5 Ak kibarei maotiondonoto anan karuotitoindonoto; amu kimwa kit ne ibeeti bik kobagakta Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ne kiimutwok omong’une emetab Misri, ne kiitiachin eng’ gotab otwognatet, kole komaasin eng’ oret ne king’atin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ iwendote. Iste anyun ko u noto yaitiet eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Ngo kaigain eng’ ung’ot ng’etab komet, anan wering’ung’, anan cheptang’ung’, anan osotiondeng’ung’ ne ichame, anan chorueng’ung’ ne ichame ko u ye ichame sobondang’ung’, kolenjin, Ngebe keot kanamonik, che kima ingen, inye, anan kwanisieguk;" 
Deuteronomy13:7 kanamonikab bororiosiek che mi tabanwekwok, che negitenen anan che looenen, koboch tabanda age ne bo ng’ony agoi tabanda age;" 
Deuteronomy13:8 ameyanji, anan igasyi; ama, ye igeer, irire, anan ibagakte, anan iuny:" 
Deuteronomy13:9 ago bar anyun inendet iman; ngo sib kobar inendet eung’ung’, ak ye ibata kobar bik tugul." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Lach eng’ koik kot kome; amu kicheng’ei komaasin imete Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne kiimutun imong’une emetab Misri, eng’ gotab otwognatet." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Ak kogas Israelik tugul, ak koiyweis, si mata koyai sogornatet ne u nito kogeny eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Ngigas keng’alale age eng’ nganasoguk, ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ imeny, kelen," 
Deuteronomy13:13 Kamong’une kwenung’ung’ bik alak che yaach, ak koba komaas bik che menyei nganasenywa, kolenji, Ongebe keot cheptalelisiek, che mongen;" 
Deuteronomy13:14 teeb anyun; ak icheng’, ak igin, igiiljige; ak keero, ngo imanit, ko u noto ng’olyondonoto, kele kogeyai kit ne kiwechei eng’ kwenung’ung’," 
Deuteronomy13:15 ibar anyun bikab nganasanato eng’ rotwetab chok, iwong’u, koboto tuguk tugul che mitei ak tuga." 
Deuteronomy13:16 Ak iyumji tugukyik tugul kwenutab oretab nganasanato, ak ibeel nganaset, ak tugukyik tugul kogesgei, ibeelji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: ak koek tulwo koigeny; ma keteechei kogeny." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Amenam eng’ eung’ung’ kiy age tugul ne kigeisto: si koweek Jehovah kobagach neregekyik che koromen, ak korirenen, ak kochamin, ak kobarain, ko u ye kigoyosiechi kwanisieguk;" 
Deuteronomy13:18 ye iepchi it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak irib ng’atutikyik tugul che kang’atin rani, iyai noto bo iman eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy14:1 O lagokab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’: amowat borwekwok, amobiorgei amu ne kame." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Amu i bororiet ne tilil eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak kigolewenin Jehovah iegu bororiennyi ne itabanat kosiir bororiosiek tugul che mi ng’ony." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Amat iam kiy age tugul ne kiwechei. 
Deuteronomy14:4 Chu tiong’ik che oame: teta, kechiriet, ng’ororiet," 
Deuteronomy14:5 ak che u teweretiot, cheptirgichet, ak chemnyogoset: ak ng’ororietab timin ak kiplelgutiet, ak kenyelet ak sitwet." 
Deuteronomy14:6 Ak tiony age tugul ne pcheotin siok, che kipcheunegei aeng’, ne itori baroi eng’ tiong’ik, oam noto." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Ago amat oam chu eng’ che itori baroi, anan che betotin siok: tambesiet, kiblengwet, keneriet, amu itori baroi ago ma pcheotin siok, ng’wonen eng’ okwek." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Ak toret, amu betotin siok ago maitori baroi, ng’wan noto eng’ okwek: amat oam banyekwak; amotwa ye kame." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Chu che oame eng’ che mi beek: oam age tugul ne tinyei kebebaik ak berik. 
Deuteronomy14:10 Ago mat oam age tugul ne matinyei kebebaik ak berik; ng’wan noto eng’ okwek. 
Deuteronomy14:11 Omuchi oam taritik alak tugul che miachen. 
Deuteronomy14:12 Ago amat oam chu: kipsichit, ak motonda, ak chelogomiet;" 
Deuteronomy14:13 chepkupkupchiet ak chesireret, ak keeret ak tugul che kergei;" 
Deuteronomy14:14 ak chepkuginik ak tugul che kergei; 
Deuteronomy14:15 ak tiondab songolik, ak keeretab kemoi, ak taritiet ne leel ne bo nyanjet, ak keeret ak che kergei;" 
Deuteronomy14:16 ak sugurut ne ming’in, ak sugurut ne o, ak sugurut ne tinyei kuinoik;" 
Deuteronomy14:17 ak chebokibabaa, ak chepsengwet, ak taritietab nyanjet;" 
Deuteronomy14:18 ak kong’onyot ak chelogomiet ak che kergei, ak chesululit, ak reresiet." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Ng’wonen eng’ okwek tuguk tugul che ing’onioti che tinyei kebebaik: magiamei. 
Deuteronomy14:20 Omuchi oam taritik alak tugul che miachen. 
Deuteronomy14:21 Amat oam ne kame inegei: imuchi igochi kipsagarindet ne mi kurgotiguk koam; anan ialdochi toondet: amu i bororiet ne tilil eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’. Amat iyoe aruetab ng’oror chegab kamet. 
Deuteronomy14:22 Igoite iman kebebertab taman ne bo iyotet tugul ne bo kesweguk che biitu eng’ mbar kenyit age tugul. 
Deuteronomy14:23 Iamisiei eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, eng’ ole leweni konde kainennyi komeny oloto, kebebertab taman ne bo beguk, ak divaiguk, ak mwaniguk, ak che twatei akweng’ung’, ak kechireguk; si inetge iywei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kotugul." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Ak ngo uuit banda eng’ inye, amu kebeberwechoto amu loo eng’ inye oloto leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ konde kainennyi, ye tun iberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’;" 
Deuteronomy14:25 ialde anyun koek fedaisiek, ak irat si iib eng’ eung’ung’, ak iwe komosta ne leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’:" 
Deuteronomy14:26 ak iale fedaisiechoto kit age tugul ne machei muguleldang’ung’, ngo tuga, anan kechirek, anan divaik, anan maiyek, anan kiy age tugul ne machei sobondang’ung’: ak iam eng’ oloto eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak ibaibaitu, inye, ak bikab gong’ung’." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Amebagakte Lawindet ne mi kurgotiguk; amu matinyei kebeberta anan borotet koboten. 
Deuteronomy14:28 Ye igesgei kenyit age tugul ne bo somok inemu kebeberwekab taman che bo rurateng’ung’ tugul eng’ kenyinoto, ak igonore oldang’ung’:" 
Deuteronomy14:29 si konyo Lawindet amu matinyei kebeberta anan borotet koboten, ak toondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosok, choto mi kurgotiguk nyo koamis ak kobiyong’so; si koberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ boisiet tugul ne bo euneguk." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Ye igesgei kenyit age tugul ne bo tisab ichob katiaget. 
Deuteronomy15:2 Ak u ni katiagonato: ingobagakta age tugul ne yaaksei tugul che kigobesendochi chitab kokwennyi; amat koyaach chitab kokwennyi anan ne tupcho; amu kagemwaita katiagetab Jehovah. 
Deuteronomy15:3 Imuchi iyaach bunotyot: ago itiach kiy age tugul ne neng’ung’ ne tinyei ne otupche. 
Deuteronomy15:4 Ago mabiitunenen kibananok; (amu iberurin iman Jehovah eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, imeny koek boroteng’ung’;)" 
Deuteronomy15:5 ngigiilgei igas kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, irib iyai ng’atutichuto tugul kang’atin rani." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Amu iberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko u ye kiiarorun: ak ibesendochi bororiosiek che chang’, ago mebeseni; ak ibou bororiosiek che chang’, ama boun." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Ngo mi kibanania kwenung’wong’ ne bo tupchosieguk, eng’ nganaset age ne mi age eng’ kurgotiguk ne mi emeng’ung’, ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko mat iuuiit muguleldang’ung’, anan imumut eung’ung’ eng’ ne otupche ne kibanania:" 
Deuteronomy15:8 ago ng’ang’ji eung’ung’ iman, igochi kobesen che yamei rerunaikyik che te che machei." 
Deuteronomy15:9 Ripgei si mabiitune muguleldang’ung’ kabwatutiet ne ya, ile, Kagonegitit kenyitab tisab, kenyinoto bo katiaget; ak koyait kondang’ung’ eng’ ne otupche ne banan, kot ko megochi kiy; ak korirji Jehovah agobo inye, ak koek noto tengekto eng’ inye." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Igochi inendet anyun iman, amat koyait muguleldang’ung’ ye igochini: amu iberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ ng’olyondoni eng’ boisioniguk tugul, ak eng’ tuguk tugul che iyae euneguk." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Amu mabetos kibananok eng’ emet agoi: kaang’atin anyun ale, Kanyol ing’ang’ji eung’ung’ iman tupcheng’ung’, ak cheguk che tinyei nyalilda, ak kibananoguk, eng’ emeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Ngealdaun tupcheng’ung’, Hebranindet ne muren anan ne kwondo, ak koboisieun kenyisiek lo; unde anyun kwo eng’ oldang’ung’ eng’ kenyitab tisab." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Ak ye kaitiach, ko mat ingwo buch:" 
Deuteronomy15:14 igochi eng’ aiyebindo che bo kechireguk, ak che bo ruanyung’ung’, ak che bo ole kitue sabibuguk: igochi anyun ko u ye kigoberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Ak ibwat ile ki i otwogin eng’ emetab Misri, ak kiitiachin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: kang’atin anyun agobo ng’olyondoni rani amu noto." 
Deuteronomy15:16 Ak ngo lenjin, Mawendi eng’ oldang’ung’; amu chamin koboto gong’ung’, amu baibai ye mi koboten;" 
Deuteronomy15:17 inam katet anyun, irute itinnyi itisyi kurget, ak koek otwogindeng’ung’ koigeny. Yachi ko u noto agine otwogindeng’ung’ ne tie." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Amat kouuiit eng’ inye noto, ye keunde kwo eng’ oldang’ung’; amu u boisiennyi, ne kiboisieun eng’ kenyisiek lo, boisietab otwogik aeng’ che nyoru melekto: ak koberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ tugul che iyae." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Itabanji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eik tugul che twatei tuga ak mengichik ak kwesik che twatei nego: ameboisie eitang’ung’ ne kitwatei, anan itil korotikab mengit ne kitwatei." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Iame choto eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ kenyit age tugul eng’ ole leweni Jehovah, inye ak bikab gong’ung’." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Ak ngo ma libwob, ngong’wali anan ngo korat, anan ngo tinyei berut age tugul ne ya, ko mat ieng’ji noto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Iame eng’ kurgotiguk: amei che ng’wonen ak che ma ng’wonen kogergeit, ko u cheptirgichet ak ko u teweretiot." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kobate amat iam korotikyik; tumji choto ng’ony ko u beek. 
Deuteronomy16:1 Rib arawetab Abib, ak iyachi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ paska: amu kiimoong’une Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ Misri kemoi eng’ arawetab Abib." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Ak igochi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ tiseiywot ne bo paska, eng’ kechirek ak eng’ tuga, eng’ ole leweni Jehovah kotebe kainennyi oloto." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Ameam makatinik che kiginde mermerek koboto paska, am eng’ betusiek tisab koboto makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, choto makatinikab nyalilda; amu kiimong’une emetab Misri eng’ kagirgiret: si ibwat betut ne kiimong’une emetab Misri kote isobe." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Amat kegeerjin mermerek eng’ komosweguk tugul eng’ betusiek tisab; amat koeekyi banyek che igoitoi koek kagochinet eng’ betut ne bo tai koskoleny. 
Deuteronomy16:5 Amat ieny che bo paska eng’ komosta age tugul ne bo kurgotiguk, ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’;" 
Deuteronomy16:6 ago eng’ ole leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kotebe kainennyi, ieny eng’ oloto che bo paska koskoleny, ye machei kororokto asista, eng’ betut ne kiimong’u eng’ Misri." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Ak iyo si iam eng’ ole leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: ak iweege karon iwe ole mi emaisieguk. 
Deuteronomy16:8 Am betusiek lo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek: ak koek eng’ betutab tisab tuiyetab kaming’inetab ge eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; amat iyai boisio age tugul betunoto. 
Deuteronomy16:9 Iityigei wigisiek tisab: koboch betut ne ketau inam chepkesweng’ung’ iges bek, iit wigisiek tisab." 
Deuteronomy16:10 Ak iripchi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ igorta ne bo wigisiek eng’ kagochinet ne kigoitoi eng’ chamnyet, ne igochini, che te che kiiberurun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’:" 
Deuteronomy16:11 ak ibaibaitu eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, inye, ak wering’ung’, ak cheptang’ung’, ak otwogindeng’ung’ ne muren, ak otwogindeng’ung’ ne tie, ak Lawindet ne mi kurgotiguk, ak toondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosoget, che mi koboten, eng’ ole leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kotebe kainennyi." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Ak ibwat ile ki i otwogindet eng’ Misri: rib anyun konetisiosiechu ak iyai. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Iyae igortab keriosiek betusiek tisab, ye kaiyum tuguk che bunu ruanyung’ung’ ak che bunu ole kitue sabibuguk:" 
Deuteronomy16:14 ak ibaibaitu eng’ igortang’ung’, inye, ak wering’ung’, ak cheptang’ung’, ak otwogeng’ung’ ne muren, ak otwogindeng’ung’ ne tie, ak Lawindet, ak toondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosoget, che mi kurgotiguk." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Ripchi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, igorta eng’ betusiek tisab eng’ ole leweni Jehovah: amu iberurun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ tuguk tugul che inyoru, ak boisionik tugul che bo euneguk, ak ibaibaitu mising’." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Ingobwa mureniguk tugul taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ konyil somok eng’ kenyit eng’ ole leweni inendet; eng’ igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ak eng’ igortab wigisiek, ak eng’ igortab keriosiek: amat kobwa taitab Jehovah ak eut buch:" 
Deuteronomy16:17 ingogoito chi age tugul ko u ye imuchi, ne te kaberuretab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne kigonin." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Inde kiruogik ak bounik kurgotiguk tugul, che konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ko u ortinweguk: si koruokyi bik eng’ kiruoget ne bo imanda." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Amemaas kiruoget: ametiytii bik: anan itaach che bo kagaigaet; amu kerei konyekab che ng’omen tuguk che bo kagaigaet, ak kogunuri ng’alekab che bo imanda." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Isub che bo imanda kityo, si isob, ak inyaban emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Amat iminji ketit age tugul ne bo Asera ole negite kaptisisietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne tun iteekyinige." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Amat iteech toloita agine; ne wechei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’. 
Deuteronomy17:1 Ameeng’ji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eito, anan kechiriet, ne tinyei berut, anan kiy age tugul ne ya: amu wechei noto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Ngo biitune kwenung’ung’, eng’ kurgotiguk alak tugul che konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne muren, anan kwondo, ne yaei ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kobistoe arorutiennyi," 
Deuteronomy17:3 ak kwo koot kanamonik, kogutung’ji, anan asista, anan arawet, anan age tugul ne bo chang’indab kipsengwet, ne ma ang’at;" 
Deuteronomy17:4 ak kemwaun, ak igas, isiach anyun eng’ kagiiletab ge, ak ngo bo iman noto, ak ko u noto kioto, kele, kiyaei ne te noto ne kiwechei eng’ Israel;" 
Deuteronomy17:5 imutu anyun murenonoto anan kobogoriondonoto ne kayai kioto ya, konyo kurgotiguk, chichoto anan kobogoriondonoto; ak inyo ilach eng’ koik kot kome." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Kibarei chichoto eng’ ng’alekab baorinik aeng’ anan ko somok; magibarei eng’ baornatetab chito agenge. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Ingosib kolach baorinichoto kibarei, yeityo kolach bik tugul. Iste anyun ko u noto yaitiet eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy17:8 Ngo biit ng’olyot ne uui eng’ kiruoget ne temenen, ne bo korotik eng’ korotik, ak ng’olyot eng’ ng’olyot, ak biret eng’ biret, che kaek kabeletab ge eng’ kurgotiguk: ing’eet anyun, iwe ole leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’;" 
Deuteronomy17:9 ak inyo ole mi tisiik Lawik, ak kiruogindet ne mi eng’ betusiechoto: ak iteeb; ak koborun ole teptoi kiruoget." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Si iyai anyun ko u ole teptoi ng’alekwak, che iborun eng’ komosta ne leweni Jehovah; si irib iyai ko u tugul che inetin:" 
Deuteronomy17:11 ko u ng’olyotab ng’atutiet ne inetin bichoto, ak ko u kiruoget ne mwaun, iyai ko u noto: amemaste eng’ kiruoget ne iborun, iwe eutab tai anan katam." 
Deuteronomy17:12 Ak chito ne yaei eng’ losetab ge ne magasei ng’alekab tisiindet ne tononi koboisiei eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, anan kiruogindet, komeei chichoto: ak iiste yaitiet eng’ Israel." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Ak kogas bik tugul, ak koiywei, si mata koyai eng’ losetab ge kogeny." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Ye kaiit emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak inam kobunjin, ak imeny oloto; ak ile, Kande laitoriat koboiywa, ko u bororiosiek tugul che mi komoswekyuk;" 
Deuteronomy17:15 inde anyun iman koek laitoriat koboun, inendet ne leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: inde age eng’ tupchosieguk koek laitoriat ne boun: amat inde bunotyot ko boun, ne ma ne otupche." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Ago amat kotesyigei mbartanyisiek, anan kogochi bik koweektagei Misri, si kotes mbartanyisiek: amu kimwawok Jehovah kole, Amata oweektage oranato kogeny." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Amat kotes osotik, si magusgong’ muguleldanyi: anan kotesyigei feda ak tahabu che chang’." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Ak ye kagotebe ng’echeretab bororiennyi, kosirjigei ng’atutioni konde bukuit, kosub noto tinyei tisiik Lawik:" 
Deuteronomy17:19 ak kotepto, ak kosoman kote kosobei: si konetgei koiywei Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, korib ng’alek tugul che bo ng’atutioni ak konetisiosiechu, koyai:" 
Deuteronomy17:20 si meetgei eng’ muguleldanyi kosiir tupchosiekyik, ak komasta kometo ng’atutiet, kwo eutab tai anan ne bo katam: si kobiit kochang’a betusiekyik eng’ laitornatennyi, inendet ak lagokyik, eng’ kwenutab Israel." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Manyoru kebeberta anan borotet koboto Israel tisiik Lawik, oret komugul ne bo Lawi: amei kagochinoikab Jehovah che bunei mat kigochin, ak borotennyi." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Ak manyoru borotet eng’ tupchosiekwak: borotenywa Jehovah, ko u ye kimwachi." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Egu ni melektab tisiik che konu bik, eng’ ichek che igoitoi tiseiywek, ngo eito anan kechir, ingogochi tisiindet kusto, ak tagilgilik tuwai, ak moet." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Tongoanikab beguk, divaiguk, ak mwaniguk, ak kororik che bo tai che bo kechireguk, igochi inendet choto." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Amu kalewen Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ inendet eng’ ortinweguk tugul, kotonon si kobois eng’ kainetab Jehovah, inendet ak werikyik koigeny." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Ak ngo bun Lawindet kurgotiguk alak tugul eng’ Israel tugul, ole menyei, ak konyo eng’ chamnyennyi tugul ne bo sobondanyi ole leweni Jehovah;" 
Deuteronomy18:7 ingobois anyun eng’ kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, ko u ye yaei tupchosiekyik tugul, Lawik che tonondos eng’ oloto eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Ingoam kebeberwek che aechin, koboto che nyorune aldaetab tuguk che bo kwandanyi." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Ye kaiit emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko menetgei iyai tuguchoto yaachen yaei bororiosiechoto." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Amat kobiit eng’ okwek ne igoitoi werinnyi anan cheptanyi kobun mat, anan ne boisie ng’orset, anan kipsogeiyot, anan ne isogisiei, anan bonindet," 
Deuteronomy18:11 anan ne abusisiei, anan ne ng’alali ak oik, anan bonindet, anan ne ng’alali ak che kigobek." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Amu wechei Jehovah chi age tugul ne yaei tuguchu: onei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ichek eng’ taing’ung’ amu tuguchu wechei. 
Deuteronomy18:13 Egu ne igesunotgei eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’. 
Deuteronomy18:14 Amu bororiosiechu tun iluule, koyani che boisie sogeinotet, ak che ng’orsei: ago ma chamun inye Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ iyai choto." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Tun ing’eetun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ maotiot eng’ che otupche, eng’ kwenung’ung’, ne u ane; ogas it inendet;" 
Deuteronomy18:16 ko u tugul che kiimach eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ betutab tuiyet eng’ Horeb, ile, Amat kota agas kogeny kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, anan kota ageer mai o kogeny, si mamei." 
Deuteronomy18:17 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Kamwa komie choto kamwa." 
Deuteronomy18:18 Ang’eetyini maotiot eng’ tupchosiekwak, ne u inye; ak ande ng’alekyuk kutinnyin, ak komwachi ichek tugul che ang’ate inendet." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Ak age tugul ne mamachei kogas ng’alekyuk che tun mwaei eng’ kainennyu, ko tun ateebe inendet." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Ago maotiot ne mwaei ng’olyo eng’ losetab ge eng’ kainennyu, ne ma ang’at inendet komwa, anan ne ng’alali eng’ kainaikab cheptalelisiek, komei maotiondonoto." 
Deuteronomy18:21 Ak ngile eng’ muguleldang’ung’, Kinae nee ng’olyot ne ma mwa Jehovah?" 
Deuteronomy18:22 Ye kang’alal maotiot eng’ kainetab Jehovah, ngo mayaak kioto, anan kosulda, ko noto ne ma mwa Jehovah: kimwa maotiot eng’ losetab ge amat iywei inendet." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Ye kaisto Jehovah bororiosiek, ne nenywa emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak inam emenywa, ak imeny nganasokwak, ak gorikwak;" 
Deuteronomy19:2 itabanjigei nganasok somok eng’ kwenutab emeng’ung’ ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kobunjin. 
Deuteronomy19:3 Chopchigei oret ak ipche kiwotosiekab emeng’ung’, ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kobunjin, koek kebeberwek somok, si komuch komwechi chi age tugul ne karumis." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Ni ng’olyotab chito ne karumis, ne kamwechi oloto si kosob: inendet ne kabar chitab kokwennyi ama nai, ne kima kowechei inendet eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto;" 
Deuteronomy19:5 ko u ye kawa chito timdo koeb ketit koboto chitab kokwennyi, ak ye kasut aiywet komachei koeb ketit, ak kochun aiywet eng’ kungit, ak kochililji aiywet chitab kokwennyi, ak kome; ingomwechi anyun age eng’ nganasochoto si kosob:" 
Deuteronomy19:6 si mata kosub ne igeeri korotik rumindet, kota kolaldos neregekyik, ak konam, amu loo oret, ak kokwer kome; ago kima konyoljin meet amu kima kowechei inendet eng’ tai." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Kang’atin anyun amu noto, ale, Itabanjigei nganasok somok." 
Deuteronomy19:8 Ak ngobaraun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kiwoteng’ung’, ko u ye kigoyosiechi kwanisieguk, ak kogonin emet komugul ne kiiarorji kwanisieguk kole igochin;" 
Deuteronomy19:9 ngirib ng’atutioni komugul, ne kang’atin rani ak iyai, icham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak iwendote ortinwekyik kotugul; ites anyun nganasok alak somok, koboto choto somok:" 
Deuteronomy19:10 si ma kitumda korotik che matinyei tengek eng’ emeng’ung’ ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koek borotet, si manamin korotichoto." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Ago ngo wech chi chitab kokwennyi, ak kosapchi, ak kong’eetyi kokwer kome; ak komwechi nganaset age eng’ chuto:" 
Deuteronomy19:12 koyokto anyun boisiek che bo nganasennyi kimut eng’ oloto kamwechi, nyo konde eutab ne yaaktoi korotik, si kobar." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Ama, ye igeer, irire, ago iste korotik che matinyei tengek eng’ Israel, si komieit eng’ inye." 
Deuteronomy19:14 Amenaktae kiwotetab chitab kokweng’ung’, ne kiindoi bik che bo keny, eng’ boroteng’ung’ ne inyabani, eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kobunjin." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Amat kobaorianji chi baoriat agenge eng’ tengek age tugul, anan eng’ chalwok age tugul, eng’ lelut age tugul ne kayai: kigimiti ng’olyot eng’ ng’alekab baorinik aeng’ anan ko somok." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Ngo ng’eet baoriat ne ma bo iman kobaorianji chi age tugul agobo yaitiet; 
Deuteronomy19:17 ingotononso anyun ichek tuwai, choto ibelegei, eng’ taitab Jehovah, eng’ taitab tisiik ak kiruogik che mi eng’ betusiechoto;" 
Deuteronomy19:18 ak kogin kiruogik kogiiljigei: ak, ngo ma bo iman baoriat, ak kabaorianji ne tupcho eng’ lembech;" 
Deuteronomy19:19 oyachi anyun, ko u ye kata machei koyachi ne tupcho: iste ko u noto anyun yaitiet eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Ak kogas che kong’et, ak koiyweis, si mata koyai yaitiet ne u noto eng’ kwenung’ung’ kogeny." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Ama, ye igeer, irire; kigeere sobondo sobondo, konda eng’ konda, keldet eng’ keldet, eut eng’ eut, keldo eng’ keldo." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Ye iwe obarge ak buniguk, ak iro mbartanyisiek, ak karisiek, ak bik che chang’ kosiirok, ko mat iywei: amu mi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koboten, ne kiimutun imong’u eng’ emetab Misri." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Ak ye iit ole mi luget, korik anyun tisiindet ak kong’alalji bik," 
Deuteronomy20:3 ak kolenji ichek, Ogaso, ee Israel, korikyi rani luget obarge ak bounikwok: amogochi mugulelwekwok kotanuiso; amoiywei anan orukrugense, among’ komuok bichoto;" 
Deuteronomy20:4 amu wendi kobotok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, koyai boriet agobo okwek, eng’ bunikwok, kosoruok:" 
Deuteronomy20:5 yeityo kong’alalji bik kandoik, kolenji, Ng’o ne kateech got ne leel, ama igochi Kamuktaindet? Ingoweek kwo gonnyi, si mame eng’ boriet, ak kogochi chito age Kamuktaindet gonnyi." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Ng’o ne kimin mbaretab sabibuk, ak tomo kobut logoekyik? Ingoweek kwo gonnyi, si mame eng’ boriet, ak koboisie chito age logoekyik?" 
Deuteronomy20:7 Ng’o ne kigigochi chepto, ak tom kotun? Ingoweek kwo gonnyi, si mame eng’ boriet, ak kotun age cheboto." 
Deuteronomy20:8 Ingong’alalji kandoik bik kogeny kolenji, Ng’o ne nyogor ne machei kotanui? Ingoweek kwo gonnyi, si machootyo mugulelwekab tupchosiekyik ko u nenyi." 
Deuteronomy20:9 Ak ye kagoges kandoik ng’alekwak eng’ bik, konde anyun kandoichoto, kiptainikab lugosiek kondochi bik." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Ye irikyi nganaset ne obarege, iteebe kalyet korok." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Ak ngo wolun kalyet, ak koyatun, koegu anyun bik tugul che bo nganasanato otwogiguk ak kootin." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Ak ngo macham koyai kalyet koboten, ago komach koyai luget koboten, iyiem anyun nganasanato:" 
Deuteronomy20:13 ak ye kagondeun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ nganasanato euneguk, ibar muren age tugul ne mi oloto eng’ rotwetab chok:" 
Deuteronomy20:14 ago luul kobunjin gotab kor, ak lagok, ak tuga, ak tugul che mi nganaset, ak tuguk tugul che mi oloto; ak iam tugukab buniguk che kagonin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Yachi ko u noto nganasok tugul che looen mising’ eng’ inye, che ma nganasokab bororiosiechu." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Ago eng’ nganasok che bo bororiosiechu che konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koek borotet, ko meunde kiy age tugul ne mi yoto kosob:" 
Deuteronomy20:17 ago iwong’u kot ko mang’et; Hitik, Amorik, Kananik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik; ko u ye kigong’atin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’:" 
Deuteronomy20:18 si mainetin isub iyai tugukwak tugul che kiwechei, che kigoyachi kanamonikwak; ngo yai ko u noto ko kochalwogenji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Ye kaiyiem nganaset betusiek che chang’, imache ibar iluul, ko mat ieb katikyik ing’em; amu imuchi iam che bo ketichoto; ameluul anyun; amu tos chi ketitab timin, ne tos iyiem?" 
Deuteronomy20:20 Kobate ketik che ingen ile magiamei, iluul anyun ketichoto, ing’em; ing’ote irimet nganasanato obaregei, agoi kolul." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Ngo biit musto eng’ timin ne kigibarei eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kobunjin, ama kinai ne kibarei;" 
Deuteronomy21:2 komanda anyun boisieguk ak kiruogiguk, ak kokwa agoi nganasok che mi komoswek tugul kong’eete ole mi musto:" 
Deuteronomy21:3 ingokweri boisiekab nganaset ne negite musto, roriat ne bunu akwet ne tomo kobois, ne tomo keratyi chogit;" 
Deuteronomy21:4 ingokweri boisiekab nganasanato roriandanato kwo atebwet ne roote beek, ne tomo kibat, anan kegol, ak koiiny kaatitab roriandanato eng’ atebwonoto:" 
Deuteronomy21:5 yeityo korikta yoto tisiik werikab Lawi; amu choto che kilewen Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koboisiechi ak koberuris eng’ kainetab Jehovah; ak tebyei ko u ng’olyondenywa kit age tugul ne kagimoitos ak biret age tugul: 
Deuteronomy21:6 yeityo koun eunekwak boisiek tugul che bo nganasanato negite musto, eng’ baragutab roriandanato kagiiny kaatit eng’ atebwet." 
Deuteronomy21:7 Ak kowol kole, Ma tumda eunekyok korotichu, ama keer konyekyok." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Ee Jehovah, nyochi kaat biguk Israel, che kiitiach, amengotebe kwenutab biguk Israel korotik che matinyei tengek. Ak kobiit nyoetab kaat amu tengektab korotik." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Iste ko u noto anyun korotik che matinyei tengek eng’ kwenung’ung’, ye keyai ne nyolu eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Ye kewe kobarge ak buniguk, ak konde euneguk Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak imut koek luulenik," 
Deuteronomy21:11 ak ngigeer eng’ kwenutab luulenichoto kwondo ne kararan, ak imach inendet, imutyigei koek osotiondeng’ung’;" 
Deuteronomy21:12 imut anyun kwo gong’ung’; ak konem metinnyi, ak korar siokyik;" 
Deuteronomy21:13 ak kolakta ngoroik che kigiluuldoi, kotebe gong’ung’ anyun, korirji kwandanyi ak kamet arawet agenge komugul: ak ye ibata noto iwe ole mi iegu manong’otiondennyi, ak koek inendet osotiondeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Ak ngo mecham inendet, iunde kwo, ole machei; ago amat ialde eng’ siling’isiek, ameyachi ko u ye iyachini otwogindet, amu koinyere inendet." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Ngo tinyei chi osotik aeng’, ngo chamanet age, ko chepkinyariat age, ak kigosikyi lagok tuwai, chamanet ak chepkinyariat; ak ngo kiisib kosich chepkinyariat werit;" 
Deuteronomy21:16 ko eng’ betut ne pchechin chichoto werikyik tugukyik, ko mat kogochi koeet weritab chamanet kosiir weroto o kisichei chepkinyariat:" 
Deuteronomy21:17 ago iyani kole, werit ne o, weritab chepkinyariat, ye igochin inendet kebeberwek aeng’ eng’ tugul che tinyei: amu inendet taunetab kimnatennyi chechik tuguk che nyoljin werit ne o." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Ngotinyei chi werit ne uui met ak ko ngelelio, ne magase it kutitab kwandanyi, anan kamet, agot ngotigon ko magase it;" 
Deuteronomy21:19 konam anyun kwandanyi ak kamennyi, ak komutyi boisiekab nganasennyi, agoi ormarichetab oldanyi;" 
Deuteronomy21:20 kolenji boisiekab nganasennyi, Uui met werinnyo ak ko ngelelio magasech it: kipkeiya, ak ko kibogitio." 
Deuteronomy21:21 Ak kolage koik murenik tugul che bo nganasennyi, agoi kome: iste anyun yaitiet ko u noto eng’ kwenung’ung’; ak kogas Israel tugul, ak koiywei." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Ak ngo yai chi tengekto ne nyoljin meet, ak kebar, ak isonginin eng’ ketit;" 
Deuteronomy21:23 ko mat kotebe musto ketit barak agoi koeech, ago kanyol itub eng’ betunoto; amu chubot eng’ Kamuktaindet ne kigartati; si meng’wanit inye emeng’ung’ ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koek borotet." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Ama, ye igeer tetab ne otupche anan kechiriennyi kobetoti, iung’egei: kwerichi iman ne otupche." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Ak ngo manegitenen ne otupche, anan ngo mengen inendet, igetu anyun konyo gong’ung’, ak kotebe oldang’ung’ agoi kocheng’an ne otupche, ak iweekyi." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Ak iyai ko u noto eng’ sigiriennyi; ak iyai ko u noto eng’ ngoriennyi; yai ko u noto anyun eng’ kiy age tugul ne kabet ne bo tupcheng’ung’, ne kabetyi, ago kainyoru: ameuny ge." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Ama, ye igeer sigirietab tupcheng’ung’ anan tennyi ne kagobut eng’ oret taban, iung’egei: kanyol itoret kong’eet." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Amat kolaach kobogoriondo che bo murenik, anan kolaach mureno ngoriet ne bo kobogorio: amu age tugul ne yaei tuguchuto, ko wegot eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy22:6 Ngigeer keswetab taritiet eng’ oret, eng’ ket age tugul anan eng’ ng’ony, komi arek anan koik, kosiebei kamet arek, anan koik, ko mat iib kamet koboto arek:" 
Deuteronomy22:7 kanyol iunde kamet kwo, ago imuchi iipchigei arek; si komieit eng’ inye, ak kochang’a betusieguk." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Ye iteech got ne leel, itegel got barak iyiem kotuiyo, si meipchi gong’ung’ korotik, ngo chirkwin chi eng’ oloto." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Ameminji mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk keswek che bo ortinwek aeng’ che terotin: si ma kiistoenen tugul, keswek che kiigol, ak ruratetab mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Ameratyine eito ak sigiriet ye ibati mbaret. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Amelaach ngoriet ne kigiburuch kororikab kechirek ak katanit. 
Deuteronomy22:12 Napchi sawoinik ngorieng’ung’ ne itugegei, eng’ tabanwekyik ang’wan." 
Deuteronomy22:13 Ngotun chi osotiot, ak kwo ole mi, ak kowech," 
Deuteronomy22:14 ak komwaita ng’alekab tewernatet agobo inendet, ak kotaam eng’ ng’alek che yaach, kole, Kiatun osotiondoni, ak ye kingarikyi, ko mageerji tuguk che iboru bergeinatet:" 
Deuteronomy22:15 koipchi anyun kwandab cheboto ak kamet boisiek eng’ ormarichetab nganaset tuguk che iboru bergeinatetab cheboto: 
Deuteronomy22:16 yeityo kolenji kwanitab cheboto boisiek. Kiagochi murenoni cheptanyu kotun, ago kowech; ma cham;" 
Deuteronomy22:17 ogeero, kigotewer, kole, Mageerji cheptang’ung’ tuguk che iboru bergeinatet; ago chu tuguk che iboru bergeinatetab cheptanyu. Yeityo koito ngoriet eng’ taitab boisiekab nganaset." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Konam anyun boisiekab nganasanato murenonoto kotigon; 
Deuteronomy22:19 ak komage inendet sekelisiek bogol che bo feda, si kogochi kwandab cheboto, amu kiitaam eng’ ng’alek che yaach bergeiyat ne bo Israel: ak egu osotiondennyi: maimuchi kobagakta eng’ betusiekyik tugul." 
Deuteronomy22:20 Ago ngo bo iman ng’olyondonito, kele ma kinyorji cheboto tuguk che iboru bergeinatet:" 
Deuteronomy22:21 kimut anyun cheboto agoi kurgetab gotab kwandanyi, ak kolage inendet koik murenikab nganasennyi kot kome: amu kiyai abusnatet eng’ Israel, amu kiyai kugoinatet eng’ gotab kwandanyi: iste anyun ko u noto yaitiet eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Nginyoru chi ne ibegei ak kwondo ne kigitunji chito age, kebarei tuwai, chichoto koboto kwonyoto; iste anyun ko u noto yaitiet eng’ Israel." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Ngo mi chepto ne bergeiyat ne kigeyachi koito, ak konyorji chi nganaset ak koruiyo ak inendet;" 
Deuteronomy22:24 omutu tuwai kobwa kurgetab nganaset, ak olage koik kobek: cheboto, amu ma waach, ago kimi nganaset: ak murenonoto, amu kagotewer osotiotab chitab kokwennyi: iste anyun ko u noto yaitiet eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Ago ngo nyor mureno chepto eng’ timin, noto kigeyachi koito, ak kosuub, koipgei; kebarei murenonoto inegei:" 
Deuteronomy22:26 ago meite kiy cheboto; matinyei cheboto tengekto ne nyoljin meet: amu u chito ne kang’eetyi chitab kokwennyi ak kobar, u noto agine ng’olyondonito:" 
Deuteronomy22:27 amu kinyorji timin; ak kiwaach cheboto kiga keyachi koito, ama biit chi ne kisor." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Ngonyor mureno chepto ne bergeiyat, ne tom kigochi chi, ak kosuub, ak koruiyo tuwai, ak ngenyor;" 
Deuteronomy22:29 ingogochi murenonoto karuiyo tuwai kwandab cheboto sekelisiek konom che bo feda, ak koek osotiondennyi, amu koitewer; maimuchi kobagakta agoi." 
Deuteronomy22:30 Amat konam chi osotiotab kwandanyi, anan kong’any ach ngoritab kwandanyi." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetab Jehovah chito ne kigitui kitit, anan ne kigitil taritiennyi." 
Deuteronomy23:2 Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetab Jehovah chito ne bo sarbuch; amat komanda tuiyetab Jehovah agoi ibinda ne bo taman. 
Deuteronomy23:3 Amat komanda ole mi tuiyetab Jehovah Amonindet anan Moabindet; amat komanda ole mi tuiyetab Jehovah agot eng’ ibinda ne bo taman eng’ tilionutikwak agoi koigeny: 
Deuteronomy23:4 amu kima torogunenok makatinik ak beek ye kiomong’une Misri; amu kial Balaam weritab Beor konyo eng’ Petor ne mi Mesopotamia konyo kochupten. 
Deuteronomy23:5 Ago kima kasyi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ Balaam; ago kiiweech Jehovah Kamuktiandeng’ung’ chubisiet koek kaberuret, amu kichamin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Amat icheng’ kalyenywa anan borotenywa eng’ betusieguk tugul koigeny. 
Deuteronomy23:7 Amewech Edomindet; amu ng’etab kamet: amewech Misrindet; amu ki i toondet eng’ emennyi. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Ingomanda ole mi tuiyetab Jehovah lagokwak che sichei eng’ ibinda ne bo somok. 
Deuteronomy23:9 Ye kebokte nganaset obarge ak buniguk, iribege anyun yaitiet age tugul." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Ngo mi chi age tugul eng’ okwek ne ng’wan amu noto konyor kemoi, komanda anyun sang’utab nganaset, amat konyo nganaset orit:" 
Deuteronomy23:11 ago ingoungei koskoleny, ak ye kagororokta asista konyo nganaset orit." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Nyolu agine itinye ole imasyini eng’ sang’utab nganaset: 
Deuteronomy23:13 ak mie itinye kit ne u mogombet koboto kariguk; si ye imache imaste, ibale ole imasyini, ak ye kaigesu itub:" 
Deuteronomy23:14 amu wendote Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kwenutab nganaseng’ung’, kosorun, ak koon buniguk eng’ taing’ung’; ingotililit anyun nganaseng’ung’ amu noto: si mageerjin kiy ne ma tilil, eng’ inye, ak koweek kometen." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Amat iweekyi otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi ne kimweune: 
Deuteronomy23:16 ingomeny koboten, eng’ kwenung’ung’, eng’ ole leweni eng’ age ne bo kurgotiguk ole machei: amat ius." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Amat kobiit chepkugonio eng’ tibikab Israel, anan ne isubi biteetab Sodomik eng’ werikab Israel." 
Deuteronomy23:18 Ameibu melektab chepkugoniot, anan che kiale seset kobwa gotab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ kaarorunet age tugul: amu wechei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ choto tuwai." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Amebesendochi tupcheng’ung’ ile tun inyorune keljinet; besendab siling’isiek, besendab amitwogik, anan besendab kiy age tugul ne kibesendoi si kenyorune keljinet." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Imuchi ibesendochi bunotyot si tun inyorune keljinet; ago mebesendochi ne otupche ile tun inyorune keljinet: si koberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ tuguk tugul che iyae eng’ eung’ung’, eng’ emet ne iwendi iname." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Ye iarorji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kaarorunet, ko mat igaegei: amu magenen Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kioto iman; si maek tengekto eng’ inye." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Ago ngo ma iarorji kiy, ko maegu tengek eng’ inye." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Rib iyai ne kemwa eng’ kuting’ung’; ko u ye kiarorji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, kagochinetab chamnyet, ne kaiaroru eng’ kuting’ung’." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Ye iwe mbaretab sabibuk ne bo chitab kokweng’ung’, iam anyun logoek agoi ibiye ko u ye imache; ago amat inde king’ung’." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Ye iwe mbaretab chitab kokweng’ung’ ne mi bek, imuchi ibach bek; ago amenamji chepkeswet ile iges bekab chitab kokweng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Ngotunis chi, ama nyor osotiondennyi chamet eng’ tainnyi, amu kageerji chichoto kiy ne ya kwonyoto, kosirji anyun siretab besiet, konde eunnyi, ak koon eng’ gonnyi." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Ak ye kagomanda eng’ gotab chichoto, komuchi koek osotiotab chito age." 
Deuteronomy24:3 Ak ngo wech inendet manong’otiot ne bo let, ak kosirji siretab besiet, ak konde eunnyi, yeityo koon eng’ gonnyi, anan ngo me manong’otiot ne bo let, ne kiitun inendet;" 
Deuteronomy24:4 ko mat komut manong’otiondennyi ni ki bo tai, ne kionei inendet, kole koek osotiondennyi kogeny, ko kagong’wanit; amu wegot noto eng’ taitab Jehovah: amat igochi emet koyai tengek, ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koek borotet." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Ye kagotunis chito, ko mat kwo luget, anan kiim eng’ boit age tugul: kotebi eng’ ga kenyit agenge, si kobiit kobaibai osotiondennyi ne kogotun." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Amat koib chi koitab bai anan isiet kobunji kaarorunet: amu ngo nam ko u noto ko kabunji kaarorunonoto sobondab chi. 
Deuteronomy24:7 Ngenyor chi ne kachor tupchennyi age ne bo lagokab Israel, ak koyachi ko u otwogin, anan koalda, ingome anyun chorindonoto: iste ko u noto anyun yaitiet eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Ripge eng’ koroitab mogondosik, rib komie eng’ kagiiletab ge, ak iyai ko u tugul che inetin tisiik Lawik: ko u ye kiang’at ichek, orib anyun si oyai ko u noto." 
Deuteronomy24:9 Ibwat kit ne kiita Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ Miriam, eng’ oret ye kiomong’u eng’ Misri." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Ye ibesendochi chitab kokweng’ung’ kiy age tugul, ko mat iwe gonnyi inemu kit ne iname besendo." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Tonone sang’, inye ne iyaaksei, si koibun konyo sang’ kit ne iname besendo." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Ak ngo kibanania chichoto, komat iru itinye kinnyi ne iname besendo:" 
Deuteronomy24:13 iweekyi kinnyi ko karorokto asista, si kobiit kotugegei ye ruei ak koberurin: ak koek noto imanda eng’ inye eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Amesastae otwogindet ne nyoru melekto ne kibanania ne nyalili, ngo age eng’ che otupche, anan ngo bo bunotik che mi emeng’ung’ eng’ kurgotiguk:" 
Deuteronomy24:15 igochi inendet melektanyi eng’ betunnyi ne bo melekto; ameng’ kororokto asista kotom igochi; amu kibanania, ak imang’u choto: si marirji Jehovah agobo inye, ak koek tengekto eng’ inye." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Magibarei kwanisiek amu lagok, anan kebar lagok amu kwanisiek: kibarei chi age tugul inegei agobo tengektanyi." 
Deuteronomy24:17 Amemaas kiruogetab toondet, anan ne matinyei kwanda; anan iname besendo ngorietab mosoget:" 
Deuteronomy24:18 ago ibwat ile ki i otwogin eng’ Misri, kiitiachin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ oloto: kang’atin anyun amu noto ale iyai kiito." 
Deuteronomy24:19 Ye igesisie eng’ mbareng’ung’, ak iutie ratutikab bek eng’ mbar, ko mat iweege iwe iibu: ingobunji toondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosoget: si kobiit koberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ tuguk tugul che iname eung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Ye itui logoekab emitiguk ko megetyinotegei iturote eng’ temenik: ingobunji toondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosoget." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Ye ibute logoekab mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk, ko megetyigei iturote: ingobunji toondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosoget." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Ak ibwat ile ki i otwogindet eng’ emetab Misri: kang’atin anyun eng’ noto ale iyai ng’olyondonito. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Ngo biit tiiyet eng’ bik, ak kobwa kapkiruok, ak koruokyi kiruogik; koiityi anyun ne bo imanda imanda, ak kogikyi ne ya;" 
Deuteronomy25:2 ak ngegeer kole nyoljin chichoto ya biret, komwachi kiruogindet koru, ak kebir eng’ tainnyi, ko u koitet ne yamegei ak yaitiennyi." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Imuchi kobir birutik artam, amat kotes: amu ngo siir choto ak kobir birutik che chang’, koek tupcheng’ung’ ne sasat eng’ inye." 
Deuteronomy25:4 Amerat kutitab eito ye tiechei bek koborei. 
Deuteronomy25:5 Ngo meng’jindos che tupcho, ak ngo me age, ama sich werit, ko mat kotun chi ne bo sang’ ne kamee manong’otiot: ingondi ne tupcho ak koek manong’otiondennyi, ak komutyigei koek osotiondennyi, ak koyachi kwonyoto ne kota yachin ng’etab kamet, manong’otiotab kwonyoto." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Ak ingetochi werit ne bo tai ne isib kosichei kwonyoto, kainetab ng’etab kam ne kime, si maburburenok kainennyi eng’ Israel." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Ak ngo mamachei chichoto kondi osotiotab ng’etab kamet, ingowo anyun noto bo ng’etab kam ole mi boisiek eng’ ormarich, kwo kolenji, Kaesio bamuru kotononji ne tupcho kainennyi eng’ Israel, kaesio koyaiywa ne nyoljin tupchetab manong’otionnyu." 
Deuteronomy25:8 Yeityo koguur boisiekab nganasennyi chichoto, ak kong’alalsechi: ak ngo tonon kole, Machame andi;" 
Deuteronomy25:9 kwo osotiotab ng’etab kamet eng’ taitab boisiek, ak kocher kweiyotab chichoto, ak kong’utyi togennyi; ak kowol mosoganato kole, Ingeyachi ko u noto chito ne esioi kolal matab ng’etab kamet." 
Deuteronomy25:10 Ak keguure kainennyi eng’ Israel, Gotab inendet ne kigitiage kweiyot." 
Deuteronomy25:11 Ngo birgei bik, ak kwo osotiotab age kosor manong’otiondennyi eng’ ne birei, ak kosapchi konam kitik:" 
Deuteronomy25:12 til anyun eunnyi, amat irire." 
Deuteronomy25:13 Amat inde loleng’ung’ ratilisiek che terotin, ne o ak ne ming’in." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Ametepte eng’ gong’ung’ tuguk che terotin che kigere bek, ne o ak ne ming’in." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Tepte ratilit ne nyolu ne bo imanda; tepte kit ne kigere bek ne nyolu ne bo imanda: si kochang’a betusieguk eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’. 
Deuteronomy25:16 Amu wechei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ tugul che yaei tuguk che u choto, tugul che yaei che ma bo iman." 
Deuteronomy25:17 Ibwat kit ne kimwaun Amalek eng’ oret ye kiobunu Misri; 
Deuteronomy25:18 ko u ye kinyorjin oret, ak kobar biguk che kimi let, tugul che ki nyalulyotin che kiletu, ye kinegit itanui, ak ye kiga ing’et mising’; ama iywei Amalek Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Ye tun kagogonin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kamuung’et eng’ buniguk tugul che mi komosweguk tugul, eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koek boroteng’ung’ kobunjin, ibukte anyun kabwatetab Amalek eng’ kureretab kipsengwet; amat iutie." 
Deuteronomy26:1 Ak ye kaiit emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koek borotet kobunjin, ak imeny oloto;" 
Deuteronomy26:2 inam anyun eng’ tongoanik tugul che bo logoek che bo emet che iibu eng’ emeng’ung’ ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; inde kitonget, iib koba ole leweni Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kole konde kainennyi." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Ak inyo anyun ole mi tisiindet ne mi eng’ betusiechoto, nyo ilenji, Aborjini rani Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ alenjini, Kaitu emet ne kiiyosiechi Jehovah kwanisiekyok kole konech." 
Deuteronomy26:4 Yeityo koib tisiindet kitonget eng’ eung’ung’, ak konde taitab kaptisisietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Ak iwolu eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ile, Ki Suriaindet baba ne kimachei kobet, kichortagei Misri, komeny oloto, kima kotia; ak kiek bororiet ne o eng’ oloto, kogimit, ak kochang’ait." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Ak kiyaiywech ne ya Misrik, kiinyalilech, ak koratyech boisiet ne nyigis:" 
Deuteronomy26:7 ak kigirirji Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyok, ak kigas Jehovah kutinnyo, kigeer nyalildanyo, ak birtoennyo bo ge, ak sastaet ne kigisastaenech:" 
Deuteronomy26:8 ak kiimoong’wech Jehovah eng’ Misri, eng’ eut ne kim, ak eng’ eut ne chuulat, ak eng’ kamuiset ne o, ak eng’ kaborunoik, ak kwong’utik:" 
Deuteronomy26:9 ak kigomutwech keitu olito, ak kigonech emoni, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Keer nguno anyun, kaibu tongoanik che bo logoek che bo emet ne kiigona inye Jehovah. Yeityo inde ng’ony eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak ilosu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’:" 
Deuteronomy26:11 ak ibaibaitu eng’ mieindo tugul ne kigonin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak gong’ung’, inye ak Lawindet, ak toondet ne mi kwenung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Ye kainemu iges kebeberwek che bo taman che bo kebeberwekab rurateng’ung’ eng’ kenyit ne bo somok, noto kenyit ne kigoitoe kebeberta, igochi choto anyun Lawindet, ak toondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosoget, si koamis eng’ kurgotiguk kobiyong’so;" 
Deuteronomy26:13 yeityo imwa eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ile, Kaanemu eng’ gonnyu tuguk che itabanotin, kaagochi agine Lawindet, ak tondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosoget, ko u ng’atutieng’ung’ tugul ne kiing’ata: ma abistoe ng’atutiguk alak tugul, ama autie:" 
Deuteronomy26:14 ma aam tukchoto eng’ rirekyuk, ama aiste alak eng’ choto, aboisie eng’ boisiet ne ma tilil, ama agoite amu che kigobek: kiagas it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, kiayai ko u tugul che kiing’ata." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Keer anyun ng’ony eng’ meng’ateng’ung’ ne tilil, eng’ kipsengwet, ak iberur biguk Israel, ak emet ne kiigonech, ko u ye kiiyosiechi kwanisiekyok, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik." 
Deuteronomy26:16 Kang’atin rani Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ iyai konetisiosiechu ak kiruogutichu: rib anyun ak iyai eng’ muguleldang’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ sobondang’ung’ komugul." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Keng’any rani Jehovah, ile, inendet ko Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ak ile kanyol iwendote ortinwekyik, ak irib konetisiosiekyik, ak ng’atutikyik, ak kiruogutikyik, ak igas it kutinnyi:" 
Deuteronomy26:18 ak kang’any Jehovah rani kole, I bororiet ne kigitabanin iegu nenyi, ko u ye kiiarorun, ak si kobiit irib ng’atutikyik tugul;" 
Deuteronomy26:19 ak koyain itororitu isiir bororiosiek tugul che kiyai inendet eng’ kalosunet, ak kainet, ak teegisto; si iegu bororiet ne tilil eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko u ye kimwa." 
Deuteronomy27:1 King’at anyun Musa ak boisiekab Israel bik kolenji, Orib ng’atutik tugul che kang’atak rani." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Ak eng’ betut ne olandoe Jordan obendi emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, itononsechigei koik che eechen, ak imal:" 
Deuteronomy27:3 yeityo isirji koichato ng’alek tugul che bo ng’atutioni, ye kailande; si kobiit iit emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik, ko u ye kiiarorun Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisieguk." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Ak ye kailandae Jordan, ilumde koichato, che ang’atin rani, eng’ tulwetab Ebal, ak imal." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Ak iteekyi eng’ oloto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kaptisisiet, kaptisisiet ne bo koik: ameyae koichato karna." 
Deuteronomy27:6 Teekyi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kaptisisiet eng’ koik che ma kiwai: ak igochi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ oloto: 
Deuteronomy27:7 ak ieny kagochinoik che bo kalyet, ak iamisie eng’ oloto; si ibaibaitu eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Ak isirji koichato ng’alek tugul che bo ng’atutioni kotook komie. 
Deuteronomy27:9 Ak kimwachi Musa ak tisiik che Lawik, Israelik tugul, kolenji, Sis, ebit, ee Israel; keegu rani bikab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Kas it anyun kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindengung’, yai ng’atutikyik ak konetisiosiekyik, che kaang’atin ra." 
Deuteronomy27:11 King’at anyun Musa bik betunoto kolenji," 
Deuteronomy27:12 Tonondos bichu eng’ tulwetab Gerisim koberur bik, ye kaolandae Jordan; Simeon, Lawi, Juda, Isakar, Josep ak Bemjamin." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Tonondos bichu eng’ tulwetab Ebal agobo chubisiet; Reuben, Gad, Aser, Sebulun, Dan ak Naptali." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Ak kowol Lawik kolenji bik tugul che bo Israel eng’ kutit ne o," 
Deuteronomy27:15 Chubot ne yaei kanamwet ne kiwaei anan ne kitanyi, ne wechei Jehovah, boisietab musogindet, ne lumdoi eng’ ung’ot. Ak kowol bik tugul kole, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:16 Chubot chi ne sasei kwanda anan kamet. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:17 Chubot chi ne inaktoe kiwotetab chitab kokwennyi. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:18 Chubot chi ne ibeeti ne korat. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:19 Chubot chi ne imaasi kiruogetab ne toondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosoget. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:20 Chubot chi ne ibegei ak osotiotab kwandanyi; amu kang’any ach ngorietab kwandanyi. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:21 Chubot chi ne ibegei ak tiony age tugul. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:22 Chubot chi ne ibegei ak chepkamet ne cheptab kwandanyi, anan ne cheptab kamet. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:23 Chubot chi ne ibegei ak korgetab yugoi. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:24 Chubot chi ne birei chitab kokwennyi eng’ ung’ot. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:25 Chubot chi ne taachei melekto si kobar chi ne matinyei tengek. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy27:26 Chubot chi ne ma igimit ng’alekab ng’atutioni koyai. Ak kole bik tugul, Amen." 
Deuteronomy28:1 Ak ngiepchi it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ kagiiletab ge, irib iyai ng’atutikyik tugul che kaang’atin rani, koeetin anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ isiir bororiosiek tugul che mi ng’ony:" 
Deuteronomy28:2 ak kobwanjinin kaberurosiechu tugul, koityin, ngiepchi it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy28:3 Kiberurin eng’ nganaset, kiberurin eng’ mbar." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Kiberuri iyoteng’ung’, ak iyotetab emeng’ung’, ak iyotetab akwotisieguk ak ne bo tuguk ak arekab kechireguk." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Kiberuri kitongeng’ung’ ak tereng’ung’ ne kitangware busiek. 
Deuteronomy28:6 Kiberurin ye imong’u, ak kiberurin ye imandoi sang’." 
Deuteronomy28:7 Igoitoi Jehovah buniguk che ng’eetyinin kiterter eng’ taing’ung’: ibokyinin eng’ oret agenge, ago mwee ortinwek tisab eng’ taing’ung’." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Ng’atei Jehovah berurto konyonjin, eng’ chogeniguk ak eng’ tugul che iyai eng’ eung’ung’; ak iberurin eng’ emet ne konin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Ak kogimitin Jehovah iegu bororiennyi ne tilil, ko u ye kiiyosieun; ngirib ng’atutikab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, iwendote ortinwekyik." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Ak kogeer bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony kole kiguurtoenen kainetab Jehovah; ak koiywein. 
Deuteronomy28:11 Ak koyabin Jehovah ibaraitu iegu ne nyiitat mieindo, eng’ iyoteng’ung’, ak eng’ iyotetab akwotisieguk, ak eng’ iyotetab koreng’ung’, eng’ emet ne kiiyosiechi Jehovah kwanisieguk kole konin." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Yatun Jehovah konoruennyi ne kararan noto ko kipsengwet korobonji emeng’ung’ eng’ betusiekyik, ak koberur boisionik tugul che bo euneguk: ak ibesendochi bororiosiek che chang’, ago mebeseni." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Yain Jehovah iegu metit ago meegu katutiet; ak iegu ne mi barak kityo, ago meegu ne mi ng’ony; ngiepchi it ng’atutikab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, che ang’atin rani, irib ak iyai;" 
Deuteronomy28:14 ngo meistoege ng’olyo age tugul ne ang’atin rani, iwe tai anan katam, isub kanamonik iot." 
Deuteronomy28:15 Ago ngo meepchi it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, irib iyai ng’atutikyik tugul ak konetisiosiekyik che ang’atin rani; kobwanjin koityin anyun chubisiosiechu tugul." 
Deuteronomy28:16 Kichubin eng’ nganaset, ak kichubin eng’ mbar." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Kichubei kitongeng’ung’ ak tereng’ung’ ne kitangware busiek. 
Deuteronomy28:18 Kichubei iyoteng’ung’, ak iyotetab emeng’ung’, ak ne bo tuguk ak arekab kechireguk." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Kichubin ye imong’u, ak kichubin ye imandoi sang’." 
Deuteronomy28:20 Iyogun Jehovah chubisiet ak nyalilda, ak keretab kong’, eng’ tugul che iyae euneguk, agoi kong’emin, ak agoi ilus ichakte; amu yaitietab boisioniguk ne kigonin ibagakta." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Konin Jehovah koroito konamin agoi kowong’un eng’ emet ne iwendi iname kobunjin. 
Deuteronomy28:22 Birin Jehovah eng’ chebuonit, ak mat ne mi borto, ak kabwanet, ak mat ne ng’wan, ak rotwetab chok, ak chelalitiet, ak uchatet: onotin choto agoi ilus." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Ak egu sugunwet kipsengwet ne mi baragung’ung’, ak koek karnet ng’ony ne itieche." 
Deuteronomy28:24 Yaei Jehovah roptab emeng’ung’ koek temburiek ak ng’ung’unyek: chorjiningei choto eng’ kipsengwet, agoi igesuge." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Igoitoin Jehovah koterterin buniguk: ibokyini eng’ oret agenge, ak imwee eng’ tainywa eng’ ortinwek tisab: ak koonatin bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Ak koek mustang’ung’ amditab taritik tugul che bo barak, ak tiong’ik che bo ng’ony, ak mabiitu chi ne iyestoi." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Birenen Jehovah ondirik che bo Misri, ak kabwondo, ak kochek, ak simbiriek, che magimuchi kisoobun." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Birenen Jehovah iywek, ak koratet, ak kaiyweisiet ne bo muguleldo:" 
Deuteronomy28:29 iwendi isabsabisioti bet kwen, ko u ye sabsabisioti kipkoratiat eng’ mesundeito, ama kiberurin eng’ ortinweguk: ak kinyalilin kityo ak kerebenen tuguguk kotugul, ama biitu ne sorun." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Ituni osotiot, ak koipgei ak chito age: iteeche got, amemenye: imine mbaretab sabibuk, amebute logoekwak." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Kienyei eitang’ung’ igeere, ameame banyekyik: kirebenen sigirieng’ung’ eng’ koromnatet, igeere, ama kiweegun: kigochin kechireguk buniguk, ama biitu chi ne sorun." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Kigochin bororiet age weriguk ak tibiguk, ak keerei konyeguk ak koamjin emo ichek betut komugul: ametinye kimnatet eng’ eung’ung’." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Amei bororiet ne mengen logoekab emeng’ung’, ak boisioniguk tugul; kinyalilin ak ketiekyinin ng’ony kotugul:" 
Deuteronomy28:34 agoi koamin iywek amu tugul che igeere eng’ konyeguk. 
Deuteronomy28:35 Birei Jehovah kutung’oiguk, ak kelyeguk, eng’ ondirik che ng’wonen, che magimuchi kisoobun, koboch keldebesiet agoi metit barak." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Imutin Jehovah koboto laitoriandeng’ung’ ne tun indoi koboun, agoi iit bororiet ne mengen, inye, anan kwanisieguk; ak iot kanamonik eng’ oloto, che bo ketik ak koik." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Ak iegu kwong’utiet, ak kalewenet, ak atindiot, eng’ kwenutab bik tugul ole imutyinin Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Iibe keswek che chang’ mbar, ago igese che ng’ering’; amu tarei chereng’endet." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Imine mbarenikab sabibuk ak isemberi, ago mee divaikyik, anan ibut logoek; amu amei kutik." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Itinye emitik eng’ kiwotosieguk tugul, ago meilege mwanikwak; amu iroroi logoekwak che bo emitiguk." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Isiche werik ak tibik, ago maegu cheguk; amu kiluulei." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Bunjin chereng’endet ketiguk tugul ak ruratetab emeng’ung’. 
Deuteronomy28:43 Tororitu toondet ne mi kwenung’ung’ kosiirin; ak iming’initu mising’. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Besendoun inendet, ago mebesendochini: egu inendet metit, ak iegu katutiet." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Ak kobwanjin chubisiosiechu tugul, koonatin, agoi konamin, agoi kong’emin; amu ma iepchi it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, irib ng’atutikyik ak konetisiosiekyik che king’atin:" 
Deuteronomy28:46 ak kotebenen choto koek kaborunet ak kwong’utiet, ak kotebe iyoteng’ung’ agoi koigeny." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Amu meboisiechini Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ boiboindo, ak eng’ kagesetab ge ne bo muguleldo, amu chang’indab tuguk tugul:" 
Deuteronomy28:48 iote anyun buniguk che imutun Jehovah kong’eetyin, eng’ rubet, ak eng’ melelda, ak eng’ ach ngorit, ak eng’ rarunetab tuguk tugul: ak konde chogitab karnet kaating’ung’, agoi kobarin." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Imutun Jehovah bororiet konyo koborienen ne bunu ole loo, tabandab ng’ony, ko u ye tirireni kipsichit; bororiet ne megase ng’alekwak;" 
Deuteronomy28:50 bororiet ne korom igeere, ne meiiti chi ne os, ama rire lakwa:" 
Deuteronomy28:51 ak koam iyotetab tuguk, ak ruratetab emeng’ung’, agoi kowong’un: ne mabagagun bek, anan divaik, anan mwanik, anan iyotetab tuguk, anan arekab kechireguk, agoi kolusin." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Ak koyiemin eng’ kurgotiguk tugul, agoi kolulyo irimoiguk che koen, che ng’ototin, che imang’u, eng’ emeng’ung’ komugul: yiemin eng’ kurgotiguk tugul eng’ emeng’ung’ komugul, ne kigogonin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Ak iam iyoteng’ung’ banyekab weriguk ak tibiguk che kigonin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; ye kagoyiemin buniguk, ak eng’ bichiindo ne ibun buniguk." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Ak kogeere kong’ ne ya chito ne ko kiptalbisio ak ko ng’arng’arge ne mi kwenung’wong’, ng’etab kamet ak osotiondennyi ne chamei, ak lagokyik che kang’et:" 
Deuteronomy28:55 kot ko macham kobutyi chi age tugul eng’ ichek banyekab lagokyik che amei, amu mang’etyi kiy inendet; amu yiemet ak amu bichiindo ne ibun buniguk eng’ kurgotiguk tugul." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Ak kogeere kong’ ne ya kwondo ne mi kwenung’wong’ ne cheptalbisio ak ko ng’arng’ar ne machamei kotiegat ng’ony amu talbistanyi ak ng’arng’arindo, manong’otiondennyi ne chamei, ak eng’ werinnyi, ak eng’ cheptanyi;" 
Deuteronomy28:57 ak eng’ sindariet ne sichei inendet, ak eng’ lagokyik che sichei; amei eng’ ung’ot amu bananda: eng’ kamuutetab nganaset ak eng’ rubet amu keret ne kerei kurgotiguk buniguk." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Ngo merib iyai ng’alek tugul che bo ng’atutioni che kigisirji bukuini, si kobiit igonyit kainani bo teegisto, kainet ne kiywei JEHOVAH KAMUKTAINDENG’UNG’;" 
Deuteronomy28:59 koyai anyun Jehovah korotweguk koek che kikwong’e, ak korotwekab iyoteng’ung’, korotwek che eechen, che tebyei keny, ak mianwek che yaachen, che tebyei keny." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Ak koweekyin mianwek tugul che bo Misri, che kiiywei; ak konamin." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Kogeny ibun Jehovah miando age tugul, ak koroito age tugul, ne ma kisirji bukuitab ng’atutioni, agoi kiwong’un." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Ak ong’etu che ng’ering’, che ki aechin chang’indang’wong’ ak kecheikab kipsengwetisiek; amu kima iepchi it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Ak ko u ye kibaibait Jehovah eng’ okwek koyaiywok ne mie, ak kotesak; u noto boiboitu Jehovah eng’ okwek kolusak, ak kowong’wok; ak kitutok eng’ emet ne iwendi iname kobunjin." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Ak koiyestak Jehovah obe bororiosiek tugul, koboch tabanda age ne bo ng’ony agoi tabanda age; ak iot kanamonik eng’ oloto che bo ketik ak che bo koik, che mengen, inye, anan kwanisieguk." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Amenyoru kamuung’et eng’ bororiosiechoto, menyoru ole imuung’e keldang’ung’: ago konin Jehovah eng’ oloto muguleldo ne rugrugeni, ak konyek che kortos, ak muguleldo ne ichuchui:" 
Deuteronomy28:66 amenai ole teptoi sobeng’ung’; ak iyweisiei kemoi ak bet, ak menae ole itei sobondang’ung’:" 
Deuteronomy28:67 Ilen karon, Kata kaigai nda ka koskoleny nguno! Ak ile koskoleny, Kata kaigai nda kaeech! Amu kaiyweisietab muguleldang’ung’ ne iyweisiei, ak amu tuguk che keerei konyeguk che tun igeere." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Ak koweekyin Jehovah Misri kogeny eng’ melisiek, eng’ oret ne kiamwaun, ale, Ma igeere kogeny: ak oaldochige bunikwok eng’ oloto oegu otwogik che murenik ak che kobogorisiek, ago mabiitu chi ne alok." 
Deuteronomy29:1 Chu ng’alekab kayomiset ne king’at Jehovah Musa koyai koboto lagokab Israel eng’ emetab Moabik, koboto kayomiset ne kiiyomisgei ak ichek eng’ Horeb." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Ak kiguur Musa Israelik tugul kolenji, Kiogeer tugul che kiyachi Jehovah Parao, ak otwogikyik tugul, ak emennyi tugul, eng’ emetab Misri eng’ taing’wong’;" 
Deuteronomy29:3 tiemisiosiek che eechen che kigeer konyeguk, kaborunoik, ak kwong’utichoto eechen:" 
Deuteronomy29:4 ago kitom kogonok Jehovah muguleldo ne oguiye, anan konyek che ogeere, anan itik che ogase, agoi rani." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Ak kiandoiywok eng’ kenyisiek artam eng’ ong’atet: ma osegitu ngoroik che olaachi, ama osegitu kweoniguk eng’ kelyeguk." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Ma oam makatinik, ama oee divaik anan maiyek: si kobiit onai ole a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Deuteronomy29:7 Ak ye kingoitu oli, kobokyech Sihon, laitoriatab Hesbon, ak Og, laitoriatab Basan, ak kigibar laitorinichoto:" 
Deuteronomy29:8 ak kiginam emenywa, ak kigigochi bikab Reuben, ak che bo Gad, ak kebebertab oretab Manase koek borotet." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Orib anyun ng’alekab kayomisoni, ak oyai, si kiberurok eng’ tugul che oyae." 
Deuteronomy29:10 Otonondosi ra okwek tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; bounikwok, ortinwekwok, boisiekwok, ak kiptainikwok, agot murenik tugul che bo Israel," 
Deuteronomy29:11 lagokwok, osotikwok, ak toondeng’ung’ ne mitei nganasoguk, koboch ne murmuri kweniguk agoi ne siilei beeguk." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Si kobiit oarorjige ak Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak kayosiennyi, ne yaei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koboten rani:" 
Deuteronomy29:13 si kogimitin rani iegu bororiennyi, si koek Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko u ye kimwaun, ak ko u ye kiiyosiechi kwanisieguk, Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Mayomisok okwege eng’ kayomisoni ak kayosioni; 
Deuteronomy29:15 ago koboto inendet ne tononi kobotech eng’ yu rani eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ak koboto inendet agine ne mami kobotech rani:" 
Deuteronomy29:16 (amu ongen ole kigiteptoi eng’ emetab Misri; ak ole kigibwanunde eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek che kiobun kwenunywa; 
Deuteronomy29:17 ak kiogeer tugukwak che kiwechei, ak kanamonikwak, ketik ak koik, feda ak tahabu, che kimi kwenunywa:)" 
Deuteronomy29:18 si mabiit chi eng’ okwek mureno anan kwondo, anan gab chi, anan oret, ne mastoi muguleldanyi rani kobagakta Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, kwo koot kanamonikab bororiosiechoto; si mabiit eng’ okwek tigitiotab ng’wanindo ak ng’wonet;" 
Deuteronomy29:19 ak ye kas ng’alekab chubisioni, koberurgei eng’ muguleldanyi kole, Atebye eng’ kalyet, agot ngawendoti eng’ ngelelnatetab muguleldanyu, kotese melelda bogitet." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Mametoi Jehovah chichoto, ago iyenjin chichoto neregek ak ng’etkonda che bo Jehovah, ak kotebe chichoto chubisioni tugul ne kigisirji bukuini, ak kobukto Jehovah kainennyi eng’ kureretab kipsengwet." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Ak ibesie Jehovah chichoto ortinwek tugul che bo Israel kobunji yaitiet, ko u chubisiosiek tugul che bo kayomiset ne kigisirji bukuinito bo Ng’atutik." 
Deuteronomy29:22 Ak kole ibinda ne biitu, lagokwok che biitu let eng’ okwek, ak toondet ne bunu emet ne loo, ye keer korotwek che bo emonoto, ak mainwek che kiigochi Jehovah komianso:" 
Deuteronomy29:23 ak kowalak emet komugul koek tuguk che laldos, ak munyuk, ak lalet, kot ko ma kegolei, ama koiyei, ama kobite suswo oloto, kergeitu ak ng’emisietab Sodom ak Gomora, Adma ak Seboim, che king’em Jehovah kowong’ eng’ neregekyik, ak eng’ nyitatennyi:" 
Deuteronomy29:24 ak kole bororiosiek tugul, Amu nee si koyachi Jehovah ko u ni emoni? Iboru nee mai bo neregechu ng’wonen?" 
Deuteronomy29:25 Kole anyun bik, Amu kibagakta kayomisetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, ne kiyai koboto ichek ye kiimutu komong’ eng’ emetab Misri;" 
Deuteronomy29:26 ak kiba koot kanamonik, ak kogutung’ji, kanamonik che kima kongen, ak che kima chamji inendet:" 
Deuteronomy29:27 kilal anyun nereknatetab Jehovah amu noto agobo emoni, koipchi chubisiosiek tugul che kigisirji bukuini:" 
Deuteronomy29:28 kiitut Jehovah ichek komong’ eng’ emenywa eng’ neregek ak eng’ nyitatet, ak eng’ ng’wanindo, koonji emet age ko u rani." 
Deuteronomy29:29 Bo Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo tugukab ung’ot: ago chechok ak lagokyok koigeny tuguk che ng’ang’atin, si kobiit keyai ng’alek tugul che bo ng’atutioni." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Ak ye bwanjin tukchu tugul, berurto ak chubisiet, che kiande taing’ung’, ak ibwat anyun eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek tugul, ole kigoonjin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’," 
Deuteronomy30:2 ak ngiweekyige Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, igas it kutinnyi ko u tugul che kang’atin rani, inye ak lagoguk, eng’ muguleldang’ung’ komugul, eng’ sobondang’ung’ komugul;" 
Deuteronomy30:3 kowal anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ luulet ne kigiluulin ak korirenen, ak koweek koyumin eng’ bororiosiek tugul, ole kiiyestochin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Ngo mi che kiiyestochi tabanwekab kipsengwet, koyumin eng’ oloto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak komutun eng’ oloto:" 
Deuteronomy30:5 ak komutyin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ emet ne ki bo kwanisieguk, si kobunjin; ak koyaun ne mie, kotesin ichang’itu isiir kwanisieguk." 
Deuteronomy30:6 Ak komuratan Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ muguleldang’ung’, ak mugulelwekab iyoteng’ung’, si icham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ muguleldang’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ sobondang’ung’ komugul, si isob." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Ak konde Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ chubisiosiechu tugul buniguk, ak eng’ ichek che wechin, che kiusin." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Ak iweege igas it kutitab Jehovah, ak iyai ng’atutikyik tugul che ang’atin rani." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Ak koyain Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ iegu ne tinyei chang’indab berurto eng’ boisionik tugul che bo euneguk, ak eng’ iyoteng’ung’, ak eng’ iyotetab tuguk, ak eng’ ruratetab emeng’ung’; amu tun boiboitunenen Jehovah kogeny koyaun ne mie, ko u ye kibaibaitune kwanisieguk:" 
Deuteronomy30:10 ngigas it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, irib ng’atutikyik ak konetisiosiekyik che sirotin eng’ bukuini bo Ng’atutiet; ngiweekyige Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ muguleldang’ung’ komugul, ak eng’ sobondang’ung’ komugul." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Amu ma uui mising’ eng’ inye ng’atutioni kaang’atin rani, ama loo." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Mami kipseng’wet, kot ile, Ng’o ne togostoiyech kipsengwet, si koibwech, ak kogonech kegas, si keyai?" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Ama mi nyanjet bitonin, kot ile, Ng’o ne landoi eng’ nyanjet, si koibwech, ak kogonech kegas, si kobiit keyai?" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Ago negitenen ng’olyondoni mising’, mitei kuting’ung’, ak muguleldang’ung’, si kobiit iyai." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Keero, kande rani taing’ung’ sobondo ak mieindo, meet ak yaitiet;" 
Deuteronomy30:16 amu kaang’atin rani ale icham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, iwendote ortinwekyik, irib ng’atutikyik ak konetisiosiekyik ak kiruogutikyik, si isob itesage, si koberurin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ emet ne iwendi iname." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Ago ngo masta muguleldang’ung’, amecham igas, ago ngichuutin, iwe isa kanamonik, ak iot;" 
Deuteronomy30:18 aboruok rani ale, olustosi iman; machang’itu betusiekwok eng’ emet, ole olang’jini eng’ Jordan iwendi inam." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Kaaguur kipsengwet ak ng’ony kobaorianjok rani, ale, kande taing’ung’ sobondo ak meet, kaberuret ak chubisiet: lewen sobondo anyun, si isob, inye ak iyoteng’ung’:" 
Deuteronomy30:20 icham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, igas it kutinnyi, ak onamgei ak inendet: amu inendet sobondang’ung’, ak koindab betusieguk, si kobiit imeny emet ne kiiyosiechi Jehovah kwanisieguk kogochi Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Kiwa Musa anyun komwachi Israelik tugul ng’alechu. 
Deuteronomy31:2 Kolenji, Koboch ra ko kenyisiekyuk ko bogol ak tiptem; ma amuchi amanda ak among’u: ak kilenja Jehovah, Melandoe Jordanini."
