Deuteronomy31:3 Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, inendet ne landoi kondoenen; ak kobar bororiosiechu mi taing’ung’, ak inam ichek: landoi Josua kondoenen, ko u ye kimwa Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Yachin Jehovah ichek ko u ye kiyachi Sihon ak Og, laitorinikab Amorik, ak emenywa; che king’em." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Indewok Jehovah ichek eunekwok eng’ taing’wong’, ak oyachi bichoto ko u ng’atutiet komugul ne kiang’atak." 
Deuteronomy31:6 Ogimegitu, onyiganitu, amoiywei, anan oarogense amu ichek: amu wendi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koboten; mametoin inendet, ama bagaktoin." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Ak kiguur Musa Josua, ak kolenji, eng’ taitab Israelik tugul, Kimitu, nyiganitu: amu obendi koboto bichu oite emet ne kiiyosiechi Jehovah kwanisiekwok kole igochin; ak igochini ichek konyaban." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Inendet Jehovah ne indoenen; mi koboten, amemetoin, ama bagaktoin; ameiywei, anan iarogen." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Kisir anyun Musa ng’atutioni, ak kogochi tisiik werikab Lawik, che kiibei moinget ne bo arorutietab Jehovah, ak boisiek tugul che bo Israel." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Ak king’at Musa bichoto kolenji, Kenyit age tugul ne igesunegei kenyitab tisab, eng’ betut ne kiging’at ne bo kenyit ne bo katiaget, eng’ igorta ne bo keriosiek," 
Deuteronomy31:11 ye kabwa Israel tugul koborgei eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ ole tun leweni, isoman anyun ng’atutioni eng’ taitab Israel tugul kogas." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Iyum bik, murenik, gotab kor ak lagok, ak toondeng’ung’ ne mi kurgotiguk, si kobiit kogas, ak konetgei, ak koiywei Jehovah Kamuktindeng’wong’, ak korib koyai ng’alek tugul che bo ng’atutioni;" 
Deuteronomy31:13 si kogas lagokwak che tom konai ak konetgei koiywei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, betusiek tugul kote osoptosi eng’ emet ne olandoe Jordan obendi oname." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Kilenji Jehovah Musa, Keero, kagorik betut ne imee: kuur Josua anyun, ak obe otononse emait ne kituiyechin, si ang’at inendet. Kiba anyun Musa ak Josua, kotononso eng’ emaitab tuiyet." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Ak kitook Jehovah eng’ Emait eng’ toloitab boldet: kitonone toloitab boldet kurgetab Emait. 
Deuteronomy31:16 Ak kilenji Jehovah Musa, Keero, irue koboto kwanisieguk; yeityo kong’eetyo bichu koibotgei ak kanamonik che bo bororiosiek alak che bo emet, ole bendi kotebe kwenunywa, ak kobagakta, ak kobut kayomisennyu, ne kigiyomisge ak ichek." 
Deuteronomy31:17 Kolal anyun nereknatennyu eng’ betunoto agobo ichek, yeityo abagakte, ak auny togennyu, ak kiwong’ ichek, ak kobwanji yaitwogik ak nyalilwogik che chang’; ak kole eng’ betunoto, Tos mabwanjech yaitwogtichu amu mami Kamuktaindennyo kobotech?" 
Deuteronomy31:18 Ak, auny togennyu betunoto iman amu yaitwogik tugul che kiyai, amu kaweektagei koot kanamonik." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Osirjige anyun nguno tieni, si inet lagokab Israel: inde kutuswekwak, si koek baoriandennyu tieni agobo lagokab Israel." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Amu ye kaamut koit emet ne kiayosiechi kwanisiekwak, noto nyiitat chego ak kumik; ak ye kagoamis kobiyong’so, ak konerio; koweektagei anyun ole mi kanamonik koba koot, ak kosasa, ak kobut kayomisennyu." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Ak ye tun kagobwanji yaitwogik che chang’ ak nyalilwogik, kobaorian anyun tieni eng’ tainywa ko u baoriat; amu mautie iyotenywa eng’ kutuswekwak: amu agot nguno angen kabwatutikwak che ibwati, kotom amut koba emet ne kiayosiechi." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Kisir anyun Musa tieni betunoto, ak konet lagokab Israel." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Kiigochi anyun Josua weritab Nun ng’atutiet, kolenji, Kimitu, nyiganitu: amu imuti lagokab Israel koba emet ne kiayosiechi: ak ami koboten." 
Deuteronomy31:24 Ak ye kingo kagosir Musa koges ng’alekab ng’atutioni eng’ bukuit, agoi kogesgei," 
Deuteronomy31:25 kong’at Musa Lawik che kiibei moingetab arorutietab Jehovah, kolenji," 
Deuteronomy31:26 Oib bukuineb ng’atutik, onde ole negite moingetab arorutietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, si kotebe oloto koek baoriat agobo inye." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Amu angen ngelelnateng’ung’, ak uuindab kaating’ung’: ogeero, kaongelelji Jehovah, kota asobe ami kobotok betuni; oyae anyun ne tia ye kaamei?" 
Deuteronomy31:28 Oyumwa boisiek tugul che bo ortinwekwok, ak kiptainikwok, kobwa yu ami, si amwachi ng’alechu koba itikwak, aguur kipsengwet ak ng’ony kobaorian agobo ichek." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Amu angen ale ye kaamei ong’emge mising’ kot, omaste eng’ oret ne kiang’atak; ak koityok yaitiet eng’ betusiek che bo let; amu omache oyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, otach inendet amu boisionikab eunekwok." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Kimwachi Musa tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel ng’alekab tieni kogas, agoi kogesgei." 
Deuteronomy32:1 Oebit, okwek kipsengwetisiek, si kobiit ang’alal; Ak ingogas ng’ony ng’alekab kutinnyu:" 
Deuteronomy32:2 Rong’ugei konetisiennyu ko u ropta, Sou ng’alekyuk ko u rewot; Ko u ropta ne inesyin suswek che ng’orng’or, Ak ropta ne robonjin suswekab timin:" 
Deuteronomy32:3 Amu amwaitoi kainetab Jehovah: Oiityi etunatet Kamuktaindennyo. 
Deuteronomy32:4 Ruandet inendet, igesunotgei boisiennyi; Amu imanda ortinwekyik tugul: Kamuktaindet ne bo imanit ne matinyei yaitio, Bo imanda inendet ak kosuldaat." 
Deuteronomy32:5 King’emgei; berutiet ne tinyei ko ma bo lagokab Jehovah; Ichek bororiet ne ngelelio ne mastaat. 
Deuteronomy32:6 Tos kongoi ne ogochini Jehovah ni, Okwek bik che o abusotin che ma o ng’omen? Tos ma kwandang’ung’ inendet, ne kialin? Kiyain, ak kogimitin." 
Deuteronomy32:7 Ibwat betusiek che bo keny, Ibwat kenyisiekab ibinwek che chang’: Teebe kwandang’ung’, si koborun; Teebe boisieguk, si komwaun." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Ye kiigochi Inendet ne Toror Mising’ bororiosiek borotenywa, Ye kipcheei werikab bik, Kiinde kiwotosiekab bik Ko u koitetab lagokab Israel." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Amu bikyik kebebertab Jehovah; Borotennyi Jakobo. 
Deuteronomy32:10 Kinyorji inendet ong’atet, Eng’ surkwen ne imuisei ne mami kiy; Kiyiem korib, Kirib inendet ko u laptetab kondanyi:" 
Deuteronomy32:11 Ko u ye ing’eeti kipsichit arekyik, Ne wendote baragutab lagokyik koribei, Ne uitoi kebebaikyik, konam ichek, Kogesene kebebaikyik:" 
Deuteronomy32:12 Jehovah inegei ne kiindochi inendet, Ak ma biit cheptalelit ne bo bororiosiek alak koboto inendet." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Kiigochi kolany oldinwek che sutotin che bo ng’ony, Ak kiam ruratetab mbaret; Ak kiigochi kochuchun kumik eng’ ruandet, Ak mwanik eng’ ruandet ne uui;" 
Deuteronomy32:14 Mwaitab chego ne bo akwet, ak chegab kechirek, koboto mwanikab arekab kechir, Ak mengichikab Basan, ak ng’ororek, Koboto mwanikab nganok che miachen: Ak kieei divaik, korotikab sabibuk." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Ago kiner Jesurun, ak kotiaris: Kainer, kainyigisitu, kaiakwaitu: Kibagakta anyun Kamuktaindet ne kiyai inendet, Ak kosas Ruandetab yetunennyi." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Kiigochi koam ng’etkonda eng’ cheptalelisiek che ter, Kitach eng’ tuguk che kiwechei." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Kieng’ji tiseiywek oik, che ma Kamuktaindet, Cheptalelisiek che kima kongen, Che kibiitu let, Che kima koiywei kwanisiekwok." 
Deuteronomy32:18 Mebwati Ruandet ne kisichin, Kiiutie Kamuktaindet ne kisichin." 
Deuteronomy32:19 Ak kigeer Jehovah, ak kowech, Amu tagetab ne kitach werikyik ak tibikyik." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Ak kile, Aung’e togennyu, Ageere ole teptoi kagesunenywa: Amu ichek ibinda ne imaasat mising’. Lagok che matinyei kayanet." 
Deuteronomy32:21 Kigona ng’etkonda eng’ noto ne ma Kamuktaindet; Kitacha eng’ tangoitanywa: Ak agochi ichek ng’etkonda eng’ che ma bororiet; Atache ichek eng’ bororiet ne abusat. 
Deuteronomy32:22 Amu kalal mat ne bo neregekyuk, Ak lalei agoi keringet ne loo mising’, Ak kobeel ng’ony koboto ruratennyi, Ak kobeel ole tonone tulonok." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Atesyini yaitwogik; Amwoge ichek kipchabonikyuk: 
Deuteronomy32:24 Sagitos eng’ rubet, Ak kebeel eng’ mat ne korom Ak ng’emisiet ne ng’wan; Ak ayokyi kelekab tiong’ik, Koboto ng’wonetab che ichuutegei ng’ony che bo temburiek." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Rebisiei rotwetab chok eng’ ole bo sang’, Ak mi kamuiset go; Barei muren ak bergeiyat, Ne chuchuni ak chito ne bo kalwalek." 
Deuteronomy32:26 Kiale, Aiyestochini ole loo, Agochini kogesgei kabwatenywa eng’ bik:" 
Deuteronomy32:27 Nda kima aiywei tagisietab bunyot, Si maibwat bunikwak berberindo, Ak komwa kole, Kagotororit eunnyo, Ak ma yai Jehovah choto tugul." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Amu ichek bororiet ne matinyei koruoch, Ama tinyei naet." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Nda ka ng’omen, ta konaei nito, Ak kobwat kagesunenywa!" 
Deuteronomy32:30 Kotos imuktoi ano koon chichage elfut, Ak koon aeng’ elfusiek taman, Nda kima alda Ruandenywa ichek, Ak kogoito Jehovah ichek?" 
Deuteronomy32:31 Amu ma u ruandenywa Ruandennyo, Amu ingen agichek bunikyok kole u noto." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Amu ketinywa ne bo sabibuk kobunu ketitab Sodom, Ne bunu mbarenikab Gomora: Murmure bich sabibukwak, Ng’wonen sabibukwak che kiirurugok:" 
Deuteronomy32:33 Ng’wonetab maswetisiek divaikwak, Ng’wonet ne korom ne bo erenok." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Tos ma konorotin eng’ oldanyu chuto, Kiging’och koboto konoraikyuk?" 
Deuteronomy32:35 Nenyu mugetut, ak kageeret, Eng’ betut ne kagochabaita kelyekwak: Amu karik betutab nyalildanywa, Ak chogu tuguk che bwanjin ichek." 
Deuteronomy32:36 Amu iruokyinechin Jehovah bikyik, Ak korir mo agobo otwogikyik; Ye keer kole kagowandagei kimnatenywa, Ama mi ne kong’et ne ratat anan ne ma ratat." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Ak kole, Mi ano kanamonikwak, Ruandet ne kiimang’u;" 
Deuteronomy32:38 Che kiamei mwanikab tiseiywekwak, Che kieei divaik che bo kagochinenywa ne kieei? Ingong’eetyo choto kotoretok, Ingoek ichek che omwechini." 
Deuteronomy32:39 Ogeer anyun nguno ole ane, ko a inendet iman, Mami cheptalelit, ami anege: Abare, ak asoobi; Kiaguoten, ak kianya: Ak mami ne imuchi kosor eng’ eunnyu." 
Deuteronomy32:40 Amu kanamji eunnyu kipsengwet, Ak ale, Ko u ye asobe koigeny," 
Deuteronomy32:41 Ngalit rotwennyu bo chok ne ilyeli, Ak konam eunnyu kiruoget; Ayaakyini mugetut bunikyuk, Ageerjini che wecha." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Agochini kipchabonikyuk kobogityo korotik, Ak koam banyek rotwennyu ne bo chok; Koboto korotikab che kigibar ak che kigiluul, Eng’ metowekab kandoikab bunik." 
Deuteronomy32:43 Oboiboitu, okwek bororiosiek, koboto bikyik: Amu yaaktoi mugetut che bo korotikab otwogikyik, Yaakyin mugetut bunikyik, Ak koyai kagaigaet agobo emennyi, ak bikyik." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Kinyo Musa anyun komwachi bik ng’alek tugul che bo tieni kogas eng’ itikwak, inendet ak Hosea weritab Nun." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Kinyo Musa anyun komwachi bik ng’alek tugul che bo tieni kogas eng’ itikwak, inendet ak Hosea weritab Nun." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Ak kiiges Musa ng’alechu tugul che kimwachi Israel tugul: 
Deuteronomy32:46 ak kilenji, Onde mugulelwekwok ng’alechu tugul kabaorianwok ra; che tun ong’ate lagokwok, korib koyai ng’alek tugul che bo ng’atutioni." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Amu ma tangoi eng’ okwek ni; amu sobondang’wong’, ak otese betusiekwok eng’ emet amu nito, eng’ ole obendi olandoe Jordan oname kobunjok." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Kimwachi Jehovah Musa betunoto, kolenji," 
Deuteronomy32:49 Togoste tulwoni bo Abarim, agoi tulwetab Nebo, ne mi emetab Moab, ne tokyingei Jeriko; igeer emetab Kanan ne agochini lagokab Israel kobunji:" 
Deuteronomy32:50 si imechi tulwet ole itogosyini, si kiyumin koboto biguk, ko u ye kimechi Aron ng’etab komet tulwetab Hor, ak kigiyum koboto bikyik;" 
Deuteronomy32:51 amu kiongelelja eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel eng’ beekab Meriba ne bo Kades, eng’ ong’atetab Sin; amu kima ogonyita eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Amu igeere emet eng’ taing’ung’; ago meite oloto, emenoto ne agochini lagokab Israel." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Ni kaberuret, ne kiiberur Musa chitab Kamuktaindet lagokab Israel kotom kome," 
Deuteronomy33:2 kile, Kinyo Jehovah eng’ Sinai, Ak king’eet eng’ Seir amu ichek; Kiiluu eng’ tulwetab Paran, Kinyo eng’ che tililen tamanusiekab elfusiek: Kimi eunnyi ne bo tai ng’atutiet ne u mat eng’ ichek." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Ee, kichamei bororiosiek; Mi eung’ung’ bikyik tugul che tililen: Ak kitebe ole bo kelyeguk; Taachei age tugul eng’ ng’aleguk." 
Deuteronomy33:4 King’atwech Musa ng’atutiet, Borotetab tuiyetab Jakobo," 
Deuteronomy33:5 Kiek laitoriat eng’ Jesurun, Ye kiiyumjigei bounikab bik, Ortinwek tugul che bo Israel." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Ingosob Reuben, mameei; Ago ingong’ering’itu bikyik." 
Deuteronomy33:7 Ak ni kaberuretab Juda: kile, Kas, Jehovah, kutitab Juda, Imutu inendet konyo ole mi bikyik: Kisorgei eng’ eunnyi; Ak iegu toretindennyi eng’ bunikyik." 
Deuteronomy33:8 Ak kile agobo Lawi, Mi Tumim neng’ung’, ak Urim neng’ung’ koboto neng’ung’ ne tilil, Ne kiitiem eng’ Masa, Ak kioborie eng’ beekab Meriba;" 
Deuteronomy33:9 Ne kimwa agobo kwandanyi ak kamet, kole, Ma ageer inendet; Ama nai che tupcho, Ama nai lagokyik: Amu kiisub ichek ng’olyondeng’ung’, Ak kirib kayomiseng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Ineti Jakobo kiruogutiguk, Ak koneti Israel ng’atutieng’ung’: Indoi taing’ung’ nyamdutik che kibeelei, Ak konde kagochinet ne kibeelei komugul kaptisisieng’ung’." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Ee, Jehovah, iberur tugukyik, Ak itaach boisionikab eunekyik: Bir suenutikab icheget che ng’eetyin, Ak che bo icheget che wechei inendet, si mang’eetyo kogeny." 
Deuteronomy33:12 Kile agobo Benjamin, Meng’isiei chamanetab Jehovah eng’ kalyet eng’ ye negite inendet; Tuchei bet komugul, Ak komenyei kwenutab tigigoikyik." 
Deuteronomy33:13 Ak kile agobo Josep, Iberurot eng’ Jehovah emennyi; Amu tuguk che kororon kot che bo kipsengwet, amu rewot, Ak riret ne mi kurere," 
Deuteronomy33:14 Ak amu tuguk che kororon kot che bo logoekab asista, Ak tuguk che kororon kot che bo ruratetab arawek," 
Deuteronomy33:15 Ak amu tuguk che eechen mising’ che bo tulonokab keny, Ak tuguk che kororon che bo tulonok che mengechen che bo koigeny," 
Deuteronomy33:16 Ak amu tuguk che kororon che bo ng’ony ak nyiiennyi, Ak maget ne mie ne bo inendet ne kimenyei sondit: Ingonyonji metitab Josep berurto, Ak eng’ metitab inendet ne kigitabane tupchosiekyik." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Twateiyot ne bunu kirginnyi kotinyei torornatet; Ak kuinoikyik ko kuinoikab soet: Toortoe choto bororiosiek tugul agoi tabanwekab ng’ony: Ak choto tamanusiekab elfusiekab Epraim, Ak choto elfusiek che bo Manase." 
Deuteronomy33:18 Ak kile agobo Sebulun, Baibaitu, ee Sebulun, eng’ mandaeng’ung’; Ak, ee Isakar, eng’ emaisieguk." 
Deuteronomy33:19 Kuurei ichek bororiosiek kobwa tulwet; Kogoito eng’ oloto tiseiywek che bo imanda: Amu chuchuni chang’indab nyanjosiek, Ak konoraik che ung’otin che bo ng’aniek." 
Deuteronomy33:20 Ak kile agobo Gad, Iberurot inendet ne ibaroi Gad, Meng’isiei inendet ko u ng’etundo ne kotoy, Bachei eut, ee, ak metit barak." 
Deuteronomy33:21 Kilewenjigei kebeberta ne bo tai, Amu kigigonor eng’ oloto kebebertab ne igoitoi ng’atutik; Kinyo koboto bounikab bik, Kiyai imandab Jehovah, Ak kiruogutikyik eng’ Israel." 
Deuteronomy33:22 Ak kile agobo Dan, Aruetab ng’etundo Dan, Torombenoti kobunu Basan." 
Deuteronomy33:23 Ak kile agobo Naptali, Ee Naptali, ne kiibiye chamet, Ak ne nyiitat kaberuretab Jehovah: Ingobunjin cherongo ak murot ne bo tai." 
Deuteronomy33:24 Ak kile agobo Aser, Ingiberurji Aser lagok; Ingochamak inendet eng’ che tupcho, Ak ingorooch keldanyi mwaita." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Egu kweoniguk karik ak sugunonik; Tebyei kimnateng’ung’ ko u betusieguk. 
Deuteronomy33:26 Ee, Jesurun, mami ne u Kamuktaindet, Ne lanyei kipsengwetisiek si kotoretin, Ak lanyei barak eng’ telunatennyi." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Meng’ateng’ung’ Kamuktaindet ne bo koigeny, Ak kanabin eunek che bo koigeny: Ak toortoi bunik eng’ taing’ung’ Ak kole, Ng’em." 
Deuteronomy33:28 Meng’isiei anyun Israel eng’ kalyet, Kondab beek ne bo Jakobo inegei, Eng’ emet ne bo bek ak divaik; Ee, isau kipsengwetisiekyik rewot." 
Deuteronomy33:29 Ee Israel, igasige: O kerge ak ng’o, bororiet ne kisor Jehovah, Long’et ne toretin, Ak ko rotweng’ung’ bo chok, ne bo telunateng’ung’! Ak koyaigei buniguk koigei che kase it; Ak itiech oldinwekwak che sutotin." 
Deuteronomy34:1 Kitogosta Musa eng’ warengetab Moab, kwo tulwetab Nebo, agoi baragutab Pisga, ne tokyingei Jeriko. Kiiborji Jehovah inendet emet komugul ne bo Gilead, agoi Dan;" 
Deuteronomy34:2 ak Naptali komugul, ak emetab Epraim ak Manase, ak emet komugul ne bo Juda, agoi nyanjet ne mi cherongo." 
Deuteronomy34:3 Ak Murot ne bo Tai, ak warenget ne bo atebwet ne bo Jeriko, nganaset ne mi tironik, agoi Soar." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Ak kilenji Jehovah, Emoni ne kiayosiechi Abraham, ak Isak, ak Jakobo, alenji, Agochini iyoteng’ung’: kagonin igeer eng’ konyeguk, ago melandoi olindo." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Kime anyun Musa kiboitiotab Jehovah eng’ oloto eng’ emetab Moab, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Ak kitupchi atebwet eng’ emetab Moab ole tokyingei Bet-peor: ama mi chi ne ingen kererinnyi agoi rani. 
Deuteronomy34:7 Kiga kotar Musa kenyisiek bogol ak tiptem ye kimeei: kima kor, ama igesgei kimnatennyi." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Kirirji lagokab Israel Musa eng’ warengetab Moab betusiek sosom: kiigesgei anyun betusiekab kateiyet ak rirek agobo Musa. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Ki nyiitat Josua weritab Nun tamirmiriet ne bo ng’omnatet; amu kiga kogonoor Musa eunekyik inendet: ak kigas it lagokab Israel inendet, ak kiyai ko u ye king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Ak mata kobiit eng’ Israel maotiot ne u Musa, ne kinai Jehovah kimni;" 
Deuteronomy34:11 eng’ kaborunoik tugul, ak kwong’utik, che kiiyoktoi Jehovah inendet koyai eng’ emetab Misri, eng’ Parao, ak eng’ otwogikyik tugul, ak eng’ emennyi komugul;" 
Deuteronomy34:12 ak eng’ eut komugul ne kim, ak kamuiset komugul ne o, che kiyai Musa eng’ taitab Israel tugul." 
Joshua1:1 Kingo kagome Musa otwogindetab Jehovah, kong’alalji Jehovah Josua weritab Nun, kiboitiotab Musa, kolenji," 
Joshua1:2 Kogome otwogindennyu Musa; ng’eet anyun nguno, landae Jordanini, inye ak bichu tugul, oba emet ne agochini ichek, choto ko lagokab Israel." 
Joshua1:3 Komosta age tugul ole otieche eng’ kelyekwok, ko kaagonok yoto, ko u ye kiamwachi Musa." 
Joshua1:4 Koboch ong’atet, ak Lebanonini, agoi ainet ne o, ainet ne kiguure Euprate, emet komugul ne bo Hitik, agoi nyanjet ne o ne tokyingei ole roroktoe asista, egu noto kiwoteng’wong’." 
Joshua1:5 Mabiitu chi ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taing’ung’ betusiek tugul kote isobe: ko u ye kiami koboto Musa, ko u noto ami koboten: mametoin, anan abagakten." 
Joshua1:6 Kimitu ak inyiganitu: amu igochini bichu konam emet ne kiayosiechi kwanisiekwak ale agochini. 
Joshua1:7 Ago kimitu ak inyiganitu mising’, si irib iyai ko u ng’atutik tugul, che king’atin otwogindennyu Musa: amemaste iwe eutab tai anan ko katam, si kobiit kiberurin mising’ eng’ oldo tugul ole iwendi." 
Joshua1:8 Amat komanda bukuini bo Ng’atutik eng’ kuting’ung’, ago ibwat bet ak kemoi, si irib iyai ko u tugul che kigisirji: si iyai oreng’ung’ kotunen, ak kiberurin mising’." 
Joshua1:9 Tos ma ane ne kiang’atin? Kimitu ak inyiganitu mising’; ameiywei, anan itoptoben: amu mi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koboten eng’ ui tugul ole iwendi." 
Joshua1:10 King’at anyun Josua kiptainikab bik kolenji," 
Joshua1:11 Obun kwenutab nganaset, ak ong’at bik olenji, Ochob amitwogik; amu kotom kogesgei betusiek somogu olandoe Jordanini si onam emet, ne konok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ kobunjok." 
Joshua1:12 King’alalji Josua oretab Reuben, ak oretab Gad, ak kebebertab oretab Manase, kolenji," 
Joshua1:13 Obwat ng’olyot ne king’atak Musa otwogindentab Jehovah, kole, Konok Jehova Kamuktaindeng’wong’ kamuung’et, ak konok emoni." 
Joshua1:14 Tebe osotikwok, lagokwok, ak tukwok emet ne kigonok Musa eng’ Jordan bitoni; ago olandoi okwek ondoe tupchosiekwok ko kaolaach karik, murenik tugul che kimen, che nyigonen; obe otoret ichek." 
Joshua1:15 Agoi kogochi Jehovah tupchosiekwok kamuung’et, ko u okwek, ak konam agichek emet ne igochin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’: oweege anyun obwa emeng’wong’, si kobunjok, ne kigonok Musa otwogindetab Jehovah eng’ Jordan bitoni ole chorune asista." 
Joshua1:16 Kowolji ichek Josua kolenji, Kiyae choto tugul keng’atech, kibendi olda tugul ole keyoktech kebe." 
Joshua1:17 Ko u ye kigigase it Musa eng’ tuguk tugul, kegasin it aginye ko u noto: ago ingoteb Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koboten, ko u ye kimi koboto Musa." 
Joshua1:18 Chi age tugul ne kabistoe ng’atutieng’ung’, ama epchi it ng’aleguk eng’ tugul che ing’ate inendet, kebarei: ago kimitu inye, ak inyiganitu mising’." 
Joshua2:1 Kiiyokto Josua weritab Nun bik aeng’ eng’ Sitim koba eng’ ung’ot kosegei emet, kolenji, Oba ogeer emet, ak Jeriko. Kiba anyun ichek, ak kiit gotab chepkugoniot, ne ki kainennyi ko Rahab, ak kiruiyo yoto." 
Joshua2:2 Ak kigimwachi laitoriatab Jeriko kelenji, Keero, kait olito kemouni murenikab lagokab Israel, kobwa kosegei emet." 
Joshua2:3 Kiiyokto anyun laitoriatab Jeriko bik kobwa oldab Rahab, koba kolenji, Imutu bichu kobwanjin kobwa sang’, che kabwa gong’ung’: amu kabwa kosegei emet tugul." 
Joshua2:4 Kiimut anyun kobogoriondonoto bichoto aeng’ kouny; ak kole, Ee, kabwanja bichoto, ago ma anai ole kabunu:" 
Joshua2:5 ak kingo negit koit sait ne kigere ormarichet, ye kiga koimen, komanda bichoto: amangen ole kaba: osub ochakte; amu omuchi onam." 
Joshua2:6 Ago kiga imut inendet ichek koba got barak, ak kotuge mabutek, che kiga tet komie eng’ got barak." 
Joshua2:7 Koba anyun bichoto kole kosub eng’ oret ne wendi ainetab Jordan kot koit tabarwek ole landoe bik: ak ne matianit ko kata kobendi bichoto kiisubi ichek, keger ormarichet." 
Joshua2:8 Ak ye kitom koruiyo, kotogosta kobogoriondonoto kwo ole mi ichek eng’ got barak;" 
Joshua2:9 ak kolenji bichoto, Angen ale kigonok Jehovah emoni, ak kigobutyech kamuiseng’wong’, ak begu kowoi bik tugul che bo emoni eng’ taing’wong’." 
Joshua2:10 Amu kigegas ole kiiyaamnda Jehovah beekab Nyanjet ne Birir eng’ taing’wong’, ye kiobwane eng’ Misri; ak kit ne kioite laitorinik aeng’ che bo Amorik, che kimi Jordan bitonin, agot Sihon ak Og, che kiobar ogesu." 
Joshua2:11 Ak kingegas agobo noto, komeiyo mugulelwekyok, amata kong’et nyiganatet eng’ chi age tugul, amu okwek: amu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ko Kamuktaindent eng’ barak kipsengwet ak eng’ ng’ony." 
Joshua2:12 Ara anyun, asaok ale, oyosiewa eng’ Jehovah, amu kayaiywok ne mie, oyachi ne mie ak okwek gotab baba, ak ogona kaborunet ne bo iman:" 
Joshua2:13 amat obar baba, ak kamennyu, ak tupchosiekyuk, che murenik, ak che tibik, ak tugukwak tugul, ak osoru sobonwekyok eng’ meet." 
Joshua2:14 Kolenji bichoto inendet, Igeeri sobonwekwok sobonwekyok, ngot ko mong’ande boisioninyo; ak ye tun konech Jehovah emet, keyaun ne mie ak ne bo iman." 
Joshua2:15 Kichortae anyun ichek tirisiet eng’ rogoet: amu kimi gonnyi irimetab nganaset barak, ak kimenyei irimonoto barak." 
Joshua2:16 Ak kilenji ichek, Oba tulwet, si manyoruok bik che cheng’otok; ak oung’ge eng’ yoto betusiek somok, agoi koweek bik che cheng’otok: ak ye ibata, obe bandang’wong’." 
Joshua2:17 Ak kilenji bichoto inendet, Manamech ng’ogistab kayosioning’ung’ kesimjech kiyosieun." 
Joshua2:18 Keero, ye kiitu emoni iratyi borowoni birir tirisiet ne kechortaenech: ak iyum kobwa go kwandang’ung’ ak komet, ak tupchosieguk, ak bik tugul che bo gotab kwandang’ung’." 
Joshua2:19 Ak chi age tugul ne mandoi eng’ kurgetab gong’ung’ kowendi oret, kotebe korotikyik metinnyi, ak manamech ng’ogisto: ak chi age tugul ne omi tugul eng’ go, kotebe korotikyik metowekyok, ngot kotwa chi inendet." 
Joshua2:20 Ago ngot ing’ande boisioninyo ko manamech ng’ogistab kayosieng’ung’, ne kesimjech kiyosieun." 
Joshua2:21 Ak kile inendet, Ingoyaak ko u ng’alekwok. Ak kiunda koba, koba anyun: koratyi anyun borowet ne birir tirisiet." 
Joshua2:22 Kiba anyun bichoto, agoi tulwet, ak kotebe oloto betusiek somok, agoi koweek bichoto kiisubi ichek: ak kicheng’at ichek bichoto kiisubi eng’ oret tugul, ago manyor." 
Joshua2:23 Koweek anyun bichoto aeng’u kochortagei eng’ tulwet, koba kolanda, kot koit ole mi Josua weritab Nun; ak kimwachi inendet tuguk che kinyor agobo ichek." 
Joshua2:24 Ak kilenji bichoto Josua, Iman kigonde Jehovah emet tugul eunekyok; ak ne siirei noto, kobegu kowoi bikab emonoto eng’ tainnyo." 
Joshua3:1 Kong’eet anyun Josua karon mising’, ak kiba eng’ Sitim, agoi koit Jordan, inendet ak lagokab Israel tugul; ak kiruiyo yoto kotom kolanda." 
Joshua3:2 Kingobata betusiek somogu, koba kiptainik kobun kwenuteb nganaset;" 
Joshua3:3 ak kong’at bik, kolenji, Ye ogeer moingetab arorutietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak tisiik Lawik koibei, ong’eetye anyun eng’ ole omi, ak osub." 
Joshua3:4 Ago oloochine ak moinget eng’ kakwautik elfusiek aeng’ che bo eut: amorikyi moinget, si kobiit onai oret ne nyoljinok obun; amu tom obune orani." 
Joshua3:5 Kilenji Josua bik, Oanyinyge: amu yaei Jehovah kwong’utik mutai eng’ kwenung’wong’." 
Joshua3:6 Ak king’alalji Josua tisiik kolenji, Oganab moingetab arorutiet, ak oib olande ondoe bik. Koib anyun moingetab arorutiet, ak koba kondoe bik." 
Joshua3:7 Ak kilenji Jehovah Josua, Atau rani atororin eng’ taitab Israel tugul, si kobiit konai kole, ko u ye kiami koboto Musa, ami koboten ko u noto." 
Joshua3:8 Ak ing’at tisiik che ibei moingetab arorutiet, ilenji, Ye oit ngegutab beekab Jordan, otononse eng’ Jordan." 
Joshua3:9 Yeityo kolenji Josua lagokab Israel, Obwa yu, ogas ng’alekab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Joshua3:10 Kole anyun Josua, Onae eng’ ni ole, mi kwenung’wong’ Kamuktaindet ne sobei, ak onei inendet Kanamik eng’ taing’wong’ matiny, ak Hitik, Hibik, Perisik, Girgasik, Amorik, ak Jebusik." 
Joshua3:11 Ogeero, chorjingei Jordan moingetab arorutietab Kiptaiyat ne bo ng’ony komugul, kondoenak kolandoi." 
Joshua3:12 Noto anyun olewen bik taman ak aeng’ eng’ ortinwekab Israel, chito agenge eng’ oret age tugul." 
Joshua3:13 Ak ye tononie kelyekab tisiik che ibei moingetab Jehovah, Kiptaiatab ng’ony komugul, beekab Jordan, kopcheigei anyun beekab Jordan, ak kotononso beek che bunu meto kototen." 
Joshua3:14 Ak ye kingong’eetyo bik eng’ emaisiekwak, koba kolandae Jordan, kondoe tisiik che ibei moingetab arorutiet;" 
Joshua3:15 ak ye kingoit Jordan che kiibei moingonoto, ak kingotiech che ibei moingonoto tabandab beek, (amu nyiiei beek ainetab Jordan kot kosiir ngegusiekyik tugul eng’ betusiek tugul che bo kesisiet,)" 
Joshua3:16 kotononso anyun beek che bunu meto koba barak, kototen eng’ ole loo, eng’ Adam, nganaset ne negite Saretan: ak beek che kichortagei koba araraitab Araba, noto ko Araraita ne bo Munyuk, ko kiigestagei: kolanda anyun bik kolong’ji ole tokyingei Jeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Ak kitononso tisiik che kiibei moingetab arorutietab Jehovah eng’ ole yaamat eng’ kwenutab Jordan, ak kilanda Israel tugul eng’ ole yaamat, kot kolanda bororiet tugul eng’ Jordan kogestagei." 
Joshua4:1 Ak kingo kagolanda bororiet tugul eng’ Jordan, kong’alalji Jehovah Josua kolenji," 
Joshua4:2 Olewen anyun murenik taman ak aeng’ eng’ bik, chito agenge eng’ oret age tugul" 
Joshua4:3 ak ong’at ichek olenji, Okwei koik taman ak aeng’ eng’ kwenutab Jordan, ole katononie kelyekab tisiik, ak oib onde ng’ony eng’ ole omuung’e, ole oruitosi kemouni." 
Joshua4:4 Koguur anyun Josua bichoto taman ak aeng’, che kiga kochob eng’ lagokab Israel chito agenge eng’ oret age tugul:" 
Joshua4:5 ak kolenji Josua, Oba ondoe moingetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, kot oit kwenutab Jordan, ak koib chi age tugul eng’ okwek koita eng’ tigikyennyi, che te koitetab ortinwekab lagokab Israel:" 
Joshua4:6 si kobiit koek nito kaborunet eng’ kwenung’wong’, si ye tun teebenak lagokwok eng’ betusiek che bwanei kole, Iboru nee koichu?" 
Joshua4:7 Olenji anyun, Amu kipcheigei beekab Jordan eng’ taitab moingetab arorutiet ne bo Jehovah: ye kilong’une moingonoto Jordan, kotononso beekab Jordan kototen: koek koichu anyun kabwatet eng’ lagokab Israel koigeny." 
Joshua4:8 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel ko u ye king’at Josua, ak kokwei koik taman ak aeng’ eng’ kwenutab Jordan, ko u che kimwachi Jehovah Josua, che te koitetab ortinwekab lagokab Israel; ak kiib kot koit ole kiba koruiyo, ak konde ng’ony eng’ oloto." 
Joshua4:9 Ak kiiruruch Josua koichato taman ak aeng’ eng’ kwenutab Jordan, eng’ ole kitonone kalyekab tisiik che kiibei moingetab arorutiet: ak mi oloto, agoi kora." 
Joshua4:10 Amu kitonone kwenutab Jordan tisiik che kiibei moinget, agoi kobata tuguk tugul che king’at Jehovah Josua komwachi bik, ko u tugul che king’at Musa Josua: ak kiigirgir bik kolanda." 
Joshua4:11 Ak kingo kagolanda bik tugul kogestagei, kolanda moingetab Jehovah anyun, koboto tisiik, kogeerei bik." 
Joshua4:12 Kilanda lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad, ak kebebertab oretab Manase, kolaachi karik, kondoe lagokab Israel, ko u ye kimwachi Musa ichek:" 
Joshua4:13 ki olo bo elfusiek artam bik che kilanda eng’ taitab Jehovah, che kilaachi karik che kiga kochobok agobo luget, agoi warengetab Jeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Kiitoror Jehovah Josua eng’ betunoto eng’ taitab Israel tugul; ak kiiywei inendet, ko u ye kiiywei Musa, eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi." 
Joshua4:15 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Josua kolenji," 
Joshua4:16 Ng’at tisiik che ibei moingetab baornatet, kotogos eng’ Jordan." 
Joshua4:17 Kong’at anyun Josua tisiik kolenji, Otogosu eng’ Jordan." 
Joshua4:18 Ak kingotogos tisiik che kiibei moingetab arorutietab Jehovah eng’ Jordan, ak ye kingotiech tisiik emet ne yaamat, kowekyigei beekab Jordan komostanywa, ak kosiir ngegusiekyik tugul ko u eng’ tai." 
Joshua4:19 Ak kitogos bik eng’ Jordan eng’ betutab taman ne bo arawetab tai, ak kiteech emaisiek eng’ Gilgal, ole bo kiwotetab Jeriko ne tokyingei kong’asis." 
Joshua4:20 Ak kiiruruch Josua koichato taman ak aeng’ eng’ Gilgal, choto che kiibune Jordan." 
Joshua4:21 Ak king’alalji lagokab Israel kolenji, Ye tun teebe lagokwok kwanisiekwak eng’ betusiek che bwanei, kolenji, Iboru nee koichu?" 
Joshua4:22 Oborji anyun lagokwok konai, olenji, Kilong’une Israel Jordanini ko kagoyaam." 
Joshua4:23 Amu kiyai Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ Nyanjet ne Birir, ne kiyai koyaam eng’ tainnyo, agoi kelong’u:" 
Joshua4:24 si kobiit konai bik tugul che bo ng’ony eutab Jehovah, kole kim; si kobiit koiywei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ koigeny." 
Joshua5:1 Ak ye kingogas laitorinik tugul che bo Amorik, che kimi komostab cherongo eng’ Jordan, ak laitorinik tugul che bo Kananik, che ki negite nyanjet, kole kiyai Jehovah beekab Jordan koyaamnyo eng’ taitab lagokab Israel, agoi kelong’u, kobek mugulelwekwak, amata kong’et nyiganatet eng’ ichek, amu lagokab Israel." 
Joshua5:2 Kimwachi Jehovah Josua eng’ betusiechoto, kolenji, Yachige rotokab sengwetoik che uuen, ak imuratan kogeny lagokab Israel ne bo aeng’." 
Joshua5:3 Ak kiyachigei anyun Josua rotokab sengwetoik, ak koyatita lagokab Israel eng’ tulwet ne kiguure Gibea-aralot." 
Joshua5:4 Kit ne kiigochi Josua koyatitais ko amu - bik tugul che kimong’une Misri, che ki murenik, che ki murenik tugul che bo luget, ko kibek eng’ ong’atet eng’ oret, ye kingo kagomong’ eng’ Misri." 
Joshua5:5 Amu kiga kiyatita bik tugul che kimong’une oloto: ago bik tugul che kigisikyi ong’atet eng’ oret ye kimong’u eng’ Misri, ko kitom keyatita." 
Joshua5:6 Amu kibendat lagokab Israel eng’ kenyisiek artam eng’ ong’atet, agoi kobek bororiet tugul, che ki murenikab luget che kimong’une Misri, amu ma kas it kutitab Jehovah: che kiga koyosiechi Jehovah kole machamjin ichek kogeer emet ne kiga koyosiechi Jehovah kwanisiekwak kole konech, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik." 
Joshua5:7 Kiimuratan Josua lagokwak, che kiing’eet kogeer ichek: amu kitom kimuratan ichek, amu kima kimuratan eng’ oret." 
Joshua5:8 Ak ye kingo kagimuratan bororiet tugul, kotebe komoswekwak eng’ nganaset, agoi kosopcho." 
Joshua5:9 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Josua kolenji, Kamilde rani aistaenok tewernatetab Misri. Kigiguure anyun yoto Gilgal agoi ra." 
Joshua5:10 Ak kiteech lagokab Israel emaisiekwak eng’ Gilgal; ak kiyai paska koskoleny eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawet eng’ warengetab Jeriko. 
Joshua5:11 Ak kiam bek che bo kenyit ne kigosiirto che bo emonoto eng’ betut ne kiisubi paska, makatinik che ma kinde mermerek ak bek che kagigel, betunoto." 
Joshua5:12 Ak kiigesgei mana eng’ betut ne kiisubi noto, kingo kagoam bekab emonoto che bo kenyit ne kigosiirto; amata konyor kogeny lagokab Israel mana; ago kiam eng’ kenyinoto amitwogikab emetab Kanan." 
Joshua5:13 Ak ye ki negite Josua Jeriko, kotobendo ak kogeer, ogeero, kitononi chito ko katokyingei inendet kotinyei rotwennyi bo chok eng’ eunnyi ne kaging’us: ak kiwa Josua ole mitei inendet, kwo kolenji, I nenyo, anan i bo bunikyok?" 
Joshua5:14 Ak kile, Achicha; kanyo nguno aegu kiptaiyatab lugetab Jehovah. Ak kiing’uruk Josua kot koit ng’ony togennyi, ak kolos, ak kolenji, Mwachin nee kiptaiyandennyu otwogindennyi?" 
Joshua5:15 Ak kimwachi kiptaiyatab lugetab Jehovah Josua kolenji, Icheru kweoniguk eng’ kelyeguk; amu tilil yo itonone. Ak kiyai Josua ko u noto." 
Joshua6:1 (Kiga kiger Jeriko kouuiit amu lagokab Israel: kima komandoi chi, ak ko kima konyonei chi orit.)" 
Joshua6:2 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Josua kolenji, Keero, kande eung’ung’ Jeriko, ak laitoriandennyi, ak murenik che kimen che nyigonen." 
Joshua6:3 Ak oyiem nganaset, murenik tugul che bo luget, omuuti nganaset konyil agenge. Iyae ko u noto eng’ betusiek lo." 
Joshua6:4 Ak koib tisiik tisabu igondisiek tisab che bo kuinoikab mengichik eng’ taitab moinget: ak eng’ betut ne bo tisab oyiem nganaset konyil tisab, koguut tisiik igondisiek." 
Joshua6:5 Ak ye kagoguut koek keny kuinoichoto, ak ye ogas cheetab igondit, kowaach bik tugul waagat ne o; ak kolul irimetab nganaset kwo ng’ony, ak kwo chi age tugul kotogosta kotoorjigei ye kageer." 
Joshua6:6 Koguur anyun Josua weritab Nun tisiik kolenji, Oib moingetab arorutiet, ak ingoib tisiik tisabu igondisiek tisab che bo kuinoikab mengichik kondoe moingetab Jehovah." 
Joshua6:7 Ak kilenji bik, Oba, ak oyiem nganaset, ak ongondoe moingetab Jehovah murenik che kiilaachi karik." 
Joshua6:8 Ak kiyaak ko u noto, ye kingo kagomwachi Josua bik, koba tisiik tisabu che kiibei igondisiek tisab che bo kuinoikab mengichik kondo eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak koguutei igondisiek: ak kiisub ichek moingetab arorutietab Jehovah." 
Joshua6:9 Ak kiindoe murenik che kiilaachi karik tisiik che kiguutei igondisiek, ak kiisub bik che kiletu, moinget, koguutoti tisiik igondisiek ak kobendi." 
Joshua6:10 Ak king’at Josua bik kolenji, Amat owaach, anan otwegu, amat komong’une ng’olyo kutiswekwok, kot koit betut ne alenjinok owaach; owaach anyun." 
Joshua6:11 Koib anyun moingetab Jehovah komuute nganaset konyil agenge: ak kobwa nganaset, koruiyo." 
Joshua6:12 Ak king’eet Josua karon mising’, ak koib tisiik moingetab Jehovah." 
Joshua6:13 Ak kiba ko u noto kotugul tisiik tisabu che kiibei igondisiek tisab che bo kuinoikab mengichik, kondoe moingetab Jehovah, ak koguutei igondisiek: ak kiindoe ichek murenik che kiilaachi karik, ak kiisub bik che kiletu moingetab Jehovah, koguutoti tisiik igondisiek ak kobendi." 
Joshua6:14 Kiyiem nganaset betut ne bo aeng’ konyil agenge, ak koweektagei koba nganaset: kiyai ko u noto betusiek lo." 
Joshua6:15 Ak eng’ betut ne bo tisab, kong’eetyo karon inne, ko kairir emet, ak komuut nganaset ko u noto konyil tisab: betut noto kityo ne kiyiem nganaset konyil tisab." 
Joshua6:16 Ak eng’ ne bo tisab, ko kiguutei tisiik igondisiek, kolenji Josua bik, Owaach anyun: amu kagogonok Jehovah nganasani." 
Joshua6:17 Ak kitabanjin Jehovah nganasani, nganaset ak tugul che mi: kobate Rahab chepkugoniondonoto, ne kibagaktoi kosob, inendet ak tugul che mi gonnyi, amu kiuny bik che kigiyogu." 
Joshua6:18 Ago oripge okweget eng’ kiy ne itabanat, si ma ye kaotaban, ko ta onam kogeny; si moyai nganasetab Israel koek ne chubot, ak onyalil." 
Joshua6:19 Ago fedaisiek tugul, ak tahabu tugul, ak tuguk tugul che bo sugunonik, ak che bo karik, ko kigitabanji Jehovah: kiibu choto kobwa ole kigonore tugukab Jehovah." 
Joshua6:20 Kowaach anyun bik, ak koguut tisiik igondisiek, ak kingogas bik cheetab igondit, kowaach bik eng’ waagat ne o, ak kolul irimet kobutyi ng’ony, kot kolany bik koba nganaset orit, kwo chi tugul tai kotoorjigei ye kageerei, ak kinam nganaset." 
Joshua6:21 Ak kibare rotwetab chok tugul che kimi nganaset koges, muren ak kwony, ne ming’in ak ne os, ak tany, ak kechir, ak sigirio." 
Joshua6:22 Kolenji Josua bichoto aeng’ che kiga ba kogesgei emet, Oba gotab chepkugoniot, ak omutu komong’ kwonyoto, ak tugul che tinyei, ko u ye kioyosiechi." 
Joshua6:23 Kiba go anyun murenjoto aeng’, segeik, ak komut Rahab komong’, koboto kwandanyi ak kamennyi, ak tupchosiekyik, ak tugul che kitinyei, kiimut komong’ sang’ tilionutikyik tugul agichek; ak kiimut koba kotebe nganasetab Israel sang’." 
Joshua6:24 Yeityo kobeel nganaset, koboto tugul che kimi orit: ago kiinde choto ole kigonore tugukab Jehovah, fedaisiek, tahabu, ak tuguk che bo sugunonik, ak che bo karik." 
Joshua6:25 Ago kibagach Josua Rahab chepkugoniot kosob, koboto bikab gotab kwandanyi, ak tugul che kitinyei; ak kimeny ak Israel agoi ra; amu kiuny bik che kigiyokto, che kiga iyokto Josua koba kosegei Jeriko." 
Joshua6:26 Ak king’at Josua ichek eng’ kayosiet eng’ betusiechoto, kolenji, Chubot eng’ taitab Jehovah chito ne ng’eetei ak koteech nganasani bo Jeriko: lume lumeiywondennyi meetab taitanyi, ak kolumda kurgotikyik eng’ meetab towennyi." 
Joshua6:27 Kimi anyun Jehovah koboto Josua; ak kiyom emet komugul kalosunennyi. 
Joshua7:1 Ago kiyai lagokab Israel chalwokto eng’ kit ne itabanat: amu kiib Akan weritab Karmi, weritab Sabdi, weritab Sera, ne bo bororietab Juda, tuguk alak eng’ che itabanotin, ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo lagokab Israel." 
Joshua7:2 Ak kiiyokto Josua bik eng’ Jeriko koba Ai, ne negite Bet-aben, eng’ komostab kong’asis eng’ Be-tel, ak komwachi kolenji, Oba osegei emonoto. Kiba anyun bik kosegei Ai." 
Joshua7:3 Ak kiweektagei koba ole mi Josua ak kolenji, Amat koba bik tugul; ago ingoba bik olo bo elfusiek aeng’ anan ko somok koba kobar Ai; amat ingong’etyot bik tugul koba olindo; amu ng’ering’ bichoto." 
Joshua7:4 Koba anyun bik olo bo elfusiek somok: ak kimweune bikab Ai. 
Joshua7:5 Ak kibar bikab Ai olo bo bik sosom ak lo eng’ ichek: ak kion ichek eng’ ormarichet, kot koit Sebarik, ak kibarat ichek korektoi: ak kimeiyo mugulelwekab bik, kot koigei beek." 
Joshua7:6 Kigerer anyun Josua ngorikyik, ak kong’uruk kot koit ng’ony togennyi eng’ taitab moingetab Jehovah agoi koskoleny, inendet ak boisiekab Israel; ak kiinde metowekwak temburiek." 
Joshua7:7 Ak kile Josua, Bwa wee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, amu nee si imutu bichu kolong’une Jordan, si igochech eunekab Amorik, kelusye? Kita kaigai kemeny Jordan bitonin!" 
Joshua7:8 Ee Kiptaiyat, amwae nee anyun, ye kagomweune Israel bunikwak!" 
Joshua7:9 Amu tun kasei Kanamik ak tugul che menyei emet, agobo kiito, ak koyiemech komuutech, ak kotil kainennyo kobet eng’ ng’ony: si iite nee kaineng’ung’ ne o?" 
Joshua7:10 Ak kilenji Jehovah Josua, Ng’eet; amu nee si ibutyi ng’ony ing’uruge ko u ni?" 
Joshua7:11 Kogoyai Israel tengekto; ee, kogobistoe kayomisennyu ne kiga ang’at: ee, kogoib tuguk eng’ che itabanotin; ak kogochorso, ak koberberis, ak kogonde ole mi tugukwak." 
Joshua7:12 Noto anyun, maimuchi lagokab Israel kotononso eng’ taitab bunikwak, komweune bunikwak, amu kagoek che chubotin: ma ami kobotok kogeny, ngot ko mong’em eng’ kwenung’wong’ kioto itabanat." 
Joshua7:13 Ng’eet ianyiny bik, ilenji, Oanyinge agobo mutai: amu kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, kole, Mi kiy ne itabanat kwenung’ung’, ee Israel: memuchi itonone taitab buniguk, agoi oiste kioto itabanat eng’ kwenung’wong’." 
Joshua7:14 Kimutwok karon origu kobee bororiosiekwok: ak korik bororiet ne namei Jehovah kobee ortinwekwak: ak korik oret ne namei Jehovah kobee gorikwak: ak got ne kanam Jehovah korigu chito agenge agenge. 
Joshua7:15 Ak inendet ne kinamjin kit ne itabanat kebeelei eng’ mat, chichoto ak tugul che tinyei: amu kobistoe kayomisetab Jehovah, amu koyai abusnatet eng’ Israel." 
Joshua7:16 Kong’eet anyun Josua karon inne, ak komut Israel korik kobee bororiosiekwak; ak kiginam bororietab Juda:" 
Joshua7:17 ak kiimut inendet oretab Juda korik; ak kinam oretab Seraik: ak kiimut oretab Seraik korik konyonune chito agenge agenge; ak kiginam Sabdi: 
Joshua7:18 ak kiimut gonnyi konyonune chito agenge agenge; ak kiginam Akan, weritab Karmi, weritab Sabdi, weritab Sera, ne bo bororietab Juda." 
Joshua7:19 Ak kolenji Josua Akan, Werinnyu, asain ale, igochi torornatet Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ng’ang’ji inendet; ak imwawa nguno kit ne koiyai; mat iung’ena." 
Joshua7:20 Ak kiwolji Akan Josua kolenji, Eng’ iman, ko koayachi tengek Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, ak koayai ko u ni ak ko u ni:" 
Joshua7:21 kingageer eng’ tuguk che kigiluul ngoriet ne kararan ne bo Babulon, ak sekelisiek bogol aeng’ che bo feda, ak tahabu ne u chamaniet ne nyigisindanyi ko sekelisiek konom, agase miat anyun, ak aib; ak ogeero, ung’otin tukchoto eng’ ng’ony, eng’ kwenutab emainnyu, ak tabanu ng’ony feda eng’ tukchoto." 
Joshua7:22 Koyokto anyun Josua bik, ak kiruai koba emait; ak ogeero, ki ung’otin eng’ emainnyi, ak kitabanu feda ng’ony." 
Joshua7:23 Ak kiinem eng’ kwenutab emait, ak koipchi Josua, ak lagokab Israel tugul; ak kiinde ng’ony eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Joshua7:24 Ak kinam Josua ak Israel tugul, Akan weritab Sera, ak feda, ak ngoriet, ak tahabu ne u chamaniet, ak werikyik, ak tibikyik, ak tukyik, ak sigirokyik, ak kechirekyik, ak emainnyi, ak tugul che kitinyei: ak kiimut koba atebwetab Akor." 
Joshua7:25 Ak kilenji Josua, Amu nee si inyalilech? Inyalilin Jehovah rani. Ak kilach Israel tugul inendet eng’ koik; ak kobeel eng’ mat, ak kolach ichek eng’ koik." 
Joshua7:26 Ak kiiruruch koik eng’ baragunnyi, ak mi koichato agoi ra; ak kimeto Jehovah koromnatetab neregekyik. Noto anyun kigiguure kainetab yoto, Atebwetab Akor, agoi ra." 
Joshua8:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Josua kolenji, Meiywei, anan komein mugulelel: imut bik tugul che bo luget, ak ong’eetye otogoste Ai: keero, kande eung’ung’ laitoriatab Ai, koboto bikyik, ak nganasennyi, ak emennyi:" 
Joshua8:2 ak iyachi Ai ak laitoriandennyi kit ne kiiyachi Jeriko ak laitoriandennyi: kobate tugukyik che kiluulei, ak tuga, che oipchinige kobunjok koek barunenik: inde bik koribisyo eng’ ole bo nganaset let." 
Joshua8:3 King’eet anyun Josua ak bik tugul che bo luget, koba Ai: ak kilewen Josua bik elfusiek sosom, murenik che kimen che nyigonen, ak koyokto koba kemoi." 
Joshua8:4 Ak kong’at ichek kolenji, Ogeero, oribistosi otokyinige nganaset, eng’ nganaset ole bo let: amat olooegitu mising’ eng’ nganasanato, ago ochoboge okwek tugul:" 
Joshua8:5 si arikyi nganaset ane ak bik tugul che mi kobota: ak ye mong’ kobokyech, ko u eng’ tai, kemwei eng’ tainywa;" 
Joshua8:6 si komong’ kosubwech, kot kirete eng’ nganaset; amu mwaei kole, Kamweenech, ko u yuginye; kemwei ko u noto eng’ tainywa:" 
Joshua8:7 ak ong’eetye eng’ ribiset; ak onam nganaset: amu indoi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eunekwok. 
Joshua8:8 Ak ye kaonam nganaset, obeel; oyai ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah: ogeero, kaang’atak." 
Joshua8:9 Ak kiiyokto Josua ichek koba: ak kiba koribisyo kotebe kwenutab Bet-el ak Ai, komostab cherongo ne bo Ai: ak kiruiyo Josua ole mi bik kemounoto." 
Joshua8:10 Ak king’eet Josua karon mising’ ak koyum bik, ak kotogosta, inendet ak boisiekab Israel, kondoe bik koba Ai." 
Joshua8:11 Ak kitogosta bik tugul che bo luget che kimi koboto inendet, ak kiba korikta, koit ole boch nganaset, koba koteekso eng’ murot ne bo katam ne bo Ai: kimi atebwet kwenunnyi ak Ai." 
Joshua8:12 Ak kiimut bik olo bo elfusiek mut, ak konde koribisyo eng’ kwenutab Bet-el ak Ai, eng’ komostab cherongo ne bo nganaset." 
Joshua8:13 Konde bik anyun kotebi ko u noto, luget tugul ne kimi murot ne bo katam eng’ nganaset, ak bikwak tugul che kiribistos che kimi komostab cherongo ne bo nganaset; ak kiwa Josua kemounoto kot koit kwenutab atebwet." 
Joshua8:14 Ak kingogeer laitoriatab Ai, kochirjiren, kong’eetyo karon inne, ak kimanda bikab nganaset koba kobargei ak Israel, inendet ak bikyik tugul, eng’ sait ne kiga kichob, eng’ ole tokyingei Araba; ago kima nai kole mi bik che ribistos agobo inendet eng’ nganaset let." 
Joshua8:15 Ak kiyaigei Josua ak Israel tugul ko u yo kagiterter eng’ tainywa, ak kimwei kobun oretab ong’atet." 
Joshua8:16 Ak kigiguur bik tugul che kimi nganaset koba koon: ak kion bichoto Josua, ak kigireto ichek kolooegitu eng’ nganaset." 
Joshua8:17 Ak kima komi chi ne king’et eng’ Ai anan ko Bet-el, ne ma wa koon Israel: ak kibagach nganaset ko seng’eng’at, ak koon Israel." 
Joshua8:18 Ak kilenji Jehovah Josua, Tokyi Ai ng’otit ne itinye eng’ eut; amu andoi eung’ung’ nganasanito. Ak kitokyi Josua ng’otit ne kimi eunnyi nganaset." 
Joshua8:19 Ak king’eetyo bichu karibistos kochok eng’ ole karibisye, ak kiruai eng’ yoto ye kingoiito Josua eunnyi, koba kochut nganaset ak konam; ak kobeel nganaset kochokyi." 
Joshua8:20 Ak kingogusgong’ bikab Ai, kogeer, ak ogeero, kitogostoi iyetab nganaset kowendi barak, ak kimata kosich kimnatet komwechi komosi anan ko komosi: koweek anyun bichu kamwee kobendi ong’atet, koweekyigei bichu kaonu." 
Joshua8:21 Ak kingogeer Josua ak Israel tugul kole kagonam nganaset bichu karibistos, ak kogeer kotogostoi iyetab nganaset, koweek anyun, ak kobar bikab Ai." 
Joshua8:22 Ak kibwa agichek che kimi nganaset kobargei ak bichoto; kotebe anyun kwenutab Israel, kimi alak komosi, komi alak komosi: ak kibar ichek, kot ko ma ituuch agot agenge eng’ ichek kong’et anan kochilil." 
Joshua8:23 Ak kinam laitoriatab Ai kosobei, ak komutyi Josua." 
Joshua8:24 Ak kingo kagoges Israel baretab bik tugul che kimenyei Ai eng’ warenget, eng’ ong’atet ole kione ichek, ak kingo kagobutyo tugul eng’ rotwetab chok kot kogesgei, koweektagei anyun Israel tugul koba Ai, ak koba kobare Ai rotwetab chok." 
Joshua8:25 Ak tugul che kiibutyo betunoto, murenik ak kwonyik, ko ki elfusiek taman ak aeng’, choto ko ki bik tugul che bo Ai." 
Joshua8:26 Amu ma aruny Josua eunnyi, ne kiga iito koname ng’otit, kot kobar bik tugul che kimenyei Ai koges." 
Joshua8:27 Ago kikweri Israel tuga ak barunenikab nganasanato kobunji, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kiga ng’at Josua." 
Joshua8:28 Kobeel anyun Josua Ai, ak koyai koek tulwo kogeny, koek karatia, agoi ra." 
Joshua8:29 Ak kiisonginin laitoriatab Ai eng’ ketit kot koimen: ak kingororokta asista kong’at Josua kechoor mustanyi eng’ ketit konyo ng’ony, ak kowirji ole kichutei eng’ kurgetab nganaset, ak korurukyi yoto karurugutiet ne o ne bo koik, agoi ra." 
Joshua8:30 Kiteekyi anyun Josua Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, kaptisisiet eng’ tulwetab Ebal," 
Joshua8:31 ko u ye king’at Musa otwogindetab Jehovah lagokab Israel, ko u ye kigisir eng’ bukuitab Ng’atutikab Musa, kaptisisietab koik che ma kiwai, che ma wai chi eng’ karna: ak kiigochi eng’ yoto Jehovah kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak kieng’ji kagochinoikab kalyet." 
Joshua8:32 Ak kisirji koichato Ng’atutikab Musa, che kisir eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
Joshua8:33 Ak kitononso Israel tugul ak boisiekwak, ak kiptainikwak, ak kiruogikwak, eng’ moinget komosi ak komosi eng’ taitab tisiik Lawik, che ibei moingetab arorutietab Jehovah, koboto toondet ak ne kigisikyi ga; kimi kebeber taitab tulwetab Gerisim, komi kebeber taitab tulwetab Ebal; ko u ye kiga ng’at Musa otwogindetab Jehovah, kole kiberuri bikab Israel korok." 
Joshua8:34 Ak ye ibata kosoman ng’alek tugul che bo Ng’atutik, kaberuret ak chubisiet, ko u tugul che kigisir eng’ bukuitab Ng’atutik." 
Joshua8:35 Mami ng’olyo eng’ ng’alek tugul che king’at Musa ne ma soman Josua eng’ taitab tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel, komi kwonyik, ak lagok, ak toek che kimi kwenunywa." 
Joshua9:1 Ak ye kingogas laitorinik tugul che kimi Jordan bitonin, emetab tulonok, ak warenget, ak ngegut tugul ne bo araraita ne o ne mi tai eng’ Lebanon, Hitik, Amorik, Kananik, Perisik, Hibik, koboto Jebusik;" 
Joshua9:2 koyumgei kobargei ak Josua koboto Israel, eng’ kabwatet agenge." 
Joshua9:3 Ago kingogas bik che kimenyei Gibeon kit ne kiga yachi Josua Jeriko ak Ai," 
Joshua9:4 koyai ng’alset agichek, ak koba koigei bik che kiyoktoi, ak kiib kuniok che osen, eng’ sigirokwak, ak lolotinwekab divaik che osen, che kigogerer, che kigenabanab;" 
Joshua9:5 ak kweonik che kigoosegitu che kigeginogin, che kimi kelyekwak, ak ngoroik che osen che kiilaachi; ak makatinik tugul che ki amitwogikwak ko kiga koyaamnyo ak koucho." 
Joshua9:6 Ak kiba ole mi Josua eng’ nganaset eng’ Gilgal, ak komwachi inendet ak bikab Israel kolenji, Kibunu emet ne loo; ara anyun ongeyai arorutiet ak okwek." 
Joshua9:7 Ak kilenji bikab Israel Hibik, Kale ng’o momenye kwenunnyo; kimuktoi ano keyai arorutiet ak okwek?" 
Joshua9:8 Ak kilenji ichek Josua, Ki otwogiguk. Ak kilenji Josua ichek, O ng’o? Ak obunu ano?" 
Joshua9:9 Ak kolenji, Bunu otwogiguk emet ne loo kot amu kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: amu kigegas etunatennyi, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai eng’ Misri," 
Joshua9:10 ak tuguk tugul che kiyachi laitorinik aeng’ che bo Amorik, che kimi Jordan bitonin, Sihon laitoriatab Hesbon, ak Og laitoriatab Basan, ne kimi Astarot." 
Joshua9:11 Ak kimwawech boisiekyok ak bik tugul che menyei emennyo, kole, Oib amitwogik eng’ eunekwok che bo banda, obe otorokte, ak olenji, Ki otwogikwok: ara anyun, ongeyai arorutiet ak okwek." 
Joshua9:12 Kigiibu makatinichuchok eng’ gorikyok ko ta komi ma eng’ betut ne kiging’eetosi kebwane oling’wong’; ago nguno ogeero, kigoyaamnyo, ak koucho:" 
Joshua9:13 ak ki leelach lolotinwechu kiga kinyiit divaik, ak ogeero, kigogereris: ak kigoosegitu ngoroichuchok ak kweonikyok amu banda ne koi kot." 
Joshua9:14 Ak kiam ichek amitwogikab bichoto, ama teeb ng’omnatet kobun kutitab Jehovah." 
Joshua9:15 Ak kiyai kalyet Josua ak icheget, ak koyai arorutiet, kole kobagakta kosopcho: ak kiiyosiechi bounikab tuiyet." 
Joshua9:16 Ak kingobata betusiek somogu, ko kagoyai arorutiet ak ichek, kogas kele, kaga ki bikab kokwenywa, ak komenyei kwenunywa." 
Joshua9:17 Ak kiba lagokab Israel ak koit nganasokab bichoto eng’ betutab somok. Nganasokwak ko ki Gibeon, Kepira, Beerot, ak Kiriat-jearim." 
Joshua9:18 Ak ma bar lagokab Israel ichek, amu kiga koyosiechi bounikab tuiyet eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel. Ak kiing’unyng’uny tuiyet komugul agobo bounik." 
Joshua9:19 Ago kilenji bounik tugul tuiyet komugul, Kigiyosiechi ichek eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel: ara anyun, magimuchi ketwa ichek." 
Joshua9:20 Kiyachini ko u ni, ak kebagakte kosopcho; si matebenech neregek, amu kayosiet ne kigiyosiechi." 
Joshua9:21 Ak kilenji bounik ichek, Obagach kosopcho: kiek anyun ichek che betei kwenik ak koramjin beek tuiyet komugul ko u ye kiga mwachi bounik." 
Joshua9:22 Kiiyokto anyun Josua keguur ichek, ak kong’alalji kolenji, Amu nee si ong’alech, ole, Kimenye ole loo mising’ eng’ okwek; ago kaga omenye kwenunnyo?" 
Joshua9:23 Ara anyun, o chubotin, amagoi betyo eng’ okwek che otwogik, che betei kwenik ak che ramei beek che bo gotab Kamuktaindennyu." 
Joshua9:24 Ak kiwolji ichek Josua kolenji, Amu kigimwachi otwogiguk iman, ko u ye king’at Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ otwogindennyi Musa kogonok emet tugul ak kobar eng’ taing’wong’ bik tugul che menyei emoni; kigiweisie anyun mising’ agobo sobonwekyok amu okwek, keyai anyun ko u nito." 
Joshua9:25 Ara anyun, keero, kimi euneguk: ko u ye igeere ile mie eng’ inye ak ko bo iman, iyaiywech ko u noto." 
Joshua9:26 Ak kiyachi anyun ko u noto, ak kosor eng’ eunekab lagokab Israel, si mabar." 
Joshua9:27 Ak kiyai Josua ichek eng’ betunoto koek che betei kwenik ak koramjin beek tuiyet ak kaptisisietab Jehovah, agoi ra, eng’ ole leweni inendet." 
Joshua10:1 Ak kingogas Adoni-sedek laitoriatab Jerusalem kole kigonam Josua Ai, ak kong’em koges; ko u ye kiga yachi Jeriko ak laitoriandennyi, koyachi ko u noto Ai ak laitoriandennyi; ak ko u ye kiyai kalyet bikab Gibeon ak Israel, ak komi kwenunywa;" 
Joshua10:2 koiywei mising’, amu ki nganaset ne o Gibeon, ko u age eng’ nganasokab kaplaitoriat, ak amu ki o kosiir Ai, ak ki kimen murenik tugul che bo nganasanato." 
Joshua10:3 Koyokto anyun Adoni-sedek laitoriatab Jerusalem, Hoam laitoriatab Hebron, ak Piram laitoriatab Jarmut, ak Japia laitoriatab Lakis, ak Debir laitoriatab Eglon, kolenji," 
Joshua10:4 Otogosu oldanyu, obwa otoreta, kebar Gibeon: amu kigoyai kalyet ak Josua ak lagokab Israel." 
Joshua10:5 Kiiyumgei anyun laitorinik mutu che bo Amorik, laitoriatab Jerusalem, ak laitoriatab Hebron, ak laitoriatab Jarmut, ak laitoriatab Lakis, ak laitoriatab Eglon ak kotogosta, ichek ak lugosiekwak tugul, ak koteech taitab Gibeon, ak kobargei ak nganasanato." 
Joshua10:6 Kiiyokto bikab Gibeon Josua eng’ nganaset eng’ Gilgal, kolenji, Amebagakte otwogiguk; nyo togosu ichogu, ak isoruech, ak itoretech: amu kagoyumjeigei laitorinik tugul che bo Amorik che menyei emetab tulonok." 
Joshua10:7 Kitogosta anyun Josua eng’ Gilgal, inendet ak bik tugul che bo luget, koboto murenik tugul che kimen che nyigonen." 
Joshua10:8 Ak kilenji Jehovah Josua, Ameiywei ichek: amu kande ichek euneguk; mami chi eng’ ichek ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taing’ung’." 
Joshua10:9 Kiche anyun Josua ichek; amu kitogosta eng’ Gilgal kemout komugul. 
Joshua10:10 Kiiyesta Jehovah ichek eng’ taitab Israel, ak kobar ichek eng’ baret ne o eng’ Gibeon, ak koon kobun oret ne togostoi Bet-horon, ak kobarat kot koit Aseka, ak Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Ak ye kingomwei eng’ taitab Israel, ye kichortaegei Bet-horon, kowir Jehovah ichek eng’ koik che eechen che bunu kipsengwet kot koit Aseka, ak kibek; ki chang’ che kibek eng’ koikab ropta kosiir che kibar lagokab Israel eng’ rotwetab chok." 
Joshua10:12 King’alalji anyun Josua Jehovah eng’ betut ne kiigoito Jehovah Amorik eng’ taitab lagokab Israel; ak kimwa eng’ taitab lagokab Israel, kole, “Ee Asisi, tonon eng’ Gibeon; Ak inye Arawet, itelel eng’ atebwetab Aijalon.”" 
Joshua10:13 Ak kitonon asista, ak mata kwo arawet, Kot koyaaktochigei mugetut bororiet eng’ bunikwak. Tos ma kisirji nito bukuitab Jasar? Ak kitonon, mata kwo asista eng’ kwenutab kipsengwet, mata kwo, ama chakta kororokta ne te betut komugul." 
Joshua10:14 Ak kitom kobiitu betut ne u noto eng tai amata kobiit eng’ let, ne kigas Jehovah kutitab chi: amu kiyai Jehovah luget agobo Israel." 
Joshua10:15 Kiweek Josua anyun, koboto Israel tugul, koba nganaset eng’ Gilgal." 
Joshua10:16 Kimwei anyun laitorinichoto mutu, ak kounygei eng’ kebenet eng’ Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Ak kigimwachi Josua kelenji, Kagenyor laitorinichato mut, kounyegei eng’ kebenet eng’ Makeda." 
Joshua10:18 Kole Josua anyun, Omilji koik che eechen kurgetab kebenet, ak onde bik yoto korib:" 
Joshua10:19 amat otebi okweget; oon bunikwok, ak obar che mi let; amat ochamji koba nganasokwak orit: amu kagonde Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eunekwok." 
Joshua10:20 Ak kingo kagobar Josua ak lagokab Israel ichek koges eng’ baret ne o mising’, kot kogesgei, ak koba che king’et nganasok che ng’ototin," 
Joshua10:21 koweek anyun bik tugul eng’ kalyet koba nganaset ole mi Josua eng’ Makeda: ma biit chi ne kitwek komwa ng’olyot ne ya agobo lagokab Israel. 
Joshua10:22 Komwa Josua anyun, kole, Oyat kurgetab kebenet, yeityo omoong’u laitorinichoto mut eng’ kebenet, ak omutwa." 
Joshua10:23 Ak kiyai ko u noto, ak kiimutyi inendet laitorinichato mut, laitoriatab Jerusalem, laitoriatab Hebron, laitoriatab Jarmut, laitoriatab Lakis, ak laitoriatab Eglon." 
Joshua10:24 Ak kingo kagomutyi Josua laitorinichato, koguur Josua murenik tugul che bo Israel, ak komwachi bounikab luget che kiga ba koboto inendet, kolenji, Obwa origu, onde kelyekwok kaatwekab laitorinichu. Kobwa anyun korik, ak konde kelyekwak kaatwekab bichoto." 
Joshua10:25 Ak kilenji Josua ichek, Amoiywei, anan otoptoben; ogimegitu ak onyiganitu: amu yachin ko u noto Jehovah bunikwok tugul che obarege." 
Joshua10:26 Ye ibata, kokwerot Josua ichek ak kobar, ak kosonginine ketik mut: ak kitebe ketik kosonginindos agoi koimen." 
Joshua10:27 Ak ye kimachei kororokta asista, kogon Josua ng’atutiet, kechoor anyun eng’ ketik kobwa ng’ony, ak kowirji kebenet ole kiga ung’egei, ak konde koik che eechen kurgetab kebenet, mi agoi ra." 
Joshua10:28 Ak kinam Josua Makeda betunoto, ak kobar koboto laitoriandennyi eng’ rotwetab chok; kibar ichek ak bik tugul che kimi orit kogesgei, ma bagakta agot agenge: ak kiyachi laitoriatab Makeda ko u ye kiga yachi laitoriatab Jeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Ak kisiirto Josua eng’ Makeda, koboto Israel tugul, koba Libna, ak kobargei ak Libna:" 
Joshua10:30 ak kiigoito Jehovah nganasanato agine, koboto laitoriandennyi, konde eunekab Israel; ak kibar nganasanato koboto bik tugul che kimi orit eng’ rotwetab chok; ma bagakta agot agenge eng’ orit; ak kiyachi laitoriandennyi ko u ye kiga yachi laitoriatab Jeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Ak kisiirto Josua eng’ Libna, koboto Israel tugul, koba Lakis, ak koteech taitab nganasanato, ak kobargei:" 
Joshua10:32 ak kiinde Jehovah Lakis eunekab Israel, ak kinam eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, ak kobar koboto bik tugul che kimi orit, eng’ rotwetab chok, ko u tugul che kiga yachi Libna." 
Joshua10:33 Kitogos anyun Horam laitoriatab Geser kolen kotoret Lakis; ak kibar Josua inendet koboto bikyik, kot ko ma bagakyi agot agenge." 
Joshua10:34 Ak kisiirto Josua eng’ Lakis, koboto Israel tugul, koba Eglon, ak koteech taitab nganasanato, ak kobargei;" 
Joshua10:35 ak kinam eng’ betunoto, ak kobar eng’ rotwetab chok bik tugul che kimi orit, ak kibar kogesgei eng’ betunoto ko u tugul che kiga yachi Lakis." 
Joshua10:36 Ak kitogosta Josua eng’ Eglon, koboto Israel tugul, koba Hebron; ak kobargei:" 
Joshua10:37 ak kinam, ak kobar eng’ rotwetab chok, bik tugul che kimi orit; koboto laitoriandennyi, ak nganasokyik tugul, ma bagakta agot agenge, ko u tugul che kiga yachi Eglon; king’em koges, koboto bik tugul che kimi orit." 
Joshua10:38 Ak kiweek Josua, koboto Israel tugul, koba Debir; ak kobargei:" 
Joshua10:39 ak kinam, koboto laitoriandennyi, ak nganasokyik tugul; ak kobar ichek eng’ rotwetab chok, ak kobar bik tugul che kimi orit kogesgei; ma bagakta agot agenge: ko u ye kiga yachi Hebron, koyachi Debir ko u noto, koboto laitoriandennyi; ko u ye kiga yachi Libna agine ak laitoriandennyi." 
Joshua10:40 Kibar anyun Josua emet tugul, emetab tulonok, ak komostab Murot ne bo Tai, ak warenget, ak chepkeigeusiek, koboto laitorinikwak tugul; ma bagakta kong’et agot agenge: kibar koges tugul che kitinyei kabuset, ko u ye king’at Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Joshua10:41 Ak kibar Josua ichek koboch Kades-barnea agoi Gasa, ak emet komugul ne bo Gosen, agoi Gibeon." 
Joshua10:42 Ak kinam Josua laitorinichoto tugul, ak emotinwekwak eng’ betusiechoto, amu kiyai Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, luget agobo Israel." 
Joshua10:43 Ak kiweek Josua, koboto Israel tugul, koba nganaset eng’ Gilgal." 
Joshua11:1 Ak kingogas Jabin laitoriatab Hasor, koyokto ng’olyo kwo oldab Jobab laitoriatab Madon, ak laitoriatab Simron, ak laitoriatab Aksap," 
Joshua11:1 Ak kingogas Jabin laitoriatab Hasor, koyokto ng’olyo kwo oldab Jobab laitoriatab Madon, ak laitoriatab Simron, ak laitoriatab Aksap," 
Joshua11:2 ak laitorinik che kimi murot ne bo katam, eng’ emetab tulonok, ak eng’ Araba, murot ne bo tai eng’ Kinerot, ak eng’ warenget, ak eng’ baragusiekab Dor eng’ cherongo," 
Joshua11:3 agoi oldab Kananik eng’ kong’asis, ak eng’ cherongo, koboto Amorik, ak Hitik, ak Perisik, ak Jebusik eng’ emetab tulonok, ak Hibik eng’ Hermon kel eng’ emetab Mispa." 
Joshua11:4 Ak kimanda icheget ak lugosiekwak tugul, bik ng’isiat, che te ng’aniek che mi ngegutab nyanjet eng’ chang’indo, ak mbartanyisiek ak karisiek ng’isiat." 
Joshua11:5 Ak kituiyo laitorinichuto tugul; ak kibwa ak koteech komosta agenge eng’ ye negite beekab Merom, si kobargei ak Israel." 
Joshua11:6 Ak kilenji Jehovah Josua, Ameiyweisie amu ichek; agoitoi ichek tugul kebar eng’ taitab Israel mutai ko te ni asis: iebe kwarinikab mbartanyisiekwak, ak ibeel karisiekwak eng’ mat." 
Joshua11:7 Konyo anyun Josua, koboto bik tugul che bo luget, koborio ak ichek eng’ ye negite beekab Merom koche, ak kobar." 
Joshua11:8 Ak kiinde Jehovah ichek eunekab Israel, ak kibar, koon agoi Sidon ne o, kot koit Misrepot-maim, agoi atebwetab Mispe ole tokyingei kong’asis; ak kibar ichek kot ko ma bagakta agot agenge." 
Joshua11:9 Ak kiyachi Josua ichek ko u ye king’at Jehovah: kieb kwarinikab mbartanyisiekwak, ak kobeel karisiekwak eng’ mat." 
Joshua11:10 Ak kiweek Josua eng’ betunoto, ak konam Hasor, ak kobar laitoriandennyi eng’ rotwetab chok: amu ki ne o Hasor eng’ tai eng’ laitorinichato tugul." 
Joshua11:11 Ak kibar bik tugul che kimi nganasanato eng’ rotwetab chok, kobar koges: ma ng’et agot agenge ne kitinyei kabuset: ak kibeel Hasor eng’ mat." 
Joshua11:12 Ak kinam Josua nganasok tugul che bo laitorinichato, ak laitorinikwak tugul, ak kibar ichek eng’ rotwetab chok, kobar koges; ko u ye kiga ng’at Musa otwogindetab Jehovah." 
Joshua11:13 Ago kima beel Israel nganasok che kitonondos eng’ tulonokwak, kobate Hasor kityo; kibeel noto Josua." 
Joshua11:14 Ak kiib Israel tuguk tugul che bo nganasochuto, ak kokweri tuga koek chechuak; ago kibar chi age tugul eng’ rotwetab chok, kot koges, ama bagakta agot agenge ne kitinyei kabuset." 
Joshua11:15 Ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa otwogindennyi, ko king’at Musa Josua ko u noto: ak kiyai Josua ko u noto; ma bagakta kiy age tugul ne ma yai, eng’ tuguk tugul che king’at Jehovah Musa." 
Joshua11:16 Kinam anyun Josua emonoto tugul, emetab tulonok, ak Murot tugul ne bo Tai, ak emet tugul ne bo Gosen, ak warenget, ak Araba, ak emetab tulonok, ne bo Israel, ak warengetab emonoto;" 
Joshua11:17 koboch tulwetab Halak, ne togostoi Seir, agoi Baal-gad eng’ atebwetab Lebanon tulwetab Hermon kel: ak kinam laitorinikwak tugul, ak kokwerot kobar." 
Joshua11:18 Kiyai Josua luget eng’ betusiek che chang’ koboto laitorinichato. 
Joshua11:19 Ma biit nganaset agot agenge ne kiyai kalyet ak lagokab Israel, kobate Hibichoto kimenyei Gibeon: kinam tugul eng’ luget." 
Joshua11:20 Amu ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kiiuuiit mugulelwekwak, si kobargei ak Israel eng’ luget, si kobiit kong’em ichek koges, si ma kirire ichek, ago si kobiit kobar, ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa." 
Joshua11:21 Ak kinyo Josua eng’ betusiechoto kobar Anagik kobetyo eng’ emetab tulonok, eng’ Hebron, ak Debir, ak Anab, ak eng’ emet tugul ne bo tulonok ne bo Juda, ak eng’ emet tugul ne bo tulonok ne bo Israel: kibar Josua ichek kogesgei koboto nganasokwak." 
Joshua11:22 Ma ng’et agot agenge eng’ Anagichato eng’ emetab lagokab Israel: kobate eng’ Gasa kityo, ak eng’ Gat, ak eng’ Asdod, che king’etune bichoto." 
Joshua11:23 Kinam anyun Josua emet komugul, ko u tugul che kiga mwachi Jehovah Musa; ak kiigochi Josua emonoto Israel koek borotenywa ko u pcheutikwak eng’ bororiosiekwak. Kiimuuny anyun emet eng’ luget." 
Joshua12:1 Chu ko laitorinikab emonoto, che kibar lagokab Israel, ak konam emenywa kobunji eng’ Jordan bitonin, ole tokyingei ole chorune asista, koboch atebwetab Arnon kot koit tulwetab Hermon, ak Araba tugul ne tokyingei kong’asis:" 
Joshua12:2 Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, ne kimenyei Hesbon, ne kibou koboch Aroer, ne mi tabandab atebwetab Arnon, ak koboch kwenutab atebwet, ak kebebertab Gilead, kot koit ainetab Jabok, kiwotetab lagokab Amon;" 
Joshua12:3 ak Araba agoi nyanjetab Kinerot, ne tokyingei kong’asis, kot koit nyanjetab Araba, ne noto Araraita ne bo Munyuk, ne tokyingei kong’asis, oret ne wendi Bet-jesimot; ak eng’ murot ne bo tai, eng’ chepkeigeusiekab Pisga kel:" 
Joshua12:4 ak kiwotetab Og laitoriatab Basan, ne bo che king’etune Repaik, che kimenyei Astarot ak Edrei," 
Joshua12:5 ak kibounisiei eng’ tulwetab Hermon, ak Saleka, ak Basan komugul, kot koit kiwotetab Gesurik, ak Maakatik, ak kebeberta ne bo Gilead, kiwotetab Sihon laitoriatab Hesbon." 
Joshua12:6 Kibar Musa, otwogindetab Jehovah koboto lagokab Israel ichek: ak kogochi Musa otwogindetab Jehovah emonoto bikab Reuben ak che bo Gad ak kebebertab bororietab Manase, kobunji." 
Joshua12:7 Chuto laitorinikab emonoto che kibar Josua ak lagokab Israel eng’ Jordan bitonin ole tokyingei cherongo, koboch Baal-gad eng’ atebwetab Lebanon kot koit tulwetab Halak, ne togostoi agoi Seir; ak kiigochi Josua emonoto bororiosiekab Israel kobunji ko u pcheutikwak;" 
Joshua12:8 eng’ emetab tulonok, ak eng’ warenget, ak eng’ Araba, ak eng’ chepkeigeusiek, ak eng’ ong’atet, ak eng’ Murot ne bo Tai; Hitik, ak Amorik, ak Kananik, ak Perisik, ak Hibik, ak Jebusik:" 
Joshua12:9 laitoriatab Jeriko, agenge; laitoriatab Ai, ne mi ole negite Bet-el, agenge;" 
Joshua12:10 laitoriatab Jerusalem, agenge; laitoriatab Hebron, agenge;" 
Joshua12:11 laitoriatab Jarmut, agenge; laitoriatab Lakis, agenge;" 
Joshua12:12 laitoriatab Eglon, agenge; laitoriatab Geser, agenge;" 
Joshua12:13 laitoriatab Debir, agenge; laitoriatab Geder, agenge;" 
Joshua12:14 laitoriatab Horma, agenge; laitoriatab Arad, agenge;" 
Joshua12:15 laitoriatab Libna, agenge; laitoriatab Adulam, agenge;" 
Joshua12:16 laitoriatab Makeda, agenge; laitoriatab Bet-el, agenge;" 
Joshua12:17 laitoriatab Tapua, agenge; laitoriatab Heper, agenge;" 
Joshua12:18 laitoriatab Apek, agenge; laitoriatab Lasaron, agenge;" 
Joshua12:19 laitoriatab Madon, agenge; laitoriatab Hasor, agenge;" 
Joshua12:20 laitoriatab Simron-meron, agenge; laitoriatab Aksap, agenge;" 
Joshua12:21 laitoriatab Taanak, agenge; laitoriatab Megido, agenge;" 
Joshua12:22 laitoriatab Kedes, agenge; laitoriatab Jokneam eng’ Karmel, agenge;" 
Joshua12:23 laitoriatab Dor ne kimi Dor barak, agenge; laitroriatab Goim eng’ Gilgal, agenge;" 
Joshua12:24 laitoriatab Tirsa, agenge: kiek laitorinichoto tugul sosom ak agenge." 
Joshua13:1 Ak kiga koosit Josua, kiga kotar kenyisiek che chang’; ak kimwachi Jehovah kolenji, Kaiositu ak kiitar kenyisiek che chang’, ago ta ko ng’etunot emet ne o ne nyolu kenam." 
Joshua13:2 Ni emet ne ta ko ng’etunot: komoswek tugul che bo Pilistik, ak Gesurik tugul;" 
Joshua13:3 koboch Sihor, ne mi taitab Misri, kot koit kiwotetab Ekron ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam, che kiityin Kananik: kiptainik mut che bo Pilistik; Gasaik, Asdodik, Askelonik, Gitik, Ekronik; ak Abik agichek," 
Joshua13:4 eng’ murot ne bo tai: emet tugul ne bo Kananik, ak Meara ne bo Sidonik, kot koit Apek, agoi kiwotetab Amorik:" 
Joshua13:5 ak emetab Gebalik, ak Lebanon tugul, ne tokyingei ole chorune asista, koboch Baal-gad eng’ tulwetab Hermon kel kot koit ole kimandoe kebendi Hamat:" 
Joshua13:6 bik tugul che menyei emetab tulonok koboch Lebanon kot koit Misrepotmaim, agot Sidonik tugul; aone ichek koba eng’ taitab lagokab Israel: ago igochi Israel koek borotenywa, ko u ye kiang’atin." 
Joshua13:7 Pchechi anyun emonito bororiosiechuto sogol ak kebebertab che bo Manase. 
Joshua13:8 Kisich borotenywa bikab Reuben ak che bo Gad koboto inendet, ne kiigochi Musa ichek, eng’ Jordan bitonin ole tokyingei kong’asis, ko u ye kiigochi Musa ichek, otwogindetab Jehovah;" 
Joshua13:9 koboch Aroer, ne mi tabandab atebwetab Arnon, ak nganaset ne mi kwenutab atebwonoto, ak warenget tugul ne bo Medeba agoi Dibon;" 
Joshua13:10 ak nganasok tugul che bo Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, ne kilaitorani eng’ Hesbon, agoi kiwotetab lagokab Amon;" 
Joshua13:11 ak Gilead, ak kiwotetab Gesurik ak Maakatik, ak tulwet tugul ne bo Hermon, ak Basan tugul agoi Saleka;" 
Joshua13:12 bororiet tugul ne bo Og eng’ Basan, ne kilaitorani eng’ Astarot ak Edrei (inendet ko agenge eng’ Repaik che king’et); amu kibar chuto Musa ak koon." 
Joshua13:13 Ago ma on lagokab Israel Gesurik, anan ko Maakatik: kimeny Gesurik ak Maakatik kwenutab Israel, agoi ra." 
Joshua13:14 Bororietab Lawik kityo ne ma igochi borotet; borotenywa kagochinoikab Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, che kigoitoi, kobun mat, ko u ye kimwachi inendet." 
Joshua13:15 Ak kiigochi Musa bororietab lagokab Reuben ko u ortinwekwak. 
Joshua13:16 Kiboch kiwotenywa Aroer, ne mi tabandab atebwetab Arnon, ak nganaset ne mi kwenutab atebwet, ak warenget tugul ne negite Medeba;" 
Joshua13:17 Hesbon, ak nganasokyik tugul che mi warenget; Dibon, ak Bamotbaal, ak Bet-baal-meon;" 
Joshua13:18 ak Jahas, ak Kedemot, ak Mepaat," 
Joshua13:19 ak Kiriataim, ak Sibma, ak Seret-sahar eng’ tulwetab atebwet;" 
Joshua13:20 ak Bet-peor, ak chepkeigeusiekab Pisga, ak Bet-jesimot;" 
Joshua13:21 ak nganasok tugul che bo warenget, ak bororiet tugul ne bo Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, ne kilaitorani eng’ Hesbon, ne kibar Musa koboto kiruogik che bo Midian, ak Ebi, ak Rekem, ak Sur, ak Hur, ak Reba, bounikab Sihon, che kimenyei emonoto." 
Joshua13:22 Kibar lagokab Israel Balaam agine weritab Beor, orgoiyot, eng’ rotwetab chok, koboto che kigibar." 
Joshua13:23 Ak kiwotetab lagokab Reuben ko ki Jordan, ak kiwotennyi. Nito borotetab lagokab Reuben ko u ortinwekwak, nganasokwak che eechen ak che mengechen." 
Joshua13:24 Ak kiigochi Musa bororietab Gad, lagokab Gad, ko u ortinwekwak." 
Joshua13:25 Ak kiwotenywa ko ki Jaser, ak nganasok tugul che bo Gilead, ak kebebertab emetab lagokab Amon, agoi Aroer ne mi taitab Raba;" 
Joshua13:26 ak koboch Hesbon kot koit Ramat-mispe, ak Betonim; ak koboch Maanaim kot koit kiwotetab Debir;" 
Joshua13:27 ak eng’ atebwet, Bet-aram, ak Bet-nimra, ak Sukot, koboto Sapon, noto ne king’et eng’ bororietab Sihon laitoriatab Hesbon, ne ki Jordan kiwotennyi, kot koit ole boch tabandab araraita ne bo Kineret, Jordan bitonin ole tokyingei kong’asis." 
Joshua13:28 Nito ko borotetab lagokab Gad ko u ortinwekwak, nganasokwak che eechen ak che mengechen." 
Joshua13:29 Ak kiigochi Musa kebebertab bororietab Manase borotet: ak kibunji kebebertab bororietab Manase ko u ortinwekwak. 
Joshua13:30 Ak kiboch kiwotenywa Maanaim, Basan tugul, bororiet tugul ne bo Og laitoriatab Basan, ak nganasok tugul che bo Jair, che mi Basan, nganasok che eechen tamanwogik lo:" 
Joshua13:31 ak kebebertab Gilead, ak Astarot, ak Edrei, nganasok che eechen che bo bororietab Og eng’ Basan, kibunji chuto lagokab Makir weritab Manase, kebebertab lagokab Makir ko u ortinwekwak." 
Joshua13:32 Chuto ko borotosiek che kipchei Musa eng’ warengosiekab Moab, Jordan bitonin, eng’ Jeriko ne tokyingei kong’asis." 
Joshua13:33 Ago ma igochi Musa bororietab Lawik borotet age tugul: Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko borotenywa, ko u ye kiga mwachi ichek." 
Joshua14:1 Chu ko borotosiek che kinam lagokab Israel eng’ emetab Kanan, che kipchechi ichek Eleasar tisiindet, ak Josua weritab Nun, koboto kandoikab gorik che bo bororiosiekab lagokab Israel," 
Joshua14:2 kipchei kosube barbarekab borotenywa, ko u ye king’at Jehovah eng’ eutab Musa, agobo bororiosiechoto sogol ak kebebertab oret." 
Joshua14:3 Amu kiga kogochi Musa borotet bororiosiechoto aeng’ ak kebebertab bororiet eng’ Jordan bitonin: ago ma igochi Lawik borotet age tugul eng’ kwenunywa. 
Joshua14:4 Amu ki bororiosiek aeng’ lagokab Josep, ichek ko ki Manase ak Epraim: ama igochi Lawik kebeberta eng’ emonoto, kobate nganasok che menyei, koboto korotinwek che agete tukwak ak ole nyorjin tugukwak." 
Joshua14:5 Ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah Musa, ko kiyai lagokab Israel ko u noto, ak kipchei emet." 
Joshua14:6 Kirikta anyun lagokab Juda koba ole mi Josua eng’ Gilgal: ak kimwachi Kaleb weritab Jepune Kenisindet inendet, kolenji, Ingen kit ne kimwachi Jehovah Musa chitab Kamuktaindet agobo ane ak inye eng’ Kades-barnea." 
Joshua14:7 Kia bo kenyisiek artam ye kiiyokwa Musa otwogindetab Jehovah eng’ Kades-barnea anyo asegei emet; ak kiaipchi inendet ng’olyot ko u ye kimi muguleldanyu. 
Joshua14:8 Ago kiigochi tupchosiekyuk che kigitogostoi tugul mugulelwekab bik komeiyo: ago kiasub Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu eng’ kagesunatetab ge. 
Joshua14:9 Ak kiiyosio Musa betunoto kole, Egu boroteng’ung’ iman ak tun bunjin lagoguk koigeny emet ne kitiech kelyeguk, amu kiisub Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu eng’ kagesunatetab ge." 
Joshua14:10 Keer anyun-o, kigoriba Jehovah asob, ko u ye kimwa, kenyisiechu artam ak mut, koboch betut ne kimwachi Jehovah Musa ng’olyondoni, ye kingota kobendoti Israel eng’ ong’atet: ak nguno, keero, koboch ra, atinye kenyisiek tamanwogik sisiit ak mut." 
Joshua14:11 Agot rani ko a kim ko u eng’ betut ne kiiyoktaa Musa: kit ne ki u kimnatennyu eng’ betunoto, ko u noto kimnatennyu nguno, eng’ luget, awo, ak aweege." 
Joshua14:12 Noto anyun, kona tulwoni, ne kiga mwa Jehovah eng’ betunoto; amu kiigas eng’ betunoto ile kimi Anagik oloto, ak nganasok che eechen che ng’ototin: alen mi Jehovah kobota, si aon koba, ko u ye kimwa Jehovah." 
Joshua14:13 Ak kiiberur Josua inendet; ak kiigochi Kaleb weritab Jepune Hebron koek borotennyi. 
Joshua14:14 Kiek anyun Hebron borotetab Kaleb weritab Jepune Kenisindet agoi ra; amu kiisub Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel eng’ kagesunatetab ge. 
Joshua14:15 Kainetab Hebron eng’ tai ko ki Kiriat-arba; ki chito ne o Arba kosiir tugul eng’ Anagik. Ak kiimuuny emet eng’ luget. 
Joshua15:1 Ak barbariatab bororietab lagokab Juda ko u ortinwekwak ko kiibutyi kiwotetab Edom, agoi ong’atetab Sin ne tokyingei murot ne bo tai, eng’ tabanda ne bo murot ne bo tai." 
Joshua15:2 Kibochit kiwotenywa ne bo murot ne bo tai tabandab Araraita ne bo Munyuk, koboch nyanjet ne kiluktogei ne kitokyingei murot ne bo tai:" 
Joshua15:3 ak kibun murot ne bo tai ole kitogostoe kebendi Akrabik, kosiirto kot koit Sin, ak kotogosta kwo murot ne bo tai ne bo Kades-barnea, ak kosiirto kobun Hesron, ak kotogosta kwo Adar, ak koweek konyo Karka:" 
Joshua15:4 ak kisiirto kwo Asmon, ak kwo komandae ainetab Misri; ak kibochit kiwotonoto nyanjet; egu nito kiwoteng’wong’ ne bo murot ne bo tai." 
Joshua15:5 Ak kiboch kiwotetab kong’asis Araraita ne bo Munyuk, agoi ole boch Jordan. Ak kiwotetab kebebertab murot ne bo katam ko kiboch nyanjet ne kiluktogei eng’ ole igesunegei Jordan:" 
Joshua15:6 ak kiwa kiwotet kot koit Bet-hogla, ak kosiirto kobun murot ne bo katam ne bo Bet-araba; ak kiwa kiwotet kot koit koitab Boan weritab Reuben:" 
Joshua15:7 ak kiwa kiwotet kot koit Debir kobun atebwetab Akor si kotokyigei murot ne bo katam, kootorjigei Gilgal, ne mi ole kitogostoe kebendi Adumim, ne mi murot ne bo tai ne bo ainet: ak kisiirto kiwotet kwo beekab En-semes, ak kimandae En-rogel:" 
Joshua15:8 ak kiwa kiwotet kobun atebwetab weritab Hinom agoi tabandab Jebusindet murot ne bo tai (noto ko Jerusalem): ak kiwa kiwotet agoi tulwet barak ne mi taitab atebwetab Hinom ne tokyingei cherongo, ne mi tabandab atebwet ne bo Repaik ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam:" 
Joshua15:9 ak kigitil kiwotet kong’eete tulwet barak kot koit kondab beekab Neptoa, ak komanda kwo nganasokab tulwetab Epron; ak kigitil kiwotet kotorjigei Baala (noto ko Kiriat-jearim):" 
Joshua15:10 ak kiweek kiwotet kong’eete Baala kotokyigei cherongo agoi tulwetab Seir, ak kosiirto kwo tabandab tulwetab Jearim eng’ murot ne bo katam (noto ko Kesalon) ak kochorjigei Bet-semes, ak kosiirto kobun ole negite Timna:" 
Joshua15:11 ak kimanda kiwotet kwo tabandab Ekron murot ne bo katam: ak kigitil kiwotet kotorjigei Sikeron, ak kosiirto kwo tulwetab Baala, ak kwo komanda eng’ Jabneel: ak kimong’ji kiwotet nyanjet." 
Joshua15:12 Ak kiwotet ne bo cherongo ko ki nyanjet ne o, ak ngegunnyi. Nito ko kiwotetab lagokab Juda ne kiyiemayiem ichek ko u ortinwekwak." 
Joshua15:13 Ak kiigochi Kaleb weritab Jepune kebeberta eng’ kwenutab lagokab Juda, ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah ne kimwachi Josua, noto ko Kiriat-arba, kwandab Anak (noto ko Hebron)." 
Joshua15:14 Ak kion Kaleb eng’ oloto werik somok che bo Anak, Sesai, ak Ahiman, ak Talmai, lagokab Anak." 
Joshua15:15 Ak kitogosta eng’ oloto kwo kobargei ak che kimenyei Debir: kainetab Debir eng’ tai ko ki Kiriat-seper. 
Joshua15:16 Ak kile Kaleb, Inendet ne barei Kiriat-seper, ak konam, agochini Aksa cheptanyu kotun." 
Joshua15:17 Ak kinam Otniel weritab Kenas, ng’etab kametab Kaleb, nganasanato, ak kiigochi inendet Aksa cheptanyi kotun." 
Joshua15:18 Ak ye kingoit ole mi inendet, komwachi eng’ kagiiletab ge kosom kwandanyi koret: ak kichorgei anyun eng’ sigiriennyi; ak koteebe Kaleb kolenji, Imache nee?" 
Joshua15:19 Ak kimwa kole, Kona kaberuret; amu kiindea emet ne bo Murot ne bo Tai, igona kong’ikab beek agichek. Ak kiigochi kong’ikab beek che bo meto, ak kong’ikab beek che mi ole rektoot." 
Joshua15:20 Ni ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Juda ko u ortinwekwak. 
Joshua15:21 Ak nganasokab taban che bo bororietab lagokab Juda eng’ ole tokyingei kiwotetab Edom eng’ Murot ne bo Tai ko ki Kabseel, ak Eder, ak Jagur;" 
Joshua15:22 ak Kina, Dimona, ak Adada;" 
Joshua15:23 ak Kedes, Hasor, ak Itnan;" 
Joshua15:24 Sip, Telem, ak Bealot;" 
Joshua15:25 ak Hasor-hadata, Keriot-hesron (noto ko Hasor);" 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Sema, ak Molada;" 
Joshua15:27 ak Hasar-gada, Hesmon, ak Bet-pelet;" 
Joshua15:28 ak Hasar-sual, Beer-seba, ak Bisiotia;" 
Joshua15:29 Bala, Iim, ak Esem;" 
Joshua15:30 ak Eltolad, Chesil, ak Horma;" 
Joshua15:31 ak Siklag, Madmana, ak Sansana;" 
Joshua15:32 ak Lebaot, Silim, Ain, ak Rimon: nganasochoto tugul ko tiptem ak sogol, koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:33 Eng’ warenget, Estaol, Sora, ak Asna;" 
Joshua15:34 ak Sanoa, En-ganim, Tapua, ak Enam;" 
Joshua15:35 Jarmut, Adulam, Soko, ak Aseka;" 
Joshua15:36 ak Saaraim, Aditaim, Gedera, ak Gederotaim; nganasok taman ak ang’wan koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:37 Senan, Hadasa, ak Migdalgad;" 
Joshua15:38 ak Dilan, Mispe, ak Jokteel;" 
Joshua15:39 Lakis, Boskat, ak Eglon;" 
Joshua15:40 ak Kabon, Lamam, ak Kitlis;" 
Joshua15:41 ak Gederot, Bet-dagon, Naama, ak Makeda; nganasok taman ak lo koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:42 Libna, Eter, ak Asan;" 
Joshua15:43 ak Ipta, Asna, ak Nesib;" 
Joshua15:44 ak Keila, Aksib, ak Maresa; nganasok sogol koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:45 Ekron, koboto nganasokyik ak nganasokyik che mengechen:" 
Joshua15:46 koboch Ekron agoi nyanjet, tugul che kimi ole negite Asdod, koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:47 Asdod, nganasokyik ak nganasokyik che mengechen; Gasa, nganasokyik ak nganasokyik che mengechen; agoi ainetab Misri, ak nyanjet ne o, ak kiwotennyi." 
Joshua15:48 Ak eng’ emetab tulonok, Samir, Jatir, ak Soko;" 
Joshua15:49 ak Dana ak Kiriat-sana, (noto ko Debir);" 
Joshua15:50 ak Anab, Estemo, ak Anim;" 
Joshua15:51 ak Gosen, Holon, ak Gilo; nganasok taman ak agenge koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:52 Arab, Duma, ak Esan;" 
Joshua15:53 ak Janim, Bet-tapua, ak Apeka;" 
Joshua15:54 ak Humta, Kiriat-arba (noto ko Hebron), ak Sior; nganasok sogol ak nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:55 Maon, Karmel, Sip, ak Juta;" 
Joshua15:56 ak Jesreel, Jokdeam, ak Sanoa;" 
Joshua15:57 Kain, Gibea, ak Timna; nganasok taman koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:58 Halul, Bet-sur, ak Geder;" 
Joshua15:59 Maarat, Bet-anot, ak Eltekon; nganasok lo koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:60 Kiriat-baal (noto ko Kiriat-jearim), ak Raba; nganasok aeng’ koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:61 Eng’ ong’atet, Bet-araba, Midin, ak Sekaka;" 
Joshua15:62 ak Nibsan, ak Nganasetab Munyuk, ak En-gedi; nganasok lo koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua15:63 Ak kima imuch lagokab Juda koon Jebusik, che kimenyei Jerusalem: ago kimeny Jebusik ak lagokab Juda eng’ Jerusalem, agoi ra." 
Joshua16:1 Ak kiibutyi barbariatab lagokab Josep Jordan eng’ Jeriko, eng’ beekab Jeriko eng’ kong’asis, ne ong’atet, kotogosta eng’ Jeriko kobun emetab tulonok kwo Bet-el;" 
Joshua16:2 ak kiwa komanda eng’ Bet-el kwo Lus, ak kwo kosiirto kot koit kiwotetab Arikik agoi Atarot;" 
Joshua16:3 ak kwo kochortagei kotokyigei cherongo agoi kiwotetab Japletik, kot koit kiwotetab Bet-horon eng’ komosta ne rektoot, kot koit Geser; ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi nyanjet." 
Joshua16:4 Ak kinam lagokab Josep, che ki Manase ak Eprain, borotenywa." 
Joshua16:5 Ak ki u ni kiwotetab lagokab Epraim, ko u ortinwekwak: ak kiwotetab borotenywa ne kitokyingei kong’asis ko ki Atarotadar, kot koit Bet-horon barak;" 
Joshua16:6 ak kiwa kiwotet kotokyingei cherongo eng’ Mikmetat eng’ murot ne bo katam; ak kiyiemak kiwotet kotokyigei kong’asis kot koit Taanat-silo, ak kobun yoto eng’ kong’asis ne bo Janoa;" 
Joshua16:7 ak kichortagei eng’ Janoa kwo Atarot, agoi Nara, kot koit Jeriko, ak komanda eng’ Jordan." 
Joshua16:8 Kiwa kiwotet kong’eete Tapua kobun cherongo kot koit ainetab Kana; ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi nyanjet. Nito ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Epraim ko u ortinwekwak; 
Joshua16:9 koboto nganasok che kigitabanji lagokab Epraim eng’ kwenutab borotetab lagokab Manase, nganasok tugul koboto nganasokwak che mengechen."
