Joshua16:10 Ago ma on Kanaik che kimenyei Geser: ago kimeny Kananik kwenutab Epraim, agoi rani, ak kiek otwogik che yaei boisionikab otwoknatet." 
Joshua17:1 Ak ni ko ki barbariatab bororietab Manase; amu ki taita ne bo Josep. Ko u Makir, ne ki taita ne bo Manase, kwandab Gilead, ko amu ki chi ne bo luget, ko kinyor anyun Gilead ak Basan." 
Joshua17:2 Ak kibunji barbariat lagokab Manase che king’et, ko u ortinwekwak; amu lagokab Abieser, ak lagokab Helek, ak lagokab Asriel, ak lagokab Sekem, ak lagokab Heper, ak lagokab Semida: chuto ko ki lagok che werik che bo Manase weritab Josep ko u ortinwekwak." 
Joshua17:3 Ago kima sich werik Selopehad, weritab Heper, weritab Gilead, weritab Makir, weritab Manase, kisich tibik ichegei: chu ko kainaikab tibikyik, Mala, ak Noa, ak Hogla, Milka, ak Tirsa." 
Joshua17:4 Ak kibwa korik taitab Eleasar tisiindet, ak taitab Josua weritab Nun, ak taitab bounik, ak kolenji, King’at Jehovah Musa kogonech borotet eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekyok: kiigochi anyun borotet eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekab kwandanywa, ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah." 
Joshua17:5 Ak kisich Manase kebeberwek taman, koboto emetab Gilead ak Basan, ne mi Jordan bitonin;" 
Joshua17:6 amu kitinyei tibikab Manase borotet koboto werikyik: ak kibunji emetab Gilead werikab Manase che king’et. 
Joshua17:7 Ak king’eete kiwotetab Manase Aser kot koit Mikmetat, ne itoorjingei Sekem; ak kibun kiwotet komostab tai, agoi koit ole menyei bikab En- tapua." 
Joshua17:8 Ki bo Manase emetab Tapua: ago Tapua ne mi kiwotetab Manase ko ki bo lagokab Epraim. 
Joshua17:9 Ak kichortagei kiwotet kwo ainetab Kana, komostab tai ne bo ainet: kibunji nganasochuto Epraim eng’ nganasokab Manase: ak kimi kiwotetab Manase komostab katam ne bo ainet, ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi nyanjet:" 
Joshua17:10 ki bo Epraim komostab tai, ki bo Manase komostab katam, ak ki nyanjet kiwotennyi; ak kiit Aser eng’ murot ne bo katam, agoi Isakar eng’ kong’asis." 
Joshua17:11 Ak kitinyei Manase eng’ Isakar ak eng’ Aser Bet-sean ak nganasokyik, ak Ibleam koboto nganasokyik ak che kimenyei Dor ak nganasokyik, ak che kimenyei Endor koboto nganasokyik, ak che kimenyei Taanak koboto nganasokyik, ak che kimenyei Megido koboto nganasokyik, komoswek somok che kiba barak." 
Joshua17:12 Ago kima imuch lagokab Manase koon che kimenyei nganasochoto; ago kimach mising’ Kananik komeng’is eng’ emonoto. 
Joshua17:13 Ak ye kiga kogimegitu lagokab Israel, konde Kananik koyai boisionikab otwoknatet, ama on kogestagei." 
Joshua17:14 Ak king’alalji lagokab Josep Josua, kolenji, Amu nee si igona barbariat agenge ak kebeberta agenge koek borotet, ak ingen ile a bororiet ne o, amu kigoberura Jehovah agoi rani?" 
Joshua17:15 Ak kilenji Josua ichek, Ngot ko i bororiet ne o, itogoste iwe osnet, ak ibatyige oldo eng’ emetab Perisik ak ne bo Repaik; amu mariich emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim eng’ inye." 
Joshua17:16 Ak kimwa lagokab Josep kole, Mayamech emetab tulonok: ak kotinyei karisiekab karik Kananik tugul che menyei emetab atebwet, ichek che mi Bet-sean ak nganasokyik, ak ichek che menyei atebwetab Jesreel." 
Joshua17:17 Ak king’alalji Josua gotab Josep, che Epraim ak Manase, kolenji, I bororiet ne o, ak itinye kimnatet: mesiche barbariat agenge kityo:" 
Joshua17:18 ago bunjinin emetab tulonok; amu nganda osnet, iswache, ak bunjinin ole boch: amu ione Kananik koba, nganda tinyei karisiekab karik, ak nganda kimen." 
Joshua18:1 Ak kiiyumgei tuiyet tugul ne bo lagokab Israel eng’ Silo, ak koteech eng’ oloto emait ne kituiyechin: ak kiga kiterter emonoto eng’ tainywa." 
Joshua18:2 Ak king’et eng’ lagokab Israel bororiosiek tisab che kitom kopchei borotenywa. 
Joshua18:3 Ak kilenji Josua lagokab Israel, Ogaige kot kotianit si onam emet, ne kigonok Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwok?" 
Joshua18:4 Olewenjige bik somok eng’ bororiet age tugul: si ayokto ichek, kong’eetyo kobendat eng’ emet, si kosir ko u ole teptoi borotenywa; ak kobwa ole ami." 
Joshua18:5 Ak kopchei koek kebeberwek tisab; tebe Juda kiwotennyi eng’ murot ne bo tai, ak tebe Josep kiwotenywa eng’ murot ne bo katam." 
Joshua18:6 Ak osir emonoto koek kebeberwek tisab, yeityo oibwa siranato: si aserjinewok barbarek eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Joshua18:7 Amu matinyei Lawik kebeberta eng’ kwenung’wong’; amu tiseinatetab Jehovah ko borotenywa: ak kigosich Gad ak Reuben ak kebebertab bororietab Manase borotenywa, eng’ Jordan bitonin bo kong’asis, ne kiigochi Musa otwogindetab Jehovah." 
Joshua18:8 Ak king’eetyo bik ak koba: ak kiiyomis Josua bik che kiga ba kosir emet, kole, Oba obun emet, ak osir, si obwa kogeny ole ami, ak aserjinewok barbarek eng’ yu eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ Silo." 
Joshua18:9 Kiba anyun bichoto kobun emet, ak kosirji bukuit kobee nganasok koek kebeberwek tisab, ak kibwa ole mi Josua eng’ nganaset eng’ Silo." 
Joshua18:10 Ak kiser Josua barbarek agobo ichek eng’ Silo eng’ taitab Jehovah: Ak kipchechi Josua emet lagokab Israel ko u pcheutikwak eng’ oloto. 
Joshua18:11 Ak kibiit bororietab lagokab Benjamin ko u ortinwekwak: ak kiwa kiwotetab barbariandenywa kwenutab lagokab Juda ak lagokab Josep. 
Joshua18:12 Ak king’eete kiwotenywa ne bo komostab katam Jordan; ak kitogosta kiwotenywa kobun tabandab Jeriko eng’ murot ne bo katam, ak kotogosta kobun emetab tulonok kotokyigei cherongo; ak kimong’ji kiwotenywa ong’atetab Bet-aben." 
Joshua18:13 Ak kiwa kiwotet eng’ oloto agoi Lus, agoi tabandab Lus (noto ko Bet- el), kotokyingei murot ne bo tai; ak kichortagei kiwotet kot koit Atarot- adar, kobun tulwet ne mi komostab tai ne bo Bet-horon ne mi ole rektoot." 
Joshua18:14 Ak kigitil kiwotet keyiem komostab cherongo ole tokyingei murot ne bo tai kong’eete tulwet ne mi taitab Bet-horon ne tokyingei murot ne bo tai; ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi agoi koit Kiriat-baal (noto ko Kiriat-jearim), nganasetab lagokab Juda: nito ko ki komostab cherongo." 
Joshua18:15 Ak king’eete murot ne bo tai tabandab Kiriat-jearim, ak kiwa kiwotet kotokyigei cherongo, komong’ji kondab beekab Neptoa:" 
Joshua18:16 ak kichortagei kiwotet agoi tabandab tulwet ne mi taitab atebwetab weritab Hinom, ne mi atebwetab Repaik ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam; ak kichortagei kwo atebwetab Hinom, kot koit tabandab Jebusindet ne tokyingei murot ne bo tai, ak kochortagei kwo En-rogelo;" 
Joshua18:17 ak kigitil kobun murot ne bo katam, komong’ji En-semes, kwo Gelilot, ne tokyindos ak ole kitogostoe kebendi Adumin; ak kochortagei agoi koitab Boan weritab Reuben;" 
Joshua18:18 ak kosiirto kobun tabanda ne tokyingei Araba murot ne bo katam, ak kochortagei kot koit Araba:" 
Joshua18:19 ak kiwa kiwotet kobun tabandab Bet-hogla kotokyigei murot ne bo katam: ak kimong’ji kiwotet ole kiluktoegei beek murot ne bo katam eng’ Araraita ne bo Munyuk, eng’ murot ne bo tai ye boch Jordan: nito ko ki kiwotet ne bo murot ne bo tai." 
Joshua18:20 Ak ki Jordan kiwotennyi eng’ komostab kong’asis. Nito ko ki borotetab lagokab Benjamin ko u kiwotosiekyik che kiimut komoswek tugul, ko u ortinwekwak." 
Joshua18:21 Nganasokab bororietab lagokab Benjamin ko u ortinwekwak ko ki Jeriko, Bet-hogla, ak Emek-kesis;" 
Joshua18:22 ak Bet-araba, Semaraim, ak Bet-el;" 
Joshua18:23 ak Abim, Para, ak Opra;" 
Joshua18:24 ak Keparamoni, Opni, ak Geba; nganasok taman ak aeng’ koboto nganasokwak che mengechen:" 
Joshua18:25 Gibeon, Rama, ak Beerot," 
Joshua18:26 ak Mispe, Kepira, ak Mosa," 
Joshua18:27 ak Rekem, Irpeel, ak Tarala;" 
Joshua18:28 ak Selar, Elep, ak Jebusindet (noto ko Jerusalem), Gibeat, ak Kiriat; nganasok taman ak ang’wan koboto nganasokwak che mengechen. Nito ko borotetab lagokab Benjamin ko u ortinwekwak." 
Joshua19:1 Ak kinyo barbariatab aeng’ ne bo Simeon, ne bo bororietab lagokab Simeon ko u ortinwekwak: ak kimi borotenywa kwenutab borotetab lagokab Juda." 
Joshua19:2 Ak kisich koek borotenywa Beer-seba, anan ko Sheba, ak Molada;" 
Joshua19:3 ak Hasarsual, Bala, ak Esem;" 
Joshua19:4 ak Eltolat, Betul, ak Horma;" 
Joshua19:5 ak Siklag, Bet-markabot, ak Hasar-susa;" 
Joshua19:6 ak Bet-lebaot, ak Saruen; nganasok taman ak somok koboto nganasokwak che mengechen:" 
Joshua19:7 Ain, Rimon, Eter, ak Asan; nganasok ang’wan koboto nganasokwak che mengechen," 
Joshua19:8 ak nganasok tugul che mengechen che kiyiem nganasochuto agoi Balat- beer, Rama ne bo Murot ne bo Tai. Nito ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Simeon ko u ortinwekwak." 
Joshua19:9 Kibun borotetab lagokab Simeon kebebertab lagokab Juda: amu ki o kebebertab Juda kosiir ichek: kisich anyun lagokab Simeon borotet eng’ kwenutab borotenywa. 
Joshua19:10 Ak kibiit barbariatab somok eng’ lagokab Sebulun ko u ortinwekwak: ak kiit borotetab kiwotenywa Sarik: 
Joshua19:11 ak kitogosta kiwotenywa kotokyigei cherongo, kot koit Marala, ak kiit Dabeset; ak kiit ainet ne mi taitab Jokneam;" 
Joshua19:12 ak kiweek eng’ Sarik kotokyigei kong’asis, kotokyigei ole chorune asista, kot koit kiwotetab Kislot-tabor; ak kimong’ji Daberat, ak kitogosta kwo Japia;" 
Joshua19:13 ak kisiirto kong’eete yoto kotokyigei kong’asis kwo Get-eper, agoi Et- kasin; ak kiwa eng’ Rimon ne kichulak kot koit Nea;" 
Joshua19:14 ak kiyiem kiwotet emonoto eng’ katam kwo Anaton: ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi, atebwetab Ipta-el;" 
Joshua19:15 ak Katat, ak Naalal, ak Simron, ak Idala, ak Bet-lehem: nganasok taman ak aeng’ koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua19:16 Nito ko borotetab lagokab Sebulun ko u ortinwekwak, nganasochuto koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua19:17 Ak kimong’ barbariatab ang’wan ne bo Isakar, ne bo lagokab Isakar ko u ortinwekwak." 
Joshua19:18 Ak kiit kiwotenywa Jesreel, Kesulot, ak Sunem;" 
Joshua19:19 ak Aparaim, Shion, ak Anaarat;" 
Joshua19:20 ak Rabit, Kision, ak Ebes;" 
Joshua19:21 ak Remet, En-ganim, En-hada, ak Bet-pases;" 
Joshua19:22 ak kiit kiwotet Tabor, Saasuma, ak Bet-semes; ak kimong’ji kiwotenywa Jordan: nganasok taman ak lo koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua19:23 Nito ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Isakar ko u ortinwekwak, nganasok koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua19:24 Ak kimong’ barbariatab mut ne bo bororietab lagokab Aser ko u ortinwekwak. 
Joshua19:25 Ak kiwotenywa ko ki Helkat, Ali, Beten, ak Aksap;" 
Joshua19:26 ak Alamelek, Amad, ak Misal; ak kiit Karmel ole tokyingei cherongo, ak kwo Sihor-libnat;" 
Joshua19:27 ak kiweek kotokyigei ole chorune asista agoi Bet-dagon, ak koit Sebulun, ak agoi atebwetab Ipta-el kotokyigei murot ne bo katam kwo Bet-emek, ak Neiel, ak komong’ji Kabul eng’ eutab katam," 
Joshua19:28 ak Hebron, Rehob, Haman, ak Kana, kot koit Sidon ne o;" 
Joshua19:29 ak kiweek kiwotet kwo Rama, ak kwo nganasetab Turo ne kiging’ot ak kiweek kiwotet kwo Hosa; ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi nyanjet eng’ emetab Aksib;" 
Joshua19:30 Uma agine, Apek, ak Rehob: nganasok tiptem ak aeng’ koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua19:31 Nito ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Aser ko u ortinwekwak, nganasochuto koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua19:32 Ak kimong’ barbariatab lo ne bo lagokab Naptali, ne bo lagokab Naptali ko u ortinwekwak." 
Joshua19:33 King’eete kiwotenywa Helep, eng’ ketit ne kimi Saananim, ak Adaminekeb ak Jabneel, agoi Lakum, ak kimong’ji kiwotennyi Jordan:" 
Joshua19:34 ak kiweek kiwotet kotokyigei cherongo kwo Asnot-tabor, ak kiwa Hukok kong’eete yoto; ak kiit Sebulun eng’ murot ne bo tai, ak kiit Aser eng’ cherongo, kot koit Juda eng’ Jordan ne tokyingei ole chorune asista." 
Joshua19:35 Nganasok che kiga king’ot ko Sidim, Ser, ak Amat, Rakat, ak Kineret;" 
Joshua19:36 ak Adama, Rama, ak Hasor;" 
Joshua19:37 ak Kedes, Edrei, ak En-hasor;" 
Joshua19:38 ak Iron, Migdal-el, Horem, Bet-anat, ak Bet-semes; nganasok taman ak sogol ak nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua19:39 Nito ko borotetab bororietab lagokab Naptali ko u ortinwekwak, nganasok koboto nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua19:40 Ak kimong’ barbariatab tisab ne bo bororietab lagokab Dan ko u ortinwekwak. 
Joshua19:41 Ak kiwotetab borotenywa ko ki Sora, Estaol, ak Ir-semes;" 
Joshua19:42 ak Saalabin, Aijalon, ak Itla;" 
Joshua19:43 ak Elon, Timna, ak Ekron;" 
Joshua19:44 ak Elteke, Gibeton, ak Baalat;" 
Joshua19:45 ak Jeud, Bene-berak, ak Gat-rimon;" 
Joshua19:46 ak Mejarkon, ak Rakon, koboto kiwotet ne tokyingei Jopa." 
Joshua19:47 Ak kiwa kiwotetab lagokab Dan kosiirto, amu kitogosta lagokab Dan kobargei ak Lesem, ak kiluul, ak kobar eng’ rotwetab chok, ak konam emet kobunji, ak komeny oloto, ak kiguure Lesem, Dan, komwaitae kainetab Dan kwandanywa." 
Joshua19:48 Nito ko borotetab bororietab Dan ko u ortinwekwak, nganasochuto ak nganasokwak che mengechen." 
Joshua19:49 Koges anyun pcheetab emet koek borotet eng’ kiwotosiekyik; ak kiigochi lagokab Israel Josua weritab Nun borotet eng’ kwenunywa: 
Joshua19:50 kiigochi nganaset ne kiga som ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah, Timnatsera eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim: ak kiteech nganaset ak komeny." 
Joshua19:51 Chuto ko borotosiek che kipchei eng’ barbarek Eleasar tisiindet, ak Josua weritab Nun, koboto che eechen eng’ gorikab kwanisiek, che bo bororiosiekab lagokab Israel, kipchei eng’ Silo koek borotet eng’ taitab Jehovah, eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin. Kiiges anyun pcheetab emet." 
Joshua20:1 King’alalji Jehovah Josua kolenji," 
Joshua20:2 Mwachi lagokab Israel ilenji, Otaban nganasok che kimwechin, che kiamwawok eng’ Musa:" 
Joshua20:3 si kobiit komwechi rumindet ne kalelso, ko ma nai: ak koek eng’ okwek ole kimwechin eng’ ne yaaktoi korotik." 
Joshua20:4 Ak mwechin age eng’ nganasochoto, ak kotonone ye kibunei kebendi orit eng’ kurgetab nganaset, ak komwa ng’alekyik kogas boisiekab nganasanato; ak komut kwo nganaset orit ole mi icheget, ak kogochi ui, si kobiit komeny kwenunywa." 
Joshua20:5 Ak ngot koon inendet ne yaaktoi korotik, ko maigoitoi rumindonoto kwo eunekyik; amu kibar chitab kokwennyi eng’ lelet, ak kima kowechei inendet eng’ tai." 
Joshua20:6 Ak komeny nganasanato, agoi kwo kotonon eng’ taitab tuiyet si kiruokyi, kot kome tisiindet ne o ne mi eng’ betusiechoto: koweektagei anyun rumindonoto, kwo nganasennyi agoi gonnyi, agoi nganaset ne kimweune." 
Joshua20:7 Ak kiitaban Kedes eng’ Galili eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Naptali, ak Sekem eng’ emetab tolonok ne bo Epraim, ak Kiriat-arba (noto ko Hebron) eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Juda." 
Joshua20:8 Ak eng’ Jordan bitonin eng’ Jeriko, ne tokyingei kong’asis, ko kiitaban Beser eng’ ong’atet eng’ warengetab bororietab Reuben, ak Ramot eng’ Gilead eng’ bororietab Gad, ak Golan eng’ Basan eng’ bororietab Manase." 
Joshua20:9 Chuto ko ki nganasok che kigitabanji lagok tugul che bo Israel, ak che bo bunotyot ne menyei kwenunywa, si komwechi oloto chito age tugul ne kabar chi ama nai, si mame eng’ eutab ne yaaktoi korotik, kot kotonon eng’ taitab tuiyet." 
Joshua21:1 Yeityo kobwa kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo Lawik korik ole mi Eleasar tisiindet, ak Josua weritab Nun, ak kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo bororiosiekab lagokab Israel," 
Joshua21:2 ak king’alalji ichek eng’ Silo eng’ emetab Kanan, kolenji, King’at Jehovah eng’ eutab Musa kole kegonech nganasok kemeny, koboto emotinwekwak ole agete tuga." 
Joshua21:3 Ak kiigochi lagokab Israel Lawik eng’ borotenywa, ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah, nganasochu, koboto emotinwekwak." 
Joshua21:4 Ak kimong’ barbariatab ortinwekab Kohatik: ak kisich lagokab Aron tisiindet, che ki bo Lawik, eng’ barbariat, nganasok taman ak somok, eng’ bororietab Juda, ak eng’ bororietab bikab Simeon, ak eng’ bororietab Benjamin." 
Joshua21:5 Ak kisich eng’ barbariatab lagokab Kohat che king’et, nganasok taman, eng’ ortinwekab bororietab Epraim, ak eng’ bororietab Dan, ak eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase." 
Joshua21:6 Ak kisich eng’ barbariat lagokab Gerson nganasok taman ak somok, eng’ ortinwekab oretab Isakar, ak eng’ bororietab Aser, ak eng’ bororietab Naptali, ak eng’ kebebertab oretab bororietab Manase eng’ Basan." 
Joshua21:7 Kisich eng’ barbariat lagokab Merari ko u ortinwekwak nganasok taman ak aeng’ eng’ bororietab Reuben, ak eng’ bororietab Gad, ak eng’ bororietab Sebulun." 
Joshua21:8 Ak kiigochi eng’ barbariat lagokab Israel Lawik nganasochoto koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie, ko u ye king’at Jehovah eng’ eutab Musa." 
Joshua21:9 Ak kiigoito eng’ bororietab lagokab Juda, ak eng’ bororietab lagokab Simeon, nganasochu kagimwa eng’ yu eng’ kainaik:" 
Joshua21:10 ak kibunji choto lagokab Aron, che bo ortinwekab Kohatik, che ki bo lagokab Lawi: amu ki nenywa barbariatab tai." 
Joshua21:11 Ak kiigochi Kiriat-arba, kwandab Anak (noto ko Hebron), eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Juda, koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie che kiyiem." 
Joshua21:12 Ago kiigochi Kaleb weritab Jepune korotinwekab nganaset kobunji, koboto nganasokyik che mengechen." 
Joshua21:13 Ak kiigochi ichek lagokab Aron tisiindet Hebron koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, noto ko ki nganaset ne mwechin rumindet, ak Libna koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
Joshua21:14 ak Jatir koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Estomoa koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
Joshua21:15 Holon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Debir koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
Joshua21:16 ak Ain koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Juta koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Bet-semes ak emotinwekyik; nganasok sogol eng’ bororiosiechuto aeng’." 
Joshua21:17 Ak eng’ bororietab Benjamin, ko ki Gibeon koboto emotinwekyik, Geba koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
Joshua21:18 Anatot koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Almon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok ang’wan." 
Joshua21:19 Nganasok tugul che bo lagokab Aron, tisiik, ko ki taman ak somok koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie." 
Joshua21:20 Ak kisich ortinwekab lagokab Kohat, Lawik, che ichek che king’et eng’ lagokab Kohatik, nganasokab barbariandenywa eng’ bororietab Epraim." 
Joshua21:21 Ak kiigochi ichek Sekem koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim, noto ko ki nganaset ne mwechin rumindet, ak Geser koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie." 
Joshua21:22 Ak Kibasaim koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Bet-horon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok ang’wan." 
Joshua21:23 Ak eng’ bororietab Dan, ko ki Elteke koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Gibeton koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
Joshua21:24 Aijalon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Gat-rimon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok ang’wan." 
Joshua21:25 Ak eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase, ko ki Taanak koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Gat-rimon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok aeng’." 
Joshua21:26 Nganasok tugul che bo ortinwekab lagokab Kohat che king’et ko ki taman koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie. 
Joshua21:27 Ak kiigochi lagokab Gerson eng’ ortinwekab Lawik, eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase, Golan eng’ Basan koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, noto ko ki nganaset ne mwechin rumindet; ak Be-estera koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok aeng’." 
Joshua21:28 Ak eng’ bororietab Isakar, ko ki Kision koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Daberat koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
Joshua21:29 Jarmut koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, En-ganim koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok ang’wan." 
Joshua21:30 Ak eng’ bororietab Aser, ko ki Misal koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Abdon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
Joshua21:31 Elkat koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Rehob koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok ang’wan." 
Joshua21:32 Ak eng’ bororietab Naptali, ko ki Kedes eng’ Galili koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, noto ko ki nganaset ne mwechin rumindet, ak Amot-dor koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Kartan koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok somok." 
Joshua21:33 Nganasok tugul che bo Gersonik ko u ortinwekwak, ko ki taman ak somok koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie." 
Joshua21:34 Ak kiigochi ortinwekab lagokab Merari, che ichek che king’et eng’ Lawik, eng’ bororietab Sebulun, Jokneam koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Karta koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Naalal koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok ang’wan." 
Joshua21:36 Ak eng’ bororietab Reuben, ko ki Beser koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Jahas koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie," 
Joshua21:37 Kedemot koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Mepaat koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok ang’wan." 
Joshua21:38 Ak eng’ bororietab Gad, ko ki Ramot eng’ Gilead koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, noto ko ki nganaset ne mwachin rumindet, ak Maanaim koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
Joshua21:39 Hesbon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Jaser koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; nganasok ang’wan tugul." 
Joshua21:40 Chuto tugul ko ki nganasokab lagokab Merari ko u ortinwekwak, koboto che king’et eng’ ortinwekab Lawik; ak barbariandenywa ko ki nganasok taman ak aeng’." 
Joshua21:41 Nganasok tugul che bo Lawik eng’ kwenutab emetab lagokab Israel ko ki nganasok artam ak sisiit koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie. 
Joshua21:42 Kitinyei age tugul eng’ nganasochuto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie che kiyiem: ki u noto eng’ nganasochuto tugul. 
Joshua21:43 Kiigochi anyun Jehovah Israel emet tugul ne kiiyosiechi kwanisiekwak kole tun igochin; ak kinam kobunji, ak komeny;" 
Joshua21:44 ak kiigochi Jehovah ichek kamuung’et eng’ komoswek tugul, ko u tugul che kiiyosiechi kwanisiekwak: ak ma biit chi eng’ bunikwak tugul ne kiimuch kotonon eng’ tainywa; kiinde Jehovah bunikwak tugul eunekwak." 
Joshua21:45 Ma bet ng’olyo agot agenge ne mie ne kiga komwachi Jehovah gotab Israel; kiisulda tugul. 
Joshua22:1 Kiguur anyun Josua bikab Reuben, ak che bo Gad, ak kebebertab bororietab Manase," 
Joshua22:2 ak kolenji ichek, Kiorib tuguk tugul che king’atak Musa otwogindetab Jehovah, ak kiogas it kutinnyu eng’ tugul che kiang’atak:" 
Joshua22:3 ma obagakte tupchosiekwok eng’ betusiechu chang’, agoi betuni, ago kiorib kayomisetab ng’atutietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Joshua22:4 Ak kagogochi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ tupchosiekwok kamuung’et nguno, ko u ye kimwachi: oweeige anyun nguno ak obe emaisiekwok, agoi emet ne kibunjok, ne kigonok Musa otwogindetab Jehovah eng’ Jordan bitonin." 
Joshua22:5 Ago oripge mising’ oyai kayomisutiet ak ng’atutiet, che king’atak Musa otwogindetab Jehovah, ocham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak obendate ortinwekyik tugul ak orib ng’atutikyik, ak onamge ak inendet ak oot inendet eng’ mugulelwekwok tugul ak sobonwekwok tugul." 
Joshua22:6 Koberur anyun Josua ichek, ak kolenji koba: ak kiba emaisiekwak." 
Joshua22:7 Kiga kogochi Musa kebebertab bororietab Manase borotet eng’ Basan: ak kiigochi Josua kebeberta age ne bo bororionoto borotet eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekwak eng’ Jordan bitonin ole tokyingei cherongo. Ak kingomachei Josua komwachi ichek koba emaisiekwak, koberur," 
Joshua22:8 ak kong’alalji kolenji, Oweeige emaisiekwok ak magornatet ne o, ak tuga che chang’, ak feda, ak tahabu, ak sugunonik ak karik, ak ngoroik che chang’ mising’: opchei barunenichuto ki bo bunikwok, koboto tupchosiekwok." 
Joshua22:9 Ak kiweek lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad ak kebebertab bororietab Manase, koba eng’ ole mi lagokab Israel komanda eng’ Silo, ne mi emetab Kanan, koba emetab Gilead, emet ne nenywa, ne kiga konam kobunji, ko u ng’atutietab Jehovah eng’ eutab Musa." 
Joshua22:10 Ak kingoit emet ne negit Jordan, ne mi emetab Kanan, lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad ak kebebertab bororietab Manase, koteech eng’ oloto kaptisisiet ye bo Jordan, kaptisisiet ne o ne toogu." 
Joshua22:11 Ak kigas lagokab Israel kemwaei kelen, Ogeero, kogoteech kaptisisiet lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad ak kebebertab bororietab Manase eng’ taitab emetab Kanan, eng’ koret ne negit Jordan, eng’ komosta ne bo lagokab Israel." 
Joshua22:12 Ak ye kingogas lagokab Israel kioto, koyumgei tuiyet komugul ne bo lagokab Israel eng’ Silo, kole koba kobargei ak bichoto." 
Joshua22:13 Ak kiiyokto lagokab Israel Pineas, weritab Eleasar tisiindet, kwo ole mi lagokab Reuben, ak lagokab Gad, ak kebebertab bororietab Manase, koba emetab Gilead;" 
Joshua22:14 ak kimi koboto inendet bounik tamanu, bounindet agenge ko kibunu gotab kwanisiek eng’ bororietab age tugul ne bo bororiosiekab Israel; ak age tugul ko ki ne o eng’ gotab kwanisiekwak eng’ elfusiekab Israel." 
Joshua22:15 Ak kibwa ole mi lagokab Reuben, ak lagokab Gad, ak kebebertab bororietab Manase, eng’ emetab Gilead, ak kong’alalji kolenji," 
Joshua22:16 Kamwa ko u ni tuiyet komugul ne bo Jehovah, Nee chalwogi kooyachi Kamuktaindetab Israel, kot omaste rani eng’ kasubet ne osubi Jehovah amu kooteekyigei kaptisisiet, ongelelji Jehovah rani?" 
Joshua22:17 Tos mayamech tengektab Peor, ne tomo kitililge eng’ tengegoto agoi ra, nganda kinyonji koroito tuiyetab Jehovah," 
Joshua22:18 kot omaste rani eng’ kasubet ne osubi Jehovah? Ak amu kaongelelji Jehovah rani, ko mutai konerekyi inendet tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel." 
Joshua22:19 Ago, ngo maianyinyat emet ne neng’wong’, olande emet ne bo Jehovah, ole menyei gotab Jehovah, ak obwa onam emet eng’ kwenunnyo kobunjok: ago amat ongelelji Jehovah, anan ongeleljech, oteekyigei kaptisisiet age ne ma kaptisisietab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Joshua22:20 Kima yai Akan weritab Sera chalwokto eng’ kit ne ki itabanat, ak kobutyi neregek tuiyet komugul ne bo Israel? Ak kima lus chichoto inegei eng’ tengektanyi." 
Joshua22:21 Kiwol anyun lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad ak kebebertab bororietab Manase, kong’alalji kandoikab elfusekab Israel, kolenji," 
Joshua22:22 Ingen Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bou cheptalelisiek, Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bou cheptalelisiek, ak ta konaei Israel agine; ngot ko eng’ ngelelnatet, anan ngot ko eng’ kachililutiet ne kagichililji Jehovah, (ko mat isoruech rani,)" 
Joshua22:23 keteekyige kaptisisiet kemaste eng’ kasubet ne kisubi Jehovah; anan ngot kemache kigoite kagochinet ne kibeelei, anan ngot ko kagochinetab busiek, anan ngot kigoite korosekab kagochinoik che bo kalyet, ko ingoyaakta Jehovah inegei;" 
Joshua22:24 anan ngot ko kigiyai kii eng’ ribetab ge, agobo kiy, kele, Manai chi ngot ko tun ng’alaljin lagokwok lagokyok eng’ betusiek che bwanei, kole, Oting’ege nee ak Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel?" 
Joshua22:25 Amu kiyai Jehovah Jordan koek kiwotennyo ak okwek, okwek lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad; motinye kebeberta eng’ Jehovah; koyai anyun lagokwok lagokyok kobagakta kaiyweet ne iywei Jehovah." 
Joshua22:26 Noto anyun ko kogimwa kele, Ongechoboge keteekyige kaptisisiet, ne ma bo kagochinoik che kibeelei, anan ko tiseiywek:" 
Joshua22:27 ago si koek baornatet eng’ kwenunnyo, achek ak okwek, ak kwenutab ibinwek che biitu let eng’ achek, si kobiit keyai boisietab Jehovah eng’ tainnyi eng’ kagochinoikyok che kibeelei, ak eng’ tiseiywekyok, ak eng’ kagochinoikyok che bo kalyet; si matun lenji lagokwok lagokyok eng’ betusiek che bwanei, Motinye kebeberta eng’ Jehovah." 
Joshua22:28 Ko kigimwa anyun kele, Ye tun kamwawech ko u noto anan komwachi ibinwekyok eng’ betusiek che bwanei, kemwa anyun kele, Ogeer kergeindab kaptisisietab Jehovah, ne kiyai kwanisiekyok, ne ma bo kagochinoik che kibeelei, ama bo tiseiywek, ago baornatet eng’ kwenunnyo achek ak okwek." 
Joshua22:29 Ingolooit eng’ achek ama kingelelji Jehovah, ama kimaste rani eng’ kasubet ne kisubi jehovah, kot keteech kaptisisiet ne bo kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak ko bo kagochinoikab busiek, anan ko ne bo tiseiywek, age ne ma kaptisisietab Jehovah, Kamuktaindennyo ne mi taitab gonnyi." 
Joshua22:30 Ak kingogas Pineas tisiindet, ak bounikab tuiyet, ak kandoikab elfusiekab Israel che kimi koboto inendet, ng’alek che kimwa lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad, ak lagokab Manase, kobaibai ichek mising’." 
Joshua22:31 Ak kilenji Pineas weritab Eleasar tisiindet lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad, ak lagokab Manase, Kaginai rani kele mi Jehovah kwenunnyo, amu mata ochalwogenji Jehovah eng’ kiito: kaosoru anyun lagokab Israel eng’ eutab Jehovah." 
Joshua22:32 Ak kiweek Pineas weritab Eleasar tisiindet, koboto bounik, eng’ ole mi lagokab Reuben, ak lagokab Gad, koba eng’ Gilead, agoi emetab Kanan, ole mi lagokab Israel, koipchi ichek ng’alek kogeny." 
Joshua22:33 Ak kiibaibai kioto lagokab Israel; ak kiilos lagokab Israel Kamuktaindet, amata komwa kogeny kole koba kobargei ak ichek, kong’em emet ne kimenyei lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad." 
Joshua22:34 Ak kiguure lagokab Reuben ak lagokab Gad kaptisisionoto, Ed: amu, kile, nito ko baornatet eng’ kwenunnyo ne kagimwa kele Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet." 
Joshua23:1 Ak kingobata betusiek che chang’, kingo kagogochi Jehovah Israel kamuung’et eng’ bunikwak tugul eng’ komoswek tugul, ak kiga koosit Josua, kiga kotar kenyisiek che chang’;" 
Joshua23:2 koguur anyun Josua Israel tugul, boisiekwak ak kandoikwak, ak kiruogikwak ak kiptainikwak, ak kolenji ichek, Kaaositu, kigochang’it kenyisiekyuk;" 
Joshua23:3 ak kiogeer tuguk tugul che kigoyachi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ bororiosiechu tugul amu okwek; amu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, inendet ne kiyai luget agobo okwek." 
Joshua23:4 Ogeero, kiapcheiywok bororiosiechu kang’et, koek borotetab ortinwekwok, koboch Jordan, koboto bororiosiek tugul che kiabar, agoi nyanjet ne o ne tokyingei ole roroktoe asista." 
Joshua23:5 Ak timdoi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ichek eng’ taing’wong’, ak koon si ma ogeere; ak onam emenywa kobunjok, ko u ye kimwawok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Joshua23:6 Onyiganitu anyun mising’ si orib ak oyai tuguk tugul che kigisir eng’ bukuitab Ng’atutik ne bo Musa, si momaste oistoege tuguchoto, obe eutab tai anan ko ne bo katam;" 
Joshua23:7 si mobe kwenutab bororiosiechu, chuto kong’et eng’ kwenung’wong’; anan omwa kainaikab kanamonikwak, anan oyosie eng’ ichek, anan oot, anan ogutung’ji:" 
Joshua23:8 ago onamge ak Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ko u ye kioyai agoi ra." 
Joshua23:9 Amu kigoon Jehovah eng’ taing’wong’ bororiosiek che eechen ak ko kimen: ago ma biit chi ne kitonon eng’ taing’wong’ agoi ra. 
Joshua23:10 Onei chito agenge eng’ okwek elfut, amu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ne yaei luget agobo okwek, ko u ye kimwawok." 
Joshua23:11 Oripge anyun mising’ si ocham Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’. 
Joshua23:12 Amu ngot ochuchuige obe let eng’ kiy age tugul, ak onamge ak bororiosiechuto king’et, chuto king’et eng’ kwenung’wong’, ak otunge ak ichek, ak obe ole mi: ak kobwa ole omi:" 
Joshua23:13 onai komie ole ma koonei kogeny Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ bororiosiechuto eng’ taing’wong’, ago egu mestet ak kit ne riichei bich eng’ okwek, ak kipcharitit eng’ karasaikwok, ak katok eng’ konyekwok, kot kotun olusye eng’ emoni kararan kigonok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong." 
Joshua23:14 Ak ogeero, awendi rani oret ne bendi bik tugul che bo ng’ony: ongen eng’ mugulelwekwok tugul ak eng’ sobonwekwok tugul, ole ma bet ng’olyo agot agenge eng’ tuguk tugul che miachen che kimwa Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ agobo okwek; kiisulda choto tugul eng’ okwek, ma bet kiy agot agenge eng’ choto." 
Joshua23:15 Ak koek ko u ye kibwanjok tuguk tugul che miachen che kimwawok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, koibwok Jehovah ko u noto, tuguk tugul che yaachen, agoi kogeswok eng’ emoni kararan kigonok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Joshua23:16 Ye ongelelji kayomisetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ne king’atak, ak obe oot kanamonik, ak ogutung’ji; kolalyo anyun neregekab Jehovah agobo okwek, ak obegu ochokyi, ochakte eng’ emoni kararan kigogonok inendet." 
Joshua24:1 Kiiyum anyun Josua bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel koba Sekem, ak kiguur boisiekab Israel, ak bounikwak, ak kiruogikwak, ak kiptainikwak; ak kitononso eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet." 
Joshua24:2 Ak kilenji Josua bik tugul, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, kole, Kimenyei kwanisiekwok keny Ainet bitonin, Tera, kwandab Abraham, ak ko kwandab Nahor: ak kiotei kanamonik." 
Joshua24:3 Kiamutu kwandang’wong’ Abraham eng’ Ainet bitonin, ak amutate eng’ emet tugul ne bo Kanan, ak ates iyotennyi, ak agochi Isak." 
Joshua24:4 Ak kiagochi Isak Jakobo ak Esau: ak kiagochi Esau tulwetab Seir, kobunji: ak kirekto Jakobo ak lagokyik koba Misri." 
Joshua24:5 Ak kiayokte Musa ak Aron, ak abire Misri korotwek, ko u kit ne kiayai eng’ kwenunywa: ak ye ibata amutwak omong’u." 
Joshua24:6 Kiamutu kwanisiekwok komong’une Misri: ak kiobwa agoi nyanjet; ak kion Misrik kwanisiekwok eng’ karisiek ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek kot koit Nyanjet ne Birir. 
Joshua24:7 Ak kingorirji Jehovah, konde mesundeito kwenung’wong’ ak Misrik, ak koib nyanjet komaluuch ichek ak kotuch; ak kigeer konyekwok kit ne kiayai eng’ Misri: ak kiomeny ong’atet betusiek che chang’." 
Joshua24:8 Ak kiamutwok oitu emetab Amorik, che kimenyei Jordan bitonin; ak kiyai luget ak okwek: ak kiande icheget eunekwok; ak kionam emenywa kobunujok; ak kiabar ichek eng’ taing’wong’." 
Joshua24:9 King’eet anyun Balak weritab Sipor, laitoriatab Moab, ak kobargei ak Israel; ak kiiyokto keguur Balaam weritab Beor konyo kochubok:" 
Joshua24:10 ago ma acham agas ng’alekab Balaam; eng’ noto anyun, nganda ki u noto, ko kiiberurok; kiasoruok anyun eng’ eunnyi." 
Joshua24:11 Ak kiolong’une Jordan, obwa Jeriko: ak kiyai luget ak okwek bikab Jeriko, Amorik, Perisik, Kananik, Hitik, Girgasik, Hibik, ak Jebusik; ak kiande ichek eunekwok." 
Joshua24:12 Ak kiayokte karamiet kondoenak, ne kion ichek eng’ taing’wong’, laitorinichato aeng’ bo Amorik; ma eng’ rotweng’ung’ bo chok, anan kwangeng’ung’." 
Joshua24:13 Ak kiagonok emet ne kima oyae kiy, nganasok che kima oteeche, ak omeny; oame che bo mbarenikab sabibuk ak che bo emitik che kima omine." 
Joshua24:14 Oiywei anyun Jehovah, ak oboisiechi inendet eng’ muguleldo ne matinyei kenisiet ak eng’ imanit: ak oiste kanamonik che kiotei kwanisiekwok eng’ Ainet bitonin, ak eng’ Misri; ak oboisiechi Jehovah." 
Joshua24:15 Ak ngot ogeere ko ya oboisiechini Jehovah, olewen rani ne oboisiechini; ngo kanamonik che kiotei kwanisiekwok eng’ Ainet bitonin, anan kanamonikab Amorik, che omenye emenywa: ago aboisiechini ane Jehovah, koboto gonnyu." 
Joshua24:16 Ak kiwol bichoto kole, Ingolooit eng’ achek kebagakte Jehovah ak keot kanamonik;" 
Joshua24:17 amu Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, inendet ne kiimutwech ak kwanisiekyok kemong’une emetab Misri, eng’ gotab otwognatet, ak ko inendet ne kiyai kaborunoichu ki eechen eng’ tainnyo, ak koribonwech eng’ oret tugul ne kigibunu, ak eng’ kwenutab bik tugul che kigibunu kwenunywa:" 
Joshua24:18 ak kion Jehovah bik tugul koba eng’ tainnyo, Amorik che kimenyei emonito: noto anyun kiboisiechini Jehovah agachek; amu inendet ko Kamuktaindennyo." 
Joshua24:19 Ak kilenji Josua bik, Momuchi oboisiechi Jehovah; amu inendet ko Kamuktaindet ne tilil; inendet ko Kamuktaindet ne amei ng’etkong’; manyoiywok kaat bistoeng’wong’ anan ko tengekwogikwok." 
Joshua24:20 Ngot omete Jehovah ak oot kanamonik che too, koweeksei anyun ak koyaiywok ne ya, ak kogeswok, ago kiga koyaiywok ne mie." 
Joshua24:21 Ak kilenji bik Josua, Achicha; kiboisiechini Jehovah." 
Joshua24:22 Ak kilenji Josua bik, O baorinik che obaorianjinige ole kaolewen Jehovah, oboisiechi inendet. Ak kimwa kole, Ki baorinik." 
Joshua24:23 Ara anyun, oiste kanamonik che too che mi kwenung’wong’, ak otokyi mugulelwekwok Jehovah Kamuktaindetab israel." 
Joshua24:24 Ak kilenji bik Josua, Kiboisiechini Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ak kegas it kutinnyi." 
Joshua24:25 Koyomisgei Josua anyun ak bichoto betunoto, ak koyachi ng’atutiet ak kayomisutiet eng’ Sekem." 
Joshua24:26 Ak kisir ng’alechuto Josua eng’ bukuitab Ng’atutikab Kamuktaindet; ak kiinem koita ne o, ak konde kotonon eng’ ketit kel ne kimi ye bo ole tilil ne bo Jehovah." 
Joshua24:27 Ak kimwachi Josua bik tugul kolenji, Ogeero, egu koi baoriat agobo achek; amu kagogas ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah che kimwawech: egu anyun baoriat agobo okwek, si moesie Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Joshua24:28 Kilenji anyun Josua bik koba, kwo chi tugul oldab borotennyi." 
Joshua24:29 Ak kingobata tuguchuto, kome Josua weritab Nun otwogindetab Jehovah, ko bo kenyisiek bogol ak taman." 
Joshua24:30 Ak kitub ichek inendet eng’ kiwotetab borotennyi eng’ Timnat-sera, ne mi emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim, eng’ murot ne bo katam ne bo tulwetab Gaas." 
Joshua24:31 Ak kiboisiechi Israel Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Josua, ak eng’ betusiek tugul che bo boisiek che kita komi ko kagome Josua, che kiingen boisiet tugul ne bo Jehovah, ne kiga koyai agobo Israel." 
Joshua24:32 Ak kitub ichek kowekab Josep eng’ Sekem, che kiibu lagokab Israel eng’ Misri, eng’ kebebertab emet ne kiga al Jakobo eng’ werikab Hamor kwandab Sekem eng’ fedaisiek bogol: ak kiek choto borotetab lagokab Josep." 
Joshua24:33 Ak kime agine Eleasar weritab Aron; ak kitub ichek inendet eng’ tulwetab Pineas werinnyi, ne kiga kigochi inendet eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim." 
Judges1:1 Ak kingobata meetab Josua, koteebe lagokab Israel Jehovah kole, Ng’o ne togostoi korok si kobargei ak Kananik agobo achek?" 
Judges1:2 Kole Jehovah, Juda ne togostoi: ogeero, kande emonoto eunnyi." 
Judges1:3 Ak kilenji Juda Simeon ng’etab kamet, Ngetogoste tuwai kebe emet ne kigigona, si kobiit kebarge ak Kananik; si tun kebe tuwai agane emeng’ung’. Koba anyun Simeon ak inendet." 
Judges1:4 Ak kitogosta Juda; ak kiinde Jehovah eunekwak Kananik ak Perisik: ak kibar ichek eng’ Besek bik elfusiek taman. 
Judges1:5 Ak kinyor Adoni-besek eng’ Besek: ak kibargei ak inendet, ak kibar ichek Kananik ak Perisik." 
Judges1:6 Ago kimwei Adoni-besek; ak kion inendet, ak kinam, ak kotil morikyik che eechen che bo eunek ak che bo kelyek." 
Judges1:7 Ak kimwa Adoni-besek kole, Kiiyum amitwogik eng’ kureretab mesennyu laitorinik tamanwogik tisabu che kiga kitil morikwak che eechen che bo eunek ak che bo kelyek; ko u ye kiayai, ko kayaiywa Kamuktaindet ko u noto. Ak kiimut inendet kwo Jerusalem, ak kimechi oloto." 
Judges1:8 Ak kibargei lagokab Juda ak Jerusalem, ak kinam, ak kibare rotwetab chok, ak kobeel nganaset eng’ mat." 
Judges1:9 Ak kingobata, kochortagei lagokab Juda koba kobargei ak Kananik che kimenyei emetab tulonok, ak eng’ Murot ne bo Tai, ak eng’ warenget." 
Judges1:10 Ak kibargei Juda ak Kananik che kimenyei Hebron: (kainetab Hebron eng’ tai ko ki Kiriat-arba:) ak kibar Sesai, ak Ahiman, ak Talmai." 
Judges1:11 Ak kiwa eng’ yoto kwo kobargei ak bik che kimenyei Debir. (Kainetab Debir eng’ tai ko ki Kiriat-seper.) 
Judges1:12 Ak kimwa Kaleb kole, Inendet ne barei Kiriat-seper ak konam, agochini Aksa cheptanyu kotun." 
Judges1:13 Ak kinam Otniel weritab Kenas, ng’etab kamet ne ming’in ne bo Kaleb; ak kiigochi inendet Aksa cheptanyi kotun." 
Judges1:14 Ak kingonyo ole mi inendet, kogaigai inendet kosom kwandanyi koret: kichorgei anyun eng’ sigiriennyi; ak kiteebe Kaleb inendet kolenji, Imache nee?" 
Judges1:15 Ak kilenji inendet, Kona kaberuret; amu kiindea emet ne bo Murot ne bo Tai, igona kong’ikab beek agichek. Ak kiigochi Kaleb inendet kong’ikab beek che bo meto, ak kong’ikab beek che mi ole rektoot." 
Judges1:16 Ak kitogosta lagokab Kenindet, kabyugoitab Musa, komanda eng’ nganaset ne bo tironik koboto lagokab Juda koba ong’atetab Juda, ne mi Murot ne bo Tai ne bo Arad; ak kiba komeny ak bichoto." 
Judges1:17 Ak kiba Juda ak Simeon, ng’etab kamet, koba kobar Kananik che kimenyei Sepat, ak kibar koges. Ak kigiguure kainetab nganasanato Horma." 
Judges1:18 Ak kinam Juda Gasar koboto kiwotennyi, ak Askelon ak kiwotennyi, ak Ekron koboto kiwotennyi." 
Judges1:19 Ak kimi Jehovah koboto Juda; ak kion che kimenyei emetab tulonok; kima imuch koon bik che kimenyei atebwet, amu kitinyei karisiekab karik." 
Judges1:20 Ak kiigochi Kaleb Hebron, ko u ye kiga mwa Musa: ak kion eng’ oloto werik somok che bo Anak." 
Judges1:21 Ak kima on lagokab Benjamin Jebusik che kimenyei Jerusalem: kimeny Jerusalem Jebusik koboto lagokab Benjamin, agoi ra." 
Judges1:22 Ak kitogosta che bo gotab Josep agichek koba kobar Bet-el: ak kimi Jehovah koboto ichek. 
Judges1:23 Ak kiiyokto che bo gotab Josep bik koba kosegei Bet-el. (Kainetab nganasanato eng’ tai ko ki Lus.) 
Judges1:24 Ak kigeer segeik chito komong’une nganaset, ak kilenji inendet, Kisomin iboruech ole kibunei kebendi nganaset orit, si tun kerirenen." 
Judges1:25 Kiiborji anyun ole kibunei kebendi nganaset ak kibar nganaset eng’ rotwetab chok; ago kibagakta chichoto koboto gonnyi tugul. 
Judges1:26 Ak kiwa chichoto emetab Hitik, ak koteech nganaset, ak koguure kainetab nganasanato Lus: ne noto kainennyi agoi ra." 
Judges1:27 Ak ma on Manase che kimenyei Bet-sean ak nganasokyik, anan che bo Taanak ak nganasokyik, anan bik che kimenyei Dor ak nganasokyik, anan bik che kimenyei Ibleam ak nganasokyik, anan bik che kimenyei Megido ak nganasokyik: kimach Kananik komeny emonoto." 
Judges1:28 Ak kingo kagogimegitu Israel, konde Kananik koyai boisionikab otwoknatet, ama on kogestagei." 
Judges1:29 Ak ma on Epraim agine Kananik che kimenyei Geser; kimeny Kananik kwenunywa eng’ Geser. 
Judges1:30 Ma on agine Sebulun bik che kimenyei Kitron, anan bik che kimenyei Naalol; kimeny Kananik kwenunywa, ak kiek che yaei boisietab otwoknatet." 
Judges1:31 Ma on Aser agine bik che kimenyei Ako, anan bik che kimenyei Sidon, anan che bo Alab, anan che bo Aksib, anan che bo Helba, anan che bo Apik, anan che bo Rehob:" 
Judges1:32 ago kimeny Aserik kwenutab Kananik, bik che kimenyei emonoto: amu kima on." 
Judges1:33 Ma on agine Naptali bik che kimenyei Bet-semes, anan bik che kimenyei Bet-anat; ago kimeny kwenutab Kananik, che ki bo emonoto: ago kiek che yaei boisietab otwoknatet, bik che kimenyei Bet-semes ak che bo Bet-anat." 
Judges1:34 Ak kitoorta Amorik lagokab Dan koba emetab tulonok: amu kima kochamjin ichek korek kobwa atebwet: 
Judges1:35 ak kimach Amorik komeny tulwetab Heres, eng’ Aijalon, ak eng’ Saalbim: ago kiiterteris eutab gotab Josep kot koek bichoto che yaei boisietab otwoknatet." 
Judges1:36 Ak kiboch kiwotetab Amorik ole kitogoste kebendi Akrabim, koboch ruandet, ak kotogosta." 
Judges2:1 Ak kitogos malaikaiyatab Jehovah eng’ Gilgal konyo Bokim. Ak kile, Kiamutwak otogosu eng’ Misri, ak kiamutwak obwa emet ne kiayosiechi kwanisiekwok; ak kiamwa ale, Magoi abut kayomisennyu ne kigiarorjige ak okwek:" 
Judges2:2 amat oyai arorut ak bik che menyei emoni; obut kapkorsusiekwak: ago ma ogas it kutinnyu: amu nee anyun si oyai ko u nito? 
Judges2:3 Kiamwa anyun kogeny amu noto, ale, Maone ichek koba eng’ taing’wong’; ago kergeitu ak katok eng’ karasaikwok, ak egu kanamonikwak mestonok eng’ okwek." 
Judges2:4 Ak kingo kagomwachi malaikaiyatab Jehovah ng’alechu lagok tugul che bo Israel, kowaach, ak koririo." 
Judges2:5 Ak kiguure kainetab yoto Bokim: ak kieng’ji Jehovah eng’ yoto. 
Judges2:6 Ak kingo kagolenji Josua bik koba, kwo chi tugul eng’ lagokab Israel ole mi borotennyi konam emet." 
Judges2:7 Ak kiboisiechi bik Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Josua, ak eng’ betusiek tugul che bo boisiek che kita komi ko kagome Josua, che kiga kogeer boisiet tugul ne o ne bo Jehovah, ne kiga koyai agobo Israel." 
Judges2:8 Ak kime Josua weritab Nun otwogindetab Jehovah, ko bo kenyisiek bogol ak taman." 
Judges2:9 Ak kitub ichek inendet eng’ kiwotetab emennyi eng’ Timnat-heres, eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim, eng’ murot ne bo katam ne bo tulwetab Gaas." 
Judges2:10 Ak kibek agichek tugul che bo ibinato ak kigiyumji oldab kwanisiekwak: ak kobiit ibinda age eng’ let ne kima kongen Jehovah, anan ko boisiet ne kiga koyai inendet agobo Israel." 
Judges2:11 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, koot Baalik:" 
Judges2:12 ak kimeto Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, ne kiimut ichek komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, ak kosub kanamonik, che bo kanamonikab bik che kimenyei komoswekwak tugul, ak kong’urukyi kanamonichoto: ak kitach Jehovah si konerech." 
Judges2:13 Ak kimeto Jehovah, ak koot Baal ak Astarot." 
Judges2:14 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel, ak kiinde ichek eunekab bik che kiluul ichek, ak kialdochi ichek eunekab bunikwak che kimenyei komoswekwak, kot ko kima kota komuchi kotononso eng’ tait ab bunikwak." 
Judges2:15 Komosta age tugul ole kiba, ko kimi eutab Jehovah baragunywa si koyachi ne ya, ko u ye kiga mwa Jehovah, ak ko u ye kiga koyosiechi Jehovah ichek: ak kinyalilso mising’." 
Judges2:16 Ak kiing’eetyi Jehovah kiruogik, che kisor ichek eng’ eunekab bik che kiluul ichek." 
Judges2:17 Ago ma kas it kiruogikwak kora, amu kiisubot kanamonik koibotgei, ak kong’urukyi: kimasta kochakta kobagakta oret ne kibunei kwanisiekwak, kogas it ng’atutikab Jehovah; ago ma yai icheget ko u noto." 
Judges2:18 Ak kingong’eetyi Jehovah kiruogik, ko kimi Jehovah koboto kiruogindet, ak kosor ichek eng’ eunekab bunikwak eng’ betusiek tugul che bo kiruogindonoto: kirire Jehovah amu tigenenywa amu ichek che kiinyalili ichek ak koiimi." 
Judges2:19 Ago kingo kagome kiruogindet, koweeigei let, ak koyai tuguk che samisen kosiir kwanisiekwak, kosubi kanamonik kootei, ak kong’urukyi; ma sisyo eng’ boisionikwak, anan eng’ oretab ngelelnatenywa." 
Judges2:20 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel ak kimwa kole, Amu kigobistoe bororioni kayomisennyu ne kiang’at kwanisiekwak, ama kas it kutinnyu;" 
Judges2:21 ko ma aone agane koboch nguno eng’ tainywa age tugul eng’ bororiosiek che kibagakta Josua ye kingo kagome: 
Judges2:22 si kobiit atieme Israel ageer ngo togot korib oretab Jehovah kobendate ko u ye kirib kwanisiekwak, anan maribei." 
Judges2:23 Kibagakta anyun Jehovah bororiosiechoto, ma on kochakta; ama inde ichek eutab Josua." 
Judges3:1 Chu anyun ko bororiosiek che kibagakta Jehovah, si kobiit kotieme Israel, ichek tugul che kima nai lugosiekab Kanan;" 
Judges3:2 si kobiit konai ibinwekab lagokab Israel, konet ichek luget, mising’ ko che kitomo konai agobo luget, eng’ tai;" 
Judges3:3 ichek ko kiptainik mut che bo Pilistik, ak Kananik tugul, ak Sidonik, koboto Hibik che kimenyei tulwetab Lebanon, koboch tulwetab Baal-hermon agoi ole kibunei kebendi Hamat." 
Judges3:4 Kigibagakta si kobiit ketieme Israel ichek, si kobiit konai ngo kase it ng’atutikab Jehovah, che king’at kwanisiekwak eng’ eutab Musa." 
Judges3:5 Ak kimeny lagokab Israel kwenutab Kananik; Hitik, Amorik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik;" 
Judges3:6 ak kiimut tibikwak koek osotikwak, ak kiigochi tibikwak werikwak, ak kiot kanamonikwak." 
Judges3:7 Ak kiyai ne ya lagokab Israel eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak koutie Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak koot Baalik ak Aserot." 
Judges3:8 Noto anyun kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel, ak kialda ichek koba eunekab Kusan-risataim laitoriatab Mesopotamia: ak kiot lagokab Israel Kusan-risataim kenyisiek sisiit." 
Judges3:9 Ak ye kingorirji lagokab Israel Jehovah, kong’eetyi Jehovah lagokab Israel yetindet, ne kisor ichek, inendet ko Otniel weritab Kenas, ng’etab kamet ne ming’in ne bo Kaleb." 
Judges3:10 Ak kinyonji inendet Tamirmirietab Jehovah, ak kiiruokyi Israel; ak kiwa luget, ak kiinde Jehovah eunnyi Kusan-risataim laitoriatab Mesopotamia: ak kiiterter Otniel Kusan-risataim." 
Judges3:11 Ak kiimuuny emet kenyisiek artam. Ak kime Otniel weritab Kenas. 
Judges3:12 Ak kiyai ne ya lagokab Israel kogeny eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak kiigimit Jehovah Eglon laitoriatab Moab kobargei ak Israel, amu kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Judges3:13 Ak kiiyum inendet lagokab Amon ak Amalek kobwa ole mi inendet; ak kiwa kobar Israel, ak kiluul nganasetab tironik." 
Judges3:14 Ak kiot lagokab Israel Eglon laitoriatab Moabik kenyisiek taman ak sisiit. 
Judges3:15 Ago ye kingorirji lagokab Israel Jehovah, kong’eetyi Jehovah ichek yetindet, Ehud weritab Gera, Benjaminindet, chito ne ki bo katam: ak kiiyoktae inendet lagokab Israel kagochinet koyokyi Eglon laitoriatab Moab." 
Judges3:16 Kiitang’jigei Ehud rotwetab chok ne ng’atiben komoswek tuwai, ne aechin ak kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut; ak kiratyi kubestanyi ne bo tai kotaban ngoriennyi orit." 
Judges3:17 Ak kiipchi kagochinonoto Eglon laitoriatab Moab: ak ki chito ne nerat mising’ Eglon," 
Judges3:18 ak ye kingo kagogoito kagochinonoto, kolenji bichoto che kiibu kagochinet koba." 
Judges3:19 Ago kiweek inendet eng’ ole kimi kanamonik eng’ ole negite Gilgal, ak komwa kole, Atinye ng’olyotab ung’ot ne kagiyogunena, ee laitoriat. Ak kile, Sis. Ak kimanda bik tugul che kimi ole negite inendet." 
Judges3:20 Ak kinyo Ehud ole mi inendet; ak kitebyei inegei eng’ gonnyi ne kiuure. Ak kile Ehud, Atinye ng’alek che aibun che bunu Kamuktaindet. Kong’eet anyun eng’ ng’echerennyi." 
Judges3:21 Ak kiiyogoito eunnyi ne bo katam Ehud ak kiinem rotwetab chok eng’ kubestanyi ne bo tai, ak kotoor moennyi:" 
Judges3:22 kiwa rotwet orit koboto kungit; ak kituch sundet rotwonoto, amu ma ng’us rotwet eng’ moennyi; ak kimandae batai." 
Judges3:23 Kimanda anyun Ehud kwo serem, ak koger kurgotik, kogerji inendet go, ak kotemel." 
Judges3:24 Ak ye kingomanda, kobwa otwogikyik; ak kigeer, ak ogeero, temelotin kurgotikab got; ak komwa kole, Eng’ iman, ko katuch kelyekyik eng’ gonnyi ne kiuure." 
Judges3:25 Kiigenis kot kolilanso: ak ogeero, ma yat inendet kurgotikab got; kiinem anyun yateiywot, ak koyat: ak ogeero, kiga kobutyi ng’ony kiptaiyandenywa kome." 
Judges3:26 Ak kichilil Ehud ye kita kogenisiei ichek, ak kwo kosiirtoe kanamonik, ak komwechi Seira." 
Judges3:27 Ak kingoit, koguut igondit eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim, ak kichortagei lagokab Israel koboto inendet eng’ emetab tulonok, ak kiindoe ichek." 
Judges3:28 Ak kilenji ichek, Osubwa: amu kagonde Jehovah eunekwok bunikwok Moabik. Ak kichortagei kosub inendet koba konam tabarwekab Jordan korebe Moabik, ama chamji chi kolanda." 
Judges3:29 Ak kibar eng’ betunoto murenik olo bo elfusiek taman che bo Moab, chito age tugul ne ki kim, ak chito age tugul ne ki nyigan; ama chilil chi agot agenge." 
Judges3:30 Kigiterter anyun eng’ betunoto Moab eng’ eutab Israel. Ak kiimuuny emet eng’ kenyisiek tamanwogik sisiit. 
Judges3:31 Kingobata inendet kobiit Samgar weritab Anat, ne kibar murenik bogol lo che bo Pilistik eng’ kiblitwet: ak kisor agine Israel." 
Judges4:1 Kiyai anyun lagokab Israel yaitiet kogeny eng’ taitab Jehovah, ye kingo kagome Ehud." 
Judges4:2 Ak kialda Jehovah ichek koba eunekab Jabin laitoriatab Kanan, ne kilaitorani eng’ Hasor; ne ki kiptaiyatab lugennyi Sisera, ne kimenyei Haroset ne bo Bororiosiek." 
Judges4:3 Ak kirirji lagokab Israel Jehovah: amu kitinyei karisiekab karik bogol sogol; ak kiinyalil lagokab Israel eng’ kimnatet eng’ kenyisiek tiptem. 
Judges4:4 Ak kiiruokyi Israel eng’ betusiechoto Debora maotiot, kwondab Lapidot." 
Judges4:5 Kitebe tiretab Debora kel eng’ kwenutab Rama ak Bet-el eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim: ak kitogosu lagokab Israel ole mi inendet kobwanei kiruoget. 
Judges4:6 Ak kiiyokto inendet kole keguur Barak weritab Abinoam eng’ Kedes-naptali, ak kinyo kolenji, Ma ng’at Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel kole, Ui irikyi tulwetab Tabor, ak imut murenik elfusiek taman che bo lagokab Naptali ak che bo lagokab Sebulun?" 
Judges4:7 Si amutun Sisera konyo ainetab Kison, kiptaiyatab lugetab Jabin, koboto karisiekyik ak bikyik che chang’; ak andoi inendet euneguk." 
Judges4:8 Ak kilenji Barak inendet, Ngot kebendi tuwai, awendi: ago ngot ko magibendi tuwai, ko mawendi." 
Judges4:9 Ak kile, Kibendi tuwai iman: ago banda ne iwendi ko mabunjin teegistang’ung’; amu aldochin Jehovah Sisera eunekab kwondo. Ak king’eet Debora koba Kedes ak Barak." 
Judges4:10 Ak kiguur Barak Sebulun ak Naptali kotuiyechi Kedes; ak kitogosta murenik elfusiek tamanu kosub inendet: ak kitogosta Debora agine koboto inendet. 
Judges4:11 Kiga kotabanegei Heber Kenindet Kenik, eng’ lagokab Hobab kabyugoitab Musa, kwo koteech emainnyi eng’ ole mi ketit eng’ Saananim, ne negite Kedes." 
Judges4:12 Ak kigimwachi Sisera kelenji, kowa Barak weritab Abinoam kotogosta tulwetab Tabor." 
Judges4:13 Ak kiiyum Sisera karisiekyik tugul, karisiekab karik bogol sogol, ak bik tugul che kimi koboto inendet, koboch Haroset ne bo Bororiosiek, agoi ainetab Kison." 
Judges4:14 Ak kilenji Debora Barak, Ng’eet; nito betut ne indoi Jehovah Sisera eung’ung’: mawo Jehovah kondoenen? Kwo anyun Barak kochortagei eng’ tulwetab Tabor, koboto murenik elfusiek taman che kiisubi inendet." 
Judges4:15 Ak kiiseer Jehovah Sisera, koboto karisiekyik tugul, ak lugennyi tugul eng’ rotwetab chok eng’ taitab Barak; ak kichorgei Sisera eng’ karinnyi, ak komwei eng’ keldo." 
Judges4:16 Ago kion Barak karisiek, ak luget, kot koit Haroset ne bo Bororiosiek, ak kiibut luget komugul ne bo Sisera eng’ rotwetab chok; ma ng’et chi." 
Judges4:17 Ago kimwei Sisera kobun keldo agoi koit emaitab Jael osotiotab Heber Kenindet: amu kiting’egei kalyet Jabin laitoriatab Hasor ak gotab Heber Kenindet. 
Judges4:18 Ak kimanda Jael kotorokto Sisera, kwo kolenji, Nyo go, kiptaiyandennyu, nyo ole ami; ameiywei. Ak kiwa ole mi eng’ emait, ak kituge inendet ngoriet." 
Judges4:19 Yeityo kolenji, Asomin ale, inaga beek tutigin aee; amu ama melel. Ak kiyat sotet ne bo chego, ak konaga kolu, ak kotuch." 
Judges4:20 Ak kilenji chichoto inendet, Tonon eng’ kurgetab emait, ak ye nyo chi age tugul ak koteebenen kole, Mi chi yu? Ilenji, Achicha." 
Judges4:21 Yeityo konem Jael osotiotab Heber tigongiotab emait, ak konem kiriswet, ak kwo kosapchi ak kobirji tigongiondonoto mwaitab konda, ak kitoor komanda kwo kotoor ng’onyut; amu kiruei mising’; ak kitanui kome." 
Judges4:22 Ak ogeero, ye kingota koonei Barak Sisera, komong’ Jael kotorok inendet, ak kolenji, Nyo aborun chito ne icheng’e. Ak kinyo ye mi inendet, ak ogeero, kiruei Sisera ko kagome, ak kimi tigongiot mwaitab kondanyi." 
Judges4:23 Koterter anyun Kamuktaindet eng’ betunoto, Jabin laitoriatab Kanan eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
Judges4:24 Ak kigimit eutab lagokab Israel koterter Jabin laitoriatab Kanan, kot kobar Jabin laitoriatab Kanan." 
Judges5:1 Kotien anyun Debora ak Barak weritab Abinoam eng’ betunoto, kole," 
Judges5:2 Amu kiindo kandoik eng’ Israel, Amu kiigoitogei bik eng’ chamnyet, Olosu Jehovah." 
Judges5:3 Ogas, ee, okwek, laitorinik; oeb it, ee, okwek bounik, Atienjini ane Jehovah; Atienjini kalosunet Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Judges5:4 Jehovah, ye kiimande eng’ Seir, Ye kiiwe imande eng’ koretab Edom, Kobotan ng’ony korobon agine kipsengwetisiek, Ee, kosoi bolik beek." 
Judges5:5 Kiroot tulonok kotenden eng’ taitab Jehovah, Agot Sinainin eng’ taitab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Judges5:6 Eng’ betusiekab Samgar weritab Anat, Eng’ betusiekab Jael ko kima kobunei chi ortinwek che eechen, Ak kibun kiprutoinik ortinwekab taban." 
Judges5:7 Kiigesgei bounik eng’ Israel, kiigesgei, Kot ang’eet ane Debora, Ang’eet ane, kamet eng’ Israel." 
Judges5:8 Kilewen cheptalelisiek che taunen; Kibiit luget eng’ kurgotik: Tos kibiit long’et anan ko ng’otit ne kigigeerei Eng’ elfusiek artam eng’ Israel? 
Judges5:9 Tokyingei muguleldanyu bounikab Israel, Che kiigoitogei eng’ chamnyet eng’ kwenutab bik: Olosu Jehovah." 
Judges5:10 Omwaite okwek che olanye sigirok che leelach, Che otebe ngoroik che kiitoi eng’ ng’ony, che bo kamanutiet ne o, Ak okwek che obendoti eng’ oret." 
Judges5:11 Che looen eng’ cheetab mwogik, eng’ komoswek che kirame beek, Yoto ye mwaitoe boisionikab imanda che bo Jehovah, Boisionikab imanda che bo bounatennyi eng’ Israel. Yeityo korekto bikabo Jehovah koba kot koit ormarichok." 
Judges5:12 Ng’eet, ng’eet, Debora; Ng’eet, ng’eet, tien: Tonon, Barak, ak imut luuleniguk che kiiluul, inye weritab Abinoam." 
Judges5:13 Yeityo kochorgei che king’et eng’ bik che toogunotin eng’ bik; Kichorgei Jehovah agobo ane si kobargei ak che nyigonen. 
Judges5:14 Kimong’une Epraim che salu Amalek; Kosubun, inye Benjamin, eng’ biguk; Kibun Makir bounik, Ak kibun Sebulun ichek che boisie kiroktab sirindet." 
Judges5:15 Ak kimi bounikab Isakar koboto Debora; Kit ne ki u Isakar, ko kit ne ki u Barak agine; Kiruai atebwet kosub kelyekyik. Ole negite ainosiekab Reuben Ko kimi kabwatutik che eechen che bo muguleldo." 
Judges5:16 Kilya si itebe kwenutab biusiekab kechirek, Si igas kuutetab ndurerusiek che kiguutyin akwotisiek? Ole negite ainosiekab Reuben Ko kimi kasiagutik che eechen che bo muguleldo." 
Judges5:17 Kimeny Gilead Jordan bitonin: Ak Dan, ko kilya si kotebi eng’ melisiek? Kiteb Aser kosisyigei eng’ ngegutab nyanjet, Kimeny ole negite luukwekab beekyik." 
Judges5:18 Sebulun ko ki bik che kiinde sobonwekwak ng’oiyonditab meet, Ak Naptali eng’ oldinwek che tororen che bo emet." 
Judges5:19 Kibwa laitorinik ak koyai luget; Kibargei ak laitorinikab Kanan, Eng’ Taanak ole negite beekab Megido: Ma ib kelunetab fedaisiek." 
Judges5:20 Kiyai luget kong’eete kipsengwet, Kibargei kecheik ak Sisera eng’ ortinwekwak." 
Judges5:21 Kiib ainetab Kison ichek, Ainonoto bo keny, ainetab Kison. Ee sobondanyun, ui tai eng’ kimnatet." 
Judges5:22 Yeityo kotiechatiech kelyekab mbartanyisiek Eng’ torombenet, torombenetab chechuak che kimen." 
Judges5:23 Kile malaikaiyatab Jehovah, Ochub Meros, Ochub eng’ chubet ne ng’wan bik che menyei oloto; Amu ma bwa kotoret Jehovah, Kotoret Jehovah agobo che kimen." 
Judges5:24 Egu Jael ne iberurot eng’ kwonyik, Osotiotab Heber Kenindet, Egu ne iberurot eng’ kwonyik eng’ emait." 
Judges5:25 Kisom beek, ago kiinage chego; Kiipchi mwaitab chego eng’ tabet ne bo teegisto." 
Judges5:26 Kiinem tigongiot, Ak kiname eunnyi ne bo tai kiriswetab musogindet; Ak kokwere Sisera kiriswonoto, kikwer komandae metinnyi, Ee, kitoor ak kokwer, komandae mwaitab kondanyi." 
Judges5:27 Kiing’uruk eng’ kelyekyik, kiibut, kiru: Kiing’uruk eng’ kelyekyik, kiibut: Eng’ ye kiing’uruge, ko kiibut anyun kome." 
Judges5:28 Kiitito eng’ tirisia, ak korir, Kirir kametab Sisera eng’ tirisietab segengeisiek, kole, Amu nee si kogagei karinnyi ko ma sib konyo? Amu nee si kogagei kelyekab karisiekyik?" 
Judges5:29 Kowolji kwonyikyik che ng’omen, kolenji, Ee, kiwoljigei inendet," 
Judges5:30 Tomo konyo, tomo kopchei barunenik? Chepto, tibik aeng’ che bunjin chi age tugul; Che bunjin Sisera, barunenikab saleiywek che ter, Barunenikab saleiywek che ter che bo nabutikab lelesta, Che bo saleiywek che ter che bo nabutikab lelesta, eng’ komoswek tuwai, eng’ kaatwekab luulenik?" 
Judges5:31 Ingobetyo anyun buniguk tugul, ee Jehovah: Ago ingoigei che chamei inendet asista, ye choru eng’ kimnatennyi. Ak kiimuuny emet eng’ kenyisiek artam." 
Judges6:1 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak kiinde Jehovah ichek eunekab Midian kenyisiek tisab. 
Judges6:2 Ak kiiterter eutab Midian Israel: ak kibaljigei lagokab Israel keringonik eng’ tulonok, ak kebenonik, ak kiyachigei irimoik, amu Midian." 
Judges6:3 Ak kingo kagogolso Israel, kotogos anyun Midianik, ak Amalegik, ak bikab kong’asis; kobwa kobargei ak ichek;" 
Judges6:4 ak koteech tainywa, ak kong’em ruratetab emet, agoi koit Gasa, ama ituuch amitwogik eng’ Israel, kechir, anan ko tany, anan ko sigirio." 
Judges6:5 Amu kibwa kotogos ak tukwak ak emaisiekwak, ak kimong’ ko u chereng’enyinik eng’ chang’indo; kima ko iitoksei ichek ak tambesikwak; ak kibwa kong’em emet." 
Judges6:6 Ak kinyor Israel nyalilda ne o amu Midianik, ak kirirji lagokab Israel Jehovah." 
Judges6:7 Ak ye kingorirji lagokab Israel Jehovah amu Midianik," 
Judges6:8 koyokyi Jehovah lagokab Israel maotiot: ak kimwachi kolenji, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel kole, Kiamutwak otogosu eng’ Misri, ak amutwak omong’une gotab otwognatet;" 
Judges6:9 ak kiatiachak eng’ eutab Misrik, ak eng’ eutab tugul che kiinyalilak, ak kiaon ichek koba eng’ taing’wong’, ak agonok emenywa;" 
Judges6:10 ak kialenjok, A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’; moiywei cheptalelisiekab Amorik, che omenye emenywa: ago ma ogas it kutinnyu." 
Judges6:11 Ak kinyo malaikaiyatab Jehovah, ak kotebe ketit kel ne kimi Opra, ne ki bo Joas Abiesrindet: ak kituei werinnyi Gideon nganok eng’ ole kitue sabibuk, si kobiit kouny nganochoto eng’ Midianik." 
Judges6:12 Ak kimong’ji inendet malaikaiyatab Jehovah, ak kolenji, Mi Jehovah koboten, inye chito ne i kim ak ko i nyigan." 
Judges6:13 Ak kilenji Gideon inendet, Bwa kiptaiyandennyu, ngot komi Jehovah kobotech, ko amu nee si kobwanjech tuguchu tugul? Ak mi ano boisionikyik tugul che bo kwong’et che kimwawech kwanisiekyok, kolenjech, Tos kima imutwech Jehovah ketogosu eng’ Misri? Ago kigobagaktech Jehovah, ak kondeech eunekab Midianik." 
Judges6:14 Ak kigusyi kong’ Jehovah inendet, ak kolenji, Ui eng’ kimnatoning’ung’, ak isoru Israel eng’ eutab Midianik: tos ma ayokten?" 
Judges6:15 Ak kolenji, Bwa Kiptaiyat, asorune nee Israel? Keero, orennyo ko bonon kosiir tugul che bo Manase, ak ko a ne ming’in eng’ tugul eng’ gotab kwandanyu." 
Judges6:16 Ak kilenji Jehovah, Ami koboten iman, ak ibare Midianik ko u chito agenge." 
Judges6:17 Ak kilenji, Ngot ko kaanyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’, iborua anyun kaborunet ile inye ne ing’alalwa." 
Judges6:18 Asain ale, amat iwe eng’ yu, agoi anyo ole imi, ak aibu kagochinennyu, ak ande taing’ung’. Ak kile, Atebye kot iitu kogeny." 
Judges6:19 Ak kiwa Gideon go, ak kochob aruetab ng’oror, ak makatinik che ma kinde mermerek che bo busiek che bo epah agenge: kiinde banyek kerebet, ak kiinde sutek teret, ak koipchi inendet eng’ ketit kel, kwo kogochi." 
Judges6:20 Ak kilenji malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet inendet, Inemu banyek ak makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ak inde koi, ak irong’u sutek. Ak kiyai ko u noto." 
Judges6:21 Ak kiiyogoito malaikaiyatab Jehovah walitab kirokto ne kitinyei eng’ eunnyi, ak kotwae banyechato ak makatinichato ma kinde mermerek; ak kitogosta mat eng’ koyata, kobeel banyek ak makatinichato ma kinde mermerek; yeityo kobetito kwo malaikaiyatab Jehovah eng’ tainnyi ne mata kogeer." 
Judges6:22 Ak kigeer Gideon kole kaga inendet ko malaikaiyatab Jehovah; ak kile Gideon, Bwa, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Amu kageer malaikaiyatab Jehovah kimni." 
Judges6:23 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet, Ingoteb kalyet koboten; ameiywei: memee." 
Judges6:24 Koteekyi Gideon anyun Jehovah kaptisisiet eng’ yoto, ak koguure Jehovah-salom: mitei agoi kora eng’ Opra ne bo Abiesrik." 
Judges6:25 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet kemounoto, Kweri kirgitab kwandang’ung’, kirgitab aeng’ ne bo kenyisiek tisab, ak ibut kapkorosutab Baal ne tinyei kwandang’ung’, ak iluul Asera ne negite kapkorosunoto:" 
Judges6:26 ak iteekyi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kaptisisiet eng’ baragutab irimonito, kotetak komie, ak ikweri kirgit ne bo aeng’ ak igoite kagochinet ne kibeelei koboto kwenikab Asera che iebe." 
Judges6:27 Kiimut anyun Gideon bik taman eng’ otwogikyik, ak koyai ko u ye kamwachi Jehovah: amu kiiywei bikab gotab kwandanyi ak bikab nganaset, ko ma imuch anyun koyai bet, koyai kemoi." 
Judges6:28 Ak kingong’eetyo bikab nganaset kota ko karon inne, ogeero, ko kiga kebut kapkorosutab Baal, ak kiga kiluul Asera ne ki negite kapkorosut, ak kiga kigoito kirgit ne bo aeng’ eng’ kaptisisiet ne kiga kiteech." 
Judges6:29 Kolenjigei, Ng’o ne koyaei kii? Ak ye kingogin ak koteebat, kole, koyaei kiito Gideon weritab Joas." 
Judges6:30 Ak kolenji bikab nganaset Joas, Imutu wering’ung’ komong’, kebar: amu kabut kapkorosutab Baal, ak amu koeb Asera ne komi yoto." 
Judges6:31 Ak kilenji Joas bik tugul che kiibeligei ak inendet, Ong’alali otoreti Baal? Anan osoru inendet? Ne ng’alali agobo inendet ko mie kebar kota ko karon: ngot ko cheptalelit inendet, ko ingong’alal kotoretgei, amu kogoluul chito kapkorosunnyi." 
Judges6:32 Koguure anyun inendet eng’ betunoto Jerubaal, kole, Ingong’alal Baal koruokyi inendet, amu kobut kapkorosunnyi." 
Judges6:33 Kiiyumgei anyun Midianik tugul ak Amalegik ak bikab kong’asis, ak kolong’ koteech atebwetab Jesreel." 
Judges6:34 Ago kinyonji Tamirmirietab Jehovah Gideon; ak kiguut igondit; ak kiiyumgei Abiesrik kosub inendet. 
Judges6:35 Ak kiiyokto bik koba Manase komugul; ak kiiyumgei agichek kosub inendet: ak kiiyokto bik koba Aser, ak Sebulun, ak Naptali; ak kitogos kotorok ichek." 
Judges6:36 Ak kilenji Gideon Kamuktaindet, Ngot isoru Israel eng’ eunnyu ko u ye kiimwa," 
Judges6:37 keero, andoi kororikab kechirek ruanyut ne kiborse; ngot konam rewot kororik ichegei ak ko yaamat ng’onyut tugul, anai anyun ale isoru Israel eng’ eunnyu, ko u ye kiimwa." 
Judges6:38 Ak kiek ko u noto: amu king’eet kota ko karon mising’ eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, ak koruruny kororik, ak koiiny kororichoto komong’ beekab rewot, konyi tabet." 
Judges6:39 Ak kilenji Gideon Kamuktaindet, Amat kolalyo neregeguk agobo ane, kota amwa ni kityo: asain ale chamwan atiem kororik konyil agenge kogeny; ingosaiyo kororik ichegei, ak ingobiit rewot eng’ ng’onyut tugul." 
Judges6:40 Ak kiyai Kamuktaindet ko u noto kemounoto: amu kisaiyo kororik ichegei, ak kibiit rewot eng’ ng’onyut tugul." 
Judges7:1 King’eet anyun karon mising’ Jerubaal, inendet ko Gideon, koboto bik tugul che kimi ak inendet, ak koteech ole negite kondab beek ne bo Harok: ak kimi nganasetab Midian murot ne bo katam ne bo bichoto, ole negite tulwetab More, eng’ atebwet." 
Judges7:2 Ak kilenji Jehovah Gideon, Chang’ bik che mi koboten ne mamuchi ande Midianik eunekwak, si mamenja Israel kole, Kasorua eunnyu." 
Judges7:3 Ui anyun nguno, imwaite kogas bik, ilenji, Age tugul ne nyogor ak kobotani ko ingoweek kwo eng’ tulwetab Gilead. Ak kiweek bik elfusiek tiptemu ak aeng’; ak king’et elfusiek tamanu." 
Judges7:4 Ak kilenji Jehovah Gideon, Ta ko chang’ bik; imutu kobwa ole mi beek, si atiemun ichek eng’ yoto: si age tugul ne amwaun alenjinin, Obendi ak ni, obe ak noto; ak age tugul ne amwaun alenjinin, Mobendi ak ni, ko mawendi noto." 
Judges7:5 Komut anyun bik kobwa ye mi beek: ak kilenji Jehovah Gideon, Age tugul ne labei beek eng’ ng’eleptanyi ko u ye labei seset, itaban noto; ko u noto agine age tugul ne kutunyi si koee beek." 
Judges7:6 Ak koitetab ichek che kilabune beek eunekwak kobwa kutit, ko ki bik bogol somok: ago kigutung’so bik chun alak koee beek." 
Judges7:7 Ak kilenji Jehovah Gideon, Asoruok eng’ bichoto bogol somok che kalab beek, ak ande Midianik euneguk: ago ingoba bik tugul, ingowo chi tugul oldanyi." 
Judges7:8 Koib anyun bik amitwogik eng’ eunekwak, ak igondisiekwak: ak kimwachi bikab Israel tugul koba, kwo chi tugul emainnyi, ago kirany bik bogol somok: ak kimi nganasetab Midian ng’ony eng’ ole kimi inendet, eng’ atebwet." 
Judges7:9 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet kemounoto, Ng’eet, chortege nganaset; amu kande eung’ung’." 
Judges7:10 Ago ngot iwe ichortege, obe ak otwogindeng’ung’ Pura ochortege nganaset:" 
Judges7:11 ak igas kit ne mwaei; ak ye ibata kigimit euneguk ichortege nganaset. Kichortagei anyun ak otwogindennyi Pura agoi koit ole boch bik che kimi nganaset che tinyei karik. 
Judges7:12 Ak kiga ruiyo Midianik ak Amalegik ak bikab kong’asis tugul eng’ atebwet koigei chereng’enyinik eng’ chang’indo; ak kima ko iitoksei, ki te tambesikwak ng’aniekab ngegutab nyanjet eng’ chang’indo." 
Judges7:13 Ak kingoit Gideon, ogeero, kimi chito ne kiga mwachi choruennyi karuotitoet, kolenji, Keero, koaruotyi karuotitoet, ak keero, kiibutyi makatiat ne ming’in ne bo sairik nganasetab Midian, ak kororokyi emait, kokwer kolul, ak kogabui, koru eng’ ng’ony." 
Judges7:14 Ak kiwolji choruennyi kolenji, Nito ko ma kit age kobate rotwetab chok ne bo Gideon weritab Joas, chitab Israel: kagonde Kamuktaindet Midian eunekyik, ak luget tugul." 
Judges7:15 Ak ye kingogas Gideon mwaunetab karuotitaonoto, ak weegennyi, kong’uruk kosa; ak kwo nganasetab Israel, ak komwa kole, Ong’eetye; amu kagonde Jehovah eunekwok lugetab Midian." 
Judges7:16 Ak kipchei bichoto bogol somok koek kweanaik somok, ak kiigochi ichek tugul igondisiek konam eng’ eunekwak, ak terenik che mami kiy, che mi orit kegenganikab mat." 
Judges7:17 Ak kolenji, Ogeera, ak oyai ko u ye ayae, ak ogeero, ye kaait ye boch nganaset, ko u ye ayae, oyai ak okwek ko u noto." 
Judges7:18 Ye aguut igondit, ane ak bik tugul che mi kobota, oguut anyun ak okwek igondisiek eng’ komosta age tugul ne bo nganaset tugul, ak omwa ole, Bo Jehovah ak Gideon." 
Judges7:19 Kiit anyun Gideon ak bichoto bogol che kimi koboto inendet, ole boch nganaset eng’ taunetab ripset ne bo kemoi kwen, ye kata kewale ripset: ak kiguut igondisiek, ak kotui terenik che kimi eunekwak." 
Judges7:20 Ak kiguut kweanaichoto somogu igondisiek, ak kotui terenik, ak koname eunekab katam kegenganikab mat, ak konam igondisiek eng’ eunekwak che bo tai si koguut: ak kiwaach kole, Rotwetab chok ne bo Jehovah ak ne bo Gideon." 
Judges7:21 Ak kitonon chi tugul eng’ komostanyi ko kayiem nganaset: ak kiibokto luget tugul: ak kowaach ak koon bichoto. 
Judges7:22 Ak kiguut igondisiechoto bogol somok, ak kogochi Jehovah kobar chi age tugul chito ne kaonei, ak kobargei ak luget tugul: ak kimwei luget kot koit Bet-sita kotokyigei Serera, kot koit kiwotetab Abel-meola, ole negite Tabat." 
Judges7:23 Ak kiiyumgei murenikab Israel kobun Naptali, ak Aser, ak Manase tugul, ak koon Midianik." 
Judges7:24 Ak kiiyokto Gideon bik koba emet komugul ne bo tulonokab Epraim, kolenji, Ochoruge, kebarge ak Midian, ak onam beek agoi Bet-bara, ak Jordan. Kiiyumgei anyun murenik tugul che bo Epraim, ak konam beek tugul kot koit Bet-bara, agot Jordan." 
Judges7:25 Ak kinam bounik aeng’ che bo Midian, Oreb ak Seeb; ak kibar Oreb eng’ ruandetab Oreb, ak kibarji Seeb ole kitue sabibuk, eng’ Seeb, ak koon Midianik: ak kiib metitab Oreb ak ne bo Seeb koipchi Gideon eng’ Jordan bitonin." 
Judges8:1 Ak kimwachi bikab Epraim inendet kolenji, Amu nee si iyaiywech ko u ni, si meguurech ye kiiwendi obarge ak Midian? Ak kibolji inendet mising’." 
Judges8:2 Kilenji, Koayai nee ne siirei ne kooyai okwek? Tos ma kaigai turetab sabibukab Epraim kosiir kesisietab Abieser?" 
Judges8:3 Kogonde Kamuktaindet eunekwok bounikab Midianik, Oreb ak Seeb: ak nee ne kotamuchi ayai ne siirei ne kooyai okwek? Kogesgei anyun neregekwak agobo inendet, ye kingo kagomwa ko u noto." 
Judges8:4 Ak kiit Gideon Jordan, ak kolanda, inendet ak murenik bogol somok che kimi koboto inendet, ko kagong’etyo, ago kita koonei." 
Judges8:5 Ak kilenji bikab Sukot, Kaigai ogochi makatinik bik che isubwa; amu kagong’etyo, ak aone Seba ak Salmuna, laitorinikab Midian." 
Judges8:6 Ak kile bounikab Sukot, Tos mi eunekab Seba ak Salmuna eung’ung’ nguno, kot kigochi makatinik lugeng’ung’?" 
Judges8:7 Ak kile Gideon, Noto anyun, ye kagonde Jehovah eunekyuk Seba ak Salmuna, abache anyun borwekwok eng’ katokab ong’atet ak katablelinik." 
Judges8:8 Kitogosta anyun eng’ oloto kwo Penuel, ak kong’alalji bichoto ko u noto: ak kiwolji inendet bikab Penuel ko u ye kiga wolji bikab Sukot." 
Judges8:9 Ak kimwachi bikab Penuel kolenji, Ye aweeige eng’ kalyet, anyone aluuli teeksoni koi." 
Judges8:10 Kimi Seba ak Salmuna Karkor, koboto lugosiekwak, olo bo bik elfusiek taman ak mut, tugul che king’et eng’ luget tugul ne bo bikab kong’asis: amu kibek bik elfusiek bogol ak tiptem che kiga ng’us rotokab chok." 
Judges8:11 Ak kitogosta Gideon kobun oretab bik che kimenyei emaisiek eng’ komostab kong’asis ne bo Noba ak Jogbea, ak kibar luget; amu kimi luget eng’ kalyet." 
Judges8:12 Ak kimwei Seba ak Salmuna; ak kion ichek; ak kinam laitorinichoto aeng’ bo Midian, Seba ak Salmuna, ak kiimu lugonoto tugul." 
Judges8:13 Ak kiweek Gideon weritab Joas eng’ luget kobun ole kitogostoe ne bo Heres. 
Judges8:14 Ak kinam muren age ne bo bikab Sukot, ak koteepse: ak kisirji inendet kainaikab bounikab Sukot, ak boisiekab nganaset, bik tamanwogik tisab ak tisab." 
Judges8:15 Ak kinyo ole mi bikab Sukot, ak kolenji, Ogeero, Seba ak Salmuna, che kiororecha agobo ichek, ole, Tos mi euneguk eunekab Seba ak Salmuna nguno, kot kigochi makatinik biguk che kagong’etyo?" 
Judges8:16 Ak kinam boisiekab nganaset, ak koib katokab ong’atet ak katablelinik, ak kobaage bikab Sukot." 
Judges8:17 Ak kiiluul teeksonoto koi bo Penuel, ak kobar bikab nganasanato." 
Judges8:18 Kolenji anyun Seba ak Salmuna, Ki bich nee bik che kiobar eng’ Tabor? Ak kiwolji kolenji, Kit ne i u, ko ki u noto agichek. Ki u inye; ki kergei age tugul ak lagokab laitoriat." 
Judges8:19 Ak kile, Ki tupchosiekyuk, werikab kamennyu; ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ko nda kigobagakte kosopcho, ko kama kota abarok." 
Judges8:20 Ak kilenji taitanyi Jeter, Ng’eet, ak ibar ichek. Ago ma ng’us rotwennyi bo chok nerananato: amu kiiywei, amu kita ko ming’in." 
Judges8:21 Yeityo komwa Seba ak Salmuna, kole, Ng’eet barech: amu ko u kit ne u mureno, ko u noto kimnatennyi. Ak king’eet Gideon, ak kobar Seba ak Salmuna, ak konem karikab lelesta che kimi kaatwekab tambesikwak." 
Judges8:22 Yeityo komwachi bikab Israel Gideon kolenji, Boiywech inye, ak wering’ung’, ak weritab wering’ung’ agine: amu koisoruech eng’ eutab Midianik." 
Judges8:23 Ak kilenji Gideon ichek, Maboiywok, ama boiywok werinnyu: boiywok Jehovah." 
Judges8:24 Ak kilenji Gideon ichek, Amagenok teebutiet, ale kogona chi tugul munaokab itik eng’ barunenik. (Amu kitinyei munaokab tahabu che bo itik, amu ki Ismaelik.)" 
Judges8:25 Ak kiwol kole, Kigonu eng’ chamnyet. Ak kiito ngoriet, ak kowirji chi tugul munaokab itik che bo barunenik." 
Judges8:26 Ak kiek nyigisindab munaokab itik che bo tahabu, che kiga som inendet, sekelisiekab tahabu elfut agenge ak bogol tisab; ko ma kiit karikab lelesta, ak karik alak che bo kaatit, ak ngoroik che arusen ne birir che kiilachi laitorinikab Midian, ko ma kiit sirimwek che kimi kaatwekab tambesik." 
Judges8:27 Ak kiyai Gideon epod eng’ tuguchoto, ak kiinde nganasennyi, noto ko Opra: ak kiisub Israel tugul kioto koyaat ibetab ge: ak kiek kioto mestet eng’ Gideon ak eng’ gonnyi." 
Judges8:28 Kigiterter anyun Midian eng’ taitab lagokab Israel, mata koyotgei met agoi. Ak kiimuuny emet kenyisiek artam eng’ betusiekab Gideon." 
Judges8:29 Ak kiwa Jerubaal weritab Joas komeny gonnyi. 
Judges8:30 Ak kitinyei Gideon werik tamanwogik tisab che kisichei: amu kitinyei osotik che chang’. 
Judges8:31 Ak kisikyi werit agine chebaigeiyandennyi ne kimitei Sekem, ak kiguure kainennyi Abimelek." 
Judges8:32 Ak kiilil Gideon weritab Joas, ak kigitupchi kereritab Joas kwandanyi eng’ Opra ne bo Abiesrik." 
Judges8:33 Ak kingobata meetab Gideon, koweek kogeny lagokab Israel, koibotgei ak Baalik, ak koyai Baal-berit koek cheptalelinywa." 
Judges8:34 Ak ma ibwat lagokab Israel Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ne kisor ichek eng’ eunekab bunikwak tugul che kimi komosta age tugul:" 
Judges8:35 anan korire gotab Jerubaal, ne inendet ko Gideon, ko u mieindo tugul ne kiga koyachi Israel." 
Judges9:1 Ak kiwa Sekem Abimelek weritab Jerubaal oldab gab imamet, ak kong’alal ak ichek, ak bik tugul che bo gotab kwandab kamennyi kolenji," 
Judges9:2 Kaigai omwachi bik tugul che bo Sekem kogas ngo mie eng’ okwek koboiywok werik tugul che bo Jerubaal che tamanwogik tisab, anan boiywok agenge? Obwat kogeny ole a kowekwok ak ko a banyekwok." 
Judges9:3 Ak kimwachi imamosiekyik bik tugul che bo Sekem ng’alechato kogas: ak kimach mugulelwekwak kosub Abimelek; amu kimwa kole, Inendet ko ne kitupche." 
Judges9:4 Ak kiigochi bichoto inendet fedaisiek tamanwogik tisab eng’ gotab Baal-berit, che kiigaigae Abimelek bik che yaach, che njaamik, che kiisub inendet." 
Judges9:5 Ak kiwa gotab kwandanyi eng’ Opra, ak kibarji koita agenge tupchosiekyik werikab Jerubaal, che ki bik tamanwogik tisab: ago king’et Jotam werit ne ming’in ne bo Jerubaal; amu kiunygei." 
Judges9:6 Ak kiiyumgei bik tugul che bo Sekem, ak got tugul ne bo Milo, ak koba koyai Abimelek koek laitoriat, eng’ ole negite ketitab toloita ne kimi Sekem." 
Judges9:7 Ak ye kingemwachi Jotam, kwo kotonone tulwet barak ne bo Gerisim, ak komwa eng’ kutit ne o, kowaach, kolenji, Ogasa, okwek bikab Sekem, si kobiit kogasak Kamuktaindet." 
Judges9:8 Kiba betut age ketik koiil age koek laitoriat ne bou ichek; ak kilenji emdit, Laitoran eng’ achek." 
Judges9:9 Ago kilenji emdit ichek, Tos abagakte akwaiyennyu, ne kigonyite bik Kamuktaindet ak bik, ak awe atumdumotegei eng’ baragutab ketik?" 
Judges9:10 Ak kilenji ketik mogoiywet, Nyo ilaitoran eng’ achek." 
Judges9:11 Ago kilenji mogoiywet ichek, Tos abagakte anyinyindanyu, ak logoekyuk che miach, ak awe atumdumotegei eng’ baragutab ketik?" 
Judges9:12 Ak kilenji ketik ketitab sabibuk, Nyo, ilaitoran eng’ achek." 
Judges9:13 Ak kilenji ketitab sabibuk ichek, Tos, abagakte divaikyuk, che iboiboi Kamuktaindet ak bik, ak awe atumdumotegei eng’ baragutab ketik?" 
Judges9:14 Yeityo kolenji ketik tugul ketit ne ming’in ne bo katok, Nyo ilaitoran eng’ achek." 
Judges9:15 Ak kilenji ketoto ming’in ketik, Ngot iman oiila aek laitoriat eng’ okwek, obwa anyun ak omang’u uruennyu: ak ngo ma u noto, ko ingomong’une mat ketit ne ming’in, ak kobeel taragonikab Lebanon koges." 
Judges9:16 Noto anyun ngo kioyai ne bo iman ak ne litit, ye kioyai Abimelek koek laitoriat, ak ngot ko kioyachi ne mie Jerubaal ak gonnyi, ak kioyachi inendet ko u ye nyoljin boisionikab eunekyik;" 
Judges9:17 (amu kiyai luget baba agobo okwek, ak ma iit sobondanyi, ak kosoruok eng’ eutab Midian:" 
Judges9:18 ak kong’eetyi gotab baba ra, ak kaobar werikyik, bik tamanwogik tisab eng’ koita agenge, ak kaoyai Abimelek, weritab otwogindennyi ne chepto, koek laitoriat eng’ bikab Sekem, amu inendet ko ne otupche;)" 
Judges9:19 ngot ko kioyachi Jerubaal ne bo iman ak ne litit koboto gonnyi rani, oboiboitu anyun eng’ Abimelek, ak ingobaibait agine eng’ okwek:" 
Judges9:20 ago ngot ko ma u noto, ko ingomong’ mat eng’ Abimelek, ak kobeel bikab Sekem koges, koboto gotab Milo; ak ingomong’ mat eng’ bikab Sekem, ak eng’ gotab Milo, kobeel Abimelek koges." 
Judges9:21 Ak kilabat Jotam komwei kwo Beer, ak komeny oloto, amu kiiywei Abimelek ng’etab kamet." 
Judges9:22 Ak kiek bounindet Abimelek eng’ Israel kenyisiek somok. 
Judges9:23 Ak kiiyokyi Jehovah tamirmiriet ne ya kwenutab Abimelek ak bikab Sekem; ak kiiberber bikab Sekem Abimelek: 
Judges9:24 si konyo kolgoliet ne kigiyachi werikab Jerubaal tamanwogik tisab, si kotebe korotikwak baragutab tupchenywa, ne kibarei ichek, ak baragutab bikab Sekem, che kiigimit eunekyik si kobar werik che tupcho." 
Judges9:25 Ak kiinde bikab Sekem bik che kiribistos koribei inendet eng’ tulonok barak, ak kirebe tuguk bik tugul che kibunei oranato ki negite ichek: ak kigimwachi Abimelek." 
Judges9:26 Ak kinyo Gaal weritab Ebed koboto tupchosiekyik kolanda koba Sekem: ak kiimang’ inendet bikab Sekem. 
Judges9:27 Ak kiba mbarenywa, koba kobut sabibuk, ak kotui, ak koyai igorta, yeityo koba gotab cheptalelinywa, koamis ak koeeisei, ak kochub Abimelek." 
Judges9:28 Ak kile Gaal weritab Ebed, Ng’o Abimelek, ak ki ng’o achek che kebo Sekem, kot keot inendet? Ma inendet ko weritab Jerubaal? Ak Sebul kiptaiyandennyi? Oot okwek bikab Hamor kwandab Sekem: ago amu nee si keot inendet?" 
Judges9:29 Kata kaigai nda kami bichu eunnyu! Ta kaiste Abimelek. Ak kilenji Abimelek, Tes lugeng’ung’ ak imong’u." 
Judges9:30 Ak kingogas Sebul bounindetab nganaset ng’alekab Gaal weritab Ebed, kolalyo neregekyik." 
Judges9:31 Ak kiiyokto bik koba oldab Abimelek eng’ ng’alset, kolenji, Keero, kabwa Sekem, Gaal weritab Ebed, ak tupchosiekyik; machei kochaamji bikab nganaset si kobokyin." 
Judges9:32 Noto anyun, ng’eet kemoi, inye, ak bik che mi koboten, ak oribisye eng’ mbar:" 
Judges9:33 ak mutai karon, ko kata kochor asista, isib ing’eet, ak ibokyi nganaset: ak keero, ye kamong’ inendet koboto bik che mi tugul kobokyin, iyachi anyun kit age tugul ko u ye kenyoru boroindo." 
Judges9:34 King’eet anyun Abimelek kemoi ak bik tugul che kimi koboto inendet, ak kiribisyo ichek agobo Sekem eng’ kweanaik ang’wan." 
Judges9:35 Ak kimanda Gaal weritab Ebed, ak kotonon eng’ ole kibunei eng’ kurgetab nganaset: ak king’eet anyun Abimelek ak bik che kimi koboto inendet eng’ ole koga ribisye." 
Judges9:36 Ak kingogeer Gaal bik, kolenji Sebul, Keero, chorugei bik eng’ tulonok barak. Ak kilenji Sebul, Igeere uruetab tulonok ko u bik." 
Judges9:37 Ak kimwa Gaal kogeny kole, Keero, chorugei bik eng’ kwenutab emet, ak nyonei kweanet agenge kobunu oretab ketitab Meonenim." 
Judges9:38 Kolenji anyun Sebul inendet, Mi ano kuting’ung’ nguno, ne koimwa ile, Ng’o Abimelek kot keot inendet? Tos chu ko ma bik che koisase? Mande anyun nguno, kaigai, ak obarge ak ichek." 
Judges9:39 Komanda Gaal kondoe bikab Sekem, ak kobargei ak Abimelek." 
Judges9:40 Ak kion Abimelek inendet, ak kimwei eng’ tainnyi, ak kiibutyo che chang’ che kigiguoten, kot koit ole kibunei eng’ kurget." 
Judges9:41 Ak kimeny Abimelek Aruma: ak kion Sebul Gaal ak tupchosiekyik komanda, si mameny Sekem." 
Judges9:42 Ak mutai koba bik mbar; ak komwachi Abimelek. 
Judges9:43 Ak kiimut bik, kopcheune kweanaik somok, ak koribisyo eng’ mbar; ak kigeer, ogeero, kimong’ bik sang’ eng’ nganaset; ak king’eet kobokyi ichek ak kobar."
