Judges9:44 Ak kiruai Abimelek ak kweanaik che kimi koboto inendet koba tai, ak kotononso eng’ ye kibunei eng’ kurgetab nganaset: ak kiruai kweanaichoto aeng’u kobokyi che kimi mbar, ak kibar ichek." 
Judges9:45 Ak kibargei Abimelek ak nganasanato betunoto tugul; ak kinam nganaset, ak kibar bik che kimi orit: ak kibut nganaset, ak koseerji munyuk." 
Judges9:46 Ak kingogas bik tugul che bo teekset ne koi ne bo Sekem agobo ng’olyondonoto, koba irimet orit ne bo gotab Elberit." 
Judges9:47 Ak kigimwachi Abimelek kelenji, kagoyumgei bik tugul che bo teekset ne koi ne bo Sekem." 
Judges9:48 Ak kitogosta Abimelek tulwetab Salmon, inendet ak bik tugul che kimi koboto inendet; ak kinam Abimelek aiywet eng’ eunnyi, ak koeb temetab ketit, ak konam ak kotiiny kaat: ak kimwachi bik che kimi koboto inendet kolenji, Kit ne kogeer ayai, oyai ochokyi ko u ye kayai." 
Judges9:49 Ak kieb chi tugul temennyi ne bo ketit, ak kosub Abimelek, ak konde ichek irimet, ak kobeel irimonoto komi bik orit; kibek anyun agichek bik tugul che bo teeksonoto koi ne bo Sekem, bik che itei elfut agenge murenik ak kwonyik." 
Judges9:50 Yeityo kwo Abimelek Tebes, ak koteech kotoorji Tebes, ak konam." 
Judges9:51 Ago kimitei teeksonoto koi ne kim eng’ nganasanato, ak kimwechi oloto murenik tugul ak kwonyik, koboto ichek tugul che bo nganaset, ak kogerjigei orit, ak kotogosta kwo got barak." 
Judges9:52 Ak kinyo Abimelek teeksonoto koi, ak kobargei ak bichoto, ak kiwa korikyi kurgetab teeksonoto koi kole kobeel." 
Judges9:53 Ak kotururji kobogoriot age metitab Abimelek isiet, ak kitui metinnyi." 
Judges9:54 Ak kiguur kochokyi Abimelek muren age ne kiipchin karik, kolenji inendet, Ng’usu rotwet, ak ibara, si male bik, Kabar ane, kobogoriondo. Ak kitoor inendet murenonoto, ak kime." 
Judges9:55 Ak kingogeer bikab Israel kole kagome Abimelek, kwo chi tugul oldanyi." 
Judges9:56 Ak kiyaakta mugetut anyun Kamuktaindet agobo tengektab Abimelek, ne kiyachi kwandanyi, ye kibar tupchosiekyik tamanwogik tisab:" 
Judges9:57 ak tengekto tugul ne bo bikab Sekem ko kiyaakyi Kamuktaindet mugetut eng’ metowekwak: kinyonji anyun ichek chubetab Jotam weritab Jerubaal. 
Judges10:1 Ak kingobata betusiekab Abimelek kong’eet Tola weritab Pua, weritab Dodo, chitab Isakar, kosor Israel; ak kimenyei Samir eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim." 
Judges10:2 Ak kiiruokyi Israel kenyisiek tiptem ak somok, ak kime, ak kigitupchi Samir." 
Judges10:3 Ak kingobata betusiekyik, kong’eet Jair, Gileadindet; ak kiiruokyi Israel kenyisiek tiptem ak aeng’." 
Judges10:4 Ak kitinyei werik sosom che kilanyei moek sosom che bo sigirok, ak kitinyei nganasok sosom, che kiguure Habot-jair agoi ra, che mi emetab Gilead." 
Judges10:5 Ak kime Jair, ak kigitupchi Kamon." 
Judges10:6 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel yaitiet kogeny eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kiot Baalik, ak Astarot, ak kanamonikab Suria, ak kanamonikab Sidon, ak kanamonikab Moab, ak kanamonikab lagokab Amon, ak kanamonikab Pilistik; ak kimeto Jehovah, mata koot inendet." 
Judges10:7 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel, ak kialdochi eunekab Pilistik, ak eunekab lagokab Amon." 
Judges10:8 Ak kiim ak konyalil lagokab Israel kenyinoto ak kiinyalil lagokab Israel tugul che kimi Jordan bitonin eng’ emetab Amorik, ne mi Gilead, eng’ kenyisiek taman ak sisiit." 
Judges10:9 Ak kilandae Jordan lagokab Amon koba kobargei ak Juda, ak Benjamin agichek, ak gotab Epraim; kiginyalil anyun Israel mising’." 
Judges10:10 Ak kirirji lagokab Israel Jehovah, kolenji, Kigeyaun tengekto, amu kigemete Kamuktaindennyo, ak kigeot Baalik." 
Judges10:11 Ak kimwachi Jehovah lagokab Israel, kolenji, Tos kima asoruok eng’ Misrik, ak eng’ Amorik, ak eng’ lagokab Amon, ak eng’ Pilistik?" 
Judges10:12 Kiinyalilak agichek Sidonik, ak Amalegik, ak Maonik; ak kiorirja, ak kasoruok eng’ eunekwak." 
Judges10:13 Ago kiometa, ak oot kanamonik: noto anyun, ma asoruok kogeny." 
Judges10:14 Oba orirji kanamonik che kiolewen; ingosoruok ichek eng’ betutab nyalildang’wong’. 
Judges10:15 Ak kilenji lagokab Israel Jehovah, Kigeyai tengekto: yaiywech kit age tugul ne igeere ile nyolu; ago kisain kityo kele isoruech betuni." 
Judges10:16 Ak kiisto kanamonik che too eng’ kwenunywa, ak koot Jehovah: ak kiarogen sobondanyi amu nyalildab Israel." 
Judges10:17 Kiiyumgei anyun lagokab Amon, koba koteech Gilead. Ak kiiyumgei lagokab Israel ak koteech Mispa." 
Judges10:18 Ak kimwachigei bik, bounikab Gilead, kole, Ng’o ne tau kobaregei ak lagokab Amon? Egu inendet ne o eng’ tugul che menyei Gilead." 
Judges11:1 Ki nyiganet ne kim Jepta Gileadindet, ago ki weritab chepkugoniot: ak kisich Gilead Jepta." 
Judges11:2 Ak kisikyi Gilead osotiondennyi werik; ak kingo kagoeegitu werikab osotiondennyi, koon Jepta, kwo komanda, kolenji inendet, Mesiche kiy eng’ gotab baba, amu i weritab kwondo age." 
Judges11:3 Komwei anyun Jepta eng’ ole mi tupchosiekyik, ak kwo komeny emetab Tob: ak kiiyumjigei Jepta bik che njaamik, ak kibendat koboto inendet." 
Judges11:4 Kingobata betusiek alak, koyai luget lagokab Amon ak Israel." 
Judges11:5 Ak kingoyai luget lagokab Amon ak Israel, koba boisiekab Gilead komut Jepta eng’ emetab Tob:" 
Judges11:6 ak kilenji Jepta, Nyo egu kiptaiyandennyo, si kobiit kebarge ak lagokab Amon." 
Judges11:7 Ak kilenji Jepta boisiekab Gilead, Tos kima owecha, ak oona eng’ gotab baba? Amu nee anyun si obwanja ye otinye nyalilda?" 
Judges11:8 Ak kilenji boisiekab Gilead Jepta, Kagiweekyinge kogeny amu noto, si kobiit kebe tugul koboten, kebarge ak lagokab Amon, si iegu bounindennyo ne ibou bik tugul che menyei Gilead." 
Judges11:9 Ak kilenji Jepta boisiekab Gilead, Ngot omuta ga kogeny kebarge ak lagokab Amon, ak kogoito Jehovah ichek eng’ tainnyu, aegu bounindeng’wong’?" 
Judges11:10 Ak kilenji boisiekab Gilead Jepta, Egu Jehovah baoriat eng’ kwenunnyo; kiyae iman ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Judges11:11 Kiwa Jepta anyun koboto boisiekab Gilead, ak kiyai bik inendet koek bounindet ak kiptaiyat ne bou ichek: ak kimwa Jepta ng’alekyik tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ Mispa." 
Judges11:12 Ak kiiyokta Jepta bik koba oldab laitoriatab lagokab Amon, kolenji, Iting’ena nee, kot inyonja iyai luget ak emennyu?" 
Judges11:13 Ak kiwolji laitoriatab lagokab Amon bik che kiga iyokto Jepta, kolenji, Amu kiib Israel emennyu, ye kitogosu kobunu Misri, koboch Arnon agoi Jabok, kot koit Jordan: weekwa anyun emotinwechoto eng’ kalyet." 
Judges11:14 Ak kiiyokto Jepta bik kogeny koba oldab laitoriatab lagokab Amon: 
Judges11:15 ak kimwa bichoto kole, Kamwa Jepta ko u ni kole: Ma ib Israel emetab Moab, anan ko emetab lagokab Amon:" 
Judges11:16 ago ye kitogosu Israel eng’ Misri, ak kobwa kobun ong’atet agoi Nyanjet ne Birir, ak kibwa Kades;" 
Judges11:17 koyokto anyun Israel bik koba oldab laitoriatab Edom, kolenji, Kaigai ichamwa abun emeng’ung’; ago ma cham laitoriatab Edom. Ak kiiyokto bik ko u noto koba oldab laitoriatab Moab: ago ma cham: ak kimeny Israel Kades." 
Judges11:18 Yeityo kobun ong’atet, ak koyiem emetab Edom, ak emetab Moab, ak kibun kong’asis ne bo emetab Moab, ak koteech Arnon bitonin; ago ma siir kiwotetab Moab, amu Arnon ko ki kiwotetab Moab." 
Judges11:19 Ak kiiyokto bik Israel koba oldab Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, laitoriatab Hesbon; ak kilenji Israel inendet, Kaigai, ichamwech kebun emeng’ung’, kebe oldanyo." 
Judges11:20 Ago ma iyan Sihon kobun Israel kiwotennyi: ago kiiyum Sihon bikyik tugul ak koteech Jahas, ak kobargei ak Israel." 
Judges11:21 Ak kiinde Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, Sihon ak bikyik tugul eutab Israel, ak kibar ichek: konam anyun Israel emet tugul ne bo Amorik kobunji, icheget che kimenyei emonoto." 
Judges11:22 Ak kinam kiwotet tugul ne bo Amorik kobunji, koboch Arnon agoi Jabok, ak koboch ong’atet agoi Jordan." 
Judges11:23 Kion anyun Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, Amorik, koba, eng’ taitab bikyik Israel, imuchi anyun inye inam ichek?" 
Judges11:24 Meibe kobunjin noto ne kigonin Kemos cheptaleling’ung’? Noto anyun, age tugul ne onei Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo eng’ tainnyo, kename choto kobunjech." 
Judges11:25 Tos i kaigai inye eng’ kiy age tugul isiir Balak weritab Sipor, laitoriatab Moab? Tos kiborio ak Israel, anan kobargei ak ichek?" 
Judges11:26 Ye kita komenyei Israel Hesbon ak nganasokyik, ak eng’ Aroer ak nganasokyik, ak eng’ nganasok tugul che mi tabandab Arnon eng’ kenyisiek bogol somok, kolya si moib eng’ betusiechoto?" 
Judges11:27 Tom ayaun ane tengek, ago keyai ne ya iyaiywa luget: Jehovah, ne Kiruogindet, ko ingoek kiruogindet rani eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel ak lagokab Amon." 
Judges11:28 Ago ma kas laitoriatab lagokab Amon ng’alek che kiiyokyi Jepta inendet. 
Judges11:29 Kinyonji anyun Tamirmirietab Jehovah Jepta, ak kilandae Gilead ak Manase, ak kilandae Mispa ne bo Gilead, ak kong’eete Mispa ne bo Gilead kwo kolanda kot koit ole mi lagokab Amon." 
Judges11:30 Ak kiyai Jepta kaarortaet koarorji Jehovah, kole, Ngot inde iman eunekyuk lagokab Amon," 
Judges11:31 ko kiy age tugul ne torokwa eng’ kurgennyu, ye tun aweeksei eng’ kalyet, abunu ole mi lagokab Amon, kobunjin kiyoto Jehovah, si agoito koek kagochinet ne kibeelei." 
Judges11:32 Kilanda anyun Jepta kwo ole mi lagokab Amon, kobargei ak ichek; ak kiinde Jehovah ichek eunekyik." 
Judges11:33 Ak kibar ichek, kong’eete Aroer kot koit Minit, nganasok tiptem, kot koit Abel- keramim, kibar eng’ baret ne o kot. Kigiterter anyun lagokab Amon eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
Judges11:34 Ak kinyo Jepta Mispa ole mi gonnyi, ak ogeero, kimong’ cheptanyi kotorok inendet kotinyei sugutisiek che mengechen kotienonu: ki lakwennyi noto inegei; kima kotinyei werit anan chepto age kobate noto inegei." 
Judges11:35 Ak kingogeer inendet, kobet ngoroikyik, ak kole, Bwa cheptanyu! Kegona anyeratit, ak i age eng’ che inyalila: amu koang’ang’ji Jehovah kutinnyu, ama aweechige let." 
Judges11:36 Ak kilenji lakwanato inendet, Baba, koing’ang’ji kuting’ung’ Jehovah; yaiywa ko u kit ne kobun kuting’ung’; amu kogoyaaktaun Jehovah mugetut eng’ buniguk, eng’ lagokab Amon." 
Judges11:37 Ak kilenji kwandanyi, Ingeyaiywa ng’olyondoni: chamwa atebi anege arawek aeng’, si kobiit awa tulonok barak, arirji bergeinatennyu, ane, ak choronokyuk." 
Judges11:38 Ak kile, Ui. Ak kilenji kwo arawek aeng’: kiwa anyun, inendet ak choronokyik, ak korirji bergeinatennyi eng’ tolonok." 
Judges11:39 Ak kingogesgei arawek aeng’u, koweektagei ole mi kwandanyi, ak kiyachi inendet ko u kaarortaennyi ne kiga koaror: ak kitomo kotuiyo ak muren. Ak kiek biteet eng’ Israel," 
Judges11:40 kele, bendi tibikab Israel kenyit age tugul koyaei kabwatet agobo cheptab Jepta Gileadindet eng’ betusiek ang’wan eng’ kenyit age tugul." 
Judges12:1 Ak kiiyumgei bikab Epraim, ak koba kotokyigei murot ne bo katam; ak kimwachi ichek Jepta kolenji, Amu nee si ilande obarge ak lagokab Amon, ama imwawech kebe tugul? Kibeeldoin gong’ung’." 
Judges12:2 Ak kimwachi Jepta ichek kolenji, Kigitinye boriet ne o ak lagokab Amon, ane ak bikyuk, ak ye kiaguurok ko ma osorua eng’ eunywa." 
Judges12:3 Ak ye kiageer ale ma osorua, ande sobondanyu ng’oiyondit, alande kebarge ak lagokab Amon, ak kiinde Jehovah ichek eunnyu: ko amu nee anyun si obwanja rani, oboriena?" 
Judges12:4 Yeityo koyum Jepta bik tugul che bo Gilead, ak kobargei ak Epraim: ak kibar bikab Gilead Epraim, amu kile, Okwek Gileadik ko kiomweune Epraim, che omi kwenutab Epraim, ak kwenutab Manase." 
Judges12:5 Ak kinam Gileadik tabarwekab Jordan, korat Epraimik: ak ye mwa che kimweune Epraim, kole, Chamwa alanda, kolenji inendet bikab Gilead, I Epraimindet? Ye le, Achicha;" 
Judges12:6 kolenji anyun ichek inendet, Mwa ile Shibolet; ak kile Sibolet; amu kima komuchi komwa komie; konam anyun inendet, ak kobar eng’ tabarwekab Jordan: ak kibek eng’ betunoto che bo Epraim elfusiek artamu ak aeng’." 
Judges12:7 Ak kiiruokyi Jepta Israel kenyisiek lo. Yeityo kome Jepta Gileadindet, ak kigitupchi nganaset age ne bo Gilead." 
Judges12:8 Ak kingobata, koruokyi Ibsan ne bo Bet-lehem Israel." 
Judges12:9 Ak kitinyei werik sosom, ak tibik sosom che kiigoito kitunot eng’ komoswek alak, ak kiimutyi werikyik tibik sosom che bo komoswek alak. Ak kiiruokyi Israel kenyisiek tisab." 
Judges12:10 Ak kime Ibsan, kigitupchi Bet-lehem." 
Judges12:11 Ak kingobata, koruokyi Elon Sebulunindet Israel; ak kiiruokyi Israel kenyisiek taman." 
Judges12:12 Ak kime Elon Sebulunindet agine, ak kigitupchi Aijalon eng’ emetab Sebulun." 
Judges12:13 Ak kingobata koruokyi Abdon weritab Hilel Piratonindet Israel. 
Judges12:14 Ak kitinyei werik artam, ak werik sosom che bo werikyik che kilanyei moek tamanwogik tisab che bo sigirok: ak kiiruokyi Israel kenyisiek sisiit." 
Judges12:15 Ak kime Abdon weritab Hilel Piratonindet, ak kigitupchi Piraton eng’ emetab Epraim, eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Amalegik." 
Judges13:1 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel yaitiet kogeny eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kiinde Jehovah ichek eutab Pilistik kenyisiek artam. 
Judges13:2 Ak kimitei chito age ne bo Sora, ne bo bororietab Danik, ne kigiguure kainennyi Manoa; ak ki son osotiondennyi, ma sigis." 
Judges13:3 Ak kimong’ji malaikaiyatab Jehovah kwonyoto, ak kolenji, Keero, i son, ma isigisie: ago imanachi, ak isich werit." 
Judges13:4 Noto anyun, asomin ale iripge, amee divaik anan ko maiyek, ameam kiy age tugul ne muruon:" 
Judges13:5 amu, keero, imanachi, ak isich werit; ama kicheru sumeekyik; amu egu lakwanato Nasiritindet ne bo Kamuktaindet koboch komi mo: ak kotoi kosor Israel eng’ eunekab Pilistik." 
Judges13:6 Kiwa anyun kwonyoto ak komwachi manong’otiondennyi kolenji, Kanyonja chitab Kamuktaindet, ak ka u itondanyi itondab malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet, ne imuisei mising’; ak ma ateebe ole kabunu, ama mwawa agine kainennyi:" 
Judges13:7 ago kalenja, Keero, imanachi, ak isich werit; amee divaik anan ko maiyek, anan iam kiy age tugul ne muruon: amu egu lakwanato Nasiritindet ne bo Kamuktaindet koboch komi mo agoi betutab meenyi." 
Judges13:8 Kisa anyun Manoa Jehovah kole, Asain, ee Kamuktaindet, ingonyo kogeny chichoto bo Kamuktaindet, ne kogeyogu, konyo ole kimi konetech kit ne kiyachin lakwanato kisichei." 
Judges13:9 Ak kigas Kamuktaindet kutitab Manoa; ak kinyonji malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet ole kimi kwondo kogeny ye kitebyei eng’ mbar: ago kima komi Manoa manong’otiondennyi koboto inendet. 
Judges13:10 Kichakta anyun kwonyoto, kolabat, ak komwachi manong’otiondennyi, kolenji, Keero, kagomong’ja kogeny, chichi kinyonjina yuginye." 
Judges13:11 Ak king’eet Manoa, ak kosub osotiondennyi, ak koit ole mi chichoto, ak kolenji inendet, Inye chichi king’alaljin kwonyi? Ak kile, A inendet." 
Judges13:12 Ak kile Manoa, Ingosulda ng’aleguk: tun u nee lakwanato, ak egu nee boisiennyi?" 
Judges13:13 Ak kilenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah Manoa, ingoripgei kwondo eng’ tugul tugul che kiamwachi." 
Judges13:14 Mat koam kiy age tugul ne bunu ketitab sabibuk, amechamji koee divaik anan ko maiyek, amat koam kiy age tugul ne muruon; tugul che kiamwachi koribegei choto." 
Judges13:15 Ak kimwachi Manoa malaikaiyatab Jehovah, kolenji, Asain ale, cham ko ta keranyin, si kobiit kechobun aruetab ng’oror." 
Judges13:16 Ak kilenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah Manoa, Matiny keranya, ko ma ame amitwogiguk: ak ngot imache ichob kagochinet ne kibeelei, ko nyolu igochi Jehovah. Amu kima nai Manoa kole ki malaikaiyatab Jehovah." 
Judges13:17 Ak kilenji Manoa malaikaiyatab Jehovah, Kiguurenen nee, si kobiit kegonyitin ye isulda ng’aleguk?" 
Judges13:18 Ak kilenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah, Amu nee si iteebena kainennyu, amu kwong’et kainennyu?" 
Judges13:19 Kiib anyun Manoa aruanato koboto kagochinetab busiek, ak kogoito eng’ koita barak kogochi Jehovah: ak kiyai malaikaiyandanato ne kikwong’e, ak kigeerot Manoa koboto osotiondennyi." 
Judges13:20 Amu ye kitogosta liblibenetab mat kotokyigei kipsengwet kobunei kaptisisiet, kotogostae malaikaiyatab Jehovah liblibenonato bo mat ne bo kaptisisiet: ak kigeerot Manoa koboto osotiondennyi; ak kiing’urukso ichek kot kotiiny ng’ony togochikwak." 
Judges13:21 Ago kimata komong’ji malaikaiyatab Jehovah Manoa kogeny, anan ko osotiondennyi. Konai anyun Manoa kole inendet ko ki malaikaiyatab Jehovah." 
Judges13:22 Kolenji Manoa osotiondennyi, Kibegu iman, amu kagegeer Kamuktaindet." 
Judges13:23 Ago kilenji osotiondennyi, Nda kamachei Jehovah kobarech, ta kama kotaachei kagochinet ne kibeelei ak kagochinetab busiek, eng’ eunekyok, ak ta kama koboruech tuguchu tugul, ak ta kama komwawech tuguk che u chuto." 
Judges13:24 Ak kisich kwonyoto werit, ak koguure kainennyi Samson: ak kieet lakwet, ak kiiberur Jehovah inendet." 
Judges13:25 Ak kitoi Tamirmirietab Jehovah kobois eng’ inendet eng’ Maane-dan, kwenutab Sora ak Estaol." 
Judges14:1 Ak kichortagei Samson kwo Timna, ak kigeer chepto eng’ Timna eng’ tibikab Pilistik." 
Judges14:2 Ak kitogos inendet, konyo komwachi kwanda ak kamet, kolenji, Kaageer chepto eng’ Timna eng’ tibikab Pilistik: ara anyun omutwa atun." 
Judges14:3 Yeityo kolenji kwandanyi ak kamennyi, Tos mami chepto eng’ tibikab tupchosieguk, agot eng’ bikyuk tugul, kot iwe kitun ne bo Pilistik che ma kimuratan? Ak kilenji Samson kwandanyi, Omutwa; amu achame kot." 
Judges14:4 Ago kima nai kwandanyi ak kamennyi kole ki bo Jehovah ng’olyondonoto; amu kicheng’ei boroindo ne yachine luget Pilistik. Kibou Pilistik Israel eng’ betusiechoto. 
Judges14:5 Kichortagei anyun Samson, koboto kwandanyi ak kamennyi, koba Timna, ak kiit mbarenikab sabibuk che bo Timna: ak ogeero, kiborisenjin inendet ng’etundo ne neran." 
Judges14:6 Ak kinyonji inendet Tamirmirietab Jehovah eng’ kimnatet, ak kigerer ng’etunyoto, ko u ye imuchi kogerer aruetab ng’oror, ak kima kotinyei kiy eng’ eut; ago ma mwachi kwanda anan ko kamet kit ne kayai." 
Judges14:7 Ak kichortagei, kwo kong’alalji kwonyoto; ak kiibaibai Samson kot." 
Judges14:8 Ak ye matianit, koweek kwo komut, ak kiwa taban kogeer bortab ng’etunyoto: ak ogeero, kimi segemik kebomboruetab ng’etunyoto, ak kumik." 
Judges14:9 Ak kiinem eng’ eunekyik ak kwo koamat, ak kiit ole mi kwandanyi ak kamennyi, ak kiigochi, ak kiam agichek: ago ma mwachi kolenji, kaanemune kumik kebomboruetab ng’etundo." 
Judges14:10 Ak kichortagei kwandanyi kwo ole mi kwonyoto: ak kiyai Samson igorta eng’ oloto; amu kicham koyaei murenik ko u noto. 
Judges14:11 Ak ye kingogeer inendet komut choronok sosom koteb koboto inendet. 
Judges14:12 Ak kimwachi Samson ichek kolenji, Ogany amwawok tangochet: ngot omuchi omwawa eng’ betusiek tisab che bo igorta, ak onai kit ne iboru, agonok anyun ngoroik sosom che bo katanitab ngoroik sosom che kiwalawali:" 
Judges14:13 ago ngot ko momuchi omwawa, ogona anyun okwek ngoroik sosom che bo katanit, ak ngoroik sosom che kiwalwali. Ak kilenji ichek, Mwa tangocheng’ung’, si kegas." 
Judges14:14 Ak kilenji ichek, Kimong’une amindet amitwogik, Ak kimong’une ne kim anyinyindo. Ak kima imuch kobor tangochonoto eng’ betusiek somok." 
Judges14:15 Ak eng’ betutab tisab, kolenji ichek kwondab Samson, Igaigai manong’otiondeng’ung’ si kobiit komwawech tangochet, si magibeelin ak gotab kwandang’ung’: kooguurech si ogonech bananda? Ma u noto?" 
Judges14:16 Ak kirir ne bo Samson eng’ tainnyi, kolenji, Iwecha kityo, ak mechama: kiimwachi tangochet lagokab bikyuk, ama imwawa. Ak kilenji inendet, Keero, tom amwachi kwandanyu ak kamennyu, amwaun inye?" 
Judges14:17 Ak kirir eng’ tainnyi betusiek tisab, eng’ betusiechoto bo igortanywa: ak eng’ betut ne bo tisab, komwachi inendet, amu kiim inendet kot: ak kimwachi tangochonoto lagokab bikyik." 
Judges14:18 Ak kimwachi inendet bikab nganaset eng’ betutab tisab kotom kororokta asista, kolenji, Mi nee ne anyiny kosiir kumiat? Ak nee ne kim kosiir ng’etundo? Ak kilenji ichek, Nda kima obatisie roriandennyu, Ta monai kit ne iboru tangochennyu." 
Judges14:19 Ak kinyonji inendet Tamirmirietab Jehovah eng’ kimnatet, ak kichortagei kwo Askelon, ak kibar bik sosom che bo bichoto, ak koib barunenikwak ak kiigochi ngoroik che kiwalawali, ichek che kiibor tangochonoto. Ak kilalyo neregekyik, ak kitogosta kwo gotab kwandanyi." 
Judges14:20 Ago kigigoito ne bo Samson kigochi chito ne kicham kobendoti tuwai, ne kiga koyai koek choruennyi." 
Judges15:1 Ago kingobata betusiek alak eng’ betusiekab kesisietab nganok, korutochi Samson osotiondennyi, kogetyin aruetab ng’oror; ak kole, Awendi go ole mi osotiondennyu. Ago ma chamji inendet kwo go kwandab osotiondonoto." 
Judges15:2 Ak kile kwandab osotiondonoto, Kialen kiiwech inendet iman; noto anyun, kiagoite inendet kotun chorueng’ung’: tos ma kararan chepkamet ne ming’in kosiir inendet? Asomin ale imut noto ne kata imuti inendet." 
Judges15:3 Ak kilenji Samson ichek, Masiche lelut rani eng’ Pilistik ye ayachi yeitiet." 
Judges15:4 Ak kiwa Samson ak konam lelwek bogol somok, ak konam kegenganik, ak kichob lelwek kotuktochin batai, ak konde kegenget kwenutab katutaik aeng’ alak tugul." 
Judges15:5 Ak kingo kagonde mat kegenganichoto kounda koba ole mi bekab Pilistik che tomo koges, ak kobeel bek che kigiyum kotononso ak che tomo keges, koboto mbarenikab emitik agichek." 
Judges15:6 Koteeb anyun Pilistik, kole, Ng’o ne kayai kii? Ak kile, Samson, sandetab Timnaindet, amu kirebe osotiondennyi, kogochi choruennyi. Kitogosta anyun Pilistik, ak kobeel osotiondonoto ak kwandanyi eng’ mat." 
Judges15:7 Kolenji Samson ichek, Ngot ko koayai ko u ni, ayaaktochinige mugetut iman eng’ okwek, ak ye ibata, asis." 
Judges15:8 Ak kibar ichek komugus eng’ baret ne o: yeityo kochortagei kwo komeny ole kibetak eng’ ruandetab Etam. 
Judges15:9 Kitogosta anyun Pilistik ak koteech Juda, ak koyom komoswekab Lei." 
Judges15:10 Ak kile bikab Juda, Amu nee si otogosu obokyech? Ak kile, Kagitogosu kebwa kerat Samson, keyachi inendet ko u ye koyaiywech." 
Judges15:11 Kichortagei anyun bik elfusiek somogu che bo Juda koba ole kibetak eng’ ruandetab Etam, ak kolenji Samson, Mengen ile boiywech Pilistik? Nee anyun kii koiyaiywech? Ak kilenji ichek, Ko u ye kiyaiywa ko kiayachi ichek ko u noto." 
Judges15:12 Ak kilenji ichek, Kagichoruge kebwa keratin, si kobiit kigoiten iwe eutab Pilistik. Ak kilenji Samson, Oyosiewa, ole mobara okweget." 
Judges15:13 Ak kimwachi inendet kolenji, Achicha, kibwane keratin mising’, ak kigoiten iwe eunekwak: ago magibarin, iman. Kirate anyun rogoosiek aeng’ che leelach, ak komut kotogos eng’ ruandet." 
Judges15:14 Kingoit Lei, kowaach Pilistik ko katuiyo ak inendet: ak kinyonji inendet Tamirmirietab Jehovah eng’ kimnatet, ak kiigei rogoosiek che kimi eunekyik katanit ne kabeel mat, ak kiibutyo eng’ eunekyik tuguk che kiga kirate." 
Judges15:15 Kinyor anyun kowetab tagilgilietab sigiriet ne tom koyaam, ak kiinem, ak kobare bik elfut." 
Judges15:16 Ak kile Samson, Karurugutik eng’ karurugutik, eng’ kowetab tagilgilietab sigiriet, Kabare bik elfut kowetab tagilgilietab sigiriet." 
Judges15:17 Ak kingo kagoges ng’alalonoto, kowirta kowonoto bo tagilgiliet ne kami eunnyi; ak kigiguure yoto Ramat-lei." 
Judges15:18 Ak kiam melelda ne o, ak kiguur Jehovah, kolenji, Kaigonu sorunoni o eng’ eutab otwogindeng’ung’: ak nguno, amee eng’ melelda, si abutyi eutab che ma kimuratan." 
Judges15:19 Ago kibet Jehovah ole kimi keringet eng’ Lei ak kimong’une beek yoto; ak kingo kagoee koweek tamirmiriennyi kogeny, ak kisob: kigiguure kainetab yoto anyun En- hakore, ne mitei Lei agoi rani." 
Judges15:20 Ak kiiruokyi Samson Israel kenyisiek tiptem eng’ betusiekab Pilistik. 
Judges16:1 Ak kiwa Samson Gasa, ak kogeer eng’ oloto chepkugoniot, ak kotuiyogei ak inendet." 
Judges16:2 Ak kigimwachi Gasik kelenji, Kagonyo Samson oli. Ak kiyiem inendet, ak kiribisyo korib kemout komugul eng’ kurgetab nganaset, ak kisisyo kemout komugul kolen, Ingotebi agoi koeech, si kebar inendet." 
Judges16:3 Ak kiru Samson agoi kemoi kwen, ak king’eet kemoi kwen, ak kinam kurgotikab ormarichetab nganaset, koboto tugatugikyik aeng’, ak kotut, koboto temeleiywot, ak kotiiny kaat, ak koib kot koit tulwet barak ne tokyingei Hebron." 
Judges16:4 Ak kingobata noto kocham Samson kwondo age ne kimi atebwetab Sorek, ne kigiguure kainennyi Delila." 
Judges16:5 Ak kitogos kiptainikab Pilistik kobwa ole mi kwonyoto, ak kolenji inendet, Igaigai inendet, si inai ole mi kimnatoninyi o, ak ole kimuchi kiterterte inendet, si kobiit kerat inendet kinyalil: si kogonin age tugul eng’ achek fedaisiek bogolusiek taman ak agenge." 
Judges16:6 Kilenji anyun Delila Samson, Asomin ale mwawa ole mi kimnatoning’ung’ o, ak kimuchi keratenen nee si kinyalilin." 
Judges16:7 Ak kilenji Samson inendet, Ngot keratena inoik tisab che ta ko lelach, che tomo koyaamnyo, anyaluli anyun, ak aige chi tugul." 
Judges16:8 Kiipchi anyun kiptainikab Pilistik osotiondonoto inoik tisab che ta ko leelach, che tomo koyaamnyo, ak korate inendet inoichoto." 
Judges16:9 Ak kitinyei bik che kiribei che kimi got ne bo orit. Ak kilenji inendet, Kabwanjin Pilistik, Samson. Ak king’eti inendet inoichoto, ko u ye ng’etos katanisiek ye katiiny mat. Ko ma konaak anyun kimnatennyi." 
Judges16:10 Ak kilenji Delila Samson, Keero, kaichota, imwawa lembech: asomin anyun ale imwawa kimuchi keratenen nee." 
Judges16:11 Ak kilenji inendet, Ngot keratena rogoosiek che leelachen che tom keyai kiy, anyaluli anyun, ak aige chi tugul." 
Judges16:12 Konam anyun Delila rogoosiek che leelach, ak korate ak kolenji, Kabwanjin Pilistik, Samson. Ak kimi bik che kiribei eng’ got ne bo orit. Ak king’eti eng’ eunekyik ko u ye king’etiei inet." 
Judges16:13 Ak kilenji Delila Samson, Ichota kora ak imwawa lembech: mwawa anyun kimuchi keratenen nee. Ak kilenji inendet, Ngot ilet kaletutichu tisab bo sumeekyuk eng’ kit ne kiletisie." 
Judges16:14 Ak kiratyi sumeechoto tigongiot, ak kolenji, Kabwanjin Pilistik, Samson. Kisiir anyun eng’ ruondanyi, ak kiitut tigongiotab kimurtoiyot koboto kit ne kiletisie." 
Judges16:15 Ak kilenji kwonyoto inendet, Imuktoi ano imwa ile, Achamin, ama mi muguleldang’ung’ kobota? Koichota konyil chuto somok, ama imwawa ole mi kimnatoning’ung’ o." 
Judges16:16 Ak kingo kagoiim betusiek che chang’ eng’ ng’alekyik, ak kobirjin, kong’et anyun sobondanyi agoi kome mugulel." 
Judges16:17 Ak kimwachi tugul che kimi muguleldanyi, kolenji, Tomo kicher metinnyu ole ki koi; amu kiaegu Nasiritindetab Kamuktaindet koboch ami moetab kamennyu: ngot kicher metinnyu, kowendi anyun kimnatennyu eng’ ane, anyaluli, ak aige chi tugul" 
Judges16:18 Ak kingogeer Delila kole kagomwachi inendet tugul che kimi muguleldanyi, koyokto keguur kiptainikab Pilistik, kolenji, Obwa otogosu anyun ra, amu kagomwawa tugul che mi muguleldanyi. Kitogos anyun kiptainikab Pilistik kobwanji kwonyoto, koibu fedaisiek." 
Judges16:19 Ak kimwachi kwonyoto inendet korue kutung’oikyik; ak kiguur chito age, konyo kocher kaletutichoto tisab bo sumeekyik; ak kitoi kwonyoto konyalil inendet, ak kiwa kimnatennyi eng’ inendet." 
Judges16:20 Ak kile, Kabwanjin Pilistik, Samson. Ak kisiir eng’ ruondanyi, ak kole, Amandoi ko u ye cham ayae kotugul, awa aleileige. Ago kima nai kole kagometo Jehovah inendet." 
Judges16:21 Ak kinam Pilistik inendet; ak kobar konyekyik; ak kiimut inendet kwo Gasa, ak kirate inendet sirimwekab sugunonik; ak king’aiso eng’ korgoret." 
Judges16:22 Ago kibityo sumeekyik kogeny ye kingo kagicher. 
Judges16:23 Ak kiiyumgei kiptainikab Pilistik si kogochi korosiot ne o, Dagon kanamwenywa, ak koboiboitu: amu kimwa kole, Kagonde kanamwennyo Samson bunyondennyo eunekyok." 
Judges16:24 Ak kingogeer bik inendet, kolos kanamwenywa: amu kimwa kole, Kagonde kanamwennyo bunyondennyo eunekyok, ak ko ng’emindetab emennyo, ne kigobarenech bik che chang’." 
Judges16:25 Ak kingogasgei mugulelwekwak, kole, Oguur Samson konyo kourerenwech. Ak kiguur Samson komong’ eng’ korgoret; ak kiureren eng’ tainywa: ak kiinde inendet kwenutab tolochik." 
Judges16:26 Ak kilenji Samson lakwet ne kinamoti eut, Bagakta asabsab tolochik che tonone got, si atiiege." 
Judges16:27 Ki nyiitat murenik ak gotab kor goyoto; ak kimi yoto kiptainik tugul che bo Pilistik; ak kimi got barak murenik ak gotab kor olo bo elfusiek somok che kigeerei Samson kourereni. 
Judges16:28 Ak kiguur Samson Jehovah kolenji, Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, asain ale ibwata, ak asain ale igimita ra kityo, ee Kamuktaindet, si ayaaktochige mugetut eng’ Pilistik agobo konyekyuk tuwai." 
Judges16:29 Kinam anyun Samson tolochik aeng’ che kitonone got, ak kotiiegei, kiname age eutab tai, koname age eutab katam." 
Judges16:30 Ak kile Samson, Bagakta ame koboto Pilistik. Ak kiing’uruk eng’ kimnatennyi tugul; ak kilulji goyoto kiptainik, koboto bik tugul che kimitei orit. Bik che kibar eng’ betutab meennyi ko kisiirei che kibar kota kosobei." 
Judges16:31 Kingobata kochorgei anyun tupchosiekyik ak bik tugul che bo gotab kwandanyi, ak kiinem ak kola kotogos, ak kotupchi inendet kwenutab Sora ak Estaol eng’ ole kitupchin bik, ne bo Manoa kwandanyi. Ak kiiruokyi Israel kenyisiek tiptem." 
Judges17:1 Ak kimi chito age ne bo emetab tulonokab Epraim, ne kigiguure kainennyi Mika." 
Judges17:2 Ak kilenji kamennyi, Fedaisiechoto bogolusiek taman ak agenge che kigiibenen, ak kiichubisie agobo choto, ak kiimwa agase eng’ itikyuk, keero, atinye fedaisiechoto; kiaib. Ak kile kamennyi, Iberurot werinnyu eng’ Jehovah." 
Judges17:3 Ak kiweekyi kamennyi fedaisiechoto bogolusiek taman ak agenge, ak kile kamet, Katabanji iman Jehovah fedaisiechu eng’ eunnyu agobo werinnyu, si kobiit koyae kanamwet ne kiwaei ak kanamwet ne kitanyi: kaweegun anyun amu noto." 
Judges17:4 Ak ye kiweekyi kamennyi fedaisiechoto, konam kamet fedaisiek bogol aeng’, ak kogochi kitang’indet ne kiyai kanamwet ne kiwaei ak kanamwet ne kitanyi eng’ fedaisiechoto: ak kitebe tuguchoto gotab Mika." 
Judges17:5 Ak kitinyei chichoto kiguure Mika gotab kanamonik, ak kiyai epok, ak terapik, ak kiitaban age eng’ werikyik, ne kiek tisiindennyi." 
Judges17:6 Ak kima komi betusiechoto laitoriat eng’ Israel: kiyaei chi tugul ko u ye keerei eng’ konyekyik kole mie. 
Judges17:7 Ak kimi mureno age ne kibunu Bet-lehem-juda, ne bo oretab Juda, ne ki Lawindet, ak kimeny oloto koek toondet." 
Judges17:8 Ak kiwa chichoto eng’ nganasanato, eng’ Bet-lehem-juda, kwo kotebe ole kanyorji oldo koek toondet; ak kiit emetab tulonokab Epraim agoi gotab Mika, eng’ bandanyi." 
Judges17:9 Ak kilenji Mika, Ibunu ano? Kolenji, A Lawindet ne bo Bet-lehem-juda, ak awendi amenye eng’ ole kanyorji oldo, aegu toondet." 
Judges17:10 Ak kilenji Mika inendet, Ngemeny tuwai, si iegu kwanda eng’ ane ak ko tisiindet, ak agonin fedaisiek taman eng’ kenyit, ak ngoroik, ak amitwogiguk. Kwo go anyun Lawindet." 
Judges17:11 Ak kicham Lawindet anyun komeny ak chichoto; ak kiigei murenonoto age eng’ werikyik. 
Judges17:12 Ak kiitaban Mika Lawindonoto, ak kiek murenonoto tisiindennyi, ak kitebe gotab Mika." 
Judges17:13 Kole anyun Mika, Angen nguno ale yaiywa Jehovah ne mie, amu atinye Lawindet ne tisiindennyu." 
Judges18:1 Kima komi laitoriat Israel betusiechoto: ak kicheng’jigei bororietab Danik ole menyei eng’ betusiechoto; amu kitom konyor borotenywa eng’ ortinwekab Israel, eng’ betusiechoto." 
Judges18:2 Ak kiiyokto lagokab Dan bik mut eng’ orenywa, che kibunu koitenywa tugul, che nyigonen, che kibunu Sora, ak Estaol, koba kosegei emet komarar, ak kilenji, Oba, omarar emet: ak kiit emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim, agoi gotab Mika, ak kiruiyo yoto." 
Judges18:3 Kingomi ye negite gotab Mika, konai kutitab murenonoto Lawindet: ak kimasta koba yoto, kolenji, Kiimutun ng’o inyo yu? Ak iyae nee eng’ oli? Ak itinye nee eng’ yu?" 
Judges18:4 Ak kilenji ichek, Kigoyaiywa Mika ko u ni ak ko u ni, ak kona tuguk, ak kiaegu tisiindennyi." 
Judges18:5 Ak kilenji inendet, Kisomin kele, teebwech ng’omnatet eng’ Kamuktaindet, si kobiit kenai ngo mi kaberuret eng’ bandanyo." 
Judges18:6 Ak kilenji tisiindonoto ichek, Oba eng’ kalyet: mitei taitab Jehovah oret ne obendi." 
Judges18:7 Kiba anyun bichoto mutu, ak kiit Lais, ak kigeer bik che kimi yoto, kole meng’isiei eng’ kalyet, ko u biteetab Sidonik, kosistos ak kotebyei eng’ kalyet; amu kima komi chi eng’ emet ne ki nenyi bounatet, ne kiimuchi koger kong’ eng’ kiy tugul, ak ki looen eng’ Sidonik, ak kima koting’egei kiy ak chi age tugul." 
Judges18:8 Ak kibwa ole mi tupchosiekwak eng’ Sora ak Estaol: ak kimwachi ichek tupchosiekwak kolenji, Otinye ng’al nee?" 
Judges18:9 Ak kile, Ong’eetye kebe kebarge ak ichek: amu kogegeer emet, ak ogeero, kararan mising’: ak ta osistosi? Amochorirense, oba ak ochut emet ak onam." 
Judges18:10 Ye oit, onyoru bik che mi kalyet, ak o emet: amu kigonde Kamuktaindet eung’wong’ emonoto; emet ne ma rartaat kiy age tugul ne mi ng’ony." 
Judges18:11 Ak kiba eng’ oloto bik bogolusiek lo, che ilaachi karik, che bo oretab Danik, eng’ Sora ak eng’ Estaol." 
Judges18:12 Ak kitogosta ak koteech Kiriat-jearim, eng’ Juda: noto anyun kiguure ichek yoto Maanedan agoi ra: mi Kiriat-jearim batai." 
Judges18:13 Ak kibun yoto kot koit emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim, kot koit gotab Mika." 
Judges18:14 Yeityo kowol bichoto mutu che kiba kosegei emetab Lais, ak kolenji tupchosiekwak, Ongen okwek ole mitei gorju epod, ak terapik, ak kanamwet ne kigiwai, ak kanamwet ne kigitany? Obwat anyun nguno kit ne kanyol oyai." 
Judges18:15 Ak kiwa yoto, ak kiit gotab murenonoto Lawindet, noto gotab Mika, ak kiteebe inendet agobo chamennyi bo ge." 
Judges18:16 Ak kitononso eng’ ye negite ye kibunei eng’ ormarich, bichoto bogolusiek lo che ki bo lagokab Dan, kolaachi karik." 
Judges18:17 Ak kitogosta murenjoto mutu che kiga ba kosegei emet, ak kiit oloto, ak kiib kanamwonoto kigiwai, ak epod, ak terapik, ak kanamwonoto kigitany: ak kitonon tisiindet eng’ ye negite ye kibunei eng’ ormarich koboto bichoto bogolusiek lo kolaachi karik." 
Judges18:18 Ak kingo kagoba bichuto gotab Mika, ak koib kanamwet ne kigiwai, ak epod, ak terapik, ak kanamwet ne kigitany, komwachi tisiindet kolenji, Oyae nee?" 
Judges18:19 Ak kilenji, Sis, kere kutit eung’ung’, ak inyo kebe tugul, ak iegu kwandanyo ak tisiindet: tos mie eng’ inye iegu tisiindetab gotab chito agenge, anan iegu tisiindetab bororiet ak oret eng’ Israel?" 
Judges18:20 Ak kibaibait muguleldab tisiindonoto, ak kiib epod, ak terapik, ak kanamwonoto kigiwai, ak kwo kwenutab bik." 
Judges18:21 Kiweek anyun ichek, ak kiinde lagok ak tuga ak tuguk kondo." 
Judges18:22 Kingo kagoba ole machei ko loo eng’ gotab Mika, koyumgei murenik che kimi gorik che negite gotab Mika, ak koon lagokab Dan." 
Judges18:23 Ak kiwaage lagokab Dan. Ak kigusgong’, ak kolenji Mika, Kaamin nee, kot inyo koboto bichu te chu?" 
Judges18:24 Ak kile, Kaoreb kanamonikyuk che kiayai, ak tisiindet, ak kaobe, ak ta atinye nee anyun? Omwawa eng’ nee ole, Amin nee?" 
Judges18:25 Ak kilenji inendet lagokab Dan, Amengegas kuting’ung’ eng’ kwenunnyo, si mabarin bik che nerektos, ak ibeet sobondang’ung’, koboto sobonwekab bikab gong’ung’." 
Judges18:26 Ak kiba lagokab Dan: ak kingogeer Mika kole kimen eng’ inendet, koweek kwo ga." 
Judges18:27 Ak kiib tuguchoto kiyaei Mika, ak komut tisiindet ne kitinyei, ak kiba koit Lais, agoi ole mi bik che kisistos ak kotebyei eng’ kalyet, ak kibar eng’ rotwetab chok; ak kibeel nganaset." 
Judges18:28 Ak kima biit sorunindet, amu ki loo eng’ Sidon, ak kima koting’egei kiy ak chi age tugul; ak kimi nganasanato atebwet ne negite Bet-reob. Ak kiteech nganaset, ak komeny." 
Judges18:29 Ak kiguure nganasanato Dan, komwaitae Dan kwandanywa, ne kiga kisikyi Israel: ago ki kainetab nganasanato eng’ tai ko ki Lais." 
Judges18:30 Ak kilumdochigei lagokab Dan kanamwet ne kigiwai kotonon: ak kiek tisiikab bororietab Danik, Jonatan weritab Gersom, weritab Musa, inendet ak werikyik agoi betut ne kigiluule emet." 
Judges18:31 Kilumda anyun kotonon kanamwet ne kigiwai ne bo Mika ne kiyaei inendet, eng’ betusiek tugul ye kimi gotab Kamuktaindet Silo." 
Judges19:1 Ak eng’ betusiechoto, ye kima komi laitoriat Israel, kimi Lawindet age ne kiga meny komosin eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim, koek toondet, ne kiimutyigei chebaigeiyat eng’ Bet-lehem-juda." 
Judges19:2 Ak kiyai kugoinatet chebaigeiyandennyi kosas inendet, ak kibagakta inendet kwo gotab kwandanyi eng’ Bet-lehem-juda, ak kitebe oloto arawek ang’wan." 
Judges19:3 Ak king’eet manong’otiondennyi kosub inendet, kwo kong’alalji inendet eng’ chamnyet, komut inendet kogeny, komi inendet ak otwogindennyi, ak sigirok aeng’: ak kiimut inendet kwo gotab kwandanyi: ak kingogeer kwandab kwonyoto chichoto, kobaibait amu katuiyo ak inendet." 
Judges19:4 Ak kimach kapyugoinnyi, ne kwandab kwonyoto, kota kobeni; ak kitebi koboto inendet egosiek somok: kiamis anyun ak koeeiso, ak koruiyo yoto." 
Judges19:5 Ak eng’ betutab ang’wan, kong’eetyo karon inne, ak king’eet kole kwo: ak kimwachi kwandab kwonyoto sandennyi, kolenji, Igaigai muguleldang’ung’ eng’ makatiat kitigin, yeityo obe." 
Judges19:6 Kitebi ng’ony ak kiamis ak koeeiso ichek tuwai: ak kilenji kwandab kwonyoto chichoto, Asomin ale, cham itebi kemout komugul, ak ingobaibait muguleldang’ung’." 
Judges19:7 Ak king’eet chichoto kole kwo; ago kiigaigai kapyugoinnyi, ak kiru yoto kogeny." 
Judges19:8 Ak king’eet karon mising’ eng’ betut ne bo mut kole kwo; ak kile kwandab kwonyoto, Asomin ale, igaigai muguleldang’ung’, ak otebi agoi koskoleny; ak kiamis ichek tuwai." 
Judges19:9 Ak kingong’eet chichoto kole kwo, inendet ak chebaigeiyandennyi, ak otwogindennyi, kolenji inendet kapyugoinnyi kwandab kwonyoto, Keero, amu machei koimen, asomin ale tebi kemout komugul: keero, machei kogesgei betut, ru yuto, si kobaibait muguleldang’ung’; si imuste karon mising’, iwe ga." 
Judges19:10 Ago ma cham chichoto kotebi kemounoto, ago king’eet ak kwo, agoi koit ole tokyingei Jebus (noto ko Jerusalem); ak kitinyei sigirok aeng’ che kiga kiito; kimi agine chebaigeiyandennyi koboto inendet." 
Judges19:11 Kingomi ye negite Jebus, koimen; ak kilenji otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi, Asomin ale nyo kemaste kebe nganasetab Jebusik, ak keruiye yoto." 
Judges19:12 Ak kilenji kiptaiyandennyi, Magimastoi kebendi nganasetab toondet, ne ma bo lagokab Israel; ago kisiirtoi kebendi Gibea." 
Judges19:13 Ak kilenji otwogindennyi, Nyo kerikyi yeto age eng’ chu; si keruiye Gibea anan ko Rama." 
Judges19:14 Kisiirto anyun koba bandanywa; kirorokta asista kota kobendi ko negit koit Gibea, ne bo Benjamin," 
Judges19:15 ak kimasta koba oloto, koba koruiyo Gibea: ak kiwa orit, ak kotebi ng’ony eng’ oretab nganaset: amu ma biit chi ne kiimut ichek koba gonnyi koruiyo." 
Judges19:16 Ak ogeero, kinyo boiyot age ne kibunu boisiennyi eng’ mbar koskoleny: ki bo chichoto emetab tulonokab Epraim, ak kimeny Gibea koek toondet; ago ki Benjaminik bikab oloto." 
Judges19:17 Ak kitobendo kogeer kiprutoiyot eng’ oretab nganaset; ak kile boiyondonoto, Iwendi ano? Ak ibunu ano?" 
Judges19:18 Ak kilenji inendet, Kisiirtoi kibunu Bet-lehem-juda kibendi emetab tulonokab Epraim komosin; a bo oloto, ak kigawe Bet-lehem-juda; ak awendi nguno gotab Jehovah; ama mi chi ne imuta gonnyi." 
Judges19:19 Ago kitinye mobek ak amitwogik che kigigonor che bo sigirokyok; ak atinye makatiat ak divaik, ak che bo otwogindeng’ung’ ne chepto, ak che bo murenoni mi koboto otwogiguk: mami kiy age tugul ne rartaat." 
Judges19:20 Ak kile boiyondonoto, Ingoteb kalyet koboten; ago ingobunja tuguk tugul che imache; koek kityo, mat iru oret." 
Judges19:21 Komut anyun kwo gonnyi, ak kogochi sigirok amitwogik: ak kiun kelyekwak, ak kiamis ak koeeiso." 
Judges19:22 Ak ye kiiboiboi mugulelwekwak, ogeero, kibwa murenikab nganasanato, werikab Belial, koyiem got, ak kobir kurget; ak king’alalji chitab kobo got, boiyondonoto, kolenji, Imoong’u chichi kanyo gong’ung’, si kobiit kesuub." 
Judges19:23 Kimanda anyun chichoto, bounindetab got, kwo ole mi ichek, ak kolenji, Achicha, tupchosiekyuk, asomok ale, amoyai tengekto ne te ni; amu kanyo chichi gonnyu, amoyai sogornatani." 
Judges19:24 Ogeero, mi yu cheptanyu ne bergeiya, ak chebaigeiyatab chichi; amutwok ichek kobwa sang’ nguno, si ong’em, ak oyachi ichek ko u ye ogeere ole mie: ago amat oyachi chichi sogornatani u ni." 
Judges19:25 Ago ma cham bichoto kogasyi ng’alek: kinam anyun chichoto chebaigeiyandennyi ak komutyi ichek eng’ sang’; ak kisuub kwonyoto, ak kotewer inendet agoi koeech: ak kingomachei koeech, kobagakta kwo." 
Judges19:26 Kinyo anyun kwonyoto ko kairir emet, ak kobutyi kurgetab gotab chichoto ole kimi kiptaiyandennyi, kot koeech." 
Judges19:27 Ak king’eet kiptaiyandennyi karon, ak koyat kurgotikab got, ak komanda kolen kwo bandanyi: ak ogeero, kogobutyi kurgetab got chebaigeiyandennyi, komi eunekyik tugatuk." 
Judges19:28 Ak kilenji inendet, Ng’eet kebe; ago ma wol chi kiy: koganapchi anyun sigiriet; ak king’eet chichoto kwo oldanyi." 
Judges19:29 Ak kingo kakwa gonnyi orit, konem rotwet, ak konam chebaigeiyandennyi ak kopcheapchei koek kebeberwek taman ak aeng’, ak koyokto kebeberwechoto koba komoswek tugul che bo Israel." 
Judges19:30 Ak kimwa tugul che kigeer, kole, Kitom kobiitu boisiet ne u ni koboch ngab komong’ lagokab Israel, eng’ emetab Misri agoi ra: obwat, oruoch, ak omwaite." 
Judges20:1 Kimanda anyun lagokab Israel tugul, ak kiiyumgei tuiyet koigei chichak, koboch Dan agoi Beer-seba, koboto emetab Gilead, koyumjigei Jehovah eng’ Mispa." 
Judges20:2 Kiiyomechigei kiruogikab bik tugul, che choto ko bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel, tuiyetab bikab Kamuktaindet, bik elfusiek bogol ang’wan che bunei kelyek, che tinyei rotokab chok." 
Judges20:3 (Kigas anyun lagokab Benjamin kole kagotogosta lagokab Israel koba Mispa.) Ak kile lagokab Israel, Omwawech, kibiitunda ano tengegi?" 
Judges20:4 Ak kiwol Lawindet manong’otiotab kwonyoto kigibarei, kole, Kianyo Gibea ne bo Benjamin, ane ak chebaigeiyandennyu ale keru yoto." 
Judges20:5 Ak king’eetya bikab Gibea kobwa koyiem got ne kiami kemoi; kimachei kole kobara anendet, ak kisuub chebaigeiyandennyu, ak kime." 
Judges20:6 Ak kianam chebaigeiyandennyu ak aton, ak ayokte keib koba emet tugul ne borotetab Israel: amu kigoyai tengekto ak abusnatet eng’ Israel." 
Judges20:7 Ogeero, okwek lagokab Israel, okwek tugul, omwa, ak oruoch kit ne nyolu." 
Judges20:8 Ak king’eetyo bik tugul koigei chichak kole, Magibendi achek, chi age tugul, emainnyi, ama kiweechige chi age tugul kowendi gonnyi." 
Judges20:9 Ago ni kit ne keyachini Gibea; kitogostoi kebendi yoto eng’ seretab barbarek; 
Judges20:10 ak kinemu murenik taman eng’ bogolut age tugul eng’ bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel, ak bogolut eng’ elfut age tugul ak kinemu elfut eng’ elfusiek taman, koba koipchi bik amitwogik, si ye it Gibea ne bo Benjamin koyai ko u abusnatet tugul ne kiyai ichek eng’ Israel." 
Judges20:11 Koyumjigei anyun tugul che bo Israel nganasanato, konamgei koek agenge ko u chichak." 
Judges20:12 Ak kiiyokto bik ortinwekab Israel koba oret tugul ne bo Benjamin, kole, nee tengegi kogobiit eng’ kwenung’wong’?" 
Judges20:13 Ogonu anyun bichoto werikab Belial, che mi Gibea, si kobiit kebar, si keiste yaitiet eng’ Israel. Ago ma cham Benjamin kogas ng’alekab tupchosiekwak lagokab Israel." 
Judges20:14 Ak kiiyumgei lagokab Benjamin che kimong’une nganasok, koyumjigei Gibea, koba kobargei ak lagokab Israel." 
Judges20:15 Ak kigiit lagokab Benjamin betunoto che kimong’une nganasok, koek murenik elfusiek tiptem ak lo che tinyei rotokab chok, ama kiitito bik che kimenyei Gibea, che kiek murenik bogol tisab che kigilewen." 
Judges20:16 Kimi kwenutab bichuto tugul murenik bogolwogik tisabu che bo katam che kigilewen; kiimuchi age tugul kowirtae borowet koita kowir sumeiyot, ama ichilili." 
Judges20:17 Ak kiek murenikab Israel che kigiit ama boto Benjamin, murenik elfusiek bogol ang’wan che tinyei rotokab chok: chuto tugul ko ki murenikab luget." 
Judges20:18 Ak king’eetyo lagokab Israel kotogosta Bet-el, ak kiteebe Kamuktaindet kit ne kanyol koyai; ak kile, Ng’o ne sib kotogostoi koba kobargei ak lagokab Benjamin? Ak kile Jehovah, Juda ne indoi." 
Judges20:19 King’eetyo anyun lagokab Israel karon, ak koteech ye tokyingei Gibea." 
Judges20:20 Ak kimanda lagokab Israel kobargei ak Benjamin, ak kitet luget kotokyigei ichek eng’ Gibea." 
Judges20:21 Ak kimong’ lagokab Benjamin eng’ Gibea, ak kibar murenik elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’ kobutyi ng’ony, che bo Israelik, eng’ betunoto." 
Judges20:22 Ak kiigimitgei bik, murenikab Israel, ak kotet luget kogeny eng’ yu kinyeta eng’ betut ne bo tai." 
Judges20:23 (Ak kitogosta lagokab Israel koba koririo eng’ taitab Jehovah agoi koskoleny; ak kiteebe Jehovah, kole, Arikte kogeny ayai luget ak lagokab Benjamin tupchennyu? Ak kile Jehovah, Togoste obarge ak inendet.)" 
Judges20:24 Ak kirikyi lagokab Israel lagokab Benjamin eng’ betut ne bo aeng’. 
Judges20:25 Ak kimanda Benjamin eng’ Gibea ak kobargei ak ichek eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, ak kobar kogeny murenik elfusiek taman ak sisiit kobutyi ng’ony; kitinyei chuto tugul rotokab chok." 
Judges20:26 Yeityo kotogosta lagok tugul che bo Israel, ak bik tugul, ak koit Bet-el, ak koririo, ak kotebi ng’ony eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak korugutgei betunoto agoi koskoleny; ak kiigoito kagochinoik che kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Judges20:27 Ak kiteebe lagokab Israel Jehovah, (amu kimi oloto moingetab arorutietab Kamuktaindet eng’ betusiechoto," 
Judges20:28 ak kitonone taitab moingonoto Pineas, weritab Eleasar, weritab Aron, eng’ betusiechoto,) kolenji, Ta awe kogeny kebarge ak lagokab Benjamin tupchennyu, anan atebi? Ak kile Jehovah, Togoste; amu andoi inendet eung’ung’ mutai." 
Judges20:29 Ak kiinde Israel bik che ribistos koyiem Gibea korib. 
Judges20:30 Ak kitogosta Israel koba kobargei ak lagokab Benjamin eng’ betut ne bo somok, ak kotetgei kobargei ak Gibea ko u betusiechun alak." 
Judges20:31 Ak kimanda lagokab Benjamin kobokyi bichoto, ak kigireto koba eng’ nganaset; ak kitoi kowir ak kobar eng’ bichoto olo bo bik sosom che bo Israel, ko u betusiechun alak, eng’ ortinwek che eechen, ne wendi age Bet-el, kowendi age Gibea, eng’ mbarenik." 
Judges20:32 Ak kimwa lagokab Benjamin kole, Kagibar eng’ tainnyo ko u eng’ tai. Ago kile lagokab Israel, Ongemwee, ak kirete koba eng’ nganaset koba ortinwek che eechen." 
Judges20:33 Ak king’eetyo bik tugul che bo Israel eng’ komostanywa, ak koba kotetgei eng’ Baal-tamar: ak kimong’ eng’ komostanywa bik che kiribistos che bo Israel, eng’ Maaregeba." 
Judges20:34 Ak kibwa kobargei ak Gibea, murenik elfusiek tamanu, che kigilewen eng’ Israel tugul, ak king’wanit boriet: ago kima nai kole negit yaitiet eng’ ichek." 
Judges20:35 Ak kibar Jehovah Benjamin eng’ taitab Israel: ak kibar lagokab Israel eng’ betunoto murenik elfusiek tiptem ak mut ak bogol che bo Benjamin: kitinyei chuto tugul rotokab chok. 
Judges20:36 Kigeer lagokab Benjamin anyun kole kagebar: amu kiistochigei lagokab Israel Benjamin, amu kiimang’u bik che kiribistos koripsei, che kiga konde ichek korib Gibea." 
Judges20:37 Ak kichakta bik che karibistos koruai Gibea; ak kiiseergei bichoto, ak kobar nganaset tugul eng’ rotwetab chok." 
Judges20:38 Ak kimi kaborunet ne kiga kichob eng’ kwenutab bikab Israel ak bik che kiribistos kele konaam iyeto ne o kotogosta eng’ nganaset. 
Judges20:39 Ak kiweek murenikab Israel eng’ boriet, ak kitoi Benjamin kowir ak kobar murenikab Israel olo bo bik sosom; amu kile Kagibar iman, ko u eng’ boriet ne bo tai." 
Judges20:40 Ago kingotoi kotogosta iyeto ne u toloita eng’ nganaset, kogeer let Benjamin, ak ogeero, kitogostoi mat eng’ nganaset kowendi barak." 
Judges20:41 Ak kiweek bikab Israel, ak kikwong’io bikab Benjamin: amu kigeer kole kanyonji yaitiet." 
Judges20:42 Kimwei eng’ taitab bikab Israel kotuktochi batai, koba oretab ong’atet; ago kiriich ichek boriet; ak kibar bichoto eng’ kwenunywa bik che kimong’une nganasok." 
Judges20:43 Kiyiem Benjaminik konde kwen, ak kion, ak kotiegat eng’ ole imuung’e, kot koit ole tokyingei Gibea ole chorune asista." 
Judges20:44 Ak kibek bik elfusiek tamanu ak sisiit che bo Benjamin; chuto tugul ko ki murenik che nyigonen. 
Judges20:45 Ak kiweek ak komwei kotokyigei ong’atet kot koit ruandetab Rimon: ak kikweat bik elfusiek mut eng’ ichek, eng’ ortinwek che eechen; ak kion kot koit Gidom, kibar bik elfusiek aeng’ eng’ ichek." 
Judges20:46 Kibek anyun eng’ betunoto bik elfusiek tiptemu ak mut che bo Benjuamin che kitinyei rotokab chok; chuto tugul ko ki murenik che nyigonen. 
Judges20:47 Ago kiweek bik bogolwogik lo, komwei kotokyigei ong’atet kot koit ruandetab Rimon, ak kimeny ruandetab Rimon orit arawek ang’wan." 
Judges20:48 Ak kiweekyigei kogeny bikab Israel lagokab Benjamin, ak kobar eng’ rotwetab chok, nganaset komugul, ak tuga, ak tugul che kinyor: ak kibeel kogeny nganasok tugul che kinyor." 
Judges21:1 Kiga koyosio bikab Israel eng’ Mispa, kole, Maigochin chi eng’ achek cheptanyi Benjamin kotun." 
Judges21:2 Ak kibwa bik Bet-el, ak kobuur eng’ yoto eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet kot koit koskoleny, ak kowaach, ak koririo ne ng’wan." 
Judges21:3 Ak kole, Ee, Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, amu nee si kobiit kii eng’ Israel, kot ko ma komi rani oret age eng’ Israel?" 
Judges21:4 Ak ki eng’ mutai kong’eetyo bik kota ko karon, ak koteech kaptisisiet eng’ yoto, ak kogoito kagochinoik che kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet." 
Judges21:5 Ak kile lagokab Israel, Mi ng’o eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel ne ma nyo kotogos tuiyet ole mi Jehovah? Amu kiga yai kayosiet ne o agobo inendet ne ma nyo kotogos ole mi Jehovah eng’ Mispa, kole, Kibarei inendet iman." 
Judges21:6 Ak kiarogenso lagokab Israel agobo Benjamin tupchenywa, ak kimwa kole, Mi oret agenge ne kagobet ra eng’ Israel." 
Judges21:7 Kiyae nee si konyor osotik ichek che kong’et, amu kigiyosie eng’ Jehovah kele magigochini ichek tibikyok kotun?" 
Judges21:8 Ak kile ichek, Ng’o ne bo ortinwek eng’ Israel ne ma nyo kotogos ole mi Jehovah eng’ Mispa? Ak ogeero, Kima nyo chi agot agenge nganaset ne kibunu Jabes-gilead konyo tuiyet." 
Judges21:9 Amu ye kingo kagiit bik, ogeero, kima komi chi eng’ bik che kimenyei Jabes-gilead." 
Judges21:10 Ak kiiyokto tuiyet bik elfusiek taman ak aeng’ che bo che nyigonen eng’ tugul, ak kong’at ichek kolenji, Oba obar eng’ rotwetab chok bik che menyei Jabes-gilead, koboto kwonyik ak lagok." 
Judges21:11 Ak kit ne obendi oyae ko ni; obare ogesu muren age tugul, ak kwony age tugul ne kigoruiyo ak muren." 
Judges21:12 Ak kinyor eng’ bik che kimenyei Jabes-gilead bergeinik bogol ang’wan che neranik, che kitomo konai muren eng’ ruondo ne kiruiyo tuwai: ak kiimut ichek kobwa nganaset eng’ Silo, ne mi emetab Kanan." 
Judges21:13 Ak kiiyokto tuiyet komugul bik koba kong’alalji lagokab Benjamin che kimi ruandetab Rimon orit, ak komwachi ichek kalyet." 
Judges21:14 Ak kiweek Benmjamin eng’ betusiechoto; ak kiigochi ichek kwonyik che kisor kosopcho eng’ che bo kwonyikab Jabes-gilead: ago kima yam ichek. 
Judges21:15 Ak kiarogenso bik agobo Benjamin amu kigoyai Jehovah koyatak oldo age eng’ ortinwekab Israel. 
Judges21:16 Kile anyun boisiekab tuiyet, Kiyai nee si konyor osotik ichek che kong’et, amu kigibar gotab kor eng’ Benjamin?" 
Judges21:17 Ak kile ichek, Ne matiny konyolu kobiit borotet eng’ ichek che kichililso che bo Benjamin, si mabet oret age eng’ Israel." 
Judges21:18 Ago magimuchi kigochi ichek osotik eng’ tibikyok: amu kiga koyosio lagokab Israel, kole, Chubot ne igochin osotiot Benjamin." 
Judges21:19 Ak kile, Ogeero, mitei igortab Jehovah eng’ kenyit age tugul eng’ Silo, ne mitei murot ne bo katam ne bo Bet-el, eng’ komostab kong’asis ne bo oret ne o ne togostoi eng’ Bet-el kowendi Sekem, ak eng’ murot ne bo tai ne bo Lebanon." 
Judges21:20 Ak king’at lagokab Benjamin, kolenji, Oba, oribisye eng’ mbarenikab sabibuk;" 
Judges21:21 ak ogeer, ak ogeero, ngot komong’ tibikab Silo kobwa kourerenso eng’ ureriosiek, omong’u anyun eng’ mbarenikab sabibuk, ak konam chi tugul osotiondennyi eng’ tibikab Silo, kobwa emetab Benjamin." 
Judges21:22 Ak ye bwa kwanisiekwak anan ko tupchosiekwak koboljech, kelenji anyun, Ogonech ichek eng’ mieindo: amu ma kimutu chi tugul eng’ achek osotiondennyi eng’ boriet: ama ogochi okwek ichek; amu nda kigoyai ko u noto, totinye tengekto." 
Judges21:23 Ak kiyai ko u noto lagokab Benjamin, ak kiimutyigei osotik, che te koitenywa, eng’ che kiuerendos che kiimut: ak kiba koweektagei ole kimi borotenywa, ak kiteech nganasok, ak komeny." 
Judges21:24 Ak kiba lagokab Israel eng’ betusiechoto, kwo chi tugul bororiennyi ak ole kimi orennyi, ak kimanda eng’ yoto chi tugul kwo ole mi borotennyi." 
Judges21:25 Kima komi laitoriat Israel eng’ betusiechoto: kiyaei chi tugul ko u ye kigeerei kole mie. 
Ruth1:1 Kibiit rubet eng’ emet eng’ betusiek che kiiruochi kiruogik. Kiwa chito age ne bo Bet-lehem-juda kwo komeny emetab Moab, ak osotiondennyi, ak werikyik aeng’." 
Ruth1:2 Ak kainetab chichoto ko ki Elimelek, ak kainetab osotiondennyi ko ki Naomi, ak kainaikab werikyik aeng’ ko ki Malon ak Kilion, Epratikab Bet-lehem-juda. Kiit emetab Moab, ak kotebe oloto." 
Ruth1:3 Ak kime Elimelek manong’otiotab Naomi; ak king’et inendet ak werikyik aeng’. 
Ruth1:4 Ak kiitun osotik eng’ kwonyikab Moab; kainetab age ko ki Orpa, ak kainetab age ko ki Ruth: ak kimeny oloto olo bo kenyisiek taman." 
Ruth1:5 Ak kibek tuwai Malon ak Kilion; kibegune kwonyoto lagokyik aeng’u ak manong’otiondennyi. 
Ruth1:6 King’eet inendet anyun koboto che bo werikyik, komachei koweektagei eng’ emetab Moab: amu kiga kogas eng’ emetab Moab kole kigorutochi Jehovah bikyik kogochi amitwogik." 
Ruth1:7 Ak kiwa eng’ komosta ne kimi, koboto osotik aeng’ che bo werikyik; ak kiba bandanywa koweektagei emetab Juda." 
Ruth1:8 Ak kilenji Naomi osotichoto aeng’ bo werikyik, Oba, ingoweek age tugul kwo gotab kamet: ingoyaiywok Jehovah ne mie, ko u ye kioyachi bichu kibegu, ak ko u ye kioyaiywa." 
Ruth1:9 Ingogonok Jehovah onyoru kamuung’et, age tugul eng’ okwek eng’ gotab manong’otiondennyi. Yeityo kong’utut ichek; ak kiwaach koririo." 
Ruth1:10 Ak kilenji ichek inendet, Achicha, kiweeksei tugul ole mi biguk." 
Ruth1:11 Ak kile Naomi, Oweeige, tibikyuk: amu nee si kebe tugul? Ta asiche werik alak che imuchi koek manong’otaikwok?" 
Ruth1:12 Oweektege anyun, tibikyuk, oba; amu koaositu, ma kituna. Nda amwae ale, atinye kamang’unet, nda agot asiche manong’otiot kemouni, ak asich werik;" 
Ruth1:13 ko kata ogeni kot koeegitu? Ko kata otebye amotinye manong’otaik? Achicha, tibikyuk; amu kona aarogen mising’ agobo okwek, amu kigonyalila eutab Jehovah." 
Ruth1:14 Ak kiwaach koririo kogeny: ak king’utut Orpa korgennyi bo yugoi; ago kiratyigei Ruth inendet. 
Ruth1:15 Ak kilenji Naomi Ruth, Keero, kagoweek kwondab bomurtang’ung’ kwo ole mi bikyik, ole mi kanamwennyi: weektege aginye isub ne bo bomurtang’ung’." 
Ruth1:16 Ak kile Ruth, Amegaigaa abagachin, aweek awa ga amasubin: amu ole iwendi awendi; ak ole itebe atebe agane: egu biguk bikyuk, ak egu Kamuktaindeng’ung’ Kamuktaindennyu:" 
Ruth1:17 ole imechini, amechini agane, ak ketupcha yoto: ingoyaiywa Jehovah ko u noto, ak kotes, kobate meet inegei ne ibestosech ane ak inye." 
Ruth1:18 Ak kingogeer Naomi kole, kiga kobegechi koba tuwai, ko mata kong’alalji inendet." 
Ruth1:19 Kiba tuwai anyun kot koit Bet-lehem. Kingoit Bet-lehem, kochirjiren nganaset komugul agobo ichek, ak kile gotab kor, Naomi nito?" 
Ruth1:20 Ak kilenji ichek, Amat oguurena Naomi, oguurena Mara: amu kigoyaiywa Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet kit ne ng’wan." 
Ruth1:21 Kiawendi ko a nyiitat, ak kogomutwa Jehovah ga ami buch: amu nee si oguurena Naomi, amu kigobaorian Jehovah kogikya, kigonyalila Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet?" 
Ruth1:22 Kiweek anyun Naomi, koboto Ruth Jemoabindet, osotiotab werinnyi, che kiweek eng’ emetab Moab: ak kiit Bet-lehem eng’ taunetab kesisietab sairik." 
Ruth2:1 Ak kitinyei Naomi chitab oretab manong’otiondennyi, chito ne o ne magorio, ne bo oretab Elimelek; ak kainennyi ko ki Boas." 
Ruth2:2 Ak kilenji Ruth Jemoabindet Naomi, Chamwa awa mbar, aturot bek asubot inendet ne anyorune mieindo. Ak kilenji inendet, Ui anyun cheptanyu." 
Ruth2:3 Ak kiwa, ak kiit, ak koturisiot eng’ mbar kosubot bik che kesisiei: ak kingole kogeer, komi kebebertab mbaretab Boas, ne ki bo oretab Elimelek." 
Ruth2:4 Ak ogeero, kinyo Boas eng’ Bet-lehem, ak kolenji bik che kesisiei, Ingoteb Jehovah kobotok. Ak kiwolji ichek kolenji, Ingoberurin Jehovah." 
Ruth2:5 Yeityo kolenji Boas otwogindennyi ne kitononjin bik che kesisiei, Bo gab ng’o chebi?" 
Ruth2:6 Ak kiwolji otwogindet ne kitononjin bik che kesisiei, kolenji, Inendet ko cheptab Moab ne kibwanei ak Naomi koweeksei eng’ emetab Moab:" 
Ruth2:7 ak kile, Asomin ale, chamwa aturisiot, ak ayumate asubot bik che kesisiei eng’ kwenutab ratutikab bek: konyo anyun, ak kagoturisiot kong’eete karon agoi nguno, kobate katebi kitigin eng’ go." 
Ruth2:8 Kolenji anyun Boas Ruth, Megase anyun-o, cheptanyu? Amat iwe iturisiote eng’ mbaret age, anan isiirte eng’ yu, ago tebi eng’ yu negite tibikyuk." 
Ruth2:9 Ingotokyige konyeguk mbaret ne kesei icheget, ak iwe isub ichek: tos ma ang’at murenik ale, si matwain? Ak ye amin melelda, iwe ole mi terenik, ak iee beek che karamei murenik." 
Ruth2:10 Kiibutyi ng’ony anyun inendet ak kong’uruk kot koit ng’ony, ak kolenji chichoto, Amu nee si anyor mieindo eng’ taing’ung’, kot ibwata, ane ne a toondet?" 
Ruth2:11 Ak kiwolji Boas inendet, kolenji, Kogemwawa inne tuguk tugul che kiiyachi korgeng’ung’ bo yugoi koboch ngome manong’otiondeng’ung’: ak ko u ye kiibagakte kwandang’ung’ ak komet, ak emet ne kigisikyinin, ak inyo ole mi bik che kima ingen eng’ tai." 
Ruth2:12 Ingoyaagun Jehovah boisieng’ung’, ingogonin melekto ne nyiitat, Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne kiinyo imwechi kebebaikyik." 
Ruth2:13 Kole anyun Ruth, Inganyor mieindo eng’ taing’ung’, kiptaiyandennyu; amu kaigaigaa, ak amu kaing’alalji cheptang’ung’ ne otwogin eng’ chamnyet, agot nganda maa u age eng’ tibiguk che otwogik." 
Ruth2:14 Ak eng’ saitab amitwogik, kolenji Boas inendet, Nyo butul amitwogichu, ak iburburte kererutieng’ung’ siki. Ak kiteb Ruth eng’ ye negite bik che kesisiei: ak kiigochi inendet bek che kagigel, ak kinyei ak kibiyo, ak kiituuch." 
Ruth2:15 Ak kingong’eet kwo koturisiot, kong’at Boas murenikyik, kolenji, Ingoturot chebi agot eng’ kwenutab ratutikab bik, amoger kong’." 
Ruth2:16 Ak kogeny ong’usu alak eng’ ratutik, ak obagakte, ak ingoturot, amoger kong’." 
Ruth2:17 Kiturisiot anyun eng’ mbar agoi koskoleny; ak kibor che kagoturot, ak ki olo bo epah agenge ne bo sairik." 
Ruth2:18 Kiinem kola koba nganaset: ak kigeer korgennyi bo yugai che kagoturot: ak kiib amitwogik che kiga ituuch, ko kagobiyo, ak kogochi inendet." 
Ruth2:19 Ak kilenji korgennyi bo yugoi, Keture ano ra? Ak keboisie ano? Iberurot inendet ne kanain. Ak kiiborji korgennyi bo yugoi chito ne kaboisiei tuwai, ak kolenji, Kainetab chito ne kagiboisiei tuwai rani ko Boas." 
Ruth2:20 Ak kilenji Naomi osotiondonoto ki bo werinnyi, Ingoberur Jehovah inendet ne ma bagakta rirenennyi bo ge eng’ che soptos ak che kigobek. Ak kilenji Naomi inendet, Chichoto ko chitab oret ne negit." 
Ruth2:21 Ak kile Ruth Jemoabindet, Ee, kamwawa kole, Tebe yu negite murenjuchuk, agoi kogosor kesisiennyu tugul." 
Ruth2:22 Ak kilenji Naomi Ruth osotiondonoto ki bo werinnyi, Mie, cheptanyu, obe ak tibikyik, amat kogeerjin mbaret age." 
Ruth2:23 Kitebe anyun ye negite tibikab Boas koturisiot agoi kegosor kesisietab sairik ak kesisietab nganok; ak kimeny koboto korgennyi bo yugoi. 
Ruth3:1 Ak kilenji Naomi korgennyi bo yugoi, Cheptanyu, tos macheng’un ane ole imuung’e, si komieit eng’ inye?" 
Ruth3:2 Tos ma bo orennyo Boas, ne kiomi ak tibikyik? Keero, iruri sairik koi kemoi eng’ ruanyut ne kiborse." 
Ruth3:3 Iunge anyun, ak iilge, ak ilaach ngoroiguk, yeityo iwe oloto mi ruanyut: ago amat iborjige chichoto, kot koges amisiet ak eeiset." 
Ruth3:4 Ak ye kagoru, igeer ye karu, iwe yoto anyun, ak ing’any kelyekyik, ak iru yoto; si komwaun kit ne kanyol iyai." 
Ruth3:5 Ak kilenji Ruth Naomi, Ayae tuguchoto tugul kemwa." 
Ruth3:6 Kichortagei anyun kwo ole mi ruanyut, kwo koyai tugul che kamwachi korgennyi bo yugoi." 
Ruth3:7 Ak ye kingo kagoamis Boas ak koee, ak kobaibait muguleldanyi, kwo koru ye boch karurugutietab bek: ak kinyo Ruth mutyo, ak kong’any kelyekyik, ak koru yoto." 
Ruth3:8 Ak kingoek kemoi kwen kosiir chichoto eng’ ruondo, ak koweeigei: ak ogeero, kiruei kwony eng’ kelyekyik." 
Ruth3:9 Ak kile, I ng’o? Ak kiwol kole, A Ruth cheptang’ung’ ne otwoget: tuge cheptang’ung’ ne otwoget ngorieng’ung’ amu i chitab oret ne negit." 
Ruth3:10 Ak kile chichoto, Ingoberurin Jehovah, cheptanyu: kaiboru mieindo ne o eng’ let kosiir eng’ taunet, amu ma isub murenik che mengech, ngo che bonon anan ngo che magore." 
Ruth3:11 Noto anyun, cheptanyu, meiywei; ayaun tugul choto kemwa: amu ingen nganaset tugul ne bo bikyuk kole, i kwondo ne tinyei atebet ne nyolunot." 
Ruth3:12 Ak iman a chitab oret ne negit: ago mitei chito age ne ta ko negit kosiira. 
Ruth3:13 Tebi kemouni, ak ngot koyaun chichoto mutai karon noto nyolunot eng’ chitab oret, ko mie noto; ko ingoyai noto nyolunot eng’ chitab oret: ago ngot ko mayaun noto nyolunot eng’ chitab oret, ayai anyun noto nyolunot eng’ chitab oret, ko u ye sobei Jehovah; ru anyun agoi koeech." 
Ruth3:14 Ak kiru eng’ kelyekyik agoi koeech; king’eet kotomo kinyit chi. Amu kile Boas, Amengonai chi kole konyo kwonyoto ruanyut." 
Ruth3:15 Ak kilenji, Ibu ngoriono ilaachi, ak itaach; ak kitaach ngorionoto: ak kigerji kerutik lo che bo sairik, ak kogesenji: yeityo kwo Boas nganaset." 
Ruth3:16 Ak kingoit Ruth ole mi korgennyi bo yugoi, komwa kole, I ng’o, cheptanyu? Ak kimwachi inendet tuguk tugul che koyachi chichoto." 
Ruth3:17 Ak kile, Kagona kerutichu lo bo sairik; amu kile, Amewe buch ole mi korgeng’ung’ bo yugoi." 
Ruth3:18 Kile anyun, Tebi cheptanyu, kot inai kie egu ng’alechato: amu maimuunyi chichoto, kot koyai kioto rani kosulda." 
Ruth4:1 Ak kitogosta Boas kwo ormarichetab nganaset, ak koteb ng’ony eng’ yoto: ak ogeero, kinyo kobun yoto chichoto bo oret ne negit noto kimwaei Boas; inendet ne kilenji, Kale-i, nyo yu, ibuur eng’ yu. Kiwa anyun ak kobuur." 
Ruth4:2 Ak kiguur Boas boisiek taman che bo nganaset, ak kolenji, Obuur eng’ yu. Kobuur anyun." 
Ruth4:3 Yeityo kolenji Boas chitab oret ne negit, Aldoi Naomi, ne kigoweek eng’ emetab Moab, koret ne ki bo tupchennyo Elimelek:" 
Ruth4:4 ak koabwat amwaun ale, Ial koronoto eng’ taitab bichu ibuuri eng’ yu, ak eng’ taitab boisiekab bikyuk. Ngot imach itiach, itiach: ago ngot ko memach itiach, imwawa, anai: amu mami age ne itiachi kobatenen; ak arubin. Ak kile, Atiachi." 
Ruth4:5 Yeityo kole Boas, Eng’ betut ne iale koronoto eng’ eutab Naomi, ko kanyol ial eng’ Ruth agine Jemoabindet, osotiotab ne kigome, si kobiit ilaalji mat ne kigome eng’ borotennyi." 
Ruth4:6 Ak kile chichoto bo oret ne negit, Mamuchi atiakyige, si mang’em borotennyu: ib imandab katiaget ne kata atiachi kobunjin; amu mamuchi atiach." 
Ruth4:7 Ki u ni biteet ne kimi Israel agobo katiaget ak agobo walet, si kigimit tuguk tugul; kiicheru chito kweiyondennyi, ak kogochi chitab kokwennyi: ak ki biteetab baornatet eng’ Israel noto." 
Ruth4:8 Kolenji anyun Boas chichoto bo oret ne negit, Aljige. Ak kiicher kweiyondennyi." 
Ruth4:9 Ak kilenji Boas boisiek, ak bik tugul, O baorinik ra, ole kaal tuguk tugul che ki bo Elimelek, ak tuguk tugul che ki bo Kilion ak che ki bo Malon, eng’ eutab Naomi." 
Ruth4:10 Kogeny, ko kaal Ruth Chemoabindet, ne ki osotiotab Malon, koek osotiondennyu, si kobiit alaalji mat eng’ bortennyi inendet ne kime, si mabet kainetab inendet ne kime eng’ tupchosiekyik, ak eng’ kurgetab oldanyi: o baorinik rani." 
Ruth4:11 Kile anyun bik tugul che kimi ormarichet, koboto boisiek, Ki baorinik. Ingoyai Jehovah kwondo ne kanyo gong’ung’ koigei Rael ak Lea, choto aeng’ che kiteech gotab Israel: ak iegu ne nyolu eng’ Eprata, ak iegu ne toogunot eng’ Bet-lehem;" 
Ruth4:12 ak ingogergeit gong’ung’ ak gotab Peres, ne kisikyi Tamar Juda, eng’ keswek che tun konin Jehovah eng’ kwonyi." 
Ruth4:13 Kiimut anyun Boas Ruth, ak kiek osotiondennyi; ak kituiyogei ak inendet, ak kiigochi Jehovah komanach, ak kisich werit." 
Ruth4:14 Ak kilenji gotab kor Naomi, Iberurot Jehovah, ne ma bagakten eng’ betuni ametinye chitab oret ne negit, ak ingotook kainennyi eng’ Israel." 
Ruth4:15 Ak egu inendet ne weegun sobondang’ung’, ak koek ne bain eng’ osindang’ung’: amu kasich lakwet, osotiotab wering’ung’, ne chamin, ne kaigai eng’ inye kosiir werik tisab." 
Ruth4:16 Ak kinam Naomi lakwet ak kotiny eng’ tegennyi, ak kiek cheblakwetab lakwanato." 
Ruth4:17 Ak kitochi kainet kwonyikab kokwet che bo Naomi, kole, Kogesikyi Naomi werit, ak kiguure kainennyi Obed: inendet kwandab Jesii, kwandab Daudi." 
Ruth4:18 Chu anyun ko ortinwekab Peres: kisich Peres Hesron; 
Ruth4:19 ak kisich Hesron Ram, ak kisich Ram Aminadab;" 
Ruth4:20 ak kisich Aminadab Nason, ak kisich Nason Salmon;" 
Ruth4:21 ak kisich Salmon Boas, ak kisich Boas Obed;" 
Ruth4:22 ak kisich Obed Jesii, ak kisich Jesi Daudi." 
1Samuel1:1 Kimi chito age ne bo Ramataim-sopim, ne bo emetab tulonokab Epraim, ak kainennyi ko ki Elkana, weritab Jeroam, weritab Eliu, weritab Tohu, weritab Sup, Epraimindet:" 
1Samuel1:2 ak kitinyei osotik aeng’; kainetab age ko ki Hana, kainetab age ko ki Penina: ak kitinyei Penina lagok, ago kima kotinyei Hana lakwa." 
1Samuel1:3 Ak kicham kotogostoi chichoto eng’ nganasennyi eng’ kenyit age tugul kowendi kosaei ak kogochin Jehovah ne bo lugosiek tiseiywek eng’ Silo. Ak kimi yoto werik aeng’ che bo Eli, Hopni ak Pineas, tisiikab Jehovah." 
1Samuel1:4 Ak kingoit betut ne igoitoi Elkana tiseiywek, kogochi Penina osotiondennyi, ak werikyik tugul ak tibikyik, kebeberwek:" 
1Samuel1:5 ago kiigochi Hana kebeberwek aeng’: amu kichamei Hana, ago kiga rat Jehovah moennyi." 
1Samuel1:6 Ak kitach inendet ne kiting’e moiyet, kole si kogerer met, amu kiga rat Jehovah moennyi." 
1Samuel1:7 Ak ye kiyaei Elkana ko u noto eng’ kenyit age tugul, ye kitogostoi Hana kowendi gotab Jehovah, kotach inendet kwonyoto ko u noto; korir anyun, ak ma amis." 
1Samuel1:8 Ak kilenji inendet Elkana manong’otiondennyi, Hana, irirjini nee? Ak amu nee si meamisiei? Ak amu nee si koarogeni muguleldang’ung’? Ma a kaigai eng’ inye kosiir werik taman?" 
1Samuel1:9 King’eet Hana anyun ye kingo kagoamis eng’ Silo, ak kingo kagoeeiso. Kitebyei Eli tisiindet eng’ ye bo tugatugietab kurget ne bo hekalutab Jehovah." 
1Samuel1:10 Ak kitinyei inendet ng’wanindo eng’ sobondanyi, ak kisa Jehovah, ak korir eng’ ng’wanindo." 
1Samuel1:11 Ak kiyai kaarortaet ne kiarorto kole, Ee Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ngot igeer nyalildab cheptang’ung’ ne otwoget, ak ibwata, ameutie cheptang’ung’ ne otwoget, ak igochi cheptang’ung’ ne otwoget werit, agochini anyun inendet Jehovah eng’ betusiekyik tugul kote kosobei, ama kicheru sumeekyik." 
1Samuel1:12 Ak ye kita kosaei eng’ taitab Jehovah, kogeer Eli kutinnyi." 
1Samuel1:13 King’alali Hana eng’ muguleldanyi; kitwau kutinnyi, ago kima kegasei twegunennyi: kobwat anyun Eli kole alen kabogit." 
1Samuel1:14 Ak kilenji Eli, Ibogiti kot kotianit? Iste divaiguk." 
1Samuel1:15 Ak kiwol Hana kole, Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, a kwondo ne tinyei tamirmiriet ne tinyei arogenet: ma aee divaik anan ko maiyek, ago karong’ji sobondanyu taitab Jehovah." 
1Samuel1:16 Meit cheptang’ung’ ne otwoget ile a cheptab Belial: amu koang’alal agoi rani eng’ chang’indab kang’unyng’unyennyu ak taget ne kitacha. 
1Samuel1:17 Kiwol anyun Eli kole, Ui eng’ kalyet: ak ingogonin Kamuktaindetab Israel someng’ung’ ne kesom inendet." 
1Samuel1:18 Ak kile inendet, Ingonyor otwogeng’ung’ mieindo eng’ taing’ung’. Kowa anyun kwonyoto, ak koamis, amata konyor togennyi arogenet kogeny." 
1Samuel1:19 Ak king’eetyo karon mising’, ak kogutuny eng’ taitab Jehovah, yeityo koweektagei agoi gonywa eng’ Rama: ak kituiyo Elkana ak Hana osotiondennyi, ak kiibwat Jehovah kwonyoto." 
1Samuel1:20 Ak kingoit betut, komanach Hana, ak kisich werit; ak kiguure kainennyi Samuel, kole, Amu kiasom inendet eng’ Jehovah." 
1Samuel1:21 Ak kitogosta Elkana, koboto gonnyi tugul, kwo kogochi Jehovah tiseiywotab kenyit age tugul, ak koyaakta kaarortoennyi." 
1Samuel1:22 Ago ma togosta Hana, amu kilenji manong’otiondennyi, Mawendi kot aluge lakwet, si amut kwo taitab Jehovah, kwo kotebe oloto agoi." 
1Samuel1:23 Ak kimwachi Elkana manong’otiondennyi kolenji, Yai ko u ye igeere ile mie; tebi kot iluge lakwet; ago ingogimit Jehovah ng’olyondennyi. Kiteb anyun kwonyoto kochuchun lakwennyi ne ki werit, kot koluge." 
1Samuel1:24 Ak kingo kagoluge, komut, ak kikweri kirugik somok, ak epah agenge ne bo busiek, ak sotet agenge ne bo divaik, ak komut inendet kwo gotab Jehovah eng’ Silo: ak kita ko ming’in lakwanato." 
1Samuel1:25 Ak kieny kirgit, ak komutyi Eli lakwet." 
1Samuel1:26 Ak kimwa kwonyoto kole, Ee, kiptaiyandennyu, ko u ye sobei sobondang’ung’, inye, kiptaiyandennyu, a kwonyi kiatononi eng’ yu kiimi, asae Jehovah." 
1Samuel1:27 Lakwani ne kiasome, ak kigogona Jehovah somennyu ne kiasom inendet:" 
1Samuel1:28 noto anyun, kaagochi inendet Jehovah; kote kosobei, ko kigigochi inendet Jehovah. Ak kigutung’ji Jehovah eng’ yoto." 
1Samuel2:1 Ak kisa Hana, kole, Igasegei muguleldanyu eng’ Jehovah, Kagotororit kuinennyu eng’ Jehovah: Kabarait kutinnyu kosiir bunikyuk; Amu abaibai eng’ yetuneng’ung’." 
1Samuel2:2 Mami ne tilil ko u Jehovah; Amu mami age kobatenen: Ama mi ruandet ne u Kamuktaindennyo. 
1Samuel2:3 Amotes ong’alal eng’ menotet; Among’ komong’une kutuswekwok losetab ge; Amu Jehovah ko Kamuktaindetab naet, Ak inendet ne keerei ole teptoi boisionik." 
1Samuel2:4 Kigoilyo kwangokab bik che nyigonen, Ak kigegermene kimnatet icheget che kiginach." 
1Samuel2:5 Kigoaldagei si konyor amitwogik icheget che kobiyong’dos; Ak kigosisyo che kiamei rubet; Ee, kigosich tisab ne son; Ak nyaluli inendet ne tinyei lagok che chang’." 
1Samuel2:6 Barei Jehovah, ak kosoobi: Choortoi koba kererit, ak komutu kotogos." 
1Samuel2:7 Ibanani Jehovah chi, ak komogornoni: Inyeroti, ak koeeti agine." 
1Samuel2:8 Ing’eeti kibananok komong’une temburiek, Kanabu eng’ kapng’atat che matinyei kiy, Si kogochi kotebi ak bounik, Ak kosich ng’echeretab torornatet: Amu bo Jehovah tolochikab ng’ony, Ak kiinde ng’onyut kotonone choto." 
1Samuel2:9 Ribei kelyekab bikyik che tililen, Ago igochin kiptengeginik kosisyo eng’ ole imen; Amu maiterterisiei chi amu kimnatet." 
1Samuel2:10 Kitonatoni che ibeligei ak Jehovah; Tuljin ichek eng’ kipsengwet: Iruokyin Jehovah tabanwekab ng’ony; Ak kogochi kimnatet laitoriandennyi. Ak kotoror kuinetab nenyi ne kigiil. 
1Samuel2:11 Ak kiwa Elkana gonnyi eng’ Rama. Ak kiboisiechi lakwet Jehovah eng’ taitab tisiindet Eli. 
1Samuel2:12 Werikab Eli ko ki werikab Belial; kima nai ichek Jehovah. 
1Samuel2:13 Kingogoitochi tiseiywot ko ki biteetab tisiik eng’ bik, konyo otwogindetab tisiindet, ye kita kiyoi banyek, koting’e eut karnet ne kisagunegei somok ne kirutune banyek;" 
1Samuel2:14 ak kiirookta karnanato teret orit, anan ko kibiriget, anan ko saburiet, anan ko teret age; kiibei tisiindet tugul che kainem karnanato. Kiyachin ko u noto Israelik tugul eng’ Silo che kibwanei yoto." 
1Samuel2:15 Kingotom kobeel mwaita, konyo otwogindetab tisiindet, ak kolenji chito ne kieng’sei, Konu bendo ne kiwatanjin tisiindet; amu maibei bendo ne kagiyo, ne igonu, kobate ne tuon." 
1Samuel2:16 Ak ngot kolenji chito inendet, Beelei ichek nguno iman sunetik, yeityo iib che te che machei sobondang’ung’; kowolu anyun kolen, Achicha, kona nguno: ak ngot ko megona, aibe eng’ kimnatet." 
1Samuel2:17 Ak ki o mising’ tengektab murenichoto eng’ taitab Jehovah: amu kiwech bik kagochinoikab Jehovah. 
1Samuel2:18 Ago kiboisiei Samuel eng’ taitab Jehovah, kota ko lakwet, kolaachi epod ne bo katanit." 
1Samuel2:19 Kinapchin kogeny kamet ngoriet ne ming’in, ak koipchin eng’ kenyit age tugul, ye kitogosu ak manong’otiondennyi kogoitoi tiseiywekab kenyit age togul." 
1Samuel2:20 Ak kiiberur Eli Elkana ak osotiondennyi, kole, Ingogonin Jehovah iyotet eng’ kwonyi amu somet ne kiga kiarorji Jehovah. Yeityo koba ga." 
1Samuel2:21 Ak kirutochi Jehovah Hana, ak kimanach, ak kisich werik somok ak tibik aeng’. Ak kieet lakwet Samuel eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
1Samuel2:22 Kiga koosit Eli mising’; ak kigas tuguk tugul che kiyachin werikyik Israel tugul, ak ko u ye kiibegei ak kwonyik che kiboisiei eng’ kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin." 
1Samuel2:23 Ak kilenji ichek, Amu nee si oyai tuguk che u cho? Amu agase eng’ bichu tugul boisionikwok che yaachen." 
1Samuel2:24 Achicha, werikyuk; amu ma miachen ng’alek che agase: oyae bikab Jehovah kongelelso." 
1Samuel2:25 Ngot koyachi chi chito age tengek, koruokyin Kamuktaindet: ago ngot koyachi chi tengek Jehovah, ko ng’o ne saei agobo inendet? Ago kima kas ng’alekab kwandanywa, amu kimachei Jehovah kobar ichek." 
1Samuel2:26 Kieet anyun lakwanato Samuel, ak ki chamat eng’ Jehovah, ak eng’ bik agichek." 
1Samuel2:27 Ak kinyonji chitab Kamuktaindet Eli, ak kolenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, Tos kiang’ang’jigei gotab kwandang’ung’, ye kimitei Misri eng’ gotab Parao?" 
1Samuel2:28 Ak kialewen inendet eng’ bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel koek tisiindennyu, kwo kotogosta ole mi kapkorosunnyu, kwo kobeel nyamdutik, ak kolaach epod eng’ tainnyu? Ak kiagochi gotab kwandang’ung’ kagochinoik tugul che bo Israelik che kigoitoi kobun mat?" 
1Samuel2:29 Amu nee anyun si otiar tiseiywekyuk ak kagochinoikyuk, che kiang’at eng’ meng’otennyu; ak igonyit weriguk kosiira, si onerie kagochinoik che eechen eng’ tugul che bo bikyuk Israel?" 
1Samuel2:30 Noto anyun, mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, kole, Kiamwa iman ale, wendoti eng’ tainnyu gong’ung’, ak gotab kwandang’ung’, koigeny: ago kamwa Jehovah nguno kole, Ingolooit eng’ ane; amu ichek che konyita, agonyiti, ago icheget che maiita kole a kiy, kesasei." 
1Samuel2:31 Keero, bwanei betusiek che atile eung’ung’ ak eutab gotab kwandang’ung’, kot ko mabiit boiyo eng’ gong’ung’." 
1Samuel2:32 Ak igeere nyalildab meng’otennyu eng’ magornatet tugul ne igochin Jehovah Israel: ama biitu boiyo eng’ gong’ung’ koigeny. 
1Samuel2:33 Ak ching’ung’ ne maistoi ane eng’ kapkorosunnyu, koegu ne igesu konyeguk, ak kogochi arogenet muguleldang’ung’: ak begu iyotet tugul ne bo gong’ung’ kota ko neran." 
1Samuel2:34 Ak egu ni kaborunet, ne tun nyonjin weriguk aeng’, Hopni ak Pineas; begu tuwai eng’ betut agenge." 
1Samuel2:35 Ak ang’eetyige tisiindet ne kiyani, ne tun yaei kit ne mi muguleldanyu ak eng’ kabwatutikyuk: ak ateekyi inendet got ne kim; ak kowendote taitab nenyu ne iilat koigeny." 
1Samuel2:36 Ak tun nyonei age tugul ne kang’et eng’ gong’ung’ konyo kong’urukyi inendet si konyor fedaiyat ak makatiat, ak kole, Asomin ale, indea aek age eng’ boisionikab tisiik, si aam agot makatiat kitigin." 
1Samuel3:1 Ak kiboisiechi lakwanato Samuel Jehovah eng’ taitab Eli. Kima ko tai kegasei ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ betusiechoto; kima komi ng’ang’utiet ne toogu. 
1Samuel3:2 Ak ye kingoru Eli eng’ oldanyi, (kigatoi kogorio konyekyik, kot ko ma kogeerei kiy,)" 
1Samuel3:3 ak ye kitom kome tait ne bo Kamuktaindet, ak koga koru Samuel, eng’ hekalutab Jehovah, ole kimi moingetab Kamuktaindet;" 
1Samuel3:4 koguur Jehovah Samuel: ak kile, Ami yu." 
1Samuel3:5 Ak kilabat ole mi Eli, ak kolenji, Ami yu; amu keguura. Ak kile, Ma aguurse; ru kogeny. Ak kiwa koru." 
1Samuel3:6 Ak kiguur Jehovah kogeny, kole, Samuel. Ak king’eet Samuel kwo ole mi Eli, ak kolenji, Ami yu; amu keguura. Ak kiwolji Eli kolenji, Ma aguurse, werinnyu; ru kogeny." 
1Samuel3:7 Kitom konai Samuel Jehovah, ak kitom keng’ang’ji inendet ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
1Samuel3:8 Ak kiguur Jehovah Samuel kogeny ne bo somok. Ak king’eet kwo ole mi Eli, ak kolenji, Ami yu; amu keguura. Ak kinai Eli kole kaguur Jehovah lakwanito." 
1Samuel3:9 Kolenji anyun Eli Samuel, Ui, iru: ak ngot koguurin, imwa ile, Ng’alal, Jehovah; amu kasei otwogindeng’ung’. Kwo anyun Samuel koru eng’ oldanyi." 
1Samuel3:10 Ak kinyo Jehovah, ak kotonon, koguur ko u tai, kole, Samuel, Samuel. Kile anyun Samuel, Ng’alal; amu kasei otwogindeng’ung’." 
1Samuel3:11 Ak kilenji Jehovah Samuel, Keero, ayae kit eng’ Israel, ne ng’wonegitu itik tuwai che bo chito age tugul ne kasei." 
1Samuel3:12 Ayachini Eli eng’ betunoto tuguk tugul che kiamwa agobo gonnyi, koboch taunet agoi let." 
1Samuel3:13 Amu kiamwachi alenji, Aruokyini gonnyi koigeny, amu tengekto ne kiingen, amu kiipchigei werikyik chubisiet, ama ker kong’." 
1Samuel3:14 Noto anyun kiayosie agobo gotab Eli ale, magitisei tengektab gotab Eli, eng’ tiseiywek anan ko eng’ kagochinoik agoi koigeny." 
1Samuel3:15 Ak kiru Samuel agoi koeech, ak kiyat kurgotikab gotab Jehovah. Ak kiiywei Samuel koborji Eli ng’ang’utionoto." 
1Samuel3:16 Kiguur Eli Samuel anyun, ak kolenji, Werinnyu, Samuel. Ak kile, Ami yu." 
1Samuel3:17 Ak kile, Nee kit ne komwaun Jehovah? Asomin ale, ameung’ena ng’olyondonoto: ingoyaun ko u noto Kamuktaindet, ak ne siirei noto, ngot iung’ena kiy age tugul eng’ tuguk tugul che komwaun inendet." 
1Samuel3:18 Ak kimwachi Samuel kiy age tugul, ama ung’e kiy inendet. Ak kile Eli, Inendet ko Jehovah: ingoyai ko u ye keerei kole mie." 
1Samuel3:19 Ak kieet Samuel, ak kimi Jehovah koboto inendet, ama cham kobutyi ng’ony ng’olyo age tugul eng’ ng’alekyik." 
1Samuel3:20 Ak kinai Israel tugul koboch Dan agoi Beer-seba kole kogigimit Samuel koek maotiotab Jehovah. 
1Samuel3:21 Ak kitook Jehovah kogeny eng’ Silo: amu king’ang’jigei Jehovah Samuel eng’ Silo eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah. 
1Samuel4:1 Kinyonji Israel tugul ng’olyotab Samuel. Kimanda Israel koba kobargei ak Pilistik, ak kiteech ole negite Eben-eser: ak kiteech Pilistik Apek." 
1Samuel4:2 Kitetgei Pilistik kobargei ak Israel: ak ye kingotuiyo luget, ko kigibar Israel eng’ taitab Pilistik: ak kibar che bo luget eng’ koronoto ole bo bik elfusiek ang’wan." 
1Samuel4:3 Ak ye kingoit bik nganaset, kole boisiekab Israel, Amu nee si kobarech Jehovah rani eng’ taitab Pilistik? Ongeibu moingetab arorutietab Jehovah eng’ Silo, konyo oli kimi, konyo kwenunnyo kosoruech eng’ eunekab bunikyok." 
1Samuel4:4 Kiiyokto anyun bichoto bik koba Silo, ak kiib eng’ yoto moingetab arorutietab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne tebe kerubisiek: ak kimi yoto werichoto aeng’u bo Eli, Hopni ak Pineas, koboto moingetab arorutietab Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel4:5 Ak kingoit moingetab arorutietab Jehovah nganaset, kowaach Israel tugul eng’ waagat ne o, kot kochei emet." 
1Samuel4:6 Ak kingogas Pilistik bolatetab waagat, komwa kole, Bo nee bolatetab waagandani eng’ nganasetab Hebranik? Ak kinai kole kagoit moingetab Jehovah nganaset." 
1Samuel4:7 Ak kiiywei Pilistik, amu kile, Kanyo Kamuktaindet nganaset. Ak kile, Bwa achek! Amu tom kobiitu kit ne u ni atkinye kora." 
1Samuel4:8 Bwa achek! Ng’o ne soruech eng’ cheptalelisiechu kimen? Chuto ko cheptalelisiechu kibarei Misrik eng’ borotwek alak tugul eng’ ong’atet. 
1Samuel4:9 Ogimegitu, ak oegu murenik, ee okwek Pilistik, si moegu otwogikab Hebranik ko u ye ki otwogikwok ichek: oegu murenik anyun, ak oyai luget." 
1Samuel4:10 Ak kiyai Pilistik luget, ak kigibar Israel, ak kimwei chi age tugul kwo emainnyi: ak kibiit baret ne o mising’; amu kibek che bo Israel murenik elfusiek sosomu che bunei kelyek." 
1Samuel4:11 Ak kigiib moingetab Kamuktaindet; ak kigibar werichoto aeng’ bo Eli, Hopni ak Pineas." 
1Samuel4:12 Ak kilabat eng’ ole mi luget chito ne bo oretab Benjamin, ak kiit Silo betunoto ko kagogerer ngoroikyik, ak komi ng’ung’unyek metinnyi." 
1Samuel4:13 Ak kingoit, ogeero, kitebe Eli ng’echerennyi eng’ tabandab oret koripsei: amu kibotan muguleldanyi agobo moingetab Kamuktaindet. Ak kingoit chichoto nganaset, ak komwa ng’alechato, kowaach nganaset tugul." 
1Samuel4:14 Ak kingogas Eli bolatetab rirek, kole, Bo nee bolatoni wasegei bik? Ak kilabat chichoto, kwo komwachi Eli." 
1Samuel4:15 Ki bo Eli kenyisiek tamanwogik sogol ak sisiit; kiga kogor ne kima kota komuchi kogeer kiy. 
1Samuel4:16 Ak kilenji chichoto Eli, A inendet ne kabunu luget, ak kamweu ra eng’ ole mi luget. Ak kile Eli, Katepto ano ng’alek-o, werinnyu?" 
1Samuel4:17 Ak kiwol inendet ne kiibu ng’alek, kole, Kagomwei Israel eng’ taitab Pilistik ak kagobiit baret ne o eng’ bik, ak kagobek agichek weriguk tuwai, Hopni ak Pineas, ak kageib moingetab Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel4:18 Ak kingomwa agobo moingetab Kamuktaindet, kobut Eli kobun batai eng’ ng’echerennyi eng’ tabandab ormarich, ak king’et kaatit, ak kime: amu ki chi ne kiga koosit ak kiga konyigisit. Ak kiga koruokyi Israel kenyisiek artam."
