1Samuel4:19 Ak ki tamono osotiotab werinnyi, Pineas, ki negit kosigis: ak kingogas ng’alek kole kageib moingetab Kamuktaindet, ak kole kagome kwandab manong’otiondennyi koboto manong’otiondennyi, kong’uruk ak kosigis; amu kinyonji inendet ng’wanindo." 
1Samuel4:20 Ak ye kimachei kome komwachi inendet kwonyik che kitonondos eng’ ye negit, kolenji, Ameiywei; amu kesich werit. Ago ma wol kiy, ama iit ng’alechato." 
1Samuel4:21 Ak kiguure lakwanato Ikabod, kole, Kagoistogei torornatet eng’ Israel: amu kageib moingetab Kamuktaindet, ak amu kwandab manong’otiondennyi ak manong’otiondennyi." 
1Samuel4:22 Ak kile, Kagoistogei torornatet eng’ Israel; amu kageib moingetab Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel5:1 Kiga koib anyun Pilistik moingetab Kamuktaindet, ak koib eng’ Eben-eser konyo Asdod." 
1Samuel5:2 Ak kiib Pilistik moingetab Kamuktaindet, konde gotab Dagon, ak konde ole negite Dagon." 
1Samuel5:3 Ak kingong’eetyo bikab Asdod karon inne, eng’ betutab aeng’, ogeero, kogolul Dagon kosieb mo eng’ taitab moingetab Jehovah. Ak kiinem Dagon ak konde komostanyi kogeny." 
1Samuel5:4 Ak kingong’eetyo karon inne eng’ betutab somok, ogeero, kogolul Dagon kosieb mo eng’ taitab moingetab Jehovah; ak king’et metitab Dagon ak rubeiywekab eunekyik tuwai, ak kimi kurgat; king’et kebeberta kityo ne kogomutak ne bo Dagon." 
1Samuel5:5 Eng’ noto anyun, ko matiechei tisiikab Dagon kurgetab gotab Dagon eng’ Asdod, kot koit ra, anan ko chi age tugul ne nyonei gotab Dagon." 
1Samuel5:6 Ak kinyigisyi eutab Jehovah bikab Asdod, ak kibar ichek, ak kobire miando ne ibwansei, Asdod ak kiwotosiekyik." 
1Samuel5:7 Ak kingogeer bikab Asdod kole kagoek ko u noto, kole, Ma kotebyei moingetab Kamuktaindetab Israel kobotech: amu kagong’wanit eunnyi eng’ achek, ak eng’ Dagon kanamwennyo." 
1Samuel5:8 Kiiyokto anyun kiyum kiptainik tugul che bo Pilistik kobwa ole mi ichek, ak kolenji, Kiitoi nee moingetab Kamuktaindetab Israel? Ak kiwol kole, Ngeibot moingetab Kamuktaindetab Israel kot koit Gat. Ak kiibot moingetab Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
1Samuel5:9 Ak kingo kagoibot, konyalil Jehovah nganasanato eng’ kanyalilet ne o mising’: ak kibir bikab nganaset, che mengech ak che eechen, ak kimong’une ichek miando ne ibwansei." 
1Samuel5:10 Kiiyokto moingetab Kamuktaindet kwo Ekron. Ak kingoit moingetab Kamuktaindet Ekron, kowaach Ekronik kole, Kagoibwech moingetab Kamuktaindetab Israel konyo kobarech ak bikyok." 
1Samuel5:11 Kiiyokto anyun kiyum kiptainik tugul che bo Pilistik kotuiyo, ak kile, Oiste moingetab Kamuktaindetab Israel, kwo oldanyi kogeny, si mabarech, ak bikyok: amu kibiit kanyalilet ne bo meet eng’ nganaset komugul; kinyigisit mising’ eutab Kamuktaindet eng’ oloto." 
1Samuel5:12 Ak bik che ma bek ko kigibire miando ne ibwansei: ak kitogosta kipsengwet rirekab nganaset. 
1Samuel6:1 Ak kitebe moingetab Jehovah emetab Pilistik arawek tisab. 
1Samuel6:2 Kiguur Pilistik tisiik ak che ng’orsei, kole, Kiitoi nee moingetab Jehovah? Oboruech ole kiweektoitoi kwo oldanyi." 
1Samuel6:3 Ak kile, Ngot oweekte moingetab Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko mat oweekte buch; ago matiny kilya oweektochini inendet koboto kagochinetab chalwokto: si kosoobok, ak onai amu nee si ko ma kiisto eunnyi eng’ okwek." 
1Samuel6:4 Komwa anyun kole, Nee kagochinetab chalwokto ne kiweekyini inendet? Ak kile, Kabwanutik mut che bo tahabu, koboto murek mut che bo tahabu, ko u koitetab kiptainikab Pilistik: amu kimi koroito agenge okwek tugul, ak kiptainikwok." 
1Samuel6:5 Noto anyun, oyai itonwekab kabwanutikwok, ak itonwekab murekwok che ng’emei emet; si kobiit otoror Kamuktaindetab Israel; tamangab ko nyamnyum eunnyi eng’ okwek, ak eng’ kanamonikwok, ak eng’ emeng’wong’." 
1Samuel6:6 Amu nee anyun si ouuiit mugulelwekwok, ko u ye kiiuuiit Misrik ak Parao mugulelwekwak? Kingo kagoyai tuguk eng’ kwong’et eng’ kwenunywa, ko tos ma chamji bichoto koba, ak kiba?" 
1Samuel6:7 Oyai anyun karit ne leel, ak onam tuga aeng’ che aboen che tomo kerat, oratyi karinato tuchato, ak ogetu moekwak kobwa ga:" 
1Samuel6:8 ak oib moingetab Jehovah ak onde karit; ak onde sandugut ne mi tabandanyi: tugukab tahabu, che oweektochini koek kagochinetab chalwokto, ak oyokte kwo." 
1Samuel6:9 Ak ogeer, ngot kotogosta kobun kiwotennyi kowendi Bet-semes, ko kaga ko inendet ne kiyaiywech yaitioni o: ago ngot ko ma bun, kenai anyun kele, ma eunnyi ne kobirech; kaga kiy ne koityech buch." 
1Samuel6:10 Ak kiyai bichoto ko u noto; ak koget tuga aeng’ che aboen, ak koratyi karit, ak koger moekwak eng’ ga." 
1Samuel6:11 Yeityo konde moingetab Jehovah karit, koboto sandugut ne mi murek che bo tahabu ak itonwekab kabwanutikwak che kigiyai." 
1Samuel6:12 Ak kibun tuchato oret ne litit ne wendi Bet-semes; kibun oret ne o, koutyoti, ama masta koba eutab tai anan ko ne bo katam, ak kiisub kiptainikab Pilistik kot koit kiwotetab Bet-semes." 
1Samuel6:13 Ak kigesei nganokwak bikab Bet-semes eng’ atebwet: ak kitobendo, kogeer moinget, ak koboiboitu ko kageer." 
1Samuel6:14 Ak kiit karinato mbaretab Josua Bet-semindet, kitonon eng’ yoto, ole kimi koita ne o: ak kibet ketikab karinato, ak kogoito tuchato koek kagochinet ne kibeeljin Jehovah." 
1Samuel6:15 Ak kiinem Lawik moingetab Jehovah, ak sandugut ne kimi yoto, ne kimi tuguk che bo tahabu orit, ak konde baragutab koyato o: ak kiigoito bikab Bet-semes kagochinoik che kibeelei ak koeng’ji Jehovah tiseiywek eng’ betunoto." 
1Samuel6:16 Ak kingo kagogeer kiptainik mutu che bo Pilistik tuguchoto, koweek koba Ekron betunoto." 
1Samuel6:17 Ak chu ko kabwanutik che kigiyae tahabu che kiweektochi Pilistik Jehovah koek kagochinetab chalwokto; bo agenge Asdod, ko bo agenge Gasa, ko bo agenge Askelon, ko bo agenge Gat, ko bo agenge Ekron;" 
1Samuel6:18 koboto murek che kigiyae tahabu, ko u koitetab nganasok tugul che bo Pilistik che ki bo kiptainik mut, che ki bo nganasok che ng’ototin ak ko bo nganasok che mengechen eng’ emet: agoi koyato o, ne kiginde moingetab Jehovah kotonone, mi koyato agoi rani koretab Josua Bet-semindet." 
1Samuel6:19 Ak kibir Jehovah Bet-semes, amu kiit moingetab Jehovah kogeer orit, kibar inendet bik tamanwogik tisab eng’ bichoto, ak bik elfusiek konom: ak kiririo bik, amu kibar Jehovah bik eng’ baret ne o." 
1Samuel6:20 Ak kile bikab Bet-semes, Ng’o ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindani tilil? Ak togostoi eng’ olinnyo kowendi ole mi ng’o?" 
1Samuel6:21 Ak kiiyokto bik koba ole mi bik che menyei Kiriat-jearim, kolenji, Kagoib Pilistik moingetab Jehovah konyo oli; obwa ochoruge, ak oib kotogosta kwo oling’wong’." 
1Samuel7:1 Ak kibwa bikab Kiriat-jearim, ak koib moingetab Jehovah kotogosta, ak koib kwo gotab Abinadab eng’ tulwet, ak kotaban Eleasar werinnyi si korib moingetab Jehovah." 
1Samuel7:2 Ak kichang’it betusiek koboch ngotebe moinget Kiriat-jearim; amu kiek kenyisiek tiptem: ak kirirji Jehovah got tugul ne bo Israel. 
1Samuel7:3 Ak king’alalji Samuel got tugul ne bo Israel, kolenji, Ngot oweekyinige Jehovah eng’ mugulelwekwok tugul, oiste anyun kanamonik che too ak Astarot eng’ kwenung’wong’ ak otokyi mugulelwekwok Jehovah ak oot inendet inegei: si kosoruok eng’ eunekab Pilistik." 
1Samuel7:4 Kiisto anyun lagokab Israel Baalik ak Astarot, ak kiot Jehovah inegei." 
1Samuel7:5 Ak kile Samuel, Oyumji Israel tugul Mispa, si kobiit asaiywok Jehovah." 
1Samuel7:6 Ak kiiyumjigei tugul Mispa, ak kiram beek, ak kotumda eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kiirugutgei betunoto, ak kimwa eng’ yoto kole, Kigeyachi Jehovah tengekto. Kiiruokyi Samuel lagokab Israel eng’ Mispa." 
1Samuel7:7 Ak kingogas Pilistik kole koiyumgei lagokab Israel eng’ Mispa, koba kiptainikab Pilistik kotogosta kobargei ak Israel. Ak kingogas lagokab Israel, koiywei Pilistik." 
1Samuel7:8 Ak kilenji lagokab Israel Samuel, Amebagakte irirji Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo agobo achek, si kosoruech eng’ eunekab Pilistik." 
1Samuel7:9 Ak kinam Samuel aruetab kechir ne reriei, ak kogoito koek kagochinet ne kibeeljin Jehovah komugul: ak kirirji Samuel Jehovah agobo Israel; ak kiwolji Jehovah inendet." 
1Samuel7:10 Ak ye kingota kogoitoi Samuel kagochinet ne kibeelei, korik Pilistik kobwa kobargei ak Israel: ago kitulji Jehovah Pilistik eng’ tulet ne o betunoto, ak konyalil ichek; ak kigibar eng’ taitab Israel." 
1Samuel7:11 Ak kimanda bikab Israel eng’ Mispa, koba koon Pilistik, ak kobarat, agoi koit Bet-ka kel." 
1Samuel7:12 Yeityo konam Samuel koita, ak konde kwenutab Mispa ak Sen, ak koguure kainennyi Eben-eser, kole, Kigotoretech Jehovah kot koit rani." 
1Samuel7:13 Kigiterter anyun Pilistik, ak matagai kobwa kogeny kosiir kiwotetab Israel: ak kigirinda Jehovah Pilistik eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Samuel." 
1Samuel7:14 Ak kigiweekyi Israel nganasok che kiga koibe Pilistik, koboch Ekron kot koit Gat; ak kiitiach Israel kiwotennyi eng’ eutab Pilistik. Ak kibiit kalyet eng’ kwenutab Israel ak Amorik." 
1Samuel7:15 Ak kiiruokyi Samuel Israel eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi. 
1Samuel7:16 Ak kiwendi eng’ kenyit age tugul komuutoti Bet-el, ak Gilgal, ak Mispa; ak kiiruokyi Israel eng’ komoswechoto tugul." 
1Samuel7:17 Ak kiweekyingei Rama, amu kimi gonnyi yoto; ak kiiruokyi Israel eng’ oloto: ak kiteekyi Jehovah kaptisisiet eng’ yoto." 
1Samuel8:1 Ak kingoosit Samuel, konde werikyik koek kiruogik koboi Israel." 
1Samuel8:2 Ak kainetab taitanyi ko ki Joel; ak kainetab ne bo aeng’ ko ki Abija: ki kiruogik eng’ Beer-seba. 
1Samuel8:2 Ak kainetab taitanyi ko ki Joel; ak kainetab ne bo aeng’ ko ki Abija: ki kiruogik eng’ Beer-seba. 
1Samuel8:3 Ak ma bendate werikyik ortinwekyik, ago kimasta kosub magornotet eng’ oret ne ya, ak kitaach tuguk che kigoigoisie, ak komaas kiruoget." 
1Samuel8:4 Ak kiiyumgei boisiek tugul che bo Israel, ak kobwa ole mi Samuel eng’ Rama:" 
1Samuel8:5 ak kolenji inendet, Keero, kaiositu, ama bendote weriguk ortinweguk: cheng’wech laitoriat ne iruokwech ko u bororiosiek tugul." 
1Samuel8:6 Ago kiyait ng’olyondonoto eng’ Samuel kingomwa ichek kole, Konech laitoriat ne iruokwech. Ak kisa Samuel Jehovah." 
1Samuel8:7 Ak kilenji Jehovah Samuel, Kas ng’alekab bik agobo tuguk tugul che kamwaun: amu ma inye ne kaesio, ago kaesio ane, kole maegu laitoriat eng’ ichek." 
1Samuel8:8 Ko u boisionik tugul che kigoyai koboch betut ne kiamutu kotogos eng’ Misri kot koit ra, kobagaktoa, ak kootot kanamonik che ter, koyaun aginye ko u noto." 
1Samuel8:9 Kasyi anyun ng’alekwak: ago iteechi komie, ak iborji kit ne u laitoriat ne tun laitorane ichek." 
1Samuel8:10 Ak kimwachi Samuel bichoto kisomei eng’ inendet laitoriat, ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah." 
1Samuel8:11 Ak kile, U ni laitoriat ne tun laitoranenok: namei werikwok, ak kolewenjigei kotononji karisiekyik, ak koek che lanyei mbartanyisiekyik: ak koruai kondoe karisiekyik:" 
1Samuel8:12 ak kolewenjigei icheget koek kiptainikab elfusiek ak kiptainikab konomusiek; ak kobat mbarenikyik alage, ak koges bekyik, ak kotany karikyik che bo luget, ak tugukab karisiekyik." 
1Samuel8:13 Ak konam tibikwok koek che yaei nyamdutik, ak koek che kwanyei, ak che beelei makatinik." 
1Samuel8:14 Ak korebenak mbarenikwok, ak mbarenikwok che bo sabibuk ak che bo emitik, che kororon eng’ tugul, ak kogochi otwogikyik." 
1Samuel8:15 Ak koib kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo keswekwok, ak ne bo mbarenikwok che bo sabibuk, kogochi kiboitinikyik ak otwogikyik." 
1Samuel8:16 Ak korebenak otwogikwok che murenik, ak otwogikwok che tibik, ak neranikwok che kororon, ak sigirokwok, ak konde koyai boisionikyik." 
1Samuel8:17 Ibei kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo kechirekwok: ak oegu otwogikyik. 
1Samuel8:18 Ak oririe eng’ betunoto amu laitoriandeng’wong’ ne tun olewenjinige; ak mawolwok Jehovah eng’ betunoto. 
1Samuel8:19 Ago kiesio bik kogas ng’alekab Samuel; ak kile, Achicha; ago kimache laitoriat ne boiywech;" 
1Samuel8:20 si keige ak achek bororiosiek tugul; ak si koruokwech laitoriandennyo, ak komandoi kondoenech, ak koyaiywech lugosiekyok." 
1Samuel8:21 Ak kigas Samuel ng’alek tugul che bo bik, ak kimwachi Jehovah ng’alechato kogas." 
1Samuel8:22 Ak kilenji Jehovah Samuel, Kasyi ng’alekwak, ak icheng’ji ichek laitoriat. Ak kilenji Samuel bikab Israel, Ingowo chi tugul nganasennyi." 
1Samuel9:1 Ak kimi chi ne bo oretab Benjamin, ne kainennyi ko ki Kis, weritab Abiel, weritab Seror, weritab Bekorat, weritab Apia, weritab Benjaminindet, chito ne nyigan, ne kim." 
1Samuel9:2 Ak kitinyei werit, ne kigiguure kainennyi Saul, chito ne ki neranet ne kararan: ak kima komi eng’ lagokab Israel chito ne kararan kosiir inendet: ki koi kosiir chi tugul, kong’eete tigigoikyik, ak kotogosta." 
1Samuel9:3 Ak kibetyo sigirokab Kis kwandab Saul. Ak kilenji Kis werinnyi Saul, Imut age eng’ otwogik, ak obe ocheng’ sigirok." 
1Samuel9:4 Ak kibun emetab tulonokab Epraim, ak kibun emetab Salisa, ago manyor: yeityo kobun emetab Saalim, ak kima komi oloto: ak kibun emetab Benjaminik, ago manyor." 
1Samuel9:5 Kingoit emetab Sup, kolenji Saul otwogindennyi ne kimi tuwai, Nyo keweege; si mabagach kwandanyu kobwat sigirok, ak kobwatech." 
1Samuel9:6 Ak kilenji inendet, Keero, mitei nganasani chitab Kamuktaindet, ak inendet ko chito ne kigonyiti; ak tuguk tugul che mwaei kosuldoi iman: ngebe anyun yoto; tamangab komuch komwawech agobo bandanyo ne kibendi." 
1Samuel9:7 Kilenji anyun Saul otwogindennyi, Ago keero, ngot kebe, keipchini nee chichoto? Amu kogogesgei amitwogik eng’ tuguk che kogiibune, ama mi kagochinet ne keipchini chichoto bo Kamuktaindet. Kitinye nee?" 
1Samuel9:8 Ak kiwolji otwogindonoto Saul kogeny, kolenji, Keero, atinye eng’ eunnyu kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo sekelitab feda: agochini noto chitab Kamuktaindet, si komwawech agobo bandanyo." 
1Samuel9:9 (Kingowa chi keny eng’ Israel, kwo koteebe Kamuktaindet ng’olyo, komwaei ko u ni kole, Obwa kebe gab keerindet: amu inendet ne kiguure Maotiot nguno ko kigiguure keny Keerindet.)" 
1Samuel9:10 Kolenji anyun Saul otwogindennyi, Kemwa kit ne mie; nyo kebe. Koba anyun nganaset ole mi chitab Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel9:11 Ye kingotogostoi kobendi nganaset, konyor tibik kobendi koramei beek, ak kolenji, Mi keerindet yu?" 
1Samuel9:12 Ak kiwolji kolenji, Mi; ogeero, mi taing’ung’: chakte nguno, amu kait ra nganaset; amu tinyei bik ra tiseiywek eng’ ole toror:" 
1Samuel9:13 ye oititoi kityo nganaset, onyoru inendet eng’ yoto, kotomo kotogosta ole toror koamis: amu maamisiei bik kot koit inendet, amu iberuri tiseiywek; si ye ibata koamis bik che kagiguur. Otogoste anyun nguno; amu onyoru inendet eng’ sainito." 
1Samuel9:14 Ak kitogosta koba nganaset; ak ye kingoba nganaset orit, ogeero, komong’ Samuel kotokyigei ichek, konyo kowendi ole toror." 
1Samuel9:15 Ak kiga kong’ang’ji Jehovah Samuel ko u amut, kotomo koit Saul, kolenji," 
1Samuel9:16 Ayogun mutai chito ne bunu emetab Benjamin koteni asis, si iil inendet koek bounindet eng’ bikyuk Israel, ak soru bikyuk eng’ eunekab Pilistik: amu kiageer bikyuk, amu kigoit oldanyu rirekwak." 
1Samuel9:17 Ak kingogeer Samuel Saul, kolenji Jehovah inendet, Keer chichi koamwaun-o! Nito ne bou bikyuk." 
1Samuel9:18 Yeityo korikyi Saul Samuel eng’ ye bo ormarich, ak kolenji, Asomin ale mwawa ole mi gotab keerindet." 
1Samuel9:19 Ak kiwolji Samuel Saul kolenji, A keerindonoto; togoste indoena, ui ole toror, amu kiamisiei tugul ak okwek ra: ak karon abagakten iwe, ak amwaun tuguk tugul che mi muguleldang’ung’." 
1Samuel9:20 Ak agobo sigirok che kigobetyo betusiek somok che kigosiirto, ko mata ibwat, amu kogenyor. Ak tokyingei ng’o maget tugul ne bo Israel? Ma inye, ak got tugul ne bo kwandang’ung’?" 
1Samuel9:21 Ak kiwol Saul kole, Ma a Benjaminindet, ne bo bororiet ne ming’in eng’ tugul che bo Israel? Ak orennyo ne ming’in eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo bororietab Benjamin? Amu nee anyun si ing’alalwa ko u ni?" 
1Samuel9:22 Kiimut anyun Samuel Saul ak otwogindennyi, koba gotab toek, ak kogochi kotebe ole toogunot kosiir tugul eng’ kwenutab che kiga kiguur, che ki olo bo bik sosom." 
1Samuel9:23 Ak kilenji Samuel kwong’indet, Ibu kebeberta ne kagagonin, ne kagamwaun, alenjin, Konor." 
1Samuel9:24 Ak kiinem kwang’indonoto kubesto, ak che kimi baragutab benyoto, ak konde taitab Saul. Ak kile Samuel, Keer che kagigonorun-o! Nde taing’ung’, ak iam; amu kagigonorun kot koit sait ne koging’at, amu kamwa ale, Kaguur bichu. Kiamis anyun Samu ak Samuel eng’ betunoto." 
1Samuel9:25 Ak kingo kagochorgei eng’ ole toror, koba nganaset, kong’alal ak Saul eng’ got barak." 
1Samuel9:26 Ak king’eetyo karon mising’: ak kingo kairir emet, koguur Samuel Saul eng’ got barak, kolenji, Ng’eet si agonin iwe. King’eet anyun Saul, ak kimanda tuwai, inendet ak Samuel koba sang’." 
1Samuel9:27 Kingochortagei eng’ ye boch nganaset, kolenji Samuel Saul, Mwachi otwogindeng’ung’ kondo, (ak kiindo,) ago tonon inye nguno, si amwaun ng’olyotab Kamuktaindet igas." 
1Samuel10:1 Kiinem anyun Samuel chuboitab mwaita, ak korong’ji metinnyi mwaita, ak kong’utut inendet, ak kolenji, Ma inye ne kagoiilin Jehovah iegu bounindet ne bo borotennyi?" 
1Samuel10:2 Ye iwe rani eng’ yu ami, inyoru bik aeng’ eng’ ole bo kereritab Rael, eng’ kiwotetab Benjamin eng’ Selsa; ak komwaun bichoto kole, Kigenyor sigirocho kigewe icheng’ate: kogobagach kwandang’ung’ kabwatetab sigirok, ak kobwatak, kolen, Ayae nee agobo werinnyu?" 
1Samuel10:3 Yeityo iwe tai eng’ yoto kot iit ketitab Tabor, ak nyorun eng’ yoto bik somogu kotogosyin oldab Kamuktaindet eng’ Bet-el, kanabi age arek somok che bo ng’oror, koibei age makatinik somok, koibei age sotetab divaik:" 
1Samuel10:4 ak igatin, ak kogonin makatinik aeng’, che itaach eng’ eunywa." 
1Samuel10:5 Ye ibata iit tulwetab Kamuktaindet, ole mitei irimetab Pilistik: ak ye iit nganaset, ituiye maotik che kaiyumgei kochorugei eng’ ole toror kotinyei kibugandet, ak sugutit ne ming’in, ak ndurerut, ak ketubet eng’ tainywa; ak komaotenonu:" 
1Samuel10:6 ak konyonjin Tamirmirietab Jehovah eng’ kimnatet, ak imaoten koboto ichek, ak kewalin iegu chito age." 
1Samuel10:7 Ak ye bwanjin kaborunoichu, iyai ko u ye kenyoru boroindo; amu mitei Kamuktaindet koboten." 
1Samuel10:8 Yeityo ichortege indoena iwe Gilgal; ak keero, achoruge ole imi, anyo agoite kagochinoik che kibeelei ak aeny tiseiywek che kagochinoikab kalyet: igenisie betusiek tisab, agoi aitu ole imi, ak aborun kit ne iyae." 
1Samuel10:9 Ak ye kingowelelgei kwo eng’ ole mi Samuel, kogochi Kamuktaindet inendet muguleldo age: ak kiisulda kaborunoichoto tugul eng’ betunoto." 
1Samuel10:10 Ak kingoit tulwet, ogeero, kotuiye inendet maotik che kigaiyumgei; ak kinyonji inendet Tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet eng’ kimnatet, ak kimaoten eng’ kwenunywa." 
1Samuel10:11 Ak kingogeer inendet bik tugul che kiingen inendet eng’ tai, komaoteni ak maotik, kolenjigei bik, Nee ni kogonyonji weritab Kis? Bo Saul agine maotik?" 
1Samuel10:12 Ak kiwol age ne bo yoto, kole, Ak ko ng’o kwandanywa? Koek anyun kalewenet, kele, Bo Saul agine maotik?" 
1Samuel10:13 Ak kingo kagoges maotenet, konyo ole toror." 
1Samuel10:14 Ak kiteebe imametab Saul ak otwogindennyi kolenji, Kigobe ano? Ak kile, Kiga kibe kecheng’ate sigirok: ak ye kingegeer kele mata kobiit, kebwa ole mi Samuel." 
1Samuel10:15 Ak kile imametab Saul, Kaigai imwawa kit ne komwaun Samuel." 
1Samuel10:16 Ak kilenji Saul imamennyi, Kimwawech komie kole, kigenyor sigirok. Ago agobo ng’alekab laitornatet, che kimwachi Samuel, ko ma mwachi inendet." 
1Samuel10:17 Ak kiguur Samuel bik koyumgei eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ Mispa; 
1Samuel10:18 ak kilenji lagokab Israel, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, kole, Kiamutu Israel kotogos eng’ Misri, ak kiasoruok eng’ eunekab Misrik, ak eng’ eunekab bororiosiek tugul che kiusok:" 
1Samuel10:19 ago kaoesie ra Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ne inendet ne soruok eng’ bichiinwekwok ak nyalilwogikwok tugul; ak kaolenji inendet, Achicha, ago inde laitoriat koboiywech. Obwa anyun taitab Jehovah obwanune bororiosiekwok ak elfusiekwok." 
1Samuel10:20 Komut anyun Samuel bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel korik, ak kiginam bororietab Benjamin." 
1Samuel10:21 Yeityo komut bororietab Benjamin korik kobwanune ortinwekwak, ak kiginam oretab Matirik: ak kiginam Saul weritab Kis; ago kigicheng’ inendet, ko ma kinyor." 
1Samuel10:22 Kota koteebe Jehovah anyun kogeny, kolenji, Ta komi chi ne ta konyonei yu? Ak kiwol Jehovah kole, Kaung’egei tuguk." 
1Samuel10:23 Ak kiruai koba komut inendet eng’ oloto; ak kingotonon eng’ kwenutab bik, ko ki koi kosiir chi tugul kong’eete tigigoikyik ak kotogosta." 
1Samuel10:24 Ak kilenji Samwel bik tugul, Ogeer inendet ne kogolewen Jehovah, ole mami ne kergei ak inendet eng’ bik tugul? Ak kimwa bik tugul eng’ kutit ne o kole, Ingosob laitoriat." 
1Samuel10:25 Yeityo komwachi Samuel bik kit ne u laitornatet, ak kisirji bukuit, ak kogonor eng’ taitab Jehovah. Ak kimwachi Samuel bik tugul koba, kwo chi tugul gonnyi." 
1Samuel10:26 Ak kiwa Saul agine gonnyi eng’ Gibea; ak kiba koboto inendet murenik che nyigonen, che kiga twa Kamuktaindet mugulelwekwak." 
1Samuel10:27 Ago kile werik alak che bo Belial, Sorundoech ano chichi? Ak kisas inendet, ama ipchi kagochinet. Ago kisis Saul." 
1Samuel11:1 Kitogos anyun Nahas Amonindet, konyo koteech taitab Jabes-gilead: ak kilenji bik tugul che bo Jabes Nahas, Ongiyomisge, si keotin." 
1Samuel11:2 Ak kilenji Nahas Amonindet ichek, Ayae arorutionoto kobotok eng’ ng’olyondoni, ale, kebalu konyekwok tugul che bo tai, ak ande koek tewernatet eng’ Israel tugul." 
1Samuel11:3 Ak kilenji boisiekab Jabes inendet, Konech betusiek tisab, si kiyokte bik koba kiwotosiek tugul che bo Israel: si ngot ko mabiit chi ne soruech, kemong’u kebwa olo imi." 
1Samuel11:4 Koit anyun bik che kiga kiyokto, Gibea ne bo Saul, ak komwachi bik ng’alechuto kogas: ak kiwaach bik tugul ak koririo." 
1Samuel11:5 Ak ogeero, kinyo Saul kosubu eik eng’ mbar; ak kile Saul, Kaam nee bik si koririo? Ak kimwachi inendet ng’alekab bikab Jabes." 
1Samuel11:6 Ak kinyonji Saul Tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet eng’ kimnatet, ye kingogas ng’alechato, ak kilalyo neregekyik kot." 
1Samuel11:7 Kinam anyun eik aeng’ che bo chogit, ak kotonaton, ak koyoktae bik koba komoswek tugul che bo Israel, kole, Chi age tugul ne mamong’u kosubu Saul ak Samuel, keyachin eikyik ko u nito. Ak kiibutyi bik kamuisetab Jehovah, ak kimong’ koigei chichak." 
1Samuel11:8 Ak kiit ichek eng’ Besek; ak kiek lagokab Israel elfusiek bogol somok, ak kiek bikab Juda elfusiek sosom." 
1Samuel11:9 Ak kilenji bichoto kiga kiyok, chu kiga bwa, Omwachini bikab Jabes-gilead ko u ni, olenjini, Tun mutai, ko kang’wanit asista, onyoru sorunet. Ak kibwa bichoto kiga kiyok ak komwachi bikab Jabes; ak kiboiboitu." 
1Samuel11:10 Kile anyun bikab Jabes, Kibwane mutai ole omi, oyaiywech tuguk tugul che ogeere ole mie eng’ okwek." 
1Samuel11:11 Ak kingoeech kopcheune Saul bik kweanaik somok; ak kiit kwenutab nganaset eng’ ripset ne bo karon, ak kibar Amonik kot kong’wanit asis: ak kiyesta che kiga ng’et, kot ko mata kenyorji aeng’ komosta agenge." 
1Samuel11:12 Ak kilenji bik Samuel, Ng’o ni kilen, Boiywech Saul? Imutu bichoto kebar." 
1Samuel11:13 Ak kile Saul, Magibarei chi agot agenge eng’ betuni: amu kagoyai rani Jehovah sorunet eng’ Israel." 
1Samuel11:14 Kilenji anyun Samuel bik, Obwa kebe Gilgal kebe kigimit laitornatet eng’ yoto." 
1Samuel11:15 Ak kiba bik tugul Gilgal: ak kiyai Saul eng’ oloto koek laitoriat eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ Gilgal; ak kieny eng’ oloto tiseiywek che bo kagochinoikab kalyet eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kibaibaitu mising’; Saul ak bik tugul che bo Israel eng’ oloto. 
1Samuel12:1 Ak kilenji Samuel Israel tugul, Ogeero, kiagas ng’alekwok eng’ tuguk tugul che kiomwawa, ak kiacheng’wok laitoriat ne boiywok." 
1Samuel12:2 Ak ogeero, wendoti laitoriat eng’ taing’wong’: ak koaositu, ak koabunji kalwalek; ak ogeero, mi werikyuk kobotok: ak kiawendote eng’ taing’wong’ koboch ming’inatennyu agoi betuni." 
1Samuel12:3 Ami yu: omwa ng’olyo eng’ taitab Jehovah, ne ongenja, ak eng’ taitab nenyi ne kigiil: kiarebe ng’o tennyi? Anan kiarebe ng’o sigiriennyi? Anan kiaberber ng’o? Kiaus ng’o? Anan kianam eng’ eutab ng’o tuguk che kigoigoisie, si atuge konyekyuk? Si aweekwok tuguchoto." 
1Samuel12:4 Ak kile, Ma iberberech, anan iusech, anan inam eng’ eutab chi kiy age tugul." 
1Samuel12:5 Ak kilenji ichek, Baoriat Jehovah agobo okwek, ak baoriat eng’ betuni nenyi ne kigiil, kole, ma onyoru kiy eng’ eunnyu. Ak kile, Baoriat inendet." 
1Samuel12:6 Ak kimwachi Samuel bik kolenji, Jehovah ne kileweni Musa ak Aron, ak ko ine ne kiimutu kwanisiekwok kotogos eng’ emetab Misri." 
1Samuel12:7 Otononse anyun nguno, si kobiit ateeiywok eng’ taitab Jehovah agobo boisionik tugul che bo imanda che bo Jehovah, che kiyaiywok ak kwanisiekwok." 
1Samuel12:8 Ye kingonyo Jakobo Misri, ak korirji kwanisiekwok Jehovah, koyok anyun Jehovah Musa ak Aron, che kiimong’ kwanisiekwok eng’ Misri, ak kogochi komeny olito." 
1Samuel12:9 Ago kiutie Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak kialdochi ichek eutab Sisera, kiptaiyatab lugetab Hasor, ak kialdochi eutab Pilistik, ak eutab laitoriatab Moab, ak kibargei ak ichek." 
1Samuel12:10 Ak kirirji Jehovah kolenji, Kigeyai tengekto, amu kigebagakte Jehovah, ak keot Baalik ak Astarot: ago soruech nguno eng’ eutab bunikyok, si keotin." 
1Samuel12:11 Kiiyok Jehovah Jeru-baal, ak Bedan, ak Jepta, ak Samuel, ak kosoruok eng’ eunekab bunikwok eng’ komosta age tugul, ak kiomeng’isie eng’ kalyet." 
1Samuel12:12 Ak kingogeer Nahas laitoriab lagokab Amon, konyo obarge, olenja, Achicha, boiywech laitoriat: ago ki laitoriandeng’wong’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
1Samuel12:13 Ogeer anyun laitoriat ne kiolewen, ne kiosom: ak ogeero, kagonde Jehovah laitoriat koboiywok." 
1Samuel12:14 Ngot oiywei Jehovah, ak oot inendet, ak ogas it kutinnyi, amobistoe ng’atutietab Jehovah, ak ngot oegu okwek ak laitoriat agine ne koboiywok, kasubikab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, komieitu anyun:" 
1Samuel12:15 ago ngot ko mogas it kutitab Jehovah, ago ngot obistoe ng’atutietab Jehovah, konyalilok eutab Jehovah anyun, ko u ye kiinyalil kwanisiekwok." 
1Samuel12:16 Otononse anyun si ogeer kii o, ne machei koyai Jehovah ogeere." 
1Samuel12:17 Tos ma betusiekab kesisietab nganok rani? Aguure Jehovah si koyok tulet ak ropta; si onai ak ogeer ole o tengektang’wong’, ne kioyai eng’ taitab Jehovah, amu kiosomjige laitoriat." 
1Samuel12:18 Koguur anyun Samuel Jehovah; ak kiiyok Jehovah betunoto tulet ak ropta: ak kiiywei bik tugul Jehovah ak Samuel mising’. 
1Samuel12:19 Ak kilenji bik tugul Samuel, Saiywech achek otwogiguk Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, si ma kibegu: amu kogetesyi tengekwogikyok tugul yaitioni, kesomjige laitoriat." 
1Samuel12:20 Ak kilenji Samuel bik, Amoiywei: kioyai iman yaitioni tugul: ago amomaste obagach osub Jehovah, ago oot Jehovah eng’ mugulelwekwok tugul;" 
1Samuel12:21 amomaste osub tugukab buch che maimuchi kotoret kiy anan kosor, amu buch." 
1Samuel12:22 Amu mabagaktoi Jehovah bikyik amu kainennyi ne o: amu kicham Jehovah koyaak oegu bikyik. 
1Samuel12:23 Ago ingolooit eng’ ane, amayachi Jehovah tengek, abagakte asaiywok: ago anetok eng’ oret ne mie ne nyolu." 
1Samuel12:24 Oiywei Jehovah kityo, ak oot inendet eng’ imanit eng’ mugulelwekwok tugul: ak obwat ole te tuguk che eechen che kigoyaiywok." 
1Samuel12:25 Ago ngot ko ta oyai yaitiet, kigeswok, okwek ak laitoriandeng’wong’." 
1Samuel13:1 Kiga kotar Saul kenyisiek [sosom] ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek aeng’ eng’ Israel. 
1Samuel13:2 Ak kilewenjigei Saul murenik elfusiek somok che bo Israel; kimi elfusiek aeng’u eng’ choto koboto Saul eng’ Mikmas ak eng’ tulwetab Bet-el, ak kimi elfut agenge koboto Jonatan eng’ Gibea ne bo Benjamin: ak kiigochi bik che kiga ng’et kwo ga chi tugul." 
1Samuel13:3 Ak kibar Jonatan irimetab Pilistik ne kimitei Geba, ak kigas Pilistik. Kiguut Saul iriaget eng’ emet tugul, kolen, Ingogas Hebranik." 
1Samuel13:4 Ak kigas Israel tugul kole, kogobar Saul irimetab Pilistik, ak kole kigoek Israel ne kiwechei eng’ Pilistik. Ak kiiyumgei bik kosub Saul koba Gilgal." 
1Samuel13:5 Ak kiiyumgei Pilistik kobargei ak Israel, karisiek elfusiek sosom, ak bik elfusiek lo che lanyei mbartanyisiek, koboto bik che te ng’aniekab ngegutab nyanjet eng’ chang’indo: ak kitogos ak koteech Mikmas, ne tokyingei kong’asis eng’ Bet-aben." 
1Samuel13:6 Kingogeer bikab Israel kole mi eng’ bichiindo, (amu kinyalilso bik,) koung’gei anyun bik eng’ kebenonik, ak eng’ sondisiek, ak eng’ ruandosiek, ak eng’ keringonik, ak eng’ keringonik che mengechen." 
1Samuel13:7 Kiga kolandae Jordan Hebranik alage koba emetab Gad ak Gilead; ago kita komi Saul Gilgal: ak kiisub bik tugul inendet kobotanioti. 
1Samuel13:8 Ak kiigenis betusiek tisab, ko u ye kiga ng’at Samuel: ago kima nyo Samuel Gilgal: ak kiyesta bik koba eng’ ole mi inendet." 
1Samuel13:9 Ak kile Saul, Oibwa kagochinet ne kibeelei konyo yu, koboto kagochinoikab kalyet. Ak kiigoito kagochinonoto kibeelei." 
1Samuel13:10 Ak eng’ sainato kiigesune kagoitoetab kagochinet ne kibeelei, ogeero, koit Samuel; ak kimanda Saul kotorokta inendet, kwo kogat." 
1Samuel13:11 Ak kilenji Samuel, Nee ne kaiyai? Ak kile Saul, Amu kageer ale kaiyesta bik koba eng’ ole ami, ak ma inyo eng’ betusiek che kiga king’at, ak ageer ko kogoyumgei Pilistik eng’ Mikmas;" 
1Samuel13:12 amwa anyun ale, Chorugei Pilistik nguno kobwanei ole ami eng’ Gilgal, ak tom asom chametab Jehovah: andege anyun amu noto, agoito kagochinet ne kibeelei." 
1Samuel13:13 Ak kilenji Samuel Saul, Keyai eng’ berberindo: ma irib ng’atutietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne king’atin: amu kata igimiti Jehovah laitornateng’ung’ eng’ Israel koigeny." 
1Samuel13:14 Ago nguno, ko ma kotebyei laitornateng’ung’: kagocheng’jigei Jehovah chito ne iboiboi muguleldanyi, ak kagonde Jehovah inendet koek bounindet ne bou bikyik, amu ma irib ng’olyot ne king’atin Jehovah." 
1Samuel13:15 Ak king’eet Samuel, kwo kotogosta eng’ Gilgal agoi Gibea ne bo Benjamin. Ak kiit Saul bik che kimi koboto inendet, koek murenik olo bo bogol lo." 
1Samuel13:16 Ak kitebe Saul ak Jonatan werinnyi ak bik che kimi ak inendet Geba ne bo Benjamin: ago kiteech Pilistik Mikmas. 
1Samuel13:17 Ak kimong’ luulik eng’ nganasetab Pilistik kopcheunegei somok: kibun kweanet age oret ne wendi Opra, agoi emetab Saul:" 
1Samuel13:18 Kibun kweanet age oret ne wendi Bet-horon: kibun kweanet age oret ne bunei kiwotet ne ing’ururi atebwetab Seboim kotokyigei ong’atet. 
1Samuel13:19 Kima komitei kitang’indet emet komugul ne bo Israel: amu kile Pilistik, Si mayachigei Hebranik rotokab chok anan ng’otwek:" 
1Samuel13:20 ago kichortagei Israelik tugul koba ole mi Pilistik, kwo kolit chi tugul mogombennyi, ak rotwennyi, ak aiywennyi ak marunnyi;" 
1Samuel13:21 ago kitinyei liteito ne bo marusiek, ak ne bo rotok, ak ne bo umaisiek, ak ne bo aonok; ak kolite kiplitok." 
1Samuel13:22 Ago kima biit eng’ betutab luget, rotwetab chok anan ko ng’otit eng’ eutab chi age tugul ne kimi koboto Saul ak Jonatan: ago kitinyei Saul ak Jonatan werinnyi chechuak." 
1Samuel13:23 Ak kimanda lugetab Pilistik koba ole kibunei eng’ Mikmas. 
1Samuel14:1 Kilenji betut age Jonatan weritab Saul muren age ne kiipchin karikyik, Nyo kebe kelande ole mi lugetab Pilistik, ne mi bitonin. Ago ma mwachi kwandanyi." 
1Samuel14:2 Ak kitebe Saul tabandab Gibea ketit kel ne bo logoek, ne mi Migron: ak ki olo bo bogol lo murenik che kimi ak inendet;" 
1Samuel14:3 koboto Aija, weritab Aitub, ng’etab kametab Ikabod, weritab Pineas, weritab Eli, tisiindetab Jehovah eng’ Silo, ne kiilaachi epod. Ago kima nai bik kole kakwa Jonatan." 
1Samuel14:4 Ak kimi ruandet ne ng’atib komosi, komi age komosin eng’ kwenutab kererjosiek che kimachei Jonatan kobun kolanda kwo ole mi lugetab Pilistik: ak kainetab age ko ki Boses, ak kainetab age ko ki Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Kiga tonon ruandet age eng’ murot ne bo katam eng’ taitab Mikmas, kotonon age eng’ murot ne bo tai eng’ taitab Geba." 
1Samuel14:6 Ak kilenji Jonatan neranet ne kiipchin karikyik che bo luget, Nyo kelande kebe ole mi lugetab chu ma kimuratan: abere imuchi kotoretech Jehovah: amu mami kiy ne ete Jehovah kosor eng’ che chang’ anan ko eng’ che ng’ering’." 
1Samuel14:7 Ak kilenji inendet chito ne kiipchin karik, Yai tuguk tugul che mi muguleldang’ung’: welelge, keero, ami koboten ko u eng’ muguleldang’ung’." 
1Samuel14:8 Yeityo kole Jonatan, Keero, kilandoi kebendi ole mi bichoto, ak kiborjige." 
1Samuel14:9 Ngot komwawech ko u ni kole, Otebi kot kebwa ole omi; ketonondosi anyun eng’ oldanyo, magitogostoi ole mi ichek." 
1Samuel14:10 Ago ngot kolenjech, Otogosu ole kimi; ketogoste anyun: amu kagonde Jehovah ichek eunekyok: ak egu nito kaborunet eng’ achek." 
1Samuel14:11 Ak kiiborjigei ichek tuwai lugetab Pilistik: ak kile Pilistik, Ogeero, kamong’ Hebranik eng’ keringonik ole koga ung’egei." 
1Samuel14:12 Kilenji bikab lugonoto Jonatan ak chito ne kiipchin karik, Otogosu ole kimi, si kiboruok kiy. Ak kilenji Jonatan chichoto kiipchin karik, Togosu isubwa: amu kagonde Jehovah ichek eunekab Israel." 
1Samuel14:13 Ak kiwa Jonatan kolany eng’ eunek ak kelyek, ak kiisubi inendet chichoto kiipchin karik: ak kiibutyo ichek eng’ taitab Jonatan; ak kibarat ichek eng’ let chito ne kiipchinoti karik." 
1Samuel14:14 Ak baronato bo tai ne kibar Jonatan ak chito ne kiipchin karik, ko ki olo bo bik tiptem, eng’ koret ne bo kebebertab ekait." 
1Samuel14:15 Ak kibiit botanet eng’ nganaset, ak eng’ emet, ak eng’ bik tugul; ak kibotan agine luget koboto luulik: ak kibotan ng’ony, kot kobiit botanet ne o, ne siirtoot." 
1Samuel14:16 Ak kigeer ribikab Saul eng’ Gibea ne bo Benjamin; ak ogeero, kibetyo bichoto chang’; ak kiyesta, koba komosi ak komosi." 
1Samuel14:17 Kolenji anyun Saul bik che kimi koboto inendet, Oiit bik nguno, ak ogeer chito ne kakwa eng’ achek. Ak kingo kagoit, ogeero, kima komi Jonatan ak chito ne kiipchinoti karik." 
1Samuel14:18 Ak kilenji Saul Aija, Ibu moingetab Kamuktaindet konyo yu. Amu kimi moingetab Kamuktaindet koboto lagokab Israel eng’ betusiechoto." 
1Samuel14:19 Ak ye kita kong’alaljin Saul tisiindet, koeet bolatet kotesak eng’ nganasetab Pilistik: ak kilenji Saul tisiindet, Iste eung’ung’." 
1Samuel14:20 Ak kiiyumgei bik tugul che kimi ak Saul koboto inendet, ak kobwa luget: ak ogeero, kibar chi tugul chito ne kitokyigei, ak kieet mising’ barisiet." 
1Samuel14:21 Ak kiweek Hebranik che kimi koboto Pilistik ko u ye ki u eng’ tai, che kiga togosta koboto icheget koba nganaset, kobun korotinwek che kiga yiem; konamgei choto agichek koboto Israelik che kimi koboto Saul ak Jonatan." 
1Samuel14:22 Ko u noto bik tugul che bo Israel che kiga unygei eng’ emetab tulonokab Epraim, kingogas kole kamwei Pilistik, koon agichek mising’ eng’ lugonoto." 
1Samuel14:23 Kosor anyun Jehovah Israel eng’ betunoto: ak kilanda luget kwo Bet-aben. 
1Samuel14:24 Ak kinyalilso Israel eng’ betunoto: ago kilenji Saul bik koyosio kole, Chubot chito ne amei amit age tugul kot koit koskoleny, ak keyaaktawa mugetut eng’ bunikyok. Ko ma chamjam anyun chi age tugul amit eng’ bichoto." 
1Samuel14:25 Ak kiba bik tugul osnet; ak kimi kumik ng’ony. 
1Samuel14:26 Ak kingoit bik osnet, ogeero, kosoi kumik: ago ma inde chi kut eng’ eunnyi; amu kiiywei bik kayosiet." 
1Samuel14:27 Ago kima kas Jonatan ye king’atei kwanda bik eng’ kayosiet: kiiyogoito anyun kirokto ne kimi eunnyi, ak kotoore masamek, ak konde kutit; ak kiyatogis konyekyik." 
1Samuel14:28 Kowol anyun age eng’ bik, kole, King’at kwandang’ung’ bik eng’ kayosiet, eng’ kimnatet kole, Chubot chito ne amei amitwogik eng’ betuni. Ak kiga kong’etyo bik." 
1Samuel14:29 Kile Jonatan anyun, Kigoiim emet baba: asomok ale, ogeer ole kagiyatita konyekyuk, amu kachamjam kitigin eng’ kumiandani." 
1Samuel14:30 Kotam nee nda kaga am bik tugukab bunikwak che kanyor ko u ye machei? Amu kata biitu baret ne o eng’ Pilistik. 
1Samuel14:31 Ak kibar Pilistik eng’ betunoto koboch Mikmas kot koit Aijalon: ak king’etyo bik mising’. 
1Samuel14:32 Ak kiruachi bik tuguk che kinyaban, ak kinam kechirek, ak tuga, koboto moek, ak koeny eng’ yoto: ak kiam bik banyechato koboto korotik." 
1Samuel14:33 Yeityo komwachi ichek Saul kolenji, Keero, yachin bik Jehovah tengekto, amu amei banyek koboto korotik. Ak kile inendet, Kaoyai ng’alset: omilja koito ne o rani." 
1Samuel14:34 Ak kile Saul, Oyeste oba kwenutab bik, ak olenji kogetwa chi tugul eitanyi, ak kogetwa chi tugul kechiriennyi, ak koeny eng’ yu, ak koam; si moyachi Jehovah tengekto ye oame koboto korotik. Ak kiget bik tugul, chi age tugul eitanyi konyo kemounoto, ak koeny eng’ yoto." 
1Samuel14:35 Ak kiteekyi Saul Jehovah kaptisisiet: noto ko ki kaptisisiet ne bo tai ne kiteekyi Jehovah. 
1Samuel14:36 Ak kile Saul, Ongechortege kisub Pilistik kemoi, ak kenyabane tuguk kot koeech, amat ongebagach chi agot agenge eng’ ichek. Ak kimwa ichek kole, Yai kit age tugul ne igeere ile mie eng’ inye. Yeityo komwa tisiindet kole, Ongerigu yu kerikyi Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel14:37 Ak kiteebe Saul Kamuktaindet kit ne yaei, kole, Achortege asub Pilistik? Tos indoi ichek eutab Israel? Ago ma wolji inendet eng’ betunoto." 
1Samuel14:38 Ak kile Saul, Origu yu, okwek bounik tugul che bo bik; onai ak ogeer ole kabiitunda tengegi rani." 
1Samuel14:39 Amu, ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne soru Israel, ko agot ngot ko Jonatan werinnyu, komeei iman. Ago ma biit chi eng’ bik tugul ne kiwolji inendet." 
1Samuel14:40 Yeityo komwachi Israel tugul kolenji, Otebe komosta agenge, ak ketebe ak Jonatan werinnyu komosta age. Ak kimwachi bik Saul kolenji, Yai kit ne igeere ile mie eng’ inye." 
1Samuel14:41 Komwachi anyun Saul Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, kolenji, Iboru imanit. Ak kiginam Jonatan ak Saul: ago kichililso bik." 
1Samuel14:42 Ak kile Saul, Oser barbarek nguno agobo ane ak Jonatan werinnyu. Ak kiginam Jonatan." 
1Samuel14:43 Kilenji anyun Saul Jonatan, Mwawa kit ne koiyai. Ak kimwachi Jonatan inendet, kolenji, Koachamjam iman kumik tutigin eng’ walitab kirokto ne komi eunnyu; ak keero, amee." 
1Samuel14:44 Ak kile Saul, Ingoyai Kamuktaindet ko u noto, ak koyai kotes kora: amu imee iman, Jonatan." 
1Samuel14:45 Ak kilenji bik Saul, Tos meei Jonatan, ne koyai yetunoni o eng’ Israel? Achicha, ma u noto: ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ko maibutyin ng’ony agot agenge eng’ sumeekab metinnyi; amu kabois ak Kamuktaindet rani. Kisor bik anyun Jonatan, si mame." 
1Samuel14:46 Kitogosta anyun Saul ko mata kosub Pilistik: ak kiba Pilistik oldanywa. 
1Samuel14:47 Kingo kagonam anyun Saul laitornatet eng’ Israel, kobargei ak bunikyik tugul eng’ komosta age tugul, kibargei ak Moab, ak kobargei ak lagokab Amon, ak kobargei ak Edom, ak kobargei ak laitorinikab Soba, ak kobargei ak Pilistik: ak kiiterter ichek eng’ komosta age tugul ole kiweleljigei." 
1Samuel14:48 Kiyai eng’ nyiganatet, ak kibar Amalegik, ak kosor Israel eng’ eunekab ichek che kiga koluul ichek." 
1Samuel14:49 Werikab Saul anyun ko ki Jonatan, ak Isbi, ak Malkisua: ak kainaikab tibikyik tuwai ko ki chu: kainetab taita ko Merab, ak kainetab ne ming’in ko Mikal:" 
1Samuel14:50 ak kainetab osotiotab Saul ko ki Ainoam cheptab Aimaas: ak kainetab kiptaiyatab lugennyi ko ki Abner weritab Ner, imametab Saul." 
1Samuel14:51 Ak Kis ko ki kwandab Saul; ak Ner kwandab Abner ko ki weritab Abiel. 
1Samuel14:52 Ak kibiit luget ne korom agobo Pilistik eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Saul: ak kingogeer Saul chito age tugul ne kim, anan ko chito age tugul ne nyigan, komut inendet kotebe oldanyi." 
1Samuel15:1 Ak kilenji Samuel Saul, Kiiyokwa Jehovah anyo aiilin iegu laitoriatab bikyik, ibou Israel: kas anyun ng’alekab Jehovah." 
1Samuel15:2 Kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Kaabwat kit ne kiyachi Amalek Israel, ko u ye kigirinda inendet eng’ oret, ye kitogosu eng’ Misri." 
1Samuel15:3 Ui anyun nguno ak ibar Amalek, ak ing’em igesu tuguk tugul che tinyei, amat ibagakte; ago bar muren ak kwony, lakwet ak ne reriei, teta ak kechiriet, tambesiet ak sigiriet." 
1Samuel15:4 Ak kiguur Saul bik, ak koiit ichek eng’ Telaim, bik elfusiek bogol aeng’ che bunei kelyek ak bik elfusiek taman che bo Juda." 
1Samuel15:5 Ak kinyo Saul koit nganasetab Amalek, ak koribis eng’ atebwet." 
1Samuel15:6 Ak kimwachi Saul Kenik, kolenji, Oba oistege, ochortege oistoege Amalegik, si mabarak koboto ichek: amu kiorire lagok tugul che bo Israel, ye kitogosu komong’u eng’ Misri. Koistogei anyun Kenik eng’ Amalegik." 
1Samuel15:7 Ak kibar Saul Amalegik, koboch Abila ne mi oret ye kibendi Sur, ne tokyingei Misri." 
1Samuel15:8 Ak kinam Agag laitoriatab Amalegik kosobei, ak kobar bik tugul koges eng’ rotwetab chok." 
1Samuel15:9 Ago kibagach Agag Saul ak bik, ak kechirek che kororon eng’ tugul, ak tuga, ak che akwaen, ak arekab kechir, ak tuguk tugul che ki miachen, ama cham kobar koges: ago king’em kit age tugul ne kisasei ak ne ma kiy, koges." 
1Samuel15:10 Kiityi anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Samuel kolenji," 
1Samuel15:11 Kima ko ta mie aeet Saul koek laitoriat: amu kagoweektagei let ma kosuba, ama yai ng’atutikyuk. Ak kinerech anyun Samuel; ak kirirji Jehovah kemout komugul." 
1Samuel15:12 Ak king’eet Samuel karon inne kwo kotuiyo ak Saul; ak kigimwachi Samuel kelenji, Kanyo Saul Karmel, ak keero, koteekyigei kit ne kibwate inendet, ak kowendot, ak kwo kosiirto, ak kochortagei Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:13 Ak kinyo Samuel ole mi Saul: ak kilenji Saul inendet, Ingoberurin Jehovah: koayai ng’atutietab Jehovah." 
1Samuel15:14 Ak kile Samuel, Bo nee anyun kautoni bo kechirek agase eng’ itikyuk, ak kautetab tuga ne agase?" 
1Samuel15:15 Ak kile Saul, Koget bik kechirechoto ak tuchato eng’ Amalegik: amu kobagakta bik kechirek ak tuga che kororon eng’ tugul, si koeng’ji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; ak kogibar che kong’et, kigesu." 
1Samuel15:16 Kimwachi anyun Samuel Saul kolenji, Kany amwaun kit ne kamwawa Jehovah kemouni. Ak kilenji inendet, Mwa inye." 
1Samuel15:17 Ak kimwa Samuel kole, Nganda kii ming’in ye kiigeerege, ko kima kieetin iegu kandoindetab bororiosiekab Israel? Ak koiilin Jehovah iegu laitoriat eng’ Israel;" 
1Samuel15:18 ak kiiyokten Jehovah iwe banda, ak kole, Ui ak ibar Amalegik, kiptengeginicho igesu, ak obarge ak ichek kot kogesgei." 
1Samuel15:19 Amu nee anyun si megas it kutitab Jehovah, ago kelabatyi barunenik, ak iyai kit ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah?" 
1Samuel15:20 Ak kilenji Saul Samuel, Ee, koagas it kutitab Jehovah, ak koawe oret ne koiyoktoa Jehovah awo, ak koamutu Agag laitoriatab Amalegik, ak koabar Amalegik kogesgei." 
1Samuel15:21 Ago koget bik barunenik, kechirek ak tuga, che kororon che kogitaban, si keeng’ji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:22 Ak kimwa Samuel kole, Tos, ting’e Jehovah boiboiyet ne o kagochinoik che kibeelei ak tiseiywek, ko u ye ting’e kasetab it ne bo ng’olyotab Jehovah? Keero, siirei kasetab it tiseiywek, ak siirei kasetab it mwanikab mengichik." 
1Samuel15:23 Amu kergei ngelelnatet ak tengektab bonisiet, ak kergei uuindab met ak chalwokto ak saetab kanamonik. Amu koiesie ng’olyotab Jehovah, ko kagoesien aginye si mata iegu laitoriat." 
1Samuel15:24 Ak kimwachi Saul Samuel kolenji, Koayai tengekto, amu koabistoe ng’atutietab Jehovah, ak ng’aleguk: amu koaiywei bik, ak agas it kutinywa." 
1Samuel15:25 Ara asain anyun nguno ale, nyoiywa kaat tengektanyu, ak ingeweeige tuwai, si kobiit agutung’ji Jehovah." 
1Samuel15:26 Ak kimwachi Samuel Saul kolenji, Magiweeksei ak inye: amu koiesie ng’olyotab Jehovah, kagoesien Jehovah, maiegu laitoriat eng’ Israel." 
1Samuel15:27 Ak ye kingowelelgei Samuel kwo, konam Saul tabandab ngoriennyi, ak kigerer." 
1Samuel15:28 Ak kimwachi Samuel inendet kolenji, Kagogererenen Jehovah bounatetab Israel rani, ak kogochi chitab kokweng’ung’ ne kaigai eng’ inye." 
1Samuel15:29 Ak mamwaei lembech Kimnatetab Israel, ama sigu; amu inendet ko ma chito si kowalak." 
1Samuel15:30 Yeityo komwa kole, Koayai tengekto: ago asain kora ale konyita nguno, eng’ taitab boisiekab bikyuk, ak eng’ Israel; ak ingeweeige tuwai, si agutung’ji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
1Samuel15:31 Koweek anyun Samuel kosub Saul; ak kigutung’ji Saul Jehovah. 
1Samuel15:32 Ak kimwa Samuel kole, Omutwa Agag laitoriatab Amalegik konyo yu. Ak kinyo anyun Agag kobaibai. Ak kimwa Agag kole, Eng’ iman ko kagosiirto ng’wanindab meet." 
1Samuel15:33 Ak kimwa Samuel kole, Ko u ye kiyachi rotweng’ung’ bo chok kobogorisiek kobetyi lagok, koegu kameng’ung’ agine ne matinyei lakwa, eng’ kobogorisiek. Ak kimurmur Samuel Agag kotonaton eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ Gilgal." 
1Samuel15:34 Kiwa Samuel anyun Rama; ak kitogosta Saul gonnyi eng’ Gibea ne bo Saul. 
1Samuel15:35 Ak ki matagai konyo Samuel kogeer Saul kogeny agoi kome; amu kirirji Samuel Saul: ak kiibwat Jehovah kole kima kota mie koyai Saul koek laitoriat koboi Israel. 
1Samuel16:1 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Samuel kolenji, Irirjini Saul agoi kotianit amu koaesie inendet si mata koek laitoriat eng’ Israel? Inde mwaita laleng’ung’ konyi, ak iwe, ayoktoin iwe oldab Jesii Betlehemindet: amu kaalewenjige laitoriat eng’ werikyik." 
1Samuel16:2 Ak kimwa Samuel kole, Awetitoi ano? Ngot kogas Saul, kobara. Ak kilenji Jehovah, Kweri roriat, ak imwa ile, Kanyo aeng’ji Jehovah." 
1Samuel16:3 Ak iguur Jesii konyo ole itisisie, si aborun kit ne iyae: ak iilwa chito ne amwaun." 
1Samuel16:4 Ak kiyai Samuel kioto kiga mwa Jehovah, ak kinyo Bet-lehem. Ak kitorok inendet boisiekab nganaset, kobotanionu, ak kolenji, Inyone eng’ kalyet?" 
1Samuel16:5 Ak kile, Ee, anyone eng’ kalyet: kanyo anyo aeng’ji Jehovah: otabange anyun, ak obwa kebe ole atisisie. Ak kiitaban Jesii ak werikyik, ak koguur ichek kobwa ole tisisie." 
1Samuel16:6 Kingoit, kogeer Eliab, ak kole, Mitei iman ne iilat ne bo Jehovah tainnyi." 
1Samuel16:7 Ago kilenji Jehovah Samuel, Amat igeer togennyi, anan ko koindab tononennyi; amu kaesie inendet: amu mageerei Jehovah ko u ye keerei bik; amu keerei bik itonda, ago keerei Jehovah muguleldo." 
1Samuel16:8 Koguur anyun Jesii Abinadab, ak kolenji kosiirto eng’ taitab Samuel. Ak kile, Ma lewen agine Jehovah nito." 
1Samuel16:9 Yeityo kolenji Jesii Sama kosiirto. Ak kile, Ma lewen agine Jehovah nito." 
1Samuel16:10 Ak kilenji Jesii werikyik tisab kosiirto eng’ taitab Samuel. Ak kilenji Samuel Jesii, Ma lewen Jehovah chuto." 
1Samuel16:11 Ak kilenji Samuel Jesii, Mi yu lagoguk tugul? Ak kile, Ta komi ne ming’in, keero, iyagi kechirek. Ak kilenji Samuel Jesii, Iyokte chito kwo komut inendet: amu magitebye ng’ony agoi koit." 
1Samuel16:12 Ak kiiyokto chito, ak kiimut inendet. Ki birir, ak ki kararan togennyi, ak ki kararan. Ak kile Jehovah, Ng’eet, iil inendet: amu inendet nito." 
1Samuel16:13 Konem anyun Samuel lalet ne mi mwaita, ak koiil inendet eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekyik: ak kinyonji Tamirmirietab Jehovah Daudi eng’ kimnatet koboch betunoto agoi. Kong’eet anyun Samuel, ak kwo Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Ak kiga kwo Tamirmirietab Jehovah eng’ Saul, ak kiimu inendet tamirmiriet ne ya ne kibunu Jehovah." 
1Samuel16:15 Ak kimwachi otwogikyik Saul, kolenji, Keero, imuin tamirmiriet ne ya ne bunu Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel16:16 Ingong’at kiptaiyandennyo otwogikyik, che mi tainnyi, kocheng’ chito ne butin ketubet: ye nyonji tamirmiriet ne ya ne bunu Kamuktaindet, kobut ketubet eng’ eunnyi, si isob." 
1Samuel16:17 Ak kilenji Saul otwogikyik, Ocheng’wa chito ne ingen kobut ketubet komie, ak omutwa inendet." 
1Samuel16:18 Kowolji anyun age eng’ murenjoto chiget, kolenji, Keero, kiageer werit age ne bo Jesii Bet-lehemindet, ne butin, ak ko chito ne kim ne tinyei nyiganatet, ak ko chitab luget, ak ko ng’om eng’ ng’alalet, ak ko chito ne kararan, ak komi Jehovah koboto inendet." 
1Samuel16:19 Koyokto anyun Saul bik koba oldab Jesii, koba kolenji, Iyokwa Daudi wering’ung’, ne iyagi kechirek." 
1Samuel16:20 Ak kichob Jesii sigiriet ak koganapchi amitwogik, ak sotet ne mi divaik, ak aruetab ng’oror, koyoktae Daudi werinnyi koipchi Saul." 
1Samuel16:21 Ak kiit Daudi oldab Saul, ak kotonon eng’ tainnyi: ak kicham Saul inendet mising’; ak kiek chito ne ipchin karikyik." 
1Samuel16:22 Ak kiiyokto Saul chito kwo oldab Jesii, kwo kolenji, Asomin ale, chamji Daudi kotonone tainnyu: amu kogonyor chamet eng’ ane." 
1Samuel16:23 Ak ye kiga nyonji Saul tamirmiriet ne ya ne bunu Kamuktaindet, konem Daudi ketubet ak kobut: kogaigait anyun Saul, ak komieit kogeny, ak kiwa eng’ inendet tamirmiriet ne ya." 
1Samuel17:1 Kiiyum anyun Pilistik lugosiekwak koba luget, ak kiiyumgei eng’ Soko, ne bo Juda, ak kiteech kwenutab Soko ak Aseka, eng’ Epes-damin." 
1Samuel17:2 Ak kiiyumgei bikab Israel koboto Saul, ak kiteech atebwetab Ela, ak kotet luget kobargei ak Pilistik." 
1Samuel17:3 Ak kitonone Pilistik tulwet komosta age, kotonone Israel tulwet komosta age: ak kimi atebwet kwenunywa." 
1Samuel17:4 Kimong’ nyiganet age eng’ nganasetab Pilistik, ne kigiguure Goliat, ne bo Gat, ne ki koindanyi ko ki kakwautik lo che bo eut ak inchisiek sogol." 
1Samuel17:5 Ak kitinyei kutwet ne bo sugunwet eng’ metinnyi, ak kiilaachi ngoriet ne bo karik; ak nyigisindab ngorionoto ko ki sekelisiek elfusiek mut che bo sugunonik." 
1Samuel17:6 Ak kitinyei karikab sugunonik eng’ kelyekyik, ak ndiritab sugunwet eng’ batennyi." 
1Samuel17:7 Ak ki kergei irumetab ndirinnyi ak ketit ne taachin usisiek chito ne nabisiei; ak meleitab ng’otinnyi ko ki sekelisiek bogol lo che bo karik nyigisindanyi: ak kiwendi chito ne kiipchin long’et kondoe inendet. 
1Samuel17:8 Ak kitonon ak kotwekyi lugosiekab Israel eng’ kutit ne o, kolenji, Amu nee si omong’u otet lugeng’wong’? Ma a Pilistindet, ko o otwogikab Saul? Olewenjige chito, ak ongochorgei konyonja." 
1Samuel17:9 Ngot komuch kebarge tuwai, ak kobaran, keegu anyun otwogikwok: ago ngot aterter inendet, ak abar, oegu anyun otwogikyok, ak ootech." 
1Samuel17:10 Ak kile Pilistindonoto, Arenye lugosiekab Israel ra; ogona chito, si kobiit kebarge." 
1Samuel17:11 Ak kingogas Saul ak Israel tugul ng’alechato bo Pilistindet, kotoptobenso, ak koiyweis mising’." 
1Samuel17:12 Daudi ko ki weritab Epratindonoto bo Bet-lehem-juda, ne kainennyi ko ki Jesii; ak kitinyei werik sisiit: ak ki boiyot chichoto eng’ betusiekab Saul, kiga koosit eng’ kwenutab bik." 
1Samuel17:13 Ak kiga ba luget werik che eechen somogu che bo Jesii kosub Saul: ak kainaikab werikyik somok che kiga ba luget ko ki Eliab, taita, ak ne rubei inendet ko Abinadab, ak ne bo somok ko Sama." 
1Samuel17:14 Ak ki ne ming’in Daudi: ak kiga isub Saul che eechen somogu. 
1Samuel17:15 Ak kiwendi Daudi oldab Saul, ak koweeksei koyagi kechirekab kwandanyi eng’ Bet-lehem." 
1Samuel17:16 Ak kirigu Pilistindet karon ak koskoleny, ak koborugei eng’ betusiek artam." 
1Samuel17:17 Ak kilenji Jesii werinnyi Daudi, Ipchi tupchosieguk epah agenge ne bo bek che kagigel, ak makatinichu taman, ak iipchi tupchosieguk eng’ nganaset, ichaktae;" 
1Samuel17:18 ak iipchi mugunichu taman bo chego kiptaiyatab elfunywa, ak igeer ole chamdoigei tupchosieguk, ak iibu wolunenywa." 
1Samuel17:19 Kimi Saul, ak ichek, koboto bik tugul che bo Israel, atebwetab Ela, kobaregei ak Pilistik." 
1Samuel17:20 Ak king’eet Daudi karon mising’, ak kobagakyi kechirek ribindet, ak kiib tuguchoto ak kwo, ko u ye kiga ng’at Jesii; ak kiit ole mi karisiek, ye kiwaachei luget agobo boriet, komachei komanda koba koyai luget." 
1Samuel17:21 Ak kitet luget Israel ak Pilistik, kotorjingei lugosiek tuwai." 
1Samuel17:22 Kibagakyi Daudi tugukyik ribindetab tuguk, ak kolabat ye mi luget, kwo kogat werik che tupcho." 
1Samuel17:23 Ak ye kita kong’alaldos ak ichek, ogeero, kotogos nyiganet, Pilistindet ne bo Gat, ne kainennyi ko ki Goliat, komong’une kweanaikab Pilistik, ak komwa ng’alek che cham komwaei: ak kigas Daudi." 
1Samuel17:24 Ak kingogeer bik tugul che bo Israel chichoto, komwee inendet, ak koiywei kot." 
1Samuel17:25 Ak kile bikab Israel, Kaogeer chichi katogos? Katogosu iman konyo korenyei Israel: ak chito ne barei inendet, kogochin laitoriat inendet magornatet ne o, ak kogochi cheptanyi kotun, ak kotiach gotab kwandanyi eng’ Israel." 
1Samuel17:26 Ak king’alalji Daudi bik che kitonondos eng’ ye mi inendet, kolenji, Kiyachin nee chito ne barei Pilistindoni, ak koisto tewernatani eng’ Isrtael? Amu ng’o Pilistindoni ma kimuratan, kot koreny lugosiekab Kamuktaindet ne sobei?" 
1Samuel17:27 Ak kiwolji bichoto inendet ko u ni, kolenji, Kiyachin ko u noto chito ne barei inendet." 
1Samuel17:28 Ak kigas Eliab ng’etab kamet ne o kong’alaljin bichoto; ak kilalyo neregekab Eliab agobo Daudi, ak kile, Amu nee si ichoruge? Ak kebagakyi ng’o kechirechoto ng’ering’ eng’ ong’atet? Angen menoteng’ung’, ak yaitietab muguleldang’ung’; amu kechoruge inyo igeer luget." 
1Samuel17:29 Ak kile Daudi, Kawech nee nguno? Tos mami kiy ne bo bani?" 
1Samuel17:30 Ak kiwelelgei kotokyigei chito age, ak komwa ko u atgai: ak kiwolji bik inendet kogeny ko u tai." 
1Samuel17:31 Ak ye kingegas ng’alek che kimwa Daudi, keba kemwachi Saul; ak kiyokto chito koguur inendet." 
1Samuel17:32 Ak kilenji Daudi Saul, Amat kome chi mugulel agobo inendet; wendi otwogindeng’ung’ kobaregei ak Pilistindonito." 
1Samuel17:33 Ak kilenji Saul Daudi, Memuchi iwe obargei ak Pilistindonito: amu ta ko i ming’in, ak inendet ko chitab luget koboch ming’inatennyi." 
1Samuel17:34 Ak kilenji Daudi Saul, Kiiyagi otwogindeng’ung’ kechirekab kwandanyi; ak kingonyo ng’etundo, anan tiondo age ne kergei ak keerit, ak konam aruetab kechir eng’ akwet," 
1Samuel17:35 asub, awe abar, ak asoru eng’ kutinnyi: ak kingong’eet kole kobara, anam tamnet, akwer, ak abar." 
1Samuel17:36 Kibar otwogindeng’ung’ tiong’ichoto tuwai, ng’etundo ak noto ne kergei ak keerit; ak igeitu Pilistindonito ma kimuratan age eng’ ichek, amu kogoreny lugosiekab Kamuktaindet ne sobei." 
1Samuel17:37 Ak kimwa Daudi kole, Jehovah ne kisorua eng’ siokab ng’etundo, ak eng’ siokab tionyoto, kosorua eng’ eutab Pilistindoni. Ak kilenji Saul Daudi, Ui, ak mi Jehovah koboten." 
1Samuel17:38 Ak kiilaakyi Saul Daudi ngoriennyi ne bo luget, ak kogerjine metit kutwetab sugunwet, ak kiilaakyi ngorietab karik." 
1Samuel17:39 Ak kiratyi Daudi ngoriennyi rotwennyi bo chok, kolen kwo; amu kitom kotiem. Ak kilenji Daudi Saul, Mamuchi aib tuguchu; amu tom atiem. Ak kiireek Daudi." 
1Samuel17:40 Ak kinam kiroktanyi, ak kokwechigei kibargook mut eng’ kererut, ak konde loletab mestowek ne kitinyei, noto ko ki suberennyi; ak kimi eunnyi borowet ne kiwirtoe koita: ak kirikyi Pilistindet." 
1Samuel17:41 Ak kinyo Pilistindet korikyi Daudi; ak kiindoe inendet chito ne kiipchin long’et. 
1Samuel17:42 Ak kingogeerot Pilistindet ola tugul, kogeer Daudi, ak kosas: amu kita ko ming’in, ak ki birir, ak kotinyei toget ne kararan." 
1Samuel17:43 Ak kilenji Pilistindet Daudi, Tos a seset kot inyonja ak kirokwek? Ak kichub Pilistindonoto Daudi eng’ kanamonikyik." 
1Samuel17:44 Ak kilenji Pilistindet Daudi, Nyo ole ami, si kobiit agochi bortang’ung’ taritikab barak, ak tiong’ikab timin." 
1Samuel17:45 Yeityo kolenji Daudi Pilistindonoto, Kenyonja ak rotwetab chok, ak ng’otit, ak ndirit: ago kanyonjin eng’ kainetab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab lugosiekab Israel, ne koireny." 
1Samuel17:46 Indein rani Jehovah eunnyu; ak awirin, ak atil meting’ung’, ak agochi rani muswekab lugetab Pilistik taritik che bo barak, ak tiong’ikab timin che bo ng’ony; si kobiit konai ng’ony tugul kole, mi Kamuktaindet Israel:" 
1Samuel17:47 ak si kobiit konai tuiyoni tugul kole, masorune chi Jehovah rotwetab chok ak ng’otit: amu bo luget Jehovah ak indeok eunekyok." 
1Samuel17:48 Ak kingong’eet Pilistindet konyo korik, kotorok Daudi, kochakta Daudi, kolabat kotokyigei ole mi luget kotorokta Pilistindet." 
1Samuel17:49 Ak kiirooch Daudi eut lolennyi, ak konem koita, konde borowet, ak kowir Pilistindet kokwer turietab toget; ak kichut koita toget orit, ak kiibut kondoe met." 
1Samuel17:50 Koterter anyun Daudi Pilistindet eng’ borowonoto bo koita, kiwir Pilistindet ak kobar inendet; ago kima komi rotwo ne bo chok eutab Daudi." 
1Samuel17:51 Kolabat anyun Daudi, kwo kotonone Pilistindet, ak konam rotwetab Pilistindonoto, kong’us eng’ choget, ak kobar, ak koebe kaatit kong’et. Ak kingogeer Pilistik kole kagome nyiganennywa, komwei." 
1Samuel17:52 Ak king’eetyo bikab Israel ak che bo Juda, ak kowaach, ak koon Pilistik, agoi koit Gat, agoi kurgotikab Ekron. Ak kiibutyot eng’ oret ne wendi Saaraim Pilistik che kigiguoten, agoi Gat, ak Ekron." 
1Samuel17:53 Ak kiweek lagokab Israel eng’ onet ne kionei Pilistik, ak konyaban nganasenywa." 
1Samuel17:54 Ak kiib Daudi metitab Pilistindonoto, konyo Jerusalem; ago kigonore emainnyi karikab Pilistindet." 
1Samuel17:55 Ak kingogeer Saul Daudi kowendi kobaregei ak Pilistindet, koteebe Abner ne ki kiptaiyatab luget, kolenji, Abner, bo gab ng’o weri? Ak kile Abner, Ko u ye sobei sobondang’ung’, ee laitoriat, ko mangen." 
1Samuel17:56 Ak kile laitoriat, Teeb ole bo werito." 
1Samuel17:57 Ak ye kingoweeksei Daudi kobunu baretab Pilistindet, konam Abner inendet ak komut kwo taitab Saul, kotinyei metitab Pilistindet eng’ eunnyi." 
1Samuel17:58 Ak kiteebe Saul kolenji, I bo gab ng’o, weri? Ak kiwolji Daudi kolenji, A weritab otwogindeng’ung’ Jesii, Bet-lehemindet." 
1Samuel18:1 Ak kingo kagoges inendet ng’alaljinetab Saul, konamgei sobondab Jonatan ak sobondab Daudi, ak kicham Jonatan inendet ko u sobondanyi." 
1Samuel18:2 Ak kiimut inendet Saul betunoto, mata kochamji kwo ga kogeny, gotab kwandanyi." 
1Samuel18:3 Kiiyomisgei anyun Jonatan ak Daudi, amu kicham Jonatan inendet ko u sobondanyi." 
1Samuel18:4 Ak kiireek Jonatan ngoriennyi ne bo barak ne kiilaachi, ak kogochi Daudi, ak ngoriennyi ne koi, ak rotwennyi ne bo chok, ak kwangennyi, ak birenennyi." 
1Samuel18:5 Kiwa Daudi oldo age tugul ole kiiyokto Saul, ak kitebi eng’ ng’omnatet: ak kiinde Saul inendet koboi murenikab luget, ak kimieit kioto eng’ taitab bik tugul, ak eng’ taitab otwogikab Saul agichek." 
1Samuel18:6 Ak ye kingobwanei ichek, koweeksei Daudi kobunu baretab Pilistindet, komong’ gotab kor eng’ nganasok tugul che bo Israel, kotienonu ak kourereni, kotorogu laitoriat Saul, kobirei sugutisiek che mengechen, eng’ boiboiyet, koboto tuguk che kibutei." 
1Samuel18:7 Ak kitienjingei kobogorisiechoto kourerendos kolen, Kibar Saul elfusiekyik, Kibar Daudi tamanusiekab elfusiekyik." 
1Samuel18:8 Ak kinerech Saul kot, ak ma ibaibai inendet mwaonato, ak kimwa kole, Kagoiityi Daudi tamanusiekab elfusiek, koiitya elfusiek kityo: ko nee age ne kang’et ne nyoru kobate laitornatet?" 
1Samuel18:9 Ak kigeerote kong’ ne ya Saul Daudi koboch betunoto agoi. 
1Samuel18:10 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi betunoto, konyonji Saul tamirmiriet ne ya eng’ kimnatet, ne kibunu Kamuktaindet, ak King’alal eng’ go ko u chi ne amei iywek: ak kibut Daudi ketubet eng’ eunnyi, ko u ye kicham koyaei betut age tugul: ak kitinyei Saul ng’otit eng’ eunnyi." 
1Samuel18:11 Ak kitoorta ng’otit Saul; amu kile, Atoore Daudi kosore koit inat. Ak kiistoegei Daudi tainnyi konyil aeng’." 
1Samuel18:12 Ak kiiywei Saul Daudi, amu kimi Jehovah koboto inendet, ak kiga kobagakta Saul." 
1Samuel18:13 Kiisto Saul anyun inendet eng’ ole mi, ak kiinde inendet koek kiptaiyatab elfut; ak kimandoi ak koweeksei eng’ taitab bik." 
1Samuel18:14 Ak kitebi Daudi eng’ ng’omnatet eng’ ortinwekyik tugul; ak kimi Jehovah koboto inendet. 
1Samuel18:15 Kingogeer Saul kotebyei Daudi eng’ ng’omnatet ne o, koiywei inendet." 
1Samuel18:16 Ago kicham Israel tugul ak Juda Daudi; amu kimandoi ak koweeksei eng’ tainywa. 
1Samuel18:17 Ak kilenji Saul Daudi, Keero, cheptanyu ne o, Merab, agonin inendet itun: egu kityo nyiganennyu, ak iyai lugosiekab Jehovah. Amu kile Saul, Mamache kotwa eunekyuk inendet, ago ingobar inendet eunekab Pilistik." 
1Samuel18:18 Ak kilenji Daudi Saul, A ng’o ak nee sobondanyu, anan ko oretab baba eng’ Israel, kot aegu sandetab laitoriat?" 
1Samuel18:19 Ago eng’ betut ne kita kigochin Merab Daudi cheptab Saul, kigochi Adriel Meolatindet kotun." 
1Samuel18:20 Ak kicham Mikal Daudi, cheptab Saul: ak kigimwachi Saul, ak kiibaibai ng’olyondonoto inendet." 
1Samuel18:21 Ak kimwa Saul kole, Agochini inendet, si kobiit koek mestet eng’ Daudi, ak si kobiit kobar inendet eutab Pilistik. Komwachi anyun Saul Daudi kolenji ne bo aeng’, Iegu ra sandet." 
1Samuel18:22 Ak king’at Saul otwogikyik, kolenji, Ong’alal ak Daudi eng’ ung’ot, olenji, Keero, baibai laitoriat eng’ inye, ak kochamin otwogikyik tugul: noto anyun ko mie iegu sandetab laitoriat." 
1Samuel18:23 Ak kimwachi otwogikab Saul Daudi ng’alechato kogas. Ak kimwa Daudi kole, Ogeere ko kit ne ming’in eng’ okwek koek chi sandetab gab laitoriat, ago ane, ko a chi ne banan, ne sasat?" 
1Samuel18:24 Ak kimwachi anyun otwogikyik Saul, kolenji, Kang’alal Daudi ko u ni." 
1Samuel18:25 Ak kile Saul, Omwachini Daudi ko u ni, olenjini, Mamachei laitoriat kanyiok alak tugul, ago machei irirenik bogol che bo Pilistik, si kobiit keyaaktochi mugetut bunikab laitoriat. Ak kiibwati Saul kole si kome Daudi eng’ eunekab Pilistik." 
1Samuel18:26 Ak kingomwachi otwogikyik Daudi ng’alechuto, kobaibait komie Daudi koek sandetab laitoriat. Ak kotom kogesgei betusiechoto;" 
1Samuel18:27 kong’eet Daudi kwo koboto bikyik, koba kobar Pilistik bik bogol aeng’; ak kiib Daudi irirenikwak, ak kogochi laitoriat irirenichoto tugul, si koek sandetab laitoriat. Ak kiigochi Saul inendet Mikal cheptanyi kotun." 
1Samuel18:28 Ak kigeer Saul ak konai kole komi Jehovah koboto Daudi ak kicham Mikal cheptab Saul Daudi. 
1Samuel18:29 Ak kites Saul koiywei Daudi; ak kiek Saul bunyotab Daudi betut age tugul. 
1Samuel18:30 Kimanda anyun bounikab Pilistik: ak ye kicham komandoi, kotebi Daudi eng’ ng’omnatet kosiir otwogik tugul che bo Saul; kot kegonyit kainennyi mising’." 
1Samuel19:1 Ak king’alalji Saul Jonatan werinnyi, koboto otwogikyik tugul, kolenji kobar Daudi." 
1Samuel19:2 Ago kibaibai mising’ Jonatan weritab Saul agobo Daudi. Ak kimwachi Jonatan Daudi, kolenji, Cheng’ei baba Saul kobarin: noto anyun asain mising’ ale, ripge karon, ak itebi eng’ ung’ot, iunyge:" 
1Samuel19:3 si amanda ak awe atonone ye negite baba eng’ kewet eng’ ole imi, ak keng’alal ak baba agobo inye; ak ngot ageer kiy amwaun." 
1Samuel19:4 Ak king’alalji Jonatan Saul kwandanyi, kochoi Daudi, kolenji, Amat koyachi tengek laitoriat otwogindennyi Daudi, amu ma yaun tengek, ak amu kagomiagitu mising’ boisionikyik che kogoyaun:" 
1Samuel19:5 amu ma iit sobondanyi, ak kogobar Pilistindet, ak kiyai Jehovah yetunet ne o agobo Israel tugul: kiigeer kioto aginye, ak kiibaibaitu: amu nee anyun si iyachi tengek korotik che matinyei tengek, ibar Daudi buch?" 
1Samuel19:6 Ak kigas Saul ng’olyotab Jonatan: ak kiiyosio Saul kole, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ko magibarei inendet." 
1Samuel19:7 Ak kiguur Jonatan Daudi ak koborji Jonatan inendet tuguchoto tugul. Ak kiimut Jonatan Daudi kwo ole mi Saul, ak kitebe tainnyi ko u eng’ tai." 
1Samuel19:8 Ak kibiit luget kogeny: ak kimanda Daudi kwo kobargei ak Pilistik, ak kibar ichek eng’ baret ne o; ak kimwei eng’ tainnyi." 
1Samuel19:9 Ak kinyonji Saul tamirmiriet ne ya ne kibunu Jehovah, ye kitebyei eng’ gonnyi, kotinyei ng’otit eng’ eunnyi; ak kibut Daudi kibugandet eng’ eunnyi." 
1Samuel19:10 Ak kilen Saul kotoor Daudi eng’ ng’otit kosore inat; ago kichilil eng’ taitab Saul, ak kitoor inatut eng’ ng’otit: ak kimwei Daudi, ak kochilil kemounoto." 
1Samuel19:11 Ak kiiyokto Saul bik koba gotab Daudi, korib inendet kole si kobar inendet karon: ak kimwachi Mikal Daudi, osotiondennyi, kolenji, Ngot ko mesoru sobondang’ung’ kemouni, kebarin mutai." 
1Samuel19:12 Kochoorta anyun Mikal Daudi kwo ng’ony kobun tirisiet: ak kiwa komwei, kochilil." 
1Samuel19:13 Ak kinam Mikal kanamwet, ak komogon eng’ itogut, ak kotichine met mutoit ne bo kororikab ng’ororek, ak kotuge ngoroik." 
1Samuel19:14 Ak kingoyokto Saul bik koba konam Daudi, komwa kwondanyi kole, Miani." 
1Samuel19:15 Ak kiiyokto Saul bichoto koba kogeer Daudi, kolenji, Omutwa eng’ itogut si anyo abar." 
1Samuel19:16 Ak kingobwa go bichoto, ogeero, kimi kanamwet itok, komi metinnyi mutoinoto bo kororikab ng’ororek." 
1Samuel19:17 Ak kilenji Saul Mikal, Amu nee si igena ko u ni ak ichunde bunyondennyu kwo, kot ko kagochilil? Ak kiwolji Mikal Saul kolenji, Kilenja, Bagakta awa; kalya si imach abarin?" 
1Samuel19:18 Komwei anyun Daudi, ak kochilil, ak kwo ole mi Samuel eng’ Rama, kwo komwachi tuguk tugul che kiyachi inendet Saul. Kiba tuwai ak Samuel koba komeny Naiot." 
1Samuel19:19 Ak kigimwachi Saul kelenji, Keero, mitei Daudi Naiot eng’ Rama." 
1Samuel19:20 Ak kiiyokto Saul bik koba konam Daudi; ak kingogeer tuiyetab maotik komaotendos ng’alek, kotononi Samuel kondochin ichek, konyonji Tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet bikab Saul, ak komaotenso agichek." 
1Samuel19:21 Ak kingemwachi Saul ng’alechato, koyokto bik alak, ak kimaotenso agichek. Ak kiiyokto Saul bik, ne bo somok, ak kimaotenso agichek." 
1Samuel19:22 Kiwa inendet agine Rama, ak kiit ole mi keringet ne o ne bo beek ne mitei Seku: ak kiteeb kole, Mi ano Samuel ak Daudi? Ak kile chito age, Keero, mi Naiot eng’ Rama." 
1Samuel19:23 Ak kiwa oloto bo Naiot eng’ Rama: ak kinyonji inendet agine Tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet, ak kiwa, komaotenot, kot koit Naiot eng’ Rama." 
1Samuel19:24 Ak kiireek ngoroikyik, ak kimaoten agine eng’ taitab Samuel, ak koru ach ngor betunoto tugul ak kemounoto tugul. Noto anyun mwaei ichek kole, Bo Saul agine maotik?" 
1Samuel20:1 Ak kimwei Daudi eng’ Naiot eng’ Rama, ak konyo komwa eng’ taitab Jonatan, kole, Kiayai nee? Nee tengektanyu? Nee chalwoktanyu eng’ taitab kwandang’ung’, si kocheng’ei sobondanyu?" 
1Samuel20:2 Ak kilenji, Ingolooit noto; memee; keero, mayaei baba kiy ne o anan ne ming’in, ama iborua: ak amu nee si koung’ena baba kiito? Ma u noto." 
1Samuel20:3 Ak kogeny, kiiyosio Daudi kogeny kole, Ingen kwandang’ung’ komie kole, Kianyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’; ak kile, Amat konai Jonatan kiito, si maarogen: ago iman ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ak ko u ye sobei sobondang’ung’ agine, komi kakwautiet agenge kityo eng’ kwenunnyu ak meet." 
1Samuel20:4 Kolenji anyun Jonatan Daudi, Kit age tugul ne machei sobondang’ung’, ayaun kioto." 
1Samuel20:5 Ak kilenji Daudi Jonatan, Keero, leelei arawet mutai, ak kama kota nyoljina atebi, ama kitebi ak laitoriat mutai eng’ amisiet: ago chamwa awa, si awa aung’ge eng’ timin agoi betutab somok koskoleny." 
1Samuel20:6 Ngot kogeer kwandang’ung’ kole mami ane, imwachi anyun ilenji, Kosoma Daudi mising’ kole achamji kolabat kwo Bet-lehem nganasennyi: amu mi oloto tiseiywotab kenyit age tugul ne bo orenywa tugul." 
1Samuel20:7 Ngot komwa ko u noto, kole, Mie; konyoru anyun otwogindeng’ung’ kalyet; ago ngot konerech, inai anyun ile kagotil kole yaei kit ne ya." 
1Samuel20:8 Eng’ noto anyun iyachi ne mie otwogindeng’ung’; amu kiiyachi otwogindeng’ung’ arorutiet ne bo Jehovah koboten: ago ngot atinye tengekto, ibara inyendet; amu kalya si imutya kwandang’ung’?" 
1Samuel20:9 Ak kile Jonatan, Ingolooit eng’ inye: amu ndangen ale kagotil baba kole koyaun kit ne ya, ko tos mamwaun?" 
1Samuel20:10 Kolenji anyun Daudi Jonatan, Ng’o ne mwawa ngot kogowolun kwandang’ung’ eng’ koromnatet?" 
1Samuel20:11 Kolenji Jonatan Daudi, Nyo kebe timin. Kiba tuwai anyun timin." 
1Samuel20:12 Kilenji Jonatan Daudi, Ingoek baoriat Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel; ye tun ateebe baba mutai koteni asis, anan eng’ betutab somok, keero, ngot komi ng’olyot ne mie agobo Daudi, ko mayogun ak aborun?" 
1Samuel20:13 Ingoyachi Jehovah Jonatan ko u noto, ak kosiir, ngot kochamei baba koyaun ne ya, ama aborun, ak amwaun, si kobiit iwe eng’ kalyet: ak ingotebi Jehovah koboten, ko u ye kimi koboto baba." 
1Samuel20:14 Ak iborua mieindab Jehovah, ma kota asobe kityo, si mamei:" 
1Samuel20:15 ago kogeny meistoi mieindang’ung’ eng’ gonnyu koigeny: achicha, agot ye kagoisto Jehovah bunik alak tugul che bo Daudi eng’ ng’ony." 
1Samuel20:16 Koyai anyun Jonatan arorutiet koboto gotab Daudi kole, Ak tun mage Jehovah kioto eunekab bunikab Daudi." 
1Samuel20:17 Ak kiiyosiechi Jonatan Daudi ne bo aeng’, amu chamnyet ne o ne kiting’e inendet: amu kichamei inendet ko u ye kichamei sobondanyi." 
1Samuel20:18 Kilenji anyun Jonatan inendet, Leelei arawet mutai: ak tun kigeerei kele memi, amu mi ng’echereng’ung’ buch." 
1Samuel20:19 Ak ye kaibeni betusiek somok, ichortege ichakte, ak iit ole kigeung’ege ye kigimwaei ng’alechato, ak itebe ole negite koitab Esel." 
1Samuel20:20 Ak amwok tabandanyi eng’ kipchabonik somok, ko u ye kamwoge kiy." 
1Samuel20:21 Keero, ayoktoi lakwet alenji, Ui cheng’ kipchabonik. Ngot amwachi lakwanato alenji, Keero, mitei kipchabonik komosi: inemu anyun ak inyo; amu mitei kalyet eng’ inye, ama mi ng’oiyondit, ko u ye sobei Jehovah." 
1Samuel20:22 Ago ngot amwachi weroto ko u noto alenji, Mitei komosin kipchabonik: iwe; amu kamwaun Jehovah iwe." 
1Samuel20:23 Ak agobo ng’alek che kagemwa, inye ak ane, ko keero, mi Jehovah kwenunnyo." 
1Samuel20:24 Kiunygei Daudi anyun eng’ timin: ak kingoleel arawet, koteb laitoriat koamis." 
1Samuel20:25 Ak kitebe laitoriat ng’echerennyi ko u betusiek alak, eng’ ng’echeret ne ki negite inat: ak kitonon Jonatan, ak kitebe Abner ole negite Saul: ago kimi buch komostab Daudi." 
1Samuel20:26 Ago kima mwa ng’olyo age tugul betunoto Saul: amu kilen, Kagonyonji kiy inendet; ma tilil inendet; iman ma tilil inendet." 
1Samuel20:27 Ak ki mutai, ko kagoleel arawet, eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, ko kimi buch komostab Daudi: ak kilenji Saul Jonatan werinnyi, Amu nee si ma nyo weritab Jesii amisiet, amut, ak raini?" 
1Samuel20:28 Ak kiwolji Jonatan Saul kolenji, Kosoma Daudi mising’ kwo Bet-lehem:" 
1Samuel20:29 ak kole, Asomin ale, Chamwa awa; amu enyei bikab orennyo tiseiywot eng’ nganaset; ak kong’ata werit ne ketupche awa: ak nguno anyun, ko ngot ko kaanyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’, asomin ale chamwa awa, ak awe ageer che kitupche. Koma nyo anyun mesetab laitoriat amu noto." 
1Samuel20:30 Kolalyo anyun neregekab Saul agobo Jonatan, ak komwachi inendet kolenji, Inye weritab kwondo ne imaasat ak ko ngeleliot, tos mangen ale kiilewen weritab Jesii si tun ililane, ak koek kalilanetab ach ngorietab komet?" 
1Samuel20:31 Amu kota kosobei weritab Jesii eng’ ng’ony, ko magigimitin anan kigimit bounateng’ung’. Iyokte anyun kimutwa inendet, amu meei iman." 
1Samuel20:32 Ak kiwolji Jonatan kwandanyi Saul kolenji, Kibarei amu nee? Koyai nee?" 
1Samuel20:33 Ak kitoor Saul inendet kolen kobar: konae noto anyun Jonatan kole kogotil kwandanyi kobar Daudi. 
1Samuel20:34 Kong’eet anyun Jonatan eng’ meset eng’ neregek che ng’wonen, ak ma amis eng’ betutab aeng’ ne bo arawet: amu kiarogeni agobo Daudi, amu kiitewer kwandanyi." 
1Samuel20:35 Ak ki eng’ karon, kwo Jonatan timin eng’ sait ne kiga ng’at Daudi, kobendi ak lakwet ne ming’in." 
1Samuel20:36 Ak kilenji lakwanato, Labat si icheng’ kipchabonik che amwoktoi. Ak ye kilabati lakwet, komwokto kipchabet kondoe inendet." 
1Samuel20:37 Ak kingoit lakwet ole kimi kipchabet ne kiga mwokto Jonatan, koguur Jonatan lakwanato, kolenji, Mata komi tai kipchabet?" 
1Samuel20:38 Ak kiguur Jonatan lakwet kolenji, Chakte, labat, mat igage. Ak kiiyum lakwanato bo Jonatan kipchabonik, ak konyo ole mi kiptaiyandennyi." 
1Samuel20:39 Ago ma nai kiy age tugul lakwanato: Jonatan ak Daudi ichegei che kiingen ng’alechato. 
1Samuel20:40 Ak kiigochi Jonatan karikyik lakwanatonyi, ak kolenji, Ui, ib tuguchu koba nganaset." 
1Samuel20:41 Ak ne matia ko kata kowendi lakwet, kong’eet Daudi eng’ ole tokyingei Murot ne bo Tai, kotiing’e togennyi ng’ony, ak kong’uruk konyil somok: ak king’ututgei, ak korirjigei, kot kotesak mising’ rirekab Daudi." 
1Samuel20:42 Ak kilenji Jonatan Daudi, Ui eng’ kalyet, amu ko u ye kagiyosie tuwai eng’ kainetab Jehovah, kele, Tebyei Jehovah eng’ kwenunnyo, ane ak inye, ak kwenutab iyotennyu ak iyoteng’ung’ koigeny. Ak king’eet kwo: ak kiwa Jonatan nganaset." 
1Samuel21:1 Konyo anyun Daudi Nob oldab Aimelek tisiindet: ak kinyo Aimelek kotorok Daudi kobotanonu, ak kolenji, Amu nee si imi inyege, ama mi chi ne omi tuwai?" 
1Samuel21:2 Ak kilenji Daudi Aimelek tisiindet, Kang’ata laitoriat agobo ng’olyo, ak kolenja, Matingonai chi agobo ng’olyondonito kayoktochin, anan agobo kit ne kang’atin: ak kang’at murenik koba ole kile." 
1Samuel21:3 Ara anyun, itinye nee eng’ eung’ung’? Kona makatinik mut kobwa eunnyu, anan ko kit age tugul ne itinye." 
1Samuel21:4 Ak kiwolji tisiindonoto Daudi kolenji, Mami makatinik che maitabanotin, kobate mi makatinik che tililen; ngot ko koripgei murenjoto eng’ kwonyik." 
1Samuel21:5 Ak kiwolji Daudi tisiindonoto kolenji, Iman, kogitabanenech kwonyik eng’ betusiechu somok; ye kiamong’u ko kiitabanotin tugukab murenik, agot ngo bandab betusiek tugul; kotabanotin tugukwak ra ne tia?" 
1Samuel21:6 Kogochi anyun tisiindet inendet makatinik che itabanotin: amu kima komi makatinik alage kobate makatinik che bo kabartaet, che kiginemu eng’ taitab Jehovah, si kinde makatinik che kabunu ma eng’ betut ne kagiisto che kami." 
1Samuel21:7 Kimi yoto chito age ne bo otwogikab Saul eng’ betunoto, ne kigirany kotebi eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kainennyi ko ki Doeg, Edomindet, ne ki o eng’ mestowekab Saul." 
1Samuel21:8 Ak kimwachi Daudi Aimelek, kolenji, Metinye eng’ yu ng’otit anan ko rotwetab chok eng’ eung’ung’? Amu maibu rotwennyu anan ko karikyuk, amu komachei boisietab laitoriat kechokyi." 
1Samuel21:9 Ak kile tisiindonoto, Keero, Mi yu rotwetab chok ne bo Goliat Pilistindoni kiibare eng’ atebwetab Ela, kigitaae anget ak mitei eng’ batetab epod: ngot imache iib noto, iib: amu mami age yu kobate noto. Ak kile Daudi, Mami age ne u noto; kona noto." 
1Samuel21:10 Ak king’eet anyun Daudi, komwei betunoto amu kiiywei Saul, ak kwo oldab Akis laitoriatab Gat." 
1Samuel21:11 Ak kilenji otwogikyik Aksi, Ma Daudi nito laitoriatab emet? Tos kima tienjigei ichek agobo inendet eng’ ureriosiek, kole, Kibar Saul elfusiekyik, Ak kibar Daudi tamanusiekab elfusiek?" 
1Samuel21:12 Ak kigonor Daudi ng’alechuto eng’ muguleldanyi, ak kiiywei mising’ Akis laitoriatab Gat." 
1Samuel21:13 Ak kiwal atebennyi eng’ tainywa, ak kiyaigei koek kibiywet eng’ eunekwak, ak kisirasir kurgotikab ormarichet, ak kibagakta ng’ulekyik kochortaegei tamnet." 
1Samuel21:14 Kilenji anyun Akis otwogikyik, Ogeero, ogeere ole kibiywo chichi: amu nee anyun si omutwa?" 
1Samuel21:15 Tos korarua kibionik, kot omutwa chichi konyo koiiywen eng’ tainnyu? Nyonei chichi gonnyu?" 
1Samuel22:1 Kiwa Daudi anyun eng’ oloto, kochilil kwo kebenetab Adulam: ak kingogas tupchosiekyik ak bik tugul che bo gotab kwandanyi, kochortagei koba ole mi." 
1Samuel22:2 Ak kiiyumjigei inendet chi age tugul ne kinyalili, ak age tugul ne kitinyei besendo, ak age tugul ne kitinyei ng’wanindo eng’ muguleldanyi; ak kiek kiptaiyandenywa: ak kimi ak inendet murenik olo bo bogol ang’wan." 
1Samuel22:3 Ak kiwa eng’ oloto Daudi kwo Mispe ne bo Moab, kolenji laitoriatab Moab, Asomin ale, chamji baba ak kamennyu kobwa otebi tugul, agoi anai kit ne yaiywa Kamuktaindet." 
1Samuel22:4 Ak kiimut ichek kobwa taitab laitoriatab Moab: ak kimeng’is ak inendet betusiek tugul che kimi Daudi kebenet. 
1Samuel22:5 Ak kilenji maotiot Gad Daudi, Amat itebe kebenet; ui, ak iwe emetab Juda. Kwo anyun Daudi, ak kiit osnetab Heret." 
1Samuel22:6 Ak kigas Saul kole kigenyor Daudi, koboto murenik che kimi ak inendet: ak kitebi Saul eng’ Gibea, ketit kel eng’ Rama, kotinyei ng’otit eng’ eunnyi, ak kotonondos otwogikyik eng’ ye negite inendet." 
1Samuel22:7 Ak kilenji Saul otwogikyik che kitonondos eng’ ye negite inendet, Ogas nguno, okwek Benjaminik; tos igochi weritab Jesii chi age tugul eng’ okwek mbarenik ak mbarenikab sabibuk, tos yaok okwek tugul egu kiptainikab elfusiek ak kiptainikab bogolwogik;" 
1Samuel22:8 kot ochaama okwek tugul? Ma biit agot agenge ne ng’ang’wa ye yaei arorutiet werinnyu ak weritab Jesii, ama mi chi eng’ okwek ne rirena, anan ko ne ng’ang’wa kole kogong’eet werinnyu otwogindennyu kosuriena, kosapcha, ko u rani?" 
1Samuel22:9 Kowol anyun Doeg Edomindet, ne kitononi eng’ ye negite otwogikab Saul kole, Kiageer weritab Jesii konyonei Nob, ole mi Aimelek weritab Aitub." 
1Samuel22:10 Ak kiteepsechi eng’ Jehovah agobo inendet, ak kogochi inendet amitwogik, ak kogochi rotwetab chok ne ki bo Goliat Pilistindet." 
1Samuel22:11 Kiiyokto anyun laitoriat keguur tisiindet Aimelek, weritab Aitub, ak bik tugul che bo gotab kwandanyi, tisiik che kimi Not: ak kibwa ichek tugul ole mi laitoriat." 
1Samuel22:12 Ak kile Saul, Kas nguno inye, weritab Aitub. Ak kiwol kole, Ami yu, kiptaiyandennyu." 
1Samuel22:13 Ak kimwachi Saul inendet kolenji, Amu nee si ochaama, inye, ak weritab Jesii, kiigochi inendet makatinik, ak rotwetab chok, ak kiiteepsechi inendet eng’ Kamuktaindet, si kong’eetya, koboriena, kosapcha, ko u rani?" 
1Samuel22:14 Kowolji anyun Aimelek laitoriat kolenji, Ago ng’o eng’ otwogiguk tugul ne bo iman ko u Daudi ne sandetab laitoriat, ne kiginem kwo kapkiruogeng’ung’, ak ko konyitot eng’ gong’ung’?" 
1Samuel22:15 Tos katau rani ateepsechi inendet eng’ Kamuktaindet? Ingolooit eng’ ane: amat koiityi laitoriat kiy age tugul otwogindennyi, anan got tugul ne bo baba: amu maingen otwogindeng’ung’ agobo ng’alechu tugul che ng’ering’ anan ngo che chang’." 
1Samuel22:16 Ak kile laitoriat, Imee iman, inye Aimelek, ak bik tugul che bo gotab kwandang’ung’." 
1Samuel22:17 Ak kilenji laitoriat ribik che kitonondos eng’ ye negite inendet, Owelelge ak obar tisiikab Jehovah; amu ting’egei agichek yamdaet ak Daudi, amu kiingen kole kimwei, ama ng’ang’wa. Ago ma cham otwogikab laitoriat koiito eunekwak kobar tisiikab Jehovah." 
1Samuel22:18 Ak kilenji laitoriat Doeg, Welelge inye, ak ibar tisiik. Kiwelelgei anyun Doeg Edomindet, ak kobar tisiik, ak kibar eng’ betunoto bik tamanwogik sisiit ak mut che kiilachi epod ne bo katanit." 
1Samuel22:19 Ak kibar Nob, nganasetab tisiik, eng’ rotwetab chok, murenik ak gotab kor, lagok ak che reriei, ak tuga koboto sigirok ak kechirek." 
1Samuel22:20 Ak kichilil age eng’ werikab Aimelek weritab Aitub, ne kigiguure Abiatar, ak komwei kosub Daudi." 
1Samuel22:21 Ak kimwachi Abiatar Daudi kolenji, Kogobar Saul tisiikab Jehovah." 
1Samuel22:22 Ak kilenji Daudi Abiatar, Kiganai eng’ betunoto, ye kimi yoto Doeg Edomindet, ale mwachin iman Saul: koaipchi meet bik tugul che bo gotab kwandang’ung’." 
1Samuel22:23 Tebi kobota, ameiyweisie; amu inendet ne cheng’ei sobondanyu kocheng’ei sobondang’ung’: amu ngemi tuwai ko i ribot." 
1Samuel23:1 Ak kigimwachi Daudi kelenji, Keero, baregei Pilistik ak Keila, ak kochorei tuguk eng’ ruanyut ne kiborse." 
1Samuel23:2 Koteebe anyun Daudi Jehovah kolenji, Awe abar Pilistichuto? Ak kilenji Jehovah Daudi, Ui ak ibar Pilistik, ak isoru Keila." 
1Samuel23:3 Ak kilenji bikyik Daudi, Keero, kiyweisiei eng’ olito bo Juda: ko siirei ne tia anyun ngot kebe Keila kebarge ak lugosiekab Pilistik?" 
1Samuel23:4 Koteebe anyun Daudi Jehovah kogeny. Ak kiwolji Jehovah inendet kolenji, Ng’eet, chortege Keila; amu andoi Pilistik euneguk." 
1Samuel23:5 Ak kiwa Daudi Keila koboto bikyik, ak kobargei ak Pilistik, ak koluul tukwak, ak kobar bik eng’ baret ne o. Kisor anyun Daudi bikab Keila." 
1Samuel23:6 Ak kingomwechi Abiatar weritab Aimelek Daudi eng’ Keila, kochorgei kotinyei epod eng’ eunnyi." 
1Samuel23:7 Ak kigimwachi Saul kelenji, Konyo Daudi Keila. Ak kile Saul, Kagonde Kamuktaindet inendet eunnyu; amu kagegerji orit, amu kiwa nganaset ne tinyei ormarichok ak temeleiywek." 
1Samuel23:8 Ak kiguur Saul bik tugul koba luget, kochortagei koba Keila, koba koyiem Daudi ak bikyik." 
1Samuel23:9 Ak kinai Daudi kole, chobei Saul yaitiet agobo inendet; ak kilenji Abiatar tisiindet, Ibu epod konyo yu." 
1Samuel23:10 Yeityo komwa Daudi kole, Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, kagogas iman otwogindeng’ung’ kole, machei konyo Saul Keila, konyo kobar nganaset agobo ane." 
1Samuel23:11 Tos indea bikab Keila eunnyi? Chorugei Saul, ko u ye kagogas otwogindeng’ung’? Ee, Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, asomin mising’ ale, mwachi otwogindeng’ung’. Ak kile Jehovah, Chorugei." 
1Samuel23:12 Komwa Daudi anyun kole, Tos indea eutab Saul bikab Keila, ane ak bikyuk? Ak kile Jehovah, Indein." 
1Samuel23:13 Kong’eet anyun Daudi koboto bikyik che ki olo bo bogol lo, ak koba eng’ Keila, ak kiba oldo tugul ole kiimuch koba. Ak kigimwachi Saul kelenji, kigomwei Daudi eng’ Keila; ak mata kwo." 
1Samuel23:14 Ak kitebe Daudi irimoik eng’ ong’atet, ak kitebe emetab tulonok eng’ ong’atetab Sip. Ak kicheng’ei Saul inendet eng’ betut age tugul, ago ma inde Kamuktaindet inendet eunnyi." 
1Samuel23:15 Ak kigeer Daudi kole kagonyo sang’ Saul kocheng’ sobondanyi: ak kimi Daudi ong’atetab Sip eng’ osnet. 
1Samuel23:16 Ak king’eet Jonatan weritab Saul, ak kwo ole mi Daudi eng’ osnet, ak kogimit inendet eng’ Kamuktaindet."
