1Samuel23:17 Ak kilenji inendet, Ameiywei: amu manyorun eutab Saul baba; ak iegu laitoriat eng’ Israel, ak aegu ne rubin; ak ingen noto agine Saul kwandanyu." 
1Samuel23:18 Ak kiiyomisgei tuwai eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak kitebe Daudi osnet, ak kwo Jonatan gonnyi." 
1Samuel23:19 Kibwa anyun Sipik kotogos ole mi Saul, eng’ Gibea, kobwa kolenji, Tos maunyegei Daudi eng’ olinnyo eng’ irimoik che mi osnet, eng’ tulwetab Hakila, ne mi murot ne bo tai ne bo ong’atet?" 
1Samuel23:20 Ara anyun, ee laitoriandani, choruge, ko u maget tugul ne bo sobondang’ung’ ichoruge; ak boisiennyo ko kinde inendet eutab laitoriat." 
1Samuel23:21 Ak kile Saul, Ingoberurok Jehovah; amu kaorirena." 
1Samuel23:22 Asomok anyun ale oba ocheng’ komie, ak onai ak ogeer ole mi, ak inendet ne kigeerei eng’ oloto: amu kigimwawa kele boisie ng’alset." 
1Samuel23:23 Ogeer anyun ak onai komoswek tugul ole ung’egei, ak obwa kogeny yu ami, oibu ng’alek che bo iman, si kebe tugul: ak ngot komi emoni, acheng’oti eng’ elfusiek tugul che bo Juda." 
1Samuel23:24 Ak king’eetyo koba Sip kondoe Saul; ago kimi Daudi ak bikyik ong’atetab Maon, eng’ Araba murot ne bo tai ne bo ong’atet." 
1Samuel23:25 Ak kiba Saul ak bikyik koba kocheng’ inendet. Ak kigimwachi Daudi: kichorgei anyun konyo ole mi ruandet, ak kitebe ong’atetab Maon. Ak kingogas Saul, kwo kosub Daudi eng’ ong’atetab Maon." 
1Samuel23:26 Ak kibun Saul tulwet komosi, ak kibun Daudi ak bikyik tulwet komosin: ak kichakta Daudi komwei amu kiiywei Saul; amu kiyiem Saul ak bikyik Daudi koboto bikyik kole konam." 
1Samuel23:27 Ago kinyo chi komwachi Saul kolenji, Nyo chogu, amu kagobokyi emet Pilistik." 
1Samuel23:28 Kiweek anyun Saul mata kosub Daudi, ak kiwa kobargei ak Pilistik: kiguure yoto anyun Sela-hamalekot." 
1Samuel23:29 Ak kitogosta Daudi eng’ yoto, kwo komeny irimoikab En-gedi." 
1Samuel24:1 Ak kingoweek Saul eng’ kasubet ne kiisubi Pilistik, kemwachi kelenji, Keero, mitei Daudi ong’atetab En-gedi." 
1Samuel24:2 Konam anyun Saul murenik elfusiek somok che kigilewen eng’ Israel tugul, koba kocheng’ Daudi ak bikyik eng’ ruandosiekab sitok." 
1Samuel24:3 Ak kiit ole mi biusiekab kechirek eng’ oret, ole kimi kebenet; ak kiwa Saul orit, ak kotuch kelyekyik. Kimi Daudi ak bikyik kebenet orit mising’." 
1Samuel24:4 Ak kilenji bikyik Daudi, Keero, betut ne kimwaun Jehovah kole, Keero, andoi bunyondeng’ung’ eung’ung’, ak iyachi kit ne igeere ile mie eng’ inye. King’eet anyun Daudi kwo kotil tabandab ngorietab Saul eng’ ung’ot." 
1Samuel24:5 Ak eng’ let kogas Daudi ng’wanindo eng’ muguleldanyi, amu kagotil tabandab ngorietab Saul." 
1Samuel24:6 Ak kilenji bikyik, Ingolooit eng’ ane eng’ Jehovah si mayachi kiptaiyandennyu ne iilat ne bo Jehovah, kiy ne u ni, si machuul eunnyu ayachi kiy ne ya, amu inendet ko ne iilat ne bo Jehovah." 
1Samuel24:7 Kiete anyun Daudi bikyik ng’alechuto, ama chamji kong’eetyo kobar Saul. Ak king’eet Saul kwo eng’ kebenet, ak kwo bandanyi." 
1Samuel24:8 Yeityo kong’eet Daudi agine, ak kwo eng’ kebenet, ak komwachi Saul eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat. Ak kingogusgong’ Saul, kong’uruk Daudi, kot kotiiny toget ng’ony, kogutung’ji." 
1Samuel24:9 Kolenji Daudi Saul, Amu nee si igas ng’alekab bik, che mwaei kole, Cheng’ei Daudi koyaun kiy ne ya?" 
1Samuel24:10 Keero, kagogeer konyeguk rani kole kaindein Jehovah rani eunnyu eng’ kebenet: ak kamwawa bik alage kole abarin: ago karirenen; ak kamwa ale, machuule eunnyu abare kiptaiyandennyu; amu inendet ko ne iilat ne bo Jehovah." 
1Samuel24:11 Kogeny, keero, baba, ee, keer walitab ngorieng’ung’ ne mi eunnyu: amu katil walitab ngorieng’ung’ ak ma abarin, nai anyun ak igeer ile matinye yaitiet anan ko bistoet eng’ eunekyuk, ak tom ayaun tengek, agot nganda icheng’e sobondanyu ibar." 
1Samuel24:12 Ingooiyech Jehovah, ak ingoyaaktawa Jehovah mugetut eng’ inye; ago mabarin eunnyu." 
1Samuel24:13 Ko u ye mwaei kalewenetab bik che bo keny, kole, Bunu sogornatet sogoranik: ago mabarin eunnyu." 
1Samuel24:14 Kamong’ sang’ laitoriatab Israel koon ng’o? Ione ng’o? Ione seset ne kigome, anan kimitiat?" 
1Samuel24:15 Ingoek Jehovah kiruogindet, kotilwech kiruoget eng’ kwenunnyo, ane ak inye, ak kogeer, ak kong’alal agobo ane, ak kosorua eng’ eung’ung’." 
1Samuel24:16 Ak kingo kagoges Daudi ng’alechu kimwachin Saul, komwa Saul kole, Kuting’ung’ nito, werinnyu Daudi? Ak kiwaach Saul korir." 
1Samuel24:17 Ak kimwachi Daudi kolenji, I bo iman isiira: amu kaiyaiywa ne mie, ago kiayaun ne ya." 
1Samuel24:18 Ak kaibarte rani ile kaiyaiywa ne mie: amu ko u ye kaindea Jehovah eung’ung’, ko ma ibara." 
1Samuel24:19 Amu ngot konyor chi bunyondennyi, kobagaktoi kwo kochamegei? Noto anyun ingogonin Jehovah mieindo agobo noto keyaiywa rani." 
1Samuel24:20 Nguno anyun, angen ale iegu laitoriat iman, ak kigimiti bounatetab Israel eng’ eung’ung’." 
1Samuel24:21 Iyosiewa anyun eng’ Jehovah ile, meistoi iyotennyu che biitu let eng’ ane, ak ile megesu kainennyu eng’ gotab baba." 
1Samuel24:22 Ak kiiyosiechi Daudi Saul. Ak kiwa Saul ga; ago kitogosta Daudi ak bikyik koba irimet. 
1Samuel25:1 Ak kime Samuel; ak kiiyumgei Israel tugul, koba korirji inendet, ak kotupchi gonnyi eng’ Rama. Ak king’eet Daudi, ak kochortagei kwo ong’atetab Paran." 
1Samuel25:2 Ak kimi chito Maon, ne kimi tugukyik Karmel; ak ki toogunot chichoto, ak kitinyei kechirek elfusiek somok, ak ng’ororek elfut agenge: ak kitilei kororikab kechirekyik eng’ Karmel." 
1Samuel25:3 Kainetab chichoto ko ki Nabal; ak kainetab osotiondennyi ko ki Abigail; ak ki ng’om osotiondonoto, ak kitinyei itondo ne kararan: ago ki uui met chichoto ak ki yaach boisionikyik; ak ki bo oretab Kaleb." 
1Samuel25:4 Ak kigas Daudi eng’ ong’atet kele, tilei Nabal kororikab kechirekyik." 
1Samuel25:5 Ak kiiyokto Daudi murenik taman, ak kilenji Daudi murenjoto, Otogoste Karmel, ak obe ole mi Nabal, ak ogat inendet eng’ kainennyu:" 
1Samuel25:6 ak omwachi ko u ni inendet ne meng’isiei eng’ kaberuret, Ingoteb kalyet koboten, ak ingoteb kalyet eng’ gong’ung’, ak ingoteb kalyet koboto tugul che itinye." 
1Samuel25:7 Ak kaagas nguno kele itinye bik che tilei kororikab kechirek: kogotebi mestoweguk kobotech, ama kiyachi kiy ne ya, ama betyi ichek kiy age tugul, eng’ betusiek tugul ye kimi Karmel." 
1Samuel25:8 Teebe murenjotoguget, si komwaun; noto anyun ingonyor chamet murenjoto eng’ taing’ung’; amu kagibwa eng’ betut ne mie: asomin anyun ale, igochi otwogiguk, ak wering’ung’ Daudi, kiy age tugul ne itinye." 
1Samuel25:9 Ak kingoit murenjoto bo Daudi, komwachi Nabal ko u ng’alechato tugul eng’ kainetab Daudi, ak kosisyo." 
1Samuel25:10 Ak kiwolji Nabal otwogikab Daudi, kolenji, Daudi ko ng’o? Ak weritab Jesii ko ng’o? Chang’ otwogik betusiechu che mwee chi age tugul kiptaiyandennyi." 
1Samuel25:11 Araso, kanam amitwogikyuk, ak beekyuk, ak banyek che kaeng’ji bikyuk che tilei kororikab kechirek, ak agochi bik che mangen ole bunu?" 
1Samuel25:12 Kiwelelgei anyun murenjoto bo Daudi, ak koweektagei, ak kiba komwachi inendet ko u ng’alechuto tugul." 
1Samuel25:13 Ak kilenji Daudi bikyik, Ingorat chi tugul rotwennyi bo chok. Ak kirat chi tugul rotwennyi bo chok; ak kirat Daudi agine rotwennyi bo chok; ak kitogosta murenik olo bo bogol ang’wan kosub Daudi; ak kitebi murenik bogolwogik aeng’u korib tuguk." 
1Samuel25:14 Ago kimwachi age eng’ murenjoto Abigail osotiotab Nabal, kolenji, Keero, kiiyok Daudi bik kobwa eng’ ong’atet, kobwa kogat kiptaiyandennyo; ak kinerekyi ichek." 
1Samuel25:15 Ago kiyaiywech ne mie kot bichoto, ama amech kiy, ama betwech kiy, ye kita kemi tugul, ye kigimi kewanin:" 
1Samuel25:16 ak kiek ichek ng’otwennyo eng’ achek kemoi ak bet, betusiek tugul ye kigimitei tugul ak ichek, kiyagi kechirek." 
1Samuel25:17 Nai anyun ak ibwat kit ne iyae; amu kigetilji yaitiet kiptaiyandennyo, ak gonnyi tugul: amu inendet ko weritab Belial ne siirtoot, kot ko maimuchi chi kotwekyi." 
1Samuel25:18 Kichirjiren anyun Abigail, ak konam makatinik bogol aeng’ ak sotonik aeng’ che bo divaik, ak kechirek mut che kageeny che chobotin, ak kerutik mut che nyiitotin bek che kagegel, ak temenik bogol che mi sabibuk che yaamnyotin, ak makatinik bogol aeng’ che bo mogoonik, ak kiratyi sigirok." 
1Samuel25:19 Ak kilenji bikyik, Oba ondoena; ogeero, anyone asubwok. Ago ma mwachi manong’otiondennyi Nabal." 
1Samuel25:20 Ak ye kita kobunei sigiriennyi, kochortagei kobun ole ma toogu eng’ tulwet, ogeero, kichorugei Daudi ak bikyik kotoorjingei inendet; ak kituiye ichek." 
1Samuel25:21 Kigale Daudi, Kaga, kiarib buch iman tuguk tugul che kitinyei chichi, eng’ ong’atet, kot ko ma bet kiy eng’ tugukyik tugul: ak kagoweekwa yaitiet eng’ ne mie." 
1Samuel25:22 Ingoyachi Kamuktaindet ko u noto bunikab Daudi, ak kotes, ngot abagakte kiy age tugul ne nenyi mutai kaeech, agot lakwet agenge ne ng’etet." 
1Samuel25:23 Ak kingogeer Abigail Daudi, kochorgei kochok eng’ sigiriennyi, ak kobutyi taitab Daudi, kong’uruk kotiing’e toget ng’ony." 
1Samuel25:24 Ak kiibutyi kelyekyik, ak kolenji, Ingobunja yaitioni, kiptaiyandennyu, ingobunja: ak asain ale, chamji cheptang’ung’ ne otwoget kong’alal igas, ak igasyi cheptang’ung’ ne otwoget, ng’alekyik." 
1Samuel25:25 Asain kiptaiyandennyu ale, mat iit chichi bo Belial, inendet Nabal: amu ko u kit ne u kainennyi, ko u noto inendet; kainennyi ko Nabal, ak tinyei abusnatet; ago ma ageer ane cheptang’ung’ ne otwogindet, murenjoto bo kiptaiyandennyu che kigeyogu." 
1Samuel25:26 Ara anyun kiptaiyandennyu, ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ak ko u ye sobei sobondang’ung’, ak ko u ye kietenen Jehovah si metumde korotik, si meyaaktochigei mugetut eng’ eung’ung’, noto anyun, ingoigei buniguk Nabal, ak ichek che cheng’jin yaitiet kiptaiyandennyu." 
1Samuel25:27 Ingigochi kagochinoni kaipchin otwogindeng’ung’ kiptaiyandennyu, ingigochi murenik che isuboti kiptaiyandennyu." 
1Samuel25:28 Asain ale, nyochi kaat cheptang’ung’ ne otwogindet, lelutiennyi: amu igimiti Jehovah iman gotab kiptaiyandennyu, amu yaei kiptaiyandennyu lugosiekab Jehovah; ama kinyorjinin yaitiet eng’ betusieguk tugul." 
1Samuel25:29 Ak nganda ng’eet chi koonatin, ak kocheng’ sobondang’ung’, ko kigiratyi sobondab kiptaiyandennyu ratutietab sobondo koboto Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; ak wirtoi inendet sobondab buniguk, ko u ye kiwirtoe kondab borowet." 
1Samuel25:30 Ak ye kagoyachi Jehovah kiptaiyandennyu ko u mieindo tugul ne kimwaitaenen, ak kondein iegu bounindetab Israel;" 
1Samuel25:31 ko maegu nito arogenet eng’ inye, ama egu kanagutietab muguleldo eng’ kiptaiyandennyu, ngot ko kiitumde korotik buch, anan ngot ko kigoyaaktochigei mugetut kiptaiyandennyu: ak ye tun kagoyachi Jehovah kiptaiyandennyu kit ne mie, ibwat anyun cheptang’ung’ ne otwogindet." 
1Samuel25:32 Ak kilenji Daudi Abigail, Iberurot Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne kaiyogun rani, itorokwa:" 
1Samuel25:33 ak iberurot ng’omnateng’ung’, ak iberurot aginye, ne kaetena rani si matumde korotik, amayaaktochigei mugetut eng’ eunnyu." 
1Samuel25:34 Amu iman, ko u ye sobei Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne kaetena si mayaun kit ne ya, nda ma ichogu itorokwa, ta kama kong’etyin Nabal agot lakwet agenge ne ng’etet, mutai kaeech." 
1Samuel25:35 Kitaach anyun Daudi tuguk che kiga ipchi inendet, osotiondonoto: ak kilenji Daudi inendet, Togoste ui ga eng’ kalyet; keero, kaagasun ng’aleguk, kaachamin." 
1Samuel25:36 Ak kiwa Abigail ole mi Nabal; ak keero, kitinyei igorta eng’ gonnyi, ne u igortab laitoriat; ak kibaibai muguleldab Nabal eng’ orinnyi, amu kiga bogit kot: ma mwachi kiy amun inendet, ne ming’in anan ne o, agoi koeech." 
1Samuel25:37 Ak karon, ko kagogesgei bogitetab Nabal, komwachi osotiondennyi inendet tuguchuto tugul, ak kime muguleldanyi, ak koigei inendet koita." 
1Samuel25:38 Ak kingogesgei olo bo betusiek taman, kobir Jehovah Nabal, ak kime." 
1Samuel25:39 Ak kingogas Daudi kole, kagome Nabal, kole, Iberurot Jehovah, ne kigoruokyinewa Nabal agobo chubet ne kichuba, ak kiete otwogindennyi yaitiet: ak kiweekyi Jehovah metitab Nabal yaitiennyi ne kiyai. Ak kiiyokto Daudi keng’alalji Abigal, si komut koek osotiondennyi." 
1Samuel25:40 Ak kingoit otwogikab Daudi ole mi Abigail eng’ Karmel, kong’alalji, kolenji, Kagoyokwech Daudi kebwa ole imi, si kimutin iegu osotiondennyi." 
1Samuel25:41 King’eet anyun ak kong’uruk, kotiing’e togennyi ng’ony, ak kole, Keero, otwogindet cheptang’ung’ ne otwogindet ne iuni kelyekab otwogikab kiptaiyandennyu." 
1Samuel25:42 Ak kichirjiren Abigail, ak kong’eet ak kolany sigiriet, koboto tibik mut che kitinyei che kiisub inendet; ak kiwa kosub bikab Daudi, ak kiek osotiondennyi." 
1Samuel25:43 Kiimut Daudi agine Ainoam ne bo Jesreel; ak kiek tuwai osotikyik. 
1Samuel25:44 Kiga kogochi Saul Mikal cheptanyi, ne ki osotiotab Daudi, Palti weritab Lais, ne ki bo Galim." 
1Samuel26:1 Ak kibwa Sipik ole mi Saul eng’ Gibea, ak kolenji, Maunyegei Daudi eng’ tulwetab Akila, ne tokyingei ong’atet?" 
1Samuel26:2 Kong’eet anyun Saul kochortagei kwo ong’atetab Sip, komi ak murenik elfusiek somok che bo Israel che kigilewen, koba kocheng’at Daudi eng’ ong’atetab Sip." 
1Samuel26:3 Ak kiteech Saul tulwetab Akila, ne tokyingei ong’atet, ne negite oret. Ago kitebe Daudi ong’atet, ak kigeer kole kogosub inendet Saul konyo ong’atet." 
1Samuel26:4 Kiiyokto anyun Daudi segeik, ak kinai komie kole kogonyo Saul." 
1Samuel26:5 Ak king’eet Daudi ak konyo ole kiga teech Saul: ak kigeer Daudi ole kirue Saul, koboto Abner weritab Ner, ne ki kiptaiyatab lugennyi: kirue Saul kwenutab karisiek, ak kiteech bik koyiem inendet." 
1Samuel26:6 Kiwol anyun Daudi ak kolenji Aimelek Hitindet, ak Abisai weritab Seruia, ng’etab kametab Joab, Ng’o ne nyonei kechortage tuwai ole mi Saul eng’ nganaset? Kole Abisai, Kichortoige tuwai." 
1Samuel26:7 Kiit anyun Daudi ak Abisai kemoi ole mi bik: ak ogeero, kirue Saul kwenutab karisiek, ko lumdaat ng’otinnyi eng’ ye negite metinnyi: ak kiruei Abner koboto bik ko kayiem inendet." 
1Samuel26:8 Kolenji anyun Abisai Daudi, Kagonde Kamuktaindet eung’ung’ bunyondeng’ung’ rani: ara anyun, asomin ale chamwa atoor inendet eng’ ng’otit, atoore agenge, kosore ak matoore kogeny asakyini." 
1Samuel26:9 Ak kilenji Daudi Abisai, Amebar: amu ng’o ne imuchi kochuul eunnyi kobar ne iilat ne bo Jehovah, ama nyor ng’ogisto?" 
1Samuel26:10 Ak kile Daudi, ko u ye sobei Jehovah, kobarei Jehovah inendet; anan koityi betunnyi ne meei; anan kwo luget kwo komechi oloto." 
1Samuel26:11 Ingolooit eng’ ane eng’ Jehovah si machuul eunnyu abar ne iilat ne bo Jehovah: ago asomin ale, ib ng’otit ne mi ye negite metinnyi, ak sotetab beek, ak kebe." 
1Samuel26:12 Kiib anyun Daudi ng’otit ak sotetab beek che kimi ye negite metitab Saul; ak kiba ama keer chi, anan konai, ama kos chi age tugul: amu kiruitos tugul; amu kiibutyi ichek ruondo ne nyigis ne kibunu Jehovah." 
1Samuel26:13 Yeityo kwo Daudi bitonin, ak kotonon eng’ tulwet barak eng’ ole loo; ki loochin kot:" 
1Samuel26:14 ak kitwekyi Daudi bik, koboto Abner weritab Ner, kolenji, Mewolu kiy inye Abner? Ak kiwol Abner kole, I ng’o inye, ne itwekyini laitoriat?" 
1Samuel26:15 Ak kilenji Daudi Abner, Tos, ma i muren? Ng’o ne ogerge eng’ Israel? Amu nee anyun si merib kiptaiyandeng’ung’ laitoriat? Amu konyo chi eng’ bik konyo kobar lairtoriat kiptaiyandeng’ung’." 
1Samuel26:16 Ma mie kii koiyai. Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, konyoljinok obegu, amu ma orib kiptaiyandeng’wong’, ne iilat ne bo Jehovah. Ogeer anyun-o, ole mi ng’otitab laitoriat, ak sotetab beek ne komi ye negite metinnyi." 
1Samuel26:17 Ak kinai Saul kutitab Daudi, ak kole, Kuting’ung’ noto, inye werinnyu Daudi? Ak kile Daudi, Ee, kutinnyu noto kiptaiyandennyu, ee, laitoriat." 
1Samuel26:18 Ak kile, Amu nee si kosubot kiptaiyandennyu otwogindennyi? Koayai nee? Anan nee yaitiet ne mi eunekyuk?" 
1Samuel26:19 Noto anyun, asomin ale, ingogas kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat ng’alekab otwogindennyi. Ngot ko Jehovah ne kiing’eetin iyaiywa ne ya, ko ingotaach inendet kagochinet: ago ngot ko werikab bik, ko ingoek ichek che chubotin eng’ taitab Jehovah; amu kagoona ichek rani si ma kinamge ak bororietab Jehovah, kolen, Ui iot kanamonik." 
1Samuel26:20 Ara anyun, amat kotumjigei ng’ony korotikyuk ole looe ole mi Jehovah amu kanyo laitoriatab Israel kocheng’ kimitiat, ko u ye cheng’ei chito taiywet eng’ tulonok." 
1Samuel26:21 Kole anyun Saul, Kaayai tengekto: weeige werinnyu Daudi: amu ma ayaun kiy ne ya kogeny, amu kabunji kamanut ne o rani sobondanyu eng’ taing’ung’: keero, kaayai berberindo, ak kaalel mising’." 
1Samuel26:22 Ak kiwol Daudi kole, Keer ng’otit-o, ee laitoriat! Ingonyo anyun age eng’ murenik bitoni, konyo koib." 
1Samuel26:23 Ak yaakyin Jehovah chi age tugul imandanyi ak mieindanyi: amu kagondein Jehovah eunnyu rani, ak ma acham achuul eunnyu abar ne iilat ne bo Jehovah." 
1Samuel26:24 Ak kogeny, keero, katinyei rani sobondang’ung’ kamanutiet ne o eng’ tainnyu, ko u noto ingosich agine sobondanyu kamanutiet ne o eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak ingosorua inendet eng’ nyalilda tugul." 
1Samuel26:25 Kolenji anyun Saul Daudi, Ingiberurin werinnyu Daudi: ta iyae tuguk che eechen, ak ibelisiei iman. Kwo anyun Daudi bandanyi, ak kiweek Saul kwo oldanyi." 
1Samuel27:1 Ak kimwa Daudi eng’ muguleldanyi kole, Tatun amechini eunekab Saul: mami kiy ne mie kosiir amwechi emetab Pilistik; si kogesgei kamang’unetab Saul, si ma kocheng’a kogeny eng’ kiwotosiek tugul che bo Israel: si achilile eunekyik." 
1Samuel27:2 Ak king’eet Daudi kolanda, inendet ak bik bogol lo che kimi koboto inendet, kot koit ole mi Akis weritab Maok, laitoriatab Gat." 
1Samuel27:3 Ak kitebi Daudi ak Akis eng’ Gat, inendet koboto bikyik, chi tugul ak bikab gonnyi, agot Daudi ak osotikyik aeng’, Ainoam Jesreelyot, ak Abigail Chepkarmelyot, ne ki osotiotab Nabal." 
1Samuel27:4 Ak kigimwachi Saul kelenji, kogomwechi Daudi Gat: ak mata kocheng’at inendet kogeny." 
1Samuel27:5 Ak kilenji Daudi Akis, Ngot ko koanyoru mieindo eng’ taing’ung’, ingogona ichek oldo eng’ age eng’ nganasokab emoni; si kobiit ameny oloto: amu kalya si komeny otwogindeng’ung’ nganasetab laitoriat, koboten?" 
1Samuel27:6 Kogochi anyun Akis inendet Siklag eng’ betunoto: noto anyun, kibunji Siklag laitorinikab Juda agoi ra." 
1Samuel27:7 Ak koitetab betusiek che kimeny Daudi emetab Pilistik ko ki kenyit agenge ak arawek ang’wan. 
1Samuel27:8 Ak kitogosta Daudi ak bikyik kobokyi Gesurik, ak Girsik, ak Amalegik: amu choto ko ki bik che kimenyei emonoto, bik che ki bo keny, eng’ oret ne kibunei kebendi Sur, agoi emetab Misri." 
1Samuel27:9 Ak kibar Daudi emonoto, ama bagakta muren anan kwony kosob, ak kinyaban kechirek ak tuga, ak sigirok, ak tambesik, ak ngoroik; ak kiweek kwo oldab Akis." 
1Samuel27:10 Ak kilenji Akis, Kobar ano ra? Ak kile Daudi, Kagibar Murot ne bo Tai ne bo Juda, ak Murot ne bo Tai ne bo Jeramelik, ak Murot ne bo Tai ne bo Kenik." 
1Samuel27:11 Ma bagakta Daudi muren anan kwony kosob, si maimut koba Gat, amu kile, si ma mwaitech, kole, Kiyai ko u noto Daudi, ak kiyaei ko u noto eng’ bitennyi eng’ betusiek tugul che kimeny emetab Pilistik." 
1Samuel27:12 Ak kiiyan Akis ng’alekab Daudi, kole, Kagogochi bikyik Israel kowech inendet inne; noto anyun egu otwogindennyu agoi." 
1Samuel28:1 Kiiyum Pilistik lugosiekwak eng’ betusiechoto koba luget, kobargei ak Israel. Ak kilenji Akis Daudi, Nai komie ile, kibendi tuwai luget, inye ak mureniguk." 
1Samuel28:2 Ak kilenji Daudi Akis, Noto anyun, inae kit ne yaei otwogindeng’ung’. Ak kilenji Akis Daudi, Noto anyun, ayain iegu ne iribwa metinnyu agoi." 
1Samuel28:3 Kiga kome Samuel, ak kiga korirji Israel tugul inendet, ak kigitupchi Rama, nganasennyi. Kiga koon Saul ichek che kiboisie oik, ak bonik eng’ emet." 
1Samuel28:4 Ak kiiyumgei Pilistik, ak koba koteech Sunem: ak kiiyum Saul Israel tugul, ak koteech Gilboa." 
1Samuel28:5 Ak kingogeer Saul lugetab Pilistik, koiywei, kirukrugen muguleldanyi mising’." 
1Samuel28:6 Ak ye kingolen koteebe Saul Jehovah, ko ma kowolji Jehovah, eng’ karuotitaosiek, anan eng’ Urim, anan eng’ maotik." 
1Samuel28:7 Kolenji anyun Saul otwogikyik, Ocheng’wa kwondo ne boisie oik, si awa ole mi inendet ak ateepse. Ak kilenji otwogikyik inendet, Keero, mi kwondo En-dor ne boisie oik." 
1Samuel28:8 Ak kiwalgei Saul, ak kolaach ngoroik alak, ak kwo inendet koboto bik aeng’ ak kiit kemoi ole kimi kwonyoto: ak kilenji, Asomin ale, ng’orsewa eng’ oindet ne iboisie, si imutwa kotogos chito age tugul ne amwaun kainennyi." 
1Samuel28:9 Ak kilenji kwonyoto inendet, Keero, ingen inye kit ne kigoyai Saul, ko u ye kigoisto eng’ emet icheget che boisie oik, ak bonik: amu nee si iriich sobondanyu, igona ame?" 
1Samuel28:10 Ak kiiyosiechi Saul inendet eng’ Jehovah, kolenji, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ko mami biret ne inyoru agobo kiito." 
1Samuel28:11 Kile anyun kwonyoto, Ng’o ne imache amutun kotogos? Ak kile, Imutwa Samuel kotogos." 
1Samuel28:12 Ak kingogeer kwonyoto Samuel, kowaach eng’ kutit ne o, ak kimwachi kwonyoto Saul kolenji, Amu nee si igena? Amu i Saul inye." 
1Samuel28:13 Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Ameiywei; igeere nee? Ak kilenji kwonyoto Saul, Ageere cheptalelit ne togosu eng’ ng’ony." 
1Samuel28:14 Ak kilenji inendet, Tinyei itondo nee? Ak kile, Boiyot ne togosu; ak ilaachi ngoriet. Ak kinai Saul kole Samuel inendet, ak kiing’uruk kot kotiiny togennyi ng’ony kogutung’ji." 
1Samuel28:15 Ak kimwachi Samuel Saul kolenji, Amu nee si iima, imutwa atogos? Ak kiwolji Saul kolenji, Atinye nyalilda ne ng’wan; amu kabwa Pilistik kebarge, ak kogometa Kamuktaindet, ama kowolwa kiy, eng’ maotik, anan eng’ karuotitaosiek: noto anyun kaguurin, si kobiit iborua kit ne ayae." 
1Samuel28:16 Ak kile Samuel, Amu nee si iteebena, ago kigometen Jehovah, ak kigoek bunyondeng’ung’?" 
1Samuel28:17 Ak kigoboisiechigei Jehovah, ko u ye kimwa eng’ ane: ak kigobetenen Jehovah bounatet, ak kogochi chitab kokweng’ung’, inendet ko Daudi." 
1Samuel28:18 Amu ma igas it kutitab Jehovah, ama isuldochi neregekyik che koromen eng’ Amalek, ko kayaun anyun Jehovah kii rani amu noto." 
1Samuel28:19 Ak kogeny, indoi Jehovah Israel eunekab Pilistik koboten aginye: ak omite mutai kobota inye ak weriguk: ak kogeny indoi Jehovah lugetab Israel eunekab Pilistik." 
1Samuel28:20 Kiibutyi ng’ony Saul anyun kosieb mo, ak kiarogen mising’, amu ng’alekab Samuel: ak kima kota kotinyei kimnatet; amu kima amis eng’ betut komugul anan kemout komugul." 
1Samuel28:21 Ak kinyo kwonyoto ole mi Saul, ak kogeer kole tinyei arogenet ne o, ak kolenji inendet, Keero, kagogas cheptang’ung’ ne otwogindet ng’aleguk, ak kande sobondanyu eunnyi, ak kaagas ng’alek che kemwawa." 
1Samuel28:22 Asomin anyun ale, igas ng’alekab cheptang’ung’ ne otwoget, ak chamwa aibun amitwogik tutigin ande taing’ung’; ak iam, si kobiit isich kimnatet eng’ bandang’ung’." 
1Samuel28:23 Ago kiesio ak kole, Maame. Ago kibirji inendet otwogikyik ak kwonyoto; ak kigas ng’alekwak. Ak king’eet eng’ ng’onyut, ak kwo kotebe itogut." 
1Samuel28:24 Ak kitinyei kwonyoto eng’ go moita ne nerat; ak kichakta, kwo koeny; ak kiinem busiek, ak kokwanykwany, ak kobeel makatinik che ma kinde mermerek:" 
1Samuel28:25 yeityo koib amitwogichoto ak konde taitab Saul ak otwogikyik; ak kiam. Yeityo kong’eetyo, ak koba bandanywa kemounoto." 
1Samuel29:1 Kiiyumji anyun Pilistik lugosiekwak tugul Apek: ak kiteech Israel ye negite kondab beek ne mi Jesreel. 
1Samuel29:2 Kiba anyun kiptainikab Pilistik kobee bogolwogik ak elfusiek: ak kiletu Daudi ak bikyik koboto Akis. 
1Samuel29:3 Yeityo komwa bounikab Pilistik kole, Yaei nee Hebranichu? Ak kilenji Akis bounikab Pilistik, Ma Daudi nito otwogindetab Saul laitoriatab Israel, ne komi kobota eng’ betusiechu anan eng’ kenyisiechu, ak tom anyoru lelut eng’ inendet koboch ngoistogei rani?" 
1Samuel29:4 Ago kinerekyi inendet bounikab Pilistik; ak kilenji bounikab Pilistik inendet, Ilenji chichi koweek, koweektagei oldanyi ole kiiborji, amat kochortagei kwo luget kobotech, si maek bunyondennyo eng’ ole mi luget: amu, nee ne igochin konamgei ak kiptaiyandennyi? Tos ma eng’ metowekab bichu?" 
1Samuel29:5 Ma Daudi nito, ne kitienjingei ichek agobo inendet eng’ ureriosiek kole, Kibar Saul elfusiek, Ak kibar Daudi tamanusiekab elfusiek." 
1Samuel29:6 Kiguur anyun Akis Daudi, ak kolenji, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ko kiitebi eng’ imanda, ak mie eng’ tainnyu mandaeng’ung’ ak nyonuneng’ung’ kobota eng’ luget: amu tom anyorjin yaitiet koboch inyo ole ami agoi rani: agot nganda u noto, ko machamin kiptainik." 
1Samuel29:7 Ara anyun weektege, ui eng’ kalyet, si megochi kiptainikab Pilistik konerekso." 
1Samuel29:8 Ak kilenji Daudi Akis, Koayai nee? Ak koinyorji nee otwogindeng’ung’ koboch ye kiami taing’ung’ agoi rani, si mawe kebarge ak bunikab kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat?" 
1Samuel29:9 Ak kiwolji Akis Daudi kolenji, Angen ale i mie eng’ tainnyu, ko u malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet: ago kagomwa bounikab Pilistik kole, Magibendi tugul luget koboto inendet." 
1Samuel29:10 Noto anyun, muste karon koboto otwogikab kiptaiyandeng’ung’ che koobwane tugul: ak ye ong’eetye karon ko kaeech, ko kalapkeit, obe." 
1Samuel29:11 King’eet anyun Daudi karon mising’, inendet ak bikyik, si koba karon, koweektagei emetab Pilistik. Ak kitogosta Pilistik koba Jesreel." 
1Samuel30:1 Ak kingoit Daudi ak bikyik Siklag eng’ betutab somok, ko kagobokyi Amalegik Murot ne bo Tai, ak Siklag, ak kiga kobar Siklag ak kobeel eng’ mat;" 
1Samuel30:2 Ak kiga koluul kwonyik che kimi yoto, che mengech ak che eechen: ma bar chi age tugul, ago kiluul ak koba." 
1Samuel30:3 Ak kingoit Daudi ak bikyik nganaset, ogeero, kiga kebeel; ak kigiluul osotikwak, ak werikwak, ak tibikwak." 
1Samuel30:4 Ak kiwaach Daudi ak bik che kimi koboto inendet, ak koririo, kot ko ma komuchi koririo." 
1Samuel30:5 Ak kigiluul osotikab Daudi tuwai, Ainoam Jesreelyot, ak Abigail ne ki osotiotab Nabal Karmelindet." 
1Samuel30:6 Ak kiimgei mising’ Daudi, amu kimwa bik kole kilache inendet eng’ koik, amu kiarogenso sobonwekab bik tugul, kiarogen chi age tugul agobo werikyik ak tibikyik: ago kiigimitgei Daudi eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi." 
1Samuel30:7 Ak kilenji Daudi Abiatar tisiindet, weritab Aimelek, Asomin ibwa epod konyo yu. Ak kiib Abiatar epod konyo ole mi Daudi." 
1Samuel30:8 Ak kiteebe Daudi Jehovah kolenji, Ngot asub lugoni, aname? Ak kiwolji kolenji, Isub: amu iname iman, ak ne matiny imutu tugul." 
1Samuel30:9 Kiwa Daudi anyun, koboto murenik bogol lo che kimi koboto inendet, kot koit kererutab Besor, ole kiga tebe bik che kiga ng’et." 
1Samuel30:10 Ago kiisub Daudi bichoto koboto murenik bogol ang’wan: amu kitebi bik bogol wogik aeng’u che kima imuchi kolandae kererutab Besor amu kiga kong’etyo mising’. 
1Samuel30:11 Ak kinyor bichoto Misrindet eng’ kewet, ak kiimutyi Daudi, ak kiigochi amitwogik, ak kiam; ak kiinaga beek koee:" 
1Samuel30:12 ak kiigochi makatiat ne ming’in ne bo mogoonik, ak temenik aeng’ che bo sabibuk che yaamnyotin: ak kingo kagoam kosob: amu kima am kiy, anan koee beek eng’ betusiek somok ak kemousiek somok." 
1Samuel30:13 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet, I bo gab ng’o? Ak ibunu ano? Ak kile, A muren ne bo Misri, a otwogindetab Amalegindet; kibagakta kiptaiyandennyu, amu kiamian eng’ betusiechu somok." 
1Samuel30:14 Kiga kibokyi Murot ne bo Tai ne bo Keretik, ak oldab Juda, ak oldab Kaleb ne mi Murot ne bo Tai; ak kigibeel Siklag eng’ mat." 
1Samuel30:15 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet, Ichame imuta ole mi lugonoto? Ak kile, Iyosiewa eng’ Kamuktaindet, ile mebara, anan indea eunekab kiptaiyandennyu, si amutin ole mi lugonoto." 
1Samuel30:16 Ak kingo kagomut kochortagei, ogeero, kiga yom bichoto ola tugul eng’ emet, koamisiei ak koeeisei, ak kourerendos, amu barunenik che chang’ che kiga luul eng’ emetab Pilistik, ak eng’ emetab Juda." 
1Samuel30:17 Ak kibar Daudi ichek koboch ko karatarat agoi koskoleng’utab betut ne bo aeng’: ama chilil chi agot agenge, kobate murenik bogol ang’wan che kilany tambesik ak komwei." 
1Samuel30:18 Ak kisor Daudi tugul che kiga luul Amalegik: ak kisor Daudi osotikyik tuwai. 
1Samuel30:19 Ak kima bete kiy ichek, ngo ne ming’in anan ngo ne o, anan werik anan ko tibik, anan ko barunenik, anan ko kiy age tugul ne kiga ib: kiib Daudi tugul koweek." 
1Samuel30:20 Ak kikweri Daudi akwotisiek tugul che bo kechirek ak che bo tuga, che kikweri ichek kondoe tuga alak, ak kole, Chuto ko barunenikab Daudi." 
1Samuel30:21 Kiit anyun Daudi ole kimi murenjoto bogolwogik aeng’u, che kiga kong’etyo mising’ kot ko mata komuch kosub Daudi, che kiga mwachi kotebe kererutab Besor: ak kiba kotorokta Daudi, ak kotorokta bik che kimi koboto inendet: ak kingorikyi Daudi bichoto, kogat ichek." 
1Samuel30:22 Kiwol anyun bik tugul che yaachen, ak bikab Belial, eng’ bik che kiga ba ak Daudi, ak kile, Magigochini ichek kiy age tugul eng’ barunenik che kagiweegu, amu kima kibe tugul, kobate kityo kigochin chi tugul osotiondennyi ak lagokyik, si komut ak koba." 
1Samuel30:23 Kole Daudi anyun, Amat oyai ko u noto, che kitupche, eng’ tuguk che kogonech Jehovah, ne koribech, ak koinde eunekyok lugoni koibokyinech." 
1Samuel30:24 Ak ng’o ne kasok eng’ ng’alechu? Amu ko u ole tenitu kebebertab ne wendi luget, kotenitu noto kebebertab ne tebyei koribei tuguk: pcheei koaechin." 
1Samuel30:25 Ak kiek ko u noto koboch betunoto agoi, kiyai koek ng’atutiet ak kayomiset agobo Israel, agoi rani." 
1Samuel30:26 Ak kingonyo Daudi Siklag, koyokyi barunenik boisiekab Juda, choronokyik, kole, Ogeero, kagochineng’wong’ ne bo barunenikab bunikab Jehovah;" 
1Samuel30:27 kiiyokyi che kimi Bet-el, ak che kimi Ramot ne bo Murot ne bo Tai, ak che kimi Jatir;" 
1Samuel30:28 ak che kimi Aroer, ak che kimi Sipmot, ak che kimi Estemoa;" 
1Samuel30:29 ak che kimi Rakal, ak che kimi nganasokab Jerameelik, ak che kimi nganasokab Kenik;" 
1Samuel30:30 ak che kimi Horma, ak che kimi Korasan, ak che kimi Atak;" 
1Samuel30:31 ak che kimi Hebron, ak komoswek tugul che kicham koitei Daudi ak murenikyik." 
1Samuel31:1 Kibargei anyun Pilistik ak Israel: ak kimwei murenikab Israel eng’ taitab Pilistik, ak kiibutyo eng’ tulwetab Gilboa ko kagebar." 
1Samuel31:2 Ak kion Pilistik mising’ Saul ak werikyik, kirikyi; ak kibar Pilistik Jonatan, ak Abinadab, ak Malkisua, werikab Saul." 
1Samuel31:3 Ak kigoromit boriet mising’ eng’ Saul, ak kion inendet mwogik kot koriich; ak kinyalil kot amu mwogichoto." 
1Samuel31:4 Kolenji anyun Saul chito ne kiipchin karikyik, Ng’usu rotweng’ung’ bo chok, ak itoorena; si mabwa bichu ma kimuratan, kotoora, ak kogengeniena. Ago ma cham chito ne kiipchin karikyik; amu kiiywei kot. Konem anyun Saul rotwennyi bo chok, ak kobutyi." 
1Samuel31:5 Ak kingogeer chito ne kiipchin karik kole, kagome Saul, kobutyi agine rotwennyi bo chok, ak kime koboto inendet." 
1Samuel31:6 Kime anyun Saul, koboto werikyik somok, ak chito ne kiipchin karikyik, ak bikyik tugul, eng’ betunak." 
1Samuel31:7 Ak kingogeer bikab Israel che kimi atebwet komosin, ak ichek che kimi Jordan bitonin, kole kagomwei bikab Israel, ak kagome Saul ak werikyik, kobagakta nganasok ak komwei: ak kibwa Pilistik komeny." 
1Samuel31:8 Ak eng’ betut ne kiisubi noto, ye kingobwa Pilistik kobut bik che kiga kibar, konyor Saul ak werikyik somok ko kagobek eng’ tulwetab Gilboa." 
1Samuel31:9 Ak kitil metinnyi, ak koreegune karikyik, ak koyokto kemwaita eng’ emetab Pilistik komoswek tugul, keib ng’alechato koba gotab kanamonikwak, ak koipchi bik." 
1Samuel31:10 Ak kiinde karikyik gotab Astarot: ak koratyi mustanyi inatutab Bet-san. 
1Samuel31:11 Ak kingogas bik che kimenyei Jabes-gilead agobo kit ne kiyachi Pilistik Saul," 
1Samuel31:12 kong’eetyo murenik tugul che nyigonen ak koba eng’ kemout komugul, ak konem mustab Saul ak muswekab werikyik eng’ inatutab Bet-san; ak kiit Jabes, ak kobeel eng’ oloto." 
1Samuel31:13 Ak kiib kowekwak, ak kotupchi ketit kel eng’ Jabes, ak korugutgei betusiek tisab." 
2Samuel1:1 Ak kingobata meetab Saul, ko kagoweek Daudi kobunu baretab Amalegik, ko kagobeni Daudi betusiek aeng’ eng’ Siklag;" 
2Samuel1:2 eng’ betutab somok, ogeero, konyo chito eng’ nganaset ne kimi Saul ko kererotin ngoroikyik, ak komi ng’ung’unyek metinnyi: ak kingoit ole mi Daudi, kobutyi ng’ony, kogutung’ji." 
2Samuel1:3 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet, Ibunu ano? Ak kilenji inendet, Koachilili eng’ nganasetab Israel." 
2Samuel1:4 Ak kiteebe Daudi inendet kolenji, Kitepto ano ng’alek? Asomin ale imwawa. Ak kiwol kole, Kimwei bik eng’ luget, ak kogeny, kiibutyot bik che chang’ ak kobek; ak kigome agine Saul ak Jonatan werinnyi." 
2Samuel1:5 Ak kilenji Daudi murenonoto kimwachin inendet, Inae nee ile kigome Saul ak Jonatan werinnyi?" 
2Samuel1:6 Ak kilenji murenenoto kimwachin inendet, Ye kita ami tulwetab Gilboa, keero, kitiiegei Saul ng’otinnyi; ak keero, kion inendet mising’ karisiek ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek." 
2Samuel1:7 Ak kingowelelgei, kogeera, ak kotwekwa. Ak kiawolji alenji, Ami yu." 
2Samuel1:8 Ak kilenja, I ng’o? Ak kiawolji alenji, A Amalegindet." 
2Samuel1:9 Ak kilenja, Asomin ale, tonon eng’ yu ami, ak ibara, amu kagonama bichiindo; amu ta asobe." 
2Samuel1:10 Atonone anyun yoto kimitei, ak abar, amu kianai eng’ iman ale ma komuchi kosob ko kagobut: ak kianemu kutwetab laitornatet ne kimi metinnyi, ak karnet ne kimi eunnyi, ak kaibu kobwa yu aipchi kiptaiyandennyu." 
2Samuel1:11 Konam anyun Daudi ngoroikyik kogerer; ak kiyai ko u noto bik tugul che kimi ak inendet: 
2Samuel1:12 ak kiiteiyo ak koririo ak korugutgei agoi koskoleny agobo Saul ak Jonatan werinnyi, ak agobo bikab Jehovah, ak gotab Israel; amu kibek eng’ rotokab chok." 
2Samuel1:13 Ak kilenji Daudi murenonoto kimwachin inendet ng’alechato, I bo gab ng’o? Ak kiwol kole, A weritab bunotiot, Amalegindet." 
2Samuel1:14 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet, Kolya si meiywei ichuul eung’ung’ ibar ne iilat ne bo Jehovah?" 
2Samuel1:15 Ak kiguur Daudi age eng’ murenik, ak kilenji, Rikte ak ibar inendet. Ak kieb inendet kome." 
2Samuel1:16 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet, Ingotebe korotiguk meting’ung’ amu kagobaorian kuting’ung’ koruogun, kole, Kiabar ne iilat ne bo Jehovah." 
2Samuel1:17 Ak kirirji Daudi Saul ak Jonatan werinnyi eng’ rirechu: 
2Samuel1:18 ak kimwachi ichek konet bikab Juda tiendab kwanget: ogeero, kigisirji bukuitab Jasar." 
2Samuel1:19 Ee Israel, kigibar torornateng’ung’ eng’ komosweguk che tororen! Kiibututa ano che kimen!" 
2Samuel1:20 Mat omwaite eng’ Gat, Mat obarte eng’ ortinwekab Askelon; Si maboiboitu tibikab Pilistik, Si mailosgei tibikab che ma kimuratan." 
2Samuel1:21 Okwek tulonokab Gilboa, Mat kobiitunenak rewot anan ropta, anan mbarenik che mbarenikab kagochinoik: Amu kigiwirta eng’ tewernatet long’etab inendet ne kim eng’ oloto, Long’etab Saul, ama kiile mwaita." 
2Samuel1:22 Eng’ korotikab che kigibar, Eng’ mwanikab che kimen, Ko ma week let kwangetab Jonatan, Ama week buch rotwetab chok ne bo Saul." 
2Samuel1:23 Ki kororon Saul ak Jonatan ak ki chamotin eng’ sobonwekwak, Ak ma besio eng’ meenywa; Ki chepcheben kosiir kipsichinik, Ki kimen kosiir ng’etunyik." 
2Samuel1:24 Okwek tibikab Israel, oririe agobo Saul, Inendet ne kiilaakwok ngoroik che biriren che bo boiboiyet, Ne kiinde lelestab tahabu ngoroikwok." 
2Samuel1:25 Kiibututa ano che kimen eng’ kwenutab boriet! Kigibar Jonatan eng’ komosweguk che tororen. 
2Samuel1:26 Aarogeni amu inye, tupchennyu Jonatan: Kiigona abaibait mising’: Ki bo kwong’et chamnyeng’ung’ ne kiichama, Kisiirei chamnyetab kwonyik." 
2Samuel1:27 Kiibututa ano che kimen, Ak kibetyo karikab luget!" 
2Samuel2:1 Ak kingobata tuguchuto koteebe Daudi Jehovah kole, Atogoste awe age eng’ nganasokab Juda? Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet, Togoste. Ak kile Daudi, Atogoste awe ano? Ak kilenji, Ui Hebron." 
2Samuel2:2 Kotogosta anyun Daudi oloto, koboto osotikyik aeng’, Ainoam Jesreelyot, ak Abigail ne ki osotiotab Nabal Karmelindet." 
2Samuel2:3 Ak kiimut Daudi bikyik che kimi koboto inendet, kotogosta, chi tugul ak bikab gonnyi: ak kimeny nganasokab Hebron." 
2Samuel2:4 Ak kibwa bikab Juda kobwa koiil Daudi eng’ oloto koek laitoriatab gotab Juda. Ak kimwachi icheget Daudi kolenji, Ki bikab Jabes-gilead che kitubei Saul." 
2Samuel2:5 Ak kiiyokto Daudi bik koba oldab bikab Jabes-gilead, ak kolenji ichek, Ingoberurok Jehovah, amu kioborji mieini kiptaiyandeng’wong’, ne inendet ko Saul, ak kiotub inendet." 
2Samuel2:6 Ak ingoboruok Jehovah ak okwek mieindo ak imanit: ak ayaakwok agane mieinito, amu kioyai kiito." 
2Samuel2:7 Ingogimegitu anyun eunekwok, ak oegu che nyigonen: amu kogome Saul kiptaiyandeng’wong’, ak kogoiila gotab Juda aek laitoriat eng’ ichek." 
2Samuel2:8 Kiga komut Abner weritab Ner, ne ki kiptaiyatab lugetab Saul, Is-boset, weritab Saul, ak komut inendet kolanda Maanaim;" 
2Samuel2:9 kiinde inendet koek laitoriat koboi Gilead, ak koboi Ashurik, ak Jesreel, ak Epraim, ak Benjamin, ak koboi Israel tugul." 
2Samuel2:10 (Ki bo Is-boset weritab Saul kenyisiek artam ye kitau kolaitorani, kilaitoran kenyisiek aeng’.) Ago kiisub gotab Juda Daudi." 
2Samuel2:11 Ak betusiek che kilaitoran Daudi eng’ Hebron eng’ gotab Juda ko ki kenyisiek tisab ak arawek lo. 
2Samuel2:12 Ak kiba Abner weritab Ner, ak otwogikab Is-boset weritab Saul, eng’ Maanaim koba Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:13 Ak kiba Joab weritab Seruia, ak otwogikab Daudi, ak kituiyechi tamboiyotab Gibeon; ak kiibuur, kobuure alak tamboiyot komosi, kobuure alak tamboiyot komosin." 
2Samuel2:14 Ak kilenji Abner Joab, Asomin ale ingong’eetyo murenik kourerenso eng’ tainnyo. Ak kile Joab, Ingong’eetyo." 
2Samuel2:15 King’eetyo anyun koba ak kigiiti; ki taman ak aeng’ che bo Benjamin, ak che bo Is-boset weritab Saul, ak ki taman ak aeng’ che bo otwogikab Daudi." 
2Samuel2:16 Ak kinam age tugul metitab age, ak kotoorgei karasaik eng’ rotokab chok; ak kiibutyo tuwai: kigiguure yoto anyun Helkat-hasurim, ne mitei Gibeon." 
2Samuel2:17 Ak kigoromit boriet mising’ eng’ betunoto; ak kigiterter Abner, koboto bikab Israel, eng’ taitab otwogikab Daudi." 
2Samuel2:18 Ak kimi yoto werik somogu che bo Seruia, Joab, ak Abisai, ak Asael: ak ki chepcheb Asael ko u cheptirgichet." 
2Samuel2:19 Ak kion Asael Abner; ak ma masta kwo eutab tai anan eutab katam ye kionei Abner. 
2Samuel2:20 Yeityo kogusgong’ Abner, ak kole, Inye ni, Asael? Ak kiwol kole, Ane." 
2Samuel2:21 Ak kilenji Abner inendet, Ui taban, eutab tai anan ko ne bo katam, ak inam age eng’ murenjo, ak irebe karikyik. Ago ma cham Asael komasta kobagakta inendet." 
2Samuel2:22 Ak kilenji Abner Asael kogeny, Ui taban, mata isubwa: amu nee si imach atoorin kosorenen? Si ko ta amukta ano anyun ageer togetab Joab ng’etab komet?" 
2Samuel2:23 Ago kiesio komasta: kitoor anyun Abner inendet moet eng’ chileiywotab ng’otit, kosore; ak kiibut eng’ yoto, ak komechi yoto: ak tugul che kiit yoto kiibutyi Asael ak kome, ko kitononso." 
2Samuel2:24 Ago kion Joab ak Abisai Abner: ak kingoit tulwetab Ama, ne mi taitab Gia eng’ oret ne wendi ong’atetab Gibeon, kororokta asista." 
2Samuel2:25 Ak kiiyumgei lagokab Benjamin konamgei ak Abner, koek luget agenge, ak kotononso eng’ tulwet barak." 
2Samuel2:26 Yeityo koguur Abner Joab kolenji, Tos barisiei rotwet agoi? Mengen ile egu ng’wanindo eng’ let? Tianitu si imwachi bik koweek ko mata kosub che tupcho?" 
2Samuel2:27 Ak kile Joab, Ko u ye sobei Kamuktaindet, ko nda kama ing’alal, ta kagoba bik iman atkai karon, ta kama kosubi chi tugul tupchennyi." 
2Samuel2:28 Koguut anyun Joab iriaget, ak kitononso bik tugul, ak mata koon Israel kogeny, anan kota koborio kogeny." 
2Samuel2:29 Ak kiba Abner ak bikyik kemounoto tugul kobun Araba; ak kilandae Jordan, ak kobun tugul, Pitron, ak kiit Maanaim." 
2Samuel2:30 Ak kiweek Joab mata kosub Abner: ak kingo kagoyum bik tugul, ko ki betyotin eng’ otwogikab Daudi bik tamanu ak sogol koboto Asael." 
2Samuel2:31 Ago kiga kobar otwogikab Daudi che bo Benjamin ak murenikab Abner; kot kobek bik bogolwogik somogu ak tamanwogik lo. 
2Samuel2:32 Ak kila Asael, ak kotupchi kereritab kwandanyi, ne kimitei Betlehem. Ak kiba Joab ak bikyik kemout tugul, ak kieekyi Hebron." 
2Samuel3:1 Ak kibiit boriet eng’ betusiek che chang’ eng’ gotab Saul ak gotab Daudi: ak kigimit Daudi kotesak, ago kichecheiyot kimnatetab gotab Saul kwo let." 
2Samuel3:2 Ak kigisikyi Daudi werik eng’ Hebron: ak taitanyi ko ki Amnon, ne kisiche Ainoam Jesreelyot;" 
2Samuel3:3 ak werinnyi ne bo aeng’ ko ki Kileab, ne kisichei Abigail ne ki osotiotab Nabal Karmelindet; ak ne bo somok ko ki Absalom ne kisichei Maaka cheptab Talmai laitoriatab Gesur;" 
2Samuel3:4 ak ne bo ang’wan ko ki Adonija weritab Hagit; ak ne bo mut ko ki Sepatia weritab Abital; 
2Samuel3:5 ak ne bo lo ko ki Itream ne kisichei Egla osotiotab Daudi. Kigisikyi chuto Daudi eng’ Hebron. 
2Samuel3:6 Ak ye kibortos gotab Saul ak gotab Daudi, koyaigei Abner kogimit eng’ gotab Saul." 
2Samuel3:7 Kitinyei Saul chebaigeiyat, ne kigiguure kainennyi Rispa, cheptab Aia: ak kilenji Is-boset Abner, Amu nee si obaige ak chebaigeiyatab baba?" 
2Samuel3:8 Kinerech anyun mising’ Abner amu ng’alekab Is-boset, ak kile, A metitab sesetab Juda? Aborjini mieindo rani gotab Saul kwandang’ung’, ak tupchosiekyik, ak choronokyik, ak ma andein eutab Daudi, ago keruokwa rani ile kalel agobo kwonyi." 
2Samuel3:9 Ingoyachi Kamuktaindet ko u noto Abner, ak kotes, ngot ko mayachi ane Daudi ko u ye kiiyosiechi Jehovah inendet;" 
2Samuel3:10 auto bounatet eng’ gotab Saul, ak alumde ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi koboi Israel ak Juda, koboch Dan agoi Beer-seba." 
2Samuel3:11 Ak kimata komuch kowolji Abner ng’olyot age, amu kiiywei inendet." 
2Samuel3:12 Ak kiiyokto bik Abner koba oldab Daudi ne kita wendi inendet kolenji, Bo ng’o emet? Ak kile, Ngeyai tuwai arorutiet kiyomege, ak keero, mi eunnyu koboten, si amutun Israel tugul kobwa ole imi." 
2Samuel3:13 Ak kile Daudi, Mie; ayae arorutiet koboten: ago kit agenge ne amagenen, noto ko ni, megeere togennyu, agoi imutu korok Mikal cheptab Saul, ye inyone igeera." 
2Samuel3:14 Ak kiiyokto Daudi bik koba oldab Is-boset weritab Saul, kolenji, Kona osotiondennyu Mikal, ne kianyonune koito irirenik bogol che bo Pilistik." 
2Samuel3:15 Ak kiiyokto Is-boset bik koba komutune manong’otiondennyi, noto ko Paltiel weritab Lais." 
2Samuel3:16 Ak kiba ak monong’otiondennyi koriroti manong’otiondennyi, ak kiisub kwonyoto kot koit Baurim. Kilenji anyun Abner inendet, Ui, iweektege: ak kiweek." 
2Samuel3:17 Ak king’alal Abner ak boisiekab Israel, kole, Kiocheng’e koek laitoriandeng’wong’ Daudi eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto:" 
2Samuel3:18 ara anyun oyai: amu kigomwa Jehovah agobo Daudi kole, Asoru bikyuk Israel eng’ otwogindennyu Daudi eng’ eunekab Pilistik, ak eng’ eunekab bunikwak tugul." 
2Samuel3:19 Ak king’alalji Abner Benjamin agine kogas: ak kogeny ko kiwa Abner komwachi Daudi kogas eng’ Hebron tuguk tugul che kigeerei Israel ak gotab Benjamin tugul, kole nyolu." 
2Samuel3:20 Kiit anyun Abner ole mi Daudi eng’ Hebron, koboto bik tiptem. Ak kiyachi igorta Daudi Abner koboto murenjoto kimi koboto inendet." 
2Samuel3:21 Ak kilenji Abner Daudi, Ang’eete awendi, ak ayumji Israel tugul kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, si kobiit koyai arorutiet koboten, ak si kobiit ilaitorane che machei muguleldang’ung’. Ak kimwachi Daudi Abner kwo; ak kiwa eng’ kalyet." 
2Samuel3:22 Ak ogeero, kibwa otwogikab Daudi ak Joab luget, ak kiib barunenik che chang’: ago kima komi Abner koboto Daudi eng’ Hebron; amu kiga komwachi kwo, ak kiga wa eng’ kalyet." 
2Samuel3:23 Kingoit Joab ak luget tugul ne kimi ak inendet, kemwachi Joab kelenji, Kanyo Abner weritab Ner ole mi laitoriat, ak kagolenji kwo, ak kakwa eng’ kalyet." 
2Samuel3:24 Konyo anyun Joab ole mi laitoriat, ak konyo kolenji, Nee ne kaiyai? Keero, kanyo Abner oldang’ung’; amu nee si iunde kwo, ak kakwa iman?" 
2Samuel3:25 Ingen inye Abner weritab Ner ile kanyo koberberin, si konai mandaeng’ung’ ak nyonuneng’ung’, ak konai tuguk tugul che iyae." 
2Samuel3:26 Ak kingonyo Joab eng’ oldab Daudi, koyokto bik kosub Abner, ak koweech inendet eng’ keringetab beek ne bo Sira: ago ma nai Daudi." 
2Samuel3:27 Ak kingo kagoweek Abner konyo Hebron, komut Joab inendet kwo taban agoi kwenutab ormarichet, kwo kong’alalji mutyo, ak kitoor inendet moet eng’ yoto, ak kime, agobo korotikab Asael, ng’etab kamet." 
2Samuel3:28 Ak kingogas Daudi eng’ let, komwa kole, Matinye ane ng’ogisto ak bounatennyu eng’ taitab Jehovah koigeny eng’ korotikab Abner weritab Ner:" 
2Samuel3:29 ingotebe metitab Joab, ak kotebe gotab kwandanyi tugul; amat kobet eng’ gotab Joab chi ne tinyei kuseret, anan ne tinyei mogondos, anan ne tebenoti kirokto, anan ne kibarei eng’ rotwetab chok, anan ko ne matinyei amitwogik." 
2Samuel3:30 Kibar anyun Joab ak Abisai ng’etab kamet, Abner, amu kiga kobar Abner Asael werit ne tupcho, eng’ Gibeon eng’ luget." 
2Samuel3:31 Ak kilenji Daudi Joab, koboto bik tugul che kimi ak inendet, Ogerer ngoroikwok, ak ogermenege kuniok, ak oteiye eng’ taitab Abner. Ak kiisubi Daudi kit ne kigisute." 
2Samuel3:32 Ak kitupchi Abner Hebron: ak kiwaach laitoriat eng’ kutit ne o, ak korir eng’ kereritab Abner; ak kiririo bik tugul." 
2Samuel3:33 Ak kirir laitoriat agobo Abner kole, Konyolji Abner kome ko u ye meei chito ne abusat?" 
2Samuel3:34 Kima ko ratotin euneguk, ak kima kirat kelyeguk eng’ mugurek: Ko u ye ibutyin chito taitab lagokab yaitiet, ko koibut anyun ko u noto. Ak kiririo bik tugul kogeny agobo inendet." 
2Samuel3:35 Ak kibwa bik tugul komwachi Daudi koamis ye kita ko bet; ago kiiyosio Daudi, kole, Ingoyaiywa Kamuktaindet ko u noto, ak kotes, ngot achamjam amitwogik, anan ko kiy age, agoi kororokto asista." 
2Samuel3:36 Ak kigeer bik tugul kioto, ak kiibaibai ichek: amu kit age tugul ne kiyai laitoriat, ko kiibaibai bik tugul." 
2Samuel3:37 Kinai anyun bik tugul ak Israel tugul eng’ betunoto kole, kima koboto laitoriat baretab Abner weritab Ner." 
2Samuel3:38 Ak kilenji laitoriat otwogikyik, Mongen ole kaibut rani bounindet ak ko chito ne o eng’ Israel?" 
2Samuel3:39 A nyalulat rani agot nganda a laitoriat ne kigiil; ak temena bichu werikab Seruia; ingoyaakyi Jehovah yaindetab yaitiet ko u yaitiennyi. 
2Samuel4:1 Ak kingogas Is-boset weritab Saul kole kogome Abner eng’ Hebron, konyalul, ak kiarogenso Israelik tugul." 
2Samuel4:2 Ak kitinyei weritab Saul murenik aeng’ che ki kiptainikab kweanaikab luget: kigiguure kainetab age Baana, ak kigiguure ne bo age Rekab, werikab Rimon Berotindet, ne bo lagokab Benjamin: (amu kiityin Berot agine Benjamin:" 
2Samuel4:3 ak kimwechi Berotik Gitaim, ak kiba koek bunotik eng’ oloto agoi ra.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Kitinyei Jonatan weritab Saul werit ne ki meiyotin kelyek. Ki bo kenyisiek mut inendet ye kiitu ng’alekab Saul ak Jonatan eng’ Jesreel, ak kiganab cheblakwet, ak komwei: ak kichoktoi komwei cheblakwanato, kobut lakwet, ak kiyaagitu kelyek. Ak kigiguure kainennyi Mepiboset." 
2Samuel4:5 Ak kiba werikab Rimon Berotindet, Rekab ak Baana, ak kiit gotab Is-bonet ko kang’wanit asista, ye kiimuunyi bet kwen." 
2Samuel4:6 Ak kiba kwenutab got, ko u bich che kimachei koib nganok; ak kitoor moennyi: ak kichililso Rekab ak Baana, ng’etab kamet." 
2Samuel4:7 Kingoit go anyun ichek konyor koruei eng’ itogunnyi eng’ got ne kirue, kokwer, ak kobar, ak kotil metit, ak koib metit, ak koba kobun oretab Araba kemout komugul." 
2Samuel4:8 Ak kiib metoto bo Is-boset koipchi Daudi eng’ Hebron, ak kolenji laitoriat, Keero metitab Is-boset weritab Saul bunyondeng’ung’, ne kicheng’ei sobondang’ung’; ak kagoyaaktochi Jehovah mugetut rani kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, eng’ Saul, ak iyotennyi." 
2Samuel4:9 Ak kiwolji Daudi Rekab ak Baana ng’etab kamet, werikab Rimon Berotindet, kolenji, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne kigotiach sobondanyu eng’ nyalilda tugul," 
2Samuel4:10 kingomwawa chito age kole, Keero, kogome Saul, kolen kaib logoiywek che miach, anam inendet, ak abar eng’ Siklag, noto ko melekto ne kiagochi inendet agobo logoiywekyik." 
2Samuel4:11 Siirei ne tia, ye kabar bik che yaachen chito ne bo iman eng’ gonnyi komi itogunnyi, ko tos mamage korotikyik eunekwok, ak aistook eng’ ng’ony?" 
2Samuel4:12 Ak king’at Daudi murenikyik, ak kibar ichek, ak kotil eunekwak ak kelyekwak, ak kosonginin eng’ ole negite tamboiyot ne mi Hebron. Ago kiib metitab Is-boset, ak kitupchi kereritab Abner eng’ Hebron." 
2Samuel5:1 Kibwa anyun bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel ole mi Daudi eng’ Hebron, ak komwa, kole, Keero, ki koweguk ak bortang’ung’." 
2Samuel5:2 Eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto, ye ki laitoriat Saul ne kiboiywech, ko inye ne kiimuti Israel komanda, ak komong’u: ak kilenji Jehovah, Ibae bikyuk Israel, ak iegu bounindetab Israel." 
2Samuel5:3 Kibwa anyun boisiek tugul che bo Israel ole mi laitoriat eng’ Hebron; ak kiyai laitoriat Daudi arorutiet koboto ichek eng’ Hebron eng’ taitab Jehovah: ak kiil Daudi koek laitoriat koboi Israel. 
2Samuel5:4 Ki bo Daudi kenyisiek sosom ye kitau kolaitorani, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek artam." 
2Samuel5:5 Kilaitoran eng’ Hebron kobou Juda kenyisiek tisab ak arawek lo: ak kilaitoran eng’ Jerusalem kenyisiek sosom kobou Israel tugul ak Juda. 
2Samuel5:6 Yeityo kwo laitoriat ak bikyik Jerusalem koba kobargei ak Jebusik, bik che kimenyei emonoto: che kimwachi Daudi kolenji, Ngot ko meiste kipkoratinik ak che ing’waldos, ko menyone oli: kolen, maimuchi Daudi konyo olito." 
2Samuel5:7 Ago kinam Daudi irimetab Sion; noto ko nganasetab Daudi. 
2Samuel5:8 Ak kile Daudi eng’ betunoto, Chi age tugul ne barei Jebusik, ko ingotogosta kwo berechitab beek, kwo kobar che ing’waldos ak kipkoratinik, che wechei Daudi eng’ sobondanyi. Noto anyun, mwaei ichek kole, mitei kipkoratinik ak che ing’waldos; maimuchi konyo go." 
2Samuel5:9 Kimeny anyun Daudi irimonoto, ak koguure nganasetab Daudi. Ak kiteech Daudi komoswek tugul koboch Milo agoi orit." 
2Samuel5:10 Ak kieet Daudi kotesak; amu kimi Jehovah Kamuktaindetab lugosiek koboto inendet. 
2Samuel5:11 Ak kiiyokto Iram laitoriatab Turo bik koba oldab Daudi, koibei taragonik; ak kiiyokto musogik, ak che waei koik: ak kiteekyi got Daudi." 
2Samuel5:12 Ak kinai Daudi kole kigogimit Jehovah inendet koek laitoriat ne bou Israel, ak kinai kole kigotoror inendet bounatennyi agobo bikyik Israel." 
2Samuel5:13 Ak kiimutyigei Daudi chebaigeinik alak ak osotik alak eng’ Jerusalem, ko kagonyo eng’ Hebron: ak kita kesikyi Daudi werik ak tibik." 
2Samuel5:14 Ak chu ko kainaikab che kigisikyi inendet eng’ Jerusalem; Samua, ak Sobab, ak Natan, ak Solomon," 
2Samuel5:15 ak Ibar, ak Elisua, ak Nepeg, ak Japia;" 
2Samuel5:16 ak Elisama, ak Eliada, ak Elipelet." 
2Samuel5:17 Ak kingogas Pilistik kole kigiil Daudi koek laitoriat koboi Israel, kotogosta Pilistik tugul koba kocheng’ Daudi; ak kigas Daudi ak kichortagei kwo irimet." 
2Samuel5:18 Ak kibwa Pilistik ak koyom atebwetab Repaim. 
2Samuel5:19 Ak kiteebe Daudi Jehovah kolenji, Awe kebargei ak Pilistik? Indoi ichek eunnyu? Ak kilenji Jehovah Daudi, Togoste: amu andoi iman Pilistik eung’ung’." 
2Samuel5:20 Ak kiit Daudi Baal-perasim, ak kibar Daudi ichek eng’ yoto; ak kile, Kagotui Jehovah bunikyuk eng’ tainnyu, ko u mogochek. Kiguure anyun yoto Baal- perasim." 
2Samuel5:21 Ak kibagakta kanamonikwak eng’ yoto, ak kiib Daudi koboto bikyik." 
2Samuel5:22 Kitogos Pilistik kogeny ne bo aeng’, ak koyom atebwetab Repaim." 
2Samuel5:23 Ak ye kiteebe Daudi Jehovah, kolenji, Metogoste: alagu batenywa, ak iche ichek eng’ ye itoorjingei ketikab logoek." 
2Samuel5:24 Ak ye igas cheetab banda eng’ ketichato bo logoek barak, ing’eet ichakte: amu kagondoenen Jehovah kobar lugetab Pilistik." 
2Samuel5:25 Ak kiyai Daudi ko u noto ko u ye king’at Jehovah; ak kibar Pilistik koboch Geba agoi koit Geser. 
2Samuel6:1 Ak kiiyum Daudi kogeny murenik tugul che bo Israel che kigilewen, elfusiek sosom." 
2Samuel6:2 Ak king’eet Daudi, kwo koboto bik tugul che kimi ak inendet, eng’ Baale Juda, koba koib moingetab Kamuktaindet, ne kigimwaitae Kainet, kainetab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne tebe kerubisiek." 
2Samuel6:3 Ak kiinde moingetab Kamuktaindet karit ne leel, ak kiib konyo eng’ gotab Abinadab ne kimi tulwet: ak kikweri werikab Abinadab, Usa ak Ahio, karinato leel." 
2Samuel6:4 Ak kiib konyo eng’ gotab Abinadab ne kimi tulwet, koboto moingetab Kamuktaindet: ak kiindoe Ahio moingonoto." 
2Samuel6:5 Ak kibut Daudi ak got tugul ne bo Israel eng’ taitab Jehovah, kibugandisiek che kigiyae ketikab biribiriet, koboto ketubosiek, ak kibugandinik, ak eng’ sugutisiek che mengechen, ak eng’ ndurerusiek, ak eng’ sanisiek che cheeitos." 
2Samuel6:6 Ak kingoit ichek ruanyut ne kiborse ne bo Nakon, koyogoito Usa eunnyi kotokyi moingetab Kamuktaindet, ak kinam; amu kiterteriot eik." 
2Samuel6:7 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Usa; ak kibir Kamuktaindet inendet eng’ yoto amu lelutiennyi; ak kimechi yoto kimi moingetab Kamuktaindet. 
2Samuel6:8 Ak kima cham Daudi, amu kibar Jehovah Usa: ak kiguure yoto Peres-usa, agoi ra." 
2Samuel6:9 Ak kiiywei Daudi Jehovah betunoto: ak kimwa kole, Imuktoi ano moingetab Jehovah konyo ole ami?" 
2Samuel6:10 Ma cham Daudi anyun koib moingetab Jehovah konyo ole mi inendet eng’ nganasetab Daudi; ago kiib Daudi kwo taban kwo gotab Obed-edom Getindet. 
2Samuel6:11 Ak kitebe moingetab Jehovah gotab Obed-edom Getindet arawek somok: ak kiiberur Jehovah Obed-edom, ak gonnyi tugul." 
2Samuel6:12 Ak kigimwachi Daudi kelenji, Kigoberur Jehovah gotab Obed-edom, ak tugukyik tugul, amu moingetab Kamuktaindet. Ak kiwa Daudi koib moingetab Kamuktaindet eng’ boiboiyet eng’ gotab Obed-edom kotogos konyo nganasetab Daudi." 
2Samuel6:13 Ak kingo kagoba kakwautik lo icheget che kiibei moingetab Jehovah, koeny eito ne bungus ak age ne akwai." 
2Samuel6:14 Ak kiureren Daudi eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ kimnatennyi tugul; ak kigermenegei Daudi epod ne bo katanit. 
2Samuel6:15 Kiib anyun Daudi ak got tugul ne bo Israel moingetab Jehovah, kotienonu ak koguutonu iriagok." 
2Samuel6:16 Ak kingoit moingetab Jehovah nganasetab Daudi, koiit Mikal cheptab Saul eng’ tirisiet, ak kogeer laitoriat Daudi kotorombeni kourereni eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kisas inendet eng’ muguleldanyi." 
2Samuel6:17 Ak kiib moingetab Jehovah konyo go, ak konde yetanyi, eng’ kwenutab emait ne kiga koteekyi Daudi: ak kiigoito Daudi kagochinoik che kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Samuel6:18 Ak kingo kagoges Daudi kagoitoetab kagochinet ne kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet, koberur bik eng’ kainetab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
2Samuel6:19 Ak kipchechi bik tugul eng’ tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel, murenik ak kwonyik, kogochi chi age tugul makatiat, ak bendo, ak makatiatab sabibuk che yaamnyotin. Kiba anyun bik tugul kwo chi tugul gonnyi." 
2Samuel6:20 Yeityo koweek Daudi koberur bikab gonnyi. Ak kinyo sang’ Mikal cheptab Saul kotorok Daudi, ak kole, Ka itororot ne tia, laitoriatab Israel rani, ne kang’anygei rani eng’ taitab otwogikyik che tibik che bo otwogikyik, ko u age eng’ kiptangoinik che ng’anyegei ama iliani!" 
2Samuel6:21 Ak kilenji Daudi Mikal, Kagaureren eng’ taitab Jehovah, ne kilewena asiir kwandang’ung’, ak asiir gonnyi tugul, kondea aek bounindet eng’ bikab Jehovah, aboi Israel: noto anyun, aurereni eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Samuel6:22 Ak ta kesasa kosiir nito, ak ageerege aegu ne ming’in: ago agobo tibicho otwogik che kemwa, koteecha icheget." 
2Samuel6:23 Ak ma sich Mikal cheptab Saul lakwa agoi betutab meennyi. 
2Samuel7:1 Ak ye kingomeny laitoriat gonnyi, ak kogochi Jehovah inendet kamuung’et eng’ bunikyik tugul che kimi eng’ komoswek tugul," 
2Samuel7:2 kolenji laitoriat Natan maotiot, Keero, amenye gotab taragonik, ago menyei moingetab Kamuktaindet angok orit." 
2Samuel7:3 Ak kilenji Natan laitoriat, Ui, ak iyai tugul che mi muguleldang’ung; amu mi Jehovah koboten." 
2Samuel7:4 Ak kiityi Natan ng’olyotab Jehovah kemounoto, kolenji," 
2Samuel7:5 Ui imwachi otwogindennyu Daudi, ilenji, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Iteekwa got ne amenye?" 
2Samuel7:6 Amu tom ameny go koboch betut ne kiamutu lagokab Israel eng’ Misri, agoi betuni, ago kiawendote emait ak gotab moinget." 
2Samuel7:7 Eng’ komoswek tugul ole kiawendate ak lagok tugul che bo Israel, ko tos kiamwachi ng’olyo age eng’ ortinwekab Israel che kiang’at kobai bikyuk Israel, alenji, Amu nee si ma oteekwa got ne bo taragonik?" 
2Samuel7:8 Ara anyun, imwachini otwogindennyu Daudi ko u ni, ilenji, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole, Kiamutun eng’ biutab kechirek, eng’ kayagetab kechirek, si kobiit iegu bounindet eng’ bikyuk, ibou Israel:" 
2Samuel7:9 ak kiatebi koboten eng’ oldo tugul ole kiiwe, ak kiaiste buniguk tugul eng’ taing’ung’; ak aeeti kaineng’ung’, ko u kainetab bik che eechen eng’ ng’ony." 
2Samuel7:10 Ak alewenjini yeto bikyuk Israel, ak amine ichek, si kobiit komeny yetanywa, ak ma kiutoi kogeny; anan ko ta konyalil ichek lagokab yaitiet kogeny, ko u eng’ tai," 
2Samuel7:11 ak koboch betut ne kiang’at kiruogik koboi bikyuk Israel; ak agonin imuuny eng’ buniguk tugul. Ak mwaun Jehovah kogeny kole teegun got Jehovah. 
2Samuel7:12 Ak ye igesgei betusieguk, ak oruiye ak kwanisieguk, ang’eet iyoteng’ung’ ne biitu let, ne bunu bortang’ung’, ak agimit bounatennyi." 
2Samuel7:13 Tun teekyin got inendet kainennyu, ak agimit ng’echeretab laitornatetab bounatennyi koigeny." 
2Samuel7:14 Aegu kwandanyi, ak koek werinnyu: ngot koyai tengekto, atigone inendet kiroktab bik, ak atigone birutikab lagokab bik;" 
2Samuel7:15 ago maistoegei inendet rirenennyu, ko u ye kiarebe Saul, inendet ne kiaiste eng’ taing’ung’." 
2Samuel7:16 Ak kigimiti gong’ung’ ak bounateng’ung’ koigeny eng’ taing’ung’: kigimiti ng’echeretab laitornateng’ung’ agoi koigeny. 
2Samuel7:17 King’alalji Natan Daudi ko u ole teptoi ng’alechoto tugul, ak ko u ng’ang’utioni tugul." 
2Samuel7:18 Yeityo kwo go laitoriat, kwo kotebi ng’ony eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kole, A ng’o, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ak nee gonnyu, kot imutwa agoi ra?" 
2Samuel7:19 Ak kiek nito kit ne ming’in eng’ taing’ung’, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah; ago kaing’alal kogeny agobo gotab otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ betusiek che chang’ che bwanei; keng’alale kiito agine ko u ye u bik, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
2Samuel7:20 Ak nee age ne ta komuchi Daudi komwaun? Amu ingen inye otwogindeng’ung’, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
2Samuel7:21 Amu kaiyai etunatoni tugul agobo ng’olyondeng’ung’, ak ko u muguleldang’ung’ inyege, si kobiit igochi otwogindeng’ung’ konai." 
2Samuel7:22 I o amu noto, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet: amu mami ne ogerge, ama mi Kamuktaindet age kobatenen, ko u eng’ tugul che kigegas eng’ itikyok." 
2Samuel7:23 Ak ngoro bororiet ne kergei ak biguk, choto Israel, che kiwa Kamuktaindet kotiakyigei koek bikyik, ak koyachigei kainet, ak koyai tuguk che eechen agobo okwek, ak tuguk che bo kamuiset agobo emeng’ung’ eng’ taitab biguk che kiitiach eng’ Misri koek cheguk, eng’ bororiosiek ak cheptalelisiekwak?" 
2Samuel7:24 Kiigimityigei biguk Israel koek biguk koigeny; ak kiiegu inye Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa. 
2Samuel7:25 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet, igimit koigeny ng’olyot ne kiimwa agobo otwogindeng’ung’, ak agobo gonnyi, ak iyai ko u ye kaimwa." 
2Samuel7:26 Ak ingitoror kaineng’ung’ koigeny, kele, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko Kamuktaindet ne bou Israel: ak kigimiti koigeny gotab otwogindeng’ung’ Daudi eng’ taing’ung’." 
2Samuel7:27 Amu kiing’ang’ji inye otwogindeng’ung’, ee Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ilenji, Ateegun got: kanyiganit anyun otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ muguleldanyi kosain saoni." 
2Samuel7:28 Ara anyun, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, i Kamuktaindet, ak ko iman ng’aleguk, ak kaiyomisyi otwogindeng’ung’ kii mie:" 
2Samuel7:29 ara anyun, ingobaibain iberur gotab otwogindeng’ung’ si kobiit koteb koigeny eng’ taing’ung’: amu kaimwa inye, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ak ingoek ne iberurot koigeny gotab otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ kaberureng’ung’." 
2Samuel8:1 Ak kingobata nito kobar Daudi Pilistik ak koterter ichek: ak kireb Daudi Metegama eng’ eunekab Pilistik. 
2Samuel8:2 Ak kibar Moab, ak kiikwa ichek eng’ borowet, king’at koruiyo eng’ ng’ony, ak kiikwa eng’ boroonik aeng’ bik che kibarei kobek, ak kichamji kosopcho che bo borowet ne nyiitat. Ak kiek Moabik otwogikab Daudi, ak kiib kagochinoik." 
2Samuel8:3 Kibar kogeny Daudi Hadadeser weritab Rehob, laitoriatab Soba, ye kiwendi koweechi bounatennyi kogeny eng’ Ainet." 
2Samuel8:4 Ak kirebe Daudi inendet murenik elfut agenge ak bogol tisab che kilanyei mbartanyisiek, ak elfusiek tiptem che kibunei kelyek: ak kieb Daudi kutung’oikab mbartanyisiek tugul che kiichuuti karisiek, ago kiituch eng’ choto che yamei karisiek bogol." 
2Samuel8:5 Ak kingobwa Suriekab Damasko kotoret Hadadeser laitoriatab Soba, kobar Daudi bik elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’ eng’ Suriek." 
2Samuel8:6 Kiinde anyun Daudi irimosiek Suria ne bo Damasko: ak kiek Suriek otwogikab Daudi, ak kiib kagochinoik. Ak kiigochi Jehovah Daudi katerteret eng’ komosta age tugul ne kiwa." 
2Samuel8:7 Ak kiib Daudi long’onikab tahabu che kitinyei otwogikab Hadadeser ak kiib kobwa Jerusalem. 
2Samuel8:8 Ak kiib laitoriat Daudi sugunonik che chang’ mising’ eng’ Beta ak eng’ Berotai, nganasokab Hadadeser." 
2Samuel8:9 Ak kingogas Toi laitoriatab Hamat kole kogobar Daudi luget tugul ne bo Hadadeser," 
2Samuel8:10 koyokto anyun Toi Joram werinnyi, kwo oldab laitoriat Daudi, kwo kogat inendet ak koberur, amu kiga kobargei ak Hadadeser ak kibar inendet: amu kibargei Hadadeser ak Toi. Ak kiib Joram terenikab feda, ak terenikab tahabu, ak terenikab sugunonik:" 
2Samuel8:11 kiitabanji Daudi Jehovah tuguchuto agichek, koboto feda ak tahabu che kiga kotaban eng’ bororiosiek tugul che kiga koterter;" 
2Samuel8:12 che bo Suria, ak che bo Moab, ak che bo lagokab Amon, ak che bo Pilistik, ak che bo Amalek, ak che barunenikab Hadadeser, weritab Rehob, laitoriatab Soba." 
2Samuel8:13 Ak kieet kainetab Daudi ye kiweeksei kobunu baret ne kibarei Suriek eng’ Atebwetab Munyuk, ole kibare murenik elfusiek taman ak sisiit." 
2Samuel8:14 Ak kiinde irimosiek Edom; kiinde irimosiek Edom komugul, ak kiek Edomik tugul otwogikab Daudi. Ak kiigochi Jehovah Daudi katerteret eng’ komosta age tugul ne kiwa." 
2Samuel8:15 Ak kilaitoran Daudi eng’ Israel tugul; ak kiiruokyi Daudi bikyik tugul eng’ lititindo ak iman. 
2Samuel8:16 Ak kibou Joab weritab Seruia luget; ak ki sirindetab tuguk che biitu, Jeosapat weritab Ailud:" 
2Samuel8:17 ak ki tisiik Sadok weritab Aitub ak Aimelek weritab Abiatar; ak ki sirindet Seraia: 
2Samuel8:18 ak kibou Benaia weritab Jeoiada Keretik ak Peletik; ak ki tisiik werikab Daudi. 
2Samuel9:1 Ak kile Daudi, Mi chi ne king’et eng’ gotab Saul, si kobiit ayachi ne mie amu Jonatan?" 
2Samuel9:2 Ak kimi eng’ gotab Saul otwogindet ne kigiguure kainennyi Siba, ak kigiguur kwo ole mi Daudi; kilenji laitoriat, I Siba? Ak kile, A inendet, ane otwogindeng’ung’." 
2Samuel9:3 Ak kile laitoriat, Tos ma komi chi eng’ gotab Saul, si kobiit ayachi inendet mieindab Kamuktaindet? Ak kilenji Siba laitoriat, Ta kotinyei Jonatan werit ne yaachen kelyekyik." 
2Samuel9:4 Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Mi ano? Ak kilenji Siba laitoriat, Keero, mi gotab Makir weritab Amiel, eng’ Lo-debar." 
2Samuel9:5 Kiiyokto anyun Daudi kimut inendet konyo eng’ gotab Makir weritab Amiel, eng’ Lo-debar." 
2Samuel9:6 Ak kinyo ole mi Daudi Mepiboset, weritab Jonatan weritab Saul, ak kobutyi ng’ony, kogutung’ji. Ak kile Daudi, Mepiboset. Ak kiwol kole, Keer otwogindeng’ung’!" 
2Samuel9:7 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet, Ameiywei: amu ayaun ne mie iman agobo Jonatan kwandang’ung’, ak iamisie mesennyu kotugul." 
2Samuel9:8 Ak kiing’uruk, ak kole, Nee otwogindeng’ung’, kot igeer seset ne kigome ko u ane?" 
2Samuel9:9 Kiguur anyun laitoriat Siba otwogindetab Saul, ak kolenji inendet, Kaagochi weritab kiptaiyandeng’ung’ tuguk tugul che ki bo Saul ak gonnyi tugul." 
2Samuel9:10 Ak ibatyi emet inye, ak weriguk, ak otwogiguk; ak iibu bek kobwa go, si kobiit konyor weritab kiptaiyandeng’ung’ amitwogik che amei: ago amisie mesennyu kotugul Mepiboset weritab kiptaiyandeng’ung’. Kitinyei Siba werik taman ak mut ak otwogik tiptem." 
2Samuel9:11 Kolenji anyun Siba laitoriat, Ayae ko u tugul che ng’ata kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat ane otwogindennyi. Ago kile laitoriat, Amisie mesennyu Mepiboset, ko u age eng’ werikab laitoriat." 
2Samuel9:12 Ak kitinye Mepiboset werit ne ming’in, ne kigiguure kainennyi Mika. Ak bik tugul che kimenyei gotab Siba ko ki otwogikab Mepiboset." 
2Samuel9:13 Kimeny anyun Mepiboset Jerusalem: amu kiamisie kotugul mesetab laitoriat; ak kiing’wali eng’ kelyekyik tuwai. 
2Samuel10:1 Ak kingobata nito, kome laitoriatab lagokab Amon, ak kilaitoran Hanun werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Samuel10:2 Ak kile Daudi, Ayachini ne mie Hanun weritab Nahas, ko u ye kiyaiywa ne mie kwandanyi. Kiiyokto anyun Daudi bik koba kogaigai inendet amu kwandanyi. Ak kiit otwogikab Daudi emetab lagokab Amon." 
2Samuel10:3 Ago kilenji bounikab lagokab Amon Hanun kiptaiyandenywa, Ibwati ile konyiti Daudi kwandang’ung’, kot koyogun kagoigoik? Ma iyok Daudi otwogikyik kobwa oldang’ung’ kosiach nganaset, ak kosegei, ak kobar?" 
2Samuel10:4 Kinam anyun Hanun otwogikab Daudi, ak konem kebeber eng’ tamnokwak, ak kotil ngoroikwak komut kwenut, kobochit ngorook, ak kounda koba." 
2Samuel10:5 Kingemwachi Daudi ng’olyondonoto, koyokto bik kotorokta; amu kiililandos bichoto mising’. Ak kile laitoriat, Otebi eng’ Jeriko agoi kobityo tamnokwok, ye ibata, obwa." 
2Samuel10:6 Ak kingogeer lagokab Amon kole kagoyaagitu icheget eng’ Daudi, koyokto lagokab Amon keguur Suriekab Bet-reob ak Suriekab Soba, si konyor melekto, murenik elfusiek tiptemu che bunei kelyek, koboto laitoriat Maaka ak murenik elfut, ak murenik elfusiek taman ak aeng’ che bo Tob." 
2Samuel10:7 Ak kingogas Daudi, koyokto Joab ak luget tugul ne bo murenik che kimen." 
2Samuel10:8 Ak kibwa lagokab Amon, ak kotet luget eng’ ye kibunei eng’ ormarich: ak kimi ichegei Suriekab Soba, ak che bo Rehob, ak murenikab Tob ak che bo Maaka, eng’ warenget." 
2Samuel10:9 Ak kingogeer Joab kole kagetet luget agobo inendet eng’ tai ak let, kokwei murenik che kigilewen che bo Israel, ak kotet kobargei ak Suriek:" 
2Samuel10:10 ak kiinde bik che kiga ng’et, eutab Abisai, ng’etab kamet, ak kitet ichek si kobargei ak lagokab Amon." 
2Samuel10:11 Ak kile, Ngot kogimegitu Suriek kotertera, itoreta: ago ngot kogimegitu lagokab Amon koterterin, anyo atoretin." 
2Samuel10:12 Nyiganitu, ingeegu murenik agobo bikyok, ak nganasokab Kamuktaindennyo: ak ingoyai Jehovah ko u ye keerei kole mie." 
2Samuel10:13 Kirikta anyun Joab ak murenik che kimi ak inendet, koba luget kobargei ak Suriek: ak kimwee inendet." 
2Samuel10:14 Ak kingogeer lagokab Amon kole kagomwei Suriek, komwei agichek eng’ taitab Abisai, ak kiba nganaset. Kiweek Joab anyun eng’ ole kimi lagokab Amon, ak kibwa Jerusalem." 
2Samuel10:15 Ak kingogeer Suriek kole kagiterter ichek eng’ taitab Israel, koyumgei." 
2Samuel10:16 Ak kiiyokto Hadareser kimut Suriek che kimi Ainet bitonin: ak kibwa Helam, koboto Sobak kiptaiyatab lugetab Hadareser kondoune." 
2Samuel10:17 Ak kigimwachi Daudi; ak kiiyum Israel tugul, ak kilandae Jordan, ak koba Helam. Ak kitetgei Suriek kotokyigei Daudi, ak kobargei ak inendet." 
2Samuel10:18 Ak kimwee Suriek Israel; ak kibar Daudi Suriek bogol tisab che bo karisiek, ak murenik elfusiek artam che kilanyei mbartanyisiek, ak kibar Sobak kiptaiyatab lugenywa komechi yoto." 
2Samuel10:19 Ak kingogeer laitorinik tugul che ki otwogikab Hadareser kole kagiterter ichek eng’ taitab Israel, koyai kalyet ak Israel, ak koot ichek. Koiywei anyun Suriek ko ta kotoret lagokab Amon kogeny." 
2Samuel11:1 Ak kingogesgei kenyit, eng’ betusiek che kicham kobendi laitorinik luget, koyokto Daudi Joab koboto otwogikyik, ak Israel tugul; ak kobar lagokab Amon, ak kiyiem Raba. Ago kitebi Daudi eng’ Jerusalem." 
2Samuel11:2 Ak kingoit koskoleny, kong’eet Daudi eng’ itogunnyi, ak kowendote gotab laitoriat barak: ak kingomi barak, kogeer kwondo kounegei; ak ki kararan kot kwonyoto." 
2Samuel11:3 Kiiyokto Daudi bik koteeb agobo kwonyoto. Ak kile age, Ma Bat-seba nito cheptab Eliam, osotiotab Uria Hitindet?" 
2Samuel11:4 Ak kiiyokto Daudi bik koba kimut; ak kinyo ole mi inendet, ak kiruiyo ak inendet; (amu kiga koanyinygei eng’ muruonindanyi;) ak kiweektagei kwo gonnyi." 
2Samuel11:5 Ak kimanach kwonyoto; ak kiiyokto kemwachi Daudi, kole, A managat." 
2Samuel11:6 Ak kiiyokto Daudi chi kwo ole mi Joab, kolenji, Iyokwa Uria Hitindet. Ak kiiyokto Joab Uria kwo ole mi Daudi." 
2Samuel11:7 Ak kingoit Uria ole mi inendet, koteebe Daudi inendet agobo Joab, ak ole chamdogei bik ak ole kiborto luget." 
2Samuel11:8 Ak kilenji Daudi Uria, Chortege, ui gong’ung’, ak iun kelyeguk. Ak kiwa Uria eng’ gotab laitoriat, ak kigisube inendet amitwogik che kibunu laitoriat." 
2Samuel11:9 Ago kiru Uria kurgetab gotab laitoriat koboto otwogik tugul che bo kiptaiyandennyi, ma chortagei kwo gonnyi." 
2Samuel11:10 Ak kingo kagomwachi ichek Daudi kolenji, Ma chortagei Uria kwo gonnyi, kolenji Daudi Uria, Kama ibunu banda? Amu nee anyun si mechortege iwe gong’ung’?" 
2Samuel11:11 Ak kilenji Uria Daudi, Tebe keriosiek moinget, ak Israel, ak Juda; ak menyei kewet kiptaiyandennyu Joab, ak otwogikab kiptaiyandennyu; awe anyun ane gonnyu, aamisie ak aeeise, ak keruiye ak osotiondennyu? Ko u ye isobe, ak ko u ye sobei sobondang’ung’, mayae kioto." 
2Samuel11:12 Ak kilenji Daudi Uria, Beni olito rani, ak mutai achamun iwe. Kibeni anyun Uria Jerusalem betunoto, ak betut ne kiisubi noto." 
2Samuel11:13 Ak kingoguur Daudi inendet, koamis ak koeeiso eng’ tainnyi; ak kiigochi koee kot kobogit: ak kiwa koskoleny komanda kwo koru eng’ itogunnyi koboto otwogikab kiptaiyandennyi, ago ma chortagei kwo gonnyi." 
2Samuel11:14 Ak kingo kagoeech, kosirji Daudi baruet Joab, ak koyoktae Uria." 
2Samuel11:15 Ak kisir eng’ baruanato kole, Onde Uria tai eng’ luget ne ng’wan mising’, ak ochuchuige obagaket inendet, si kobiit kebar kome." 
2Samuel11:16 Ak kingota koribei Joab nganaset, konde Uria komosta ne kimi murenik che nyigonen." 
2Samuel11:17 Ak kimanda bikab nganaset koba kobargei ak Joab: ak kibek bik alak eng’ ichek, eng’ otwogikab Daudi; ak kime Uria Hitindet agine." 
2Samuel11:18 Kiiyokto anyun Joab kemwachi Daudi tuguk tugul agobo luget; 
2Samuel11:19 ak king’at chito ne kiga iyokto kolenji, Ye kaimwachi laitoriat tuguk tugul agobo luget kogesgei," 
2Samuel11:20 ko, ngot konerech laitoriat, ak kolenjin, Amu nee si orikyi nganaset obarge? Kama ongen ole imuchi komwogok eng’ irimet?" 
2Samuel11:21 Ng’o ne kibar Abimelek weritab Jerubeset? Kima wire kwondo age inendet isiet eng’ irimet, ak kimechi Tebes? Amu nee anyun si orikyi irimet? Ile, Kigome otwogindeng’ung’ Uria Hitindet agine." 
2Samuel11:22 Kiwa anyun ne kigiyokto, ak kiit ak koborji Daudi tuguk tugul che kiga iyoktae Joab inendet." 
2Samuel11:23 Ak kilenji chichoto Daudi, Kiiterterech bichoto, kiimong’jech eng’ kewet, ak kigibaratege kot koit ye kibunei eng’ ormarichet." 
2Samuel11:24 Ak kimwok mwogik otwogiguk eng’ irimet; ak kibek alak eng’ otwogikab laitoriat, ak kime agine otwogindeng’ung’ Uria Hitindet." 
2Samuel11:25 Kolenji Daudi chichoto kagiyogu, Imwachini Joab ko u ni ilenjini, Ameng’ koiimin ng’olyondoni, amu barei rotwetab chok age ko u ye barei age: igimit lugeng’ung’ kota kogimit, si kobargei ak nganaset, ak oterter: ak icheer inendet." 
2Samuel11:26 Ak kingogas osotiotab Uria kole kogome manong’otiondennyi, kote agobo manong’otiondennyi." 
2Samuel11:27 Ak kingobata kateet, koyokto Daudi kimut konyo gonnyi, ak kiek osotiondennyi, ak kisikyi ng’etet. Ago ma cham Jehovah kioto kiyai Daudi." 
2Samuel12:1 Ak kiiyokto Jehovah Natan kwo ole mi Daudi. Ak kinyo ole mi inendet ak kolenji, Kimi bik aeng’u nganaset agenge; ki magoriot age, ko kibananiat age." 
2Samuel12:2 Kitinyei ne ki magoriot akwotisiek che chang’ mising’ che bo kechirek ak tuga. 
2Samuel12:3 Ago kima kotinyei kiy ne ki kibananiat, kobate subendo agenge ne ming’in ne bo kechir, ne kiga al ak kogu: ak kieegitu tuwai, ak lagokyik; kiamei amitwogikyik, ak kiee kikombennyi, ak kirue tegennyi, ak ki u eng’ inendet cheptanyi." 
2Samuel12:4 Ak kinyo kiprutoiyot oldab magoriondonoto, ak ma cham konam ne bo akwennyi ne bo kechirek ak ne bo akwetab tukyik, koeng’ji chichoto kisiirtoi, ne kiga nyonji inendet, ago kinam aruetab kibananiandanato, ak koeng’ji chichoto kiga nyonji inendet." 
2Samuel12:5 Ak kilalyo mising’ neregekab Daudi agobo chichoto: ak kilenji Natan, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, konyoljin chichoto kiyai kioto kome:" 
2Samuel12:6 ak koyook aruanato konyil ang’wan, amu kiyai kiito, ak amu kima kotinyei rirenet." 
2Samuel12:7 Ak kilenji Natan Daudi, I chichoto. Kamwa Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel ko u ni kole, Kiaiilin iegu laitoriat ibou Israel, ak kiasorun eng’ eutab Saul;" 
2Samuel12:8 ak kiagonin gotab kiptaiyandeng’ung’, ak kiagonin osotikab kiptaiyandeng’ung’ kobwa tegeng’ung’, ak agonin gotab Israel ak ne bo Juda; ak nda kiga ng’ering’itu choto, ta kiatesun tuguk alak ak alak." 
2Samuel12:9 Amu nee anyun si isas ng’olyotab Jehovah, iyai kit ne ya eng’ tainnyi? Koibar Uria Hitindet eng’ rotwetab chok, ak koimutu osotiondennyi koek osotiondeng’ung’, ak koibare inendet rotwetab chok ne bo lagokab Amon." 
2Samuel12:10 Ara anyun, magoi istogei rotwetab chok eng’ gong’ung’: amu koisasa, ak koimutu osotiotab Uria Hitindet koek osotiondeng’ung’." 
2Samuel12:11 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Keero, ang’eetun yaitiet eng’ gong’ung’, ak arebenen osotiguk igeeroti, ak agochi ichek chitab kokweng’ung’, ak koruiyo ak osotiguk koluu asista." 
2Samuel12:12 Amu koiyai eng’ ung’ot: ago ayae kiito eng’ taitab Israel tugul, ak kogeerei asis." 
2Samuel12:13 Ak kilenji Daudi Natan, Koyachi Jehovah tengekto. Ak kilenji Natan Daudi, Kagoisto Jehovah agine tengektang’ung’; memee." 
2Samuel12:14 Ago amu kaigochi eng’ yaitioni bunikab Jehovah boroindo ne o kochubis, komeei iman agine lakwet ne tun kisigun." 
2Samuel12:15 Ak kiwa Natan gonnyi. Ak kibir Jehovah lakwet ne kiga sikyi Daudi osotiot ne ki bo Uria, ak kimian kot." 
2Samuel12:16 Ak kisa Daudi Kamuktaindet agobo lakwanato; ak kiirugutgei Daudi, ak kiwa go, kwo koru ng’ony kemout komugul." 
2Samuel12:17 Ak king’eetyo boisiekab gonnyi kotononio eng’ ye mi inendet, kole kong’eet inendet: ago ma cham, ak ma cham koamis ak icheget." 
2Samuel12:18 Ak kime lakwet eng’ betut ne bo tisab. Ak kiiywei otwogikab Daudi komwachi inendet kolenji kagome lakwet: amu kile, Ogeero, ye kota kosobei lakwet, ko koging’alalji inendet, ama cham kogas ng’alekyok: kobirtogei anyun ne tia ngot kelenji, kagome lakwet?" 
2Samuel12:19 Ago kingogeer Daudi kochaamjingei otwogikyik, konai Daudi kole kagome; ak kimwachi Daudi otwogikyik, kolenji, Kagome lakwet? Ak kile, Kagome." 
2Samuel12:20 King’eet anyun Daudi eng’ ng’ony, kwo koungei, ak koiilgei, ak kolaach ngoroik alak; yeityo konyo gotab Jehovah konyo kosa: yeityo kwo gonnyi; ak kingomach amitwogik, kindochi tainnyi, ak kiam." 
2Samuel12:21 Kilenji anyun otwogikyik, Nee kii koiyai? Koirugutige ak irire agobo lakwet yu kota kosobei; ago kongome, ing’eet ak iamisie." 
2Samuel12:22 Ak kile, Kongota kosobei lakwet, ko koarugutige ak arire: amu koalen, Tamangab korirena Jehovah, si kosob lakwet?" 
2Samuel12:23 Ago nguno ko kagome, ko ta arugutyige nee? Ta amuchi aweech kosob kogeny? Ta awendi ole mi inendet, ago maweeksei inendet konyonei oli ami." 
2Samuel12:24 Ak kiigaigai Daudi Bat-seba osotiondennyi, ak kiwa ole mi inendet kotuiyogei: ak kosich werit, ak koguure kainennyi Solomon. Ak kicham Jehovah inendet;" 
2Samuel12:25 ak kiiyoktae ng’alek Natan maotiot, keguure kainennyi Jedidia, agobo Jehovah." 
2Samuel12:26 Ak kibargei Joab ak Raba ne bo lagokab Amon, ak kiluul nganasetab kaplaitoriat." 
2Samuel12:27 Ak kiiyokto Joab bik koba ole mi Daudi, ak komwachi kolenji, Kogebarge ak Raba, ee, koaluul nganasetab beek." 
2Samuel12:28 Noto anyun, iyum bik che ng’etunotin, ak iteech ye tokyingei nganaset, ak inam: si maanam ane nganaset, ak kemwaitae kainennyu." 
2Samuel12:29 Ak kiiyum Daudi bik tugul, ak koba Raba, ak kobargei ak nganasanato, ak koluul." 
2Samuel12:30 Kiinemune laitoriandenywa narietab laitornatet; ak nyigisindanyi ko ki talentait agenge ne bo tahabu, ne kiginde koik che bo kamanutiet ne o; ak kigigerjine Daudi metit. Ak kiib barunenik che chang’ mising’ che bo nganaset komong’." 
2Samuel12:31 Ak kiimut bik che kimi orit komong’, ak konde ichek koboisie musumenosiek, ak koboisie karik che kiburburenisie, ak koboisie aonokab karik, ak kobirji kobois eng’ ole kibeele matabaruk, ak kiyachi ko u noto nganasok tugul che bo lagokab Amon. Ak kiweek Daudi ak bik tugul koba Jerusalem." 
2Samuel13:1 Kitinyei Absalom weritab Daudi chepkamet ne kararan, ne kainennyi ko ki Tamar; ak kicham Amnon weritab Daudi inendet." 
2Samuel13:2 Ak kiimgei Amnon kot komian amu chepkametinnyi Tamar; amu ki bergeiyat: ak kigeer Amnon kouuit koyachi kiy age tugul inendet. 
2Samuel13:3 Ago kitinyei Amnon choruet, ne kainennyi ko ki Jonadab, weritab Simea, ng’etab kametab Daudi: ak ki chi ne ng’alin mising’ Jonadab." 
2Samuel13:4 Ak kilenji inendet, Kolya-o, weritab laitoriat, si isagiti betut age tugul? Ak kilenji Amnon inendet, Amache Tamar chepkametab tupchennyu Absalom." 
2Samuel13:5 Ak kilenji Jonadab inendet, Ru eng’ itogung’ung’, ak iige chito ne miani: si ye nyo kwandang’ung’ kogeerin, ilenji, Asomin ale, ingonyo tupchennyu Tamar konyo kogona amitwogik aam, ak koyaiywa amitwogik eng’ tainnyu, si kobiit ageer, ak kogona eng’ eunnyi, aam." 
2Samuel13:6 Kiru anyun Amnon, koigei chito ne miani: ak kingonyo laitoriat kogeer inendet, kolenji Amnon laitoriat, Asomin ale, ingonyo tupchennyu Tamar, ak koyaiywa makatinik aeng’ ageere, si kobiit kogona eng’ eunnyi aam." 
2Samuel13:7 Koyokto anyun Daudi keguur Tamar eng’ ga, kolenji, Ui gotab ng’etab komet Amnon iyachi amitwogik." 
2Samuel13:8 Kwo anyun Tamar gotab ng’etab kamet Amnon; ak kiruei. Ak kinam busiek che kagitesyi beek, ak kokwanykwany, ak koyai makatinik eng’ tainnyi; ak kobeel." 
2Samuel13:9 Ak kinam tabetab karnet ak koluluk eng’ tainnyi; ago kiesio koam. Ak kile Amnon, Ingomanda bik tugul eng’ yu ami. Ak kimanda chi tugul eng’ ye kimi inendet." 
2Samuel13:10 Ak kilenji Amnon Tamar, Ibu amitwogik kobwa goi, si kobiit igona eng’ eung’ung’ aam. Ak kiib Tamar makatinik che kagoyai, koib koba goyoto, koipchi ng’etab kamet Amnon." 
2Samuel13:11 Ak kingo kagoib makatinichoto koba ye negite inendet, si koam, kosuub inendet, ak kolenji, Nyo keruiye tuwai, tupchennyu." 
2Samuel13:12 Ak kiwolji kolenji, Achicha, tupchennyu, amesuuba; amu mami kiy ne u no ne nyolu keyai eng’ Israel: ameyai abusnatani." 
2Samuel13:13 Si awa ano anyun, ane, eng’ tewernatennyu? Ak iige inye age eng’ che abusotin eng’ Israel. Ara anyun, asomin ale ng’alalji laitoriat; amu maetenen abunjin." 
2Samuel13:14 Ago ma cham kogas ng’alekyik: ago, amu ki kim kosiir cheboto, ko kisuub ak koruiyo ak inendet." 
2Samuel13:15 Yeityo kowech Amnon inendet eng’ weget ne o mising’: amu kieet weget ne kiwech inendet kosiir chamnyet ne kiga chame inendet. Ak kilenji Amnon inendet, Ng’eet, ui." 
2Samuel13:16 Ak kilenji inendet, Ma u noto, amu ya yaitioni o keonena kosiir kit ne kaiyaiywa. Ago ma cham kogas ng’alekyik." 
2Samuel13:17 Yeityo koguur otwogindet ne kiboisiechin konyo ole mi, ak kolenji, Imaande kwonyi kwo eng’ yu ami, ak itemel kurget ko kagomanda." 
2Samuel13:18 Ak kiilaachi cheboto ngoriet ne koi: amu kicham kolaachi tibikab laitoriat che bergeinik ngoroik che u choto. Kiimut anyun otwogindennyi inendet konyo sang’, ak kotemel kurget ko kagomong’ konyo sang’." 
2Samuel13:19 Ak kiinde Tamar orek metinnyi, ak kogerer ngoriennyi ne koi ne kiilaachi: ak konamatgei met, ak kwo, koriroti eng’ kutit ne o." 
2Samuel13:20 Ak kilenji Absalom ng’etab kametab Tamar, inendet, Komi tuwai ak Amnon ng’etab komet? Sis nguno anyun, tupchennyu: inendet ko ng’etab komet; amende kiito muguleldang’ung’. Ak kitebi Tamar inegei eng’ gotab ng’etab kamet Absalom." 
2Samuel13:21 Ago kingogas laitoriat Daudi tuguchuto tugul, konerech mising’." 
2Samuel13:22 Ak ma mwachi Absalom Amnon kiy ne mie anan ko ne ya: amu kiwech Absalom Amnon, amu kiga suub chepkamennyi Tamar." 
2Samuel13:23 Ak ye kingosiirto kenyisiek aeng’u, ko kimi Absalom ak bik che kitilei kororikab kechirek eng’ Baal-hasor, ne mi ye negite Epraim: ak kiguur Absalom werik tugul che bo laitoriat." 
2Samuel13:24 Ak kimi Absalom ole mi laitoriat, ak kolenji, Keero, tinyei otwogindeng’ung’ bik che tilei kororikab kechirek; asomin ale ingoba laitoriat ak otwogikyik koboto otwogindeng’ung’." 
2Samuel13:25 Ak kilenji laitoriat Absalom, Achicha, werinnyu, ma mie kebe tugul, si ma kigonin nyigisindo. Ak kiigaigai inendet: ago ma cham kwo, kiiberur inendet."
