2Samuel13:26 Kile anyun Absalom, Ngot ko mewendi, asomin ale kebe koboto Amnon tupchennyu. Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Amu nee si imache obe tuwai?" 
2Samuel13:27 Ago kiigaigai Absalom inendet, kochamji Amnon ak werik tugul che bo laitoriat, koba koboto inendet." 
2Samuel13:28 Ak king’at Absalom otwogik kolenji, Ogeero, ye kagobaibait muguleldab Amnon eng’ maiyek; ko, ye alenjok, Okwer Amnon, obar anyun inendet, mat oiywei. Ma ane ne kang’atak? Ogimegitu ak onyiganitu." 
2Samuel13:29 Ak kiyachi otwogikab Absalom Amnon ko u ye kiga ng’at Absalom. Kiing’eetyo anyun werik tugul che bo laitoriat, ak kilany chi tugul nyumbunnyi, ak komwei." 
2Samuel13:30 Ak ye kita kobendi eng’ oret, koit ng’alek ole kimi Daudi kele, kagobar Absalom werik tugul che bo laitoriat, ak ma ng’et agot agenge eng’ ichek." 
2Samuel13:31 King’eet anyun laitoriat, kogerer ngoroikyik, ak koru eng’ ng’ony; ak kitononso otwogikyik tugul eng’ ole mi inendet ko kagogerer ngoroikwak." 
2Samuel13:32 Ak kiwol Jonadab, weritab Simea, ng’etab kametab Daudi, kole, Mat kobwat kiptaiyandennyu kole kagobar ichek murenik tugul, werikab laitoriat; amu Amnon inegei ne kame: amu kiga ketil nito eng’ ng’atutietab Absalom koboch betut ne kisuubei chepkamennyi Tamar." 
2Samuel13:33 Noto anyun, amat konde kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat kii muguleldanyi, kobwat kole kagobek werik tugul che bo laitoriat: amu Amnon inegei ne kame." 
2Samuel13:34 Ago kimwei Absalom. Ak kitobendo murenet age ne kiripsei, ak kogeer, ak ogeero, kibwanei bik che chang’, kobunu oretab tegeiyat ne kimi let eng’ inendet." 
2Samuel13:35 Ak kilenji Jonadab laitoriat, Keero, kabobwa werikab laitoriat: ko u ye kamwa otwogindeng’ung’ ko u noto." 
2Samuel13:36 Ak kingo kagoges ng’alalet, ogeero, koit werikab laitoriat ak kowaach ak koteeiyo: ak kiite laitoriat agine ak otwogikyik tugul, eng’ kateet ne o." 
2Samuel13:37 Ago kimwei Absalom, kwo ole mi Talmai weritab Amiur, laitoriatab Gesur. Ak kirirji Daudi werinnyi betut age tugul." 
2Samuel13:38 Kimwei anyun Absalom, kwo Gesur, ak kitebe oloto kenyisiek somok." 
2Samuel13:39 Ak kimach mising’ laitoriat Daudi kwo ole mi Absalom: amu kiga konyor kagaigaet agobo Amnon, amu kiga kome." 
2Samuel14:1 Kinai Joab weritab Seruia kole ibwati muguleldab laitoriat Absalom. 
2Samuel14:2 Ak kiiyokto Joab keguur kwondo ne ng’om eng’ Tekoa, ak kolenji, Asain ale, yaige ogergeitu ak chito ne rirei, ak asain ale ilaach ngoroikab rirek, amat iilege mwaita, ago ogergeitu ak kwondo ne kigorir keny agobo chito ne kime:" 
2Samuel14:3 ak iwe oldab laitoriat, ak ing’alalji ko u ni. Konde anyun Joab ng’alek kutitab kwonyoto." 
2Samuel14:4 Ak kingong’alaljin kwonyoto bo Tekoa laitoriat, kobutyi ng’ony, koting’e togennyi ng’ony, kogutung’ji, ak kole, Toreta, ee laitoriat." 
2Samuel14:5 Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Amin nee? Ak kiwolji kolenji, A mosok iman; kigome manong’otiondennyu." 
2Samuel14:6 Ak kitinyei otwogindeng’ung’ werik aeng’, ak kiborio tuwai eng’ timin, ama biit chi ne kiibesio ichek, ak kikwer age age ak kobar." 
2Samuel14:7 Ak keero, king’eetyo got komugul koborie otwogindeng’ung’, ak kile, Konu inendet ne kobar ng’etab kamet, si kobiit kebar inendet, agobo sobondab ng’etab kamennyi noto kobar, ak kebar agine ne kata namei tuguk: ak komis mannyu ne kong’et, ama ituukyi manong’otiondennyu kainet anan ko ne ng’etu eng’ ng’ony." 
2Samuel14:8 Ak kilenji laitoriat kwonyoto, Ui gong’ung’, si ang’at keyaun ng’alechato." 
2Samuel14:9 Ak kilenji kwonyoto bo Tekoa laitoriat, Kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat, ingotebena tengegi, ak kotebe gotab baba: ak ingoek ne matinyei ng’ogisto laitoriat ak ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet." 
2Samuel14:10 Ak kile laitoriat, Chi age tugul ne mwaun ng’olyo imutwa, si mata kotwain kogeny." 
2Samuel14:11 Yeityo komwa kwonyoto kole, Asomin ale ingobwat laitoriat Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, si mata kobaris ne yaaktoi korotik, si mabar werinnyu. Ak kile, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ko maibutyin ng’ony agot sumeiywot agenge ne bo wering’ung’." 
2Samuel14:12 Kole anyun kwonyoto, Asomin ale chamji cheptang’ung’ ne otwogindet komwachi ng’olyot kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat. Ak kile, Mwa." 
2Samuel14:13 Ak kile kwonyoto, Kilya si ibwat kit ne u no agobo bikab Kamuktaindet? Amu ngo mwa laitoriat ng’olyot ne u ni, ko kaigei chi ne tinyei ng’ogisto, amu maimut laitoriat konyo ga nenyi ne kigion." 
2Samuel14:14 Amu nyoljinech kebegu ne matiny, ak ki u beek che kagitumji ng’ony, che magimuchi keram kogeny; ama istoi Kamuktaindet sobondo, ago chobei oret si mata koigei ne kigion ne kiging’eeto." 
2Samuel14:15 Noto anyun amu kaanyo amwachi ng’olyondoni kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, ko amu kiimua bik: ak kiale ane otwogindeng’ung’ ne chepto, Ang’alaljini laitoriat; abere imuchi laitoriat koyachi otwogindennyi somennyi." 
2Samuel14:16 Amu kasei laitoriat ak kosorua ane otwogindennyi eng’ eutab chito ne machei kobara ak werinnyu koistoenech borotetab Kamuktaindet. 
2Samuel14:17 Amwa anyun ane otwogindeng’ung’ ale, Asomin ale, ingomieit ng’olyotab kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat: iguitos kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat kit ne mie ak ne ya ko u malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet: ak ingoteb Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koboten." 
2Samuel14:18 Kiwolji anyun laitoriat kwonyoto kolenji, Asomin ale, ameung’ena kiy age tugul ne ateebenen. Ak kile kwonyoto, Ingong’alal kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat nguno." 
2Samuel14:19 Ak kile laitoriat, Tos omi ak Joab eng’ ng’alechu tugul? Ak kiwol kwonyoto kole, Ko u ye sobei sobondang’ung’, kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, mami chi ne imuchi komasta kwo eutab tai anan kwo eutab katam eng’ kiy age tugul ne kagomwa kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat: amu kong’ata otwogindeng’ung’ Joab, ak komwawa ane otwogindeng’ung’ ng’alechuto tugul;" 
2Samuel14:20 kiyai otwogindeng’ung’ Joab kiito, si kobiit kewal kit ne u ng’olyondonito: ak tinyei kiptaiyandennyu ng’omnatet ne u ng’omnatetab malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet, konai tugul tugul che mi ng’ony." 
2Samuel14:21 Ak kilenji laitoriat Joab, Keer anyun-o, kaayai kioto: ui anyun, imutu nerananato Absalom." 
2Samuel14:22 Ak kiibutyi ng’ony Joab, kong’uruk, ak koberur laitoriat: ak kile Joab, Kagonai otwogindeng’ung’ rani kole, kaanyoru mieindo eng’ taing’ung’, kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat, amu kagoyachi laitoriat otwogindennyi somennyi." 
2Samuel14:23 King’eet anyun Joab kwo Gesur, kwo komut Absalom konyo Jerusalem." 
2Samuel14:24 Ak kile laitoriat, Ingowo gonnyi, amat konyo kogeera togoch. Kwo anyun Absalom gonnyi, ama keer laitoriat togoch." 
2Samuel14:25 Kima komi eng’ Israel tugul chito ne kigilosu eng’ kororonindo ko u Absalom: kima kotinyei berutiet kong’eete keldebesiet agoi metinnyi barak. 
2Samuel14:26 Ak kingonem metinnyi, (amu kiinemu sumeekyik eng’ kagesunetab kenyit age tugul: amu ki nyigisen eng’ inendet, ko kiinemu anyun amu noto:) kibimani sumeekyik ak kiegu sekelisiek bogol aeng, eng’ ratilitab laitoriat." 
2Samuel14:27 Ak kigisikyi Absalom werik somok, ak chepto agenge, ne kigiguure kainennyi Tamar: ki chepto ne kararan kot." 
2Samuel14:28 Ak kitebe Absalom kenyisiek aeng’ Jerusalem; ama keer laitoriat togoch. 
2Samuel14:29 Kiiyokto anyun Absalom keguur Joab, si kobiit koyokto kwo oldab laitoriat; ago ma cham konyo ole mi inendet: kiiyokto kogeny ne bo aeng’, ago ma cham konyo." 
2Samuel14:30 Kilenji anyun Absalom otwogikyik, Ogeero, negite mbaretab Joab mbarennyu, ak tinyei sairik eng’ mbaranato; oba obeel. Ak kibeel otwogikab Absalom mbaranato." 
2Samuel14:31 Kong’eet anyun Joab ak konyo ole mi Absalom eng’ gonnyi, ak kolenji inendet, Amu nee si kobeel otwogiguk mbarennyu?" 
2Samuel14:32 Ak kiwolji Absalom Joab kolenji, Keero, koaguurin ale, Nyo yu si kobiit ayokten iwe oldab laitoriat, ilenji, Amu nee si anyo eng’ Gesur? Kita mie atebe oloto agoi: chamwa anyun nguno ageer togetab laitoriat; ak ngot atinye tengekto, kobara." 
2Samuel14:33 Kinyo anyun Joab oldab laitoriat, ak komwachi: ak kingo kageguur Absalom, konyo anyun oldab laitoriat, ak kong’uruk kot kotiiny toget ng’ony eng’ taitab laitoriat: ak king’utut laitoriat Absalom." 
2Samuel15:1 Ak kingobata ni, kochopchigei Absalom karit koboto mbartanyisiek, ak murenik konom koruai kondoe inendet." 
2Samuel15:2 Ak king’eet Absalom karon inne, ak kotonon eng’ ye negite ormarichet: ak kingotinyei chi age tugul ng’olyo ne ibei kwo gab laitoriat kiruokyinechi, koguurei Absalom konyo ye mi inendet, kolenji, I bo nganaset ano? Ak kole, Bo otwogindeng’ung’ age eng’ bororiosiekab Israel." 
2Samuel15:3 Kolenji Absalom inendet, Keero, miach ng’aleguk ak ko lititen; ago mami chi ne kiinde laitoriat kogasun." 
2Samuel15:4 Kile kogeny Absalom, Eiye, nda kiga kiyaa aek kiruogindet eng’ emet, ko ngo nyo ole ami chi age tugul ne tinyei ng’olyo anan kiruoget, ayachini imanda!" 
2Samuel15:5 Ak kingorikyi chi age tugul kwo kong’uruk eng’ tainnyi, koyogoito eunnyi, konam inendet, ak kong’utut." 
2Samuel15:6 Ak kiyachi Absalom ko u noto Israel tugul che kibendi oldab laitoriat agobo kiruoget: kiichuut ko u noto anyun Absalom mugulelwekab bikab Israel. 
2Samuel15:7 Ak kingogesgei kenyisiek artamu, kolenji Absalom laitoriat, Kaigai ichamwa awa agoito kaarortaennyu, ne kiaarorji Jehovah, eng’ Hebron." 
2Samuel15:8 Amu kiarorte ane otwogindeng’ung’ ye kita ami Gesur eng’ Suria ale, Ngot koweekta Jehovah kogeny iman awa Jerusalem, aboisiechini anyun Jehovah." 
2Samuel15:9 Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Ui eng’ kalyet. Kong’eet anyun ak kwo Hebron." 
2Samuel15:10 Ago kiiyokto Absalom segeik koba bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel, kolenji, Eng’ sait ne kogas iriaget, omwa ole, Laitorani Absalom eng’ Hebron." 
2Samuel15:11 Ak kiba bik bogolwogik aeng’u eng’ Jerusalem koboto Absalom, che kiga kiguur, ak kiba eng’ berberindanywa, ak kima kongen kiy." 
2Samuel15:12 Ak kiiyokto Absalom keguur Aitopel Gilonindet, toretindetab Daudi, eng’ nganasennyi, Gilo, ye kiigoitoi tiseiywek. Ak kitesak chaamset; amu ki tesoksei bik che namegei ak Absalom." 
2Samuel15:13 Ak kinyo chito oldab Daudi ne kiibu ng’alek, ak kolenji, Kogosub mugulelwekab bikab Israel Absalom." 
2Samuel15:14 Ak kilenji Daudi otwogikyik tugul che kimi ak inendet eng’ Jerusalem, Ong’eetye, ak ongemwei; amu ngo ma u noto, ko mami chi ne chilili eng’ Absalom: ongechakte, si manyoruech ngunoto, ak koibwech yaitiet, ak kobar nganaset eng’ rotwetab chok." 
2Samuel15:15 Ak kimwa otwogikab laitoriat kolenji laitoriat, Keero, ki chobotin achek otwogiguk keyai kit age tugul ne kalewen kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat." 
2Samuel15:16 Ak kimanda laitoriat, ak kiisub inendet bik tugul che bo gonnyi. Ak kibagakta laitoriat kwonyik taman, che ki chebaigeinik, korib got." 
2Samuel15:17 Ak kimanda laitoriat, ak kiisub inendet bik tugul; ak kiba kotebe Bet-merak." 
2Samuel15:18 Ak kiba otwogikyik tugul kobun ye negite inendet; ak kiba kondoe laitoriat Keretik tugul, ak Peletik tugul, ak Gitik tugul che ki murenik bogol lo che kiisubu inendet kobunu Gat." 
2Samuel15:19 Yeityo kolenji laitoriat Itai Gitindet, Amu nee si inyo kebe tugul aginye? Weeige, ui otebi ak laitoriat: amu i toondet, ne kigionun eng’ oldang’ung’; weeige, ui oldang’ung’." 
2Samuel15:20 Amu koiitu amut, tos mie amutatin ketogostoi ak kerektoi tugul rani, amu awendi ole kamach? Weeige anyun, ak iweech tupchosieguk; ingoteb koboten rirenet ak imanit." 
2Samuel15:21 Ak kiwolji Itai laitoriat kolenji, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ak ko u ye sobei kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, oldo tugul ole mi kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, ami oloto agane iman, ane otwogindeng’ung’ ngo eng’ meet anan eng’ sobet." 
2Samuel15:22 Ak kilenji Daudi Itai, Ui lande. Kilanda anyun Itai Gitindet, ak bikyik tugul, koboto lagok tugul che kimi ak inendet." 
2Samuel15:23 Ak kiwaach emet komugul eng’ kutit ne o, ak kilanda bik tugul: ak kilandae laitoriat inendet agine kererutab Kidron, ak kilanda bik tugul, kotokyigei ong’atet." 
2Samuel15:24 Ak ogeero, kinyo Sadok agine, ak Lawik tugul che kimi koboto inendet, koibei moingetab arorutietab Kamuktaindet; ak kiitu moingetab Kamuktaindet, ak kitogosta Abiatar, agoi komanda bik tugul eng’ nganaset." 
2Samuel15:25 Ak kilenji laitoriat Sadok, Oib moingetab Kamuktaindet koweek kwo nganaset: ngot anyoru chamet eng’ taitab Jehovah, kotun imutwa kogeny, ak koborua moingonoto ak ole tebe." 
2Samuel15:26 Ago ngot komwa ko u ni kole, Mabaibai eng’ inye; keero, ami yu, ingoyaiywa ko u ye keerei kole mie." 
2Samuel15:27 Kimwachi anyun laitoriat kogeny Sadok tisiindet kolenji, Ma i keerindet? Weektege nganaset eng’ kalyet, ak weriguk tuwai, Aimaas wering’ung’, ak Jonatan weritab Abiatar." 
2Samuel15:28 Keero, atebe ole kilandoe kebendi ong’atet, agoi agas ng’olyo eng’ inye ne imwawa." 
2Samuel15:29 Kiib anyun Sadok ak Abiatar moingetab Kamuktaindet kogeny kwo Jerusalem: ak kiba kotebe oloto. 
2Samuel15:30 Ak kitogosta Daudi kobun oret ne kitogoste kebendi tulwetab emitik, ak kiriroti; ak kiga tuigei met, ak kiwendi ko matinyei kweonik: ak kituigei met chi age tugul eng’ bik tugul che kimi koboto inendet, ak kitogosta, koririoti kotogostoi." 
2Samuel15:31 Ak kigimwachi Daudi, kelenji, Mi Aitopel koboto njaamikab Absalom. Ak kile Daudi, Ee Jehovah, asomin ale, wal kiruogetab Aitopel koek berberindo." 
2Samuel15:32 Ak kingoit Daudi tulwet barak ole kicham kilosune Kamuktaindet, ogeero, kinyo Husai Arkindet kotorok inendet, ko kagogerer ngoriennyi ak komi ng’ung’unyek metinnyi." 
2Samuel15:33 Ak kilenji Daudi inendet, Ngot inyone kebe tuwai, iegu milet eng’ ane:" 
2Samuel15:34 ago ngot iweeige nganaset, ak ilenji Absalom, Aegu otwogindeng’ung’, ee laitoriat; ko u ye kia otwogindetab kwandang’ung’ eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto, aegu anyun nguno otwogindeng’ung’: iterterwa anyun kiruogetab Aitopel." 
2Samuel15:35 Tos mami koboten tisiik, Sadok ak Abiatar? Ko ye igas ng’olyo age tugul ne bunu gotab laitoriat, imwachi Sadok ak Abiatar, tisiik." 
2Samuel15:36 Keero, tinyei ichek eng’ yoto werikwak aeng’, Aimaas weritab Sadok, ak Jonatan weritab Abiatar; ak oyogune ichek kiy age tugul ne ogase." 
2Samuel15:37 Kiit anyun nganaset Husai choruetab Daudi; ak kiit Absalom Jerusalem. 
2Samuel16:1 Ak kingo kagosiir Daudi tulwet barak kitigin, ogeero, kituiyo ak inendet Siba otwogindetab Mepiboset, kogetu sigirok aeng’ che kiga kiito, koibei makatinik bogol aeng’, ak temenik bogol agenge che bo sabibuk che yaamnyotin, ak logoek bogol agenge che bo kemei, ak sotetab divaik." 
2Samuel16:2 Ak kilenji laitoriat Siba, Bo nee tuguchu? Ak kile Siba, Bo sigirok bikab gotab laitoriat, che lanyei; ko bo murenik makatinik ak logoechu bo kemei, che amei; ak bo divaik bik che katanuiso eng’ ong’atet si koee." 
2Samuel16:3 Ak kile laitoriat, Mi ano weritab kiptaiyandeng’ung’? Ak kilenji Siba laitoriat, Keero, kotebi eng’ Jerusalem: amu kile, Kona rani gotab Israel bounatetab baba." 
2Samuel16:4 Yeityo kolenji laitoriat Siba, Cheguk tuguk tugul che bo Mepiboset. Ak kile Siba, Agutunyi; inganyor chamet eng’ taing’ung’, kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat." 
2Samuel16:5 Ak kingoit laitoriat Daudi Baurim, ogeero, kimong’ eng’ oloto chito ne bo oretab gab Saul, ne kigiguure kainennyi Simei, weritab Gera: kimong’ kochubisionu." 
2Samuel16:6 Ak kiwir Daudi eng’ koik koboto otwogik tugul che bo laitoriat Daudi: ak kimi bik tugul che nyigonen eunnyi ne bo tai ak eunnyi ne bo katam. 
2Samuel16:7 Ak kimwa ko u ni Simei ye kichubisiei, Ui, ui inye, chitab korotik, ak ko chitab Belial:" 
2Samuel16:8 kagoweekyin Jehovah korotik tugul che bo gotab Saul, ne kiilaitoran igeer inendet; ak kagonde Jehovah bounatet eutab wering’ung’ Absalom: ak keero, kaginamin eng’ yaitieng’ung’, amu i chitab korotik." 
2Samuel16:9 Kilenji anyun Abisai weritab Seruia laitoriat, Amu nee si kochub kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat sesoni kigome? Asomin ale, chamwa alanda awa atil metinnyi." 
2Samuel16:10 Ak kile laitoriat, Kiting’ege nee ak okwek, werikab Seruia? Amu chubisiei, ak amu kamwachi Jehovah inendet kolenji, Chub Daudi; ko ng’o anyun ne mwaei kole, Amu nee si iyai ko u no?" 
2Samuel16:11 Ak kilenji Daudi Abisai, koboto otwogikyik tugul, Ogeero, cheng’ei sobondanyu werinnyu ne kibunu bortanyu: ko tam nee anyun Benjaminindoni, obagakte, ak ongochubis; amu kagong’at Jehovah inendet koyai ko u noto." 
2Samuel16:12 Abere keerei Jehovah yaitiet ne kagiyaiywa, ak igeerua Jehovah ne mie agobo chubisioni kagichuba rani." 
2Samuel16:13 Kiba anyun Daudi ak bikyik bandanywa: kiwa Simei kolengel tulwet kotoorjigei inendet, ak kochubisioti, ak kowire inendet koik, ak koseertoi temburiek." 
2Samuel16:14 Ak kiit laitoriat, ak bik tugul che kimi koboto inendet, ko kang’etyo kot; ak kiimuuny eng’ yoto." 
2Samuel16:15 Ak kiit Jerusalem Absalom ak bik tugul, murenikab Israel, ak kimi Aitopel ak inendet." 
2Samuel16:16 Ak kingoit Husai Arkindet, choruetab Daudi, ole mi Absalom, kolenji Husai Absalom, Ingosob laitoriat, ingosob laitoriat." 
2Samuel16:17 Ak kilenji Absalom Husai, Mieindang’ung’ nito ne iyachini chorueng’ung’? Amu nee si mobe ak chorueng’ung’?" 
2Samuel16:18 Ak kilenji Husai Absalom, Achicha; abunjin inendet ne kolewen Jehovah ak bichu ak murenik tugul che bo Israel, kitebye ak inendet." 
2Samuel16:19 Ak kogeny, aboisiechini ng’o? Ne ma eng’ taitab werinnyi? Ko u ye kiaboisie eng’ taitab kwandang’ung’, aboisiei ko u noto eng’ taing’ung’." 
2Samuel16:20 Kilenji anyun Absalom Aitopel, Mwa kit ne kiyae." 
2Samuel16:21 Ak kilenji Aitopel Absalom, Obaige ak chebaigeinikab kwandang’ung’, che kibagakta korib got; ak kogas Israel tugul kole wechin kwandang’ung’: si kogimegitu che omi tugul." 
2Samuel16:22 Koiitochi anyun ichek Absalom emait eng’ baragutab got; ak kiipgei Absalom ak chebaigeinikab kwandanyi kogeerei Israel tugul. 
2Samuel16:23 Ak ki u kiruogetab Aitopel, ne kiiruochi eng’ betusiechoto, ye teebei chi eng’ ng’olyotab Kamuktaindet: ki u noto anyun kiruogutik tugul che bo Aitopel eng’ Daudi ak eng’ Absalom." 
2Samuel17:1 Kilenji Aitopel Absalom kogeny, Chamwa alewen murenik elfusiek taman ak aeng’, ak ang’eet asub Daudi kemouni." 
2Samuel17:2 Si ache kota ko ng’etat ko maimuchi koyai kiy, ak amuu; ak komwei bik tugul che mi koboto inendet; ak abar laitoriat inegei:" 
2Samuel17:3 ak amutun bik tugul: u chichoto ne icheng’e ye kageweech bik tugul: ak kotebi bik tugul eng’ kalyet. 
2Samuel17:4 Ak kiibaibai Absalom ng’olyondonoto, koboto boisiek tugul che bo Israel." 
2Samuel17:5 Yeityo komwa Absalom kole, Oguur Husai Arkindet agine konyo, kegas kit ne mwaei agine." 
2Samuel17:6 Ak kingoit Husai ole mi Absalom, komwachi Absalom inendet kolenji, Kamwa ko u ni Aitopel: kiyai ko u ye kamwa? Ngo ma u noto, imwa inye." 
2Samuel17:7 Ak kilenji Husai Absalom, Ma mie ng’olyot ne kamwa Aitopel ra." 
2Samuel17:8 Kile kogeny Husai, Ingen kwandang’ung’ ak bikyik, ile bik che nyigonen, ak tinyei ng’wanindo eng’ kabwatutikwak, ko u tiondo ne u keerit ne kagirebe arekyik eng’ timin: kwandang’ung’ ko chitab luget, ak maruitos ak bik." 
2Samuel17:9 Kogiuny eng’ keringet, anan ko eng’ komosta age: ak ye kagobek alak eng’ ichek korok, ko age tugul ne kagas komwa kole, Mi barisiet eng’ kwenutab bik che isubi Absalom." 
2Samuel17:10 Agot inendet ne nyigan, ne u muguleldanyi muguleldab ng’etundo, kochootei kogesugei: amu ingen Israel tugul kole chito ne nyigan kwandang’ung’, ak ichek che mi ak inendet ko bik che nyigonen." 
2Samuel17:11 Ago aruochi ale, ingoyumjingei Israel tugul, koboch Dan agoi Beer-seba, kotenit ng’aniek che mitei ngegutab araraita eng’ chang’indo; si iwe luget inyendet." 
2Samuel17:12 Si keche inendet eng’ komosta ne kaginyorji, ak kibutyi inendet ko u ye ibutyin rewot ng’ony: ak magituuchi agot agenge, eng’ inendet ak bik tugul che mi koboto inendet." 
2Samuel17:13 Ak kogeny, ngwo nganaset, koibu Israel anyun rogoosiek kobwa nganasanato, yeityo kong’us kwo ainet, kot ko mang’et koita agenge ne ming’in eng’ oloto." 
2Samuel17:14 Ak kile Absalom ak bik tugul che bo Israel, Kararan kiruogetab Husai Arkindet kosiir kiruogetab Aitopel. Amu kiga til Jehovah koterter kiruoget ne mie ne bo Aitopel, si kobiit koipchi Jehovah yaitiet Absalom." 
2Samuel17:15 Kilenji anyun Husai Sadok ak Abiatar tisiik, Kamwachi Aitopel ko u ni ak ko u ni Absalom ak boisiekab Israel; ak kamwa ko u ni ak ko u ni." 
2Samuel17:16 Ara anyun oyokte ng’olyot ochokyi, ak omwachi Daudi olenji, Amat irue kemouni eng’ ole kilandoe kebendi ong’atet, ago mie olande ui tugul; si ma kiges laitoriat, ak bik tugul che mi ak inendet." 
2Samuel17:17 Kitebi Jonatan ak Aimaas eng’ ole negite En-rogel; ak kicham kowendi chepto ne otwogindet komwachin ichek ng’alek; ak kibendi komwachin laitoriat Daudi: amu kima komachei kogeer chi ichek kobendi nganaset. 
2Samuel17:18 Ago kigeer ichek ng’etet age, ak kwo komwachi Absalom: ak kiba tuwai kochakta, ak kiit gotab chito age eng’ Baurim, ne kitinyei keringetab beek eng’ kurgennyi; ak kiba kochortagei yoto." 
2Samuel17:19 Ak kinam kwondo keruet ak kogere kutitab keringonoto, ak kimae nganok che kagibor baragunnyi; ak ma kinai." 
2Samuel17:20 Ak kibwa otwogikab Absalom ole mi kwonyoto eng’ goyoto; ak kile, Mi ano Aimaas ak Jonatan? Ak kilenji kwonyoto ichek, Kagoba kolandae kererut ne mi beek. Ak kingo kagocheng’, ama imuchi konyor ichek, koweek kwo Jerusalem." 
2Samuel17:21 Ak kingo kagoba ichek, komong’ eng’ keringonoto bo beek, ak koba komwachi laitoriat Daudi; ak kilenji ichek Daudi, Ong’eetye, ak olande eng’ beek, ochakte: amu kagotil ko u noto Aitopel agobo okwek." 
2Samuel17:22 King’eet anyun Daudi, ak bik tugul che kimi ak inendet, ak kolandae Jordan: kingochoru asista, ko kima kota komi agot agenge eng’ ichek ne kitomo kolanda eng’ Jordan." 
2Samuel17:23 Ak kingogeer Aitopel kole, mata kosub chi kiruogennyi, koiito sigiriennyi, ak kong’eet, kwo ga, kot koit nganasennyi, ak kwo korarji ket bikab gonnyi, ak kogetgei; ak kime; ak kigitupchi kereritab kwandanyi." 
2Samuel17:24 Yeityo koit Daudi Maanaim. Ak kilanda Absalom eng’ Jordan, inendet ak murenik tugul che bo Israel koboto inendet." 
2Samuel17:25 Ak kiinde Absalom Amasa koboi luget kogeer Joab. Amasa ko ki weritab chito ne kainennyi ko ki Itra Israelindet, ne kigoipgei ak Abigal cheptab Nahas, chepkametab Seruia kametab Joab." 
2Samuel17:26 Ak kiteech Israel ak Absalom emetab Gilead. 
2Samuel17:27 Ak kingoit Daudi Maanaim, koib Sobi weritab Nahas ne bo Raba ne bo lagokab Amon, ak Makir weritab Amiel ne bo Lo-debar, ak Barsilai Gileadindet ne bo Rogelim," 
2Samuel17:28 itogusiek, tabok, ak terenik, ak nganok, ak sairik, ak busiek, ak bek che kagigel, ak magandek, ak sogoriek, ak igobek," 
2Samuel17:29 ak kumik, ak mwaitab chego, ak kechirek, ak mugunikab chego, koipchi Daudi, ak bik che kimi koboto inendet, koam: amu kile, Amei rubet bik, ak ko ng’etyotin, ak koamei melelda eng’ ong’atet." 
2Samuel18:1 Ak kiit Daudi bik che kimi ak inendet, ak kiinde kiptainikab elfusiek, ak kiptainikab bogolwogik koboi ichek." 
2Samuel18:2 Ak kiiyokto Daudi bik, ak kiinde Joab kondochi kebeberta agenge eng’ somok, ak kiinde Abisai weritab Seruia, ng’etab kametab Joab, kondochi kebeberta agenge eng’ somok, ak kiinde Itai Gitindet kondochi kebeberta agenge eng’ somok. Ak kilenji laitoriat bik, Awendi agane iman kobotok." 
2Samuel18:3 Ago kile bik, Mewendi: amu ngot kemwei, ko mamagenech kiy; anan ngot kobek kebeberta agenge eng’ achek, ko mamagenech kiy: ago oaechine ak bik elfusiek taman eng’ achek: ko mie anyun ichoboge si itoretech eng’ nganaset." 
2Samuel18:4 Ak kilenji laitoriat ichek, Kit ne ogeere okwek ole nyolu, ayae noto. Ak kitonone laitoriat ormarichet taban, ak kimanda bik kobee bogolwogik ak elfusiek." 
2Samuel18:5 Ak king’at laitoriat Joab ak Abisai ak Itai kolenji, Orire nerananato Absalom, agobo ane. Ak kigas bik tugul ye king’atei laitoriat kiptainik tugul agobo Absalom." 
2Samuel18:6 Komanda anyun bik koba kobargei ak Israel eng’ kewet: ak kimi luget eng’ osnetab Epraim. 
2Samuel18:7 Ak kibar otwogikab Daudi bikab Israel eng’ yoto, ak kibiit barisiet ne o eng’ oloto eng’ betunoto, ne bo bik elfusiek tiptem." 
2Samuel18:8 Amu kiyom emet tugul lugonoto: ak kibar osnet bik eng’ betunoto che siirei che kigibare rotwetab chok. 
2Samuel18:9 Ak kichunji Absalom otwogikab Daudi. Ak kibunei Absalom nyumbunnyi, ak kichut nyumbut temenik che kichang’a che bo ketit ne o, ak kinam metinnyi ketoto, ak kosonginin; ak kiwa anyun nyumbut ne kibunoti, kosiirto." 
2Samuel18:10 Ak kigeer chito age, ak komwachi Joab kolenji, Keero, kageer Absalom kosonginini eng’ ketit." 
2Samuel18:11 Ak kilenji Joab chichoto kimwachin inendet, Keero, inye ne kegeere, kalya si metoor inendet eng’ yoto kosore, kokwer ng’onyut? Ak ta kaagonin fedaisiek taman, ak birenet." 
2Samuel18:12 Ak kilenji chichoto Joab, Agot ndaname fedaisiek elfut eng’ eunnyu, ko matwae kora weritab laitoriat eng’ eunnyu: amu king’atin laitoriat ak Abisai ak Itai kegase kole, Oripge, si matwa chi nerananato Absalom." 
2Samuel18:13 Nda kaga ayachi sobondanyi ko u noto, ang’alse (ama mi ng’olyo ne ung’oksei eng’ laitoriat), ko kata iistoenage inye." 
2Samuel18:14 Kole anyun Joab, Ma mie kigage ne te ni ak inye. Ak kinam kiblitok somok, ak kotoor muguleldab Absalom, ye kita kosobei eng’ ketoto." 
2Samuel18:15 Ak kiyiem inendet murenik tamanu, che kiipchin Joab karikyik, ak kotoor Absalom, kobar." 
2Samuel18:16 Ak kiguut Joab iriaget, ak kiweek bik kobagakta oret ne kione Israel; amu kiete Joab bik." 
2Samuel18:17 Ak kisut Absalom ak kowirji keringet ne o eng’ osnet, ak korurukyi inendet karurugutiet ne o ne bo koik: ak kimwei Israel tugul, kwo age tugul emainnyi." 
2Samuel18:18 Ak kiga koteekyigei Absalom kit ne u toloita ye kita kosobei inendet, ne mi atebwetab laitoriat: amu kile, Matinye werit ne kibwate kainennyu: ak kimwaitoe kioto kainennyi: ak kigiguure toloitab Absalom agoi ra." 
2Samuel18:19 Kile anyun Aimaas weritab Sadok, Ingalabat, aipchi laitoriat ng’alek, alenji kagoyaaktochigei Jehovah mugetut eng’ bunikyik." 
2Samuel18:20 Ak kilenji Joab inendet, Meibe ng’alek ra, ago iibe ng’alek betut age: meibe ng’olyo age tugul betuni, amu kagome weritab laitoriat." 
2Samuel18:21 Ak kilenji Joab Kusindet, Ui mwachi laitoriat tuguk che kaigeer. Ak kiing’uruk Kusindet eng’ taitab Joab, ak kolabat." 
2Samuel18:22 Kolenji anyun Aimaas, weritab Sadok Joab kogeny, Agot nda biitu kiy age tugul, asomin ale, chamwa agane alabat asub Kusindet. Ak kile Joab, Amu nee si imache ilabat-o, werinnyu, ago mesiche melek agobo ng’alechato?" 
2Samuel18:23 Ago kile, Agot nda biitu kiy age tugul, alabati. Ak kilenji inendet, Labat. Kilabat anyun Aimaas kobun oretab Warenget, ak kiwa kondoe Kusindet." 
2Samuel18:24 Kitebe Daudi kwenutab ormarichok aeng’: ak kitogosta ribindet kwo ormarichet barak kot koit irimet, ak kitobendo, ak kigeer, ogeero, chito ne labatu inegei." 
2Samuel18:25 Ak kiwaach ribindet ak komwachi laitoriat. Ak kile laitoriat, Ngot ko inegei, kotinyei ng’alek che nyo komwaei. Ak kilabot korik." 
2Samuel18:26 Ak kigeer ribindet chito age kolabotu: ak kiguur ribindet, ribindetab ormarichet, ak kole, Keero, labotu chito age inegei. Ak kile laitoriat, Ibu agine ng’alek." 
2Samuel18:27 Ak kile ribindet, Ageere ko kergei labatetab ne indou ak labatetab Aimaas weritab Sadok. Ak kile laitoriat, Inendet ko chi ne mie, ak ibu ng’alek che miach." 
2Samuel18:28 Ak kiguurso Aimaas, ak kolenji laitoriat, Chamegei tugul. Ak kiing’uruk eng’ taitab laitoriat kot kotiiny togennyi ng’ony, ak kole, Iberurot Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne kaigoito bik che kolen kobargei ak kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat." 
2Samuel18:29 Ak kile laitoriat, Chamegei nerananato Absalom? Ak kiwol Aimaas kole, Kangoyogu Joab otwogindetab laitoriat, ane otwogindeng’ung, ageer wasetab ge ne o, ago manai kit ne kabo." 
2Samuel18:30 Ak kilenji laitoriat, Ui taban, ak itonon eng’ yu. Ak kiwa taban, ak kotonon." 
2Samuel18:31 Ak ogeero, kiit Kusindet; ak kile Kusindet, Ng’alek che bo kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat: amu kayooktoun Jehovah rani mugetut eng’ tugul che koga ng’eetyo kole obarge." 
2Samuel18:32 Ak kilenji laitoriat Kusindet, Chamegei nerananato Absalom? Ak kiwolji Kusindet kole, Ingoigei bunikab kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, ak bik tugul che ng’eetyinin kole kobarin, kit ne kaigei nerananato." 
2Samuel18:33 Ak kiarogen mising’ laitoriat, ak kitogosta kwo got orit ne mi ormarichet barak, ak korir: ak kingowendi kolenoti, Ooi werinnyu Absalom, werinnyu, werinnyu Absalom! Kata kaigai ame ne kata inye, Ooi Absalom, werinnyu, werinnyu!" 
2Samuel19:1 Ak kigimwachi Joab kelenji, Keero, rirei laitoriat, ak kotei agobo Absalom." 
2Samuel19:2 Ak kiwalak katerterisiet eng’ betunoto koek kateiyet eng’ bik tugul: amu kigas bik kemwaei betunoto kele, Arogeni laitoriat agobo werinnyi." 
2Samuel19:3 Ak kiba bik nganaset betunoto koung’ategei, ko u ye ung’otegei bik che ililandos, ye mwei eng’ luget." 
2Samuel19:4 Ak kituch laitoriat togennyi, ak kiite laitoriat eng’ kutit ne o kole, Ooi werinnyu Absalom, ooi Absalom, werinnyu, werinnyu!" 
2Samuel19:5 Ak kinyo Joab go, ole mi laitoriat ak kolenji, Kegochi togochikab otwogiguk tugul eng’ betuni kolilanso, che kasor sobondang’ung’ rani, ak sobonwekab weriguk ak tibiguk, ak sobonwekab osotiguk, ak sobonwekab chebaigeiniguk;" 
2Samuel19:6 amu ichame ichek che wechin, ak iweche ichek che chamin. Amu kebarte rani ile, ma kiy eng’ inye bounik ak otwogik: amu kaageer rani, ale nda kagosob Absalom, ak kebegu achek tugul rani, ko kata iboiboin mising’." 
2Samuel19:7 Ng’eet anyun, mande, ak ing’alalji otwogiguk, igaigai: amu ayostosi eng’ Jehovah ale, ngot ko memande ko mang’etun chi kemouni: ak yaitu noto eng’ inye kosiir yaitiet tugul ne kigonyonjin koboch ming’inateng’ung’ agoi nguno." 
2Samuel19:8 Kong’eet anyun laitoriat ak kotebe ormarichet. Ak kigimwachi bik tugul kelenji, Ogeero, tebyei ng’ony laitoriat eng’ ormarich: ak kibwa bik tugul taitab laitoriat. Kiga komwei Israel, kwo chi tugul emainnyi." 
2Samuel19:9 Ak kibiit suriet eng’ bik tugul eng’ bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel, kole, Kisoruech laitoriat eng’ bunikyok, ak kisoruech eng’ eunekab Pilistik; ak nguno ko kigomwei inendet eng’ emet komwee Absalom." 
2Samuel19:10 Ak kogome eng’ luget Absalom ne kiga kiil koboiywech. Ara anyun amu nee si momwa kimut laitoriat koweek? 
2Samuel19:11 Kiiyokto anyun laitoriat Daudi ng’alek koba oldab Sadok ak Abiatar, che ki tisiik, kelenji, Omwachi boisiekab Juda olenji, Amu nee si oegu che bo let eng’ kamutunetab laitoriat koweek konyo gonnyi? Amu kogobwanji laitoriat ng’alekab Israel tugul, kele, kimut inendet konyo gonnyi." 
2Samuel19:12 O tupchosiekyuk, o kowekyuk ak banyekyuk: amu nee anyun si oegu che bo let eng’ kamutunetab laitoriat koweek?" 
2Samuel19:13 Ak olenji Amasa, Tos ma i kowekyuk ak banyekyuk? Ingoyaiywa Kamuktaindet ko u noto, ak kotes, ngot ko meegu kiptaiyatab luget eng’ tainnyu kotugul igeer Joab." 
2Samuel19:14 Ak kiwelel mugulelwekab bik tugul che bo Juda, ko u ne bo chito agenge; kot koyokto kemwachi laitoriat, kolenji, Mie iweeige koboto otwogiguk tugul." 
2Samuel19:15 Kiweek anyun laitoriat, konyo Jordan. Ak kinyo Juda Gilgal, kotorok laitoriat, komut kolong’une Jordan." 
2Samuel19:16 Ak kichok Simei, weritab Gera, Benjaminindet, ne ki bo Baurim, kochorgei koboto bikab Juda kotorok laitoriat Daudi." 
2Samuel19:17 Ak kimi koboto inendet bik elfut agenge che bo Benjamin, ak Siba otwogindetab gotab Saul, ak werikyik taman ak mut, ak otwogikyik tiptem; ak kilandae Jordan eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
2Samuel19:18 Ak kilanda moinget ne ming’in kwo komut bikab gotab laitoriat kolong’, ak koyai kit ne kigeerei kole mie. Ak kiibutyi ng’ony Simei weritab Gera, eng’ taitab laitoriat, ko kagolong’ eng’ Jordan." 
2Samuel19:19 Ak kilenji laitoriat, Amat koiitya tengekto kiptaiyandennyu, anan ibwat kii kiga yai otwogindeng’ung’ komaasak, eng’ betuni kimandoi kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem, ale amanam laitoriat kioto eng’ muguleldanyi." 
2Samuel19:20 Amu ingen otwogindeng’ung’ kole kigoyai tengekto: noto anyun keero, kanyo rani andou eng’ bik tugul che bo gotab Josep, achoruge atorogu kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat." 
2Samuel19:21 Ago kiwol Abisai weritab Seruia, kole, Tos magibarei Simei agobo kiito, amu kichub ne iilat ne bo Jehovah?" 
2Samuel19:22 Ak kile Daudi, Kiting’ege nee ak okwek werikab Seruia, kot oegu bunik eng’ ane rani? Kibarei chi rani eng’ Israel? Mangen ale, a laitoriat rani ne bou Israel?" 
2Samuel19:23 Ak kilenji laitoriat Simei, Memee. Ak kiiyosiechi laitoriat inendet." 
2Samuel19:24 Ak kichorgei Mepiboset weritab Saul kotorok laitoriat; kimata kotil siokab kelyekyik, anan kocher tamnennyi, anan komwet ngoroikyik, koboch betut ne kiga wa laitoriat agoi betut ne kiweeksei ga eng’ kalyet." 
2Samuel19:25 Ak kingonyo Jerusalem kogat laitoriat, kolenji inendet, Amu nee-o, Mepiboset, si mecham kebe tuwai?" 
2Samuel19:26 Ak kiwol kole, Kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat, kiiberbera otwogindennyu: amu kiale ane otwogindeng’ung’, Aiitoi sigiriet, si kobiit alany, kebe ak laitoriat; amu ing’wali otwogindeng’ung’." 
2Samuel19:27 Ak king’acha ane otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat: ago u kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat malaikaiyatab Kamuktaindet: yai anyun kit ne igeere ile mie. 
2Samuel19:28 Amu ki u got tugul ne bo kwandanyu, bik che kigobek eng’ taitab kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat: ago kiinde otwogindeng’ung’ kwenutab icheget che amisie meseng’ung’. Atinye imanda nee anyun kot kota arirji laitoriat?" 
2Samuel19:29 Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Amu nee si kota ing’alale tuguguk? Kale, Opchei emet ak Siba." 
2Samuel19:30 Ak kilenji Mepiboset laitoriat, Ingoib inendet tugul, amu kigoweek kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat eng’ kalyet konyo gonnyi." 
2Samuel19:31 Ak kichortagei Barsilai Gileadindet eng’ Rogelim; kwo kolandae Jordan koboto laitoriat, komut inendet kolandae Jordan." 
2Samuel19:32 Kiga koosit mising’ Barsilai, ki bo kenyisiek tamanwogik sisiit: kichopchin laitoriat amitwogik ye kimi Maanaim; amu ki chito ne toogunot." 
2Samuel19:33 Ak kilenji laitoriat Barsilai, Ngelande kebe keamisie tuwai eng’ Jerusalem." 
2Samuel19:34 Ak kilenji Barsilai laitoriat, Ata betusiekab kenyisiekab sobondanyu kot ketogoste ak laitoriat kebe Jerusalem?" 
2Samuel19:35 A bo rani kenyisiek tamanwogik sisiit: ta amuchi abesio ne mie ak ne ya? Ta komuchi otwogindeng’ung’ kogas kit ne chamu tuguk che aame anan ko che aee? Ta amuchi agas cheetab murenik che tiendos, ak kwonyik che tiendos? Amu nee anyun si ko ta koek milet otwogindeng’ung’ kogeny, eng’ kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat?" 
2Samuel19:36 Landoi otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ Jordan kityo, koboto laitoriat: ak amu nee si koyookwa laitoriat melekto ne u noto?" 
2Samuel19:37 Asomin ale, ngaweek ane otwogindeng’ung’ kogeny, awa amechi nganasennyu, ye negite kereritab kwandanyu ak kamennyu. Ago keero otwogindeng’ung’, Kimham; ingolanda koboto kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat; ak iyachi kit ne igeere ile mie eng’ inye." 
2Samuel19:38 Ak kiwol laitoriat kole, Kilandoi ak Kimham, ak ayachi kit ne igeere ile mie eng’ inye: ak kit age tugul ne imagena, ayaun kioto." 
2Samuel19:39 Ak kilandae bik tugul Jordan, ak kilanda laitoriat: ak king’utut laitoriat Barsilai, ak koberur; ak kiweektagei kwo oldanyi." 
2Samuel19:40 Kilanda anyun laitoriat kwo Gilgal, ak kilanda Kimham ak inendet: ak kiimut bik tugul che bo Juda laitoriat kolong’, ak kebebertab bikab Israel." 
2Samuel19:41 Ak ogeero, kibwanji laitoriat bik tugul che bo Israel, ak kolenji laitoriat, Amu nee si kochorin tupchosiekyok bikab Juda, ak komut laitoriat, koboto gonnyi, kolong’une Jordan, koboto bik tugul che bo Daudi?" 
2Samuel19:42 Ak kiwolji bik tugul che bo Juda bikab Israel, kolenji, Amu chitab oret ne negit laitoriat eng’ achek: ko amu nee anyun si onerech agobo ng’olyondonoto? Tos kigiam tugukab laitoriat? Anan kigonech konunet age tugul?" 
2Samuel19:43 Ak kiwolji bikab Israel bikab Juda, kolenji, Kitinye kebeberwek taman eng’ laitoriat, amu kitinye kebeberta ne o eng’ Daudi kosiirok: ko amu nee anyun si osasech, si moteebenech kotom omutu laitoriandennyo? Ak kigoromitu ng’alekab bikab Juda kosiir ng’alekab bikab Israel." 
2Samuel20:1 Ak kibiit eng’ yoto chi ne bo Belial, ne kainennyi ko ki Sheba, weritab Bikri, Benjaminindet: ak kiguut iriaget, ak kole, Magitinye kebeberta eng’ Daudi, ama kitinye borotet eng’ weritab Jesii: ingwo chi tugul emaisiekyik, ee Israel." 
2Samuel20:2 Kotogosta anyun bik tugul che bo Israel, mata kosub Daudi, kiisub Sheba weritab Bikri: ago kinamgei bikab Juda ak laitoriandenywa, koboch Jordan agoi Jerusalem." 
2Samuel20:3 Ak kinyo Daudi gonnyi eng’ Jerusalem; ak kinam laitoriat kwonyichugiche taman, chebaigeinikyik, chu kiga bagakta korib got, ak konde got orit, korat, ak kobai, ago mata kwo ole mi ichek. Kigirat anyun agoi betutab meenywa, koteb koek mosogik." 
2Samuel20:4 Kilenji anyun laitoriat Amasa, Kuurwa murenikab Juda koyumgei eng’ betusiek somok, ak inyo aginye." 
2Samuel20:5 Kwo anyun Amasa koguur bikab Juda kotuiyo: ago kiigagei kosiir che kiga ng’at laitoriat inendet. 
2Samuel20:6 Ak kilenji Daudi Abisai, Yaiywech yaitiet Sheba weritab Bikri nguno kosiir ne kiyai Absalom: imut anyun otwogikab kiptaiyandeng’ung’, ak isub inendet, si manamjigei nganasok che ng’ototin, ak kochilil si mata kegeer." 
2Samuel20:7 Ak kiisub inendet bikab Joab, ak Keretik ak Peletik, ak bik tugul che nyigonen: ak kiba eng’ Jerusalem, kosub Sheba weritab Bikri." 
2Samuel20:8 Ak kingorikyi koita ne o ne mi Gibeon, konyo Amasa kotorok ichek. Ak kiga rat Joab karikyik che bo luget, che kiga ilaach, ak kitinyei birenet ak rotwetab chok ne kiga ratyi suennyi komi choget; ak ye kiwendi, kochun rotwet." 
2Samuel20:9 Ak kilenji Joab Amasa, Tos ichamege, tupchennyu? Ak kinam Joab tamnetab Amasa eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai, ko u ne machei kong’utut inendet." 
2Samuel20:10 Ago ma keer Amasa rotwetab chok ne kitinyei Joab eng’ eunnyi: kotoor anyun moet eng’ rotwonoto, ak kitumda agutanikyik koba ng’ony, amata kotoor inendet kogeny; ak kime. Ak kiisub Joab ak Abisai ng’etab kamet, Sheba weritab Bikri." 
2Samuel20:11 Ak kitonon eng’ ye negite inendet age eng’ murenikab Joab, ak kole, Inendet ne chamei Joab, ak inendet ne bo Daudi, kosub Joab." 
2Samuel20:12 Ak kimildoegei Amasa korotikyik eng’ kwenutab oret ne o. Ak kingogeer chichoto kole katononso bik tugul, kola Amasa koistogei eng’ oranato o kwo kewet, ak kotuge ngoriet, ye kingogeer kole ngo it chi tugul yoto, kotonon." 
2Samuel20:13 Kingo kageisto eng’ oranato o, koba bik tugul kosub Joab, kosub Sheba weritab Bikri." 
2Samuel20:14 Ak kibun bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel agoi koit Abel, ak Bet-maaka, ak ole mi Berik tugul: ak kiga iyumgei, ak kiba agichek kosub inendet." 
2Samuel20:15 Ak kibwa koyiem inendet eng’ Abel ne bo Bet-maaka, ak kiiyum ng’ung’unyek koek tulwo konamgei ak nganaset, ak kitonon konamgei ak irimet: ak kirieb irimet bik tugul che kimi ak Joab, koluul kwo ng’ony." 
2Samuel20:16 Kowaach anyun kwondo age ne ng’om eng’ nganasanato, kole, Ogaso, ogaso, asomok ale olenji Joab konyo korik yu, si kobiit ang’alalji." 
2Samuel20:17 Ak kinyo ye mi kwonyoto, ak kimwa kwonyoto, kole, I Joab? Ak kiwolji kolenji, A inendet. Kolenji anyun inendet, Kas ng’alekab cheptang’ung’ ne otwogindet. Ak kiwol kole, Agase." 
2Samuel20:18 Yeityo komwa kole, Kicham kemwaei keny, kele, Kiteebe iman ng’omnatet eng’ Abel: koges anyun ng’alechato." 
2Samuel20:19 A bo ichek che bo kalyet ak che bo iman eng’ Israel: icheng’e ibar nganaset ak ko kamet eng’ Israel: amu nee si imache ilugui borotetab Jehovah? 
2Samuel20:20 Ak kiwol Joab kole, Ingolooit, ingolooit eng’ ane, si malugui anan abar." 
2Samuel20:21 Ma u noto ng’olyondonoto: kimach Sheba weritab Bikri, chito ne bo emetab tulonokab Epraim, kobar laitoriat, inendet Daudi: ogonu inendet inegei, si awa eng’ nganaset. Ak kilenji kwonyoto Joab, Keero, kiwirun metinnyi kosiir irimet." 
2Samuel20:22 Kwo anyun kwonyoto eng’ ng’omnatennyi ole mi bik tugul. Ak kitil ichek metitab Sheba weritab Bikri, ak kowir konyo sang’ ole mi Joab. Ak kiguut anyun Joab iriaget, ak koba eng’ nganaset, kwo chi tugul emainnyi. Ak kiweek Joab kwo Jerusalem ole mi laitoriat." 
2Samuel20:23 Ak koboi Joab luget tugul ne bo Israel: ak kiboi Benaia weritab Jeoiada Keretik ak Peletik: 
2Samuel20:24 ak kiboi Adoram aisurut: ki sirindetab tuguk che biitu Jeosapat weritab Ailud: 
2Samuel20:25 ak ki sirindet Seva: ak ki tisiik Sadok ak Abiatar: 
2Samuel20:26 ak ki tisiindetab Daudi agine Ira Jairindet. 
2Samuel21:1 Ak kibiit rubet eng’ betusiekab Daudi, eng’ kenyisiek somok che kiisubegei, ak kicheng’ Daudi togetab Jehovah. Ak kile Jehovah, Bo Saul, ak gonnyi ne bo korotik, amu kibar Gibeonik." 
2Samuel21:2 Ak kiguur laitoriat Gibeonik, ak kolenji; (kima ko bo Gibeonik lagokab Israel, ki bo bik che king’etune Amorik; ak kiga koyosiechi ichek lagokab Israel: ak kicheng’ei Saul kobar ichek amu kagiilennyi bo ge agobo lagokab Israel ak Juda:)" 
2Samuel21:3 ak kilenji Daudi Gibeonik, Ayaiywok nee? Ak ayai kagaigao nee, si kobiit oberur borotetab Jehovah?" 
2Samuel21:4 Ak kilenji Gibeonik inendet, Ma ng’olyotab feda anan ko tahabu eng’ kwenunnyo achek ak Saul, anan ko gonnyi; ama botech kebar chi age tugul eng’ Israel. Ak kile, Kit ne omwae, ayaiywok kioto." 
2Samuel21:5 Ak kilenji ichek laitoriat, Chichi kiigeswech, ak ne kichobei kegirindech, kole kebarech kot ko ma king’etu eng’ kiwotet age tugul ne bo Israel," 
2Samuel21:6 ingigonech bik tisab che bo werikyik, si kigartatyi Jehovah eng’ Gibea ne bo Saul, ne kilewen Jehovah. Ak kile laitoriat, Agonu ichek." 
2Samuel21:7 Ago kirire laitoriat Mepiboset, weritab Jonatan, weritab Saul, amu kayosietab Jehovah ne kimi kwenunywa, kwenutab Daudi ak Jonatan weritab Saul." 
2Samuel21:8 Ago kinam laitoriat werik tuwai che bo Rispa cheptab Aia, che kiga sikyi Saul, Armoni ak Mepiboset; ak werik mut che bo Mikal cheptab Saul, che kiga sikyi Adriel weritab Barsilai Meolatindet:" 
2Samuel21:9 ak kiinde eunekab Gibeonik, ak kiigartat ichek eng’ tulwet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kibek tugul ko tisab kibagenge: ak kigibar ichek eng’ betusiekab kesisiet, eng’ betusiek che bo tai eng’ taunetab kesisietab sairik." 
2Samuel21:10 Ak kiinem Rispa cheptab Aia kuniok ak kiitochigei eng’ ruandet, koboch taunetab kesisiet agoi korobonji ropta ne bunu kipsengwet; ak ma chamji taritik kobutyi muswekwak bet, anan kobwa tiong’ikab timin kemoi." 
2Samuel21:11 Ak kigimwachi Daudi kit ne koyai Rispa cheptab Aia, chebaigeiyatab Saul." 
2Samuel21:12 Ak kiwa Daudi koib kowekab Saul ak kowekab Jonatan werinnyi eng’ bikab Jabes-gilead, che kiga chor eng’ oretab Bet-san, ole kiga igartate Pilistik, eng’ betut ne kibarei Pilistik Saul eng’ Gilboa:" 
2Samuel21:13 ak kiib kowekab Saul ak kowekab Jonatan werinnyi kotogos; ak kiiyum kowekab icheget che kiga kigartat. 
2Samuel21:14 Ak kitub kowekab Saul ak che bo Jonatan werinnyi eng’ emetab Benjamin eng’ Sela, eng’ kereritab Kis kwandanyi: ak kiyai tuguk tugul che king’at laitoriat. Ak kingobata choto kogasyi Kamuktaindet ichek rirek agobo emet." 
2Samuel21:15 Ak kibiit luget kogeny eng’ Pilistik ak Israel; ak kichortagei Daudi ak otwogikyik, kobwa kobargei ak Pilistik: ak king’et Daudi." 
2Samuel21:16 Ak kilen Isbi-benok, ne ki bo werikab chito chemosit, ne ki nyigisindab ng’otinnyi ko ki sekelisiek bogol somok che bo sugunwet, ak kiga rat rotwetab chok ne leel, kole kobar Daudi." 
2Samuel21:17 Ago kitoret inendet Abisai weritab Seruia, ak kikwer Pilistindet ak kobar. Yeityo koyosiechi bikab Daudi inendet, kolenji, Ma kebendi tugul kogeny luget ak inye, si memis taitab Israel." 
2Samuel21:18 Ak kingobata nito, kobiit luget kogeny ak Pilistik eng’ Gob: kobar Sibeikai Husatindet Sap, ne ki bo werikab chito chemosit." 
2Samuel21:19 Ak kibiit kogeny luget ak Pilistik eng’ Gob; ak kibar Elanan weritab Jaareoregim Bet-lehemindet Goliat Gitindet, ne ki kergei irumetab ndirinnyi, ak ketit ne taachin usisiek chito ne nabisiei." 
2Samuel21:20 Ak kibiit luget kogeny eng’ Gat, ole kimi chito ne koi kot, ne kitinyei morik lo eng’ eut age tugul, ak kitinyei morik lo eng’ keldo age tugul, ki tiptem ak ang’wan tugul; ak kiga kisikyi chichoto agine chito chemosit." 
2Samuel21:21 Ak ye kingoreny Israel, kobar inendet Jonatan weritab Simei ng’etab kametab Daudi." 
2Samuel21:22 Kigisikyi bichoto ang’wan chito chemosit eng’ Gat: ak kibar Daudi ak otwogikyik bichoto. 
2Samuel22:1 Ak kimwachi Daudi Jehovah ng’alekab tieni eng’ betut ne kigasor Jehovah inendet eng’ eunekab bunikyik tugul, ak eng’ eutab Saul:" 
2Samuel22:2 ak kile, Jehovah ruandennyu, ak irimennyu, ak orunindennyu, ne nenyu;" 
2Samuel22:3 Kamuktaindetab ruandennyu, amang’u inendet; Long’ennyu, ak kuinetab yetunennyu, teeksennyu ne koi, ak ole amwechini; Yetindennyu, isorua eng’ koromnatet." 
2Samuel22:4 Aguure Jehovah, ne nyoljin kilos: Si kesorua eng’ bunikyuk." 
2Samuel22:5 Kiyiema beek che mildogei che bo meet, Kigona maranosiekab yaitiet aiyweis." 
2Samuel22:6 Kiyiema boroonikab oldab che kigobek: Kichea mestonokab meet. 
2Samuel22:7 Kiaguur Jehovah eng’ bichiindanyu, Ee, kiaguur Kamuktaindennyu: Ak kigas kutinnyu eng’ hekalunnyi, Ak kiit rirekyuk itikyik." 
2Samuel22:8 Kigirgiren ng’ony anyun ak kibotan, Kitwagei lumeiywekab kipsengwet Ak kotumdumgei, amu kinerech." 
2Samuel22:9 Kitogostae iyeto serunekyik: Ak kibeelso mat ne kimong’une kutinnyi: Kilalyo nesek eng’ maata. 
2Samuel22:10 Kiim kipsengwetisiek agichek, ak kochorgei inendet; Ak kimi mesundeito ne o kureretab kelyekyik." 
2Samuel22:11 Ak kilany kerubindet, ak kotiriren: Ee, kitook eng’ kebebaikab usonet." 
2Samuel22:12 Ak kiyai mesundeito koek emaisiekyik che mi komoswekyik tugul, Kayumetab ge ne bo beek, bolik che tuuen che bo barak." 
2Samuel22:13 Kilalyo nesek Eng’ kaluunet ne kimi tainnyi. 
2Samuel22:14 Kitul Jehovah eng’ kipsengwetisiek, Ak kitwek Inendet ne Toror Mising’." 
2Samuel22:15 Ak kiiyokto kipchabonik, koiyesta; Koboto kalyelet, ak koiyesta ichek." 
2Samuel22:16 Kitook anyun kererusiekab nyanjet, King’ang’ogis lumeiywekab ng’ony, Eng’ keretab kong’ ne bo Jehovah, Eng’ cheetab kabusetab serunekyik." 
2Samuel22:17 Kiiyok eng’ barak, ak koganaba; Kiichuutwa among’ eng’ beek che chang’." 
2Samuel22:18 Kisorua eng’ bunyondennyu ne kim, Eng’ icheget che kiwecha; amu ki kimen kosiira." 
2Samuel22:19 Kichea eng’ betutab nyalildanyu: Ago kiek Jehovah ne atiiege. 
2Samuel22:20 Kiimuta amanda awa ole baraa: Kisorua, amu kibaibait eng’ane." 
2Samuel22:21 Kigona Jehovah ko u imandanyu; Kigona ko u tililindab eunekyuk. 
2Samuel22:22 Amu kiarib ortinwekab Jehovah, Ak ma abagakte Kamuktaindennyu eng’ or ne ya." 
2Samuel22:23 Amu kimi tainnyu kiruogutikyik tugul, Ak ma aistoege konetisiosiekyik." 
2Samuel22:24 Kiagesunotgei agane eng’ tainnyi, Ak kiaripge si manama tengekto." 
2Samuel22:25 Kigona anyun Jehovah ko u imandanyu; Ko u tililindanyu eng’ tainnyi. 
2Samuel22:26 Eng’ che tinyei rirenetab ge i bo rirenetab ge: Ak eng’ chito ne igesunotgei ibortoige ile igesunotge. 
2Samuel22:27 Eng’ che tililen ibortoige ile i tilil, Ak eng’ che mastoi, obortosi." 
2Samuel22:28 Ak isoru che nyerotin. Ago igeere che mendos, si kobiit iming’in." 
2Samuel22:29 Amu i tainnyu Jehovah: Ak ikwenyi Jehovah mesundeitanyu. 
2Samuel22:30 Amu aiyestoi luget eng’ inye; Eng’ Kamuktaindennyu atorombeni asiire irimet. 
2Samuel22:31 Igesunotgei oretab Kamuktaindet: Kigonaak ng’olyotab Jehovah; Inendet long’etab icheget tugul che imang’u. 
2Samuel22:32 Amu tos ng’o Kamuktaindet, kobate Jehovah? Ak tos ng’o ruandet, kobate Kamuktaindennyo?" 
2Samuel22:33 Kamuktaindet ko irimennyu ne kim: Ak indochin ne gesunotgei eng’ orennyi. 
2Samuel22:34 Yaei inendet kelyekyuk koigei che bo kenyelet ne kotoy: Ak nama atonon eng’ komoswekyuk che tororen. 
2Samuel22:35 Ineti eunekyuk koyai luget; Si kong’i eunekyuk kwanget ne bo sugunwet. 
2Samuel22:36 Kiigona long’etab yetuneng’ung’ agine: Ak kigoeeta talasieng’ung’. 
2Samuel22:37 Kiibaraiywa kakwautikyuk, Ama ichabaita kelyekyuk." 
2Samuel22:38 Kiasub bunikyuk, ak abar; Ama aweeige agoi kogesgei." 
2Samuel22:39 Kiawong’u ichek, ak atui, kot ko ma komuchi kong’eetyo: Ee, kagobutyi ichek kelyekyuk kel." 
2Samuel22:40 Amu kiiratwa kimnatet ne bo luget: Kiiterterwa aboi che king’eetya. 
2Samuel22:41 Kiiwelel bunikyuk kotuktocha batai, Si kobiit ang’eti ichek che wecha." 
2Samuel22:42 Kigeer, ago kima biit ne kisor; Kigeer Jehovah, ago kima wolji." 
2Samuel22:43 Kiatonaton anyun ichek komengegitu koigei temburiekab ng’ony, Kiatiech ko u ng’atatek che mi ortinwek, ak ayeste." 
2Samuel22:44 Kiisorua aginye eng’ boriosiekab bikyuk; Kiiriba aek metitab bororiosiek: Tun ota bik che tom anai. 
2Samuel22:45 Tun kasa it toek eng’ ng’alset: Ye kas agobo ane, eng’ yoto kogasa it." 
2Samuel22:46 Begunoti toek kowandogei, Ak komong’ eng’ ole ung’egei kobotandos." 
2Samuel22:47 Sobei Jehovah; ak iberurot ruandennyu; Ak ingotororit Kamuktaindetab ruandetab yetunennyu: 
2Samuel22:48 Kamuktaindet ne yaaktoiywa mugetut, Ak koming’ini bik kogasa it," 
2Samuel22:49 Ne imutwa among’une bunikyuk: Ee, itorora asiir ichek che ng’eetyina: Isorua eng’ chito ne korom." 
2Samuel22:50 Aweegun kongoi anyun, ee Jehovah, eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek, Ak atienji kaineng’ung’ kalosunoik." 
2Samuel22:51 Igochin laitoriandennyi sorunet ne o; Ak koborjin nenyi ne iilat chamnyennyi ne tala, Daudi ak iyotennyi agoi koigeny." 
2Samuel23:1 Chu anyun ko ng’alek che bo let che bo Daudi. Kale Daudi weritab Jesii, Ak kole chito ne kigitoor, Ne iilat ne bo Kamuktaindetab Jakobo, Ak tienindet ne mie ne bo Israel, ne bo tienwogikab kalosunet." 
2Samuel23:2 King’alalena Tamirmirietab Jehovah, Ak kimi ng’olyondennyi ng’elyeptanyu." 
2Samuel23:3 Kile Kamuktaindetab Israel, King’alalwa Ruandetab Israel kole: Inendet ne bou bik eng’ imanda, Ne bou eng’ kaiyweisietab Kamuktaindet," 
2Samuel23:4 Ko kergeitu ak lapkeiyet ne bo karon, ye choru asista, Karonet ne churat; Ye bitos suswek che ng’orng’oren, Eng’ kaluunet ne lapkei ko kamoen ropta." 
2Samuel23:5 Ma u noto iman gonnyu eng’ Kamuktaindet; Ago kigoyomiswa kayomiset ne bo koigeny, Ne kigichob eng’ tuguk tugul, ak ko lumdaat: Amu noto ko yetunennyu tugul, ak ko magennyu tugul, Agot ngo mayai kotesak." 
2Samuel23:6 Ago kergeitu tugul che maiywei Jehovah ak katok che kiwirtoi, Amu ma namaksei eng’ eut:" 
2Samuel23:7 Ago chito ne namei Ko kanyol kotinyei karik ak irumetab ng’otit; Ak kibeelei eng’ mat kogesgei eng’ komostanywa. 
2Samuel23:8 Chu ko kainaikab murenik che nyigonen che kitinyei Daudi: Joseb-basebet Takemonindet, ne o eng’ kiptainik; inendet ko ki Adino Esnindet, kibar bik bogol sisiit eng’ betunak." 
2Samuel23:9 Ak ne rubei inendet ko ki Eleasar weritab Dodai weritab Ahoindet, ki age eng’ murenichoto somok nyigonen che kimi ak Daudi, ye kiwitei Pilistik che kiga iyumgei eng’ yoto agobo luget, ak kiga koba murenikab Israel:" 
2Samuel23:10 king’eet kobar Pilistik kot kong’et eunnyi, ak kinamgei eunnyi ak rotwetab chok: ak kiyai Jehovah katerteret ne o betunoto; ak kiweek bik kityo kosub inendet koba konyaban tuguk." 
2Samuel23:11 Ak ne rubei inendet ko ki Sama weritab Agee Hararindet. Ak kiga iyumgei Pilistik koek luget, eng’ ole kimi mbaret ne mi sogoriek che chang’; ak kimwee bik Pilistik." 
2Samuel23:12 Ago kitonon Sama eng’ kwenutab mbaranato, koeet mbaret, ak kibar Pilistik: ak kiyai Jehovah katerteret ne o." 
2Samuel23:13 Ak kichortagei somogu eng’ bounik che eechen sosom, ak kibwa ole mi Daudi eng’ betusiekab kesisiet agoi kebenetab Adulam; ak kiga teech lugetab Pilistik atebwetab Repaim." 
2Samuel23:14 Ak kimi Daudi eng’ betusiechoto irimet, ak kimi lugetab Pilistik eng’ betusiechoto Bet-lehem." 
2Samuel23:15 Ak kiam melelda Daudi ak kile, Eiye, inaga ng’o beekab keringetab beek ne mi Bet-lehem, ne negite ormarichet, aee!" 
2Samuel23:16 Ak kichut lugetab Pilistik murenjoto nyigonen somogu, koba koram beek eng’ keringonoto bo beek ne mi Bet-lehem, ne kimi ye negite ormarichet, ak kiib, koipchi Daudi: ago ma cham koee, kitumda eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Samuel23:17 Ak kile, Ingolooit eng’ ane, ee Jehovah, si mayai kii: tos aee korotikab bik che kachut ng’oiyondit sobonwekwak? Ma cham anyun koee amu noto. Kiyai tuguchuto anyun bichoto somogu nyigonen." 
2Samuel23:18 Ak ki ne o eng’ choto somok Abisai ng’etab kametab Joab weritab Seruia, ak kinam ng’otinnyi ak kobar bik bogol somok, ak kitook kainennyi eng’ murenjoto somok." 
2Samuel23:19 Ma inendet ne kitinyei teegisto mising’ eng’ choto somok? Kigiyai inendet anyun koek kiptaiyandenywa: ago ma ityi chugai somok bo tai. 
2Samuel23:20 Kibar Benaia weritab Jeoiada, weritab chito ne nyigan ne bo Kabseel, inendet ne kiyai boisionik che eechen, kibar werik aeng’ che bo Ariel che bo Moab: kichortagei kogeny, kwo kobar ng’etundo eng’ kwenutab keringet eng’ betusiekab teluchi:" 
2Samuel23:21 ak kibar Misrindet, murenet ne kararan: ak kitinyei Misrindonoto ng’otit eng’ eunnyi; ago kichortagei kwo ole mi inendet ak kirokto, ak kong’us ng’otit eng’ eutab Misrindonoto, ak kobare ng’otinnyi." 
2Samuel23:22 Kiyai tuguchuto Benaia weritab Jeoiada, ak kitook kainennyi eng’ murenjoto somok nyigonen." 
2Samuel23:23 Kisich teegisto kosiir choto somok, ago ma ityi chugai somok bo tai. Ak kiinde Daudi inendet koboi ribikyik." 
2Samuel23:24 Ki age Asael ng’etab kametab Joab, eng’ choto sosom; Elanan weritab Dodo ne bo Bet-lehem;" 
2Samuel23:25 Sama Harodindet, Elika Harodindet;" 
2Samuel23:26 Heles Paltindet, Ira weritab Ikes Tekoindet;" 
2Samuel23:27 Abieser Anatotindet, Mebunai Husatindet;" 
2Samuel23:28 Salmon Aoindet, Maarai Netopatindet;" 
2Samuel23:29 Heleb weritab Baana Netopatindet, Itai weritab Ribai ne bo Gibea ne bo lagokab Benjamin;" 
2Samuel23:30 Benaia Piratonindet, Idai ne bo ainosiekab Gaas;" 
2Samuel23:31 Abi-albon Arbatindet, Asmabet Barumindet;" 
2Samuel23:32 Eliaba Saalbonindet, werikab Jasen, Jonatan;" 
2Samuel23:33 Sama Hararindet, Aiam weritab Sarar Ararindet;" 
2Samuel23:34 Elipelet weritab Aasbai, weritab Maakatindet, Eliam weritab Aitopel Gilonindet;" 
2Samuel23:35 Hesro Karmelindet, Paarai Arbindet;" 
2Samuel23:36 Igal weritab Natan ne bo Soba, Bani Gadindet;" 
2Samuel23:37 Selek Amonindet, Naarai Beerotindet, che kiipchin karik Joab weritab Seruia;" 
2Samuel23:38 Ira Itrindet, Gareb Itrindet;" 
2Samuel23:39 Uria Hitindet: ki sosom ak tisab tugul. 
2Samuel24:1 Ak kilalyo kogeny neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel, ak king’eetyi Daudi kosich kabwatet ne ya agobo ichek, kolenji, Ui, iit Israel ak Juda." 
2Samuel24:2 Ak kilenji laitoriat Joab kiptaiyatab luget, ne kimi ak inendet, Ui bunote bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel, koboch Dan agoi Beer-seba, ak oiit bik si kobiit anai koitetab bik." 
2Samuel24:3 Ak kilenji Joab laitoriat, Ingotesyi bik Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ngo te kit ne te konyil bogol, ak ingogeer kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat: ago amu nee si kobaibaitune ng’olyondoni kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat?" 
2Samuel24:4 Ago kiiterter ng’olyotab laitoriat Joab, ak kiiterter kiptainikab luget. Ak kiba Joab ak kiptainikab luget eng’ ole mi laitoriat, koba koiit bikab Israel." 
2Samuel24:5 Ak kilandae Jordan, ak kiteech Aroer, komostab tai ne bo nganaset ne mi kwenutab atebwetab Gad, kotokyigei Jaser:" 
2Samuel24:6 yeityo kobwa Gilead, ak emetab Tatim-hodsi; ak kibwa Dan-jan, ak koyiemat agoi Sidon," 
2Samuel24:7 ak kibwa irimetab Turo, agoi nganasok tugul che bo Hibik, ak che bo Kananik: ak kimanda koba Murot ne bo Tai ne bo Juda, eng’ Beer-seba." 
2Samuel24:8 Kingo kagobunot anyun emet tugul kobwa Jerusalem ko kaigesgei karawek sogolu ak betusiek tiptem koboch ngoba. 
2Samuel24:9 Ak kiigochi Joab laitoriat kit ne te koitetab bik: ak kimi Israel murenik elfusiek bogolwogik sisiitu che nyigonen che bo rotokab chok; ak kiek che bo Juda murenik elfusiek bogol mut. 
2Samuel24:10 Ak kitoor Daudi muguleldanyi ye kingo kagoiit bik. Ak kilenji Daudi Jehovah, Kiayai tengekto ne o eng’ kioto koayai: ago asomin ale, iste anyun, ee Jehovah, tengektab otwogindeng’ung’; amu kiayai eng’ berberindo ne o." 
2Samuel24:11 Ak kingong’eet Daudi karon, koityi ng’olyotab Jehovah maotiot Gad, keerindetab Daudi, kolenji," 
2Samuel24:12 Ui imwachi Daudi ilenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kagonin tuguk somok; lewen agenge eng’ choto, si kobiit ayaun." 
2Samuel24:13 Kinyo anyun Gad ole mi Daudi, ak komwachi inendet kolenji, Mie koamin rubet kenyisiek tisab eng’ emeng’ung’? Anan imweote eng’ arawek somok eng’ taitab buniguk koonotin? Anan biit koroitab ng’ony eng’ emeng’ung’ betusiek somok? Til anyun nguno, ak ibwat kit ne awoljini inendet ne kaiyokwa." 
2Samuel24:14 Ak kilenji Daudi Gad, Ami eng’ bichindo ne o: ngibutyi eutab Jehovah; amu chang’ rirenosiekyik: ameng’abutyi eutab chi." 
2Samuel24:15 Kiiyokyi Jehovah anyun koroitab ng’ony Israel, koboch karon agoi sait ne kiging’at; ak kibek bik koboch Dan agoi Beer-seba bik elfusiek tamanwogik tisabu." 
2Samuel24:16 Ak kingotokyi malaikaiyat eunnyi Jerusalem kole kobar, kowal Jehovah kabwatutikyik agobo yaitionoto, ak kolenji malaikaiyandonoto kibarei bik, Kagoyam; ingosis eung’ung’. Ak kimi malaikaiyatab Jehovah ole negite ruanyut ne kiborse ne bo Arauna Jebusindet." 
2Samuel24:17 Ak king’alalji Daudi Jehovah, ye kingogeer malaikaiyat ne kibarei bik, kolenji, Keero, kiayai tengekto, kiayai amaste: ago kiyai nee kechirechu? Asain ale, ingobira eung’ung’, ak ingobir gotab kwandanyu." 
2Samuel24:18 Ak kinyo Gad betunoto ole mi Daudi kolenji inendet, Togoste, iteekyi Jehovah kaptisisiet eng’ ruanyut ne kiborse ne bo Arauna Jebusindet." 
2Samuel24:19 Ak kigotosta Daudi, ko u ye kimwa Gad, ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah." 
2Samuel24:20 Ak kitobendo Arauna, ak kigeer laitoriat ak otwogikyik kobwanei kotokyingei inendet: ak kiwa Arauna, ak kong’uruk eng’ taitab laitoriat kot kotiiny toget ng’ony." 
2Samuel24:21 Ak kile Arauna, Kalya si konyo kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat ole mi otwogindennyi? Ak kile Daudi, Kanyo aalenen ruanyut ne kiborse, si kobiit ateekyi Jehovah kaptisisiet, si kobiit kerany koroitab ng’ony kosis si ma kobarei bik." 
2Samuel24:22 Ak kilenji Arauna Daudi, Ingoib kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat ak kogoito kit ne keerei kole mie eng’ inendet: keero tuga che bo kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak tuguk che kiborse, ak chogisiekab tuga che egu kwenik:" 
2Samuel24:23 ee laitoriat, kaigochi Arauna chuto tugul laitoriat. Ak kilenji Arauna laitoriat, Ingotaachin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
2Samuel24:24 Ak kilenji laitoriat Arauna, Achicha: aalenen iman eng’ alyet: magochini Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu kagochinoik che kibeelei che ma agoite kiy. Kial anyun Daudi ruanyunoto kiborse koboto tuga eng’ sekelisiek konom che bo feda." 
2Samuel24:25 Ak kiteekyi Daudi Jehovah kaptisisiet eng’ yoto, ak kogoito kagochinoik che kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet. Kigasyi anyun Jehovah ichek rirek agobo emet, ak kigirany koroitab ng’ony kosis eng’ Israel." 
1Kings1:1 Kiga koosit anyun laitoriat Daudi, kiga kotar kenyisiek che chang’; ak kituch ichek inendet eng’ ngoroik, ago ma kas lalang’indo." 
1Kings1:2 Kilenji anyun otwogikyik inendet, Ingecheng’ji kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat bergeiyat ne ta ko ming’in, kotonon eng’ taitab laitoriat, korib; ak ingoru eng’ tegeng’ung’, si kosich kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat lalang’indo." 
1Kings1:3 Kocheng’ anyun chepto ne kararan eng’ komoswek tugul che bo Israel, ak kinyor Abisag Jepsunamindet, ak komutyi laitoriat." 
1Kings1:4 Ak ki kararan cheboto mising’; ak kirib laitoriat, ak koboisiechi inendet; ago ma ituiyogei laitoriat ak inendet." 
1Kings1:5 Kiieetgei Adonija weritab Hagit, kole, Aegu laitoriat: ak kichopchigei karisiek ak che lanyei mbartanyisiek, ak bik konom che ruaei kondoe inendet." 
1Kings1:6 Ago ma iim inendet kwandanyi eng’ betut age tugul, kole, Amu nee si iyai ko u nito? Ak ki muren ne kararan kot agine; ak kirubu Absalom." 
1Kings1:7 Ak king’alal ak Joab weritab Seruia, koboto Abiatar tisiindet: ak kiisub Adonija kotoret inendet." 
1Kings1:8 Ago kima komi koboto Adonija, Sadok tisiindet, ak Benaia weritab Jeoiada, ak maotiot Natan, ak Simeri, ak Rei, ak bik che nyigonen che ki bo Daudi." 
1Kings1:9 Ak kieny Adonija kechirek ak tuga ak che akwaen eng’ ole negite koitab Soelet, ne mi ole negite En-rogel; ak kiguur tupchosiekyik tugul werikab laitoriat, ak bik tugul che bo Juda otwogikab laitoriat:" 
1Kings1:10 ago maguur maotiot Natan, ak Benaia, ak bik che nyigonen, ak Solomon ng’etab kamet." 
1Kings1:11 Komwachi anyun Natan Batseba kametab Solomon, kolenji, Tom igas kele laitorani Adonija weritab Hagit, amaingen Daudi kiptaiyandennyi?" 
1Kings1:12 Nyo anyun, asomin ale, ngang’omitin, si kobiit isoru sobondang’ung’, ak sobondab wering’ung’ Solomon." 
1Kings1:13 Ui go ole mi Daudi, ak ilenji inendet, Tos kima iyosiechi inye kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat, otwogindeng’ung’ ne chepto, ilenji, Laitorani iman Solomon wering’ung’ ko kaamee, tebe ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet? Amu nee anyun si kolaitoran Adonija?" 
1Kings1:14 Keero, ye ta ong’alali ak laitoriat, anyo go agane, asubun, anyo agimit ng’aleguk." 
1Kings1:15 Kiwa anyun Bat-seba orit agoi go ole mi laitoriat: ak kiga koosit laitoriat mising’; ak kiboisiechin Abisag Jepsunamindet laitoriat. 
1Kings1:16 Ak kiing’uruk Bat-seba kogutung’ji laitoriat. Ak kile laitoriat, Imache nee?" 
1Kings1:17 Ak kilenji inendet, Kiiyosie inye kiptaiyandennyu eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, kiiyosiechi otwogindeng’ung’ ne chepto, ilenji, Laitorani iman Solomon wering’ung’ ko kaamee, tebe ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet." 
1Kings1:18 Ak nguno anyun, keero, laitorani Adonija; amengen inye kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat:" 
1Kings1:19 ak kagoeny tuga ak che akwaen ak kechirek ng’isiat, ak koguur werik tugul che bo laitoriat, ak Abiatar tisiindet, koboto Joab kiptaiyatab luget: ago ma kuur Solomon otwogindeng’ung’." 
1Kings1:20 Ak keerin konyekab Israel tugul, inye kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, imwachi ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat ko kagome." 
1Kings1:21 Anan ngot ko ma u noto, ko ye kagoru kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat koboto kwanisiekyik, kiita ane ak werinnyu Solomon keegu ngelelik." 
1Kings1:22 Ak keero, ye kita kong’alali ak laitoriat, konyo go maotiot Natan." 
1Kings1:23 Ak kigimwachi laitoriat kelenji, Keero, maotiot Natan. Ak kingonyo inendet taitab laitoriat, kong’uruk eng’ taitab laitoriat kot kotiing’e togennyi ng’ony." 
1Kings1:24 Ak kile Natan, Kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat, kiimwa ile, Tun laitorani Adonija ko kaamee, ak kotebe ng’echerunnyu ne bo laitornatet?" 
1Kings1:25 Amu kachortagei rani, ak kagoeny tuga ak che akwaen ak kechirek ng’isiat, ak kagoguur werik tugul che bo laitoriat, ak kiptainikab luget, ak Abiatar tisiindet; ak keero, amisiei ak koeeisei eng’ tainnyi, ak kolen, Ingosob laitoriat Adonija." 
1Kings1:26 Ago, ma kuura agot ane otwogindeng’ung’, ak Sadok tisiindet, ak Benaia weritab Jeoiada, ak otwogindeng’ung’ Solomon." 
1Kings1:27 Tos kiyai kii kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, ama iborji otwogiguk inendet ne tebe ng’cheretab kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat ko kagome?" 
1Kings1:28 Kowol anyun laitoriat Daudi kole, Oguurwa Bat-seba. Ak kinyo taitab laitoriat ak kotonon eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
1Kings1:29 Ak kiiyosio laitoriat kole, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne kigotiach sobondanyu komong’une ng’oiyondit tugul," 
1Kings1:30 ko u ye ayosieun iman eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, ale, Laitorani iman Solomon wering’ung’, ko kaamee, ak kotebe ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet kogeera; ayae ko u noto iman rani." 
1Kings1:31 Kong’uruk anyun Bat-seba kotiing’e toget ng’ony, ak kogutung’ji laitoriat, kole, Ingosob kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat Daudi koigeny." 
1Kings1:32 Ak kile laitoriat Daudi, Oguurwa Sadok tisiindet, ak maotiot Natan, ak Benaia weritab Jeoiada. Ak kibwa taitab laitoriat." 
1Kings1:33 Ak kilenji laitoriat ichek, Omut otwogikab kiptaiyandeng’ung’, ak ogochi Solomon werinnyu kolany nyumbunnyu, ak omutu kochorgei konyo Gion:" 
1Kings1:34 ak ingoiil inendet eng’ oloto Sadok tisiindet ak maotiot Natan koek laitoriat ne bou Israel: ak koguut iriaget ak ole, Ingosob laitoriat Solomon." 
1Kings1:35 Yeityo otogosu osubu inendet, ak konyo kotebe ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet; amu egu laitoriat kogeera: ak kaande inendet koek bounindet ne bou Israel ak Juda." 
1Kings1:36 Ak kiwolji Benaia weritab Jeoiada laitoriat kolenji, Amen: ingomwa agine Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, ko u noto." 
1Kings1:37 Ko u ye kimi Jehovah koboto kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, ko ingoteb koboto Solomon ko u noto, ak koyai ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet koeet kosiir ne bo kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat Daudi." 
1Kings1:38 Kichortagei anyun Sadok tisiindet, ak maotiot Natan, ak Benaia weritab Jeoiada, ak Keretik, ak Peletik, ak kogochi Solomon kolany nyumbutab laitoriat Daudi, ak komut inendet kwo Gion." 
1Kings1:39 Ak kiinem Sadok tisiindet laletab mwaita eng’ Emait, ak koiil Solomon. Ak kiguut iriaget; ak kile bik tugul, Ingosob laitoriat Solomon." 
1Kings1:40 Ak kitogos bik tugul kosub inendet, ak kiguut bik ndurerusiek, ak koboiboitu eng’ boiboindo ne o, kot kobotan emet amu cheenywa." 
1Kings1:41 Ak kigas Adonija ak toek tugul che kimi ak inendet ye kingo kagoges amisiet. Ak kingogas Joab cheetab iriaget, kole, Bo nee bolatoni kawa barak eng’ nganaset?" 
1Kings1:42 Ye kita kong’alali, ogeero, koit Jonatan weritab Abiatar tisiindet: ak kile Adonija, Nyo go; amu i chi ne nyigan, ak iibu logoiywek che miach." 
1Kings1:43 Ak kiwolji Jonatan Adonija kolenji, Kagoyai iman kiptaiyandennyo laitoriat Daudi Solomon koek laitoriat:" 
1Kings1:44 ak kagoyokto laitoriat Sadok tisiindet, ak maotiot Natan, ak Benaia weritab Jeoiada, ak Keretik, ak Peletik, koba ak inendet, ak kagochi inendet kolany nyumbutab laitoriat:" 
1Kings1:45 ak kagoiil Sadok tisiindet ak maotiot Natan Solomon koek laitoriat eng’ Gion: ak kagotogos eng’ oloto kogasonugei, kot kogululen nganaset kogeny. Noto bolatet ne kogase." 
1Kings1:46 Ak kogeny tebe Solomon ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo bounatet. 
1Kings1:47 Ak kogeny kabwa otwogikab laitoriat koberur kiptaiyandennyo laitoriat Daudi, kole, Ingoyai Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kainetab Solomon kogararanit kosiir neng’ung’, ak koyai ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet koeet kosiir neng’ung’: ak kiing’uruk laitoriat eng’ itok." 
1Kings1:48 Ak kogeny, kamwa laitoriat ko u ni kole, Iberurot Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne kagonde chito kotebe ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet eng’ betuni, kogeerei konyekyuk." 
1Kings1:49 Ak kiarogenso toek tugul che bo Adonija, ak king’eetyo, ak kwo chi tugul orennyi." 
1Kings1:50 Ak kiiyweis Adonija amu Solomon; ak king’eet, ak kwo, kwo konam kuinoikab kaptisisiet." 
1Kings1:51 Ak kigimwachi Solomon, kelenji, Keero, iywei Adonija laitoriat Solomon; keero, kagonam kuinoikab kaptisisiet, kole, Ingoyosiewa laitoriat Solomon rani kole, mabarei otwogindennyi eng’ rotwetab chok." 
1Kings1:52 Ak kile Solomon, Ngot koborgei koek chito ne mie, ko maibutyi ng’ony agot agenge eng’ sumeekyik: ago ngot kenyorji inendet yaitiet, komeei." 
1Kings1:53 Kiiyokto anyun laitoriat Solomon, ak kigimut inendet konyo kochorgei eng’ kaptisisiet. Ak kinyo ak kogutung’ji laitoriat Solomon: ak kilenji Solomon inendet, Ui gong’ung’." 
1Kings2:1 Kirik anyun betusiek che mee Daudi; ak king’at werinnyi Solomon kolenji," 
1Kings2:2 Kawe oret ne bendi bik tugul che bo ng’ony: kimitu anyun, ak iegu muren." 
1Kings2:3 Ak irib kayomisetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, iwendote ortinwekyik, irib konetisiosiekyik, ak ng’atutikyik, ak kiruogutikyik, ak baornatosiekyik, ko u choto kigisir eng’ Ng’atutietab Musa, si kiberurin eng’ tugul che iyae, eng’ oldo tugul ole iwendi," 
1Kings2:4 si kobiit kogimit Jehovah ng’olyondennyi ne kimwa agobo ane, kole, Ngot korib lagoguk ortinwekwak, kobendat eng’ tainnyu eng’ imanit eng’ mugulelwekwak tugul ak eng’ sobonwekwak tugul, ko u ye kimwa kole mabetenen chito ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Israel." 
1Kings2:5 Ak kogeny ingen aginye kit ne kiyaiywa Joab weritab Seruia, kit ne kiyachi kiptainik aeng’ che bo lugosiekab Israel, Abner weritab Ner, ak Amasa weritab Jeter, che kibar, ak kotumda korotikab luget eng’ betusiekab kalyet, ak konde korotikab luget birenet ne kiga rategei, koboto kweonik che kimi kelyekyik." 
1Kings2:6 Yai anyun ko u ng’omnateng’ung’, amechamji kolil eng’ kalwalekyik eng’ kalyet." 
1Kings2:7 Ago rire werikab Barsilai Gileadindet, ak ingoek ichek alak che amisie meseng’ung’: amu kibwa ole ami ye kiamwee Absalom ng’etab komet." 
1Kings2:8 Ak keero, mi koboten Simei weritab Gera, Benjaminindet, ne bo Baurim, ne kichuba eng’ chubet ne ng’wan eng’ betut ne kiawendi Maanaim: ago kichorgei kotorokwa eng’ Jordan, ak kiayosiechi inendet eng’ Jehovah alenji, Mabarin eng’ rotwetab chok." 
1Kings2:9 Ara anyun, amat ile, matinyei ng’ogisto, amu i chito ne ng’om; ak imuchi inai kit ne kanyoljin iyachi, ak ichoorune kalwalekyik korotik koba oldab che kigobek." 
1Kings2:10 Ak kiru Daudi koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi nganasetab Daudi." 
1Kings2:11 Ak betusiek che kilaitorane Daudi Israel, ko ki kenyisiek artam: kilaitoran kenyisiek tisab eng’ Hebron, ak kilaitoran eng’ Jerusalem kenyisiek sosom ak somok." 
1Kings2:12 Ak kitebe Solomon ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi kwandanyi; ak kigigimit bounatennyi mising’. 
1Kings2:13 Kinyo anyun Adonija weritab Hagit ole mi Bat-seba kametab Solomon. Ak kile, Inyone eng’ kalyet? Ak kile, Anyone eng’ kalyet." 
1Kings2:14 Ak kile kogeny, Atinye kit ne amache amwaun. Ak kilenji, Mwa anyun." 
1Kings2:15 Ak kile, Ingen ile ki nenyu bounatet, ak kigeera Israel tugul, kole alaitoran: ago kiwalak bounatet, ak kigobunji werit ne kitupche: amu ki nenyi kobunu Jehovah." 
1Kings2:16 Ara anyun, asomin kit agenge, amat ietena. Ak kilenji, Mwa anyun." 
1Kings2:17 Ak kile, Asomin ale ng’alalji laitoriat Solomon, (amu maesioun,) ale kogona Abisag Jepsunamindet atun." 
1Kings2:18 Ak kile Bat-seba, Mie; ang’alaljineun laitoriat." 
1Kings2:19 Kiwa anyun Bat-seba ole mi laitoriat Solomon, kwo kong’alaljinechi Adonija. Ak king’eet laitoriat kotorok inendet, ak kong’urukyi, ak kotebe ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, ak king’at keib ng’echeretab laitornatet kotebe kametab laitoriat; ak kitebe kamennyi eunnyi ne bo tai." 
1Kings2:20 Yeityo kole, Asomin kiy agenge ne ming’in; amat ietena. Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Som anyun, kamennyu: amu maetenen." 
1Kings2:21 Ak kile, Ingigochi Adonija ng’etab komet Abisag Jepsunamindet kotun." 
1Kings2:22 Ak kiwol laitoriat Solomon kolenji kamet, Amu nee si isomji Adonija Abisag Jepsunamindet? Somji inendet bounatet agine; amu inendet ko tupchennyu ne o; somji inendet ak Abiatar tisiindet, ak Joab weritab Seruia." 
1Kings2:23 Koyosio anyun laitoriat Solomon eng’ Jehovah kole, Ingoyaiywa Kamuktaindet ko u noto, ak kotes, ngot ko ma mwa Adonija ng’olyondoni agobo sobondanyi." 
1Kings2:24 Noto anyun ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne kiigimita, ak kondea ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi baba, ak ne kiteekwa got, ko u ye kiiyomis inendet; kebarei Adonija iman rani." 
1Kings2:25 Ak kiiyokto laitoriat Solomon Benaia weritab Jeoiada; ak kiwa kobar inendet. 
1Kings2:26 Ak kilenji laitoriat Abiatar tisiindet, Ui Anatot, ole mi mbareniguk; amu nyoljinin imee: ago mabarin rani, amu kiibe moingetab Kiptaiyat Jehovah eng’ taitab Daudi baba, ak kiginyalilin eng’ tuguk tugul che kiginyalile baba." 
1Kings2:27 Koon anyun Solomon Abiatar si mata koek tisiindetab Jehovah; si kobiit kosulda ng’olyotab Jehovah, ne kimwa agobo gotab Eli eng’ Silo." 
1Kings2:28 Ak kiit ng’alek oldab Joab: amu kiga kosub Joab Adonija, agot nganda kima isub Absalom. Ak kimwechi Joab Emaitab Jehovah, ak konam kuinoikab kaptisisiet." 
1Kings2:29 Ak kigimwachi laitoriat Solomon kelenji, Kagomwechi Joab Emaitab Jehovah, ak ogeero, mi ye bo kaptisisiet. Kiiyokto anyun Solomon Benaia weritab Jeoiada, kolenji, Ui ibar." 
1Kings2:30 Ak kiit Benaia Emaitab Jehovah, ak kolenji inendet, Kamwa laitoriat ko u ni, kole, Mong’u. Ak kile, Achicha; amechini yuto. Ak kiipchi Benaia laitoriat ng’olyot kogeny, kolenji, Kamwa Joab ko u ni ak kawolwa ko u ni." 
1Kings2:31 Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Yai ko u ye kagomwa, ak ibar inendet ak itub; si kobiit iiste korotik, che kitumda Joab buch, eng’ ane ak eng’ gotab baba." 
1Kings2:32 Ak weekyin Jehovah korotikyik metinnyi, amu kibar bik aeng’ che ki bo iman ak ko koigoi kosiir inendet, ak kibar ichek eng’ rotwetab chok, ama ingen kwandanyu Daudi, choto ko Abner weritab Ner, kiptaiyatab lugetab Israel, ak Amasa weritab Jeter, kiptaiyatab lugetab Juda." 
1Kings2:33 Weekyingei anyun korotikwak metitab Joab, ak metowekab iyotennyi koigeny: ago mi kalyet koigeny ne bunu Jehovah, gab Daudi ak iyotennyi, ak gonnyi ak ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet." 
1Kings2:34 Kotogosta anyun Benaia weritab Jeoiada, kwo kokwer inendet ak kobar; ak kigitupchi gonnyi eng’ ong’atet." 
1Kings2:35 Ak kiinde laitoriat Benaia weritab Jeoiada koboi luget kogeer inendet: ak kiinde laitoriat Sadok tisiindet kogeer Abiatar. 
1Kings2:36 Ak kiiyokto laitoriat keguur Simei konyo ole mi inendet, ak kolenji, Teekyigei got eng’ Jerusalem, ak imeny oloto, amat iwe ui." 
1Kings2:37 Amu eng’ betut ne imandoi ak ilandoe kererutab Kedron, inai anyun komie ile imee iman: tebe korotiguk meting’ung’." 
1Kings2:38 Ak kilenji Simei laitoriat, Mie mwaonoto: ko u ye kamwa kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, koyaei otwogindeng’ung’ ko u noto. Ak kimeny Simei Jerusalem betusiek che chang’." 
1Kings2:39 Ak kingobata kenyisiek somogu, komwei otwogik aeng’ che bo Simei koba oldab Akis, weritab Maaka laitoriatab Gat. Ak kigimwachi Simei kelenji, Keero, mi otwogiguk Gat." 
1Kings2:40 Ak king’eet Simei, ak koiito sigiriennyi, ak kwo Gat agoi oldab Akis, kocheng’ otwogikyik: ak kiwa Simei komut otwogikyik eng’ Got." 
1Kings2:41 Ak kigimwachi Solomon kelenji, Kokwa Simei eng’ Jerusalem, kwo Gat, ak kogoweek." 
1Kings2:42 Ak kiiyokto laitoriat keguur Simei, ak kolenji inendet, Kima alenjin iyosie eng’ Jehovah, ak ateeun alenjin, Nai komie ile, eng’ betut ne imandoi, ak iwendote eng’ oldo age tugul, imee iman? Ak kiilenja, Mie mwaonito kaagas." 
1Kings2:43 Amu nee anyun si merib kayosietab Jehovah, ak ng’atutiet ne kiang’atin?" 
1Kings2:44 Kimwachi kogeny laitoriat Simei kolenji, Ingen inye tengektang’ung’ tugul ne mi muguleldang’ung’; ne kiiyachi Daudi baba? Noto anyun weekyin Jehovah tengektang’ung’ meting’ung’." 
1Kings2:45 Ago kiberuri laitoriat Solomon, ak kigimiti koigeny bounatetab ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
1Kings2:46 King’at anyun laitoriat Benaia weritab Jeoiada; ak kimanda kobar; kome anyun. Ak kigigimit bounatet eng’ eutab Solomon. 
1Kings3:1 Ak kiyaigei Solomon koek tilionut ak Parao laitoriatab Misri, ak kiitun cheptab Parao, ak komut konyo nganasetab Daudi, kot koges teeksetab gonnyi, ak gotab Jehovah, ak irimet ne kiyiem Jerusalem." 
1Kings3:2 Ago kienyei bik tiseiywek eng’ komoswek che tororen, amu kima ko mi go ne kiga kiteekyi kainetab Jehovah agoi betusiechoto." 
1Kings3:3 Ak kicham Solomon Jehovah, kowendote ng’atutikab Daudi kwandanyi; ago kienyei tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ komoswek che tororen." 
1Kings3:4 Ak kiwa laitoriat Gibeon kwo koeny tiseiywek eng’ oloto; amu ki toror yoto, ole o: kiigoito Solomon kagochinoik elfut che kibeelei eng’ kaptisisionoto." 
1Kings3:5 Kimong’ji Jehovah Solomon eng’ Gibeon eng’ karuotitoet kemoi: ak kile Kamuktaindet, Som kit ne imache agonin." 
1Kings3:6 Ak kile Solomon, Kiiyachi otwogindeng’ung’ Daudi baba mieindo ne o, ko u ye kiwendote taing’ung’ eng’ imanit, ak eng’ imanda, ak eng’ lititindab muguleldo eng’ inye; ak kiigonorji inendet mieini o, amu kiigochi inendet werit kotebe ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, ko u ra." 
1Kings3:7 Ak nguno anyun, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, kiiyai otwogindeng’ung’ koek laitoriat kogeer Daudi baba: ago ane, ko ta ko a lakwet ne ming’in; mangen ole amandoitoi ak ole among’undoi." 
1Kings3:8 Ak mi otwogindeng’ung’ kwenutab biguk che kiilewen, bik che chang’, che magimuchi kiit anan ko kerar amu chang’indo." 
1Kings3:9 Igochi anyun otwogindeng’ung’ muguleldo ne tinyei kaguiyet si koruokyi biguk, si kobiit abesio ne mie ak ne ya; amu ng’o anyun ne imuchi koruokyi bororioning’ung’et toogunot?" 
1Kings3:10 Ak kiibaibai Kiptaiyat ng’olyondonoto, amu kisom Solomon kiito." 
1Kings3:11 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet inendet, Amu kaisom kii, ama isomjige isob keny; ama isomjige magornatosiek, ama isom kebar buniguk; ago kesomjige kaguiyet ibesie kiruoget;" 
1Kings3:12 keero, kaayai ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’; keero, kaagonin muguleldo ne ng’om, ak kotinyei kaguiyet; ne kitomo kobiitu age ne ogerge, ama kobiitu age ne ogerge eng’ let." 
1Kings3:13 Ak kaagonin agine kit ne ma isom, magornatosiek ak teegisto, ne mabiitu eng’ laitorinik ne ogergeitu, eng’ betusieguk tugul." 
1Kings3:14 Ak ngot iwendote ortinwekyuk, irib kayomisutikyuk, ak ng’atutikyuk, ko u ye kiwendote Daudi kwandang’ung’, atesun anyun kochang’ait betusieguk." 
1Kings3:15 Ak kigos Solomon, ak keero, ki karuotitoet: ak kinyo Jerusalem, ak kotonon eng’ taitab moinget ne bo arorutietab Jehovah, ak kogoito kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak kogoito kagochinoikab kalyet, ak koyachi igorta otwogikyik tugul." 
1Kings3:16 Kibwa anyun ole mi laitoriat kwonyik aeng’ che ki chepkugonik, kotononio eng’ tainnyi." 
1Kings3:17 Ak kile kwondo age, Ee kiptaiyandennyu, kimenye ak kwonyi got agenge; ak kiasich lakwet kemi ak inendet eng’ goyoto." 
1Kings3:18 Ak eng’ betutab somok ko kaasigisie, kosigis kwonyi agine: ak kigimi tuwai; kima kemi ak too eng’ go, kobate achege aeng’ eng’ go." 
1Kings3:19 Ak kime lakwetab kwonyi kemoi, amu kisieb." 
1Kings3:20 Ak king’eet kemoi kwen, ak komut werinnyu eng’ ye koami kota konuuchi otwogindeng’ung’ ne chepto, ak komonji tegennyi, ak konde lakwennyi ne kagome tegennyu." 
1Kings3:21 Ak kangang’eet karon ale agochi lakwet kochunchun, ogeero, kaga kome; ago kangageer komie karon, ogeero, ko ma werinnyu, ne kigasich." 
1Kings3:22 Ak kile ne bo aeng’, Achicha; ni kogome ko wering’ung’ ak ni sobei ko werinnyu. Kitiiyo ko u noto anyun eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
1Kings3:23 Kile anyun laitoriat, Mwaei ni kole, Werinnyu ni sobei, ak wering’ung’ ni kogome: kolen age, Achicha; kogome wering’ung’, werinnyu ni sobei." 
1Kings3:24 Ak kile laitoriat, Oibwa rotwetab chok. Ak kigiipchi laitoriat rotwetab chok." 
1Kings3:25 Yeityo kole laitoriat, Opcheune aeng’ lakwet ne sobei, si ogochi kebeber kwondo age, ogochi kebeber kwondo age." 
1Kings3:26 Yeityo kong’alalji kwondo ne ki nenyi lakwet ne sobei, laitoriat, amu kirir mo agobo werinnyi, ak kile, Ee kiptaiyandennyu, Igochi inendet lakwani sobei, amat ibar. Ago kile age, Mabunjina, ama bunjinin; pchei." 
1Kings3:27 Kiwol anyun laitoriat kole, Ogochi ne bo tai lakwani sobei, mat obar: amu inendet ko kamennyi." 
1Kings3:28 Ak kigas Israel tugul kiruoget ne kiiruoch laitoriat; ak kiiywei laitoriat: amu kigeer kole mi ng’omnatetab Kamuktaindet eng’ inendet, si kobiit koruoch." 
1Kings4:1 Ki laitoriat Solomon ne kibou Israel tugul. 
1Kings4:2 Ak chu ko ki bounik che kitinyei inendet; Asaria, weritab Sadok ko ki tisiindet;" 
1Kings4:3 Eliorep ak Aija, werikab Sisa, sirik; Jeosapat weritab Ailud, sirindetab tuguk che biitu;" 
1Kings4:4 ak kibou luget Benaia weritab Jeoiada; ak ki tisiik Sadok ak Abiatar; 
1Kings4:5 ak kibou Asaria weritab Natan, kiptainik; ak ki tisiindet Sabud weritab Natan, ne ki choruetab laitoriat;" 
1Kings4:6 kibou got Aisar; ak kibou Adoniram weritab Abda aisurut. 
1Kings4:7 Ak kitinyei Solomon kiptainik taman ak aeng’ che kibou Israel tugul, che kiipchin laitoriat amitwogik koboto gonnyi: kiging’at koib chi age tugul amitwogik eng’ arawet eng’ kenyit." 
1Kings4:8 Ak chu kainaikwak: Ben-hur, eng’ emetab tulonokab Epraim:" 
1Kings4:9 Ben-deker, eng’ Makas, ak eng’ Saalbim, ak Bet-semes, ak Elon-bet-hanan:" 
1Kings4:10 Ben-hesed, eng’ Arubot; ki nenyi Soko, ak emet tugul ne bo Heper:" 
1Kings4:11 Ben-abinadab, eng’ Napat-dor tugul; kiitun Tapat cheptab Solomon:" 
1Kings4:12 Baana weritab Ailud, eng’ Taanak ak Megido, ak Bet-sean tugul ne negite Saretan, ne mi atebwetab Jesreel, koboch Bet-sean agoi Abel-meola, agoi koit bitetab Jokmeam:" 
1Kings4:13 Ben-geber, eng’ Ramot-gilead; ki chechik nganasokab Jair weritab Manase, che mitei Gilead; ki nenyi agine koretab Argob, ne mi Basan, nganasok che eechen tamanwogik lo che tinyei irimoik ak temeleiywekab sugunonik:" 
1Kings4:14 Ainadab weritab Ido, eng’ Maanaim:" 
1Kings4:15 Aimaas, eng’ Naptali; kiitun agine Basemat cheptab Solomon:" 
1Kings4:16 Baana weritab Husai eng’ Aser ak Bealot: 
1Kings4:17 Jeosapat weritab Parua, eng’ Isakar:" 
1Kings4:18 Simei weritab Ela, eng’ Benjamin:"
