1Kings4:19 Geber weritab Uri, eng’ emetab Gilead, koretab Sihon laitoriatab Amorik ak ne bo Og laitoriatab Basan; ak ki kiptaiyat inegei ne kimi emonoto." 
1Kings4:20 Ki chang’ Juda ak Israel, ko u ng’aniek che mi nyanjet eng’ chang’indo, koamisiei ak koeeisei ak koboiboegei." 
1Kings4:21 Ak kilaitorane Solomon bororiosiek tugul koboch Ainet agoi emetab Pilistik, ak agoi kiwotetab Misri: kiibu kagochinoik, ak kootei Solomon eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi." 
1Kings4:22 Ak amitwogikab Solomon che bo betut agenge ko ki kerutik sosom che bo busiek che tambulul che bo nganok, ak kerutik tamanwogik lo che bo busiek;" 
1Kings4:23 eik taman che akwaen, ak eik tiptem che kigetune akwotisiek, ak kechirek bogol, ko ma boto teweretinik, ak cheptirgichik, ak tiong’ik che u chemnyogosonik, ak ngogaik che akwaen." 
1Kings4:24 Amu kibou koret tugul ne bo Ainet komosi, koboch Tipsa agoi Gasa, kiboi laitorinik tugul che mi Ainet komosi: ak kichamdos ak bik che kimi komoswekyik tugul." 
1Kings4:25 Ak kimeng’is Juda ak Israel eng’ chametab ge, kitebe chi tugul kelutab ketinnyi ne bo sabibuk, ak mogoiywennyi, koboch Dan agoi Beer-seba, eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Solomon." 
1Kings4:26 Ak kitinyei Solomon gorik elfusiek artam che bo mbartanyisiekab karisiekyik, ak bik elfusiek taman ak aeng’, che lanyei mbartanyisiek." 
1Kings4:27 Ak kiipchi kiptainichoto laitoriat Solomon amitwogik, koboto tugul che kiamisie mesetab laitoriat Solomon, kiipchi chi tugul eng’ arawennyi: ma kany korarji kiy." 
1Kings4:28 Kiipchi sairik agichek ak mobek che bo mbartanyisiek ak tiong’ik che chepcheben koib kobwa ole mi kiptainik, chi tugul ko u ye kiging’at." 
1Kings4:29 Ak kiigochi Kamuktaindet Solomon ng’omnatet ak naet, che siirtootin mising’, ak boroindab muguleldo, ko u ng’aniek che mi ngegutab nyanjet." 
1Kings4:30 Ak kisiir ng’omnatetab Solomon ng’omnatetab bik tugul che bo kong’asis, ak ng’omnatet tugul ne bo Misri." 
1Kings4:31 Amu ki ng’om kosiir bik tugul; kosiir Etan Esraindet, ak Heman, ak Kalkol, ak Darda, weritab Maol: ak kiyom toogunatennyi bororiosiek tugul che kiga yiem inendet." 
1Kings4:32 Ak kimwa kalewenaik elfusiek somok: ak tienwogikyik ko ki elfut ak mut. 
1Kings4:33 Ak king’alal agobo ketik, koboch taragonik che mi Lebanon agoi husop che bitos eng’ inatut: king’alal kogeny agobo tiong’ik, ak taritik, ak tuguk che ichuutegei ng’ony, ak njirenik." 
1Kings4:34 Ak kibwa bik eng’ bororiosiek tugul kogas ng’omnatetab Solomon, kobun oldab laitorinik tugul che bo ng’ony, che kiga kas agobo ng’omnatennyi." 
1Kings5:1 Kiiyokto Hiram laitoriatab Turo otwogikyik koba oldab Solomon; amu kiga kogas kele kigiil inendet koek laitoriat kogeer kwandanyi: amu kichamei Hiram Daudi. 
1Kings5:2 Ak kiiyokto Solomon bik koba oldab Hiram kolenji," 
1Kings5:3 Ingen ile kima imuch baba Daudi koteekyi got kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi amu lugosiek che kiga yiem inendet, che kimi komosta age tugul, kot konde Jehovah ichek keldebesaikab kelyekyik." 
1Kings5:4 Ago nguno ko kogogona Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu kamuung’et eng’ komosta age tugul; mami bunyot anan ko kiy ne ya ne biitu. 
1Kings5:5 Ak keero, kaabegechi ateekyi got kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, ko u ye kimwachi Jehovah baba Daudi, kolenji, Tun teekyin kainennyu got wering’ung’ ne tun andoi kotebe ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet, kogeerin." 
1Kings5:6 Ara anyun, ng’at keebwa ketikab taragonik eng’ Lebanon; ak kobois otwogikyuk ak otwogiguk; ak agonin melektab otwogiguk che kemwa: amu ingen inye ile mami chi eng’ achek ne ingen koeb ketik ko u Sidonik." 
1Kings5:7 Ak kingogas Hiram ng’alekab Solomon, kobaibait mising’ kole, Ingilos Jehovah rani, ne kiigochi Daudi werit ne ng’om koboi bororioni o." 
1Kings5:8 Ak kiiyokto Hiram bik koba oldab Solomon kolenji, Kaagas ng’alek che keyokwa: kayae ko u mageng’ung’ tugul agobo baoinikab taragonik, ak baoinikab biribiriet." 
1Kings5:9 Ibu otwogikyuk kochorgei eng’ Lebanon kobwa nyanjet: ak aratyine si koba kobun nyanjet kot koit ole imwawa, ak amwaite kitiach eng’ yoto, si inyo iib: ak isuldawa magennyu igochi amitwogik bikab gonnyu." 
1Kings5:10 Kiigochi anyun Hiram Solomon baoinikab taragonik, ak baoinikab biribirinik, ko u magennyi tugul." 
1Kings5:11 Ak kiigochi Solomon Hiram kerutik elfusiek tiptem che bo nganok koek amitwogikab gonnyi, ak kerutik tiptem che bo mwanik che tililen: kiigochi anyun Solomon Hiram ko u noto kenyit age tugul." 
1Kings5:12 Ak kiigochi Jehovah Solomon ng’omnatet, ko u ye kiiarorji; kimi kalyet eng’ kwenutab Hiram ak Solomon; ak kiyai tuwai arorutiet." 
1Kings5:13 Ak king’at Solomon kekwei bik eng’ Israel tugul; ak murenik che kiging’at kiyum ko ki bik elfusiek sosom. 
1Kings5:14 Ak kiiyokto koba Lebanon, bik elfusiek taman eng’ arawet age tugul kochunchun; kimi Lebanon arawet agenge, komi ga eng’ arawek aeng’: ak kibou Adoniram bichoto." 
1Kings5:15 Ak kitinyei Solomon bik elfusiek tamanwogik tisab che kilaisei, ak elfusiek tamanwogik sisiit che kiebisiei eng’ tulonok;" 
1Kings5:16 ko ma boto kiptainik che eechen che bo Solomon che kiindochin boisiet, ko ki elfusiek somok ak bogol somok, che kibou bik che kiyaei boisiet." 
1Kings5:17 Ak king’at laitoriat, ak kiwai koik che eechen, koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, si koteege lumeiywotab got koik che kigiwai." 
1Kings5:18 Ak kiyai koichato teegikab Solomon ak teegikab Hiram ak Gebalik, ak kichob baoinik ak koik koteege got." 
1Kings6:1 Ak kingobata kenyisiek bogolwogik ang’wanu ak tamanwogik sisiit koboch ngab kobwa Israel komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan ne bo laitornatetab Solomon ne kibou Israel, eng’ arawetab Sip, noto arawet ne bo aeng’, kotoi koteech gotab Jehovah." 
1Kings6:2 Ak got ne kiteekyi laitoriat Solomon Jehovah ko ki kakwautik tamanwogik lo che bo eut koindanyi, ak tebeesindo ko ki kakwautik tiptem che bo eut, ak kakwautik sosom che bo eut koindab tononennyi." 
1Kings6:3 Ak keterut eng’ taitab hekalutab got ko ki kakwautik tiptem che bo eut, koindanyi ko u tebeesindab got; ki kakwautik taman che bo eut tebeesindanyi eng’ taitab got." 
1Kings6:4 Ak kiyachi got tirisiok che kigiyai kong’walng’walgei. 
1Kings6:5 Ak kiteech gorik alak che mi barak eng’ got, koyiem inatutab got, konamatgei ak inatusiekab got eng’ komoswek tugul, eng’ hekalut ak got ne bo orit: ak kiteech gorik alak che mi got taban eng’ komoswek tugul:" 
1Kings6:6 kiek tebeesindab got ne bo ng’ony kakwautik mut che bo eut, ak kiek tebeesindab got ne bo kwenut kakwautik lo, ak kiek tebeesindab got ne bo somok kakwautik tisab: amu kiteech kit ne u mireiywot kotobon sang’ eng’ inatutab got eng’ komoswek tugul, si manamgei ketik ak inatusiekab got." 
1Kings6:7 Ak kingeteechei goyoto ko kigiteege koik che kiga kechob eng’ ole kibale: ak kima komi cheetab kiriswet anan ko ne bo aiywet anan ko ne bo karna age tugul ne kiboisie, ne kigigas eng’ goyoto keteechei." 
1Kings6:8 Kimi komostab tai kurgetab gorik che bo kwenut ne bo got: ak kigitogostae long’eiywot ne kiing’aatgei kot koit gorik che bo kwenut, ak kong’eete che bo kwenut agoi che bo somok." 
1Kings6:9 Kiteech anyun got ak kiiges; ak kitete got bambanik ak kosiebe baoinikab taragonik. 
1Kings6:10 Ak kiteech gorik che bo barak konamatgei ak got tugul, ki bo age tugul kakwautik mut kwo barak: ak kitonone got kimurtoinikab taragonik." 
1Kings6:11 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Solomon, kolenji," 
1Kings6:12 Eng’ goi iteeche, ko ngot iwendote konetisiosiekyuk, ak iyai kiruogutikyuk, ak irib ng’atutikyuk tugul iwendote; agimit anyun ng’olyondennyu eng’ inye, ne kiamwachi Daudi kwandang’ung’." 
1Kings6:13 Ak amenye kwenutab lagokab Israel, ak mametoi bikyuk Israel." 
1Kings6:14 Kiteech anyun Solomon got ak kiiges. 
1Kings6:15 Ak kiteech inatusiekab got che bo orit eng’ baoinikab taragonik; koboch got ng’ony kot koit inatusiekab tabotet, koliige ketik ole bo orit: ak kitete got ng’ony baoinikab birbirinik." 
1Kings6:16 Ak kiteech kakwautik tiptem eng’ komosta ne bo let ne bo got eng’ baoinikab taragonik koboch ng’ony agoi inatusiek: kiteege choto orit, koek got ne bo orit, noto ko ole tilil mising’." 
1Kings6:17 Ak ki kakwautik artam koindab got, noto ko hekalut ne mi tai." 
1Kings6:18 Ak kimi taragonik got orit, che kigiwai kosich mulonok ak taptok che yesiotin: ki bo tugul taragonik; kima komi koita ne kitoogu." 
1Kings6:19 Ak kichob got ne bo orit eng’ kwenutab got orit, si konde yoto moingetab arorutietab Jehovah." 
1Kings6:20 Ak ki kakwautik tiptem koindab goyoto bo orit, ak ki kakwautik tiptem tebeesindo, ak ki kakwautik tiptem koindo ne bo tononennyi; ak kiiliige tahabu che tililen: ak kiiliige kapkorosut taragonik." 
1Kings6:21 Ak kiiliige got orit tahabu che tililen; ak kirat sirimwekab tahabu kobun taitab goyoto bo orit; ak kiiliige tahabu. 
1Kings6:22 Ak kiiliige got kumugul tahabu, kot kogesgei got tugul: kiiliige agine tahabu kapkorosut komugul ne bo goyoto bo orit." 
1Kings6:23 Ak kiyai kerubisiek aeng’ che bo ketikab emitik eng’ ole tilil, ne age tugul ko kakwautik taman che bo eut kwo barak." 
1Kings6:24 Ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut kebepchet agenge ne bo kerubit: ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut kebepchet age ne bo kerubit, koboch walitab kebepchet age agoi walitab kebepchet age ko ki kakwautik taman che bo eut." 
1Kings6:25 Ak ki kakwautik taman kerubit age: ki aechin eng’ kakwaet kerubisiechoto tuwai ak ki kergei. 
1Kings6:26 Ki kakwautik taman koindab tononetab kerubit age, ak ki u noto che bo kerubit age." 
1Kings6:27 Ak kiinde kerubisiechoto got ne bo orit: ak kiga iitagei kebebaikab kerubisiechoto, kot kotiiny kebepchetab age inatut age, ak kitiiny kebepchetab kerubit age inatut age; ak kitiinygei kebebaikwak eng’ kwenutab got." 
1Kings6:28 Ak kiiliige kerubisiechoto tahabu. 
1Kings6:29 Ak kiwai inatusiek tugul che bo got komoswek tugul, eng’ kerubisiek che kigiwaat ak tironik ak taptok che yiesiotin eng’ go orit ak sang’." 
1Kings6:30 Ak kiiliige tahabu ng’onyutab got orit ak sang’. 
1Kings6:31 Ak kiyachi kereiywekab kurgotik che bo ketikab emitik, ole kibunei kebendi got ne bo orit: ki kebeberta agenge eng’ mut rateiywotab tugatuk koboto tugatugik." 
1Kings6:32 Kiyai anyun kereiywek aeng’ che bo emitik; ak kiwai itonwekab kerubisiek ak che bo tironik ak che bo taptok che yiesiotin eng’ kurgotichoto, ak koliige tahabu; ak kotuge tahabu kerubisiechoto, ak kotuge tahabu tironik." 
1Kings6:33 Ak kiyachi ko u noto ole kichutei kebendi hekalut, tugatugikab ketikab emitik, koek kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo inatut;" 
1Kings6:34 ak kiyai kereiywek aeng’ che bo kurgotik che bo birbirinik; ki arung’oksei kebeberwek aeng’ che bo kereiywot agenge, ak ki arung’oksei kebeberwek aeng’u che bo kereiywot age." 
1Kings6:35 Ak kiwai eng’ choto itonwekab kerubisiek ak che bo tironik ak che bo taptok che yiesiotin: ak kiiliige tahabu che kigibirji konamgei ak wautichoto. 
1Kings6:36 Ak kiteech seremut ne bo orit eng’ ortinwek somok che bo koik che kigiwai, ak oret agenge ne bo ketikab taragonik." 
1Kings6:37 Kigilumei got ne bo Jehovah eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan, eng’ arawetab Sip." 
1Kings6:38 Ak kiigesgei got koboto kebeberwekyik tugul eng’ kenyitab taman ak agenge eng’ arawetab Bul, noto ko arawetab sisiit, ak ko u tugul che kiga king’at agobo goyoto. Kiteech anyun goyoto eng’ kenyisiek tisab." 
1Kings7:1 Ak kiteech Solomon gonnyi eng’ kenyisiek taman ak somok, ak kiiges gonnyi tugul." 
1Kings7:2 Amu kiteech gotab osnetab Lebanon; koindanyi ko ki kakwautik bogol che bo eut, ak tebeesindanyi ko ki kakwautik konom che bo eut, ak koindo ne bo tononennyi ko ki kakwautik sosom che bo eut, che kimi baragutab tolochik eng’ ortinwek ang’wan, che bo taragonik, ak kigimure baragutab tolochichoto bambanik che bo taragonik." 
1Kings7:3 Ak kigisiebe barak taragonik eng’ bambanichoto artam ak mut, che kimi tolochik barak, che kiga kitet koek taman ak mut eng’ oret agenge." 
1Kings7:4 Ak kimi tirisiok eng’ ortinwek somok, che kiga tookyin lapkeiyosiek, che kiga tebe age baragutab age." 
1Kings7:5 Ak ki aechin komoswek tugul eng’ kurgotik ak tugatugik, ak kiga tokyin lapkeiyosiek che kiga tebe age baragutab age eng’ ortinwek somok." 
1Kings7:6 Ak kiyai keterut ne bo tolochik; koindanyi ko ki kakwautik konom che bo eut, ak tebeesindanyi ko ki kakwautik sosom che bo eut; ak keterut ne kimi tainywa; ak tolochik ak bambanik che nyigisen che kigimur che kimi tainywa." 
1Kings7:7 Ak kiteech got ne u keterut ole tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ole kiiruoge, noto ko kapkiruok: ak kitete taragonik kong’eete got ng’ony agoi tabot." 
1Kings7:8 Ak gonnyi ne kimenyei, seremut ne kimi keter orit, ko ki bo boisiet ne u noto. Kiteekyi got agine cheptab Parao, (ne kiga itun Solomon,) kogergeit ak keterunoto kiga teech." 
1Kings7:9 Chuto tugul ko ki bo koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, koik che kigiwai, ko u karogendaet, che kigitile musumenosiek, orit ak sang’, koboch lumeiywot kot koit barak, ak ki u noto agine sang’ kot koit seremut ne o." 
1Kings7:10 Ak ki bo lumeiywek koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, koik che eechen, koikab kakwautik taman che bo eut, ak koikab kakwautik sisiit che bo eut." 
1Kings7:11 Ak kimi baragunywa koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, koik che kigiwai, ko u karogendoet, ak ketikab taragonik." 
1Kings7:12 Ak kitinyei seremut ne o koik che kiging’ote che kigiwai che ki soniot somok, ak oret ne bo bambanik che bo taragonik; ko u seremutab orit ne bo gotab Jehovah, ak keterutab got." 
1Kings7:13 Ak kiiyokto laitoriat Solomon kimut Hiram eng’ Turo. 
1Kings7:14 Ki weritab mosoget ne bo oretab Naptali, ak kwandanyi ko ki chitab Turo, kitang’indetab sugononik; ak kitinyei ng’omnatet ne o, ak kaguiyet, ak naetab musognatet, ne yaei boisionik tugul che bo sugunonik. Ak kiit oldab laitoriat Solomon, ak kiyai boisiennyi tugul." 
1Kings7:15 Kiyai tolochik aeng’ che bo sugunonik ne kitinyei age tugul kakwautik taman ak sisiit che bo eut kwo barak: ak ki kakwautik taman ak aeng’ che bo eut nyigisindab tolochichoto ngeyiem. 
1Kings7:16 Ak kiyai metowek aeng’ che bo sugunonik che kigibeel kochootyo, si konde walisiekab tolochichoto; koindab tononetab metit agenge ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut, ak koindab tononetab metit age ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut." 
1Kings7:17 Kimi karik che regerotin, ak tuguk che u sirimwek che kiging’walng’walat, che ki bo metowek che kimi baragutab tolochik; ki tisab che bo metit agenge, ak ki tisab che bo metit age." 
1Kings7:18 Kiyai anyun tolochik; ak kimi ortinwek aeng’ che kiyiem baragutab karichoto regerotin, ketuge metowek che kimi baragutab tolochik: ak kiyachi metit age ko u noto." 
1Kings7:19 Ak ki bo kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut metowek che kimitei baragutab tolochik eng’ keter, che kigilelesonjine itonwekab taptok." 
1Kings7:20 Ak kimi metowek baragutab tolochichoto aeng’ agichek, ole negite mulwet, ne kimi ole negite karichato regerotin: ak itonwekab logoek ko ki bogol aeng’, che kiyiem metoto age eng’ ortinwek." 
1Kings7:21 Ak kilumda tolochik eng’ keterutab hekalut: ak kilumda toloito ne bo komostab tai, ak koguure kainennyi Jakin: ak kilumda toloito ne bo komostab katam, ak koguure kainennyi Boas." 
1Kings7:22 Ak kimi itonwekab taptok baragutab tolochichoto: kiigesgei anyun boisietab tolochik. 
1Kings7:23 Ak kiyai nyanjet ne kitanyi, ne bo kakwautik taman che bo eut kong’eete taban agoi taban, ne kigitainganat, ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut koindo ne bo tononennyi: ak kimi mireiywot ne bo kakwautik sosom che bo eut." 
1Kings7:24 Ak kimi mulonok ng’onyutab mireiywot che kiyiem kotuiyo, che bo kakwautik taman che bo eut, che kiyieme nyanjanato: kisoniot aeng’ mulonochoto, che kigiyaei ye kingeyaei nyanjanato." 
1Kings7:25 Kiga tonone nyanjanato itonwekab eik taman ak aeng’, kigeerei somogu murot ne bo katam, kogeerei somogu cherongo, kogeerei somogu murot ne bo tai, kogeerei somogu kong’asis: ak kitonone baragunywa nyanjanato, ak kigeer sugulumwekwak orit." 
1Kings7:26 Ak ki aechin tebeesindanyi ak nyigisindab eut; ak kigiyai mireiywondennyi kogergeit ak mireiywotab kikombet, ko u taptet ne kaiye: kiyamegei ak beekab debeisiek elfusiek ang’wan." 
1Kings7:27 Ak kiyai ng’echerok taman che bo sugunonik che tebe; ki kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut koindab ng’echeret agenge, ak ki kakwautik ang’wan tebeesindanyi, ak ki kakwautik somok koindab tononennyi." 
1Kings7:28 Ak ki u ni boisietab ng’echerochoto: kitinyei tegeleiywek; ak kimi tegeleiywek kwenutab tuguk che u marugut: 
1Kings7:29 ak eng’ tegeleiywechoto kimi kwenutab tukchoto u marugut ko kimi itonwekab ng’etunyik, eik, ak kerubisiek; ak eng’ baragutab tukchoto u marugut ko kimi kit ne u ng’echeret baragunnyi: ak eng’ ng’onyutab ng’etunyik ak eik ko kimitei tukchoto kiging’walng’walat kosongininso." 
1Kings7:30 Ak kitinyei ng’echeret age tugul kelyek ang’wan che u cheptirok, ak kimurtoinikab sugunonik che namei cheptirok: ak kitinyei cheptirochoto ang’wan karik che tiiei: ak kimi karichato kitiie, che kigitany, kureretab teret, komi tabandab age tugul tuguchoto kiging’walng’wal." 
1Kings7:31 Ak ki kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut kutinnyi eng’ orit ne bo metit ak eng’ barak: ak kitainganak kutinnyi, ko u ole kigiyaita ng’echeret ne tebe, ki kakwautiet agenge ak kebeberta; ak kimi wautik baragutab kutinnyi agine, ak ki aechin komoswekwak tugul eng’ koindo, ki ma ko tainganat." 
1Kings7:32 Ak kimi kureretab tegeleiywechoto cheptirochoto ang’wanu; ak kimi kimurtoinichoto namei kelyek ole bo kel: ak koindab tononetab cheptiret ko ki kakwautiet agenge ak kebeberta. 
1Kings7:33 Ak ki u yaetab cheptirochoto yaetab kelyekab karit: kimurtoinikwak, ak cheptirokwak icheget, ak karik che ituitos cheptiret ak kungit eng’ kwenut, ak kungit inendet eng’ kwenut, ko kigitanyi choto tugul." 
1Kings7:34 Ak kimi karik ang’wanu che kitiiei eng’ luukwek ang’wan che bo ng’echeret age tugul: kinamgei ak ng’echeret karikyik che kigitiie. 
1Kings7:35 Ak kimi baragutab ng’echeret tegeleiywot ne kiga yiem kotuiyo, ne ki koindab tononennyi ko kebebertab kakwautiet ne bo eut: ak kiga namgei ko u noto tiieiywekyik ak tegeleiywekyik eng’ baragutab ng’echeret." 
1Kings7:36 Ak kiwai itonwekab kerubisiek ak ng’etunyik ak tironik eng’ sanisiekab tiieiywekyik ak eng’ tegeleiywekyik, ko u boroindo ne bo age tugul, koboto karik che kiging’walng’wal, che kiga yiem." 
1Kings7:37 Kiyai ko u noto ng’echerochoto taman: kigiyai choto tugul kogergeit, ki aechin tugul, ak ki kergei eng’ yaet." 
1Kings7:38 Ak kiyai tabok taman che eechen che bo sugononik: kiyamei tabet agenge beekab debeisiek tamanwogik sisiit: ak ki kakwautik ang’wan tabet age tugul: ak kimi tabet agenge baragutab ng’echeret age tugul eng’ choto taman: kitebe tabet age tugul ng’echeret. 
1Kings7:39 Ak kiitepto ng’echerok, kotebe mutu komostab tai ne bo got, kotebe mutu komostab katam ne bo got: ak kiinde nyanjanato komostab tai ne bo got kogeer kong’asis, kotokyigei murot ne bo tai." 
1Kings7:40 Ak kiyai Hiram tabok che eechen ak kechigosiek che eechen ak tabok che mengechen. Kiiges anyun Hiram boisiet tugul ne kiyachi laitoriat Solomon eng’ gotab Jehovah: 
1Kings7:41 tolochik aeng’, ak tabok aeng’ che bo metowek che kimi baragutab tolochichoto; ak karichato aeng’ regerotin kotuch tabochoto aeng’ che kimi baragutab tolochik;" 
1Kings7:42 ak itonwekab logoek bogol ang’wan che bo karichato aeng’ regerotin; ortinwek aeng’ che bo logoek che bo karnet age tugul ne kigireger, kotuch bagulisiechoto aeng’ bo metowek che kimi baragutab tolochik;" 
1Kings7:43 ak ng’echerok taman, ak tabokwak taman che kimi ng’echerochoto;" 
1Kings7:44 ak nyanjanato agenge ak itonwekab eik che kimi kureretab nyanjanato; 
1Kings7:45 ak terenik, ak kechigosiek che eechen, ak tabok che mengech; ak tuguchoto tugul che kiyachi Hiram laitoriat Solomon, eng’ gotab Jehovah, ko ki bo sugunonik che sitotin." 
1Kings7:46 Kiyai laitoriat tuguchoto eng’ atebwetab Jordan, eng’ ole mi menet eng’ kwenutab Sukot ak Saretan." 
1Kings7:47 Kibagakta Solomon karichato tugul, ama kipiman, amu ki chang’ mising’ kot: ma imuch chi konai nyigisindab sugunonik." 
1Kings7:48 Ak kiyai Solomon tuguk tugul che kimi gotab Jehovah: kapkorosutab tahabu, ak mesetab tahabu ne kitebe makatinikab kabartaet;" 
1Kings7:49 ak kelyekab taisiek, kimi mutu komostab tai, komi mutu komostab katam eng’ taitab got ne bo orit, ki bo tahabu che tililen; ak taptok, ak taisiek ak kanameiywek, ki bo tahabu;" 
1Kings7:50 ak kikombok; ak magasisiek che kitile ole lalei eng’ taisiek, ak tabok che mengechen, ak kechigosiek, ak terenik che kiibe mat, ki bo tahabu che tililen; koboto karik che namei kereiywotab kurget, che bo kereiywekab kurgotikab got ne bo orit, ole tilil mising’, ak che bo kurgotikab got, noto ko hekalut, ki bo tahabu." 
1Kings7:51 Kiigesgei anyun boisiet tugul ne kiyai laitoriat Solomon eng’ gotab Jehovah. Ak kiib Solomon tuguk che kiga kotaban Daudi kwandanyi, kobwa go, feda ak tahabu, ak tuguk che kiboisie, ak konde ole kindoi konoraik eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
1Kings8:1 Kiiyum anyun Solomon boisiek che bo Israel, ak kandoik tugul che bo ortinwek, bounikab kwanisiekab lagokab Israel, kobwa ole mi laitoriat Solomon eng’ Jerusalem, koib moingetab arorutietab Jehovah kotogos eng’ nganasetab Daudi, ne noto ko Sion." 
1Kings8:2 Ak kiiyumgei bik tugul che bo Israel eng’ ole kimi laitoriat Solomon eng’ igorta, eng’ arawetab Etanim, ne arawetab tisab." 
1Kings8:3 Ak kibwa boisiek tugul che bo Israel, ak kiganob tisiik moinget." 
1Kings8:4 Ak kiib moingetab Jehovah, ak emait ne kituiyechin, ak terenik tugul che tililen che kimi Emait; kiib chuto tisiik ak Lawik kotogos." 
1Kings8:5 Ak kimi taitab moinget, laitoriat Solomon ak tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel che kiga iyumgei eng’ ole mi inendet, koenyei kechirek ak eik, che kima kimuchi kerar anan kiit eng’ chang’indo." 
1Kings8:6 Ak kiib tisiik moingetab arorutiet ne bo Jehovah, konyo ole tebe eng’ got orit ole tilil, ole tilil mising’, kureretab kebebaikab kerubisiek." 
1Kings8:7 Amu kiga iito kerubisiek kebebaikwak kouur ole mi moinget, ak kituch kerubisiek moinget ak ketikyik che kiibe." 
1Kings8:8 Ak ki koen ketichoto mising’; ak kitoogu walisiekwak eng’ ole tilil eng’ taitab got ne bo orit; ago kima ko toogu eng’ sang’: ak mi yoto agoi ra. 
1Kings8:9 Kima komi kiy moingonoto orit kobate koik aeng’ che lebelen che kiindoi Musa eng’ Horeb, ye kingoyai Jehovah arorutiet ak lagokab Israel, ye kimong’u eng’ emetab Misri." 
1Kings8:10 Ak kingomong’ tisiik eng’ ole tilil, konyi boldet gotab Jehovah," 
1Kings8:11 kot komata komuch tisiik kobois amu boldet: amu kinyi gotab Jehovah lilindab Jehovah. 
1Kings8:12 Kong’alal anyun Solomon kole, Kile Jehovah, menyei inendet mesundeito ne o." 
1Kings8:13 Kaateegun iman got ne imenye, komostang’ung’ ne imenye koigeny." 
1Kings8:14 Ak kiwelelgei laitoriat, ak koberur tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel: ak kitonon tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel." 
1Kings8:15 Ak kile, Iberurot Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne king’alalji eng’ kutinnyi Daudi baba, ak kagosulda eng’ eunekyik kole," 
1Kings8:16 Koboch betut ne kiamutu bikyuk Israel komong’ eng’ Misri, ko ma alewen nganas eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel ateech got, si kobiit kotebe yoto kainennyu; ago kialewen Daudi koboi bikyuk Israel." 
1Kings8:17 Ak kimi muguleldab baba Daudi kole koteekyi got kainetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
1Kings8:18 Ago kilenji Jehovah kwandanyu Daudi, Amu kimi muguleldang’ung’ iteekyi got kainennyu, ko kiiyai kit ne mie ibwat ko u noto eng’ muguleldang’ung’:" 
1Kings8:19 ago ma inye ne teechei goyoto; ago wering’ung’ ne mong’une bortang’ung’, inendet ne teekyin kainennyu got." 
1Kings8:20 Ak kagogimit Jehovah ng’olyondennyi ne kimwa; amu kiabiitu ageer kwandanyu Daudi, ak atebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Israel, ko u ye kiiyomis Jehovah, ak koateekyi got kainetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
1Kings8:21 Ak koachob eng’ yoto ole tebe moinget, ne mi arorutietab Jehovah orit, ne kiyai ak kwanisiekyok, ye kiimutu komong’ eng’ emetab Misri." 
1Kings8:22 Ak kitonon Solomon eng’ taitab kaptisisietab Jehovah eng’ taitab tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel, ak koiito eunekyik kotokyi kipsengwet:" 
1Kings8:23 ak kile, Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, mami Kamuktaindet age ne u inye, eng’ barak kipsengwet, anan eng’ ng’ony orit; ne ribei kayomiset ak rirenet eng’ otwogiguk, che bendote taing’ung’ eng’ mugulelwekwak tugul:" 
1Kings8:24 ne kiisuldochi otwogindeng’ung’ baba Daudi kit ne kigeyomisyi inendet: ee, kiimwa eng’ kuting’ung’, ak kaiyai eng’ eung’ung’ kosulda, ko u kit ne u rani." 
1Kings8:25 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, isuldochi otwogindeng’ung’ baba Daudi kit ne kiiyomisyi, ilenji, Mabetenen chito ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Israel eng’ tainnyu; ngot korib lagoguk ortinwekwak, kobendate tainnyu ko u ye kiiwendote tainnyu." 
1Kings8:26 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindetab Israel, asain ale ingogimit ng’olyondeng’ung’, ne kiimwachi otwogindeng’ung’ baba Daudi." 
1Kings8:27 Ago tos meny Kamuktaindet ng’ony iman? Keero, mayamin kipsengwet itebe, anan ko kipsengwet ne bo kipsengwetisiek; ko ming’in ne tia anyun goi koateech!" 
1Kings8:28 Ago konyit saetab otwogindeng’ung’, ak somennyi, kas, ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindennyu, rirek ak saet ne saei otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ taing’ung’ rani:" 
1Kings8:29 si kobiit kogeer konyeguk goi kemoi ak bet, kogeer komosta ne kiimwa ile, Tebe yoto kainennyu: si igas saet ne saei otwogindeng’ung’ kotokyingei komosita." 
1Kings8:30 Ak igas sometab otwogindeng’ung’, ak biguk Israel, ye saei kotokyingei yuto: ee, kas anyun eng’ kipsengwet oldang’ung’ ole imenye; ak ye igas, inyochi kaat." 
1Kings8:31 Ngot kolelji chi chitab kokwennyi, ak kebirji inendet koyosio, konyo koyosio eng’ taitab kaptisisieng’ung’ eng’ goi:" 
1Kings8:32 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet, ak iyai, ak iruoksechi otwogiguk, igikyi inendet ne kalel, si inde kotebe metinnyi ortinwekyik; ak iityi imanda inendet ne bo iman, igochi inendet ko u imandanyi." 
1Kings8:33 Ye kibar biguk Israel eng’ taitab bunik, amu kigoyaun tengekto; ngot koweekyingei kogeny, ak kong’any kaineng’ung’, ak kosa, ak korirjin eng’ goi:" 
1Kings8:34 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet, ak inyochi kaat biguk Israel eng’ tengektanywa, ak imutu ichek kogeny kobwa emet ne kiigochi kwanisiekwak." 
1Kings8:35 Ye kerak kipsengwet, ak kobet ropta, amu kigoyaun tengekto; ko ngot kosa kotokyigei komosi, ak kong’any kaineng’ung’, ak koweek eng’ tengektanywa, ye inyalil ichek:" 
1Kings8:36 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet, ak inyochi kaat otwogiguk, eng’ tengektanywa ak ne bo biguk Israel, ye ineti ichek oret ne mie ne nyolu kobendate; ak iyokyi ropta emeng’ung’, ne kiigochi biguk koek borotenywa." 
1Kings8:37 Ngot kobiit rubet eng’ emet, anan ko koroito, ngot kobiit chelalitiet anan ko uchatet, chereng’endet anan ko kutit; ngot koyiem ichek bunikwak eng’ emetab nganasokwak; koroito age tugul anan ko mi miando age tugul ne biitu;" 
1Kings8:38 ko saet anan ko somet age tugul ne kasom chi age tugul, anan ko ne kasom biguk tugul che bo Israel, ne naei chi age tugul miandab muguleldanyi, ak koiito eunekyik kotokyi goi:" 
1Kings8:39 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet oldang’ung’ ole imenye, ak inyochi kaat, ak iyai, ak iyaakyi chi age tugul ko u ortinwekyik tugul, ne inege muguleldanyi: (amu inye inyege ne ingen mugulelwekab werikab bik;)" 
1Kings8:40 si kobiit koiywein betusiek tugul komenyei emet ne kiigochi kwanisiekyok. 
1Kings8:41 Ak eng’ chito ne bo bororiosiek, ne ma bo biguk Israel, ngo nyo eng’ emet ne loo agobo kaineng’ung’;" 
1Kings8:42 (amu tun kasei ichek agobo kaineng’ung’ ne o, ak agobo eung’ung’ ne kim, ak eung’ung’ ne chuulat;) ye nyo ak kosa kotokyigei goi;" 
1Kings8:43 igas eng’ kipsengwet oldang’ung’ ole imenye, ak iyai ko u tuguk tugul che kaguurjin chichoto bo bororiosiek; si kobiit konai kaineng’ung’ bik tugul che bo ng’ony, koiywein, ko u ye iywein biguk Israel, ak si kobiit konai kole goi kiateech kemwaitoe kaineng’ung’." 
1Kings8:44 Ngot koba biguk kobargei ak bunikwak, eng’ oret age tugul ne keyoktae, ak kosa Jehovah kotokyigei nganasani kiilewen, kotokyigei goi koateekyi kaineng’ung’:" 
1Kings8:45 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet saenywa ak somenywa, ak iyachi ichek kit ne machei." 
1Kings8:46 Ngot koyaun tengek, (amu mami chi ne mayaei tengek,) ak inerekyi, ak igochi ichek eunekab bunikwak, koluul ichek komut koba emetab bunik, ngot ko loo anan ko negit;" 
1Kings8:47 ago ngot kobwatgei eng’ emet ne kigimut koek luulenik, ak kosik, ak korirjin eng’ emetab bik che kiimut ichek koluul, kole, Kigeyai tengekto, kigeyai kit ne imaasat, kigeyai kit ne ya kot;" 
1Kings8:48 ngot koweekiyigei eng’ mugulelwekwak tugul ak eng’ sobonwekwak tugul, eng’ emetab bunikwak che kiluul ichek, ak kosain kotokyigei emenywa, ne kiigochi kwanisiekwak, nganaset ne kiilewen, ak got ne kiateekyi kaineng’ung’;" 
1Kings8:49 igas anyun saenywa ak somenywa eng’ kipsengwet oldang’ung’ ole imenye, ak iyachi ichek kit ne machei;" 
1Kings8:50 ak inyochi kaat biguk che kigoyaun tengekto, ak bistaosiekwak tugul che kigobistaenen; ak irire ichek eng’ taitab bik che kiimut ichek koluul:" 
1Kings8:51 amu ichek ko biguk, boroteng’ung’, che kiimutu komong’ eng’ Misri, eng’ kwenutab matab karnet:" 
1Kings8:52 si kobiit igeer sometab otwogindeng’ung’, ak sometab biguk Israel, igasyi ichek eng’ sait age tugul ne karirjin." 
1Kings8:53 Amu kiitaban ichek eng’ bik tugul che bo ng’ony, koek boroteng’ung’, ko u ye kiimwa eng’ Musa otwogindeng’ung’, ye kiimutu kwanisiekyok komong’ eng’ Misri, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
1Kings8:54 Ak kingo kagoges Solomon saet eng’ saoni ak somet ne kisaei Jehovah, kong’eet eng’ taitab kaptisisietab Jehovah, eng’ ole kigutung’e kotokyin eunekyik kipsengwet." 
1Kings8:55 Ak kitonon, ak koberur tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel eng’ kutit ne o kole," 
1Kings8:56 Iberurot Jehovah, ne kigogochi kamuung’et bikyik Israel, ko u tuguk tugul che kiga koaror: ma bet ng’olyot agot agenge eng’ arorutiennyi tugul ne mie, ne kiiaror eng’ otwogindennyi Musa." 
1Kings8:57 Ingoteb Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo kobotech ko u ye kimi ak kwanisiekyok: amat kobagaktech, anan kometech:" 
1Kings8:58 si kobiit koyai mugulelwekyok kotokyigei inendet, kebendate ortinwekyik tugul, ak kerib ng’atutikyik, ak etanutikyik, ak kiruogutikyik, che king’at kwanisiekyok." 
1Kings8:59 Ak ingorikyi ng’alechuchuk Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, bet ak kemoi, chu kasome eng’ taitab Jehovah, si kobiit koyachi otwogindennyi kit ne machei, ak kit ne machei bikyik Israel, ko u ye machei eng’ betut age tugul:" 
1Kings8:60 si kobiit konai bik tugul che bo ng’ony kole, Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet; mami age." 
1Kings8:61 Ingoek anyun mugulelwekwok che igesunotgei eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, obendate ng’atutikyik, ak orib etanutikyik, ko u rani." 
1Kings8:62 Ak kiigoito laitoriat koboto Israel tugul tiseiywek eng’ taitab Jehovah. 
1Kings8:63 Ak kiigoito Solomon tiseiywek koek kagochinoikab kalyet, che kiigochi Jehovah, tuga elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’, ak kechirek elfusiek bogol ak tiptem. Kotaban anyun laitoriat koboto lagok tugul che bo Israel, gotab Jehovah." 
1Kings8:64 Kiitilil betunoto laitoriat kwenutab seremut ne kimi taitab gotab Jehovah; amu yoto ole kiigoitoe inendet kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagochinet ne bo busiek, ak mwanik che bo kagochinoikab kalyet: amu ki ming’in kaptisisietab sugunwet ne kimi taitab Jehovah, ma yam kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagochinetab busiek, ak mwanikab kagochinoikab kalyet." 
1Kings8:65 Kiyai anyun Solomon igorta eng’ betusiechoto, koboto Israel tugul, tuiyet ne o, kong’eete ye kibunei kebendi Hamat agoi ainetab Misri, eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, betusiek tisab ak betusiek tisab, tugul ko betusiek taman ak ang’wan." 
1Kings8:66 Kimwachi bik koba eng’ betutab sisiit, ak kiiberur ichek laitoriat, ak koba emaisiekwak koboiboen, kogasotegei eng’ mugulelwekwak amu mieindo tugul ne kiyachi Jehovah Daudi otwogindennyi, ak Israel bikyik." 
1Kings9:1 Ak kingo kagoges Solomon teeksetab gotab Jehovah, koboto gotab laitoriat, ak tuguk tugul che kimachei Solomon koyai," 
1Kings9:2 komong’ji anyun Jehovah Solomon ne bo aeng’, ko u ye kiga komong’ji inendet eng’ tai eng’ Gibeon." 
1Kings9:3 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet, Kaagas saeng’ung’ ak someng’ung’ ne kaisa ak isom eng’ tainnyu: kaatilil goi koiteech, si ande kainennyu yoto koigeny; ak tebe yoto konyekyuk ak muguleldanyu betusiek tugul." 
1Kings9:4 Ak ngiwendote tainnyu inye, ko u ye kiwendote Daudi kwandang’ung’, eng’ kagesunetab ge ne bo muguleldo, ak eng’ imanda, iyai ko u tugul che kaang’atin, ak irib ng’atutikyuk ak kiruogutikyuk;" 
1Kings9:5 agimit anyun ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo bounateng’ung’ eng’ Israel koigeny; ko u ye kigayomisyi Daudi kwandang’ung’, alenji, Mabetenen chito ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Israel." 
1Kings9:6 Ago ngot omaste ko mata osuba, okwek anan lagokwok, amorib ng’atutikyuk ak etanutikyuk, che kiande taing’wong’, ago ngot obe oot kanamonik, ogutung’ji:" 
1Kings9:7 ang’etoi Israel anyun eng’ emet ne kiagochi; ak goi kiatilil agobo kainennyu, aistoi eng’ tainnyu; si koek Israel kalewenet ak atindiot eng’ bik tugul:" 
1Kings9:8 agot nganda toror goi kot, ko tun kwong’e age tugul ne siirtoe yoto, ak kosasei; ak komwa ichek kole, Amu nee si koyachi ko u ni Jehovah emoni ak goi?" 
1Kings9:9 Ak kowol kole, Amu kimeto ichek Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ne kiimut kwanisiekwak komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, ak konamgei ak kanamonik, ak kogutung’ji, ak koot ichek: koipchi anyun Jehovah ichek yaitioni tugul." 
1Kings9:10 Ak kingo kagogesgei kenyisiek tiptemu, che kiteege Solomon gorjoto aeng’, gotab Jehovah ak gotab laitoriat," 
1Kings9:11 (kiga kogochi Hiram laitoriatab Turo Solomon ketikab taragonik ak ketikab biribirinik, ak tahabu, ko u tugul che kimachei,) kogochi anyun laitoriat Solomon Hiram nganasok tiptem eng’ emetab Galili." 
1Kings9:12 Kinyo Hiram eng’ Turo konyo kogeer nganasochoto kiga kogochi Solomon inendet; ago ma baibai inendet eng’ nganasochoto. 
1Kings9:13 Ak kile, Nee nganasochu kegona-o, tupchennyu? Ak kiguure emet Kabul, agoi ra." 
1Kings9:14 Ak kiiyokyi Hiram laitoriat Solomon talentaisiek bogol ak tiptem che bo tahabu. 
1Kings9:15 Ak ni kit ne kiigochi laitoriat Solomon koyum tuguk si kobiit koteege gotab Jehovah, ak gonnyi, ak Milo, ak irimetab Jerusalem, ak Hasor, ak Megido, ak Geser." 
1Kings9:16 Kiwa Parao laitoriatab Misri kwo konam Geser, ak kobeel eng’ mat, ak kobar Kananik che kimenyei nganasanato, ak kogochi cheptanyi, osotiotab Solomon, koek kagochinet." 
1Kings9:17 Ak kiteech Solomon Geser, ak Bet-horon ne mi komosta ne rektoot." 
1Kings9:18 Ak Baalat, ak Tamar ne mi ong’atet, eng’ emet," 
1Kings9:19 ak nganasok tugul ole kigonore Solomon tuguk, ak nganasok che bo karisiekyik, ak nganasokab murenik che lanyei mbartanyisiek, ak kit ne kimachei Solomon koteekyigei eng’ Jerusalem, ak eng’ Lebanon, ak eng’ emet tugul ne bo bounatennyi." 
1Kings9:20 Ak eng’ bik tugul che kiga ng’et che bo Amorik, Hitik, Perisik, Hibik ak Jebusik, che kima ko bo Israel;" 
1Kings9:21 lagokwak che kiga ng’et eng’ emet, che kima imuch lagokab Israel kobar koges, kiiyum Solomon otwogik eng’ bichoto, agoi rani." 
1Kings9:22 Ago ma yai Solomon lagokab Israel koek otwogik: kiek murenikab luget, ak kiboitinikyik, ak bounikyik, ak kiptainikyik, ak kandoikab karisiekyik che bo luget, ak murenikyik che kilanyei mbartanyisiek." 
1Kings9:23 Chu ko kiptainikyik che kibou boisietab Solomon, bik bogol mut ak konom, che kibou bik che kiboisiei." 
1Kings9:24 Kitogos cheptab Parao eng’ nganasetab Daudi kwo gonnyi ne kiga teekyi Solomon: yeityo koteech Milo. 
1Kings9:25 Ak kiigoitoi Solomon kagochinoik che kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet konyil somok eng’ kenyit eng’ kaptisisiet ne kiteekyi Jehovah, kitesta choto nyamdutik che kibeelei, eng’ taitab Jehovah. Koges anyun got." 
1Kings9:26 Ak kiyai laitoriat Solomon melisiek che bo luget eng’ Esion-geber, ye negite Elot, eng’ ngegutab Nyanjet ne Birir, eng’ emetab Edom." 
1Kings9:27 Ak kiiyokto Hiram otwogikyik, bikab melit, che ingen nyanjet, koboto otwogikab Solomon." 
1Kings9:28 Ak kiba Opir, ak koib tahabu eng’ oloto, talentaisiek bogol ang’wan ak tiptem, koipchi laitoriat Solomon." 
1Kings10:1 Ak kingogas laitoriatab Sheba, ne ki kwondo, kalosunetab Solomon agobo kainetab Jehovah, konyo kotiem inendet eng’ teebutik che uuen." 
1Kings10:2 Ak kinyo Jerusalem koboto bik che chang’, ak tambesik che ibei tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak tahabusiek che chang’, ak koik che bo kamanutiet ne o: ak kingoit ole mi Solomon kong’alal ak inendet agobo tuguk tugul che kimi muguleldanyi." 
1Kings10:3 Ak kiwolji Solomon inendet teebutikyik tugul: kima biit kiy age tugul ne ung’at eng’ laitoriat ne ma mwachi inendet. 
1Kings10:4 Ak kingo kagogeer laitoriandanato bo Sheba ng’omnatet tugul ne bo Solomon, ak got ne kiga koteech," 
1Kings10:5 ak amitwogikyik, ak ole teptoi otwogikyik, ak tononet ne tononjin boisiet kiboitinikyik, ak ngoroikwak, ak bikyik che ipchin tuguk che eei, ak kagochinoikyik che kiigoitoi eng’ gotab Jehovah: kogesgei anyun kimnatennyi." 
1Kings10:6 Ak kilenji kwonyoto laitoriat, Bo iman ng’alechu kiagase eng’ emennyu agobo boisioniguk, ak ng’omnateng’ung’." 
1Kings10:7 Ago kimayan ng’alechato kot anyo, ak kagogeer konyekyuk: ak keero, kima it agot kebeber che kiga kimwawa: siirei ng’omnateng’ung’ ak berurtang’ung’ kalosunet ne kigagas." 
1Kings10:8 Boiboi biguk, boiboi otwogichuguk, chu tonondos eng’ taing’ung’ kotugul, ak kogasei ng’omnateng’ung’." 
1Kings10:9 Iberurot Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne kibaibait eng’ inye, ak kondein ng’echeretab laitornatetab Israel: amu kicham Jehovah Israel koigeny, koyain anyun iegu laitoriat, si iyai kiruoget ak imanda." 
1Kings10:10 Ak kiigochi kwonyoto Solomon talentaisiek bogol ak tiptem che bo tahabu, ak nyamdutik che ng’uu ne anyiny, che chang’ mising’; ak koik che bo kamanutiet ne o: kimata keip kogeny nyamdutik che ng’uu ne anyin ng’isiat che te choto che kiigochi laitoriatab Sheba laitoriat Solomon." 
1Kings10:11 Ak kiib agichek melisiekab Hiram, che kiibu tahabu eng’ Opir, ketikab almug che chang’ kot ak koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, che kiibune Opir." 
1Kings10:12 Ak kiyae laitoriat ketichato bo almug, tolochikab gotab Jehovah, ak gotab laitoriat, kiyae kogeny ketichato ketubosiek ak kibugandinik che bo bik che tieni: mata keib ketikab almug che u choto kogeny, amata kegeer agoi rani." 
1Kings10:13 Ak kiigochi laitoriat Solomon laitoriatab Sheba kiy age tugul ne kimach, kiy age tugul ne kisom, ko ma boto choto che kiigochi Solomon kwonyoto eng’ aiyebindab laitornatennyi. Kiweektagei anyun, kwo emennyi, inendet koboto otwogikyik." 
1Kings10:14 Ak nyigisindab tahabu che kiipchi Solomon eng’ kenyit agenge ko ki talentaisiek bogol lo ak tamanwogik lo ak lo che bo tahabu," 
1Kings10:15 ama boto che kialdooti bik, ak che kiyae mung’aret chemung’arainik, ak che bo laitorinik tugul che bo bik che burugotin, ak che bo bounikab emet." 
1Kings10:16 Ak kiyai laitoriat Solomon long’onik che eechen bogol aeng’ che bo tahabu che kigitany: kigiyae long’et agenge ne o sekelisiek bogol lo che bo tahabu. 
1Kings10:17 Ak kiyai long’onik che mengechen bogol somok che bo tahabu che kigitany; kigiyae long’et agenge ratilisiek somok che bo tahabu: kigonore laitoriat long’onichoto gotab osnetab Lebanon. 
1Kings10:18 Ak koyai kogeny laitoriat ng’echeret ne o ne bo laitornatet eng’ kelekab belek, ak koliige tahabu che kororon mising’." 
1Kings10:19 Kimi tuguk long’eiywot ne kitinyei tuguk lo che kigitiegoti ketogosyin ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak ki kitainganat ng’echeronato komostab batai: ak kimi ketik komosi ak komosi che tiiegei eunek, ak itonwek aeng’ che bo ng’etunyik eng’ komosi ak komosi, eng’ ye negite ketichato kitiie eunek." 
1Kings10:20 Ak kitonondos itonwek tamanu ak aeng’ che bo ng’etunyik eng’ komoswek tuwai eng’ long’eiywondonoto kitinyei tuguk lo che kitiegoti ketogostoi: kima komi age ne kergei ak noto ne kigiyai eng’ bororiet age tugul. 
1Kings10:21 Ki bo tahabu tuguk tugul che keeise che bo laitoriat Solomon, ak tuguk tugul che kigiboisie eng’ gotab osnetab Lebanon ko ki bo tahabu che tililen: kima komi agot agenge ne bo feda; kima ko kiy feda eng’ betusiekab Solomon." 
1Kings10:22 Amu kitinyei laitoriat eng’ nyanjet melisiek che bo Tarsis koboto melisiek che bo Hiram: kiibu melisiek che bo Tarsis konyil agenge eng’ kenyisiek somok tahabu, ak feda, ak kelekab belek, ak tisok, ak taritik che kiguure tausi." 
1Kings10:23 Kisiir anyun laitoriat Solomon laitorinik tugul che bo ng’ony eng’ magornatet ak ng’omnatet. 
1Kings10:24 Ak kicheng’ ng’ony komugul kogeer Solomon, kogas ng’omnatennyi, ne kigainde Kamuktaindet muguleldanyi." 
1Kings10:25 Ak kiib chi tugul kagochinennyi, tugukab feda, ak tugukab tahabu, ak ngoroik, ak karikab luget, ak nyamdutik, ak mbartanyisiek ak nyumbusiek, koitet ne kigigonu eng’ kenyit age tugul." 
1Kings10:26 Ak kiiyum Solomon karisiekab luget ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek: ak kitinyei karisiek elfut ak bogol ang’wan ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek elfusiek taman ak aeng’ che kiinde nganasokab karisiek, ak che kimi ole mi laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem." 
1Kings10:27 Kiyai laitoriat feda eng’ Jerusalem koigei koik, ak kiyai taragonik koigei mogoonik che mi emet ne soi, eng’ chang’indo." 
1Kings10:28 Ak mbartanyisiechato che kitinyei Solomon ko kigigetune Misri; ak kitaach chemung’arainikab laitoriat eng’ akwotisiek, kitaach akwet age tugul eng’ alyennyi." 
1Kings10:29 Ak kimong’u karit eng’ Misri eng’ alyetab sekelisiek bogol lo che bo feda, ak mbartanyit ko ki sekelisiek bogol ak konom: ak ki u noto eng’ laitorinik tugul che bo Hitik, ak laitorinik che bo Suria, kogetu icheget." 
1Kings11:1 Kicham anyun Solomon kwonyik che chang’ che bo bororiosiek, koboto cheptab Parao, ak tibik che bo Moabik, ak che bo Amonik, ak che bo Edomik, ak che bo Sidonik, ak che bo Hitik:" 
1Kings11:2 che bo bororiosiek che kilenji Jehovah lagokab Israel, Amochut ichek, anan kochutok: amu imaasi ichek mugulelwekwok kosub kanamonikwak: kinamgei Solomon ak chuto kochamnyo." 
1Kings11:3 Ak kitinyei osotik bogol tisab, che ki tibikab bounik, ak chebaigeinik bogol somok: ak kiimaas osotikyik muguleldanyi." 
1Kings11:4 Amu kingoosit Solomon, komaas osotikyik muguleldanyi kosub kanamonikwak, ak kima kogesunotgei eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, ko u kit ne ki u muguleldab Daudi kwandanyi." 
1Kings11:5 Amu kiisub Solomon Astoret, kanamwet ne kwondo ne bo Sidonik, koboto Milkom ne kiwechei ne bo Amonik." 
1Kings11:6 Ak kiyai Solomon yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ama isub Jehovah konyi, ko u ye kiyai Daudi kwandanyi." 
1Kings11:7 Kiteekyi anyun Solomon Kemos ne kiwechei ne bo Moabik ole toror, eng’ tulwet ne mi taitab Jerusalem, ak kiteekyi Molek ne kiwechei ne bo lagokab Amon." 
1Kings11:8 Ak kiyachi ko u noto osotikyik tugul che bo bororiosiek, che kibeelei nyamdutik ak koeng’jin kanamonikwak." 
1Kings11:9 Ak kinerekyi Jehovah Solomon, amu kigimaas muguleldanyi kobagakta Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne kiga komong’ji inendet konyil aeng’," 
1Kings11:10 ak kiga kong’at inendet agobo ng’olyondonito, kole, amat kosub kanamonik: ago ma rib kit ne kiga ng’at Jehovah inendet." 
1Kings11:11 Kilenji anyun Jehovah Solomon, Amu koiyai kii, ama irib kayomisennyu ak ng’atutikyuk che kiang’atin, arebenen iman bounatet, ak agochi otwogindeng’ung’." 
1Kings11:12 Ago mayae ng’olyondonito eng’ betusieguk agobo Daudi kwandang’ung’ ago arebe eutab wering’ung’. 
1Kings11:13 Ago marebe bounatet tugul; ago agochini oret agenge wering’ung’, agobo Daudi otwogindennyu, ak Jerusalem ne kialewen." 
1Kings11:14 Ak kiing’eetyi Jehovah Solomon bunyot, Hadad Edomindet: ki bo iyotetab laitoriat eng’ Edom." 
1Kings11:15 Amu kingomi Daudi Edom, ak kiga wa Joab, kiptaiyatab luget, kotogosta kotub bik che kiga kibar, ak kiga bar muren age tugul eng’ Edom;" 
1Kings11:16 (amu kitebe oloto Joab ak Israel tugul arawek lo, agoi kobar muren age tugul eng’ Edom;)" 
1Kings11:17 kimwei anyun Hadad, inendet ak Edomik alak che bo otwogikab kwandanyi koboto inendet, koba Misri; kita ko lakwet ne ming’in Hadad." 
1Kings11:18 Ak king’eetyo eng’ Midian, ak kobwa Paran: ak kiimut bik eng’ Paran koba koboto icheget, ak koba koit Misri, oldab Parao laitoriatab Misri; ne kiigochi inendet got ak kong’at kigochi amitwogik, kogochi emet." 
1Kings11:19 Ak kichamak mising’ Hadad eng’ taitab Parao, kot kogochi chepkametab osotiondennyi kotun, chepkametab Tapanes osotiotab laitoriat." 
1Kings11:20 Ak kisikyi chepkametab Tapanes inendet werit Genubat, ne kiluge Tapanes inendet eng’ gotab Parao: ak kitebe Genubat gotab Parao koboto werikab Parao." 
1Kings11:21 Ak kingogas Hadad komi Misri kole kigoru Daudi koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigome Joab kiptaiyatab luget, kolenji Hadad Parao, Chamwa awa, kot ait emennyu." 
1Kings11:22 Kolenji Parao, Nee ne kobetun eng’ oldanyu, si imach iwe emeng’ung’? Ak kiwol kole, Ma betwa kiy: chamwa inye awa." 
1Kings11:23 Ak kiing’eetyi Kamuktaindet inendet bunyot age, Reson weritab Eliada, ne kiga mwee kiptaiyandennyi Hadadeser laitoriatab Soba:" 
1Kings11:24 ak kiiyum bik koba ole mi inendet, ak koek kiptaiyatab kweanetab luget, kingobar Daudi bikab Soba: ak kiba Damasko ak komeny oloto, ak kolaitoran eng’ Damasko." 
1Kings11:25 Ak kiek inendet bunyotab Israel eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Solomon, ko ma kiitito yaitiet ne kiyai Hadad: ak kiwech Israel, ak kolaitoran eng’ Suria." 
1Kings11:26 Ak kimach Jeroboam weritab Nebat, Epraimindet ne bo Sereda, otwogindetab Solomon, ne kainetab kamennyi ko ki Serua, kwondo ne ki mosok, kobar laitoriat." 
1Kings11:27 Ak ni kit ne kiigochi inendet komach kobar laitoriat: kiteech Solomon Milo, ak koteech kogeny ole kigobutok eng’ nganasetab Daudi kwandanyi." 
1Kings11:28 Ak chichoto kigiguure Jeroboam ko ki chito ne kim ak ko nyigan: ak kigeer Solomon murenonoto kole, igiilegei eng’ boisiet, kogochi inendet koboi boisiet tugul ne bo gotab Josep." 
1Kings11:29 Ak eng’ betusiechoto kingwa Jeroboam eng’ Jerusalem, kotuiye maotiot Aija Silonindet eng’ oret; kigailaach Aija ngoriet ne ta ko leel; ak kimi tuwai ichegei timin." 
1Kings11:30 Ak kinam Aija ngorionoto leel kiilaachi, ak kogerer kopcheune taman ak aeng’." 
1Kings11:31 Ak kilenji Jeroboam, Ib kebeberwek taman: amu kale Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, Keero, arebe bounatet eng’ eutab Solomon, ak agonin ortinwek taman:" 
1Kings11:32 (ago bunjin inendet oret agenge, agobo otwogindennyu Daudi, ak agobo Jerusalem, nganaset ne kialewen eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel:)" 
1Kings11:33 amu kigobagakta, ak kogutung’ji Astoret kanamwet ne kwondo ne bo Sidonik, ak Kemos kanamwetab Moab, ak Milkom kanamwetab lagokab Amon; ama bendote ortinwekyuk, koyai ne mie eng’ tainnyu, ak korib ng’atutikyuk ak kiruogutikyuk, ko u ye kiyai Daudi kwandanyi." 
1Kings11:34 Ago maibe bounatet tugul eng’ eunnyi: ayae inendet koek bounindet betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi, agobo Daudi otwogindennyu, ne kialewen, amu kirib ng’atutikyuk ak etanutikyuk:" 
1Kings11:35 ago aistoi bounatet eng’ eutab werinnyi, ak agonin ortinwek taman." 
1Kings11:36 Ak agochini werinnyi oret agenge, si kolal kotugul taitab Daudi otwogindennyu eng’ Jerusalem eng’ tainnyu, nganaset ne kialewenjigei ande kainennyu yoto." 
1Kings11:37 Ak anamin, ak ilaitoran ko u tugul che chamei sobondang’ung’, ak iegu laitoriat ibou Israel." 
1Kings11:38 Ak ngot igas tugul che ang’atin, ak iwendote ortinwekyuk, ak iyai che achame, irib etanutikyuk ak ng’atutikyuk, ko u ye kiyai Daudi otwogindennyu; atebe koboten, ateegun got ne kim, ko u ye kiateekyi Daudi, ak agonin Israel." 
1Kings11:39 Ak anyalil iyotetab Daudi amu nito, ago manyalili agoi." 
1Kings11:40 Kicheng’ anyun Solomon kobar Jeroboam: ago king’eet Jeroboam ak komwei kwo Misri, oldab Sisak laitoriatab Misri ak kitebe Misri agoi kome Solomon." 
1Kings11:41 Ak ma kisirji boisionikab Solomon che kang’et, ak tugul che kiyai, ak ng’omnatennyi, bukuitab boisionikab Solomon?" 
1Kings11:42 Ak betusiek che kilaitoran Solomon eng’ Jerusalem kobou Israel ko ki kenyisiek artam. 
1Kings11:43 Ak kiru Solomon koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi nganasetab Daudi kwandanyi: ak kilaitoran Reoboam werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
1Kings12:1 Ak kiwa Reoboam Sekem: amu kigabwa Israel tugul Sekem koyai inendet koek laitoriat. 
1Kings12:2 Ak kingogas Jeroboam weritab Nebat agobo noto, (amu kita komi Misri, ole kiga mwechi komwee laitoriat Solomon, ak kimenyei Jeroboam Misri," 
1Kings12:3 ak kiiyokto keguur inendet;) konyo Jeroboam ak tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel, ak kong’alalji Reoboam kolenji," 
1Kings12:4 Kiyai kwandang’ung’ choginnyo kouuit: ara anyun, yai kowisisit otisiet ne uui ne ki bo kwandang’ung’, ak choginnyi ne nyigis ne kiindeech, si keotin." 
1Kings12:5 Ak kilenji, Oba betusiek somok, si tun obwa kogeny. Koba anyun bik." 
1Kings12:6 King’alal laitoriat Reoboam ak boisiek che kicham kotonondos eng’ taitab Solomon kwandanyi, ye kita kosobei, kolenji, Nee ng’olyot ne omwawa ne awoljini bichu?" 
1Kings12:7 Ak kimwachi kolenji, Ngot iegu otwogindetab bichu ra, ak iot ichek, ak iwolji ichek, ak imwachi ng’alek che miach, koegu anyun ichek otwogiguk koigeny." 
1Kings12:8 Ago kibagakta ng’alekab boisiek che kimwachi inendet, ak kong’alal ak neranik che kinerjindos tugul, che kitonondos eng’ tainnyi." 
1Kings12:9 Ak kolenji ichek, Nee ng’olyot ne omwae okwek si kobiit kewolji bichu, kong’alalwa kolenja, Yai kowisisit chogit ne kiindeech kwandang’ung’?" 
1Kings12:10 Ak kimwachi neranik che kinerjindos ak inendet, kolenji, Imwachini ko u ni bichu kong’alalun, ilenjini, Kiyai kwandang’ung’ choginnyo konyigisit, ago iyaiywech kowisisit; imwachini ko u ni, ilenjini, Nyigis mornennyu ne ming’in ne bo eut kosiir suetab baba." 
1Kings12:11 Ak ko u ye kigonok baba chogit ne nyigis, atese choging’wong’: kiitigonenok baba kipcharitisiek, ago atigonenok melmelwek." 
1Kings12:12 Kobwa anyun Jeroboam ak bik tugul ole mi Reoboam eng’ betutab somok, ko u ye kiga ng’at laitoriat, kole, Obwa eng’ betutab somok." 
1Kings12:13 Ak kiwolji laitoriat bik eng’ koromnatet, ak kometo ng’alekab boisiek che kiga mwachi inendet;" 
1Kings12:14 ak kong’alalji ichek ko u ye kiga mwachi neranik, kolenji, Kiyai baba choging’wong’ konyigisit, ago atese choging’wong’: kiitigonenok baba kipcharitisiek, ago atigonenok melmelwek." 
1Kings12:15 Ma kasyi anyun laitoriat bichoto, amu ki kit ne kibunu Jehovah, si kobiit kogimit ng’olyondennyi, ne kimwa Jehovah eng’ Aija Silonindet, komwachi Jeroboam weritab Nebat." 
1Kings12:16 Ak kingogeer Israel tugul kole, mata kogasyi laitoriat ichek, kowolji bik laitoriat, kolenji, Nee kebeberta ne ketinye eng’ Daudi? Ama kitinye borotet eng’ weritab Jesii: oba emaisiekwok, ee Israel: rib gong’ung’ anyun Daudi. Koba Israel anyun emaisiekwak." 
1Kings12:17 Ago kilaitorane Reoboam lagokab Israel che kimenyei nganasokab Juda. 
1Kings12:18 Kiiyokto anyun Reoboam Adoram, ne kibou aisurut; ak kilach Israel tugul inendet eng’ koik, kome. Ak kichakta laitoriat Reoboam kolany karinnyi, komwei kwo Jerusalem." 
1Kings12:19 Kongelelji anyun Israel gotab Daudi agoi ra. 
1Kings12:20 Ak kingogas Israel tugul kole kogoweek Jeroboam, koyokto keguur konyo tuiyet, ak koyai inendet koek laitoriat koboi Israel tugul: ama biit ne kiisub gotab Daudi, kobate oretab Juda kityo." 
1Kings12:21 Ak kingoit Reoboam Jerusalem, koyum gotab Juda tugul, koboto oretab Benjamin, murenik elfusiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit che bo luget, che kigilewen, kobargei ak gotab Israel, koweekyi bounatet Reoboam weritab Solomon." 
1Kings12:22 Ago kinyonji ng’olyotab Kamuktaindet Semaia chitab Kamuktaindet, kolenji," 
1Kings12:23 Ng’alalji Reoboam weritab Solomon, laitoriatab Juda, ak got tugul ne bo Juda ak ne bo Benjamin, ak bik che kong’et, ilenji," 
1Kings12:24 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Amobe otogoste, anan obargei ak tupchosiekwok lagokab Israel: ingoweek chi tugul kwo gonnyi; amu bunwa kii. Kogas it anyun ichek ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak koweek koba, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
1Kings12:25 Koteech anyun Jeroboam Sekem eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim, ak komeny oloto; ak kiwa eng’ oloto kwo koteech Penuel." 
1Kings12:26 Ak kile Jeroboam eng’ muguleldanyi, Weekyingei anyun nguno bounatet gotab Daudi:" 
1Kings12:27 ngot koba bichu kotogosta kogoito tiseiywek eng’ gotab Jehovah eng’ Jerusalem, koweekyingei mugulelwekab bichu kogeny kiptaiyandenywa, ne inendet ko Reoboam laitoriatab Juda; ak kobara, ak koweekyigei Reoboam laitoriatab Juda." 
1Kings12:28 Koruoch anyun laitoriat ak kotany itonwek aeng’ che bo moek che bo tahabu; ak kilenji ichek, Uui kot eng’ okwek obe otogoste Jerusalem; ogeer kanamonikwok-o, ee Israel, che kiimutwak otogosu eng’ emetab Misri." 
1Kings12:29 Ak kiinde age Bet-el, konde age Dan." 
1Kings12:30 Ak kiek kiito tengekto: amu kiba bik kogutuny eng’ taitab age tugul, agot eng’ Dan." 
1Kings12:31 Ak kiteech gorikab komoswek che tororen, ak kilewen tisiik eng’ bik tugul, che kima ko bo werikab Lawik." 
1Kings12:32 Ak king’at Jeroboam keyai igorta eng’ arawetab sisiit eng’ betutab taman ak mut, ko u igorta ne kimi Juda, ak kitogosta ye mi kapkorosut; kiyai ko u noto eng’ Bet-el, koeng’ji moek che kiga kotany: ak kiinde Bet-el tisiik che bo komoswek che tororen che kiga yai." 
1Kings12:33 Ak kitogosta kwo kapkorosut ne kiga koyai eng’ Bet-el, eng’ betutab taman ak mut, eng’ arawetab sisiit, eng’ arawet ne kiga chob inegei eng’ muguleldanyi, ak king’at keyai: kiinde igorta ne bo lagokab Israel, ak kotogosta kwo kapkorosut, kobeel nyamdutik." 
1Kings13:1 Ak ogeero, kinyo chitab Kamuktaindet eng’ Juda eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah konyo Bet-el: ak kitononi Jeroboam eng’ ye negite kapkorosut kobeelei nyamdutik." 
1Kings13:2 Ak kiwaage kapkorosut eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah, kole, Ee, kapkorosuni, kapkorosuni, kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Keero, tun kisikyin lakwet gotab Daudi, ne kiguure kainennyi Josia; ak kogoitoenen inendet tisiikab komoswek che tororen, che beelenen nyamdutik, ak tun beelei eng’ inye kowekab bik." 
1Kings13:3 Ak kiibor kaborunet eng’ betunoto kole, Ni kaborunet ne kamwa Jehovah: keero, betoksei kapkorosut, ak kotumdagei orek che mi baragunnyi." 
1Kings13:4 Ak kingogas laitoriat ng’alekab chitab Kamuktaindet, ne kiwaage kapkorosut eng’ Bet-el, kochuul anyun Jeroboam eunnyi eng’ kapkorosut kong’werer kole, Onam inendet. Ak kiyaam eunoto kiga chuul, ne mata komuch koaruny kogeny." 
1Kings13:5 Kobetak kapkorosut agine, ak kotumdagei orek eng’ kapkorosunoto, ko u kaborunet ne kaga kobor chitab Kamuktaindet eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
1Kings13:6 Ak kiwolji laitoriat chitab Kamuktaindet kolenji, Igaigai Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak isaiywa, si koweek eunnyu kogeny kosob. Ak kisa chitab Kamuktaindet Jehovah, ak kiweek eutab laitoriat kogeny kosob, ak koigei kit ne ka u eng’ tai." 
1Kings13:7 Ak kilenji laitoriat chitab Kamuktaindet, Nyo kebe ga, iwe imuuny, ak agonin melekto." 
1Kings13:8 Ak kilenji chitab Kamuktaindet laitoriat, Agot ngot igona kebebertab gong’ung’, ko magibendi go tuwai, ama amisiei anan aee beek eng’ olito:" 
1Kings13:9 amu kang’ata ng’olyotab Jehovah ko u noto, kole, Amat iam amit anan iee beek, anan iweegege oret ne kebunu." 
1Kings13:10 Kwo anyun kobun oret age, ma weegege oret ne kibunu konyonei Bet-el." 
1Kings13:11 Kimenyei maotiot ne os nganasetab Bet-el; ak kinyo age eng’ werikyik komwachi inendet boisionik tugul che kiga yai chitab Kamuktaindet betunoto eng’ Bet-el; ng’alek che kiga mwachi laitoriat, komwachi kwandanywa ng’alechato agichek." 
1Kings13:12 Ak kilenji ichek kwandanywa, Kabun ano? Ak kiga keer werikyik oret ne kabun chitab Kamuktaindet ne kibunu Juda." 
1Kings13:13 Ak kilenji werikyik, Oiitawa sigiriet. Koiitochi inendet anyun sigiriet: ak kilany." 
1Kings13:14 Ak kiisub chitab Kamuktaindet, ak kinyor kotebyei eng’ ketit kel: ak kilenji inendet, Tos, i chitab Kamuktaindet no kebunu Juda? Ak kile, A inendet." 
1Kings13:15 Kolenji anyun inendet, Nyo kebe ga tuwai, iamisie." 
1Kings13:16 Ak kile, Mamuchi keweeige tuwai, anan kebe go tuwai: ama ame amit anan kee beek tuwai eng’ oli:" 
1Kings13:17 amu kagimwawa eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah kele, Amat iam amit anan iee beek eng’ oloto, anan iweegege oret ne kebune." 
1Kings13:18 Ak kilenji inendet, A maotiot agane ko u inye; ak kang’alalwa malaikaiyat eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah kole, Imutu inendet konyo gong’ung’, si koamis ak koee beek. Ago kimwachi lembech." 
1Kings13:19 Koweek anyun ak inendet, kwo koamis eng’ gonnyi ak koee beek." 
1Kings13:20 Ak ye kita koamisiei, konyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah maotiondonoto kiimutu inendet koweek:" 
1Kings13:21 ak kimwachi eng’ kutit ne o chitab Kamuktaindet ne kibunu Juda, kolenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Amu kaibistoe ng’olyotab Jehovah, ama irib ng’atutietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne kang’atin," 
1Kings13:22 ago keweeige, ak iamisie ak iee beek eng’ ole kaga mwaun kolenjin, Amat iam amit anan iee beek; maitei mustang’ung’ kereritab kwanisieguk." 
1Kings13:23 Ak kingo kagoamis ak koeeiso, koiitochi inendet sigiriet maotiondoni kaweechi inendet." 
1Kings13:24 Ak kingo kakwa, konyor ng’etundo inendet eng’ oret, ak kobar inendet: ak kigiwirji mustanyi oret, ak kitonone sigiriet ye negite musto; kitonone ng’etundo agine ye negite musto." 
1Kings13:25 Ak ogeero, kisiirto bik eng’ yoto, ak kogeer musto ne kagiwirji oret, ak ng’etundo ne kitononi eng’ ye negite musto: ak kiba komwaita eng’ nganaset ole kimenyei maotiondonoto os." 
1Kings13:26 Ak kingogas maotiondonoto kole, Inendet ko chitab Kamuktaindet, ne kaga bistoe ng’olyotab Jehovah: ko noto anyun, kaigochi Jehovah inendet ng’etundo, ne kagerer inendet ak kobar, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kiga mwachi inendet." 
1Kings13:27 Ak kimwachi werikyik kolenji, Oiitawa sigiriet. Ak kiito." 
1Kings13:28 Kiwa anyun ak konyor mustanyi ko kagiwirji oret, ak sigiriet ak ng’etundo kotonondos eng’ ye negite musto: ma am ng’etundo musto, anan kobar sigiriet." 
1Kings13:29 Ak kisut maotiondonoto mustab chitab Kamuktaindet, ak konde sigiriet barak, ak koib koweekta: ak konyo nganasetab maotiondonoto os, konyo korir, ak kotub inendet." 
1Kings13:30 Ak kiinde musoto kererinnyi; ak korirji inendet, kole, Bwa tupchennyu!" 
1Kings13:31 Ak kingo kagotub inendet, komwachi werikyik kolenji, Tun kaamee, otupcha kererini kagitupchi chitab Kamuktaindet; onde kowekyuk korupgei ak chechik." 
1Kings13:32 Amu isuldoi iman mwaet ne kimwa eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah, ne kawaage kapkorosut eng’ Bet-el, ak gorik tugul che bo komoswek che tororen che mi nganasokab Samaria." 
1Kings13:33 Kingobata nito, ko ma week Jeroboam eng’ orennyi ne ya, ago kiyai kogeny tisiik eng’ bik tugul che bo komoswek che tororen: kiitaban age tugul ne kimach, si kobiit tisiik che bo komoswek che tororen:" 
1Kings13:34 ak kiek kii tengekto eng’ gotab Jeroboam, si koisto kobet, ak kong’em kogesgei eng’ ng’ony." 
1Kings14:1 Kimian eng’ betusiechoto Abija weritab Jeroboam. 
1Kings14:2 Ak kilenji Jeroboam osotiondennyi, Asomin ale, ng’eet ak iwalge si ma kinain kele i osotiotab Jeroboam: ak iwe Silo; keero, mi oloto maotiot Aija, ne kimwa agobo ane kole aegu laitoriat abou bichu." 
1Kings14:3 Ak iib makatinik taman, ak makatinik che mengechen, ak chuboit ne mi kumiat, ak iwe oldanyi: si komwaun kit ne biitu eng’ lakwani." 
1Kings14:4 Ak kiyai ko u noto osotiotab Jeroboam, king’eet, kwo Silo, ak kiit gotab Aija. Kimata kogeerei kiy; amu kiga kogor eng’ osindanyi." 
1Kings14:5 Ak kilenji Jehovah Aija, Keero, nyonei osotiotab Jeroboam konyo koteebenen agobo werinnyi; amu miani: imwachini ko u ni ak ko u ni: amu ye it go, koyaegei koigei kwondo age." 
1Kings14:6 Ak kingogas Aija cheetab kelyekyik, ko kait kurgat, kolenji, Nyo go, osotiotab Jeroboam; amu nee si iyaige iige age? Amu kagiyokwa aibun ng’alek che bichien." 
1Kings14:7 Ui, ilenji Jeroboam, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel; kiaeetin eng’ bichu, ak ayain iegu bounindetab bikyuk Israel," 
1Kings14:8 ak areb bounatet eng’ gotab Daudi, ak agonin: ago maiige otwogindennyu Daudi, ne kirib ng’atutikyuk, kosuba eng’ muguleldanyi komugul, koyai ne mie eng’ tainnyu;" 
1Kings14:9 ago koiyai yaitiet kosiir bik tugul che kiindounenen, ak koiwe iyachige kanamonik, ak che kitanyi, itacha, ak iwirta awa let eng’ inye:" 
1Kings14:10 noto anyun, ogeero, aipchini yaitiet gotab Jeroboam, ak aistoe Jeroboam lakwet age tugul ne werit, ne kigigerji go, ak ne wendoti eng’ Israel, ak abukte kogestagei gotab Jeroboam, ko u ye ng’uei chito ng’atatek, kot kogestagei." 
1Kings14:11 Chita age tugul ne bo Jeroboam ne meei eng’ nganaset, koamei sesenik; ak ne meechin timin, koamei taritik che bo barak: amu kagomwa Jehovah." 
1Kings14:12 Ng’eet ui gong’ung’: ak ye itiech kelyeguk nganaset, komee lakwet." 
1Kings14:13 Ak korirji Israel tugul inendet, ak kotub; amu inendet inegei ne bo gab Jeroboam ne wendi kererit: amu koginyorji inendet kit ne mie eng’ Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, eng’ gotab Jeroboam." 
1Kings14:14 Ak tun lewenjingei Jehovah laitoriat ne bou Israel, ne tun barei gotab Jeroboam kogesgei eng’ betunoto: ago nee? Agot eng’ betunoto." 
1Kings14:15 Kong’eete nguno kobarei Jehovah Israel, ko u ye kitumdumi morong’iot eng’ beek; ak kotut Israel eng’ emoni kararan, ne kiigochi kwanisiekwak, ak koseer kosiir Ainet bitonin; amu kiyachigei Aserik, kotach Jehovah." 
1Kings14:16 Ak metoi Israel amu tengekwogikab Jeroboam, che kiyai inendet, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
1Kings14:17 Ak king’eet osotiotab Jeroboam, ak kwo, ak kiit Tirsa: ak kingoit ye bo tugatukyetab kurgetab got, kome lakwet." 
1Kings14:18 Ak kitub Israel tugul inendet, ak koririo agobo inendet, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, ne kimwa eng’ otwogindennyi Aija maotiot." 
1Kings14:19 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jeroboam, ak ole kiyaita luget, ak ole kilaitoranda, ogeero, kigisirji bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel." 
1Kings14:20 Kilaitoran Jeroboam kenyisiek tiptem ak aeng’: ak kiru koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kilaitoran Nadab werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
1Kings14:21 Kilaitoran Reoboam weritab Solomon eng’ Juda. Ki bo Reoboam kenyisiek artam ak agenge ye kitau kolaitorani, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak tisab eng’ Jerusalem, nganaset ne kilewen Jehovah eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel, si konde kainennyi yoto; ak kigiguure kametab Reoboam Naama che bo Amonik." 
1Kings14:22 Ak kiyai bikab Juda ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah; kiigochi inendet ng’etkonda eng’ tengekwogikwak kosiir tugul che kiga koyai kwanisiekwak. 
1Kings14:23 Amu kiteekyigei agichek komoswek che tororen, ak tolochik, ak Aserik, eng’ tulwet age tugul ne koi, ak eng’ ketit kel eng’ ketit age tugul ne tuon;" 
1Kings14:24 ak kimi sodomik agichek: ak kiyai tuguk tugul che kiwechei che bo bororiosiek che kiga koon Jehovah eng’ taitab lagokab Israel. 
1Kings14:25 Ak eng’ kenyitab mut ne bo laitoriat Reoboam, kotogos Sisak laitoriatab Misri konyo kobar Jerusalem:" 
1Kings14:26 ak kiib konoraikab gotab Jehovah, koboto konoraikab gotab laitoriat; kiib tugul: ak kiib long’onik tugul che bo tahabu che kiyai Solomon." 
1Kings14:27 Ak kiyai Reoboam long’onik che bo sugunonik kogeere choto, ak kogochi kiptainikab ribik, che kiribei kurgetab gotab laitoriat." 
1Kings14:28 Ak ye kiwendi laitoriat gotab Jehovah, ko kiibei ribindet long’onichoto, yeityo koweech kobwa gotab ribik." 
1Kings14:29 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Reoboam, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ko tos ma kisirji bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
1Kings14:30 Ak kicham komi luget eng’ kwenutab Reoboam ak Jeroboam kotugul. 
1Kings14:31 Ak kiru Reoboam koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi nganasetab Daudi koboto kwanisiekyik; ak kigiguure kamet Naama cheptab Amonik. Ak kilaitoran Abijam werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
1Kings15:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Abijam eng’ Juda eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo laitoriat Jeroboam weritab Nebat. 
1Kings15:2 Kilaitoran kenyisiek somok eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamet Maaka cheptab Abisalom. 
1Kings15:3 Ak kiwendote tengekwogik tugul che bo kwandanyi che kiga sib koyai eng’ inendet; ak kima kogesunotgei muguleldanyi eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, ko u muguleldab Daudi kwandanyi." 
1Kings15:4 Ago kiigochi Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi inendet tait eng’ Jerusalem agobo Daudi, konde werinnyi ye me inendet, ak kogimit Jerusalem:" 
1Kings15:5 amu kiyai Daudi ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ama masta eng’ kiy age tugul ne king’at inendet, eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi, kobate eng’ ng’olyotab Uria Hitindet." 
1Kings15:6 Ak kicham komi luget eng’ kwenutab Reoboam ak Jeroboam eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi. 
1Kings15:7 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Abijam ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ko tos ma kisirji bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda? Ak kimi luget eng’ kwenutab Abijam ak Jeroboam." 
1Kings15:8 Ak kiru Abijam koboto kwanisiekyik; ak kigitupchi nganasetab Daudi: ak kilaitoran werinnyi Asa kogeer inendet. 
1Kings15:9 Ak kitoi kolaitoran Asa eng’ Juda eng’ kenyitab tiptem ne bo Jeroboam laitoriatab Israel. 
1Kings15:10 Ak kilaitoran kenyisiek artam ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamet Maaka cheptab Abisalom. 
1Kings15:11 Ak kiyai Asa ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u ye kiyai Daudi kwandanyi." 
1Kings15:12 Ak kiisto sodomik eng’ emet, ak kiisto kanamonik tugul che kiga koyai kwanisiekyik." 
1Kings15:13 Ak kiisto agine kamennyi Maaka eng’ laitornatet, amu kiga yachi Asera kanamwet ne kiwechei; ak kibut Asa kanamwanato, ak kobeel eng’ kererutab Kidron." 
1Kings15:14 Ago ma kiisto komoswek che tororen: ago ki igesunotgei muguleldab Asa eng’ Jehovah eng’ betusiekyik tugul. 
1Kings15:15 Ak kiib tuguk che kiga kotaban kwandanyi kobwa gotab Jehovah, ak tuguk che kiga kotaban inendet, feda, ak tahabu, ak terenik." 
1Kings15:16 Ak kicham komi luget eng’ kwenutab Asa ak Baasa laitoriatab Israel eng’ betusiekwak tugul. 
1Kings15:17 Kitogosta Baasa laitoriatab Israel kwo kobargei ak Juda, ak koteech Rama, si machamji chi age tugul komanda anan konyo orit oldab Asa laitoriatab Juda." 
1Kings15:18 Konam anyun Asa feda tugul ak tahabu che kiga ng’et eng’ konoraikab gotab Jehovah, ak konoraikab gotab laitoriat, ak konde eunekab otwogik: ak kiiyokyi laitoriat Asa tuguchoto Ben-hadad weritab Tabrimon, weritab Hesion, laitoriatab Suria, ne kimenyei Damasko, kolenji," 
1Kings15:19 Mi kasyinet kwenunnyo, inye ak ane, kwenutab kwandanyu ak kwandang’ung’: keero, kaayogun kagochinetab feda, ak tahabu; ui but kasyinet ne oting’ege ak Baasa laitoriatab Israel, si kobiit koistoenagei." 
1Kings15:20 Ak kigas it Ben-hadad laitoriat Asa, ak koyokto kiptainik che bo lugosiekyik koba kobargei ak nganasokab Israel, ak kibar Ijon, ak Dan, ak Abel-bet-maaka, ak Kinerot tugul, koboto emet tugul ne bo Naptali." 
1Kings15:21 Ak kingogas Baasa ng’olyondonoto, komata koteech Rama, ak komeny Tirsa." 
1Kings15:22 Komwaita anyun laitoriat Asa eng’ Juda tugul, ma kituuch chi: ak kiib koikab Rama, ak ketik che kimi yoto, che kiga koteekse Baasa; ak kiteege laitoriat Asa Geba ne bo Benjamin, ak Mispa." 
1Kings15:23 Ak boisionik tugul che ng’etunotin che bo Asa, ak kimnatennyi tugul, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ak nganasok che kiteech, kotos ma kisirji bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda? Ak kinam miando kelyekyik eng’ betusiekab osindanyi." 
1Kings15:24 Ak kiru Asa koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitub koboto kwanisiekyik eng’ nganasetab Daudi kwandanyi: ak kilaitoran Jeosapat werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
1Kings15:25 Ak kitoi kolaitoran Nadab weritab Jeroboam eng’ Israel eng’ kenyitab aeng’ ne bo Asa laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran eng’ Israel kenyisiek aeng’." 
1Kings15:26 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kowendote ortinwekab kwandanyi, ak tengektanyi, ne kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
1Kings15:27 Ak kichaam inendet Baasa weritab Aija, ne bo gotab Isakar; ak kibar Baasa inendet eng’ Gibeton, ne ki bo Pilistik; amu kiga yiem Nadab ak Israel tugul Gibeton." 
1Kings15:28 Kibar Baasa inendet eng’ kenyitab somok ne bo Asa laitoriatab Juda, ak kolaitoran kogeer inendet." 
1Kings15:29 Ak kingo kata koek laitoriat, kobar got tugul ne bo Jeroboam; ma ituukyi Jeroboam agot agenge ne kisob, agoi kobar inendet koges: ko u mwaetab Jehovah, ne kimwa eng’ otwogindennyi Aija Silonindet:" 
1Kings15:30 amu tengekwogikab Jeroboam che kiyai, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto; amu taget ne kitach Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, si konerech." 
1Kings15:31 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Nadab, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
1Kings15:32 Ak kicham komi luget eng’ kwenutab Asa ak Baasa laitoriatab Israel eng’ betusiekwak tugul. 
1Kings15:33 Kitau Basa weritab Aija kolaitorani eng’ Israel eng’ Tirsa eng’ kenyitab somok ne bo Asa laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak ang’wan." 
1Kings15:34 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kowendote ortinwekab Jeroboam, ak tengektanyi ne kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
1Kings16:1 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeu weritab Hanani agobo Baasa kolenji," 
1Kings16:2 Ko u ye kiatororin imong’une temburiek, ak ayain iegu bounindetab bikyuk Israel; ak koiwendote ortinwekab Jeroboam, ak koigochi bikyuk koyai tengekto, kotacha eng’ tengekwogikwak anerech:" 
1Kings16:3 keero, abuktoi Baasa agestoi ak gonnyi; ak ayai gong’ung’ koigei gotab Jeroboam weritab Nebat." 
1Kings16:4 Inendet ne bo gab Baasa ne mechin nganaset, koamei sesenik; ak inendet ne mechin timin, koamei taritik che bo barak." 
1Kings16:5 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Baasa, ak tuguk che kiyai, ak kimnatennyi, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
1Kings16:6 Ak kiru Baasa ak kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi Tirsa; ak kilaitoran Ela werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
1Kings16:7 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah kogeny maotiot Jeu weritab Hanani agobo Baasa ak gonnyi, amu yaitiet tugul ne kiyai eng’ taitab Jehovah, kotach inendet eng’ boisionikab eunekyik kot konerech, amu kiigei gotab Jeroboam, ak amu kibar inendet." 
1Kings16:8 Kitau Ela weritab Baasa kolaitorani eng’ Israel, eng’ Tirsa; eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak lo ne bo Asa laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek aeng’." 
1Kings16:9 Ak kichaam inendet otwogindennyi Simri, kiptaiyatab kebebertab karisiekyik: kimi Tirsa, koeeisei kot ko kiga kobogit eng’ gotab Arsa, ne kibou got eng’ Tirsa:" 
1Kings16:10 ak kiwa go Simri kokwer inendet, ak kobar, eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak tisab ne bo Asa laitoriatab Juda; ak kilaitoran kogeer inendet." 
1Kings16:11 Ak kingotoi kolaitoran, ko kata kotebe ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, kobar gotab Basa tugul: ma ituukyi inendet lakwet agot agenge ne werit, anan ko ne bo tilionutikyik, anan ko ne bo choronokyik." 
1Kings16:12 Kibar anyun Simri got tugul ne bo Baasa, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kimwa agobo Baasa, eng’ maotiot Jeu." 
1Kings16:13 Amu tengekwogik tugul che bo Baasa, ak tengekwogikab Ela werinnyi, che kiyai, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto, kotach Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel konerech, eng’ boisionikwak che bo buch." 
1Kings16:14 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Ela, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
1Kings16:15 Kilaitoran Simri betusiek tisab eng’ Tirsa, eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak tisab, ne bo Asa laitoriatab Juda. Ak kiga teech bik kotokyingei Gibeton, ne ki bo Pilistik." 
1Kings16:16 Ak kigas bichoto kimi nganaset kelen, kogochaamso Simri, ak kogobar laitoriat: koyai anyun Israel tugul Omri, kiptaiyatab luget, koek laitoriatab Israel, eng’ betunoto eng’ nganaset." 
1Kings16:17 Ak kiwa Omri kotogosta eng’ Gibeton, komi Israel tugul koboto inendet, ak koyiem Tirsa." 
1Kings16:18 Ak kingogeer Simri kole, kagenam nganaset, kwo irimet orit ne bo gotab laitoriat, ak kobeeldagei gotab laitoriat ak kime," 
1Kings16:19 amu tengekwogikyik che kiyai, koyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, kowendate ortinwekab Jeroboam, ak tengektanyi ne kiyai, kobeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
1Kings16:20 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Simri, ak chaamsennyi ne kichaamso, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
1Kings16:21 Kopcheiyo anyun bikab Israel koek kebeberwek aeng’: kiisub Tibni weritab Ginat bik kebeber, koyai inendet koek laitoriat; ak kiisub Omri kebeberta age." 
1Kings16:22 Ago kiiterter bik che kiga isub Omri bik che kiga isub Tibni weritab Ginat: kome anyun Tibni, kolaitoran Omri." 
1Kings16:23 Kitoi Omri kolaitoran eng’ Israel eng’ kenyitab sosom ak agenge ne bo Asa laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak aeng’: kilaitoran kenyisiek lo eng’ Tirsa." 
1Kings16:24 Ak kial tulwetab Samaria ne bo Semer eng’ talentaisiek aeng’ che bo feda; ak kiteech tulwonoto, ak komwaitae kainetab nganaset ne kiga teech, kainetab Semer, chito ne ki bo tulwonoto bo Samaria." 
1Kings16:25 Ak kiyai Omri ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kiyai yaitiet kosiir bik tugul che kiindoune inendet." 
1Kings16:26 Amu kiwendote ortinwek tugul che bo Jeroboam weritab Nebat, ak tengekwogikyik che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto, kotach Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel konerech, eng’ boisionikwak che bo buch." 
1Kings16:27 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Omri che kiyai ak kimnatennyi ne kiibor, ko ma kisir eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
1Kings16:28 Koru anyun Omri ak kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi Samaria: ak kilaitoran Ahab werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
1Kings16:29 Ak kitoi kolaitoran Ahab weritab Omri eng’ Israel, eng’ kenyitab sosom ak sisiit, ne bo Asa laitoriatab Juda: ak kilaitoran Ahab weritab Omri eng’ Israel eng’ Samaria kenyisiek tiptem ak aeng’." 
1Kings16:30 Ak kiyai Ahab weritab Omri yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah kosiir bik tugul che kiindoune inendet. 
1Kings16:31 Ak kigeer inendet ko kit ne ming’in kowendote tengekwogikab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, kwo anyun kotun Jesebel cheptab Etbaal laitoriatab Sidonik, ak kwo koot Baal ak kogutung’ji." 
1Kings16:32 Ak kiteekyi Baal kapkorosut eng’ gotab Baal, ne kiga teech eng’ Samaria." 
1Kings16:33 Ak kiyai Ahab Asera; ak kiyai Ahab tuguk alak; kotes kotach Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, konerech, kosiir laitorinik tugul che bo Israel che kiindoune inendet." 
1Kings16:34 Ak kiteech Hiel Bet-elindet Jeriko eng’ betusiekyik: ak kilume lumeiywondennyi meetab Abiram taitanyi, ak kolumda ormarichokyik eng’ meetab werinnyi Segub towennyi; ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, ne kimwa eng’ Josua weritab Nun." 
1Kings17:1 Ak kilenji Elija Tisbindet ne ki bo bik che kimenyei Gilead, Ahab, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne atonone tainnyi, ko mabiitu rewot anan ko ropta kenyisiechu, kobate ko u ng’olyondennyu." 
1Kings17:2 Ak kinyonji inendet ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenji," 
1Kings17:3 Ui eng’ yu, ak itokyige komostab kong’asis, ak iunyge eng’ kererutab Kerit, ne tokyingei Jordan." 
1Kings17:4 Ak iee beekab kererunato; ak kaang’at chepkuginik kobain eng’ yoto. 
1Kings17:5 Kwo anyun ak koyai ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah: amu kiwa ak komeny ye negite kererutab Kerit, ne tokyingei Jordan." 
1Kings17:6 Ak kiipchi inendet makatinik ak banyek chepkuginik karon, ak koipchi makatinik ak banyek koskoleny; ak kiee beekab kererunato." 
1Kings17:7 Ak ki eng’ betusiek che matia koteny kererunato, amu kimata korobon emet." 
1Kings17:8 Kinyonji inendet ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenji," 
1Kings17:9 Ng’eet, ak iwe Sarepat, ne bo Sidon, ak imeny oloto: keero, kaang’at mosoget eng’ oloto kobain." 
1Kings17:10 Kong’eet anyun, ak kwo Sarepat; ak kingoit ormarichetab nganaset, keero, kimi yoto kwondo koyumi kwenik: ak kiguur inendet, ak konyo kolenji, Asomin ale, ibwa beek eng’ teret ne ming’in, aee." 
1Kings17:11 Ak ye kita kowendi koibu, koguur inendet, kolenji, Asomin ale, ibwa makatiat kitigin eng’ eung’ung’." 
1Kings17:12 Ak kile, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko matinye makatiat, kobate busiekab eut che mi teret, ak mwaita kitigin ne mi sotet ne ming’in: ak keero, abute kwenik aeng’, si kekwang’jinege ak werinnyu, si keam, ak kebegu." 
1Kings17:13 Ak kilenji Elija inendet, Ameiywei; ui, ak iyai ko u ye kaimwa: ago kwang’wa korok makatiat kitigin, ak iibwa komong’, yeityo okwang’jige ak wering’ung’." 
1Kings17:14 Amu kamwa Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel ko u ni, kole, Maigesugei busiek eng’ teronoto, anan kobek mwaita eng’ sotonoto ming’in, kot koit betut ne iyokyin Jehovah ropta ng’ony." 
1Kings17:15 Ak kiwa koyai ko u mwaetab Elija: ak kiam amitwogik, kwonyoto, ak Elija, koboto gotab kwonyoto, eng’ betusiek che chang’." 
1Kings17:16 Ma igesgei busiek eng’ teret, anan kobek mwaita eng’ sotet ne ming’in, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, ne kimwa eng’ Elija." 
1Kings17:17 Ak kingobata tuguchu, komian lakwetab kwonyoto, ne inendet ko chebioset ne bo got; ak kigoromit mianoto, kot ko ma kobusi." 
1Kings17:18 Ak kilenji Elija, Kiting’ege nee ak inye, chitab Kamuktaindet? Koinyo oli ami si kong’ang’ak tengektanyu, ak ibar werinnyu!" 
1Kings17:19 Ak kilenji inendet, Kona wering’ung’. Ak kitaach Elija lakwet eng’ tegetab mosogonato, ak koganab, ak komut kwo got age ne mi barak, ole kimenyei, ak komogonji itogunnyi." 
1Kings17:20 Ak kirirji Jehovah, kole, Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindennyu, keipchi kogeny yaitiet mosogani ami gonnyi, ibare werinnyi?" 
1Kings17:21 Ak kiitoegei lakwet konyil somok, ak korirji Jehovah kolenji, Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindennyu, asain ale, ingoweekyigei lakwani sobondanyi kogeny." 
1Kings17:22 Ak kigas Jehovah kutitab Elija; ak kiweekyigei lakwet sobondanyi kogeny, ak kisob." 
1Kings17:23 Ak kiganab Elija lakwet, ak komut kochorgei eng’ goyoto konyo got ne bo ng’ony, ak kogochi kamet: ak kile Elija, Keero, sobei wering’ung’." 
1Kings17:24 Ak kilenji kwonyoto Elija, Kaanai nguno ale i chitab Kamuktaindet, ak ko bo iman ng’olyotab Jehovah ne mi kuting’ung’." 
1Kings18:1 Ak kingobata betusiek che chang’, konyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Elija, eng’ kenyitab somok, kolenji, Ui iborjige Ahab; si ayokyi ng’ony ropta." 
1Kings18:2 Ak kiwa Elija koborjigei Ahab. Ak ki ng’wan rubet eng’ Samaria. 
1Kings18:3 Ak kiguur Ahab Obadia, ne kibou gonnyi. (Kiiywei Obadia Jehovah mising’:" 
1Kings18:4 amu ye kiga bar Jesebel maotikab Jehovah, komut Obadia maotik bogol, ak kouny kobeate konom eng’ kebenet, ak kobae ichek makatinik ak beek.)" 
1Kings18:5 Ak kilenji Ahab Obadia, Ui bun emet, ui kondametusiek tugul che bo beek, ak kererusiek tugul: tamangab kenyoru suswek ak kesoru mbartanyisiek ak nyumbusiek kosopcho, si mabegunenech tuguk tugul che kiyagi." 
1Kings18:6 Kopchechigei anyun emet si kobun kogeerot: kwo Ahab oret age inegei, kwo Obadia oret age inegei." 
1Kings18:7 Ak kingomi oret Obadia, kotuiye Elija: ak kiinyit inendet, ak kobutyi ng’ony, ak kole, Inye nito, kiptaiyandennyu Elija?" 
1Kings18:8 Ak kiwolji kolenji, Ane. Ui mwachi kiptaiyandeng’ung’, ilenji, Keero, mi yu Elija." 
1Kings18:9 Ak kile, Nee tengek ne koayai, si imach inde otwogindeng’ung’ eutab Ahab, kobaran?" 
1Kings18:10 Ko u ye sobei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko mami bororiet anan ko bounatet, ne tomo koyokto bik kiptaiyandennyu koba kocheng’in: ak ngo mwa kole, Mami oli, kolenjin bounatanato anan ko bororionoto koyosio kole, mageerin." 
1Kings18:11 Ak ilen nguno, Ui, mwachi kiptaiyandeng’ung’ ilenji, Keero, mi yu Elija." 
1Kings18:12 Ak ye awe eng’ yu imi, komutin Tamirmirietab Jehovah ole mangen; ak ye awe amwachi Ahab, amanyo konyorun, kobara: ago ane otwogindeng’ung’, aiywei Jehovah koboch ko a ming’in." 
1Kings18:13 Tos ma kimwaun inye kiptaiyandennyu kit ne kiayai ye kingobar Jesebel maotikab Jehovah, kele kiauny bik bogol che bo maotikab Jehovah kobeate konom eng’ kebenet age tugul, ak abai ichek eng’ makatinik ak beek?" 
1Kings18:14 Ak imwae nguno ile, Ui mwachi kiptaiyandeng’ung’, ilenji, Keero, mi yu Elija: si kobara." 
1Kings18:15 Ak kile Elija, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ne atonone tainnyi, aborjinige iman inendet rani." 
1Kings18:16 Kwo anyun Obadia kotuiyo ak Ahab, ak komwachi inendet: ak kiwa Ahab kotuiyo ak Elija." 
1Kings18:17 Ak kingogeer Ahab Elija, kolenji Ahab inendet, Inye ni chichi, kiinyalil Israel?" 
1Kings18:18 Ak kiwol kole, Ma anyalil Israel; inye ne kiinyalil, ak gotab kwandang’ung’, amu kiomete ng’atutikab Jehovah, ak kiisub Baal." 
1Kings18:19 Iyokte anyun nguno kiyumwa Israel tugul kobwa tulwetab Karmel, koboto maotikab Baal bogol ang’wan ak konom, ak maotikab Asera bogol ang’wan, che amisie mesetab Jesebel." 
1Kings18:20 Koguur anyun Ahab lagokab Israel tugul, ak koyum maotik tugul koba tulwetab Karmel."
