1Kings18:21 Ak kinyo Elija korikyi bik tugul, ak kolenji, Otebe eng’ kabwatutik aeng’ kot kotianit? Ngot ko Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet, osub inendet: ago ngot ko Baal, osub anyun inendet. Ak ma wolji bik inendet ng’olyo." 
1Kings18:22 Kolenji anyun Elija bik, Ane, anege kityo, maotiotab Jehovah ne a ng’etunot; ago maotikab Baal ko bogol ang’wan ak konom." 
1Kings18:23 Ingogonech anyun ichek kirugik aeng’; ak ingolewenjigei kirgit agenge, ak kotonaton komengegitu, ak konde baragutab kwenik, amat konde mat kotobon ng’ony: ak aeny kirgit age, ak ande baragutab kwenik, amandoi mat kotobon ng’ony." 
1Kings18:24 Ak oguur kainetab kanamweng’wong’, si aguur kainetab Jehovah: ak Kamuktaindet ne wolu eng’ mat, koek noto Kamuktaindet. Ak kiwol bik tugul kole, Kemwa ne mie." 
1Kings18:25 Ak kilenji Elija maotikab Baal, Olewenjige kirgit agenge, ak osib oeny; amu o chang’; ak oguur kainetab kanamweng’wong’, ago monde mat kotobon ng’ony." 
1Kings18:26 Ak kinam kirgit ne kiga kigochi, ak koeny, ak koguur kainetab Baal kong’eete karon kot koit bet kwen, kolen, Ee Baal, kasech. Ago kima biit tweguno, anan kobiit woluno age tugul. Ak kitorombenso komuut kapkorosut ne kiga kiyai." 
1Kings18:27 Ak ki eng’ bet kwen, kochot Elija ichek, kolenji, Owaach inne: amu inendet ko cheptalelit; abere ibwati tuguk, anan ko kawa ui, anan ko mi rutoi, anan abere inuuchi, ak kanyol king’eet." 
1Kings18:28 Ak kiwaach eng’ kutit ne o, ak kotilgei eng’ rotok ak ng’otwek, ko u biteenywa, kot kochagirirta korotik." 
1Kings18:29 Ak kingoweek asis komaotenso agoi sait ne kigoitoe kagochinet; ago kima biit tweguno, anan ko chi age tugul ne wolu, anan ko chi age tugul ne kasei." 
1Kings18:30 Ak kilenji Elija bik tugul, Origu ole ami; ak kirikta bik tugul ole mi inendet. Ak kiteech kogeny kaptisisietab Jehovah ne kiga kobutok." 
1Kings18:31 Ak kinam Elija koik taman ak aeng’, ko u koitetab ortinwekab werikab Jakobo, ne kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenji, Egu kaineng’ung’ Israel." 
1Kings18:32 Ak kiteege kaptisisiet koichato eng’ kainetab Jehovah; ak kibal keringet koyieme kaptisisiet, ne yamegei ak kerutik aeng’ che bo keswek." 
1Kings18:33 Ak kiinde kwenik kotet, ak kotonaton kirgoto, ak konde baragutab kwenik. Ak kile, Onde beek terenik ang’wan, ak orong’ji kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kwenik." 
1Kings18:34 Ak kile, Orong’ji kogeny ne bo aeng’; ak kirong’ji kogeny ne bo aeng’. Ak kile, Orong’ji kogeny ne bo somok, ak kirong’ji ne bo somok." 
1Kings18:35 Kiitenden beek koyiem kaptisisiet; ak kiinde beek keringet agine konyi. 
1Kings18:36 Ak eng’ sait ne kigoitoe kagochinet, konyo maotiot Elija korik, ak kole, Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Abraham, ak ko bo Isak, ak ko bo Israel, ingonaak rani kele i Kamuktaindet eng’ Israel; ak a otwogindeng’ung’ ak konaak kele kayai tuguchuto tugul eng’ ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
1Kings18:37 Kasa, ee Jehovah, kasa, si kobiit konai bichu kole, inye Jehovah, ko i Kamuktaindet, ak konai kole koiweech mugulelwekwak koweek kogeny." 
1Kings18:38 Kochorgei anyun matab Jehovah; ak kobeel kagochinet ne kibeelei, koges, ak kwenik, ak koik, ak ng’ung’unyek, ak kobeel beek che kimi keringet kobek." 
1Kings18:39 Ak kingogeer bik tugul, kobutyi ng’ony: ak kole, Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet; Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet." 
1Kings18:40 Ak kilenji Elija ichek, Onam maotikab Baal; amat ongochilil agot agenge. Kinam anyun ichek: ak kiimut Elija kochorgei kererutab Kison, ak kobarji yoto." 
1Kings18:41 Ak kilenji Elija Ahab, Togoste, iamisie ak ieeise; amu agase tuletab ropta ne o." 
1Kings18:42 Kitogosta anyun Ahab kwo koamis ak koeeiso. Ak kitogosta Elija kwo Karmel barak; ak kiing’uruk, ak konde metinnyi kwenutab kutung’oikyik." 
1Kings18:43 Ak kolenji otwogindennyi, Togoste nguno, igeer yun bo nyanjet. Ak kitogosta, ak kogeer, ak kole, Mami kiy. Ak kile, Ui kogeny konyiil tisab." 
1Kings18:44 Ak eng’ banda ne bo tisab, kole, Keero, ng’eetei boldet eng’ nyanjet ne ming’in ne te eutab chito. Ak kile, Togoste ilenji Ahab, Chopge, ak ichortege si magerin ropta." 
1Kings18:45 Ak ne matianit, kotuuit kipsengwet eng’ bolik, ak usonet, ak kirobon ropta ne o. Ak kilany karit Ahab, kwo Jesreel." 
1Kings18:46 Ak kimi eutab Jehovah koboto Elija, ak kigermengei, ak kolabat kondoe Ahab kwo ole kimandoe kebendi Jesreel." 
1Kings19:1 Ak kimwachi Ahab Jesebel tuguk tugul che kayai Elija, koboto ole kabarta maotik eng’ rotwetab chok." 
1Kings19:2 Koyokto anyun Jesebel chito kwo ole mi Elija, kolenji, Ingoyaiywa kanamonik ko u noto, ak kotes, ngot ko mayai sobondang’ung’ koigei sobondab age eng’ ichek mutai ko negit saini." 
1Kings19:3 Ak kingogeer ko u noto, kong’eet kwo komweita sobondanyi, ak kiit Beer-seba, ne bo Juda, ak kobagakta otwogindennyi eng’ oloto." 
1Kings19:4 Ago kiwa ong’atet inendet, bandab betut agenge, ak kiit ole mi ketikab junipa, ak kotebi ng’ony eng’ ketoto kel: ak kisom kole kome; ak kile, Kogoyam; ara anyun, ee Jehovah, ib sobondanyu nguno; ma a mie ane asiir kwanisiekyuk." 
1Kings19:5 Ak kiru ak konuuch eng’ ketit kel ne kiguure junipa; ak ogeero, kitwa inendet malaikaiyat, ak kolenji, Ng’eet, amisie." 
1Kings19:6 Ak kigeer, ak ogeero, kimi ye negite metinnyi makatiat ne kiga kibeel eng’ matab nesek, ak teretab beek. Ak kiamis ak koee beek ak koru kogeny." 
1Kings19:7 Ak kinyo malaikaiyatab Jehovah kogeny ne bo aeng’, ak kotwa inendet, ak kolenji, Ng’eet, amisie; amu o mising’ banda eng’ inye." 
1Kings19:8 Ak king’eet, ak koamis, ak koee beek, ak kowee kimnatetab amitwogichoto betusiek artam ak kemousiek artam, kot koit Horeb tulwetab Kamuktaindet." 
1Kings19:9 Ak kiit kebenet ne mi yoto, ak koru yoto; ak ogeero, kinyonji inendet ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak kolenji, Iyae nee eng’ yu, Elija?" 
1Kings19:10 Ak kile, Kigoama ng’etkong’ mising’ agobo Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab lugosiek; amu kigobagakta lagokab Israel kayomiseng’ung’, kobut kaptisisiosieguk, ak kobar maotiguk eng’ rotwetab chok: ak kiang’etu, ane, anege; ak cheng’ei ichek sobondanyu kobar." 
1Kings19:11 Ak kile, Mande, ak iwe itonone tulwet eng’ taitab Jehovah. Ak ogeero, kisiirto Jehovah, ak kibet tulonok usonet ne o, ne kim, ak kotuatui ruandosiek eng’ taitab Jehovah; ago kima komi Jehovah usononoto: ak kingobata usonet kobiit botanetab ng’ony; ago kima komi Jehovah botanonato bo ng’ony:" 
1Kings19:12 ak kingobata botanet kobiit mat; ago kima komi Jehovah maata: kingobata mat kobiit tuget ne ming’in ne kitwegu mutyo. 
1Kings19:13 Ak kingogas Elija kotuch togennyi eng’ ngoriennyi, ak kotonon eng’ ye kichutei kebendi kebenet. Ak ogeero, kinyonji inendet kutit, kolenji, Iyae nee eng’ yu, Elija?" 
1Kings19:14 Ak kile, Kigoama ng’etkong’ mising’ agobo Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek; amu kigobagakta lagokab Israel kayomiseng’ung’, kobut kaptisisiosieguk, ak kobar maotiguk eng’ rotwetab chok; kiang’etu ane anege; ak cheng’ei ichek sobondanyu kobar." 
1Kings19:15 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet, Ui, ketitege, bun ong’atetab Damasko; ak ye iit, iil Hasael koek laitoriat eng’ Suria;" 
1Kings19:16 ak iil Jeu weritab Nimsi koek laitoriat eng’ Israel; ak iil Elisha weritab Sapat ne bo Abel-meola koek maotiot kogeerin. 
1Kings19:17 Ak inendet ne chilili eng’ rotwetab chok ne bo Hasael, kobarei Jeu: ak inendet ne chilili eng’ rotwetab chok ne bo Jeu kobarei Elisha." 
1Kings19:18 Ago atuukyinige elfusiek tisab eng’ Israel, kutung’oik tugul che tomo kogutung’ji Baal, ak kutit age tugul ne tomo kong’utut inendet." 
1Kings19:19 Kwo anyun eng’ yoto, ak kinyor Elisha weritab Sapat, ne kiibatisie eik tiptem ak ang’wan, che bo chogit eng’ tainnyi, ak kikweriei inendet che bo chogitab taman ak aeng’, ne bo let: kiwa Elija ye mi inendet, ak kowirji inendet ngoriennyi." 
1Kings19:20 Ak kibagakta eik, ak kilabat kosub Elija, ak kolenji, Asomin ale, chamwa awa ang’utut baba ak kamennyu agochi saisere, yeityo asubun. Ak kilenji inendet, Ui, ketitege; amu kayaun nee?" 
1Kings19:21 Ak kiweek, mata kosub inendet, ak konam eik aeng’ che bo chogit, ak koyoe banyekwak tuguk che kiboisie eik, ak kogochi bik, ak kiam. Kingobata kong’eet, ak kwo kosub Elija, koboisiechi inendet." 
1Kings20:1 Ak kiiyum Ben-hadad laitoriatab Suria lugennyi tugul: ak kimi laitorinik sosomu ak aeng’ koboto inendet, ak mbartanyisiek ak karisiek: ak kitogosta kwo koyiem Samaria, ak kobargei ak nganasanato." 
1Kings20:2 Ak kiiyokto bik koba oldab Ahab laitoriatab Israel, agoi nganaset, ak kolenji inendet, Kamwa Ben-hadad ko u ni, kole," 
1Kings20:3 Chechuk fedaisieguk ak tahabusieguk; chechuk agichek osotiguk koboto lagoguk, agot che miachen mising’." 
1Kings20:4 Ak kiwol laitoriatab Israel kole, A neng’ung’, koboto tuguk tugul che atinye, ko u mwaeng’ung’, kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat." 
1Kings20:5 Ak kibwa bichoto kogeny ak kolenji, Kamwa Ben-hadad ko u ni kole, Koayogu bik iman kobwa oldang’ung’, ale, Igona fedaisieguk, ak tahabusieguk, ak osotiguk, ak lagoguk;" 
1Kings20:6 ago ayogun otwogikyuk kobwa oldang’ung’ mutai ko negit saini, ak kocheng’so eng’ gong’ung’, ak gorikab otwogiguk; ak konam kit age tugul ne igeere ko kararan, ak koib." 
1Kings20:7 Koguur anyun laitoriatab Israel boisiek tugul che bo emet, ak kolenji, Asomok ale, obwat ak ogeer ole cheng’doi chichi yaitiet: amu koiyok bik komach osotikyuk, ak lagokyuk, koboto fedaisiekyuk, ak tahabusiekyuk; amaete." 
1Kings20:8 Ak kilenji boisiek tugul ak bik tugul inendet, Amat igas, anan icham." 
1Kings20:9 Kilenji anyun bichoto bo Ben-hadad, Oba omwachi kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, olenji, Ayaei tuguk tugul che kigeyogu eng’ tai kemwachi otwogindeng’ung’: ago mamuchi ayai kii. Kiba anyun bichoto kiga kiyok, ak koipchi inendet ng’olyot kogeny." 
1Kings20:10 Ak kiiyokto Ben-hadad bik koba oldanyi, kolenji, Ingoyaiywa cheptalelisiek ko u noto, ak kotes, ngot koyam temburiekab Samaria komugutat eng’ eunekwak bik che isubwa." 
1Kings20:11 Ak kiwol laitoriatab Israel kole, Olenji inendet, Amat kochoigei inendet ne kermenegei karik, ko u inendet ne ireegu karik." 
1Kings20:12 Ak kingogas Ben-hadad ng’alechuto, koeeisei, inendet ak laitorinik, komi emaisiek, komwachi otwogikyik, kolenji, Otetge. Kotetgei anyun kobokyi nganaset." 
1Kings20:13 Ak ogeero, kinyo maotiot ole mi Ahab laitoriatab Israel, ak kole, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, kole, Tos kaigeer tuiyoni o? Keero, andoi eung’ung’ rani si inai ile a Jehovah." 
1Kings20:14 Ak kile Ahab, Eng’ ng’o? Ak kile, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, kole, Eng’ eunekab murenik che bo bounikab emotinwek. Kole anyun, Ng’o ne tau boriet? Ak kiwol kole, Inye." 
1Kings20:15 Koyum anyun neranik che bo emotinwek, ak kiek bogol aeng’ ak sosom ak aeng’: ak kingobata koyum bik tugul, lagok tugul che bo Israel, ki elfusiek tisab." 
1Kings20:16 Ak kimanda bet kwen. Ago kieeisei Ben-hadad eng’ emaisiek orit, kot ko kiga kobogit, inendet ak laitorinik, laitorinik sosom ak aeng’ che kitoret inendet." 
1Kings20:17 Ak kiindo murenikab bounikab emotinwek; ak kiiyok Ben-hadad bik ak kimwachi bichoto inendet kolenji, Bwanei bik che bunu Samaria." 
1Kings20:18 Ak kile, Ngot kobwanei kalyet, onam; ak ngot kobwanei luget, onam kora." 
1Kings20:19 Komanda anyun bichoto eng’ nganaset, murenikab bounikab emotinwek, ak luget ne kiisubi ichek." 
1Kings20:20 Ak kibar chi age tugul chito; ak kimwei Suriek, ak kion Israel ichek: ak kichilil Ben-hadad laitoriatab Suria eng’ mbartanyit koboto bik che kilanyei mbartanyisiek." 
1Kings20:21 Ak kimanda laitoriatab Israel, ak kobar mbartanyisiek ak karisiek, ak kobar Suriek eng’ baret ne o." 
1Kings20:22 Ak kinyo maotiot korik ole mi laitoriatab Israel, ak kolenji inendet, Ui igimitge, ak ibwat ak igeer kit ne iyae: amu nyonei laitoriatab Suria kotogosu obargei, ko kabek kenyini." 
1Kings20:23 Ak kilenji otwogikab laitoriatab Suria inendet, Cheptalelinywa ko cheptalelitab tulonok; ki kimen anyun kosiirech amu noto: ago ongebarge ak ichek eng’ warenget, ak kegimegitu iman kesiir ichek." 
1Kings20:24 Ak iyai kii; iste laitorinik, chi age tugul eng’ ye kami, ak inde kiptainik kogeer ichek:" 
1Kings20:25 ak iit lugeng’ung’, ko u luget ne kogebarenen, mbartanyit eng’ mbartanyit, ak karit eng’ karit: si kebarge ak ichek eng’ warenget, si kegimegitu iman kesiir ichek. Ak kigasyi ichek ng’alekwak, ak kiyai ko u noto." 
1Kings20:26 Ak kingogesgei kenyit, koyum Ben-hadad Suriek, ak kotogosta kwo Apek, kobargei ak Israel." 
1Kings20:27 Ak kigiyum lagokab Israel, ak kigochi amitwogik, ak kobokto kobargei ak bichoto: ak kiteech nganaset eng’ tainywa koigei akwotisiek aeng’ che tutigin che bo arekab ng’oror; ago kinyi Suriek emet." 
1Kings20:28 Ak kinyo chitab Kamuktaindet korik ak kong’alalji laitoriatab Israel, kole, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Amu komwa Suriek kole, Jehovah ko cheptalelitab tulonok, ma cheptalelitab atebwosiek; andoi anyun eung’ung’ tuiyoni o tugul, si onai ole a Jehovah." 
1Kings20:29 Ak kiteech kotokyin ak komeng’is eng’ betusiek tisab. Ak eng’ betutab tisab kotuiyogei lugosiek kobargei; ak kibar lagokab Israel eng’ betut agenge Suriek elfusiek bogol che kibunei kelyek. 
1Kings20:30 Ago kimwei che king’et koba Apek, koba nganaset; ak kilulji inatut bik elfusiek tiptem ak tisab che kiga ng’et. Ak kimwei Ben-hadad kwo nganaset, kwo got ne bo orit." 
1Kings20:31 Ak kilenji otwogikyik inendet, Keero, kigegas kele laitorinikab gotab Israel ko laitorinik che tinyei rirenetab ge. Kisomin anyun kele kilaach kuniok kegermenege, ak kinde rogoosiek metowekyok, ak kemande kebe ole mi laitoriatab Israel: tamangab kosor sobondang’ung’." 
1Kings20:32 Kogermenengei anyun kuniok, ak konde rogoosiek metowekwak, ak kobwa ole mi laitoriatab Israel, ak koba kolenji, Kamwa otwogindeng’ung’ Ben-hadad kole, Asain ale, bagakta asob. Ak kile, Ta kosobei? Inendet ko tupchennyu." 
1Kings20:33 Kogeer bichoto komie, si kosib konai ngo kimwaei iman; ak kimwa bichoto kole, Ng’etab komet Ben-hadad. Kole anyun, Oba omutu inendet. Komong’ anyun Ben-hadad konyo ole mi inendet: ak kilenji kolong’ karit barak." 
1Kings20:34 Ak kilenji Ben-hadad inendet, Aweegun nganasok che kiga ibe kwandanyu kwandang’ung’; ak iyachinige ortinwek eng’ Damasko, ko u ye kiyai kwandanyu eng’ Samaria. Ak kimwa Ahab kole, Achundoin iwe eng’ kayomisoni. Koyomisgei anyun ak inendet, ak kochunda kwo." 
1Kings20:35 Ak kilenji chito age ne bo werikab maotik chitab kokwennyi eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah, Asomin ale, bira. Ak kiesio chichoto kobir inendet." 
1Kings20:36 Kolenji inendet anyun, Amu ma igas it kutitab Jehovah, ko keero, ne bo iwendi kityo eng’ yu ami, kobarin ng’etundo. Ak kingo kata kwo, eng’ yoto kotuiyo ak ng’etundo, ak kobar ng’etundo inendet." 
1Kings20:37 Yeityo konyor chito age, ak kolenji, Asomin ale bira. Ak kibir chichoto inendet, kibir ak koguoten inendet." 
1Kings20:38 Kwo anyun maotiondonoto, ak korib laitoriat eng’ oret, ak kowalgei koek age, kotuge togennyi angennyi ne kere metit." 
1Kings20:39 Ak ye kisiirtoi laitoriat, koguur inendet laitoriat, kolenji, Kiwa otwogindeng’ung’ kwenutab luget, ak keero, kiwelelgei chito kwo taban, ak komutwa chito, ak kole, Rib chichi: ngot kobiit kiy kot kochilil, kogeeri sobondang’ung’ sobondanyi, anan iyoogu talentait agenge ne bo feda." 
1Kings20:40 Ak ye kichirjireni otwogindeng’ung’, koboisiei kowendi yu ak kowendi yu, kochilil. Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel inendet, Egu ko u noto kiruogeng’ung’. Kaitil inyege ko u noto." 
1Kings20:41 Ak kiinem angennyi ne kere metit, eng’ togennyi kochokyi; ak kinai laitoriatab Israel inendet kole ki bo inendet maotik." 
1Kings20:42 Ak kilenji inendet, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Amu koichunde eng’ eung’ung’ chito ne koga atabanji ng’emisiet, kogeeri anyun sobondang’ung’ sobondanyi, ak kogeer biguk bikyik." 
1Kings20:43 Ak kiwa gonnyi laitoriatab Israel eng’ muguleldo ne nyigis, ak konerechi, ak kiit Samaria." 
1Kings21:1 Ak kingobata tuguchoto, ko kitinyei Nabot Jesreelindet mbaretab sabibuk, ne kimi Jesreel, ne rikyin gotab Ahab laitoriatab Samaria." 
1Kings21:2 Ak kimwachi Ahab Nabot, kolenji, Kona mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk, ayai koek kabungut, amu negite gonnyu; si ageerunenen mbaret age ne bo sabibuk ne kararan kosiir nito: anan ngot igeere komie eng’ inye, agonin kamanutiennyi eng’ siling’isiek." 
1Kings21:3 Ak kilenji Nabot Ahab, Machamwa Jehovah agonin borotetab kwanisiekyuk." 
1Kings21:4 Ak kinyo Ahab gonnyi eng’ muguleldo ne nyigis, ak konerechi amu ng’olyot ne kamwachi Nabot Jesreelindet: amu kiga lenji, Magonin borotetab kwanisiekyuk. Ak kiru eng’ itogunnyi, ak kolit olin, ak koesio koamis." 
1Kings21:5 Ago kinyo Jesebel kwondanyi ole mi inendet, ak kolenji, Amu nee si ko mabaibai sobondang’ung’ ko u ni, kot ko memache iamisie?" 
1Kings21:6 Ak kilenji inendet, Amu kamwachi Nabot Jesreelindet alenji, Kona mbareng’ung’ ne bo sabibuk aal eng’ siling’isiek, anan ngot igeere ko mie eng’ inye, agonin mbaret age ne bo sabibuk kewale: ak kawol kole, Magonin mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk." 
1Kings21:7 Ak kilenji Jesebel osotiondennyi inendet, Tos ibou nguno bororietab Israel? Ng’eet ak iamisie, ak ingobaibait muguleldang’ung’: agonin mbaretab sabibuk ne bo Nabot Jesreelindet." 
1Kings21:8 Kosir anyun baronok eng’ kainetab Ahab, ak kong’och eng’ ng’oksetab Ahab, ak koyokyi baronochoto boisiek ak bik che toogunotin che kimi nganasennyi, che kimeng’jindos ak Nabot." 
1Kings21:9 Ak kisir eng’ baronochoto kole, Omwaite karugutetab ge, ak onde Nabot taitab bik:" 
1Kings21:10 ak onde bik aeng’ tainnyi, werikab Belial, ak ongobaorian kotaam inendet, kole, Kechub inye Kamuktaindet ak laitoriat. Yeityo omut inendet kwo sang’, ak olach eng’ koik, kome." 
1Kings21:11 Ak kiyai bikab nganasennyi, boisiek ak bik che toogunotin che kimenyei nganasennyi, ko u ye kiga iyokyi baruet Jesebel, ko u ye kiga sir eng’ baronok che kiga iyokyi ichek." 
1Kings21:12 Kimwaita karugutetab ge, ak konde Nabot taitab bik." 
1Kings21:13 Ak kibwa go bik aeng’u, werikab Belial, ak kotebi ng’ony eng’ tainnyi: ak kobaorian kotaam inendet, bichoto bo Belial, kogen agobo Nabot eng’ taitab bik, kole, Kachub Nabot Kamuktaindet ak laitoriat. Komut anyun inendet komaanda eng’ nganaset, ak kolach inendet eng’ koik, kome." 
1Kings21:14 Kigoyokto anyun kemwachi Jesebel kelenji, Kagelach Nabot eng’ koik, ak kogome." 
1Kings21:15 Ak kingogas Jesebel kole, kagelach Nabot eng’ koik, ak kagome, kolenji Jesebel Ahab, Ng’eet, nam mbaretab sabibuk ne bo Nabot Jesreelindet kobunjin, ni kietei kogonin ial eng’ siling’isiek: amu ma kosobei, kagome." 
1Kings21:16 Ak kingogas Ahab kole kagome Nabot, kong’eet ak korekto kwo mbaretab sabibuk ne bo Nabot Jesreelindet, kwo konam kobunji." 
1Kings21:17 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Elija Tisbindet, kolenji," 
1Kings21:18 Ng’eet chortege otuiye ak Ahab laitoriatab Israel, ne menyei Samaria: keero, mi mbaretab sabibuk ne bo Nabot ole kachorjigei kwo konam kobunji." 
1Kings21:19 Ing’alalji inendet ilenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Kaibar ak kenam kobunjin? Ak imwachi ilenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Ole kimele sesenik korotikab Nabot, komele yoto sesenik korotiguk agichek." 
1Kings21:20 Ak kilenji Ahab Elija, Kainyorua-o, bunyodennyu? Ak kiwol kole, Ee, kaanyorun: amu kaialdege iyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
1Kings21:21 Keero, aibun yaitiet, ak abukten ibet, ak aiste eng’ gab Ahab lakwet age tugul ne werit, ak inendet ne kerat koboto ne itiagat eng’ Israel:" 
1Kings21:22 ak ayae gong’ung’ kogergeit ak gotab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, ak kogergeit ak gotab Baasa weritab Aija, amu taget ne kiitacha anerech, ak igochi Israel koyai tengekto." 
1Kings21:23 Ak kimwa Jehovah agobo Jesebel agine, kole, Amei sesenik Jesebel eng’ ye negite irimetab Jesreel." 
1Kings21:24 Amei sesenik inendet ne bo gab Ahab ne meei eng’ nganaset, ak ne meei eng’ timin koamei taritik che bo barak." 
1Kings21:25 (Ago kitom kobiit age ne kiigei Ahab ne kialdagei koyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ne kiing’eetyin Jesebel osotiondennyi." 
1Kings21:26 Ak kiyai tuguk che kiwechei mising’ eng’ kasubetab kanamonik, ko u tuguk tugul che kiyaei Amorik, che kion Jehovah eng’ taitab lagokab Israel.)" 
1Kings21:27 Ak kingogas Ahab ng’alechato, kogerer ngoroikyik, ak kolaach kuniet, ak korugutgei, ak kosieb kuniet, ak kwo mutyo." 
1Kings21:28 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Elija Tisbindet, kolenji," 
1Kings21:29 Igeere ole iming’indogei Ahab eng’ tainnyu? Amu iming’inegei eng’ tainnyu, ko maibu yaitiet eng’ betusiekyik: ago aipchini yaitiet gonnyi eng’ betusiekab werinnyi." 
1Kings22:1 Ak kitebi kenyisiek somok ko mami luget kwenutab Suria ak Israel. 
1Kings22:2 Ak eng’ kenyitab somok, kochorgei Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda konyo oldab laitoriatab Israel." 
1Kings22:3 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel otwogikyik, Ongen ole nenyo Ramot-Gilead, kitebye, ama kibendi kerebe eng’ eunekab laitoriatab Suria?" 
1Kings22:4 Ak kilenji inendet Jeosapat, Ichame kebe tuwai kebarge ak Ramot-Gilead? Ak kilenji Jeosapat laitoriatab Israel, A u kit ne i u, ak u bikyuk biguk, ak u mbartanyisiekyuk mbartanyisieguk." 
1Kings22:5 Ak kilenji Jeosapat laitoriatab Israel, Asomin ale teeb eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah rani." 
1Kings22:6 Koyum anyun laitoriatab Israel maotik, olo bo bik bogol ang’wan, ak kolenji ichek, Awe kebarge ak Ramot-Gilead, anan atebi? Ak kilenji, Togoste; amu indoi Kiptaiyat eutab laitoriat." 
1Kings22:7 Ago kile Jeosapat, Tos mami maotiotab Jehovah age yu si keteepse inendet?" 
1Kings22:8 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat, Ta komi chito agenge ne kimuchi keteepse eng’ Jehovah, Mikaia weritab Imla: ago aweche inendet; amu mamaoteni tuguk che miachen agobo ane, kobate yaitiet. Ak kile Jeosapat, Amat komwa laitoriat ko u no." 
1Kings22:9 Kiguur anyun laitoriatab Israel kiptaiyat age ak kolenji, Ui imutu Mikaia weritab Imla ichogune." 
1Kings22:10 Ak kiga tebe laitoriatab Israel ak Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda chi tugul ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, kolaachi ngoroikwak che bo laitornatet, eng’ ole bara eng’ ole kibunei eng’ ormarichetab Samaria: ak kimaoteni maotik tugul eng’ tainywa." 
1Kings22:11 Ak kiyachigei Sedekia weritab Kenaana kuinoikab karik, ak kole, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Itoortoe chuto Suriek, kot kogesgei." 
1Kings22:12 Ak kimaotenso maotik tugul ko u noto agichek, kole, Togoste Ramot-Gilead, ak ibor: amu indoi Jehovah ngnasanato eutab laitoriat." 
1Kings22:13 Ak king’alalji inendet chito ne kiga kiyokto koguur Mikaia, kolenji, Keero, kamwachi ng’alek che miach laitoriat ng’alekab maotik eng’ kutit agenge: asomin ale, ingoigei ng’olyondeng’ung’ ng’olyotab age eng’ ichek, ak ing’alal ng’alek che miach." 
1Kings22:14 Ak kile Mikaia, ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ko kit ne mwawa Jehovah, amwae noto." 
1Kings22:15 Ak kingoit inendet ole mi laitoriat, kolenji laitoriat inendet, Mikaia, kibe Ramot- Gilead kebarge, anan kitebi? Ak kiwolji inendet kolenji, Togoste, ak ibor; ak indoi Jehovah nganasanato eutab laitoriat." 
1Kings22:16 Ak kilenji laitoriat, Ayosieun konyil ata ale, amat imwawa kiy age kobate imanit eng’ kainetab Jehovah?" 
1Kings22:17 Ak kile, Kiageer Israel tugul ko kaiyesta eng’ tulonok ko u kechirek che matinyei mestowot: ak kimwa Jehovah kole, Matinyei chuto kiptaiyat; ingoweek chi tugul kwo gonnyi eng’ kalyet." 
1Kings22:18 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat, Kamamwaun ale, mamaoteni tuguk che miach agobo ane, kobate yaitiet?" 
1Kings22:19 Ak kile Mikaia, Kas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah; kiageer Jehovah kotebyei eng’ ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, ak kitononi luget tugul ne bo kipsengwet eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai ak ne bo katam." 
1Kings22:20 Ak kile Jehovah, Ng’o ne iberberi Ahab, si kwo kotogosta ak kome eng’ Ramot- gilead? Ak kimwa age ko u ni; komwa age ko u ni." 
1Kings22:21 Ak kimong’ tamirmiriet age ak kotonon eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kole, Aberberi." 
1Kings22:22 Ak kimwachi Jehovah inendet kolenji, Iberbertoi ano? Ak kile, Awendi ak aegu tamirmiriet ne kenisiei eng’ kutuswekab maotikyik tugul. Ak kimwa inendet kole, Iberberi inendet, ak iterter: ui anyun, ak iyai ko u noto." 
1Kings22:23 Ara anyun, keero, kainde Jehovah tamirmiriet ne kenisiei kutuswekab maotichuguk tugul; ak kagomwa Jehovah yaitiet agobo inye." 
1Kings22:24 Korik anyun Sedekia weritab Kenaana, ak korabach Mikaia matanda, ak kolenji, Kabun ano tamirmirietab Jehovah ak konyo kong’alalun?" 
1Kings22:25 Ak kile Mikaia, Keero, igeere eng’ betunoto, tun iwendi got ne bo orit iunyege." 
1Kings22:26 Ak kimwa laitoriatab Israel kole, Onam Mikaia, ak oweekte omutyi Amon bounindetab nganaset, ak Joas weritab laitoriat;" 
1Kings22:27 ak kolenji, Kamwa laitoriat ko u ni, kole, Onde chichi korgoret, ak obae amitwogikab nyalilda, ak beekab nyalilda, agoi aweeige eng’ kalyet." 
1Kings22:28 Ak kile Mikaia, Ngot iweeige iman eng’ kalyet, ko kaga ma ng’alalena Jehovah. Ak kile, Ogas okwek bik tugul." 
1Kings22:29 Kitogosta anyun laitoriatab Israel ak Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda koba Ramot- gilead. 
1Kings22:30 Kilenji laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat, Awalege aegu age, ak awe luget; ago ilaach inye ngoroiguk che bo laitornatet. Kowalgei anyun laitoriatab Israel koek age, ak kwo luget." 
1Kings22:31 Kiga ng’at laitoriatab Suria kiptainik sosom ak aeng’ che bo karisiekyik, kolenji, Amat obarge ak ne ming’in anan ko ne o, kobate laitoriatab Israel inegei." 
1Kings22:32 Ak kingogeer kiptainichoto bo karisiek Jeosapat, kole, Iman, nito laitoriatab Israel; ak kiwelelgei kobargei ak inendet: ak kiwaach Jeosapat." 
1Kings22:33 Ak kingogeer kiptainikab karisiek kole ma laitoriatab Israel ni, koweek, mata kosub inendet." 
1Kings22:34 King’i chito age kwangennyi kosapsapchi, ak kitiech laitoriatab Israel ole tuiyechin karikyik che kiilaachi: kolenji anyun chito ne kweriei karinnyi, Imuta amanda eng’ ole mi luget; amu kagiguotena mising’." 
1Kings22:35 Ak kitesak luget betunoto: ak kigiti laitoriat eng’ karinnyi kotokyigei Suriek, ak kime koskoleny: ak kiitenden korotik eng’ ng’otobet koba kobun kelutab karit." 
1Kings22:36 Ak kibiit waagat eng’ luget komugul komachei kororokto asista, kele, Ingwo chi tugul nganasennyi, ak kwo chi tugul emennyi." 
1Kings22:37 Kome anyun laitoriat, ak kigisut konyo Samaria; ak kitub ichek laitoriat eng’ Samaria." 
1Kings22:38 Ak kiun bik karit eng’ tamboiyotab Samaria; ak kimel sesenik korotikyik; (kiunegei yoto chepkugonik;) ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kimwa. 
1Kings22:39 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Ahab ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ak gotab kelekab belek ne kiteech, ak nganasok tugul che kiteech, ko tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
1Kings22:40 Koru anyun Ahab ak kwanisiekyik; ak kilaitoran Aasia werinnyi kogeer inendet. 
1Kings22:41 Ak kitoi kolaitoran Jeosapat weritab Asa eng’ Juda eng’ kenyitab ang’wan ne bo Ahab laitoriatab Israel. 
1Kings22:42 Ki bo Jeosapat kenyisiek sosom ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak mut eng’ Jerusalem. Ak kigiguure kamennyi Asuba cheptab Sili. 
1Kings22:43 Ak kiwendote ortinwek tugul che bo Asa kwandanyi; ma masta eng’ ortinwechato, kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah: agos kima kiisto komoswek che tororen; kita koenyei bik tiseiywek, ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ komoswechato tororen." 
1Kings22:44 Ak kiyai kalyet Jeosapat ak laitoriatab Israel. 
1Kings22:45 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jeosapat, ak kimnatennyi ne kiibor, ak ole kiyaita lugosiek, ko tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
1Kings22:46 Ak kiisto eng’ emet sodomik che kiga ng’et eng’ betusiekab kwandanyi Asa. 
1Kings22:47 Ak kima komi laitorianda Edom: ki laitoriat chito ne kirubei laitoriat. 
1Kings22:48 Kiyai Jeosapat melisiekab Taris si koba Opir koib tahabu: ago ma ba; amu kibutok melisiechoto eng’ Esion-geber. 
1Kings22:49 Kolenji anyun Aasia weritab Ahab Jeosapat, Chamji otwogikyuk koba ak otwogiguk eng’ melisiek. Ago ma cham Jeosapat." 
1Kings22:50 Ak kiru Jeosapat ak kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi ole kigitupchi kwanisiekyik eng’ nganasetab Daudi kwandanyi: ak kilaitoran Jeoram werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
1Kings22:51 Kitoi kolaitoran Aasia weritab Ahab eng’ Israel eng’ Samaria, eng’ kenyitab taman ak tisab ne bo Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek aeng’ eng’ Israel." 
1Kings22:52 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kowendote ortinwekab kwandanyi, ak ortinwekab kamennyi ak ortinwekab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, ne kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
1Kings22:53 Ak kiot Baal, ak kogutung’ji, ak kotach Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, konerech, ko u tuguk tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi." 
2Kings1:1 Ak kingo kagome Ahab kongelelji Moab Israel. 
2Kings1:2 Ak kirorok Aasia eng’ tirisietab gonnyi ne bo barak ne kimi Samaria, ak kimian: ak kiiyokto bik, ak kolenji, Oba, oteebe Baal-sebub kanamwetab Ekron ngo tos asob eng’ miani." 
2Kings1:3 Ago kilenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah Elija Tisbindet, Ng’eet, ak iwe otuiye ak bik che kaiyokto laitoriatab Samaria, ak ilenji ichek, Si obe oteepse Baal-sebub kanamwetab Ekron, ko amu mami Kamuktaindet Israel?" 
2Kings1:4 Ara anyun, kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Mechoruge eng’ itogut ne kagelany, ago imee iman. Ak kiwa Elija." 
2Kings1:5 Ak kiweek bichoto koba oldanyi, ak kilenji ichek, Kalya si owege?" 
2Kings1:6 Ak kilenji inendet, Konyo chito kotuiyenech ak kolenjech, Oba oweege ole mi laitoriat ne kaiyokwok, ak olenji inendet, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Si iyokte bik koba koteepse Baal-sebub kanamwetab Ekron, ko amu mami Kamuktaindet Israel? Noto anyun, ko mechoruge eng’ itogut, ago imee iman." 
2Kings1:7 Ak kilenji ichek, Ka chi ne u nee chichoto katuiyenok, ak komwawok ng’alechuto?" 
2Kings1:8 Ak kiwolji inendet kolenji, Ka chito ne sabul, ak koratategei birenet eng’ suennyi. Ak kile, Inendet ko Elija Tisbindet." 
2Kings1:9 Koyoktochi anyun laitoriat inendet kiptaiyat ne bou konom koboto bikyik konom. Ak kitogosta kwo ole mi inendet: ak ogeero, kitebyei ng’ony Elija eng’ tulwet barak. Ak kimwachi inendet kolenji, Ee, chitab Kamuktaindet, kole laitoriat, Choruge." 
2Kings1:10 Ak kiwolji Elija kiptaiyatab bichoto konom, kolenji, Ngot ko a chitab Kamuktaindet, kochorgei mat eng’ kipsengwet, ak kobeelin koboto biguk konom. Ak kichorgei mat eng’ kipsengwet, ak kobeel inendet ak bikyik konom." 
2Kings1:11 Ak kiiyokyi inendet kogeny kiptaiyat age ne bou konom, ak bikyik konom. Ak kiwolji inendet kolenji, Ee, chitab Kamuktaindet, kamwa laitoriat ko u ni kole, Chogu choruge." 
2Kings1:12 Ak kiwolji Elija ichek kolenji, Ngot ko a chitab Kamuktaindet, kochorgei mat eng’ kipsengwet, ak kobeelin koboto biguk konom. Ak kichorgei matab Kamuktaindet eng’ kipsengwet, ak kobeel inendet ak bikyik konom." 
2Kings1:13 Ak kiiyokto kogeny kiptaiyat ne bou konomutab somok koboto bikyik konom. Ak kitogosta kiptaiyatab somok ne bou konom, ak konyo kogutuny eng’ taitab Elija, ak kosaisai inendet, kolenji, Ee chitab Kamuktaindet, asain ale, ingobunji kamanut ne o, sobondanyu, ak sobonwekab otwogichuguk konom eng’ taing’ung’." 
2Kings1:14 Keero, kachorgei mat eng’ kipsengwet ak kobeel kiptainichu ka bo tai aeng’ chu kabou konom ak konomusiekwak: ago ingobunji sobondanyu kamanut ne o eng’ taing’ung’ nguno." 
2Kings1:15 Ak kilenji malaikaiyatab Jehovah Elija, Orekte tuwai ak inendet: amat iywei inendet. Ak king’eet ak kirekta tuwai ak inendet agoi ole mi laitoriat." 
2Kings1:16 Ak kilenji inendet, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Ko u ye keyokte bik koba koteepse Baal-sebub kanamwetab Ekron, ko amu mami Kamuktaindet eng’ Israel ne iteepse eng’ ng’olyondennyi? Noto anyun, mechoruge eng’ itogut ne kagelany, ago imee iman." 
2Kings1:17 Kome anyun ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kiga mwa Elija. Ak kitoi kolaitoran Jeoram kogeer inendet, eng’ kenyitab aeng’ ne bo Jeoram weritab Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda; amu kima kotinyei werit." 
2Kings1:18 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Aasia che kiyai, ko tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
2Kings2:1 Ak ye kimachei Jehovah komut Elija eng’ kipchurjuriet kwo kipsengwet, koba Elija ak Elisha eng’ Gilgal." 
2Kings2:2 Ak kilenji Elija Elisha, Asomin ale, tebi eng’ yu; amu kagoyokta Jehovah awa agoi Bet-el. Ak kile Elisha, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ak ko u ye sobei sobondang’ung’, ko mametoin. Kochortagei anyun Bet-el." 
2Kings2:3 Ak kimong’ werikab maotik che kimi Bet-el, kobwa ole mi Elisha, ak kolenji inendet, Ingen ile imuti ra Jehovah kiptaiyandeng’ung’ si ma ko kiptaiyandeng’ung’? Ak kile, Ee, angen; osisye okwek." 
2Kings2:4 Ak kilenji Elija inendet, Elisha, asomin ale tebi eng’ yu; amu kagoyokta Jehovah awa Jeriko. Ak kile, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ak ko u ye sobei sobondang’ung’, ko mametoin. Koit anyun Jeriko tuwai." 
2Kings2:5 Ak kibwa korik ole mi Elisha, werikab maotik che kimi Jeriko, ak kolenji inendet, Ingen ile imuti ra Jehovah kiptaiyandeng’ung’ si ma ko kiptaiyandeng’ung’? Ak kiwol kole, Ee, angen; osisye okwek." 
2Kings2:6 Ak kilenji Elija inendet, Asomin ale, tebi eng’ yu; amu kagoyokta Jehovah awa Jordan. Ak kile, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ak ko u ye sobei sogondang’ung’, ko mametoin. Ak kiba tuwai." 
2Kings2:7 Ak kiba murenik konomu che bo werikab maotik, ak kotononso eng’ ole loo kotokyigei ichek: ak kitononso ichek aeng’u eng’ ye negite Jordan." 
2Kings2:8 Ak kiireek Elija ngoriennyi ak kotaa, ak kokwere beek, ak kipcheiyo beek, koba komosi ak komosi, ak kilanda tuwai eng’ ole yaamat." 
2Kings2:9 Ak kingolanda, kolenji Elija Elisha, Som kit ne imache ayaun, kotomo kimuta eng’ ole imi. Ak kile Elisha, Asomin ale, ingotebena kebebertab tamirmirieng’ung’ konyil aeng’." 
2Kings2:10 Ak kile, Kesom kit ne uui: ago ngigeera ye kimuta awa eng’ ole imi, kobiitu ko u noto eng’ inye; ago ngot ko ma u noto, ko mabiitu noto." 
2Kings2:11 Ak ye kita kobendi, ak kong’alaloti, ogeero, karit ne bo mat, ak mbartanyisiek che bo mat, che kiibesio ichek tuwai; ak kiwa Elija kipsengwet eng’ kipchurjuriet." 
2Kings2:12 Ak kigeer Elisha, ak kowaach kole, Baba, baba, karisiekab Israel ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiechato! Ak kimata kogeer inendet kogeny: ak kinam ngoroikyik, ak kogerer kopcheune aeng’." 
2Kings2:13 Ak kinam kogeny ngorietab Elija ne kiibute inendet, ak koweektagei kwo kotonone ngegutab Jordan." 
2Kings2:14 Ak kinam ngorietab Elija ne kiibute inendet, ak kokwere beek, ak kole, Mi ano Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Elija? Ak kingo kagokwer beek, kopcheiyo, koba komosi ak komosi: ak kilanda Elisha." 
2Kings2:15 Ak kingogeer werikab maotik che kimi Jeriko ko katokyigei inendet, kole, Tebe tamirmirietab Elija Elisha. Ak kiba kotorokta inendet, ak kong’uruk kot koit ng’ony eng’ tainnyi." 
2Kings2:16 Ak kilenji ichek inendet, Keero, mi koboto otwogiguk bik konomu che kimen; kisomin kele, ingoba kocheng’ kiptaiyandeng’ung’: tamangab ko kagomut inendet tamirmirietab Jehovah kotogosta, ak kokwirji tulonok barak, anan ko atebwosiek. Ak kile, Amat oyokte." 
2Kings2:17 Ak kingosimji inendet agoi kolilan, komwa kole, Oyokte. Koyokta anyun murenik konom; ak kicheng’at eng’ betusiek somok, ama nyor inendet." 
2Kings2:18 Ak kiweek ole mi inendet, ye kita kotebyei eng’ Jeriko; ak kilenji inendet ichek, Kimamwawok alenjok, Amat obe?" 
2Kings2:19 Ak kilenji bikab nganaset Elisha, Keero, kararan ole mi nganasani, ko u ye keerei kiptaiyandennyu: ago yaachen beek, ama rurtos tuguk eng’ emet." 
2Kings2:20 Ak kile, Oibwa sotet ne leel, ak onde orit munyuk. Ak kiipchi inendet." 
2Kings2:21 Ak kimanda kwo kondametutab beek, ak kowirji orit munyuk, ak kole, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kaasoob beechu; ma kobiitu meet anan osunatet eng’ oloto." 
2Kings2:22 Kigisoob anyun beechoto agoi ra, ko u ng’olyotab Elisha ne kimwa." 
2Kings2:23 Ak kitogosta eng’ oloto kwo Bet-el: ak ye kita kotogostoi eng’ oret, komong’ werik che mengechen eng’ nganaset, ak kowit inendet, kolenji, Togoste inye kipchurmet, togoste, inye kipchurmet." 
2Kings2:24 Ak kigusgong’ ak kogeer ichek, ak kochub ichek eng’ kainetab Jehovah. Ak kimong’ kogonik aeng’ che bo tiong’ik che kergei ak keerit eng’ osnet, ak koton artam ak aeng’ eng’ werjoto." 
2Kings2:25 Ak kiwa eng’ yoto agoi tulwetab Karmel, ak koweek eng’ yoto kwo Samaria." 
2Kings3:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Jeoram weritab Ahab eng’ Israel eng’ Samaria eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo Jeosapat laitortiatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak aeng’." 
2Kings3:2 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah; ago ma yai ko u kwandanyi, anan ko u kamet: amu kiisto toloitab Baal ne kiga yai kwandanyi." 
2Kings3:3 Ago kinam tengekwogikab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto; ma istoegei." 
2Kings3:4 Kitinyei Mesa laitoriatab Moab kechirek; ak kiigochi laitoriatab Israel kororikab arekab kechir elfusiek bogol, koboto che bo mengichik elfusiek bogol." 
2Kings3:5 Ago kingome Ahab, kongelelji laitoriatab Moab laitoriatab Israel." 
2Kings3:6 Ak kimanda laitoriat Jeoram eng’ Samaria eng’ betusiechoto, ak koyum Israel tugul." 
2Kings3:7 Ak kiwa ak koyokto chito kwo oldab Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda, kolenji, Koingelelja laitoriatab Moab: tos ichame kebe tuwai Moab kebe kebar? Ak kile, Achame ketogoste: a u kit ne i u, ak u bikyuk biguk, ak u mbartanyisiekyuk mbartanyisieguk." 
2Kings3:8 Ak kile, Kitogostoe oret ne bunei ano? Ak kiwol kole, Kitogoste oretab ong’atetab Edom." 
2Kings3:9 Koba anyun laitoriatab Israel, ak laitoriatab Juda, ak laitoriatab Edom: ak kiyiem emet eng’ bandab betusiek tisab: ak kima komi beek che eei luget, anan ko tuga che kikweriei icheget." 
2Kings3:10 Ak kile laitoriatab Israel, Bwa! Amu kogoguur Jehovah laitorinichu somok kibagenge konde eunekab Moab." 
2Kings3:11 Ago kile Jeosapat, Mami yu maotiotab Jehovah, keteepse eng’ Jehovah inendet? Ak kiwol chito age eng’ otwogikab laitoriatab Israel kole, Mi yu Elisha weritab Sapat, ne kigerjin beek Elija." 
2Kings3:12 Ak kile Jeosapat, Mi ng’olyotab Jehovah koboto inendet. Kochortagei anyun laitoriatab Israel ak Jeosapat koboto laitoriatab Edom koba ole mi inendet." 
2Kings3:13 Ak kilenji Elisha laitoriatab Israel, Kiting’ege nee ak inye? Ui ole mi maotikab kwandang’ung’, ak maotikab komet. Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel inendet, Achicha: amu kogoguur Jehovah laitorinichu somok kibagenge, konde eunekab Moab." 
2Kings3:14 Ak kile Elisha, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne atonone tainnyi, ko nda kama agonyiti Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda amu mi yu, ko kama ko ta agusyinin kong’ iman, anan ageerin." 
2Kings3:15 Ago imutwa nguno butindet. Ak kingobut chichoto kibugandet, konyonji inendet eutab Jehovah." 
2Kings3:16 Ak kile, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Obal kererjosiek che chang’ eng’ tembwoni." 
2Kings3:17 Amu kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Mogeere usonet, anan ogeer ropta, ago nyiiei beek tembwonin: ak oee okwek, ak tukwok ak tiong’ikwok." 
2Kings3:18 Ago ni ko kit ne ming’in eng’ taitab Jehovah: indoi kogeny Moabik eunekwok. 
2Kings3:19 Ak obare nganaset age tugul ne ng’otat, ak nganaset age tugul ne kararan, ak oluul ketit age tugul ne mie, ak oger kondametusiek tugul che bo beek, ak ong’em eng’ koik koret age tugul ne mie." 
2Kings3:20 Ak ki eng’ karon, eng’ olo bo sait ne kigoitoe kagochinet, ogeero, kibwa beek che kibunei oretab Edom, ak kinyi emet beek." 
2Kings3:21 Kingogas anyun Moabik tugul kole, kotogos laitorinik kobwa kobargei ak ichek, koyumgei tugul che kiimuchi kolaach karik, agoi che eechen, ak koba kotononso eng’ kiwoto." 
2Kings3:22 Ak king’eetyo karon inne, ak kiga iluuchi asista beek, ak kigeer Moabik beek, che kiga itorjigei ichek, ko kabiriritu ko u korotik:" 
2Kings3:23 ak kile, Korotik chun; kogebar laitorinik iman, ak kogobar chi tugul choruennyi: ara anyun, Moabichu, onam barunenik." 
2Kings3:24 Ak kingoit nganasetab Israel, kong’eetyo Israel kobar Moabik, kot komwei eng’ tainywa: ak kiba kochut emet kobarat Moabik." 
2Kings3:25 Ak kibut nganasok; ak kiwirji chi age tugul koitanyi koret age tugul ne mie, ak konyiit koik; kiger kondametusiek tugul che bo beek, ak koluul ketik tugul che miachen: kot kotuuch eng’ Kir-hareset inegei koik che bo yoto; nganda kiyiem nganasanato bik che kiwirtoi koik, ak kobar." 
2Kings3:26 Ak kingogeer laitoriatab Moab kole kagogoromji boriet inendet, komut murenik bogol tisab che tinyei rotok, kole kourur luget kwo ole mi laitoriatab Edom: ago ma imuch." 
2Kings3:27 Ak kinam taitanyi ne kita laitorani kogeeri inendet, ak kogoito inendet koek kagochjinet ne kibeelei eng’ inatut barak. Ak kibiit neregek che eechen agobo Israel: ak kiba eng’ ole mi inendet, koweektagei emenywa." 
2Kings4:1 Ak kirirji Elisha kwondo age ne bo osotikab werikab maotik, kolenji, Kigome otwogindeng’ung’ manong’otiondennyu: ak ingen ile kiiywei otwogindeng’ung’ Jehovah: ak kagonyo besendoindet komachei komut lagokyuk aeng’ koba koek otwogik." 
2Kings4:2 Ak kilenji Elisha inendet, Imache ayaun nee? Mwawa; itinye nee eng’ go? Ak kile, Matinyei kiy age tugul eng’ go otwogindeng’ung’ ne chepto, kobate sotetab mwaita." 
2Kings4:3 Kole anyun, Ui somjige terenik eng’ biguk tugul che bo kokweng’ung’, terenik che mami kiy, amat isom che ng’ering’." 
2Kings4:4 Yeityo iwe go, ak igerjige go koboto weriguk, ak irong’ji mwaata terenichoto tugul; ak ne kagonyi, iiste kwo taban." 
2Kings4:5 Kwo anyun eng’ ole kimi inendet, kwo kogerigei go koboto werikyik; kiipchi ichek inendet terenik ak kirong’ji." 
2Kings4:6 Ak kingonyi terenik, kolenji werinnyi, Ibwa teret age. Ak kilenji inendet, Ma komi teret age, ak kisis mwaita." 
2Kings4:7 Konyo anyun komwachi chitab Kamuktaindet. Ak kile chichoto, Ui alde mwanichato, si iyaaktae besendang’ung’, ak iboisie che kang’et ak weriguk." 
2Kings4:8 Ak kiwa Elisha Sunem betut age, ole kimi kwondo ne toogunot; ak kibirji inendet koamis. Ak betut age tugul ye kibunei yoto, ko kicham kowendi goyoto koamisiei." 
2Kings4:9 Ak kilenji inendet manong’otiondennyi, Keero, ageere ale ni ko chito ne tilil ne bo Kamuktaindet, ne cham kosiirtoi eng’ olinyo kotugul." 
2Kings4:10 Asomin ale, ngechopchi got ne ming’in kogakta gonnyo; si kindochi itogut, ak meset, ak ng’echeret, ak kit ne tebe tait; ak ye kanyo gonnyo, kotebe yoto." 
2Kings4:11 Ak kinyo yoto betut age, ak kiwa goyoto koru." 
2Kings4:12 Ak kilenji Elisha Geasi otwogindennyi, Kuur Chepsunamindoni. Ak kingo kagoguur, konyo kwonyoto kotonon eng’ tainnyi." 
2Kings4:13 Ak kilenji otwogindennyi, Ilenji kwonyi, Keero, kaitoretech mising’ eng’ toretoni tugul te ni; imache keyaun nee? Imache kesomun kiy eng’ laitoriat, anan eng’ kiptaiyatab luget? Ak kiwolji kolenji, Amenye kwenutab bikyuk." 
2Kings4:14 Kile anyun Elisha, Kiyachi nee anyun? Ak kiwol Geasi kole, Matinyei werit iman, ak os manong’otiondennyi." 
2Kings4:15 Ak kile, Kuur inendet. Ak kingo kagoguur inendet, konyo kotonon eng’ kurgat." 
2Kings4:16 Ak kile Elisha, Tun kapkora eng’ kenyit ne nyonei, itinye werit. Ak kile, Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, inye chitab Kamuktaindet, amat imwachi lembech otwogindeng’ung’ ne chepto." 
2Kings4:17 Ak kimanach kwonyoto, ak kisich werit eng’ betunoto, ko kait kenyit, ko u ye kiga mwachi Elisha inendet." 
2Kings4:18 Ak kingoeet lakwanato, koba ak kwandanyi betut age ole mi bik che kesisiei." 
2Kings4:19 Ak kilenji lakwanato kwandanyi, Metinnyu, metinnyu. Ak kilenji chichoto otwogindennyi, Imutyi kamet." 
2Kings4:20 Ak kingo kagonam inendet, ak komutyi kamet, kotiny kamet agoi kotonon asis, ak kime." 
2Kings4:21 Ak kitogosta kwo komogonji inendet itogutab chitab Kamuktaindet, ak kogerji inendet go, ak komanda." 
2Kings4:22 Ak koguur manong’otiondennyi kolenji, Asomin ale iyokwa age eng’ otwogik, ak sigiriet age, alabat ole mi chitab Kamuktaindet, si aweek." 
2Kings4:23 Ak kile manong’otiondennyi, Amu nee si iwe ole mi inendet ra? Ama betut ne kaleel arawet, anan ko sabato. Ak kile, Ma ya." 
2Kings4:24 Koiito anyun sigiriet, ak kolenji otwogindennyi, Kweri, kebe; mat iwe mutyo, kobate ye kamwaun." 
2Kings4:25 Kwo anyun, ak koit ole mi chitab Kamuktaindet eng’ tulwetab Karmel. Ak kingogeer chitab Kamuktaindet inendet eng’ ole loo, kolenji Geasi otwogindennyi, Keero, nin ko Chepsunamindet:" 
2Kings4:26 asomin ale, labat torokte, ak ilenji, Ichamege? Chamegei manong’otiondeng’ung’? Chamegei lakwet? Ak kiwol kole, Chamegei." 
2Kings4:27 Ak kingoit ole mitei chitab Kamuktaindet eng’ tulwet, konam kelyekyik. Ak kinyo Geasi korik konyo kolen kotoorta inendet; ago kile chitab Kamuktaindet, Mete: amu tinyei ng’wanindo eng’ muguleldanyi; ak kagoung’ena Jehovah, ma mwawa." 
2Kings4:28 Yeityo komwa kole, Kigamage werit kiptaiyandennyu? Kima ale, Mat igena?" 
2Kings4:29 Kolenji anyun Elisha Geasi, Kermenge, ak inam kiroktanyu eng’ eung’ung’, ak iwe: ngot ituiye chi, ko mat igat; ak ngot kogatin chi, ko mat iwolji; ak inde kiroktanyu togetab lakwet." 
2Kings4:30 Ak kile kametab lakwet, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ak ko u ye sobei sobondang’ung’, ko mabagaktoin. Ak king’eet Elisha, kosub inendet." 
2Kings4:31 Ak kiwa Geasi kondoe ichek, ak konde kirokto togetab lakwet; ago ma biit tweguno, anan kaset. Koweek anyun kotorokta inendet, ak kolenji, Tom kong’eet lakwet." 
2Kings4:32 Ak kingonyo go Elisha, ogeero, ko kagome lakwet, ak kaginde itogunnyi." 
2Kings4:33 Kwo go anyun, ak kogerjigei go ichek aeng’u, ak kosa Jehovah." 
2Kings4:34 Ak kitogosta, ak korue lakwet, ak kotiing’e kutinnyi kutitab lakwet, ak kotiing’e konyekyik konyekab lakwet, ak kotiing’e eunekyik chechiget: ak koiitoegei baragutab lakwet; ak kilalang’it bortab lakwet." 
2Kings4:35 Koweek anyun Elisha, ak kowendot eng’ go; ak kotogosta, ak koiitoegei inendet: ak kirion lakwet konyil tisab, ak kogos." 
2Kings4:36 Ak kiguur Geasi kolenji, Kuur Chepsunamindet. Koguur anyun inendet. Ak kingonyo go ole mi Elisha, kolenji Elisha, Kanab wering’ung’." 
2Kings4:37 Kwo go anyun, ak kobutyi kelyekyik ak kong’uruk kot koit ng’ony; ak kiganab werinnyi ak komanda." 
2Kings4:38 Ak kiweek Elisha Gilgal, ak kimi rubet emet; ak kitebyei werikab maotik eng’ tainnyi: ak kilenji otwogindennyi, Kotkot teret ne o, ak iyochi werikab maotik sogoriek." 
2Kings4:39 Ak kiwa age mbar kwo kobut ngwek, ak kinyor ketitab motondoronik, ak kobut motondoronikab ketoto, kot konyiit ngoriet, ak konyo komurmurji teret ne mi sogoriek: amu kima nai." 
2Kings4:40 Koluluk anyun kobwa ng’ony koam bik. Ak ye kiamei tuguchoto, kowaach, kole, Ee chitab Kamuktaindet, mi meet teret orit. Ak mata komuch koam tuguk che kimi teronoto." 
2Kings4:41 Ago kile inendet, Oibu busiek. Ak kirong’ji teret; ak kimwa kole, Olulugu koam bik. Ak kimata kobiit kiy ne ya eng’ teret." 
2Kings4:42 Ak kinyo chito age eng’ Baal-salisa, ak kiipchi chitab Kamuktaindet makatinikab tongoanik, makatinik tiptem che bo sairik, ak mesisekab bek eng’ lolennyi. Ak kile, Igochi bik koam." 
2Kings4:43 Ak kile otwogindennyi, He! Andoi amitwogichu taitab bik bogol? Ago kile, Igochi bik koam; amu kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Amei kot kotuuch." 
2Kings4:44 Konde anyun tainywa, ak kiamis bichoto, ak kotuuch, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
2Kings5:1 Ak ki chito ne o Naaman, kiptaiyatab luget ne ki bo laitoriatab Suria, eng’ taitab kiptaiyandennyi, ak ki konyitot, amu kiga kogochi Jehovah Suria katerteret eng’ inendet: ki chito inendet kogeny ne kim ak ko nyigan, ago kitinyei mogondosik." 
2Kings5:2 Ak kiset Suriek emetab Israel kobee kweanaik, ak kiluul chepto ne ming’in; ak kiboisiechin cheboto kwondab Naaman." 
2Kings5:3 Ak kilenji lakwanato kwonyoto, Nda mi kiptaiyandennyu ole mi maotiot ne mi Samaria, ta kagosoob inendet eng’ mogondosikyik." 
2Kings5:4 Ak kiwa chito age go ak komwachi kiptaiyandennyi, kolenji, Kamwa ko u ni cheboto bo emetab Israel." 
2Kings5:5 Ak kile laitoriatab Suria, Ara, ui oloto, si ayokyi baruet laitoriatab Israel. Ak kiwa ak koib talentaisiek taman che bo feda, ak tahabusiek elfusiek lo, ak ngoroik taman che kiwalawali." 
2Kings5:6 Ak kiipchi baruet laitoriatab Israel, kolenji, Ye it oldang’ung’ baruani, ko keero, kaayogu Naaman otwogindennyu, si kobiit isoob inendet eng’ mogondosikyik." 
2Kings5:7 Ak kingo kagosoman baruanato laitoriatab Israel, kogerer ngoroikyik, ak kole, Tos a Kamuktaindet, ne abare ak asoobi, si koyokwa chichi chito konyo asoob eng’ mogondosikyik? Ago asomin ale ibwat ak igeer ole cheng’doi suriet eng’ ane." 
2Kings5:8 Ak kingogas Elisha chitab Kamuktaindet, kole kagerer laitoriatab Israel ngoroikyik, koyokto chito kwo oldab laitoriat kolenji, Amu nee si igerer ngoroiguk? Ingonyo oli ami si konai kole mi maotiot Israel." 
2Kings5:9 Konyo anyun Naaman ak mbartanyisiekyik ak karisiekyik, inyo kotonon eng’ kurgetab gotab Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Ak kiiyokto Elisha chito kwo ole mi inendet, kwo kolenji, Ui iunge eng’ Jordan konyil tisab, ak weekyiningei kogeny bortang’ung’, ak itililitu." 
2Kings5:11 Ago kinerech Naaman, ak kwo ak kole, Keero, kalen, Mong’u sang’ iman ole ami, ak kotonon, ak koguur kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, ak kosapsabe eunnyi ole ama, ak kosoob mogondosik." 
2Kings5:12 Tos ma koigoi Abana ak Parpar, ainosiekab Damasko, kosiir beek tugul che bo Israel? Ko ma ko ta amuchi aunege choto ak atililitu? Koweek anyun, ak kwo konerechi mising’." 
2Kings5:13 Ak kibwa otwogikyik korik, ak kong’alalji, kolenji, Baba, nda kaga lenjin maotiot iyai kit age ne o, ta kama iyae? Ko kamieit ne tia ngo lenjin, Iunge si itililitu?" 
2Kings5:14 Kochortagei anyun kwo kochut beek konyil tisab eng’ Jordan, ko u mwaetab chitab Kamuktaindet: ak kiweek bortanyi kowalak koigei bortab lakwet ne ming’in, ak kitililit." 
2Kings5:15 Ak kiweek kwo ole mi chitab Kamuktaindet, inendet ak bikyik tugul che kimi ak inendet, ak kinyo ak kotonon eng’ tainnyi: ak kole, Keer anyun nguno, kaanai ale mami Kamuktaindet eng’ ng’ony tugul, kobate mi eng’ Israel: ara asain nguno anyun ale, taach konunet eng’ otwogindeng’ung’." 
2Kings5:16 Ago kimwa kole, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne atonone tainnyi, ko mataache kiy. Ago kibirji inendet koib; ago kiesio." 
2Kings5:17 Ak kimwa Naaman kole, Ngot ko mata icham, asain ale ngigochi otwogindeng’ung’ ng’ung’unyek che yamei kola nyumbusiek aeng’u; amu koboch nguno ko ma kogochin otwogindeng’ung’ kagochinet ne kibeelei, anan ko tiseiywot, kanamonik, koek Jehovah inegei." 
2Kings5:18 Ingonyochi kaat Jehovah otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ kii: ye wendi kiptaiyandennyu gotab Rimon kosaei eng’ yoto, kotiiegei eunnyu, ak ang’uruge eng’ gotab Rimon, ye ang’uruge eng’ gotab Rimon, ko ingoyochi kaat Jehovah otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ kiito." 
2Kings5:19 Ak kilenji inendet, Ui eng’ kalyet. Kwo anyun eng’ ye kimi inendet ne ma looit." 
2Kings5:20 Ago kile Geasi otwogindetab Elisha chitab Kamuktaindet, Keero, kabagakyi kiptaiyandennyu Naaman Suriaindet, amataach eng’ eunnyi tuguk che kaibu: ko u ye sobei Jehovah, alabati asubi inendet, ak aibe inendet tuguk alak." 
2Kings5:21 Kosub anyun Geasi Naaman. Ak kingogeer Naaman chito kolabatu kosubu inendet, kochorgei eng’ karit kotorokta inendet, ak kolenji, Kalyet?" 
2Kings5:22 Ak kile, Kalyet. Kaiyokwa kiptaiyandennyu, kole, Keero, kagoit oldanyu murenik aeng’u che bo werikab maotik, che bunu emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim; asomin ale, igochi ichek talentait agenge ne bo feda, ak ngoroik aeng’ che kiwalawali." 
2Kings5:23 Ak kile Naaman, Iyan iib talentaisiek aeng’, ak kibirji inendet, ak koratyi talentaisiek aeng’ che bo feda eng’ lolonik aeng’, ak ngoroik aeng’ che kiwalawali, ak kogochi otwogikyik aeng’ koipchi; ak kiib kondoe inendet." 
2Kings5:24 Ak kingoit tulwet, konam inendet tuguchoto eng’ eunekab otwogichoto, ak kwo kogonor eng’ go: ak kimwachi bichoto koba, ak kiba." 
2Kings5:25 Ago kiwa inendet go, ak kotonon eng’ taitab kiptaiyandennyi. Ak kilenji Elisha inendet, Ibunu ano, Geasi? Ak kile, Kama wa ui otwogindeng’ung’." 
2Kings5:26 Ak kilenji inendet, Kama obe ak muguleldanyu ye kaweeksei chichigai eng’ karinnyi kotorogun? Tos betusiechu ko che kitaage feda, ak ketaage ngoroik, ak mbarenikab emitik, ak mbarenikab sabibuk, ak kechirek ak tuga, ak otwogik che murenik ak che tibik?" 
2Kings5:27 Namin anyun mogondosikab Naaman ak iyoteng’ung’ koigeny. Ak kimanda eng’ ye kimi inendet ko kagonam mogondosik, koleelit ko u teluchi." 
2Kings6:1 Ak kilenji werikab maotik Elisha, Yu kimenye eng’ taing’ung’ ko mariich mising’ eng’ achek." 
2Kings6:2 Kisome kele chamwech kebe Jordan, ak koib chi age tugul ketit, keteekyige yeto eng’ yoto ole kimenye. Ak kiwol kole, Oba." 
2Kings6:3 Ak kile chito age, Asomin ale, iyan oba ak otwogiguk. Ak kiwol kole, Kibendi." 
2Kings6:4 Koba anyun koboto ichek. Ak kingoit Jordan, koeb ketik." 
2Kings6:5 Ago ye kingota koluuli age ketit, korarach aiywet kobutyi beek: ak kiwaach kole, Bwa kiptaiyandennyu! Amu kogisomei." 
2Kings6:6 Ak kile chitab Kamuktaindet, Karorokyi ano? Ak kiiborji ye karorokyi. Ak kieb ketit ak kowirji yoto ak kiigochi ketoto aiywet kotogos." 
2Kings6:7 Ak kilenji, Inemu. Koyogoito anyun eunnyi ak konem." 
2Kings6:8 Ak kibargei laitoriatab Suria ak Israel; ak kiiruoch ak otwogikyik kole, Egu nganasennyu yegile ak yugile." 
2Kings6:9 Ak kiiyokto chitab Kamuktaindet chito kwo oldab laitoriatab Israel, kolenji, Ripge, mebun korono; amu bwanei yoto Suriek." 
2Kings6:10 Ak kiiyokto laitoriatab Israel bik koba ole kiga mwachi inendet chitab Kamuktaindet ak koteechi agobo yoto; ak kisorgei, ma wa yoto, ma konyil agenge anan ko aeng’." 
2Kings6:11 Ak kiimak mising’ muguleldab laitoriatab Suria agobo kioto; ak kiguur otwogikyik, ak kolenji, Ochame omwawa chito eng’ achek ne bo laitoriatab Israel?" 
2Kings6:12 Ak kile age eng’ otwogikyik, Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat: mwachin Elisha maotiot ne mi Israel laitoriatab Israel ng’alek che imwae eng’ gong’ung’ orit ne irue." 
2Kings6:13 Ak kile, Oba ogeer ole mi inendet, si ayokto chito komut inendet. Ak kigimwachi inendet kelenji, Keero, mi inendet Dotan." 
2Kings6:14 Koyokto anyun inendet mbartanyisiek, ak karisiek, ak luget ne o koba oloto: ak kiit kemoi ak koyiem nganaset." 
2Kings6:15 Ak kingong’eet otwogindetab chitab Kamuktaindet karon inne, komanda, ogeero, kimi luget ne boto mbartanyisiek ak karisiek ne kiga yiem nganaset. Ak kilenji otwogindennyi inendet, Bwa kiptaiyandennyu! Kiyae nee?" 
2Kings6:16 Ak kiwol kole, Ameiywei: amu chang’ che mi kobotech kosiir che mi ak icheget." 
2Kings6:17 Ak kisa Elisha kole, Jehovah, asain ale, yat konyekyik, si kogeer. Ak kiyat Jehovah konyekab nerananato; ak kigeer: ak ogeero, ki nyiitat tulwet mbartanyisiek ak karisiek che bo mat che kiga yiem Elisha." 
2Kings6:18 Ak kingochorgei ole mi inendet, kosa Elisha Jehovah kole, Asain ale bire bichu koratet. Ak kibire ichek koratet ko u ng’olyotab Elisha." 
2Kings6:19 Ak kilenji Elisha ichek, Ma oret ni, ama nganasanato: osubwa, si amutak ole mi chito ne ocheng’e. Ak kiimut ichek koba Samaria." 
2Kings6:20 Ak kingoit Samaria, kole Elisha, Jehovah, yat konyekab bichu, si kobiit kogeer. Ak kiyat Jehovah konyekwak, ak kigeer, ak ogeero, kimi kwenutab Samaria." 
2Kings6:21 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel Elisha, ye kingogeer bichoto, Baba, abar? Abar?" 
2Kings6:22 Ak kiwol kole, Mat ibar: ibare che kailuul eng’ rotweng’ung’ ne bo chok ak kwangeng’ung’? Igochi amitwogik ak beek, si koamis ak koeeiso, ak koba oldab kiptaiyandenywa." 
2Kings6:23 Ak kichopchi ichek amitwogik che chang’: ak ye kingo kagoamis ak koeeiso, kochunda koba, ak kiba oldab kiptaiyandenywa. Ak matagai kobwa lugosiekab Suria kogeny emetab Israel." 
2Kings6:24 Ak kingobata choto, koyum Ben-hadad laitoriatab Suria lugennyi tugul, ak kotogosta koyiem Samaria." 
2Kings6:25 Ak kibiit rubet ne o eng’ Samaria: ak ogeero, kiyiem nganasanato, kot kealdae metitab sigiriet fedaisiek tamanwogik sisiit, ak kealdae kebeberta agenge eng’ ang’wan ne bo kibabet ne bo soroekab cheptugenik, fedaisiek mut." 
2Kings6:26 Ak ye kisiirtoi laitoriatab Israel eng’ inatut barak, korikyi inendet kwondo age kolenji, Toreta, kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat." 
2Kings6:27 Ak kile, Ngot ko matoretin Jehovah, atoretitoin ano? Eng’ ole kiborse, anan ole kitue sabibuk?" 
2Kings6:28 Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Amin nee? Ak kiwol kole, Kolenja kwonyi, Konu wering’ung’ keam ra, si keam werinnyu mutai." 
2Kings6:29 Kiiyo anyun, ak keam: ak kialenji inendet eng’ betutab aeng’, Konu wering’ung’, keam: kouny werinnyi." 
2Kings6:30 Ak kingogas laitoriat ng’alekab kwonyoto, kogerer ngoroikyik; (ak kiwendote irimet barak;) ak kigeer bik, ogeero, kiilaagoti kuniok." 
2Kings6:31 Yeityo komwa kole, Ingoyaiywa Kamuktaindet ko u noto ak kotes, ngot kotebi metitab Elisha weritab Sapat rani." 
2Kings6:32 Ago kitebyei Elisha eng’ gonnyi, koboto boisiek; ak kiiyokto laitoriat chito kwo: ago kingo tom koit chito ne kagiyok, ole mi inendet, kolenji boisiek, Ogeere ole kagoyok weri bo rumindet chito konyo kotil metinnyu? Ogeero, ye it chito ne kagiyok, oger kurget, ak onam kereiywot kouuiit: tos mongen ole isubu kiptaiyandennyi inendet?" 
2Kings6:33 Ak ye kita kong’alali ak icheget, ogeero, koit ole mi inendet chito ne kagiyok: ak kimwa kole, Keero, bo yaitioni Jehovah; ko ta agen Jehovah kolya?" 
2Kings7:1 Ak kimwa Elisha kole, Ogas okwek ng’olyotab Jehovah: kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, kialdoe mutai olo bo saini kerutietab busiek che tambulul sekelit agenge, ak kealdoe kerutik aeng’ che bo sairik sekelit agenge, eng’ ormarichetab Samaria." 
2Kings7:2 Kowolji anyun kiptaiyat ne kitiiegei eunnyi laitoriat chitab Kamuktaindet, kolenji, Ogeero, ngot koyai Jehovah tirisiok eng’ kipsengwet, ko tos biit kioto? Ak kile Elisha, Keero, igeere eng’ konyeguk, ago meame tuguchoto." 
2Kings7:3 Kimi bik ang’wanu che kitinyei mogondosik ole kibunei eng’ ormarichet: ak kilenjigei, Amu nee si ketebe yu kot kebegu?" 
2Kings7:4 Ngot kemwa kele, kibendi nganaset, komi rubet nganaset, ak kibegu eng’ yoto: ak ngot ketebi eng’ yu kesisye, kebegu kora. Ara anyun obwa kebe kebekyi lugetab Suriek: ngot kobagaktech, kesoptosi; ak ngot kobarech, kebegu." 
2Kings7:5 Ak king’eetyo karon kota ko mirmir, ak koba nganasetab Suriek: ak kingoit tabandab nganasetab Suriek, ogeero, koma komi chi yoto." 
2Kings7:6 Amu kiigochi Jehovah Suriek kogas cheetab karisiek ak cheetab mbartanyisiek, cheetab luget ne o: ak kilenjigei, Ogeero, kagogochi tuguk laitoriatab Israel laitorinikab Hitik, ak laitorinikab Misrik, si kobwa kobarech." 
2Kings7:7 Komwei anyun kota komirmir, ak kobagakta emaisiekwak, ak mbartanyisiekwak, ak sigirokwak, ak kibagakta nganaset ko u kit ne ki u, ak komwei kosor sobonwekwak." 
2Kings7:8 Ak kingoit bichoto kiamei mogondosik tabandab nganaset, koba emait age orit, ak kiamis, ak koeeiso, ak koib feda ak tahabu, ak ngoroik, ak koba kouny; ak koweek koba emait age, ak koib tuguk eng’ yoto agine, ak koba kouny." 
2Kings7:9 Yeityo komwachigei kole, Ma kiyai kiy ne mie: betuni ko betutab logoiywek che miach, ak kesistosi: ngot kegany kot koeech, konamech biret: ara anyun obwa kebe kemwachi bikab gab laitoriat." 
2Kings7:10 Kobwa anyun ak koguur ribindetab nganaset: ak komwachi ichek kolenji, Kagibe nganasetab Suriek, ogeero, kama komi chi yoto, anan ko twegunetab chito, ago ka ratotin mbartanyisiek, ak ko ratotin sigirok, ak ko u emaisiek kit ne ko u." 
2Kings7:11 Ak kiguur ribik; ak kimwachi bikab gab laitoriat eng’ go. 
2Kings7:12 Ak king’eet laitoriat kemoi, ak kolenji otwogikyik, Aboruok kit ne kogoyaiywech Suriek. Ingen kole amech rubet; koba anyun eng’ nganaset kounygei eng’ timin kole, Si ye mong’ eng’ nganaset, kenam, ak kebe nganaset." 
2Kings7:13 Ak kiwol age eng’ otwogikyik kole, Asomin ale, ingoba bik alak ak mbartanyisiek mut che ta ko ng’etunotin, che mi nganaset, (ogeero, te chang’indo tugul ne bo Israel che ng’etunotin eng’ nganaset; ogeero, te chang’indo tugul ne bo Israel che kigogesgei:) ak ongiyokte bik koba kogeer." 
2Kings7:14 Konam anyun karisiek aeng’ ak mbartanyisiek: ak kiiyokto laitoriat bik kosub lugetab Suriek kolenji, Oba ogeer." 
2Kings7:15 Ak kiisub kot koit Jordan: ak ogeero, ki nyiitat oret ngoroik ak terenik, che kiwirtooti Suriek koruaei. Ak kiweek bichoto kiga kiyokto komwachi laitoriat." 
2Kings7:16 Ak kimanda bik koba konam tugukab nganasetab Suriek. Kigialdae anyun kerutietab busiek che tambululen sekelit agenge, ak kigialdae kerutik aeng’ che bo sairik sekelit agenge, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
2Kings7:17 Ak king’at laitoriat kiptaiyatab luget ne kitiiegei inendet eunnyi, korib ormarichet: ak kitiech bik inendet eng’ ormarichet, ak kime ko u ye kiga mwa chitab Kamuktaindet, ne kiga mwa ye kiga nyo laitoriat ole mi inendet." 
2Kings7:18 Ak ye kingo kagong’alalji chitab Kamuktaindet laitoriat, kolenji, Kialdoe kerutik aeng’ che bo sairik sekelit agenge, ak kialdoe kerutiet agenge ne bo busiek che tambululen sekelit agenge mutai olo bo saini eng’ ormarichetab Samaria;" 
2Kings7:19 ak kiwolji kiptaiyandanato chitab Kamuktaindet kolenji, Keero, ngot koyai Jehovah tirisiok eng’ kipsengwet, ko tos biit kiy ne u noto? Ak kile, Igeere eng’ konyeguk, ago meame tuguchoto:" 
2Kings7:20 kiyaak ko u noto eng’ inendet; amu kitiech bik inendet eng’ ormarichet, kome." 
2Kings8:1 Kiga ng’alalji Elisha kwonyi kiga ing’eetyi werinnyi, kolenji, Ng’eet ak obe ak bikab gong’ung’, ak obe omeny oldo tugul ole ochame: amu kagoguur Jehovah rubet: ak nyonei rubet emet kenyisiek tisab." 
2Kings8:2 Ak king’eet kwonyoto, ak koyai ko u ng’olyotab chitab Kamuktaindet: ak kiba ak gonnyi, ak komeny emetab Pilistik kenyisiek tisab." 
2Kings8:3 Ak kingogesgei kenyisiek tisab, koweek kwonyoto eng’ emetab Pilistik: ak kiwa korirji laitoriat agobo gonnyi ak korennyi." 
2Kings8:4 King’alalji laitoriat Geasi otwogindetab chitab Kamuktaindet, kolenji, Asomin ale, mwawa tuguk tugul che eechen che kigoyai Elisha." 
2Kings8:5 Ak kingota komwachin inendet laitoriat ole kiisoopto kogeny lakwet ne kiga kome, ogeero, korirji laitoriat kwonyi kiging’eetyin werinnyi agobo gonnyi ak korennyi. Ak kile Geasi, Kiptaiyandennyu, ee laitoriat, kwonyoto ni, ak werinnyi ni, ne kiing’eeti Elisha." 
2Kings8:6 Ak kingoteebe laitoriat kwonyoto, komwachi inendet. Kong’atyi anyun laitoriat inendet kiptaiyat, kolenji, Ui weekyi inendet tuguk tugul che ki chechik, ak logoek tugul che bo mbaret koboch betut ne kiwendi eng’ emoni, agoi ra." 
2Kings8:7 Ak kinyo Elisha Damasko; ak kimiani Ben-hadad laitoriatab Suria; ak kigimwachi kelenji, Konyo oli chitab Kamuktaindet." 
2Kings8:8 Ak kilenji laitoriat Hasael, Ib kagochinet eng’ eung’ung’, ak iwe itorokte chitab Kamuktaindet, ak iteepse Jehovah eng’ inendet, ilenji, Asobe eng’ miani?" 
2Kings8:9 Kwo anyun Hasael, kotorokta inendet, ak koib kagochinet ne bo kit age tugul ne mie ne bo Damasko, che yamei kola tambesik artamu, ak konyo kotonon eng’ tainnyi, ak kole, Kagoyokwa wering’ung’ Ben-hadad laitoriatab Suria, anyo oldang’ung’, kole, Tos asob eng’ miani?" 
2Kings8:10 Ak kilenji Elisha inendet, Ui ilenji inendet, Isobe iman; nganda kagoborua Jehovah kole meei inendet iman." 
2Kings8:11 Ak kitokyi inendet togennyi konjurur inne, kot kolilan inendet; ak korir chitab Kamuktaindet." 
2Kings8:12 Ak kile Hasael, Amu nee si irir, kiptaiyandennyu? Ak kiwol kole, Amu angen yaitiet ne tun iyachini lagokab Israel: ibeele irimoikwak che kimen, ak ibare werikwak eng’ rotokab chok, ak ibirte manyurunikwak, kotonak, ak igerer kwonyikwak che tamonosiek." 
2Kings8:13 Ak kile Hasael, Nee otwogindeng’ung’, ne seset kityo, kot koyai kii o? Ak kiwol Elisha kole, Kigoborua Jehovah kole, iegu laitoriat eng’ Suria." 
2Kings8:14 Kwo anyun eng’ ole kimi Elisha, ak koit oldab kiptaiyandennyi; ne kiteebe inendet kolenji, Kalenjin nee Elisha? Ak kimwachi kolenji, Kalenja isobe iman." 
2Kings8:15 Ak ki eng’ karon, konem anget ne kiitoi eng’ itogut barak, ak korookto beek, ak kotuge togennyi ak kome: ak kiliatoran Hasael kogeer inendet." 
2Kings8:16 Ak eng’ kenyitab mut ne bo Joram weritab Ahab laitoriatab Israel, ye ki Jeosapat laitoriat ne bo Juda, kotoi kolaitoran Jeoram weritab Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda." 
2Kings8:17 Ki bo kenyisiek sosom ak aeng’ inendet ye kingotau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek sisiit eng’ Jerusalem. 
2Kings8:18 Ak kiwendote ortinwekab laitorinikab Israel, koyai ko u gotab Ahab: amu ki cheptab Ahab osotiondennyi: ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Kings8:19 Ago ma cham Jehovah kobar Juda, amu otwogindennyi Daudi, ko u ye kiiarorji kogochi inendet tait ne bo lagokyik betusiek tugul." 
2Kings8:20 Kingelelji Edom Juda eng’ betusiekyik, ak kilewenjigei Edom laitoriat ne bou ichek." 
2Kings8:21 Kilanda anyun Joram kwo Sair, koboto karisiekyik tugul: ak king’eet kemoi, ak kobar Edomik che kiga yiem inendet, koboto kiptainikab karisiek: ak kimwei bik koba emaisiekwak." 
2Kings8:22 Kongelelji anyun Edom Juda agoi ra. Ak kingelel agine Libna eng’ betusiechoto. 
2Kings8:23 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Joram, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings8:24 Ak kiru Joram ak kwanisiekyik, ak kigitub koboto kwanisiekyik eng’ nganasetab Daudi: ak kilaitoran Aasia werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings8:25 Eng’ kenyitab taman ak aeng’ ne bo Joram weritab Ahab laitoriatab Israel, kotoi kolaitoran Aasia weritab Jeoram laitoriatab Juda." 
2Kings8:26 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak aeng’ Aasia ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyit agenge eng’ Jerusalem. Ak kainetab kamet ko ki Atalia cheptab Omri laitoriatab Israel. 
2Kings8:27 Ak kiwendote ortinwekab gotab Ahab, ak koyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u ye kiga yai gotab Ahab: amu ki sandetab gab Ahab." 
2Kings8:28 Ak kiba ak Joram weritab Ahab kobargei ak Hasael laitoriatab Suria eng’ Ramot-gilead: ak kiiguoten Suriek Joram. 
2Kings8:29 Ak kiweek laitoriat Joram konyo kinya eng’ Jesreel eng’ ng’otobosiek che kitoor Suriek inendet eng’ Rama, ye kibaregei ak Hasael laitoriatab Suria. Ak kichortagei Aasia weritab Jeoram laitoriatab Juda kwo kogeer Joram weritab Ahab eng’ Jesreel, amu kimiani." 
2Kings9:1 Ak kiguur maotiot Elisha age eng’ werikab maotik, ak kolenji inendet, Kermenge, ak iib lalani bo mwaita, ak iwe Ramot-gilead." 
2Kings9:2 Ak ye it yoto, icheng’ Jeu weritab Jeosapat weritab Nimsi, ak iwe go, ak ilenji kong’eet eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekyik, ak imut inendet kwo got ne bo orit." 
2Kings9:3 Yeityo inemu laletab mwaita, ak irong’ji mwaita metinnyi, ak ilenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kaaiilin iegu laitoriat eng’ Israel, yeityo iyat kurget, ak imwei, amat igage." 
2Kings9:4 Kwo anyun Ramot-gilead murenonoto, ne ki maotiot." 
2Kings9:5 Ak kingoit, ogeero, kitebyei kiptainikab luget; ak kile, Atinye ng’olyot ne kagiyogunena, ee kiptaiyat. Ak kile Jeu, Kagiyokyi ng’o eng’ achek tugul? Ak kile, Kagiyogun, ee kiptaiyat." 
2Kings9:6 Ak king’eet kwo go; ak kirong’ji mwaita metinnyi, ak kolenji inendet, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, kole, Kaaiilin iegu laitoriat eng’ bikab Jehovah, che icheget ko Israel." 
2Kings9:7 Ak ibare gotab Ahab kiptaiyandeng’ung’, si kobiit ayaakta mugetut eng’ korotikab otwogikyuk maotik, ak eng’ korotikab otwogikab Jehovah tugul, eng’ eutab Jesebel." 
2Kings9:8 Amu igesugei got komugul ne bo Ahab; ak abar werit age tugul ne bo Ahab, koboto inendet ne kerat ak inendet ne itiagat eng’ Israel." 
2Kings9:9 Ak ayae gotab Ahab koigei gotab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, ak ne bo Baasa weritab Aija." 
2Kings9:10 Ak amei sesenik Jesebel eng’ koretab Jesreel, ak mabiitu chi ne tubei inendet. Ak kiyat kurget, ak komwei." 
2Kings9:11 Konyo anyun Jeu ole kimi otwogikab kiptaiyandennyi: ak kilenji age inendet, Kalyet? Kanyonjin kibiywoni amu nee? Ak kilenji ichek, Ongen chichoto, ak kit ne ka u ng’alekyik." 
2Kings9:12 Ak kile ichek, Lembech; mwawech anyun nguno. Ak kile, Kang’alalwa ko u ni ak ko u ni, kole, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kaaiilin iegu laitoriat eng’ Israel." 
2Kings9:13 Ak kichirjirenso konam chi tugul ngoriennyi, ak konde kotobon ng’ony eng’ inendet, ak eng’ baragutab long’eiywot ne bo got, ak koguut iriaget kole, Laitoriat Jeu." 
2Kings9:14 Kochaam anyun Jeu weritab Jeosapat weritab Nimsi, Joram. (Kiribei Joram Ramot-gilead, inendet ak Israel tugul, amu Hasael laitoriatab Suria:" 
2Kings9:15 ago kiga week laitoriat Joram kwo kinya eng’ Jesreel eng’ ng’otobosiek che kiga toor inendet Suriek, ye kibaregei ak Hasael laitoriatab Suria.) Ak kimwa Jeu kole, Ngot ko kit ne obwati ni, ko mat ongwa chi kochilil eng’ nganaset, kwo komwaita eng’ Jesreel." 
2Kings9:16 Kolany anyun Jeu karit, kwo Jesreel; amu kiruei Joram eng’ oloto. Ak kiga chorgei Aasia laitoriatab Juda kogeer Joram." 
2Kings9:17 Kitonon ribindet eng’ teekset ne koi ne bo Jesreel, ak kitoben Jeu ak kweanennyi kobwanei, ak kile, Ageere bik. Ak kile Joram, Nam chito ne lanyei mbartanyit, ak iyokte kotorokta, ak ingowo kolenji, Kalyet?" 
2Kings9:18 Kwo anyun chito kobun mbartanyit, kotorokta ichek, ak kolenji, Kamwa laitoriat ko u ni, kole, Kalyet? Ak kile Jeu, Image nee kalyet? Nyo ui let. Ak kimwaita ribindonoto kole, Kait chito ne kaga kiyokto ole mi ichek, ago ma week." 
2Kings9:19 Ak kiiyokto chitab aeng’ kobun mbartanyit, ne kiit ye kimi ichek, ak komwachi kolenji, Kamwa laitoriat ko u ni kole, Kalyet? Ak kiwol Jeu kole, Image nee kalyet? Nyo ui let." 
2Kings9:20 Ak kimwaita ribindet kole, Kait ole mi ichek, ago ma week: ak kergei kweriennyi ak kwerietab Jeu weritab Nimsi; amu kweriei eng’ koromnatet." 
2Kings9:21 Ak kile Joram, Ochoboge. Kochob anyun karinnyi. Ak kimanda Joram laitoriatab Israel ak Aasia laitoriatab Juda, komi chi tugul karinnyi, ak kiba kotorokta Jeu, ak kinyorji inendet koretab Nabot Jesreelindet." 
2Kings9:22 Ak kingogeer Joram Jeu, komwa kole, Kalyet-o Jeu? Ak kiwol kole, Kalyet ne bo nee, kota ko o ibetab ge ne bo komet Jesebel ak bonisiosiekyik?" 
2Kings9:23 Ak kiweech Joram eunekyik, ak komwei, ak kolenji Aasia, Mi ng’wektaet, wee Aasia." 
2Kings9:24 Ak king’i Jeu kwangennyi eng’ kimnatennyi tugul, ak komwok Joram kokwer kwenutab tigigoikyik, ak kiisore kipchabet muguleldanyi, ak kiibutyi karinnyi." 
2Kings9:25 Kolenji anyun Jeu Bidka kiptaiyatab lugennyi, Sut ak iwirji koretab Nabot Jesreelindet: amu ibwat ile, ye kigibendi tuwai kisubi Ahab kwandanyi, ko kiinde Jehovah milani inendet;" 
2Kings9:26 koageer iman amut korotikab Nabot, ak korotikab werikyik, mwaei Jehovah; ak ayaagun eng’ mbarani, mwaei Jehovah. Ara anyun wirji inendet mbaranato; ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
2Kings9:27 Ago kingogeer Aasia laitoriatab Juda kioto, komwei kobun oret ne wendi got ne mi mbar (Bet-hagan). Ak kion Jeu inendet, ak kole, Obar inendet agine eng’ karit: ak kigibar inendet eng’ ole kitogostoe eng’ Gur ye negite Ibleam. Ak kimwechi Megido, ak komechi yoto." 
2Kings9:28 Ak kisut inendet otwogikyik eng’ karit kwo Jerusalem, ak kotub inendet eng’ kererinnyi koboto kwanisiekyik eng’ nganasetab Daudi." 
2Kings9:29 Ak kitoi kolaitoran Aasia eng’ Juda eng’ kenyitab taman ak agenge ne bo Joram weritab Ahab. 
2Kings9:30 Ak kingoit Jeu Jesreel, kogas Jesebel; kosal konyekyik, ak kolelesonji metinnyi, ak koitito eng’ tirisiet." 
2Kings9:31 Ak ye kinyonei Jeu eng’ ormarich, kole, Kalyet, inye Simri, rumindetab kiptaiyandeng’ung’?" 
2Kings9:32 Ak kiinyal Jeu tirisiet, ak kole, Ng’o ne mi komostanyu? Ng’o? Ak kigeerei inendet bik aeng’u anan somok che ki kiptainik." 
2Kings9:33 Ak kile Jeu, Owiru. Kowir anyun inendet konyo ng’ony, ak kiiseegei korotikyik inatut, ak mbartanyisiek: ak kitiechatiech inendet eng’ kelyekyik." 
2Kings9:34 Ak ye kingonyo go, koamis ak koeeiso; yeityo kole, Orib kwonyito chubot, si otub inendet: amu inendet ko cheptab laitoriat." 
2Kings9:35 Ak kiba kolen kotub inendet: ago kima nyor inendet kobate terta, ak kelyekyik, ak rubeiywekab eunekyik." 
2Kings9:36 Kobwa go anyun kogeny ak komwachi inendet. Ak kile, Ng’olyotab Jehovah noto, ne kimwa eng’ otwogindennyi Elija Tisbindet, kole, Amei sesenik bortab Jesebel eng’ koretab Jesreel:" 
2Kings9:37 ak kergeitu ak ng’atatek mustab Jesebel eng’ mbaret eng’ koretab Jesreel; kot ko ma komwaei bik kole, Jesebel ni." 
2Kings10:1 Ak kitinyei Ahab werik tamanwogik tisab eng’ Samaria. Ak kisir Jeu baronok, ak koyokto koba Samaria, koyokyi bounikab Jesreel, che ichek ko ki boisiek, ak koyokyi ichek che kibaei werikab Ahab ko mengechen, kolenji," 
2Kings10:2 Ne bo koitu oldang’wong’ baruani, amu mi werikab kiptaiyandeng’wong’ kobotok, ak otinye karisiek ak mbartanyisiek, ak nganaset ne ng’otat, ak karik che bo luget:" 
2Kings10:3 ocheng’ ne mie, ne yamegei eng’ werikab kiptaiyandeng’wong’, ak onde inendet kotebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo kwandanyi, ak oyai luget agobo gotab kiptaiyandeng’wong’." 
2Kings10:4 Ago kiarogenso mising’, ak kole, Ogeero, ma tononso laitorinik aeng’u eng’ tainnyi: ketonondoi ano achek?" 
2Kings10:5 Ak kiiyokyi inendet ne kibou got komugul, ak inendet ne kibou nganaset, koboto boisiek agichek, ak ichek che kibaei lagochoto, koyokyi ng’olyot Jeu, kolenji, Ki otwogiguk, ak kiyae tuguk tugul che imwawech; magiyae chito age koek laitoriat: yai kit ne igeere ile mie." 
2Kings10:6 Kosirji anyun ichek kogeny baruet, ne bo aeng’, kolenji, Ngot omi komostanyu, ak ngot ogase it ng’alekyuk, otil metowekab bichoto werikab kiptaiyandeng’wong’, ak obwa ole ami eng’ Jesreel, mutai koteni asis. Ak kimi werichato bo laitoriat tamanwogik tisabu koboto bik che toogunotin che bo nganaset, che kibaei ichek ko mengechen." 
2Kings10:7 Ak kingoit baruet oldanywa, konam werikab laitoriat ak kobar, che ichek ko ki bik tamanwogik tisab, ak konde metowekwak kitongok, ak koyoktochi inendet eng’ Jesreel." 
2Kings10:8 Ak kinyo chito ne kigiyogu, ak komwachi inendet kolenji, Kageib metowekab werikab laitoriat. Ak kile, Onde ng’ony eng’ ole kibunei kebendi nganaset, koek karurugutik aeng’, agoi karon." 
2Kings10:9 Ak ki eng’ karon, komanda ak kotonon, ak kolenji bik tugul, O bo iman: ogeero, kiachaam kiptaiyandennyu ak abar inendet: ago ng’o ne kobar chu tugul?" 
2Kings10:10 Onai anyun nguno ole mabetei kiy eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah, ne kimwa Jehovah agobo gotab Ahab: amu kagoyai Jehovah kit ne kimwa eng’ otwogindennyi Elija." 
2Kings10:11 Kobar anyun Jeu tugul che kigong’et che bo gotab Ahab eng’ Jesreel, koboto bikyik tugul che eechen, ak choronokyik che kicham ko choronoi, ak tisiikyik, kot ma ituukyi inendet chi agot agenge." 
2Kings10:12 Ak king’eet kwo Samaria. Ak ye kimi got ne kitile kororikab kechirek, ne bo mestowek, eng’ oret," 
2Kings10:13 kotuiye Jeu che tupcho ak Aasia laitoriatab Juda; kolenji, O ng’o? Ak kiwol kole, Ki tupchosiekab Aasia: ak kichortoige kigati lagokab laitoriat ak lagokab kwondab laitoriat." 
2Kings10:14 Ak kimwa inendet kole, Onam. Ak kinam ichek, ak kobar ichek eng’ keringet ne bo got ne kitilisie, bik artam ak aeng’; ama bagakta agot agenge eng’ ichek." 
2Kings10:15 Ak ye kingo kakwa eng’ yoto, kotuiyo ak Jeonadab weritab Rekab kotorogu inendet: ak kiigat inendet ak kolenji, Mie muguleldang’ung’, ko u ye mie muguleldanyu eng’ muguleldang’ung’? Ak kiwol Jeonadab kole, Mie. Ngot ko u noto, igona eut. Ak kiigochi inendet eut; ak kinam inendet kwo karit orit." 
2Kings10:16 Ak kimwa kole, Ngebe tuwai, igeer kagiilennyu ne bo ge agobo Jehovah. Kogochi anyun kobun karinnyi." 
2Kings10:17 Ak kingoit Samaria, kobar bik tugul che kiga ng’etyi Ahab eng’ Samaria, agoi koges inendet ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, ne kimwachi Elija." 
2Kings10:18 Ak kiiyum Jeu bik tugul, ak kolenji, Kiot Ahab Baal kitigin; ago otei Jeu mising’." 
2Kings10:19 Oguurwa anyun maotik tugul che bo Baal, bik tugul che saei inendet, ak tisiikyik tugul, amongong’et agot agenge: amu atinye tiseiywot ne o ne aeng’jini Baal; chi age tugul ne ng’etu, ko masobei. Ago kiyai Jeu ko u noto kong’alsei, komachei kobar bik che saei Baal." 
2Kings10:20 Ak kile Jeu, Ong’at tuiyetab Baal ne bo kaming’inetab ge." 
2Kings10:21 Ak kiiyokto Jeu bik koba Israel tugul: ak kibwa bik tugul che saei Baal, kot ko ma ng’et chi ne ma nyo. Ak kibwa gotab Baal; ak kinyi bik gotab Baal, kong’eete komosi kot koit komosin." 
2Kings10:22 Ak kilenji chito ne ribei ole kigonore ngoroik, Inemji ngoroik bik tugul che saei Baal. Ak kiinemji ichek ngoroik." 
2Kings10:23 Kiba gotab Baal, Jeu ak Jeonadab weritab Rekab; ak kolenji Jeu bik che kisaei Baal, Ocheng’ ogeer ngo mi yu kobotok chi age tugul eng’ otwogikab Jehovah, kobate bik che saei Baal ichegei." 
2Kings10:24 Ak kiba go kogoito tiseiywek ak kagochinoik che kibeelei. Ak kiga kochob Jeu bik tamanwogik sisiit eng’ sang’, ak kolenji, Ngot kochilil chi age tugul ne amutu konyo eunekwok, ko inendet ne kaunda kochilil, kogeeri sobondanyi inendet." 
2Kings10:25 Kingoges eng’ yoto kagoitoetab kagochinet ne kibeelei, kolenji Jeu ribik ak kiptainikab luget, Oba go, ak obar; amongochilil agot agenge. Ak kibar eng’ rotwetab chok; ak kiwir ribik ak kiptainikab luget ichek komong’, ak koba nganasetab gotab Baal." 
2Kings10:26 Ak kiib tolochik che kimi gotab Baal, komong’, ak kobeel." 
2Kings10:27 Ak kiiluul toloitab Baal, ak kobut gotab Baal, ak koyai koek got ne kimasyin, agoi ra." 
2Kings10:28 Kobut anyun Jeu Baal eng’ Israel. 
2Kings10:29 Agos ma istoegei Jeu kasubetab tengekwogikab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, ne kiigochi Israel koyai tengekto, che ki moekab tahabu che kimi Bet-el ak che kimi Dan." 
2Kings10:30 Ak kilenji Jehovah Jeu, Amu kiiyai ne mie eng’ yaetab imanda ne mie eng’ tainnyu, ak iyachi gotab Ahab ko u tuguk tugul che kimi muguleldanyu, tebe anyun weriguk ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Israel, agoi ibindab ang’wan." 
2Kings10:31 Ago ma mage kiy Jeu kowendote ng’atutikab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, eng’ muguleldanyi tugul: ma istoegei tengekwogikab Jeroboam, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings10:32 Kitoi Jehovah eng’ betusiechoto kotil Israel kong’ering’itu: ak kibar Hasael ichek eng’ kiwotosiek tugul che bo Israel; 
2Kings10:33 kong’eete Jordan komostab kong’asis, emet tugul ne bo Gilead, ne bo Gadik, ak ne bo Reubenik, ak ne bo Manasik, kong’eete Aroer ne mi ole bo atebwetab Arnon, choto ko Gilead ak Basan." 
2Kings10:34 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jeu, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ak kimnatennyi tugul, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
2Kings10:35 Ak kiru Jeu ak kwanisiekyik: ak kigitub inendet eng’ Samaria. Ak kilaitoran Jeoahas werinnyi kogeer inendet. 
2Kings10:36 Ak kenyisiek che kilaitoran Jeu koboi Israel eng’ Samaria ko ki kenyisiek tiptem ak sisiit. 
2Kings11:1 Ak kingogeer Atalia kametab Aasia kole kagome werinnyi, kong’eet ak kobar anyun iyotet tugul ne bo gab laitoriat." 
2Kings11:2 Ago kichor Jeoseba cheptab laitoriat Joram, chepkametab Aasia, Joas weritab Aasia, ak komut inendet ak cheblakwet eng’ ole mi werikab laitoriat che kigibarei, kwo koung’e ichek got orit ne kirue, si manyor Atalia, ak kobar." 
2Kings11:3 Ak kitebi ak inendet, kounyegei eng’ gotab Jehovah kenyisiek lo: ak kilaitoran Atalia koboi emet." 
2Kings11:4 Ak kiiyokto Jeoiada chito eng’ kenyitab tisab kwo koguur kiptainik che bou bogolwogikab Karitik, ak che bo ribik, koguur ichek kobwa ole mi inendet eng’ gotab Jehovah; ak kiiyomisgei koboto ichek, ak kolenji koyosio eng’ gotab Jehovah, ak koborji ichek weritab laitoriat." 
2Kings11:5 Ak king’at ichek kolenji, Ni kit ne oyae: Egu kebeberta agenge eng’ somok eng’ okwek, che obwane sabato, ribikab ripset eng’ gotab laitoriat;" 
2Kings11:6 ak tebe kebeberta agenge eng’ somok, ormarichetab Sur; ak kotebe kebeberta agenge eng’ somok batetab ribik: oribe anyun ripsetab got ko u noto, ak oegu ng’otwet." 
2Kings11:7 Ak ripsei kweanaik aeng’u eng’ okwek, tugul che omandoi eng’ sabato, eng’ ripsetab gotab Jehovah, koyiemei laitoriat." 
2Kings11:8 Ak oyieme laitoriat, kotinyei chi tugul karikyik eng’ eunnyi; ak inendet ne nyonei ole mi bichoto, kebarei: ak obe ak laitoriat ye wendi komandoi sang’, ak ye nyonei go." 
2Kings11:9 Ak kiyai kiptainik che bou bogolwogik ko u tuguk tugul che king’at Jeoiada tisiindet: ak kiimut chi age tugul bikyik, che kibwanei eng’ sabato, koboto che kimandoi eng’ sabato, ak kobwa ole mi Jeoiada tisiindet." 
2Kings11:10 Ak kiigochi tisiindet kiptainik che bou bogolwogik, ng’otwek ak long’onik che ki bo laitoriat Daudi, che kimi gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings11:11 Ak kitonondos ribik, kotinyei chi tugul karik eng’ eunnyi, kong’eete komostab tai ne bo got agoi komostab katam, kobun ole negite kaptisisiet ak ole negite got, koyiem laitoriat." 
2Kings11:12 Komut anyun weritab laitoriat komong’, ak kolaakyi narietab laitornatet, ak kogochi baornatet; ak koyai inendet koek laitoriat, ak koiil inendet; ak koraprab eunekwak, ak kole, Ingosob laitoriat." 
2Kings11:13 Ak kingogas Atalia bolatetab ribik ak bik, konyo ole kimi bik eng’ gotab Jehovah:" 
2Kings11:14 ak kigeer, ak ogeero, kitononi laitoriat eng’ ye negite toloita, ko u ye ki biteet, ak kimi kiptainik ak bik che kuutei iriagok ole negite laitoriat; ak kiboiboitu bik tugul che bo emet, ak koguut iriagok. Kogerer anyun Atalia ngoroikyik, ak kowaach kole, Chaamset, chaamset."
