2Kings11:15 Ak king’at Jeoiada tisiindet kiptainikab bogolwogik che bou luget, kolenji, Omaande inendet kobun kwenutab bik; ak kibarei eng’ rotwetab chok, chito ne isubi inendet: amu kimwa tisiindonoto kole, Amat kebar inendet eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings11:16 Koistochigei anyun inendet; ak kibun Atalia oret ne bunei mbartanyisiek kobendi gotab laitoriat: ak kigibarji inendet yoto. 
2Kings11:17 Ak kiyai Jeoiada arorutiet eng’ kwenutab Jehovah ak laitoriat ak bik kole egu ichek bikab Jehovah; ak eng’ kwenutab laitoriat agine ak bik. 
2Kings11:18 Ak kiba bik tugul che bo emet gotab Baal, ak kobut kolul; kibut kapkorosusiekyik ak kanamonikyik kotonaton inne, ak kobar Matan tisiindetab Baal eng’ taitab kapkorosusiek. Ak kilewen tisiindet bounik korib gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings11:19 Ak kiimut kiptainik che bo bogolwogik, ak Karitik, ak ribik, koboto bik tugul che bo emet, ak kiimut laitoriat kochorgei eng’ gotab Jehovah, kobun oretab ormarichetab ribik agoi gotab laitoriat. Ak kitebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo laitorinik." 
2Kings11:20 Koboiboitu anyun bik tugul che bo emet, ak kisis nganaset: ak kibar Atalia eng’ rotwetab chok eng’ gotab laitoriat." 
2Kings11:21 Kitoi kolaitoran Jeoas ko bo kenyisiek tisab. 
2Kings12:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Jeoas eng’ kenyitab tisab ne bo Jeu; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek artam eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamet ko ki Sibia ne bo Beer-seba. 
2Kings12:2 Ak kiyai Jeoas ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ betusiekyik tugul koneti Jeoiada tisiindet inendet. 
2Kings12:3 Agos kima kiisto komoswek che tororen: kita koenyei bik tiseiywek, ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ komoswek che tororen." 
2Kings12:4 Ak kilenji Jeoas tisiik, Ingoib tisiik fedaisiek tugul che bo tuguk che itabanotin che kiibu kobwa gotab Jehovah, ak fedaisiek che kiboisie, fedaisiek che bo bik che te che yamei koitetab chi age tugul, ak fedaisiek tugul che kaibwat chi eng’ muguleldanyi kole koib kobwa gotab Jehovah," 
2Kings12:5 koib tisiik choto, tisiindet age tugul eng’ chito ne ingenge: si koteech ole kigobutok eng’ got, komosta age tugul ole mi ole butot." 
2Kings12:6 Ago kingoitei kenyitab tiptem ak somok ne bo laitoriat Jeoas, ko kitomo koteech tisiik ole kiga kobutok eng’ got." 
2Kings12:7 Koguur anyun laitoriat Jeoas tisiindet Jeoiada, koboto tisiik alak, ak kolenji ichek, Amu nee si moteeche ole kigobutok eng’ got? Noto anyun, amata oib fedaisiek eng’ che ongenge, ogoite keyae ole kigobutok eng’ got." 
2Kings12:8 Ak kiiyan tisiik kole ma koibei fedaisiek eng’ bik, ama teechei ole kigobutok eng’ got." 
2Kings12:9 Ago kinam Jeoiada moinget, ak korut kereiywondennyi, ak konde taban eng’ kaptisisiet, eng’ komostab tai kebendi go eng’ gotab Jehovah: ak kiinde moingonoto tisiik che kiribei kurget, fedaisiek tugul che kigiibu kobwa gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings12:10 Ak kingogeer kole kagochang’a fedaisiek eng’ moinget, kotogos sirindetab laitoriat ak tisiindet ne o konde lolonik ak koiit kogeer kit ne te fedaisiechoto kimi gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings12:11 Ak kiigochi fedaisiechoto kiga kigaman, bik che kiboisiei, che kiribei gotab Jehovah: ak kogochi musogik ak teegik, che kiyaei gotab Jehovah," 
2Kings12:12 ak bik che teekse koik, ak che waei koik, ak koalei baoinik ak koik che kwaotin che kiteege ole kiga kobutok eng’ gotab Jehovah, ak koalei tuguk tugul che kigiib keteege got." 
2Kings12:13 Ago ma kiyachi gotab Jehovah kikombokab feda, anan ko magasisiek che kitile ole lalei eng’ taisiek, anan ko tabok, anan ko igondisiek, ak terenik alak tugul che bo tahabu, anan ko terenikab feda, eng’ fedaisiek che kigiib kobwa gotab Jehovah:" 
2Kings12:14 amu kiigochi choto ichek che kiyai boisiet, ak koteege gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings12:15 Ago ma iit koboto bichoto, kiigochin fedaisiek konam si kogochi bik che yaei boisiet: amu kiboisie imanda." 
2Kings12:16 Kima kiib fedaisiekab kagochinoikab chalwogik, ak fedaisiekab kagochinoikab tengekto, kobwa gotab Jehovah: ki bo tisiik." 
2Kings12:17 Kotogosta anyun Hasael laitoriatab Suria kwo kobargei ak Gat, ak kinam nganasanato: ak kitokyigei Hasael Jerusalem." 
2Kings12:18 Ak kinam Jeoas laitoriatab Juda tuguk tugul che itabanotin che kiga itaban Jeosapat, ak Jeoram, ak Aasia, kwanisiekyik, laitorinikab Juda, ak tugukyik che itabanotin, ak tahabusiek tugul che kimi konoraikab gotab Jehovah, ak che bo gotab laitoriat, ak koyokyi Hasael laitoriatab Suria: ak kiwa eng’ Jerusalem." 
2Kings12:19 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Joas, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ko tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings12:20 Ak king’eetyo otwogikyik kochaam inendet, ak kibar Joas eng’ gotab Milo, eng’ oret ne chortoegei Sila." 
2Kings12:21 Amu kibar inendet Josakar weritab Simeat, ak Jeosabad weritab Somer otwogikyik, ak kime; ak kitub inendet koboto kwanisiekyik eng’ nganasetab Daudi: ak kilaitoran Amasia werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings13:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Jeoahas weritab Jeu eng’ Israel eng’ Samaria, eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak somok, ne bo Joas weritab Aasia laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak tisab." 
2Kings13:2 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kosub tengekwogikab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto; ma istoegei tengekwogichoto." 
2Kings13:3 Ak kilalyo neregekab Jehovah agobo Israel, ak kiinde ichek eutab Hasael laitoriatab Suria, ak konde eutab Ben-hadad weritab Hasael, betusiek tugul." 
2Kings13:4 Ak kirirji Jeoahas Jehovah, ak kigasyi Jehovah inendet: amu kigeer nyalildab Israel, ole kiinyalildoi laitoriatab Suria." 
2Kings13:5 (Ak kiigochi Jehovah Israel yetindet, kot komanda eng’ eutab Suriek: ak kimeny lagokab Israel emaisiekwak, ko u eng’ tai." 
2Kings13:6 Ago ma istoegei tengekwogikab gotab Jeroboam, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto, ago kibendate tengekwogichoto: ak kitebe Samaria Asera agine.)" 
2Kings13:7 Amu ma ituukyi bik Jeoahas, kobate bik konom che lanyei mbartanyisiek, ak karisiek taman, ak bik elfusiek taman che bunei kelyek; amu kibar laitoriatab Suria ichek, ak koyai koigei metetek che mi ole kiborse." 
2Kings13:8 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jeoahas, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ak kimnatennyi, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
2Kings13:9 Ak kiru Jeoahas koboto kwanisiekyik; ak kigitub inendet eng’ Samaria: ak kilaitoran Joas werinnyi kogeer inendet. 
2Kings13:10 Kitoi kolaitoran Jeoas weritab Jeoahas eng’ Israel eng’ Samaria, eng’ kenyitab sosom ak tisab ne bo Joas laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak lo." 
2Kings13:11 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah; ma istoegei tengekwogik tugul che bo Jeroboam weritab Nebat, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto: ago kiwendate tengekwogichoto." 
2Kings13:12 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Joas, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ak kimnatennyi ne kibaregei ak Amasia laitoriatab Juda, ko tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
2Kings13:13 Ak kiru Joas koboto kwanisiekyik; ak kitebe Jeroboam ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet: ak kigitupchi Joas Samaria koboto laitorinikab Israel. 
2Kings13:14 Ak kinam Elisha miando ne kibar inendet: Ak kichorgei Joas laitoriatab Israel konyo ole mi inendet, ak korir agobo inendet, ak kole, Baba, baba, karitab Israel ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiekyik!" 
2Kings13:15 Ak kilenji Elisha inendet, Nam kwanget ak kipchabonik: konam anyun inendet kwanget ak kipchabonik." 
2Kings13:16 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel, Kersach: ak kigersach. Ak kiigonoor Elisha eunekyik eunekab laitoriat." 
2Kings13:17 Ak kilenji, Yat tirisiet ne tokyingei kong’asis: ak kiyat. Ak kile Elisha, Mwokte: ak kimwokto. Ak kimwa Elisha kole, Kipchabetab Jehovah ne bo katerteret, kipchabetab katerteret ne itertere Suriek: amu ibare Suriek eng’ Apek, kot igesu ichek." 
2Kings13:18 Ak kilenji, Nam kipchabonik: ak kinam. Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel, Kwer ng’ony: ak kikwer konyil somok, kobagach." 
2Kings13:19 Ak kinerekyi chitab Kamuktaindet inendet, kolenji, Kaga nyoljin ikwer konyil mut anan ko lo, ko kata ibare Suriek kot igesu: ago nguno ibare Suriek konyil somok kityo." 
2Kings13:20 Ak kime Elisha, ak kigitub inendet. Ak kiibok lugosiekab Moabik kobwa emet eng’ taunetab kenyit." 
2Kings13:21 Ak ye kitubei ichek chito, ogeero, kogeer luget; ak kiwirji chichoto kereritab Elisha: ak kingotiiny chichoto kowekab Elisha, kosob ak kong’eet." 
2Kings13:22 Ak kiinyalil Hasael laitoriatab Suria Israel eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Jeoahas. 
2Kings13:23 Ago kiiborji Jehovah mieindanyi ichek, ak korire ichek ak kogonyit ichek, amu kayomisennyi ne kiiyomisgei ak Abraham, ak Isak, ak Jakobo, ko ma cham kobar ichek, anan koon ichek eng’ tainnyi agoi rani." 
2Kings13:24 Kome anyun Hasael laitoriatab Suria; ak kilaitoran Ben-hadad werinnyi kogeer inendet. 
2Kings13:25 Ak kiiweech Jeoas weritab Jeoahas nganasok eng’ eutab Ben-hadad weritab Hasael che kiga ib eng’ eutab Jeoahas kwandanyi eng’ luget. Kiiterter Joas inendet konyil somok, ak kiiweech nganasokab Israel." 
2Kings14:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Amasia weritab Joas laitoriatab Juda eng’ kenyitab aeng’ ne bo Joas weritab Jeoahas laitoriatab Israel. 
2Kings14:2 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak sogol eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamet ko ki Jeoadin ne bo Jerusalem. 
2Kings14:3 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ago ma igei Daudi kwandanyi: kiyai ko u tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi Joas." 
2Kings14:4 Agos kima kiisto komoswek che tororen: kita koenyei bik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ komoswek che tororen. 
2Kings14:5 Ak ye ki kata kigimit bounatet eng’ eunnyi, kobar otwogikyik che kiga bar laitoriat, kwandanyi:" 
2Kings14:6 ago ma bar lagokab rumichoto: ko u ye kigisir eng’ bukuitab Ng’atutietab Musa, ko u ye king’at Jehovah, kole, Magibarei kwanisiek amu lagok, anan kebar lagok amu kwanisiek: ago kibarei chi age tugul agobo tengektanyi." 
2Kings14:7 Kibar bikab Edom elfusiek taman eng’ Atebwetab Munyuk, ak konam Sela eng’ luget, ak koguure kainennyi Joktel agoi ra." 
2Kings14:8 Koyokto anyun Amasia bik koba oldab Jeoas, weritab Jeoahas weritab Jeu, laitoriatab Israel, kolenji, Nyo ketuiye kegeerge togoch." 
2Kings14:9 Ak kiiyokyi bik Jeoas laitoriatab Israel Amasia laitoriatab Juda kolenji, Kiiyokto ng’olyot katableliat ne kimi Lebanon koyokyi tarakwet ne kimi Lebanon, kolenji, Igochi cheptang’ung’ werinnyu kotun: ak kisiirto tiondo ne bo timin ne kimi Lebanon, ak kotiech katableliandanato." 
2Kings14:10 Kiibar iman Edom, ak kigotororin muguleldang’ung’: baibaitune noto anyun, ak itebe gong’ung’; amu nee si icheng’jige nyalilda, si ibut, inye koboto Juda?" 
2Kings14:11 Ago ma cham Amasia kogas. Kotogosta anyun Jeoas laitoriatab Israel; ak kigeergei inendet ak Amasia laitoriatab Juda togoch eng’ Bet-semes ne bo Juda. 
2Kings14:12 Ak kigiterter Juda eng’ taitab Israel; ak kimwei chi tugul kwo emainnyi. 
2Kings14:13 Ak kiimut Jeoas laitoriatab Israel Amasia laitoriatab Juda, weritab Jeoas weritab Aasia, eng’ Bet-semes, ak koit Jerusalem, ak kobut irimet ne bo Jerusalem koboch ormarichetab Epraim agoi ormarichetab luita, kakwautik bogol ang’wan che bo eut." 
2Kings14:14 Ak kiib tahabu tugul ak feda, koboto tuguk tugul che kimi gotab Jehovah, ak che kimi konoraik che bo gotab laitoriat, koboto luulenik agichek, ak kiweek kwo Samaria." 
2Kings14:15 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jeoas che kiyai, ak kimnatennyi, ak ole kibartagei ak Amasia laitoriatab Juda, ko tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
2Kings14:16 Ak kiru Jeoas koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitub eng’ Samaria koboto laitorinikab Israel; ak kilaitoran Jeroboam werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings14:17 Ak kita kosob Amasia weritab Jeoas laitoriatab Juda kenyisiek taman ak mut kingobata meetab Jeoas weritab Jeoahas laitoriatab Israel. 
2Kings14:18 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Amasia, ko tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings14:19 Ak kichaam inendet eng’ Jerusalem; ak komwei kwo Lakis: ago kiiyokto bik kosub inendet koba Lakis, ak kobar inendet eng’ oloto." 
2Kings14:20 Ak kilaune inendet mbartanyisiek: ak kigitupchi Jerusalem koboto kwanisiekyik eng’ nganasetab Daudi. 
2Kings14:21 Ak kinam bik tugul che bo Juda Asaria, ne ki bo kenyisiek taman ak lo, ak koyai inendet koek laitoriat kogeer kwandanyi Amasia." 
2Kings14:22 Kiteech Elat, koweekyi Juda ko kagoru laitoriat koboto kwanisiekyik." 
2Kings14:23 Kitoi kolaitoran Jeroboam weritab Joas laitoriatab Israel eng’ Samaria, eng’ kenyitab taman ak mut ne bo Amasia weritab Joas laitoriatab Juda, ak kolaitoran kenyisiek artam ak agenge." 
2Kings14:24 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah: ma istoegei tengekwogik tugul che bo Jeroboam weritab Nebat, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings14:25 Kiweech inendet kiwotetab Israel koboch ye kibunei kebendi Hamat agoi nyanjetab Araba, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne kimwa eng’ otwogindennyi Jona maotiot, weritab Amitai, ne ki bo Gat-heper." 
2Kings14:26 Amu kigeer Jehovah nyalildab Israel, kole ng’wan kot: amu kima komi chi ne kiga kiger anan ko ne itiagat, ak kima komi toretindet Israel." 
2Kings14:27 Ak ma mwa Jehovah kole, ibuktoi kainetab Israel eng’ kureretab kipsengwet: ago kisor ichek eng’ Jeroboam weritab Joas." 
2Kings14:28 Ak boisionik tugul che bo Jeroboam, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ak kimnatennyi, ole kiyaita luget, ak ole kiiweegundo Damasko ak Hamat ne ki bo Juda, koweekyi Israel, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
2Kings14:29 Ak kiru Jeroboam koboto kwanisiekyik, choto ko laitorinikab Israel; ak kilaitoran Sekaria werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings15:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Asaria weritab Amasia laitoriatab Juda eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak tisab ne bo Jeroboam laitoriatab Israel. 
2Kings15:2 Ki bo kenyisiek taman ak lo ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek konom ak aeng’ eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamet ko ki Jekolia ne bo Jerusalem. 
2Kings15:3 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u tugul che kiyai kwandanyi Amasia." 
2Kings15:4 Agos kima kiisto komoswek che tororen: kita koenyei bik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ komoswek che tororen. 
2Kings15:5 Ak kibir Jehovah laitoriat, ak kinam mogondosik agoi betutab meennyi, ak kimeny got ne itabanat. Ak kibou got Jotam weritab laitoriat, koruokyin bik eng’ emet." 
2Kings15:6 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Asaria, ak tugul che kiyai, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings15:7 Ak kiru Asaria koboto kwanisiekyik; ak kigitub koboto kwanisiekyik, eng’ nganasetab Daudi: ak kilaitoran Jotam werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings15:8 Kilaitoran Sekaria weritab Jeroboam eng’ Israel eng’ Samaria arawek lo eng’ kenyitab sosom ak sisiit ne bo Asaria laitoriatab Juda. 
2Kings15:9 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah: ko u ye kiyai kwanisiekyik: ma istoegei tengekwogikab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings15:10 Ak kichaam inendet Salum weritab Jabes, ak kokwer inendet eng’ taitab bik, ak kobar, ak kolaitoran kogeer inendet." 
2Kings15:11 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Sekaria, ogeero, kigisir eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel." 
2Kings15:12 Nito ko ng’olyot ne kimwachi Jehovah Jeu, kolenji, Tebe weriguk ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Israel agoi ibinda ne bo ang’wan. Ak kiyaak ko u noto." 
2Kings15:13 Kitoi kolaitoran Salum weritab Jabes eng’ kenyitab sosom ak sogol ne bo Usia laitoriatab Juda: ak kilaitoran arawet agenge eng’ Samaria. 
2Kings15:14 Ak kitogosta Menaem weritab Gadi eng’ Tirsa, ak kiit Samaria, ak kikwer Salum weritab Jabes eng’ Samaria, ak kobar, ak kolaitoran kogeer inendet." 
2Kings15:15 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Salum, ak chaamsennyi ne kiyai, ogeero, sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel." 
2Kings15:16 Kibar anyun Menaem Tipsa, ak bik tugul che kimenyei yoto, ak kiwotosiekyik koboch Tirsa: amu ma yatyi inendet; ak kobar anyun amu noto: ak kigerer kwonyik tugul che tamonosiek che kimi yoto." 
2Kings15:17 Kitoi Menaem weritab Gadi kolaitoran eng’ Israel eng’ kenyitab sosom ak sogol ne bo Asaria laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman eng’ Samaria." 
2Kings15:18 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah: ma istoegei tengekwogikab Jeroboam weritab Nebat eng’ betusiekyik tugul, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings15:19 Kiset Pul laitoriatab Asuria kolen kobar emet; ak kiigochi Menaem Pul talentaisiek elfut che bo feda, si kobiit kotoret Pul inendet kogimit laitornatet eng’ eunnyi." 
2Kings15:20 Ak kireb Menaem fedaisiek eng’ Israel, che bo bik tugul che eechen che magorek, kiibe chi tugul sekelisiek konom che bo feda, si kobiit kogochi laitoriatab Asuria. Kiweek anyun laitoriatab Asuria, ma tebi eng’ emonoto." 
2Kings15:21 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Menaem, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel?" 
2Kings15:22 Ak kiru Menaem koboto kwanisiekyik; ak kilaitoran Pekaia werinnyi kogeer inendet. 
2Kings15:23 Kitoi kolaitoran Pekaia weritab Menaem eng’ Israel eng’ Samaria, eng’ kenyitab konom ne bo Asaria laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek aeng’." 
2Kings15:24 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah: ma istoegei tengekwogikab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings15:25 Ak kichaam inendet Peka weritab Remalia, kiptaiyandennyi ne bo luget, ak kobar eng’ Samaria, eng’ irimetab gotab laitoriat, koboto Argob ak Arie; ak kimi koboto inendet bik konomu che bo Gileadik: ak kibar inendet, ak kolaitoran kogeer inendet." 
2Kings15:26 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Pekaia, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ogeero, sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel." 
2Kings15:27 Kitoi kolaitoran Peka weritab Remalia eng’ Israel eng’ Samaria, eng’ kenyitab konom ak aeng’ ne bo Asaria laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem." 
2Kings15:28 Kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah: ma istoegei tengekwogikab Jeroboam weritab Nebat, che kiibeete Israel si koyai tengekto." 
2Kings15:29 Kinyo Tiglat-peleser laitoriatab Asuria eng’ betusiekab Peka laitoriatab Israel, ak kinam Ijon, ak Abel-bet-maaka, koboto Janoa, ak Kedes, ak Hasor, ak Gilead, ak Galili, emet tugul ne bo Naptali; ak kiluul ichek komut koba Asuria." 
2Kings15:30 Ak kichaam Hosea weritab Ela Peka weritab Remalia, ak kokwer inendet ak kobar, ak kolaitoran kogeer inendet, eng’ kenyitab tiptem ne bo Jotam weritab Usia." 
2Kings15:30 Ak kichaam Hosea weritab Ela Peka weritab Remalia, ak kokwer inendet ak kobar, ak kolaitoran kogeer inendet, eng’ kenyitab tiptem ne bo Jotam weritab Usia." 
2Kings15:31 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Peka, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ogeero, sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Israel." 
2Kings15:32 Kitoi kolaitoran Jotam weritab Usia laitoriatab Juda eng’ kenyitab aeng’ ne bo Peka weritab Remalia laitoriatab Israel. 
2Kings15:33 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak lo eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Jerusa cheptab Sadok. 
2Kings15:34 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah: kiyai ko u tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi Usia. 
2Kings15:35 Agos ma kiisto komoswek che tororen: kita koenyei bik tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ komoswek che tororen. Kiteech ormarichetab meto ne bo gotab Jehovah. 
2Kings15:36 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jotam, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ko tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek che bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings15:37 Kitoi Jehovah eng’ betusiechoto koyokyi Juda Resin laitoriatab Suria ak Peka weritab Remalia, kobargei." 
2Kings15:38 Ak kiru Jotam ak kwanisiekyik, ak kigitub koboto kwanisiekyik, eng’ nganasetab Daudi kwandanyi: ak kilaitoran Ahas werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings16:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Ahas weritab Jotam laitoriatab Juda eng’ kenyitab taman ak tisab ne bo Peka weritab Remalia. 
2Kings16:2 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem Ahas ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak lo eng’ Jerusalem: kima yai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, ko u ye kiyai Daudi kwandanyi." 
2Kings16:3 Ago kiwendote ortinwekab laitorinikab Israel, ee, ak kogoito werinnyi kobun mat, ko u tuguk che kiwechei che bo bororiosiek, che kion Jehovah koba eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
2Kings16:4 Ak kienyei inendet tiseiywek ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ komoswek che tororen, ak eng’ tulonok, ak eng’ kelutab ketit age tugul ne tuon." 
2Kings16:5 Konyo anyun Jerusalem Resin laitoriatab Suria koboto Peka weritab Remalia laitoriatab Israel, kobargei: ago kiyiem Ahas, ago kima imuch koterter inendet." 
2Kings16:6 Eng’ betusiechoto koweekyi Resin laitoriatab Suria, Elat, Suria, ak koon Yahudik eng’ Elat: ak kibwa Suriek Elat, ak komeny oloto agoi rani." 
2Kings16:7 Koyokto anyun Ahas bik koba oldab Tiglat-peleser laitoriatab Asuria, kolenji, A otwogindeng’ung’ ak ko a wering’ung’; togosu, sorua eng’ eutab laitoriatab Suria, ak eng’ eutab laitoriatab Israel, che machei kobokya." 
2Kings16:8 Ak kinam Ahas feda ak tahabu che kimi gotab Jehovah, ak che kimi konoraikab gotab laitoriat, ak koyokyi laitoriatab Asuria koek kagochinet." 
2Kings16:9 Ak kigasyi inendet laitoriatab Asuria: ak kitogosta laitoriatab Asuria kobokyi Damasko, ak konam, ak koluul bikab yoto komut koba Kir, ak kobar Resin." 
2Kings16:10 Ak kiwa laitoriat Ahas Damasko kotorokto Tiglat-peleser laitoriatab Asuria, ak kigeer kaptisisiet ne kimi Damasko: ak kiiyokyi laitoriat Ahas Urija tisiindet kit ne u kaptisisionoto, ak kergeindanyi, ko u musognatennyi tugul." 
2Kings16:11 Ak kiteech Urija tisiindet kaptisisiet, ko u tugul che kiga koyokyi laitoriat Ahas eng’ Damasko; kisib koteech anyun ko u noto tisiindet Urija, kotom koit laitoriat Ahas eng’ Damasko." 
2Kings16:12 Ak kingoit laitoriat kobunu Damasko, kogeer kaptisisiet: ak korikyi laitoriat kaptisisionoto, ak kogoite kagochinoik." 
2Kings16:13 Ak kibeel kagochinennyi ne kibeelei ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, ak korong’ji kagochinennyi ne kieei, ak koise kaptisisiet korotikab kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet." 
2Kings16:14 Ak kiib kaptisisietab sugunwet ne kimi taitab Jehovah konyo eng’ taitab got, komong’ eng’ kwenutab kaptisisiennyi ak gotab Jehovah, ak konde komostab murot ne bo katam ne bo kaptisisiennyi." 
2Kings16:15 Ak king’at laitoriat Ahas Urija tisiindet, kolenji, Beel kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo karon eng’ kaptisisiet ne o, ak kagochinet ne bo koskoleny ne bo busiek, ak kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo laitoriat, ak kagochinennyi ne bo busiek, koboto kagochinenywa ne kibeelei ne bo bik tugul che bo emet, ak kagochinoikwak che bo busiek, ak kagochinoikwak che kieei, ak iise kaptisisionoto korotik tugul che bo kagochinenywa ne kibeelei, ak korotik tugul che bo tiseiywek: kobate kaptisisietab sugunwet, kobunjina, noto ateepse." 
2Kings16:16 Kiyai ko u noto Urija tisiindet, ko u tugul che king’at laitoriat Ahas." 
2Kings16:17 Ak kitil laitoriat Ahas tabanwekab ng’echerok, ak koisto tabet ne o eng’ kwenutab tuguchoto; ak konem nyanjet ne kimi baragutab eikab sugunonik, konyo ng’ony, ak konde baragutab koik che kigitet." 
2Kings16:18 Ak kiwal oret ne kerat ne bo sabato ne kiga kiyai eng’ go, ak ole mandoe laitoriat eng’ ole bo sang’, kiiweech kotokyi gotab Jehovah amu laitoriatab Asuria." 
2Kings16:19 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che kiyai Ahas, tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings16:20 Ak kiru Ahas koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitub koboto kwanisiekyik eng’ nganasetab Daudi: ak kilaitoran Hesekia werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings17:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Hosea weritab Ela eng’ Samaria eng’ Israel, eng’ kenyitab taman ak aeng’ ne bo Ahas laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek sogol." 
2Kings17:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Hosea weritab Ela eng’ Samaria eng’ Israel, eng’ kenyitab taman ak aeng’ ne bo Ahas laitoriatab Juda, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek sogol." 
2Kings17:2 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ago ma ko u laitorinikab Israel che kiindoune inendet." 
2Kings17:3 Kitogos Salmaneser laitoriatab Asuria kobargei ak inendet; ak kiek Hosea otwogindennyi, ak kiipchi inendet kagochinoik." 
2Kings17:3 Kitogos Salmaneser laitoriatab Asuria kobargei ak inendet; ak kiek Hosea otwogindennyi, ak kiipchi inendet kagochinoik." 
2Kings17:4 Ak kinai laitoriatab Asuria kole chaamsei Hosea; amu kiga koyokto bik koba oldab So laitoriatab Misri, ama igochi kagochinet laitoriatab Asuria, ko u ye kicham koyaei kenyit age tugul: eng’ noto anyun koger inendet laitoriatab Asuria, ak korat eng’ korgoret." 
2Kings17:4 Ak kinai laitoriatab Asuria kole chaamsei Hosea; amu kiga koyokto bik koba oldab So laitoriatab Misri, ama igochi kagochinet laitoriatab Asuria, ko u ye kicham koyaei kenyit age tugul: eng’ noto anyun koger inendet laitoriatab Asuria, ak korat eng’ korgoret." 
2Kings17:5 Yeityo kotogos laitoriatab Asuria konyo kowendot eng’ emet komugul ak kitogosta kwo Samaria, ak kiyiem kotebi kenyisiek somok." 
2Kings17:6 Kinam laitoriatab Asuria Samaria, eng’ kenyitab sogol ne bo Hosea, ak komut Israel koba Asuria, ak kwo konde ichek Hala, ak Habor, eng’ ainetab Gosan, ak nganasokab Medek." 
2Kings17:6 Kinam laitoriatab Asuria Samaria, eng’ kenyitab sogol ne bo Hosea, ak komut Israel koba Asuria, ak kwo konde ichek Hala, ak Habor, eng’ ainetab Gosan, ak nganasokab Medek." 
2Kings17:7 Ak kiyaak ko u noto, amu kiga yachi lagokab Israel tengekto Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ne kiimutu ichek komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, komong’une eutab Parao laitoriatab Misri, ak kiga koiywei kanamonik," 
2Kings17:8 ak kobendate ng’atutikab bororiosiek, che kiga on Jehovah koba eng’ taitab lagokab Israel, ak eng’ taitab laitorinikab Israel che kiga yai ichek." 
2Kings17:9 Ak kiyai lagokab Israel eng’ ung’ot tuguk che ma lititen koyachi Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak kiteekyigei komoswek che tororen eng’ nganasokwak tugul, koboch teekset ne koi ne bo ribik kot koit nganaset ne ng’otat." 
2Kings17:10 Ak kilumda tolochik ak Aserik eng’ tulwet age tugul ne koi, ak eng’ kelutab ketit age tugul ne tuon:" 
2Kings17:11 ak kibeele yoto nyamdutik eng’ komoswek tugul che tororen, ko u ye kiyaei bororiosiek che kion Jehovah eng’ tainywa; ak koyai tuguk che yaachen kotach Jehovah konerech:" 
2Kings17:12 ak kiot kanamonik, che kiga mwachi Jehovah, kolenji, Amat oyai kiito." 
2Kings17:13 Ago kibaorian Jehovah kora agobo Israel, ak agobo Juda, eng’ maotiot age tugul, ak keerindet age tugul kolenji, Oweege eng’ ortinwekwok che yaachen, ak orib ng’atutikyuk ak kayomisutikyuk, ko u Ng’atutiet tugul ne kiang’at kwanisiekwok, ak che kiayokwok eng’ eunekab otwogikyuk maotik." 
2Kings17:14 Ago ma cham kogas kora, ago kiiuuiit kaatwekwak ko u kaatwekab kwanisiekwak, che kima iyan Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa." 
2Kings17:15 Ak kiesio ng’atutikyik, ak kayomisennyi ne kiiyomisgei ak kwanisiekwak, ak baornatosiekyik che kibaorian agobo ichek; ak kiisub tuguk che bo buch, ak kiek buch, ak kiisub bororiosiek che kiga yiem ichek, che kiga ng’at Jehovah ichek agobo bichoto, kolenji, amat oyai ko u ye yaei icheget." 
2Kings17:16 Ak kimeto ng’atutik tugul che bo Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak koyachigei kanamonik che kigitany, moek aeng’, ak kiyai Asera, ak kogutung’ji tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet, ak koot Baal." 
2Kings17:17 Ak kiigoito werikwak ak tibikwak kobun mat, ak kiboisie ng’orset ak bonisosiek, ak koaldagei koyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, kotach inendet konerech." 
2Kings17:18 Konerekyi anyun Jehovah Israel mising’, ak kong’eeto ichek eng’ tainnyi: ma ng’et agot agenge kobate oretab Juda inegei." 
2Kings17:19 Ma rib agine Juda ng’atutikab Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ago kibendate konetisiosiekab Israel che kiyai." 
2Kings17:20 Ak kiesio Jehovah keswek tugul che bo Israel, ak konyalil ichek, ak konde eunekab bik che kiluul ichek, agoi kong’eeto ichek koba eng’ tainnyi." 
2Kings17:21 Amu kibut Israel eng’ gotab Daudi; ak koyai Jeroboam weritab Nebat koek laitoriat: ak kiimaas Jeroboam Israel si maisub Jehovah, ak kogochi ichek koyai tengekto ne o." 
2Kings17:22 Ak kibendate lagokab Israel tengekwogik tugul che bo Jeroboam che kiyai; ma istoegei; 
2Kings17:23 agoi kong’eeto Jehovah Israel eng’ tainnyi, ko u ye kimwa eng’ otwogikyik tugul, maotik. Kimut anyun Israel eng’ emenywa koba emetab Asuria, agoi ra." 
2Kings17:24 Ak kiimut laitoriatab Asuria bik eng’ Babulon, ak Kuta, ak Aba, ak Hamat, ak Separbaim, ak konde ichek nganasokab Samaria kogeer lagokab Israel: ak kibunji ichek Samaria, ak komeny nganasokyik." 
2Kings17:25 Ak ma iywei Jehovah eng’ taunetab meng’enywa ne bo oloto: koyokyi anyun Jehovah ichek ng’etunyik, che kibar alak eng’ ichek." 
2Kings17:26 Komwachi anyun laitoriatab Asuria, kolenji, Maingen bororiosiechu koimutu inyo inde nganasokab Samaria kit ne u Kamuktaindetab emonoto: eng’ noto anyun, ko kogoyokyi ichek ng’etunyik, ak keero, barei ng’etunyik ichek, amu maingen kit ne u Kamuktaindetab emonoto." 
2Kings17:27 Kong’at anyun laitoriatab Asuria kole, Omut age eng’ tisiik che kiomutu eng’ oloto; ak ongoba komeny oloto; ak konet ichek agobo kit ne u Kamuktaindetab emonoto." 
2Kings17:28 Konyo anyun age eng’ tisiik che kiga kimut koba eng’ Samaria, ak konyo komeny Bet-el, ak konet ichek ole kanyol koiyweita Jehovah." 
2Kings17:29 Nganda kiga yai bororiet age tugul kanamonikwak, ak konde gorikab komoswek che tororen che kiga teech Samarik, bororiet age tugul eng’ nganasokwak che kimenyei." 
2Kings17:30 Ak kiyai bikab Babulon Sukot-benot, koyai bikab Kut Nergal, koyai Hamat Asima," 
2Kings17:31 ak kiyai Abik Nibas ak Tartak, ak kibeel Separbaik lagokwak kobeelji Adramelek ak Anamelek kanamonikab Separbaim." 
2Kings17:32 Koiywei ichek anyun Jehovah, ak kolewenjigei eng’ bichoto tisiik che bo komoswek che tororen, che kieng’jin tiseiywek eng’ gorikab komoswek che tororen." 
2Kings17:33 Kiiywei Jehovah ak koot kanamonikwak, ko u ye kiiyweitoi bororiosiek eng’ ole kigiuune ichek kobwa." 
2Kings17:34 Yaei kora ko u atebosiek che ki bo tai agoi ra; maiywei Jehovah, amaisubi konetisiosiekwak, anan ko kotigonutikwak, anan ng’atutiet, anan kayomiset, che king’at Jehovah lagokab Jakobo, ne kiguure inendet Israel;" 
2Kings17:35 ne kiga koyomisgei Jehovah ak inendet, ak king’at ichek kolenji, Amoiywei kanamonik, anan ong’urukyi, anan oot, anan oeng’ji tiseiywot:" 
2Kings17:36 ago oiywei Jehovah ne kiimutwak otogosu eng’ emetab Misri eng’ kimnatet ne o, eng’ eut ne chuulat, ak ong’urukyi inendet, ak oeng’ji tiseiywot:" 
2Kings17:37 ak orib oyai eng’ betusiek tugul agoi, konetisiosiek ak kotigonutik, ak ng’atutiet, ak kayomiset, che kisirwak; amat oiywei kanamonik:" 
2Kings17:38 amat outie kayomiset ne kigiyomisge kobotok; anan oiywei kanamonik: 
2Kings17:39 ago oiywei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’; si kosoruok inendet eng’ eunekab bunikwok tugul. 
2Kings17:40 Ago ma kas, kiyai ko u atebosiekwak che ki bo tai." 
2Kings17:41 Kiiywei anyun bororiosiechuto Jehovah, ak kootei kanamonikwak che kigiwai; kiyai ko u noto lagokwak, ak lagokab lagokwak, ko u ye kiyai kwanisiekwak, koyaei ko u noto agoi ra." 
2Kings18:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Hesekia weritab Ahas laitoriatab Juda eng’ kenyitab somok ne bo Hosea weritab Ela laitoriatab Israel. 
2Kings18:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Hesekia weritab Ahas laitoriatab Juda eng’ kenyitab somok ne bo Hosea weritab Ela laitoriatab Israel. 
2Kings18:2 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak sogol eng’ Jerusalem: kainetab kamennyi ko ki Abi cheptab Sekaria. 
2Kings18:3 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u tugul che kiga yai Daudi kwandanyi." 
2Kings18:4 Kiisto komoswek che tororen, ak kobut tolochik, ak koluul Asera: ak kitui erenetab sugunwet ne kiyaei Musa; amu kibeeljin nyamdutik lagokab Israel agoi betusiechoto; ak kiguure Nehustan." 
2Kings18:5 Kiimang’ Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel; ne mata kobiit age kogeny eng’ laitorinik tugul che bo Juda ne kergei ak inendet, anan ko eng’ che ki bo tai eng’ inendet." 
2Kings18:6 Amu kinamgei ak Jehovah, ma masta eng’ kasubetab Jehovah, ago kirib ng’atutikyik, che king’at Jehovah Musa." 
2Kings18:7 Ak kimi Jehovah koboto inendet; kibor eng’ komosta age tugul ne kiwa: ak kiingelelji laitoriatab Asuria, ma ot inendet." 
2Kings18:8 Kibar Pilistik kot koit Gasa ak kiwotosiekyik, koboch teekset ne koi ne bo ribik agoi nganaset ne ng’otat." 
2Kings18:9 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan ne bo Hesekia, ne ki kenyitab tisab ne bo Hosea weritab Ela, laitoriatab Israel, kotogos Salmaneser laitoriatab Asuria, kobokyi Samaria, ak koyiem." 
2Kings18:9 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan ne bo Hesekia, ne ki kenyitab tisab ne bo Hosea weritab Ela, laitoriatab Israel, kotogos Salmaneser laitoriatab Asuria, kobokyi Samaria, ak koyiem." 
2Kings18:10 Ak kingobata kenyisiek somogu, konam nganasanato: kiginam Samaria eng’ kenyitab lo ne bo Hesekia, ne ki kenyitab sogol ne bo Hosea laitoriatab Israel." 
2Kings18:10 Ak kingobata kenyisiek somogu, konam nganasanato: kiginam Samaria eng’ kenyitab lo ne bo Hesekia, ne ki kenyitab sogol ne bo Hosea laitoriatab Israel." 
2Kings18:11 Ak kiimut laitoriatab Asuria Israel koba Asuria, ak kiwa konde Hala ak Habor, ainetab Gosan, ak nganasokab Medek:" 
2Kings18:12 amu kima kas it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ago kibistoe kayomisennyi, choto tugul kiga ng’at Musa otwogindetab Jehovah, ma cham kogas, anan koyai." 
2Kings18:13 Ak kitogos Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria eng’ kenyitab taman ak ang’wan ne bo laitoriat Hesekia, kobar nganasok tugul che ng’ototin che bo Juda ak konam." 
2Kings18:14 Ak kiiyokto Hesekia laitoriatab Juda chito kwo oldab laitoriatab Asuria eng’ Lakis, kolenji, Kialel; ui weektege eng’ oldanyu: kit age tugul ne igesenwa, alae. Ak king’atyi laitoriatab Asuria Hesekia, laitoriatab Juda talentaisiek bogol somok che bo feda ak talentaisiek sosom che bo tahabu." 
2Kings18:15 Ak kiigochi Hesekia inendet fedaisiek tugul che kimi eng’ gotab Jehovah, ak eng’ konoraikab gotab laitoriat." 
2Kings18:16 Kiinem Hesekia eng’ betusiechoto tahabu eng’ kereiywekab kurgotik che bo gotab Jehovah, ak eng’ tolochik che kiga koliige Hesekia, laitoriatab Juda, tahabu, ak kogochi laitoriatab Asuria." 
2Kings18:17 Ak kiiyokto laitoriatab Asuria Tartan ak Rab-saris ak Rabsake eng’ Lakis koboto luget ne o, koba oldab laitoriat Hesekia eng’ Jerusalem. Ak kitogosta ak koit Jerusalem. Ak kingoit, koba kotononie kererjetab tamboiyot ne bo meto, ne mi oret ne o ne bo koretab mwetindet." 
2Kings18:18 Ak kingoguur laitoriat, komong Eliakim weritab Hilkia, konyo ole mi bichoto, ne kibou got, koboto Sebna sirindet, ak Joa weritab Asap sirindetab tuguk che biitu." 
2Kings18:19 Ak kilenji Rabsake ichek, Olenji Hesekia, Kamwa ko u ni laitoriat ne o, laitoriatab Asuria, kole, Nee kamang’unoni imang’u?" 
2Kings18:20 Ing’alali, ago ng’alekab buch, ile, Mi kiruoget ak kimnatetab luget. Ara ng’o ne imang’u, si ingelelja?" 
2Kings18:21 Keero, imang’u kiroktab tegandani chisot, noto ko Misri: ne ngo tiiegei chi, kotoorei eunnyi, kwo orit: u noto Parao laitoriatab Misri eng’ ichek tugul che imang’u inendet." 
2Kings18:22 Ago ngot olenja, Kimang’u Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo: ko ma inendet, ne kiisto Hesekia komoswekyik che tororen ak kapkorosusiekyik, ak kolenji Juda ak Jerusalem, Osae eng’ taitab kaptisisioni eng’ Jerusalem?" 
2Kings18:23 Ara asomin anyun nguno ale, igochi kiptaiyandennyu laitoriatab Asuria kit ne iboru kayosiet, si agonin mbartanyisiek elfusiek aeng’, ngot imuchi eng’ komostang’ung’ inde bik che lanyei mbartanyisiechato." 
2Kings18:24 Imuktoi ano anyun iweech togetab kiptaiyat agenge ne ming’in eng’ otwogik tugul che bo kiptaiyandennyu, ak imang’u Misri amu karisiek ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek?" 
2Kings18:25 Ara anyun, kanyo ko magimi ak Jehovah anyo abar oli, ang’em? Kolenja Jehovah, Togoste bar emoni, ak ing’em." 
2Kings18:26 Kolenji anyun Eliakim weritab Hilkia, ak Sebna, ak Joa, Rabsake, Asomin ale, ng’alalji otwogiguk eng’ kutitab Suria; amu kigase: mat ing’alalwech eng’ kutitab Yahudik, kogasei bik che mi irimet barak." 
2Kings18:27 Ago kilenji Rabsake ichek, Kagoyokwa kiptaiyandennyu anyo oldab kiptaiyandeng’ung’, ak oldang’ung’, si kobiit amwa ng’alechu? Tos ma iyokwa anyo oldab bichu iburi eng’ irimet barak, si koam ng’atatekwak, ak koee beekwak kobotok?" 
2Kings18:28 Yeityo kotonon Rabsake ak komwa eng’ kutit ne o eng’ kutitab Yahudik ak kong’alal kole, Ogas okwek ng’olyotab laitoriat ne o, laitoriatab Asuria." 
2Kings18:29 Kamwa laitoriat ko u ni kole, Amongoberberak Hesekia; amu maimuchi kosoruok eng’ eunnyi." 
2Kings18:30 Amongogonok Hesekia omang’u Jehovah, kole, Soruech Jehovah iman, ak magigochin nganasanio laitoriatab Asuria." 
2Kings18:31 Amat ogas ng’alekab Hesekia: amu kamwa ko u ni laitoriatab Asuria, kole, Oyai kalyet kobota, ak omong’u obwa ole ami; ak koam chi tugul che bo sabibukyik, ak koam chi tugul che bo mogoiywennyi, ak koee chi tugul che bo beekab keringennyi;" 
2Kings18:32 agoi anyo amutak obe emet ne kergei ak emeng’wong’, emetab beek ak divaik, emetab amitwogik ak mbarenikab sabibuk, emetab mwanikab emitik ak kumik, si kobiit osopche, amobegu: amogas Hesekia, ye igoigook, kole, Soruech Jehovah." 
2Kings18:33 Tos kigobiit eng’ cheptalelisiekab bororiosiek ne kisor emennyi eng’ eutab laitoriatab Asuria? 
2Kings18:34 Mi ano cheptalelisiekab Hamat, ak che bo Arpad? Mi ano cheptalelisiekab Separbaim, ak Hena ak Iba? Tos kisor choto Samarik eng’ eunnyu?" 
2Kings18:35 Ng’o eng’ cheptalelisiek tugul che bo emotinwek, che kigosor emenywa eng’ eunnyu, kot kosor Jehovah Jerusalem eng’ eunnyu?" 
2Kings18:36 Ago kisisyo bik, ma wolji inendet ng’olyo: amu kiga ng’at laitoriat kole, Amat owolji kiy." 
2Kings18:37 Konyo anyun Eliakim weritab Hilkia, ne kibou got, ak Sebna, sirindet, ak Joa weritab Asap sirindetab tuguk che biitu, ole mi Hesekia ko kagogerer ngoroikwak, kobwa komwachi inendet ng’alekab Rabsake." 
2Kings19:1 Ak kingogas laitoriat Hesekia, kogerer ngoroikyik, ak kotugegei kuniok, ak kwo gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings19:2 Ak koyokto Eliakim, ne kibou got, ak Sebna sirindet, ak boisiekab tisiik, kotugotegei kuniok, koba ole mi Isaia maotiot, weritab Amos." 
2Kings19:2 Ak koyokto Eliakim, ne kibou got, ak Sebna sirindet, ak boisiekab tisiik, kotugotegei kuniok, koba ole mi Isaia maotiot, weritab Amos." 
2Kings19:3 Ak kilenji inendet, Kamwa Hesekia ko u ni kole, Betuni ko betutab nyalilda, ak keretab kong’, ak chubisiet: amu kait kesich lagok, ama mi kimnatet ne kesige." 
2Kings19:4 Abere imuchi kogas Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ng’alek tugul che bo Rabsake, ne kagoyok laitoriatab Asuria kiptaiyandennyi, konyo kochot Kamuktaindet ne sobei, ak koger kong’ ng’alek che kagas Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: ara anyun sa agobo bik che ng’etunotin." 
2Kings19:5 Kobwa anyun otwogikab laitoriat Hesekia ole mi Isaia. 
2Kings19:6 Ak kilenji Isaia ichek, Omwachini kiptaiyandeng’wong’ ko u ni, olenjini, Kamwa Jehovah kole, Ameiywei ng’alek che kegas, che kachubena otwogikab laitoriatab Asuria." 
2Kings19:7 Keero, andoi inendet tamirmiriet, ak kasei ng’alekab bik, ak koweek kwo emennyi; ak agoite kebar eng’ rotwetab chok eng’ emennyi." 
2Kings19:8 Koweek anyun Rabsake, ak koitita kobaregei laitoriatab Asuria ak Libna: amu kiga kas kole kikwa eng’ Lakis." 
2Kings19:9 Ak kingogas kemwaei agobo Tiraka laitoriatab Etiopia, kele, Keero, kogonyo obarge: koyokto bik kogeny koba oldab Hesekia, kolenji," 
2Kings19:10 Omwachini Hesekia, laitoriatab Juda, olenjini, Amengoberberin Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne imang’u, kolenjin, Magigoitoi Jerusalem kwo eutab laitoriatab Asuria." 
2Kings19:11 Keero, kiigas kit ne kigoyachi laitorinikab Asuria emotinwek tugul, eng’ ng’emet ne king’em ichek koges: kesorun inye?" 
2Kings19:12 Tos kisor ichek cheptalelisiekab bororiosiek, che kibar kwanisiekyuk, Gosan, ak Haran, ak Resep, ak lagokab Eden che kimi Telasar?" 
2Kings19:13 Mi ano laitoriatab Hamat, ak laitoriatab Arpad, ak laitoriatab nganasetab Separbaim, ne bo Hena, ak Iba?" 
2Kings19:14 Ak kinam Hesekia baruet eng’ eutab bik che kiga kiyok, ak kosoman: ak kitogosta Hesekia kwo gotab Jehovah, ak koiito baruanato eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Kings19:15 Ak kisa Hesekia eng’ taitab Jehovah kole, Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne tebe kerubisiek, i Kamuktaindet inye inyege, ne bo bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony; kiiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony." 
2Kings19:16 Eb it, ee Jehovah, ak igas; yat konyeguk, ee Jehovah, ak igeer; ak kas ng’alekab Senakerib, che kaiyogune chito konyo kochot Kamuktaindet ne sobei." 
2Kings19:17 Iman, Jehovah, kigobar laitorinikab Asuria bororiosiek ak emotinwekwak kowechawech," 
2Kings19:18 ak kigowirji ma kanamonikwak: amu kima ko cheptalelisiek, ago ki boisietab eunekab bik, ketik ak koik; king’em anyun ichek tuguchoto amu noto." 
2Kings19:19 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, asain ale soruech eng’ eunnyi, si konai bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony kole i Jehovah Kamuktaindet, inye inyege." 
2Kings19:20 Koyokto anyun Isaia weritab Amos chito kwo oldab Hesekia, kolenji, Kamwa Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ko u ye kaisaa agobo Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria, ko kaagasin." 
2Kings19:20 Koyokto anyun Isaia weritab Amos chito kwo oldab Hesekia, kolenji, Kamwa Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ko u ye kaisaa agobo Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria, ko kaagasin." 
2Kings19:21 Ni ng’olyot ne kagomwa Jehovah agobo inendet: Kasasin bergeiyat cheptab Sion, ak kororechin kochotin: kagolelech metinnyi cheptab Jerusalem eng’ inye." 
2Kings19:22 Ng’o ne kiichot ak ichub? Ak ng’o ne kiibolji ak injurur? Noto ko Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel. 
2Kings19:23 Koichot Kiptaiyat eng’ biguk che koiyogu, ak koile, Anyone kot aitu baragutab tulonok koboto chang’indab karisiekyuk, kot aitu orit eng’ Lebanon; ak aluul taragonikyik che koen, ak biribirinikyik che kororon: ak achute komosta ne kimenyei orit inne, osnetab mbarennyi ne rurei." 
2Kings19:24 Kiabal che kima angen, ak aee, ak ateny ainosiek tugul che bo Misri eng’ keldebesaikab kelyekyuk." 
2Kings19:25 Tom igas ole kiayaite ko u noto keny, ak ayai eng’ betusiek che bo keny? Ara kaasulde nguno, si kobiit ibut nganasok che ng’ototin koek karurugutik che kiging’em." 
2Kings19:26 Kiek anyun bik che kimenyei nganasochoto, che tinyei kimnatet ne ming’in, kimeiyo mugulelwekwak ak kokwong’io; kiigei suswekab kewet, ak koigei sogek che ng’orng’or, ak koigei suswek che mi gorik barak, ak ko u bek che kilalyo kotom koeegitu." 
2Kings19:27 Ago angen kabuureng’ung’, ak mandaeng’ung’, ak nyonuneng’ung’ ne inyone go, ak neregeguk che koromen agobo ane." 
2Kings19:28 Amu neregeguk che koromen agobo ane, ak amu kogoit itikyuk loseng’ung’ ne bo ge, andoi anyun kombet serung’ung’, ak ande karnennyu kuting’ung’, ak aweechin ibun oret ne kebunu." 
2Kings19:29 Ak egu ni kaborunet ne kiborun: oame eng’ kenyini che bitos ichegei, ak oam eng’ kenyitab aeng’ che siegune choto; ak eng’ kenyitab somok, ogol, ak oges, ak omin ketikab sabibuk, ak oam logoekwak." 
2Kings19:30 Ak bitos kogeny kobendi ng’ony tigitikab che ng’etu che chilildos che bo gotab Juda, ak koiyo logoek eng’ barak." 
2Kings19:31 Amu mandoi eng’ Jerusalem che kang’et, ak chilildos eng’ tulwetab Sion: yaei nito kagiiletab ge ne bo Jehovah." 
2Kings19:32 Mwaei anyun Jehovah agobo laitoriatab Asuria, kole, Maitu inendet nganasani, ama mwogei yoto eng’ kipchabet, ama nyonei tainnyi kotinyei long’et, ama wasyin ng’ung’unyek." 
2Kings19:33 Weegegei oret ne kibunu, ama itu nganasani, mwaei Jehovah." 
2Kings19:34 Amu aribe nganasani, asoru, agobo ane, ak agobo Daudi otwogindennyu." 
2Kings19:35 Ak kimanda malaikaiyatab Jehovah kemounoto, ak kobar bik elfusiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak mut eng’ nganasetab Asuriek: ak kingong’eetyo bik karon, ogeero, ki muswek tugul, che kogobek." 
2Kings19:36 Kwo anyun Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria, koweek ak kwo komeny Ninebe." 
2Kings19:37 Ak ye kita kosaei eng’ gotab Nisrok kanamwennyi, kobar inendet Adramelek ak Sareser eng’ rotwetab chok: ak komwei koba emetab Ararat. Ak kilaitoran Esarhadon werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings20:1 Kimian Hesekia eng’ betusiechoto kot ko negit kome. Ak kinyo ole mi inendet Isaia maotiot weritab Amos, ak kolenji inendet, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Rarji ket bikab gong’ung’; amu imee, mesobe." 
2Kings20:1 Kimian Hesekia eng’ betusiechoto kot ko negit kome. Ak kinyo ole mi inendet Isaia maotiot weritab Amos, ak kolenji inendet, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Rarji ket bikab gong’ung’; amu imee, mesobe." 
2Kings20:2 Kowelel anyun togennyi kogeer inat, ak kosa Jehovah, kole," 
2Kings20:3 Ee Jehovah, asain ale, ibwat ole kiatepte eng’ imanda eng’ taing’ung’, ak eng’ muguleldo ne igesunotgei, ak ayai ne mie eng’ taing’ung’. Ak kirir Hesekia eng’ ng’wanindo." 
2Kings20:4 Ak ye kitomo koit Isaia kwenutab nganaset, konyonji inendet ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenji," 
2Kings20:5 Weege kogeny, ak ilenji Hesekia bounindetab bikyuk, Kamwa Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwandang’ung’ Daudi, ko u ni kole, Kaagas saeng’ung’, kaageer beeguk bo kong’: keero, asoobin: itogostoi gotab Jehovah eng’ betutab somok." 
2Kings20:6 Ak atesyini betusieguk kenyisiek taman ak mut; ak asorun koboto nganasani eng’ eunekab laitoriatab Asuria; ak aribe nganasani agobo ane, ak agobo otwogindennyu Daudi." 
2Kings20:7 Ak kile Isaia, Oib makatiat ne bo logoekab mogoonik. Koib anyun ak konde ole kimi miando ne u ondiriet, ak kisob." 
2Kings20:8 Ak kilenji Hesekia Isaia, Nee kaborunet ne iboru kole isooba Jehovah, si atogosta gotab Jehovah eng’ betutab somok?" 
2Kings20:9 Ak kimwa Isaia kole, Egu kii kaborunet ne bunu Jehovah, ne iborun kole yaei Jehovah kit ne kamwa: wa uruet tai tilutik taman, anan wa let tilutik taman?" 
2Kings20:10 Ak kimwa Hesekia kole, Kit ne nyamnyum eng’ uruet kwo tai tilutik taman: achicha, ingoweek uruet kwo let tilutik taman:" 
2Kings20:11 Ak kirirji maotiot Isaia Jehovah: ak kiweech uruet kwo let tilutik taman, eng’ che kiga korekto eng’ kit ne kirogendoe saisiek ne bo Ahas." 
2Kings20:12 Kiiyokyi Berodak-baladan weritab Baladan, laitoriatab Babulon, baronok ak kagochinet Hesekia eng’ betusiechoto: amu kiga kogas kole kigomian Hesekia." 
2Kings20:13 Ak kigas Hesekia ichek, ak koborji ichek got tugul ne bo tugukyik che bo kamanutiet ne o, feda, ak tahabu, ak nyamdutik, ak mwanik che bo kamanutiet ne o, ak gotab karikyik che bo luget, ak tuguk tugul che kimi ole mi konoraikyik: ma ng’et kiy eng’ gonnyi anan ko bounatennyi tugul ne ma iborji Hesekia ichek." 
2Kings20:14 Konyo anyun Isaia maotiot ole mi laitoriat Hesekia, ak kolenji, Kale nee bichu? Ak kobwanei oldang’ung’ kobunu ano? Ak kile Hesekia, Kabunu emet ne loo, kobunu Babulon." 
2Kings20:15 Ak kile inendet, Kagogeer nee eng’ gong’ung’? Ak kowol Hesekia kole, Kagogeer tuguk tugul che mi gonnyu: ma ng’et kiy eng’ konoraikyuk ne ma aborji." 
2Kings20:16 Ak kilenji Isaia Hesekia, Kas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
2Kings20:17 Keero, bwanei betusiek, che tun kiibei tuguk tugul che mi gong’ung’ koba Babulon, ak tuguk tugul che kigonor kwanisieguk agoi ra: mami kiy ne ng’etu, mwaei Jehovah." 
2Kings20:18 Ak komuti alak eng’ weriguk che mong’unenen, che isiche; ak koba koek ichek che kigimoch eng’ gotab laitoriatab Babulon." 
2Kings20:19 Kolenji anyun Hesekia Isaia, Mie ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kemwa. Komwa kogeny kole, Tos ma mie koteb ko u noto, katai komi kalyet ak imanda eng’ betusiekyuk?" 
2Kings20:20 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Hesekia, ak kimnatennyi tugul, ak ole kiyaita tamboiyot ak kererjet ak koib beek koba nganaset, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings20:21 Ak kiru Hesekia koboto kwanisiekyik: ak kilaitoran Manase werinnyi kogeer inendet. 
2Kings21:1 Ki bo kenyisiek taman ak aeng’ Manase ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek konom ak mut eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Hepsi-ba. 
2Kings21:2 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, kosub tuguk che kiwechei che bo bororiosiek, che kion Jehovah eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
2Kings21:3 Amu kiteech kogeny komoswek che tororen che kiga kobut Hesekia kwandanyi; ak kiteekyi Baal kapkorosusiek, ak koyai Asera ko u ye kiga yai Ahab laitoriatab Israel, ak kogutung’ji tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet, ak koot." 
2Kings21:4 Ak kiteech kapkorosusiek eng’ gotab Jehovah ne kimwa Jehovah agobo goyoto kole, Andoi kainennyu Jerusalem." 
2Kings21:5 Ak kiteekyi kapkorosusiek tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet eng’ seremusiek tuwai che bo gotab Jehovah. 
2Kings21:6 Ak kiigoito werinnyi kobun mat, ak kong’orso, ak koboisie bonisiet, ak kobois koboto bik che boisie oik, ak bonik: kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, kotach inendet konerech." 
2Kings21:7 Ak kiinde kanamwetab Asera ne kigiwai, ne kiga koyai, got ne kiga mwachi Jehovah Daudi ak werinnyi Solomon, kolenji, Andoi kainennyu koigeny goi ak Jerusalem, ne kialewen eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel:" 
2Kings21:8 ama agochini kelyekab Israel koombenot kogeny koba eng’ emet ne kiagochi kwanisiekwak; ngot korib koyai ko u tugul che kiang’at ichek, ko u ng’atutiet tugul ne king’at otwogindennyu Musa ichek." 
2Kings21:9 Ago ma kas: ak kiichuut Manase ichek koyai yaitiet kosiir ne kiyai bororiosiek, che kibar Jehovah eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
2Kings21:10 Ak king’alal Jehovah eng’ otwogikyik maotik kole," 
2Kings21:11 Amu kogoyai Manase laitoriatab Juda tuguchu kiwechei, ak koyai yaitiet kosiir tugul che kiyai Amorik, che kimi eng’ tai, ko tom kobiit inendet, ak kogochi Juda agine koyai tengekto eng’ kanamonikyik:" 
2Kings21:12 ko kamwa anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel ko u ni kole, Keero, aibu yaitiet konyo Jerusalem ak Juda, kot kotildilyo itik tuwai eng’ chi age tugul ne kagas." 
2Kings21:13 Ak aiitoi anwetab Samaria kobun Jerusalem, koboto kit ne kikwaise ne bo gotab Ahab: ak abuchi Jerusalem ko u ye ibuchi chito sanit, ye ibuchi ak kogabui." 
2Kings21:14 Ak atoortoi che kang’et che bo borotennyu, ak ande ichek eunekab bunikwak; ak koek luulenik che luulei bunikwak tugul;" 
2Kings21:15 amu kigoyai yaitiet eng’ tainnyu, ak kigotacha anerech, koboch betut ne kimong’u kwanisiekwak eng’ Misri, agoi rani." 
2Kings21:16 Ak kitumda kogeny Manase korotik che chang’ kot, che matinyei tengek, kot konyiit Jerusalem kong’eete komosta age agoi komosta age; koboto tengektanyi ne kiibeete Juda si koyai tengekto, eng’ yaitiet ne kiyai eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Kings21:17 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Manase, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ak tengektanyi ne kiyai, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings21:18 Ak kiru Manase koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi mbaretab gonnyi, eng’ mbaretab Usa: ak kilaitoran Amon werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings21:19 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak aeng’ Amon ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek aeng’ eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Mesulemet cheptab Harus ne bo Jotba. 
2Kings21:20 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u ye kiga yai Manase kwandanyi." 
2Kings21:21 Ak kiwendote ortinwek tugul che kiwendote kwandanyi, ak koot kanamonik che kiotei kwandanyi, ak kogutung’ji:" 
2Kings21:22 ak kometo Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyik, ama isub ortinwekab Jehovah." 
2Kings21:23 Ak kichaam otwogikyik Amon, ak kobar otwogichoto laitoriat eng’ gonnyi." 
2Kings21:24 Ago kibar bikab emet ichek tugul che kichaamei laitoriat Amon; ak kiyai bikab emet Josia werinnyi koek laitoriat. 
2Kings21:25 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Amon che kiyai, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings21:26 Ak kigitupchi kererinnyi eng’ mbaretab Usa: ak kilaitoran Josia werinnyi kogeer inendet. 
2Kings22:1 Ki bo kenyisiek sisiit Josia ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek sosom ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Jedida cheptab Adaia ne bo Boskat. 
2Kings22:2 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kowendote ortinwek tugul che bo Daudi kwandanyi, ama masta kwo tai anan ko katam." 
2Kings22:3 Ak eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo Josia, koyokto laitoriat Sapan weritab Asalia, weritab Mesulam, sirindet, kwo gotab Jehovah, kolenji," 
2Kings22:4 Togoste oldab Hilkia, tisiindet ne o, ilenji koiit fedaisiek che kigeib kobwa gotab Jehovah che kigoyum eng’ bik ribikab kurget:" 
2Kings22:5 ak ingogochi kiboitinikyik che boisiei eng’ gotab Jehovah, che ribei: ak ingogochi kiboitinik che mi gotab Jehovah, si koteech ole kigobutok eng’ got;" 
2Kings22:6 ak kogochi musogik che bo baoinik, ak teegik, ak bik che waei koik; ak koalei baoinik ak koik che waatin, che kiteege got ole kigobutok." 
2Kings22:7 Ago ma kiit fedaisiek che kiga kigochi bichoto; amu kiboisiei eng’ imanda. 
2Kings22:8 Ak kilenji Hilkia tisiindet ne o Sapan sirindet, Koanyoru bukuitab Ng’atutik eng’ gotab Jehovah. Ak kiigochi Hilkia Sapan bukuinoto, ak kisoman." 
2Kings22:9 Ak kinyo Sapan sirindet oldab laitoriat, ak koipchi laitoriat ng’olyot kogeny, ak kole, Kogogesta otwogiguk fedaisiek che kimi got, ak kogochi kiboitinik che ribei gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings22:10 Ak kimwachi Sapan sirindet laitoriat, kolenji, Kagona Hilkia tisiindet bukuit. Ak kisoman Sapan eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
2Kings22:11 Ak kingogas laitoriat ng’alekab bukuitab Ng’atutik, kogerer ngoroikyik." 
2Kings22:12 Ak king’at laitoriat Hilkia tisiindet, ak Aikam weritab Sapan, ak Akbor weritab Mikaia, koboto Sapan sirindet, ak Asaia otwogindetab laitoriat, kolenji," 
2Kings22:13 Oba, oteebwa eng’ Jehovah, ak agobo bik, ak agobo Juda komugul, agobo ng’alekab bukuini kaginyor: amu eechen neregekab Jehovah che laldos agobo achek, amu ma kas it kwanisiekyok ng’alekab bukuini, koyai ko u tugul che kigisir agobo achek." 
2Kings22:14 Koba anyun Hilkia tisiindet, ak Aikam, koboto Akbor, ak Sapan, ak Asaia, oldab Hulda ne maotiot, osotiotab Salum weritab Tikba, weritab Haras, ne ribei ngoroik; (kimenyei kwonyoto Jerusalem kebebertab aeng’;) ak king’alal ichek koboto inendet." 
2Kings22:15 Ak kimwachi ichek kolenji, Kamwa Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Olenji chicho kaiyokwok obwa oldanyua," 
2Kings22:16 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Keero, aibu yaitiet konyo koroni, ak konyonji bik che menyei koronito, ee, ng’alek tugul che bo bukuinoto kasomani laitoriatab Juda:" 
2Kings22:17 amu kimetaa, ak kobeelji nyamdutik cheptalelisiek, si kotacha anerech eng’ boisionikwak tugul che bo eunekwak; eng’ noto anyun, kolaldos neregekyuk agobo koroni, ama kimisi." 
2Kings22:18 Ago omwachini laitoriatab Juda, ne kaiyokwok obwa oteepse Jehovah, olenjini, Kale Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel: agobo ng’alecho kegas," 
2Kings22:19 amu kang’arng’arit muguleldang’ung’, ak iming’inge eng’ taitab Jehovah, ye kangigas kit ne kiamwa agobo koroni, ak agobo bik che menyei koronito, ale egu karaita ak chubet, ak amu kegerer ngoroiguk ak irir eng’ tainnyu; kaagasin agane, mwaei Jehovah." 
2Kings22:20 Ara anyun, keero, ayumin iwe ole mi kwanisieguk, ak kiyumin iwe ketering’ung’ eng’ kalyet, ama keerei konyeguk yaitionoto tugul aipchini koroni. Ak kiipchi ng’olyot laitoriat kogeny." 
2Kings23:1 Ak kiiyokto laitoriat, kiyumji inendet boisiek tugul che bo Juda ak che bo Jerusalem." 
2Kings23:2 Ak kitogosta laitoriat gotab Jehovah, koboto bik tugul che bo Juda ak bik tugul che kimenyei Jerusalem, ak tisiik, ak maotik, koboto bik tugul, che mengech ak che eechen: ak kisoman ng’alek tugul che bo bukuitab arorutiet ne kiginyoru eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings23:3 Ak kitonon laitoriat eng’ ye bo toloita, ak koyai arorutiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, kosub Jehovah, ak korib ng’atutikyik, ak baornatosiekyik, ak kayomisutikyik, eng’ muguleldanyi tugul, ak sobondanyi tugul, kogimit ng’alekab arorutioni che kigisirji bukuini: ak kitononso bik tugul koyan arorutionoto." 
2Kings23:4 Ak king’at laitoriat Hilkia tisiindet ne o, ak tisiik che rubei ne bo tai, ak ribikab kurget, koib komong’ eng’ hekalutab Jehovah terenik tugul che kigiyachin Baal, ak che bo Asera, ak che bo tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet: ak kibeel eng’ Jerusalem sang’ eng’ mbaretab Kidron, ak koib orek koba Bet-el." 
2Kings23:5 Ak kiisto tisiikab kanamonik, che kiga konde laitorinikab Juda, kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ komoswek che tororen eng’ nganasokab Juda, ak eng’ komoswek che kiyiem Jerusalem, koboto ichek che kibeeljin Baal nyamdutik, ak asista, ak arawet, ak kecheik che eechen, ak tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet." 
2Kings23:6 Ak kiib Asera komong’ eng’ gotab Jehovah, koib komanda eng’ Jerusalem, agoi kererutab Kidron, ak kobeel eng’ kererutab Kidron, ak kotuatui komengegitu koek busbusik, ak koseer koba kererisiekab bik." 
2Kings23:7 Ak kibut gorikab sodomik, che kimi gotab Jehovah, ole kiyae kwonyik ngoroik che songinindos che bo Asera." 
2Kings23:8 Ak kiimut inendet tisiik tugul komong’ eng’ nganasokab Juda, ak kong’wanit komoswek che tororen ole kibeele tisiik nyamdutik, koboch Geba agoi Beer-seba; ak kibut komoswek che tororen che bo ormarichok che kimi ye kimandoe eng’ ormarichetab Josua bounindetab nganaset, che kimi komostab katam eng’ ormarichetab nganaset." 
2Kings23:9 Ago ma togos tisiikab komoswek che tororen kobwa ye mitei kaptisisietab Jehovah eng’ Jerusalem, ago kiamei makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekwak." 
2Kings23:10 Ak kiing’wanit Topet, ne mi atebwetab lagokab Hinom, si ma igoito chi werinnyi anan ko cheptanyi kobun mat kogochi Molek." 
2Kings23:11 Ak kiisto mnbartanyisiek che kiga kogochi laitorinikab Juda asista, eng’ ye kimandoe kebendi gotab Jehovah, ye negite gotab Natan-melek ribindet, ne mi serem; ak kibeel karisiek che bo asista eng’ mat." 
2Kings23:12 Ak kibut laitoriat kapkorosusiek, che kimi got barak eng’ got ne tabonu barak ne bo Ahas, che kiga koyai laitorinikab Juda, ak kapkorosusiek che kiga koyai Manase eng’ seremusiek tuwai che bo gotab Jehovah ak kotuatui koturur, ak koseer koba kererutab Kidron." 
2Kings23:13 Ak kiing’wanit laitoriat komoswek che tororen che kimi taitab Jerusalem, che kimi eutab tai ne bo tulwetab ng’emisiet, ne kiga teekyi Solomon laitoriatab Israel Astoret ne kiwechei ne bo Sidonik, koboto Kemos ne kiwechei ne bo Moab, ak Milkom ne kiwechei ne bo lagokab Amon." 
2Kings23:14 Ak kituatui tolochik, ak koeb Aserik koluul, ak kiinyiit oloto kowekab bik." 
2Kings23:15 Ak kibut kapkorosut ne kimi Bet-el, ak komosta ne toror ne kiga koyai Jeroboam weritab Nebat, ne kiigochi Israel koyai tengekto, kibut kapkorosunoto ak komosta ne toror; ak kibeel komosta ne toror, ak kotuatui koek busbusik, ak kobeel Asera." 
2Kings23:16 Ak kingowelelgei Josia, kogeer kererisiek che kimi tulwet; ak koyokto bik koba koib kowek eng’ kererisiechoto, konyo kobeel eng’ kapkorosunoto, ak kong’wanit, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kimwaita chitab Kamuktaindet, ne kimwaitoi tuguchoto." 
2Kings23:17 Ak kiteeb kole, Nee kio bo kabwatet no ogeere? Ak kimwachi bikab nganaset inendet kolenji, Kereritab chitab Kamuktaindet, ne kibunu Juda, ne kinyo komwaita tuguchuto kaiyai iyachi kapkorosutab Bet-el." 
2Kings23:18 Ak kile, Obagakte; amat koisto chi kowekyik. Kobagakta anyun kowekyik, koboto kowekab maotiot ne kibunu Samaria." 
2Kings23:19 Ak kiisto Josia gorik tugul che bo komoswek che tororen che kimi nganasokab Samaria, che kiga koteech laitorinikab Israel kotage Jehovah konerech, ak koyachi choto ko u tugul che kiga koyachi che kimi Bet-el." 
2Kings23:20 Ak kibar tisiik tugul che bo komoswek che tororen che kimi yoto, eng’ kapkorosusiek, ak kobeel kowekab bik eng’ baragunywa; ak koweek kwo Jerusalem." 
2Kings23:21 Ak king’at laitoriat bik tugul kolenji, Oripchi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ paska, ko u ye kigisir eng’ bukuini bo arorutiet." 
2Kings23:22 Iman, kimata keyai paska ne u noto koboch betusiekab kiruogik che kiiruokyin Israel, anan eng’ betusiek tugul che bo laitorinikab Israel, anan che bo laitorinikab Juda;" 
2Kings23:23 ago kigiyai paska nito eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo laitoriat Josia, keyachi Jehovah eng’ Jerusal" 
2Kings23:24 Ago kiisto Josia ichek che kiboisie oik, ak bonik, ak terapik, ak kanamonik, ak tuguk tugul che kiwechei che kigigeerei eng’ emetab Juda ak eng’ Jerusalem, si kobiit kogimit ng’alekab Ng’atutik che kiga kisir eng’ bukuit ne kinyor Hilkia tisiindet eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
2Kings23:25 Ak kima biit eng’ tai laitoriat ne kergei ak inendet, ne kiisub Jehovah eng’ muguleldanyi tugul, ak eng’ sobondanyi tugul, ak eng’ kamugennyi tugul, ko u Ng’atutik tugul che bo Musa; amata kobiit eng’ let laitoriat age ne u inendet." 
2Kings23:26 Agot nganda u noto ko ma meto Jehovah koromnatetab neregekyik che eechen, che kiga nerekyine Juda, amu tagisiet tugul ne kitach Manase inendet." 
2Kings23:27 Ak kile Jehovah, Aistoi Juda agine eng’ tainnyu, ko u ye kiaiste Israel, ak amete nganasani kialewen, Jerusalem, koboto got ne kiale, Tebe kainennyu yoto." 
2Kings23:28 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Josia, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings23:29 Kitogosta Parao-neko laitoriatab Misri eng’ betusiekab Josia kobokyi laitoriatab Asuria, eng’ ainetab Euprate: ak kwo laitoriat Josia kwo kobargei ak inendet; ak kibar laitoriandanato Josia eng’ Megido, ye kingogeer inendet." 
2Kings23:30 Ak kila inendet otwogikyik eng’ karit eng’ Megido ko kagome, ak koloo inendet konyo Jerusalem, ak kotupchi inendet kererinnyi. Ak kiimut bikab emet Jeoahas weritab Josia, ak koiil inendet, ak koyai inendet koek laitoriat, kogeer kwandanyi." 
2Kings23:31 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak somok Jeoahas ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran arawek somok eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Hamutal cheptab Jeremia ne bo Libna. 
2Kings23:32 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah ko u tugul che kiga yai kwanisiekyik. 
2Kings23:33 Ak kirat Parao-neko inendet eng’ Ribla eng’ emetab Hamat, si malaitoran eng’ Jerusalem, ak king’at emet kogon aisurut, talentaisiek bogol che bo feda, ak talentait agenge ne bo tahabu." 
2Kings23:34 Ak kiyai Parao-neko Eliakim weritab Josia koek laitoriat kogeer Josia kwandanyi, ak kiwal kainennyi koek Jeoiakim: ago kiimut Jeoahas koisto, ak kinyo Misri, ak kinyo kome eng’ oloto." 
2Kings23:35 Ak kiigochi Jeoiakim feda ak tahabu Parao; ago king’at emet kogon fedaisiek ko u ng’atutietab Parao: kimage feda ak tahabu bik che bo emet, chi age tugul ko u ye kiging’at, si kogochi Parao-neko." 
2Kings23:36 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak mut Jeoiakim ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Sebida cheptab Pedaia ne bo Ruma. 
2Kings23:37 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u tugul che kiga yai kwanisiekyik." 
2Kings24:1 Kitogos Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon eng’ betusiekyik, ak kiek Jeoiakim otwogindennyi kenyisiek somok: kingobata kongelelji inendet." 
2Kings24:2 Ak kiikyokyi Jehovah inendet lugosiekab Kaldeik, ak lugosiekab Suriek, ak lugosiekab Moabik, ak lugosiekab lagokab Amon, ak koyokto ichek koba Juda, kobar, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, ne kimwa eng’ otwogikyik maotik." 
2Kings24:3 Kinyo kii Juda iman eng’ ng’atutietab Jehovah, si koisto ichek koba eng’ tainnyi, amu ng’ogiswekab Manase, ko u tugul che kiyai:" 
2Kings24:4 ak agobo korotik che matinyei tengek che kitumda; amu kiinyiit Jerusalem korotik che matinyei tengek: ak kiesio Jehovah konyochi kaat. 
2Kings24:5 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jeoiakim, ak tuguk tugul che kiyai, ko ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Juda?" 
2Kings24:6 Koru anyun Jeoiakim koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kilaitoran Jeoiakin werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Kings24:7 Ak ki mata konyo kogeny laitoriatab Misri komong’ eng’ emennyi: amu kiga konam laitoriatab Babulon, kong’eete ainetab Misri agoi ainetab Euprate, choto tugul che ki bo laitoriatab Misri." 
2Kings24:8 Ki bo kenyisiek taman ak sisiit Jeoiakin ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran eng’ Jerusalem arawek somok: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Nehusta cheptab Elnatan ne bo Jerusalem. 
2Kings24:9 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah ko u tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi. 
2Kings24:10 Kitogos eng’ betusiechoto otwogikab Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon kobwa Jerusalem, ak kiyiem nganaset." 
2Kings24:11 Ak kinyo nganaset Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon, kota koyiemei otwogikyik;" 
2Kings24:12 ak kimanda Jeoiakin laitoriatab Juda, kwo ole mi laitoriatab Babulon, inendet ak kamennyi, ak otwogikyik, ak bounikyik, ak kiptainikyik: ak kiimut inendet laitoriatab Babulon eng’ kenyitab sisiit ne bo laitornatennyi." 
2Kings24:13 Ak kiib eng’ yoto konoraik tugul che bo gotab Jehovah, ak konoraikab gotab laitoriat, ak kotuatui terenik tugul che bo tahabu komengegitu che kiga yai Solomon laitoriatab Israel eng’ hekalutab Jehovah, ko u ye kiga mwa Jehovah." 
2Kings24:14 Ak kiimut Jerusalem tugul, ak bounik tugul, ak bik tugul che kimen che nyigonen, che ki luulenik elfusiek taman, ak musogik tugul, ak kitang’ik; mami ne king’et, kobate bik che ki kibananok mising’ che kimi emet." 
2Kings24:15 Ak kiimut Jeoiakin kwo Babulon; ak kametab laitoriat, ak osotikab laitoriat, ak kiptainikyik, ak bik che eechen che bo emet, komut inendet ichek eng’ Jerusalem koba Babulon." 
2Kings24:16 Ak bik tugul che kimen elfusiek tisab, ak musogik ak kitang’ik, kiek elfut agenge; ki kimen tugul, ak ko begechinotin eng’ luget; kiimut choto laitoriatab Babulon koluul koba Babulon." 
2Kings24:17 Ak kiyai laitoriatab Babulon Matania ng’etab kametab kwandanyi, koek laitoriat kogeer inendet, ak kowal kainennyi koek Sedekia." 
2Kings24:18 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak agenge Sedekia ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Hamutal cheptab Jeremia ne bo Libna. 
2Kings24:19 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u tugul che kiga yai Jeoiakim." 
2Kings24:20 Amu kibiitune tuguchoto neregekab Jehovah eng’ Jerusalem ak Juda, kot kotimda ichek koba eng’ tainnyi: ak kiingelelji Sedekia laitoriatab Babulon." 
2Kings25:1 Ak eng’ kenyitab sogol ne bo laitornatennyi, eng’ arawetab taman, eng’ betutab taman ne bo arawanato, konyo Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon, inendet ak lugennyi tugul, kobokyi Jerusalem, ak koteech kotokyigei nganaset; ak kiteech ichek irimoik koyiem." 
2Kings25:2 Koyiem anyun nganaset agoi kenyitab taman ak agenge ne bo laitoriat Sedekia. 
2Kings25:3 King’wanit rubet eng’ nganaset eng’ betutab sogol ne bo arawetab ang’wan, ne kima komi amitwogik che amei bik eng’ emet." 
2Kings25:4 Kobut anyun bik irimetab nganaset, ak kimwei murenik tugul che bo luget kemoi kobun oretab ormarichet ne kimi kwenutab inatusiek aeng’, ye kimi ole negite seremutab laitoriat: (kiga yiem Kaldeik nganaset:) ak kibun laitoriat oretab Araba." 
2Kings25:5 Ago kion lugetab Kaldeik laitoriat, ak kinam inendet eng’ warengosiekab Jeriko: ak kiiyesta lugennyi tugul kometo inendet." 
2Kings25:6 Komut anyun laitoriat, ak komut kwo ole mi laitoriatab Babulon eng’ Ribla; ak kiiruokyi inendet." 
2Kings25:7 Ak kibar werikab Sedekia kogeerei inendet, ak kobar konyekab Sedekia, ak korat inendet eng’ sirimwek, ak komut kwo Babulon." 
2Kings25:8 Ak kinyo Jerusalem Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik, otwogindetab laitoriatab Babulon, eng’ arawetab mut, betutab tisab, ne ki kenyitab taman ak sogol ne bo laitoriat Nebukadnesar, laitoriatab Babulon:" 
2Kings25:9 ak kibeel gotab Jehovah, ak gotab laitoriat; ak gorik tugul che bo Jerusalem, got age tugul ne o, ko kibeel eng’ mat." 
2Kings25:10 Ak kibut luget tugul ne bo Kaldeik ne kimi koboto kiptaiyatab ribik, irimosiekab Jerusalem komoswek tugul." 
2Kings25:11 Ak kiimut koluul Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik, bik che kiga ng’et eng’ nganaset, ak che kiga chililso, che kiigochigei laitoriatab Babulon, ak bikab tuiyet che kiga ng’et." 
2Kings25:12 Ago kibagakta kiptaiyatab ribik, bik che kibananok mising’ eng’ emet, koek ribikab sabibuk ak koek semberik." 
2Kings25:13 Ak kitui Kaldeik tolochikab sugunonik che kimi gotab Jehovah, ak ng’echerok che kitebe ak nyanjet ne bo sugunwet che kimi gotab Jehovah, ak koib sugunonikab tuguchoto koba Babulon." 
2Kings25:14 Ak kiib terenik, ak kechigosiek che eechen, ak magasisiek che kitile ole lalei eng’ taisiek, ak kechigosiek, ak terenik tugul che bo sugunonik che kiboisie." 
2Kings25:15 Ak tuguk che kiibe mat, ak tabok; ak kiib kiptaiyatab ribik tuguk che kigiyae tahabu, ko tahabu, ak tuguk che kigiyae feda, ko feda." 
2Kings25:16 Tolochichoto aeng’, koboto nyanjanato agenge, ak ng’echerok che kitebe, che kiga yachi Solomon gotab Jehovah; ma kimuch kenai nyigisindab sugononikab tuguchuto tugul." 
2Kings25:17 Koindab tononetab toloita agenge ko ki kakwautik taman ak sisiit che bo eut, ak kimi metitab sugunwet baragunnyi; ak koindab tononetab metoto ko ki kakwautik somok che bo eut; koboto karik che regerotin ak logoek che kimi metoto komoswek tugul, che ki bo tugul sugunonik: ak kitinyei toloita ne bo aeng’ tuguk che u choto, koboto karik che regerotin." 
2Kings25:18 Ak kiimut kiptaiyatab ribik Seraia tisiindet ne o ak Sepania tisiindet ne bo aeng’ ak ribik somok che kiribei kurget: 
2Kings25:19 ak kiimut eng’ nganaset kiptaiyat ne kibou murenikab luget; ak bik mut eng’ ichek che kigeerei togetab laitoriat, che kimi nganaset; ak sirindet, kiptaiyatab luget, ne kiiyumi bikab emet; ak bik tamanwogik lo che bo emet, che kiginyorji nganaset." 
2Kings25:20 Ak kiimut Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik bichoto, komutyi laitoriatab Babulon eng’ Ribla." 
2Kings25:21 Ak kibir laitoriatab Babulon bichoto ak kobar eng’ Ribla eng’ emetab Hamat. Kigimut anyun Juda keluul komanda eng’ emennyi. 
2Kings25:22 Kiyai Nebukadnesar Kedalia weritab Aikam weritab Sapan koek bounindetab bik che kiga ng’et eng’ emetab Juda, che kiga bagakta Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon." 
2Kings25:23 Ak kingogas kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek, icheget ak bikwak, kole kogoyai laitoriatab Babulon Gedalia koek bounindet, kobwa ole mi Gedalia eng’ Mispa, choto ko ki Ismael weritab Netania, ak Johanan weritab Karea, ak Seraia weritab Tanumet Netopatindet, ak Jaasania weritab Maakatindet, icheget ak bikwak." 
2Kings25:24 Ak kiiyosiechi ichek Gedalia ak koyosiechi bikwak, kolenji, Amoiywei amu otwogikab Kaldeik: omeny emet ak oot laitoriatatab Babulon, si komieit eng’ okwek." 
2Kings25:25 Ago kinyo eng’ arawetab tisap Ismael weritab Netania, weritab Elisama, ne bo keswekab gab laitoriat, ak kibwa ak bik taman, ak kobar Kedalia kome. Koboto Yahudik ak Kaldeik che kimi koboto inendet eng’ Mispa." 
2Kings25:26 Ak king’eetyo bik tugul che mengech ak che eechen, ak kiptainikab luget, ak kobwa Misri: amu kiiywei Kaldeik." 
2Kings25:27 Ak eng’ kenyitab sosom ak tisab ne bo luuletab Jeoiakin laitoriatab Juda, eng’ arawetab taman ak aeng’, eng’ betutab tiptem ak tisab ne bo arawanato, kotiach Ebil-merodak laitoriatab Babulon, eng’ kenyit ne kitau kolaitorane, Jeoiakin laitoriatab Juda komong’ eng’ korgoret;" 
2Kings25:28 ak king’alalji inendet eng’ rirenetab ge, ak konde ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet kotororit eng’ che bo laitorinik che kimi Babulon koboto inendet." 
2Kings25:29 Ak kiwal ngoroikyik che bo korgoret, ak kiamis eng’ tainnyi kotugul eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi." 
2Kings25:30 Ak kiigochi laitoriat inendet kotugul kebebertanyi ne bo amitwogik, kiigochin betut age tugul kebeberta ne yamei, eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adam, Set, Enos;" 
1Chronicles1:2 Kena, Maalalel, Jared;" 
1Chronicles1:3 Enok, Metusela, Lamek;" 
1Chronicles1:4 Noa, Sem, Ham, ak Japet." 
1Chronicles1:5 Werikab Japet ko: Gomer, Magog, Madai, Jaban, Tubal, Mesek, ak Tiras." 
1Chronicles1:6 Ak werikab Gomer ko: Askenas, Dipat, ak Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Ak werikab Jaban ko: Elisa, Tarsis, Kitim, ak Rodanik." 
1Chronicles1:8 Werikab Ham ko: Kus, Misraim, Put, ak Kanan." 
1Chronicles1:9 Ak werikab Kus ko: Seba, Habila, Sabta, Raama, ak Sabteka. Ak werikab Raama ko: Sheba ak Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:10 Ak kisich Kus Nimrod: kitoi koek ne nyigan eng’ ng’ony. 
1Chronicles1:11 Ak kisich Misraim Ludik, Anamik, Leabik, ak Naptuik," 
1Chronicles1:12 Patrusik, Kasluik (ne kibunu Pilistik), ak Kaptorik." 
1Chronicles1:13 Ak kisich Kanan Sidon taitanyi, ak Het;" 
1Chronicles1:14 koboto Jebusindet, Amorindet, ak Girgasindet;" 
1Chronicles1:15 koboto Hibindet, Arkindet, ak Sinindet;" 
1Chronicles1:16 ak Arbadindet, Semarindet, ak Hamatindet." 
1Chronicles1:17 Werikab Sem ko: Elam, Asur, Arpaksad, Lud, Aram, Us, Hul, Geter, ak Mesek." 
1Chronicles1:18 Ak kisich Arpaksad Shela, kisich Shela Eber." 
1Chronicles1:19 Ak kigisikyi werik aeng’ Eber: kainetab age ko ki Peleg; amu kigipchei emet eng’ betusiekyik; ak kainetab ng’etab kamet ko ki Joktan. 
1Chronicles1:20 Ak kisich Joktan Almodad, Shelep, Hasarmabet, ak Jera;" 
1Chronicles1:21 Hadoram, Usal, ak Dikla;" 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebal, Abimael, ak Sheba;" 
1Chronicles1:23 Opir, Hablia ak Jobab. Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Joktan." 
1Chronicles1:23 Opir, Hablia ak Jobab. Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Joktan." 
1Chronicles1:24 Sem, Arpaksad, Shela." 
1Chronicles1:25 Eber, Peleg, Reu;" 
1Chronicles1:26 Serug, Nahor, Tera;" 
1Chronicles1:27 Abram (noto ko Abraham). 
1Chronicles1:28 Werikab Abraham ko: Isak, ak Ismael." 
1Chronicles1:29 Chu ko ibinwekwak: taitab Ismael ko Nebaiot; korub Kedar, Adbeel, ak Mibsam," 
1Chronicles1:30 Misma, Duma, Masa; Hadad, ak Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Jetur, Napis, ak Kedema. Chuto ko werikab Ismael." 
1Chronicles1:32 Ak werikab Ketura, chebaigeiyatab Abraham: ko kisich Simram, Joksan, Medan, Midian, Isbak, ak Sua. Ak werikab Joksan ko ki: Sheba, ak Dedan." 
1Chronicles1:33 Ak werikab Midian ko ki: Epa, Eper, Hanok, Abida, ak Eldaa. Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Ak kisich Abraham Isak. Werikab Isak ko ki: Esau, ak Israel." 
1Chronicles1:35 Werikab Esau ko ki: Elipas, Reuel, Jeus, Jalam, ak Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Werikab Elipas ko ki: Teman, Omar, Sepi, Gatam, Kenas, Timna, ak Amalek." 
1Chronicles1:37 Werikab Reuel ko ki: Nahat, Sera, Sama, ak Misa." 
1Chronicles1:38 Ak werikab Seir ko ki: Lotan, Sobal, Sibeon, Ana, Dison, Eser, ak Disan." 
1Chronicles1:39 Ak werikab Lotan ko ki: Hori, ak Homam: ak Timna ko ki chepkametab Lotan." 
1Chronicles1:40 Werikab Sobal ko ki: Alian, Manahat, Ebal, Sepi ak Onam. Ak werikab Sibeon ko ki: Aia ak Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Werikab Ana ko ki: Dison. Ak werikab Dison ko ki: Hamran, Esban, Itran, ak Keran." 
1Chronicles1:42 Werikab Eser ko ki: Bilan, Saaban, ak Jaakan. Werikab Disan ko ki: Us ak Aran." 
1Chronicles1:43 Chu anyun ko ki laitorinik che kilaitoran eng’ emetab Edom, kotomo kolaitoran laitorianda eng’ lagokab Israel: Bela weritab Beor; ak kainetab nganasennyi ko ki Dinaba." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ak kime Bela, ak kilaitoran Jobab weritab Sera ne bo Bosra kogeer inendet." 
1Chronicles1:44 Ak kime Bela, ak kilaitoran Jobab weritab Sera ne bo Bosra kogeer inendet." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ak kime Jobab, ak kilaitoran Husam ne bo emetab Temanik kogeer inendet." 
1Chronicles1:45 Ak kime Jobab, ak kilaitoran Husam ne bo emetab Temanik kogeer inendet." 
1Chronicles1:46 Ak kime Hadad, ak kilaitoran Hadad weritab Bedad kogeer inendet, ne kiga bar Midian eng’ warengetab Moab: ak kainetab nganasennyi ko ki Abit." 
1Chronicles1:47 Ak kime Hadad, ak kilaitoran Samla ne bo Masreka kogeer inendet." 
1Chronicles1:48 Ak kime Samla, ak kilaitoran kogeer inendet, Shaul ne bo Rehobot ne kimi ole negite Ainet." 
1Chronicles1:49 Ak kime Shaul, ak kilaitoran Baal-hanan weritab Akbor kogeer inendet." 
1Chronicles1:50 Ak kime Baal-hanan ak kilaitoran Hadad kogeer inendet; ak kainetab nganasennyi ko ki Pai: ak kainetab osotiondennyi ko ki Meetabel cheptab Matred, cheptab Me-sahab." 
1Chronicles1:51 Ak kime Hadad. Ak kiruogikab Edom ko ki: kiruogindet Timna, kiruogindet Alia, kiruogindet Jetet;" 
1Chronicles1:52 kiruogindet Oholibama, kiruogindet Ela, kiruogindet Pinon;" 
1Chronicles1:53 kiruogindet Kenas, kiruogindet Teman, kiruogindet Mibsar;" 
1Chronicles1:54 kiruogindet Magdiel, kiruogindet Iram. Chuto ko kiruogikab Edom." 
1Chronicles2:1 Chu ko werikab Israel: Reuben, Simeon, Lawi, Juda, Isakar, ak Sebulun;" 
1Chronicles2:2 Dan, Josep, Benjamin, Naptali, Gad ak Aser." 
1Chronicles2:3 Werikab Juda ko ki: Er, Onan ak Shela: chuto somok che kisikyi inendet Bat- sua Jepkananindet. Ak Er, taitab Juda, ko ki chi ne sogoran eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kibar inendet." 
1Chronicles2:4 Ak kisikyi Tamar Juda, osotiotab werinnyi Peres ak Sera. Werikab Juda tugul ko ki mut." 
1Chronicles2:5 Werikab Peres ko ki: Hesron ak Hamul. 
1Chronicles2:6 Ak werikab Sera ko ki: Simri, Etan, Heman, Kalkol, ak Dara: ki mut tugul." 
1Chronicles2:7 Ak werikab Karmi ko ki: Aakar, ne kiinyalil Israel, ne kiyai chalwokto eng’ kit ne ki itabanat." 
1Chronicles2:8 Ak werikab Etan ko ki Asaria. 
1Chronicles2:9 Werikab Hesron agichek che kigisikyi inendet ko ki: Jerameel, Ram, ak Kelubai." 
1Chronicles2:10 Ak kisich Ram Aminadab; ak kisich Aminadab Hason, bounindetab lagokab Juda;" 
1Chronicles2:11 Ak kisich Nason Salma, ak kisich Salma Boas;" 
1Chronicles2:12 ak kisich Boas Obed, ak kisich Obed Jesii;" 
1Chronicles2:13 ak kisich Jesii taitanyi Eliab, ak Abinadab ne bo aeng’, ak Simea ne bo somok;" 
1Chronicles2:14 ak Netanel ne bo ang’wan, Radai ne bo mut;" 
1Chronicles2:15 Osem ne bo lo, Daudi ne bo tisab:" 
1Chronicles2:16 ak chepkametwogikwak ko ki Seruia ak Abigail. Ak werikab Seruia ko ki: Abisai ak Joab, ak Asael, ki somok." 
1Chronicles2:17 Ak kisich Abigail Amasa: ak kwandab Amasa ko ki Jeter Ismaelindet. 
1Chronicles2:18 Ak kisich Kaleb weritab Hesron lagok eng’ Asuba osotiondennyi, ak eng’ Jeriot: ak chu ko ki werikyik: Jeser, Sobab, ak Ardon." 
1Chronicles2:19 Ak kime Asuba, ak kiitun Kaleb Eprat, ne kisikyi inendet Hur." 
1Chronicles2:20 Ak kisich Hur Uri, ak kisich Uri Besalel." 
1Chronicles2:21 Ak kingobata choto kotun Hesron cheptab Makir kwandab Gilead; ne kiitun ye ki bo kenyisiekyik tamanwogik lo; ak kisikyi inendet Segub. 
1Chronicles2:22 Ak kisich Segub Jair, ne kitinyei nganasok tiptem ak somok eng’ emetab Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:23 Ak kireb Gesur ak Aram nganasokab Jair, koboto Kenat, ak nganasokyik, nganasok tamanwogik lo. Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Makir kwandab Gilead." 
1Chronicles2:24 Ak kingome Hesron eng’ Kaleb-eprata, kosikyi inendet Abija osotiondennyi, Ashur kwandab Tekoa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Ak werikab Jerameel taitab Hesron ko ki Ram taitanyi, ak Buna, Oren, Osem, ak Aija." 
1Chronicles2:26 Ak kitinyei Jerameel osotiot age, ne kainennyi ko ki Atara; ki kametab Onam." 
1Chronicles2:27 Ak werikab Ram taitab Jerameel ko ki: Maas, Jamin, ak Eker." 
1Chronicles2:28 Ak werikab Onam ko ki: Samai, ak Jada: ak werikab Samai ko ki: Nadab ak Abisur." 
1Chronicles2:29 Ak kainetab osotiotab Abisur ko ki Abiail; ak kisikyi inendet Aban, ak Molid." 
1Chronicles2:30 Ak werikab Nadab ko ki: Seled, ak Apaim: ago kime Seled ama sich lagok." 
1Chronicles2:31 Ak werikab Apaim ko ki: Isi. Ak werikab Isi ko ki: Sesan. Ak werikab Sesan ko ki: Alai. 
1Chronicles2:32 Ak werikab Jada ng’etab kametab Samai ko ki: Jeter, ak Jonatan: ak kime Jeter ama sich lagok." 
1Chronicles2:33 Ak werikab Jonatan ko ki: Pelet, ak Sasa. Chuto ko ki werikab Jerameel." 
1Chronicles2:34 Kima kotinyei werik Sesan, kobate tibik ichegei. Ak kitinyei Sesan otwogindet, Misrindet, ne kainennyi ko ki Jara." 
1Chronicles2:35 Ak kiigochi Sesan Jara otwogindennyi cheptanyi kotun; ak kisikyi inendet Atai. 
1Chronicles2:36 Ak kisich Atai Natan, ak kisich Natan Sabad;" 
1Chronicles2:37 ak kisich Sabad Eplal, ak kisich Eplal Obed;" 
1Chronicles2:38 ak kisich Obed Jeu, ak kisich Jeu Asaria;" 
1Chronicles2:39 ak kisich Asaria Heles, ak kisich Heles Eleasa;" 
1Chronicles2:40 ak kisich Eleasa Sismai, ak kisich Sismai Salum;" 
1Chronicles2:41 ak kisich Salum Jekamia, ak kisich Jekamia Elisama." 
1Chronicles2:42 Ak werikab Kaleb ng’etab kametab Jerameel ko ki: Mesa taitanyi, ne ki kwandab Sip; ak werikab Maresa kwandab Hebron." 
1Chronicles2:43 Ak werikab Hebron ko ki: Kora, Tapua, Rekem, ak Sema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Ak kisich Sema Raham, kwandab Jorkeam; ak kisich Rekem Samai." 
1Chronicles2:45 Ak weritab Sami ko ki Maon; ak ki Maon kwandab Bet-sut. 
1Chronicles2:46 Ak kisich Epa chebaigeiyatab Kaleb, Haran, Mosa, ak Gases: ak kisich Haran Gases." 
1Chronicles2:47 Ak werikab Jadai ko ki: Regem, Jotam, Gesan, Pelet, Epa, ak Saap." 
1Chronicles2:48 Ak kisich Maaka chebaigeiyatab Kaleb, Seber ak Tirana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Kisich agichek Saap kwandab Madmana, Seba kwandab Makbena, ak kwandab Gibea; ak cheptab Kaleb ko ki Aksa."
