1Chronicles2:50 Chu ko ki werikab Kaleb: weritab Jur, taitab Eprata, Sobal kwandab Kiriat- jearim;" 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma kwandab Bet-lehem, Harep kwandab Bet-gader." 
1Chronicles2:52 Ak kisich Sobal kwandab Kiriat-jearim, werik: Haroe ak kebebertab Menuot." 
1Chronicles2:53 Ak ortinwekab Kiriat-jearim ko: Itrik, Putik, Sumatik, ak Misraik; kibunu Soratik ak Estaolik bichoto." 
1Chronicles2:54 Werikab Salma ko: Bet-lehem, Netopatik, ak Atrot-bet-Joab, koboto kebebertab Manahatik, Sorik." 
1Chronicles2:55 Ak ortinwekab sirik che kimenyei Jabes: Tiratik, Simeatik, Sukatik. Chuto ko Kenik che kibunu Hamat, kwandab gotab Rekab." 
1Chronicles3:1 Chu anyun ko ki werikab Daudi, che kigisikyi inendet eng’ Hebron: taita ko ki Amnon, ne kisich Ainoam Jesreelindet; ne bo aeng’ ko ki Daniel, ne kisich Abigail Jepkarmelyot;" 
1Chronicles3:1 Chu anyun ko ki werikab Daudi, che kigisikyi inendet eng’ Hebron: taita ko ki Amnon, ne kisich Ainoam Jesreelindet; ne bo aeng’ ko ki Daniel, ne kisich Abigail Jepkarmelyot;" 
1Chronicles3:2 ne bo somok ko ki Absalom, weritab Maaka cheptab Talmai laitoriatab Gesur; ne bo ang’wan ko ki Adonija, weritab Hagit;" 
1Chronicles3:3 ne bo mut ko ki Sepatia, ne bo Abital; ne bo lo ko ki Itream ne kisichei Egla osotiondennyi." 
1Chronicles3:4 Kigisikyi lo eng’ Hebron; ak kilaitoran eng’ oloto kenyisiek tisab ak arawek lo: ak kilaitoran eng’ Jerusalem kenyisiek sosom ak somok. 
1Chronicles3:5 Ak kigisikyi chu inendet eng’ Jerusalem: Simea, Sobab, Natan, ak Solomon, chuto ang’wan che kisichei Bat-sua cheptab Amiel:" 
1Chronicles3:6 ak Ibar, Elisama, ak Elipelet;" 
1Chronicles3:7 ak Noga, Nepeg, ak Japia;" 
1Chronicles3:8 ak Elisama, Eliada, ak Elipelet, chuto sogol." 
1Chronicles3:9 Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Daudi, ko ma boto werikab chebaigeinik; ak ki chepkamenywa Tamar." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ak weritab Solomon ko ki Reoboam, Abija werinnyi, Asa werinnyi, Jeosapat werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles3:11 Joram werinnyi, Aasia werinnyi, Joas werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles3:12 Amasia werinnyi, Asaria werinnyi, Jotam werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles3:13 Ahas werinnyi, Hesekia werinnyi, Manase werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles3:14 Amon werinnyi, Josia werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles3:15 ak werikab Josia ko ki: taita ko ki Johanan, ne bo aeng’ ko ki Jeoiakim, ne bo somok ko ki Sedekia, ne bo ang’wan ko ki Salum." 
1Chronicles3:16 Ak werikab Jeoiakim ko ki: Jekonia werinnyi, Sedekia werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles3:17 ak werikab Jekonia luulenet ko ki: Sealtiel werinnyi," 
1Chronicles3:18 ak Malkiram, Pedaia, Senasar, Jekamia, Hosama, ak Nedabia." 
1Chronicles3:19 Ak werikab Pedaia ko ki: Serubabel, ak Simei: ak werikab Serubabel ko ki Mesulam, ak Hanania; ak Selomit ko ki chepkamenywa:" 
1Chronicles3:20 ak Asuba, Ohel, Berekia, Hasadia, ak Jusab-hesed, chuto mut." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ak werikab Hanania ko ki: Pelatia, ak Jesaia: werikab Repaia, werikab Arnan, werikab Obadia, werikab Sekania." 
1Chronicles3:22 Ak werikab Sekania ko ki: Semaia: ak werikab Semaia ko ki: Hatus, Igal, Baria, Nearia, ak Sapat, chuto lo." 
1Chronicles3:23 Ak werikab Nearia ko ki: Elioenai, Hiskia, ak Asrikam, chuto somok." 
1Chronicles3:24 Ak werikab Elioenai ko ki: Hodabia, Eliasib, Pelaia, Akub, Johanan, Delaia, ak Anani, chuto tisab." 
1Chronicles4:1 Werikab Juda ko ki: Peres, Hesnon, Karmi, Hur, ak Sobal." 
1Chronicles4:2 Ak kisich Reaia weritab Sobal, Jahat; ak kisich Jahat Aumai ak Lahad. Chuto ko ortinwekab Soratik." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ak chu ko ki werikab kwandab Etam: Jesreel, Isma, Idbas: ak kainetab chepkamenywa ko ki Hasalelponi:" 
1Chronicles4:4 ak Penuel kwandab Gedor, ak Eser kwandab Husa. Chu ko werikab Hur, taitab Eprata, kwandab Bet-lehem." 
1Chronicles4:5 Ak kitinyei osotik aeng’ Ashur kwandab Tekoa, Hela, ak Naara." 
1Chronicles4:6 Ak kisikyi inendet Naara Ausam, Eper, Temeni, ak Hastari. Chu ko ki werikab Naara." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ak werikab Hela ko ki Seret, Isar, ak Etnan." 
1Chronicles4:8 Ak kisich Hakos Anub, ak Sobeba, ak ortinwekab Aharel weritab Harum." 
1Chronicles4:9 Ak ki konyitot Jabes kosiir tupchosiekyik: ak kiguure kamennyi inendet Jabes, kole, Amu kiasich inendet eng’ arogenet." 
1Chronicles4:10 Ak kiguur Jabes Kamuktaindetab Israel, kolenji, Mie iberura iman, ak ites kiwotennyu, ak ingotebi eung’ung’ kobota, ak iriba eng’ yaitiet, si ma aorogen! Ak kiigochi Kamuktaindet inendet tuguk che kiga som." 
1Chronicles4:11 Ak kisich Kelub ng’etab kametab Sua, Meir, ne ki kwandab Eston." 
1Chronicles4:12 Ak kisich Eston Bet-rapa, ak Pasea, ak Teina kwandab Irnaas. Choto ko bikab Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Ak werikab Kenas ko ki: Otniel, ak Seraia: ak werikab Otniel ko ki: Hatat." 
1Chronicles4:14 Ak kisich Meonotai Opra: ak kisich Seraia Joab kwandab Ge-arasik; amu ki musogik. 
1Chronicles4:15 Ak werikab Kaleb weritab Jepune ko ki: Iru, Ela, ak Naam: ak werikab Ela: ak Kenas." 
1Chronicles4:16 Ak werikab Jealelel ko ki: Sip, Sipa, Tiria, ak Asarel." 
1Chronicles4:17 Ak werikab Esrah ko ki: Jeter, Mered, Eper, ak Jalon: ak kisich Miriam, ak Samai, ak Isba kwandab Estemoa." 
1Chronicles4:18 Ak kisich osotiondennyi Jebyahudiot Jered kwandab Gedor, ak Heber kwandab Soko, ak Jekutiel kwandab Sanoa. Ak chu werikab Bitia cheptab Parao, ne kiitun Mered." 
1Chronicles4:19 Ak werikab osotiotab Hodia, chepkametab Naham, ko ki kwandab Keila Garmindet, ak Estemoa Maakatindet." 
1Chronicles4:20 Ak werikab Shimon ko ki: Amnon, Rina, Ben-hanan, ak Tilon. Ak werikab Isi ko ki: Sohet, ak Ben-sohet." 
1Chronicles4:21 Werikab Shela weritab Juda ko ki: Er kwandab Leka, ak Laada kwandab Maresa, ak ortinwekab gotab icheget che kinabei katanit ne kararan, che bo gotab Asbea;" 
1Chronicles4:22 koboto Jokim, ak murenikab Koseba, Joas, ak Sarap, ne kibou Moab, ak Jasubi-lehem. Ak bo keny ng’alechuto kigisir." 
1Chronicles4:23 Chu ko ki cheptereninik, ak bik che kimenyei Netaim ak Gedera: kimenyei oloto koboto laitoriat agobo boisiennyi." 
1Chronicles4:24 Werikab Simeon ko ki: Nemuel, Jamin, Jarib, Sera, ak Shaul:" 
1Chronicles4:25 Salum werinnyi, Mibsam werinnyi, Misma werinnyi." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ak werikab Misma ko ki: Hamuel werinnyi, Sakur werinnyi, Simei werinnyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Ak kisich Simei werik taman ak lo ak tibik lo; ago kima kotinyei tupchosiekyik lagok che chang’, amatesak orenywa ko u lagokab Juda." 
1Chronicles4:28 Ak kimeny Beer-seba, Molada, ak Hasarsual;" 
1Chronicles4:29 ak Bila, Esem, ak Tolad;" 
1Chronicles4:30 ak Betuel, Horma, Siklag’" 
1Chronicles4:31 ak Bet-markabot, Hasar-susim, Bet-biri, ak Saaraim. Chuto nganasokwak agoi laitornatetab Daudi." 
1Chronicles4:32 Ak nganasokwak che mengechen ko ki Etam, Ain, Rimon, Token, ak Asan, nganasok mut:" 
1Chronicles4:33 koboto nganasokwak tugul che mengechen che kigayiem nganasochoto, agoi Baal. Chu ko ki komoswekwak che kimenyei, ak tinyei tetutikab ibinwekwak che kigosiirto." 
1Chronicles4:34 Ak Mesobab, Jamlek, ak Josa weritab Amasia;" 
1Chronicles4:35 ak Joel, ak Jeu weritab Josibia, weritab Seraia, weritab Asiel;" 
1Chronicles4:35 ak Joel, ak Jeu weritab Josibia, weritab Seraia, weritab Asiel;" 
1Chronicles4:36 ak Elioenai, Jaakoba, Jesohaia, Asaia, Adiel, Jesimiel, ak Benaia;" 
1Chronicles4:37 ak Sisa weritab Sipi, weritab Alon, weritab Jedaia, weritab Simri, weritab Semaia;" 
1Chronicles4:38 chuto kagimwa kainaikwak ko ki bounik eng’ ortinwekwak: ak kitesogis mising’ gorikab kwanisiekwak. 
1Chronicles4:39 Ak kiba kot koit ye kimandoe kebendi Gedor, agoi komostab kong’asis ne bo atebwet, kocheng’jinoti kechirekwak ole agete." 
1Chronicles4:40 Ak kinyor ole bitat ak ko mie, ak ki baraa emet, ak ko sisat, ak kotinyei kalyet; amu ki bo bikab Ham bik che kimenyei oloto eng’ tai." 
1Chronicles4:41 Ak kibwa eng’ betusiekab Hesekia laitoriatab Juda chuto kigisir kainaikwak, ak kobar emaisiekwak, koboto Meunik che kimi oloto, ak kobar ichek koges, agoi ra, ak komeny oloto kogeer ichek: amu kimi oloto ole agete kechirekwak." 
1Chronicles4:42 Ak kiba alak eng’ ichek tulwetab Seir, werikab Simeon, bik bogol mut, che kiptainikwak ko ki Pelatia, Nearia, Repaia, ak Usiel, werikab Isi." 
1Chronicles4:43 Ak kibar Amalegik che kiga ng’et che kichililso, ak komeny oloto agoi rani." 
1Chronicles5:1 Ak werikab Reuben taitab Israel, (amu ki taita inendet; ago amu kiimuruon itogutab kwandanyi, kigigochi etunatennyi ne bo siget werikab Josep weritab Israel; ak ma kiit tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto kisube etunatetab siget." 
1Chronicles5:2 Amu kiiterteris Juda kosiir tupchosiekyik, ak kimong’une inendet bounindet; ago kibunji Josep etunatetab siget:)" 
1Chronicles5:3 werikab Reuben taitab Israel ko ki: Hanok, Palu, Hesron, ak Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:4 Werikab Joel ko ki: Semaia werinnyi, Gog werinnyi, Simei werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles5:4 Werikab Joel ko ki: Semaia werinnyi, Gog werinnyi, Simei werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika werinnyi, Reaia werinnyi, Baal werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles5:6 Beera werinnyi, ne kiluul Tilgat-pilneser laitoriatab Asuria komut: ki bounindetab bikab Reuben." 
1Chronicles5:7 Ak tupchosiekyik eng’ ortinwekwak, ye kingiit tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto che bo ibinwekwak; ne o, Jeiel, ak Sekaria," 
1Chronicles5:8 ak Bela weritab Asas, weritab Sema, weritab Joel, ne kimenyei Aroer, agoi Nebo ak Baal-meon:" 
1Chronicles5:8 ak Bela weritab Asas, weritab Sema, weritab Joel, ne kimenyei Aroer, agoi Nebo ak Baal-meon:" 
1Chronicles5:9 ak kimeny kotokyigei kong’asis agoi ye kimandoe kebendi ong’atet koboch ainetab Euprate: amu kitesogis tukwak eng’ emetab Gilead. 
1Chronicles5:10 Ak kiyai luget ak Hagrik eng’ betusiekab Saul, che kibek eng’ eunekwak: ak kimeny emaisiekwak eng’ emet tugul eng’ komostab kong’asis ne bo Gilead." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ak kimeny werikab Gad kotokyin ak ichek, eng’ emetab Basan agoi Saleka:" 
1Chronicles5:12 ki ne o Joel, korub Sapam, ak Janai, ak Sapat eng’ Basan:" 
1Chronicles5:12 ki ne o Joel, korub Sapam, ak Janai, ak Sapat eng’ Basan:" 
1Chronicles5:13 ak tupchosiekwak che bo gorikab kwanisiekwak ko ki: Mikael, Mesulam, Sheba, Jorai, Jakan, Sia, ak Eber, chuto tisab." 
1Chronicles5:14 Chuto ko ki werikab Abiail weritab Huri, weritab Jaroa, weritab Gilead, weritab Mikael, weritab Jesisai, weritab Jado, weritab Bus;" 
1Chronicles5:15 Ahi weritab Abdiel, weritab Guni, bounikab gorikab kwanisiekwak." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ak kimeny Gilead eng’ Basan, ak nganasokyik, ak emotinwek tugul che kiyagisie che bo Saron, agoi kiwotosiekwak." 
1Chronicles5:17 Kigiit chuto tugul eng’ tetutikab ibinwekwak che kigosiirto eng’ betusiekab Jotam laitoriatab Juda, ak eng’ betusiekab Jeroboam laitoriatab Israel." 
1Chronicles5:18 Werikab Reuben, ak che bo bikab Gad, ak kebebertab bororietab Manase, che bo bik che nyigonen, murenik che kiimuchi koib long’et ak rotwetab chok, ak komwokse kwanget, ak kongen luget komie, ko ki elfusiek artam ak ang’wan ak bogol tisab ak tamanwogik lo che kiimuch komanda koba luget." 
1Chronicles5:19 Ak kiyai luget ak Hagrik, Jetur, Napis, ak Nodab." 
1Chronicles5:20 Ak kigitoret kobargei ak icheget, ak kiginde Hagrik eunekwak, koboto tugul che kimi koboto bichoto: amu kirirji Kamuktaindet komi luget, ak kigasyi inendet ichek; amu kiimang’ inendet." 
1Chronicles5:21 Ak kikweri tukwak; kikweri eng’ tambesikwak elfusiek konom, ak eng’ kechirek elfusiek bogol aeng’ ak konom, ak kokweri eng’ sigirok elfusiek aeng’, ak komut bik elfusiek bogol agenge." 
1Chronicles5:22 Amu kigibar che chang’, amu ki bo luget Kamuktaindet. Ak kimeng’is eng’ oloto kogeer ichek kot koit betut ne kigiluule." 
1Chronicles5:23 Ak kimeny emonoto lagokab kebebertab bororietab Manase: kitesak koboch Basan agoi Baal-hermon ak Senir ak tulwetab Hermon. 
1Chronicles5:24 Ak chu ko ki kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekwak: Eper, Isi, Eliel, Asriel, Jeremia, Hodabia, ak Jadiel, bik che kimen che nyigonen, bik che toogunotin, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekwak." 
1Chronicles5:25 Ak kiingelelji Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, ak kiibotgei ak kanamonikab bikab emonoto, che kiga bar Kamuktaindet eng’ tainywa." 
1Chronicles5:26 Ak kiing’eet Kamuktaindetab Israel tamirmirietab Pul laitoriatab Asuria, ak tamirmirietab Tilgat-pilneser laitoriatab Asuria, ak kiimut, bikab Reuben, ak bikab Gad, ak kebebertab bororietab Manase, ak kiimut koba Hala, Habor, ak Hara, kot koit ainetab Gosan, agoi ra." 
1Chronicles6:1 Werikab Lawi ko ki: Gerson, Kohat, ak Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Ak werikab Kohat ko ki: Amram, Isar, Hebron, ak Usiel." 
1Chronicles6:3 Ak lagokab Amram ko ki: Aron, Musa, ak Miriam. Ak werikab Aron ko ki: Nadab, Abiu, Eleasar, ak Itamar." 
1Chronicles6:4 Kisich Eleasar Pineas; kisich Pineas Abisua; 
1Chronicles6:5 ak kisich Abisua Buki, ak kisich Buki Usi;" 
1Chronicles6:6 ak kisich Usi Seraia, ak kisich Seraia Meraiot;" 
1Chronicles6:7 kisich Meraiot Amaria, ak kisich Amaria Aitub;" 
1Chronicles6:8 ak kisich Aitub Sadok, ak kisich Sadok Aimaas;" 
1Chronicles6:9 ak kisich Aimaas Asaria, ak kisich Asaria Johanan;" 
1Chronicles6:10 ak kisich Johanan Asaria (inendet ne kiyaei boisietab tiseinatet eng’ got ne kiteech Solomon eng’ Jerusalem;) 
1Chronicles6:11 ak kisich Asaria Amaria, ak kisich Amaria Aitub;" 
1Chronicles6:12 ak kisich Aitub Sadok, ak kisich Sadok Salum;" 
1Chronicles6:13 ak kisich Salum Hilkia, ak kisich Hilkia Asaria;" 
1Chronicles6:14 ak kisich Asaria Seraia, ak kisich Seraia Jeosadak;" 
1Chronicles6:15 ak kigiluul Jeosadak, ye kiimuti Jehovah Juda ak Jerusalem eng’ eutab Nebukadnesar." 
1Chronicles6:16 Werikab Lawi ko ki: Gersom, Kohat, ak Merari." 
1Chronicles6:17 Ak chu kainaikab werikab Gerson: Libni, ak Simei." 
1Chronicles6:18 Ak werikab Kohat ko ki: Amram, Isar, Hebron, ak Usiel." 
1Chronicles6:19 Werikab Merari ko ki: Mali ak Musi. Ak chu ortinwekab Lawik kobee gorikab kwanisiekwak. 
1Chronicles6:20 Che bo Gersom: Libni werinnyi, Jahat werinnyi, Sima werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles6:21 Joa werinnyi, Ido werinnyi, Sera werinnyi, Jeaterai werinnyi." 
1Chronicles6:22 Werikab Kohat ko ki: Aminadab werinnyi, Kora werinnyi, Asir werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles6:23 Elkana werinnyi, Ebiasap werinnyi, Asir werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles6:24 Tahat werinnyi, Uriel werinnyi, Usia werinnyi, ak Shaul werinnyi." 
1Chronicles6:25 Ak werikab Elkana ko ki: Amasai ak Aimot. 
1Chronicles6:26 Elkana werikab Elkana ko ki: Sopai werinnyi, Nahat werinnyi," 
1Chronicles6:27 Eliab werinnyi, Jeroam werinnyi, Elkana werinnyi." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ak werikab Samuel ko ki: Joel taita, ak ne bo aeng’ Abija." 
1Chronicles6:28 Ak werikab Samuel ko ki: Joel taita, ak ne bo aeng’ Abija." 
1Chronicles6:29 Werikab Merari ko ki: Mali, Libni werinnyi, Simei werinnyi, Usa werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles6:30 Simea werinnyi, Hagia werinnyi, Asaia werinnyi." 
1Chronicles6:31 Ak chu ko che kiinde Daudi kondochi boisietab tienwogik eng’ gotab Jehovah, ye kingo kagomuuny moinget." 
1Chronicles6:32 Ak kibois eng’ tienwogik eng’ taitab hekalutab emait ne kituiyechin, kot koteech Solomon gotab Jehovah eng’ Jerusalem: ak kitononjin boisienywa ko u tetet ne kiga kitet." 
1Chronicles6:33 Ak chu ko ichek che kiboisiei, koboto werikwak. Che bo werikab Kohatik: Heman tienindet, weritab Joel, weritab Samuel;" 
1Chronicles6:33 Ak chu ko ichek che kiboisiei, koboto werikwak. Che bo werikab Kohatik: Heman tienindet, weritab Joel, weritab Samuel;" 
1Chronicles6:34 weritab Elkana, weritab Jeroam, weritab Eliel, weritab Toa;" 
1Chronicles6:35 weritab Sup, weritab Elkana, weritab Mahat, weritab Amaasi;" 
1Chronicles6:36 weritab Elkana, weritab Joel, weritab Asaria, weritab Sepania;" 
1Chronicles6:36 weritab Elkana, weritab Joel, weritab Asaria, weritab Sepania;" 
1Chronicles6:37 weritab Tahat, weritab Asir, weritab Ebiasap, weritab Kora;" 
1Chronicles6:38 weritab Isar, weritab Kohat, weritab Lawi, weritab Israel." 
1Chronicles6:39 Koboto ng’etab kamennyi Asap, ne kitonone komostab eunnyi ne bo tai, inendet Asap weritab Berekia, weritab Simea;" 
1Chronicles6:40 weritab Mikael, weritab Baaseia, weritab Malkija;" 
1Chronicles6:41 weritab Etni, weritab Sera, weritab Adaia;" 
1Chronicles6:42 weritab Etan, weritab Sima, weritab Simei;" 
1Chronicles6:43 weritab Jahat, weritab Gersom, weritab Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:44 Ak kimi komostab eutab katam, tupchosiekwak werikab Merari: Etan weritab Kisi, weritab Abdi, weritab Maluk;" 
1Chronicles6:45 weritab Hasabia, weritab Amasia, weritab Hilkia;" 
1Chronicles6:46 weritab Amsi, weritab Bani, weritab Semer;" 
1Chronicles6:47 weritab Mali, weritab Musi, weritab Merari, weritab Lawi." 
1Chronicles6:48 Ak kiginde tupchosiekwak Lawik koyai boisiet tugul ne bo hekalutab gotab Kamuktaindet. 
1Chronicles6:49 Ago kiigoitoi Aron ak werikyik kagochinet eng’ kaptisisietab kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak eng’ kapkorosutab nyamdutik, agobo boisiet tugul ne bo ole tilil mising’, ak koyaei kagaigaet agobo Israel, ko u tugul che kiga ng’at Musa otwogindetab Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles6:50 Ak chu ko werikab Aron: Eleasar werinnyi, Pineas werinnyi, Abisua werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles6:51 Buki werinnyi, Usi werinnyi, Seraia werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles6:52 Meraiot werinnyi, Amaria werinnyi, Aitub werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles6:53 Sadok werinnyi, Aimaas werinnyi." 
1Chronicles6:54 Chu ko komoswekwak che kimenyei ko u ole kiga teekta eng’ kiwotosiekwak: kigigochi werikab Aron che bo ortinwekab Kohatik, amu ki nenywa barbariat ne bo tai," 
1Chronicles6:55 kiigochi Hebron eng’ emetab Juda, koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie che kigayiem oloto;" 
1Chronicles6:56 ago kiigochi Kaleb weritab Jepune mbarenikab nganaset, ak nganasokyik che mengechen." 
1Chronicles6:57 Ak kiigochi werikab Aron nganasok che kimwechin, Hebron; koboto Libna ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Jatir, Estemoa, ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
1Chronicles6:58 ak Ilen ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Debir, ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
1Chronicles6:59 ak Asan ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Bet-semes ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
1Chronicles6:60 ak kiigochi eng’ che bo bororietab Benjamin: Geba ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Alemet ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Anatot ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie. Kiek nganasokwak tugul eng’ ortinwekwak tugul nganasok taman ak somok." 
1Chronicles6:61 Ak kigigochi eng’ barbariat che king’et eng’ werikab Kohat, eng’ oret ne bo bororiet, eng’ kebebertab bororionoto, kebebertab Manase, nganasok taman." 
1Chronicles6:62 Ak kigigochi werikab Gersom ko u ortinwekwak, eng’ bororietab Isakar, ak eng’ bororietab Aser, ak eng’ bororietab Naptali, ak eng’ bororietab Manase, eng’ Basan, nganasok taman ak somok." 
1Chronicles6:63 Kigigochi werikab Merari eng’ barbariat, ko u ortinwekwak eng’ bororietab Reuben, ak eng’ bororietab Gad, ak eng’ bororietab Sebulun, nganasok taman ak aeng’." 
1Chronicles6:64 Ak kiigochi lagokab Israel Lawik nganasochoto koboto emotinwekwak che kiyagisie. 
1Chronicles6:65 Ak kiigochi eng’ barbariat eng’ bororietab lagokab Juda, ak eng’ bororietab lagokab Simeon, ak eng’ bororietab lagokab Benjamin, nganasochu kagemwa kainaikwak." 
1Chronicles6:66 Ak kitinyei alak eng’ ortinwekab werikab Kohat nganasok che bo kiwotosiekwak eng’ bororietab Epraim. 
1Chronicles6:67 Ak kiigochi ichek nganasok che kimwechin, Sekem eng’ emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie; Geser agine koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
1Chronicles6:68 ak Jokmeam koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Bet-horon ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
1Chronicles6:69 ak Aijalon ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Gatrimon ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
1Chronicles6:70 ak kiigochi eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase; Aner koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Bileam ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, kobunji che kang’et eng’ oretab werikab Kohat." 
1Chronicles6:71 Kigigochi werikab Gersom, eng’ oretab kebebertab bororietab Manase, Golan eng’ Basan koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Astarot koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie:" 
1Chronicles6:72 ak eng’ bororietab Isakar; Kedes koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Daberat koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
1Chronicles6:73 ak Ramot koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Anem koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie:" 
1Chronicles6:74 ak eng’ bororietab Aser; Masal koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Abdon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
1Chronicles6:75 ak Hukok koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Rehob koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie:" 
1Chronicles6:76 ak eng’ bororietab Naptali; Kedes eng’ Galili koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Hamon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Kiriataim koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie." 
1Chronicles6:77 Ak kigigochi che kang’et eng’ Lawik, werikab Merari, eng’ bororietab Sebulun, Rimono koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, Tabor koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie;" 
1Chronicles6:78 ak kigigochi ichek bitonin eng’ Jordan, eng’ Jeriko, eng’ komostab kong’asis ne bo Jordan, eng’ bororietab Reuben, Beser eng’ ong’atet koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Jasa koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie," 
1Chronicles6:79 ak Kedemot koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Mepaat koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie:" 
1Chronicles6:80 ak eng’ bororietab Gad; Ramot eng’ Gilead koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Maanaim koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie," 
1Chronicles6:81 ak Hesbon koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, ak Jaser koboto emotinwekyik che kiyagisie." 
1Chronicles7:1 Ak werikab Isakar ko ki: Tola, Pua, Jasub, ak Simron, ang’wan." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ak werikab Tola ko ki: Usi, Repaia, Jeriel, Jamai, Ibsam, ak Semuel, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekwak, che bo Tola; bik che ki kimen che nyigonen eng’ ibinwekwak: koitenywa eng’ betusiekab Daudi ko ki elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’ ak bogol lo." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ak werikab Usi ko ki: Israia: ak werikab Israia ko ki: Mikael, Obadia, Joel, ak Isia, mut: tugul ko ki bik che eechen." 
1Chronicles7:3 Ak werikab Usi ko ki: Israia: ak werikab Israia ko ki: Mikael, Obadia, Joel, ak Isia, mut: tugul ko ki bik che eechen." 
1Chronicles7:4 Ak kimi koboto ichek, kweanaikab lugosiek che kiyaei luget, eng’ ibinwekwak, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, elfusiek sosom ak lo, amu kitinyei kwonyik che chang’ ak werik che chang’." 
1Chronicles7:5 Ak tupchosiekwak, eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Isakar, che ki bik che ki kimen, che nyigonen, che kiga kiit eng’ tetutikab ibinwekwak tugul che kigosiirto, ko ki elfusiek tamanwogik sisiit ak tisab." 
1Chronicles7:6 Werikab Benjamin ko ki: Bela, Beker, ak Jediael, somok." 
1Chronicles7:7 Ak werikab Bela ko ki: Esbon, Usi, Usiel, Jerimot, ak Iri, mut; kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekwak, bik che kimen, che nyigonen; ak kigiit eng’ tetutikab ibinwekwak che kigosiirto, koek elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’ ak sosom ak ang’wan." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ak werikab Beker ko ki: Semira, Joas, Elieser, Elioenai, Omri, Jeremot, Abija, Anatot, ak Alemet. Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Beker." 
1Chronicles7:9 Ak kigiit ko u tetutikab ibinwekwak che kigosiirto, kobee ibinwekwak, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekwak, bik che kimen che nyigonen, elfusiek tiptem ak bogol aeng’." 
1Chronicles7:10 Ak werikab Jediael ko ki: Bilan: ak werikab Bilan ko ki: Jeus, Benjamin, Ehud, Kenaana, Sethan, Tarsis, ak Aisaar." 
1Chronicles7:11 Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Jediael, ko u kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekwak, bik che kimen che nyigonen, elfusiek taman ak tisab ak bogol aeng’, che kiimuchi koba boriet eng’ luget." 
1Chronicles7:12 Supim agine, ak Hupim, werikab Ir, ak Husim, werikab Aher." 
1Chronicles7:13 Werikab Naptali ko ki: Jasiel, Guni, Jeser, ak Salum, werikab Bila." 
1Chronicles7:14 Werikab Manase ko ki: Asriel, ne kisichei kwondanyi: (kisich chebaigeiyandennyi Chebaramindet Makir kwandab Gilead:" 
1Chronicles7:15 ak Makir, ne kigiguure chepkamenywa Maaka) ko kicheng’ji Hupim ak Supim osotik, ak kainetab ne bo aeng’ ko ki Selopehad: ak kisich tibik Selopehad." 
1Chronicles7:16 Ak kisich werit Maaka kwondab Makir, ak koguure kainennyi Peres; ak kainetab ng’etab kamet ko ki Seres; ak werikyik ko ki Ulam ak Rakem." 
1Chronicles7:17 Ak werikab Ulam ko ki: Bedan. Chuto ko ki werikab Gilead weritab Makir, weritab Manase." 
1Chronicles7:18 Ak kisich chepkamennyi Hamoleket Isod, Abieser, ak Mahala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Ak werikab Semida ko ki: Aian, Sekem, Liki, ak Aniam." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ak werikab Epraim ko ki: Sutela, ak Bered werinnyi, Tahat werinnyi, ak Eleada werinnyi, ak Tahat werinnyi," 
1Chronicles7:21 ak Sabad werinnyi, ak Sutela werinnyi, ak Eser, ak Elead, che kibar bikab Gat che kigisikyi emonoto, amu, kibwa korek kobar tukwak." 
1Chronicles7:22 Ak kirir Epraim kwandanywa betusiek che chang’, ak kibwa tupchosiekyik kogaigai inendet." 
1Chronicles7:23 Ak kiituiyogei ak osotiondennyi, ak kimanach, ak kosich werit, ak kiguure kainennyi Beria, amu kibiit kiy ne ya eng’ gonnyi." 
1Chronicles7:24 Ak kigiguure cheptanyi Seera, ne kiga teech Bet-horon ne rektoot ak ne bo meto, ak Usen-seera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Ak ki werinnyi Repa, ak Resep, ak Tela werinnyi, ak Tahan werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladan werinnyi, Amiud werinnyi, Elisama werinnyi;" 
1Chronicles7:27 Nun werinnyi, Josua werinnyi." 
1Chronicles7:28 Ak tugukwak, ak komoswekwak che kimenyei, ko ki Bet-el ak nganasokyik, ak komostab kong’asis Naaran, ak komostab cherongo Geser, koboto nganasokwak; Sekem agine koboto nganasokyik, agoi Asah ak nganasokyik:" 
1Chronicles7:29 ak eng’ ye negite kiwotisiekab lagokab Manase, Bet-sean ak nganasokyik, Taanak ak nganasokyik, Megido ak nganasokyik, Dor ak nganasokyik. Kimenyei chuto lagokab Josep weritab Israel." 
1Chronicles7:30 Werikab Aser ko ki: Imna, Isba, Isbi, Beria, ak Sera chepkamenywa." 
1Chronicles7:31 Ak werikab Beria ko ki: Heber, ak Malkiel, ne ki kwandab Birsait." 
1Chronicles7:32 Ak kisich Heber Japlet, Somer, Hotam, ak Sua chepkamenywa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Ak werikab Japlet ko ki: Pasak, Bimal, ak Asba. Chuto ko ki werikab Japlet." 
1Chronicles7:34 Ak werikab Semer ko ki: Ahi, Roga, Jeuba, ak Aram." 
1Chronicles7:35 Werikab Helam ng’etab kamet ko ki: Sopa, Imna, Seles, ak Amal." 
1Chronicles7:36 Werikab Sopa ko ki: Sua, Harneper, Shual, Beri, ak Imra;" 
1Chronicles7:37 Beser, Hod, Sama, Silsa, Itran, ak Beera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Ak werikab Jeter ko ki: Jepune, ak Pispa, ak Ara." 
1Chronicles7:39 Werikab Ula ko ki: Ara, Haniel, ak Risia." 
1Chronicles7:40 Chuto tugul ko ki lagokab Aser, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekwak, bik che kigilewen, che kimen che nyigonen, che eechen eng’ bounik. Ak koitetab ichek che kigiit kobee tetutikab ibinwekwak che kigosiirto si koyai luget, ko ki bik elfusiek tiptem ak lo." 
1Chronicles8:1 Ak kisich Benjamin Bela taitanyi, ne bo aeng’ ko Asbel, ak ne bo somok ko Ahara;" 
1Chronicles8:2 ne bo ang’wan ko Noha, ak ne bo mut ko Rapa." 
1Chronicles8:3 Ak kisich Bela werik; Adar, Gera, ak Abiud;" 
1Chronicles8:4 ak Abisua, Naaman, ak Ahoa;" 
1Chronicles8:5 ak Gera, Sepupan, ak Huram." 
1Chronicles8:6 Ak chu ko werikab Ehud; chu ko kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo che kimenyei Geba, ak kiluul ichek koba Manahat;" 
1Chronicles8:7 ak Naaman, Aija, ak Gera, kiluul ichek; ak kisich Usa ak Aihud." 
1Chronicles8:8 Ak kisich Saaraim lagok eng’ emetab Moab, ye kingo kagoon ichek; ki kwonyikyik Husim ak Baara." 
1Chronicles8:9 Ak kisige osotiondennyi Hodes, Jobab, Sibia, Mesa, ak Malkam;" 
1Chronicles8:9 Ak kisige osotiondennyi Hodes, Jobab, Sibia, Mesa, ak Malkam;" 
1Chronicles8:10 ak Jeus, Sakia, ak Mirma. Chuto ko ki werikyik, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek." 
1Chronicles8:11 Ak kisige Husim Abitub ak Elpaal. 
1Chronicles8:12 Ak werikab Elpaal ko ki: Eber, Misam, ak Semed, ne kiteech Ono ak Lod, koboto nganasokwak:" 
1Chronicles8:13 ak Beria, ak Sema, che ki kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo bik che kimenyei Aijalon, che kion bik che kimenyei Gat;" 
1Chronicles8:14 ak Ahio, Sasak, ak Jeremot;" 
1Chronicles8:15 ak Sebadia, Arad, ak Eder;" 
1Chronicles8:16 ak Mikael, Ispa, ak Joha, werikab Beria;" 
1Chronicles8:17 ak Sebadia, Mesulam, Hiski, ak Heber;" 
1Chronicles8:18 ak Ismerai, Islia, ak Jobab, werikab Elpaal;" 
1Chronicles8:18 ak Ismerai, Islia, ak Jobab, werikab Elpaal;" 
1Chronicles8:19 ak Jakim, Sikri, ak Sabdi;" 
1Chronicles8:20 ak Elienai, Siletai, ak Eliel;" 
1Chronicles8:21 ak Adaia, Beraia, ak Simrat, werikab Simei;" 
1Chronicles8:22 ak Ispan, Eber, ak Eliel;" 
1Chronicles8:23 ak Abdon, Sikri, ak Hanan;" 
1Chronicles8:24 ak Hanania, Elam, ak Antotija;" 
1Chronicles8:25 ak Ipdeia, ak Penuel, werikab Sasak;" 
1Chronicles8:26 ak Samserai, Searia, ak Atalia;" 
1Chronicles8:27 ak Jaaresia, Elija, ak Sikri, werikab Jeroam." 
1Chronicles8:28 Chuto ko ki kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek eng’ ibinwekwak, bik che eechen: kimeny chuto Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles8:29 Ak kimenyei Gibeon kwandab Gibeon, Jeiel, ne ki kainetab kwondanyi ko ki Maaka;" 
1Chronicles8:30 ak taitanyi ko ki Abdon, korub Sur, ak Kis, ak Baal, ak Nadab;" 
1Chronicles8:31 ak Gedor, ak Ahio, ak Seker." 
1Chronicles8:32 Ak kisich Miklot Simea. Ak kimenyei agichek ak tupchosiekwak Jerusalem, kotokyindos ak tupchosiekwak." 
1Chronicles8:33 Ak kisich Ner Kis; ak kisich Kis Saul; ak kisich Saul Jonatan, Malki-sua, Abinadab, ak Esbaal." 
1Chronicles8:34 Ak weritab Jonatan ko ki Meri-baal, ak kisich Meri-baal Mika." 
1Chronicles8:35 Ak werikab Mika ko ki: Piton, Melek, Tatea, ak Ahas." 
1Chronicles8:36 Ak kisich Ahas Jeoada; ak kisich Jeoada Alemet, Asmabet, ak Simri; ak kisich Simri Mosa:" 
1Chronicles8:37 kisich Mosa Benea; Rapa ko ki werinnyi, Eleasa werinnyi, Asel werinnyi:" 
1Chronicles8:38 ak kisich Asel werik lo, che kainaikwak ko chu: Asrikam, Bokeru, ak Ismael, ak Searia, ak Obadia, ak Hanan. Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Asel." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ak werikab Esek ng’et kamet ko ki: Ulam taitanyi, ne bo aeng’ ko ki Jeus, ak ne bo somok ko ki Elipelet." 
1Chronicles8:40 Ak ki bik che kimen che nyigonen werikab Ulam, ki mwogik, ak kitinyei werik che chang’, ak werikab werik, che ki bogol ak konom. Chuto tugul ko ki bo werikab Benjamin." 
1Chronicles9:1 Kigiit anyun Israel tugul kobee tetutikab ibinwekwak che kigosiirto; ak keero, kigisirji bukuitab laitorinikab Israel: ak kigimut Juda keluul kwo Babulon amu bistoenywa." 
1Chronicles9:2 Ak bik che tai che kisib komeny ole kimenyei eng’ nganasokwak ko ki Israel, tisiik, Lawik, ak Netinik." 
1Chronicles9:3 Ak kimeny Jerusalem che bo lagokab Juda, ak che bo lagokab Benjamin, ak che bo lagokab Epraim ak che bo Manase;" 
1Chronicles9:4 Utai weritab Amiud, weritab Omri, weritab Imri, weritab Bani, che bo lagokab Peres weritab Juda." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ak che bo Silonitik ko ki: Asaia taita, ak werikyik." 
1Chronicles9:6 Ak che bo werikab Sera, ko Jeuel ak tupchosiekwak, bik bogol lo ak tamanwogik sogol." 
1Chronicles9:7 Ak che bo werikab Benjamin; ko Salu weritab Mesulam, weritab Hodabia, weritab Hasenua;" 
1Chronicles9:8 ak Ibneia weritab Jeroam, ak Ela weritab Usi, weritab Mikri, ak Mesulam weritab Sepatia, weritab Reuel, weritab Ibnija." 
1Chronicles9:9 Ak tupchosiekwak, ko u tetutikab ibinwekwak che kigosiirto, bogol sogol ak konom ak lo. Bichuto tugul ko ki kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek, eng’ gorikab kwanisiekwak." 
1Chronicles9:10 Ak eng’ tisiik ko ki: Jedaia, Jeoiarib, ak Jakin;" 
1Chronicles9:11 ak Asaria weritab Hilkia, weritab Mesulam, weritab Sadok, weritab Meraiot, weritab Aitub, bounindetab gotab Kamuktaindet;" 
1Chronicles9:12 ak Adaia weritab Jeroam, weritab Pasur, weritab Malkija, ak Maasai weritab Adiel, weritab Jasera, weritab Mesulam, weritab Mesilemit, weritab Imer;" 
1Chronicles9:13 ak tupchosiekwak, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekwak, bik elfut agenge ak bogol tisab ak tamanwogik lo; bik che tinyei kamuget inne ne bo boisietab otet eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles9:14 Ak eng’ Lawik ko ki: Semaia weritab Hasub, weritab Asrikam, weritab Hasabia, eng’ werikab Merari;" 
1Chronicles9:15 ak Bakbaka, Heres, Galal, ak Matania weritab Mika, weritab Sikri, weritab Asap;" 
1Chronicles9:16 ak Obadia weritab Semaia, weritab Galal, weritab Jedutun, ak Berekia weritab Asa, weritab Elkana, che kimenyei nganasokab Netopatik." 
1Chronicles9:17 Ak ribikab Kurget ko ki: Salum, Akub, Talmon, Ahiman, ak tupchosiekwak: ki ne o Salum;" 
1Chronicles9:18 che kiribei kurgetab laitoriat komostab kong’asis agoi betunoto: ki ribikab nganasetab lagokab Lawik. 
1Chronicles9:19 Ak kibou Salum weritab Kore, weritab Ebiasap, weritab Kora, ak tupchosiekyik, che bo gotab kwandanyi, Koraik, boisietab oret, ribikab kurgotikab emait: ak kicham kobou kwanisiekwak nganasetab Jehovah, ribikab ole kimandoe;" 
1Chronicles9:20 ak ki bounindenywa Pineas weritab Eleasar eng’ betusiek che bo tai, ak kimi Jehovah ak inendet." 
1Chronicles9:21 Ki ribindetab kurget Sekaria weritab Meselemia ne bo kurgetab emait ne kituiyechin. 
1Chronicles9:22 Chuto tugul kigilewen koek ribikab kurget eng’ kurgotik, ko ki bogol aeng’ ak taman ak aeng’. Kigiit chuto kobee tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto eng’ nganasokwak, che kiga konde Daudi ak Samuel keerindet boisienywa ne kiga kigochi." 
1Chronicles9:23 Korib anyun icheget ak lagokwak kurgotikab gotab Jehovah, gotab emait, kowaljingei." 
1Chronicles9:24 Kimi ribik komoswek ang’wan, komostab kong’asis, ak cherongo, ak murot ne bo katam, ak murot ne bo tai." 
1Chronicles9:25 Ak kicham kobwanei tupchosiekwak, eng’ nganasokwak, konyil agenge eng’ betusiek tisab, kotebyei ak ichek:" 
1Chronicles9:26 amu kimi boisiet ne kiga kigochi ribik ang’wan che eechen, che ki Lawik, ak kibou gorik ak ole kigonore tuguk eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles9:27 Ak kiruitos ole negite gotab Kamuktaindet, amu ki nenywa boisiet, ak ki boisienywa koyat kurgotik karonet age tugul." 
1Chronicles9:28 Ak kiribei alak eng’ ichek tuguk che kiboisie eng’ otet; amu kigiiti si keibu kobwa go, ak kigiiti si keibei komanda." 
1Chronicles9:29 Kigilewen alak kogeny eng’ ichek korib tuguk tugul che bo ole tilil, ak busiek che tambulul, divaik, mwanik, ubani, ak nyamdutik." 
1Chronicles9:30 Ak kichobei alak eng’ werikab tisiik nyamdutik che kiburuchi. 
1Chronicles9:31 Ak kiga kinde Matitia age eng’ Lawik, ne ki taitab Salum Koraindet, korib tuguk che kigigelei eng’ tabok." 
1Chronicles9:32 Ak kiribei alak eng’ tupchosiekwak, eng’ werikab Kohatik, makatinikab kabartaet, kochob eng’ sabatut age tugul." 
1Chronicles9:33 Ak chu ko tienik, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo Lawik, che kimenyei gorik, ak ki itiagotin eng’ boisionik alak: amu kimi boisienywa bet ak kemoi." 
1Chronicles9:34 Chuto ko ki kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo Lawik, eng’ ibinwekwak tugul, bik che eechen: kimenyei chuto Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles9:35 Ak kimenyei Gibeon kwandab Gibeon, Jeiel, kainetab osotiondennyi ko ki Maaka:" 
1Chronicles9:36 ak werinnyi taita ko ki Abdon, korub Sur, Kis, Baal, Ner, ak Nadab;" 
1Chronicles9:37 ak Gedor, Ahio, Sekaria, ak Miklot." 
1Chronicles9:38 Ak kisich Miklot Simeam. Ak kimenyei agichek koboto tupchosiekwak Jerusalem, kotokyindos ak tupchosiekwak." 
1Chronicles9:39 Ak kisich Ner Kis; ak kisich Kis Saul; ak kisich Saul Jonatan, Malki-sua, Abinadab, ak Esbaal." 
1Chronicles9:40 Ak weritab Jonatan ko ki Meri-baal; ak kisich Meri-baal Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Ak werikab Mika ko ki: Piton, Melek, Tatea, ak Ahas." 
1Chronicles9:42 Ak kisich Ahas Jara; ak kisich Jara Alemet, Asmabet, ak Simri; ak kisich Simri Mosa:" 
1Chronicles9:43 ak kisich Mosa Binea; ak Repaia werinnyi, Eleasa werinnyi, Asel werinnyi:" 
1Chronicles9:44 ak kisich Asel werik lo, che kainaikwak ko ki: Asrikam, Bokeru, Ismael, Searia, Obadia, ak Hanan: chuto ko ki werikab Asel." 
1Chronicles10:1 Kibargei Pilistik ak Israel, ak kimwei bikab Israel eng’ taitab Pilistik, ak kiibutyo kebar eng’ tulwetab Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:2 Ak kion Pilistik Saul ak werikyik kosub inne, ak kibar Pilistik Jonatan, ak Abinadab, ak Malki-sua, werikab Saul." 
1Chronicles10:3 Ak king’wanit boriet eng’ Saul, ak kinam inendet mwogik; ak kinyalil eng’ mwogik." 
1Chronicles10:4 Kolenji anyun Saul chito ne kiipchin inendet karik, Ng’usu rotweng’ung’ bo chok, ak itoorena; si mabwa bichoto chu ma kimuratan kochota. Ago ma cham chito ne kiipchin karik: amu kiiywei mising’. Konam, anyun Saul rotwennyi bo chok, ak kong’at, ak kobutyi." 
1Chronicles10:5 Ak kingogeer chito ne kiipchin inendet karik kole kagome Saul, kobutyi agine rotwennyi bo chok, ak kome." 
1Chronicles10:6 Kome anyun Saul, ak werikyik somok; ak kibek gonnyi tugul kibagenge." 
1Chronicles10:7 Ak kingogeer bik tugul che bo Israel che kimi atebwet kole, kagomwei, ago kagome Saul ak werikyik, kometo nganasokwak, ak komwei; ak kibwa Pilistik komeny nganasochato." 
1Chronicles10:8 Ak ki eng’ karon, ye kibwanei Pilistik kobutei bik che kiga kibar, konyor Saul ak werikyik ko kogobek eng’ tulwetab Gilboa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Ak kibut inendet, ak koib metinnyi, ak karikyik, ak koyokto koba emetab Pilistik komoswek tugul koipchi logoiywek kanamonikwak, ak koipchi bik agichek." 
1Chronicles10:10 Ak kiinde karikyik gotab kanamonikwak, ak koratyi metinnyi gotab Dagon." 
1Chronicles10:11 Ak kingogas Jabes-gilead komugul kit ne koyachi Pilistik Saul," 
1Chronicles10:12 kong’eetyo bik tugul che nyigonen, ak koba koib bortab Saul, ak borwekab werikyik, ak koib kobwa Jabes, ak kotub kowekwak eng’ ketit kel eng’ Jabes, ak korugutgei betusiek tisab." 
1Chronicles10:13 Kome anyun Saul amu chalwoktanyi ne kiyachi Jehovah, amu ng’olyotab Jehovah ne ma rib; ak amu kiteeb ng’omnatet kogeny eng’ inendet ne kiboisie oik, koteepse," 
1Chronicles10:14 ama teebe Jehovah: kobar anyun Jehovah inendet, ak kogochi laitornatet Daudi weritab Jesii." 
1Chronicles11:1 Koyumjigei anyun Israel tugul ole mi Daudi eng’ Hebron, ak kolenji, Keero, ki koweguk ak ko ki banyeguk." 
1Chronicles11:2 Eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto, ye ki laitoriat Saul, ko ki inye ne kiimaandoi Israel ak imutu koweek: ak kilenjin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, Ibae bikyuk Israel, ak iegu bounindet eng’ bikyuk Israel." 
1Chronicles11:3 Kobwa anyun boisiek tugul che bo Israel ole mi laitoriat eng’ Hebron, ak kiiyomisgei Daudi ak ichek eng’ Hebron eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kiil Daudi, koek laitoriat eng’ Israel, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kimwa eng’ Samuel." 
1Chronicles11:4 Ak kiwa Daudi koboto Israel tugul Jerusalem (noto ko Jebus); ak kimi oloto Jebusik, bik che kimenyei emonoto." 
1Chronicles11:5 Ak kilenji bik che kimenyei Jebus Daudi, Menyone oli. Ago kinam Daudi irimet ne bo Sion; noto ko nganasetab Daudi." 
1Chronicles11:6 Ak kile Daudi, Chito age tugul ne sib kobarei Jebusik koegu ne o ak koek kiptaiyat. Ak kisib kwo kotogosta Joab weritab Seruia, ak kigiyai koek ne o." 
1Chronicles11:7 Ak kimeny Daudi irimet; kigiguure anyun nganasetab Daudi. 
1Chronicles11:8 Koteech anyun komuut nganaset, koboch Milo koyiem; ak koteech Joab kogetyi ole kiga kobutok eng’ nganaset ne kiga ng’et." 
1Chronicles11:9 Ak kieet Daudi kotesak; amu kimi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek koboto inendet. 
1Chronicles11:10 Chu ko che eechen che bo bik che kimen che kitinyei Daudi che kitook kogimegitu koboto inendet eng’ bounatennyi, koboto Israel tugul, si koyai inendet koek laitoriat, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah agobo Israel." 
1Chronicles11:11 Ak ni ko koitetab murenik che kimen che kitinyei Daudi: Jasobeam, weritab Hakmonindet, ne o ne bo bik sosom; kinam ng’otinnyi ak kobar bogol somok, tugul kibagenge." 
1Chronicles11:12 Ak ne kirubei inendet ko ki Eleasar, weritab Dodo, Ahoindet ne ki agenge ak murenik somok che ki kimen." 
1Chronicles11:13 Kimi ak Daudi eng’ Pas-damim, ak kiga iyumgei eng’ yoto Pilistik koyai luget, eng’ ole kimi mbaret ne kimi sairik che chang’; ak kimwei bik eng’ taitab Pilistik." 
1Chronicles11:14 Ak kitononso eng’ kwenutab mbaranato, ak koet mbaranato, ak kobar Pilistik; ak kisor Jehovah ichek eng’ katerteret ne o." 
1Chronicles11:15 Ak kichortagei somogu eng’ che eechen sosom, koba ole mi Daudi eng’ ruandet, kot koit kebenetab Adulam; ak kiga teech lugetab Pilistik eng’ atebwetab Repaim." 
1Chronicles11:16 Ak kimi Daudi eng’ betunoto, irimet, ak kimi agine lugetab Pilistik Bet-lehem eng’ betunoto." 
1Chronicles11:17 Ak kiam melelda Daudi, ak kile, Eiye, inaga ng’o beekab keringetab beek, ne mi Bet-lehem aee ne negite ormarichet!" 
1Chronicles11:18 Ak kichut lugetab Pilistik murenjoto nyigonen somogu, koba koram beek eng’ keringetab Bet-lehem, ne kimi ye negite ormarichet, ak koib, koipchi Daudi: ago ma cham Daudi koee, kitumda eng’ taitab Jehovah," 
1Chronicles11:19 ak kile, Ingoetena Kamuktaindennyu, si mayai kii: tos aee korotikab bichu koinde sobonwekwak ng’oiyondit? Amu kaib beechu eng’ kandaet ne kainde sobonwekwak ng’oiyondit. Ko ma cham anyun koee amu noto. Kiyai tuguchuto bichoto kimen somogu." 
1Chronicles11:20 Ak ki ne o eng’ bichoto somok Abisai ng’etab kametab Joab: amu kinam ng’otinnyi ak kobar bik bogol somok, ak kitook kainennyi koboto bichoto somok." 
1Chronicles11:21 Eng’ bichoto somok ko ki konyitot Abisai kosiir chun aeng’, ak kigiyai koek kiptaiyandenywa: ago ma ityi che bo tai somok." 
1Chronicles11:22 Kibar Benaia, weritab Jeoiada, weritab chito ne nyigan ne bo Kabseel, ne kiga koyai boisionik che eechen, werik aeng’ che bo Ariel ne bo Moab: kichortagei agine kwo kobar ng’etundo eng’ kwenutab keringet eng’ betusiekab teluchi." 
1Chronicles11:23 Ak kibar Misrindet, chito ne koi kot, ne bo kakwautik mut che bo eut tonon; ak kimi eutab Misrindonoto ng’otit ne u ketit ne taachin usisiek chito ne nabisiei; ak kichortagei ole mi inendet kotinyei kirokto, ak koreb ng’otit eng’ eutab Misrindet, ak kobare inendet ng’otinnyi." 
1Chronicles11:24 Kiyai tuguchuto Benaia weritab Jeoiada, ak kitook kainennyi koboto bichoto somok ki kimen." 
1Chronicles11:25 Keero, ki konyitot inendet kosiir bichoto somok, ago ma ityi che bo tai somok: ak kiinde Daudi inendet koboi ribikyik." 
1Chronicles11:26 Ak bik che kimen kogeny che bo lugosiek ko ki: Asael ng’etab kametab Joab, Elanan weritab Dodo ne bo Bet-lehem;" 
1Chronicles11:27 Samot Harorindet, Heles Pelonindet;" 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira weritab Ikes Tekoindet, Abieser Anatotindet;" 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibekai Husatindet, Ilai Ahoindet;" 
1Chronicles11:30 Maarai Netopatindet; Heled weritab Baana Netopatindet; 
1Chronicles11:31 Itai weritab Ribai ne bo Gibea ne bo lagokab Benjamin, Benaia Piratonindet;" 
1Chronicles11:32 Hurai ne bo kererusiekab Gaas, Abiel Arbatindet;" 
1Chronicles11:33 Asmabet Baharumindet, Eliaba Saalbonindet;" 
1Chronicles11:34 werikab Hasem Gisonindet, Jonatan weritab Sage Hararindet;" 
1Chronicles11:35 Aiam weritab Sakar Hararindet, Elipal weritab Ur;" 
1Chronicles11:36 Heper Mekeratindet, Aija Pelonindet;" 
1Chronicles11:37 Hesro Karmelindet, Naarai weritab Esbai;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel ng’etab kametab Natan, Mibar weritab Hagri;" 
1Chronicles11:38 Joel ng’etab kametab Natan, Mibar weritab Hagri;" 
1Chronicles11:39 Selek Amonindet, Naarai Berotindet, chito ne kiipchin karik Joab weritab Seruia;" 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira Itrindet, Garib Itrindet;" 
1Chronicles11:41 Uria Hitindet, Sabad weritab Alai;" 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina weritab Sisa Reubenindet, ne o ne bo bikab Reuben, ak bik sosom che kimi koboto inendet;" 
1Chronicles11:43 Hanan weritab Maaka, ak Josapat Mitnindet;" 
1Chronicles11:44 Usia Asteratindet, Sama ak Jeiel werikab Hotam Aroerindet;" 
1Chronicles11:45 Jediael weritab Simri, ak Joha, ng’etab kamet, Tisindet;" 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliel Maabindet, ak Jeribai, ak Josabia, werikab Elnaam, ak Itma Moabindet;" 
1Chronicles11:47 Eliel, Obed ak Jaasiel Mesobaindet." 
1Chronicles12:1 Chu ko che kibwa ole mi Daudi eng’ Siklag, ye kita kounyegei amu Saul weritab Kis: ak ki boto bik che kimen che ki toretikyik eng’ luget." 
1Chronicles12:2 Kitinyei kwangok, ak kiimuchi koboisie eutab tai ak eutab katam eng’ wirtaetab koik eng’ borowet ak eng’ mwoktoetab kipchabonik eng’ kwangok; ki bo tupchosiekab Saul ne bo Benjamin." 
1Chronicles12:3 Ne o ko ki Aieser, korub Joas, werikab Semaa Gibeatindet; ak Jesiel, ak Pelet, werikab Asmabet; koboto Beraka, ak Jeu Anatotindet;" 
1Chronicles12:4 ak Ismaia Gibeonindet, chito ne kim eng’ bichoto sosom, ak kibou bichoto sosom; ak Jeremia, Jahasiel, Johanan, ak Josabad, Gederatindet;" 
1Chronicles12:5 Elusai, Jerimot, Bealia, Semaria, ak Sepatia Harupindet;" 
1Chronicles12:6 Elkana, Isia, Asarel, Joeser, ak Jasobeam, Koraik;" 
1Chronicles12:7 ak Joela, ak Sebadia, werikab Jeroam ne bo Gedor." 
1Chronicles12:7 ak Joela, ak Sebadia, werikab Jeroam ne bo Gedor." 
1Chronicles12:8 Ak kiitabangei che bo bikab Gad, koba ole mi Daudi, eng’ irimet eng’ ong’atet, murenik che kimen che nyigonen, murenik che kiginet, bik che kiimuchi konam long’onik ak ng’otwek; che ki u togochikwak togochikab ng’etunyik, ak kichepcheben ko u cheptirgichik che mi tulonok;" 
1Chronicles12:9 ki ne o Eser, ne bo aeng’ ko Obadia, ne bo somok ko Eliab;" 
1Chronicles12:10 ne bo ang’wan ko Mismana, ne bo mut ko Jeremia;" 
1Chronicles12:11 ne bo lo ko Atai, ne bo tisab ko Eliel;" 
1Chronicles12:12 ne bo sisiit ko Johanan, ne bo sogol ko Elsabad;" 
1Chronicles12:13 ne bo taman ko Jeremia, ne bo taman ak agenge ko Makbanai." 
1Chronicles12:14 Chuto bo werikab Gad ko ki kiptainikab luget: ne ki ming’in eng’ ichek ko ki u bik bogol, ak ne ki o eng’ ichek ko ki u bik elfut." 
1Chronicles12:15 Chu ko ichek che kiga landa eng’ Jordan eng’ arawet ne bo tai, ye kiga nyi beek kot koba timin eng’ ngegusiekyik tugul; koba koon bik tugul che ki bo atebwosiek, koba kong’asis, ak cherongo." 
1Chronicles12:16 Ak kibwa che bo lagokab Benjamin ak che bo Juda irimet ole kimi Daudi. 
1Chronicles12:17 Ak kimanda Daudi kotorokta ichek, ak komwachi ichek kolenji, Ngot obwanjina eng’ kalyet otoreta, konamegei muguleldanyu ak okwek: ago ngot ko kobwane ong’wekyina bunikyuk, ago mami yaitiet eunekyuk, ko ingogeer Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyok kioto, ak koger kong’." 
1Chronicles12:18 Konyonji anyun tamirmiriet Amasai, ne ki ne o eng’ bichoto sosom, ak kole, Ki cheguk, Daudi, ak kimi komostang’ung’, inye weritab Jesii: mi kalyet, ingoteb kalyet koboten, ak ingoteb kalyet koboto toretiguk; amu toretin Kamuktaindeng’ung’. Kotaach anyun Daudi ichek, ak koyai koek kiptainikab kweanet." 
1Chronicles12:19 Kiba ole kimi Daudi agichek alak che bo Manase, ye kingobwa koboto Pilistik kobokyin Saul, ago ma toret bichoto icheget: amu kiiruoch kiptainikab Pilistik si koon inendet kole tun bagachech ak kwo konamgei ak Saul kiptaiyandennyi, si koek ng’oiyonditab sobonwekyok." 
1Chronicles12:20 Ak ye kiwendi Siklag, kobwa ole mi inendet che bo Manase, Adna, Josabad, Jediael, Mikael, Josabad, Eliu, ak Siletai, kiptainikab elfusiek che ki bo Manase." 
1Chronicles12:21 Ak kitoret Daudi kobargei ak kweanaikab bik che kiiboktooti: amu tugul ko ki bik che kimen, che nyigonen, ak ko ki kiptainikab luget." 
1Chronicles12:22 Amu kibwanei betut age tugul kotoreti Daudi, kot koek luget ne o, ne u lugetab Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles12:23 Chu ko koitetab kandoikab ichek che kiga ilaach karik che kiyae luget, che kiga bwa ole mi Daudi eng’ Hebron, kogochi inendet bounatetab Saul, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles12:24 Lagokab Juda che kitinyei long’onik ak ng’otwek ko ki elfusiek lo ak bogol sisiit, che kiga ilaach karik si koyae luget." 
1Chronicles12:25 Che bo lagokab Simeon, che kimen che nyigonen che bo luget ko ki elfusiek tisab ak bogol agenge." 
1Chronicles12:26 Che bo lagokab Lawi ko ki elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol lo. 
1Chronicles12:27 Ak ki kandoindet Jeoiada ne bo gotab Aron, ak kimi koboto inendet bik elfusiek somogu ak bogol tisab;" 
1Chronicles12:28 ak Sadok, neranet ne ki kim ak ko nyigan, ak kiptainik tiptem ak aeng’ che bo gotab kwandanyi." 
1Chronicles12:29 Ak che bo lagokab Benjamin, tupchosiekab Saul ko ki elfusiek somok; amu kita konamegei kebeberta ne o ne bo bichoto ak gotab Saul agoi betunoto." 
1Chronicles12:30 Ak che bo lagokab Epraim, ko ki bik elfusiek tiptem ak sisiit, che kimen che nyigonen, bik che toogunotin eng’ gorikab kwanisiekwak." 
1Chronicles12:31 Ak che bo kebebertab bororietab Manase, ko ki elfusiek taman ak sisiit che kiga kimwa eng’ kainaik, si kobwa koyai Daudi koek laitoriat." 
1Chronicles12:32 Ak che bo lagokab Isakar, che kiiguitos agobo betusiek, che kiingen kit ne kanyol koyai Israel; ki bogol aeng’ kandoikwak; ak kigase it ichek tupchosiekwak tugul." 
1Chronicles12:33 Che bo Sebulun, che kiimuchi komanda koba luget, che kiimuchi kotet luget, eng’ karik alak tugul che bo luget; ak che kiimuchi kong’at luget, ago kima kotinyei muguleldo ne besiot aeng’." 
1Chronicles12:34 Ak che bo Naptali, ko ki kiptainik elfut agenge, ak kimi koboto icheget, bik elfusiek sosomu ak tisab che kitinyei long’onik ak ng’otwek." 
1Chronicles12:35 Ak che bo Danik, che kiimuchi kotet luget, ko ki elfusiek tiptem ak sisiit ak bogol lo." 
1Chronicles12:36 Ak che bo Aser, che kiimuchi komanda koba luget, che kiimuchi kotet luget, ko ki elfusiek artam." 
1Chronicles12:37 Ak eng’ bitonin eng’ Jordan, ne bo bikab Reuben, ak bikab Gad, ak ne bo kebebertab bororietab Manase, che kitinyei karik alak tugul che bo boriet che yaei luget, ko kimi bik elfusiek bogolu agenge ak tiptem." 
1Chronicles12:38 Kibwa Hebron chuto tugul eng’ muguleldo ne igesunotgei che icheget ko bikab luget, che kiimuchi kong’eet luget, koyai Daudi koek laitoriat koboi Israel tugul, ak bik tugul che king’et che bo Israel ko kitinyei maget agenge koyai Daudi koek laitoriat." 
1Chronicles12:39 Ak kitebi eng’ yoto ak Daudi betusiek somok, koamisiei ak koeeisei: amu kiga chopchi tuguk tupchosiekwak." 
1Chronicles12:40 Ak ichek che ki negite bichoto, koboch Isakar ak Sebulun ak Naptali, ko kiib amitwogik eng’ sigirok ak tambesik, ak eng’ nyumbusiek, ak eik, amitwogik che bo busiek, makatinik che bo mogoonik, ak temenik che mi logoek che bo sabibuk che yaamnyotin, divaik, mwanik, eik, ak kechirek che chang’: amu kimi boiboiyet Israel." 
1Chronicles13:1 Ak king’alal Daudi ak kiptainikab elfusiek ak che bo bogolusiek, king’alal ak kandoindet age tugul." 
1Chronicles13:2 Ak kilenji Daudi tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel, Ngot ogeere ole mie eng’ okwek, ak ngot kobunu Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ongiyokte tupchosiekyok che kang’et eng’ komosta age tugul ne mi emet tugul ne bo Israel, che mi tisiik ak Lawik koboto ichek nganasokwak che tinyei emotinwek che kiyagisie, koyumgei kobwa ole kimi:" 
1Chronicles13:3 ak ongeibu kogeny moingetab Kamuktaindennyo konyo ole kimi: amu kima kiteeb kiy eng’ moingonoto eng’ betusiekab Saul. 
1Chronicles13:4 Ak kiiyan tuiyet tugul kole yaei ko u noto: amu kimieit kioto eng’ taitab bik tugul. 
1Chronicles13:5 Koyum anyun Daudi tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel, koboch Sihor ainetab Misri kot koit ole kimandoe Hamat, koib moingetab Kamuktaindet, eng’ Kiriat-jearim." 
1Chronicles13:6 Ak kitogosta Daudi koboto Israel tugul, koba Baala, yoto ko Kiriat-jearim, ne ki bo Juda, koba koib eng’ oloto moingetab Kamuktaindet, Jehovah ne tebe kerubisiek, ne kimwaitoe Kainanato." 
1Chronicles13:7 Ak kiib moingetab Kamuktaindet eng’ karit ne kita ko leel, komong’ eng’ gotab Abinadab: ak kikweri karinato Usa ak Ahio." 
1Chronicles13:8 Ak kiureren Daudi koboto Israel tugul eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet eng’ kimnatenywa tugul: eng’ tienwogik, ak ketubosiek, ak kibugandinik, ak sugutisiek che mengechen, ak sanisiek che bo sugunonik che kibirei, ak iriagok." 
1Chronicles13:9 Ak kingoit ruanyut ne kiborse ne bo Kidon, koyogoito eunnyi Usa kole kotii moinget; amu kiterteriot eik." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ak kilalyo nerebekab Jehovah agobo Usa, ak kibar inendet, amu kiiyogoito eunnyi konam moinget; ak kimechi yoto eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles13:11 Ak ma cham Daudi, amu kibar Jehovah Usa: ak kiguure yoto Peres-usa, agoi ra." 
1Chronicles13:12 Ak kiiywei Daudi Kamuktaindet betunoto, kole, Amuktoi ano aib moingetab Kamuktaindet konyo ga ole ami?" 
1Chronicles13:13 Ko mata koib anyun Daudi moinget kwo oldanyi eng’ nganasetab Daudi, ago kiimaas kwo gotab Obed-edom Gitindet." 
1Chronicles13:14 Ak kitebi moingetab Kamuktaindet eng’ gab Obed-edom arawek somok: ak kiiberur Jehovah gotab Obed-edom, ak tuguk tugul che kitinyei." 
1Chronicles14:1 Ak kiiyokto Hiram laitoriatab Turo bik koba oldab Daudi, koipchi taragonik, ak koyokyi bik che waei koik, ak musogikab baoinik, koba koteekyi inendet got." 
1Chronicles14:2 Ak kinai Daudi kole kogogimit Jehovah inendet koek laitoriatab Israel, amu kigitoror bounatennyi, amu bikyik Israel." 
1Chronicles14:3 Ak kiitun Daudi osotik alak eng’ Jerusalem: ak kisich Daudi werik che chang’ ak tibik che chang’. 
1Chronicles14:4 Ak chu ko kainaikab lagok che kisichei eng’ Jerusalem; Samua, Sobab, Natan, ak Solomon;" 
1Chronicles14:5 ak Ibar, Elisua, ak Elpelet;" 
1Chronicles14:6 ak Noga, Nepeg, ak Japia;" 
1Chronicles14:7 ak Elisama, Beeliada, ak Elipelet." 
1Chronicles14:8 Ak kingogas Pilistik kole, kogiil Daudi koek laitoriatab Israel tugul, kotogosta Pilistik koba kocheng’ Daudi: ak kigas Daudi ak kwo kobargei ak ichek." 
1Chronicles14:9 Kiga kobwa Pilistik kobokyi atebwetab Repaim. 
1Chronicles14:10 Ak kiteebe Daudi Kamuktaindet kolenji, Atogoste awe kebarge ak Pilistik? Ak tos, inde eunnyu ichek? Ak kilenji Jehovah, Togoste, amu andoi ichek eung’ung’." 
1Chronicles14:11 Kotogos anyun kobwa Baal-perasim, ak kibar Daudi ichek eng’ yoto; ak kile Daudi, Kagoiyesta Kamuktaindet bunikyuk eng’ eunnyu, ko u beek che iyestoi. Koguure anyun kainetab koronoto Baal-perasim." 
1Chronicles14:12 Ak kibagage oloto kanamonikwak; ak king’at Daudi, ak kigibeel eng’ mat." 
1Chronicles14:13 Ak kita kobokyi kogeny atebwonoto Pilistik. 
1Chronicles14:14 Ak kiteebe Daudi kogeny Kamuktaindet; ak kilenji Kamuktaindet inendet, Amat itogoste isub ichek: ui taban, si iche ichek eng’ ye itoorjingei ketikab logoek." 
1Chronicles14:15 Ak ye igas cheetab banda eng’ ketichato bo logoek barak, iwe anyun obarge: amu kagondoenen Kamuktaindet kwo kobar lugetab Pilistik." 
1Chronicles14:16 Ak kiyai Daudi ko u ye king’at Kamuktaindet inendet: ak kibar lugetab Pilistik koboch Gibeon agoi Geser. 
1Chronicles14:17 Ak kiyom emotinwek tugul toogunatetab Daudi; ak kiigochi Jehovah bororiosiek tugul koiywei inendet. 
1Chronicles15:1 Ak kiteekyigei Daudi gorik eng’ nganasetab Daudi; ak kichob ole tebe moingetab Kamuktaindet, ak kolumdochi moingonoto emait." 
1Chronicles15:2 Yeityo komwa Daudi kole, Manyol koib chi age tugul moingetab Kamuktaindet, kobate Lawik ichegei: amu kigolewen Jehovah ichek koib moingetab Kamuktaindet, ak koboisiechi inendet koigeny." 
1Chronicles15:3 Ak kiiyum Daudi Israel tugul eng’ Jerusalem, si koib moingetab Jehovah kotogos konyo komostanyi, ne kiga kochopchi inendet." 
1Chronicles15:4 Ak kiiyum Daudi werikab Aron koboto Lawik: 
1Chronicles15:5 che bo werikab Kohat: ne o ko ki Uriel, ak tupchosiekyik bogol ak tiptem;" 
1Chronicles15:6 che bo werikab Merari; ne o ko ki Asaia, ak tupchosiekyik bogol aeng’ ak tiptem:" 
1Chronicles15:7 che bo werikab Gersom: ne o ko ki Joel, ak tupchosiekyik bogol ak sosom:" 
1Chronicles15:7 che bo werikab Gersom: ne o ko ki Joel, ak tupchosiekyik bogol ak sosom:" 
1Chronicles15:8 che bo werikab Elisapan: ne o ko ki Semaia, ak tupchosiekyik bogol aeng’;" 
1Chronicles15:9 che bo werikab Hebron: ne o ko ki Eliel, ak tupchosiekyik tamanwogik sisiit:" 
1Chronicles15:10 che bo werikab Usiel; ne o ko ki Aminadab, ak tupchosiekyik bogol ak taman ak aeng’." 
1Chronicles15:11 Ak kiguur Daudi Sadok ak Abiatar, tisiik, ak kiguur Lawik, Uriel, Asaia, Joel, Semaia, Eliel, ak Aminadab," 
1Chronicles15:11 Ak kiguur Daudi Sadok ak Abiatar, tisiik, ak kiguur Lawik, Uriel, Asaia, Joel, Semaia, Eliel, ak Aminadab," 
1Chronicles15:12 ak kilenji ichek, O kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo Lawik: otililge okwek ak tupchosiekwok, si oibu moingetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, kotogos, konyo komosta ne koachopchi." 
1Chronicles15:13 Amu kima oib okwek yuginye, kobar anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo chito eng’ achek, amu kima kicheng’ inendet ko u ye kiging’at." 
1Chronicles15:14 Kotililgei anyun tisiik ak Lawik si koib moingetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, kotogos." 
1Chronicles15:15 Ak kiib lagokab Lawik moingetab Kamuktaindet eng’ tigigoikwak eng’ ketik che kiibe, ko u ye kiga ng’at Musa ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles15:16 Ak kimwachi Daudi che eechen che bo Lawik kolewen tupchosiekwak tienik, ak tuguk che kibutei, che choto ko kibugandinik, ak ketubosiek ak sanisiek che bo sugunonik che kibirei kebut kocheiyo mising’, ak kotienso eng’ kagasetab ge." 
1Chronicles15:17 Kolewen anyun Lawik Heman weritab Joel; ak eng’ tupchosiekyik, Asap weritab Berekia; ak eng’ werikab Merari tupchosiekwak, Etan weritab Kusaia;" 
1Chronicles15:17 Kolewen anyun Lawik Heman weritab Joel; ak eng’ tupchosiekyik, Asap weritab Berekia; ak eng’ werikab Merari tupchosiekwak, Etan weritab Kusaia;" 
1Chronicles15:18 ak kimi koboto ichek tupchosiekwak che kirubei ichek eng’ etunatet, Sekaria, Ben, Jaasiel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Uni, Eliab, Benaia, Maseia, Matitia, Elipeleu, Mikneia, Obed-edom ak Jeiel, ribikab kurgotik." 
1Chronicles15:19 Tienik anyun ko ki Heman, Asap, ak Etan, che kitinyei sanisiekab sugunonik che kibirei kocheiyo mising’;" 
1Chronicles15:20 koboto Sekaria, Asiel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Uni, ak Eliab, Maaseia, ak Benaia, che kitinyei kibugandinik, che bo cheetab Alamot;" 
1Chronicles15:21 ak Matitia, ak Elipeleu, Mikneia, Obed-edom, Jeiel, ak Asasia, che kibutei ketubosiek che bo cheetab Seminit, si kondochi." 
1Chronicles15:22 Ak kibou Kenania tienwogik, ne o eng’ Lawik: kiineti bik tiendo, amu ki utat inendet." 
1Chronicles15:23 Ak ki ribikab kurgetab ole kimi moinget, Berekia ak Elkana." 
1Chronicles15:24 Ak kiguut iriagok eng’ taitab moingetab Kamuktaindet, Sebania, ak Josapat, ak Netanel, Amasai, Sekaria, Benaia, ak Elieser, tisiik: ak ki ribikab kurgetab ole kimi moinget, Obed-edom ak Jeia." 
1Chronicles15:25 Kwo anyun Daudi ak boisiekab Israel, ak kiptainik che kibou elfusiek, koba koib eng’ kagasetab ge moingetab arorutietab Jehovah kotogos eng’ gotab Obed- edom:" 
1Chronicles15:26 ak kingo kagotoret Kamuktaindet Lawik che kiibei moingetab arorutietab Jehovah, koeny kirugik tisab ak mengichik tisab." 
1Chronicles15:27 Ak kiilaachi Daudi ngoriet ne bo katanit ne kararan, koboto Lawik tugul che kiibei moinget, ak tienik, ak Kenania kandoindetab tienik: ak kiilaachi Daudi epod ne bo katanit." 
1Chronicles15:28 Koib anyun Israel tugul moingetab arorutietab Jehovah kotogos kobolyonu kogasonugei, ak koguutonu iriagok, ak kobironu sanisiek che bo sugunonik, ak kobutonu kibugandinik ak ketubosiek." 
1Chronicles15:29 Ak kingoit moingetab arorutietab Jehovah nganasetab Daudi, koiit Mikal cheptab Saul eng’ tirisiet, kogeer laitoriat Daudi kourereni ak kogasigei; ak kisas inendet eng’ muguleldanyi." 
1Chronicles16:1 Kiib anyun moingetab Kamuktaindet, ak konde kwenutab emait ne kiga teekyi Daudi; ak kiigoito kagochinoik che kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles16:2 Ak kingo kagoges Daudi kogoitoetab kagochinet ne kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet, koberur bik eng’ kainetab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles16:3 Ak kiigochi chi age tugul ne bo Israel, ne muren ak kwonyu, kiigochi chi age tugul makatiat, ak bendo kitigin, ak makatiatab sabibuk che yaamnyotin." 
1Chronicles16:4 Ak kilewen alak eng’ Lawik kobois eng’ taitab moingetab Jehovah, ak koyai kabwatet, ak komwachin kongoi Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, ak kolosu inendet:" 
1Chronicles16:5 ki ne o Asap, ak ki ne rubei Sekaria, Jeiel, Semiramot, Jehiel, Matitia, Eliab, Benaia, Obed-edom ak Jeiel, kobutei kibugandinik ak ketubosiek; ak kibirei Asap sanisiek che bo sugunonik, kocheiyo mising’;" 
1Chronicles16:6 ak kiguutei kotugul iriagok Benaia ak Jahasiel tisiik, eng’ taitab moingetab arorutietab Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles16:7 Kong’at anyun Daudi eng’ betunoto, kigochi Jehovah kongoi korok, eng’ Asap ak tupchosiekyik." 
1Chronicles16:8 Oweekyi kongoi Jehovah, oguur eng’ kainennyi; Ongonaak boisionikyik eng’ bik." 
1Chronicles16:9 Otienji, otienji kalosunoik; Ong’alale boisionikyik che kikwong’e." 
1Chronicles16:10 Olosunege kainennyi ne tilil: Ingoboiboitu mugulelwekab ichek che cheng’ei Jehovah. 
1Chronicles16:11 Ocheng’ Jehovah ak kimnatennyi; Ocheng’ togennyi kotugul. 
1Chronicles16:12 Obwat boisionikyik che kikwong’e che kigoyai; Kwong’utikyik, ak kiruogutikab kutinnyi;" 
1Chronicles16:13 Ee okwek, keswekab Israel kiboitiondennyi, Okwek lagokab Jakobo, chechik che kigelewen." 
1Chronicles16:14 Inendet ko Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo: Mitei kiruogutikyik ng’ony komugul. 
1Chronicles16:15 Obwat kayomisennyi koigeny, Ng’olyot ne king’atyi ibinwek elfut;" 
1Chronicles16:16 Arorutiet ne kiyai koboto Abraham, Ak kayosiennyi ne kiiyosiechi Isak;" 
1Chronicles16:17 Ak kiigimityi Jakobo noto koek ng’atutiet, Kiigimityi Israel koek kayomiset ne bo koigeny:" 
1Chronicles16:18 Kolenji, Agonin emetab Kanan, Koek kebebertab boroteng’ung’:" 
1Chronicles16:19 Ye kita ko o bik che ng’ering’; Ee, kio ng’ering’ mising’, ak kio toek eng’ oloto;" 
1Chronicles16:20 Ak kibendat kobunot bororiet age agoi bororiet age, Ak kibun bounatet age koba oldab bik alak." 
1Chronicles16:21 Kima chamji chi koyachi ichek ne ya; Ee, kiger kong’ laitorinik amu ichek;" 
1Chronicles16:22 Kole, Amat otwa chechuk che kigiil, Amoyachi ne ya maotikyuk." 
1Chronicles16:23 Otienji Jehovah, ng’ony komugul; Obarte yetunennyi eng’ betut agoi betut." 
1Chronicles16:24 Omwaite torornatennyi eng’ bororiosiek, Ak boisionikyik che kikwong’e eng’ bik tugul." 
1Chronicles16:25 Amu o Jehovah, nyolu kilos inendet mising’: Kanyol kiywei inendet kosiir cheptalelisiek tugul." 
1Chronicles16:26 Amu cheptalelisiek tugul che bo bik ko matilei kiy: Ago kiyaei Jehovah kipsengwetisiek. 
1Chronicles16:27 Mi tainnyi teegisto ak etunatet: Mi oldanyi kimnatet ak kagasetab ge. 
1Chronicles16:28 Ogochi Jehovah, okwek tilionutikab bik, Ogochi Jehovah torornatet ak kimnatet." 
1Chronicles16:29 Ogochi Jehovah torornatet ne nyoljin kainennyi: Oibu kagochinet, ak obwa tainnyi: Ogutung’ji Jehovah eng’ kororonindab tililindo." 
1Chronicles16:30 Botan eng’ tainnyi, ng’ony komugul: Kigigimit ng’ony si mang’eigei." 
1Chronicles16:31 Ingogasgei kipsengwetisiek, ak ingobaibait ng’ony; Ingomwa eng’ bororiosiek, kole Laitorani Jehovah." 
1Chronicles16:32 Ingomoror nyanjet, ak tuguk che nyiitat oloto; Ingogasgei mbarenik, koboto tugul che mi oloto;" 
1Chronicles16:33 Si kotienso anyun eng’ boiboiyet ketik che mi osnet eng’ taitab Jehovah, Amu nyonei koruokyin ng’ony." 
1Chronicles16:34 Oweekyi Jehovah kongoi; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
1Chronicles16:35 Ak omwa ole, Soruech, ee Kamuktaindetab yetunennyo, Ak iyumech ak isoruech kemong’u eng’ bororiosiek, Si kobiit keweekyi kongoi kaineng’ung’ ne tilil, Ak kilosuge eng’ kalosuneng’ung’." 
1Chronicles16:36 Iberurot Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, Koboch koigeny agoi koigeny. Ak kimwa bik tugul kole, Amen, ak kolos Jehovah." 
1Chronicles16:37 Kobagach anyun eng’ yoto, eng’ taitab moingetab arorutietab Jehovah, Asap ak tupchosiekyik, si kobiit kobois eng’ taitab moinget betusiek tugul, ko u ye yamegei ak boisietab betut age tugul." 
1Chronicles16:38 Ak Obed-edom, koboto tupchosiekwak, bik tamanwogik lo ak sisiit; ak kobagach agine Obed-edom weritab Jedutun ak Hosa koek ribikab kurget:" 
1Chronicles16:39 ak kobagach Sadok tisiindet ak tupchosiekyik tisiik, eng’ taitab gotab Jehovah eng’ komosta ne toror ne kimi Gibeon," 
1Chronicles16:40 si kogochin Jehovah kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ kaptisisietab kagochinet ne kibeelei kotugul karon ak koskoleny, ko u tugul che kigisirji Ng’atutikab Jehovah, che king’atyi Israel;" 
1Chronicles16:41 ak kimi koboto ichek Heman ak Jedutun ak che kiga ng’et tugul che kigilewen, che kigimwa eng’ kainaikwak, koweekyi kongoi Jehovah, amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny;" 
1Chronicles16:42 ak kimi koboto ichek Heman ak Jedutun che kitinyei iriagok ak sanisiek che bo sugunonik che kibirei, che bo ichek che birei kocheiyo mising’, ak tuguk che kibutei che bo tienwogikab Kamuktaindet: ak kotebe werikab Jedutun ormarich." 
1Chronicles16:43 Ak kiba bik tugul kwo chi tugul gonnyi: ak kiweek Daudi kwo koberur gonnyi. 
1Chronicles17:1 Ak ye kimenyei Daudi gonnyi, kolenji Daudi maotiot Natan, Keero, amenye gotab ketikab taragonik, ago menyei moingetab arorutietab Jehovah angok orit." 
1Chronicles17:2 Ak kilenji Natan Daudi, Yai tuguk tugul che mi muguleldang’ung’; amu mi Jehovah koboten." 
1Chronicles17:3 Ak eng’ kemounoto konyonji ng’olyotab Kamuktaindet Natan kolenji," 
1Chronicles17:4 Ui ilenji Daudi otwogindennyu, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Meteekwa got ne amenye:" 
1Chronicles17:5 amu tom ameny got koboch betut ne kiamutu Israel kotogos, agoi ra; kobate kiawendote emait, ak got ne kituiyechin." 
1Chronicles17:6 Eng’ komoswek tugul che kiawendote koboto Israel, ko tos kiamwachi ng’olyo age eng’ kiruogikab Israel, che kiang’at kobai bikyuk, alenji, Amu nee si moteekwa got ne bo taragonik?" 
1Chronicles17:7 Noto anyun imwachini otwogindennyu Daudi ilenjini, Kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Kiamutun eng’ biutab kechirek, ye kiisuboti kechirek, si iegu bounindet eng’ bikyuk Israel:" 
1Chronicles17:8 ak kiatebi koboten eng’ komosta age tugul ne kiiwe, ak kiaiste buniguk eng’ taing’ung’; ak ayaun kainet ne u kainaikab bik che eechen che mi ng’ony." 
1Chronicles17:9 Ak alewenjini oldo bikyuk Israel, ak amine ichek, si kobiit komeny oldanywa, ama kiutoi kogeny; anan kota kobar ichek lagokab yaitiet kogeny, ko u tai." 
1Chronicles17:10 Ak koboch betut ne kiang’ate kiruogik koboi bikyuk Israel. Ak aterteri buniguk tugul. Kogeny amwaun ale teegun Jehovah got. 
1Chronicles17:11 Ak ye igesgei betusieguk si iwe ole mi kwanisieguk, alumde iyoteng’ung’, ne bo weriguk; ak agimit bounatennyi." 
1Chronicles17:12 Teekwa inendet got, ak agimiti ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet koigeny." 
1Chronicles17:13 Aegu kwandanyi, ak koek werinnyu: ak maistoe inendet rirennyu, ko u ye kiaistoe inendet ne kiindounenen:" 
1Chronicles17:14 ago andoi inendet kotebe gonnyu ak kotebe bounatennyu koigeny: ak kigimiti ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet koigeny. 
1Chronicles17:15 Kimwachi Natan Daudi ko u ng’alechuto tugul, ak ko u ng’ang’utioni tugul." 
1Chronicles17:16 Yeityo kwo go laitoriat Daudi, ak kotebi eng’ taitab Jehovah; ak kole, A ng’o, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet, ak nee gonnyu, kot imutwa agoi ra?" 
1Chronicles17:17 Ak kiek nito kit ne ming’in eng’ taing’ung’, ee Kamuktaindet, agoi kaing’alal agobo gotab otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ betusiek che chang’ che bwanei, ak kaiita eng’ koitetab chito ne bo torornatet, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles17:18 Nee age ne ta komuchi Daudi komwaun agobo teegisto ne kiyachin otwogindeng’ung’? Amu ingen otwogindeng’ung’. 
1Chronicles17:19 Ee Jehovah, kaiyai etunatoni tugul agobo otwogindeng’ung’, ak ko u muguleldang’ung’ inyege, si ibarte tuguchu eechen tugul konaak." 
1Chronicles17:20 Ee Jehovah, mami age ne ogerge, ama mi Kamuktaindet age kobatenen, ko u eng’ tugul che kigegas eng’ itikyok." 
1Chronicles17:21 Ak ngoro bororiet ne kergei ak biguk Israel, che kiwa Kamuktaindet kotiakyigei koek bikyik, si iyachige kainet eng’ tuguk che eechen ak tuguk che bo kamuiset, ye kiion bororiosiek eng’ taitab biguk, che kiitiach eng’ Misri?" 
1Chronicles17:22 Amu kiiyai biguk Israel koek biguk koigeny; ak kiiegu inye Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa. 
1Chronicles17:23 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah, ingogimit koigeny ng’olyot ne kiimwa agobo otwogindeng’ung’ ak agobo gonnyi, ak iyai ko u ye kaimwa." 
1Chronicles17:24 Ak ingogimit kaineng’ung’, ak kotororit koigeny, kele, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko Kamuktaindetab Israel, inendet Kamuktaindet eng’ Israel: ak kigimiti gotab Daudi otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ taing’ung’." 
1Chronicles17:25 Amu kiing’ang’ji otwogindeng’ung’, ee Kamuktaindennyu, ile iteekyini inendet got: kanyiganit anyun otwogindeng’ung’ kosa eng’ taing’ung’." 
1Chronicles17:26 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah, i Kamuktaindet, kaiyomisyi otwogindeng’ung’ kii mie:" 
1Chronicles17:27 ak nguno anyun, kebaibaitu iberur gotab otwogindeng’ung’, si kobiit koteb koigeny eng’ taing’ung’: amu kaiberur inye, ee Jehovah, ak iberurot koigeny." 
1Chronicles18:1 Ak kingobata nito, kobar Daudi Pilistik, ak koterter ichek, ak konam Gat ak nganasokyik koreb eng’ eunekab Pilistik." 
1Chronicles18:2 Ak kobar Moab; ak kiek Moabik otwogikab Daudi, ak koib kagochinoik." 
1Chronicles18:3 Ak kibar Daudi Hadareser laitoriatab Soba eng’ Hamat, ye kingowendi kogimiti bounatennyi eng’ ole negite ainetab Euprate." 
1Chronicles18:4 Ak kirebe Daudi inendet karisiek elfut, ak murenik elfusiek tisab che kilanyei mbartanyisiek, ak elfusiek tiptem che kibunei kelyek; ak kieb Daudi kutung’oikab mbartanyisiek, ago kiituuch eng’ choto che yamei karisiek bogol." 
1Chronicles18:5 Ak kingobwa Suriekab Damasko, kotoret Hadareser laitoriatab Soba, kobar Daudi bik elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’." 
1Chronicles18:6 Kiinde anyun Daudi irimosiek Suria ne bo Damasko; ak kiek Suriek otwogikab Daudi, ak kiib kagochinoik. Ak kiigochi Jehovah Daudi katerteret eng’ komosta age tugul ne kiwa." 
1Chronicles18:7 Ak kiib Daudi long’onikab tahabu che kitinyei otwogikab Hadareser, kobwa Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles18:8 Ak kiib Daudi sugunonik che chang’ eng’ Tibat ak Kun, nganasokab Hadareser, che kiyae Solomon nyanjet ne bo sugunwet, ak tolochik, ak tuguk che bo sugunonik." 
1Chronicles18:9 Ak kingogas Tou laitoriatab Hamat kole kogobar Daudi luget tugul ne bo Hadareser laitoriat ne bo Soba," 
1Chronicles18:10 koyokto Hadoram werinnyi kwo oldab laitoriat Daudi, kwo kogat inendet, ak koberur, amu kiga bargei ak Hadareser ak kobar inendet; amu kibargei Hadareser ak Tou; ak kitinyei terenik alak tugul che bo tahabu ak feda ak sugunonik." 
1Chronicles18:11 Kiitabanji Daudi Jehovah tuguchuto agichek, koboto feda ak tahabu che kiibune bororiosiek tugul; eng’ Edom, ak eng’ Moab, ak eng’ lagokab Amon, ak eng’ Pilistik, ak eng’ Amalek." 
1Chronicles18:12 Kibar kogeny Abisai weritab Seruia bikab Edom eng’ Atebwetab Munyuk elfusiek taman ak sisiit. 
1Chronicles18:13 Ak kiinde irimosiek Edom; ak kiek Edomik tugul otwogikab Daudi. Ak kiigoch Jehovah Daudi katerteret eng’ komosta age tugul ne kiwa. 
1Chronicles18:14 Ak kilaitoran Daudi eng’ Israel tugul; ak kiiruokyi bikyik tugul eng’ lititindo ak iman. 
1Chronicles18:15 Ak kibou Joab weritab Seruia luget; ak ki sirindetab tuguk che biitu Jeosapat weritab Ailud. 
1Chronicles18:16 Ak ki tisiik Sadok weritab Aitub, ak Abimelek weritab Abiatar; ak ki sirindet Sabsa;" 
1Chronicles18:17 ak kibou Benaia weritab Jeoiada Keretik ak Peletik; ak ki che eechen werikab Daudi che kitebe ye negite laitoriat. 
1Chronicles19:1 Ak kingobata nito, kome Nahas laitoriatab lagokab Amon, ak kilaitoran werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
1Chronicles19:2 Ak kile Daudi, Ayachini ne mie Hanun weritab Nahas, amu kiyaiywa ne mie kwandanyi. Kiiyokto anyun Daudi bik koba kogaigai inendet, amu kwandanyi. Ak kiit otwogikab Daudi emetab lagokab Amon oldab Hanun, koba kogaigai inendet." 
1Chronicles19:3 Ago kilenji bounikab lagokab Amon Hanun, Ibwati ile konyiti Daudi kwandang’ung’, kot koyogun kagoigoik? Tos ma bwa otwogikyik kobwa ole imi, kosiach, ak kobar ak kosegei emet?" 
1Chronicles19:4 Kinam anyun Hanun otwogikab Daudi, ak konem tamnokwak, ak kotil ngoroikwak komut kwenut, kobochit ngorook, ak kounda koba." 
1Chronicles19:5 Koba anyun bik alak, komwachi Daudi kit ne kogiyachi bichoto. Ak kiiyokto bik kotorokta; amu kiililandos bichoto mising’. Ak kilenji laitoriat, Otebi eng’ Jeriko agoi kobityo tamnokwok, ye ibata, obwa." 
1Chronicles19:6 Ak kingogeer lagokab Amon kole kagoyaagitu icheget eng’ Daudi, koyokto Hanun ak lagokab Amon talentaisiek elfut agenge che bo feda koale karisiek ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek eng’ Mesopotamia, ak Aram-maaka, ak Soba." 
1Chronicles19:7 Koaljigei anyun karisiek elfusiek sosom ak aeng’, koboto laitoriatab Maaka ak bikyik; che kibwa koteech taitab Medeba. Ak kiiyumgei lagokab Amon komong’ eng’ nganasokwak, kobwa koyai luget." 
1Chronicles19:8 Ak kingogas Daudi, koyokto Joab, ak luget tugul ne bo murenik che kimen." 
1Chronicles19:9 Ak kibwa lagokab Amon, ak kotet luget eng’ ormarichetab nganaset: ak kimi laitorinik ichegei warenget che kiga bwa." 
1Chronicles19:10 Ak kingogeer Joab kole kagetet luget agobo inendet eng’ tai ak let, kokwei murenik che kigilewen che bo Israel, ak kotet kobargei ak Suriek." 
1Chronicles19:11 Ak kiinde bik che kiga ng’et, eutab Abisai, ng’etab kamet, kotetgei ichek si kobargei ak lagokab Amon." 
1Chronicles19:12 Ak kile, Ngot kogimegitu Suriek kotertera, itoreta: ago ngot kogimegitu lagokab Amon koterterin, atoretin." 
1Chronicles19:13 Nyiganitu, ngeegu murenik agobo bikyok, ak nganasokab Kamuktaindennyo: ak ingoyai Jehovah ko u ye keerei kole mie." 
1Chronicles19:14 Kirikta anyun Joab ak murenik che kimi ak inendet koba luget kobargei ak Suriek; ak kimwee inendet. 
1Chronicles19:15 Ak kingogeer lagokab Amon kole kagomwei Suriek, komwei agichek eng’ taitab Abisai ng’etab kametab Joab, ak kiba nganaset. Kinyo anyun Joab Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles19:16 Ak kingogeer Suriek kole kagiterter ichek eng’ taitab Israel, koyokto bik, koba koguur Suriek che kimi Ainet bitonin, koboto Sopak kiptaiyatab lugetab Hadareser ne kiindoe ichek." 
1Chronicles19:17 Ak kigimwachi Daudi; ak kiiyum Israel tugul, ak kilandae Jordan, ak kiche ichek, ak kotet luget kobargei ak ichek. Ak kingo kagotet Daudi luget si kobargei ak Suriek, koyai ichek luget ak inendet." 
1Chronicles19:18 Ak kimwee Suriek Israel; ak kibar Daudi Suriek elfusiek tisab che bo karisiek, ak murenik elfusiek artam che bunei kelyek, ak kobar Sopak kiptaiyatab luget." 
1Chronicles19:19 Ak kingogeer otwogikab Hadareser kole kagiterter ichek eng’ taitab Israel, koyai kalyet ak Daudi, ak koot inendet; mata kocham Suriek kotoret lagokab Amon kogeny agoi." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ak kingogesgei kenyit, eng’ betusiek che kicham kobendi laitorinik luget, komut Joab nyigonikab luget, ak kong’em emetab lagokab Amon, ak kobwa koyiem Raba. Ago kitebi Daudi eng’ Jerusalem. Ak kibar Joab Raba, kowong’." 
1Chronicles20:2 Ak kiinem Daudi narietab laitoriandenywa eng’ metinnyi, ak kigeer kole yamegei ak talentait agenge ne bo tahabu, ak kimi koik che bo kamanutiet ne o eng’ orit; ak kigigerjine metit Daudi; ak kiib barunenik che chang’ kot che bo nganaset komong’." 
1Chronicles20:3 Ak kiimut bik che kimi nganaset komong’, ak komurmure musumenosiek, ak karik che kiburburene mbarenik, ak aonok. Ak kiyachi Daudi ko u noto nganasok tugul che bo lagokab Amon. Ak kiweek Daudi ak bik tugul koba Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles20:4 Ak kingobata nito, kong’eet borietab Pilistik eng’ Geser: kobar Sibekai Husatindet Sipai, ne bo werikab chito chemosit: ak kigiterter bichoto." 
1Chronicles20:5 Ak kibiit kogeny luget ak Pilistik; ak kibar Elanan weritab Jair Lami ng’etab kametab Goliat Gitindet, ne ki kergei irumetab ndirinnyi ak ketit ne taachin usisiek chito ne nabisiei." 
1Chronicles20:6 Ak kibiit luget kogeny eng’ Gat, ole kimi chito ne koi kot, ne kitinyei morik tiptem ak ang’wan, ki lo eng’ eut age tugul, ak ki lo eng’ keldo age tugul; ak kiga kisikyi agine chito chemosit." 
1Chronicles20:7 Ak ye kingoreny inendet Israel, kobar Jonatan weritab Simea ng’etab kametab Daudi inendet." 
1Chronicles20:8 Kigisikyi bichuto chito chemosit eng’ Gat; ak kibar Daudi ak otwogikyik bichoto. 
1Chronicles21:1 Ak king’eet Setani kogirinda Israel, ak kiigochi Daudi koiit Israel." 
1Chronicles21:2 Ak kilenji Daudi Joab ak bounikab bik, Oba, oiit Israel kong’eete Beer-seba agoi Dan; ak obwa omwawa, si anai koitenywa." 
1Chronicles21:3 Ak kile Joab, Ingotes Jehovah bikyik konyil che te koitenywa bogol: ago, kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, tugul ko ma otwogikab kiptaiyandennyu? Amu nee si komach kiptaiyandennyu kii? Amu nee si komachei inendet kong’eetyi tengekto Israel?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Ago kiiterter ng’olyotab laitoriat Joab. Kwo anyun Joab amu noto, kochut emet tugul ne bo Israel, agoi Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles21:5 Ak kiigochi Joab Daudi kit ne te koitetab bik. Ak che bo Israel tugul ko ki elfut konyil elfut, ak murenik elfusiek bogol che ki bo rotokab chok: ak che bo Juda ko ki murenik elfusiek bogol ang’wan ak tamanwogik tisab che ki bo rotokab chok." 
1Chronicles21:6 Ago ma kiitito Lawik ak Benjamin: amu kiek ng’olyotab laitoriat kit ne kiwechei eng’ Joab. 
1Chronicles21:7 Ak ma cham Kamuktaindet kiito; kobir anyun Israel. 
1Chronicles21:8 Ak kilenji Daudi Kamuktaindet, Kiayai tengekto ne o, amu kiayai kii: ago asomin ale, iste tengektab otwogindeng’ung’; amu kiayai eng’ berberindo ne o." 
1Chronicles21:9 Ak kimwachi Jehovah Gad keerindetab Daudi, kolenji," 
1Chronicles21:10 Ui mwachi Daudi ilenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kagonin tuguk somok; lewen agenge eng’ choto, si kobiit ayaun." 
1Chronicles21:11 Konyo anyun Gad ole mi Daudi, ak kolenji inendet, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Lewen ne imache;" 
1Chronicles21:12 kenyisiek somok che bo rubet; anan kobaratin buniguk arawek somok, koonotin rotwetab buniguk; anan ko betusiek somok che bo rotwetab Jehovah, noto ko koroitab ng’ony ne nyonei emet, ak kobarisiot malaikaiyatab Jehovah eng’ kiwotosiek tugul che bo Israel. Ibwat anyun nguno kit ne awoljini inendet ne koiyokwa." 
1Chronicles21:13 Ak kilenji Daudi Gad, Ami eng’ bichiindo ne o: ngabutyi eutab Jehovah; amu eechen mising’ rirenosiekyik: ameng’ abutyi eutab chi." 
1Chronicles21:14 Koyokyi Jehovah anyun koroitab ng’ony Israel: ak kibek murenik elfusiek tamanwogik tisabu che bo Israel. 
1Chronicles21:15 Ak kiiyokto Kamuktaindet malaikaiyat kwo kobar Jerusalem: ak ye ki negit kobar, kogeer Jehovah, ak kowal kabwatennyi agobo yaitionoto, ak kolenji malaikaiyat ne kibarisiei, Kagoyam; bagakte. Ak kitonone malaikaiyatab Jehovah ole negit ruanyut ne kiborse ne bo Ornan Jebusindet." 
1Chronicles21:16 Ak kiyot met Daudi, ak kogeer malaikaiyatab Jehovah kotononi eng’ kwenutab ng’ony ak kipsengwet, kotinyei rotwetab chok ne kaging’us eng’ eunnyi, ak kong’werere Jerusalem. Kobutyi ng’ony anyun Daudi ak boisiek kotoore togochikwak ng’ony, kolaachi kuniok." 
1Chronicles21:17 Ak kilenji Daudi Kamuktaindet, Koma ko ane ne kong’atei kiit bik? Anendet ne koayai tengekto ak ayai kit ne ya mising’; ago koyai nee kechirechu? Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindennyu, asain ale, ingobira eung’ung’ ak gotab kwandanyu; ago mat kebir biguk eng’ koroito." 
1Chronicles21:18 Kong’at anyun malaikaiyatab Jehovah Gad kolenji Daudi, Ui togoste, ak iteekyi Jehovah kaptisisiet eng’ ruanyut ne kiborse ne bo Ornan Jebusindet." 
1Chronicles21:19 Kotogosta Daudi anyun eng’ ng’olyotab Gad, ne kamwa eng’ kainetab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles21:20 Kowelelgei Ornan, ak kogeer malaikaiyat; ak kiunygei werikyik ang’wanu che kimi ak inendet. Kiborei Ornan nganok." 
1Chronicles21:21 Ak kingonyonei Daudi ole mi Ornan, kotobendo Ornan kogeer Daudi, kwo komanda eng’ ruanyunato kiborse, ak kong’uruk eng’ taitab Daudi kot kotiiny toget ng’ony." 
1Chronicles21:22 Kolenji anyun Daudi Ornan, Kona komosita iborse, si ateekyi Jehovah kaptisisiet eng’ yuto: igona eng’ alyet ne yamegei: si kosis koroito, mata kobar bik." 
1Chronicles21:23 Ak kilenji Ornan Daudi, Ib, kobunjin, ak ingoyai kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat kit ne keerei kole mie: keero, agonin eik koek kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak agonin tuguk che kiborse koek kwenik, ak agonin nganok koek kagochinetab busiek; kagonin tugul." 
1Chronicles21:24 Ak kilenji laitoriat Daudi Ornan, Achicha; aale alyet ne yamegei iman: amu maibe king’ung’ak agochi Jehovah, anan agoite kagochinet ne kibeelei ne ma kial." 
1Chronicles21:25 Kogochi anyun Daudi Ornan sekelisiek bogol lo che bo tahabu ngegaman, koale oloto." 
1Chronicles21:26 Ak kiteekyi Daudi Jehovah kaptisisiet eng’ yoto, ak kiigoito kagochinoik che kibeelei ak kagochinoikab kalyet, ak kisa Jehovah; ak kiwolji inendet eng’ kipsengwet eng’ mat ne kichorjigei kaptisisiet ne bo kagochinet ne kibeelei." 
1Chronicles21:27 Ak king’at Jehovah malaikaiyat; ak kiger rotwennyi eng’ choget. 
1Chronicles21:28 Ak kingogeer anyun Daudi eng’ sainato kole kagowolji Jehovah inendet eng’ ruanyut ne kiborse ne bo Ornan Jebusindet, koeny kagochinoikyik eng’ yoto." 
1Chronicles21:29 Amu kimi eng’ betusiechoto gotab Jehovah ne kiteechei Musa eng’ ong’atet, komosta ne toror eng’ Gibeon, koboto kaptisisietab kagochinet ne kibeelei." 
1Chronicles21:30 Ago kima imuch Daudi kwo taitab kaptisisionoto kwo koteepse Kamuktaindet: amu kiiyweisiei amu rotwetab chok ne bo malaikaiyatab Jehovah. 
1Chronicles22:1 Yeityo kole Daudi, Ni ko gotab Jehovah Kamuktaindet, ak ni ko kaptisisietab kagochinet ne kibeelei, ne bo Israel."
