1Chronicles22:2 Ak king’at Daudi kiyum bunotik che kimi emetab Israel; ak kiinde musogik che waei koik kowai koik, si keteege gotab Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles22:3 Ak kichob Daudi karik ng’isiat koek kipchumarisiek che bo kereiywekab ormarichok, ak che bo ole kituiyechin; koboto sugunonik ng’isiat che maiitoksei;" 
1Chronicles22:4 ak taragonik che maiitoksei; amu kiipchi bikab Sidon ak che bo Turo Daudi taragonik ng’isiat. 
1Chronicles22:5 Ak kile Daudi, Ta ko ming’in werinnyu Solomon, ak ko etyet, ak nyolu kogararanit mising’ got ne keteekyin Jehovah, konyor toogunatet ak torornatet eng’ emotinwek tugul: amu noto anyun achopchini tuguk goyoto. Kochob anyun Daudi tuguk ng’isiat kotom kome." 
1Chronicles22:6 Kiguur werinnyi Solomon anyun, ak kong’at inendet koteekyi got Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
1Chronicles22:7 Ak kilenji Daudi Solomon werinnyi, Kimi muguleldanyu ateekyi got kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu." 
1Chronicles22:8 Ago kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja, Kiitumde korotik che chang’ mising’, ak iyai lugosiek che eechen: meteekyini got kainennyu, amu kiitumde korotik che chang’ eng’ ng’ony eng’ tainnyu:" 
1Chronicles22:9 keero, tun kisigun werit, ne egu chitab kamuung’et; ak agochini inendet kamuung’et eng’ bunikyik tugul che mi komoswek tugul: amu kiguure kainennyi Solomon, ak agochi Israel kalyet ak kamuung’et eng’ betusiekyik:" 
1Chronicles22:10 teekyin inendet got kainennyu; ak koek werinnyu, ak aegu kwandanyi; ak agimit ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo bounatennyi eng’ Israel koigeny." 
1Chronicles22:11 Ara anyun, werinnyu, ingoteb Jehovah koboten; ak ibor, ak iteech gotab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko u ye kigomwa agobo inye." 
1Chronicles22:12 Ingogonin Jehovah kaguiyet ak naet, ak kogonin ng’atutiet agobo Israel; si kobiit irib ng’atutietab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
1Chronicles22:13 Ibor anyun, ngot irib iyai ng’atutik ak kiruogutik che kiiyomis Jehovah Musa agobo Israel: kimitu, nyiganitu; ameiywei, anan itoptoben." 
1Chronicles22:14 Keer anyun-o, kiachopchi gotab Jehovah eng’ nyalildanyu talentaisiek elfusiek bogol che bo tahabu, ak talentaisiek elfut konyil elfut che bo feda; koboto sugunonik ak karik che maiitoksei; amu ng’isiat: kiachob ketik agichek ak koik; ak imuchi ko ta ites alak." 
1Chronicles22:15 Ak itinye kogeny kiboitinik che chang’ kot, waikab koik ak che boisie koik ak ketik, ak bik tugul che ng’omen eng’ boisiet age tugul;" 
1Chronicles22:16 maiitoksei tahabu, ak feda, ak sugunonik, ak karik; ng’eet anyun, boisie, ak ingoteb Jehovah koboten." 
1Chronicles22:17 King’at kogeny Daudi bounik tugul che bo Israel kotoret werinnyi Solomon, kolenji," 
1Chronicles22:18 Tos mami kobotok Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’? Ak ma konok kamuung’et eng’ komoswek tugul? Amu kiinde eunnyu bik che menyei emoni; ak kigiterter emet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak eng’ taitab bikyik." 
1Chronicles22:19 Ara anyun, ochob mugulelwekwok ak sobonwekwok, ocheng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ong’eetye anyun, oteech ole tilil ne bo Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, si oibu moingetab arorutietab Jehovah ak tuguk che tililen che bo Kamuktaindet, kobwa got ne kiteekyin kainetab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles23:1 Kiga koosit Daudi, kiga kochang’a betusiekyik; ak kiyai Solomon werinnyi koek laitoriat koboi Israel." 
1Chronicles23:2 Ak kiiyum bounik tugul che bo Israel, koboto tisiik ak Lawik." 
1Chronicles23:3 Ak kigiit Lawik koboch che bo kenyisiek sosom ak che siirei: ak kiek koitenywa, ko kagiit chito agenge agenge, elfusiek sosom ak sisiit." 
1Chronicles23:4 Kitononjin boisietab gotab Jehovah elfusiek tiptemu ak ang’wan eng’ bichoto; ak ki elfusiek lo kiptainik ak kiruogik: 
1Chronicles23:5 ak ki elfusiek ang’wan ribikab kurgotik; ak kiilosu Jehovah elfusiek ang’wanu eng’ kibugandinik che kiayae ane, si kilosune Jehovah." 
1Chronicles23:6 Ak kipchei Daudi ichek, kopchechi boisionik kobee werikab Lawi: Gerson, Kohat, ak Merari." 
1Chronicles23:7 Che bo Gerson ko ki: Ladan ak Simei. 
1Chronicles23:8 Werikab Ladan: ne o ko ki Jehiel, Setam, ak Joel, somok." 
1Chronicles23:8 Werikab Ladan: ne o ko ki Jehiel, Setam, ak Joel, somok." 
1Chronicles23:9 Werikab Simei ko ki: Selomot, Hasiel, ak Haran, somok. Chuto ko ki kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo Ladan." 
1Chronicles23:10 Ak werikab Simei ko ki: Jahat, Sina, Jeus, ak Beria. Chuto ang’wan ko ki werikab Simei." 
1Chronicles23:11 Ak ki ne o Jahat, ak ki ne bo aeng’ Sia: ago kima kotinyei werik che chang’ Jeus ak Beria; koek anyun ichek got agenge ne bo kwanisiek." 
1Chronicles23:12 Werikab Kohat ko ki: Amram, Isar, Hebron ak Usiel, ang’wan." 
1Chronicles23:13 Werikab Amram ko ki: Aron, ak Musa: ak kigitaban Aron si kotaban inendet tuguk che tililen mising’, inendet ak werikyik, koigeny, si kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ taitab Jehovah, koboisiechi inendet, ak koberuris eng’ kainennyi koigeny." 
1Chronicles23:14 Ago kigiitito werikab Musa chitab Kamuktaindet, oretab Lawi." 
1Chronicles23:15 Werikab Musa ko ki: Gersom ak Elieser. 
1Chronicles23:16 Werikab Gersom: ne o ko ki Sebuel. 
1Chronicles23:17 Ak werikab Elieser: ne o ko ki: Reabia. Ak kima kotinyei Elieser werik alak; ago ki chang’ mising’ werikab Reabia. 
1Chronicles23:18 Werikab Isar: ne o ko ki Selomit. 
1Chronicles23:19 Werikab Hebron: ne o ko ki: Jeria, Amaria ne bo aeng’, Jahasiel, ne bo somok, ak Jekameam ne bo ang’wan." 
1Chronicles23:20 Werikab Usiel: ne o ko ki: Mika, ak Isia ne bo aeng’." 
1Chronicles23:21 Werikab Merari ko ki: Mali ak Musi. Werikab Mali ko ki: Eleasar ak Kis. 
1Chronicles23:22 Ak kime Eleasar, ama sich werik, kisich tibik kityo: ak kiitun ichek tupchosiekwak werikab Kis." 
1Chronicles23:23 Werikab Musi ko ki: Mali, Eder, ak Jerimot, somok." 
1Chronicles23:24 Chuto ko ki werikab Lawi ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekab icheget che kigiit, kobee koitetab kainaik, ko kagiit chito agenge agenge, che kiyai boisietab otisietab gotab Jehovah, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak che siirei." 
1Chronicles23:25 Amu kile Daudi, Kogogochi Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel bikyik kamuung’et; ak menyei inendet Jerusalem koigeny:" 
1Chronicles23:26 ak kogeny, ma koiboti Lawik got ne kituiyechin koboto tugukyik tugul che bo boisiennyi." 
1Chronicles23:27 Amu kigiit werikab Lawi eng’ ng’alekab Daudi che bo let, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak che siirei." 
1Chronicles23:28 Amu ki boisienywa koboisiechi werikab Aron agobo boisietab gotab Jehovah, eng’ seremusiek, ak eng’ gorik che bo orit, ak eng’ kaanyinyetab tuguk tugul che tililen, boisietab otisietab gotab Kamuktaindet;" 
1Chronicles23:29 agobo makatinikab kabartaet agichek, ak busiek che tambulul che bo kagochinetab busiek, ngo che bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek anan che kigelei eng’ tabet, anan che kinuri, ak eng’ tuguk alak tugul che kigerisie ak che terjin eng’ oindo;" 
1Chronicles23:30 ak kotonondos karonet age tugul koweekyin Jehovah kongoi ak kolosu inendet, ak ko u noto agine koskoleny;" 
1Chronicles23:31 ak kogochi Jehovah kagochinoik tugul che kibeelei eng’ sabatosiek, ak ye kaleel arawet, ak eng’ igorwek che kiging’at, eng’ koitenywa ko u ng’atutiet ne kiging’at agobo ichek, eng’ betusiek tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah:" 
1Chronicles23:32 si koripso eng’ ripsetab emait ne kituiyechin, ak ripsetab ole tilil, ak ripsetab werikab Aron tupchosiekwak, agobo otisietab gotab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles24:1 Ak pcheutikab werikab Aron ko ki chu. Werikab Aron ko ki: Nadab, Abiu, Eleasar, ak Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:2 Ago kibek Nadab ak Abiu kotom kome kwandanywa, ama sich lagok: kibois anyun Eleasar ak Itamar eng’ tiseinatet." 
1Chronicles24:3 Ak kipchei Daudi ak Sadok, eng’ werikab Eleasar, ak Aimelek, eng’ werikab Itamar, kopchei ichek ko u boisienywa eng’ otisienywa." 
1Chronicles24:4 Kibiitune bounik che chang’ werikab Eleasar kosiir che bo werikab Itamar; ak kigipchei ko u ni: kiek taman ak lo che bo werikab Eleasar kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek; ak kiek sisiit che bo werikab Itamar ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak. 
1Chronicles24:5 Kigipchei anyun ko u ni eng’ barbarek, chu ak chu; amu kimi bounik che bo ole tilil, ak bounik che bo Kamuktaindet, ki bo tuwai werikab Eleasar, ak werikab Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:6 Ak kisir ichek Semaia weritab Netanel, sirindet, ne ki bo Lawik, eng’ taitab laitoriat, ak bounik, ak Sadok tisiindet, ak Aimelek weritab Abiatar, koboto kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo tisiik ak che bo Lawik: kiginam got age ne bo kwanisiek kobunji Eleasar, kenam age kobunji Itamar." 
1Chronicles24:7 Kimong’ barbariat ne bo tai kobunji Jeoiarib, kobunji ne bo aeng’ Jedaia:" 
1Chronicles24:8 kobunji ne bo somok Harim, kobunji ne bo ang’wan Seorim;" 
1Chronicles24:9 kobunji ne bo mut Malkija, kobunji ne bo lo Mijamin;" 
1Chronicles24:10 kobunji ne bo tisab Hakos, kobunji ne bo sisiit Abija;" 
1Chronicles24:11 kobunji ne bo sogol Jesua, kobunji ne bo taman Sekania;" 
1Chronicles24:12 kobunji ne bo taman ak agenge Eliasib, kobunji ne bo taman ak aeng’ Jakim;" 
1Chronicles24:13 kobunji ne bo taman ak somok Hupa, kobunji ne bo taman ak ang’wan Jesebeab;" 
1Chronicles24:14 kobunji ne bo taman ak mut Bilga, kobunji ne bo taman ak lo Imer;" 
1Chronicles24:15 kobunji ne bo taman ak tisab Hesir, kobunji ne bo taman ak sisiit Hapises," 
1Chronicles24:16 kobunji ne bo taman ak sogol Petaia, kobunji ne bo tiptem Jeskel;" 
1Chronicles24:17 kobunji ne bo tiptem ak agenge Jakin, kobunji ne bo tiptem ak aeng’ Gamul;" 
1Chronicles24:18 kobunji ne bo tiptem ak somok Delaia, kobunji ne bo tiptem ak ang’wan Maasia." 
1Chronicles24:19 Nito ko ki boisienywa eng’ otisienywa, kobwa gotab Jehovah ko u ng’atutiet ne kigigochi ichek eng’ kwandanywa Aron, ko u ye kiga ng’at inendet Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
1Chronicles24:20 Ak che kiga ng’et che bo werikab Lawi: che bo werikab Amram, ko ki Subael; che bo werikab Subael, ko ki Jedaia." 
1Chronicles24:21 Che bo Reabia: che bo werikab Reabia, ko ki Isia ne o." 
1Chronicles24:22 Che bo Isarik, ko ki Selomot; che bo werikab Selomot, ko ki Jahat." 
1Chronicles24:23 Werikab Hebron ko ki Jeria ne o, Amaria ne bo aeng’, Jahasiel ne bo somok, Jekameam ne bo ang’wan." 
1Chronicles24:24 Werikab Usiel ko ki Mika; che bo werikab Mika, ko ki Samir." 
1Chronicles24:25 Ng’etab kametab Mika, Isia: che bo werikab Isia, ko ki Sekaria." 
1Chronicles24:26 Werikab Merari ko ki: Mali ak Musi: werikab Jaasia ko ki: Beno. 
1Chronicles24:27 Werikab Merari: che kisich Jaasia, ko ki Beno, Soham, Sakur, ak Ibri." 
1Chronicles24:28 Che bo Mali ko ki: Eleasar, ne kima sich werik." 
1Chronicles24:29 Che bo Kis: werikab Kis ko Jerameel. 
1Chronicles24:30 Ak werikab Musi ko ki: Mali, Eder, ak Jerimot. Chuto ko ki werikab Lawik ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak." 
1Chronicles24:31 Kiser chuto agichek barbarek ko u tupchosiekwak werikab Aron eng’ taitab laitoriat Daudi, ak Sadok, ak Aimelek, ak kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo tisiik ak che bo Lawik: gorikab kwanisiekab che eechen eng’ ichek kogergeit ak che bo tupchennyi ne ming’in." 
1Chronicles25:1 Kiitaban kogeny Daudi ak kiptainikab luget alak eng’ werikab Asap kotanbanji boisiet, ak che bo Herman, ak che bo Jedutun, si komaotenso eng’ ketubosiek, ak kibugandinik ak sanisiek che bo sugunonik che kibirei: ak koitetab icheget che kiyaei boisiet ko u otisienywa ko:" 
1Chronicles25:2 che bo werikab Asap ko ki: Sakur, Josep, Netania, ak Asarela, werikab Asap; che kiindochin Asap, ne kimaoteni, ko u ng’atutietab laitoriat." 
1Chronicles25:3 Che bo Jedutun: werikab Jedutun ko ki: Gedalia, Seri, Jesaia, Hasabia, ak Matitia, lo; che kiindochin kwandanywa Jedutun kobutei ketubet, che kimaoteni ak komwaei kongoi kolosu Jehovah." 
1Chronicles25:4 Che bo Heman: werikab Heman ko ki: Bukia, Matania, Usiel, Sebuel, Jerimot, Hanania, Hanani, Eliata, Gidalti, Romamti-eser, Josbekasa, Maloti, Hotir, ak Maasiot:" 
1Chronicles25:5 chuto tugul ko ki werikab Heman keerindetab laitoriat eng’ ng’alekab Kamuktaindet, konamji barak kuinet. Ak kiigochi Kamuktaindet Heman werik taman ak ang’wan, ak tibik somok." 
1Chronicles25:6 Kibou chuto tugul kwandanywa si kotienso eng’ gotab Jehovah, kotinyei sanisiek che bo sugunonik che kibirei, ak ketubosiek, agobo otisietab gotab Kamuktaindet; king’atei laitoriat Asap, Jedutun ak Heman." 
1Chronicles25:7 Ak koitenywa ko ki bogol aeng’ tamanwogik sisiit ak sisiit ko kagiit koboto tupchosiekwak che kiginet eng’ tienwogik kotienjin Jehovah, tugul che ki ng’omen." 
1Chronicles25:8 Ak kiser barbarek agobo boisionikwak, kogergeit tugul, che mengechen ak che eechen, konetindet ak ne kineti." 
1Chronicles25:9 Kimong’ barbariat ne bo tai, kobunji Josep agobo Asap: kobunji ne bo aeng’ Gedalia; ki taman ak aeng’ koboto tupchosiekyik ak werikyik:" 
1Chronicles25:10 kobunji ne bo somok Sakur, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik koboto tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:11 kobunji ne bo ang’wan Isri, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:12 kobunji ne bo mut Netania, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:13 kobunji ne bo lo Bukia, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:14 kobunji ne bo tisab Jesarela, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:15 kobunji ne bo sisiit Jesaia, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:16 kobunji ne bo sogol Matania, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:17 kobunji ne bo taman Simei, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:18 kobunji ne bo taman ak agenge Asarel, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:19 kobunji ne bo taman ak aeng’ Asabia, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:20 kobunji ne bo taman ak somok Subael, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:21 kobunji ne bo taman ak ang’wan Matitia, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:22 kobunji ne bo taman ak mut Jeremot, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:23 kobunji ne bo taman ak lo Hanania, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:24 kobunji ne bo taman ak tisab Josbekasa, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:25 kobunji ne bo taman ak sisiit Hanani, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:26 kobunji ne bo taman ak sogol Maloti, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:27 kobunji ne bo tiptem Eliata, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:28 kobunji ne bo tiptem ak agenge Hotir, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:29 kobunji ne bo tiptem ak aeng’ Gidalti, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:30 kobunji ne bo tiptem ak somok Maasiot, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik:" 
1Chronicles25:31 kobunji ne bo tiptem ak ang’wan Romamti-eser, ki taman ak aeng’ werikyik ak tupchosiekyik." 
1Chronicles26:1 Pcheutikab ribikab kurget ko: che bo Koraik ko ki: Meselemia weritab Kore, che bo werikab Asap." 
1Chronicles26:2 Ak kitinyei werik Meselemia, Sekaria taita, Jediael ne bo aeng’, Sebadia ne bo somok, Jatniel ne bo ang’wan;" 
1Chronicles26:3 Elam ne bo mut, Jeohanan ne bo lo, Eliehenai ne bo tisab." 
1Chronicles26:4 Ak kitinyei werik Obed-edom; Semaia taita, Jeosabad ne bo aeng’, Joa ne bo somok, ak Sakar ne bo ang’wan, Netanel ne bo mut." 
1Chronicles26:5 Amiel ne bo lo, Isakar ne bo tisab, Peuletai ne bo sisiit: amu kiiberur Kamuktaindet inendet." 
1Chronicles26:6 Ak kigisikyi werik Semaia agine, che kibou gotab kwandanywa: amu ki bik che kimen che nyigonen." 
1Chronicles26:7 Werikab Semaia ko ki: Otni, Repael, Obed, Elsabad, che ki bik che ki nyigonen tupchosiekwak, Eliu ak Semakia." 
1Chronicles26:8 Chuto tugul ko ki werikab Obed-edom: icheget ak werikwak ak tupchosiekwak ko ki bik che kimen eng’ kimnatet agobo otisiet; ki bik tamanwogik lo ak aeng’ che bo Obed-edom. 
1Chronicles26:9 Ak kitinyei Meselemia werik ak che tupcho, bik che nyigonen, taman ak sisiit." 
1Chronicles26:10 Kitinyei Hosa agine, ne bo lagokab Merari, werik; ki ne o Simri, (nganda kima ko taita inendet, ko kiyai kwandanyi inendet koek ne o;)" 
1Chronicles26:11 Hilkia ne bo aeng’, Tebalia ne bo somok, Sekaria ne bo ang’wan: ki taman ak somok werik tugul che bo Hosa koboto tupchosiekyik." 
1Chronicles26:12 Kimi eng’ chuto pcheutikab bik che kiribei kurget, bik che eechen, kotinyei ripsosiek che u che bo tupchosiekwak, si kobois eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles26:13 Ak kiser barbarek, bik che mengechen ak che eechen, kobee gorikab kwanisiekwak, agobo ormarichet age tugul." 
1Chronicles26:14 Ak kibunji barbariat ne kitokyigei kong’asis Selemia. Yeityo koser barbarek agobo Sekaria werinnyi, kiruogindet ne ng’om; ak kimong’ barbariandennyi kotokyigei murot ne bo katam." 
1Chronicles26:15 Ki bo Obed-edom ne kitokyigei murot ne bo tai; ak kibunji werikyik got ne kigonore tuguk. 
1Chronicles26:16 Kibunji Supim ak Hosa ne kitokyigei cherongo, ole negite ormarichetab Saleket, eng’ ole kitogostoe, kotokyindos ribik." 
1Chronicles26:17 Kimi Lawik lo komostab kong’asis, komi ang’wanu komostab murot ne bo katam betut age tugul, komi komostab murot ne bo tai ang’wanu betut age tugul, ak ki aeng’ aeng’ che bo got ne kigonore tuguk." 
1Chronicles26:18 Kimi bik ang’wanu ye kitogostoe eng’ Parbar, komostab cherongo, komi aeng’ Parbar." 
1Chronicles26:19 Chuto ko ki pcheutikab ribikab kurget che bo werikab Koraik, ak che bo werikab Merari." 
1Chronicles26:20 Ak eng’ Lawik, ko kiribei Aija tuguk che bo ole kigonore tuguk che bo gotab Kamuktaindet, koboto ole kigonore tuguk che itabanotin." 
1Chronicles26:21 Werikab Ladan: werikab Gersonik che bo Ladan, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo Ladan Gersonindet, ko Jeieli." 
1Chronicles26:22 Werikab Jeieli ko ki: Setam ak Joel ng’etab kamet, che kibou ole kigonore tugukab gotab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles26:22 Werikab Jeieli ko ki: Setam ak Joel ng’etab kamet, che kibou ole kigonore tugukab gotab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles26:23 Che bo Amramik, che bo Isarik, che bo Hebronik, che bo Usielik:" 
1Chronicles26:24 ak kibou Sebuel weritab Gersom, weritab Musa, ole kigonore tuguk." 
1Chronicles26:25 Ak tupchosiekyik: kisich Elieser Reabia werinnyi, Jesaia werinnyi, Joram werinnyi, Sikri werinnyi, ak Selomot werinnyi." 
1Chronicles26:26 Kibou Selomotinito ak tupchosiekyik komoswek tugul ole kigonore tuguk che itabanotin, che kiga kotaban laitoriat Daudi, koboto kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek, ak kiptainikab elfusiek, ak che bo bogolwogik, ak kiptainikab luget." 
1Chronicles26:27 Kiitaban che bo barunenik tuguk che kigibaru eng’ lugosiek, si keteege ole kigobutok eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles26:28 Kibou Selomot ak tupchosiekyik tuguk tugul che kiga kotaban Samuel keerindet, ak Saul weritab Kis, ak Abner weritab Ner, ak Joab weritab Seruia, koboto kiy age tugul ne kiga kotaban chi age tugul." 
1Chronicles26:29 Kiyaei Kenania ak werikyik, che bo Isarik, boisionikab sang’ che bo Israel, koek kiptainik ak kiruogik." 
1Chronicles26:30 Eng’ Hebronik, ko kiribei Asabia ak tupchosiekyik, bik che nyigonen elfut agenge ak bogol tisab, Israel eng’ Jordan bitonin komostab cherongo; agobo boisionik tugul che bo Jehovah, ak otisietab laitoriat." 
1Chronicles26:31 Che bo Hebronik, ko ki Jerija ne o, che bo Hebronik, ko u ibinwekwak, eng’ gorikab kwanisiek. Kigicheng’ bichoto eng’ kenyitab artam ne bo laitornatetab Daudi, ak kibiit eng’ ichek bik che kimen che nyigonen eng’ Jaser ne bo Gilead." 
1Chronicles26:32 Ak tupchosiekyik, che ki bik che nyigonen, ko kiek elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol tisab, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek, che kiinde laitoriat Daudi koboi bikab Reuben, ak Gadik, ak kebebertab bororietab Manase, agobo kiy age tugul ne tokyingei Kamuktaindet, ak ng’alekab laitoriat." 
1Chronicles27:1 Kiek lagokab Israel, ko u koitenywa, noto ko kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek ak kiptainikab elfusiek, ak che bo bogolwogik, ak kiptainikwak che kiboisiechin laitoriat, eng’ ng’olyot age tugul ne bo ripsosiek che kibwanei ak kobendi eng’ arawet age tugul eng’ arawek tugul che bo kenyit, bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan che bo ripset age tugul." 
1Chronicles27:2 Kibou ripset ne bo tai ne bo arawet ne bo tai Jasobeam weritab Sabdiel: ak kimi ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptemu ak ang’wan. 
1Chronicles27:3 Ki bo lagokab Peres, ne o eng’ kiptainik tugul che bo luget ne bo arawet ne bo tai." 
1Chronicles27:4 Ak kibou ripset ne bo arawet ne bo aeng’ Dodai Ahoindet, ak ripsennyi; ak Miklot bounindet: ak kitinyei bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan eng’ ripsennyi." 
1Chronicles27:5 Kiptaiyat ne bo somok ne bo luget eng’ arawetab somok ko ki Benaia, weritab Jeoiada, tisiindet ne o: ak kitinyei bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan eng’ ripsennyi." 
1Chronicles27:6 Benaia-ini ko ki chito ne nyigan eng’ bik sosom, ak kibou bichoto sosom: ak ki bo ripsennyi Amisabad werinnyi." 
1Chronicles27:7 Ki Asael ng’etab kametab Joab kiptaiyat ne bo ang’wan eng’ arawet ne bo ang’wan, ak kirubei inendet Sebadia werinnyi: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan." 
1Chronicles27:8 Ki Samut Israindet kiptaiyat ne bo mut eng’ arawetab mut: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan. 
1Chronicles27:9 Ki Ira weritab Ikes Tekoindet kiptaiyat ne bo lo: eng’ arawet ne bo lo; ak kitinyei bik eng’ ripsennyi elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan. 
1Chronicles27:10 Ki Heles Pelonindet, ne bo werikab Epraim, kiptaiyat ne bo tisab eng’ arawet ne bo tisab: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan." 
1Chronicles27:11 Ki Sibekai Husatindet ne bo Seraik, kiptaiyat ne bo sisiit eng’ arawet ne bo sisiit: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan." 
1Chronicles27:12 Ki Abieser Anatotindet ne bo Benjaminik, kiptaiyat ne bo sogol eng’ arawetab sogol: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan." 
1Chronicles27:13 Ki Maarai Netopatindet ne bo Seraik, kiptaiyat ne bo taman eng’ arawet ne bo taman: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan." 
1Chronicles27:14 Ki Benaia Piratonindet ne bo lagokab Epraim, kiptaiyat ne bo taman ak agenge eng’ arawetab taman ak agenge: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan." 
1Chronicles27:15 Ki Heldai Netopatindet ne bo Otniel kiptaiyat ne bo taman ak aeng’ eng’ arawetab taman ak aeng’: ak kitinyei eng’ ripsennyi bik elfusiek tiptem ak ang’wan. 
1Chronicles27:16 Kogeny, bik che kibou bororiosiekab Israel ko ki: bounindet Elieser weritab Sikri ne bo bikab Reuben: eng’ bikab Simeon, ko ki Sepatia weritab Maaka:" 
1Chronicles27:17 eng’ gab Lawi, ko ki Asabia weritab Kemuel: eng’ gab Aron, ko ki Sadok," 
1Chronicles27:18 eng’ gab Juda, ko ki Eliu, age eng’ tupchosiekab Daudi: eng’ gab Isakar, ko ki Omri weritab Mikael:" 
1Chronicles27:19 eng’ gab Sebulun, ko ki Ismaia weritab Obadia: eng’ gab Naptali, ko ki Jeremot weritab Asriel:" 
1Chronicles27:20 eng’ lagokab Epraim ko ki Hosea weritab Asasia: eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase, ko ki Joel weritab Pedaia:" 
1Chronicles27:20 eng’ lagokab Epraim ko ki Hosea weritab Asasia: eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase, ko ki Joel weritab Pedaia:" 
1Chronicles27:20 eng’ lagokab Epraim ko ki Hosea weritab Asasia: eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase, ko ki Joel weritab Pedaia:" 
1Chronicles27:21 eng’ kebebertab bororietab Manase, eng’ Gilead, ko ki Ido weritab Sekaria: eng’ gab Benjamin, ko ki Jaasiel weritab Abner;" 
1Chronicles27:22 eng’ gab Dan, ko ki Asarel weritab Jeroam. Chuto ko ki kiptainikab bororiosiekab Israel." 
1Chronicles27:23 Ago kima iit Daudi che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak koba ng’ony: amu kiga mwa Jehovah kole, Atese Israel kotenit kecheikab kipsengwet." 
1Chronicles27:24 Kitoi Joab weritab Seruia koiit, ago ma iges; ak kibiit neregek eng’ Israel agobo koitonito: ama kisirji koitonoto tetetab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitoriat Daudi." 
1Chronicles27:25 Ak kibou ole kigonore tugukab laitoriat Asmabet weritab Adiel: ak kibou Jonatan weritab Usia ole kigonore tugukab mbarenik, eng’ nganasok, ak eng’ nganasok che mengechen, ak eng’ irimosiek:" 
1Chronicles27:26 ak kibou Isri weritab Kelub ichek che kiyaei boisietab mbar, ne bo kabatisietab emet:" 
1Chronicles27:27 ak kibou Simei Ramatindet mbarenikab sabibuk: ak kibou Sabdi Sipmindet ruratetab mbarenikab sabibuk che kigonori: 
1Chronicles27:28 ak kibou Baal-hanan Gederindet ketikab emitik ak mogoonik che kimi emet ne soi: ak kibou Joas ole kigonore mwanik: 
1Chronicles27:29 ak kibou Sitrai Saronindet akwotisiek che kiagetos eng’ Saron: ak kibou Sapat weritab Adlai akwotisiek che kimi atebwosiek: 
1Chronicles27:30 ak kibou Obil Ismaelindet tambesik: ak kibou Jedeia Meronotindet sigirok: 
1Chronicles27:31 ak kibou Jasis Hagrindet akwotisiekab kechirek. Chuto tugul ko ki bounikab tugukab laitoriat Daudi. 
1Chronicles27:32 Ki kiruogindet Jonatan weritab ng’etab kametab Daudi, ki chito ne ng’om, sirindet: ak kimi Jehiel weritab Akmoni koboto werikab laitoriat:" 
1Chronicles27:33 ak ki kiruogindet Aitopel ne bo gab laitoriat: ki choruetab laitoriat, Hisai Arkindet:" 
1Chronicles27:34 ak kirubei Jeoiada weritab Benaia ak Abiatar, Aitopel: ak ki kiptaiyatab lugetab laitoriat, Joab." 
1Chronicles28:1 Ak kiiyum Daudi bounik tugul che bo Israel, koboto bounikab ortinwek, ak kiptainikab kweanaik che kiboisiechin laitoriat eng’ ripset, ak kiptainikab elfusiek, ak kiptainikab bogolwogik ak bounik che kibou tuguk tugul che bo laitoriat, ak che bo werikyik, koboto kiptainik, ak bik che kimen che nyigonen, bik tugul che kimen che nyigonen, kobwa Jerusalem." 
1Chronicles28:2 Ak kitonon anyun laitoriat Daudi, ak kole, Ogasa, tupchosiekyuk, ak bikyuk: kimi muguleldanyu ateech got ne imuung’e moingetab arorutietab Jehovah, ak ng’echeret ne tebe kelyekab Kamuktaindennyo; ak kiga achob tuguk che bo teekset." 
1Chronicles28:3 Ago kilenja Kamuktaindet, Meteekyini got kainennyu, amu i chitab luget, ak kiitumde korotik." 
1Chronicles28:4 Ago kilewena Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, eng’ got komugul ne bo kwandanyu aek laitoriat eng’ Israel koigeny: amu kilewen Juda koek bounindet; ak eng’ gotab Juda, ne gotab kwandanyu, ak kibaibaitunena eng’ werikab kwandanyu; si koyaa aek laitoriat eng’ Israel tugul:" 
1Chronicles28:5 ak kilewen Solomon werinnyu eng’ werikyuk tugul, (amu kigogona Jehovah werik che chang’,) kotebe ng’echeret ne bo laitornatetab bounatetab Jehovah koboi Israel." 
1Chronicles28:6 Ak kimwawa kole, Teechei Solomon wering’ung’ gonnyu ak seremusiekyuk: amu kialewen inendet koek werinnyu, ak aegu kwandanyi." 
1Chronicles28:7 Ak agimit bounatennyi koigeny, ngot koyai kotugul ng’atutikyuk ak kiruogutikyuk, ko u rani." 
1Chronicles28:8 Ara anyun, orib ak ocheng’ ng’atutik tugul che bo Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, eng’ taitab Israel tugul, tuiyetab Jehovah, kogasei Kamuktaindennyo: si kobunjok emoni kararan, ak obagakyi lagokwok koek borotenywa koigeny." 
1Chronicles28:9 Nai anyun inye Solomon werinnyu, Kamuktaindetab kwandang’ung’, ak iboisiechi inendet eng’ muguleldo ne igesunotgei, ak eng’ kabwatutik che tinyei chamet: amu isiachi Jehovah mugulelwek tugul, ak koguitos kabwatutik tugul che bo metit: ngot icheng’ inendet, inyoru: ago ngot imete inendet, kowirtoin koigeny." 
1Chronicles28:10 Ripge anyun; amu kigolewenin Jehovah iteech got ne bo ole tilil: kimitu anyun, ak iyai." 
1Chronicles28:11 Yeityo kogochi Daudi Solomon werinnyi kergeindab keterut, ak ne bo gorikab hekalunoto, ak ne bo ole kigonore tuguk, ak ne bo gorik che bo barak, ak ne bo gorik che bo orit, ak ne bo keruetab rirenet:" 
1Chronicles28:12 ak kergeindab tuguk tugul che kiiborji Tamirmiriet, agobo seremusiekab gotab Jehovah, ak gorik tugul che kigiyieme, che bo ole kigonorisie eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet, koboto che bo ole kigonore tuguk che itabanotin:" 
1Chronicles28:13 ak kiigochi kogeny pcheutikab ripsosiekab tisiik ak Lawik, ak ne bo boisiet tugul ne bo otisietab gotab Jehovah, ak ne bo tuguk tugul che kiboisie eng’ gotab Jehovah:" 
1Chronicles28:14 che bo tahabu ngepiman, ko bo tugukab tahabu, che bo tuguk tugul che bo boisiet age tugul; che bo feda, ko bo tuguk tugul che bo feda ngepiman, che bo tuguk tugul che bo boisiet age tugul:" 
1Chronicles28:15 ak kiigochi kogeny ole te tahabu che bo kelyekab tait ngepiman, ak che bo taisiekyik, che bo tahabu ngepiman, che bo keldo age tugul ne bo tait, ak che bo taisiekyik: ak che bo kelyekab taitab feda, che bo feda ngepiman ko bo keldo age tugul ne bo tait, ak che bo taisiekyik, ko u boisietab keldo age tugul ne bo tait:" 
1Chronicles28:16 ak tahabu ngepiman, ko bo mesosiekab makatinikab kabartaet che bo meset age tugul; ak feda che bo mesosiekab feda:" 
1Chronicles28:17 ak karik che kirutune banyek, ak tabok, ak kikombok, che bo tahabu che tililen: ak che bo tabokab tahabu ngepiman ko bo tabet age tugul; ak che bo tabokab feda ngepiman, ko bo tabet age tugul:" 
1Chronicles28:18 ak che bo kapkorosut ne kibeele nyamdutik ko bo tahabu che tililen ngepiman: ak tahabu che bo kergeindab karit, choto kerubisiek che kiuito kebebaikwak, si kouur moingetab arorutietab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles28:19 Kigigona aguiyo chuto tugul eng’ sirutik kobun eutab Jehovah, boisionik tugul che bo kergeini." 
1Chronicles28:20 Ak kilenji Daudi Solomon werinnyi, Kimitu nyiganitu, ak iyai: ameiywei, anan itoptoben: amu mi koboten Jehovah Kamuktaindet, inendet Kamuktaindennyu: mabagaktoin, anan kometen agoi kogesgei boisiet tugul ne bo otisietab gotab Jehovah." 
1Chronicles28:21 Ak keero, mi ripsosiekab tisiik ak Lawik, agobo otisiet tugul ne bo gotab Kamuktaindet: ak mi koboten eng’ boisiet age tugul chi age tugul ne chamei ak ko utat, agobo otisiet age tugul; kogeny, kase it ng’atutieng’ung’ komie kiptainik ak bik tugul." 
1Chronicles29:1 Ak kilenji laitoriat Daudi tuiyet tugul, Ta ko ming’in Solomon werinnyu, ne kilewen inegei Kamuktaindet, ak ko ta ko etyet, ak ko o boisiet: amu goyoto bo laitoriat ko ma bo chito, bo Jehovah Kamuktaindet." 
1Chronicles29:2 Kiachob anyun eng’ kimnatennyu tugul, tahabu agobo tugukab tahabu, che bo gotab Kamuktaindennyu, ak feda agobo tugukab feda, ak sugunonik agobo tugukab sugunonik, ak karik agobo tugukab karik, ak ketik agobo tugukab ketik; koik che kiguure soam, ak koik che kitetei, kindoi kotabon ng’ony, ak che bo saleiywek che terjin, ak koik alak tugul che bo kamanutiet ne o, ak koik ng’isiat che leelach." 
1Chronicles29:3 Kogeny, amu kiacham mising’ gotab Kamuktaindennyu, ko u ye atinye tugukyuk che bo tahabu ak feda, agochini gotab Kamuktaindennyu, che siirei tuguk tugul che kiachopchi got ne tilil;" 
1Chronicles29:4 talentaisiek elfusiek somok che bo tahabu, che bo tahabu che bo Opir, ak talentaisiek elfusiek tisab che bo feda che tililen, che kiliige inatusiekab gorik:" 
1Chronicles29:5 che bo tahabu agobo tugukab tahabu, ak che bo feda agobo tugukab feda, ak che bo boisiet age tugul che yaei musogik. Ng’o anyun ne chamei kotabanjigei Jehovah eng’ betuni?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Kiigoito anyun eng’ chamnyet bounikab gorikab kwanisiek, ak bounikab ortinwekab Israel, ak kiptainikab elfusiek, ak che bo bogolwogik, koboto bounik che kibou boisietab laitoriat;" 
1Chronicles29:7 ak kiigoito agobo otisietab gotab Kamuktaindet talentaisiek elfusiek mut che bo tahabu koboto darkoni elfusiek taman, ak talentaisiek che bo feda elfusiek taman, ak che bo sugunonik talentaisiek elfusiek taman ak sisiit, ak che bo karik talentaisiek elfusiek bogol." 
1Chronicles29:8 Ak ichek che kitinyei koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, ko kiigoito kinde ole kigonore tugukab gotab Jehovah, koba eutab Jehiel Gersonindet." 
1Chronicles29:9 Koboiboitu anyun bik, amu kiigoito eng’ chamnyet, amu kiigochi Jehovah eng’ muguleldo ne igesunotgei: ak kibaibait agine laitoriat Daudi eng’ boiboiyet ne o." 
1Chronicles29:10 Kolos anyun Daudi Jehovah eng’ taitab tuiyet tugul; ak kile Daudi, Iberurot inye, koigeny ak koigeny, ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel kwandanyo." 
1Chronicles29:11 Cheguk, ee Jehovah, oindo, ak kamuktaet, ak torornatet, ak katerteret, ak etunatet; amu cheguk tuguk tugul che mi kipsengwet ak che mi ng’ony; neng’ung’ bounatet, ee Jehovah, ak i tororot, i metitab tugul." 
1Chronicles29:12 Bunun magornatosiek ak teegisto, ak ibou tugul; ak mi eung’ung’ kimnatet ak kamuktaet; inye ne ieeti, ak inye ne igochini tugul kimnatet." 
1Chronicles29:13 Ara anyun, Kamuktaindennyo, kimwaun kongoi, ak kilosu kaineng’ung’ ne bo torornatet." 
1Chronicles29:14 Ago a ng’o, ak nee bikyuk, kot kimuch kigoite eng’ chamnyet ko u ni? Amu bunun tuguk tugul, ak kagigonin tuguguk." 
1Chronicles29:15 Amu ki toek eng’ taing’ung’, ak ki kiprutoinik, ko u ye ki u kwanisiekyok tugul: u betusiekyok eng’ ng’ony uruet, ama mi ne tebyei agoi." 
1Chronicles29:16 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, bunu eung’ung’ tuguchuto tugul kogechop si keteegunenen got ne bo kaineng’ung’ ne tilil, cheguk tugul." 
1Chronicles29:17 Angen kogeny, ee Kamuktaindennyu ale, itieme muguleldo, ak ibaibaitune lititindo. Ak kiagonin tuguchuto tugul eng’ chamnyet ak lititindab muguleldanyu: ak kaageer nguno eng’ boiboiyet biguk che mi yu kogonin eng’ chamnyet." 
1Chronicles29:18 Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Abraham, ak ko bo Isak, ak ko bo Israel, kwanisiekyok, rib ng’olyondonito koigeny eng’ kabwatutik che ibwati mugulelwekab biguk, ak ichopchige mugulelwekwak:" 
1Chronicles29:19 ak igochi werinnyu Solomon muguleldo ne igesunotgei, si korib ng’atutiguk, ak baornatosieguk, ak konetisiosieguk, ak koyai tuguchuto tugul, ak koteech gotab laitoriat, ne kiachopchi tuguchuto." 
1Chronicles29:20 Ak kilenji Daudi tuiyet tugul, Olosu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’. Ak kiilos tuiyet komugul Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, ak kong’uruk, kogutung’ji Jehovah, ak laitoriat." 
1Chronicles29:21 Ak kieny tiseiywek koeng’ji Jehovah, ak kogochi Jehovah kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, eik elfut, mengichik elfut, ak arekab kechir elfut, koboto kagochinoikwak che kieei, ak korosek ng’isiat che bo Israel tugul;" 
1Chronicles29:22 ak kiamis ak koeeiso eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ betunoto eng’ kagasetab ge ne o. Ak kiyai Solomon weritab Daudi koek laitoriat kogeny, ak koiil inendet eng’ taitab Jehovah koek bounindet, ak koiil Sadok koek tisiindet." 
1Chronicles29:23 Kotebe anyun Solomon ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Jehovah koek laitoriat, kogeer Daudi kwandanyi, ak kobor; ak kigas it Israel tugul inendet." 
1Chronicles29:24 Ak kigas it bounik tugul, ak bik che kimen, koboto werik tugul che bo laitoriat Daudi, laitoriat Solomon." 
1Chronicles29:25 Ak kiieet Jehovah Solomon mising’ eng’ taitab Israel tugul, ak kogochi inendet etunatetab laitornatet ne kitom kigochi laitoriat age tugul eng’ Israel ne kiindoune inendet." 
1Chronicles29:26 Kilaitoran Daudi anyun weritab Jesii eng’ Israel tugul. 
1Chronicles29:27 Ak betusiek che kilaitorane Israel ko ki kenyisiek artam; kilaitoran eng’ Hebron kenyisiek tisab, kolaitoran eng’ Jerusalem kenyisiek sosom ak somok." 
1Chronicles29:28 Ak kiilil, ko kagoyam betusiekyik, ak magornatosiek, ak teegisto: ak kilaitoran Solomon werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
1Chronicles29:29 Ak boisionikab laitoriat Daudi, che bo tai ak che bo let, ogeero, sirotin eng’ ng’alekab Samuel keerindet, ak eng’ ng’alekab Natan maotiot, ak eng’ ng’alekab Gad keerindet;" 
1Chronicles29:30 koboto laitornatennyi tugul ak kimnatennyi, ak betusiekab sobennyi, ak che bo Israel, ak che bo bounatosiek tugul che bo emotinwek." 
2Chronicles1:1 Ak kigimit Solomon weritab Daudi eng’ bounatennyi, ak kimi Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi koboto inendet, ak kiieet inendet mising’." 
2Chronicles1:2 Ak king’alalji Solomon Israel tugul, kiptainikab elfusiek ak che bo bogolwogik, ak kiruogik, ak bounindet age tugul eng’ Israel tugul, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek." 
2Chronicles1:3 Kiwa anyun Solomon koboto tuiyet tugul, komosta ne toror eng’ Gibeon; amu kimi yoto emait ne kituiyechin ne bo Kamuktaindet, ne kiga teech Musa otwogindetab Jehovah eng’ ong’atet." 
2Chronicles1:4 Ago kiga koib Daudi moingetab Kamuktaindet kotogos eng’ Kiriat-jearim konyo ole kiga kochopchi Daudi: amu kiga koteekyi emait eng’ Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles1:5 Ak kimi yoto kaptisisiet ne bo sugunwet ne kiyaei Besalel weritab Uri, weritab Hur, kimitei taitab gotab Jehovah: ak kiba Solomon ak tuiyet ole mi." 
2Chronicles1:6 Ak kitogosta Solomon kwo ole mitei kaptisisiet ne bo sugunwet, ne kimitei emait ne kituiyechin, eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kogoito kagochinoik che kibeelei elfut." 
2Chronicles1:7 King’ang’jigei anyun Kamuktaindet Solomon kemounoto, ak kolenji, Som kit ne imache agonin." 
2Chronicles1:8 Kilenji Solomon Kamuktaindet, Kiiyachi mieindo ne o kwandanyu Daudi, ak kiyaa aek laitoriat ageer inendet." 
2Chronicles1:9 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet, ingogimit kayomiset ne kiiyomisyi kwandanyu Daudi: amu koiyaa aek laitoriat aboi bik che te temburiek eng’ ng’ony eng’ chang’indo." 
2Chronicles1:10 Kona anyun ng’omnatet ak naet, si amuch amanda ak anyo eng’ taitab bichu: amu ng’o ne imuchi koruokyi bichuguk chang’ ko u ni?" 
2Chronicles1:11 Ak kilenji Kamuktaindet Solomon, Amu kimi ng’olyondonito muguleldang’ung’, ama isom magornatosiek, ak chang’indab tuguk, anan ko teegisto, anan kebar icheget che wechin, ama isom isob keny; ago kesomjige ng’omnatet ak naet, si kobiit iruokyi bikyuk, che kiandein iegu laitoriat ibou:" 
2Chronicles1:12 kagegonin anyun ng’omnatet ak naet; ak agonin magornatosiek, ak chang’indab tuguk, ak teegisto, che tom konyor laitorinik che kigondounenen, ama kobiitu age ne nyoru ko u noto." 
2Chronicles1:13 Konyo anyun Solomon eng’ komosato toror ne kimi Gibeon, eng’ taitab emait ne kituiyechin, konyo Jerusalem; ak kilaitoran eng’ Israel." 
2Chronicles1:14 Ak kiiyum Solomon karisiekab luget ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek: ak kitinyei karisiek elfut agenge ak bogol ang’wan, ak bik elfusiek taman ak aeng’ che lanyei mbartanyisiek, che kiinde nganasokab karisiek, koboto ole mi laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles1:15 Ak kiyai laitoriat feda ak tahabu eng’ Jerusalem kot kotenit koik, ak kiyai taragonik kotenit mogoonik che mi emet ne soi." 
2Chronicles1:16 Ak kigigetune Misri mbartanyisiek che kitinyei Solomon; kialei chemung’arainikab laitoriat kobee akwotisiek, akwet age tugul eng’ alyennyi." 
2Chronicles1:17 Ak kiib kotogos eng’ Misri karit ne yamei sekelisiek bogol lo che bo feda, ak mbartanyit ne yamei bogol agenge ak konom: ak kiyai ko u noto laitorinik tugul che bo Hitik, ak laitorinikab Suria, kiget ichek eng’ kamugenywa." 
2Chronicles2:1 Kibegechi anyun Solomon koteekyi got kainetab Jehovah, ak got ne bo bounatennyi." 
2Chronicles2:2 Ak kiit Solomon bik elfusiek tamanwogik tisab che laisei, ak bik elfusiek tamanwogik sisiit che waei koik eng’ tulonok, ak bik elfusiek somok ak bogol lo che tononjin." 
2Chronicles2:3 Ak kiiyokto Solomon kemwachi Huram laitoriatab Turo, kelenji, Ko u ye kiiyachi baba Daudi, ak iyokyi inendet taragonik koteege gonnyi ne menyei, ko u noto, yaiywa agane." 
2Chronicles2:4 Keero, ateekyini got kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, si atabanji inendet, ak abeel eng’ tainnyi nyamdutikab tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak ko bo makatinikab kabartaet che bo kotugul, ak ko bo kagochinoik che kibeelei karon ak koskoleny, eng’ sabatosiek, ak eng’ ye kaleel arawet, ak eng’ igorwek che kiging’at che bo Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu. Bo koigeny nito eng’ Israel." 
2Chronicles2:5 Ak o got ne ateeche: amu o Kamuktaindennyu kosiir cheptalelisiek tugul. 
2Chronicles2:6 Ago ng’o anyun ne imuchi koteekyi inendet got, amu mayamei inendet kipsengwet ak kipsengwet ne bo kipsengwetisiek? A ng’o anyun, kot ateekyi got, kobate kebeelji nyamdutik eng’ tainnyi?" 
2Chronicles2:7 Ara anyun, iyokwa chito ne ng’om ne imuchi koyai boisietab tahabu, ak ne bo feda, ak ne bo sugunonik, ak ne bo karik, ak ne bo ngoroik che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, ak che tuuen ne nyalil, ak bik che utotin eng’ waet age tugul kobois, kotebi ak bik che ng’omen che mi kobota eng’ Juda ak eng’ Jerusalem, che kigochob baba Daudi." 
2Chronicles2:8 Iyokwa kogeny ketikab taragonik, ak biribirinik, ak ketikab almug che bo Lebanon: amu angen ale ng’omen otwogiguk eng’ ebetab ketikab Lebanon; ak keero, tun mi otwogikyuk ak otwogiguk," 
2Chronicles2:9 si kochobwa ketik che chang’ mising’: amu got ne negit ateech ko o ak ko bo kwong’et. 
2Chronicles2:10 Ak keero, agochini otwogiguk bik che ebei ketik, nganok che kigetui, kerutik elfusiek tiptem che bo nganok che kigibor, ak kerutik elfusiek tiptem che bo sairik, ak divaik che yamegei ak debeisiek elfusiek artam, ak mwanik che yamegei ak debeisiek elfusiek artam." 
2Chronicles2:11 Kowolji anyun Huram laitoriatab Turo eng’ baruet ne kiiyokyi Solomon, kolenji, Amu chamei Jehovah bikyik, ko kiindein iegu laitoriat ibou ichek." 
2Chronicles2:12 Komwa kogeny Huram kole, Iberurot Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne kiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony, ne kigogochi laitoriat Daudi werit ne ng’om, ne kigigochi kaguiyet ak naet, si kobiit koteekyi got Jehovah, ak got ne bo bounatennyi." 
2Chronicles2:13 Kaayogu anyun chito ne ng’om, ne kigigochi naet, ne bo Huram kwandanyu," 
2Chronicles2:14 weritab kwondo ne bo tibikab Dan, ak ki chitab Turo kwandanyi, ne utat, ne imuchi koyai boisietab tahabu, ak ne bo feda, ak ne bo sugunonik, ak ne bo karik, ak ne bo koik, ak ne bo ketik, ak ne bo ngoroik che arusen ne birir, ak che tuuen ne nyalil, ak ne bo katanit ne kararan, ak ne bo che biriren: ak kowai waet age tugul, ak koyai kit age tugul ne kaibwat: si kobiit ole kigilewenji inendet, kobois koboto biguk che ng’omen, ak koboto bik che ng’omen che bo kiptaiyandennyu Daudi kwandang’ung’." 
2Chronicles2:15 Ingoyok anyun inendet nganok, ak sairik, ak mwanik, ak divaik, che kimwaei kiptaiyandennyu, koyokyi otwogikyik:" 
2Chronicles2:16 si keeb ketik eng’ Lebanon, che te che imache; si kiyogun ko ratotin kobun beek eng’ nyanjet agoi Jopa; si iib eng’ yoto kotogosta koba Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles2:17 Ak kiit Solomon bunotik tugul che kimi emetab Israel, eng’ koitonoto kiiti kwandanyi Daudi, ak kibiit bik elfusiek bogolu ak konom ak somok ak bogolwogik lo." 
2Chronicles2:18 Ak kiinde bik elfusiek tamanwogik tisab che laisei, ak elfusiek tamanwogik sisiit che waei koik eng’ tulonok, ak bik che tononjin boisiet elfusiek somok ak bogolwogik lo che gochin bik boisiet." 
2Chronicles3:1 Kitoi anyun Solomon koteech gotab Jehovah eng’ Jerusalem eng’ tulwetab Moria, ole kimong’jine Jehovah kwandanyi Daudi, ne kichob inendet eng’ ole king’at Daudi, eng’ ruanyut ne kiborse ne bo Ornan Jebusindet." 
2Chronicles3:2 Ak kitoi koteekso eng’ betutab aeng’ eng’ arawet ne bo aeng’, eng’ kenyitab ang’wan ne bo laitornatennyi." 
2Chronicles3:3 Chu anyun lumeiywek che kilumda Solomon agobo teeksetab gotab Kamuktaindet. Ak kiek koindo kakwautik tamanwogik lo che bo eut eng’ pimanet ne bo tai ne bo kakwautik che bo eut, ak kiek tebeesindo kakwautik tiptem che bo eut." 
2Chronicles3:4 Ak koindab keterut ne kimi taitab got, ko u tebeesindab got, ko ki kakwautik tiptem, ak kiek koindab tononennyi kakwautik che bo eut bogol ak tiptem: ak kiiliige tahabu che tililen komostab orit." 
2Chronicles3:5 Ak kitete got ne o ketikab biribirinik che kiiliige tahabu che kororon, ak kiwachinot itonwekab tironik ak sirimwek." 
2Chronicles3:6 Ak kilelesonji got eng’ koik che bo kamanutiet ne o si kogararanit: ak kibunu tahabu Parbaim. 
2Chronicles3:7 Kiiliige kogeny tahabu got, kimurtoinik, ak tugatugik, ak inatusiek, ak kereiywekab kurgotikyik; ak kiwachi inatusiek itonwekab karubisiek." 
2Chronicles3:8 Ak kiteech got ne tilil mising’; ak kiek koindanyi kakwautik tiptem che bo eut, ko u tebeesindab got; ak kiek kakwautik tiptem che bo eut tebeesindanyi: ak kiiliigote tahabu che kororon, che kiitei talentaisiek bogol lo." 
2Chronicles3:9 Ak kiek nyigisindab kipchumarisiek sekelisiek konom che bo tahabu. Ak kiiliige tahabu gorik che bo barak. 
2Chronicles3:10 Ak kiinde itonwek aeng’ che bo karubisiek got ne tilil mising’; ak koliige tahabu. 
2Chronicles3:11 Ak ki kakwautik tiptem che bo eut koindab kebebaikab kerubisiek: koindab kebepchet agenge ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut, ak kiitei inatutab got; ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut kebepchet age, ak kitiinyegei kebepchetab kerubit age ak ne bo age." 
2Chronicles3:12 Ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut kebepchetab kerubit age, ak kiitei inatutab got: ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut kebepchet age agine, kotiinyegei ak kebepchetab kerubit age." 
2Chronicles3:13 Kiga uitogei kebebaikab kerubisiechuto koit kakwautik tiptem che bo eut: ak kitonondos eng’ kelyekwak, ak kiga tokyigei togochikwak got." 
2Chronicles3:14 Ak kinab anget ne kioiye got, che tuuen ne nyalil, ak che arusen ne birir, ak che biriren, ak katanit ne kararan, ak kinapchi choto kerubisiek." 
2Chronicles3:15 Ak kiyai kogeny tolochik aeng’ eng’ taitab got, che bo kakwautik sosom ak mut che bo eut koindab tononennyi, ak ki bo kakwautik mut che bo eut, metit age tugul ne kimi tuguchoto barak." 
2Chronicles3:16 Ak kiyai sirimwek eng’ got ne bo orit, ak konde baragusiekab tolochik; ak kiyai itonwekab logoek bogol agenge, ak koiywachi baragutab sirimwechoto." 
2Chronicles3:17 Ak kilumda tolochichoto eng’ taitab hekalut, kilumda age eng’ komostab tai, kolumda age eng’ komostab katam; ak koguure ne kimi komostab tai Jakin, koguure ne kimi komostab katam Boas." 
2Chronicles4:1 Kiyai kogeny kaptisisietab sugunonik, ki kakwautik tiptem che bo eut koindanyi, ko kakwautik tiptem che bo eut tebeesindanyi, ak ki kakwautik taman che bo eut koindab tononennyi." 
2Chronicles4:2 Ak kiyai nyanjet ne kitanyi ne bo kakwautik taman che bo eut, kong’eete taban agoi taban, ne kigitainganat, ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut koindab tononennyi; ak kimi mireiywot ne bo kakwautik sosom che bo eut." 
2Chronicles4:3 Ak kimi itonwekab eik ng’onyutab mireiywot, che kiyiem kotuiyo, che bo kakwautik taman che bo eut, che kiyiemei nyanjanato. Ki aeng’ eichato, che kigitanyi, ye kigitanyi nyanjet." 
2Chronicles4:4 Kiga tonone nyanjanato itonwekab eik, taman ak aeng’, kogeerei somogu murot ne bo katam, kogeerei somogu cherongo, kogeerei somogu murot ne bo tai, kogeerei somogu kong’asis: ak kitonone baragunywa nyanjanato, ak kigeer sugulumwekwak orit." 
2Chronicles4:5 Ak kiaechin tebeesindanyi ak nyigisindab eut; ak kigiyai mireiywondennyi kogergeit ak mireiywotab kikombet, ko u taptet ne kaiye: ak kiyamegei ak debeisiek elfusiek lo." 
2Chronicles4:6 Ak kiyai tabok taman che eechen, ak kiinde mut komostab eutab tai, ak kiinde mut komostab eutab katam, si kiunse; kigiune choto tuguk che bo kagochinoik che kibeelei: ago ki bo nyanjet tisiik si kounegei." 
2Chronicles4:7 Ak kiyai kelyek taman che bo tait eng’ tahabu ko u ng’atutiet ne kiging’at agobo tuguchoto; ak kiinde hekalut orit, kiinde mut komostab eutab tai, konde mut komostab eutab katam." 
2Chronicles4:8 Ak kiyai kogeny mesosiek taman, ak konde hekalut, kiinde mut komostab eutab tai, konde mut komostab eutab katam. Ak kiyai tabok bogol che mengechen che bo tahabu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Ak kiyai kogeny seremutab tisiik, ak seremut ne o, ak kereiywek che bo seremut, ak koliige sugunonik kereiywekab kurgotikwak." 
2Chronicles4:10 Ak kiinde nyanjanato komostab tai, kogeer kong’asis, kotokyigei murot ne bo tai." 
2Chronicles4:11 Ak kiyai Huram terenik, ak kechigosiek che eechen, ak tabok che mengechen. Kiiges anyun Huram boisiet ne kiyachi laitoriat Solomon eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet:" 
2Chronicles4:12 tolochik aeng’, ak bagulisiek, ak metowek aeng’ che kimi baragutab tolochichoto; ak karichato aeng’ regerotin, kotuch bagulisiechoto aeng’ che kimi baragutab tolochik;" 
2Chronicles4:13 ak itonwekab logoek bogol ang’wan che bo karichato aeng’ regerotin; ortinwek aeng’ che bo logoek che bo karnet age tugul ne kigireger, kotuch bagulisiechoto aeng’ bo metowek che kimi baragutab tolochik." 
2Chronicles4:14 Kiyai kogeny ng’echerok ak tabokwak che eechen, che kimi ng’echerochoto," 
2Chronicles4:15 nyanjanato agenge, ak itonwekab eik taman ak aeng’ che kimi kureretab nyanjanato." 
2Chronicles4:16 Ak kiyai kwandab Huram terenik agichek, ak kechigosiek che eechen, ak karik che kirutune banyek, ak tugukyik tugul, koyachi laitoriat Solomon kobunji gotab Jehovah, kiyae sugunonik che sitotin." 
2Chronicles4:17 Kiyai laitoriat tuguchoto eng’ Atebwetab Jordan, eng’ ole mi menet eng’ kwenutab Sukot ak Sereda." 
2Chronicles4:18 Kiyai anyun Solomon tuguchuto tugul eng’ chang’indo: amu ma imuch chi konai nyigisindab sugunonik. 
2Chronicles4:19 Ak kiyai Solomon tuguk tugul che kimi gotab Kamuktaindet, kapkorosutab tahabu, ak mesosiek che kitebe makatinikab kabartaet;" 
2Chronicles4:20 kiyae tahabu che tililen kelyekab taisiek koboto taisiekwak, si kobiit kolaldos eng’ taitab got ne bo orit, ko u ye kiging’at;" 
2Chronicles4:21 ak kiyae tahabu, tahabu ne ma burugot ak kiy, taptok, ak taisiek, ak kanameiywek;" 
2Chronicles4:22 ak magasisiek, che tilei ole lalei eng’ taisiek, ak tabok che mengechen, ak kechigosiek, ak terenik che kiibe mat, kiyae choto tahabu che tililen: ak ki bo tahabu ole kigibunei kebendi go, ak kereiywekab kurgotikyik che bo orit che bo ole tilil mising’, ak kereiywekab kurgotikab got, noto hekalut." 
2Chronicles5:1 Kiigesgei anyun boisiet tugul ne kiyai Solomon agobo gotab Jehovah. Ak kiib Solomon tuguk che kiga kotaban Daudi kwandanyi, kobwa go, feda, ak tahabu, ak tuguk che kiboisie, ak konde ole kigonore konoraik che bo gotab Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles5:2 Kiiyum anyun Solomon boisiek che bo Israel, ak kandoik tugul che bo ortinwek, bounik che bo kwanisiekab lagokab Israel, kobwa Jerusalem, koib moingetab arorutietab Jehovah kotogos eng’ nganasetab Daudi, ne noto ko Sion." 
2Chronicles5:3 Ak kiiyumgei bik tugul che bo Israel eng’ ole kimi laitoriat eng’ igorta, ne kimi eng’ arawetab tisab." 
2Chronicles5:4 Ak kibwa boisiek tugul che bo Israel, ak kigonob Lawik moinget." 
2Chronicles5:5 Ak kiib moinget ak emait ne kituiyechin, ak terenik tugul che tililen che kimi Emait; kiib choto kotogos tisiik, Lawik." 
2Chronicles5:6 Ak kimi taitab moinget laitoriat Solomon ak tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel, che kiga iyumgei eng’ ole mi inendet, koenyei kechirek ak eik, che kima kimuchi kerar anan ko kiit eng’ chang’indo." 
2Chronicles5:7 Ak kiib tisiik moingetab arorutietab Jehovah konyo ole tebe eng’ got ne bo orit, ole tilil mising’, kureretab kebebaikab kerubisiek." 
2Chronicles5:8 Amu kiga iito kerubisiek kebebaikwak kouur ole mi moinget, ak kituch kerubisiek moinget ak ketikyik che kiibe." 
2Chronicles5:9 Ak ki koen ketichato mising’, ak ki toogu walisiekwak eng’ moinget eng’ taitab got ne bo orit; ago kima ko toogu sang’: ak mi yoto agoi ra." 
2Chronicles5:10 Kima komi kiy moinget orit kobate koik aeng’ che lebelen che kiindoi Musa eng’ Horeb, kingoyaei Jehovah arorutiet ak lagokab Israel, ye kimong’u eng’ Misri." 
2Chronicles5:11 Ak kingomong’ tisiik eng’ ole tilil, (amu tisiik tugul che kimi yoto, ko kiga kotililgei, ak ma rib ripsosiekwak;" 
2Chronicles5:12 ak kitononso Lawik agichek, che ki tienik ichek tugul, che choto ko Asap, Heman, Jedutun, ak werikwak ak tupchosiekwak, kolaachi katanisiek che kororon, ak kotinyei sanisiekab sugunonik che kibirei ak kibugandinik ak ketubosiek, eng’ komostab kong’asis ne bo kaptisisiet, ak kimi koboto ichek tisiik bogolu ak tiptem che kuutei iriagok:)" 
2Chronicles5:13 ak kingoyomogei bik che kuutei iriagok ak tienik koek agenge, si kotien cheet agenge kegas eng’ kalosunet ak komwachin Jehovah kongoi; ak kingotien eng’ kutit ne o eng’ iriagok ak sanisiekab sugunonik, ak kibugandinikab tienwogik, ak kolos Jehovah, kole, Amu mie inendet; bo koigeny rirenennyi: konyi got anyun boldet, ne noto ko gotab Jehovah," 
2Chronicles5:14 ne mata komuch tisiik kotononso kobois amu boldonoto: amu kinyi lilindab Jehovah gotab Kamuktaindet. 
2Chronicles6:1 Kong’alal anyun Solomon kole, Kile Jehovah, menyei inendet mesundeito ne o." 
2Chronicles6:2 Ago kaateegun got ne imenye, komostang’ung’ ne imenye koigeny." 
2Chronicles6:3 Ak kiwelelgei laitoriat, ak koberur tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel: ak kitonon tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel." 
2Chronicles6:4 Ak kile, Iberurot Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne king’alalji eng’ kutinnyi baba Daudi, ak kagoyai eng’ eunnyi kosulda, kole," 
2Chronicles6:5 Koboch betut ne kiamutu bikyuk eng’ emetab Misri, ko malewen nganas eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel ateech got, si kobiit kotebe yoto kainennyu; amalewen chi age tugul koek bounindet koboi bikyuk Israel:" 
2Chronicles6:6 ago kialewen Jerusalem, si kobiit kotebe yoto kainennyu; ak kialewen Daudi koboi bikyuk Israel." 
2Chronicles6:7 Ak kimi muguleldab baba Daudi kole koteekyi got kainetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
2Chronicles6:8 Ago kilenji Jehovah kwandanyu Daudi, Amu kimi muguleldang’ung’ iteekyi got kainennyu, ko kiiyai kit ne mie ibwat ko u noto eng’ muguleldang’ung’:" 
2Chronicles6:9 ago ma inye ne teechei goyoto; ago wering’ung’ ne mong’une bortang’ung’, inendet ne teekyin kainennyu got." 
2Chronicles6:10 Ak kagoyai Jehovah ng’olyondennyi ne kimwa; amu kiabiitu ageer kwandanyu Daudi; ak atebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Israel, ko u ye kiiaror Jehovah, ak koateekyi got kainetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ak kiande yoto moinget, ne mi orit arorutietab Jehovah, ne kiyai ak lagokab Israel." 
2Chronicles6:12 Ak kitonon inendet eng’ taitab kaptisisietab Jehovah, eng’ taitab tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel, ak koiito eunekyik:" 
2Chronicles6:13 (amu kiga yai Solomon eng’ sugunwet ole kitororit, ne koindanyi ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut, ak tebeesindanyi ko ki kakwautik mut, ak koindab tononennyi ko ki kakwautik somok, ak konde kwenutab seremut; ak kotonone, ak kogutuny eng’ taitab tuiyet tugul ne bo Israel, ak koiito eunekyik kotokyigei kipsengwet:)" 
2Chronicles6:14 ak kile, Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, mami Kamuktaindet age ne u inye, eng’ kipsengwet, anan eng’ ng’ony; ne ribei kayomiset ak rirenet ak otwogiguk, che bendote taing’ung’ eng’ mugulelwekwak tugul:" 
2Chronicles6:15 ne kiisuldochi otwogindeng’ung’ baba Daudi kit ne kiiyomisyi inendet: ee kiimwa eng’ kuting’ung’, ak kaiyai eng’ eung’ung’ kosulda, ko u kit ne u rani." 
2Chronicles6:16 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, isuldochi otwogindeng’ung’ baba Daudi kit ne kiiyomisyi, ilenji, Mabetenen chito ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Israel eng’ tainnyu, ngot korib lagoguk ortinwekwak, kobendate ng’atutiennyu, ko u ye kiiwendote tainnyu." 
2Chronicles6:17 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ingogimit ng’olyondeng’ung’, ne kiimwachi otwogindeng’ung’ Daudi." 
2Chronicles6:18 Ago tos menyei Kamuktaindet ak bik iman eng’ ng’ony? Keero, mayamin kipsengwet itebe, anan ko kipsengwet ne bo kipsengwetisiek; ko ming’in ne tia anyun goi koateech!" 
2Chronicles6:19 Ago konyit saetab otwogindeng’ung’, ak somennyi, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, kas rirek ak saet ne saei otwogindeng’ung’ eng’ taing’ung’:" 
2Chronicles6:20 si kobiit kogeer konyeguk goi bet ak kemoi, kogeer komosta ne kiimwa ile indoi kaineng’ung’; si igas saet ne saei otwogindeng’ung’ kotokyingei komosit." 
2Chronicles6:21 Ak igas somutikab otwogindeng’ung’, ak biguk Israel, ye saei kotokyingei yuto; ee kas anyun eng’ ole imenye, eng’ kipsengwet; ak ye igas, inyochi kaat." 
2Chronicles6:22 Ngot kolelji chi chitab kokwennyi, ak kebirji inendet koyosio, ak konyo koyosio eng’ taitab kaptisisieng’ung’ eng’ goi:" 
2Chronicles6:23 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet, ak iyai, ak iruoksechi otwogiguk, iyaakyi mugetut inendet ne kalel, si inde kotebe metinnyi ortinwekyik, ak iityi imanda inendet ne bo iman, igochi inendet ko u imandanyi." 
2Chronicles6:24 Ak ngot kebar biguk Israel eng’ taitab bunik, amu kigoyaun tengekto ak koweek kogeny ak kong’any kaineng’ung’, ak kosa, ak koririo eng’ taing’ung’ eng’ goi:" 
2Chronicles6:25 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet, ak inyochi kaat biguk Israel eng’ tengektanywa, ak imutu ichek kogeny kobwa emet ne kiigochi ichek ak kwanisiekwak." 
2Chronicles6:26 Ye kerak kipseng’wet, ak kobet ropta, amu kigoyaun tengekto, ko ngot kosa kotokyigei komosi, ak kong’any kaineng’ung’, ak koweek eng’ tengektanywa, ye inyalil ichek:" 
2Chronicles6:27 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet, ak inyochi kaat otwogiguk eng’ tengektanywa, ak ne bo biguk Israel, ye ineti ichek oret ne mie ne nyolu kobendate; ak iyokyi ropta emeng’ung’, ne kiigochi biguk koek borotenywa." 
2Chronicles6:28 Ngot kobiit rubet eng’ emet, anan ko koroito, ngot kobiit chelalitiet anan ko uchatet, chereng’endet anan ko kutiet; ngot koyiem ichek bunikwak eng’ emetab nganasokwak; anan kobiit koroito age tugul anan ko miando age tugul;" 
2Chronicles6:29 ko saet anan ko somet age tugul ne kasom chi age tugul, anan ko ne kasom biguk tugul che bo Israel, ne naei chi age tugul miandanyi ak arogenennyi, ak koiito eunekyik kotokyi goi:" 
2Chronicles6:30 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet oldang’ung’ ole imenye, ak inyochi kaat ak iyaakyi chi age tugul ko u ortinwekyik tugul, ne ingen muguleldanyi; (amu inye inyege ne ingen mugulelwekab werikab bik;)" 
2Chronicles6:31 si kobiit koiywein ak kobendate ortinweguk kote kosoptos eng’ emet ne kiigochi kwanisiekyok. 
2Chronicles6:32 Ak eng’ chito ne bo bororiosiek, ne ma bo biguk Israel, ngo nyo eng’ emet ne loo agobo kaineng’ung’ ne o, ak agobo eung’ung’ ne kim, ak eung’ung’ ne chuulat; ye bwa ak kosa kotokyigei goi:" 
2Chronicles6:33 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet eng’ oldang’ung’ ole imenye, ak iyai ko u tuguk tugul che kaguurjin chichoto bo bororiosiek; si kobiit konai kaineng’ung’ bik tugul che bo ng’ony, ak koiywein, ko u ye iywein biguk Israel, ak si kobiit konai kole goi kiateech kemwaitoe kaineng’ung’." 
2Chronicles6:34 Ngot koba biguk kobargei ak bunikwak, eng’ oret age tugul ne keyoktae, ak kosain kotokyigei nganasani kiilewen, ak goi koateekyi kaineng’ung’:" 
2Chronicles6:35 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet saenywa, ak somenywa, ak iyachi ichek kit ne machei." 
2Chronicles6:36 Ngot koyaun tengek, (amu mami chi ne mayaei tengek,) ak inerekyi, ak igochi ichek bunikwak koluul ichek komut koba emet ne loo anan ko ne negit;" 
2Chronicles6:37 ago ngot kobwatgei eng’ emet ne kigimut koek luulenik ak kosik, ak korirjin eng’ emet ne kigiluulji ichek, kole, Kigeyai tengekto, kigeyai kit ne imaasat, kigeyai kit ne ya kot;" 
2Chronicles6:38 ngot koweekyingei eng’ mugulelwekwak tugul ak eng’ sobonwekwak tugul eng’ emet ne kigiluulji ichek, ole kigimut ichek koek luulenik, ak kosa kotokyigei emenywa, ne kiigochi kwanisiekwak, ak nganaset ne kiilewen, ak got ne koateekyi kaineng’ung’:" 
2Chronicles6:39 igas anyun eng’ kipsengwet eng’ oldang’ung’ ole imenye, saenywa ak somutikwak, ak iyachi ichek kit ne machei; ak inyochi kaat biguk che kigoyaun tengekto." 
2Chronicles6:40 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindennyu, asain ale, ingogeer konyeguk, ak ingogas itiguk saet ne kisaei eng’ yuto." 
2Chronicles6:41 Ara anyun, ng’eet, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet, nyo oli imuung’e, inye ak moingetab kimnateng’ung’: ingolaach tisiiguk yetunet, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet, ak ingoboiboitu biguk che tililen eng’ mieindo." 
2Chronicles6:42 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet, ameiste togetab neng’ung’ ne iilat: ibwat rirenosiekab Daudi otwogindeng’ung’." 
2Chronicles7:1 Ak kingoges Solomon saet, kochorgei mat eng’ kipsengwet, ak kobeel kagochinet ne kibeelei ak korosek; ak kinyi got lilindab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles7:2 Ak kima imuch tisiik koba gotab Jehovah, amu kiganyi lilindab Jehovah gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles7:3 Ak kigeerei lagok tugul che bo Israel ye kichorugei mat, ak kitebe lilindab Jehovah baragutab got; ak kiing’urugis kot koit ng’ony togochikwak, eng’ ye kigitetyi koik, ak kolos, ak komwachi kongoi Jehovah, kole, Amu mie inendet; amu bo koigeny rirenennyi." 
2Chronicles7:4 Kogoito anyun laitoriat, koboto bik tugul, tiseiywek eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles7:5 Ak kiigoito laitoriat Solomon tiseiywek che bo eik elfusiek tiptem ak aeng’, ak kechirek elfusiek bogol ak tiptem. Kotaban anyun laitoriat ak bik tugul gotab Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles7:6 Ak kitononso tisiik kobee boisionikwak; koboto Lawik che kitinyei kibungandinikab tienwogik che bo Jehovah, che kiga koyai Daudi laitoriat che kimwachine kongoi Jehovah, amu bo koigeny rirenennyi, ye kiilosu Daudi eng’ otisienywa: ak kiguutei iriagok tisiik eng’ tainywa; ak kitononso Israel tugul." 
2Chronicles7:7 Kogeny kiitilil Solomon kwenutab seremut ne kimi taitab gotab Jehovah; amu kiigoito eng’ yoto kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak mwanik che bo kagochinoikab kalyet: amu kima koyamei kaptisisietab sugunwet, ne kiga koyai Solomon, kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagochinet ne bo busiek, ak mwanik." 
2Chronicles7:8 Kiyai anyun Solomon igorta eng’ betusiechoto, betusiek tisab, koboto Israel tugul, tuiyet ne o mising’, kong’eete ye kibunei kebendi Hamat agoi ainetab Misri." 
2Chronicles7:9 Ak kiyai eng’ betutab sisiit tuiyetab kaming’inetab ge; amu kiyai katabanetab kaptisisiet eng’ betusiek tisab, kiyai anyun igorta betusiek tisab." 
2Chronicles7:10 Ak kimwachi bik koba emaisiekwak eng’ betutab tiptem ak somok ne bo arawetab tisab, eng’ boiboiyet ak kagasetab ge ne bo muguleldo amu mieindo ne kiyachi Jehovah Daudi ak Solomon, ak Israel bikyik." 
2Chronicles7:11 Koges anyun Solomon gotab Jehovah, ak gotab laitoriat: ak kiyai Solomon eng’ aiyebindo tuguk tugul che kiibwat inendet eng’ muguleldanyi, koyai eng’ gotab Jehovah, ak eng’ gonnyi." 
2Chronicles7:12 Ak kimong’ji Jehovah Solomon kemoi, ak kolenji inendet, Kaagas saeng’ung’, ak kaalewenjige yuto koek gotab tiseiywek." 
2Chronicles7:13 Ngot ager kipsengwet si marobon, anan ngot ang’at chereng’endet koam emet, anan ayokyi koroito bikyuk;" 
2Chronicles7:14 ngot koming’ingei bikyuk, che kemwaitoe kainennyu, ak kosa, ak kocheng’a, ak kolakta ortinwekwak che bo yaitiet; agas anyun eng’ kipsengwet, ak anyochi kaat eng’ tengektanywa, ak asoob emenywa." 
2Chronicles7:15 Kogeer anyun konyekyuk, ak kogas itikyuk, saet ne kisaei eng’ yuto." 
2Chronicles7:16 Amu kaalewen goi ak ataban, si kobiit kotebe kainennyu oloto koigeny: ak tebe yuto konyekyuk kotugul ak muguleldanyun." 
2Chronicles7:17 Ak ngot iwendote inye tainnyu ko u ye kiwendote Daudi kwandang’ung’, ak iyai ko u tuguk tugul che kaang’atin, ak irib ng’atutikyuk ak kiruogutikyuk;" 
2Chronicles7:18 agimit anyun ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo bounateng’ung’, ko u ye kiayai arorutiet ak Daudi kwandang’ung’, alenji, Mabetenen chito ne egu bounindet eng’ Israel." 
2Chronicles7:19 Ago ngot omaste, ak olakte konetisiosiekyuk ak ng’atutikyuk che kiande taing’wong’, ak obe oot kanamonik, ak ogutung’ji:" 
2Chronicles7:20 atutu anyun ichek eng’ emennyu ne kiagochi; ak awirte goi eng’ tainnyu, ne kiatabanji kainennyu, ak ayai koek kalewenet ak atindiot eng’ bororiosiek tugul." 
2Chronicles7:21 Ak kwong’ei age tugul ne siirei yuto, agobo goi o te ni, ak kole, Amu nee si koyachi Jehovah ko u ni emoni ak goi?" 
2Chronicles7:22 Ak kowol kole, Amu kimeto ichek Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, ne kiimut ichek komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, ak konamgei ak kanamonik, ak kogutung’ji, ak koot: noto anyun kiipchi inendet ichek yaitioni tugul." 
2Chronicles8:1 Ak kingo kagogesgei kenyisiek tiptemu, che kiteege Solomon gotab Jehovah, ak gonnyi," 
2Chronicles8:2 koteech Solomon nganasok che kiga kogochi Huram Solomon, ak kogochi lagokab Israel komeny oloto." 
2Chronicles8:3 Ak kiwa Solomon Hamat-seba, ak koterter." 
2Chronicles8:4 Ak kiteech Tadmor eng’ ong’atet, ak nganasok tugul che kigonore tuguk, che kiteech eng’ Hamat." 
2Chronicles8:5 Kiteech kogeny Bet-horon ne bo meto, ak Bet-horon ne rektoot, nganasok che ng’ototin, che kitinyei irimoik, ak ormarichok, ak temeleiywek;" 
2Chronicles8:6 ak Baalat, ak nganasok tugul che kigonorisie che kitinyei Solomon, ak nganasok tugul che bo karisiekyik, ak nganasokab bik che lanyei mbartanyisiekyik, ak tuguk tugul che bo magennyi che kicham Solomon koteech eng’ Jerusalem, ak eng’ Lebanon, ak eng’ emet tugul ne bo bounatennyi." 
2Chronicles8:7 Ago bik tugul che king’et eng’ Hitik, Amorik, Perisik, Hibik, ak Jebusik, che kima ko bo Israel;" 
2Chronicles8:8 king’at Solomon kelewen bik eng’ lagokab bichoto che kiga ng’et eng’ emet, che kima bar lagokab Israel koges, koek otwogik agoi rani." 
2Chronicles8:9 Ago kima yai Solomon lagokab Israel koek otwogik che yaei boisiennyi; ago kiek murenikab luget, ak che eechen eng’ kiptainikyik, ak bounikab karisiekyik ak murenikyik che kilanyei mbartanyisiekyik." 
2Chronicles8:10 Chu ko ki kiptainik che eechen che bo laitoriat Solomon, bik bogol aeng’ ak konom, che kibou bik." 
2Chronicles8:11 Ak kiimut Solomon cheptab Parao kotogos eng’ nganasetab Daudi konyo got ne kiga koteekyi inendet: amu kile, Mamenyei osotiondennyu gotab Daudi laitoriatab Israel, amu tililen komoswek che kinyo moingetab Jehovah kotebe." 
2Chronicles8:12 Kiigochi anyun Solomon Jehovah kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ kaptisisietab Jehovah, ne kiga koteech eng’ taitab keterut," 
2Chronicles8:13 ko u ye yamei boisietab betut age tugul, kogoitoi ko u ng’atutietab Musa, eng’ sabatosiek, ak eng’ ye kaleel arawet, ak eng’ igorwek che kiging’at, konyil somok eng’ kenyit, igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, ak igortab wigisiek, ak igortab keriosiek." 
2Chronicles8:14 King’at ripsosiekab tisiik eng’ otisienywa, ko u ng’atutietab Daudi kwandanyi, ak king’at Lawik, koyai boisionikwak, si kolosu ak koboisiei eng’ taitab tisiik, ko u ye yamei boisietab betut age tugul: ak king’at ribikab kurget agichek koyai ripsosiekwak eng’ kurget age tugul: amu kiga ng’at Daudi chitab Kamuktaindet ko u noto." 
2Chronicles8:15 Ak kima meto ng’atutietab laitoriat ne king’at tisiik ak Lawik agobo ng’olyot age tugul, anan agobo konoraik." 
2Chronicles8:16 Kechob anyun boisiet tugul ne bo Solomon kot koit betut ne kilume lumeiywotab gotab Jehovah, agoi kogesgei. Kiigesgei anyun boisietab gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles8:17 Yeityo kwo Solomon Esion-geber ak Elot, che mi ngegutab emetab Edom." 
2Chronicles8:18 Ak kiiyokyi Huram melisiek inendet koyoktae otwogikyik, ak otwogik che ingen nyanjet; ak kibwa Opir koboto otwogikab Solomon, ak koib eng’ oloto talentaisiek che bo tahabu bogol ang’wan ak konom, koipchi laitoriat Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:1 Ak kingogas laitoriatab Sheba, ne ki kwondo, kalosunetab Solomon, konyo Jerusalem koboto bik che chang’, ak tambesik che ibei tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak tahabusiek che chang’, ak koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, konyo kotiem Solomon eng’ teebutik che uuen: ak kingoit ole mi Solomon, kong’alal ak inendet agobo tuguk tugul che kimi muguleldanyi." 
2Chronicles9:2 Ak kiwolji Solomon inendet teebutikyik tugul: ak kima komi kiy age tugul ne kigiung’e Solomon ne ma mwachi inendet. 
2Chronicles9:3 Ak kingo kagogeer laitoriandanato bo Sheba ng’omnatetab Solomon, ak got ne kiga teech," 
2Chronicles9:4 ak amitwogikyik, ak ole teptoi otwogikyik, ak tononet ne tononjin boisiet kiboitinikyik, ak ngoroikwak, ak bikyik agichek che ipchin tuguk che eei, ak ngoroikwak; ak kagochinoikyik che kibeelei che kiigoitoi eng’ gotab Jehovah; kogesgei anyun kimnatennyi." 
2Chronicles9:5 Ak kilenji kwonyoto laitoriat, Bo iman ng’alechu kiagase eng’ emennyu agobo boisioniguk, ak ng’omnateng’ung’." 
2Chronicles9:6 Ago kima ayan ng’alekwak, kot anyo, ak kagogeer konyekyuk: ak keero, kima kimwawa agot kebebertab oindab ng’omnateng’ung’: isiire kalosunoni kiagase." 
2Chronicles9:7 Boiboi biguk, ak boiboi otwogichuguk, chu tonondos eng’ taing’ung’ kotugul, ak kogasei ng’omnateng’ung’." 
2Chronicles9:8 Iberurot Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne kibaibait eng’ inye, kondein ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, iegu laitoriatab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; amu kicham Kamuktaindeng’ung’ Israel, kogimit ichek koigeny, kondein anyun iegu laitoriat ibou ichek iyai kiruoget ak imanda." 
2Chronicles9:9 Ak kiigochi kwonyoto laitoriat talentaisiek bogol ak tiptem che bo tahabu, ak tuguk ng’isiat che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak koik che bo kamanutiet ne o: ak kima biit nyamdutik che u choto kiigochi laitoriatab Sheba laitoriat Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:10 Ak kiib otwogikab Huram agichek, ak otwogikab Solomon, che kiib tahabu eng’ Opir, ketikab almug, ak koik che bo kamanutiet ne o." 
2Chronicles9:11 Ak kiyae laitoriat ketichato bo almug ole kitogostoe eng’ gotab Jehovah, ak eng’ gotab laitoriat, ak ketubosiek ak kibugandinik che bo tienik: ak kitomo kogeerei chi tuguk che u choto eng’ emetab Juda." 
2Chronicles9:12 Ak kiigochi laitoriat Solomon laitoriatab Sheba kiy age tugul ne kimach, kiy age tugul ne kisom, ko maboto tuguk che kiga ipchi laitoriat. Ki weektagei anyun kwo emennyi, koboto otwogikyik." 
2Chronicles9:13 Ak nyigisindab tahabu che kigiipchi Solomon eng’ kenyit agenge ko ki talentaisiek bogol lo ak tamanwogik lo ak lo che bo tahabu; 
2Chronicles9:14 ama boto che kiibu bik che aldooti ak che kiibu chemung’arainik: ak kiib laitorinik tugul che bo Arabia ak bounikab emet, tahabu ak feda, koipchi Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:15 Ak kiyai laitoriat Solomon, long’onik che eechen bogol aeng’ che bo tahabu che kigitany: kigiyae long’et agenge ne o sekelisiek bogol lo che bo tahabu che kigitany." 
2Chronicles9:16 Ak kiyai long’onik che mengechen bogol somok che bo tahabu che kigitany; kigiyae long’et agenge sekelisiek bogol somok che bo tahabu: ak kigonore laitoriat long’onichato gotab osnetab Lebanon. 
2Chronicles9:17 Ak koyai kogeny laitoriat ng’echeret ne o ne bo laitornatet eng’ kelekab belek, ak koliige tahabu che tililen." 
2Chronicles9:18 Ak kimi long’eiywot ne tinyei tuguk lo che kitiegoti ketogosyin ng’echeretab laitornatet, koboto ng’echeret ne tebe kelyek ne ki bo tahabu, ne kiga kiratyi ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak kimi ketik komosi ak komosi che tiiegei eunek, ak itonwek aeng’ che bo ng’etunyik eng’ komosi ak komosi eng’ ye negite ketichato kitiie eunek." 
2Chronicles9:19 Ak kitonondos itonwek tamanu ak aeng’ che bo ng’etunyik eng’ komoswek tuwai eng’ tuguchoto lo kitiegoti ketogostoi: kima komi age ne kergei ak noto ne kigiyai eng’ bororiet age tugul. 
2Chronicles9:20 Ki bo tahabu tuguk tugul che kieeise laitoriat Solomon, ak tuguk tugul che kigiboisie eng’ gotab osnetab Lebanon ko ki bo tahabu che tililen: kima ko kiy feda eng’ betusiekab Solomon." 
2Chronicles9:21 Amu kitinyei laitoriat melisiek che kibendi Tarsis koboto otwogikab Huram: kiibu melisiek che bo Tarsis konyil agenge eng’ kenyisiek somok, tahabu, ak feda, ak kelekab belek, ak tisok, ak taritik che kiguure tausi." 
2Chronicles9:22 Kisiir anyun laitoriat Solomon laitorinik tugul che bo ng’ony eng’ magornatosiek ak ng’omnatet. 
2Chronicles9:23 Ak kicheng’ laitorinik tugul che bo ng’ony kogeer Solomon, kogas ng’omnatennyi, ne kiinde Kamuktaindet muguleldanyi." 
2Chronicles9:24 Ak kiib chi tugul kagochinennyi, tugukab feda, ak tugukab tahabu, ak ngoroik, karikab luget, ak nyamdutik, ak mbartanyisiek, ak nyumbusiek, koitet ne kigigonu eng’ kenyit age tugul." 
2Chronicles9:25 Ak kitinyei Solomon gorik elfusiek ang’wan che bo mbartanyisiek ak karisiek, ak bik elfusiek taman ak aeng’ che bo mbartanyisiek, che kiinde nganasokab karisiek, ak che kimi ole mi laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles9:26 Ak kibou laitorinik tugul koboch Ainet agoi emetab Pilistik, ak agoi kiwotetab Misri." 
2Chronicles9:27 Ak kiyai laitoriat feda eng’ Jerusalem koigei koik, ak kiyai eng’ chang’indo taragonik koigei mogoonik che mi emet ne soi." 
2Chronicles9:28 Ak kigigetyi Solomon mbartanyisiek eng’ Misri, ak eng’ emotinwek tugul." 
2Chronicles9:29 Ak tos ma kisirji boisionikab Solomon che kang’et, che bo tai ak che bo let, bukuitab ng’alekab maotiot Natan, ak eng’ maoinatetab Aija Silonindet, ak eng’ ng’ang’utikab keerindet Ido agobo Jeroboam weritab Nebat?" 
2Chronicles9:30 Ak kilaitoran Solomon eng’ Jerusalem koboi Israel tugul kenyisiek artam. 
2Chronicles9:31 Ak kiru Solomon koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi nganasetab Daudi kwandanyi: ak kilaitoran Reoboam werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Chronicles10:1 Ak kiwa Reoboam Sekem: amu kigabwa Israel tugul Sekem, konde inendet koek laitoriat." 
2Chronicles10:2 Ak kingogas Jeroboam weritab Nebat agobo noto, (amu kimi Misri, ole kiga mwechi komwee laitoriat Solomon,) koweek Jeroboam eng’ Misri." 
2Chronicles10:3 Ak kiiyokto keguur inendet; ak kinyo Jeroboam koboto Israel tugul, ak kong’alalji Reoboam, kolenji," 
2Chronicles10:4 Kiyai kwandang’ung’ choginnyo kouuiit: ara anyun, yai kowisisit otisiet ne uui ne ki bo kwandang’ung’, ak iyai kowisisit choginnyi ne nyigis ne kiindeech, si kobiit keotin." 
2Chronicles10:5 Ak kilenji ichek, Obwa kogeny ole ami koga ibata betusiek somogu. Koba anyun bik." 
2Chronicles10:6 Kong’alal laitoriat Reoboam ak boisiek, che kicham kotonondos eng’ taitab Solomon kwandanyi, ye kita kosobei, kolenji, Nee ng’olyot ne omwawa ne awoljini bichu?" 
2Chronicles10:7 Ak kimwachi kolenji, Ngot iegu chi ne mie eng’ bichu, ak ibaibai ichek, ak imwachi ng’alek che miach, koegu anyun ichek otwogiguk koigeny." 
2Chronicles10:8 Ago kibagakta ng’alekab boisiek, che kimwachi inendet, ak kong’alal ak neranik che kinerjindos tugul, che kitonondos eng’ tainnyi." 
2Chronicles10:9 Ak kilenji ichek, Nee ng’olyot ne omwae okwek, si kobiit kewolji bichu kong’alalwa kolenja, Yai kowisisit chogit, ne kiindeech kwandang’ung’?" 
2Chronicles10:10 Ak kiwolji neranik che kinerjindos ak inendet kolenji, Imwachini ko u ni bichu kong’alalun, kolenjinin, Kiyai kwandang’ung’ choginnyo konyigisit, ago iyaiywech kowisisit; imwachini ko u ni, ilenjini, Nyigis mornennyu ne ming’in ne bo eut kosiir suetab baba." 
2Chronicles10:11 Ak ko u ye kigonok baba chogit ne nyigis, atese choging’wong’: kiitigonenok baba kipcharitisiek, ago atigonenok melmelwek." 
2Chronicles10:12 Kobwa anyun Jeroboam ak bik tugul ole mi Reoboam eng’ betutab somok, ko u ye kiga ng’at laitoriat, kole, Obwa eng’ betutab somok." 
2Chronicles10:13 Ak kiwolji laitoriat ichek eng’ koromnatet; ak kometo laitoriat Reoboam ng’alekab boisiek," 
2Chronicles10:14 ak kong’alalji ichek ko u ye kiga mwachi neranik, kolenji, Kiyai baba choging’wong’ konyigisit, ago atese: kiitigonenok baba kipcharitisiek, ago atigonenok melmelwek." 
2Chronicles10:15 Koma kasyi anyun laitoriat bichoto; amu ki kit ne kibunu Kamuktaindet, si kobiit kogimit Jehovah ng’olyondennyi, ne kimwa eng’ Aija Silonindet komwachi Jeroboam weritab Nebat." 
2Chronicles10:16 Ak kingogeer Israel tugul kole mata kogasyi laitoriat ichek, kowolji bik laitoriat, kolenji, Nee kebeberta ne ketinye eng’ Daudi? Ama kitinye borotet eng’ weritab Jesii: ingwo chi tugul emainnyi, ee Israel: rib gong’ung’ anyun, Daudi. Koba Israel tugul anyun emaisiekwak." 
2Chronicles10:17 Ago kilaitoran Reoboam eng’ lagokab Israel che kimenyei nganasokab Juda. 
2Chronicles10:18 Kiiyokto anyun Reoboam Hadoram, ne kibou aisurut; ak kilach lagokab Israel inendet eng’ koik, kome. Ak kichakta laitoriat Reoboam kolany karinnyi komwei kwo Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles10:19 Kongelelji anyun Israel gotab Daudi, agoi ra." 
2Chronicles11:1 Ak kingoit Reoboam Jerusalem, koyum gotab Juda, ak gotab Benjamin, murenik elfusiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit che bo luget, che kigilewen, kobargei ak Israel, koweekyi bounatet Reoboam." 
2Chronicles11:2 Ago kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Semaia chitab Kamuktaindet, kolenji," 
2Chronicles11:3 Ng’alalji Reoboam weritab Solomon, laitoriatab Juda, koboto Israel tugul eng’ Juda ak Benjamin, ilenji," 
2Chronicles11:4 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Amobe otogoste anan obarge ak tupchosiekwok; ingoweek chi tugul kwo gonnyi; amu bunwa kii. Kogas anyun ichek ng’alekab Jehovah, ak koweek, mata koba kobargei ak Jeroboam." 
2Chronicles11:5 Ak kimeny Reoboam Jerusalem, ak koteech eng’ Juda nganasok che kiribegei." 
2Chronicles11:6 Kiteech Bet-lehem, Etam, ak Tekoa," 
2Chronicles11:7 ak Bet-sur, Soko, ak Adulam," 
2Chronicles11:8 ak Gat, Maresa, ak Sip," 
2Chronicles11:9 ak Adoraim, Lakis, ak Aseka," 
2Chronicles11:10 ak Sora, Aijalon, ak Hebron, che mi Juda ak Benjamin, nganasok che ng’ototin." 
2Chronicles11:11 Ak kiigimit irimoik, ak konde kiptainik, ak kogonore amitwogik, ak mwanik ak divaik." 
2Chronicles11:12 Ak kiinde nganaset age tugul long’onik ak ng’otwek, ak kogimit mising’. Ak kibunji inendet Juda ak Benjamin." 
2Chronicles11:13 Ak kibwanji inendet tisiik ak Lawik che kimi Israel tugul, komong’ eng’ kiwotosiekwak tugul." 
2Chronicles11:14 Amu kibagakta Lawik emotinwekwak che kiyagisie ak tugukwak, ak kobwa Juda ak Jerusalem: amu kion Jeroboam ak werikyik ichek, si mayai boisietab tiseinatet koyachi Jehovah:" 
2Chronicles11:15 ak kilewenjigei tisiik che bo komoswek che tororen, ak che bo oik, ak che bo moek che kiga koyai." 
2Chronicles11:16 Ak kibwa Jerusalem, bik alak eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel, ichek che kiga igiilgei eng’ mugulelwekwak kocheng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, kosub bichoto, kobwa koeng’ji Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak." 
2Chronicles11:17 Kiigimit anyun bounatetab Juda, ak kogimit Reoboam weritab Solomon eng’ kenyisiek somok: amu kibandate ortinwekab Daudi ak Solomon eng’ kenyisiek somok." 
2Chronicles11:18 Ak kitun Reoboam Maalat cheptab Jerimot weritab Daudi, ak Abiail, cheptab Eliab weritab Jesii;" 
2Chronicles11:19 ak kisikyi inendet werik; Jeus, Semaria, ak Saham." 
2Chronicles11:20 Yeityo kotun Maaka cheptab Absalom; ak kisikyi inendet Abija, Atai, Sisa, ak Selomit." 
2Chronicles11:21 Ak kicham Reoboam Maaka cheptab Absalom kosiir osotikyik tugul, ak chebaigainiyik: (amu kiitun osotik taman ak sisiit, ak chebaigeinik tamanwogik lo, ak kisich werik tiptem ak sisiit ak tibik tamanwogik lo.)" 
2Chronicles11:22 Ak kiinde Reoboam Abija weritab Maaka koek ne o, koboi tupchosiekyik: amu kimach konde inendet koek laitoriat." 
2Chronicles11:23 Kiyai eng’ ng’omnatet, kopcheita werikyik tugul koyom emotinwek tugul che bo Juda ak Benjamin, koba nganaset age tugul ne ng’otat, ak kiigochi ichek amitwogik che chang’ kot. Ak kicheng’ji ichek osotik che chang’." 
2Chronicles12:1 Ak kingo kagigimit bounatetab Reoboam, ak kogimit agine, kometo ng’atutikab Jehovah, inendet ak Israel tugul." 
2Chronicles12:2 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo mut ne bo laitoriat Reoboam, kotogos Sisak laitoriatab Misri, konyo kobar Jerusalem, amu kiga kongelelji Jehovah;" 
2Chronicles12:3 kitinyei karisiek elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’, ak bik elfusiek tamanwogik lo che lanyei mbartanyisiek: ak kima ko iitoksei bik che kigabwa koboto inendet eng’ Misri; Lubik, Sukik, ak Etiopik." 
2Chronicles12:4 Ak kinam nganasok che ng’ototin che ki bo Juda, ak kobwa Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles12:5 Konyo maotiot Semaia oldab Reoboam, ak bounikab Juda, che kiga koyumjigei Jerusalem, komwee Sisak, ak kolenji ichek, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Kiometa, eng’ noto ko kabagakyok anyun agane eutab Sisak." 
2Chronicles12:6 Koming’ingei anyun bounikab Israel koboto laitoriat; ak kile, Bo iman Jehovah." 
2Chronicles12:7 Ak kingogeer Jehovah kole, kagoming’ingei, konyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Semaia, kolenji, Kagoming’ingei ichek; ma abare: ago asoru kitigin, ak ma kerong’jin Jerusalem neregekyuk eng’ eutab Sisak." 
2Chronicles12:8 Ago egu ichek otwogikyik; si kobiit konai boisiennyu ak boisietab bounatosiekab emotinwek. 
2Chronicles12:9 Kotogos anyun Sisak laitoriatab Misri kobar Jerusalem, ak koib konoraikab gotab Jehovah, ak konoraikab gotab laitoriat: kiib tugul: kiib kogeny long’onik che bo tahabu che kiga yai Solomon." 
2Chronicles12:10 Ak kiyai laitoriat Reoboam long’onik che bo sugunonik kogeere choto, ak kogochi kiptainikab ribik korib, che kiribei kurgetab gotab laitoriat." 
2Chronicles12:11 Ak eng’ betut age tugul ne kanyo laitoriat gotab Jehovah, kobwa ribik koib, yeityo koweekta koba gotab ribik." 
2Chronicles12:12 Ak kingoming’ingei, koistoegei neregekab Jehovah inendet, si mabar inendet kowong’: ak kogeny kimitei Juda tuguk che miach." 
2Chronicles12:13 Kiigimitgei anyun laitoriat Reoboam eng’ Jerusalem, ak kolaitoran: amu ki bo kenyisiek artam ak agenge Reoboam ye kitau kolaitorani, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak tisab eng’ Jerusalem, nganasanato kiga kolewen Jehovah eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel, konde kainennyi oloto: ak kigiguure kamet Naama Jebamonindet." 
2Chronicles12:14 Ak kiyai yaitiet, amu ma igiilgei eng’ muguleldanyi kocheng’ Jehovah." 
2Chronicles12:15 Ak boisionikab Reoboam, che bo tai ak che bo let, tos ma kisir eng’ ng’alekab Semaia maotiot, ak che bo Ido keerindet, kobee tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto? Ak kimi lugosiek kwenutab Reoboam ak Jeroboam kotugul." 
2Chronicles12:16 Ak kiru Reoboam koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi nganasetab Daudi; ak kilaitoran Abija werinnyi kogeer inendet."
