2Chronicles13:1 Kitoi kolaitoran Abija eng’ Juda eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo laitoriat Jeroboam. 
2Chronicles13:2 Kilaitoran kenyisiek somok eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamet Mikaia cheptab Uriel ne bo Gibea. Ak kitinyei luget Abija ak Jeroboam eng’ kwenunywa. 
2Chronicles13:3 Ak kitet luget Abija koboto lugetab murenik che nyigonen che bo luget, murenik elfusiek bogol ang’wan che kigilewen: ak kitet Jeroboam luget kobargei ak inendet kotinyei murenik elfusiek bogol sisiit, che kigilewen, bik che kimen, che nyigonen." 
2Chronicles13:4 Ak kitonon Abija eng’ tulwetab Semaraim, ne mi emetab tulonok ne bo Epraim, ak kole, Ogasa, ee Jeroboam ak Israel tugul;" 
2Chronicles13:5 tos manyoljok onai ole kiigochi Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, Daudi, bounatet koboi Israel koigeny, kiigochi inendet ak werikyik eng’ kayomisetab munyuk?" 
2Chronicles13:6 Ago king’eet Jeroboam weritab Nebat, otwogindetab Solomon weritab Daudi, kongelelji kiptaiyandennyi." 
2Chronicles13:7 Ak kiiyumjigei inendet bik che yaach, werikab Belial, che kiigimitgei kobargei ak Reoboam weritab Solomon, ye kita ko ming’in Reoboam ak kotinyei rirge, ak ma imuch kogirinda ichek." 
2Chronicles13:8 Ak nguno olen omuchi ogirinde bounatetab Jehovah ne mi eunekab werikab Daudi; ak o tuiyet ne o, ak otinye moek che bo tahabu che kiitang’wok Jeroboam koek kanamonik." 
2Chronicles13:9 Ma oonu tisiikab Jehovah, werikab Aron, ak Lawik, ak olewenjige tisiik, osubi bitonwekab bikab emotinwek alak? Si age tugul ne nyonei koanyinyegei kirgit ak mengichik tisab, koegu noto tisiindetab tuguk che matilei kiy." 
2Chronicles13:10 Ago Jehovah ko Kamuktaindennyo achek, ak tom kebagakte inendet; ak ketinye tisiik che boisiechin Jehovah, werikab Aron, ak Lawik che yaei boisienywa:" 
2Chronicles13:11 ak beeljin ichek Jehovah kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak nyamdutik che ng’uu ne anyiny, karonet age tugul ak koskoleng’ut age tugul: tetei makatinik che bo kabartaet eng’ meset ne tilil: ak keldab tait ne bo tahabu koboto taisiekyik, si kolal koskoleng’ut age tugul: amu kiribe boisietab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo; ago kiomete inendet." 
2Chronicles13:12 Ogeero, mi Kamuktaindet kobotech, kondoiywech, ak tisiikyik che tinyei iriagok che bo waagat si koguutwak ne bo waagat. Ee lagokab Israel, amat obarge ak Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwok: amu mobore." 
2Chronicles13:13 Ago kichob Jeroboam bik kobwa koribisyo eng’ let: kimi ichek taitab Juda, ak kimi let che kiribistos." 
2Chronicles13:14 Ak kingogeer bikab Juda let, ogeero, kimi luget tainywa ak let: ak kirirji Jehovah, ak kiguut tisiik iriagok." 
2Chronicles13:15 Kowaach anyun bikab Juda; ak ye kita kowaachei bikab Juda, kobar Kamuktaindet Jeroboam ak Israel tugul eng’ taitab Abija ak Juda." 
2Chronicles13:16 Ak kimwei lagokab Israel eng’ taitab Juda: ak kiinde Kamuktaindet ichek eunekwak. 
2Chronicles13:17 Ak kibar Abija ak bikyik ichek eng’ baret ne o: kobek anyun bik che kigilewen elfusiek bogol mut. 
2Chronicles13:18 Kigiming’in ko u noto lagokab Israel eng’ betusiechoto, ak kiiterteris lagokab Juda, amu kitiiegei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak." 
2Chronicles13:19 Ak kion Abija Jeroboam, ak korebe inendet nganasok, Bet-el ak nganasokyik, ak Jesana ak nganasokyik, ak Epron ak nganasokyik." 
2Chronicles13:20 Mata konyor kimnatet kogeny Jeroboam eng’ betusiekab Abija: kibar Jehovah inendet, ak kime." 
2Chronicles13:21 Ago kitesak Abija kogimit, ak kotun osotik taman ak ang’wan, ak kisich werik tiptem ak aeng’, ak tibik taman ak lo." 
2Chronicles13:22 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Abija, ak ortinwekyik, ak ng’alekyik, ko kigisirji bukuitab maotiot Ido." 
2Chronicles14:1 Koru anyun Abija koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi nganasetab Daudi, ak kilaitoran Asa werinnyi kogeer inendet: kinyor emet kalyet kenyisiek taman eng’ betusiekyik." 
2Chronicles14:2 Ak kiyai Asa ne mie ak ko litit eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi: 
2Chronicles14:3 amu kiisto kapkorosusiek che ter, ak komoswek che tororen, ak kobut tolochik, ak koeb Aserik;" 
2Chronicles14:4 ak king’at Juda kocheng’ Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, ak koyai ng’atutik ak kayomisutik." 
2Chronicles14:5 Kiisto kogeny eng’ nganasok tugul che bo Juda komoswek che tororen ak kanamonikab asista: ak kitinyei kalyet bororiet eng’ tainnyi. 
2Chronicles14:6 Ak kiteech nganasok che ng’ototin eng’ Juda: amu kimi kalyet emet, ak kima kotinyei luget eng’ kenyisiechoto; amu kiga kogochi Jehovah inendet kamuung’et." 
2Chronicles14:7 Amu kimwachi bikab Juda kolenji, Ongeteech nganasochu, ak kiyieme irimoik, ak teeksosiek che koen, ak ormarichok, ak temeleiywek; ta komi emet tainnyo, amu kigecheng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo; kigecheng’ inendet, ak kigogonech kamuung’et eng’ komosta age tugul. Koteekso anyun ak kibor." 
2Chronicles14:8 Ak kitinyei Asa luget ne kitinyei long’onik ak ng’otwek; che bo Juda ko ki bik elfusiek bogol somok; ak che bo Benjamin, che kitinyei long’onik ak kwangok, ko ki elfusiek bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik sisiit: ki bik che kimen che nyigonen chuto tugul." 
2Chronicles14:9 Ak kinyo kobargei ak ichek Sera Etiopindet, kotinyei luget ne bo bik elfut konyil elfut, ak karisiek bogol somok; ak kiit Maresa." 
2Chronicles14:10 Kwo anyun Asa kotorokta inendet, ak kitet luget eng’ atebwetab Sepata ne mi Maresa." 
2Chronicles14:11 Ak kirirji Asa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, kole, Jehovah, mami age kobatenen ne imuchi kotoretis eng’ kwenutab ne kim ak ne matinyei kimnatet: toretech, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo; amu kimang’un, ak kagibwa kebarge ak tuiyoni eng’ kaineng’ung’. Ee Jehovah, i Kamuktaindennyo; amat koterterin chi." 
2Chronicles14:12 Kobar anyun Jehovah Etiopik eng’ taitab Asa, ak eng’ taitab Juda; ak kimwei Etiopik." 
2Chronicles14:13 Ak kion Asa ak bik che kimi tugul agoi Gerar: ak kibek Etiopik che chang’ ne mata komuch kosorgei; amu kigibar eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak eng’ taitab lugennyi; ak kiib barunenik che chang’." 
2Chronicles14:14 Ak kibar nganasok tugul che kimi ole negite Gerar; amu kinyonji ichek kamuisetab Jehovah: ak kinam tuguk eng’ nganasok tugul; amu kimi barunenik che chang’ nganasochato. 
2Chronicles14:15 Ak kibar kogeny kaptugusiek, ak kokweri kechirek ng’isiat, ak tambesik, ak koweek koba Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles15:1 Ak kinyonji Tamirmirietab Jehovah Asaria weritab Obed: 
2Chronicles15:2 ak kiwa kotorokta Asa, kolenji, Ogasa okwek, inye Asa ak Juda tugul ak Benjamin: mi Jehovah kobotok, ye otebye ak inendet; ak ngot ocheng’ inendet, onyoru; ago ngot omete inendet, kometok." 
2Chronicles15:3 Kiga kotebe Israel egosiek che chang’ ama tinyei Kamuktaindet ne bo iman, ama tinyei tisiindet ne inetisiei, ama tinyei ng’atutik:" 
2Chronicles15:4 ago kingoweekyigei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, eng’ nyalildanywa, ak kocheng’ inendet, konyor inendet." 
2Chronicles15:5 Ak kima komi kalyet eng’ betusiechoto eng’ inendet ne kimandoi, anan ko eng’ inendet ne nyonei go, ago kitinyei kaiimutik ichek tugul che kimenyei emotinwechoto." 
2Chronicles15:6 Kitonatongei, kogirindoi bororiet age bororiet age, ak kogirindoi nganaset age nganaset age: amu kiinyalil Kamuktaindet ichek eng’ nyalilowogik tugul." 
2Chronicles15:7 Ago ogimegitu, among’ kochorirenso eunekwok: amu onyoru melekto eng’ boisionikwok." 
2Chronicles15:8 Ak kingogas Asa ng’alechuto, ak maoinatetab maotiot Obed, konyiganit, ak koisto tuguk che kiwechei eng’ emet tugul ne bo Juda ak Benjamin, ak eng’ nganasok che kiga koreb eng’ emetab tulonokab Epraim; ak kiteech kogeny kaptisisietab Jehovah, ne kimi taitab keterutab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles15:9 Ak kiiyum Juda tugul ak Benjamin, ak bunotik che kimi koboto ichek, che bo Epraim ak Manase, ak che bo Simeon: amu kibwanji inendet bik che chang; mising’ kobun Israel, ye kingogeer kole mi Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi koboto inendet." 
2Chronicles15:10 Koyumgei anyun eng’ Jerusalem eng’ arawetab somok eng’ kenyitab taman ak mut ne bo laitornatetab Asa. 
2Chronicles15:11 Ak kieng’ji Jehovah tiseiywek eng’ betunoto, che bo barunenik che kigetu, eik bogol tisab ak kechirek elfusiek tisab." 
2Chronicles15:12 Ak kiiyomisgei kocheng’ Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, eng’ mugulelwekwak tugul, ak eng’ sobonwekwak tugul;" 
2Chronicles15:13 ak kole, age tugul ne machamei kocheng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, kebarei ngo ming’in, anan ko o, ngo muren, anan ko kwony." 
2Chronicles15:14 Ak kiiyosiechi Jehovah komwa eng’ kutit ne o, ak eng’ waagat, ak eng’ iriagok, ak eng’ igondisiek." 
2Chronicles15:15 Ak kiboiboitu Juda tugul amu kayosionoto: amu kigayosio eng’ mugulelwekwak tugul, ak kocheng’ inendet eng’ magenywa tugul; ak kinyor inendet: ak kiigochi Jehovah ichek kamuung’et eng’ tabanwekwak tugul." 
2Chronicles15:16 Ak kiisto Maaka agine, kametab Asa laitoriat, si mata koek laitoriat ne kwondo, amu kiga koyai kanamwet ne kiwechei ne bo Asera; kibut Asa kanamwennyi, ak kotui koek temburiek, ak kobeel eng’ ole negite kererutab Kidron." 
2Chronicles15:17 Ago kima kiisto komoswek che tororen eng’ Israel: ago kiigesunotgei muguleldab Asa eng’ betusiekyik tugul. 
2Chronicles15:18 Ak kiib tuguk che kiga taban kwandanyi, kobwa gotab Kamuktaindet, ak che kiga kotaban inendet, feda, ak tahabu, ak terenik." 
2Chronicles15:19 Ak mata kobiit luget kogeny agoi kenyitab sosom ak mut ne bo laitornatetab Asa. 
2Chronicles16:1 Eng’ kenyitab sosom ak lo ne bo laitornatetab Asa, kwo Baasa laitoriatab Israel kwo kobargei ak Juda, ak koteech Rama, si mata kochamji chi komanda anan konyo orit ole mi Asa laitoriatab Juda." 
2Chronicles16:2 Konem anyun Asa feda ak tahabu eng’ ole kigonore tugukab gotab Jehovah, ak gotab laitoriat, ak koyokyi Ben-hadad laitoriatab Suria, ne kimenyei Damasko, kolenji," 
2Chronicles16:3 Mitei kasyinet kwenunnyo, ane ak inye, ko u ye kimi kwenutab kwandanyu ak kwandang’ung’: ogeero, kaayogun feda ak tahabu; ui but kasyinet ne oting’ege ak Baasa laitoriatab Israel, si kwo koistoenagei." 
2Chronicles16:4 Kogasyi anyun Ben-hadad laitoriat Asa ng’alekyik, ak koyokto kiptainikab lugosiekyik koba kobar nganasokab Israel; ak kibar Ijon, ak Dan, ak Abel-maim, ak nganasok tugul che kigigonore tuguk, che bo Naptali." 
2Chronicles16:5 Ak kingogas Baasa, ko mata koteech Rama, kobagakta boisiennyi ne kiyaei." 
2Chronicles16:6 Komut anyun laitoriat Asa Juda tugul; ak koba koib koik che bo Rama, koboto ketik, che kiga teekse Baasa; ak koteege Geba ak Mispa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Ak kinyo eng’ betusiechoto Hanani keerindet ole mi Asa laitoriatab Juda, ak kolenji, Amu koitiiege laitoriatab Suria, ma itiiege Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ko kachilil lugetab laitoriatab Suria eng’ eung’ung’ amu noto." 
2Chronicles16:8 Tos kima ko luget ne o Etiopik ak Lubik, che kitinyei karisiek ak bik che chang’ mising’ che kilanyei mbartanyisiek? Ko amu kiitiiege Jehovah, ko kiinde inendet ichek eung’ung’." 
2Chronicles16:9 Amu bendoti konyekab Jehovah eng’ ng’ony komugul, kobortogei kole kim agobo icheget che igesunotgei mugulelwekwak eng’ tainnyi. Koiyai koito eng’ berberindo; amu koboch nguno ko kenyoru lugosiek agoi." 
2Chronicles16:10 Konerekyi anyun Asa keerindet, ak konde inendet korgoret; amu kinerekyi inendet mising’ agobo kiito. Ak kius Asa bik alak eng’ betusiechoto." 
2Chronicles16:11 Ak ogeero, boisionikab Asa, che bo tai, ak che bo let, ogeero, kigisirji bukuitab laitorinikab Juda ak Israel." 
2Chronicles16:12 Ak eng’ kenyitab sosom ak sogol ne bo laitornatennyi, konam miando kelyekab Asa; kieet mising’ miandanyi: ago ma cheng’ Jehovah eng’ miandanyi, kicheng’ chepkerichinik." 
2Chronicles16:13 Ak kiru Asa ak kwanisiekyik, ak kime eng’ kenyitab artam ak agenge ne bo laitornatennyi." 
2Chronicles16:14 Ak kigitub inendet eng’ kererisiekyik, che kiga kowachigei eng’ nganasetab Daudi, ak kiginde itogut ne ki nyiitat nyamdutik che anyiny, ak tuguk alak che terjin che kigichob eng’ ng’omnatetab chepkerichinik: ak kigibeelji tuguk che chang’ mising’." 
2Chronicles17:1 Ak kilaitoran werinnyi Jeosapat kogeer inendet, ak kogimitgei kobargei ak Israel." 
2Chronicles17:2 Ak kiinde lugosiek nganasok tugul che ng’ototin che bo Juda, ak kiinde ribik emetab Juda, ak nganasokab Epraim, che kiga reb kwandanyi Asa." 
2Chronicles17:3 Ak kimi Jehovah ak Jeosapat, amu kiwendote ortinwek che bo tai che bo kwandanyi Daudi, ama cheng’ Baalik;" 
2Chronicles17:4 ago kicheng’ Kamuktaindetab kwandanyi, ak kowendote ng’atutikyik, ama isub tuguk che kiyai Israel." 
2Chronicles17:5 Kiigimit anyun Jehovah laitornatet eng’ eunnyi; ak kiipchi bik tugul che bo Juda Jeosapat kagochinoik; ak kitinyei magornatet ak teegisto eng’ chang’indo. 
2Chronicles17:6 Ak kiitororok muguleldanyi eng’ oretab Jehovah: ak kogeny, kiisto komoswek che tororen ak Aserik kobetyo eng’ Juda." 
2Chronicles17:7 Ak kogeny kiiyokto bounikyik eng’ kenyitab somok ne bo laitornatennyi, choto ko ki Benail, Obadia, Sekaria, Netanel, ak Mikaia, koba konetisiot eng’ nganasokab Juda;" 
2Chronicles17:8 ak kimi Lawik koboto ichek, ichek ko ki Semaia, Netania, Sebadia, Asael, Semiramot, Jeonatan, Adonija, Tobija, ak Tobadonija, Lawik; ak kimi koboto ichek Elisama, ak Jeoram, tisiik." 
2Chronicles17:9 Ak konetisiot eng’ Juda, kotinyei bukuitab Ng’atutikab Jehovah; ak kibendate nganasok tugul che bo Juda, konetisiot eng’ kwenutab bik." 
2Chronicles17:10 Ak kiibutyi kamuisetab Jehovah bounatosiek tugul che bo emotinwek che kimi tabanwekab Juda, kot ko mata kobokyi Jeosapat." 
2Chronicles17:11 Ak kiipchi Pilistik alak kagochinoik Jeosapat, ak kiipchi feda koek aisurut; kigetyi Marabuk agichek akwotisiekab kechirek, mengichik elfusiek tisab ak bogol tisab, ak kwesik elfusiek tisab ak bogol tisab." 
2Chronicles17:12 Ak kitesak Jeosapat koeet mising’; ak kiteech irimoik ak nganasok che kigonore tuguk, eng’ Juda." 
2Chronicles17:13 Ak kitinye boisionik che chang’ eng’ nganasokab Juda; koboto bikab luget, bik che kimen, che nyigonen, eng’ Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles17:14 Chu koitosiekwak ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak: che bo gab Juda, che ki kiptainikab elfusiek ko ki Adna ne ki kiptaiyat, ak kitinyei bik che kimen che nyigonen elfusiek bogol somok:" 
2Chronicles17:15 ak ne kirubei inendet ko ki Jeohanan ne ki kiptaiyat, ak kitinyei bik elfusiek bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik sisiit;" 
2Chronicles17:16 ak kirubei inendet Amasia weritab Sikri, ne kiigochigei Jehovah eng’ chamnyet; ak kitinyei bik che kimen che nyigonen elfusiek bogol aeng’:" 
2Chronicles17:17 ak che bo gab Benjamin ko ki Eliada ne kim ak ko nyigan, ak kitinyei bik elfusiek bogol aeng’ che kitinyei kwangok ak long’onik:" 
2Chronicles17:18 ak kirubei inendet Jeosabad, ak kitinyei bik elfusiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit che ki chobotin koyai luget." 
2Chronicles17:19 Chuto ko che kiboisiechin laitoriat, ko ma kiitito che kiinde laitoriat nganasok che ng’ototin che bo Juda tugul." 
2Chronicles18:1 Kitinyei Jeosapat magornatosiek ak teegisto eng’ chang’indo; ak kigangei ak Ahab. 
2Chronicles18:2 Ak kingosiirto kenyisiek alage kochortagei oldab Ahab eng’ Samaria. Ak kieng’ji Ahab inendet kechirek ak tuga che chang’ mising’, koboto bik che kimi ak inendet, ak kogaigai inendet kotogosta Ramot-gilead." 
2Chronicles18:3 Ak kilenji Ahab laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda, Ichame kebe tuwai Ramot-gilead? Ak kiwolji kolenji, A u kit ne i u, ak u bikyuk biguk; ak kimi koboten eng’ lugoni." 
2Chronicles18:4 Ak kilenji Jeosapat laitoriatab Israel, Asomin ale, teeb eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah rani." 
2Chronicles18:5 Koyum anyun laitoriatab Israel maotik bogol ang’wan, ak kolenji ichek, Kibe kebargei ak Ramot-gilead, anan atebi? Ak kilenji, Togoste; amu indoi Kamuktaindet eutab laitoriat." 
2Chronicles18:6 Ago kile Jeosapat, Tos mami maotiotab Jehovah age yu, si keteepse inendet?" 
2Chronicles18:7 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat, Ta komi chito age ne kimuchi keteepse eng’ Jehovah: ago aweche; amu mamaoteni tuguk che miachen agobo ane, kobate yaitiet kotugul: inendet ko Mikaia weritab Imla. Kile Jeosapat, Amat komwa laitoriat ko u no." 
2Chronicles18:8 Kiguur anyun laitoriatab Israel kiptaiyat age, ak kolenji, Ui imutu Mikaia weritab Imla ichogune." 
2Chronicles18:9 Ak kiga tebe laitoriatab Israel ak Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda chi tugul ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, kolaachi ngoroikwak che bo laitornatet, ak kitebi eng’ ole baraa eng’ ole kibunei eng’ ormarichetab Samaria; ak kimaoteni maotik tugul eng’ tainywa." 
2Chronicles18:10 Ak kiyachigei Sedekia weritab Kenaana kuinoikab karik, ak kole, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Itoortoe chuto Suriek, kot kogesgei." 
2Chronicles18:11 Ak kimaotenso maotik tugul ko u noto agichek, kole, Togoste Ramot-gilead, ak ibor: amu indoi Jehovah nganasanato eutab laitoriat." 
2Chronicles18:12 Ak king’alalji inendet chito ne kiga kiyokto koguur Mikaia, kolenji, Keero, kachamak eng’ laitoriat ng’alekab maotik che kamwachi eng’ kasyinet agenge: asomin ale, ingoigei anyun ng’olyondeng’ung’ ng’olyotab age eng’ ichek, ak ing’alal ng’alek che miach." 
2Chronicles18:13 Ak kile Mikaia, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ko kit ne mwaei Kamuktaindennyu, amwae noto." 
2Chronicles18:14 Ak kingoit inendet ole mi laitoriat, kolenji laitoriat inendet, Mikaia, kibe Ramot- gilead, anan kitebi? Ak kile, Otogoste, ak obor; ak kindoi eunekwok bichoto." 
2Chronicles18:15 Ak kilenji laitoriat, Ayosieun konyil ata ale, Amat imwawa kiy age kobate imanda eng’ kainetab Jehovah?" 
2Chronicles18:16 Ak kile, Kiageer Israel tugul ko kaiyesta eng’ tulonok, ko u kechirek che matinyei mestowot: ak kimwa Jehovah kole, Matinyei chuto kiptaiyat; ingoweek chi tugul kwo gonnyi eng’ kalyet." 
2Chronicles18:17 Ak kilenji laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat, Kama amwaun ale, mamaoteni tuguk che miachen agobo ane, kobate yaitiet?" 
2Chronicles18:18 Ak kile Mikaia, Ogas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah: kiageer Jehovah kotebyei eng’ ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, ak kitononi luget tugul ne bo kipsengwet eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai ak ne bo katam." 
2Chronicles18:19 Ak kile Jehovah, Ng’o ne iberberi Ahab laitoriatab Israel, si kwo kotogosta ak kome eng’ Ramot-gilead? Ak kimwa age ko u ni, komwa age ko u ni." 
2Chronicles18:20 Ak kimong’ tamirmiriet ak kotonon eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kole, Aberberi. Ak kimwachi Jehovah inendet, kolenji, Iberbertoi ano? Maotikyik tugul. Ak kimwa inendet kole, Iberberi inendet, ak iterter: ui anyun, ak iyai ko u noto." 
2Chronicles18:21 Ak kile, Awendi ak aegu tamirmiriet ne kenisiei eng’ kutuswekab maotikyik tugul. Ak kimwa inendet kole, Iberberi inendet, ak iterter: ui anyun, ak iyai ko u noto." 
2Chronicles18:22 Ara anyun, keero, kagonde Jehovah tamirmiriet ne kenisiei kutuswekab maotichuguk tugul; ak kagomwa Jehovah yaitiet agobo inye." 
2Chronicles18:23 Korik anyun Sedekia weritab Kenaana, ak korabach Mikaia matanda, ak kolenji, Kabun ano tamirmirietab Jehovah ak konyo kong’alalun?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Ak kile Mikaia, Keero, igeere eng’ betunoto ye tun iwendi got ne bo orit iunyege." 
2Chronicles18:25 Ak kimwa laitoriatab Israel kole, Onam Mikaia ak oweekte omutyi Amon bounindetab nganaset, ak Joas weritab laitoriat;" 
2Chronicles18:26 ak olenji, Kamwa laitoriat ko u ni kole, Onde chichi korgoret, ak obae amitwogikab nyalilda ak beekab nyalilda, agoi aweege eng’ kalyet." 
2Chronicles18:27 Ak kile Mikaia, Ngot iweege iman eng’ kalyet, ko kaga ma ng’alalena Jehovah. Ak kile, Ogas okwek bik tugul." 
2Chronicles18:28 Kitogosta anyun laitoriatab Israel ak Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda koba Ramot- gilead. 
2Chronicles18:29 Kilenji laitoriatab Israel Jeosapat, Awalegei aegu age, ak awe luget; ago ilaach inye ngoroik che bo laitornatet. Kowalgei anyun laitoriatab Israel koek age, ak koba luget." 
2Chronicles18:30 Kiga ng’at laitoriatab Suria kiptainikab karisiekyik, kolenji, Amat obargei ak ne ming’in anan ko ne o kobate laitoriatab Israel inegei." 
2Chronicles18:31 Ak kingogeer kiptainichoto bo karisiek Jeosapat, komwa kole, Nito ko laitoriatab Israel. Koweekyigei anyun kole kobargei ak inendet: ago kiwaach Jeosapat, ak kitoret Jehovah inendet; ago kiigochi Kamuktaindet ichek kobagakta inendet." 
2Chronicles18:32 Ak kingogeer kiptainikab karisiek kole ma laitoriatab Israel ni, koweek, mata kosub inendet." 
2Chronicles18:33 King’i chito age kwangennyi komwok kosapsapchi, ak kitiech laitoriatab Israel ole tuiyechin karikyik che kiilaachi: kolenji anyun chito ne kweriei karinnyi, Imuta amanda eng’ oli mi luget; amu kagiguotena mising’." 
2Chronicles18:34 Ak kitesak luget betunoto: ago kitiigei laitoriatab Israel eng’ karinnyi kotokyigei Suriek agoi koskoleny: ak kingo negit kororokto asista, kome." 
2Chronicles19:1 Ak kiweek Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda kwo gonnyi eng’ Jerusalem eng’ kalyet. 
2Chronicles19:2 Ak kiwa Jeu weritab Hanani keerindet, kotorokta inendet, ak kolenji laitoriat Jeosapat, Tos yamin itoret kiptengekyot, ak icham che wechei Jehovah? Kabwanjin neregek, che bunu taitab Jehovah, amu kiito." 
2Chronicles19:3 Ago kigigeerjin tuguk che miachen, amu kiiste Aserot eng’ emet, ak kiigiil muguleldang’ung’ icheng’ Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles19:4 Ak kimeny Jeosapat Jerusalem: ak kiwendot kogeny eng’ kwenutab bik koboch Beer-seba agoi emetab tulonokab Epraim, ak komut ichek koweekyi Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak." 
2Chronicles19:5 Ak kiinde kiruogik emet, eng’ nganasok tugul che ng’ototin che bo Juda, nganaset age tugul," 
2Chronicles19:6 ak kolenji kiruogichoto, Obwat kit ne oyae: amu moruochi agobo chi, oruochi agobo Jehovah; mi inendet kobotok eng’ kiruoget." 
2Chronicles19:7 Ingotebenok anyun kaiyweisiet ne oiywei Jehovah: orib, ak oyai: amu mami tengekto eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, anan ko tiytietab bik, ama taachei konunoik che kigoigoisie." 
2Chronicles19:8 Ak kiinde kogeny Jeosapat Jerusalem Lawik ak tisiik, ak che bo kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekab Israel, agobo kiruogetab Jehovah, ak agobo tuguk che kamoiyo. Ak kiweek koba Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles19:9 Ak king’at ichek kolenji, Oyai ko u nito eng’ kaiyweisiet ne oiywei Jehovah, eng’ imanda, ak eng’ muguleldo ne igesunotgei." 
2Chronicles19:10 Ak betut age tugul ne kaityok ng’olyotab chi age tugul ne bunu tupchosiekwok che menyei nganasokwak, agobo korotik eng’ korotik, ak agobo ng’atutik ak kayomisutik, konetisiosiek ak kiruogutik, oteechi, si manam ichek tengekto eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak konyonjok nereknatet, okwek ak tupchosiekwok: oyai nito, si manamak tengekto." 
2Chronicles19:11 Ak ogeero, boiywok Amaria tisiindet ne o eng’ tuguk tugul che bo Jehovah; ak koboiywok Sebadia weritab Ismael, bounindetab gotab Juda, eng’ tuguk tugul che bo laitoriat: ak egu Lawik kiptainik eng’ taing’wong’. Oboisie eng’ nyiganatet, ak kotebi Jehovah koboto inendet ne yaei ne mie." 
2Chronicles20:1 Ak kingobata nito, kobok lagokab Moab, ak lagokab Amon, ak kimi koboto ichek Amonik alak kobwa kobargei ak Jeosapat." 
2Chronicles20:2 Ak kibwa bik alak komwachi Jeosapat, kolenji, Ibokyinin tuiyet ne o ne bunu nyanjet bitonin eng’ Suria; ak ogeero, mi Hasason-tamar (noto ko Engedi)." 
2Chronicles20:3 Koiywei Jeosapat, ak kogiilgei kocheng’ Jehovah; ak komwaita karugutetab ge eng’ Juda tugul." 
2Chronicles20:4 Ak kiiyumgei Juda tugul kocheng’ toretet eng’ Jehovah: kibwa eng’ nganasok tugul che bo Juda kocheng’ Jehovah. 
2Chronicles20:5 Ak kitonon Jeosapat eng’ tuiyetab Juda ak ne bo Israel, eng’ gotab Jehovah, eng’ taitab seremut ne leel;" 
2Chronicles20:6 ak kile, Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyok, tos ma i Kamuktaindet eng’ kipsengwet? Ak tos ma i bounindet ne bou bounatosiek tugul che bo bororiosiek? Ak mi eung’ung’ kimnatet ak kamuktaet, ne mami ne imuchi kogirinden." 
2Chronicles20:7 Tos ma ion inye, ee Kamuktaindennyo, bik che kimenyei emoni eng’ taitab biguk Israel, ak igochi kobunji iyotetab Abraham chorueng’ung’ koigeny?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Ak kimeny olito, ak kigoteegun ole tilil agobo kaineng’ung’, kolen," 
2Chronicles20:9 Ngot konyonjech yaitiet, rotwetab chok, kiruoget, anan koroito, anan rubet, ketononie eng’ taitab goi, ak eng’ taing’ung’, (amu mi kaineng’ung’ goi,) ak kerirjin eng’ nyalilwogikyok, ak igasech ak isoruech." 
2Chronicles20:10 Keer nguno anyun-o, lagokab Amon, ak Moab, ak che bo tulwetab Seir, che kima ichamji Israel kobokyi, kingobwanei komong’u eng’ emetab Misri, ago kirob taban, ama bar;" 
2Chronicles20:11 keer anyun-o, ole kagogeerundawech, kobwa komaandech eng’ boroteng’ung’, ne kiigonech kobunjech." 
2Chronicles20:12 Ee Kamuktaindennyo, meruokyini? Amu magitinye kamuget kebarge ak tuiyoni o kagobokyech; ama kingen kit ne kiyaei: ago inyalin konyekyok." 
2Chronicles20:13 Ak kitononso Juda tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah, koboto manyurunikwak ak osotikwak ak lagokwak." 
2Chronicles20:14 Kinyonji anyun Tamirmirietab Jehovah Jaasiel weritab Sekaria, weritab Benaia, weritab Jeiel, weritab Matania, Lawindet, ne bo werikab Asap, eng’ kwenutab tuiyet;" 
2Chronicles20:15 ak kile, Oeb it okwek tugul gab Juda, ak che omenye Jerusalem, koboten inye laitoriat Jeosapat: kamwawok Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Amoiywei, anan oarogense amu lugoni o; amu ma neng’wong’ luget, bo Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles20:16 Orekte mutai obarge ak ichek: ogeero, togosu ichek eng’ tegeiyetab Sis; ak onyorjini ye igesunegei atebwet, taitab ong’atetab Jeruel." 
2Chronicles20:17 Ma okwek che oyae lugoni: otetge, otononse, si ogeer yetunetab Jehovah ne mi kobotok, ee Juda ak Jerusalem: amoiyweisie, anan oarogense: oba obokyi mutai; amu mi Jehovah kobotok." 
2Chronicles20:18 Ak kiing’uruk Jeosapat kot kotiiny toget ng’ony: ak kiibutyi taitab Jehovah gab Juda tugul ak bikab Jerusalem ak kolos Jehovah. 
2Chronicles20:19 Ak kitononso Lawik ak che bo lagokab Kohatik, ak che bo lagokab Koraik, kolos Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, eng’ kutit ne o mising’." 
2Chronicles20:20 Ak king’eetyo karon mising’, komusta ong’atetab Tekoa; ak ye kingota kobendi, kotonon Jeosapat ak kole, Ogasa, ee Juda, ak che omenye Jerusalem; oyan Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, si kobiit ogimegitu; oyan maotikyik, si obor." 
2Chronicles20:21 Ak kingo kagong’alal ak bik, kolewen che tienjin Jehovah, ak kolosu kororonindab tililindo, komandoi kondoe luget, kolen, Oweekyi Jehovah kongoi; amu bo koigeny rirenennyi." 
2Chronicles20:22 Ak kingotoi kotienso ak kolosu, konde Jehovah bik che ribistos si kobargei ak lagokab Amon, ak Moab, ak tulwetab Seir, che kigobwanji Juda; ak kigibar." 
2Chronicles20:23 Amu kitononso lagokab Amon ak Moab kobargei ak che kimenyei tulwetab Seir, kobar koges ak kong’em: ak ye kingo kagoges che kimenyei Seir, kotoret chi tugul kobar chito ne kami tuwai." 
2Chronicles20:24 Ak kingoit Judaik teekset ne koi ne kiripse, eng’ ong’atet, kotoben bik che chang’; ak ogeero, kiga kobutyo koek muswek, ak kima komi agot agenge ne kichilil." 
2Chronicles20:25 Ak kingonyo Jeosapat koboto bikyik konam tuguk, konyor eng’ kwenunywa tuguk ng’isiat che bo magornatet ak ngoroik, ak tuguk che bo kamanutik che eechen, che kibut eng’ bichoto koipchigei, che kitemene kola: kitar betutab somok koibei barunenichoto, ki chang’ kot." 
2Chronicles20:26 Ak kiiyumjigei atebwetab Beraka eng’ betutab ang’wan; amu kiilos Jehovah eng’ oloto: kigiguure anyun kainetab yoto Atebwetab Beraka, agoi ra." 
2Chronicles20:27 Koweek chi tugul ne bo Juda ak Jerusalem, kondoe Jeosapat, kobendi Jerusalem eng’ boiboiyet; am kiigochi Jehovah ichek koboiboitu amu bunikwak." 
2Chronicles20:28 Ak kibwa Jerusalem kobutonu kibugandinik ak ketubosiek, ak koguutonu iriagok kot koit gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles20:29 Ak kinam bounatosiek tugul che bo emotinwek, kaiyweisiet ne iywei Kamuktaindet, ye kingogas kole kibar Jehovah bunikab Israel." 
2Chronicles20:30 Kiimuuny anyun bounatetab Jeosapat: amu kiigochi Kamuktaindennyi kamuung’et eng’ tabanwek tugul. 
2Chronicles20:31 Kilaitoran Jeosapat eng’ Juda; ki bo kenyisiek sosom ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak mut eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Asuba cheptab Sili. 
2Chronicles20:32 Ak kiwendote ortinwekab kwandanyi Asa, ma masta kometo, kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles20:33 Ago ma kiisto komoswek che tororen; ago kitomo kogiil bik mugulelwekwak kotokyi Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak. 
2Chronicles20:34 Ak boisionikab Jeosapat che ng’etunotin, che bo tai ak che bo let, ogeero, kigisirji ng’alekab Jeu weritab Hanani, che kigimwa eng’ bukuitab laitorinikab Israel." 
2Chronicles20:35 Ak kingobata nito konamgei Jeosapat laitoriatab Juda ak Aasia laitoriatab Israel; kiyai Aasia ne ya mising’: 
2Chronicles20:36 ak kinamgei ak inendet si kobiit koteech melisiek koba Tarsis: ak kiteech melisiechoto eng’ Esion-geber. 
2Chronicles20:37 Kimaoten Elieser weritab Dodabahu ne bo Maresa agobo Jeosapat, kole, Amu koonamge ak Aasia, ko kagong’em Jehovah boisioniguk. Kobutok anyun melisiek, ne mata komuch koba Tarsis." 
2Chronicles21:1 Ak kiru Jeosapat ak kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi ole kigitupchi kwanisiekyik eng’ nganasetab Daudi: ak kilaitoran Jeoram werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Chronicles21:2 Kitinyei inendet werik che tupcho, werikab Jeosapat, Asaria, Jehiel, Sekaria, Asaria, Mikael, ak Sepatia: chuto tugul ko ki werikab Jeosapat laitoriatab Israel." 
2Chronicles21:3 Ak kiigochi kwandanywa kagochinoik che eechen, che bo feda, ak che bo tahabu, ak che bo tuguk che bo kamanutiet ne o, ak kogochi nganasok che ng’ototin che bo Juda: ago kiigochi laitornatet Jeoram, amu ki taita." 
2Chronicles21:4 Ak kingong’eet Jeoram konam bounatetab kwandanyi, ak kogimitgei, kobar tupchosiekyik tugul eng’ rotwetab chok, ak alak che bo bounikab Israel." 
2Chronicles21:5 Ki bo Jeoram kenyisiek sosom ak aeng’ ye kitau kolaitorani; kilaitoran kenyisiek sisiit eng’ Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles21:6 Ak kiwendote ortinwekab laitorinikab Israel, ko u ye kiyai gotab Ahab: amu kiitun cheptab Ahab: ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles21:7 Agot nganda ki u noto ko ma cham Jehovah kong’em gotab Daudi, amu kayomiset ne kiga koyomisyi Daudi, ak ko u ye kiiarorji inendet ak lagokyik kole igochin inendet tait kotugul." 
2Chronicles21:8 Kiingelelji Edomik bounatetab Juda eng’ betusiekyik, ak konamjigei laitoriat ne bou ichek." 
2Chronicles21:9 Kiwa anyun Jeoram kolanda koboto kiptainikyik kotinyei karisiekyik tugul, ak king’eet kemoi ak kobar Edomik, che kigayiem inendet, koboto kiptainikab karisiek." 
2Chronicles21:10 Kiingelel anyun Edomik kobagakta bounatetab Juda, agoi rani: kiingelel agine Libna eng’ betusiechoto: amu kiga kometo Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyik." 
2Chronicles21:11 Ak kiteech kogeny komoswek che tororen eng’ tulonokab Juda, ak koyai che kimenyei Jerusalem koibotgei, ak kobeet Juda." 
2Chronicles21:12 Kinyonji inendet baruet ne kibunu maotiot Elija, kolenji, Kamwa ko u ni Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Daudi kwandang’ung’, kole, Amu ma iwendote ortinwekab Jeosapat kwandang’ung’, anan ortinwekab Asa laitoriatab Juda;" 
2Chronicles21:13 ago kiiwendote ortinwekab laitorinikab Israel, ak kiigochi Juda ak che menyei Jerusalem koyai ibetab ge, ko u ye kiyai gotab Ahab; ak kiibar kogeny tupchosieguk che bo gotab kwandang’ung’, che ki koigoi kosiirin:" 
2Chronicles21:14 keero, barei Jehovah biguk, ak lagoguk, ak osotiguk, ak tuguguk tugul, eng’ koroito ne o:" 
2Chronicles21:15 ak inyoru miando ne o, koroito eng’ agutaniguk, agoi komong’ agutaniguk eng’ mianato, eng’ betut age tugul." 
2Chronicles21:16 Ak kiing’eet Jehovah nereknatetab Pilistik ak ne bo Marabuk che menyei ole negite Etiopik, kobargei ak Jeoram:" 
2Chronicles21:17 ak kitogos kobokyi Juda, ak kobut koba orit, ak koib tuguk tugul che kinyor eng’ gotab laitoriat, ak koluul werikyik agichek, ak osotikyik; kot ko ma ng’etyi werit agot agenge, kobate Jeoahas, werit ne ming’in eng’ tugul." 
2Chronicles21:18 Ak kingobata chuto tugul, kobir Jehovah inendet eng’ miando eng’ agutanikyik, ne ma inyaoksei." 
2Chronicles21:19 Ak kingobata kenyisiek aeng’u komong’ agutanikyik amu miandanyi, ak kime eng’ mianwek che ng’wonen, ama beelji bikyik kiy inendet, ko u ye kigibeelji kwanisiekyik." 
2Chronicles21:20 Ki bo kenyisiek sosom ak aeng’ ye kitau kolaitorani, ak kilaitoran eng’ Jerusalem kenyisiek sisiit: ak kime, ko ma komachei chi inendet; ak kigitupchi nganasetab Daudi, ago ma eng’ kererisiekab laitorinik." 
2Chronicles22:1 Ak kiinde bik che kimenyei Jerusalem Aasia werinnyi ne ming’in koek laitoriat kogeer inendet: amu kibar kweanet ne kigabwa nganaset koboto Marabuk, werik tugul che eechen. Kolaitoran anyun Aasia weritab Jeoram laitoriatab Juda." 
2Chronicles22:2 Ki bo kenyisiek artam ak aeng’ Aasia ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyit agenge eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Atalia cheptab Omri. 
2Chronicles22:3 Kiwendote agine ortinwekab gotab Ahab: amu kiek kamennyi konetindennyi ne kiinet inendet koyai ne ya. 
2Chronicles22:4 Ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u ye kiyai gotab Ahab: amu ki konetikyik che kiineti inendet, agoi ng’emisiennyi, kingo kagome kwandanyi." 
2Chronicles22:5 Kiisub konetisienywa, ak koba ak Jeoram weritab Ahab laitoriatab Israel, kobargei ak Hasael laitoriatab Suria eng’ Ramot-gilead: ak kiiguoten Suriek Joram." 
2Chronicles22:6 Kiweek konyo kinya eng’ Jesreel, ng’otobosiek che kigitoor eng’ Rama, ye kibaregei ak Hasael laitoriatab Suria. Ak kichortagei Asaria weritab Jeoram laitoriatab Juda kwo kogeer Jeoram weritab Ahab eng’ Jesreel, amu kimiani." 
2Chronicles22:7 Kibunu Kamuktaindet ng’emisietab Aasia, amu kiwa ole mi Joram: amu kingoit, koba ak Jeoram kobargei ak Jeu weritab Nimsi, ne kiga koiil Jehovah si kobiit kobar gotab Ahab koges." 
2Chronicles22:8 Ak ye kita koruokyin Jeu gotab Ahab, konyor bounikab Juda, ak werikab tupchosiekab Aasia, che kiboisiechin Aasia, ak kibar ichek." 
2Chronicles22:9 Ak kicheng’ Aasia, ak kinam inendet, (kiga ung’egei Samaria,) ak kigimutyi Jeu, ak kibar inendet, ak kitub, amu kile inendet ko weritab Jeosapat, ne kicheng’ Jehovah eng’ muguleldanyi tugul. Ak ma sich gotab Aasia kimnatet konam bounatet." 
2Chronicles22:10 Ak kingogeer Atalia kametab Aasia kole kigome werinnyi, kong’eet ak kobar iyotet tugul ne bo kaplaitoriat ne bo gotab Juda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Ago kiimut Jeosabeat, cheptab laitoriat, Joas weritab Aasia, kochor inendet komut eng’ ole mi werikab laitoriat, chu kigibarei, ak konde inendet ak cheblakwet got ne kiruei eng’ got orit. Kouny anyun inendet Jeosabeat cheptab laitoriat Jeoram, osotiotab Jeoiada tisiindet, (amu ki chepkametab Aasia,) si mabar Atalia." 
2Chronicles22:12 Ak kitebi koboto ichek ko ung’at eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet kenyisiek lo: ak kilaitorani Atalia eng’ emet. 
2Chronicles23:1 Ak kiigimitgei Jeoiada eng’ kenyitab tisab, ak kinam kiptainikab bogolwogik, Asaria weritab Jeroam, ak Ismael weritab Jeohanan, ak Asaria weritab Obed, ak Maaseia weritab Adaia, ak Elisapat weritab Sikri, ak koyomisgei koboto ichek." 
2Chronicles23:2 Ak kibendate Juda, ak koyum Lawik eng’ nganasok tugul che bo Juda, ak kandoikab kwanisiekab Israel, ak kibwa Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles23:3 Ak kiiyomisgei ak laitoriat tuiyet komugul eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet. Ak kilenji, Ingolaitoran weritab laitoriat, ko u ye kimwa Jehovah agobo werikab Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:4 Ni kit ne oyae: egu ribikab kurgotik kebeberta agenge eng’ somok eng’ okwek, che bwanei eng’ betutab sabato, che bo tisiik ak Lawik;" 
2Chronicles23:5 kotebe kebeberta agenge eng’ somok gotab laitoriat; kotebe kebeberta agenge eng’ somok kurgetab lumeiywot: ak ingotebe bik tugul seremusiekab gotab Jehovah. 
2Chronicles23:6 Ago amochamji chi konyo gotab Jehovah, kobate tisiik, ak Lawik che otisiei; bwanei icheget amu tililen: ago ribei bik tugul ripsetab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles23:7 Si koyiem Lawik laitoriat, kotinyei chi tugul karikyik eng’ eunnyi ak chi age tugul ne nyonei go, kebarei: ak otebi ak laitoriat ye nyonei go ak ye mandoi." 
2Chronicles23:8 Koyai anyun Lawik ak Juda tugul kit ne kang’at ichek Jeoiada tisiindet: komut chi tugul bikyik, bik che bwanei eng’ sabato, ak che kimandoi eng’ sabato; amu ma bagakta Jeoiada tisiindet ripsosiechoto." 
2Chronicles23:9 Ak kiigochi Jeoiada tisiindet kiptainikab bogolwogik ng’otwek, ak long’onik che mengechen, ak long’onik che eechen, che ki bo laitoriat Daudi, che kimi gotab Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles23:10 Ak kitet bik tugul, kotinyei chi tugul karikyik eng’ eunekyik, koboch komostab tai ne bo got agoi komostab katam ne bo goyoto, ye negite kaptisisiet, ak got, koyiem laitoriat." 
2Chronicles23:11 Komong’ anyun weritab laitoriat, ak kolaakyi nariet, ak kogochi baornatet, ak konde inendet koek laitoriat: ak kiil Jeoiada ak werikyik, inendet; ak kole, Ingosob laitoriat." 
2Chronicles23:12 Ak kingogas Atalia bolatetab bik che ruaoti ak kolosu laitoriat, konyo ole mi bik eng’ gotab Jehovah:" 
2Chronicles23:13 Ak kigeerot, ogeero, kitononi laitoriat eng’ ole negite toloitanyi eng’ ye kibunei kebendi orit, komi kiptainik ak iriagok ye mi laitoriat; ak kiboiboitu bik tugul che bo emet, ak koguutei iriagok; kibutei agichek tienik kibugandinik, ak kondochin tiendab kalosunet. Kogerer anyun Atalia ngoroikyik, ak kole, Chaamset, chaamset." 
2Chronicles23:14 Komut anyun Jeoiada tisiindet kiptainikab bogolwogik, kobwa sang’, che kiga kinde koboi luget, kolenji, Omande inendet eng’ kwenutab bik: ak kibarei eng’ rotwetab chok chito ne isubi inendet: amu kile tisiindet, Amobarji gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles23:15 Koistochigei anyun ichek inendet; ak kiwa ye kichutei ormarichetab mbartanyit ne bo gotab laitoriat; ak kibarji yoto. 
2Chronicles23:16 Koyomisgei anyun Jeoiada ak bik tugul, ak laitoriat, kole koek bikab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles23:17 Ak kiba bik tugul gotab Baal, kobut, ak kobut kapkorosusiekyik, ak kotuatui kanamonikyik, ak kobar Matan tisiindetab Baal eng’ taitab kapkorosusiek." 
2Chronicles23:18 Ak king’at Jeoiada boisionikab gotab Jehovah koboi tisiik, Lawik, che kiga kopchei Daudi eng’ gotab Jehovah, si kogoitoi kagochinoik che kibeelei che bo Jehovah, ko u ye kigisir eng’ Ng’atutikab Musa, si koboiboitu ak kotiendos, ko u ng’atutietab Daudi." 
2Chronicles23:19 Ak kiinde ribik kurgotikab gotab Jehovah, si mawa go chi age tugul ne ma tilil eng’ kiy age tugul." 
2Chronicles23:20 Ak kinam kiptainikab bogolwogik, ak bik che toogunotin, ak bounikab bik, koboto bik tugul che bo emet, si komut laitoriat kochorgei eng’ gotab Jehovah: ak kibun ormarichet ne toror kot koit gotab laitoriat, ak konde laitoriat kotebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo bounatet." 
2Chronicles23:21 Koboiboitu anyun bik tugul che bo emet, ak kisis nganaset: ak kibar Atalia eng’ rotwetab chok." 
2Chronicles24:1 Ki bo Joas kenyisiek tisab ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek artam eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamet Sibia, ne bo Beer-seba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Ak kiyai Joas ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Jeoiada tisiindet. 
2Chronicles24:3 Ak kiitunji Jeoiada inendet osotik aeng’; ak kisich werik ak tibik. 
2Chronicles24:4 Ak kingobata choto komach Joas koteech gotab Jehovah ole kiga kobutok. 
2Chronicles24:5 Kiiyum tisiik ak Lawik, ak kolenji, Oba nganasokab Juda, oyumate Israel tugul fedaisiek che kiteege kogeny gotab Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ kenyit age tugul, ak ochaktae ng’olyondonito. Ago ma chaktae Lawik." 
2Chronicles24:6 Koguur anyun laitoriat Jeoiada, ne o eng’ ichek, ak kolenji, Amu nee si memwachi Lawik koyumat eng’ Juda ak Jerusalem aisurut ne king’at Musa otwogindetab Jehovah, ak tuiyetab Israel, agobo emaitab baornatet?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Amu kigobut gotab Kamuktaindet werikab Atalia, kwonyoto sogoran: ak kigogochi Baalik tuguk tugul che kiga kitabanji gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles24:8 Kong’at anyun laitoriat, ak kiyai moinget, ak konde kurget sang’ ne bo gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles24:9 Ak kimwaita eng’ Juda ak Jerusalem, keipchi Jehovah aisurut ne king’at Musa otwogindetab Kamuktaindet eng’ ong’atet agobo Israel." 
2Chronicles24:10 Ak kiboiboitu bounik tugul koboto bik, ak kiib aisurunoto konde moinget, agoi kowong’." 
2Chronicles24:11 Ak kingo kagoib Lawik moinget konyo gotab laitoriat, ko ngo keer kole chang’ fedaisiek eng’ orit, konyo sirindetab laitoriat, ak kiboitiotab tisiindet ne o, ak koib fedaisiek eng’ moinget, ak korong’ fedaisiek eng’ moinget, ak koib, koweekta moinget kwo ye kami. Kiyai ko u noto betut age tugul, ak kiiyum fedaisiek che chang’." 
2Chronicles24:12 Ak kiigochi laitoriat ak Jeoiada bik che kiyai boisietab gotab Jehovah fedaisiechoto; ak kisir bik che bo melekto, musogikab koik ak che bo baoinik, si koteech kogeny gotab Jehovah, ole kiga kobutok, ak kiigochi kogeny kitang’ikab karik ak che bo sugunonik, si kogetyi kogeny gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles24:13 Kobois anyun kiboitinik, ak kiyai boisionoto kosulda, ak kilumda gotab Kamuktaindet ko u ye ki u, ak kogimit." 
2Chronicles24:14 Ak kingo kagoges, koipchi laitoriat ak Jeoiada fedaisiek che kiga ng’et; che kiga kiyae tuguk che bo gotab Jehovah, che choto ko ki tuguk che kigiotisie, ak che kigigoitoisie, ak kechigosiek, ak tuguk che bo tahabu ak che bo feda. Ak kiigoitoi kotugul kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ gotab Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Jeoiada." 
2Chronicles24:15 Ak kiosit Jeoiada, kiga kochang’a betusiekyik, ak kiilil; kiga kotar kenyisiek bogol ak sosom ye kingomeei." 
2Chronicles24:16 Ak kigitupchi inendet nganasetab Daudi koboto laitorinik, amu kiyai ne mie eng’ Israel, ak eng’ Kamuktaindet ak gonnyi." 
2Chronicles24:17 Kingo kagome Jeoiada kobwa bounikab Juda, ak kogetung’ji laitoriat. Kogasyi anyun laitoriat ng’alekwak." 
2Chronicles24:18 Kometo anyun gotab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, ak koot Aserik ak kanamonik: ak kinyonji neregek Juda ak Jerusalem agobo ng’ogiswechuchuak." 
2Chronicles24:19 Agos kiiyokyi ichek maotik, komut ichek koweekyi Jehovah; ak kibaorian kogirinda ichek: ago ma cham kogas." 
2Chronicles24:20 Kinyonji Tamirmirietab Jehovah Sekaria weritab Jeoiada tisiindet; ak kitonon eng’ ole toror, ak kolenji bik, Kale Kamuktaindet, Amu nee si obistoe ng’atutikab Jehovah, si mobor? Amu kiomete Jehovah, kagometok ak okwek." 
2Chronicles24:21 Ak kichaam inendet, ak kolage koik eng’ ng’atutietab laitoriat eng’ seremutab gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles24:22 Noto anyun, ma ibwat laitoriat Joas mieindo ne kiga koyachi Jeoiada kwandanyi, ago kibar werinnyi. Ak kingomeei, komwa kole, Ingogeer Jehovah kioto, ak koyaakta." 
2Chronicles24:23 Ak kingogesgei kenyit, kotogos lugetab Suriek kobokyi inendet: ak kiit J uda ak Jerusalem, ak kibar bounik tugul che bo bik, che kimi ak bichoto, ak koyokyi barunenik laitoriatab Damasko." 
2Chronicles24:24 Amu kinyo lugetab Suriek komut kweanet ne ming’in; ak kiinde Jehovah eunekwak luget ne o mising’, amu kiga kometo Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak. Kiiruokyi anyun Joas." 
2Chronicles24:25 Ak kingoba eng’ ole mi inendet, (amu kibagach inendet kotinyei mianwek che chang’,) kochaam inendet otwogikyik amu korotikab werikab Jeoiada tisiindet, ak kibarji itogunnyi: ak kotupchi inendet nganasetab Daudi, ago ma tupchi inendet kererisiekab laitorinik." 
2Chronicles24:26 Ak chu ko ichek che kichaam inendet: Sabad weritab Simeat Jebamonindet, ak Jeosabad weritab Simirit Jemoabindet." 
2Chronicles24:27 Ogeero, kigisir agobo werikyik, ak oindab milosiek che kigigesenji inendet, ak teeksetab gotab Kamuktaindet, eng’ ng’alekab bukuitab laitorinik. Ak kilaitoran Amasia werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Chronicles25:1 Ki bo Amasia kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak sogol eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Jeoadan ne bo Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles25:2 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ago ma eng’ muguleldo ne igesunotgei." 
2Chronicles25:3 Ak kingo kagogimit laitornatennyi, kobar otwogikyik che kibar laitoriat kwandanyi." 
2Chronicles25:4 Ago ma bar lagokwak, kiyai ko u ye kigisir eng’ Ng’atutik che mi bukuitab Musa, ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah, kole, Mabegu kwanisiek agobo lagok, anan kobek lagok agobo kwanisiekwak; ago meei chi tugul agobo tengektanyi." 
2Chronicles25:5 Kogeny, ko kiiyum Amasia bikab Juda, ak kotet ichek kobee gorikab kwanisiekwak, kondochin kiptainikab elfusiek ak kiptainikab bogolwogik Juda tugul ak Benjamin: ak kiit ichek koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak che siirei, ak kiek bik elfusiek bogol somok che kigilewen, che imuchi koba luget, che kiimuchi konam ng’otwek ak long’onik." 
2Chronicles25:6 Kisir kogeny bik elfusiek bogol che kimen ak ko nyigonen eng’ Israel eng’ talentaisiek bogol che bo feda. 
2Chronicles25:7 Ago kinyo chitab Kamuktaindet ole mi, ak kolenji, Ee laitoriat, amobe koboto lugetab Israel; amu mami Jehovah koboto Israel, choto ko lagok tugul che bo Epraim." 
2Chronicles25:8 Ago ngot imache iwe, iwe, inyiganitu, igimitu eng’ luget: wirtoin Kamuktaindet eng’ taitab bunyot; amu tinyei Kamuktaindet kimnatet kotoret, ak kotinyei kimnatet kowirta." 
2Chronicles25:9 Ak kilenji Amasia chitab Kamuktaindet, Ara si kelyonji talentaisiek bogol che kiagochi lugetab Israel? Kowol anyun chitab Kamuktaindet kole, Imuchi Jehovah kogonin che siirei chuto mising’." 
2Chronicles25:10 Koweekta anyun Amasia ichek, noto ko luget ne kiga nyo oldanyi, ne kibunu Epraim, koweek koba ga: kolalyo anyun neregekwak kot agobo Juda, ak kiweek koba ga eng’ neregek che ng’wonen." 
2Chronicles25:11 Konyiganit anyun Amasia, ak kondochi bikyik, kwo Atebwetab Munyuk, ak kobar che bo lagokab Seir elfusiek taman." 
2Chronicles25:12 Ak kiluul lagokab Juda bik alak elfusiek taman, ak komut kobwa baragutab ruandet, ak kotoorta eng’ ruandanoto barak, ak kitonogis tugul." 
2Chronicles25:13 Ago kibar bikab luget che kiweektoi Amasia kole amaba tugul luget, nganasokab Juda koboch Samaria kot koit Bet-horon, kibar bik elfusiek somok, ak koib barunenik che chang’." 
2Chronicles25:14 Ak kingobunu Amasia baretab Edomik, koib kanamonikab lagokab Seir, ak kolumda koek kanamonikyik, ak kong’urukyi ichek eng’ tainywa, ak kobeelji nyamdutik." 
2Chronicles25:15 Kolalyo anyun neregekab Jehovah agobo Amasia, ak koyokyi maotiot ne kimwachi inendet kolenji, Amu nee si icheng’ kanamonikab bik, che tom kosor bikwak eng’ eung’ung’?" 
2Chronicles25:16 Ak ye kita kong’alaldos ak inendet, kolenji laitoriat, Tos kogindein iegu kiruogindetab laitoriat? Muite; amu nee si imache kebarin? Kimuita anyun maotiot, ak kile, Angen ale, kagotil Kamuktaindet kole kong’emin, amu kaiyai ni, ama igas ng’alekyuk." 
2Chronicles25:17 Koruoch anyun Amasia laitoriatab Juda, ak kiiyokto bik koba oldab Joas weritab Jeoahas weritab Jeu laitoriatab Israel, kolenji, Nyo ketuiye kegeerge togoch." 
2Chronicles25:18 Ak kiiyokyi Joas laitoriatab Israel bik Amasia laitoriatab Juda, kolenji, Kiiyokto ng’olyot katableliat ne kimi Lebanon koyokyi tarakwet ne kimi Lebanon, kolenji, Igochi cheptang’ung’ werinnyu kotun: ak kisiirto tiondo ne bo timin ne kimi Lebanon, ak kotiech katableliandanato." 
2Chronicles25:19 Imwae ile, Keero, kiibar Edom; ak itororin muguleldang’ung’ si ilosuge: tebe gong’ung’; amu nee si icheng’jige nyalilda, si ibut inye, koboto Juda?" 
2Chronicles25:20 Ago ma cham Amasia kogas; amu kibunu Kamuktaindet kioto, si kobiit konde ichek eunekab bunikwak, amu kicheng’ kanamonikab Edom." 
2Chronicles25:21 Kitogosta anyun Joas laitoriatab Israel; ak kigeergei inendet ak Amasia laitoriatab Juda togoch eng’ Bet-semes, ne bo Juda." 
2Chronicles25:22 Ak kigiterter Juda eng’ taitab Israel; ak kimwei chi tugul kwo emainnyi. 
2Chronicles25:23 Ak kiimut Joas laitoriatab Israel Amasia laitoriatab Juda weritab Joas weritab Jeoahas, eng’ Bet-semes, ak komut inendet konyo Jerusalem, ak kobut irimet ne bo Jerusalem koboch ormarichetab Epraim agoi ormarichetab luita, kakwautik bogol ang’wan che bo eut." 
2Chronicles25:24 Ak kiib tahabu tugul ak feda, ak tuguk tugul che kimi gotab Kamuktaindet koboto Obed-edom, ak konoraik che bo gotab laitoriat, koboto luulenik agichek, ak kiweek kwo Samaria." 
2Chronicles25:25 Ak kita kosob Amasia weritab Joas laitoriatab Juda kenyisiek taman ak mut kingobata meetab Joas weritab Jeoahas laitoriatab Israel. 
2Chronicles25:26 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Amasia, che bo tai ak che bo let, ogeero, tos ma sirotin eng’ bukuitab laitorinikab Juda ak Israel?" 
2Chronicles25:27 Kichaam bik Amasia eng’ Jerusalem, koboch ngab komasta kobagakta Jehovah; ak kimwei kwo Lakis: ago kiiyokto bik kosub inendet koba Lakis, ak kobar inendet eng’ oloto." 
2Chronicles25:28 Ak kilaune inendet mbartanyisiek, ak kotupchi nganasetab Juda koboto kwanisiekyik." 
2Chronicles26:1 Yeityo konam bik tugul che bo Juda Usia, ne ki bo kenyisiek taman ak lo, ak koeet inendet koek laitoriat kogeer kwandanyi Amasia." 
2Chronicles26:2 Kiteech Elot, ak koweekyi Juda, ko kagoru laitoriat koboto kwanisiekyik." 
2Chronicles26:3 Ki bo Usia kenyisiek taman ak lo ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek konom ak aeng’ eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamet Jekilia ne bo Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles26:4 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u tugul che kiyai kwandanyi Amasia." 
2Chronicles26:5 Ak kiigiil muguleldanyi kocheng’ Kamuktaindet eng’ betusiekab Sekaria, ne kitinyei kaguiyet agobo ng’ang’utietab Kamuktaindet: ak eng’ betusiek tugul che kicheng’ Jehovah, ko kiiberur Kamuktaindet inendet." 
2Chronicles26:6 Ak kiwa kobargei ak Pilistik, ak kobut irimetab Gat, ak irimetab Jabne, ak irimetab Asdod; ak kiteech nganasok eng’ Asdod, ak eng’ kwenutab Pilistik." 
2Chronicles26:7 Ak kitoret Kamuktaindet inendet kobargei ak Pilistik, ak kobargei ak Marabuk che kimenyei Gur-baal, koboto Meunik." 
2Chronicles26:8 Ak kiigochi Amonik Usia kagochinoik: ak kiyom kainennyi agoi ole kibunei kebendi Misri; amu kitesak kimnatennyi kot. 
2Chronicles26:9 Kogeny, ko kiteech Usia teeksosiek che koen eng’ Jerusalem eng’ ormarichetab luita, ak eng’ ormarichetab atebwet, ak eng’ ole weegegei irimet, ak kogimit." 
2Chronicles26:10 Ak kiteech teeksosiek che koen eng’ ong’atet, ak kibal keringonik che chang’ che bo beek, amu kitinyei tuga che chang’; eng’ emet ne soi agine, ak eng’ warenget: kitinyei kabatik ak che ribei logoekab sabibuk, eng’ tulonok ak eng’ mbarenik che rurtos mising’; amu kichamei kabatisiet." 
2Chronicles26:11 Kitinyei kogeny Usia luget ne bo bikab boriet, che kigaba baretab ge eng’ kweanaik, ko u koitenywa ne kiiti Jeiel sirindet ak Maaseia bounindet, kondochin Hanania, ne ki agenge eng’ kiptainikab laitoriat." 
2Chronicles26:12 Koitet komugul ne bo kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek, bik che kimen ak ko nyigonen, ko ki elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol lo." 
2Chronicles26:13 Ak kimi eunekwak askarik che inetotin, elfusiek bogol somok ak tisab ak bogol mut, che kiyai luget eng’ kimnatet ne o, si kotoret laitoriat kobargei ak bunik." 
2Chronicles26:14 Ak kichopchi Usia luget tugul, long’onik, ng’otwek, kutonok, karikab teget, kwangok, ak koik che kiwirtoe borowet." 
2Chronicles26:15 Ak kiyai injinisiek eng’ Jerusalem, che kitoi koyai bik che ng’omen, kotebe teeksosiek che koen ak irimoik, che kimwoktoe kipchabonik, ak kiwirtoe koik che eechen. Ak kiyom ole loo kainennyi; amu kigitoret mising’, kot kogimit." 
2Chronicles26:16 Ago ye kingo kagogimit, kolosgei eng’ muguleldanyi kot koyai ne ya, ak kiingelelji Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi; amu kiwa hekalutab Jehovah kobeel nyamdutik eng’ kapkorosutab nyamdutik." 
2Chronicles26:17 Ak kiwa go Asaria tisiindet kosub inendet, koboto tisiik tamanwogik sisiit che bo Jehovah, che ki murenik che nyigonen:" 
2Chronicles26:18 Ak kigirinda Usia laitoriat, kolenji, Manyoljin, Usia, ibeelji Jehovah nyamdutik, ago nyoljin tisiik werikab Aron, che kigitaban kobeel nyamdutik: mande eng’ ole tilil; amu kengelel; maegu teegisto nito eng’ inye ne bunu Jehovah Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles26:19 Konerech anyun Usia; ak kitinyei teret eng’ eunnyi ne kibeele nyamdutik; ak ye kinerekyin tisiik, komong’une mogondosik togennyi eng’ taitab tisiik eng’ gotab Jehovah, eng’ ye negite kapkorosutab nyamdutik." 
2Chronicles26:20 Ak kigeer Asaria tisiindet ne o, ak tisiik tugul, ak ogeero, kagomong’une mogondosik togennyi, ak kion inendet eng’ yoto kochokyi; ee, kichakta agine komanda, amu kiga kobir Jehovah inendet." 
2Chronicles26:21 Ak kiam mogondosik Usia laitoriat agoi betutab meenyi, ak kimeny got ne itabanat, amu kitinyei mogondosik; amu kigiistoe inendet gotab Jehovah: ak kibou Jotam werinnyi bikab gotab laitoriat, koruokyin bikab emet." 
2Chronicles26:22 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Usia, che bo tai ak che bo let, ko kisir maotiot Isaia, weritab Amos." 
2Chronicles26:22 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Usia, che bo tai ak che bo let, ko kisir maotiot Isaia, weritab Amos." 
2Chronicles26:23 Koru anyun Usia ak kwanisiekyik; ak kigitub inendet ak kwanisiekyik, eng’ koretab kererisiekab laitorinik; amu kile, Tinyei mogondosik: ak kilaitoran Jotam kogeer inendet." 
2Chronicles27:1 Ki bo Jotam kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak lo eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamennyi Jerusa cheptab Sadak. 
2Chronicles27:2 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u tugul che kiga yai kwandanyi Usia: ago kimawa hekalutab Jehovah. Ak kita koyaei bik yaitwogik kora." 
2Chronicles27:3 Kiteech kurget ne bo meto eng’ gortab Jehovah, ak kiteekso mising’ eng’ inatutab Opel." 
2Chronicles27:4 Ak kiteech kogeny nganasok eng’ emetab tulonok che bo Juda, ak kiteech irimoik ak teeksosiek che koen eng’ osnosiek." 
2Chronicles27:5 Kibargei kogeny ak laitoriatab lagokab Amon, ak koterter ichek. Ak kiigochi lagokab Amon inendet eng’ kenyinoto talentaisiek bogol che bo feda, ak kerutik elfusiek taman che bo nganok, ak kerutik elfusiek taman che bo sairik. Kiigochi ko u noto lagokab Amon inendet, eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ kogeny, ak ne bo somok." 
2Chronicles27:6 Kigimit anyun Jotam, amu kichob ortinwekyik eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi." 
2Chronicles27:7 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jotam, ak lugosiekyik tugul, ak ortinwekyik tugul, ogeero, sirotin eng’ bukuitab laitorinikab Israel ak che bo Juda." 
2Chronicles27:8 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani, ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak lo eng’ Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles27:9 Ak kiru Jotam ak kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi nganasetab Daudi: ak kilaitoran Ahas werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Chronicles28:1 Ki bo Ahas kenyisiek tiptem ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak lo eng’ Jerusalem: ak kima yai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u Daudi kwandanyi:" 
2Chronicles28:2 Ago kiwendote ortinwekab laitorinikab Israel, ak kiitang’ji kogeny Baalik kanamonik." 
2Chronicles28:3 Kibeel kogeny nyamdutik eng’ atebwetab weritab Hinom, ak kobeel lagokyik eng’ mat, ko u tuguk che kiwechei che bo bororiosiek, che kiga on Jehovah eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
2Chronicles28:4 Ak kieny tiseiywek ak kobeel nyamdutik eng’ komoswek che tororen, ak eng’ tulonok, ak eng’ kelutab ketit age tugul ne tuon." 
2Chronicles28:5 Kiinde anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi eutab laitoriatab Suria; ak kibar, ak komut tuiyet ne o ne bo bikyik koek luulenik, ak komut koba Damasko. Ak kiginde inendet kogeny eunekab laitoriatab Israel, ne kibar inendet eng’ baret ne o." 
2Chronicles28:6 Amu kibar Peka weritab Remalia bik eng’ Juda elfusiek bogol agenge ak tiptem eng’ betut agenge, che ki bik che nyigonen choto tugul, amu kimeto Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak." 
2Chronicles28:7 Ak kibar Sikri, chito ne kim, ne bo Epraim, Maaseia weritab laitoriat, ak Asrikam bounindetab got, ak Elkana ne kirubei laitoriat." 
2Chronicles28:8 Ak kiluul lagokab Israel tupchosiekwak elfusiek bogol aeng’, kwonyik, werik, ak tibik, ak kiib barunenik che chang’ eng’ ichek koba Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:9 Ago kimi maotiotab Jehovah oloto, ne kigiguure Oded: ak kiwa kotorokta luget ne kinyonei Samaria, ak kolenji ichek, Ogeero, amu kinerekyi Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwok Juda, ko no koinde ichek eunekwok, ak kaobar ichek eng’ neregek che ng’wonen che kagoit kipsengwet." 
2Chronicles28:10 Ak nguno omache oyai lagokab Juda ak Jerusalem koek otwogikwok che murenik ak che kwonyik: ago motinye okwek kachiliilutik che kiochiliilji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’? 
2Chronicles28:11 Ogasa anyun, oweech luulenik che kaoluul eng’ tupchosiekwok: amu mi baragung’wong’ neregek che ng’wonen che bo Jehovah." 
2Chronicles28:12 Yeityo kotononso alak eng’ kandoikab lagokab Epraim, Asaria weritab Johanan, Berekia weritab Mesilemot, Jeisikia weritab Salum, ak Amasa weritab Hadlai, kogirinda bichoto kibunu luget," 
2Chronicles28:13 ak kolenji ichek, Momuchi omutu luulenik kobwa olito: amu omache oyai kit ne ibwech kachiliilutiet eng’ Jehovah, si kobiit otes tengekwogikyok ak kachiliilutik: amu eechen kachiliilutikyok, ak mitei neregek che ng’wonen agobo Israel." 
2Chronicles28:14 Kobagakta anyun murenik che kiilaachi karik, luulenik ak barunenik eng’ taitab bounik ak tuiyet tugul." 
2Chronicles28:15 Kong’eetyo anyun bik che kigimwa kainaikwak, ak komut luulenik, ak kinam tuguk che kibaru, ak kolaaksechine bik tugul che kimi ach ngor, ak kolaaksechi ichek, ak kolaakyi kweonik, ak kobai, ak konaga koee, ak koiil ichek, ak komute tugul che nyalulyotin sigirok, komut kobwa Jeriko, nganasetab tironik, agoi ole mi tupchosiekwak: koweek anyun koba Samaria." 
2Chronicles28:16 Kiiyokto eng’ betusiechoto laitoriat Ahas bik koba oldab laitorinikab Asuria kotoret inendet. 
2Chronicles28:17 Amu kigabwa kogeny Edomik, ak komut luulenik." 
2Chronicles28:18 Kiga kobokyi agichek Pilistik nganasok che bo atebwet, ak che bo Juda Murot ne bo Tai, ak kiga nam Bet-semes, Aijalon, Gederot, Soko koboto nganasokyik ak Timna koboto nganasokyik: Gimso agine koboto nganasokyik: ak kimeny oloto." 
2Chronicles28:19 Amu kiiming’in Jehovah Juda agobo Ahas laitoriatab Israel; amu kiyai atebosiekab tewernatet eng’ Juda, ak kongelelji Jehovah mising’." 
2Chronicles28:20 Ak kinyonji inendet Tilgat-pilneser laitoriatab Asuria, ak konyalil inendet, ma igimit." 
2Chronicles28:21 Amu kiisto Ahas kebeberta ne kimi gotab Jehovah, ak ne kimi gotab laitoriat, ak ne bo bounik, ak kogochi laitoriatab Asuria: ago ma toret noto inendet." 
2Chronicles28:22 Ak kites kosiir kongelelji Jehovah eng’ betusiekab nyalildanyi, laitoriandanito Ahas." 
2Chronicles28:23 Amu kieng’ji tiseiywek cheptalelisiekab Damasko, che kibar inendet; ak kile, Amu toreti cheptalelisiekab laitorinikab Suria ichek, aeng’jini anyun agane ichek, si kobiit kotoreta. Ago kiek choto che king’em inendet ak Israel tugul." 
2Chronicles28:24 Ak kiiyum Ahas terenikab gotab Kamuktaindet, ak kotui terenichoto bo gotab Kamuktaindet, ak koger kurgotikab gotab Jehovah; ak kiyachigei kapkorosusiek eng’ luita age tugul ne bo Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles28:25 Ak kiyai komoswek che tororen eng’ nganaset age tugul ne bo Juda, si kobeeljine nyamdutik cheptalelisiek, ak kotach Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyik, konerech." 
2Chronicles28:26 Ak boisionikyik che ng’etunotin, ak ortinwekyik tugul, che bo tai ak che bo let, ogeero, sirotin eng’ bukuitab laitorinikab Juda ak Israel." 
2Chronicles28:27 Ak kiru Ahas koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi nganaset, noto ko Jerusalem, amu ma kisut kwo kererisiekab laitorinikab Israel: ak kilaitoran Hesekia werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Chronicles29:1 Kitau Hesekia kolaitorani ko bo kenyisiek tiptem ak mut; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek tiptem ak sogol eng’ Jerusalem: ak kigiguure kamennyi Abija cheptab Sekaria. 
2Chronicles29:2 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u tugul che kiyai Daudi kwandanyi." 
2Chronicles29:3 Kiyat kurgotikab gotab Jehovah, eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo laitornatennyi, eng’ arawet ne bo tai, ak koteech kogeny ole kiga kobutok." 
2Chronicles29:4 Ak kiimut tisiik ak Lawik kobwa go, ak koyumji ichek komosta ne baraa eng’ kong’asis," 
2Chronicles29:5 ak kolenji, Ogas, okwek Lawik; oanyinyge, ak oanyiny gotab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyok, ak omaande tugukab simdo eng’ ole tilil." 
2Chronicles29:6 Amu kigochiliil kwanisiekyok, ak koyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ak kigometo inendet, ak kowelelgei kometo ole menyei Jehovah, ak kotuktochi batai." 
2Chronicles29:7 Kigoger kurgotikab keterut, ak komis taisiek, mata kobeel nyamdutik anan kogoito tiseiywek che kibeelei eng’ ole tilil, kogochi Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
2Chronicles29:8 Kinyonji anyun neregekab Jehovah Juda ak Jerusalem, ak kiigoito ichek ketoortaat koba komosi ak komosi, koek kwong’utiet, ak koek che kirenyei ko u ye ogeere eng’ konyekwok." 
2Chronicles29:9 Amu, ogeero, kigebar kwanisiekyok eng’ rotokab chok, ak kigeluul werikyok ak tibikyok ak osotikyok amu nito." 
2Chronicles29:10 Ara anyun, mi muguleldanyu kiyomisge ak Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, si keistoenech neregekyik che koromen." 
2Chronicles29:11 Werikyuk, amata oegu che maigiilegei: amu kilewenok Jehovah otonone tainnyi, oboisiechi inendet, ak oegu kiboitinikyik, ak obeel nyamdutik." 
2Chronicles29:12 King’eetyo anyun Lawik, Mahat weritab Amasai, ak Joel weritab Asaria, eng’ werikab Kohatik: ak eng’ werikab Merari, Kis weritab Abdi, ak Asaria weritab Jealelel: ak eng’ Gersonik, Joa weritab Sima, ak Eden weritab Joa:" 
2Chronicles29:12 King’eetyo anyun Lawik, Mahat weritab Amasai, ak Joel weritab Asaria, eng’ werikab Kohatik: ak eng’ werikab Merari, Kis weritab Abdi, ak Asaria weritab Jealelel: ak eng’ Gersonik, Joa weritab Sima, ak Eden weritab Joa:" 
2Chronicles29:13 ak eng’ werikab Elisapan, Simri ak Jeuel: ak eng’ werikab Asap, Sekaria ak Matania:" 
2Chronicles29:14 ak eng’ werikab Heman, Jehuel ak Simei: ak eng’ werikab Jedutun, Semaia ak Usiel." 
2Chronicles29:15 Ak kiiyum tupchosiekwak, ak koanyinygei, ak koba go, ko u ng’atutietab laitoriat eng’ ng’alekab Jehovah, kotilil gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles29:16 Ak kiba tisiik komosta ne bo orit mising’ eng’ gotab Jehovah, koba kotilil, ak komaanda tugul che bo simdo che kiganyorji hekalutab Jehovah, ak koib koba seremutab gotab Jehovah. Ak kinam Lawik, ak koib koba timin, kowirji kererutab Kidron." 
2Chronicles29:17 Kitoi anyun koanyinyis eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawet ne bo tai, ak kibwa eng’ betut ne bo sisiit ne bo arawet, keterutab Jehovah; ak kiianyiny gotab Jehovah betusiek sisiit: ak kiiges eng’ betutab taman ak lo eng’ arawanato bo tai." 
2Chronicles29:18 Kiba anyun ole mi Hesekia laitoriat eng’ go, ak kolenji, Kagitilil got tugul ne bo Jehovah, ak kaptisisiet ne bo kagochinoik che kibeelei, koboto terenikyik tugul, ak mesetab makatinikab kabartaet, koboto tugukyik tugul." 
2Chronicles29:19 Kogeny, kogechob tuguk tugul che kiga wirta laitoriat Ahas eng’ laitornatennyi, ye kiga kobistoe, ak kianyiny; keero, mi taitab kaptisisietab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles29:20 King’eet anyun Hesekia laitoriat karon inne, ak koyum bounikab nganaset, ak kotogosta gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles29:21 Ak kiget kirugik tisab, ak mengichik tisab, ak arekab kechir tisab, ak kwesik tisab koek kagochinetab tengekto ne bo bounatet ak ne bo ole tilil ak ne bo Juda. Ak king’at tisiik werikab Aron kogoito choto eng’ kaptisisietab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles29:22 Kieny anyun kirugik, ak kotaach tisiik korotik, ak koise kaptisisiet; ak kieny mengichik, ak koise korotik kaptisisiet; ak kieny arekab kechir, ak koise korotik kaptisisiet." 
2Chronicles29:23 Ak kiget kwesikab kagochinetab tengekto korik taitab laitoriat ak tuiyet; ak kiigonoor eunekwak baragunywa: 
2Chronicles29:24 ak kieny tisiik, ak kiigoito korotikwak eng’ kaptisisiet koek kagochinetab tengekto, si koyai kagaigaet agobo Israel tugul: amu king’at laitoriat kole kigoito kagochinet ne kibeelei ak kagochinetab tengekto agobo Israel tugul." 
2Chronicles29:25 Ak kiinde Lawik gotab Jehovah, kotinyei sanisiekab sugunonik che kibirei, ak kibugandinik ak ketubosiek, ko u ng’atutietab Daudi, ak ne bo Gad keerindetab laitoriat, ak maotiot Natan: amu kibunu ng’atutionoto Jehovah eng’ maotikyik." 
2Chronicles29:26 Ak kitononso Lawik kotinyei kibugandinikab Daudi, kotinyei tisiik iriagok." 
2Chronicles29:27 Ak king’at Hesekia kigoito kagochinet ne kibeelei eng’ kaptisisiet. Ak kingetoi kigoito kagochinet ne kibeelei, ketoi tiendab Jehovah agine, ak iriagok koboto kibugandinikab Daudi laitoriatab Israel." 
2Chronicles29:28 Ak kiing’urukso tuiyet tugul, ak kotienso tienik, ak koguut iriagok bik che kuutei; kiyai ko u noto agoi kogesgei kagochinet ne kigibeelei." 
2Chronicles29:29 Ak kingo kagoges kagoitoet tugul, kong’uruk laitoriat koboto tugul che kimi ak inendet, ak kolos." 
2Chronicles29:30 King’at kogeny laitoriat Hesekia ak bounik, Lawik kotienji Jehovah kalosunoik eng’ ng’alekab Daudi, ak che bo Asap keerindet. Ak kitien kalosunoik eng’ kagasetab ge, ak kiing’urukso ak kolos." 
2Chronicles29:31 Yeityo kowol Hesekia kole, Amu kaotabanjige Jehovah, origu oibu tiseiywek ak kagochinoikab kongoi kobwa gotab Jehovah. Ak kiib tuiyet tiseiywek ak kagochinoikab kongoi; ak kiib tugul che kichamei eng’ mugulelwekwak, kagochinoik che kibeelei." 
2Chronicles29:32 Ak kiek koitetab kagochinoik che kibeelei, che kiget tuiyet, kirugik tamanwogik tisab, ak mengichik bogol, ak arekab kechir bogol aeng’: ki bo choto tugul kagochinoik che kibeeljin Jehovah." 
2Chronicles29:33 Ak kiek tuguk che kigitaban eik bogol lo ak kechirek elfusiek somok. 
2Chronicles29:34 Ago ki ng’ering’ tisiik, kot ko ma imuch koeny kagochinoik tugul che kibeelei: kotoret anyun Lawik tupchosiekwak, kot kogesgei boisionoto, ak agoi koanyinygei tisiik: amu ki lititen mugulelwekab Lawik che kichamei koanyinygei kosiir tisiik." 
2Chronicles29:35 Ak ki chang’ kogeny kagochinoik che kibeelei, koboto mwanikab kagochinoikab kalyet, koboto kagochinoikab tuguk che kieei che bo kagochinet age tugul ne kibeelei. Kigitet anyun otisiet eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles29:36 Ak kibaibait Hesekia, koboto bik tugul, amu otisionoto kiga chopchi Kamuktaindet bik: amu kiyaak ng’olyondonoto eng’ yoto." 
2Chronicles30:1 Kiiyokto anyun Hesekia keguur Israel tugul ak Juda, ak kisirji baronok Epraim ak Manase, kole kobwa gotab Jehovah eng’ Jerusalem, koripchi Jehovah paska, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
2Chronicles30:2 Amu kiga komwa laitoriat koboto bounik, ak tuiyet tugul eng’ Jerusalem, kole korib paska eng’ arawet ne bo aeng’." 
2Chronicles30:3 Amu kima imuch koyai eng’ betusiechoto, amu kitom koyam tisiik che kiga koanyinygei, anan koyumjigei bik Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:4 Ak kimieit kioto eng’ taitab laitoriat ak tuiyet tugul. 
2Chronicles30:5 Kogimit anyun ng’atutiet kole kemwaita eng’ Israel tugul, koboch Beer-seba agoi Dan, kole kobwa koripchi Jehovah paska, Kamuktaindetab Israel, eng’ Jerusalem: amu kitomo koribei bik che chang’ ko u noto ko u ye kigisir." 
2Chronicles30:6 Kiib anyun bik che kiga kiyokto, baronok che kibunu laitoriat ak bounikyik, koba Israel tugul ak Juda, ko u ng’atutietab laitortiat, kolenji, Okwek, lagokab Israel, oweekyige Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Abraham, Isak ak Israel, si komuch inendet koweekyigei bik che king’et, che kichililso eng’ okwek eng’ eunekab laitorinikab Asuria." 
2Chronicles30:7 Amoige kwanisiekwok, ak tupchosiekwok, che kiingelelji Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, kot kobagakta ichek koek che kikwong’e, ko u ye ogeere." 
2Chronicles30:8 Amoegu anyun che uui kaat, ko u ye ki u kwanisiekwok; ago ogochige Jehovah, ak obe oldanyi ole tilil, ne kigotaban kobunji koigeny, ak oboisiechi Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, si koistoenogei neregekyik che koromen." 
2Chronicles30:9 Amu ngoweekyige Jehovah, kosichei tupchosiekwok ak lagokwok rirenet eng’ taitab icheget che kiluul ichek, ak koweek kogeny kobwa emoni: amu tinyei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ mieindo ak rirenet, ama ituktochinok batai, ngot oweekyige inendet." 
2Chronicles30:10 Kibun anyun bik, che kiga kiyokto, nganaset age tugul eng’ emetab Epraim ak Manase, agoi Sebulun: ago kirorechi, kochot ichek, ak kochurachur." 
2Chronicles30:11 Agos kiiming’ingei alak che bo Aser ak Manase ak Sebulun, ak kobwa Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles30:12 Kimi kogeny eutab Kamuktaindet Juda si kogochi ichek muguleldo agenge, koyai ng’atutietab laitoriat ak bounik eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles30:13 Ak kiiyumjigei Jerusalem bik che chang’ korib igortab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ arawetab aeng’, ki tuiyet ne o kot." 
2Chronicles30:14 Kong’eetyo anyun ak koisto kaptisisiosiek che kimi Jerusalem, ak kapkorosusiek tugul che bo nyamdutik, ak kowirji kererutab Kidron." 
2Chronicles30:15 Kieny anyun aruetab paska eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan eng’ arawetab aeng’: ak kiililanso tisiik ak Lawik, ak koanyinygei, ak kiib kagochinoik che kibeelei kobwa gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles30:16 Ak kitononso eng’ komostanywa ko u ye kiga king’at, ko u Ng’atutietab Musa chitab Kamuktaindet: kiisisie tisiik korotik che kitaachei eng’ eunekab Lawik." 
2Chronicles30:17 Amu kimi che chang’ eng’ tuiyet che kitom koanyinygei: noto anyun, ki boisietab Lawik koeng’ji paska chito age tugul ne kima ko tilil, koanyinyji Jehovah." 
2Chronicles30:18 Amu kitom koanyinygei che chang’ eng’ bichoto, agot che chang’ che ki bo Epraim, ak che bo Manase, che bo Isakar, ak che bo Sebulun, ago kiam alak paska ama ko u ye kigisir. Amu kiga sa Hesekia agobo ichek kole, Ingonyochi kaat Jehovah ne mie chi age tugul," 
2Chronicles30:19 ne chobei muguleldanyi kocheng’ Kamuktaindet, Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyik, agot ngo tomo kianyiny ko u kaanyinyetab ole tilil." 
2Chronicles30:20 Ak kigasyi Jehovah Hesekia, ak kosoob bik." 
2Chronicles30:21 Ak kirib lagokab Israel che kimi Jerusalem, igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek, betusiek tisab eng’ kagasetab ge ne o: ak kiilos Jehovah Lawik ak tisiik betut age tugul, kotienjin Jehovah eng’ kibugandinik che cheitos mising’." 
2Chronicles30:22 Kicheer anyun Hesekia Lawik tugul che ki inetotin eng’ otisietab Jehovah. Koamis anyun eng’ igorta tugul eng’ betusiek tisab, kogoitoi tiseiywek che bo kalyet, ak komwachin kongoi Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak." 
2Chronicles30:23 Ak kichamnyechi tuiyet komugul kole kota korib igorta betusiek alak tisab: ak kirib betusiek alak tisab eng’ kagasetab ge. 
2Chronicles30:24 Amu kiigochi Hesekia laitoriatab Juda tuiyet kirugik elfut ak kechirek elfusiek tisab, koek kagochinoik; ak kiigochi bounik tuiyet kirugik elfut ak kechirek elfusiek taman; ak kiianyinygei tisiik che chang’ kot." 
2Chronicles30:25 Ak kiboiboitu tuiyet komugul ne bo Juda, koboto tisiik ak Lawik, ak tuiyet tugul ne kibunu Israel, ak toek che kibunu emetab Israel, ak che kimenyei Juda." 
2Chronicles30:26 Kibiit boiboiyet no o anyun eng’ Jerusalem: amu koboch eng’ betusiekab Solomon weritab Daudi laitoriatab Israel ko kitomo kobiit ne u noto eng’ Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles30:27 Kong’eetyo anyun tisiik, Lawik, ak koberur bik: ak kigigas kutinywa, ak kitogosta saenywa kwo oldanyi ne tilil, kipsengwet." 
2Chronicles31:1 Kingo kagogesgei chuto tugul, koba nganasokab Juda Israel tugul che kimi, koba kobut tolochik, ak koeb Aserik, ak kobut komoswek che tororen ak kapkorosusiek eng’ Juda tugul ak Benjamin, eng’ Epraim agine ak Manase, kot kong’em tugul. Koweek anyun lagok tugul che bo Israel, kwo chi tugul ole mi tugukyik, eng’ nganasokwak." 
2Chronicles31:2 Ak kipchei Hesekia ripsosiekab tisiik ak Lawik kobee ripsosiekwak, chi tugul ko u boisiennyi, tisiik ak Lawik, agobo kagochinoik che kibeelei ak kagochinoik che bo kalyet, kootis, ak koweekyi kongoi, ak kolos eng’ ormarichokab nganasetab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles31:3 King’at agine kebebertab laitoriat ne bo tugukyik koek kagochinoik che kibeelei, che bo kagochinoik che kibeelei che bo karon ak che bo koskoleny, ak kagochinoik che kibeelei che bo sabatosiek, ak che bo ye kaleel arawet, ak che bo igorwek che kiging’at, ko u ye kigisir eng’ ng’atutikab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles31:4 King’at kogeny bik che kimenyei Jerusalem kogoito kebeberta ne bunjin tisiik ak Lawik, si kobiit kogochigei ng’atutietab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles31:5 Ak kingogasak ng’atutiet eng’ emet, kogoito lagokab Israel eng’ chang’indo tongoanikab bek, ak che bo divaik, ak mwanik, ak kumik, ak che bo ruratet tugul ne bo emet; ak kiib kebebertab taman ne bo tuguk tugul eng’ chang’indo." 
2Chronicles31:6 Ak kiib agichek lagokab Israel ak Juda, che kimenyei nganasokab Juda, kebebertab taman ne bo eik ak kechirek, ak kebebertab taman ne bo tuguk tugul che itabanotin che kiga kigochi Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak kiiyumat." 
2Chronicles31:7 Kitoi koyumat eng’ arawetab somok, ak koges eng’ arawetab tisab." 
2Chronicles31:8 Ak kingonyo Hesekia koboto bounik ak kogeer kayumanik, kolos Jehovah, ak bikyik Israel." 
2Chronicles31:9 Kiteebe anyun Hesekia tisiik ak Lawik agobo kayumanichato. 
2Chronicles31:10 Ak kiwolji Asaria tisiindet ne o ne bo gotab Sadok, kolenji, Koboch ngab kotoi bik koib kagochinoik kobwa gotab Jehovah, ko kigiamisie koyamech, ak kigituch che chang’: amu kigoberur Jehovah bikyik; ak che kong’et ko chu chang’." 
2Chronicles31:11 King’at anyun Hesekia kechob gorik che mengechen eng’ gotab Jehovah; ak kichob. 
2Chronicles31:12 Koib anyun kobwa go eng’ kayanet, kagochinoik ak kebeberwekab taman, ak tuguk che itabanotin: ak ki bounindet Konania Lawindet ne kibou ichek, ak ki ne bo aeng’ Semei ng’etab kamet." 
2Chronicles31:13 Ak Jehiel, Asasia, Nahat, Asael, Jerimot, Josabad, Eliel, Ismakia, Mahat, ak Benaia, ko ki ribik che kiindochin Konania ak Simei ng’etab kamet, ko u ye king’at laitoriat Hesekia, ak Asaria bounindetab gotab Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles31:14 Ak kibou Kore weritab Imna Lawindet, ne ki ribindetab kurget ne mi kong’asis, kagochinoikab chamnyet che bo Kamuktaindet, si kopcheita, kagochinoikab Jehovah che kinamjin barak, koboto tuguk che tililen mising’." 
2Chronicles31:15 Ak kirubei inendet Eden, Miniamin, Jesua, Semaia, Amaria, ak Sekania eng’ nganasokab tisiik, eng’ boisienywa ne kigigochi, si kogochi tupchosiekwak kobee ripsosiekwak, kogochi che eechen ak che mengech kogergeit:" 
2Chronicles31:16 ko maboto ichek che kigiit kobee tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto che bo murenik, koboch che bo kenyisiek somok ak che siirei, agot age tugul ne kiwendi gotab Jehovah, ko u ye yamegei ak boisietab betut age tugul, eng’ otisienywa eng’ boisienywa kobee ripsosiekwak:" 
2Chronicles31:17 koboto ichek che kigiit kobee tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto che bo tisiik, ko u gorikab kwanisiekwak, ak Lawik che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak che siirei, eng’ boisienywa kobee ripsosiekwak;" 
2Chronicles31:18 ak ichek che kigiit kobee tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto, che bo lagokwak che mengechen, ak osotikwak, ak werikwak, ak tibikwak, eng’ tuiyet komugul: amu kiianyinygei eng’ boisienywa ne kigigochi eng’ tililindo:" 
2Chronicles31:19 ko u noto agine eng’ werikab Aron tisiik, che kimenyei mbarenikab emotinwek che kiyagisie, che bo nganasokwak, eng’ nganaset age tugul, ko kimi bik che kigimwa kainaikwak, kopchechi kebeberwek murenik tugul che bo tisiik, koboto tugul che kigiit kobee tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto, che bo Lawik." 
2Chronicles31:20 Kiyai anyun ko u noto Hesekia eng’ Juda komugul; ak kiyai ne mie ak ne litit ak ne bo iman eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi. 
2Chronicles31:21 Ak eng’ boisiet age tugul ne kitoi koyai eng’ otisietab gotab Kamuktaindet, ak eng’ ng’atutik, ak eng’ kayomisutik, kocheng’ Kamuktaindennyi, kiyai eng’ muguleldanyi komugul, ak kibor." 
2Chronicles32:1 Kingobata tuguchoto, ak boisionichoto be iman, konyo Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria, kochut Juda, ak koteech koyiem nganasok che ng’ototin, kolen koman ichek kobunji." 
2Chronicles32:2 Ak kingogeer Hesekia kole kagonyo Senakerib, ak kobegechinot kobar Jerusalem," 
2Chronicles32:3 kong’alal ak bounikyik ak bikyik che kimen, si koger beekab kondametusiek che kimi sang’utab nganaset; ak kitoret bichoto inendet." 
2Chronicles32:4 Koyumgei anyun bik che chang’, ak koger kondametusiek tugul, ak kererut ne kirootei eng’ kwenutab emet, kole, Amu nee si kobwa laitorinikab Asuria, ak konyor beek che chang’?" 
2Chronicles32:5 Ak kinyiganit, ak koteech irimet tugul ne kiga kobutok, ak kiteech koaechin ak teeksosiek che koen, koboto irimet age ne kitobonu sang’, ak kogimit Milo eng’ nganasetab Daudi, ak kiyai karik ak long’onik che chang’." 
2Chronicles32:6 Ak kiinde kiptainikab luget koboi, ak koyum kobwa ole mi inendet eng’ ole baraa eng’ ormarichetab nganaset, ak kocheer ichek kolenji," 
2Chronicles32:7 Ogimegitu, ak onyiganitu, amoiyweisie anan otoptobense amu laitoriatab Asuria, anan agobo tuiyet tugul ne mi koboto inendet: amu mi ne o kobotech kosiir ne mi ak inendet." 
2Chronicles32:8 Mi koboto inendet eut ne bo borto; ago mi kobotech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo kotoretech, ak koyai lugosiekyok. Ak kitiiegei bik ng’alekab Hesekia laitoriatab Juda." 
2Chronicles32:9 Kingobata nito koyokto Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria otwogikyik koba Jerusalem, (kimi ole negite Lakis, koboto lugennyi tugul,) oldab Hesekia laitoriatab Juda ak oldab Juda tugul che kimi Jerusalem, kolenji," 
2Chronicles32:10 Kamwa ko u ni Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria, kole, Omang’u nee, ngotebye ak ogeere ko kageyiemak eng’ Jerusalem?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Tos maigoigook Hesekia si kogoitook obegu eng’ rubet ak melelda, kolenjinok, Soruech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo eng’ eutab laitoriatab Asuria?" 
2Chronicles32:12 Tos ma Hesekia nito ne kiisto komoswek che tororen ak kapkorosusiekyik, ak kong’atei Juda ak Jerusalem kolenjin, Osae eng’ taitab kapkorosut agenge, ak obeele nyamdutik eng’ yoto?" 
2Chronicles32:13 Tos mongen kit ne kigiyachi, ane ak kwanisiekyuk, bororiosiek tugul che bo emotinwek? Tos kiimuchi cheptalelisiekab bororiosiek che bo emotinwek kosor emenywa eng’ or age tugul eng’ eunnyu?" 
2Chronicles32:14 Tos kimi ng’o eng’ cheptalelisiek tugul che bo bororiosiechoto, che kibar kwanisiekyuk koges, ne kiimuch kosor bikyik eng’ eunnyu, kot ole imuchi Kamuktaindeng’wong’ kosoruok eng’ eunnyu?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Noto anyun, among’ koberberak Hesekia, anan kogaigaak ko u ni, anan oyan inendet: amu mami cheptalelit ne bo boror age tugul, anan ko bounatet age tugul ne kiimuch kosor bikyik eng’ eunnyu, ak eng’ eunekab kwanisiekyuk: komuktoi ano anyun Kamuktaindeng’wong’ kosoruok eng’ eunnyu?" 
2Chronicles32:16 Ak kites otwogikyik kong’alal che yaach agobo Jehovah Kamuktaindet, ak otwogindennyi Hesekia." 
2Chronicles32:17 Kisir kogeny baronok, kochurachur Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, ak komwa che yaach agobo inendet, kole, Ko u ye ma sor cheptalelisiekab bororiosiekab emotinwek, kosor bikwak eng’ eunnyu, komasoru agine Kamuktaindetab Hesekia bikyik eng’ eunnyu." 
2Chronicles32:18 Ak kiwaage bichoto bikab Jerusalem che kimi irimet barak, eng’ kutit ne o, eng’ ng’alekab Yahudik, komu ichek, ak koiim; si komuch konam nganaset." 
2Chronicles32:19 Ak king’alal agobo Kamuktaindetab Jerusalem koyanie kanamonikab bik che bo ng’ony, che boisionikab eunekab bik." 
2Chronicles32:20 Ak kisa laitoriat Hesekia ak maotiot Isaia weritab Amos agobo ng’olyondonito, ak korirji kipsengwet." 
2Chronicles32:20 Ak kisa laitoriat Hesekia ak maotiot Isaia weritab Amos agobo ng’olyondonito, ak korirji kipsengwet." 
2Chronicles32:21 Ak kiiyokto Jehovah malaikaiyat, ne kibar murenik tugul che kimen che nyigonen, koboto kandoik ak kiptainik, eng’ nganaset ne bo laitoriatab Asuria. Koweek anyun eng’ kalilanet kwo emennyi. Ak kingoit gotab kanamwennyi, kobar lagokyik inendet eng’ yoto eng’ rotwetab chok." 
2Chronicles32:22 Kisor anyun Jehovah Hesekia ak bik che kimenyei Jerusalem, eng’ eutab Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria, ak eng’ eunekab alak tugul, ak kondochi ichek eng’ komosta age tugul." 
2Chronicles32:23 Ak kiipchi bik che chang’ Jehovah kagochinoik kobwa Jerusalem, ak kiipchi Hesekia laitoriatab Juda tuguk che bo kamanutiet ne o: kot kotororit inendet eng’ taitab bororiosiek tugul koboch betunoto agoi." 
2Chronicles32:24 Kimian Hesekia eng’ betusiechoto ne ki negit kome: ak kisa Jehovah; ak king’alalji Jehovah inendet ak kogochi kaborunet. 
2Chronicles32:25 Ago ma yai Hesekia kogeny ko u ye kiga kiyachi ko mie; amu kimen: konyonji anyun nereknatet inendet, ak Juda ak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles32:26 Ago kiiming’ingei Hesekia kometo menotetab muguleldanyi, inendet koboto bik che kimenyei Jerusalem, ak kima nyonji neregekab Jehovah ichek eng’ betusiekab Hesekia." 
2Chronicles32:27 Ak kitinyei Hesekia magornatosiek che chang’ mising’ ak teegisto: ak kichopchigei ole kigonore feda ak tahabu, ak koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, ak tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak long’onik, ak tuguk che kororon che terotin;" 
2Chronicles32:28 koboto chogenik che bo bek che karurio, ak divaik ak mwanik; ak gorikab tuguk alak tugul che kiyagi, ak akwotisiekab kechirek eng’ biusiek." 
2Chronicles32:29 Ak kichopchigei kogeny nganasok, ak kitinyei akwotisiekab kechirek ak che bo tuga eng’ chang’indo: amu kiga kogochi Kamuktaindet tuguk ng’isiat."
