2Chronicles32:30 Hesekia nito ne kiimaas beekab kondametut ne mi meto eng’ Gion, ak koib eng’ oret ne litit korek kobwa komostab cherongo ne bo nganasetab Daudi. Ak kibor Hesekia eng’ boisionikyik tugul." 
2Chronicles32:31 Ago eng’ ng’alekab bik che kiiyok bounikab Babulon, che kibwa koteepse agobo kwong’utiet ne kiyaak eng’ emet, ko kibagakta Kamuktaindet inendet, kotiem si konai tuguk tugul che kimi muguleldanyi." 
2Chronicles32:32 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Hesekia, ak boisionikyik che miach, ogeero, sirotin eng’ ng’ang’utietab maotiot Isaia weritab Amos, eng’ bukuitab laitorinikab Juda ak Israel." 
2Chronicles32:32 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Hesekia, ak boisionikyik che miach, ogeero, sirotin eng’ ng’ang’utietab maotiot Isaia weritab Amos, eng’ bukuitab laitorinikab Juda ak Israel." 
2Chronicles32:33 Ak kiru Hesekia koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitupchi ole kitogostoe kebendi kererisiekab werikab Daudi: ak kigonyit inendet Juda tugul ak bik che kimenyei Jerusalem eng’ meenyi. Ak kilaitoran Manase werinnyi, kogeer inendet." 
2Chronicles33:1 Ki bo Manase kenyisiek taman ak aeng’ ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek konom ak mut eng’ Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles33:2 Ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah ko u tuguk che kiwechei che bo bororiosiek, che kiga on Jehovah eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
2Chronicles33:3 Amu kiteech kogeny komoswek che tororen che kiga kobut kwandanyi Hesekia; kiteekyi Baalik kapkorosusiek, ak koyai Aserot, ak kigutung’ji tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet ak koot." 
2Chronicles33:4 Ak kiteech kapkorosusiek eng’ gotab Jehovah, ne kimwa Jehovah agobo noto kole, Tebe kainennyu Jerusalem koigeny." 
2Chronicles33:5 Ak kiteekyi kapkorosusiek tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet, eng’ seremusiechoto aeng’ che bo gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles33:6 Ak kiigoito kogeny lagokyik kobun mat eng’ atebwetab weritab Hinom: ak king’orso ak kiisogis, ak kiyai bonisiet, ak king’alal ak che boisie oik ak bonik: kiyai yaitiet ne o eng’ taitab Jehovah, kotach inendet konerech." 
2Chronicles33:7 Ak kiinde kit ne kigiwai ne bo kanamwet ne kiyai inendet, gotab Kamuktaindet, ne kimwachi Kamuktindet Daudi ak Solomon werinnyi, agobo goyoto, kolenji, Andoi kainennyu koigeny goi, ak Jerusalem, ne kialewen eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo Israel:" 
2Chronicles33:8 amaistoi kogeny keldab Israel eng’ emet ne kiaarorji kwanisiekwak: ngot korib koyai tugul che kiang’at ichek eng’ Musa, ng’atutik tugul ak etanutik ak kayomisutik." 
2Chronicles33:9 Ak kiigochi anyun Manase Juda ak bik che kimenyei Jerusalem, koyai tengekto kot koyai yaitiet kosiir bororiosiek che king’em Jehovah eng’ taitab lagokab Israel." 
2Chronicles33:10 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Manase ak bikyik; ago kima mage kiy. 
2Chronicles33:11 Komutyi anyun Jehovah ichek kiptainikab luget ne bo laitoriatab Asuria che kiimut Manase ko ratat eng’ sirimwek ak mugurek, ak komut inendet kwo Babulon." 
2Chronicles33:12 Ak kingomi eng’ nyalilda kosa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, ak koming’ingei mising’ eng’ taitab Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyik." 
2Chronicles33:13 Ak kisa, ak kigigasyi; kigas Jehovah somennyi, ak kiimut inendet kogeny konyo Jerusalem ole mi bounatennyi. Konai anyun Manase kole Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet." 
2Chronicles33:14 Kingobata nito koteech irimet ne bo sang’ ne bo nganasetab Daudi eng’ komostab cherongo ne bo Gion, eng’ atebwet, eng’ ole kichutei eng’ ormarichetab njirenik; ak kiyiem Opel, ak koteech kogoit mising’; ak kiinde kiptainik che nyigonen nganasok tugul che ng’ototin che bo Juda." 
2Chronicles33:15 Ak kiisto kanamonik che too ak kanamwet ne kimi gotab Jehovah ak kapkorosusiek tugul che kiga koteech eng’ tulwetab gotab Jehovah, ak eng’ Jerusalem, ak kowirji sang’utab nganaset." 
2Chronicles33:16 Ak kiteech kaptisisietab Jehovah ak kogoitoe yoto tiseiywekab kagochinoikab kalyet ak che bo kongoi, ak kong’at Juda koot Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
2Chronicles33:17 Agos kita koeny bik tiseiywek eng’ komoswek che tororen, ago kieng’jine yoto Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa kityo." 
2Chronicles33:18 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Manase, ak saet ne kisa Kamuktaindennyi, ak ng’alekab keerik che king’alalji inendet eng’ kainetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ogeero, sirotin koboto boisionikab laitorinikab Israel." 
2Chronicles33:19 Kigisirji agine saennyi, ak ole kigasyindo Kamuktaindet, ak tengektanyi tugul ak kachiliilutiennyi, ak komoswek ole kiteech komoswek che tororen, ak kolumda Aserik ak kanamonik che kigiwai, ye kitomo koming’ingei; ogeero, sirotin choto eng’ bukuitab ateptab betusiekab Hosai." 
2Chronicles33:20 Kiru anyun Manase koboto kwanisiekyik, ak kigitub eng’ gonnyi: ak kilaitoran werinnyi Amon kogeer inendet." 
2Chronicles33:21 Ki bo Amon kenyisiek tiptem ak aeng’ ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek aeng’ eng’ Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles33:22 Ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah ko u ye kiyai kwandanyi Manase: ak kieng’ji Amon tiseiywek kanamonik tugul che kigiwai che kiga koyai kwandanyi Manase, ak koot." 
2Chronicles33:23 Ak kima iming’ingei eng’ taitab Jehovah ko u ye kiiming’ingei kwandanyi Manase; ago kites Amon koyai chalwokto mising’ kosiir. 
2Chronicles33:24 Ak kichaam inendet otwogikyik, ak kobar inendet eng’ gonnyi." 
2Chronicles33:25 Ak kibar bikab emonoto bichoto tugul kichaam laitoriat Amon; ak kiieet bikab emet Josia werinnyi koek laitoriat kogeer inendet. 
2Chronicles34:1 Ki bo Josia kenyisiek sisiit ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek sosom ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles34:2 Ak kiyai ne mie eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kiwendote ortinwekab Daudi kwandanyi, ama masta kwo eutab tai anan ne bo katam." 
2Chronicles34:3 Amu eng’ kenyitab sisiit ne bo laitornatennyi, ye kita ko ming’in, kotoi kocheng’ Kamuktaindetab Daudi kwandanyi: ak eng’ kenyitab taman ak aeng’ kotoi kotilil Juda ak Jerusalem koisto komoswek che tororen, ak Aserik, ak kanamonik che kigiwai ak kanamonik che kigitany." 
2Chronicles34:4 Ak kibut kapkorosusiekab Baalik eng’ tainnyi; ak koluul kanamonik che bo asista che kimitei baragunywa; ak kituatui Aserik, ak kanamonik che kigiwai ak kanamonik che kigitany, ak kong’a koek temburiek ak koseerji kererisiekab icheget che kieng’ji." 
2Chronicles34:5 Ak kibeel kowekab tisiik eng’ kapkorosusiekwak, ak kotilil Juda ak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:6 Ak kiyachi ko u noto nganasokab Manase ak Epraim, ak Simeon, agoi Naptali, ak komoswek tugul che bo karatwekwak." 
2Chronicles34:7 Ak kibut kapkorosusiek, ak kong’a Aserik ak kanamonik che kigiwai ak kanamonik che kigitany, koek temburiek, ak koluul kanamonik tugul che bo asista eng’ emet komugul ne bo Israel, yeityo koweek Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:8 Ak eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo laitornatennyi, ye kiga kotilil emet ak got, koyokto anyun Sapan weritab Asalia, ak Maaseia bounindetab nganaset, ak Joa weritab Joahas sirindetab tuguk che biitu, koteech ole kigobutok eng’ gotab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi." 
2Chronicles34:9 Ak kibwa ole mi Hilkia, tisiindet ne o, ak kogochi fedaisiek che kigiibu kobwa gotab Kamuktaindet, che kiga koyum Lawik, ribikab kurget, che kigiyumune Manase ak Epraim, ak Israel tugul che kigong’et, ak che bo Juda tugul ak Benjamin ak che bo bik che kimenyei Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles34:10 Ak kiigochi kiboitinik che kitononjin gotab Jehovah; ak kiigoito kiboitinik che kiboisiei eng’ gotab Jehovah si kobiit kechobe ak keteege ole kiga kobutok eng’ got; 
2Chronicles34:11 kiigochi musogik ak teegik, koale koik che kigewai, ak baoinik che kigituiyote, ak che kiyae bambanikab gorik che kiga kobut laitorinikab Juda." 
2Chronicles34:12 Ak kiyai bichoto boisiet koek bik che kiyani: ak kandoikab bichoto ko ki Jahat ak Obadia, Lawik eng’ werikab Merari; ak Sekaria ak Mesulam eng’ werikab Kohat, che kiichirjiri boisiet: ak Lawik alak, che ki utotin eng’ butetab kibugandinik." 
2Chronicles34:13 Ak kibou kogeny bik che kilaei milosiek, ak kiichirjiri tugul che kiyaei boisiet age tugul: ak kimi Lawik che ki sirik ak kiptainik ak ribikab kurgotik." 
2Chronicles34:14 Ak ye kingonem fedaisiek che kiga kiib kobwa gotab Jehovah, konyor Hilkia tisiindet bukuitab Ng’atutikab Jehovah che kigonu Musa." 
2Chronicles34:15 Ak kiwolji Hilkia Sapan sirindet, kolenji, Kaanyoru bukuitab Ng’atutik eng’ gotab Jehovah. Ak kiigochi Hilkia Sapan bukuinoto." 
2Chronicles34:16 Ak kiipchi Sapan laitoriat bukuinoto, ak kilenji laitoriat kogeny, Yaei otwogiguk kit age tugul ne kemwachi." 
2Chronicles34:17 Ak kigoib fedaisiek tugul che kiginyorji gotab Jehovah, ak kogoch ribik, ak kiboitinik." 
2Chronicles34:18 Ak kimwachi Sapan sirindet laitoriat kolenji, Kagona Hilkia tisiindet bukuit. Ak kisoman Sapan bukuinoto eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
2Chronicles34:19 Ak kingogas laitoriat ng’alekab ng’atutichoto, kobet ngoroikyik." 
2Chronicles34:20 Ak king’at laitoriat Hilkia, ak Aikam weritab Sapan, ak Abdon weritab Mika, ak Sapan sirindet, ak Asaia otwogindetab laitoriat, kolenji," 
2Chronicles34:21 Oba oteebunena Jehovah, ak agobo bik che king’et eng’ Israel ak Juda, agobo ng’alekab bukuit ne kogenyor: amu o nereknatetab Jehovah ne rong’jinech, amu ma rib kwanisiekyok ng’olyotab Jehovah, koyai ko u tugul che kigisirji bukuini." 
2Chronicles34:22 Kiba anyun Hilkia ak ichek che kiiyokto laitoriat, oldab Hulda chebioset ne maotiot, osotiotab Salum weritab Tokat, weritab Hasra, ribindetab ngoroik; (kimenyei Jerusalem nganaset ne bo aeng’;) ak komwachi ko u noto." 
2Chronicles34:23 Ak kilenji ichek, Kamwa Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel ko u ni, kole, Omwachi chito ne kaiyokwok obwa ole ami, olenji," 
2Chronicles34:24 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni, kole, Ogeero, aipchini yaitiet yuto, ak ichek che menyei olito, chubisiosiek tugul che kigisirji bukuit ne kagesoman eng’ taitab laitoriatab Juda:" 
2Chronicles34:25 amu kigometa, ak kigobeelji nyamdutik kanamonik, si kobiit kotacha anerech eng’ boisionik tugul che bo eunekwak; noto anyun, karong’jige neregekyuk yuto, ama kimisi." 
2Chronicles34:26 Ago olenji laitoriatab Juda, ne kagoyokwok obwa oteepse Jehovah, Kamwa Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel ko u ni, kole: Eng’ ng’alechato kaigas," 
2Chronicles34:27 amu ki tangus muguleldang’ung’, ak kiiming’ingei eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet, ye kegas ng’alekyik che nerekyin yuto, ak bik che menyei olito, ak iming’inige eng’ tainnyu, ak igerer ngoroiguk, ak irir eng’ tainnyu; ko kaagasun agane, mwaei Jehovah." 
2Chronicles34:28 Keero, ayumin iwe ole mi kwanisieguk, ak iwe kerering’ung’ eng’ kalyet, ama keerei konyeguk yaitiet tugul ne aipchini koroni, koboto bik che menyei. Ak kiipchin laitoriat ng’olyot kogeny." 
2Chronicles34:29 Koyokto anyun laitoriat kiyum boisiek tugul che bo Juda ak Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles34:30 Ak kitogosta laitoriat gotab Jehovah, koboto bik tugul che bo Juda ak bik che kimenyei Jerusalem, ak tisiik, ak Lawik, ak bik tugul, che eechen ak che mengechen: ak kosoman ng’alek tugul che bo bukuitab arorutiet ne kiginyoru eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles34:31 Ak kitonon laitoriat eng’ komostanyi, ak koyai arorutiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, kosub Jehovah, ak korib ng’atutikyik, ak baornatosiekyik, ak kayomisutikyik, eng’ muguleldanyi tugul, ak eng’ sobondanyi tugul, kosub ng’alekab arorutiet che kigisirji bukuini." 
2Chronicles34:32 Ak king’at bik tugul che kimi Jerusalem ak Benjamin kotononso koyan ng’alechato. Ak kiyai che kimenyei Jerusalem ko u kayomisetab Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak." 
2Chronicles34:33 Ak kiisto Josia tuguk tugul che kiwechei eng’ emotinwek tugul che bo Israel, ak kong’at bik tugul che bo Israel kootis, koot Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa. Ma meto bichoto kosub Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, eng’ betusiekyik tugul." 
2Chronicles35:1 Ak kiripchi Josia Jehovah paska eng’ Jerusalem; ak kieny aruetab paska eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawet ne bo tai. 
2Chronicles35:2 Ak kiinde tiisik ripsosiekwak, ak kogiil ichek eng’ otisietab gotab Jehovah." 
2Chronicles35:3 Ak kilenji Lawik che kiineti Israel tugul, che ki tililen eng’ Jehovah, Onde moinget ne tilil got ne kiteech Solomon weritab Daudi laitoriatab Israel; ma koegu milet ne mi tigigoikwok: oot anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak bikyik Israel." 
2Chronicles35:4 Ak ochopge obee gorikab kwanisiekwok ko u ripsosiekwok, ko u sirutikab Daudi laitoriatab Israel, ak sirutikab Solomon, werinnyi." 
2Chronicles35:5 Ak otononse eng’ ole tilil ko u ole kigipcheita gorikab kwanisiek che bo tupchosiekwok lagokab bik, ak ingobunji age tugul kebebertab gotab kwanisiekab Lawik." 
2Chronicles35:6 Ak oeny aruetab paska ak oanyinyge, ochopchji tupchosiekwok, koyai ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah ne king’at eng’ Musa." 
2Chronicles35:7 Ak kiigochi Josia bik, che bo akwetab kechirek, arekab kechir ak che bo ng’ororek, kobunji choto tugul che bo kagochinoikab Paska, kogochi bik tugul che kimi yoto; kiek tugul elfusiek sosom, ak kirugik elfusiek somok: ki bo laitoriat chuto." 
2Chronicles35:8 Ak kiigochi bounikyik bik ak tisiik, ak Lawik, kagochinetab chamnyet. Kiigochi Hilkia ak Sekaria ak Jehiel, che bounikab gotab Kamuktaindet, kogochi tisiik, tuga elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol lo, ak eik bogol somok koek kagochinoikab paska." 
2Chronicles35:9 Ak kiigochi Konania, ak Semaia ak Netanel, tupchosiekyik, ak Hasabia, Jeiel, ak Josabad, che eechen eng’ Lawik, kogochi Lawik, tuga elfusiek mut, ak eik bogol mut, koek kagochinoikab paska." 
2Chronicles35:10 Kochobok anyun otisiet ak kotononso tisiik eng’ komostanywa, ak Lawik eng’ ripsosiekwak, ko u ng’atutietab laitoriat." 
2Chronicles35:11 Ak kieny aruetab paska, ak kiisisie tisiik korotik che kitaachei eng’ eunekab Lawik, ak kieny Lawik tiseiywechoto." 
2Chronicles35:12 Ak kiisto kagochinoik che kibeelei, si kobiit kogoito, ko u ole kigipcheita gorikab kwanisiekab lagokab bik, kogochi Jehovah ko u ye sirat eng’ bukuitab Musa. Ak kiyachi ko u noto eik." 
2Chronicles35:13 Ak kibeel aruetab paska eng’ mat ko u kayomiset: ak kiiyo kagochinoik che tililen eng’ terenik, ak saburionik, ak tabokab karik, ak koipchi lagok tugul che bo bik kochaktae." 
2Chronicles35:14 Ye ibata kochopchigei ak tisiik; amu kichirjirendos tisiik werikab Aron kogoitoi kagochinoik che kibeelei ak mwanik agoi kemoi: kichopchigei anyun Lawik, ak tisiik, werikab Aron." 
2Chronicles35:15 Ak kimi komostanywa tienik werikab Asap, ko u ng’atutietab Daudi, ak Asap, Heman, ak Jedutun keerindetab laitoriat; ak kimi ribik ormarichet age tugul; kima ko nyoljin kobagakta boisienywa, amu kichopjin Lawik tupchosiekwak tugul." 
2Chronicles35:16 Kichobok anyun otisiet tugul ne bo Jehovah eng’ betunoto, si korib paska, ak kogoito kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ kaptisisietab Jehovah, ko u ng’atutietab laitoriat Josia." 
2Chronicles35:17 Kirib lagokab Israel che kimi yoto, paska, eng’ betusiechoto, ak korip igortab makatinik che ma kinde mermerek eng’ betusiek tisab." 
2Chronicles35:18 Ak kitom kobiit paska age koboch betusiekab maotiot Samuel ne kergei ak noto kigirib eng’ Israel; ama rib age tugul eng’ laitorinikab Israel ne u noto koyai Josia, ak tisiik, ak Lawik, ak Juda tugul ak Israel che kimi yoto, ak bik che kimenyei Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles35:19 Kigirib paskainoto eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo laitornatetab Josia. 
2Chronicles35:20 Kingobata choto tugul ko kagochob Josia hekalut, kotogos Neko laitoriatab Misri kobargei ak Karkemis ye negite Euprate: ak kiwa Josia kobargei ak inendet." 
2Chronicles35:21 Ago kiiyokto Neko bik koba ole mi inendet, kolenji, Kiting’ege nee ak inye, laitoriatab Juda? Maabokyin inye, betuni, ago abokyini got ne ating’e boriet; ak kang’ata Kamuktaindet achokyi: bagakte, amegirinde Kamuktaindet ne mi kobota, si mabarin inendet." 
2Chronicles35:22 Ago kima cham Josia kobagakta inendet, ago kiwalgei koek age si kobiit kobargei ak inendet, ama kas ng’alekab Neko che kibunu kutitab Kamuktaindet, ak kinyo kobargei eng’ atebwetab Megido." 
2Chronicles35:23 Ak kimwok mwogik laitoriat Josia; ak kilenji laitoriat otwogikyik, Omuta; amu kagiguotena mising’." 
2Chronicles35:24 Komut anyun otwogikyik inendet eng’ karit, ak konde inendet karit ne bo aeng’ ne kitinyei, ak kiimut inendet konyo Jerusalem; ak kime ak kigitupchi kererisiekab kwanisiekyik. Ak kirirji Josia Juda tugul ak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles35:25 Ak kirir Jeremia agobo Josia: ak kirirji Josia tienik tugul che murenik ak gotab kor, eng’ rirekwak agoi kora; ak kiyachi ichek kayomiset eng’ Israel: ak ogeero, sirotin eng’ bukuitab rirek." 
2Chronicles35:26 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Josia, ak boisionikyik che miach, ko u che sirotin eng’ bukuitab Ng’atutikab Jehovah," 
2Chronicles35:27 ak boisionikyik, che bo tai ak che bo let, ogeero, sirotin eng’ bukuitab laitorinikab Israel ak Juda." 
2Chronicles36:1 Kiieet anyun bikab emet Jeoahas weritab Josia koek laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem kogeer kwandanyi. 
2Chronicles36:2 Ki bo Jeoahas kenyisiek tiptem ak somok ye kitau kolaitorani: ak kilaitoran arawek somok eng’ Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles36:3 Ak kiribe laitornatennyi laitoriatab Misri eng’ Jerusalem, ak kimage emet talentaisiek bogol che bo feda ak talentait agenge ne bo tahabu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Ak kiieet laitoriatab Misri ng’etab kamet Eliakim koboi Juda ak Jerusalem, ak kiweech kainennyi koguure Jeoiakim. Ak kiimut Neko ng’etab kamet Jeoahas kwo Misri." 
2Chronicles36:5 Ki bo Jeoiakim kenyisiek tiptem ak mut ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem; ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi. 
2Chronicles36:6 Kitogos Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon konyo kobargei ak inendet, ak kirate inendet mugurek, komut kwo Babulon." 
2Chronicles36:7 Kiib kogeny Nebukadnesar terenikab gotab Jehovah koba Babulon, ak konde hekalunnyi eng’ Babulon." 
2Chronicles36:8 Ak boisionik che ng’etunotin che bo Jeoiakim, ak tuguk che kiwechei che kiyai, ak tuguk che yaach che kiginyorji inendet, ogeero, sirotin eng’ bukuitab laitorinikab Israel ak Juda: ak kilaitoran Jeoiakin werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
2Chronicles36:9 Ki bo Jeoiakin kenyisiek sisiit ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran arawek somok ak betusiek taman eng’ Jerusalem: ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah. 
2Chronicles36:10 Ak ye kingogesgei kenyit koyok laitoriat Nebukadnesar bik komut inendet konyo Babulon, koboto terenik che kororon che bo gotab Jehovah, ak kiieet Sedekia ng’etab kamet koek laitoriat koboi Juda ak Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:11 Ki bo Sedekia kenyisiek tiptem ak agenge ye kitau kolaitorani: ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem. 
2Chronicles36:12 Ak kiyai ne ya eng’ taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi; kima iming’injigei maotiot Jeremia ye king’alal ng’alek che bunu kutitab Jehovah. 
2Chronicles36:13 Ak kiingelelji kogeny laitoriat Nebukadnesar, ne kiga birji koyosio eng’ Kamuktaindet: ago kiiuuiit kaatinnyi ak muguleldanyi, ma weekyigei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
2Chronicles36:14 Kiingelelso kogeny mising’ tisiik tugul che eechen, ak bik, kosub tuguk tugul che kiwechei che bo bororiosiek; ak kiimuruon gotab Jehovah ne kiga kotaban eng’ Jerusalem." 
2Chronicles36:15 Ak kiiyoktoi Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwak, bikyik, komusta koba ole mi ichek; amu kirire bikyik, ak ole menyei inendet." 
2Chronicles36:16 Ago kireny bichoto kiiyoktoi Kamuktaindet, ak kisas ng’alekyik, kogengenie maotikyik, agoi konerekyi Jehovah bikyik, kot ko ma komi kit ne kinyae." 
2Chronicles36:17 Komutyi anyun icheget laitoriatab Kaldiek, ne kinyo kobar neranikwak eng’ rotwetab chok, eng’ gotab oldanywa ne tilil, ama rire muren anan tie, boiyot anan ne negit kolil: kiinde tugul eunnyi." 
2Chronicles36:18 Ak kiib anyun tuguk tugul che bo gotab Kamuktaindet, che eechen ak che mengechen, ak konoraikab gotab Jehovah, ak konoraikab laitoriat, ak che bo bounikyik, kiib tugul koba Babulon." 
2Chronicles36:19 Ak kibeel gotab Kamuktaindet, ak kobut irimetab Jerusalem, ak kobeel gorik tugul che bo laitoriat, ak kong’em tuguk tugul che kororon che kimi gorjoto." 
2Chronicles36:20 Ak kiimut koba Babulon che kiga chililye rotwetab chok; ak kiek otwogikyik ak che bo werikyik agoi bounatetab Persia: 
2Chronicles36:21 si kosulda ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kimwa eng’ kutitab Jeremia, agoi kogasegei emet sabatosiekyik: amu kirib sabatosiekyik eng’ betusiechoto kima komenyei chi, kot kosulda kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab." 
2Chronicles36:22 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo Kirus laitoriatab Persia, si kobiit kosulda ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kimwa eng’ kutitab Jeremia, kochirjir Jehovah tamirmirietab Kirus laitoriatab Persia, si komwaita eng’ bounatennyi tugul, ak kosirta kogeny, kole," 
2Chronicles36:23 Kamwa ko u ni Kirus laitoriatab Persia, kole, Kigona Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet, bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony; ak king’ata ateekyi got eng’ Jerusalem, ne mi Juda. Ingotogosta age tugul eng’ okwek che o bo bikyik tugul, ak ingoteb Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi koboto chichoto." 
Ezra1:1 Eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo Kirus laitoriatab Persia, si kobiit kosulda ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kimwa eng’ kutitab Jeremia, kochirjir Jehovah tamirmirietab Kirus laitoriatab Persia, si komwaita eng’ bounatennyi tugul, ak kosirta kogeny, kole," 
Ezra1:2 Kamwa ko u ni Kirus laitoriatab Persia, kole, Kigona Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet, bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony; ak king’ata ateekyi got eng’ Jerusalem, ne mi Juda." 
Ezra1:3 Ingotogosta Jerusalem, ne mi Juda, age tugul eng’ okwek che o bo bikyik tugul, ak ingoteb Kamuktaindennyi koboto inendet, kwo koteekyi got Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel (inendet ko Kamuktaindet,) ne mi Jerusalem." 
Ezra1:4 Ak chi age tugul ne kang’et, eng’ oldo tugul ole menyei, ko ingotoret bikab oldanyi chichoto eng’ feda, ak tahabu, ak tuguk, ak tuga, koboto kagochinoik che bo chamnyet agobo gotab Kamuktaindet, ne mi Jerusalem." 
Ezra1:5 King’eetyo anyun che eechen eng’ kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek che bo Juda ak Benjamin, ak tisiik, koboto Lawik, ak tugul che kiing’eet Kamuktaindet sobonwekwak kotogosta koba koteech gotab Jehovah ne mi Jerusalem." 
Ezra1:6 Ak kiigochi tugul che kimi ak ichek, tuguk che bo feda, koboto tahabu, ak tuguk, ak tuga, ak tuguk che bo kamanutiet ne o, koboto tugul che kigigoitoi eng’ chamnyet, kogimite ichek." 
Ezra1:7 Kiinem kogeny laitoriat Kirus tuguk che bo gotab Jehovah, che kiga koib Nebukadnesar eng’ Jerusalem, che kigainde gotab kanamonikyik;" 
Ezra1:8 kiib choto Kirus laitoriatab Persia, eng’ eutab Mitredat konorindet, ak koiityi Sesbasar, bounindetab Juda." 
Ezra1:9 Chu ko koitetab tuguchoto: tabok sosom che bo tahabu, tabok elfut che bo feda, ak rotok tiptem ak sogol;" 
Ezra1:10 tabok sosom che mengechen che bo tahabu, ak tabok alak che mengechen, bogol ang’wan ak taman che bo feda, ak terenik alak elfut agenge." 
Ezra1:11 Terenik tugul che bo tahabu ak feda, ko kiek elfusiek mut ak bogol ang’wan. Kiib Sesbasar chuto tugul kotogos, ye kigimutu luulenik kotogos kobunu Babulon kobwa Jerusalem." 
Ezra2:1 Chu anyun ko bikab emonoto, che kiga togos kobunu ole kiga kiluulji, che bo che kiga kiluul, che kiga luul Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon koba Babulon, che kiweek koba Jerusalem ak Juda, kiwa chi tugul nganasennyi;" 
Ezra2:2 che kigabwa koboto Serubabel, Jesua, Neemia, Seraia, Reelaia, Mordekai, Bilsan, Mispar, Bigbai, Reum, ak Baana. Koitetab murenikab bikab Israel:" 
Ezra2:3 Lagokab Paros ko ki elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol ak tamanwogik tisab ak aeng’. 
Ezra2:4 Lagokab Sepatia ko ki bogol somok ak tamanwogik tisab ak aeng’. 
Ezra2:5 Lagokab Ara ko ki bogol tisab ak tamanwogik tisab ak mut. 
Ezra2:6 Lagokab Pahat-moab, eng’ lagokab Jesua ak Joab, ko ki elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol sisiit ak taman ak aeng’." 
Ezra2:7 Lagokab Elam ko ki elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’ ak konom ak ang’wan. 
Ezra2:8 Lagokab Satu ko ki bogol sogol ak artam ak mut. 
Ezra2:9 Lagokab Sakai ko ki bogol tisab ak tamanwogik lo. 
Ezra2:10 Lagokab Bani ko ki bogol lo ak artam ak aeng’. 
Ezra2:11 Lagokab Bebai ko ki bogol lo ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:12 Lagokab Asgad ko ki elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’ ak tiptem ak aeng’. 
Ezra2:13 Lagokab Adonikam ko ki bogol lo ak tamanwogik lo ak lo. 
Ezra2:14 Lagokab Bigbai ko ki elfusiek aeng’ ak konom ak lo. 
Ezra2:15 Lagokab Adin ko ki bogol ang’wan ak konom ak ang’wan. 
Ezra2:16 Lagokab Ater, che bo Hesekia, ko ki tamanwogik sogol ak sisiit." 
Ezra2:17 Lagokab Besai ko ki bogol somok ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:18 Lagokab Jora ko ki bogol agenge ak taman ak aeng’. 
Ezra2:19 Lagokab Asum ko ki bogol aeng’ ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:20 Lagokab Gibar ko ki tamanwogik sogol ak mut. 
Ezra2:21 Lagokab Bet-lehem ko ki bogol agenge ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:22 Murenikab Netopa ko ki konom ak lo. 
Ezra2:23 Murenikab Anatot ko ki bogol agenge ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Ezra2:24 Lagokab Asmabet ko ki artam ak aeng’. 
Ezra2:25 Lagokab Kiriat-arim, Kepira, ak Beerot, ko ki bogol tisab ak artam ak somok." 
Ezra2:26 Lagokab Rama ak Geba ko ki bogol lo ak tiptem ak agenge. 
Ezra2:27 Murenikab Mikmas ko ki bogol agenge ak tiptem ak aeng’. 
Ezra2:28 Murenikab Bet-el ak Ai ko ki bogol aeng’ ak tiptem ak somok. 
Ezra2:29 Lagokab Nebo ko ki konom ak aeng’. 
Ezra2:30 Lagokab Magbis ko ki bogol agenge ak konom ak lo. 
Ezra2:31 Lagokab Elam age, ko ki elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’ ak konom ak ang’wan." 
Ezra2:32 Lagokab Harim ko ki bogol somok ak tiptem. 
Ezra2:33 Lagokab Lod, Hadid, ak Ono, ko ki bogol tisab ak tiptem ak mut." 
Ezra2:34 Lagokab Jeriko ko ki bogol somok ak artam ak mut. 
Ezra2:35 Lagokab Senaa ko ki elfusiek somok ak bogol lo ak sosom. 
Ezra2:36 Tisiik: lagokab Jedaia, che bo gotab Jesua, ko ki bogol sogol ak tamanwogik tisab ak somok." 
Ezra2:37 Lagokab Imer ko ki elfut agenge ak konom ak aeng’. 
Ezra2:38 Lagokab Pasur ko ki elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’ ak artam ak tisab. 
Ezra2:39 Lagokab Harim ko ki elfut agenge ak taman ak tisab. 
Ezra2:40 Lawik: lagokab Jesua ak Kadmiel, che bo lagokab Hodabia, ko ki tamanwogik tisab ak ang’wan." 
Ezra2:41 Tienik: lagokab Asap ko ki bogol agenge ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Ezra2:42 Lagokab ribikab kurgotik: lagokab Salum, lagokab Ater, lagokab Talmon, lagokab Akub, lagokab Hatita, lagokab Sobai, kiek tugul bogol agenge ak sosom ak sogol." 
Ezra2:43 Netinik: lagokab Siha, lagokab Hasupa, lagokab Tabaot;" 
Ezra2:44 lagokab Keros, lagokab Siaa, lagokab Padon;" 
Ezra2:45 lagokab Lebana, lagokab Hagaba, lagokab Akub;" 
Ezra2:46 lagokab Hagab, lagokab Samlai, lagokab Hanan;" 
Ezra2:47 lagokab Gidel, lagokab Gahar, lagokab Reaia;" 
Ezra2:48 lagokab Resin, lagokab Nekoda, lagokab Gasam;" 
Ezra2:49 lagokab Usa, lagokab Pasea, lagokab Besai;" 
Ezra2:50 lagokab Asna, lagokab Meunik, lagokab Nepisik;" 
Ezra2:51 lagokab Bakbuk, lagokab Hakupa, lagokab Harur;" 
Ezra2:52 lagokab Baslut; lagokab Meida, lagokab Harsa;" 
Ezra2:53 lagokab Barkos, lagokab Sisera, lagokab Tema;" 
Ezra2:54 lagokab Nesia, lagokab Hatipa." 
Ezra2:55 Lagokab otwogikab Solomon: lagokab Sotai, lagokab Hasoperet, lagokab Peruda;" 
Ezra2:56 lagokab Jaala, lagokab Darkon, lagokab Gidel;" 
Ezra2:57 lagokab Sepatia, lagokab Hatil, lagokab Pokeret-hasebaim, lagokab Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Netinik tugul, ak lagokab otwogikab Solomon, ko ki bogol somok ak tamanwogik sogol ak aeng’." 
Ezra2:59 Chu ko che kitogosta eng’ Tel-mela, Tel-harsa, Kerub, Adan, ak Imer: ago kima imuch kobor gorikab kwanisiekwak, ak iyotenywa, ngo ki bo Israel." 
Ezra2:60 Lagokab Delaia, lagokab Tobia, lagokab Nekoda, ko kiek bogol lo ak konom ak aeng’." 
Ezra2:61 Ak che bo lagokab tisiik: lagokab Habaia, lagokab Hakos, lagokab Barsilai, ne kiitun osotiot ne bo tibikab Barsilai Gileadindet, ak kigimwaitae kainenywa." 
Ezra2:62 Kicheng’ chuto kit ne kigisirji kainaikwak, kobee tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto, ago ma kinyor: amu noto kigiit koek che ng’wonen ak kigiistoe tiseinatet." 
Ezra2:63 Ak kilenji Tirsata ichek, manyoljin koam tuguk che tililen mising’, kot kobiit tisiindet ne tinyei Urim ak Tumim." 
Ezra2:64 Kiek tuiyet tugul elfusiek artam ak aeng’ ak bogol somok ak tamanwogik lo," 
Ezra2:65 ko ma boto otwogikwak che murenik ak che tibik, kiek choto elfusiek tisab ak bogol somok ak sosom ak tisab: ak kitinyei tienik che murenik ak gotab kor bogol aeng’." 
Ezra2:66 Mbartanyisiekwak ko ki bogol tisab ak sosom ak lo; ak nyumbusiekwak ko ki bogol aeng’ ak artam ak mut; 
Ezra2:67 tambesikwak ko ki bogol ang’wan ak sosom ak mut; sigirok ko ki elfusiek lo ak bogol tisab ak tiptem. 
Ezra2:68 Ak kingobwa gotab Jehovah ne mi Jerusalem, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek, kogoito tuguk eng’ chamnyet, keteege gotab Kamuktaindet eng’ ole kimi;" 
Ezra2:69 kiigoito ko u kamugenywa, darkoni elfusiek tamanwogik lo ak agenge che bo tahabu, ak ratilisiek elfusiek mut che bo feda, ak ngoroik bogol agenge che bo tisiik, koba ole kigonore tuguk." 
Ezra2:70 Komeny anyun nganasokwak tisiik, ak Lawik, ak bik alak, ak tienik, ak ribikab kurgotik, ak Netinik, ak Israel tugul eng’ nganasokwak." 
Ezra3:1 Ak kingoit arawetab tisab, ye kimi lagokab Israel nganasokwak, koyumjigei bik Jerusalem ko u chichak." 
Ezra3:2 Kotonon anyun Jesua weritab Josadak, ak tupchosiekyik tisiik, koboto Serubabel weritab Sealtiel, ak tupchosiekyik, ak koteech kaptisisiet ne bo Kamuktaindetab Israel, si kogoitoe kagochinoik che kibeelei, ko u ye sirat eng’ Ng’atutietab Musa chitab Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra3:3 Ak kiinde kaptisisiet ole tebe; amu kitinyei kaiyweisiet amu bikab emotinwek alak: ak kiigochi Jehovah kagochinoik eng’ kaptisisionoto, kagochinoik che kibeelei, karon ak koskoleny." 
Ezra3:4 Ak kirib igorta ne bo keriosiek, ko u ye sirat, ak kogoito kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ betut age tugul kobee koitenywa, ko u kayomiset, ko u ye yamei boisietab betut age tugul;" 
Ezra3:5 ak kingobata kogoito kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kagochinoik che bo ye kaleel arawet, ak che bo igorwek tugul che bo Jehovah che kiging’at che kigitaban, ak che bo chi tugul ne kiigochin Jehovah kagochinetab chamnyet." 
Ezra3:6 Kitau kogochin Jehovah kagochinoik che kibeelei eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawetab tisab: ago kitomo kelumda lumeiywekab hekalutab Jehovah. 
Ezra3:7 Kiigochi kogeny fedaisiek musogikab koik, ak che bo baoinik; ak kogochi bikab Sidon ak che bo Turo amitwogik, ak che kieei ak mwanik, si kobiit koib taragonik eng’ Lebanon kobwa nyanjet, agoi Jopa, ko u ye kiga koyanji Kirus laitoriatab Persia." 
Ezra3:8 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ngab koit gotab Kamuktaindet eng’ Jerusalem, eng’ arawet ne bo aeng’, kotoi Serubabel weritab Sealtiel, ak Jesua weritab Josadak, koboto tupchosiekwak tugul che tisiik ak Lawik, ak luulenik tugul che kiga week Jerusalem; konde Lawik, koboch che bo kenyisiek tiptem ak che siirei, korib boisiet ne bo gotab Jehovah." 
Ezra3:9 Kotonon anyun Jesua koboto werikyik ak tupchosiekyik, Kadmiel ak werikyik, werikab Juda, komi tugul korib kiboitinik eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet: werikab Henadad, koboto werikwak ak tupchosiekwak Lawik." 
Ezra3:10 Ak kingolumda teegik lumeiywotab hekalutab Jehovah, konde tisiik kolos Jehovah kolaachi ngoroikwak che bo tiseinatet, kotinyei iriagok, koboto Lawik werikab Asap che kitinyei sanisiekab sugunonik che kibirei, ko u ng’atutietab Daudi laitoriatab Israel." 
Ezra3:11 Ak kiwoljingei kotieni kolosu ak komwachin kongoi Jehovah, kolen, Amu mie inendet, amu bo koigeny rirenennyi eng’ Israel. Ak kiwaach bik tugul eng’ waagat ne o ye kiilosu Jehovah, amu kiga kelumda lumeiywotab gotab Jehovah." 
Ezra3:12 Ago kiririo eng’ kutit ne o tisiik che chang’ ak Lawik ak kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek, boisiek che kiga keer got ne ki bo tai, ye kingelumdoi lumeiywotab goito eng’ tainywa; ak kiwaach eng’ boiboiyet:" 
Ezra3:13 kot ko mata komuch bik kobesio waagat ne bo boiboiyet ak ne bo rirekab bik: amu kiwaach bik eng’ waagat ne o, ak kiit waagandanato ole loo." 
Ezra4:1 Kingogas anyun bunikab Juda ak Benjamin kole kateekyi Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, hekalut, lagokab luulenik," 
Ezra4:2 korikta anyun ole mi Serubabel, ak kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek, ak kolenji ichek, Ongeteech tugul: amu kicheng’e Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ko u okwek; ak keeng’jini inendet tiseiywek koboch betusiekab Esar-hadon laitoriatab Asuria ne kiimutwech kebwa olito." 
Ezra4:3 Ago kilenji ichek Serubabel, koboto Jesua, ak kandoik tugul che bo gorikab kwanisiek che bo Israel, Magiting’ege yamdao ak okwek keteech tugul gotab Kamuktaindennyo; ago kiteekyini achege Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, got, ko u ye king’atech laitoriat Kirus laitoriatab Persia." 
Ezra4:4 Kiigochi anyun bikab emonoto bikab Juda kochorirenso, ak koiim ichek eng’ teekset." 
Ezra4:5 Ak kisir ng’omotik che bo melekto, si kogirinda ichek kowal magenywa koek buch, eng’ betusiek tugul che bo Kirus laitoriatab Persia, agoi koit laitornatetab Darius laitoriatab Persia." 
Ezra4:6 Ak kisir bichoto kataamset agobo bik che kimenyei Juda ak Jerusalem eng’ betusiekab laitornatetab Aasuerus, eng’ taunetab laitornatennyi." 
Ezra4:7 Ak eng’ betusiekab Artaserses kosirji baruet Bislam, Mitredat, Tabeel, koboto choronokwak tugul, kosirji Artaserses laitoriandanato bo Persia; ak kigisire baruanato sirutikab Suria, ak kemwae kutitab Suria." 
Ezra4:8 Kisir anyun baruet Reum bounindetab kiruoget ak Simsai sirindet, kosirji laitoriat Artaserses, kotaam Jerusalem ko u ni:" 
Ezra4:9 kisir anyun Reum bounindetab kiruoget, ak Simsai sirindet, koboto choronokwak tugul, Dinaik, Aparsatkik, Tarpelik, Aparsik, Arkebik, Babulonik, Susankik, Deaik, ak Elamik," 
Ezra4:10 ak bororiosiek alak che kiimutu Osnaper ne o ak ko toogunot, kolong’ kobwa nganasetab Samaria, ak emet ne mi ainet bitonin." 
Ezra4:11 Chu anyun ng’alek che bo baruanato kigiyoktochin laitoriat Artaserses: Achek otwogiguk che kimi bitoni, ak alak." 
Ezra4:12 Ingonaak eng’ laitoriat kole, Yahudik che kibunu oldang’ung’ ko kogoitwech eng’ Jerusalem; teechei nganaset ne ngeleliot ak ko ya, ak kogoges irimoik, ak kogoteech kogeny lumeiywot ne kiga kobutok." 
Ezra4:13 Ingonaak nguno eng’ laitoriat kole, Ngot koteech nganasani, ak koges irimoikyik, ko ma kogoitoi kodi, ak aisurut, anan ko aisurutab tuguk, ak eng’ let, kong’em laitorinik." 
Ezra4:14 Ara anyun, amu kiame munyuk che bo gotab laitoriat, ak ma nyoljinech kegeer keng’emjin laitoriat teegisto, kagiyogu anyun amu noto kiborji laitoriat;" 
Ezra4:15 si kobiit kecheng’ eng’ bukuit ne bo ng’alekab betusiekab kwanisieguk: si kobiit inyorji bukuinoto bo ng’alekab betusiek, ak inai ile ngeleliot nganasani, ak koiimi laitorinik ak emotinwek, ak kigong’eet chaamset koboch keny: noto anyun ne kiigochi nganasanito keng’em." 
Ezra4:16 Kiborjini anyun laitoriat kelenjini, ngot keteech nganasani, ak kiges irimoik, koboru noto kole, ma itinye kebeberta eng’ ainet bitoni." 
Ezra4:17 Kiiyokyi anyun laitoriat wolunet Reum bounindetab kiruoget, ak Simsai sirindet, ak choronokwak tugul che kimenyei Samaria, ak emet tugul ne mi ainet bitonin, kole, Ingoteb kalyet ko u noto." 
Ezra4:18 Baruet ne kigooyokwech ko kagesoman komie eng’ tainnyu. 
Ezra4:19 Ak koang’at, ak kogecheng’, ak kenyor kele king’eetyo nganasanito bo keny kobistoe laitorinik, ak kogobiitune ngelelnatet ak chaamset." 
Ezra4:20 Kimitei kogeny laitorinik che ki kimen che kibou Jerusalem, che kibou emet tugul ne mi ainet bitonin; ak kigigochin kodi, ak aisurut, ak aisurutab tuguk." 
Ezra4:21 Ong’at anyun kit ne igochin bichoto kosisyo, si mata koteech nganasani, agoi tun ang’at." 
Ezra4:22 Oripge anyun si mogaege ng’olyondonoto: amu nee si kotesak ng’emisiet ne inyalili laitorinik? 
Ezra4:23 Kingo kagesoman ng’alekab baruetab laitoriat Artaserses eng’ taitab Reum, ak Simsai sirindet ak choronokwak, kochakta Jerusalem ole mi Yahudik, kwo kong’at ichek eng’ koromnatet ak kimnatet kobagakta boisiet." 
Ezra4:24 Kotonon anyun boisietab gotab Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem; ak kitonon agoi kenyit ne bo aeng’ ne bo laitornatetab Darius laitoriatab Persia. 
Ezra5:1 Kimaoten anyun maotichu, maotiot Hagai, ak Sekaria weritab Ido, komaotenji Yahudik che kimi Juda ak Jerusalem, eng’ kainetab Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Ezra5:2 Kong’eet anyun Serubabel weritab Sealtiel, ak Jesua weritab Josadak; ak kotoi koteech gotab Kamuktaindet ne mi Jerusalem; ak kimi koboto ichek maotikab Kamuktaindet, kotoret." 
Ezra5:3 Kinyonji ichek eng’ betusiechoto, Tatenai ne ki bounindet eng’ ainet bitonin, ak Setar-bosenai, ak choronokwak, ak komwachi ko u ni, kolenji, King’atak ng’o oteech goi, ak oges inatuni?" 
Ezra5:4 Kemwachi anyun ko u ni kelenji, Ng’o kainaikab bik che teechei goi?" 
Ezra5:5 Ago kigeer konyekab Kamuktaindenywa boisiekab Yahudik, ak ma mwachi ichek kobagach boisionoto, kot koit ng’olyot oldab Darius, ak keweech wolunet eng’ baruet agobo ng’olyondonito." 
Ezra5:6 Chu ng’alekab baruet ne kiiyokto Tatenai bounindet ne bo ainet bitonin, ak Setar- bosenai, ak choronokyik Aparsakitik, che kimi ainet bitonin, koyokyi laitoriat Darius:" 
Ezra5:7 kiiyokyi inendet baruet, ne kigisir ko u ni: Kisirjini laitoriat Darius, kalyet tugul." 
Ezra5:8 Ingonaak eng’ laitoriat kole, kigibe emetab Juda, agoi gotab Kamuktaindet ne o, ne kigiteege koik che eechen, ak kiginde baoinik inatusiek, ak wendi tai boisioni eng’ kagiiletab ge ak koberurot eng’ eunekwak." 
Ezra5:9 Kigiteebe anyun boisiechoto, kelenji, King’atak ng’o oteech goi, ak oges inatuni?" 
Ezra5:10 Kigiteebe kainaikwak kogeny, si kobiit kiborun, si kimuch kesir kainaikab bik che kiindochin ichek." 
Ezra5:11 Ak kiwolwech anyun ko u ni, kole, Ki otwogikab Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet ak ng’ony, ak kiteeche got ne kiga keteech eng’ kenyisiechu chang’ kigosiirto, ne kiteechei laitoriat ne o ne bo Israel ak koges." 
Ezra5:12 Ago kingo kagotach kwanisiekyok Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet kot konerech, konde ichek eutab Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon, Kaldeindet, ne king’em goi, ak komut bik koba Babulon." 
Ezra5:13 Ago eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo Kirus laitoriatab Babulon, kong’at laitoriat Kirus keteech goi bo Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra5:14 Ak kiinem laitoriat Kirus, eng’ hekalutab Babulon, terenikab tahabu ak che bo feda agichek che bo gotab Kamuktaindet, che kiga ib Nebukadnesar eng’ hekalut ne kimi Jerusalem, kobwa hekalutab Babulon, ak kigigochi chito age ne kiguure Sesbasar, ne kiga koeet inendet koek bounindet;" 
Ezra5:15 ak kilenji inendet, Ib terenichu, ak iwe hekalut ne mi Jerusalem, ak ingeteech gotab Kamuktaindet eng’ ole kimi yeginye." 
Ezra5:16 Kinyo anyun Sesbasar nito, ak kolum lumeiywekab gotab Kamuktaindet ne mitei Jerusalem: ak koboch betusiechoto agoi ra, keteechei kora, ago tomo kogesgei." 
Ezra5:17 Ara anyun, ngot kogeer laitoriat kole mie, kecheng’ eng’ got ne kigonore tugukab laitoriat, ne mi oloto bo Babulon, si kegeer ngo u noto, ngo king’at laitoriat Kirus keteech goito bo Kamuktaindet eng’ Jerusalem, ak ingoyokwech laitoriat ng’olyot komwawech kit ne chamei eng’ ng’olyondonito." 
Ezra6:1 King’at anyun laitoriat Darius, ak kigicheng’ got ne bo bukuisiek, ole kigigonore tuguk eng’ Babulon." 
Ezra6:2 Ak kiginyorji bukuit Akmeta, eng’ gotab laitoriat ne mi emetab Media, ne kigisir ko u ni koek kabwatet." 
Ezra6:3 Eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo laitoriat Kirus, koyai Kirus ng’atutiet agobo gotab Kamuktaindet eng’ Jerusalem, kole, Ngeteech got, ole kigoitoe tiseiywek, ak kelumda lumeiywekyik kouuegitu; ingoek koindab tononennyi kakwautik tamanwogik lo che bo eut, ak tebeesindanyi kakwautik tamanwogik lo che bo eut;" 
Ezra6:4 koboto ortinwek somok che bo koik che eechen, ak oret agenge ne bo baoinik che leelach: ak ingobun gotab laitoriat tuguk che keyaaktoe tuguchoto:" 
Ezra6:5 ak ingeweekta kogeny terenik che bo tahabu ak che bo feda che bo gotab Kamuktaindet, che kiga ib Nebukadnesar eng’ hekalut ne kimi Jerusalem, kobwa Babulon, ak ingeib kogeny koba hekalut ne mi Jerusalem, ak kiinde kit age tugul komostanyi, ak inde gotab Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra6:6 Ara anyun inye Tatenai bounindetab ainet bitonin, ak Setar-bosenai, ak choronoguk Aparsakitik, che mi ainet bitonin, oistoege:" 
Ezra6:7 oistoege boisietab gotab Kamuktaindet; ingoteech bounindetab Yahudik koboto boisiekab Yahudik, goyoto bo Kamuktaindet eng’ ole kimi yekinye." 
Ezra6:8 Kang’at kogeny agobo kit ne oyachini boisiechoto bo Yahudik agobo teeksetab goito bo Kamuktaindet: ale kigochi bichoto eng’ kagiiletab ge, tuguk che kiyaaktoi che bo laitoriat, che tugukab aisurut eng’ ainet bitonin, si ma kigirinda ichek." 
Ezra6:9 Ak tuguk che makyingei, ko u kirugik che mengechen, ak mengichik, ak arekab kechir, koek kagochinoik che kibeeljin Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet, nganok, munyuk, divaik, ak mwanik, ko u eng’ ng’olyotab tisiik che mi Jerusalem, ingigochi ichek betut age tugul amat kele mami:" 
Ezra6:10 si kobiit kogochi Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet korosekab nyamdutik che anyiny, ak kosa agobo sobondab laitoriat, ak werikyik." 
Ezra6:11 Kang’at kogeny ale, chi age tugul ne walei ng’olyondonito ko ingeng’us bambaniat eng’ gonnyi, ak keganapchi inendet ak keratyi ketoto; ak keyai gonnyi koek kapng’atat agobo nito:" 
Ezra6:12 ak kobar Kamuktaindet ne kiinde kainennyi komeny oloto, laitorinik tugul ak bik tugul, che iitoi eunekwak kole kowal ng’olyondonoto, kong’em gotab Kamuktaindet ne mitei Jerusalem. Kaang’at ane Darius; ingoyaak ng’atutionito eng’ kagiiletab ge tugul." 
Ezra6:13 Kiyai anyun ko u noto kochokyi Tatenai, bounindetab ainet bitonin, koboto Setar-bosenai, ak choronokwak, amu kiga koyokto bik laitoriat Darius." 
Ezra6:14 Ak kiteekso anyun boisiekab Yahudik ak kobor, eng’ maoinatetab maotiot Hagai ak Sekaria weritab Ido. Ak kiteekso, ak kiiges, ko u ng’atutietab Kamuktaindetab Israel, ak ko u ng’atutietab Kirus, ak Darius, ak Artaserses laitoriatab Persia." 
Ezra6:15 Ak kigiges goyoto eng’ betut ne bo somok eng’ arawetab Adar, ne ki bo kenyit ne bo lo eng’ laitornatetab laitoriat Darius." 
Ezra6:16 Ak kiitaban eng’ boiboiyet lagokab Israel, tisiik koboto Lawik, ak lagok tugul che ki luulenik che kiweeksei, goyoto bo Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra6:17 Ak kiigoito kirugik bogol agenge, mengichik bogol aeng’, arekab kechir bogol ang’wan eng’ betutab katabanetab goyoto bo Kamuktaindet; ak kiigoito kwesik taman ak aeng’ koek kagochinetab tengekto agobo Israel tugul, kobee koitetab ortinwekab Israel." 
Ezra6:18 Ak kiinde tisiik ko u pcheutikwak, ak Lawik ko u ripsosiekwak, agobo otisietab Kamuktaindet, ne mi Jerusalem; ko u ye sirat eng’ bukuitab Musa." 
Ezra6:19 Ak kirib paska lagokab luulenik eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawet ne bo tai. 
Ezra6:20 Amu kiga koanyinygei tisiik ak Lawik tugul; ki tililen tugul: ak kieny aruetab paska agobo lagok tugul che bo luulenik, ak agobo tupchosiekwak tisiik, ak agobo icheget." 
Ezra6:21 Ak kiam paska lagokab Israel che kiweeksei kobunu ole kiga kiluulji, ak tugul che kiga istoegei simdab bororiosiekab emonoto, kocheng’ Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel," 
Ezra6:22 ak korib eng’ boiboiyet igorta ne bo makatinik che ma kinde mermerek betusiek tisab: amu kiigochi Jehovah ichek koboiboitu, ak kiwal muguleldab laitoriatab Asuria kotokyigei ichek, si kogimit ichek eng’ boisietab gotab Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Ezra7:1 Ak kingobata tuguchu, eng’ laitornatetab Artaserses laitoriatab Persia, kotogosta Esra weritab Seraia, weritab Asaria, weritab Hilkia," 
Ezra7:2 weritab Salum, weritab Sadok, weritab Aitub," 
Ezra7:3 weritab Amaria, weritab Asaria, weritab Meraiot," 
Ezra7:4 weritab Seraia, weritab Usi, weritab Buki," 
Ezra7:5 weritab Abisua, weritab Pineas, weritab Eleasar, weritab Aron tisiindet ne o:" 
Ezra7:6 kotogosta anyun Esra nito eng’ Babulon; ak ki sirindet ne ng’om eng’ Ng’atutikab Musa, che kiga kogochi Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel: ak kichamji laitoriat somennyi tugul, ko u ye kimi eutab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi, baragunnyi." 
Ezra7:7 Ak kitogosta alak che bo lagokab Israel, ak che bo tisiik, ak Lawik, ak tienik, koboto ribikab kurgotik, ak Netinik, kobwa Jerusalem, eng’ kenyit ne bo tisab ne bo laitoriat Artaserses." 
Ezra7:8 Ak kiit Esra Jerusalem eng’ arawet ne bo mut, ne ki kenyit ne bo tisab ne bo laitoriat." 
Ezra7:9 Amu kitoi kotogos eng’ Babulon eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawet ne bo tai, ak eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawetab mut, koit Jerusalem, ko u ye kimi ak inendet eut ne mie ne bo Kamuktaindennyi." 
Ezra7:10 Amu kiga kogiil Esra muguleldanyi kocheng’ ng’atutikab Jehovah, ak koyai, ak konet eng’ Israel kayomisutik ak kiruogutik." 
Ezra7:11 Chu ng’alek che bo baruet ne kiigochi laitoriat Artaserses Esra tisiindet, ak ko sirindet, sirindetab ng’alekab ng’atutik che bo Jehovah, ak ko bo kayomisutik che kiigochinoti Israel:" 
Ezra7:12 Ane, Artaserses, laitoriatab laitorinik, asirjini Esra tisiindet, sirindetab ng’atutikab Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet, ne igesunotgei ak ko u noto." 
Ezra7:13 Kang’at ale, Oba, tugul ak tugul che bo bikab Israel ak Lawik, che mi bounatennyu, che chamei koba Jerusalem eng’ magenywa." 
Ezra7:14 Amu kagoyokten laitoriat ak kiruogikyik tisab iwe iteeb agobo Juda ak Jerusalem, ko u ng’atutietab Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne mi koboten;" 
Ezra7:15 ak iib feda ak tahabu, che kiigochi laitoriat ak kiruogikyik Kamuktaindetab Israel eng’ chamnyet, ne mi meng’otennyi, Jerusalem," 
Ezra7:16 koboto feda tugul ak tahabu che inyorjini emet tugul ne bo Babulon, koboto kagochinet ne bo chamnyet ne bo bik ak ne bo tisiik, kogoitoi eng’ chamnyet agobo gotab Kamuktaindenywa ne mi Jerusalem;" 
Ezra7:17 noto anyun ial eng’ fedaisiechu eng’ kagiiletab ge, kirugik, mengichik, arekab kechir, koboto kagochinoikwak che bo busiek ak kagochinoikwak che kieei, ak igoite choto eng’ kaptisisietab gotab Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ne mi Jerusalem." 
Ezra7:18 Ak kit age tugul ne igeere inye ak tupchosieguk ole mie oyae fedaisiek tugul che kang’et, ak tahabu, oyae ko u magetab Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Ezra7:19 Ak igoite eng’ taitab Kamuktaindetab Jerusalem terenik che kigonin agobo otisietab gotab Kamuktaindeng’ung’. 
Ezra7:20 Ak kit age tugul ne ta kemakyin gotab Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne kanyol igoite, igoite eng’ tuguk che konorotin che bo gotab laitoriat." 
Ezra7:21 Ang’ate ane, laitoriat Artaserses, konoraik tugul che bo tuguk, che mi ainet bitonin, ale, kit age tugul ne ta komagenok Esra tisiindet, sirindetab ng’atutikab Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet, keyai eng’ kagiiletab ge," 
Ezra7:22 kot koit talentaisiek bogol che bo feda, ak kerutik bogol che bo nganok, ak divaik che yamegei ak debeisiek bogol aeng’, ak mwanik che yamegei ak debeisiek bogol aeng’, ak munyuk che ma kimwa ole te." 
Ezra7:23 Ak kit age tugul ne ng’atei Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet, koyaak ko u noto agobo gotab Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet, amu nee si ko tos nyonji nereknatet bounatetab laitoriat ak werikyik?" 
Ezra7:24 Kiboruok kogeny kele, ma chamdaat eng’ ng’atutik kogoito kodi, anan aisurut, anan ko aisurut ne bo tuguk, age tugul eng’ tisiik ak Lawik, ak tienik, ak ribikab kurgotik, ak Netinik, anan ko otwogikab gotab Kamuktaindet." 
Ezra7:25 Lewen inye Esra ko u ng’omnatetab Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne mi eung’ung’, kiruogik ak bounik che imuchi koboi bik tugul che mi ainet bitonin, ichek tugul che ingen ng’atutikab Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak onet inendet ne maingen." 
Ezra7:26 Ak age tugul ne machamei koyai ng’atutikab Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak ng’atutikab laitoriat, kiruokyi inendet eng’ kagiiletab ge tugul, ngo bo meet, anan ngo bo kang’etoet, anan ngo kerebe tuguk, anan ngo ratisiet." 
Ezra7:27 Iberurot Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyok, ne kiinde ng’olyot ne u ni muguleldab laitoriat, si kochob gotab Jehovah ne mi Jerusalem kogararanit:" 
Ezra7:28 ak kigoitwa ak ane rirenet eng’ taitab laitoriat ak kiruogikyik ak eng’ taitab bounik tugul che kimen che bo laitoriat. Ak kigigimita ko u ye kimi kobota eutab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, ak kiayum, eng’ Israel bik che toogunotin ketogoste tugul." 
Ezra8:1 Chu ko kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekwak, ak chu ko tetutikab ibinwekwak che kigosiirto, che kigitogosu tugul eng’ Babulon, eng’ betusiekab laitornatetab laitoriat Artaserses." 
Ezra8:2 Eng’ werikab Pineas, ko Gersom: eng’ werikab Itamar, ko Daniel: eng’ werikab Daudi, ko Hatus." 
Ezra8:2 Eng’ werikab Pineas, ko Gersom: eng’ werikab Itamar, ko Daniel: eng’ werikab Daudi, ko Hatus." 
Ezra8:3 Eng’ werikab Sekania, eng’ werikab Paros, ko Sekaria: ak kigiitito inendet murenik bogol ak konom eng’ tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto." 
Ezra8:4 Eng’ werikab Pahat-moab, ko Eliehoenai weritab Seraia; ak kimi koboto inendet murenik bogolwogik aeng’u." 
Ezra8:5 Eng’ werikab Sekania ko weritab Jahasiel; ak kimi koboto inendet murenik bogolwogik somogu. 
Ezra8:6 Ak eng’ werikab Adin, ko Ebed weritab Jonatan; ak kimi koboto inendet murenik konomu." 
Ezra8:7 Ak eng’ werikab Elam, ko Jesaia weritab Atalia; ak kimi koboto inendet murenik tamanwogik tisabu." 
Ezra8:8 Ak eng’ werikab Sepatia, ko Sebadia weritab Mikael; ak kimi koboto inendet murenik tamanwogik sisiitu." 
Ezra8:9 Eng’ werikab Joab, ko Obadia weritab Jehiel; ak kimi koboto inendet murenik bogolwogik aeng’u ak taman ak sisiit." 
Ezra8:10 Ak eng’ werikab Selomit, ko weritab Josipia; ak kimi koboto inendet murenik bogolut agenge ak tamanwogik lo." 
Ezra8:11 Ak eng’ werikab Bebai, ko Sekaria weritab Bebai; ak kimi koboto inendet murenik tiptemu ak sisiit." 
Ezra8:12 Ak eng’ werikab Asgad, ko Johanan weritab Hakatan; ak kimi koboto inendet murenik bogolut agenge ak taman." 
Ezra8:13 Ak eng’ werikab Adonikam, che bo let; ak chu kainaikwak, Elipelet, Jeuel, ak Semaia, ak kimi koboto ichek murenik tamanwogik lo." 
Ezra8:14 Ak eng’ werikab Bigbai, ko Utai ak Sabud; kimi koboto ichek murenik tamanwogik tisabu." 
Ezra8:15 Ak kiayumji ichek ainet ne rootyin Ahaba; ak kigitebe yoto betusiek somok: ak kiageerote bik, ak tisiik, ak ma anyoru werikab Lawi." 
Ezra8:16 Kiayokte anyun keguur Elieser, Ariel, Semaia, Elnatan, Jarib, Elnatan, Natan, Sekaria, ak Mesulam, bik che eechen; ak kogeny Joiarib, ak Elnatan, che ki konetik." 
Ezra8:17 Ak kiayokte ichek koba oldab Ido ne ki o eng’ ole kiguure Kasipia; ak amwachi kit ne kanyol komwachi Ido, ak tupchosiekyik Netinik, eng’ komosato bo Kasipia, si komutwech kiboitinik che bo gotab Kamuktaindennyo." 
Ezra8:18 Ak ko u ye kimi kobotech eut ne mie ne bo Kamuktaindennyo, komutwech chito ne tinyei naet, ne bo werikab Mali, weritab Lawi, weritab Israel; ak Serebia, koboto werikyik ak tupchosiekyik, taman ak sisiit;" 
Ezra8:19 ak Hasabia, ak kimi koboto inendet Jesaia ne bo werikab Merari, tupchosiekyik ak werikwak, tiptem:" 
Ezra8:20 ak eng’ Netinik, che kiga konde Daudi ak bounik agobo otisietab Lawik, Netinik bogol aeng’ ak tiptem: kigimwa tugul eng’ kainaikwak." 
Ezra8:21 Ang’at anyun karugutetab ge, eng’ ainetab Ahaba, si kobiit kiming’inge eng’ taitab Kamuktaindennyo, kecheng’ eng’ inendet oret ne litit, eng’ achek, ak lagokyok, ak ne bo tugukyok tugul." 
Ezra8:22 Amu kialilan asom laitoriat kweanet ne bo askarik, ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek si kotoretech kegirinde bunik che mi oret: amu kiga kemwachi laitoriat, kelenji, Mi eutab Kamuktaindennyo koboto ichek tugul che cheng’ei inendet, koyachi ne mie; ago kirindoi kimnatennyi ak nereknatennyi bik tugul che metoi inendet." 
Ezra8:23 Kigirugutge anyun ak kesa Kamuktaindennyo agobo nito; ak kigaswech. 
Ezra8:24 Kiataban anyun taman ak aeng’ che eechen eng’ tisiik, icheget ko ki Serebia ak Hasabia, ak kimi koboto ichek tamanu eng’ tupchosiekwak," 
Ezra8:25 ak kiagerji ichek feda, ak tahabu, ak terenik, ak kagochinetab gotab Kamuktaindennyo, che kiga kogon laitoriat, ak kiruogikyik, ak bounikyik, ak Israel tugul che kimi yoto:" 
Ezra8:26 kiagerji ichek talentaisiek bogol lo ak konom che bo feda, ak tuguk che bo feda che yamei talentaisiek bogol; ak tahabu che yamei talentaisiek bogol;" 
Ezra8:27 ak tabok tiptem che bo tahabu, che yamei darkoni elfut agenge; ak terenik aeng’ che bo sugunonik, che miachen, che lilei bich, che tinyei kamanutiet ne u ne bo tahabu." 
Ezra8:28 Ak kialenji ichek, O tililen eng’ Jehovah, ak ko tililen terenik; ak feda ak tahabu ko kagochinoikab chamnyet che kigochin Jehovah Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwok." 
Ezra8:29 Oripse, ak orib tuguchoto, agoi ogeer eng’ taitab che eechen eng’ tisiik ak Lawik, ak bounikab gorikab kwanisiekwok che bo Israel, eng’ Jerusalem, eng’ gorik che bo orit eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
Ezra8:30 Kitaach anyun tisiik ak Lawik ole ki te nyigisindab feda ak tahabu, ak terenik, si koib kobwa Jerusalem gotab Kamuktaindennyo." 
Ezra8:31 Kebe anyun eng’ ainetab Ahaba eng’ betutab taman ak aeng’ ne bo arawet ne bo tai, kebe Jerusalem: ak kimi kobotech eutab Kamuktaindennyo, ak kisoruech eng’ eutab bunyot, ak ne kisapchinech eng’ oret." 
Ezra8:32 Ak kigibwa Jerusalem, ak ketebe yoto betusiek somok." 
Ezra8:33 Ak eng’ betut ne bo ang’wan ko kigiger feda ak tahabu ak terenik eng’ gotab Kamuktaindennyo, kigigochi Meremot weritab Uria tisiindet; ak kimi koboto inendet Eleasar weritab Pineas; ak kimi koboto ichek Josabad weritab Jesua, ak Noadia weritab Binui, Lawik;" 
Ezra8:34 kigiit tuguk tugul ak keger: ak kigisir ole ki te nyigisindo eng’ betunoto. 
Ezra8:35 Kiigoito lagokab luulenik, che kiweeksei eng’ ole kigiluulji, kagochinoik che kibeelei, kogochi Kamuktaindetab Israel, kirugik taman ak aeng’ agobo Israel tugul, mengichik tamanwogik sogol ak lo, arekab kechir tamanwogik tisab ak tisab, kwesik taman ak aeng’, koek kagochinetab tengekto: kiek chuto tugul kagochinet ne kibeeljin Jehovah." 
Ezra8:36 Ak kiigochi ng’atutikab laitoriat kandoikab laitoriat ak bounik che mi ainet bitonin: ak kitoret bik ak gotab Kamuktaindet. 
Ezra9:1 Kingo kagoyaak tuguchu, korik kandoik ole ami, kole, Ma itabanegei bikab Israel ak tisiik ak Lawik bikab emotinwek, yaei tuguk che kiwechei, che bo Kananik, Hitik, Perisik, Jebusik, Amonik, Moabik, Misrik, ak Amorik." 
Ezra9:2 Amu kigotun tibikwak ak kotunji werikwak; kot koburuigei keswot ne tilil ak bikab emotinwek, ee, che kiindochin bistoonito ko ki kandoik ak bounik." 
Ezra9:3 Ak kingagas ng’olyondoni, abet ngoriennyu ne bo orit ak ne bo barak, ak ang’ei sumeekyuk ak atut tamnennyu, ak atebi ng’ony akwong’." 
Ezra9:4 Kiiyumjagei anyun chi age tugul ne kibotani agobo ng’alekab Kamuktaindetab Israel, agobo bistoetab che kiga kiluul; ak atebi ng’ony akwong’ kot koit kagoitoetab kagochinetab koskoleny." 
Ezra9:5 Ak kiang’eet eng’ kaming’inennyu bo ge ye kigigoitoi kagochinetab koskoleny, ko kaabet ngoriennyu ne bo orit ak ne bo barak; ak kiagutuny, ak aiitochi eunekyuk Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu;" 
Ezra9:6 ak ale, Ee Kamuktaindennyu, alilani mising’ ak kagowalak togennyu kot ko mamuch anyalin, inye, Kamuktaindennyu: amu kogotesak tengekwogikyok kot ko maluuchech ak kigoeet ng’ogistanyo kot koit kipsengwetisiek." 
Ezra9:7 Kigeegu kiptengeginik mising’ koboch betusiekab kwanisiekyok agoi rani; ak kigindeech eunekab laitorinik che bo emotinwek, agobo tengekwogikyok achek, ak laitorinikyok, ak tisiikyok, kebarech eng’ rotwetab chok, keluulech, ak ng’emisiet, ak kalilanet, ko u rani." 
Ezra9:8 Kagiboruech anyun nguno eng’ boroini ming’in mieindo ne bunu Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, kot kotuukwech alak kochililso, ak kogonech tigongiot eng’ oldanyi ne tilil, si kokweng’wech konyekyok Kamuktaindennyo, ak kogonech kasoobet ne ming’in eng’ ratisiennyo." 
Ezra9:9 Amu ki otwogik; ago ma bagakyech Kamuktaindennyo ratisiennyo, ago kiityech rirenet eng’ taitab laitorinikab Persia, si kogonech kasoobet, si kelumda gotab Kamuktaindennyo, ak keteech ole kigong’emak eng’ goyoto, ak kegonech irimet eng’ Juda ak Jerusalem." 
Ezra9:10 Ara anyun, ee, Kamuktaindennyo, ta kemwae nee kogeny? Amu kigemete ng’atutiguk," 
Ezra9:11 che kigeng’at eng’ otwogiguk maotik, ile, Ma tilil emet ne obendi oname kobunjok, amu simwekab bik che bo emotinwek, eng’ tugukwak che kiwechei che kigonyiit ng’wanindanywa emet kong’eete tabanda age agoi tabanda age." 
Ezra9:12 Amogochi anyun tibikwok werikwak, anan kotun werikwok tibikwak, anan ocheng’ kalyenywa anan ko borotenywa koigeny: si kobiit ogimegitu, ak oam ruratetab emet, ak obagakyi lagokwok koek borotenywa koigeny." 
Ezra9:13 Ak amu kigobwanjech choto tugul amu boisionikyok che yaach, ak ng’ogistanyo ne o, amu ma ibirech inye Kamuktaindennyo ko u ye yamegei ak tengekwogikyok, ak kiigonech chu ng’etunotin," 
Ezra9:14 tos, kibut kogeny ng’atutiguk, ak kenamge ak bik che yaei tuguchu kiwechei? Ko tos menerekyinech kot igeswech, kot ko mami che ng’etu, anan che chilildos?" 
Ezra9:15 Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, i bo iman; amu ki bik che kigeng’etu, che kichililso, ko u rani: keero, kimi taing’ung’ eng’ ng’ogistanyo; amu mami ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taing’ung’ amu nito." 
Ezra10:1 Ak ye kita kosaei Esra, ak kong’anyei chalwogik, ak korirei ak kowirjingei ng’ony eng’ taitab gotab Kamuktaindet, koyumjigei inendet tuiyet ne o mising’ ne kibunu Israel, ne bo murenik ak kwonyik ak lagok: amu kiririo bik eng’ ng’wanindo." 
Ezra10:2 Ak kiwolji Sekania weritab Jehiel, weritab Elam, Esra, kolenji, Kigichililji Kamuktaindennyo, ak kigitun tibik che toek che bo bikab emoni: ago mi nguno kamang’unet agobo Israel agobo ng’olyondonito." 
Ezra10:3 Ongiyomisge anyun ak Kamuktaindennyo keiste osotik tugul ak lagok che kisichei osotichoto, ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’ inye kiptaiyandennyu, ak ne bo icheget che kabotanso amu ng’atutietab Kamuktaindennyo; ak ingoyaak ko u ng’atutiet." 
Ezra10:4 Ng’eet anyun; amu neng’ung’ ng’olyondonito, ak kimi koboten: nyiganitu, ak iyai." 
Ezra10:5 Kong’eet anyun Esra, ak kong’at che eechen eng’ tisiik, ak Lawik, ak Israel tugul, koyosio kole yaei ko u ng’olyondonito. Koyosio anyun." 
Ezra10:6 Kong’eet anyun Esra eng’ taitab gotab Kamuktaindet, ak kwo got ne bo orit ne bo Jeohanan weritab Eliasib: ak kingoit yoto, koma koamis, anan koee beek: amu kirirei agobo kachililutietab ichek che kiga kiluul." 
Ezra10:7 Ak kimwaita eng’ Juda tugul ak Jerusalem, komwachi lagok tugul che bo bik che kiga kiluul, si kobiit koyumjigei Jerusalem." 
Ezra10:8 Ak age tugul ne ma nyo ko kagobata betusiek somogu, ko u ng’olyotab bounik ak boisiek, kerebe tugukyik tugul, ak kitabane tuiyetab bichoto kiga kiluul." 
Ezra10:9 Kiiyumjigei anyun Jerusalem bik tugul che bo Juda ak Benjamin kotomo kogesgei betusiek somogu; ki arawetab sogol, eng’ betutab tiptem ne bo arawanato: ak kitebe bik tugul komosta ne baraa eng’ taitab gotab Kamuktaindet, kobotandos agobo ng’olyondonoto, ak ropta ne o." 
Ezra10:10 Kotonon anyun Esra tisiindet, ak kolenji ichek, Kiochiliil, ak kiotun tibik che toek, otes ng’ogistab Israel." 
Ezra10:11 Ong’ang’ji anyun Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekwok, ak oyai kit ne chamei: ak otabange bikab emet, ak kwonyik che toek." 
Ezra10:12 Kiwol anyun tuiyet tugul eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Ko u ye kaimwa agobo achek, konyoljinech keyai." 
Ezra10:13 Ago chang’ bik, ak betusiekab ropta ne o, ama kimuchi ketononse eng’ sang’, ama boisietab betut agenge nito anan aeng’: amu kigichiliil mising’ eng’ kiito." 
Ezra10:14 Ingelewen anyun bounikyok agobo tuiyet tugul, ak ingobwa ichek tugul che mi nganasokyok che kiitun tibik che toek, ingobwa eng’ betusiek che king’atei, ak ingobwa koboto ichek boisiekab nganaset age tugul, ak kiruogikyik, agoi koistoeneigei neregek che koromen che bo Kamuktaindennyo, kot keisto boisionito." 
Ezra10:15 Jonatan weritab Asael ak Jaseia weritab Tikba ichegei che kitononso kogirinda ng’olyondonito: ak kitoret ichek Mesulam ak Sabetai Lawindet. 
Ezra10:16 Ak kiyai ko u noto lagokab bik che kiga kiluul. Ak kigitaban tisiindet Esra, koboto kandoik alak che bo gorikab kwanisiek, kobee gorikab kwanisiekwak, ak ichek tugul ko u kainaikwak; ak kitebi ng’ony eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawetab taman kogin ng’alechato." 
Ezra10:17 Ak kiiges eng’ betut ne bo tai eng’ arawet ne bo tai ng’alek tugul che bo murenik che kiga kotun tibik che toek. 
Ezra10:18 Ak kibiit eng’ werikab tisiik che kiga kotun tibik che toek: eng’ werikab Jesua, weritab Josedak, ak tupchosiekyik, ko ki Maaseia, Elieser, Jarib, ak Gedalia." 
Ezra10:19 Ak kiiyosio kole istoi osotikwak; ak amu kitinyei tengekto, ko kiigoito mengit ne bo akwet kobunji tengektanywa." 
Ezra10:20 Ak eng’ werikab Imer ko ki Hanani ak Sebadia. 
Ezra10:21 Ak eng’ werikab Harim ko ki Maaseia, Elija, Semaia, Jehiel, ak Usia." 
Ezra10:22 Ak eng’ werikab Pasur ko ki Elioenai, Maaseia, Ismael, Netanel, Josabad, ak Elasa." 
Ezra10:23 Ak eng’ Lawik ko ki Josabad, Simei, Kelaia (inendet Kelita), Petaia, Juda, ak Elieser." 
Ezra10:24 Ak eng’ tienik ko ki Eliasib: ak eng’ ribikab kurgotik ko ki Salum, Telem, ak Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Ak eng’ Israel: eng’ werikab Paros ko ki Ramia, Isia, Malkija, Mijamin, Eleasar, Malkija, ak Benaia." 
Ezra10:26 Ak eng’ werikab Elam ko ki Matania, Sekaria, Jehiel, Abdi, Jeremot, ak Elija." 
Ezra10:27 Ak eng’ werikab Satu ko ki Elioenai, Eliasib, Matania, Jeremot, Sabad, ak Asisa." 
Ezra10:28 Ak eng’ werikab Bebai ko ki Jeohanan, Hanania, Sabai, Atlai." 
Ezra10:29 Ak eng’ werikab Bani ko ki Mesulam, Maluk, Adaia, Jasub, Seal ak Jeremot." 
Ezra10:30 Ak eng’ werikab Pahat-moab ko ki Adna, Kelal, Benaia, Maaseia, Matania, Besalel, Binui, ak Manase." 
Ezra10:31 Ak eng’ werikab Harim ko ki Elieser, Isija, Malkija, Semaia, Shimeon;" 
Ezra10:32 Benjamin, Maluk, Semaria." 
Ezra10:33 Eng’ werikab Asum ko ki Matenai, Matata, Sabad, Elipelet, Jeremai, Manase, Simei." 
Ezra10:34 Eng’ werikab Bani ko ki Maadai, Amram, ak Uel;" 
Ezra10:35 Benaia, Bedeia, Kelui;" 
Ezra10:36 Bania, Meremot, Eliasib;" 
Ezra10:37 Matania, Matenai, ak Jaasu;" 
Ezra10:38 ak Bani, Binui, Simei;" 
Ezra10:39 ak Selemia, Natan, Adaia;" 
Ezra10:40 Maknadebai, Sasai, Sarai;" 
Ezra10:41 Asarel, Selemia, Semaria;" 
Ezra10:42 Salum, Amaria, Josep." 
Ezra10:43 Eng’ werikab Nebo ko ki Jeiel, Matitia, Sabad, Sebina, Ido, Joel, ak Benaia." 
Ezra10:43 Eng’ werikab Nebo ko ki Jeiel, Matitia, Sabad, Sebina, Ido, Joel, ak Benaia." 
Ezra10:44 Kiga kotun chuto tugul tibik che toek; ak kitinyei alak osotik che kiga kosikyi lagok. 
Nehemiah1:1 Ng’alekab Neemia weritab Hakalia. Ak eng’ arawetab Kisleb, eng’ kenyitab tiptem, ye kiami Susan eng’ gab laitoriat," 
Nehemiah1:2 konyo Hanani, age eng’ tupchosiekyuk, inendet ak bik alak che kibunu Juda; ak kiateebe ichek agobo Yahudik che kiga kochililso, che king’et eng’ che kiga keluul, ak agobo Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah1:3 Ak kimwawa kole, Tinyei nyalilda ne o, ak churisiet eng’ emonoto, bik che king’et eng’ che kiga keluul: ak kigobutok agine irimetab Jerusalem, ak kigebeel ormarichokyik." 
Nehemiah1:4 Ak kingagas ng’alechuto, ateb ng’ony arir, ak aarogen eng’ betusiek alak; ak kiarugutge asa eng’ taitab Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet," 
Nehemiah1:5 ak ale, Asain, ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet, Kamuktaindet ne o ne bo kamuiset, ne ribei arorutiet ak rirenet eng’ icheget che chamei inendet, ak koribei ng’atutikyik:" 
Nehemiah1:6 ingoeb it itiguk, ak koyatogis konyeguk, si kobiit igas saetab otwogindeng’ung’, ne asain eng’ saini, bet ak kemoi, agobo lagokab Israel otwogiguk, ye ang’anye tengekwogikab lagokab Israel, che kigeyaun: ee, kiayai tengekto koboto gotab kwandanyu." 
Nehemiah1:7 Kigeyaun ne ya mising’, ama kirib ng’atutik, anan kayomisutik, anan kiruogutik, che kiing’at otwogindeng’ung’ Musa." 
Nehemiah1:8 Asain ale, ibwat ng’olyot ne kiing’at otwogindeng’ung’ Musa, ilenji, Ngot obistoe, aiyestook obe oldab bororiosiek:" 
Nehemiah1:9 ago ngot oweekyage, ak orib ng’atutikyuk ak oyai, ko agot ngo kigiyestochok tabandab kipsengwet, ayumi kobwa eng’ oloto, ak amutu kobwa ole kialewen ande kainennyu kotebe." 
Nehemiah1:10 Ara anyun chuto ko otwogiguk ak ko biguk, che kiitiach eng’ kamuktaeng’ung’ ne o, ak eng’ eung’ung’ ne kim." 
Nehemiah1:11 Asain, ee Kiptaiyat, ale, ingoepchi it iting’ung’ saetab otwogindeng’ung’, ak saetab otwogiguk, che boiboi koiywei kaineng’ung’: ak asain ale, igochi otwogindeng’ung’ kobor eng’ betuni, ak igochi inendet rirenet eng’ taitab chichi. (Ki ne ipchin laitoriat kikombet.)" 
Nehemiah2:1 Ak eng’ arawetab Nisan, eng’ kenyitab tiptem ne bo laitoriat Artaserses, anemu divaik che kimi tainnyi, ak agochi laitoriat. Kitom aarogeni anyun eng’ tainnyi." 
Nehemiah2:2 Ak kilenja laitoriat, Amu nee si koarogen togeng’ung’, ago memiani? Ma bo nito kit age, ago bo arogenetab muguleldo. Aarogen anyun mising’." 
Nehemiah2:3 Ak alenji laitoriat, Ingosob laitoriat agoi: kalya si ma arogen togennyu, ye kigoek karatia nganaset, oldab kererisiekab kwanisiekyuk, ak kigolalyo ormarichokyik?" 
Nehemiah2:4 Komwawa anyun laitoriat kolenja, Nee ne isome? Kiasa anyun Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet." 
Nehemiah2:5 Ak kialenji laitoriat, Ngo cham laitoriat, ak ngo kagonyor otwogindeng’ung’ chamet eng’ taing’ung’, iyokta anyun awa Juda, agoi nganasetab kererisiekab kwanisiekyuk, si kobiit ateech." 
Nehemiah2:6 Ak kilenja laitoriat, (kimi osotiondennyi ak inendet,) Bo betusiek ata bandang’ung’? Ak iweeksei au? Kicham anyun laitoriat koyokta; ak kiamwachi betusiek che awendi." 
Nehemiah2:7 Kiamwachi kogeny laitoriat, alenji, Ngo cham laitoriat, ingegona baronok che bo bounik che mi ainet bitonin, si kochamwa asiirto agoi ait Juda;" 
Nehemiah2:8 ak baruet ne kisirjin Asap ribindetab osnetab laitoriat, si kogona ketik ayae baoinikab kurgotik che bo irimet ne kinamgei ak got, ak che bo irimetab nganaset, ak che bo got ne awendi. Ak kigona laitoriat ko u noto, ko u eut ne mie ne bo Kamuktaindennyu ne kimi kobota." 
Nehemiah2:9 Kiait anyun oldab bounik che kimi ainet bitonin, ak agochi ichek baronokab laitoriat. Kiiyokto laitoriat kiptainikab luget kobota, ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek." 
Nehemiah2:10 Ak kingogas Sanbalat Horonindet, ak Tobia otwogindet ne Amonindet, kogochi ichek ng’wanindo ne o, amu kanyo chito si kobiit kocheng’ji lagokab Israel sobet ne mie." 
Nehemiah2:11 Kiait anyun Jerusalem, ak kiatebe yoto betusiek somok." 
Nehemiah2:12 Ak kiang’eet kemoi, ane ak bik che ng’ering che kimi kobota; amamwachi chi age tugul kit ne kiinde Kamuktaindennyu muguleldanyu ayachi Jerusalem: kima komi tiony age tugul kobota, kobate ne kialanye." 
Nehemiah2:13 Ak kiamande kemoi eng’ ormarichet ne bo atebwet, ne tokyingei kondab beek ne bo maswetit, agoi ormarichet ne bo ng’atatek, ak kiatoben irimoikab Jerusalem, che kiga kobutok, ak kiga kolalyo ormarichokyik." 
Nehemiah2:14 Kiawe anyun ormarichetab kondab beek agoi tamboiyotab laitoriat: ago kima biit ole bunei tiondo ne kialanye. 
Nehemiah2:15 Kiatogoste anyun kemoi abun tabandab kererut, atoben irimet; ak aweege, anyo abun ormarichet ne bo atebwet, ak aweege." 
Nehemiah2:16 Ak kima nai bounik ole kigawe, anan kit ne kiayai: ak kitom amwachi Yahudik, anan ko tisiik, anan ko bik che toogunotin, anan ko bounik, anan ko che kiboisiei." 
Nehemiah2:17 Yeityo alenji, Ogeere nyalili kimi, ko u ye kigoek karatia Jerusalem, ak kigolalyo ormarichyokyik: obwa keteech kogeny irimetab Jerusalem, si mata keegu che kichurei." 
Nehemiah2:18 Ak kiamwachi ichek agobo eut ne mie ne bo Kamuktaindennyu ne kimi kobota; ak kiamwachi kogeny ng’alekab laitoriat che kiga komwawa. Ak kile, Ongeng’eetye keteekse. Kiigimitgei anyun agobo boisiet ne mie." 
Nehemiah2:19 Ago kingogas Sanbalat Horonindet, ak Tobia otwogindet ne Amonindet, ak Gesem Marabuindet, kororechech kochotech, ak kosasech kole, Nee kit ne oyae? Ongeleljini laitoriat?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Kiawolji anyun ichek alenji, Iberurech Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet; noto anyun king’eetosi achek otwogikyik ak keteech: ago okwek, ko motinye kebeberta, amotinye kiy ne oyaache, anan kabwatet, eng’ Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah3:1 King’eet anyun Eliasib tisiindet ne o, koboto tupchosiekyik tisiik, ak koteech ormarichetab kechirek; kiianyiny, ak konde kurgotikyik; kiianyiny agoi teekset ne koi ne bo Hamea, kot koit teekset ne koi ne bo Hananel." 
Nehemiah3:2 Ak che kiteeksei korubei inendet ko ki bikab Jeriko. Ak che kiteeksei korubei ichek ko ki Sakur weritab Imri. 
Nehemiah3:3 Ak kiteech werikab Hasenaa ormarichet ne bo njirenik; ak kiinde tugatugikab kurgotik, ak konde kereiywekyik, ak karikyik che kigiige, ak tameleiywekyik." 
Nehemiah3:4 Ak che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Meremot weritab Uria, weritab Hakos. Ak che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Mesulam weritab Berekia, weritab Mesesabel. Ak che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Sadok weritab Baana." 
Nehemiah3:5 Ak che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Tekoitik; ago ma chuuljigei bikwak che toogunotin boisietab kiptaiyandenywa. 
Nehemiah3:6 Ak kiteech kogeny ormarichet ne bo keny Joiada weritab Pasea ak Mesulam weritab Besodeia, ak kiinde tugatugikab kurgotikyik, ak konde kereiywekyik, ak karikyik che kigiige, ak temeleiywekyik." 
Nehemiah3:7 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Melatia Gibeonindet, ak Jadon Meronotindet, bikab Gibeon, ak che bo Mispa, bik che bo ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo bounindet ne mi ainet bitonin." 
Nehemiah3:8 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Usiel weritab Haraia, kitang’ikab tahabu. Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Hanania burugindetab tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, ak kiigimit Jerusalem agoi irimet ne tebees." 
Nehemiah3:9 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Repaia weritab Hur, ne bounindetab kebebertab koretab Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah3:10 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Jedaia weritab Harumap, ole tokyingei gonnyi. Ak ne kiteechei korubei inendet ko ki Hatus weritab Hasabneia." 
Nehemiah3:11 Kiteechei kebeberta age Malkija weritab Harim, ak Hasub weritab Pahat-moab, koboto teekset ne koi ne bo mastinwek." 
Nehemiah3:12 Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Salum weritab Haloes, bounindetab kebebertab koretab Jerusalem, inendet ak tibikyik." 
Nehemiah3:13 Kiteech kogeny Hanun ormarichet ne bo atebwet, koboto bik che kimenyei Sanoa; ak kiteech, ak konde kereiywekyik, ak karikyik che kigiige, ak temeleiywekyik, ak kiteech irimet ne bo kakwautik elfut agenge che bo eut agoi ormarichet ne bo ng’atatek." 
Nehemiah3:14 Ak kiteech kogeny ormarichet ne bo ng’atatek Malkija weritab Rekab, bounindetab koretab Bet-hakerem; kiteech, ak konde kereiywekyik, ak karikyik che kigiige, ak temeleiywekyik." 
Nehemiah3:15 Ak kiteech kogeny ormarichetab kondab beek Salum weritab Kolhose, bounindetab koretab Mispa; kiteech, ak kotuch, ak konde kereiywekyik, ak karikyik che kigiige, ak temeleiywekyik, ak kiteech irimet ne bo tamboiyotab Sela ole negite seremutab gab laitoriat, agoi long’eiywot ne kichortoegei kebendi nganasetab Daudi." 
Nehemiah3:16 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Neemia weritab Asbuk, bounindetab kebebertab koretab Bet-sur, agoi ole tokyingei kererisiekab Daudi, ak agoi tamboiyot ne kigibal, ak agoi gotab bik che nyigonen." 
Nehemiah3:17 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Lawik, Reum, weritab Bani. Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Hasabia, bounindetab kebebertab koretab Keila, agobo korennyi." 
Nehemiah3:18 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki tupchosiekwak, Babai weritab Henadad, bounindetab kebebertab koretab Keila." 
Nehemiah3:19 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Eser weritab Jesua, bounindetab Mispa, kebeberta age ne tokyingei ole kitogostoe agoi keit ole kigonore karikab luget, eng’ ole weegegei irimet." 
Nehemiah3:20 Kiteech kogeny eng’ kagiiletab ge, kebeberta age Baruk weritab Sabai korub inendet, koboch ole weegegei irimet agoi kurgetab gotab Eliasib tisiindet ne o." 
Nehemiah3:21 Ak kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei inendet ko ki Meremot weritab Uria weritab Akos, koboch kurgetab gotab Eliasib agoi ole boch gotab Eliasib." 
Nehemiah3:22 Ak che kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki tisiik, bikab Warenget." 
Nehemiah3:23 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Benjamin ak Hasub ole tokyingei gonywa. Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Asaria weritab Maaseia weritab Anania ole negite gonnyi. 
Nehemiah3:24 Ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei inendet ko ki Binui weritab Henadad, koboch gotab Asaria kot koit ole weegegei irimet, ak agoi luita." 
Nehemiah3:25 Kiteech kogeny Palal weritab Usai ole tokyingei ole weegegei irimet, ak teekset ne koi ne kiichumda eng’ got ne bo barak ne bo gotab laitoriat, ne negite seremutab ribik. Kiteech kogeny korub inendet Pedaia weritab Paros." 
Nehemiah3:26 (Kimenyei Netinik Opel, agoi komosta ole tokyingei ormarichetab beek ole bo kong’asis, ak teekset ne koi ne kiichumda.)" 
Nehemiah3:27 Ak che kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei inendet ko ki Tekoitik che tokyingei teekset ne koi ne kiichumda, agoi irimetab Opel." 
Nehemiah3:28 Kiteech kogeny tisiik baragutab ormarichetab mbartanyit, kiteechei age tugul ne tokyingei gonnyi." 
Nehemiah3:29 Che kiteechei kogeny korubei ichek ko ki Sadok weritab Imer kotokyingei gonnyi. Ak ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Semaia weritab Sekania, ribindetab ormarichet ne bo kong’asis." 
Nehemiah3:30 Ne kiteechei kogeny kebeberta age korubei inendet ko ki Hanania weritab Selemia, ak Hanun werit ne bo lo ne bo Salap. Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Mesulam weritab Berekia kotokyingei gonnyi ne bo orit." 
Nehemiah3:31 Ne kiteechei kogeny korubei inendet ko ki Malkija ne ki age eng’ kitang’ikab tahabu kot koit gotab Netinik, ak ne bo chemung’arainik, kotokyingei ormarichetab Hamikad, kot koit ole kitogostoe eng’ luita." 
Nehemiah3:32 Ak kiteech kogeny kitang’ikab tahabu ak chemung’arainik kwenutab ole kitogostoe eng’ luita ak ormarichetab kechirek. 
Nehemiah4:1 Ago kingogas Sanbalat kole kiteechei irimet, konerech, ak konyit inne, ak kochot Yahudik." 
Nehemiah4:2 Ak king’alal eng’ taitab tupchosiekyik ak lugetab Samaria, ak kole, Yaei nee Yahudichu nyalulyotin? Tos igimitigei? Tos igoitoi korosek? Tos igesu eng’ betut agenge? Tos ing’eeti koik komong’une karurugutikab busagariek che kigolalyo?" 
Nehemiah4:3 Kimi ak inendet Tobia Amonindet, ak kile, Agot noto teechei, ko ngot kolany lelwot, kobutei irimenywa ne bo koik." 
Nehemiah4:4 Kas anyun, ee, Kamuktaindennyo, amu kisasech: ak iweekyi ichek churisienywa kotebe metowekwak, ak igoite ichek keluul koba emet ne kiluuljin:" 
Nehemiah4:5 amat ketuch tengektanywa, amat kibukto ng’ogistanywa eng’ taing’ung’: amu kigotachin eng’ taitab teegik." 
Nehemiah4:6 Kigiteech anyun irimet; ak kigituiyo irimet tugul kot koit kebeberta ne bo koindab tononennyi: amu kitinyei bik mugulelwek che chamei boisiet. 
Nehemiah4:7 Ago kingogas Sanbalat, ak Tobia, ak Marabuk, ak Amonik, koboto Asdodik, kole wendi tai teekset ne keteechei irimoikab Jerusalem, che kiga kobutok, ak kole kitiemei ole kiga koundur, konerekso mising’;" 
Nehemiah4:8 koruoch tugul kibagenge kole kobwa ak kobargei ak Jerusalem, ak kong’eet boriet eng’ yoto." 
Nehemiah4:9 Ago kigisa Kamuktaindennyo ak kiginde ribik koripso bet ak kemoi, amu ichek." 
Nehemiah4:10 Ak kile Juda, Kagogesgei kimnatetab che laei tuguk, ak mitei busagariek che chang’; kot ko mata kimuch keteech irimet." 
Nehemiah4:11 Ak kile bunikyok, Manaei ichek anan kogeer, agoi keit kwenunywa, ak kebar ichek, ak keger boisiet kotonon." 
Nehemiah4:12 Ak kingobwa Yahudik che kimenyei ole negite ichek, komwawech konyil taman eng’ komoswek tugul, kole, Kanyol oweekyeige." 
Nehemiah4:13 Kiande anyun bik komoswek che reektoot, eng’ irimet batai, eng’ ole mami kiy, kiande bik kobee ortinwekwak, kotinyei rotokwak bo chok, ak ng’otwekwak, ak kwangokwak." 
Nehemiah4:14 Ak kiageer, ak ang’eet, ak alenji bik che toogunotin, ak bounik, ak bik tugul, Amoiywei ichek: obwat Jehovah, ne o ak ko bo kamuiset, ak oyai luget agobo tupchosiekwok, ak werikwok, ak tibikwok, osotikwok ak gorikwok." 
Nehemiah4:15 Ak kingogas bunikyok kole kigegas kiito, ak kigowal Kamuktaindet kiruogenywa koek buch, keweekyigei anyun tugul irimet, kwo chi tugul boisiennyi." 
Nehemiah4:16 Ak koboch betunoto ak kwo tai, ko kiyai boisiet kebebertab otwogikyuk, konamei kebeberta age ng’otwek, ak long’onik, koboto kwangok, ak ngoroik che bo karik; ak kitabanu let bounik che bo got komugul ne bo Juda." 
Nehemiah4:17 Che kiteechei irimet, ak che kilaei tuguk, ko kinamjingei ichegei, koyai chi boisiet eng’ eut age, koname eut age karikyik;" 
Nehemiah4:18 ak eng’ teegik, ko kitinyei chi tugul rotwennyi bo chok ne kiga rat, asi koteeksei. Ak kimi ye negitena ne kuutei iriaget." 
Nehemiah4:19 Ak kialenji bik che toogunotin, ak bounik koboto bik tugul, O boisiet ak ko baraa, ak kagisirarjine eng’ irimet, keloochine." 
Nehemiah4:20 Oldo tugul ole kogasyi iriaget, oyumjeige eng’ yoto; yaiywech luget Kamuktaindennyo." 
Nehemiah4:21 Kigiyai anyun boisiet: ak kinam kebeberta age ne bo bichoto ng’otwek koboch ko kachor asista agoi kotook kecheik. 
Nehemiah4:22 Kialenji bik anyun eng’ betunoto, Ingotebe chi age tugul koboto otwogindennyi Jerusalem orit, asi koek ribikyok che ripsei kemoi, ak komuchi kobois bet." 
Nehemiah4:23 Kima kiregu ngoroikyok, ane, anan tupchosiekyuk, anan otwogikyuk, anan bik che kiripsei che kiisubwa, kiwa chi age tugul ak karikyik agoi ainet." 
Nehemiah5:1 Kibiit rirek che ng’wonen eng’ bik ak eng’ osotikwak agobo tupchosiekwak Yahudik. 
Nehemiah5:2 Amu kimi che kimwa kole, Ki chang’ achek koboto werikyok ak tibikyok: ongecheng’jige bek, si kobiit keam ak kesopche." 
Nehemiah5:3 Kimi alak kogeny che kimwa kole, Kigoitoi mbarenikyok, ak mbarenikyok che bo sabibuk, ak gorikyok si kotononwech, si kiyan kegonech bek, amu rubet." 
Nehemiah5:4 Kimi alak kogeny che kimwa kole, Kogiarorte mbarenikyok, ak mbarenikyok che bo sabibuk kotononwech kebesene fedaisiek si kobiit kigoite aisurut ne bo laitoriat." 
Nehemiah5:5 Ago kergei anyun borwekyok ak che bo tupchosiekyok, lagokyok ko kergei ak lagokwak: ak ogeero, kimutu werikyok ak tibikyok kobwa ratisiet si koek otwogik, ak kagimutu tibikyok alak kobwa ratisiet: ama kitinye kimnatet keesie kioto; amu tinyei bik alak mbarenikyok ak mbarenikyok che bo sabibuk." 
Nehemiah5:6 Ak kianerech mising’ kingagas rirekwak ak ng’alechuto. 
Nehemiah5:7 Kiabwat anyun anege, ak kigitiiye ak bik che toogunotin ak bounik, ak alenji ichek, Omache keljinet ne siirei ne nyolu, ne mage chi age tugul tupchennyi. Ak kiayai tuiyet ne o kegirindae ichek." 
Nehemiah5:8 Ak kialenji ichek, Ko u kit ne te kamugennyo, ko kogitiach tupchosiekyok Yahudik, che kiga kialdochi bororiosiek; ak tos oaldoi tupchosiekwok si tun oaldawech ichek? Kosisyo anyun, ama sich kiy ne wolu." 
Nehemiah5:9 Kiamwa kogeny ale, Kit ne oyae ko ma mie: tos manyoljinok obendate kaiyweisietab Kamuktaindennyo, amu chotisietab bororiosiek bunikyok?" 
Nehemiah5:10 Ak kigibesendochi ichek ko u noto, ane ak tupchosiekyuk, fedaisiek ak bek si kesich keljinet. Asomok ale, kemete boisioneb keljinet." 
Nehemiah5:11 Asomok oweekyi ichek rani mbarenikwak, mbarenikwak che bo emitik, ak gorikwak, ak oweekyi kogeny kebeberta agenge eng’ bogol ne bo fedaisiek, ak ne bo bek, ak divaik, ak mwanik, che kiomage ichek." 
Nehemiah5:12 Komwa anyun kole, Kiweekyini ichek, ama kemage kiy ichek; kiyae anyun ko u noto, ko u ye kemwa. Kiaguur anyun tisiik, ang’at koyosio, kole koyai ko u kayomisutioni." 
Nehemiah5:13 Kialeglekte kogeny ngoriennyu ale, Ingoleglekta ko u noto Kamuktaindet chi age tugul komong’ eng’ gonnyi ak eng’ boisiennyi, ne ma yai kayomisutioni; ingeleglekta ko u noto, kot ko ma kotinyei kiy. Ak kimwa bik tugul che bo tuiyet kole, Amen, ak kolos Jehovah. Ak kiyai bik ko u kayomisutioni." 
Nehemiah5:14 Kogeny koboch betut ne kigindea aek bounindenywa eng’ emetab Juda, kong’eete kenyitab tiptem agoi kenyitab sosom ak aeng’ ne bo laitoriat Artaserses, kiek choto kenyisiek taman ak aeng’, kima kiam ak tupchosiekyuk amitwogikab bounindet." 
Nehemiah5:15 Ago kiigochi milet bik bounik che bo tai che kiindounena, ak kiibe ichek makatinik ak divaik, ko ma boto sekelisiek artam che bo feda; ee, kiboi agot otwogikwak bik: ago kima ayai anyun ko u noto, amu kaiyweisiet ne aiywei Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah5:16 Ee, kiawe tai kogeny eng’ boisietab irimoni, ama kial koret age tugul: ak kiiyumjigei yuto otwogikyuk tugul si kobois." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kiamisie kogeny mesennyu Yahudik ak bounik, murenik bogol ak konom, ko ma boto ichek che kibwa ole kigimi, che kimong’u eng’ bororiosiek che kiyiemech." 
Nehemiah5:18 Che kiga kichob agobo betut agenge ko ki eito agenge ak kechirek lo che kigilewen; ak kigichobwa ngogaik, ak kigichob divaik alak tugul konyil agenge eng’ betusiek taman: agot eng’ chuto tugul ko ma amach amitwogikab bounindet, amu ki o otwoknatet eng’ bichu." 
Nehemiah5:19 Ibwata, ee Kamuktaindennyu, eng’ tuguk che miach, amu tugul che kiayachi bichu." 
Nehemiah6:1 Ak kingemwachi anyun Sanbalat ak Tobia, ak Gesem Marabuindet, ak bunikyok tugul, kelenji, kiateech irimet, ak ma komi ole butot; (ago eng’ betunoto ko kitom ande kereiywek che bo ormarichok;)" 
Nehemiah6:2 koyokwa Sanbalat ak Gesem kolenja, Nyo, ketuiyechi nganaset age eng’ nganasok che mi warengetab Ono. Ago kiibwati kele koyaiywa ne ya."
