Nehemiah6:3 Ak kiayokyi bik ichek koba kolenji, Ayae boisiet ne o, ko noto anyun mamuchi achorge: kalya si kotonon boisiet, ko kachoruge anyo ole omi?" 
Nehemiah6:4 Ak kiiyokwa ko u noto konyil ang’wan; ak awolji ichek ko u noto kogeny. 
Nehemiah6:5 Yeityo koyokwa Sanbalat ko u noto ne bo mut otwogindennyi, koibu eng’ eunnyi baruet ne yatat;" 
Nehemiah6:6 ne kigisir kele, Mwaat eng’ bororiosiek, ak komwaei Gasmu ko u noto, kole, Obwati, inye ak Yahudik, ongelel; amu noto ne konok oteech irimet: ak iegu laitoriandenywa, ko u eng’ ng’alechuto." 
Nehemiah6:7 Ak kiilewen kogeny maotik si kobiit komwaita ng’alek agobo inye eng’ Jerusalem, kole, Mi laitoriat Juda: ak kimwachin anyun laitoriat ko u ng’alechuto. Nyo anyun kiruoch tugul." 
Nehemiah6:8 Yeityo ayoktochi chito kwo kolenji, Ma kiyaei tuguk che u che kemwa, ago ibwati choto inyege eng’ muguleldang’ung’." 
Nehemiah6:9 Amu kita machei bichoto tugul komuech, kole, Kigochi eunekwak konyalulso eng’ boisiet, si mayaak. Ago igimit anyun eunekyuk." 
Nehemiah6:10 Ak kiawe gotab Semaia weritab Delaia, weritab Meetabel, ne ki ratat, ak kile, Ongetuiyechi gotab Kamuktaindet, eng’ hekalut orit, ak ongeger kurgotikab hekalut: amu bwanei ichek kobarin, ee, bwanei kemoi kobarin." 
Nehemiah6:11 Ak kiale, Tos nyolu komwei chi ne u ane? Ak mi ng’o ne u ane, ne machei kwo hekalut kosor sobondanyi? Mawendi orit." 
Nehemiah6:12 Ak kianai, ak ogeero, ma iyok inendet Kamuktaindet: ago kiyai maoinatoni kole kogirindaa: ak kiga kosir Tobia ak Sanbalat inendet si kogochi melekto." 
Nehemiah6:13 Kigisir inendet anyun si konyor melekto amu ng’olyondoni kole si aiyweis, ak ayai ko u noto, ayai tengekto, si kosich ng’alek che yaach che mwaitoi, si kotaama." 
Nehemiah6:14 Ibwat, ee Kamuktaindennyu, Tobia ak Sanbalat ko u boisionichuchuak, ak ibwat kogeny Noadia chebioset ne ki maotiot, ak maotik tugul, choto che kita imua." 
Nehemiah6:15 Kigiges anyun irimet eng’ betutab tiptem ak mut ne bo arawetab Elul, kiek betusiek konom ak aeng’." 
Nehemiah6:16 Ak kingogas bunikyok tugul, koiyweis bororiosiek tugul che kigayiemech, ak kosasgei: amu kinai kole boisioni ko kiyaei Kamuktaindennyo." 
Nehemiah6:17 Kiiyokto kogeny eng’ betusiechoto bik che toogunotin che bo Juda, baronok che chang’ koba oldab Tobia, ak kinyor agichek baronokab Tobia." 
Nehemiah6:18 Amu kimi che chang’ eng’ Juda che kiga koyosiechi inendet, amu ki sandetab Sekania weritab Ara; ak kiga kotun werinnyi Jeohanan cheptab Mesulam weritab Berekia." 
Nehemiah6:19 King’alal kogeny agobo boisionikyik che miach eng’ tainnyu, ak kiipchi ng’alekyuk inendet. Kiiyok Tobia baronok kole komua." 
Nehemiah7:1 Ak kingo kageteech irimet, ak ande kereiywekab kurgotik, ak kingo kagelewen ribik, tienik ak Lawik," 
Nehemiah7:2 alewen anyun tupchennyu Hanani, ak Hanania bounindetab irimet, gab laitoriat, koboi Jerusalem: amu ki chito ne kiyani, ak ne kiiywei Kamuktaindet kosiir che chang’." 
Nehemiah7:3 Ak kialenji ichek, Amat keyat ormarichokab Jerusalem kot kong’wanit asis; ak ye ta kotonondos koripsei, ko mie koger ichek ormarichok, ak otemel, ak olewen ribik eng’ bik che menyei Jerusalem, chi age tugul eng’ ripsennyi, ak korib chi age tugul ole tokyingei gonnyi." 
Nehemiah7:4 Ki tebees anyun nganaset ak ko baraa: ago ki ng’ering’ bik che kimi orit, ak kitomo keteech gorik." 
Nehemiah7:5 Kiinde Kamuktaindennyo muguleldanyu ale ayum bik che toogunotin, ak bounik, koboto bik, si kobiit kiit kobee tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto. Ak kianyoru bukuitab tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto ne bo ichek che kisib kotogos, ak anyoru ko sirotin eng’ bukuinoto:" 
Nehemiah7:6 Chuto bikab emet, che kiga kotogos kobunu ole kiga kiluulji, che bo che kiga kiluul, che kiga luul Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon, che kiweek kobwa Jerusalem ak Juda kiwa chi tugul nganasennyi;" 
Nehemiah7:7 che kigabwa koboto Serubabel, ak Jesua, Neemia, Asaria, Raamia, Nahamani, Mordekai, Bilsan, Misperet, Bigbai, Nehum, ak Baana. Koitetab murenikab bikab Israel:" 
Nehemiah7:8 lagokab Paros ko ki bik elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol ak tamanwogik tisab ak aeng’. 
Nehemiah7:9 Lagokab Sepatia ko ki bogol somok ak tamanwogik tisab ak aeng’. 
Nehemiah7:10 Lagokab Ara ko ki bogol lo ak konom ak aeng’. 
Nehemiah7:11 Lagokab Pahat-moab, eng’ lagokab Jesua ak Joab, ko ki elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol sisiit ak taman ak sisiit." 
Nehemiah7:12 Lagokab Elam ko ki elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’ ak konom ak ang’wan. 
Nehemiah7:13 Lagokab Satu ko ki bogol sisiit ak artam ak mut. 
Nehemiah7:14 Lagokab Sakai ko ki bogol tisab ak tamanwogik lo. 
Nehemiah7:15 Lagokab Binui ko ki bogol lo ak artam ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:16 Lagokab Bebai ko ki bogol lo ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:17 Lagokab Asgad ko ki elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol somok ak tiptem ak aeng’. 
Nehemiah7:18 Lagokab Adonikam ko ki bogol lo ak tamanwogik lo ak tisab. 
Nehemiah7:19 Lagokab Bigbai ko ki elfusiek aeng’ ak tamanwogik lo ak tisab. 
Nehemiah7:20 Lagokab Adin ko ki bogol lo ak konom ak mut. 
Nehemiah7:21 Lagokab Ater, che bo Hesekia, ko ki tamanwogik sogol ak sisiit." 
Nehemiah7:22 Lagokab Hasum ko ki bogol somok ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:23 Lagokab Besai ko ki bogol somok ak tiptem ak ang’wan. 
Nehemiah7:24 Lagokab Harip ko ki bogol ak taman ak aeng’. 
Nehemiah7:25 Lagokab Gibeon ko ki tamanwogik sogol ak mut. 
Nehemiah7:26 Bikab Bet-lehem ak Netopa ko ki bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:27 Bikab Anatot ko ki bogol ak tiptem ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:28 Bikab Betasmabet ko ki artam ak aeng’. 
Nehemiah7:29 Bikab Kiriat-jearim, Kepira, ak Beerot ko ki bogol tisab ak artam ak somok." 
Nehemiah7:30 Lagokab Rama ak Geba ko ki bogol lo ak tiptem ak agenge. 
Nehemiah7:31 Bikab Mikmas ko ki bogol ak tiptem ak aeng’. 
Nehemiah7:32 Bikab Bet-el ak Ai ko ki bogol ak tiptem ak somok. 
Nehemiah7:33 Bikab Nebo age ko ki konom ak aeng’. 
Nehemiah7:34 Lagokab Elam age ko ki elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’ ak konom ak ang’wan. 
Nehemiah7:35 Lagokab Harim ko ki bogol somok ak tiptem. 
Nehemiah7:36 Lagokab Jeriko ko ki bogol somok ak artam ak mut. 
Nehemiah7:37 Lagokab Lod, Hadid, ak Ono, ko ki bogol tisab ak tiptem ak agenge." 
Nehemiah7:38 Lagokab Senaa ko ki elfusiek somok ak bogol sogol ak sosom. 
Nehemiah7:39 Tisiik: lagokab Jedaia, che bo gotab Jesua, ko ki bogol sogol ak tamanwogik tisab ak somok." 
Nehemiah7:40 Lagokab Imer ko ki bik elfut agenge ak konom ak aeng’. 
Nehemiah7:41 Lagokab Pasur ko ki elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’ ak artam ak tisab. 
Nehemiah7:42 Lagokab Harim ko ki elfut agenge ak taman ak tisab. 
Nehemiah7:43 Lawik: lagokab Jesua, che bo Kadmiel, eng’ lagokab Odeba, ko ki tamanwogik tisab ak ang’wan." 
Nehemiah7:44 Tienik: lagokab Asap ko ki bogol ak artam ak sisiit. 
Nehemiah7:45 Ribikab kurgotik: lagokab Salum, lagokab Ater, lagokab Talmon, lagokab Akub, lagokab Hatita, lagokab Sobai, ko ki bogol ak sosom ak sisiit." 
Nehemiah7:46 Netinik: lagokab Siha, lagokab Hasupa, lagokab Tabaot;" 
Nehemiah7:47 lagokab Keros, lagokab Sia, lagokab Padon;" 
Nehemiah7:48 lagokab Lebana, lagokab Hagaba, lagokab Salmai;" 
Nehemiah7:49 lagokab Hanan, lagokab Gidel, lagokab Gahar;" 
Nehemiah7:50 lagokab Reaia, lagokab Resin, lagokab Nekoda;" 
Nehemiah7:51 lagokab Gasam, lagokab Usa, lagokab Pasea;" 
Nehemiah7:52 lagokab Besai, lagokab Meunik, lagokab Neprusesik;" 
Nehemiah7:53 lagokab Bakbuk, lagokab Hakupa, lagokab Harur;" 
Nehemiah7:54 lagokab Baslit, lagokab Meida, lagokab Harsa;" 
Nehemiah7:55 lagokab Barkos, lagokab Sisera, lagokab Tema;" 
Nehemiah7:56 lagokab Nesia, ak lagokab Hatipa." 
Nehemiah7:57 Lagokab otwogikab Solomon: lagokab Sotai, lagokab Soperet, lagokab Perida;" 
Nehemiah7:58 lagokab Jaala, lagokab Darkon, lagokab Gidel;" 
Nehemiah7:59 lagokab Sepatia, lagokab Hatil, lagokab Pokeret-hasebaim, lagokab Amon." 
Nehemiah7:60 Netinik tugul, ak lagokab otwogikab Solomon, ko kiek bogol somok ak tamanwogik sogol ak aeng’." 
Nehemiah7:61 Ak chuto che kitogos eng’ Tel-mela, Tel-harsa, Kerub, Adon, ak Imer; ago kima imuch kobor gorikab kwanisiekwak, anan iyotwenywa, ngo ki bo Israel:" 
Nehemiah7:62 lagokab Delaia, lagokab Tobia, lagokab Nekoda, ko ki bogol lo ak artam ak aeng’." 
Nehemiah7:63 Ak eng’ tisiik: lagokab Hobaia, lagokab Hakos, lagokab Barsilai, ne kiitun chepto age eng’ tibikab Barsilai Gileadindet, ak kigimwaitae kainenywa." 
Nehemiah7:64 Kicheng’ chuto kit ne kigisirji kainaikwak, kobee tetutikab ibinwek che kigosiirto, ago kimanyor: amu noto anyun kigiit kele ng’wonen, ak kigiistoe tiseinatet." 
Nehemiah7:65 Ak kilenji Tirsata ichek, Manyolji koam tuguk che tililen mising’, kot kobiit tisiindet ne tinyei Urim ak Tumim." 
Nehemiah7:66 Kiek tuiyet tugul elfusiek artam ak aeng’ ak bogol somok ak tamanwogik lo," 
Nehemiah7:67 ko maboto otwogikwak che murenik ak che tibik, kiek choto elfusiek tisab ak bogol somok ak sosom ak tisab: ak kitinyei tienik che murenik ak gotab kor bogol aeng’ ak artam ak mut." 
Nehemiah7:68 Mbartanyisiekwak ko ki bogol tisab ak sosom ak lo; nyumbusiekwak ko ki bogol aeng’ ak artam ak mut; 
Nehemiah7:69 tambesik ko ki bogol ang’wan ak sosom ak mut: sigirok ko ki elfusiek lo ak bogol tisab ak tiptem. 
Nehemiah7:70 Ak kigon alak eng’ kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek tugukab boisiet. Kigon Tirsata darkoni elfut agenge che bo tahabu, tabok konom, ngoroikab tisiik bogol mut ak sosom, koba ole kigonore tuguk." 
Nehemiah7:71 Ak kigon kandoik alak che bo gorikab kwanisiek darkoni elfusiek tiptem che bo tahabu, ak ratilisiek che bo feda elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol aeng’, koba ole kigonore tuguk che bo boisiet." 
Nehemiah7:72 Ak tuguk che kigagon bik tugul ko ki darkoni elfusiek tiptem che bo tahabu, ak ratilisiek che bo feda elfusiek aeng’, ak ngoroik tamanwogik lo ak tisab che bo tisiik." 
Nehemiah7:73 Komeny anyun nganasokwak tisiik, Lawik, ak ribikab kurgotik, ak tienik, ak bik alak, ak Netinik, ak Israel tugul. Ak kingoit arawet ne bo tisab, ko kimi lagokab Israel nganasokwak." 
Nehemiah8:1 Ak kiiyumgei bik tugul ko u chichak eng’ komosta ne baraa ne kimi taitab ormarichetab beek; ak kilenji bichoto Esra sirindet koib bukuitab Ng’atutikab Musa, che kiga kong’atyi Jehovah Israel." 
Nehemiah8:2 Kiib anyun Esra tisiindet Ng’atutik kobwa taitab tuiyet, murenik ak kwonyik, koboto bik tugul che kiimuchi kogas ak koguiyo, eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawetab tisab." 
Nehemiah8:3 Ak kisoman Ng’atutichoto eng’ taitab komosta ne baraa ne kimitei taitab ormarichetab beek, koboch karon agoi bet kwen, eng’ taitab murenik ak kwonyik, koboto che kiimuchi koguiyo; ak kiepchi it anyun bik tugul bukuitab Ng’atutik." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ak kitonon Esra sirindet eng’ komosta ne kigiteege ketik kotororit, ne kiga kiyachi boisionoto; ak kitonondos eng’ ye negite inendet eng’ komostab eunnyi ne bo tai, Matitia, Sema, Anaia, Uria, Hilkia, ak Maaseia, ak kitonondos eng’ komostab eunnyi ne bo katam, Pedaia, Misael, Malkija, Hasum, Hasbadana, Sekaria, ak Mesulam." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ak king’any Esra bukuinoto eng’ taitab bik tugul; (amu kimi ye toror kosiir bik;) ak kingong’any bukuinoto kotononso bik tugul. 
Nehemiah8:6 Ak kiilos Esra Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne o; ak kiwol bik tugul kole, Amen, Amen, konamjin barak eunekwak: ak kiing’urukso, kot kotiing’e togochikwak ng’ony kolos Jehovah." 
Nehemiah8:7 Ak kiigochi Jesua, Bani, Serebia, Jamin, Akub, Sabetai, Hodia, Maaseia, Kelita, Asaria, Josabad, Hanan, Pelaia, ak Lawik, bik koguiyo Ng’atutik: ak kitononso bik eng’ komostanywa." 
Nehemiah8:8 Ak kisoman kogasak komie eng’ bukuit, ng’atutikab Kamuktaindet; ak kiiarorji, si koguiyo somanonato." 
Nehemiah8:9 Ak kilenji bik tugul Neemia, ne ki Tirsata, ak Esra tisiindet ak ko sirindet, koboto Lawik che kiineti bik, Tilil betuni eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’; amoteeye, anan oririe. Amu kiga ririo bik tugul, ye kingogas ng’alekab Ng’atutik." 
Nehemiah8:10 Yeityo kolenji ichek, Oba, oam che akwaen, ak oee che anyiny, ak oyokyi kebeberwek inendet ne ma kichopchi kiy; amu tilil betuni eng’ Kiptaiyandennyo; amoarogense, amu kimnateng’wong’ boiboiyetab Jehovah." 
Nehemiah8:11 Kogaigai anyun Lawik bik tugul, kolenji, Osisye, amu tilil betuni; amoarogense." 
Nehemiah8:12 Ak kiba bik tugul koamis, ak koee, ak koyokto kebeberwek, ak koboiboitu mising’ amu kiga koguiyo ng’alek che kiga kimwachi ichek." 
Nehemiah8:13 Ak eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, koyumgei kandoikab gorikab kwanisiekab bik tugul, tisiik ak Lawik, koyumjigei Esra sirindet, si kobiit koepchi it ng’alekab Ng’atutik." 
Nehemiah8:14 Ak kinyor kole kigisir eng’ Ng’atutik, ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah eng’ Musa, kole, kanyol komeny lagokab Israel keriosiek eng’ igorta ne bo arawetab tisab;" 
Nehemiah8:15 ak kole kobarta ak komwaita eng’ nganasokwak tugul, ak eng’ Jerusalem, kole, Oba tulwet, ak oibu temenikab emitik, ak che bo temenikab emitikab timin, ak temenikab ketit ne kiguure myrtle, ak sosik, ak temenikab ketik che nyigisen, si keteege keriosiek, ko u ye sirat." 
Nehemiah8:16 Koba anyun bik, koib tuguchoto, ak koteekyinegei keriosiek, kiteech chi age tugul baragutab gonnyi, ak eng’ seremusiekwak, ak eng’ seremusiekab gotab Kamuktaindet, ak eng’ komosta ne baraa eng’ ormarichetab beek, ak eng’ komosta ne baraa eng’ ormarichetab Epraim." 
Nehemiah8:17 Ak kiteekyigei keriosiek tuiyet tugul ne bo bik che kiweeksei che kiga kiluul, ak komeny keriosiechoto: amu kitom koyai lagokab Israel ko u noto koboch betusiekab Jesua weritab Nun. Ak kibiit boiboiyet ne o." 
Nehemiah8:18 Kisoman kogeny betut age tugul bukuit ne bo Ng’atutikab Kamuktaindet, koboch betut ne bo tai agoi betut ne bo let. Ak kiyai igorta betusiek tisab; ak eng’ betutab sisiit koyai tuiyetab kaming’inetab ge, ko u ye kiging’at." 
Nehemiah9:1 Kiiyumgei lagokab Israel eng’ betutab tiptem ak ang’wan ne bo arawanato korugutgei, kolaach kunoik, ak koiilegei ng’ung’unyek." 
Nehemiah9:2 Ak kitabanegei iyotetab Israel toek tugul, ak kotononso kong’any tengekwogikwak, ak tengekwogikab kwanisiekwak." 
Nehemiah9:3 Ak kitononso eng’ komostanywa, kosoman bukuitab Ng’atutikab Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa eng’ kebeberta agenge ne bo ang’wan ne bo betut; ak kong’any tengekwogikwak eng’ kebeberta age ne bo ang’wan, ak kolos Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa." 
Nehemiah9:4 Yeityo kotononso eng’ long’eiywotab Lawik, Jesua, Bani, Kadmiel, Sebania, Buni, Serebia, Bani, ak Kenani, ak kowaach eng’ kutit ne o, kowaakyi Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa." 
Nehemiah9:5 Yeityo komwa Lawik, Jesua, Kadmiel, Bani, Hasabeneia, Serebia, Hodia, Sebania, ak Petaia, kole, Otononie ak olosu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ koboch koigeny agoi koigeny. Ingoberurok kaineng’ung’ ne bo torornatet, ne itororot kosiir kaberuret tugul ak kalosunet." 
Nehemiah9:6 I Jehovah, inye inyege; kiiyai kipsengwet, kipsengwet ne bo kipsengwetisiek, koboto tugukwak tugul, ak ng’ony ak tuguk tugul che mi oloto, nyanjosiek ak tuguk tugul che mitei, ak iribe tuguchoto tugul; ak kolosun luget tugul ne bo kipsengwet." 
Nehemiah9:7 I Jehovah Kamuktaindet, ne kiilewen Abram, ak imutu inendet komong’ eng’ Ur ne bo Kaldeik, ak igochi inendet kainet iguure Abraham;" 
Nehemiah9:8 ak igeer ile bo iman muguleldanyi eng’ taing’ung’, ak oyomisge ak inendet igochi inendet emetab Kananindet, Hitindet, Amorindet, Perisindet, Jebusindet ak Girgasindet, igochi emonoto iyotennyi ak kaiyai ng’aleguk kosulda; amu i bo iman." 
Nehemiah9:9 Ak kiigeer nyalilwogikab kwanisiekyok eng’ Misri, ak kiigas rirekwak eng’ ye negite Nyanjet ne Birir," 
Nehemiah9:10 ak kiibarte kaborunoik ak kwong’utik eng’ Parao, ak otwogikyik tugul, ak bik tugul che bo emennyi; amu kiingen ile kiinyalil ichek eng’ menotet; ak kiigochige kainet ko u rani." 
Nehemiah9:11 Ak kiipchei nyanjet eng’ tainywa, si kobun ichek kwenutab nyanjet eng’ emet ne yaamat; ak kiitoorji bik che kiisubu ichek rirosiek, ko u ye kiwirjin koita beek che kimen." 
Nehemiah9:12 Ak kiindochi ichek kogeny bet eng’ toloitab boldet; ak indochi ichek kemoi eng’ toloitab mat, kokweng’ji oret ne kanyol kobun." 
Nehemiah9:13 Kiichorjige kogeny tulwetab Sinai, ak ing’alalji ichek imi kipsengwet, ak igochi ichek kiruogutik che lititen ak ng’atutik che bo iman, ak kotigonutik che miach ak kayomisutik," 
Nehemiah9:14 ak iborji ichek sabatong’ung’ ne tilil, ak ing’atyi ichek ng’atutik ak kotigonutik, ak Ng’atutiet, eng’ eutab Musa otwogindeng’ung’," 
Nehemiah9:15 ak igochi amitwogik che bunu kipsengwet amu rubenywa, ak imoong’u beek eng’ ruandet agobo ichek, amu meleldanywa, ak ing’at ichek koba konam emet kobunji, emet ne kiga iitochi eung’ung’ igochi." 
Nehemiah9:16 Ago kiboisie ichek menotet koboto kwanisiekyok, ak kouuiit kaatinywa, ama kas it ng’atutiguk," 
Nehemiah9:17 ak koesio kogas it, amata kobwat kwong’utiguk che kiiyai eng’ kwenunywa, ago kiiuuiit kaatinywa, ak eng’ ngelelnatenywa ko kilewen kiptaiyat komut ichek koweekyigei otwoknatenywa: ago i Kamuktaindet ne i chobot inyochi kaat, i bo mieindo ak ko nyiitat rirenet, ne ma sib konerechi, ak itinye chang’indab rirenet, ama imete ichek." 
Nehemiah9:18 Ee, ye kingo kagoyachigei moita ne kitanyi, ak komwa kole, Ni ko Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne kiimutun imong’u eng’ Misri, ak kiyai tagisiosiek che eechen;" 
Nehemiah9:19 agos ma imete ichek eng’ ong’atet amu rirenosieguk che chang’: ma istoegei baragunywa bet toloitab boldet si kondochi ichek eng’ oret; ama istoegei ichek toloito ne bo mat kemoi, si koborji ichek lapkeiyet, ak oret ne kanyol kobun." 
Nehemiah9:20 Kiigochi kogeny ichek Tamirmirieng’ung’ ne mie konet, ama iete ichek koam mana chotoguget, ak inage beek amu meleldanywa." 
Nehemiah9:21 Ee, kiibai ichek eng’ ong’atet kenyisiek artam, kima rarta kiy eng’ ichek; ma osegitu ngoroikwak, ama ibwanso kelyekwak." 
Nehemiah9:22 Kiigochi kogeny ichek bounatosiek ak bororiosiek che kiipchechi ichek kobee kebeberwekwak: kinam anyun emetab Sihon kobunji, ak emetab laitoriatab Hesbon, ak emetab Og laitoriatab Basan." 
Nehemiah9:23 Kiites kogeny lagokwak kotenit kecheikab kipsengwet, ak imutu ichek kobwa emonoto kiilenji kwanisiekwak koba konam kobunji." 
Nehemiah9:24 Kiba anyun lagochato ak konam emet kobunji, ak iterter eng’ tainywa bikab emonoto, choto ko ki Kananik, ak inde ichek eunekwak, koboto laitorinikwak, ak bikab emet, si koyachi ichek ko u ye machei." 
Nehemiah9:25 Ak kinam nganasok che ng’ototin, ak emet ne akwai, ak konam gorik che nyiitotin tuguk tugul che miachen kobunji, ak keringonik che kigibal, mbarenikab sabibuk, ak mbarenikab emitik, ak ketik ng’isiat che bo logoek: kiam anyun ak kibiyong’so, ak kinerio, ak kiigasgei eng’ mieindang’ung’ ne o." 
Nehemiah9:26 Ago ma kas it, ak kongeleljin, ak kiwirta Ng’atutiguk kotuktochi batai, ak kobar maotiguk che kibaorianji ichek, kole koweech ichek kobwanjin, ak koyai tagisiosiek che eechen." 
Nehemiah9:27 Noto anyun, kiinde ichek eunekab bunikwak, che kiim ichek: ak eng’ betusiekab nyalildanywa, ye kingorirjin, igas eng’ kipsengwet; ak ko u eng’ rirenosieguk che chang’, ko kiigochi ichek sorunik che kisor ichek eng’ eunekab bunikwak." 
Nehemiah9:28 Ago kingo kagomuuny, koyai yaitiet kogeny eng’ taing’ung’; ibagakyi anyun eunekab bunikwak, si kobiit koboi ichek: ago ye kingoweek, ak korirjin, igas eng’ kipsengwet; ak kiisoru ichek konyil che chang’ ko u rirenosieguk," 
Nehemiah9:29 ak ibaorianji ichek itigon, ile imutyi kogeny Ng’atutieng’ung’: ago kiboisie menotet, ama kas it ng’atutiguk, ago kiyai tengekto kongelelji kiruogutiguk (che ngot koyai chito kosobe choto), ak kilit olin, ak kouuiit kaatinywa, ama cham kogas." 
Nehemiah9:30 Ago kiimuitochi ichek eng’ kenyisiek che chang’, ak kiibaorianji ichek eng’ Tamirmirieng’ung’ eng’ maotiguk: ago ma cham kogas: kiinde anyun ichek eunekab bikab emotinwek." 
Nehemiah9:31 Ago eng’ rirenosieguk che chang’ ko ma igesu ichek, anan imete, amu i Kamuktaindet ne bo mieindo, ak ko nyiitat rirenet." 
Nehemiah9:32 Ara anyun Kamuktaindennyo, ne o, ne bo kamuktaet, ak ko Kamuktaindet ne bo kamuiset, ne ribei arorutiet ak rirenetab ge, amat igeer ile kiy ne ming’in, ng’wanindo tugul ne kaityech, ak laitorinikyok, ak bounikyok, ak tisiikyok, ak maotikyok, ak kwanisiekyok, ak biguk tugul koboch eng’ betusiekab laitorinikab Asuria agoi rani." 
Nehemiah9:33 Ago i bo iman eng’ tuguk tugul che kigobwanjech; amu kiiyai ne bo iman, ago kigeyai ne ya:" 
Nehemiah9:34 ama rib Ng’atutieng’ung’ laitorinikyok, koboto bounikyok, tisiikyok, anan kwanisiekyok, ama kas it ng’atutiguk ak baornatosieguk, che kiibaorian agobo ichek." 
Nehemiah9:35 Amu ma otin eng’ bounatenywa, ak eng’ mieindang’ung’ ne o ne kiigochi, ak eng’ emet ne baraa ak ko akwai ne kiigochi eng’ tainywa, ama meto boisionikwak che yaachen." 
Nehemiah9:36 Keero, ki otwogik rani, ak eng’ emet ne kiigochi kwanisiekyok koam logoekyik ak mieindanyi, keero, ki otwogik eng’ emonito." 
Nehemiah9:37 Ak rurei emonito mising’ korurjin laitorinik che kiinde koboiywech amu tengekwogikyok: tinyei kogeny kimnatet koboi borwekyok, koboto tukyok, ko u ye machei, ak kimi bichiindo ne o." 
Nehemiah9:38 Agot eng’ choto tugul ko kagiyai arorutiet ne kim, ak kesir: ak kong’och bounikyok, ak Lawikyok, ak tisiikyok." 
Nehemiah10:1 Chu anyun che king’och: Neemia Tirsata, weritab Hakalia, ak Sedekia;" 
Nehemiah10:2 Seraia, Asaria, Jeremia;" 
Nehemiah10:3 Pasur, Amaria, Malkija;" 
Nehemiah10:4 Hatus, Sebania, Maluk;" 
Nehemiah10:5 Harim, Meremot, Obadia;" 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Gineton, Baruk;" 
Nehemiah10:6 Daniel, Gineton, Baruk;" 
Nehemiah10:7 Mesulam, Abija, Mijamin;" 
Nehemiah10:8 Maasia, Bilgai, Semaia: ki tisiik chuto." 
Nehemiah10:9 Lawik ko ki: Jesua, weritab Asania, Binui ne bo werikab Henadad, Kadmiel;" 
Nehemiah10:10 ak tupchosiekwak, Sebania, Hodia, Kelita, Pelaia, Hanan;" 
Nehemiah10:11 Mika, Rehob, Hasabia;" 
Nehemiah10:12 Sakur, Serebia, Sebania;" 
Nehemiah10:13 Hodia, Bani, Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:14 Che eechen che bo bik ko ki: Paros, Pahat-moab, Elam, Satu, Bani;" 
Nehemiah10:15 Buni, Asgad, Bebai;" 
Nehemiah10:16 Adonija, Bigbai, Adin;" 
Nehemiah10:17 Ater, Hesekia, Asur;" 
Nehemiah10:18 Hodia, Asum, Besai;" 
Nehemiah10:19 Arib, Anatot, Nobai;" 
Nehemiah10:20 Magpias, Mesulam, Hesir;" 
Nehemiah10:21 Mesesabel, Sadok, Jadua;" 
Nehemiah10:22 Pelatia, Anan, Anaia;" 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea, Hanania, Hasub;" 
Nehemiah10:23 Hosea, Hanania, Hasub;" 
Nehemiah10:24 Haloes, Pila, Sobek;" 
Nehemiah10:25 Reum, Hasabna, Maaseia;" 
Nehemiah10:26 ak Ahia, Hanan, Anan;" 
Nehemiah10:27 Maluk, Harim, Baana." 
Nehemiah10:28 Ak bik tugul, tisiik, Lawik, ribikab kurgotik, tienik, Netinik, ak tugul che kiga kotabanegei bikab emotinwek, kotabanjigei Ng’atutikab Kamuktaindet, koboto osotikwak, werikwak ak tibikwak, chi tugul ne kitinyei naet ak kaguiyet;" 
Nehemiah10:29 kinamegei ak tupchosiekwak, bikwak che toogunotin, ak kiiyosio eng’ chubisiet ak koyosiet, kole kobendate Ng’atutikab Kamuktaindet, che kigigon eng’ Musa otwogindetab Kamuktaindet, ak korib ak koyai kayomisutik tugul che bo Jehovah Kiptaiyandennyo, koboto kiruogutikyik ak kotigonutikyik;" 
Nehemiah10:30 ak kole, magigochini tibikyok bikab emet, anan kotun werikyok tibikwak:" 
Nehemiah10:31 ak ngot koib bikab emet, tuguk che kialdoi anan ko amitwogik eng’ betutab sabato kole koalda, ko magiale eng’ betutab sabato, anan ko eng’ betut ne itabanat: kemete kenyitab tisab, ak kemete yaaksetab besendo age tugul." 
Nehemiah10:32 Kigiyachige anyun ng’atutik, kele kigoite eng’ kenyit age tugul kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo sekel kobunji otisietab gotab Kamuktaindennyo;" 
Nehemiah10:33 ak che bo makatinikab kabartaet, ak che bo kagochinet ne bo kotugul ne bo busiek, ak kagochinet ne bo kotugul ne kibeelei, ak che bo sabatosiek, ak che bo ye kaleel arawet, ak che bo igorwek che kiging’at, ak che bo tuguk che itabanotin, ak che bo kagochinoikab tengekto, si keyachine Israel kagaigaet, ak che bo boisiet tugul ne bo gotab Kamuktaindennyo." 
Nehemiah10:34 Ak kigiser barbarek, koboto tisiik ak Lawik, ak bik, agobo kagochinetab kwenik, si kobiit keib kobwa gotab Kamuktaindennyo, ko u gorikab kwanisiekyok, eng’ betusiek che kiging’at, eng’ kenyit age tugul, si kebeel eng’ kaptisisietab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ko u ye sirat eng’ Ng’atutik;" 
Nehemiah10:35 ak keib tongoanikab mbarenikyok, ak tongoanikab logoek tugul che bo ketik alak tugul, eng’ kenyit age tugul, kobwa gotab Jehovah:" 
Nehemiah10:36 ak kimutu kogeny taiywek che bo werikyok, ak che twotei tukyok, ko u ye sirat eng’ Ng’atutik, ak che twotei akwotisiekyok ak akwotisiekab kechirekyok, keget kobwa gotab Kamuktaindennyo, kobwa ole mi tisiik che boisiei eng’ gotab Kamuktaindennyo;" 
Nehemiah10:37 ak keibu makatinik che tuonen che bo tongoanik, ak kagochinoikyok che kinamjin barak, ak logoekab ketik alak tugul, ak divaik, ak mwanik, kobwa ole mi tisiik, agoi gorik che bo orit che bo gotab Kamuktaindennyo; ak keipchi Lawik kebeberwekab taman che bo tugukab mbarenikyok; amu iyumi Lawik kebeberwekab taman che bo kabatisiennyo eng’ nganasok tugul." 
Nehemiah10:38 Ak mitei tisiindet weritab Aron koboto Lawik, ye iyumi Lawik kebeberwekab taman: ak koib Lawik kebebertab taman ne bo kebeberwekab taman kobwa gotab Kamuktaindennyo agoi gorik che bo orit, got ne kigonore tuguk." 
Nehemiah10:39 Amu ibu lagokab Israel ak lagokab Lawi kagochinet ne kinamjin barak ne bo bek, ak ne bo divaik, ak ne bo mwanik, kobwa gorik che bo orit, ole mi tuguk che bo ole tilil, ak tisiik che boisiei, ak ribikab kurgotik, ak tienik: ak magibagaktoi gotab Kamuktaindennyo." 
Nehemiah11:1 Ak kimeny Jerusalem bounikab bik: ak kiser kogeny barbarek bik che king’et, kole komut kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo bik, komeny Jerusalem, nganaset ne tilil, ak kebeberwek sogol eng’ taman ne bo bik, komeny nganasok alak." 
Nehemiah11:2 Ak kiiberur bik murenik tugul che kiigoitogei eng’ chamnyet komeny Jerusalem. 
Nehemiah11:3 Chu ko bik che eechen che bo emotinwek che kimeny Jerusalem: ago kimeny chi tugul komostanyi eng’ nganasokab Juda eng’ nganasokwak, choto ko ki Israel, tisiik, ak Lawik, ak Netinik, ak lagokab otwogikab Solomon." 
Nehemiah11:4 Ak kimeny Jerusalem alak eng’ lagokab Juda, ak eng’ lagokab Benjamin. Che bo lagokab Juda ko ki Ataia weritab Usia, weritab Sekaria, weritab Amaria, weritab Sepatia, weritab Maalalel, ne bo lagokab Peres;" 
Nehemiah11:5 ak Maaseia weritab Baruk, weritab Kolhose, weritab Hasaia, weritab Adaia, weritab Joiarib, weritab Sekaria, weritab Silonindet." 
Nehemiah11:6 Kiek werik tugul che bo Peres che kimenyei Jerusalem bogol ang’wan ak tamanwogik lo ak sisiit, murenik che nyigonen." 
Nehemiah11:7 Ak chu werikab Benjamin: Salu weritab Mesulam, weritab Joed, weritab Pedaia, weritab Kolaia, weritab Maaseia, weritab Itiel, weritab Jesaia." 
Nehemiah11:8 Ak kirubei inendet Gabia, Salai, bik bogol sogol ak tiptem ak sisiit." 
Nehemiah11:9 Ak ki bounindenywa Joel weritab Sikri: ak ki ne bo aeng’ ne kibou nganaset Juda weritab Hasenua. 
Nehemiah11:9 Ak ki bounindenywa Joel weritab Sikri: ak ki ne bo aeng’ ne kibou nganaset Juda weritab Hasenua. 
Nehemiah11:10 Che bo tisiik ko ki Jedaia weritab Joiarib, Jakin," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraia weritab Hilkia, weritab Mesulam, weritab Sadok, weritab Meraiot, weritab Aitub, bounindetab gotab Kamuktaindet," 
Nehemiah11:12 ak tupchosiekwak che kiyai boisietab got, ko ki bik bogol sisiit ak tiptem ak aeng’: ak Adaia weritab Jeroam, weritab Pelalia, weritab Amsi, weritab Sekaria, weritab Pasur, weritab Malkija," 
Nehemiah11:13 ak tupchosiekyik, che eechen che bo gorikab kwanisiek, ko ki bik bogol aeng’ ak artam ak aeng’: ak Amashai weritab Asarel, weritab Asai, weritab Mesilemot, weritab Imer," 
Nehemiah11:14 ak tupchosiekwak, murenik che kimen che nyigonen, ko ki bogol ak tiptem ak sisiit: ak ki bounindenywa Sabdiel, weritab Hagedolim." 
Nehemiah11:15 Ak che bo Lawik ko ki Semaia weritab Hasub, weritab Asrikam, weritab Hasabia, weritab Buni;" 
Nehemiah11:16 ak Sabetai ak Josabad, che bo che eechen eng’ Lawik, che kibou boisietab sang’ ne bo gotab Kamuktaindet;" 
Nehemiah11:17 ak Matania weritab Mika, weritab Sabdi, weritab Asap, ne ki ne o ne kitau komwaei kongoi eng’ saet, ak Bakbukia, ne bo aeng’ eng’ tupchosiekyik; ak Abda weritab Samua, weritab Galal, weritab Jedutun." 
Nehemiah11:18 Lawik tugul che kimi nganaset ne tilil ko ki bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik sisiit ak ang’wan. 
Nehemiah11:19 Kogeny, ki bogol ak tamanwogik tisab ak aeng’ ribikab kurgotik, choto ko ki Akub, Talmon, ak tupchosiekwak che kiripsei eng’ ormarichok." 
Nehemiah11:20 Ak che king’et che bo Israel, eng’ tisiik, ak Lawik, ko kimi nganasok tugul che bo Juda, chi age tugul eng’ ole mi borotennyi." 
Nehemiah11:21 Ago kimeny Netinik Opel: ak kibou Netinik Siha ak Gispa. 
Nehemiah11:22 Ki bounindetab Lawik eng’ Jerusalem Usi weritab Bani, weritab Hasabia, weritab Matania, weritab Mika, ne bo werikab Asap, tienik, che kibou boisiet ne bo gotab Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah11:23 Amu kimi ng’atutiet ne king’atyi ichek laitoriat, ak tuguk che kigichopchi tienik, che yamei betut age tugul." 
Nehemiah11:24 Petaia weritab Mesesabel, ne bo lagokab Sera weritab Juda, ko ki toretindetab laitoriat eng’ ng’alek tugul che bo bik." 
Nehemiah11:25 Ak eng’ nganasok koboto mbarenikwak, ko kimenyei alak eng’ lagokab Juda, Kiriat-arba ak nganasokyik, ak eng’ Dibon ak nganasokyik, ak eng’ Jekabseel ak nganasokyik;" 
Nehemiah11:26 ak eng’ Jesua, ak eng’ Molada, ak Bet-pelet;" 
Nehemiah11:27 ak eng’ Hasar-sual, ak eng’ Beer-seba ak nganasokyik," 
Nehemiah11:28 ak eng’ Siklag, ak eng’ Mekona ak nganasokyik;" 
Nehemiah11:29 ak eng’ En-rimon, ak eng’ Sora, ak eng’ Jarmut;" 
Nehemiah11:30 Sanoa ak Adulam, ak nganasokwak, Lakis ak mbarenikyik, Aseka ak nganasokyik. Kimeny anyun koboch Beer-seba agoi atebwetab Hinom." 
Nehemiah11:31 Kimeny lagokab Benjamin agichek koboch Geba ak kwo tai, eng’ Mikmas ak Aija, ak eng’ Bet-el ak nganasokyik;" 
Nehemiah11:32 eng’ Anatot, Nob, Anania;" 
Nehemiah11:33 Hasor, Rama, Gitaim;" 
Nehemiah11:34 Hadid, Seboim, Nebalat;" 
Nehemiah11:35 Lod, ak Ono, atebwetab musogik." 
Nehemiah11:36 Ak kiiyomogei ak Benjamin, Lawik alage che bo Juda." 
Nehemiah12:1 Chu anyun ko tisiik ak Lawik che kitogosta koboto Serubabel weritab Sealtiel, ak Jesua: Seraia, Jeremia, Esra;" 
Nehemiah12:2 Amaria, Maluk, Hatus;" 
Nehemiah12:3 Sekania, Reum, Meremot;" 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Ginetoi, Abija;" 
Nehemiah12:5 Mijamin, Maadia, Bilga;" 
Nehemiah12:6 Semaia, Joiarib, Jedaia;" 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amok, Hilkia, Jedaia. Chuto ko ki che eechen eng’ tisiik ak che bo tupchosiekwak eng’ betusiekab Jesua." 
Nehemiah12:8 Lawik kogeny ko ki Jesua, Binui, Kadmiel, Serebia, Juda, ak Matania, ne kibou kagoitoetab kongoi, inendet koboto tupchosiekyik." 
Nehemiah12:9 Kitokyindos ak icheget eng’ ripsosiekwak tupchosiekwak Bakbukia, ak Uno," 
Nehemiah12:10 ak kisich Jesua Joiakim, ak kosich Joiakim Eliasib, kosich Eliasib Joiada," 
Nehemiah12:11 kosich Joiada Jonatan, kosich Jonatan Jadua." 
Nehemiah12:12 Ak kimi eng’ betusiekab Joiakim tisiik kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek: ne bo Seraia ko Meraia; ne bo Jeremia ko Hanania; 
Nehemiah12:13 ne bo Esra ko Mesulam; ne bo Amaria ko Jeohanan; 
Nehemiah12:14 ne bo Maluki ko Jonatan; ne bo Sepania ko Josep; 
Nehemiah12:15 ne bo Harim ko Adna; ne bo Meraiot ko Helkai; 
Nehemiah12:16 ne bo Ido ko Sekaria; ne bo Gineton ko Mesulam; 
Nehemiah12:17 ne bo Abija ko Sikri; ne bo Miniamin, ne bo Moadia ko Piltai;" 
Nehemiah12:18 ne bo Bilga ko Samua; ne bo Semaia ko Jeonatan; 
Nehemiah12:19 ne bo Joiarib ko Matenai; ne bo Jedaia ko Usi; 
Nehemiah12:20 ne bo Salai ko Kalai; ne bo Amok ko Eber; 
Nehemiah12:21 ne bo Hilkai ko Hasabia, ne bo Jedaia ko Netanel." 
Nehemiah12:22 Kigisir Lawik eng’ betusiekab Eliasib, Joiada, Johanan, ak Jadua koek kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek: ak kigisir tisiik agichek eng’ laitornatet Darius Persianindet." 
Nehemiah12:23 Kigisirji bukuitab ateptab betusiek, werikab Lawik, kandoikab gorikab kwanisiek, agoi betusiekab Johanan weritab Eliasib." 
Nehemiah12:24 Ak che eechen che bo Lawik ko ki Hasabia, Serebia, ak Jesua weritab Kadmiel, koboto tupchosiekwak che kitokyindos ak icheget, si kolos ak komwaei kongoi, kowaljingei, ko u ng’atutietab Daudi chitab Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah12:25 Ak ribikab kurgotik Matania, Bakbukia, Obadia, Mesulam, Talmon, Akub, che kiripsei eng’ chogenikab ormarichok." 
Nehemiah12:26 Kimi chuto eng’ betusiekab Joiakim weritab Jesua, weritab Josadak, ak eng’ betusiekab Neemia bounindet, ak eng’ betusiekab Esra tisiindet ak ko sirindet." 
Nehemiah12:27 Ak kicheng’ ichek Lawik eng’ komoswekwak tugul, eng’ betut ne kigitabane irimetab Jerusalem, si komut ichek kobwa Jerusalem, si koyai katabanisiet eng’ boiboiyet, koboto mwaetab kongoi, eng’ tiendo, ak eng’ sanisiekab sugunonik che kibirei, kibugandinik, ak eng’ ketubosiek." 
Nehemiah12:28 Ak kiiyumgei werikab tienik, kobunu warenget ne kiyiem Jerusalem, ak nganasokab Netopatik;" 
Nehemiah12:29 ak kibun kogeny Bet-gilgal, ak mbarenikab Geba ak Asmabet: amu kiga koteekyigei tienik nganasok koyiem Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah12:30 Ak kiianyinygei tisiik ak Lawik; ak kiianyiny bik, ak ormarichok, ak irimet." 
Nehemiah12:31 Yeityo amutu bounikab Juda kobwa irimet barak, ak alewen kweanaik aeng’ che eechen che mwaei kongoi ak koba kotenden; kiwa kweanet agenge komostab eutab tai kobun irimet kotokyigei ormarichetab ng’atatek:" 
Nehemiah12:32 ak kiisub ichek Hosaia, ak kebebertab bounikab Juda," 
Nehemiah12:33 ak Asaria, Esra ak Mesulam," 
Nehemiah12:34 Juda, Benjamin, Semaia, ak Jeremia," 
Nehemiah12:35 ak alak eng’ werikab tisiik kotinyei iriagok, choto ko Sekaria weritab Jonatan, weritab Semaia, weritab Matania, weritab Mikaia, weritab Sakur, weritab Asap;" 
Nehemiah12:36 ak tupchosiekyik, Semaia, Asarel, Milalai, Gilalai, Maai, Netanel, ak Juda, Hanani, kotinyei kibugandinik che bo Daudi chitab Kamuktaindet; ak kiindoe ichek Esra sirindet:" 
Nehemiah12:37 ak kitogostae ye negite ormarichetab kondametut, ak koba banda ne litit, kobun long’eiywotab nganasetab Daudi, eng’ ye kitogostoe eng’ irimet, kosiir gotab Daudi, kot koit ormarichetab beek eng’ komostab kong’asis." 
Nehemiah12:38 Ak kiwa kweanet age ne bo bichoto che kimwaei kongoi, kotorokta ichek, ak kiasub ichek, koboto kebeberta ne bo bik, eng’ irimet barak, kobun teekset ne koi barak ne bo mastinwek che eechen agoi irimet ne tebees;" 
Nehemiah12:39 ak kobun baragutab ormarichetab Epraim, ak ormarichet ne os, ak ormarichetab njirenik, ak teekset ne koi ne bo Hananel, ak teekset ne koi ne bo Hamea, agoi ormarichetab kechirek: ak kitononso ichek eng’ ormarichetab ribik." 
Nehemiah12:40 Kitononso anyun kweanaichoto tuwai che bo icheget che kimwaei kongoi eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet, kigimi tugul, koboto kebeberta ne bo bounik:" 
Nehemiah12:41 ak tisiik, Eliakim, Maaseia, Miniamin, Mikaia, Elioenai, Sekaria, ak Hanania, che kitinyei iriagok;" 
Nehemiah12:42 ak Maaseia, Semaia, Eleasar, Usi, Jeohanan, Malkija, Elam, ak Eser. Ak kitieni tienik eng’ kutit ne o, koboto Jesraia kandoindenywa." 
Nehemiah12:43 Ak kiigoito betunoto tiseiywek che eechen, ak koboiboitu; amu kiigochi Kamuktaindet ichek koboiboitu eng’ boiboiyet ne o; ak kiboiboitu agichek kwonyik ak lagok: kot kegasune boiboiyetab Jerusalem ole loo." 
Nehemiah12:44 Ak kigilewen eng’ betunoto bik korib gorik che bo orit ole kigonore tuguk, kagochinoik che kinamjin barak, ak tongoanik, ak kebeberwekab taman, kiyumji gorjoto, kobee mbarenik che bo nganasok, kebeberwek che kiging’at eng’ ng’atutiet kobunji tisiik ak Lawik: amu kibaibait Juda agobo tisiik ak Lawik che kiboisiei." 
Nehemiah12:45 Ak kitononji ripsetab Kamuktaindenywa, ak ripsetab kaanyinyet, ak kiyai anyun ko u noto tienik ak ribik, ko u ng’atutietab Daudi ak ne bo Solomon werinnyi." 
Nehemiah12:46 Amu kimi chito ne o ne bo tienik eng’ betusiekab Daudi ak Asap ne bo keny, ak tienwogikab kalosunet ak kagoitoetab kongoi ne kigochin Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah12:47 Ak kiigoito Israel tugul kebeberwekab tienik ak che bo ribikab kurgotik, eng’ betusiekab Serubabel, ak eng’ betusiekab Neemia, ko u che yamei betut age tugul: ak kiitabanji ichek Lawik, ak kiitabanji Lawik werikab Aron." 
Nehemiah13:1 Kisoman eng’ betunoto bukuitab Musa kogas bik; ak kiginyor ng’alek che kigisir kele machutei Amonindet ak Moabindet tuiyetab Kamuktaindet koigeny; 
Nehemiah13:2 amu kima torogune lagokab Israel amitwogik ak beek, ago kiigochi Balaam melekto kogirinda ichek, kochupto ichek: ago kiwal Kamuktaindennyo chubisiet koek kaberuret." 
Nehemiah13:3 Ak kingogas ichek Ng’atutiet, koisto tuiyet tugul ne bo bik che terotin komong’une Israelik." 
Nehemiah13:4 Ak ye kitomo koyaak ng’olyondonito, ko kiga kochob Eliasib tisiindet, ne kiga kilewen koboi gorik che bo orit che bo gotab Kamuktaindennyo, got ne o, kochopchi Tobia, ne ki tilionut," 
Nehemiah13:5 got ne kigigonore koboch keny, kagochinoik che bo busiek, ak ubani, ak terenik, ak kebeberwekab taman che bo bek, ak che bo divaik, ak che bo mwanik, che kimwa ng’atutik kole kigochi Lawik, ak tienik, ak ribikab kurgotik; ak kagochinoik che kinamjin barak che kigochin tisiik." 
Nehemiah13:6 Ago eng’ betusiechoto tugul ko kima ami Jerusalem: amu kiawe oldab laitoriat eng’ kenyitab sosom ak aeng’ ne bo Artaserses laitoriatab Babulon, ak kingobata betusiek alak asom laitoriat kochamwa awa:" 
Nehemiah13:7 ak kianyo Jerusalem ak agas yaitiet ne kiga koyai Eliasib agobo Tobia, amu kichopchi inendet got ne bo orit eng’ seremusiekab gotab Kamuktaindet." 
Nehemiah13:8 Ak kigona aarogen mising’: awirte anyun komanda tuguk tugul che bo gotab Tobia, komanda eng’ goyoto bo orit." 
Nehemiah13:9 Yeityo ang’at, ak kiitilil ichek gorik che bo orit: ak kiaib kogeny tugukab gotab Kamuktaindet koba yoto, koboto kagochinoikab busiek ak ubani." 
Nehemiah13:10 Ak kianai ale ma kigochi Lawik kebeberwekwak; amu noto anyun ko kimwei age tugul kwo mbarennyi eng’ Lawik ak tienik che kiyaei boisiet. 
Nehemiah13:11 Kiaborie anyun bounik alenji, Amu nee si kebagakta gotab Kamuktaindet? Ak kiayum ak ande ichek komostanywa." 
Nehemiah13:12 Kiib anyun Juda tugul kebeberwekab taman che bo bek ak che bo divaik ak che bo mwanik, konde ole kigonore tuguk." 
Nehemiah13:13 Ak kiande ribik korib ole kigonore tuguk, Selemia tisiindet, ak Sadok sirindet, ak eng’ Lawik ko Pedaia; ak kirubei ichek Hanan weritab Sakur, weritab Matania: amu kigiit kele bik che kiyani, ak ki boisienywa ko kopchechi tupchosiekwak tuguk." 
Nehemiah13:14 Ibwata, ee Kamuktaindennyu, agobo ng’olyondonito, amat ibuch boisionikyuk che miach che kiayai agobo gotab Kamuktaindennyu, ak boisionikyik." 
Nehemiah13:15 Kiageer eng’ betusiechoto eng’ Juda alak che kitiechei sabibuk eng’ ole kituisie eng’ betutab sabato, ak koibu ratutikab bek, ak koratyin sigirok; kiyai ko u noto eng’ divaik, ak sabibuk, ak logoekab mogoonik, ak lautik alak tugul, che kiibu kobwa Jerusalem eng’ betutab sabato: ak kiabaorian agirinde ichek eng’ betunoto kialdoi amitwogik." 
Nehemiah13:16 Kimenyei oloto bikab Turo agichek, che kiibu njirenik, ak tuguk alak tugul che bo mung’aret, ak koaldochi lagokab Juda eng’ betutab sabato, ak eng’ Jerusalem." 
Nehemiah13:17 Yeityo aborie bik che toogunotin che bo Juda, ak alenji ichek, Nee yaitioni oyae, ak ong’eme betutab sabato?" 
Nehemiah13:18 Tos kima yai ko u noto kwanisiekwok, ak tos kima ibwech Kamuktaindennyo yaitioni tugul, ak nganasani? Ago oipchini kora Israel neregek che siirei amu ong’eme sabato." 
Nehemiah13:19 Ak ye kimachei koimenit eng’ ormarichokab Jerusalem ye kitom koit sabato, ang’at keger ormarichok, ak ang’at ale magiyatei kot kogesgei sabato: ak kiande otwogikyuk alak korib ormarichok, si ma kiib konyo orit lautiet age tugul eng’ betutab sabato." 
Nehemiah13:20 Kitebe anyun sang’utab Jerusalem konyil agenge anan aeng’, chemung’arainik ak che aldoi tuguk alak tugul che bo mung’aret." 
Nehemiah13:21 Yeityo abaorian agirinde ichek, ak alenji ichek, Amu nee si otebe ole negite irimet? Ngot ko ta oyai ko u no kogeny, anamok. Koboch betunoto ko mata kobwa ichek eng’ betutab sabato." 
Nehemiah13:22 Ak kiang’at Lawik koanyinygei, ak kobwa korib ormarichok, kotaban betutab sabato. Ibwata, ee Kamuktaindennyu, agobo ng’olyondonito agine, ak irirena ko u oindab rireneng’ung’." 
Nehemiah13:23 Kiageer kogeny eng’ betusiechoto Yahudik che kiga kotun tibikab Asdod, che bo Amon, ak che bo Moab;" 
Nehemiah13:24 ak king’alali lagokwak kebebertab ng’alekab Asdodik, ama imuch kong’alal eng’ kutitab Yahudik, ago king’alal lagochato kosub kutitab bororienywa." 
Nehemiah13:25 Ak kiaborie ichek, ak achub, ak abir alak eng’ ichek, ak ang’ei sumekwak, ak abirji ichek koyosio eng’ Kamuktaindet, alenji, Amat ogochi tibikwok werikwak, anan otunji werikwok tibikwak, anan otun okweget." 
Nehemiah13:26 Tos kima yai tengek Solomon laitoriatab Israel eng’ tuguchu? Nganda kima komi laitoriat ne u inendet eng’ bororiosiek che chang’, ak ki chamat eng’ Kamuktaindennyi, ak kiinde Kamuktaindet inendet koek laitoriat koboi Israel tugul: ago kiigochi tibikab bororiosiek alak inendet koyai tengekto." 
Nehemiah13:27 Tos kigasak it anyun keyai yaitioni o tugul, kingelelji Kamuktaindennyo kitun tibikab bororiosiek alak?" 
Nehemiah13:28 Ak ki sandetab Sanbalat Horonindet, age eng’ werikab Joiada, weritab Eliasib tisiindet ne o: kiaon anyun inendet kwo eng’ ole ami." 
Nehemiah13:29 Ibwat ichek, ee Kamuktaindennyu, amu kigong’wanit tiseinatet, ak kayomisutietab tiseinatet, ak ne bo Lawik." 
Nehemiah13:30 Kiaanyiny ichek anyun eng’ bikab bororiosiek tugul, ak ang’at ripsosiekab tisiik ak che bo Lawik, age tugul eng’ boisiennyi." 
Nehemiah13:31 Ak che bo kagochinetab kwenik, eng’ betusiek che kiging’at, ak che bo tongoanik. Ibwata, ee Kamuktaindennyu eng’ tuguk che miach." 
Esther1:1 Eng’ betusiekab Aasuerus (Aasuerus-nito ko ne kilaitorani koboch India agoi Etiopia, kobou emotinwek bogol ak tiptem ak tisab:)" 
Esther1:2 eng’ betusiechoto, ye kitebe laitoriat Aasuerus ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo bounatennyi, ne kimi Susan, nganaset ne o;" 
Esther1:3 eng’ kenyit ne bo somok ne bo laitornatennyi, ko kiyachi igorta bounikyik tugul ak otwogikyik; komi tainnyi bik che toogunotin ak bounikab emotinwek, che ki kimnatetab Persia ak Media:" 
Esther1:4 ye kingobiit tuguchoto kobarta magornatosiekab bounatennyi ne toror, ak teegistab etunatennyi ne siirtoot, eng’ betusiek che chang’, betusiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit." 
Esther1:5 Ak kingogesgei betusiechuto, koyachi laitoriat igorta bik tugul che kimi Susan, nganaset ne o, che eechen koboto che mengechen, eng’ betusiek tisab eng’ seremutab mbaretab gotab laitoriat;" 
Esther1:6 kimitei ngoroik che songinindos che ki leelach, ak che ki nyalilen, ak che ki tuuen ne nyalil, che kigirate boroonik che bo katanit ne kararan, ak ne arus ne birir, keratyi tamogok che bo feda eng’ tolochikab koik che leelach: ki bo tahabu ak feda itogusiek, kiginde ng’ony ole kigimale koik che biriren, ak che leelach, ak che sogionen, ak che tuuen." 
Esther1:7 Ak kiinaga ichek koee eng’ tuguk che bo tahabu, (ki terjin tuguchoto,) ak divaik che chang’ che bo laitoriat, ko u aiyebindab laitoriat." 
Esther1:8 Ak kieei ko u ng’atutiet; kima kibirji chi: amu kiga kong’at laitoriat ko u noto agobo kiptainik tugul che bo gonnyi, kole koyai ko u ye machei chi tugul." 
Esther1:9 Kiyachi agine Basiti, osotiotab laitoriat, igorta, kwonyik tugul che kimi gotab laitoriat che ki bo laitoriat Aasuerus." 
Esther1:10 Eng’ betut ne bo tisab, ye kibaibai muguleldab laitoriat amu divaik, kong’at inendet Meuman, Bista, Harbona, Bigta, Abagta, Setar, ak Karkas, ribik tisab che kiboisiei eng’ taitab laitoriat Aasuerus," 
Esther1:11 komut Basiti osotiotab laitoriat konyo taitab laitoriat kolaagonu nariet ne bo laitornatet, si koborji kororonindanyi bik ak bounik, amu ki kararan." 
Esther1:12 Ago kiesio Basiti osotiotab laitoriat konyo ye kingong’at laitoriat inendet eng’ kutitab ribik: kinerech anyun mising’ laitoriat, ak kilalyo neregekyik eng’ inendet." 
Esther1:13 Kolenji anyun laitoriat bik che ng’omen, che kiingen betusiek, (amu ki u noto ateptab laitoriat eng’ tugul che ingen ng’atutik ak kiruogutik:" 
Esther1:14 ak che kirubei inendet ko ki Karsena, Setar, Admata, Tarsis, Meres, Marsena, ak Memukan, bounik tisab che bo Persia ak Media, che kigeerei togetab laitoriat, che kisib kinde koek che eechen eng’ bounatet:)" 
Esther1:15 kile, Kiitoi nee Basiti osotiotab laitoriat ko u ye mwaei ng’atutik, amu ma yai kit ne king’at laitoriat Aasuerus ne kimwa eng’ ribik?" 
Esther1:16 Ak kiwol Memukan eng’ taitab laitoriat ak bounik kole, Ma yachi ne ya Basiti, osotiondonoto bo laitoriat, laitoriat inegei, ago kayachi ne ya bounik tugul, ak bik tugul che mi emotinwek tugul che bo laitoriat Aasuerus." 
Esther1:17 Amu tun kasei kwonyik tugul boisionito bo osotiondonito, si koyai manong’otaikwak koek che kisasei eng’ tainywa, ye tun kagimwaita kele, King’at laitoriat Aasuerus kimut Basiti osotiondennyi konyo tainnyi, ago ma nyo." 
Esther1:18 Ak imuchi komwa ko u noto rani tibikab laitorinikab Persia ak Media che kagogas agobo boisietab osotiotab laitoriat, komwachi bounik tugul che bo laitoriat. Ak kobiit anyun sasisiet ne o ak neregek che chang’." 
Esther1:19 Ngot kocham anyun laitoriat, ko mie komwa inendet ng’atutiet ne bo laitornatet, ak ngesir koboto ng’atutikab Persik ak Medik, si ma kiwal, kele ma konyonei kogeny Basiti taitab laitoriat Aasuerus; ak ingogochi laitoriat etunatennyi ne bo laitornatet, chito age ne kaigai kosiir inendet." 
Esther1:20 Ak ye tun kagimwaita ng’atutietab laitoriat ne tun yaei eng’ bounatennyi tugul, (amu o,) kogochi anyun osotik tugul manong’otaikwak teegisto, kogochi che eechen ak che mengechen." 
Esther1:21 Ak kiibaibai ng’olyondonoto laitoriat ak bounik; ak kiyai laitoriat ko u ng’olyotab Memukan: 
Esther1:22 amu kiiyokto baronok koba emotinwek tugul che bo laitoriat, koba emet age tugul ko u sirenywa, ak koba bororiet age tugul eng’ kutinywa, kole, koboi chi tugul gonnyi, ak komwaita eng’ kutitab bikyik." 
Esther2:1 Kingobata tuguchuto, ko kagogesgei neregekab Aasuerus, kobwat Basiti, ak kit ne kiga koyai, ak kit ne kiga king’at agobo inendet." 
Esther2:2 Yeityo komwa otwogikab laitoriat che kiboisiechin inendet, kole, Ingecheng’ji laitoriat bergeinik che neran che kororon:" 
Esther2:3 ak ingonde laitoriat kiptainik emotinwek tugul che bo bounatennyi, si kobiit koyum bergeinik tugul che neran che kororon kobwa Susan, nganaset ne o, kobwa gotab kwonyik, konyo korib Hegai, ribindetab laitoriat, ne kiribei kwonyik; ak ingigochi tugukwak che ianyinyegei:" 
Esther2:4 ak koek osotiotab laitoriat chepto ne iboiboi laitoriat kogeer Basiti. Ak kiibaibai laitoriat ng’olyondoni; ak kiyai ko u noto. 
Esther2:5 Kimi Yahudiot age Susan, nganaset ne o, ne kigiguure Mordekai, weritab Jair, weritab Simei, weritab Kis, Benjaminindet;" 
Esther2:6 ne kiga kimut eng’ Jerusalem koboto luulenik, che kiga kimut koboto Jekonia laitoriatab Juda, che kiga komut Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon." 
Esther2:7 Ak kiigui Hadasa, noto ko Esta, cheptab ne tupcho ak kwandanyi: amu kima kotinyei kwanda ak kamet, ak ki chepto ne kitinyei itondo ne mie ak toget ne kararan; ak ye kingome kwandanyi ak kamennyi, konam Mordekai koek cheptanyi." 
Esther2:8 Ak kingegas ng’olyotab laitoriat ak ng’atutiennyi, ak kingiyum tibik che chang’ kobwa Susan, nganaset ne o, korib Hegai, ko kigimut Esta konyo gotab laitoriat, korib Hegai, ne kiribei kwonyik." 
Esther2:9 Ak kiibaibai cheboto inendet, ak kinyor chamet eng’ inendet; ak kisib kogochi inendet tugukyik che ianyinyegei, koboto kebeberwekyik, ak tibik tisab, che kinyol kigochi inendet, eng’ gotab laitoriat: ak kiiuu inendet ak tibikyik koba komosta ne kararan kot ne bo gotab kwonyik." 
Esther2:10 Kitom kobor Esta ole salu bikyik anan tilionutikyik: amu kiga kong’at Mordekai inendet si mamwa. 
Esther2:11 Ak kiwendote Mordekai betut age tugul taitab seremut ne bo gotab kwonyik, si kobiit konai ole teptoi Esta, ak kit ne kiyachin inendet." 
Esther2:12 Ak kingoit betut ne wendi chepto age tugul ole mi laitoriat Aasuerus, ko kageyachi ko u ye mwaei ng’atutik agobo kwonyik, eng’ arawek taman ak aeng’, (amu ki u noto kagesunetab betusiekab kaanyinyenywa bo ge, bo arawek lo mwanikab tuguk che u igomoik, ko bo arawek lo nyamdutik, ak tuguk che bo kaanyinyetab kwonyik,)" 
Esther2:13 kinyonei anyun ko u nito chepto ole mi laitoriat, kigigochin kit age tugul ne machei koib eng’ gotab kwonyik kwo gotab laitoriat." 
Esther2:14 Kiwendi koskoleny, ak koweek mutai kwo got ne bo aeng’ ne bo kwonyik korib Saasgas, ribindetab laitoriat, ne kiribei chebaigeinik: kima kota kowendi kogeny cheboto ole mi laitoriat, kobate ngo cham laitoriat cheboto, ak keguur kainennyi." 
Esther2:15 Ak kingoit anyun betutab Esta, cheptab Abiail imametab Mordekai, ne kiga nam cheboto koek cheptanyi, ye wendi ole mi laitoriat, ko ma mach kiy age tugul kobate kit ne king’at Hegai ribindetab laitoriat, ne kiribei kwonyik. Ak kichamak Esta eng’ taitab bik tugul che kigeer inendet." 
Esther2:16 Kigimut anyun Esta kwo ole mi laitoriat Aasuerus eng’ gonnyi ne bo laitornatet, eng’ arawetab taman, noto ko arawetab Tebet, eng’ kenyit ne bo tisab ne bo laitornatennyi." 
Esther2:17 Ak kicham laitoriat Esta kosiir tibik tugul, ak kinyor mieindo ak chamet eng’ tainnyi kosiir bergeinik tugul; kot kolaakyi inendet narietab laitornatet, ak kotun inendet kogeere Basiti." 
Esther2:18 Kiyachi anyun laitoriat igorta ne o bounikyik tugul ak otwogikyik, igortab Esta; ak kiigochi kamuung’et emotinwek, ak kogoito kagochinoik, ko u aiyebindab laitoriat." 
Esther2:19 Ak kingo kagoyumgei bergeinik ne bo aeng’, koteb Mordekai eng’ ormarichetab laitoriat." 
Esther2:20 Kitom kobor Esta ole salu tilionutikyik anan bikyik: ko u ye kiga ng’at Mordekai inendet: amu kigas it Esta ng’atutietab Mordekai, ko u atkinyei koribei inendet." 
Esther2:21 Eng’ betusiechoto, ye kitebyei Mordekai eng’ ormarichetab laitoriat, konerekso ribik aeng’ che bo laitoriat, Bigtan ak Teres, che kiribei kurget, ak kocheng’ kobar laitoriat Aasuerus." 
Esther2:22 Ak kinaak kioto eng’ Mordekai, ne kimwachi Esta osotiotab laitoriat; ak kimwachi Esta laitoriat ng’olyondonoto, komwaitochi Mordekai." 
Esther2:23 Ak kingo kagegin ng’olyondonoto, ak kenai kele u noto, ko kigigartat bichoto tuwai eng’ ketit: ak kigisirji ng’olyondonoto bukuitab ateptab betusiek eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
Esther3:1 Kingobata tuguchuto koeet laitoriat Aasuerus Haman weritab Hamedata Agagindet, ak kotoror inendet ak kogochi kotebe ng’echeret ne toror kosiir bounik tugul che kimi koboto inendet." 
Esther3:2 Ak kiing’urukso otwogik tugul che bo laitoriat che kimi ormarichetab laitoriat, ak kogonyit Haman: amu kiga kong’at laitoriat ko u noto agobo inendet. Ago kima ing’uruk Mordekai, anan kogonyit inendet." 
Esther3:3 Komwachi anyun otwogikab laitoriat che kimi ormarichetab laitoriat, Mordekai, kolenji, Amu nee si ibistoe ng’atutietab laitoriat?" 
Esther3:4 Kingong’alaljin anyun inendet eng’ betut age tugul, ak kima kas ichek, komwachi Haman kogeer ngo mie kotebi ng’alekab Mordekai ko u noto: amu kiga komwachi ichek kolenji, a Yahudiot." 
Esther3:5 Ak kingogeer Haman kole ma ing’uruk Mordekai, anan kogonyit inendet, konerech mising’." 
Esther3:6 Ago kigeer kole matilei kiy kobar Mordekai inegei; amu kiga koborji ichek inendet ole salu bikab Mordekai: kocheng’ anyun Haman kobar Yahudik tugul che kimi bounatet tugul ne bo Aasuerus, choto ko bikab Mordekai." 
Esther3:7 Eng’ arawet ne bo tai, noto ko arawetab Nisan, eng’ kenyitab taman ak aeng’ ne bo laitoriat Aasuerus, koser Pur, noto ko barbarek, eng’ taitab Haman, koboch betut agoi betut, ak koboch arawet agoi arawet, agoi arawetab taman ak aeng’, noto ko arawetab Adar." 
Esther3:8 Ak kilenji Haman laitoriat Aasuerus, Mi bik alak che kiyom emet ak koiyestaat eng’ kwenutab bik eng’ emotinwek tugul che bo bounateng’ung’, ak terjin ng’atutikwak ak che bo bik alak tugul; ama ribei ichek ng’atutikab laitoriat: matoreti kiy anyun eng’ laitoriat kobagakta ichek." 
Esther3:9 Ngot kochamei laitoriat, ingesir kele kebar ichek: ak agochi bik che tononjin boisionoto, talentaisiek elfusiek taman che bo feda, koib kobwa ole kigonore tugukab laitoriat." 
Esther3:10 Kiinem anyun laitoriat peteit eng’ eunnyi, ak kogochi Haman weritab Hamedata Agagindet, ne ki bunyotab Yahudik." 
Esther3:11 Ak kilenji laitoriat Haman, Kagigonin feda, ak bik agichek, si kobiit iyachi ko u ye igeere ile mie." 
Esther3:12 Kigiguur anyun sirikab laitoriat kobwa eng’ arawet ne bo tai eng’ betutab taman ak somok, ak kigisir ko u tugul che king’at Haman, kong’atyi kiptainikab laitoriat, ak bounik che kibou emet age tugul, ak bounikab bororiet age tugul; kigisirji emet age tugul ko u sirennyi, ak bororiet age tugul ko u kutinywa; kigisir eng’ kainetab laitoriat Aasuerus, ak kiging’och eng’ peteitab laitoriat." 
Esther3:13 Ak kigiyokto baronok, kiyoktae bik koba emotinwek tugul che bo laitoriat, kelenji, keng’em, kebar, kilus, Yahudik tugul, neranik ak che osen, lagok che mengechen ak kwonyik, eng’ betut agenge, eng’ betutab taman ak somok eng’ arawetab taman ak aeng’, noto ko arawetab Adar, ak konam tugukwak koek barunenik." 
Esther3:14 Ak kigimwachi bororiosiek tugul ng’alekab sirutichoto, si kobiit kigoito ng’atutiet eng’ emet age tugul, si kochobogis agobo betunoto." 
Esther3:15 Kiba anyun bik che kiga kiyokto kochakta eng’ ng’atutietab laitoriat, ak kigigon ng’atutionoto eng’ Susan, nganaset ne o: ak kiteb ng’ony laitoriat ak Haman koeeiso; ago kiimgei nganasetab Susan." 
Esther4:1 Ye kingonai Mordekai tuguk tugul che kagoyaak, kogerer Mordekai ngoroikyik, ak kolaach kuniok ak koiilegei orek, ak kwo kwenutab nganaset, ak kote eng’ kutit ne o ak rirekab ng’wanindo ne o:" 
Esther4:2 ak kinyo taitab ormarichetab laitoriat: amu ma kichamji chi age tugul kochut ormarichetab laitoriat kolaachi kuniok. 
Esther4:3 Ak kibiit arogenet ne o eng’ Yahudik, ak karugutetab ge, ak rirek ak kateeiyet eng’ emet age tugul ne kiit ng’olyotab laitoriat ak ng’atutiennyi, ak kisieb che chang’ eng’ ichek kuniok ak orek." 
Esther4:4 Ak kibwa tibikab Esta ak ribikyik, ak komwachi inendet ng’olyondonoto; ak kiarogen mising’ osotiotab laitoriat: ak kiiyokto ngoroik kilaakyi Mordekai, ak kireegune kuniok: ago ma taach." 
Esther4:5 Kiguur anyun Esta Hatak, age eng’ ribikab laitoriat, ne kiga konde laitoriat koboisiechi kwonyoto, ak kong’at inendet kwo ole mi Mordekai, si kobiit konai kole nee nito, ak amu nee si koyaak ko u noto." 
Esther4:6 Kwo anyun Hatak ole mi Mordekai agoi ole baraa eng’ nganaset, ne kimi taitab ormarichetab laitoriat." 
Esther4:7 Ak kimwachi Mordekai inendet tuguk tugul che kagoyaak agobo inendet, ak fedaisiek tugul che kiga koarorji Haman kole konde ole kigonore tugukab laitoriat, agobo Yahudik, kole si kebar ichek." 
Esther4:8 Ak kiigochi kogeny inendet ng’alekab sirutik che bo ng’atutiet ne kigimwaita eng’ Susan kele kebar ichek, si koborji Esta, ak komwachi ole teptoi; ak kong’at inendet kwo ole mi laitoriat, kwo korirji inendet, ak kosomso eng’ tainnyi agobo bikyik." 
Esther4:9 Ak kinyo Hatak ak komwachi Esta ng’alekab Mordekai. 
Esther4:10 Kong’alalji anyun Esta Hatak, ak komwachi inendet ng’alek koipchi Mordekai, kolenji," 
Esther4:11 Ingen otwogik tugul che bo laitoriat, ak bik che bo emotinwekab laitoriat, kole, age tugul, ngo muren anan kwony, ne nyonei ole mi laitoriat eng’ seremut ne mi orit, ne ma kiguur, komi ng’atutiet agenge agobo inendet, kele kibarei, kobate icheget che iyogochin laitoriat siaritab tahabu, si kosob: ago tomo keguura anyo ole mi laitoriat eng’ betusiechu sosom." 
Esther4:12 Ak kimwachi ichek Mordekai ng’alekab Esta. 
Esther4:13 Kong’at anyun Mordekai ichek koipchi Esta wolunet, kolenji, Amat ibwat ile ichilili eng’ gotab laitoriat, kosiir Yahudik tugul." 
Esther4:14 Amu ngot isis kityo eng’ betusiechuto, konyor Yahudik toretet ak katiaget eng’ komosta age, ago iluse inye ak gotab kwandang’ung’: ak ng’o ne ingen ngo tos kima inyonji bounatet agobo betusiek che u chuto?" 
Esther4:15 Kong’at anyun Esta ichek keipchi Mordekai wolunet, kelenji," 
Esther4:16 Ui iyum Yahudik tugul che mitei Susan, ak orugutge agobo ane, amat oam kiy anan oeeise eng’ betusiek somok, kemoi anan bet: arugutige agane ko u noto koboto tibikyuk: ak awe anyun ole mi laitoriat, ama ko u ng’atutiet: ak ngalus, alus." 
Esther4:17 Kwo anyun Mordekai ak koyai ko u tugul che kang’at Esta inendet. 
Esther5:1 Ak eng’ betut ne bo somok, kolaach Esta ngoroikyik che bo laitornatet, ak kotonon eng’ seremut ne bo orit ne bo gotab laitoriat, ne tokyingei gotab laitoriat: ak kitebe laitoriat ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet eng’ gotab laitornatet, kotokyigei ole kibunei kebendi go." 
Esther5:2 Ak kingogeer laitoriat osotiondennyi Esta kotononi eng’ seremut, konyor chamet eng’ tainnyi: ak kiiyogochi laitoriat Esta siarit ne bo tahabu ne kiting’e eunnyi. Korikta anyun Esta, ak kotwa walitab siarinato." 
Esther5:3 Kolenji anyun laitoriat inendet, Imache nee Esta, osotiondoni bo laitoriat? Ak nee kit ne isome? Kigonin agot ngo kebebertab bounatet." 
Esther5:4 Ak kile Esta, Ngot kogeer laitoriat kole mie, ingonyo laitoriat ak Haman rani igorta ne o ne kaachopchi inendet." 
Esther5:5 Yeityo komwa laitoriat kole, Omwachi Haman kochok, si kobiit koyaak ko u ye kagomwa Esta. Kinyo anyun laitoriat koboto Haman igorato kagochob Esta." 
Esther5:6 Ak kilenji laitoriat Esta komi igortab divaik, Nee someng’ung’? Si kegonin. Ak nee kit ne isome? Agot ngo kebebertab bounatet, keyaei." 
Esther5:7 Kiwolji anyun Esta kolenji, Somennyu ak kit ne asome ko:" 
Esther5:8 Ngot ko kaanyoru chamet eng’ taitab laitoriat, ak ngot koboiboi laitoriat somennyu, koyaiywa anyun kit ne asome, ko ingobwa laitoriat ak Haman igorta ne o ne achopchini ichek, ak ayai mutai ko u ye kagomwa laitoriat." 
Esther5:9 Kwo anyun Haman eng’ betunoto kobaibai ak kogasegei eng’ muguleldo: ago ye kingogeer Haman Mordekai eng’ ormarichetab laitoriat, kole ma tonon anan koistochigei inendet, konerekyi Mordekai mising’." 
Esther5:10 Ago kimuita Haman, kwo ga; ak kiiyokto keguur choronokyik ak Seres osotiondennyi." 
Esther5:11 Ak kimwachi Haman ichek torornatetab magornatosiekyik, ak chang’indab lagokyik, ak tuguk tugul che kiieete laitoriat inendet kosiir bounik ak otwogik che bo laitoriat." 
Esther5:12 Kile Haman kogeny, Ma chamji Esta osotiotab laitoriat chi age tugul koba ak laitoriat igorta ne o, ne kiga kochob, kobatena; ak kaguura kogeny inendet kebe ak laitoriat mutai." 
Esther5:13 Ago maiiti chuto tugul, kota ageere Mordekai Yahudiot kotebyei eng’ ormarichetab laitoriat." 
Esther5:14 Kolenji anyun Seres osotiondennyi ak choronokyik tugul, Ingelumda ketit ne kigetisie ne bo kakwautik konom che bo eut ne tonon, ak imwachi laitoriat mutai ilenji kigartate kioto Mordekai: yeityo iwe inye igorta eng’ kagasetab ge koboto laitoriat. Ak kiibaibai kioto Haman; ak king’at keyai ketoto kigetisie." 
Esther6:1 Ma imuch laitoriat konuuch kemounoto; ak king’at keib bukuitab sirutik che bo ateptab betusiek, ak kigisoman eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
Esther6:2 Ak kiginyor ko sirat kele, Kimwaita Mordekai Bigtana ak Teres, che ki ribik aeng’ che bo laitoriat, che bo icheget che kiribei kurget, che kiga cheng’ kobar laitoriat Aasuerus." 
Esther6:3 Ak kile laitoriat, Nee teegisto ak etunatet ne kigeyachi Mordekai agobo kioto? Kole anyun otwogikab laitoriat che kiboisiechin inendet, Mami kiy ne kigeyachi inendet." 
Esther6:4 Ak kile laitoriat, Ng’o ne mi serem? Kiga konyo Haman seremut ne bo sang’ ne bo gotab laitoriat, konyo kong’alalji laitoriat si kigartat Mordekai eng’ ketit ne kiga kochopchi inendet." 
Esther6:5 Ak kimwa otwogikab laitoriat, komwachi laitoriat, kolenji, Keero, tononi Haman eng’ serem. Ak kile laitoriat, Ingonyo go." 
Esther6:6 Konyo go anyun Haman. Ak kilenji laitoriat inendet, Kiyachin nee chito ne chamei mising’ laitoriat kotoror? Komwa anyun Haman eng’ muguleldanyi kole, Ng’o age ne chamei mising’ laitoriat kotoror kisiira?" 
Esther6:7 Ak kilenji Haman laitoriat, Chito ne kacham mising’ laitoriat kotoror," 
Esther6:8 ko ingeipchi ngoroik che bo laitornatet, che cham kolaachi laitoriat, ak keget mbartanyit ne lanyei laitoriat, ne kiginde metinnyi nariet ne bo laitornatet:" 
Esther6:9 ak ingigochi ngoroichoto ak mbartanyit chito age eng’ bounik che toogunotin mising’ che bo laitoriat, si kolaakyi chito ne chamei mising’ laitoriat kotoror, ak kogochi kolany mbartanyit kobun oretab nganaset, ak komwaita eng’ tainnyi, kole, Kiyachin ko u noto chito ne chamei mising’ laitoriat kotoror." 
Esther6:10 Komwachi anyun laitoriat Haman, kolenji, Chakte, ib ngoroik ak ikweri mbartanyit, ko u ye kaimwa, ak iyachi ko u noto Mordekai, ne tebyei eng’ ormarichetab laitoriat: amat kebagakta kiy eng’ choto tugul kaimwa." 
Esther6:11 Kiib anyun Haman ngoroik ak kokweri mbartanyit, kwo kolaakyi Mordekai, ak kogochi kolany mbartanyit kobun oretab nganaset, ak komwaita eng’ tainnyi kole, Kiyachin ko u ni chito ne kacham mising’ laitoriat kotoror." 
Esther6:12 Ak kinyo kogeny Mordekai ormarichetab laitoriat. Ago kichakta Haman kwo gonnyi, koarogenoti kotugot metinnyi." 
Esther6:13 Ak kimwachi Haman Seres osotiondennyi ak choronokyik tugul kit age tugul ne kagoityi inendet. Komwachi anyun bikyik che ng’omen ak osotiondennyi Seres, Haman, kolenji, Ngot ko bo Mordekai oretab Yahudik, inendet ne kaitau ibutyi tainnyi, ko meterteri inendet, ago ibutyini tainnyi." 
Esther6:14 Ye kita kong’alali ak inendet, kobwa ribikab laitoriat, komut Haman kochogune konyo igorta ne o ne kiga kochob Esta." 
Esther7:1 Kibwa anyun laitoriat ak Haman koam igorta koboto Esta osotiotab laitoriat. 
Esther7:2 Ak kimwachi kogeny laitoriat Esta eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ ne bo igortab divaik kolenji, Nee someng’ung’-o, Esta, osotiotab laitoriat? Si kegonin. Ak nee ne isome? Kigonin agot ngo kebebertab bounatet." 
Esther7:3 Kowolji anyun Esta osotiotab laitoriat kole, Ngot ko kaanyoru chamet eng’ taing’ung’, ee laitoriat, ak ngot kobaibai laitoriat, ko ingegona sobondanyu amu somennyu, ak bikyuk amu kioto kasom:" 
Esther7:4 amu kigealdech, ane ak bikyuk, si kobiit keng’emech, kebarech, ak kelusye. Ago nda kiga kialdech keegu otwogik che murenik ak che kwonyik, ko kota asise, ago ko ma kota imuchi bunyot koyaakyi laitoriat bichu ko ta betos." 
Esther7:5 Yeityo komwachi anyun laitoriat Aasuerus Esta osotiondennyi kolenji, Ng’o noto, ak komi ano inendet, ne kogany koyai ko u ni eng’ muguleldanyi?" 
Esther7:6 Ak kile Esta, Kanyalilindoni ak ko bunyot, sogoranani Haman. Kiarogen anyun Haman eng’ taitab laitoriat ak osotiotab laitoriat." 
Esther7:7 King’eet laitoriat eng’ neregek kwo eng’ igorato bo divaik, kwo mbaretab gotab laitoriat: ak kotonon Haman kole kosom Esta osotiotab laitoriat kesor sobondanyi; amu kigeer kole kagobegechi laitoriat koyachi inendet yaitiet." 
Esther7:8 Kiweek anyun laitoriat eng’ mbaretab gotab laitoriat, kwo ole kimi igorta ne bo divaik, ak kiga kobutyi Haman kit ne kilyeldoe Esta. Kole anyun laitoriat, Machei kosuub osotiondennyu eng’ tainnyu eng’ go? Ye kita kong’alali ak laitoriat, ketuch togetab Haman." 
Esther7:9 Yeityo komwa Harbona, ne ki agenge eng’ ribik che kimi taitab laitoriat kole, Keero, mitei ketit ne kigartate bik, ne bo kakwautik konom che bo eut tonon, ne kiga kochopchi Haman Mordekai, ne kimwa ne mie agobo laitoriat, lumdaat ketoto eng’ gotab Haman. Ak kile laitoriat, Ogartate inendet ketoto." 
Esther7:10 Kiigartat anyun bichoto Haman eng’ ketit ne kiga kochopchi inendet Mordekai. Kosisyo anyun neregekab laitoriat. 
Esther8:1 Kiigochi anyun eng’ betunoto laitoriat Aasuerus Esta osotiondennyi, gotab Haman bunyotab Yahudik. Ak kinyo Mordekai taitab laitoriat; amu kiga komwa Esta kit ne kiguuregei ak inendet." 
Esther8:2 Ak kiinem laitoriat peteinnyi, ne kiga rebe Haman, ak kogochi Mordekai. Ak kiinde Esta Mordekai koboi gotab Haman." 
Esther8:3 Ak king’alal Esta kogeny eng’ taitab laitoriat, ak kobutyi kelyekyik, kogaigai eng’ beekab kong’ kole koisto yaitietab Haman Agagindet, ak ng’alekyik che yaachen che kimachei koyachi Yahudik." 
Esther8:4 Kiiyogochi anyun laitoriat Esta siaritab tahabu. Kong’eet anyun Esta, ak kotonon eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
Esther8:5 Ak kole, Ngot koboiboi nito laitoriat, ak ngot ko kaanyoru chamet eng’ tainnyi, ak ngot kogeer laitoriat kole mie ng’olyondonoto, ak aboiboi inendet, ko ingesir kewal baronok che kichobei Haman weritab Hamedata Agagindet, che kisir kole keng’em Yahudik che mi emotinwek tugul che bo laitoriat." 
Esther8:6 Amu amuktoi ano amuita ak ageere yaitiet ne nyonjin bikyuk? Anan amuktoi ano amuita ak ageere ng’emisietab tilionutikyuk? 
Esther8:7 Kilenji anyun laitoriat Aasuerus Esta osotiondennyi ak Mordekai Yahudiot, Ogeero, kaagochi Esta gotab Haman, ak kogigartat inendet eng’ ketit amu kimachei kobar Yahudik." 
Esther8:8 Osirji ak okwek Yahudik, ko u ye omache, eng’ kainetab laitoriat, ak ong’och eng’ peteitab laitoriat: amu maimuchi kowal chi baruet ne kisirei eng’ kainetab laitoriat, ak keng’och eng’ peteitab laitoriat." 
Esther8:9 Kigiguur anyun sirikab laitoriat betunoto, eng’ arawetab somok, noto ko arawetab Siban, eng’ betutab tiptem ak somok ne bo arawanato; kigisir ko u tuguk tugul che kiga ng’atyi Mordekai Yahudik, ak kandoik, ak bounik, ak kiptainikab emotinwek, che kimi kong’eete India agoi Etiopia, emotinwek bogol ak tiptem ak tisab, ak kigisirji emet age tugul eng’ sirutikyik, ak bororiet age tugul eng’ kutinywa, ak kigisirji Yahudik ko u sirutikwak, ak eng’ kutinywa." 
Esther8:10 Ak kisir Mordekai eng’ kainetab laitoriat Aasuerus, ak kong’och eng’ peteitab laitoriat, ak koyoktae baronochoto bik che kibunei mbartanyisiek, che kilanyei mbartanyisiek che chepcheben che kiboisiei eng’ boisietab laitoriat, che kigiichin biusiekab gab laitoriat:" 
Esther8:11 kimwa baronochoto kole kogochi laitoriat Yahudik che mi nganaset age tugul koyumgei kosorgei, ak kong’em, ak kobar, ak kolus, kimnatet tugul ne bo bik ak ne bo emet, ne kita inyalili ichek, lagok ak kwonyik, ak koluul tugukab bichoto koek barunenik," 
Esther8:12 keyai eng’ betut agenge eng’ emotinwek tugul che bo laitoriat Aasuerus, eng’ betutab taman ak somok ne bo arawetab taman ak aeng’, noto ko Adar." 
Esther8:13 Kigimwachi bororiosiek tugul ng’alekab sirutichoto che kimwa kole kemwaita ng’atutiet eng’ emet age tugul, ak kele kochopgei Yahudik eng’ betunoto koyaaktochigei mugetut eng’ bunikwak." 
Esther8:14 Kiba anyun bik che kiga kiyokto kobun mbartanyisiek che chepcheb che kiboisiei eng’ boisietab laitoriat, che kigichirjir, ak kigigiil eng’ ng’atutietab laitoriat; ak kigimwaita ng’atutiet eng’ Susan, nganaset ne o." 
Esther8:15 Ak kiwa Mordekai eng’ ole mi laitoriat kolaagoti ngoroikab laitornatet che tuuen ne nyalil ak che leelach, kotinyei nariet ne o ne bo tahabu, ak ngoriet ne bo katanit ne kararan ne arus ne birir: ak kiwaach nganasetab Susan kogasgei." 
Esther8:16 Kitinyei Yahudik lapkeiyet ak kagasetab ge, ak boiboiyet ak teegisto." 
Esther8:17 Ak kitinyei kagasetab ge ak boiboiyet, igorta ak betut ne o, eng’ emet age tugul ak eng’ nganaset age tugul, oldo tugul ole kiga it ng’olyotab laitoriat ak ng’atutiennyi. Ak kiwalgei bik che chang’ che bo emet koek Yahudik; amu kiga koityi ichek kaiyweisiet ne kiiywei Yahudik." 
Esther9:1 Ki eng’ arawetab taman ak aeng’, noto ko arawetab Adar, eng’ betutab taman ak somok ne bo arawanato, ye kingorik koyaak ng’olyotab laitoriat ak ng’atutiennyi, eng’ betut ne kiimang’u bunikab Yahudik kole bou ichek: ko kiwalak anyun ng’olyondonoto, si koboi Yahudik bik che kiwechei ichek;" 
Esther9:2 koyumgei Yahudik eng’ nganasokwak eng’ emotinwek tugul che bo laitoriat Aasuerus, si konam icheget che kicheng’ei konyalil ichek: ama biit chi ne kiimuch kogirinda ichek; amu kiga koityi bororiosiek tugul kaiyweisiet ne kiiywei Yahudik." 
Esther9:3 Ak kitoret Yahudik kiptainik tugul che bo emotinwek, ak kandoik, ak bounik, ak ichek che kiyaei boisietab laitoriat; amu kiga koityi ichek kaiyweisiet ne kiiywei Mordekai." 
Esther9:4 Amu ki o Mordekai eng’ gotab laitoriat, ak kiyom etunatennyi emotinwek tugul: amu kieet Mordekai kotesak ak kotesak." 
Esther9:5 Ak kibar Yahudik bunikwak tugul eng’ rotwetab chok, ak eng’ baret, ak eng’ ng’emisiet, ak koyachi bichoto kiwechei ichek, ko u ye kimachei." 
Esther9:6 Ak kibar Yahudik murenik bogol mut eng’ Susan, nganaset ne o, ak kong’em." 
Esther9:7 Ak kibar Parsandata, Dalpon, ak Aspata," 
Esther9:8 ak Porata, Adalia, ak Aritata," 
Esther9:9 ak Parmasta, Arisai, Aritai, ak Baisata," 
Esther9:10 werichoto taman ki bo Haman weritab Hamedata, bunyotab Yahudik; ago ma twa tugukwak." 
Esther9:11 Kigiib kobwa taitab laitoriat eng’ betunoto, koitetab bik che kigibar eng’ Susan, nganaset ne o." 
Esther9:12 Ak kilenji laitoriat Esta osotiondennyi, Kogobar Yahudik ak kong’em murenik bogol mut eng’ Susan, nganaset ne o, koboto werichoto taman bo Haman; kogoyai anyun ne tai eng’ emotinwek tugul che bo laitoriat! Nee someng’ung’ anyun? Si kegonin. Nee kit ne ta isome? Si keyai." 
Esther9:13 Kole anyun Esta, Ngot koboiboi laitoriat, ingigochi Yahudik che mitei Susan koyai mutai agine ng’atutiet ne ka bo rani, ak ingigartat werichoto taman bo Haman eng’ ketit ne kigartate bik." 
Esther9:14 Ak king’at laitoriat koyaak ko u noto: ak kigigon ng’atutiet eng’ Susan; ak kigigartat werichoto taman bo Haman. 
Esther9:15 Ak kiiyumgei Yahudik che kimi Susan eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan eng’ arawanato bo Adar kogeny, ak kobar murenik bogol somok eng’ Susan; ago ma twa tugukwak." 
Esther9:16 Ak kiiyumgei Yahudik alage che kimi emotinwekab laitoriat, ak kosorgei, ak konyor kamuung’et, amata kobargei ak bunikwak, ak kobar bik che kiwechei ichek, elfusiek tamanwogik tisab ak mut; ago ma twa tugukwak." 
Esther9:17 Kiyaak ng’olyondonoto eng’ betutab taman ak somok eng’ arawetab Adar; ak kiimuuny eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawanato, ak kiyai koek betutab igorta ak kagasetab ge." 
Esther9:18 Ago kiiyumgei Yahudik che kimi Susan eng’ betutab taman ak somok eng’ arawanato, ak eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan agine; kiimuuny eng’ betutab taman ak mut ne bo arawanato, ak kiyai koek betutab igorta ak kagasetab ge." 
Esther9:19 Amu noto anyun, yaei Yahudik che bo nganasok che mengechen, che menyei nganasok che ma king’ot, betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawetab Adar koek betutab kagasetab ge ak igorta, ak koek betut ne mie, ak betut ne kiyoktochingei kebeberwek." 
Esther9:20 Ak kisir Mordekai tuguchoto, ak koyoktochi baronok Yahudik tugul che kimi emotinwek tugul che bo laitoriat Aasuerus, che negit ak che looen," 
Esther9:21 kong’at ichek kole, korib betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawetab Adar, ak betutab taman ak mut eng’ arawanato, eng’ kenyit age tugul." 
Esther9:22 Koek betusiek che imuunyi Yahudik, che mabaregei ak bunikwak, ak koek arawet ne kigiwale arogenet koek kagasetab ge, ak rirek koek betut ne mie: kole koyachigei koek betusiekab igorta ak kagasetab ge, ak koek ne kiyoktochingei kebeberwek, ak kiyokyi kibananok kagochinoik." 
Esther9:23 Ak kiiyan Yahudik koyai ko u ye kiga kotoi, ak ko u ye kiga kosirji Mordekai ichek;" 
Esther9:24 amu kiga kobwat Haman weritab Hamedata, Agagindet, bunyotab Yahudik tugul, kole kong’em Yahudik, ak koser Pur, noto ko barbarek, kole kobar ichek koges, ak kong’em;" 
Esther9:25 ago ye kingoit ng’olyondonoto taitab laitoriat, kong’at eng’ baronok kole koweekyigei metinnyi sogornatennyi ne kiga kochob agobo Yahudik; ak kole kigartati inendet ak werikyik eng’ ketit ne kigartate bik." 
Esther9:26 Kiguure anyun ichek betusiechoto Purim, keguurtoe kainetab Pur. Eng’ noto anyun, amu ng’alek tugul che bo baruanito, ak tuguk che kiga kogeer agobo ng’olyondonito, ak tuguk che kiga kobwanji ichek," 
Esther9:27 kong’at Yahudik kole korib ichek koboto iyotenywa, ak tugul che kinamgei ak icheget, betusiechoto aeng’ ko u ng’olyondenywa, ne kigisir, ak ko u betusiek che kiging’at, eng’ kenyit age tugul, si ma kibagakta;" 
Esther9:28 ak kele kibwat ak kerib betusiechoto eng’ ibinda age tugul, ak eng’ gab chi age tugul, eng’ emet age tugul, ak eng’ nganaset age tugul; si mabetyo betusiekab Purim eng’ Yahudik, anan kobet kabwatenywa eng’ iyotenywa." 
Esther9:29 Kisir anyun Esta osotiotab laitoriat, cheptab Abiail, ak Mordekai Yahudiot, eng’ kimnatet tugul ne bo bounatet kogimit baruanito bo aeng’ bo Purim." 
Esther9:30 Ak kiiyokyi baronok Yahudik tugul, che kimi emotinwek bogol ak tiptem ak tisab che bo bounatetab Aasuerus, koboto ng’alekab kalyet ak che bo iman," 
Esther9:31 si kogimit betusiechuto bo Purim eng’ betusiekwak che kiging’at, ko u ye kiga ng’at ichek Mordekai Yahudiot, ak Esta osotiotab laitoriat, ak ko u ye kiga kong’atyigei ak iyotenywa, eng’ ng’olyotab karugutetab ge ak rirekwak," 
Esther9:32 ak kiigimit ng’atutietab Esta ng’alechu bo Purim; ak kigisirji bukuit. 
Esther10:1 King’at laitoriat Aasuerus aisurut eng’ emet, ak eng’ ngegusiekab nyanjet." 
Esther10:2 Ak boisionik tugul che bo kimnatennyi ak kamugennyi, ak ng’alek tugul che bo oindab Mordekai ko u ye kiieet laitoriat inendet, ko tos ma kisirji bukuitab ateptab betusiek ne bo laitorinikab Media ak Persia?" 
Esther10:3 Amu kirubei Mordekai Yahudiot laitoriat Aasuerus, ak ki o eng’ Yahudik, ak kichamak eng’ tupchosiekyik che chang’; kicheng’ei kit ne mie agobo bikyik, ak kong’alaljin iyotennyi tugul agobo kalyet." 
Job1:1 Kimi chi eng’ emetab Us, ne kigiguure Job; ak kiigesunotgei chichoto ak ko bo iman, ne kiiywei Kamuktaindet, ak koistoegei yaitio." 
Job1:2 Kigisikyi werik tisab ak tibik somok," 
Job1:3 ak tugukyik ko ki kechirek elfusiek tisab, ak tambesik elfusiek somok, ak eik elfut agenge, che bo chogit, ak sigirok che iyuogik bogol mut, ak bik che chang’ che bo gonnyi; ki o anyun chichoto mising’ kosiir bik tugul che bo kong’asis." 
Job1:4 Ak kibendi werikyik gotab age tugul, eng’ betut ne kigichopchi; ak kiiyokto keguur chepkametisiekwak somok kobwa koamis ak koee koboto ichek." 
Job1:5 Ak kingogesgei betusiekwak che bo igorta, koyokto Job kianyiny ichek, ak kong’eet karon mising’, ak kogoito kagochinoik che kibeelei ko u koitetab ichek tugul: amu kile Job, Abere kogoyai werikyuk tengek, koesio Kamuktaindet eng’ mugulelwekwak. Kiyaei Job ko u noto kotugul." 
Job1:6 Kimi anyun betut ye kibwanei werikab Kamuktaindet kotonondos eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kinyo agine Setani koboto ichek." 
Job1:7 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani, Ibunu ano? Kowolji anyun Setani Jehovah, kolenji, Abunu ole awendote eng’ ng’ony, ak ole abunoti eng’ ng’ony." 
Job1:8 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani, Koigeer otwogindennyu Job? Amu mami ne kergei ak inendet eng’ ng’ony, ne igesunotgei ak ko chito ne bo iman, ne iywei Kamuktaindet, ak koistoegei yaitio." 
Job1:9 Kowolji anyun Setani Jehovah kolenji, Tos iywei Job Kamuktaindet buch?" 
Job1:10 Tos ma iyieme ng’otwet inendet koboto gonnyi, ak tuguk tugul che tinyei, eng’ komosta age tugul? Kiiberur boisionikab eunekyik, ak kotesak tugukyik eng’ emet." 
Job1:11 Ago chuul eung’ung’, ak itwa tuguk tugul che tinyei, si koesien eng’ taing’ung’." 
Job1:12 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani, Keero, tuguk tugul che tinyei komi eung’ung’; ametwa inendet kityo. Kwo anyun Setani eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Job1:13 Ak eng’ betut ye kiamisiei ak koeei divaik werikyik ak tibikyik eng’ gotab werit ne tupcho," 
Job1:14 koit ole mi Job chito ne kiga kiyokto, ak kolenji, Kaibatisiei eik, ak kaagete sigirok ole negite ichek:" 
Job1:15 koset Sabeik ak kokweri akwotisiechoto; ee, kagobar otwogik eng’ rotwetab chok; ak kaachilil anege, kanyo amwaun." 
Job1:16 Ye kita kong’alali, koit agine age, ak kole, Kachorgei matab Kamuktaindet eng’ kipsengwet, ak kagobeel kechirek, ak otwogik, ak koges ichek; ak kaachilil anege, kanyo amwaun." 
Job1:17 Ye kita kong’alali, koit agine age, ak kole, Kachob Kaldeik kweanaik somok, ak kobok kobwa kokweri tambesik; ee, ak kobar otwogik eng’ rotwetab chok; ak kaachilil anege, kanyo amwaun." 
Job1:18 Ye kita kong’alali, koit agine age, ak kole, Koamisiei ak koeei divaik weriguk ak tibiguk eng’ gotab werit ne tupcho:" 
Job1:19 ak ogeero, kous usonet ne o kobunu ong’atet ak korieb luukwek ang’wan che bo got, koluulji murenik, ak kagobek; ak kaachilil anege, kanyo amwaun." 
Job1:20 Kong’eet anyun Job, ak kobet ngoriennyi ne bo barak, ak kocher metinnyi, ak kobutyi ng’ony, kosa:" 
Job1:21 ak kile, Kigisicha ach ngor, ak aweeksei ach ngor: kigonu Jehovah, ak kagoweech Jehovah; iberurot kainetab Jehovah." 
Job1:22 Ma yai Job tengek eng’ chuto tugul, anan koiityi Kamuktaindet berberiet." 
Job2:1 Kimi kogeny betut ye kibwanei werikab Kamuktaindet kotonondos eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kinyo agine Setani koboto ichek, kotonon eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Job2:2 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani, Ibunu ano? Kowolji anyun Setani Jehovah kolenji, Abunu ole awendote eng’ ng’ony, ak ole abunoti eng’ ng’ony." 
Job2:3 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani, Koigeer otwogindennyu Job? Amu mami ne kergei ak inendet eng’ ng’ony, ak ko chito ne igesunotgei ak ko bo iman, ne iywei Kamuktaindet, ak koistoegei yaitio: ak koribei kora imandanyi, nganda igaigaa agobo inendet, si ang’em inendet buch." 
Job2:4 Ak kiwolji Setani Jehovah kolenji, Kigeere iririot iririot, ee, igoitoi chito tugukyik tugul agobo sobondanyi." 
Job2:5 Ago chuul eung’ung’ nguno, ak itwa kowekyik ak banyekyik, ak koesien eng’ taing’ung’." 
Job2:6 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani, Keero, mi inendet eung’ung’; amat itwa kityo sobondanyi." 
Job2:7 Kwo anyun Setani eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kobire Job ondirik che ng’wonen koboch keldebesiennyi agoi metit barak." 
Job2:8 Ak kiinem Job rokyet kong’iriregei; ak kitebe orek. 
Job2:9 Yeityo kolenji osotiondennyi, Ta iribe kora imandang’ung’? Esie Kamuktaindet, si ime." 
Job2:10 Ago kilenji Job inendet, Ing’alali ko u ye ng’alaldos kwonyik che berber. Tos kinyor che miach eng’ eutab Kamuktaindet ama kinyoru che yaach? Eng’ chuto tugul ko ma mwa Job tengek eng’ kutinnyi." 
Job2:11 Kingogas anyun choronok somogu che bo Job agobo yaitioni tugul kinyonji inendet, konyo chi tugul eng’ oldanyi; ki Elipas Temanindet, Bildad Suindet, ak Sopar Naamatindet: ak kiiyomisgei tugul kobwa korirji Job ak kogaigai inendet." 
Job2:12 Ak kitobendi ichek eng’ ye loo, ama inyit inendet, kowaach eng’ kutit ne o, ak koririo; ak kibet age tugul ngoriennyi ne bo barak, ak koseerta temburiek koba barak, kororokyi metowekwak." 
Job2:13 Kotebe ng’ony anyun ak inendet betusiek tisab ak kemousiek tisab, ak kima twekyi age tugul inendet: amu kigeer kole o mising’ ng’wanindanyi." 
Job3:1 Kingobata chuto kotwek Job kosas betunnyi. 
Job3:2 Ak kiwol Job kole," 
Job3:3 Ingobet betut ne kigisigena, Ak kemout ne kimwa kole, Kagimanach werit." 
Job3:4 Ingoimenit betunoto; Amat komage kiy Kamuktaindet eng’ barak, Anan koluuchi lapkeiyet betunoto." 
Job3:5 Ingonam betunoto mesundeito ak uruetab meet kobunji; Ingotebe boldet betunoto; Ingomu betunoto tugul che yaei, koimenit." 
Job3:6 Ingonam mesundeito ne kitung’dung’ioti kemounoto: Amat kogasgei betunoto eng’ betusiek che bo kenyit; Amat kiitito betusiekab arawek. 
Job3:7 Ee, ingoek inegei kemounoto; Amat kobiit eng’ yoto twegunet ne bo boiboiyet." 
Job3:8 Ingochub betunoto ichek che chubei betut, Che chobotin kong’eet tiondo ne o ne bo beek ne u ting’ong’et." 
Job3:9 Ingoimenitu kecheik che bo ye karatarat: Ingocheng’ lapkeiyet, amanyor; Amat kogeer betunoto ye machei korir emet." 
Job3:10 Amu kima rat moetab kamennyu, Anan koung’e konyekyuk nyalilda." 
Job3:11 Amu nee si ma amee ami mo? Amu nee si ma amee ko kagisicha? 
Job3:12 Kilya si kotorocha kutung’oik? Anan kinaik, kot areri?" 
Job3:13 Amu ki ta arue ak asis; Ki ta anuuchi, yeityo amuuny:" 
Job3:14 Koboto laitorinik ak kiruogik che bo ng’ony, Che kiteekyigei komoswek che kigoguber;" 
Job3:15 Anan koboto bounik che kitinyei tahabu, Che kiinyiit gorikwak feda:" 
Job3:16 Ki ta kaigai nda kiga kiooswa si mabiitu; Ko u manyurunik che ma keer lapkeiyet. 
Job3:17 Maiimi sogoranik oloto; Ak imuunyi eng’ oloto che ng’etyotin. 
Job3:18 Imuunyi eng’ oloto che ratotin; Magasei kutitab kayagindet. 
Job3:19 Mi oloto ne ming’in ak ne o; Itiagat otwogindet eng’ kiptaiyandennyi. 
Job3:20 Amu nee si kigochi lapkeiyet ne mi nyalilda, Ak kigochi sobondo ne mi ng’wanindo eng’ muguleldo;" 
Job3:21 Che igeni meet, ago manyonei; Ak kobalei, kocheng’ei kosiir konoraik che ung’otin;" 
Job3:22 Che boiboitu mising’, Ak kogasegei ye kanyor kererit?" 
Job3:23 Amu nee si kigochin lapkeiyet chito ne ung’at orennyi, Ak koyieme Kamuktaindet inendet ng’otwet?" 
Job3:24 Amu nyonei arogenennyu kotom aamisie, Ak korong’ugei tigenoikyuk ko u beek." 
Job3:25 Amu kanyonja kit ne aiywei, Ak nyonjina kit ne aiywei, kona aarogen."
