Job3:26 Matinye talbis, anan sisyinetab ge, anan kamuung’et; Ago nyonei nyalilda." 
Job4:1 Kiwol anyun Elipas Temanindet kole," 
Job4:2 Ngot kotiem chi kong’alalun, ko tos kiimin? Ago ng’o ne imuchi kosis ama ng’alali?" 
Job4:3 Keero, kiinet bik che chang’, Ak kiigimit eunek che nyalulyotin." 
Job4:4 Kigogonob ng’aleguk inendet ne kiibuti, Ak kiigimit kutung’oik che nyalulyotin." 
Job4:5 Ago kagoityin kiito nguno, ak itanui; Katwain, ak ketoptoben." 
Job4:6 Tos ma kamang’uneng’ung’ kaiyweisiet ne iywei Kamuktaindet, Ak kamang’uneng’ung’ imanda ne bo ortinweguk?" 
Job4:7 Asomin ale, ibwat ile ng’o ne kilus ama tinyei lelut? Anan mi ano che bo iman che kigebagakta?" 
Job4:8 Ko u ye kiageer, icheget che ibatisiei agobo tengekto, Ak kogolei nyalilda, kogesei anyun choto." 
Job4:9 Betos eng’ kabusetab Kamuktaindet, Ak kigesu eng’ usetab neregekyik." 
Job4:10 Borisenetab ng’etundo, ak tugetab ng’etundo ne korom, Ak kelekab ng’etunyik che neran, ko kagoilyo." 
Job4:11 Meei ng’etundo ne kagoosit amu ma kologoteni, Yestooti arekab ng’etundo ne kotoy." 
Job4:12 Kigiibwa anyun ng’olyot eng’ ung’ot, Ak kigas itinnyu kechaamwa." 
Job4:13 Eng’ kabwatet ne bo ng’ang’utikab kemoi, Ye kagonyonji bik ruondo ne nyigis," 
Job4:14 Konyonja kaiyweisiet ak botanet, Ne kiigochi kowekyuk kobotan." 
Job4:15 Yeityo kosiirtoena tamirmiriet; Kitononso sumeekab bortanyu. 
Job4:16 Kitonon tamirmiriet, ago ma amuch aguiyo kit ne ki u; Kimi itondo taitab konyekyuk: Kimi sisek, ak kiagas kutit komwaei kole," 
Job4:17 Tos bo iman chito ne ma bo koigeny kosiir Kamuktaindet? Tos tilil chito kosiir Yaindennyi? 
Job4:18 Keero, maimang’u inendet otwogikyik; Ak iityin malaikaisiek berberindo:" 
Job4:19 Tos siirei ne tia icheget che menyei gorikab menet, Che kigilumda eng’ ng’ung’unyek, Che kituei ko u ye kituei taburburiet!" 
Job4:20 King’emang’emi kong’eete karon agoi koskoleny: Lustos koigeny ama iiti chi. 
Job4:21 Tos ma kitut rogoetab emainywa eng’ orinywa: Betu ichek, ama tinyei ng’omnatet." 
Job5:1 Kuur anyun; tos mi ne wolu? Iwendi oldab ng’o eng’ che tililen? 
Job5:2 Amu barei neregek chito ne berber. Ak barei ng’et konda chito ne berber. 
Job5:3 Kiageer kolumdogei chito ne berber: Ago kiachub eng’ yoto meng’otennyi. 
Job5:4 Looen lagokyik eng’ ole ribot, Ak kagigiikyi ichek ormarichet, Ama mi chi ne soru ichek." 
Job5:5 Amei kogesu bekwak che amei rubet, Ak konemu agot che mi katok, Ak iseng’eng’at mestet agobo tugukwak." 
Job5:6 Amu mamong’une nyalilda ng’ung’unyek, Mabitei kaiimetab ge eng’ ng’ony;" 
Job5:7 Ago kisikyin chito kaiimetab ge, Ko u ye iteri leldetab mat." 
Job5:8 Ago nda ka ane, acheng’e Kamuktaindet, Ak aipchini Kamuktaindet ng’olyondennyu:" 
Job5:9 Inendet ne yaei tuguk che eechen che maisiagaksei; Tuguk che kikwong’e che maiitoksei: 
Job5:10 Ne igochin ng’ony ropta, Ak koyokyin beek mbarenik:" 
Job5:11 Si kobiit kieet icheget che nyerotin; Ak kitorori ichek che rirtos kotebe ole ribot. 
Job5:12 Ng’emei chobutikab ng’alik, Kot ko ma komuchi eunekwak koyai tuguk che bo kagiilenywa bo ge." 
Job5:13 Namei che ng’omen eng’ ng’alsenywa: Sib kong’emaksei kiruogutikab che imaasotin. 
Job5:14 Nyonjin ichek mesundeito bet, Ak kotung’dung’iot bet kwen ko u kemoi." 
Job5:15 Ago soru ne banani eng’ rotwetab chok ne bo kutinywa, Eng’ eutab ne kim." 
Job5:16 Tinyei anyun kibananiat kamang’unet, Ak konamak kut tengekto." 
Job5:17 Keero, baibai chito ne itigoni Kamuktaindet: Amesas anyun kotigonetab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet." 
Job5:18 Amu igochin ng’wanindo, ak konya; Iguoteni, ak kosoobi eng’ eunekyik." 
Job5:19 Sorun eng’ nyalilwogik lo; Ee, agot eng’ tisab ko matwain yaitiet." 
Job5:20 Itiachin eng’ rubet si mabarin; Ak kotiachin eng’ luget eng’ kimnatetab rotwetab chok. 
Job5:21 Kiunyin eng’ biretab ng’elepta; Ameiywei ng’emisiet ye kanyo. 
Job5:22 Irorechini ng’emisiet ak rubet; Ameiywei tiong’ikab ng’ony. 
Job5:23 Amu onamege ak koikab warenget; Ak oting’ege kalyet ak tiong’ikab timin. 
Job5:24 Ak inai ile mi kalyet emaing’ung’; Irutochini biung’ung’, ama betun kiy." 
Job5:25 Ak inai ile chang’aitu iyoteng’ung’, Ak kotenit lagoguk suswekab ng’ony." 
Job5:26 Iwendi kerering’ung’ eng’ kalilet, Ko u bek che kigiyum kotononso eng’ betusiekab kesisiet." 
Job5:27 Keer ni-o, kagisiach, u noto; Kas, ak inai si komieit eng’ inye." 
Job6:1 Kiwol anyun Job, kole," 
Job6:2 Ee, ka ta mie nda kagiger neregekyuk, Ak kituiyo nyalildanyu eng’ ratilit!" 
Job6:3 Amu nyigisitu kosiir ng’aniek che bo nyanjosiek: Kasartae anyun ng’alekyuk. 
Job6:4 Amu mi orinnyu kipchabonikab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, Kaee sobondanyu ng’wanindanywa: Katetgei kamuisosiekab Kamuktaindet agobo ane." 
Job6:5 Tos itei sigirietab timin ye tinyei suswek? Anan iuti eito ye tinyei amitwogik? 
Job6:6 Tos kiamei kit ne machamu kiy ama kinde munyuk? Anan tos chamu kiy kebeberta ne leel ne bo koitab ngok? 
Job6:7 Esioi sobondanyu kotwa; U bendo ne samis eng’ ane. 
Job6:8 Ee, nda kichamwa somennyu ne asome; Ak kogona Kamuktaindet kit ne amache mising’!" 
Job6:9 Agot nda chamei Kamuktaindet korurunya; Kochuul eunnyi, ak koistoa!" 
Job6:10 Ta kaanyoru anyun kagaigaet; Ee, ta kaabaibaitu eng’ ng’wanindo ne mabagaktoi chi: Amu ma atiiye ng’alekab Inendet ne Tilil." 
Job6:11 Nee kimnatennyu, si kobiit agen? Ak nee kagesunennyu, si kobiit amuita?" 
Job6:12 Tos u kimnatennyu kimnatetab koik? Anan bo bortanyu sugunwet? 
Job6:13 Tos ma amu matinye ane toretet eng’ orinnyu, Ak kigiistoena ng’omnatet kolooit eng’ ane?" 
Job6:14 Kanyolji konyor inendet ne machei kotanui, rirenet eng’ choruennyi; Agot inendet ne kabagakta kaiyweisietab ne kiywei Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet." 
Job6:15 Kigoyai tupchosiekyuk kaberberisiet ko u kererut, Ko u beekab kererusiek che tendos:" 
Job6:16 Che katuuegitu amu kagau, Ak ole ung’egei teluchi:" 
Job6:17 Ak ye kalalang’itu kobetyo; Ak kobetyo eng’ kemeut eng’ oldanywa. 
Job6:18 Mastoi che rutoe orenywa; Togostoi kobendi ong’atet, ak kolusyo." 
Job6:19 Kigeer kiprutoinikab Tema, Kiigen ichek kweanaikab Sheba." 
Job6:20 Kiililanso amu kiga komang’; Kibwa yoto, ak kitoptobenso." 
Job6:21 Amu o buch nguno; Ogeere kamuiset, ak oiyweisie." 
Job6:22 Tos kiamwa ale, Kona? Anan ale, Kona konunet eng’ tugukwok?" 
Job6:23 Anan ale, Osorua eng’ eutab bunyot? Anan kiale, Otiacha eng’ eutab usik?" 
Job6:24 Oneta, si asis: Ak ogona aguiyo ole koalele." 
Job6:25 Kimen ne tia ng’alekab imanda! Ago kertoi kong’ ano tiiyeng’wong’? 
Job6:26 Olen ogeere kong’ ng’alek? Amu u usonet ng’alalutikab inendet ne kigogesgei kamang’unennyi. 
Job6:27 Ee, omache oser barbarek agobo che matinyei kwanda, Anan oyae mung’aret chorueng’wong’." 
Job6:28 Ara anyun ocham ogeera; Amu mamwawok iman lembech eng’ taing’wong’. 
Job6:29 Asaok ale, Oweege, amat kobiit kenisiet; Ee, oweege kogeny, bo iman ng’olyondennyu." 
Job6:30 Tos mi kenisiet ng’elyeptanyu? Tos mamuchi abesio tugukab yaitiet? 
Job7:1 Tos mami betusiekab chito che bo boriet eng’ ng’ony? Ak ma kergei betusiekyik ak che bo otwogindet ne kigochin melekto? 
Job7:2 Ko u otwogindet ne machei mising’ uruet, Ak ko u otwogindet ne igeni melektanyi:" 
Job7:3 Kagigona anyun arawek che bo buch kobunja, Ak kagigona kemousiekab ng’etatet." 
Job7:4 Ye arue, amwae ale, Ang’eete au? Ago koi kemout: Ak aweiweechige agoi korir emet." 
Job7:5 Kagilaakyi bortanyu kutik ak mogoronikab temburiek; Laei bortanyu ak konenderi kogeny. 
Job7:6 Choktoi betusiekyuk kosiir ketit ne kinabisie, Ak kosiirtoi ama mi kamang’unet." 
Job7:7 Ee, obwat ole, usonet sobennyu: Matun kogeerei che miach konyekyuk." 
Job7:8 Ma kogeera kogeny inendet ne keera: Keera konyeguk, ago ma ami." 
Job7:9 Ko u boldet ne igesugei ak kobetito, Ko u noto inendet ne wendi oldab che kigobek, ma kotogosu kogeny." 
Job7:10 Ma koweekyingei kogeny gonnyi Ama konaei inendet kogeny oldanyi. 
Job7:11 Noto anyun, magere kutinnyu: Ang’alali eng’ ng’wanindab tamirmiriennyu; Ang’unyng’unyi eng’ ng’wanindab sobondanyu." 
Job7:12 Tos a nyanjet, anan ko a tiondo ne o ne bo nyanjet, Kot iriba?" 
Job7:13 Ye amwae ale, Igoigoa itogunnyu, Inyamnyumwa tigenennyu kit ne alyeldoe;" 
Job7:14 Igona aiyweis anyun eng’ karuotitaosiek, Ak imua eng’ ng’ang’utik:" 
Job7:15 Kot kolewen sobondanyu kagetetab ge, Ak meet kosiir kowekyuk." 
Job7:16 Aweche sobennyu; mamache asob agoi: Bagakta; amu buch betusiekyuk. 
Job7:17 Nee chi, kot ieet, Kot icham inendet," 
Job7:18 Ak irutochi inendet karonet age tugul, Ak itiem inendet eng’ sait age tugul?" 
Job7:19 Tianitu si ma igeera, Ak ibagakta kot alugui ng’ulekyuk?" 
Job7:20 Ngot ko kiayai tengek, ko kiayaun nee, ee inye, ribindetab bik? Amu nee si indea aek kit ne imwoge, Kot andege lautiet?" 
Job7:21 Ak amu nee si menyoiywa kaat bistoennyu, ak iiste tengektanyu? Amu arue eng’ temburiek: Ak icheng’a eng’ kagiiletab ge, ago ma ami." 
Job8:1 Kiwol anyun Bildad Suindet kole," 
Job8:2 Imwae tuguchuto kot kotianit? Kergeitu ng’aleguk ak usonet ne kim kot kotianit? 
Job8:3 Tos igunuri Kamuktaindet kiruoget? Anan imaasi Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet imanda? 
Job8:4 Ngot ko kigoyachi lagoguk inendet tengekto, Ak kigonde inendet ichek eutab bistoenywa;" 
Job8:5 Ngot icheng’ Kamuktaindet eng’ kagiiletab ge, Ak isom Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet;" 
Job8:6 Nda ki i tilil ak ko i litit; Ta kagong’eet iman amu inye, Ak koyai meng’otetab imandang’ung’ kobor." 
Job8:7 Ak nganda ki ming’in tauneng’ung’, Ta ko tesoksei mising’ kagesuneng’ung’." 
Job8:8 Asain anyun ale, teeb agobo kenyisiek che kigosiirto, Ak igochige choto kicheng’ei kwanisiekwak:" 
Job8:9 (Amu ki bo achek amut, ak magingen kiy, Amu uruet betusiekyok eng’ ng’ony:)" 
Job8:10 Tos mainetin, ak komwaun, Ak komwa ng’alek che bunu mugulelwekwak?" 
Job8:11 Tos imuchi koeet cherungut ama mi nyanyawet? Tos imuchi kobiit mutwot ama mi beek? 
Job8:12 Kota ko tuon, kotom keng’ei, Sib korestos kosiir sogek alak tugul." 
Job8:13 U choto ortinwek che bo tugul che utie Kamuktaindet; Ak betei kamang’unetab chito ne ma bo iman: 
Job8:14 Ne ng’emaksei kamang’unennyi, Ak u kamang’unennyi gotab kiproroktet." 
Job8:15 Tiiegei gonnyi, ago matononi: Namjingei yoto, ago matebyei." 
Job8:16 Tuon eng’ betusiekab asista, Ak kong’atos temenikyik koyomu mbarennyi." 
Job8:17 Taachingei tigitikyik karurugutiet, Keerei inendet komostab koik." 
Job8:18 Ngot keng’em eng’ komostanyi, Koesio inendet, kole, Tom ageerin." 
Job8:19 Keero, ni ko boiboiyetab orennyi, Ak bitos alage eng’ ng’ony." 
Job8:20 Keero, matimdoi Kamuktaindet chito ne igesunotgei, Ama tiiei yaikab yaitio." 
Job8:21 Ta konyiiti kuting’ung’ roriot, Ak konyiit kuting’ung’ boiboiyet." 
Job8:22 Ak kilaakyin kalilanet icheget che wechin; Ama komi emaitab kiptengeginik. 
Job9:1 Kiwol anyun Job kole," 
Job9:2 Angen iman ale u noto: Ago imuktoi ano chito koek ne bo iman eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet? 
Job9:3 Ngot kochamei chichoto kobelgei ak inendet, Ko maimuchi kowolji agot ng’olyot eng’ elfut." 
Job9:4 Ng’om inendet eng’ muguleldo, ak kotinyei kamuktaet eng’ kimnatet: Ng’o ne kigouuiitgei eng’ tainnyi, ak kobor?" 
Job9:5 Ne iuutoi tulonok, ama naei ichek, Ye igabui ichek eng’ neregekyik." 
Job9:6 Ne kitumdumi ng’onyut, koistogei eng’ komostanyi, Ak kobotanso tolochikyik." 
Job9:7 Ne ng’atei asista, si machor; Ne indoi ng’okset kecheik." 
Job9:8 Inendet inegei ne iitoi kipsengwetisiek, Ak kotiechei beek che mildogei che bo nyanjet." 
Job9:9 Ne yaei kecheik che u Tiondo, Kapsomoguk, ak Koremerik, Ak gorik che mi murot ne bo tai." 
Job9:10 Ne yaei tuguk che eechen che ma naaksei; Ee, tuguk che kikwong’e che maiitoksei." 
Job9:11 Keero, bunei ye negitena, amageere inendet: Siirtoi kogeny, amanyiti." 
Job9:12 Keero, namei, ak ng’o ne ete? Ng’o ne mwachin kolenjin, Iyae nee?" 
Job9:13 Maistoi Kamuktaindet neregekyik; Ing’uruksei toretikab Rahab eng’ kelyekyik. 
Job9:14 Ngo u noto, amuchi ane awoljindo ano, Ak alewen ng’alekyuk che kimwae ak inendet?" 
Job9:15 Ne agot ngo a bo iman, ko mawoljini inendet; Asaisai bunyondennyu." 
Job9:16 Nda kiga aguur, ak kowolwa; Ta ma ayani ale kigogas kutinnyu." 
Job9:17 Amu tuena usonet ne o, Ak kotesei mookyuk buch." 
Job9:18 Machamwa abus, Ago inyiita ng’wanindo." 
Job9:19 Ngeng’alal agobo kimnatetab kamuget, keero, mi oloto inendet, Ak ngot ko bo kiruoget, ko ng’o ne chobwa betut?" 
Job9:20 Agot ngo a bo iman, koruokwa kutinnyu: Agot ngo agesunotge, kobaorianjina kole a ne imaasat." 
Job9:21 Agesunotge; maiitige; Asase sobennyu. 
Job9:22 Agenge tugul; amwae anyun ale, Ng’emei ne igesunotgei ak ne sogoran." 
Job9:23 Ngot kobaris biret kochokyi, Kororechin anyun tiemisietab che matinyei lelut." 
Job9:24 Kiginde ng’onyuni eunekab kiptengeginik: Tuchei togochikab kiruogikyik; Ngot ko ma inendet, ko ng’o anyun?" 
Job9:25 Ruaei betusiekyuk kosiir ne kiyoktoi: Mweei, mageerei kit ne mie." 
Job9:26 Kagosiirto ko u melisiek che ruaei: Ko u kipsichit ne chorjingei tiondo ne machei kobar. 
Job9:27 Ngot amwa ale, Autie kang’unyng’ung’ennyu, Amete arogenennyu, ak abaibaitu:" 
Job9:28 Aiywei arogenosiekyuk tugul, Angen ale meityina ile matinye lelut." 
Job9:29 Kiruokwa; Amu nee anyun si aiimge buch? 
Job9:30 Agot ngaunege beekab teluchi, Ak atilil eunekyuk mising’;" 
Job9:31 Agot ngo u noto iwirjina keringet, Ak kowecha ngoroikyuk." 
Job9:32 Amu inendet ko ma chi, ko u ane, ne awoljini, Kot ketuiye kibagenge eng’ kiruoget." 
Job9:33 Amu mami ne ioitosech, Si kobiit kogonoorech eunekyik achek tuwai." 
Job9:34 Ingoistoena kiroktanyi, Amat komua kamuisennyi." 
Job9:35 Si ang’alal anyun, amaiywei inendet; Amu ane, ko ma u noto eng’ orinnyu." 
Job10:1 Ng’etei sobondanyu eng’ sobennyu; Amwaitoi kang’unyung’ung’ennyu, amasise; Ang’alali eng’ ng’wanindab sobondanyu." 
Job10:2 Alenjini Kamuktaindet, Ameruokwa; Iborua anyun kit ne kagonin kibelge." 
Job10:3 Tos mie eng’ inye iusisie, Ak isas boisietab euneguk, Ak iluuchi kiruogetab kiptengeginik?" 
Job10:4 Tos itinye konyek che bo borto, Anan igeere ko u ye keerei chito?" 
Job10:5 Tos kergei betusieguk ak betusiekab chi, Anan u kenyisieguk betusiekab chi," 
Job10:6 Kot iteeb tengektanyu, Ak iweny chalwoktanyu," 
Job10:7 Agot ngingen ile ma a chi ne ya; Ama mi ne imuchi kosor eng’ eung’ung? 
Job10:8 Kiyaa euneguk ak komimia; Ago kegesua inye. 
Job10:9 Asain ale ibwat ile, kiimimia ko u menet; Ak igetyina ng’ung’unyek kogeny?" 
Job10:10 Tos ma irong’wa ko u chego, Ak iyaa aek mugunikab chego?" 
Job10:11 Kiilaakwa iririot ak banyek, Ak ituiya eng’ kowek ak simoloik." 
Job10:12 Kiigona sobondo ak chamet, Ak kigorib rutochineng’ung’ tamirmiriennyu." 
Job10:13 Ago kiiung’e tuguchoto muguleldang’ung’; Angen ale mi nito koboten: 
Job10:14 Ngot ayai tengek, igeera, Amenyoiywa kaat agobo tengektanyu." 
Job10:15 Ngot ko a ya, bwa eng’ ane; Ak ngot a bo iman, ko mayote metinnyu; Amu kagonyiia kalilanet Ak ageere nyalildanyu." 
Job10:16 Ak ngot koeetgei metinnyu, isapchina ko u ng’etundo: Ak iboruage kogeny eng’ kwong’et." 
Job10:17 Iyae baoriniguk agobo ane koleelagitu, Ak itesyina neregeguk; Mi kobota lugosiek che mawalatigei." 
Job10:18 Kilya anyun si ichamde kesicha? Kita mie ame, si mageera chi." 
Job10:19 Kita aegu chito ne kima kota biitu; Kita kimutena moet awa kererit. 
Job10:20 Tos ma ng’ering’ betusiekyuk? Sis anyun, Ak ibagakta, si anyor kagaigaet kitigin," 
Job10:21 Kotom awe ole ma aweeksei, Emetab mesundeito ak uruetab meet;" 
Job10:22 Emetab mesundeito ne o, ne u mesundeito; Ne bo uruetab meet, ne matinyei ng’atut age tugul, Ak ole u lapkeiyet mesundeito." 
Job11:1 Kiwol anyun Sopar Naamatindet, kole," 
Job11:2 Tos manyoljin wolunet ng’alechu chang’? Tos kiityin imanda chito ne chang’ ng’alek? 
Job11:3 Tos igochin bik kosisyo kachaunosieguk bo ge? Ak ye ichotisiei ko mami ne konin ililan? 
Job11:4 Amu imwae ile, Tililen konetisiosiekyuk, Ak a tilil eng’ taing’ung’." 
Job11:5 Kata mie kong’alal Kamuktaindet, Ak kong’alal kogirinden;" 
Job11:6 Ak koborun ung’otik che bo ng’omnatet, Kole chang’ kot eng’ boisiennyi ne yaei kosulda! Nai anyun ile mamagenen Kamuktaindet ne te ne yamegei ak yaitwogiguk." 
Job11:7 Tos imuchi inyoru Kamuktaindet ngisiach? Tos imuchi inyoru ole bochin Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet? 
Job11:8 Toror ko u kipsengwet; imuchi iyai nee? Loo kosiir oldab che kigobek; nee ne imuchi inai? 
Job11:9 Kakwautiennyi ko koi kosiir ng’ony, Ak ko tebees kosiir nyanjet." 
Job11:10 Ngot kosiirto, ak kogeris, Ak koguurso keba kiruoget, ko ng’o ne imuchi kogirinda inendet?" 
Job11:11 Amu ingen inendet bik che matilei kiy: Ak keerei tengekto agine, agot nga mamage kiy." 
Job11:12 Ago matinyei kaguiyet chito ne matilei kiy, Ee, kisichei chi ko u moitab sigirietab timin." 
Job11:13 Ngot ichob muguleldang’ung’ kolititit, Ak iitochi inendet euneguk;" 
Job11:14 Ngot komi tengekto eung’ung’, iwirte kolooit, Ameng’ komeny emaisieguk kiy ne ma bo imanda:" 
Job11:15 Ngiyai ko u noto itokyi anyun barak togeng’ung’ ko mami tisia; Ee, igimitu, ameiyweisiei:" 
Job11:16 Amu iutie nyalildang’ung’; Ibwati ko u beek che kigosiirto: 
Job11:17 Ak kolapkeit sobeng’ung’ kosiir bet kwen; Agot ngo mi mesundeito, kogergeitu ak karon." 
Job11:18 Ak itebi eng’ chametab ge, amu mi kamang’unet; Ee, icheng’oti, ak imuuny eng’ chametab ge." 
Job11:19 Ak iru, ama biitu ne imuin; Ee, cheng’in che chang’." 
Job11:20 Ago keroksei konyekab kiptengeginik, Ak betyin oret ne mwee, Ak kamang’unenywa ko meet." 
Job12:1 Kiwol anyun Job kole," 
Job12:2 O bik iman, Ak begu ng’omnatet kobotok." 
Job12:3 Ago atinye naet agane, ko u okwek; Ma a nyerat eng’ okwek: Ee, ng’o ne maingen tuguk che u chuto?" 
Job12:4 A u chito ne rorechin bikab kokwennyi, Ne kiguur Kamuktaindet, ak kiwolji inendet: Kirorechin ne bo iman, chito ne igesunotgei." 
Job12:5 Sasei nyalilda kabwatutikab chito ne tebyei eng’ kalyet; Amu kigichopchi ichek che ichabaitoi kelyekwak. 
Job12:6 Borei emaisiekab ribik, Ak ribotin che tachei Kamuktaindet; Ipchin Kamuktaindet eunekwak tugul che chang’." 
Job12:7 Ago teebe tiong’ik, si konetin; Teebe taritik che bo barak, si komwaun:" 
Job12:8 Anan ing’alalji ng’ony, si konetin; Ak kotetun njirenikab nyanjet." 
Job12:9 Ng’o ne manaei eng’ chuto tugul, Kole, eutab Jehovah ne kiyai nito?" 
Job12:10 Mi eunnyi sobondab kiy age tugul ne sobei, Ak kabusetab bik tugul." 
Job12:11 Tos matiemei itit ng’alek, Ko u ye chamjami kutit amitwogik?" 
Job12:12 Mi ng’omnatet koboto boisiek che osen, Ak mi naet chang’indab betusiek." 
Job12:13 Mi ng’omnatet ak kamuktaet koboto inendet; Tinyei kiruoget ak naet. 
Job12:14 Keero, butei, ama kimuchi keteech kogeny; Kerei chito, ama mi ne yatei." 
Job12:15 Keero, etei beek, ak kotenyo; Ak koyogu kogeny, ak konyi emet." 
Job12:16 Mi koboto inendet kimnatet, ak ng’omnatet; Nenyi ne kiberberi ak kaberberindet." 
Job12:17 Imuti kiruogik ko luulenik, Ak yaei inendet kiruogik koek che berber." 
Job12:18 Itiachi ratutietab laitorinik, Ak koratei suenutikwak eng’ birenet." 
Job12:19 Imuti tisiik ko luulenik, Ak kogabui che kimen." 
Job12:20 Istoi twegunetab che kiyani, Ak koistoi kaguiyetab boisiek." 
Job12:21 Rong’jin bounik sasisiet, Ak kotiachi birenetab che kimen." 
Job12:22 Nyoru tuguk che ung’otin eng’ mesundeito, Ak koibu uruetab meet konyo lapkeiyet." 
Job12:23 Tesei bororiosiek ak kong’emei ichek: Iseeri bororiosiek, ak koyumi." 
Job12:24 Ibei mugulelwekab bounikab bik che bo ng’ony, Ak igochin koombeniot eng’ ong’atet ole mami oret." 
Job12:25 Tung’dung’ioti eng’ mesundeito ama tinyei lapkeiyet, Ak kogochin ichek koterteriot ko u chito ne kabogit." 
Job13:1 Keero, kigogeer konyekyuk chuto tugul, Kigogas itinnyu ak koguiyo." 
Job13:2 Kit ne ongen, angen agane: Ma a nyerat eng’ okwek." 
Job13:3 Iman amache ang’alalji Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet. Ak amache keng’alaljine ak Kamuktaindet. 
Job13:4 Ago okwek, ko o kitang’ikab lembechek, O chepkerichinik tugul che matilei kiy." 
Job13:5 Ee, kata mie osisye mising’! Ak si koek nito ng’omnateng’wong’." 
Job13:6 Ogas anyun ng’alekyuk che amwae, Ak oepchi it rirekab kutinnyu." 
Job13:7 Tos omwae che ma bo iman agobo Kamuktaindet, Ak ong’alal eng’ ng’alset agobo inendet?" 
Job13:8 Tos otiytii inendet? Obelige ak Kamuktaindet? 
Job13:9 Tos mie kocheng’ak? Anan oberberi inendet ko u ye kiberberi chito? 
Job13:10 Kerok kong’ iman, Ngot otiytii bik eng’ ung’ot." 
Job13:11 Tos magonin etunatennyi iywei? Ak kobutyin kaiyweisiennyi? 
Job13:12 Ng’alekwok che kibwati ko kalewenaikab orek, Irimosiekwok ko irimosiek che bo menet." 
Job13:13 Osisye, obagakta anege, si kobiit ang’alal, Ak ingobwanja che machei kobwanja." 
Job13:14 Tos aname bortanyu kelekyuk, Ak ande sobondanyu eunnyu?" 
Job13:15 Agot ngo bara, ko ta ageni inendet: Ago agimiti ortinwekyuk eng’ tainnyi." 
Job13:16 Egu nito agine yetunennyu; Amu manyonei tainnyi chito ne ya. 
Job13:17 Ogas ng’alekyuk eng’ kagiiletab ge, Ak ingotebe itikwok mwaoninnyu." 
Job13:18 Ogeer anyun-o, koachob kit ne atoorjinige; Angen ale a bo iman." 
Job13:19 Ng’o inendet ne kibelige tuwai? Amu asise ak amee. 
Job13:20 Kobate amat iyaiywa tuguk aeng’, Si maung’enenge:" 
Job13:21 Istoena eung’ung’ kolooit eng’ ane; Amat komua kamuiseng’ung’. 
Job13:22 Kuurse anyun, si awol; Anan ichamwa ang’alal, ak iwolwa." 
Job13:23 Ata ng’ogiswekyuk ak tengekwogikyuk? Kona anai bistoennyu ak tengektanyu. 
Job13:24 Amu nee anyun si iuny togeng’ung’, Ak iita ile a bunyondeng’ung’?" 
Job13:25 Tos inyalili sogot ne ibei usonet? Ak isubi mobek che yaamnyotin? 
Job13:26 Amu kiisir ng’alek che ng’wonen agobo ane, Ak igona tengekwogikab ming’inatennyu anam kobunja:" 
Job13:27 Iratyini kelyekyuk temeleiywek, ak igeer ortinwekyuk tugul: Isire kiwotet ole bochin kelyekyuk:" 
Job13:28 Agot nganda a u kit ne kigonun ne igesugei, Ko u ngoriet ne kiam kiptorotinik." 
Job14:1 Ng’ering’ betusiekab chi ne sichei kwondo, Ak ko chang’ nyalilwogikyik." 
Job14:2 Bitei ko u taptet, ak keisto: Labati ko u uruet, ama tononi." 
Job14:3 Tos igeere chito ne u noto, Ak imuta kebe tuwai kapkiruok?" 
Job14:4 Ng’o ne imuchi komoong’une ne anyiny ole ng’wan? Mami, agot agenge." 
Job14:5 Amu kiging’at betusiekyik, ak mi koitetab arawekyik koboten, Ak kiinde kiwotosiekyik che maimuchi kosiir;" 
Job14:6 Ituktochi batai inendet, si kobiit komuuny, Agoi betunnyi, ko u otwogindet ne kigisir." 
Job14:7 Amu mi kamang’unet agobo ketit, ngot kiluul, kobitei kogeny, Ak masisei temennyi ne ng’arng’ar." 
Job14:8 Agot ngo osegitu tigitikyik eng’ ng’ung’unyek, Ak kourusan ketit eng’ ng’ony;" 
Job14:9 Ago ing’ati ko kagas anyinyindab beek, Ak kowakta temenik ko u ketit ne ing’ati." 
Job14:10 Ago meei chito, ak konun: Ee, meei chito, ak mi ano?" 
Job14:11 Ko u ye tendos beekab nyanjet, Ak ko u ye tenyei ainet agine ak koyaam;" 
Job14:12 Ko u noto ruei chito, ama kong’eetei: Agoi ko ma komi kipsengwetisiek, ko ma ng’etos, Ama king’eeti kong’eetyo eng’ ruondanywa." 
Job14:13 Ee, kata mie iunya eng’ oldab che kigobek, Iriba eng’ ole ung’at, kot kosiirto neregeguk, Ak ilewenwa betut, ak ibwata!" 
Job14:14 Ngo mee chito, kosobei? Ta ageni betusiek tugul che bo lugennyu, Kot konyo katiagennyu." 
Job14:15 Iguursei, ak awolun: Ak itinye maget agobo boisietab euneguk." 
Job14:16 Ago iiti nguno kakwautikyuk: Tos megeere tengektanyu? 
Job14:17 Kigigerji lolet bistoennyu, Ak irate tengektanyu." 
Job14:18 Ak iman, ngobut tulwet kobetei, Kiistoe ruandet eng’ komostanyi;" 
Job14:19 Amei bek koik; Ibei mogochek temburiekab ng’ony: Ak ing’eme kamang’unetab chito. 
Job14:20 Iterteri inendet agoi, ak kosiirto; Iwale itondanyi, ak iiste." 
Job14:21 Nyoru werikyik teegisto, ama naei; Ak kiming’ini, ago manaei." 
Job14:22 Ago tinyei ng’wanindo bortanyi, Ak rirei sobondanyi." 
Job15:1 Kiwol anyun Elipas Temanindet kole," 
Job15:2 Tos nyolu kowol chito ne ng’om eng’ naet ne bo buch, Ak konyiit moennyi usonet ne bo kong’asis?" 
Job15:3 Tos nyolu koruoch eng’ ng’alek che matilei kiy, Anan eng’ ng’alek che mayaei kiy ne mie?" 
Job15:4 Ee, ione kaiyweisiet, Ak igirindoi saet eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet." 
Job15:5 Amu ineti tengektang’ung’ kuting’ung’, Ak ileweni ng’eleptab ng’alindet." 
Job15:6 Iruogun kuting’ung’, ma ane; Ee, baorianjinin kuting’ung’ kogirindoin." 
Job15:7 Tos inye chito ne kisib kesich? Anan kisib kesichin kotom kobiit tulonok? 
Job15:8 Tos kiigas kiruogutikab ung’ot che bo Kamuktaindet? Ak iityinige inyege ng’omnatet? 
Job15:9 Nee ne ingen ne magingen? Nee kaguiyet ne itinye, ne magitinye?" 
Job15:10 Kimi ak boisiek che bo kalwalek ak che kigoosegitu mising’, Che osen mising’ kosiir kwandang’ung’." 
Job15:11 Tos nyerotin kagaigaosiekab Kamuktaindet eng’ inye, Ak ma kiy eng’ inye ng’olyotab mutyonet?" 
Job15:12 Amu nee si kobeetin muguleldang’ung’? Ak amu nee si komismis konyeguk? 
Job15:13 Kot iwal tamirmirieng’ung’ kongelelji Kamuktaindet, Ak icham komong’une kuting’ung’ ng’alek che u choto." 
Job15:14 Nee chi, kot kotililit? Ak nee inendet ne sichei kwondo kot kiit kele bo imanda?" 
Job15:15 Keero, maimang’u bikyik che tililen; Ee, ma tililen kipsengwetisiek eng’ tainnyi." 
Job15:16 Kotam nee inendet ne kewechei ak ko samis? Chito ne eei tengekto ko u beek! 
Job15:17 Aborun; kasa anyun; Ak amwaitoi tuguk che kiageer: 
Job15:18 (Che kimwau bik che ng’omen Kobunu kwanisiekwak, ama uny;" 
Job15:19 Che kigigochi emet ichegei, Ama mi too ne kibunei kwenunywa:)" 
Job15:20 Kasei ng’wanindo kiptengekyot eng’ betusiekyik tugul, Ee, koitetab kenyisiek che kigigonorji usindet." 
Job15:21 Mi itikyik tugetab kamuisosiek; Ibokyin inendet luulindet eng’ betusiekyik che bo borotet: 
Job15:22 Maiyani kole weeksei eng’ mesundeito, Ak igeni rotwetab chok inendet:" 
Job15:23 Ombenoti kocheng’oti amitwogik, kolen, Mi ano? Ingen inendet kole kagorikyi betut ne bo mesundeito:" 
Job15:24 Imui nyalilda ak ng’wanindo; Iterteri ichek inendet ko u laitoriat ne chobot agobo luget: 
Job15:25 Amu kigochuul inendet eunnyi kogirinda Kamuktaindet, Komenjin Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet;" 
Job15:26 Labatyin inendet eng’ kaatit ne uui, Eng’ ugutikab long’onikyik:" 
Job15:27 Amu kigotuch togennyi neratennyi, Ak koakwaitu suenutikyik;" 
Job15:28 Ak kigomeny nganasok che kigoguber, Eng’ gorik che mamenyei chi, Che negit koek karatwek." 
Job15:29 Maegu magorio ama tebyei tugukyik, Ama rurtos tugukyik." 
Job15:30 Maistoegei mesundeito; Iyami liblibenetab mat temenikyik, Ak wendi inendet eng’ kabusetab kutinnyi." 
Job15:31 Amat komang’ tugukab buch, koberberegei: Amu egu melektanyi tangoita." 
Job15:32 Isuldoi kotom koit betunnyi, Ama tuonitu temennyi." 
Job15:33 Itumdumi sabibuk che tomo korurio ko u ketikab sabibuk, Ak kowirta taptennyi ko u emdit." 
Job15:34 Amu egu sonon tuiyetab che maiywei Kamuktaindet, Ak beelei mat emaisiek che mi tugukab kagaigaet." 
Job15:35 Manachi yaitiet, ak kosich tengekto, Ak kochob moenywa ng’alset." 
Job16:1 Kiwol anyun Job kole," 
Job16:2 Kiagas tuguk che chang’ che u choto: O kagoigoik okwek tugul che otese nyalilda. 
Job16:3 Tos tinyei ng’alek che bo buch ole igesunegei? Anan nee ne katachin kot iwolu? 
Job16:4 Amuchi ang’alal agane ko u okwek; Nda ka sobonwekwok ko sobondanyu, Ta kamuchi atuiyo ng’alek agirindaenak, Ak alelech metinnyu agobo okwek." 
Job16:5 Kata agimitok eng’ kutinnyu, Ak kata tisei ng’wanindang’wong’ kagaigaetab kutinnyu." 
Job16:6 Agot ngang’alali, ko magitisei ng’wanindanyu: Ak agot ngamuite, ko kagimuung’wa eng’ nee?" 
Job16:7 Ago kagogona nguno ang’et: Ak kaigochi tuiyennyu tugul koguber. 
Job16:8 Ak kaigiicha mising’ noto ne baorianjina: Ak ng’eetyina sagitennyu, baorianjina kimni." 
Job16:9 Kagogerera eng’ neregekyik, ak kousa; Kagosusya kelek: Kagonjurura bunyondennyu." 
Job16:10 Kagoyatya kut ichek; Kagorabacha eng’ chotisiet: Iyumjinagei kogirinda. 
Job16:11 Igochina Kamuktaindet bik che yaachen, Ak kotoortacha eunekab kiptengeginik." 
Job16:12 Kiamuunyi, ak kiiria; Ee, kagonama kaatit, kowirta konyaknyagana: Ak kagondea kogeny aek kit ne mwogei." 
Job16:13 Yiema mwogikyik, Betei suennyu, ama rire; Rong’jin ng’ony kipsegetetiennyu." 
Job16:14 Kagoiria konyil che chang’; Labatyina ko u chito chemosit. 
Job16:15 Kaanapchi kuniok bortanyu. Ak kaande kuinennyu ng’ony. 
Job16:16 Kagong’emak togennyu eng’ rirek, Ak mi uruetab meet irirenikab konyekyuk;" 
Job16:17 Agot ngo mami koromnatet eunekyuk, Ak ko tililen saennyu." 
Job16:18 Ee ng’ony, ametuch korotikyuk, Amegochi rirekyuk ole imuung’e." 
Job16:19 Agot nguno, keero, mi baoriandennyu kipsengwet, Mi barak inendet ne baorianjina." 
Job16:20 Sasa choronokyuk: Ago rong’jin konyekyuk beekab kong’ Kamuktaindet; 
Job16:21 Kata mie ngo kong’alal inendet agobo chi eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet, Ak ko u ye yaei chi agobo chitab kokwennyi!" 
Job16:22 Amu ye kagosiirto kenyisiek che ng’ering’, Awe oret ne ma aweeksei." 
Job17:1 Kagogesgei tamirmiriennyu, kagobek betusiekyuk, Chobot kererit agobo ane." 
Job17:2 Iman mi kobota che chotisiei, Keerei konyekyuk tagisienywa." 
Job17:3 Kona kit ne bo kayosiet, egu inye ne itononwa; Ng’o ne kenamege eunek?" 
Job17:4 Amu keuny muguleldanywa si maiguiyo: Metorori anyun ichek amu noto. 
Job17:5 Inendet ne igoitoi choronokyik koek che kionoti eng’ loget, Betos konyekab lagokyik." 
Job17:6 Kagoyaa aek kalewenet eng’ bik; Ak kaaegu ne kiwechei ne keerei bik tugul. 
Job17:7 Kagoimenitu konyekyuk amu arogenet, Ak u kebeberwekyuk tugul uruet." 
Job17:8 Kwong’dos bik che bo iman agobo nito, Ak ng’eetei ne matinyei lelut kogirinda bik che yaachen." 
Job17:9 Agot ngo u noto kowendi ne bo iman eng’ orennyi, Ak inendet ne tinyei eunek che tililen kotesoksei kogimitu kosiir." 
Job17:10 Ago oweeige okwek tugul, obwa nguno: Amanyoru ane chi ne ng’om eng’ kwenung’wong’." 
Job17:11 Kagosiirto betusiekyuk, kagobutogis chobutikyuk, Agot kabwatutikab muguleldanyu." 
Job17:12 Walei ichek kemout koek bet: Len, Negityin lapkeiyet ak mesundeito." 
Job17:13 Ngot acheng’ oldab che kigobek, koek gonnyu; Ngot aiite kit ne arue, eng’ mesundeito;" 
Job17:14 Ngot alenji ng’emisiet, I kwandanyu; Alenji kutiet, I kamennyu, ak ko i chebeiyo;" 
Job17:15 Komi ano anyun kamang’unennyu? Keerei ng’o anyun kamang’unennyu? 
Job17:16 Chortogei agoi temeleiywekab oldab che kigobek, Ye kagobiit kamuung’et eng’ temburiek." 
Job18:1 Kiwol anyun Bildad Suindet kole," 
Job18:2 Oriiche mestonok agobo ng’alek kot kotianit? Obwat, ye ibata keng’alal." 
Job18:3 Amu nee si kiitech kele ki tiong’ik, Keng’wonegitu eng’ taing’ung’?" 
Job18:4 Inye ne igererige eng’ neregeguk, Tos kimetoi ng’ony agobo inye? Anan kiistoi ruandet eng’ komostanyi?" 
Job18:5 Ee, kimisi lapkeiyetab kiptengegeginik, Ama kokweng’sei liblibenetab mannyi." 
Job18:6 Imenitu lapkeiyet eng’ emainnyi, Ak kimisi tainnyi ne mi baragunnyi." 
Job18:7 Kisagiti tiegutikab kimnatennyi, Ak kowirtoi inendet kiruogennyi." 
Job18:8 Amu kigowirji kelyekyik inendet mestet ne u regereiywot, Ak wendote mestonok che kigituch." 
Job18:9 Namei mestetab borowet kwariandennyi, Ak namei inendet mestet ne bo karik." 
Job18:10 Kagiuny eng’ ng’ony mestetab rogoet agobo inendet, Ak keringet ne kagiuny eng’ oret agobo inendet." 
Job18:11 Igochin kamuisosiek inendet koiyweis eng’ komosta age tugul, Ak koonat inendet kot koriich." 
Job18:12 Amei rubet kimnatennyi, Ak chobot nyalilda konach inendet." 
Job18:13 Amei kebeberwekab bortanyi, Amei taita ne bo meet, kebeberwekyik." 
Job18:14 Kitutu inendet eng’ emainnyi ne kiimang’u; Ak kimutyi laitoriatab kamuisosiek. 
Job18:15 Menyei emainnyi kit ne ma nenyi: Kiseere meng’otennyi koik che laldos. 
Job18:16 Yaamdos tigitikyik eng’ orit, Ak keeb temennyi eng’ barak." 
Job18:17 Lusei kabwatennyi eng’ ng’ony, Ama nyoru kaina eng’ oret." 
Job18:18 Kionei eng’ ole mi lapkeiyet kwo mesundeito, Ak keon eng’ ng’ony." 
Job18:19 Manyoru inendet werit anan mochogoret eng’ bikyik, Ama ng’etyin chi eng’ ole menyei." 
Job18:20 Kwong’dos eng’ betunnyi icheget che biitu let, Ko u ye kiiyweis che kiindou." 
Job18:21 U noto iman meng’otosiekab che ma bo iman, Ak nito ko komostab inendet ne maingen Kamuktaindet." 
Job19:1 Kiwol anyun Job kole," 
Job19:2 Onyalili sobondanyu agoi kotianit, Ak otonatonena ng’alek?" 
Job19:3 Kaochota konyil chu taman: Molilandosi amu oyaiywa ne uui. 
Job19:4 Ak ngo kialel iman, Kotebena lelutiennyu." 
Job19:5 Ngot oeetge agobo ane, Ak oruokwa agobo chotisiennyu:" 
Job19:6 Onai anyun ole kagogabua Kamuktaindet, Ak koyiemena regereiywondennyi." 
Job19:7 Ogeero, arire amu koromnatet, ago ma kigasa: Arire agobo toretet, ago mami kiruoget." 
Job19:8 Kagong’ot orennyu kot ko mamuchi abun, Ak kagonde mesundeito ortinwekyuk." 
Job19:9 Kagoreegunena torornatennyu, Ak kagoreegunena nariet ne bo laitornatet." 
Job19:10 Kagotua eng’ komosta age tugul, ak ma ami: Ak kagotut kamang’unennyu ko u ketit." 
Job19:11 Kagolalyo kogeny neregekyik agobo ane, Ak kagoiita kole a age eng’ bunikyik." 
Job19:12 Bwanei kweanaikyik che bo luget kobokyina, Ak komeng’is komuut emainnyu." 
Job19:13 Kagoistoena tupchosiekyuk kolooena, Ak kigobesiena mising’ bik che kingenge." 
Job19:14 Kagobagakta tilionutikyuk, Kagoutiena choronokyuk che angen komie." 
Job19:15 Kagoiita bik che menyei gonnyu, ak otwogikyuk che tibik aige too: A kipsagarin eng’ tainywa." 
Job19:16 Aguure otwogindennyu, ama wolwa kiy, Agot ngagaigai mising’." 
Job19:17 Kagoek kabusennyu kiy ne too eng’ kwondanyu, Ak kagoek somennyu agine kiy ne too eng’ lagokab kamennyu." 
Job19:18 Sasa agot lagok che mengech: Ngang’eet, kong’alal kowekwa kut." 
Job19:19 Wecha choronokyuk che kogichamdosi mising’: Ak wecha che kiachame. 
Job19:20 Namegei kowekyuk ak iririonnyu ak banyekyuk, Kachilile ui kitigin." 
Job19:21 Orirena, orirena, ee choronokyuk: Amu kagotwaa eutab Kamuktaindet." 
Job19:22 Amu nee si ousa ko u Kamuktaindet, Ama yamak banyekyuk?" 
Job19:23 Ee, kata mie kesir ng’alekyuk nguno! Ee, kata mie kesirji bukuit!" 
Job19:24 Kesire kalamitab karnet ak ngosielait Kesirji ruandet agoi koigeny! 
Job19:25 Ago angen ale sobei Katiagindennyu, Ak tun tonone ng’ony eng’ betut ne bo let:" 
Job19:26 Ak ye kagong’emak iririondennyu ko u ni, Ageere Kamuktaindet ko ma ami eng’ bortanyu;" 
Job19:27 Ne tun ageere kimni, Ak keerei konyekyuk inendet, mageerei age. Ichuchui sobondanyu eng’ orinnyu." 
Job19:28 Ngot omwa ole, Kiustoi ano inendet! Amu kigenyorja kit ne bunu ng’olyondonito;" 
Job19:29 Oiywei rotwetab chok: Amu ibu neregek biret ne bo rotwetab chok, Si kobiit onai ole mi kiruoget." 
Job20:1 Kowol anyun Sopar Naamatindet, kole," 
Job20:2 Kona kabwatutikyuk wolunet, Amu ng’olyotab chirjirto ne atinye." 
Job20:3 Kaagas keretab kong’ ne kagona alilan, Ak wolwa tamirmirietab naennyu." 
Job20:4 Tos kitom inai nito koboch keny, Koboch nginde chito ng’ony," 
Job20:5 Ile, nwach boiboiyetab kiptengeginik, Ak bo sait ne ming’in kagasetab ge ne bo ne maiywei Kamuktaindet?" 
Job20:6 Agot ngo togosta etunatennyi kipsengwetisiek, Ak koit metinnyi bolik;" 
Job20:7 Kolusei koigeny ko u ng’atatekyik: Mwaei che kigogeer inendet kole, Mi ano?" 
Job20:8 Siirtoi ko u karuotitoet, ama kenyoru: Ee, kionei ko u ng’ang’utietab kemoi." 
Job20:9 Ma kogeerei kogeny konda ne kiga kogeer inendet; Ama kogeerei inendet komostanyi kogeny. 
Job20:10 Cheng’ei lagokyik chamet eng’ kibananok, Ak koweech eunekyik magornatennyi." 
Job20:11 Nyiitat kowekyik ming’inatennyi, Ago ruitos ak inendet eng’ temburiek." 
Job20:12 Nganda anyiny tengekto eng’ kutinnyi, Nganda unyei eng’ ng’elyeptanyi;" 
Job20:13 Nganda rire, ama chamjin kwo, Ago ribei eng’ kutinnyi;" 
Job20:14 Kowalaksei amitwogikyik eng’ moennyi, Egu ng’wonetab erenok eng’ orinnyi." 
Job20:15 Kigolugui magornatosiek, ak kong’ung’u kogeny: Tumdoi Kamuktaindet choto eng’ moennyi." 
Job20:16 Chuchuni ng’wonetab erenok: Barei inendet ng’elyeptab erenet. 
Job20:17 Magerei ainosiek, Kererusiek che rootei che bo kumik ak mwanikab chego." 
Job20:18 Iweegu tuguk che kigobirtochigei, eng’ boisiet, ak malugui; Mabaibaitu ko u eng’ tuguk che kigonor." 
Job20:19 Amu kiinyalil kibananok ak kometo; Kigoreb got eng’ koromnatet, ak mateechei kogeny." 
Job20:20 Amu kima nai kamuung’et eng’ orinnyi, Masoru kiy age tugul ne iboiboi inendet." 
Job20:21 Ma ng’et kiy ne kima am; Noto anyun, matebyei magornatennyi." 
Job20:22 Bichiityin eng’ chang’indab tugukyik; Ityin inendet eutab age tugul ne nyalili. 
Job20:23 Ye machei konyiit moennyi, Kowire Kamuktaindet inendet neregekyik che koromen, Ak koyokyi Kamuktaindet inendet neregekyik ko u ropta, ye amisiei." 
Job20:24 Mwee karikab luget, che bo karik, Ak kotoor inendet kwangetab sugunwet, kosore." 
Job20:25 Ng’usu, ak komong’ eng’ bortanyi: Ee, mong’une kipsegetetiennyi walit ne lilei bich; Mi baragunnyi kamuisosiek." 
Job20:26 Kagigonorji mesundeito tugukyik che kororon: Beelei inendet mat ne maguutei chi; Beelei che ng’etunotin eng’ emainnyi. 
Job20:27 Ng’anyei kipsengwetisiek tengektanyi, Ak kong’eet ng’ony kogirinda inendet." 
Job20:28 Istogei magornatetab gonnyi, Iseeroksei eng’ betutab neregekyik." 
Job20:29 Nito kebeberta ne bo kiptengekyot, ne bunu Kamuktaindet, Ak borotet ne kilewenji Kamuktaindet inendet." 
Job21:1 Kowol anyun Job kole," 
Job21:2 Oepchi it komie ng’alalennyu: Ak ingoek nito kagaigaeng’wong’. 
Job21:3 Ogang’wa, si ang’alal agane; Ak ye kaang’alal, ochotisie." 
Job21:4 Ago eng’ ane, kotos arirjini chi? Ak amu nee si mamuite?" 
Job21:5 Ogeera, si okwong’ie, Ak onam kutuswekwok." 
Job21:6 Agot ye abwat, aarogeni, Ak namei kamuiset bortanyu." 
Job21:7 Amu nee si kosoptos kiptengeginik, Koosegitu, ee, kogimegitu kotesoksei?" 
Job21:8 Kimegitu iyotenywa koboto ichek eng’ tainywa, Ak kogimegitu lagokwak kogeerei." 
Job21:9 Mi kalyet gorikwak, ama mi kaiyweisiet. Ama mi kiroktab Kamuktaindet baragunywa." 
Job21:10 Riisiei kirginywa, ama mi kaiyweisiet: Iitos tukwak, ama oosu." 
Job21:11 Imaandoi lagokwak ko u akwetab kechirek, Ak urerendos lagokwak." 
Job21:12 Tiendos eng’ sugutit ak ketubet, Ak koboiboitu eng’ cheetab ndurerut," 
Job21:13 Boisie betusiekwak eng’ borotet, Ak ne matianit kochorjigei oldab che kigobek." 
Job21:14 Ago kilenji Kamuktaindet, Istoeneige: Amu magimache kenai ortinweguk." 
Job21:15 Ng’o Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, kot koet? Ak nee kelunet ne kesiche ngot kesa inendet?" 
Job21:16 Ogeero, manamu icheget borotenywa: Looena kiruogetab kiptengeginik." 
Job21:17 Kimisi tait ne bo kiptengeginik konyil ata? Kot konyonji icheget bichiindanywa? Kot kopcheita Kamuktaindet arogenosiek eng’ neregekyik? 
Job21:18 Ak koigei ichek mobek eng’ taitab usonet, Ak koigei metetek che ibei usonet ne o?" 
Job21:19 Olen, Konorjin Kamuktaindet lagokab chichoto tengektanyi. Ingogeerjigei, si kobiit konai." 
Job21:20 Ingogeer konyekyik ng’emisiennyi, Ak ingoee neregekab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet." 
Job21:21 Amu igochin gonnyi inendet boiboiyo nee ye kagobata inendet, Ye kitil koitetab arawekyik eng’ kwenet?" 
Job21:22 Tos ineti chi Kamuktaindet naet? Amu iruokyin che tororen. 
Job21:23 Meei age ko nyiitat kimnatennyi, Kotinyei kalyet ne o ak komuunyi:" 
Job21:24 Nyiitotin kinaikyik chego, Tuonen mwanikab kowekyik." 
Job21:25 Ak meei age eng’ ng’wanindab sobondo, Ama chamjami kiy ne mie." 
Job21:26 Kergei tugul, ruitos eng’ ng’ung’unyek. Ak tuchei kutik ichek." 
Job21:27 Ogeero, angen kabwatutikwok, Ak chobutik che obwati eng’ oret ne ya agobo ane." 
Job21:28 Amu olen, Mi ano gotab bounindet? Ak mi ano emait ne kimenyei kiptengeginik?" 
Job21:29 Tos ma oteebe ichek che siirtoi? Amongen kaborunaikwak? 
Job21:30 Ole, kigigonorji chito ne ya betutab bichiindo? Ole, kimuti eng’ betutab neregek?" 
Job21:31 Ng’o ne mwaitoi orennyi eng’ tainnyi? Ak ng’o ne yaakyin inendet kit ne kayai? 
Job21:32 Nganda u noto kelaei kwo kererit, Ak korib kererit." 
Job21:33 Anyinyitu eng’ inendet mogoronikab atebwet, Ak isubi bik tugul inendet, Ko u che kigondoe inendet che maiitoksei." 
Job21:34 Omuktoi ano anyun ogaigaa buch, Amu mi lembechek kityo wolunoikwok?" 
Job22:1 Kowol anyun Elipas Temanindet kole," 
Job22:2 Tos imuchi chi kotoret Kamuktaindet? Toretigei iman inendet ne ng’om. 
Job22:3 Tos boiboitu Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet ngele i bo iman? Anan tos nyoru inendet kelunet amu iyae ortinweguk koek che igesunotgei? 
Job22:4 Tos kerin kong’ amu kaiyweisiet ne iywei inendet, Kot obe tuwai kiruoget?" 
Job22:5 Tos ma o tengektang’ung’? Ama tinyei tengekwogiguk ole igesunegei. 
Job22:6 Amu kiiyosiechi buch ne otupche, Ak ireegune ngoroikwak che mi ach ngor." 
Job22:7 Kima inage beek ne kang’et, Ak kiimelel amitwogik ne amei rubet." 
Job22:8 Ago ki bo emet chito ne nyigan; Ak kimeny oloto chito ne tinyei teegisto. 
Job22:9 Kiion mosogik koba ak eut buch, Ak kigeiri eunekab che matinyei kwanisiek." 
Job22:10 Kayiemin anyun mestonok, Ak inyalilin kaiyweisiet ne kachein." 
Job22:11 Anan mesundeito, kot ko maimuchi igeerte. Ak komaluuchin chang’indab beek." 
Job22:12 Tos mami Kamuktaindet ole toror eng’ kipsengwet? Ak keero, tororindab kecheik, ile, mi barak ne tia!" 
Job22:13 Ak imwae ile, Ingen nee Kamuktaindet? Tos imuchi koruoch eng’ mesundeito ne o?" 
Job22:14 Tuchei inendet bolik che eechen, si mageerto; Ak wendoti eng’ yiemutietab kipsengwet." 
Job22:15 Isubi oret ne bo keny Ne kitiech bik che yaachen? 
Job22:16 Che kiging’us kotom kogesgei betusiekwak, Che kigitumda lumeiywekwak ko u beekab kererut:" 
Job22:17 Che kilenji Kamuktaindet, Istoeneige; Ak, Nee ne imuchi koyaiywech Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet?" 
Job22:18 Ago kiinyiit inendet gorikwak tuguk che miach: Ago loo eng’ ane kiruogetab kiptengeginik. 
Job22:19 Keerei noto che bo iman, ak koboiboitu; Ak rorechin ichek che matinyei lelut kogengenie:" 
Job22:20 Kolen, Kigeisto iman ichek che kilen kogirindech, Ak kigoges mat ichek che kiga ng’et." 
Job22:21 Onaiye anyun ak inendet ak itebe kalyet: Si konyonjin kit ne mie. 
Job22:22 Asain ale, taach ng’atutiet ne bunu kutinnyi, Ak igonore muguleldang’ung’ ng’alekyik." 
Job22:23 Ngot iweekyige Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, keteechin; Ngot iiste tengekto kolooit eng’ emaisieguk." 
Job22:24 Ak igonor konoraiguk eng’ ng’ung’unyek, Ak igonor tahabu che bo Opir eng’ koik che bo kererusiek;" 
Job22:25 Ak koek Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet konorueng’ung’, Ak koek feda ne bo kamanutiet ne o eng’ inye." 
Job22:26 Ibaibaege anyun Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, Ak inyal Kamuktaindet." 
Job22:27 Isa anyun inendet ak kogasin: Ak iyaakte arorutiguk. 
Job22:28 Ing’ate kogeny kiy, ak kigimitun; Ak koluuchi lapkeiyet ortinweguk." 
Job22:29 Ye kiwirjin ng’ony, imwa ile, Ta ang’eete; Ak kosoru inendet chito ne iming’inegei." 
Job22:30 Soru agot inendet ne ma bo iman: Ee, kisoru amu tililindab euneguk." 
Job23:1 Kowol anyun Job kole," 
Job23:2 Kang’wanit rani kang’unyng’ung’ennyu. Nyigis birennyu kosiir tigenennyu. 
Job23:3 Ee, kata mie nda kangen ole anyorjini inendet, Si kobiit ait ole mi ng’echerennyi!" 
Job23:4 Ta achobe ng’olyondennyu eng’ tainnyi, Ak anyiit kutinnyu tiiyosiek." 
Job23:5 Ta anae ng’alek che wolwa, Ak aguiye kit ne mwawa inendet." 
Job23:6 Tos kibeligei eng’ oindab kamuktaennyi? Achicha; epchina it. 
Job23:7 Imuchi ne bo iman kong’alaljin ak inendet eng’ oloto: Si kesorua koigeny eng’ inendet ne iruokwa. 
Job23:8 Ogeero, awendi tai, ago mami inendet; Ak aweechige let, ago mamuchi ageer inendet:" 
Job23:9 Awendi eutab katam, ole boisie, ago mamuchi ageer inendet: Ung’egei komostab tai, si mamuch ageer inendet." 
Job23:10 Ago ingen inendet oret ne abune; Ye kagotiema, among’u aige tahabu." 
Job23:11 Kagonamgei keldanyu ak tiegutikyik; Kaasub orennyi, ama amaste." 
Job23:12 Ma aweege let amete ng’atutietab kutinnyi; Kaagonor ng’alek che bunu kutinnyi kosiir amitwogik che nyoljina. 
Job23:13 Ago inendet ko agenge, ak ng’o ne imuchi kowal inendet? Ak kit ne machei sobondanyi, koyaei noto." 
Job23:14 Amu yaei inendet noto kageng’atwa: Ak mi tuguk che chang’ che u choto koboto inendet. 
Job23:15 Anyalili anyun eng’ tainnyi; Ye abwat, aiywei inendet." 
Job23:16 Amu kagogochi Kamuktaindet muguleldanyu kotanui, Ak kagonyalila Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet." 
Job23:17 Amu kima kiistoa kotom kobiit mesundeito, Ama tuch inendet mesundeito ne o eng’ tainnyu." 
Job24:1 Amu nee si ma konor Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet betusiek? Ak amu nee si mageer betusiekyik ichek che ingen inendet? 
Job24:2 Mi che istoi kiwotosiek; Rebei ichek eng’ kimnatet akwotisiekab kechirek, ak koyaga." 
Job24:3 Kweriei ichek sigirietab che matinyei kwanda, Namei eitab mosoget agobo besendo." 
Job24:4 Imaasi che banandos: Ung’egei uwak kibananokab ng’ony. 
Job24:5 Ogeero, bendi ichek boisienywa ko u sigirietab timin eng’ ong’atet, Kocheng’oti amitwogik; Igochin ong’atet ichek amitwogik agobo lagokwak." 
Job24:6 Kesei amitwogikwak eng’ mbar; Ak koturoti logoekab kiptengeginik. 
Job24:7 Ruitos ach ngor kemout komugul, Ama tinyei kit ne tugegei eng’ kaititiet." 
Job24:8 Inesyin roptab tulonok ichek, Ak ure ruandet amu matinyei ole ume." 
Job24:9 Mi che ng’use kinaik che matinyei kwanisiek, Ak konamei tugukab kibananok agobo besendo:" 
Job24:10 Kot kobendat ach ngor, Ak koibot ratutikab bek che amei rubet;" 
Job24:11 Che yaei mwanik eng’ orititab inatusiekab bichuto, Tiechei ole kitue sabibuk, ak koamei melel." 
Job24:12 Tigendos bik eng’ nganaset ne chang’ bik, Ak korirtos sobonwekab bik che kigiguoten: Ago ma iityi Kamuktaindet berberiet." 
Job24:13 Chuto ko che bo ichek che ingeleljin lapkeiyet; Manaei ortinwekyik, Ama tebe ortinwekyik." 
Job24:14 Ng’eetei rumindet ko kaeech kobar kibananok ak che matinyei kiy; Ak u inendet chorindet kemoi. 
Job24:15 Igeni kondab ne ibegei ko ratarat, Kolen, Mageera chi: Walei togennyi." 
Job24:16 Balei gorik kemoi: Kerjingei go bet; Manaei lapkeiyet. 
Job24:17 Amu karon eng’ ichek tugul ko u uruetab meet; Amu ingen kamuisosiekab uruetab meet. 
Job24:18 Labate inendet baragutab beek; Chubot kebebertanywa eng’ ng’ony: Mabunei oretab mbarenikab sabibuk. 
Job24:19 Istoi kemeut ak kiptoret beekab teluchi: U noto istoi oldab che kigobek che kigoyai tengekto. 
Job24:20 Utie moet inendet; amei kutik inendet eng’ anyinyindo; Magibwati kogeny: Ak keiri ne ma bo iman ko u ketit. 
Job24:21 Amei inendet ne son, ne maiyweiei; Ama yachin ne mie mosoget." 
Job24:22 Ichuuti che kimen agichek eng’ kamugennyi: Ng’eetei, ama tinyei chi kamang’unetab sobet." 
Job24:23 Igochin Kamuktaindet ichek kotebe chametab ge, ak komuung’e yoto; Ak komi konyekyik ortinwekwak." 
Job24:24 Kitorori; ak ne matianit, kobetyo; Ee, kiming’ini anyun, keistoi eng’ oret ko u alak tugul. Kitilei ko u ye kigesei bek." 
Job24:25 Ak ngot ko ma u noto anyun, ko ng’o ne mwaei kole a kiplembechwa, Ak kowal ng’alekyuk koek che matilei kiy?" 
Job25:1 Kowol anyun Bildad Suindet kole," 
Job25:2 Mi koboto inendet bounatet ak kaiyweisiet; Yaei kalyet eng’ komoswekyik che tororen. 
Job25:3 Tos iitoksei lugosiekyik? Ak ng’o ne mailuuchin lapkeiyennyi? 
Job25:4 Imuktoi ano anyun chi koek ne bo iman eng’ tai Kamuktaindet? Ak tililitundoi ano inendet ne kisich kwondo? 
Job25:5 Keero, agot arawet ko matinyei kaluunet, Ama tililen kecheik eng’ tainnyi:" 
Job25:6 Kotam nee anyun chito, ne inendet ko kutiet! Ak weritab chi, ne kutiet!" 
Job26:1 Kowol anyun Job kole," 
Job26:2 Ketoretite ano chito ne matinyei kamuget! Kesorunde ano eutab inendet ne matinyei kimnatet! 
Job26:3 Ketigonde ano inendet ne matinyei ng’omnatet, Ak imwaite naet ne bo iman eng’ chang’indo!" 
Job26:4 Kemwachi ng’o ng’alek? Ak bo ng’o tamirmiriet ne kimong’unenen? 
Job26:5 Botandos ichek che kigobek Che mi beek orit ak che menyei oloto. 
Job26:6 Mi buch oldab che kigobek eng’ tainnyi, Ama tinyei Ng’emisiet kit ne kituge." 
Job26:7 Iitoi murot ne bo katam ole mami kiy, Ak kosonginin ng’onyut eng’ ole mami kiy." 
Job26:8 Ratei beek eng’ bolikyik che eechen; Ama betoksei boldet eng’ kureretab beechoto. 
Job26:9 Unyei togetab ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, Ak koiito boldennyi eng’ baragutab ng’echeronato." 
Job26:10 Kiinde kiwotet koyiem nyanjosiek, Kiinde ole pcheegei lapkeiyet ak mesundeito." 
Job26:11 Botandos tolochikab kipsengwet Ak kokwong’dos eng’ kerennyi bo kong’. 
Job26:12 Wasei nyanjet eng’ kamuktaennyi, Toorei Rahab kosore eng’ naennyi." 
Job26:13 Lelesonjine kipsengwetisiek Tamirmiriennyi; Katoor eunnyi ndaret ne chepcheb. 
Job26:14 Keero, chuto ko kiwotosiekab ortinwekyik: Ago ming’in ne tia chaamset ne kegase agobo inendet! Ago iguitos ng’o tuletab kamuktaennyi?" 
Job27:1 Ak kigetyigei kogeny Job kalewenennyi, kole," 
Job27:2 Ko u ye sobei Kamuktaindet, ne kiistoena imandanyu; Ak ko u ye sobei Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, ne kigonyalil sobondanyu," 
Job27:3 (Amu ta kochamegei sobondanyu eng’ orinnyu, Ak mi tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet serunekyuk;)" 
Job27:4 Iman mamwaei kutinnyu ne ma bo iman, Anan komwa ng’elyeptanyu ng’alset." 
Job27:5 Achicha, maiityinok imanda: Mametoi imandanyu agoi ameei." 
Job27:6 Aname imandanyu kouuiit, machundoi: Magera kong’ muguleldanyu kota asobe." 
Job27:7 Ingogergeit bunyondennyu ak kiptengekyot, Ak ingoigei inendet ne ng’eetyina, chito ne ma bo iman." 
Job27:8 Nee kamang’unetab chito ne maiywei Kamuktaindet, agot ngo sikyigei kelunet, Ye isto Kamuktaindet sobondanyi?" 
Job27:9 Tos kasei Kamuktaindet rirekyik, Ye kanyonji inendet nyalilda?" 
Job27:10 Tos ibaibaegei Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, Ak koguur Kamuktaindet eng’ betusiek tugul?" 
Job27:11 Anetok agobo eutab Kamuktaindet; Maunye kit ne tinyei Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet. 
Job27:12 Ogeero, kiogeer noto okwek tugul; Amu nee anyun si oegu che matilei kiy agot kitigin?" 
Job27:13 Nito ko kebebertab kiptengekyot eng’ Kamuktaindet, Ak borotetab usik, che taachei eng’ Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet," 
Job27:14 Ngo tesogis lagokyik, kobunjin rotwetab chok; Ama yamei amitwogik lagokyik." 
Job27:15 Che kang’etune inendet, ketubei eng’ meet, Ama rirtos mosogikyik." 
Job27:16 Agot ngo bas fedaisiek ko u temburiek, Ak kochob ngoroik ko u menet;" 
Job27:17 Imuchi kochob, ago ilaachi bikab iman, Ak kopchechigei fedaisiechoto bik che matinyei lelut." 
Job27:18 Teechei gonnyi ko u kutiet, Ak ko u keriet ne teechei ribindet." 
Job27:19 Ruei ko magorio, ago magiyumi; Kosu, ago ma komi." 
Job27:20 Namei inendet kamuisosiek ko u beek; Chorei inendet usonet ne o kemoi. 
Job27:21 Ibei inendet usonet ne bo kong’asis, ak kwo; Ak kobukto inendet kwo eng’ oldanyi." 
Job27:22 Amu wirei Kamuktaindet inendet, ama rire: Machei komwee eunnyi." 
Job27:23 Iraprabi bik eunekwak agobo inendet, Ak koon inendet eng’ oldanyi." 
Job28:1 Iman, mitei keringet ne kebalune feda, Ak komostab tahabu che itilili ichek." 
Job28:2 Kibalune karik ng’ony, Ak kitang’une sugunonik koik." 
Job28:3 Chopchin chito mesundeito ole igesunegei, Ak kosiagoti kot koit ole boch eng’ ole loo Koikab mesundeito ne o ak ne bo uruetab meet." 
Job28:4 Balei keringet ole looe ole menyei bik; Utie icheget che siirtoi; Igartatotin icheget eng’ ole looe bik, ak kosonginindos kobendi komosi ak komosi." 
Job28:5 Mong’une amitwogik ng’ony: Ak ko walaksei ole bo orit kogeerei barak ko u ye walei mat. 
Job28:6 Koikyik ko komostab sapire, Ak kotinyei ng’ung’unyekab tahabu." 
Job28:7 Manaei oranato taritiet ne barisiei, Ak tom kogeer matonda oranato:" 
Job28:8 Tom kotiech yoto tiong’ik che menot, Ak tom kobun yoto ng’etundo ne korom." 
Job28:9 Iyogoitoi eunnyi si kotwaei ruandet ne uui; Igabui tulonok. 
Job28:10 Betei ole bunei beek eng’ ruandosiek; Ak kogeerei kondanyi kit age tugul ne bo kamanutiet. 
Job28:11 Kerei ainosiek si maroot, Ak imoong’u kit ne ung’at konyo lapkeiyet." 
Job28:12 Ago kinyorjin ano ng’omnatet? Ak mi ano komostab kaguiyet? 
Job28:13 Manaei chito alyennyi; Maginyorjin emetab bik che soptos. 
Job28:14 Len riret, Mami oldanyu: Ak len nyanjet, Mami oldanyu." 
Job28:15 Magimuchi keale tahabu, Ama kigere feda koek kamanutiennyi." 
Job28:16 Magimuchi kiroge tahabu che bo Opir, Ama kimuchi kiroge soam che bo kamanutiet ne o, anan ko sapire." 
Job28:17 Magimuchi kiaechine ng’omnatet tahabu ak glasit: Ama kiwale tuguk che bo tahabu che kororon. 
Job28:18 Magimwaei tuguk che biriren che mi ngegut anan sonoek che kororon: Ee, alyetab ng’omnatet kosiirei ne bo peninim." 
Job28:19 Magiaechindos ak topasio ne bo Etiopia, Ama kirogendoi tahabu che tililen." 
Job28:20 Bunu ano anyun ng’omnatet? Ak mi ano komostab kaguiyet? 
Job28:21 Amu kigiung’e konyekab tuguk che soptos, Ak keung’e taritik che bo barak." 
Job28:22 Len Ng’emisiet ak Meet, Kigegas eng’ itikyok ng’alek che kimwaoti agobo ng’omnatanato." 
Job28:23 Ingen Kamuktaindet orennyi, Ak ingen oldanyi." 
Job28:24 Amu keerei inendet tabanwekab ng’ony, Ak keerei kureret komugul ne bo kipsengwet;" 
Job28:25 Si kogochi usonet nyigisindo; Ee, ikwai beek eng’ kakwautiet." 
Job28:26 Ye kingoyai ng’atutietab ropta, Ak koyai oretab kalyeletab tulet:" 
Job28:27 Kogeer anyun, ak komwaita; Kiigimit, ee, ak kosiach." 
Job28:28 Ak kimwachi bik, kolenji, Ogeero, ngiywei Kiptaiyat, ko ng’omnatet noto; Ak ngeistoege yaitiet, ko naet noto." 
Job29:1 Ak kigetyigei Job kogeny kalewenennyi, kole," 
Job29:2 Kata kaigai nda ka u kit ne kia u eng’ arawek che bo keny, Eng’ betusiek che kiriba Kamuktaindet;" 
Job29:3 Ye kiiluuchin tainnyi metinnyu, Ak kiawendote mesundeito eng’ lapkeiyennyi;" 
Job29:4 Ko u ye kia u eng’ betusiekab neratennyu, Ye kimi ung’otietab Kamuktaindet emainnyu;" 
Job29:5 Ye kita komi kobota Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, Ye kimi lagokyuk kobota;" 
Job29:6 Ye kigiune tiegutikyuk mwaitab chego, Ak kirong’wa ruandet ainosiekab mwanik!" 
Job29:7 Ye kiawendi agoi ormarichetab nganaset, Ye kiachobe ng’echerennyu eng’ oret ne o," 
Job29:8 Kigeera murenik ak kounygei, Ak king’eetya che osen kotononso;" 
Job29:9 Kisisyo bounik, Ak konam kutuswekwak;" 
Job29:10 Kima twek bik che toogunotin, Ak kinamak kut." 
Job29:11 Amu ye kingegasa, kiberura; Ak ye kingegeera, kebaorianja." 
Job29:12 Amu kiasoru kibananiat ne kirirei, Ak ne kima kotinyei kwanda agine, ne kima kotinyei chi ne toreti." 
Job29:13 Kinyonja kaberuretab inendet ne kimachei kolus: Ak kiagochi muguleldab mosoget kotien eng’ boiboiyet. 
Job29:14 Kialaach imanda, ak kitucha: Ki u imandanyu ngoriet ne bo teegisto ak chepkuletab torornatet." 
Job29:15 Kiaegu konyekab kipkoratiat, Ak aegu kelyekab ne solomwo." 
Job29:16 Kiaegu kwandab che matinyei kiy: Ak kiasiach kiruogetab inendet ne kima angen. 
Job29:17 Ak kiairi tagilgilikab bik che ma bo iman, Ak ang’usu eng’ kelyekyik kit ne kimachei kobar." 
Job29:18 Kiale anyun, Amechini gonnyu, Ak ates betusiekyuk kochang’a ko u ng’aniek:" 
Job29:19 Iwaktoi tigitikyuk kobendi beek, Ak kotebe rewot temennyu kemout komugul:" 
Job29:20 Ta ko leel torornatennyu ne mita, Ak kileeliti kwangennyu eng’ eunnyu." 
Job29:21 Kiepcha it bik, ak kogenis, Ak kosisyo si kobiit kogas kotigonutikyuk." 
Job29:22 Kingo kaang’alal, ko mata kotwek: Ak kiibis ichek ng’alekyuk." 
Job29:23 Ak kiigena ko u ye igeni ropta; Ak kiiseng’eng’so mising’ ko u ye igeni ropta ne bo let. 
Job29:24 Ngot arorechi ichek, ko maiyani; Ak ma kirinda ichek lapkeiyetab togennyu." 
Job29:25 Kialewen orenywa, ak atebi aegu kiruogindet, Ak ameny ko u laitoriat ne mi luget, Ko u chito ne igoigoi che rirtos." 
Job30:1 Ago rorechina nguno che ta ko mengechen eng’ ane, Che kiasas kwanisiekwak ale atuiyo ak sesenik che bo akwennyu." 
Job30:2 Ee, kelwa nee anyun, eng’ kimnatetab eunekwak? Bik che kigobetyo kimnatosiekwak." 
Job30:3 Sogityotin eng’ bananda ak rubet; Amei ng’ung’unyek che yaamnyotin, eng’ ole mi mesundeitab bananda ak ng’emisiet." 
Job30:4 Butei sogekab ketitab munyuk eng’ ole negite timdo; Ak amitwogikwak tigitikab junipa. 
Job30:5 Kionei koba eng’ kwenutab bik; Kiwaage ichek ko u ye kiwaage chorindet. 
Job30:6 Kanyol komeny ole betotin eng’ bomboosiek, Komeny keringonikab ng’ony ak che bo ruandosiek." 
Job30:7 Iteitos eng’ timin ko u sigirok; Iyumjingei kelutab ketik che u siwek. 
Job30:8 Icheget ko lagokab bik che abusotin, ee lagokab bik che itewerotin; Kigibirot koba eng’ emet." 
Job30:9 Kaaegu nguno tiendanywa, Ee, kaaegu kalewenet eng’ ichek." 
Job30:10 Wecha, itabanenagei, Ak sing’iljina togoch." 
Job30:11 Amu kigotiach borowennyi ak konyalila, Kiireek eng’ tainnyu kit ne rang’egei." 
Job30:12 Ng’eetos eng’ eunnyu ne bo tai bik che yaachen; Ak kotoorta kelyekyuk koba taban, Ak kobokya eng’ ortinwekwak che bo ng’emisiet." 
Job30:13 Ng’emei orennyu, Tesei nyalildanyu, Bik che matinyei toretin." 
Job30:14 Bwanjina eng’ ole kiundur kobarait: Miljinagei eng’ ole kigoguber. 
Job30:15 Kagiweekya kamuisosiek, Onei teegistanyu ko u ye onsei usonet; Ak kagosiirto chamennyu bo ge ko u boldet." 
Job30:16 Katumdagei anyun sobondanyu; Kagonama betusiekab nyalilda. 
Job30:17 Kitoorei kowekyuk kemoi, Ama sisei ng’wanindo ne nyea." 
Job30:18 Kang’emak ngoriennyu amu kimnatet ne o ne bo miandanyu: Igiicha ko u kaatitab ngoriennyu. 
Job30:19 Kagowirja ng’atatek, Ak kaige temburiek ak orek." 
Job30:20 Arirjinin, amewolwa: Atononi, ak igeera." 
Job30:21 Kaigoromitu eng’ ane: Iusena kimnatetab eung’ung’. 
Job30:22 Iganapchina usonet, ak igona alany; Ak ichoota eng’ usonet ne o." 
Job30:23 Amu angen ale imutyina meet, Ak imutyina got ne kigichopchi bik tugul che soptos." 
Job30:24 Iman matokyin eunnyi karaita ne kigorurugok; Nganda mi eng’ ng’emisiennyi, kota komuchi chi kowaach agobo tuguchuto." 
Job30:25 Tos ma arir agobo inendet ne kimi nyalilda? Tos ma arogen sobondanyu agobo che matinyei kiy? 
Job30:26 Ye kingacheng’ ne mie, konyo yaitiet; Ye kiageni lapkeiyet, konyo mesundeito." 
Job30:27 Lalei moennyu, ama sisei; Kabwanja betusiekab nyalilda." 
Job30:28 Ariroti, mageere asista: Atononi eng’ tuiyet, ak arir amache toretet." 
Job30:29 A tupchetab lelwek, Ak a choruetab tiong’ikab songolik." 
Job30:30 Tuui iririondennyu, sinditi, Ak laldos kowekyuk eng’ mat." 
Job30:31 Kawalak cheetab ketubennyu koek rirek. Ak kawalak cheetab ndurerunnyu koek cheetab icheget che rirtos. 
Job31:1 Kigiyomisge ak konyekyuk; Amuktoi ano anyun ageer bergeiyat? 
Job31:2 Nee kebeberta ne bunu barak, ne bo Kamuktaindet, Ak borotet ne bunu barak ne bo Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet?" 
Job31:3 Tos ma nyalilda eng’ che ma bo iman, Ak ng’emisiet eng’ yaikab tengekto?" 
Job31:4 Tos mageerei ortinwekyuk, Ak koiiti kakwautikyuk tugul?" 
Job31:5 Ngot ko kiawendote tangoita, Ak kochakta keldanyu kwo ole mi ng’alset;" 
Job31:6 (Ngegera anyun eng’ karogendoet ne bo iman, Si kobiit konai Kamuktaindet imandanyu;)" 
Job31:7 Ngot ko kagomasta kakwaennyu, Ak kosub muguleldanyu konyekyuk, Ak ngot ko kagonam tisiet age tugul eunekyuk:" 
Job31:8 Mie agolso anyun, ak ingoam chito age; Ee, ingitut bekab mbarennyu." 
Job31:9 Ngot ko kigochuut kwondo muguleldanyu, Ak kiaribis eng’ kurgetab chitab kokwennyu:" 
Job31:10 Ingong’aisechi anyun osotiondennyu chito age, Ingong’urukyi alage inendet." 
Job31:11 Amu kata egu noto tengekto ne o; Ee, kata egu tengekto ne iruokyin kiruogik:" 
Job31:12 Amu noto ko mat ne igesu agoi Ng’emisiet, Ak kotut ruratennyu tugul." 
Job31:13 Ngot ko kiasas ng’olyotab otwogindennyu ne muren anan ne tie, Ye kigitiytosi ak ichek:" 
Job31:14 Yaei nee anyun ye kang’eet Kamuktaindet? Ak ye nyo koteepso, awoljini nee?" 
Job31:15 Inendet ne kiyaa eng’ moet, ko tos ma Inendet ne kiyaei chichoto agine? Tos ma Inendet ne kimimiech eng’ moet?" 
Job31:16 Ngot ko kiamelel kibananok magenywa, Anan ngo kiagochi konyekab mosoget kong’etyo;" 
Job31:17 Anan ngo kiaam kererutiennyu anege, Ak tomo koam ne matinyei kwanda;" 
Job31:18 (Achicha, kigoner inendet kemi tuwai koboch ko a ming’in, ko u ye mi ak kwanda, Ak kiaegu kandoindetab mosoganato koboch ngab kesicha;)" 
Job31:19 Ngot ko kiageer chi age tugul kobetei amu matinyei ngoroik, Anan ageer che nyalildos ko matinyei kiy ne tugegei;" 
Job31:20 Ngot ko ma iberura suenutikyik, Ak ngot ko manyor lalang’indo eng’ kororikab kechirekyuk;" 
Job31:21 Ngot ko kianamji barak eunnyu agirinde ne matinyei kwanda, Amu kiageer toretennyu eng’ ormarich:" 
Job31:22 Ingobut anyun tigikyiennyu eng’ buita, Ingeiri eunnyu kichun." 
Job31:23 Amu ki kamuiset eng’ ane nyalilda ne bunu Kamuktaindet, Amamuch ayai kiy amu telunatennyi." 
Job31:24 Ngot ko kiamang’u tahabu, Ak alenji tahabu che kororon, Inye ne amang’un;" 
Job31:25 Ngot ko kiabaibaitu amu o magornatennyu, Ak amu kiga konyor eunnyu tuguk che chang’;" 
Job31:26 Ngot ko kiageer asista ye kiiluu, Anan arawet ye kiwendoti eng’ kaluunet;" 
Job31:27 Ak kigigaigai muguleldanyu eng’ ung’ot, Ak king’utut kutinnyu eunnyu:" 
Job31:28 Kita egu nito agine tengekto ne iruokyin kiruogik: Amu ta kiga amwachi lembech Kamuktaindet ne mi barak. 
Job31:29 Ngot ko kiabaibaitu eng’ ng’emisietab inendet ne wecha, Anan aeetge ye kinyor yaitiet inendet;" 
Job31:30 (Ee, ma achamji kutinnyu koyai tengekto Asom eng’ chubisiet sobondanyi;)" 
Job31:31 Ngot ko ma mwa bikab emainnyu kole, Ng’o ne imuchi konyor chi ne ma biyonyi banyekyik?" 
Job31:32 Ma ru toondet oret, Ago kiayatyi kurgotikyuk kiprutoiyot;" 
Job31:33 Ngot ko kiatuch bistoennyu ko u Adam, Atuch tengektanyu eng’ tegennyu;" 
Job31:34 Amu kiaiywei tuiyet ne o, Ak kiimua sasisietab bik eng’ gorikwak, Kot asis, amawe sang’-" 
Job31:35 Ee, kata mie nda katinye chi ne kasa! (Keero, mi yu sirutiennyu ne bo ng’okset, ingowolwa Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet;) Ak atinye kataamset ne kisirei bunyondennyu!" 
Job31:36 Iman, ka ta alae eng’ tigikyiennyu; Kata aratyinige ko u nariet;" 
Job31:37 Kata amwachini inendet koitetab kakwautikyuk; Kata arikyini inendet ko u bounindet. 
Job31:38 Ngo waagena emennyu, Ak koririo kibagenge ole kigibat;" 
Job31:39 Ngot ko kiaam logoekyik ama aal, Anan agochi bikab kobo kobeet sobonwekwak:" 
Job31:40 Ingobityo anyun katablelinik kogeer nganok, Ak kogeer timdo sairik. Kagogesgei ng’alekab Job." 
Job32:1 Kosisyo anyun bichoto somogu, mata kowolji kiy Job, amu kigeerei Job eng’ kabwatutikyik kole, a bo iman." 
Job32:2 Kilalyo anyun neregekab Eliu weritab Barakel Busindet, ne bo oretab Ram: kilalyo neregekyik agobo Job, amu kiityigei imanda, ne kata iiytin Kamuktaindet." 
Job32:3 Kilalyo kogeny neregekyik agobo choronokyik somok, amu kimanyor ichek kit ne woljin Job, ago kiigikyi inendet." 
Job32:4 Ago kiigeni Eliu kong’alalji Job, amu ki osen icheget kosiir inendet." 
Job32:5 Ak kingogeer Eliu kole manyor bichoto somogu kit ne wolu, kolalyo neregekyik." 
Job32:6 Kowol anyun Eliu weritab Barakel Busindet kole, A neran, ago okwek, ko o boisiek che osen mising’; Koasis anyun amu noto, ma agany aboruok kabwatennyu." 
Job32:7 Koale, Nyoljin betusiek kong’alal. Ak nyoljin chang’indab kenyisiek konet ng’omnatet." 
Job32:8 Ago mi tamirmiriet chito, Igochin kabusetab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet ichek kaguiyet." 
Job32:9 Ma che eechen che ng’omen, Ama che osen che iguitos kiruoget." 
Job32:10 Amwae anyun ale, Ogasa; Aboru agane kabwatennyu." 
Job32:11 Ogeero, koageni ng’alekwok, Koaepchini it ng’alekwok, Ye koocheng’e kit ne omwae." 
Job32:12 Ee, koaepchok it, Ak ogeero, ma biit chi ne koiterter Job, Anan ne kowol ng’alekyik eng’ okwek." 
Job32:13 Oripge si momwa ole, Kageng’omegitu; Iterteri Kamuktaindet inendet, ma chi:" 
Job32:14 Amu ma tokya ng’alekyik; Amawoljini inendet kiy eng’ ng’alekwok. 
Job32:15 Kwong’dos ichek, mata kowol kiy: Matinyei ng’olyot ne mwaei." 
Job32:16 Tos kanyol agen, amu mang’alaldos, Amu tonondos kosistos, ama kowolu kiy?" 
Job32:17 Awolu agane kebebertanyu, Aboru agane kabwatennyu." 
Job32:18 Amu kigonyiia ng’alek; Igiila tamirmiriet ne atinye. 
Job32:19 Ogeero, u moennyu divaik che matinyei ole mandoe; Kergei ak sotonik che leelach che machei koyesyo." 
Job32:20 Ang’alali, si kobiit asob; Ayate kutinnyu, awolu." 
Job32:21 Asaok ale, amogona atiytii chi age tugul; Amagochini chi age tugul kainaik che ilosunegei buch." 
Job32:22 Amu mangen agoito kainaik che kilosunegei buch; Si maistoa Yaindennyu kochokyi. 
Job33:1 Ago anyun, asain Job ale, igas ng’alekyuk, Ak iepchi it ng’alekyuk tugul." 
Job33:2 Keer anyun, kaang’alal, Twegu ng’elyeptanyu eng’ kutinnyu." 
Job33:3 Iboru ng’alekyuk imandab muguleldanyu: Ak mwaei kutinnyu tuguk che bo iman, che ingen." 
Job33:4 Kigoyaa tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet, Kona asob kabusetab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet." 
Job33:5 Ngimuchi, iwolwa: Tonon, tetwa ng’aleguk komie." 
Job33:6 Keero, kit ne i u eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet, a u noto agane: Kigiyaena agane menet." 
Job33:7 Keero, magonin kamuisennyu iyweisie, Ama nyigisyinin eunnyu." 
Job33:8 Iman, kaing’alal agase, Ak kaagas ng’aleguk komwaei kole," 
Job33:9 A tilil, matinye kachililut; Matinye lelut, ama mi tengek eng’ ane:" 
Job33:10 Ogeero, nyorjina tuguk che iruogunena, Iita aek bunyondennyi;" 
Job33:11 Indoi kelyekyuk temeleiywek, Keerei ortinwekyuk tugul." 
Job33:12 Keero, awolun, mebo iman eng’ ng’olyondoni; Amu o Kamuktaindet kosiir chito." 
Job33:13 Amu nee si oborie ak inendet? Amu matetu ng’alekyik agot agenge. 
Job33:14 Amu ng’alali Kamuktaindet konyil agenge, Ee, konyil aeng, agot ngo manaei chi." 
Job33:15 Eng’ karuotitoet, eng’ ng’ang’utiet ne bo kemoi, Ye nyonjin bik ruondo ne nyigis, Ye inuuktos eng’ itok;" 
Job33:16 Yatei anyun itikab bik, Ak kong’och konetisienywa," 
Job33:17 Si kobiit koisto chito eng’ kit ne tokyingei, Ak koung’e chito menotet:" 
Job33:18 Ribei sobondanyi si maibutyi keringet, Ak koribei sobennyi si mabar rotwetab chok." 
Job33:19 Kitigone kogeny ng’wanindo eng’ itogunnyi. Ak boriet ne mi kotugul eng’ kowekyik: 
Job33:20 Kot kowech sobennyi amitwogik, Ak kowech sobondanyi amitwogik che anyinyen." 
Job33:21 Inchuchui banyekyik, kot ko ma kegeerei: Ak kotook kowekyik che kima ko toogu." 
Job33:22 Ee, rikyin sobondanyi keringet, Ak korikyi sobennyi ng’emik." 
Job33:23 Ngot komi malaikaiyat koboto inendet, Kaweegindetab ng’alek, agenge eng’ elfut. Si koborji chito kit ne bo iman eng’ chichoto:" 
Job33:24 Korire inendet anyun, ak kole, Soru inendet si marorokyi keringet, Kaanyoru katiaget." 
Job33:25 Ng’arng’aritu bortanyi kosiir ne bo lakwet; Weekyingei betusiekab ming’inatennyi: 
Job33:26 Saei Kamuktaindet, ak kogasyi inendet; Kot konyo tainnyi eng’ boiboiyet: Ak koweekyi chito imandanyi." 
Job33:27 Tieni eng’ taitab bik, ak kole, Kiayai tengekto, ak amaas kit ne ki bo iman, Ama kelwa kiy:" 
Job33:28 Kigosor sobondanyu si mawo keringet, Ak kogeer sobondanyu lapkeiyet." 
Job33:29 Keero, yaei Kamuktaindet tuguchuto tugul, Yaei konyil aeng’, konyil somok koyachin chito," 
Job33:30 Si koweech sobondanyi komong’une keringet, Si kobiit kikweng’e lapkeiyetab che soptos." 
Job33:31 Keer komie, ee Job, kasa: Sis, si ang’alal." 
Job33:32 Ngitinye kiy age tugul ne imwae, iwolwa: Ng’alal, amu amache aiityin imanda." 
Job33:33 Ngo ma u noto, igaswa: Sis, si anetin ng’omnatet." 
Job34:1 Kiwol kogeny Eliu kole," 
Job34:2 Ogas ng’alekyuk, bichu ng’omen; Ak oepcha it, okwek che otinye naet." 
Job34:3 Amu tiemei itit ng’alek, Ko u ye chamjami kutit amitwogik." 
Job34:4 Ongelewenjige kit ne bo iman: Ongenai acheget kit ne mie. 
Job34:5 Amu kamwa Job kole, A bo iman, Ak kigoistoena Kamuktaindet che nyoljina:" 
Job34:6 Nganda a bo iman ko kigiita kele a kiplembechwa: Mainyaaksei ng’otobennyu, agot ngo matinye kachililut." 
Job34:7 Ngoro chi ne u Job, Ne eei sasisiet ko u beek?" 
Job34:8 Ne wendoti koboto yaikab tengekto, Ak kowendoti ak bik che yaach." 
Job34:9 Amu kigomwa kole, Mageljin kiy chito Kobaibaegei Kamuktaindet." 
Job34:10 Ogas anyun amu noto, bichu otinye naet: Ingolooit eng’ Kamuktaindet kele imuchi koyai yaitiet; Ak ingolooit eng’ Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet kele koyai tengekto." 
Job34:11 Amu yaakyin chito ko u boisionikyik, Ak kogochi chi age tugul konyor ko u ortinwekyik." 
Job34:12 Ee, iman, mayaei Kamuktaindet kiy ne ya, Ama imaasi kiruoget Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet." 
Job34:13 Ng’o ne king’at inendet si kobiit korib ng’ony? Anan ng’o ne kiinde ng’ony komugul ole tebe? 
Job34:14 Ngot kochamei chito eng’ muguleldanyi, Ngot koyumjingei inendet tamirmiriet ak kabusetab chichoto;" 
Job34:15 Kobegu anyun bik tugul kibagenge, Ak koweekyingei chito ng’ung’unyek." 
Job34:16 Ngot itinye anyun kaguiyet igas nito: Epchi it ng’alekyuk. 
Job34:17 Tos imuchi kobounis inendet ne wechei imanda? Ak tos igikyini inye inendet ne bo iman ak ko kim? 
Job34:18 Tos nyolu kelenji laitoriat, I ya? Anan kelenji bik che toogunotin, O yaachen?" 
Job34:19 Kotam nee anyun eng’ inendet ne magonyiti bounik, Ne mageerei magorek kosiir kibananok? Amu boisionikab eunekyik ichek tugul." 
Job34:20 Begu eng’ ye matia, agot kemoi kwen; Botandos bik ak kosiirto, Ak kiistoi che kimen ama eng’ eutab chi." 
Job34:21 Amu keerei konyekyik ortinwekab chi, Ak kogeerei banwekyik tugul." 
Job34:22 Mami mesundeito, anan uruetab meet, Ole imuchi koung’egei yaikab tengekto." 
Job34:23 Amu manyoljin inendet ko ta kobwat chito, Kole nyoljin kwo taitab Kamuktaindet eng’ kiruoget." 
Job34:24 Tonatoni bik che kimen eng’ ortinwek che ma naoksei, Ak konde alak kogeer icheget." 
Job34:25 Naei anyun boisionikwak: Ak kogabui kemoi, si kobiit keng’em ichek." 
Job34:26 Birei ichek ko u bik che yaachen Kogeerei bik alak; 
Job34:27 Amu kimasta, ma isub inendet, Ama ibwat age tugul eng’ ortinwekyik:" 
Job34:28 Kot kogochi rirekab kibananok koit ole mi inendet, Ak kigas rirekab che kinyalili." 
Job34:29 Ye konu inendet kamuung’et, ko ng’o anyun ne igikyin inendet? Ak ye uny togennyi, ko ng’o ne imuchi kogeer? Ngo yachi boror, anan ko chi, ko kergei:" 
Job34:30 Si malaitoran chito ne maiywei Kamuktaindet, Si mabiit chi ne riichei bik." 
Job34:31 Tos kigomwachi chi age tugul Kamuktaindet, kolenji, Kaamuite eng’ kotigonet, ma ayae lelut kogeny:" 
Job34:32 Ineta che ma ageere: Ngot ko kiayai tengekto, ko mayae kogeny?" 
Job34:33 Tos biitu yaakyinennyi ko u ye ichame amu iesioi? Amu kanyol ilewen, ma ane: Mwa anyun che ingen." 
Job34:34 Lenjina bik che tinyei naet, Ee, chi age tugul ne ng’om ne kasa:" 
Job34:35 Ng’alali Job ko matinyei naet, Ama mi ng’omnatet ng’alekyik." 
Job34:36 Kata mie ketiem Job agoi let, Amu kergei wolunennyi ak ne bo bik che yachen." 
Job34:37 Amu tesyin ngelelnatet tengektanyi, Iraprabi eunekyik eng’ kwenunnyo, Ak kotesei ng’alekyik kogirinda Kamuktaindet." 
Job35:1 Kowol kogeny Eliu kole," 
Job35:2 Tos ilen imandang’ung’ nito, Anan imwae ile, Siirei imandanyu ne bo Kamuktaindet," 
Job35:3 Kot ile, Nee kelunet ne inyoru? Anan, Nee kelunet ne anyoru ne siirei nda kagayai tengekto?" 
Job35:4 Awolun anyun, Koboto bik che omi tugul." 
Job35:5 Inyal kipsengwetisiek, ak igeer; Ak igeer bolik, che mi barak kosiirin." 
Job35:6 Ngot ko kaiyai tengek, ko keyachi nee inendet? Ak ngot ko tesoksei bistaosieguk, ko keyachi nee inendet?" 
Job35:7 Ngot i bo iman, igochini nee inendet? Anan taachei nee eng’ eung’ung’?" 
Job35:8 Imuchi kogochi yaitieng’ung’ ng’wanindo chito ne u inye; Ak imuchi imandang’ung’ kogochi keljinet weritab chito. 
Job35:9 Rirtos amu chang’indab usisiosiek; Rirtos komachei toretet amu eutab inendet ne tinyei kamuget. 
Job35:10 Ago mami ne mwaei kole, Mi ano Kamuktaindet Yaindennyu, Ne konu tienwogik kemoi:" 
Job35:11 Ne inetech kosiir tiong’ikab ng’ony, Ak kong’omitech kosiir taritikab barak?" 
Job35:12 Rirtos anyun, ago mami ne woljin kiy, Amu menotetab bik che yaach." 
Job35:13 Iman magasei Kamuktaindet tangoita, Ama iiti Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet." 
Job35:14 Kotam nee ye imwae ile, mageere inendet, Mi ng’alek tainnyi, ak igeni!" 
Job35:15 Ago, amu ma nyo inendet eng’ neregekyik, Ama iiti menotet mising’;" 
Job35:16 Komwa anyun Job ng’alekab buch; Tesei ng’alek ama tinyei naet. 
Job36:1 Kiwa tai kogeny Eliu eng’ ng’alalennyi, kole," 
Job36:2 Kang’wa kitigin, si aborun; Amu ta atinye ng’olyot ne amwae ne kata mwaei Kamuktaindet." 
Job36:3 Aibune naennyu ole loo, Si aiityi imanda Yaindennyu." 
Job36:4 Amu ma lembech ng’alekyuk iman: Mi koboten inendet ne igesunotgei eng’ naet. 
Job36:5 Keero, bo kamuget Kamuktaindet, ama sasei chi tugul: Tinyei kamuget eng’ kimnatetab kaguiyet." 
Job36:6 Maribei sobetab che yaachen: Ago igochin che kinyalili tuguk che nyoljin. 
Job36:7 Maistoe konyekyik bik che bo iman: Ago indoi ichek kotebi koigeny Koboto laitorinik, eng’ ng’echeretab laitornatet, ak kitorori ichek." 
Job36:8 Ak ngot kerat eng’ mugurek, Ak kerate boroonikab nyalilda;" 
Job36:9 Koborji anyun ichek boisienywa, Ak bistaosiekwak, kele, kiyai icheget eng’ menotet." 
Job36:10 Yatei kogeny itikwak si kogas konetisiet, Ak kong’at kole koweek ichek eng’ tengekto." 
Job36:11 Ngot kogas it inendet ak koot, Koboisie betusiekwak eng’ kaberuret, Ak koboisie kenyisiekwak eng’ boiboiyet." 
Job36:12 Ago ngot ko magas it, kolustos eng’ rotwetab chok, Ak kobek ama tinyei naet." 
Job36:13 Ago ichek che maiywei Kamuktaindet eng’ muguleldo, kogonorjingei neregek: Marirtos kosomei toretet ye karat inendet ichek." 
Job36:14 Begu ye ta ko neran, Ak lustos sobonwekwak koboto che ng’wonen." 
Job36:15 Soru chito ne kinyalili eng’ nyalildanyi, Ak koyat itikwak eng’ usisienywa." 
Job36:16 Ee, kata imutun imong’une bichiindo; Inyo ole baraa, ole mami tiritindo; Ak kit ne kindoi meseng’ung’ konyiie mwanik." 
Job36:17 Ago kagonyiin kiruogutikab chi ne ya: Namin kiruoget ak imanda. 
Job36:18 Amu mi neregek, iripge si maichuutin talbistang’ung’; Anan komaasin oindab katiaget." 
Job36:19 Tos yamin magornatosieguk, kot ko menyoru bichiindo, Anan yamin kimnatosiek tugul che bo kamugeng’ung’?" 
Job36:20 Amat imach kemout, Ye kiistoi bik eng’ komostanywa." 
Job36:21 Ripge, amemage kiy tengekto: Amu kilewen nito kosiir nyalilda." 
Job36:22 Keero, tororitu Kamuktaindet eng’ kamugennyi: Ng’o konetindet ne u inendet?" 
Job36:23 Ng’o ne kigong’at orennyi? Anan ng’o ne imuchi komwa kole, Keyai ne ma bo iman?" 
Job36:24 Ibwat itoror boisiennyi, Ne kigotienjin bik." 
Job36:25 Kagogeer bik tugul noto; Keerei bik eng’ ole loo. 
Job36:26 Keero, o Kamuktaindet, ama kinae inendet; Ma naaksei koitetab kenyisiekyik." 
Job36:27 Amu ichuuti inendet beek che saitoi, Che rong’ugei eng’ ropta eng’ kibungwerennyi." 
Job36:28 Che rong’u bolik Ak korobonji bik ropta ne o. 
Job36:29 Ee, imuchi chi koguiyo kaiyestaetab bolik, Ak tulosiekab meng’otennyi?" 
Job36:30 Keero, iitoi lapkeiyennyi koyiem inendet; Ak tuchei nyanjet ole bo ng’ony." 
Job36:31 Amu iruokyine bik chuto; Konu amitwogik eng’ chang’indo. 
Job36:32 Tuge eunekyik kalyelet; Ak kong’at ole kwere. 
Job36:33 Mwaitoi tulet inendet, Iboru tuga usonet ne nyonei." 
Job37:1 Botani muguleldanyu eng’ nito agine, Ak kaistoegei komostanyi." 
Job37:2 Ogas anyun cheetab tugennyi, Ak cheet ne mong’une kutinnyi." 
Job37:3 Iyoktoi kwo kureret tugul ne bo kipsengwet, Ak koyoktoi kalyelennyi koyom tabanwekab ng’ony." 
Job37:4 Ye ibata kotugul; Tulei eng’ tugetab etunatennyi: Ak magerei inendet ichek ye kagigas tugennyi. 
Job37:5 Tulei Kamuktaindet eng’ tugennyi eng’ kwong’et; Yaei tuguk che eechen, che magimuchi kiguiye." 
Job37:6 Amu lenjin teluchi, Obutyi ng’ony; Ak mwachin ko u noto ropta ne inesi, Ak mwachin ko u noto roptanyi ne kim." 
Job37:7 Ratei eutab chi age tugul; Si kobiit konai bik tugul che kiyaei. 
Job37:8 Koba anyun tiong’ik ole ung’egei, Ak kotebi eng’ kebenonikwak." 
Job37:9 Bunu usonet ne o gorikab murot ne bo tai: Kobun kaititiet murot ne bo katam. 
Job37:10 Konu kabusetab Kamuktaindet beek che kigogau: Ak kogau chang’indab beek. 
Job37:11 Ee, igochin beek boldet ne nyigis; Iitoi boldetab kalyelennyi:" 
Job37:12 Ak kiweleli eng’ kandoisiennyi, Si kobiit koyai kit age tugul ne kang’atyi ichek Eng’ ng’onyut ne kimenyei." 
Job37:13 Ngo bo kotigonet, anan ngo bo emennyi, Anan ngo bo rirenet, kogonu ui tugul." 
Job37:14 Kas ng’olyondoni, ee Job: Tonon, ak ibwat boisionikab Kamuktaindet che kikwong’e." 
Job37:15 Tos ingen inye ole ng’atitoi Kamuktaindet ichek, Ole ng’atitoi kokweny kalyeletab boldennyi koluu?" 
Job37:16 Tos ingen ole songinindoi bolik, Boisionik che kikwong’e, che bo inendet ne igesunotgei eng’ naet?" 
Job37:17 Lalang’en mising’ ngoroiguk, Ye kasis emet eng’ usonet ne bo murot ne bo tai?" 
Job37:18 Tos imuchi iite sengwetiet koboto inendet, Ne kim ko u kioit ne kigichoot si kitanyi?" 
Job37:19 Inetech kit ne kimwachini inendet; Amu magimuchi ketet ng’alekyok amu mesundeito. 
Job37:20 Tos kimwachin inendet kelenjin, amache ang’alal? Anan tos mach chito kelugui?" 
Job37:21 Mageerei anyun bik lapkeiyet ne iluu eng’ sengwetisiek: Ago siirtoi usonet, ak kotilil ichek." 
Job37:22 Bunu murot ne bo katam kakweng’et ne u tahabu: Tinyei Kamuktaindet etunatet ne kiywei. 
Job37:23 Magimuchi kegeer Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet; tinyei telunatet eng’ kamuktaet: Mainyalilisiei eng’ kiruoget ak eng’ imanda ne o. 
Job37:24 Iywei anyun bik inendet: Matiytii age tugul ne ng’om eng’ muguleldo. 
Job38:1 Kiwolji anyun Jehovah Job eng’ kipchurjuriet, kolenji," 
Job38:2 Ng’o nito indoi mesundeito kiruoget Eng’ ng’alek che matinyei naet? 
Job38:3 Kermenge anyun nguno ko u muren; Amu amagenen ng’olyot, ak imwawa." 
Job38:4 Kiimi ano ye kiandoi lumeiywekab ng’ony? Mwau anyun, ngot itinye naet." 
Job38:5 Ng’o ne king’atei kakwautikyik, ngot ingen? Anan ng’o ne kiito borowet eng’ baragunnyi?" 
Job38:6 Kigiratyi ano lumeiywekyik? Anan ng’o ne kiinde koitanyi ne bo luita; 
Job38:7 Ye kitienso kecheikab karon kibagenge, Ak kowaach werik tugul che bo Kamuktaindet eng’ boiboiyet?" 
Job38:8 Anan ng’o ne kigere nyanjet kurgotik, Ye kimaran, ko u che bunu moet;" 
Job38:9 Ye kiayai boldet koek ngoriennyi, Ak ayachi mesundeito ne nyigis koek ngorietab lakwandit," 
Job38:10 Ak ang’atyi ng’atutiennyu, Ak ande temeleiywek ak kurgotik," 
Job38:11 Ak ale, Ibochitu yu, mesiire; Ak kirang’e yu beeguk chemildogei eng’ menotet?" 
Job38:12 Kiing’at karonet koboch ngo biit betusieguk, Ak igochi egonet konai komostanyi;" 
Job38:13 Si kobiit konam tabanwekab ng’ony, Ak kitumdum che yaachen komong’ eng’ yoto?" 
Job38:14 Kiwalei ko u menet ye king’ochi; Ak kotononso tuguk tugul ko u ngoriet: 
Job38:15 Ak kiete bik che yaachen lapkeiyenywa, Ak keiri eut ne itororegei." 
Job38:16 Tos kiichut kondemetusiekab nyanjet? Anan kiiwendote komoswek che ung’otin che bo riret? 
Job38:17 Tos kiging’ang’un ormarichokab meet? Anan kiigeer kurgotikab uruetab meet? 
Job38:18 Tos kiinai tebeesindab ng’ony? Mwau, ngot ingen tugul." 
Job38:19 Mi ano oret ne wendi ole menyei lapkeiyet, Ak mi ano komostab mesundeito;" 
Job38:20 Si kobiit iib kot koit kiwotennyi, Ak iguiye ortinwek che bendi gonnyi?" 
Job38:21 Ingen iman, amu kiga kesichin, Ak ko chang’ koitetab betusieguk!" 
Job38:22 Tos kiichut ole kigonore teluchi, Anan kiigeer ole kigonore koikab ropta," 
Job38:23 Che kiagonorji betutab nyalilda, Che kiagonorji betutab boriet ak luget?" 
Job38:24 Kipcheune ano lapkeiyet, Anan kiseerune ano usonetab kong’asis eng’ ng’ony?" 
Job38:25 Ng’o ne kibet oretab maranet, Anan oret ne bunei kalyeletab tulet;" 
Job38:26 Si kogochi korobonji emet ole mami chi; Korobonji ong’atet ole mami chi; 
Job38:27 Si kobiyo emet ne karatia ne kigoguber; Ak kogochi suswek che ng’orng’or kobityo? 
Job38:28 Tos tinyei ropta kwanda? Anan ng’o ne kisich rewot ne sau? 
Job38:29 Kibunu moetab ng’o beek che kigogau? Ak ng’o ne kisich chepkoset ne bunu kipsengwet? 
Job38:30 Ung’otin beek ko u koita, Ak kigonamogis baragutab riret." 
Job38:31 Tos imuchi irat karurugutikab Koremerik, Anan itiach ratutikab Kapsomoguk?" 
Job38:32 Tos imuchi indochi Masarot eng’ betusiekwak? Anan imuchi indochi kecheik che u Tiondo ak lagokyik? 
Job38:33 Tos ingen ng’atutik che kiging’atyi kipsengwetisiek? Tos imuchi igimit bounatennyi eng’ ng’ony? 
Job38:34 Tos imuchi koit kuting’ung’ bolik, Si kotuchin beek che chang’?" 
Job38:35 Tos imuchi iyokte kalyelosiek si koba, Ak kolenjin, Kimi yu?" 
Job38:36 Ng’o ne kiinde ng’omnatet kebeberwek che bo orit? Anan ng’o ne kiigochi naet kundit? 
Job38:37 Ng’o ne imuchi koiit bolik eng’ ng’omnatet? Ng’o ne tumu chuboinikab kipsengwet," 
Job38:38 Ye kayumgei temburiek koek tulwo, Ak konamgei mogoronik kouuegitu?" 
Job38:39 Tos ilogotenjini ng’etuny ne kotoy? Anan ibai neranikab ng’etunyik kobiyong’so," 
Job38:40 Ye ribistos eng’ kebenonikwak, Ak kounygei eng’ ole ma toogu si kosapta?" 
Job38:41 Ng’o ne baei chepkugit, Ye rirjin lagokyik Kamuktaindet, Ak koombenot amu matinyei che amei?" 
Job39:1 Ingen betusiek ye itos sitok? Anan igeere ye ristos kenyelok? 
Job39:2 Imuchi iit arawek che tarei? Anan ingen betusiek ye itos? 
Job39:3 Ing’uruktos, si koiyo arekwak, Igesu arogenosiekwak." 
Job39:4 Tebe chametab ge arekwak, eegitu eng’ kewanin; Bendi, ama weeksei kogeny." 
Job39:5 Ng’o ne kiitiach sigiriet ne bo timin? Anan ng’o ne kiitiach ratutikab sigirietab timin? 
Job39:6 Che kiagochi komeny ong’atet, Ak koek ole menyei emetab munyuk." 
Job39:7 Sasei bolatetab nganaset, Ama kasei waagetab chito ne kweriei." 
Job39:8 Agetye barautietab tulonok, Ak kocheng’oti kiy age tugul ne tuon," 
Job39:9 Tos cham soet koboisieun? Anan tos tebe ole negite biung’ung’? 
Job39:10 Tos imuchi iratyi soet mogombet? Anan tos murmurun mbaret ne kaibat? 
Job39:11 Tos imang’u inendet, amu o kimnatennyi? Anan tos ibagakyi boisieng’ung’?"
