Job39:12 Tos imang’u inendet, ile koibun kesweguk kobwa ga, Ak koyumji bek ole kiborse?" 
Job39:13 Baibai kebepchetab tiondab songolik; Ago tos tinyei rirenet kebebaikyik ak kororikyik? 
Job39:14 Amu bagakyin koikyik ng’ung’unyek, Si kolalang’e temburiek," 
Job39:15 Ak koutie kole tuei keldo, Anan kotiech tiondab timin." 
Job39:16 Koromjin lagokyik ko u che ma chechik: Agot ngo buch boisiennyi, ko maarogeni;" 
Job39:17 Amu kiete Kamuktaindet ng’omnatet, Ama igochi naet." 
Job39:18 Ago ye yot met komwei, Kosas anyun mbartanyit ak chito ne lanyei." 
Job39:19 Kiigochini mbartanyit kimnatet? Kiilaakyini kaatinnyi masek che usausi? 
Job39:20 Kiigochini inendet kotoromben ko u chereng’endet? Imui bich torornatetab waagatab serunekyik. 
Job39:21 Kutei atebwet, ak kobaibait eng’ kimnatennyi: Toroktoi bik che ilaachi karik." 
Job39:22 Chotei kaiyweisiet, ama arogeni; Ama mwee rotwetab chok." 
Job39:23 Boljin inendet motietab kipchabonik, Koboto ng’otit ne ilyeli ak ndirit." 
Job39:24 Lugui emet eng’ koromnatet ak neregek; Ama iyani kole noto ko cheetab iriaget. 
Job39:25 Sait age tugul ye cheei iriaget, komwa kole, Haa! Kasei siptab luget kota komi ole loo, Bolatetab kiptainik, ak waagat." 
Job39:26 Tos tirirene keeret ng’omnateng’ung’, Ak kotokyigei kebebaikyik murot ne bo tai?" 
Job39:27 Tos tirirene kipsichit ng’atutieng’ung’, Ak koteech keswennyi eng’ barak?" 
Job39:28 Menyei ruandet, ak tinyei ole rue eng’ oloto, Tebe serutab koita, ak irimet." 
Job39:29 Segei eng’ yoto tiondanyi; Tobeni konyekyik ole loo. 
Job39:30 Chuchuni lagokyik agichek korotik: Ak ole mi muswek, komi yoto agine." 
Job40:1 Kiwolji kogeny Jehovah Job kolenji," 
Job40:2 King’alaljin ne imesesi kobelegei ak Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet? Ingowol inendet ne tiitos ak Kamuktaindet. 
Job40:3 Kowolji anyun Job Jehovah kolenji," 
Job40:4 Keero, ma a kiy; awolun nee? Kagonama kut." 
Job40:5 Kiamwa konyil agenge, ama awolu kogeny; Ee, kiamwa konyil aeng’, ago ma atese." 
Job40:6 Kowolji anyun Jehovah Job eng’ kipchurjuriet, kolenji," 
Job40:7 Kermenge ko u muren; Amagenen ng’olyo, ak imwawa." 
Job40:8 Tos iwale kiruogennyu koek buch? Tos iruokwa, si kobiit kiityin imanda?" 
Job40:9 Anan itinye eut ne u ne bo Kamuktaindet? Ak imuchi itul eng’ tuget ko u inendet? 
Job40:10 Ilaakyige anyun telunatet ak etunatet; Ilaakyige teegisto ak kororonindo. 
Job40:11 Rong’u neregeguk che ing’irtogei: Ak igeer age tugul ne menei, ak inyerat." 
Job40:12 Keer age tugul ne menei, ak iming’in; Ak itiekyi ng’ony kiptengeginik eng’ ole tonone." 
Job40:13 Ung’e temburiek kibagenge; Tuch togochikwak eng’ ole ung’at. 
Job40:14 Si abarten ale Kaga imuchi eung’ung’ ne bo tai kosorun. 
Job40:15 Keer anyun-o magaut ne kiayai koboten; Ageti ko u teta. 
Job40:16 Keer anyun-o, mi kimnatennyi suennyi, Mi kamugennyi inoikab moennyi." 
Job40:17 Birabirtoi saruriennyi ko u tarakwet: King’walgei tigitikab chotikyik. 
Job40:18 U kowekyik karik che kimen che bo sugunwet; U karaswekyik temeleiywekab karik. 
Job40:19 O inendet, ne bo ortinwekab Kamuktaindet: Inendet ne kiyai tionyoto, ko ne imuchi kobar eng’ rotwetab chok." 
Job40:20 Iman baei inendet tulonok; Ole urerense tiong’ik tugul che bo kewanin. 
Job40:21 Rue ketit kel ye mi uruet, Eng’ saoset orit, ak nyanyawet." 
Job40:22 Iuuri inendet ketik; Yiemei inendet ketikab kererusiek. 
Job40:23 Keero, ngonyi beek ainet kot kong’irtagei, ko mabotani: Menegei, agot ngo itu beekab Jordan kutinnyi." 
Job40:24 Tos imuchi chi konam tionyoto ye ripsei, Anan kotoore serunnyi katet?" 
Job41:1 Tos imuchi ing’usune tiondo ne u tiong’ong’et kombetab njirenik? Anan irate ng’elyeptanyi borowet? 
Job41:2 Imuchi inde rogoet serunnyi? Anan itoore tagilgiliennyi kombet? 
Job41:3 Tos saisain konyil che chang’? Anan tos ng’alalun ng’alek che tangus? 
Job41:4 Tos oyomisge ak inendet, Si kobiit inam kootin agoi?" 
Job41:5 Tos iurerenji ko u taritiet? Anan tos irat kobunji tibiguk? 
Job41:6 Tos aldaat che namei njirenik? Tos pchechi inendet chemung’arainik? 
Job41:7 Tos imuchi inyiit iririondennyi kibitinosiek, Anan inyiit metinnyi ng’otwek che kitoore njirenik?" 
Job41:8 Nam inendet; Ibwat luget, amata iyai kogeny." 
Job41:9 Keero, buch kamang’unet ne kimang’u inendet: Tos maibutyin ng’ony chito ne kageer inendet?" 
Job41:10 Mami ne korom ne kanyei kong’eet: Ng’o anyun inendet ne imuchi kotonone tainnyu? 
Job41:11 Ng’o ne kisib kogona, si aweekyi? Chechuk tuguk tugul che mi kereretab kipsengwet." 
Job41:12 Masise agobo kebeberwekyik, Anan agobo kimnatennyi ne o, anan kororonindanyi." 
Job41:13 Ng’o ne imuchi koreegune ngoriennyi ne bo barak? Ng’o ne rikyin kotinyei karnet ne ki soniot aeng’ ne kiratyin kutit? 
Job41:14 Ng’o ne imuchi koyat kurgotikab togennyi? Kiyiem kamuiset kelekyik. 
Job41:15 Berikyik che kimen ko menotennyi. Kinamgei ko u ng’okset. 
Job41:16 Rikyindos kot, Kot ko machutei usonet." 
Job41:17 Kinamgei; Kitiinygei, kot ko magimuchi kibesio." 
Job41:18 Ilyeli karionennyi, Ak u konyekyik chorunetab asista." 
Job41:19 Mong’une kutinnyi kegenganikab mastinwek, Ak iteri mat." 
Job41:20 Mong’une iyeto serunekyik, Ko u teret ne kutu ak mutwek che laldos." 
Job41:21 Inaami kabusennyi nesek, Mong’une kutinnyi liblibenetab mat." 
Job41:22 Mi kimnatet kaatinnyi, Ak urereni kamuiset eng’ tainnyi." 
Job41:23 Kinamgei tagalosiekyik tugul: Kiigiigei; magimuchi keisto. 
Job41:24 Uui muguleldanyi ko u koita; Ee, u koitab bai ne tabanu ng’ony." 
Job41:25 Ye kang’eet, koiyweis che kimen: Begu mugulel amu kaiyweisiet." 
Job41:26 Ngo len chi koeb, ko matilei kiy; Anan ng’otit, anan kipchabet, anan ng’otit ne ng’atib." 
Job41:27 Iiti karnet ko u suswek, Ak sugunonik ko u ketik che kigonunio." 
Job41:28 Mamwee kipchabet; Walaksei koik che kewirtoe borowet, koek mobek." 
Job41:29 U rungusiek mobek eng’ inendet: Rorechin ndirit ne kitoore. 
Job41:30 U moennyi rokyonik che ng’atiben: Iitoi eng’ ng’atatek tuguk che kiborse. 
Job41:31 Igochin riret kowasgei ko u teret ne mi ma: Yaei nyanjet koigei mwaita. 
Job41:32 Leelitu ole kabunei: Len chito kaek riret kalwalek. 
Job41:33 Mami ne kergei ak inendet eng’ ng’ony, Ne kigiyai, ne maiyweisiei." 
Job41:34 Keerei kit age tugul ne toror: Laitoriat inendet ne bou werik tugul che bo menotik. 
Job42:1 Kowolji anyun Job Jehovah, kolenji," 
Job42:2 Angen ale imuchi iyai tuguk tugul. Ama kimuchi kegirinda mageng’ung’. 
Job42:3 Ng’o ni unyei kiruoget ama tinyei naet? Noto anyun kiamwa che kima aguiye, Tuguk che bo kwong’ut eng’ ane, che kima angen." 
Job42:4 Asain ale kaswa, si ang’alal; Amagenen ng’olyot, ak imwawa." 
Job42:5 Kiagasin kityo kibit; Ago ageerin nguno," 
Job42:6 Kaasasge anyun amu noto, kasigu Eng’ temburiek ak orek." 
Job42:7 Ak kingo kagomwachi Jehovah Job ng’alechuto, kolenji Jehovah Elipas Temanindet, Kalalyo neregekyuk agobo inye, ak choronoguk tuwai: amu ma omwa kit ne bo iman agobo ane, ko u ye kamwa otwogindennyu Job." 
Job42:8 Onam anyun kirugik tisab, ak mengichik tisab, ak okweri koba oldab Job otwogindennyu, ak ogoitochige koek kagochinet ne kibeelei; si kosaiywok Job otwogindennyu; amu kachamji, si mayaiywok ko u abusnateng’wong’; amu tom omwa kit ne bo iman agobo ane, ko u ye komwa otwogindennyu Job." 
Job42:9 Koba anyun Elipas Temanindet ak Bildad Suindet ak Sopa Naamatindet, koba koyai ko u ye king’at Jehovah: ak kitaach Jehovah Job." 
Job42:10 Kowal anyun Jehovah ratetab Job, ye kingosa agobo choronokyik: ak kiigochi Jehovah Job konyil aeng’ kosiir che kitinyei eng’ tai." 
Job42:11 Kobwa werik tugul che tupcho, ak chepkametisiek tugul, ak bik tugul che kiingen ge, ak koamisie gonnyi koboto inendet: ak korirji inendet, ak kogaigai inendet agobo yaitiet tugul ne kiipchi Jehovah inendet: kiigochi chi age tugul fedaiyat, ak kogochi chi age tugul peteitab tahabu." 
Job42:12 Kiiberur anyun Jehovah betusiek che bo let che bo Job kosiir betusiekyik che bo tai: amu kitinyei kechirek elfusiek taman ak ang’wan, ak tambesik elfusiek lo, ak eik elfusiek aeng’ che bo chogit, ak iyuogik elfut che bo sigirok." 
Job42:13 Ak kitinyei kogeny werik tisab ak tibik somok. 
Job42:14 Ak kiguure kainetab ne bo tai, Jemima; ak koguure ne bo aeng’, Kesia; ak koguure ne bo somok, Keren-hapuk." 
Job42:15 Ak kima komitei emet tugul kwonyik che kororon kosiir tibikab Job: ak kiigochi kwandanywa ichek borotet koboto werik che tupcho. 
Job42:16 Ak kingobata nito kotar Job kenyisiek bogol agenge ak artam, kigeer werikyik, ak werikab werikyik, agoi ibinda ne bo ang’wan." 
Job42:17 Kolil anyun Job. 
Psalms1:1 Iberurot chi ne manamei ng’alekab bik che yaachen, Ama tonone oretab kiptengeginik, Ama tebe ng’echeretab sasik." 
Psalms1:2 Ago baibaitune ng’atutietab Jehovah; Ak kobwatoti ng’atutiennyi bet ak kemoi. 
Psalms1:3 Ak kogergeit ak ketit ne kigiminji ole negite ainosiek, Ne yiei logoekyik eng’ betusiekyik, Ama restos sogekyik; ak koberurok kiy age tugul ne yaei." 
Psalms1:4 Ma u noto che yaachen; Ago kergei ichek ak metetek che ibei usonet. 
Psalms1:5 Eng’ noto anyun matonondos che yaachen eng’ kiruoget, Ama tonondos kiptengeginik eng’ tuiyetab che bo imanda." 
Psalms1:6 Amu ingen Jehovah oretab che bo imanda: Ago betei oretab kiptengeginik. 
Psalms2:1 Amu nee si koyumgei bororiosiek ak koboldos, Ak kobwatoti bik tuguk che manamegei ak kiy?" 
Psalms2:2 Tetegei laitorinikab ng’ony, Ak iruochi bounik che kagotuiyo, Agobo Jehovah ak nenyi, ne iilat, kole," 
Psalms2:3 Ongeng’eti tugukwak che ratisie, Ak kewirte boroonikwak eng’ oldanyo." 
Psalms2:4 Tun roriei inendet ne tebyei eng’ kipsengwetisiek: Ak kochot Kiptaiyat ichek. 
Psalms2:5 Ak kong’alalji anyun eng’ neregekyik, Ak konyalil ichek eng’ neregekyik che ng’wonen:" 
Psalms2:6 Ago kande laitoriandennyu Tulwennyu ne tilil ne bo Sion. 
Psalms2:7 Abartoi ng’atutiet: Kilenja Jehovah, I werinnyu; Kaasichin rani." 
Psalms2:8 Soma, si agonin bororiosiek koek boroteng’ung’, Ak agonin tabanwekab ng’ony kobunjin." 
Psalms2:9 Itue ichek siaritab karnet; Ak ituatui ichek ko u rokyetab cheptereniot. 
Psalms2:10 Noto anyun ong’omegitu, laitorinichu: Onetge, okwek kiruogikab ng’ony." 
Psalms2:11 Oboisiechi Jehovah eng’ kaiyweisiet, Ak oboiboitu eng’ botanet." 
Psalms2:12 Oming’inityige werit si manerech, ak olusye eng’ oret, Amu negit kolalyo neregekyik. Iberurotin ichek tugul che imang’u inendet." 
Psalms3:1 Ee Jehovah, kagotesak bunikyuk ne tia! Chang’ che ng’eetyina." 
Psalms3:2 Mitei che chang’ che mwaei agobo sobondanyu, kole, Matinyei chichi yetunet eng’ Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms3:3 Ago inye, Jehovah, ko i long’et ne mi komoswek tugul eng’ ane; I teegistanyu, ak i tiindetab metinnyu." 
Psalms3:4 Arirjini Jehovah eng’ kutinnyu, Ak wolwa eng’ tulwennyi ne tilil." 
Psalms3:5 Kialyelde ak anuuch; Kiagosu; amu kiigimita Jehovah. 
Psalms3:6 Maiywei bik tamanusiekab elfusiek, Che kayiema kotokyagei eng’ komoswek tugul." 
Psalms3:7 Ng’eet, ee Jehovah; sorua, ee Kamuktaindennyu: Amu kiirabach matang’wekab bunikyuk tugul; Kiiri kelekab kiptengeginik." 
Psalms3:8 Bo Jehovah yetunet: Ingotebe berurtang’ung’ biguk. 
Psalms4:1 Wolwa ye aguursei, ee Kamuktaindet ne bo imandanyu; Kiindea barautiet ye kiatinye nyalilda; Rirena, ak igaswa saennyu." 
Psalms4:2 Ee okwek, werikab bik, owale teegistanyu koek tewernatet kot kotianit? Ochame che manamegei ak kiy, ak ocheng’e lembechek?" 
Psalms4:3 Ago onai ni ole kigotabanjigei Jehovah chito ne bo iman: Kasei Jehovah ye aguure inendet. 
Psalms4:4 Obotanse, amoyai tengek: Ong’alaljigei eng’ mugulelwekwok eng’ itok, ak osisye." 
Psalms4:5 Ogoite tiseiywek che bo imanda, Ak omang’u Jehovah." 
Psalms4:6 Mwaei che chang’ kole, Ng’o ne iboruech kiy ne mie? Ee Jehovah, tokyech lapkeiyetab togeng’ung’." 
Psalms4:7 Kiinde muguleldanyu kagasetab ge, Kosiir ne kitinyei ichek ye kingotesak bekwak ak divaikwak." 
Psalms4:8 Alyeldoi eng’ kalyet, ak kanuuchi: Amu inye Jehovah, inyege ne igona ameng’is eng’ kalyet." 
Psalms5:1 Epchi it ng’alekyuk, ee Jehovah, Ruchi kabwatutikyuk." 
Psalms5:2 Kas ye atwegu arire, Laitoriandennyu ak ko Kamuktaindennyu: Amu inye ne asae." 
Psalms5:3 Ee Jehovah, igase kutinnyu karon; Ak atetun saennyu karon, ak ageni." 
Psalms5:4 Amu ma i Kamuktaindet ne ibaibaitune yaitio: Ama tebe oldang’ung’ yaitio. 
Psalms5:5 Matonondos eng’ taing’ung’ menotik: Iweche tugul che yaei tengekto. 
Psalms5:6 Ing’eme che mwaei lembechek: Wechei Jehovah chitab korotik ak ng’alindet. 
Psalms5:7 Ago ane, anyone gong’ung’ eng’ chang’indab rireng’ung’ bo ge: Eng’ kaiyweisieng’ung’ agutunyi atokyinige hekalung’ung’ ne tilil." 
Psalms5:8 Ee Jehovah, indoiywa eng’ imandang’ung’ amu che sapchina; Ilitit oreng’ung’ eng’ tainnyu." 
Psalms5:9 Amu mami lititindo eng’ kutuswekwak; Tengek kityo mugulelwekwak: Kererit ne yatat mokwekwak; Lasei bich eng’ ng’elyebwekwak. 
Psalms5:10 Iityi ichek tengekto, ee Kamuktaindet; Ingobutyo eng’ kiruogutikwak: On ichek eng’ chang’indab bistoenywa; Amu kiingeleljin." 
Psalms5:11 Ago ingoboiboitu ichek tugul che imang’un, Ingotienso eng’ boiboindo ichek agoi, amu iribe ichek: Ingoboiboitu agichek eng’ inye che chamei kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms5:12 Amu iberuri inye chitab imanda; Ee Jehovah, iyieme inendet chamnyeng’ung’ ko u eng’ torgochet." 
Psalms6:1 Ee Jehovah, megera kong’ eng’ neregeguk, Anan itigona eng’ nyitateng’ung’ ne ng’wan." 
Psalms6:2 Rirena, ee Jehovah; amu a nyalulat: Ee Jehovah, isooba; amu nyalildos kowekyuk." 
Psalms6:3 Nyalili agine sobondanyu mising’: Ee inye Jehovah, tianitu?" 
Psalms6:4 Iweege, ee Jehovah, soru sobondanyu: Sorua amu chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala." 
Psalms6:5 Amu mami chi ne ibwati eng’ oldab meet: Mwaun ng’o kongoi eng’ oldab che kigobek? 
Psalms6:6 Kaang’et eng’ tigenoikyuk; Marane beekab kong’ itogunnyu kemout age tugul; Sachin beekyuk bo kong’ ole arue. 
Psalms6:7 Machei kong’emogis konyekyuk amu arogenet; Kaosegitu amu bunikyuk tugul. 
Psalms6:8 Oistoenage, okwek tugul yaikab tengekto; Amu kagogas Jehovah tugetab rirekyuk." 
Psalms6:9 Kagogas Jehovah somsennyu: Taachei Jehovah saennyu. 
Psalms6:10 Ililandos bunikyuk tugul ak konyalildos mising’: Weechegei let ak kolilanso eng’ yoto. 
Psalms7:1 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, inye ne amang’un: Sorua eng’ ichek tugul che onwa, ak ieta;" 
Psalms7:2 Si magerer sobondanyu ko u ng’etundo, Si matonaton, ama mi chi ne sorua." 
Psalms7:3 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, ngo kiayai ni; Ngo mi tengek eunekyuk;" 
Psalms7:4 Ngo kiayaakyi yaitio ne kigimi tuwai eng’ kalyet; (Ee, kiasoru inendet ne ki bunyondennyu ne kima awekyi kiy:)" 
Psalms7:5 Ingoon bunyot sobondanyu, kot konam; Ee, ingotiekyi ng’ony sobondanyu, Ak konde temburiek teegistanyu." 
Psalms7:6 Ng’eet, ee Jehovah, eng’ neregeguk, Tonon kirinde koromnatetab neregekab bunikyuk: Ng’eet amu ane; kiing’at kiruoget." 
Psalms7:7 Ak ingoyiemin tuiyetab bororiosiek: Ak iweege barak ibou ichek. 
Psalms7:8 Ibesiechin Jehovah bororiosiek: Iruokseiywa, ee Jehovah ko u imandanyu, ak ko u kagesunatennyu bo ge ne mita." 
Psalms7:9 Ingowong’gei tengektab kiptengeginik, ago igimit ne bo imanda: Amu tiemei Kamuktaindet ne bo imanda mugulelwek ak soromok." 
Psalms7:10 Mi long’ennyu eng’ Kamuktaindet, Ne soru che bo iman eng’ mugulelwek." 
Psalms7:11 Kamuktaindet ko kiruogindet ne bo imanda, Ee Kamuktaindet ne nerekyin kiptengeginik kotugul." 
Psalms7:12 Ngo masik chi, kolit rotwennyi bo chok; Kagoriich kwangennyi, ak kachob." 
Psalms7:13 Kigochopchi karik che kibare; Yaei kipchabonikyik che bo mat. 
Psalms7:14 Ogeero, kasei ng’wanindab tengekto ne machei kosich; Ee, kogomanach yaitiet, ak kosich lembeita." 
Psalms7:15 Kogochob keringet, kot kobal, Ak kogobutyi keringonoto kobalei." 
Psalms7:16 Weekyingei metinnyi yaitiennyi, Ak kobutyi baragutab metinnyi koromnatennyi." 
Psalms7:17 Aweekyini Jehovah kongoi ko u imandanyi: Ak atienjini kalosunet kainetab Jehovah ne Toror Mising’. 
Psalms8:1 Ee Jehovah, Kiptaiyandennyo, Konyitot ne tia kaineng’ung’ eng’ ng’ony komugul! Inye ne kiinde telunateng’ung’ kipsengwetisiek." 
Psalms8:2 Kiing’at kimnatet kobun kutuswekab lagok ak che reritos, Amu buniguk, Si iger kong’ bunyot kosis ak ne yaaktoi mugetut." 
Psalms8:3 Ye ageere kipsengwetisieguk, boisionikab euneguk, Arawet ak kecheik che kiichob;" 
Psalms8:4 Ale, Nee chi anyun, ne tos ibwat? Anan weritab chi, ne tos irutochi?" 
Psalms8:5 Amu kiiyai inendet koming’init kitigin eng’ Kamuktaindet, Ilaakyini inendet kutwet ne bo torornatet ak teegisto." 
Psalms8:6 Kiigochi inendet koboi boisionikab euneguk; Kiinde tuguk tugul keldebesaikab kelyekyik kogas it; 
Psalms8:7 Kechirek tugul ak eik tugul, Ee, agot tiong’ik che bo timin;" 
Psalms8:8 Taritik che mi barak, ak njirenik che bo nyanjet, Ak alak tugul che bunoti ortinwekab nyanjosiek," 
Psalms8:9 Ee Jehovah, Kiptaiyandennyo, Konyitot ne tia kaineng’ung’ eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Psalms9:1 Aweekyini Jehovah kongoi eng’ muguleldanyu tugul; Abartoi kwong’utiguk tugul. 
Psalms9:2 Abaibaitu ak agasige eng’ inye: Atienjini kalosunet kaineng’ung’, ee, inye Ne Toror Mising’." 
Psalms9:3 Ye kaweek let bunikyuk, Ibutos ak kolusyo eng’ taing’ung’." 
Psalms9:4 Amu kiiyai kiruogennyu ak ng’alekyuk; Kiitebe ng’echeretab laitornatet iruoch eng’ iman. 
Psalms9:5 Kiiger kong’ bororiosiek, ak kiing’em sogoranet, Kiibukte kainenywa koigeny agoi koigeny." 
Psalms9:6 Kigogesgei bunik, kigoek surkwen agoi koigeny; Ak nganasok che kiing’em; Kigogesgei kabwatet ne kibwate icheget." 
Psalms9:7 Ago tebyei Jehovah koigeny: Kigochopchi ng’echerennyi bo laitornatet kiruoget. 
Psalms9:8 Ak iruokyin inendet ng’ony eng’ imanda, Ibesiechin bik kiruoget eng’ imanda." 
Psalms9:9 Egu Jehovah irimetab ne kiusei, Irimet eng’ betusiekab nyalilda;" 
Psalms9:10 Ak imang’un che ingen kaineng’ung’; Amu ma imete inye, Jehovah che cheng’in." 
Psalms9:11 Otienji kalosunet Jehovah ne menyei Sion: Omwaite boisionikyik eng’ kwenutab bik. 
Psalms9:12 Amu ibwati ichek ne yaaktoi mugetut agobo korotik: Mautie rirekab kibananok. 
Psalms9:13 Rirena, ee Jehovah; Keer nyalildanyu agobo ichek che wecha, Inye ne itogosunena eng’ kurgotikab meet;" 
Psalms9:14 Si kobiit abarta kalosuneng’ung’ tugul: Eng’ kurgotikab cheptab Sion, Agasege yetuneng’ung’." 
Psalms9:15 Kagororokyi bororiosiek keringet ne kibalei: Kagonam kelyekwak mestet ne kiga uny. 
Psalms9:16 Kigoborgei Jehovah, kigoruoch: Kigonam kiptengekyot boisietab eunekyik. Higaion." 
Psalms9:17 Weechegei kiptengeginik kobendi oldab meet, Agot bororiosiek tugul che utie Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms9:18 Amu magiutie kotugul kibananok, Ama betei koigeny kamang’unetab che nyalildos." 
Psalms9:19 Ng’eet, ee Jehovah; amat ichamji bik koterteris: Ingiruoksechi bororiosiek eng’ taing’ung’." 
Psalms9:20 Ee Jehovah, imu ichek: Ingonai bororiosiek kole ichek ko bik kityo." 
Psalms10:1 Ee Jehovah, amu nee si itonone ole loo? Kalya si iung’ge eng’ betusiekab nyalilda?" 
Psalms10:2 Isubi kiptengeginik che menot kibananok eng’ koromnatet; Ingonam ichek mestonok che kigobwat. 
Psalms10:3 Amu ilosunegei kiptengekyot magetab muguleldanyi, Ak koberuri ne koi kong’, ak kosas Jehovah:" 
Psalms10:4 Len kiptengekyot eng’ menotennyi, Mamage kiy: Len eng’ kabwatutikyik tugul, Mami Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms10:5 Mi nyalilda ortinwekyik kotugul; Mi barak kiruogutiguk, maityin kogeer: Ak sasei inendet bunikyik tugul." 
Psalms10:6 Len eng’ muguleldanyi, Maistaa chi: Manyoru ane yaitiet eng’ ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms10:7 Nyiitat kutinnyi chubisiet ak ng’alset ak sastaet: Mitei ng’elyeptanyi mastaet ak yaitiet. 
Psalms10:8 Tebe ole ung’egei eng’ nganasok: Barei che matinyei ng’ogi eng’ komoswek che ung’otin: Sapchin konyekyik inendet ne nyerat. 
Psalms10:9 Saptoi eng’ ole ung’at ko u ng’etundo eng’ kebenennyi: Sapchin kibananok: Namei kibananiat, ye ichuuti eng’ mestennyi." 
Psalms10:10 Ribisi, ing’uruksei, Ak kobutyo che nyalildos amu chechik che kimen." 
Psalms10:11 Len eng’ muguleldanyi, Kogoutie Kamuktaindet: Unyei togennyi; mageerei agoi." 
Psalms10:12 Ng’eet, ee Jehovah; ee Kamuktaindet, namji barak eung’ung’: Ameutie kibananok." 
Psalms10:13 Amu nee si kosas kiptengekyot Kamuktaindet, Ak kolen eng’ muguleldanyi, Memage kiy?" 
Psalms10:14 Koigeer inye; amu igeere mastaet ak tagisiet, si ibou eng’ eung’ung’: Tiienengei ne nyerat; Kiiegu toretindetab ne matinyei kwanda." 
Psalms10:15 Iri eutab kiptengekyot; Ak icheng’ tengektab ne ya, kot koma komi." 
Psalms10:16 Laitoriat Jehovah ne bo koigeny ak koigeny: Kigobetyo bororiosiek eng’ emennyi. 
Psalms10:17 Kiigas inye, Jehovah, magetab che taloen: Ichobe mugulelwekwak, igochini itiguk kogas;" 
Psalms10:18 Si ibesiechi ne matinyei kwanda ak ne kisastae, Si mata komuiso kogeny chi ne bo ng’ony." 
Psalms11:1 Amang’u Jehovah: Teptoi ano si olenji sobondanyu, Mwechi tulweng’ung’ ko u taritiet?" 
Psalms11:2 Ogeero, kariich kwanget kiptengeginik, Kagersach kipchabonikwak, Si kobiit komwok ne bo iman eng’ ole imen." 
Psalms11:3 Ngot keng’em lumeiywek, Komuchi koyai nee ne bo imanda?" 
Psalms11:4 Mitei Jehovah hekalunnyi ne tilil, Mitei kipsengwet ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Jehovah; Keerei konyekyik, tiemei iririotab konyekyik werikab bik." 
Psalms11:5 Tiemei Jehovah chitab imanda: Ago wechei sobondanyi kiptengekyot ak inendet ne chamei koromnatet. 
Psalms11:6 Rong’jin kiptengeginik mestonok; Egu mat ak tuguk che laldos che u munyeik ak usonet ne beelsei, kebebertab kikombenywa." 
Psalms11:7 Amu bo imanda Jehovah; chamei imanda: Keerei che bo iman togennyi. 
Psalms12:1 Soru, ee Jehovah; amu ma komi chitab iman; Amu kagobetyo kayanik eng’ kwenutab werikab bik." 
Psalms12:2 Ng’alaljingei tangoita, chi tugul ak chitab kokwennyi: Ng’alali chemwaikutnatet ak eng’ muguleldo ne besiot aeng’." 
Psalms12:3 Ibeeti Jehovah kutuswek tugul che ng’alali chemwaikutnatet, Ng’elyepta ne mwaei tuguk che eechen:" 
Psalms12:4 Che kile, Kiterteri eng’ ng’elyebwekyok; Chechok kutuswek; ng’o ne boiywech?" 
Psalms12:5 Amu sastaetab kibananok, amu tigenetab che banandos, Ang’eete nguno, mwaei Jehovah; Agochini kotebi ribetab ge, noto ne machei mising’." 
Psalms12:6 Tililen ng’alekab Jehovah; Ko u feda ne kitiemei eng’ mat ne o eng’ ng’ony, Ne kitilili konyil tisap." 
Psalms12:7 Ee Jehovah, iribe ichek, Iribe ichek koboch ibini agoi koigeny." 
Psalms12:8 Bendi kiptengeginik komoswek tugul, Ye eetu yaitiet eng’ kwenutab bik." 
Psalms13:1 Ee Jehovah, iutiena agoi au? Agoi koigeny? Iung’ena togeng’ung’ kot kotianit?" 
Psalms13:2 Agereri met eng’ sobondanyu kot kotianit, Komi arogenet muguleldanyu betut komugul? Eetu bunyondennyu eng’ ane kot kotianit?" 
Psalms13:3 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, keer si iwolwa: Ikweny konyekyuk, si maru ruondab meet;" 
Psalms13:4 Si mamwa bunyondennyu, kole, Kaaterter inendet; Si maboiboitu bunikyuk ye kiistaa." 
Psalms13:5 Ago kiamang’u rireneng’ung’; Igasege muguleldanyu yetuneng’ung’. 
Psalms13:6 Atienjini Jehovah, Amu kiyaiywa eng’ aiyebindo." 
Psalms14:1 Kigomwa ne berber eng’ muguleldanyi, kole, Mami Kamuktaindet. Kigong’emogis, ak koyai yautik che kiwechei; Mami ne yaei ne mie." 
Psalms14:2 Keerei Jehovah eng’ kipsengwet werikab bik, Kole kogeer ngo mi ne ng’om, Ne cheng’ei Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms14:3 Kigomasta tugul; kigosamisitu tugul: Mami ne yaei ne mie agot agenge. 
Psalms14:4 Matinyei kaguiyet yaikab tengekto? Che amei bikyuk ko u ye amei amitwogik, Ama kuurei Jehovah." 
Psalms14:5 Kiiyweis mising’ eng’ oloto: Amu mi Kamuktaindet koboto ibindab che bo imanda. 
Psalms14:6 Ondoi tewernatet ng’alekab kibananiat, Amu Jehovah ole mwechin inendet." 
Psalms14:7 Kita mie nda kiga bun yetunetab Israel Sion! Ye tun iweechi Jehovah bikyik che kigiluul, Koboiboitu anyun Jakobo, ak kogasgei Israel." 
Psalms15:1 Ng’o ne nyoljin kotebe gong’ung’ Jehovah! Ng’o ne tos meny tulweng’ung’ ne tilil? 
Psalms15:2 Inendet ne wendoti eng’ lititindo, ak koyaei imanda, Ak komwaei imanit eng’ muguleldanyi." 
Psalms15:3 Ne mang’ochei eng’ ng’elyeptanyi, Ama yachin ne ya choruennyi, Ama mwaitoe ne ya chitab kokwennyi." 
Psalms15:4 Sasat eng’ tainnyi inendet ne esioot; Ago konyiti che iywei Jehovah. Ne mawalei kayosiennyi matiny kanyor nyalil; 
Psalms15:5 Mabesendoi fedaisiekyik si kosige che siirtoot, Ama taachei tugukab kagoigoisiet agobo ne matinyei tengek. Inendet ne yaei tuguchuto ko magiistoi koigeny." 
Psalms16:1 Riba, ee Kamuktaindet: amu amang’un." 
Psalms16:2 Kaalenji Jehovah, I Kiptaiyandennyu: Matinye miein age kobatenen inye." 
Psalms16:3 Ago eng’ che tililen che mi ng’ony, Choto ko che telutik, che mi boiboiyennyu tugul eng’ ichek." 
Psalms16:4 Tesoksei nyalilwogikab ichek che wale kit age Jehovah: Matumdoi ane kagochinoikwak che kieei che bo korotik, Amamwae kainaikwak eng’ kutinnyu." 
Psalms16:5 Jehovah ko kebebertab borotennyu ak ne bo kikombennyu: Iname barbariandennyu. 
Psalms16:6 Kagokwaiywa komoswek che miachen; Ee, atinye borotet ne mie." 
Psalms16:7 Alosu Jehovah ne kiing’omita: Ee, ineta muguleldanyu kemoi." 
Psalms16:8 Kande Jehovah tainnyu betusiek tugul: Amu mi inendet eunnyu ne bo tai, magiistaa." 
Psalms16:9 Baibai muguleldanyu amu noto, ak kogasegei sobondanyu: Ak kotebi bortanyu agine eng’ chametab ge." 
Psalms16:10 Amu memetoi sobondanyu eng’ oldab meet; Amechamjini kogeer neng’ung’ ne tilil nunet. 
Psalms16:11 Iborua oretab sobondo: Mi kagasetab ge taing’ung’ ne nyiitat; Mi eung’ung’ ne bo tai che kechamei agoi koigeny. 
Psalms17:1 Kas imanda, ee Jehovah, epchi it rirekyuk; Ingogas iting’ung’ saennyu, ne mamong’une kutitab ng’alset." 
Psalms17:2 Ingomong’ kiruogennyu eng’ ole imi; Ingogeer konyeguk tugul che nyolunotin. 
Psalms17:3 Kiitiem muguleldanyu; kiinyonja kemoi; Kiisiacha, ama inyorja kiy; Kiabekyi ale mamwaei kutinnyu bistoet." 
Psalms17:4 Ago eng’ boisionikab bik, ko kiaripge amu ng’olyot ne bunu kuting’ung’ Si masub ortinwekab rebik." 
Psalms17:5 Kigonamgei tiegutikyuk ak ortinweguk, Ama ichabaita kelyekyuk." 
Psalms17:6 Kaguurin, amu iwolwa, ee Kamuktaindet; Epcha it, kas ng’alalennyu." 
Psalms17:7 Iboru chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala ne kikwong’e, ee inye ne isoru ichek che imang’un Eng’ eung’ung’ ne bo tai, eng’ icheget che ng’eetyin." 
Psalms17:8 Riba ko u laptetab konda, Ung’ena uruetab kebebaiguk," 
Psalms17:9 Si matwaa kiptengeginik che usa, Bunikyuk che koromen che yiema." 
Psalms17:10 Kager icheget mwanikwak: Ng’alale menotet kutuswekwak. 
Psalms17:11 Kagoalachech komoswek tugul: Kagochiiljech kong’ si kowirjech ng’ony. 
Psalms17:12 Kergei inendet ak ng’etundo ne machei kochumji kit ne amei, Ak u neranetab ng’etundo ne ribisi eng’ komoswek che ung’otin." 
Psalms17:13 Ng’eet, ee Jehovah, torokte, wirji ng’ony: Soru sobondanyu eng’ kiptengekyot, eng’ rotweng’ung’ bo chok:" 
Psalms17:14 Eng’ bik, eng’ eung’ung’, ee Jehovah, Eng’ bik che bo ng’ony, che ting’e kebebertanywa soboni, Che inyiiti inye mootinwekwak konoraiguk: Tinyei ichek lagok che yamei, Ak bagakyin tugukwak manyurunikwak." 
Psalms17:15 Ago ageere ane togeng’ung’ eng’ imanda: Abiyonyi itondang’ung’ ye ang’eete. 
Psalms18:1 Achamin, ee Jehovah, kimnatennyu." 
Psalms18:2 Jehovah ruandennyu, ak irimennyu, ak sorunindennyu; Kamuktaindennyu, ruandennyu ne kim, amang’u inendet; Long’ennyu, ak kuinetab yetunennyu, teeksennyu ne koi." 
Psalms18:3 Aguure Jehovah, ne nyoljin kilos: Si kesorua eng’ bunikyuk." 
Psalms18:4 Kialacha boroonikab meet, Ak kiimua maranetab yaitiet." 
Psalms18:5 Kiyiema boroonikab oldab che kigobek: Kichea mestonokab meet. 
Psalms18:6 Kiaguur Jehovah eng’ bichiindanyu, Kiarirji Kamuktaindennyu: Kigas kutinnyu eng’ hekalunnyi, Ak kiit itikyik rirek che kiarirji." 
Psalms18:7 Kigirgiren ng’ony anyun, ak kibotan, Kitwagei lumeiywekab tulonok, Ak kotumdumgei, amu kinerech." 
Psalms18:8 Kitogostae iyeto serunekyik, Ak kibeelso mat ne kimong’une kutinnyi: Kilalyo nesek eng’ maata." 
Psalms18:9 Kiim kipsengwetisiek agichek, ak kochorgei inendet; Ak kimi mesundeito ne o kururetab kelyekyik." 
Psalms18:10 Ak kilany kerubindet, ak kotiriren: Ee, kitiriren anyun kochakta eng’ kebebaikab usonet." 
Psalms18:11 Kiyai mesundeito koek ole ung’egei, emainnyi ne mi komoswekyik tugul; Imenindab beek, bolik che tuuen che bo barak." 
Psalms18:12 Kibun bolikyik che tuuen kaluunet ne kimi tainnyi, Koikab ropta ak ng’etetiot." 
Psalms18:13 Kitul Jehovah eng’ kipsengwetisiek, Ak kitwek Inendet ne Toror Mising’; Koikab ropta ak ng’etetiot." 
Psalms18:14 Ak kiiyokto kipchabonikyik, ak koiyesta; Ee, kalyelosiek ng’isiat, ak konyalil." 
Psalms18:15 Kitook anyun kererusiekab beek, Ak king’ang’agis lumeiywekab ng’ony, Ye kiiger kong’ inye, ee Jehovah, Eng’ cheetab kabusetab seruneguk." 
Psalms18:16 Kiiyok eng’ barak, ak koganaba; Kiichuutwa among’ eng’ beek che chang’." 
Psalms18:17 Kisorua eng’ bunyondennyu ne kim, Ak eng’ icheget che kiwecha; amu ki kimen kosiira." 
Psalms18:18 Kichea eng’ betutab nyalildanyu: Ago kiek Jehovah ne atiiege. 
Psalms18:19 Kiimuta amanda awa ole baraa; Kisorua, amu kibaibait eng’ ane." 
Psalms18:20 Kigona Jehovah ko u imandanyu; Kigona ko u tililindab eunekyuk. 
Psalms18:21 Amu kiarib ortinwekab Jehovah, Ak ma abagakte Kamuktaindennyu eng’ or ne ya." 
Psalms18:22 Amu kimi tainnyu kiruogutikyik tugul, Ak kima aiste konetisiosiekyik." 
Psalms18:23 Kiagesunotge eng’ tainnyi, Ak kiaripge si manama tengekto." 
Psalms18:24 Kigona anyun Jehovah ko u imandanyu, Ko u tililindab eunekyuk eng’ tainnyi." 
Psalms18:25 Eng’ che tinyei rirenetab ge i bo rirenetab ge: Ak eng’ chito ne igesunotgei ibartoige ile igesunotge. 
Psalms18:26 Eng’ che tililen ibartoige ile i tilil, Ak eng’ che mastoi, obortosi." 
Psalms18:27 Amu isoru che nyerotin; Ago iming’ini che mendos. 
Psalms18:28 Amu inaami tainnyu: Ikweng’wa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu mesundeitanyu. 
Psalms18:29 Amu aiyestoi luget eng’ inye; Ak eng’ Kamuktaindennyu atorombeni asiire irimet. 
Psalms18:30 Igesunotgei oretab Kamuktaindet: Kigonaak ng’olyotab Jehovah; Inendet long’etab icheget tugul che imang’u. 
Psalms18:31 Amu tos ng’o Kamuktaindet, kobate Jehovah? Ak tos ng’o ruandet, kobate Kamuktaindennyo?" 
Psalms18:32 Inendet Kamuktaindet ne ratwa kimnatet, Ak koyaei orennyu koek ne igesunotgei." 
Psalms18:33 Yaei inendet kelyekyuk koigei che bo kenyelet ne kotoy: Nama atonon eng’ komoswekyuk che sutotin. 
Psalms18:34 Ineti eunekyuk koyai luget; Si kong’i eunekyuk kwanget ne bo sugunwet. 
Psalms18:35 Kiigona long’etab yetuneng’ung’ agine: Ak kigotiia eung’ung’ ne bo tai, Ak kigoeeta talasieng’ung’." 
Psalms18:36 Kiibaraiywa kakwautikyuk, Ama ichabaita kelyekyuk." 
Psalms18:37 Aone bunikyuk, agoi anam: Amaweechige agoi kowong’gei." 
Psalms18:38 Atue kot koma komuchi kong’eetyo: Ibutyin ichek kelyekyuk kel. 
Psalms18:39 Amu kiiratwa kimnatet ne bo luget: Kiiterterwa aboi che king’eetya. 
Psalms18:40 Kiiwelel bunikyuk kotuktocha batai, Si kobiit ang’eti ichek che wecha." 
Psalms18:41 Kiririo, ago kima biit ne kisor: Kirirji Jehovah, ago kima wolji." 
Psalms18:42 Kiatonaton eng’ noto komengegitu koigei temburiek che ibei usonet: Kiawaste ko u ng’atatek che mi ortinwek. 
Psalms18:43 Kiisorua eng’ boriosiekab bik; Kiigona aek metitab bororiosiek: Tun ota bik che tom anai. 
Psalms18:44 Ye kas agobo ane, eng’ yoto kogasa it: Ak tun kasa it toek eng’ ng’alset." 
Psalms18:45 Begunoti toek kowandogei, Ak komong’ eng’ ole ung’egei kobotandos." 
Psalms18:46 Sobei Jehovah; ak iberurot ruandennyu; Ingotororit Kamuktaindet ne bo yetunennyu: 
Psalms18:47 Kamuktaindet ne yaaktoiywa mugetut, Ak yaei bik kogasa it." 
Psalms18:48 Sorua inendet eng’ bunikyuk: Ee, itorora asiir ichek che ng’eetyina: Isorua eng’ chito ne korom." 
Psalms18:49 Aweegun kongoi anyun, ee Jehovah, eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek, Ak atienji kaineng’ung’ kalosunoik." 
Psalms18:50 Igochin laitoriandennyi sorunet ne o; Ak koborjin nenyi ne iilat chamnyennyi ne tala, Daudi ak iyotennyi agoi koigeny." 
Psalms19:1 Mwaitoi kipsengwetisiek lilindab Kamuktaindet; Ibartoi soet boisionikab eunekyik. 
Psalms19:2 Mwachin betut betut age ng’olyot, Ak kiborjin kemout kemout age naet." 
Psalms19:3 Mami ng’alalet anan ng’alek; Magigasei twegunenywa. 
Psalms19:4 Itei kutinywa ng’ony komugul, Ak itei ng’alekwak tabanwekab ng’ony. Kiinde emait eng’ choto agobo asista," 
Psalms19:5 Ko u sandet ne mong’une gonnyi, Ak kobaibai ko u chi ne kim ne labati eng’ kabeletab ge." 
Psalms19:6 Itei choruennyi tabandab kipsengwet, Ak itei yiemutiennyi tabanwekab kipsengwet: Ak mami kiy ne ung’egei mannyi." 
Psalms19:7 Igesunotgei ng’atutietab Jehovah, ak koweechi sobondo: Bo iman baornatetab Jehovah, ing’omiti ne berber." 
Psalms19:8 Lititen konetisiosiekab Jehovah, iboiboi muguleldo: Tilil ng’atutietab Jehovah, indoi lapkeiyet konyek." 
Psalms19:9 Tilil kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah, ak kotebyei koigeny: Bo iman kiruogutikab Jehovah, ak tinyei imanda tugul." 
Psalms19:10 Choto che kemachei kosiir tahabu, ee, kosiir tahabu che chang’ che tililen: Siirei anyinyindanyua kumiat ak masamek." 
Psalms19:11 Kogeny eng’ choto kitigoni otwogeng’ung’: Mitei melekto ne o ngerib choto. 
Psalms19:12 Ng’o ne imuchi koguiyo lelutikyik? Itilila eng’ tuguk che ung’otin. 
Psalms19:13 Ak iger otwogeng’ung’ si mayai tuguk che bo menotet: Amegochi koboiywa: si aek ne igesunotgei, Si atiagak eng’ bistoet ne o." 
Psalms19:14 Ingochamak ng’alekab kutinnyu eng’ taing’ung’ ak kabwatutikab muguleldanyu, Ee Jehovah, ruandennyu, ak ko katiagindennyu." 
Psalms20:1 Ingowolun Jehovah eng’ betutab nyalilda; Ingoeetin kainetab Kamuktaindetab Jakobo; 
Psalms20:2 Ingoyogun toretet eng’ hekalut, Ak kotiin kobunu Sion;" 
Psalms20:3 Ingobwat kagochinoiguk tugul. Ak ingocham tiseiyweguk che kibeelei; 
Psalms20:4 Ingogonin ko u ye machei muguleldang’ung’. Ak ingosuldaun ruchinaiguk tugul. 
Psalms20:5 Kigasegei achek yetuneng’ung’, Ak kinamjini barak songolikyok eng’ kainetab Kamuktaindennyo: Ingosuldaun Jehovah somutiguk tugul." 
Psalms20:6 Angen nguno ale soru Jehovah nenyi ne iilat; Ak woljin inendet eng’ kipsengwetisiekyik che tililen Eng’ kimnatetab yetunetab eunnyi ne bo tai. 
Psalms20:7 Imang’u alak karisiekab luget, ak alak mbartanyisiek: Ago kibwati achek kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms20:8 Kagong’urukso ak kobutyo: Ago achek ko kageng’eetye, ketononse." 
Psalms20:9 Ee Jehovah, soru laitoriat; Ak iwolwech ye kiguursei." 
Psalms21:1 Ee Jehovah, boiboitu laitoriat eng’ kimnateng’ung’; Ak koboiboitu ne tia eng’ yetuneng’ung’!" 
Psalms21:2 Kiigochi kit ne machei muguleldanyi, Ama iete kit ne kosom." 
Psalms21:3 Amu isib igochini kaberuroikab mieindo: Igerjine metit narietab tahabu ne kararan. 
Psalms21:4 Kisomin sobondo, ak kiigochi; Agot chang’indab betusiek che bendi agoi koigeny ak koigeny." 
Psalms21:5 O telunatennyi eng’ yetuneng’ung’: Ilaakyini teegisto ak etunatet. 
Psalms21:6 Amu iyae inendet koek berurto agoi koigeny: Igochini kogasgei eng’ boiboiyetab togeng’ung’. 
Psalms21:7 Amu imang’u laitoriat Jehovah, Ak magiistoi inendet amu chamnyet ne tala ne bo Inendet ne Toror Mising’." 
Psalms21:8 Nyoru eung’ung’ buniguk tugul; Nyoru eung’ung’ ne bo tai icheget che wechin. 
Psalms21:9 Iyae ichek kogergeit ak mat ne ng’eteteni eng’ betutab neregeguk. Lugui Jehovah ichek eng’ nyitatennyi, Ak kobeel mat koges." 
Psalms21:10 Tun ing’eme logoekwak iiste eng’ ng’ony, Koboto iyotenywa eng’ kwenutab werikab bik." 
Psalms21:11 Amu kichob ichek koyaun yaitio: Kiibwat koyai ne ya, ama imuch koyai." 
Psalms21:12 Amu iweechi ichek kotuktochin batai, Igeresach kipchaboniguk si itokyi ichek." 
Psalms21:13 Tororitu, ee Jehovah, eng’ kimnateng’ung’; Si ketien kilosu kimnateng’ung’." 
Psalms22:1 Kamuktaindennyu, Kamuktaindennyu, amu nee si ibagakta? Amu nee si ilooena, ametoreta, ak amu nee si ilooitune ng’alekab tigenennyu?" 
Psalms22:2 Ee Kamuktaindennyu, arire bet, amewolu; Ak eng’ kemoi, amasise." 
Psalms22:3 Ago i tilil, Ee, inye ne imenye kalosunoikab Israel." 
Psalms22:4 Kiimang’un kwanisiekyok: Kiimang’ ak kiisoru. 
Psalms22:5 Kirirjin ak kinyor sorunet: Kiimang’un ak kima ililanso. 
Psalms22:6 Ago ane ko a kutiet, ma a chi; Ane ne kirosyin eng’ bik, ak ne sasat eng’ bik." 
Psalms22:7 Rorechina tugul che keera: Ak kochota eng’ kutit, kolelechi metowek, kolen," 
Psalms22:8 Tiiege Jehovah; ingosor Jehovah inendet: Ingosor, amu baibai Jehovah eng’ inendet." 
Psalms22:9 Ago inye ne kiimoong’wa eng’ moetab kamennyu: Inye ne kiigona amang’ ye kiachuchuni. 
Psalms22:10 Kigiwirja oldang’ung’, koboch ami mo: Koboch ami moetab kamennyu, ko i Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms22:11 Amelooitena; amu negit nyalilda; Amu mami toretindet. 
Psalms22:12 Kagoyiema kirugik che chang’: Kagogiicha kirugik che koromen che bo Basan. 
Psalms22:13 Kagoseng’eng’ja, Ko u ng’etundo ne kombori ak koboriseni." 
Psalms22:14 Kagitumda ko u beek, Ak kagong’ulielis kowekyuk tugul: U muguleldanyu masamek; Ak kochootyo eng’ moennyu." 
Psalms22:15 Kagoyaam kimnatennyu ko u rokyet; Ak kanamgei ng’elyeptanyu ak tagilgiliet; Ak kaimutya temburiekab meet. 
Psalms22:16 Amu kagoyiema sesenik: Ak kagogerja oret tuiyetab kiptengeginik; Katoor eunekyuk ak kelyekyuk. 
Psalms22:17 Amuchi aiit kowekyuk tugul; Keera ak konjurura: 
Psalms22:18 Pchechingei ngoroikyuk, Ak serei barbarek agobo ngoriennyu." 
Psalms22:19 Ago, amelooitena, ee Jehovah: Ee kimnatennyu, chogu toreta." 
Psalms22:20 Soru sobondanyu eng’ rotwetab chok, Ee, soru chamanennyu eng’ kimnatetab seset." 
Psalms22:21 Sorua eng’ kutitab ng’etundo; Ee, kaiwolwa eng’ kuinoikab soenik." 
Psalms22:22 Amwachini kaineng’ung’ tupchosiekyuk: Alosun eng’ kwenutab tuiyet. 
Psalms22:23 Okwek che ogonyiti Jehovah, olosu inendet; Okwek tugul che o iyotetab Jakobo, otoror inendet; Ak oiywei inendet okwek tugul iyotetab Israel." 
Psalms22:24 Amu kima sas anan kowech nyalildab ne kinyalili; Ama ung’e togennyi inendet; Ago ye kingorirji, kogas." 
Psalms22:25 Inye ne alosu eng’ kwenutab tuiyet ne o: Agoitoi che kiaarorte eng’ taitab ichek che iywei inendet," 
Psalms22:26 Amisiei che taloen ak kobiyong’so: Ilosu Jehovah che cheng’ei inendet: Ingosopcho mugulelwekwok koigeny. 
Psalms22:27 Ibwati Jehovah tabanwek tugul che bo ng’ony ak koweekyigei inendet: Tun kutung’jinin inye ortinwek tugul che bo bororiosiek. 
Psalms22:28 Amu bo Jehovah laitornatet: Ak inendet bounindetab bororiosiek. 
Psalms22:29 Tun amisiei tugul che neriotin che bo ng’ony, ak kolosu; Ak tun ing’urukyin inendet tugul che bendi temburiek, Agot inendet ne matun imuchi korib sobondanyi kosob." 
Psalms22:30 Tun boisiechin inendet iyotet; Kiityin Kiptaiyat eng’ ibinwek. 
Psalms22:31 Bwanei kobartoi imandanyi Eng’ bik che tun kisichei, kele, inendet ne kiyai." 
Psalms23:1 Jehovah mestowondennyu; mararua kiy. 
Psalms23:2 Kona arue ole mi suswek che nyalilen; Indoiywa awa ole mi beekab kalyet. 
Psalms23:3 Isoobi sobondanyu: Indoiywa abun ortinwekab imanda agobo kainennyi. 
Psalms23:4 Ee, agot ngabune atebwetab uruetab meet, Ko maiywei yaitio; amu imi kobota: Igaigaa kiroktang’ung’ ak siaring’ung’." 
Psalms23:5 Iitoi meset eng’ tainnyu eng’ ole mi bunikyuk: Kaiile metinnyu mwaita; kagonyi kikombennyu kot kong’irtagei. 
Psalms23:6 Isubota iman mieindo ak chamnyet ne tala betusiek tugul kote asobe: Ak atebe gotab Jehovah koigeny. 
Psalms24:1 Bo Jehovah ng’ony, ak che nyiitat ng’ony; Ng’ony, ak che menyei oloto." 
Psalms24:2 Amu inendet ne kilumdoi eng’ nyanjosiek, Ak kogimit eng’ ainosiek." 
Psalms24:3 Ng’o ne togostoi tulwetab Jehovah? Ak ng’o ne tononi eng’ oldanyi ne tilil? 
Psalms24:4 Inendet ne tililen eunek, ak ko tilil muguleldanyi: Ne malasyingei sobondanyi tugukab yaitio, Ama iyostos eng’ ng’alset." 
Psalms24:5 Taachei inendet kaberuret eng’ Jehovah, Ak imanda eng’ Kamuktaindetab yetunennyi." 
Psalms24:6 Nito ibinda ne cheng’ei inendet, Ne cheng’ei togeng’ung’, ee Kamuktaindetab Jakobo." 
Psalms24:7 Oyot met, okwek kurgotik; Oyot met, okwek kurgotik che bo koigeny: Si konyo orit Laitoriatab teegisto." 
Psalms24:8 Ng’o Laitoriatab teegisto? Jehovah ne kim ne bo kamuktaet, Jehovah ne bo kamuktaet eng’ luget." 
Psalms24:9 Oyot met, okwek kurgotik; Ee, oyot met, kurgotik che bo koigeny: Si konyo go Laitoriatab teegisto." 
Psalms24:10 Ng’o Laitoriandani bo teegisto? Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Inendet Laitoriatab teegisto." 
Psalms25:1 Atokyinin sobondanyu, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms25:2 Ee Kamuktaindennyu; kiamang’un. Amegona alilan; Amegochi bunikyuk kogasenagei. 
Psalms25:3 Ee, mami ne ililani ne igenin: Ililandos che ng’alsei buch." 
Psalms25:4 Iborua ortinweguk, ee Jehovah; Ineta ole ibune." 
Psalms25:5 Indoiywa eng’ imaning’ung’, ak ineta; Amu i Kamuktaindetab yetunennyu; Agenin betut komugul." 
Psalms25:6 Ibwat, ee Jehovah, rirenosieguk ak chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala; Amu kimi koboch keny." 
Psalms25:7 Amebwat tengekwogik che bo ming’inatennyu, anan bistoennyu: Ibwata ko u chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala, Amu mieindang’ung’, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms25:8 Mie Jehovah ak ko bo iman: Eng’ noto anyun ineti inendet kiptengeginik eng’ oret. 
Psalms25:9 Indochin che taloen eng’ kiruoget: Ak ineti che taloen orennyi. 
Psalms25:10 Chamnyet ne tala ortinwek tugul che bo Jehovah ak ko bo imanit. Eng’ ichek che ribei kayomisennyi ak baornatosiekyik. 
Psalms25:11 Nyoiywa kaat tengektanyu, amu o, Amu kaineng’ung’, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms25:12 Chi ng’o ne iywei Jehovah? Ineti Jehovah inendet eng’ or ne leweni. 
Psalms25:13 Tebyei sobondanyi eng’ tunenatet; Ak konyaban iyotennyi emet. 
Psalms25:14 Mitei ung’otietab Jehovah koboto ichek che iywei inendet; Ak koborji ichek arorutiennyi. 
Psalms25:15 Tokyingei konyekyuk Jehovah kotugul; Amu inemu kelyekyuk eng’ mestet. 
Psalms25:16 Iweekyage ak irirena; Amu ami anege ak anyalili. 
Psalms25:17 Katesak nyalilwogik che bo muguleldanyu: Imaanda eng’ bichiinwekyuk. 
Psalms25:18 Keer nyalildanyu ak arogenennyu; Ak nyoiywa kaat tengekwogikyuk tugul. 
Psalms25:19 Keer bunikyuk, amu chang’; Ak kowecha eng’ weget ne korom." 
Psalms25:20 Rib sobondanyu, ak isorua: Ameng’ alilan, amu amang’un." 
Psalms25:21 Ingoriba kagesunatetab ge ak imanda, Amu agenin." 
Psalms25:22 Itiach Israel, ee Kamuktaindet, Eng’ nyalilwogikyik tugul." 
Psalms26:1 Ibesiewa, ee Jehovah, amu kiawendote kagesunatennyu bo ge: Kiamang’u Jehovah amachuchuige." 
Psalms26:2 Isiacha, ee Jehovah, ak itiema; Itilil kabwatutikyuk ak muguleldanyu." 
Psalms26:3 Amu mi tainnyu chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala; Ak kiawendote imaning’ung’. 
Psalms26:4 Tomo ketebi ak bik che iberberisiei; Ama kinamege ak ng’alik. 
Psalms26:5 Aweche tuiyetab che yaei yaitio. Ama kitebye ak kiptengeginik. 
Psalms26:6 Auni eunekyuk amu matiinya lelutio; Si amuut kaptisisieng’ung’, ee Jehovah:" 
Psalms26:7 Si aamda kogasak kutitab kongoi. Ak ang’alale boisioniguk tugul che kikwong’e. 
Psalms26:8 Ee Jehovah, achame meng’otetab gong’ung’. Ak ole menyei teegistang’ung’." 
Psalms26:9 Ameistaa koboto kiptengeginik, Anan sobondanyu koboto rumik:" 
Psalms26:10 Mi eunekwak kolgoliet, Ak nyiitotin eunekwak che bo tai tuguk che kigoigoisie." 
Psalms26:11 Ago ane, awendote kagesunatennyu bo ge: Itiacha, ak irirenage." 
Psalms26:12 Tonone keldanyu ole mie: Alosu Jehovah eng’ tuiyosiek. 
Psalms27:1 Jehovah lapkeiyennyu ak yetunennyu; tos aiywei ng’o? Jehovah kimnatetab sobondanyu; aiywei ng’o? 
Psalms27:2 Ye kichea che yaei yaitio, kole koam bortanyu, Kiginach ak kiibutyo bunikyuk ak usikyuk." 
Psalms27:3 Agot ngo yiema luget, Ko manyogoritu muguleldanyu: Ngo ng’eetya boriet, Amang’un kora eng’ yoto." 
Psalms27:4 Kiamage kit agenge Jehovah, noto ne acheng’e; Ale atebe gotab Jehovah eng’ betusiek tugul kote asobe, Si ageer kororonindab Jehovah, ak abwati eng’ hekalunnyi." 
Psalms27:5 Amu ung’ena gonnyi eng’ betutab nyalilda: Ee, ung’ena emainnyi eng’ ole ung’at; Kanapchina ruandet barak." 
Psalms27:6 Ak koeeta nguno agee bunikyuk che yiema; Ak agoite korosek che bo kagasetab ge eng’ emainnyi; Atieni, ee, atienjini kalosunoik Jehovah." 
Psalms27:7 Kas kutinnyu, ee Jehovah, ye arire: Rirena, ak iwolwa." 
Psalms27:8 (Ye kiile,) Ocheng’ togennyu; kilenjin muguleldanyu, Ee Jehovah, acheng’e togeng’ung’." 
Psalms27:9 Ameung’ena togeng’ung’; Ameiste kiboitiondeng’ung’ eng’ neregek: Kiiegu toretindennyu; Ameona, amemeta, ee Kamuktaindetab yetunennyu." 
Psalms27:10 Amu kigometa baba ak kamennyu, Ago nama Jehovah." 
Psalms27:11 Ineta oreng’ung’, ee Jehovah; Ak imutena oret ne litit, Amu che sapchina." 
Psalms27:12 Amegocha magetab bunikyuk: Amu kong’eetya baorinik che bo lembech, ak che mong’une kutuswekwak kolgoliet ko u kabuset." 
Psalms27:13 Kaayan ale ageere mieindab Jehovah, Eng’ emetab bik che soptos." 
Psalms27:14 Ingen Jehovah: Kimitu, ingonyiganit muguleldang’ung’; Ee, ingen Jehovah." 
Psalms28:1 Aguurin, ee Jehovah; Ameger itiguk, ruandennyu, eng’ komostanyu: Amu, ngot isis eng’ ane, Aige ichek che bendi keringet." 
Psalms28:2 Kas kutitab somutikyuk, ye arirjinin, Ye anamjini barak eunekyuk atokyini oldang’ung’ ne tilil." 
Psalms28:3 Amewirta koboto kiptengeginik, Anan koboto che yaei yaitio; Che mwachingei kalyet ak bikab kokwet, Ago tinyei suriet eng’ mugulelwekwak." 
Psalms28:4 Igochi ko u boisionikwak, ak ko u ole te yaetab yautikwak: Igochi ko u boisietab eunekwak; Yakyi che nyoljin." 
Psalms28:5 Amu mamage kiy boisionikab Jehovah, Anan boisietab eunekyik, Butei Jehovah ichek ama koteechei kogeny." 
Psalms28:6 Iberurot Jehovah, Amu kigogaswa somutikyuk," 
Psalms28:7 Jehovah kimnatennyu ak long’ennyu; Kigomang’ muguleldanyu inendet; ak kigetoreta: Eng’ noto anyun igasegei muguleldanyu mising’; Ak alosu inendet eng’ tiendanyu. 
Psalms28:8 Jehovah kimnatetab bikyik, Ak inendet irimetab yetunetab nenyinet ne kigiil." 
Psalms28:9 Soru biguk, ak iberur boroteng’ung’: Bai ichek, ak imutate agoi koigeny." 
Psalms29:1 Ogochi Jehovah, ee okwek werikab che kimen, Ogochi Jehovah teegisto ak kimnatet." 
Psalms29:2 Ogochi Jehovah teegisto ne nyoljin kainennyi; Ogutung’ji Jehovah eng’ telunatetab tililindo. 
Psalms29:3 Mitei twegunetab Jehovah nyanjosiek: Tulei Kamuktaindetab teegisto, Noto Jehovah ne mi baragutab beek che chang’." 
Psalms29:4 Tinyei kimnatet twegunetab Jehovah; Nyiitat etunatet twegunetab Jehovah. 
Psalms29:5 Iriei twegunetab Jehovah taragonik; Ee, tonatoni Jehovah taragonik che bo Lebanon;" 
Psalms29:6 Igochin Jehovah ichek kotorombenso ko u moita; Ko u moitab soet, Lebanon ak Sirion." 
Psalms29:7 Betei twegunetab Jehovah laletab mat. 
Psalms29:8 Itumdumi twegunetab Jehovah ong’atet: Itumdumi Jehovah ong’atetab Kades. 
Psalms29:9 Igochin twegunetab Jehovah kenyelok koiiyo, Ak chorori ketikab timdo: Ak mwaei age tugul ne mi hekalunnyi kole, Torornatet." 
Psalms29:10 Tebe Jehovah maranet ko u laitoriat; Ee, tebyei Jehovah kolaitorani koigeny." 
Psalms29:11 Igochin Jehovah bikyik kimnatet; Iberuri Jehovah bikyik eng’ kalyet. 
Psalms30:1 Alosun, ee Jehovah; amu kiieeta, Ama igochi bunikyuk kogasenagei." 
Psalms30:2 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, Kiarirjin, ak kiisooba." 
Psalms30:3 Ee Jehovah, kiimoong’u sobondanyu eng’ oldab meet: Kiigona asob, si mawe keringet." 
Psalms30:4 Otienji Jehovah kalosunet, ee, okwek che o chechik che tililen, Ak ogochi kongoi kainennyi ne tilil." 
Psalms30:5 Tebyei neregekyik ne matia; Ichuldos chametab Jehovah eng’ sobetab chi: Mi rirek kemout, Ago biitu boiboiyet karon." 
Psalms30:6 Ak kiale eng’ berurtanyu, Magiistaa." 
Psalms30:7 Inye Jehovah ne kiigochi tulwennyu eng’ chameng’ung’ kotonon kogimit: Kiiuny togeng’ung’; ak kiaiyweisie. 
Psalms30:8 Kiarirjin, inye, ee Jehovah; Ak kiagaigai Jehovah:" 
Psalms30:9 Tinyei nee keljino korotikyuk, ye kaawe keringet? Ilosun temburiek? Tos ibarta imaning’ung’?" 
Psalms30:10 Kas, ee Jehovah, ak rirenage: Egu toretindennyu, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms30:11 Kiiwal kateennyu koek ureriet; Kiireegunena kuniet, ak ilaakwa boiboiyet:" 
Psalms30:12 Si kobiit kolosun teegistanyu eng’ tiendo ama sisei. Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, aweegun kongoi koigeny." 
Psalms31:1 Amang’un inye, ee Jehovah; ameng’alilan agoi: Sorua eng’ imandang’ung’." 
Psalms31:2 Epcha it; sorua chokyi: Egu ruandet ne kim eng’ ane, got ne aung’ege kosorua." 
Psalms31:3 Amu inye ko i ruandennyu ak irimennyu; Eng’ noto anyun indoiywa amu kaineng’ung’ ak imutata. 
Psalms31:4 Imaanda eng’ mestet ne kigiriich agobo ane eng’ ung’ot; Amu inye ko i kimnatennyu. 
Psalms31:5 Kande tamirmiriennyu eung’ung’: Kiitiacha, ee Jehovah, inye Kamuktaindet ne bo imanit." 
Psalms31:6 Aweche ichek che isubi atebosiek che manyolu che bo lembech: Ago amang’u Jehovah. 
Psalms31:7 Agasige ak abaibaitu eng’ rireneng’ung’: Amu kiigeer nyalildanyu; Kiinai sobondanyu eng’ betusiekab nyalilda: 
Psalms31:8 Ama ichamde konama eutab bunyot; Kiicham kotonone kelyekyuk ole bara. 
Psalms31:9 Rirena, ee Jehovah, amu ami nyalilda: Machei kobek konyekyuk amu arogenet, koboto sobondanyu ak bortanyu." 
Psalms31:10 Kagowong’gei betusiekyuk amu arogenet, ak kenyisiekyuk eng’ tigenet: Kagorarua kimnatet amu tengektanyu, ak kagoosegitu kowekyuk." 
Psalms31:11 Kaegu ne itewerat amu bunikyuk tugul, Ee, ne siirei ko bikab kokwennyu, ak kiaegu kit ne kiywei agot eng’ bik che kogingengei: Kimweena che kigeera eng’ sang’." 
Psalms31:12 Kigeutiena ko u chi ne kigome ne magibwati: Kiaige teret ne kigoiye. 
Psalms31:13 Amu kiagas kataamsetab che chang’, Kigoyiema kamuiset: Ye kituiyogei koruoch agobo ane, Kicheng’ei oret ne barena." 
Psalms31:14 Ago kiamang’un inye, ee Jehovah: Kiale, Inye ko i Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms31:15 Mitei betusiekyuk eung’ung’: Sorua eng’ eunekab bunikyuk, ak eng’ ichek che onwa." 
Psalms31:16 Ingokweny togeng’ung’ kiboitiondeng’ung’. Sorua eng’ chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala. 
Psalms31:17 Ameng’alilan, ee Jehovah; amu kaaguurin: Ingolilanso kiptengeginik, ingosisyo eng’ oldab meet." 
Psalms31:18 Ingonamak kut kiplembechonik; Che itaami che bo imanda eng’ menotet, Eng’ kachaunetab ge ak sasisiet." 
Psalms31:19 Ee, o ne tia mieindang’ung’, ne kiigonorji ichek che iywein! Ne kiiyachi ichek che imang’un eng’ taitab werikab bik!" 
Psalms31:20 Iung’e ichek ole imi ole ung’at si maityi chaamsetab bik: Iunye ichek eng’ ung’ot eng’ emait si manyor bolatet ne bo ng’alek. 
Psalms31:21 Iberurot Jehovah: Amu kigoborua chamnyennyi ne tala ne kikwong’e eng’ nganaset ne kim. 
Psalms31:22 Ago kiamwa eng’ sartaet ale, Kigeistaa, ma igeera: Ago kiigas somutikyuk ye kiarirjin." 
Psalms31:23 Ee, ocham Jehovah, okwek bikyik tugul che tililen: Ribei Jehovah che iyani, Ak yaakyin eng’ chang’indo ne boisie menotet." 
Psalms31:24 Ogimegitu, ak ingonyiganitu mugulelwekwok, Okwek tugul che ogeni Jehovah." 
Psalms32:1 Igasatgei ne kigenyochi kaat bistoennyi, ne kigetuch chalwoktanyi." 
Psalms32:2 Baibai mising’ chi ne maiityin Jehovah tengekto, Ama komi ng’alset muguleldanyi." 
Psalms32:3 Ye kiasise, koosegitu kowekyuk, Amu tigenennyu betut komugul." 
Psalms32:4 Amu kichiila eung’ung’ bet ak kemoi: Kiyaam bortanyu ko u ye kabiit kemeut. 
Psalms32:5 Kiamwaun chalwoktanyu, ak ma aung’enen tengektanyu: Kiale, Ang’ang’jini Jehovah bistaosiekyuk; Ak kiinyoiywa kaat chalwoktab tengektanyu." 
Psalms32:6 Ingosain chi age tugul ne tilil amu noto eng’ betut ne ta komuchi konyorun: Iman ye kagong’irtagei beek che chang’, ko maitei ole mi inendet." 
Psalms32:7 Inye ko i oldanyu ole aung’ege; iriba inye si manyorua nyalilda; Iyiemena tienwogikab yetunet. 
Psalms32:8 Atigonin ak anetin eng’ oret ne ibune: Ang’omitin ageerotin. 
Psalms32:9 Amoige mbartanyit, anan nyumbut, che matinyei naet: Che tinyei karik eng’ kutuswek, ak anok che kirang’e, Si marikyin." 
Psalms32:10 Nyoru ng’woninwogik che chang’ kiptengekyot: Ago kimuute rirenetab ge ne imang’u Jehovah. 
Psalms32:11 Ogasge Jehovah, ak oboiboitu, okwek che o bo imanda: Ak otien eng’ boiboindo, okwek tugul che o bo iman eng’ mugulelwekwok." 
Psalms33:1 Oboiboitu eng’ Jehovah, okwek che o bo imanda: Nyoljin kalosunet che bo iman." 
Psalms33:2 Oweekyi Jehovah kongoi eng’ ketubet: Otienji kalosunoik eng’ kibugandet ne tinyei inoik taman. 
Psalms33:3 Otienji tiendo ne leel; Obut komie si kogasak tiendo. 
Psalms33:4 Amu bo iman ng’olyotab Jehovah; Ak yaei boisionikyik tugul eng’ imanda. 
Psalms33:5 Chamei imanda ak kiruoget: Nyiitat ng’ony chamnyet ne tala ne bo Jehovah. 
Psalms33:6 Kigiyai kipsengwetisiek eng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah; Ak chang’indanywa tugul eng’ kabusetab kutinnyi. 
Psalms33:7 Iyumi beekab nyanjet koigei tulwo: Ak konore rirosiek chogenik. 
Psalms33:8 Ingoiywei ng’ony tugul Jehovah: Ingobotanso bik tugul che menyei ng’ony, amu inendet." 
Psalms33:9 Amu kimwa, ak kiyaak; King’at, ak kitonon." 
Psalms33:10 Walei Jehovah ruchinaikab bororiosiek koek buch: Yaei kabwatutikab bik koek che matilei kiy. 
Psalms33:11 Tonondos ruchinaikab Jehovah koigeny, Ak kabwatutikab muguleldanyi eng’ ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms33:12 Iberurot bororiet ne Kamuktaindenywa Jehovah; Bik che kigolewen koek borotennyi. 
Psalms33:13 Ing’ururi Jehovah eng’ kipsengwetisiek; Keerei inendet werik tugul che bo bik; 
Psalms33:14 Keeroti eng’ ole menyei Bik tugul che menyei ng’ony; 
Psalms33:15 Inendet ne yaei mugulelwekwak tugul, Ak koruchin boisionikwak tugul." 
Psalms33:16 Mami laitoriat ne sorunegei chang’indab luget: Magisoru chito ne nyigan eng’ kimnatet ne o. 
Psalms33:17 Kit buch mbartanyit eng’ katerteret: Ama soru chi eng’ kimnatennyi ne o. 
Psalms33:18 Ogeero, keerei konyekab Jehovah ichek che iywei inendet, Icheget che igeni rirenennyi;" 
Psalms33:19 Si kosor sobonwekwak eng’ meet, Ak korib kosopcho eng’ rubet." 
Psalms33:20 Kigogen sobonwekyok Jehovah: Inendet toretindennyo ak long’ennyo. 
Psalms33:21 Amu boiboitu mugulelwekyok eng’ inendet, Amu kigimang’u kainennyi ne tilil." 
Psalms33:22 Ingotebenech rireneng’ung’, ee Jehovah, Ko u ye kigigenin." 
Psalms34:1 Alasu Jehovah kotugul: Tebe kutinnyu kalosunennyi kotugul. 
Psalms34:2 Ilosugei sobondanyu eng’ Jehovah: Kasei noto che taloen, ak kogasgei." 
Psalms34:3 Ongilosu Jehovah, okwek ak ane, Ak ongitoror tugul kainennyi." 
Psalms34:4 Kiacheng’ Jehovah ak kiwolwa, Ak kisorua eng’ kaiyweisiosiekyuk tugul." 
Psalms34:5 Kiinyal inendet, ak kinyor kakweng’et: Ak manyoru kalilanet togochikwak agoi." 
Psalms34:6 Kirir kimnyaliliandani, ak kigasyi Jehovah, Ak kisore inendet eng’ nyalilwogikyik tugul." 
Psalms34:7 Menyei malaikaiyatab Jehovah komoswek tugul che bo icheget che iywei Jehovah, Ak kosoru ichek." 
Psalms34:8 Ee, ochamjam anyun si onai ole mie Jehovah: Baibai mising’ chito ne imang’u inendet!" 
Psalms34:9 Ee, oiywei Jehovah, okwek bikyik che tililen: Amu mararjin kiy ichek che iywei inendet." 
Psalms34:10 Rarjin kirugikab ng’etunyik, ak koamei rubet: Ago mararjin kiy age tugul ne mie icheget che cheng’ei Jehovah." 
Psalms34:11 Obwa lagochu, ogasa: Si anetak kaiyweisiet ne oiywei Jehovah." 
Psalms34:12 Ng’o chi ne machei kosob keny, Ak kochamei betusiek che chang’ si kogeer ne mie?" 
Psalms34:13 Rib ng’elyeptang’ung’ eng’ yaitio, Ak kuting’ung’ si mamwa ng’alset." 
Psalms34:14 Istoege yaitio, ak iyai ne mie; Cheng’ kalyet, ak isub." 
Psalms34:15 Tokyingei konyekab Jehovah che bo imanda, Ak kasei itikyik rirekwak." 
Psalms34:16 Kirindoi togetab Jehovah che yaei yaitio, Si koisto kabwatenywa eng’ ng’ony." 
Psalms34:17 Kiririo che bo iman, ak kigas Jehovah, Ak kisor eng’ nyalilwogikwak tugul." 
Psalms34:18 Negite Jehovah icheget che ilyotin mugulelwekwak, Ak kosoru ichek che kigonyeratitu tamirmirikwak." 
Psalms34:19 Chang’ nyalilwogikab ne bo imanda: Ago soru Jehovah inendet eng’ choto tugul. 
Psalms34:20 Ribei kowekyik tugul: Mailei agot agenge. 
Psalms34:21 Barei yaitwogik sogoranik: Ak kiruokyin che wechei ne bo imanda. 
Psalms34:22 Itiachi Jehovah sobonwekab kiboitinikyik: Ak magiruokyin agot agenge ne imang’u inendet. 
Psalms35:1 Obarege, ee Jehovah, ak icheget che kibarege: Yai luget ak icheget che yaiywa luget." 
Psalms35:2 Nam long’et ak torgochet, Ak itonon itoreta." 
Psalms35:3 Ng’usu ng’otit, ak iger oretab icheget che onwa: Ilenji sobondanyu, A yetuneng’ung’." 
Psalms35:4 Ingolilanso ak kotewerogis che cheng’ei sobondanyu: Ingoweektagei let ak kotobtobenso icheget che cheng’ei koyaiywa ne ya. 
Psalms35:5 Ingogergeit ak metetek che ibei usonet, Ak koon malaikaiyatab Jehovah." 
Psalms35:6 Ingoimen orenywa ak kochabait, Ak koon malaikaiyatab Jehovah ichek." 
Psalms35:7 Amu kiuny mestenywa buch agobo ane eng’ keringet, Kibalji buch sobondanyu keringet." 
Psalms35:8 Ingoche inendet ng’emisiet; Ak ingonam inendet mestet ne kiunyei: Ingororkyi oloto eng’ ng’emisionoto. 
Psalms35:9 Ak kobaibait sobondanyu eng’ Jehovah: Ak baibaitu eng’ yetunennyi. 
Psalms35:10 Len kowekyuk tugul, Ee Jehovah, ng’o ne ogerge, Ne soru ne nyalili eng’ inendet ne kim kosiir, Ee, ne soru ne nyalili ak ne matinyei kiy eng’ inendet ne rebei tugukyik?" 
Psalms35:11 Ng’eetos baorinikab lembech; Ak teebena tuguk che mangen. 
Psalms35:12 Yaakwa yaitiet eng’ ne mie, Kot kogochi sobondanyu kobanan." 
Psalms35:13 Ago ane, ye kingomiandos ichek ko kialaachi kuniok: Kiaming’in sobondanyu eng’ rugutet; Ak kiweekyagei saennyu." 
Psalms35:14 Kicham awendoti ko u ye choruennyu inendet anan werit ne kitupche: Kiang’uruge arir ko u ne iteei agobo kamet. 
Psalms35:15 Ago kiboiboitu ye kiang’wali, ak kiiyumgei: Kiiyumjagei kipreprebinik, ak kima anai; Kibacha, ama sistos." 
Psalms35:16 Ko u sasik che yaachen eng’ igorwek, Kisus kelek agobo ane." 
Psalms35:17 Ee Kiptaiyat, igeere kot kotianit? Soru chamanennyu eng’ ng’etunyik." 
Psalms35:18 Aweegun kongoi eng’ tuiyet ne o: Alosun eng’ ole mi bik che chang’. 
Psalms35:19 Amegochi koboiboitunena bunikyuk buch: Anan komismis konyek che wecha buch. 
Psalms35:20 Amu mang’alali che bo kalyet: Ago cheng’ei ng’alekab ng’alset agobo ichek che taloen che bo emet. 
Psalms35:21 Ee, kiseng’eng’ja ichek mising’; Len, Haa, haa, kagegeer." 
Psalms35:22 Kaigeer inye, ee Jehovah; amesis: Ee, Kiptaiyat, amelooitena." 
Psalms35:23 Ng’eet, keer si iruoksewa, Agobo ng’alekyuk, inye Kamuktaindennyu, ago i Kiptaiyandennyu." 
Psalms35:24 Iruoksewa, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, ko u imandang’ung’; Amegochi koboiboitunena." 
Psalms35:25 Amegochi komwa eng’ mugulelwekwak, kole, Haa, noto ne kogimache: Amechamji kole, Kagelugui." 
Psalms35:26 Ingolilanso ak kotoptobenso che boiboi ye kanyorua kiy ne ya: Ingilaakyi kalilanet ak tewernatet che ilosunenagei. 
Psalms35:27 Ingotien eng’ boiboiyet ak kogasgei ichek che machei imandanyu: Ee, ingomwa ichek kotugul kole, Ingitoror Jehovah, Ne boiboitune kalyetab kiboitiondennyi." 
Psalms35:28 Ak kong’alale ng’elyeptanyu imandang’ung’, Ak kalosuneng’ung’ bet komugul." 
Psalms36:1 Mwaei yaitietab bistoindet eng’ muguleldanyu, kole, Mami kaiyweisietab Kamuktaindet eng’ konyekyik." 
Psalms36:2 Amu ilosugei inendet, Len, maginyoru tengektanyi kot kewech." 
Psalms36:3 Ng’alekab kutinnyi ko tengekto ak ng’alset: Ma komage kiy kong’omit anan koyai ne mie. 
Psalms36:4 Ruchin tengekto eng’ itogunnyi; Indogei oret ne ma mie; Mawechei yaitiet. 
Psalms36:5 Itei chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala kipsengwetisiek, ee Jehovah; Ak itei barak imandang’ung’." 
Psalms36:6 Kergei imandang’ung’ ak tulonokab Kamuktaindet; Riret ne o kiruogutiguk: Ee Jehovah, iribe chi ak tiony." 
Psalms36:7 Kararan ne tia chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala, ee Kamuktaindet! Mwechin anyun werikab bik uruetab kebebaiguk." 
Psalms36:8 Biyong’dos eng’ akwaiyetab gong’ung’; Ak igochini koee che bo ainetab boiboindang’ung’. 
Psalms36:9 Amu mi oldang’ung’ kondab beekab sobon: Kigeere lapkeiyet eng’ lapkeiyeng’ung’. 
Psalms36:10 Ingotepto chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala ichek che ingenin; Ak ingotepto imandang’ung’ che bo iman eng’ mugulelwekwak. 
Psalms36:11 Ameng’ koit ole ami kelyekab menotiot, Amechamji koistaa eunekab kiptengeginik." 
Psalms36:12 Oloto ole kigobutyi che yaei tengekto: Kigetimda, ak ma komuchi kong’eetyo." 
Psalms37:1 Ameng’ konyitin che yaei yaitio, Amat koamin ng’et kong’ agobo che yaei tengekto." 
Psalms37:2 Amu matenitu ketil ko u suswek, Ak koresyo ko u suswek che ng’orng’or." 
Psalms37:3 Imang’u Jehovah, ak iyai ne mie; Meng’isie eng’ emet, ak isub imanda." 
Psalms37:4 Baibaitune Jehovah; Ak kogonin somutikab muguleldang’ung’. 
Psalms37:5 Igochi Jehovah kondochi bandang’ung’; Imang’u inendet, si kosuldaun ne imache." 
Psalms37:6 Yaei imandang’ung’ kotook ko u lapkeiyet, Ak yaei kiruogutiguk koluu ko u bet kwen." 
Psalms37:7 Imuuny eng’ Jehovah, ak igen inendet eng’ muitaet: Ameng’ konyitin ne beruri eng’ orennyi, Chito ne isuldoe ng’alset." 
Psalms37:8 Mete nereknatet, ak iistoege neregek che laldos: Ameiimege, amu ibu noto yaitiet." 
Psalms37:9 Amu kiwong’u che yaei yaitio: Ago namei emet che igeni Jehovah. 
Psalms37:10 Amu tomo kitigin, si ma komi kiptengekyot: Tun igeere ole komi, ago ma komi." 
Psalms37:11 Ago namei emet che taloen; Ak kogasgei eng’ kalyet ne o. 
Psalms37:12 Chobei kiptengekyot yaitiet agobo ne bo imanda, Ak susei kelek agobo inendet." 
Psalms37:13 Rorechin Kiptaiyat inendet: Amu keerei kole nyonei betunnyi. 
Psalms37:14 Kang’us kiptengeginik rotokwak bo chok, ak kariich kwangokwak; Si kowirji ng’ony ne nyalili ak ne matinyei kiy, Ak kobar ichek che tebyei eng’ iman:" 
Psalms37:15 Toorei rotokwak bo chok mugulelwekwak, Ak koilyo kwangokwak." 
Psalms37:16 Kaigai che ng’ering’ che tinyei ne bo imanda Kosiir chang’indab che bo kiptengeginik. 
Psalms37:17 Amu ildos eunekab kiptengeginik: Ago tiiei Jehovah che bo imanda. 
Psalms37:18 Ingen Jehovah betusiekab che igesunotgei: Ak bo koigeny borotenywa. 
Psalms37:19 Manyoru kalilanet eng’ betusiek che yaachen: Ak kobiyong’so eng’ betusiekab rubet. 
Psalms37:20 Ago lustos che ma bo iman, Ak kogergeit bunikab Jehovah ak suswek che kororon che bo kewet: Iwong’ugei; iwong’ugei ko u iyeto." 
Psalms37:21 Chito ne ma bo iman kobesenisiei, ama yaagu: Ago boisie ne bo imanda aiyebindo, ak kogoitoi." 
Psalms37:22 Amu che kigoberur Jehovah, kobunjin emet; Ak che kigochub kiwong’u." 
Psalms37:23 Chobei Jehovah ole bunoti chi; Ak baibaitu eng’ orennyi; 
Psalms37:24 Agot ngo terteriot, ko maitei ng’ony: Amu namoti Jehovah eunnyi." 
Psalms37:25 Kia ming’in ak kaositu nguno, Ago tom ageer kemeto ne bo imanda, Ak ma keer kosomoti iyotennyi amitwogik." 
Psalms37:26 Boisie aiyebindo betut komugul, ak kobesendoi; Ak kiberuri iyotennyi." 
Psalms37:27 Itabanegei yaitio, ak iyai ne mie; Ak imeng’isie koigeny." 
Psalms37:28 Amu chamei Jehovah imanda, Ama bagaktoi chechiget che tililen; Kiribei agoi koigeny: Ago kiwong’u keswekab kiptengeginik." 
Psalms37:29 Namei emet che bo imanda, Ak komeny oloto koigeny." 
Psalms37:30 Ng’alali chi ne bo imanda eng’ ng’omnatet, Ak mwaei ng’elyeptanyi imanda." 
Psalms37:31 Mitei muguleldanyi ng’atutietab Kamuktaindennyi; Maichabaitoi eng’ kakwautikyik. 
Psalms37:32 Sapchin kiptengekyot chi ne bo imanda, Ak cheng’ei kobar." 
Psalms37:33 Ago mametochin Jehovah inendet eutab kiptengekyot, Anan kogiikyi ye iruokyin." 
Psalms37:34 Igen Jehovah, ak isub orennyi, Ak koeetin inam emet: Ye kiwong’u kiptengeginik igeere." 
Psalms37:35 Kiageer kiptengekyot ne tinyei bounatet ne o, Ak kotuneni ko u ketit ne tuon ne bitei eng’ emennyi." 
Psalms37:36 Ago kibun yoto chi, ak keero, kima kota komi: Ee, kiacheng’, ago ma anyoru." 
Psalms37:37 Rib chito ne igesunotgei, ak igeer chito ne bo iman; Amu kagesunetab chichoto ko kalyet." 
Psalms37:38 Ago kibarei bistoik kibagenge: Kagesunetab kiptengeginik ko ng’emisiet. 
Psalms37:39 Ago bo Jehovah yetunetab che bo imanda: Inendet ko irimenywa eng’ betutab nyalilda. 
Psalms37:40 Ak kotoreti Jehovah ichek, ak kosoru: Soru ichek eng’ kiptengeginik, ak koeetei, Amu kimwechi inendet." 
Psalms38:1 Amegera kong’, ee Jehovah, eng’ neregeguk. Amegera kong’ eng’ neregeguk che koromen." 
Psalms38:2 Amu kigomwoga kipchaboniguk, Ak irurunya eung’ung’ mising’." 
Psalms38:3 Ma kosobei bortanyu amu neregeguk; Ama komi kamuung’et kowekyuk amu tengektanyu. 
Psalms38:4 Amu kagomaluucha tengekwogikyuk: Kagotemena ko u milet ne nyigis. 
Psalms38:5 Kagosamisitu ng’otobosiekyuk ak kogonunio, Amu abusnatennyu." 
Psalms38:6 Kaarigage ak ang’uruksei mising’; Ariroti bet komugul. 
Psalms38:7 Amu nyiitat ng’wanindo suennyu; Ama kosobei bortanyu. 
Psalms38:8 Kanyaratitu ak kagonyanya bortanyu; Koatigen amu nyalildab muguleldanyu. 
Psalms38:9 Ee Kiptaiyat, mi taing’ung’ magennyu tugul; Ama ung’at tigenennyu eng’ inye." 
Psalms38:10 Rukrugeni muguleldanyu, kogobetwa kimnatennyu: Kogomanda agine lapkeiyet eng’ konyekyuk." 
Psalms38:11 Tonondos eng’ ole loo che chama ak choronokyuk si marikyi miandanyu; Ak tonondos eng’ ole loo tilionutikyuk agichek. 
Psalms38:12 Ak chobei mestonok kole konama che cheng’ei sobondanyu; Ak mwaei yaitwogik che cheng’ena kiy ne ya, Ak kobwatoti ng’alsosiek bet komugul." 
Psalms38:13 Ago ane, a u chi ne ming’at, ne magastoi, Ak a u ne namat kut ne matwegu." 
Psalms38:14 Ee, a u chito ne magastoi, Ne matinyei ng’olyo ne sorunegei." 
Psalms38:15 Amu amang’un inye, ee Jehovah: Inye ne iwolu, ee Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms38:16 Amu kiale, Si maboiboitunena; Ye kagochabaita keldanyu, kolosunenagei." 
Psalms38:17 Amu negit aterteriot, Amu mi arogenennyu tainnyu kotugul." 
Psalms38:18 Ak ang’anye tengektanyu; Aarogeni amu chalwoktanyu. 
Psalms38:19 Ago soptos bunikyuk, ak ko kimen: Ak kagotesogis ichek che wecha buch." 
Psalms38:20 Kaek bunikyuk che yaaktoi yaitiet eng’ ne mie, Amu asubi kit ne mie." 
Psalms38:21 Mebagakta, ee Jehovah: Ee Kamuktaindennyu, amelooitena." 
Psalms38:22 Chogu toreta, Ee Kiptaiyat, yetunennyu." 
Psalms39:1 Kiamwa ale, Aribe ortinwekyuk, Si mamwa ng’elyeptanyu tengek: Agere kutinnyu karnet, Ye ta komi tainnyu kiptengekyot." 
Psalms39:2 Kinamak kutinnyu, ak kiasis, agot eng’ che miach; Ak kiging’eet arogenennyu." 
Psalms39:3 Kiek mat muguleldanyu eng’ orinnyu; Ak ye kita abwatoti kolal mat: Yeityo amwa eng’ ng’elyeptanyu ale," 
Psalms39:4 Ee Jehovah, chamwa anai kagesunennyu, Ak ole boch betusiekyuk, ak kit ne tun egu; Si anai ole teptoi nyalulennyu." 
Psalms39:5 Keero, kiiroge betusiekyuk tebesindab eut; Ama tilei kiy eng’ inye kenyisiekyuk kote asobe: Iman, agot nda mie ne tia chi age tugul, ko buch." 
Psalms39:6 Iman wendoti chi age tugul ko u uruet ne siirtoi: Iman iimegei bichoto buch: Iyumi tuguk, ama naei ne tun bunjin." 
Psalms39:7 Ara anyun, ee Kiptaiyat, ta ageni nee? Inye kamang’unennyu." 
Psalms39:8 Itiacha eng’ bistaosiekyuk tugul: Ameng’ aek ne teweria eng’ abusanik. 
Psalms39:9 Kinamak kutinnyu, ak kiasis, ma atwegu; Amu inye ne kiiyae." 
Psalms39:10 Iistoena bireng’ung’: Kaiwong’wa kweretab eung’ung’. 
Psalms39:11 Ye itigoni chi eng’ keretab kong’ amu tengekto, Iistoi kororonindanyi ko u ye amei kiptorotiot: Iman, buch chi tugul." 
Psalms39:12 Kas saennyu, ee Jehovah, ak epchi it rirekyuk; Amat isis igeere beekyuk bo kong’: Amu a kiprutoiyot koboten, A bunotyot ko u ye ki bunotik kwanisiekyuk tugul." 
Psalms39:13 Undaa, si anyor kimnatet kogeny, Kotom asiirte eng’ yu, ama ami." 
Psalms40:1 Kiagen Jehovah mising’; Ak kiepcha it, ak kigas rirekyuk." 
Psalms40:2 Kiganabwa kora among’une keringet ne kiywei, eng’ ng’atatiat ne menet; Ak konama atonon eng’ ruandet, ak kiigimit ole abunoti." 
Psalms40:3 Ak kagonde kutinnyu tiendo ne leel, noto kalosunet eng’ Kamuktaindennyo: Keerei che chang’, ak koiywei, Ak komang’ Jehovah." 
Psalms40:4 Baibai mising’ chito ne imang’u Jehovah, Ne matiytii menotik, ama weekyingei lembechek." 
Psalms40:5 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, kiiyai boisionik che chang’ che kikwong’e, Kabwatutik che ibwatenech: Magimuchi ketetun; Ngot ale amwaita ak ang’alale, Ko chang’ mising’ kot ko magimuchi kiit." 
Psalms40:6 Kima ibaibaitune tiseiywot ak kagochinet; Kiiyat itikyuk: Kima imach kagochinet ne kibeelei ak kagochinet ne bo tengekto. 
Psalms40:7 Amwa anyun ale, Keero, kaanyo; Kigisir agobo ane eng’ bukuit ne kigimaman." 
Psalms40:8 Abaibai ayai mageng’ung’, ee Kamuktaindennyu; Ee, mitei ng’atutieng’ung’ muguleldanyu." 
Psalms40:9 Kiaamde imanda eng’ tuiyet ne o; Keero, magere kutinnyu, Ee Jehovah, ingen aginye." 
Psalms40:10 Kimauny imandang’ung’ eng’ muguleldanyu; Kiabarte imandang’ung’ ak yetuneng’ung’: Kimaung’e chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala ak imaning’ung’ tuiyet ne o. 
Psalms40:11 Amemelela rirenosieguk che bo chamnyet, ee Jehovah: Ingoriba chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala ak imaning’ung’ betusiek tugul." 
Psalms40:12 Amu kigoyiema yaitwogik che magimuchi kiit, Kigonyorua tengekwogikyuk kot ko ma amuchi ageer kiy; Chang’ kosiir sumeekab metinnyu, ak kogonyeratit muguleldanyu." 
Psalms40:13 Ee Jehovah, cham eta: Chogu toreta, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms40:14 Ingolilanso ak kotoptobenso ko kaiyomogei Ichek che cheng’ei kobar sobondanyu: Ingolit olin ak kolilanso Che boiboi ye anyalili. 
Psalms40:15 Ingoek bonon amu tewernatenywa Che lenjina, Haa, Haa." 
Psalms40:16 Ingogasgei ak koboiboitu tugul che cheng’in: Ingomwa tugul che chamei yetuneng’ung’ kotugul kole, Ingotororit Jehovah." 
Psalms40:17 Ago a ne nyalili, ama tinye kiy; Ago ibwata Kiptaiyat: I toretindennyu ak ko i yetindennyu; Amegage, ee Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms41:1 Baibai mising’ inendet ne ibwati che nyerotin: Soru Jehovah inendet eng’ betutab nyalilda. 
Psalms41:2 Ribei Jehovah inendet, ak kogochin kosob, ak kobaibait eng’ emet; Ak amegochi bunikyik koboi inendet." 
Psalms41:3 Tiie Jehovah inendet ye miani eng’ itogunnyi: Iitochini itogunnyi eng’ miandanyi. 
Psalms41:4 Kiamwa ale, Ee Jehovah, rirenage: Isoob sobondanyu; amu kiayaun tengekto." 
Psalms41:5 Mwaitaena bunikyuk yaitio, kolen, Meei auyo, ak betei kainennyi au?" 
Psalms41:6 Ak ngo nyo kogeera, kong’alali lembechek; Iyumi muguleldanyi tengekwogik: Ak kong’alaloti ye mandoi." 
Psalms41:7 Chaamjingei ng’alek agobo ane, tugul che wecha: Cheng’ei koyaiywa ne ya:" 
Psalms41:8 Mwaei ichek kole, Kigonam kiy ne ya inendet: Ak kagoru ama kong’eetei." 
Psalms41:9 Ee, agot choruennyu ne kigichamdosi, ne kiamang’u, ne kiabae, Ko kagong’eet kole koyaiywa ne ya." 
Psalms41:10 Ago rirena, ee Jehovah, ing’eeta, Si ayaakyi mugetut." 
Psalms41:11 Kaanai eng’ ni ale iboiboitunena, Amu maorenena bunyondennyu." 
Psalms41:12 Ak itia eng’ kagesunatennyu bo ge, Ak igona atonon eng’ taing’ung’ koigeny." 
Psalms41:13 Ingitoror Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, Koboch keny agoi koigeny. Amen, ak Amen." 
Psalms42:1 Ko u ye isyenyi teweretiot agobo kererusiekab beek, Ko u noto isyenyi sobondanyu agobo inye, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms42:2 Amei sobondanyu melelda amu machei Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet ne sobei: Auiyo ye anyone atoogu eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet?" 
Psalms42:3 Kaek beekyuk bo kong’ amitwogikyuk che bo bet ak kemoi, Ye teebena ichek betut komugul kolen, Mi ano Kamuktaindeng’ung’?" 
Psalms42:4 Abwati tuguchu, ak ang’anye sobondanyu eng’ orinnyu, Ko u ye kigibe ak tuiyet, ak andochi koba gotab Kamuktaindet, Eng’ kutit ne bo boiboiyet ak kalosunet, koboto tuiyet ne kiribei betutab igorta." 
Psalms42:5 Amu nee si ing’uruge, ee sobondanyu? Amu nee si iimge eng’ ane? Imang’u Kamuktaindet: amu ta alosu inendet Amu yetunet ye mi inendet kobota." 
Psalms42:6 Ee Kamuktaindennyu, ing’uruksei sobondanyu eng’ ane: Eng’ noto anyun abwatin eng’ emetab Jordan, Ak eng’ Hermon tugul, ak tulwetab Misar." 
Psalms42:7 Kuurei riret riret age eng’ cheetab beeguk che isururtoi: Kigomaluucha beeguk tugul che mildogei ak che somotitogei. 
Psalms42:8 Ago ng’atei Jehovah bet chamnyennyi ne tala, Ak mi kobota tiendanyi kemoi, Noto saet eng’ Kamuktaindetab sobondanyu." 
Psalms42:9 Alenjini Kamuktaindet ne ruandennyu, Amu nee si iutiena? Amu nee si awa ariroti amu kanyaliletab bunyot?" 
Psalms42:10 Sasa bunikyuk, ko u ye toorei rotwet kowekyuk; Ak koteebena kotugul kole, Mi ano Kamuktaindeng’ung’?" 
Psalms42:11 Amu nee si ing’uruge, ee sobondanyu? Amu nee si iimige eng’ ane? Imang’u Kamuktaindet: amu ta alosu inendet. Inendet yetunet ne mi tainnyu, ak Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms43:1 Ibesiewa ng’alekyuk, ee Kamuktaindet, ak itononwa eng’ bororiet ne ma bo iman: Sorua eng’ chito ne ng’alsei ak ne ma bo iman." 
Psalms43:2 Amu i Kamuktaindet ne bo kimnatennyu; amu nee anyun si ibagakta? Amu nee si awa ariroti amu kanyaliletab bunyot? 
Psalms43:3 Iyokte lapkeiyeng’ung’ ak imaning’ung’; ingondoiywa choto: Ingomuta agoi tulweng’ung’ ne tilil, Ak meng’otosieguk." 
Psalms43:4 Si awa anyun kaptisisietab Kamuktaindet, Ole mi Kamuktaindet ne boiboiyennyu ne siirtoot: Alosun eng’ ketubet, ee Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms43:5 Amu nee si ing’uruge, ee sobondanyu? Amu nee si iimige eng’ ane? Imang’u Kamuktaindet: amu ta alosu inendet, Inendet yetunet ne mi tainnyu, ak Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms44:1 Kigegas eng’ itikyok, ee Kamuktaindet, kigomwawech kwanisiekyok, Boisiosiek che kiiyai eng’ betusiekwak che ki bo keny." 
Psalms44:2 Kole, Kiion bororiosiek eng’ eung’ung’, ak kiigochi komeny oloto; Ak kiinyalil inye bik, ak kiiyeste." 
Psalms44:3 Amu ma nam emet eng’ rotokwak bo chok, Ama sor ichek eunekwak: Ago eung’ung’ ne bo tai, ak eunoto inegei, ak lapkeiyetab togeng’ung’, Amu kiicham ichek." 
Psalms44:4 Ee Kamuktaindet, i Laitoriandennyu: Iyokyi Jakobo sorunet." 
Psalms44:5 Kitoortoi bunikyok eng’ inye: Ak kitieche eng’ kaineng’ung’ che machei kong’eetyech. 
Psalms44:6 Amu ma kwangennyu ne amang’u, Ama sorua rotwennyu bo chok." 
Psalms44:7 Ago kiisoruech eng’ bunikyok, Ak kiigochi kolilanso che wechech." 
Psalms44:8 Kilosunege Kamuktaindet betut komugul, Ak kiweekyini kongoi kaineng’ung’ koigeny." 
Psalms44:9 Ago kaibagaktech, ak kaigonech kililanse; Ama iwe inye koboto lugosiekyok." 
Psalms44:10 Kegonech kemwee bunikyok: Ak kanyabanjigei che wechech tuguk che luulei. 
Psalms44:11 Keyaech kegergeitu ak kechirek che kienyei; Ak kiiyestech kebe oldab bororiosiek. 
Psalms44:12 Ialdoi biguk buch, Ama tesun kiy ichek." 
Psalms44:13 Kegonech keegu che iteweri bikyok che bo kok, Sasech ak kororechinech icheget che mi komoswekyok." 
Psalms44:14 Kegonech keegu kalewenet eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek, Ak kolelegoti bik metowek agobo achek." 
Psalms44:15 Mi tainnyu tewernatennyu betut komugul, Ak kagotucha kalilanet ne mi togennyu," 
Psalms44:16 Amu kutitab inendet ne rosu ak kochubisiei; Amu bunyot ak ne yaaktoi mugetut. 
Psalms44:17 Kabwanjech chuto tugul; ago tomo keutienen, Ama kiboisie kayomiseng’ung’ eng’ lembechek." 
Psalms44:18 Ama weekyingei let mugulelwekyok, Ama masta kelyekyok kometo oreng’ung’;" 
Psalms44:19 Agot ye kiibirech mising’ eng’ oldab suik, Ak kiitugenech uruetab meet." 
Psalms44:20 Ngo kageutie kainetab Kamuktaindennyo, Anan ketokyi eunekyok cheptalelit;" 
Psalms44:21 Ko tos macheng’ei Kamuktaindet nito? Amu ingen ung’otikab muguleldo. 
Psalms44:22 Iman, kibarech betut komugul agobo inye; Kiitech ko u kechirek che bo eng’set." 
Psalms44:23 Ee Kiptaiyat, ng’eet, amu nee si iru? Ng’eet, amebagaktech agoi." 
Psalms44:24 Amu nee si iuny togeng’ung’, Ak iutie nyalildanyo ak sastaennyo?" 
Psalms44:25 Amu kagong’urukso sobonwekyok kotokyigei temburiek: Kanamgei mootinwekyok ak ng’ony. 
Psalms44:26 Ng’eet, toretech, Ak itiachech amu chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala." 
Psalms45:1 Ing’irtogei tuguk che miach eng’ muguleldanyu; Amwaitoi tuguk che kiayai agobo laitoriat: Kergei ng’elyeptanyu ak ne sirisie sirindet ne ng’om. 
Psalms45:2 Isiire werikab bik eng’ kororonindo; Kirong’jin kuting’ung’ mieindo: Eng’ noto anyun kigoberurin Kamuktaindet koigeny. 
Psalms45:3 Ee, rat rotweng’ung’ bo chok, inye ne kim, Koboto konding’ung’ ak etunateng’ung’." 
Psalms45:4 Ak iwendote eng’ etunateng’ung’ eng’ kaberuret, Amu imanit ak kaming’inetab ge ak imanda: Ak inetin eung’ung’ ne bo tai boisiosiek che imuisei." 
Psalms45:5 Ng’atiben kipchaboniguk; Ak kobutyin bik kelyeguk Eng’ mugulelwekab bunikab laitoriat; 
Psalms45:6 Ee Kamuktaindet, tebyei koigeny ak koigeny ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo laitornatet; Siaritab imanda ko siaritab bounateng’ung’." 
Psalms45:7 Kiicham imanda, ak kiiwech tengekto; Eng’ noto anyun kigoiilin Kamuktaindet, inendet Kamuktaindeng’ung’ Eng’ mwaita ne bo boiboiyet kosiir siritoiguk." 
Psalms45:8 Ng’uu ngoroiguk tugul nyamdutiet ne bo tuguk che u igomoik, ak ahalot ak kasia; Kiibaibain kibugandinik che bo inoik che mi gorikab laitorinik che bo kelekab belek." 
Psalms45:9 Mi tibikab laitorinik koboto chebiosok che konyitotin: Tononi osotiotab laitoriat eng’ eung’ung’ ne bo tai kolaachi tahabu ne bunu Opir. 
Psalms45:10 Ee chebi, kas ak iruchi, ak ieb it; Iutie biguk agichek, ak bikab gotab kwandang’ung’;" 
Psalms45:11 Ak kocham anyun laitoriat kororonindang’ung’; Amu inendet Kiptaiyandeng’ung’; ak igutung’jini. 
Psalms45:12 Ak tun mi cheptab Turo, kotinyei konunet; Ak kosaisain magorek." 
Psalms45:13 Tinyei cheptab laitoriat teegisto mising’ eng’ go: Kiginapchi ngoroikyik tahabu. 
Psalms45:14 Kimutyin laitoriat kolaachi ngoroik che kiginde lelesta: Kimutu bergeinik che choronokyik che isubu inendet, Kobwa oldang’ung’." 
Psalms45:15 Kimutu eng’ kagasetab ge ak boiboindo: Agoi koba gotab laitoriat orit. 
Psalms45:16 Iyae weriguk koek bounik eng’ ng’ony komugul, Ne kata kwanisieguk, Ayae kaineng’ung’ koek ne kibwati eng’ ibinwek tugul:" 
Psalms45:17 Ak kolosun bik agoi koigeny ak koigeny eng’ noto. 
Psalms46:1 Kamuktaindet ole kemwechini, ak kimnatennyo, Toretindet ne negit ye mi nyalilda." 
Psalms46:2 Magiyweisiei anyun amu noto, agot ngowalak ng’ony, Ak ngoba tulonok kwenutab nyanjosiek;" 
Psalms46:3 Agot ngo tulei beekwak ak kowasegei, Agot ngo botanso tulonok amu menotenywa." 
Psalms46:4 Mi ainet, ne iboiboi kererusiekyik nganasetab Kamuktaindet, Ole tilil ole mi gorikab Inendet ne Toror Mising’." 
Psalms46:5 Mi Kamuktaindet kwenunnyi; ama kiistoi: Toreti Kamuktaindet inendet ko kaeech. 
Psalms46:6 Kibolyo bororiosiek, ak kiwasgei bounatosiek: Kitwek inendet ak kichoot ng’ony." 
Psalms46:7 Mi kobotech Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: Ole kimwechini Kamuktaindetab Jakobo. 
Psalms46:8 Obwa, ogeer boisionikab Jehovah, Tuguk che kikwong’e che kiyai inendet eng’ ng’ony." 
Psalms46:9 Igesu inendet lugosiek eng’ ng’ony; Iriei kwanget, ak iriei ng’otit; Ak kobeel karisiek eng’ mat." 
Psalms46:10 Osisie, onai ole a Kamuktaindet: Kitorora eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek, Kitorora eng’ ng’ony." 
Psalms46:11 Mi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kobotech; Ole kimwechini Kamuktaindetab Jakobo. 
Psalms47:1 Oraprab eunekwok, okwek bik tugul; Ooren eng’ Kamuktaindet eng’ cheetab katerteret." 
Psalms47:2 Amu bo kamuiset Jehovah ne Toror Mising’; Inendet ko Laitoriat ne o ne bou ng’ony komugul. 
Psalms47:3 Iterterwech inendet bik si kebou, Ak koterterwech bororiosiek eng’ kelyekyok." 
Psalms47:4 Lewenwech inendet borotennyo, Telunatetab Jakobo ne kichamei." 
Psalms47:5 Kitogosta Kamuktaindet eng’ tulet, Kitogosta Jehovah ak cheetab iriaget." 
Psalms47:6 Otienji Kamuktaindet eng’ kalosunoik, otien kalosunoik: Otienji Laitoriandennyo eng’ kalosunoik, otien kalosunoik." 
Psalms47:7 Amu Kamuktaindet ko Laitoriatab ng’ony komugul: Olosu eng’ naet. 
Psalms47:8 Bou Kamuktaindet bororiosiek: Tebe Kamuktaindet ng’echerennyi ne tilil ne bo laitornatet. 
Psalms47:9 Kagoyumgei kiruogikab bik Koek bikab Kamuktaindetab Abraham: Amu bo Kamuktaindet long’osiekab ng’ony; Toror inendet mising’. 
Psalms48:1 O Jehovah, ak kanyol kilos mising’, Eng’ nganaset ne bo Kamuktaindennyo eng’ tulwennyi ne tilil." 
Psalms48:2 Mi tulwetab Sion ole kararan, ole toogunot, inendet boiboindab ng’ony komugul, Ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam, Nganasetab Laitoriat ne o." 
Psalms48:3 Kigoborgei Kamuktaindet eng’ gorik che eechen che bo nganasanato koek ole kimwechin. 
Psalms48:4 Ogeero, kigoyumgei laitorinik, Ak kisiirto tugul kibagenge." 
Psalms48:5 Kigeer nganasanato, yeityo kotang’ang’ji; Kitoptobenso, ak kiba kochakta." 
Psalms48:6 Kibotanso, eng’ oloto; Kinyor ng’wanindo ko u kwondo ne machei kosigis." 
Psalms48:7 Ibute melisiek che bo Tarsis Eng’ usonet ne bunu kong’asis. 
Psalms48:8 Kigigeer ko u ye kigigas Eng’ nganasetab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, eng’ nganasetab Kamuktaindennyo: Igimiti Kamuktaindet agoi koigeny." 
Psalms48:9 Kigibwat agobo chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala, ee Kamuktaindet, Eng’ hekalung’ung’ orit." 
Psalms48:10 Ko u ole teptoi kaineng’ung’, ee Kamuktaindet, Ko u noto kalosuneng’ung’ agoi tabanwekab ng’ony: Nyiitat imanda eung’ung’ ne bo tai." 
Psalms48:11 Ingogasgei tulwetab Sion, Ingoboiboitu tibikab Juda, Amu kiruogutiguk." 
Psalms48:12 Obendate Sion, omuut: Oiit teeksosiek che koen." 
Psalms48:13 Obwat komie irimoikyik, Obwat gorikyik che eechen; Si kobiit omwachi ibinda ne biitu let." 
Psalms48:14 Amu Kamuktaindet nito ko Kamuktaindennyo koigeny ak koigeny: Inendet kandoindennyo agoi meet. 
Psalms49:1 Ogas ni, okwek bik tugul; Oeb it, okwek tugul che omenye ng’ony:" 
Psalms49:2 Che ma toogunotin ak che toogunotin, Tuwai, magoriot ak kibananiat." 
Psalms49:3 Ng’alale kutinnyu ng’omnatet; Bo naet kabwatutikab muguleldanyu. 
Psalms49:4 Aepchini it kalewenet: Ak ang’any mwaennyu ne bo ung’ot eng’ ketubet. 
Psalms49:5 Amu nee si aiyweis eng’ betusiekab yaitiet, Ye yiema tengekto ne isubwa?" 
Psalms49:6 Icheget che imang’u tugukwak, Ak kolosunegei chang’indab magornatosiekwak;"
