Psalms49:7 Mami eng’ ichek ne imuchi kotiach ng’etab kamet eng’ or age tugul, Ago temene kogochi Kamuktaindet kit ne kitiage inendet;" 
Psalms49:8 (Amu bichii kit ne kitiage sobonwekwak, Ak kanyol kebagakta agoi:)" 
Psalms49:9 Si kobiit kosob inendet agoi, Si mageer ng’emisiet." 
Psalms49:10 Amu keerei inendet kole begu che ng’omen, Ak begu tuwai ne berber ak ne u tiony, Ak kobagakyi bik alak tugukwak." 
Psalms49:11 Amu ibwati ichek eng’ kabwatutikwak kole, tebyei gorikwak koigeny, Ak len tebyei meng’otosiekwak eng’ ibinwek tugul; Kuurtoe emotinwekwak kainaikwak." 
Psalms49:12 Ago matebyei chi eng’ teegisto: U tiong’ik che begu. 
Psalms49:13 Bo berberindo oraninywa: Ak chamei bik alage che biitu ng’ololutikwak. 
Psalms49:14 Kigichopchi ichek oldab meet ko u kechirek; Egu meet mestowondenywa; Ak koboi che bo iman ichek karon; Ak bunjin itondanywa oldab meet, konun, si mabiit ole menyei." 
Psalms49:15 Ago itiachi Kamuktaindet sobondanyu komong’une kimnatetab meet: Amu taacha. 
Psalms49:16 Ameiywei ye kagigochi chi magornatet, Ye katesak konditab gonnyi:" 
Psalms49:17 Amu maibei kiy ye me; Machortagei teegistanyi kosubi inendet. 
Psalms49:18 Agot nga kiiberuri sobondanyi ye kita kosobei, Ak kolosun bik, ye iyachinigei ne mie," 
Psalms49:19 Wendi ibindab kwanisiekyik; Ama kogeerei ichek lapkeiyet koigeny. 
Psalms49:20 Kergei ak tiong’ik che begu, Chito ne tinyei teegisto, ama tinyei ng’omnatet." 
Psalms50:1 Katwek Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindet Jehovah, Ak kaguur ng’ony koboch ko kachor asis agoi kororokto." 
Psalms50:2 Kamong’ Kamuktaindet koluu, Eng’ Sion, kororonindo ne igesunotgei." 
Psalms50:3 Nyonei Kamuktaindennyo, ama sisei: Beelei mat eng’ tainnyi kowong’u, Ak komuut inendet usonet ne o." 
Psalms50:4 Kuurei kipsengwetisiek che mi barak, Ak koguur ng’ony, si kobiit koruokyi bikyik:" 
Psalms50:5 Oyumja bikyuk che tililen; Choto che kigiyomisge ak ichek eng’ tiseiywek. 
Psalms50:6 Ak mwaitoi kipsengwetisiek imandanyi; Amu Kamuktaindet inendet kiruogindet. 
Psalms50:7 Oeb it, ee bikyuk, si ang’alal; Ee Israel, si abaorianun: A Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Psalms50:8 Magerin kong’ agobo tiseiyweguk; Ak mi tainnyu kagochinoiguk che kebeelei kotugul. 
Psalms50:9 Makwerie tany eng’ kaptugung’ung’, Anan kwesta eng’ akwotisieguk." 
Psalms50:10 Amu nenyu tiony age tugul ne bo timin, Ak tuga che mitei tulonok elfut." 
Psalms50:11 Angen taritik tugul che mitei tulonok: Ak chechuk tiong’ikab warenget. 
Psalms50:12 Nda ama rubet, ko mamwaun: Amu nenyu ng’ony, ak tugukyik che nyiitat oloto." 
Psalms50:13 Tos aame banyekab kirugiguk, Anan aee korotikab ng’ororek?" 
Psalms50:14 Igochi Kamuktaindet korosiotab kongoi; Ak yaakyi Inendet ne Toror Mising’ arorutiguk: 
Psalms50:15 Ak iguura eng’ betutab nyalilda; Asi asorun, ak iloswa." 
Psalms50:16 Ago lenjin Kamuktaindet kiptengekyot, Itinye nee inye, si imwae ng’atutikyuk, Ak kende arorutiennyu kuting’ung’?" 
Psalms50:17 Amu inye ne iweche kotigonet, Ak ituktochini batai ng’alekyuk." 
Psalms50:18 Ye kiigeer chorindet, ochamnyechi tuwai, Ak itinye yamdaet ak che ibegei." 
Psalms50:19 Kiichamji kuting’ung’ komwa yaitiet, Ak chobei ng’elyeptang’ung’ ng’alset." 
Psalms50:20 Itebye ak ichaame ng’etab komet; Itaami weritab komet. 
Psalms50:21 Kiiyai tuguchuto, ak kiasis; Kiilen ki kerge ak inye: Ago amache agerin kong’, ak atete tugul eng’ taing’ung’." 
Psalms50:22 Ara anyun obwat chuto, okwek che outie Kamuktaindet, Si matonak, ama biitu chi ne soruok:" 
Psalms50:23 Age tugul ne igoitoi korosiotab kongoi ko noto ne iloswa; Ak inendet ne chobei atebennyi komie Aborjini yetunetab Kamuktaindet. 
Psalms51:1 Rirenage, ee Kamuktaindet, ko u chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala: Tindiny bistoennyu eng’ chang’indab rirenosieguk." 
Psalms51:2 Iundoena inne tengektanyu, Ak itilila eng’ ng’ogistanyu." 
Psalms51:3 Amu ang’anye bistautikyuk: Ak mi tainnyu ng’ogistanyu kotugul. 
Psalms51:4 Kiayaun tengekto inyendet inyege, Ak kiayai ne ya eng’ taing’ung’: Si kobiit kindein imanda ye ing’alali, Ak kotook tililindang’ung’ ye iruochi." 
Psalms51:5 Keero, kigisikta tengekto; Ak kimanakta kamennyu chalwok." 
Psalms51:6 Keero, imache imanit eng’ kebeberwek che bo orit: Ak ineta ng’omnatet eng’ ole ung’at." 
Psalms51:7 Iunena husop, si atililit: Iuna, si atililit kosiir teluchi." 
Psalms51:8 Kona agas kagasetab ge ak boiboindo; Si koboiboitu kowek che kiiri. 
Psalms51:9 Ung’e togeng’ung’ ng’ogiswekyuk, Ak itindiny tengekwogikyuk tugul." 
Psalms51:10 Yaiywa muguleldo ne tilil, ee Kamuktaindet; Ak iyai tamirmiriennyu koleelit ak iyuokyi eng’ orit." 
Psalms51:11 Ametorta eng’ ole imi; Ameistoena Tamirmirieng’ung’ ne Tilil. 
Psalms51:12 Ak iweekwa boiboiyetab yetuneng’ung’: Ak inama atonon eng’ tamirmiriet ne chamdaat. 
Psalms51:13 Yeityo anet anyun bistoik ortinweguk; Ak koweekyingei kiptengeginik. 
Psalms51:14 Sorua eng’ ng’ogistab korotik, ee Kamuktaindet, inye Kamuktaindetab yetunennyu; Ak kotien kutinnyu imandang’ung’." 
Psalms51:15 Yat kutinnyu, ee Kiptaiyat; Ak komwaita kutinnyu kalosuneng’ung’." 
Psalms51:16 Amu mebaibaitune tiseiywot; ta kagonin: Mebaibaitune kogochinoik che kibeelei. 
Psalms51:17 Korosekab Kamuktaindet ko tamirmiriet ne kigoil: Ee Kamuktaindet, mesase muguleldo ne kigoil ak kotinyei sigunet." 
Psalms51:18 Yachi ne mie Sion ko u ye ichame; Teech irimoikab Jerusalem. 
Psalms51:19 Si ibaibaitu anyun eng’ tiseiywekab imanda, eng’ kagochinet ne kibeelei ak kagochinet ne kibeelei komugul: Eng’ yoto anyun kogoito ichek kirugik konde kaptisisieng’ung’." 
Psalms52:1 Amu nee si ilosuge eng’ yaitiet, ee inye ne chito korom, Tebyei rirenetab Kamuktaindet kotugul." 
Psalms52:2 Chobei ng’elyeptang’ung’ tengekto; Boisiei eng’ ng’alset ko u rotwet ne ng’atib. 
Psalms52:3 Ichame yaitiet kosiir ne mie; Ak ichame lembech kosiir ye imwae imanda. 
Psalms52:4 Ichame ng’alek tugul che amei bich, Ee inye, ng’elyepta ne ng’alsei." 
Psalms52:5 Ng’emin Kamuktaindet ko u noto koigeny, Istoin, ak kong’usun eng’ meng’ateng’ung’, Ak kotutin eng’ emetab che soptos." 
Psalms52:6 Keerei che bo imanda, ak koiywei, Ak kororechi inendet kole," 
Psalms52:7 Ogeero, nito chito ne kima cham koek kimnatennyi Kamuktaindet; Ago kiimang’ chang’indab magornatosiekyik, Ak kiigimitgei eng’ tengektanyi." 
Psalms52:8 Ago ane, agergeitu ak emdit ne tuon ne bitei eng’ gotab Kamuktaindet: Amang’u rirenetab Kamuktaindet agoi koigeny ak koigeny." 
Psalms52:9 Awegun kongoi, amu kiiyai inye: Ak ageni kaineng’ung’, amu mie, eng’ taitab biguk che tililen." 
Psalms53:1 Kigomwa ne berber eng’ muguleldanyi, kole, Mami Kamuktaindet. Kigong’emogis ichek, kigoyai tengekto ne kiwechei; Mami ne yaei ne mie." 
Psalms53:2 Kiing’urur Kamuktaindet eng’ kipsengwet werikab bik, Kole kogeer ngo mi ne ng’om, Ne cheng’ei Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms53:3 Kigoweektagei let age tugul eng’ ichek; kigosamisitu tugul; Mami ne yaei ne mie, achicha, mami agot agenge." 
Psalms53:4 Tos matinyei kaguiyet yaikab tengekto, Che amei bikyuk ko u ye amei amitwogik, Ama kuurei Kamuktaindet?" 
Psalms53:5 Kiiywei mising’ eng’ oloto, ole kima komi ng’oiyondit: Amu kigoser Kamuktaindet kowekab inendet ne setyinin; Kiigochi kolilanso, amu kigoesio Kamuktaindet ichek." 
Psalms53:6 Kita mie nda kiga bun yetunetab Israel Sion! Ye tun weechi Kamuktaindet bikyik che kigiluul, Koboiboitu anyun Jakobo, ak kogasgei Israel." 
Psalms54:1 Sorua, ee Kamuktaindet, eng’ kaineng’ung’, Ak ibesiewa eng’ kimnateng’ung’." 
Psalms54:2 Kas saennyu, ee Kamuktaindet; Epchi it ng’alekab kutinnyu." 
Psalms54:3 Amu kang’eetya toek che machei kogirinda, Amu kogocheng’ ichek che koromen sobondanyu: Ma cham ichek konde Kamuktaindet tainywa." 
Psalms54:4 Ogeero, toretindennyu Kamuktaindet; Mi Kiptaiyat komostab ichek che tiie sobondanyu." 
Psalms54:5 Yaakyin yaitiet bunikyuk: Ng’em ichek eng’ imaning’ung’. 
Psalms54:6 Agonin korosiot ne bo chamnyet: Aweekyini kongoi kaineng’ung’, ee Jehovah, amu mie." 
Psalms54:7 Amu kigosorua eng’ nyalilda tugul; Ak kigogeer konyekyuk kit ne kiamache eng’ bunikyuk. 
Psalms55:1 Epchi it saennyu, ee Kamuktaindet; Ameung’egei somsennyu." 
Psalms55:2 Kaswa, ak iwolwa: Aiimige amamuunyi eng’ kabwatutikyuk, ak atigeni;" 
Psalms55:3 Amu kutitab bunyot, Amu surietab kiptengekyot; Amu wirjina tengekto, Ak wecha eng’ neregek." 
Psalms55:4 Tinyei ng’wanindo ne o muguleldanyu: Ak kagobutya kamuisosiekab meet. 
Psalms55:5 Kagobwanja kaiyweisiet ak botanet, Ak kagotucha arogenet." 
Psalms55:6 Ak kiale, Bwa, nda katinye kebebaik ko u cheptuget! Ta kaatiriren, ak amuuny." 
Psalms55:7 Keero, ta kiawe ole loo, Ak ameny ong’atet." 
Psalms55:8 Ta kiasib amwechi ole aung’egei Eng’ usonet ne korom ak kipchurjuriet. 
Psalms55:9 Ng’em, ee Kiptaiyat, ak itoiye ng’elyebwekwak: Amu koageer koromnatet ak boriet eng’ nganaset." 
Psalms55:10 Yiemei irimosiek bet ak kemoi; Mi kwenutab nganaset tengekto ak wasetab ge. 
Psalms55:11 Mi tengekto kwenunnyi: Maistoegei suriet ak ng’alset ortinwekyik. 
Psalms55:12 Amu kima ko bunyot ne kirosya: Nda ki bunyot ta kiamuitoi: Ama inendet ne kiwecha ne kiilosunenagei; Amu ta kiaung’egei inendet: 
Psalms55:13 Ago ki inye ne kiaechine, Choruennyu ak ne kingenge." 
Psalms55:14 Kiging’alaljige eng’ ng’alek che anyiny, Ak kigibe gotab Jehovah koboto tuiyet." 
Psalms55:15 Ingoche meet ichek, Ak ingororokyi keringet kosoptos: Amu mitei yaitwogik gorikwak ak kwenunywa." 
Psalms55:16 Ago aguure ane Kamuktaindet; Ak kosorua Jehovah. 
Psalms55:17 Atigeni, ak arire, koskoleny, ak karon, ak bet kwen: Si kogas kutinnyu inendet." 
Psalms55:18 Kigotiach sobondanyu eng’ kalyet eng’ luget ne kimachei kogirindaa: Amu ki chang’ ichek che kibelige: 
Psalms55:19 Kasei Kamuktaindet, ak kowolji ichek, Agot inendet ne kimi koboch keny, Bik che ma walaksei, Ama konyiti Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms55:20 Kigoita eunekyik kole konam che kitinyei kalyet ak inendet: Kigosamis kayomisennyi. 
Psalms55:21 Ki chabai kutinnyi kosiir mwaitab chego, Ago kimi luget muguleldanyi: Ki tangus ng’alekyik kosiir mwaita, Ago ki rotokab chok che kaging’us." 
Psalms55:22 Ituuchi Jehovah nyigisindang’ung’, si kotiin: Magoi cham inendet keisto ne bo imanda." 
Psalms55:23 Ago inye Kamuktaindet, irorogu koba keringetab ng’emisiet: Matarei rumik ak ng’alik kebebertab betusiekwak; Ago amang’un inye." 
Psalms56:1 Rirena, ee Kamuktaindet, amu machei kolugua bik: Boriena, kousa bet komugul." 
Psalms56:2 Machei kolugua bunikyuk eng’ betut komugul: Amu chang’ che boriena eng’ menotet. 
Psalms56:3 Amang’un, Eng’ betut ne aiyweisiei." 
Psalms56:4 Eng’ Kamuktaindet alosu ng’olyondennyi: Kamuktaindet ne amang’u, maiyweisiei: Imuchi koita nee chi?" 
Psalms56:5 Walei ng’alekyuk koyaagitu bet komugul: Tokyina yaitiet eng’ kabwatutikwak. 
Psalms56:6 Iyumigei, ak kounyegei, Riboti kakwautikyuk, Ko u ye kigosetyi sobondanyu." 
Psalms56:7 Tos chililso eng’ tengekto? Iluul bik eng’ neregeguk, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms56:8 Iiti ombenennyu: Inde beekyuk bo kong’ soteng’ung’; Tos mami choto bukuing’ung’? 
Psalms56:9 Si koweekyigei let bunikyuk eng’ betut ne aguursei: Angen nito ale, mi Kamuktaindet komostanyu." 
Psalms56:10 Eng’ Kamuktaindet alosu ng’olyondennyi. Eng’ Jehovah alosu ng’olyondennyi. 
Psalms56:11 Kamuktaindet ne amang’u, maiyweisiei; Tos imuchi koita nee chi?" 
Psalms56:12 Mitei baragunnyu kayosiautiguk, ee Kamuktaindet: Agonin inye konunoikab kongoi." 
Psalms56:13 Amu kiisoru sobondanyu eng’ meet: Tos kima isoru kelyekyuk si mabut? Si awendote taitab Kamuktaindet Eng’ lapkeiyetab sobondo. 
Psalms57:1 Rirena, ee Kamuktaindet, rirena; Amu mwechinin sobondanyu: Ee, amwechini uruetab kebebaiguk, Agoi kosiirto nyalilwogichu." 
Psalms57:2 Arirjini Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’; Inendet Kamuktaindet ne isuldawa tuguk tugul. 
Psalms57:3 Iyogu eng’ kipsengwet, kosorua, Ye renya ne machei kolugua; Iyogu Kamuktaindet rirenennyi ak imaninnyi." 
Psalms57:4 Mitei sobondanyu kwenutab ng’etunyik; Arue kwenutab ichek che mitei mat, Agot werikab bik, che kelekwak ko ng’otwek ak kipchabonik, Ak ng’elyebwekwak ko rotok che ng’atiben." 
Psalms57:5 Tororitu, ee Kamuktaindet, isiir kipsengwetisiek; Ingoeet teegistang’ung’ eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Psalms57:6 Kagoriich mestet si konam kelyekyuk; Kagong’uruk sobondanyu: Kagobal ichek keringet eng’ tainnyu; Kagororokyi icheget oloto. 
Psalms57:7 Igiilotgei muguleldanyu, ee Kamuktaindet, igiilotgei muguleldanyu: Atieni, ee atieni kalosunoik." 
Psalms57:8 Ng’eet, torornatennyu; ng’eet, kibugandet ak ketubet: Ang’eete ko kairir emet." 
Psalms57:9 Aweegun kongoi, ee Kiptaiyat, eng’ kwenutab bik; Atienun kalosunoik eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek." 
Psalms57:10 Amu o rireneng’ung’ agoi kipsengwetisiek, Ak itei imaning’ung’ barak." 
Psalms57:11 Tororitu, ee Kamuktaindet, isiir kipsengwetisiek, Ingoeet teegistang’ung’ eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Psalms58:1 Tos omwae inne eng’ sisek imanda? Tos oruochi eng’ imanda okwek werikab bik? 
Psalms58:2 Ee, oyae tengekto eng’ muguleldo; Ak oyae koromnatetab eunekwok eng’ ng’ony." 
Psalms58:3 Betyotin kiptengeginik koboch komi mo: Mastoi koboch ko kagisich, komwaei lembechek." 
Psalms58:4 Ng’wonenywa ko u ng’wonetab ndaret; Kergei ichek ak erenet ne magastoi, ne timei itikyik;" 
Psalms58:5 Ne maepchin it kutitab bik che kuurei erenok. Matiny kaguur eng’ ng’omnatet. 
Psalms58:6 Ee Kamuktaindet, iri kelekwak eng’ kutuswekwak: Ee Jehovah, icheru kelek che eechen che bo ng’etunyik che neran." 
Psalms58:7 Ingochootyo koigei beek che rootei: Ak ye kagersach kipchabonikyik, ingoigei ichek che machei kotonogis." 
Psalms58:8 Ingoigei kimng’elyegut ne chootei kowong’ugei: Ak ingoigei kwondo ne karorok moet, ne ma keer asis." 
Psalms58:9 Kotom kogas terenikwok matab katok, Istoi inendet ichek eng’ kipchurjuriet, che tuonen ak che laldos kogergeit." 
Psalms58:10 Baibai ne bo imanda ye keerei yaaktaetab mugetut: Iune kelyekyik korotikab kiptengeginik. 
Psalms58:11 Si komwa bik kole, Mitei iman melekto ne bo chito ne bo imanda: Mi iman Kamuktaindet ne iruochi eng’ ng’ony." 
Psalms59:1 Sorua eng’ bunikyuk, ee Kamuktaindennyu; Ieeta asiir ichek che ng’eetyina." 
Psalms59:2 Sorua eng’ yaikab tengekto, Ak isorua eng’ bik che chamei kotumda korotik." 
Psalms59:3 Amu, keero, ratei ichek oret agobo sobondanyu; Kagoyumjagei che kimen: Ma amu bistoennyu, anan tengektanyu, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms59:4 Ruaei ichek kochobegei ma amu lelutiennyu: Ng’eet inye, toreta, ak igeer." 
Psalms59:5 Agot inye, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindetab lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, Ng’eet ibokyi bororiosiek: Amat irire bistoik alak tugul che yaach." 
Psalms59:6 Weeksei ichek koskoleny, ikwari ko u seset, Ak bendi koyiemei nganaset." 
Psalms59:7 Keero, ing’irugei ng’alek eng’ kutuswekwak; Mitei rotok kutuswekwak: Amu mwaei kole, ng’o ne kasei?" 
Psalms59:8 Ago irorechini inye Jehovah; Irenye bororiosiek. 
Psalms59:9 Ee kimnatennyu, agenin: Amu irimennyu ne koi Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms59:10 Indoena Kamuktaindennyu ne bo rirenet: Tun chamwa Kamuktaindet ageer magennyu eng’ bunikyuk. 
Psalms59:11 Amebar ichek, si mautie bikyuk; Iyeste bichoto eng’ kimnateng’ung’, ak ichooru, Ee Kiptaiyat long’ennyo." 
Psalms59:12 Ingenam ichek eng’ menotenywa, Amu tengektab kutuswekwak, ak ng’alekab ng’elyebwekwak, Ak amu chubisiet ak lembechek che mwaei." 
Psalms59:13 Iwong’u ichek eng’ neregek, iwong’u anyun, kot ko ma komi. Ak mie konai ichek kole bou Kamuktaindet eng’ Jakobo, Agoi tabanwekab ng’ony." 
Psalms59:14 Ak ingoweech gei ichek koskoleny, ingokwario ko u seset, Ak ingoba koyiem ngnaset." 
Psalms59:15 Ombenoti kocheng’oti amitwogik, Ak kotebi kemout komugul ngo ma biyong’so." 
Psalms59:16 Ago atieni agobo kimnateng’ung’; Ee, atieni agobo rireneng’ung’ karon: Amu inye ko ki i irimennyu ne koi, Ak ole amwechini eng’ betutab bichiindo." 
Psalms59:17 Ee kimnatennyu, atienun inye kalosunoik: Amu Kamuktaindet ko irimennyu ne koi, ak Kamuktaindetab rirenennyu." 
Psalms60:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, kiiwirtech, kiiyestech; Kiinerech; ee iweechech kogeny." 
Psalms60:2 Kiitumdum emet; ak kiibeet emet: Isoob ole kigobetak; amu botani. 
Psalms60:3 Kiiborji biguk tuguk che koromen: Kiigonech kee divaik che kibogiti. 
Psalms60:4 Kiigochi che iywein songoliet, Si kobarta amu imanda." 
Psalms60:5 Si kesor chamaniguk, Soru eng’ eung’ung’ ne bo tai, ak iwolwech." 
Psalms60:6 Kigotwek Kamuktaindet eng’ tililindanyi; kole, Agasige: Apchee Sekem, ak akwa atebwetab Sukot." 
Psalms60:7 Nenyu Gilead, ak nenyu Manase; Epraim agine ko kimnatetab metinnyu: Juda ko siarinnyu ne bo laitornatet." 
Psalms60:8 Moab ko teret ne aunege; Awirjini kweiyondennyu Edom: Oren inye Pilistia amu ane. 
Psalms60:9 Imuta ng’o awa nganaset ne kim? Indoiywa ng’o agoi Edom? 
Psalms60:10 Tos ma inye ne kiiwirtech, ee Kamuktaindet? Ama iwe inye koboto lugosiekyok, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms60:11 Konech toretet kegirindae bunyot: Amu matilei kiy toretetab chi. 
Psalms60:12 Kiterterisiei eng’ nyiganatet eng’ Kamuktaindet: Amu inendet ne tiekyin ng’ony bunikyok. 
Psalms61:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, kaswa rirekyuk; Epchi it saennyu." 
Psalms61:2 Aguurin eng’ tabandab ng’ony, ye kagotanui muguleldanyu: Imutya ruandet ne koi kosiira." 
Psalms61:3 Amu inye ko i ole amwechini, Ak ko i got ne koi ne kim ole aung’ege eng’ bunik." 
Psalms61:4 Amenye gong’ung’ koigeny: Amwechini oldab ung’ot ne bo kebebaiguk. 
Psalms61:5 Amu inye, ee Kamuktaindet ne kiigas kaarortaosiekyuk: Kiigona borotetab icheget che konyiti kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms61:6 Itesyini laitoriat betusiek: Tarei kenyisiekyik ibinwek che chang’. 
Psalms61:7 Tebe taitab Kamuktaindet koigeny: Ee, chob chamnyet ne tala ak imanit, si korib inendet." 
Psalms61:8 Si atienjin kaineng’ung’ kalosunet koigeny, Si kobiit agoito betut age tugul che kiaarorte." 
Psalms62:1 Igeni Kamuktaindet kityo sobondanyu: Bunu yetunennyu inendet. 
Psalms62:2 Inendet inegei ruandennyu ak yetunennyu: Inendet ko irimennyu ne koi; magiistoa mising’. 
Psalms62:3 Obokyini chi kot kotianit, Ole si kobiit obar inendet, okwek tugul, Ko u inatut ne kogoimom, ak ko u ng’otwet ne negit kolul?" 
Psalms62:4 Iruochi kityo komachei kotoorta inendet amu telunatennyi; Boiboi eng’ lembechek: Iberuri eng’ kutuswekwak, ago sasisiei eng’ mugulelwekwak." 
Psalms62:5 Ee sobondanyu, igen Kamuktaindet kityo; Amu bunu kamang’unennyu inendet." 
Psalms62:6 Inendet inegei ruandennyu ak yetunennyu: Irimennyu ne koi inendet; magiistoa. 
Psalms62:7 Tinyei Kamuktaindet yetunennyu ak torornatennyu: Mi eng’ Kamuktaindet ruandetab kimnatennyu, ak ole amwechini." 
Psalms62:8 Omang’u inendet kotugul okwek, ee bichu; Orong’ji mugulelwekwok inendet: Kamuktaindet ole kemwechini." 
Psalms62:9 Iman buch bik che nyerotin, ak kiplembechonik bik che toogunotin: Ak maing’eeti kit ne kigere nyigisindo; Wisisen ichek kosiir kabuset." 
Psalms62:10 Amomang’u sastaet, Amomene rebisiet: Ngotesak magornatosiek, ko mat otiiege." 
Psalms62:11 Kitwek Kamuktaindet konyil agenge, Kiagas noto konyil aeng’, Ale, bo kimnatet Kamuktaindet:" 
Psalms62:12 Ee Kiptaiyat, neng’ung’ rirenet agine: Amu inye ne iyaakyini chi tugul ko u boisiennyi." 
Psalms63:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, inye ko i Kamuktaindennyu; acheng’in eng’ kagiiletab ge: Amei melelda sobondanyu amu machin, machin kot bortanyu, Eng’ emet ne yaamat ne bo ng’etatet, ole mami beek." 
Psalms63:2 U noto koageerin eng’ ole tilil, Si ageer kimnateng’ung’ ak torornateng’ung’." 
Psalms63:3 Amu mie chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala kosiir sobondo; Ilosun anyun kutinnyu. 
Psalms63:4 U noto kota asobe alosun: Anamjini barak eunekyuk amu kaineng’ung’. 
Psalms63:5 Biyonyi sobondanyu eng’ amset ak akwaiyet; Ak ilosun kutinnyu eng’ boiboiyet; 
Psalms63:6 Ye abwatin ami itogunnyu, Ak abwatin eng’ saisiekab kemoi." 
Psalms63:7 Amu kiiegu toretindennyu, Abaibai anyun eng’ uruetab kebebaiguk." 
Psalms63:8 Isubotin sobondanyu mising’: Nama eung’ung’ ne bo tai. 
Psalms63:9 Ago bendi ng’ony orit, Che cheng’ei kong’em sobondanyu." 
Psalms63:10 Kigoitoi kobek eng’ kimnatetab rotwetab chok: Ak kobunji lelwek. 
Psalms63:11 Ago baibai laitoriat eng’ Kamuktaindet: Igasegei age tugul ne iyostos eng’ inendet; Amu kigerei kutuswekab kiplembechonik. 
Psalms64:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, kas kutinnyu, eng’ rirekyuk: Rib sobondanyu si maiywei bunyot." 
Psalms64:2 Unya eng’ kiruogutikab ung’ot che bo che yaei tengekto; Si manyorua wasetab ge ne bo kiptengeginik: 
Psalms64:3 Che kagolit ng’elyebwekwak ko u rotwetab chok, Ak kogersach kipchabonikwak, choto ng’alek che ng’wonen:" 
Psalms64:4 Si komwok eng’ ung’ot ne igesunotgei: Ak kosib komwok inendet, amaiywei." 
Psalms64:5 Ak kicheergei eng’ maget ne ya; Kichaamjigei kouny mestonok; Kile, Ng’o ne imuchi kogeer ichek?" 
Psalms64:6 Cheng’oti tengekwogik; mwaei ichek kole, kogeyai eng’ kagiiletab ge kosulda cheng’sennyo. Bo ung’ot mising, kabwatetab chito age tugul, koboto muguleldanyi." 
Psalms64:7 Ago mwogei Kamuktaindet ichek; Ak kiguoten eng’ sainato eng’ kipchabonik. 
Psalms64:8 Kinach anyun ichek, ak komaas ichek ng’elyebwekwak: Ak tugul che keerei ichek kolelechi metowek." 
Psalms64:9 Ak koiyweis bik tugul; Ak komwaita boisietab Kamuktaindet, Ak koruochi eng’ ng’omnatet agobo boisiennyi." 
Psalms64:10 Baibai ne bo imanda eng’ Jehovah, ak komang’ inendet; Ak kogasgei tugul che bo iman eng’ mugulelwek." 
Psalms65:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, igenin kalosunet eng’ Sion: Ak keyaei che kigiarorun." 
Psalms65:2 Ee inye ne kasei saet, Bwanjinin bik tugul." 
Psalms65:3 Katemena tengekwogik: Ak iundoi inye bistaosiekyok. 
Psalms65:4 Baibai mising’ chito ne ileweni, ak imuti korikyin, Si kobiit komeny seremusieguk: Ak kebiye mieindab gong’ung’, Ole tilil eng’ hekalung’ung’." 
Psalms65:5 Ak iwolwech eng’ imanda eng’ tuguk che imuisei, Ee Kamuktaindetab yetunennyo; Inye ko i kamang’unetab komoswek tugul che bo ng’ony, Ak ne bo ichek che mi nyanjet ne loo:" 
Psalms65:6 Ne iuuiiti tulonok eng’ kimnatennyi; Ak korategei eng’ kamuktaet: 
Psalms65:7 Ne igochin tuletab nyanjosiek kosis, tuletab beek che mildogei, Ak bolatetab bik." 
Psalms65:8 Ak koiyweisiei che menyei ole loo mising’ amu kaborunoiguk: Igochini koboiboitu ole chorune asis ak ole roroktoe. 
Psalms65:9 Irutochini ng’ony, ak inagi beek, Ak iakwai mising’; Nyiitat beek ainetab Kamuktaindet: Ichopchini bik bek, ko kaichob ng’ony." 
Psalms65:10 Inyiiti beek ole kigerer eng’ ng’ony, komarane; Iripribi komoswekyik che sutotin: Itangusi eng’ ropta ne inesi; Iberuri tugukyik che bitos." 
Psalms65:11 Inyiiti kenyit mieindang’ung’; Ak sau akwaiyet eng’ ortinweguk. 
Psalms65:12 Sachin choto kewosiekab ong’atet: Ak kirate tulonok boiboindo. 
Psalms65:13 Nyiitotin kewosiek kechirek; Ak nyiitotin bek atebwosiek; Igasegei amu boiboi ak kotiendos. 
Psalms66:1 Otienji Kamuktaindet eng’ boiboiyet, ng’ony komugul:" 
Psalms66:2 Otien torornatetab kainennyi; Otoror kalosunennyi. 
Psalms66:3 Olenji Kamuktaindet, Bo kamuiset ne tia boisioniguk! Iming’injiningei buniguk amu etunatetab kimnateng’ung’." 
Psalms66:4 Tun ilosun ng’ony komugul, Ak kotienun; Tienjin kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms66:5 Obwa, ogeer boisionikab Kamuktaindet; Bo kamuiset boisionik che yachin inendet werikab bik." 
Psalms66:6 Kiwal nyanjet koek emet ne yaamat: Kilandae ainet kobunei kelyek. Kigiboiboitu eng’ inendet eng’ oloto. 
Psalms66:7 Laitorani koigeny eng’ kamuktaennyi; Keerei konyekyik bororiosiek: Amat koeetgei ngelelik. 
Psalms66:8 Olosu Kamuktaindennyo, okwek bik, Ak ongogasak kutitab kalosunennyi:" 
Psalms66:9 Ne ribei sobonwekyok kosopcho, Ak ne machamdoi keisto kelyekyok." 
Psalms66:10 Ee Kamuktaindet, kiitiemech inye: Kiitiemech, ko u ye kitieme mat feda." 
Psalms66:11 Kiimutyech mestet ne u regereiywot; Kiiratyi suenutikyok nyalilda ne o. 
Psalms66:12 Kiigochi bik kotiech metowekyok; Kigibun mat ak beek; Ago kiimutwech kebwa ole tunenot. 
Psalms66:13 Anyone gong’ung’ aibu kagochinoik che kibeelei, Ayaagun tuguk che kiaarorun," 
Psalms66:14 Choto che kimwa ng’elyeptanyu, Ak che kigomwa kutinnyu, ye kiami nyalilda." 
Psalms66:15 Ago kagochinoik che kibeelei che akwaen, Koboto nyamdutikab mengichik; Agoitoi kirugik koboto kwesik." 
Psalms66:16 Obwa, ogas, okwek tugul che oiywei Kamuktaindet, Si amwaita tuguk che kiyachi sobondanyu." 
Psalms66:17 Kiarirji eng’ kutinnyu, Ak kialosu inendet eng’ ng’elyeptanyu." 
Psalms66:18 Ye abwat tengekto eng’ muguleldanyu, Ko magaswa Kiptaiyat:" 
Psalms66:19 Ago iman kogogas Kamuktaindet: Kigoepchi it twegunetab saennyu; 
Psalms66:20 Iberurot Kamuktaindet, Ne kima timda saennyu, ak kima istoena rirenennyi." 
Psalms67:1 Ingorirenech Kamuktaindet, ak koberurech, Ak kotokyech togennyi kokwenyech;" 
Psalms67:2 Si konaak oreng’ung’ eng’ ng’ony, Ak yetuneng’ung’ eng’ bororiosiek tugul." 
Psalms67:3 Ingolosun bik, ee Kamuktaindet; Ingolosun bik tugul." 
Psalms67:4 Ingoboiboitu bororiosiek ak kotienso eng’ boiboiyet: Amu iruokyini bik eng’ imanda, Ak indochi bororiosiek eng’ ng’ony." 
Psalms67:5 Ingolosun bik, ee Kamuktaindet; Ingolosun bik tugul." 
Psalms67:6 Kigogon ng’ony iyotennyi: Iberurech Kamuktaindet, inendet Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms67:7 Iberurech Kamuktaindet; Ak kogonyit inendet komoswek tugul che bo ng’ony. 
Psalms68:1 Ingong’eet Kamuktaindet, ingoiyesta bunikyik; Ak ingomwei eng’ tainnyi che wechei inendet." 
Psalms68:2 Iyeste ichek ko u ye kiyestoi iyeto: Ko u ye chootei temeniet eng’ ye negite mat, Ko u noto ingolusyo kiptengeginik eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms68:3 Ago ingoboiboitu che bo imanda; ingogasgei eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet: Ee, ingoboiboitu eng’ kagasetab ge." 
Psalms68:4 Otienji Kamuktaindet, otienji kainennyi kalosunoik: Ochopchi oret ne o inendet ne bunei ong’atosiek, ko u ne lanyei mbartanyit. Kainennyi ko JAH; ak ogasge eng’ tainnyi." 
Psalms68:5 Kwandab che matinyei kwanda, ak ne tononjin mosogik, Ko Kamuktaindet eng’ gonnyi ne tilil." 
Psalms68:6 Igochin Kamuktaindet che mi ichegei komeng’jin ak alak: Imutyin kimonjororinik borotet: Ago menyei bistoik emet ne yaamat. 
Psalms68:7 Ee Kamuktaindet, ye kingaimande indoe biguk, Ye kiitiegoti ong’atet," 
Psalms68:8 Kobotan ng’ony, Ak kororok kipsengwetisiek eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet: Kobotan Sinai noto eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Psalms68:9 Ee Kamuktaindet, kiiyogu ropta ne o, Ak kiigimit boroteng’ung’ ye kitinyei ng’etatet." 
Psalms68:10 Kimeny oloto tuiyeng’ung’: Ee Kamuktaindet, kiichopchi che bo mieindang’ung’ kibananok." 
Psalms68:11 Igoitoi Kiptaiyat ng’olyot: O lugetab kobogorisiek che mwaitoi ng’alek. 
Psalms68:12 Mweei laitorinikab lugosiek, mweei: Ak kopchei kwondo ne ng’etu eng’ ga barunenik," 
Psalms68:13 Agot ngirue biusiekab kechirek, Ko u kebebaikab cheptuget ne kigituge feda, Ak kororikyik che kigiile tahabu che talelionen." 
Psalms68:14 Ye kiiyesta Ne bo Kamuktaet laitorinik eng’ oloto, Ko ki u ye ibuti teluchi eng’ Salmon." 
Psalms68:15 Tulwetab Kamuktaindet ko tulwetab Basan; Tinyei tulwetab Basan walisiek che koen. 
Psalms68:16 Amu nee si koamak ng’etkong’, okwek tulonok che koen, Agobo tulwet ne kigomach Kamuktaindet komeny? Ee, menyei Jehovah oloto koigeny." 
Psalms68:17 Karisiekab Kamuktaindet ko elfusiek tiptem, agot elfusiek ak elfusiek: Mi Kiptaiyat kwenunywa, eng’ Sinai, eng’ ole tilil." 
Psalms68:18 Kiitogoste barak, kiimut luulenik che kiiluul; Kiitaach bik koek kagochinoik, Ee, agot ngelelik agichek, si kobiit komeng’is Jehovah." 
Psalms68:19 Iberurot Kiptaiyat, ne ibei betut age tugul milennyo, Kamuktaindet inendet ko yetunennyo." 
Psalms68:20 Kamuktaindet eng’ achek ko Kamuktaindet ne bo sorunoik; Bo JEHOVAH Kiptaiyat ortinwek che kechilile eng’ meet. 
Psalms68:21 Ago tuei Kamuktaindet metowekab bunikyik, Metitab chito ne wendote tengektanyi." 
Psalms68:22 Kile Kiptaiyat, Amutu kogeny eng’ Basan, Amutu kogeny komong’une rirosiekab nyanjet:" 
Psalms68:23 Si kobiit irooch keldang’ung’ korotik, Si konyor ng’elyeptab seseniguk kebebertanyi eng’ bunik." 
Psalms68:24 Kigogeer ichek banweguk, ee Kamuktaindet, Banwekab Kamuktaindennyu, Laitoriandennyu, agoi ole tilil." 
Psalms68:25 Kiindo tienik, ak kiisubu che kibutei kibugandinik, Kimi kwen gotab kor che kibirei sugutisiek che mengechen." 
Psalms68:26 Olosu Kamuktaindet eng’ tuiyosiek, Olosu Kiptaiyat, che ko bo kondametutab Israel." 
Psalms68:27 Mitei Benjamin ne ming’in, bounindenywa, Mitei bounikab Juda ak tuiyenywa, Bounikab Sebulun, bounikab Naptali." 
Psalms68:28 Kigong’at Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kimnateng’ung’: Igimit, ee Kamuktaindet, noto ne kiiyai agobo achek." 
Psalms68:29 Ibun laitorinik kagochinoik Amu hekalung’ung’ eng’ Jerusalem. 
Psalms68:30 Ker kong’ tiondab timin ne mi mutwek, Chang’indab kirugik, ak moekab bik, Koming’inonugei age tugul koibu feda; Kigoiyesta inendet bik che chamei boriet." 
Psalms68:31 Tun mong’une bounik Misri; Iyogochin Etiopia eunekyik Kamuktaindet kochokyin. 
Psalms68:32 Otienji Kamuktaindet, okwek bororiosiekab ng’ony; Otienji Kiptaiyat kalosunoik;" 
Psalms68:33 Inendet ne lanyei kipsengwetisiekab kipsengwetisiek, choto bo keny; Ogeero, twegu eng’ kutinnyi, kutit ne kim." 
Psalms68:34 Ingobunji kimnatet Kamuktaindet: Mi telunatennyi Israel, Ak mi kimnatennyi baragusiek." 
Psalms68:35 Ee Kamuktaindet, kiywein eng’ oldinweguk che tililen: Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne igochin bikyik kimnatet ak kamuktaet. Iberurot Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms69:1 Sorua, ee Kamuktaindet; Amu karong’jigei beek sobondanyu." 
Psalms69:2 Karorokyi ng’atatiat ne loo, ama mi ole ketonone: Kaitu ye mi riretab beek, ole katucha maranosiek." 
Psalms69:3 Koang’et eng’ rirekyuk; kagoyaam moktanyu: Kagoimenitu konyekyuk ye ta ageni Kamuktaindennyu. 
Psalms69:4 Chang’ kosiir sumeekyuk che wecha buch; Kimen bunikyuk che mwaei lembech che machei kobara: Ak kiagoite choto che kima arebe chi. 
Psalms69:5 Ee Kamuktaindet, ingen inye berberindanyu; Ak ma ung’otin tengekwogikyuk eng’ inye." 
Psalms69:6 Ee Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, amat kolilanso che igenin amu ane: Ee Kamuktaindet ne bo Israel, amat kotewerogis agobo ane icheget che cheng’in." 
Psalms69:7 Amu kiaegu ne kirosyin agobo inye: Kigotuch togennyu kalilanet. 
Psalms69:8 Kiaegu too eng’ che kitupche, Ak kiaegu kipsagarin eng’ lagokab chebioset ne kisicha." 
Psalms69:9 Amu kiama ng’etkondab gong’ung’; Ak kigobwanja rosyinetab icheget che rosyinin. 
Psalms69:10 Ak ye kiarire, aming’init sobondanyu eng’ karugutetab ge, Koek noto ne kirosya." 
Psalms69:11 Ye kialaagoti kuniet, Aegu kalewenet eng’ ichek." 
Psalms69:12 Ng’alali agobo ane che tebyei eng’ ormarich; Ak kiaegu tiendab kibogitinik. 
Psalms69:13 Ago ane, asain, ee Jehovah, eng’ betut ne chamaksei: Ee Kamuktaindet, eng’ chang’indab rireneng’ung’, Wolwa eng’ imandab yetuneng’ung’." 
Psalms69:14 Sorua eng’ ng’atatiat, si malugua: Unda achilil eng’ icheget che wecha, ak eng’ riretab beek." 
Psalms69:15 Amengotucha mogochek, Ak amengolugua riret; Amengoger kutinnyi keringet kota ami orit." 
Psalms69:16 Wolwa Jehovah, amu mie chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala: Iweekyage ko u chang’indab rirenosieguk." 
Psalms69:17 Ak ameung’e togeng’ung’ kiboitiondeng’ung’; Chokyi wolwa, amu ami tiritindo." 
Psalms69:18 Rikyi sobondanyu, ak itiach: Sorua amu bunikyuk." 
Psalms69:19 Ingen rosyinet ne kirosyina, ak kalilanennyu, ak tewernatennyu: Mitei taing’ung’ bunikyuk tugul." 
Psalms69:20 Kogoiri muguleldanyu rosyinet; ak a rumot: Ak kiagen che tinyei rirenet, ago kima biit; Ak che imuchi kogaigai chi, ago ma anyoru." 
Psalms69:21 Kigona tuguk che ng’wonen koek amitwogik; Ak ye kiama melel konaga siki aee. 
Psalms69:22 Ingoek mestet mesenywa ne mi tainywa; Ak ingoek mestet ye mi ichek eng’ kalyet. 
Psalms69:23 Ingoimenitu konyekwak, si mageer kiy; Ak igochi kobotanso suenutikwak kotugul." 
Psalms69:24 Rong’ji ichek nyitateng’ung’, Ak ingonam ichek koromindab neregeguk," 
Psalms69:25 Ingoguber ole menyei; Amat komeny chi emaisiekwak. 
Psalms69:26 Amu usei ichek inendet ne kiibir; Ak komwaoti agobo arogenetab ichek che kiiguoten. 
Psalms69:27 Tesyi tengekto age tengektanywa: Ak amat kobwanji ichek imandang’ung’. 
Psalms69:28 Ingibukto ichek eng’ bukuitab sobon, Amat kesir koboto che bo imanda." 
Psalms69:29 Ago a kibananiat ak atinye arogenet: Ingotorora yetuneng’ung’, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms69:30 Alosu kainetab Kamuktaindet eng’ tiendo, Ak amwae kongoi atorori inendet." 
Psalms69:31 Ak kobaibai noto Jehovah kosiir eito, Anan kirgit ne tinyei kuinoik ak siok." 
Psalms69:32 Kagogeer che taloen, ak kogasgei: Ingosopcho mugulelwekwok, okwek che ocheng’e Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms69:33 Amu kasei Jehovah che bonondos, Ak masasei kimonjororinikyik." 
Psalms69:34 Ingolos inendet kipsengwet ak ng’ony, Nyanjosiek, ak tuguk tugul che bendote oloto." 
Psalms69:35 Amu soru Kamuktaindet Sion, ak koteech nganasokab Juda; Ak komeny ichek oloto, kobunji." 
Psalms69:36 Nyaboni agichek keswekab otwogikyik oloto; Ak komeny oloto ichek che chamei kainennyi. 
Psalms70:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, sorua; Chokyi toreta, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms70:2 Ingolilanso ak kotewerogis Che cheng’ei sobondanyu: Ingoweektagei let ak kotewerogis Che boiboi amu ng’wanindanyu. 
Psalms70:3 Ingeweekta koba let amu tewernatenywa. Che len, Haa, Haa." 
Psalms70:4 Ingoboiboitu ichek tugul che cheng’in, ak kogasgei eng’ inye; Ak ingomwa kotugul ichek che chamei yetuneng’ung’, Kole, Ingitoror Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms70:5 Ago ane ko a banan ak matinye kiy; Chogu ole ami, ee Kamuktaindet: I toretindennyu ak ko i sorunindennyu; Ee Jehovah, amegage." 
Psalms71:1 Amang’un, ee Jehovah: Amegona alilan agoi." 
Psalms71:2 Sorua eng’ imandang’ung’, ak ieta: Epcha it, si isorua." 
Psalms71:3 Egu eng’ ane ruandet ne amenye, ole awendi kotugul: Kiigonu ng’atutiet kosorua; Amu i ruandennyu, ak ko i irimennyu." 
Psalms71:4 Kona achilil, ee Kamuktaindennyu, eng’ eutab kiptengekyot, Eng’ eutab chito ne ma bo imanda, ak ne kolgol." 
Psalms71:5 Amu inye ne agenin, ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah: I kamang’unennyu koboch ko a ming’in." 
Psalms71:6 Kigitiia koboch ami mo: Inye ne kiimoong’wa eng’ moetab chebiosennyu ne kisicha: Neng’ung’ kalosunennyu kotugul. 
Psalms71:7 A u kwong’utiet eng’ che chang’; Ago inye ko i ole amwechini ne kim. 
Psalms71:8 Nyiiei kutinnyu kalosuneng’ung’, Koboto teegistang’ung’ betut komugul." 
Psalms71:9 Amewirta ye tun kaaositu; Amebagakta ye kagobet kimnatennyu. 
Psalms71:10 Amu ng’alalena bunikyuk; Ak iruochi ichek che sapchin sobondanyu," 
Psalms71:11 Len, Kigobagakta inendet Kamuktaindet: Oon ak onam inendet; amu mami ne soru." 
Psalms71:12 Ee Kamuktaindet, amelooena: Ee, Kamuktaindennyu, chogu toreta." 
Psalms71:13 Ingolilanso ak kobetyo che bunikab sobondanyu; Ingotuch ichek rosyinet ak tewernatet che cheng’ei koyaiywa ne ya. 
Psalms71:14 Ago amang’u kotugul, Ak atese alosun kosiir." 
Psalms71:15 Mwaitoi kutinnyu imandang’ung’, Ak yetuneng’ung’ betut komugul; Amu mangen ole te choto." 
Psalms71:16 Anyone koboto boisionik che kimen che bo Kiptaiyat Jehovah: Amwae imandang’ung’, ne neng’ung’ inyege." 
Psalms71:17 Ee Kamuktaindet, kiineta koboch ko a ming’in; Ak kiamwaite agoi nguno boisioniguk che bo kwong’et." 
Psalms71:18 Ee, ye tun kaaositu, asich kalwalek, ko mebagakta, ee Kamuktaindet; Agoi amwachi kimnateng’ung’ ibinda ne nyonei, Amwachi kamuktaeng’ung’ age tugul ne biitu." 
Psalms71:19 Toror agine imandang’ung’ mising’, ee Kamuktaindet; Inye ne kiiyai tuguk che eechen, Ee Kamuktaindet, ng’o ne ogerge?" 
Psalms71:20 Inye ne kiiboruech nyalilwogik che chang’ che koromen, Ta isoobech kogeny, Ak tun imoong’wech kemong’une orit mising’ ne bo ng’ony." 
Psalms71:21 Tes etunatennyu, Ak iweeige kogeny igaigaa." 
Psalms71:22 Alosun agane eng’ kibugandet, Agot imandang’ung’, ee Kamuktaindennyu: Atienun kalosunoik eng’ ketubet, Ee Inye ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Psalms71:23 Baibaitu kutinnyu mising’ ye atienun kalosunoik; Ak baibaitu sobondanyu, ne kiitiach inye." 
Psalms71:24 Ng’alali ng’elyeptanyu agobo imandang’ung’ betut komugul: Amu ililandos, ak koteweroksei, ichek che cheng’jina yaitiet." 
Psalms72:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, igochi laitoriat kiruogutiguk, Ak igochi imandang’ung’ weritab laitoriat." 
Psalms72:2 Iruokyin biguk eng’ imanda, Ak kobesiechi kibananoguk." 
Psalms72:3 Ipchin tulonok biguk kalyet, Ak ipchin tulonok che mengechen biguk imanda." 
Psalms72:4 Iruoksechin kibananokab bik, Ak kosoru lagokab che nyalildos, Ak kotonaton usindet." 
Psalms72:5 Iywein ichek kota komi asista, Ak kote komi arawet, eng’ ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms72:6 Chorugei inendet ko u ropta ne chorjingei maleliet: Ko u ropta ne inesyin ng’ony. 
Psalms72:7 Eng’ betusiekyik konyoru ne bo imanda berurto; Ak chang’indab kalyet agoi ko ma komi arawet. 
Psalms72:8 Laitorani inendet koboch nyanjet agoi nyanjet age, Ak koboch Ainet agoi ole bochin ng’ony." 
Psalms72:9 Ing’urukyin inendet ichek che menyei ong’atet; Ak komel temburiek bunikyik. 
Psalms72:10 Ibu kagochinoik laitorinikab Tarsus ak che bo ngegusiek; Igoitoi kagochinoik laitorinikab Sheba ak Seba. 
Psalms72:11 Ee, ibutyin kelyekyik laitorinik tugul: Otei inendet bororiosiek tugul." 
Psalms72:12 Amu soru ne nyalili ye karir; Ak kibananiat, ne matinyei toretin." 
Psalms72:13 Rire kibananiat ak ne nyalili, Ak kosoru sobonwekab che nyalildos." 
Psalms72:14 Itiachi sobonwekwak eng’ usisiet ak koromnatet; Ak bunjin kamanut korotikwak eng’ tainnyi: 
Psalms72:15 Ak soptos ichek; ak kigochi inendet tahabu ne bo Sheba: Ak saei bik kotugul agobo inendet; Iberuri inendet betut komugul. 
Psalms72:16 Ak tun biitu chang’indab bek eng’ ng’ony eng’ tulonok barak; Ak itumdumegei logoekyik ko u Lebanon: Ak tunendos ichek che bo nganaset ko u suswek che bo ng’ony. 
Psalms72:17 Tebyei kainennyi koigeny; Tebyei kainennyi kota komi asista: Ak kiberuri bik eng’ inendet; Ak kuure bororiosiek tugul ne baibai. 
Psalms72:18 Iberurot Jehovah Kamuktaindet, Kamuktaindetab Israel, Ne inegei ne yaei tuguk che bo kwong’et:" 
Psalms72:19 Ak iberurot kainennyi ne tinyei torornatet agoi koigeny; Ak ingonyi ng’ony komugul torornatennyi. Amen, ak Amen." 
Psalms72:20 Kagogesgei sautikab Daudi weritab Jesii. 
Psalms73:1 Iman mie Kamuktaindet eng’ Israel, Eng’ icheget che tililen mugulelwek." 
Psalms73:2 Ago eng’ ane, ko ki negit komasta kelyekyuk; Ki negit kochabaita kakwautikyuk." 
Psalms73:3 Amu kiama ng’etkong’ agobo che mendos, Ye kingageer kalyetab kiptengeginik." 
Psalms73:4 Amu manyoru ng’wanindo; Chamegei borwekwak, ak ko kimen." 
Psalms73:5 Matinyei icheget nyalilwogik ko u bik alak; Ama nyoru biret ko u bik alak. 
Psalms73:6 Eng’ noto anyun u menotet sirimdo ne mi kaatwekwak; Katuch ichek koromnatet ko u ngoriet. 
Psalms73:7 Ibwanotin konyekwak eng’ neratet: Tinyei tuguk che siirei che machei mugulelwekwak. 
Psalms73:8 Chotisiei, ak mwaei sastaet eng’ tengekto: Ng’alaldos eng’ katororetab ge." 
Psalms73:9 Kigotoror kutuswekwak agobo kipsengwetisiek, Ak kobendote ng’elyebwekwak ng’ony." 
Psalms73:10 Eng’ noto anyun, weeksei bikyik oli: Ak lugui ichek beek che nyiitotin." 
Psalms73:11 Ak kolen ichek, Naei nee Kamuktaindet? Tos mitei naet eng’ Inendet ne Toror Mising’?" 
Psalms73:12 Ogeero, kiptengeginik chuto; Mitei icheget kotugul eng’ kalyet; tesoksei eng’ magornatosiek." 
Psalms73:13 Iman kiatilil muguleldanyu buch, Ak kiaune eunekyuk libwobindo buch;" 
Psalms73:14 Amu kaanyoru biret eng’ betut komugul, Ak kitigona karonet age tugul." 
Psalms73:15 Nda kigamwa ale ang’alali ko u ni, Keero, ta kiga aberber ibindab lagoguk." 
Psalms73:16 Ye kingacheng’ ole amuchi anaita nito, Kotemena;" 
Psalms73:17 Agoi among’ji oldab Kamuktaindet ole tilil, Anai anyun ole bochin kagesunenywa." 
Psalms73:18 Iman igochini kotebe ichek komoswek che chaboen: Ak iwirjini ichek ng’ony koba ng’emisiet. 
Psalms73:19 Katepto ano kot kosib kong’emogis ichek ngunoto! Kagowong’gei eng’ kamuisosiek. 
Psalms73:20 U karuotitoet ye kagos chito; Ko u noto, ee Kiptaiyat, ye ing’eet inye, isase itondanywa." 
Psalms73:21 King’wanit muguleldanyu, Ak kigitoor sobondanyu:" 
Psalms73:22 Kia abusat, amangen kiy; Kia u tiondo eng’ taing’ung’." 
Psalms73:23 Agot nga u noto ami koboten kotugul: Kiinam eunnyu ne bo tai. 
Psalms73:24 Inye ne indoiywa eng’ ruchineng’ung’, Ak eng’ let itaacha anyo oldab lilindo." 
Psalms73:25 Ng’o ne atinye eng’ kipsengwet ne ma inye? Ama mi age ne amache eng’ ng’ony kosiirin. 
Psalms73:26 Ichuchui bortanyu ak muguleldanyu: Ago Kamuktaindet kimnatetab muguleldanyu ak kebebertanyu koigeny. 
Psalms73:27 Amu keero, betos icheget che looen eng’ inye: Amu kiing’em ichek tugul che kiisub ibetab ge koistoenengei." 
Psalms73:28 Ago mie eng’ ane arikyi Kamuktaindet: Kiacham koek Kiptaiyat Jehovah ole amwechini, Si kobiit amwaita boisioniguk tugul." 
Psalms74:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, amu nee si iwirtech agoi? Amu nee si koiyenji neregeguk kechirekab akweng’ung’?" 
Psalms74:2 Ibwat tuiyeng’ung’ ne kiial keny, Ne kiitiach koek bororietab boroteng’ung’; Tulwetab Sion ole kiimeny." 
Psalms74:3 Iyogochi keldang’ung’ ole kigong’emak koigeny, Yaitiet tugul ne kigoyai bunyot eng’ ole tilil." 
Psalms74:4 Kogoborisenso buniguk eng’ kwenutab tuiyeng’ung’; Kigonde songolikwak koek kaborunoik. 
Psalms74:5 Ki u ichek bik Che namjin barak aonok, komachei koeb ketikab sondit." 
Psalms74:6 Ago butei ichek nguno aonok ak kirisonok Boisiennyi tugul ne kagiwai. 
Psalms74:7 Kigobeel oldang’ung’ ne tilil; Kigoyai ole menyei kaineng’ung’ kong’wanit agoi ng’ony. 
Psalms74:8 Kile eng’ mugulelwekwak, Ongeng’em kowong’gei tugul: Kigobeel sunagogisiek tugul che bo Kamuktaindet eng’ emet." 
Psalms74:9 Magigeere kaborunoikyok; Ma komi maotiondo; Ama mi kwenunnyo age tugul ne ingen kole tianitu. 
Psalms74:10 Ee Kamuktaindet, rosu bunyot kot kotianit? Tos chubei bunyot kaineng’ung’ agoi koigeny?" 
Psalms74:11 Kalya si iweekte eung’ung’, eung’ung’ ne bo tai? Inemu eng’ tegeng’ung’, ak iwong’u ichek." 
Psalms74:12 Ago Kamuktaindet ko Laitoriandennyu koboch keny, Ne yaei yetunet eng’ kwenutab ng’ony." 
Psalms74:13 Kiipchei inye nyanjet eng’ kimnateng’ung’: Kiiri metowekab cheluguinik eng’ beek. 
Psalms74:14 Kiiri kotonogis metowekab tiong’ik che eechen che bo beek, che u ting’ong’ok, Kiigoite koek amditab bik che menyei ong’atet." 
Psalms74:15 Kiigerer kong’ikab beek ak ainosiek: Kiitenyi ainosiek che kirootei agoi. 
Psalms74:16 Neng’ung’ betut, ak neng’ung’ kemout agine: Kiichob tuguk che iluu, ak asista." 
Psalms74:17 Kiipchei kiwotosiek tugul che bo ng’ony: Kiiyai kemeut ak iwot. 
Psalms74:18 Ibwat nito, ee Jehovah, ile, kigogerin kong’ bunyot, Ak kichub bik che abusotin kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms74:19 Ee, amegochi sobondab cheptugeng’ung’ tiondab timin: Ameutie koigeny sobonwekab biguk che nyalildos." 
Psalms74:20 Ibwat kayomiset: Amu nyiitat komoswek che imenen che bo ng’ony, ole menyei che koromen." 
Psalms74:21 Amengoweek kolilananu ne tinyei usisiet; Ingolos kaineng’ung’ che nyalildos ak che matinyei kiy. 
Psalms74:22 Ng’eet, ee Kamuktaindet, ibesiechige ng’aleguk: Ibwat ole kertoin kong’ eng’ betut komugul, chito ne abusat." 
Psalms74:23 Ameutie ng’alekab buniguk: Togostoi kotugul bolatetab icheget che ng’eetyinin. 
Psalms75:1 Kiweegun kongoi, ee Kamuktaindet; Kiweegun kongoi, amu negit kaineng’ung’: Mwaitoi bik kwong’utiguk." 
Psalms75:2 Ye kanyoru boroindo ne chobot, Aruoch eng’ imanda." 
Psalms75:3 Kigochoot ng’ony koboto chechik tugul che menyei oloto: Kialum tolochikyik. 
Psalms75:4 Kialenji che mendos, Amomenie: Ak kialenji che yaachen, Amotoror kuineng’wong’:" 
Psalms75:5 Amotoror mising’ kuineng’wong’; Among’alal eng’ menotet. 
Psalms75:6 Amu mabunu katororet kong’asis, anan cherongo, Ama bunu murot ne bo tai." 
Psalms75:7 Ago kiruogindet Kamuktaindet: Iming’ini age, ak koeeti age." 
Psalms75:8 Amu mitei kikombet eutab Jehovah, ak kutu divaik; Ak kigiburuch che chang’ che terotin, ak korong’u inendet choto: Iman, irurunyi misigikwak kiptengeginik tugul che bo ng’ony ak koeei." 
Psalms75:9 Ago amwaitoi ane koigeny, Atienjini kalosunoik Kamuktaindetab Jakobo." 
Psalms75:10 Atile kuinoikab kiptengeginik; Ago eegitu kuinoikab che bo imanda. 
Psalms76:1 Naat Kamuktaindet eng’ Juda: O kainennyi eng’ Israel. 
Psalms76:2 Mitei gonnyi Salem, Ak mitei Sion ole menyei." 
Psalms76:3 Kiiri eng’ oloto kipchabonik che bo kwanget; Long’et ak rotwetab chok, ak luget." 
Psalms76:4 Iluu ak itinye telunatet kosiir tulonokab che luulsei. 
Psalms76:5 Kogeluul che nyigonen, kogoruiyo konuukso; Ak mami eng’ bik che kimen ne kinyor eunekwak." 
Psalms76:6 Ee Kamuktaindetab Jakobo, inuuktos karisiek ak mbartanyisiek Amu kereng’ung’ bo kong’." 
Psalms76:7 Kanyol kiywein inyendet, inye; Ak ng’o ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taing’ung’ ko kenerech?" 
Psalms76:8 Kiimwau kiruoget kogasak kobun kipsengwet; Kiiyweis emet, ak kisis," 
Psalms76:9 Ye kingong’eet Kamuktaindet koruoch, Kosor tugul che taloen che bo ng’ony." 
Psalms76:10 Iman ilosun neregekab bik: Iratege neregek che kang’et. 
Psalms76:11 Oarorji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak oyaakyi: Ingoipchi kagochinoik, icheget che mi ole negite inendet, inendet ne nyoljin kiywei." 
Psalms76:12 Tilei inendet sobonwekab bounik: Imui inendet laitorinikab ng’ony. 
Psalms77:1 Arirjini Kamuktaindet; Ee, arirjini Kamuktaindet eng’ kutinnyu, si koepcha it." 
Psalms77:2 Kiacheng’ Kiptaiyat eng’ betutab nyalildanyu: Kiaiite eunnyu kemoi, ama amuuny; Kiesio sobondanyu kigaigai." 
Psalms77:3 Abwati Kamuktaindet, ak atigeni: Abwatoti, ak kotanui sobondanyu." 
Psalms77:4 Iname konyekyuk kogos: Aiimige kot ko mamuchi ang’alal. 
Psalms77:5 Koabwat betusiek che bo keny. Kenyisiek che kigobunji keny mising’. 
Psalms77:6 Abwati tiendanyu kemoi: Ang’alali ak muguleldanyu; Ak kogosiach tamirmiriennyu eng’ kagiiletab ge. 
Psalms77:7 Tos toortoisiei Kiptaiyat agoi? Tos mata kobaibait kogeny? 
Psalms77:8 Tos kigogesgei rirenennyi koigeny? Tos ma kosuldoi arorutiennyi koigeny? 
Psalms77:9 Tos kigoutie Kamuktaindet rirenennyi? Anan kigoger neregekyik rirenennyi ne tala? 
Psalms77:10 Ak kiale, Nyalulennyu nito; Ago abwati kenyisiekab eut ne bo tai ne bo Inendet ne Toror Mising’." 
Psalms77:11 Abwati boisionikab Jehovah; Ak abwati kwong’utiguk che bo keny. 
Psalms77:12 Abwatoti agine tuguk che kiiyai, Ak ang’alalote boisioniguk." 
Psalms77:13 Ee Kamuktaindet, mi oreng’ung’ ole tilil: Ng’o cheptalelit ne o ne kergei ak Kiptaiyat?" 
Psalms77:14 Inyendet Kamuktaindet ne iyae kwong’utik: Kiibarte kimnateng’ung’ eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek. 
Psalms77:15 Kiitiach biguk eng’ eung’ung’, Werikab Jakobo ak Josep." 
Psalms77:16 Kigeerin beek, ee Kamuktaindet; Kigeerin beek ak kiiyweis: Kibotanso agichek rirosiek." 
Psalms77:17 Kirong’ bolik beek; Kibiitune cheet barak: Ak kiiyesta kipchaboniguk. 
Psalms77:18 Kimi tugetab tuleng’ung’ kipchurjuriet; Kiikweny ng’ony kalyelosiek: Kibotan ng’ony ak kotumdumgei. 
Psalms77:19 Kimi oreng’ung’ nyanjet, Ak kimi ortinweguk beek che kimen, Ak kimanaak tiegutiguk." 
Psalms77:20 Kiimut biguk ko u akwetab kechirek, Eng’ eutab Musa ak Aron." 
Psalms78:1 Oepchi it ng’atutiennyu, ee bikyuk: Otokyi itikwok ng’alekab kutinnyu." 
Psalms78:2 Ayate kutinnyu eng’ kalewenet; Amwae ng’alek che ung’otin che bo keny: 
Psalms78:3 Che kigegas ak kenai, Ak kigomwawech kwanisiekyok." 
Psalms78:4 Magiung’e choto lagokwak, Kimwachini ibinda ne nyonei kalosunoikab Jehovah, Ak kimnatennyi, ak kwong’utikyik che kigoyai." 
Psalms78:5 Amu kiigimit baornatet eng’ Jakobo, Ak kiinde ng’atutiet eng’ Israel, Ne king’at kwanisiekyok, kole, Konet lagokwak:" 
Psalms78:6 Si konai choto ibinda ne biitu, agot lagok che tun kisichei; Che tun ng’eetos ak komwachi lagokwak:" 
Psalms78:7 Si konde kamang’unenywa eng’ Kamuktaindet, Si mautie boisionikab Kamuktaindet, Ago si korib ng’atutikyik:" 
Psalms78:8 Ak si matun igei kwanisiekwak, Ibinda ne uui met ak ko ngelelio; Ibinda ne kima chob mugulelwekwak, Ak che kima litititu tamirmirikwak eng’ Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms78:9 Kiweektagei let lagokab Epraim eng’ betutab luget, Kotinyei karik ak koiboti kwangok." 
Psalms78:10 Kima rib kayomisetab Kamuktaindet, Ak kiesio kobendate ng’atutiennyi:" 
Psalms78:11 Ak kiutie tugukyik che kiga yai, Ak kwong’utikyik che kiga koborji ichek." 
Psalms78:12 Kiyai inendet tuguk che bo kwong’et eng’ taitab kwanisiekwak, Eng’ emetab Misri, eng’ tembwetab Soan." 
Psalms78:13 Kipcheune aeng’ nyanjet, ak kogochi kolandae; Ak kiigochi beek kototenso konamgei." 
Psalms78:14 Kiindochi eng’ boldet bet, Ak kiindochi kemout komugul eng’ lapkeiyetab mat." 
Psalms78:15 Kitui ruandosiek eng’ ong’atet, Ak kiinaga beek che chang’ ko u che bunu rirosiek." 
Psalms78:16 Kiimong’une ruandet beek che rootei, Ak kiigochi beek kosururgei ko u ainosiek." 
Psalms78:17 Ago kites ichek koyachi inendet tengekto, Kongelelji Inendet ne Toror Mising’ eng’ emet ne yaamat." 
Psalms78:18 Ak kitiem Kamuktaindet eng’ mugulelwekwak Eng’ sometab amitwogik eng’ kasenywa bo miat. 
Psalms78:19 Ee, kichaam Kamuktaindet; Kile, Tos imuchi Kamuktaindet kochobwech amitwogik eng’ ong’atet?" 
Psalms78:20 Ogeero, kikwer inendet ruandet, ak kisururgei beek, Konyi ainosiek kot kong’irtagei; Tos imuchi kogonech makatinik agichek? Anan imuchi kogonech banyek?" 
Psalms78:21 Kigas Jehovah anyun, ak kinerech: Ak kilal mat agobo Jakobo, Ak kitogosta neregek agobo Israel;" 
Psalms78:22 Amu kima iyan bichoto Kamuktaindet, Ama imang’ yetunennyi." 
Psalms78:23 Ago king’at bolik eng’ barak, Ak kiyat kurgotikab kipsengwet," 
Psalms78:24 Ak kirong’ji mana si koam, Ak kiigochi bekab kipsengwet." 
Psalms78:25 Kiam bik amitwogikab che kimen: Kiiyokyi amitwogik kobiyong’so. 
Psalms78:26 Kiigochi usonetab kong’asis kous eng’ kipsengwet: Ak kiindochi usonet ne bo murot ne bo tai eng’ kimnatennyi. 
Psalms78:27 Kirong’ji ichek banyek che te temburiek, Ak taritik che bo kebebaik che te ng’aniekab nyanjosiek:" 
Psalms78:28 Ak kiigochi kobutyi kwenutab nganasenywa, Komoswek tugul che bo meng’otosiekwak." 
Psalms78:29 Kiamis anyun, ak kibiyong’so kot; Ak kiigochi che kigasei miat." 
Psalms78:30 Ago kima igesgei magenywa, Ak ye kita komi banyek kutuswekwak," 
Psalms78:31 Konyonji eng’ yoto neregekab Kamuktaindet, Ak kobar che neriotin alak eng’ ichek, Ak kokwer neranikab Israel kobar." 
Psalms78:32 Agot nganda kinyor choto tugul ko kita koyai tengekto, Ak kima iyan boisionikyik che bo kwong’et." 
Psalms78:33 Kiiwong’ anyun betusiekwak kobetyo buch, Ak kenyisiekwak eng’ kamuiset." 
Psalms78:34 Ye kingobar ichek, kocheng’ anyun ichek inendet: Ak kiweek kocheng’ Kamuktaindet eng’ kagiiletab ge." 
Psalms78:35 Ak kiibwat kole Kamuktaindet ko ruandenywa, Ak kole katiagindenywa Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’." 
Psalms78:36 Ago kiiberber inendet eng’ kutuswekwak, Ak komwachi lembechek eng’ ng’elyebwekwak." 
Psalms78:37 Amu kima ko lititen mugulelwekwak eng’ inendet, Ak kimaek che kiyani agobo kayomisennyi." 
Psalms78:38 Ago kinyochi kaat tengektanywa amu ki nyiitat inendet rirenetab ge, ak kima bar ichek: Ee, kiweekta neregekyik konyil che chang’, Ama ing’eet neregekyik tugul." 
Psalms78:39 Ak kiibwat kole, icheget ko borto kityo: Usonet ne siirtoi, ama weeksei kogeny." 
Psalms78:40 Ak kingelelji inendet konyil ata eng’ ong’atet, Ak kiigochi arogenet eng’ surkwen!" 
Psalms78:41 Ak kiweek kogeny kotiem Kamuktaindet, Ak kitach Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Psalms78:42 Ma ibwat eunnyi, Anan betut ne kiitiach ichek eng’ bunyot." 
Psalms78:43 Ko u ye kiyai kaborunoikyik eng’ Misri, Ak kwong’utikyik eng’ tembwetab Soan;" 
Psalms78:44 Ak kiwal beekab ainosiekwak koek korotik, Agot kererusiek agichek, kot ko ma ko eeoksei." 
Psalms78:45 Kiiyokto kalyang’ik koba kwenunywa, che kisus ichek; Ak mororochik che king’em ichek." 
Psalms78:46 Ak kiigochi koam tinapchet ruratenywa, Ak kiigochi chereng’endet koam boisionikwak." 
Psalms78:47 King’eme koikab ropta sabibukwak, Ak king’eme chepkoset mogoonikwak." 
Psalms78:48 Ak kibire koiyat tukwak, Ak kiam ilet akwenywa bo kechir." 
Psalms78:49 Kiwirji ichek koromnatetab neregekyik, Neregek, ng’wanindo ak nyalilda, Ak kiiyokyi kweanetab malaikaisiek che ibei yaitiet." 
Psalms78:50 Kiyachi neregekyik oret; Ak kima rire sobonwekwak eng’ meet, Ago kiigochi sobonwekwak koroito:" 
Psalms78:51 Ak kibar taiywek tugul eng’ Misri, Kibar taunetab kimnatenywa eng’ emaisiekab Ham:" 
Psalms78:52 Ago kiindochi bikyik ko u kechirek, Ak kiimut ko u akwetab kechirek eng’ ong’atet." 
Psalms78:53 Kiindochi eng’ kalyet, si maiyweis: Ago kituch nyanjet bunikwak." 
Psalms78:54 Ak kiimut agoi koit kiwotetab oldanyi ole tilil, Agoi tulwoni, ne kiga ale eunnyi ne bo tai." 
Psalms78:55 Kion bororiosiek eng’ tainywa, Ak kipchechi ichek emonoto eng’ kiwotosiek koek borotenywa, Ak kiigochi ortinwekab Israel komeny emaisiekwak." 
Psalms78:56 Ago kitiem ak kongelelji Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’, Ak kima rib baornatosiekyik;" 
Psalms78:57 Ak kiweektagei let, kosub ng’alset ko u kwanisiekwak: Kigiweekta koba taban ko u kwanget ne ma litit." 
Psalms78:58 Kitach inendet kot konerech eng’ oldinwekwak che sutotin, Ak kiigochi inendet ng’etkonda eng’ kanamonikwak che kigiwai." 
Psalms78:59 Ye kingogas Kamuktaindet nito konerech, Ak kiwech Israel mising’:" 
Psalms78:60 Ak kimeto anyun hekalut ne kimi Silo, Emait ne kiinde kwenutab bik;" 
Psalms78:61 Ak kiigoito kimnatennyi keluul, Ak kiinde kororonindanyi eutab bunyot." 
Psalms78:62 Kiigoito bikyik agichek kebare rotwetab chok; Ak kinerekyi borotennyi. 
Psalms78:63 Kibar mat werikwak; Ama kitienji tibikwak tiendab katunisiet. 
Psalms78:64 Kigibare tisiikwak rotwetab chok; Ak kima iteiyo mosogikwak. 
Psalms78:65 King’eet anyun Kiptaiyat ko u ne karuei, Ko u chito ne kim ne barori amu maiyek." 
Psalms78:66 Ak kibarat bunikyik koweektagei let: Ak kiigochi kolilanso agoi. 
Psalms78:67 Ak kiesio emaitab Josep, Ak kima lewen oretab Epraim;" 
Psalms78:68 Ago kilewen oretab Juda, Tulwetab Sion ne kicham." 
Psalms78:69 Ak kiteech oldanyi ne tilil koigei ole sutot, Koigei ng’onyut ne kigogimit inendet koigeny." 
Psalms78:70 Kilewen Daudi agine kiboitiondennyi, Ak kiimutune biusiekab kechirek:" 
Psalms78:71 Ye kiisubu kechirek che aboen, Kiimut inendet si kobiit kobai gab Jakobo che bikyik, ak Israel che borotennyi." 
Psalms78:72 Kibai anyun ichek ko u kagesunatetab ge ne bo muguleldanyi; Ak kiindochi eng’ utatietab eunekyik. 
Psalms79:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, kagomong’ji boroteng’ung’ bororiosiek; Kagomuruon hekalung’ung’ ne tilil; Kagoyai Jerusalem koegunot karurugutik." 
Psalms79:2 Kigogochi muswekab kiboitiniguk taritikab barak koam, Kiigochi tiong’ikab timin koam borwekab biguk che tililen." 
Psalms79:3 Kitumjinot Jerusalem korotikab biguk ko u beek; Ak kima biit chi ne kitub ichek. 
Psalms79:4 Kigeegu che itewerotin eng’ bik che negitenech, Sasech ak kororechinech anyun, che mi komoswekyok tugul." 
Psalms79:5 Ee Jehovah, tianitu, tos inerechi agoi? Tos lalei ng’etkondang’ung’ ko u mat?" 
Psalms79:6 Rong’ji neregeguk bororiosiek che maingenin, Ak bounatosiek che maguurei kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms79:7 Amu kigoam Jakobo, Ak kigoyai koek karaita ole menyei." 
Psalms79:8 Amebwat iityech tengekwogikab kwanisiekyok: Ingosib kondoenech rirenosiekguk: Amu kigenyeratitu mising’. 
Psalms79:9 Toretech, ee Kamuktaindetab yetunennyo, amu torornatetab kaineng’ung’; Soruech, ak iunde tengekwogikyok, amu kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms79:10 Amu nee si kolen bororiosiek, Mi ano Kamuktaindenywa? Ingonaak eng’ bororiosiek eng’ tainnyo Yaaktaetab korotik che bo kiboitiniguk che kigitumda." 
Psalms79:11 Ingonyo taing’ung’ tigenetab kimonjororiot; Rib inye eng’ oindab kimnateng’ung’ che kagitoorji meet; 
Psalms79:12 Ak iyaakyi bororiosiek che negitenech konyil tisab eng’ tegetikwak Kerenywa bo kong’, ne kigerin kong’, inye, ee Kiptaiyat." 
Psalms79:13 Ak achek anyun, che ki biguk ak kechirekab akweng’ung’, Kemwaun kongoi koigeny: Ak kimwaitoi kalosuneng’ung’ eng’ ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms80:1 Eb it, ee Mestowotab Israel, Inye ne indochini Josep ko u akwetab kechirek; Iluu, inye ne itebe kerubisiek." 
Psalms80:2 Ing’eet kimnateng’ung’, eng’ taitab Epraim, ak Benjamin, ak Manase, Ak inyo isoruech." 
Psalms80:3 Ee Kamuktaindet, weektech kogeny; Ak ingokweng’is togeng’ung’, si kesoruech." 
Psalms80:4 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, Inerekyini saetab biguk kot kotianit?" 
Psalms80:5 Kiibae ichek amitwogikab beekab kong’, Ak kiinage beekab kong’ koee eng’ kerutiet ne o." 
Psalms80:6 Iyaech keegu che moitosech bororiosiek che negitenech: Ak roritos bunikyok ichegei eng’ ichegei. 
Psalms80:7 Ee Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, weektech; Ak ingokweng’is togeng’ung’, si kesoruech." 
Psalms80:8 Kiibu inye sabibuk eng’ Misri: Kiion bororiosiek, ak imin sabibunoto." 
Psalms80:9 Kisib ichopchi boroindo, Ak kiba ng’ony orit tigitikyik, ak koyom emet." 
Psalms80:10 Kiiuur uruennyi tulonok, Ak ki kergei temenikyik ak taragonikab Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms80:11 Kiiwaakta temenikyik kot koit nyanjet, Ak kong’atos che ng’orng’or kot koit Ainet." 
Psalms80:12 Amu nee si ibut ng’otonokyik, Si kobut age tugul ne siirtoi logoekyik?" 
Psalms80:13 Ng’emei ichek toret ne bunu timin, Ak koamei tiong’ikab warenget." 
Psalms80:14 Kisain, achek ee Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, kele, iweege: Keer oli eng’ kipsengwet, ak igeer, ak irutochi sabibunito," 
Psalms80:15 Ak ketit ne kiimine eung’ung’ ne bo tai, Ak temet ne kiigimityige." 
Psalms80:16 Kigebeel eng’ mat, ak kigeeb: Lustos eng’ keretab kong’ ne bo togeng’ung’." 
Psalms80:17 Ingotebe eung’ung’ chitab eung’ung’ ne bo tai, Eng’ weritab chi ne kiigimityige." 
Psalms80:18 Si ma kegetyinige let kemetoin: Isoobech, si keguur kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms80:19 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, weektech kogeny; Ingokweng’is togeng’ung’, si kesoruech." 
Psalms81:1 Otienji Kamuktaindet eng’ kutit ne o, inendet kimnatennyo: Otienji Kamuktaindetab Jakobo eng’ boiboiyet." 
Psalms81:2 Otien tiendab kalosunet, ak obir sugutit ne ming’in, Ketubet ne tinyei cheet ne rurei, ak kibugandet." 
Psalms81:3 Oguut iriaget ko kaleel arawet, Ye kagoeet arawet, eng’ betunnyo ne bo igorta ne o." 
Psalms81:4 Amu ng’atutiet nito eng’ Israel, Kiruogetab Kamuktaindet ne bo Jakobo." 
Psalms81:5 King’at nito koek baornatet eng’ Josep, Ye kingomanda eng’ emetab Misri: Ole kiagase kutit ne ma anai." 
Psalms81:6 Kiaistoe tigikyennyi milet: Kigiistoe eunekyik kitongok: 
Psalms81:7 Kiiguurse eng’ nyalilda, ak kiasorun; Ak kiawolun eng’ ole ung’at ne bo tulet; Kiatiemin eng’ ole mi beekab Meriba." 
Psalms81:8 Ogas, okwek bikyuk, si abaorianwok: Ee Israel, ndechame iepcha it!" 
Psalms81:9 Amat kobiitunenen kanamwet ne too; Anan igutung’ji cheptalelit age tugul ne bo bororiosiek alak. 
Psalms81:10 A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, Ne kiamutun itogosu eng’ emetab Misri: Iseng’eng’e, si anyiit kuting’ung’." 
Psalms81:11 Ago kima epchi it kutinnyu bikyuk; Ak kima ko magena kiy Israel. 
Psalms81:12 Kiaunde anyun koba eng’ uuindab mugulelwekwak, Si kobendate kiruogutikwak." 
Psalms81:13 Bwa, nda kiga epcha it bikyuk, Ee, nda kiga cham Israel kobendate ortinwekyuk!" 
Psalms81:14 Ta kasib aterterji bunikwak, Ak aluukyi eunnyu usikwak." 
Psalms81:15 Yaegei koek che kase it icheget che wechei Jehovah: Ago kata teptoi betusiekwak koigeny. 
Psalms81:16 Kata bae ichek nganok che neriotin kosiir: Ak kata abaenen kumiat ne bunu ruandet kot ibiye. 
Psalms82:1 Tononi Kamuktaindet eng’ tuiyetab Kamuktaindet; Iruochi Kamuktaindet eng’ kwenutab cheptalelisiek. 
Psalms82:2 Oruochi kiruoget ne ma bo iman kot kotianit, Ak ogonyiti kiptengeginik?" 
Psalms82:3 Oruoksechinechi ne banan ak ne matinyei kwanda: Oyachi ne bo iman che kinyalili ak bononik. 
Psalms82:4 Osoru kibananiat ak ne matinyei kiy: Osoru ichek eng’ eunekab kiptengeginik. 
Psalms82:5 Maingen kiy, amaiguitos kiy; Bendi komosi ak komosi eng’ mesundeito: Kibotanso lumeiywek tugul che bo ng’ony." 
Psalms82:6 Kiamwa ale, O cheptalelisiek, Ak okwek tugul ko o werikab Inendet ne Toror Mising’." 
Psalms82:7 Agot nganda noto obegu ko u bik, Ak obutosi ko u age eng’ bounik." 
Psalms82:8 Ee Kamuktaindet, ng’eet, iruoksechi ng’ony: Amu tun egu bororiosiek tugul boroteng’ung’." 
Psalms83:1 Ee Kamuktaindet, amesis: Amesis, amemuuny, ee Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms83:2 Amu, keero, boldos buniguk: Ak kagoyot metowekwak icheget che wechin." 
Psalms83:3 Kagotuiyogei si koruoch kiruoget ne ya agobo biguk, Ak kong’alaldos agobo cheguk che ung’otin." 
Psalms83:4 Kigole, Obwa, keng’eti si mata koek bororiet: Si ma kibwati kainetab Israel kogeny." 
Psalms83:5 Amu kigong’alaljigei ak kogasyin; Yaei ichek arorutiet si kogirinden: 
Psalms83:6 Emaisiekab Edom ak Ismaelik; Moab, ak Hagarenik;" 
Psalms83:7 Gebal, ak Amon, ak Amalek; Pilistia, koboto ichek che menyei Turo:" 
Psalms83:8 Kanamgei agine Asuria koboto ichek; Kogotoret lagokab Lot. 
Psalms83:9 Yachi ichek ko u ye kiiyachi Midian; Ko u ye kiiyachi Sisera, ak Jabin, eng’ ainet Kison:" 
Psalms83:10 Che kibekyi En-dor; Kiek ng’atatek che bo ng’ony. 
Psalms83:11 Yachi bikwak che toogunotin kogergeit ak Oreb ak Seeb; Ee, yachi bounikwak tugul kogergeit ak Seba ak Salmuna:" 
Psalms83:12 Che kimwa kole, Ongenam kobunjech Meng’otosiekab Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms83:13 Ee Kamuktaindennyu, yai ichek koek temburiek che arureni; Ko u metetek che ibei usonet." 
Psalms83:14 Ko u mat ne beelei osnet, Ak ko u liblibenet ne beelei tulonok;" 
Psalms83:15 On ichek anyun eng’ kipchurjurieng’ung’, Ak imu ichek eng’ usoneng’ung’ ne kim." 
Psalms83:16 Inyiit tewernatet togochikwak; Si kobiit kocheng’ kaineng’ung’, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms83:17 Ingolilanso ak koiyweis koigeny; Ee, ingotewerogis ak kolusyo:" 
Psalms83:18 Si kobiit konai kole inyendet inyege ne kaineng’ung’ ko JEHOVAH, Inye ko i Ne Toror Mising’ ne bou ng’ony komugul." 
Psalms84:1 Kororon ne tia goriguk, Ee Jehovah ne bo lugosiek!" 
Psalms84:2 Amei emo sobondanyu, ee, machei kotanui agobo seremusiekab Jehovah; Tienjin muguleldanyu ak bortanyu, Kamuktaindet ne sobei." 
Psalms84:3 Kagonyor chepkelembut got, Ak kagonyor kibiswet keswet, ole ichin, Agot eng’ kaptisisiosieguk, ee Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Laitoriandennyu ak ko Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms84:4 Boiboen ichek che menyei gong’ung’: Ilosun kotugul. 
Psalms84:5 Baibai chi ne mi kimnatennyi eng’ inye; Inendet ne mi muguleldanyi ortinwek che baroen che bendi Sion. 
Psalms84:6 Ye bunei ichek atebwetab Rirek koyai koek kong’ikab beek; Ilaakyin berurwogik ropta ne bo tai. 
Psalms84:7 Bendi kong’eete kimnatet agoi kimnatet, Toogu age tugul eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet eng’ Sion." 
Psalms84:8 Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, kas saennyu, Eb it, Kamuktaindetab Jakobo." 
Psalms84:9 Keer, ee Kamuktaindet ne i long’ennyo, Ak igeer togetab neng’ung’ ne iilat." 
Psalms84:10 Mie betut agenge ne atebe seremusieguk kosiir elfut. Achame arib kurgetab gotab Kamuktaindennyu, Kosiir ameny emaisiekab kiptengeginik." 
Psalms84:11 Amu Jehovah Kamuktaindet ko u asista ak long’et: Konu Jehovah mieindo ak teegisto: Maete ichek che bendoti eng’ imanda kiy age tugul ne mie. 
Psalms84:12 Ee Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Baibai chi ne imang’un." 
Psalms85:1 Kiirire emeng’ung’, inye Jehovah: Kiiweegu Jakobo konyo eng’ ole kiga luul inendet." 
Psalms85:2 Kiinyochi kaat biguk eng’ tengekwogikwak, Kiituch tengektanywa tugul." 
Psalms85:3 Kiiste neregeguk tugul: Kiituktochi batai koromnatetab neregeguk. 
Psalms85:4 Weekyeige, Kamuktaindetab yetunennyo. Ak ingosisyo neregeguk che tokyineigei." 
Psalms85:5 Tos inerekyinech agoi? Tos isube neregeguk ibinwek tugul? 
Psalms85:6 Tos maisoobech kogeny, Si kobiit koboiboitunenen biguk?" 
Psalms85:7 Ee Jehovah, iboruech rireneng’ung’, Ak igonech yetuneng’ung’." 
Psalms85:8 Agase kit ne mwaei Kamuktaindet Jehovah; Amu mwachin bikyik ak chechik che tililen, kalyet: Ago amat kota koweekyigei berberindo." 
Psalms85:9 Iman negite yetunennyi ichek che iywei inendet; Si komeny telunatet emennyo. 
Psalms85:10 Katuiyo rirenet ak imanda; Kang’ututgei imanda ak kalyet. 
Psalms85:11 Kabiitune imanda ng’ony; Ak ing’ururi ng’ony imanda eng’ kipsengwet. 
Psalms85:12 Ee, konu Jehovah ne mie; Ak koiyiei emennyo ruratennyi." 
Psalms85:13 Wendi imanda kondoe inendet; Ak kochopchin oret kakwautikyik. 
Psalms86:1 Ing’uruge kasa, ee Jehovah, ak iwolwa; Amu a kibanania amatinye kiy." 
Psalms86:2 Rib sobondanyu; amu a chi ne bo iman: Ee inye Kamuktaindennyu, soru kiboitiondeng’ung’ ne imang’un." 
Psalms86:3 Rirena, ee Kiptaiyat; Amu arirjinin bet komugul." 
Psalms86:4 Ibaibai sobondab kiboitiondeng’ung’; Amu atokyinin sobondanyu, ee Kiptaiyat." 
Psalms86:5 Amu i mie inye Kiptaiyat, ak i chobot inyochi kaat, Ak itinye chang’indab rirenetab ge eng’ ichek che kuurin." 
Psalms86:6 Kaswa saennyu, ee Jehovah; Epchi it kutitab somutikyuk." 
Psalms86:7 Aguurin eng’ betutab nyalildanyu; Amu iwolwa. 
Psalms86:8 Mami ne u inye eng’ cheptalelisiek, ee Kiptaiyat; Ama mi boisionik alak che u cheguk." 
Psalms86:9 Tun bwanei bororiosiek tugul che kiiyae Ak kogutung’so eng’ taing’ung’, ee Kiptaiyat; Ak kotoror ichek kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms86:10 Amu i o, ak iyae kwong’utik; I Kamuktaindet inyege." 
Psalms86:11 Ineta oreng’ung’, ee Jehovah; si awendote imandang’ung’: Ituiye muguleldanyu si koiywei kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms86:12 Alosun, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindennyu, eng’ muguleldanyu komugul; Ak atorori kaineng’ung’ koigeny." 
Psalms86:13 Amu o rireneng’ung’ eng’ ane; Ak kiisoru sobondanyu eng’ keringet ne loo mising’. 
Psalms86:14 Ee Kamuktaindet, kagong’eetya menotik, Kogocheng’ sobondanyu tuiyetab sogoranik, Ak ma ibwatin ichek." 
Psalms86:15 Ago inye, ee Kiptaiyat, ko i Kamuktaindet ne nyiitat rirenet ak ko bo mieindo, Ne masib konerechi, ne tinyei chang’indab rirenetab ge ak imanit." 
Psalms86:16 Weekyage, ak irirena; Igochi kimnateng’ung’ kiboitiondeng’ung’, Ak isoru weritab otwogindeng’ung’ ne tie." 
Psalms86:17 Yaiywa kaborunet ne bo mieindo: Si kogeer che wecha ak kolilanso, Amu kaitoreta, inye Jehovah, ak kaigaigaa." 
Psalms87:1 Mi lumeiywondennyi tulonok che tililen. 
Psalms87:2 Chamei Jehovah kurgotikab Sion Kosiir meng’otosiek tugul che bo Jakobo. 
Psalms87:3 Kimwaitaenen tugukab teegisto, Ee inye nganasetab Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms87:4 Amwae kainetab Rahab ak Babulon eng’ ichek che ingena: Ogeer Pilistia, ak Turo, koboto Etiopia; Kigisikyin chichi oloto." 
Psalms87:5 Ee, kimwaei agobo Sion kele, Kigisikyin oloto chichi ak chicho; Ak igimiti Ne Toror Mising’ inendet." 
Psalms87:6 Tun iiti Jehovah ye sirei bik, kole Kigisikyin chichi oloto." 
Psalms87:7 Mwaei ichek che tieni ak icheget che urerendos kole, Mitei oldang’ung’ kong’ikyuk tugul che bo beek." 
Psalms88:1 Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab yetunennyu, Kaarir eng’ taing’ung’ bet ak kemoi:" 
Psalms88:2 Ingonyo saennyu oldang’ung’; Epchi it rirekyuk: 
Psalms88:3 Amu nyiitat nyalilwogik sobondanyu, Ak kagorikta sobondanyu oldab meet." 
Psalms88:4 Kagiitita che chorjingei keringet; A u chi ne matinyei toreto: 
Psalms88:5 Kigiwirja oldab che kigobek, Ko u che kigebar, che ruitos eng’ kererit, Che maibwati inye kogeny; Ak kigeisto eng’ eung’ung’." 
Psalms88:6 Kaindea keringet ne loo mising’, Eng’ oldinwekab mesundeito, eng’ rirosiek." 
Psalms88:7 Irurunya neregeguk, Ak kainyalila eng’ beeguk tugul che mildogei." 
Psalms88:8 Kaistoena che kingenge kolooegitu; Kaiyaa aek ne wegot eng’ ichek: Kigegera, ma amuchi among’ sang’." 
Psalms88:9 Kagochuchuiso konyekyuk amu nyalilda: Aguurin betut age tugul, ee Jehovah, Kaayogaun eunekyuk." 
Psalms88:10 Tos iborji kwong’utik bik che kigobek? Tos ng’eetyo che kigobek si kolosun? 
Psalms88:11 Tos kibortoi chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala eng’ kererit? Anan imandang’ung’ eng’ oldab ng’emisiet? 
Psalms88:12 Tos naaksei kwong’utiguk eng’ mesundeito? Tos naaksei imandang’ung’ eng’ emet ne bo utioet? 
Psalms88:13 Ago kiarirjin, ee Jehovah, Ak nyonei saennyu karon oldang’ung’." 
Psalms88:14 Jehovah, amu nee si ion sobondanyu? Amu nee si iung’ena togeng’ung’?" 
Psalms88:15 Kiginyalila koboch koa ming’in agoi ra, ak negit ame: Atoptobeni ye amuitoi agobo kamuisosieguk." 
Psalms88:16 Katucha neregeguk che laldos; Kagowong’wa kamuisosieguk. 
Psalms88:17 Kibwa koyiema ko u beek betut komugul; Kiyiema komoswek tugul. 
Psalms88:18 Kiistoena chamanet ak choruet, Ak mitei mesundeito ichek che ingena." 
Psalms89:1 Atieni agobo rirenetab ge ne bo Jehovah agoi koigeny: Abortoi eng’ kutinnyu imandang’ung’ eng’ ibinwek tugul. 
Psalms89:2 Amu kiale, Teegoksei koigeny rirenetab ge. Igimit imandang’ung’ eng’ kipsengwetisiek." 
Psalms89:3 Kigiyomisge ak nenyu ne kialewen, Kiayosiechi Daudi kiboitiondennyu, alenji," 
Psalms89:4 Agimiti kesweguk koigeny, Ak agimiti ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo laitornatet agoi ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms89:5 Ilosu kipsengwetisiek kwong’utiguk, ee Jehovah; Ak ilosu agine imandang’ung’ eng’ tuiyetab che tililen." 
Psalms89:6 Amu mi ng’o eng’ barak ne kirogendoe Jehovah? Tos mi ng’o eng’ werikab che kimen ne kergei ak Jehovah," 
Psalms89:7 Inendet Kamuktaindet ne kiywei mising’ eng’ tuiyetab che tililen, Ne kiywei kosiir tugul che kiyiem inendet?" 
Psalms89:8 Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, Ng’o ne bo kamuktaet ko u inye, ee JAH? Ak yiemin imandang’ung’." 
Psalms89:9 Inye ne ibou wasetab ge ne bo nyanjet: Ye kang’eet mildaennyi bo ge igere kong’ kosis. 
Psalms89:10 Kiituatui Rahab ko u ne kagebar. Kiiyeste buniguk eng’ eutab kimnateng’ung’. 
Psalms89:11 Cheguk kipsengwetisiek, ak ng’ony agine: Inye ne kiiyai ng’ony ak che nyiitat oloto." 
Psalms89:12 Kiitau iyai murot ne bo katam ak murot ne bo tai: Tiendos eng’ boiboiyet Tabor ak Hermon eng’ kaineng’ung’. 
Psalms89:13 Itinye eut ne bo kamuktaet: Kim eung’ung’, ak toror eung’ung’ ne bo tai." 
Psalms89:14 Ole tebe ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo bounatet ko imanda ak kiruoget: Indoenen rirenetab ge ak imanit. 
Psalms89:15 Boiboen bik che ingen tiendab boiboiyet: Bendote ichek lapkeiyetab togeng’ung’, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms89:16 Igasegei betut komugul eng’ kaineng’ung’: Ak kitorori ichek eng’ imandang’ung’. 
Psalms89:17 Amu inye kororonindab kimnatenywa: Ak kitorori kuinennyo eng’ chameng’ung’. 
Psalms89:18 Amu bo Jehovah long’ennyo; Ak bo Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel laitoriandennyo. 
Psalms89:19 Kiing’alalji anyun cheguk che tililen eng’ ng’ang’utik, Ak ilenjini, Kaalaakyi toretet inendet ne nyigan; Kiatoror ne kigilewen eng’ bik." 
Psalms89:20 Kianyoru Daudi kiboitiondennyu; Kiaiile inendet mwaitanyu ne tilil: 
Psalms89:21 Ne tun kimitu eunnyu eng’ inendet; Igimiti agine eunnyu inendet. 
Psalms89:22 Maimuchi bunyot koyachi inendet kiy ne ya; Anan konyalil weritab yaitiet inendet. 
Psalms89:23 Atuatui bunikyik eng’ tainnyi, Ak abir che wechei inendet." 
Psalms89:24 Ak tebyei koboto inendet imandanyu ak rirenennyu; Ak tororitu kuinennyi eng’ kainennyu. 
Psalms89:25 Agochini eunnyi koboi nyanjet, Ak koboi ainosiek eunnyi ne bo tai." 
Psalms89:26 Rirjina kolen, I baba inye, Kamuktaindennyu, ak ruandetab yetunennyu." 
Psalms89:27 Ayae inendet koek taitanyu, Koeet kosiir laitorinik tugul che bo ng’ony." 
Psalms89:28 Agonorjini rirenennyu koigeny, Ak tononi eng’ kimnatet kayomisennyu koboto inendet." 
Psalms89:29 Achamjini iyotennyi agine kotebi koigeny. Ak ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet ko u betusiekab kipsengwet. 
Psalms89:30 Ago ngo bagakta lagokyik ng’atutiennyu, Ak ngo mabendate kiruogutikyuk;" 
Psalms89:31 Ngot kobut konetisiosiekyuk, Ak ngo marib ng’atutikyuk;" 
Psalms89:32 Atigone anyun bistoenywa kirokto, Ak atigone tengektanywa birutik." 
Psalms89:33 Ago maistoi rirenennyu kot kogestagei eng’ inendet, Amayae koek buch imandanyu." 
Psalms89:34 Mabute kayomisennyu, Amawale kit ne kimong’une kutinnyu." 
Psalms89:35 Kiayosie konyil agenge eng’ tililindanyu; Ale, Maberberi Daudi;" 
Psalms89:36 Tebyei iyotennyi koigeny, Ak ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet ko u asista eng’ tainnyu." 
Psalms89:37 Kigimiti koigeny ko u arawet, Ak ko u baornatet ne bo iman ne mi barak." 
Psalms89:38 Ago kiitimde ak iesie, Kiinerekyi neng’ung’ ne iilat." 
Psalms89:39 Kiisas kayomiset ne bo kiboitiondeng’ung’: Ak kiing’wanit nariennyi ne bo laitornatet kot iwirji ng’ony. 
Psalms89:40 Kiibut ng’otonokyik tugul; Kiiluul irimoikyik. 
Psalms89:41 Rebe inendet tugukyik bik che siirtoi: Kigoek ne itewerat eng’ bikab kokwennyi. 
Psalms89:42 Kiitoror eutab tai ne bo bunikyik; Kiigochi bunikyik tugul koboiboitu. 
Psalms89:43 Ee, kiiweekyi let ng’atibindab rotwennyi ne bo chok, Amaigochi kobelis eng’ luget." 
Psalms89:44 Kiiunde tililindanyi kogesgei. Ak kiiwirji ng’ony ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet. 
Psalms89:45 Kiitil kong’ering’itu betusiekab ming’inatennyi; Kiilaakyi inendet tewernatet. 
Psalms89:46 Iunyege kot kotianit, ee Jehovah? Laldos neregeguk ko u mat kot kotianit?" 
Psalms89:47 Ee, ibwat ole te nwagindab betusiekyuk: Kiitau iyai werik tugul che bo bik koek buch agobo nee?" 
Psalms89:48 Tos ng’o chi ne sobei ne mageerei meet, Ne tos sor sobondanyi eng’ kimnatetab meet?" 
Psalms89:49 Ee, Kiptaiyat, mi ano rirenosieguk che bo keny, Che kiiyosiechi Daudi eng’ imandang’ung’?" 
Psalms89:50 Ibwat, ee Kiptaiyat, sastaet ne bo kiboitiniguk; Ko u ye aiboti eng’ tegennyu keretab kong’ ne bo bik tugul che chang’;" 
Psalms89:51 Noto ne kigogerisie kong’ buniguk, ee Jehovah, Che kigogerate kong’ kakwautikab neng’ung’ ne iilat." 
Psalms89:52 Iberurot Jehovah agoi koigeny. Amen, ak Amen." 
Psalms90:1 Ee Kiptaiyat, kiiegu ole kimenye Eng’ ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms90:2 Ye kitom kobiit tulonok, Anan ye kitom iyai emet ak ng’onyut, I Kamuktaindet, koboch keny agoi koigeny." 
Psalms90:3 Iweektoi chito kwo temburiek; Ak ilen, Oweege, okwek werikab bik." 
Psalms90:4 Amu kergei kenyisiek elfut eng’ taing’ung’ Ak amut ne kogosiirto, Ak ko u ripset ne bo kemoi." 
Psalms90:5 Imuti koba ko u mogochek; u ichek kanuuget: U ichek karon suswek che bitos. 
Psalms90:6 Ing’atos karon, ak koeegitu; Kitemei koskoleny, ak koresyo." 
Psalms90:7 Amu kagiwong’wech eng’ neregeguk, Ak kiarogendosi eng’ nyitateng’ung’." 
Psalms90:8 Kiinde tengekwogikyok taing’ung’, Ak kiinde tengekwogikyok che ung’otin lapkeiyetab togeng’ung’." 
Psalms90:9 Amu kigosiirto betusiekyok tugul eng’ neregeguk: Kiwong’u achek kenyisiekyok ko u atindiot ne kigimwa. 
Psalms90:10 Betusiekab kenyisiekyok koitei kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab, Ago eng’ che kimen koitei tamanwogik sisiit; Ago menotenywa ko nyalilda ak arogenet; Amu choktoi ko u noto, ak kebe kesiirte." 
Psalms90:11 Ng’o ne ingen kimnatetab neregeguk, Ak neregeguk che ng’wonen, ko u ye nyoljin kiywein?" 
Psalms90:12 Inetech anyun kiit betusiekyok, Si kobiit kesich muguleldo ne bo ng’omnatet." 
Psalms90:13 Weeguge, ee Jehovah; tianitu? Ak irirege kiboitiniguk." 
Psalms90:14 Ee, baech kebiye eng’ rireneng’ung’ karon; Si kobiit keboiboitu ak kigasge eng’ betusiekyok tugul." 
Psalms90:15 Ibaibaech eng’ betusiek che te che kiinyalilech, Che te kenyisiek che kigigeer yaitiet." 
Psalms90:16 Ingotook boisioniguk eng’ kiboitiniguk, Ak telunateng’ung’ eng’ lagokwak." 
Psalms90:17 Ak ingotebenech kororonindab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo: Ak igimitwech boisionikab eunekyok; Ee, igimit boisionikab eunekyok." 
Psalms91:1 Inendet ne menyei ole ung’at ne bo Inendet ne Toror Mising’ Kotebe noto uruetab Inendet Ne bo Kamuktaet. 
Psalms91:2 Amwae agobo Jehovah ale, Inendet ole amwechini ak ko irimennyu; Kamuktaindennyu ne amang’u." 
Psalms91:3 Amu sorun eng’ mestetab namindetab taritik, Ak eng’ koroito ne barisiei." 
Psalms91:4 Tugenen kororikyik, Ak inyoru ole imwechini eng’ kebebaikyik: Imandanyi ko long’et ak ne kiteektoegei." 
Psalms91:5 Meiywei kamuisetab kemoi, Anan kipchabet ne kimwoktoi bet;" 
Psalms91:6 Anan koroito ne wendoti eng’ mesundeito, Anan ng’emisiet ne barisiei bet." 
Psalms91:7 Ibutos elfut eng’ ole negitenen, Ak ibutos elfusiek tamanu eng’ ole negite eung’ung’ ne bo tai; Ago marikyinin." 
Psalms91:8 Ago igeere eng’ konyeguk, Igeere melektab kiptengeginik." 
Psalms91:9 Amu inye Jehovah, ko i ole amwechini! Kiiyai Inendet ne Toror Mising’ koek meng’oteng’ung’;" 
Psalms91:10 Manyorun yaitiet age tugul, Marikyin gong’ung’ koroito age tugul." 
Psalms91:11 Amu iyomisi malaikaisiekyik koribin, Si koribin eng’ ortinweguk tugul." 
Psalms91:12 Kanabin eng’ eunekwak, Si marus koita keldang’ung’." 
Psalms91:13 Itieche ng’etundo ak erenet: Itieche eng’ kelyeguk ng’etundo ne neran ak cheluguit. 
Psalms91:14 Amu kigochama, asoru eng’ noto anyun: Atorori inendet, amu kigonai kainennyu." 
Psalms91:15 Kuura, ak aitenji; Kitebye tuwai eng’ nyalilda: Asoru inendet, ak agonyit." 
Psalms91:16 Agochini inendet kosob kenyisiek che chang’, Ak aborjini yetunennyu." 
Psalms92:1 Kit ne mie ko keweekyi kongoi Jehovah, Ak ketienji kaineng’ung’ eng’ kalosunoik, ee inye Ne Toror Mising’:" 
Psalms92:2 Kibarta chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala karon, Ak imandang’ung’ lagatut age tugul," 
Psalms92:3 Eng’ kibugandet ne tinyei inoik taman, ak kibugandet age; Koboto ketubet ne cheei mising’." 
Psalms92:4 Amu kiibaibaa, ee Jehovah, eng’ boisieng’ung’: Agasige eng’ boisionikab euneguk." 
Psalms92:5 Eechen ne tia boisioniguk, ee Jehovah! Matinyei ole bochin kabwatutiguk." 
Psalms92:6 Maingen chito ne u tiony; Amaiguitos ne berber; 
Psalms92:7 Ye kaeegitu kiptengeginik ko u suswek, Ak ye kanyor berurto yaikab tengekto; Ko si keng’em agoi koigeny:" 
Psalms92:8 Ago inye, ee Jehovah, imi barak agoi koigeny." 
Psalms92:9 Amu, keero, ee Jehovah, buniguk, Amu, keero, lustos buniguk. Kiyestooti yaikab tengekto tugul." 
Psalms92:10 Ago kiitoror kuinennyu ko u kuinetab soet: Kagiilena mwaita ne kararan. 
Psalms92:11 Kogogeer konyekyuk agichek magennyu eng’ bunikyuk, Ak kogogas itikyuk magennyu eng’ yaikab yaitio che setyina." 
Psalms92:12 Sobei ne bo imanda ko u tiret: Bitei ko u tarakwetab Lebanon. 
Psalms92:13 Icheget che kigiminji gotab Jehovah Koeegitu eng’ seremusiekab gotab Kamuktaindennyo. 
Psalms92:14 Ta koiitos agot ko kagoosegitu; Tuonitu amu beek che eei, ak kotunendos:" 
Psalms92:15 Si kobiit kobarta kole bo iman Jehovah; Inendet ruandennyu, ama mi kiy ne ma bo iman eng’ inendet." 
Psalms93:1 Laitorani Jehovah; ilaagat eng’ telunatet; Ilaagat Jehovah, kigermenegei kimnatet: Kigigimit ng’ony, si mang’eigei." 
Psalms93:2 Kigigimit ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo laitornatet koboch keny: Kiimi koboch keny agoi. 
Psalms93:3 Ee Jehovah, tuldos ainosiek, Kigong’eet ainosiek tulenywa; Ing’eeti maranosiek mildaenywa bo ge." 
Psalms93:4 Kim Jehovah eng’ barak, Kosiir tuletab beek che chang’, Kosiir mildaetab ge ne kim ne bo nyanjet." 
Psalms93:5 Lumdootin baornatosieguk: Nyoljin gong’ung’ tililindo, Ee Jehovah, agoi koigeny." 
Psalms94:1 Ee Jehovah, inye Kamuktaindet ne bo yaaktaetab mugetut, Iluu, inye Kamuktaindet ne bo yaaktaetab mugetut." 
Psalms94:2 Ng’eet, inye kiruogindetab ng’ony: Igeerji menotik ko u ye nyoljin." 
Psalms94:3 Ee Jehovah, tianitu, Iterterisiei kiptengeginik kot kotianit?" 
Psalms94:4 Ng’alaloti ichek ng’alek che chang’, ng’alale menotet: Ilosugei yaik tugul che bo tengekto." 
Psalms94:5 Tuatui ichek biguk, ee Jehovah, Ak konyalili ichek boroteng’ung’." 
Psalms94:6 Barei mosoget ak toondet, Ak rumei che matinyei kwanda." 
Psalms94:7 Ak kolen, Mageerei Jehovah, Ama mage kiy Kamuktaindetab Jakobo." 
Psalms94:8 Obwat, okwek che o u tiong’ik eng’ kwenutab bik: Ak okwek che o berberen, ong’omegitu auyo?" 
Psalms94:9 Tos inendet ne kiyaei itit, ko magastoi? Tos inendet ne kiyaei konyek, ko mageertoi?" 
Psalms94:10 Tos maitigoni inendet ne kere kong’ bororiosiek, Ne inendet ne ineti bik naet?" 
Psalms94:11 Ingen Jehovah kabwatutikab chi, Kole buch." 
Psalms94:12 Igasegei chi ne igere kong’, ee Jehovah, Ak ineti eng’ ng’atutiguk;" 
Psalms94:13 Si kobiit imuung’ji eng’ betusiekab nyalilda, Agoi kebalji keringet kiptengeginik." 
Psalms94:14 Amu matoortoi Jehovah bikyik, Ama metoi borotennyi." 
Psalms94:15 Amu weekyingei kiruoget imanda: Ak kosubi noto tugul che bo iman eng’ mugulelwekwak. 
Psalms94:16 Tos ng’o ne ng’eetei kotoreta eng’ yaikab yaitio? Tos ng’o ne tononi kotoreta eng’ kiptengeginik? 
Psalms94:17 Nda kimaek toretennyu Jehovah, Ta kiga kochakta sobondanyu komeny oldab sisek." 
Psalms94:18 Ye kingale, Ichaboitoi keldanyu, Kotiia rireneng’ung’, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms94:19 Eng’ chang’indab kabwatutik che mi orinnyu Koboiboi kagaigaosieguk sobondanyu. 
Psalms94:20 Tinyei yamdaet nee ng’echeretab bounatetab tengekwogik ak inye, Ne chobei yaitwogik eng’ ng’atutik?" 
Psalms94:21 Iyumigei agobo sobondab ne bo iman, Ak koruokyi korotik che matinyei tengek." 
Psalms94:22 Ago kigoek Jehovah irimennyu ne koi; Ak Kamuktaindennyu ruandet ne amwechini. 
Psalms94:23 Ak kigoweekyi ichek tengektanywa, Ak koisto ichek amu tengektanywa; Ak kowong’ ichek Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms95:1 Obwa, ongetienji Jehovah: Ongetienji ruandetab yetunennyo eng’ kutitab boiboiyet." 
Psalms95:2 Ongebwa tainnyi keweekyi kongoi, Ongetienji inendet eng’ kutitab boiboiyet eng’ tienwogikab kalosunet." 
Psalms95:3 Amu Kamuktaindet ne o Jehovah, Inendet laitoriat ne o ne siirei cheptalelisiek tugul." 
Psalms95:4 Mi eunnyi komoswekab orit che bo ng’ony; Ak chechik agichek walisiekab tulonok.
