Psalms95:5 Nenyi nyanjet, inendet ne kiyaei; Ak kiyaei eunekyik emet ne yaamat." 
Psalms95:6 Obwa kilosu, ak king’urukyi; Ongegutung’se eng’ taitab Jehovah Yaindennyo:" 
Psalms95:7 Amu inendet Kamuktaindennyo, Ak ki bik che bo akwennyi, kechirekab eunnyi, Ee, kata mie ngogas okwek kutinnyi rani!" 
Psalms95:8 Amat ouuiit mugulelwekwok, ko u eng’ Meriba, Ko u eng’ betutab Masa eng’ ong’atet:" 
Psalms95:9 Ye kiyoma kwanisiekwok, Kotiema, ak kigeer boisiennyu." 
Psalms95:10 Kiaarogen kenyisiek artam eng’ ibinato, Ak kiale, Icheget ko bik che mastoi eng’ mugulelwekwak, Ak tom konai ortinwekyuk:" 
Psalms95:11 Kiayosie anyun eng’ neregekyuk, Ale, Maitei ichek kamuung’ennyu." 
Psalms96:1 Otienji Jehovah tiendo ne leel: Otienji Jehovah, ng’ony komugul." 
Psalms96:2 Otienji Jehovah, oberur kainennyi; Obarte yetunennyi eng’ betut agoi betut." 
Psalms96:3 Omwaite torornatennyi eng’ bororiosiek, Ak boisionikyik che kikwong’e eng’ bik tugul." 
Psalms96:4 Amu o Jehovah, nyolu kilos inendet mising’: Kanyol kiywei inendet kosiir cheptalelisiek tugul." 
Psalms96:5 Amu cheptalelisiek tugul che bo bik ko matilei kiy: Ago kiyaei Jehovah kipsengwetisiek. 
Psalms96:6 Mi tainnyi teegisto ak etunatet: Mi gonnyi ne tilil kimnatet ak kororonindo. 
Psalms96:7 Ogochi Jehovah, okwek tilionutikab bik, Ogochi Jehovah torornatet ak kimnatet." 
Psalms96:8 Ogochi Jehovah torornatet ne nyoljin kainennyi: Oibu kagochinet, ak obwa seremusiekyik." 
Psalms96:9 Ogutung’ji Jehovah eng’ kororonindab tililindo: Botan eng’ tainnyi, ng’ony komugul." 
Psalms96:10 Omwa eng’ bororiosiek ole, Laitorani Jehovah: Kigigimit ng’ony si mang’eigei: Iruokyin bik eng’ imanda." 
Psalms96:11 Ingogasgei kipsengwetisiek, ak ingobaibait ng’ony; Ingomoror nyanjet, ak tuguk che nyiitat oloto;" 
Psalms96:12 Ingogasgei mbarenik, koboto tugul che mi oloto; Si kotienso anyun eng’ boiboiyet ketik tugul che mi osnet;" 
Psalms96:13 Eng’ taitab Jehovah, amu nyonei: Amu nyonei koruokyin ng’ony, Iruokyin ng’ony eng’ imanda, Ak koruokyin bik eng’ imandanyi." 
Psalms97:1 Laitorani Jehovah; ingobaibait ng’ony; Ingogasgei emotinwek che chang’ che mi ngegusiek. 
Psalms97:2 Yiemei inendet bolik ak mesundeito: Ole tebe ng’echerennyi ne bo bounatet ko imanda ak kiruoget. 
Psalms97:3 Indoi mat eng’ inendet, Ak beelei bunikyik eng’ komoswek tugul." 
Psalms97:4 Kiikwenyi ng’ony ilotikyik; Kigeer emet, ak kobotan." 
Psalms97:5 Kichootyo tulonok eng’ taitab Jehovah ko u temeniet, Eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet ne bo ng’ony komugul." 
Psalms97:6 Ibortoi kipsengwetisiek imandanyi, Ak kigogeer bik tugul torornatennyi." 
Psalms97:7 Ingolilanso tugul che otei kanamonik che kigiwai, Che lasegei tuguk che matilei kiy: Ogutung’ji inendet, okwek cheptalelisiek tugul." 
Psalms97:8 Kigas Sion, ak kiigasgei, Ak kiboiboitu tibikab Juda; Amu kiruogutiguk, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms97:9 Amu inye, Jehovah, ko i toror mising’ eng’ ng’ony komugul: Kiitororitu mising’ isiir cheptalelisiek tugul." 
Psalms97:10 Ee okwek che ochame Jehovah, owech yaitiet: Ribei sobonwekab chechik che tililen; Soru ichek eng’ eutab kiptengeginik." 
Psalms97:11 Kigoljin lapkeiyet che bo iman, Ak kigoljin kagasetab ge che bo iman eng’ mugulelwek." 
Psalms97:12 Ogasge eng’ Jehovah okwek che o bo iman; Ogochi kongoi kainennyi ne tilil. 
Psalms98:1 Ee, otienji Jehovah tiendo ne leel; Amu kigoyai tuguk che kikwong’e: Kiyachi yetunet inendet eunnyi ne bo tai, eunnyi ne tilil." 
Psalms98:2 Kigobarta Jehovah yetunennyi: Kigong’any imandanyi eng’ taitab bororiosiek. 
Psalms98:3 Kigobwat rirenennyi ak imandanyi eng’ gotab Israel: Kigogeer tabanwek tugul che bo ng’ony yetunetab Kamuktaindennyo. 
Psalms98:4 Otienji Jehovah eng’ kutitab boiboiyet, ng’ony komugul: Ong’eet tiendo, ak otien eng’ boiboiyet, ee, otien kalosunoik." 
Psalms98:5 Otienji Jehovah kalosunoik eng’ ketubet; Eng’ ketubet, ak eng’ kutitab kalosunet." 
Psalms98:6 Eng’ igondisiek, ak cheetab iriaget Otien eng’ kutitab boiboiyet eng’ taitab laitoriat, Jehovah." 
Psalms98:7 Ingomoror nyanjet, ak tuguk che nyiitat oloto; Ng’ony, ak icheget che menyei oloto;" 
Psalms98:8 Ingoraprab eunekwak ainosiek; Ingotienso tulonok kibagenge eng’ boiboiyet; 
Psalms98:9 Eng’ taitab Jehovah, amu nyonei koruokyin ng’ony: Tun iruokyin ng’ony eng’ imanda, Ak koruokyi bik eng’ iman." 
Psalms99:1 Laitorani Jehovah; ingobotanso bik: Tebe inendet baragutab kerubik; ingobotan ng’ony. 
Psalms99:2 O Jehovah eng’ Sion; Ak toror inendet kosiir bik tugul. 
Psalms99:3 Ingolos ichek kaineng’ung’ ne o ne imuisei. Tilil inendet. 
Psalms99:4 Chamei kimnatetab laitoriat kiruoget; Igimiti imanda, Iyae kiruoget ak imanda eng’ Jakobo." 
Psalms99:5 Otoror Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, Ak ogutung’ji eng’ ng’echeretab kelyekyik kel: Tilil inendet." 
Psalms99:6 Musa ak Aron eng’ tisiikyik, Ak Samuel koboto icheget che kuurei kainennyi; Kiguur ichek Jehovah ak kiwolji." 
Psalms99:7 King’alalji ichek eng’ toloitab boldet: Kirib baornatosiekyik, ak konetisiet ne kiigochi." 
Psalms99:8 Iwoljini ichek, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo: Kii Kamuktaindet ne kiinyochini kaat, Agot nganda kiiyaakyi mugetut agobo boisionikwak." 
Psalms99:9 Otoror Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, Ak ogutung’ji eng’ tulwennyi ne tilil; Amu tilil Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms100:1 Otienji Jehovah eng’ kutitab boiboiyet, okwek emotinwek tugul." 
Psalms100:2 Oboisiechi Jehovah eng’ kagasetab ge: Obwa tainnyi otienonu. 
Psalms100:3 Onai ole Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet: Inendet ne kiyaech, ak ki chechik; Ki bikyik, ak ki kechirekab akwennyi." 
Psalms100:4 Oba kurgotikyik, ogoitoi kongoi, Ak obe seremusiekyik olosunoti: Oweekyi kongoi, ak oberur kainennyi." 
Psalms100:5 Amu mie Jehovah; tebyei rirenennyi koigeny; Ak imandanyi eng’ ibinwek tugul. 
Psalms101:1 Atieni agobo rirenet ak kiruoget: Ee Jehovah, atienun kalosunoik." 
Psalms101:2 Atebye komie eng’ ng’omnatet eng’ oret ne igesunotgei: Ee, inyonjina au? Awendote gonnyu eng’ muguleldo ne igesunotgei." 
Psalms101:3 Mandoi ane taitab konyekyuk kiy age tugul ne ya: Aweche boisietab icheget che mastoi; Manama. 
Psalms101:4 Istoenage muguleldo ne mastaat: Mamage kiy anai kiy age tugul ne ya. 
Psalms101:5 Ang’eme age tugul ne chaamoti chitab kokwennyu eng’ ung’ot: Mamuitochini menotio, chito ne menei muguleldanyi." 
Psalms101:6 Keerei konyekyuk bik che bo iman eng’ emet, si komeny kobota: Inendet ne wendoti eng’ oret ne igesunotgei, koboisiewa noto." 
Psalms101:7 Mamenyei gonnyu inendet ne yaei ng’alset: Magimitu eng’ tainnyu inendet ne mwaei lembech. 
Psalms101:8 Ang’eme karonet age tugul kiptengeginik tugul che bo emet; Si kobiit aisto yaik tugul che bo tengekto eng’ nganasetab Jehovah. 
Psalms102:1 Kas saennyu, ee Jehovah, Ak ingobwanjin rirekyuk." 
Psalms102:2 Ameung’ena togeng’ung’ eng’ betutab nyalildanyu: Epcha it; Wolwa chokyi eng’ betut ne aguursei. 
Psalms102:3 Amu betos betusiekyuk ko u iyeto, Ak kibeelei kowekyuk ko u kegenget." 
Psalms102:4 Kagebir muguleldanyu ko u suswek, ak kagores; Amu autie aam amitwogikyuk." 
Psalms102:5 Amu tugetab tigenennyu Ko kanamgei kowekyuk ak banyek. 
Psalms102:6 A u chebokibabaa ne bo ong’atet; Kaige ane sugurut ne bo surkwen. 
Psalms102:7 Aripsei, ak kaaegu Ne kergei ak chepkelembut ne mi inegei got barak." 
Psalms102:8 Rosyina bunikyuk betut komugul; Chubisiei agobo ane icheget che wecha mising’. 
Psalms102:9 Amu kiaam orek ko u amitwogik, Ak kiaburuch tugukyuk che aee koboto beekab kong’," 
Psalms102:10 Amu koromindab neregeguk ak nyitateng’ung’; Amu kiiganaba ak iwirta. 
Psalms102:11 U betusiekyuk uruet ne iyaptagei; Ak kiares ko u suswek. 
Psalms102:12 Ago inye, ee Jehovah, itebye koigeny; Tebyei kabwateng’ung’ ne kibwatenen agoi ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms102:13 Ing’eete, irire Sion: Amu kagoyam kerire, ee, kagoit betut ne kigichopchi." 
Psalms102:14 Amu boiboitu kiboitiniguk eng’ koikyik, Ak rire ichek temburiekyik." 
Psalms102:15 Koiywei anyun bororiosiek kainetab Jehovah, Ak koiywei laitorinik tugul che bo ng’ony torornateng’ung’:" 
Psalms102:16 Amu kagoteech Jehovah Sion, Kagotook eng’ torornatennyi;" 
Psalms102:17 Kagogas saetab kibananiat, Ama sas saenywa." 
Psalms102:18 Kisirjin nito ibinda ne biitu: Ak kolos Jehovah bik che tun kiyaei. 
Psalms102:19 Amu kigogeer inendet olito bo ng’ony eng’ tororindab oldanyi ne tilil; Kigeer Jehovah ng’ony eng’ kipsengwet; 
Psalms102:20 Si kogas tigenetab kimonjororiot; Si kotiach ichek che kigechopchi meet; 
Psalms102:21 Si kobarta bik kainetab Jehovah eng’ Sion, Ak kalosunennyi eng’ Jerusalem;" 
Psalms102:22 Ye kagoyumgei bik, Ak bororiosiek, si koboisiechi Jehovah." 
Psalms102:23 Kiyai kimnatennyu konyalul eng’ oret; Kitil betusiekyuk konwagitu. 
Psalms102:24 Kiale, Ee Kamuktaindennyu, amemuta eng’ kwenutab betusiekyuk: Tebyei kenyisieguk agoi ibinwek tugul." 
Psalms102:25 Kiiyai ole tonone ng’ony keny; Ak boisietab euneguk kipsengwetisiek. 
Psalms102:26 Betos ichek; ago itebye inye agoi: Ee, osegitu ichek tugul ko u ngoriet; Ak iwale ichek ko u ngoriet, ak kowalogis:" 
Psalms102:27 Ago i u noto inye agoi, Ama tinyei kenyisieguk ole igesunegei." 
Psalms102:28 Tebyei lagokab kiboitiniguk, Ak kimitu iyoteng’ung’ eng’ taing’ung’." 
Psalms103:1 Ilosu Jehovah, ee sobondanyu, Ak ingolos kainennyi ne tilil tugul che mi orinnyu." 
Psalms103:2 Ilosu Jehovah, ee sobondanyu, Ameutie konunoikyik tugul:" 
Psalms103:3 Inendet ne nyoun kaat tengekwogiguk tugul; Ak kosoobin eng’ mianwogiguk tugul; 
Psalms103:4 Inendet ne itiachi sobondang’ung’ eng’ oldab ng’emisiet; Ak kolaagun kutwetab chamnyet ne tala ak rirenosiek: 
Psalms103:5 Ne konin tuguk che miach kot koyamin; Si kiweegun ming’inateng’ung’ ko u kipsichit. 
Psalms103:6 Yaei Jehovah boisionikab imanda, Ak kiruogutik agobo tugul che kisastae." 
Psalms103:7 Kiiborji Musa ortinwekyik, Kiiborji lagokab Israel boisionikyik." 
Psalms103:8 Nyiitat Jehovah rirenet ak ko bo mieindo, Ama sib konerechi, ak tinyei chang’indab rirenet." 
Psalms103:9 Magerei kong’ kotugul; Ama konori neregekyik agoi. 
Psalms103:10 Tom koyaiywech ko u ye nyoljin chalwogikyok, Ama igeeruech ko u tengekwogikyok," 
Psalms103:11 Amu ko u ye toror kipsengwet eng’ ng’ony, Ko u noto rirenennyi eng’ ichek che iywei inendet." 
Psalms103:12 Ko u ye loochin kong’asis ak cherongo, Ko u noto kigoistoenech chalwogikyok kolooegitu." 
Psalms103:13 Ko u ye rire kwanda lagokyik, Ko u noto rire Jehovah ichek che iywei inendet." 
Psalms103:14 Amu ingen borwekyok; Ibwati inendet kole, ki temburiek." 
Psalms103:15 Ago chito, ko u betusiekyik suswek; Tuneni ko u taptet ne bo kewanin." 
Psalms103:16 Amu bunei yoto usonet, ak kobetito taptanato; Ama kongen oldanyi kogeny." 
Psalms103:17 Ago tebyei rirenetab Jehovah koigeny ak koigeny eng’ ichek che iywei inendet, Ak imandanyi eng’ lagokab lagok;" 
Psalms103:18 Eng’ ichek che ribei kayomisennyi, Ak ichek che ibwati ng’atutikyik ak koyaei." 
Psalms103:19 Kigogimit Jehovah ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet eng’ kipsengwetisiek; Ak bou laitornatennyi tugul: 
Psalms103:20 Olosu Jehovah, okwek malaikaisiekyik: Okwek che o kimen eng’ kamuktaet, che osuldoi ng’olyondennyi, Che oepchini it tugetab ng’olyondennyi." 
Psalms103:21 Olosu Jehovah, okwek lugosiekyik tugul, Okwek che o kiboitinikyik, che oyae magennyi." 
Psalms103:22 Olosu Jehovah, okwek boisionikyik tugul, Eng’ komoswek tugul ole bou inendet: Ilosu Jehovah, ee sobondanyu." 
Psalms104:1 Ilosu Jehovah, ee sobondanyu. Ee Jehovah, Kamuktaindennyu, i o mising’; Ilaachi teegisto ak etunatet." 
Psalms104:2 Inye ne itugege lapkeiyet ko u ngoriet; Iitoi kipsengwetisiek ko u ngoriet; 
Psalms104:3 Inendet ne indoi beek kimurtoinikab gorikyik; Inendet ne yaei bolik koek karinnyi; Ne wendote kebebaikab usonet: 
Psalms104:4 Inendet ne yaei usonaik koek chechik che kiyoktoi; Ne yaei kiboitinikyik koek mat ne liblibeni: 
Psalms104:5 Ne kilumda lumeiywek che tonone ng’ony, Si ma kiisto agoi koigeny." 
Psalms104:6 Kiilaakyi ng’ony riret ko u ngoriet; Kiimaluuchi beek tulonok. 
Psalms104:7 Kimwei eng’ kereng’ung’ bo kong’, Kichakta eng’ cheetab tuleng’ung’;" 
Psalms104:8 Kitogosta tulonok, ak kichorjigei atebwosiek, Agoi koit ole kiichopchi." 
Psalms104:9 Kiinde kiwotet si masiir; Si maweek kogeny kotuch ng’ony. 
Psalms104:10 Iyoktoi kong’ikab beek korootyi atebwosiek; Chokchogoni eng’ tulonok: 
Psalms104:11 Inagi beek tiondo age tugul ne bo timin; Imise sigirokab timin meleldanywa. 
Psalms104:12 Menyei taritik che bo barak ngegusiekwak, Tiendos eng’ temenik." 
Psalms104:13 Ibise beek tulonok eng’ gorikyik: Biyonyi ng’ony logoekab boisioniguk. 
Psalms104:14 Ibiityin tuga suswek, Ak ngwek si koboisie chito; Si komoong’ amitwogik eng’ ng’ony:" 
Psalms104:15 Ak divaik che iboiboi muguleldab chito, Ak mwaita ne itiliali togennyi, Ak amitwogik che igimiti muguleldab chi." 
Psalms104:16 Biyonyi ketikab Jehovah; Taragonikab Lebanon, che kigomin;" 
Psalms104:17 Ole teechei kesonokwak taritik: Gotab cheptalamiat biribiriet. 
Psalms104:18 Bo tulonok che koen ng’ororek che bo timin; Ruandosiek ko ole mwechin kenerok. 
Psalms104:19 Kiinde arawet si kobor betusiek: Ingen asista ole roroktae. 
Psalms104:20 Iyae mesundeito, ak koek kemoi, Eng’ noto anyun, koguiguiyon tiony age tugul ne bo timin komong’." 
Psalms104:21 Boriseni neranikab ng’etunyik ye mi logenywa, Ak cheng’ei amitwogikwak eng’ Kamuktaindet." 
Psalms104:22 Ye chor asista komwei, Ak koruiyo eng’ kebenonikwak." 
Psalms104:23 Wendi chito boisiennyi Kwo kobois agoi koimen. 
Psalms104:24 Ee Jehovah, chang’ ne tia boisioniguk! Kiiyai tugul eng’ ng’omnatet: Nyiitat ng’ony magornatosieguk." 
Psalms104:25 Mi olin nyanjet, ne o ak ko tebees, Ole mi tuguk che ichuutegei che ma iitoksei, Tiong’ik che mengechen ak che eechen." 
Psalms104:26 Bendi oloto melisiek; Mi oloto tiondo ne o ne bo beek, ne u ting’ong’et, ne kiiyai kourerene oloto." 
Psalms104:27 Igenin chuto tugul, Si igochi amitwogikwak eng’ betusiekwak." 
Psalms104:28 Iyumi che igochini; Ing’anye eung’ung’, biyong’dos tuguk che miach." 
Psalms104:29 Ye keuny togeng’ung’, kotoptobenso; Inemu kabusenywa, si kobek, Ak koweektagei temburiekwak." 
Psalms104:30 Iyoktoi tamirmirieng’ung’, si keyai kobiit, kosopcho; Ak ichobe itondab emet koleelit kogeny." 
Psalms104:31 Ingoteb tororindab Jehovah koigeny; Ingobaibait Jehovah eng’ boisionikyik: 
Psalms104:32 Botani ng’ony ye kageer inendet; Twaei tulonok, si koiyenso." 
Psalms104:33 Atienjini Jehovah kote asobe: Atienjini Kamuktaindennyu kalosunet kota asobe. 
Psalms104:34 Ingoanyinyitu kabwatutikyuk eng’ inendet: Agasige eng’ Jehovah. 
Psalms104:35 Ingiwong’ kiptengeginik eng’ ng’ony, Ak ingobetyo che yaachen agoi. Ilosu Jehovah, ee sobondanyu. Olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms105:1 Oweekyi kongoi Jehovah, oguur kainennyi; Ongonaak boisionikyik eng’ bik." 
Psalms105:2 Otienji, otienji kalosunoik; Ong’alale boisionikyik che kikwong’e." 
Psalms105:3 Olosunege kainennyi ne tilil: Ingoboiboitu mugulelwekab ichek che cheng’ei Jehovah. 
Psalms105:4 Ocheng’ Jehovah ak kimnatennyi; Ocheng’ togennyi kotugul. 
Psalms105:5 Obwat boisionikyik che kikwong’e che kigoyai; Kwong’utikyik, ak kiruogutikab kutinnyi;" 
Psalms105:6 Ee okwek, keswekab Abraham kiboitiondennyi, Okwek lagokab Jakobo, chechik che kigelewen." 
Psalms105:7 Inendet ko Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, Mitei kiruogutikyik ng’ony komugul." 
Psalms105:8 Ibwati kayomisennyi koigeny, Ng’olyot ne king’atyi ibinwek elfut;" 
Psalms105:9 Ne kiyai koboto Abraham, Ak kayosiet ne kiiyosiechi Isak;" 
Psalms105:10 Ak kiigimityi Jakobo noto koek ng’atutiet, Kiigimityi Israel koek kayomiset ne bo koigeny:" 
Psalms105:11 Kolenji, Agonin emetab Kanan, Koek kebebertab boroteng’ung’." 
Psalms105:12 Ye kita ko ng’ering’ bichoto; Ee, ki ng’ering’ mising’, ago ki toek eng’ oloto;" 
Psalms105:13 Ak kibendat kobunot bororiet age agoi bororiet age; Kibun bounatet age koba oldab bik alak. 
Psalms105:14 Kima chamji chi koyachi ichek ne ya; Ee, kiger kong’ laitorinik amu ichek;" 
Psalms105:15 Kole, Amat otwa chechuk che kigiil, Amoyachi ne ya maotikyuk." 
Psalms105:16 Ak kiguur rubet konyonji emet; Ak kitil amitwogik tugul kong’ering’itu. 
Psalms105:17 Kiiyokto chi kondoe ichek; Kigialda Josep koek otwogin: 
Psalms105:18 Kiigochi ng’wanindo kelyekyik eng’ mugurek; Kiginde inendet oldab karik: 
Psalms105:19 Agoi betut ne kiisulda ng’olyondennyi; Kitiem ng’olyotab Jehovah inendet. 
Psalms105:20 Kiiyokto laitoriat kitiach inendet; Agot bounindetab bik, ak kiunda kwo." 
Psalms105:21 Kiinde inendet koek kiptaiyatab gonnyi, Ak bounindetab tugukyik tugul:" 
Psalms105:22 Si korat bounikyik ko u ye machei, Ak konet boisiekyik ng’omnatet." 
Psalms105:23 Kinyo Israel agine Misri; Ak kiuchi Jakobo emetab Ham. 
Psalms105:24 Ak kites bikyik mising’. Ak kogimit ichek kosiir bunikwak. 
Psalms105:25 Kiwal mugulelwekwak kowech bikyik, Si kong’al kiboitinikyik." 
Psalms105:26 Kiiyokto Musa kiboitiondennyi, Ak Aron ne kiga kolewen." 
Psalms105:27 Kiinde kwenunywa kaborunoikyik, Ak kwong’utikyik eng’ emetab Ham." 
Psalms105:28 Kiiyokto mesundeito, ak kiigochi koimenit; Ak kima ingelelji ichek ng’alekyik." 
Psalms105:29 Kiwal beekwak koek korotik, Ak kobar njirenikwak." 
Psalms105:30 Kiyom mororochik emenywa, Eng’ gorikab laitorinikwak." 
Psalms105:31 Kitwek, ak kibwa kalyang’ik ng’isiat, Ak isirek eng’ kiwotosiekwak tugul." 
Psalms105:32 Kiigochi koik ne kata ropta, Ak mat ne liblibeni eng’ emenywa." 
Psalms105:33 Kibir ketikwak agichek che bo sabibuk ak mogoonikwak; Ak kiiri ketikab kiwotosiekwak. 
Psalms105:34 Kitwek, ak kinyo chereng’endet, Ak tinapchet, che maiitoksei," 
Psalms105:35 Ak kiam sogot age tugul ne bo emenywa, Ak kiam logoekab mbarenikwak." 
Psalms105:36 Kibar agichek taiywek tugul eng’ emenywa, Taunetab kimnatenywa." 
Psalms105:37 Ak kiimong’ ichek koibei feda ak tahabu: Ak kima komi chi ne nyalulat agot agenge eng’ bororiosiekyik. 
Psalms105:38 Kibaibait Misri ye kingoba; Amu kiga konyor kaiyweisiet amu ichek. 
Psalms105:39 Kiito boldet koek ne tuge; Ak mat si kogochi bichoto lapkeiyet kemoi. 
Psalms105:40 Kisom, ak kiigochi taritik che taok, Ak kibae ichek amitwogikab kipsengwet kobiyo." 
Psalms105:41 Kiyat ruandet, ak kisururgei beek; Kiroot eng’ komoswek che yaamnyotin ko u ainet." 
Psalms105:42 Amu kiibwat ng’olyondennyi ne tilil, Ak Abraham kiboitiondennyi." 
Psalms105:43 Ak kiimut bikyik komong’ eng’ boiboiyet, Ak chechik che kigelewen kotienonu." 
Psalms105:44 Ak kiigochi ichek emotinwekab bororiosiek; Ak kinam boisionikab bik kobunji: 
Psalms105:45 Si kobiit korib konetisiosiekyik, Ak kosub ng’atutikyik. Olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms106:1 Olosu Jehovah, Ee, oweekyi Jehovah kongoi; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms106:2 Ng’o ne imuchi komwa boisionikab kamuktaet, che bo Jehovah, Anan ne imuchi komwaita kalosunennyi tugul?" 
Psalms106:3 Boiboen ichek che ribei kiruoget, Ak inendet ne yaei imanda betusiek tugul." 
Psalms106:4 Ibwata, ee Jehovah, eng’ chamet ne ichame biguk; Ee, rutocha eng’ yetuneng’ung’:" 
Psalms106:5 Si ageer borotetab cheguk che kigelewen, Si abaibait eng’ kagasetab ge ne bo bororieng’ung’, Si alosge koboto boroteng’ung’." 
Psalms106:6 Kigechalwogense koboto kwanisiekyok, Kigeyai tengekto, kigeyai ne ya kot." 
Psalms106:7 Ma iguiyo kwanisiekyok kwong’utiguk eng’ Misri; Ma ibwat chang’indab rirenosieguk; Ago kiingelelso eng’ ye negit nyanjet, noto Nyanjet ne Birir." 
Psalms106:8 Ago kisor ichek amu kainennyi, Si kobiit konaak kimnatennyi ne bo kamuktaet." 
Psalms106:9 Kiger kong’ Nyanjet ne Birir agine, ak kiyaam: Kiindochi anyun kobun rirosiek, ko u ye bunei ong’atet." 
Psalms106:10 Ak kisor ichek eng’ eutab inendet ne kiwechei ichek, Ak kiitiach ichek eng’ eutab bunyot." 
Psalms106:11 Ak kiimaluuch beek bunikwak: Ma ng’et agot agenge eng’ ichek. 
Psalms106:12 Kiiyan anyun ng’alekyik; Kitien kalosunennyi. 
Psalms106:13 Ne matianit koutie boisionikyik; Ma ingen ng’olyondennyi: 
Psalms106:14 Ago kinyor maget ne o eng’ ong’atet, Ak kitiem Kamuktaindet eng’ turguito." 
Psalms106:15 Ak kiigochi kit ne kisom; Ago kiigochi kosogityi sobonwekwak. 
Psalms106:16 Kiam ng’etkong’ ichek agobo Musa agine eng’ nganaset, Koboto Aron ne tilil ne bo Jehovah." 
Psalms106:17 Kiyatak ng’ony ak kilugui Datan, Ak kituch kweanetab Abiram." 
Psalms106:18 Ak kilal mat eng’ kweanenywa; Ak kibeel mat bichoto yaachen. 
Psalms106:19 Kiitany itondab moita eng’ Horeb, Ak kigutung’ji kanamwet ne kigitanyi." 
Psalms106:20 Kiwal anyun telunatenywa Kogergeit ak eito ne ageti. 
Psalms106:21 Kiiutie Kamuktaindet, yetindenywa, Ne kiga koyai tuguk che eechen eng’ Misri;" 
Psalms106:22 Boisionik che kikwong’e eng’ emetab Ham, Ak tuguk che imuisei eng’ ole bo Nyanjet ne Birir." 
Psalms106:23 Kimwa anyun kole ng’emei inendet ichek amu noto, Nda kima tonon Musa nenyi ne kigilewen eng’ tainnyi kooiyo, Koweekta neregekyik, si mabar ichek." 
Psalms106:24 Ee, kisas ichek emet ne kararan, Ma iyan ng’olyondennyi;" 
Psalms106:25 Ago kiing’unyng’ung’so eng’ emaisiekwak, Ama epchi it kutitab Jehovah." 
Psalms106:26 Kinamji barak anyun eunnyi amu noto, Kole kotoorta kobutyo eng’ ong’atet:" 
Psalms106:27 Ak koiyestaat iyotenywa koyom bororiosiek, Ak koiyesta ichek eng’ emotinwek." 
Psalms106:28 Kinamgei ichek ak Baal-peor, Ak kiam korosek che kigieng’jin che kigobek." 
Psalms106:29 Kitach inendet kot konerech amu boisionikwak; Ak king’eet koroito eng’ kwenunywa. 
Psalms106:30 Kitonon anyun Pineas, koruoch: Ak kigigirinda koroito." 
Psalms106:31 Ak kigiit noto koek imanda eng’ inendet, Agoi ibinwek tugul koigeny." 
Psalms106:32 Kitach inendet kogeny eng’ beekab Meriba, Kot koyait noto eng’ Musa amu ichek:" 
Psalms106:33 Amu kiingelelji tamirmiriennyi, Ak king’alal kosartae eng’ kutinnyi." 
Psalms106:34 Ma bar bororiosiek, Ko u ye kiga ng’at Jehovah ichek;" 
Psalms106:35 Ago kiburuigei koboto bororiosiek, Ak kiinetgei boisionikwak:" 
Psalms106:36 Ak kiot kanamonikwak; Che kiek mestet eng’ ichek: 
Psalms106:37 Ee, kiigochi oik werikwak ak tibikwak koek tiseiywek," 
Psalms106:38 Ak kitumda korotik che matinyei tengek, korotikab werikwak ak tibikwak, Che kiigochi kanamonikab Kanan koek tiseiywek; Ak kiging’wanit emet eng’ korotik." 
Psalms106:39 Kimuruonitu anyun eng’ boisionikwak, Ak kiyai ibetab ge eng’ boisionikwak." 
Psalms106:40 Kilalyo anyun neregekab Jehovah eng’ bikyik. Ak kiwech borotennyi. 
Psalms106:41 Ak kiigoito ichek koba eunekab bororiosiek; Ak kiboi ichek che kiwechei. 
Psalms106:42 Kiinyalil ichek bunikwak, Ak kigimut ichek kogas it eng’ eunekab bichoto." 
Psalms106:43 Kisor ichek konyil che chang’; Ago kiek ngelelik eng’ ng’olyondenywa, Ak kigiyai konyeratitu eng’ tengektanywa," 
Psalms106:44 Ago kigeer bichiindanywa, Ye kingogas rirekwak:" 
Psalms106:45 Ak kiibwat kayomisennyi ne kigayomisyi ichek, Ak kirire ichek ko u chang’indab rirenosiekyik." 
Psalms106:46 Kiigochi bik tugul che kiluulei ichek, Korirge." 
Psalms106:47 Soruech, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, Ak iyumech, kemong’une bororiosiek, Si kobiit keweekyi kongoi kaineng’ung’ ne tilil, Ak kilosuge eng’ kalosuneng’ung’." 
Psalms106:48 Iberurot Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, Koboch koigeny agoi koigeny. Ak ingomwa bik tugul kole, Amen. Olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms107:1 Oweekyi Jehovah kongoi; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms107:2 Ingomwa ko u noto che kigotiach Jehovah, Che kigotiach eng’ eutab bunyot;" 
Psalms107:3 Ak kiiyum komong’ eng’ emotinwek, Kobun kong’asis ak cherongo, Murot ne bo katam ak murot ne bo tai." 
Psalms107:4 Kiombenoti eng’ ong’atet eng’ turguito; Kimanyor nganaset ne menyei. 
Psalms107:5 Kiamoti rubet ak melelda, Kitanuiso sobonwekwak." 
Psalms107:6 Kirirji anyun Jehovah eng’ nyalildanywa, Ak kisor ichek komong’une bichiinwekwak." 
Psalms107:7 Kiindochi agine eng’ oret ne litit, Si kobiit koba nganaset ne menyei." 
Psalms107:8 Ee, kata mie kolos bik Jehovah amu mieindanyi, Ak amu boisionikyik che kikwong’e, che yachin werikab bik!" 
Psalms107:9 Amu igochin kobiyo sobondo ne tinyei emosto, Ak inyiityin mieindo sobondo ne amei rubet." 
Psalms107:10 Ichek che kitebe mesundeito ak uruetab meet, Ko ratotin eng’ nyalilda ak karik;" 
Psalms107:11 Amu kiingelelji ng’alekab Kamuktaindet, Ak kisas ng’olyotab Inendet ne Toror Mising’:" 
Psalms107:12 Eng’ noto anyun kiiming’in Jehovah mugulelwekwak eng’ boisiet ne kibirtoegei; Kiibutyo, ak kima biit ne kitoret." 
Psalms107:13 Kirirji anyun Jehovah eng’ nyalildanywa, Ak kisor ichek komong’une bichiinwekwak." 
Psalms107:14 Kiimoong’une mesundeito ak uruetab meet, Ak kong’eti tugukwak che kigirate." 
Psalms107:15 Ee, kata mie kolos bik Jehovah amu mieindanyi, Ak amu boisionikyik che kikwong’e, che yachin werikab bik!" 
Psalms107:16 Amu kibut kereiywekab sugunonik che bo ormarichok, Ak kitil temeleiywekab karik." 
Psalms107:17 Kinyalili che berber amu bistoenywa, Ak amu tengekwogikwak." 
Psalms107:18 Wechei sobonwekwak amit age tugul; Ak rikyin kurgotikab meet. 
Psalms107:19 Korirji anyun Jehovah eng’ nyalildanywa, Ak kosor ichek komong’une bichiinwekwak." 
Psalms107:20 Iyoktoi ng’olyondennyi, kosoob ichek, Ak kosor ichek eng’ ng’emisiosiekwak." 
Psalms107:21 Ee, kata mie kolos bik Jehovah amu mieindanyi, Ak amu boisionikyik che kikwong’e, che yachin werikab bik!" 
Psalms107:22 Ak ingogoito korosekab kongoi, Ak komwaita boisionikyik eng’ tiendo." 
Psalms107:23 Ichek che chorjingei nyanjet eng’ melisiek, Che boisiei eng’ beek che chang’;" 
Psalms107:24 Keerei chuto boisionikab Jehovah, Ak kwong’utikyik eng’ riret." 
Psalms107:25 Amu ng’atei, ak kong’eeti kipchurjuriet, Ne namjin barak mildaennyi bo ge ne bo beek." 
Psalms107:26 Togostoi kipsengwet, ak kochorjingei kogeny oldab rirosiek: Chootos sobonwekwak amu nyalilda." 
Psalms107:27 Iyongooti ak koterterioti ko u chi ne kagobogit, Ak kokwalilendos." 
Psalms107:28 Korirji anyun Jehovah eng’ nyalildanywa, Ak komoong’ ichek eng’ bichiinwekwak." 
Psalms107:29 Igochin anyun kipchurjuriet kosis, Ak kosisyo beek che mildogei." 
Psalms107:30 Koboiboitu anyun amu kagomuung’do; Ak komut agoi koit ole machei komuung’e. 
Psalms107:31 Ee, kata mie kolos bik Jehovah amu mieindanyi, Ak amu boisionikyik che kikwong’e, che yachin werikab bik!" 
Psalms107:32 Ingolos ichek inendet eng’ tuiyetab bik, Ak kolos inendet koboto boisiek eng’ kabuureitanywa." 
Psalms107:33 Walei ainosiek koek ong’atet, Ak kong’ikab beek koek emet ne yaamat;" 
Psalms107:34 Walei emet ne iyiot koek ong’atetab munyuk, Amu sogornatetab icheget che menyei oloto." 
Psalms107:35 Walei ong’atet koek tamboiyot, Ak emet ne yaamat koek kong’ikab beek." 
Psalms107:36 Ak igochin komeny oloto che amei rubet, Si kochob nganaset ne menyei;" 
Psalms107:37 Ak kogol mbarenik, ak komin ketikab sabibuk, Ak koges ruratenywa." 
Psalms107:38 Iberuri anyun ichek, si kotesogis mising’; Ama chamjin tukwak kong’ering’itu." 
Psalms107:39 Ak kogeny, kichuchuchi ak kinyeroti Eng’ usisiet, ak nyalilda, ak arogenet." 
Psalms107:40 Renyei bounik, Ak kogochi koombeniot eng’ surkwen, ole mami oret." 
Psalms107:41 Ago itorori ne banani si manyor usisiet, Ak koyai gab chi koek akwetab kechirek." 
Psalms107:42 Keerei che bo iman ak kogasgei; Ak konamak kut tengekto tugul. 
Psalms107:43 Epchin it ne ng’om tuguchuto, Ak kobwatoti rirenosiekab Jehovah." 
Psalms108:1 Igiilotgei muguleldanyu, ee Kamuktaindet, Atieni, ee atieni kalosunoik, agot eng’ torornatennyu." 
Psalms108:2 Ong’eetye, kibugandet ak ketubet: Ang’eete anendet karon mising’." 
Psalms108:3 Aweegun kongoi, ee Jehovah, eng’ kwenutab bik: Ak atienun kalosunoik eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek." 
Psalms108:4 Amu o rireneng’ung’ kosiir kipsengwetisiek, Ak itei imandang’ung’ sengwetiet." 
Psalms108:5 Tororitu, ee Kamuktaindet, isiir kipsengwetisiek: Ak ingotororit torornateng’ung’ kosiir ng’ony komugul." 
Psalms108:6 Si kesor chamaniguk, Soru eng’ eung’ung’ ne bo tai, ak iwolwech." 
Psalms108:7 Kigotwek Kamuktaindet eng’ tililindanyi; agasige: Apchee Sekem, ak akwa atebwetab Sukot." 
Psalms108:8 Nenyu Gilead; ak nenyu Manase; Epraim agine kimnatetab metinnyu; Juda ko siarinnyu ne bo laitornatet. 
Psalms108:9 Moab ko teret ne aunege; Awirjini kweiyondennyu Edom: Aorene Pilistia. 
Psalms108:10 Imuta ng’o awo nganaset ne ng’otat? Indoiywa ng’o agoi Edom? 
Psalms108:11 Tos ma iwirtech inye, ee Kamuktaindet? Ama iwe, ee Kamuktaindet, koboto lugosiekyok." 
Psalms108:12 Konech toretet kegirindae bunyot: Amu matilei kiy toretetab chi. 
Psalms108:13 Kiyae tuguk che kimen eng’ Kamuktaindet: Amu inendet ne tiekyin ng’ony bunikyok. 
Psalms109:1 Amesis, ee Kamuktaindet ne bo kalosunennyu;" 
Psalms109:2 Amu kaiseng’eng’ja kiptengekyot ak ng’alindet: Kagong’alalwa eng’ kutit ne bo lembech. 
Psalms109:3 Koyiemena ng’alek che bo wechet, Ak koboriena buch." 
Psalms109:4 Kiachame ago kiek bunikyuk: Ago asae. 
Psalms109:5 Ak kiigeerua ne ya eng’ ne mie, Ak kiigeerua wechet eng’ chamnyennyu." 
Psalms109:6 Inde chito ne ya koboi inendet: Ak ingotonone bunyot eunnyi ne bo tai. 
Psalms109:7 Ingonam inendet tengekto ye kiruokyin; Ak ingowalak saennyi koek tengekto. 
Psalms109:8 Ingong’ering’itu betusiekyik; Ak ingonam age boisiennyi. 
Psalms109:9 Ingoek lagokyik che ma kotinyei kwanda, Ak ingoek mosok osotiondennyi." 
Psalms109:10 Ingoombenot lagokyik, kosomsot; Ak ingocheng’ate amitwogikwak ong’atet." 
Psalms109:11 Ingorebe yaagindet tuguk tugul che tinyei; Ak ingoluul toek boisiennyi. 
Psalms109:12 Amat kobiit chi ne rire inendet; Amat kobiit ne rire lagokyik che ma kotinyei kwanda. 
Psalms109:13 Ingogesgei iyotennyi; Ak ingobugok kainenywa eng’ ibinda ne isubu. 
Psalms109:14 Ingobwatak tengektab kwanisiekyik eng’ Jehovah; Amat kibukto tengektab kamet. 
Psalms109:15 Ingotebe taitab Jehovah kotugul, Si kobiit koisto kabwatenywa eng’ ng’ony." 
Psalms109:16 Amu ma ibwat kobarta rirenet, Ago kius kibananiat ne matinyei kiy, Ak ne ilot muguleldo, si kobiit kobar." 
Psalms109:17 Ee, kicham inendet chubisiet, ak kinyonji; Ak kima baibaitune kaberuret, ak kilooit eng’ inendet." 
Psalms109:18 Kiilaach chubisiet ko u ngoriennyi, Ak kichut orinnyi ko u beek, Ak kichut kowekyik ko u mwaita." 
Psalms109:19 Ingoek eng’ inendet ngoriet ne tugegei, Ak birenet ne rategei kotugul." 
Psalms109:20 Nito melektab bunikyuk ne bunu Jehovah, Ak ne bo ichek che mwaei ne ya agobo sobondanyu." 
Psalms109:21 Ago boisie inye agobo ane, ee Jehovah Kiptaiyat, amu kaineng’ung’: Amu mie rireneng’ung’, sorua anyun." 
Psalms109:22 Amu a ne nyalili, amaleli kiy, Ak iguotenot muguleldanyu orit." 
Psalms109:23 Kiabetite ko u uruet ne betei: Kionota ko u chereng’endet. 
Psalms109:24 Nyalulyotin kutung’oikyuk amu karugutetab ge; Ak kagosagit bortanyu. 
Psalms109:25 Kaegu ne kirasyin eng’ ichek: Ye keera, kobarbar metowekwak." 
Psalms109:26 Toreta, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu; Ee, sorua ko u rireneng’ung’:" 
Psalms109:27 Si kobiit konai kole nito ko eung’ung’; Ak konai kole, inye Jehovah ne kiiyai." 
Psalms109:28 Ingochubis, ago iberur inye: Ye ng’eetyo, kolilanso, ago baibai otwogindeng’ung’." 
Psalms109:29 Ingilaakyi tewernatet bunikyuk, Ak ingotugegei ichegei tewernatenywa ko u ngoriet ne kiturturi." 
Psalms109:30 Aweekyini Jehovah kongoi ne o eng’ kutinnyu; Ee, alosu inendet eng’ tuiyet." 
Psalms109:31 Amu tonone eutab tai ne bo inendet ne banani, Si kosor inendet eng’ ichek che iruokyin sobondanyi." 
Psalms110:1 Kalenji Jehovah kiptaiyandennyu, Tebe eunnyu ne bo tai, Agoi ayai buniguk koek ng’echeretab kelyeguk." 
Psalms110:2 Iyoktoi Jehovah siarit ne bo kimnateng’ung’ eng’ Sion: Bou inye eng’ kwenutab buniguk. 
Psalms110:3 Chamdogei biguk eng’ betutab kimnateng’ung’: Eng’ kororonindab tililindo, ye machei koeech. Itinye rewotab ming’inateng’ung’." 
Psalms110:4 Kigoyosio Jehovah, ama walei, kole, I tisiindet koigeny Ko u kit ne ki u Melkisedek." 
Psalms110:5 Kiptaiyat ne mi eung’ung’ ne bo tai. Ko tun tiechatiechi laitorinik eng’ betutab neregekyik. 
Psalms110:6 Iruochi eng’ bororiosiek, Inyiiti emotinwek muswek: Tun kwerei metowek eng’ emotinwek che chang’." 
Psalms110:7 Eei inendet beekab ainet eng’ oret: Yotei met anyun amu noto. 
Psalms111:1 Olosu Jehovah. Aweekyini Jehovah kongoi eng’ muguleldanyu komugul, Eng’ kapkiruogetab che bo iman, ak eng’ tuiyet." 
Psalms111:2 Eechen boisionikab Jehovah, Che cheng’ei ichek tugul che boiboitune." 
Psalms111:3 Boisiennyi ko teegisto ak etunatet: Ak tebyei imandanyi koigeny. 
Psalms111:4 Kiyai Jehovah boisionikyik che kikwong’e, si kibwataat: Bo Jehovah mieindo ak ko nyiitat rirenet." 
Psalms111:5 Kigogochi amitwogik che iywei inendet: Ibwati kayomisennyi kotugul. 
Psalms111:6 Kigoborji bikyik kimnatetab boisionikyik, Ye kiigochi konyaban bororiosiek." 
Psalms111:7 Boisionikab eunekyik ko imanda ak kiruoget; Isuldootin konetisiosiekyik tugul. 
Psalms111:8 Kigigimit kotebi koigeny ak koigeny, Kiyaei eng’ imanda ak lititindo." 
Psalms111:9 Kigoyokyi bikyik katiaget; Kigong’at kayomisennyi kobunji koigeny: Tilil kainennyi ne kiywei. 
Psalms111:10 Kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah ko taunetab ng’omnatet; Tinyei kaguiyet ne mie ichek tugul che yaei choto: Tebyei koigeny kalosunennyi. 
Psalms112:1 Olosu Jehovah. Baibai chi ne iywei Jehovah, Ne boiboitune mising’ ng’atutikyik." 
Psalms112:2 Tun kimitu iyotennyi eng’ ng’ony: Kiberuri oretab che bo iman. 
Psalms112:3 Mi gonnyi magornatet ak berurwogik: Ak tebyei imandanyi koigeny. 
Psalms112:4 Ng’eetei lapkeiyet eng’ mesundeito koluuchin che bo iman: Tinyei mieindo, ak ko nyiitat rirenet, ak bo iman." 
Psalms112:5 Mie eng’ chito ne boisiei eng’ mieindo ak kobesendoi; Chobei ng’alekyik eng’ imanda. 
Psalms112:6 Amu magoi kiisto; Kibwati ne bo iman koigeny. 
Psalms112:7 Maiywei inendet ng’alek che yaachen: Igiilotgei muguleldanyi, komang’u Jehovah." 
Psalms112:8 Lumdaat muguleldanyi, ama tinyei kaiyweisiet, Agoi kogeer magennyi eng’ bunikyik." 
Psalms112:9 Kigoseerseer, kigogochi che matinyei kiy; Tebyei imandanyi koigeny: Kitorori kuinennyi eng’ teegisto." 
Psalms112:10 Keerei kiptengekyot, ak koarogen; Nyeei kelekyik, ak kochoot: Betei magetab kiptengeginik." 
Psalms113:1 Olosu Jehovah. Olosu, okwek che oboisiechini Jehovah, Olosu kainetab Jehovah." 
Psalms113:2 Iberurot kainetab Jehovah Koboch nguno agoi koigeny. 
Psalms113:3 Koboch ko kachor asis agoi kororokto Nyolu kilos kainetab Jehovah. 
Psalms113:4 Toror Jehovah eng’ bororiosiek tugul. Ak toror etunatennyi kosiir kipsengwetisiek. 
Psalms113:5 Ng’o ne kergei ak Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, Ne tebe ole toror," 
Psalms113:6 Ne iming’inegei si kogeer Che mi kipsengwet ak che mi ng’ony? 
Psalms113:7 Ing’eeti kibananiat komong’une temburiek, Ak koganabune kapng’atat che matinyei kiy:" 
Psalms113:8 Si kogochi kotebi ak bounik, Agot bounikab bikyik." 
Psalms113:9 Igochin ne son korib got, Ak koek kamet ne baibai ne bo lagok. Olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms114:1 Ye kingomanda Israel eng’ Misri, Gotab Jakobo eng’ bik che ng’alale kutit ne ter;" 
Psalms114:2 Koek Juda oldanyi ne tilil, Ak koek Israel bounatennyi." 
Psalms114:3 Kigeer nyanjet inendet, ak kimwei; Kigiweekta Jordan kwo let." 
Psalms114:4 Kitorombenso tulonok ko u mengichik, Ak kitorombenso tulonok che mengechen ko u arekab kechir." 
Psalms114:5 Amin nee, ee nyanjani, kot imwei? Amin nee, inye Jordan, kot iweeige let?" 
Psalms114:6 Okwek tulonok, kot otorombenote ko u mengichik; Ak okwek tulonok che mengechen kot otorombenote ko u arekab kechir?" 
Psalms114:7 Botan, inye ng’ony, eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat, Eng’ taitab Kamuktaindetab Jakobo;" 
Psalms114:8 Ne kiwal ruandet koek tamboiyot, Ak ruandet ne uui koek ole isururune beek." 
Psalms115:1 Amegonech, ee Jehovah, amegonech Telunatet, ago igochi kaineng’ung’, Amu rireneng’ung’ ak imandang’ung’." 
Psalms115:2 Amu nee si komwa bororiosiek kole, Mi ano Kamuktaindenywa nguno?" 
Psalms115:3 Ago mitei Kamuktaindennyo kipsengwetisiek: Kigoyai inendet kiy age tugul ne kimachei. 
Psalms115:4 Bo feda ak tahabu kanamonikwak, Boisietab eunekab bik." 
Psalms115:5 Tinyei kutuswek, ago matwegu; Tinyei konyek, ago mageertoi;" 
Psalms115:6 Tinyei itik, ago magastoi; Tinyei serunek, ago maing’utoi;" 
Psalms115:7 Tinyei eunek, ago manamei kiy; Tinyei kelyek, ago mabendoti; Ama ng’alale mokwekwak." 
Psalms115:8 Kergeitu icheget che kiyaei, ak tukchoto; Ee, age tugul ne imang’u choto." 
Psalms115:9 Ee Israel, imang’u inye Jehovah: Inendet toretindenywa ak long’enywa." 
Psalms115:10 Ee gotab Aron, omang’u okwek Jehovah: Inendet toretindenywa ak long’enywa." 
Psalms115:11 Okwek che oiywei Jehovah, omang’u Jehovah: Inendet toretindenywa ak long’enywa." 
Psalms115:12 Kigobwatech Jehovah; iberurech: Iberuri gotab Israel; Iberuri gotab Aron. 
Psalms115:13 Iberuri ichek che iywei Jehovah, Che mengech ak che eech." 
Psalms115:14 Ingoyabak Jehovah obaraitu, Okwek ak lagokwok." 
Psalms115:15 Oberurotin eng’ Jehovah, Ne kiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony." 
Psalms115:16 Kipsengwetisiek ko kipsengwetisiek che bo Jehovah. Ago kiigochi ng’ony werikab bik. 
Psalms115:17 Mailosu Jehovah che kigobek, Anan age tugul ne chorjingei oldab sisek;" 
Psalms115:18 Ago kilosu achek Jehovah Koboch nguno agoi koigeny. Olosu Jehovah. 
Psalms116:1 Achame Jehovah, amu kigogas Kutinnyu ak somutikyuk." 
Psalms116:2 Amu kigoepcha it, Aguure inendet anyun kota asobe amu noto." 
Psalms116:3 Kiyiema boroonikab meet, Ak kinama ng’wonikwekab oldab che kigobek: Kianyoru nyalilda ak arogenet." 
Psalms116:4 Kiaguur anyun kainetab Jehovah; Ee Jehovah, asain ale, sorua sobondanyu." 
Psalms116:5 Bo mieindo Jehovah ak ko bo imanda; Ee, tinyei rirenetab ge Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms116:6 Ribei Jehovah abusanik: Kiginyerata, ago kisorua inendet." 
Psalms116:7 Iweekyige kamuung’eng’ung’, ee sobondanyu; Amu kagoyaun Jehovah eng’ aiyebindo." 
Psalms116:8 Amu kiisoru sobondanyu eng’ meet, Ak konyekyuk eng’ beekab kong’, Ak kelyekyuk si mabut." 
Psalms116:9 Awendote taitab Jehovah Eng’ emotinwekab che soptos. 
Psalms116:10 Ayani, noto anyun ang’alali: Kiginyalila mising’:" 
Psalms116:11 Kiamwa eng’ sartaet, ale, Kiplembechonik bik tugul." 
Psalms116:12 Aweekyini nee Jehovah Amu konunoikyik tugul che kona? 
Psalms116:13 Aname kikombetab yetunet, Ak aguure kainetab Jehovah." 
Psalms116:14 Agochini Jehovah che kiaarorji, Ee, agochini eng’ taitab bikyik tugul." 
Psalms116:15 Kit ne siirtoot mising’ eng’ kororonindo eng’ taitab Jehovah Ko meetab chechik che tililen. 
Psalms116:16 Ee Jehovah, a kiboitiondeng’ung’ iman: A kiboitiondeng’ung’, a weritab otwogeng’ung’ ne tie; Kiitiach ratutikyuk." 
Psalms116:17 Agonin korosiot ne bo kongoi, Ak aguur kainetab Jehovah." 
Psalms116:18 Agochini Jehovah choto che kiaarorji, Ee, agochini eng’ taitab bikyik tugul;" 
Psalms116:19 Eng’ seremusiekab gotab Jehovah, Eng’ kwenung’ung’, ee Jerusalem. Olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms117:1 Olosu Jehovah, okwek bororiosiek tugul; Ogonyit inendet, okwek bik tugul." 
Psalms117:2 Amu o rirenennyi eng’ achek; Ak tebyei koigeny imandab Jehovah. Olosu Jehovah. 
Psalms118:1 Omwachi Jehovah kongoi; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms118:2 Ingomwa Israel kole, Tebyei rirenennyi koigeny," 
Psalms118:3 Ingomwa gotab Aron nguno kole, Tebyei rirenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms118:4 Ingomwa nguno ichek che iywei Jehovah, kole, Tebyei rirenennyi koigeny." 
Psalms118:5 Kiaguur Jehovah eng’ bichiindanyu: Kiwolwa Jehovah ak kondea ole baraa. 
Psalms118:6 Mi Jehovah komostanyu; maiyweisiei: Imuchi koyaiywa nee chi? 
Psalms118:7 Mi Jehovah komostanyu eng’ kwenutab che toreta: Ageere anyun amu noto magennyu eng’ che wecha. 
Psalms118:8 Kaigai kimang’u Jehovah Kosiir kimang’u chi. 
Psalms118:9 Kaigai kimang’u Jehovah Kosiir kimang’u bounik. 
Psalms118:10 Kiyiema bororiosiek tugul: Ang’eetoi ichek eng’ kainetab Jehovah. 
Psalms118:11 Kiyiema; ee, kiyiema: Ang’eetoi ichek eng’ kainetab Jehovah." 
Psalms118:12 Kiyiema ko u segemik; kibek ko u matab katok; Ang’eetoi ichek eng’ kainetab Jehovah. 
Psalms118:13 Kiiokta inye ile abut: Ago kitoreta Jehovah. 
Psalms118:14 Kimnatennyu ak tiendanyu Jehovah; Ak kagoek yetunennyu. 
Psalms118:15 Mitei emaisiekab che bo iman kutitab boiboindo ak yetunet: Yaei eutab tai ne bo Jehovah tuguk che kimen. 
Psalms118:16 Itororot eutab tai ne bo Jehovah: Yaei eutab tai ne bo Jehovah tuguk che kimen. 
Psalms118:17 Mamee, ago asobe, Ak amwaitoi boisionikab Jehovah." 
Psalms118:18 Kibira Jehovah mising’: Ago ma igoita ame. 
Psalms118:19 Oyatwa kurgotikab imanda: Awa orit, amwachi Jehovah kongoi." 
Psalms118:20 Ni ko kurgetab Jehovah; Bunei che bo iman. 
Psalms118:21 Amwaun kongoi, amu kiiwolwa, Ak kaiegu yetunennyu." 
Psalms118:22 Koita ne kiesio teegik, Kaek noto metitab luita." 
Psalms118:23 Bunu Jehovah ng’olyondoni; Kwong’utiet noto eng’ konyekyok. 
Psalms118:24 Ni betut ne kiyai Jehovah; Kiboiboi ak kigasege noto. 
Psalms118:25 Ee Jehovah, kisain kele, soruech nguno: Ee Jehovah, kisain iyogu borotet." 
Psalms118:26 Iberurot inendet ne nyonei eng’ kainetab Jehovah: Kagiberurok achek eng’ kaberuret ne bunu gotab Jehovah. 
Psalms118:27 Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet, ak kagogonech lapkeiyet: Orat tiseiywot eng’ boroonik, oratyi kuinoikab kaptisisiet." 
Psalms118:28 I Kamuktaindennyu, ak amwaun kongoi: I Kamuktaindennyu, atororin." 
Psalms118:29 Omwachi kongoi Jehovah; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms119:1 Boiboen che igesunotgei eng’ oret, Che bendote ng’atutietab Jehovah." 
Psalms119:2 Boiboen ichek che ribei baornatosiekyik, Che cheng’ei inendet eng’ muguleldo komugul." 
Psalms119:3 Ee, mayaei ichek che ma bo iman; Bendote ortinwekyik." 
Psalms119:4 Kiing’at konetisiosieguk, Ile kisub eng’ kagiiletab ge." 
Psalms119:5 Ee, kata mie nda ka kimen ortinwekyuk Si kobiit asub ng’atutiguk!" 
Psalms119:6 Si malilan, Ye aribe komie ng’atutiguk tugul." 
Psalms119:7 Amwaun kongoi eng’ lititindab muguleldo, Ye anetige kirogutiguk che bo iman." 
Psalms119:8 Asubi ng’atutiguk: Ee, amebagakta agoi." 
Psalms119:9 Itilile nee mureno orennyi? Kogas it, ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:10 Kiacheng’in eng’ muguleldanyu tugul: Amegona alooitune ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:11 Kaagonore muguleldanyu ng’olyondeng’ung’. Si mayaun tengek. 
Psalms119:12 Iberurot inye, ee Jehovah: Ineta ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:13 Kiamwaite eng’ kutinnyu Kiruogutik tugul che bunu kuting’ung’. 
Psalms119:14 Kiabaibaitune oretab baornatosieguk, Ko u ye abaibai eng’ magornatosiek tugul." 
Psalms119:15 Abwatati konetisiosieguk, Ak aribe ortinweguk." 
Psalms119:16 Abaibaitu eng’ ng’atutiguk; Mautie ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:17 Yachi kiboitiondeng’ung’ eng’ aiyebindo, si kobiit asob; Si arib anyun ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:18 Yat konyekyuk, si kobiit ageer Tuguk che kikwong’e eng’ ng’atutieng’ung’." 
Psalms119:19 A kiprutoiyo eng’ ng’ony: Ameung’ena ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:20 Tonoksei sobondanyu amu emosto Ne tinyei kotugul eng’ kiruogutiguk. 
Psalms119:21 Kiiger kong’ menotik che chubotin, Che looitune ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:22 Istoena chotisiet ak sasisiet; Amu kiarib baornatosieguk. 
Psalms119:23 Kitebi bounik kochaama: Ago kiibwati kiboitiondeng’ung’ ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:24 Boiboiyennyu baornatosieguk Ak che ing’omita. 
Psalms119:25 Namegei sobondanyu ak temburiek: Isooba inye ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:26 Kiaboru ortinwekyuk, ak kiiwolwa: Ineta ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:27 Kona aguiyo oretab konetisiosieguk: Si abwatat boisioniguk che kikwong’e. 
Psalms119:28 Chootei sobondanyu amu arogenet: Igimita ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:29 Istoena oretab lembech: Ak igona ng’atutieng’ung’ eng’ mieindo. 
Psalms119:30 Kialewen oretab imanda: Kiande tainnyu kiruogutiguk. 
Psalms119:31 Kinamege ak baornatosieguk: Ee Jehovah, amegona alilan." 
Psalms119:32 Alabati eng’ oretab ng’atutiguk Ye ibaroi muguleldanyu. 
Psalms119:33 Ineta, ee Jehovah, oretab ng’atutiguk; Ak asub agoi kagesunet." 
Psalms119:34 Kona naet, si kobiit arib ng’atutieng’ung’: Ee, si asub eng’ muguleldanyu komugul." 
Psalms119:35 Kona abun oretab ng’atutiguk; Amu abaibaitune choto. 
Psalms119:36 Tokyi muguleldanyu baornatosieguk, Ametokyi maget ne ya." 
Psalms119:37 Iweech konyekyuk si mageer che ma nyolu. Ak isooba eng’ ortinweguk. 
Psalms119:38 Igimityi kiboitiondeng’ung’ ne iywein, Ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:39 Istoena rosyinet ne aiywei: Amu miachen kiruogutiguk. 
Psalms119:40 Keero, kigoama emo agobo konetisiosieguk: Isooba eng’ imandang’ung’." 
Psalms119:41 Ingobwanja rirenosieguk, ee Jehovah, Agot yetuneng’ung’, ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:42 Si anyor kit ne awoljini inendet ne rosyina; Amu amang’u ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:43 Amereb ng’olyondeng’ung’ ne bo iman eng’ kutinnyu; Amu kiamang’u kiruogutiguk. 
Psalms119:44 Si asub ng’atutiguk kotugul Koigeny ak koigeny. 
Psalms119:45 Si awendot eng’ kaiyesetab ge; Amu kiacheng’ konetisiosieguk. 
Psalms119:46 Amwaitoi agine baornatosieguk eng’ taitab laitorinik, Amalilani." 
Psalms119:47 Ak abaibaitu eng’ ng’atutiguk, Che kiacham." 
Psalms119:48 Anamjini barak eunekyuk atokyini ng’atutiguk, che kiacham; Ak abwatati kayomisutiguk." 
Psalms119:49 Ibwat ng’olyot ne kiiarorji kiboitiondeng’ung’, Amu kiigona amang’." 
Psalms119:50 Nito ko kagaigaennyu eng’ nyalildanyu: Amu kigosooba ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:51 Kigororecha mising’ menotik: Ago tom amaste amete ng’atutieng’ung’. 
Psalms119:52 Kiabwat kiruogutiguk che bo keny, ee Jehovah. Ak kiagaigaige." 
Psalms119:53 Kianerech mising’ kot, Amu kiptengeginik che bagaktoi ng’atutieng’ung’." 
Psalms119:54 Kigoek ng’atutiguk tienwogikyuk Eng’ gotab rutoitanyu. 
Psalms119:55 Kiabwat kaineng’ung’ kemoi, ee Jehovah, Ak kiasub ng’atutieng’ung’." 
Psalms119:56 Kiatinye ko u noto, Amu kiarib konetisiosieguk." 
Psalms119:57 Jehovah kebebertanyu: Kiamwa ale asubi ng’aleguk. 
Psalms119:58 Kiarirji chamnyeng’ung’ eng’ muguleldanyu komugul: Rirena ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:59 Kiabwat ortinwekyuk, Ak kiatokyi kelyekyuk baornatosieguk." 
Psalms119:60 Kiachokyi, kimagage, Asub ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:61 Kigoratarata boroonikab kiptengeginik; Ago tom autie ng’atutieng’ung’. 
Psalms119:62 Ang’eete kemoi kwen amwaun kongoi Amu kiruogutiguk che bo iman. 
Psalms119:63 A choruetab ichek tugul che iywein, Ak ne bo icheget che isubi konetisiosieguk." 
Psalms119:64 Nyiitat ng’ony rireneng’ung’, ee Jehovah: Ineta ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:65 Kiiyachi ne mie kiboitiondeng’ung’, Ee Jehovah, ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:66 Ineta kiruoget ne mie ak naet; Amu kiayan ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:67 Kiabetote ye kitom kinyalila; Ago nguno asubi ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:68 I mie, ak iyae ne mie; Ineta ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:69 Kogochob menotik lembechek agobo ane: Aribe konetisiosieguk eng’ muguleldanyu komugul. 
Psalms119:70 Katimogis mugulelwekwak eng’ akwaindo; Ago abaibaitune ng’atutieng’ung’," 
Psalms119:71 Mie eng’ ane amu kiginyalila; Si kobiit anetge ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:72 Kaigai eng’ ane ng’atutietab kuting’ung’ Kosiir elfusiekab tahabu ak feda. 
Psalms119:73 Kiyaa euneguk ak kogimita: Kona naet, si kobiit anetge ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:74 Keera che iywein ak koboiboitu; Amu kiamang’u ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:75 Angen, ee Jehovah, ale bo iman kiruogutiguk, Ak kiibira eng’ imandang’ung’." 
Psalms119:76 Asain ale ingoek chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala ne igaigaa, Ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’ eng’ kiboitiondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:77 Ingobwanja rirenosieguk che bo chamnyet, si asob: Amu boiboiyennyu ng’atutieng’ung’." 
Psalms119:78 Ingolilanso menotik; amu kigonyalila buch: Ago abwatati konetisiosieguk. 
Psalms119:79 Ingoweekyagei che iywein, Si konai baornatosieguk." 
Psalms119:80 Ingoek ne igesunotgei muguleldanyu eng’ ng’atutiguk; Si malilan. 
Psalms119:81 Tanui sobondanyu amu machei yetuneng’ung’: Ago amang’u ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:82 Kaimenitu konyekyuk agobo ng’olyondeng’ung’, Ye amwae ale, Igaigaa au?" 
Psalms119:83 Amu kaige sotet ne kiginde iyeto; Ago mautie ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:84 Egu ata betusiekab kiboitiondeng’ung’? Iruokyini au che onota? 
Psalms119:85 Kigobal keringonik menotik agobo ane, Che maisubi ng’atutieng’ung’." 
Psalms119:86 Bo iman ng’atutiguk tugul: Onota buch; toreta inye. 
Psalms119:87 Ki negit kowong’wa eng’ ng’ony; Ago kima abagakte konetisiosieguk. 
Psalms119:88 Isooba eng’ chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala; Si asub anyun baornatetab kuting’ung’. 
Psalms119:89 Ee Jehovah, tebe ng’olyondeng’ung’ kipsengwet Koigeny." 
Psalms119:90 Yamu ibinwek tugul imandang’ung’: Kiigimit inye ng’ony, ak tebyei." 
Psalms119:91 Tebyei ichek agoi kora ko u kiruogutiguk; Amu otwogiguk tuguk tugul. 
Psalms119:92 Nda kimaek boiboiyennyu ng’atutieng’ung’, Ta kiabet eng’ nyalildanyu." 
Psalms119:93 Magoi autie konetisiosieguk; Amu kiisooba inye eng’ choto. 
Psalms119:94 A neng’ung’, sorua anyun; Amu kiacheng’ konetisiosieguk." 
Psalms119:95 Kiigena kiptengeginik, kole kobara; Ago aruchini baornatosieguk." 
Psalms119:96 Kiageer ole bochitu kagesunatetab ge tugul; Ago baraa ng’atutieng’ung’. 
Psalms119:97 Tia chamnyet ne achame ng’atutieng’ung’! Noto kabwatennyu betut komugul. 
Psalms119:98 Ing’omita ng’atutiguk asiir bunikyuk: Amu mi kobota kotugul. 
Psalms119:99 Atinye naet ne o asiir konetikyuk tugul; Amu kabwatennyu baornatosieguk. 
Psalms119:100 Aguitosi asiir boisiek, Amu kiarib konetisiosieguk." 
Psalms119:101 Kiaistoe kelyekyuk oret age tugul ne ya, Si kobiit asub ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:102 Tom amaste abagakte kiruogutiguk; Amu kiineta inye. 
Psalms119:103 Anyinyen ne tia ng’aleguk ye achamjami! Ee, anyinyen kosiir kumiat eng’ kutinnyu!" 
Psalms119:104 Anyoru naet eng’ konetisiosieguk: Noto aweche oret age tugul ne bo lembech. 
Psalms119:105 Taitab kelyekyuk ng’olyondeng’ung’, Ak lapkeiyetab orennyu." 
Psalms119:106 Kiayosie, ak kiagimit noto, Ale asub kiruogutiguk che bo iman." 
Psalms119:107 Kinyalila mising’: Isooba, ee Jehovah, ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:108 Asain ale taach konunoikab kutinnyu, ee Jehovah, Ak ineta kiruogutiguk." 
Psalms119:109 Aiboti sobondanyu eng’ eunnyu kotugul; Ago mautie ng’atutieng’ung’. 
Psalms119:110 Kagochob mestet kiptengeginik agobo ane; Ago mamaste abagakte konetisiosieguk. 
Psalms119:111 Koanam baornatosieguk koek borotet ne bo koigeny; Amu choto boiboiyetab muguleldanyu. 
Psalms119:112 Kiatokyi muguleldanyu ale ayai ng’atutiguk, Koigeny, agoi koit kagesunet." 
Psalms119:113 Aweche ichek che bo kabwatutik aeng’; Ago achame ng’atutieng’ung’. 
Psalms119:114 I ole aung’egei ak ko i long’ennyu: Amang’u ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:115 Oba eng’ ole ami, okwek yaikab yaitio; Si kobiit arib ng’atutikab Kamuktaindennyu." 
Psalms119:116 Tiia ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’, si kobiit asob. Amegona alilan agobo kamang’unennyu." 
Psalms119:117 Tiia, si maama kiy, Ak atokyige ng’atutiguk kotugul." 
Psalms119:118 Kiiwal koek buch ichek tugul che istoegei ng’atutiguk; Amu lembech ng’alsenywa. 
Psalms119:119 Iistoi ko u busagariek kiptengeginik tugul che bo ng’ony: Achame anyun baornatosieguk amu noto. 
Psalms119:120 Botani bortanyu amu aiywein; Ak aiywei kiruogutiguk. 
Psalms119:121 Kiayai kiruoget ak imanda: Amebagakya usikyuk. 
Psalms119:122 Egu ne tononjin kiboitiondeng’ung’ eng’ ne mie: Amat kousa menotik. 
Psalms119:123 Kaimenitu konyekyuk amu machei yetuneng’ung’, Ak ng’olyondeng’ung’ ne bo iman." 
Psalms119:124 Yachi kiboitiondeng’ung’ ko u rireneng’ung’, Ak ineta ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:125 A kiboitiondeng’ung’, kona naet; Si anai baornatosieguk." 
Psalms119:126 Kagoit betut ne kanyol kobois Jehovah; Amu kagowal ichek ng’atutieng’ung’ koek buch. 
Psalms119:127 Achame anyun ng’atutiguk amu noto Kosiir tahabu, ee, kosiir tahabu che kororon." 
Psalms119:128 Eng’ noto anyun aiiti ale lititen konetisiosieguk tugul agobo tuguk tugul; Ak aweche oret age tugul ne bo lembech. 
Psalms119:129 Bo kwong’et baornatosieguk: Ribei anyun sobondanyu ichek amu noto. 
Psalms119:130 Igoitoi lapkeiyet ng’ang’utietab ng’aleguk; Ing’omiti ne abusat. 
Psalms119:131 Kiaseng’eng’e, ak asieny; Amu kiatinye emosto agobo ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:132 Iweekyage, ak irirena, Ko u ye kicham iyachini icheget che chamei kaineng’ung’." 
Psalms119:133 Igimit tiegutikyuk eng’ ng’olyondeng’ung’; Amat koboiywa tengek age tugul. 
Psalms119:134 Itiacha eng’ sastaet ne bo chi: Si asub anyun konetisiosieguk. 
Psalms119:135 Ikweng’e kiboitiondeng’ung’ togeng’ung’; Ak ineta ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:136 Isururune beek che chang’ konyekyuk, Amu maisubi ichek ng’atutieng’ung’." 
Psalms119:137 I bo iman, inye, ee Jehovah, Ak lititen kiruogutiguk." 
Psalms119:138 Kiing’at baornatosieguk eng’ imanda Ak eng’ lititindo ne o. 
Psalms119:139 Kigowong’wa kagiilennyu bo ge, Amu kigoutie bunikyuk ng’aleguk." 
Psalms119:140 Tilil mising’ ng’olyondeng’ung’; Chamei kiboitiondeng’ung’ anyun amu noto. 
Psalms119:141 A nyerat, ak a sasat: Ago mautie konetisiosieguk." 
Psalms119:142 Imandang’ung’ ko imanda ne wendi agoi koigeny. Ak imanda ng’atutieng’ung’. 
Psalms119:143 Kanama nyalilda ak bichiindo: Ago boiboindanyu ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:144 Bo iman baornatosieguk agoi: Kona naet, si asob." 
Psalms119:145 Kiaguurse eng’ muguleldanyu komugul; wolwa, ee Jehovah: Aribe ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:146 Kiaguurin; sorua anyun, Si asub baornatosieguk." 
Psalms119:147 Kiaguurin kotom koeech: Kiamang’u ng’aleguk. 
Psalms119:148 Asib agosu kota ko kemoi, Si kobiit abwat ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:149 Kas kutinnyu ko u chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala: Isooba, ee Jehovah, ko u kiruogutiguk." 
Psalms119:150 Karik ichek che isubi tengekto; Kigolooegitu eng’ ng’atutieng’ung’. 
Psalms119:151 I negit inye, ee Jehovah; Ak bo iman ng’atutiguk tugul." 
Psalms119:152 Kianai koboch keny eng’ baornatosieguk, Ale kiigimit kotebi ichek agoi." 
Psalms119:153 Ibwat nyalildanyu, ak isorua; Amu mautie ng’atutieng’ung’." 
Psalms119:154 Ibesiewa ng’alekyuk, ak itiacha: Isooba ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:155 Loo yetunet eng’ kiptengeginik; Amu macheng’ei ichek ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:156 Eechen rirenosieguk che bo chamnyet, ee Jehovah: Isooba ko u kiruogutiguk." 
Psalms119:157 Chang’ usikyuk ak bunikyuk; Ago tom amaste eng’ baornatosieguk. 
Psalms119:158 Kiageer che ng’alsei, ak kiaarogen; Amu maisubi ichek ng’olyondeng’ung’." 
Psalms119:159 Ibwat ole achamdoi konetisiosieguk: Isooba ko u chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms119:160 Bo iman ng’aleguk tugul ko kagiyomo; Ak tebyei koigeny kiruogeng’ung’ age tugul ne bo iman. 
Psalms119:161 Kigoonata buch bounik; Ago iywei muguleldanyu ng’aleguk. 
Psalms119:162 Abaibai eng’ ng’olyondeng’ung’, Ko u ne nyoru tuguk che luulei che chang’." 
Psalms119:163 Aweche ak asase lembechek; Ago achame ng’atutieng’ung’. 
Psalms119:164 Alosun konyil tisab eng’ betut, Amu kiruogutiguk che bo iman." 
Psalms119:165 Tinyei kalyet ne o che chamei ng’atutieng’ung’; Ama mi kiy ne inachi ichek. 
Psalms119:166 Kiamang’u yetuneng’ung’, ee Jehovah, Ak kiayai ng’atutiguk." 
Psalms119:167 Kigosub sobondanyu baornatosieguk; Ak achame mising’ kot. 
Psalms119:168 Kiasub konetisiosieguk ak baornatosieguk; Amu mi taing’ung’ ortinwekyuk tugul. 
Psalms119:169 Ingorikyi taing’ung’ rirekyuk ee Jehovah: Kona naet ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:170 Ingonyo taing’ung’ somennyu: Sorua ko u ng’olyondeng’ung’. 
Psalms119:171 Ingotwek kutinnyu komwa kalosunet; Amu ineta ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:172 Ingotien ng’elyeptanyu agobo ng’olyondeng’ung’; Amu bo iman ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms119:173 Ingochobok eung’ung’ kotoreta; Amu kialewen konetisiosieguk. 
Psalms119:174 Kigoama emosto agobo yetuneng’ung’, ee Jehovah; Ak boiboindanyu ng’atutieng’ung’." 
Psalms119:175 Ingosob sobondanyu, si kolosun; Ak ingotoreta kiruogutiguk." 
Psalms119:176 Kiabetote ko u kechiriet ne betot; cheng’ kiboitiondeng’ung’; Amu mautie ng’atutiguk. 
Psalms120:1 Kiarirji Jehovah eng’ bichiindanyu, Ak kiwolwa." 
Psalms120:2 Soru sobondanyu, ee Jehovah, eng’ kutuswek che mwaei lembech, Ak eng’ ng’elyepta ne ng’alsei." 
Psalms120:3 Kigonin nee, anan kitesun nee, Inye, ng’elyepta ne ng’alsei?" 
Psalms120:4 Kipchabonik che litotin che bo che kimen Koboto nesek che bo ketit ne kiguure junipa. 
Psalms120:5 Bwawe, ane amu kiaegu ononio eng’ Mesek, Amu amenye kwenutab emaisiekab Kedar!" 
Psalms120:6 Kigomeng’is sobondanyu keny Koboto inendet ne wechei kalyet. 
Psalms120:7 Achame kalyet: Ago ye ang’alali, kochamei ichek boriet." 
Psalms121:1 Anyali tulonok: Bunu ano toretennyu? 
Psalms121:2 Bunu toretennyu Jehovah, Ne kiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony." 
Psalms121:3 Machamdoi inendet keldang’ung’ keisto: Mainuuchi inendet ne ribin. 
Psalms121:4 Ogeero, inendet ne ribei Israel Ko mainuuchi ama ruei." 
Psalms121:5 Ribindeng’ung’ Jehovah: Jehovah urueng’ung’ eng’ eung’ung’ ne bo tai. 
Psalms121:6 Mabirin asista bet, Ama birin arawet kemoi." 
Psalms121:7 Ribin Jehovah eng’ yaitiet tugul; Ribei sobondang’ung’. 
Psalms121:8 Ribin Jehovah ye imandoi sang’ ak ye inyone go, Koboch nguno agoi koigeny." 
Psalms122:1 Kiabaibaitu ye kimwawa ichek Kole, Ongebe gotab Jehovah." 
Psalms122:2 Tonondos kelyekyok Eng’ ormarichoguk, ee Jerusalem." 
Psalms122:3 Jerusalem, ne teegat Ko u nganaset ne tuiyot:" 
Psalms122:4 Ole togoste bororiosiek, bororiosiekab Jehovah, Koek baornatet eng’ Israel, Si komwa kongoi agobo kainetab Jehovah." 
Psalms122:5 Amu kiginde oloto ng’echerokab laitornatet che bo kiruoget, Ng’echerokab laitornatet che bo gotab Daudi." 
Psalms122:6 Osomji kalyet Jerusalem: Nyoru borotet ichek che chamin. 
Psalms122:7 Ingotebe kalyet irimoiguk, Ak ingotebe borotet goriguk che eechen." 
Psalms122:8 Amu tupchosiekyuk ak choronokyuk, Amwae nguno ale, Ingotebenen kalyet." 
Psalms122:9 Amu gotab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo Acheng’un mieindo. 
Psalms123:1 Anyalin, Ee inye ne tebe kipsengwetisiek." 
Psalms123:2 Ogeero, ko u ye keerei otwogik eutab kiptaiyandenywa, Ko u ye keerei chepto eutab chebioset ne bou inendet; Ko u noto keerei konyekyok Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, Agoi korirenech." 
Psalms123:3 Rirenech, ee Jehovah, rirenech; Amu kigonyiiech sasisiet mising’." 
Psalms123:4 Kigonyi sobonwekyok mising’ Chotisietab icheget che imuunyi, Ak eng’ sasisietab menotik." 
Psalms124:1 Nda kima ko Jehovah ne kimi komostanyo, Ingomwa Israel nguno kole:" 
Psalms124:2 Nda kima ko Jehovah ne kimi komostanyo, Ye king’eetyinech bik:" 
Psalms124:3 Ta kigoluguech kesoptosi, Ye kilaldos neregekwak agobo achek:" 
Psalms124:4 Kita imaluuchech beek, Kita roote ainet sobonwekyok:" 
Psalms124:5 Kita roote sobonwekyok beek che wasegei. 
Psalms124:6 Iberurot Jehovah, Ne kima igoitech kibutyi kelekwak." 
Psalms124:7 Chilildos sobonwekyok ko u ye chilili taritiet eng’ mestetab kiplogotinik che barei taritik: Kagong’et mestet, ak kagechililse." 
Psalms124:8 Mitei toretennyo kainetab Jehovah, Ne kiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony." 
Psalms125:1 U ichek che imang’u Jehovah Tulwetab Sion, ne magimuchi keisto, ago tebyei koigeny." 
Psalms125:2 Ko u ye kiyiem tulonok Jerusalem, Yiemei Jehovah ko u noto bikyik, Koboch nguno agoi koigeny." 
Psalms125:3 Amu malaitorani siaritab tengekto eng’ oldab che bo iman: Si maiyogochi che bo iman, eunekwak tengekto." 
Psalms125:4 Yachi ne mie che miachen, ee Jehovah. Ak ichek che lititen mugulelwekwak." 
Psalms125:5 Ago ichek che mastoi kosubi ortinwekwak che kunuren, Koonei Jehovah ichek koboto yaikab tengekto. Ingotebe kalyet Israel." 
Psalms126:1 Ye kiweekta Jehovah che kigeluul che bo Sion, Ko kigiige che iruotitoi." 
Psalms126:2 Konyi anyun roriot kutuswekyok, Ak kinyi ng’elyebwekyok tienwogik: Komwa anyun bororiosiek kole, Kogoyachi Jehovah tuguk che eechen." 
Psalms126:3 Kogoyaiywech Jehovah tuguk che eechen; Che kiboiboitune. 
Psalms126:4 Iweech chechok che kigeluul, ee Jehovah, Ko u ainosiek che bo Murot ne bo Tai." 
Psalms126:5 Kesei eng’ boiboiyet che kolsei eng’ beekab kong’. 
Psalms126:6 Agot ngo wendi koriroti, koibei keswek; Koweeksei kogasanugei, koibu ratutikyik che bo bek." 
Psalms127:1 Ngot ko mateech Jehovah got, Koboisiei buch che teechei: Ngot ko marib Jehovah nganaset, Kogosu buch ribindet." 
Psalms127:2 Buch eng’ okwek ye ong’eetosi kota ko karon mising’, ak otebye keny si obendi oruitosi, Ak oame amitwogik che onyaliljini: Igochin anyun chamanennyi ruondo." 
Psalms127:3 Ogeero, borotet ne bunu Jehovah, lagok; Ak konunennyi iyotetab moet." 
Psalms127:4 Ko u kipchabonik eng’ eutab ne kim, Ko u noto lagokab che ta ko neran." 
Psalms127:5 Baibai chi ne nyiitat motiennyi: Manyoru kalilanet, Ye ng’alaldos ak bunikwak eng’ ormarich." 
Psalms128:1 Baibai age tugul ne iywei Jehovah, Ne wendote ortinwekyik." 
Psalms128:2 Amu iame boisionikab euneguk: Ibaibaitu, ak italbisi." 
Psalms128:3 Igeitu osotiondeng’ung’ ketit ne yiei ne bo sabibuk, eng’ gong’ung’ orit: Igeitu lagoguk ketik che mengechen che bo emitik che yiemei meseng’ung’." 
Psalms128:4 Ogeero, kiberuri ko u noto chito Ne iywei Jehovah." 
Psalms128:5 Iberurin Jehovah eng’ Sion: Ak igeere borotetab Jerusalem betusiek tugul che bo sobeng’ung’. 
Psalms128:6 Ee, tun igeere mochogoroniguk. Ingotebe kalyet Israel." 
Psalms129:1 Kigonyalila ichek konyil che chang’ koboch ko a ming’in, Ingomwa Israel nguno kole," 
Psalms129:2 Kigonyalila ichek konyil che chang’ koboch ko a ming’in: Ago kima itertera. 
Psalms129:3 Kiibat batennyu kabatik; Kigerer kererjosiek koeegitu. 
Psalms129:4 Bo iman Jehovah: Kigong’eti boroonikab kiptengeginik. 
Psalms129:5 Ingolilanso ak koweekyigei let. Ichek tugul che wechei Sion. 
Psalms129:6 Ingoigei ichek suswek che mi gorik barak, Che restos kotom koeegitu:" 
Psalms129:7 Che mainyiiti eunnyi kesindet, Ama yamei koue choto eunek tuwai, inendet ne ratei ratutikab bek." 
Psalms129:8 Ama mwaei che siirtoi kole, Ingotebenok berurtab Jehovah; Kiberurok eng’ kainetab Jehovah." 
Psalms130:1 Kiarirjin eng’ rirosiek, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms130:2 Kiptaiyat, kas kutinnyu: Ingoepchi it iting’ung’ Kutitab somutikyuk." 
Psalms130:3 Ngot iit inye Jehovah, tengekwogik, Ko ng’o ne imuchi kotonon, ee Kiptaiyat?" 
Psalms130:4 Ago mitei nyoetab kaat eng’ inye, Si kobiit kiywein." 
Psalms130:5 Ageni Jehovah, igenisiei sobondanyu, Ak amang’u ng’olyondennyi." 
Psalms130:6 Igeni sobondanyu Kiptaiyat, Kosiir ribik che igeni egonet; Ee, kosiir ribik che igeni egonet." 
Psalms130:7 Ee Israel, imang’u Jehovah; Amu mi rirenet eng’ Jehovah, Ak mi katiaget ne siirei eng’ inendet." 
Psalms130:8 Ak kitiachi inendet Israel Eng’ tengekwogikyik tugul. 
Psalms131:1 Jehovah, mamenei muguleldanyu; Ama mi katororetab ge eng’ koneykyuk; Amayae tuguk che eechen, Anan alosyige tuguk che kikwong’e mising’." 
Psalms131:2 Kiabirge iman ak agochi sobondanyu kosis; Ko u lakwet ne kaluge kamet, U sobondanyu lakwet ne kagiluge." 
Psalms131:3 Ee Israel, imang’u Jehovah Koboch nguno agoi koigeny." 
Psalms132:1 Ee Jehovah, ibwat agobo Daudi Nyalilwogikyik tugul;" 
Psalms132:2 Ko u ye kiiyosiechi Jehovah, Ak kiiarorji Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet ne bo Jakobo, kolenji:" 
Psalms132:3 Iman, mawendi emait orit ne bo gonnyu, Anan atogoste itogunnyu:" 
Psalms132:4 Magere konyekyuk eng’ ruondo, Anan anuuch;" 
Psalms132:5 Agoi acheng’ji Jehovah oldo, Meng’otetab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet ne bo Jakobo." 
Psalms132:6 Ogeero, kigegas agobo noto eng’ Eprata: Kiginyorji kewet ne mi timdo." 
Psalms132:7 Kibendi meng’otosiekyik; Kigutunyi eng’ ng’echeretab kelyekyik kel. 
Psalms132:8 Ng’eet, ee Jehovah, ui ole imuung’e; Inye ak moingetab kimnateng’ung’." 
Psalms132:9 Ingolaach tisiiguk imanda; Ak ingogasgei eng’ kutit ne o eng’ boiboindo cheguk che tililen. 
Psalms132:10 Amewelel togetab neng’ung’ ne kiil Amu kiboitiondeng’ung’ Daudi. 
Psalms132:11 Kiiyosiechi Jehovah Daudi eng’ iman; Maweechegei let: Andoi ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo bounateng’ung’ age ne bunu bortang’ung’. 
Psalms132:12 Ngot korib lagoguk arorutiennyu Ak bounatennyu ne tun aneti, Kotebe anyun lagokwak agichek ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo bounatet agoi koigeny." 
Psalms132:13 Amu kigolewen Jehovah Sion; Kimakyigei koek ole tebe. 
Psalms132:14 Yuto ko komosta ole amuung’e koigeny: Atebe yuto; amu kiamach. 
Psalms132:15 Aberuri mising’ amitwogikyik: Abae kibananokyik amitwogik kot kobiyong’so. 
Psalms132:16 Alaakyini tisiikyik agichek yetunet: Ak kogasgei eng’ kutit ne o eng’ boiboindo chechik che tililen. 
Psalms132:17 Ayae eng’ oloto kuinetab Daudi kong’at: Kiachopchi nenyu ne kigiil, tait." 
Psalms132:18 Alaakyini bunikyik kalilanet: Ago tuneni eng’ inendet mariennyi ne bo bounatet. 
Psalms133:1 Ogeero, mie ne tia ak kararan ne tia Ye meng’indos che tupcho eng’ yamdaet agenge!" 
Psalms133:2 Kergei ak mwaita ne kararan mising’ ne kiile metit, Ne kirootei agoi tamnet, Agot tamnetab Aron: Ne kirootei agoi kaatitab ngoroikyik:" 
Psalms133:3 U rewotab Hermon, Che chorjingei tulonokab Sion: Amu oloto ole king’ate Jehovah kaberuret, Agot sobondab koigeny." 
Psalms134:1 Ogeero, olosu Jehovah, okwek kiboitinikab Jehovah, Che tonondos kemoi eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
Psalms134:2 Otokyi eunekwok oldab tililindo, Ak olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms134:3 Ingoberurin Jehovah eng’ Sion; Inendet ne kiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony. 
Psalms135:1 Olosu Jehovah. Olosu kainetab Jehovah; Olosu inendet, okwek kiboitinikab Jehovah:" 
Psalms135:2 Okwek che kotonondosi eng’ gotab Jehovah, Eng’ seremusiekab gotab Kamuktaindennyo." 
Psalms135:3 Olosu Jehovah; amu mie Jehovah: Otienji kainennyi kalosunoik; amu kararan. 
Psalms135:4 Amu kigolewenjigei Jehovah Jakobo, Ak Israel koek kinnyi ne nenyi iman." 
Psalms135:5 Amu angen ale o Jehovah. Ak siirei Kiptaiyandennyo cheptalelisiek tugul. 
Psalms135:6 Kigoyai Jehovah kit age tugul ne chamei, Eng’ kipsengwet ak eng’ ng’ony, eng’ nyanjosiek ak rirosiek tugul." 
Psalms135:7 Igochin kibungweret kotogosta kong’eete tabanwekab ng’ony; Yachin ropta kalyelosiek; Imoong’u usonet eng’ konoraikyik. 
Psalms135:8 Ne kibar taiywek che bo Misri, Che bo bik ak che kitwatei che kiyagi." 
Psalms135:9 Kiiyokto kaborunoik ak kwong’utik koba kwenung’ung’, ee Misri, Kobwanji Parao ak otwogikyik tugul." 
Psalms135:10 Ne kibir bororiosiek che chang’, Ak kibar laitorinik che kimen;" 
Psalms135:11 Sihon laitoriatab Amorik, Ak Og laitoriatab Basan, Ak bororiosiek tugul che bo Kanan:" 
Psalms135:12 Ak kiigoito emenywa koek borotet, Borotetab bikyik Israel." 
Psalms135:13 Tebyei kaineng’ung’ koigeny, ee Jehovah; Tebyei kabwateng’ung’ eng’ ibinwek tugul, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms135:14 Amu iruoksechin Jehovah bikyik, Ak koriregei kiboitinikyik." 
Psalms135:15 Kanamonikab bororiosiek ko bo feda ak tahabu. Boisietab eunekab bik. 
Psalms135:16 Tinyei kutuswek, ago matwegu; Tinyei konyek, ago mageertoi;" 
Psalms135:17 Tinyei itik, ago magastoi; Ama mi kabuset eng’ kutuswekwak." 
Psalms135:18 Kergeitu icheget che kiyaei, ak tukchoto; Ee, age tugul ne imang’u ichek." 
Psalms135:19 Ee gotab Israel, olosu Jehovah: Ee gotab Aron, olosu Jehovah;" 
Psalms135:20 Ee gotab Lawi, olosu Jehovah: Okwek che oiywei Jehovah, olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms135:21 Iberurot Jehovah eng’ Sion, Inendet ne menyei Jerusalem. Olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms136:1 Ogochi Jehovah kongoi; amu mie inendet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:2 Ee ogochi kongoi Kamuktaindet ne bou cheptalelisiek: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:3 Ee ogochi kongoi Kiptaiyatab kiptainik: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:4 Inendet ne yaei inegei kwong’utik che eechen: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:5 Inendet ne kiyai kipsengwetisiek eng’ ng’omnatet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:6 Inendet ne kiito ng’onyut eng’ beek barak: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:7 Inendet ne kiyai lapkeiyosiek che eechen: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:8 Asista ne bou eng’ betut: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:9 Arawek ak kecheik che bou eng’ kemoi: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:10 Inendet ne kibir Misri eng’ taiywekwak: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:11 Ak kiimut Israel komong’ eng’ kwenunywa: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:12 Eng’ eut ne kim ak eng’ eut ne chuulat: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:13 Inendet ne kipcheune aeng’ Nyanjet ne Birir: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:14 Ak kiigochi Israel kobun kwenunnyi: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:15 Ago kitoorji Parao ak lugosiekyik Nyanjet ne Birir: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:16 Inendet ne kiindochi bikyik kobun ong’atet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:17 Inendet ne kibir laitorinik che eechen: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:18 Ak kibar laitorinik che toogunotin: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:19 Sihon laitoriatab Amorik: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:20 Ak Og laitoriat Basan: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:21 Ak kiigoito emenywa koek borotet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:22 Borotetab kiboitiondennyi Israel: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:23 Ne kiibwatech eng’ nyeratiennyo: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny: 
Psalms136:24 Ak ne kiitiachech eng’ bunikyok: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:25 Inendet ne igochin amitwogik tugul che bo borwek: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms136:26 Ee ogochi kongoi Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet: Amu tebyei rirenennyi koigeny. 
Psalms137:1 Kigitebe ngegutab ainosiekab Babulon, Ee kigirirtosi eng’ oloto, Ye kingibwati Sion." 
Psalms137:2 Kigigartate ketubosiekyok ketik che bo kererusiek Eng’ kwenutab emonoto. 
Psalms137:3 Amu kimagenech tienwogik eng’ oloto ichek che kiluulech, Ak kimagenech boiboiyet ichek che kiinyalilech, Kolen, Otienwech tiendo agenge eng’ tienwogikab Sion." 
Psalms137:4 Kimuktoi ano ketien tiendab Jehovah Eng’ emet ne ki onon? 
Psalms137:5 Ngot autienen, ee Jerusalem, Ko ingoutie eunnyu ne bo tai ng’omnatennyi." 
Psalms137:6 Ingonamgei ng’elyeptanyu ak kutit, Ngot ko ma abwatin; Ngo ma achame Jerusalem Kosiir boiboiyennyu ne siirtoot." 
Psalms137:7 Ibwat, ee Jehovah, ak iityi bikab Edom Betutab Jerusalem: Che kilen, Obut, obut, Agot oldanyi ole tonone gorik." 
Psalms137:8 Ee, cheptab Babulon, ne tun kiwong’un; Baibai inendet ne igeerun Ko u ye kiiyaiywech." 
Psalms137:9 Baibai inendet ne namei manyuruniguk Ak kowire ruandet. 
Psalms138:1 Agonin kongoi eng’ muguleldanyu komugul: Atienun kalosunoik eng’ taitab kanamonik. 
Psalms138:2 Agutunyi atokyinige hekalung’ung’ ne tilil, Ak agochini kaineng’ung’ kongoi amu chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala amu imandang’ung’: Amu kiieet ng’olyondeng’ung’ kosiir kaineng’ung’ komugul." 
Psalms138:3 Kiiwolwa eng’ betut ne kiaguurin, Kiigimita eng’ kimnatet eng’ sobondanyu." 
Psalms138:4 Konin kongoi laitorinik tugul che bo ng’ony, ee Jehovah, Amu kigogas ng’alekab kuting’ung’." 
Psalms138:5 Ee, tieni ichek agobo ortinwekab Jehovah: Amu o torornatetab Jehovah." 
Psalms138:6 Amu agot ngo toror Jehovah, kogeerei ne nyerat: Ago ingen inendet menotiot agot ngo mi ole loo." 
Psalms138:7 Agot ngabunoti kwenutab nyalilda, ko inye ne isooba; Iitoi eung’ung’ igirindoe neregekab bunikyuk, Ak sorua eung’ung’ ne bo tai." 
Psalms138:8 Isuldawa Jehovah tuguk che nyoljina: Tebyei rireneng’ung’ koigeny, ee Jehovah; Amebagakte boisionikab euneguk." 
Psalms139:1 Ee Jehovah, kiisiacha, ak kiinaa." 
Psalms139:2 Ingen ye atebye ak ye ang’eete, Ingen kabwatutikyuk agot ngimi ole loo." 
Psalms139:3 Isiachi korennyu ak ole arue, Ak ingen ortinwekyuk tugul." 
Psalms139:4 Amu mami ng’olyo ng’elyeptannyu, Keero, ingen inye tugul, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms139:5 Kiiyiema tai ak let, Ak kiigonoora eung’ung’." 
Psalms139:6 Bo kwong’et ne o eng’ ane, ng’omnatet ne u noto; Toror, mamuchi aityi." 
Psalms139:7 Awendoti ano aistoege Tamirmirieng’ung’? Anan amwechini ano ole memi? 
Psalms139:8 Ngatogoste kipsengwet, imi oloto: Agot ngaite itogunnyu eng’ oldab che kigobek, keero, imi oloto." 
Psalms139:9 Ngaib kebebaikab karon, Ak awe atebe tabanwekab nyanjet;" 
Psalms139:10 Kondoiywa eung’ung’ agot eng’ oloto, Ak nama eung’ung’ ne bo tai." 
Psalms139:11 Ngot amwa ale, tucha mesundeito iman, Ak ngale koek lapkeiyet ne yiema, kemout;" 
Psalms139:12 Ko agot mesundeito, ko maung’enengei, Ago iluu kemout ko u bet: Kergei mesundeito ak lapkeiyet eng’ inye." 
Psalms139:13 Amu inye ne kiiyai sobondanyu: Kiitucha eng’ moetab kamennyu. 
Psalms139:14 Aweegun kongoi, amu kigiyaa eng’ oretab kaiyweisiet, ak eng’ kwong’utiet: Kwong’utik boisioniguk. Ak ingen sobondanyu ng’olyondonoto komie." 
Psalms139:15 Maung’enenge bortanyu, Ye kigiyaa eng’ ung’ot, Ak ye kigimimia eng’ ng’omnatet eng’ ng’ony orit." 
Psalms139:16 Kigeer konyeguk bortanyu kotom kosulda, Ak kigisirji bukuing’ung’ kebeberwekyuk tugul, Che kigiyaei betut age tugul, Ye kitom kobiit agot agenge eng’ ichek." 
Psalms139:17 Kororon ne tia kabwatutiguk che iting’ena, ee Kamuktaindet! Eechen ne tia ichek tugul ko kagiyomo!" 
Psalms139:18 Nda aiiti ichek, ko chang’ kosiir ng’aniek: Ye agosu, ko ta ami koboten." 
Psalms139:19 Iman, ibare kiptengeginik, ee Kamuktaindet: Oistoenage anyun, okwek bik che tumdoi korotik." 
Psalms139:20 Amu mwaei ichek tengekto agobo inye, Ak mwaei kaineng’ung’ buch buniguk." 
Psalms139:21 Ee Jehovah, tos maweche ichek che wechin? Ak manerekyini ichek che ng’eetyinin?" 
Psalms139:22 Aweche ichek konyi: Aiiti ichek ale bunikyuk. 
Psalms139:23 Isiacha, ee Kamuktaindet, ak inai muguleldanyu: Tiema, ak inai kabwatutikyuk:" 
Psalms139:24 Ak igeer ngo mi or age tugul ne bo tengek eng’ ane, Ak indoiywa eng’ oret ne bo koigeny." 
Psalms140:1 Sorua, ee Jehovah, eng’ chito ne ya; Riba eng’ chito ne korom;" 
Psalms140:2 Che ibwati yaitwogik eng’ mugulelwekwak; Iyomdosgei kotugul agobo luget. 
Psalms140:3 Kigolit ng’elyebwekwak ko u erenet: Mitei ng’wonetab erenok kutuswekwak. 
Psalms140:4 Riba, ee Jehovah, eng’ eunekab kiptengekyot; Riba eng’ chito ne korom: Ne bekyinot kotoorta." 
Psalms140:5 Kigouny menotik mestet agobo ane, ak boroonik; Kigoiito mestet ne u regereiywot eng’ oret taban; Kigoriich mestonok agobo ane." 
Psalms140:6 Kialenji Jehovah, Inye ko i Kamuktaindennyu: Epchi it somutikyuk che bunu kutinnyu, ee Jehovah." 
Psalms140:7 Ee Jehovah Kiptaiyat, kimnatetab yetunennyu, Kiituch metinnyu eng’ betutab luget." 
Psalms140:8 Amegochi kiptengeginik tuguk che machei, ee Jehovah; Ametoret konyor magennyi ne ya; si mayaigei koeegitu." 
Psalms140:9 Ago ingotuch metowekab icheget che yiema, Yaitietab kutuswekwak." 
Psalms140:10 Ingobutyi ichek ng’etetiot: Ingewirji ichek ma; Agoi rirosiek, si mata kong’eetyo kogeny." 
Psalms140:11 Magigimiti chito ne bo ng’alek che yaach eng’ ng’ony: Cheng’ei yaitiet chito ne korom, si koterter inendet." 
Psalms140:12 Angen ale toreti Jehovah ng’alekab ne kinyalili, Ak kit ne nyoljin inendet ne banani." 
Psalms140:13 Iman, igochin kongoi kaineng’ung’ bik che bo imanda; Menyei taing’ung’ che lititen." 
Psalms141:1 Kaaguurin Jehovah; chogu nyonja: Epchi it kutinnyu, ye aguurin." 
Psalms141:2 Ingotogosta saennyu ko u nyamdutik eng’ taing’ung’; Ingoigei eunekyuk che anamjini barak, korosiot ne bo koskoleny." 
Psalms141:3 Nde ribindet kutinnyu, ee Jehovah; Rib kurgetab kutinnyu." 
Psalms141:4 Ametokyi muguleldanyu kiy age tugul ne ya, Koboisie boisionikab tengekto Koboto bik che yaei tengekto: Amechamwa aam tugukwak che anyiny." 
Psalms141:5 Ingobira ne bo iman, si koek noto ne mie; Ak ingogera kong’, kogergeit anyun noto ak mwaita ne mi metinnyu; Amat koesio metinnyu: Amu mametoi asa agot eng’ kwenutab tengekwogikwak." 
Psalms141:6 Kigitoorta kiruogikwak kong’irtae ruandet, Kogas anyun ng’alekyuk; amu anyinyen." 
Psalms141:7 Ko u ye ibati chito ng’onyut ak kogereri, Ko u noto iseeroksei kowekyok eng’ kutitab kererit." 
Psalms141:8 Amu inyalin konyekyuk, ee Jehovah Kiptaiyat: Amang’un inye; amegochi sobondanyu kobanan." 
Psalms141:9 Riba si manama mestet ne kiriich ichek agobo ane, Ak mestonokab yaikab yaitio." 
Psalms141:10 Ingobutyi kiptengeginik mestonokwak, Ye achilili." 
Psalms142:1 Arirjini Jehovah eng’ kutinnyu: Atwekyini Jehovah aipchini somennyu. 
Psalms142:2 Arong’jini tainnyi rirekyuk; Abortoi eng’ tainnyi nyalildanyu. 
Psalms142:3 Ye kingotanui tamirmiriennyu, inai orennyu. Kigouny ichek mestet agobo ane eng’ oret ne abune." 
Psalms142:4 Kusyi kong’ eunnyu ne bo tai, ak igeer; amu mami chi ne ingena: Kigobetwa ole amwechini; mami chi ne ribei sobondanyu." 
Psalms142:5 Kiarirjin inye, ee Jehovah; Kiamwa ale, I oldanyu ole amwechini, I kebebertanyu eng’ emetab che soptos." 
Psalms142:6 Epchi it rirekyuk; amu kinyerata mising’: Sorua eng’ usikyuk; amu kimen kosiira. 
Psalms142:7 Imoong’u sobondanyu eng’ korgoret, si agochi kongoi kaineng’ung’: Yeima che bo iman komoswekyuk tugul; Amu iyaiywa eng’ aiyebindo." 
Psalms143:1 Kas saennyu, ee Jehovah; epchi it somutikyuk: Wolwa eng’ imandang’ung’ ak lititindang’ung’." 
Psalms143:2 Ameruokyi otwogindeng’ung’; Amu mami chi ne sobei ne kiityin imanda eng’ taing’ung’. 
Psalms143:3 Anu kigous bunyot sobondanyu; Kigokwer sobondanyu kobutyi ng’ony: Kigogona ameng’ot ole imen, ko u che kigobek keny." 
Psalms143:4 Kigotanui amu tamirmiriennyu eng’ orit; Kaek muguleldanyu kipkuberet eng’ orit. 
Psalms143:5 Abwatati betusiek che bo keny; Aruchinoti boisioniguk tugul: Aruchinoti boisionikab euneguk. 
Psalms143:6 Atokyinin eunekyuk: Amei melelda sobondanyu agobo inye ko u emet ne yaamat. 
Psalms143:7 Chokyi wolwa, ee Jehovah; ichuchui tamirmiriennyu: Ameung’ena togeng’ung’; Si maige ichek che chorjingei keringet." 
Psalms143:8 Kona agas chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala karon; Amu amang’un: Kona anai oret ne abune; Amu atokyinin sobondanyu. 
Psalms143:9 Sorua, ee Jehovah, eng’ bunikyuk; Amwechinin iunya." 
Psalms143:10 Ineta ayai mageng’ung’; amu inye ko i Kamuktaindennyu: Mie Tamirmirieng’ung’; indoiywa eng’ emetab lititindo. 
Psalms143:11 Isooba, ee Jehovah, amu kaineng’ung’: Imoong’u sobondanyu eng’ nyalilda amu imandang’ung’." 
Psalms143:12 Ak ing’eti bunikyuk eng’ chamnyeng’ung’ ne tala, Ak ing’em ichek tugul che inyalili sobondanyu; Amu a kiboitiondeng’ung’." 
Psalms144:1 Iberurot Jehovah ruandennyu, Ne ineti eunekyuk luget, Ak koneti morikyuk boriet:" 
Psalms144:2 Inendet chamnyennyu ne tala, ak irimennyu, Teeksennyu ne koi, ak sorunindennyu; Long’ennyu, ak inendet ne amang’u; Ne igochin bikyuk kogasa it." 
Psalms144:3 Jehovah, tos nee chi, kot inai? Anan weritab chi, ne tos iit ile kiy?" 
Psalms144:4 Kergei chi ak kiy buch; U betusiekyik merumbet ne siirtoi. 
Psalms144:5 Ing’uruch kipsengwetisieguk, ee Jehovah, ak ichoruge: Twa tulonok, si koiyenso," 
Psalms144:6 Iyokte kalyelet, ak iyeste ichek; Mwokte kipchaboniguk, ak inyalil ichek." 
Psalms144:7 Iyogau eung’ung’ eng’ barak; Itiacha, ak isorua eng’ beek che chang’, Eng’ eunekab toek;" 
Psalms144:8 Che nyalili kutuswekwak tugukab buch, Ak eunekwak che bo tai ko eunek che bo lembech." 
Psalms144:9 Atienun tiendo ne leel, ee Kamuktaindet, Atienun kalosunoik eng’ kibugandet ne bo inoik taman." 
Psalms144:10 Inendet ne igochin yetunet laitorinik: Ne soru Daudi kiboitiondennyi eng’ rotwetab chok ne bo yaitiet. 
Psalms144:11 Itiacha, ak isorua eng’ eunekab toek, Che nyalili kutuswekwak tugukab buch, Ak eunekwak che bo tai ko eunek che bo lembech." 
Psalms144:12 Ye kagergeit werikyok ko ta ko neran ak ketik che bitos; Ak kogergeit tibikyok ak koikab luita che kigiwai ko u che bo gotab laitoriat; 
Psalms144:13 Ye nyiitat chogenikyok tuguk tugul che konorotin: Ak koiiyo kechirekyok elfusiek ak tamanusiekab elfusiek eng’ korotinwekyok; 
Psalms144:14 Ye laisei eikyok; Ye mami ne ibogu, ama mi ondo. Ama biit kateiyet eng’ ortinwekyok che eechen;" 
Psalms144:15 Boiboen bik, che tebyei ko u noto: Ee, boiboen bik, che Kamuktaindenywa ko Jehovah." 
Psalms145:1 Alosun inye, Kamuktaindennyu, ee Laitoriat; Ak alosu kaineng’ung’ koigeny ak koigeny." 
Psalms145:2 Amwae betut age tugul ale iberurot; Ak alosu kaineng’ung’ koigeny ak koigeny. 
Psalms145:3 O Jehovah, ak kanyol kilos mising’; Ak ma isiagaksei etunatennyi." 
Psalms145:4 Ilosu boisioniguk ibinda age agoi age, Ak mwaitoi boisioniguk che bo kamuktaet." 
Psalms145:5 Abwatati telunatet ne o ne bo teegistang’ung’, Ak ne bo boisioniguk che bo kwong’et." 
Psalms145:6 Ak ng’alali bik agobo kamuktaetab boisioniguk che kiywei; Ak amwaitoi oindang’ung’. 
Psalms145:7 Twegu ichek komwaei kabwatetab mieindang’ung’ ne o, Ak tieni ichek agobo imandang’ung’." 
Psalms145:8 Jehovah ko ne bo mieindo, ak konyiitat rirenet; Masib konerechi, ak tinyei rirenet ne o." 
Psalms145:9 Mie Jehovah eng’ bik tugul; Ak bou rirenosiekyik che taloen boisionikyik tugul. 
Psalms145:10 Weegun kongoi boisioniguk tugul, ee Jehovah: Ak len cheguk che tililen, iberurot." 
Psalms145:11 Ng’alali ichek agobo torornatetab bounateng’ung’, Ak ng’alale kimnateng’ung’;" 
Psalms145:12 Koborji werikab bik boisionikyik che bo kamuktaet, Ak torornatetab etunatet ne bo bounatennyi." 
Psalms145:13 Laitornateng’ung’ ko laitornatet ne bo koigeny. Ak tebyei bounatengung’ eng’ ibinwek tugul. 
Psalms145:14 Tiiei Jehovah tugul che ibutos, Ak ing’eeti icheget tugul che ing’uruksei."
