Psalms145:15 Igenin konyekab bik tugul; Ak igochini amitwogikwak eng’ betut ne nyolu. 
Psalms145:16 Ing’anye eung’ung’, Ak igochini age tugul ne sobei kit ne machei kot kobiyo." 
Psalms145:17 Bo iman Jehovah eng’ ortinwekyik tugul, Ak tala eng’ boisionikyik tugul." 
Psalms145:18 Negit Jehovah icheget tugul che kuurei inendet, Tugul che kuurei eng’ iman." 
Psalms145:19 Isuldochin icheget che iywei inendet kit ne machei ichek; Kasei inendet rirekwak, ak soru." 
Psalms145:20 Ribei Jehovah tugul che chamei inendet; Ago ng’emei kiptengeginik. 
Psalms145:21 Ng’alali kutinnyu agobo kalosunetab Jehovah; Ak ingolos bik tugul kainennyi ne tilil koigeny ak koigeny. 
Psalms146:1 Olosu Jehovah. Ilosu Jehovah, ee sobondanyu." 
Psalms146:2 Alosu Jehovah kota asobe: Atienjini Kamuktaindennyu kalosunoik kote asobe. 
Psalms146:3 Amat omang’u bounik, Anan weritab chi, ne mami toretet eng’ inendet." 
Psalms146:4 Mandoi kabusennyi, weekyingei ng’ung’unyekyik; Betos kabwatutikyik eng’ betunoto." 
Psalms146:5 Baibai inendet ne tinyei Kamuktaindetab Jakobo ne toretennyi, Ne mi kamuung’ennyi Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi:" 
Psalms146:6 Ne kiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony, Nyanjet, ak tugul che mi oloto; Ne ribei imanda koigeny:" 
Psalms146:7 Ne iruoksechinechin che kiusei: Ne igochin amitwogik che amei rubet: Itiachi Jehovah che ratotin; 
Psalms146:8 Yatei Jehovah konyekab che koriotin; Ing’eeti Jehovah che ing’uruksei; Chamei Jehovah che bo iman. 
Psalms146:9 Ribei Jehovah toek; Tiiei ne matinyei kwanda ak mosoget; Ago igabui oretab kiptengekyot. 
Psalms146:10 Laitorani Jehovah koigeny, Laitorani Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ ibinwek tugul, ee Sion. Olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms147:1 Olosu Jehovah; Amu mie ketienji Kamuktaindennyo kalosunoik; Amu kararan, ak nyolu kalosunet." 
Psalms147:2 Teechei Jehovah Jerusalem; Iyumi inendet che kigion che bo Israel. 
Psalms147:3 Inyai che ilyotin mugulelwekwak, Ak koratei mookwak." 
Psalms147:4 Iiti kecheik ole te; Tochin ichek tugul kainaik. 
Psalms147:5 O Kiptaiyandennyo, ak tinyei kimnatet ne o kosiir; Magimuchi ketet ng’omnatennyi." 
Psalms147:6 Tiiei Jehovah che iming’inegei: Ago chooru kiptengeginik kobwa ng’ony. 
Psalms147:7 Otienji Jehovah koboto kagoitoetab kongoi: Otienji Kamuktaindennyo kalosunoik eng’ ketubet: 
Psalms147:8 Ne tuge bolik kipsengwet, Ne chopchin ropta ng’ony, Ne ibiti suswek eng’ tulonok." 
Psalms147:9 Igochin inendet amitwogik tiong’ik, Ak chepkuginik che iteeitos." 
Psalms147:10 Mabaibai inendet eng’ kimnatetab mbartanyit: Ama baibai eng’ kelyekab chito. 
Psalms147:11 Baibai Jehovah eng’ ichek che iywei inendet, Eng’ icheget che imang’u rirenennyi." 
Psalms147:12 Ilosu Jehovah, ee Jerusalem; Ilosu Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ee Sion." 
Psalms147:13 Amu kagogimit temeleiywekab ormarichoguk; Kigoberur lagoguk eng’ kwenung’ung’. 
Psalms147:14 Yaei kalyet eng’ kiwotosieguk; Inyiitin nganok che neriotin kosiir. 
Psalms147:15 Iyokyin ng’ony ng’atutiennyi; Ak labati ng’olyondennyi mising’. 
Psalms147:16 Konu teluchi ko u kororikab kechirek; Iseeroti chepkosiet ko u orek. 
Psalms147:17 Iyoktoi beekyik che kigau ak kotonogis: Ng’o ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taitab kaititiennyi? 
Psalms147:18 Iyoktoi ng’olyondennyi, ak koyaei tuguchoto kochootyo: Yaei usonennyi kous, ak koroot beek." 
Psalms147:19 Iborjin Jakobo ng’olyondennyi, Iborjin Israel ng’atutikyik ak kiruogutikyik." 
Psalms147:20 Ma yachin bororiet age tugul ko u noto: Ama nai ichek kiruogutikyik. Olosu Jehovah. 
Psalms148:1 Olosu Jehovah. Olosu Jehovah eng’ kipsengwetisiek: Olosu inendet eng’ komoswek che tororen. 
Psalms148:2 Olosu inendet, okwek malaikaisiekyik tugul: Olosu inendet, okwek lugosiekyik tugul." 
Psalms148:3 Olosu inendet, okwek asista ak arawet: Olosu inendet, okwek kecheik tugul che o bo lapkeiyet." 
Psalms148:4 Olosu inendet, okwek kipsengwetisiekab kipsengwetisiek, Ak okwek beek che omi baragutab kipsengwetisiek." 
Psalms148:5 Ingolos ichek kainetab Jehovah: Amu king’at, ak kiyaogis." 
Psalms148:6 Ak kigogimit agine kotebi koigeny ak koigeny: Kigoyai ng’atutiet ne maigesugei. 
Psalms148:7 Olosu Jehovah eng’ ng’ony, Okwek maswetisiek ak rirosiek tugul:" 
Psalms148:8 Mat ak koiyat, teluchi ak kibungweret; Ak kipchurjuriet, ne isuldochin ng’olyondennyi:" 
Psalms148:9 Tulonok ak tulonok che mengechen; Ketik che iitos, ak taragonik tugul;" 
Psalms148:10 Tiong’ik ak tuga tugul; Tuguk che ichuutegei ng’ony ak taritik che tirirendos: 
Psalms148:11 Laitorinikab ng’ony ak bororiosiek tugul; Bounik ak kiruogik tugul che bo ng’ony: 
Psalms148:12 Murenik ak tibik; Boisiek ak lagok: 
Psalms148:13 Ingolos kainetab Jehovah; Amu kainennyi inegei ne itororot: Siirei torornatennyi ng’ony ak kipsengwet. 
Psalms148:14 Ak kigotoror kuinetab bikyik, Kalosunetab bikyik tugul che tililen; Agot lagokab Israel, bik che negite inendet. Olosu Jehovah." 
Psalms149:1 Olosu Jehovah. Otienji Jehovah tiendo ne leel, Ak kalosunennyi eng’ tuiyetab che tililen." 
Psalms149:2 Ingobaibait Israel eng’ yaindennyi: Ingogasgei lagokab Sion eng’ Laitoriandennywa. 
Psalms149:3 Ingolos kainennyi ye urerendos: Ingotienji inendet kalosunoik eng’ sugutit ne ming’in ak ketubet. 
Psalms149:4 Amu baibai Jehovah eng’ bikyik: Igororoni eng’ yetunet che iming’inegei. 
Psalms149:5 Ingoboiboitu che tililen eng’ telunatet: Ingotienso eng’ boiboiyet eng’ itogusiekwak. 
Psalms149:6 Ingotebe kutuswekwak kalosunoik che eechen che bo Kamuktaindet, Ak ingotebe eunekwak rotwetab chok ne ng’atib komoswek tuwai;" 
Psalms149:7 Si kobiit koyaakyi mugetut bororiosiek, Ak biret ne birei bik;" 
Psalms149:8 Korat laitorinikwak eng’ sirimwek, Ak korat eng’ mugurek che bo karik chechuak che toogunotin:" 
Psalms149:9 Ak koruokyine kiruoget ne sirat; Tinyei teegisi chechik tugul che tililen. Olosu Jehovah. 
Psalms150:1 Olosu Jehovah. Olosu Kamuktaindet eng’ oldanyi ne tilil: Olosu inendet eng’ yamunetab kimnatennyi. 
Psalms150:2 Olosu inendet amu boisionikyik che bo kamuktaet: Olosu inendet ko u ole te etunatennyi ne telunot mising’. 
Psalms150:3 Olosu inendet eng’ cheetab iriaget: Olosu inendet eng’ kibugandet ak ketubet. 
Psalms150:4 Olosu inendet eng’ sugutit ne ming’in ak urertiet: Olosu inendet eng’ kibugandinik che bo inoik ak ndurerusiek. 
Psalms150:5 Olosu inendet eng’ sanisiekab sugunonik che kibirei che cheitos: Olosu inendet eng’ sanisiekab sugunonik che cheitos mising’. 
Psalms150:6 Ingolos Jehovah kiy age tugul ne tinyei kabuset. Olosu Jehovah. 
Proverbs1:1 Kalewenaikab Solomon weritab Daudi, laitoriatab Israel:" 
Proverbs1:2 Kenae ng’omnatet ak konetisiet; Kiguiyo ng’alekab naet; 
Proverbs1:3 Ketaach konetisietab ng’omnatet, Eng’ imanda, ak kiruoget, ak ne nyolu;" 
Proverbs1:4 Kigochi utatiet che berberen, Kogochi muren naet ak ruchinet:" 
Proverbs1:5 Si kobiit kogas chito ne ng’om, ak kotesak eng’ kanetetab ge; Ak si kobiit konyor kiruogutik che bo iman chito ne tinyei kaguiyet;" 
Proverbs1:6 Koguiyo kalewenet, ak kaweekset; Koguiyo ng’alekab bik che ng’omen ak ng’alekwak che ung’otin." 
Proverbs1:7 Taunetab naet ko kiywei Jehovah: Ago sasei che berber ng’omnatet ak konetisiet. 
Proverbs1:8 Werinnyu, epchi it konetisietab kwandang’ung’, Amemete ng’atutietab komet:" 
Proverbs1:9 Amu egu choto narietab mieindo eng’ meting’ung’, Ak koek sirimwek che mi kaating’ung’." 
Proverbs1:10 Werinnyu, ngogaigain kiptengeginik, Ko mecham." 
Proverbs1:11 Ngo mwa kole, Nyo kebe tugul, Ongeribis ketumde korotik, Ongeung’ge kesapchi che matinyei lelut, agot ngo mating’enech ng’olyo;" 
Proverbs1:12 Ongelugui kosoptos ko u oldab che kigobek, Kelugui kochamegei, ko u che chorjingei keringet;" 
Proverbs1:13 Kinyoru tuguk tugul che bo kamanutiet ne o, Kinyiiti gorikyok barunenik;" 
Proverbs1:14 Ongenamge; Si keyamde tugukyok tugul: 
Proverbs1:15 Werinnyu, amobe oret agenge koboto ichek; Iste keldang’ung’ eng’ orenywa:" 
Proverbs1:16 Amu ruachin kelyekwak yaitiet, Ak choktoi kotumdoi korotik." 
Proverbs1:17 Kigiriich mestet buch, Kogeerei taritiet age tugul:" 
Proverbs1:18 Ribistos chuto kotumdoi korotikwak, Unyegei kosapchin sobonwekwak." 
Proverbs1:19 U noto ortinwekab age tugul ne kipkeiyat agobo kelunet; Rebei sobonwekab bik. 
Proverbs1:20 Waachei mising’ ng’omnatet eng’ oret; Ng’alali eng’ komoswek che baroen; 
Proverbs1:21 Kuursei eng’ ole tuiyechin bik; Eng’ ole kibunei eng’ ormarichok, Mwaitoi ng’alekyik eng’ nganaset:" 
Proverbs1:22 Ochame abusnateng’wong’ kot kotianit, okwek che o abusanik? Ak boiboitune chotik chotisienywa, Ak wechei che berber naet?" 
Proverbs1:23 Oweege eng’ kateunennyu, Ogeero, arong’wok tamirmiriennyu, Ang’ang’wok ng’alekyuk." 
Proverbs1:24 Amu kiaguurse, ak kioesie; Kiaiite eunnyu, ak ma iit chi." 
Proverbs1:25 Ago kiosas kiruogutikyuk tugul, Ama ocham kateunennyu:" 
Proverbs1:26 Arorie eng’ betutab nyalildang’wong’; Achotisiei ye kanyo kaiyweisieng’wong’; 
Proverbs1:27 Ye kanyo kaiyweisieng’wong’ ko u usonet ne o, Ak ye kanyo nyalildang’wong’ ko u kipchurjuriet; Ye kanyonjok bichiindo ak ng’wanindo." 
Proverbs1:28 Koguura anyun, ago mawolu; Cheng’a eng’ kagiiletab ge, ago manyorua:" 
Proverbs1:29 Amu kiwech naet, Ama lewen koiywei Jehovah:" 
Proverbs1:30 Ama cham kiruogutikyuk; Kisas kateunaikyuk tugul: 
Proverbs1:31 Amei anyun logoekab ortinwekwak, Ak konyi ichek ng’alekwak che yaachen." 
Proverbs1:32 Amu barei ichek kachuchugetab ge ne bo abusanik, Ak ng’emei ichek borotetab che berber." 
Proverbs1:33 Ago age tugul ne kasa kotebe chametab ge, Ak imuunyi ama iywei yaitiet." 
Proverbs2:1 Werinnyu, ngitaach ng’alekyuk, Ak igonorjige ng’atutikyuk;" 
Proverbs2:2 Kot iepchi it ng’omnatet, Ak itokyi muguleldang’ung’ kaguiyet;" 
Proverbs2:3 Ee, ngot iguur naet, Ak iwaach agobo kaguiyet;" 
Proverbs2:4 Ngot icheng’ inendet ko u ye icheng’e feda, Ak icheng’ ko u ye icheng’e konoraik che ung’otin;" 
Proverbs2:5 Iguiye anyun kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah, Ak inyoru inai Kamuktaindet." 
Proverbs2:6 Amu igoitoi Jehovah ng’omnatet: Mong’une kutinnyi naet ak kaguiyet: 
Proverbs2:7 Konorjin che bo iman ng’omnatet ne igesunotgei, Inendet long’etab ichek che bendote imanda;" 
Proverbs2:8 Si kobiit korib ortinwekab kiruoget, Ak koribei ortinwekab bikyik che tililen." 
Proverbs2:9 Iguiye anyun imanda ak kiruoget, Ak ne nyolu, ak oret age tugul ne mie." 
Proverbs2:10 Amu chutei ng’omnatet muguleldang’ung’, Ak kobaibai naet sobondang’ung’;" 
Proverbs2:11 Ribin ruchinet, Ribin kaguiyet:" 
Proverbs2:12 Si kosorun eng’ oretab chito ne ya, Ak eng’ bik che mwaei tuguk che imaasotin;" 
Proverbs2:13 Che laaktoi ortinwekab lititindo, Kobendate ortinwekab mesundeito:" 
Proverbs2:14 Che boiboitu koyai yaitiet, Ak koboiboitune mastaetab bik che yaachen;" 
Proverbs2:15 Che kunuren ortinwekwak, Ak komaasotin eng’ ortinwekwak:" 
Proverbs2:16 Si kosorun eng’ chepkugoniot, Ee, kwondo ne chamwai kut;" 
Proverbs2:17 Ne metoi choruet ne kinerjindos, Ak koutie kayomisetab Kamuktaindennyi:" 
Proverbs2:18 Chorjingei gonnyi meet, Ak bendi ortinwekyik oldab che kigobek:" 
Proverbs2:19 Maweeksei age tugul ne wendi oldanyi, Ama itei ole mi ortinwekab sobondo:" 
Proverbs2:20 Si kobiit iwendote ortinwekab bik che miach, Ak isub ortinwekab bik che bo iman." 
Proverbs2:21 Amu menyei emet bik che bo iman. Ak ng’etune oloto che igesunotgei. 
Proverbs2:22 Ago kiistoi bik che yaachen eng’ emet, Ak kitutu eng’ emet che yaei kaberberisiet." 
Proverbs3:1 Werinnyu, ameutie ng’atutiennyu; Ago ingorib muguleldang’ung’ ng’atutikyuk:" 
Proverbs3:2 Amu tesun choto chang’indab betusiek, Ak kenyisiekab sobet, ak kalyet." 
Proverbs3:3 Amecham koistoenengei rirenet ak iman: Ratyi kaating’ung’; Sirji muguleldang’ung’; 
Proverbs3:4 Si inyoru anyun chamet ak kaguiyet ne mie Eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet ak bik. 
Proverbs3:5 Imang’u Jehovah eng’ muguleldang’ung’ tugul, Ametiiege naeng’ung’:" 
Proverbs3:6 Ng’any inendet eng’ ortinweguk tugul, Si kolitit ortinweguk." 
Proverbs3:7 Amendege inyege ile i ng’om; Iywei Jehovah, ak iistoege yaitio:" 
Proverbs3:8 Egu chametab ge ne bo mugung’ung’, Ak koek mwanik eng’ koweguk." 
Proverbs3:9 Konyite Jehovah tuguguk, Ak eng’ tongoanikab rurateng’ung’ tugul:" 
Proverbs3:10 Si konyi chogeniguk eng’ aiyebindo, Ak kong’irtagei divaik che leelach eng’ ole ituisie." 
Proverbs3:11 Werinnyu, amesas kotigonetab Jehovah; Ameng’et eng’ kateunennyi:" 
Proverbs3:12 Amu iteechin Jehovah age tugul ne chamei; Ko u ye iteechin kwanda werinnyi ne boiboitune. 
Proverbs3:13 Baibai chito ne nyoru ng’omnatet, Ak chito ne nyoru naet." 
Proverbs3:14 Amu siirei chemung’arainatet ne bo ng’omnatet ne bo feda, Ak siirei keljinet ne kenyorune noto tahabu che kororon." 
Proverbs3:15 Bo kamanutiet ne o inendet kosiir koek che kiguure peninim: Ak tuguk tugul che imache ko mami che kiroge ng’omnatet. 
Proverbs3:16 Mi eunnyi ne bo tai chang’indab betusiek; Komi eunnyi ne bo katam magornatosiek ak teegisto. 
Proverbs3:17 Bo kagasetab ge ortinwekyik, Ak kalyet ortinwekyik tugul." 
Proverbs3:18 Ketitab sobondo inendet eng’ ichek che namei: Ak baibai age tugul ne namegei ak inendet. 
Proverbs3:19 Kilum Jehovah ng’ony eng’ ng’omnatet; Kiigimit kipsengwetisiek eng’ naet. 
Proverbs3:20 Kipcheak rirosiek eng’ naennyi. Ak isau bolik rewot. 
Proverbs3:21 Werinnyu, amengoistoenengei choto eng’ taing’ung’; Isub ng’omnatet ne igesunotgei ak ruchinet:" 
Proverbs3:22 Egu anyun choto sobondo eng’ muguleldang’ung’, Ak koek mieindo eng’ kaating’ung’." 
Proverbs3:23 Iwendote anyun oreng’ung’ eng’ chametab ge, Ama riichin kiy." 
Proverbs3:24 Ameiywei kiy ye irue: Ee, irue, ak koanyinyit ruondang’ung’." 
Proverbs3:25 Amearogeni eng’ ne chein, Anan eng’ ng’emisietab kiptengeginik, ye kait:" 
Proverbs3:26 Amu egu Jehovah kamang’uneng’ung’, Ak koribei inendet keldang’ung’ ama kinam." 
Proverbs3:27 Ameete mieindo che nyoljin kigochi, Ye itinye kimnatet ne iyae." 
Proverbs3:28 Amelenji chitab kokweng’ung’, Ui, si iweege, Si agonin mutai; Ye itinye kit ne machei." 
Proverbs3:29 Amechopchi yaitiet chitab kokweng’ung’, Amu menyei ole negitenen eng’ chametab ge." 
Proverbs3:30 Amobelge ak chi buch, Ngot ko ma yaun kiy ne ya." 
Proverbs3:31 Amat koamjin ng’etkong’ chito ne korom, Amelewen age tugul eng’ ortinwekyik." 
Proverbs3:32 Amu wechei Jehovah ngeleliot: Ago mi ung’otikyik ak bikab iman. 
Proverbs3:33 Mi chubetab Jehovah gotab kiptengekyot; Ago iberuri meng’otetab bik che bo iman. 
Proverbs3:34 Chotei inendet iman chotik, Ago igochin mieindo che iming’ingei." 
Proverbs3:35 Bunjin torornatet bik che ng’omen; Ago egu tewernatet etunatetab che berber. 
Proverbs4:1 Ogas werju kotigonetab kwanda, Ak oeb it si kobiit onai kaguiyet:" 
Proverbs4:2 Amu agonok konetisiet ne mie; Amobagakte ng’atutiennyu. 
Proverbs4:3 Amu kia weritab baba, Kia tala, ak kia chamat anege eng’ taitab kamennyu." 
Proverbs4:4 Ak kiineta baba, kolenja, Ingotebe muguleldang’ung’ ng’alekyuk; Rib ng’atutikyuk, si isob:" 
Proverbs4:5 Cheng’jige ng’omnatet, cheng’jige kaguiyet; Ameutie, ameistoege ng’alekyuk che amwae:" 
Proverbs4:6 Amemete, si koribin; Cham, si koribin." 
Proverbs4:7 Ng’omnatet ko kit ne o; cheng’ anyun ng’omnatet: Ee, cheng’jige naet koboto tuguk tugul che itinye." 
Proverbs4:8 Itoror, si kolanden: Imutyinin teegisto, ye onamge ak inendet." 
Proverbs4:9 Indoi meting’ung’ sonoekab mieindo: Konin narietab telunatet. 
Proverbs4:10 Kaso, werinnyu, ak itaach tuguk che amwae; Si kochang’a kenyisiekab sobeng’ung’." 
Proverbs4:11 Kianetin eng’ oretab ng’omnatet; Kiandoun eng’ ortinwekab lititindo. 
Proverbs4:12 Ye iwendi ko maigiichi kiy kakwautiguk; Ak ngot ilabati, ko mariichin kiy." 
Proverbs4:13 Nam mising’ konetisiet; mat ichamji kwo: Rib: amu inendet ko sobondang’ung’. 
Proverbs4:14 Mechut oretab kiptengeginik, Amewondote oretab bik che yaachen." 
Proverbs4:15 Istoege noto, mebun ole negite; Iweeige eng’ ole mi, ak isiirte." 
Proverbs4:16 Amu mainuuktos kobate ko kagoyai yaitiet; Istoegei ichek kanuuget, agoi konach chito age." 
Proverbs4:17 Amu amei amitwogikab yaitiet, Ak koeei divaikab koromnatet." 
Proverbs4:18 Ago oretab che bo iman ko u lapkeiyet ne iluu, Ne iluu ko tesoksei agoi betut ne igesunotgei." 
Proverbs4:19 Oretab kiptengeginik ko u mesundeito: Manaei kit ne riichei ichek. 
Proverbs4:20 Werinnyu, kas ng’alekyuk; Epchi it ng’alek che amwae." 
Proverbs4:21 Amat ingoistoegei taing’ung’; Rib kotebe muguleldang’ung’ orit. 
Proverbs4:22 Amu sobondo eng’ icheget che nyoru, Ak chametab ge ne bo borwekwak." 
Proverbs4:23 Rib muguleldang’ung’ eng’ kagiiletab ge tugul; Amu bunu kong’ikab beekab sobon yoto. 
Proverbs4:24 Istoege kutit ne ngelelio, Ak iistoege kutit ne mwaei ng’alek che bo kamaaset." 
Proverbs4:25 Keer tai, Ak ingogeer konyeguk tai." 
Proverbs4:26 Ruchi komie ole bunei kelyeguk, Ak ingogimegitu ortinweguk tugul." 
Proverbs4:27 Amemaste iwe eutab tai anan ne bo katam; Istoe keldang’ung’ yaitiet. 
Proverbs5:1 Werinnyu, kas ng’omnatennyu; Epchi it naennyu:" 
Proverbs5:2 Si kobiit irib ruchinet, Si korib kuting’ung’ naet." 
Proverbs5:3 Amu saune kumiat kutitab chepkugoniot, Ak tangusen ng’alekyik kosiir mwaita:" 
Proverbs5:4 Ago ng’wan kagesunennyi ko u ng’wonet, Ng’atib ko u rotwetab chok ne ng’atiben komoswek tuwai." 
Proverbs5:5 Chorjingei kelyekyik meet; Namegei kakwautikyik ak oldab che kigobek; 
Proverbs5:6 Kot ko manyoru oret ne litit ne bo sobondo: Ma tononiotin ortinwekyik, ama naei." 
Proverbs5:7 Ogasa anyun werju, Amoistoege ng’alek che amwae." 
Proverbs5:8 Iste oreng’ung’ kolooit eng’ korgonoto, Amerikyi kurgetab gonnyi:" 
Proverbs5:9 Si megochi teegistang’ung’ bik alak; Ak igochi kenyisieguk bik che kolgol: 
Proverbs5:10 Si manyor toek kimnateng’ung’; Si matebe boisioniguk che kimen gotab kipsagarindet; 
Proverbs5:11 Si irir let, Ye kang’emak banyeguk ak bortang’ung’," 
Proverbs5:12 Ak imwa ile, Tia weget ne kiawech konetisiet, Ak saset ne kisas muguleldanyu kateunet!" 
Proverbs5:13 Ama agas it konetikyuk, Amaepchi it bik che kiineta." 
Proverbs5:14 Kiga arikyi yaitiet tugul Eng’ kwenutab tuiyet ak kayumetab ge. 
Proverbs5:15 Ee beek che mi tereng’ung’, Ak iee beek che rootei, eng’ keringeng’ung’." 
Proverbs5:16 Tos kanyol koseergei kondametusieguk che bo beek eng’ olo tugul, Ak ainosiekab beek eng’ ortinwek?" 
Proverbs5:17 Ingobunjin inyege, Amat kobunji toek che mi koboten." 
Proverbs5:18 Ingoek ne iberurot kondametung’ung’ ne bo beek; Ak ibaibaitu eng’ osotiotab ming’inoteng’ung’. 
Proverbs5:19 Ko u kenyelet ne kotoy ak sitwet ne kotoy, ne iboiboi bich, Ingoyamin kinaikyik kotugul; Ak ibaibaitune chamnyennyi kotugul." 
Proverbs5:20 Amu nee werinnyu, si ibaibaege chepkugoniot, Ak isuub tegetab chepkugoniot?" 
Proverbs5:21 Amu keerei Jehovah ortinwekab chito, Ak koribei ortinwek tugul che bo chichoto." 
Proverbs5:22 Namei kiptengekyot yaitwogikyik, Ak kerate inendet boroonikab tengektanyi." 
Proverbs5:23 Meei ama tinyei konetisiet; Ak betei amu oindab berberindanyi. 
Proverbs6:1 Werinnyu, ngot iegu ne itononjini chitab kokweng’ung’, Ngot ko kooyosie onamge eunek ak kipsagarin," 
Proverbs6:2 Kagoriichin anyun ng’alek che imwae, Kagoratin ng’alek che imwae." 
Proverbs6:3 Yai anyun nito, werinnyu, si isoruge, Amu kagonamin eutab chitab kokweng’ung’; Ui iming’inge, ak igaigai chitab kokweng’ung’." 
Proverbs6:4 Ameru, Anan inuuch." 
Proverbs6:5 Sorugei ko u ye sorugei cheptirgichet eng’ kiplogotiot, Ak ko u taritiet ne sorugei eng’ eutab namindetab taritik." 
Proverbs6:6 Ui oldab birechet, inye ne i choriren; Ibwat ortinwekyik, si ing’omitu:" 
Proverbs6:7 Amu matinyei kiruogindet, Anan ne iyagi, anan bounindet," 
Proverbs6:8 Konorjingei amitwogik eng’ kemei, Ak koyumi amitwogikyik eng’ kesisio." 
Proverbs6:9 Irue kot kotianit-o, chorirenoni? Ing’eete au eng’ ruondong’ung’?" 
Proverbs6:10 Ruondo kitigin, kanuuget kitigin, Namet kitigin ne bo eunek si kinuuch:" 
Proverbs6:11 Konyo anyun banandang’ung ko u rebindet, Ak konyo anyun rartaeng’ung’ ko u chito ne tinyei karik." 
Proverbs6:12 Wendoti chito ne matilei kiy, chitab tengekto, Koiboti ng’alek che bo kamaaset;" 
Proverbs6:13 Ng’wegisie konyekyik, ak kong’alale kelyekyik, Ng’alale morikyik;" 
Proverbs6:14 Mi mastaet muguleldanyi, chobei yaitiet kotugul; Kolei toiyet." 
Proverbs6:15 Cheei anyun inendet nyalildanyi; Ng’emaksei eng’ chokyinet, ama mi kiy ne kinyae." 
Proverbs6:16 Mitei tuguk lo che wechei Jehovah; Ee, tuguk tisab che wechei inendet:" 
Proverbs6:17 Choto ko, konyekab menotet, ng’elyepta ne mwaei lembech, Ak eunek che tumdoi korotik che matinyei tengek;" 
Proverbs6:18 Muguleldo ne chobei kabwatutik che yaach, Kelyek che chepcheb koruachin yaitiet;" 
Proverbs6:19 Baoriat ne ma bo iman, ne mwaei lembech, Ak inendet ne kolei toiyet eng’ kwenutab tupchosiek." 
Proverbs6:20 Werinnyu, rib kayomisutietab kwandang’ung’, Amemete ng’atutietab komet:" 
Proverbs6:21 Ratyi choto muguleldang’ung’ kotugul, Ratyi kaating’ung’." 
Proverbs6:22 Ye iwendoti, kondoun; Ye irue, koribin, Ak ye ing’eet, kong’alalun." 
Proverbs6:23 Amu kayomisutiet ko tait; ak ng’atutiet ko lapkeiyet; Ak keretab kong’ ne bo kotigonet ko oretab sobondo: 
Proverbs6:24 Si koribin eng’ kwondo ne ya. Koribin eng’ chemwaikutnatet ne bo chepkugoniot. 
Proverbs6:25 Amegase miat eng’ muguleldang’ung’ kororonindanyi; Amengoriigenen konyekyik. 
Proverbs6:26 Amu ibeeti chepkugoniot chito agoi kong’etyi kererutiet: Ak cheng’oti chepkugoniot koriich sobondo ne kararan. 
Proverbs6:27 Imuchi chi konamji mat tegennyi, Ama lalyo ngoroikyik?" 
Proverbs6:28 Imuchi chi kotiegat ng’etetiot, Ama lalyo kelyekyik?" 
Proverbs6:29 U noto chito ne ibegei ak osotiotab chitab kokwennyi; Age tugul ne twaei inendet ko magibagaktoi buch. 
Proverbs6:30 Masasei bik chorindet, ngo chorso Si kobiyo ye amei rubet:" 
Proverbs6:31 Ago ngot kenyor, kogeeri konyil tisab; Igoitoi tuguk tugul che bo gonnyi." 
Proverbs6:32 Matinyei naet chito ne ibegei ak kwony; Inendet ne yaei noto kong’emei sobondanyi. 
Proverbs6:33 Nyoru ng’otobosiek ak tewernatet; Ama kiistoi tewernatennyi. 
Proverbs6:34 Amu ng’etkonda nereknatetab chi; Ama rire eng’ betutab yaaktaetab mugetut. 
Proverbs6:35 Mamage kiy kit ne kitiage; Magigoigoi, agot ngigochi tuguk che chang’ che bo kagaigaet." 
Proverbs7:1 Werinnyu, rib ng’alekyuk, Ak igonorjige kayomisutikyuk." 
Proverbs7:2 Rib kayomisutikyuk si isob; Rib ng’atutiennyu ko u ye iribe laptetab kondang’ung’. 
Proverbs7:3 Ratyi moriguk; Sirji muguleldang’ung’. 
Proverbs7:4 Ilenji ng’omnatet, I chepkamennyu; Ak iguure naet chepkamennyu ne bo oret:" 
Proverbs7:5 Si kobiit koribin eng’ chepkugoniot, Eng’ chepkugoniot ne chemwai kut." 
Proverbs7:6 Amu kiaiitite eng’ tirisietab gonnyu Eng’ tirisiennyu ne bo segengeisiek; 
Proverbs7:7 Ak kiageer eng’ kwenutab che abusanik, Ak kianyit eng’ kwenutab neranik, Neran ne matinyei naet," 
Proverbs7:8 Kobunei oret ole negite luitab kwonyoto, Ak kiisub oret ne wendi gonnyi;" 
Proverbs7:9 Ko karatarat, ko kaimen, Eng’ imenindab kemout, eng’ mesundeito." 
Proverbs7:10 Ak ogeero, kituiye korgo Kolaachi ngoroikab chepkugonik, ng’alindet." 
Proverbs7:11 Bolin ak ko ngelelio; Matononi eng’ gonnyi: 
Proverbs7:12 Mi oret ra, komi tun komoswek che baraen, Ak saptoi eng’ ole besiechin ortinwek." 
Proverbs7:13 Konam anyun inendet, ak kong’utut, Ak komwachi inendet eng’ nyiganatet kolenji:" 
Proverbs7:14 Atinye korosekab kagochinoikab kalyet; Kaayaakte rani tuguk che kiga arorte. 
Proverbs7:15 Kaanyo anyun atorogun, Kaanyo acheng’in eng’ kagiiletab ge, ak kaanyorun." 
Proverbs7:16 Kaaiite ngoroik che bo lelesta, Eng’ kit ne alyeldoe, Koboto kitambaok che simormor che bo usisietab Misri." 
Proverbs7:17 Kaande nyamdutik itogunnyu Koboto tuguk che u igomoik, ketik che kiguure ahalim, ak kinamon." 
Proverbs7:18 Nyo kibaibaige kot koeech; Ngibaibaige eng’ chamnyet. 
Proverbs7:19 Amu mami ga chitab kobo got, Kawa banda ne loo:" 
Proverbs7:20 Kaib loletab fedaisiek; Tun itu ga eng’ kwenutab arawet. 
Proverbs7:21 Iterteri inendet eng’ ng’alekyik che chang’ che tangus, Ichuuti chichoto eng’ ng’alekyik che bo kagaigaet." 
Proverbs7:22 Isubi anyun inendet kwonyoto eng’ yoto, Ko u eito ne kikwerie kwo eng’set, Anan ko u mugurek che kitigone ne berber;" 
Proverbs7:23 Kot kotoor kipchabet koennyi kosore; Ko u taritiet ne choktoi kowendi mestet, Ama naei kole barei sobondanyi." 
Proverbs7:24 Ara anyun, werju, ogasa, Ak oepchi it ng’alek che amwae." 
Proverbs7:25 Amengotokyigei muguleldang’ung’ ortinwekyik, Amebet isub ortinwekyik." 
Proverbs7:26 Amu kigoluul che chang’ che kigiguoten: Ee, bik tugul che kigobar inendet, ko luget ne o." 
Proverbs7:27 Gonnyi ko oret ne wendi oldab che kigobek, Ne chorjingei gorikab meet." 
Proverbs8:1 Tos mabolei ng’omnatet, Tos matwegu naet?" 
Proverbs8:2 Tonone baragutab komoswek che tororen ye negit oret, Ole tuiyechin ortinwek;" 
Proverbs8:3 Ole negite ormarichok, ole kibunei kebendi nganaset, Bolei mising’ eng’ kurgotik che kibunei kebendi orit:" 
Proverbs8:4 Kole, Aguurok, okwek murenju, Ak bo tugennyu werikab bik." 
Proverbs8:5 Okwek che o abusotin, oguiye ng’omnatet; Ak okwek che o berber, oegu che tinyei muguleldo ne bo naet." 
Proverbs8:6 Ogas, amu amwae tuguk che bo telunatet; Ak mwaei kutinnyu tuguk che bo iman." 
Proverbs8:7 Amu mwaei kutinnyu imanda; Ak wechei kutinnyu tengekto. 
Proverbs8:8 Bo imanda ng’alek tugul che amwae; Mami kiy ne imaasat anan ko ne bo ngelelnatet. 
Proverbs8:9 Kasoksei tugul eng’ inendet ne iguitos, Ak bo iman eng’ icheget che nyoru naet." 
Proverbs8:10 Taach kotigonennyu, ma feda; Ak itaach naet kosiir tahabu che kororon." 
Proverbs8:11 Amu kararan ng’omnatet kosiir koik che kiguure peninim; Ak magirogendoi ng’omnatet tuguk tugul che kimachei. 
Proverbs8:12 Ane, ng’omnatet, ne kiayai naet koek ole amenye, Ak anyoru naet ak ruchinet." 
Proverbs8:13 Kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah ko kewech yaitio: Aweche menotet, ak kaeetetab ge, ak oret ne ya, Ak kutit ne imaasat." 
Proverbs8:14 Nenyu kiruoget, ak naet ne igesunotge: A naet; atinye kamuget." 
Proverbs8:15 Laitorani laitorinik amu ane, Ak iruochi bounik eng’ imanda." 
Proverbs8:16 Bounisiei bounik amu ane, Ak bik che toogunotin, kiruogik tugul che bo ng’ony." 
Proverbs8:17 Achame che chama; Ak nyorua che cheng’a eng’ kagiiletab ge. 
Proverbs8:18 Atinye magornatosiek ak teegisto; Magornatosiek che tebyei, ak imanda." 
Proverbs8:19 Kororon logoekyuk kosiir tahabu, ee, tahabu che tililen; Ak siirei kelunetab tugukyuk feda che kororon." 
Proverbs8:20 Awendote oretab imanda, Eng’ kwenutab ortinwekab kiruoget:" 
Proverbs8:21 Si kobiit agochi icheget che chama konyor borotet, Ak anyiit chogenikwak." 
Proverbs8:22 Kiami koboto Jehovah koboch taunetab orennyi, Kotom kobiit boisionikyik che bo keny." 
Proverbs8:23 Kigiyaa abiit koboch keny, koboch taunet, Kotom kobiit ng’ony." 
Proverbs8:24 Kigisicha ye kitomo kobiit rirosiek; Ye kitomo kobiit kondametusiek che rootune beek che chang’. 
Proverbs8:25 Ye kitomo kelumda tulonok, Kigisicha ye kitomo kobiit tulonok che mengechen;" 
Proverbs8:26 Ye kitomo koyai inendet ng’ony anan emotinwek, Anan taunetab ng’ung’unyekab ng’ony." 
Proverbs8:27 Kiami ye kiigimiti inendet kipsengwetisiek: Ye kiinde yiemutiet ole boch riret: 
Proverbs8:28 Ye kiigimiti bolik eng’ barak: Ye kingogimegitu kondametusiekab riret: 
Proverbs8:29 Ye kiinde nyanjet kiwotennyi, Si masiir beek ng’atutiennyi: Ye king’at lumeiywekab ng’ony:" 
Proverbs8:30 Kigimi tuwai, ko u kiboitiot ne ingen boisiet: Ak kiaboiboi inendet betut age tugul, Kiabaibai kotugul eng’ tainnyi;" 
Proverbs8:31 Abaibaitune emennyi ne menyei bik; Ak kimi boiboiyennyu eng’ werikab bik. 
Proverbs8:32 Ogasa anyun, werju: Amu iberurotin ichek che ribei ortinwekyuk." 
Proverbs8:33 Ogas kotigonet, ak ong’omegitu, Amoesie." 
Proverbs8:34 Iberurot chito ne kasa, Ne ripsei betut age tugul eng’ kurgotikyuk, Kogenisiei eng’ tugatugikab kurgotikyuk." 
Proverbs8:35 Amu inendet ne nyorua, ko kanyor sobondo, Ak konyor chamet eng’ Jehovah." 
Proverbs8:36 Ago inendet ne chalwogenjina ko kang’em sobondanyi: Chamei meet tugul che wecha. 
Proverbs9:1 Kigoteech ng’omnatet gonnyi, Kigowai tolochikyik tisab:" 
Proverbs9:2 Kigoeny tukyik; kigoburuch divaikyik; Kigochob amitwogik eng’ mesennyi. 
Proverbs9:3 Kigoyokto tibikyik, waachei Eng’ komoswek che tororen mising’ che bo nganaset," 
Proverbs9:4 Ingonyo yu age tugul ne abusat: Mwachin chito ne matinyei naet, kolenjin," 
Proverbs9:5 Nyo, am amitwogikyuk, Ak iee divaik che kaaburuch." 
Proverbs9:6 Obagakte abusnatet, ak osopche; Ak obendate oretab kaguiyet." 
Proverbs9:7 Nyoru tewernatet inendet ne itigoni chotindet; Nyoru tisiet ne kerei kong’ kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs9:8 Ameger kong’ chotindet, si mawechin: Ker kong’ chito ne ng’om, si kochamin." 
Proverbs9:9 Inet ne ng’om si kong’omit kosiir: Inet chito ne bo iman, si kotesak eng’ kanetetab ge." 
Proverbs9:10 Kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah ko taunetab ng’omnatet: Ak naet ne kinae Inendet ne Tilil ko kaguiyet. 
Proverbs9:11 Amu tesoksei betusieguk eng’ ane, Ak kotesak kenyisiekab sobeng’ung’." 
Proverbs9:12 Ngot ko i ng’om, ko i ng’om ne neng’ung’: Ak ngot ichotisiei, igeseni inyege." 
Proverbs9:13 Bolin kwondo ne berber; Abusat, ama naei kiy." 
Proverbs9:14 Ak tebe kurgetab gonnyi, Tebe ng’echeret eng’ komoswek che tororen che bo nganaset," 
Proverbs9:15 Si koguur che siirtoi, Che maguseigong’ eng’ ortinwekwak," 
Proverbs9:16 Ingonyo yu age tugul ne abusat: Ak mwachin inendet ne matinyei naet kolenjin," 
Proverbs9:17 Anyiny beek che kechorei, Ak kororon amitwogik che keamei eng’ ung’ot." 
Proverbs9:18 Ago manaei kole mi oloto che kigobek; Kole, mi toekyik rirosiekab oldab che kigobek." 
Proverbs10:1 Kalewenaikab Solomon. Iboiboi werit ne ng’om kwanda: Ago inyalili werit ne berber kamet. 
Proverbs10:2 Mami keluno konoraikab yaitiet: Ago soru imanda eng’ meet. 
Proverbs10:3 Machamjin Jehovah sobondab ne bo iman kotanui eng’ rubet: Ago timdoi magetab kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs10:4 Banani ne choriren: Ago ibu magornatet eutab ne igiiligei. 
Proverbs10:5 Ng’om werit ne iyumi eng’ kemei: Ago ibu tewernatet werit ne ruei kegesisiei. 
Proverbs10:6 Tebe kaberuroik ne bo iman: Ago tuchei koromnatet kutitab kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs10:7 Iberurot kabwatetab ne bo iman; Ago nunei kainetab kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs10:8 Taachei kayomisutik ne ng’om eng’ muguleldo: Ago ibuti ne berber ne chang’ ng’alek. 
Proverbs10:9 Inendet ne wendote lititindo kowendote chemetab ge: Ago naoksei inendet ne imaasi ortinwekyik. 
Proverbs10:10 Ibu arogenet ne ng’wegisie konda: Ago ibuti ne berber ne chang’ ng’alek. 
Proverbs10:11 Kondametutab sobon kutitab ne bo iman: Ago tuchei koromnatet kutitab kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs10:12 Ing’eeti wechet boriosiek: Ago tuchei chamnyet bistaosiek tugul. 
Proverbs10:13 Kinyorjin ng’omnatet kutitab chito ne tinyei ruchinet: Ago nyoljin kirokto batetab inendet ne matinyei naet. 
Proverbs10:14 Konori bik che ng’omen naet: Ago ng’emisiet ne negit kutitab ne berber. 
Proverbs10:15 Magornatetab magoriot ko nganasennyi ne kim: Ng’emisietab kibananok ko banandanywa. 
Proverbs10:16 Tokyingei sobondo boisietab ne bo iman; Tokyingei tengekto berurtab kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs10:17 Mitei oretab sobondo ne ribei kotigonet: Ago mastoi chito ne bagaktoi keretab kong’. 
Proverbs10:18 Inendet ne unyei weget kotinyei kutitab lembechek; Ak inendet ne mwaei ng’alekab chemereret ko berber. 
Proverbs10:19 Mabete bistoet ng’alek che chang’: Ago ng’om ne sisei. 
Proverbs10:20 U fedaisiek che kororon ng’elyeptab ne bo iman: Matilei kiy muguleldab kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs10:21 Baei bik che chang’ kutitab chito ne bo iman: Ago begu che berber amu matinyei naet. 
Proverbs10:22 Imagornoni kaberuretab Jehovah, Ama testoi rirek." 
Proverbs10:23 U ureriet eng’ ne berber ye yaei yaitwogik: Ak u noto ng’omnatet eng’ chito ne tinyei naet. 
Proverbs10:24 Kit ne iywei kiptengekyot, ko noto ne nyonjin inendet: Ak kigochin che bo iman tuguk che machei." 
Proverbs10:25 Ye siirto kipchurjuriet koma komi kiptengekyot: Ago lumeiywot ne bo koigeny chito ne bo iman. 
Proverbs10:26 U siki eng’ kelek, ak u iyeto eng’ konyek, U noto chito ne choriren eng’ ichek che iyoktoi inendet." 
Proverbs10:27 Tesei betusiek kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah: Ago kitilei kenyisiekab kiptengeginik kong’ering’itu. 
Proverbs10:28 Kagasetab ge kamang’unetab che bo iman: Ago lusei kamang’unetab kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs10:29 Irimet ne kim oretab Jehovah eng’ ne bo iman; Ago ng’emisiet eng’ yaikab yaitio. 
Proverbs10:30 Magoi kiisto ne bo iman: Ago mamenyei kiptengeginik emet. 
Proverbs10:31 Mong’une ng’omnatet kutitab ne bo iman: Ago kitilei ng’elyeptab ne imaasisiei. 
Proverbs10:32 Ingen kutitab ne bo iman tuguk che taagaksei: Ago mwaei kutuswekab kiptengeginik ng’alek che bo kamaaset. 
Proverbs11:1 Wechei Jehovah kerutiet ne ma bo iman: Ago chamei Jehovah kerutiet ne bo iman. 
Proverbs11:2 Ye nyo menotet, konyo agine kalilanet: Ago mi ng’omnatet ak che iming’inegei." 
Proverbs11:3 Indochin che bo iman kagesunatenywa bo ge: Ago ng’emei che yaei kaberberisiet, kamaasenywa." 
Proverbs11:4 Matilei kiy magornatosiek eng’ betutab neregek: Ago sorunisiei imanda eng’ meet. 
Proverbs11:5 Indochin ne igesunotgei imandanyi eng’ orennyi: Ago ibuti kiptengekyot eng’ tengektanyi. 
Proverbs11:6 Soru che bo iman imandanywa: Ago kinamei che yaei kaberberisiet eng’ ng’alsenywa. 
Proverbs11:7 Ye mee chito ne kiptengekyot, kobet kamang’unennyi: Ak lusei kamang’unetab bik che bo tengek." 
Proverbs11:8 Kisoru ne bo iman komong’ eng’ nyalilda, Ak igeeri kiptengekyot inendet." 
Proverbs11:9 Ng’emei eng’ kutinnyi, chito ne maiywei Kamuktaindet, chitab kokwennyi: Ago kisoru che bo iman eng’ naet." 
Proverbs11:10 Ye bor che bo iman, kobaibaitu nganaset: Ak ye lusyo kiptengeginik, kobiitu kagasetab ge." 
Proverbs11:11 Kitorori nganaset eng’ berurtab che bo iman: Ago igabui kutuswekab kiptengeginik nganaset. 
Proverbs11:12 Matinyei ng’omnatet ne sasei chitab kokwennyi: Ago sisei chito ne tinyei naet. 
Proverbs11:13 Ng’anyei ung’otik inendet ne chaamsoti: Ago unyei ng’olyot inendet ne tinyei tamirmiriet ne bo iman. 
Proverbs11:14 Ibutos bik eng’ ole mami kandoiset ne bo ng’omnatet: Ago mi sorunet eng’ ole mi kiruogik che chang’. 
Proverbs11:15 Nyoru nyalilda ne tononjin too: Ago inendet ne wechei tononjinet kotebe chametab ge. 
Proverbs11:16 Nyoru teegisto kwondo ne mie: Teptoi bik che koromen magornatosiek. 
Proverbs11:17 Chito ne tinyei rirenetab ge koyachin ne mie sobondanyi: Ago chito ne kolgol konyalili bortanyi. 
Proverbs11:18 Nyoru kiptengekyot melektab ng’alset: Ago inendet ne kolei imanda kotinyei melekto ne bo iman. 
Proverbs11:19 Inendet ne kimitu eng’ imanda koityin sobondo: Ak inendet ne isubi yaitiet kosubi meennyi inegei. 
Proverbs11:20 Wechei Jehovah icheget che imaasotin mugulelwek: Baibai inendet eng’ che igesunotgei eng’ orenywa. 
Proverbs11:21 Magimetoi iman chito ne ya ama kibir: Ago kisoru iyotetab che bo iman. 
Proverbs11:22 Kergei peteitab tahabu ne mi serutab toret, Ak kwondo ne kararan ne matinyei naet." 
Proverbs11:23 Magutikab che bo iman ko miachen kityo: Ago kamang’unetab kiptengeginik ko neregek. 
Proverbs11:24 Mi ne iseeri, ago tesoksei kosiir; Ak komi ne etei mising’ kosiir ne nyolu, ago ibu noto bananda." 
Proverbs11:25 Nerei sobondab ne aiyeb: Ak kibisi ne ibisisiei. 
Proverbs11:26 Chubei bik che etei bek: Ago kiberuri ne aldoi. 
Proverbs11:27 Inendet ne cheng’ei ne mie eng’ kagiiletab ge, ko kacheng’ chamet; Ago inendet ne cheng’ei yaitiet, konyoru." 
Proverbs11:28 Inendet ne imang’u magornatosiekyik, kobuti: Ago bitos che bo iman ko u sogot ne tuon." 
Proverbs11:29 Inendet ne inyalili gonnyi konyoru usonet: Ak koegu ne berber otwogindetab ne ng’om eng’ muguleldo. 
Proverbs11:30 Logoekab ne bo iman ketitab sobondo; Ng’om inendet ne soru sobonwekab bik. 
Proverbs11:31 Keero, kigeerjin ne bo iman eng’ ng’ony: Kotam nee anyun chito ne ya ak kiptengekyot!" 
Proverbs12:1 Age tugul ne chamei kotigonet kochamei naet: Ago inendet ne esioi keretab kong’ ko u tiondo. 
Proverbs12:2 Nyoru chamet eng’ Jehovah chito ne mie: Ago igikyin Jehovah chito ne bo chobutik che yaachen. 
Proverbs12:3 Magimitu chi eng’ yaitio: Amagoi kitut tigitiotab che bo iman. 
Proverbs12:4 Egu kwondo ne mie konditab manong’otiondennyi: Ago kwondo ne ibu kalilanet ko u nunatet eng’ kowekab chichoto. 
Proverbs12:5 Bo iman kabwatutikab che bo imanda: Ago ng’alset kiruogutikab kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs12:6 Sapchin kotumda korotik ng’alekab kiptengeginik: Ago soru ichek kutitab che bo iman. 
Proverbs12:7 Kigabui kiptengeginik, kot ko ma komi: Ago tononi gotab che bo iman." 
Proverbs12:8 Kilosu chi ko u kit ne te ng’omnatennyi: Ago kisasei inendet ne tinyei muguleldo ne imaasat. 
Proverbs12:9 Kaigai inendet ne kesasei, ak kotinyei otwogindet, Kosiir inendet ne ichaugei, ama tinyei amitwogik." 
Proverbs12:10 Ribei chito ne bo iman sobetab tennyi: Ago kolgolen rirenosiekab bik che yaach. 
Proverbs12:11 Nyoru amitwogik che chang’ chito ne ibati korennyi: Ago inendet ne isubi tangoita, ko matinyei naet." 
Proverbs12:12 Machei kiptengekyot mestetab bik che yaach: Ago yiei logoek tigitiotab che bo iman. 
Proverbs12:13 Mi mestetab chito ne ya bistoetab kutit: Ago mong’une nyalilda chito ne bo iman. 
Proverbs12:14 Biyonyi chito mieindo eng’ logoekab kutinnyi: Ak kigeerjin chito boisionikab eunekyik. 
Proverbs12:15 Litit eng’ ne berber orennyi ngo keerei: Ago epchin it kiruoget inendet ne ng’om. 
Proverbs12:16 Sib konaoksei neregekab ne berber: Ago unyei tewernatet chito ne ng’om. 
Proverbs12:17 Inendet ne mwaei iman kobortoi imanda, Ago ibortoi ng’alset baoriat ne ma bo iman." 
Proverbs12:18 Mi ne sartae ng’alek ko u rotwetab chok ne toorsei: Ago chametab ge ng’elyeptab ne ng’om. 
Proverbs12:19 Kigimiti koigeny kutit ne bo iman; Ago bo sait ne matia ng’elyepta ne mwaei lembech. 
Proverbs12:20 Mi ng’alset mugulelwekab che chobei yaitiet: Ago tinyei boiboiyet che mwaitoi kalyet. 
Proverbs12:21 Manyoru yaitiet age tugul chito ne bo iman: Ago nyiiei yaitiet kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs12:22 Wechei Jehovah kutit ne mwaei lembech: Ago baibai inendet eng’ che boisie iman. 
Proverbs12:23 Unyei naet chito ne ng’om: Ago mwaitoi mugulelwekab che berber berberindo. 
Proverbs12:24 Bounisiei eutab ne igiilegei; Ago kibirjin chito ne choriren kobois. 
Proverbs12:25 Ing’uruksei muguleldab chito amu nyigisindo ne tinyei; Ago iboiboi muguleloto ng’olyot ne mie. 
Proverbs12:26 Chitab iman ko kandoindetab chitab kokwennyi: Ago ibeeti kiptengeginik orenywa. 
Proverbs12:27 Mawatani chito ne choriren kit ne kanyor eng’ loget: Ago tinyei chito ne igiilegei tuguk che bo kamanutiet ne o. 
Proverbs12:28 Mi sobondo oretab imanda; Ama mi meet eng’ orennyi. 
Proverbs13:1 Epchin it werit ne ng’om kotigonetab kwandanyi: Ago magasei keretab kong’ chotindet. 
Proverbs13:2 Amei chito ne mie eng’ logoekab kutinnyi: Ago amei koromnatet sobondo ne yaei kaberberisiet. 
Proverbs13:3 Ribei sobondanyi ne ribei kutinnyi: Ago nyoru ng’emisiet ne yatei kutinnyi mising’. 
Proverbs13:4 Tinyei maget sobondab ne choriren, ak manyoru kiy: Ago nerei sobondab ne igiilegei." 
Proverbs13:5 Wechei chito ne bo iman lembechek: Ago samisitu chito ne ya, ak konyoru tewernatet." 
Proverbs13:6 Imanda ne ribei inendet ne litit eng’ oret: Ago igabui yaitiet kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs13:7 Mi ne yaegei koek magorio, ago matinyei kiy: Mi ne yaegei koek kibanania, ago tinyei magornatet ne o." 
Proverbs13:8 Kitiage sobondab chito magornatosiekyik: Ago magasei kibananok kamuiset. 
Proverbs13:9 Iluu mising’ lapkeiyetab che bo iman: Ago kimisi taitab kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs13:10 Ibu menotet boriet kityo: Ago mi ng’omnatet koboto ichek che ng’ategei. 
Proverbs13:11 Ichuchugaksei magornatet ne kiginyoru eng’ menotet: Ago tesoksei che bo chito ne iyumi eng’ birtoetab ge. 
Proverbs13:12 Miani muguleldo eng’ kamang’unet ne igaegei: Ago ye isulda magonato, koek anyun ketitab sobondo." 
Proverbs13:13 Age tugul ne sasei ng’olyot koipchingei ng’emisiet: Ago kigochin melekto chito ne iywei kayomiset. 
Proverbs13:14 Kondametutab sobon ng’atutietab ne ng’om: Si kobiit koistoegei mestonokab meet. 
Proverbs13:15 Ibu chamet naet ne mie: Ago uui oretab kaberberik. 
Proverbs13:16 Boisie naet chito age tugul ne ng’om: Ago iseeri ne berber berberindo. 
Proverbs13:17 Ibutyin yaitiet chito ne ya ne kiyoktoi: Ago egu chametab ge tononjinindet ne kiyani. 
Proverbs13:18 Nyoru bananda ak tewernatet inendet ne esioi kotigonet: Ago nyoru teegisto inendet ne epchin it keretab kong’. 
Proverbs13:19 Anyiny eng’ sobondo maget ne isuldaat: Ago wechei che berber ngo istoegei yaitwogik. 
Proverbs13:20 Obendate ak bik che ng’omen, si ing’omitu: Ago nyoru nyalilda chito ne bendoti ak che berber." 
Proverbs13:21 Isubi yaitiet kiptengeginik: Ago kigeerjin che bo iman mieindo. 
Proverbs13:22 Bagakyin chito ne mie tugukyik mochogoronikyik; Ak kigonorjin chitab iman magornatetab kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs13:23 Mi amitwogik che chang’ eng’ kabatisietab kibananok: Ago mi ne keng’emei amu mami imanda. 
Proverbs13:24 Wechei werinnyi ne mabirei: Ago inendet ne chamei werinnyi kotigoni ko u ye nyolu. 
Proverbs13:25 Amei ne bo iman kot kobiyo sobondanyi; Ago manyoru kiptengeginik che yamei. 
Proverbs14:1 Teechei gonnyi kwondo age tugul ne ng’om: Ago butei ne berber. 
Proverbs14:2 Iywei Jehovah inendet ne wendote imandanyi: Ago sasei Jehovah inendet ne imaasat eng’ ortinwekyik. 
Proverbs14:3 Mitei kutitab ne berber kiroktab menotet: Ago ribei kutuswekwak che ng’omen. 
Proverbs14:4 Tilil biut ole mami tuga: Ago ibu kimnatetab tuga kelunet ne o. 
Proverbs14:5 Mamwaei lembech baoriat ne kiyani: Ago mwaei lembech baoriat ne ma bo iman. 
Proverbs14:6 Cheng’ei chotindet ng’omnatet, ago manyoru: Ago nyamnyum naet eng’ inendet ne tinyei kaguiyet." 
Proverbs14:7 Ui ole mi chito ne berber, Amenyorjini inendet ng’olyotab naet." 
Proverbs14:8 Ng’omnatetab chito ne ng’om ko koguiyo orennyi: Ago ng’alset berberindab che berber. 
Proverbs14:9 Sasei che berber ng’ogisto: Ago mi mieindo eng’ kwenutab che bo iman. 
Proverbs14:10 Ingen muguleldo ng’wanindanyi; Ak matinyei toondet yamdao ak boiboiyennyi. 
Proverbs14:11 Kigabui gotab kiptengeginik: Ago kiberuri emaitab ne bo iman. 
Proverbs14:12 Mi oret ne len chito litit, Ago kagesunennyi ko ortinwekab meet." 
Proverbs14:13 Rirei muguleldo agot ngo roriei; Ak kagesunetab boiboiyet ko nyigisindo. 
Proverbs14:14 Inendet ne ichuchuchegei eng’ muguleldo kobiyonyi ortinwekyik: Ak yamatgei chito ne mie eng’ muguleldanyi. 
Proverbs14:15 Iyani ng’olyo age tugul ne abusat: Ago keerei komie chito ne ng’om ole wendi. 
Proverbs14:16 Iyweisiei chito ne ng’om, ak koistoegei yaitiet: Ago nerechi ne berber, ak komenei." 
Proverbs14:17 Inendet ne sib konerechi, koyaei tuguk eng’ abusnatet: Ak kiwechei chito ne tinyei chobutik che yaachen." 
Proverbs14:18 Berberindo ko borotetab che abusotin. Ago kilaakyin che ng’omen chepkuletab naet. 
Proverbs14:19 Ing’uruksei che yaachen eng’ taitab che miachen; Ak kong’uruksei kiptengeginik eng’ ormarichokab che bo iman. 
Proverbs14:20 Kiwechei kibananiat, wechei agot chitab kokwennyi: Ago tinyei magoriot choronok che chang’." 
Proverbs14:21 Yaei tengekto chito ne sasei chitab kokwennyi: Ago baibai ne rire kibananok. 
Proverbs14:22 Tos mayaei chalwok bik che chobei yaitiet? Ago nyoru rirenet ak imanda che chobei mieindo. 
Proverbs14:23 Tinyei kelunet boisiet age tugul: Ago ibu bananda ng’alek ichegei. 
Proverbs14:24 Chepkuletab che ng’omen ko magornatosiekwak: Ago berberindab che berber ko berberindo kityo. 
Proverbs14:25 Soru sobonwek baoriat ne bo iman: Ago ibu ng’alset inendet ne mwaei lembech. 
Proverbs14:26 Mi kamang’unet ne kim eng’ kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah: Ak nyoru lagokyik ole mwechin. 
Proverbs14:27 Kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah ko kondametutab beekab sobon, Si keistoege mestonokab meet." 
Proverbs14:28 Torornatetab laitoriat ko chang’indab bikyik: Ago ng’emisietab bounindet ko ng’ering’indab bik. 
Proverbs14:29 Tinyei naet ne o inendet ne masartae nerek: Ago tesei berberindo inendet ne sib konerechi. 
Proverbs14:30 Sobondab borto muguleldo ne tinyei chametab ge: Ago nunatetab kowek ng’etkonda. 
Proverbs14:31 Iteweri Yaindennyi ne usei kibananiat; Ago konyiti Yaindennyi inendet ne rire ne matinyei kiy. 
Proverbs14:32 Kiwirjin ng’ony kiptengekyot amu boisionikyik che yaach: Ago tinyei kamang’unet ne bo iman eng’ meenyi. 
Proverbs14:33 Tebe ng’omnatet muguleldab inendet ne tinyei naet: Ago king’anyei che mi mugulelwekab che berber. 
Proverbs14:34 Itorori imanda bororiet: Ago iteweri tengekto boror age tugul. 
Proverbs14:35 Chamei laitoriat otwogindet ne boisiei eng’ ng’omnatet: Ago nerekyin inendet ne ibu kalilanet. 
Proverbs15:1 Istoi wolunet ne tala neregek: Ago ing’eeti ng’olyot ne ng’wan neregek. 
Proverbs15:2 Mwaei ng’elyebwekab che ng’omen naet ne litit: Ago rong’u kutuswekab che berber berberindo. 
Proverbs15:3 Mitei konyekab Jehovah komosta age tugul, Kogeerei che yaachen ak che miachen," 
Proverbs15:4 Ketitab sobondo ng’elyepta ne isoobisiei: Ago ng’emei ngelelnatet tamirmiriet. 
Proverbs15:5 Sasei ne berber kotigonetab kwandanyi: Ago nyoru ng’omnatet inendet ne epchin it keretab kong’. 
Proverbs15:6 Mitei konoraik che chang’ gotab ne bo iman: Ago mitei nyalilda kelunaikab kiptengekyot. 
Proverbs15:7 Iyestoi naet kutuswekab che ng’omen: Ago mayaei ko u noto mugulelwekab che berber. 
Proverbs15:8 Wechei Jehovah tiseiywotab kiptengeginik: Ago boiboiyennyi saetab che bo iman. 
Proverbs15:9 Wechei Jehovah oretab kiptengekyot: Ago chamei ne isubi imanda. 
Proverbs15:10 Mi kotigonet ne ng’wan eng’ inendet ne metoi oret: Ak meei inendet ne wechei keretab kong’. 
Proverbs15:11 Mi taitab Jehovah oldab che kigobek ak Ng’emisiet: Siirei ne tia anyun mugulelwekab bik! 
Proverbs15:12 Machamei chotindet keger kong’: Mawendi ole mi che ng’omen. 
Proverbs15:13 Igochin muguleldo ne igasegei toget kobaibait: Ago tanui tamirmiriet eng’ arogenetab muguleldo. 
Proverbs15:14 Cheng’ei naet muguleldab inendet ne tinyei kaguiyet: Ago baegei kutuswekab che berber, berberindo." 
Proverbs15:15 Yaachen betusiek tugul che bo che kinyalili: Ago muguleldo ne igasegei ko igorta ne bo kotugul. 
Proverbs15:16 Kaigai tuguk che matia koboto kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah, Kosiir konoraik che chang’ koboto nyalilda." 
Proverbs15:17 Kaigai keam ngwek eng’ ole mi chamnyet, Kosiir eito ne akwai koboto wechet." 
Proverbs15:18 Ing’eeti chito ne kolgol boriet: Ago tisei boriet inendet ne masartae nerek. 
Proverbs15:19 U oretab chito ne choriren ng’otwetab katok: Ago baraitu oretab che bo iman. 
Proverbs15:20 Iboiboi kwanda werit ne ng’om: Ago sasei kamet chito ne berber. 
Proverbs15:21 Egu berberindo boiboiyetab ne ma ng’om: Ago ilititi ortinwekyik chito ne tinyei kaguiyet. 
Proverbs15:22 Maisuldoi chobutik eng’ ole mami kiruoget: Ago kigimiti chobutichoto eng’ ole mi kiruogik che chang’. 
Proverbs15:23 Baibaitu chi eng’ wolunetab kutinnyi: Ago ng’olyot ne kimwaei eng’ sait ne nyolu, ko kararan ne tia!" 
Proverbs15:24 Wendi barak oretab sobondo eng’ ne ng’om, Si kobiit koistoegei oldab che kigobek, eng’ ng’ony orit." 
Proverbs15:25 Itutu Jehovah gotab menotik: Ago igimiti kiwotetab mosoget. 
Proverbs15:26 Chobutik che yaachen ko tuguk che kiwechei eng’ Jehovah: Ago tililen ng’alek che iboiboi bich. 
Proverbs15:27 Inyalili gonnyi inendet ne kipkeiyat agobo kelunaik: Ago sobei inendet ne wechei kagochinoik. 
Proverbs15:28 Ruchin muguleldab ne bo iman, kit ne wolu: Ago rong’u kutuswekab kiptengeginik tuguk che yaachen." 
Proverbs15:29 Looe Jehovah kiptengeginik: Ago kasei sautikab che bo iman. 
Proverbs15:30 Iboiboi lapkeiyetab konyek muguleldo: Iakwai kowek ng’alek che miach. 
Proverbs15:31 Tebe kwenutab che ng’omen Itit ne kasei keretab kong’ ne bo sobondo. 
Proverbs15:32 Inendet ne esioi kotigonet, ko kasas sobondanyi: Ago inendet ne epchin it keretab kong’, konyoru kaguiyet." 
Proverbs15:33 Kotigonetab ng’omnatet kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah; Ak indoi kaming’inetab ge eng’ teegisto. 
Proverbs16:1 Boisietab chi kochob muguleldanyi: Ago bunu Jehovah wolunetab ng’elyepta. 
Proverbs16:2 Tililen ortinwek tugul che bo chi ye keerei: Ago kerei Jehovah tamirmirik eng’ karogendoet. 
Proverbs16:3 Igochi Jehovah boisioniguk kondochi, Si kogimegitu kabwatutiguk." 
Proverbs16:4 Kiyai Jehovah tuguk tugul ko u ye kimakyin: Ee, kiyachi che yaach betut ne ya." 
Proverbs16:5 Kit ne wechei Jehovah ko muguleldo age tugul ne menei: Agot ngo namgei eunek, ko magimetoi ama kibir." 
Proverbs16:6 Kiundoi yaitiet eng’ rirenet ak iman: Ak istoegei bik yaitiet ye iywei Jehovah. 
Proverbs16:7 Ye iboiboi ortinwekab chi Jehovah, Kogochin kochamnyo ak bunikyik." 
Proverbs16:8 Kaigai tuguk che matia koboto imanda Kosiir kelunaik che chang’ koboto kertaetab kong’. 
Proverbs16:9 Chobei muguleldab chi orennyi: Ago indochin Jehovah kakwautikyik. 
Proverbs16:10 Bunu kutitab laitoriat tiletab kiruoget ne bo Kamuktaindet: Malelei kutinnyi eng’ kiruoget. 
Proverbs16:11 Bo Jehovah kerutiet ne bo iman ak tuguk che kigerisie: Boisiennyi koik tugul che mi lolet che kigerisie. 
Proverbs16:12 Kit ne kiwechei eng’ laitorinik ko koyai tengekto: Amu kigimiti laitornatet eng’ imanda. 
Proverbs16:13 Boiboiyetab laitorinik kutuswek che bo iman: Ak kochamei ichek chi ne mwaei iman. 
Proverbs16:14 U neregekab laitoriat bik che kiyoktoi che bo meet: Ago tisei chito ne ng’om. 
Proverbs16:15 Mi sobondo lapkeiyetab togetab laitoriat; Ak u chamennyi boldetab ropta ne bo let. 
Proverbs16:16 Kararan anyun ne tia kenyor ng’omnatet kosiir tahabu! Ee, kaigai kelewen naet kosiir feda." 
Proverbs16:17 Oret ne o ne bo bik che bo iman ko koistoegei yaitiet: Ribei sobondanyi ne ribei orennyi. 
Proverbs16:18 Indoe menotet ng’emisiet, Ak indoe kachaunetab ge kabutet." 
Proverbs16:19 Kaigai ngetepto kaming’inetab ge koboto kibananok, Kosiir kepchei barunenik ak menotik." 
Proverbs16:20 Nyoru mieindo ne epchin it ng’olyot: Ak baibai age tugul ne imang’u Jehovah. 
Proverbs16:21 Inendet ne ng’om eng’ muguleldanyi, keguure ne utat: Ak tesei kanetetab ge anyinyindab kutit." 
Proverbs16:22 Kaguiyet ko kondametutab beekab sobon eng’ inendet ne tinyei: Ago berberindo kotigonet ne kitigoni che berber. 
Proverbs16:23 Ineti muguleldab ne ng’om kutinnyi, Ak kotesyin kanetetab ge kutinnyi." 
Proverbs16:24 U kumiat ng’alek che iboiboi bich, Anyinyen eng’ sobondo, ak chametab ge ne bo kowek." 
Proverbs16:25 Mi oret ne len chito litit, Ago kagesunennyi ko ortinwekab meet." 
Proverbs16:26 Boisiechin chi magetab boisiet; Amu ichirjiri kutinnyi inendet. 
Proverbs16:27 Chobei yaitiet chito ne matilei kiy: Ak mitei kutinnyi kit ne u mat ne beelsei. 
Proverbs16:28 Iseeri boriet chito ne imaasat: Ak ibestos chaamindet choronok che eechen. 
Proverbs16:29 Iboiboi chito ne korom chitab kokwennyi, Ak komut eng’ oret ne ma mie." 
Proverbs16:30 Chobei tuguk che imaasotin chito ne kerei konyekyik: Ibu yaitiet inendet ne susei kutinnyi. 
Proverbs16:31 Chepkuletab torornatet kalwalek, Biitune oretab imanda." 
Proverbs16:32 Kaigai inendet ne masartae nerek kosiir ne kim; Ak kaigai inendet ne bou tamirmiriennyi kosiir ne luulei nganaset. 
Proverbs16:33 Kiwirjin barbariat ngoriet; Ago bunu Jehovah kiruogennyi tugul. 
Proverbs17:1 Kaigai kererutiet ne yaamat koboto kamuung’et, Kosiir got ne nyiitat igorta ak komi boriet." 
Proverbs17:2 Bou otwogindet ne boisie ng’omnatet, werit ne ibu kalilanet, Ak nyoru borotet koboto tupchosiek." 
Proverbs17:3 Bo teret feda che kitilili, ak bo mat ne o tahabu: Ago Jehovah ne tiemei mugulelwek." 
Proverbs17:4 Epchin it chito ne yamei yaitiet, kutuswekab kiptengeginik; Epchin it kiplembechwet ng’elyepta ne ng’alsei." 
Proverbs17:5 Age tugul ne chotei kibananiat kogerei kong’ Yaindennyi: Ama kimetoi ama kibir, inendet ne boiboitu ko kanyor alage nyalilda." 
Proverbs17:6 Chepkuletab boisiek mochogoronikwak; Ak torornatetab lagok kwanisiekwak. 
Proverbs17:7 Manyoljin ng’alek che kororon abusanet: Kotam nee anyun kutit ne mwaei lembech, eng’ bounindet." 
Proverbs17:8 U koita ne bo kamanutiet ne o, kitab kagaigaet, eng’ taitab inendet ne tinyei: Borei eng’ ui tugul ole tokyingei." 
Proverbs17:9 Cheng’ei chamnyet inendet ne tuchei bistoet: Ago ibestos choronok che eechen, inendet ne iboti ng’alek." 
Proverbs17:10 Chutei keretab kong’ inendet ne tinyei kaguiyet Kosiir birutik bogol eng’ ne berber. 
Proverbs17:11 Cheng’ei chito ne ya bistoet kityo; Noto anyun kiyokyin inendet chito ne kolgol. 
Proverbs17:12 Kaigai kotuiyo ak chi tiondo ne u keerit ne kagirebe arekyik, Kosiir ne berber eng’ berberindanyi." 
Proverbs17:13 Age tugul ne yaaktoi yaitiet eng’ ne mie, Ko maistoegei yaitiet gonnyi." 
Proverbs17:14 U taunetab boriet ye kiyatei beek; Omete anyun boriet kotom kobiit bolatet. 
Proverbs17:15 Inendet ne iityin imanda kiptengekyot, ak inendet ne igikyin chitab iman, Choto tuwai ko tuguk che wechei Jehovah." 
Proverbs17:16 Lyon anyun si kotinyei ne berber kit ne ale ng’omnatet, Ngot ko matinyei naet?" 
Proverbs17:17 Tinyei choruet chamnyet kotugul, Ak kisichei ne tupcho agobo nyalilda." 
Proverbs17:18 Namegei eunek chito ne matinyei naet, ak chito age koyostos, Si koek tononjinindet eng’ taitab chitab kokwennyi." 
Proverbs17:19 Chamei bistoet ne chamei boriet: Ak inendet ne itorori kurgennyi kocheng’ei ng’emisiet. 
Proverbs17:20 Manyoru kiy ne mie inendet ne imaasat muguleldo: Ak ibutyin yaitiet ne tinyei ng’elyepta ne imaasat. 
Proverbs17:21 Inendet ne sichei ne berber konyoru arogenet: Ak matinyei boiboiyet kwandab ne abusat. 
Proverbs17:22 Kerichek che miach muguleldo ne igasegei: Ago iyaami kowek tamirmiriet ne katanui. 
Proverbs17:23 Inemune kiptengekyot tegennyi kitab kagaigaet, Si komaas ortinwekab kiruoget." 
Proverbs17:24 Mi ng’omnatet taitab inendet ne tinyei naet: Ago mi konyekab ne berber tabanwekab ng’ony. 
Proverbs17:25 Werit ne berber ko arogenet eng’ kwandanyi, Ak ng’wanindo eng’ inendet ne kisichei." 
Proverbs17:26 Ma mie kogeny kebir ne bo iman, Anan kebir che toogunotin agobo imandanywa." 
Proverbs17:27 Tinyei naet ne maiseeri ng’alekyik: Ak tinyei kaguiyet inendet ne tinyei tamirmiriet ne bo muitaet. 
Proverbs17:28 Agot ne berber, ye sisei, kiiti kele ng’om: Ye ker kutinnyi, kiit kele ng’om." 
Proverbs18:1 Inendet ne itabanegei, kocheng’ei magennyi inegei, Ak konerekyin chichoto ng’omnatet ne igesunotgei." 
Proverbs18:2 Maboiboitune ne berber kaguiyet, Ago ibortogei kityo muguleldanyi." 
Proverbs18:3 Ye nyo kiptengekyot, konyo agine sasisiet, Ak bwanei tewernatet ak chotisiet." 
Proverbs18:4 U beekab keringet ne loo ng’alekab chito; U kondametutab ng’omnatet kererut ne rootei. 
Proverbs18:5 Ma mie ketiytii kiptengekyot, Anan kimaas ne bo iman eng’ kiruoget." 
Proverbs18:6 Chutei kutitab ne berber ole mi tiiyet, Ak kuurei kutinnyi biret." 
Proverbs18:7 Ng’emisietab ne berber kutinnyi, Ak mestetab sobondanyi kutinnyi." 
Proverbs18:8 U tuguk che anyiny ng’alekab chaamindet, Ak bendi moet." 
Proverbs18:9 Inendet agine ne choriren eng’ boisiennyi Ko tupcho ak ng’emindet. 
Proverbs18:10 Irimet ne kim kainetab Jehovah: Mwechin ne bo iman, si konyor chametab ge." 
Proverbs18:11 Magornatetab magoriot ko nganasennyi ne kim, Ak u irimet ne koi eng’ kabwatutikyik." 
Proverbs18:12 Menei muguleldab chi kotom konyor ng’emisiet, Ak indoe kaming’inetab ge teegisto." 
Proverbs18:13 Inendet ne wolu ko ma epchi it, Ko berberindo ak tewernatet eng’ inendet." 
Proverbs18:14 Igimiti tamirmirietab chito nyalulnatennyi; Ago imuchi ng’o komuita eng’ arogenet? 
Proverbs18:15 Nyoru naet muguleldab ne ng’om; Ak cheng’ei naet ititab ne ng’om. 
Proverbs18:16 Cheng’jin konunet chito boroindo, Ak komutyi inendet taitab bik che eechen." 
Proverbs18:17 Chito ne sib kong’alali, kelen bo iman; Ago nyonei chitab kokwennyi kosiachi inendet." 
Proverbs18:18 Iwong’u kabeletab ge barbariat, Ak ioitos kiruogik." 
Proverbs18:19 Uui kosiir nganaset ne kim keweech tupchet ne kiginach: Ak u tiiyosiek che u choto, temeleiywekab nganaset." 
Proverbs18:20 Biyonyi moetab chi logoekab kutinnyi; Biyonyi inendet iyotetab kutinnyi. 
Proverbs18:21 Mitei kimnatetab ng’elyepta, meet ak sobondo; Ak amei logoekyik ichek che chamei." 
Proverbs18:22 Nyoru kit ne mie age tugul ne nyoru osotiot ne ituni, Ak nyoru chamet eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Proverbs18:23 Boisie kibananiat kagaigaosiek: Ago wolu magoriot kong’emei. 
Proverbs18:24 Cheng’jingei ng’emisiet inendet ne cheng’ei choronok che chang’: Ago mi choruet ne namegei kosiir ng’etab kamet. 
Proverbs19:1 Kaigai kibananiat ne wendote imandanyi Kosiir ne imaasat eng’ ng’alekyik, ak ko berber." 
Proverbs19:2 Ma mie kogeny sobondo ne matinyei naet; Ak yaei tengekto inendet ne sartae bandanyi. 
Proverbs19:3 Igunuri oretab chito berberindanyi. Ak konerekyin Jehovah eng’ muguleldanyi. 
Proverbs19:4 Tesei choronok che chang’ magornatet: Ago itabanegei kibananiat choruennyi. 
Proverbs19:5 Magimetoi baoriatab lembech ama kibir; Ak machilili inendet ne mwaei lembechek. 
Proverbs19:6 Rirjin bik che chang’ mieindab chito ne toogunot: Ak chi age tugul ko choruetab inendet ne igoitoi konunoik. 
Proverbs19:7 Wechei kibananiat tupchosiekyik tugul: Istoegei anyun ne tia choronokyik! Isube ichek ng’alek, ago manyoru." 
Proverbs19:8 Chamei sobondanyi ne nyoru ng’omnatet: Nyoru mieindo inendet ne ribei naet. 
Proverbs19:9 Magimetoi baoriatab lembech ama kibir; Ak lusei inendet ne mwaei lembechek. 
Proverbs19:10 Manyoljin tugukab talbisto ne berber; Kotam nee anyun ngele bou otwogindet werikab laitoriat. 
Proverbs19:11 Masartae neregek chito ne ng’om; Ak egu torornatennyi ye kasiirtoe bistoet. 
Proverbs19:12 U borisenetab ng’etundo neregekab laitoriat; Ago u mieindanyi rewot ne mi suswek. 
Proverbs19:13 Nyalildab kwandanyi werit ne berber: U beek che saitoi bolatetab osotiot. 
Proverbs19:14 Got ak magornatosiekab chi ko borotet ne bunu kwanisiek; Ago bunu Jehovah osotiot ne ng’om. 
Proverbs19:15 Igochin chito chorirnatet ruondo ne nyigis; Amei rubet chito ne choriren. 
Proverbs19:16 Ribei sobondanyi ne ribei ng’atutik: Ago meei ne maribei ortinwekyik. 
Proverbs19:17 Inendet ne rire kibananiat ko kabesendochi Jehovah, Ak kiyaakyin inendet kogeny eng’ boisiennyi ne mie." 
Proverbs19:18 Itigon wering’ung’ kota komi kamang’unet; Amat itil eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile mie ngo mee. 
Proverbs19:19 Nyoru biret chito ne tinyei nereknatet ne o: Amu ngot isoru inendet, ko kanyoljin tun isoru kogeny." 
Proverbs19:20 Epchi it kotigonet, ak itaach konetisiet, Si kobiit inyoru ng’omnatet eng’ kagesuneng’ung’." 
Proverbs19:21 Mi chobutik che chang’ muguleldab chito; Ago tebyei kotigonetab Jehovah. 
Proverbs19:22 Kichamei chito amu mieindanyi: Ak kaigai kibananiat kosiir kiplembechwet. 
Proverbs19:23 Tokyingei sobondo kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah: Yamei kotugul kaiyweisionoto inendet ne tinyei: Manyonjin yaitiet. 
Proverbs19:24 Unyei eunnyi eng’ tabet chito ne choriren, Ama chamei konde kutinnyi kogeny." 
Proverbs19:25 Bir sasindet, si konetgei ng’omnatet ne abusat: Ak iger kong’ inendet ne tinyei kaguiyet, si koguiyo naet." 
Proverbs19:26 Ibu kalilanet ak tewernatert, Werit ne iseeri tugukab kwandanyi ak koon kamet." 
Proverbs19:27 Amat igas anyun werinnyu konetisiet Ne ibeetenen ng’alekab ng’omnatet. 
Proverbs19:28 Chotei kiruoget baoriat ne matilei kiy; Ak lugui yaitiet kutuswekab kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs19:29 Kichopchin kiruogutik chotik, Ak kichopchin bataikab che berber birutik." 
Proverbs20:1 Chotindet divaik, bolindet maiyek; Ak ma ng’om age tugul ne betei eng’ maiyek." 
Proverbs20:2 U borisenetab ng’etundo kamuisetab laitoriat: Inendet ne tachei laitoriat koyachin sobondanyi tengekto. 
Proverbs20:3 Teegisto eng’ chi ngo istoegei boriet: Ago bolei age tugul ne berber. 
Proverbs20:4 Machamei kobatis inendet ne choriren eng’ betusiekab kaititiet; Somsoti anyun kegesisie, ama nyoru kiy." 
Proverbs20:5 U riret kiruoget eng’ muguleldab chito, Ago ramu chito ne tinyei kaguiyet." 
Proverbs20:6 Ibortoi chi age tugul eng’ bik che chang’ mieindanyi: Ago imuchi ng’o konyor chito ne kiyani? 
Proverbs20:7 Iberurotin lagokab chito ne bo iman, Ne wendote imandanyi." 
Proverbs20:8 Iseertoi yaitwogik tugul eng’ konyekyik Laitoriat ne tebe ng’echeretab kiruoget. 
Proverbs20:9 Ng’o ne imuchi komwa kole, Kaatilil muguleldanyu, A tilil, ma atinye tengek?" 
Proverbs20:10 Ratilisiek che terotin, ak tuguk che kigerisie che terotin, Choto tugul ko tuguk che wechei Jehovah." 
Proverbs20:11 Naoksei lakwet eng’ boisionikyik, Ngo tilil boisiennyi, anan ngo litit." 
Proverbs20:12 Kiyai Jehovah tuwai, Itit ne kigastoe, ak konda ne kigeertoe." 
Proverbs20:13 Amecham ruondo, si meegu kibananiat; Kosu, si ibiye." 
Proverbs20:14 Mwaei alindet kole, Matilei kiy, matilei kiy; Ago ye kakwa, kochoigei." 
Proverbs20:15 Mi tahabu, ak chang’indab koik che kiguure peninim: Ago ng’alekab naet ko koita ne bo kamanutiet ne o." 
Proverbs20:16 Nam ngorietab inendet ne tononjin toondet; Ak onam inendet koek kaarorunet ne tononjin toek. 
Proverbs20:17 Anyiny eng’ chi amitwogikab lembeita; Ago ne matia konyi kutinnyi koik. 
Proverbs20:18 Kigimiti chobutiet age tugul eng’ kiruoget: Ak iyai luget eng’ ng’omnatet. 
Proverbs20:19 Ng’anyei ung’otik ne iboti ng’alek; Amat onamge anyun ak inendet ne iberberisiei. 
Proverbs20:20 Kimisi eng’ mesundeito ne o mising’ Taitab age tugul ne sasei kwandanyi anan kamet. 
Proverbs20:21 Borotet ne biitu eng’ chokyinet Ko magiberuri eng’ let. 
Proverbs20:22 Amat imwa ile, Ageeri yaitiet: Igen Jehovah, si kosorun." 
Proverbs20:23 Wechei Jehovah ratilisiek che terotin; Ama mie kerutietab lembech. 
Proverbs20:24 Bo Jehovah kakwautikab chi; Imuktoi ano anyun chi koguiyo orennyi? 
Proverbs20:25 Mestet eng’ chi kosartae kole, Tilil, Ak ye kagoyai kayosiosiek, koteebat." 
Proverbs20:26 Iyestoi laitoriat ne ng’om kiptengeginik, Ak kotuei ichek eng’ kit ne kituisie." 
Proverbs20:27 Tait ne bo Jehovah tamirmirietab chi, Ne isiachi tugukab ke." 
Proverbs20:28 Ribei rirenet ak iman laitoriat: Ak kogimiti rirenet ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet. 
Proverbs20:29 Torornatetab murenik ko kimnatenywa: Ak kororonindab boisiek kalwalek. 
Proverbs20:30 Iundoi yaitwogik birutik che ng’wonen: Ak itei kwerutik moet orit. 
Proverbs21:1 U ainosiek muguleldab laitoriat eng’ eutab Jehovah: Imuti kotokyigei oldo tugul ole machei. 
Proverbs21:2 Len chi bo iman orennyi age tugul: Ago kerei Jehovah mugulelwek eng’ karogendoet. 
Proverbs21:3 Keyaei iman ak kiruoget Ko taachaksei eng’ taitab Jehovah kosiir korosiot. 
Proverbs21:4 Konyek che tinyei menotet, ak muguleldo ne menei, Agot kabatisietab kiptengeginik, ko tengekto." 
Proverbs21:5 Tokyingei chang’indo kityo kabwatutikab che igiilegei: Ago banani age tugul ne sartae. 
Proverbs21:6 Ye kinyoru konoraik eng’ lembeita Ko u kibungweret ne kiwirjin komosi ak komosi; cheng’ei meet che cheng’ei choto. 
Proverbs21:7 Onei kiptengeginik koromnatenywa; Amu esioi koruoch. 
Proverbs21:8 Kunur mising’ oretab inendet ne laei ng’ogisto: Ago eng’ inendet ne tilil, ko litit boisiennyi." 
Proverbs21:9 Kaigai kemeny taban eng’ got barak, Kosiir kemeny got ne o ak kwondo ne bolin." 
Proverbs21:10 Machei yaitiet sobondab chito ne ya: Manyoru chamet chitab kokwennyi eng’ tainnyi. 
Proverbs21:11 Ye kibir chotindet, kong’omitu ne abusat: Ak ye kinet ne ng’om, kotaachei naet." 
Proverbs21:12 Ibwati chitab iman gotab kiptengekyot; Ole kigabuitoi kiptengeginik eng’ ng’emisienywa. 
Proverbs21:13 Inendet ne timei itikyik ye rirei kibananiat, Korirei agine, ago magasei chi." 
Proverbs21:14 Imisi neregek konunotiot ne kigonu eng’ ung’ot, Ak imisi neregek che ng’wonen kit ne kigoigoisie." 
Proverbs21:15 Boiboiyet eng’ chito ne bo iman koyai kiruoget; Ago ng’emisiet eng’ yaikab tengekto. 
Proverbs21:16 Imuunyi eng’ tuiyetab che kigobek Chito ne mastoi eng’ oretab kaguiyet. 
Proverbs21:17 Egu kibananiat chito ne chamei ureriet: Maegu magoriot inendet ne chamei divaik ak mwanik. 
Proverbs21:18 Egu kiptengekyot ne kitiage ne bo iman; Ak kogeeri kaberberindet che bo iman. 
Proverbs21:19 Kaigai kemeny kong’atet, Kosiir kemeny ak kwondo ne bolei ak konerechi." 
Proverbs21:20 Mitei konoraik che bo kamanutiet ne o, ak mwanik eng’ meng’atetab ne ng’om; Ago lugui noto chito ne berber." 
Proverbs21:21 Inendet ne isubi imanda ak rirenet, Konyoru sobondo, imanda ak teegisto." 
Proverbs21:22 Lanyei chito ne ng’om nganasetab che kimen, Ak kobut kimnatetab kamang’unennyi." 
Proverbs21:23 Age tugul ne ribei kutinnyi ak ng’elyeptanyi Koribei sobondanyi si manyor nyalilwogik. 
Proverbs21:24 Kiguure chotindet chito ne menei, ak kochaugei, Boisiei inendet eng’ kaeetetab ge ne bo menotet." 
Proverbs21:25 Barei chito ne choriren magennyi; Amu esioi eunekyik kobois. 
Proverbs21:26 Mi ne kasei miat eng’ keiyandit bet komugul: Ago igoitoi ne bo iman ama etei. 
Proverbs21:27 Kit ne kiwechei korosiotab kiptengeginik: Kotam nee anyun ye ibu korosiondonoto, kotinyei kabwatutik che yaach!" 
Proverbs21:28 Lusei baoriat ne bo lembech: Ago ng’alali ng’alek che tebyei keny chito ne kasei. 
Proverbs21:29 Iuuiiti togennyi chito ne ya: Ago chobei ortinwekyik chito ne bo iman. 
Proverbs21:30 Mami ng’omnatet anan kaguiyet Anan kiruoget ne kirindoi Jehovah. 
Proverbs21:31 Choboksei mbartanyit agobo betutab luget: Ago bo katerteret Jehovah. 
Proverbs22:1 Kaigai kelewen kainet ne mie kosiir magornatosiek che chang’; Kaigai kelewen mieindo ne bo chamnyet kosiir feda ak tahabu. 
Proverbs22:2 Tuitos magorek ak kibananok: Jehovah yaindetab ichek tugul. 
Proverbs22:3 Keerei chito ne ng’om yaitiet ak kounygei: Ago siirtoi abusanik, ak konyor nyalilda." 
Proverbs22:4 Melektab kaming’inetab ge, ak kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah, Ko magornatosiek, ak teegisto, ak sobondo." 
Proverbs22:5 Mi katok ak mestonok oretab chito ne imaasat: Looitune choto inendet ne ribei sobondanyi. 
Proverbs22:6 Inet lakwet kosub oret ne nyolu kobun, Ak mabagaktoi agot ye kagoosit." 
Proverbs22:7 Bou magoriot kibananok, Ak otwogindetab chito ne besendoi, ne beseni." 
Proverbs22:8 Inendet ne kolei tengekto kogesei nyalilda: Ak betei kiroktab nereknatennyi. 
Proverbs22:9 Kiberuri ne tinyei kondab aiyebindo; Amu igochin amitwogikyik kibananiat. 
Proverbs22:10 On chotindet, si kobet bolatet; Ee, sisei boriet ak tewernatet." 
Proverbs22:11 Inendet ne chamei tililindab muguleldo, Egu anyun laitoriat choruennyi amu mieindab kutinnyi." 
Proverbs22:12 Ribei konyekab Jehovah inendet ne tinyei naet, Ago igabui ng’alekab chito ne kaberberindet." 
Proverbs22:13 Mwaei chito ne choriren kole, Mi ng’etundo sang’: Kibara eng’ oret." 
Proverbs22:14 Keringet ne loo kutitab chepkugoniot: Ibutyin yoto inendet ne nerekyin Jehovah. 
Proverbs22:15 Kigiratyi berberindo muguleldab lakwet; Ago onei kiroktab kotigonet kolooit eng’ inendet. 
Proverbs22:16 Inendet ne usei kibananiat si kotesak tugukyik, Ak kogochin tuguk magoriot, koegu kibananiat." 
Proverbs22:17 Eb it, si kobiit igas ng’alekab bik che ng’omen, Ak itokyi muguleldang’ung’ naennyu." 
Proverbs22:18 Amu mie ngot irib eng’ oring’ung’, Ngo kimegitu tugul eng’ kuting’ung’." 
Proverbs22:19 Si kobiit imang’u Jehovah, Kaaborun rani chuto, ee, kaaborun." 
Proverbs22:20 Tos ma asirun tuguk che kororon Che bo kiruogutik ak naet; 
Proverbs22:21 Kogonin inai imanitab ng’alekab iman, Si kobiit imuch iwolji ng’alekab iman ichek che koiyogun?" 
Proverbs22:22 Amat irebe kibananiat, amu banan, Anan ius eng’ ormarich ne kinyalili:" 
Proverbs22:23 Amu ng’alaldochin Jehovah ichek, Ak koluul sobonwekab ichek che luulei." 
Proverbs22:24 Amenam choruandit ak chito ne nerechi; Amat obendate ak chito ne tinyei neregek. 
Proverbs22:25 Si menetge ortinwekyik, Ak inyoru mestet ne bo sobondang’ung’." 
Proverbs22:26 Amat iegu agenge eng’ ichek che iyostos konamegei eunek, Anan agenge eng’ ichek che tononjin bik agobo besenaik:" 
Proverbs22:27 Ngot ko metinye che iyaaktoe, Ko amu nee anyun si koibenen itogung’ung’?" 
Proverbs22:28 Ameiste kiwotet ne bo keny, Ne kichobei kwanisieguk." 
Proverbs22:29 Tos igeere chito ne igiiljingei boisiennyi? Tononi inendet eng’ taitab laitorinik; Matononi eng’ taitab bik che ma toogunotin. 
Proverbs23:1 Ye oamisie ak bounindet, Ibwat komie ne mi taing’ung’;" 
Proverbs23:2 Ak inde rotwet moktang’ung’, Ngo i kipkeiya." 
Proverbs23:3 Amat imach amitwogikyik che anyiny; Amu amitwogikab kaberberisiet choto. 
Proverbs23:4 Ameiimge ile iegu magorio; Ametiiege ng’omnateng’ung’. 
Proverbs23:5 Tos igase miat kit ne mami? Amu yachingei magornatet kebebaik, Ko u ye tirireni kipsichit kotokyingei barak." 
Proverbs23:6 Ameam amitwogikab inendet ne tinyei kong’ ne ya, Amemach amitwogikyik che anyiny:" 
Proverbs23:7 Amu u inendet kabwatutikyik: Lenjinin, Amisie ak ieeise; Ago mami muguleldanyi koboten." 
Proverbs23:8 Ing’ung’u kererutiet ne keam, Ak kobetyo ng’aleguk che anyiny." 
Proverbs23:9 Amat ing’alal kogasei ne berber; Amu sasei ng’omnatetab ng’aleguk. 
Proverbs23:10 Ameiste kiwotet ne bo keny; Amewe mbarenikab che matinyei kwanisiek; 
Proverbs23:11 Amu kim katiagindenywa; Tononjin ichek eng’ ng’alek kogirindoin. 
Proverbs23:12 Igochi muguleldang’ung’ konetisiet, Ak igochi itiguk kogas ng’alekab ng’omnatet." 
Proverbs23:13 Ameesie itigon lakwet: Amu mameei ngibir. 
Proverbs23:14 Bire kirokto, Si isoru sobondanyi eng’ oldab che kigobek." 
Proverbs23:15 Werinnyu, ngo ng’om muguleldang’ung’, Kobaibai muguleldanyu, ee, baibai muguleldanyu:" 
Proverbs23:16 Ee, boiboitu muguleldanyu, Ye kemwa tuguk che bo iman." 
Proverbs23:17 Amat koam ng’etkong’ muguleldang’ung’ agobo kiptengeginik: Ago konyit Jehovah betut komugul: 
Proverbs23:18 Amu mitei iman melekto; Ama kiistoi kamang’uneng’ung’. 
Proverbs23:19 Kas anyun, werinnyu, ak ing’omitu, Ak indochi muguleldang’ung’ eng’ oret." 
Proverbs23:20 Amotebi ak eeikab divaik; Koboto kipkeinik che amei banyek: 
Proverbs23:21 Amu egu bononik kibogitinik ak kipkeinik: Ak ilaakyin ruondo chito mararenik. 
Proverbs23:22 Epchi it kwandang’ung’ ne kisichin, Amesas komet ko kagoosit." 
Proverbs23:23 Al imanit, amealde; Ee, al ng’omnatet, ak konetisiet, ak kaguiyet." 
Proverbs23:24 Baibaitu mising’ kwandab ne bo iman: Ak inendet ne sichei lakwet ne ng’om, kobaibaitune inendet." 
Proverbs23:25 Ingogasgei kwandang’ung’ ak komet, Ingobaibait komet ne kisichin." 
Proverbs23:26 Werinnyu, kona muguleldang’ung’, Ingobaibaitune konyeguk ortinwekyuk." 
Proverbs23:27 Amu keringet ne loo chepkugoniot; Keringet ne mariich kwondo ne ma neng’ung’. 
Proverbs23:28 Ee, saptoi ko u rebindet, Ak kotesei kaberberik eng’ bik." 
Proverbs23:29 Ng’o ne rirei kole, Bwa? Ng’o ne arogeni? Ng’o ne bolei? Ng’o ne ing’unyng’unyi? Ng’o ne kigiguoten buch? Ng’o ne biriren konyek?" 
Proverbs23:30 Ichek che eei divaik agoi; Ichek che cheng’oti maiyek che burugotin. 
Proverbs23:31 Ameiit maiyek ye kagobiriritu, Ye toogu itondanyi eng’ kikombet, Ye rektoi komie:" 
Proverbs23:32 Eng’ let kosus ko u erenet, Ak kouut ko u melmeldo." 
Proverbs23:33 Keerei konyeguk karusiek, Ak komwa muguleldang’ung’ tuguk che imaasotin." 
Proverbs23:34 Ee, iigeitu inendet ne rue nyanjet kwen, Anan ko u inendet ne rue toloitab melit." 
Proverbs23:35 Ile, Kagokwera, ago ma ama kiy; Kagobira, ama agas: Agosu au, si acheng’at kogeny?" 
Proverbs24:1 Amat koamjin ng’etkong’ bik che yaachen, Anan imach otebi ak ichek:" 
Proverbs24:2 Amu inetegei mugulwekwak usisiet, Ak mwaei kutuswekwak che yaachen." 
Proverbs24:3 Kiteege got ng’omnatet; Ak kigimite kaguiyet: 
Proverbs24:4 Ak eng’ naet kinyiiti gorik che bo orit che bo goyoto Eng’ magornatosiek tugul che bo kamanutiet ne o, ak ko miachen." 
Proverbs24:5 Kim chito ne ng’om; Ee, tesei kimnatet chito ne bo naet." 
Proverbs24:6 Amu iyae lugeng’ung’ eng’ kandoet ne bo ng’omnatet: Ak biitu sorunet eng’ chang’indab kiruogik. 
Proverbs24:7 Toror ng’omnatet eng’ ne berber: Matwegu eng’ kurgat. 
Proverbs24:8 Inendet ne chobei koyai yaitiet Koguure bik inendet chito ne ya. 
Proverbs24:9 Tengekto kabwatutikab ne berber: Ak wechei bik chotindet. 
Proverbs24:10 Ngot itanui eng’ betutab nyalilda Ko ming’in kimnateng’ung’. 
Proverbs24:11 Soru ichek che kimuti koba meet, Ak iet che kimachei kebar." 
Proverbs24:12 Ngot imwa ile, Keero, ma kinai nito: Tos maibwati nito inendet ne kerei mugulelwek eng’ karogendoet? Tos manaei ng’olyondonito inendet ne ribei sobondang’ung’? Ak tos maigeerjin chi age tugul ko u boisiennyi?" 
Proverbs24:13 Werinnyu, am kumik, amu miach; Koboto masamek, amu anyiny ye ichamjami:" 
Proverbs24:14 Inae anyun ile anyiny ng’omnatet eng’ sobondang’ung’: Ngot inyoru noto, kobiitu anyun melekto, Ama kiistoi kamang’uneng’ung’." 
Proverbs24:15 Ee, kiptengekyondoni, amesapchi meng’otetab chito ne bo iman: Ameluul ole imuung’e inendet:" 
Proverbs24:16 Amu ibuti chito ne bo iman konyil tisab, ak kong’eet kogeny: Ago igabui nyalilda kiptengeginik." 
Proverbs24:17 Amat ibaibaitu ye ibut bunyondeng’ung’, Amat kogasgei muguleldang’ung’ ye kagiwirta inendet:" 
Proverbs24:18 Si mageer noto Jehovah, ak konyit, Ak koistoe inendet neregekyik." 
Proverbs24:19 Amengonyitin che yaei yaitio; Anan koamjin ng’etkong’ kiptengeginik: 
Proverbs24:20 Amu manyoru melekto chito ne ya; Kimisi tait ne bo kiptengeginik. 
Proverbs24:21 Werinnyu, konyit Jehovah ak laitoriat: Amonamge ak icheget che walaksei:" 
Proverbs24:22 Amu biitu nyalildanywa kochogu; Ak ng’o ne ingen ng’emisietab icheget tuwai? 
Proverbs24:23 Chuto agichek ko ng’alekab che ng’omen. Ma mie ketiytii bik eng’ kiruoget. 
Proverbs24:24 Inendet ne mwachin kiptengekyot, kolenjin, I bo iman; Kochubei bik inendet, wechei bororiosiek inendet:" 
Proverbs24:25 Ago igasegei che kere kong’ inendet, Ak nyonjin ichek kaberuret ne mie." 
Proverbs24:26 Ng’ututisiei Inendet ne wolu ne bo iman. 
Proverbs24:27 Chob boisieng’ung’ eng’ ole bo sang’, Ak ichopchige eng’ mbar; Yeityo iteech gong’ung’." 
Proverbs24:28 Amat iegu baoriat igirinde chitab kokweng’ung’ buch; Amat ing’alse eng’ kuting’ung’. 
Proverbs24:29 Amat imwa ile, Ayachini inendet ko u ye kagoyaiywa; Ageerjini chichoto ko u boisiennyi." 
Proverbs24:30 Kiabun mbaretab chito ne choriren, Ak ole negite mbaretab sabibuk ne bo chichoto matinyei naet;" 
Proverbs24:31 Ak ogeero, kigobitye katok mbaret tugul, Ak kituch siwek yoto tugul. Ak kigobutok inatunnyi ne bo koik." 
Proverbs24:32 Kiageer anyun, ak abwat mising’: Kiageer, ak kianyoru konetisiet." 
Proverbs24:33 Ruondo kitigin, kanuuget kitigin, Arung’et kitigin ne bo eunek eng’ ruondo:" 
Proverbs24:34 Konyonjin anyun banandang’ung’ ko u rebindet: Ak konyonjin rubet ko u chito ne tinyei karik. 
Proverbs25:1 Kalewenaikab Solomon chuto agichek, che kisirei bikab Hesekia laitoriatab Juda." 
Proverbs25:2 Torornatetab Kamuktaindet kouny kiy: Ago torornatetab laitorinik kocheng’ ng’olyo age tugul. 
Proverbs25:3 Ko u ye maisiagaksei tororindab kipsengwet, ak looindab ng’ony, Ko u noto agine mugulelwekab laitorinik." 
Proverbs25:4 Kenende michikyigek eng’ feda, Si kobiit teret ne bo katililindetab feda:" 
Proverbs25:5 Iste kiptengekyot eng’ taitab laitoriat, Si kigimit eng’ imanda ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet." 
Proverbs25:6 Amelosuge eng’ taitab laitoriat, Ametonon eng’ komostab bik che eechen:" 
Proverbs25:7 Amu kaigai ngelenjin, Togosu; Kosiir kiming’inin eng’ taitab bounindet, Ne kaigeer." 
Proverbs25:8 Amat isib iyai boriet, Si mabetun kit ne iyae eng’ let, Ye kagotewerin chitab kokweng’ung’." 
Proverbs25:9 Oruoch ak chitab kokweng’ung’ inegei, Amat ing’any ung’otietab chito age:" 
Proverbs25:10 Si maitewerin inendet ne kasei, Ak konamin tewernateng’ung’." 
Proverbs25:11 U logoekab tahabu che mi kerebonikab feda Ng’olyot ne kemwaei eng’ sait ne nyolu. 
Proverbs25:12 U munaiyetab itit ne bo tahabu, ak lelestab tahabu che kororon, Kotigonindet ne ng’om ne kere kong’ itit ne kase it." 
Proverbs25:13 U kaititietab teluchi eng’ betusiekab kesisiet, Chito ne kiyoktoi ne kiyani, eng’ ichek che iyoktoi inendet; Amu igoigoi sobonwekab kiptainikyik." 
Proverbs25:14 U bolik ak usonet ne matinyei ropta, Ne ilosunegei konunoikyik eng’ lembech." 
Proverbs25:15 Kigoigoi kiruogindet eng’ muitaet ne o, Ak iriei ng’elyepta ne tala kowet." 
Proverbs25:16 Tos kiinyoru kumik? Am che te che yamin; Si mebiye, ak ing’ung’u." 
Proverbs25:17 Ametiech gotab chitab kokweng’ung’ kotugul; Si mang’et agobo inye, ak kowechin." 
Proverbs25:18 Chito ne baorianjin chitab kokwennyi eng’ lembech Ko kergei ak kiriswet, ak rotwetab chok, ak kipchabet ne ng’atib." 
Proverbs25:19 U keldet ne kigoil, ak keldo ne kigobunuk Kamang’unet ne kimang’u chito ne magiyani, eng’ betutab nyalilda." 
Proverbs25:20 U chito ne ireegu ngoriet eng’ betusiekab kaititiet, ak ko u siki che kirong’jin munyat, Inendet ne tienjin tienwogik muguleldo ne nyigis." 
Proverbs25:21 Ngo am rubet bunyondeng’ung’, ibai; Ak ngo am melel, inage koee:" 
Proverbs25:22 Amu irurukyini ng’etetiot metinnyi, Ak kogeerun Jehovah." 
Proverbs25:23 Ibu ropta usonetab murot ne bo katam: Ibu ko u noto chemereret neregek. 
Proverbs25:24 Kaigai kemeny taban eng’ got barak, Kosiir kemeny got ne o ak kwondo ne bolin." 
Proverbs25:25 U beek che kaitit eng’ ne amei melel, Logoiywek che miach che bunu emet ne loo." 
Proverbs25:26 U ole kutune beek che turur, ak kondab beek ne bulot, Chito ne bo iman ne igochingei kiptengekyot." 
Proverbs25:27 Ma mie keam kumik che chang’: Ko u noto ngo cheng’jigei bik teegistanywa ko ma teegisto. 
Proverbs25:28 U nganaset ne kigebut ama tinyei irimet, Chito ne maribegei." 
Proverbs26:1 Ko u ye manamegei teluchi ak kemeut, ak manamegei ropta ak betusiekab kesisiet, Ko u noto, manyoljin teegisto chi ne berber." 
Proverbs26:2 Ko u ye maombenoti buch chepkelembut, anan ko u ye matirirenoti buch kibiswet, Ko u noto, manamei chi chubisiet ne bo buch." 
Proverbs26:3 Ko u ye bo kipcharitit mbartanyit, ak ko u ye bo karnetab kutit sigiriet, Ko u noto, bo kirokto chito ne berber." 
Proverbs26:4 Amewolji ne berber ko u berberindanyi, Si meige inendet aginye." 
Proverbs26:5 Wolji ne berber ko u berberindanyi, Si maiitgei inendet kole ng’om eng’ losennyi bo ge." 
Proverbs26:6 Tilei kelyekyik, ak koeei ng’emisiet Inendet ne iyoktoe ng’olyot chito ne berber." 
Proverbs26:7 Ko u ye songinindos kelyekab ne ing’wali: Ko u noto kalewenet eng’ kutuswekab che berber. 
Proverbs26:8 U chito ne indoi koita borowet ne kiwirtoisie, Inendet ne igochin teegisto chito ne berber." 
Proverbs26:9 U katet ne toorei eutab kibogitiot, Kalewenet eng’ kutuswekab che berber." 
Proverbs26:10 U mwogindet ne iguoteni tugul, Inendet ne sirei ne berber anan che siirtoi, koboisiechi." 
Proverbs26:11 U seset ne weekyingei kang’undaikyik, Inendet ne berber ne ketyingei berberindanyi." 
Proverbs26:12 Tos igeere chito ne iityingei kole ng’om eng’ losennyi bo ge? Mitei kamang’unet eng’ chito ne berber kosiir inendet. 
Proverbs26:13 Mwaei ne choriren kole, Mi ng’etundo oret; Mi ng’etundo ortinwek che baraen." 
Proverbs26:14 Ko u ye weegegei kereiywotab kurget karikyik che namei, Ko u noto weechegei chito ne choriren eng’ itogunnyi." 
Proverbs26:15 Unyei keunnyi eng’ tabet chito ne choriren; Ng’etei inendet si mainde kutinnyi. 
Proverbs26:16 Iityingei chito ne choriren kole ng’om eng’ losennyi bo ge Kosiir bik tisab che imuchi kowol kiy. 
Proverbs26:17 U ne namei itikab seset, Inendet ne siirtoi, ak koiimgei eng’ boriet ne ma nenyi." 
Proverbs26:18 U chito ne amei iywek ne wirtoi kegenganik, Kipchabonik ak meet;" 
Proverbs26:19 Chito ne iberberi chitab kokwennyi, Ak kole, Maurereni?" 
Proverbs26:20 Meei mat ye mami kwenik: Ak sisei boriet eng’ ole mami chaamindet. 
Proverbs26:21 Ko u ye tesei nesek ng’etetiot, ak ko u ye tesei kwenik mat; Ko u noto, tesei suriet chito ne bolin." 
Proverbs26:22 U amitwogik che anyiny ng’alekab chaamindet, Ak bendi ng’alechato moet orit." 
Proverbs26:23 U teretab menet ne kigiliige michikyigek che kigenendoe feda, Kutitab chemwai kut koboto muguleldo ne ya." 
Proverbs26:24 Iberberisiei eng’ ng’alekyik chito ne wegisiei, Ago konorjingei ng’alset:" 
Proverbs26:25 Ye kamwa che miach, ko meyan inendet; Amu mitei muguleldanyi tuguk tisabu che bo wechet:" 
Proverbs26:26 Agot ngo tugegei wechet eng’ ng’alset, Ko tun keng’anyei yaitiennyi eng’ taitab tuiyet." 
Proverbs26:27 Ibutyin keringet age tugul ne balei: Ak koweekyingei koita inendet ne mildoi. 
Proverbs26:28 Wechei ng’elyepta ne mwaei lembech icheget che kagoguoten; Ak ibu ng’emisiet chito ne chemwai kut. 
Proverbs27:1 Amechauge agobo mutai; Amu mengen kit ne biitu eng’ betut age tugul. 
Proverbs27:2 Ingolosun age, amelosuge; Ingolosun toondet, amelosuge." 
Proverbs27:3 Nyigis koita, nyigisen ng’aniek; Ago siirei choto tugul neregekab ne berber." 
Proverbs27:4 Korom nereknatet, koromen mising’ neregek; Ago ng’o ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taitab ng’etkonda?"
