Proverbs27:5 Kaigai keretab kong’ ne toogu Kosiir chamnyet ne kiunyei. 
Proverbs27:6 Bo iman kaguotenetab choruet: Ago chang’ ng’ututosiekab bunyot. 
Proverbs27:7 Wechei masamek chito ne biyong’ot: Ago anyiny kiy age tugul ne ng’wan eng’ chito ne amei rubo. 
Proverbs27:8 U taritiet ne ng’eete keswennyi koombenoti, Chito ne ng’eete oldanyi koombenot." 
Proverbs27:9 Iboiboi muguleldo mwanik ak nyamdutik: Iboiboi ko u noto anyinyindab choruetab chi ye toreti inendet. 
Proverbs27:10 Amemete chorueng’ung’, ak choruetab kwandang’ung’; Amewe gotab ng’etab komet eng’ betutab nyalildang’ung’: Kaigai chitab kokweng’ung’ ne negit kosiir ng’etab komet ne mi ole loo." 
Proverbs27:11 Werinnyu, ng’omitu, ak ibaibai muguleldanyu, Si amuch awolji inendet ne itewera." 
Proverbs27:12 Keerei chito ne ng’om yaitiet, ak kounygei: Ago siirtoi abusanik, ak konyor nyalilda." 
Proverbs27:13 Nam ngorietab inendet ne tononjin toondet; Ak inam inendet koek kaarorunet ne tononjin chepkugoniot. 
Proverbs27:14 Inendet ne iberuri choruennyi eng’ kutit ne o, kong’eetei karon mising’, Kiiti koek chubisiet kaberuronoto eng’ inendet." 
Proverbs27:15 Kergei ropta ne inesi eng’ betutab ropta Ak kwondo ne bolin: 
Proverbs27:16 Inendet ne len kirindoi kwonyoto, kogirindoi usonet, Ak komumute mwaita eunnyi ne bo tai." 
Proverbs27:17 Litei karnet karnet; Litei ko u noto chi togetab choruennyi. 
Proverbs27:18 Age tugul ne ribei mogoiywet koamei logoekyik; Ak kitorori inendet ne ribei kiptaiyandennyi. 
Proverbs27:19 Ko u ye keerei chi togennyi eng’ beek, Ko u noto keerei muguleldab chito, ne bo chito age." 
Proverbs27:20 Magoi biyo Oldab che Kigobek ak Ng’emisiet; Magoi biyo konyekab chi. 
Proverbs27:21 Kitilili feda eng’ teret, kitilile tahabu mat ne o, Ak kitieme chi kalosunennyi." 
Proverbs27:22 Agot ngitui chito ne berber eng’ kenut koboto bek che kagitartaran, Ko maistoige berberindanyi kora." 
Proverbs27:23 Igiilge si inai ole teptoi akwotisiekab kechireguk, Rib komie akwotisiekab tuguk:" 
Proverbs27:24 Amu ma bo koigeny magornatosiek: Ak tos tebyei narietab bounatet eng’ ibinwek tugul? 
Proverbs27:25 Kiibei suswek che kigoyaamnyo, ak bitos suswek che ng’orng’or, Ak kiyumi sogek che bo tulonok." 
Proverbs27:26 Bo ngoroiguk arekab kechir, Ak bo alyetab mbar ng’ororek:" 
Proverbs27:27 Ak mitei chegab ng’ororek che yamei koek amitwogiguk, ak che bo bikab gong’ung’; Ak amitwogik che yamei tibiguk." 
Proverbs28:1 Mweei kiptengekyot ye maonei chi: Ago nyigonen che bo iman ko u ng’etundo. 
Proverbs28:2 Chang’aitu bounikab emet amu bistoennyi: Ago tebyei keny emonoto amu bik che tinyei kaguiye ak naet. 
Proverbs28:3 U usonet ropta ne ng’emei amitwogik Chito ne matinyei kiy, ne usei kibananok." 
Proverbs28:4 Ilosu bik che yaach icheget che metoi ng’atutik: Ago borie bichoto yaachen icheget che ribei ng’atutik. 
Proverbs28:5 Maiguitos bik che yaach kiruoget: Ago iguitos tuguk tugul icheget che cheng’ei Jehovah. 
Proverbs28:6 Kaigai kibananiat ne wendote imandanyi, Kosiir inendet ne imaasat eng’ ortinwekyik, agot ngo magorio." 
Proverbs28:7 Werit ne ng’om age tugul ne ribei ng’atutik: Ago iteweri kwandanyi inendet ne choruetab kipkeinik. 
Proverbs28:8 Inendet ne tesei tugukyik eng’ keljinet ne siirei ne nyolu, eng’ tuguk che tesoksei, Koyumjin choto inendet ne rire kibananok." 
Proverbs28:9 Kiwechei saetab inendet Ne esioi kogas ng’atutik. 
Proverbs28:10 Ibutyin keringennyi Age tugul ne imaasi che bo iman kobun oret ne ya: Ago borei eng’ tuguk che miach, bik che igesunotingei." 
Proverbs28:11 Mene magoriot ng’omnatennyi; Ago isiachi inendet kibananiat ne tinyei kaguiyet. 
Proverbs28:12 Biitu torornatet ne o ye iterterisiei che bo iman: Ago ye ng’eetyo kiptengeginik, kounygei bik." 
Proverbs28:13 Manyoru berurto inendet ne unyei bistaosiekyik: Ago nyoru rirenet age tugul ne ng’anyei ak kometo. 
Proverbs28:14 Baibai chito ne iyweisiei kotugul; Ago ibutyin yaitiet inendet ne iuuiiti muguleldanyi. 
Proverbs28:15 U ng’etundo ne boriseni ak tiondo ne u keerit ne ombenoti, Bounindet ne ya ne bou kibananok." 
Proverbs28:16 Usindet ne o agine bounindet ne matinyei kaguiyet: Ago inendet ne wechei kasetab miat kotesei betusiekyik. 
Proverbs28:17 Mwechin keringet chito ne mi baragunnyi korotikab chi age; Amat korany chi inendet. 
Proverbs28:18 Kisoru age tugul ne wendote imanda: Ago ibuti ngunoto inendet ne imaasat eng’ ortinwekyik. 
Proverbs28:19 Nyoru amitwogik che chang’ chito ne ibati korennyi: Ago nyoru bananda ne o inendet ne isubi tangoita. 
Proverbs28:20 Nyoru berurwogik che chang’ chito ne bo iman: Ago magimetoi ama kibir inendet ne labatyin koek magorio. 
Proverbs28:21 Ma mie ketiytii bik: Anan kobistoe chi kole si konyor kererutiet. 
Proverbs28:22 Labatyin magornatosiek inendet ne tinyei kong’ ne ya, Ama naei kole nyonjin bananda." 
Proverbs28:23 Tun nyoru chamet inendet ne kere kong’ chi Kosiir inendet ne chemwai kut. 
Proverbs28:24 Inendet ne chorei tugukab kwandanyi anan kamet, ak komwa kole, Ma bistoet nito; Ko choruetab ng’emindet inendet." 
Proverbs28:25 Ing’eeti boriet inendet ne tinyei kasetab miat: Ago nerei inendet ne imang’u Jehovah. 
Proverbs28:26 Berber inendet ne imang’ugei: Ago kisoru age tugul ne wendote ng’omnatet. 
Proverbs28:27 Mararjin kiy inendet ne igochin tuguk kibananiat: Ago nyoru chubisiosiek che chang’ inendet ne unyei konyekyik. 
Proverbs28:28 Unyegei bik, ye kang’eetyo bik che yaach: Ago tesoksei che bo iman, ye kalusyo ichek." 
Proverbs29:1 Inendet ne iuuiiti kaatinnyi, ko kageger kong’ konyil che chang’, Ko ng’emaksei eng’ chokyinet, ama mi kiy ne kinyae." 
Proverbs29:2 Boiboitu bik ngo tesak che bo iman: Ago tigendos bik ngo bounis chito ne ya. 
Proverbs29:3 Iboiboi kwanda age tugul ne chamei ng’omnatet: Ago iseerseeri tuguk inendet ne namegei ak chepkugonik. 
Proverbs29:4 Igimiti emet laitoriat eng’ kiruoknatet: Ago igabui emet inendet ne taachei tuguk che kigoigoisie. 
Proverbs29:5 Iitochin kakwautikyik mestet ne regereiywot Chito ne ilosu buch chitab kokwennyi. 
Proverbs29:6 Mitei mestet bistoetab chito ne ya; Ago tieni ak kobaibai chito ne bo iman. 
Proverbs29:7 Ibwati chito ne bo iman ng’alekab kibananok: Matinyei kaguiyet kiptengekyot konai noto. 
Proverbs29:8 Beelei nganaset chotik: Ago kirindoi bik che ng’omen neregek. 
Proverbs29:9 Ngot kotinyei kabeletab ge chito ne ng’om ak chito ne berber, Ngot konerechi anan ngo roriei, komami kamuung’et." 
Proverbs29:10 Wechei bik che tumdoi korotik, chito ne igesunotgei: Ak cheng’ei kobar chito ne bo iman." 
Proverbs29:11 Ibortoi chito ne berber neregekyik tugul: Ago bou ak kosisei eng’ choto, chito ne ng’om." 
Proverbs29:12 Ngot koepchi it bounindet lembeita, Koyaagitu otwogikyik tugul." 
Proverbs29:13 Tuitos kibagenge kibananiat ak usindet: Ikweng’jin Jehovah konyekab ichek tuwai. 
Proverbs29:14 Kigimiti agoi koigeny laitornatetab laitoriat Ne iruokyin kibananok eng’ imanda. 
Proverbs29:15 Ibu kirokto ak keretab kong’ ng’omnatet: Ago iteweri kamet lakwet ne kigochin koboigei. 
Proverbs29:16 Ye tesak kiptengeginik, ko tesaksei bistoet: Ago keerei che bo iman kabutenywa." 
Proverbs29:17 Itigon wering’ung’, si kogonin kamuung’et; Ee, si kobaibai sobondang’ung’." 
Proverbs29:18 Betyoti bik eng’ ole mami ng’ang’utiet: Ago baibai inendet ne ribei ng’atutiet. 
Proverbs29:19 Magitigone ng’alek otwogindet: Amu nganda iguitos, ko magase it." 
Proverbs29:20 Tos igeere chi ne sartae ng’alekyik? Mitei kamang’unet eng’ chito ne berber kosiir inendet. 
Proverbs29:21 Inendet ne ribei komie otwogindennyi koboch ko ta ko lakwa Kotun koegu werit eng’ let. 
Proverbs29:22 Ing’eeti boriet kimnerekyiat, Ak ko nyiiei bistoet chito ne korom." 
Proverbs29:23 Iming’ini chi menotennyi: Ago nyoru teegisto inendet ne iming’inegei. 
Proverbs29:24 Wechei sobondanyi inendet ne tinyei yamdaet ak chorindet: Kasei chubisiet ama twegu. 
Proverbs29:25 Ibu mestet kaiyweisiet ne kiywei chi: Ago nyoru chametab ge age tugul ne imang’u Jehovah. 
Proverbs29:26 Cheng’ei che chang’ mieindo eng’ bounindet: Ago bunu gab Jehovah kiruogetab chi. 
Proverbs29:27 Wechei che bo iman ne ma bo iman: Wechei ne ya ne isubi iman. 
Proverbs30:1 Ng’alekab Agur weritab Jake; maoinatet. Kilenji chito Itiel, ee Itiel ak Ukal:" 
Proverbs30:2 A u tiony iman asiir chi tugul, Amatinyei kaguiyet ne bo chi:" 
Proverbs30:3 Ak tom anetge ng’omnatet, Amanai Inendet ne Tilil." 
Proverbs30:4 Ng’o ne kitogosta kipsengwet, ak kochorgei? Ng’o ne kigoyum usonet eng’ eunekyik? Ng’o ne kigoratyi beek ngoriennyi? Ng’o ne kiigimit tabanwek tugul che bo ng’ony? Kiguure nee, kiguure nee werinnyi, ngot ingen?" 
Proverbs30:5 Tilil ng’olyotab age tugul ne bo Kamuktaindet: Inendet ko long’etab ichek che imang’u inendet. 
Proverbs30:6 Ametesyi ng’olyo ng’alekyik, Si magerin kong’, ak iegu kiplembechwa." 
Proverbs30:7 Kasomin tuguk aeng’; Amat ietena kotom amee: 
Proverbs30:8 Iste kolooegitu eng’ ane, tangoita ak lembechek: Amegona bananda anan magornatosiek; Baena amitwogik che yama:" 
Proverbs30:9 Si mabiye ak aesien, ak ale, Ng’o Jehovah? Anan si maegu kibanania, ak achorse, Si mamwa kainetab Kamuktaindennyu eng’ tangoi." 
Proverbs30:10 Ametaam otwogindet eng’ taitab kiptaiyandennyi, Si machubin, ak konamin ng’ogisto." 
Proverbs30:11 Mi ibinda ne chubei kwanisiekwak, Amaiberuri kametisiekwak." 
Proverbs30:12 Mitei ibinda ne iitigei kole tilil, Ago tom kiun eng’ simdanywa." 
Proverbs30:13 Mitei ibinda, Ee, mi katororetab ge ne tia eng’ konyekwak! Sutotin irirenikab konyekwak." 
Proverbs30:14 Mitei ibinda che u kelekwak rotokab chok, ak ko u kelekwak che bo kipkermet, rotok, Si koame kibananok kogesgei eng’ ng’ony, ak koges che matinyei kiy, eng’ bik." 
Proverbs30:15 Tinyei binyinyet arek aeng’, che len, Konech, konech. Mi tuguk somogu che magoi biyo, Ee, mitei tuguk ang’wanu che mamwaei kole, Kayamech:" 
Proverbs30:16 Choto ko kererit, ak ne son; Emet ne mabiyonyi beek; Ak mat ne mamwaei kole, Kagoyama." 
Proverbs30:17 Kondab chito ne chotei kwandanyi, Ama chamei kogas it kamet, Kobalu chepkuginik che bo atebwet, kong’ato, Ak koam arekab kipsichinik." 
Proverbs30:18 Mitei tuguk somogu che bo kwong’et ne o eng’ ane, Ee, mi ang’wanu che mangen:" 
Proverbs30:19 Ole tirirendoi kipsichit eng’ soet: Ole wetitoi erenet eng’ ruandet; Ole wetitoi melit eng’ nyanjet; Ak ole teptoi mureno ak chepto. 
Proverbs30:20 U ni atebetab kwondo ne tinyei ibetab ge; Amisiei ak kouus kutit, Ak komwa kole, Ma ayai kiy ne ya." 
Proverbs30:21 Botani ng’ony agobo tuguk somok, Ee, tuguk ang’wan che maimuchi komuitochi:" 
Proverbs30:22 Choto ko chu: otwogindet ne kaek laitoriat; Ak chito ne abusat ye kagobiyo; 
Proverbs30:23 Ak kwondo ne kiwechei ye kagitun; Ak chepto ne otwogindet ne tun bunjin tugukab kwondo ne bou inendet. 
Proverbs30:24 Mitei tuguk ang’wanu ng’ony che mengechen, Ago ng’omen mising’:" 
Proverbs30:25 Tiong’ik che ma kimen birechik, Ago iyumjingei amitwogikwak eng’ kemei;" 
Proverbs30:26 Tiong’ik che nyerotin kenerok, Ago teechei gorikwak eng’ ruandosiek;" 
Proverbs30:27 Matinyei laitoriat chereng’enyinik, Ago iboktoi tugul eng’ kweanaik;" 
Proverbs30:28 Namisie cheringisiet eunekyik, Ago mi gorikab laitorinik." 
Proverbs30:29 Mitei tuguk somogu che bendoti komie eng’ bandanywa, Ee, ang’wan che bendoti komie:" 
Proverbs30:30 Choto ko chu: ng’etundo, ne kim kosiir tiong’ik tugul; Ama mwee tiony age tugul;" 
Proverbs30:31 Seset ne chepcheb; ak kwesta agine; Ak laitoriat ne magirindoi chi. 
Proverbs30:32 Ngot ko kaitororge eng’ berberindo, Anan ngot ko kaibwat yaitio, Iger kuting’ung’." 
Proverbs30:33 Amu nyonei mwaita ye kisach chego, Bwanei korotik ngiiny serut: Ko u noto ibu neregek che kaging’eet boriet." 
Proverbs31:1 Ng’alekab laitoriat Lemuel; maoinatet ne kiinet kamet. 
Proverbs31:2 Nee, werinnyu? Ee, nee weritab moennyu? Ee, nee weritab kayosioutikyuk?" 
Proverbs31:3 Amegochi karusiek kimnateng’ung’, Amegochi ortinweguk ichek che ng’emei laitorinik." 
Proverbs31:4 Manyoljin laitorinik, ee Lemuel, manyoljin divaik; Manyoljin bounik kole, Mi ano maiyek?" 
Proverbs31:5 Si ye kagoee, koutie ng’atutik, Ak komaas kiruogetab age tugul ne kinyalili." 
Proverbs31:6 Inage maiyek inendet ne machei kolus, Ak inage divaik bik che tinyei ng’wanindo eng’ sobonwekwak:" 
Proverbs31:7 Ingoee ak koutie banandanyi, Si mata kobwat nyalildanyi." 
Proverbs31:8 Ng’alal agobo ne namat kut, Agobo tugul che kagilakta kotebi ichegei." 
Proverbs31:9 Ng’alal, iruoch eng’ imanda, Ak iruoch agobo kibananok ak che matinyei kiy." 
Proverbs31:10 Ng’o ne imuchi konyor kwondo ne nyolunot? Amu siirei mising’ kamanutiennyi, ne bo koik che kiguure peninim." 
Proverbs31:11 Imang’u manong’otiondennyi inendet, Mararjin kiy ne nyoru." 
Proverbs31:12 Yachin ne mie osotiondennyi inendet, mayachin ne ya Eng’ betusiek tugul che bo osotiondonoto." 
Proverbs31:13 Cheng’ei osotiondonoto kororikab kechirek ak katanit, Boisiei eng’ chamnyet." 
Proverbs31:14 U inendet melisiekab che iboti tuguk che kialdoi; Amu ibu amitwogikyik eng’ ole loo. 
Proverbs31:15 Ng’eetei kogeny kota ko kemoi, Ak kobai bikab gonnyi. Ak kogoch tibikyik boisienywa." 
Proverbs31:16 Ibwati agobo mbaret, ak koal: Minei mbaretab sabibuk eng’ keljinet ne konyor." 
Proverbs31:17 Kermenegei kimnatet, Ak kogimit eunekyik." 
Proverbs31:18 Keerei kole tinyei keljinet mung’arennyi: Mameei tainnyi kemoi. 
Proverbs31:19 Namei ketit ne kitae kororik, Ak konamei ketit ne kinabisie." 
Proverbs31:20 Aiyeb inendet eng’ kibananiat; Ee, toreti ne matinyei kiy." 
Proverbs31:21 Maiywei kole tos nyor bikyik kaititietab teluchi; Amu ilaachi bik tugul che bo gonnyi ngoroik che biriren. 
Proverbs31:22 Napchingei kitambaok che bo lelesta; Bo ngoroikyik katanit ne kararan ak ko bo tuguk che arusen ne birir. 
Proverbs31:23 Naat manong’otiondennyi eng’ ormarichok, Ye tebyei inendet ak boisiekab emet." 
Proverbs31:24 Nabei osotiondonoto ngoroikab katanit si koalda; Igochin chemung’arainik birenoik. 
Proverbs31:25 Kimnatet ak teegisto ko ngoroikyik; Rorechin betusiek che bwanei. 
Proverbs31:26 Twegu eng’ ng’omnatet; Mi kutinnyi konetisietab talasiet. 
Proverbs31:27 Ribei komie atebosiekab bikab gonnyi, Ama amei che bo chorirnatet." 
Proverbs31:28 Ng’eetos lagokyik, ak koguure inendet ne iberurot; Ilosu kogeny manong’otiondennyi inendet kole," 
Proverbs31:29 Kigoyai ne nyolunot tibik che chang’, Ago i nyolunot kosiir choto tugul." 
Proverbs31:30 Iberberisiei mieindo, ak ko buch kororonindo: Ago kilosu kwondo ne iywei Jehovah." 
Proverbs31:31 Ogochi logoekab eunekyik; Ak ingolos boisionikyik inendet eng’ ormarichok. 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Ng’alekab Amdoindet, weritab Daudi, ne ki laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Mwaei Amdoindet kole, Buch, matilei kiy, buch, matilei kiy; buch tugul." 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Nee keljinet ne nyoru chito eng’ boisionikyik tugul che yaei eng’ kureretab asista? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Siirtoi ibinda age, ak konyonei age; ak tebyei ng’ony koigeny." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Choru kogeny asista, ak kororoktoi, ak choktoi kowendi ole chorune." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Usyin usonet murot ne bo tai, ak koweek kwo murot ne bo katam; weechegei kotugul eng’ ole bunoti, ak koweeksei kogeny eng’ ole boch yiemutikyik." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Rootyin ainosiek tugul nyanjet, ago manyiiei nyanjet; ole rootyin ainosiek, ko oloto ole weekyingei kogeny." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Ng’etos tuguk tugul; maimuchi chi komwa: mabiyonyi konda che keerei, anan konyi itit che kasei." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Noto ne kigobiit, ko noto ne ta kobiitu; ak noto ne kigeyai ko noto ne ta keyaei: ama mi kiy ne taunen eng’ kereretab asista." 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Tos mi kiy ne mwaei bik kole, Keer, tos ma taunen ni? Kimi noto koboch keny, kotom kebiitu." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Mami kabwato agobo ibinwek che bo tai; ama kibwati ibinwek che bo let che ta kobwanei, eng’ choto che ta kobiitu." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Kia laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem ane Amdoindet. 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Ak kiagiil muguleldanyu kocheng’ ak kosiach eng’ ng’omnatet agobo tuguk tugul che kiyaei eng’ kureretab kipsengwet: kiigochi Kamuktaindet werikab bik boisiet ne bo nyalilda kotigone. 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Kiageer boisionik tugul che kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista; ak ogeero, buch tugul, kaiimetab ge ne bo buch." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Magimuchi kilitit kit ne kunur: ama kimuchi kiit ne mami. 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Kiamwachi muguleldanyu alenji, Keero, koanyoru ng’omnatet ne o kosiir tugul che kiindounena eng’ Jerusalem: ee, kigogeer mising’ muguleldanyu ng’omnatet ak naet." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Ak kiagiil muguleldanyu konai ng’omnatet, ak konai iywek ak berberindo: kiageer kogeny ale kaiimetab ge buch nito." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Amu mi arogenet ne o ng’omnatet ne o: ak tesei arogenet inendet ne tesei ng’omnatet. 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Kiamwa eng’ muguleldanyu ale, Ara anyun, atiemin eng’ boiboiyet; baibaitu anyun eng’ kiy ne mie: ak keero, buch nito agine." 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Kiamwa agobo roriot ale, Iywek: ak agobo boiboiyet, ale, Yaei nee?" 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Kiasiach eng’ muguleldanyu ole aboiboititoi bortanyu eng’ divaik, kondoiywa muguleldanyu eng’ ng’omnatet, ak ole anamdoi berberindo, kot amuch ageer kit ne nyoljin werikab bik koyai eng’ kureretab kipsengwet eng’ betusiekwak tugul." 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Kiayachige boisiosiek che eechen; kiateekyige gorik; kiaminjige sabibuk; 
Ecclesiastes2:5 kiabatyige mbarenik ak achob ole kiuure, ak kiaminji yoto ketik che bo logoek alak tugul." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Kiayachige tamboinik, si kobiit abise osnet ne kigiminji ketik." 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Kiaal otwogik che murenik ak che tibik, ak kiatinye otwogik che kigisikyi gonnyu; kiatinye kogeny akwotisiek che chang’ che bo tuga ak che bo kechirek, kosiir tugul che kiindounena eng’ Jerusalem." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Kiayumjige kogeny feda ak tahabu, ak konoraik che kororon che bo laitorinik ak che bo emotinwek: kialewenjige tienik che murenik ak che kwonyik, ak boiboiyosiekab werikab bik, chebaigeinik che chang’." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Kia o anyun, ak kiatesage asiir tugul che kiindounena eng’ Jerusalem: ak kiatepte ng’omnatennyu." 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ak kima aete konyekyuk kiy age tugul ne kimach: ma aete muguleldanyu boiboiyet age tugul, amu kibaibait muguleldanyu eng’ boisiennyu tugul; ak ki nito kebebertanyu eng’ boisiennyu tugul." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Kiageer anyun boisionik tugul che kiayai, ak boisiet ne kiga abirtochige ayai: ak ogeero, buch tugul ak kaiimetab ge ne bo buch, ak kima komi keluno eng’ kureretab asista." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Kiawelelge anyun acheng’ ng’omnatet, ak iywek ak berberindo: nee ne imuchi koyai chito ne isubu laitoriat? Kobate noto ne kigeyai." 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Kiageer anyun ale siirei ng’omnatet berberindo, ko u ye siirei lapkeiyet mesundeito." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Tinyei konyek che keertoe ne ng’om, ak wendoti ne berber eng’ mesundeito: agot eng’ choto ko kiageer ale ityin kit agenge ichek tugul." 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Kiale anyun eng’ muguleldanyu, Ko u ye ityin kioto ne berber, koityina agane; ak amu nee anyun si ang’omit kosiir? Kiamwa anyun eng’ muguleldanyu ale buch nito agine." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Amu magibwati ne ng’om agoi, ko u ye magibwati ne berber; amu tun kiutie tugul eng’ betusiek che bwanei. Meei ne ng’om agine ko u ne berber!" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Kiawech anyun sobet amu kigona ng’wanindo boisiet ne kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista: amu buch tugul ak kaiimetab ge ne bo buch. 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Ak kiawech boisiennyu tugul ne kiabirtochige eng’ kureretab asista: amu eng’ ne matiny, ametochini chito ne isubwa." 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Ak ng’o ne ingen ngo tun egu chito ne ng’om anan ko ne berber? Nganda u noto, ko tun bou boisiennyu tugul ne koabirtochige, ak ne abartae ng’omnatet eng’ kureretab asista. Buch nito agine." 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kiawelelge anyun ak agochi muguleldanyu koarogen amu boisiet tugul ne kiabirtochige eng’ kureretab asista. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Amu mi chito ne yaei boisiennyi eng’ ng’omnatet, koboto naet, ak utatiet; ago bagakyin koek kebebertab chito ne ma birtochigei boisiet. Buch nito agine ak ko yaitiet ne o." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Nee ne nyoru chito eng’ birtoennyi bo ge tugul, ak kaiimetab ge ne bo muguleldanyi, ne birtochingei eng’ kureretab asista?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Amu bo arogenet betusiekyik tugul, ak ko bo ng’wanindo boisiennyi; ee, maimuunyi muguleldanyi kemoi. Buch nito agine." 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Mami kit ne kaigai eng’ chito kosiir koamis ak koeeiso, ak kobaibae sobondanyi tuguk che miach eng’ birtoennyi bo ge. Kiageer kogeny ale bunu nito eutab Kamuktaindet." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Amu ng’o ne imuchi koamis, ng’o ne imuchi konyor boiboiyet, kosiira?" 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Amu igochin Kamuktaindet ng’omnatet, ak naet, ak boiboiyet chito ne iboiboi inendet: ago igochin kiptengekyot boisietab nyalilda, si kobiit koyum ak kotes, ak kogochi inendet ne iboiboi Kamuktaindet. Buch nito agine ak ko kaiimetab ge ne bo buch." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Mi boroindab kiy age tugul, ak mi betutab ng’olyot age tugul eng’ keruretab kipsengwet." 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Betut ne kisige chi, ak betut ne meei chi: betut ne kiminse, ak betut ne kitutu choto kiga kimin;" 
Ecclesiastes3:3 betut ne kibarisie, ak betut ne kinyaise; betut ne kibutisie, ak betut ne kiteekse;" 
Ecclesiastes3:4 betut ne kirirtos, ak betut ne kiroritos; betut ne kiteitos, ak betut ne kiurereni;" 
Ecclesiastes3:5 betut ne kiwirtoi koik, ak betut ne kiyumi koik; betut ne kitorochegei, ak betut ne magitorochegei;" 
Ecclesiastes3:6 betut ne kicheng’se, ak betut ne kibeeti; betut ne kigonori, ak betut ne kimetoi;" 
Ecclesiastes3:7 betut ne kigereri, ak betut ne kinabisie; betut ne kisistos, ak betut ne king’alaldos;" 
Ecclesiastes3:8 betut ne kichamisie, ak betut ne kiwegisie; betut ne bo luget, ak betut ne bo kalyet." 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Nee keljinet ne nyoru inendet ne boisiei eng’ noto birtochingei? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Kiageer boisiet ne kigogochi Kamuktaindet werikab bik kotigone. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Kigoyai kiy age tugul kogararanit eng’ betunnyi: ak kiinde mugulelwekwak kabwatetab koigeny, ago nganda u noto, ko maimuch konai chito boisiet ne kigoyai Kamuktaindet koboch taunet agoi kagesunet." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Angen ale mami kit ne mie eng’ ichek kosiir koboiboitu, ak koyai ne mie kote kosoptos." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Ak kogeny konunetab Kamuktaindet konyoljin chi age tugul koamis ak koeeiso, ak kobaibait eng’ tuguk che miach eng’ birtoennyi bo ge tugul." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Angen ale, bunjin koigeny kiy age tugul ne yaei Kamuktaindet: magimuchi ketesyi kiy anan keistoe kiy: ak kigoyai Kamuktaindet, si koiywei bik inendet." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 No mitei, ko kigobiit; ak no ta kobiitu, ko kigobiit: ak kocheng’ei kogeny Kamuktaindet no kigosiirto." 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Kiageer anyun kogeny eng’ kureretab asista ale mi yaitiet oldab kiruoget; ak komi yaitiet oldab imanda. 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Kiamwa eng’ muguleldanyu ale, Tun iruokyin Kamuktaindet bik che bo iman ak che yaach: amu mi betut ne bo ng’olyot age tugul, ak ne bo boisiet age tugul." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Kiamwa eng’ muguleldanyu ale, Bo werikab bik ng’olyondoni, si kobiit kotiem Kamuktaindet ichek, ak kogeergei icheget kole u tiong’ik." 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Amu kit ne nyoru werikab bik konyoru tiong’ik; nyoru kit agenge tugul: ko u ye meei age, ko u noto, meei age agine; ee, tinyei tugul kabuset agenge; ama tinyei chito etunatet kosiir tiong’ik; amu buch tugul." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Bendi tugul komosta agenge: bo tugul ng’ung’unyek, ak ketyingei tugul ng’ung’unyek." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Ng’o ne ingen tamirmirietab chito ngo wendi barak, ak ngo wendi ng’ony ne bo tiondo?" 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Kiageer anyun ale, mami kiy ne mie, kosiir kobaibait chito eng’ boisionikyik: amu noto kebebertanyi: amu ng’o ne weechi kogeny inendet kogeer tuguk che biitu let?" 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Kiaweege anyun ak ageer usisiosiek tugul che kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista: ak ogeero, rirekab che kigius, ama tinyei kagaigaindet; ak kitinyei kimnatet usikwak, ago kima kotinyei kagaigaindet." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Kialosu anyun che kigobek kosiir che ta kosoptos; 
Ecclesiastes4:3 ee, kiaiit ale, kaigai inendet ne tom kobiit, ne tom kogeer boisiet ne ya ne kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista, kosiir chugai tuwai." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Yeityo ageer boisiet tugul, ak boisiet age tugul ne bo utatiet, ale amei kimege chi agobo chitab kokwennyi. Buch nito agine ak kaiimetab ge ne bo buch." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Namjin ne berber eunekyik teget, ak koamei bortanyi." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Kaigai kererutiet koboto sisek, kosiir kererutik aeng’ ak birtoetab ge, ak kaiimetab ge ne bo buch." 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Kiaweege anyun ak ageer tangoita eng’ kureretab asista. 
Ecclesiastes4:8 Mi age ne mi inegei, ama tinyei ne rubei; ee, matinyei werit anan ng’etab kamet; nganda u noto, ko mami kagesunet ne bo birtoennyi bo ge tugul, ama biyonyi konyekyik magornatosiek. Len, Aboisiechini ng’o, ak arebe sobondanyu kit ne mie? Buch nito agine, ee, boisiet ne bo nyalilda." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Kaigai aeng’u kosiir agenge, amu nyoru melekto ne mie eng’ boisienywa." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Amu ngobutyo, kong’eeti age choruennyi: ago bwa eng’ inendet ne ibuti ko mi inegei, ama mi age ne ing’eeti inendet." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Kogeny, ngo ruiyo aeng’u kolalang’itu: ago nyorundoi ano lalang’indo chito agenge?" 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ak ngoterter chito inendet ne mi inegei, komuchi aeng’u kogirinda inendet; ak ma sib kong’etei borowet ne ki soniot somok." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Kaigai nerana ne kibanania, ne ng’om, kosiir laitoriat ne os ne berber, ne manaei ko ta kotaach kateunet." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Amu kimong’une korgoret konyo koek laitoriat; ee, kigisichei ko kibananiat agot eng’ bounatennyi." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Kiageer tugul che soptos che bendoti eng’ kureretab asista, komi koboto neranet ne bo aeng’, ne kitonon kogeer inendet." 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Kima komi kagesunetab bik tugul, agot ne bo ichek tugul che kibou: ago maboiboitune inendet ichek che biitu let. Buch nito agine iman ak kaiimetab ge ne bo buch." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Rib keldang’ung’ ye iwendi gotab Kamuktaindet; amu kaigai kerikyi si kegas, kosiir kigoite korosek che bo bik che berber; amu manaei ichek kole yaei yaitiet." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Amat kosartae kuting’ung’, ak amat kosartae muguleldang’ung’ komwa kiy age tugul eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet; amu mi Kamuktaindet kipsengwet, ak imi ng’ony: ingong’ering’itu anyun ng’aleguk." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Amu nyonei karuotitoet eng’ boisionik che chang’; ak mwaei ne berber ng’alek che chang’. 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Ye iarorji Kamuktaindet kaarorunet, ko mat igaege; amu mabaibaitune inendet che berberen: igoite anyun ne iarortoi." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Kaigai amearorte, kosiir iarorte amegoite." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Amengogochi kuting’ung’ bortang’ung’ koyai tengek; anan imwa eng’ taitab malaikaiyat ile, Ki lelutiet: amu nee anyun si konerekyi Kamuktaindet kuting’ung’, ak kong’em boisionikab euneguk?" 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Amu mi ng’alek che chang’ eng’ chang’indab karuotitaosiek ak tuguk che bo buch; ago iywei inye Kamuktaindet. 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ngot igeer kesastae kibananiat, ak keistoi kiruoget ak imanda eng’ koromnatet eng’ emet, ko mekwong’e noto: amu keerei noto inendet ne toror kosiir icheget che tororen; ak mi che tororen kosiir ichek." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Bo tugul keljinetab ng’ony: boisiechin agine laitoriat tugukab mbar. 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Mabiyonyi feda ne chamei feda; ama biyonyi tuguk che tesoksei, inendet ne chamei chang’indab tuguk: buch nito agine." 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Ye tesak tuguk, ko tesak agichek che amei: ak tinyei keljinet nee anyun chitab kobo, kobate kogeer kityo?" 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Anyiny ruondab chito ne boisiei, ngo am che ng’ering’ anan che chang’: ago mainuuktos magorek amu biyendanywa." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Mi yaitiet ne ng’wan ne kiageer eng’ kureretab asista, noto ko magornatosiek che ribei chitab kobo si kong’emegei:" 
Ecclesiastes5:14 ak betos magornatosiechoto eng’ boisiet ne ya; ak ngot ko kigosich werit, ko mami kiy eunnyi." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Ko u ye kigisichei, kowendi buch kogeny ko u ye kinyonei, ama ibei kiy ne bo boisiennyi ne imuchi kotita eng’ eunnyi." 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Nito agine ko yaitiet ne ng’wan, amu ko u ye kinyonei, ko tun wendi ko u noto: ak nee keljinet ne nyoru inendet ne birtogei buch?" 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Amisiei kogeny eng’ betusiekyik tugul eng’ mesundeito, ak tinyei arogenet ne ng’wan, ak miando ak neregek." 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Ogeero, kit ne mie ne kiageer, ak ko nyolu, ko koamis chi ak koee, ak kobaibaitune tuguk che miach eng’ boisiennyi tugul, ne yaei eng’ kureretab asista, eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi che kiigochi Kamuktaindet inendet: amu kebebertanyi nito." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Ak chi age tugul agine ne kiigochi Kamuktaindet magornatosiek ak chang’indab tuguk, ak kogochi kimnatet ne ame tukchoto, ak koib kebebertanyi, ak kobaibaitune boisiennyi; nito ko konunetab Kamuktaindet." 
Ecclesiastes5:20 Amu ma kobwati mising’ betusiekab sobennyi; amu woljin Kamuktaindet inendet eng’ boiboindab muguleldanyi. 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Mi yaitiet ne kiageer eng’ kureretab asista, ak nyigis noto eng’ bik:" 
Ecclesiastes6:2 chito ne igochin Kamuktaindet magornatosiek, chang’indab tuguk, ak teegisto, kot ko mararjin kiy sobondanyi eng’ tuguk tugul che machei, ago maigochin Kamuktaindet kimnatet ne ame tukchoto, ago amei toondet; buch nito, ak ko miando ne ya." 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Ngot kosich chito lagok bogol, ak kosob kenyisiek che chang’, si kochang’a betusiekab kenyisiekyik, ago mabiyonyi sobondanyi kit ne mie, ama tinyei ole kitupchin; amwae ale kaigai ne kigioos, kosiir inendet:" 
Ecclesiastes6:4 amu nyonei buch, ak wendi eng’ mesundeito, ak kituchei kainennyi eng’ mesundeito;" 
Ecclesiastes6:5 ama keer asista anan konai; tinyei nito kamuung’et kosiir ni kai. 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Agot ngo sob kenyisiek elfut konyil aeng’, ama baibaitune kiy ne mie, tos mabendi tugul oldo agenge?" 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Bo boisiet tugul ne bo chito kutinnyi, ago mabiyonyi." 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Amu tinyei keljinet nee chito ne ng’om kosiir ne berber? Anan tinyei nee chito ne banan, ne ingen kowendot eng’ taitab che soptos?" 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kaigai keeretab konda kosiir maget ne omenoti: buch nito agine ak ko kaiimetab ge ne bo buch. 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Kiy age tugul ne mi, ko kiga ketochi kainennyi keny, ak ko naat kele chito: amaimuchi kotiiyo kiy ak inendet ne kim kosiir inendet." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Amu mi tuguk che chang’ che tesei tangoita, ko kaigai chito eng’ nee?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Ng’o anyun ne ingen kit ne mie agobo chito eng’ sobennyi, eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi ne bo buch che boisie ko u uruet? Ng’o anyun ne imuchi komwachi chito tuguk che biitu let eng’ inendet eng’ kureretab asista?" 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Kaigai kainet ne mie kosiir mwanik che bo kamanutiet ne o; ak kaigai betutab meet kosiir betut ne kisichei chi. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Kaigai kebe got ne kiteiye, kosiir kebe got ne mi igorta: amu noto kagesunetab bik tugul; ak konori noto eng’ muguleldanyi chito ne sobei." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kaigai arogenet kosiir roriot: amu kiboiboi muguleldo eng’ arogenetab toget. 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mi mugulelwekab che ng’omen got ne kiteiye; ago mi mugulelwekab che berber got ne bo boiboiyet. 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Kaigai kegas keretab kong’ ne bo chito ne ng’om, kosiir kogas chito tiendab bik che berber." 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Amu u kateretab katok che mi mat ne mi teret ne kotkotat, roriotab chito ne berber: buch nito agine." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Igochin iman sastaet chito ne ng’om koberberit; ak ng’emei kit ne kigoigoisie, naet." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Kaigai kagesunetab kiy kosiir taunennyi: kaigai ne muitoi eng’ tamirmiriet kosiir ne menei. 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Amesartae nerek eng’ sobondang’ung’: amu tebe neregek tegetikab che berber. 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Amemwa ile, Kilyon si kogororonitu betusiek che bo tai kosiir betusiechu? Amu ma iteeb agobo nito eng’ ng’omnatet." 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Mie ng’omnatet ko u ye mie borotet: ee, mie mising’ eng’ ichek che keerei asista." 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Amu irimet ng’omnatet ko u fedaisiek: ago telunatetab naet ko ni, ribei ng’omnatet sobondab chito ne tinyei." 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Ibwat boisietab Kamuktaindet: amu ng’o ne imuchi kolitit kit ne kiyai inendet kogunurit? 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Baibaitu eng’ betutab berurto, ak eng’ betutab nyalilda ibwat komie: kiyai Kamuktaindet choto kogergeit tuwai, si manai chito kit age tugul ne biitu let." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Kiageer choto tugul eng’ betusiekyuk che bo buch: mi chito ne bo iman ne meitoi imandanyi, ak mi chito ne ya ne sobei keny ak koyaei yaitiennyi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Ametepte imanda ne siirtoot; ameng’omitu mising’; amu nee si ing’emge? 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Ameegu ne ya mising’, anan iegu ne berber: amu nee si imee kotom koit betung’ung’?" 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Mie inam komie nito; ee, ameistoe eung’ung’ ng’olyondoni agine; amu inendet ne iywei Kamuktaindet komong’une choto tugul." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ng’omnatet ko kimnatetab chito ne ng’om ne siirei bounik taman che mi nganaset. 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Iman, mami chi ne bo iman eng’ ng’ony, ne yaei ne mie ama yaei tengekto." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ameepchi it kogeny ng’alek tugul che kimwaei; si megas kochubin otwogindeng’ung’: 
Ecclesiastes7:22 amu ingen agine muguleldang’ung’ konyil che chang’ kole kiichub aginye alak ko u noto. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Kiageer chuto tugul eng’ ng’omnatet: kiale, Ang’omitu; ago kilooena." 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Kit ne mi, ko mi ye loo, ak kiwa orit mising’; ng’o ne imuchi konyor?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Kiaweege, ak kimach muguleldanyu konai ak kosiach ak kocheng’, ng’omnatet, ak ole teptoi tuguk, ak konai kole yaitiet ko berberindo, ak kole berberindo ko iywek." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ak anyoru kit ne ng’wan kosiir meet, korget ne tinyei muguleldanyi mestonok, ak mestonok che u regereiywek, ak u eunekyik ratutik: age tugul ne boiboi Kamuktaindet kochilile inendet; ago namei korgonoto kiptengekyot." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Ogeero, kianyoru nito, mwaei Amdoindet, kiatuiye kit age ak age si kobiit anai ole te:" 
Ecclesiastes7:28 ne ta kocheng’ei sobondanyu, ago tom anyoru: kianyoru chito agenge eng’ bik elfut; ago ma anyoru kwondo eng’ choto tugul." 
Ecclesiastes7:29 Ogeero, kianyoru nito kityo, ale, kiyai Kamuktaindet chito kobunji iman; ago kigocheng’ ichek tuguk che chang’ che taunen." 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Ng’o ne kergei ak chito ne ng’om? Ak ng’o ne ingen kaweegetab kiy? Igochin ng’omnatetab chito togennyi koluu, ak kowalak uuindab togennyi." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Aborun ale, Rib ng’atutietab laitoriat, ak ibwat ile kiiyosye eng’ Kamuktaindet." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Amesib iwe eng’ tainnyi; ameyai kiy ne ya kotugul: amu yaei laitoriat kiy age tugul ne iboiboegei. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Amu tinyei kimnatet ng’olyotab laitoriat; ak ng’o ne imuchi kolenji inendet, Iyae nee?" 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Manaei kiy ne ya age tugul ne ribei ng’atutiet; ak ibestos muguleldab chito ne ng’om betusiek ak kiruoget: 
Ecclesiastes8:6 amu mi betut ak kiruoget ne bo ng’olyot age tugul; amu o nyalilda ne tinyei chito eng’ choto: 
Ecclesiastes8:7 amu manaei kit ne biitu; amu tos ng’o ne imuchi komwachi inendet ole biitundoi kioto? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Mami chi ne tinyei kimnatet eng’ tamirmiriet korany tamirmiriet; ama tinyei kimnatet koboi betutab meet; ama mi undaet eng’ lugonoto: ama soru yaitiet inendet ne igochingei yaitionoto. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Kiageer chuto tugul, kiagiilji muguleldanyu boisiet age tugul ne kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista: mitei betut ne tinyei chito age kimnatet koboi age si kogochinegei nyalilda." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Ak kiageer ketubei kiptengeginik, ak kiba kererit; ak kiba eng’ ole tilil bik che kiyai ne mie, ak kigiutie ichek eng’ nganaset: buch nito agine." 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Amu ma sib kiruokyin boisiet ne ya, nyoru anyun mugulelwekab bik maget koyai yaitiet." 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Agot ngo yai kiptengekyot yaitiet konyil bogol, ak kotesak betusiekyik, angen ui tugul ale, mieitu eng’ ichek che iywei Kamuktaindet, che iyweisiei eng’ tainnyi:" 
Ecclesiastes8:13 ago mamieitu eng’ kiptengeginik, ama tesoksei betusiekyik che u uruet; amu maiyweisiei eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet." 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Mi tangoita ne yaoksei eng’ ng’ony; amu mi bik che bo iman, che biityin kiy ko u boisionikab kiptengeginik; komi bik che yaach che biityin kiy ko u boisionikab che bo iman: kiamwa ale, tangoita nito agine." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Kialosu anyun boiboiyet, amu matinyei chi kiy ne mie eng’ kureretab asista kobate koam, ak koeei, ak kobaibait: amu tebyei noto koboto inendet eng’ boisiennyi, eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi, che kiigochi Kamuktaindet inendet eng’ kureretab asista." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Ye kiagiil muguleldanyu konai ng’omnatet, ak ageer boisiet ne kiyaei eng’ ng’ony; (amu mi ne mainuuchi bet anan kemoi:)" 
Ecclesiastes8:17 kiageer anyun boisionik tugul che bo Kamuktaindet, ale maimuchi chi konai boisiet ne kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista: amu agot ngogiilgei chito ne tai, kole kocheng’, ko manyoru; ee, agot ngo len chito ne ng’om konai, ko maimuchi konyor." 
Ecclesiastes9:1 Kiabwat choto tugul eng’ muguleldanyu, asiach chuto tugul, ale mitei eutab Kamuktaindet, bik che bo iman, ak che ng’omen, ak boisionikwak: ngo chamnyet anan wechet, ko manaei chito noto; mi tugul tainywa." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Ityin bik tugul tuguk tugul kogergeit: ityin kit agenge chi ne bo iman ak chi ne ya; ityin ne mie, ak ne tilil, ak ne ma tilil, ityin ne igoitoi korosiot, ak ne maigoitoi korosiot: ko u kit ne u chito ne mie, ko u noto kiptengekyot; u inendet ne iyostos, inendet ne iywei kayosiet." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Nito ko yaitiet eng’ tugul che kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista, mi kit agenge ne ityin tugul: ee, nyiitat mugulelwekab werikab bik, yaitwogik, ak mi iywek mugulelwekwak kote kosoptos, ak ye ibata koba ole mi che kigobek." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Amu tinyei kamang’unet inendet ne namegei ak tugul che soptos: amu kaigai seset ne sobei kosiir ng’etundo ne kagome. 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Amu ingen che soptos kole begu: ago manaei kiy age tugul che kigobek, ama kotinyei melekto age tugul kogeny; amu kigeutie ichek." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Kigobet chamnyenywa, ak wechenywa, ak ng’et kondanywa, ama kotinyei kebeberta koigeny eng’ kiy age tugul ne kiyaei eng’ kureretab asista." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Ui oldang’ung’, am amitwogiguk eng’ boiboiyet, ak iee divaiguk eng’ muguleldo ne baibai; amu kigocham Kamuktaindet boisioniguk." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Ingoleelagitu ngoroiguk kotugul; ameng’ korarji mwaita meting’ung’. 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Otebi eng’ boiboiyet ak osotiot ne ichame, betusiek tugul che bo sobeng’ung’ ne bo buch, che kigonin inendet eng’ kureretab asista, betusieguk tugul che bo buch: amu kebebertang’ung’ noto kote isobe ak eng’ boisieng’ung’ ne iyaei eng’ kureretab asista." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Kit age tugul ne iyae eng’ eung’ung’, iyai eng’ kimnateng’ung’; amu mami boisiet, anan chobutik, anan naet, anan ng’omnatet eng’ kererit ne iwendi." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Kiaweege ak ageer eng’ kureretab asista, ale, ma bo kabeletab ge che chepcheb, ama bo luget che kimen, ama bo amitwogik che ng’omen, ama bo magornatosiek bikab naet, ama chamotin bik che utotin; ago ityin ichek tugul sainywa ak betunywa." 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Amu manai chito agine betunnyi: u njirenik che kinamei eng’ regereiywot ne ya, ak u taritik che kinamei eng’ mestet, kinamei ko u noto werikab bik eng’ betut ne ya, ye cheei ichek." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Kiageer kogeny ng’omnatet eng’ kureretab asista ko u ni, ak kiageer ale, o." 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kimi nganaset ne ming’in, ak kimi bik che ng’ering’ orit; ak kinyo laitoriat ne o kobokyi, ak koyiem, ak koteech irimosiek che eechen komuute nganasanato." 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Kiginyorji nganasanato kibananiat ne ng’om, ak kisor nganaset eng’ ng’omnatennyi; ago mami chi ne kiibwat kibananiandanato." 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Kiale anyun, Mie ng’omnatet kosiir kimnatet; nganda u noto, kesasei ng’omnatetab kibananiat, ama kigasei ng’alekyik." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Kigasei ng’alekab bik che ng’omen che kimwaei mutyo kosiir waagetab ne bou bik che berber. 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Mie ng’omnatet kosiir karik che bo luget: ago ng’emei kiptengekyot agenge mieinwek che chang’. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Buldos mwanik che anyiny che bo ng’omotiot, ne buruchi tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, amu kalyang’ik che bekyin: ko u noto agine ng’emei berberindo kitigin ng’omnatet ak teegisto." 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Mi muguleldab chito ne ng’om eunnyi ne bo tai; ago mi muguleldab ne berber eunnyi ne bo katam. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Ee, ye wendoti ne berber eng’ oret, kobetyi ng’omnatet inendet, ak kolenjinoti chito age tugul, A berber." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Ngot kolaljin neregekab bounindet, ko mat iwe eng’ yetang’ung’ ye kemi; amu tisei talasiet tengekwogik che eechen." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Mi yaitiet ne kiageer eng’ kureretab asista, ne u lelutiet ne bunu bounindet:" 
Ecclesiastes10:6 kindoi berberindo komoswek che tororen, ak tebyei magorek eng’ ole bo ng’ony." 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Kiageer otwogik kolanyei mbartanyisiek, ak kobunei kelyek bounik ko u otwogik eng’ ng’ony." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Inendet ne balei keringet kobutyin yoto; ak age tugul ne butei ng’otwet kosusei erenet. 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Iberjin koik chi age tugul ne waei; imuchi kokwer kwendet inendet ne betei. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Ngo ng’utum karnet, ama lit chi, ko kanyol kobirtogei ne ebei: ago mie ng’omnatet eng’ kandochinet." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Ngot kosusis erenet kotom kigaigai, ko ma ko tilei kiy kagaigaet." 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Miachen ng’alekab chito ne ng’om; ago luguegei kutitab chito ne berber. 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Berberindo taunetab ng’alekyik: ak kagesunetab ng’alalennyi ko iywek che ng’emisiei. 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Tesei kogeny ne berber ng’alek: ago manaei chi kit ne biitu; ak ng’o ne mwachin inendet tuguk che biitu let eng’ inendet? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Boisietab che berber kogochin age tugul eng’ icheget kong’et, amu manaei inendet ole wetitoi nganaset." 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Bwa eng’ inye, ee emet, ye ta ko ming’in laitoriandeng’ung’ ak ye amisiei bouniguk kota ko karon!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Ibaibai inye, ee emet, ye laitoriandeng’ung’ ko weritab bik che toogunotin, ye amisiei bouniguk eng’ sait ne nyolu, si kogimegitu, ama eng’ bogitet!" 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Kabuisei baragutab got amu chorirnatetab chito; robonu got amu chorirnatet. 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Kiyaei igorta agobo roriot, ak iboiboi divaik sobondo: ak imuchi fedaisiek koyai tuguk tugul." 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Amesas laitoriat, agot eng’ kabwatutiguk; amesas magoriot eng’ gong’ung’ ne irue: amu ibei tarit ng’olyot, ak mwaitoi che tinyei kebebaik ng’alek." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Wirji amitwogiguk beek; amu tun inyoru ko kagosiirto betusiek che chang’. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Igochi kebeberta bik tisab, ee bik sisiit; amu mengen yaitiet ne biitu eng’ ng’ony." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Ngo nyi ropta bolik, korong’jigei ng’ony: ak ngo lulji ketit murot ne bo tai, anan ko murot ne bo katam, ko komosta ne kalulji, kotebe yoto." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Magolsei inendet ne ribei usonet; ama kesei inendet ne keerei bolik. 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Ko u ye mengen oretab usonet anan ole nertoi kowekab lakwet eng’ moetab inendet ne managat; u noto mengen boisietab Kamuktaindet ne yaei tuguk tugul. 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Kolse karon, amesis koskoleny: amu mengen che rurtos, ngo ni anan ni, anan ngo miagitu tuwai." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Anyiny iman lapkeiyet, ak kit ne kararan asista kegeerei." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Ee, ngo sob chito kenyisiek che chang’, ingobaibait eng’ choto tugul; ago ingobwat inendet betusiekab mesundeito, amu chang’. Buch tugul che bwanei." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Ee, baibaitu murenoni, eng’ betusiekab ming’inateng’ung’; ak ingobaibain muguleldang’ung’ eng’ betusiekab ming’inateng’ung’, ak isub ortinwekab muguleldang’ung’, ak ko u ye igeere: ago nai ile, imutyinin Kamuktaindet kiruoget amu tuguchuto tugul." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Iste anyun arogenet eng’ muguleldang’ung’, ak iste yaitiet eng’ bortang’ung’: amu buch betusiekab ming’inateng’ung’ ak che bo nerateng’ung’." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Ibwat kogeny Yaindeng’ung’ eng’ betusiekab ming’inateng’ung’, kotom koit betusiek che yaach, ak korik kenyisiek che imwae ile, Mabaibaitune chuto;" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 kotom koimenit asista, anan lapkeiyet, anan arawet, anan kecheik, ak koweek bolik ye kagorobon;" 
Ecclesiastes12:3 eng’ betut ye tun botanso ribikab got, ak kong’urugis che kimen ak kosisyo che ng’aisei amu ng’ering’, ak koimenitu che ititoi eng’ tirisiok," 
Ecclesiastes12:4 ak keger kurgotik eng’ oret, ye ma kegasei mising’ ng’aiset, ak kong’eet chito eng’ kateetab taritiet, ak koming’in tibik tugul che bo tienwogik;" 
Ecclesiastes12:5 ee, iywei ichek noto toror, ak kobiit kamuiset eng’ oret; ak koiyesio taptokab ketit ne kiguure almond, ak konyigisit talamwet, ak kobet maget: amu wendi chito gonnyi ne bo koigeny ak kobendat che ririoti eng’ ortinwek:" 
Ecclesiastes12:6 kotom kitaach borowetab feda, anan kotom ketui teretab tahabu, anan kotom koiye teret eng’ kondametut, anan kotom koil cheptiret eng’ ole kisiile beek," 
Ecclesiastes12:7 ak koweekyigei ng’ung’unyek ng’ony ko u ye kinye, ak koweekyigei sobondo Kamuktaindet ne kigonu." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Mwaei Amdoindet kole, Buch, matilei kiy; buch tugul." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Ago, amu ki ng’om Amdoindet, kita koneti bik naet; ee, kiibwat, ak kocheng’, ak kotet kalewenaik che chang’." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Kicheng’ Amdoindet ng’alek che taachaksei, ak choto che kigisir eng’ lititindo ng’alek che bo iman." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 U kiplitok ng’alekab bik che ng’omen, ak u kipchumarisiek che kigigiich komie, ng’alekab konetikab tuiyosiek, che kigigon kobun mestowot agenge." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Kas anyun werinnyu kateunet: mami ole igesunegei siretab bukuisiek che chang’: ak ng’etei borto eng’ somanosiek che chang’. 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kagesunetab tuguchu ni; kagogasak tugul: iywei Kamuktaindet ak irib ng’atutikyik; amu nyoljin chito boisionito tugul. 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Amu ipchin Kamuktaindet boisiet age tugul oldab kiruoget, koboto kit age tugul ne ung’at, ngo kiy ne mie anan ngo ne ya." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Tiendo ne siirei tugul, ne bo Solomon." 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ingong’ututena kutinnyi: Amu siirei chamnyeng’ung’ divaik. 
SongOfSongs1:3 Tinyei nyamdutiet ne mie mwaniguk; U kaineng’ung’ mwaita ne kirong’un; Chamin anyun bergeinik amu noto. 
SongOfSongs1:4 Ichuuta; si keruou, kisubun: Kagomutwa anyo gorikyik che bo orit: Kigasige ak kiboiboitu eng’ inye, Kimwaitoi achek chamnyeng’ung’ kosiir divaik: Chamin ichek eng’ iman." 
SongOfSongs1:5 A tuui ak ko a kararan, Ee, tibikab Jerusalem, Ko u emaisiekab Kedar, Ko u angokab Solomon." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Amegeera, amu kiatuuitu, Amu kibeela asista. Kinerekya werikab kamennyu, Kiindea aek ribindetab mbarenikab sabibuk. Ago ma arib mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Mwawa anyun, ee inye ne chamin sobondanyu, Ole iyage akwetab kechireguk, ole igochine komuung’e ko katelel asis: Amu nee si aige ne tugot met Eng’ ole negite akwotisiekab choronoguk?" 
SongOfSongs1:8 Ngo mengen, ee inye ne i kararan isiir tibik tugul, Ui isub merendusiekab akwetab kechirek, Ak iyage areguk che bo ng’oror eng’ ole negite emaisiekab mestowek." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Ee chamanennyu, kaarogenden Mbartanyit ne bo karisiekab Parao." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Kororon matong’oik koboto lelestang’ung’, Ak kaating’ung’ koboto sonoek che kororon." 
SongOfSongs1:11 Kiyaun achek tugukab tahabu che kigila, Koboto tugukab lelesta che bo feda." 
SongOfSongs1:12 Ye kitebyei laitoriat eng’ mesennyi, Kong’uu ketinnyu ne bo nyamdutik." 
SongOfSongs1:13 U chamanennyu loletab tuguk che u igomoik, Ne rue kwenutab kinaikyuk." 
SongOfSongs1:14 U chamanennyu temet ne mi taptokab biribirinik Che mi mbarenikab sabibuk che bo En-gedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Keero, i kararan mising’ inye chamanennyu; keero, i kararan; U konyeguk che bo cheptugenik." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Keero, i kararan, chamanennyu, ee, iboiboi bich: Nyalil agine itogunnyo." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Bambanikab gonnyo ko taragonik, Kureiywekyok ko biribirinik." 
SongOfSongs2:1 A taptetab Saron, A u taptetab atebwosiek." 
SongOfSongs2:2 A u taptet ne mi kwenutab katok, U noto chamanennyu eng’ tibik." 
SongOfSongs2:3 U ketitab logoek eng’ ketikab timin, U noto chamanennyu eng’ murenik. Kiatebe uruennyi eng’ boiboiyet ne o, Ak ki anyiny logoekyik ye kiachamjami." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Kimutwa anyo gotab igorta, Ak ki chamnyet songoliennyi ne kiiuurena." 
SongOfSongs2:5 Igimitena logoek che saiyotin, igoigoena logoek: Amu amiani agobo emostab chamnyet." 
SongOfSongs2:6 Tiie metinnyu eunnyi ne bo katam, Imurena eunnyi ne bo tai." 
SongOfSongs2:7 Kayosiewok, ee tibikab Jerusalem, Eng’ cheptirgichik ak kenyelok che kotoy, Ale, Amat otwa, anan ong’eet chamnyet, Agoi kocham." 
SongOfSongs2:8 Ogas, tugetab chamanennyu! Ogeero, nyonei, Kotorombenonu eng’ tulonok, Kotwalonu eng’ tulonok che mengechen." 
SongOfSongs2:9 U chamanennyu cheptirgichet anan aruetab teweretiot: Ogeero, tonone inatunnyo komosin. Iitu inendet eng’ tirisiok, Iborugei eng’ tirisiet ne regerat." 
SongOfSongs2:10 King’alal chamanennyu kolenja, Ng’eet chamanennyu, nenyu ne kararan, ak inyo kebe." 
SongOfSongs2:11 Keero, kagosiirto kaititiet, Kagomoen, kakwa ropta;" 
SongOfSongs2:12 Yiestos taptok eng’ emet; Kagoit betusiekab tiendo, Kigasei tugetab cheptuget eng’ emennyo;" 
SongOfSongs2:13 Igochin mogoiywet logoekyik che tuonen korurio, Ak yiestos taptokab ketikab sabibuk, Ng’uu ne nyamdut. Ng’eet, chamanennyu, nenyu ne kararan, ak inyo kebe." 
SongOfSongs2:14 Ee cheptugennyu, imi ole kibetak eng’ ruandet, eng’ ole ung’at eng’ ye kitogostoe, Ingageer togeng’ung’, ngagas tugeng’ung’; Amu anyiny tugeng’ung’, ak ko kararan togeng’ung’." 
SongOfSongs2:15 Namwech lelwek, lelwek che mengechen, che ng’emei mbarenikab sabibuk; Amu kayiesio taptokab mbarenikyok che bo sabibuk." 
SongOfSongs2:16 Nenyu chamanennyu, ak a nenyi: Iyagi kechirekyik eng’ oldab taptok." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Agoi kogaititit, ak kobetyo uronok, Weege, chamanennyu, ak iige cheptirgichet anan teweretiot Eng’ tulonokab Beter." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Kiacheng’ kemoi arue, inendet ne chamei sobondanyu: Kiacheng’ inendet, ago ma anyoru." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Kiale, Ang’eete nguno ak awendote nganaset, Eng’ ortinwek ak eng’ ortinwek che baraen, Acheng’e inendet ne chamei sobondanyu: Kiacheng’, ago ma anyoru." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Kinyorua ribik che bendoti eng’ nganaset: Kiateebe alenji, Kiogeer inendet ne chamei sobondanyu?" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Kiawe ne matia ko kaasiirtoe ichek, Ye kianyoru inendet ne chamei sobondanyu: Kianam, ma achamji kwo, Agoi amutu inendet konyo gotab kamennyu, Agoi got ne bo orit ne bo inendet ne kisicha." 
SongOfSongs3:5 Kayosiewok, ee tibikab Jerusalem, Eng’ cheptirgichik ak kenyelok che kotoy, Ale, Amat otwa, anan ong’eet chamnyet, Agoi kocham." 
SongOfSongs3:6 Ng’o ni togosu eng’ ong’atet ko u tolochikab iyeto, Ne ng’uu nyamdutiet ne bo tuguk che u igomoik ak tuguk che nyamdut, Ak busaruk tugul che bo chemung’araindet?" 
SongOfSongs3:7 Ogeero, kit ne lyeldoe Solomon; Yiemei kioto murenik tamanwogik lo che kimen, Murenik che kimen che bo Israel." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Tinyei tugul rotokab chok, ak ko ng’omen eng’ luget: Tinyei age tugul rotwennyi bo chok eng’ suennyi, Amu kaiyweisiet ne bo kemoi." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Kiyachigei laitoriat Solomon ng’echeret ne kilyeldoe Ne bo ketikab Lebanon. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Kiyae tolochikyik feda, Kiyae kelunnyi tahabu, koyae ole kitebe, tuguk che arusen ne birir, Kigitete kwenunnyi chamnyet, Ne kibunu tibikab Jerusalem." 
SongOfSongs3:11 Oba anyun, ee tibikab Sion, ak ogeer laitoriat Solomon, Kolaachi narietab laitornatet ne kiilaakyin kamennyi eng’ betut ne kiitunisie. Ak eng’ betutab boiboiyetab muguleldanyi." 
SongOfSongs4:1 Keero, i kararan chamanennyu; keero, i kararan; U konyeguk che bo cheptugenik, che katuch sumeeguk: U sumeeguk akwetab ng’ororek, Che ruitos eng’ tegeiyatab tulwetab Gilead." 
SongOfSongs4:2 U keleguk akwetab kechirek che kagetil kororikwak, Che bunu ole kiune; Ne tinyei age tugul saramek, Ama mi agot agenge eng’ ichek ne kimee aruet." 
SongOfSongs4:3 U kuting’ung’ borowet ne birir, Ak kororon ng’aleguk: U togeng’ung’ logoiyat ne birir Ne tuchei sumeeguk." 
SongOfSongs4:4 U kaating’ung’ teekset ne koi ne bo Daudi ne kigiteekyi karikab luget, Ole kigartate long’onik che mengechen elfut, Long’onik tugul che bo bik che kimen." 
SongOfSongs4:5 U kinaiguk tuwai arek aeng’ che bo chemnyogoset, che u saramekab cheptirgichet, Che agete kwenutab taptok." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Agoi kogaititit, ak kobetyo uronok, Awendi tulwet ne mi tuguk che u igomoik, Ak tulwet ne ming’in ne bo tuguk che nyamdut." 
SongOfSongs4:7 I kararan kot, chamanennyu; Ametinye tisia." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Murerennyu, nyo kebe tuwai eng’ Lebanon, Kebe tuwai eng’ Lebanon: Tobende eng’ tulwet barak ne bo Amana, Eng’ tulwet barak ne bo Senir ak Hermon, Eng’ kebenonikab ng’etunyik, Eng’ tulonokab cheblangok." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Kecheer muguleldanyu, chepkamennyu, murerennyu; Kecheer muguleldanyu eng’ kondang’ung’, Eng’ sirimdo agenge ne bo kaating’ung’." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Kararan ne tia chamnyeng’ung’, chepkamennyu, murerennyu! Siirei mising’ chamnyeng’ung’ divaik! Ak siirei ne tia ng’uunetab mwaniguk, tuguk tugul che ng’uu ne anyiny!" 
SongOfSongs4:11 Ee murerennyu, saitoi ng’aleguk ko u kumiat: Mi ng’elyeptang’ung’ kumik ak chego: U siptab ngoroiguk ng’uunet ne anyiny ne bo Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Mbaret ne ng’otat chepkamennyu, murerennyu; Kondab beek ne ng’otat kondametutab beek ne kiging’och." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Mbaretab logoek che biriren ketiguk, che tinyei logoek che kororon mising’; Biribirinik ak ketik che bo nyamdiutik," 
SongOfSongs4:14 Ketit ne bo nyamdutik ak karkom, Kalamus ak kinamon, koboto ketik tugul che bo tuguk che nyamdut; Tuguk che u igomoik, ak ahalot, koboto tuguk tugul che ng’uu ne anyiny mising’." 
SongOfSongs4:15 I kondametutab beekab mbarenik, Keringetab beek che soptos, Ak kererusiek che rootei che bunu Lebanon." 
SongOfSongs4:16 Ng’eet, ee usonetab murot ne bo katam; ak inyo inye usonetab murot ne bo tai; Ousyi mbarennyu, si kobiit komuch kong’uu nyamdutikyik. Ingonyo chamanennyu mbarennyu, Ak koam logoekyik che kororon mising’." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Kaanyo mbarennyu, chepkamennyu, murerennyu: Kaayum tugukyuk che u igomoik, ak tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny: Kaamde masamekyuk kumikyuk; Kaaee divaikyuk ak alu chekyuk. Ee choronok, oamisie; Oeeise, ee oeeise mising’, ee chamanikyuk." 
SongOfSongs5:2 Kianuuchi, ago king’eet muguleldanyu: Kutitab chamanennyu ne igongong’isiei, kolen, Yatwa, chepkamennyu, chamanennyu, cheptugennyu, nenyu ne libwob: Amu nyiitat metinnyu rewot, Ak nyiitat sumeekyuk che iletotin, rewotab kemoi." 
SongOfSongs5:3 Kaareegu kotinnyu; ta alaaktoi ano kogeny? Kaaun kelyekyuk; ta andoitoi ano simdo kogeny? 
SongOfSongs5:4 Kiyogoune chamanennyu eunnyi konda ne mi kurget, Ak kiigasgei muguleldanyu agobo inendet." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Kiang’eet alen ayatyi chamanennyu; Kisaitae eunekyuk tuguk che u igomoik, Kisaitae morikyuk tuguchoto u igomoik che u beek, Eng’ eunekab karnet ne kigiige." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Kiayatyi chamanennyu; Ago kiwelelgei chamanennyu ak kwo. Kitanui sobondanyu ye kingotwekwa: Kiacheng’ inendet, ago ma amuch anyor; Kiaguur inendet, ago ma wolwa." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Kinyorua ribik che bendoti eng’ nganaset, Kibira, kiiguotena; Kiibena ribikab irimoik ngoriennyu ne bo barak." 
SongOfSongs5:8 Kayosiewok, ee tibikab Jerusalem, ale, ngot onyoru chamanennyu, Omwachi inendet olenji, amiani agobo emostab chamnyet." 
SongOfSongs5:9 Siirei eng’ nee chamaneng’ung’ chamanet age, Inye ne i kararan isiir tibik tugul? Siirei eng’ nee chamaneng’ung’ chamanet age, Kot iyosiewech ko u noto?" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Leel chamanennyu ago tilial ne birir, Toogunet inendet eng’ elfusiek taman." 
SongOfSongs5:11 U metinnyi tahabu ne kararan mising’, Koen sumeekyik che iletotin, ak ko tuuen ko u kororikab chepkugit." 
SongOfSongs5:12 U konyekyik che bo cheptugenik eng’ ngegusiekab kererusiek; Che kiune chego, che tetotin komie." 
SongOfSongs5:13 U matong’oikyik mbaretab nyamdutik, u mbarenikab ngwek che anyiny: U kutinnyi taptok che biriren, ne saitoe tuguk che u igomoik che u beek." 
SongOfSongs5:14 U eunekyik peteinikab tahabu che kigitetyi berulo: U bortanyi kelekab belek che kigiliige sapire. 
SongOfSongs5:15 U kelyekyik tolochikab koik che leelach, che kigitetyi kelongonikab tahabu ne kararan: U itondanyi Lebanon, kararan ko u taragonik." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Anyiny ng’alekyik mising’: ee, kararan kot inendet eng’ kiy age tugul. Nito ko chamanennyu, nito ko choruennyu, Ee, tibikab Jerusalem." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Kawa ano chameneng’ung’, Ee inye ne i kararan isiir tibik tugul? Kamasta kwo ano chamaneng’ung’, Si kobiit kecheng’ inendet koboten?" 
SongOfSongs6:2 Kachorjigei chamanennyu mbarennyi, mbarenikab tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny, Kwo koamis eng’ mbarenik, ak koyum taptok." 
SongOfSongs6:3 A bo chamanennyu, ak ko nenyu chamanennyu: Iyagisiei eng’ ole mi taptok." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Ee chamanennyu, i kararan kot, ko u Tirsa, I kararan ko u Jerusalem, I ne imuisei ko u luget ne tinyei songolik." 
SongOfSongs6:5 Keer olin, Amu kagotertera konyeguk, U sumeeguk akwetab ng’ororek, Che ruitos eng’ tegeiyatab Gilead." 
SongOfSongs6:6 U keleguk akwetab kechirek, Che bunu ole kiune; Ne tinyei age tugul saramek, Ama mi agot agenge eng’ ichek ne kimee aruet." 
SongOfSongs6:7 U togeng’ung’ kebebertab logoiyat ne birir Ne tuchei sumeeguk. 
SongOfSongs6:8 Mitei osotik tamanwogik lo che bo laitoriat, ak chebaigeinik tamanwogik sisiit, Koboto bergeinik che maiitoksei." 
SongOfSongs6:9 Agenge cheptugennyu, nenyu ne libwob; Ne kigii inegei; Chamat inendet eng’ kamet. Kigeer tibik inendet, ak koguure ne iberurot; Ee, kiilos inendet osotikab laitoriat, ak chebaigeinik." 
SongOfSongs6:10 Ng’o ne tobendoi ko u karonet, Ne kararan ko u arawet, Ne iluu ko u asista, Ne imuisei ko u luget ne tinye songolik?" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Kiachorjige mbaretab logoek che u njuguk, Si kobiit ageer ketik che ing’atos che bo atebwet, Ageer ngo kayiesio ketikab sabibuk, Ak ageer ngo kayiesio logoek che biriren." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Kingo tom anai, komutwa muguleldanyu Anyo kwenutab karisiekab bikyuk che eechen." 
SongOfSongs6:13 Weeguge, weeguge, ee Jepsulamindet; Weeguge, weeguge, si kegeerin. Kalya si omach ogeer Jepsulamindet, Ko u ye ogeere urerietab Maanaim?" 
SongOfSongs7:1 Kororon ne tia kelyeguk komi kweonik, ee cheptab bounindet! U kubesaiguk che mugulen, koik che kororon, Boisietab musogindet ne ng’om." 
SongOfSongs7:2 U mugeng’ung’ tabet ne mugul, Ne mararjin divaik che burugotin: U moeng’ung’ karurugutietab nganok Ne kigiyieme taptok." 
SongOfSongs7:3 U kinaiguk tuwai arek aeng’ che bo chemnyogoset Che u saramekab cheptirgichet. 
SongOfSongs7:4 U kaating’ung’ teekset ne koi ne bo kelekab belek; U konyeguk tamboinik che mi Hesbon, ole negite ormarichetab Bat-rabim; U sereng’ung’ teekset ne koi ne bo Lebanon Ne tokyingei Damasko." 
SongOfSongs7:5 U meting’ung’ Karmel, Ak arusen ne birir sumeeguk; Luulei sumekyik laitoriat." 
SongOfSongs7:6 I kararan ne tia ak ko i chamat, Ee chamnyet, ne iboiboisie!" 
SongOfSongs7:7 U tononanito-ng’ung’et tiret, Ak u kinaiguk logoek." 
SongOfSongs7:8 Kiamwa ale, Alanye tiret, Aname temenikyik: Ingoigei kinaiguk logoekab sabibuk, Ak ingoigei ng’uunetab kabuseng’ung’, logoek;" 
SongOfSongs7:9 Ak ingoigei kuting’ung’ divaik che miachen mising’, Che rektoi komie eng’ chamanennyu, Che igimiti kutuswekab che ruitos." 
SongOfSongs7:10 A bo chamanennyu, Ak tokyinagei magennyi." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Nyo anyun chamanennyu, kebe mbar; Ngemeng’ote nganasok che mengechen." 
SongOfSongs7:12 Ngemusyi mbarenikab logoekab sabibuk; Ngegeer ngo kagong’atyo ketikab sabibuk, ak koyiesio taptokyik, Ngo kogoyiesio taptokab logoek che biriren: Agonin chamnyennyu eng’ oloto." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Ng’uu ne anyiny tuguk che u labotik, Ak mi seremusiekyok logoek alak tugul che kororon, che leelach ak che bo keny, Che kiagonorun, ee chamanennyu." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Kita kaigai nda kii u werit ne kitupche, Ne kichuchun kinetab kamennyu! Nda anyorjinin sang’ ang’ututin; Ee, ama mi chi ne sasa." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Ta kamutin iwe gotab kamennyu, Ne imuchi koneta; Ta kanagin divaik che kigiburukto nyamdutik, Che bo beekab logoekyuk che biriren." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Ta katiie metinnyu eunnyi ne bo katam, Ta kaimurena eunnyi ne bo tai." 
SongOfSongs8:4 Kayosiewok, ee tibikab Jerusalem, Ale, Amat otwa, anan ong’eet chamnyet, Agoi kocham." 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ng’o ni togosu eng’ ong’atet, Ne tiiegei chamanennyi? Kiang’eetin eng’ kelutab ketitab logoek: Ole kiame moet komet komachei kosichin, Kimi yoto koamei moet si kosichin." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Indea muguleldang’ung’ ko u ng’okset, ko u ng’okset eng’ eung’ung’: Amu kim chamnyet ko u meet; Korom ng’et konda ko u kererit: Lalei ko u ye lalei mat, Liblibenet ne korom ne bo Jehovah." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Maimuchi beek che chang’ kotis chamnyet, Ama imaluuchi maranosiek: Ngot kogoito chito tugukyik tugul che bo gonnyi agobo chamnyet, Kesasei mising’ kot." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Kitinye chepto ne ming’in ne kitupche, Ne tom kogun kinet: Kiitoi nee cheptanyo Ye tun kait ye kibwanune koito?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Ngot ko inatut inendet, Keteechei baragunnyi irimet ne bo feda: Ak ngot ko kereiywotab kurget, Keng’ote inendet baoinikab taragonik." 
SongOfSongs8:10 A inatut, ak ko u kinaikyuk teeksosiekyik che koen: Kiaegu anyun eng’ inendet ne u ne kinyor kalyet." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Kitinyei Solomon mbaretab sabibuk eng’ Baal-hamon; Kiimanakyi mbaranato bo sabibuk ribik; Kinyoljin chi tugul koib fedaisiek elfut che bo logoekyik. 
SongOfSongs8:12 Mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk, ne nenyu, ko mi tainnyu: Ee Solomon, inyoru elfunoto, Ak nyoru bogol aeng’ icheget che ribei logoekyik." 
SongOfSongs8:13 Inye ne imenye mbarenik, Epchin it choronok kuting’ung’: Kona agas kutinato." 
SongOfSongs8:14 Chakte, chamanennyu, Kergeitu ak cheptirgichet anan aruetab teweretiot Eng’ tulonokab tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny." 
Isaiah1:1 Ng’ang’utietab Isaia weritab Amos, ne kigeer agobo Juda ak Jerusalem, eng’ betusiekab Usia, Jotam, Ahas ak Hesekia, laitorinikab Juda." 
Isaiah1:1 Ng’ang’utietab Isaia weritab Amos, ne kigeer agobo Juda ak Jerusalem, eng’ betusiekab Usia, Jotam, Ahas ak Hesekia, laitorinikab Juda." 
Isaiah1:2 Ogas, ee kipsengwetisiek, ak oeb it, inye ng’ony, amu kagotwek Jehovah, kole: kiagu lagok, ak kianet, ak kigongelelja." 
Isaiah1:3 Ingen eito chitab kobo, ak kongen sigiriet biutab kiptaiyandennyi: ago manaei Israel, amaibwati bikyuk." 
Isaiah1:4 Bwa, bororiet ne yaei tengekto, bik che laei yaitiet, iyotetab yaikab yaitiet, lagok che yaei ng’emisiet: kigometo Jehovah, kigosas Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel, kigotoiyegei kochuchuigei." 
Isaiah1:5 Amu nee si kota kebirok, kot obistoe mising’ kosiir? Miani metit komugul, kigotanui muguleldo komugul." 
Isaiah1:6 Mami ole sobei koboch keldebesiet agoi metit; ago tinyei ng’otobosiek, ak kanerutik, ak mook che inenderi: ma kituch, ama kirat, ama kinur eng’ mwaita." 
Isaiah1:7 Kigoguber emeng’wong’; kigebeel nganasokwok; ibokyin toek emeng’wong’ ogeere, ak kogoguber, ko u ne kogong’em toek." 
Isaiah1:8 Ak kigebagakta cheptab Sion ko u keriet eng’ mbaretab sabibuk, ko u keriet eng’ mbaretab ngwek, ko u nganaset ne kigiyiem." 
Isaiah1:9 Nda kima bagakwech Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ng’etunenik che ng’ering’ mising’, ta kiga keige Sodom, ak ta kiga keige Gomora." 
Isaiah1:10 Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek bounikab Sodom; oepchi it ng’atutietab Kamuktaindennyo, okwek bikab Gomora." 
Isaiah1:11 Tilei nee eng’ ane chang’indab tiseiywekwok? Mwaei Jehovah. Kigonyiia kagochinoik che bo beelset che bo mengichik, ak sunetikab tuga che bootin; ama baibaitune korotikab kirugik, anan ko che bo arekab kechir, anan ko che bo kwesik." 
Isaiah1:12 Ye obwa tainnyu, ko ng’o ne kimagenak kiito, si otiech seremusiekyuk?" 
Isaiah1:13 Amatata oibu kagochinoik che matilei kiy; aweche nyamdutik che kibeelei; ma amuchi amuita agobo igorwekab arawet ne kaleel, ak sabato, ak kuursetab tuiyosiek - yaitwogik choto, koboto tuiyetab kaming’inetab ge." 
Isaiah1:14 Wechei sobondanyu arawekwok che kaleel ak igorwekwok che kiging’at: inyalila tuguchoto; kaang’et eng’ laetab tuguchoto. 
Isaiah1:15 Ak ye oiite eunekwok, aung’enok konyekyuk: ee, ye osa eng’ sautik che chang’, ko magase: nyiitat eunekwok korotik." 
Isaiah1:16 Ounge, otililge; oiste yaitietab boisionikwok eng’ tainnyu; osisye, amatata oyai yaitiet:" 
Isaiah1:17 onetge oyai ne mie; ocheng’ kiruoget, otoret che kisastoe, obesiechi ng’alek ne matinyei kwanda, ong’alaldochi mosoget." 
Isaiah1:18 Obwa anyun, keng’alal, mwaei Jehovah: agot ngo biriren tengekwogikwok, koleelagitu ko u teluchi; agot ngo biriren mising’, koigeitu kororikab kechirek." 
Isaiah1:19 Ngot ochame ak ogase it, oame anyun akwaindab emet:" 
Isaiah1:20 ago ngot oesie ak ongelelse, kebarenok rotwetab chok: amu kagomwa nito kutitab Jehovah." 
Isaiah1:21 Kaegundo ano chepkugoniot nganaset ne ko bo iman, ne kotinyei kiruoget ne bo iman! Komenyei imanda nganasanato, ago nguno komi rumik." 
Isaiah1:22 Kigoigei fedaisieguk michikyigek che kigenendoe feda, kigeburukto divaiguk beek." 
Isaiah1:23 Ngelelik bouniguk, ak ko choronokab chorik; chamei age tugul tugukab kagaigaet, ak kosuboti tuguk che kigeerjin: maibesiechin ne matinyei kwanda, ama kiipchin ichek ng’alekab mosoget." 
Isaiah1:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet ne bo Israel, kole, Haa, anyoru kagaigaet eng’ bunikyuk, ak ayoktochige mugetut eng’ bunikyuk:" 
Isaiah1:25 ak atokyin eunnyu, ak aunde simdang’ung’, ak aiste kibatiniguk tugul:" 
Isaiah1:26 ak aweegu kiruogiguk ko u eng’ tai, ak aweegu kotigoniguk ko u eng’ tai: ye ibata noto keguurenen Nganasetab Imanda, nganaset ne kiyani." 
Isaiah1:27 Tun kitiachi Sion eng’ kiruoget, ak kitiache eng’ imanda bikyik che sigu." 
Isaiah1:28 Ago tun biitu ng’emisietab bistoik ak ne bo kiptengeginik eng’ betut agenge, ak tun kigesu che metoi Jehovah." 
Isaiah1:29 Amu ililandos ichek amu ketik che kiomache, ak kitewerak agobo mbarenik che kiolewen." 
Isaiah1:30 Amu oigeitu ketit ne yaamdos sogekyik, ak mbaret ne matinyei beek." 
Isaiah1:31 Ak koigei che kimen katanisiek che arurendos, ak koigei boisiennyi mat ne iteri; ak kolalyo tuwai, ama biitu ne imisi." 
Isaiah2:1 Ng’olyotab Isaia weritab Amos, ne kigeer agobo Juda ak Jerusalem." 
Isaiah2:1 Ng’olyotab Isaia weritab Amos, ne kigeer agobo Juda ak Jerusalem." 
Isaiah2:2 Kimitu eng’ betusiek che bo let, tulwetab gotab Jehovah eng’ tulonok barak, ak kitorori kosiir tulonok che mengechen; ak tun itendenjin oloto bororiosiek tugul." 
Isaiah2:3 Ak tun itendenjin oloto bik che chang’ kolen, Obwa, kebe ketogoste tulwetab Jehovah, agoi gotab Kamuktaindetab Jakobo; si konetech ortinwekyik, si kebendate ortinwekyik: amu mong’une ng’atutik Sion, ak komong’une ng’olyotab Jehovah Jerusalem." 
Isaiah2:4 Ak koruoksechin inendet bororiosiek, ak koger kong’ bik che chang’: ak kotany rotokwak bo chok koek mogomboik che bo tuga, ak kotany ng’otwekwak koek chepkesok: si ma kobargei bororiosiek, ama konetegei luget kogeny." 
Isaiah2:5 Ee gotab Jakobo, obwa kebendate lapkeiyetab Jehovah." 
Isaiah2:6 Amu kiibagakte biguk, gotab Jakobo, amu kigonyi ichek bitonwekab kong’asis, ak kigoek ichek kipsogeinik ko u Pilistik, ak konamgei eunek koyosiechigei ak lagokab toek." 
Isaiah2:7 Nyiitat emenywa kogeny feda ak tahabu, ama mi ole igesunegei konoraikwak; nyiitat emenywa kogeny mbartanyisiek, ama mi ole igesunegei karisiekwak." 
Isaiah2:8 Nyiitat emenywa kogeny kanamonik; ilosu boisionikab eunekwak, che kiyaei eunekwak." 
Isaiah2:9 Ing’uruksei chito ne nyerat, ak kiming’ini chito ne o: ko u noto anyun amenyochi kaat ichek." 
Isaiah2:10 Chut ruandet, ak iung’ege temburiek, imwee kamuisetab Jehovah, ak eng’ torornatetab etunatennyi." 
Isaiah2:11 Kinyeroti che ieetegei, ak kiming’ini menotetab bik, Jehovah inegei ne tororitu eng’ betunoto." 
Isaiah2:12 Amu tun biitu betutab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, eng’ ichek tugul che mendos ak che ieetigei; ak eng’ ichek tugul che itororigei: ak kiming’ini." 
Isaiah2:13 Ak eng’ taragonik tugul che bo Lebanon, che tororen ak koeetigei, ak eng’ ketik tugul che bo Basan;" 
Isaiah2:14 ak eng’ tulonok tugul che koen, ak eng’ tulonok tugul che kitororitu;" 
Isaiah2:15 ak eng’ teekset age tugul ne koi, ak eng’ irimet age tugul ne ng’otat;" 
Isaiah2:16 ak eng’ melisiek tugul che bo Tarsis, ak eng’ itonwek tugul che kichamei." 
Isaiah2:17 Ak kiming’ini kaeetetab ge ne bo chito, ak kinyeroti menotetab bik: Jehovah inegei ne tororitu betunoto." 
Isaiah2:18 Ak igesugei kanamonik. 
Isaiah2:19 Ak komwechi bik kebenonik che mi ruandosiek, ak keringonik che mi ng’ony, komwee kamuisetab Jehovah, ak eng’ torornatetab etunatennyi, ye kang’eet kotumdum ng’onyuni eng’ kimnatet." 
Isaiah2:20 Laktoi chito kanamonikyik che bo feda betunoto, ak kanamonikyik che bo tahabu, che kigiyachi inendet si kosa, kolaktochi bung’ung’onik ak reresik;" 
Isaiah2:21 si komwechi kebenonik, ak ruandosiek che kibetogis, komwee kamuisetab Jehovah, ak eng’ torornatetab etunatennyi, ye kang’eet kotumdum ng’onyuni eng’ kimnatet." 
Isaiah2:22 Amomang’u chi, ne mi kabusennyi serunekyik: amu tilei nee?" 
Isaiah3:1 Ogeer anyun-o, istoi Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, eng’ Jerusalek ak Juda, tiieywot ak tuguk che kimang’u, koboto amitwogik tugul, ak beek tugul;" 
Isaiah3:2 koboto chito ne kim, ak chitab luget; koboto kiruogindet, ak maotiot, ak chito ne ng’orsei, ak boiyot;" 
Isaiah3:3 koboto kiptaiyatab bik konom, ak chito ne konyitot, ak kiruogindet ak musogindet ne ng’om, ak kipsogeiyot ne ng’om." 
Isaiah3:4 Ak agochi lagok koek bounikwak, ak koboi ichek manyurunik." 
Isaiah3:5 Ak tun kiusei bik, usei age age, ak kous age tugul chitab kokwennyi: ak kosas lakwa boiyo, ak kosas chito ne nyerat chito ne konyitot." 
Isaiah3:6 Ye tun nam chi ng’etab kamet eng’ gotab kwandanyi, kolenji, Egu bounindennyo, amu itinye ngoroik, ak kotebe ng’emisioni eung’ung’:" 
Isaiah3:7 mwaei inendet eng’ betunoto kole, Maegu kanyaindet; amu mami gonnyu amitwogik anan ngoroik: moeeta aek bounindetab bik." 
Isaiah3:8 Amu kogong’emak Jerusalem, ak kogobut Juda: amu kongelelji Jehovah eng’ ng’elyebwekwak ak eng’ boisionikwak, kotach konyekab torornatennyi." 
Isaiah3:9 Baorianjin ichek togochikwak; ak komwaitoi tengekwogikwak ko u Sodom, maunyei. Bwa eng’ sobonwekwak! Amu kagoyaakyigei yaitiet." 
Isaiah3:10 Omwachi ne bo iman olenji, mieitu eng’ inendet: amu amei ichek logoekab boisionikwak." 
Isaiah3:11 Bwa eng’ kiptengekyot! Yaitu eng’ inendet; amu kigochin melektab boisionikab eunekyik. 
Isaiah3:12 Usei lagok bikyuk, ak koboi kwonyik ichek. Ee bikyuk, konin ichiliil bik che indoun, ak kong’em bandab ortinweguk." 
Isaiah3:13 Tononi Jehovah kong’alaldowok, ak kotonon koruokyi bik." 
Isaiah3:14 Chutei Jehovah kiruoget, koruokyin boisiekab bikyik, ak bounikab bikyik: ak kolenji, Okwek che kioam mbaretab sabibuk; mi gorikwok barunenikab kibananok." 
Isaiah3:15 Lyon anyun, si osastoe bikyuk, ak otiech togochikab kibananok? Mwaei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah3:16 Kimwa kogeny Jehovah kole, Amu menioti tibikab Sion, ak kobendoti ko chuulotin kaatwekwak, koberberisiote konyekwak, kobendi ak kokwaisoti, ak kocheiyoti kelyekwak:" 
Isaiah3:17 bire anyun Kiptaiyat tibikab Sion bokbogenetab metowekwak, ak kong’anyei Jehovah ichek koba ach ngor." 
Isaiah3:18 Istoi Kiptaiyat eng’ betunoto kororonindab mugurekwak, ak kwambelelik, ak karik che bo kaatit;" 
Isaiah3:19 munaok, ak karikab eunek ak ngoroik che kitugege;" 
Isaiah3:20 ak chepkuloik, ak sirimwek che bo kelyek, ak angok che iuegei, ak sandugusiekab nyamdutik, ak karik che bo itik;" 
Isaiah3:21 peteinik, ak munaok che kororon che bo serut;" 
Isaiah3:22 ngoroik che kororon che bo tuiyosiek, ak sumotik, ak angok che kitugegei, ak lolonik;" 
Isaiah3:23 kioinik, ak katanit ne kararan, ak chepkuloik, ak angok." 
Isaiah3:24 Ak tun kigeere nyamdutik che anyiny, nunatet: ak kogeere birenet, rogoet; ak kogeere sumeek che iletotin, bosta; ak kogeere anget ne kararan, kuniet ne kigermenegei: ak kogeere kororonindo, soremik." 
Isaiah3:25 Kibare mureniguk rotwetab chok, ak kebar biguk che kimen eng’ luget." 
Isaiah3:26 Ak koririo ormarichokyik ak koteiyo; ak koguber ak kotebe ng’ony. 
Isaiah4:1 Ak tun namei kwonyik tisabu muren agenge eng’ betunoto, kolenji, Kiame amitwogikyok, ak kilaachi ngoroikyok: ago ngeguurtoenech kityo kaineng’ung’; iste tewernatennyo." 
Isaiah4:2 Kororonitu ak kotororitu eng’ betunoto temetab Jehovah, ak ko telunotin ak ko kororon logoekab emet eng’ ichek che kichililso eng’ Israel." 
Isaiah4:3 Ak tun kiguure ne itabanat inendet ne ng’etu eng’ Sion, ak inendet ne ng’etu eng’ Jerusalem, chito age tugul ne kigisir eng’ che soptos eng’ Jerusalem:" 
Isaiah4:4 ye tun kagoundo Jehovah simdab tibikab Sion, ak koundo korotikab Jerusalem eng’ kwenunnyi eng’ tamirmirietab kiruoget, ak eng’ tamirmirietab beelset." 
Isaiah4:5 Ak koyai Jehovah boldet ak iyeto eng’ bet kouur meng’otet tugul ne bo tulwetab Sion, ak mat ne liblibeni, ak ne iluu kemoi: amu tuchei torornatet komugul kit ne kiuure." 
Isaiah4:6 Ak tun biitu emait ne tun kiuure bet eng’ kiptoret, ak koek ole kimwechin, ak ole kiung’egei eng’ usonet ne o ak ropta." 
Isaiah5:1 Ngatienji chamanennyu tiendo ne bo chamanennyu agobo mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk. Kitinyei chamanennyu mbaretab sabibuk eng’ tulwet ne ming’in ne akwai mising’: 
Isaiah5:2 ak kibal keringet koyieme, ak koisto koik eng’ yoto, ak kominji ketik che kororon che bo sabibuk, ak koteech teekset ne koi eng’ kwenut, ak kobal kogeny ole kitue sabibuk eng’ yoto: ak kilen imuchi koi sabibuk, ak kii sabibuk che bo timin." 
Isaiah5:3 Ara anyun, ee, okwek che omenye Jerusalem, ak okwek bikab Juda, asaok ale oruokwa ak mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk." 
Isaiah5:4 Nee ne kita ta keyaei ne siirei, eng’ mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk, ne ma ayai? Amu nee anyun, ye kingalen yiei sabibuk, koi sabibuk che yaachen?" 
Isaiah5:5 Ui anyun nguno; amwawok kit ne aitoi mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk: aistoi ng’otwennyi, si keam; abute irimennyi, si ketiech:" 
Isaiah5:6 ak angem; ma kesabori, ama kesemberi; ago bitos katablelinik ak katok: ang’ate kogeny bolik si mata korobonji." 
Isaiah5:7 Mbaretab sabibuk ne bo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko gotab Israel, ak ketinnyi ne iboiboi inendet ko bikab Juda: ak kiigen kiruoget, ago ogeero, tumdaetab korotik; kiigen imanda, ago ogeero, rirek." 
Isaiah5:8 Bwa eng’ ichek che ituitos gorik, ak mbarenik, kot ko ma komi boroindo, ak kebirjok omeny okwege kwenutab emet!" 
Isaiah5:9 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, agase eng’ itikyuk, kole, Iman, kuberi gorik che chang’, agot che eechen che kororon, che mamenyei chi." 
Isaiah5:10 Amu yiei ekaisiek tamanu che bo mbaretab sabibuk, debeinik aeng’, ak koi keswekab homer, epah agenge." 
Isaiah5:11 Bwa eng’ ichek che ng’eetos karon mising’, kocheng’at maiywek; che eeisei agoi kemoi kwen, kot kobogityo mising’!" 
Isaiah5:12 Ak ketubet ak kibugandet, ak sugutit ne ming’in ak ndurerut, ak maiyek, mi choto igorwekwak: ago maiiti ichek boisietab Jehovah, anan kobwat boisionikab eunekyik." 
Isaiah5:13 Kigeluul anyun bikyuk, amu kibetyi naet: ak barei rubet bikwak che konyitotin, ak barei melelda tuiyenywa." 
Isaiah5:14 Noto anyun, kigobarait oldab che kigobek, ak kigoseng’eng’ ne ma aechin ak kiy: ak chorjingei oloto teegistanywa, ak chang’indanywa, ak etunatenywa, koboto inendet ne igasegei eng’ kwenunywa." 
Isaiah5:15 Kinyeroti chito ne nyerat, ak kiming’ini chito ne o, ak kiabuchi konyekab icheget che ieetegei:" 
Isaiah5:16 ago tororitu Jehovah ne bo lugosiek eng’ kiruoget, ak itabanat eng’ imanda Kamuktaindet, Inendet ne Tilil." 
Isaiah5:17 Yeityo koagetyo arekab kechir ko u eng’ ole cham koagete, ak koam toek ole kigometo che akwaen." 
Isaiah5:18 Bwa eng’ ichek che ichuutune ng’ogisto boroonik che bo buch, ak kochuutu tengekto ko u eng’ rogoetab karit:" 
Isaiah5:19 che mwaei kole, Ingochakta inendet, kochokyi boisiennyi, si kobiit kegeer: ak ingorik konyo kiruogetab Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel, si kobiit kenai!" 
Isaiah5:20 Bwa eng’ ichek che kuure yaitiet mieindo, ak koguure mieindo yaitiet, che igeere mesundeito lapkeiyet, ak kogeer lapkeiyet mesundeito; che igeere ng’wanindo anyinyindo, ak kogeere anyinyindo ng’wanindo!" 
Isaiah5:21 Bwa eng’ ichek che indogei kole ki ng’omen, ak kogeerei kolen utotin!" 
Isaiah5:22 Bwa eng’ ichek che koromen koee divaik, ak murenik che kimen che buruchi maiyek." 
Isaiah5:23 Che iityin kiptengekyot agobo tugukab kagaigaet, ak korebe imanda chito ne bo iman!" 
Isaiah5:24 Noto anyun, ko u ye beelei liblibenetab mat mobek, ak ko u ye igesu liblibenetab mat suswek che yaamnyotin, ko u noto kergeitu tigitikwak ak nunatet, ak kotogosta taptokwak ko u temburiek: amu kigoesio ng’atutikab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak kosas ng’olyotab Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Isaiah5:25 Kilalyo anyun neregekab Jehovah agobo bikyik, ak kiiyogoito eunnyi kogirinda ichek, ak kobir, ak kibotanso tulonok che mengechen, ak kiek muswekwak busagariek eng’ kwenutab ortinwek. Nganda u noto, ko ma istogei neregekyik, ago ta kochuulat eunnyi kora." 
Isaiah5:26 Ak konamji barak songoliet koborji bororiosiek che looen, ak koititenji ichek kobwa eng’ tabanwekab ng’ony: ak ogeero, ruou kochogu:" 
Isaiah5:27 mabiitu eng’ ichek ne ng’etei anan ko ne ibuti; ama mi ne inuuchi, anan ne ruei; ama kitustusi birenet ne rategei, ama ng’etei tapsinietab kweonikwak:" 
Isaiah5:28 che ng’atiben kipchabonikwak, ak ko riigotin kwangokwak tugul; kirogendoi kelyekab mbartanyisiekwak koik che uuen, ak u cheptirokwak kipchurjuriet:" 
Isaiah5:29 u borisenenywa ne bo ng’etundo, borisendos ko u barnotikab ng’etunyik: ee, borisendos, ak konam luulenik, ak komut kochamegei, ama biitu chi ne soru." 
Isaiah5:30 Ak komororji ichek eng’ betunoto ko u mororetab nyanjet: ak ngo keer chi emet, ogeero, mi mesundeito ak bichiindo, ak koimenit lapkeiyet eng’ bolikyik." 
Isaiah6:1 Eng’ kenyit ne kimee laitoriat Usia, ageer Kiptaiyat kotebe ng’echeretab laitornatet, kotoror ak komi barak, ak kinyi ngoriennyi hekalut." 
Isaiah6:2 Kitonondos serapik eng’ baragunnyi: kitinyei age tugul kebebaik lo; kituge aeng’ togennyi, kotuge aeng’ kelyekyik, ak kitirirene aeng’." 
Isaiah6:3 Ak kitwekyi age age kolenji, Tilil, tilil, tilil, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: nyiitat ng’ony komugul torornatennyi." 
Isaiah6:4 Ak kiitumdumgei lumeiywekab tugatugikab kurget amu tugetab inendet ne kitwek, ak kinyi got iyeto." 
Isaiah6:5 Kiale anyun, Bwa ane! Amu kaabet; amu a chi ne tinyei kutit ne ng’wan, ak kimeng’isiei ak bik che ng’wonen kutuswek: amu kaageer Laitoriat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah6:6 Kitirirenja anyun age eng’ serapik, kotinyei ng’etetiot eng’ eunnyi, ne kiinemune kanameiywot eng’ kaptisisiet." 
Isaiah6:7 Ak kitwae kutinnyu, ak kole, Keero, kagotwa kuting’ung’ nito; ak kageisto ng’ogistang’ung’, ak kagiundo tengektang’ung’." 
Isaiah6:8 Ak kiagas kutitab Kiptaiyat kolen, Ayokte ng’o, ng’o ne wendi agobo achek? Kiale anyun, Ami yu; iyokta." 
Isaiah6:9 Ak kile, Ui, ak imwachi bichu ilenji, Ogase iman, ago moguitosi; ak ogeere iman, ago monae." 
Isaiah6:10 Yai mugulelwekab bichu konyigisitu, ak kotimogis itikwak, ak kogerogis konyekwak, si mageertoe konyekwak, ama kastoe itikwak, anan koguiyo eng’ mugulelwekwak, ak kowalogis, ak kisoob." 
Isaiah6:11 Kiateebe anyun, ale, Ee Kiptaiyat, tianitu? Ak kiwol kole, Agoi tun koguber nganasok, ak koguber gorik, ak koek emet kipkubere mising’." 
Isaiah6:12 Ko kagouto Jehovah bik koba ole loo, ak kochang’a emotinwek che kigemeto eng’ emet." 
Isaiah6:13 Ak ngot ko ta komi kebeberta agenge eng’ taman, keamei kogeny: ko u ketit ne kiguure teil, ak ketit age, che ng’etu musugikwak ye kageeb; u noto, iyotet ne tilil ko tigitikyik." 
Isaiah7:1 Eng’ betusiekab Ahas weritab Jotam, weritab Usia, laitoriatab Juda, kotogosta Resin Jerusalem laitoriatab Suria, ak Peka weritab Remalia, laitoriatab Israel, kolen kobargei; ago ma imuch koterter." 
Isaiah7:2 Ak kigimwachi gotab Daudi, kelenji, Kanamgei Suria ak Epraim. Ak kibotan muguleldanyi, ak mugulelwekab bikyik, ko u ye itumdumi usonet ketikab osnet." 
Isaiah7:3 Kimwachi anyun Jehovah Isaia kolenji, Ui anyun otuiye ak Ahas, inye ak Sear- jasub wering’ung’, otuiyechi ole igesunegei kererjetab tamboiyot ne bo meto, ne mi oret ne o ne bo koretab mwetindet;" 
Isaiah7:4 ak ilenji inendet, Ripge, ak isis; ameiyweisie, anan kotanui muguleldang’ung’, amu katutoichu aeng’ che bo kegenganik che iyendos, amu neregek che ng’wonen che bo Resin ak Suria, ak che bo weritab Remalia." 
Isaiah7:5 Amu kagochaamin Suria, koboto Epraim, ak weritab Remalia, kolenjigei," 
Isaiah7:6 Ongetogoste kebarge ak Juda, ak kinyalil ak keluuljige, si kinde laitoriat, noto weritab Tabeel:"
