Isaiah7:7 kamwa ko u ni Kiptaiyat Jehovah, kole, Matononi nito, ama yaoksei." 
Isaiah7:8 Amu metitab Suria ko Damasko, ak metitab Damasko ko Resin: ak ye tom kogesgei kenyisiek tamanwogik lo ak mut, ko tonaksei Eprain si ma ko bororiet:" 
Isaiah7:9 ak metitab Epraim ko Samaria, ak metitab Samaria ko weritab Remalia. Ngot ko moyan, ko magigimitok iman." 
Isaiah7:10 Ak king’alalji Jehovah Ahas kogeny kolenji," 
Isaiah7:11 Som Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ kaborunet; som agot ngo mitei riret, anan ngot komi barak mising’." 
Isaiah7:12 Ago kimwa Ahas kole, Masome, amatieme Jehovah." 
Isaiah7:13 Ak kimwa kole, Ogas anyun, ee gotab Daudi; tos kit ne ming’in eng’ okwek ogochi bik kong’etyo, kot ogochi Kamuktaindennyu kong’et agine?" 
Isaiah7:14 Konok anyun Kiptaiyat inendet kaborunet; ogeero, manachi bergeiyat, ak kosich werit, ak koguure kainennyi Imanuel." 
Isaiah7:15 Amei inendet mwaitab chego ak kumik, ye kagonai koesio yaitiet, ak kolewen ne mie." 
Isaiah7:16 Amu kotom konai lakwet koesio ne ya, ak kolewen ne mie, kemetoi emet ne iweche laitorinikyik tuwai." 
Isaiah7:17 Ibun Jehovah, ak koipchi biguk, ak gotab kwandang’ung’, betusiek che tom kobiit, koboch betut ne kiistoegei Epraim Juda; noto laitoriatab Asuria." 
Isaiah7:18 Ak eng’ betunoto koititenji Jehovah kalyang’et ne mi tabanwek che looen che bo ainosiekab Misri, ak koititenji segemiat ne mi emetab Asuria." 
Isaiah7:19 Ak kobwa, ak komuuny tugul eng’ atebwosiek che kigoek surkwen, ak eng’ ole kigobetak eng’ ruandosiek, ak eng’ katok tugul, ak eng’ ola tugul ole kiyagisie." 
Isaiah7:20 Inemu metit Jehovah eng’ betunoto eng’ rotwet ne kialei, ne mi komoswekab Ainet bitonin, koboto laitoriatab Asuria, inemu metit ak kororikab kelyek: ak konem kogeny tamnet koges." 
Isaiah7:21 Ak eng’ betunoto, koyagi chito roriat ak kechirek aeng’;" 
Isaiah7:22 amu tun konu icheget chego che chang’, tun amei inendet mwaitab chego: amu tun amei age tugul ne kang’et eng’ emet, mwaitab chego ak kumik." 
Isaiah7:23 Ak tun biitu eng’ betunoto katablelinik ak katok eng’ komosta age tugul, eng’ ole kimi ketikab sabibuk elfut agenge che yamegei ak fedaisiek elfut." 
Isaiah7:24 Wendi chito oloto kotinyei kipchabonik ak kwanget: amu egu emonoto tugul katablelinik ak katok. 
Isaiah7:25 Morikyini betunoto tulonok tugul che mengechen che kigibat, amu oiywei katablelinik ak katok, ago egu ole kiyage tuga, ak ole tiechei kechirek." 
Isaiah8:1 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Ipchige kit ne o ne kisirei, ak isire kalamitab chito, Agobo Maer-salal-hasbas;" 
Isaiah8:2 si kobiit acheng’jige baorinik che kiyani, kosir tuguk che biitu, Uria tisiindet, ak Sekaria weritab Jeberekia." 
Isaiah8:3 Kiawe anyun oldab chebioset ne maotio; ak kimanach, ak kosich werit. Kilenja Jehovah anyun, Tochi kainennyi Maer-salal-hasbas." 
Isaiah8:4 Amu kotom komuch lakwanato kotwek kole, Baba, ak Eiyo, koluulei laitoriatab Asuria magornatosiekab Damasko ak barunenikab Samaria." 
Isaiah8:5 Ak king’alalwa Jehovah kogeny, kole," 
Isaiah8:6 Amu kiesio bichu beekab Siloa che rootei mutyo, ak koboiboitune Resin ak weritab Remalia;" 
Isaiah8:7 keero, ipchin anyun Kiptaiyat ichek beekab Ainet, che chang’ che kimen, noto ko laitoriatab Asuria koboto torornatennyi tugul: ak kotogosyi inendet ainosiekyik tugul, ak kosiir ngegusiekyik tugul:" 
Isaiah8:8 ak kobokto kwo Juda; ak koyom kosiir oloto; nyiiei kot koit kaatit; ak konyiiei kaiitoetab kebebaikyik tebeesindab emeng’ung’, ee Imanuel." 
Isaiah8:9 Owaach, ee bororiosiechu, si kobiit ketonatonak; ak oeb it, ee okwek tugul che o bo emotinwek che looen: ogermenge, si ketonatonak; ogermenge anyun, si ketonatonak." 
Isaiah8:10 Oruoch tugul, si koek buch; omwa ng’olyot, ama tononi: amu mi Kamuktaindet kobotech." 
Isaiah8:11 Amu king’alalwa Jehovah ko u noto eng’ eut ne kim, ak kotigona si mawendate ortinwekab bichu, kole," 
Isaiah8:12 Amomwa ole, Chaamset, agobo tugul che mwaei bichu kole, Chaamset; amoiywei kit ne iywei icheget, anan oarogen." 
Isaiah8:13 Amu Jehovah ne bo lugosiek inegei ne ogonyiti; ak ingoek inendet ne oiywei, ak koek inendet ne konok oiyweisie." 
Isaiah8:14 Ak koek inendet ole tilil; ago egu koita ne inachi bich ak ruandet ne riichei bich eng’ gorik tuwai che bo Israel, koek mestet ak mestet age ne ter eng’ bik che menyei Jerusalem." 
Isaiah8:15 Kinachi che chang’ eng’ oloto, ak kobutyo, ak koilyo, ak kename mestet, ak kimut." 
Isaiah8:16 Rat anyun baornatet, ng’och ng’atutik eng’ kwenutab alamalyennyu." 
Isaiah8:17 Si agen Jehovah, ne unyei togennyi si mageer gotab Jakobo, ak amang’u inendet." 
Isaiah8:18 Ogeero, ane ak lagok che kigona Jehovah ko ki kaborunoik ak kwong’utik eng’ tugul, che bunu Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne menyei tulwetab Sion." 
Isaiah8:19 Ak ye mwawok kole, Ocheng’ate ichek che boisie oik ak bonik, che twegu ko u taritik ak che nyeanyei ng’alek: tos manyoljin bik kocheng’ Kamuktaindenywa? Tos nyoljin kocheng’at che kigobek agobo che soptos?" 
Isaiah8:20 Onamge ak ng’atutik ak baornatet! Ngot ko mang’alal ichek kosub ng’olyondonito, ko amu mami lapkeiyet eng’ ichek." 
Isaiah8:21 Ak tun siirtoe yoto, konyalildos ak koamei rubet: ak ye tun kaam rubet, konerekso, ak kosas laitoriandenywa ak Kamuktaindenywa, ak konyal barak:" 
Isaiah8:22 ak kogeer ng’ony, ak ogeero, mi bichiindo ak mesundeito, mesundeito ne bo ndara; ak keonji ichek mesundeito ne o." 
Isaiah9:1 Ago mami mesundeito eng’ emet ne kitinyei bichiindo. Eng’ betusiek che bo tai, ko kiipchi sasisiet emetab Sebulun ak emetab Naptali, ago kiitoror eng’ betusiek che bo let, oretab nyanjet, Jordan bitonin, Galili ne bo bororiosiek." 
Isaiah9:2 Kogogeer lapkeiyet ne o bik che kibendote mesundeito: kogoluuchi lapkeiyet ichek che kimenyei emetab uruetab meet. 
Isaiah9:3 Kiites bororiet, kiites boiboiyenywa: boiboitu eng’ taing’ung’ ko u boiboiyet ne bo kesisiet, ko u bik che boiboitu ye pchei barunenik." 
Isaiah9:4 Amu koiiri chogitab lautiennyi, ak siaritab tigikyiennyi, ak kiroktab usindennyi, ko u eng’ betusiekab Midian." 
Isaiah9:5 Amu kibeelei karik tugul che bo chitab luget eng’ wasetab ge, ak ngoroik che kiisegei korotik, koek che laldos." 
Isaiah9:6 Amu kagisikwech lakwet, kagigonech werit; ak ting’e inendet bounatet tigikyiennyi: ak kiguure kainennyi Kwong’utiet, Kiruogindet, Kamuktaindet ne bo Kamuktaet, Kwanda ne bo Koigeny, Bounindetab Kalyet." 
Isaiah9:7 Mami ole igesunegei tesetab ge ne bo bounatennyi ak kalyet, eng’ ng’echeret ne bo laitornatetab Daudi, ak laitornatennyi, si kogimit, ak koboi eng’ kiruoget ak imanda koboch nguno agoi koigeny. Yaei nito kagiiletab ge ne bo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah9:8 Kiiyokyi Kiptaiyat Jakobo ng’olyot, ak kobutyi Israel." 
Isaiah9:9 Ak konai bik tugul, agot Epraim ak ne menyei Samaria, che mwaei eng’ menotet ak eng’ muguleldo ne ichaugei," 
Isaiah9:10 Kagobutyo matabaruk, ago kiteege koik che kiwaei: kigiluul mogoonik, ago kigeere taragonik." 
Isaiah9:11 Noto anyun ing’eeti Jehovah bounikab Resin, kogirinda inendet, ak kogiil bunikyik." 
Isaiah9:12 Ing’eeti Suriek eng’ tai, ak Pilistik eng’ let; ak koam Israel eng’ kutit ne iseng’eng’at. Nganda u noto, ko ma istogei neregekyik, ago ta ko chuulat eunnyi kora." 
Isaiah9:13 Nganda u noto ko ma weekyigei bik inendet ne kibir ichek, ama cheng’ Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah9:14 Tilei anyun Jehovah metit ak katutiet eng’ Israel, ebei temetab sosiot ak mutwot betunak." 
Isaiah9:15 Metit ko boiyot ne konyitot; ak katutiet ko maotiot ne ineti lembechek. 
Isaiah9:16 Amu ibeeti bichu icheget che indochin ak keng’emei ichek che kindochin. 
Isaiah9:17 Maboiboitu Jehovah eng’ murenikwak, ama rire chechuak che matinyei kwanda ak mosogikwak: amu ya age tugul, ak ko yaindetab yaitiet, ak komwaei kutit age tugul abusnatet. Nganda u noto, ko ma istogei neregekyik, ago ta ko chuulat eunnyi kora." 
Isaiah9:18 Amu lalei yaitiet ko u mat; igesu katablelinik ak katok: ee, lalei eng’ osnet ne o, ak koiyen iyeto ne o ne u bolik che nyigisen." 
Isaiah9:19 Kigolal emet eng’ neregekab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: kagoigei bik kwenik che kilaali; marire chi ng’etab kamet. 
Isaiah9:20 Wiriti age eng’ komostab eutab tai, ak koamei rubet; ak koam eng’ komostab eutab katam, ama biyong’dos ichek: amei chi age tugul banyekab eunnyi:" 
Isaiah9:21 amei Manase Epraim; ak amei Epraim Manase: ak kogirindoi ichek tuwai Juda. Nganda u noto, ko ma istogei neregekyik, ago ta ko chuulat eunnyi kora." 
Isaiah10:1 Bwa eng’ ichek che ng’atei ng’atutik che ma bo iman, ak eng’ ichek che sirei kamaaset:" 
Isaiah10:2 kobeet ne nyalili eng’ kiruoget, ak korebe imanit kibananokab bikyuk, si kobiit koek mosogik barunenikwak, ak si kobiit koluul che matinyei kwanda!" 
Isaiah10:3 Ak oyae nee eng’ betut ne ityinok bireng’wong’, ak eng’ ng’emisiet ne bunu ole loo? Omwechini ng’o kotoretok? Ak ondoi ano torornateng’wong’?" 
Isaiah10:4 Ing’urukyin ichek kimonjororinik, ak kobutyi ole kigibarji bik. Nganda u noto, ko ma istogei neregekyik, ago ta ko chuulat eunnyi kora." 
Isaiah10:5 Bwa Asuriaindet, kiroktab neregekyuk, siaritab inendet ne mi neregekyuk eunnyi!" 
Isaiah10:6 Ayoktoi kobargei ak bororiet ne ya, ak agochini kobargei ak bik che anerekyini, si koluul ak koib barunenik, ak ketiech ichek, ko u ye kitiechi ng’atatek eng’ oret." 
Isaiah10:7 Ago maibwati ko u noto, ama mi muguleldanyi ko u noto; ago machei muguleldanyi kong’emis, ak kowong’ bororiosiek che chang’." 
Isaiah10:8 Amu kimwa kole, Tos, ma laitorinik bounikyuk tugul?" 
Isaiah10:9 Tos, ma u Kalno Karkemis? Tos, ma u Hamat Arpad? Tos, ma u Samaria Damasko?" 
Isaiah10:10 Ko u ye kagonyor eunnyu bounatosiekab kanamonik, che siirei itonwekwak che kigiwai, che bo Jerusalem ak che bo Samaria;" 
Isaiah10:11 tos mayachini Jerusalem ak kanamonikyik ko u ye kiayachi Samaria ak kanamonikyik? 
Isaiah10:12 Noto anyun ye tun kagoyai Kiptaiyat boisiennyi komugul eng’ tulwetab Sion ak eng’ Jerusalem, abir anyun logoekab menotetab muguleldo ne bo laitoriatab Asuria, ak torornatetab kachaunennyi bo ge." 
Isaiah10:13 Amu kigomwa kole, Kiayai nito eng’ kimnatetab eunnyu, ak eng’ ng’omnatennyu; amu a ng’om; ak kiaiste kiwotosiekab bororiosiek, ak kiarebe konoraikwak, ak kiaming’in ichek che tebe ng’echerokab laitornatet, ko u chito ne nyigan:" 
Isaiah10:14 ak kigonyor eunnyu magornatosiekab bororiosiek ko u keswetab taritiet; ak ko u ye iyumi chito koik che kigelakta, che bo ngogaik, kiayum ko u noto ng’ony komugul: ak ma biit ne kibirabirto kebepchet, anan ne kitwek, anan ne kiite." 
Isaiah10:15 Tos ichaugei aiywet eng’ inendet ne ebisie? Tos ieetegei musumenet eng’ inendet ne tilisie? Ko u nda itumdumi kirokto ne namei, anan nda namjin barak siarit inendet ne ma ketit." 
Isaiah10:16 Igochin anyun Kiptaiyat, Kiptaiyat ne bo lugosiek, bikyik che neriotin kosagityo; ak tun biitu liblibenet ne u ne bo mat ne lalei, ne kigeere torornatennyi." 
Isaiah10:17 Ak koek mat lapkeiyetab Israel, ak koek nenyi Ne Tilil liblibenetab mat, ak kobeel kwong’ katokyik ak katablelinikyik betunak." 
Isaiah10:18 Ak kobeel inendet torornatetab osnennyi, ak ne bo mbarennyi ne rurei, koboto sobondo ak borto: ak koek ko u ye tanui inendet ne iboti songoliet." 
Isaiah10:19 Ak kong’ering’itu ketik che ng’etu che bo osnennyi, kot komuch lakwa koiit." 
Isaiah10:20 Ak eng’ betunoto ko ma kotiiegei kogeny che king’et eng’ Israel, ak ichek che kichililyo eng’ gotab Jakobo, inendet ne kibirei ichek; ago tiiegei Jehovah iman, Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Isaiah10:21 Weekyingei Kamuktaindet ne bo kamuktaet, ichek che king’et, agot ichek che king’et che bo Jakobo." 
Isaiah10:22 Agot nganda u biguk che bo Israel ng’aniek che bo nyanjet, koweeksei bik che ng’etu kityo eng’ ichek: kigeng’at kagesunet eng’ ichek, ne ng’elyektoi eng’ imanda." 
Isaiah10:23 Amu yaei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, kagesunet ne kigeng’at, eng’ kwenutab ng’ony tugul." 
Isaiah10:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, kole, Ee bikyuk che menyei Sion, amoiywei Asuria: nganda birin eng’ kirokto, ak konamjin barak agobo inye, ko u biteetab Misri." 
Isaiah10:25 Amu ta komi kitigin mising’, si kosulda neregek, neregekyuk eng’ ng’emisienywa." 
Isaiah10:26 Ak kong’eetyi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek inendet biret, ko u barisietab Midianik eng’ ruandetab Oreb: ak tun bou kiroktanyi nyanjet, ak konamji barak ko u biteetab Misri." 
Isaiah10:27 Ak eng’ betunoto, koistoegei tigikyieng’ung’ lautiennyi, ak koistoegei kaating’ung’ choginnyi, ak keng’em chogit amu kaiilet." 
Isaiah10:28 Kagoit Aiat, kagosiir Migron; kagonore tugukyik Mikmas:" 
Isaiah10:29 kagoba kosiir ole kibunei; kagoru Geba: botani Rama; kamwei Gibea ne bo Saul. 
Isaiah10:30 Waach mising’, ee cheptab Galim! Eb it, ee Laisha! Ee inye kibananiat Anatot!" 
Isaiah10:31 Kamwei Madmena; iyumigei bik che menyei Gebim si komwei. 
Isaiah10:32 Tonone Nob eng’ betuni bo rani: ing’wereri tulwetab cheptab Sion, tulwetab Jerusalem." 
Isaiah10:33 Ogeero, tun ebei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, temenik eng’ kamuiset: ak kiluulei che koen, ak kinyeroti che ieetegei." 
Isaiah10:34 Ak koluule inendet karik osnet ne o, ak koluul Lebanon inendet ne kim." 
Isaiah11:1 Ak komong’une temet oretab Jesii, ak koi logoek temet ne biitune tigitikyik:" 
Isaiah11:2 ak kotebe inendet Tamirmirietab Jehovah, tamirmirietab ng’omnatet ak kaguiyet, tamirmirietab kiruoget ak kimnatet, tamirmirietab naet ak kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah." 
Isaiah11:3 Ak komi boiboiyennyi kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah: amairuochi ko u ye keerei, ama kerei kong’ ko u ye kasei;" 
Isaiah11:4 ago iruoksechin kibananok eng’ imanda, ak koger kong’ che taloen che bo ng’ony eng’ imanda: ak kobir ng’onyuni eng’ kiroktab kutinnyi, ak kobare kiptengeginik kabusennyi." 
Isaiah11:5 Ak egu imanda birenet ne rategei, ak koek kayanet ne kiyani birenet ne rategei." 
Isaiah11:6 Ak kotebi suiyot koboto aruetab kechir, ak koruiyo cheblanget ak aruetab ng’oror; ak koruiyo moita ak ng’etundo barnotiot ak ne akwai; ak kokweri ichek lakwet ne ming’in." 
Isaiah11:7 Ak koaget teta ak tiondo ne u keerit; ruitos moekwak tugul: ak koam ng’etundo suswek ko u teta. 
Isaiah11:8 Ak kourerene lakwet ne reriei keringetab erenet, ak konde lakwet ne kageluge eunnyi kebenetab erenet." 
Isaiah11:9 Ma ito kiy chi anan kong’emis eng’ tulwennyu tugul ne tilil: amu nyiiei ng’ony naetab Jehovah ko u ye nyiiei beek nyanjet. 
Isaiah11:10 Ak cheng’ei bororiosiek eng’ betunoto tigitiotab Jesii, ne tononi koegu songolietab bik; ak egu torornatet ole imuung’e." 
Isaiah11:11 Ak eng’ betunoto koyogoito Kiptaiyat eunnyi kogeny ne bo aeng’, kosor bikyik che tun ng’etu, eng’ Asuria, ak eng’ Misri, ak eng’ Patros, ak eng’ Kus, ak eng’ Elam, ak eng’ Sinar, ak eng’ Hamat, ak eng’ emotinwek che mi ngegusiek." 
Isaiah11:12 Ak kolumda songoliet agobo bororiosiek, ak koyum che kigitimda che bo Israel, ak koyum che kiyesta che bo Juda eng’ luukwek ang’wan che bo ng’ony." 
Isaiah11:13 Ak koistogei ng’et kondab Epraim kogeny, ak keisto ichek che inyalili Juda: ak maamei ng’etkong’ Epraim agobo Juda, amainyalili Juda Epraim." 
Isaiah11:14 Ak kobokyi tigigoikab Pilistik eng’ cherongo; ak koluul ichek tuwai bikab kong’asis: chuulei eunekwak kogirinda Edom ak Moab; ak kogas it ichek lagokab Amon. 
Isaiah11:15 Ak kong’em Jehovah kowong’ ng’elyeptab nyanjetab Misri; ak kotwaitwai eunnyi kotokyi Ainet eng’ usonennyi ne beelsei, ak kobir kobiitune ainosiek tisabu, ak kogochi bik kolanda kolaagoti kweonik." 
Isaiah11:16 Ak kobiit oret ne o ne bo bikyik che tun ng’etu eng’ Asuria; ko u ye kimi agobo Israel eng’ betut ne kitogosu komong’une emetab Misri. 
Isaiah12:1 Ak eng’ betunoto imwae ile, Aweegun kongoi, ee Jehovah; agot nganda kiinerekya, ko kageisto neregeguk, ak igoigoa." 
Isaiah12:2 Ogeero, Kamuktaindet ko yetunennyu; amang’u ama aiyweisiei: amu Jehovah JEHOVAH ko kimnatennyu ak ko tiendanyu; ak kagoek inendet yetunennyu." 
Isaiah12:3 Tun orame anyun beek eng’ boiboiyet, eng’ keringonik che bo yetunet." 
Isaiah12:4 Ak omwae eng’ betunoto ole, Oweekyi Jehovah kongoi, oguur kainennyi, omwaite boisionikyik eng’ bororiosiek, omwa ole kagotororit kainennyi." 
Isaiah12:5 Otienji Jehovah; amu kigoyai tuguk che bo telunatet: ingonaak nito eng’ ng’ony komugul. 
Isaiah12:6 Owaach mising’ ak otiense, inye ne imenye Sion: amu o Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Isaiah13:1 Lautietab Babulon, ne kigeer Isaia weritab Amos." 
Isaiah13:1 Lautietab Babulon, ne kigeer Isaia weritab Amos." 
Isaiah13:2 Olumde songoliet eng’ tulwet ne churat, owaakyi, ong’werer, si kobiit komandae ormarichokab bik che toogunotin." 
Isaiah13:3 Koang’at bikyuk che itabanotin, ee, koaguur bikyuk che kimen agobo neregekyuk, chechuget che igasegei etunatennyu." 
Isaiah13:4 Bolatetab tuiyet eng’ tulonok, ne u ne bo bororiet ne o! Bolatetab wasetab ge ne bo bounatosiekab bororiosiek che kaiyumgei! Iyumi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek luget agobo boriet." 
Isaiah13:5 Bunu ichek emet ne loo, ole boch tabandab kipsengwet, inendet Jehovah koboto karikab neregekyik, si kobiit kong’em emet komugul." 
Isaiah13:6 Oteiye; amu kagorik betutab Jehovah; nyonei ko u ng’emisiet ne bunu Inendet ne ko Kamuktaet. 
Isaiah13:7 Nyaluldos anyun eunek tugul, ak kochoot muguleldab chi age tugul:" 
Isaiah13:8 ak kotoptobenso; ak konam ichek ng’woninwek ak arogenosiek; nyoru ng’wanindo ko u kwondo ne amei moet: ak kokwong’e age age; ak koigei togochikwak togochikab liblibenetab mat. 
Isaiah13:9 Ogeero, nyonei betutab Jehovah, ne korom, koboto nereknatet ak neregek che ng’wonen; si kobiit koyai emet koguber, ak kong’em kiptengeginik koges eng’ yoto." 
Isaiah13:10 Amu ma kogonu kecheikab kipsengwet ak kecheikyik che iyumigei lapkeiyenywa: imenitu asista komachei kochor, ak ma koluu arawet agine." 
Isaiah13:11 Ak abir ng’ony amu yaitiennyi, ak abir kiptengeginik amu tengektanywa; ak awong’u menotetab che mendos, ak anyeroti menotetab che imuisei." 
Isaiah13:12 Ayae chito koek ne kicheng’ei kosiir tahabu che kororon, chito ne siirei tahabu che tililen che bo Opir." 
Isaiah13:13 Ayae anyun kipsengwetisiek kobotan, ak kitumdum ng’ony koistogei eng’ komostanyi, eng’ nereknatetab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak eng’ betutab neregekyik che ng’wonen." 
Isaiah13:14 Ak koweekyigei chi age tugul bikyik ko u cheptirgichet ne kionei, ak ko u kechirek che maiyumi chi, ak komwei chi age tugul kwo emennyi." 
Isaiah13:15 Kitoorei age tugul ne kinyoru; ak kibare rotwetab chok age tugul ne kinamei. 
Isaiah13:16 Kitonatoni lagokwak kogeerei; kiluulei gorikwak, ak kesuub osotikwak." 
Isaiah13:17 Ogeero, ang’eeti Medik koba kobargei ak ichek, che maiiti feda kole kiy, ama boiboitune ichek tahabu." 
Isaiah13:18 Ak kotonaton kwangokwak murenik; ama tinyei rirge eng’ che kisichei; marire lagok. 
Isaiah13:19 Ak ko u ye kiigabui Kamuktaindet Sodom ak Gomora, koigeitu noto Babulon, ne inendet ko torornatetab bounatosiek, ne kororonindab menotetab Kaldeik." 
Isaiah13:20 Ma komenyei bik kogeny, ama menyei chi kong’eete ibinda agoi ibinda: ama teechei Marabuk emaisiek eng’ oloto; amaiyagisie oloto mestowek." 
Isaiah13:21 Ago tebe oloto tiong’ik che bo ong’atet; ak konyi gorikwak tiong’ik che irigendos: menyei oloto tiong’ikab songolik, ak kourerense oloto kwesik." 
Isaiah13:22 Ak koteiyo suik eng’ irimoikwak, ak koteiyo lelwek eng’ gorikwak che kororon che bo laitorinik: ak kagorik betunnyi, ama ketesei betusiekyik." 
Isaiah14:1 Amu rire Jehovah Jakobo, ak ta koleweni Israel, ak konde ichek emenywa: ak konamgei toondet agichek, ak konamgei ak gotab Jakobo." 
Isaiah14:2 Ak komut bororiosiek ichek agoi oldanywa: ak kobunji gotab Israel bichoto eng’ emetab Jehovah, koek otwogik ak tibik che otwogik: ak koluul Israel ichek che kiga luul ichek; ak koboi usikwak." 
Isaiah14:3 Ak eng’ betut ne konin Jehovah kamuung’et eng’ arogeneng’ung’, ak eng’ nyalindang’ung’, ak eng’ otisiet ne uui ne kigibirjin," 
Isaiah14:4 imwa kalewenoni agobo laitoriatab Babulon, ile, Ha-a, kigowong’gei usindet! Kigowong’gei koromnatet!" 
Isaiah14:5 Kigoiri Jehovah kirokta kiptengeginik, siaritab bounik;" 
Isaiah14:6 che kibir bororiosiek eng’ neregek eng’ biretab kotugul, che kiboi bororiosiek eng’ neregek, eng’ usisiet ne ma kirinda chi." 
Isaiah14:7 Mi kamuung’et ng’ony komugul, ak komi kalyet: tiendos." 
Isaiah14:8 Ee, boiboitu biribirinik eng’ inye, ak taragonikab Lebanon, kolen, Koboch ngab iru, ko ma ebech chi." 
Isaiah14:9 Kagotumdumgei oldab che kigobek eng’ orit kotorogun ye inyone: ing’eetun bik che kigobek, agot bik che eechen che bo ng’ony; kagong’eet laitorinik tugul che bo bororiosiek koistoegei ng’echerokwak che bo laitornatet." 
Isaiah14:10 Wolun tugul kolenjinin, Tos keegu ne nyalulat ko u achek? Keige achek?" 
Isaiah14:11 Kagichorta etunateng’ung’ kwo oldab che kigobek, koboto cheetab kibugandiniguk: isiebe kutik, ak kotuchin kutik." 
Isaiah14:12 Ha-a, kaibut eng’ kipsengwet, ee, inye, kecheiyatab bet, weritab karon! Ha-a, kagiebin ibut, inye ne kiinyerat bororiosiek!" 
Isaiah14:13 Ak kiimwa eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile, Atogostoi kipsengwet, atorori ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet kosiir kecheikab Kamuktaindet; ak atebe tulwetab tuiyet, eng’ komoswek che looen che bo murot ne bo katam." 
Isaiah14:14 Atogostoi asiir bolik; aigeitu Inendet ne Toror Mising’. 
Isaiah14:15 Ago anyun, kichoortoin iwe oldab che kigobek, agoi komoswek che looen che bo keringet." 
Isaiah14:16 Injururin che keerin, kobwatin kole, Tos chichito ne kiigochi ng’ony kobotan, chichito ne kiitumdum bounatosiek;" 
Isaiah14:17 ne kiyai ng’ony koek ong’atet, ak koluul nganasokyik; ne ma itiach kimonjororinikyik koba gorikwak?" 
Isaiah14:18 Ruitos laitorinik tugul che bo bororiosiek, ruitos ichek tugul eng’ torornatet, ruei age tugul eng’ gonnyi." 
Isaiah14:19 Ago kagiwirjin sang’ eng’ kerering’ung’ ko u temet ne kiwechei, ko u ngoroikab che kigibar, che kigitoore rotwetab chok, che rektoi agoi koikab keringet; ko u musto ne kitiechei." 
Isaiah14:20 Motuitosi koboto ichek eng’ tubet, amu kiing’em emeng’ung’, kiibar biguk; ma kemwaei koigeny iyotetab bik che yaei yaitio." 
Isaiah14:21 Ochopchi lagokyik barisiet amu ng’ogistab kwanisiekwak; si mang’eetyo, ak konam ng’ony kobunji, ak konyiit nganasok ng’onyuni." 
Isaiah14:22 Ak ang’eet agirinde ichek, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak aiste eng’ Babulon kainet ak che king’et, ak werit, ak weritab werit, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah14:23 Ak agochi komeny emonoto chepswererinik, ak tamboinikab beek: ak abuge kabugoitab ng’emisiet, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah14:24 Kigoyosyo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, kole, Ko u ye kiabwat iman, ko yaaksei ko u noto; ak ko u ye kiachob, kotebyei ko u noto:" 
Isaiah14:25 ale atonatoni Asuriek eng’ emennyu, ak atiech eng’ tulonokyuk: koistoegei eng’ ichek choginnyi, ak koistoegei lautiennyi tigikyienywa." 
Isaiah14:26 Nito chobet ne kigechob agobo ng’ony komugul: ak ni ko eut ne kigichuulji bororiosiek tugul. 
Isaiah14:27 Amu kigochob Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ko tos ng’o ne walei koek buch? Ak chuulat eunnyi, ko tos ng’o ne arunyi?" 
Isaiah14:28 Kibiit lautioni eng’ kenyit ne kimee laitoriat Ahas. 
Isaiah14:29 Amebaibaitu, ee Pilistia, inye tugul, amu kagoil kirokto ne kibirin: amu mong’une tigitiotab ndaret erenet, ak egu iyotennyi erenet ne tirireni, ne u mat." 
Isaiah14:30 Ak koamis taiywek che bo kibananok, ak koruiyo eng’ chametab ge che matinyei kiy: ak abare rubet tigitiondeng’ung’, ak kebar cheguk che ng’etu." 
Isaiah14:31 Itee, ee ormarichet; rir, ee nganaset; kaichoot, ee Pilistia, inye tugul; amu mong’une iyeto murot ne bo katam, ama tononi chi inegei eng’ betusiekyik che kiging’at." 
Isaiah14:32 Kiwoljin nee anyun bik che kiyoktoi, che bo bororiet? Kele, Kagolumda Jehovah Sion, ak komwechi oloto bikyik che kigius." 
Isaiah15:1 Lautietab Moab. Amu king’emei Ar ne bo Moab eng’ kemout agenge, kiwong’; amu king’emei Kir ne bo Moab eng’ kemout agenge, kiwong’." 
Isaiah15:2 Katogosta Bayit, ak Dibon, kot koit komoswek che tororen, koba korir: rirjin Moab Nebo, ak eng’ Mediba: mi boswek metowekwak, kigetil tamnet age tugul." 
Isaiah15:3 Kermenegei kuniok eng’ ortinwekwak: iteei age tugul ak korirei mising’, eng’ gorikwak barak, ak eng’ komoswekwak che baraen." 
Isaiah15:4 Ak rirei Hesbon, ak Eleale; kigasei kutuswekwak eng’ Jahas: waaktos anyun murenikab Moab che ilaachi karik; botani sobondanyi." 
Isaiah15:5 Rirei muguleldanyu amu Moab; mwechin Soar bik che mweoti agoi Eglatselisiya: amu togostoe Luhit koririoti; amu iteitos kateiyet ne bo ng’emisiet eng’ oret ne wendi Horonaim. 
Isaiah15:6 Amu tendos beekab Nimrim: amu kagoresyo suswek, ma kobitos suswek che ng’orng’or, ma komi kiy age tugul ne tuon." 
Isaiah15:7 Ibei anyun chang’indab tuguk che kigonyor, koboto che kigogonor, koba ole mi kererut ne mi ketik." 
Isaiah15:8 Amu kigoit rirek kiwotosiek tugul che bo Moab; kiit kateiyennyi Eglaim, ak kiit kateiyennyi Beer-elim." 
Isaiah15:9 Amu nyiitat korotik beekab Dimon: amu ta aipchini alak Dimon, amutyini ng’etundo inendet ne chilile Moab, ak che ng’etu eng’ emet." 
Isaiah16:1 Okweri arekab kechir eng’ Sela ne tokyingei ong’atet, che bo bounindetab emet, koba tulwetab cheptab Sion." 
Isaiah16:2 Amu kergeitu tibikab Moab eng’ ole kilandoe eng’ Arnon, ak taritik che ombenioti, ak keswet ne kigobutok." 
Isaiah16:3 Oruoch, otil kiruoget; yai urueng’ung’ koigei kemoi kwen eng’ bet: uny che kigetimda; ameng’wekte che ombenioti." 
Isaiah16:4 Ingomeny koboten chechuk che kigetimda; egu inye ole ung’egei Moab komwee luulindet: amu kagoek buch rebindet, kagogesgei luulset, kagiwong’ usik eng’ emet." 
Isaiah16:5 Ak kigimiti ng’echeretab laitornatet eng’ rirenet, ak tebe chito ng’echeranato eng’ iman eng’ emaitab Daudi; koruoch ak kocheng’ei kiruoget, ak ko chepcheb koyai imanda." 
Isaiah16:6 Kigegas menotetab Moab, kele, menot inendet mising’; eng’ kachaunennyi bo ge, ak menotennyi, ak neregekyik; buch lasennyi bo ge." 
Isaiah16:7 Iteechin anyun Moab Moab, iteei age tugul: orirjini makatinikab sabibuk che bo Kir-hareset, ko kagebirok mising’." 
Isaiah16:8 Amu restos mbarenikab Hesbon, ak ketikab sabibuk che bo Sibma; kigoiri kiptainikab bororiosiek ketikyik che kororon; kiit Jaser, kiombeniot agoi ong’atet; kiwakta temenikyik, kisiir nyanjet." 
Isaiah16:9 Arire anyun eng’ rirekab Jaser agobo ketikab sabibuk che bo Sibma; aisenen beekyuk bo kong’, ee Hesbon, ak Eleale: amu kagobiit waagatab luget eng’ betutab logoeguk che bo kemei ak kesisieng’ung’." 
Isaiah16:10 Ak kageisto kagasetab ge, ak keisto boiboiyet eng’ mbaret ne rurei; ak mabiitu tienwogik eng’ mbarenik che bo sabibuk, ama kigasei twegunetab boiboiyet: mami chi ne tiechei divaik eng’ ole kituisie; kaawong’u bolatetab kesisiet." 
Isaiah16:11 Morori anyun moennyu ko u ketubetab Moab, ak morortos agutanikyuk agichek amu Kir-heres." 
Isaiah16:12 Ak ye kagoborgei Moab, ye kabirtogei eng’ oli toror, ak konyor oldanyi ne tilil si kobiit kosa, ago maiterterisiei." 
Isaiah16:13 Nito ng’olyot ne kimwa Jehovah agobo Moab eng’ betusiek che kigosiirto. 
Isaiah16:14 Ago kagomwa nguno Jehovah kole, Kotom kogesgei kenyisiek somogu, ko u kenyisiekab otwogindet ne kisirei, kasasei torornatetab Moab, koboto tuiyennyi tugul ne o; ak kong’ering’itu mising’ bik, ak ma kotilei kiy che ng’etu." 
Isaiah17:1 Lautietab Damasko. Ogeero, kageisto Damasko, si mata koek nganaset, ak egu karatia." 
Isaiah17:2 Kigebagakta nganasokab Aroer: bunjin akwotisiekab kechirek che ruitos, ama mi chi ne imui." 
Isaiah17:3 Iwong’ugei kogeny irimetab Epraim, ak kowong’gei bounatetab Damasko, ak che king’et che bo Suria; kergeitu ak torornatetab lagokab Israel, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah17:4 Nyerotitu torornatetab Jakobo eng’ betunoto, ak kosagit bortanyi." 
Isaiah17:5 Ak kergeitu ak ye iyumi bek kesindet, ak kesei eunnyi bek; ee kergeitu ak ye kesei chito bek eng’ atebwetab Repaim." 
Isaiah17:6 Nganda u noto, kong’etu turonik, ko u ye kitumdumi emdit, ak kong’etune logoek aeng’ anan ko somok eng’ temet ne tabanu barak, ak kong’etune ang’wan anan ko mut eng’ temenik che kiiwakta kolooegitu che bo ketit ne rurei, mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Isaiah17:7 Inyali betunoto chi Yaindennyi, ak kogeerei Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Isaiah17:8 Ama koiiti kapkorosusiek kole kiy, boisionikab eunekyik, anan koiit kole kiy kit ne kiyai eng’ morikyik, anan Aserik, anan kanamonikab asista." 
Isaiah17:9 Igeitu eng’ betunoto nganasokyik che kimen komoswek che kigebagakta eng’ osnet, ak eng’ tulwet barak, che kiga kebagakta eng’ taitab lagokab Israel; ak koek karatia." 
Isaiah17:10 Amu kiutie Kamuktaindetab yetuneng’ung’, ama ibwat ruandetab kimnateng’ung’; igole anyun ketik che kororon, ak ketik alak che ter:" 
Isaiah17:11 ing’ote eng’ betutab kolseng’ung’, ak igochini koyesio kesweguk karon: ago mwee kesisiet eng’ betutab arogenet ak ne bo nyalilda ne ng’wan." 
Isaiah17:12 Bwa, bolatetab bik che chang’, che morortos ko u nyanjosiek; ak bororiosiek che ruaei ko u ruaetab beek che kimen!" 
Isaiah17:13 Ruaei bororiosiek ko u ruaetab beek che chang’: ago kerei kong’ inendet ichek: ak komwei kolooegitu, ak keon ko u metetek che ibei usonet eng’ tulonok, ak ko u ye arureni temburiek eng’ kipchurjuriet." 
Isaiah17:14 Ogeero, mi kamuiset koskoleny; ak kobetyo kotom koeech. Nito kebebertab ichek che luulech, ak ko kebebertab ichek che rebenech." 
Isaiah18:1 Bwa emet ne tinyei kebebaik che cheitos, ne mi bitonin eng’ ainosiekab Etiopia:" 
Isaiah18:2 ne iyoktoi bik che tononjin kobun nyanjet, eng’ tuguk che kigiyae cherungusiek kobun beek barak, kolenji, Oba okwek bik che kiyoktoi che chepcheben, agoi bororiet ne koen bik ak ko ng’orng’oren, bik che imuisei koboch taunenywa agoi: bororiet ne ikwaisei ak kotiegoti, ne pcheei ainosiek emenywa!" 
Isaiah18:3 Okwek tugul che omenye ng’ony, ak okwek che omenye emet, ogeer ye kinamjin barak songoliet eng’ tulonok; ak oeb it ye kiguutei iriaget." 
Isaiah18:4 Amu kamwawa Jehovah ko u ni kolenja, Asise, ak ageere eng’ ole amenye; ko u asista ne ng’wan ne iluu mising’, ko u boldetab rewot eng’ kiptoretab betusiekab kesisiet." 
Isaiah18:5 Amu ye tom kobiit kesisiet, ko kagobutyo taptok, ak koek taptok logoek che rurtos, kotile chepkeswet ole ing’atos, ak koeb koisto temenik che iwaktoi." 
Isaiah18:6 Kibagakyin ichek tugul taritik che koromen che bo tulonok, ak tiong’ikab timin: ak koam taritik che koromen eng’ kemei, ak koam tiong’ik tugul che bo timin eng’ betusiekab kaititiet." 
Isaiah18:7 Kiipchin eng’ betunoto Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kagochinet ne bo bik che koen ak ko ng’orng’oren, ak eng’ bik che imuisei koboch taunenywa agoi; bororiet ne ikwaisei ak kotiegoti, ne pcheei ainosiek emenywa, agoi komostab kainetab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, noto tulwetab Sion." 
Isaiah19:1 Lautietab Misri. Ogeero, lanyei Jehovah boldet ne chepcheb, ak nyonei agoi Misri: ak kiistoi kanamonikab Misri eng’ tainnyi, ak kochoot muguleldab Misri eng’ kwenunnyi." 
Isaiah19:2 Ak ang’eet Misrik kobargei ak Misrik: ak kobargei chi tugul ak tupchennyi, ak kobargei chi tugul ak chitab kokwennyi; baregei nganaset age ak age, ak kobargei bounatet age ak age." 
Isaiah19:3 Ak tun kiyaei koek buch tamirmirietab Misri eng’ kwenunnyi; ak ang’em kiruogennyi: ak koba kocheng’ kanamonik, ak bik che abusisiei, ak che boisie oik, ak bonik." 
Isaiah19:4 Ak agochi Misrik kiptaiyat ne korom koboi ichek; ak koboi ichek laitoriat ne korom, mwaei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah19:5 Ak kotenyo beek eng’ nyanjet, ak koteny ainet ak koyaam." 
Isaiah19:6 Ak kobulyo ainosiek; ak kotenyo ainosiekab Misri ak koyaamnyo: Ak koresyo saosanik ak cherungusiek. 
Isaiah19:7 Ak koyaamnyo morong’inik che mi ainetab Nael, che mi ngegutab ainetab Nael, koboto tugul che kigimin eng’ ole negite ainetab Nael, ak keib ak kobetyo ama kobiitu." 
Isaiah19:8 Ak koririo kogeny ramik che bo njirenik, ak koteiyo ichek tugul che namei njirenik eng’ ainetab Nael, ak kobetyi kimnatet ichek che wirjin beek regereiywek che kiname njirenik." 
Isaiah19:9 Kogeny, kolilandos ichek che laei katanit ne kararan, ak che taei ngoroik che leelach." 
Isaiah19:10 Ak koilyo tolochikyik kotonogis, ak koarogenso eng’ sobonwekwak ichek tugul che kigisir koyai boisiet." 
Isaiah19:11 Berberen mising’ bounikab Soan; kaabusak kiruogetab kiruogik che ng’omen mising’ che bo Parao: omwachindoi ano Parao, olenji, A weritab che ng’omen, weritab laitorinik che bo keny?" 
Isaiah19:12 Mi ano anyun biguk che ng’omen? Ak ingomwaun nguno, ingonai ichek kit ne kogochob Jehovah ne bo lugosiek agobo Misri." 
Isaiah19:13 Kagoek che berber bounikab Soan, kigiberber bounikab Nop; kogogochi Misri komasta, choto ko koitab luita ne bo bororiosiekyik." 
Isaiah19:14 Kigoburuch Jehovah tamirmirietab kamaaset eng’ kwenunnyi: ak kogogochi ichek Misri komasta eng’ boisiennyi age tugul, ko u ye terterioti kibogitiot kong’ung’u." 
Isaiah19:15 Ama komi boisiet age tugul agobo Misri, ne imuchi koyai metit anan katutiet, temetab sosiot anan cherungut." 
Isaiah19:16 Eng’ betunoto, ko kergeitu Misri ak kwonyik: botani ak koiyweisiei amu twaitwaetab eutab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne twaitwai eng’ baragunnyi." 
Isaiah19:17 Ak koek emetab Juda kamuiset eng’ Misri, ak iyweisiei age tugul ne kemwachin agobo noto amu chobetab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne kichob kogirinda emonoto." 
Isaiah19:18 Tun biitu eng’ betunoto nganasok mutu eng’ emetab Misri che ng’alali kutitab Kananik, ak koyosiechi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: kiguure age Nganasetab ng’emisiet." 
Isaiah19:19 Tun biitu eng’ betunoto kaptisisietab Jehovah eng’ kwenutab emetab Misri, ak toloita ne bo Jehovah ne mi kiwotennyi." 
Isaiah19:20 Ak koek noto kaborunet ak baornatet ne bo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek eng’ emetab Misri: amu tun rirjin Jehovah amu usik, ak koyokyi ichek yetindet, toretindet, ak kosor ichek." 
Isaiah19:21 Ak konaak Jehovah eng’ Misri, ak konai Misrik Jehovah eng’ betunoto; ee, ilosune ichek korosek ak kagochinoik, ak koarorji Jehovah kaarorunet, ak koyai kosulda." 
Isaiah19:22 Ak tun birei Jehovah Misri, birisiet ak kasoobet; ak koweekyigei Jehovah, ak kogasyi ichek somutikwak ak kosoob." 
Isaiah19:23 Tun biitu oret ne o eng’ betunoto ne ng’ete Misri agoi Asuria, ak kobwa Asuriek Misri, ak koba Misrik Asuria: ak kosa Misrik koboto Asuriek." 
Isaiah19:24 Tun egu ne bo somok Israel eng’ betunoto, koboto Misri ak koboto Asuria, koek kaberuret eng’ ng’ony:" 
Isaiah19:25 amu kogoberur Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ichek, kolen, Iberurotin bikyuk Misri ak Asuria boisietab eunekyuk, ak Israel bortannyu." 
Isaiah20:1 Eng’ kenyit ne kiwa Tartan Asdod, ye kiiyokto Sorgon laitoriatab Asuria, ak kobargei ak Asdod, ak koluul;" 
Isaiah20:2 king’alal Jehovah eng’ betusiechoto eng’ Isaia weritab Amos, kole, Ui ireegu kuniok che igermenege, ak ireegu kweoniguk. Ak kiyai ko u noto, kowendot ach ngor ama tinyei kweonik." 
Isaiah20:2 king’alal Jehovah eng’ betusiechoto eng’ Isaia weritab Amos, kole, Ui ireegu kuniok che igermenege, ak ireegu kweoniguk. Ak kiyai ko u noto, kowendot ach ngor ama tinyei kweonik." 
Isaiah20:3 Ak kimwa Jehovah kole, Ko u ye kogowendot otwogindennyu Isaia ach ngor ama tinyei kweonik, kenyisiek somok koek kaborunet ak kwong’utiet eng’ Misri ak eng’ Etiopia;" 
Isaiah20:4 imuti ko u noto laitoriatab Asuria luulenik che bo Misri, ak luulenikab Etiopia, che mengech ak che osen, komi ach ngor ama tinyei kweonik, kotoogu ngorook, ne kalilanetab Misri." 
Isaiah20:5 Ak koarogenso, ak kolilanso, amu kamang’unenywa Etiopia, ak ko torornatenywa Misri." 
Isaiah20:6 Ak tun mwaei eng’ betunoto ne menyei emoni bo ngegut, kole, Ogeero, nito ko kamang’unennyo, ne kigimwachi agobo toretet si kesoruech eng’ laitoriatab Asuria: ak achek anyun, kechilildoi ano?" 
Isaiah21:1 Lautietab ong’atetab nyanjet. Ko u ye ibuksei kipchurjuriet ne bunu Murot ne bo Tai, kobunu ko u noto ong’atet, emetab kamuiset." 
Isaiah21:2 Kagiborua ng’ang’utiet ne ng’wan; iberberisiei kaberberindet, ak kong’emisiei ng’emindet. Ee Elam, togoste; ee Media, yiemisie; kaawong’u tigenoikyik tugul." 
Isaiah21:3 Kanyi anyun arogenet suennyu; kanama ng’woninwek, ko u ng’woninwekab kwondo ne machei kosigis: ama kot ko mamuchi agasta; aarogeni kot ko mamuchi ageerto." 
Isaiah21:4 Rukrugeni muguleldanyu, kagomua toptobenet: kawalak boiboiyennyu koek botanet." 
Isaiah21:5 Iitoi meset, indoi ribik, amisiei, eeisei; ong’eetye, okwek bounik, oiil long’onik." 
Isaiah21:6 Amu kamwawa Kiptaiyat agobo noto kole, Ui, inde ribindet; ingomwa inendet kit ne keerei:" 
Isaiah21:7 ak ye keer karikab luget, bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek kobwanune aeng’, che lanyei sigirok, che lanyei tambesik, koeb it komie eng’ kagiiletab ge." 
Isaiah21:8 Ak kowaach inendet ko u ng’etundo kole, Ee Kiptaiyat, atononi kotugul eng’ teekset ne koi ne kiripse bet, ak kindea ole aripse kemousiek tugul:" 
Isaiah21:9 ak, ogeero, bwanei bikab luget, bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek che bwanune aeng’. Ak kiwol inendet kole, Kagobut Babulon, kagobut; ak kagoilyo itonwek tugul che kigiwai che bo kanamonikyik koba ng’ony." 
Isaiah21:10 Ee inye, kesisiennyu, ak bek che bo ole kituisie: kaamwawok che kiagas eng’ Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Isaiah21:11 Lautietab Duma. Kuura age eng’ Seir, kole, Ribindoni, egu nee kemoi? Ribindoni, egu nee kemoi?" 
Isaiah21:12 Mwaei ribindet kole, Kagoeech, ak konyonei kogeny kemout: ngot omache oteeb, oteeb: oweege, obwa." 
Isaiah21:13 Lautietab Arabia. Omenye osnet eng’ Arabia, ee okwek che rutoi che bo Dedanik." 
Isaiah21:14 Kiipchi beek inendet ne kiamei melel; kitoroktae amitwogik bik che kimenyei emetab Tema, bik che kimweei." 
Isaiah21:15 Amu kimwee rotokab chok, rotwetab chok ne kaging’us, ak kwanget ne kaging’i, ak eng’ ng’wanindab luget." 
Isaiah21:16 Amu kagomwawa Kiptaiyat ko u ni kole, Kotom kogesgei kenyit agenge, ko u kenyisiekab otwogindet ne kisirei, kwong’ugei torornatet tugul ne bo Kedar:" 
Isaiah21:17 ak ng’ering’itu che ng’etu eng’ mwogik, murenik che kimen che bo bikab Kedar: amu kagomwa nito Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Isaiah22:1 Lautietab atebwetab ng’ang’utiet. Amin nee anyun, kot itogoste gorik barak?" 
Isaiah22:2 Ee inye ne nyiitat bolatosiekab bik, nganaset ne nyiitat wasetab ge, nganaset ne baibai; ma kibare biguk rotwetab chok, ama begu eng’ luget." 
Isaiah22:3 Kimwei kibagenge bouniguk, kirat mwogik ichek: kigirat tugul che kiginyor eng’ okwek, kimwei ichek kolooegitu." 
Isaiah22:4 Kiamwa anyun ale, Welelge amegeera, si arir eng’ ng’wanindo; mat ibirtege ile igaigaa, amu luuletab cheptab bikyuk." 
Isaiah22:5 Amu betutab nyalilda ni, ak ne bo tieget, ak ne bo kaiimetab ge, ne bunu Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, eng’ atebwetab ng’ang’utiet: butetab irimoik, ak rirek che kirirjin tulonok." 
Isaiah22:6 Ak kiib Elam motiet, koboto karisiek che bo luget ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek; ak king’any Kir long’et." 
Isaiah22:7 Ak kinyi atebwosieguk che miach karisiek che bo luget, ak kitetgei bik che kilanyei mbartanyisiek eng’ ormarichet." 
Isaiah22:8 Ak kiisto inendet kit ne kituchei Juda; ak kiigeer inye eng’ betunoto karikab luget eng’ got ne mi osnet. 
Isaiah22:9 Ak kiogeer ole chang’ ole kigobutogis eng’ nganasetab Daudi: ak oyum beekab tamboiyot ne mi ng’ony. 
Isaiah22:10 Ak oiit gorikab Jerusalem, ak obut gorik si kobiit ogimit irimet." 
Isaiah22:11 Kiobal keringetab beek eng’ kwenutab irimoik aeng’, si korootyi beekab tamboiyot ne bo keny: ago ma ogeer inendet ne kiyaei nito, amoiit ole kiy inendet ne kiyaei nito keny." 
Isaiah22:12 Ak kiguurso eng’ betunoto Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, si kobiit oririe, ak oteiye, ak ocheru metowek, ak olaach kuniok:" 
Isaiah22:13 ak ogeero, boiboiyet ak kagasetab ge, eng’setab kechirek ak ne bo tuga, oame banyek ak oee divaik: ongeamisie ak keeise, amu kibegu mutai." 
Isaiah22:14 Ak king’ang’jigei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek itikyuk, Magitililok iman eng’ yaitioni kot obegu, mwaei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah22:15 Kamwa ko u ni Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, kole, Ui ole mi ne ribei tuguk, oldab Sebna, ne bou got, ak ilenji," 
Isaiah22:16 Iyae nee eng’ yu? Ak omi ak ng’o yu, kot ibaljige kererit eng’ olito? Ko u ne baljingei kererit eng’ ole bo barak, ne baljingei ole menyei eng’ ruandet!" 
Isaiah22:17 Keero, wirtoin Jehovah eng’ kimnatet ko u chito ne kim; ee, taain mising’." 
Isaiah22:18 Weleljiningei iman ak kowirten iwe barak ko u tagurguruet eng’ emet ne baraa; imechini oloto, ak mitei oloto karisiekab luget che bo torornateng’ung’, inyendet tewernatetab gotab kiptaiyandeng’ung’." 
Isaiah22:19 Ak aonin eng’ boisieng’ung’, ak kong’usun inyo ng’ony." 
Isaiah22:20 Ak aguur otwogindennyu Eliakim weritab Hilkia eng’ betunoto: 
Isaiah22:21 ak alaakyi inendet ngorieng’ung’, ak agimite inendet bireng’ung’, ak agochi inendet bounateng’ung’: ak koek inendet kwandab bik che menyei Jerusalem, ak ne bo gotab Juda." 
Isaiah22:22 Ak ande tigikyiennyi yatutietab gotab Daudi; ak yatei inendet, ama mi chi ne kerei; ak kerei inendet, ama mi chi ne yatei." 
Isaiah22:23 Ak agiich inendet ko u kipchumariat eng’ ole kim; ak koek ng’echeretab torornatet eng’ gotab kwandanyi. 
Isaiah22:24 Ak kolaakyi ichek inendet torornatet tugul ne bo gotab kwandanyi, iyotet ak lagok, teret age tugul ne ming’in, koboch tugukab kikombok agoi chuboinik tugul." 
Isaiah22:25 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole, Kiistoi eng’ betunoto kipchumariat ne kiga kigiich, eng’ ole kim: ak keeb, ak kolul, ak keisto lautiet ne kitinyei; amu kagomwa Jehovah nito." 
Isaiah23:1 Lautietab Turo. Oteiye okwek melisiekab Tarsis; amu kageng’em, kot ko ma komi got, anan ole kibunei kebendi orit; amu kiging’ang’ji ichek ng’olyondonito eng’ emetab Kitim." 
Isaiah23:2 Osisye, okwek che omenye ole bo ngegut; inye ne kiinyiitun tuguk chemung’arainikab Sidon, che kilong’une nyanjet." 
Isaiah23:3 Ak keljinennyi ko ki iyotetab Sihor ne kibunu beek che chang’, noto ko kesisietab Nael; ak ki oldab aldaisiet ne bo bororiosiek." 
Isaiah23:4 Ililan, ee Sidon: amu kagong’alal nyanjet, irimetab nyanjet kole, Tom anyoru ng’wanindo, anan asigisie, anan abai murenik, anan bergeinik." 
Isaiah23:5 Ye it ng’alek Misri, konyoru ichek ng’wanindo ne o mising’ eng’ ng’alekab Turo." 
Isaiah23:6 Olande Tarsis; oteiye, okwek che omenye ngegut." 
Isaiah23:7 Tos nganaseng’wong’ ni ne bo boiboiyet, ne kimi koboch keny, ne kiimut kelyekyik kwo ole loo?" 
Isaiah23:8 Ng’o ne kichob ng’olyondonito agobo Turo, ne ilaakyin bik kutonok, che chemung’arainikyik ko bounik che aldaikyik ko bik che konyitotin che bo ng’ony?" 
Isaiah23:9 Kigochob noto Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, si kobiit komuruon menotet tugul ne bo torornatet, ak kotewer bik tugul che konyitotin che bo ng’ony." 
Isaiah23:10 Bun emeng’ung’ ko u Nael, ee cheptab Tarsis; ma itinye birenet kogeny." 
Isaiah23:11 Kigotokyi eunnyi nyanjet, kigotumdum bounatosiekab laitorinik: kigon Jehovah ng’atutiet agobo Kanan, kole, keng’em irimoikyik." 
Isaiah23:12 Kile, Ma iboiboitu inye, ee ne i bergeiyat, cheptab Sidon ne kiusei: ng’eet, lande, ui Kitim; ago menyoru kamuung’et agot eng’ oloto." 
Isaiah23:13 Ogeero, emetab Kaldeik; ma komi bichoto; kigochopchi Asuriaindet emonoto tiong’ikab ong’atet: kiteech teeksosiekwak che koen, kibut gorikyik che bo laitorinik: kigong’em." 
Isaiah23:14 Oteiye, okwek melisiekab Tarsis: amu kigeng’em irimeng’wong’ kiges." 
Isaiah23:15 Tun kiutie Turo kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab eng’ betusiechoto, ko u betusiekab laitoriat agenge: ak eng’ kagesunetab kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab, koigei Turo kit ne u tiendab chepkugoniot." 
Isaiah23:16 Nam ketubet, ak iwendote nganaset, inye chepkugoniot ne kigeutienen; tien korur, tien tienwogik che chang’, si kibwatin." 
Isaiah23:17 Ak ye ibata kenyisiek tamanwogik tisabu, koityi Jehovah biret Turo, si koweek konyor mung’arennyi, si koyai kugoinatennyi koboto bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony eng’ emet." 
Isaiah23:18 Ak koek mung’arennyi ak melektanyi tililindo eng’ taitab Jehovah: magigonori ama kibasei; amu bunjin mung’arennyi ichek che menyei taitab Jehovah, si koam kobiyong’so, ak kolaach ngoroik che bo telunatet." 
Isaiah24:1 Ogeero, yaei Jehovah ng’ony koek ole mami kiy, koek surkwen, ak kogabui, ak koseer bik che menyei oloto." 
Isaiah24:2 Ak kit ne u eng’ bik, ko u noto eng’ tisiindet; kit ne u eng’ otwogindet, ko u noto eng’ kiptaiyandennyi; kit ne u eng’ otwogindet ne chepto, ko u noto eng’ chebioset ne bou inendet; kit ne u eng’ alindet, ko u noto eng’ aldaindet; kit ne u eng’ chito ne besendoi, ko u noto eng’ besenindet; kit ne u eng’ ne ibei keljinet ne siirei, ko u noto eng’ ne igochin inendet." 
Isaiah24:3 Kiyai emet koek ne matinyei kiy, ak keng’em; amu kagomwa Jehovah ng’olyondonito." 
Isaiah24:4 Arogeni ng’ony ak kowong’gei, nyaluli ng’ony ak kowong’gei, nyalildos bik che mendos che bo ng’ony." 
Isaiah24:5 Kigimuruon ng’ony amu bik che menyei; amu kigobistoe ng’atutik, kigowal kiruogutik, kigobut kayomiset ne bo koigeny." 
Isaiah24:6 Kigoam anyun chubisiet ng’ony, ak kigonam ng’ogisto che menyei: kigibeel bik che menyei ng’ony, ak king’et che ng’ering’." 
Isaiah24:7 Rirtos divaik che leelach, restos ketikab sabibuk, tigendos tugul che igasegei." 
Isaiah24:8 Sisei kagasetab ge ne bo sugutit ne ming’in, igesugei bolatetab icheget che boiboi, sisei boiboiyetab ketubet." 
Isaiah24:9 Maeei divaik kotiendos; ng’wonegitu maiyek eng’ icheget che eei. 
Isaiah24:10 Kigebut nganaset ne mi chemarget: kigerei got age tugul, si manyo chi go." 
Isaiah24:11 Mi rirek ortinwek amu divaik; kagoimenit boiboiyet tugul, kigobet boiboiyetab emet." 
Isaiah24:12 Ng’etu kubernatet eng’ nganaset, ak kebare ormarichet ng’emisiet." 
Isaiah24:13 Amu egu ko u noto eng’ ng’ony eng’ bororiosiek, ko u ye kitumdumi emitik, ko u turisietab sabibuk ye kagogesgei kesisiet." 
Isaiah24:14 Waaktos chuto, boldos; boldos mising’ eng’ nyanjet amu etunatetab Jehovah." 
Isaiah24:15 Otoror anyun Jehovah eng’ kong’asis, otoror kainetab Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, eng’ ngegusiekab nyanjet." 
Isaiah24:16 Kigegas tienwogik che bunu tabanwekab ng’ony, kolen bo torornatet ne bo imanda. Ago kiale, Asagiti, asagiti, bwa eng’ ane! Kigoberberis kaberberik; ee, kigoberberis mising’ kaberberik." 
Isaiah24:17 Kanyonjin kaiyweisiet, ak keringet, ak mestet, ee inye ne imenye ng’ony." 
Isaiah24:18 Ak tun ibutyin keringet inendet ne mwee bolatetab kaiyweisiet; ak namei mestet inendet ne togosune keringet: amu yatotin tirisiok eng’ barak, ak botandos lumeiywekab ng’ony." 
Isaiah24:19 Kigobutok ng’ony mising’, kigobetak ng’ony mising’, kigotumdumgei ng’ony mising’." 
Isaiah24:20 Terterioti ng’ony ko u chito ne kabogit, ak keistoot kwo komosi ak komosi ko u got; ak konyigisityi bistoennyi, ak kobut, ama kong’eetei kogeny." 
Isaiah24:21 Ak tun birei Jehovah eng’ betunoto eng’ barak lugetab icheget che tororen, ak kobir laitorinikab ng’ony eng’ ng’ony." 
Isaiah24:22 Ak kiyum ichek tugul, ko u ye kiyumi kimonjororinik eng’ keringet, ak kegerji korgoret, ak ye kagobata betusiek che chang’, kebir." 
Isaiah24:23 Ak kotoptoben arawet, ak kolilan asista; amu laitorani Jehovah ne bo lugosiek eng’ tulwetab Sion, ak eng’ Jerusalem, ak eng’ taitab boisiekyik." 
Isaiah25:1 Ee, Jehovah, i Kamuktaindennyu; atororin, alosu kaineng’ung’; amu kiiyai tuguk che kikwong’e, kiruogutik che bo keny, eng’ imanda ak eng’ imanit." 
Isaiah25:2 Amu kiiyai nganaset koek karurugutiet; kiiyai nganaset ne ng’otat koek karatia: kiiyai gotab laitoriat ne bo toek koek ole mami nganaset; magoi ta keteech kogeny. 
Isaiah25:3 Konyitin anyun bik che kimen, iywein nganaset ne bo bororiosiek che imuisei." 
Isaiah25:4 Amu kiiegu irimetab kibananiat, irimetab ne matinyei kiy eng’ bichiindanyi, i ole kimwechin eng’ usonet ole kiuure eng’ kiptoret, ye igei usonetab che imuisei, usonet ne o ne rusei inat." 
Isaiah25:5 Iming’ini bolatetab toek ko u kiptoret eng’ ole yaamat; kinyeroti tiendab che imuisei ko u kiptoret eng’ tulugenet. 
Isaiah25:6 Ak tun yachin Jehovah ne bo lugosiek bororiosiek tugul, eng’ tulwoni igorta ne bo tuguk che akwaen, igortab divaik che kigotebi keny, ne bo tuguk che akwaen, che nyiitotin mwanik, ne bo divaik che kororon che kigotebi keny." 
Isaiah25:7 Ak tun ng’emei eng’ tulwoni kit ne kituge bik tugul, ak anget ne kigituge bororiosiek tugul." 
Isaiah25:8 Kigolugui inendet meet koigeny; ak tun ibuchi Kiptaiyat Jehovah beekab kong’ eng’ togochik tugul; ak koisto tewernatetab bikyik eng’ ng’ony komugul: amu kagomwa Jehovah nito. 
Isaiah25:9 Ak tun kimwaei eng’ betunoto kele, Ogeero, nito ko Kamuktaindennyo; kigigen inendet, ak soruech inendet: nito ko Jehovah; kigigen inendet, kigasige ak keboiboitu eng’ yetunennyi." 
Isaiah25:10 Amu imuunyi eutab Jehovah eng’ tulwoni, ak ketiekyi ng’ony Moab eng’ oldanyi, ko u ye kitiekyin ng’ony mobek eng’ beekab kapng’atat." 
Isaiah25:11 Ak koiitochi eunekyik kwenunywa, ko u ye iitoi eunekyik inendet ne birei beek: ak konyerat menotennyi koboto ng’alsetab eunekyik." 
Isaiah25:12 Ak kagobut ole ng’otat ne bo teekset ne koi, ne bo irimoiguk, kagoluul, kagowirtagei kwo ng’ony, ole mitei temburiek." 
Isaiah26:1 Tun kitieni tieni eng’ emetab Juda eng’ betunoto: Kitinye achek nganaset ne kim; ng’atei inendet yetunet koek inatusiek ak irimoik. 
Isaiah26:2 Oyat ormarichok, si kobiit kobun kwo orit bororiet ne bo iman, ne ribei imanit." 
Isaiah26:3 Iribe inendet kotebe kalyet ne igesunotgei, inendet ne tiienengei kabwautuikyik: amu imang’un." 
Isaiah26:4 Omang’u Jehovah koigeny: amu mi eng’ Jehovah JEHOVAH ruandet ne bo koigeny. 
Isaiah26:5 Amu kigochoor inendet ichek che menyei ole toror, nganaset ne toror: iluuli inendet; iluuli agoi temburiek." 
Isaiah26:6 Kitiechei; tiechei kibananiat, ak ne matinyei kiy." 
Isaiah26:7 Litit oretab inendet ne bo iman: inye ne i litit, indochini ortinwekab chito ne bo iman." 
Isaiah26:8 Ee, kigigenin, inye Jehovah, eng’ oretab kiruogutiguk; makyingei sobonwekyok kaineng’ung’ ak kabwateng’ung’." 
Isaiah26:9 Koamachin eng’ sobondanyu kemoi; ee, acheng’in eng’ tamirmiriennyu kotom koeech: amu ye mi ng’ony kiruogutiguk, konetegei che menyei ng’ony imanda." 
Isaiah26:10 Agot nda kiborji chamet kiptengekyot, ko mainetigei imanda kora; yaei inendet ne ma bo iman eng’ emetab imanda, ama keerei telunatetab Jehovah." 
Isaiah26:11 Kasutok eung’ung’ Jehovah, ama keerei ichek: ago keerei kagiileng’ung’ bo ge agobo bik, ak kolilanso; ee, laldos buniguk." 
Isaiah26:12 Inye Jehovah ne ing’atwech kalyet amu inye ne kiiyaiywech kogeny boisionikyok tugul. 
Isaiah26:13 Ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, kigoboiywech kiptainik alak; ago eng’ inye, inyege, kemwae kaineng’ung’." 
Isaiah26:14 Kigobek ichek, ma kosoptos; kigobek, ma kong’eetos: kiinyonji anyun ak ing’em ichek, ak kiigochi kolus kabwatet age tugul agobo ichek." 
Isaiah26:15 Kiites bororiet, ee Jehovah, kiites bororiet kobarait; i ne itororot: kiites kobaraitu kiwotosiek tugul che bo emet." 
Isaiah26:16 Ee Jehovah, kigobwanjin ichek eng’ nyalilda, kisain ye kiitigon ichek." 
Isaiah26:17 Ko u kwondo ne tamano, ne kagorik betusiek che chute go, komi eng’ ng’wanindo, ak korirei amu ng’woninwekyik; ee Jehovah, kigi u noto agachek eng’ taing’ung’." 
Isaiah26:18 Kigi tamonoin, kigimi ng’wanindo, u kele, kigisich usonet kityo; tom keyai sorunet age tugul eng’ ng’ony; ama ibutyo bikab ng’ony." 
Isaiah26:19 Tun soptos cheguk che kigobek; ng’eetos muswekyuk. Ong’eetye ak otien, okwek che omenye ng’ung’unyek: amu u rewondeng’ung’ rewotab ngwek, ak konu ng’ony che kigobek." 
Isaiah26:20 Obwa, bikyuk, nyo goriguk orit, ak iger kurgotiguk: unyge ne matia, agoi kosiirto neregek." 
Isaiah26:21 Amu, ogeero, mong’u Jehovah eng’ oldanyi si kobiit kobir che menyei ng’ony amu yaitienywa: ng’anyei ng’ony kogeny korotikyik, ama kotuchei bikyik che kigibar." 
Isaiah27:1 Tun birei Jehovah eng’ betunoto eng’ rotwennyi ne bo chok ne korom ak ko o ak ko kim, tiondo ne bo beek ne u ting’ong’et, ne erenet ne chepcheb, ak tionyoto ne erenet ne taategei; ak kobar maswetit ne mi nyanjet." 
Isaiah27:2 Otienji eng’ betunoto, mbaretab sabibuk ne bo divaik." 
Isaiah27:3 Ane Jehovah ne aribe; abisi kotugul, aribe kemoi ak bet si mang’em chi." 
Isaiah27:4 Matinye neregek che ng’wonen: kata mie nda koboriena katablelinik ak katok! Ta katiegoti ichek, ta kabeele tugul." 
Isaiah27:5 Anan konam inendet kimnatennyu, si koyai kalyet kobota; ee, ingoyai inendet kalyet kobota." 
Isaiah27:6 Kimitu Jakobo eng’ betusiek che bwanei; bitei Israel ak kong’at: ak konyiit ng’ony logoek. 
Isaiah27:7 Tos kigobir inendet ko u ye kibir ichek che kibir inendet? Anan kagibar inendet ko u barisietab ichek che kibar inendet? 
Isaiah27:8 Kioborie ak inendet ne yamei, ye kiione; kiisto inendet eng’ usonennyi ne ng’wan eng’ betutab usonetab kong’asis." 
Isaiah27:9 Tun kiundoi anyun eng’ nito yaitietab Jakobo, ak chuto ko logoek tugul che kiistoe tengektanyi; ye kagoyai koik tugul che bo kaptisisiet kogergeit ak tartarik che kigitui, kot ko ma kong’eetos kogeny Aserik ak itonwekab asista." 
Isaiah27:10 Amu mi inegei nganaset ne ng’otat, meng’otet ne kigeue, ak kemeto, ne u ong’atet: agete yoto moita, ak koru yoto, ak koam temenikyik." 
Isaiah27:11 Ye kagoresyo temenikyik, koilyo; bwanei kwonyik ak kobeel: amu bororiot ne matinyei naet; noto anyun marire ichek inendet ne kiyai, ama tiytii ichek inendet ne kimimii." 
Isaiah27:12 Ak tun birei Jehovah eng’ betunoto logoekyik korara, koboch nyiietab Ainet agoi kererutab Misri, ak kiyumak agenge agenge, ee okwek lagokab Israel." 
Isaiah27:13 Ak tun kiguutei iriaget ne o eng’ betunoto; ak tun bwanei che ki negit kolusyo eng’ emetab Asuria, koboto che kigetimda eng’ emetab Misri; ak tun ilosu Jehovah eng’ tulwet ne tilil eng’ Jerusalem." 
Isaiah28:1 Bwa eng’ chepkuletab menotet ne bo kibogitinikab Epraim, ak eng’ taptet ne resei ne bo kororonindab laitornatennyi, ne mi metitab atebwet ne akwai ne bo ichek che kigoterter divaik!" 
Isaiah28:2 Ogeero, tinyei Kiptaiyat chito age ne nyigan ak ko kim; ko u usonetab roptab koik, usonet ne ng’emisiei, ko u usonetab beek che kimen, che ing’irtogei, wirjin ng’ony ko u noto eng’ eunnyi." 
Isaiah28:3 Kitiekyin ng’ony chepkuletab menotet ne bo kibogitinikab Epraim; 
Isaiah28:4 kergeitu taptet ne resei ne bo kororonindab torornatennyi, ne mitei metitab atebwet ne akwai, ak logoiyatab mogoiywet ne kiga sib korur ko tomo kobiit kemeut; ne ye keer chi koam eng’ yoto kota komi eunnyi." 
Isaiah28:5 Egu Jehovah ne bo lugosiek eng’ betunoto nariet ne bo torornatet, ak kutwetab telunatet, eng’ bikyik che ng’etu;" 
Isaiah28:6 ak koek tamirmirietab kiruoget eng’ inendet ne tebe kiruoget, ak koek kimnatetab icheget che weektoi luget eng’ ormarichet." 
Isaiah28:7 Ago kigochilil chuto agichek amu divaik, ak kigomasta amu maiyek; kigochilil tisiindet ak maotiot amu maiyek, kigomaluuch divaik ichek, kigomasta amu maiyek; ichiliili eng’ ng’ang’utiet, ibutos eng’ kiruoget." 
Isaiah28:8 Amu kigonyi mesosiek tugul kang’ung’daik ak simwek, mami ole tilil." 
Isaiah28:9 Ineti ng’o inendet naet? Ak ng’o ne igochin koguiyo ng’alek? Ichek che kigeluge, che kigeete kochuchun?" 
Isaiah28:10 Amu kineti ng’atutiet kegetyingei ng’atutiet, kineti ng’atutiet kegetyingei ng’atutiet; kineti konetisiet kegetyingei konetisiet, kineti konetisiet kegetyingei konetisiet; kitigin eng’ oli, kitigin eng’ olo." 
Isaiah28:11 Achicha, ago ng’alaljin bichu eng’ kutuswekab toek ak eng’ kutit age;" 
Isaiah28:12 che kimwachi inendet kolenji, Kamuung’et nito, ogochi kamuung’et inendet ne ng’atat; ak kasoobet nito: ago ma cham kogas." 
Isaiah28:13 Noto anyun, egu ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ ichek ng’atutiet ne kineti kegetyingei ng’atutiet, ng’atutiet ne kineti kegetyingei ng’atutiet; konetisiet ne kineti kegetyingei konetisiet, konetisiet ne kineti kegetyingei konetisiet; kitigin eng’ oli, kitigin eng’ oloto; si keba, si kebee batai kobutyo, ak koilyo, kenam eng’ mestet, ak kimut." 
Isaiah28:14 Ogas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah okwek bik sasik, che obou bichu mi Jerusalem." 
Isaiah28:15 Amu kiomwa ole, kigiyomisge ak meet, ak kigiyanjine ak oldab meet; ye siirto biret ne o, ko maityinech; amu kigeyai lembechek koek ole kimwechini, ak kigiung’ege lembeita:" 
Isaiah28:16 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ogeero, andoi Sion koita koek lumeiywot, koita ne kigetiem, koita ne bo kamanutiet ne o ne bo luita, lumeiywot ne kim; maigirgiri ne iyani." 
Isaiah28:17 Ak ayai kiruoget koek kit ne litit, ak ayai imanda koek borowet ne kilititisie: ak kobukto koikab ropta ole kimwechin eng’ lembechek, ak komarane beek ole kiung’egei." 
Isaiah28:18 Ak kewal kayomiseng’wong’ ne kioyomisge ak meet koek buch, ama tononi kayanjineng’wong’ ne kioyanjine ak oldab meet: ye siirto biret ne o, ketiegatak anyun eng’ yoto." 
Isaiah28:19 Ibok eng’ betut age tugul ye siirtoi; amu siirtoi karonet age tugul bet ak kemoi: ak egu kamuiset kityo ye ogase ng’alek. 
Isaiah28:20 Amu nwagitu itogut kosiir ne imuchi koiitoegei chito; ak kotendenit kit ne ketugegei kot kosiir ne yamei kotugegei chito. 
Isaiah28:21 Amu ng’eetei Jehovah ko u eng’ tulwetab Perasim, nerechi ko u eng’ atebwetab Gibeon; si kobiit koyai boisiennyi, boisiennyi ne ter, ak koges boisiennyi, boisiennyi ne ter." 
Isaiah28:22 Noto anyun, amat oegu sasik, si magigiich ratutikwok amu kiagas kagesunet ne kigeng’at, eng’ ng’ony komugul, ne bunu Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah28:23 Oeb it, ogas kutinnyu; oeb it, ogas ng’alekyuk." 
Isaiah28:24 Tos ibatisiei chito ne ibatisiei kotugul si kogol? Tos ibati ak kobirei mogoronik kotugul che bo mbarennyi? 
Isaiah28:25 Ye kagobirok mbaranato komieit, ko tos maletoi keswekab ngwek ak kogol kamon, ak kogolji nganok ortinwek, ak kogolji sairik ole kigilewenji, ak bek alak che kiguure kusemet eng’ tabanwekyik?" 
Isaiah28:26 Amu itigoni Kamuktaindennyi inendet komie, ak konet." 
Isaiah28:27 Amu magibore kit ne ng’atib keswekab ngwek, ama kimildoe keldab karit kamon; ago kibire kirokto keswechoto, ak kibire ketit kamon." 
Isaiah28:28 King’oe nganok che kikwanyei; amu magiborei kotugul; agot ngoseer keldab karinnyi ak mbartanyisiekyik, ko mang’aei." 
Isaiah28:29 Bunu nito agine Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne kikwong’e kiruogennyi, ak kogesunotgei eng’ ng’omnatet." 
Isaiah29:1 Bwa Ariel, Ariel, nganaset ne kimeny Daudi! Otes kenyit eng’ kenyit; ingorubatgei igorwek:" 
Isaiah29:2 si aiim anyun Ariel, ak kobiit rirek ak kateiyet: ak koigei eng’ ane Ariel." 
Isaiah29:3 Amu amuutin komoswek tugul, ak ayiemenen teeksosiek che koen, ak ateech irimoik si kebarge." 
Isaiah29:4 Ak kinyeratin, ak ing’alal imi ng’ung’unyek, ak kinyerat ng’aleguk komong’une temburiek; ak kogergeit tweguneng’ung’ ak chito ne boisie oik, ne mong’une ng’ung’unyek, ak ichaam ng’aleguk eng’ temburiek." 
Isaiah29:5 Ago kergeitu chang’indab buniguk ak ng’ung’unyek che busbus, ak kogergeit chang’indab che imuisei ak metetek che arureni; ee, biitu eng’ cheiset." 
Isaiah29:6 Nyonjin Jehovah ne bo lugosiek inendet eng’ tulet, ak eng’ botanetab ng’ony, ak bolatet ne o, ak kipchurjuriet ak usonet ne o, ak liblibenetab mat ne beelsei." 
Isaiah29:7 Ak kogergeit karuotitoet, ne ng’ang’utiet ne bo kemoi, ak chang’indab bororiosiek tugul che baregei ak Ariel, agot ichek tugul che baregei ak inendet ak irimennyi, ak che inyalili inendet." 
Isaiah29:8 Ak kogergeit ak ye iruotitoi chito ne amei rubet, ak ogeero, amisiei; ago kosu, ak mi buch sobondanyi: anan kogergeit ak ye iruotitoi chito ne amei melel, ak ogeero, eeisei; ago kosu, ak ogeero, tanui, ak machei sobondanyi koee; u noto anyun chang’indab bororiosiek tugul che baregei ak tulwetab Sion." 
Isaiah29:9 Ogenisie ak okwong’ie; oyai ko u ye omache, ak ogorie: kabogityo, ago ma eng’ divaik; terterioti, ago ma eng’ maiyek." 
Isaiah29:10 Amu kirong’jok Jehovah tamirmirietab ruondo ne nyigis, kigoger konyekwok, choto ko maotik, ak kigotuch kandoikwok, choto ko keerik." 
Isaiah29:11 Ak kagergeit eng’ okwek ng’ang’utiet tugul ak ng’alekab bukuit ne kiging’och, ne igochin bik chito ne inetat, kolenji, Asomin ale, soman bukuini: ak kole, Mamuchi, amu kiging’och." 
Isaiah29:12 Yeityo kigochi chito ne ma inetat, kolenji, Asomin ale, soman bukuini: ak kole, Ma a chi ne inetat." 
Isaiah29:13 Ak kile Kiptaiyat, Amu rikyina bichu kong’alalwa, ak kogonyita eng’ kutuswekwak, ago kigoisto mugulelwekwak kolooegitu eng’ ane, ak kaiyweisiet ne iywea ko ng’atutiet ne kiineti bik ichek:" 
Isaiah29:14 ogeer anyun-o, ayae boisiet ne kitang’ang’jin eng’ kwenutab bichu, boisiet ne kitang’ang’jin ak kekwong’e; ak kobet ng’omnatetab bikwak che ng’omen, ak keuny kaguiyetab bikwak che ng’omen." 
Isaiah29:15 Bwa eng’ ichek che cheng’ei mising’ koung’e Jehovah kiruogenywa, ak mi boisionikwak mesundeito, ak mwaei kolen, Ng’o ne keerech? Ak ng’o ne ingenech?" 
Isaiah29:16 Ogabui tuguk! Tos kiroge cheptereniot menet; kot komwa kit ne kigiyaei agobo inendet ne kiyaei, kole, Kima koyaa, anan komwa kit ne kiginamdos agobo inendet ne kiinamdos, kole, Matinyei inendet kaguiyet?" 
Isaiah29:17 Tos mami boroindo kitigin, si kewal Lebanon koek mbaret ne rurei kot, ak kiit mbaret ne rurei koek osnet?" 
Isaiah29:18 Ak tun kasei eng’ betunoto ng’alekab bukuit bik che magastoi, ak kogeerto eng’ mesundeito ne o ak eng’ ole imen konyekab che koriotin." 
Isaiah29:19 Tesei kogeny boiboiyenywa eng’ Jehovah, bik che iming’inegei, ak koboiboitune bik che bonon, Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Isaiah29:20 Amu kiyaei inendet ne imuisei koek buch, ak kosis sasindet, ak keisto bik tugul che igeni yaitiet:" 
Isaiah29:21 che igochin bik kochalwogense ng’alekwak, ak koriich mestet agobo inendet ne itigonisiei eng’ ormarichet, ak komaas chito ne bo iman eng’ kit ne bo buch." 
Isaiah29:22 Mwaei ko u ni anyun Jehovah, ne kiitiach Abraham, agobo gotab Jakobo, kole, Ma kolilani anyun Jakobo, ama koarogeni." 
Isaiah29:23 Ago ye keer inendet lagokyik, noto ko boisietab eunekyuk, che mi kwenunnyi, kotaban kainennyu; ee, itabani Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Jakobo, ak koiywei Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Isaiah29:24 Nyoru kaguiyet agichek icheget che ichiliili eng’ tamirmiriet, ak konetgei konetisiet ichek che ing’unyng’ung’dos." 
Isaiah30:1 Bwa eng’ lagok che ngelel, mwaei Jehovah, che tilei ng’alek, ama eng’ ane; ak che tuchegei, ama eng’ tamirmiriennyu, si kobiit kotes tengekto eng’ tengekto:" 
Isaiah30:2 che ng’eetos kochorjingei Misri, ama teebena; che igimitegei kimnatetab Parao, ak komang’ uruetab Misri!" 
Isaiah30:3 Egu anyun kimnatetab Parao kolilaneng’wong’, ak koek kamang’unet ne omang’u uruetab Misri, toiyeng’wong’." 
Isaiah30:4 Amu mi bounikyik Soan, ak kagobwa tononjinikyik Hanes." 
Isaiah30:5 Ililandos tugul agobo bik che maimuchi konyorune kiy, che ma toretet, anan ko kelunet, ago egu kalilanet, ak chotisiet agine." 
Isaiah30:6 Lautietab tiong’ik che bo Murot ne bo Tai. Ibe magornatosiekwak tigigoikab moekab sigirok, ak koibe konoraikwak ukwekab tambesik, koipchin bik che manyorune kiy, kobunei emetab nyalilda ak ndara, ole bunu ng’etundo ne kotoy, ak ne kirgit, erenet ak erenet ne tirireni, ne u mat." 
Isaiah30:7 Amu toretisiei buch Misri, ama tilei kiy toretonoto: kiaguure anyun inendet Rahab ne tebyei kosisei." 
Isaiah30:8 Ui anyun nguno, ak isirji bukuit, si kobunji betusiek che bwanei che bo koigeny ak koigeny." 
Isaiah30:9 Amu icheget ko bik che ngelel, lagok che bo lembeita, lagok che machamei kogas ng’atutietab Jehovah:" 
Isaiah30:10 che mwachin keerik kolenji, Amogeer; ak kolenji maotik, Amomaotenwech tuguk che bo iman, omwawech tuguk che tangus, omaoten kaberberisiosiek:" 
Isaiah30:11 oistege eng’ oret, omaste eng’ oret, ogochi Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel kosis eng’ tainnyo." 
Isaiah30:12 Mwaei anyun Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel ko u ni, kole, Amu osase ng’olyondoni, ak omang’u sastaet ak kamaaset, ak otiiege choto;" 
Isaiah30:13 kergeitu anyun tengegito eng’ okwek ak ole kigong’eer ole negit kobut, ne kogotoorgei eng’ inatut ne koi, ne luulei kochokyin." 
Isaiah30:14 Ak kotui ko u ye kituei teretab cheptereniot, ne tuatui ko marire; kot ko ma kenyoru rokiet ne kiibe mat eng’ kapkoima, anan kerame beek eng’ keringet." 
Isaiah30:15 Amu komwa Kiptaiyat Jehovah, Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel, ko u ni kole, Kisoruok ye oweege ak omuuny; egu kimnateng’wong’ sisek ak kamang’unet: ago ma ocham." 
Isaiah30:16 Ago kiomwa ole, Achicha, kimwee mbartanyisiek; omweei anyun: ak kiole, Kilanye che chepcheb; chepchebitu anyun agichek che onok." 
Isaiah30:17 Mwee elfut agenge keretab kong’ ne bo agenge; omwee keretab kong’ ne bo mut: agoi kebagaktak oige ketit ne koi ne mi tulwet barak, oige songoliet ne mi tulwet barak." 
Isaiah30:18 Igenok anyun Jehovah, si kobiit koboruok mieindo, ak koek anyun inendet ne itororot, si kobiit korirenak: amu Jehovah ko Kamuktaindetab kiruoget; iberurotin tugul che igeni inendet." 
Isaiah30:19 Amu menyei bik Sion eng’ Jerusalem: ma irire kogeny; iborun iman mieindo ye kas rireguk; ye kas kowolun. 
Isaiah30:20 Nganda konok Kiptaiyat amitwogikab nyalilda ak beekab usisiet, ko ma keunyei konetiguk agoi, ago keerei konyeguk konetiguk." 
Isaiah30:21 Ak igas ng’olyot ne mi let eng’ inye, ne mwaei kole, Oret ni, oba orani; ye komaste obe eutab tai, ak ye komaste obe eutab katam." 
Isaiah30:22 Ak omuruon kit ne kigiliige kanamoniguk che bo feda che kigiwai, koboto che kigiliige kanamoniguk che bo tahabu che kigitany: iwirtoi ko u kit ne mi simdo; ilenjini, Istege eng’ yu." 
Isaiah30:23 Ak koyok inendet ropta ne bo kesweguk, si kobiit igolse; ak kogonok amitwogik che bunu ruratetab emet, ak konerio ak kochang’ait: tun agete tuguk ole baraa eng’ betunoto." 
Isaiah30:24 Amei eik agichek ak moekab sigirok che ibatisiei, amitwogik che anyiny che kigigonor, che kigirue aterut ak keibet." 
Isaiah30:25 Ak kobiitu ainosiek ak kererusiek che mi beek eng’ tulwet age tugul ne o ne koi, ak eng’ tulwet age tugul ne ming’in ak ko toror, eng’ betutab barisiet ne o, ye ibutos teeksosiek che koen." 
Isaiah30:26 Kogeny, kogergeitu lapkeiyetab arawet ak ne bo asista, ak kotesak lapkeiyetab asista konyil tisab, koigei lapkeiyetab betusiek tisab, eng’ betut ne inyai Jehovah mookab bikyik, ak kosoob birutikab kaguotenenywa." 
Isaiah30:27 Ogeero, bunu kainetab Jehovah ole loo, lalei eng’ neregekyik, ak eng’ iyeto ne o ne togostoi; nyiitat kutinnyi nyitatet, ak u ng’elyeptanyi mat ne beelsei:" 
Isaiah30:28 ak u kabusennyi kererut ne mi beek che ing’irtogei, che itei kaatit, si kobiit kochuchugan bororiosiek eng’ kipchuchugetab ng’emisiet: ak kirate kutuswekab bik karnet ne imaasi." 
Isaiah30:29 Onyoru tiendo ko u eng’ kemout ye kiyaei igorta ne tilil; ak kagasetab ge ne bo muguleldo, ko u ye ibei chito ndurerut si kwo tulwetab Jehovah, agoi Ruandetab Israel." 
Isaiah30:30 Ak koyai Jehovah kutinnyi ne bo torornatet kogasak, ak kobor eunnyi ne choru, eng’ nyitatetab nereknatennyi, ak liblibenetab mat ne beelsei, koboto cheet, ak usonet ne o, ak koikab ropta." 
Isaiah30:31 Amu kitonatoni Suriek eng’ twegunetab Jehovah, ne birei eng’ kirokto." 
Isaiah30:32 Ak biret age tugul ne kiging’at, ne bire Jehovah inendet, komi koboto sugutisiek che mengech, ak ketubosiek: ak koborio koboto ichek eng’ lugosiek che kitumdumi." 
Isaiah30:33 Amu kigechob Topet koboch keny; ee, kigechopchi laitoriat; kigoyai kolooit kwo ng’ony ak kotebeesit: karurugutiennyi ko mat ak kwenik che chang’; inaami kabusetab Jehovah, ne kergei ak koik che laldos, che isururu." 
Isaiah31:1 Bwa eng’ ichek che chorjingei Misri kocheng’ei toretet, ak kotiiegei mbartanyisiek; ak komang’u karisiek, amu chang’, ak komang’u bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek, amu kimen kot; ago mainyali Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel, ama cheng’ei Jehovah!" 
Isaiah31:2 Ago ng’om inendet agine, ak ibu yaitiet, ama walei ng’alekyik: ago ng’eetei kogirindoi gotab yaikab yaitiet, ak toretetab icheget che yaei tengekto." 
Isaiah31:3 Ago bik Misrik, ma Kamuktaindet; ak banyek mbartanyisiekwak, ma tamirmiriet: ak ye chuul Jehovah eunnyi, keriichei inendet ne toretisiei, ak ibuti ne ketoreti, ak kobutos tuwai." 
Isaiah31:4 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ko u ye boriseni ng’etundo ak ng’etundo ne barnotiot, agobo tiondo ne kagobar, agot ngeguur mestowek che chang’ koawenji inendet, ko maarogeni eng’ waaganywa, anan koming’injigei bolatenywa: chorugei ko u noto Jehovah ne bo lugosiek koyai boriet eng’ tulwetab Sion ak eng’ tulwennyi ne ming’in." 
Isaiah31:5 Ko u ye tirirendos taritik, ko u noto ribei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek Jerusalem; ribei ak kosoru, siirtoi kowendi koribei." 
Isaiah31:6 Oweekyige inendet ne kiongelelji mising’, ee lagokab Israel." 
Isaiah31:7 Amu tun wirtoi chi age tugul eng’ betunoto kanamonikyik che bo feda, ak konamonikyik che bo tahabu, che kiyaiywok eunekwok koek tengekto." 
Isaiah31:8 Ibuti anyun Asuriaindet eng’ rotwetab chok, ma rotwetab chi; ak kobar inendet rotwetab chok, ne ma bo bik: ak komwee rotwetab chok, ak koek murenikyik otwogik." 
Isaiah31:9 Ak komwei ruandennyi amu kamuiset, ak kotoptobenso bounikyik amu songoliet ne kageer, mwaei Jehovah ne mi mannyi Sion, ak komi mannyi ne o Jerusalem." 
Isaiah32:1 Ogeero, laitorani laitoriat eng’ imanda, ak kobounis bounik eng’ kiruoget." 
Isaiah32:2 Ak egu chito ole kiung’ege eng’ usonet, ak eng’ usonet ne o; ko u ainosiekab beek eng’ ole yaamat, ko u uruetab ruandet ne o eng’ emetab ng’etatet." 
Isaiah32:3 Ama kigerei konyekab icheget che keertoi, ak kogasta itikab icheget che kastoi." 
Isaiah32:4 Ak koguiyo naet agichek mugulelwekab icheget che sartaisiei, ak kong’alalso komie ng’elyebwekab che uuen kutuswek." 
Isaiah32:5 Ma keguure kogeny chito ne berber, chito ne toogunot, anan keguure rebindet ne aiyeb." 
Isaiah32:6 Amu ng’alali ne berber kaberberisiet, ak koyai muguleldanyi tengekto, kochombilis, komwa ne ya agobo Jehovah, kometo buch sobondo ne amei rubet, ak koete koee ne amei melel." 
Isaiah32:7 Yaachen tuguk che bo rebindet: chobei chobutik che yaachen si kobare che taloen ng’alek che bo lembech, agot ye ng’alali ne matinyei kiy ng’alek che lititen." 
Isaiah32:8 Ago chobei ne toogunot, tuguk che toogunotin; ak tebyei eng’ tuguk che toogunotin." 
Isaiah32:9 Ong’eetye okwek kwonyik che omuunyi, ak ogas kutinnyu; oepchi it ng’alekyuk okwek tibik che moribege." 
Isaiah32:10 Amu kinyalilok eng’ betusiek alak ko kagosiirto kenyit, okwek kwonyik che moribege: amu betei ruratetab sabibuk, mabiitu kesisiet." 
Isaiah32:11 Obotanse okwek kwonyik che omuunyi; onyalilye, okwek che moribege; oreegu ngoroik, ak otebi ach ngor, ak ogermenege kuniok." 
Isaiah32:12 Luchei tegetik korirjin mbarenik che kororon, korirjin ketikab sabibuk che korurtos." 
Isaiah32:13 Bitos katok ak katablelinik eng’ emetab bikyuk; ee, eng’ gorik tugul che bo boiboiyet eng’ nganaset ne kobaibai:" 
Isaiah32:14 Amu kibagaktoi gotab laitoriat; kiue nganaset ne mi bik che chang’; bunjin koigeny tulwet ak teekset ne koi ne kitobendoe, koegu kebenonik ole boiboitune sigirok che bo timin, ak koek ole agete kechirek;" 
Isaiah32:15 agoi kerong’wech tamirmiriet eng’ barak, ak koek ong’atet mbaret ne rurei, ak kiroge mbaret ne rurei, osnet." 
Isaiah32:16 Komeny anyun kiruoget ong’atet, ak kotebe imanda mbaret ne rurei." 
Isaiah32:17 Ak koek boisietab imanda kalyet; ak kobiitune imanda kamuung’et ak kamang’unet koigeny. 
Isaiah32:18 Ak kotebe bikyuk meng’otetab kalyet, ak eng’ meng’otosiek che ribotin, ak eng’ komoswek che kimuung’e ole sisat." 
Isaiah32:19 Ago roboni koikab ropta kot kolul osnet; ak kolul nganaset tugul. 
Isaiah32:20 Oberurotin okwek che ogole tabanwekab beek tugul, che iyoktoi kelyekab eito ak che bo sigiriet." 
Isaiah33:1 Bwa eng’ inye ne ing’emisiei, ama king’emin; ak ne iberberisiei, ama iberberin ichek! Ye ma ing’emisiei, keng’emin: ak ye ma iberberisiei, koberberin ichek." 
Isaiah33:2 Ee Jehovah, rirenech; kigigenin: egu eunnyo karonet age tugul, ak iegu yetunennyo agine eng’ betutab nyalilda." 
Isaiah33:3 Mweei bik ye kas bolatetab wasetab ge; yestoi bororiosiek ye keng’eet. 
Isaiah33:4 Ak kiyumi barunenik ko u ye iyumisiei kutik: torombenjin ko u ye torombeni chereng’enyinik. 
Isaiah33:5 Toror Jehovah; amu menyei barak; kigonyiit Sion kiruoget ak imanda. 
Isaiah33:6 Tun biitu kimnatet eng’ betusieguk, ak oindab yetunet, ng’omnatet, ak naet: kaiyweisiet ne kiywei Jehovah ko konoruennyi." 
Isaiah33:7 Ogeero, waaktos eng’ sang’ bikwak che nyigonen: rirtos mising’ tononjinikab kalyet." 
Isaiah33:8 Kigelakta ortinwek che eechen, ma korutoi kiprutoiyot: kigobut kayomisutik, kigosas nganasok, ma koiiti chi." 
Isaiah33:9 Rirei emet ak konyaluli: ililani Lebanon ak koresei: u Saron ong’atet; ak boregei sok Basan ak Karmel. 
Isaiah33:10 Kang’eet anyun nguno, mwaei Jehovah; aeetu nguno; atororitu nguno." 
Isaiah33:11 Omanachi metetek, oiyie mobek: kabuseng’wong’ ko mat ne igeswok." 
Isaiah33:12 Ak kergeitu bik ak tartarik che kibeelei: ko u katok che kiluuli, che kibeelei eng’ ma." 
Isaiah33:13 Ogas, okwek che o looen, kit ne kiayai; ak okwek che o negit, ong’any kamugennyu." 
Isaiah33:14 Iyweisiei kiptengeginik che mi Sion; kigonam botanet che maiywei Kamuktaindet: Ng’o eng’ achek ne imuchi komeng’is ak mat ne igesu? Ng’o eng’ achek ne imuchi komeng’is ak mat ne lalei koigeny? 
Isaiah33:15 Inendet ne wendote imanda, ak kong’alali che lititen; inendet ne sasei kelunetab sastaet, ne manamei tugukab kagaigaet, ne timei itikyik si magas agobo korotik, ak ne tuchei konyekyik si mageer yaitiet;" 
Isaiah33:16 menyei inendet ole toror: oldanyi ole teegu ko irimoikab ruandosiek: kigochin amitwogikyik; mararjin beekyik. 
Isaiah33:17 Keerei konyeguk kororonindab laitoriat: keerei ichek emet ne kiuiitogei. 
Isaiah33:18 Ibwati muguleldang’ung’ agobo kamuiset: mi ano inendet ne iitisiei, mi ano inendet ne kerei karogendoetab aisurut? Mi ano inendet ne iiti teeksosiek che koen?" 
Isaiah33:19 Megeere bik che koromen, bik che baroen mokwekwak che memuchi iguiye; bik che ng’alali kutit ne too ne memuchi iguiye." 
Isaiah33:20 Keer Sion, nganasetab igorwekyok che kiging’at: tun keerei konyeguk Jerusalem, meng’otetab kamuung’et, emait ne magiutoi, ne magitutu tigongenikyik agoi, ama ng’etos boroonikyik." 
Isaiah33:21 Ago tun tebyei Jehovah kobotech eng’ oloto eng’ etunatennyi, oldab ainosiek che baroen ak kererusiek; ole mabunei moingetab beek ne kikwerie eng’ mugangok che kiwase beek, ama bunei yoto melit ne kararan." 
Isaiah33:22 Amu Jehovah ko kiruogindennyo, Jehovah ko ne konech ng’atutik, Jehovah ko laitoriandennyo; inendet ne soruech." 
Isaiah33:23 Kagitustus borooniguk; ma imuch kogimit kelutab toloitab melinywa: ma imuch koiito angetab melit: kopcheak anyun barunenikab tuguk che chang’ che kigiluul; kinam che ing’waldos barunenik. 
Isaiah33:24 Ak ma tun mwaei ne meng’isiei kole, Amiani: kinyochin kaat bik che menyei oloto, tengekwogikwak." 
Isaiah34:1 Origu okwek bororiosiek, si ogas; ak oeb it okwek bik: ingogas emet, ak tuguk che nyiitat oloto; ng’ony ak tuguk tugul che mong’une." 
Isaiah34:2 Amu tinyei Jehovah nyitatet agobo bororiosiek tugul, ak neregek che laldos agobo lugosiekwak tugul: kigong’em ichek koges, kigogoito ichek kebar." 
Isaiah34:3 Kiwirtoi bikwak che kigebar, ak buldos muswekwak, ak kochootyo tulonok amu korotikwak." 
Isaiah34:4 Ak kochoot luget tugul ne bo kipsengwet, ak kemaman kipsengwetisiek ko u kartasit: ak kowandagei lugenywa tugul, ko u sogot ne ibuti eng’ ketitab sabibuk, ak ko u sogot ne ibuti eng’ mogoiywet." 
Isaiah34:5 Amu kigoee rotwennyu bo chok eng’ kipsengwet kot konyi: ogeero, chorjingei Edom, ak chorjingei bik che kiachub, kiruokyi." 
Isaiah34:6 Nyiitat korotik rotwetab chok ne bo Jehovah, kigoakwait eng’ akwaindo, eng’ korotikab arekab kechir ak ng’ororek, koboto mwanikab soromok che bo mengichik: amu tinyei Jehovah tiseiywot eng’ Bosra, ak barisiet ne o eng’ emetab Edom." 
Isaiah34:7 Ak kochorgei soenik koboto ichek, kirugik che mengechen, koboto kirugik che eechen; ak kobogite emenywa korotik, ak koakwaitu temburiekwak eng’ akwaindo." 
Isaiah34:8 Amu betutab Jehovah ne bo yaaktaetab mugetut, kenyitab kageeret ne bo toiyetab Sion." 
Isaiah34:9 Ak kewal kererusiekyik koek manget, ak kewal temburiekyik koek koik che laldos, ak koek emennyi manget ne lalei." 
Isaiah34:10 Magimisi kemoi anan bet; togostoi iyetanyi koigeny: egu karatia koboch ibinda age agoi ibinda age; mabunei chi yoto koigeny ak koigeny. 
Isaiah34:11 Ago bunjin chebokibabaa ak chepswererit; ak komeny oloto sugurut ak chepkugit: ak kochuul eng’ baragunnyi borowetab toiyet, ak borowet ne bo buch ne bo kalititisiet." 
Isaiah34:12 Kuurei ichek bik che toogunotin kobwa bounatet, ago mabiitu chi eng’ oloto; egu buch bounikyik tugul." 
Isaiah34:13 Ak kobitye katok gorikyik che bo laitorinik, ak kobitye siwek ak katablelinik irimoikyik: ak koek meng’otetab lelwek, ak seremutab tiong’ikab songolik." 
Isaiah34:14 Ak kotuiyo tiong’ikab ong’atet ak suik, ak kowaach kwesta kowaakyi choruennyi; ee, tebe oloto sugurut ne bo kemoi, ak kosikyigei ole imuung’e." 
Isaiah34:15 Ak koteekyigei eng’ oloto sugurut ne o keswennyi, ak kolok, ak kogeeny, ak koyumji arekyik uruennyi: ee, iyumjingei oloto keerosiek, age tugul ak koget." 
Isaiah34:16 Ocheng’ eng’ bukuitab Jehovah, ak osoman: mabetei agot agenge eng’ chuto, mami ne rartae koget: amu kang’at kutinnyu, ak kagoyum ichek tamirmiriennyi." 
Isaiah34:17 Ak kigoser barbarek agobo ichek, ak kigopchechi ichek eunnyi eng’ borowet: bunjin ichek agoi, menyei oloto koboch ibinda age agoi ibinda age." 
Isaiah35:1 Igasegei ong’atet ak turguito, ak kobaibait emet ne surkwen, ak koiye ko u taptet." 
Isaiah35:2 Yiei mising’, ak kobaibait eng’ boiboiyet ak eng’ tiendo; kigochin torornatetab Lebanon, telunatetab Karmel ak Saron: keerei ichek torornatetab Jehovah, telunatetab Kamuktaindennyo." 
Isaiah35:3 Ogimit eunek che nyalulyotin, ogiil kutung’oik che ma kimen." 
Isaiah35:4 Olenji ichek che arogendos, Ogimegitu, amoiyweisie: ogeero, nyonei Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ak yaaktaetab mugetut, koboto kageeretab Kamuktaindet; nyonei kosoruok." 
Isaiah35:5 Koyatogis anyun konyekab che koriotin, ak koyatogis itik che timotin." 
Isaiah35:6 Yeityo kotoromben chito ne ing’wali ko u cheptirgichet, ak kotien ng’elyeptab ne namat kut: amu kutu beek eng’ ong’atet, ak kobiit kererusiek eng’ surkwen." 
Isaiah35:7 Ak koek ng’aniek che ilyeldos tamboiyot ak koek emet ne yaamat kong’ikab beek: ak eng’ meng’otetab lelwek, ole kiruitos ichek, kobiitune yoto suswek ak saoset ak cherungusiek." 
Isaiah35:8 Ak kobiit oret ne o eng’ oloto, ak oret, ak kiguure oranato Oretab Tililindo; mabunei oranato che muruonen ago bunjin bichoto; ama betos eng’ oranato kiprutoinik, agot ngo berber." 
Isaiah35:9 Mabiitu ng’etundo eng’ oloto, ama bunei oranato tiondo age tugul ne korom, maginyorjin oloto; ago bunei oloto che kigitiach:" 
Isaiah35:10 ak koweek bikab Jehovah che kigitiach, ak kobwa Sion kotienonu; ak kotebe baragunywa boiboiyetab koigeny: nyoru kagasetab ge ak boiboiyet, ak komwei arogenet ak tigenoik." 
Isaiah36:1 Ak eng’ kenyitab taman ak ang’wan ne bo laitoriat Hesekia, kobokyi Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria, nganasok tugul che ng’ototin che bo Juda, ak konam." 
Isaiah36:2 Ak kiiyok laitoriatab Asuria Rabsake eng’ Lakis konyo Jerusalem oldab laitoriat Hesekia, koboto luget ne o, ak kitonone ole negite kererjetab tamboiyot ne bo meto eng’ oret ne o ne bo koretab mwetindet." 
Isaiah36:3 Yeityo konyo ole mi inendet Eliakim weritab Hilkia, ne ki ribindetab tugukab got, koboto Sebna sirindet, ak Joas weritab Asap sirindetab tuguk che biitu." 
Isaiah36:4 Ak kilenji Rabsake bichoto, Olenji Hesekia, Mwaei laitoriat ne o, laitoriatab Asuria, ko u ni kole, Nee kamang’unani omang’u?" 
Isaiah36:5 Amwae ale, ng’alek buch kiruogutiguk ak kimnateng’ung’ ne bo luget: ng’o anyun ne imang’u kot ingelelja?" 
Isaiah36:6 Keero, imang’u kiroktab tegandani kigeiri, noto ko Misri; ne ngot kotiiegei chi, kotoorei eunnyi: u noto Parao laitoriatab Misri eng’ tugul che imang’u inendet." 
Isaiah36:7 Ago ngot ilenja, Kimang’u Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo: ko tos ma inendet ne chechik komoswek che tororen ak kapkorosusiek che kigoisto Hesekia, ak kolenji Juda ak Jerusalem, Osae eng’ taitab kaptisisioni?" 
Isaiah36:8 Ara anyun, asomin ale, igochi kit ne bo kayosiet kiptaiyandennyu laitoriatab Asuria, si agonin mbartanyisiek elfusiek aeng’, ngot imuchi eng’ komostang’ung’, inde bik che lanyei." 
Isaiah36:9 Imuktoi ano anyun igirinde kiptaiyat agenge eng’ otwogik che mengechen che bo kiptaiyandennyu, ak imang’u Misri amu karisiek ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek?" 
Isaiah36:10 Ak tos katogosu kebarge ak emoni ang’em, ama mi kobota Jehovah? Kimwawa Jehovah, kolenja, Togoste obarge ak emoni ak ing’em." 
Isaiah36:11 Komwachi anyun Eliakim ak Sebna ak Joa Rabsake kolenji, Asomin ale, ng’alalji otwogiguk eng’ kutitab Suria; amu kigase: mat ing’alalwech eng’ kutitab Yahudik, kogasei bik che mi irimet barak."
