Isaiah36:12 Ago kile Rabsake, Tos kaiyokwa kiptaiyandennyu anyo oldab kiptaiyandeng’ung’ ak oldang’ung’, amwa ng’alechu? Tos ma iyokwa awa ole mi bik che mi irimet barak, si kobiit koam kobotok ng’atatekwak ak koee beekwak?" 
Isaiah36:13 Kotonon anyun Rabsake, ak kobol eng’ kutit ne o eng’ ng’alekab Yahudik kole, Ogas okwek ng’alekab laitoriat ne o, laitoriatab Asuria." 
Isaiah36:14 Kole laitoriat, Among’ koberberak Hesekia; amu maimuchi kosoruok." 
Isaiah36:15 Amocham kong’atak Hesekia omang’u Jehovah, kole, Soruech iman Jehovah; magigochin nganasani eutab laitoriatab Asuria." 
Isaiah36:16 Amogas ng’alekab Hesekia: amu mwaei laitoriatab Asuria kole, Yai kalyet kobota, ak omong’u obwanja; ak ingoam chi age tugul eng’ okwek sabibukyik, ak ingoam chi age tugul logoekab mogoonikyik, ak koee chi age tugul beekab keringennyi:" 
Isaiah36:17 agoi anyo amutak obe emet ne kergei ak neng’wong’, emet ne mi bek ak divaik, emet ne mi amitwogik ak mbarenikab sabibuk." 
Isaiah36:18 Oripge si maigaigaak Hesekia, kolenjok, Soruech Jehovah. Tos kigosor age eng’ cheptalelisiekab bororiosiek, emennyi eng’ eutab laitoriatab Asuria?" 
Isaiah36:19 Mi ano cheptalelisiekab Hamat ak che bo Arpad? Mi ano cheptalelisiekab Separbaim? Ak tos kisor ichek Samaria eng’ eunnyi? 
Isaiah36:20 Ng’o eng’ cheptalelisiek tugul che bo emotinwechu che kigosor emenywa eng’ eunnyu, kot kosor Jehovah Jerusalem eng’ eunnyu?" 
Isaiah36:21 Ago kisisyo, ma wolji agot ng’olyo: amu kimwaei ng’atutietab laitoriat kole, Amat owolji kiy." 
Isaiah36:22 Kinyo anyun Eliakim weritab Hilkia ne ki ne kibou got, ak Sebna sirindet, ak Joa weritab Asap sirindetab tuguk che biitu, kobwa ole mi Hesekia ko kagogerer ngoroikwak, kobwa komwachi ng’alekab Rabsake." 
Isaiah37:1 Ak kingogas laitoriat Hesekia, kogerer ngoroikyik, ak kotugegei kuniok, ak kwo gotab Jehovah." 
Isaiah37:2 Ak koyokto Eliakim ne kibou got, ak Sebna sirindet, ak boisiekab tisiik, kotugotegei kuniok, koba ole mi Isaia maotiot, weritab Amos." 
Isaiah37:2 Ak koyokto Eliakim ne kibou got, ak Sebna sirindet, ak boisiekab tisiik, kotugotegei kuniok, koba ole mi Isaia maotiot, weritab Amos." 
Isaiah37:3 Ak kilenji inendet, Kamwa Hesekia ko u ni kole, Betuni ko betutab nyalilda, ak keretab kong’, ak chubisiet: amu kait kesich lagok, ama mi kimnatet ne kesige." 
Isaiah37:4 Abere imuchi kogas Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ng’alekab Rabsake, ne kagoyok laitoriatab Asuria kiptaiyandennyi, konyo kochot kamuktaindet ne sobei, ak koger kong’ ng’alek che kagas Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’: ara anyun sa agobo bik che ng’etunotin." 
Isaiah37:5 Kobwa anyun otwogikab laitoriat Hesekia ole mi Isaia. 
Isaiah37:6 Ak kilenji Isaia ichek, Omwachini kiptaiyandeng’wong’ ko u ni, olenjini, Kamwa Jehovah kole, Ameiywei ng’alek che kegas, che kachubena otwogikab laitoriatab Asuria." 
Isaiah37:7 Keero, andoi inendet tamirmiriet, ak kasei ng’alekab bik, ak koweek kwo emennyi; ak agoite kebar eng’ rotwetab chok eng’ emennyi." 
Isaiah37:8 Koweek anyun Rabsake, ak koitita kobaregei laitoriatab Asuria ak Libna: amu kiga kas kole kikwa eng’ Lakis." 
Isaiah37:9 Ak kigas kemwaei agobo Tiraka laitoriatab Etiopia, kele, Kogonyo obarge. Ak kingogas koyokto bik koba oldab Hesekia, kolenji," 
Isaiah37:10 Omwachini Hesekia, laitoriatab Juda, olenjini, Amengoberberin Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne imang’u, kolenjin, Magigoitoi Jerusalem kwo eutab laitoriatab Asuria." 
Isaiah37:11 Keero, kiigas kit ne kiyachi laitorinikab Asuria emotinwek tugul, eng’ ng’emet ne king’em ichek koges: kesorun inye?" 
Isaiah37:12 Tos kisor ichek cheptalelisiekab bororiosiek, che kibar kwanisiekyuk, Gosan, ak Haran, ak Resep, ak lagokab Eden che kimi Telasar?" 
Isaiah37:13 Mi ano laitoriatab Hamat, ak laitoriatab Arpad, ak laitoriatab nganasetab Separbaim, ne bo Hena, ak Iba?" 
Isaiah37:14 Ak kinam Hesekia baruet eng’ eutab bik che kiga kiyok, ak kosoman: ak kitogosta Hesekia kwo gotab Jehovah, ak koiito baruanato eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Isaiah37:15 Ak kisa Hesekia Jehovah kole," 
Isaiah37:16 Ee Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ne tebe kerubisiek, i Kamuktaindet, inye inyege, ne bo bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony; kiiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony." 
Isaiah37:17 Eb it, ee Jehovah, ak igeer; ak kas ng’alek tugul che bo Senakerib, che kagoyok kochote Kamuktaindet ne sobei." 
Isaiah37:18 Iman, Jehovah, kigobar laitorinikab Asuria, emotinwek tugul, ak emenywa," 
Isaiah37:19 ak kigowirji ma kanamonikwak: amu kima ko cheptalelisiek, ago ki boisietab eunekab bik, ketit ak koik; king’em anyun ichek tuguchoto amu noto." 
Isaiah37:20 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, soruech eng’ eunnyi, si konai bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony kole i Jehovah, inye inyege." 
Isaiah37:21 Koyokto anyun Isaia weritab Amos chito kwo oldab Hesekia, kolenji, Kamwa Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ko u ye kaisaa agobo Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria," 
Isaiah37:21 Koyokto anyun Isaia weritab Amos chito kwo oldab Hesekia, kolenji, Kamwa Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ko u ye kaisaa agobo Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria," 
Isaiah37:22 ni ng’olyot ne kagomwa Jehovah agobo inendet: Kasasin bergeiyat cheptab Sion, ak kororechin kochotin; kagolelech metinnyi cheptab Jerusalem eng’ inye." 
Isaiah37:23 Ak ng’o ne kiichot ak ichub? Ak ng’o ne kiibolji ak injurur? Noto ko Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel. 
Isaiah37:24 Koichot Kiptaiyat eng’ otwogiguk, ak koile, Anyone kot aitu baragutab tulonok koboto chang’indab karisiekyuk, kot aitu orit eng’ Lebanon; ak aluul taragonikyik che koen, ak biribirinikyik che kororon: ak achute komosta ne toror mising’, osnetab mbarennyi ne rurei." 
Isaiah37:25 Kiabal ak aee beek, ak ateny ainosiek tugul che bo Misri eng’ keldebesaikab kelyekyuk." 
Isaiah37:26 Tom igas ole kiayaite ko u noto keny, ak ayai eng’ betusiek che bo keny? Ara kaasulde nguno, si kobiit ibut nganasok che ng’ototin koek karurugutik che kiging’em." 
Isaiah37:27 Kiek anyun bik che kimenyei nganasochato, che tinyei kimnatet ne ming’in, kimeiyo mugulelwekwak ak kokwong’io; kiigei suswekab kewet, ak koigei sogek che ng’orng’or, ak koigei suswek che mi gorik barak, ak ko u mbaretab bek kotomo koeegitu." 
Isaiah37:28 Ago angen kabuureng’ung’, ak mandaeng’ung’, ak nyonuneng’ung’ ne inyone go, ak neregeguk che koromen agobo ane." 
Isaiah37:29 Amu neregeguk che koromen agobo ane, ak amu kogoit itikyuk loseng’ung’ ne bo ge, andoi anyun kombet serung’ung’, ak ande karnennyu kuting’ung’, ak aweechin ibun oret ne kebunu." 
Isaiah37:30 Ak egu ni kaborunet ne kiborun: oame eng’ kenyini che bitos ichegei, ak oam eng’ kenyitab aeng’ che siegune choto; ak eng’ kenyitab somok, ogol, ak oges, ak omin ketikab sabibuk, ak oam logoekwak." 
Isaiah37:31 Ak bitos kogeny kobendi ng’ony tigitikab che ng’etu che chilildos che bo gotab Juda, ak koiyo logoek eng’ barak." 
Isaiah37:32 Amu mandoi eng’ Jerusalem che kang’et, ak chilildos eng’ tulwetab Sion: yaei nito kagiiletab ge ne bo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah37:33 Mwaei anyun Jehovah agobo laitoriatab Asuria, kole, Maitu inendet nganasani, ama mwogei yoto eng’ kipchabet, ama nyonei tainnyi kotinyei long’et, ama wasyin ng’ung’unyek." 
Isaiah37:34 Weegegei oret ne kibunu, ama itu nganasani, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah37:35 Amu aribe nganasani, asoru, agobo ane, ak agobo Daudi otwogindennyu." 
Isaiah37:36 Ak kimanda malaikaiyatab Jehovah, ak kobar bik elfusiek bogol ak tamanwogik sisiit ak mut eng’ nganasetab Asuriek: ak kingong’eetyo bik karon, ogeero, ki muswek tugul, che kogobek." 
Isaiah37:37 Kwo anyun Senakerib laitoriatab Asuria, koweek ak kwo komeny Ninebe." 
Isaiah37:38 Ak ye kita kosaei eng’ gotab Nisrok kanamwennyi, kobar inendet werikyik Adramelek ak Sareser eng’ rotwetab chok: ak komwei koba emetab Ararat. Ak kilaitoran Esar-hadon werinnyi kogeer inendet." 
Isaiah38:1 Kimian Hesekia eng’ betusiechoto kot ko negit kome. Ak kinyo ole mi inendet Isaia maotiot weritab Amos, ak kolenji inendet, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Rarji ket bikab gong’ung’; amu imee, mesobe." 
Isaiah38:1 Kimian Hesekia eng’ betusiechoto kot ko negit kome. Ak kinyo ole mi inendet Isaia maotiot weritab Amos, ak kolenji inendet, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Rarji ket bikab gong’ung’; amu imee, mesobe." 
Isaiah38:2 Kowelel anyun Hesekia togennyi kogeer inat, ak kosa Jehovah," 
Isaiah38:3 kole, Ee Jehovah, asain ale, ibwat ole kiatepte eng’ imanda eng’ taing’ung’ ak eng’ muguleldo ne igesunotgei, ak kiayai ne mie eng’ taing’ung’. Ak kirir Hesekia eng’ ng’wanindo." 
Isaiah38:4 Konyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Isaia kolenji," 
Isaiah38:5 Ui mwachi Hesekia ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Daudi kwandang’ung’ ko u ni kole, Kaagas saeng’ung’, kaageer beeguk bo kong’: keero, atesyini betusieguk kenyisiek taman ak mut." 
Isaiah38:6 Ak asorun koboto nganasani eng’ eunekab laitoriatab Asuria: ak aribe nganasani. 
Isaiah38:7 Ak egu ni kaborunet eng’ inye ne bunu Jehovah, kele yaei Jehovah kii kagomwa:" 
Isaiah38:8 Keero, aweechi uruet ne bo tilutik ne kagorekta koboto asista eng’ kit ne kirogendoe saisiek, ne bo Ahas, koweek kwo let tilutik taman. Kotogos anyun asista tilutik taman eng’ kioto kirogendoisie ne kaga korektae." 
Isaiah38:9 Chu ng’alek che kisir Hesekia laitoriatab Juda, ye kiga komian, kot kosob eng’ miandanyi." 
Isaiah38:10 Kiamwa ale, Achute kurgetab kererit, eng’ kwenutab betusiekyuk; Kagirebena betusiekyuk che ng’etunotin." 
Isaiah38:11 Kiamwa ale, Ma ageere Jehovah, inendet Jehovah eng’ emetab bik che soptos: Ma ageere chito kogeny koboto che menyei ng’ony." 
Isaiah38:12 Kageisto meng’otennyu, kageibena ko u emait ne bo mestowot: Kiamaman sobondanyu ko u ye mamanisiei chito ne nabisiei; istoa eng’ ketit ne kinabisie: Igeswa koboch bet agoi kemoi." 
Isaiah38:13 Kiasis kot koeech; irie kowekyuk tugul ko u ng’etundo: Igeswa koboch bet agoi kemoi. 
Isaiah38:14 Kiatwegu anyun ko u kibiswet anan cheptalamiat: Kiarir ko u cheptuget: kianyal barak kot koimenitu konyekyuk; Ee Jehovah, kinyalila, egu ne tononwa." 
Isaiah38:15 Amwae nee anyun? King’alalwa, ak kigoyai inendet kosulda: Awendi mutyo kenyisiekyuk tugul amu ng’wanindab sobondanyu." 
Isaiah38:16 Ee Kiptaiyat, soptos bik eng’ tuguchuto, Ak mitei sobondab tamirmiriennyu tuguchoto tugul: Inyaa anyun, ak igona asob." 
Isaiah38:17 Keero, kianyoru ng’wanindo ne o agobo kalyennyu: Ago kiisoru sobondanyu komong’une keringetab ng’emisiet amu ichame: Amu kiiwirte tengekwogikyuk koba let." 
Isaiah38:18 Amu maimuchi kererit kolosun, maimuchi meet kobwatin: Maimuchi komang’ imandang’ung icheget che chorjingei keringet." 
Isaiah38:19 Ilosun che soptos, ee che soptos, ko u ye alosun ra: Iborjin kwanda lagok imandang’ung’." 
Isaiah38:20 Chobot Jehovah kosorua; Kitieni anyun tienwogikyuk eng’ kibugandinikab inoik Eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyo eng’ gotab Jehovah. 
Isaiah38:21 Kiga komwa Isaia kole, Ingoib logoekab mogoonik che inurotin, ak konuge ole mi burasta, si kosob." 
Isaiah38:22 Kiga mwa Hesekia kole, Nee kaborunet ne iborua kole atogostoi gotab Jehovah?" 
Isaiah39:1 Kiiyokyi eng’ betusiechoto Merodak-baladan weritab Baladen laitoriatab Babulon baronok ak kagochinet, Hesekia: amu kigas kole kiga komian, ak kigosob." 
Isaiah39:2 Ak kibaibait Hesekia agobo tuguchoto, ak kiiborji ichek gotab tugukyik che bo kamanutiet ne o, feda, ak tahabu, ak nyamdutik, ak mwanik che kororon mising’, ak got tugul ne bo karikyik, koboto tugukyik tugul che konorotin: ma ng’et kiy eng’ gonnyi, anan eng’ bounatennyi, ne ma iborji Hesekia bichoto." 
Isaiah39:3 Kinyo anyun maotiot Isaia oldab laitoriat Hesekia, ak koteebe kolenji, Kale nee bichu? Ak kabunu ano kobwanei oling’ung’? Ak kile Hesekia, Kabwa olinnyu kobunu emet ne loo, emetab Babulon." 
Isaiah39:4 Kolenji anyun, Kageer nee eng’ gong’ung’? Ak kiwol Hesekia kole, Kageer tuguk tugul che mi gonnyu: mami kiy eng’ konoraikyuk ne ma aborji ichek." 
Isaiah39:5 Kolenji anyun Isaia Hesekia, Kas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah39:6 Keero, bwanei betusiek che tun kiibei tuguk tugul che mi gong’ung’ koba Babulon, koboto che kigonor kwanisieguk agoi ra: mami kiy ne ng’etu, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah39:7 Ak komuti alak eng’ weriguk che mong’unenen, che isiche; ak koba koek ichek kiptainik eng’ gotab laitoriatab Babulon." 
Isaiah39:8 Kolenji anyun Hesekia Isaia, Mie ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kemwa. Kimwa kogeny kole, Amu mi kalyet ak imanit eng’ betusiekyuk." 
Isaiah40:1 Ogaigai, ogaigai bikyuk, mwaei Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Isaiah40:2 Ong’alalji Jerusalem eng’ kagaigaet, ak omwachi eng’ kutit ne o olenji, kagogesgei boriennyi, kagenyochi kaat tengektanyi; kagotaach eng’ eutab Jehovah biret konyil aeng’ agobo tengekwogikyik tugul." 
Isaiah40:3 Kutitab ne ititeni, kolen, Ochob okwek oretab Jehovah eng’ surkwen, olitit oret ne o eng’ ong’atet agobo Kamuktaindennyo." 
Isaiah40:4 Tun kilong’u atebwet age tugul, ak tun kiripribi tulwet age tugul ne o ak ne ming’in: ak tun kilititi che kunuren, ak kichaboi komoswek che sing’ortot:" 
Isaiah40:5 Ak keng’any torornatetab Jehovah, ak tun keerei bik tugul: amu kamwa Jehovah nito." 
Isaiah40:6 Kutitab chi ne mwaei kole, Waach. Ak kole age, Awaakyi nee? Suswek borwek tugul, ak u taptok che bo kewet kororonindanywa tugul:" 
Isaiah40:7 Restos suswek, ak kobetos taptok; amu usyin kabusetab Jehovah: suswek bik iman." 
Isaiah40:8 Restos suswek, ak kobetos taptok: ago tononi koigeny ng’olyotab Kamuktaindennyo." 
Isaiah40:9 Togoste tulwet ne koi inye ne imwachini logoiywek che miach Sion; waach mising’ eng’ kimnatet inye ne imwachini Jerusalem logoiywek che miach; waach, ameiywei; mwachi nganasokab Juda ilenji, Ogeer, Kamuktaindeng’wong’!" 
Isaiah40:10 Ogeero, nyonei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u inendet ne kim, ak kobounisiei eunnyi agobo inendet: ogeero, mi melektanyi koboto inendet, ak mi yaaktaennyi tainnyi." 
Isaiah40:11 Baei kechirekyik ko u mestowot, iyumi eunnyi arekab kechir, ak komute tegennyi, ak kondochi mutyo che aboen." 
Isaiah40:12 Ng’o ne kiger beek kogeer ole te, eng’ rubeitanyi, ak kokwa kipsengwet eng’ morikyik, ak konai ole te temburiekab ng’ony eng’ karogendoet, ak korogendo tulonok eng’ ratilisiek, koboto tulonok che mengechen eng’ kit ne kirogendoisie?" 
Isaiah40:13 Ng’o ne kiindochi tamirmirietab Jehovah, anan ng’o konetindennyi ne kiinet inendet?" 
Isaiah40:14 King’alal ak ng’o, ak kiine ng’o inendet, ak konet inendet eng’ oretab kiruoget, ak konet naet, ak koborji inendet oretab kaguiyet?" 
Isaiah40:15 Ogeero, u bororiosiek beek che kasaita konyil agenge eng’ teret, ak kiiti ko u temburiek che tutigin che mi kit ne kirogendoisie: ogeero, inemu ngegusiek ko u kit ne ming’in mising’." 
Isaiah40:16 Ak mayamei kwenikab Lebanon kilaal, ama yamei tiong’ikab oloto koek kagochinet ne kibeelei." 
Isaiah40:17 U buch bororiosiek tugul eng’ tainnyi; kiiti ichek kele u buch eng’ inendet, ak tangoita." 
Isaiah40:18 Orogendoi ng’o anyun Kamuktaindet? Anan nee kergeindo ne orogendoi inendet? 
Isaiah40:19 Ichooti musogindet tuguk si kobiit kowai kanamwet, ak koliige kitang’indetab tahabu kanamwonoto tahabu, ak kotang’ji sirimwekab feda." 
Isaiah40:20 Chito ne banan mising’ agobo kagochinet ne u noto, ne kinamjin barak, koleweni ketit ne manunei; cheng’jingei musogindet ne ng’om si kolumda kanamwet ne kiwaei, ne maging’ei." 
Isaiah40:21 Tos tom onai? Tos tom ogas? Tos tom kemwawok koboch taunet? Tos tom oguiye koboch ngab kelumda lumeiywekab ng’ony? 
Isaiah40:22 Inendet ko ne tebe ole boch yiemutietab ng’ony, ak u che menyei oloto, talamik; ne iitoi kipsengwetisiek ko u anget, ak koiito kipsengwetisiechoto ko u emait ne kimenyei:" 
Isaiah40:23 inendet ne yaei bounik koek buch, ne yaei kiruogikab ng’ony koek tangoita." 
Isaiah40:24 Ee, kima komin ichek, ee, kima kigol ichek; ee, kima nam ng’ony tigitikwak: si koguut inendet ichek, ak koresyo, ak koib kipchurjuriet ichek ko u mobek." 
Isaiah40:25 Orogendoa ng’o anyun, kot kegergeitu ak inendet? Mwaei Inendet ne Tilil." 
Isaiah40:26 Onyal barak, ogeer ole ng’o ne kitoi koyai chuto, ne imutu lugenywa kobee koitet: kuurei tugul eng’ kainaikwak, eng’ oindab kamugennyi, ak kim inendet eng’ kamuktaet, ma bet agot agenge." 
Isaiah40:27 Amu nee si ile inye Jakobo, ak ing’alali, ee Israel, ile, Ung’at orennyu eng’ Jehovah, kigosiirto kiruogennyu ama mage kiy Kamuktaindennyu?" 
Isaiah40:28 Tos tom inai? Tos tom igas? Manyaluli, ama ng’etei Kamuktaindet ne bo koigeny, inendet Jehovah, Yaindetab ng’ony komugul; maisiagaksei naennyi." 
Isaiah40:29 Igochin kimnatet ne nyaluli; ak tesyin kimnatet inendet ne matinyei kamuget. 
Isaiah40:30 Nyaluldos ak kong’etos agot neranik, ak kobutyo murenik:" 
Isaiah40:31 ago nyoru kimnatet ne leel icheget che igeni Jehovah; togostoi kotirirendos ko u kipsichinik; ruaei, ama ng’etos; bendoti, ama nyaluldos." 
Isaiah41:1 Osisye eng’ tainnyu, ee ngegusiek; ingonyor bororiosiek kimnatenywa ne leel: ingorik; yeityo kong’alalso: ongerigu tugul oldab kiruoget." 
Isaiah41:2 Ng’o ne kiing’eet inendet ne bunu kong’asis, ne kuurei eng’ imanda konyo kelyekyik? Igoitoi bororiosiek eng’ tainnyi, ak kogochi inendet koboi laitorinik; igochin ichek koigei temburiek eng’ rotwennyi bo chok, ko u metetek che arureni, eng’ taitab kwangennyi." 
Isaiah41:3 Onei, ak kosiirto eng’ kalyet; agot eng’ oret ne kitom kobunei." 
Isaiah41:4 Ng’o ne kigobois ak koges, ne kuurei ibinwek koboch taunet? Ane Jehovah ne bo tai, ak ne bo let, a inendet." 
Isaiah41:5 Kigeer ngegusiek, ak koiywei; kibotanso komoswek tugul che bo ng’ony: kirik, kobwa." 
Isaiah41:6 Kitoret age tugul chitab kokwennyi, ak kolenji tugul ng’etab kamet, Nyiganitu." 
Isaiah41:7 Kogiil anyun musogindetab baoinik kitang’indetab tahabu, ak inendet ne ichabaisie kiriswet kogiili inendet ne birei karnet ne o, komwachin agobo ole kituiye ngosielait, kolenjin, Mie: yeityo kogiige kipchumarisiek, si maging’ei." 
Isaiah41:8 Ago inye Israel, otwogindennyu, Jakobo ne kialewen, iyotetab choruennyu Abraham;" 
Isaiah41:9 inye ne kianamin koboch tabanwekab ng’ony, ak aguurin imong’une luukwekyik, ak alenjin, I otwogindennyu, kialewenin ama atimdoin;" 
Isaiah41:10 ameiyweisie, amu ami koboten; amearogen, amu a Kamuktaindeng’ung’: agimitin; ee, atoretin; ee, anamin eng’ eunnyu ne bo tai ne bo imandanyu." 
Isaiah41:11 Keero, ililandos tugul che nerekyinin ak kotoptobenso: egu buch ak kobetyo." 
Isaiah41:12 Icheng’e ichek, amenyoru, agot ichek che obarege: egu buch che borienen, ak kogergeit ak kiy buch." 
Isaiah41:13 Amu aname eung’ung’ ne bo tai, ane Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, alenjinin, Ameiyweisie; atoretin." 
Isaiah41:14 Ameiyweisie, inye Jakobo, ne i kutiet, ak okwek bikab Israel; atoretin, mwaei Jehovah, ak katiagindeng’ung’ ko Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Isaiah41:15 Keero, ayain iegu kit ne leel ne ng’atib ne kiborse, ne tinyei kelek: ibore tulonok, ak itui komengegitu, ak iyai tulonok che mengech kogergeit ak metetek." 
Isaiah41:16 Iruri, si koib usonet, ak koyesta kipchurjuriet: ak ibaibaitu eng’ Jehovah, ilosunegei Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Isaiah41:17 Cheng’ei beek bik che bonon ak che matinyei kiy, ago mami, ak koyaamei ng’elyepta amu melelda; awoljini, ane Jehovah, mametoi ane Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Isaiah41:18 Ayate ainosiek eng’ komoswek che tororen ole churat, ak ayat kondametusiekab beek eng’ kwenutab atebwosiek: ayae ong’atet koek tamboiyot, ak emet ne yaamat kobiitune kong’ikab beek." 
Isaiah41:19 Amine eng’ ong’atet taragonik, ketikab shita, ak che kiguure myrtle, ak che bo mwanik; ak ande surkwen biribirinik, taragonik che sabulen, ak taragonik che ter kobityo tugul." 
Isaiah41:20 Si komuch kogeer, ak konai, ak kobwat, ak koguiyo kibagenge, kole kiyai eutab Jehovah nito, ak kitoi koyai nito Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Isaiah41:21 Kale Jehovah, Omwa ng’alekwok; kale Laitoriatab Jakobo, Oibu ng’alekwok che kimen." 
Isaiah41:22 Ingoib ichek, ak komwawech kit ne biitu: omwa tuguk che bo tai, kit ne u, si kobiit kibwat, ak kenai kagesunenywa, anan oboruech tuguk che tun bwanei." 
Isaiah41:23 Omwa tuguk che ta kobiitu, si kobiit kenai kele o cheptalelisiek: ee, oyai ne mie, anan oyai ne ya, si kobiit ketoptobense, ak kegeer achek tugul." 
Isaiah41:24 Ogeero, o bo buch, ak boisieng’wong’ ko bo buch: kiwechei inendet ne lewenok." 
Isaiah41:25 Koang’eet age ne bunu murot ne bo katam, ak kagoit; bunu inendet ne kuure kainennyu ole chorunei asista: ak nyonjin bounik ko u ye nyonjin menet, ak ko u cheptereniot ne tiechei menet." 
Isaiah41:26 Ng’o ne kigomwa ng’olyondoni koboch taunet, si kobiit kenai? Ak ne kisib komwa, si kobiit kemwa kele, Bo inendet imanda? Ee, mami agot agenge ne mwaei, ee, mami agot agenge ne iboru, ee, mami agot agenge ne kasei ng’alekwok." 
Isaiah41:27 Amwachini korok Sion, alenjini, Keero, keer ichek-o; ak agochini Jerusalem inendet ne ibu logoiywek che miach." 
Isaiah41:28 Ak ye ageer, ko mami chi; mami kiruogindet agot eng’ kwenunya, ne ye ateebe ichek, komuchi kowol ng’olyo." 
Isaiah41:29 Ogeer tugul-o, tangoita boisionikwak ak ko buch: usonet ak toiyet kanamonikwak che kitanyi." 
Isaiah42:1 Ogeero otwogindennyu, ne agimiti; nenyu ne kialewen ne boiboitune sobondanyu: kande inendet tamirmiriennyu; ipchin kiruoget bororiosiek." 
Isaiah42:2 Mabolei, anan kowaach, anan kotwek kot kegas kutinnyi eng’ oret." 
Isaiah42:3 Mairiei tegat ne chisot, ama imisi inendet kitambit ne iyeni: ibu kiruoget eng’ iman." 
Isaiah42:4 Matanui ama nyogoritu, agoi konde ng’ony kiruoget; ak kogen ngegusiek, ng’atutiennyi." 
Isaiah42:5 Mwaei ko u noto Kamuktaindet Jehovah, ne kitoi koyai kipsengwetisiek, ak koiito; inendet ne kiito ng’onyuni, ak che mong’une oloto; inendet ne igochin kabuset bik che menyei ng’ony, ak kogochi tamirmiriet ichek che bendote:" 
Isaiah42:6 Kiaguurin, ane Jehovah, eng’ imanda, ak anam eung’ung’, ak aribin, ak agonin iegu arorutietab bik, iegu lapkeiyetab Bororiosiek;" 
Isaiah42:7 iyat konyek che koriotin, imoong’u kimonjororinik eng’ korgoret, ak imoong’u che tebe mesundeito komong’une got ne kigiratyi." 
Isaiah42:8 A Jehovah; kainennyu noto: amagochini torornatennyu chito age, amagochini kanamonik che kiwaei, kalosunennyu." 
Isaiah42:9 Ogeero, kagosulda tuguk che bo tai, ak amwaitoi tuguk che leelach: amwawok kotomo kobiit." 
Isaiah42:10 Otienji Jehovah tiendo ne leel, otien kalosunenennyi koboch tabandab ng’ony; okwek che ochortoige nyanjet, ak tugul che mi orit, ngegusiek, ak bik che menyei oloto." 
Isaiah42:11 Ingotienso ong’atet ak nganasokyik, nganasok che mengechen che menyei Kedar; ingotienso bik che menyei Sela, ingowaach eng’ tulonok barak." 
Isaiah42:12 Ingogochi Jehovah torornatet, ak komwaita kalosunennyi eng’ ngegusiek." 
Isaiah42:13 Mandoi Jehovah ko u chito ne kim; ing’eeti neregek ko u chitab luget; bolei, ee waachei mising’; iborjin bunikyik kamugennyi." 
Isaiah42:14 Kiasis keny; kimayai kiy, ak aratge: awaache anyun nguno ko u kwondo ne machei kosigis; asiiru ak asienyi." 
Isaiah42:15 Ang’eme tulonok ak tulonok che mengechen, ak ayaam sogekwak tugul; ak awal ainosiek koek ngegusiek, ak ateny tamboinik." 
Isaiah42:16 Ak amutune kipkoratinik oret ne manaei; andochini eng’ ortinwek che manaei: awale mesundeito koek lapkeiyet eng’ tainywa, ak alitit komoswek che kunuren. Ayae tuguchuto, amabagaktoi." 
Isaiah42:17 Kiweektoi ichek koba let, ak kolilanso mising’, che imang’u kanamonik che kigiwai, che lenjin kanamonik che kigitany, O cheptalelisiekyok." 
Isaiah42:18 Ogas okwek che o ming’otin; ak ogosu, okwek kipkoratinik, si kobiit ogeerte." 
Isaiah42:19 Ng’o ne korat, kobate otwogindennyu? Anan ng’o ne ming’at ko u nenyu ne kiyoktoi ne ayoktoi? Ng’o ne korat ko u inendet ne kiting’ege kalyet, ak ko korat ko u otwogindetab Jehovah?" 
Isaiah42:20 Igeere tuguk che chang’, ago meguitosi; yatotin itikyik, ago magasei." 
Isaiah42:21 Kiibaibai Jehovah, kotoror ng’atutiet, ak koyai koek ne kigonyiti amu imandanyi." 
Isaiah42:22 Ago chu ko bik che kigiluul, ak kerebe tugukwak; kiginame ichek tugul keringonik, ak keung’e korgorosiek: kigoek che kiluulei, ama mi chi ne soru; kigoek che kiluule tuguk, ama mi chi ne len, Oweekte." 
Isaiah42:23 Ng’o eng’ okwek ne chamei koepchi it nito? Ne chamei koeb it ak kogas agobo betusiek che bwanei? 
Isaiah42:24 Kiigoito ng’o Jakobo keluul, ak kiigoito ng’o Israel kogochi rebik? Tos ma Jehovah? Inendet ne kigiyachi achek tengekto, ak ne kima cham ichek kobendate ortinwekyik, ama kas it ng’atutiennyi." 
Isaiah42:25 Kirong’ji anyun neregekyik che koromen, ak kimnatetab luget; ak koyieme mat inendet, ago ma nai kora ak kobeel inendet, ago ma chut muguleldanyi." 
Isaiah43:1 Ago mwaei anyun Jehovah ne kiyain ko u ni kole, Ee Jakobo, ak inendet ne kimimiin, ee Israel: kole, Ameiywei, amu kiatiachin; kiaguurin eng’ kaineng’ung’, i nenyu." 
Isaiah43:2 Ami koboten ye ibune beek che chang’; ak ye ibune ainosiek, ko maimaluuchin; ye ibune mat, ko mabeelin; ama imelin liblibenetab mat." 
Isaiah43:3 Amu a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel, Yetindeng’ung’; kaagoite Misri koek ne kitiagenen, koboto Etiopia ak Seba." 
Isaiah43:4 Amu koiegu eng’ ane ne achame mising’, ak ne kigonyiti, ak kiachamin; agoitoi anyun bik agobo inye, ak agoite bik agobo sobeng’ung’." 
Isaiah43:5 Ameiywei; amu ami koboten: amutu iyoteng’ung’ eng’ kong’asis, ayumin inyo eng’ cherongo;" 
Isaiah43:6 Amwachini murot ne bo katam, alenjini, Konu; ak amwachi murot ne bo tai, alenji, Ametuuch; omutu werikyuk kobun ole loo, ak omutu tibikyuk eng’ tabanwekab ng’ony;" 
Isaiah43:7 age tugul ne kimwaitoe kainennyu, inendet ne kiatau ayai agobo torornatennyu; kiamimii; ee, kiayai." 
Isaiah43:8 Omutu bik che koriotin che tinyei konyek, ak omutu bik che ming’otin che tinyei itik." 
Isaiah43:9 Ingoyumgei bororiosiek tugul, ak ingoyumgei bik: ng’o eng’ ichek ne imuchi komwa ng’olyondonito, ak koboruech tuguk che bo tai? Ingomut baorinikwak, si kobiit kiityi imanda: anan ingogas, ak komwa kole, Bo iman." 
Isaiah43:10 O baorinikyuk, mwaei Jehovah, ak otwogindennyu ne kialewen; si kobiit onai ak oyana, ak oguiye ole a inendet; mami Kamuktaindet age ne kisib keyai eng’ ane, ama kobiitu age eng’ let." 
Isaiah43:11 Ane, ee, anendet, a Jehovah; ama mi yetindet age kobatena." 
Isaiah43:12 Kiamwaite, ak kiasoru, ak kiabarte, ama mi cheptalelit ne ter eng’ kwenung’wong’: o baorinikyuk anyun, mwaei Jehovah, ak a Kamuktaindet." 
Isaiah43:13 Ee, a inendet koboch agoi, ama mi age ne imuchi koreb eng’ eunnyu: aboisiei, ak ng’o ne imuchi koger?" 
Isaiah43:14 Mwaei Jehovah, katiagindeng’wong’, Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel, ko u ni, kole: Kiayokte ng’olyot kwo Babulon agobo okwek, ak achooru ichek tugul ko u che mweoti, choto bo Kaldeik, eng’ melisiek che boiboitune." 
Isaiah43:15 A Jehovah, neng’wong’ Ne Tilil, Yaindetab Israel, Laitoriandeng’wong’." 
Isaiah43:16 Mwaei Jehovah, ne yaei oret eng’ nyanjet, ak oret eng’ beek che kimen;" 
Isaiah43:17 ne moong’u karit ak mbartanyit koboto luget ak kimnatet; ruitos tugul ng’ony, ama ng’eetos kogeny; kagobetyo, kagimis ko u kitambit:" 
Isaiah43:18 Amat obwat tuguk che bo tai, amat ogererji met tuguk che bo keny." 
Isaiah43:19 Ogeero, ayae kit ne leel; biitu anyun nguno; tos monae? Ayae oret eng’ ong’atet, ak ainosiek eng’ surkwen." 
Isaiah43:20 Konyita tiong’ikab timin, lelwek ak tiong’ikab songolik: amu agonu beek eng’ ong’atet, ak ainosiek eng’ surkwen, si anaga bikyuk, chechuk che kialewen:" 
Isaiah43:21 bik che kiayachige, si kobiit kobarta kalosunennyu." 
Isaiah43:22 Ago ma iguura, ee Jakobo; ago kiing’et agobo ane, ee Israel." 
Isaiah43:23 Ma igetwa areguk koek kagochinoiguk che kibeelei; ama igonyitena tiseiyweguk. Ma abirjin iotisie kagochinoik, ama aiimenen tuguk che nyamdut." 
Isaiah43:24 Ma ialunena feda tuguk che u mutwek che nyamdut, ama igona abiyo eng’ mwanikab tiseiyweguk: ago kiimena tengekwogiguk, kiigona ang’et agobo yaitwogiguk." 
Isaiah43:25 Ane, ee anendet ne aistoi bistaosieguk, amu kainennyu; amabwati tengekwogiguk." 
Isaiah43:26 Ibwatwa; ngeng’alal tuwai: tetu ng’aleguk, si kobiit kiityin imanda." 
Isaiah43:27 Kiyai tengekto kwandang’ung’ ne bo tai, ak kiingelelja kaletoiguk." 
Isaiah43:28 Amuruoni anyun bounik che bo ole tilil, ak ayae Jakobo koek ne chubot, ak ayae Israel koek ne kisasei." 
Isaiah44:1 Kas anyun nguno, ee otwogindennyu Jakobo; ak Israel ne kialewen:" 
Isaiah44:2 Mwaei Jehovah ne kiyain, ne kimimiin eng’ moet, ne toretin, ko u ni kole, Ameiywei, ee otwogindennyu Jakobo; ak inye Jesurun, ne kialewen." 
Isaiah44:3 Amu arong’jini beek ne amei melel, arong’jini ainosiek emet ne yaamat: arong’jini Tamirmiriennyu iyoteng’ung’, ak arong’jini berurtanyu lagoguk:" 
Isaiah44:4 ak kobityo eng’ ole mi suswek, ko u ketik che bitos eng’ ole roote beek." 
Isaiah44:5 Mwaei age kole, A bo Jehovah; ak koguuregei age kainetab Jakobo; ak kosirji age eunnyi kainetab Jehovah; ak komwaitoegei kainetab Israel." 
Isaiah44:6 Mwaei Jehovah, Laitoriatab Israel, ak ko katiagindennyi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ko u ni kole, A ne bo tai ak ne bo let; ama mi Kamuktaindet age kobatena." 
Isaiah44:7 Ak ng’o ne u ane, ne kuurei, ak komwaita, ak kotetwa, koboch ngab ande bikab keny? Ak ingomwa ichek tuguk che bwanei, ak che ta kosuldoi." 
Isaiah44:8 Amoiywei, anan oarogense: tos ma amwaun nito keny, aborun? O baorinikyuk. Tos mi Kamuktaindet age kobatena? Ee, mamitei Ruandet; mangen age." 
Isaiah44:9 Buch icheget tugul che yaei kanamonik che kiwaei; ak matinyei keljinet tugukwak che iboiboegei: ak mageertoi baorinikwak, ama naei; si kolilanso." 
Isaiah44:10 Ng’o ne kiyai cheptalelit, anan kotany kanamwet ne kiwaei, ne tinyei keljinet ne bo buch?" 
Isaiah44:11 Ogeero, ililandos choronokyik tugul; ak bo bik musogik: ingoyumgei tugul, ingotononso; iyweisiei, ilandos tugul." 
Isaiah44:12 Itanyi kitang’indet aiywet, ak koboisie nesek, ak kotang’e kiriswet, ak koboisie eunnyi ne kim: ee, amei rubet, ak betei kimnatennyi; maeei beek, ak kotanui." 
Isaiah44:13 Iitoe musogindetab baoinik borowet; ak komare kalamit; site rotok, ak komare yiemutiet karik che kimarse, ak kowai koigei itondab chito, ko u kororonindab chito, si kobiit kotebe go." 
Isaiah44:14 Iluuljingei taragonik, ak koib biribiriet ak ketit age, ak koripchigei age eng’ ketikab osnet: minei tarakwet ne sabul, ak koner amu ropta." 
Isaiah44:15 Egu anyun ketoto ne ilaali chito; ak ibei kwenikyik, ak kwo koyu; ee, ilaali, ak kobeele makatinik: ee, yaei cheptalelit, ak kosa; yaei koek kanamwet ne kiwaei, ak kogutung’ji." 
Isaiah44:16 Ilaali alak; amei alak banyek: watani bendo, ak kobiyo: ee, yue mat, ak kole, Haa, kalalang’itu, kaageer mat:" 
Isaiah44:17 ak koyae che ng’etu cheptalelit, noto kanamwennyi ne kiwaei: ibutyin ak kogutung’jin, ak kosaei, kole, Sorua; amu i cheptalelinnyu." 
Isaiah44:18 Maingen ichek, amaibwati: amu kigoger konyekwak, si mageerto; ak koger mugulelwekwak, si maiguiyo." 
Isaiah44:19 Ama mi ne ibwati, ama mi naet anan kaguiyet ne mwaei kole, Kaabeel alak eng’ ma: ee, kaabeele makatinik nesekyik kogeny; kaawatane banyek ak aam: ak tos ayai ne kang’et koek kit ne kiwechei? Tos abutyini kit ne kiyae ketit?" 
Isaiah44:20 Amei orek: kagomaas inendet muguleldo ne iberberat, kot ko maimuchi kosor sobondanyi, anan komwa kole, Tos mami lembeita eunnyu ne bo tai?" 
Isaiah44:21 Ibwat tuguchuto, ee Jakobo, ak Israel; amu i otwogindennyu: kiayain; i otwogindennyu: ee Israel, mautienen." 
Isaiah44:22 Kiaiste bistaosieguk, ko u boldet ne o, ak kiaiste tengekwogiguk, ko u boldet: weekyage; amu kiatiachin." 
Isaiah44:23 Ee okwek kipsengwetisiek, Otiense, amu kiyai Jehovah noto; owaach okwek, komoswek che bo orit che bo ng’ony; otiense, okwek tulonok, ee osnet, ak ketit age tugul ne mi yoto: amu kagotiach Jehovah Jakobo, ak kotororgei eng’ Israel." 
Isaiah44:24 Mwaei Jehovah, katiagindeng’ung’, inendet ne kimimiin eng’ moet, ko u ni kole, A Jehovah, ne yaei tuguk tugul; anege ne aiitoi kipsengwetisiek; ne aiitoi ng’ony; ng’o ne mi kobota?" 
Isaiah44:25 Ne walei kaborunoikab kiplembechonik koek buch, ak kogochin che ng’orsei koiiywenso; ne weechi bik che ng’omen koba let, ak koyaei naenywa koek berberindo:" 
Isaiah44:26 ne igimiti ng’olyotab otwogindennyi, ak kosuldoi kiruogetab chechik che kiyoktoi; ne mwaei agobo Jerusalem kole, Tun kimenyei; ak komwaei agobo nganasokab Juda kole, Tun kiteechei, ak ang’eet komoswekyik che kigoek karatwek:" 
Isaiah44:27 ne mwachin riret kolenjin, Yaam, ak atenyi ainosieguk:" 
Isaiah44:28 ne mwaei agobo Kirus kole, Inendet ko mestowondennyu, ak koyaei inendet tuguk tugul che achame: mwaei kogeny agobo Jerusalem kole, Tun kiteechei, ak komwachin hekalut kolenjin, Tun kilumei lumeiyweguk." 
Isaiah45:1 Mwachin Jehovah Kirus, nenyi ne iilat, ne aname eunnyi ne bo tai, koterter bororiosiek eng’ tainnyi, ak atiach suenutikab laitorinik; si ayat kurgotik eng’ tainnyi, ama kigerei ormarichok, komwaei ko u ni kole;" 
Isaiah45:2 Andoenen, ak alitit komoswek che kunuren: atonatoni kereiywekab sugunonik che bo kurgotik, ak atil temeleiywek che bo karik:" 
Isaiah45:3 ak agonin konoraikab mesundeito, ak magornatosiek che ung’otin che bo komoswekab ung’ot, si kobiit inai ile a Jehovah ne kiaguurin eng’ kaineng’ung’, Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Isaiah45:4 Kiaguurin eng’ kaineng’ung’ amu Jakobo otwogindennyu ak amu Israel nenyu ne kialewen: kaataun kainet nganda tomo inaa. 
Isaiah45:5 A Jehovah, ama mi age; mami Kamuktaindet age kobatena: agermenin, nganda tomo inaa:" 
Isaiah45:6 si kobiit konai ichek koboch ko kachor asis, ak koboch cherongo, kole mami age kobatena: a Jehovah, ama mi age." 
Isaiah45:7 Ayae lapkeiyet, ak ayae mesundeito; ayae kalyet, ak ayae yaitiet; a Jehovah, ne yaei tuguchuto tugul." 
Isaiah45:8 Osau, okwek kipsengwetisiek, ak ingorong’ bolik imanda: ingoyatak emet, si kobiit koib bolik yetunet, ak ingogochi imanda kobityo tugul; ane Jehovah ne kiayae noto." 
Isaiah45:9 Bwa eng’ inendet ne bortos ak Yaindennyi! Rokyet eng’ rokyonikab ng’ony! Tos mwachin menet inendet ne kimimii, kolenjin, Iyae nee? Anan tos mwaei boisieng’ung’ kole, Matinyei inendet eunek?" 
Isaiah45:10 Bwa eng’ inendet ne lenjin kwandanyi, Iyie nee? Anan koteebe kwondo kolenji, Amin moet agobo nee?" 
Isaiah45:11 Mwaei Jehovah, Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel, ak ko Yaindennyi, ko u ni kole, Teebena agobo tuguk che bwanei; ong’ata agobo werikyuk, ak agobo boisietab eunekyuk." 
Isaiah45:12 Kiayae ng’ony, ak kiatau ayai chito kotebe oloto: ane, ee, eunekyuk, che kiito kipsengwetisiek, ak kiang’at lugosiekwak tugul." 
Isaiah45:13 Kiang’eet inendet eng’ imanda, ak alititi ortinwekyik tugul: inendet ne teechei nganasennyu, ak kotiach bikyuk che kigimut, ma eng’ alet anan melekto, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah45:14 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Nyonjinin boisietab Misri, koboto tugukab mung’aretab Etiopia, ak Sabeik, bik che koen, ak bunjinin; isubun; bwanjinin ko ratotin; ak kobutyi kelyeguk, kosomin, kole, Iman mi Kamuktaindet koboten; ama mi age, mami Kamuktaindet age." 
Isaiah45:15 Iman, i Kamuktaindet ne iunyege, ee, Kamuktaindetab Israel, Yetindet." 
Isaiah45:16 Ililandos, ee, toptobendos ichek tugul; toitos tugul che yaei kanamonik." 
Isaiah45:17 Ago soru Jehovah Israel eng’ yetunet ne bo koigeny: molilandosi anan otoptobense koigeny ak koigeny. 
Isaiah45:18 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne kitoi koyai kipsengwetisiek ko u ni kole, Inendet ko Kamuktaindet ne kimimii ng’ony ak koyai; kiigimit, kima yai koek buch, kiyai si kobiit kemeny: a Jehovah; ama mi age." 
Isaiah45:19 Tom ang’alal eng’ ung’ot, eng’ komostab emet ne bo mesundeito; ma alenji iyotetab Jakobo, Ocheng’a buch; amwae ane Jehovah imanda, amwae tuguk che litit." 
Isaiah45:20 Oyumge obwa; origu tugul, okwek che kiochilile bororiosiek: matinyei naet ichek che ibei ketitab kanamwenywa ne kigiwai, ak kosaei cheptalelit ne maimuchi kosor." 
Isaiah45:21 Omwaite, obarte; ee, ingoruoch tugul: ng’o ne kiibor ng’olyondonito koboch keny? Ng’o ne kimwaita koboch keny? Tos ma ane Jehovah? Ama mi Kamuktaindet age kobatena; Kamuktaindet ne bo iman, ak ko yaindet; mami age kobatena." 
Isaiah45:22 Onyala, si kesoruok, okwek tabanwek tugul che bo ng’ony: amu a Kamuktaindet, ama mi age." 
Isaiah45:23 Kiayosiechige, kagomong’une ng’olyot kutinnyu eng’ imanda, ama weechegei, ale, kutung’jina kutundo age tugul, iyostos ng’elyepta age tugul." 
Isaiah45:24 Lenjina age, Mi eng’ Jehovah inegei imanda ak kimnatet: bwanjin bik inendet, ak kolilandos ichek tugul che kinerekyi inendet." 
Isaiah45:25 Kiityin imanda iyotet tugul ne bo Israel eng’ Jehovah, ak kolosunegei." 
Isaiah46:1 Abuksei Bel, ing’uruksei Nebo; laei tiong’ik ak tuga kanamonikwak: kagiyai koek milet tuguk che kioiboti, lautiet eng’ che ng’etyotin." 
Isaiah46:2 Ing’uruksei, abuksei tugul; ma imuch kola lautiet, ago kigeluul icheget." 
Isaiah46:3 Oepcha it, ee gotab Jakobo, ak tugul che ng’etunotin che bo gotab Israel, che kiageseni koboch ko kagisich, che kigigeseni koboch komi mo:" 
Isaiah46:4 A inendet agoi osindo, ak agesenok agoi osich kalwalek: kiayae, ak ageseni, ee ageseni, ak asoru." 
Isaiah46:5 Orogendoa ng’o, ak oaechinena ng’o, ak oyaniena ng’o si kobiit kegergeitu?" 
Isaiah46:6 Ichek che rong’u tahabu eng’ lolet, ak kogere feda ratilit, kosirei kitang’indetab tahabu, ak koyae tuguchoto kanamwet; ibutyin ng’ony ichek, ee, kutung’jin." 
Isaiah46:7 Ibe tigikyiet, laei, ak koteepto eng’ oldanyi, ak kotonon; ma keisto eng’ komostanyi: ee, rirjin age kioto, ama imuch kowol, anan kosor inendet eng’ nyalildanyi." 
Isaiah46:8 Obwat ni anyun, ak obartege ole o murenik: obwatyige kogeny, ee okwek bistoichu." 
Isaiah46:9 Obwat tuguk che bo tai che bo keny; amu a Kamuktaindet, ama mi age; a Kamuktaindet, ama mi age ne kegerge;" 
Isaiah46:10 ne ibortoi kegesunet koboch taunet, ak kobortoi koboch betusiek che bo keny, tuguk che tomo koyaogis; kole, Tononi kiruogennyu, ak ayae tugul che achame:" 
Isaiah46:11 aguure taritiet ne amei banyek eng’ kong’asis, aguure kiruogindennyu kobun emet ne loo; ee, kaamwa, ak ayae kosulda; kiachob, ak ayai." 
Isaiah46:12 Oepcha it, okwek che o nyigonen, che o looen eng’ imanda:" 
Isaiah46:13 Aibu imandanyu korik, malooitu, amaigaegei yetunennyu: ak ande Sion yetunet agobo Israel ne torornatennyu." 
Isaiah47:1 Choruge ak itebe temburiek, ee inye ne i chepto ne bergeiyat ne bo Babulon; tebe ng’ony, ye mami ng’echeretab laitornatet, ee cheptab Kaldeik: amu ma keguurenen kogeny ne cheptalbisio ak ko ng’arng’ar." 
Isaiah47:2 Nam koitab bai, ak ing’a bek: ng’any meting’ung’, ireegu ngorieng’ung’ ne koi, ng’any keldo, ak ilandae ainosiek." 
Isaiah47:3 King’anyin itebi ach ngor, ee, toogu tewernateng’ung’: ayaaktoi mugetut, amataache chi age tugul." 
Isaiah47:4 Katiagindennyo, kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Isaiah47:5 Tebi eng’ sisek, ak iwe mesundeito, ee cheptab Kaldeik: amu ma keguurenen kogeny Chebiosetab bountosiek." 
Isaiah47:6 Kianerekyi bikyuk, kiamuruon bortannyu, ak kiande ichek eung’ung’: ma irire agot kitigin; kiigesenji che kigoosegitu choging’ung’ ne nyigis mising’." 
Isaiah47:7 Ak kiimwa ile, Aegu chebioset agoi; kot ko mata inde tuguchuto muguleldang’ung’, amata ibwat kagesunenywa." 
Isaiah47:8 Kas nito anyun, inye ne ichame ureriosiek, ne imeng’isiei, ameiiti kiy, ne imwae eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile, Anendet, ama mi age kobatena; matebye ko u mosok, ama begunena lagok:" 
Isaiah47:9 ago chein tuguchuto aeng’ betunak, begu lagok, ak kobiit mosoknatet: bwanjinin ko nyiitotin, agot ngo chang’ orgoinatosieguk, ak ko ng’isiat ng’orsosieguk." 
Isaiah47:10 Amu kiimang’u sogornateng’ung’; kiile, Mami chi ne keera; kigomaasin ng’omnateng’ung’ ak naeng’ung’: ak kiimwa eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile, Anendet, mami age kobatena." 
Isaiah47:11 Nyonjinin anyun yaitiet; memuchi igirinde: ak ibutyinin bichiindo, memuchi iiste: ak kochein ng’emisiet, ne mengen." 
Isaiah47:12 Tonon anyun nguno itinye ng’orsosiek, koboto chang’indab orgoinatosieguk, che kiibirtochige koboch ko i ming’in; ngo tos imuchi inyorune kelunet, ngo tos imuchi iterterisie." 
Isaiah47:13 Kiing’et eng’ chang’indab kiruogutiguk: ingotononso anyun ng’omotikab kecheik, ak keerikab kecheik, ng’omotikab arawet age tugul, kosorun eng’ tuguk che bwanjinin." 
Isaiah47:14 Keero, igeitu mobek; beelei mat; masorugei eng’ kimnatetab mat ne lalei; maegu nesek che kiyue, ama egu mat ne kitebe tainnyi." 
Isaiah47:15 U noto anyun tuguk che kiibirtochige: ombenoti ichek che kiyaei mung’aret koboten, koboch ko i ming’in, wendi age tugul komostanyi: mabiitu ne sorun." 
Isaiah48:1 Ogas ni anyun, okwek, ee gotab Jakobo, che kimwaitoenok kainetab Israel, che kiobiitune beekab Juda; che oyostosi eng’ kainetab Jehovah, ak omwae Kamuktaindetab Israel, ago ma eng’ iman, anan ko eng’ imanda." 
Isaiah48:2 Amu mwaei kole ki bo nganaset ne tilil, ak kotiiegei Kamuktaindetab Israel: kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah48:3 Kiamwaite tuguk che bo tai koboch keny; ee, kimong’une kutinnyu, ak kiabarte: kiayai achokyi, ak kiisulda." 
Isaiah48:4 Amu kianai ale uuin met, bo karnet kaating’ung’, bo sugunwet togeng’ung’;" 
Isaiah48:5 noto anyun kiamwaun koboch keny; kiasib aborun ama isulda: si memwa ile, kiyaei kanamwennyu, ak king’atei kanamwennyu ne kigiwai, ak kanamwennyu ne kigitany, choto che king’atei chuto." 
Isaiah48:6 Kiigas nito; keer chuto tugul-o; ak okwek, ko tos momwaitoi? Kaaborun tuguk che leelach koboch nguno, agot tuguk che ung’otin, che tom inai." 
Isaiah48:7 Kitau keyaei nguno, ma boch keny; ak kitom igas agoi betuni; si memwa ile, Keero, kiangen." 
Isaiah48:8 Ee, kitom igas, ee kitom inai; ee kitom koyatak iting’ung’: amu kiangen ale iyae kaberberisiet ne o, ak kigiguurenen bistoindet koboch imi mo." 
Isaiah48:9 Agoitoi neregekyuk amu kainennyu, ak amuitoi agobo inye amu kalosunennyu, si magesun." 
Isaiah48:10 Keero, kaatililin eng’ mat, ago ma ko u feda; kaalewenin eng’ mat ne o ne bo nyalilda." 
Isaiah48:11 Ayae amu kainennyu, amu kainennyu; amu kimuruonindoi ano kainennyu? Amagochini age torornatennyu." 
Isaiah48:12 Oepcha it, ee Jakobo, ak Israel nenyu, ne kiaguur: a inendet; a ne bo tai, ak ko a ne bo let kogeny." 
Isaiah48:13 Ee, kilum eunnyu lumeiywotab ng’ony, ak kiito eunnyu ne bo tai kipsengwetisiek: ye aguur ichek, kotononso kibagenge." 
Isaiah48:14 Oyumge, okwek tugul, si ogas; ng’o eng’ ichek ne kigomwaita tuguchuto? Kigocham Jehovah inendet: yaei eng’ Babulon kit ne chamei, ak kotebe eunnyi Kaldeik." 
Isaiah48:15 Ane, ee anendet ne kiamwae; ee kiaguur inendet: kiamutu, ak borei inendet eng’ orennyi." 
Isaiah48:16 Orikya, ogas ni; tom amwa kiy eng’ ung’ot koboch keny; kiami koboch agoi; kagoyokta anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ak Tamirmiriennyi." 
Isaiah48:17 Mwaei ko u ni Jehovah, katiangindeng’ung’, Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel: A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne inetin ibor, ne indoun eng’ oret ne kanyol ibun." 
Isaiah48:18 Kita mie nda kigegas ng’atutikyuk! Kita igeitu kalyeng’ung’ ainet, ak koigei imandang’ung’ beekab nyanjet che mildogei:" 
Isaiah48:19 Kita tenitu ng’aniek iyoteng’ung’, ak koigei lagoguk che kiisiche, chang’indab ng’aniek: kima kota kiistoi kainennyi anan keng’em eng’ tainnyu." 
Isaiah48:20 Omande eng’ Babulon, omwee Kaldeik; obarte eng’ cheetab tiendo, omwaite nito, omwa kogasak agoi ole boch ng’ony: omwa ole, Kigotiach Jehovah Jakobo otwogindennyi." 
Isaiah48:21 Ma am melelda ichek ye kigimuti kobun ong’atosiek: kiigochi beek korootune ruandet konaga ichek: kibet ruandet kogeny, ak kitumgei beek." 
Isaiah48:22 Mwaei Jehovah kole, Mami kalyet eng’ kiptengeginik." 
Isaiah49:1 Ogasa, ee ngegusiek; ak oeb it, okwek bororiosiek che omi ole loo; kiguura Jehovah koboch ami mo; kimwa kainennyu koboch ami moetab kamennyu:" 
Isaiah49:2 ak kigoyai kutinnyu koigei rotwetab chok ne ng’atib, kiung’ena uruetab eunnyi; kigoyaa aek irumet ne kigisit, kigoung’ena motiennyi:" 
Isaiah49:3 ak kilenja, I otwogindennyu; ee Israel, ne kitororena." 
Isaiah49:4 Ago kiamwa ale, Kiabirtege buch, kiaboisie kimnatennyu buch, ak eng’ tangoita; ago iman, mi kiruogennyu eng’ Jehovah, ak mi yaaktaennyu eng’ Kamuktaindennyu." 
Isaiah49:5 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ne kimimia koboch ami mo aek otwogindennyi, si kobiit amutyi inendet Jakobo kogeny, ak kiyumji Israel inendet: (amu a konyitot eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak kagoek Kamuktaindennyu kimnatennyu:)" 
Isaiah49:6 ee, mwaei kole, Kiy ne ming’in iegu otwogindennyu, si kobiit ing’eet bororiosiek che bo Jakobo, ak iweech che kigirib che bo Israel: agonin kogeny iegu lapkeiyetab Bororiosiek, si kobiit iegu yetunennyu agoi tabanwekab ng’ony." 
Isaiah49:7 Mwaei ko u ni Jehovah, katiagindetab Israel, ak ko Nenyi ne Tilil, inendet ne sasei bik, inendet ne wechei bororiet, ne otwogindetab bounik: Tun keerei laitorinik ak kong’eetyo; ak kogutung’so bounik; amu Jehovah ne kiyani, Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel, ne kilewenin." 
Isaiah49:8 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kiawolun eng’ betut ne chamaksei, ak kiatoretin eng’ betutab yetunet: ak aribin, ak agonin iegu arorutietab bik, si ilang’u emet, si igochi kobore borotosiek che kimi buch;" 
Isaiah49:9 kolenjin ichek che ratotin, Omande; ak kolenjin che mi mesundeito, Obartege. Amisioti eng’ ortinwek, ak egu komoswek che tororen ole churat, ole kiagete." 
Isaiah49:10 Magasei rubet anan koam melelda; ama kobeelei ichek mat, anan kobir asista: amu indochin ichek inendet ne rire, imuti kobun kong’ikab beek." 
Isaiah49:11 Ak ayae tulonokyuk tugul koek oret, ak kotororitu ortinwekyuk che eechen." 
Isaiah49:12 Ogeero, bunu chu ole loo: ak ogeero, bunu chu murot ne bo katam ak cherongo; ak bunu chu emetab Sinim." 
Isaiah49:13 Otiense, ee kipsengwetisiek; ak oboiboitu, ee ng’ony; ak otiense, ee tulonok; amu kagogaigai Jehovah bikyik, ak korire bikyik che kiginyalil." 
Isaiah49:14 Ago kimwa Sion kole, kigometa Jehovah, ak kigoutiena Kiptaiyat." 
Isaiah49:15 Tos imuchi kwondo koutie lakwennyi ne chuchuni, kot ko marire werit ne kisichei? Ee, imuchi chuto koutie, ago mautienen." 
Isaiah49:16 Keero, kiasirjin rubeitab eunekyuk; mi tainnyu kotugul irimoiguk." 
Isaiah49:17 Igirgiri lagoguk; mandaenen ng’emiguk, che yain iguber." 
Isaiah49:18 Yot met ak igeer komoswek tugul: iyumigei chuto tugul, ak kobwanjin. Mwaei Jehovah kole, Ko u ye asobe, iman, ilaachi tuguchoto tugul ko u kit ne bo lelesta, ak igermenege ichek, ko u ye kermenigei mureret." 
Isaiah49:19 Amu mariigitu komosweguk che kigemeto, ak che kigoguber, ak emeng’ung’ ne kigeng’em, iman mariigityin bik che menyei, ak kolooegitu ichek che kiluguin." 
Isaiah49:20 Tun igase komwaei lagoguk che isiche, ko kagobek alak, kolen, mariich olito eng’ ane: istowage si kobiit ameng’is." 
Isaiah49:21 Yeityo imwa eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ilen, Kisikwa ng’o chuto, amu kigobegunena lagokyuk, ak ami anege, ak kigeluula, ak aombenoti? Ak ng’o ne kiigu chuto? Keero, kigibagakta anege; kimi ano chuto?" 
Isaiah49:22 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, atokyini eunnyu bororiosiek, ak aborji bik songoliennyu: si koganab weriguk, ak kimut tibiguk eng’ tigigoikwak." 
Isaiah49:23 Ak koek laitorinik kwanisieguk che iguin, ak koek osotikab laitorinik kametwogiguk che iguin: kutung’jinin ichek kot koit togochikwak ng’ony, ak komel temburiek che mi kelyeguk; ak inai ile a Jehovah, maililandos ichek che igena." 
Isaiah49:24 Tos kirebe ne kim tuguk che kiluul, anan kitiachi luulenik che kigiluul eng’ imanda?" 
Isaiah49:25 Ago mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kirebe che kimen luulenikwak, ak kitiachi tugul che kigiluulei, che bo che imuisei: amu kibortosi ak inendet ne borienen, ak asoru lagoguk." 
Isaiah49:26 Ak abae ichek che usin borwekwak; ak kobogityo eng’ korotikwak, ko u ye bogiti chi eng’ divaik che leelachen: si konai bik tugul kole, a Jehovah yetindeng’ung’, ak ko katiagindeng’ung’, Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet ne bo Jakobo." 
Isaiah50:1 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Mi ano baruetab besietab komet, ne kiaone inendet? Anan kiaaldachok ng’o ne yaacha? Kigialdak amu yaitwogikwok, ak kigion komet amu bistaosiekwok." 
Isaiah50:2 Kilya si mabiit chi ye kianyone? Kingaguurse ko ma biit chi ne wolu? Tos kigonwagit eunnyu kot ko maimuch kotiach? Anan matinyei kamuget ne asorune? Keero, atenyi nyanjet eng’ kergong’iennyu, ayae ainosiek koek ong’atet: boldos njirenikwak, ak kobek eng’ melelda, amu mami beek." 
Isaiah50:3 Alaakyini kipsengwetisiek tuuindo, ak atuge kuniok." 
Isaiah50:4 Kigona Kiptaiyat Jehovah ng’elyepta ne bo icheget che kiginet, si kobiit anai ole agimititoi eng’ ng’alek inendet ne ng’etat: ing’eetisiei karonet age tugul, ing’eeta si kobiit agas ko u che kiginet." 
Isaiah50:5 Kigoyat Kiptaiyat Jehovah itinnyu, ak kima angelel, anan atuktochi batai." 
Isaiah50:6 Kiagochi kobir batennyu birik, ak agochi matang’wekyuk icheget che kiitut sumeek: ma aung’e togennyu tewernatet ak che sing’iljina." 
Isaiah50:7 Amu toreta Kiptaiyat Jehovah; ma alilan anyun amu noto: kiauuiit anyun togennyu koigei ruandet ne uui, ak angen ale malilani." 
Isaiah50:8 Negit inendet ne iityina imanda; kibortosi ak ng’o? Ngetononse tuwai: ng’o bunyondennyu? Ingonyo korikya. 
Isaiah50:9 Ogeero, toreta Kiptaiyat Jehovah; ng’o ne igikyina? Ogeero, osegitu ichek tugul ko u ngoriet; amei kiptorotiot." 
Isaiah50:10 Ng’o eng’ okwek ne iywei Jehovah, ne kase it kutitab otwogindennyi? Ne wendote mesundeito, ama tinyei lapkeiyet, ingomang’ kainetab Jehovah ak kotiiegei Kamuktaindennyi." 
Isaiah50:11 Ogeero, okwek tugul che olaali mat, che ogermenege kegenganik: obunote liblibenetab mang’wong’, ak eng’ kwenutab kegenganik che kaolaal. Onyoru nito kobunu eunnyu; oruitosi eng’ arogenet." 
Isaiah51:1 Oepcha it, okwek che osubi imanda, okwek che ocheng’e Jehovah: ogeer ruandet ne kigimoong’unenok eng’ waet, ak ogeer keringet ne kigibalunenok." 
Isaiah51:2 Ogeer Abraham kwandang’wong’, ak Sara ne kisichok: amu kiaguur inendet ye kita komi inegei, ak aberur inendet ak abaraa." 
Isaiah51:3 Amu kagogaigai Jehovah Sion: kagogaigai komoswekyik tugul che kigemeto, ak kigoyai ong’atennyi koigei Eden, ak koyai surkwenennyi koigei mbaretab Jehovah; kinyorjin oloto boiboiyet ak kagasetab ge, koboto kongoi ak tienwogik che rurei komie." 
Isaiah51:4 Ogasa, ee bikyuk; oepcha it, ee, bororiennyu: amu mong’unena ng’atutiet, ak ayai kiruogennyu kotonon koek lapkeiyetab bik." 
Isaiah51:5 Negit imandanyu, kamong’ yetunennyu, ak koruokyi bik eunekyuk; igena ngegusiek, ak komang’u eunnyu." 
Isaiah51:6 Onyal kipsengwetisiek, ak ogeer ng’ony: amu betos kipsengwetisiek ko u iyeto, ak ositu ng’ony ko u ngoriet, ak begu ko u noto ichek che menyei oloto: ago bunjin koigeny yetunennyu, ama kigesu imandanyu." 
Isaiah51:7 Oepcha it, okwek che ongen imanda, bik che mi ng’atutiennyu mugulelwekwak: amoiywei chotisietab bik, amoarogense amu churisiosiekwak." 
Isaiah51:8 Amu amei ichek kiptorotiot ko u ngoriet, ak koamei ichek kutiet ko u kororik: ago bunjin koigeny imandanyu, ak kobunjin ibinwek tugul yetunennyu." 
Isaiah51:9 Ng’eet, ng’eet, ilaach kimnatet, ee, eutab Jehovah; ng’eet, ko u betusiek che bo keny, ibinwekab betusiek che bo keny. Tos ma inye ne kiitonaton Rahab, ne kiitoor maswetit?" 
Isaiah51:10 Tos ma inye ne kiiteny nyanjet, beekab riret ne o; ne kiiyai riretab nyanjet koek oret ne landoe ichek che kigitiach?" 
Isaiah51:11 Ak koweegegei che bo Jehovah che kigitiach, ak kobwa Sion kotienonu; ak tebe metowekwak boiboiyetab koigeny: nyoru kagasetab ge ak boiboiyet, ak komwei arogenet ak tigenet." 
Isaiah51:12 Ane, anendet ne agoigook: i ng’o, kot iywei chito ne meei, ak iywei weritab chi ne kiyaei koek suswot;" 
Isaiah51:13 ak kiiutie Jehovah Yaindeng’ung’, ne kiito kipsengwetisiek, ak kolumda lumeiywekab ng’ony; ak iyweisiei kotugul, betut komugul, amu koromnatetab usindet ye chobegei si kong’emis? Mi ano koromnatetab usindet?" 
Isaiah51:14 Kitiachi eng’ chokyinet luulenik che kigimut; ama meei, ama wendi keringet, ama rarjin amitwogik." 
Isaiah51:15 Amu a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne awase nyanjet, si komoror mildaetab ge ne bo beek: kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Isaiah51:16 Ak kiande ng’alekyuk kuting’ung’, ak kiatugenen uruetab eunnyu, si kobiit amin kipsengwetisiek, ak alume lumeiywekab ng’ony, ak alenji Sion, I bororiennyu." 
Isaiah51:17 Ng’eet, ng’eet, tonon, ee Jerusalem, ne kiiee kikombetab neregek che koromen che bo Jehovah eng’ eunnyi; kiiee tabetab kikombet ne bo terteriotet icholol." 
Isaiah51:18 Mami ne indochin inendet eng’ werik tugul che kisich; ama mi ne namoti inendet eut eng’ werik tugul che kiigui. 
Isaiah51:19 Kagobutyin tuguchuto aeng’u; ng’o anyun ne rirjinin? Kubernatet ak ng’emisiet, ak rubet koboto rotwetab chok; agoigoitoin ano anyun?" 
Isaiah51:20 Kagotanuiso weriguk, ruitos eng’ tabanwekab ortinwek tugul, ko u kenyelet ne mi mestet; nyiitotin ichek neregek che koromen che bo Jehovah, keretab kong’ ne bo Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Isaiah51:21 Kas anyun ni inye ne kinyalili, ak ko bogitot, ago ma eng’ divaik:" 
Isaiah51:22 Mwaei Kiptaiyandeng’ung’ Jehovah, ak ko Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ne ng’alaldochin bikyik, ko u ni kole, Ogeero, kaaib eng’ eung’ung’ kikombet ne bo terteriotet, noto ko tabetab kikombet ne bo neregekyuk che koromen; ma iee agoi:" 
Isaiah51:23 Ak ande eutab icheget che inyalilin; che kilenji sobondang’ung’, Ng’uruge, si kobiit kesiirte: ak iite bateng’ung’ koigei ng’onyut, ak koigei oret, eng’ ichek che siirtoi." 
Isaiah52:1 Ng’eet, ng’eet, ilaach kimnateng’ung’, ee Sion; ilaach ngoroiguk che kororon, ee Jerusalem, nganaset ne tilil: amu koboch nguno ko ma kobwanjinin che ma kimuratan ak che ma tililen." 
Isaiah52:2 Lelekte temburiek; ng’eet, tebi ng’ony, ee Jerusalem: itiach ratutik che mi kaating’ung’, ee cheptab Sion ne kigeluul." 
Isaiah52:3 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kigialdak buch; ak kitiachok ama eng’ feda." 
Isaiah52:4 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kichortagei bikyuk eng’ tai koba Misri koek toek eng’ oloto: ak kiinyalil ichek Asuriaindet buch." 
Isaiah52:5 Mwaei anyun Jehovah kole, Ayae nee eng’ yu, amu kigimut bikyuk buch? Iteitos ichek che bou, mwaei Jehovah, ak kichubei kainennyu kotugul, betut komugul." 
Isaiah52:6 Nae anyun bikyuk kainennyu: naei anyun eng’ betunoto kole ane ne ang’alali; ogeero, ane." 
Isaiah52:7 Kororon ne tia eng’ tulonok, kelyekab inendet ne ibu logoiywek che miach, ne mwaitoi kalyet, ne ibu logoiywek che miach che bo mieindo, ne mwaitoi yetunet; ne mwachin Sion kolenjin, Laitorani Kamuktaindeng’ung’!" 
Isaiah52:8 Kutitab ribiguk! Waachei ichek, tiendos kibagenge; amu tun keerei ichek togoch eng’ togoch, ye weeksei Jehovah konyonei Sion." 
Isaiah52:9 Oboiboitu, otiense tugul, okwek komoswek che kigemeto che bo Jerusalem; amu kigogaigai Jehovah bikyik, kigotiach Jerusalem." 
Isaiah52:10 Amu kigobarta Jehovah eunnyi ne tilil eng’ taitab bororiosiek tugul; ak keerei tabanwek tugul che bo ng’ony yetunetab Kamuktaindennyo. 
Isaiah52:11 Oba, oba, omande eng’ oloto, amat otwa kiy ne ma tilil; omande eng’ kwenunnyi; otililitu, okwek che oibe tugukab Jehovah." 
Isaiah52:12 Amu momandoi eng’ kagirgiret, anan omwei: amu indoenok Jehovah; ak letwok Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Isaiah52:13 Ogeero, boisie otwogindennyu ng’omnatet, kieeti ak kitorori, ak kotororit mising’." 
Isaiah52:14 Ko u ye kikwong’enen che chang’, (kiging’em togennyi kosiir ne bo chi age tugul, ak kiging’em itondanyi kosiir werikab bik,)" 
Isaiah52:15 ibisi anyun bororiosiek che chang’; namei kut laitorinik amu inendet: amu tun keerei tuguk che kitom kemwachi ichek, ak koguiyo tuguk che kitom kogas." 
Isaiah53:1 Ng’o ne kiiyan ng’alekyok? Ak kiging’ang’ji ng’o eutab Jehovah? 
Isaiah53:2 Amu tun eetu eng’ tainnyi ko u ketit ne ng’arng’ar, ak eetu ko u tigitiot eng’ emet ne yaamat: matinyei iton anan kororonindo; ak ye kigeere inendet ko mami korornindo kot kecham." 
Isaiah53:3 Kigisas, ak kiesio bik inendet; chitab arogenosiek, ne ingen ng’wanindo: ak kigisas inendet ko u chito ne ung’e bik togochikwak, ama kiit inendet kele kiy." 
Isaiah53:4 Kiib iman ng’woninwekyok, ak kigesen arogenosiekyok: ago kigiit inendet kele kigibir, kibir Kamuktaindet ak konyalil." 
Isaiah53:5 Ago kigitoor agobo bistaosiekyok, kigiguoten agobo tengekwogikyok: kinyoru kalyennyo eng’ birennyi; ak kisoobenech birutikyik." 
Isaiah53:6 Ki u achek tugul kechirek che kigobetyo; kigosub age tugul eng’ achek orennyi; ak kigonde Jehovah inendet tengekwogikyok achek tugul. 
Isaiah53:7 Kiginyalil, ago kiiming’ingei, ma twek; kiigei inendet aruetab kechir ne kikweriei kwo ole kieng’e, ko u kechiriet ne sisei eng’ taitab bik che tilei kororikyik; ee, ma twek." 
Isaiah53:8 Kiginam eng’ suriet ak kiruokyi; ak ng’o ne ibwati eng’ ibindanyi kole kigiisto inendet eng’ emetab che soptos: Amu kigibir agobo bistoetab bikyuk. 
Isaiah53:9 Ak kiyachi inendet kererit koboto kiptengeginik, ago kigitub eng’ meennyi koboto magorek; nganda kima yai koromnatet age tugul, ama mong’une kutinnyi ng’alset age tugul." 
Isaiah53:10 Ago kicham Jehovah koguoten inendet; kiigochi arogenet; ye tun iyai sobondanyi koek kagochinet agobo tengekto, tun keerei iyotennyi, tun tesei betusiekyik, ak kotesak chametab Jehovah eng’ eunnyi." 
Isaiah53:11 Tun keerei che biitune ng’wanindab sobondanyi, ak koyam; tun iityin otwogindennyu ne bo iman, imanda, bik che chang’, eng’ naennyi: ak tun ibei tengekwogikwak." 
Isaiah53:12 Apchechini anyun inendet kebeberta koboto bik che eechen, ak kopchei barunenik koboto bik che kimen; amu kiigoito sobondanyi agoi meet, ak kigiitito bistoik: ago kigesen tengekwogikab bik che chang’, ak kisa agobo bistoik." 
Isaiah54:1 Tien, ee inye ne ison, ne ma ii; tien, ak iwaach, inye ne ma inyoru ng’wanindo agobo sigisiet: amu chang’ lagokab ne mi inegei kosiir lagokab osotiot, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah54:2 Ibaraa oldab emaing’ung’, ak ingoiito ichek angokab meng’otosieguk; ameete; igoit borooniguk, ak igimit tigongeniguk." 
Isaiah54:3 Amu inaktoi komostab eutab tai ak ne bo katam; ak konyaban iyoteng’ung’ bororiosiek, ak kogochi kemeny kogeny nganasok che kiga kelakta." 
Isaiah54:4 Ameiywei; amu melilani: anan itoptoben; amu magitewerin: amu iutie tewernatetab ming’inateng’ung’, ama ibwati chotisietab mosoknateng’ung’." 
Isaiah54:5 Amu Yaindeng’ung’ ko manong’otiondeng’ung’; Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kainennyi: ak Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel ko katiagindeng’ung’; kiguure inendet Kamuktaindetab ng’ony komugul. 
Isaiah54:6 Amu kigoguurin Jehovah ko u osotiot ne kigebagakta, ne kigigochi koarogen eng’ muguleldanyi, osotiot ne ta ko ming’in, ye kagion, mwaei Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Isaiah54:7 Kiabagakten ne matia; ago ayumin eng’ rirenet ne o. 
Isaiah54:8 Kiaung’enen togennyu ne matia eng’ neregek che ing’irtogei; ago arirenen eng’ talasiet ne bo koigeny, mwaei Jehovah katiagindeng’ung’." 
Isaiah54:9 Amu u nito eng’ ane beekab Noa: amu ko u ye kiayosie ale ma komarane emet beekab Noa kogeny, kayosie ko u noto ale manerekyinin kogeny, anan agerin kong’." 
Isaiah54:10 Amu istogei tulonok ak kiutoi tulonok che mengechen; ago maistoenengei talasiennyu, ama kiistoi kayomisennyu ne bo kalyet, mwaei Jehovah ne rirenen." 
Isaiah54:11 Ee inye ne kinyalili, ne wirtoi usonet ne o, ama kigaigain, keero, alumdoi koiguk eng’ saleiywek che kororon, ak alume lumeiyweguk koik che kiguure sapire." 
Isaiah54:12 Ak ateege irimoiguk koik che biriren, ak ayae ormarichoguk koik che kiguure bareqet, ak ayae tabanweguk tugul koik che kororon." 
Isaiah54:13 Ak ineti Jehovah lagoguk tugul; ak koeet kalyetab lagoguk. 
Isaiah54:14 Kigimitin eng’ imanda; ilooitu eng’ nyalilda, amu meiyweisiei; ilooitu eng’ kamuiset, amu marikyinin." 
Isaiah54:15 Keero, ngot kong’eet chi boriet, ko mabunwa: ibuti age tugul ne ing’eetyinin boriet." 
Isaiah54:16 Keero, kiayai kitang’indet ne kuutei matab nesek, si kobiit karnet ne bo boisiennyi, ak kiayai ng’emindet si kong’emis." 
Isaiah54:17 Magiberuri karnet age tugul ne kiyaei si kogirinden; ak igikyini ng’elyepta age tugul ne kirindoin eng’ kiruoget. Nito borotetab otwogikab Jehovah, ak imandanywa ne bunwa, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah55:1 Ee chi age tugul ne amei melel, obwanjin beek, koboto inendet ne matinyei feda; obwa anyun, oal ak oam; ee, obwa, oal divaik ak chego ama eng’ feda anan eng’ alyet." 
Isaiah55:2 Amu nee si oboisie feda eng’ tuguk che ma amitwogik? Ak boisieng’wong’ agobo tuguk che mobiyonyi? Oepcha it mising’, si oam che miach, ak ingoboiboitu sobonwekwok eng’ che akwaen." 
Isaiah55:3 Oeb it, ak obwanja, ogas, si kosopcho sobonwekwok: ak kiyomisyige ak okwek kayomiset ne bo koigeny, noto rirenosiek che bo iman, che bo Daudi." 
Isaiah55:4 Ogeero, kiagoite inendet koek aboriat eng’ bororiosiek, koek kandoindet, ak ko ng’atindet ne bo bororiosiek." 
Isaiah55:5 Keero, iguure bororiet ne mengen, ak kolabatyin bororiet ne kima kongenin, amu Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak amu Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel; amu kigotororin." 
Isaiah55:6 Ocheng’ Jehovah kota kimuchi kenyor, oguur kota ko negit:" 
Isaiah55:7 ingometo kiptengekyot orennyi, ak ingometo inendet ne ma bo iman, kabwatutikyik: ak ingoweekyigei Jehovah, si korire; ak ingoweekyigei Kamuktaindennyo, amu nyochin kaat iman." 
Isaiah55:8 Amu ma chekwok kabwatutikyuk, ama chechuk ortinwekwok, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah55:9 Amu ko u ye toror kipsengwetisiek kosiir ng’ony, ko u noto tororen ortinwekyuk kosiir ortinwekwok, ak ko tororen kabwatutikyuk kosiir kabwatutikwok." 
Isaiah55:10 Amu ko u ye roboni ak kobuti teluchi kobunu kipsengwet, ama weektagei oloto kogeny, ago ibisi ng’ony, ak kogochi tuguk kobityo ak kong’atyo, ak kogochi keswek letaindet, ak kogochi amitwogik chito ne amei;" 
Isaiah55:11 u noto ng’olyondennyu ne mong’une kutinnyu: maweekyinagei buch, ago yaei kosulda kit ne amache, ak koborei eng’ kit ne kiayoktochine." 
Isaiah55:12 Amu tun omandoi eng’ boiboiyet, ak kindoiywok eng’ kalyet: tiendos eng’ taing’wong’ tulonok ak tulonok che mengechen, ak koraprab eunekwak ketik tugul che bo timin." 
Isaiah55:13 Bitei biribiriet kogeeri katok, ak kobit myrtle kogeer katablelinik: ak kibwate kainetab Jehovah, koek kaborunet ne bo koigeny ne magiistoi." 
Isaiah56:1 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Osub kiruoget, ak oyai imanda: amu negit konyo yetunennyu, ak negit keng’any imandanyu." 
Isaiah56:2 Iberurot ne yaei chuto, ak weritab chi ne namei chuto mising’ ne ribei sabato ama imuruoni, ne ribei eunnyi si mayai yaitiet age tugul." 
Isaiah56:3 Amechamji toondet ne kigonamgei ak Jehovah, kong’alal kole, Itabanena Jehovah bikyik: amechamji sirorto komwa kole, Keero, a ketit ne yamat." 
Isaiah56:4 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni agobo sirorinik che ribei sabatosiekyuk, ak che leweni tuguk che iboiboa, ak che namei mising’ kayomisennyu:" 
Isaiah56:5 kole, Agochini ichek kabwatet ak kainet eng’ gonnyu ak eng’ irimoikyuk, kosiir werik ak tibik; agochini kainet ne bo koigeny, ne magiistoi." 
Isaiah56:6 Amutu kogeny toek che namegei ak Jehovah, si koboisiechi inendet, ak kocham kainetab Jehovah, koek otwogikyik, age tugul ne ribei sabato ne maimuruoni, ak konamei mising’ arorutiennyu;" 
Isaiah56:7 amutu ichek kobwa tulwennyu ne tilil, ak agochi koboiboitu eng’ gonnyu ne bo saet; kitaachei kagochinoikwak che kibeelei ak tiseiywekwak, eng’ kaptisisiennyu: amu kiguure gonnyu gotab saet ne bo bororiosiek tugul." 
Isaiah56:8 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ne iyumi che kigetimda che bo Israel, kole, Ta ayumjini alak inendet, che siirei chechik che kigiyum." 
Isaiah56:9 Obwa, oamisie, okwek tiong’ik tugul che bo timin, ee, okwek tiong’ik tugul che bo osnet." 
Isaiah56:10 Koriotin ribikyik, matinyei tugul naet; icheget tugul ko sesenik che namotin kut, maimuchi ichek kokwer; irotitoi, ruitos, chamei konuukso." 
Isaiah56:11 Ee, kipkein sesenik, mabiyong’dos agoi; ak chuto ko mestowek che maiguitos kiy: kigomasta tugul kosub orenywa, kigosub chi tugul keljinennyi, eng’ komosta age tugul." 
Isaiah56:12 Mwaei kole, Obwa, si aib divaik, si kee maiyek konyiiech; ak kergeitu betuni ak mutai; betut ne o, ne siirtoot." 
Isaiah57:1 Begu che bo iman, ama iiti chi; ak kimuti bik che tinyei rirgei, amaibwati chi kole, kimuti che bo iman si mageer yaitiet ne nyonei." 
Isaiah57:2 Mong’jin ole mi kalyet; imuunyi eng’ itogusiekwak, age tugul ne wendoti eng’ lititindanyi." 
Isaiah57:3 Ago origu okwek werikab chepsogeiyot, iyotetab chito ne yaei ibetab ge ak chepkugoniot." 
Isaiah57:4 Ourerenjini ng’o? Oseng’eng’jini ng’o, ak ochuutyini ng’elyepta? Tos ma o lagokab bistoet, iyotetab kaberberisiet," 
Isaiah57:5 che olaali mageng’wong’ eng’ ketik kel, eng’ kelutab ketit age tugul ne tuon; okwek che obare lagok eng’ atebwosiek, eng’ ole kibetak eng’ ruandosiek?" 
Isaiah57:6 Mi kebebertang’ung’ koik che chaboen che bo atebwet; choto, choto ko kebebertang’ung’: kiirong’ji ichek kagochinet ne kieei, kiigochi kagochinet. Tos igoigoa tuguchuto?" 
Isaiah57:7 Kainde itogung’ung’ tulwet ne kiwa barak ak ko koi mising’: ak kiiwe kogeny oloto igoite tiseiywek. 
Isaiah57:8 Ak kiitepte kit ne bo kabwateng’ung’ eng’ ole bo let eng’ kereiywek ak tugatugik: amu kiing’ang’jige age, ne ma ane, ak kiitogoste; kiibaraa itogung’ung’, ak iyai arorutiet koboto ichek: ichame itogunywa eng’ ole kiigeerji." 
Isaiah57:9 Ak kiiwe oldab laitoriat iibe mwanik, ak ites nyamdutiguk, ak iyokte biguk che tononun koba ole loo, ak kiitewerge agoi oldab che kigobek." 
Isaiah57:10 Kiing’et amu koindab oreng’ung’; ago kima imwa ile, Mami kamang’unet: kiinyoru kasoobetab kimnateng’ung’; ma itanui anyun." 
Isaiah57:11 Ak kiiywei ng’o anyun ak itoptoben, kot imwa lembech, ak ma ibwata, ama chut ng’olyondonito muguleldang’ung’? Ma asis betusiek che chang’, ama iywea?" 
Isaiah57:12 Abortoi imandang’ung’; ama kelun kiy eng’ boisioniguk. 
Isaiah57:13 Ingosorun ye irire, ichek che kiiyum, ago ibei usonet ichek, ibei kabuset ichek tugul: ago namei emet kobunji, inendet ne imang’wa, ak koek tulwennyu ne tilil borotennyi." 
Isaiah57:14 Ak mwaei inendet kole, Oyai, oyai, ochob oret, oiste kanagutiet eng’ oretab bikyuk." 
Isaiah57:15 Amu mwaei ko u ni Inendet ne mi barak ak ko toror ne menyei koigeny, ne Tilil kainennyi, kole, Amenye ole toror, ak ko tilil, koboto inendet agine ne kigonyeratgei eng’ tamirmiriet, ak koming’ingei, si kobiit kisoob tamirmirietab ne iming’inegei, ak kisoob mugulelwekab che inyeratigei." 
Isaiah57:16 Amu magibortosi agoi, ama kinerechi kotugul: amu katatanui tamirmiriet eng’ tainnyu, ak sobonwek che kiayai." 
Isaiah57:17 Amu kianerech agobo tengektab kasennyi ne bo miat, ak abir inendet, kiauny togennyu ak anerech: ak kites komaasak eng’ oretab muguleldanyi." 
Isaiah57:18 Kiageer ortinwekyik, ak asoobi inendet: andochini kogeny, ak aweekyi inendet kagaigaosiek koboto bikyik che rirtos." 
Isaiah57:19 Ayae logoekab kutuswek: Kalyet, kalyet, eng’ inendet ne mi ole loo ak inendet ne mi ole negit, mwaei Jehovah; ak asoob inendet." 
Isaiah57:20 Ago u kiptengeginik nyanjet ne wasegei; amu maimuchi komuuny, ak wiru beekyik ng’atatek ak simdo." 
Isaiah57:21 Mwaei Kamuktaindennyu kole, Mami kalyet eng’ kiptengeginik." 
Isaiah58:1 Waach mising’, amesis, waach ko u iriaget, ak imwachi bikyuk bistoenywa, ak imwachi gotab Jakobo tengekwogikwak." 
Isaiah58:2 Ago cheng’a betut age tugul, ak chamei konai ortinwekyuk: ko u bororiet ne kiyai imanda, ama meto kiruogetab Kamuktaindenywa, teebena kiruogutik che bo iman, chamei korikyi Kamuktaindet." 
Isaiah58:3 Mwaei ichek kole, Amu nee si kirugutige, amegeere? Amu nee si kinyalil achek sobonwekyok, amemage kiy? Ogeero, onyoru boiboiyeng’wong’ eng’ betutab karuguteng’wong’ bo ge, ak omage bik tugul che boisiewok tuguk che siirtoot." 
Isaiah58:4 Ogeero, orugutige agobo boriet ak suriet, ak olugisie yaitiet: morugutige eng’ betuni si kegas kuting’wong’ eng’ ole bo barak." 
Isaiah58:5 Tos noto karugutetab ge ne kialewen? Betut ne inyalili chi sobondanyi? Koabuch chi metinnyi ko u cherungut, ak kosieb kuniok ak orek? Tos oguure nito karugutetab ge, betut ne taachaksei eng’ Jehovah?" 
Isaiah58:6 Tos ma karugutetab ge ni ne kialewen: ale kitiach ratutikab yaitet, kitiach anokab chogit, ak keunda che kigetiekyi ng’ony, ak oiri chogit age tugul?" 
Isaiah58:7 Tos ma kebae amitwogiguk che amei rubet, ak imutu kibananok che kigetimda, kobwa gong’ung’? Ye igeer ne mi ach ngor, ituch; ameung’ege bik che bo oreng’ung’?" 
Isaiah58:8 Koluu anyun lapkeiyeng’ung’ ko u karonet, ak kobiit kasoobeng’ung’ kochok: ak kondoenen imandang’ung’ ak koletun torornatetab Jehovah." 
Isaiah58:9 Yeityo anyun iguurse, ak kowolun Jehovah; iguure, ak kole, Ami yu. Ngot iiste chogit eng’ kwenung’ung’, kang’wererisiet, ak ng’alalet ne ya;" 
Isaiah58:10 ak ngot irire che amei rubo, ak ibai kobiyo sobondo ne kinyalili: kochor anyun lapkeiyeng’ung’ eng’ mesundeito, ak koigei bet kwen mesundeitang’ung’." 
Isaiah58:11 Ak kondoun Jehovah kotugul, ak kogochi sobondang’ung’ kobiyo eng’ komoswek che yaamnyotin, ak kogimit koweguk; ak iige mbaret ne kibisi, ak iige kererut ne matenyei." 
Isaiah58:12 Ak koteech biguk karotwek che bo keny: ak ing’eet lumeiywekab ibinwek che chang’; ak keguurenen, Teegindetab ole kibutok, Kaweegunindetab ortinwek che itebe." 
Isaiah58:13 Ngot iiste keldang’ung’ eng’ betutab sabato, ameyai tuguk che ichame eng’ betunnyu ne tilil; ak ile boiboiyet betutab sabato, ne tilil ne bo Jehovah, ne bo teegisto; ak igonyit betunoto, amesub ortinweguk, anan icheng’ che ichame, anan imwa ng’aleguk:" 
Isaiah58:14 ibaibaegei anyun Jehovah; ak agonin ilany komoswek che tororen che bo ng’ony; ak abaenen borotetab Jakobo kwandang’ung’: amu kagomwa nito kutitab Jehovah. 
Isaiah59:1 Ogeero, ma nwach eutab Jehovah, kot ko maimuch kosor; ama nyigis itinnyi, kot ko maimuch kogas:" 
Isaiah59:2 ago kigobesienok tengekwogikwok Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak kigouny tengekwogikwok togennyi, kot ko ma kochamei kogas." 
Isaiah59:3 Amu muruonen eunekwok eng’ korotik, ak ko muruonen morikwok eng’ tengekto; kogomwa kutuswekwok lembechek, ng’alali ng’elyebwekwok yaitiet." 
Isaiah59:4 Mami agot agenge ne cheng’ei imanda ne bo kiruoget, ama mi ne ibei ng’alek che bo iman kapkiruok: imang’u ichek tangoita, ak komwaei lembechek; manachi yaitiet, ak koi tengekto." 
Isaiah59:5 Igenyi koikab erenet, ak kola gotab kibroroktet: meei ne amei koikwak, ak mong’une erenet koita ne kagitui." 
Isaiah59:6 Maegu gorikab kibroroginik ngoroik, ama tugegei boisionikwak: boisionikwak ko boisionikab yaitiet, ak komi eunekwak boisietab koromnatet." 
Isaiah59:7 Ruachin kelyekwak yaitiet, ak kochoktoi kotumda korotik che matinyei tengek: kabwatutikwak ko kabwatutikab tengekto; mi ortinwekwak kubernatet ak ng’emisiet." 
Isaiah59:8 Maingen ichek oretab kalyet; ama mi kiruoget eng’ ortinwekwak: kigoyachigei ortinwek che kunuren; maingen kalyet age tugul ne bunei oloto. 
Isaiah59:9 Loo anyun kiruoget eng’ achek, ama nyoruech imanda: kicheng’e lapkeiyet, ago ogeero, mi mesundeito; kicheng’e kakweng’et, ago kibendote mesundeito." 
Isaiah59:10 Kisapsabisioti kecheng’e inatut ko u kipkoratinik, ee, kisapsabisioti ko u che matinyei konyek: kibutyoti bet kwen ko u ye karatarat; ki u che kigobek ye kimi kwenutab che neriotin." 
Isaiah59:11 Kimorori tugul ko u keerisiek, ak kitigendosi mising’ ko u cheptugenik: kicheng’e kiruoget, ago mami; kicheng’e yetunet, ago looenech." 
Isaiah59:12 Amu kigotesogis bistaosiekyok eng’ taing’ung’, ak baorianjinech tengekwogikyok: amu mi kobotech bistaosiekyok, ak kingen tengekwogikyok:" 
Isaiah59:13 kigiesie Jehovah eng’ bistoennyo, ak kigemaste ama kisub Kamuktaindennyo, keng’alali ng’alekab sastaet ak ngelelnatet, kichobe eng’ mugulelwekyok ng’alekab lembech, ak kemwae." 
Isaiah59:14 Ak kikwa let kiruoget, ak tononi imanda eng’ ole loo: amu kagobutyi imanda oret, ak maimuchi komong’ lititindo." 
Isaiah59:15 Ee, betot imanda; ak inendet ne bagaktoi yaitiet koyaegei koek ne kiluulei. Ak kigeer Jehovah nito, ak ma ibaibai inendet amu kima komi kiruoget." 
Isaiah59:16 Ak kigeer kole mami chi age tugul, ak kikwong’ amu kima komi ne sachin age: kiipchigei anyun yetunet eng’ eunnyi; ak kiti imandanyi inendet." 
Isaiah59:17 Ak kiilaach imanda ko u karnetab teget, ak chepkulet ne bo yetunet eng’ metinnyi; ak kiilaach ngoroikab yaaktaetab mugetut, ak kiilaach kagiiletab ge ko u sambut." 
Isaiah59:18 Yaakyin ichek ko u boisionikwak, neregek che ng’wonen eng’ bunikyik, yaaktaet eng’ bunikyik; yaakyin ngegusiek ko u ye nyoljin." 
Isaiah59:19 Iywei anyun kainetab Jehovah eng’ cherongo, ak koiywei torornatennyi eng’ ole chorune asista: amu nyonei ko u ainet ne isururtoi, ne onei kabusetab Jehovah." 
Isaiah59:20 Ak konyo katiagindet Sion, ak konyonji ichek che bo Jakobo che metoi bistoet, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah59:21 Ni anyun kayomisennyu ne kiyomisyinige ak ichek, mwaei Jehovah: maistoegei kuting’ung’ tamirmiriennyu ne miten ak ng’aleguk che kiande kuting’ung’, anan eng’ kutitab iyoteng’ung’, anan eng’ kutuswekab mochogoroniguk, mwaei Jehovah, koboch nguno agoi koigeny." 
Isaiah60:1 Ng’eet, iluu; amu kagoit lapkeiyeng’ung’, ak kagochorjin torornatetab Jehovah." 
Isaiah60:2 Amu, keero, tuchei mesundeito ng’ony, ak kotuch mesundeito ne o bororiosiek: ago chorjinin Jehovah, ak kotook torornatennyi eng’ inye." 
Isaiah60:3 Ak kobwanji bororiosiek lapkeiyeng’ung’, ak kobwanji laitorinik kaluunetab choruneng’ung’." 
Isaiah60:4 Yot met ak igeer komoswek tugul: iyumigei ichek tugul, ak kobwanjin: bunu weriguk ole loo, ak keganabu tibiguk." 
Isaiah60:5 Igeer anyun ak kikwenyin, ak kobotan muguleldang’ung’ ak kibaraa; amu bwanjinin chang’indab nyanjosiek, bwanjinin magornatosiekab bororiosiek." 
Isaiah60:6 Tuchin chang’indab tambesik, koboto moekab tambesik che bo Midian ak Epa; bunu tugul Sheba: ibu tahabu ak tuguk che nyamdut, ak komwaita kalosunoikab Jehovah." 
Isaiah60:7 Kiyumjinin akwotisiek tugul che bo kechirekab Kedar, koboisieun mengichikab Nebaiot: bwanei amu taachaksei eng’ kaptisisiennyu, ak atorori gotab torornatennyu." 
Isaiah60:8 Ng’o chu ruaei ko u boldet, ak kotirirendos cheptugenik eng’ tirisiokwak?" 
Isaiah60:9 Igena iman ngegusiek, ak sib kogena melisiek che bo Tarsis, si kobiit komut weriguk eng’ ole loo, koibu fedaisiekwak ak tahabusiekwak, agobo kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak agobo Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel, amu kigotororin." 
Isaiah60:10 Ak koteech toek irimoiguk, ak koboisieun laitorinikwak: amu kiabirin eng’ neregekyuk, ago kiarirenen amu chamennyu." 
Isaiah60:11 Kiyatei kogeny ormarichoguk kotugul; magigerei bet anan kemoi; si koibun bik magornatosiekab bororiosiek, koboto laitorinikwak che kimutu." 
Isaiah60:12 Amu lusei bororiet ak bounatet ne maboisieun; ee, king’emei bororiosiechoto kobetyo." 
Isaiah60:13 Nyonjinin torornatetab Lebanon, koboto biribirinik, taragonik che sabulen, ak taragonik che ter; si koyai konyol oldanyu ne tilil, ak achob ole tebe kelyekyuk kogararanit." 
Isaiah60:14 Ak kobwanjin werikab icheget che kiinyalilin kong’urugonu; ak kogutung’so eng’ keldebesaikab kelyeguk ichek tugul che kisasin; ak koguurenen, Nganasetab Jehovah, Sion ne bo Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Isaiah60:15 Ak ko u ye kiga kebagakten, ak kewechin, kot ko kima kota komi chi ne kibunei kwenung’ung’, ayain anyun iegu telunatet ne bo koigeny, boiboiyetab ibinwek che chang’." 
Isaiah60:16 Ichuchuni kogeny chegab bororiosiek, ak irerie kinaikab laitorinik: si kobiit inai ile ane Jehovah, ko a yetindeng’ung’, ak ko katiagindeng’ung’, Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet ne bo Jakobo." 
Isaiah60:17 Aibu tahabu ageere sugunonik, ak aibu feda ageere karik, ak ageere sugunonik ketik, ak ageere karik koik: ak ayai kogeny kiptainiguk koek kalyet, ak ayai kayagiguk koek imanda." 
Isaiah60:18 Ma kegasei kogeny koromnatet eng’ emeng’ung’, anan kobiit kubernatet ak ng’emisiet eng’ kiwotosieguk; ago tun iguure irimoiguk Yetunet, ak iguure ormarichoguk Kalosunet." 
Isaiah60:19 Ma koegu asista lapkeiyeng’ung’ bet: ama kogonin lapkeiyet kaluunetab arawet: ago egu Jehovah lapkeiyeng’ung’ ne bo koigeny; ak koek Kamuktaindeng’ung’ torornateng’ung’. 
Isaiah60:20 Ma kororoktoi asistang’ung’, ama komei araweng’ung’: amu egu Jehovah lapkeiyeng’ung’ ne bo koigeny, ak kogesgei betusiekab rireguk." 
Isaiah60:21 Ak koek che bo imanda kogeny biguk tugul, ak koek emet borotenywa koigeny; temet ne kiamin, boisietab eunekyuk, si kobiit kegonyita." 
Isaiah60:22 Egu ne ming’in elfut, ak koek ne ming’in bororiet ne kim: achokyini noto ane Jehovah eng’ betunnyi." 
Isaiah61:1 Mi kobota tamirmirietab Kiptaiyat Jehovah; amu kiila Jehovah si kobiit aamji logoiywek che miach che nyerotin; kigoyokta anya che ilyotin mugulelwek, si kobiit aamji luulenik katiaget, ak kitiach che ratotin." 
Isaiah61:2 Si kobiit aamda kenyit ne chamat eng’ Jehovah, ak betutab yaaktaetab mugetut ne bo Kamuktaindennyo; ak agaigai tugul che rirtos;" 
Isaiah61:3 si aarorji ichek che rirtos eng’ Sion, kigochi chepkulet ne kararan kogeere orek, ak mwaitab boiboiyet kogeere rirek, ak ngorietab kalosunet kogeere tamirmiriet ne kigonyigisit; si kobiit keguure ketik che bo imanda, che kimin Jehovah, si kegonyit." 
Isaiah61:4 Ak koteech kogeny karatwek che bo keny, koteech kole kiga koguber eng’ tai, ak koteech kogeny nganasok che kigemeto, ole kiga koguber eng’ ibinwek che chang’." 
Isaiah61:5 Ak kotononso toek koyaga akwotisiekab kechirekwok, ak kobatwok mbarenik kipsagarek, ak koek ribikab sabibukwok." 
Isaiah61:6 Ago kiguurenok tisiikab Jehovah: kuurenok bik kiboitinikab Kamuktaindennyo: oame magornatosiekab bororiosiek, ak olosunege torornatenywa." 
Isaiah61:7 Onyoru konyil aeng’ agobo kalilaneng’wong’; ak koboiboitu eng’ kebebertanywa kogeere toiyet: nyabani anyun ichek konyil aeng’ eng’ emenywa: bunjin ichek boiboiyet ne bo koigeny. 
Isaiah61:8 Amu achame ane Jehovah kiruoget, aweche rebisiet koboto tengekto; ak ayaakyini ichek eng’ imanit, ak kiyomisyige ak ichek kayomiset ne bo koigeny." 
Isaiah61:9 Ak konaak iyotenywa eng’ bororiosiek, ak konaak lagokwak eng’ bik: ak naei bik tugul ichek ye keer, kole, Chu iyotet ne kigoberur Jehovah." 
Isaiah61:10 Abaibaitu mising’ eng’ Jehovah, boiboitu sobondanyu mising’ eng’ Kamuktaindennyu; amu kagolaakwa ngoroikab yetunet, kagotugena ngoriet ne bo imanda, ko u ye lelesane sandet kit ne indoi metit, ak ko u ye lelesane mureret sonoekyik." 
Isaiah61:11 Amu ko u ye ing’atos tuguk eng’ ng’ony, ak ko u ye bitos tuguk che kigigolji mbar; kobiti ko u noto Kiptaiyat Jehovah imanda ak kalosunet eng’ taitab bororiosiek tugul." 
Isaiah62:1 Masise agobo Sion, amamuunyi agobo Jerusalem, agoi komanda imandanyi ko u kaluunet, ak komanda yetunennyi ko u tait ne lalei." 
Isaiah62:2 Ak kogeer bororiosiek imandang’ung’, ak kogeer laitorinik tugul torornateng’ung’: ak keguurenen kainet ne leel, ne tun kuurenen Jehovah." 
Isaiah62:3 Iegu kogeny narietab kororonindo eng’ eutab Jehovah, ak iegu narietab laitornatet eng’ eutab Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Isaiah62:4 Ma keguurenen kogeny Ne Kigimeto; ama keguure emeng’ung’ kogeny Karaita: ago kiguurenen Hepsi-ba, ak keguure emeng’ung’ Beula: amu baibaitunenen Jehovah, ak kitun emeng’ung’." 
Isaiah62:5 Amu ko u ye ituni mureno bergeiyat, u noto tun itunin weriguk: ak ko u ye baibaitu sandet eng’ mureret, ko u noto, tun boiboitu Kamuktaindeng’ung’ eng’ inye." 
Isaiah62:6 Kande ribik irimoiguk, ee Jerusalem; magoi sisyo bet anan kemoi; amomuunyi okwek bik che obwatyini Jehovah," 
Isaiah62:7 amogochini inendet komuuny, agoi kogimit Jerusalem ak koyai koek kalosunet eng’ ng’ony." 
Isaiah62:8 Kigoyosio Jehovah eng’ eunnyi ne bo tai, ak eng’ eutab kimnatennyi, kole, Iman, ma agoitoi beguk koek amitwogikab buniguk; ama koee toek divaiguk, che kiiyai:" 
Isaiah62:9 ago amei ichek che kigonori, ak kolos Jehovah; ak koee ichek che kiyumi, eng’ seremusiekab oldanyu ne tilil." 
Isaiah62:10 Omande, omandae ormarichok; ochob oretab bik; ochob, ochob oret ne o; oiste koik; onamji barak songoliet agobo bik." 
Isaiah62:11 Ogeero, kagomwaita Jehovah agoi tabandab ng’ony, kole, Olenji cheptab Sion, Keero, nyonei yetuneng’ung’; keero, mi melektanyi koboto inendet, ak mi yaaktaennyi tainnyi." 
Isaiah62:12 Ak koguure ichek, Bik che tililen, Che kigotiach Jehovah: ak keguurenen, Ne Kigicheng’, Nganaset ne ma kimeto." 
Isaiah63:1 Ng’o ne bunu Edom, ne tinyei ngoroik che kigisal kobiriritu, eng’ Bosra: ne tinyei ngoroik che bo torornatet, kowendi eng’ oindab kimnatennyi? Anendet ne ang’alali eng’ imanda, ne atinye kamuget asor." 
Isaiah63:2 Amu nee si kobiriritu ngoroiguk, ak u ngoroiguk che bo ne tiechei sabibuk?" 
Isaiah63:3 Kiatiech anege sabibuk eng’ ole kitue; ak kima komi chi kobota eng’ bichoto; ee, kiatiech eng’ neregekyuk, atiechatiech eng’ neregekyuk che laldos; ak koisegei ngoroikyuk korotikwak che soptos, ak kiamuruon ngoroikyuk tugul." 
Isaiah63:4 Amu kimi muguleldanyu betutab yaaktaetab mugetut, ak kagoit kenyitab chechuk che kitiachi."
