Isaiah63:5 Ak kiageerote, ama biit ne toretisiei; ak kiakwong’ amu ma biit chi ne tiiei age: kiibwa anyun eunnyu yetunet; ak kitiia neregekyuk che ng’wonen." 
Isaiah63:6 Ak kiatiech bik eng’ neregekyuk, ak kiagochi kobogityo eng’ neregekyuk che ng’wonen, ak kiatumji ng’ony korotikwak che soptos." 
Isaiah63:7 Amwaitoi chamnyet ne tala ne bo Jehovah, ak kalosunoikab Jehovah, ko u tugul che kigogonech Jehovah; ak mieindo ne o eng’ gotab Israel, ne kigogochi ichek ko u rirenosiekyik, ak ko u chang’indab chamnyennyi ne tala." 
Isaiah63:8 Amu kimwa kole, Bikyuk iman, lagok che mayaei kaberberisiet: kiek anyun yetindenywa." 
Isaiah63:9 Kiginyalil inendet eng’ nyalilwogikwak tugul, ak kisor ichek malaikaiyandennyi ne kimi tainnyi: kiitiach eng’ chamnyennyi ak rirenennyi; ak kigesen ak koganab betusiek tugul che bo keny." 
Isaiah63:10 Ago kiingelelso ak kogochi arogenet Tamirmiriennyi ne tilil: kigiwal anyun koek bunyondenywa, ak kobargei ak ichek." 
Isaiah63:11 Kiibwat anyun betusiek che bo keny, Musa, ak bikyik, kole, Mi ano inendet ne kiimut ichek kolong’une nyanjet koboto mestowek che bo akwennyi? Mi ano inendet ne kiinde Tamirmiriennyi ne tilil kwenunywa," 
Isaiah63:12 ne kichuul eunnyi ne bo torornatet koba koboto eutab tai ne bo Musa, ne kipchei beek eng’ tainywa, si koyachigei kainet ne bo koigeny," 
Isaiah63:13 ne kiindochi ichek kobun riret, ko u mbartanyit eng’ ong’atet, si maginach?" 
Isaiah63:14 Ko u ye chorjingei tuga atebwet, kogochi ko u noto Tamirmirietab Jehovah ichek komuuny: kiindochi anyun biguk, si kobiit iyachige kainet ne toror." 
Isaiah63:15 Keer anyun ng’ony eng’ kipsengwet, ak igeer eng’ meng’otetab tililindang’ung’ ak ko bo torornateng’ung’. Mi ano kagiileng’ung’ bo ge ak boisioniguk che bo kamuktaet? Kaietena rirenetab muguleldang’ung’ ak rirenosieguk." 
Isaiah63:16 Amu i kwandanyo, agot ngo maingenech Abraham, ama naech Israel; ee, Jehovah, inye ko i kwandanyo; kaineng’ung’ ko katiagindennyo koboch keny." 
Isaiah63:17 Ee, Jehovah, amu nee si igonech kemaste eng’ ortinweguk, ak iuuit mugulelwekyok si magiywein? Weege amu otwogiguk, bororiosiekab boroteng’ung’." 
Isaiah63:18 Kinyaban biguk che tililen; ago ne matia kotiech bunikyok oldang’ung’ ne tilil. 
Isaiah63:19 Kageige bik che kitom ibou; ko u icheget che ma kimwaitae kaineng’ung’. 
Isaiah64:1 Kata mie ibet kipsengwetisiek, ak ichoruge, si kobiit kobotanso tulonok eng’ taing’ung’;" 
Isaiah64:2 ko u ye beelei mat sigorik, ak ko u ye iguuti mat beek: si kibarta kaineng’ung’ konaak eng’ buniguk, si kobotanso bororiosiek eng’ taing’ung’!" 
Isaiah64:3 Ye kingiyai tuguk che bo kamuiset che kima kicheng’, kiichoruge, kibotanso tulonok eng’ taing’ung’." 
Isaiah64:4 Amu tomo kogas bik koboch keny, anan koguiyo eng’ itik, anan kogeer eng’ konyekwak Kamuktaindet age ne ma inye, ne yaei boisiet agobo chito ne igeni inendet." 
Isaiah64:5 Otuitosi ak inendet ne baibai ak koyaei imanda, icheget che ibwatin eng’ ortinweguk: keero, kiinerech, ak kigiyai tengekto: kigeyai choto betusiek che chang’, ak tos kisoruech?" 
Isaiah64:6 Amu kigiige tugul chi ne bo simdo, ak u imandanyo tugul ngoriet ne muruon: ak kirestosi achek tugul ko u sogot; ak onech yaitwogikyok ko u ye onsei usonet." 
Isaiah64:7 Ama mi ne kuurei kaineng’ung’, ne igiilegei si kobiit konamin: amu kiiung’enech togeng’ung’, ak kiigeswech amu tengekwogikyok." 
Isaiah64:8 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah, i kwandanyo; ki menet, ak ko i mimiindennyo; ak ki boisionikab euneguk achek tugul." 
Isaiah64:9 Amat inerech mising’, ee Jehovah, amat ibwat tengekto agoi: keero, keer komie, kisain, ki biguk achek tugul." 
Isaiah64:10 Kigoek kong’atet nganasoguk che tililen, koek Sion ong’atet, koek Jerusalem karatia." 
Isaiah64:11 Kigebeel gonnyo ne tilil ne kararan, ole kilosunenen kwanisiekyok; kigong’emogis tugukyok tugul che kororon." 
Isaiah64:12 Ee Jehovah, tos ta iranyege eng’ tuguchoto? Tos isise, ak inyalilech mising’?" 
Isaiah65:1 Teeba bik che kima koteeba; kigonyorua ichek che kima cheng’a: kialenji bororiet ne kima kemwaitae kainennyu, Ogeera, ogeera." 
Isaiah65:2 Kiaiitochi eunekyuk bet komugul bik che ingeleldos, che bendote oret ne ma kararan, che bendote kabwatutikwak;" 
Isaiah65:3 bik che tacha kimni kotugul, koeng’sei eng’ mbarenik, ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ matabaruk barak;" 
Isaiah65:4 che teebote kererisiek, ak komenyei komoswek che bo ung’ot; che amei banyekab torok, ak mi terenikwak sutekab tuguk che kiwechei." 
Isaiah65:5 Che mwaei kole, Tonon inyege, amerikya, amu a tilil asiirin: chuto ko iyeto eng’ serunnyu, mat ne lalei betut komugul." 
Isaiah65:6 Ogeero, sirat eng’ tainnyu: masise, ago ayaaktoi, ee ayaakyini andochini tegetikwak," 
Isaiah65:7 tengekwogikwok, koboto tengekwogikab kwanisiekwok, mwaei Jehovah, che kigobeel nyamdutik eng’ tulonok, ak kochuba eng’ tulonok che mengechen: ageerjini anyun boisionikwak che bo tai, andochini tegetikwak." 
Isaiah65:8 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ko u ye kinyorjin divaik che leelach logoek che irurugotin eng’ temet, ak kole age, Ameng’em, amu mi kaberuret tuguchoto: ayae anyun ko u noto agobo otwogikyuk, si mang’em ichek tugul." 
Isaiah65:9 Ak amutu ne kigii eng’ Jakobo, ak amutu eng’ Juda nyabanindetab tulonokyuk, ak kobunji yoto chechuk che kigilewen, ak komenyei yoto otwogikyuk." 
Isaiah65:10 Ak koek Saron biutab akwotisiekab kechirek, ak koek atebwetab Akor ole ruiye akwotisiek, amu bikyuk che kigocheng’a." 
Isaiah65:11 Ago okwek che ometoi Jehovah, che outie tulwennyu ne tilil, che ochobe meset agobo Kelunet, ak che onyiityini Kagesunet divaik che kigiburuch:" 
Isaiah65:12 aityinok anyun rotwetab chok, ak ong’urukyini tugul barisiet: amu kingaguurse, ko ma kowolu; kingang’alal, ko ma ogas; ago kioyai yaitiet eng’ tainnyu, ak kiolewen ne mabaibaitune." 
Isaiah65:13 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, tun amisiei otwogikyuk, ago amok rubet: ogeero, tun eeisei otwogikyuk, ago amok melel: ogeero, tun baibaitu otwogikyuk, ago olilandosi:" 
Isaiah65:14 ogeero, tiendos otwogikyuk amu boiboiyetab mugulelwekwak, ago orirtosi eng’ arogenetab muguleldo, oteitosi amu ng’wanindab muguleldo." 
Isaiah65:15 Ak obagakte kaineng’wong’ koek chubisiet eng’ chechuk che kialewen, ak kobarin Kiptaiyat Jehovah; ak koguur otwogikyik eng’ kainet age:" 
Isaiah65:16 si koek ne iberuregei eng’ ng’ony ne iberuregei eng’ Kamuktaindet ne bo iman, ak koek ne iyostos eng’ ng’ony ne iyostos eng’ Kamuktaindet ne bo iman; amu kigeutie nyalilwogik che bo tai, amu kigeuny si ma ageere." 
Isaiah65:17 Ogeero, atau ayae kipsengwetisiek che leelach ak ng’onyut ne leel: ama kibwati tuguk che bo tai, ama kochutei metit." 
Isaiah65:18 Ago ogasge ak oboiboitu agoi agobo kit ne atau ayae: amu atau ayae Jerusalem koek ne kiboiboitune, ak koek bikyik boiboiyet." 
Isaiah65:19 Ak abaibaitune Jerusalem, abaibaitune bikyuk: ama kegasei ne rirei eng’ nganasanato, anan tuget ne bo rirek." 
Isaiah65:20 Ma biitu eng’ oloto kogeny lakwet ne bo betusiek che ng’ering’ anan boiyot ne ma ilil: amu meei lakwet ko bo kenyisiek bogol, ak kechubei kiptengekyot ne bo kenyisiek bogol." 
Isaiah65:21 Ak koteech gorik, ak komeny; ak komin sabibuk eng’ mbarenik, ak koam logoekwak." 
Isaiah65:22 Mateeksei ichek, si konyo komeny age; ama minsei ichek, si konyo koam age: amu igeitu betusiekab ketit betusiekab bikyuk, ak koboiboitune chechuk che kialewen, boisionikab eunekwak." 
Isaiah65:23 Maboisiei buch, ama ichin nyalil, amu icheget ko iyotetab che iberurotin che bo Jehovah, koboto lagokwak." 
Isaiah65:24 Ak ye tom koguurso, awolu; ak ye ta kong’alali, agas." 
Isaiah65:25 Ageti suiyot ak aruetab kechir, ak koam ng’etundo suswek ko u teta: ak koek ng’ung’unyek amitwogikab erenet. Ma itoi kiy chi anan kong’emis eng’ tulwennyu tugul ne tilil, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah66:1 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kipsengwet ko ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet, ak ng’ony ko ng’echeretab kelyekyuk: oteekwa got ne u nee? Ak komosta ano ole amuung’e?" 
Isaiah66:2 Amu kiyaei eunnyu tuguchuto tugul, ak kibiit anyun tuguchuto tugul, mwaei Jehovah; ago ageni inendet ne banan ak konyerategei eng’ tamirmiriet, ne botani amu ng’olyondennyu." 
Isaiah66:3 Inendet ne barei teta ko kergei ak inendet ne barei chito; inendet ne igoitoi aruetab kechir koek tiseiywot, ko kergei ak inendet ne kiriei kaatitab seset; inendet ne igoitoi kagochinet ko kergei ak inendet ne kigoitoi korotikab toret; inendet ne beelei tuguk che nyamdut ko kergei ak inendet ne iberuri kanamwet: ee, kigolewen ortinwekwak ak kochamei sobonwekwak tugukwak che kiwechei;" 
Isaiah66:4 alewenjini anyun kaberberisiosiekwak, ak aipchi ichek kaiyweisiosiekwak; amu kingaguurse, ko ma wol chi; ye kingang’alal, ko ma kas ichek: ago kiyai tuguk che yaach eng’ tainnyu, ak kolewen tuguk che ma abaibaitune." 
Isaiah66:5 Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek che obotandosi amu ng’olyondennyi: Kigomwa che otupche icheget che wechok, che kitimdak agobo kainennyu, kole, Ingitoror Jehovah, si kobiit kegeer boiboiyeng’wong’; ago ililandos." 
Isaiah66:6 Waagat ne bo wasetab ge ne bunu nganaset, waagat ne bunu hekalut, kutitab Jehovah ne yaaktochin mugetut bunikyik." 
Isaiah66:7 Kisigis amanyor ng’wanindo; kisich werit kotom kogas ng’wanindo. 
Isaiah66:8 Kigogas ng’o ng’olyot ne u ni? Kigogeer ng’o tuguk che u chu? Tos kisichei emet eng’ betut agenge? Tos kisichei bororiet eng’ sait ne matia? Amu kisich Sion lagokyik, eng’ sainato kinyorune ng’wanindo." 
Isaiah66:9 Tos aete kesich lakwet ne kogoyam kesich? Mwaei Jehovah. Tos arate moet ne agochini koi? Mwaei Kamuktaindeng’ung’. 
Isaiah66:10 Oboiboitu okwek koboto Jerusalem, ogasge koboto inendet, okwek tugul che ochame inendet: oboiboitu eng’ boiboiyet koboto inendet, okwek tugul che orirjini:" 
Isaiah66:11 si kobiit ochuchun obiyong’se eng’ kainaikab kagaigaosiekyik; si kobiit ochuchun tugul, ak oboiboitune chang’indab torornatennyi." 
Isaiah66:12 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, atesyini kalyet ko u ainet, ak atesyi torornatetab bororiosiek ko u kererut ne ing’irtogei, ak ochuchun; kiisyinok usia, ak ketinyok kigaigaak." 
Isaiah66:13 Agoigook ko u inendet ne igoigoi kamet; ak kigaigaak eng’ Jerusalem. 
Isaiah66:14 Ak ogeero, ak koboiboitu mugulelwekwok, ak kong’atyo kowekwok ko u suswek che ng’orng’or: ak konaak eutab Jehovah eng’ otwogikyik, ak konerekyi bunikyik." 
Isaiah66:15 Amu ogeero, nyonei Jehovah eng’ mat, ak koigei karisiekyik che bo luget kipchurjuriet; koyaakta neregekyik eng’ koromnatet, ak koyaakta kerennyi bo kong’ eng’ liblibenetab mat." 
Isaiah66:16 Amu iruoksechin Jehovah bik tugul eng’ mat ak eng’ rotwennyi bo chok: ak kochang’a che barei Jehovah. 
Isaiah66:17 Mwaei Jehovah kole, Igesugei ichek tugul che ianyinyegei ak kotililegei si koba mbarenik, kosubotgei ak koamei banyekab torok, ak che kiwechei, ak murek." 
Isaiah66:18 Amu angen boisionikwak ak kabwatutikwak: nyonei betut, ye ayumi bororiosiek tugul ak kutuswek tugul; ak kobwa ak kogeer torornatennyu." 
Isaiah66:19 Ak ande kaborunet kwenunywa, ak ayokte che chilildos eng’ ichek koba bororiosiek, koba Tarsis, Pul ak Lud, che ng’iei kwanget, agoi Tubal ak Jaban, agoi ngegusiek che looen, che tom kogas agobo kalosunennyu, anan kogeer torornatennyu; ak komwaita torornatennyu eng’ bororiosiek." 
Isaiah66:20 Ak komut tupchosiekwok tugul komong’une bororiosiek tugul koek kagochinet eng’ Jehovah, kobunu mbartanyisiek, ak karisiek, ak tirbonok, ak eng’ nyumbusiek, ak eng’ moek che chepcheben che bo tambesik, kobwa tulwennyu ne tilil Jerusalem, mwaei Jehovah, ko u ye ibu lagokab Israel kagochinenywa eng’ teret ne tilil konyo gotab Jehovah." 
Isaiah66:21 Ak ande alak eng’ ichek kogeny koek tisiik ak Lawik, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah66:22 Amu ko u ye tebe tainnyu kipsengwetisiek che leelach ak ng’onyut ne leel, che ta ayae, ko u noto tebyei iyoteng’wong’ ak kaineng’wong’ eng’ tainnyu, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah66:23 Ak tun bwanei bik tugul koloswa eng’ tainnyu koboch ye kaleel arawet agoi koleel age, ak koboch sabato age agoi sabato age, mwaei Jehovah." 
Isaiah66:24 Ak komanda koba kogeer muswekab bik che kiingelelja: amu mabegu kutikwak, ama kimisi manywa; ak koek che wechei bik tugul." 
Jeremiah1:1 Chu ng’alekab Jeremia weritab Hilkia, ne ki bo tisiik che kimi Anatot eng’ emetab Benjamin:" 
Jeremiah1:2 ne kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ betusiekab Josia weritab Amon, laitoriatab Juda, eng’ kenyitab taman ak somok ne bo laitornatennyi." 
Jeremiah1:3 Kinyo kogeny eng’ betusiekab Jeoiakim weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda, agoi kogesgei kenyitab taman ak agenge ne bo Sedekia weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda; agoi keluul Jerusalem kimut eng’ arawetab mut." 
Jeremiah1:4 Kinyonja anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Jeremiah1:5 Kiangenin ye kitom amimiin eng’ moet, ak kiatabanin kotom kesichin; kiandein iegu maotiot eng’ bororiosiek." 
Jeremiah1:6 Amwa anyun ale, He, Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Keero, mamuchi ang’alal; amu a lakwa." 
Jeremiah1:7 Ago kilenja Jehovah, Amele, A lakwa: amu iwendi oldab bik alak tugul che ayoktochinin, ak imwae kit age tugul ne ang’atin." 
Jeremiah1:8 Ameiywei ichek: amu ami koboten, asorun, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah1:9 Koiito anyun Jehovah eunnyi, ak kotwa kutinnyu; ak kolenja Jehovah, Keero, kande ng’alekyuk kuting’ung’:" 
Jeremiah1:10 keero, kandein rani ibou bororiosiek ak bounatosiek, itutu ak ibut, ak ing’em ak igabui; iteech, ak imin." 
Jeremiah1:11 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja, Jeremia, igeere nee? Ak kiale, Ageere temet ne bo ketit ne kiguure almond." 
Jeremiah1:12 Yeityo kolenja Jehovah, Kegeer komie: amu aribe ng’olyondennyu si ayai kosulda." 
Jeremiah1:13 Ak kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah ne bo aeng’, kolenja, Igeere nee? Kiale, Ageere teret ne wasegei; ak tokyingei teronoto murot ne bo katam." 
Jeremiah1:14 Yeityo kolenja Jehovah, Mong’une yaitiet murot ne bo katam, konyonjin bik tugul che bo emet." 
Jeremiah1:15 Keero, aguure ortinwek tugul che bo bounatosiekab murot ne bo katam, mwaei Jehovah; ak kobwa, ak konde age tugul ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet ye kimandoe eng’ ormarichokab Jerusalem, ak kotokyigei irimoikyik tugul, ak kotokyigei nganasok tugul che bo Juda." 
Jeremiah1:16 Ak amwa kiruogutikyuk agirindae yaitienywa tugul; amu kigometa, ak kigobeelji nyamdutik kanamonik che ter, ak kolos boisionikab eunekwak." 
Jeremiah1:17 Kermenge anyun, ak ing’eet, ak imwachi ichek tuguk tugul che ang’atin; ametoptoben amu ichek, si magonin itoptoben eng’ tainywa." 
Jeremiah1:18 Keero, kayain betuni iegu nganaset ne ribot, ak toloitab karnet, ak irimoikab sugunwet, si igirinde emet komugul, ak laitorinikab Juda, koboto bounikyik, ak tisiikyik, ak bikab emet." 
Jeremiah1:19 Ak obarge, ago maiterterin: amu ami koboten, si asorun, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah2:1 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Jeremiah2:2 Ui, ititenji Jerusalem, ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Abwatin agobo mieindab ming’inateng’ung’, chamnyetab katunisieng’ung’; ko u ye kiisubwa eng’ ong’atet, eng’ emet ne kima kegolei." 
Jeremiah2:3 Ki tilil Israel eng’ Jehovah, rurgutinikab iyotennyi: kiityin ng’ogisto tugul che amei inendet; nyonjin yaitiet ichek, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah2:4 Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, ee gotab Jakobo, ak ortinwek tugul che bo gotab Israel:" 
Jeremiah2:5 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Nee kit ne ma bo iman ne kinyorja kwanisiekwok, kot kolooitena, ak kosubot tangoita, ak kagoek buch?" 
Jeremiah2:6 Ama mwa ichek kole, Mi ano Jehovah ne kiimutwech kemong’u eng’ emetab Misri; ne kiindoiywech kebun ong’atet, kebun emet ne surkwen ak ne bo keringonik, kebun emetab kemeut ak ne bo uruetab meet, kebun emet ne mabunei chi, ole mamenyei chi?" 
Jeremiah2:7 Ak kiamutwak obwa emet ne chang’ amitwogik, si kobiit oam logoekyik ak mieindanyi; ago kingoit emonoto, ong’wanit emennyu, ak oyai borotennyu koek kit ne kiwechei." 
Jeremiah2:8 Ma mwa tisiik kole, Mi ano Jehovah? Ama naa ichek che tinyei ng’atutik: kiingelelja kogeny bounik agichek, ak kimaotense maotik Baal, ak kobendate tuguk che maginyorune kelunet." 
Jeremiah2:9 Ta aruokseiwok anyun, mwaei Jehovah, ak aruoksechini lagokab lagokwok." 
Jeremiah2:10 Oba obun ngegusiek che bo Kitim, ak ogeer; ak oyokte bik koba Kedar, ak obwat komie; ak ogeer ngo kigobiit kiy ne u no." 
Jeremiah2:11 Tos kigowal bororiet kanamonikwak agot ngo ma cheptalelisiek? Ago kigowal bikyuk torornatenywa agobo kit ne magonu kelunet. 
Jeremiah2:12 Okwong’ie agobo nito, ee okwek kipsengwetisiek, ak oarogense mising’, oyaamnye kot, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah2:13 Amu kigoyai bikyuk yaitwogik aeng’; kigometa ane ne a kondametutab beek che soptos, ak kobaljigei keringonik, keringonik che kigoundurogis, che maimuchi kotebe beek." 
Jeremiah2:14 Tos otwogindet Israel? Tos otwogindet ne kigisikyi ga? Amu nee si keluul? 
Jeremiah2:15 Kigoborisenji barnotikab ng’etunyik, ak komoror mising’; ak kigong’em emennyi koek karatia; kigebeel nganasokyik, ma komenyei chi." 
Jeremiah2:16 Kigotui kogeny meting’ung’ barak lagokab Nop ak Tapanes. 
Jeremiah2:17 Tos kima icheng’jige nito, amu kiimete Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ye kiimutin eng’ oret?" 
Jeremiah2:18 Tos image nee anyun oret ne wendi Misri, iee beekab Sihor? Anan image nee oret ne wendi Asuria, iee beekab Ainet?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Itigonin yaitieng’ung’: ak kogerin kong’ mastaeng’ung’; nai anyun ile kit ne ya ak ko ng’wan, amu kiimete Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ametinye kaiyweisiet ne iywea, mwaei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Jeremiah2:20 Amu kiairi choging’ung’ eng’ betusiek che bo keny, ak ang’eti anoguk, ak kiimwa ile, Maotisiei, amu kiing’uruge eng’ tulwet age tugul ne koi ak eng’ ketit age tugul ne tuon, iyae kugoinatet." 
Jeremiah2:21 Ago kiga aminin inye ketitab sabibuk ne kararan, keswot ne bo iman: kilya anyun si iwalage iegu ketit ne ya ne mangen?" 
Jeremiah2:22 Amu agot ngiunege munyat, ak iboisie sabunit ne o, ko toogu kora yaitieng’ung’ eng’ tainnyu, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Jeremiah2:23 Imuktoi ano anyun ile, Ma a muruon, ma asub Baalik? Keer oreng’ung’ eng’ atebwet, nai kit ne kaiyai: i moitab tambesiet ne chepcheb ne isubi ortinwekyik;" 
Jeremiah2:24 sigirietab timin ne ingen ong’atet, ne tabei koristo eng’ magennyi; ng’o ne imuchi koweekta eng’ ye mi, eng’ betusiekyik? Mang’etos ichek tugul che cheng’ei inendet; nyoru ichek inendet eng’ arawennyi." 
Jeremiah2:25 Amat kobetyi kweiyot keldang’ung’, anan koam melelda moktang’ung’: ago kiimwa ile, Matilei kiy kamang’unet: achicha; amu kiacham toek, ak asubi ichek." 
Jeremiah2:26 Ko u ye ililani chorindet ko kaginyor, ko u noto ililani gotab Israel; icheget koboto laitorinikwak, ak bounikwak, ak tisiikwak, ak maotikwak;" 
Jeremiah2:27 che lenjin subenet, I baba; ak kolenji koita, Kiisicha: amu kigotuktocha batai, ama tokyagei: ago mwaei eng’ betutab nyalildanywa, kole, Ng’eet, soruech." 
Jeremiah2:28 Ago mi ano kanamonik che kiiyachige? Ingong’eetyo ichek, ngot komuchi kosorun eng’ betusiekab nyalildang’ung’: amu ko u ole te koitetab nganasoguk, ko u noto kanamoniguk, ee Juda." 
Jeremiah2:29 Amu nee si ogaigaa? Kiongelelja okwek tugul, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah2:30 Kiabir lagokwok buch; ma cham kotigonet: kigobar rotweng’ung’ bo chok maotikwok, ko u ng’etundo ne ng’emisiei." 
Jeremiah2:31 Ee ibini, ogeer ng’olyotab Jehovah. Tos kiaegu emetab mesundeito ne o? Amu nee anyun si komwa bikyuk kole, Kigitiachech; ma kebwane kogeny ole imi?" 
Jeremiah2:32 Tos imuchi chepto koutie tugukyik che bo lelesta, anan koutie mureret ngoroikyik? Ago kigoutiena bikyuk eng’ betusiek che maiitoksei." 
Jeremiah2:33 Ichoptoi ano oreng’ung’ si icheng’ chamnyet! Kiinet anyun kwonyik che yaachen ortinweguk. 
Jeremiah2:34 Mitei kogeny ngoroiguk korotikab kibananok che matinyei tengek: ma anyorji ole kigobutok, ago kianyorji chuto tugul." 
Jeremiah2:35 Ago kiimwa ile, Matinye tengek; kigoistoenagei iman neregekyik. Keero, aruogun, amu imwae ile, Tom ayai tengek." 
Jeremiah2:36 Amu nee si iombenote iwal bandang’ung’? Ililani agobo Misri kogeny, ko u ye kiililan agobo Asuria." 
Jeremiah2:37 Imandoe inendet agine, inamoti meting’ung’: amu kigoesio Jehovah kamang’unosiekwok, ak mebore choto." 
Jeremiah3:1 Mwaei ichek kole, Ngot koon chi osotiondennyi, ak kobagakta inendet ak koek osotiotab chito age, ko tos ta koweekyigei chichoto kwonyoto kogeny? Tos maimuruoni emonoto mising’? Ago kiiyai kugoinatet koboto chamanik che chang’; ago oweekyage kogeny, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah3:2 Onyal barak ak ogeer tulonok che churiotin; mi ano komoswek che tom oruiye tuwai? Kiigen ichek eng’ ortinwek taban, ko u Marabuindet eng’ ong’atet; ak kiimuruon emet eng’ kugoinateng’ung’ ak eng’ sogornateng’ung’." 
Jeremiah3:3 Kigeger anyun ropta amu noto, si mata kobiit ropta ne bo let; ago itinye togetab chepkugoniot, ak iesioi ililan." 
Jeremiah3:4 Tos mechame irirja koboch nguno, ile, Baba, i kandoindetab ming’inatennyu?" 
Jeremiah3:5 Tos nerechi inendet agoi? Nerechi agoi kagesunet? Keero, kiing’alal, ak kiiyai tuguk che yaachen ak kiisub oreng’ung’." 
Jeremiah3:6 Kimwawa anyun Jehovah kogeny eng’ betusiekab Josia laitoriat kolenja, Tos kiigeer noto kiyai Israel ne kigogetyigei let? Kigotogosta tulwet age tugul ne koi, ak kwo kelutab ketit age tugul ne tuon, ak kiyai kugoinatet eng’ oloto." 
Jeremiah3:7 Ak kingo kagoyai tuguchuto tugul, amwa ale, Weekyinagei inendet; ago ma week: ak kigeer nito chepkamennyi Juda kaberberindet." 
Jeremiah3:8 Ak kiageer agobo ng’olyondonito, ye kingo kagoyai Israel ne kiga kogetyigei let, ibetab ge, ko kiaon inendet ak agochi baruetab besiet, ago ma iyweis Juda chepkamennyi kaberberindet; ago kiwa agine koyai kugoinatet." 
Jeremiah3:9 Ak amu kiit inendet kole kiy ne nyamnyum kugoinatet, ko kigimuruon emet, ak kiipgei ak koik ak subenaik." 
Jeremiah3:10 Ak eng’ chu tugul ko ma weekyagei eng’ muguleldanyi komugul Juda chepkamennyi, kaberberindet, ago eng’ ng’alset, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah3:11 Kimwawa Jehovah kolenja, Kiibartagei Israel ne kigogetyigei let kole bo iman kosiir Juda kaberberindet." 
Jeremiah3:12 Ui mwachi ng’alechu komostab murot ne bo katam, ilenji, Weege, inye Israel ne kiiweekyige let, mwaei Jehovah; ma ageerok eng’ neregek: amu atinye rirenet, mwaei Jehovah, manerechi agoi." 
Jeremiah3:13 Ng’any tengektang’ung’ kityo, ile kiingelelji Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak kiiseerji toek ortinweguk eng’ kelutab ketit age tugul ne tuon, ak ma ogas it kutinnyu, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah3:14 Oweege, okwek lagok che kiogetyige let, mwaei Jehovah; amu a manong’otiot eng’ okwek; ak amut chito agenge eng’ nganaset agenge, ak bik aeng’ che bo oret agenge, ak amutwak obwa Sion." 
Jeremiah3:15 Ak agonok mestowek ko u ye chamei muguleldanyu, che baok eng’ naet ak kaguiyet." 
Jeremiah3:16 Ak ye tun kaotesage ochang’itu eng’ emet, mwaei Jehovah, ko ma komwaei eng’ betusiechoto kogeny kole, Moingetab arorutietab Jehovah; ama chutei metit; ama kobwati ichek; ama kemage kiy; ama keyaei kogeny." 
Jeremiah3:17 Tun kuure ichek Jerusalem eng’ betusiechoto, ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Jehovah, ak koyumjigei bororiosiek tugul, koyumjigei kainetab Jehovah, eng’ Jerusalem: ama kobendote uuindab mugulelwekwak che yaachen." 
Jeremiah3:18 Tun bendoti eng’ betusiechoto gotab Juda ak gotab Israel, ak kobwa tuwai komong’ eng’ emet ne bo murot ne bo katam, kobwa emet ne kiagochi kwanisiekwok kobunji." 
Jeremiah3:19 Ago kiale, Amuktoi ano andein otebi ak lagok, ak agonin emet ne kararan, borotet ne mie ne bo lugosiekab bororiosiek? Ak kiale, Oguurena Baba; ama omastoi ometa." 
Jeremiah3:20 Iman, ko u ye bagaktoi osotiot manong’otiondennyi eng’ kaberberisiet, ko u noto, kioyaiywa kaberberisiet, ee gotab Israel, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah3:21 Kigasei waagat eng’ tulonok che churiotin, rirek, ak somutikab lagokab Israel; amu kigomaas orenywa, kigoutie Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa." 
Jeremiah3:22 Oweege, okwek lagok che kiogetyigei let, si asoob kachuchugeng’wong’ bo ge. Keero, kagibwanjin; amu i Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah3:23 Iman, kigeni buch toretet ne bunu tulonok, wasetab ge ne mi tulonok. Iman mi yetunetab Israel eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah3:24 Ago kigoam kit ne bo kalilanet boisionikab kwanisiekyok koboch ming’inatennyo; koboto kechirekwak ak akwotisiekwak, ak werikwak ak tibikwak." 
Jeremiah3:25 Ongeruiye eng’ kalilanennyo, ak ingotuchech tewernatennyo: amu kigeyachi tengekto Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, achek ak kwanisiekyok, koboch ming’inatennyo agoi betuni: ama kigas it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah4:1 Ngot iweege, ee Israel, mwaei Jehovah, iweekyinage: ak ngot iiste tuguguk che kiwechei eng’ tainnyu, ko ma keistoin anyun;" 
Jeremiah4:2 ak iyosie ko u ni, ile, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, eng’ imanit, eng’ kiruoget, ak eng’ imanda; ak koberurgei bororiosiek eng’ inendet, ak kolosunegei inendet." 
Jeremiah4:3 Amu mwachin Jehovah bikab Juda ak che bo Jerusalem ko u ni kole, Obalu mbareng’wong’, amogol ole mi katok." 
Jeremiah4:4 Omuratange obunji Jehovah, oiste irirenikab mugulelwekwok, okwek bikab Juda ak che omenye Jerusalem: si mamong’ neregekyuk che koromen ko u mat, ak kolalyo kot ko maimuchi chi komis, amu yaitietab boisionikwok." 
Jeremiah4:5 Omwaite eng’ Juda, ak obarte eng’ Jerusalem: ak omwa ole, Oguut iriaget eng’ emet: owaach mising’ ak omwa ole, Oyumge, ak ongebe nganasok che ng’ototin." 
Jeremiah4:6 Onamji barak songoliet kotokyigei Sion: omwei, osoruge, amogage: amu aibu yaitiet eng’ murot ne bo katam, ak ng’emisiet ne o." 
Jeremiah4:7 Kamong’ ng’etundo eng’ sondinnyi, ne ng’emindetab bororiosiek, mi oret, kagomong’ eng’ oldanyi; si kobiit koyai emeng’ung’ koguber, ak koek nganasoguk karatia, ama komenyei chi." 
Jeremiah4:8 Ogermenege anyun kuniok amu noto, oririe ak oteiye: amu tom koistoeneigei neregek che ng’wonen che bo Jehovah." 
Jeremiah4:9 Ak mwaei Jehovah kole, Tun betei eng’ betunoto muguleldab laitoriat, koboto mugulelwekab bounik; ak kokwong’io tisiik, ak kotang’any maotik." 
Jeremiah4:10 Kiamwa anyun ale, He Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Iman kiiberber mising’ bichu ak Jerusalem, ilenji, Onyoru kalyet; ago ityin rotwetab chok sobondo." 
Jeremiah4:11 Tun kimwachin bichu ak Jerusalem eng’ betunoto, kelenjin, Usyin cheptab bikyuk usonet ne bo mat ne bunu tulonok che churiotin che bo ong’atet, ma ne sesisiei, anan ko ne itililisiei;" 
Jeremiah4:12 nyonjina usonet ne o ne bunu tuguchuto: aruokyini anyun agane ichek. 
Jeremiah4:13 Ogeero, togosu ko u bolik, ak u kipchurjuriet karisiekyik che bo luget: chepcheb mbartanyisiekyik kosiir kipsichinik. Bwa eng’ achek! Amu kageng’emech." 
Jeremiah4:14 Ee Jerusalem, iunde tengekto eng’ muguleldang’ung’, si kesorun. Tebenen kabwatutiguk che yaachen kot kotianit?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Amu mwaitoi waagat ne bunu Dan, ak kobortoi yaitiet eng’ tulonokab Epraim." 
Jeremiah4:16 Omwachi bororiosiek; ogeero, omwachi Jerusalem, olenji, Ibogu bik che ng’eete emet ne loo, ak kowaage nganasokab Juda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Kigoyiem ichek ko u ribik che ribei mbaret; amu kigongelelja, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah4:18 Kagoibun oreng’ung’ ak boisioniguk tuguchuto; nito ko yaitieng’ung’; amu ng’wan, amu itei muguleldang’ung’." 
Jeremiah4:19 Moennyu, moennyu! Atinye ng’wanindo eng’ muguleldanyu orit: rukrugeni muguleldanyu; mamuchi asis; amu kaigas, ee sobondanyu, cheetab iriaget, waagatab luget." 
Jeremiah4:20 Kagemwaita ng’emisiet eng’ ng’emisiet; amu kagong’emak emet komugul: kagechea keng’em emaisiekyuk, ak angokyuk eng’ sainato." 
Jeremiah4:21 Ageere songoliet ak agase cheetab iriaget kot kotianit! 
Jeremiah4:22 Amu berber bikyuk, maingena; lagok che uuen metowek, ama tinyei kaguiyet: ng’omen koyai yaitiet, ago maingen koyai ne mie." 
Jeremiah4:23 Kiageer ng’ony, ak ogeero, kima komi kiy ak kima kotinyei iton; ak kiageer kipsengwetisiek, ak kima kotinyei lapkeiyet." 
Jeremiah4:24 Kiageer tulonok, ak ogeero, kibotandos, ak kiiyongoi tulonok tugul che mengechen." 
Jeremiah4:25 Kiageer, ak ogeero, kima komi chi, ak kiga komwei taritik tugul che bo barak." 
Jeremiah4:26 Kiageer, ak ogeero, kiek ong’atet mbaret ne kirurei, ak kiga kiluul nganasokyik eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak eng’ taitab neregekyik che ng’wonen." 
Jeremiah4:27 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Egu emet tugul karaita; ago magesu." 
Jeremiah4:28 Rirei emet amu nito, ak kotuuegitu kipsengwetisiek: amu kaamwa, ak kaachob, ak tom awal kit ne abwati, amaweechigei let eng’ ng’olyondonito." 
Jeremiah4:29 Mweei nganaset komugul amu waagatab bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek ak bikab kwangok; chutei sondisiek ak kolany ruandosiek: kimetoi nganaset age tugul, ama menyei chi oloto." 
Jeremiah4:30 Ak inye, ye king’emin, iyae nee? Agot ngilaachi ngoroik che biriren, agot ngilelesane tuguk che bo tahabu, agot ngibaraae konyeguk saleiywek, ko buch kororonindo ne iyachinige; sasin chamaniguk, cheng’ei sobondang’ung’." 
Jeremiah4:31 Amu kiagas waagat ne u ne bo kwondo ne machei kosich taitanyi, kutitab cheptab Sion, ne isienyi, ne iitoi eunekyik, komwaei kole, Bwa eng’ ane! Amu tanui sobondanyu eng’ taitab rumik." 
Jeremiah5:1 Oruaate ortinwekab Jerusalem si ogeer, ak onai, ak ocheng’ eng’ komoswekyik che baraen, ngot omuchi onyoru chi, ngot komi ne yaei imanda, ne cheng’ei imanit; si kobiit anyochi kaat nganasanato." 
Jeremiah5:2 Agot ngo mwaei ichek kole, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah; koyostos iman eng’ lembechek." 
Jeremiah5:3 Ee Jehovah, tos mageerei konyeguk imanit? Kiibir ichek, ago ma arogenso; kiigesu ichek, ago kiesio kotaach kotigonet: kiiuuiit ichek togochikwak kosiir ruandet; kiesio koweek." 
Jeremiah5:4 Yeityo amwa ale, Nyalulyotin iman bichuto; berberen; amu manaei oretab Jehovah, anan kiruogetab Kamuktaindenywa:" 
Jeremiah5:5 awendi oldab bik che eechen, ak ang’alalji ichek; amu ingen icheget oretab Jehovah, ak kiruogetab Kamuktaindenywa. Ago kigoiri chu ka bo tai chogit kibagenge, ak kong’eti ratutik." 
Jeremiah5:6 Barei anyun ichek ng’etundo ne mong’une osnet, barei ichek suiyot ne bo ong’atet, sapchin cheblanget nganasokwak, kitonatoni age tugul ne mong’u eng’ oloto: amu chang’ bistaosiekwak, ak kigotesak kachuchugenywa bo ge." 
Jeremiah5:7 Amuktoi ano anyoun kaat? Kigometa lagoguk, ak kigiyosio agobo kanamonik che ma cheptalelisiek: kingo kaabai kobiyong’so, koyai ibetab ge, ak koyumjinotgei gorikab chepkugonik." 
Jeremiah5:8 Kiu ichek mbartanyisiek che kagobiyong’so karon: kiitei age tugul eng’ maget agobo osotiotab chitab kokwennyi. 
Jeremiah5:9 Tos manyone abire agobo tuguchuto? Mwaei Jehovah; ak tos mayaaktochinige mugetut eng’ bororiet ne u ni? 
Jeremiah5:10 Otogoste irimoikyik, ak ong’em; ago mong’em ogesu: oiste temenikyik: amu ma bo choto Jehovah." 
Jeremiah5:11 Amu kigoberbera mising’ gotab Israel ak gotab Juda, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah5:12 Kigotiiyo bichoto Jehovah, ak kole, Ma inendet; ama ityinech yaitiet; ama kigeere rotwetab chok anan rubet:" 
Jeremiah5:13 ak koek maotik usonet, ama mi ng’olyot eng’ orinywa: kiyachin ko u noto." 
Jeremiah5:14 Mwaei anyun Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, ko u ni, kole, Amu omwae ng’olyondoni, ogeero, ayae ng’alekyuk eng’ kuting’ung’ koek mat, ak koek bichu kwenik, si kobeel maata ichek." 
Jeremiah5:15 Ogeero, amutwok bororiet ne bunu ole loo, ee gotab Israel, mwaei Jehovah: bororiet ne kim, bororiet ne bo keny mising’, bororiet ne mengen kutinnyi, ameguitosi kit ne mwaei." 
Jeremiah5:16 Kererit ne yatat motienywa, kimen bichoto tugul." 
Jeremiah5:17 Ak koam beguk, ak amitwogiguk, che kita nyoljin koam weriguk ak tibiguk: ak koam ichek kechireguk ak akwotisieguk: amei ketiguk che bo sabibuk ak mogooniguk: ak kobut eng’ rotwetab chok nganasoguk che ng’ototin, che imang’u." 
Jeremiah5:18 Ago mwaei Jehovah kole, Agot eng’ betusiechoto, ko mageswok." 
Jeremiah5:19 Ak ye tun omwae ole, Amu nee si koyaiywech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo tuguchuto tugul? Ilenji anyun, Ko u ye kiometa, ak oot kanamonik che ter eng’ emeng’wong’, oote ko u noto toek eng’ emet ne ma neng’wong’." 
Jeremiah5:20 Omwaite nito eng’ gotab Jakobo, ak obarte eng’ Juda, ole," 
Jeremiah5:21 Ogas ni anyun, ee okwek bik che berber, che motinye kaguiyet; che otinye konyek, amogeertoe; che otinye itik, amogastoe:" 
Jeremiah5:22 Tos moiywea? Mwaei Jehovah: tos mobotandosi eng’ tainnyu, ane ne kiande ng’aniek koek kiwotetab nyanjet, eng’ ng’atutiet ne tebyei agoi, ne maimuchi nyanjet kosiir? Ak agot ngo mildoegei beek mising’, ko maimuchi kotil kiy; agot ngo moror, ko maimuchi kosiir." 
Jeremiah5:23 Ago tinyei bichu muguleldo ne bo bistoet ak ngelelnatet; kigobistoe ak koba. 
Jeremiah5:24 Ama mwaei eng’ mugulelwekwak kole, Ongiywei anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ne konu ropta, ne bo tai ak ne bo let, eng’ betusiekyik; ne ribwech wigisiek che kiging’at che bo kesisiet." 
Jeremiah5:25 Kigowal tengekwogikwok tuguchuto, ak kigoetenak tengekwogikwok mieindo." 
Jeremiah5:26 Amu kinyorjin bikyuk bik che yaachen: ripsei ko u ye ripsei namikab taritik; richei mestet, namei bik." 
Jeremiah5:27 Ko u ye nyiie taritik kirogoret, ko u noto nyiitotin gorikwak ng’alset: kieegitu anyun amu noto, ak koek magorek." 
Jeremiah5:28 Kigonerio mising’, iluu: ee, siirtootin ichek eng’ boisionikab sogornatet: mairuochi, maibesiechin ne matinyei kwanda, si kobiit kiberur; ama iruoksechin komie che bonondos." 
Jeremiah5:29 Tos manyone abire agobo tuguchuto? Mwaei Jehovah; tos mayaaktochinige mugetut eng’ bororiet ne u ni? 
Jeremiah5:30 Kogobiit kit ne bo kwong’et ak ko samis kot eng’ emet: 
Jeremiah5:31 Maoteni maotik lembeita, ak bou tisiik ko u magetab maotik; ak chamei bikyuk koteeb ko u noto: oyae nee anyun eng’ kagesunetab tuguchuto?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Omwei osoruge, okwek lagokab Benjamin, omong’u eng’ Jerusalem, ak oguut iriaget eng’ Tekoa, ak onamji barak kitab kaborunet eng’ Bet-hakerem: amu itu yaitiet eng’ murot ne bo katam, ak ng’emisiet ne o." 
Jeremiah6:2 Aistoi inendet, ne kararan, ak ko ng’arng’ar, cheptab Sion." 
Jeremiah6:3 Bwanjin inendet mestowek ak kechirekwak; teechei emaisiekwak koyieme inendet; iyagisie age tugul komostanyi. 
Jeremiah6:4 Ochob luget, obarge ak inendet; ong’eetye, ongetogoste bet kwen. Bwa eng’ achek! Amu kaimen, negit kororokta asista." 
Jeremiah6:5 Ong’eetye, ongetogoste kemoi, keng’em gorikyik che bo laitorinik." 
Jeremiah6:6 Amu kagomwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Oluul, oeb ketik, ak owasyi ng’ung’unyek Jerusalem: nito ko nganaset ne kibirei; sastaet inegei ne mi kwenunnyi." 
Jeremiah6:7 Ko u ye kutune beek keringet, kutu ko u noto yaitiennyi: kigasei koromnatet ak ng’emisiet eng’ inendet; mi tainnyu kotugul miando ak ng’otobosiek." 
Jeremiah6:8 Kas kotigonet, ee Jerusalem, si maistoenegei sobondanyu; si mayain iegu karatia, emet ne mamenyei chi." 
Jeremiah6:9 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Turoti ichek komie che ng’etunotin che bo Israel ko u ketitab sabibuk: ketyi eung’ung’ kogeny kitongok ko u ne butei sabibuk." 
Jeremiah6:10 Ang’alaljini ng’o, ak abaorianji, si kobiit kogas? Ogeero, ma kimuratan itikwak, amaimuchi koeb it: ogeero, kaek ng’olyotab Jehovah tewernatet eng’ ichek; maboiboitune." 
Jeremiah6:11 Kanyiia anyun neregek che ng’wonen che bo Jehovah; kaang’et aranye: rong’ji neregechoto lagok che mi oret, koboto tuiyetab murenik: amu kimuti manong’otiot ak osotiot, ne kigoosit koboto ne negit kolil." 
Jeremiah6:12 Ak kobunji gorikwak bik alak, koboto mbarenikwak ak osotikwak: amu achuuljini eunnyu bik che menyei emet, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah6:13 Amu koboch ne ming’in agoi ne o eng’ ichek, kotinyei age tugul kasetab miat; ak yaei age tugul kaberberisiet koboch maotiot agoi tisiindet." 
Jeremiah6:14 Kigonya kogeny mookab bikyuk kobir barak, kolenjin, Kalyet, kalyet; ye mami kalyet." 
Jeremiah6:15 Tos kiililanso ye kingoyai tuguk che kiwechei? Achicha, ma ililanso agot kitigin, ama walogis togochikwak: ibutos anyun koboto icheget che ibutos: tun kiwirtoi eng’ betut ne anyonjini ichek abire, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah6:16 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Otononie eng’ ortinwek ak ogeer, ak oteeb ortinwek che bo keny, ole mi oret ne mie, ak obendate noto, si osich kamuung’et eng’ sobonwekwok: ago kile, Magibendote ortinwechoto." 
Jeremiah6:17 Ak kiande ribik koribok, che len, Oepchi it cheetab iriaget; ago kile, Magigase." 
Jeremiah6:18 Ogas anyun, okwek bororiosiek, ak onai, ee okwek tuiyet, kit ne mi kwenunywa." 
Jeremiah6:19 Ogas okwek ng’ony, ogeero, aipchini bichu yaitiet, logoekab kabwatutikwak, amu ma epchi it ng’alekyuk; ak kigoesio ng’atutikyuk." 
Jeremiah6:20 Tilei nee che nyamdut ngeibwa eng’ Sheba, ak tuguk che u mutwek che nyamdut che kiibune emet ne loo? Ma taachaksei kagochinoikwok che bo beelset, amachame tiseiywekwok." 
Jeremiah6:21 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, andoi taitab bichu kanagutik: ak konach kwanisiek koboto werik; ak kolus chitab kokwet koboto choruennyi." 
Jeremiah6:22 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, bunu bik emet ne mi murot ne bo katam; king’eeti bororiet ne o ne bunu komoswek che looen che bo ng’ony." 
Jeremiah6:23 Tinyei kwanget ak ng’otit; koromen, ama tinyei rirenet; morori cheenywa ko u nyanjet, ak lanyei mbartanyisiek; chobot age tugul ko u chito ne wendi luget, kobokyinin, ee cheptab Sion." 
Jeremiah6:24 Kigegas kalosunenywa; kanyalulso eunekyok: kanamech bichiindo, ak ng’woninwek, che u che bo kwondo ne machei kosigis." 
Jeremiah6:25 Amemande iwe mbar, anan iwendote oret; amu mi rotwetab chok ne bo bunyot, ak kamuiset eng’ komosta age tugul." 
Jeremiah6:26 Ee cheptab bikyuk, igermenege kuniok, ak iburburege orek: itee, ko u ye kitechin werit ne kigii inegei, kateet ne ng’wan mising’; amu cheech ng’emindet." 
Jeremiah6:27 Koayain iegu ole kitobendoe ak irimet eng’ kwenutab bikyuk; si kobiit inai ak itiem orenywa. 
Jeremiah6:28 Ngelelik ichek tugul che yaachen, che bendi komosi ak komosi kochaamsoti; icheget ko sugunwet ak karnet: yaei tugul ng’emisiet." 
Jeremiah6:29 Kuutei kobanda mising’; laldos ngosielaisiek: itililisiei buch; amu magiisto kiptengeginik. 
Jeremiah6:30 Kuure bik ichek michikyigek che kigenendoe feda, amu kigoesio Jehovah ichek." 
Jeremiah7:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah kolenji," 
Jeremiah7:2 Tonone kurgetab gotab Jehovah, ak imwaite eng’ yoto ng’olyondoni, ile, Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek tugul che o bo Juda, che omandoe ormarichochu, obendi olosu Jehovah." 
Jeremiah7:3 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Olitit ortinwekwok ak boisionikwok, si agonok omeny yuto." 
Jeremiah7:4 Amomang’u ng’alekab lembech ole, Hekalutab Jehovah, hekalutab Jehovah, hekalutab Jehovah chuto." 
Jeremiah7:5 Amu ngot olitit komie ortinwekwok ak boisionikwok; ak ngot oruoksechi komie chi ak chitab kokwennyi; 
Jeremiah7:6 ngot ko mosastoe toondet, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak mosoget, ak amotumde korotik che matinyei tengek eng’ olito, anan osubote chjeptalelisiek che ter ogochinege nyalilda:" 
Jeremiah7:7 agonok anyun omeny olito, emet ne kiagochi kwanisiekwok, koboch keny agoi koigeny." 
Jeremiah7:8 Ogeero, omang’u ng’alekab lembech, che maimuchi kogon kelunet." 
Jeremiah7:9 Tos ochorsei, orumisiei, ak oyae ibetab ge, ak oyostosi eng’ lembech, ak obeeljini nyamdutik Baal, ak osuboti cheptalelisiek che ter che mongen," 
Jeremiah7:10 yeityo obwa otonone tainnyu eng’ goi, ne kimwaitoe kainennyu, ak ole, Kagesoruech; si kobiit oyai tuguchuto tugul kiwechei?" 
Jeremiah7:11 Tos kaek goi kemwaitoe kainennyu kebenetab rebik eng’ taing’wong’? Ogeero ane, anendet ne kaageer, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah7:12 Ago oba nguno oldanyu ne kimi Silo, ole kiande kainennyu eng’ tai, ak ogeer kit ne kiayachi amu tengekwogikab bikyuk Israel." 
Jeremiah7:13 Ara anyun, amu kioyai boisionichuto tugul, mwaei Jehovah, ak kiang’alalwok, ang’eete karon mising’ ak ang’alali, ago ma ogas; ak kiaguurok, ago ma owolu:" 
Jeremiah7:14 ayachini anyun goyoto, noto kimwaitoe kainennyu, ne omang’u, koboto komosta ne kiagonok ak kwanisiekwok, ko u ye kiayachi Silo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Ak atimdak eng’ tainnyu, ko u ye kiatimde tupchosiekwok tugul, iyotet komugul ne bo Epraim." 
Jeremiah7:16 Amat isa anyun agobo bichu, anan irirji anan isachi, anan isaa: amu magasun." 
Jeremiah7:17 Tos megeere tuguk che yaei eng’ nganasokab Juda ak eng’ ortinwekab Jerusalem? 
Jeremiah7:18 Iyumi lagok kwenik, ak ilali mat kwanisiek, ak kokwonykwonyi makatinik kwonyik, si kobeelji laitoriatab kipsengwet, ne kwondo, ak korong’ji kagochinoik che kieei, cheptalelisiek, si kobiit kotacha anerech." 
Jeremiah7:19 Tos tacha bichoto anerech? Mwaei Jehovah. Tos matachegei ichegei, si kogochigei kalilanet eng’ togochikwak?" 
Jeremiah7:20 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, kirong’jin olito neregekyuk ak neregekyuk che ng’wonen, kirong’jin bik ak tuga, ak ketikab timin, ak eng’ logoekab mbar; ak laldos, ama kimisi." 
Jeremiah7:21 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Otesyi kagochinoikwok che kibeelei tiseiywek, ak oam banyek." 
Jeremiah7:22 Amu kima ang’alalji kwanisiekwok anan ang’at ichek eng’ betut ne kiamutu komong’une emetab Misri, agobo kagochinoik che kibeelei ak tiseiywek." 
Jeremiah7:23 Ago kiang’at ichek agobo ng’olyondoni, alenji, Ogas kutinnyu, si aek Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak oegu bikyuk: ak obendate oret tugul ne ang’atok, si kobiit komieit eng’ okwek." 
Jeremiah7:24 Ago ma kas, ama eb it, ago kibendate kiruogutikwak ak uuindab mugulelwekwak che yaachen, ak kituitui koba let, ma ba tai." 
Jeremiah7:25 Koboch betut ne kimong’ kwanisiekwok eng’ emetab Misri agoi rani, ko kiayokwok otwogikyuk tugul che maotik ang’eete kotugul karon ak ayogu ichek:" 
Jeremiah7:26 ago ma kasa, ama eb it, ago kiiuuiit kaatinywa: kiyai ne ya kosiir kwanisiekwak." 
Jeremiah7:27 Ak mwachi ichek ng’alechuto tugul; ago magasin: iguure ichek kogeny, ago mawolun." 
Jeremiah7:28 Ak ilenji ichek, Nito bororiet ne ma epchi it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ama taach kotigonet: kigobet imanda, ak kigeisto eng’ kutuswekwak." 
Jeremiah7:29 Icheru sumeeguk anyun, ak iwirte, ak irirate eng’ tulonok che churiotin; amu kigoesio Jehovah ak kometo ibinda ne bo neregekyik." 
Jeremiah7:30 Amu kigoyai lagokab Juda kit ne ya eng’ tainnyu, mwaei Jehovah: kigonde tugukwak che kiwechei got ne kimwaitoe kainennyu, komuruon." 
Jeremiah7:31 Ak kigoteech komoswek che tororen che bo Topet, ne mi atebwetab weritab Hinom, si kobeel werikwak ak tibikwak eng’ mat; ne kima ang’at, ne ma kuura met." 
Jeremiah7:32 Keero, bwanei anyun betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che ma keguure yoto Topet, anan keguure weritab Hinom, ago kiguure Atebwetab Barisiet; amu tun tubisiei ichek eng’ Topet, amu ma komi ole ketupchin." 
Jeremiah7:33 Ak koek muswekab bichu amitwogikab taritik che bo barak, ak che bo tiong’ikab ng’ony; ama biitu chi ne iyestoi." 
Jeremiah7:34 Agochini anyun kosis tugetab boiboiyet ak ne bo kagasetab ge, ne bo sandet ak ne bo mureret, eng’ nganasokab Juda, ak ortinwekab Jerusalem, amu egu emet karatia." 
Jeremiah8:1 Mwaei anyun Jehovah kole, Tun ibu ichek eng’ betunoto kowekab laitorinikab Juda, ak che bo bounikyik, ak che bo tisiik, ak che bo maotik, ak che bo che menyei Jerusalem, komong’une kererisiekwak:" 
Jeremiah8:2 ak koma eng’ asista, ak eng’ arawet, ak eng’ taitab tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet, che kiga kocham, ak kiga koot, ak che kiga kosubot, che kiga kocheng’at, ak che kiga kolos: magiyumi, anan ketub; egu keturek eng’ emet." 
Jeremiah8:3 Ak kolewen meet kosiir sobet bik tugul che ng’etu, che ng’etune goito ya, che ng’etu eng’ komoswek tugul che kiaonji, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Jeremiah8:4 Imwachini kogeny ilenjini, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Tos ibutos bik ama ng’eetos kogeny? Tos wa chi ama weeksei?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Amu nee anyun si kochuchuigei bichu bo Jerusalem eng’ kachuchuget ne bo agoi? Namei mising’ ng’alset, esioi koweek." 
Jeremiah8:6 Kiaeb it agas, ago ma ng’alal ichek che bo iman: mami chi ne sigu eng’ yaitiennyi, kole, Koyai nee? Isubi chi tugul orennyi, ko u mbartanyit ye labati kochutei luget." 
Jeremiah8:7 Ee, ingen kong’onyot eng’ soet betusiekyik; ak ribei cheptuget ak kibiswet ak cheptalamiat betusiekwak che bwanune; ago maingen bikyuk ng’atutietab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah8:8 Omuktoi ano anyun omwa ole, Ki ng’omen, ak olen, kitinye ng’atutietab Jehovah? Ago, ogeero, kigoyai ng’alset kalamitab kaberberisiet ne bo sirik." 
Jeremiah8:9 Ililandos bik che ng’omen, arogendos ak kenam: ogeero, kigoesio ng’olyotab Jehovah; ara anyun tinyei ng’omnatet ne u nee?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Agochini anyun bik alak osotikwak, ak agochi mbarenikwak bik che namei kobunji: amu koboch ne ming’in agoi ne o, kotinyei age tugul kasetab miat, ak yaei age tugul kaberberisiet koboch maotiot agoi tisiindet." 
Jeremiah8:11 Ak kigonya mookab cheptab bikyuk kobir barak, kolenjin, Kalyet, kalyet; ye mami kalyet." 
Jeremiah8:12 Tos kiililanso ye kingoyai tuguk che kiwechei? Achicha, ma ililanso agot kitigin, ama walogis togochikwak: ibutos anyun koboto icheget chek ibutos: tun kiwirtoi ichek eng’ betut ne kibirei, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah8:13 Agesu ichek, mwaei Jehovah: mang’etu sabibuk eng’ ketik, ama ng’etu logoek eng’ mogoonik ak koresyo sogek; ak kobetyo eng’ ichek tuguk che kigagochi." 
Jeremiah8:14 Amu nee si ketebi ak kesistosi? Oyumge, ak ongebe nganasok che ribotin, ak kesisye eng’ oloto: amu kagonech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo kesisye, ak kogonech beekab kipsegetetiet kee, amu kigeyachi Jehovah tengekto." 
Jeremiah8:15 Kigigen kalyet, ago ma nyo kiy ne mie; kigigen betutab kasoobet, ak keero, kibiit arogenet!" 
Jeremiah8:16 Kigasei eng’ Dan waagatab serunekab mbartanyisiekyik: botani emet komugul amu cheetab kateetab chechik che kimen; amu kagobwa, ak kagoam emet koboto tuguk tugul che kami; nganaset koboto che menyei orit." 
Jeremiah8:17 Ogeer anyun-o, ayogu ndarok, erenok kobwa kwenung’wong’, che magigoigoi; ak kosusak, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah8:18 Kata mie agaigaige si magase arogenet, tanui muguleldanyu." 
Jeremiah8:19 Ogaso, kutitab rirekab cheptab bikyuk eng’ emet ne loo mising’; tos mami Jehovah Sion? Tos mami Laitoriatab nganasanato oloto? Amu nee anyun si kotacha kot anerech eng’ kanamonikwak che kiwaei, ak tuguk che ter che bo buch?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Kagosiirto kesisiet, kagogesgei kemeut, ago tomo kesoruech." 
Jeremiah8:21 Kigiguotena amu kaguotenetab cheptab bikyuk: a tuui; kaakwong’ mising’. 
Jeremiah8:22 Tos mami mwanik che kinyaise Gilead? Tos mami chepkerichot oloto? Amu nee anyun si ma sob cheptab bikyuk? 
Jeremiah9:1 Kata mie nda ka beek kityo metinnyu, kondametutab beekab kong’ konyekyuk, si kobiit arir bet ak kemoi agobo che kigibar che bo cheptab bikyuk!" 
Jeremiah9:2 Kata mie nda katinye eng’ ong’atet ole menyei bik che rutoi; si kobiit abagakta bikyuk, ak awe! Amu icheget tugul koyaei ibetab ge, tuiyetab bik che iberberisiei." 
Jeremiah9:3 Ak riichei ng’elyebwekwak ko u ye riichei kwangokwak, agobo lembechek; ak kagogimegitu eng’ emet, ago ma eng’ imanit: amu kong’eetye yaitiet koba yaitiet, amaingena, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah9:4 Ingoribegei anyun chi tugul chitab kokwennyi, amat imang’u tupchet age tugul: amu tilei bich let tupchet age tugul, ak kochaamsoti chito age tugul ne bo kokwet." 
Jeremiah9:5 Ak koberber age tugul, kokwennyi, ama mwaei imanit: kigonet ng’elyebwekwak komwa lembechek; birtogei koyai yaitiet." 
Jeremiah9:6 Mi meng’oteng’ung’ kwenutab kaberberisiet; esioi konaa amu kaberberisiet, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah9:7 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Ogeero, abeele ichek kochootyo, ak atiem; nee kit age ne amuchi ayai, agobo cheptab bikyuk?" 
Jeremiah9:8 Kipchabet ne barisiei ng’elyebwekwak; mwaei kaberberisiet: ng’alaljin chi chitab kokwennyi eng’ kalyet, ago sapchin eng’ muguleldanyi." 
Jeremiah9:9 Tos manyone abire ichek agobo tuguchu? Mwaei Jehovah: tos mayaaktachinige mugetut eng’ bororiet ne u ni? 
Jeremiah9:10 Amu arire ak atei agobo tulonok, ak amosiseni agobo ole agete tuguk eng’ ong’atet, amu kagolalyo, kot ko ma kobunei chi; ama komuchi kogas bik kautetab tuga; kogomwei taritikab barak ak tiong’ik." 
Jeremiah9:11 Ak ayai Jerusalem koek karurugutik, ole menyei lelwek; ak ayai nganasokab Juda koek karatia, ole mamenyei chi." 
Jeremiah9:12 Ng’o chito ne ng’om ne imuchi koguiyo nito? Ak ng’o inendet ne king’alalji kutitab Jehovah, si kobiit komwaita? Amu nee anyun si kong’emak emet ak kolal ko u ong’atet, kot ko ma kobunei chi?" 
Jeremiah9:13 Ak mwaei Jehovah kole, Amu kigometo ng’atutiennyu ne kiande tainywa, ama kas it kutinnyu, ama bendate choto;" 
Jeremiah9:14 ago kibendate uuindab mugulelwekwak, ak kosub Baalik, che kiineti kwanisiekwak;" 
Jeremiah9:15 mwaei anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ogeero, abae bichuto ng’wonet, ak anage ichek beek che bo kipsegetetiet koee." 
Jeremiah9:16 Ak ayestochi ichek bororiosiek, che kima nai ichek anan kwanisiekwak: ak ayokte rotwetab chok kosub ichek, kot agesu." 
Jeremiah9:17 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Obwat, ak oguur kwonyik che rirtos, kobwa; ak oguur kwonyik che ng’omen, kobwa:" 
Jeremiah9:18 ak ingochok, ak koteeiyo agobo achek, si kobiit koba beekyok bo kong’, ak korong’gei beek eng’ konyekyok." 
Jeremiah9:19 Amu kigasei tugetab kateeiyet kobunu Sion, kole, Kageng’emech ne tia! Kagetoptobense mising’ amu kagebagakte emet, amu kagobut ichek meng’otosiekyok." 
Jeremiah9:20 Ago ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek, ee kwonyichu, ak ingotaach itikwok ng’olyotab kutinnyi, ak onet tibikwok rirek, ak konet chi tugul chitab kokwennyi kateeiyet." 
Jeremiah9:21 Amu kagonyo meet tirisiokyok, kagochut gorikyok che bo laitorinik; si koges lagok eng’ sang’, ak koges neranik eng’ ortinwek." 
Jeremiah9:22 Ng’alal, ile, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ibutos muswek ko u ng’atatekab tuga eng’ kewanin, ak koigei turonik che yamei eutab kesindet, ama biitu chi ne iyumi." 
Jeremiah9:23 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Amat kolosgei chito ne ng’om eng’ ng’omnatennyi, anan kolosgei chito ne kim amu kimnatennyi, amat kolosgei magoriot eng’ magornatosiekyik:" 
Jeremiah9:24 ago ingolosgei eng’ ng’olyondoni inendet ne ilosugei, kole, ingena ak konaa, kole, a Jehovah ne boisie chamnyet ne tala, kiruoget, ak imanda eng’ ng’ony: amu aboiboitune tuguchuto, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah9:25 Ogeero, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, ye tun abire tugul che kigimuratan eng’ kamuratanenywa ne ma kamuratanet;" 
Jeremiah9:26 Misri, Juda, Edom, ak lagokab Amon, koboto Moab, ak tugul che biori metowekwak, che menyei ong’atet: amu ma imuratanotin bororiosiek tugul, ama imuratanotin mugulelwekab got tugul ne bo Israel." 
Jeremiah10:1 Ogas ng’olyot ne mwawok Jehovah, ee gotab Israel:" 
Jeremiah10:2 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Amat onetge ortinwekab bororiosiek, amoarogense agobo kaborunoikab kipsengwet; amu arogendos bororiosiek, agobo choto." 
Jeremiah10:3 Amu tangoita bitonwekab bik: amu ebei age ketit eng’ osnet, boisietab eunekab musogindet, ne boisie aiywet." 
Jeremiah10:4 Lelesonjine feda ak tahabu; igiige kipchumarisiek eng’ kiriswet, si matwagei." 
Jeremiah10:5 U ichek tiret ne kigiwechwech keyaei, ago mang’alaldos: kanyol keibot, amu maimuchi kobendat. Amoiywei ichek; amu maimuchi koyai kiy ne ya, amaimuchi koyai kiy ne mie." 
Jeremiah10:6 Mami ne ogerge, ee Jehovah; i o, ak ko o kaineng’ung’ eng’ kamuktaet." 
Jeremiah10:7 Ng’o ne maiywein, ee Laitoriatab bororiosiek? Amu nyoljinin nito: amu mami ne u inye eng’ bik tugul che ng’omen che bo bororiosiek, ak eng’ bounatosiekwak tugul." 
Jeremiah10:8 Ago u ichek tugul tiong’ik, ak ko abusotin: konetisiet ne kineti kanamonik ko u ye kineti ketik kityo." 
Jeremiah10:9 Mitei feda che kigitany kolebelitu che kigiibune Tarsis, ak tahabu che bunu Upas, boisietab musogindet ak bo kitang’indetab tahabu; tuuen ngoroikwak ne nyalil, ak ko arusen ne birir; boisietab bik che ng’omen choto tugul." 
Jeremiah10:10 Ago Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet ne bo iman; inendet ko Kamuktaindet ne sobei, ak ko laitoriat ne bo koigeny: botani ng’ony amu neregekyik: amaimuchi komuita bororiosiek eng’ neregekyik." 
Jeremiah10:11 Mwachi anyun ichek ko u ni ilenji, Betos eng’ ng’ony ak eng’ kureretab kipsengwetisiek cheptalelisiek che kima koyaei kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony." 
Jeremiah10:12 Kiyai ng’ony eng’ kamuktaennyi, kiigimit ng’onyuni eng’ ng’omnatennyi, ak kiito kipsengwetisiek eng’ naennyi." 
Jeremiah10:13 Ye twek, kobiit wasetab ge ne bo beek eng’ kipsengwetisiek, ak kogochi kibungweret kotogosta eng’ tabanwekab ng’ony; yachin ropta kalyelosiek, imoong’u usonet eng’ ole kigigonore." 
Jeremiah10:14 Kergeitu chito age tugul ak tiondo ama tinyei naet; ililani kitang’indet age tugul ne bo tahabu eng’ kanamwennyi ne kigiwai: amu lembeita kanamwennyi ne kigitany, ama tinyei kabuset." 
Jeremiah10:15 Buch choto, boisietab ng’alset: betos eng’ betut ne ityin birenywa." 
Jeremiah10:16 Ma u chuto kebebertab Jakobo; amu bo tai inendet eng’ tuguk tugul; ak Israel ko bororietab borotennyi: kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek. 
Jeremiah10:17 Iyum eng’ emet tuguguk che bo mung’aret, ee inye ne imenye irimet." 
Jeremiah10:18 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, awirtoi bikab emoni betuni, ak anyalil ichek, si kobiit kogas." 
Jeremiah10:19 Bwa eng’ ane, amu ng’wanindanyu! Ng’wan kaguotenennyu: ago kiamwa ale, Arogenennyu iman nito, ak kanyol amuita." 
Jeremiah10:20 Kigeng’em emainnyu, ak kigeng’eti boroonikyuk tugul: kigoba lagokyuk kometa, ama komi: ma komi chi ne teekwa emainnyu kogeny, ak konde angokyuk." 
Jeremiah10:21 Amu kigoigei mestowek tiong’ik, amata koteepse Jehovah: mata konyor anyun kaberuret, ak kagiyesta kechirekwak tugul." 
Jeremiah10:22 Ogeero, kigasei ng’alek kobwanei, ak kirgirenet ne o komong’une emetab murot ne bo katam, si kobiit koyai nganasokab Juda koek karatia, ole menyei lelwek." 
Jeremiah10:23 Ee Jehovah, angen ale, ma bo chito ortinwekyik; amaindochin chito ne wendoti, kabwatutikyik." 
Jeremiah10:24 Ee Jehovah, itigona, ago eng’ kiruoget; ma eng’ neregeguk, si meyaa aek buch." 
Jeremiah10:25 Rong’ji neregeguk che ng’wonen bororiosiek che maingenin, ak ortinwek che maguurei kaineng’ung’; amu kigoam Jakobo, ee, kigoam inendet ak koges, ak kigong’em meng’otenywa." 
Jeremiah11:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia kolenji," 
Jeremiah11:2 Ogas ng’alekab kayomisoni, ak ong’alalji bikab Juda, ak bik che menyei Jerusalem;" 
Jeremiah11:3 ak imwachi ichek ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Chubot chito ne magasei ng’alekab kayomisoni," 
Jeremiah11:4 ne kiang’at kwanisiekwok eng’ betut ne kiamutu ichek komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, komong’une matab karnet, alenji, Ogas it kutinnyu, ak oyai choto, ko u tugul che ang’atok: si oegu bikyuk anyun, ak aegu Kamuktaindeng’wong’;" 
Jeremiah11:5 si kobiit agimit kayosiet ne kiayosiechi kwanisiekwok, ale agochini ichek emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik, ko u rani. Awolu anyun, ale, Amen, ee Jehovah." 
Jeremiah11:6 Ak kilenja anyun Jehovah, Mwaite ng’alechuto tugul eng’ nganasokab Juda, ak eng’ ortinwekab Jerusalem, ilenji, Ogas ng’alekab arorutioni, ak oyai." 
Jeremiah11:7 Amu kiabaorianji kwanisiekwok eng’ kagiiletab ge, koboch betut ne kiamutu ichek komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, agoi ra, ang’eete karon ak abaorianjini, alenjini, Ogas it kutinnyu." 
Jeremiah11:8 Ago ma kas it, ama eb it, ago kiwendot age tugul eng’ uuindab muguleldanyi ne ya: aipchini anyun ichek ng’alek tugul che bo kayomisoni, ne kigang’at ichek koyai, ago ma yai." 
Jeremiah11:9 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Mitei chaamset kwenutab bikab Juda, ak eng’ bik che menyei Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah11:10 Kigoweekyigei tengekwogikab kwanisiekwak, che kiesio kogas ng’alekyuk; ak kiisub kanamonik koot: kigobut kayomisennyu gotab Israel ak gotab Juda ne kigayai koboto kwanisiekwak." 
Jeremiah11:11 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, aipchini ichek yaitiet, ne maimuchi kochilile; ak korirja, ago magasyini ichek." 
Jeremiah11:12 Yeityo koba nganasokab Juda ak bik che menyei Jerusalem, koba korirji kanamonik che igochin nyamdutik; ago masoru ichek agot kitigin eng’ betutab nyalildanywa." 
Jeremiah11:13 Amu ko u ole te koitetab nganasoguk, ko u noto kanamoniguk, ee Juda; ak ko u ole te koitetab ortinwekab Jerusalem, ko u noto kiolumde kapkorosusiekab kit ne kililane, kapkorosusiek che kibeeljine Baal nyamdutik." 
Jeremiah11:14 Amesa anyun agobo bichu, amerir anan isa agobo ichek: amu magase ichek eng’ betut ne rirjina amu nyalildanywa." 
Jeremiah11:15 Yaei nee chamanennyu eng’ gonnyu, amu kigoyai tengekwogik koboto bik che chang’, ak kigoistoenengei banyek che itabanotin? Ye iyae tengek ibaibaitu." 
Jeremiah11:16 Kiguure Jehovah kaineng’ung’, Emdit ne tuon, ne kararan ak kotinyei logoek che miach: kiilaal mat eng’ yoto eng’ bolatetab wasetab ge ne o, ak kagoilyo temenikyik." 
Jeremiah11:17 Amu kagomwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne kiminin, yaitiet agobo inye, amu yaitietab gotab Israel ak ne bo gotab Juda, che kigoyachigei kotacha anerech amu kiigochi Baal nyamdutik." 
Jeremiah11:18 Ak kigona Jehovah naet agobo kioto, ak kianai: yeityo iborua boisionikwak." 
Jeremiah11:19 Ago kia u aruetab kechir ne tala, ne kikweriei kwo ole kieng’e; ak kima anai ale kigochob ichek chobutik che yaachen agobo ane, kole, Ongeng’em ketit koboto logoekyik, ak ongeiste inendet eng’ emetab che soptos, si mata kibwat kainennyi kogeny." 
Jeremiah11:20 Ago, kona ageer yaaktaeng’ung’ bo mugetut eng’ ichek, ee Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne iruochi eng’ imanda, ne itieme kabwatutik ak muguleldo; amu kaang’ang’un ng’olyondennyu." 
Jeremiah11:21 Mwaei anyun Jehovah agobo bikab Anatot, che cheng’ei sobondang’ung’, kole, Amat imaoten eng’ kainetab Jehovah, si magibarin achek;" 
Jeremiah11:22 mwaei anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Ogeero, abire ichek: begu neranik eng’ rotwetab chok; barei rubet werikwak ak tibikwak;" 
Jeremiah11:23 ama biitu che ng’etu eng’ ichek: amu aipchini yaitiet bikab Anatot, eng’ kenyit ne agikyini ichek abire." 
Jeremiah12:1 I bo iman, ee Jehovah, ye arirjinin: ago ta amache ang’alal koboten agobo ng’olyondonito: amu nee anyun si kiberur oretab kiptengeginik? Amu nee si komuunyi ichek tugul che yaei kaberberisiet?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Kiimin ichek, ee, kigonam ng’ony tigitik; eegitu, ee, itos logoek: i negite kutuswekwak, ago i loo eng’ mugulelwekwak." 
Jeremiah12:3 Ago ingena, ee Jehovah; igeera, itieme muguleldanyu kotokyingei: ichuutu kobwa ko u kechirek che kienyei, ak itabanji betutab eng’set." 
Jeremiah12:4 Iteei emet kot kotianit, ak korestos sogekab emet komugul? Amu sogornatetab bik che menyei oloto, kigiges anyun, kigobek tiong’ik, ak taritik; amu kile ichek, Mageerei inendet kagesunennyo." 
Jeremiah12:5 Ngot ko kioruai ak bik che bunei kelyek, ak kigogonin ing’et, imuktoi ano anyun obarge ak mbartanyisiek? Agot ngot itebye eng’ chametab ge eng’ emetab kalyet, iyae nee anyun ye kanyi beek Jordan mising’?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Kigoyaun kaberberisiet tupchosieguk, ak gotab kwandang’ung’; kigorirjin mising’: ameyan ichek, agot nda mwaun ng’alek che kororon." 
Jeremiah12:7 Kiabagakte gonnyu, kiamete borotennyu; kiagochi chamanetab sobondanyu kwo eunekab bunikyik." 
Jeremiah12:8 Kigoigei borotennyu eng’ ane, ng’etundo ne mitei osnet: kigowaagena; kiawech anyun amu noto." 
Jeremiah12:9 Tos kaigei borotennyu eng’ ane taritiet ne lege, ne barisiei? Tos kayiem inendet taritik che barisiei? Oba, oyum tiong’ik tugul che bo timin, ogetu kobwa koamis." 
Jeremiah12:10 Kigong’em mbarennyu ne bo sabibuk mestowek che chang’, kigotiegat kebebertanyu, kigoyai kebebertanyu ne kararan koek ong’atet ne mami kiy." 
Jeremiah12:11 Kigoyai koek karatia; rirjina, amu karatia; kigeyai emet komugul koek karatia, amu mami chi ne ibwati emonoto." 
Jeremiah12:12 Katogosta bik che luulsei koba tulonok tugul che churiotin eng’ ong’atet: amu barisiei rotwetab chok ne bo Jehovah koboch tabanda age ne bo emet, agoi tabanda age: mami chi ne tinyei kalyet." 
Jeremiah12:13 Kigol nganok, ago kiges katok; kibirtogei ama kelji kiy: ak olilandosi amu logoekwok, amu neregek che ng’wonen che bo Jehovah." 
Jeremiah12:14 Mwaei Jehovah ng’alechoto agobo bik tugul che yaach che bo kokwennyu, che twaei borotet ne kiagochi bikyuk Israel konam kobunji, ko u ni kole: Ogeero, atutu ichek eng’ emenywa, ak atutu gotab Juda komong’ eng’ kwenunywa." 
Jeremiah12:15 Ak ye kaatut ichek, aweechige ak arire ichek; ak amutu kogeny, konyo age tugul borotennyi, ak konyo age tugul emennyi." 
Jeremiah12:16 Ak ngot konetgei kogiiljigei oretab bikyuk, ak koyosio eng’ kainennyu kole, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah; ko u ye kiinet bikyuk koyosio eng’ Baal; koteech anyun ichek eng’ kwenutab bikyuk." 
Jeremiah12:17 Ago ngot ko macham kogas, atutu anyun bororionoto, atutu ak ang’em, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah13:1 Kimwawa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ui, ak ialjige birenetab katanit, ak iratege, amat inde beek." 
Jeremiah13:2 Kiaal anyun birenet ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak aratege." 
Jeremiah13:3 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah ne bo aeng’, kolenja," 
Jeremiah13:4 Nam birenet ne kaial ne keratege, ak ing’eet iwe Euprate, ak iuny eng’ yoto eng’ keringet ne mi ruandet." 
Jeremiah13:5 Kiawe anyun, ak auny eng’ ole negite Euprate, ko u ye king’ata Jehovah." 
Jeremiah13:6 Ak kingobata betusiek che chang’, komwawa Jehovah kolenja, Ng’eet, ui Euprate, ak inemu birenet eng’ yoto, ne kigang’atin iuny eng’ yoto." 
Jeremiah13:7 Kiawe anyun Euprate, ak abal, ak anemu birenet eng’ ole kigaung’e: ak ogeero, kiga kong’emak birenoto, kima kota kotilei kiy." 
Jeremiah13:8 Yeityo konyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kole," 
Jeremiah13:9 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ang’eme menotetab Juda ko u ni, koboto menotet ne o ne bo Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah13:10 Igeitu birenoni ma kotilei kiy, bichu yaachen, che esioi kogas ng’alekyuk, che bendote uuindab mugulelwekwak, ak kosuboti kanamonik che ter, si koot ichek, ak kolos." 
Jeremiah13:11 Amu ko u ye namegei birenet ak suetab chi, ko u noto anyun kaagochi got komugul ne bo Israel ak got komugul ne bo Juda kenamge, mwaei Jehovah, si kobiit koek eng’ ane bororiet, ak kainet, ak kalosunet, ak teegisto: ago ma cham kogas." 
Jeremiah13:12 Mwachi anyun ichek ng’olyondoni, ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel ko u ni kole, Kinyiiti divaik teret age tugul. Ak komwaun kole, Tos magingen kele kinyiiti divaik teret age tugul?" 
Jeremiah13:13 Ilenji anyun ichek, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, anyiiti bogitet bik tugul che menyei emoni, laitorinik che tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi, ak tisiik, ak maotik, ak bik tugul che menyei Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah13:14 Ak atue chito age age, kwanisiek ak werik, mwaei Jehovah: marire, anan abagakte, anan korira mo, kot ko magesu ichek." 
Jeremiah13:15 Ogas anyun, oeb it; amomenie: amu kagomwa Jehovah." 
Jeremiah13:16 Ogonyit Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, kotom koib mesundeito konyo, kotom kinach kelyekwok eng’ tulonokab mesundieto; ak ye ocheng’e lapkeiyet, kowal koek uruetab meet, ak koyai koek mesundeito ne o." 
Jeremiah13:17 Ago ngot ko mogas ng’olyondonito, korirei sobondanyu eng’ ung’ot agobo menoteng’wong’; ak arir mising’, kot koba beekab kong’, amu kageluul kechirekab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah13:18 Mwachi laitoriat ak kametab laitoriat, ilenji, Oming’inge, otebe ng’ony: kigobutyo chepkuloikwok, choto ko narietab torornateng’wong’." 
Jeremiah13:19 Kigeger nganasok che bo Murot ne bo Tai, ama mi chi ne yatei: kigimut Juda tugul koek luulenik; kigimut tugul koek luulenik." 
Jeremiah13:20 Oyot met, ak ogeer ichek che bunu murot ne bo katam: mi ano kechirek che kigigonin, kechireguk che kororon?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Imwae nee ye tun inde inendet choronoguk koboun, amu inye ne kiinet koboun? Tos manamin ng’woninwek, ko u kwondo ne machei kosigis?" 
Jeremiah13:22 Ak ngot imwa eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ile, Amu nee anyun si kobwanja tuguchuto? Kageng’any ngoroiguk amu oindab tengektang’ung’, ak kagonyor kwariniguk ng’wanindo." 
Jeremiah13:23 Tos imuchi kowal Etiopindet iririondennyi, anan kowal cheblanget simormorindanyi? Ngo u noto, omuchi ak okwek oyai ne mie, che kionaite oyae yaitiet." 
Jeremiah13:24 Ayestoi anyun ichek, ko u mobek che ibei usonetab ong’atet." 
Jeremiah13:25 Kebebertang’ung’ nito, kebeberta ne bunwa ne kigigerun, mwaei Jehovah; amu kiiutiena, ak imang’u lembechek." 
Jeremiah13:26 Ang’anye anyun agane ngoroiguk kot koit metit, ak kotook tewernateng’ung’." 
Jeremiah13:27 Kiageer tuguguk che kiwechei, ibetab ge neng’ung’, ak kateeng’ung’ ne bo maget, tengektab kugoinateng’ung’, eng’ tulonok che mi kewanin. Bwa eng’ inye, ee Jerusalem! Memache itililitu; yaoksei nito kot kotianit?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyotab Jehovah agobo iljet. 
Jeremiah14:2 Rirei Juda, ak nyaluldos ormarichokyik, tebyei ng’ony bikyik koteitos; ak kotogosta rirekab Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah14:3 Ak koyokto bikwak che toogunotin bik che mengechen koba ole mi beek: bendi agoi keringonik, ama nyoru beek: weeksei buch ak terenikwak: ililandos ak kotoptobenso, ak kotuch metowekwak." 
Jeremiah14:4 Amu emet ne kigobetak, amu kima kota komi ropta emet, ililandos che ibatisiei, tuchei metowekwak." 
Jeremiah14:5 Ee, yiei kenyelet agine eng’ kewanin, ak kobagakta aruennyi, amu mami suswek." 
Jeremiah14:6 Ak kotononso agichek sigirokab timin eng’ tulonok che churiotin, isiendos ko u lelwek; imenitu konyekwak, amu ma komi kiy ne tuon." 
Jeremiah14:7 Agot ngo baorianjinech tengekwogikyok, ee Jehovah, boisie amu kaineng’ung’: amu chang’ kachuchugosiekyok bo ge; kigeyaun tengekto." 
Jeremiah14:8 Ee inye kamang’unetab Israel, yetindennyi eng’ betutab nyalilda, amu nee si iige toondet eng’ emet, ak iige kiprutoiyot ne mastoi koruei kemout agenge?" 
Jeremiah14:9 Amu nee si iige chi ne kakwong’, iige chito ne kim, ne maimuch kosorunis? Ago inye, ee Jehovah, imi kwenunnyo, ak kimwaitaenech kaineng’ung’; amemetech." 
Jeremiah14:10 Mwachin Jehovah bichu ko u ni kole, Kicham ko u noto koombenso; tom koisto kelyekwak: mataachei anyun Jehovah ichek amu noto; ibwati inendet tengektanywa, ak koityin biret amu tengekwogikwak." 
Jeremiah14:11 Ak kimwawa Jehovah kolenja, Amat isa isomji bichu mieindo." 
Jeremiah14:12 Ye irugutgei ichek, ko magase rirekwak; ak ye igoito kagochinet ne kibeelei, koboto kagochinetab busiek, ko mataache: ago agesu ichek eng’ rotwetab chok, ak rubet, ak koroito." 
Jeremiah14:13 Kiamwa anyun ale, Bwa, Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Keero, mwachin maotik ichek, kolenji, Maityinok rotwetab chok, amonyoru rubet; ago agonok kalyet ne bo iman eng’ olito." 
Jeremiah14:14 Kilenja anyun Jehovah, Maoteni maotik lembechek eng’ kainennyu: ma ayokte ichek, ama ang’at ichek, anan ang’alalji: maotenwok ng’ang’utiet ne bo lembech, koboto ng’orset, ak kit ne bo buch, ak kaberberisietab mugulelwekwak." 
Jeremiah14:15 Mwaei Jehovah anyun ko u ni agobo maotik che maoteni eng’ kainennyu, che ma ayokte, ago mwaei ichek kole, Mabiitu rotwetab chok anan rubet eng’ emoni, kole, Kigesu maotichoto eng’ rotwetab chok ak rubet." 
Jeremiah14:16 Ak kewirji ortinwek che bo Jerusalem bik che kimaotenjin, amu rubet ak rotwetab chok; ama biitu chi ne tubei ichek, icheget ak osotikwak, ak werikwak ak tibikwak: amu arong’jini icheget yaitienywa." 
Jeremiah14:17 Ak imwachi ichek ng’olyondoni ilenji, Ingoba beekyuk bo kong’ kemoi ak bet, ama sisei; amu kail cheptab bikyuk, ne bergeiyat, eng’ ilet ne o, kaguotenet ne ng’wan mising’." 
Jeremiah14:18 Ngot ale awa mbar, ogeero, che kigebare rotwetab chok! Ak ngot ale awa nganaset, ogeero, mitei che nyaluldos amu rubet! Amu bendoti eng’ emet maotik ak tisiik ama tinyei naet." 
Jeremiah14:19 Tos kiiesie Juda iman? Tos kigowech sobondang’ung’ Sion? Amu nee si ibirech, ama mi kasoobet eng’ achek? Kigigen kalyet, ago ma nyo kiy ne mie; kigigen betutab kasoobet, ak keero, kibiit arogenet!" 
Jeremiah14:20 Ee Jehovah, king’anye tengektanyo, ak yaitietab kwanisiekyok: amu kigeyaun tengekto." 
Jeremiah14:21 Amat iwechech, amu kaineng’ung’; ametewer ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo torornateng’ung’: ibwat, amat ibut kayomiset ne kigaiyomiswech." 
Jeremiah14:22 Tos mi age tugul eng’ tuguk che bo buch, che bo bororiosiek, ne imuchi kogon ropta? Anan imuch kipsengwetisiek kogon ropta ne inesi? Tos ma inyendet Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo? Kigenin anyun; amu kiiayi tuguchuto tugul." 
Jeremiah15:1 Kolenja anyun Jehovah, Agot nda kiga tononso Musa ak Samuel eng’ tainnyu, ko matokyingei kabwatutikyuk bichu; timde eng’ tainnyu, koba." 
Jeremiah15:2 Ak ye tun teebenen kolenjin, Kibendi ano? Imwachi anyun ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Che bo meet, kobendi meet; ak che bo rotwetab chok, kobendi rotwetab chok, ak che bo rubet, kobendi rubet, ak che bo luulet, kobendi luulet." 
Jeremiah15:3 Ak ang’atyini ichek tuguk ang’wan, mwaei Jehovah: rotwetab chok ne barisiei, ak sesenik che isongiririsiei, ak taritikab barak ak tiong’ikab ng’ony, si koamis ak kong’emis." 
Jeremiah15:4 Ak agoite ichek kewirji komosi ak komosi eng’ bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony, amu kit ne kiyai Manase weritab Hesekia laitoriatab Juda eng’ Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah15:5 Amu ng’o ne tos rirenen, ee Jerusalem? Anan ng’o ne rirjinin? Anan ng’o ne mosu koteebenen agobo chametab ge?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Kiiesia, mwaei Jehovah, kiichuchuige: kiachuul anyun eunnyu atokyin, ak ang’emin; kaang’et eng’ muitaet." 
Jeremiah15:7 Ak kiarur ichek eng’ kit ne kirurse eng’ ormarichokab emet; kiagochi kobegune lagok, kiang’em bikyuk; tomo koweek eng’ ortinwekwak." 
Jeremiah15:8 Kigotesok mosogikwak eng’ ane kosiir ng’aniekab nyanjosiek: kiamutyi ichek luulindet betkwen kobar kametab murenik: kiagochi koche inendet tiritindo ak kamuisosiek. 
Jeremiah15:9 Nyaluli inendet ne kigosich lagok tisab; meei; kagororokto asistanyi kota ko bet; kigolilan ak kotoptoben: ak agoite che ng’etu eng’ ichek kobar rotwetab chok eng’ taitab bunikwak, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah15:10 Bwa eng’ ane, ee kamennyu, amu kiisicha aek chi ne bo boriet ak ne ibeligei ak ng’ony komugul! Tom abesende si anyor keljinet ne siirei, ak kotomo kobesendawa bik, si konyor keljinet ne siirei; ago chuba age tugul eng’ ichek." 
Jeremiah15:11 Kimwa Jehovah kole, Agimitin iman agobo kit ne mie; iman agochini bunyot kogaigain eng’ betutab yaitiet ak eng’ betutab usisiet." 
Jeremiah15:12 Tos imuchi chi koiri karnet, karnet ak sugunwet ne bunu murot ne bo katam?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Agoitoi tuguguk ak konoraiguk keluul ko ma eng’ alyet, amu tengekwogiguk tugul eng’ kiwotosieguk tugul." 
Jeremiah15:14 Ak agochi koba koboto buniguk emet ne mengen: amu kagolal mat eng’ neregekyuk, ne lalenen." 
Jeremiah15:15 Ee Jehovah, ingen inye: ibwata, ak irutocha, ak iyaaktawa mugetut eng’ usikyuk; ameistoena muitaeng’ung’: nai ile kianyoru chotisiet amu inye." 
Jeremiah15:16 Kibiit ng’aleguk, ak kiaam; ak kiek ng’aleguk eng’ ane boiboiyet ak kagasetab ge ne bo muguleldanyu: amu kimwaitoena kaineng’ung’, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek." 
Jeremiah15:17 Ma kitebi ak tuiyetab ichek che urerendos, anan abaibaitu: kiatebi anege amu eung’ung’; amu kiinyiita neregek." 
Jeremiah15:18 Amu nee si kobunji agoi ng’wanindanyu, ama inyaoksei moennyu ne magimuchi kinya? Tos iegu eng’ ane iman kererut ne iberberisiei, ko u beek che tendos?" 
Jeremiah15:19 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ngot iweege, amutun kogeny, si kobiit itonon eng’ tainnyu; ak ngot inemu kit ne mie komong’ eng’ kit ne ya, iigeitu kutinnyu: weekyiningei ichek, ago meweekyinigei ichek." 
Jeremiah15:20 Ak ayain eng’ bichu iegu irimet ne ng’otat ne bo sugunwet; ak obarge ak ichek ago maiterterin; amu ami koboten si asorun ak atiachin, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah15:21 Ak asorun eng’ eutab kiptengeginik, ak atiachin eng’ eutab che imuisei." 
Jeremiah16:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Jeremiah16:2 Metunisiei, amesiche werik anan tibik eng’ olito." 
Jeremiah16:3 Amu mwaei Jehovah agobo werik ak tibik che kisikyin olito, ak agobo kametisiekwak che sichei ichek, ak agobo kwanisiekwak che kisich ichek eng’ emoni ko u ni kole:" 
Jeremiah16:4 Begu ichek eng’ meet ne ng’wan; magirirjin, ama kitubei; igeitu ng’atatek eng’ ng’ony: ak kibare rotwetab chok, ak rubet; ak koek muswekwak amitwogikab taritikab barak ak tiong’ikab ng’ony." 
Jeremiah16:5 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Amewe got ne kiririe, amewe ite, anan irirji ichek: amu kiaiste kalyennyu eng’ bichu, mwaei Jehovah, noto ko chamnyennyu ne tala ak rirenennyu ne bo chamnyet." 
Jeremiah16:6 Bekyin emoni che eechen ak che mengechen: magitubei, ama iteetos bik agobo ichek, anan kotilgei, ama icheru metowekwak;" 
Jeremiah16:7 ama butuli bik makatinik agobo ichek amu rirek, si kogaigai ichek amu bik che kabek; ama igochin koee kikombetab kagaigaet agobo kwanisiekwak ak kametisiekwak." 
Jeremiah16:8 Amewe gotab igorta, otebi ak ichek, oamisie ak oee." 
Jeremiah16:9 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Ogeero, agochini kosis eng’ taing’wong’, ak eng’ betusiekwok, tugetab boiboiyet ak ne bo kagasetab ge, ne bo sandet ak ne bo mureret, eng’ olito." 
Jeremiah16:10 Ak ye tun iborji bichu ng’alechuto tugul, ak kolenjin, Amu nee si komwa Jehovah yaitioni o agobo achek? Anan nee yaitiennyo? Anan nee tengektanyo ne kigeyachi Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo?" 
Jeremiah16:11 Ilenji anyun ichek, Amu kigometa kwanisiekwok, mwaei Jehovah, ak kosubot kanamonik che ter, ak koot ak kolos, ak kometa, ama rib ng’atutikyuk;" 
Jeremiah16:12 ak kioyai yaitiet kosiir kwanisiekwok; amu, ogeero, wendoti age tugul eng’ okwek kosubi uuindab muguleldanyi ne ya, kot ko ma oepcha it:" 
Jeremiah16:13 atimdook anyun omande eng’ emoni obe emet ne tom onai, okweget anan kwanisiekwok; ak oot cheptalelisiek che ter eng’ oloto bet ak kemoi; amu marirenok." 
Jeremiah16:14 Noto anyun, ogeero, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, ne ma kemwaei kogeny kele, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne kiimut lagokab Israel komong’une emetab Misri;" 
Jeremiah16:15 ago, kilen, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne kiimut lagokab Israel eng’ emetab murot ne bo katam, ak eng’ emotinwek tugul che kiga koonji ichek: ak amutu ichek kogeny kobwa emenywa ne kiagochi kwanisiekwak." 
Jeremiah16:16 Ogeero, ayoktoi keguur ramik che chang’ che bo njirenik, mwaei Jehovah, si kobiit koram ichek; ak ye ibata ayokte keguur kiplogotinik che chang’, si kobiit kocheng’at ichek eng’ tulwet age tugul, ak eng’ tulwet age tugul ne ming’in, ak eng’ kebenonik." 
Jeremiah16:17 Amu ageere emotinwekwak tugul: ma ung’otin eng’ tainnyu, ama ung’at tengektanywa si mageer." 
Jeremiah16:18 Ak ayaaktochini korok yaitienywa ak tengektanywa konyil aeng’; amu kigong’wanit ichek emennyu eng’ muswekab tugukwak che samis, ak kigonyiit borotennyu tugukwak che kiwechei." 
Jeremiah16:19 Ee Jehovah, kimnatennyu, ak ko irimennyu, ak ole amwechini eng’ betutab nyalildanyu, bwanjinin bororiosiek kobunu tabanwek che bo ng’ony, ak komwa kole, Ma nam kiy kwanisiekyok kobate lembechek, tangoita ak tuguk che matinyei kelunet." 
Jeremiah16:20 Tos yachingei chito kanamonik, che ma cheptalelisiek?" 
Jeremiah16:21 Noto anyun, ogeero, agochini konai, agochini konai eunnyu ak kamugennyu, konyil nito agenge; ak konai ichek kole kainennyu ko Jehovah." 
Jeremiah17:1 Kigisire tengektab Juda kalamitab karnet koboto ng’atibindab koita ne uui: kigisirji mugulelwekwak ak eng’ kuinoikab kapkorosusiekwak; 
Jeremiah17:2 ko ta kobwati lagokwak kapkorosusiekwak ak Aserik che mi ole mi ketik che tuonen eng’ tulonok barak. 
Jeremiah17:3 Ee tulwennyu ne mi kewanin, agoitoi keluul tuguguk ak konoraiguk tugul, ak komosweguk che tororen, amu tengekto, eng’ kiwotosieguk tugul." 
Jeremiah17:4 Ak ibagaktoi aginye boroteng’ung’ ne kiagonin; ak agonin iot buniguk eng’ emet ne mengen: amu kiolaal mat eng’ neregekyuk, ne lalei koigeny." 
Jeremiah17:5 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Chubot chito ne imang’u chi, ak kotiiegei chi, inendet ne istoegei muguleldanyi Jehovah." 
Jeremiah17:6 Amu igeitu sondit eng’ surkwen, ama keerei ye biitu mieindo; ago menyei komoswek che yaamnyotin eng’ ong’atet, emetab munyuk ole mamenyei chi." 
Jeremiah17:7 Iberurot chito ne imang’u Jehovah, ak ko ne kamang’unennyi Jehovah." 
Jeremiah17:8 Amu igeitu inendet ketit ne kigiminji ole negite beek, ak kowaktoi tigitikyik eng’ ole negite ainet, kamaiyweisiei ye biitu kiptoret, ago tuonitu sogekyik; ama toptobeni eng’ kenyitab kemeut, ama metoi koi logoek." 
Jeremiah17:9 Kaberberindet muguleldo kosiir tuguk tugul, ak ko ya mising’: ng’o ne imuchi konai?" 
Jeremiah17:10 Ane Jehovah ne asiachi muguleldo, atieme kabwatutik, si agochi chi age tugul ko u ortinwekyik, ko u logoekab boisionikyik." 
Jeremiah17:11 Ko u taiywet ne iyumi arek che ma chechik, u noto ne nyoru magornatosiek, ama eng’ iman; betos kota kosobei inendet, ak koek inendet eng’ kagesunennyi, chito ne berber." 
Jeremiah17:12 Oldanyo ole tilil ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo torornatet, ne kiginde ole toror, koboch taunet." 
Jeremiah17:13 Ee Jehovah, inye ne i kamang’unetab Israel, ililandos ichek tugul che metoin; kisirei eng’ ng’ony ichek che istoenagei, amu kigometa Jehovah, kondametutab beek che soptos." 
Jeremiah17:14 Isooba, ee Jehovah, si asob: sorua, si anyor sorunet: amu i kalosunennyu." 
Jeremiah17:15 Keero, mwawa ichek kolenjina, Mi ano ng’olyotab Jehovah? Ingonyo nguno." 
Jeremiah17:16 Ma achakte ane kot abagakte asubin aek mestowot; ama amach betutab rirek; ingen inye: kimi taing’ung’ kit ne kimong’une kutinnyu. 
Jeremiah17:17 Amat imua: i ole amwechini eng’ betutab yaitiet. 
Jeremiah17:18 Ingolilanso che usa, ago megona alilan; ingoarogenso ichek, ago megona aarogen: ipchi ichek betutab yaitiet, ak ing’eme ichek ng’emisiet konyil aeng’." 
Jeremiah17:19 Kimwawa Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ui, itonone ormarichetab bik, ole mong’une laitorinikab Juda, ak komandoe, ak eng’ ormarichok tugul che bo Jerusalem;" 
Jeremiah17:20 ak ilenji ichek, Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek laitorinikab Juda, ak Juda komugul, ak bik tugul che menyei Jerusalem, che obendi orit obune ormarichochuto;" 
Jeremiah17:21 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Oripge, amoib laut age tugul eng’ betutab sabato, anan oibu kobun ormarichokab Jerusalem;" 
Jeremiah17:22 anan oib lautik eng’ gorikwok eng’ betutab sabato, amoyai boisio age tugul: ago otaban betutab sabato, ko u ye kiang’at kwanisiekwok;" 
Jeremiah17:23 ago ma kas, anan koeb it, ago kiiuuiit kaatwekwak, si magas, ak kotaach konetisiet." 
Jeremiah17:24 Ak ngot oepcha it eng’ kagiiletab ge, mwaei Jehovah, si moibu laut age tugul kobun ormarichokab nganasani eng’ betutab sabato, ago otaban betutab sabato, amoyai boisio age tugul eng’ betunoto;" 
Jeremiah17:25 bwanei anyun orit laitorinik ak bounik che tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi, kobunu ormarichokab nganasani, kolong’onu karisiek ak mbartanyisiek, icheget ak bounikwak, bikab Juda, ak bik che menyei Jerusalem: ak kemeny nganasani agoi." 
Jeremiah17:26 Ak kobwa kobunu nganasokab Juda, ak komoswek che kiyiem Jerusalem, ak che bunu emetab Benjamin, ak emet ne soi, ak che bunu tulonok, ak che bunu Murot ne bo Tai, koibu kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak tiseiywek, ak kagochinoikab busiek, ak tuguk che nyamdut, ak koibu korosekab kongoi, kobwa gotab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah17:27 Ago ngot ko mogasa it otaban betutab sabato, amoib laut age tugul ak obe orit obun ormarichokab Jerusalem eng’ betutab sabato; alaal anyun mat eng’ ormarichokyik, si kobeel gorikab laitoriat che bo Jerusalem, ama kimisi." 
Jeremiah18:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah, kolenji," 
Jeremiah18:2 Ng’eet, chortege agoi gotab cheptereniot, si agonin igas ng’alekyuk eng’ oloto." 
Jeremiah18:3 Achortege anyun gotab cheptereniot, ak ogeero, kiyaei boisiennyi eng’ cheptirok." 
Jeremiah18:4 Ak kingong’emak teret ne kiga kiyae menet, eng’ eutab cheptereniot, koyae kogeny menonoto teret age, ko u ye kigeerei cheptereniondonoto kole mie." 
Jeremiah18:5 Kinyonja anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Jeremiah18:6 Ee gotab Israel, tos mamuchi ayaiywok ko u ye kayai chepterenindonito? Mwaei Jehovah. Ogeero, ko u ye mi menet eutab cheptereniot, omi ak okwek eunnyu, ee gotab Israel." 
Jeremiah18:7 Eng’ betut ne amwae agobo boror age tugul, ak agobo bounatet age tugul, ale atut, ak abut ak ang’em;" 
Jeremiah18:8 ngot kosik eng’ yaitienywa bororionoto kaamwa, awale kabwatutukyuk eng’ yaitiet ne kitayachini ichek." 
Jeremiah18:9 Ak eng’ betut ne amwae agobo boror age tugul, ak agobo bounatet age tugul, ale ateech ak amin bororionoto;" 
Jeremiah18:10 ngot koyai yaitiet eng’ tainnyu, ama kas it kutinnyu, awale anyun kabwatutikyuk eng’ mieindo ne kigamwa ale atorete ichek." 
Jeremiah18:11 Ara anyun, ui ng’alalji bikab Juda, ak bik che menyei Jerusalem, ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, achobe yaitiet agobo okwek ak achobe kit ne aitook: ingoweeigei age tugul eng’ okwek, kometo orennyi ne ya, ak olitit ortinwekwok ak boisionikwok." 
Jeremiah18:12 Ago mwaei kole, Matilei kiy kamang’unet: amu kibendote magutikyok, ak koyai chi tugul eng’ achek ko u uuindab muguleldanyi ne ya."
