Jeremiah18:13 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole: Oteebate bororiosiek, olenji, ng’o ne kigogasei ng’alek che u chu; kiyai bergeiyatab Israel kit ne samis mising’." 
Jeremiah18:14 Tos betei teluchi ne bo Lebanon eng’ ruandetab kewanin? Anan tos tendos beek che kaitit che rootune ole loo? 
Jeremiah18:15 Amu kigoutiena bikyuk, kigobeelji nyamdutik tuguk che matilei kiy; ak kigonach ichek eng’ ortinwekwak, eng’ ortinwek che bo keny, si kobunot ortinwek che mi taban, eng’ oret ne ma kiyai;" 
Jeremiah18:16 si koyai emenywa koek kwong’et, ak koek ne kirenyei kotugul; kwong’e age tugul ne siirtoi eng’ yoto, ak kolelechi metinnyi." 
Jeremiah18:17 Aseeri ichek eng’ taitab bunyot ko u ye iseerisiei usonetab kong’asis; ageere bataikwak, mageere togochikwak, eng’ betutab nyalildanywa." 
Jeremiah18:18 Kimwa anyun kole, Obwa kechob kit ne kiitoi Jeremia; amu mabetei ng’atutiet eng’ tisiindet, ama betei kiruoget eng’ chito ne ng’om, ama betei ng’olyot eng’ maotiot. Obwa, kebire ng’elyepta, amat ongeepchi it agot ng’olyot agenge eng’ ng’alekyik." 
Jeremiah18:19 Kasa, ee Jehovah, ak iepchi it rirekyuk." 
Jeremiah18:20 Tos kiyaaktoi yaitiet eng’ kit ne mie? Amu kogobalji keringet sobondanyu. Ibwat ole kiatononde eng’ taing’ung’ ak ang’alal che miach agobo ichek, si kobiit aisto neregeguk che koromen eng’ ichek." 
Jeremiah18:21 Igoite anyun lagokwak, kobar rubet, ak igoite ichek kobar rotwetab chok; ak ingobetyi lagok osotikwak, ak koek mosogik; ak ingobar meet murenikwak, ak ingobar rotwetab chok neranikwak eng’ luget." 
Jeremiah18:22 Ingogasak rirek eng’ gorikwak, ye ichee ichek imutyine luget: amu kigobal keringet kole konamena, ak kouny mestonok kole konam kelyekyuk." 
Jeremiah18:23 Ago, ingen inye Jehovah, kiruogenywa ne iruochi kole kobara; menyochi kaat tengektanywa, amebukte chalwoktanywa eng’ taing’ung’: ago ingeriich eng’ taing’ung’; yachi ko u noto eng’ betutab neregeguk." 
Jeremiah19:1 Kimwa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ui ak ial keregutab cheptereniot, ak imut alak eng’ boisiekab bik, ak alak eng’ boisiekab tisiik;" 
Jeremiah19:2 ak obe agoi atebwetab weritab Hinom, ne mitei ye negite ole kibunei eng’ ormarichetab rokyonik, ak imwaite eng’ yoto ng’alek che ta amwaun:" 
Jeremiah19:3 ile, Ogas okwek ng’olyotab Jehovah, ee laitorinikab Juda, ak bik che omenye Jerusalem; mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ogeero, aipchini yaitiet olito, ne ngo kas chi age tugul, kotildilyo itikyik." 
Jeremiah19:4 Amu kigometa ichek, kigoyai yuto koek ole maginaei, ak kigobeelji eng’ yuto, nyamdutik, kanamonik che ter, che kima kongen, icheget ak kwanisiekwak ak laitorinikab Juda; ak kigonyiit olito korotikab che matinyei tengek;" 
Jeremiah19:5 ak kigoteekyi Baal komoswek che tororen, si kobeel werikwak, koek kagochinoik che kibeelei, kogochin Baal; kit ne kima ang’at, anan amwa, anan konyonja met:" 
Jeremiah19:6 keero, bwanei anyun betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che ma keguure olito Topet, anan keguure Atebwetab weritab Hinom, ago kiguure Atebwetab Barisiet." 
Jeremiah19:7 Ak ayai koek buch kiruogutikab Juda ak Jerusalem eng’ olito; ak agochini kebare rotwetab chok eng’ taitab bunikwak, ak eng’ eunekab icheget che cheng’ei sobonwekwak: ak agoite muswekwak koek amitwogikab taritik che bo barak, ak che bo tiong’ikab ng’ony." 
Jeremiah19:8 Ak ayai nganasani koek kwong’et ak ne kirenyei; kwong’ei age tugul ne siirtoi eng’ yoto ak koreny amu korotwek tugul che bo oloto. 
Jeremiah19:9 Ak agochi ichek koam banyekab werikwak ak tibikwak, ak koam age tugul eng’ ichek banyekab choruennyi, eng’ yiemetab kabokyinet ak eng’ bichiindo, ne inyalile bunikwak ichek, ak che cheng’ei sobonwekwak." 
Jeremiah19:10 Yeityo itui keregut eng’ taitab bik che obendi tugul," 
Jeremiah19:11 ak ilenji ichek, Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Atue ko u noto bichu ak nganasani, ko u ye tuei chito teretab cheptereniot, ne magimuchi keyai komieit kogeny: ak ketupchi ichek Topet, kot ko ma komi ole ketupchin." 
Jeremiah19:12 Ayachini ko u noto olito, koboto bik che menyei olito, mwaei Jehovah, kiyaei koigei Topet:" 
Jeremiah19:13 ak kogergeit gorikab Jerusalem, ak gorikab laitorinikab Juda, che kiging’wanit, ak komostab Topet, gorik tuguk che kibeele ichek baragunywa nyamdutik kobeeljine tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet, ak kigorong’ji kagochinoik che kieei, kanamonik che ter." 
Jeremiah19:14 Kinyo anyun Jeremia eng’ Topet, ole kiga koyoktochi Jehovah kwo komaoten; ak kitonon eng’ seremutab gotab Jehovah, ak kolenji bik tugul:" 
Jeremiah19:15 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ogeero, aipchini nganasani ak nganasokyik tugul yaitiet tugul ne koamwa agobo nganasanito; amu koiuuiit kaatwekwak, si magas ng’alekyuk." 
Jeremiah20:1 Kigas anyun Pasur weritab Imer tisiindet, ne ki bounindet ne o eng’ gotab Jehovah, komaoteni Jeremia agobo tuguchuto." 
Jeremiah20:2 Kibir anyun Pasur maotiot Jeremia, ak koratyi inendet ketik kelyekyik, eng’ ormarichet ne bo meto ne bo Benjamin, ne kimi gotab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah20:3 Ak kiitiach Pasur Jeremia komong’ eng’ ketichato eng’ betut ne bo aeng’. Kilenji anyun Jeremia inendet, Ma kuure Jehovah kaineng’ung’ Pasur, ago kaguurenen Magor-misabib." 
Jeremiah20:4 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Keero, ayain iegu kamuiset ne imuege, ak ne imue choronoguk tugul: ak kobar ichek bunikwak eng’ rotwetab chok, ak igeer noto: ak agoite Juda tugul koba eutab laitoriatab Babulon, ak koluul ichek koba Babulon, ak kobare rotwetab chok." 
Jeremiah20:5 Ak agoite kogeny magornatosiek tugul che bo nganasani, ak kelunaikyik tugul, ak tugukyik tugul che bo kamanutiet, ee konoraik tugul che bo laitorinikab Juda, koba eunekab bunikwak, che luulei tuguchoto, ak konam, ak koib koba Babulon." 
Jeremiah20:6 Ak inye Pasur, keluulok koboto bik tugul che menyei gong’ung’; ak iit Babulon, ak imechi oloto, ak ketupchin oloto, inye ak choronoguk tugul, che kiimaotenji lembech." 
Jeremiah20:7 Ee Jehovah, kiiberbera, ak kiaberberage: i kim isiira, ak kiiterterisie: kaaegu ne kirorechin betut komugul, churochura age tugul." 
Jeremiah20:8 Amu kotugul ye ang’alali, awaache; awaache ale, Koromnatet ak luulet: amu kagiyai ng’olyotab Jehovah koek chotisiet eng’ ane, ak aegu ne kirorechin eng’ betut komugul." 
Jeremiah20:9 Ak ngot amwa ale, Mamwae kiy agobo inendet, anan ang’alal eng’ kainennyi, kobiit anyun eng’ muguleldanyu ko u mat ne lalei eng’ kowekyuk, ak ang’et eng’ muitaet, ak mamuchi asis." 
Jeremiah20:10 Amu koagas katewerisietab che chang’, kamuiset eng’ komosta age tugul. Mwaei choronokyuk tugul che achame, che machei kotaama, kole, Omwaite, si kemwaite inendet; tamangab kigaigai, si kiterter inendet, ak kiyaaktochinege mugetut." 
Jeremiah20:11 Ago mi Jehovah kobota ko u inendet ne kim ak komuisei: kinachi anyun usikyuk, ama iterterisiei: ililandos kot, amu ma yai eng’ ng’omnatet, ak magoi kiutie tewernatenywa ne bo koigeny." 
Jeremiah20:12 Ago, ee Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ne itieme chi ne bo iman, ne igeere kabwatutik ak muguleldo, kona ageer ye iyaakyini mugetut ichek; amu kiang’ang’un ng’olyondennyu." 
Jeremiah20:13 Otienji Jehovah, olosu Jehovah: amu kigosor sobondab ne matinyei kiy eng’ eunekab yaikab yaitiet." 
Jeremiah20:14 Ingochubok betut ne kigisigena: amat kiberur betut ne kisigena kamennyu. 
Jeremiah20:15 Ingochubok chito ne kiipchin logoiywek che miach kwandanyu, kolenjin, Kagesigun werit; ne kiibaibai inendet kot." 
Jeremiah20:16 Ak ingoigei chichoto nganasok che kigogabui Jehovah, ama sik: ak ingogas rirek karon, ak waagat bet kwen;" 
Jeremiah20:17 amu ma bara ami mo; si koek kamennyu kererinnyu, ak koeet moennyi kotugul." 
Jeremiah20:18 Amu nee anyun si among’ eng’ mo, si ageer birtoetab ge ak arogenet, kot kogesgei betusiekyuk eng’ kalilanet?" 
Jeremiah21:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah, ye kiiyoktoi inendet laitoriat Sedekia kwo oldab Pasur weritab Malkija, ak Sepania weritab Maaseia tisiindet, kolenji," 
Jeremiah21:2 Asomin ale, teebwech eng’ Jehovah; amu ibokyinech Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon: tamangab koyaiywech Jehovah ko u boisionikyik tugul che kikwong’e, si kobiit kwo koistoeneigei." 
Jeremiah21:3 Kimwachi anyun Jeremia kolenji, Omwachi Sedekia ko u ni olenji:" 
Jeremiah21:4 Mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ogeero, aweektoi karikab luget che mitei eunekwok, che obarege ak laitoriatab Babulon, ak Kaldeik che yiemok, eng’ sang’utab irimoik, ak ayumji ichek kwenutab nganasani." 
Jeremiah21:5 Ak kebarege ak okwek eng’ eut ne chuulat, eut ne kim, eng’ neregek, ak eng’ neregek che ng’wonen, ak eng’ neregek che eechen." 
Jeremiah21:6 Ak abir bik che menyei nganasani, chi ak tiony: begu eng’ koroito ne o." 
Jeremiah21:7 Ak ye ibata, mwaei Jehovah, asoru Sedekia laitoriatab Juda, ak otwogikyik, ak bik, bik che ng’etu eng’ nganasanito, asoru eng’ koroito, ak eng’ rotwetab chok, ak eng’ rubet, agoite koba eutab Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, ak koba eunekab bunikwak, ak eunekab icheget che cheng’ei sobonwekwak: ak kobar ichek eng’ rotwetab chok; mabagaktoi, ama rire, ama riregei." 
Jeremiah21:8 Ak ilenji bichu, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, kande taing’wong’ oretab sobondo ak oretab meet." 
Jeremiah21:9 Inendet ne tebe nganasani, kebarei eng’ rotwetab chok ak eng’ rubet, ak eng’ koroito: ago sobei inendet ne mandoi, ak komut inendet Kaldeik che yiemok, ak koek sobennyi ne kiluulei." 
Jeremiah21:10 Amu kaatokyi togennyu nganasani aipchi yaitiet, ma agobo mieindo, mwaei Jehovah; kindoi eutab laitoriatab Babulon si kobeel." 
Jeremiah21:11 Ak okwek gotab laitoriatab Juda, ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah21:12 Ee gotab Daudi, mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Oyai kiruoget karon, osoru ne kigiluul komong’ eng’ eutab usindet, si mamong’ neregekyuk che koromen ko u mat, ak kolal kot ko mami ne imuchi komis, amu yaitietab boisionikwok." 
Jeremiah21:13 Keero, aborienen, ee inye ne imenye atebwet, ak ne menyei ruandet ne bo warenget, mwaei Jehovah; okwek che omwae ole, Ng’o ne chorugei kebarge? Anan ng’o ne nyonei ole kimenye?" 
Jeremiah21:14 Ak abirok ko u logoekab boisionikwok, mwaei Jehovah: ak anaam mat eng’ osnennyi, ak kobeel tugul che mitei komoswekyik." 
Jeremiah22:1 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole: Chorjige gotab laitoriatab Juda, ak imwa eng’ oloto ng’olyondoni," 
Jeremiah22:2 ile, Kas ng’olyotab Jehovah, ee laitoriatab Juda, ne itebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi, inye, ak otwogiguk, ak biguk che bendi orit kobunei ormarichochu." 
Jeremiah22:3 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Oyai okwek kiruoget ak imanda, ak osoru ne kigiluul komong’ eng’ eutab usindet: amat oyai ne ya, anan koromnatet, oyachi toondet, anan ne matinyei kwanda, anan mosoget, amotumde korotik che matinyei tengek, eng’ olito." 
Jeremiah22:4 Amu ngot oyai iman kiito, kobendi orit anyun kobunei ormarichokab goi, laitorinik che tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi, kolanyei karisiek, ak mbartanyisiek, inendet ak otwogikyik, ak bikyik." 
Jeremiah22:5 Ago ngot ko mogas it ng’alechuto, ayosiechinige anyun, mwaei Jehovah, ale, egu goi karatia." 
Jeremiah22:6 Amu mwaei ko u ni Jehovah agobo gotab laitoriat ne bo Juda kole, I Gilead eng’ ane, ak ko i metitab Lebanon; ago ayain iman iegu ong’atet, ak nganasok che magimenyei." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ak achob ng’emik agobo inye, chi tugul ak karikyik: ak koluul ichek taragoniguk che kororon ak kowirji ma." 
Jeremiah22:8 Ak kosiirtoe bororiosiek che chang’ nganasani, ak kolenji chi age tugul chitab kokwennyi, Amu nee si koyachi Jehovah ko u ni nganasani o?" 
Jeremiah22:9 Kowol anyun kole, Amu kimeto kayomisetab Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak kolos kanamonik che ter, ak koot." 
Jeremiah22:10 Amorirji ne kigome, anan ote agobo inendet: ago orir mising’ agobo inendet ne mandoi; amu ma koweeksei inendet kogeny, anan kogeer emennyi ne kigisikyin." 
Jeremiah22:11 Amu kamwa Jehovah agobo Salum weritab Josia laitoriatab Juda, ne kilaitoran kogeer Josia kwandanyi, ne kimanda eng’ olito, kole, Ma koweeksei kogeny;" 
Jeremiah22:12 ago mechin ole kigiluulji, ak ma kogeerei emoni agoi." 
Jeremiah22:13 Bwa eng’ inendet ne teechei gonnyi ko ma eng’ imanda, ne teechei gorikyik che bo orit eng’ sastaet; ne boisie chitab kokwennyi amaigochin melekto, amaigochin kit ne yamegei ak boisiennyi;" 
Jeremiah22:14 ne mwaei kole, Ateekyinige got ne o ak gorik che baroen che bo orit, ak kondechigei tirisiok; ak kigitete taragonik, ak kesale saleiywek che biriren." 
Jeremiah22:15 Tos ilaitoran, amu igiilige ibelisie eng’ taragonik? Tos kima amis kwandang’ung’ ak koeeiso, ak koyai kiruoget ak iman? Kimieit anyun eng’ inendet." 
Jeremiah22:16 Kiiruoksechi ne banan ak ne matinyei kiy; kimieit anyun. Tos kima konaena nito? Mwaei Jehovah. 
Jeremiah22:17 Ago matokyingei konyeguk ak muguleldang’ung’ kiy age kobate tugukab ng’wen, ak tumdaetab korotik che matinyei tengek, ak sastaet, ak koromnatet, koyai choto." 
Jeremiah22:18 Mwaei anyun Jehovah agobo Jeoiakim weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda, ko u ni kole: Maiteei chi agobo inendet kole, Bwa, werit ne kitupche! Anan, Bwa, chepto ne kitupche! Maiteei chi agobo inendet kole, Bwa, kiptaiyandani! Anan, Bwa etunatennyi!" 
Jeremiah22:19 Kitubei ko u ye kitubei sigiriet, kichuuti ak kewirta kosiir ormarichokab Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah22:20 Togoste Lebanon, ak irir; ak iwaach eng’ Basan: ak irir eng’ Abarim; amu kagobar chamaniguk tugul." 
Jeremiah22:21 Kiang’alalun eng’ betusiekab boroteng’ung’; ago kiimwa ile, Magase. Kigoek biteeng’ung’ nito koboch ming’inateng’ung’, ile, megase it kutinnyu." 
Jeremiah22:22 Baei usonet mestoweguk tugul, ak keluul chamaniguk: ililan iman anyun ak itoptoben agobo yaitieng’ung’ tugul." 
Jeremiah22:23 Ee inye ne imenye Lebanon, ne iteeche kesweng’ung’ eng’ taragonik, iegu chi ne kirirjin mising’ ye kabwanjin ng’woninwek, ng’wanindo ne u ne bo kwondo ne machei kosigis!" 
Jeremiah22:24 Ko u ye asobe, mwaei Jehovah, agot nganda ko waet ne bo ng’okset eng’ eunnyu ne bo tai Konia weritab Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda, ang’usin ui tugul eng’ oloto;" 
Jeremiah22:25 ak andein eunekab icheget che cheng’ei sobondang’ung’, ak eunekab ichek che iywei, eutab Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, ak eutab Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah22:26 Ak atimden imande, koboto komet ne kisichin, obe emet age, ne kima kesikyinok; ak obekyi oloto." 
Jeremiah22:27 Ago maweekyingei emet ne machei sobonwekwak. 
Jeremiah22:28 Tos chichito Konia ne teret ne kisasei ne kigoyie? Tos inendet ko teret ne magiboiboitune? Amu nee anyun si ketimda icheget, inendet, ak iyotennyi, ak king’eetochi emet ne maingen?" 
Jeremiah22:29 Ee emoni, emoni, emoni, kas ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah22:30 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Osir chichi ole matinyei lakwa, chito ne maborei eng’ betusiekyik: amu maborei chi ne bo iyotennyi, ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi, ak koboi kogeny eng’ Juda." 
Jeremiah23:1 Bwa eng’ mestowek che ng’emei ak koyestoi kechirekab akwennyu! Mwaei Jehovah. 
Jeremiah23:2 Mwaei anyun Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni, agobo mestowek che baei bikyuk, kole, Kioiyeste akwennyu, ak oon, ama obe ogeer; ogeero, aitwok biret ne bo yaitietab boisionikwok, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah23:3 Ak ayum che king’et che bo akwennyu komong’ eng’ emotinwek tugul ole kigaonji, ak amutu kogeny kobwa biusiekwak; ak koiiyo kotesogis." 
Jeremiah23:4 Ak ande mestowek che iyagi: ama koiyweisiei kogeny, anan koarogenso, ama biitu chi ne rarjin kiy, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah23:5 Ogeero, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che ang’eetyini Daudi Temet ne bo iman, ak kolaitoran ko laitoriat, ak kobois eng’ ng’omnatet, ak koyai kiruoget ak imanda eng’ emet." 
Jeremiah23:6 Kisoru Juda eng’ betusiekyik, ak komeng’is Israel eng’ chametab ge: ak ni kainennyi ne kemwaitoe, Jehovah ko imandanyo." 
Jeremiah23:7 Noto anyun, ogeero, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, ye ma komwaei ichek kole, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne kiimut lagokab Israel komong’ eng’ emetab Misri." 
Jeremiah23:8 Ago, mwaei kole, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne kiimut iyotetab gotab Israel komong’ eng’ emet ne bo murot ne bo katam, ak eng’ emotinwek tugul ole kigaonji ichek, ak komeny emenywa." 
Jeremiah23:9 Kagomea mugulel agobo maotik, irigisistos kowekyuk; a u chi ne kabogit, ak a u chi ne kagoterter divaik; amu Jehovah, ak amu ng’alekyik che tililen." 
Jeremiah23:10 Amu nyiitat emet bik che yaei ibetab ge; amu rirei emet amu kayosiet; kigoyaam ole agete akwotisiek eng’ ong’atet; ya bandanywa, ak ma bo iman kimnatenywa." 
Jeremiah23:11 Amu muruon maotiot ak tisiindet; ee, kianyorji gonnyu yaitienywa, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah23:12 Egu anyun orenywa komoswek che chaboen eng’ mesundeito: kionei kot kobutyo: amu aipchini yaitiet, eng’ kenyit ne aityini birenywa, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah23:13 Ak kiageer berberindo eng’ maotikab Samaria; kimaotene Baal, ak kogochi bikyuk Israel kolel." 
Jeremiah23:14 Kiageerji maotikab Jerusalem agichek kit ne samis mising’; yaei ibetab ge, ak kobendote lembechek, ak kogimit eunekab yaikab yaitiet, kot ko mami chi ne weeksei eng’ yaitiennyi: kaigei ichek tugul Sodom eng’ ane, ak kaigei che menyei yoto, Gomora." 
Jeremiah23:15 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek agobo maotik ko u ni kole: Ogeero, abae ichek ng’wonet, ak agochi beek koee: amu kigoyom emet tugul muruonindab maotikab Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah23:16 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Amoepchi it ng’alekab maotik che maotenwok; inetok tangoita: mwaei ng’ang’utiet ne bunu mugulelwekwak, ama ne mong’une kutitab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah23:17 Mwachin ichek kotugul bik che sasa, kolenjin, Kamwa Jehovah kole, Onyoru kalyet; ak komwachi chi age tugul ne wendote uuindab muguleldanyi, kolenjin, Manyonjinin yaitiet age tugul." 
Jeremiah23:18 Amu ng’o ne kigotonon eng’ kapkiruogetab Jehovah, kot komuch koguiyo ak kogas ng’olyondennyi? Ng’o ne kiepchi it ng’olyondennyu, ak kogas?" 
Jeremiah23:19 Ogeero, kagomong’ kipchurjurietab Jehovah, noto neregekyik che koromen, ee, kipchurjuriet ne usei kot: kwerei metowekab kiptengeginik." 
Jeremiah23:20 Maweeksei neregekab Jehovah, agoi koyai koges, agoi koyai magutikab muguleldanyi kosulda: oguitosi ng’olyondonito komie eng’ betusiek che bo let." 
Jeremiah23:21 Kima ayokte maotichuto, ago kiruai: kima ang’alalji, ago kimaotenso." 
Jeremiah23:22 Ago nda kiga tononso eng’ kapkiruogennyu, ta kiigochin bikyuk kogas ng’alekyuk, ak ta kiweechi bichoto koweek eng’ orenywa ne ya, ak eng’ yaitietab boisionikwak." 
Jeremiah23:23 Tos a Kamuktaindet ne negit kityo, mwaei Jehovah, ak ma a Kamuktaindet ne mi ole loo?" 
Jeremiah23:24 Tos imuchi chi kounygei eng’ komoswek che ung’otin, kot ko mageer inendet? Mwaei Jehovah. Tos ma anyi kipsengwet ak ng’ony? Mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah23:25 Kiagas kit ne kimwa maotik, che maoteni lembechek eng’ kainennyu kole, Koaruotyi, koaruotyi." 
Jeremiah23:26 Tebe kot kotianit nito mugulelwekab maotik che maoteni lembechek, maotikab kaberberisietab mugulelwekwak," 
Jeremiah23:27 che len kogochi bikyuk koutie kainennyu eng’ karuotitaosiekwak che mwachin chi tugul chitab kokwennyi, ko u ye kiutie kwanisiekwak kainennyu amu Baal?" 
Jeremiah23:28 Ingomwa maotiot karuotitoet ne koiruotyi; ak inendet ne tinyei ng’olyondennyu komwa eng’ imanda. Ting’egei nee metetek ak nganok? Mwaei Jehovah. 
Jeremiah23:29 Tos ma u ng’olyondennyu mat? Mwaei Jehovah; ak ma u kiriswet ne tonei ruandet? 
Jeremiah23:30 Noto anyun, mwaei Jehovah kole, Ogeero, agirindoi maotik, che kichor chi age tugul ng’alekyuk kochore chitab kokwennyi." 
Jeremiah23:31 Mwaei Jehovah kole, Ogeero, agirindoi maotik, che boisie ng’elyebwekwak, kolen, Kole inendet." 
Jeremiah23:32 Mwaei Jehovah kole, Ogeero, agirindoi ichek che maoteni karuotitaosiekab lembech, komwaita, ak kogochi bikyuk kolel amu lembechekwak, ak eng’ kachaunenywa bo ge ne bo buch: ago ma ayokte, anan ang’at ichek; ama toreti bichu agot kitigin, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah23:33 Ak ye teebenen bichu, anan ko maotiot, anan ko tisiindet, kolenjin, Nee lautietab Jehovah? Imwachi anyun ilenji, Okwek lautiet! Atimdook, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah23:34 Ak abire maotiot, ak tisindet, ak bik, che mwaei kole, Lautietab Jehovah, abire chichoto ak gonnyi." 
Jeremiah23:35 Omwachi anyun okwek, chi age tugul chitab kokwennyi, ak komwachi chi age tugul ng’etab kamet, kolenji, Kawol nee Jehovah? Ak, Kamwa nee Jehovah?" 
Jeremiah23:36 Ama omwae lautietab Jehovah kogeny: amu egu ng’olyotab chi age tugul lautiennyi; amu kiomaas ng’alekab Kamuktaindet ne sobei, che bo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah23:37 Mwachi maotiot ko u ni ilenji, Tos kawolun nee Jehovah? Ak, Kamwa nee Jehovah?" 
Jeremiah23:38 Ago ngot omwa ole, Lautietab Jehovah; mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u nito kole: Amu omwae ng’olyondoni, ole, Lautietab Jehovah, ak kiayogu kemwawok kele, Amat ole, Lautietab Jehovah;" 
Jeremiah23:39 noto anyun, ogeero, autienok agoi, ak atimdook, koboto nganaset ne kiagonok ak kwanisiekwok, obe eng’ tainnyu:" 
Jeremiah23:40 ak aibwok chotisiet ne bo agoi, ak kalilanet ne bo kotugul, ne magiutie." 
Jeremiah24:1 Kiiborua Jehovah kitongok aeng’ che bo logoekab mogoonik che kiginde taitab hekalutab Jehovah; kingo kagoluul Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, Jekonia weritab Jeoiakim, laitoriatab Juda, koboto bounikab Juda, koboto musogik ak kitang’ik, kobunu Jerusalem, koba Babulon." 
Jeremiah24:2 Kimi kitonget age logoekab mogoonik che kororon mising’, ko u tongoanikab mogoonik: ak kimi kitonget age logoek che yaachen mising’ che bo mogoonik, che kima kimuchi keam, ki yaachen mising’." 
Jeremiah24:3 Yeityo kolenja Jehovah, Igeere nee, Jeremia? Ak kiale, Logoekab mogoonik; logoek che miachen, che kororon mising’, ak che yaachen, ko yaachen mising’, che magimuchi keam, yaachen kot." 
Jeremiah24:4 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Jeremiah24:5 Kamwa Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Aiti anyun bik che kigiluul che bo Juda, kogergeit ak logoechu kororon bo mogoonik, che kiayokte koba eng’ olito agoi emetab Kaldeik, si konyor mieindo." 
Jeremiah24:6 Amu ageere ichek si koteb eng’ mieindo, ak amutu kogeny kobwa emoni: ak ateech ichek, ak ma abute; amine, ama atutu." 
Jeremiah24:7 Ak agochi ichek muguleldo ne naena, kole, a Jehovah: ak koek bikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa: amu weekyinagei eng’ mugulelwekwak tugul." 
Jeremiah24:8 Ak ko u kit ne u logoechu yaachen bo mogoonik, che magimuchi keam, amu yaachen mising’; mwaei Jehovah iman kole, Ko u noto agoitoi Sedekia laitoriatab Juda, ak bounikyik, ak che ng’etu che bo Jerusalem, che ng’etu eng’ emoni, ak ichek che menyei emetab Misri:" 
Jeremiah24:9 agoitoi ichek koek che kiwirjin komosi ak komosi eng’ bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony si konyor taitiet; koek tewernatet, ak kalewenet, chotisiet ak sasisiet, eng’ komoswek tugul ole aonjini ichek." 
Jeremiah24:10 Ak ayokyi ichek rotwetab chok, rubet, ak koroito, agoi kogesgei eng’ emet ne kiagochi ichek ak kwanisiekwak." 
Jeremiah25:1 Kinyonji ng’olyot Jeremia agobo bik tugul che bo Juda eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan ne bo Jeoiakim weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda; kenyit ne bo tai noto ne bo Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon;" 
Jeremiah25:2 ne kimwachi maotiot Jeremia bik tugul che bo Juda, koboto bik tugul che menyei Jerusalem, kolenji:" 
Jeremiah25:3 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah koboch kenyitab taman ak somok ne bo Josia weritab Amon, laitoriatab Juda, agoi ra, kenyisiechu tiptem ak somok, ak kiamwawok, ang’eete karon mising’ ak ang’alalwok; ago ma ogas." 
Jeremiah25:4 Ak kigoyokwok Jehovah otwogikyik tugul che maotik, kong’eetei karon mising’ ak koyogu ichek; ago ma ogas, anan oeb it, si kobiit ogas;" 
Jeremiah25:5 komwaei kole, Ingoweek age tugul eng’ okwek, kometo orennyi ne ya, ak eng’ yaitietab boisionikwok, ak omeny emet ne kigonok Jehovah koboto kwanisiekwok, koboch keny agoi koigeny;" 
Jeremiah25:6 amosubote cheptalelisiek che ter, oot ak olosu ichek, amotacha eng’ boisionikab eunekwok; si mayaiywok ne ya." 
Jeremiah25:7 Ago kima ogasa kora, mwaei Jehovah; si kobiit otacha eng’ boisionikab eunekwok, si oipchinege ng’wanindo." 
Jeremiah25:8 Kamwa anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Amu ma ogas ng’alekyuk," 
Jeremiah25:9 ogeero, ayoktoi kenam bikab ortinwek tugul che bo murot ne bo katam, mwaei Jehovah, koboto Nebukadresar, laitoriatab Babulon, otwogindennyu, ak amutu ichek kobokyi emoni, ak bik che menyei olito, ak bororiosiechu tugul che mi komoswechuto; ak ang’em ichek, agesu, ak ayai koek kwong’et, ak ne kirenyei, ak karotwek betusiek tugul." 
Jeremiah25:10 Ak aistoe ichek anyun tugetab boiboiyet, ak ne bo kagasetab ge, ne bo sandet ak ne bo mureret, koboto cheetab koitab bai, ak lapkeiyetab tait." 
Jeremiah25:11 Ak koek karatia emoni komugul, ak kwong’et; ak koot bororiosiechu latioriatab Babulon kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab." 
Jeremiah25:12 Ak ye kagobata kenyisiek tamanwogik tisabu, abir anyun laitoriatab Babulon, ak bororionoto, mwaei Jehovah, amu yaitienywa, ak emetab Kaldeik; ak ayai koek karatia agoi." 
Jeremiah25:13 Ak aipchi emonoto ng’alekyuk tugul che kiamwa agobo oloto, tuguk tugul che kigisirji bukuini, che kigomaoten Jeremia agobo bororiosiek tugul." 
Jeremiah25:14 Amu yaei bororiosiek che chang’ ak laitorinik che eechen ichek koek otwogikwak, koot ichek: ak ayaakyi ichek ko u boisionikwak, ko u boisionikab eunekwak." 
Jeremiah25:15 Amu kamwawa Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel ko u ni kole: Nam eng’ eunnyu kikombetab divaik che bo neregechu ng’omen, si igochi bororiosiechu tugul che ayoktochini koee." 
Jeremiah25:16 Ak koeei, ak koterteriot, koam iywek, amu rotwetab chok ne ayoktochini ichek." 
Jeremiah25:17 Kianam anyun kikombet eng’ eutab Jehovah, ak agochi bororiosiek tugul, che kiga koyoktocha Jehovah, koee:" 
Jeremiah25:18 choto ko Jerusalem, ak nganasokab Juda, ak laitorinikyik, ak bounikyik, si koyai ichek koek karatia, kwong’et, ne kirenyei, ak ne kisasei; ko u eng’ betuni;" 
Jeremiah25:19 Parao laitoriatab Misri, ak otwogikyik, bounikyik, ak bikyik tugul;" 
Jeremiah25:20 koboto bik tugul che kiburuigei, ak laitorinik tugul che bo emetab Us, laitorinik tugul che bo emetab Pilistik, ak Askelon, Gasa, Ekron, ak che king’et che bo Asdod;" 
Jeremiah25:21 Edom, Moab, ak lagokab Amon;" 
Jeremiah25:22 ak laitorinik tugul che bo Turo, ak laitorinik tugul che bo Sidon, ak laitorinik che bo ngegut ne mi nyanjet bitonin;" 
Jeremiah25:23 Dedan, Tema, ak Bus, ak ichek tugul che bioregei;" 
Jeremiah25:24 ak laitorinik tugul che bo Arabia, ak laitorinik tugul che bo bik che kiburuigei che menyei ong’atet;" 
Jeremiah25:25 ak laitorinik tugul che bo Simri, ak laitorinik tugul che bo Elam, ak laitorinik tugul che bo Medik;" 
Jeremiah25:26 ak laitorinik tugul che bo murot ne bo katam, che looen ak che negit, age tugul; ak bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony, che mi ng’ony: ak eei laitoriatab Sesak ye kagoee ichek." 
Jeremiah25:27 Ak ilenji ichek, Kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Oee ak obogitye, ak ong’ung’u, ak obutye, ama ong’eetosi kogeny, amu rotwetab chok ne ayogu konyo kwenung’wong’." 
Jeremiah25:28 Ak ngot koesio konam kikombet eng’ eung’ung’, ak koee, ilenji anyun, Kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Kanyol oee." 
Jeremiah25:29 Amu, ogeero, atau ayae yaitiet eng’ nganaset ne kimwaitoe kainennyu, ko tos otebi ama kibirok iman? Mochilile biret: amu aguurjini rotwetab chok bik tugul che menyei ng’ony, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Jeremiah25:30 Maotenji anyun eng’ ng’alechu tugul, ilenji, Boriseni Jehovah eng’ barak, ak kotwegu eng’ meng’otennyi ne tilil; borisenjin mising’ akwennyi; waachei ko u che tiechei sabibuk, kowaakyi bik tugul che menyei ng’ony." 
Jeremiah25:31 Itei bolatet tabanwekab ng’ony; amu bortos Jehovah ak bororiosiek, iruoksechin inendet bik tugul; ak igoitoi kiptengeginik kebar eng’ rotwetab chok, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah25:32 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Ogeero, Wendi yaitiet kobunei bororiet age agoi bororiet age, ak king’eet kipchurjuriet ne o eng’ tabanwekab ng’ony." 
Jeremiah25:33 Ak konyi emet eng’ betunoto bik che barei Jehovah, koboch tabanda age ne bo ng’ony agoi tabanda age: mami chi ne iteei agobo ichek, ama kiyumi, ama kitubei; egu ng’atatek eng’ emet." 
Jeremiah25:34 Oteiye, okwek mestowek, ak oririe; omildaege orek, okwek che o eechen eng’ akwet; amu kagoit betusiek che kibarenok, ak atonatonak, ak obutye ko u teret ne kichamei." 
Jeremiah25:35 Ama biitu ole mwechin mestowek, anan ole chililjin che eechen che bo akwet." 
Jeremiah25:36 Kutitab rirekab mestowek, ak kateetab che eechen che bo akwet! Amu ng’emei Jehovah ole agete." 
Jeremiah25:37 Ak kosisyo biusiek che bo kalyet amu neregek che koromen che bo Jehovah. 
Jeremiah25:38 Kigometo ole ung’egei, ko u ng’etundo: amu kigoek emenywa ne kikwong’e amu koromnatetab rotwetab chok ne usisiei, ak amu neregekyik che koromen." 
Jeremiah26:1 Kibun ng’onyondoni Jehovah eng’ taunetab laitornatetab Jeoiakim weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda, kole," 
Jeremiah26:2 Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole: Tonon eng’ seremutab gotab Jehovah, ak ing’alalji nganasok tugul che bo Juda, che cham kobwanei kolosu eng’ gotab Jehovah, mwachi ng’alek tugul che ang’atin; imwachi; ametuuch ng’olyo." 
Jeremiah26:3 Abere imuchi kogas, ak koweek chi age tugul eng’ orennyi ne ya; si kobiit awal kabwatutikyuk eng’ yaitiet ne kiga achob ale ayachini ichek amu yaitietab boisionikwak." 
Jeremiah26:4 Ak ilenji ichek, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ngot ko mocham ogasa, obendate ng’atutikyuk, che kiande taing’wong’," 
Jeremiah26:5 ogas ng’alekab otwogikyuk maotik, che ayokwok, ang’eete karon mising’ ak ayokwok, ago kima ogas;" 
Jeremiah26:6 ayae anyun goi koigei Silo, ak ayai nganasani koek ne sasei bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony." 
Jeremiah26:7 Ak kigasei tisiik ak maotik ak bik tugul komwaei Jeremia ng’alechuto eng’ gotab Jehovah. 
Jeremiah26:8 Ak kingo kagoges Jeremia ng’alalet tugul ne kiga ng’at Jehovah komwachi bik tugul, konam anyun tisiik ak maotik ak bik tugul inendet, kolenji, Imee iman." 
Jeremiah26:9 Amu nee si imaoten eng’ kainetab Jehovah, ile, Igeitu goi Silo, ak koek karatia nganasani, ama komenyei chi? Ak kiiyumjigei bik tugul Jeremia eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah26:10 Ak kingogas bounikab Juda tuguchuto, kotogos eng’ gotab laitoriat kobwa gotab Jehovah; ak kiteb ng’ony eng’ ole kibunei eng’ ormarichet ne leel ne bo gotab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah26:11 Yeityo komwachi tisiik ak maotik, bounik, ak bik tugul kolenji, Nyoljin meet chichi; amu kogomaoten kit ne ya agobo nganasani, ko u ye koogas eng’ itikwok." 
Jeremiah26:12 Yeityo komwachi Jeremia bounik tugul ak bik tugul kolenji, Kiiyokwa Jehovah amaoten kit ne ya agobo goi ak nganasani, amwa ng’alek tugul che koogas." 
Jeremiah26:13 Noto anyun, olitit ortinwekwok ak boisionikwok, ak ogas it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’; si kowal Jehovah kabwatutikyik eng’ yaitiet ne kogomwa agobo okwek." 
Jeremiah26:14 Ago ogeero, ami ane eung’wong’: oyaiywa ko u ye ogeere ole mie ak ko bo iman." 
Jeremiah26:15 Ago onai komie ole, ngot obara, oipchinige korotik che matinyei tengek, koboto nganasani, ak bik tugul che menyei olito: amu kagoyokwa Jehovah iman anyo amwawok ng’alechuto tugul ogase." 
Jeremiah26:16 Yeityo komwachi bounik ak bik tugul tisiik ak maotik kolenji: Manyoljin meet chichi; amu kagong’alalwech eng’ kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo. 
Jeremiah26:17 Kong’eetyo anyun boisiek alak che bo emet, ak komwachi tuiyet tugul ne bo bik kolenji," 
Jeremiah26:18 Kimaoten Mikaia Morastindet eng’ betusiekab Hesekia laitoriatab Juda; ak king’alalji bik tugul che bo Juda kolenji, Kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Kibati Sion ko u ye kibati mbaret, ak koek Jerusalem karurugutik, ak koigei tulwetab got komoswek che tororen che bo osnet." 
Jeremiah26:19 Tos kita kobar Hesekia laitoriatab Juda ak Juda tugul inendet? Tos kima iywei Jehovah, ak kogaigai Jehovah, kot kowal Jehovah kabwatutikyik eng’ yaitiet ne kiga komwa agobo ichek? Ngot keyai ko u noto, ko kagiipchi sobonwekyok yaitiet ne o." 
Jeremiah26:20 Ak kimi chito age agine ne kimaoten eng’ kainetab Jehovah, inendet ko ki Uria weritab Semaia ne bo Kiriat-jearim; ak kimaoten kit ne ya agobo nganasani ak emet, ko u ng’alek tugul che bo Jeremia." 
Jeremiah26:21 Ak ye kingogas laitoriat Jeoiakim, koboto bikyik tugul che nyigonen, ak bounik tugul, ko kicheng’ laitoriat kobar inendet; ago ye kingogas Uria, koiywei ak komwei, kwo Misri." 
Jeremiah26:22 Ak kiiyokto laitoriat Jeoiakim bik koba Misri, choto ko Elnatan weritab Akbor, ak bik alak che kimi koboto inendet, koba agoi Misri;" 
Jeremiah26:23 ak kiimut Uria eng’ Misri, komutyi Jeoiakim laitoriat, ne kibar inendet eng’ rotwetab chok, ak kowirji mustanyi kererisiekab bik che ma toogunotin." 
Jeremiah26:24 Ago kirib Aikam weritab Sapan Jeremia, si magigoito inendet kobar bik." 
Jeremiah27:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyondoni kobunu Jehovah eng’ taunetab laitornatetab Jeoikam weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda," 
Jeremiah27:2 kolenji, Kamwawa Jehovah ko u ni kole, Yachige anok ak chogisiek, ak iratyi kaating’ung’;" 
Jeremiah27:3 yeityo iyokyi laitoriatab Edom, ak laitoriatab Moab, ak laitoriatab lagokab Amon, ak laitoriatab Turo, ak laitoriatab Sidon, koib bik che kiyoktoi che bwanei Jerusalem oldab Sedekia laitoriatab Juda:" 
Jeremiah27:4 ak iyomis ichek koba oldab kiptainikwak kolenji, Kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Omwachini kiptainikwok ko u ni olenjini:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Kiayai ng’onyuni, chi ak tiony che mitei ng’ony, eng’ kamuktainnyu ne o ak eunnyu ne chuulat; ak agochi emonito inendet ne ageere ale nyolu agochi." 
Jeremiah27:6 Kaagochi anyun emotinwechuto tugul Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon, otwogindennyu, kaagochi inendet tiong’ikab timin koot inendet." 
Jeremiah27:7 Ak koot bororiosiek tugul inendet ak werinnyi, agoi koit betusiekab emennyi: ak koyae anyun bororiosiek che chang’ ak laitorinik che eechen inendet koek otwogindenywa." 
Jeremiah27:8 Ak tun abire bororiet ak bounatet ne maotei Nebukadnesar nito laitoriatab Babulon, ak ne esioi konde kaatinywa chogitab laitoriatab Babulon, abire bororionoto rotwetab chok, ak rubet, ak koroito, agoi agesu ichek eng’ eunnyi, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah27:9 Ago, amogas okwek maotikwok anan bikwok che ng’orsei anan karuotitaosiekwok anan kipsogeinik anan bonik, che ng’alalwok kolenjinok, Moote laitoriatab Babulon:" 
Jeremiah27:10 amu maotenwok lembeita, si koistook olooegitu eng’ emeng’wong’; kole si aonak olusye." 
Jeremiah27:11 Ago bororiet ne kase it laitoriatab Babulon, ak koot inendet, abagaktoi bororionoto kong’et eng’ emenywa, mwaei Jehovah; ak kobat emonoto, ak komeny oloto." 
Jeremiah27:12 Ak kiang’alalji Sedekia laitoriatab Juda ko u ng’alechuto tugul, alenji, Onde kaating’wong’ chogitab laitoriatab Babulon, ak oot inendet ak bikyik, si osopche." 
Jeremiah27:13 Amu nee si imee, inye koboto biguk, eng’ rotwetab chok, ak eng’ rubet, ak eng’ koroito, ko u ye kogomwa Jehovah agobo bororiet ne machamei koot laitoriatab Babulon?" 
Jeremiah27:14 Amogas ng’alekab maotik che ng’alalwok kolenjinok, Moote laitoriatab Babulon: amu maotenwok lembeita." 
Jeremiah27:15 Amu ma ayogu ichek, mwaei Jehovah, ago maoteni lembechek eng’ kainennyu kole si aonak, ak olusye, okwek ak maotik che maotenwok." 
Jeremiah27:16 Kiang’alalji tisiik agichek ak bichu tugul, alenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amogas ng’alekab maotikwok che maotenwok kolenjinok, Ogeero, negit si keweech kogeny terenikab gotab Jehovah eng’ Babulon: amu maotenwok lembeita." 
Jeremiah27:17 Amogas bichoto; oot laitoriatab Babulon si osopche: amu nee anyun si koek karaita nganasani? 
Jeremiah27:18 Ago ngot ko maotik icheget, ak ngot komi ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ ichek, ingosa anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, si ma kiib terenik che king’et eng’ gotab Jehovah, ak eng’ gotab laitoriatab Juda, ak eng’ Jerusalem, koba Babulon." 
Jeremiah27:19 Amu kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni agobo tolochik, ak nyanjet, ak ng’echerok che tebe tuguk, ak che ng’etunotin che bo terenik che king’et eng’ nganasani," 
Jeremiah27:20 che kima ib Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon, ye kiluulei Jekonia weritab Jeoiakim, laitoriatab Juda, komut eng’ Jerusalem kwo Babulon, ak bik tugul che toogunotin che bo Juda ak Jerusalem;" 
Jeremiah27:21 ee, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, agobo terenik che king’et eng’ gotab Jehovah, ak eng’ gotab laitoriatab Juda ak eng’ Jerusalem, ko u ni kole," 
Jeremiah27:22 Kiibei koba Babulon, ak tebe oloto, agoi betut ne arutochini ichek, mwaei Jehovah; aibu anyun aweegu kobwa olito." 
Jeremiah28:1 Ak eng’ kenyinoto, eng’ taunetab laitornatetab Sedekia laitoriatab Juda, eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan, eng’ arawetab mut, kong’alalwa Hanania weritab Asur, maotiot, ne ki bo Gibeon, eng’ gotab Jehovah, eng’ taitab tisiik ak bik tugul kolenja," 
Jeremiah28:2 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel ko u ni kole, Kaairi chogitab laitoriatab Babulon." 
Jeremiah28:3 Kotom kogesgei kenyisiek aeng’, aibu kogeny kobwa olito tuguk tugul che bo gotab Jehovah, che kiga ib Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon eng’ olito koba Babulon:" 
Jeremiah28:4 ak amutu kogeny konyo olito Jekonia weritab Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda, koboto luulenik tugul che kigiluul che bo Juda, che kiba Babulon, mwaei Jehovah: amu airie chogitab laitoriatab Babulon." 
Jeremiah28:5 Kimwachi anyun maotiot Jeremia maotiot Hanania eng’ taitab tisiik ak eng’ taitab bik tugul che kitonondos eng’ gotab Jehovah," 
Jeremiah28:6 ak kile maotiot Jeremia, Amen: ingoyai Jehovah ko u noto: ingoyai Jehovah ng’aleguk kosulda che kaimaoten, koib kogeny tuguk kobwa gotab Jehovah, ak komut tugul che kigiluul, kobwa olito, kobunu Babulon." 
Jeremiah28:7 Ago gas anyun ng’olyondoni amwae eng’ taing’ung’ ak eng’ taitab bik tugul: 
Jeremiah28:8 Kimaoten maotik che bo keny che kiindounena ak che kiindounenen agobo emotinwek che chang’, ak bounatosiek, agobo luget ak yaitiet, ak koroito." 
Jeremiah28:9 Maotiot ne maoteni agobo kalyet, ye kagosulda ng’olyondennyi, ko naaksei maotiondonoto, kele, kiiyogu Jehovah iman." 
Jeremiah28:10 Kiinem anyun maotiot Hanania chogit ne kimi kaatitab maotiot Jeremia, ak koiri." 
Jeremiah28:11 Ak king’alal Hanania eng’ taitab bik tugul kole, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Airie ko u noto chogitab Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon eng’ kaatitab bororiosiek tugul, kotom kogesgei kenyisiek aeng’u. Kiwa anyun maotiot Jeremia." 
Jeremiah28:12 Kinyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia, ye kingo kagoiri maotiot Hanania chogit eng’ kaatitab maotiot Jeremia, kolenji," 
Jeremiah28:13 Ui, ak imwachi Hanania ilenji, Kamwa Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kaiiri chogisiekab ketik; ago iyae chogisiekab karik igeere choto." 
Jeremiah28:14 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Kande chogitab karnet kaatwekab bororiosiechu tugul, si kobiit koot Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babyulon; ak otei inendet: ak kaagochi inendet tiong’ikab timin agichek." 
Jeremiah28:15 Yeityo komwachi maotiot Jeremia maotiot Hanania, kolenji, Kaso, Hanania. Ma iyogun Jehovah; ago igochini bichu komang’ lembeita." 
Jeremiah28:16 Noto anyun, mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Keero, aistoin eng’ ng’ony: imee kenyini, amu kaimwa ngelelnatet ingelelji Jehovah." 
Jeremiah28:17 Kime anyun maotiot Hanania eng’ kenyinoto eng’ arawetab tisab. 
Jeremiah29:1 Chu ng’alekab baruet ne kiiyokto maotiot Jeremia eng’ Jerusalem, koyokyi boisiek che king’et eng’ che kiga kiluul, ak tisiik, ak maotik, ak bik tugul, che kiga luul Nebukadnesar eng’ Jerusalem koba Babulon," 
Jeremiah29:2 (ye kingo kagoba eng’ Jerusalem laitoriat Jekonia, ak kametab laitoriat, ak kiptainik, koboto bounikab Juda ak Jerusalem, ak musogik, ak kitang’ik,)" 
Jeremiah29:3 kiib Elasa weritab Sapan, ak Geramia weritab Hilkia (che kiiyokto Sedekia laitoriatab Juda koba Babulon oldab Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon), kolenji," 
Jeremiah29:4 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, komwachin bik tugul che kigiluul, che kiachamde keluul eng’ Jerusalem koba Babulon:" 
Jeremiah29:5 ko u ni kole, Oteech gorik, ak omeny; ak ogol mbarenik, ak oam logoekwak." 
Jeremiah29:6 Otunisie, si osich werik ak tibik; ak otunisiechi werikwok, ak ogoite tibikwok, si kosich werik ak tibik; ak otesage eng’ oloto, among’ering’itu." 
Jeremiah29:7 Ak ocheng’ji kalyet nganaset ne kiachamde keluuljok, ak osa Jehovah agobo nganasanato: amu onyoru kalyet eng’ kalyetab nganasanato." 
Jeremiah29:8 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Amongoberberak maotik che mi kwenung’wong’, ak bikwok che ng’orsei, anan oyan karuotitaosiekwok che oruotyini." 
Jeremiah29:9 Amu maotenwok lembeita eng’ kainennyu: ma ayogu ichek, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah29:10 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ye ibata kenyisiek tamanwogik tisabu omi Babulon, arutochok, ak asuldawok ng’olyondennyu ne mie, amutwok obwa olito." 
Jeremiah29:11 Amu angen kabwatutik che abwati agobo okwek, mwaei Jehovah, kabwatutikab kalyet, ma che bo yaitiet, si agonok kamang’unet eng’ betusiekwok che bo let." 
Jeremiah29:12 Ak oguura, ak obe osaa, ak agasak." 
Jeremiah29:13 Ak ocheng’a, ak onyorua, ye ocheng’a eng’ mugulelwekwok tugul." 
Jeremiah29:14 Ak onyorua, mwaei Jehovah, ak awal luuleng’wong’, ak ayumak omong’une bororiosiek tugul, ak eng’ komoswek tugul ole kiaonjok, mwaei Jehovah; ak amutwak kogeny obwa olito kiagoitoenok." 
Jeremiah29:15 Amu kiomwa ole, Kigong’eetwech Jehovah maotik eng’ Babulon." 
Jeremiah29:16 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni agobo laitoriat ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi, ak agobo bik tugul che menyei nganasani, tupchosiekwok che ma kiluul kobotok;" 
Jeremiah29:17 mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ogeero, ayokyini ichek rotwetab chok, ak rubet, ak koroito, ak ayai ichek koigei logoekab mogoonik che samis, che magimuchi keam, amu yaachen mising’." 
Jeremiah29:18 Ak asube ichek rotwetab chok, ak rubet, ak koroito, ak agoite ichek kewirji komosi ak komosi eng’ bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony, si koek che chubotin, ak che kikwong’e, ak che kirenyei, ak che kiteweri, eng’ bororiosiek tugul che kiaonji;" 
Jeremiah29:19 amu ma kas ng’alekyuk, mwaei Jehovah, che kiayoktochine ichek otwogikyuk maotik, ang’eete karon mising’ ak ayokte ichek; ago ma ocham ogas, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah29:20 Ogas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek tugul che kigiluul, che kiayokte eng’ Jerusalem koba Babulon." 
Jeremiah29:21 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, agobo Ahab weritab Kolaia, ak Sedekia weritab Maaseia, che maotenwok lembeita eng’ kainennyu, ko u ni kole: Ogeero, andoi ichek eutab Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon; ak kobar ichek eng’ taing’wong’;" 
Jeremiah29:22 ak komwaei luulenik tugul che bo Juda che mi Babulon, eng’ chubisiet kole, Ingoyain Jehovah iige Sedekia ak Ahab, che kiwatan laitoriatab Babulon eng’ ma;" 
Jeremiah29:23 amu kigoyai berberindo eng’ Israel, ak koyai ibetab ge ak osotikab bikab kokwenywa, ak kigomwa ng’alek che bo lembech eng’ kainennyu, che kima ang’at ichek; ak ko anendet ne angen, ak ko a baoriat, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah29:24 Ak imwa agobo Semaia Neelamindet, ile," 
Jeremiah29:25 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Amu kiiyokyi bik tugul che mi Jerusalem baronok eng’ kaineng’ung’, ak iyokyi Sepania weritab Maaseia tisiindet, ak tisiik tugul, ilenji," 
Jeremiah29:26 Kaindein Jehovah iegu tisiindet igeer tisiindet Jeoiada, si kobiit oegu bounik eng’ gotab Jehovah, amu chi age tugul ne kibiywet, ak koyaegei koek maotio, iratyi ketik kelyekyik, ak iratyi mugurek kaatinnyi." 
Jeremiah29:27 Ara anyun, amu nee si meger kong’ Jeremia ne bo Anatot ne yaegei koek maotiondeng’wong’," 
Jeremiah29:28 amu ko u ye kagoyokwech inendet ng’alek eng’ Babulon, kolenjech, Bunjin betusiek che chang’ luuleng’wong’: oteech gorik ak omeny; ak ogol mbarenik, si oam logoekwak?" 
Jeremiah29:29 Ak kisomanji Sepania tisiindet baruani, kogasei Jeremia maotiot." 
Jeremiah29:30 Konyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia, kolenji," 
Jeremiah29:31 Iyokyi ng’olyot bik tugul che kigeluul, ilenji, Kamwa Jehovah agobo Semaia Neelamindet, ko u ni kole: Amu kigomaotenwok Semaia, ak kima ayogu, ak kogogonok omang’u lembeita;" 
Jeremiah29:32 noto anyun, mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, abire Semaia Neelamindet, ak iyotennyi; masichei chi ne menyei koboto bichu, ama keerei mieindo ne ayachini bikyuk, mwaei Jehovah: amu kimwa ngelelnatet kongelelji Jehovah." 
Jeremiah30:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah, kolenji," 
Jeremiah30:2 Mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Sirji bukuit ng’alek tugul che koamwaun." 
Jeremiah30:3 Keero, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che awale luuletab bikyuk Israel ak Juda, mwaei Jehovah: ak agochi ichek koweek kobwa emet ne kiagochi kwanisiekwak, ak kobunji." 
Jeremiah30:4 Ak chu ng’alek che kimwa Jehovah agobo Israel ak Juda. 
Jeremiah30:5 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kigegas tuget ne bo botanet, ak ne bo kaiyweisiet, ne ma bo kalyet." 
Jeremiah30:6 Oteeb anyun, si onai ngo tinyei mureno ng’wanindo ne bo sigisiet: amu nee anyun si ageere muren age tugul konamei suennyi, ko u kwondo ne machei kosigis, ak kowalogis togochik tugul eng’ arogenet?" 
Jeremiah30:7 Bwa! Amu o betunoto, kot ko mami age ne u noto: noto ko betutab nyalildab Jakobo; ago kisoru eng’ nyalilato." 
Jeremiah30:8 Ak tun airie eng’ betunoto choginnyi ne mi kaating’ung’, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak ang’eti anoguk; ama koyaei toek inendet koek otwogindenywa." 
Jeremiah30:9 Ago otei Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak Daudi laitoriandenywa, ne ang’eetyini ichek." 
Jeremiah30:10 Ameiywei anyun, ee Jakobo otwogindennyu, mwaei Jehovah; ametoptoben, ee Israel: amu asorun eng’ ole loo, koboto iyoteng’ung’, komong’ eng’ emet ne kiga kiluulji; ak koweek Jakobo, ak kosis, ak komuuny, ama komi chi ne imui inendet." 
Jeremiah30:11 Amu ami koboten, mwaei Jehovah, si asorun; amu agesu bororiosiek tugul che kigayestochin, ago magesun inye; ago atigonenen kiruoget, amabagaktoin ama kibirin." 
Jeremiah30:12 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Mainyaaksei kaguoteneng’ung’, ak ko ng’wan ng’otobeng’ung’." 
Jeremiah30:13 Mami chi ne ng’alaldaun, si kobiit kinyain: metinye kerichek che kinyaise." 
Jeremiah30:14 Kigoutienen chamaniguk tugul: macheng’in: amu kaaguotenin eng’ kaguotenetab bunyot eng’ kotigonetab inendet ne korom; amu oindab yaitieng’ung’, amu kitesogis tengekwogiguk." 
Jeremiah30:15 Amu nee si irir eng’ kaguoteneng’ung’? Mainyaaksei ng’wanindang’ung’: amu oindab yaitieng’ung’, amu kitesogis tengekwogiguk, koayaun anyun tuguchuto." 
Jeremiah30:16 Kiamei anyun ichek tugul che amin; kiluulei buniguk tugul, wendi age tugul luulet; ak kiluulei ichek tugul che luulin, ak agoitoi kebar ichek che cheng’ei kobarin." 
Jeremiah30:17 Amu asoobin, ak anya ng’otobosieguk, mwaei Jehovah; amu kigoguurenen ne kigitimda, kole Sion nito, ne mamage kiy chi." 
Jeremiah30:18 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, awale kogeny luuletab emaisiekab Jakobo, ak arire meng’otosiekyik; ak keteech nganaset karaitanyi, ak kotebi gotab laitoriat ko u yeginye." 
Jeremiah30:19 Ak komong’une oloto kongoi ak kutitab icheget che igasegei: ak ates ichek, ama kong’ering’itu; atorori kogeny ichek, ama konyeratitu." 
Jeremiah30:20 Ak koigei lagokwak atkinye tai, ak kogimit tuiyenywa eng’ tainnyu, ak abir tugul che usei ichek." 
Jeremiah30:21 Ak kobiitune ichek bounindenywa, ak komong’une kwenunywa kiruogindenywa; ak agochini inendet korik, konyo korikya; amu ng’o inendet ne tinyei nyiganatet korikya? Mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah30:22 Ak oegu bikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Jeremiah30:23 Ogeero, kagomong’ kipchurjurietab Jehovah, noto ko nereknatennyi ne korom, ee kipchurjuriet ne usei kot: kwerei metowekab kiptengeginik." 
Jeremiah30:24 Mamweeksei neregek che ng’wonen che bo Jehovah agoi koyai koges, agoi koyai magutikab muguleldanyi kosulda: oguitosi ng’olyondonito eng’ betusiek che bo let." 
Jeremiah31:1 Mwaei Jehovah kole, Aegu eng’ betusiechoto Kamuktaindetab ortinwek tugul che bo Israel, ak koek bikyuk." 
Jeremiah31:2 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kinyor mieindo eng’ ong’atet bik che king’etune rotwetab chok: noto ko Israel, ye kigawe agochi inendet komuuny." 
Jeremiah31:3 Kimong’ja Jehovah keny, kolenja, Ee, kiachamin eng’ chamnyet ne bo koigeny: kiachuutun anyun eng’ chamnyet ne tala." 
Jeremiah31:4 Ateechin kogeny, ak keteechin, ee bergeiyatab Israel: kilelesonunenen kogeny sugutisieguk che mengechen, ak iwe iurerenote koboto ichek che igasegei." 
Jeremiah31:5 Ak imin kogeny sabibuk eng’ tulonokab Samaria: minsei minik, ak koboiboitune logoechoto." 
Jeremiah31:6 Amu biitu betut ye ititendos ribik eng’ tulonok che bo Epraim, kole, Ong’eetye, kebe Sion oldab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah31:7 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Otienji Jakobo eng’ kagasetab ge, ak owaach agobo ne o eng’ bororiosiek: omwaite, olosu ole, Ee Jehovah, soru biguk, che king’et che bo Israel." 
Jeremiah31:8 Ogeero, amutu ichek eng’ emet ne bo murot ne bo katam, ak ayum ichek eng’ tabanwekab ng’ony, koboto ne korat, ak ne ing’wali, koboto kwondo ne tamano, ak inendet ne machei kosigis: weeksei olito, ko tuiyet ne o." 
Jeremiah31:9 Bwanei koririonu, ak amutune sautik: agochini kobendat eng’ ole negit ainosiek, eng’ oret ne litit eng’ ole maginachi: amu a kwanda eng’ Israel, ak taitanyu Epraim." 
Jeremiah31:10 Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, ee okwek bororiosiek, ak omwaite nito eng’ ngegusiek che looen ole, Inendet ne kiiyesta Israel, koyumi ak korib, ko u ye ribei mestowot akwennyi." 
Jeremiah31:11 Amu kisor Jehovah Jakobo, ak kotiach eng’ eutab inendet ne kim kosiir inendet." 
Jeremiah31:12 Ak kobwa kotien eng’ ole toror eng’ Sion, ak koroot koba tugul ole mi mieindab Jehovah, ole mi bek, ak divaik, ak mwanik, ak ole mi arekab kechir ak moek: ak koigei sobonwekwak mbaret ne kibisi; ama koarogendos kogeny agot kitigin." 
Jeremiah31:13 Kobaibait anyun bergeiyat eng’ ureriet, koboto murenik ak boisiek agichek: amu awale rirekwak koek boiboiyet, ak agaigai ichek, ak agochi koboiboitu kometo rirekwak." 
Jeremiah31:14 Ak abae akwaindo sobonwekab tisiik kobiyong’so, ak kobiyo bikyuk mieindanyu, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah31:15 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kigasei kutit eng’ Rama, kateeiyet ak rirek che ng’wonen, rirjin Rael lagokyik; esioi kigaigai agobo lagokyik, amu ma komi." 
Jeremiah31:16 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amat ite, anan irir: amu kigonin melekto eng’ boisieng’ung’, mwaei Jehovah; ak bwanei ichek kogeny eng’ emetab bunyot." 
Jeremiah31:17 Ak mi kamang’unet ne bo betusieguk che bo let, mwaei Jehovah; ak kobwa lagoguk kogeny kiwotenywa." 
Jeremiah31:18 Koagas iman koteechingei Epraim, kolen, Kiitigona, ak kiatigonage: ko u moita ne tom konai chogit: welela, si awelelok; amu i Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu." 
Jeremiah31:19 Kiasigu iman ko kiawelelage; ak kiarabach kubestanyu ko kagineta: Kialilan, ee kiatoptoben, amu kiaiboti tewernatetab ming’inatennyu." 
Jeremiah31:20 Tos werinnyu ne achame, Epraim? Tos inendet ko lakwet ne kiboiboitune? Amu ye ang’alali kotugul arenye inendet, abwati inendet mising’ kora: iima moennyu amu inendet; arire inendet iman, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah31:21 Lumjige kaborunoik che bo oret, yachige ketik che iboru oret: tokyi muguleldang’ung’ oret ne o, noto oret ne kiibune: weege kogeny, ee bergeiyatab Israel, weekyige nganasochuguk." 
Jeremiah31:22 Iombenoti kot kotianit, ee inye chepto ne iweechige let? Amu kigotoi Jehovah koyai kit ne leel eng’ ng’ony: Yiemei kwondo muren." 
Jeremiah31:23 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Ta komwaei kogeny ichek ng’alechu eng’ emetab Juda ak eng’ nganasokyik, ye tun aweech kogeny eng’ ole kigimut kole: Ingoberurin Jehovah, ee meng’otetab imanda, ee tulwetab tililindo." 
Jeremiah31:24 Ak komeny oloto Juda ak nganasokyik tugul; koboto kabatik, ak ichek che iyagoti akwotisiekab kechirek." 
Jeremiah31:25 Amu kaabai kobiyo sobondo ne ng’etat, ak kaanyiit sobondo age tugul ne arogeni." 
Jeremiah31:26 Kiagosu anyun, ak ageer; ak ki anyiny ruondanyu." 
Jeremiah31:27 Ogeero, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che agoljini gotab Israel ak gotab Juda iyotetab chi ak iyotetab tiony." 
Jeremiah31:28 Ak ko u ye kiarib ichek si kobiit atut ak agabui ak ang’em, ak anyalil, aribe anyun ichek ko u noto si kobiit ateech ak amin, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah31:29 Ma komwaei eng’ betusiechoto kole, Kigoam kwanisiek sabibuk che mindililen, ak kilil kelekab lagok." 
Jeremiah31:30 Ago meei chi age tugul amu tengektanyi: ak kiliilei kelekab chito age tugul ne amei sabibuk che mindililen. 
Jeremiah31:31 Ogeero, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che kiyomisige ak gotab Israel eng’ kayomiset ne leel, ak koboto gotab Juda;" 
Jeremiah31:32 ma ko u kayomiset ne kigiyomisge ak kwanisiekwak eng’ betut ne kianamanu ichek amutu komong’ eng’ emetab Misri; kayomisonotonyunet ne king’em ichek, nganda kia manong’otiot eng’ ichek, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah31:33 Ago ni kayomiset ne kiyomisige ak gotab Israel ye ibata betusiechoto, mwaei Jehovah; andoi ng’atutiennyu orinywa, ak asirjini mugulelwekwak: ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa, ak koek bikyuk." 
Jeremiah31:34 Ama koneti kogeny chi age tugul chitab kokwennyi, ama koneti chi age tugul ng’etab kamet, kolenjin, Nai Jehovah: amu tun naa ichek tugul, koboch ne ming’in eng’ ichek agoi ne o, mwaei Jehovah: amu anyochini kaat amun yaitienywa, ama abwati tengektanywa kogeny." 
Jeremiah31:35 Mwaei Jehovah, ne konu asista koek lapkeiyet bet, ak ng’atutik che kiging’at agobo arawet ak kecheik si koek lapkeiyet kemoi, ne wasei nyanjet, kot komoror mildaennyi ne bo ge; kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, mwaei ko u ni kole:" 
Jeremiah31:36 Nda istoenagei ng’atutichuto, mwaei Jehovah, ta ma ko bororiet iyotetab Israel kogeny eng’ tainnyu agoi." 
Jeremiah31:37 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Nda kimuchi kikwa kipsengwet, ak kisiach lumeiywekab ng’ony orit, aiste anyun agine iyotet tugul ne bo Israel amu tuguk tugul che kigoyai, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah31:38 Ogeero, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che tun kiteekyine Jehovah nganaset koboch teekset ne koi ne bo Hanael agoi ormarichetab luita." 
Jeremiah31:39 Ak ta kikwae borowet kolititit kotokyigei tulwet ne ming’in ne kiguure Gareb, ak kowelelgei kot koit Goa." 
Jeremiah31:40 Ak koek ne tilil eng’ Jehovah atebwet komugul ne bo muswek, ak ne bo orek, ak mbarenik tugul che itei kererutab Kidron, agoi luita ne bo ormarichetab mbartanyit ne tokyingei kong’asis; magitutu, anan kebut kogeny agoi." 
Jeremiah32:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah eng’ kenyitab taman ne bo Sedekia laitoriatab Juda, ne ki kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo Nebukadresar." 
Jeremiah32:2 Kiyiem anyun lugetab laitoriatab Babulon Jerusalem eng’ betusiechoto: ak kiga kigerji maotiot Jeremia seremutab ribik, ne kimi gotab laitoriatab Juda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Amu kiga koger inendet Sedekia laitoriatab Juda kolenji, Amu nee si imaoten, ak ile, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Agochini nganasani eutab laitoriatab Babulon, ak koluul;" 
Jeremiah32:4 ama chilili Sedekia laitoriatab Juda eng’ eutab Kaldeik, ago kindoi iman eutab laitoriatab Babulon, ak kong’alal tuwai kimni, ak kogeergei togoch;" 
Jeremiah32:5 ak komut Sedekia kwo Babulon, ak kotebe oloto agoi tun aityi biret inendet, mwaei Jehovah: agot ngobargei ak Kaldeik, ko magiberurok?" 
Jeremiah32:6 Ak imwa Jeremia kole, Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja" 
Jeremiah32:7 Keero, nyonjinin Hanamel weritab Salum imameng’ung’, kolenjinin, Aljige mbarennyu ne mi Anatot: amu neng’ung’ imanitab katiaget ial." 
Jeremiah32:8 Kinyonja anyun Hanamel weritab imamennyu eng’ seremutab ribik ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah, ak kolenja, Asomin ale, al mbarennyu ne mi Anatot, ne mi emetab Benjamin: amu neng’ung’ imanitab borotet, ak neng’ung’ katiaget; aljige noto. Kianai anyun ale bo Jehovah ng’olyondonito." 
Jeremiah32:9 Ak kiaal mbaranato ne kimi Anatot ne bo Hanamel weritab imamennyu, ak kiagerji inendet fedaisiek, choto ko sekelisiek taman ak tisab che bo feda." 
Jeremiah32:10 Ak kiasir baruetab kayanjinet, ang’och, ak aguur baorinik, ak agerji inendet fedaisiek eng’ kit ne kirogendoisie." 
Jeremiah32:11 Kiaib anyun baruetab kayanjinet ne bo alyet, noto ne kiging’och ko u ng’atutiet ak biteet, koboto noto ki yatat." 
Jeremiah32:12 Ak kiagochi anyun barunato bo kayanjinet ne bo alyet Baruk weritab Neria weritab Maseia, eng’ taitab Hanamel weritab imamennyu, ak eng’ taitab baorinik che kisirji kainaikwak baruanato bo kayanjinet ne bo alyet, eng’ taitab Yahudik tugul che kitebyei eng’ seremutab ribik." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ak kiang’at Baruk eng’ tainywa, alenji," 
Jeremiah32:14 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ib baronochu bo kayanjinet, baruani bo kayanjinetab alyet, koboto ne kaging’och, ak baruani bo kayanjinet ne yatat, ak inde teretab menet; si kotebe betusiek che chang’." 
Jeremiah32:15 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Ta kealei kogeny gorik ak mbarenik ak mbarenikab sabibuk eng’ emoni." 
Jeremiah32:16 Kingo kaagochi Baruk weritab Neria baruetab kayanjinet ne bo alyet, asa Jehovah, alenji," 
Jeremiah32:17 Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Keero, kiiyai kipsengwet ak ng’ony eng’ kimnateng’ung’ ne o ak eng’ eung’ung’ ne chuulat; mami kiy age tugul ne temenen," 
Jeremiah32:18 inye ne irire elfusiek, ak igeerjini tengekwogikab kwanisiek tegetikab lagokwak che isubi ichek: Kamuktaindet ne o, ne bo kamuktaet, kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek;" 
Jeremiah32:19 inendet ne o eng’ kiruoget, ak ko bo kamuktaet eng’ boisiet; ne keerei konyekyik ortinwek tugul che bo werikab bik; si kogochi age tugul ko u ortinwekyik ak ko u logoekab boisionikyik;" 
Jeremiah32:20 ne kiinde kaborunoik ak kwong’utik emetab Misri, agoi rani, eng’ Israel ak eng’ bik alak; ak kiiyai kaineng’ung’ konaak, ko u ye u rani;" 
Jeremiah32:21 ak kiimutu biguk Israel komong’ eng’ emetab Misri eng’ kaborunoik, ak kwong’utik, ak eng’ eut ne kim, ak eng’ eut ne chuulat, ak eng’ kamuiset ne o;" 
Jeremiah32:22 ak igochi emoni, ne kiiyosiechi kwanisiekwak ile igochini ichek, emet ne nyiitat chego ak kumik;" 
Jeremiah32:23 ak kibwa, konam kobunji; ago ma kas it kuting’ung’, ama isub ng’atutiguk; ma yai kiy age tugul eng’ choto tugul kiing’atyi ichek koyai: koigochi anyun yaitioni tugul konyonji ichek." 
Jeremiah32:24 Ogeero karurugutikab ng’ung’unyek ole bunu bik kobwanei koluulei nganasani; ak kagigochi nganasani eutab Kaldeik che baregei ak nganasanato, amu rotwetab chok, ak rubet, ak koroito: ak kagosulda noto kiimwa; ak keero, igeere noto." 
Jeremiah32:25 Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, kiimwawa ilenja, Aljige mbaret eng’ feda, ak iguur baorinik; nganda kigigochi nganasani eutab Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah32:26 Kinyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia, kolenji," 
Jeremiah32:27 Keero, a Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab bik tugul: tos mi kiy age tugul ne temena?" 
Jeremiah32:28 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, agochini nganasani eutab Kaldeik, ak eng’ eutab Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, ak koluul:" 
Jeremiah32:29 ak kobwa Kaldeik che baregei ak nganasani, kobwa konaam nganasani, ak kobeel, koboto gorik, che kiigoitoe ichek nyamdutik che kibeelei, kogochin Baal eng’ baragutab gorichoto, ak korong’jin kanamonik che ter, kagochinoik che kieei, si kobiit kotacha anerech." 
Jeremiah32:30 Amu kigoyai lagokab Israel ak lagokab Juda ne ya eng’ tainnyu koboch ming’inatenywa: amu kigotacha lagokab Israel anerech eng’ boisionikab eunekwak, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah32:31 Amu kigoek eng’ ane nganasani tagisietab nereknatennyu ak ne bo neregekyuk che ng’wonen koboch betut ne kiteechei ichek agoi rani; kot aiste eng’ tainnyu," 
Jeremiah32:32 amu yaitiet tugul ne bo lagokab Israel ak ne bo lagokab Juda, che kigoyai kotagena anerech, ichek, laitorinikwak, bounikwak, tisiikwak, ak maotikwak, ak bikab Juda, ak bik che menyei Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah32:33 Ak kigotuktocha batai, ama keera: ak nganda kianet ichek, ang’eete karon mising’ ak aneti, ko ma epchi it si kotaach konetisiet." 
Jeremiah32:34 Ago kiinde tugukwak che kiwechei, got ne kimwaitoe kainennyu, kong’wanit." 
Jeremiah32:35 Ak kiteech komoswek che tororen che bo Baal, che mi atebwetab weritab Hinom, si kogoito werikwak ak tibikwak kobun mat kogochi Molek; ne kima ang’at, ama kuura met, ale si kobiit koyai kii kiwechei; ak kogochi Juda koyai tengekto." 
Jeremiah32:36 Mwaei anyun Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, agobo nganasani, ne omwae ole, Kagigochi eutab laitoriatab Babulon eng’ rotwetab chok, ak eng’ rubet, ak eng’ koroito, ko u ni kole," 
Jeremiah32:37 Ogeero, ayumi ichek komong’ eng’ emotinwek tugul che kigaonji ichek amu neregekyuk, ak eng’ neregekyuk che ng’wonen, ak eng’ neregek che eechen, ak amutu ichek kogeny kobwa olito, ak agochi komeny eng’ chametab ge." 
Jeremiah32:38 Ak koek bikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa:" 
Jeremiah32:39 ak agochi ichek muguleldo agenge ak oret agenge, si komuch koiywea koigeny; si konyor mieindo ak lagokwak che isubi ichek:" 
Jeremiah32:40 ak kiyomisige ak ichek kayomiset ne bo koigeny, ale matuktochini batai ichek ago ayachini ne mie; ak ande kaiyweisiennyu mugulelwekwak, si maistoenagei." 
Jeremiah32:41 Ee, aboiboitune ichek ayachi ne mie, ak amin ichek eng’ emoni iman eng’ muguleldanyu komugul ak eng’ sobondanyu komugul." 
Jeremiah32:42 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ko u ye kiaipchi bichu yaitioni o tugul, aipchini ko u noto mieindo tugul ne kiarorji ichek." 
Jeremiah32:43 Ak keal mbarenik eng’ emoni, ole omwae ole, Kigoguber, ama mi chi anan tiony; kigigochi eutab Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah32:44 Alei bik mbarenik eng’ fedaisiek, ak kosir baronokab kayanjinet, ak kong’och, ak koguur baorinik, eng’ emetab Benjamin, ak eng’ komoswek che mi ole negite Jerusalem, ak eng’ nganasokab Juda, ak eng’ nganasok che mi emetab tulonok, ak eng’ nganasok che mi emet ne soi, ak eng’ nganasok che mi Murot ne bo Tai: amu agochini koweek eng’ ole kigiluulji, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah33:1 Kinyonji kogeny ne bo aeng’ ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia, ye kita ko kerat eng’ seremutab ribik, kolenji," 
Jeremiah33:2 Mwaei Jehovah ne yaei noto, Jehovah ne kimimii si kogimit; kainennyi ko Jehovah, mwaei ko u ni kole:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Kuura, si awolun, ak aborun tuguk che eechen, ak ko uuen, che mengen." 
Jeremiah33:4 Amu mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, agobo gorikab nganasani, ak agobo gorikab laitorinikab Juda, che kigebut koek che ribegei eng’ taitab karurugutikab ng’ung’unyek, ak eng’ rotwetab chok: mwaei ko u ni kole:" 
Jeremiah33:5 Bwanei kobaregei ak Kaldeik, ago kinyiiti muswek, che kiabar eng’ neregekyuk ak eng’ neregekyuk che ng’wonen, ak ichek tugul che kiaung’e togennyu tengekwogikwak eng’ nganasani." 
Jeremiah33:6 Ogeero, anyai ak asoobi, ak asoobi ichek; ak ang’ang’ji ichek chang’indab kalyet ak imanda." 
Jeremiah33:7 Ak agochi Juda ak Israel koweek eng’ ole kiga kiluulji, ak ateech ichek ko u eng’ tai." 
Jeremiah33:8 Ak aun ichek eng’ tengektanywa tugul, che kigoyaiywa; ak anyochi kaat amu tengekwogikwak tugul, che kigoyaiywa, ak che kigongeleljinena." 
Jeremiah33:9 Ak koek nganasani eng’ ane kainet ne kiboiboitune, koek kalosunet ak torornatet, eng’ taitab bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony, che kasei mieindo tugul ne ayachini ichek, ak koiyweis ak kobotanso amu mieinoto tugul ak kalyet tugul ne agochini nganasani." 
Jeremiah33:10 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ta kegasei kogeny eng’ olito, ole omwae, ole, Karatia, ama mi chi anan tiony, choto ko nganasokab Juda, ak ortinwekab Jerusalem, che kigoguber, ama mi chi, ama mi chi ne menyei, ama mi tiony," 
Jeremiah33:11 kigasei tugetab boiboiyet ak ne bo kagasetab ge, ne bo sandet ak ne bo mureret, tugetab ichek che mwaei kole, Oweekyi kongoi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, amu mie Jehovah, amu tebyei koigeny rirenennyi: ak tugetab che igoitoi korosekab kongoi kobwa gotab Jehovah. Amu agochini koweek bikab emet che kigeluul, ko u eng’ tai, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah33:12 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ta kobiitu kogeny eng’ olito ole karatia, ama mi chi, ama mi tiony, ak eng’ nganasokyik tugul, meng’otetab mestowek ak ole kerjin akwotisiek che bo kechirek." 
Jeremiah33:13 Bunei kogeny akwotisiekab kechirek taitab inendet ne iiti eng’ nganasok che bo emetab tulonok, ak eng’ nganasokab soi, ak eng’ nganasok che bo Murot ne bo Tai, ak eng’ emet ne bo Benjamin, ak eng’ komoswek ole negite Jerusalem, ak eng’ nganasokab Juda, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah33:14 Ogeero, bwanei betusiek mwaei Jehovah, ye ayae ng’olyondonoto mie ne kiamwa agobo gotab Israel ak agobo gotab Juda." 
Jeremiah33:15 Agochini kobityi Daudi Temetab imanda eng’ betusiechoto ak eng’ betunoto; ak koruoch kiruoget ak imanda eng’ emet. 
Jeremiah33:16 Kisoru Juda eng’ betusiechoto; ak komeng’is Jerusalem eng’ chametab ge; ak ni kainet ne kimwaitoe, Jehovah ko imandanyo." 
Jeremiah33:17 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Magoi betyi chi Daudi ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo gotab Israel; 
Jeremiah33:18 ama betyin chi tisiik Lawik eng’ tainnyu ne igoitoi kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak kobeel kagochinoikab busiek, ak kogoito tiseiywek kotugul." 
Jeremiah33:19 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia kolenji," 
Jeremiah33:20 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ndaomuchi obut arorutiennyu ne bo bet, ak arorutiennyu ne bo kemoi, kot ko ma komi betut ak kemout eng’ saisiekwak;" 
Jeremiah33:21 ta kimuchi kebut agine kayomisennyu ne kigiyomisge ak Daudi otwogindennyu, kot kobetyi werit ne laitorani eng’ ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet; ak ne kiayai koboto Lawik tisiik, kiboitinikyuk." 
Jeremiah33:22 Ko u ye magimuchi kiit tuguk che bo kipsengwet, ama kimuchi keger ng’aniekab nyanjet; atese anyun iyotetab Daudi otwogindennyu, ak Lawik, che boisiewa." 
Jeremiah33:23 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia, kolenji," 
Jeremiah33:24 Tos mebwati kit ne kagomwa bichu kole, Kigotimda Jehovah gorjoto aeng’ che kigolewen? Sasei ichek ko u noto bikyuk, si ma koegu kogeny bororiet eng’ tainywa." 
Jeremiah33:25 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ngot ko matononi arorutiennyu ne bo bet ak ne bo kemoi, ngot ko ma ande ng’atutikab kipsengwet ak che bo ng’ony;" 
Jeremiah33:26 atimdoi anyun agine iyotetab Jakobo, ak ne bo Daudi otwogindennyu, kot ko malewen iyotennyi koek bounik che bou iyotetab Abraham, Isak, ak Jakobo: amu agochini koweek eng’ ole kigiluulji, ak arire ichek." 
Jeremiah34:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah, ye kibargei Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon, ak lugennyi tugul, ak bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony che kimi bounatennyi, ak bororiosiek tugul kobaregei ak Jerusalem, ak nganasokyik tugul, kolenji:" 
Jeremiah34:2 Mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ui ing’alalji Sedekia laitoriatab Juda ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Keero, agochini nganasani eutab laitoriatab Babulon, ak kobeel eng’ mat:" 
Jeremiah34:3 amechilile eunnyi, ago kiluulin iman, ak kindein eunnyi, ak igeer laitoriatab Babulon togoch, ak ong’alal tuwai kimni, ak iwe Babulon." 
Jeremiah34:4 Ago kas ng’olyotab Jehovah, ee Sedekia laitoriatab Juda: mwaei Jehovah agobo inye ko u ni kole, Memee eng’ rotwetab chok;" 
Jeremiah34:5 imee eng’ kalyet; ak beelun ichek ko u noto ko u ye kigebeelji kwanisieguk, laitorinik che bo tai che kiindounenen; ak korirjin, kole, Bwa kiptaiyandani! Amu kaamwa ng’oyot, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah34:6 Yeityo komwachi maotiot Jeremia Sedekia laitoriatab Juda ng’alechato tugul eng’ Jerusalem," 
Jeremiah34:7 ye kibaregei lugetab laitoriatab Babulon ak Jerusalem, ak kobargei ak nganasok tugul che bo Juda che kigang’et, kobargei ak Lakis ak Aseka; amu chuto kityo nganasok che ng’ototin che bo Juda che king’et." 
Jeremiah34:8 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah, ye kingo kagoyai laitoriat Sedekia arorutiet koboto bik tugul che kimi Jerusalem, kole, komwaita katiaget eng’ ichek;" 
Jeremiah34:9 kole kotiach chi tugul otwogindennyi ne muren ak otwogindennyi ne tie, ngo Yahudiot ne muren anan ne tie, kotiach kwo; si mabiit age tugul eng’ ichek ne otei age, noto ko koot Yahudiot tupchennyi." 
Jeremiah34:10 Ak kigas it bounik tugul ak bik tugul che kiga yai arorutionoto, kole itiachi chi age tugul otwogindennyi, ne muren, ak kotiach chi age tugul otwogindennyi ne tie kwo, kole mami chi eng’ ichek ne otei age kogeny; kigas it ng’olyondonoto, ak kogochi ichek koba:" 
Jeremiah34:11 ago eng’ let, kowalak ichek, ak koweech kogeny otwogik ak otwogik che tibik, che kiga kotiach koba, ak komut ichek kogas it koek otwogik, ak otwogik che tibik." 
Jeremiah34:12 Kinyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia ne kibunu Jehovah, kolenji," 
Jeremiah34:13 Mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: kigiyomisge ak kwanisiekwok eng’ betut ne kiamutu ichek komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, komong’ eng’ gotab otwoknatet, alenji," 
Jeremiah34:14 Ye ibata kenyisiek tisabu, kotiach chi age tugul eng’ okwek tupchennyi ne Yahudiot, ne kigeal, ago kigootin eng’ kenyisiek lo, itiachi inendet kwo: ago kima kasa kwanisiekwok, anan koepcha it." 
Jeremiah34:15 Ak kiowalage anyun, ak kiga oyai kit ne mie eng’ tainnyu, omwaitoi katiaget eng’ chi age tugul eng’ chitab kokwennyi; ak kiga oyai arorutiet eng’ tainnyu eng’ got ne kimwaitoe kainennyu:" 
Jeremiah34:16 ago kiowalage ong’wanit kainennyu, ak koweech chi age tugul otwogindennyi, ak otwogindennyi ne tie, che koga otiach koba eng’ boiboiyenywa, ak koomutu ichek kogas it, koek otwogik ak otwogik che tibik, eng’ okwek." 
Jeremiah34:17 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ma oepcha it, si omwaite katiaget, eng’ chi age tugul eng’ tupchennyi, ak eng’ chi age tugul eng’ chitab kokwennyi: ogeero, amwawok katiaget, mwaei Jehovah, ne bo rotwetab chok, ne bo koroito, ak ne bo rubet; ak agoitook kewirjok komosi ak komosi eng’ bounatosiek tugul che bo ng’ony." 
Jeremiah34:18 Ak agoitoi bik che kigobistoe kayomisennyu, che ma yai ng’alekab arorutiet ne kiga koyai eng’ tainnyu, ye kipcheune aeng’ moita ak kobun kwenetab kebeberwekyik;" 
Jeremiah34:19 bounikab Juda, ak bounikab Jerusalem, kiptainik, ak tisiik, ak bik tugul che bo emet, che kibun kwenetab kebeberwechoto bo moita;" 
Jeremiah34:20 agoitoi ichek koba eutab bunikwak, ak koba eutab ichek che cheng’ei sobonwekwak: ak koek muswekwak amitwogikab taritikab barak, ak che bo tiong’ikab ng’ony." 
Jeremiah34:21 Ak agoitoi Sedekia laitoriatab Juda ak bounikyik koba eutab bunikwak, ak koba eutab ichek che cheng’ei sobonwekwak, ak eutab lugetab laitoriatab Babulon, che kiba eng’ oli omi." 
Jeremiah34:22 Ogeero, ang’ate, mwaei Jehovah, ak aweekyi ichek nganasani; ak kobargei ak nganasani, ak koluul, ak kobeel: ak ayai nganasokab Juda koek surkwen, ole ma komenyei chi." 
Jeremiah35:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah eng’ betusiekab Jeoiakim weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda, kolenji," 
Jeremiah35:2 Ui gotab Rekabitik, ak ing’alalji, ak imutu ichek kobwa gotab Jehovah, agoi got age eng’ che bo orit, ak igochi divaik koee." 
Jeremiah35:3 Kiamut anyun Jaasania weritab Jeremia, weritab Habasinia, ak tupchosiekyik, ak werikyik tugul, ak got komugul ne bo Rekabitik;" 
Jeremiah35:4 kiamutu kobwa gotab Jehovah, agoi got ne bo orit ne bo werikab Hanan weritab Igdalia, chitab Kamuktaindet, ne ki negite got ne bo orit ne bo bounik, ne kimi baragutab got ne bo orit ne bo Maaseia weritab Salum, ribindetab kurget." 
Jeremiah35:5 Ak kiande tabok che nyiitotin divaik koboto kikombok, taitab werikab gotab Rekabitik, ak kialenji ichek, Oee divaichu." 
Jeremiah35:6 Ago kile, Magiee divaik: amu king’atech kwandanyo Jonadab weritab Rekab, kolenjech, Moee divaik, okwek, anan werikwok agoi:" 
Jeremiah35:7 amoteeche got, anan ogolse, anan omin mbaretab sabibuk, anan otepte choto: ago omenye emaisiek eng’ betusiekwok tugul; si kobiit osopche eng’ betusiek che chang’ eng’ emet ne o toek." 
Jeremiah35:8 Ak kigegas it kutitab kwandanyo Jonadab weritab Rekab ko u tugul che king’atech, kole, si ma kiee divaik eng’ betusiekyok tugul, achek, osotikyok, werikyok, anan ko tibikyok;" 
Jeremiah35:9 anan keteekyige gorik che kimenye: ama kitinye mbarenikab sabibuk anan mbarenik anan keswek: 
Jeremiah35:10 ago kigemeng’ote emaisiek, ak kigegas it, ak keyai ko u tugul che king’atech kwandanyo Jonadab." 
Jeremiah35:11 Ago ye kinyo Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon emoni, ko kigile, Obwa kebe Jerusalem amu kiywei lugetab Kaldeik, ak kiywei lugetab Suriek; kemeny anyun Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah35:12 Kinyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia, kolenji," 
Jeremiah35:13 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Ui ak imwachi bikab Juda ak bik che menyei Jerusalem, ilenji, Tos mochame otaach konetisiet oepchi it ng’alekyuk? Mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah35:14 Kagosulda ng’alekab Jonadab weritab Rekab, che king’at werikyik, kolenji, Amoee divaik, ak tomo koee ichek agoi betuni, amu kase it ng’atutietab kwandanywa: ago kiang’alalwok, ang’eete karon mising’ ak ang’alali, ago ma oepcha it." 
Jeremiah35:15 Ak kiayokwok kogeny otwogikyuk tugul che maotik, ang’eete karon mising’ ak ayogu ichek, amwae ale, Oweege anyun chi age tugul eng’ orennyi ne ya, ak olitit boisionikwok, amosub cheptalelisiek che ter oot ichek, si omeny emet ne kiagonok koboto kwanisiekwok: ago ma oeb it, anan ogasa it." 
Jeremiah35:16 Amu kagoyai werikab Jonadab weritab Rekab ng’atutietab kwandanywa, ne king’at ichek, ago ma kasa it bichu;" 
Jeremiah35:17 mwaei anyun Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Ogeero, aipchini Juda ak bik tugul che menyei Jerusalem, yaitiet tugul ne kiamwa agobo ichek: amu kiang’alalji, ago ma kas; ago kiaguur ichek, ago ma wol." 
Jeremiah35:18 Ak kimwachi Jeremia gotab Rekabitik kolenji, Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Amu kiogas it ng’atutietab kwandang’wong’ Jonadab, ak orib konetisiosiekyik tugul, ak oyai ko u tugul che king’atak;" 
Jeremiah35:19 mwaei anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Mabetyin chi Jonadab weritab Rekab chito ne tononi eng’ tainnyu agoi." 
Jeremiah36:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyondoni ne kibunu Jehovah eng’ kenyit ne bo ang’wan ne bo Jeoiakim weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda, kolenji," 
Jeremiah36:2 Nam bukuit ne mamanat, isirji ng’alek tugul che koamwaun agobo Israel, ak agobo Juda, ak agobo bororiosiek tugul, koboch betut ne kiang’alalun, koboch betusiekab Josia, agoi betuni." 
Jeremiah36:3 Abere tamangab kogas gotab Juda yaitiet tugul ne kaatil ale ayachini ichek; si koweek chi tugul eng’ ichek kometo orennyi ne ya, si anyochi kaat amu yaitienywa ak tengektanywa." 
Jeremiah36:4 Kiguur anyun Jeremia Baruk weritab Neria; ak kisir Baruk ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah che kimwaei Jeremia, che kiga komwachi Jehovah inendet, kosirji bukuit ne mamanat." 
Jeremiah36:5 Ak king’at Jeremia Baruk, kolenji, A kerat; mamuchi awa gotab Jehovah:" 
Jeremiah36:6 ui anyun isoman bukuinito, ne kaisirji che kegasena, ng’alekab Jehovah, soman kogasei bik eng’ gotab Jehovah eng’ betutab karugutetab ge: ak isoman kogeny kogasei bik tugul che bo Juda che bunu nganasokwak." 
Jeremiah36:7 Tamangab komwaita somutikwak eng’ taitab Jehovah, ak koweek chi age tugul kometo orennyi ne ya: amu eechen neregek koboto neregek che ng’wonen che kigomwa Jehovah agobo bichu." 
Jeremiah36:8 Ak kiyai Baruk weritab Neria ko u tugul che king’at maotiot Jeremia inendet, kosoman eng’ bukuit ng’alekab Jehovah eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah36:9 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo mut ne bo Jeoiakim weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda, eng’ arawetab sogol, komwaita bik tugul eng’ Jerusalem, koboto bik tugul che kibunu nganasokab Juda kobwanei Jerusalem, karugutetab ge eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah36:10 Kisoman anyun Baruk ng’alekab Jeremia che kigisirji bukuit, eng’ gotab Jehovah, eng’ got ne bo orit ne bo Gemaria weritab Sapan sirindet, eng’ seremut ne bo meto, eng’ ole kimandoe ne bo ormarichet ne leel ne bo gotab Jehovah, kisoman kogasei bik tugul." 
Jeremiah36:11 Ak ye kingogas Mikaia weritab Gemaria, weritab Sapan, ng’alechato tugul bo Jehovah, eng’ bukuit," 
Jeremiah36:12 kochortagei kwo gotab laitoriat, got ne bo orit ne bo sirindet: ak ogeero, kitebyei eng’ oloto bounik tugul, choto ko, Elisama sirindet, Delaia weritab Semaia, Elnatan weritab Akbor, ak Gemaria weritab Sapan, ak Sedekia weritab Hanania, ak bounik tugul." 
Jeremiah36:13 Komwachi anyun Mikaia ichek ng’alek tugul che kagas, ye kisomani Baruk bukuit kogasei bik." 
Jeremiah36:14 Koyokto anyun bounik tugul Jeudi weritab Netania, weritab Selemia, weritab Kusi, kwo ole mi Baruk, kolenji, Nam eng’ eung’ung’ bukuit ne kesomanjini bik kogas, ak inyo. Konam anyun Baruk weritab Neria eng’ eunnyi bukuinoto, ak konyo ole mi bichoto." 
Jeremiah36:15 Ak kilenji ichek inendet, Tebi ng’ony anyun, ak isoman kegas. Kosoman anyun Baruk kogasei bichoto." 
Jeremiah36:16 Kingo kagogas ng’alechato tugul anyun, kogeerotgei eng’ kaiyweisiet, ak kolenji Baruk, Kimwachini iman laitoriat ng’alechuto tugul." 
Jeremiah36:17 Yeityo koteebe ichek Baruk kolenji, Mwawech anyun ole kiitepte si isir ng’alechuto komwaei inendet:" 
Jeremiah36:18 Kowolji anyun Baruk ichek, kolenji, Kimwawa ng’alechuto tugul, ak kiasirji bukuit eng’ wino." 
Jeremiah36:19 Yeityo komwachi bounik Baruk, kolenji, Ui unyge, inye ak Jeremia; amongonai chi ole omi." 
Jeremiah36:20 Kiba anyun oldab laitoriat eng’ seremut; ago kiga konde bukuinoto got ne bo orit ne bo Elisama sirindet; ak kimwachi laitoriat ng’alechato tugul kogas. 
Jeremiah36:21 Koyokto anyun laitoriat Jeudi kwo koib bukuit: ak kiinem eng’ got ne bo orit ne bo Elisama sirindet. Ak kisoman Jeudi kogas laitoriat, ak kogas bounik tugul che kitonondos eng’ ole negite laitoriat." 
Jeremiah36:22 Kitebe laitoriat got ne kimenyei eng’ betusiekab kaititiet eng’ arawetab sogol: ak kimi mat ne kilalei eng’ kisigirit eng’ tainnyi. 
Jeremiah36:23 Ak kingo kagosoman Jeudi kartasisiek somok anan ang’wan, kotil laitoriat eng’ rotwet, ak kowirji maata kimi kisigirit, agoi kolal bukuit komugul kogesgei eng’ maata." 
Jeremiah36:24 Ma iyweis, ama bet ngoroikwak, laitoriat, anan age eng’ otwogikyik ne kigasei ng’alechato tugul." 
Jeremiah36:25 Kiigaigai anyun Elnatan ak Delaia ak Gemaria laitoriat, si mabeel bukuit: ago ma kasyi." 
Jeremiah36:26 Ak king’at laitoriat Jerameel weritab laitoriat, koboto Seraia weritab Asriel, ak Selemia weritab Abdeel, konam Baruk sirindet ak maotiot Jeremia: ago kiuny Jehovah ichek." 
Jeremiah36:27 Kinyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia, ko kagobeel laitoriat bukuit, ak ng’alek che kisirei Baruk komwaei Jeremia, kolenji," 
Jeremiah36:28 Nam bukuit age kogeny, ak isirji ng’alechato tugul bo tai che kimi bukuit ne bo tai ne kibeelei Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda." 
Jeremiah36:29 Ak imwa agobo Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda ile, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kiibeel bukuinoto, ile, Amu nee si isir, ile, Nyonei laitoriatab Babulon iman kong’emei emoni, ak kowong’ eng’ olito chi ak tiony?" 
Jeremiah36:30 Mwaei anyun Jehovah agobo Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda ko u ni kole: Masichei chi ne tebe ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo Daudi: ak kiwirtoi mustanyi bet kobir asista, ak kotebe kaititindo kemoi." 
Jeremiah36:31 Ak abire inendet ak iyotennyi, koboto otwogikyik amu tengektanywa; ak aipchini ichek ak bik che menyei Jerusalem, koboto bikab Juda, yaitiet tugul ne kiamwa agobo ichek, ago ma kas." 
Jeremiah36:32 Kinam anyun Jeremia bukuit age ne mamanat, ak kogochi Baruk sirindet, weritab Neria; ne kisirji ng’alek tugul che kimwaei Jeremia che kimi bukuit, ne kiga kobeel Jeoiakim laitoriat ne bo Juda: ak kigitesyi ng’alek alak che chang’ che kergei ak chugiche." 
Jeremiah37:1 Ak kilaitoran Sedekia weritab Josia kogeer Konia weritab Jeoiakim ne kiieet Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon koek laitoriat eng’ emetab Juda. 
Jeremiah37:2 Ago ma kas inendet, anan otwogikyik, anan bikab emet, ng’alekab Jehovah che kimwaei eng’ maotiot Jeremia." 
Jeremiah37:3 Ak kiiyokto Sedekia laitoriat Jeukal weritab Selemia, ak Sepania weritab Maaseia tisiindet, koba oldab maotiot Jeremia, kolenji, Saiywech anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah37:4 Kinyonei anyun Jeremia orit ak komandoi eng’ kwenutab bik: amu kitom korat chi inendet eng’ korgoret. 
Jeremiah37:5 Ak kiibok lugetab Parao eng’ Misri: ak kingo kagogas Kaldeik che kiga koyiem Jerusalem ng’alekwak, koba eng’ Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah37:6 Yeityo konyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah maotiot Jeremia, kolenji," 
Jeremiah37:7 Mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Omwachi ko u ni laitoriatab Juda, ne kaiyokwok obwa oteepsena, olenji: Keero, lugetab Parao, ne kanyo kotoretin, koweeksei kobendi Misri emenywa." 
Jeremiah37:8 Ak kobwa Kaldeik kogeny, ak kobargei ak nganasani; ak koluul, ak kobeel."
