Jeremiah37:9 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amat oberberge, ole, Istoeneige iman Kaldeik: amu maistogei." 
Jeremiah37:10 Amu nganda kiobar luget komugul ne bo Kaldeik che kiborienok, kot kong’et kityo bik che kigiguoten eng’ ichek, ko ta kong’eetei chi age tugul eng’ emainnyi, ak kobeel nganasani." 
Jeremiah37:11 Ak kingo kagotogosta lugetab Kaldeik koba eng’ Jerusalem, amu kiiywei lugetab Parao," 
Jeremiah37:12 kwo anyun Jeremia eng’ Jerusalem agoi emetab Benjamin, kwo konam kebebertanyi eng’ oloto, eng’ kwenutab bik." 
Jeremiah37:13 Ak ye kimi ormarichetab Benjamin, ko kimi agine yoto kiptaiyatab ribik, ne kigiguure Irija, weritab Selemia, weritab Hanania; ak kinam maotiot Jeremia, kolenji, Iwendi onamege ak Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah37:14 Kowolji anyun Jeremia, kolenji, Lembech noto; mawendi kenamge ak Kaldeik; ago ma kasyi: konam anyun Irija Jeremia, ak komutyi bounik." 
Jeremiah37:15 Ak kinerekyi bounik Jeremia, ak kobir, ak kotoorji korgoret eng’ gotab Jonatan sirindet; amu kiga koyai yoto koek korgoret." 
Jeremiah37:16 Kingo kagoit Jeremia gotab keringet, agoi gorik che kigerjin bik, ak kingo kagotebe Jeremia oloto betusiek che chang’;" 
Jeremiah37:17 koyokto anyun Sedekia laitoriat kimut inendet konyo: ak kiteepse laitoriat inendet eng’ ung’ot eng’ gonnyi, kolenji, Tos mi ng’olyot age tugul ne bunu Jehovah? Ak kile Jeremia, Mitei. Kimwa kogeny kole, Kindein eutab laitoriatab Babulon." 
Jeremiah37:18 Kimwachi kogeny Jeremia laitoriat Sedekia kolenji, Kiayaun tengek nee, anan otwogiguk, anan bichu, kot otoorja korgoret?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Mi ano anyun nguno maotikwok che kimaotenwok, kolenjinok, Manyojinin laitoriatab Babulon obarge, anan kobargei ak emoni?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Asain anyun, ee kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, ale, kaswa somennyu; asain ale ameweekya gotab Jonatan sirindet, si mameechi oloto." 
Jeremiah37:21 King’at anyun Sedekia laitoriat, ak kigimut Jeremia kwo seremutab ribik, ak kigigochin makatiat eng’ betut age tugul kobunu oretab bik che beelei makatinik, agoi kogesgei makatinik tugul eng’ nganaset. Kitebi anyun Jeremia ko u noto eng’ seremutab ribik." 
Jeremiah38:1 Ak kigas Sepatia weritab Matan ak Gedalia weritab Pasur, ak Jukal weritab Selemia, ak Pasur weritab Malkija, ng’alek che kimwachi Jeremia bik tugul, kolenji," 
Jeremiah38:2 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Inendet ne tebe nganasani, kebarei eng’ rotwetab chok, ak eng’ rubet, ak eng’ koroito: ago inendet ne wendi oldab Kaldeik kosobei ak koek sobennyi ne kiluulei." 
Jeremiah38:3 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kigoitoi iman nganasani kwo eutab luget ne bo laitoriatab Babulon, ak koluul." 
Jeremiah38:4 Kolenji anyun bounik laitoriat, Kisomin kele, mie kebar chichi; amu igochin eunekab murenikab luget che ng’etu eng’ nganasani, konyalulyo, ak eunekab bik tugul, amu mwachin ichek ng’alek che u choto: amu macheng’ei chichi chametab ge ne bo bichu, ago cheng’jin nyalilda." 
Jeremiah38:5 Ak kile Sedekia laitoriat, Ogeero, mi inendet eunekwok: amu laitoriat ko ma chi ne imuchi koyaiywok kiy ne ya." 
Jeremiah38:6 Konam anyun ichek Jeremia, ak kotoorji inendet keringetab Malkija weritab laitoriat, ne kimi seremutab ribik: ak kichoortae Jeremia rogoonik. Kima komi beek keringonoto, ago kimi ng’atatek: ak kirorokyi Jeremia ng’atatek orit." 
Jeremiah38:7 Kingogas anyun Ebed-melek Etiopindet, ne ki siror, ne kimi gotab laitoriat, kole, kagitoorji Jeremia keringet: ye kiibuuri laitoriat eng’ ormarichetab Benjamin;" 
Jeremiah38:8 komanda Ebed-melek eng’ gotab laitoriat, ak komwachi laitoriat kolenji," 
Jeremiah38:9 Kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat, kogoyai bichu yaitiet eng’ tuguk tugul che kogoyachi maotiot Jeremia, ne kogotoorji keringet; ak imuchi kome eng’ rubet eng’ ole mi: amu ma komi makatinik eng’ nganaset." 
Jeremiah38:10 King’at anyun laitoriat Ebed-melek Etiopindet, kolenji, Imut eng’ yu bik sosom, ak oganabu maotiot Jeremia eng’ keringet, kotom kome." 
Jeremiah38:11 Komut anyun Ebed-melek bik, ak kwo gotab laitoriat ne mi kureretab ole kigonore tuguk, ak kiinem surainik che kigoosegitu che kigelakta ak mararenik che kigoyaagitu, ak kochoortae rogoonik koba keringet ole mi Jeremia." 
Jeremiah38:12 Ak kilenji Ebed-melek Etiopindet, Jeremia, Inde surainichu kigoosegitu che kigelakta, ak mararenichu kigoyaagitu, kulguliguk, ak inde rogoonik agichek. Ak kiyai Jeremia ko u noto." 
Jeremiah38:13 Kiichuut anyun Jeremia eng’ rogoonik, ak komut komong’ eng’ keringet: ak kitebe Jeremia seremutab ribik." 
Jeremiah38:14 Kiiyokto anyun Sedekia laitoriat kimut maotiot Jeremia, kwo ole mi inendet agoi ole kimandoe ne bo somok ne kimi gotab Jehovah: ak kimwachi laitoriat Jeremia kolenji, Amache ateebenen kiy; ameung’ena kiy." 
Jeremiah38:15 Komwachi anyun Jeremia Sedekia, kolenji, Ngot amwaun kioto, kotos mebara iman? Ak ngot amwaun kiy ne toretin, ko megasa." 
Jeremiah38:16 Kiiyosiechi anyun Sedekia laitoriat Jeremia eng’ ung’ot, kolenji, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah, ne kiyaiywech sobonito, ko mabarin, amandein eutab bichu cheng’ei sobondang’ung’." 
Jeremiah38:17 Kilenji anyun Jeremia Sedekia, Mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindet ne bo Israel, ko u ni kole: Ngot iwe oldab bounikab laitoriatab Babulon, isobe, ama kibeelei nganasani; ak isob koboto gong’ung’." 
Jeremiah38:18 Ago ngot ko mewe oldab bounikab laitoriatab Babulon, kindoi anyun nganasani eutab Kaldeik, ak kobeel, amechilili eng’ eunekwak." 
Jeremiah38:19 Ak kilenji Sedekia laitoriat Jeremia, Aiywei Yahudik che kigonamgei ak Kaldeik, si maindea eunekwak, ak kochota." 
Jeremiah38:20 Ago kile Jeremia, Maigoitoin. Kasain ale, kas kutitab Jehovah eng’ chuto amwaun: si kobiit komieit eng’ inye, ak kosob sobondang’ung’." 
Jeremiah38:21 Ago ngot iesie iwe, ko ni ng’olyot ne kagoborua Jehovah:" 
Jeremiah38:22 Keero, kimuti kwonyik tugul che ng’etu eng’ gotab laitoriatab Juda koba oldab bounikab laitoriatab Babulon, ak mwaei kwonyichoto kole, Kagoberberin choronoguk che ingen, ak kagoterterin: kagorat anyun ng’atatek kelyeguk, kagoweeigei let ichek." 
Jeremiah38:23 Ak komut osotiguk tugul komong’ ak lagoguk komutyi Kaldeik: amechilile eunekwak, ago namin laitoriatab Babulon: ak igoite nganasani kebeel." 
Jeremiah38:24 Kolenji anyun Sedekia Jeremia, Amengonai chi ng’alechu, si memeei." 
Jeremiah38:25 Ago ngot kogas bounik kole kageng’alal tuwai, ak kobwanjin kolenjin, Mwawech nguno kit ne kemwachi laitoriat; ameung’enech, si ma kibarin: ak imwawech kogeny kit ne kamwaun laitoriat:" 
Jeremiah38:26 ilenji ichek anyun, Koaipchini laitoriat somennyu, ale, si maweekya gotab Jonatan, si mamee eng’ oloto." 
Jeremiah38:27 Kibwa anyun bounik tugul oldab Jeremia, ak koteebe inendet: ak kimwachi ko u ng’alechato tugul che koga ng’at laitoriat. Kobagakta anyun, mata kong’alal ak inendet; ago manaak ng’olyondonoto." 
Jeremiah38:28 Kitebe anyun Jeremia seremutab ribik agoi betut ne kigiluule Jerusalem. 
Jeremiah39:1 Ak kingo kageluul Jerusalem (eng’ kenyitab sogol ne bo Sedekia laitoriatab Juda, eng’ arawetab taman, konyo Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon koboto lugennyi tugul kobokyi Jerusalem, ak koyiem;" 
Jeremiah39:2 kigibut nganasanato eng’ kenyitab taman ak agenge ne bo Sedekia, eng’ arawet ne bo ang’wan, eng’ betutab sogol ne bo arawanato:)" 
Jeremiah39:3 kobwa anyun neganaset orit bounik tugul che bo laitoriatab Babulon, ak kotebe ormarichet ne bo kwen, choto ko Nergal-sareser, Samgar-nebo, Sarsekim, Rab- saris, Nergal-saresar, Reb-mag, koboto bounik tugul alak che king’et che bo laitoriatab Babulon." 
Jeremiah39:4 Ak kingogeer Sedekia laitoriatab Juda ak murenik tugul che bo luget, bichoto, komwei komanda eng’ nganaset kemoi, kobun oretab mbaretab laitoriat, eng’ ormarichet ne kimi kwenutab inatusiek aeng’: ak kimandae oretab Araba." 
Jeremiah39:5 Ago kiisub ichek lugetab Kaldeik, ak kinamji Sedekia warengetab Jeriko: ak kingo kagonam inendet, komutyi Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon ne kimi Ribla eng’ emetab Hamat, ak kiiruokyi inendet." 
Jeremiah39:6 Kibar anyun laitoriatab Babulon werikab Sedekia eng’ Ribla, kogeerei inendet: kibar kogeny laitoriatab Babulon bik che toogunotin tugul che bo Juda." 
Jeremiah39:7 Kibar kogeny konyekab Sedekia, ak korate mugurek si komut kwo Babulon." 
Jeremiah39:8 Ak kibeel Kaldeik gotab laitoriat, ak gorikab bik, ak kobut irimoikab Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah39:9 Yeityo komut Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik, bik che kiga ng’et eng’ nganaset koba Babulon koek luulenik, koboto bik che kimwei eng’ nganaset konamgei ak inendet, koboto bik che kiga ng’et." 
Jeremiah39:10 Ago kibagakta Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik, alak che bo bik che kibananok, che kima kotinyei kiy, eng’ emetab Juda, ak kogochi ichek mbarenikab sabibuk koboto mbarenik eng’ betunoto." 
Jeremiah39:11 King’at anyun Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik, agobo Jeremia, kolenji," 
Jeremiah39:12 Imut inendet, ak irib komie, ameyachi kiy ne ya; ago yachi ko u ye mwaun inendet." 
Jeremiah39:13 Kiiyokto anyun Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik, koboto Nebusasban, Rab-saris, ak Nergal-saresar ak Rab-mag, ak kiptainik tugul che eechen che bo laitoriatab Babulon;" 
Jeremiah39:14 kiiyokto kimut Jeremia komong’ eng’ seremutab ribik, ak konde inendet eutab Gedalia weritab Aikam, weritab Sapan, si kobiit komut inendet kwo ga: kimeng’is anyun eng’ kwenutab bik." 
Jeremiah39:15 Kinyonji anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia, ye ki kerat eng’ seremutab ribik, kolenji," 
Jeremiah39:16 Ui, ak ing’alalji Ebed-melek Etiopindet, ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Keero, aipchini ng’alekyuk nganasani agobo yaitiet, ma agobo mieindo; ak isuldoi eng’ taing’ung’ eng’ betunoto." 
Jeremiah39:17 Ago asorun eng’ betunoto, mwaei Jehovah: ama kigochinin eunekab bik che iywei." 
Jeremiah39:18 Amu asorun iman, ama kibarin eng’ rotwetab chok, ago iluule sobeng’ung’ kobunjin: amu kiimang’wa, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah40:1 Kinyonji Jeremia ng’olyot ne kibunu Jehovah, ye kingo kagotiach Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik kwo eng’ Rama, ye kiga komut inendet ko ratat eng’ sirimwek koboto luulenik tugul che bo Jerusalem ak Juda, che kiga kiluul koba Babulon." 
Jeremiah40:2 Kinam anyun kiptaiyatab ribik Jeremia, ak kolenji, Kimwa Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ yaitioni agobo olito;" 
Jeremiah40:3 ak kagoib yaitionoto konyo, ak koyai ko u ye kimwa; amu kioyachi Jehovah tengekto, ama ogas it kutinnyi, kagonyonjok anyun kiito." 
Jeremiah40:4 Keer anyun-o, katiachin rani eng’ sirimwek che mi eung’ung’. Ngot igeer ile mie kebe tuwai Babulon, inyo kebe, ak aribin komie; ago ngot igeere ile ya kebe tuwai Babulon, itebi: keero, mi emoni tugul taing’ung’; ole igeere ile mie ak konyoljinin iwe, iwe yoto." 
Jeremiah40:5 Ak ye kitomo koweek, kole, Weege anyun oldab Gedalia weritab Aikam weritab Sapan, ne kigonde laitoriatab Babulon koek bounindet koba nganasokab Juda, ak komeng’is koboto bik: anan iwe oldo age tugul ole igeere ile nyoljinin iwe. Kiigochi anyun kiptaiyatab ribik amitwogik inendet ak kagochinet ak kounda kwo." 
Jeremiah40:6 Kiwa anyun Jeremia oldab Gedalia weritab Aikam eng’ Mispa, ak komeng’is koboto inendet eng’ kwenutab bik che kiga ng’et eng’ emet." 
Jeremiah40:7 Ak kingogas kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek che kimi emotinwek, icheget ak murenikwak, kole, kogonde laitoriatab Babulon Gedalia weritab Aikam koek bounindet eng’ emet, ak kogonde eunnyi murenik, ak kwonyik, ak lagok, ak bik alak che ki kibananok mising’ eng’ emet, che bo ichek che kima kiluul koba Babulon;" 
Jeremiah40:8 kobwa anyun oldab Gedalia eng’ Mispa, icheget ko, Ismael weritab Netania, ak Johanan ak Jonatan werikab Karea, ak Seraia weritab Tanumet, ak werikab Epai Netopatindet, ak Jesania weritab Maakatindet, icheget koboto murenikwak." 
Jeremiah40:9 Ak kiiyosiechi Gedalia weritab Aikam weritab Sapan bichoto ak murenikwak, kolenji, Amoiywei oot Kaldeik: omeng’isie eng’ emet, ak oot laitoriatab Babulon, si komieit eng’ okwek." 
Jeremiah40:10 Ago amenye ane Mispa, si kobiit atonone taitab Kaldeik, che bwanjinech: ago oyum okwek divaik, logoekab kemei, ak mwanik, ak onde terenikwok, omeny nganasokwok che koonam." 
Jeremiah40:11 Ko u noto, kingogas Yahudik tugul che kimi Moab, ak che kimi ak lagokab Amon, ak che kimi Edom, koboto che kimi emotinwek tugul, kole, Kigobagach laitoriatab Babulon bik che king’et eng’ Juda, ak kole, kigonde Gedalia weritab Aikam weritab Sapan koboi ichek;" 
Jeremiah40:12 koweek anyun Yahudik tugul eng’ komoswek tugul ole kiga kionji, ak kibwa emetab Juda, ole mi Gedalia, eng’ Mispa, ak kiiyum divaik ak logoek che chang’ che bo kemei." 
Jeremiah40:13 Kibwa kogeny Johanan weritab Karea, ak kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek che kimitei emotinwek, oldab Gedalia eng’ Mispa," 
Jeremiah40:14 ak kolenji, Tos ingen ile kiiyok Baalis laitoriatab lagokab Amon Ismael weritab Netania kobarin? Ago ma iyan Gedalia weritab Aikam ng’alekwak." 
Jeremiah40:15 Kong’alalji anyun eng’ ung’ot, Johanan weritab Karea Gedalia eng’ Mispa, kolenji, Kaigai, ichamwa awa abar Ismael weritab Netania, ama naei chi: amu nee anyun si kobarin, si koyesta Yahudik tugul che kigoyumjingei, ak kobek che king’et che bo Juda?" 
Jeremiah40:16 Ago kilenji Gedalia weritab Aikam Johanan weritab Karea, Ma mie iyai kiito: amu imwae lembech agobo Ismael." 
Jeremiah41:1 Kinyo anyun Ismael weritab Netania weritab Elisama ne bo iyotetab kaplaitoriat, koboto kiptaiyat age ne o ne bo laitoriat, ak bik taman che kimi koboto inendet, eng’ arawetab tisab, oldab Gedalia weritab Aikam eng’ Mispa; ak kiamis tugul eng’ oloto eng’ Mispa." 
Jeremiah41:2 King’et anyun Ismael weritab Netania, ak bichoto taman kimi koboto inendet, ak koeb Gedalia weritab Aikam weritab Sapan eng’ rotwetab chok, ak kobar, ne kiga konde laitoriatab Babulon koek bounindetab emet." 
Jeremiah41:3 Kibar Ismael kogeny Yahudik tugul che kimi koboto Gedalia eng’ Mispa, koboto Kaldeik che kiginyorji oloto, choto ko bikab luget." 
Jeremiah41:4 Ak eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ ko kagobar inendet Gedalia, ama nai chi," 
Jeremiah41:5 kobwa bik alage kobunu Sekem, Silo, ak Samaria, bik tamanwogik sisiit, che kiga konem tamnokwak ak kogerer ngoroikwak, ko kagotilgei, ak koibu kagochinoik ak tuguk che nyamdut eng’ eunekwak, koibu kobwa gotab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ak kiwa Ismael weritab Netania eng’ Mispa kotorokto ichek, koriroti eng’ oret kowendi: ak kingo kagotuiyo ak ichek kolenji, Obwa oldab Gedalia weritab Aikam." 
Jeremiah41:7 Ak kingo kagoit kwenutab nganaset, kobar Ismael weritab Netania bichoto, ak kowirji keringet, inendet, ak murenik che kimi ak inendet." 
Jeremiah41:8 Ago kibiit bik tamanu eng’ kwenunywa che kimwachi Ismael kolenji, Amebarech: amu kitinye tuguk che kigiuny eng’ mbar, nganok, ak sairik, ak mwanik, ak kumik. Kobagakta anyun, mata kobar ichek eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekwak." 
Jeremiah41:9 Kiinyiit anyun Ismael weritab Netania keringonoto bik che kiga kebar, keringet ne kiga kowirji Ismael muswek tugul che bo bik che kiga kobar, kiwirji ole negite Gedalia (keringonoto ko ne kibalei laitoriat Asa amu kiiywei Baasa laitoriatab Israel)." 
Jeremiah41:10 Yeityo komut Ismael bik tugul che king’et eng’ Mispa koek luulenik, agot tibikab laitoriat, koboto bik tugul che king’et eng’ Mispa che kiga konde Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik eutab Gedalia weritab Aikam: kiimut Ismael weritab Netania bichoto koek luulenik, ak koba oldab lagokab Amon." 
Jeremiah41:11 Ago ye kingogas Johanan weritab Karea ak kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek che kimi koboto inendet, yaitiet tugul ne kiga koyai Ismael weritab Netania," 
Jeremiah41:12 komut anyun bik tugul, koba kobargei ak Ismael weritab Netania, ak kinyorji inendet ole negite beek che chang’ che mi Gibeon." 
Jeremiah41:13 Kingogeer anyun bik tugul che kimi koboto Ismael Johanan weritab Karea, ak kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek, che kimi koboto inendet, kogasgei anyun mising’." 
Jeremiah41:14 Kiwelelgei anyun bik tugul che kiga komut Ismael eng’ Mispa koek luulenik, koweek koba ole mi Johanan weritab Karea." 
Jeremiah41:15 Ago kichilil Ismael weritab Netania eng’ Johanan koboto bikyik sisiit, ak koba oldab lagokab Amon." 
Jeremiah41:16 Komut anyun Johanan weritab Karea ak kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek che kimi koboto inendet, bik tugul che king’et eng’ bik che kiga koweech inendet eng’ Ismael weritab Netania, eng’ Mispa, ye kingo kagobar Gedalia weritab Aikam, bikab luget, ak kwonyik, ak lagok, ak kiptainik che kiga komut kogeny eng’ Gibeon:" 
Jeremiah41:17 ak kiba komeny Gerut Kimham, ne mi ole negite Bet-lehem, si kobiit koba agoi Misri," 
Jeremiah41:18 amu Kaldeik: amu kiiywei ichek, amu kiga kobar Ismael weritab Netania, Gedalia weritab Aikam, ne kiinde laitoriatab Babulon koek bounindetab emet." 
Jeremiah42:1 Kirik anyun kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek, ak Johanan weritab Karea, ak Jesania weritab Hosaia, ak bik tugul kong’eete ne ming’in agoi ne o," 
Jeremiah42:2 ak kolenji maotiot Jeremia, Kisomin kele, kaswech somennyo, ak saiywech Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, achek tugul che kiging’etu; amu kiging’etu bik che ng’ering’ eng’ bik che chang’, ko u ye igeerech:" 
Jeremiah42:3 si kobiit koboruech Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ oret ne kanyol kebendate, ak kit ne kanyol keyai." 
Jeremiah42:4 Kolenji anyun maotiot Jeremia ichek, Kaagasak; ogeero, asae Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ko u ng’alekwok; ak kit age tugul ne wolwok Jehovah amwawok kioto; maung’enok kiy." 
Jeremiah42:5 Kimwachi anyun ichek Jeremia kolenji, Ingoek Jehovah baoriat ne bo iman ak ko ne kiyani eng’ kwenunnyo, ngot ko magiyai ko u ng’olyot age tugul ne kaiyogunenen Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ iibwech." 
Jeremiah42:6 Ngo ng’olyo ne mie, anan ngo ne ya, kegase it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ne kiyoktochinin; si kobiit komieit eng’ achek, ye kigas it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah42:7 Ak kingobata betusiek tamanu, konyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia." 
Jeremiah42:8 Kiguur anyun inendet Johanan weritab Karea, ak kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek che kimi koboto inendet, ak bik tugul kong’eete ne ming’in agoi ne o," 
Jeremiah42:9 ak kolenji ichek, Mwaei Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel ne kioyoktocha aib someng’wong’ kwo tainnyi, ko u ni kole:" 
Jeremiah42:10 Ngot ko ta omeny emoni, ateechok anyun, ama abutok, ak aminak, ama atutok: amu kaawal kabwatutikyuk eng’ yaitiet ne koayaiywok." 
Jeremiah42:11 Amoiywei laitoriatab Babulon, ne oiywei; amoiywei inendet, mwaei Jehovah: amu ami kobotok, si asoruok, ak atiachak eng’ eunnyi." 
Jeremiah42:12 Ak agonok rirenet, si kobiit korirenak inendet, ak kogonok oweege obe emeng’wong’." 
Jeremiah42:13 Ago ngot omwa ole, Magimenye emoni; kot ko mogas it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’," 
Jeremiah42:14 omwae olen, Achicha; kibendi emetab Misri, ole magigeere luget, ama kigase iriaget, ama amech rubet; ak kemeny oloto:" 
Jeremiah42:15 ogas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah, ee okwek che kiong’etu che o bo Juda; mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Ngot ogiiljige otokyige Misri, ak obe otebe oloto;" 
Jeremiah42:16 konamak anyun eng’ oloto, eng’ emetab Misri, rotwetab chok ne oiywei, ak kosubok rubet ne oiywei koriichak eng’ oloto eng’ Misri; ak obekyi oloto." 
Jeremiah42:17 Igeitu noto eng’ bik tugul che tokyingei Misri kobendi kotebe oloto; begu eng’ rotwetab chok ak eng’ rubet, ak eng’ koroito: ak mami agot agenge eng’ ichek ne ng’etu anan ne chilili eng’ yaitiet ne aipchini." 
Jeremiah42:18 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole; Ko u ye kigerong’ji neregekyuk ak neregekyuk che ng’wonen, bik che menyei Jerusalem, kerong’jinok anyun ko u noto neregekyuk che ng’wonen, ye obe Misri: ak oegu che kichubei, ak che kikwong’e ak che kisasei, ak che kichotei; ama ogeere olito kogeny." 
Jeremiah42:19 Kagong’alal Jehovah agobo okwek, ee okwek che kiong’etu che o bo Juda, kole, Amobe Misri: onai komie ole kaabaorianwok rani." 
Jeremiah42:20 Amu kioyachi kaberberisiet sobonwekwok; amu kioyokta awa oldab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ole, Saiywech Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo; ak imwawech ko u tugul che mwaei Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, si keyai:" 
Jeremiah42:21 ak kaamwawok ng’alechato rani; ago ma ogas it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’ eng’ kiy age tugul ne kogoyogunena amwawok. 
Jeremiah42:22 Onai anyun komie ole, obegu eng’ rotwetab chok, ak eng’ rubet, ak eng’ koroito, eng’ ole omache obe otebe." 
Jeremiah43:1 Ak ye kingo kagoges Jeremia ng’alalet ne king’alaljin bik tugul ng’alek tugul che bo Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, che kiga koyoktae Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa inendet komwachi ichek ng’alechato tugul," 
Jeremiah43:2 komwa anyun Asaria weritab Hosaia, ak Johanan weritab Karea, ak bik tugul che meniotin, kolenji Jeremia, Imwae lembech: ma iyogun Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo inyo imwa ile, Mobendi Misri otebe oloto:" 
Jeremiah43:3 ago kaiberberin Baruk weritab Neria si kogirindech, si kobiit kondeech eutab Kaldeik, si kobarech, ak komutech kebe Babulon keegu luulenik." 
Jeremiah43:4 Ma kas it anyun kutitab Jehovah Johanan weritab Karea, ak kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek, ak bik tugul, si kobiit komeny emetab Juda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Ago kiimut Johanan weritab Karea ak kiptainik tugul che bo lugosiek bik tugul che king’et che ki bo Juda, che kiweeksei kobunu bororiosiek tugul ole kiga kionji, kobwa kotebe Juda;" 
Jeremiah43:6 murenik, ak kwonyik, ak lagok ak tibikab laitoriat, ak chi age tugul ne kiga kobagach Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik kobagakyi Gedalia weritab Aikam, weritab Sapan, ak maotiot Jeremia, ak Baruk weritab Neria;" 
Jeremiah43:7 ak kiit emetab Misri; amu kima kas it kutitab Jehovah: ak kibwa agoi Tapanes. 
Jeremiah43:8 Yeityo konyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jeremia eng’ Tapanes, kolenji," 
Jeremiah43:9 Nam koik che eechen, ak iung’e matabaruk orit eng’ ole kiyae matabaruk, ne mi ole kibunei kebendi gotab Parao eng’ Tapanes, kogeerei bikab Juda;" 
Jeremiah43:10 ak ilenji ichek, Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Ogeero, ayoktoi kimut Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, otwogindennyu, ak ande ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet baragutab koichu kaauny; ak koiitae baragutab koichato emainnyi ne bo laitornatet." 
Jeremiah43:11 Ak konyo kobar emetab Misri; che bo meet kobendi meet, ak che bo luulet, kobendi luulet, ak che bo rotwetab chok, kobendi rotwetab chok." 
Jeremiah43:12 Ak alaal mat eng’ gorikab kanamonikab Misri; ak kobeel inendet kanamonichoto, ak koib: ak kolaach emetab Misri, ko u ye ilaachi mestowot ngoriennyi; ak kwo eng’ oloto eng’ kalyet." 
Jeremiah43:13 Butei kogeny tolochikab Bet-semes, ne mi emetab Misri; ak kobeel gorikab kanamonikab Misri." 
Jeremiah44:1 Kinyonji ng’olyot Jeremia agobo Yahudik tugul che kimenyei emetab Misri, che kimenyei Migdok, ak Tapanes, ak Nop, ak emetab Patros, kolenji," 
Jeremiah44:2 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Kiogeer yaitiet tugul ne kiapchi Jerusalem, ak nganasok tugul che bo Juda; ak ogeero, karatwek rani nganasochato, ama mi chi ne menyei oloto;" 
Jeremiah44:3 amu yaitienywa ne kigoyai kotacha anerech, amu kiba kobeel nyamdutik, koot cheptalelisiek che kima kongen, icheget, anan okwek, anan kwanisiekwok." 
Jeremiah44:4 Ago kiayokwok otwogikyuk tugul, che maotik, ang’eete karon mising’ ak ayogu, alenjinok, Bwa, amat oyai kiito samis ne aweche." 
Jeremiah44:5 Ago ma kas, anan koeb it si kobiit koweek kometo yaitienywa, si mata kobeelji nyamdutik cheptalelisiek che ter." 
Jeremiah44:6 Kirong’gei anyun neregekyuk che ng’wonen ak neregekyuk, ak kilalyo eng’ nganasokab Juda ak eng’ ortinwek che bo Jerusalem; ak kigoek karatwek ak kigoguber, ko u kit ne u betusiechu." 
Jeremiah44:7 Mwaei anyun Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Amu nee si oyachi sobonwekwok yaitioni o, si kobiit kigesunenok muren ak kwony, lakwa ak ne reriei, komong’ eng’ Juda, si mang’etwok agot agenge;" 
Jeremiah44:8 amu otagena boisionikab eunekwok, obeeljini nyamdutik cheptalelisiek eng’ emetab Misri, ole kiobe otebe; si kobiit kigeswok, ak oegu che kisasei ak che kichotei eng’ bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Tos kioutie yaitwogikab kwanisiekwok, ak yaitwogikab laitorinikab Juda, ak yaitwogikab osotikwak, ak yaitwogikwok, ak yaitwogikab osotikwok, che kiyai eng’ emetab Juda, ak eng’ ortinwekab Jerusalem?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Ma iming’ingei agoi rani, anan koiyweis, anan kobendate ng’atutikyuk, anan kayomisutikyuk, che kiande taing’wong’, ak eng’ taitab kwanisiekwok." 
Jeremiah44:11 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Ogeero, atokyinok togennyu aibwok yaitiet, agoi agesu Juda tugul." 
Jeremiah44:12 Ak anam che ng’etu che bo Juda, che kitokyigei emetab Misri, koba kotebe oloto, ak kigesu ichek tugul: ibutos eng’ emetab Misri; kigesu ichek eng’ rotwetab chok ak eng’ rubet; begu ichek, kong’eete ne ming’in agoi ne o, eng’ rotwetab chok ak eng’ rubet: ak koek che kichubei, ak che kikwong’e, ak che kisasei, ak che kichotei." 
Jeremiah44:13 Amu abire ichek che menyei emetab Misri, ko u ye kiabir Jerusalem, eng’ rotwetab chok, ak eng’ rubet, ak eng’ koroito;" 
Jeremiah44:14 kot ko machilil anan kong’et agot agenge eng’ che kiga ng’et che bo Juda, che kiba emetab Misri, kotebe oloto, kole koweek kobwa emetab Juda, emet ne machei kole koweekyigei koba komeny: amu mabiitu ne weechigei kobate ne chilili." 
Jeremiah44:15 Kiwol anyun murenik tugul che kiingen kole kibeeljin osotikwak nyamdutik cheptalelisiek che ter, ak kwonyik tugul che kitonondos eng’ ole negit, che ki tuiyet ne o, agot bik tugul che kimenyei emetab Misri, eng’ Patros, kowolji Jeremia kolenji," 
Jeremiah44:16 Magigasun ng’olyondonoto kemwawech eng’ kainetab Jehovah. 
Jeremiah44:17 Ago kiyae iman ng’olyot age tugul ne kagemwa, kele kibeeljini nyamdutik laitoriatab kipsengwet, ne kwondo, ak kerong’jini inendet kagochinoik che kieei, ko u ye kigeyai, achek ak kwanisiekyok, ak laitorinikyok, ak bounikyok, eng’ nganasokab Juda, ak eng’ ortinwek che bo Jerusalem: amu kigitinye eng’ betusiechoto amitwogik che chang’, ak kigichamege, ama kigeer yaitio." 
Jeremiah44:18 Ago koboch ngab kebagakte kebeelji nyamdutik laitoriatab kipsengwet ne kwondo, ak kerong’jini kagochinoik che kieei, korarwech tuguk tugul, ak kigeswech eng’ rotwetab chok ak rubet." 
Jeremiah44:19 Ak ye kigibeeljini nyamdutik laitoriatab kipsengwet ne kwondo, ak kerong’jini kagochinoik che kieei, tos ma kikwang’kwang’ji makatinik che kilosune inendet, ak kerong’ji kagochinoik che kieei, ko maboto manong’otaikyok?" 
Jeremiah44:20 Kimwachi anyun Jeremia bik tugul, murenik, ak kwonyik, agot bik tugul che kiga kowolji, kolenji," 
Jeremiah44:21 Tos kima ibwat Jehovah ichek ama chut metinnyi, nyamdutik che kiobeele eng’ nganasokab Juda, ak eng’ ortinwek che bo Jerusalem, okwek ak kwanisiekwok, laitorinikwok, ak bounikwok, ak bikab emet," 
Jeremiah44:22 kot ko mata komuch Jehovah komuita, amu yaitietab boisionikwok, ak amu tuguk che kiwechei che kioyai? Kiek anyun emeng’wong’ ne kuberot, ak ne kikwong’e, ak ne kisasei, ama menyei chi, ko u ye u rani." 
Jeremiah44:23 Amu kiobeel nyamdutik, ak amu kioyachi Jehovah tengekto, ama ogas it kutitab Jehovah, anan obendate ng’atutikyik, anan kayomisutikyik, anan baornatosiekyik; konyonjok anyun yaitioni ko u ye u rani." 
Jeremiah44:24 Kimwachi kogeny Jeremia bik tugul, koboto kwonyik tugul, kolenji: Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek Juda tugul che omi emetab Misri:" 
Jeremiah44:25 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole, Kiomwa eng’ kutuswekwok, okwek koboto osotikwok, ak oyai kosulda, eng’ eunekwok, olen, Kiyae iman kaarorunosiek che kigiaroru, kebeelji nyamdutik laitoriatab kipsengwet ne kwondo, ak kerong’ji kagochinoik che kieei: ogimit anyun kaarorunosiekwok, ak oyai kaarorunosiekwok." 
Jeremiah44:26 Ogas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek bikab Juda tugul che omenye emetab Misri: Ogeero, koayosie eng’ kainennyu ne o, mwaei Jehovah, ale, ma komwaei kainennyu chi age tugul ne bo Juda eng’ emet tugul ne bo Misri, kole, Ko u ye sobei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Jeremiah44:27 Ogeero, aribe ichek agobo yaitiet, ma agobo ne mie: ak kigesu murenik tugul che bo Juda che mi emetab Misri, eng’ rotwetab chok ak eng’ rubet, agoi kogesgei." 
Jeremiah44:28 Ak koweeigei ichek che chilile rotwetab chok komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, kobwa Juda, che ng’ering’; ak konai tugul che kigong’et che bo Juda, che kiba emetab Misri koba kotebe oloto, kole ng’olyotab ng’o ne isuldoi, nenyu anan nenywa." 
Jeremiah44:29 Ak ni kaborunet eng’ okwek, mwaei Jehovah, ale kabirok eng’ olito, si onai ole isuldoi iman ng’alekyuk koibwok yaitiet:" 
Jeremiah44:30 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, andoi Parao Hopra laitoriatab Misri, eutab bunikyik, ak eutab icheget che cheng’ei sobondanyi; ko u ye kiande Sedekia laitoriatab Juda, eutab Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, bunyondennyi, ak ko ne kicheng’ei sobondanyi." 
Jeremiah45:1 Kimwachi maotiot Jeremia Baruk weritab Neria, ng’olyot ye kisirjin bukuit ng’alechu komwaei Jeremia, eng’ kenyitab ang’wan ne bo Jeoiakim weritab Josia laitoriatab Juda, kolenji," 
Jeremiah45:2 Mwaun Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, inye ee Baruk, ko u ni kole:" 
Jeremiah45:3 Kiimwa ile, Bwa ane! Amu kagotesyi Jehovah arogenet ng’wanindanyu; kaang’et amu tigenoikyuk, amanyoru kamuung’et." 
Jeremiah45:4 Mwachi anyun inendet ko u ni, ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, abute ne kiateech, ak atutu ne kiamin; ak ayae nito eng’ emet komugul." 
Jeremiah45:5 Ko tos, icheng’jinige inye tuguk che eechen? Amecheng’: amu, keero, aipchini yaitiet bik tugul, mwaei Jehovah: ago agonin sobondang’ung’ koek luuleneng’ung’ eng’ komoswek tugul ole iwendi." 
Jeremiah46:1 Kinyonji maotiot Jeremia ng’olyotab Jehovah agobo bororiosiek. 
Jeremiah46:2 Ng’alekab Misri: agobo lugetab Parao-neko laitoriatab Misri, ne kimi ole negite ainet Euprate eng’ Karkemis, ne kibar Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon eng’ kenyitab ang’wan ne bo Jeoiakim weritab Josia, laitoriatab Juda." 
Jeremiah46:3 Ochob long’onik che mengech ak che eechen ak orikyi luget. 
Jeremiah46:4 Ochob mbartanyisiek ak olany, okwek che olanye mbartanyisiek, ak otononse ko kaolaach chepkuloikwak che bo luget; osit ng’otwek, ak olaach ngoroikab luget." 
Jeremiah46:5 Amu nee si ageere ko u noto? Arogendos ak koweechegei let; kagetuatui bikwak che kimen, ak kagomwei kochakta, ama kusegong’: mi kamuiset komosta age tugul, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah46:6 Amat komwei ne chepcheb, anan kochilil chito ne nyigan; kigonach ge ak kobutyo eng’ murot ne bo katam eng’ ole negite ainetab Euprate." 
Jeremiah46:7 Ng’o ni ng’eetei ko u Nael, ne wasegei beekyik ko u ainosiek?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ng’eetei Misri ko u Nael, ak wasegei beekyik ko u ainosiek: ak len, Ang’eete ak atuch emet; ang’eme nganaset ak bik che menyei oloto." 
Jeremiah46:9 Otogoste, okwek, mbartanyisiek; ak ochakte okwek, karikab luget; ak ingoba bik che nyigonen: Kus ak Put, che tinyei long’onik; ak Ludik, che tinyei kwangok ak kong’iei." 
Jeremiah46:10 Amu bo betunoto Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, betutab yaaktaetab mugetut, si koyaaktochi inendet mugetut eng’ bunikyik: ak koamis rotwetab chok ak kobiyo, ak koeei korotikwak kobiyo: amu tinyei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, tiseiywot eng’ emetab murot ne bo katam ole negite ainetab Euprate." 
Jeremiah46:11 Togoste Gilead ak iib mwanik che kinyaise, ee bergeiyandani, cheptab Misri: iboisie kerichek che chang’ buch; mesobe." 
Jeremiah46:12 Kigogas bororiosiek agobo tewernateng’ung’, ak kigonyi emoni rireguk: amu kagonach chito ne nyigan ne nyigan, kagobutyo tuwai." 
Jeremiah46:13 Ni ng’olyot ne kimwachi Jehovah maotiot Jeremia, kole, nyonei Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon ak kobar emetab Misri." 
Jeremiah46:14 Omwaite eng’ Misri, ak obarte eng’ Migdol, ak obarte eng’ Nop ak eng’ Tapanes: olenji, Otononse, ochopge; amu kagoamis rotwetab chok eng’ tabanweguk." 
Jeremiah46:15 Amu nee si kibukto cheguk che kimen? Ma tononso, amu kion Jehovah." 
Jeremiah46:16 Kiriich che chang’, ee, kiibutyi age baragutab age: ak kile, Ong’eetye, ongebe kogeny oldab bikyok, agoi emet ne kigisikyinech kemwee rotwetab chok ne usisiei." 
Jeremiah46:17 Kiwaakyo eng’ oloto, kole, Bolatet kityo Parao laitoriatab Misri; kigobagakta kosiirto betut ne kiga kichob." 
Jeremiah46:18 Mwaei Laitoriat ne kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, kole, Ko u ye asobe, nyonei iman inendet ko u Tabor eng’ tulonok, ak ko u Karmel eng’ ole negite nyanjet." 
Jeremiah46:19 Ee inye chepto ne imenye Misri, monorsechige si iwe keluulin: amu egu Nop karatia, ak kebeel, ama mi chi ne menyei." 
Jeremiah46:20 Roriat ne kararan mising’ Misri; ago kagonyo ng’emisiet ne bunu murot ne bo katam, kagonyo." 
Jeremiah46:21 U kogeny bikyik che kesirei che mi kwenunnyi moek che neriotin; amu kagoweeigei let agichek, kagomwei tugul, ma tononso: amu kanyonji ichek betutab nyalildanywa, betut ne kibirei." 
Jeremiah46:22 Wendi kutinnyi ko u erenet; amu bendi ak luget, ak kobokyine inendet aonok, ko u bik che ebei ketik." 
Jeremiah46:23 Iluuli osnennyi, mwaei Jehovah, agot ngo magimuchi kisiach; amu chang’ kosiir chereng’enyinik, ama iitoksei." 
Jeremiah46:24 Kiteweri cheptab Misri; kindoi eutab bikab murot ne bo katam. 
Jeremiah46:25 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, kole: Ogeero, abire Amon ne bo No, ak Parao, ak Misri, koboto cheptalelisiekyik, ak laitorinikyik; choto ko Parao ak icheget che imang’u inendet:" 
Jeremiah46:26 ak andoi ichek eutab icheget che cheng’ei sobonwekwak, ak eutab Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, ak eutab otwogikyik; ye ibata kemeny ko u betusiek che bo keny, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah46:27 Ago meiywei, ee Jakobo otwogindennyu, anan iarogen, ee Israel; amu, keero, asorun eng’ ole loo, ak asoru iyoteng’ung’ eng’ emet ne kigiluulji; ak koweek Jakobo, ak komuuny ak kotebe kalyet, ama mi chi ne imui." 
Jeremiah46:28 Ameiywei, ee Jakobo otwogindennyu, mwaei Jehovah; amu ami koboten: amu agesu bororiosiek tugul che kigaonjin, ago magesun; ago atigonin eng’ kiruoget, amabagaktoin ama kibirin." 
Jeremiah47:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah maotiot Jeremia agobo Pilistik, kotomo kobar Parao Gasa." 
Jeremiah47:2 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, Tesoksei beek kobunu murot ne bo katam kot koek kererut ainet ne chwaldoi, ak kochwalda emet ak tugul che mi oloto, nganaset koboto che menyei oloto: ak koririo murenik, ak kowaakyo bik tugul che menyei emet." 
Jeremiah47:3 Ye kas kirgirenetab kelyekab mbartanyisiekab bikyik che kimen, eng’ ruaetab karisiekyik che bo luget, eng’ cheetab kelyekab karisiekyik, magusyin kong’ kwanisiek lagokwak amu nyalulnatetab eunek;" 
Jeremiah47:4 amu betut ne nyonei koluulei Pilistik tugul, si koisto eng’ Turo ak Sidon toretindet age tugul ne ng’etu: amu luulei Jehovah Pilistik, che king’et che bo ngegutab Kaptor." 
Jeremiah47:5 Kanyonji Gasa bosta; kagiges Askelon, che king’et che bo atebwenywa: itilegei kot kotianit?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Ee, inye rotwetab chok ne bo Jehovah, tianitu si tun isis? Weekyige chogeng’ung’; imuuny, ak isis." 
Jeremiah47:7 Imuktoi ano isis, igeere ile kigong’atin Jehovah ibar Askelon, ak ngegutab nyanjet? Kigong’at ko u noto." 
Jeremiah48:1 Ng’alekab Moab: Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Bwa eng’ Nebo! Amu kagoek karatia; kagitewer Kiriataim, kageluul: kagitewer Misgab, kagebut." 
Jeremiah48:2 Ma komi kalosunetab Moab; kigochob yaitiet eng’ Hesbon agobo emonoto, ne mwaei kolen, Nyo kigesu si ma koegu bororiet kogeny. Agot inye, ee Madmen, kigonin isis; onin rotwetab chok." 
Jeremiah48:3 Kutitab rirek ne bunu Horonaim, luulet ak ng’emisiet ne o!" 
Jeremiah48:4 Kageng’em Moab; kagoririo lagokyik kot kegas. 
Jeremiah48:5 Amu togostoi ole kitogostoe ne bo Luhit koririoti kotugul; amu kigogas bichiindab rirekab ng’emisiet eng’ ole kichortoege ne bo Horonaim. 
Jeremiah48:6 Omwei, osoru sobonwekwok, ak oige sondit eng’ ong’atet." 
Jeremiah48:7 Amu-i, kiluulin aginye, amu kaimang’u boisioniguk ak konoraiguk: ak keluul Kemos, koboto tisiikyik ak bounikyik." 
Jeremiah48:8 Ak nyonjin luulindet nganaset age tugul, ama mi nganaset ne chilili; lusei kogeny atebwet, ak keng’emei warenget; ko u ye kagomwa Jehovah." 
Jeremiah48:9 Igochi Moab kebebaik, si kobiit kotiriren komwei: ak koek nganasokyik karatwek, ne mami chi ne menyei." 
Jeremiah48:10 Chubot inendet ne machuuljingei boisietab Jehovah, ak chubot inendet ne ete rotwennyi bo chok korotik." 
Jeremiah48:11 Kigotebe Moab kalyet koboch ming’inagtennyi, kigotepto kimnatennyi ko u divaik che mi ak misigikyik, che tom kerong’ eng’ teret age koba teret age: ak tomo keluul: ta kotinyei anyun amu noto anyinyindanyi, ak tom kowalak ng’uunennyi." 
Jeremiah48:12 Ogeer anyun-o, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che ayokyini inendet bik che rong’u, ak koranda inendet; ak korong’ kogesgei eng’ terenikyik, ak kotui sotonikwak." 
Jeremiah48:13 Ak kolilan Moab amu Kemos, ko u ye kiililan gotab Israel agobo Bet-el, ne kiimang’u." 
Jeremiah48:14 Omuktoi ano omwa ole, ki murenik che nyigonen, ak ko ki murenik che kimen eng’ luget?" 
Jeremiah48:15 Kigong’emak Moab, kigotogosta ichek nganasokyik, kigoba barisiet murenikyik che kigilewen, mwaei Laitoriat, ne kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Jeremiah48:16 Karikyi Moab nyalildanywa, ak chogu usisiennyi." 
Jeremiah48:17 Orirji inendet okwek tugul che omi ole negite inendet, ak okwek tugul che ongen kainennyi; omwa ole, Katepto ano si koil siarit ne kim, kirokto ne kararan!" 
Jeremiah48:18 Ee inye chepto ne itebe Dibon, choruge eng’ torornateng’ung’, ak itebi eng’ melelda; amu kagobokyin ng’emindetab Moab, kagong’em irimoiguk." 
Jeremiah48:19 Ee inye ne imenye Aroer, tonon eng’ oret taban, ak itoben: tebe ne mweei, ak chepto ne chilili; ilenji, Kageyai nee?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Kagitewer Moab; amu kagebut: owaach ak oririe; omwaite eng’ Arnon, ole, Kageng’em Moab." 
Jeremiah48:21 Ak kagonyonji kiruoget warenget; kanyonji Holon, Jasa, ak Mepaat;" 
Jeremiah48:22 ak Dibon, Nebo, ak Bet-diblataim;" 
Jeremiah48:23 ak Kiriataim, Bet-gamul, ak Bet-meon;" 
Jeremiah48:24 ak Keriot, Bosra, ak ngnasok tugul che bo emetab Moab, che looen ak che negit." 
Jeremiah48:25 Kageisto kuinetab Moab, ak kagoil eunnyi, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah48:26 Ogochi inendet kobogit; amu kigotororgei kogirinda Jehovah; ak mildoegei Moab kang’undaekyik, ak kerorechin." 
Jeremiah48:27 Tos maek Israel eng’ inye ne kirorechin? Tos kiginyor komi ak chorik? Amu kotugul ye ing’alali agobo inendet, ilelechi metit." 
Jeremiah48:28 Ee okwek che omenye kebenonik; ak oige cheptuget ne teechei keswennyi eng’ tabanwekab kurgetab kebenet. 
Jeremiah48:29 Kigegas menotetab Moab, kele, menot mising’; kaetetab ge, ak menotennyi, ak kachaunennyi bo ge, ak losennyi bo ge." 
Jeremiah48:30 Angen neregekyik, mwaei Jehovah, ale buch; ma yai kiy kachaunaikyik bo ge." 
Jeremiah48:31 Awaache anyun agobo Moab; ee, arirjini mising’ Moab tugul: amu iteeitos ichek agobo bikab Kir-heres." 
Jeremiah48:32 Arirjinin eng’ rirek che siirei che bo Jaser, ee ketitab sabibuk ne bo Sibma: kagolandae nyanjet temeniguk, kiit nyanjetab Jaser: kagonam luuloindet logoeguk che bo kemei, ak ole kitue sabibuk." 
Jeremiah48:33 Ak kageisto kagasetab ge ak boiboiyet, eng’ mbaret ne rurei kot ak eng’ emetab Moab; ak kaagochi kogesgei divaik eng’ ole kituisie: mami ne tiechei eng’ waagatab kagasetab ge; maegu waagandanato waagatab kagasetab ge." 
Jeremiah48:34 Kagotwek ichek koboch rirekab Hesbon agoi Eleale, kot koit Jahas, koboch Soar agoi Horonaim, agoi Eglat-Selesiya: amu tendos beekab Nimrim." 
Jeremiah48:35 Agesu kogeny eng’ Moab, mwaei Jehovah, inendet ne igoitoi korosek eng’ ole toror, ak inendet ne beeljin nyamdutik kanamonikyik." 
Jeremiah48:36 Cheei anyun muguleldanyu agobo Moab ko u ndurerusiek, ak kocheei muguleldanyu ko u ndurerusiek agobo bikab Kir-heres: kagobetyo anyun chang’indab tuguk che kiga konyor." 
Jeremiah48:37 Amu churat metit age tugul, ak kigetil tamnet age tugul: mi eunek tugul berutik che kigitilei, ak kogermenegei kuniok." 
Jeremiah48:38 Mi kateiyosiek gorik tugul barak che bo Moab ak eng’ komosta age tugul eng’ ortinwekyik: amu kiatui Moab ko u teret ne magiboiboitune, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah48:39 Kitepto ano si koyie! Iteitoi ano ichek! Katepto ano si kotukta batai Moab eng’ kalilanet! Egu anyun Moab ne kirorechin ak koek ne kwong’e ichek tugul che mi tabanwekyik. 
Jeremiah48:40 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, tirireni ko u kipsichit, ak kouito kebebaikyik kotokyi Moab." 
Jeremiah48:41 Kageluul Keriot, ak kageche irimoikyik, ak koigei mugulelwekab bik che nyigonen che bo Moab, eng’ betunoto, muguleldab kwondo ne tinyei ng’wanindo ye machei kosigis." 
Jeremiah48:42 Ak keng’em Moab si ma koegu bororiet, amu kigotororgei kogirinda Jehovah." 
Jeremiah48:43 Kabwanjin kaiyweisiet, ak keringet, ak mestet, ee inye ne imenye Moab, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah48:44 Ibutyin keringet, ne mwee kaiyweisiet; ak konam mestet ne togosune keringet: ak aipchini inendet, noto ko Moab, kenyit ne aityini inendet biret, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah48:45 Tonondos che mweei ama tinyei kimnatet eng’ uruetab Hesbon: amu kamong’une mat Hesbon, ak kamong’une liblibenetab mat, Sihon, ak kagobeel luitab Moab, ak metowekwak barak che bo ichek che boldos." 
Jeremiah48:46 Bwa inye, ee Moab! Kagogesgei bikab Kemos: amu kageluul weriguk, ak kageluul tibiguk." 
Jeremiah48:47 Ago aweechi kogeny luulenikab Moab eng’ betusiek che bo let, mwaei Jehovah. Te noto anyun kiruogetab Moab." 
Jeremiah49:1 Ng’alekab lagokab Amon: Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Tos matinyei Israel werik? Matinyei ne namei tugukyik? Amu nee anyun si konam Malkam Gad kobunji, ak komeny bikyik nganasokyik?" 
Jeremiah49:2 Ogeer anyun-o, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, ne aibu waagatab luget kegas agobo Raba ne bo lagokab Amon; ak koek karatia ne irurugot, ak kebeel tibikyik: konam anyun Israel kobunji, ichek che kiga konam inendet, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah49:3 Waach, ee Hesbon, amu kageluul Ai; oririe, okwek tibikab Raba, ogermenege kuniok: oteiye, ak oruaate eng’ ng’otonok; amu kiluulei Malkam, koboto tisiikyik ak bounikyik." 
Jeremiah49:4 Amu nee anyun si itororge eng’ atebwosiek, atebweng’ung’ ne rootei, ee chepto ne ichuchuchege let? Ne kiimang’u konoraikyik, ilen, Nyonjina ng’o?" 
Jeremiah49:5 Ogeero, aibun kaiyweisiet, mwaei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, eng’ ichek tugul che mi tabanweguk; ak keonak, komanda chi age tugul, ama biitu chi ne iyumi inendet ne ombenoti." 
Jeremiah49:6 Ago ye ibata aweegu kogeny che kigeluul che bo lagokab Amon, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah49:7 Ng’alekab Edom: Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni, kole: Tos ma komi ng’omnatet eng’ Teman? Tos kigobet kiruoget eng’ che ng’omen? Tos kigobek ng’omnatenywa?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Omwei, oweege, oung’ege ole ma toogu, ee okwek che omenye Dedan; amu aipchini inendet nyalildab Esau, eng’ betut ne aityini inendet biret." 
Jeremiah49:9 Ngot kobwanjin kayumikab sabibuk, ko tos mabagachi turonikab sabibuk? Ngot kobwanjin chorik kemoi, ko tos mabarisiei kot konyor che yamei?" 
Jeremiah49:10 Ago kiayai Esau koek ne matinyei kiy, kiang’any komoswekyik che bo ung’ot, ama komuchi kounygei: kigeng’em iyotennyi, ak tupchosiekyik, ak bikab kokwennyi, ama komi inendet." 
Jeremiah49:11 Bagakte lagoguk che matinyei kwanisiek, si arib kosopcho; ak ingomang’wa mosogiguk." 
Jeremiah49:12 Amu mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, eeisei iman che kima ko nenywa koeeise kikombet; ak tos i ne chilili si ma kibirin? Mechilili, kibirin, ago iee iman." 
Jeremiah49:13 Amu kiayosiechige, mwaei Jehovah, ale, Egu Bosra ne kikwong’e; ne kichotei, ak karatia, ak ne kisasei; ak koek nganasokyik tugul karatwek kotugul." 
Jeremiah49:14 Koagas ng’alek che bunu Jehovah, ak kagiyokto chito kwo bororiosiek, kolenji, Oyumge, ak obokyi, ak ong’eetye oyai luget." 
Jeremiah49:15 Amu, keero, kiayain iegu ne ming’in eng’ bororiosiek, ak iegu ne sasei bik." 
Jeremiah49:16 Ago kigoberberin menotetab muguleldang’ung’, amu kamuiseng’ung’, ee inye ne imenye ole kibetak eng’ ruandet, ne iname walitab tulwet: nganda iteeche kesweng’ung’ eng’ barak ko u kipsichit, arorogun eng’ oloto, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah49:17 Ak egu Edom ne kikwong’e: kwong’ei age tugul ne siirtoi eng’ yoto, ak koreny korotwekyik tugul." 
Jeremiah49:18 Ko u ye kigigabui Sodom ak Gomora ak nganasok che ki negite oloto, mwaei Jehovah, mamenyei chi oloto, ama tebe oloto lakwa ne bo chi." 
Jeremiah49:19 Ogeero, togosu inendet ko u ng’etundo kobunu Jordan ko kanyi beek mising’ kobargei ak meng’otet ne kim: ago achee, aone komwei inendet; ak age tugul ne kileweni, agochini koboi inendet: amu ng’o ne kegerge? Ak ng’o ne ng’atwa betut? Ak ng’o mestowot ne tononi eng’ tainnyu?" 
Jeremiah49:20 Ogas anyun kiruogetab Jehovah ne kigoyachi Edom; ak chobutikyik che kigochob agobo bik che menyei Teman: ichuuti ichek iman, che mengechen che bo akwetab kechirek; yaei iman meng’otenywa koek karatia agobo ichek." 
Jeremiah49:21 Botani ng’ony amu cheetab kabutenywa; mi waagat, ne kegasei cheennyi eng’ Nyanjet ne Birir." 
Jeremiah49:22 Ogeero, togosu inendet ak kotirireni ko u kipsichit, ak kouito kebebaikyik kotokyi Bosra: ak koigei eng’ betunoto mugulelwekab bik che nyigonen che bo Edom, muguleldab kwondo ne tinyei ng’wanindo ye machei kosigis." 
Jeremiah49:23 Ng’alekab Damasko. Kagolilan Hamat, ak Arpad; amu kogogas ng’alek che yaach, kogotanuiso: mi arogenet nyanjet; maimuchi kosis." 
Jeremiah49:24 Kogonyalul Damasko, kawelelgei komwei, kanam inendet botanet: kanam inendet bichiindo ak arogenosiek, ko u kwondo ye machei kosigis." 
Jeremiah49:25 Katepto ano si ma kimeto nganasetab kalosunet, nganasetab boiboiyennyu!" 
Jeremiah49:26 Ibutos anyun neranikyik eng’ ortinwekyik, ak kigochin kosisyo murenik tugul che bo luget eng’ betunoto, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Jeremiah49:27 Ak anaam mat eng’ irimetab Damasko, ak kobeel gorikab laitoriat, che bo Ben- hadad." 
Jeremiah49:28 Ng’alekab Kedar, ak che bo bounatosiekab Hasor, che kibar Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon. Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ong’eetye, otogoste Kedar, ak oluul lagokab kong’asis." 
Jeremiah49:29 Luulei emaisiekwak ak akwotisiekwak che bo kechirek; ak koluul angokwak kobunji, ak terenikwak tugul, ak tambesikwak: ak kowaakyi, kolenji, Mi kamuiset komosta age tugul." 
Jeremiah49:30 Omwei, oombenote oba ole loo, oung’ege ole ma toogu, ee okwek che omenye Hasor, mwaei Jehovah; amu kairuoch Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon agobo okwek, ak kagobwat ng’olyot agobo okwek." 
Jeremiah49:31 Ong’eetye, otogoste ole mi bororiet ne tinyei kalyet, ne meng’isiei ama kereri met, mwaei Jehovah: ne matinyei ormarichok anan temeleiywek, che menyei ichegei." 
Jeremiah49:32 Ak keluul tambesikwak, ak koek barunenik tukwak che chang’: ak aiyeste koba komoswek tugul icheget che biori metowekwak; ak aibu nyalildanywa eng’ komoswekwak, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah49:33 Ak koek Hasor ole menyei lelwek, ak koek karatia koigeny: mamenyei chi oloto, ama tebe oloto lakwa ne bo chi." 
Jeremiah49:34 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah maotiot Jeremia agobo Elam eng’ taunetab laitornatetab Sedekia laitoriatab Juda, kolenji," 
Jeremiah49:35 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Keero, airie kwangetab Elam, ne o ne bo kamugenywa." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ak aipchi Elam koriswek ang’wan che bunu luukwek ang’wan che bo kipsengwet, ak aiyeste ichek koba koriswechoto tugul; ama biitu bororiet ole maitei che kigion che bo Elam." 
Jeremiah49:37 Ak agochi Elam koarogen eng’ taitab bunikwak, ak eng’ taitab icheget che cheng’ei sobonwekwak: ak aipchi ichek yaitiet, neregekyuk che ng’wonen, mwaei Jehovah; ak ayokte rotwetab chok kosub ichek, kot agesu:" 
Jeremiah49:38 ak alum ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet eng’ Elam, ak ang’em eng’ oloto laitoriat ak bounik, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah49:39 Ago aweechi kogeny luulenikab Elam eng’ betusiek che bo let, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah50:1 Ni ng’olyot ne kimwa Jehovah eng’ maotiot Jeremia agobo Babulon, agobo emetab Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah50:2 Omwaite eng’ bororiosiek ak obarte, ak onamji barak songoliet; obarte, amouny: ole, Kageluul Babulon, kagigochi Bel kolilan, kagoarogen Merodak; kagigochi kanamonikyik kolilanso, kagoarogenso kanamonikyik." 
Jeremiah50:3 Amu nyonei bororiet eng’ murot ne bo katam kobokyin, ne yaei emennyi koek karatia, ama menyei chi oloto: kagomwei, kagoba tugul, chi ak tiony." 
Jeremiah50:4 Bwanei eng’ betusiechoto ak eng’ betunoto, lagokab Israel, icheget ak lagokab Juda, mwaei Jehovah; bendi koririoti, ak kocheng’oti Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa." 
Jeremiah50:5 Teeboti agobo ole teptoi Sion kotokyigei oloto, kolen, Obwa, ak onamge ak Jehovah eng’ kayomiset ne bo koigeny ne magiutie." 
Jeremiah50:6 U bikyuk kechirek che betyotin: kiibeet mestowekwak ichek, kiimaas eng’ tulonok: kigoombeniot kong’eete tulwet ne o agoi ne ming’in, kigoutie oldanywa ole imuung’e." 
Jeremiah50:7 Kigoam ichek bik tugul che kinyor ichek: ak kimwa bunikwak kole, Ma kilel, amu kigoyachi ichek tengekto Jehovah, meng’otetab imanda, Jehovah ne kamang’unetab kwanisiekwak." 
Jeremiah50:8 Omwei eng’ Babulon, ak omande eng’ emetab Kaldeik, ak oige kwesik eng’ taitab akwotisiekab kechirek." 
Jeremiah50:9 Amu, ogeero, ang’eeti tuiyetab bororiosiek che eechen che bunu emetab murot ne bo katam kobokyi Babulon: ak kotet luget kotokyigei emonoto; kiluulei eng’ oloto: u kipchabonikwak che bo chito ne nyigan, ne mwogindet; mami ne weeksei buch." 
Jeremiah50:10 Ak keluul Kaldea: biyong’dos tugul che luulei, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah50:11 Amu ogasige, amu oboiboi, ee okwek che obokyini borotennyu, amu ourerendosi ko u roriat ne tiechei bek, ak oteei ko u mbartanyisiek che kimen;" 
Jeremiah50:12 ililani komet mising’: toptoben inendet ne kisichok: ogeero, egu inendet ne letu eng’ tugul che bo bororiosiek, ong’atet, emet ne yaamat, ak surkwen." 
Jeremiah50:13 Magimenyei amu neregekab Jehovah, ago egu karatia mising’: kwong’ei age tugul ne siirei ole negite Babulon, ak koreny korotwekyik tugul." 
Jeremiah50:14 Otetge eng’ luget obar Babulon, eng’ komoswek tugul, okwek tugul che oriiche kwanget; omwok, amotuuch kipchabonik: amu kigoyachi tengekto Jehovah." 
Jeremiah50:15 Owaage eng’ komoswek tugul; kagochamdagei; kagolulyo irimoikyik, kagolulyo inatusiekyik: amu nito yaaktaetab mugetut ne bo Jehovah; oyaakyi mugetut; ko u ye kiyai, oyachi inendet ko u noto." 
Jeremiah50:16 Oiste letaindet eng’ Babulon, ak inendet ne kesisie chepkeswet eng’ betusiekab kesisiet: wendi chi age tugul eng’ ichek oldab bikyik, ak komwechi chi age tugul emennyi, amu kaiyweisietab rotwetab chok ne usisiei." 
Jeremiah50:17 U Israel kechirek che kigoiyesta; kigoon ng’etunyik inendet: kisib koam inendet laitoriatab Asuria; ak eng’ let koiri kowekyik Nebukadresar, nito laitoriatab Babulon." 
Jeremiah50:18 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: Ogeero, abire laitoriatab Babulon ak emennyi, ko u ye kiabir laitoriatab Asuria." 
Jeremiah50:19 Ak aweech Israel kogeny konyo ole agetye, ak koyagisie Karmel ak Basan, ak kobiyo sobondanyi eng’ tulonokab Epraim ak eng’ Gilead." 
Jeremiah50:20 Kicheng’ei tengektab Israel eng’ betusiechoto ak eng’ kenyisiechoto, mwaei Jehovah, ama kinyoru; ak kicheng’ei tengekwogikab Juda, ama kinyoru: amu anyochini kaat ichek che abagaktoi kong’et." 
Jeremiah50:21 Togoste emetab Merataim, obarge, obarge ak nganasanato, ak bik che menyei Pekod: bar ak ing’em igesu iyotenywa, mwaei Jehovah, ak iyai ko u tugul che kaang’atin." 
Jeremiah50:22 Mitei emet bolatetab boriet, ak ne bo ng’emisiet ne o." 
Jeremiah50:23 Kibetita ano ak koildo ano kiriswetab ng’ony komugul! Kiegundo ano Babulon karatia eng’ bororiosiek! 
Jeremiah50:24 Kaariich mestet agobo inye, ak kageluulin kogeny, ee Babulon, ak kima inai: kogenyorun, kogenamin kogeny, amu kioborie ak Jehovah." 
Jeremiah50:25 Kogoyat Jehovah ole konore karikyik che bo luget, ak kogonem karikab neregekyik: amu tinyei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, boisiet ne yaei eng’ emetab Kaldeik." 
Jeremiah50:26 Obwa obarge ak inendet che obunu kiwotosiek che looen, oyat chogenikyik: oyum inendet ko u karurugutik ak ong’em ogesu: amat kong’et kiy nenyi." 
Jeremiah50:27 Obar kirugikyik tugul; ochoorte koba ole kieng’se: bwa ichek! Amu kagoit betunywa, betut ne ityin ichek biret." 
Jeremiah50:28 Kutitab ichek che mweei ak kochililyo komong’ eng’ emetab Babulon, si kobiit kibarta eng’ Sion yaaktaetab mugetut ne bo Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, yaaktaetab mugetut ne bo hekalunnyi." 
Jeremiah50:29 Kuur mwogik tugul kobargei ak Babulon, ichek tugul che riichei kwangok koyiem komoswekyik; amengochilil agot agenge eng’ oloto: yaakyi mugetut ko u boisionikyik; oyachi ko u tugul che kigoyai: amu kigomenji Jehovah, kigomenji Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Jeremiah50:30 Ibutos anyun nerenikyik eng’ ortinwekyik, ak kigochin kosisyo murenikyik tugul che bo luget eng’ betunoto, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah50:31 Keero, aborienen, inyendet ne i menotio, mwaei Kiptaiyat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: amu kait betung’ung’, betut ne aityinin biret." 
Jeremiah50:32 Ak koriichgei kobut menotiot, ama mi chi ne ing’eeti inendet: ak anaam mat eng’ nganasokyik, ak kobeel tuguk che mitei komoswekyik." 
Jeremiah50:33 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Kiusei lagokab Israel koboto lagokab Juda: ak kogiich bik tugul che kiluulei ichek; esioi kochunda ichek koba. 
Jeremiah50:34 Kim Katiagindenywa; kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: ng’alaldochin inendet ichek komie, si kobiit kogochi kamuung’et ng’ony, ak koiim bik che menyei Babulon." 
Jeremiah50:35 Mi rotwetab chok baragutab Kaldeik, mwaei Jehovah, ak eng’ bik che menyei Babulon, ak eng’ bounikyik, ak eng’ bikyik che ng’omen." 
Jeremiah50:36 Mi rotwetab chok baragutab bik che ichaugei, si koberberitu: mi rotwetab chok baragutab bikyik che nyigonen, ak koarogenso ichek." 
Jeremiah50:37 Mi rotwetab chok baragutab mbartanyisiekwak, ak eng’ karisiekwak che bo luget, ak eng’ baragutab bik tugul che kiburuigei che mi koboto inendet, ak koigei ichek kwonyik: mi rotwetab chok baragutab konoraikyik, ak kereb choto." 
Jeremiah50:38 Tebe kemeut baragutab ainosiekyik, ak kotenyo: amu emonito ko emetab kanamonik che kigiwai, ak kigoyai kanamonikwak ichek koek kibion." 
Jeremiah50:39 Menyei anyun oloto tiong’ikab ong’atet koboto suik, ak komeny tiong’ikab songolik oloto: ama kimenyei oloto koigeny; ama kimenyei koboch ibinda age agoi ibinda age." 
Jeremiah50:40 Ko u ye kigabui Kamuktaindet Sodom ak Gomora ak nganasok che ki negite oloto, mwaei Jehovah; u noto anyun mamenyei chi oloto, ama tebe oloto lakwa ne bo chi." 
Jeremiah50:41 Ogeero, bunu bik murot ne bo katam; koboto bororiet ne o, ak king’eeti laitorinik che chang’ che bunu komoswek che looen che bo ng’ony." 
Jeremiah50:42 Tinyei kwangok ak ng’otwek; kolgolen, ama tinyei rirenet; morori ko u nyanjet, ak lanyei mbartanyisiek; chobot age tugul ko u chito ne wendi luget, kobokyinin, ee cheptab Babulon." 
Jeremiah50:43 Kigogas laitoriatab Babulon kalosunenywa, ak nyaluldos eunekyik: kanam inendet bichiindo, ak ng’wanindo ko u ne bo kwondo ne machei kosigis." 
Jeremiah50:44 Ogeero, togosu inendet ko u ng’etundo kobunu Jordan ko kanyi beek mising’ kobargei ak meng’otet ne kim: ago achee aone komwei inendet: ak age tugul ne kileweni, agochini koboi inendet: amu ng’o ne kegerge, ak ko ng’o ne ng’atwa betut? Ak ko ng’o mestowot ne tononi eng’ tainnyu?" 
Jeremiah50:45 Ogas anyun kiruogetab Jehovah, ne kigoyachi Babulon; ak chobutikyik che kigochob agobo emetab Kaldeik: ichuuti ichek iman, agot che mengechen che bo akwetab kechirek; yaei iman meng’otenywa koek karatia agobo ichek." 
Jeremiah50:46 Botani ng’ony eng’ cheetab luget ne kiluule Babulon, ak kigasei waagandenywa eng’ bororiosiek." 
Jeremiah51:1 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, ang’eetyini Babulon koboto bik che menyei Leb-kamai, usonet ne ng’emisiei." 
Jeremiah51:2 Ak ayokyi Babulon toek che sesei; kowong’ tugul che mi emennyi: amu baregei ichek ak inendet eng’ betutab nyalilda kobunu komoswek tugul. 
Jeremiah51:3 Amat koriich kwangennyi mwogindet, amat kong’eet kolaachi ngorietab luget: amorire neranikyik; ong’em lugennyi tugul ogesu." 
Jeremiah51:4 Ak kobutyo ko kagobek eng’ emetab Kaldeik ko kagetoor eng’ ortinwekyik. 
Jeremiah51:5 Amu magimetoi Israel, anan Juda, mametoi ichek Kamuktaindenywa, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek; nganda nyiitat emenywa ng’ogisto ne kiyachi Inendet ne Tilil ne bo Israel." 
Jeremiah51:6 Omwei eng’ Babulon, ingosor chi age tugul sobondanyi; amat ongobarak tengektanyi: amu betutab yaaktaetab mugetut ne bo Jehovah; yaakyin inendet mugetut." 
Jeremiah51:7 Ki kikombetab tahabu Babulon eng’ eutab Jehovah, ne kiigochi ng’ony komugul kobogit: kigoee bororiosiek divaikyik; amei anyun iywek bororiosiek amu noto." 
Jeremiah51:8 Kagobut Babulon kochakta, ak keng’em: oteeiye amu inendet; oipchi mwanik che kinyae ng’wanindanyi, tamangab kosob inendet." 
Jeremiah51:9 Kata kimache kisoob Babulon, ago ma sob: omete inendet, ak ongebe, kwo chi tugul emennyi: amu itei kipsengwet kiruogennyi, ak kaginamji barak agoi koit kipsengwet." 
Jeremiah51:10 Kagomoong’ Jehovah imandanyo: obwa, kibarte eng’ Sion boisionikab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo." 
Jeremiah51:11 Olit kipchabonik; onam long’onik komie: kagong’eet Jehovah tamirmirikab laitorinikab Medik; amu chobennyi ko kogirinda Babulon, kong’em: amu yaaktaetab mugetut ne bo Jehovah, yaaktaetab mugetut ne bo hekalunnyi." 
Jeremiah51:12 Onamji barak songoliet, otokyi irimoikab Babulon, ogimit ripset, onde ribik, ochob bik che sapchin: amu kagochob Jehovah ak koyai kit ne kimwa agobo bik che menyei Babulon." 
Jeremiah51:13 Ee, inye ne menyei beek che chang’, ne chang’ mising’ konoraiguk, kait kagesuneng’ung’ karogendoetab mageng’ung’." 
Jeremiah51:14 Kagoyosiechigei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, kole, Anyiitin iman bik, che te tinapchet; ak kowaagenen ichek." 
Jeremiah51:15 Kiyai ng’ony eng’ kamuktaennyi, kiigimit ng’onyuni eng’ ng’omnatennyi, ak kiito kipsengwetisiek eng’ naennyi:" 
Jeremiah51:16 ye twek, kobiit wasetab ge ne bo beek eng’ kipsengwetisiek, ak kogochi kibungweret kotogosta eng’ tabanwekab ng’ony: yachin ropta kalyelosiek, imoong’u usonet eng’ ole kigigonore." 
Jeremiah51:17 Kergeitu chito age tugul ak tiondo ne matinyei naet; ililane kitang’indet age tugul ne bo tahabu kanamwennyi ne kigiwai: amu lembeita kanamwennyi ne kigitany, ama tinyei kabuset." 
Jeremiah51:18 Buch choto, boisietab ng’alset: betos eng’ betut ne ityin birenywa." 
Jeremiah51:19 Ma u chuto kebebertab Jakobo; amu bo tai inendet eng’ tuguk tugul; ak Israel ko bororietab borotennyi: kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek. 
Jeremiah51:20 Inye ko i aiywennyu ne bo boriet, ak karikab luget: ak atonatoni bororiosiek eng’ inye; ak abar bounatosiek eng’ inye;" 
Jeremiah51:21 ak atonatoni eng’ inye mbartanyit koboto chito ne lanyei; 
Jeremiah51:22 ak atonatoni eng’ inye karitab luget koboto chito ne lanyei; ak atonatoni eng’ inye muren ak kwony; ak atonatoni eng’ inye boiyo ak neran; ak atonatoni eng’ inye muren ak tie; 
Jeremiah51:23 ak atonatoni eng’ inye mestowot ak akwennyi; ak atonatoni eng’ inye kabatindet koboto eikyik che bo chogit; ak atonatoni eng’ inye bounik ak kiptainik. 
Jeremiah51:24 Ak ayaakyini Babulon ak bik tugul che menyei Kaldea, yaitienywa tugul ne kiyai eng’ Sion eng’ taing’wong’, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah51:25 Keero, aborienen, ee inye tulwet ne ing’emisiei, mwaei Jehovah, ne ng’emei ng’ony komugul: ak achuul eunnyu atokyin, ak amilden eng’ ruandosiek, ak ayain iegu tulwet ne kigolal." 
Jeremiah51:26 Ak maibei eng’ inye koita ne bo luita, anan koib koita ne bo lumeiywek; ago iegu karatia koigeny, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah51:27 Onamji barak songoliet eng’ emet, oguut iriaget eng’ bororiosiek, ochob bororiosiek kobargei ak inendet, oguur bounatosiekab Ararat, ak che bo Mini ak che bo Askenas, kobargei ak inendet: olewen kiptaiyat ne baregei ak inendet; ogetu mbartanyisiek che u tinapchet." 
Jeremiah51:28 Ochob bororiosiek kobargei ak inendet, laitorinikab Medik, bounikyik, ak kiptainikyik tugul, koboto emet tugul ne bo bounatennyi." 
Jeremiah51:29 Ak kobotan emet ak komi eng’ ng’wanindo: amu tonondos chobutikab Jehovah che kichobei agobo Babulon, si kobiit koyai emetab Babulon koek karatia, ole mamenyei chi." 
Jeremiah51:30 Kigometo boriet murenikab Babulon che nyigonen, tebyei eng’ irimoikwak; kigobek nyiganatenywa; kagoigei kwonyik: kagobeel komoswekwak che menyei; kagoilyo temeleiywekyik." 
Jeremiah51:31 Labati chito ne kiyoktoi koib baronok kwo kotuiyo ak age, ak kolabati chito ne kiyoktoi koib ng’alek kwo kotuiyo ak age, si koborji laitoriatab Babulon kolenji, kagenam nganasennyi eng’ komosta age tugul:" 
Jeremiah51:32 kagenam tabarwek, ak kagebeel morong’iot, ak kagoarogenso murenikab luget." 
Jeremiah51:33 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u ni kole: u cheptab Babulon ruanyut ne kiborse eng’ betut ne kitiechei; tomo kitigin, si konyonji betutab kesisiet." 
Jeremiah51:34 Kigoama Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, kigotuatua, kigoyaa aek teret ne mami kiy, kigolugua ko u maswetit, kigonyiit moennyi tugukyuk che anyiny; kigotoorja sang’." 
Jeremiah51:35 Mwaei chi ne menyei Sion kole, Ingotebe baragutab Babulon koromnatet ne kigiyaiywa ak ne kigiyachi bikyuk; ak komwaei Jerusalem kole, Ingotebe baragutab bik che menyei Kaldea, korotikyuk." 
Jeremiah51:36 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole, Keero, ang’alaldoun, ayaaktoun mugetut; ak ayaam nyanjennyi, ak agochi koteny kondametunnyi ne bo beek." 
Jeremiah51:37 Ak koek Babulon karurugutik, ole menyei lelwek, ne kikwong’e, ak ne kirenyei, ne mamenyei chi." 
Jeremiah51:38 Borisendos ko u ng’etunyik che barnotik; morortos ko u arekab ng’etunyik. 
Jeremiah51:39 Ye tinyei tawirenet ichek, ayachini igortanywa, ak agochi ichek kobogityo, si koboiboitu, ak koruiyo ruondo ne bo agoi, ama kosu, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah51:40 Amutu ichek ko u arekab kechir che bendi ole kieng’se, ko u mengichik koboto kwesik." 
Jeremiah51:41 Haa, kageluul Sesak! Ak kagenam kalosunetab ng’ony komugul! Kagoek Babulon karatia eng’ bororiosiek!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Kagonyonji nyanjet Babulon: kagotuch inendet chang’indab mildaetab ge ne bo beekyik. 
Jeremiah51:43 Kagoek nganasokyik karatia, emet ne yaamat, ak ko surkwen, emet ne mamenyei chi, ama bunei oloto lakwa ne bo chi." 
Jeremiah51:44 Aruokyini Bel eng’ Babulon, ak amoong’u eng’ kutinnyi kit ne kigolugui; ama korootei bororiosiek ko u beek kobendi oldanyi kogeny: ee, luulei irimetab Babulon." 
Jeremiah51:45 Omong’une bikyuk, kwenunnyi, ak osoruge chi tugul oistoege neregek che ng’wonen che bo Jehovah." 
Jeremiah51:46 Amongotanuiso mugulelwekwok, anan oiywei ng’alekab bik che kigasei eng’ emet; amu bwanei ng’alek eng’ kenyit age, ak ye ibata kobwa ng’alechato eng’ kenyit age, ak koromnatet eng’ emet, koborio bounindet age ak bounindet age." 
Jeremiah51:47 Ogeero, bwanei anyun betusiek che tun aruokyini kanamonik che kigiwai che bo Babulon, ak kolilan emonoto komugul; ak kobutyo eng’ kwenunnyi bikyik tugul che kigibar." 
Jeremiah51:48 Yeityo kotien eng’ boiboiyet kipsengwet ak ng’ony, ak tugul che mi oloto, agobo Babulon; amu bwanei bik che luulei inendet kobunu murot ne bo katam, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah51:49 Ko u ye kibarei Babulon Israel kobutyo, ko u noto ibutos eng’ Babulon bik che tun kibarei che bo emet tugul." 
Jeremiah51:50 Oba okwek, che kiochilile rotwetab chok, amotonon; obwat Jehovah omi ole loo, ak obwat Jerusalem." 
Jeremiah51:51 Kililandosi, amu kigegas chotisiet; kigotuch togochikyok kalilanet; amu kagobwa toek komoswek che tililen che bo gotab Jehovah." 
Jeremiah51:52 Ogeero, bwanei anyun betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che karuokyini kanamonikyik che kigiwai; ak kotigendos eng’ emennyi tugul bik che kigiguoten." 
Jeremiah51:53 Agot nda togosta Babulon agoi kipsengwet, ak agot nda ng’ot tororindab kimnatennyi, ko ui tugul kobunwa bik che luulei inendet, mwaei Jehovah." 
Jeremiah51:54 Waagatab rirek ne bunu Babulon, ak ne bo ng’emisiet ne o ne bunu emetab Kaldeik!" 
Jeremiah51:55 Amu luulei Jehovah Babulon, ak kong’em kutit ne bunu oloto; morortos beekwak che mildogei ko u beek che chang’, kagemwa bolatetab twegunenywa:" 
Jeremiah51:56 amu kagonyonji inendet luulindet, kagonyonji Babulon, ak kagenam murenikyik che nyigonen, kagetonaton kwangokwak: amu Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet ne bo yaaktaetab mugetut, yaaktoi iman mugetut." 
Jeremiah51:57 Ak agochini kobogityo bounikyik ak murenikyik che ng’omen, koboto kiruogikyik ak kiptainikyik, ak murenikyik che nyigonen; ak koruiyo ruondo ne bo agoi, ama kogosu, mwaei Laitoriat, ne kainennyi ko Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Jeremiah51:58 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Kigabui irimoik che tebeesen che bo Babulon kigesu, ak kebeel ormarichokyik che koen; ak kobirtogei bik buch, ak kobirtogei bororiosiek amu mat; ak kong’eetyo." 
Jeremiah51:59 Ni ng’olyot ne king’atyi maotiot Jeremia Seraia weritab Neria, weritab Maseia, ye kibendi Babulon koboto Sedekia, laitoriatab Juda eng’ kenyitab ang’wan ne bo laitornatennyi. Ki ribindet ne o Seraia eng’ gotab laitoriat." 
Jeremiah51:60 Ak kisirji Jeremia bukuit yaitiet tugul ne tun nyonjin Babulon, ng’alechuto tugul che kigisir agobo Babulon." 
Jeremiah51:61 Ak kilenji Jeremia Seraia, Ye tun iit Babulon, ko kanyol isoman ng’alechuto tugul," 
Jeremiah51:62 ak ile, Ee Jehovah, kiimwa agobo olito, ile iistoi, si mameny chi age tugul olito, chi anan ko tiony, ago egu karatia koigeny." 
Jeremiah51:63 Ak ye kaisoman bukuini igesu, iratyi koita, ak iwirji ainetab Euprate:" 
Jeremiah51:64 ak imwa ile, Imaluuchi anyun beek Babulon ko u noto, ama kong’eetei kogeny amu yaitiet ne tun aipchini; ak kong’etyo. Igesunegei yuto ng’alekab Jeremia." 
Jeremiah52:1 Ki bo kenyisiek tiptem ak agenge Sedekia ye kitau kolaitorani; ak kilaitoran kenyisiek taman ak agenge eng’ Jerusalem: ak kainetab kamennyi ko ki Hamutal cheptab Jeremia ne bo Libna. 
Jeremiah52:2 Ak kiyai yaitiet eng’ taitab Jehovah, ko u tugul che kiga koyai Jeoiakim." 
Jeremiah52:3 Ak kibiitune tuguchoto neregekab Jehovah eng’ Jerusalem ak Juda kot kotimda ichek koba eng’ tainnyi. Ak kiingelelji Sedekia laitoriatab Babulon. 
Jeremiah52:4 Ak eng’ kenyitab sogol ne bo laitornatennyi, eng’ arawetab taman, eng’ betutab taman ne bo arawanato, konyo Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, inendet ak lugennyi tugul, kobokyi Jerusalem, ak koteech kotokyigei nganaset; ak kiteech ichek irimoik koyiem." 
Jeremiah52:5 Koyiem anyun nganaset agoi kenyitab taman ak agenge ne bo laitoriat Sedekia. 
Jeremiah52:6 King’wanit rubet eng’ nganasanato eng’ arawetab ang’wan eng’ betutab sogol ne bo arawanato, ne kima komi amitwogik che amei bik eng’ emet." 
Jeremiah52:7 Kobut anyun bik irimetab nganaset, ak kimwei murenik tugul che bo luget kemoi kobun oretab ormarichet ne kimi kwenutab inatusiek aeng’, ne kimi ole negite seremutab laitoriat; (kigayiem Kaldeik nganaset:) ak kibun ichek oretab Araba." 
Jeremiah52:8 Ago kion lugetab Kaldeik laitoriat, ak kinam Sedekia eng’ warengosiekab Jeriko; ak kiyesta lugennyi tugul kometo inendet." 
Jeremiah52:9 Komut anyun laitoriat, ak komut kwo ole mi laitoriatab Babulon eng’ Ribla eng’ emetab Hamat; ak kiiruokyi inendet." 
Jeremiah52:10 Ak kibar laitoriatab Babulon werikab Sedekia kogeerei inendet: kibar kogeny bounik tugul che bo Juda eng’ Ribla. 
Jeremiah52:11 Ak kibar konyekab Sedekia; ak korat laitoriatab Babulon inendet eng’ sirimwek, ak komut inendet kwo Babulon, ak kitoorji inendet korgoret agoi betutab meennyi." 
Jeremiah52:12 Ak eng’ arawetab mut, eng’ betutab taman ne bo arawanato, ne ki kenyitab taman ak sogol ne bo laitoriat Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, konyo Nebusaradan, kiptaiyatab ribik, ne kitononi eng’ taitab laitoriatab Babulon, agoi Jerusalem:" 
Jeremiah52:13 ak kibeel gotab Jehovah, ak gotab laitoriat; ak gorik tugul che bo Jerusalem, got age tugul ne o, ko kibeel." 
Jeremiah52:14 Ak kibut luget tugul ne bo Kaldeik ne kimi koboto kiptaiyatab ribik, irimoik tugul che bo Jerusalem, komoswek tugul." 
Jeremiah52:15 Yeityo komut koluul Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik bik che kibananok mising’, ak bik che kiga ng’et eng’ nganaset, ak che kiga chililso, che kiigochigei laitoriatab Babulon, ak bikab tuiyet che kigong’et." 
Jeremiah52:16 Ago kibagakta Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik, bik che kibananok mising’ eng’ emet, koek ribikab sabibuk ak koek semberik." 
Jeremiah52:17 Ak kitui Kaldeik tolochikab sugunonik che kimi gotab Jehovah, ak ng’echerok che kitebe tuguk ak nyanjet ne bo sugunwet ne kimi gotab Jehovah, ak koib sugunonik tugul che bo tuguchoto koba Babulon." 
Jeremiah52:18 Ak kiib terenik, ak kechigosiek che eechen, ak magasisiek che kitile ole lalei eng’ taisiek, koboto tabok ak kechigosiek, ak terenik tugul che bo sugunonik che kiboisie." 
Jeremiah52:19 Ak kikombok, ak tuguk che kiibe mat, ak tabok, ak terenik, ak kelyekab taisiek, ak kechigosiek, ak tabok; ak kiib kiptaiyatab ribik tuguk che kigiyae tahabu, ko tahabu, ak tuguk che kigiyae feda, ko feda." 
Jeremiah52:20 Tolochichoto, koboto nyanjanato agenge, ak itonwek taman ak aeng’ che bo sugunonik che bo kirugik, che kimitei kureretab ng’echerok che kitebe, che kiga yachi laitoriat Solomon gotab Jehovah: ma naoksei nyigisindab sugunonikab tuguchuto tugul." 
Jeremiah52:21 Ago eng’ tolochik, koindab tononetab agenge ko ki kakwautik taman ak sisiit che bo eut; ak ki kakwautik taman ak aeng’ che bo eut nyigisindab toloato ngeyiem; ak ki morik ang’wan nyigisindanyi ngikwa: kigiyai kioto koek soiyet." 
Jeremiah52:22 Ak kimi metitab sugunwet baragunnyi; ak koindab tononetab metoto ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut, koboto karik che regerotin, ak logoek che kimi metoto komoswek tugul, che ki bo tugul sugunonik: ak kitinyei toloita ne bo aeng’ agine tuguk che u choto, koboto logoek." 
Jeremiah52:23 Ak kimi logoek tamanwogik sogolu ak lo komoswekyik; ki bogol agenge logoechoto tugul che kimi karichato regerotin eng’ komoswek tugul. 
Jeremiah52:24 Ak kiimut kiptaiyatab ribik Seraia tisiindet ne o, ak Sepania tisiindet ne bo aeng’, ak ribik somok che kiribei kurget:" 
Jeremiah52:25 Ak kiimut eng’ nganaset kiptaiyat ne kibou luget: ak bik tisab eng’ ichek che kigeerei togetab laitoriat, che kiginyorji nganaset; ak sirindet ne bo kiptaiyatab luget, ne kiiyumi bikab emet; ak bik tamanwogik lo che bo emet che kiginyorji nganaset." 
Jeremiah52:26 Ak kiimut Nebusaradan kiptaiyatab ribik bichoto, komutyi laitoriatab Babulon eng’ Ribla." 
Jeremiah52:27 Ak kibir laitoriatab Babulon bichoto, ak kobar eng’ Ribla, eng’ emetab Hamat. Kigimut anyun Juda keluul komanda eng’ emennyi." 
Jeremiah52:28 Chu bik che kiimut Nebukadresar koluul: eng’ kenyitab tisab ko kiluul Yahudik elfusiek somok ak tiptem ak somok: 
Jeremiah52:29 eng’ kenyitab taman ak sisiit ne bo Nebukadresar komut koluul eng’ Jerusalem bik bogolwogik sisiit ak sosom ak aeng’. 
Jeremiah52:30 Eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak somok ne bo Nebukadresar komut Nubusaraden kiptaiyatab ribik, bik bogolwogik tisab ak artam ak mut che bo Yahudik: kiek bik tugul elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol lo." 
Jeremiah52:31 Ak eng’ kenyitab sosom ak tisab koboch ngeluul Jeoiakin laitoriatab Juda, eng’ arawetab taman ak aeng’, eng’ betutab tiptem ak mut ne bo arawanato, kotiach Ebil-merodak laitoriatab Babulon eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo laitornatennyi, Jeoiakin laitoriatab Juda, komong’ eng’ korgoret;" 
Jeremiah52:32 ak king’alalji inendet eng’ rirenetab ge, ak konde ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet kotororit eng’ che bo laitorinik che kimi Babulon koboto inendet." 
Jeremiah52:33 Ak kiwal ngoroikyik che bo korgoret, ak kiamis eng’ tainnyi kotugul eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi." 
Jeremiah52:34 Ak kiigochi laitoriatab Babulon inendet kotugul kebebertanyi ne bo amitwogik, kiigochin betut age tugul kebeberta ne yamei eng’ betusiek tugul che bo sobennyi, agoi betutab meennyi." 
Lamentations1:1 Lyon si komi buch nganaset, ne ki nyiitat bik! Lyon si kotebi ko u mosok! Nganaset ne ki o eng’ bororiosiek, ak ko ki cheptab laitoriat eng’ emotinwek, Kagoek anyun otwogindet!" 
Lamentations1:2 Rirei mising’ kemoi, ak kotendeni beekab kong’ eng’ matang’wekyik; Mami agot agenge ne igoigoi inendet eng’ chamanikyik tugul: Kigoberber choronokyik tugul inendet, Kagoek bunikyik." 
Lamentations1:3 Kigiluul Juda amu nyalilda, ak amu otwoknatet ne o; Menyei kwenutab bororiosiek, masichei kamuung’et: Kagonam inendet usikyik tugul eng’ ole bichii." 
Lamentations1:4 Iteitos ortinwekab Sion, amu mami chi ne nyonjin tuiyet ne kiging’at; Kigoek karatia ormarichokyik tugul, tigendos tisiikyik: Kinyalili bergeinikyik, ak kotinyei inendet ng’wanindo." 
Lamentations1:5 Kogoek usikyik kandoik, nyoru borotet bunikyik; Amu kogonyalil Jehovah inendet amu chang’indab bistaosiekyik: Kogimut lagokyik keluul eng’ taitab bunyot." 
Lamentations1:6 Kogoistoegei cheptab Sion torornatennyi tugul: Kogoigei bounikyik cheptirgichik che matinyei ole agete, Ak komwei ama tinyei kimnatet eng’ taitab chito ne onei." 
Lamentations1:7 Ibwati Jerusalem eng’ betusiekab nyalildanyi ak che bo bichiinwekyik Tugukyik tugul che kiiboiboi inendet koboch betusiek che bo keny: Ye kiibutyi bikyik eutab bunyot, ama toret chi inendet, Kigeer bounik inendet, kichot nyerotiosiekyik." 
Lamentations1:8 Kigoyai Jerusalem tengekto ne ya mising’; kogoek anyun kit ne muruon amu noto: Sasei inendet tugul che kigonyiti inendet, amu kigogeer ach ngorinnyi: Ee, tigeni, ak koweechigei let." 
Lamentations1:9 Kimi simdanyi ngoroikyik; ma ibwat kagesunennyi ne bo let; Katururgei anyun eng’ kwong’et; matinyei kagaigaindet: Keero, ee Jehovah, nyalildanyu; amu kogotororgei bunyot." 
Lamentations1:10 Kogoiitochi bunyot eunnyi tugukyik tugul che koboiboitune: Amu kagogeer kole kogochut bororiosiek oldanyi ne tilil, Che kiing’at ile, amat kochut ichek tuiyeng’ung’." 
Lamentations1:11 Tigendos bikyik tugul, cheng’ei amitwogik; Kigogoito tugukwak che kororon si konyorune amitwogik che isoobi sobondo: Keero, ee Jehovah, ak ibwat; amu kaaegu ne kisasei." 
Lamentations1:12 Tos ma kiy eng’ okwek, okwek tugul che osiirtoi? Ogeer ak obwat ngo mi arogenet age tugul ne u arogenennyu, ne kigiyaiywa, Ne kiinyalilena Jehovah eng’ betutab neregekyik che ng’wonen." 
Lamentations1:13 Kiiyok inendet mat eng’ barak koyokyi kowekyuk, ak kiiterter maata kowek: Kiriich mestet konam kelyekyuk, kigoweekya let; Kigoyaa aek banan ak atanui bet komugul." 
Lamentations1:14 Kirat eunnyi chogitab bistaosiekyuk: Kigonamgei tugul, kigoit kaatinnyu; kigoges kimnatennyu: Kigondea Kiptaiyat eunekwak, ne ma amuchi atonon agirinda." 
Lamentations1:15 Kigoyai Kiptaiyat bik tugul che nyigonen koek buch eng’ kwenunnyu; Kigoguurja tuiyet ne kiging’at kole kotuatui neranikyuk: Kigotiechatiech Kiptaiyat bergeiyatab Juda ko u ye kitiechei ole kitue sabibuk. 
Lamentations1:16 Arire anyun agobo tuguchuto; saitoi beekab kong’ eng’ konyekyuk; Amu loo eng’ ane kagaigaindet ne kata isoobi sobondanyu: Kigoek lagokyuk kibananok, amu kigoterteris bunyot." 
Lamentations1:17 Iitoi Sion eunekyik; ago mami chi ne igoigoi inendet; Kigong’at Jehovah agobo Jakobo, kole egu bunikyik bik che menyei komoswekyik: Mi Jerusalem kwenunywa ko u kit ne muruon." 
Lamentations1:18 Bo imanda Jehovah; amu kiangelelji ng’atutiennyi: Asaok ale, ogas okwek bororiosiek tugul, ak ogeer arogenennyu: Kogimut bergeinikyuk ak neranikyuk koba koek luulenik." 
Lamentations1:19 Kiaguur chamanikyuk, ago kiiberbera: Kibekyi nganaset tisiikyuk ak boisiekyuk, Ye kicheng’jingei amitwogik kole kosoob sobonwekwak." 
Lamentations1:20 Keero, ee Jehovah, amu ami bichiindo; anyalili moennyu; Kawalak muguleldanyu; amu kaangelel mising’: Rebisiei rotwetab chok eng’ ole bo sang’, mi ga ne u meet." 
Lamentations1:21 Kigogas ichek kole atigeni; mami chi ne igoigoa; Kigogas bunikyuk tugul agobo nyalildanyu; boiboi ichek amu kiiyai ko u noto: Tun iibu betut ne kiimwaite, si kegergeitu ak ichek." 
Lamentations1:22 Ingobwa taing’ung’ yaitwogikwak tugul; Ak iyachi ichek, ko u ye kiiyaiywa agobo bistaosiekyuk tugul: Amu chang’ tigenoikyuk, ak tanui muguleldanyu." 
Lamentations2:1 Lyon si kotuge Kiptaiyat cheptab Sion boldet eng’ neregekyik! Kigotim kororonindab Israel eng’ kipsengwet konyo ng’ony, Amata kobwat ng’echeretab kelyekyik eng’ betutab neregekyik." 
Lamentations2:2 Kigolugui Kiptaiyat meng’otosiek tugul che bo Jakobo, ama rire; Kigobut eng’ neregekyik irimoikab cheptab Juda; Kigoturur ichek kobwa ng’ony: Kigong’wanit bounatet ak bounikyik." 
Lamentations2:3 Kigotil kuinetab Israel eng’ neregekyik che ng’wonen; Kigoweech eunnyi ne bo tai konyo eng’ taitab bunik: Ak kigobeel Jakobo ko u mat ne liblibeni, ne beelei komoswek tugul." 
Lamentations2:4 Kigoriich kwangennyi ko u bunyot, kitonon kochuul eunnyi ne bo tai ko u bunyot, Ak kigobar tugul che iboiboi konyek: Kigorong’ neregekyik che koromen ko u mat, korong’ji emaitab cheptab Sion." 
Lamentations2:5 Kiigei Kiptaiyat bunyot, kigolugui Israel; Kigolugui gorikyik tugul che bo laitorinik, kigong’em irimoikyik: Kigotesyi cheptab Juda rirek ak kateiyet." 
Lamentations2:6 Kigoisto emainnyi eng’ koromnatet, ko u kit ne bo seremut; Kigong’em oldanyi ole kituiyechin: Kigoyai Jehovah tuiyet ne kiging’at ak sabato keutie eng’ Sion, Ak kigosas eng’ nyitatetab neregekyik laitoriat ak tisiindet." 
Lamentations2:7 Kigotimda Kiptaiyat kaptisisiennyi, ak kigowech oldanyi ne tilil, Kigonde irimoikab gorikyik che bo laitorinik, eutab bunyot: Kigobolyo eng’ gotab Jehovah, ko u eng’ betutab tuiyet ne kiging’at." 
Lamentations2:8 Kigochob Jehovah kong’em irimetab cheptab Sion; Kigokwerta kit ne kikwaise, tom koaruny eunnyi eng’ ng’emisiet: Ago kigogochi irimet ak totet koteeiyo; nyaluldos tuwai." 
Lamentations2:9 Isuwe kobendi ng’ony ormarichokyik; king’em ak koiri temeleiywekyik: Mi laitoriandennyi ak bounikyik kwenutab bororiosiek ole mami ng’atutiet; Ee, manyoru maotikyik ng’ang’utiet ne bunu Jehovah." 
Lamentations2:10 Tebyei ng’ony boisiekab cheptab Sion, sistos; Kigoseerji temburiek metowekwak; kigogermenegei kuniok: Abuchi bergeinikab Jerusalem metowekwak." 
Lamentations2:11 Ibwandos konyekyuk amu beekab kong’, nyalili moennyu, Kigorong’jigei ng’ony koennyu, amu ng’emisietab cheptab bikyuk; Amu tanuitos lagok ak che reriei eng’ ortinwekab nganaset." 
Lamentations2:12 Teebe ichek kametwagikwak kolenjin, Mi ano bek ak divaik? Ye katanuiso ko u che kagiguoten eng’ ortinwekab nganaset, Ye karong’jigei sobonwekwak tegetikab kametwagikwak." 
Lamentations2:13 Abaorianun alen nee? Arogenen nee, ee cheptab Jerusalem? Aaechindosin ak nee, si kobiit agaigain, ee bergeiyat, cheptab Sion? Amu o ole kibutok eng’ inye, ko u nyanjet: ng’o ne imuchi konyain?" 
Lamentations2:14 Kigogeer maotiguk ng’ang’utik agobo inye che bo tangoita ak berberindo; Ak tom kong’any tengektang’ung’, kotook, si koweechin kogeny eng’ ole kigiluuljin: Ago kigogeer agobo inye lautik che bo buch ak ng’alek che bo onset." 
Lamentations2:15 Iraprapchin eunek ichek tugul che siirtoi; Reng’sei ak kolelechi metowekwak agobo cheptab Jerusalem, kolen: Tos nganasanito ne kiguure bik, Ne igesunotgei eng’ kororonindo, Ne boiboiyetab ng’ony komugul?" 
Lamentations2:16 Kagoyatyin kutuswekwak buniguk tugul; Reng’sei ak kosusei kelek; mwaei kole, Kigelugui inendet; Iman, nito betut ne kigicheng’e; kagenyoru, kagegeer." 
Lamentations2:17 Kigoyai Jehovah noto kigochob; Kagoyai ng’olyondennyi kosulda ne kiga ng’at eng’ betusiek che bo keny; Kagowirta kwo ng’ony, ama rire; Ak kagogochi bunyot koboiboitunenen, Kagotoror kuinetab buniguk." 
Lamentations2:18 Kirirji mugulelwekwak Kiptaiyat: Ee irimetab cheptab Sion, ingotenden beekab kong’ ko u ainet bet ak kemoi; Amemuuny; amengosis laptetab kondang’ung’." 
Lamentations2:19 Ng’eet, waach kemoi eng’ taunetab saisiekab kemoi; Rong’u muguleldang’ung’ ko u beek eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat: Namji barak euneguk tokyi inendet agobo sobonwekab lagoguk, Che tanuitos eng’ rubet eng’ tabandab oret age tugul." 
Lamentations2:20 Keero, ee Jehovah, ak ibwat ile ng’o ne kiiyachi ko u noto! Tos amei kwonyik iyotenywa, lagok che namei eng’ eunekwak? Tos kibarjin tisiindet ak maotiot oldab Kiptaiyat ole tilil?" 
Lamentations2:21 Ruitos ng’ony murenik ak boisiek eng’ ortinwek; Kagebar bergeinikyuk ak neranikyuk eng’ rotwetab chok: Kiibar ichek eng’ betutab neregeguk; kiibar, ama irire." 
Lamentations2:22 Kiiguur kamuisosiekyuk eng’ komosta age tugul, ko u eng’ betutab tuiyet ne kiging’at. Ama biit chi ne kichilil anan ne king’et eng’ betutab neregekab Jehovah: Kigoges bunyondennyu icheget che kianame ak aribe koboch ko mengech." 
Lamentations3:1 A chito ne kiageer nyalildab kiroktab neregekyik.
