Lamentations3:2 Kigondoiywa ak kogena awendote mesundeito ama eng’ lapkeiyet. 
Lamentations3:3 Iman kiitocha eunnyi konyil ak konyil betut komugul. 
Lamentations3:4 Kigoyai bortanyu ak iririondennyu koosegitu; kigoiri kowekyuk. 
Lamentations3:5 Kigong’ota kogirindaa ak koyiemena kipsegetetiet ak ng’wanindo. 
Lamentations3:6 Kigogona ameng’ot ole imen, ko u che kigobek keny." 
Lamentations3:7 Kigong’ota, kot ko ma amuchi amanda; kigoyai sirimdanyu konyigisit." 
Lamentations3:8 Ee, ye arire ak aguursei agobo toretet, kogerjin sang’ saennyu." 
Lamentations3:9 Kigong’ote ortinwekyuk koik che kigiwai, kigogunur ortinwekyuk." 
Lamentations3:10 U inendet tiondo ne u keerit ne sapchina, ko u ng’etundo eng’ komoswek che ung’otin." 
Lamentations3:11 Kigomaas ortinwekyuk, ak kotonatona; kigoyaa aek banan." 
Lamentations3:12 Kigoriich kwangennyi ak kondea aek kit ne kimwogei. 
Lamentations3:13 Kigogochi kipchabonikab motiennyi kochut suennyu. 
Lamentations3:14 Kiaegu ne rorechin bikyuk tugul; ak aegu tiendanywa bet komugul. 
Lamentations3:15 Kigonyiita ng’wanindo, kigogona abiyo ng’wonet." 
Lamentations3:16 Kigoirie kelekyuk kibargook, kigotugena orek." 
Lamentations3:17 Ak kiiste sobondanyuu kolooit eng’ kalyet; kiautie borotet. 
Lamentations3:18 Ak kiamwa ale, Kagolus kimnatennyu, koboto kamang’unennyu eng’ Jehovah." 
Lamentations3:19 Ibwat nyalildanyu ak bichiindanyu, ng’wonet ak kipsegetetiet." 
Lamentations3:20 Ta kobwati sobondanyu choto, ak kong’uruksei eng’ orinnyu." 
Lamentations3:21 Abwati nito, atinye anyun kamang’unet amu noto." 
Lamentations3:22 Ki rirenosiekab Jehovah kityo si ma kigeswech, amu mararu rirenosiekyik." 
Lamentations3:23 Leelachen rirenosiekyik karonet age tugul; o imandang’ung’. 
Lamentations3:24 Jehovah ko kebebertanyu, mwaei sobondanyu; amang’u inendet anyun amu noto." 
Lamentations3:25 Mie Jehovah eng’ icheget che igeni inendet, eng’ sobondo ne cheng’ei inendet." 
Lamentations3:26 Mie eng’ chito komang’ ak kogen eng’ muitaet yetunetab Jehovah. 
Lamentations3:27 Mie eng’ chito kogesen chogit eng’ betusiekab ming’inatennyi. 
Lamentations3:28 Ingoteb inegei ak kosis, amu kigesenji Jehovah inendet." 
Lamentations3:29 Ingotoore kutinnyi temburiek; tamangab kobiit kamang’unet. 
Lamentations3:30 Ingogochi matandanyi inendet ne irabachi; inginyiit inendet chotisiet. 
Lamentations3:31 Amu matimdoi Kiptaiyat agoi. 
Lamentations3:32 Amun agot nga kon arogenet, kota korire ko u chang’indab rirenosiekyik." 
Lamentations3:33 Amu mainyalilisiei kokwetyin, anan kogochi arogenet werikab bik." 
Lamentations3:34 Machamei Kiptaiyat kotiechatiech kimonjororinik tugul che bo ng’ony. 
Lamentations3:35 Anan kimaase chi imaninnyi eng’ taitab Inendet ne Toror Mising’," 
Lamentations3:36 Anan kibeet chi eng’ ng’olyondennyi. 
Lamentations3:37 Ng’o inendet ne mwaei ak kosulda kioto, ngot ko mang’at Kiptaiyat kioto?" 
Lamentations3:38 Tos mamong’une kutitab Inendet ne Toror Mising’ yaitiet ak mieindo? 
Lamentations3:39 Amu nee anyun si kong’unyng’uny chito, chito ne kagibir agobo tengekwogikyik?" 
Lamentations3:40 Ongisiach ak ketiem ortinwekyok, si keweekyige kogeny Jehovah." 
Lamentations3:41 Ongetokyi mugulelwekyok koboto eunekyok Kamuktaindet ne mi kipsengwet. 
Lamentations3:42 Kigibistoe ak kigingelelse; ma inyoiywech kaat. 
Lamentations3:43 Kiitugege neregek ak ionatech; kiibarisie, ma irire." 
Lamentations3:44 Kiitugege boldet, si ma mong’une sautikyok kobwa ole imi." 
Lamentations3:45 Kiiyaech keige tuguk che kibuktoi che kilaktoi ak busagariek eng’ bororiosiek. 
Lamentations3:46 Kigoyatyech kutuswekwak bunikyok tugul. 
Lamentations3:47 Kabwanjech kaiyweisiet ak keringet, bananda ak ng’emisiet." 
Lamentations3:48 Rootei beekyuk bo kong’ ko u ainosiek, amu ng’emisietab cheptab bikyuk." 
Lamentations3:49 Isururtoe beek konyekyuk, ama sisei, ama tinyei kamuung’et," 
Lamentations3:50 Agoi kogeer Jehovah, kogeer eng’ kipsengwet." 
Lamentations3:51 Iimi kondanyu sobondanyu amu tibik tugul che bo nganasennyu. 
Lamentations3:52 Kigoona ichek mising’ ko u tarit, choto ko bunikyuk che kiona buch." 
Lamentations3:53 Kigoisto sobondanyu eng’ keringet, ak kiwirena koita." 
Lamentations3:54 Rootei beek kosiirei metinnyu; kiamwa ale, Kagigeswa." 
Lamentations3:55 Kiaguur kaineng’ung, ee Jehovah, ami keringet ne loo mising’." 
Lamentations3:56 Kiigas kutinnyu; meung’e iting’ung’ kabusennyu, anan rirekyuk." 
Lamentations3:57 Kiirigu eng’ betut ne kiaguurin: kiimwa ile, Ameiywei." 
Lamentations3:58 Ee Kiptaiyat, kiitononji ng’alekab muguleldanyu; kiitiach sobondanyu." 
Lamentations3:59 Ee Jehovah, kiigeer yaitiennyu; ibesiewa ng’olyondennyu;" 
Lamentations3:60 Kiigeer yaaktaenywa tugul ne bo mugetut ak chobutikwak tugul che kichob agobo ane. 
Lamentations3:61 Kiigas inye chotisienywa, ee Jehovah, ak chobutikwak tugul che kichob agobo ane;" 
Lamentations3:62 Kiigas kutuswekab ichek che king’eetya ak kabwatutikwak che ibwati agobo ane betut komugul. 
Lamentations3:63 Keer inye ye tebyei ng’ony ak ye ng’eetos; a tiendanywa. 
Lamentations3:64 Iyaaktochini ichek ko u boisienywa, ee Jehovah, ko u boisionikab eunekwak." 
Lamentations3:65 Igochini mugulelwekwak kouuegitu, igochini ichek chubeng’ung’." 
Lamentations3:66 Ionati ichek eng’ neregek, ak ing’em ichek koistoegei kureretab kipsengwetisiekab Jehovah." 
Lamentations4:1 Lyon si komuruonitu tahabu! Lyon si kowalaksei tahabu che tililen mising’! Kagirong’ koikab ole tilil eng’ tabandab oret age tugul. 
Lamentations4:2 Kergei werikab Sion che bo kamanutiet ne o ak tahabu che kororon, Lyon si kiit ichek ko u terenik, che boisietab eunekab cheptereniot!" 
Lamentations4:3 Tinyei lelwek agichek kinaik, igochin arekwak koreri: Kagogolgolit cheptab bikyuk, ko u tiong’ikab songolik eng’ ong’atet." 
Lamentations4:4 Yaamei ng’elyeptab lakwet ne reriei eng’ kutinnyi amu melelda: Somei lagok amitwogik, ama mi chi ne butyin." 
Lamentations4:5 Kimetoi eng’ ortinwek ichek che kibaegei amitwogikab talbisto: Tebe kapng’atat icheget che kinerta kalaaksetab ngoroik che biriren. 
Lamentations4:6 Amu o tengektab cheptab bikyuk kosiir tengektab Sodom, Ne kiging’em kigabui eng’ sait ne matia, ama twa chi." 
Lamentations4:7 Ki tililen bikyik che toogunotin kosiir teluchi, ki leelach ichek kosiir chego, Ki biriren borwekwak kosiir koik che kiguure peninim, ki sitotin ko u koita ne kiguure sapire:" 
Lamentations4:8 Tuuen togochikwak kosiir nesek; maginae eng’ ortinwek: Namegei irirenikwak ak kowekwak; kogoresyo, kogoigei ketit." 
Lamentations4:9 Kaigai che barei rotwetab chok kosiir icheget che barei rubet; Amu restos choto, kogoterterogis, amu manyor tugukab mbar." 
Lamentations4:10 Kigonam kwonyik che kitinyei rirenet lagokwak koyo; Kiek choto amitwogikwak eng’ ng’emisietab cheptab bikyuk. 
Lamentations4:11 Kigoyai Jehovah neregekyik che ng’wonen kosulda, kigorong’ neregekyik che koromen; Ak kigonaam mat eng’ Sion, ne kigobeel lumeiywekyik." 
Lamentations4:12 Kima koyani laitorinikab ng’ony, anan bik tugul che menyei ng’ony, Kole imuchi usindet ak bunyot kochut ormarichokab Jerusalem." 
Lamentations4:13 Kibiit ko u nito amu tengekwogikab maotikyik, ak yaitwogikab tisiikyik, Che kitumda korotikab bik che bo iman eng’ kwenunnyi." 
Lamentations4:14 Ombenioti eng’ ortinwek ko u kipkoratinik, kigong’wonegitu amu korotik, Kot ko ma komuchi bik kotwa ngoroikwak." 
Lamentations4:15 Kitwekyi kolenji, Oistege, ng’wonen! Oistege, oistege, amotwa: Ye kimwei ak koombeniot, kole bik eng’ bororiosiek, Ma komenyei olito kogeny." 
Lamentations4:16 Kigopchei ichek neregekab Jehovah; ma koiiti Jehovah ichek kogeny: Ma tiytii ichek tisiik, ma tiytii boisiek." 
Lamentations4:17 Kagong’etyo konyekyok kigeni toretet ne matilei kiy: Kigigen eng’ kagenisiennyo bororiet ne maimuchi kosor chi. 
Lamentations4:18 Sapchin kakwautikyok, kot ko magimuchi kebe eng’ ortinwekyok: Karik kagesunennyo, kagoyam betusiekyok; amu kait kagesunennyo." 
Lamentations4:19 Chepcheben che onatech kosiir kipsichinikab barak: Kionatech eng’ tulonok, kisapchech eng’ ong’atet." 
Lamentations4:20 Kinamji keringonikwak kabusetab serunekyok, noto ko inendet ne iilat ne bo Jehovah; Ne kigimwae achek kelen, Kimenye kwenutab bororiosiek eng’ uruetab kebebaikyik." 
Lamentations4:21 Baibaitu ak igasge, ee cheptab Edom, ne imenye emetab Us: Ityinin aginye kikombet; ibogiti, ak itebi ach ngor." 
Lamentations4:22 Kagosulda biretab tengektang’ung’, ee cheptab Sion; Ma komutin kogeny keluulin: Iityin inendet biret tengektang’ung’, ee cheptab Edom; Ng’anyei tengekwogiguk kotook." 
Lamentations5:1 Ibwat anyun, ee Jehovah, kit ne kagonyonjech: Keer, keer chotisiennyo." 
Lamentations5:2 Kigigochi borotennyo toek, Kigigochi gorikyok kipsagarek." 
Lamentations5:3 Kogeegu chebusoi ak che matinyei kwanda. Kogoigei kametisiekyok mosogik. 
Lamentations5:4 Kigee beek che kigiale feda; Kigeal ketik. 
Lamentations5:5 Negit konamech kaatit bik che onatech: Kigeng’etye ama kitinye kamuung’et. 
Lamentations5:6 Kigenamge eunek ak Misrik eng’ kayosiet, Koboto Asurik, si kobiit kebiye." 
Lamentations5:7 Kigoyai tengekto kwanisiekyok ak ma komi; Ak kigegesen tengekwogikwak. 
Lamentations5:8 Boiywech otwogik: Mami chi ne soruech kemong’une eunekwak. 
Lamentations5:9 Kindoi sobonwekyok ng’oiyondit si kobiit kenyoru amitwogik Amu rotwetab chok ne bo ong’atet. 
Lamentations5:10 Tuuen irirenikyok ko u ole kilaali Amu kemeut ne lalei ne bo iljet. 
Lamentations5:11 Kisuub ichek kwonyik eng’ Sion, Ak kisuub tibik eng’ nganasokab Juda." 
Lamentations5:12 Kiigartat icheget bounik eng’ eunekwak: Ma konyit chi boisiek. 
Lamentations5:13 Ibei neranik koitab bai, Ak kiibutyo lagok kolaei ketik." 
Lamentations5:14 Ma kobendi boisiek ormarich, Ama kotiendos neranik." 
Lamentations5:15 Kigogesgei boiboiyetab mugulelwekyok; Kigowalak ureriennyo koek rirek. 
Lamentations5:16 Kigobut nariet eng’ metowekyok: Bwa achek! Amu kigeyai tengekto. 
Lamentations5:17 Kagotanuiso mugulelwekyok amu noto; Kagogorio konyekyok amu tuguchuto; 
Lamentations5:18 Amu tulwetab Sion, ne kigoek karatia; Bendote lelwek oloto." 
Lamentations5:19 Ee Jehovah, itebye inye koigeny; Bo ng’echereng’ung’ ne bo laitornatet, ibinda age agoi ibinda age." 
Lamentations5:20 Amu nee anyun si iutienech agoi, Ak ibagaktech keny ne te no?" 
Lamentations5:21 Welelech ketokyinge, ee Jehovah, si keweleloge; Wal betusiekyok koigei che bo keny." 
Lamentations5:22 Ago kiiesiech mising’, Iting’enech neregek che eechen." 
Ezekiel1:1 Kiyatak kipsengwet eng’ kenyitab sosom, eng’ arawet ne bo ang’wan, eng’ betutab mut ne bo arawanato, ye kiami koboto luulenik eng’ ye negite ainetab Kebar, ak kiageer ng’ang’utikab Kamuktaindet." 
Ezekiel1:2 Eng’ betut ne bo mut ne bo arawet, ne ki kenyitab mut koboch ngeluul laitoriat Jeoiakin," 
Ezekiel1:3 konyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Esekiel tisiindet, weritab Busi, eng’ emetab Kaldeik, eng’ ye negite ainetab Kebar; ak kimi eutab Jehovah baragunnyi eng’ oloto." 
Ezekiel1:4 Ak kiageer, ak ogeero, kimong’une murot ne bo katam usonet ne o, boldet ne o, koboto mat ne barbaregei, ak kiyiem kaluunet maata, ak kimong’une kwenunnyi kit ne u itondab taet, komong’une kwenutab mat." 
Ezekiel1:5 Ak kimong’une kwenunnyi kergeindo ne bo tuguk ang’wan che soptos. Ki u ni itondanywa; kitinyei itondo ne u ne bo chi. 
Ezekiel1:6 Ak kitinyei age tugul togochik ang’wan, ak kitinyei age tugul eng’ ichek kebebaik ang’wan." 
Ezekiel1:7 Ak ki chuulotin kelyekwak; ak ki u keldebesaikab kelyekwak siokab moita: ak kiilyeldos ko u itondab sugunwet ne sitat. 
Ezekiel1:8 Ak kitinyei eunek che u che bo chito eng’ kebebaikwak orit eng’ komoswekwak ang’wan; ak kitinyei icheget ang’wanu togochikwak ak kebebaikwak ko u ni; 
Ezekiel1:9 kiga namgei kebebaikwak; kima kogusegong’ ye kibendi; kiwendi age tugul kogeerei tai. 
Ezekiel1:10 Kergeindab togochikwak, ko ki u togetab chito; ak kitinyei ichek ko ang’wan toget ne u ne bo ng’etundo eng’ komostab tai; ak kitinyei ichek ko ang’wan toget ne u ne bo eito eng’ komostab katam; kitinyei ichek ko ang’wan kogeny toget ne u ne bo kipsichit." 
Ezekiel1:11 Ki besiotin togochikwak ak kebebaikwak eng’ ole bo barak; kiga namgei kebebaik aeng’ eng’ age tugul, ak kotuch kebebaik aeng’ borwekwak." 
Ezekiel1:12 Kiwa tai age tugul: kiba ichek ole kamach tamirmiriet; kima kogusegong’ ye kibendi. 
Ezekiel1:13 Kergeindab tuguchoto soptos ko ki u itondanywa ng’etetiot, ko u toogunetab kegenganik: kiwendate maata kwenutab tuguchoto soptos: ak kiikweng’sei mising’ maata, ak kimong’une kalyelet maata." 
Ezekiel1:14 Ak kiruaei tuguchoto soptos ak koweechegei ko u kakweng’etab kalyelet. 
Ezekiel1:15 Kingota ageere anyun tuguchoto soptos, ogeero, kitonone ng’ony cheptiret agenge eng’ ye negite tuguchoto soptos, kotinyei age tugul eng’ togochichoto ang’wan cheptirennyi." 
Ezekiel1:16 Ki u itondab cheptirochoto koboto boisienywa, itondab berulo: ak kitinyei ichek tugul ko ang’wan kergeindo agenge: ak ki u itondanywa ak boisienywa cheptiret ne mi kwenutab cheptiret age." 
Ezekiel1:17 Ye kibendi kobunei komoswekwak ang’wan: kima kogusegong’ ye kibendi. 
Ezekiel1:18 Ki tororen karik che tiektoe cheptirochoto ak kiimuisei; ak ki nyiitotin konyek komoswek tugul eng’ karikwak che tiektoe, che kitinyei ichek tugul ko ang’wan." 
Ezekiel1:19 Ak ye kingoba tuguchoto soptos, koba cheptirochoto agichek ko boiyotyin: ak kingeganab tuguchoto soptos eng’ ng’ony, keganapta cheptirochoto agichek." 
Ezekiel1:20 Kiba ui tugul ole kamach tamirmiriet; kiwendi tamirmiriet oloto agine: ak kigiganapta cheptirochoto tuguchoto; amu kimi tamirmirietab kioto sobei, cheptirok." 
Ezekiel1:21 Kingoba chun, koba chu agichek; ak kingotononso chun, kotononso chu agichek; ak kingeganab chun eng’ ng’ony, keganapta cheptirok agichek: amu kimi tamirmirietab kioto sobei cheptirok." 
Ezekiel1:22 Ak kimi baragutab metitab kioto sobei kergeindab sengwetiet, ne u beek che kagau che imuisei, ne kigiitoe baragutab metowekwak." 
Ezekiel1:23 Ak ki chuulotin kebebaikwak eng’ kureretab sengwetiet ko katokyigei age age: kitinyei age tugul kebebaik aeng’ che tuchei komosi, ak kitinyei age tugul kebebaik aeng’ che tuchei komosin, che tuchei borwekwak." 
Ezekiel1:24 Ak kingobendi, agas kirgirenetab kebebaikwak ko u cheetab beek che chang’, ko u twegunetab Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet, ko u cheet ne imuuti, ne kergei ak cheetab luget: kingotononso kochoor kebebaikwak kobwa ng’ony." 
Ezekiel1:25 Ak kibiit cheet eng’ baragutab sengwetiet ne kimi baragutab metowekwak: kingotononso, kochoor kebebaikwak kobwa ng’ony." 
Ezekiel1:26 Ak kimi baragutab sengwetiet, ne kimi baragutab metowekwak, kergeindo ne bo ng’echeretab laitornatet, ne u itondanyi koita ne kiguure sapire: ak kimi baragutab kergeindo ne bo ng’echeranato bo laitornatet, kergeindo ne bo itondab chito eng’ baragunnyi." 
Ezekiel1:27 Ak kiageer kit ne u itondab taet, ko u itonda ne bo mat eng’ ole bo orit eng’ komoswek tugul, kong’eete itondab suennyi ak kwo barak; ak kong’eete itondab suennyi ak kwo ng’ony, ko kiageer itondo ne bo mat, ak kigayiem inendet kakweng’et." 
Ezekiel1:28 Ko u ole teptoi itondab chemng’isiriet eng’ bolik eng’ betutab ropta, ko ki u noto itondab kakweng’et eng’ komoswek tugul. Ki nito itondab kergeindo ne bo lilindab Jehovah. Ak kingageer, abut kot kotiiny toget ng’ony, ak kiagas kutitab inendet ne king’alali." 
Ezekiel2:1 Ak kimwawa kolenja, Ee, weritab chi, tonon, si ang’alalun." 
Ezekiel2:2 Kichuta anyun tamirmiriet, ye king’alalwa, ak konama atonon; ak kiagas inendet ne king’alalwa." 
Ezekiel2:3 Ak kimwawa kolenja, Ee, weritab chi, kayokten iwe oldab lagokab Israel, oldab bororiosiek che ngelelik, che kigongelelja; kigongelelja ichek koboto kwanisiekwak, agoi betuni." 
Ezekiel2:4 Ak matinye kalilanet lagok ak ko uuen mugulelwekwak; kayokten iwe oldab bichoto: ak ilenji ichek, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u nito." 
Ezekiel2:5 Agot ngo kas ichek, anan ngot ko magas, (amu icheget ko got ne ngelelio,) ko tun naei kole kimi maotiot kwenunywa." 
Ezekiel2:6 Ameiywei ichek anyun inye, weritab chi, anan iywei ng’alekwak, agot ngo mi koboten katablelinik ak katok, ak imenye kwenutab tagolik: ameiywei ng’alekwak, anan itoptoben eng’ togochikwak, agot nganda got ne ngeleliot." 
Ezekiel2:7 Ak imwachi ichek ng’alekyuk, agot ngo kas anan ngot ko magas: amu ngelelik mising’." 
Ezekiel2:8 Ago kas inye, ee weritab chi, kit ne amwaun; amengelel ko u goyoto ngeleliot; yat kuting’ung’, ak iam kit ne agonin." 
Ezekiel2:9 Ak ye kiageer, ogeero, kigiyogoiywa eut; ak keero, kimi eunoto bukuit ne mamanat;" 
Ezekiel2:10 ak kiito eng’ tainnyu; ak kigisir orit ak sang’: ak kiga kisirji kateiyosiek, ak rirek, ak nyalilwogik." 
Ezekiel3:1 Ak kimwawa kolenja, Ee, weritab chi, am ne kenyoru; am bukuini mamanat ak iwe ing’alalji gotab Israel." 
Ezekiel3:2 Kiayat anyun kutinnyu, ak kigona aam bukuinoto." 
Ezekiel3:3 Yeityo kolenja, Bai moeng’ung’, weritab chi, ak inyiit moeng’ung’ bukuini kagonin. Kiaam anyun; ak ki anyiny eng’ kutinnyu ko u kumik." 
Ezekiel3:4 Ak kilenja, Weritab chi, ui gotab Israel, ak imwachi ichek ng’alekyuk." 
Ezekiel3:5 Amu ma kiyokten iwe oldab bik che megase ng’alekwak, anan ko che bo kutit ne uui, ago iwe gotab Israel;" 
Ezekiel3:6 ma kiyokten iwe bororiosiek che chang’ che bo ng’alek che ter, anan ko che bo kutit ne uui, che memuchi igas ng’alekwak. Iman, nda ko kayoktochin ichek, ko kota kasin." 
Ezekiel3:7 Ago magasin gotab Israel; amu mamachei ichek kogasa: amu uuen togochikab got komugul ne bo Israel, ak ko uuen mugulelwekwak." 
Ezekiel3:8 Keero, kaauuiit togeng’ung’, kogirinda togochikwak, ak kaauuiit turietab togeng’ung’ kogirinda turietab togochikwak." 
Ezekiel3:9 Kaayai turietab togeng’ung’ kouuiit ko u koita ne uui kosiir ruandet ne uui: ameiywei bichoto, anan itoptoben eng’ togochikwak, agot nganda got ne ngeleliot." 
Ezekiel3:10 Kimwawa inendet kogeny kolenja, Ee weritab chi, taach eng’ muguleldang’ung’ ak igas eng’ itiguk, ng’alekyuk tugul che amwaun." 
Ezekiel3:11 Yeityo iwe ole mi che kigiluul, agoi oldab lagokab biguk, ak ing’alalji ichek, ilenji, Mwaei ko u ni Kiptaiyat Jehovah; agot ngo kas anan agot ngo magas." 
Ezekiel3:12 Yeityo koganaba tamirmiriet, ak agas cheetab kirgirenet ne o eng’ batennyu, kole, Iberurot torornatetab Jehovah kong’eete oldanyi." 
Ezekiel3:13 Ak kiagas cheet ne bo kebebaikab tuguchoto soptos ye kitiinyegei, ak kirgirenetab cheptirok che kinamgei tugul, noto ko cheetab kirgirenet ne o." 
Ezekiel3:14 Koganaba anyun tamirmiriet, ak komuta oldo age: ak kiawe eng’ ng’wanindo, eng’ neregekab tamirmiriennyu, ak kichiila eutab Jehovah eng’ kimnatet." 
Ezekiel3:15 Yeityo anyo oldab ichek che kigiluul, che mi Tel-abib, che kimenyei ye negite ainetab Kebar, kianyo ole kimenyei ichek; ak kiatebe oloto betusiek tisab, akwong’e." 
Ezekiel3:16 Ak kingo kagogesgei betusiek tisabu, konyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel3:17 Ee, weritab chi, kandein iegu ribindet eng’ gotab Israel: kas anyun ng’olyot ne amwae, ak iteechi ichek eng’ ng’olyondennyu." 
Ezekiel3:18 Ye amwachi kiptengekyot, alenji, Imee iman; ama iteechi inendet, anan ing’alal itechi kiptengekyot kometo orennyi ne ya, si kobiit isoru sobondanyi; meei kiptengekyondonoto eng’ tengektanyi; ago amagenen korotikyik." 
Ezekiel3:19 Ago ngot iteechi kiptengekyot, ama week chichoto kometo yaitiennyi, anan kometo orennyi ne ya, komeei eng’ tengektanyi; ago kaisoru sobondang’ung’." 
Ezekiel3:20 Kogeny, ngo masta chito ne bo iman, kometo imandanyi, ak koyai tengekto, ak ande kanagutiet tainnyi, komeei inendet; ko amu ma itechi, komeei anyun eng’ tengektanyi, ama kibwati boisionikyik che bo iman, che kiga koyai; ago amagenen korotikyik." 
Ezekiel3:21 Ago ngot iteechi chito ne bo iman, si mayai chichoto bo iman tengekto, ama yai tengekto, kosobei iman, amu kigas kateunet; ak kaisoru sobondang’ung’." 
Ezekiel3:22 Ak kimi baragunnyu eutab Jehovah eng’ oloto; ak kilenja, Ng’eet, ui warenget, si ang’alalun eng’ oloto." 
Ezekiel3:23 Kiang’eet anyun ak awe warenget: ak ogeero, kitonon lilindo ne kiageer eng’ ye negite ainetab Kebar: ak kiabut kot kotiiny toget ng’ony." 
Ezekiel3:24 Kichuta anyun tamirmiriet, ak konama atonon; ak king’alalwa, kolenja, Ui, kerjige gong’ung’." 
Ezekiel3:25 Ago, keero, inye weritab chi, ratenen bichoto boroonik, ak koratin eng’ tuguchoto si memande ole mi ichek:" 
Ezekiel3:26 ak ayae ng’eleptang’ung’, kouuiit eng’ kuting’ung’, si konamagen kut, si maitechini ichek: amu icheget ko got ne ngeleliot." 
Ezekiel3:27 Ak ye ang’alalun ayate kuting’ung’, ak ilenji ichek, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ingogas inendet ne kasei; ak ingoesio inendet ne esioi: amu icheget ko got ne ngeleliot." 
Ezekiel4:1 Ee, inye weritab chi, cheng’jige matabariat, ak inde taing’ung’ ak isir itondab nganaset, noto Jerusalem:" 
Ezekiel4:2 ak iyiem, ak iteech irimoik iyieme, ak iwasyi ng’ung’unyek, ak iteech gorik kotokyigei, ak inde komoswek tugul injinisiek che kibute nganaset." 
Ezekiel4:3 Yeityo icheng’ tabetab karnet, ak ilumde koek totetab karnet eng’ kwenung’ung’, ak nganaset: ak itokyi togeng’ung’ nganaset, si kobiit keyiem, ak iyiem inyendet, ak imuut inendet. Egu nito kaborunet eng’ gotab Israel." 
Ezekiel4:4 Ak iru kogeny isieb komostab katam, ak inde tengektab gotab Israel baragunnyi: iibe tengektanywa ko u koitetab betusiek che isiebe komosato." 
Ezekiel4:5 Amu kiang’at kenyisiekab tengektanywa koek eng’ inye koitetab betusiek, choto ko betusiek bogol somok ak tamanwogik sogol: iibe anyun ko u noto tengektab gotab Israel." 
Ezekiel4:6 Ak kogeny, ye kaiyai chuto kosulda, iru isieb komostab tai, ak iibe tengektab gotab Juda: betusiek artam, betut agenge ko bo kenyit agenge, kang’atin anyun ko u noto." 
Ezekiel4:7 Ak itokyi togeng’ung’ yiemetab Jerusalem, ko ma tugot eung’ung’; ak imaotenji." 
Ezekiel4:8 Keero, aratenen boroonik, si meweege isieb komosta age, agoi igesu betusiekab yiemeng’ung’." 
Ezekiel4:9 Ipchige anyun kogeny nganok, ak sairik, ak magandek, ak sogoriek, ak mosong’ik ak kusemet, ak inde teret agenge, ak ichopchinege amitwogik; ko u koitetab betusiek che irue isiebe kebeber, choto betusiek bogol somok ak tamanmwogik sogol, iame tuguchoto." 
Ezekiel4:10 Ak iame amitwogiguk che kigerei, sekelisiek tiptem eng’ betut; iame choto kotugul." 
Ezekiel4:11 Ak ee beek che kigerei, che bo kebeberta agenge eng’ lo che bo hin: iee kotugul." 
Ezekiel4:12 Iame ko u makatinik ak sairik, ak ibeele ng’atatekab bik kogeerei ichek." 
Ezekiel4:13 Ak kimwa Jehovah kole, Amei ko u noto lagokab Israel makatinikwak ko ng’wonen, eng’ bororiosiek ole tun aonjini." 
Ezekiel4:14 Kiamwa anyun ale, Bwa Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Keero, tom kimuruon sobondanyu: amu koboch ko a ming’in agoi nguno kotom aam kiy ne meei inegei, anan ne kabar tiong’ik; ama chut kutinnyu banyek che ng’wonen." 
Ezekiel4:15 Yeityo kolenja anyun, Keero, kaagonin ng’atatekab tuga igeere che bo bik, ak ichobe makatiniguk choto." 
Ezekiel4:16 Kilenja kogeny, Ee weritab chi, keero, atile amitwogik eng’ Jerusalem kong’ering’itu: ak koamei ichek amitwogik che kigerei, che kendoi kot; ak eei beek che kigerei, ak eng’ kwong’et." 
Ezekiel4:17 Si kobiit korarji amitwogik ak beek, ak kokwong’e age age, ak kochuchuiso eng’ tengektanywa." 
Ezekiel5:1 Ee inye, weritab chi, cheng’jige rotwetab chok ne ng’atib, ak iboisie ko u rotwetab chito ne inemu metit, si icherune meting’ung’ ak tamneng’ung’: yeityo inam kit ne kirogendoisie, ak igere, si ipchee sumeechoto." 
Ezekiel5:2 Ak ibeel kebeberta agenge eng’ somok eng’ kwenutab nganaset, ye kagosulda betusiekab yiemet; ak iib kebeberta age eng’ somok ak irarate ieb kotuiyo eng’ rotwonoto bo chok; ak iseerte kebeberta agenge eng’ somok koib usonet, ak ang’usu rotwetab chok asube ichek." 
Ezekiel5:3 Ak inam sumeek che ng’ering’, ak iratyi ngorieng’ung’." 
Ezekiel5:4 Ak inemu alak eng’ chuto kogeny, ak iwirji ma, ak ibeel eng’ ma; si komong’une mat sumeechoto ak kobeel got tugul ne bo Israel." 
Ezekiel5:5 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Nito ko Jerusalem: kiande kwenutab bororiosiek, ak mi emotinwek komoswekyik." 
Ezekiel5:6 Ak kigongelelji kiruogutikyuk amu kiyai sogornatet kosiir bororiosiek alak, ak kongelelji ng’atutikyuk kosiir emotinwek che mi komoswekyik tugul: amu kigoesio kiruogutikyuk, ama bendate ichek ng’atutikyuk." 
Ezekiel5:7 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu o bik che wasegei kosiir bororiosiek che mi komoswekwok, ama obendate ng’atutikyuk, ama orib kiruogutikyuk, ama osub ng’atutikab bororiosiek che mi komoswekwok;" 
Ezekiel5:8 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Ogeero, aborienen agane; ak ayai kiruogutik eng’ kwenung’ung’ eng’ taitab bororiosiek." 
Ezekiel5:9 Ak ayai eng’ inye kit ne tom ayae, ak kit ne matun ayae ne u noto kogeny, amu tuguguk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel5:10 Amei anyun kwanisiek werik eng’ kwenung’ung’, ak koam werik kwanisiekwak; ak ayai kiruogutik eng’ inye, ak aseer bik tugul che ng’etu eng’ okwek, aseerji usonaik tugul." 
Ezekiel5:11 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ko u ye asobe aming’inin iman, amarirenen kondanyu, anan korira mo, amu kiing’wanit oldanyu ne tilil eng’ tuguguk tugul che samisen, ak tuguguk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel5:12 Meei kebeberta agenge eng’ somok eng’ inye eng’ koroito, ak kigesu ichek eng’ rubet eng’ kwenung’ung’; ak kobek eng’ rotwetab chok kebeberta agenge eng’ somok, eng’ komosweguk tugul; ak aseer kebeberta agenge eng’ somok koba koriswek tugul, ak ang’usu rotwetab chok kosub ichek." 
Ezekiel5:13 Isuldoi anyun neregekyuk ko u noto, ak anerekyini ichek eng’ neregekyuk che ng’wonen, kot koyama, si kigaigaa: si konai ichek kole ane Jehovah ne kiang’alal eng’ kagiilennyu bo ge, ye kaayai neregekyuk che ng’wonen kosulda eng’ ichek." 
Ezekiel5:14 Kogeny ayain iegu karatia ak ne kiteweri, eng’ bororiosiek che mi komosweguk tugul, eng’ taitab ichek tugul che siirtoi." 
Ezekiel5:15 Egu ko u noto anyun tewernatet ak sasisiet, konetisiet ak kwong’et, eng’ bororiosiek che mi komosweguk tugul, ye ayae kiruogutik eng’ inye eng’ neregek, ak eng’ neregek che ng’wonen, ak eng’ keretab kong’ ne ng’wan: kaamwa ane Jehovah ng’olyondonito:" 
Ezekiel5:16 ye amwoge ichek kipchabonik che yaachen che bo rubet, che bo ng’emisiet, che ayogu kong’emak, ak ateswok rubet, ak atile amitwogikwok." 
Ezekiel5:17 Ak ayokwok rubet, ak tiong’ik che yaachen, che barenen bik; ak kobun kwenung’ung’ koroito ak korotik; ak aibun rotwetab chok konyo baragung’ung’: kaamwa ane Jehovah ng’olyondonito." 
Ezekiel6:1 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel6:2 Ee weritab chi, tokyi togeng’ung’ tulonokab Israel, ak imaotenji," 
Ezekiel6:3 ilenji, Ogas okwek tulonokab Israel, ng’olyotab Kiptiyat Jehovah: mwachin Kiptaiyat Jehovah tulonok che eechen ak che mengechen, kererusiek ak atebwosiek: Ogeero, aibwok agane rotwetab chok, ak ang’em komoswekwok che tororen." 
Ezekiel6:4 Ak koek karatwek kapkorosusiekwok, ak ketui kanamonikwok che bo asista: ak awirte bikwok che kigebar, eng’ taitab kanamonikwok." 
Ezekiel6:5 Ak ande muswekab lagokab Israel taitab kanamonikwak; ak aseerji kowekwok komoswek tugul che bo kapkorosusiekwok. 
Ezekiel6:6 King’emei nganasok eng’ meng’otosiekwok tugul, ak koek karatwek komoswek che tororen; si kobiit keng’em kapkorosusiekwok ak keyai koek karatwek, ak ketui kanamonikwok kobetyo, ak keeb kanamonikwok che bo asista, ak kiges boisionikwok." 
Ezekiel6:7 Ak kobutyo eng’ kwenung’wong’ che tun kibarei, si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel6:8 Ago atuuchi che ng’etu, si kobiit onyoru che chilildos eng’ rotwetab chok eng’ bororiosiek, ye kiseerak obe emotinwek." 
Ezekiel6:9 Ak kobwata ichek che chilildos eng’ okwek eng’ bororiosiek ole tun kimutyin koek luulenik, ko u ye kigomea mugulel agobo kugoinatetab mugulelwekwak, che kigoistoenagei, ak agobo konyekwak, che ibotegei ak kanamonikwak: ak wechegei ichegei agobo yaitwogik che kigoyai eng’ tugukwak tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel6:10 Ak konai kole a Jehovah: ma amwa buch ale ayachini ichek yaitioni. 
Ezekiel6:11 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Irabach eng’ eung’ung’ ak itiech eng’ keldang’ung’, ak ile, Bwa! Amu tuguk tugul che kiwechei che yaachen che bo gotab Israel: amu barei ichek rotwetab chok, ak rubet, ak koroito." 
Ezekiel6:12 Barei koroito inendet ne mi ole loo; ak barei rotwetab chok inendet ne negit; ak barei rubet inendet ne ng’etu ne kigigerji nganaset: ayae neregekyuk che ng’wonen kosulda ko u noto eng’ ichek. 
Ezekiel6:13 Ak onai ole a Jehovah, ye tun mi bikwak che kigebar, koboto kanamonikwak, che mi kapkorosusiekwak komoswekwak tugul eng’ tulwet age tugul ne ming’in ne toror, eng’ walisiek tugul che bo tulonok, ak eng’ kelutab ketit age tugul ne tuon, ak eng’ kelutab ketit age tugul ne nyigis, ole kibeeljine kanamonikwak tugul nyamdutik." 
Ezekiel6:14 Ak achuulji ichek eunnyu, ak ayai emet koguber ak koek karatia, koboch ong’atet kotokyigei Dibla, eng’ meng’otosiekwak tugul: si konai ichek kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel7:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel7:2 Ee inye, weritab chi, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah komwachin emetab Israel, kolenjin, Kagesunet: kagonyonji kagesunet luukwek ang’wan che bo emet." 
Ezekiel7:3 Kaityin anyun kagesunet, ak ayogun neregekyuk, ak aruogun ko u ortinweguk; ak aibun tuguguk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel7:4 Amarirenen kondanyu, ama rira mo: ago aibu ortinweguk, ak kotebe kwenung’ung’ tuguguk che bo wechet: si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel7:5 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Yaitiet, yaitiet kityo, keero, nyonei." 
Ezekiel7:6 Kagonyo kagesunet, ng’eetyinin; keero, nyonei." 
Ezekiel7:7 Kagonyonjin kagikyineng’ung’, ee inye ne imeng’isiei eng’ emet: kagoit betusiek, kagorik betut; betutab wasetab ge eng’ tulonok, ma waagat ne bo boiboiyet." 
Ezekiel7:8 Karik anyun si arong’jin neregekyuk che ng’wonen, ak ayai kosulda neregekyuk eng’ inye, ak aruogun ko u ortinweguk; ak aibun tuguguk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel7:9 Amarirenen kondanyu, ama rira mo: aibun ko u ortinweguk, ak kotebe kwenung’ung’ tuguguk che bo wechet; si onai ole a Jehovah ne abirisiei." 
Ezekiel7:10 Keer betut-o, keero, nyonei: kagonyo kagikyineng’ung’; kagoyesio taptokab kirokto, kagong’at menotet." 
Ezekiel7:11 Kang’eet koromnatet koek kiroktab tengekto; mami ne ng’etu eng’ ichek, anan ne bo chang’indanywa, anan ne bo magornatenywa: ama biitu kateeiyet eng’ kwenunywa." 
Ezekiel7:12 Kagoit betusiek, rigu betut: amat kobaibait alindet, anan koarogen aldaindet: amu mitei neregek eng’ chang’indanywa tugul." 
Ezekiel7:13 Amu maweekyingei aldaindet kit ne kialdoi, agot ngo ta kosobei: amu bo ng’ang’utiet tuiyet komugul, maweechegei chi; amaigimitegei chi tengektab sobennyi." 
Ezekiel7:14 Kagoguut iriaget, ak kagochob tuguk tugul; ago mami ne wendi boriet: amu mi neregekyuk chang’indanywa tugul." 
Ezekiel7:15 Mi sang’ rotwetab chok, komi orit koroito, ak rubet: inendet ne mi mbar komeei eng’ rotwetab chok; ak inendet ne mi nganaset, koamei rubet inendet ak koroito." 
Ezekiel7:16 Ago chilildos icheget che chilildos, ak koigei eng’ tulonok cheptugenikab atebwosiek, rirtos tugul, rirei chi age tugul eng’ tengektanyi." 
Ezekiel7:17 Nyaluldos eunek tugul, ak kochootyo kutung’oik tugul ko u beek." 
Ezekiel7:18 Kermenegei kogeny kuniok, ak kotuch ichek kamuiset; ak kolilanso tugul, ak konam ichek tugul boswek." 
Ezekiel7:19 Wirjin fedaisiekwak ortinwek, ak koigei tahabusiekwak kit ne muruon; maimuchi kosor ichek fedaisiekwak ak tahabusiekwak eng’ betutab neregekab Jehovah; mabiyong’dos sobonwekwak, anan konyi mootinwekwak: amu kagoek kanagutietab tengektanywa." 
Ezekiel7:20 Kigainde etunatet kororonindab lelestanyi: ago kiyai kanamonikab tugukwak che kiwechei koboto tugukwak che samis eng’ oloto: koayai anyun kioto koek kit ne muruon eng’ ichek. 
Ezekiel7:21 Ak ande kioto eunekab toek koluul, ak ande eunekab kiptengeginikab ng’ony koluul; ak kong’wanit." 
Ezekiel7:22 Ak atuktochi batai, ak kong’wanit oldanyu ne bo ung’ot: ak kochut oloto rebik, ak kong’wanit." 
Ezekiel7:23 Itany sirimdo: amu kanyi emet kiruogutikab korotik, ak kanyi nganaset koromnatet." 
Ezekiel7:24 Amutu anyun bik che yaach mising’ eng’ bororiosiek, ak konam gorikwak kobunji: ak agesu kogeny menotetab che kimen; ak king’wanit komoswekwak che tililen." 
Ezekiel7:25 Nyonei ng’emisiet; ak kocheng’ ichek kalyet, ama biitu." 
Ezekiel7:26 Nyonei bichiindo kosubu bichiindo, ak bwanei ng’alekab bik kosub ng’alekab bik; ak kocheng’ ng’ang’utietab maotiot; ago betei ng’atutiet eng’ tisiindet, ak kobet kiruoget eng’ boisiek." 
Ezekiel7:27 Rirei laitoriat, ak kilaakyi bounindet bananda, ak kinyalil eunekab bikab emet; ayachini ichek ko u orenywa, ak aruokyini ko u ye nyoljin; si konai ichek kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel8:1 Kinyonja eutab Kiptaiyat Jehovah eng’ kenyit ne bo lo, eng’ arawetab lo, eng’ betut ne bo mut ne bo arawanato, ye kiatebye eng’ gonnyu, ak kotebyei boisiekab Juda eng’ tainnyu." 
Ezekiel8:2 Ageer anyun, ogeero, kergeindo ne u itondab mat; kong’eete itondab suennyi ak kwo ng’ony, ko ki u mat, ak kong’eete suennyi ak kwo barak, ko u itondab kakweng’et, ko u itondab taet." 
Ezekiel8:3 Ak kiiyogoi kit ne u eut, konam sumeekyuk ak kiganaba tamirmiriet eng’ kwenutab ng’ony ak kipsengwet, ak komutwa eng’ ng’ang’utikab Kamuktaindet anyo Jerusalem, agoi kurgetab ormarichet ne bo seremut ne bo orit ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam; ole kimi ng’echeretab kanamwetab ng’etkonda, ne tagisiei kogonu ng’etkonda." 
Ezekiel8:4 Ak ogeero, kimi oloto lilindab Kamuktaindetab Israel, ko u itonda ne kiageer ami warenget." 
Ezekiel8:5 Kilenja anyun inendet, Ee weritab chi, toben anyun komostab murot ne bo katam. Atoben anyun komostab murot ne bo katam, ak ogeero, kimi kanamwonoto bo ng’etkonda komostab murot ne bo katam ne bo ormarichetab kaptisisiet eng’ ole kimandoe." 
Ezekiel8:6 Ak kilenja inendet, Ee weritab chi, igeere kit ne yaei ichek? Choto ko tuguk che eechen che kiwechei che yaei gotab Israel eng’ yu, si awa alooit eng’ oldanyu ne tilil? Ago ta igeere kogeny tuguk alak che eechen che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel8:7 Ak kiimutwa anyo kurgetab seremut; ak kingageer, ogeero, kimi konda totet." 
Ezekiel8:8 Yeityo kolenja, Weritab chi, undur totet: ak kingaundur totonoto, ogeero, kimi kurget." 
Ezekiel8:9 Ak kilenja, Ui orit, si igeer tuguk che yaach che kiwechei che yaei ichek eng’ olito." 
Ezekiel8:10 Kiawe anyun orit, ak ageer, ak ogeero, kimi itondab age tugul ne bo tiong’ik che ichuutegei, ak tiong’ik che kiwechei, ak kanamonik tugul che bo gotab Israel, che kigisirji itonwekwak totet komoswekwak tugul." 
Ezekiel8:11 Ak kitononie taitab kanamonichoto bik tamanwogik tisab che bo boisiekab Israel, ak kitonone kwenunywa Jaasania weritab Sapan, kotinyei chi age tugul terennyi eng’ eunnyi, ne kibeelse; ak kitogosta iyeto ne bo ng’uunetab nyamdutik." 
Ezekiel8:12 Kilenja anyun inendet, Ee weritab chi, tos kaigeer kit ne yaei boisiekab gotab Israel, eng’ ole imen, komi chi age tugul gorikyik che bo orit che bo kanamonik? Amu len ichek, Mageerech Jehovah; kigometo Jehovah emoni." 
Ezekiel8:13 Kilenja kogeny, Ta igeere kogeny tuguk alak che eechen che kiwechei che yaei ichek." 
Ezekiel8:14 Yeityo komutwa anyo kurgetab ormarichet ne bo gotab Jehovah ne kitokyigei murot ne bo katam; ak ogeero, kimi kwonyik eng’ oloto che kitebyei korirjin Tamus." 
Ezekiel8:15 Yeityo kolenja, Kaigeer nito-o, weritab chi? Ta igeere tuguk alak che eechen che kiwechei kosiir chuto." 
Ezekiel8:16 Ak kiimutwa seremut ne bo orit ne bo gotab Jehovah, ak ogeero, kimi bik che negit tiptem ak mut eng’ kurgetab hekalutab Jehovah, eng’ kwenutab keterut ak kaptisisiet, che kaituktochi batai hekalutab Jehovah, ak kotokyigei kong’asis; ak kisa asista kotokyingei kong’asis." 
Ezekiel8:17 Yeityo kolenja, Kaigeer nito-o, weritab chi? Tos kiy ne ming’in eng’ gotab Juda ngo yai ichek eng’ olito tuguk che kiwechei? Amu kigonyiit emet koromnatet, ak kigowelelgei kogeny kotacha: ak keero, indoi temetab ketit serunekwak." 
Ezekiel8:18 Ayae anyun agane eng’ neregek che ng’wonen: marirenen kondanyu, ama rira mo: agot nganda rirja eng’ waagat ne o, ko magasyini." 
Ezekiel9:1 Yeityo komwawa eng’ kutit ne o, agase, kolenja, Mwachji icheget che ribei nganaset korik, kotinyei chi age tugul karnennyi ne barisie eng’ eunnyi." 
Ezekiel9:2 Ak ogeero, kibwa bik lo kobunu oretab ormarichet ne bo meto, ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam, kotinyei chi age tugul karnennyi ne barisie; ak kiilaachi chito agenge eng’ ichek ngorietab katanit, kotinyei age tugul laletab wino eng’ suennyi. Ak kiba orit, ak kotononie ole negite kaptisisietab sugunwet." 
Ezekiel9:3 Ak kitogosta lilindab Kamuktaindetab Israel eng’ ole mi kerubindet, ole kitebe, kwo ole bo tugatugikab got: ak kitwekyi chito ne kiilaachi ngorietab katanit, ne kitinyei laletab wino eng’ suennyi." 
Ezekiel9:4 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet, Ui bun kwenutab nganaset, kwenutab Jerusalem, ak ing’och turiosiekab togochikab bik che tigendos ak korirtos agobo tuguk tugul che kiwechei che kiyai eng’ kwenunnyi." 
Ezekiel9:5 Ak kimwachi alak agase, kolenji, Oba obun nganaset, osub inendet, ak obarisiote amat korire konyekwok, anan korirak mo:" 
Ezekiel9:6 obar ogesu boiyo, muren, chepto, ak lagok che mengechen, ak kwonyik: ago amat orikyi chi age tugul ne kiging’och; ak otaune oldanyu ne tilil. Kitaune anyun boisiek che kimi taitab got." 
Ezekiel9:7 Ak kilenji ichek, Ong’wanit got, ak onyiit seremusiek bik che kagebar: oba anyun. Kiba anyun ak kibaris eng’ nganaset." 
Ezekiel9:8 Ak ye kita kobarisioti, ak kigang’etu eng’ yoto, abut kot kotiiny togennyu ng’ony, ak arir, ak amwa ale, Bwa Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Tos ibare bik tugul che king’et che bo Israel eng’ neregeguk che ng’wonen che rong’jingei Jerusalem?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Kolenja anyun, O kot tengektab gotab Israel ak ne bo Juda, kanyi emoni korotik, ak kanyi nganasani kamaaset ne bo kiruogutik: amu mwaei kole, Kigometo Jehovah emoni, ama keerei Jehovah." 
Ezekiel9:10 Ago ne u ane, ko marire kondanyu, ama rira mo, ago aipchini orenywa metowekwak." 
Ezekiel9:11 Ak ogeero, kimwaita ng’olyondonoto chichoto kiilaachi ngorietab katanit, ne kitinyei laletab wino eng’ suennyi, kole, Kaayai ko u ye kageng’ata." 
Ezekiel10:1 Kiageer anyun, ak ogeero, kitook eng’ sengwetiet, ne kimi baragutab kerubik, kit ne ki u koitab sapire, ne u itondab kergeindab ng’echeretab laitornatet." 
Ezekiel10:2 Ak kimwachi chito ne kiilaachi ngorietab katanit, kolenji, Chut kwenutab cheptirok che wirwirendos eng’ kureretab kerubik, ak inyiit euneguk tuwai ng’etetiot ne mi kwenutab kerubik, ak iseerji nganaset. Ak kiwa inendet orit ageere." 
Ezekiel10:3 Kitonondos anyun kerubik eng’ komostab tai ne bo got, ye kiwendi chichoto orit; ak kinyi boldet seremut ne bo orit." 
Ezekiel10:4 Ak kitogosta lilindab Jehovah eng’ kerubik, ak kotonone tugatugikab got; ak kinyi got boldet, ak kinyi seremut kakweng’etab lilindab Jehovah." 
Ezekiel10:5 Ak kigigasei kirgirenetab kebebaikab kerubik agoi seremut ne bo sang’, ko u kutitab Kamuktaindet ne bo Kamuktaet ye ng’alali." 
Ezekiel10:6 Ak ye kingong’at inendet chito ne kiilaachi ngorietab katanit, kolenji, Inemu mat eng’ kwenutab cheptirok che wirwirendos eng’ kwenutab kerubik, kwo orit anyun ak kotonone ye negit cheptiret." 
Ezekiel10:7 Ak kiito kerubindet eunnyi eng’ kwenutab kerubik kotokyi mat ne kimi kwenutab kerubik, ak konem, ak konde eunekab inendet ne kiilaachi ngorietab katanit, ne kinam maata ak komanda." 
Ezekiel10:8 Ak kitook eng’ kerubik ne u eutab chito eng’ kureretab kebebaikwak. 
Ezekiel10:9 Ak kiageer, ogeero, cheptirok ang’wan che kimi ole negite kerubik, ki negite cheptiret age kerubindet age, ak ki negite cheptiret age kerubindet age: ak ki u itondab cheptirochoto, itondab koita ne kiguure berulo." 
Ezekiel10:10 Kitinyei kergendo agenge ichek tugul ko ang’wan eng’ itondanywa, ko u ye kimi cheptiret kwenutab cheptiret." 
Ezekiel10:11 Ye kibendi, kobun komoswekwak ang’wan: kima kogusegong’ ye kibendi, ago kiisubi komosta ne kagotokyigei metit; kima kogusegong’ ye kibendi." 
Ezekiel10:12 Ak ki nyiitotin konyek komoswek tugul che bo borwekwak tugul, ak batoikwak, ak eunekwak, ak kebebaikwak, ak cheptirok, cheptirochoto che kitinyei kerubichoto ang’wanu." 
Ezekiel10:13 Kigiguure cheptirochoto agase, cheptirok che wirwirendos." 
Ezekiel10:14 Ak kitinyei age tugul togochik ang’wan: toget ne bo tai ko ki togetab kerubindet, ak toget ne bo aeng’ ko ki togetab chito, ak ne bo somok ko ki togetab ng’etundo, ak ne bo ang’wan ko ki togetab kipsichit." 
Ezekiel10:15 Ak kitogosta kerubik: nito ko kit ne sobei ne kiageer eng’ ye negite ainetab Kebar. 
Ezekiel10:16 Ak ye kingoba kerubik, koba cheptirochoto agichek ko boiyotyin: ak kingotirirenso kerubik kong’eetyo eng’ ng’ony, ko ma istoegei cheptirok ichek." 
Ezekiel10:17 Kingotononso ichek, kotononso chu agichek; ak kingotogosta, kotogosta chu agichek: amu kimi tamirmirietab kioto sobei koboto ichek." 
Ezekiel10:18 Ak kiwa lilindab Jehovah eng’ tugatugikab got, ak kitonone baragutab kerubik." 
Ezekiel10:19 Ak kitirirenso kerubik, ak kotogosta eng’ ng’ony ageere, ye kibendi, ak kimi cheptirok koboto ichek; ak kitononso eng’ kurget ne bo ormarichetab kong’asis ne bo gotab Jehovah; ak kimi baragunywa lilindab Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Ezekiel10:20 Nito ko kioto sobei ne kiageer eng’ kureretab Kamuktaindetab Israel eng’ ole negite ainetab Kebar ak kianai ale kerubik choto. 
Ezekiel10:21 Kitinyei age tugul togochik ang’wan ak kitinyei age tugul kebebaik ang’wan; ak kimi kergeindab eunekab chito kureretab kebebaikwak. 
Ezekiel10:22 Ak ki kergei togochikwak ak togochik che kiageer eng’ ole negite ainetab Kebar, icheget koboto itonwekwak; kibendi age tugul kogeerei tai." 
Ezekiel11:1 Kiganaba anyun tamirmiriet, ak komutwa anyo ormarichetab kong’asis ne bo gotab Jehovah, ne tokyingei kong’asis: ak ogeero, kimi kurgetab ormarichet bik tiptemu ak mut; ak kiageer eng’ kwenunywa Jaasania weritab Asur, koboto Pelatia weritab Benaia, bounikab bik." 
Ezekiel11:2 Ak kilenja inendet, Ee, weritab chi, chuto bik che chobei yaitiet, ak koruochi kiruoget ne ya eng’ nganasani:" 
Ezekiel11:3 che len, Tom korik betusiek che keteege gorik: teret nganasani, ak ki banyek." 
Ezekiel11:4 Maoten anyun agobo ichek, maoten, ee weritab chi." 
Ezekiel11:5 Ak kinyonja Tamirmirietab Jehovah, ak kolenja, Mwa ile, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kiomwa ko u ni, ee gotab Israel; amu angen tuguk che obwati." 
Ezekiel11:6 Kiotes eng’ nganasani bikwok che kibarei, ak kionyiit ortinwekyik bik che kigibar." 
Ezekiel11:7 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Banyek bikwok che kigebar che kionde kwenutab nganaset, ak nganasani ko teret: ago kimutwok omong’une kwenunnyi." 
Ezekiel11:8 Kioiywei rotwetab chok; ak aibwok rotwetab chok, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel11:9 Ak amutwok omong’une kwenunnyi, ak andeok eunekab toek, ak ayai kiruogutik eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Ezekiel11:10 Obegu eng’ rotwetab chok; aruokwok eng’ kiwotetab Israel; si onai ole a Jehovah. 
Ezekiel11:11 Maegu nganasani tereng’wong’, amoegu banyek eng’ kwenunnyi; aruokwok eng’ kiwotetab Israel;" 
Ezekiel11:12 ak onai ole a Jehovah: amu ma obendate ng’atutikyuk, ama oyai kiruogutikyuk, ago kiosub kiruogutikab bororiosiek che mi komoswekwok." 
Ezekiel11:13 Ak kime Pelatia weritab Benaia ye kiamaoteni, kiabut anyun kot kotiiny togennyu ng’ony, ak arir eng’ kutit ne o, ale, Bwa Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Tos igesu che king’et che bo Israel?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Kinyonja anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel11:15 Ee weritab chi, tupchosieguk, che tupchosieguk, bikab oreng’ung’, koboto got komugul che bo Israel, ichek tugul, choto ko che kigomwachi bik che menyei Jerusalem, kolenji, Oba ole loo eng’ Jehovah; kigigonech emoni kobunjech:" 
Ezekiel11:16 mwa anyun ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Nganda kiayestochi ichek ole loo eng’ bororiosiek, ak kiaseer ichek koyom emotinwek, ko ta aegu kora eng’ ichek komosta ne tilil eng’ ne matia eng’ emotinwek che kigoba." 
Ezekiel11:17 Mwa anyun ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ayumok omong’une bororiosiek, ak ayumok omong’une emotinwek ole kioyestochi, ak agonok emetab Israel." 
Ezekiel11:18 Ak koba oloto, ak koisto tuguk tugul che samisen eng’ oloto, koboto tuguk tugul che kiwechei, koistogei eng’ oloto." 
Ezekiel11:19 Ak agochi ichek muguleldo agenge, ak amdeak tamirmiriet ne leel; ak aiste muguleldab koita eng’ borwekwak, ak agochi ichek muguleldo ne bo banyek:" 
Ezekiel11:20 si kobendate ng’atutikyuk, ak korib kayomisutikyuk, ak koyai: ak koek ichek bikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa." 
Ezekiel11:21 Ago eng’ icheget che bendoti kosubi tugukwak che samisen, ak tugukwak che kiwechei, aipchini ortinwekwak metowekwak, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel11:22 Yeityo kotirirenso kerubik, ak kimi cheptirok koboto ichek; ak kimi baragunywa lilindab Kamuktaindetab Israel." 
Ezekiel11:23 Ak kitogosta lilindab Jehovah eng’ kwenutab nganaset, ak kwo kotonone tulwet ne mi komostab kong’asis eng’ nganaset." 
Ezekiel11:24 Ak kiganaba tamirmiriet, ak komutwa eng’ ng’ang’utiet eng’ Tamirmirietab Kamuktaindet, anyo Kaldea, agoi ait ole mi ichek che kigiluul. Kitogosta anyun eng’ ole kiami ng’ang’utionoto kiga ageer." 
Ezekiel11:25 Kiamwachi anyun ichek che kiga keluul, tuguk tugul che kiga koborua Jehovah." 
Ezekiel12:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel12:2 Ee weritab chi, imenye kwenutab got ne ngeleliot, che tinyei konyek che keertoe, ama keerei kiy; che tinyei itik che kastoe, ama kasei kiy; amu ichek ko got ne ngeleliot." 
Ezekiel12:3 Ara anyun, inye weritab chi, rat tuguk agobo kauutoet, ak iuu bet kogeerei ichek; ak iuu eng’ komostang’ung’ iwe komosta age kogeerei ichek: abere imuchi kobwat, nganda ichek ko got ne ngeleliot." 
Ezekiel12:4 Ak iibu tuguguk komong’ bet kogeerei ichek, ko u tugukab kauutoet: ak iwe imande inyendet koskoleny kogeerei ichek, ko u ye bendi bik luulet." 
Ezekiel12:5 Undur inatut kogeerei ichek, ak iib tuguguk kobun yoto." 
Ezekiel12:6 Iibe itiinye kaat, kogeerei ichek, ak iib komanda ko kagoimen; ituche togeng’ung’, si megeer ng’ony: amu kaandein iegu kaborunet eng’ gotab Israel." 
Ezekiel12:7 Kiayai anyun ko u noto ko u ye kiging’ata: kiaibu tugukyuk kobwa sang’ bet, ko u tugukab kauutoet, ak kiaundur inatut koskoleny, abale eunnyu: kiaibu tugukyuk kobwa sang’ ko kagoimen, ak aib atiiny kaat kogeerei ichek." 
Ezekiel12:8 Ak kinyonja karon ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel12:9 Ee weritab chi, tom koteebenen gotab Israel, got ngeleliot, kolenjin, Iyae nee?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Mwachi ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Bo lautioni bounindet eng’ Jerusalem, koboto got komugul ne bo Israel ole mi ichek." 
Ezekiel12:11 Mwa ile, A kaborunet agobo okwek: ko u ye kiayai, keyachin ichek ko u noto: kiuutoi, kiluulei." 
Ezekiel12:12 Ibei bounindet ne mi kwenunywa, kotiinyi kaat, ko kagoimen, ak kwo: unduri ichek inatut si kobiit kouutoe tugukwak yoto: tuchei togennyi, amu mageerei ng’ony." 
Ezekiel12:13 Aiitochini mestennyu inendet, ak konam mestennyu inendet: ak amut inendet kwo Babulon emetab Kaldeik: ago mageerei emonoto, nganda mechin oloto." 
Ezekiel12:14 Ak aiyeste koba usonet age tugul, bik tugul che mitei komoswekyik kotoret inendet, ak lugosiekyik tugul; ak ang’usu rotwetab chok asube ichek." 
Ezekiel12:15 Ak konai kole a Jehovah ye ayeste ichek eng’ bororiosiek, ak aseer ichek koyom emotinwek." 
Ezekiel12:16 Ago atuuchi bik che ng’ering’ eng’ ichek kochilile rotwetab chok, ak rubet, ak koroito; si kobiit kobarta tugukwak tugul che kiwechei eng’ bororiosiek ole tun bendi; si konai kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel12:17 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel12:18 Ee weritab chi, am amitwogiguk eng’ botanet, ak iee beeguk eng’ karigisiset koboto ribetab ge;" 
Ezekiel12:19 ak ilenji bikab emet, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah agobo bik che menyei Jerusalem, ak che bo emetab Israel ko u ni kole: Kendoi amitwogikwak, ak koeei beekwak eng’ kwong’et, si koek karatia emennyi eng’ tuguk tugul che mi, amu koromnatetab bik tugul che menyei oloto." 
Ezekiel12:20 Ak king’emei nganasok che kimenyei, ak koguber emet; si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel12:21 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel12:22 Ee weritab chi, nee kalewenoni otinye eng’ emetab Israel, olen, Kigogagei betusiek, ak koek buch ng’ang’utiet age tugul?" 
Ezekiel12:23 Mwachi anyun ichek ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Agesu kalewenoni, si ma koboisie kogeny koek kalewenet eng’ Israel; ago mwachi ilenji, Kagorik betusiek, ak kasuldaetab ng’ang’utiet age tugul." 
Ezekiel12:24 Amu ma kobiitu kogeny ng’ang’utiet age tugul ne bo buch anan ng’orset ne kilasei eng’ gotab Israel. 
Ezekiel12:25 Amu a Jehovah; ang’alali, ak kosulda ng’olyot ne amwae; magigoitoi kogeny: amu amwae ng’olyot, ak agesu eng’ betusiekwok, ee got ne i ngeleliot, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel12:26 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel12:27 Ee weritab chi, keero, len gotab Israel, Ng’ang’utiet ne keerei inendet ko bo betusiek che chang’ che bwanei, ak komaoteni inendet agobo betusiek che ta ko looen." 
Ezekiel12:28 Mwachi anyun ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Magigoitoi kogeny ng’olyondennyu age tugul, ago isuldoi ng’olyot ne amwae, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel13:1 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel13:2 Ee weritab chi, maotenji igirinde maotikab Israel che maoteni, ak ilenji ichek che maoteni eng’ mugulelwekwak ichegei, Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah:" 
Ezekiel13:3 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Bwa maotik che berber, che isubi tamirmirikwak ichegei, ak ko tom kogeer kiy!" 
Ezekiel13:4 Ee Israel, kigoigei maotiguk lelwek eng’ ong’atosiek." 
Ezekiel13:5 Ma otogoste obe ole kigobutok, ama ong’ot gotab Israel, si kobiit kotonon eng’ boriet eng’ betutab Jehovah." 
Ezekiel13:6 Kigogeer ichek tangoita ak ng’orset ne bo lembech, che mwaei kole, Kale Jehovah; ama iyokte Jehovah: ak kogochi bik komang’ kole kigimiti ng’olyot." 
Ezekiel13:7 Tos ma ogeer ng’ang’utiet ne bo buch, ama omwa ng’orset ne bo lembech, ye omwae ole, Kale Jehovah: ago ma amwa kiy?" 
Ezekiel13:8 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kiomwa eng’ tangoita, ak ogeer lembech, ogeer anyun, aborienok, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel13:9 Ak koborie eunnyu maotik che keerei tangoita, ak che ng’orei lembechek: matebe kapkiruogetab bikyuk, ama kisirjin bukuit ole kisirjin gotab Israel, ama bendi emetab Israel; si onai ole a Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel13:10 Ee, amu kigoberber bikyuk, kolenji, Kalyet; ama mi kalyet; ak ye teech chito inatut, ogeero, male tartarik che ma miachen:" 
Ezekiel13:11 mwachi ichek che malse tartarichuto ilenji, Lulei: biitu ropta ne o; ak korobon koik che eechen che bo ropta; ak kobet usonet ne o inatunato." 
Ezekiel13:12 Ogeero, ye lul inatunato, ko tos magiteebenok kele, Mi ano malset ne kigomale inatunito?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Abete inatunito eng’ usonet ne o eng’ neregekyuk che ng’wonen; ak kobiit ropta ne o eng’ neregekyuk, ak koik che eechen che bo ropta eng’ neregekyuk che ng’wonen, si kobiit koges." 
Ezekiel13:14 Abute anyun inatut ne kiomale tartarik che ma miachen, ak aluul kot kotook lumeiywekyik: ak kobut, ak kigeswok eng’ kwenunnyi; si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel13:15 Ayae anyun neregekyuk che ng’wonen kosulda eng’ inatunato, koboto ichek che kimale tartarichato; ak alenjok, Ma komi inatut, anan ichek che kimalei;" 
Ezekiel13:16 choto ko maotikab Israel che maoteni agobo Jerusalem, ak kogeerei ng’ang’utikab kalyet agobo nganasanato, ama mitei kalyet, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel13:17 Ee inye weritab chi, iuuiit togeng’ung’ igirinde tibikab biguk, che maoteni eng’ mugulelwekwak ichegei; ak imaoten agobo ichek," 
Ezekiel13:18 ak ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Bwa kwonyik che nabei lolotinwekab ndaresik che bo kutung’oik tugul che bo eunek, ak konab angok che bo metit, che yamei chi age tugul si kobiit koriige sobonwekab bik! Tos oriiche sobonwekab bikyuk, ak osoru sobonwekab bik kobunjok?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Ak kiong’wanita eng’ bikyuk agobo sairik che bo rubeito ak kererutikab makatinik, si obar sobonwekab bik che ma nyoljin kobek, ak osoru sobonwekab bik che ma nyoljin kosopcho amu lembechekwok che omwachini bikyuk che chamei kogas lembechechoto." 
Ezekiel13:20 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, aweche lolotinwekab ndaresikwok, che oriige sobonwekab bik ko u taritik, ak agereri tuguchoto eng’ eunekwok; ak atiach sobonwechoto bo bik koba, sobonwechoto oriiche ko u taritik." 
Ezekiel13:21 Agereri angokwok agichek, ak asoru bikyuk komong’ eng’ eunekwok, si ma kotebe eunekwok kogeny si keriichei; si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel13:22 Amu kiogochi muguleldab chi ne bo iman koarogen eng’ lembechek, chito ne ma agochi koarogen; ak ogimit eunekab kiptengekyot, si maweek kometo orennyi ne ya, ak kesor kosob:" 
Ezekiel13:23 ma ogeere anyun tangoita, anan ong’orse; ak asoru bikyuk komong’ eng’ eunekwok; si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel14:1 Yeityo kobwanja alak che bo boisiekab Israel, ak koteb ng’ony eng’ tainnyu." 
Ezekiel14:2 Ak konyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel14:3 Ee weritab chi, kigogonorjigei bichu kanamonikwak eng’ mugulelwekwak, ak konde kanagutietab tengektanywa tainywa: tos teebena ichek ng’olyo age tugul?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Ng’alalji anyun ichek, ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Chi age tugul ne bo gotab Israel ne konorjingei kanamonikyik eng’ muguleldanyi, ak konde kanagutietab tengektanyi tainnyi, ak konyo ole mi maotiot; awoljini ane Jehovah eng’ tuguchoto ko u chang’indab kanamonikyik;" 
Ezekiel14:5 si kobiit anam gotab Israel eng’ mugulelwekwak icheget, amu kigotoiyenagei ichek tugul amu kanamonikwak." 
Ezekiel14:6 Mwachi anyun gotab Israel ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Oweege, ak owalage omete kanamonikwok; ak otuktochi batai tugukwok tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel14:7 Amu chi age tugul ne bo gotab Israel, anan ne bo toek ne tebe Israel, ne istoenagei, ak kogonorjigei kanamonikyik eng’ muguleldanyi, ak konde kanagutietab tengektanyi tainnyi, yeityo konyo ole mi maotiot koteepchigei ng’olyot eng’ ane; awoljini anendet Jehovah chichoto." 
Ezekiel14:8 Ak auuiit togennyu aborie chichoto, ak ayai inendet koek ne kikwong’e, koek kaborunet ak kalewenet, ak aistoe inendet eng’ bikyuk; si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel14:9 Ak ngot kiberber maotiot ak komwa ng’olyo, ko ane Jehovah ne kaberberi maotiondonoto, ak atokyi eunnyu, ak ang’em inendet aiste eng’ bikyuk Israel." 
Ezekiel14:10 Ak koib ichek tengektanywa: tengektab maotiot ko u tengektab chito ne cheng’ei inendet; 
Ezekiel14:11 si ma ta koombenot kogeny gotab Israel kometa, anan kong’wanitgei kogeny eng’ bistaosiekwak tugul; ago si koek bikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel14:12 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel14:13 Ee weritab chi, ye yaiywa emet tengekto eng’ bistoet, ak atokyi eunnyu emonoto, ak atil amitwogikyik, ak ayokyi rubet, ak abar chi ak tiony;" 
Ezekiel14:14 agot nganda mi bichu somogu, Noa, Daniel, ak Job emonoto, ko kota soru sobonwekwak ichegei eng’ imandanywa, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel14:14 agot nganda mi bichu somogu, Noa, Daniel, ak Job emonoto, ko kota soru sobonwekwak ichegei eng’ imandanywa, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel14:14 agot nganda mi bichu somogu, Noa, Daniel, ak Job emonoto, ko kota soru sobonwekwak ichegei eng’ imandanywa, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel14:15 Ngot agetu tiong’ik che yaachen kobun emet, ak kong’em, kot koguber, ne ma komuchi chi kobun amu tiong’ik;" 
Ezekiel14:16 ko agot nganda mi bichuto somogu oloto, ko ko u ye asobe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ko masoru ichek werik anan tibik; kisoru icheget ichegei, ak koguber emet." 
Ezekiel14:17 Anan ngot aipchi rotwetab chok emonoto, ak ale, Ee rotwoni bo chok, ui bun emet; si abar chi ak tiony;" 
Ezekiel14:18 ko agot nganda mi bichuto somogu oloto, ko ko u ye asobe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ko masoru ichek werik anan tibik, ago kisoru icheget ichegei." 
Ezekiel14:19 Anan ngot ayokyi koroito emonoto, ak arong’ji neregekyuk che ng’wonen atumde korotik, aiste chi ak tiony:" 
Ezekiel14:20 ko agot nganda mi Noa, Daniel, ak Job oloto, ko ko u ye asobe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ko masoru ichek werit anan chepto; ago soru sobonwekwak kityo eng’ imandanywa." 
Ezekiel14:20 ko agot nganda mi Noa, Daniel, ak Job oloto, ko ko u ye asobe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ko masoru ichek werit anan chepto; ago soru sobonwekwak kityo eng’ imandanywa." 
Ezekiel14:20 ko agot nganda mi Noa, Daniel, ak Job oloto, ko ko u ye asobe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ko masoru ichek werit anan chepto; ago soru sobonwekwak kityo eng’ imandanywa." 
Ezekiel14:21 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kotam nee anyun ye ayokyi Jerusalem kiruogutikyuk ang’wan che ng’wonen; rotwetab chok, ak rubet, ak tiong’ik che yaachen, ak koroito, si kobar chi ak tiony?" 
Ezekiel14:22 Ago, ogeero, kituuchi bik che ng’etu che tun kimuti, werik koboto tibik: ogeero, mong’jinok, ak ogeer ortinwekwak ak boisionikwak: ak kigaigaak agobo yaitiet ne koaipchi Jerusalem, agobo tugul che koaipchi." 
Ezekiel14:23 Ak kogaigaak, ye ogeer ortinwekwak ak boisionikwak: si kobiit onai ole ma ayai buch tuguk tugul che koayai eng’ oloto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel15:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel15:2 Ee weritab chi, siirei eng’ nee ketitab sabibuk ketit age tugul, anan temetab ketitab sabibuk ne mi kwenutab ketikab osnet?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Tos kiebei ketoto si kobiit keyae boisio? Anan tos yae bik ketoto ireut si kigartate kiy age tugul? 
Ezekiel15:4 Ogeero, kiwirjin ma koek kwenik: beelei mat tabanwek tuwai koboto kwenut; tos tinyei keluno eng’ boisio age tugul?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Ogeero, ye kitomo keeb, ko kima kotinyei boisio: kotam nee anyun ye kagogas mat ye kagolal, tos ta kotinyei boisio age tugul?" 
Ezekiel15:6 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ko u ketitab sabibuk ne mi kwenutab ketikab osnet, ne kiande ma koek kwenik, agoitoi ko u noto bik che menyei Jerusalem." 
Ezekiel15:7 Ak auuiit togennyu aborie ichek; mandoe mat, ago beelei mat ichek; si onai ole a Jehovah, ye auuiit togennyu aborie ichek." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ak ayai emet koguber, amu kigobistoe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel16:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel16:2 Ee weritab chi, iborji Jerusalem konai tugukyik che kiwechei," 
Ezekiel16:3 ak ilenji, Mwachin Kiptaiyat Jehovah Jerusalem ko u ni kole: Sigeng’ung’, ak ole kigisikyinin ko bo emetab Kananindet: ki kwandang’ung’ Amorindet, ak ki kameng’ung’ Hitindet." 
Ezekiel16:4 Kima kotil mugeng’ung’ eng’ ole kigisikyinin, eng’ betut ne kigisichin, ama kiunin si itililitu; ma kiilenen munyuk, ama kinamden ngor." 
Ezekiel16:5 Ma rirenen chi, koyaun kiy age tugul eng’ tuguchuto, korir mo; ago kigiwirjin timin, amu kigiwechin, eng’ betut ne kigisichin." 
Ezekiel16:6 Ak kingasiir ye kiimi, ageerin ikwarkwarane korotiguk, alenjin, Agot nganda imi korotiguk, isob inye; ee, kialenjin, Agot nganda imi korotiguk, isob inye." 
Ezekiel16:7 Kiagonin itesage ko u ye ing’atos tugukab mbar, ak kiitesage ieetu, ak kiigararanitu mising’; kigogun kinaiguk, ak kigogoeegitu sumeeguk; ago kiimi buch ach ngor." 
Ezekiel16:8 Ak kingabun ye imi, ageerin, keero, betusieguk ko ki bo betusiekab chamnyet; ak kiatugunen ngoriennyu ak atuch ach ngorieng’ung’: ee, kiayosieun, ak kigoyomisge ak inye, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ak kiibunja." 
Ezekiel16:9 Kiaunin anyun; ee, kiaunde mising’ korotiguk, ak kiaiilin." 
Ezekiel16:10 Kialaagun ngoroik che kiginde lelesta, ak kialaagun kweonikab mengichikab beek, ak kiauenen katanit ne kararan, ak atugenen aririt." 
Ezekiel16:11 Kialelesanunenen kogeny tuguk che bo lelesta, ak kialaagun karikab eunek ak sirimdo ne bo kaating’ung’." 
Ezekiel16:12 Ak kiande peteit serung’ung’, ak kiande munaok itiguk, ak alaagun nariet ne kararan." 
Ezekiel16:13 Kigilelesonun anyun eng’ tahabu ak feda; ak ki bo katanit ne kararan ngoroiguk, ak aririt, ak ngoroik che kiginde lelesta; kiiam busiek che tambulul, ak kumik, ak mwanik: ak kiigararanitu kot, ak kigiberurin kot inyoru atebetab laitornatet." 
Ezekiel16:14 Ak kiyom bororiosiek kalosunetab kororonindang’ung’; amu ki igesunotgei kororoninoto, amu eetunatennyu ne kiga alaagun, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel16:15 Ago kiitiiege kororonindang’ung’, ak iyai kugoinatet amu kalosuneng’ung’, ak kioipge ak age tugul ne siirtoi; kibunji inendet." 
Ezekiel16:16 Ak kiib ngoroiguk ak iyachige komoswek che tororen che kiilelesane saleiywek che terotin, ak iyae choto kugoinatet: ma kobiitu tuguk che u choto, ama ko yaoksei ko u noto." 
Ezekiel16:17 Kiib kogeny sonoeguk che kororon che bo tahabusiekyuk ak fedaisiekyuk, che kiga agonin ak iyachinege itonwekab murenik, ak oyai kugoinatet ak tuguchoto;" 
Ezekiel16:18 ak kiib ngoroiguk che kiginde lelesta, ak ituge tuguchoto, ak kiinde tainywa mwanikyuk ak nyamdutikyuk che kibeelei." 
Ezekiel16:19 Kiinde tainywa kogeny amitwogikyuk che kiagonin, busiek che tambulbul, ak mwanik, ak kumik, che kiabaenen, kiinde tainywa koek nyamdutiet, ak kitebi ko u noto; mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel16:20 Kiinam kogeny weriguk ak tibiguk, che kiisikwa, ak ieng’ji ichek si kobiit koam. Tos ki kit ne ming’in kugoinatosieguk," 
Ezekiel16:21 kot ibar lagokyuk ak igoite kobun mat igochini ichek? 
Ezekiel16:22 Ama ibwat eng’ tuguguk tugul che kiwechei, ak eng’ kugoinatosieguk, betusiekab ming’inateng’ung’, ye kiimi buch ach ngor, ak kiikwarkwarane korotiguk." 
Ezekiel16:23 Ak kingobata yaitwogiguk tugul, (bwa, bwa inye! Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah,)" 
Ezekiel16:24 iteekyigei ole toogunot ak iyachige ole kitororit eng’ oret age tugul. 
Ezekiel16:25 Kiiteech oldang’ung’ ole kitororit eng’ tabandab oret age tugul, ak iyai kororonindang’ung’ koek kit ne kiwechei, ak oipge ak age tugul ne siirtoi, ak ites kugoinateng’ung’." 
Ezekiel16:26 Kiiyai kogeny kugoinatet koboto Misrik, bikab kokweng’ung’, bikab borto; ak kiites kugoinateng’ung’, itacha." 
Ezekiel16:27 Keer anyun, kaachuul eunnyu atokyin, ak atil amitwogiguk che bo kotugul, ak agoiten koyaun kiy age tugul ichek che wechin, tibikab Pilistik, che ililandos amu ortinweguk che yaach." 
Ezekiel16:28 Kiiyai kogeny kugoinatet koboto Asurik, amu kima koyamin kiy; ee kiiyai kugoinatet koboto ichek, ago ma yamin kora." 
Ezekiel16:29 Kiites kugoinateng’ung’ eng’ emetab Kanan, agoi Kaldea; ago ma yamin kora." 
Ezekiel16:30 Nyalulat ne tia muguleldang’ung’, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, amu iyae tuguchuto tugul, boisietab chepkugoniot ne bou bik;" 
Ezekiel16:31 amu iteeche oldang’ung’ ole toogunot, ak iyachige oldang’ung’ ole kitororit eng’ oret age tugul; ama iige chepkugoniot, amu isase alisiet." 
Ezekiel16:32 Osotiot ne yaei ibetab ge! Ne ibegei ak toek kometo manong’otiondennyi! 
Ezekiel16:33 Igochin bichoto chepkugonik tugul tugukab kagaigaet: ago igochini inyendet tuguguk che bo kagaigaet chamaniguk tugul, ak igaigae ichek tuguchoto, si kobiit kobwanjin eng’ komosta age tugul agobo kugoinatosieguk." 
Ezekiel16:34 Ak oterjine ak kwonyik alak eng’ kugoinatosieguk, amu mami chi ne suubin oipge: ialisiei, ak amu magialin, i ter amu noto." 
Ezekiel16:35 Kas anyun, ee chepkugoniondoni, ng’olyotab Jehovah:" 
Ezekiel16:36 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Amu kigirong’ simdang’ung’, ak keng’anyin kegeerin imi ach ngor eng’ kugoinatosieguk che kiiyai ak chamaniguk; ak amu kanamonik tugul che bo tuguguk che kiwechei, ak agobo korotikab lagoguk che kiigochi ichek;" 
Ezekiel16:37 noto anyun, keero, ayumi chamaniguk tugul, che kiobaibaige, koboto ichek tugul che koicham, ak koboto ichek tugul che koiwech; ayumjinin ichek kobun komosta age tugul, ak ang’ang’ji ichek kogeerin imi ach ngor, si kobiit kogeer ach ngorieng’ung’ tugul." 
Ezekiel16:38 Ak aruogun, ko u ye kiruokyin kwonyik che butei kayosietab katunisiet, ak che tumdoi korotik; ak aibun korotikab neregek che ng’wonen ak ng’etkonda." 
Ezekiel16:39 Ak andein eunekwak, ak kobut oldang’ung’ ne toogunot, ak kobut oldinweguk che kitororitu; ak koreegunenen ngoroiguk, ak koib sonoeguk che kororon: ak kobagachin imi buch ach ngor." 
Ezekiel16:40 Ak komutun kogeny tuiyet kobokyin, ak kolagenen koik, ak kotoorin eng’ rotokwak bo chok." 
Ezekiel16:41 Ak kobeel goriguk, ak koyaun kiruogutik eng’ taitab kwonyik che chang’; ak aetenen kugoinatet, ama ialisiei kogeny." 
Ezekiel16:42 Agesu anyun neregekyuk che ng’wonen eng’ inye, ak koistoenengei ng’etkondanyu, ak asis, ma anerechi kogeny." 
Ezekiel16:43 Amu ma ibwat betusiekab ming’inateng’ung’, ago kiitaacha eng’ tuguchuto tugul; keer anyun, andoi agane ortinweguk baragung’ung’, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah: si ma iyai yaitioni itesyini tuguguk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel16:44 Keero, age tugul ne boisie kalewenaik, koboisie kalewenoni agobo inye, kolen, Kit ne u kamet, ko u noto chepto." 
Ezekiel16:45 I cheptab kamet, ne wechei manong’otiondennyi ak lagokyik; ak i chepto ne otupche ak chepkametwogiguk, che kiweche manong’otaikwak ak lagokwak: ki bo komet Hitik, ko bo kwandang’ung’ Amorik." 
Ezekiel16:46 Chepkameng’ung’ ne o ko Samaria, ne menyei komostab eungung’ ne bo katam, inendet ak tibikyik; ak chepkameng’ung’ ne ming’in, ne menyei komostab eung’ung’ ne bo tai, ko Sodom ak tibikyik." 
Ezekiel16:47 Ago ma isub ortinwekwak, anan isub iyai tugukwak che kiwechei; ago, nda ki kit ne ming’in noto, ko kiiyaitu inye kosiir ichek eng’ ortinweguk tugul." 
Ezekiel16:48 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ko u ye asobe, tom koyai Sodom chepkameng’ung’, inendet anan ko tibikyik, ko u ye kiiyai inye koboto tibiguk." 
Ezekiel16:49 Keero, ki mi tengektab chepkameng’ung’ Sodom; kitinyei inendet ak tibikyik menotet, biyendo, ak borotetab talbisto; ama igimit eunekab kibananok ak che matinyei kiy." 
Ezekiel16:50 Ak kimendos ichek, ak koyaei kit ne kiwechei eng’ tainnyu: kiaiste anyun ichek ko u ye kiageer ale nyolu." 
Ezekiel16:51 Ama yai Samaria tengekwogik che siirei kebebertab tengekwogiguk; ago koites tuguguk che kiwechei, kosiir ichek, ak koiityi imanda chepkametwogiguk eng’ tuguk tugul che kiwechei che koiyai." 
Ezekiel16:52 Ib inye kobunjin kalilaneng’ung’ amu koiruokyi chepkametwogiguk; bo imanda icheget kosiirin amu tengekwogiguk che koiyai che kiwechei kosiir choto koyai icheget: ee, i teweroksei aginye, ak iib kalilaneng’ung’, amu koiityi imanda chepkametwogiguk." 
Ezekiel16:53 Ak aweech kogeny ichek che kigeluul, che kigeluul che bo Sodom koboto tibikyik, ak che kigeluul che bo Samaria, koboto tibikyik, ak che kigeluul che bo luuleniguk che mi kwenunywa;" 
Ezekiel16:54 si kobiit iipchige kalilaneng’ung’, ak ililan amu tugul che koiyai, amu i kagaigaindenywa." 
Ezekiel16:55 Ak koweekyigei chepkametiniguk, Sodom ak tibikyik, atebwenywa ne ki bo tai, ak koweekyigei Samaria ak tibikyik atebenywa ne ki bo tai, ak iweekyige inye ak tibiguk, atebeng’wong’ ne ki bo tai." 
Ezekiel16:56 Amu kima imwa kiy agobo chepkameng’ung’ Sodom eng’ betusiekab menoteng’ung’; 
Ezekiel16:57 ye kitom keng’any yaitieng’ung’, ko u eng’ betusiekab chotisietab tibikab Suria, ak ne bo tugul che mi komoswekyik, tibikab Pilistik, che sasin eng’ komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel16:58 Koiib yaitieng’ung’ ak tuguguk che kiwechei, mwaei Jehovah." 
Ezekiel16:59 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ayaun ko u ye koiyai, ne koisas kayosiet ibut kayomiset." 
Ezekiel16:60 Nganda u noto, abwati kayomiset ne kigiyomisge ak inye eng’ betusiekab ming’inateng’ung’, ak agimitun kayomiset ne bo koigeny." 
Ezekiel16:61 Ibwat anyun ortinweguk, ak ililan, ye itaache chepkametwogiguk, che eechen ak che mengechen: ak agonin ichek koek tibiguk, ago ma eng’ kayomisutieng’ung’." 
Ezekiel16:62 Ak agimit kayomisennyu koboten; si inai ile a Jehovah: 
Ezekiel16:63 si kobiit ibwat, ak itoptoben, ametwegu kogeny, amu kalilaneng’ung’; ye kanyoun kaat tuguk tugul che kiiyai, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel17:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel17:2 Ee weritab chi, mwa tangochet, ak imwachi kalewenet gotab Israel;" 
Ezekiel17:3 ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole; Kinyonji Lebanon kipsichit ne no ne tinyei kebebaik che eechen ak ko koen, che nyiitat kororik che kitinyei saleiywek che ter, ak koib walitab tarakwet:" 
Ezekiel17:4 ak kieb temet ne ki tabanu barak ne kinamgei ak che ng’orng’oren, ak koib kwo emetab mung’aret; kiinde nganasetab chemung’arainik." 
Ezekiel17:5 Kiib kogeny keswek che bo emonoto, ak kwo kogolji ng’ung’unyek che akwaen; kilechi ole negite beek che chang’; kimin ko u koibeiyot." 
Ezekiel17:6 Ak kibit ak koek ketitab sabibuk ne tebeesitu ne magoitu, ne arung’jingei temenikyik, ak komi tigitikyik kurerennyi: kiek anyun ketitab sabibuk, ak kosich temenik, ak kong’atyo." 
Ezekiel17:7 Kimi kogeny kipsichit age ne o ne kitinyei kebebaik che eechen ak kororik che chang’: ak ogeero, kiaruny ketito bo sabibuk tigitikyik, kotokyi kipsichinoto, ak kowakta temenikyik kotokyigei inendet, eng’ kererjosiek ole kiga kiminji, kole si kobise beek kipsichinoto." 
Ezekiel17:8 Kiga kiminji ng’ung’unyek che miachen eng’ ole negite beek che chang’, si kobiit kowakta temenik, si kobiit koi logoek, si kobiit koek ketit ne kararan ne bo sabibuk." 
Ezekiel17:9 Mwa inye ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Tos mieitu? Tos maituti kipsichinoto tigitikyik, ak koeb logoekyik, si kobiit kores, si kobiit koresyo sogekyik tugul che ng’orng’or; agot ngo mami kimnatet ne wo anan bik che chang’ che itutu?" 
Ezekiel17:10 Ee, ogeero, tos mieitu ye kagemin? Tos maresei tugul, ye usyi usonetab kong’asis? Resei eng’ kererjosiek ole kibite." 
Ezekiel17:11 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel17:12 Mwachi anyun got ne ngeleliot, ilenji, Tos mongen ole teptoi tuguchu? Mwachi ichek, ilenji, Ogeero, kigonyo Jerusalem laitoriatab Babulon, ak koluul laitoriandennyi, ak bounikyik, ak komut ichek kobwa Babulon." 
Ezekiel17:13 Ak kiluul iyotetab laitoriat ak koyomisgei koboto inendet: kibirji kogeny inendet eng’ kayosiet, ak komut bik che kimen che bo emet:" 
Ezekiel17:14 kole, si kobiit konyeratit bounatet, si ma imuch koeetgei, ago si kobiit kotonon ye ribei kayomisennyi." 
Ezekiel17:15 Ago kiingelelji inendet amu kiiyokto tononjinikyik koba Misri, si kobiit kogochi inendet mbartanyisiek ak bik che chang’. Tos kiberuri? Tos chilil inendet ne yaei tuguk che u choto? Tos but kayomiset, ak kochilil?" 
Ezekiel17:16 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ko u ye asobe, meei inendet iman eng’ ole menyei laitoriat ne kiindoi inendet koek laitoriat, ne kisas kayosiennyi, ak kibut kayomisennyi, meei koboto inendet eng’ Babulon." 
Ezekiel17:17 Ama tilei kiy eng’ inendet Parao koboto lugennyi ne kim, ak kweanet ne o, eng’ luget, ye irurugot ng’ung’unyek koek tulonok ak koteech irimoik, si kobar bik che chang’." 
Ezekiel17:18 Amu kigosas kayosiet kobut arorutiet, ak ogeero, kigonde eunnyi ago kigoyai tuguchoto tugul; machilili." 
Ezekiel17:19 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ko u ye asobe, aipchini iman metinnyi kayosiennyu ne kigosas ak kayomisennyu ne kigobut." 
Ezekiel17:20 Ak aiitochini mestennyu inendet, ak konam mestennyu inendet ak amut inendet kwo Babulon, ak ager kong’ inendet eng’ oloto amu ngelelnatet ne kiingelelja." 
Ezekiel17:21 Ak kebare rotwetab chok bikyik tugul che kimweei eng’ kweanaikyik tugul, ak kiseerat che ng’etu koba usonet age tugul: si onai ole a Jehovah ne koamwa ng’olyondonito." 
Ezekiel17:22 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Aibe kogeny walitab tarakwet ne koi ak amin; ak aeb temet ne ng’arng’ar, eng’ temenikyik che ng’orng’or che tabanu barak, ak aminji tulwet ne koi ne toogunot." 
Ezekiel17:23 Aminjini tulwet ne koi ne bo Israel: ak kowakta, ak koi logoek, ak koek tarakwet ne mie: ak komeny kelunnyi taritik alak tugul che tirirendos; menyei taritichoto uruetab temenikyik." 
Ezekiel17:24 Si konai ketik tugul che bo timin kole, A Jehovah ne kiachooru ketit ne koi, ak aeet ketit ne ming’in, ak ayaam ketit ne tuon, ak agochi ketit ne yaamat kotunen: kaamwa ane Jehovah, ak ayae." 
Ezekiel18:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel18:2 Oboru nee si oboisie kalewenoni agobo emetab Israel, olen, Kigoam kwanisiek sabibuk che mindililen, ak kiliil kelekab lagok?" 
Ezekiel18:3 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ko u ye asobe, ko ma oboisie kogeny kalewenonito eng’ Israel." 
Ezekiel18:4 Ogeero, chechuk sobonwekab bik tugul; ko u ye nenyu sobondab kwanda, ko nenyu agine sobondab werit: meei sobondab chito ne yaei tengekto." 
Ezekiel18:5 Ago ngot ko bo iman chi, ak koyai kit ne bo iman ak ne litit," 
Ezekiel18:6 ak tomo koamisie tulonok, ama tokyi kanamonik che bo gotab Israel, ama ing’wanit osotiotab chitab kokwennyi, ama rikyi kwony eng’ betusiekyik che bo arawet;" 
Ezekiel18:7 ak tom koyachi chi kiy ne ya, ago kogoweekta kit ne kiginame besendo, koweekyi chito ne kiginame besendo, koweekyi chito ne kiyaachei, ama rebe chi kiy eng’ koromnatet, ak kigogochi amitwogik chito ne amei rubet, ak kolaaksechi ne mi ach ngor;" 
Ezekiel18:8 inendet ne tom kogoito tuguk si konyorune kelunet ne siirtoot, ama ibei che tesotin, ne kigoistoe eunnyi tengekto, ne kigoyai kiruoget ne bo iman eng’ kwenutab bik," 
Ezekiel18:9 ne kigowendote ng’atutikyuk, ak korib kiruogutikyuk, si koyai iman, bo iman chichoto, sobei inendet iman, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel18:10 Ngot kosich chichoto werit ne rebindet, ne tumdoi korotik, ak koyaei kit age tugul eng’ tuguchuto," 
Ezekiel18:11 ama yaei age eng’ boisionichuto, ago kigoamisie tulonok, ak kigong’wanit osotiotab chitab kokwennyi," 
Ezekiel18:12 ne kigoyachi ne ya kibananiat ak ne matinyei kiy, ne kigorebis eng’ koromnatet, ne tom koweekta kit ne kiginame besendo, ak kigotokyi konyekyik kanamonik, ne kigoyai kit ne kiwechei," 
Ezekiel18:13 ne kigogoito tuguk si konyorune kelunet ne siirtoot, ak koib che tesotin: tos sob chichoto iman? Masobei: kigoyai tuguchuto tugul kiwechei: meei iman; tebe inendet korotikyik." 
Ezekiel18:14 Ara anyun, ogeero, ngot kosich chichoto werit, ne keerei tengekwogik tugul che bo kwandanyi, che kigoyai, ak koiywei, ama yai ko u noto," 
Ezekiel18:15 ne tom koamisie tulonok, anan kotokyi konyekyik kanamonikab gotab Israel, ne tom kong’wanit osotiotab chitab kokwennyi," 
Ezekiel18:16 ne tom koyachi chi age tugul kiy ne ya, ne tom koib kiy ne kiname besendo, anan korebis eng’ koromnatet, ago kigogochi amitwogikyik chito ne amei rubet, ak kolaaksechi ne mi ach ngor," 
Ezekiel18:17 ne kigoisto eunnyi si matwa kibananiat, ne tom kotaach kelunet ne siirtoot anan che tesotin, ne kigoyai kiruogutikyuk, ne kigowendote ng’atutikyuk; ko mameei chichoto amu ng’ogistab kwandanyi, sobei iman." 
Ezekiel18:18 Ago ne u kwandanyi, amu kiusis eng’ kolgoliet, ak kereb tugukab tupchennyi eng’ koromnatet, ak koyai ne ma mie eng’ bikyik, ogeero, meei inendet eng’ tengektanyi." 
Ezekiel18:19 Ago omwae okwek ole, Amu nee anyun si manam werit ng’ogistab kwandanyi? Ye kagoyai werit kit ne bo iman ak ne litit, ak korib ng’atutikyuk, ak koyai, kosobei inendet iman." 
Ezekiel18:20 Meei chito ne yaei tengekto: manamei werit ng’ogistab kwandanyi, ama namei kwanda ng’ogistab werinnyi; tebe chito ne bo iman imandanyi, ak kotebe kiptengekyot tengektanyi." 
Ezekiel18:21 Ago ngot koweek kiptengekyot kometo tengekwogikyik tugul che kigoyai, ak korib ng’atutikyuk tugul, ak koyai kit ne bo iman ak ne litit, kosobei iman, mameei." 
Ezekiel18:22 Magiityin inendet agot agenge eng’ bistaosiekyik che kigoyai: sobei inendet eng’ imandanyi ne kigoyai. 
Ezekiel18:23 Tos abaibai eng’ meetab kiptengekyot? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah: tos ma abaibai ngo week kometo orennyi si kosob? 
Ezekiel18:24 Ago ye week ne bo iman kometo imandanyi, ak koyai tengekto, ak koyai ko u tuguk tugul che kiwechei che yaei chito ne ya, ko tos sob? Magibwati agot agenge eng’ boisionikyik che bo iman che kigoyai: meei amu kachililutiennyi ne kigoyai, ak amu tengektanyi ne kigoyai." 
Ezekiel18:25 Ago omwae ole, Ma bo iman oretab Jehovah. Ogas anyun-o, gotab Israel: tos ma bo iman orennyu? Tos ma ortinwekwok che ma bo iman?" 
Ezekiel18:26 Ye week chito ne bo iman kometo imandanyi, ak koyai tengekto, ak kome eng’ tengegoto; meei anyun amu tengektanyi ne kiyai." 
Ezekiel18:27 Kogeny, ye week kiptengekyot kometo tengektanyi ne kiga koyai, ak koyai kit ne bo iman ak ne litit, kosoru sobondanyi kosob." 
Ezekiel18:28 Amu ruchin ak kometo bistaosiekyik tugul che kigoyai, kosobei iman, mameei." 
Ezekiel18:29 Ago mwaei gotab Israel kole, Ma bo iman oretab Jehovah. Ee gotab Israel, tos ma bo iman ortinwekyuk? Tos ma ortinwekwok che ma bo iman?" 
Ezekiel18:30 Aruokwok anyun, ee gotab Israel, chi age tugul ko u ortinwekyik, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah. Oweege, ak owalage, omete bistaosiekwok tugul; si maek tengekto ng’emisieng’wong’." 
Ezekiel18:31 Omete bistaosiekwok tugul che kigogonok obistoe; ak ochopchige muguleldo ne leel ak tamirmiriet ne leel: amu nee si obegu, ee gotab Israel?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Amu ma abaibai eng’ meetab inendet ne meei, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah: owalage anyun, si osopche." 
Ezekiel19:1 Rir anyun agobo bounikab Israel," 
Ezekiel19:2 ak ile, Ki nee komet? Ki ng’etundo ne kotoy: kiribisi koboto ng’etunyik, kibaei arekyik eng’ kwenutab ng’etunyik che neran." 
Ezekiel19:3 Ak kibai age eng’ arekyik; kot koeet koek ng’etundo ne neran: ak kiinetgei loget, kiam bich." 
Ezekiel19:4 Kigas bororiosiek agobo inendet: ak kiname keringenywa: ak kiichuutune kombok agoi emetab Misri. 
Ezekiel19:5 Ak kingogeer kamet kole kigogenis ak kigobet kamang’unennyi, konam anyun age eng’ arekyik, ak koyai inendet koek ng’etundo ne neran." 
Ezekiel19:6 Ak kiwendote kwenutab ng’etunyik ak kiek ng’etundo ne neran: ak kiinetgei loget, kiam bich." 
Ezekiel19:7 Ak kinai gorikwak che bo laitorinik, ak king’em nganasokwak; ak kiguber emet, ak tugukab emonoto, amu tugetab borisenennyi." 
Ezekiel19:8 Kiibokyi anyun bororiosiek eng’ komoswek tugul kobunu emotinwek tugul: ak kiitochi inendet mestenywa, ak koname inendet keringenywa." 
Ezekiel19:9 Ak kiinde inendet korgoret, ko ratat eng’ kombok, ak komutyi inendet laitoriatab Babulon; kiimut inendet konyo irimoik, si mata kogas chi kutinnyi eng’ tulonokab Israel." 
Ezekiel19:10 Ki u komet ketitab sabibuk eng’ mbaretab sabibuk eng’ korotiguk, ne kigiminji ole negite beek che chang’; kiyiei mising’ ak ko nyiitat temenik amu beek che chang’." 
Ezekiel19:11 Ak kitinyei ketik che kimen che bo siarisiekab ichek che bounisiei, ak kigieet kogoit eng’ kwenutab temenik che nyigisen, ak kitook eng’ koindanywa koboto chang’indab temenikwak." 
Ezekiel19:12 Ago kigitut eng’ neregek che ng’wonen, kigiwirta kwo ng’ony, kiyaamnyo logoekyik eng’ usonetab kong’asis: kigiiri ketikyik che kimen ak koresyo; kilalyo kogesgei eng’ ma." 
Ezekiel19:13 Kogeminji anyun ong’atet, eng’ emet ne yaamat ne mami beek." 
Ezekiel19:14 Ak kagomisok mat eng’ ketikab temenikyik, kogobeel mat logoekyik, kot ko ma kotinyei ketit ne kim ne egu siaritab bounatet. Bo nito rirek, ak egu rirek." 
Ezekiel20:1 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo tisab, eng’ arawetab mut, betut ne bo taman ne bo arawanato, kobwa boisiek alage che bo Israel kobwa koteepse Jehovah, ak koteb ng’ony eng’ tainnyu." 
Ezekiel20:2 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel20:3 Weritab chi, ng’alalji boisiekab Israel, ilenji, Mwaei Kiptiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kaobwa oteepsena? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ko u ye asobe, ko machame oteepsena." 
Ezekiel20:4 Tos iruokyini ichek, ee weritab chi, tos iruokyini ichek? Iborji ichek konai tuguk che kiwechei che bo kwanisiekwak;" 
Ezekiel20:5 ak ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Eng’ betut ne kialewen Israel, ak ayogochi eunnyu iyotetab gotab Jakobo, ak aborjige ichek eng’ emetab Misri, ye kiayogochi eunnyu ichek alenji, A Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’;" 
Ezekiel20:6 kiayogochi eunnyu ichek eng’ betunoto, amutu ichek komong’ eng’ emetab Misri kobwa emet ne kiamararji ichek, ne nyiitat chego ak kumik, ne torornatetab emotinwek tugul:" 
Ezekiel20:7 ak kiamwachi ichek alenji, Ingometo chi age tugul eng’ okwek tuguk che kiwechei che kochamei konyekyik, amat ong’wanitege kanamonikab Misri: a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Ezekiel20:8 Ago kiingelelja, ma cham kogasa it; ma meto chi age tugul eng’ ichek tuguk che kiwechei che kichamei konyekwak, ama meto kanamonikab Misri: amwa anyun ale, Arong’jini ichek neregekyuk che ng’wonen, si kobiit ayai neregekyuk kosulda eng’ ichek eng’ emetab Misri." 
Ezekiel20:9 Ago kiaboisie amu kainennyu, si ma kimuruon kogeerei bororiosiek, che kimi ichek kwenunywa, bororiosiek che kigeerei aborjinige ichek, amutu komong’ eng’ emetab Misri."
