Ezekiel20:10 Amutu anyun ichek komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, amutu kobwa ong’atet." 
Ezekiel20:11 Ak kiagochi ichek ng’atutikyuk, ak aborji kiruogutikyuk, che ngo yai chi kosobei eng’ choto." 
Ezekiel20:12 Kiagochi ichek kogeny sabatosiekyuk agichek, koek kaborunet eng’ kwenunnyu, ane ak ichek, si kobiit konai kole a Jehovah ne atabani ichek." 
Ezekiel20:13 Ago kiingelelja gotab Israel eng’ ong’atet: ma bendate ng’atutikyuk, ak kiesio kiruogutikyuk, che ngo yai chi kosobei eng’ choto; kiimuruon ichek mising’ sabatosiekyuk: kiamwa anyun ale, arong’jini ichek eng’ ong’atet neregekyuk che ng’wonen si ages ichek." 
Ezekiel20:14 Ago kiaboisie anyun kainennyu, si ma kimuruon eng’ taitab bororiosiek, che kigeeronu ichek amutu komong’." 
Ezekiel20:15 Kogeny, kiang’werere ichek eunnyu eng’ ong’atet, ale mamuti ichek koba emet ne kiagochi, ne nyiitat chego ak kumik, ne torornatetab emotinwek tugul;" 
Ezekiel20:16 amu kiesio kiruogutikyuk, ama bendate ng’atutikyuk ak komuruon sabatosiekyuk: amu kiisubot mugulelwekwak kanamonikwak." 
Ezekiel20:17 Nganda u noto, ko kirire kondanyu ichek si mang’em, ama agesu ichek eng’ ong’atet." 
Ezekiel20:18 Ak kialenji lagokwak eng’ ong’atet, Amobendate ng’atutikab kwanisiekwok, anan osub kiruogutikwak, anan ong’wanitege kanamonikwak;" 
Ezekiel20:19 a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’; obendate ng’atutikyuk, ak orib kiruogutikyuk ak oyai;" 
Ezekiel20:20 ak otaban sabatosiekyuk; si koek kaborunet eng’ kwenunnyo, ane ak okwek, si kobiit onai ole a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Ezekiel20:21 Ago kiingelelja agichek lagok; ma bendate ng’atutikyuk anan korib kiruogutikyuk, koyai, che ngo yai chi kosobei eng’ choto; kiimuruon ichek sabatosiekyuk: amwa anyun ale arong’jini ichek neregekyuk che ng’wonen si kobiit ayai neregekyuk kosulda eng’ ichek eng’ ong’atet." 
Ezekiel20:22 Ago kiaiste eunnyu, kiaboisie amu kainennyu, si ma kimuruon eng’ taitab bororiosiek, che kigeeronu ichek amutu komong’." 
Ezekiel20:23 Ak kiang’werere ichek eunnyu eng’ ong’atet, si kobiit aseer ichek eng’ bororiosiek, ak ayeste ichek koyom emotinwek;" 
Ezekiel20:24 amu ma yai kiruogutikyuk, ago kiesio ng’atutikyuk, ak komuruon sabatosiekyuk, ak kiisuboti konyekwak kanamonikab kwanisiekwak." 
Ezekiel20:25 Kiagochi anyun kogeny ng’atutik che kima ko miachen, ak kiruogutik che masobe;" 
Ezekiel20:26 ak kiamuruon ichek eng’ konunoikwak ichegei, amu kiigoito lagok tugul che yatei iyotet kobun mat, si kobiit agochi ichek kobononso, si konai kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel20:27 Noto anyun, ee weritab chi, ng’alalji gotab Israel ilenji ichek, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kigochuba kwanisiekwok kogeny eng’ nito amu kachiliilutiet ne kiyaiywa." 
Ezekiel20:28 Amu ye kingamutu ichek kobwa emet, ne kiaiitochi eunnyu agochi, kogeer tulwet age tugul ne koi, ak ketit age tugul ne nyigis, ak kiigoito eng’ oloto korosekwak, ak kiigoito eng’ oloto kagochinoikwak che bo tagisiet, kibeelei kogeny nyamdutikwak, ak korong’ji oloto kagochinoikwak che kieei." 
Ezekiel20:29 Yeityo alenji ichek, Bo nee komosta ne toror ole obendi? Kigiguure anyun yoto Bama agoi rani." 
Ezekiel20:30 Mwachi anyun gotab Israel ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Tos omuruonige ko u biteetab kwanisiekwok? Ak oyae kugoinatet osubi tugukwak che kiwechei?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Ak ye ogoitoi kagochinoikwok, ye ogoitoi werikwok kobun mat, ko tos ma omuruonege kanamonikwok agoi rani? Ko tos oteepsena, okwek gotab Israel? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ko u ye asobe, ko ma achame oteepsena:" 
Ezekiel20:32 ak mabiitu agot kitigin noto obwati; amu omwae ole, Kigergeitu ak bororiosiek, ak kergeitu ak ortinwekab emotinwek, keot ketik ak koik." 
Ezekiel20:33 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Iman, ko u ye asobe, aegu laitoriat aboiywok eng’ eut ne kim, ak eng’ eut ne chuulat, ak eng’ neregek che ng’wonen che rong’ugei." 
Ezekiel20:34 Ak amutwok omong’u eng’ bororiosiek, ak ayumak eng’ eut ne kim, ak eng’ eut ne chuulat, ak eng’ neregek che ng’wonen che rong’ugei, omong’une emotinwek ole kigiseerjok;" 
Ezekiel20:35 ak amutwak obwa ong’atetab bororiosiek, ak agerak kong’ kimni eng’ oloto." 
Ezekiel20:36 Ko u ye kiagere kong’ kwanisiekwok eng’ ong’atetab emetab Misri, agerok kong’ anyun ko u noto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel20:37 Ak amutak obun kureretab kirokto, ak amutwak obwa ratutietab kayomisutiet." 
Ezekiel20:38 Ak atililok aiste ngelelik eng’ kwenung’wong’, ak ichek che kiingelelja; amutu ichek komong’ eng’ emet ne kigaba kotebe, ago mabendi emetab Israel: si kobiit onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel20:39 Ago eng’ okwek, ee gotab Israel, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ngot ko moepcha it; obe anyun ak koot chi tugul kanamonikyik eng’ betusiek che bwanei agichek: ago ma omuruoni kainennyu ne tilil kogeny eng’ kagochinoikwok, ak eng’ kanamonikwok." 
Ezekiel20:40 Amu tun ota got komugul ne bo Israel eng’ tulwennyu ne tilil, eng’ tulwet ne koi ne bo Israel, ota ichek tugul eng’ emet, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah: ataache ichek eng’ oloto, ak amagenak eng’ oloto kagochinoikwok, ak tongoanikab kagochinoikwok, koboto tugukwok tugul che tililen." 
Ezekiel20:41 Ataachok ko u nyamdutiet ne anyiny, ye amutwok omong’une bororiosiek, ak ayumak omong’une emotinwek ole kigiseerjok; ak aegu ne itabanat eng’ okwek kogeerei bororiosiek." 
Ezekiel20:42 Ak onai ole a Jehovah, ye amutwok obwa emetab Israel, emet ne kiaiitochi eunnyu ale agochini kwanisiekwok." 
Ezekiel20:43 Ak obwat eng’ oloto ortinwekwok ak boisionikwok tugul, che kiong’wanitege; ak osasge amu yaitwogikwok tugul che kioyai." 
Ezekiel20:44 Ak onai ole a Jehovah, ye kaaboisie agobo okwek amu kainennyu, ma ko u ortinwekwok che yaachen, ama ko u boisionikwok che samis, ee okwek gotab Israel, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel20:45 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel20:46 Ee, weritab chi, tokyi togeng’ung’ murot ne bo tai ak imwachi ng’aleguk murot ne bo tai, ak imaotenji osnetab emetab Murot ne bo Tai;" 
Ezekiel20:47 ak imwachi osnetab Murot ne bo Tai, ilenji, Kas ng’olyotab Jehovah; Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, anaami mat eng’ kwenung’ung’, ak kobeel ketit age tugul ne tuon, ak ketit age tugul ne yaamat: magimisi liblibenetab maata, ak komel togochik tugul koboch murot ne bo tai agoi murot ne bo katam." 
Ezekiel20:48 Ak kogeer bik tugul kole a Jehovah ne kanaami maata: magimisi. 
Ezekiel20:49 Amwa anyun ale, Bwa Kiptaiyat Jehovah! Mwaei ichek agobo ane kole, Tos ma ng’alalindet ne bo kalewenaik inendet?" 
Ezekiel21:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel21:2 Ee, weritab chi, tokyi togeng’ung’ Jerusalem, mwachi ng’alek komoswek che tililen, ak imaotenji emetab Israel;" 
Ezekiel21:3 ak ilenji emetab Israel, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, aborienen ak ang’usu rotwennyu bo chok, ak aiste eng’ inye chito ne bo iman ak ne ya." 
Ezekiel21:4 Amu aistoi eng’ inye chito ne bo iman ak ne ya, ng’usugei anyun rotwennyu bo chok kwo kobar bik tugul koboch murot ne bo tai agoi murot ne bo katam:" 
Ezekiel21:5 si konai bik tugul kole, A Jehovah ne kang’usu rotwennyu bo chok; ma kogetitagei kogeny." 
Ezekiel21:6 Tigen anyun, inye weritab chi; tigen eng’ iletab sueng’ung’ ak eng’ ng’wanindo kogeerei ichek." 
Ezekiel21:7 Ak ye teebenen, kolenjin, Amu nee si itigen? Ile anyun, Amu ng’alek, amu nyonei: ak kome muguleldo age tugul ak konyalulso eunek tugul, ak kotanui tamirmiriet age tugul, ak kochootyo kutung’oik tugul ko u beek: ogeero, nyonei, ak ko yaoksei, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel21:8 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel21:9 Ee, weritab chi, maoten, mwa ile, Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole; Mwa ile, Rotwetab chok, rotwetab chok, kagelit, ak kagesit kogeny:" 
Ezekiel21:10 kagelit, si kobiit kobaris; kagesit si kobiit koigei kalyelet: tos kiboiboitu anyun? Kiroktab werinnyu ne sasei ketit age tugul." 
Ezekiel21:11 Ak kigigon si kobiit kesit, si kimuch kenam: kilitei rotwetab chok, ee, kisitei, si kobiit kinde eutab barindet." 
Ezekiel21:12 Waach ak ite, ee, weritab chi: amu kagong’urur bikyuk, koboto bounik tugul che bo Israel: kagigoito ichek kobar rotwetab chok koboto bikyuk: irabach anyun kubestang’ung’." 
Ezekiel21:13 Amu mi tiemisiet; egu nee anyun ngot ko ma komi kirokto ne sasisiei? Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah. 
Ezekiel21:14 Maoten anyun inye weritab chi, ak irabach euneguk; ak ingotesak rotwetab chok konyil aeng’, ingotesak ne bo somok, rotwetab chok ne bo che kigiguoten ne bo meet: rotwetab chok ne bo inendet ne o ne kigiguoten ne bo meet, ne kichut gorikwak che bo orit." 
Ezekiel21:15 Koatokyi rotwetab chok ormarichokwak tugul, si komeiyo mugulelwekwak, ak kotesogis kanagutikwak: haa! Kogeyai koigei kalyelet, kogelit si kobaris." 
Ezekiel21:16 Iyumge, ui komostab tai; chopge, chopge, ui komostab katam; oldo tugul ole ketokyi togeng’ung’." 
Ezekiel21:17 Arabachi eunekyuk, ak agesu anyun neregekyuk che ng’wonen: kamwae ane Jehovah ng’olyondonito." 
Ezekiel21:18 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel21:19 Ee, weritab chi, lewenjige kogeny ortinwek aeng’, si kobiit konyo rotwetab chok ne bo laitoriatab Babulon; bunu choto tuwai emet agenge; ak iaror komosta eng’ siret, iaror eng’ tabandab oret ne wendi nganaset." 
Ezekiel21:20 Lewen oret si kobiit koit rotwetab chok Raba ne bo lagokab Amon, ak koit Juda eng’ Jerusalem ne ng’otat." 
Ezekiel21:21 Amu kitonon laitoriatab Babulon eng’ ole besiechin ortinwek, eng’ ole besiechin ortinwek aeng’u, si kong’orso: kisaisach kipchabonik, kisa kanamonik, kibir moet kogeer koet." 
Ezekiel21:22 Kimi eunnyi ne bo tai ng’orset agobo Jerusalem, si konde injinisiek che kibutisie, si koseng’eng’ji barisiet, ak kowaach mising’, konde injinisiek taitab ormarichok, kowasyi ng’ung’unyek, koteech irimoik." 
Ezekiel21:23 Ak egu noto eng’ ichek ng’orset ne bo buch eng’ tainywa, eng’ icheget che kigoyosiechi kayosiosiek: ago ibwatyin ichek yaitiet, si kobiit kenam." 
Ezekiel21:24 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kiogonu kibwat yaitieng’wong’, amu kigeng’any bistaosiekwok kotook, kot kotook tengekwogikwok eng’ boisionikwok tugul; amu kigibwatak, kenamok anyun kityo." 
Ezekiel21:25 Ee inye ne ya, ne kigiguotenin ne bo meet, bounindetab Israel, ne kagonyo betunnyi, eng’ betusiekab yaitiet ne bo let;" 
Ezekiel21:26 mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Inemu chepkulet ak ireegu nariet: ma koigeitu nito kogeny: ieet noto ming’n, ak iming’in noto toror." 
Ezekiel21:27 Agabui, agabui, agabui; ma kobiitu noto kogeny, kot konyo ne nyoljin kobunji; si agochi inendet." 
Ezekiel21:28 Maoten inye weritab chi, ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah agobo lagokab Amon, ak agobo tewernatenywa, ko u ni kole; mwa ile, Rotwetab chok, kaging’us rotwetab chok, kagesit agobo barisiet, si kobiit kobaris, si koigei kalyelet:" 
Ezekiel21:29 kota kogeerjinin tangoita, kota kong’orei lembechek agobo inye, si kondein kaatwekab kiptengeginik che kigiguoten ne bo meet, che kagonyo betunywa, eng’ betusiekab yaitiet ne bo let." 
Ezekiel21:30 Ker rotwetab chok. Aruogun eng’ ole kigiyaenen, eng’ emet ne kigisikyinin." 
Ezekiel21:31 Ak arong’jin neregekyuk; aguutyinin matab neregekyuk: ak andein eunekab bik che u tiong’ik, che ng’omen eng’ ng’emisiet." 
Ezekiel21:32 Iegu kwenik che kilaali; kitumjin korotiguk kwenutab emet; magibwatin kogeny: amu kamwae ane Jehovah ng’olyondonito. 
Ezekiel22:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel22:2 Ee, inye weritab chi, tos iruokyini, iruokyini nganaset ne bo korotik? Iborji anyun konai tugukyuk tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel22:3 Ak imwa ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Nganaset ne tumdoi korotik eng’ kwenunnyi, si kobiit konyo betunnyi, ne yachinegei kanamonik, kong’wanitegei!" 
Ezekiel22:4 Kanamin ng’ogisto amu korotiguk che kiitumde, kiging’wanitin eng’ kanamoniguk che kiiyai; ak kiigochi betusieguk korik, ak kaiit ye boch kenyisieguk: kaayain kotewerin bororiosiek, ak ne kichotei eng’ emotinwek tugul." 
Ezekiel22:5 Chotin che negit koboto che looen, inye ne i muruon ak ko nyiitat wasetab ge." 
Ezekiel22:6 Ogeero, bounikab Israel, mi age tugul eng’ kimnatennyi, eng’ kwenung’ung’, si kobiit kotumda korotik." 
Ezekiel22:7 Kigosas ichek eng’ inye kwanda ak kamet; kigonyalil ichek toek eng’ kwenung’ung’: kigoyachi ne ya eng’ inye ne matinyei kwanda ak mosoget. 
Ezekiel22:8 Kiisas tugukyuk che tililen, ak imuruon sabatosiekyuk." 
Ezekiel22:9 Kigotebe chaamik kwenung’ung’ si kotumdoi korotik: ak kigoamisie tulonok eng’ inye: kigoyai yaitiet eng’ kwenung’ung’. 
Ezekiel22:10 Kigong’any eng’ inye kwanisiekwak kotebe ach ngor: kigosuub eng’ kwenung’ung’ kwondo ne ki itabanat eng’ betusiekyik che bo arawet. 
Ezekiel22:11 Ak kigoyai age kit ne kiwechei koboto osotiotab chitab kokwennyi, koyai age yaitiet kong’wanit osotiotab werinnyi; ak kigosuub age chepkamet, cheptab kwandanyi, eng’ inye." 
Ezekiel22:12 Kigotaach ichek eng’ inye tugukab kagaigaet si kotumda korotik; kiib kelunet ne siirtoot ak che tesotin, ak kiinyoru borotet eng’ keiyandit amu kiisastae bikab kokweng’ung’, ak kilutiena, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel22:13 Keer anyun-o, kiarabach eunekyuk agobo keluneng’ung’ ne ma bo iman ne kiinyoru, ak eng’ korotiguk che mi kwenung’ung’." 
Ezekiel22:14 Tos imuchi komuita muguleldang’ung’, anan kogimegitu euneguk, eng’ betusiek che agerin kong? Kamwae ane Jehovah ng’olyondonito, ak ayae." 
Ezekiel22:15 Ak aseerjin bororiosiek, ak ayestochin emotinwek; ak agesu simdang’ung’." 
Ezekiel22:16 Ak imuruonge inyege, eng’ taitab bororiosiek; si kobiit inai ile a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel22:17 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel22:18 Ee, weritab chi, kigoek eng’ ane gotab Israel michikyigek che kigenendoe feda: kigoek ichek tugul sugunwet ak kibatit ak karik ak ngosielait, che mi mat ne o; ichek ko michikyigek che kigenendoe feda." 
Ezekiel22:19 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kioegu okwek tugul michikyigek che kigenendoe feda, ogeero, ayumjinok Jerusalem." 
Ezekiel22:20 Ko u ye kiyumjin mat ne o feda ak sugunwet ak karik, ak ngosielait ak kibatit, si kobiit keguut mat kobeel kochootyo; ayumok anyun ko u noto eng’ neregekyuk, ak eng’ neregekyuk che ng’wonen, ak andeok oloto, si ochootye." 
Ezekiel22:21 Ee, ayumok tugul, ak aguutak eng’ matab neregekyuk, ak ochootye eng’ maata." 
Ezekiel22:22 Ko u ye chootos feda eng’ mat ne o, ochootosi ak okwek eng’ maata; si onai ole a Jehovah ne kaarong’jok neregekyuk che ng’wonen." 
Ezekiel22:23 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel22:24 Ee, weritab chi, ilenji emonoto, I emet ne tom kianyiny, anan kerobonji eng’ betutab neregek." 
Ezekiel22:25 Mitei kwenunnyi chaamset ne bo maotikyik, ne u ng’etundo ne boriseni kobarisiei: kigobar sobonwek; ibei konoraik ak tuguk che bo kamanutiet ne o; kigotes mosogik eng’ kwenunnyi." 
Ezekiel22:26 Kigobut tisiikyik ng’atutiennyu, ak komuruon tugukyuk che tililen: ma ibesio che tililen ak che ma tililen, ama inet bik koguiyo tuguk che ma ianyinyotin ak che ianyinyotin, ak kigotuch konyekwak si mageer sabatosiekyuk, ak kiging’wanita eng’ kwenunywa." 
Ezekiel22:27 Kaigei bounikyik eng’ kwenunnyi suik che barisiei; si kotumda korotik, ak kong’em sobonwek, si kobiit konyor borotet ne ma bo iman." 
Ezekiel22:28 Ak kigomalse maotikyik tartarik che ma miachen, komalsechi ichek, kogeerei tangoita, ak kong’orjin ichek lembechek, kolenjin, Mwaei ko u ni Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ye ma mwa kiy Jehovah." 
Ezekiel22:29 Kigoboisie bikab emet sastaet, ak korebisiei; ee, kigoiim kibananok ak che matinyei kiy, ak kigosastae toondet eng’ oret ne ya." 
Ezekiel22:30 Kiacheng’ anyun chi eng’ kwenunywa, si kotuur ng’otwet, ak kotonon eng’ tainnyu eng’ ole kibutok, agobo emet, si mang’em emonoto: ago ma anyoru chi." 
Ezekiel22:31 Kaarong’ji anyun neregekyuk ichek amu noto; kaagesu eng’ matab neregekyuk: kiande ortinwekwak metowekwak, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel23:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel23:2 Ee, weritab chi, kimi kwonyik aeng’ che ki tibikab chebioset agenge." 
Ezekiel23:3 Ak kiyai ichek kugoinatosiek eng’ Misri; kiyai kugoinatosiek eng’ ming’inatenywa: kigichiil kinaikwak eng’ oloto, ak kigitui kutuswekab kinaikwak che bo bergeinatenywa eng’ oloto." 
Ezekiel23:4 Kainaikwak ko ki Ohola, ne o, ak Oholiba, chepkamet: ak kibunja, ak kisich werik ak tibik. Ak ki u ni kainaikwak, Samaria ko Ohola, ak Jerusalem ko Oholiba." 
Ezekiel23:5 Ak kiyai Ohola kugoinatet ye kita ko nenyu; ak kicham mising’ chamanikyik, choto ko Asuriek, bikab kokwennyi," 
Ezekiel23:6 che kiilaachi ngoroik che tuuen ne nyalil, che ki kiruogik ak bounik, murenik tugul che kichamei, murenik che lanyei mbartanyisiek." 
Ezekiel23:7 Ak kiyai kugoinatosiekyik koboto ichek, murenik tugul che kororon mising’ che bo Asuria, ak age tugul ne kichamei mising’. Kiing’wanitegei kanamonikwak tugul." 
Ezekiel23:8 Ama meto kugoinatosiekyik koboch betusiekab Misri; amu kiruiyo koboto inendet koboch ming’inatennyi, ak kitui kutuswekab kinaik che bo bergeinatennyi: ak kiyai kugoinatenywa mising’ koboto inendet." 
Ezekiel23:9 Kiande anyun inendet eunekab chamanikyik, kwo eunekab Asuriek, che kichamei mising’." 
Ezekiel23:10 King’any chuto inendet koteb ach ngor: kiimut werikyik ak tibikyik ak kobar kwonyoto eng’ rotwetab chok: kiek teweria eng’ kwonyik; amu kiiruokyi inendet. 
Ezekiel23:11 Ak kigeerei nito Oholiba chepkamet, ago king’emak inendet mising’ eng’ chamennyi kosiir chepkamet, ak eng’ kugoinatosiekyik che kichang’a kosiir che bo chepkamet." 
Ezekiel23:12 Kicham mising’ Asuriek, che ki kiruogutik ak bounik, bikab kokwennyi, che kiilaachigei mising’, murenik che lanyei mbartanyisiek, murenik tugul che kichamei." 
Ezekiel23:13 Ak kiageer ale kiging’wanit; kiisub tuwai oret agenge. 
Ezekiel23:14 Ak kites kugoinatosiekyik; amu kigeer itonwekab bik che kigisirji inat, itonwekab Kaldeik che kigisire saleiywek che biriren," 
Ezekiel23:15 che kirategei birenoik, ak kotaae metowekwak ngoroik che kigisal, ko bounik tugul, che tiny kegeer, che kergei ak Babulonik eng’ Kaldea, emenywa ne kigisikyin." 
Ezekiel23:16 Ak kingogeer ichek kocham ngunoto, ak koyokyi bik koba Kaldea." 
Ezekiel23:17 Ak kibwanji inendet Babulonik eng’ itogutab chamnyet, ak kiing’wanit ichek inendet eng’ kugoinatenywa, ak kiimuruongei koboto ichek, ak kitoiyo sobondanyi ak bichoto." 
Ezekiel23:18 King’any anyun kugoinatosiekyik, ak kong’anygei koteb ach ngor: koistoegei anyun sobondanyu inendet, ko u ye kiistoegei sobondanyu tupchennyi." 
Ezekiel23:19 Ago kites kugoinatosiekyik, kobwati betusiekab ming’inatennyi, ye kingoyaei kugoinatet eng’ emetab Misri." 
Ezekiel23:20 Ak kicham mising’ chamanikyik, che ki u borwekwak borwekab sigirok, ak ki u tuguk che mong’une ichek, tugukab mbartanyisiek." 
Ezekiel23:21 Ibwat anyun yaitietab ming’inateng’ung’, ye kingotui Misrik kutuswekab kinaiguk che bo ming’inateng’ung’." 
Ezekiel23:22 Ara anyun, ee Oholiba, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, ang’eetyinin chamaniguk, che kigotoiyegei sobondang’ung’, ak amutu ichek kobwanjin eng’ komosta age tugul;" 
Ezekiel23:23 Babulonik ak Kaldeik tugul, Pekod ak Soa ak Koa, koboto Asuriek tugul: murenik che kichamei, che ki kiruogik ak bounik ichek tugul, bounik ak bik che toogunotin, kilanyei ichek tugul mbartanyisiek." 
Ezekiel23:24 Ak kobokyin kotinyei karik, karisiek che bo luget ak karisiek che lau tuguk, ak tuiyet ne bo bororiosiek: ibokyinin kotinyei long’onik che eechen ak che mengechen ak chepkuloikab luget eng’ komoswek tugul: ak agochi ichek kiruoget, si koruogun, ko u kiruogutikwak." 
Ezekiel23:25 Ak atokyin ng’etkondanyu, ak kogerin kong’ ichek eng’ neregek che ng’wonen; tilei serung’ung’ ak itiguk; ak kebare rotwetab chok biguk che king’et: imuti ichek weriguk ak tibiguk; ak kobeel mat biguk che king’et." 
Ezekiel23:26 Ireegunenen kogeny ngoroik, ak koibenen tuguguk che kororon." 
Ezekiel23:27 Agesu yaitieng’ung’ eng’ inye, ak kugoinateng’ung’ ne kiibu eng’ emetab Misri si mata inyalil ichek, anan kota ibwat Misri kogeny." 
Ezekiel23:28 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, andein eutab ichek che iweche, andein eutab ichek che kigotoiyegei sobondang’ung’:" 
Ezekiel23:29 ak kogerin kong’ eng’ wechet, ak korebenen boisieng’ung’ tugul, ak kobagachin itebe buch ach ngor: ak keng’anyin itebi buch eng’ kugoinatosieguk, yaitieng’ung’ koboto kugoinatosieguk." 
Ezekiel23:30 Kiyaun tuguchuto, amu kiiyai kugoinatet isuboti bororiosiek, ak amu kiimuruonegei kanamonikwak." 
Ezekiel23:31 Kiisub oretab chepkomet; noto anyun andoi kikombennyi eung’ung’. 
Ezekiel23:32 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Iee kikombetab chepkomet, ne o ak ko baraa: kirorechinin kerenyin ak kesasin; chang’ tugukab kikombanato." 
Ezekiel23:33 Kinyiitin bogitet ak arogenet, koboto kikombetab kwong’et, ak bananda, koboto kikombetab chepkomet Samaria." 
Ezekiel23:34 Iee ichololi, ak inyei rokyonokyik, ak igerer kinaiguk; amu kamwae ane ng’olyondonito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel23:35 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kiiutiena, ak ituktocha batai, kesen anyun yaitieng’ung’ agine ak kugoinatosieguk." 
Ezekiel23:36 Kimwawa anyun Jehovah kogeny, kolenja: Ee, weritab chi, tos iruokyini Ohola ak Oholiba? Iborji anyun ichek tugukwak che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel23:37 Amu kigoyai ibetab ge, ak komi korotik eunekwak, ak kigoipgei koboto kanamonikwak; ak kigogochi ichek kogeny werikwak che kisikwa, kiigoito kobun mat si kobiit kebeel." 
Ezekiel23:38 Kigoyaiywa kogeny nito: kigong’wanit oldanyu ne tilil eng’ betunoto, ak komuruon sabatosiekyuk." 
Ezekiel23:39 Amu ye kingobarji lagokwak kanamonikwak, kobwa betunoto oldanyu ne tilil komuruon; ak ogeero, kiyai noto eng’ gonnyu." 
Ezekiel23:40 Ak kogeny kioguur bik eng’ ole loo: che kiga kiyokyi, ak ogeero, kibwa; kiiungei amu bichoto, ak isal konyeguk, ak kiilelesonjinege tugukab lelesta;" 
Ezekiel23:41 ak kiitebe itogut ne kararan, ne kimi tainnyi meset ne chobot, ne kiinde nyamdutikyuk che kibeelei ak mwanikyuk." 
Ezekiel23:42 Ak kimi ak inendet eng’ yoto tugetab tuiyet ne kitalbisi: ak kigimut eng’ ong’atet bik alak tugul koboto kibogitinik; ak kiilaakyi karikab eunek ichek tuwai, ak kiilaakyi chepkuloik che kororon." 
Ezekiel23:43 Kiamwa anyun agobo inendet ne kiyai ibetab ge koboch keny, ale, Yaei anyun kugoinatosiek koboto inendet, ak inendet koboto ichek." 
Ezekiel23:44 Ak kiipgei ak inendet, ko u ye ibegei ak chepkugoniot: kiipgei anyun ko u noto koboto Ohola ak Oholiba, kwonyik che yaachen." 
Ezekiel23:45 Tun iruokyin bikab iman ichek, eng’ kiruogetab chepkugonik, ak eng’ kiruogetab kwonyik che tumdoi korotik; amu icheget ko chepkugonik, ak komi korotik eunekwak." 
Ezekiel23:46 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amutyini ichek tuiyet, ak agoite ichek kewirji komosi ak komosi ak keluul." 
Ezekiel23:47 Ak kolach tuiyet ichek eng’ koik, ak kobar eng’ rotokwak che bo chok; ak kobar werikwak ak tibikwak, ak kobeel gorikwak." 
Ezekiel23:48 Aistoi anyun ko u noto yaitiet eng’ emet, si kobiit kinet kwonyik tugul si ma kosubi yaitieng’wong’." 
Ezekiel23:49 Ak kogeerwok ko u yaitieng’wong’, ak ogesen tengekwogikab kanamonikwak: si onai ole a Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel24:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, eng’ kenyitab sogol, eng’ arawetab taman, eng’ betut ne bo taman ne bo arawanato, kolenja," 
Ezekiel24:2 Ee, weritab chi, sir kainetab betut, ne bo betunoto: kiibokyi laitoriatab Babulon Jerusalem eng’ betunoto." 
Ezekiel24:3 Ak imwachi kalewenet got ne ngeleliot, ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Kotkot teret, kotkot, ak rong’ji beek:" 
Ezekiel24:4 inde tuguk che iyoi kiy age tugul ne mie, kubesto, ak buita; inyiit kowek che miachen." 
Ezekiel24:5 Kwei kechirek che miach eng’ akwet, ak irurukyi ma kowek: ingowasgei mising’; ee, iyoe teronoto kowechoto." 
Ezekiel24:6 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole: Bwa nganaset ne bo korotik, teret ne kigoruotito ole bo orit, teret ne tomo kobek karuotitoennyi! Inemu agenge agenge; mami barbariat ne kaibutyi teronoto." 
Ezekiel24:7 Amu mi korotikyik kwenunnyi; kiinde ruandet ne mami kiy; ma tumji ng’ony, si ketuge temburiek;" 
Ezekiel24:8 si kobiit kong’eet neregek che ng’wonen konyo koyaakta mugetut, kaande korotikyik ruandet barak si ma kituch." 
Ezekiel24:9 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Bwa nganaset ne bo korotik! Atese kogeny karurugutiet koeet. 
Ezekiel24:10 Nde kwenik che chang’, ilaal mat ne o, iyo banyek komie, ak ichob sutek konyigisitu, ak ingolalyo kowek." 
Ezekiel24:11 Yeityo igotkot teronoto ko mi buch, eng’ maata, si kolal, ak kolal sugunwennyi, si kochoot simdanyi ne mi orit, si kolal karuotitoennyi." 
Ezekiel24:12 Kiimgei eng’ boisiet: ago ma istoegei inendet karuotitoennyi ne o; ama iwong’gei karuotitoennyi eng’ ma. 
Ezekiel24:13 Mi yaitiet simdang’ung’: amu kiatililin, ama itililage, magitililin kogeny eng’ simdang’ung’, kot agesu neregekyuk che ng’wonen eng’ inye." 
Ezekiel24:14 Kamwae ane Jehovah ng’olyondonito: isuldoi, ak ayae noto; maweechige let, amarira mo, amawale kabwatutikyuk; iruogun ichek ko u ortinweguk, ak ko u boisioniguk, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel24:15 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel24:16 Ee, weritab chi, keero, aistoi eng’ yoto ne iboiboi konyeguk: ago metei anan irir, ama saitoi beeguk che bo kong’." 
Ezekiel24:17 Tigen, ago ma mising’; ametechi che kigobek, taae meting’ung’ anget, ak ilaach kweoniguk, ametuch kuting’ung’, ameam amitwogikab bik." 
Ezekiel24:18 Kiang’alalji anyun bik karon; ak kime osotiondennyu koskoleny: ak kiayai karon ko u ye kiga king’ata. 
Ezekiel24:19 Ak kilenja bik, Tos memwawech kit ne u tuguchu eng’ achek, kot iyai ko u noto?" 
Ezekiel24:20 Kiamwachi anyun alenji, Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel24:21 Ng’alalji gotab Israel, ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, amuruoni oldanyu ne tilil, menotetab kimnateng’wong’, ne iboiboi konyekwok, ne rire sobonwekwok; ak kebare rotwetab chok werikwok ak tibikwok che kiobagakte." 
Ezekiel24:22 Ak tun oyae ko u ye koayai: motuche kutuswekwok, anan oam amitwogikab bik." 
Ezekiel24:23 Ak komi metowekwok angok che otaae, ak komi kweonik kelyekwok; moteitosi anan oririe; ago ochuichuitosi eng’ tengekwogikwok, ak otigenjige." 
Ezekiel24:24 Egu anyun Esekiel kaborunet eng’ okwek; oyae ko u tugul che kigoyai inendet: ye nyo nito, onai anyun ole a Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel24:25 Ak inye, ee, weritab chi, tos manyonjinin chito eng’ betut ye arebe ichek kimnatenywa, ak boiboiyetab torornatenywa, ak ne iboiboi konyekwak, ak kioto kiinde mugulelwekwak, ak werikwak ak tibikwak," 
Ezekiel24:26 tos manyonjinin eng’ betunoto chichoto chilili, si kogonin igas noto eng’ itiguk?" 
Ezekiel24:27 Eng’ betunoto, ing’alaljini inendet ne kigochilil, ak ing’alali, ama konamagen kut kogeny: iegu anyun ko u noto kaborunet eng’ ichek; ak konai ichek kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel25:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel25:2 Ee, weritab chi, tokyige oldab lagokab Amon, ak imaoten agobo ichek:" 
Ezekiel25:3 ak ilenji lagokab Amon, Ogas ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat Jehovah, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kiimwa ile, Haa, agobo oldanyu ne tilil, ye kiga kimuruon; ak agobo emetab Israel ye kiga kiyai kong’emak; ak agobo gotab Juda, ye kigiluul:" 
Ezekiel25:4 keer anyun, agochinin lagokab kong’asis ibunji, ak koteekso ichek eng’ kwenung’ung’, ak koyai meng’otosiekwak eng’ kwenung’ung’; amei logoeguk ak kolu cheguk." 
Ezekiel25:5 Ak ayai Raba koek ole menyei tambesik, ak ayai oldab lagokab Amon koek ole kiyage akwotisiekab kechirek: si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel25:6 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kiirabrab euneguk, ak itwaltwal, ak ibaibaitu eng’ koromnatet tugul ne mi sobondang’ung’ agobo emetab Israel;" 
Ezekiel25:7 keer anyun, kaachuul eunnyu atokyin, ak agochin bororiosiek koluulin; ak aisten eng’ bororiosiek, ak agonin ilus eng’ emotinwek: ang’emin; si inai ile a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel25:8 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu mwaei Moab ak Seir, kole, Ogeero, u gotab Juda bororiosiek tugul:" 
Ezekiel25:9 keer anyun-o, ayate kiwotetab Moab koboch nganasok, koboch nganasokyik che mi kiwotosiekyik, torornatetab emet, Bet-jesimot, Baal-meon ak Kiriataim," 
Ezekiel25:10 ayatyini bikab kong’asis, koba kobargei ak lagokab Amon, ak agochi ichek konam kobunji, si ma kibwati lagokab Amon kogeny eng’ bororiosiek:" 
Ezekiel25:11 ak aruokyi Moab; si konai kole a Jehovah. 
Ezekiel25:12 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kigoyai ne ya Edom koyaaktochigei mugetut eng’ gotab Juda, ak kigoyai yaitiet ne o, koyaaktochigei mugetut;" 
Ezekiel25:13 mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Achuule eunnyu atokyini Edom, ak aiste eng’ oloto chi ak tiony: ak ayai koguber koboch Teman; kibarei ichek eng’ rotwetab chok agoi Dedan." 
Ezekiel25:14 Ak ayaakyi mugetut Edom eng’ eutab bik che mitei Israel, ak koyai eng’ Edom ko u neregekyuk, ak eng’ neregekyuk che ng’wonen, si konai ichek yaaktaennyu ne bo mugetut, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel25:15 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kagoyaakta mugetut Pilistik, ak kagoyaaktochigei mugetut eng’ koromnatet ne mi sobondo si kobiit kong’emis eng’ bunyondit ne bo agoi;" 
Ezekiel25:16 mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, achuule eunnyu atokyi Pilistik, ak aiste Keretik, ak ang’em che king’et che bo ngegut." 
Ezekiel25:17 Ak ayaakyi ichek mugetut ne korom, eng’ keretab kong’ ne ng’wan; si konai kole a Jehovah, ye ayaakyini ichek mugetut." 
Ezekiel26:1 Ak eng’ kenyitab taman ak agenge, eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawanato, konyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel26:2 Ee, weritab chi, amu kigomwa Turo agobo Jerusalem kole, Haa, kogobutok inendet ne ki kurgetab bororiosiek; kagoweekyagei: kitesa anyun achangait, amu kagong’emak inendet:" 
Ezekiel26:3 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, aborienen, ee Turo, ak agochini bororiosiek che chang’ kobokyin, ko u ye igochin nyanjet beekyik komildagei." 
Ezekiel26:4 Ak kong’em irimoikab Turo, ak kobut teeksosiekyik che koen: ang’oing’oi ng’ung’unyekyik, ak ayai inendet koek ruandet ne mami kiy." 
Ezekiel26:5 Egu nganasanato ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njirenik, eng’ kwenutab nyanjet; amu kamwae ng’olyondonito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah: ak koek ne luulei bororiosiek." 
Ezekiel26:6 Ak kebare rotwetab chok tibikyik che mi emet: si konai kole a Jehovah. 
Ezekiel26:7 Amu mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, amuti Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon, inendet laitoriatab laitorinik, kobokyi Turo, kobunu murot ne bo katam, koboto mbartanyisiek, ak karisiekyik che bo luget, ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek, ak kweanet, ak bik che chang’." 
Ezekiel26:8 Bare rotwetab chok tibiguk che mi emet: ak koteech irimoik kotokyin, ak koruruch ng’ung’unyek kotokyin, ak konamji barak long’et ne o kotokyin." 
Ezekiel26:9 Ak konde injinisiek che kibutisie, taitab irimoiguk, ak kobute aonokyik teeksosieguk che koen." 
Ezekiel26:10 Tuchin temburiekab mbartanyisiekyik amu chang’indanywa: itumdumegei irimoiguk amu kirgirenetab mbartanyisiek che lanyei bik, ak ne bo karisiek che lau tuguk, ak ne bo karisiek che bo luget, ye tun bunei inendet ormarichoguk, ko u bik che bendi nganaset orit kobunei ole kigobutok." 
Ezekiel26:11 Tiechei ortinweguk tugul eng’ siokab mbartanyisiekyik: barei biguk eng’ rotwetab chok, ak kolulyo tolochikab kimnateng’ung’." 
Ezekiel26:12 Ak koluul magornatosieguk, ak koluul tuguguk che bo mung’aret: ak kobut irimoiguk, ak kong’em goriguk che kororon: ak kowirji beek koiguk ak ketiguk ak ng’ung’unyeguk." 
Ezekiel26:13 Ak agesu cheetab tienwogiguk; ama kegasei kogeny cheetab ketubosieguk. 
Ezekiel26:14 Ak ayain iegu ruandet ne mami kiy: iegu ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njirenik; ma keteechin kogeny, amu kamwae ane Jehovah ng’olyondonito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel26:15 Mwachin Kiptaiyat Jehovah Turo ko u ni kole: Tos mabotandos ngegusiek amu cheetab kabuteng’ung’, ye tigendos, che kiguoteni, ye kibarji bik kwenung’ung?" 
Ezekiel26:16 Kochorgei anyun eng’ ng’echerokwak che bo laitornatet bounik tugul che bo nyanjet, ak koreek ngoroikwak che tabanu barak, ak koreek ngoroikwak che kiginde lelesta: ilaachi botanet; ak kotebe ng’onyut, ak kobotanso sait age tugul ak kokwong’enen." 
Ezekiel26:17 Ak koririo agobo inye, ak kolenjin, Katepto ano si keng’emin ne te ni, inye ne kimenyin bikab nyanjet, nganaset ne ko toogunot, ne ki kim eng’ nyanjet, inendet ak bik che komenyei, ne koimui bik tugul che komenyei oloto!" 
Ezekiel26:18 Tun botandos anyun ngegusiek eng’ betutab kabuteng’ung’; ee, arongendos ngegusiek che mi nyanjet ye iistoige." 
Ezekiel26:19 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ye tun ayain iegu nganaset ne karatia, ko u nganasok che magimenyei; ye tun atugenen nyanjet, ak kotubin beek che chang’;" 
Ezekiel26:20 achoorten anyun koboto ichek che chorjingei keringet, ole mi bik che bo keny, ak agonin imeny ng’ony orit, eng’ komoswek che kigoek surkwen koboch keny, koboto ichek che chorjingei keringet, si ma kimenyin; ak ande torornatet emetab bik che soptos:" 
Ezekiel26:21 ayain iegu kamuiset, ama ibiitu kogeny: agot nda kicheng’in, ko magoi kinyorun kogeny, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel27:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel27:2 Ee inye, weritab chi, rir agobo Turo," 
Ezekiel27:3 ak ilenji Turo, Ee inye ne imenye ole kimandoe kebendi nyanjet, ne i chemung’arindet ne bo bororiosiek che bo ngegusiek che chang’, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ee Turo, kiimwa ile, Agesunotge eng’ kororonindo." 
Ezekiel27:4 Mi kiwotosieguk kwenutab nyanjosiek, kigoyai teegiguk kororonindang’ung’ koek ne igesunotgei." 
Ezekiel27:5 Kigoyai ichek baoiniguk eng’ biribirinik che bunu Senir: kigoib taragonik eng’ Lebanon si kobiit koyaun toloitab melit. 
Ezekiel27:6 Kigoyai ichek mugangoguk che kiwase beek, ketikab Basan; kiyae seremusieguk kelekab belek, che kigiliige taragonik che ter che bunu ngegusiekab Kitim." 
Ezekiel27:7 Ki bo katanit ne kararan ne kiginde lelesta, angeng’ung’ ne kibunu Misri, si koek eng’ inye songoliet; ki tuui ne nyalil ak ko arus ne birir emaing’ung’ ne kibunu ngegusiekab Elisa." 
Ezekiel27:8 Ki kiboitiniguk che bo melit, bik che kimenyei Sidon ak Arbad: ee Turo, kimenyin biguk che ng’omen che kikwerie melit." 
Ezekiel27:9 Kimenyin boisiekab Gebal koboto bikyik che ng’omen che kitimoti ole kaundur: kimi kwenung’ung’ melisiek tugul che bo nyanjet koboto kiboitinikwak si koyai mung’areng’ung’. 
Ezekiel27:10 Kimi lugeng’ung’ bikab Persia, ak che bo Lud ak che bo Put, mureniguk che bo luget: kigigartat eng’ inye long’et ak chepkulet; kiibarta ichek kororonindang’ung’." 
Ezekiel27:11 Kimi bikab Abad koboto lugeng’ung’ irimoiguk barak komoswek tugul, ak kimi Gamadik teeksosieguk che koen: kiigartat long’onikwak eng’ irimoiguk eng’ komoswek tugul; kigoyai kororonindang’ung’ koek ne igesunotgei." 
Ezekiel27:12 Ki chemung’araindeng’ung’ Tarsis amu chang’indab magornatosiek alak tugul; kiyaei mung’aret eng’ feda, karik, kibatinik ak ngosielaisiek, si konyor tuguguk." 
Ezekiel27:13 Ki chemung’arainiguk Jaban, Tubal, ak Mesek: kiyae mung’aret bik ak tugukab sugunonik koale tuguguk." 
Ezekiel27:14 Kiyae mung’aret ichek che bo gotab Togarma mbartanyisiek, ak mbartanyisiek che bo luget, koboto nyumbusiek si konyor tuguguk." 
Ezekiel27:15 Ki chemung’arainiguk bikab Dedan: kiek ole ialdoisie ngegusiek che chang’: kialunenen tuguguk kelekab belek ak ketik che tuuen. 
Ezekiel27:16 Ki chemung’araindeng’ung’ Suria, amu chang’indab tugukab musognateng’ung’: kiyae mung’aret sumaragdoisiek, ak ngoroik che arusen ne birir, ak ngoroik che kiginde lelesta, ak katanit ne kararan, ak tuguk che biriren che mi ngegut, ak koik che biriren si konyor tuguguk." 
Ezekiel27:17 Ki chemung’arainiguk Juda, ak emetab Israel: kiyae mung’aret nganokab Minit, ak panag, koboto kumik, ak mwanik, ak mwanik che kinyaise, si konyor tuguguk." 
Ezekiel27:18 Ki chemung’araindeng’ung’ Damasko amu chang’indab tugukab musognateng’ung’, amu chang’indab magornatosiek alak tugul; koboto divaikab Helbon, ak kororikab kechirek che leelach." 
Ezekiel27:19 Kiyae mung’aret Bedan ak Jaban tuguk che bunu Usal: kiboto tuguguk che bo mung’aret, karik che kita kitanyi, kasia ak kalamus." 
Ezekiel27:20 Ki chemung’araindeng’ung’ Dedan eng’ ngoroik che kiitoi eng’ mbartanyisiek. 
Ezekiel27:21 Ki chemung’arainiguk Arabia, ak bounik tugul che bo Kedar; kialdaun arekab kechir ak mengichik, ak ng’ororek." 
Ezekiel27:22 Chemung’arainikab Sheba ak che bo Raama ko ki chemung’arainiguk: kiyae mung’aret tuguk che ng’uu ne anyiny kosiir tugul, ak koik tugul che bo kamanutiet ne o, ak tahabu." 
Ezekiel27:23 Haran, Kane ak Eden, chemung’arainikab Sheba, Asur ak Kilmad, ko ki chemung’arainiguk." 
Ezekiel27:24 Ki chemung’arainiguk chuto eng’ tuguk che kororon, ngoroik che tuuen ne nyalil ak che kiginde lelesta, ak moingonik che kororon kot, che kigirate boroonik, ak keyae taragonik, kiboto choto tuguguk che bo mung’aret." 
Ezekiel27:25 Kiibei tuguguk che bo mung’aret melisiekab Tarsis: ak kiitesage, ak itororitu mising’ eng’ kwenutab nyanjosiek." 
Ezekiel27:26 Kigomutun kiboitiniguk che bo melit inyo beek che chang’: kiriebin usonetab kong’asis eng’ kwenutab nyanjosiek. 
Ezekiel27:27 Ibutyin kwenutab nyanjosiek magornatosieguk, ak tuguguk che bo mung’aret, mung’areng’ung’, kiboitiniguk che bo melit, ak biguk che kweriei melit, biguk che timoti ole kaundur, ak bik che kigonam mung’areng’ung’, ak biguk tugul che bo luget, che mi kwenung’ung’, koboto kweaneng’ung’ tugul che mi kwenung’ung’, eng’ betutab ng’emisieng’ung’." 
Ezekiel27:28 Botandos kiwotosiek amu waagatab biguk che kweriei melisiek. 
Ezekiel27:29 Chorugei eng’ melisiekwak bik tugul che wasei beek eng’ mugangok, koboto kiboitinik, ak bik tugul che bo nyanjet che kweriei melisiek, tonondos eng’ ngegut." 
Ezekiel27:30 Ak kowaach kot igas, ak koririo eng’ ng’wanindo, ak kolakyin temburiek metowekwak, ak komildaegei orek:" 
Ezekiel27:31 ak kocher metowekwak amu inye, ak kogermenegei kuniok, ak koririo agobo inye eng’ ng’wanindo ne bo sobondo, ak eng’ rirek che ng’wonen." 
Ezekiel27:32 Ak korirjin eng’ kateiyenwa, ak korirjin kole, Ng’o ne u Turo, ne kiging’em kewirji kwenutab nyanjet?" 
Ezekiel27:33 Ye kibun tuguguk che bo mung’aret nyanjosiek, kiinyiit bororiosiek che chang’, kiigochi laitorinikab ng’ony koek magorek eng’ chang’indab magornatosieguk." 
Ezekiel27:34 Eng’ betut ne kigiiriin eng’ nyanjosiek eng’ rirosiek, kiibutyo tuguguk che bo mung’aret eng’ kwenung’ung’, koboto kweaneng’ung’ tugul." 
Ezekiel27:35 Kwong’enen bik tugul che menyei ngegusiek, ak koiyweis mising’ laitorinikwak, toogu arogenet eng’ togochikwak." 
Ezekiel27:36 Renyin chemung’arainik che mi bororiosiek; kiiegu kamuiset ama ibiitu agoi. 
Ezekiel28:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel28:2 Ee, weritab chi, mwachi bounindetab Turo, ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kiitororge eng’ muguleldang’ung’, ak imwa ile, A cheptalelit, atebe ng’echeretab Kamuktaindet, eng’ kwenutab nyanjosiek; ago i chito, ma i Kamuktaindet, agot nganda kiiyaige eng’ muguleldang’ung’ iige Kamuktaindet:" 
Ezekiel28:3 keero, i ng’om isiir Daniel; mami ung’otiet ne imuchi ichek koung’enen:" 
Ezekiel28:3 keero, i ng’om isiir Daniel; mami ung’otiet ne imuchi ichek koung’enen:" 
Ezekiel28:4 kiisikyige magornatosiek eng’ ng’omnateng’ung’ ak naeng’ung’, ak kiigonorjige tahabu ak feda eng’ ole kigonore konoraik:" 
Ezekiel28:5 kiites magornatosieguk eng’ ng’omnateng’ung’ ne o ak eng’ mung’areng’ung’, ak kiitororgei eng’ muguleldang’ung’ amu magornatosieguk:" 
Ezekiel28:6 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kiiyaige eng’ muguleldang’ung’ iige Kamuktaindent; 
Ezekiel28:7 keer anyun, amutyinin toek, bik che iywei bororiosiek, ak kong’us rotokwak bo chok agobo kororonindab ng’omnateng’ung’, ak komuruon kakweng’eng’ung’." 
Ezekiel28:8 Ak kochoorten iwe keringet; ak imeei eng’ meosiekab che kigibar, eng’ kwenutab nyanjosiek." 
Ezekiel28:9 Tos ta imwae eng’ taitab inendet ne barin, ile, A Kamuktaindet? Ago i chito, ma i Kamuktaindet, imi eutab inendet ne iguotenin." 
Ezekiel28:10 Imee eng’ meosiekab che ma kimuratan eng’ eutab toek: amu kaamwa ng’olyondonito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel28:11 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel28:12 Ee, weritab chi, rir agobo laitoriatab Turo, ak ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ing’ochi karogendoet, kigonyiin ng’omnatet, ak i ne igesunotgei eng’ kororonindo." 
Ezekiel28:13 Kiimi Eden mbaretab Kamuktaindet; kiitugege koita age tugul ne bo kamanutiet, sardio, topasio, ak yaholom, berulo, soari, jasipi, sapire, sumaragdo, ak bareqet, ak tahabu: kimitei oring’ung’ boisietab sugutisieguk che mengenchen ak ndurerusieguk; kigichob choto eng’ betut ne kigitau keyain." 
Ezekiel28:14 Kii kerubindet ne kigiil ne kiiuurisiei: ak kiandein si itebe tulwet ne tilil ne bo Kamuktaindet; kiiwendote kwenutab koik che bo mat. 
Ezekiel28:15 Kiigesunotge eng’ ortinweguk koboch betut ne kigiyaenen, kot kenyorjin yaitiet." 
Ezekiel28:16 Kiinyiitin ichek koromnatet eng’ chang’indab mung’areng’ung’, ak kiiyai tengekto: kiatimden anyun ko u ne muruon, ichoruge eng’ tulwetab Kamuktaindet; ak kaang’emin, ee kerubindet ne iuurisiei, imong’une koik che bo mat." 
Ezekiel28:17 Kiitororge eng’ muguleldang’ung’ amu kororonindang’ung’, kiing’em ng’omnateng’ung’ amu kakweng’eng’ung’: kaawirjin ng’ony kaandein taitab laitorinik, si kobiit kogeerin." 
Ezekiel28:18 Kiimuruon oldinweguk che tililen eng’ chang’indab tengekwogiguk, eng’ yaitietab mung’areng’ung’; kaanemu anyun mat eng’ kwenung’ung’, kigobeelin, ak awalin iegu orek eng’ ng’ony, eng’ taitab ichek tugul che keerin." 
Ezekiel28:19 Kwong’enen ichek tugul che ingenin che mi bororiosiek: kiiegu kamuiset, ama ibiitu agoi." 
Ezekiel28:20 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel28:21 Ee, weritab chi, tokyi togeng’ung’ Sidon, ak imaotenji," 
Ezekiel28:22 ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, aborienen, ee Sidon; ak kitorora eng’ kwenung’ung’: si konai kole a Jehovah, ye karuokyi inendet, ak aegu ne itabanat eng’ inendet." 
Ezekiel28:23 Amu ayokyini inendet koroito ak korotik eng’ ortinwekyik; ak kobutyo eng’ kwenunnyi ichek che kogiguoten, che kiguoteni eng’ rotwetab chok eng’ komosta age tugul; si konai kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel28:24 Si ma kobiitu kogeny katableliat ne toorei bich, eng’ gotab Israel, anan katet ne ng’wan eng’ komoswekwak tugul, ne kisas ichek; si konai kole a Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel28:25 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ye tun kaayum gotab Israel komong’une bororiosiek ole kiga kiyestochi, ak aegu ne itabanat eng’ ichek eng’ taitab bororiosiek, komeny anyun emenywa ne kiagochi otwogindennyu Jakobo." 
Ezekiel28:26 Ak komeny oloto eng’ chametab ge; ee teechei gorik, ak komin sabibuk, ak komeng’is eng’ chametab ge; ye tun kaaruokyi ichek tugul che sasei ichek che mi komoswekwak tugul; si konai kole a Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa." 
Ezekiel29:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ kenyitab taman, eng’ arawetab taman, eng’ betutab taman ak aeng’, ne bo arawanato, kolenja," 
Ezekiel29:2 Ee, weritab chi, tokyi togeng’ung’ Parao laitoriatab Misri, ak imaotenji inendet koboto Misri tugul:" 
Ezekiel29:3 ng’alal, ak imwa ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole; Keero, aborienen, inye Parao laitoriatab Misri, maswetit ne o ne rue kwenutab ainosiekyik, ne kigomwa kole, Ainennyu ko nenyu anege, kiayachinige." 
Ezekiel29:4 Ak andoi kombok tagilgiliguk, ak agochi njirenikab ainosieguk konamgei ak beriguk; ak amutun imong’u eng’ kwenutab ainosieguk, koboto njirenik tugul che bo ainosieguk che kinamgei ak beriguk." 
Ezekiel29:5 Abagaktoin ko kagewirjin ong’atet, inye koboto njirenik tugul che bo ainosieguk: ibutyini kewanin; magimugutosok anan kiyumak: kagoiten iegu amitwogikab tiong’ikab ng’ony, ak che bo taritikab barak." 
Ezekiel29:6 Ak konai bik tugul che menyei Misri kole a Jehovah, amu kiek icheget kiroktab tegat eng’ gotab Israel." 
Ezekiel29:7 Kingonamin ichek eut, iiri, ak ibet tigigoikwak tugul: ye kingotiienengei, iil inyendet, ak kiitumdum suenutikwak tugul." 
Ezekiel29:8 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, aibun rotwetab chok, ak abar eng’ kwenung’ung’ chi ak tiony." 
Ezekiel29:9 Ak koguber emetab Misri ak koek karaita, si konai kole a Jehovah; amu kigomwa kole, Nenyu ainet, ane ne kiayae." 
Ezekiel29:10 Keer anyun, aborienen, koboto ainosieguk, ak ayai emetab Misri koek karaita ne ya ak koguber, koboch teekset ne koi ne bo Sebene agoi kiwotetab Etiopia." 
Ezekiel29:11 Mabunei chi oloto, ama bunei tiony, ama kimenyei eng’ kenyisiek artam." 
Ezekiel29:12 Ak ayai emetab Misri koguber eng’ kwenutab emotinwek che kuberotin, ak koek nganasokyik karatwek kenyisiek artam eng’ kwenutab nganasok che karatwek: ak aseer Misrik koba bororiosiek, ak aiyestochi emotinwek." 
Ezekiel29:13 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ayumi Misrik komong’une bororiosiek ole kigaiyestochi, ko kagobata kenyisiek artamu;" 
Ezekiel29:14 ak amutu kogeny bikab Misri che kigiluul, ak aweekte koba emetab Patros, emet ne kigisikyin ak komeng’is eng’ oloto koek bounatet ne nyerat." 
Ezekiel29:15 Egu bounatet ne nyerat eng’ tugul; ama kotororegei kogeny kosiir bororiosiek: ak aming’ini ichek, si ma kobou bororiosiek kogeny." 
Ezekiel29:16 Ama koegu kogeny ne kimang’u eng’ gotab Israel, ne konu kibwat tengekto, ye kusgong’ kogeer ichek: si konai kole a Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel29:17 Ak eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak tisab eng’ arawet ne bo tai, eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawanato, konyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel29:18 Ee, weritab chi, king’at Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon lugennyi koyai boisiet ne o kobar Turo: kichur metit age tugul, ak kosindit tigikyet age tugul: ago ma nyor melekto, agot lugennyi, eng’ Turo, amu boisiet ne kiyai agobo nganasanato." 
Ezekiel29:19 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, agochini Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon emetab Misri; ak komut bikyik che chang’, ak koluul tugukyik, ak koib tugukyik che kiluulei; si koek choto melektab lugennyi." 
Ezekiel29:20 Kaagochi inendet emetab Misri koek melektanyi amu boisiennyi, amu kiboisiewa, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel29:21 Abityini gotab Israel kuinet eng’ betunoto, ak agonin kitwegu eng’ kwenunywa; si konai kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel30:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel30:2 Ee, weritab chi, maoten, ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Oteiye, Bwa betunoto!" 
Ezekiel30:3 Amu kagorik betunoto, kagorik betutab Jehovah, betutab tulungenet; betusiekab bororiosiek." 
Ezekiel30:4 Ak konyonji rotwetab chok Misri, ak koityi ng’wanindo Etiopia, ye ibutyo bik che kibarei eng’ Misri; ak komut bikyik che chang’, ak kebut lumeiywekyik." 
Ezekiel30:5 Kibare ichek rotwetab chok koboto Etiopia, Put, Lud, ak bik tugul che kiburuigei, koboto Kub, koboto bikab emet ne kinamgei ak icheget." 
Ezekiel30:6 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ibutos agichek che tiie Misri, ak kobut menotetab kimnatennyi: kibare ichek rotwetab chok koboch teekset ne koi ne bo Sebene, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ak koek kibananok eng’ kwenutab emotinwek che kibananok, ak kotebe nganasokyik kwenutab nganasok che kigoek karatwek." 
Ezekiel30:8 Ak konai kole a Jehovah, ye kaabeel Misri, ak keng’em toretikyik tugul." 
Ezekiel30:9 Bendi eng’ betunoto eng’ tainnyu bik che kiyoktoi eng’ melisiek koba komu Etiopik che len tebyei eng’ kalyet; ak koityi ichek ng’wanindo, ko u eng’ betutab Misri; ogeero, amu nyonei betunoto." 
Ezekiel30:10 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Agesu tuiyetab Misri, eng’ eutab Nebukadresar laitoriatab Babulon." 
Ezekiel30:11 Kimutu inendet ak bikyik kong’em emet, inendet ne iywei bororiosiek; ak kong’us rotokwak bo chok kobar Misri, ak konyiit muswek emet." 
Ezekiel30:12 Ak atenyi ainosiek, ak aaldochi emonoto bik che yaachen; ak ayai emet koguber, koboto tugul che mi oloto, eng’ eunekab toek: kamwae ane Jehovah ng’olyondonito." 
Ezekiel30:13 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ang’eme kanamonik agichek, ak agesu itonwekab tuguk che matilei kiy, eng’ Nop; ama kobiitu kogeny bounindet eng’ emetab Misri: ak ande kaiyweisiet emetab Misri." 
Ezekiel30:14 Ak ayai Patros kobanan, ak abeel Soan, ak aruokyi No." 
Ezekiel30:15 Ak arong’ji neregekyuk che ng’wonen Sin, irimetab Misri; ak abar bik che chang’ che bo No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Ak abeel Misri; nyoru ng’wanindo ne o Sin, ak ketonaton No: ak konyor Nop bunik bet." 
Ezekiel30:17 Kibare rotwetab chok murenikab Aben ak che bo Pi-beset: ak keluul nganasochuto. 
Ezekiel30:18 Imenitu betut agine eng’ Teapnes, ye airi eng’ oloto chogisiekab Misri, ak kogesgei anyun menotetab kimnatennyi: ago tuchei inendet boldet, ak keluul tibikyik." 
Ezekiel30:19 Ayae anyun ko u noto kiruogutik eng’ Misri: si konai kole a Jehovah. 
Ezekiel30:20 Ak eng’ kenyitab taman ak agenge, eng’ arawet ne bo tai, eng’ betutab tisab ne bo arawanato, konyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel30:21 Ee, weritab chi, kaairi eutab Parao laitoriatab Misri: ak keero, ma kirat kinde kerichek, kerate anget, si kogimit komuch konam rotwetab chok." 
Ezekiel30:22 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, aborie Parao laitoriatab Misri ak airie eunekyik, che kimen, ak ne kiga keiri; ak agochi rotwetab chok kobut eng’ eunnyi." 
Ezekiel30:23 Ak aseer Misrik koba bororiosiek, ak aiyestochi emotinwek." 
Ezekiel30:24 Ak agimit eunekab laitoriatab Babulon, ak agochi inendet rotwennyu bo chok: ago airie eunekab Parao, ak kotigen eng’ tainnyi eng’ tigenoik che u che bo chito ne kagiguoten ne bo meet." 
Ezekiel30:25 Ak agimit eunekab laitoriatab Babulon, ak kobutyo eunekab Parao; si konai kole a Jehovah, ye agochi rotwennyu bo chok laitoriatab Babulon, si kong’werere emetab Misri." 
Ezekiel30:26 Ak aseer Misrik koba bororiosiek, ak aiyestochi emotinwek; si konai kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel31:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ kenyit ne bo taman ak agenge, eng’ arawetab somok, eng’ betutab tai ne bo arawanato, kolenja," 
Ezekiel31:2 Ee, weritab chi, mwachi Parao laitoriatab Misri ak bikyik che chang’ ng’olyondoni ilenji: Ogerge ak ng’o eng’ etunateng’ung’?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Keero, ki tarakwet Asuriaindet eng’ Lebanon ne tinyei temenik che kororon, ki samum, ak ko koi; ak kiitei walinnyi bolik." 
Ezekiel31:4 Kibai beek inendet, kiibit riret: kiroot ainosiekyik koba komoswek tugul eng’ mbarennyi; ak kirootyi beekyik ketik tugul che bo mbaret." 
Ezekiel31:5 Kitororit anyun koindanyi kosiir ketik tugul che bo mbar; ak kitesogis temenikyik, ak kogoeegitu temenikyik amu beek che chang’, ye kingowakta." 
Ezekiel31:6 Kiteech taritik tugul kesonokwak eng’ temenikab ketoto, ak koiichi tiong’ik tugul che bo emet kelutab ketoto, ak kiuure bororiosiek tugul che eechen." 
Ezekiel31:7 Ki kararan anyun eng’ etunatennyi, eng’ koindab temenikyik: amu ki negite tigitikyik beek che chang’." 
Ezekiel31:8 Ma imuch taragonik che kimi mbaretab Kamuktaindet kouny inendet: kima ko kergei biribirinik ak temenikyik; ak kima ko kergei ketik che u kurinik ak temenikyik; ak kima komi ketit age tugul eng’ mbaretab Kamuktaindet ne kergei ak inendet eng’ kororonindanyi. 
Ezekiel31:9 Kiayai inendet kogararanit eng’ chang’indab temenikyik: kot koam ng’etkong’ ketik tugul che bo Eden, che kimi mbaretab Kamuktaindet." 
Ezekiel31:10 Kamwa anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kiitororge eng’ koindang’ung’, ak kiitei walinnyi bolik, ak kitororit muguleldanyi amu koindanyi;" 
Ezekiel31:11 andoi inendet eutab chito ne kim ne bo bororiosiek; iruokyin iman: kiaon amu yaitiennyi. 
Ezekiel31:12 Kigoeb toek inendet che kiywei che bo bororiosiek, ak kometo: kigobutyo temenikyik eng’ tulonok ak eng’ atebwosiek tugul, ak kigoilyo temenikyik eng’ kererusiek tugul che bo emet; ak kigoba bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony kobagakta uruennyi, ak kometo inendet." 
Ezekiel31:13 Menyei taritik tugul karaitanyi, ak kotebe tiong’ik tugul che bo timin temenikyik:" 
Ezekiel31:14 si mata kotororgei eng’ koindanywa ket age tugul eng’ ketik tugul che mi ye negite beek, anan kobochit walisiekwak bolik, anan kotononso chechuak che kimen eng’ koindanywa, ichek tugul che eei beek: amu kagigoito tugul kobek, koba ng’ony orit, eng’ kwenutab bik, koboto icheget che chorjingei keringet." 
Ezekiel31:15 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Eng’ betut ne kichorjigei oldab che kigobek ko kiang’at rirek kerirji inendet: kiatuch riret amu kitenyo beek che chang’: ak kiang’at Lebanon korirji inendet, ak kitanuiso ketik tugul che bo timin amu inendet." 
Ezekiel31:16 Kiagochi bororiosiek kobotanso amu cheetab kabutennyi, ye kingatimde inendet kwo oldab che kigobek koboto icheget che chorjingei keringet: ak kiigaigaigei ketik tugul che bo Eden, ketik che kororon ak ko miachen mising’ che bo Lebanon, ichek tugul che eei beek, kiigaigaigei eng’ ng’ony orit." 
Ezekiel31:17 Kichortagei choto agichek koba oldab che kigobek koboto inendet, koba ole mi icheget che kigibare rotwetab chok; ee, choto che ki eunnyi, che kimenyei uruennyi eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek." 
Ezekiel31:18 Ogerge ak ng’o anyun eng’ torornatet ak etunatet eng’ kwenutab ketikab Eden? Nganda u noto kechoortoin koboto ketikab Eden iwe ng’ony orit: irue kwenutab che ma kimuratan, koboto icheget che kigibare rotwetab chok. Nito ko Parao ak bikyik che chang’, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel32:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ kenyit ne bo taman ak aeng’, eng’ arawetab taman ak aeng’, eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawanato, kolenja," 
Ezekiel32:2 Ee, weritab chi, rir agobo Parao laitoriatab Misri, ak ilenji, Kiga kirogenen ng’etundo ne neran ne bo bororiosiek: ago i u maswetit eng’ nyanjosiek; imong’u koboto ainosieguk, ak iwase beek eng’ kelyeguk, ak isamisi ainosiekwak." 
Ezekiel32:3 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Aiitoi regereiywondennyu atugenen koboto tuiyet ne bo bororiosiek che chang’; si komutunenen regereiywondennyu itogosu. 
Ezekiel32:4 Si ametochin emet, awirjinin kewanin, ak agochi taritik tugul che bo barak kotebenen, ak agochi tiong’ik che bo ng’ony komugul kobiyong’enen." 
Ezekiel32:5 Ak ande bortang’ung’ tulonok barak, ak anyiit atebwosiek koindang’ung’." 
Ezekiel32:6 Ak abise korotiguk emet ne ibire beek, agoi tulonok; ak inyi kererusiek." 
Ezekiel32:7 Ak ye tun agesun atuch kipsengwet, ak ayae kecheikyik koimenitu; atuge boldet asista, ama koluu arawet." 
Ezekiel32:8 Ayae lapkeiyosiek tugul che bo kipsengwet che iluu mising’ koimenitu eng’ baragung’ung’, ak ande mesundeito emeng’ung’, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel32:9 Agochini mugulelwekab bororiosiek che chang’ konerekso, ye tun aibun ng’emisieng’ung’ eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek, konyo emotinwek che kitom inai." 
Ezekiel32:10 Ee, agochini bororiosiek che chang’ kokwong’enen, ak koiyweis mising’ laitorinikwak agobo inye, ye tun abarbar rotwennyu bo chok eng’ tainywa; ak kobotanso eng’ sait age tugul, kobotan chi tugul agobo sobondanyi, eng’ betutab kabuteng’ung’." 
Ezekiel32:11 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Nyonjinin rotwetab chok ne bo laitoriatab Babulon. 
Ezekiel32:12 Agochini kobek biguk che chang’ eng’ rotokab chok, che bo bik che nyigonen; ichek tugul ko che iywei bororiosiek: ak kong’em ichek menotetab Misri, ak kobek bikyik tugul che chang’." 
Ezekiel32:13 Abare kogeny tiong’ikyik tugul che mi ole negite beek che chang’; ama kotiechei beek che chang’; ama kotiechei chi kogeny beechoto, anan kotiech tiong’ik." 
Ezekiel32:14 Atilili anyun beekwak, agochini koroot ainosiekwak ko u mwanik, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel32:15 Ye tun ayai emetab Misri koguber ak koek karatia, emet ne ma komi tuguk che ki nyiitat, ye abar tugul che menyei oloto, konai anyun kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel32:16 Chuto ko rirek che tun rirtos ichek; tun rirtos tibikab bororiosiek eng’ rirechato: rirtos agobo Misri, ak agobo bikyik tugul che chang’, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel32:17 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ kenyit ne bo taman ak aeng’, eng’ betutab taman ak mut ne bo arawanato, kolenja," 
Ezekiel32:18 Ee, weritab chi, rirji bik che chang’ che bo Misri, ak itimde ichek, inendet ak tibikab bororiosiek che toogunotin, koba ng’ony orit, koboto ichek che chorjingei keringet." 
Ezekiel32:19 Isiire ng’o eng’ kororonindo? Chortege, ui iru koboto che ma kimuratan." 
Ezekiel32:20 Ibutyin kwenutab che kigebare rotwetab chok: kigoitoi kebare rotwetab chok: ichuut inendet koistogei koboto bikyik tugul che chang’. 
Ezekiel32:21 Ng’alaljin bik che kimen eng’ che nyigonen inendet, eng’ kwenutab oldab che kigobek, komi koboto che toreti inendet: kigochortagei, sistos, agot che ma kimuratan, che kigibare rotwetab chok." 
Ezekiel32:22 Mi Asur oloto koboto kweanennyi tugul; mi kererisiekyik komoswekyik tugul: che kigibare rotwetab chok: 
Ezekiel32:23 che kiginde kererisiekwak komoswek che bo orit che bo keringet, ak mi kweanennyi komoswek tugul che bo kererinnyi: kigibar tugul, kigibare rotwetab chok, che kiyai kamuiset eng’ emetab bik che soptos." 
Ezekiel32:24 Mi Elam oloto ak bikyik tugul che chang’ eng’ komoswek tugul che bo kererinnyi: kigibar ichek tugul eng’ rotwetab chok, che kigochortagei ko ma kimuratan, koba agoi ng’ony orit, che kiyai kamuiset eng’ emetab bik che soptos, ak kigogesen kalilanenywa koboto icheget che chorjingei keringet." 
Ezekiel32:25 Kigochopchi inendet itogut eng’ kwenutab che kigibar, koboto bikyik tugul che chang’; mi kererisiekyik komoswekyik tugul: kima kimuratan ichek tugul, kigibare rotwetab chok; amu kiyaak kamuisenywa eng’ emetab bik che soptos, ak kigogesen kalilanenywa koboto icheget che chorjingei keringet: kiginde inendet kwenutab ichek che kigebar." 
Ezekiel32:26 Mi oloto Mesek, Tubal, ak bikyik tugul che chang’; mi kererisiekyik komoswekyik tugul; kima kimuratan ichek tugul, kigibare rotwetab chok; amu kiyai kamuisenywa eng’ emetab bik che soptos." 
Ezekiel32:27 Ak maruitos koboto bik che nyigonen che kibek che bo che ma kimuratan, che kichorjigei oldab che kigobek koibei karikwak che bo luget, ak kitiie metowekwak rotokwak bo chok, ak mi tengekwogikwak kowekwak; amu ichek ko ki kamuiset ne bo bik che nyigonen eng’ emetab bik che soptos." 
Ezekiel32:28 Ago kitonatonin eng’ kwenutab che ma kimuratan, ak oruitosi koboto icheget che kigibare rotwetab chok." 
Ezekiel32:29 Mi Edom oloto, koboto laitorinikyik ak bounikyik tugul, che ruitos eng’ kimnatenywa koboto ichek che kigibare rotwetab chok: ruitos koboto che ma kimuratan, ak icheget che chorjingei keringet." 
Ezekiel32:30 Mi oloto bounikab murot ne bo katam, ichek tugul, ak Sidonik tugul, che kichortagei koboto che kigibar; ililandos ichek eng’ kamuiset ne kibiitune kimnatenywa; ak ruitos ama kimuratan koboto che kigibare rotwetab chok, ak kogesen kalilanenywa koboto ichek che chorjingei keringet." 
Ezekiel32:31 Keerei Parao ichek, ak kogaigaigei amu bikyik tugul che chang’ che kigibare rotwetab chok; Parao ak lugennyi komugul, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel32:32 Amu kande kamuisennyi emetab bik che soptos: ak kinde inendet kwenutab che ma kimuratan, koboto ichek che kigibare rotwetab chok, Parao, koboto bikyik tugul che chang’, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel33:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel33:2 Ee, weritab chi, ng’alalji lagokab biguk, ilenji, Ye aipchi emet rotwetab chok, ngot kolewen bikab emonoto chito eng’ kwenunywa, ak konde koek ribindenywa:" 
Ezekiel33:3 ak ngo keer inendet rotwetab chok konyonjin emonoto, koguut iriaget ak koteechi bik;" 
Ezekiel33:4 age tugul anyun ne kasei iriaget, ama iit kateunet, ngot konyo rotwetab chok ak kobar inendet, kotebe korotikyik metinnyi." 
Ezekiel33:5 Kigas inendet iriaget, ama iit kateunet, tebe anyun korotikyik inendet: amu nda kiga iit kateunet, ta kiga kosor sobondanyi." 
Ezekiel33:6 Ago ngot kogeer ribindet konyonei rotwetab chok, ama kuut iriaget, ama kiteechi bik, ak konyo rotwetab chok, ak kobar chi age tugul eng’ kwenunywa; kebare amu tengektanyi, ago amage korotikyik eutab ribindet." 
Ezekiel33:7 Ee anyun, inye, weritab chi, kaandein iegu ribindet eng’ gotab Israel; kas anyun ng’olyot ne amwae, ak iipchi ichek kateunennyu." 
Ezekiel33:8 Ye alenji kiptengekyot, Ee, kiptengekyondoni, imee iman, ameteechi kiptengekyondonoto kometo orennyi; komeei kiptengekyondonoto amu tengektanyi, ago amage korotikyik eung’ung’." 
Ezekiel33:9 Ago, ngot iteechi kiptengekyot agobo orennyi, si koweek kometo oranato, ama meto orennyi, komeei inendet amu tengektanyi, ago kaisoru sobondang’ung’." 
Ezekiel33:10 Ee inye, weritab chi, mwachi gotab Israel, ilenji, Omwae ko u ni ole, Kanamech bistaosiekyok ak tengekwogikyok, ak kichuchuitosi amu choto; kimuktoi ano anyun kesopche?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Mwachi ichek ilenji, Ko u ye asobe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ko mabaibaitune meetab kiptengekyot; ago abaibai ngo week kiptengekyot kometo orennyi, ak kosob: oweege, oweege, omete ortinwekwok che yaach; amu nee si obegu, ee gotab Israel?" 
Ezekiel33:12 Ee, inye weritab chi, mwachi lagokab biguk, ilenji, Masoru chito ne bo iman imanda eng’ betutab bistoennyi; ago manamei kiptengekyot tengekto eng’ betut ne kaweek kometo tengektanyi: ama imuchi kosob inendet ne bo iman eng’ imandanyi eng’ betut ne yaei tengekto." 
Ezekiel33:13 Ye alenji ne bo iman, isobe iman; ngot komang’ imandanyi, yeityo koyai tengekto, ko magibwati agot agenge eng’ boisionikyik che bo imanda; ago meei amu tengektanyi ne kiyai." 
Ezekiel33:14 Kogeny, ye alenji kiptengekyot, Imee iman; ngot koweek kometo tengektanyi; ak koyai kit ne bo iman ak ko litit;" 
Ezekiel33:15 ngot koweekta kiptengekyot kit ne kiname besendo, ak koweekta kogeny kit ne kirebei, ak kowendote ng’atutikab sobondo, amata koyai tengekto; kosobei iman inendet, mameei." 
Ezekiel33:16 Magiityin inendet agot agenge eng’ tengekwogikyik che kigoyai: kigoyai inendet kit ne bo iman ak ko litit; sobei iman. 
Ezekiel33:17 Ago mwaei lagokab biguk kole, Ma bo iman oretab Kiptaiyat: ago eng’ ichek ko ma bo iman orenywa." 
Ezekiel33:18 Ye week ne bo iman kometo imandanyi, ak koyai tengekto, komeei eng’ tengegoto." 
Ezekiel33:19 Ak ye week kiptengekyot kometo tengektanyi, ak koyai kit ne bo iman ak ko litit, kosobei inendet eng’ noto." 
Ezekiel33:20 Ago omwae ole, Ma bo iman oretab Kiptaiyat. Ee gotab Israel, aruokyini age tugul eng’ okwek ko u ortinwekyik." 
Ezekiel33:21 Kinyonja chito age ne kiga chilil komong’ eng’ Jerusalem, kinyo eng’ kenyit ne bo taman ak aeng’, koboch ngab keluulech, eng’ arawetab taman, eng’ betut ne bo mut ne bo arawanato, kolenja, Kagebar nganaset." 
Ezekiel33:22 Kimi anyun eutab Jehovah baragunnyu koskoleny, kotomo koit inendet ne kichilili; ak kiga kogona Jehovah ang’alal, ye kingoitu chichoto karon ole kiami, ak kiang’alal, kimata konamaga kut." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel33:24 Ee, weritab chi, mwaei ichek che menyei komoswek che karatwek eng’ emetab Israel, kole, Ki chichak Abraham, ak kibunji emet: ago ki chang’ achek; kigigonech emet kobunjech." 
Ezekiel33:25 Mwachi anyun ichek ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Oame banyek koboto korotik, ak otokyini konyekwok kanamonikwok, ak otumdoi korotik: tos oname emet kobunjok?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Otiiege rotokwok bo chok, oyae kit ne kiwechei, ak ing’waniti age tugul eng’ okwek osotiotab chitab kokwennyi: tos oname emet kobunjok?" 
Ezekiel33:27 Mwachi anyun bichoto ko u ni ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ko u ye asobe, kibare iman rotwetab chok ichek che mi komoswek che karatwek, ak agochini koam tiong’ik inendet ne mi kewanin, ak kobar koroito ichek che mi irimoik ak che mi kebenonik." 
Ezekiel33:28 Ak ayae emet koguber ak koek ne kikwong’e, ak kogesgei menotetab kimnatennyi; ak koek surkwen tulonokab Israel, kot ko ma kobunei chi." 
Ezekiel33:29 Yeityo konai ichek kole a Jehovah, ye kaayai emet koguber ak koek ne kikwong’e, amu tugukwak tugul che kiwechei che kigoyai." 
Ezekiel33:30 Ee, inye weritab chi, ng’alali agobo inye lagokab biguk eng’ ole negite irimoik, ak eng’ kurgotikab gorik, ak kong’alaljin age age, ng’alaljin chi tugul tupchennyi, kolenjin, Asomin ale, nyo kebe kegas ng’olyot ne bunu Jehovah." 
Ezekiel33:31 Ak kobwanjin ko u ye bwanei bik, ak koteb ng’ony eng’ taing’ung’ ko u bikyuk, ak kogas ichek ng’aleguk, ago mayaei: amu ibortoi chamnyet ne o eng’ ng’alekwak, ago isubi mugulelwekwak kelunenywa." 
Ezekiel33:32 Keer anyun-o, i u eng’ ichek tiendo ne kararan mising’, ne tinyei cheet ne anyiny, ne butindet: amu kasei ichek ng’aleguk, ago mayaei." 
Ezekiel33:33 Ak ye biit kioto, (keero, nyonei,) konai anyun kole kimi maotiot kwenunywa." 
Ezekiel34:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel34:2 Ee, weritab chi, maoten agobo mestowekab Israel, maoten, ak ilenji mestowechoto, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Bwa mestowekab Israel che baegei amitwogik ichegei! Tos manyoljin mestowek kobai kechirek?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Oame che akwaen, ak olaachi kororikab kechirek, oenye che akwaen; ago mobae kechirek." 
Ezekiel34:4 Ma ogimit che miandos, ama onya ne kigomian, ama orob ne kigoil, ama oweech kogeny ne kigeon, ama ocheng’ ne kigobet: ago kiobou eng’ kimnatet ak eng’ koromnatet." 
Ezekiel34:5 Kiyesta amu kima komi mestowot: ak kiek amitwogikab tugul che bo timin, ak kiyesta." 
Ezekiel34:6 Kiombenioti kechirekyuk eng’ tulonok tugul, ak eng’ tulwet age tugul ne koi: ee, kiyesta kechirekyuk koyom ng’ony tugul; ak kima komi chi ne kicheng’at anan kosubot ichek." 
Ezekiel34:7 Ogas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek mestowek;" 
Ezekiel34:8 Ko u ye asobe, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, amu iman ko u ye kigeluul kechirekyuk, ak koek kechirekyuk amitwogikab tiong’ik tugul che bo timin, amu kima komi mestowot, ama cheng’at mestowekyuk kechirekyuk, ago kibaegei mestowek amitwogik ichegei, ama bai kechirekyuk;" 
Ezekiel34:9 ogas anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek mestowek;" 
Ezekiel34:10 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, aborie mestowek; ak amage eunekwak kechirekyuk, ak aete ichek kobai kechirek; ama kobaegei mestowek amitwogik kogeny; ak asoru kechirekyuk eng’ kutuswekwak, si maek amitwogikwak." 
Ezekiel34:11 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, ane, anendet ne acheng’oti kechirekyuk, ak asuboti ichek." 
Ezekiel34:12 Ko u ye cheng’ei mestowot akwennyi eng’ betut ne mi kwenutab kechirekyik che kigiiyesta, acheng’e ko u noto kechirekyuk; ak asoru ichek komong’ eng’ komoswek tugul ole kiga kiyestochi eng’ betutab bolik ak tulungenet ne imen." 
Ezekiel34:13 Ak amutu komong’ eng’ bororiosiek, ak ayumu eng’ emotinwek, ak amutu kobwa emenywa; ak abai ichek eng’ tulonokab Israel, eng’ ole negite kererusiek, ak eng’ komoswek tugul che kimenyei eng’ emonoto." 
Ezekiel34:14 Ayage ichek ole mi suswek che miach, ak kotebe biunywa tulonokab komoswek che tororen che bo Israel: ruitos eng’ oloto eng’ biut ne mie, ak koagete ole bitat eng’ tulonokab Israel." 
Ezekiel34:15 Ane ne abae kechirekyuk, ak agochi koruiyo, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel34:16 Acheng’e ne kibet, ak amutu kogeny ne kigion, ak arob ne kiil, ak agimit ne kimiani: ak abar ne nerat koboto ne kim: abae ichek kiruoget." 
Ezekiel34:17 Ago ee okwek, akwennyu, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, aruokyini artet eng’ artet, koboto mengichik ak kwesik." 
Ezekiel34:18 Tos kit ne ming’in eng’ okwek obaege tuguk che miach, yeityo otiekyi ng’ony che king’at eng’ ole oagete? Ak oee beek che tililen, yeityo oturur eng’ kelyekwok che kang’et?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Ago amei kechirekyuk che kiotiech, ak koee che kioturur eng’ kelyekwok." 
Ezekiel34:20 Mwachin anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ichek ko u ni kolenji: Ogeero, aruokyini anendet artet ne nerat eng’ artet ne sagitat." 
Ezekiel34:21 Amu kiotoortaisie karaswekwok ak tigigoikwok, ak otoore kuinoikwok tugul che kimiandos, kot oseer koba oldo tugul;" 
Ezekiel34:22 asoru anyun kechirekyuk, ma koegu che kiluulei kogeny; ak aruokyi artet eng’ artet." 
Ezekiel34:23 Ak ande mestowot agenge koyaga ichek, ak kobai ichek, noto ko otwogindennyu Daudi; baei inendet ichek, ak koek mestowondenywa." 
Ezekiel34:24 Ak aegu ane Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak koek Daudi otwogindennyu, bounindet eng’ kwenunywa; kamwae ane Jehovah ng’olyondonito." 
Ezekiel34:25 Ak kiyomisge ak ichek eng’ kayomiset ne bo kalyet, ak agesu tiong’ik che yaach eng’ emet: ak komeny ong’atet eng’ chametab ge, ak koruiyo osnosiek." 
Ezekiel34:26 Ak ayai ichek koek kaberuret koboto komoswek ole negite tulwennyu; ak ang’at ropta korobon eng’ betusiekyik; ak kobiit roptab kaberuret. 
Ezekiel34:27 Ak koi logoek ketitab mbar, ak korur emet, ak kotebe chametab ge eng’ emenywa; ak konai kole a Jehovah, ye tun airi ketikab choginywa, ko kaasoru ichek komong’ eng’ eutab bik che kiyai ichek koek otwogikwak." 
Ezekiel34:28 Ama koegu kogeny che luulei bororiosiek, ama koamei tiony ne bo ng’ony ichek; ago meng’isiei eng’ chametab ge, ama kobiitu chi ne imui." 
Ezekiel34:29 Ak achopchi ichek mbaret ne toogunot, ama kobarei rubet ichek eng’ emet, ama koiboti kalilanet ne bunu bororiosiek." 
Ezekiel34:30 Si konai kole ami ane Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa koboto ichek, ak konai ichek kole gotab Israel ko bikyuk, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel34:31 Ak okwek, kechirekyuk, che o kechirekab akwennyu, ko o bik, ak a Kamuktaindeng’wong’, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel35:1 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Ezekiel35:2 Ee, weritab chi, tokyi togeng’ung’ tulwetab Seir, ak imaotenji," 
Ezekiel35:3 ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, aborienen, ee tulwetab Seir, ak atokyinin eunnyu, ak ayain iguber ak iegu ne kikwong’e." 
Ezekiel35:4 Abute nganasoguk, ak iegu karatia; si inai ile a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel35:5 Amu itinye bunyondit ne bo kotugul, ak kiigoite lagokab Israel kebar eng’ kimnatetab rotwetab chok eng’ betutab nyalildanywa, eng’ betusiekab yaitiet ne bo let:" 
Ezekiel35:6 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah, kole, Ko u ye asobe, achopchinin korotik, ak kosubun korotik: amu ma iwech korotik, kosubin anyun korotik." 
Ezekiel35:7 Ayae anyun ko u noto tulwetab Seir koek ne kikwong’e ak koguber; ak agesu inendet ne bunei tulwonoto, ak inendet ne weegegei yoto." 
Ezekiel35:8 Ak anyiit tulonokyik bikyik che kigebar: ak kobutyo ichek che kigebar eng’ rotwetab chok eng’ tulonoguk ak eng’ atebwosieguk ak eng’ kererusieguk. 
Ezekiel35:9 Ayain iguber agoi, ama kemenyei nganasoguk: si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel35:10 Amu kiimwa ile, Egu chechuk bororiosiechu aeng’u ak emotinwechu aeng’ ak kenam kobunjech; ago kimi Jehovah oloto:" 
Ezekiel35:11 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ko u ye asobe, ayae ko u neregeguk, ak ko u ng’etkondang’ung’ ne kiiboru iweche ichek; ak aboruge eng’ kwenunywa, ye tun aruogun." 
Ezekiel35:12 Ak inai ile ane Jehovah ne kiagas chubisiosieguk tugul che kiimwa agobo tulonokab Israel, ile, Kigeyai koguber, kigegonech keam." 
Ezekiel35:13 Ak kiochounenage eng’ kutuswekwok, ak kiotes ng’alekwok agobo ane: kiagas ng’olyondonoto." 
Ezekiel35:14 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ye tun baibait ng’ony komugul, ayain iguber." 
Ezekiel35:15 Ko u ye kiibaibaitune borotetab gotab Israel, amu kiguber, ayaun ko u noto: iguberi, ee, inye tulwetab Seir, ak Edom komugul, komosato tugul; si konai ichek kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel36:1 Ee inye, weritab chi, maotenji tulonokab Israel, ilenji, Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek tulonokab Israel." 
Ezekiel36:2 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu kigomwa bunyot agobo okwek, kole, Haa! Ak kole, Kagobunjech komoswek che tororen che bo keny:" 
Ezekiel36:3 maoten anyun, ile, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu nganda kigoyaak ichek oegu bonon, ak koluguak eng’ komosta age tugul, si kobiit obunji bororiosiek che ng’etunotin, ak kigochaamatak bik, ak komwaetaenak tuguk che yaach:" 
Ezekiel36:4 ogas anyun ng’olyotab Kiptaiyat Jehovah, okwek tulonokab Israel; Mwachin Kiptaiyat Jehovah tulonok che eechen ak che mengechen, koboto kererusiek, ak atebwosiek ak komoswek che karatwek ak nganasok che kigemeto, che kigoek luulenik ak che rorechin bororiosiek che ng’etunotin eng’ komoswek tugul:" 
Ezekiel36:5 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kiamwa iman eng’ matab ng’etkondanyu agobo bororiosiek che ng’etunotin, ak agobo Edom tugul, che kiityigei emennyu kole kobunji eng’ boiboiyetab mugulelwekwak tugul, eng’ koromnatetab sobondo, si kogoito keluul:" 
Ezekiel36:6 maoten anyun agobo emetab Israel, ak ilenji tulonok che eechen ak che mengechen, koboto kererusiek, ak atebwosiek, ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, kiamwa eng’ ng’etkondanyu ak neregekyuk che ng’wonen, amu kiogesen kalilanetab bororiosiek:" 
Ezekiel36:7 mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kiachuul eunnyu, amwa ale, Ibei kalilanenywa bororiosiek che mi komoswekwok." 
Ezekiel36:8 Ago ing’atos temenikwok, ee okwek tulonokab Israel; ak oiichi logoekwok bikyuk Israel; amu negit kobwa." 
Ezekiel36:9 Amu, ogeero, ami komostang’wong’, ak aweekyoge, si kibatak, kegolak:" 
Ezekiel36:10 ak ateswok bik, got komugul ne bo Israel, got tugul: ak kemeny nganasok, ak keteech karatwek:" 
Ezekiel36:11 ak ateswok bik ak tiong’ik; ak kotesak ak koiiyo: ak kemenyok ko u betusiekwok che bo tai, ak ayaiywok ne mie kosiir eng’ tai: si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel36:12 Ee, agochini bik kobendatenak, choto bikyuk Israel; ak konamin ichek ibunji ak iegu borotenywa, ama ibare lagokwak kogeny." 
Ezekiel36:13 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amu mwawok kolenjinok, I amindetab bik, inye emoni, ak kiiegu ne ibare bororieng’ung’;" 
Ezekiel36:14 ma iame anyun bik kogeny, ama ibare bororieng’ung’ kogeny, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah;" 
Ezekiel36:15 ama achamun igas kogeny kalilanetab bororiosiek, ama igeseni tewernatetab bororiosiek kogeny, ama inach bororieng’ung’ kogeny, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel36:16 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel36:17 Ee, weritab chi, ye kimenyei gotab Israel emenywa, ko kiing’wanit emonoto eng’ ortinwekwak ak eng’ boisionikwak: ki u ortinwekwak eng’ tainnyu simwekab kwondo eng’ betusiekyik che bo arawet." 
Ezekiel36:18 Kiarong’ji anyun neregekyuk che ng’wonen amu korotik che kiga kotumji emet, ak kiga kong’wanit emonoto eng’ kanamonikwak:" 
Ezekiel36:19 ak kiaseerji ichek bororiosiek, ak kigiyestochi emotinwek: kiaruokyi ichek ko u ortinwekwak ak ko u boisionikwak." 
Ezekiel36:20 Ak kingoit oldab bororiosiek ole kiba, ko kiimuruon kainennyu ne tilil; amu kimwa bik agobo ichek kole, Bichu ko bikab Jehovah, ak kigoba eng’ emennyi." 
Ezekiel36:21 Ago kiarire kainennyu ne tilil, ne kigomuruon gotab Israel eng’ bororiosiek, ole kiba." 
Ezekiel36:22 Mwachi anyun gotab Israel ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Mayae nito agobo okwek ee gotab Israel, ago ayae agobo kainennyu ne tilil, ne kiomuruon eng’ bororiosiek che kiobe." 
Ezekiel36:23 Ak ataban kainennyu ne o ne kigimuruon eng’ kwenunywa; si konai bororiosiek kole a Jehovah, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ye aegu ne kitabanat eng’ okwek eng’ tainywa." 
Ezekiel36:24 Amu amutwok omong’une bororiosiek, ak ayumak omong’u eng’ emotinwek tugul, ak amutwak obwa emeng’wong’." 
Ezekiel36:25 Ak abisenok beek che tililen, si otililitu: ak aundawok simdang’wong’ tugul, ak kanamonikwok tugul." 
Ezekiel36:26 Agonok kogeny muguleldo ne leel, ak andeok tamirmiriet ne leel: ak aiste muguleldo ne u koita eng’ borwekwok, ak agonok muguleldo ne bo banyek." 
Ezekiel36:27 Ak andeok Tamirmiriennyu, ak agonok obendate ng’atutikyuk, ak orib kiruogutikyuk ak oyai." 
Ezekiel36:28 Ak omeny emet ne kiagochi kwanisiekwok; ak oegu bikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Ezekiel36:29 Ak asoruok eng’ simwekwok tugul: ak aguur bek si ates, ama agonok rubet kogeny." 
Ezekiel36:30 Ak ates iyotetab logoek, ak ruratetab mbaret, si mata kochotak bororiosiek amu rubet." 
Ezekiel36:31 Yeityo obwat anyun ortinwekwok che yaach, ak boisionikwok che kima ko miachen; ak osasge okwege eng’ taing’wong’ amu tengekwogikwok ak amu tugukwok che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel36:32 Mayae nito amu okwek, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ingonaak ng’olyondoni eng’ okwek: olilanse, ak otoptobense amu ortinwekwok, ee gotab Israel." 
Ezekiel36:33 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Agochini kemeny nganasok kogeny, ak keteech karatwek, eng’ betut ne aundawok tengekwogikwok tugul." 
Ezekiel36:34 Ak kibat emet ne kiga koguber agot nganda kiga koguber kogeerei tugul che kisiirtoi. 
Ezekiel36:35 Ak tun mwaei kole, kaigei emoni kiga koguber, mbaretab Eden; ak kageng’ot ak kemeny nganasok che kiga koek karatwek, ak koguber, ak kong’emak." 
Ezekiel36:36 Konai anyun bororiosiek che ng’etunotin eng’ komoswekwok, kole, koateeche ane Jehovah komoswechuto kiga kobutok, ak agol ole kiga koguber: kamwae ane Jehovah, ak ayae." 
Ezekiel36:37 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Teepsena anyun gotab Israel agobo nito, si kobiit ayachi; atesyini ichek bik kochang’a ko u akwetab kechirek." 
Ezekiel36:38 Ko u akwetab kechirek che egu tiseiywek, ko u akwetab kechirekab Jerusalem eng’ betusiekyik che bo igorwek che kiging’at; kinyiiti ko u noto nganasok che kiga koek karatwek eng’ tuiyosiekab bik: si konai ichek kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel37:1 Kimi baragunnyu eutab Jehovah, ak kiimuta eng’ Tamirmirietab Jehovah, ak kotua eng’ kwenutab atebwet; ak ki nyiitat kowek;" 
Ezekiel37:2 ak kiindoiywa abun komoswek tugul che bo kowechoto: ak ogeero, kimi kowek che chang’ atebwonoto; ak ogeero, ki yaamnyotin mising’:" 
Ezekiel37:3 ak kilenja, Ee, weritab chi, tos, imuchi kosopcho kowechu? Ak kiawolu ale, Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ingen inye." 
Ezekiel37:4 Ak kilenja kogeny, Maotenji kowechu, ak ilenji, Ee, okwek kowechu yaamnyotin, ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah." 
Ezekiel37:5 Mwachin anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah kowechu kolenjin: Ogeero, andeok kabuset, si osopche." 
Ezekiel37:6 Andeok simoloik ak alaakwok banyek ak atugenok iririot, yeityo andeok kabuset, si osopche; si onai ole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel37:7 Kiamaoten anyun ko u ye kiging’ata: ak ye kita amaoteni, kobiit cheet, ak ogeero, kibiit kirgirenet, ak kinamatgei kowek, ak kinamgei kowet ak kowennyi." 
Ezekiel37:8 Ak kiageer, ak ogeero, kiga konam simoloik kowechoto, ak kibiit banyek, ak kotuch iririot banyechato: ago kima komi kabuset." 
Ezekiel37:9 Kolenja anyun, Maotenji usonet, maoten, ee, weritab chi, ak ilenji usonet, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Nyo eng’ usonaik ang’wan, ee kabuset, ak ibusyi chu kigebar, si kobiit kosopcho." 
Ezekiel37:10 Kiamaoten anyun ko u ye king’ata inendet, ak kinyonji ichek kabuset, ak kisopcho, ak kotononso eng’ kelyekwak, luget ne o mising’." 
Ezekiel37:11 Yeityo, komwawa kolenja, Ee, weritab chi, kowechu ko gotab Israel komugul: keero, len ichek, Kigoyaamnyo kowekyok, ak kigobet kamang’unennyo; kigigeswech." 
Ezekiel37:12 Maoten anyun, ak ilenji ichek, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, ayate kererisiekwok, ak amoong’wok eng’ kererisiekwok, ee bikyuk; ak amutwok obwa emetab Israel." 
Ezekiel37:13 Ak onai ole a Jehovah, ye kaayat kererisiekwok, ak amoong’wok eng’ kererisiekwok, ee bikyuk." 
Ezekiel37:14 Ak andeok Tamirmiriennyu, si osopche, ak andeok emeng’wong’ si kobiit onai ole ane Jehovah ne kamwae ng’olyondonito, ak ayai, mwaei Jehovah." 
Ezekiel37:15 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel37:16 Ee, weritab chi, nam kirokto agenge, ak isir ile, Bo Juda, ak ko bo lagokab Israel che mi tugul ak inendet: yeityo inam kirokto age, ak isir ile, Bo Josep, kiroktab Epraim, ak ne bo got komugul ne bo Israel koboto che mi tugul ak inendet:" 
Ezekiel37:17 ak ituiyechige kirokwechoto tuwai koek kirokto agenge, si kobiit koek agenge eng’ eung’ung’." 
Ezekiel37:18 Ak ye tun teebenen lagokab biguk kolenjin, Tos meboruech kit ne iboru inye eng’ ng’alechuto?" 
Ezekiel37:19 Ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, aname kiroktab Josep, ne mi eutab Epraim, koboto ortinwekab Israel che mi tugul ak inendet; ak atuiye ichek koboto kiroktab Juda, ak ayae koek kirokto agenge, si koek agenge eng’ eunnyu." 
Ezekiel37:20 Ak kotebe eung’ung’ eng’ tainywa kirokwek che kesirei. 
Ezekiel37:21 Ak ilenji ichek, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, amutu lagokab Israel komong’ eng’ bororiosiek, ole kigoba, ak ayum ichek eng’ komosta agenge tugul, ak amutu ichek kobwa emenywa." 
Ezekiel37:22 Ak ayai ichek koek bororiet agenge eng’ emet, eng’ tulonokab Israel: ak koek laitoriat agenge laitoriandenywa eng’ ichek tugul: ak ma koegu kogeny bororiosiek aeng’, ama kepchei ichek kogeny koek bounatosiek aeng’ agoi."
