Ezekiel37:23 Ama kong’wanitegei kanamonikwak kogeny, anan eng’ tugukwak che samis, anan agot agenge eng’ bistaosiekwak: ago asoru ichek eng’ oldinwekwak tugul che menyei: ole kiyae tengekto, ak atilil ichek: egu anyun bikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa." 
Ezekiel37:24 Ak koek otwogindennyu Daudi laitoriandenywa; ak konyor ichek tugul mestowot agenge: ak kobendate kiruogutikyuk ak korib ng’atutikyuk ak koyai. 
Ezekiel37:25 Ak komeny emet ne kiagochi Jakobo otwogindennyu, ole kimenyei kwanisiekwok; ak komeny oloto icheget, koboto lagokwak, ak lagokab lagokwak, agoi koigeny: ak koek Daudi otwogindennyu, bounindenywa koigeny." 
Ezekiel37:26 Ak kiyomisge ak ichek kogeny eng’ kayomiset ne bo kalyet: egu eng’ ichek kayomiset ne wendi agoi koigeny: ak alumde ichek, ak ates, ande oldanyu ne tilil kwenunywa agoi koigeny." 
Ezekiel37:27 Tebyei agine emainnyu koboto ichek; ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa, ak koek ichek bikyuk." 
Ezekiel37:28 Ak konai bororiosiek kole a Jehovah ne atabani Israel, ye tun tebe oldanyu ne tilil kwenunywa koigeny." 
Ezekiel38:1 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah, kolenja," 
Ezekiel38:2 Ee, weritab chi, tokyi togeng’ung’ Gog, ne bo emetab Magog, bounindetab Ros, Mesek, ak Tubal, ak imaoten agobo inendet," 
Ezekiel38:3 ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, aborienen, ee Gog, bouinindetab Ros, Mesek, ak Tubal;" 
Ezekiel38:4 awelelin, ak ande kombok tagilgiliguk, ak amutun koboto lugeng’ung’ tugul, mbartanyisiek ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek, kolaachi tugul karik tugul che bo luget, luget ne o ne tinyei long’onik che eechen ak che mengechen, kotinyei tugul rotokab chok:" 
Ezekiel38:5 mi koboto ichek Persia, Kus, ak Put; kotinyei tugul long’onik ak chepkuloik che bo karik:" 
Ezekiel38:6 koboto Gomer ak lugosiekyik tugul; koboto gotab Togarma eng’ tabanwek che looen che bo murot ne bo katam, ak lugosiekyik tugul: bororiosiek che chang’ che mi koboten." 
Ezekiel38:7 Choboge, ee chopge, inye koboto lugosieguk tugul che kaiyumjingei, ak iegu kandoindenywa." 
Ezekiel38:8 Kibwanjinin ko kagosiirto betusiek che chang’: iite eng’ kenyisiek che bo let emet ne kigiweegune rotwetab chok, ne kigiweech eng’ bororiosiek che chang’, eng’ tolonokab Israel, ne kiga koguber betusiek che chang’: ago kigiweech komong’ eng’ bororiosiek ak komeng’is tugul eng’ chametab ge." 
Ezekiel38:9 Ak itogosu, inye ko u usonet, iige boldet ne tuchei emet, inye koboto lugosieguk tugul, komi bororiosiek che chang’ koboten." 
Ezekiel38:10 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Bwanjinin kabwatutik eng’ betunoto, ak ibwat chobutiet ne ya:" 
Ezekiel38:11 ak imwa ile, Atogostoi emetab nganasok che matinyei irimoik; awendi ole mi ichek che mi eng’ kalyet, che meng’isiei eng’ chametab ge, meng’isiei ichek tugul ama tinyei irimoik, ama tinyei temeleiywek anan ormarichok:" 
Ezekiel38:12 si kobiit aluul ak aib barunenik; si kobiit ibar komoswek che ki karatwek che kimenyei nguno, ak obarge ak bik che kigiyum komong’une bororiosiek, che tinyei tuga ak tuguk, che menyei emet kwen." 
Ezekiel38:13 Teebenen Sheba, ak Dedan, ak chemung’arainikab Tarsis, koboto ng’etunikyik tugul che neranik, kolenjinin, Tos kenyo iluul? Tos kaiyum lugosieguk si kobiit iib barunenik? Si kobiit iib feda ak tahabu, ak ikweri tuga ak iib tuguk, iluul luulet ne o?" 
Ezekiel38:14 Maoten anyun, ee, weritab chi, ak ilenji Gog, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Eng’ betut ye tun kameng’is bikyuk Israel eng’ chametab ge, ko tos menae?" 
Ezekiel38:15 Ak inyo eng’ oldang’ung’ eng’ tabanwek che looen che bo murot ne bo katam, komi bororiosiek che chang’ koboten, kolanyei tugul mbartanyisiek, bik che chang’, ak ko luget ne kim:" 
Ezekiel38:16 ak obwa obarge ak bikyuk Israel, ko u boldet ne tuchei emet; amutun eng’ betusiek che bo let obwa obarge ak emennyu, si kobiit konaa bororiosiek, ye tun aegu ne itabanat eng’ inye, ee Gog, eng’ tainywa." 
Ezekiel38:17 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Tos inye ne kiamwaite keny eng’ otwogikyuk maotikab Israel, che kimaoteni eng’ betusiechoto eng’ kenyisiek che chang’ kole tun amutun inyo obarge ak ichek?" 
Ezekiel38:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ye tun baregei Gog ak emetab Israel, eng’ betusiechoto, kobiit neregekyuk che ng’wonen che mong’une serunekyuk." 
Ezekiel38:19 Amu kaamwa eng’ ng’etkondanyu ak eng’ matab neregekyuk, ale, Biitu iman botanet ne o eng’ betunoto eng’ emetab Israel;" 
Ezekiel38:20 kot kobotanso eng’ tainnyi njirenikab nyanjet, ak taritik che bo barak, ak tiong’ikab timin, ak tuguk tugul che ichuutegei ng’ony, koboto bik tugul che mitei ng’ony, ak kiluul tulonok, ak kong’isiogen ole keigei, ak kolul irimet age tugul." 
Ezekiel38:21 Ak aguur rotwetab chok kobargei ak inendet agoi tulonokyuk tugul, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah: baregei chi tugul ak tupchennyi." 
Ezekiel38:22 Ak ager kong’ inendet eng’ koroito ak korotik; ak ayokyi inendet, koboto lugosiekyik, ak bikyik che chang’ che mi koboto inendet, ropta ne o, ak koik che eechen che bo ropta, ak mat, ak tuguk che laldos." 
Ezekiel38:23 Ak atororge, ak atabange, ak abartege eng’ taitab bororiosiek che chang’; si konai ichek kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel39:1 Ee, inye weritab chi, maoten agobo Gog, ak ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Keero, aborienen inye, ee Gog, bounindetab Ros, Mesek, ak Tubal:" 
Ezekiel39:2 ak awelelin, ak areun, ak amutun itogosu eng’ tabanwek che looen che bo murot ne bo katam; ak amutun inyo tulonokab Israel:" 
Ezekiel39:3 ak akwer kwangeng’ung’ ne mi eung’ung’ ne bo katam, kobut, ak agochi kobutyo kipchaboniguk, eng’ eung’ung’ ne bo tai." 
Ezekiel39:4 Ibutyini tulonokab Israel, inye ak lugosieguk tugul, koboto bororiosiek che mi koboten: ak agochin taritik alak tugul che amei banyek, koboto tiong’ikab timin, koamin." 
Ezekiel39:5 Imeechini kewanin: amu kaamwa ng’olyondonito, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel39:6 Ak ayokyi mat Magog, koboto icheget che meng’isiei eng’ chametab ge eng’ ngegusiek: si konai ichek kole a Jehovah." 
Ezekiel39:7 Ak abarte kainennyu ne tilil eng’ bikyuk Israel; ama achamdoi kainennyu ne tilil king’wanit kogeny: si konai bororiosiek kole a Jehovah, Inendet ne Tilil eng’ Israel." 
Ezekiel39:8 Keero, nyonei, ak kiyaei ko u noto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah; nito betut ne kiamwae." 
Ezekiel39:9 Ak komanda ichek che menyei nganasokab Israel, ak kolaale mat karikab luget ak kobeel tuguchoto, long’onik, ak long’onik che eechen, kwangok, kipchabonik, ndirisiek, ak ng’otwek, ak kobeel karichato eng’ kenyisiek tisab;" 
Ezekiel39:10 kot ko ma kobutei ichek kwenik anan koluul ket age tugul eng’ osnosiek, amu tun ilaale mat karikab luget; ak koluul tugukab bik che kiga koluulei ichek, ak korebe tuguk bik che kiga korebe ichek, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel39:11 Ak agochini eng’ betunoto Gog komosta ne kitupchin eng’ Israel, atebwetab ichek che bunei komostab kong’asis ne bo nyanjet: ak koger ichek che bunei yoto: ak kotupchi oloto Gog ak bikyik che chang’ tugul: ak koguure yoto atebwetab Hamon-gog." 
Ezekiel39:12 Ak kotub gotab Israel ichek arawek tisab, si kobiit kotilil emet." 
Ezekiel39:13 Ee, tubei bik tugul che bo emet ichek; ak koek kit ne toogunot eng’ ichek, eng’ betut ne tun kitorora, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel39:14 Ak kotaban bik kobunot emet betusiek tugul, ak kotubot che kiga ng’et eng’ emet, si kotilil emet: cheng’oti ye kagogesgei arawechoto tisabu." 
Ezekiel39:15 Ak ye bunoti icheget emet, ak kogeer chi age tugul kowa ne bo chi, konde anyun kaborunet yoto, agoi kotub bik che tubisiei eng’ atebwetab Hamon-gog." 
Ezekiel39:16 Ak koek kogeny Hamona kainetab nganaset. Ianyinyi emet ko u noto. 
Ezekiel39:17 Ee, weritab chi, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Mwachi taritik alak tugul, ak tiony age tugul ne bo timin, ilenji, Oyumge ak obwa; oyumge eng’ komosta age tugul si obwanji eng’sennyu ne aeng’wok, eng’set ne o eng’ tulonokab Israel, si kobiit oam banyek ak oee korotik." 
Ezekiel39:18 Oam banyekab che kimen, ak oee korotikab bounikab ng’ony, che bo mengichik, ak che bo arekab kechir, ak che bo ng’ororek, ak che bo kirugik, tugul che akwaen che bo Basan." 
Ezekiel39:19 Ak koam mwanik kot obiyong’se, ak oee korotik kot kobogitye, che bo eng’sennyu ne kaaeng’wok." 
Ezekiel39:20 Ak obiyong’dosi eng’ mesennyu eng’ mbartanyisiek ak karisiek che bo luget, eng’ bik che nyigonen, koboto bik tugul che bo luget, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel39:21 Ak ande torornatennyu kwenutab bororiosiek ak kogeer bororiosiek tugul kiruogennyu ne kaayai, ak eunnyu ne kiagonoor ichek." 
Ezekiel39:22 Konai anyun gotab Israel kole a Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, koboch betunoto ak kwo tai." 
Ezekiel39:23 Ak konai bororiosiek kole kigiluul gotab Israel amu tengektanywa; amu kiingelelja, ak kiaung’e ichek togennyu: kiande anyun ichek eutab bunikwak, ak kobek ichek tugul eng’ rotwetab chok." 
Ezekiel39:24 Kiayachi ichek ko u muruonindanywa ak ko u bistaosiekwak; ak kiaung’e ichek togennyu. 
Ezekiel39:25 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Amutu kogeny che kigiluul che bo Jakobo, ak arire got komugul ne bo Israel; ak koama ng’etkong’ agobo kainennyu ne tilil." 
Ezekiel39:26 Ak kogesen kalilanenywa, koboto bistaosiekwak tugul che kiyaiywa, ye tun meny emenywa eng’ chametab ge, ama biitu chi ne imui ichek;" 
Ezekiel39:27 ye tun kaamutu ichek kogeny komong’ eng’ bororiosiek, ak ayumu ichek komong’ eng’ emotinwekab bunikwak, ak kitabana eng’ taitab bororiosiek che chang’." 
Ezekiel39:28 Ak konai ichek kole a Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, amu kiagoite ichek keluul koba bororiosiek, ak koayumji ichek emenywa: ama abagakyini agot agenge oloto kogeny;" 
Ezekiel39:29 ama aung’e ichek togennyu kogeny; amu kaarong’ji tamirmiriennyu gotab Israel, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel40:1 Kimi baragunnyu eutab Jehovah eng’ kenyitab tiptem ak mut, koboch ngab keluulech, eng’ taunetab kenyit, eng’ betutab taman ne bo arawet, eng’ kenyitab taman ak ang’wan koboch ngab kebar nganaset, ak komutwa anyo oloto eng’ betunoto." 
Ezekiel40:2 Kiimutwa eng’ ng’ang’utikab Kamuktaindet anyo emetab Israel ak kondea tulwet ne koi mising’, ole kimi itondab teeksetab nganaset eng’ murot ne bo tai." 
Ezekiel40:3 Ak kiimutwa anyo yoto, ak ogeero, kimi yoto chi, ne ki u itondanyi itondab sugunwet kotinyei borowetab katanit eng’ eunnyi, ak tegat ne kikwaise; ak kitonone ormarichet." 
Ezekiel40:4 Ak kilenja chichoto, Ee, weritab chi, keer eng’ konyeguk, ak igas eng’ itiguk, ak inde muguleldang’ung’ tuguk tugul che ta aborun; amu kagimutun inyo olito si kobiit aborun tuguchuto: tetyi gotab Israelk tuguk tugul che igeere." 
Ezekiel40:5 Ak ogeero, kimi inatut ne kiyiem got, ak kimi eutab chichoto tegat ne kikwaise ne bo kakwautik lo che bo eut eng’ koindo, kakwautiet age tugul eng’ choto lo, ko ki tesat tebeesindo agenge ne bo eut: kiikwa anyun tebeesindab inatut, koek tegat agenge; ak kiek koindab tononennyi tegat agenge." 
Ezekiel40:6 Kiit anyun ormarichet ne tokyingei kong’asis, ak kolany kobun long’eiywot, ak kiikwa seremut ne bo ormarichet, kiek tegat agenge tebeesindo: ak kiek seremunoto tegat agenge tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:7 Ak kiek koindab got age tugul ne bo orit tegat agenge, ak ki tegat agenge tebeesindo; ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut koboch got age agoi got age; ak ki tegat agenge seremut ne bo orit ne bo ormarichet ne kimi ole kibunei kebendi keterut ne bo ormarichet ne tokyingei got." 
Ezekiel40:8 Kiikwa kogeny keterut ne bo ormarichet ne tokyingei got, koek tegat agenge." 
Ezekiel40:9 Yeityo kokwa keterut ne bo ormarichet koek kakwautik sisiit che bo eut; ak kiek tugatugikyik kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut; ak kitokyingei keterut ne bo ormarichet got. 
Ezekiel40:10 Ak ki somok gorik che kimi komosi ak komosin che bo ormarichet ne kitokyingei kong’asis; kiaechin tugul ko somok: ak kiaechin tugatugikab komosi ak komosin. 
Ezekiel40:11 Ak kiikwa tebeesindab ole kibunei eng’ ormarichet, ki kakwautik taman che bo eut; ak kiek koindab ormarichet kakwautik taman ak somok che bo eut;" 
Ezekiel40:12 ak kimi tegeleiywot taitab gorichoto bo orit, ne bo kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut eng’ komosi, ak tegeleiywot age ne bo kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut eng’ komosin; ak ki kakwautik lo che bo eut gorichoto bo orit eng’ komosi ak komosin." 
Ezekiel40:13 Ak kiikwa ormarichet koboch got barak ne bo got age agoi got barak ne bo got age, kiek tebeesindo kakwautik tiptem ak mut che bo eut; kong’eete kurget age agoi kurget age." 
Ezekiel40:14 Kiikwa keterut, ak kiek kakwautik tiptem che bo eut; kibunei keterut kemong’jin seremut ne o." 
Ezekiel40:15 Kiek kakwautik konom che bo eut koboch taitab ormarichet ne kibunei kebendi orit agoi taitab keterut ne bo orit ne bo ormarichet. 
Ezekiel40:16 Ak kitinyei gorichoto bo orit tirisiok che regerotin, koboto tugatugikwak che kimi ormarichanato komosta age tugul, ak ki u noto eng’ keterut: ak kimi tirisiok komoswek tugul ole bo orit: ak kimi itonwekab tironik eng’ tugatukyet age tugul." 
Ezekiel40:17 Kikimutwa anyun anyo seremut ne kimong’jin, ak ogeero, kimitoti gorik che bo orit, ak ole kigibunoti ole kigimale koik, che kigiyai koyiem seremut: kimi gorik sosomu oloto kigimale koik." 
Ezekiel40:18 Kimi komoswek che kigimal ole negite ormarichok, che aechin ak koindab ormarichok, choto komoswek che tabanu ng’ony." 
Ezekiel40:19 Yeityo kokwa tebeesindo koboch ormarichet ne tabanu ng’ony, agoi taitab seremut ne bo orit ole bo sang’, kiek kakwautik bogol che bo eut eng’ komostab kong’asis ak eng’ murot ne bo katam." 
Ezekiel40:20 Ak kiikwa koindo ak tebeesindo ne bo ormarichetab seremut ne kimong’jin ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam. 
Ezekiel40:21 Ak kimi gorikyik somogu che bo orit komosi ak komosin; kiaechin kakwautikab tugatugikyik koboto che bo keterunnyi, ak che bo ormarichet ni ka bo tai; ki kakwautik konom che bo eut koindanywa ak kakwautik tiptem ak mut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:22 Ak ki aechin kakwautikab tirisiokyik, ak che bo keterunnyi, koboto che bo itonwekyik che bo tironik, ak che bo ormarichet ne tokyingei kong’asis; ak kitogostae long’eiywot ne tinyei tuguk tisab che kitiegoti; ak kimi tainywa keterunnyi." 
Ezekiel40:23 Ak kimi ormarichet ne kebunei kebendi seremut ne bo orit ne kitokyingei ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo katam ak kimi ormarichet ne kitokyingei ormarichet ne bo kong’asis; ak kiikwa kong’eete ormarichet age agoi ormarichet age, koek kakwautik bogol che bo eut." 
Ezekiel40:24 Ak kiimuta atokyige murot ne bo tai, ak ogeero, kimi ormarichet ne tokyingei murot ne bo tai: ak kiikwa tugatugikyik ak keterunnyi kogergeit ak kakwautik chu ka bo tai." 
Ezekiel40:25 Ak kitinyei tirisiok ormarichanato koboto keterunnyi eng’ komoswek tugul che u tirisiochu ka bo tai: ki kakwautik konom che bo eut koindo, ak ki kakwautik tiptem ak mut che bo eut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:26 Ak kimi long’eiywot ne tinyei tuguk tisab che kitiegoti, ketogostoi, ak kimi keterut tainywa: ak kitinyei tugatugikyik itonwekab tironik komosi ak komosin." 
Ezekiel40:27 Ak kimi ormarichet ne kebunei kebendi seremut ne bo orit ne tokyingei murot ne bo tai: ak kiikwa kong’eete ormarichet age agoi ormarichet age kotokyigei murot ne bo tai, koek kakwautik bogol che bo eut." 
Ezekiel40:28 Kiimutwa anyun agoi seremut ne bo orit abune ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo tai: ak kiikwa ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo tai ko u kakwautik chu ka bo tai; 
Ezekiel40:29 koboto gorikyik che bo orit, ak tugatugikyik, ak keterunnyi, ko u kakwautik chu ka bo tai: ak kitinyei tirisiok ormarichanato koboto keterunnyi eng’ komoswek tugul: ki kakwautik konom che bo eut koindo, ak ki kakwautik tiptem ak mut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:30 Ak kimi keterut komoswek tugul, ne ki kakwautik tiptem ak mut che bo eut koindo, ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:31 Ak kitokyingei keterunnyi seremut ne bo sang’; ak kimi itonwekab tironik tugatugikyik: ak kitinyei long’eiywot tuguk sisiit che kitiegoti ketogostoi. 
Ezekiel40:32 Ak kiimutwa anyo seremut ne bo orit ne tokyingei kong’asis: ak kiikwa ormarichet ko u kakwautik chu ka bo tai; 
Ezekiel40:33 koboto gorikyik che bo orit, ak tugatugikyik, ak keterunnyi, ko u kakwautik chu ka bo tai: ak kitinyei tirisiok keterunnyi eng’ komoswek tugul; ki kakwautik konom che bo eut koindo, ak ki kakwautik tiptem ak mut che bo eut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:34 Ak kitokyingei keterunnyi seremut ne sib kemong’jin; ak kimi itonwekab tironik tugatugikyik eng’ komosi ak komosin: ak kitinyei long’eiywot tuguk sisiit che kitiegoti ketogostoi. 
Ezekiel40:35 Ak kiimutwa anyo ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo katam: ak kiikwa ko u kakwautik chu ka bo tai; 
Ezekiel40:36 koboto gorikyik che bo orit, ak tugatugikyik, ak keterunnyi; ak kitinyei tirisiok eng’ komoswek tugul: ki kakwautik konom che bo eut koindo ak ki kakwautik tiptem ak mut che bo eut tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel40:37 Ak kitokyingei tugatugikyik seremut ne sib kemong’jin; ak kitinyei tugatugichoto itonwekab tironik eng’ komosi ak komosin, ak kitinyei long’eiywot tuguk sisiit che kitiegoti ketogostoi." 
Ezekiel40:38 Ak kimi got ne bo orit koboto kurgennyi ye negite tugatugikab ormarichok; kigiune yoto kagochinet ne kibeelei. 
Ezekiel40:39 Ak kimi ye negite keterutab ormarichet, mesosiek aeng’u eng’ komosi ak aeng’ eng’ komosin, che kieng’jin kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagochinetab tengekto, ak kagochinetab chalwokto." 
Ezekiel40:40 Ak kimi mesosiek aeng’u eng’ komosta age eng’ ole bo sang’ eng’ ole kitogostoe kebendi ormarichet ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam; ak kimi mesosiek aeng’u komosta age che ki bo keterut ne bo ormarichet. 
Ezekiel40:41 Kimi mesosiek ang’wanu komosi, komi mesosiek ang’wanu komosin, eng’ ole negite ormarichet; mesosiek sisiit che kigieng’jin tiseiywek." 
Ezekiel40:42 Ak kimi mesosiek ang’wanu, che bo koik che kigiwai, che bo kagochinet ne kibeelei, ko kakwautiet agenge ak kebeberta ne bo eut, koindo, ak ki kakwautiet agenge ak kebeberta ne bo eut, tebeesindo, ak ki kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut, koindab tononennyi: kigigonore mesosiechoto tuguk che kigieng’e kagochinet ne kibeelei koboto tiseiywot." 
Ezekiel40:43 Ak kigiratyi kombok komoswek tugul, che koindanywa ko ki te tebeesindab eut: ak kimi banyekab kagochinet mesosiek barak." 
Ezekiel40:44 Ak kimi sang’utab ormarichet ne bo orit gorik che bo orit che bo tienik eng’ seremut ne bo orit, ne kimi komostab ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo katam; ak kitokyingei murot ne bo tai: kimi age komostab ormarichet ne bo kong’asis ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam." 
Ezekiel40:45 Ak kimwawa kolenja, Bo goito tokyingei murot ne bo tai tisiik, che tononjin ripsetab got." 
Ezekiel40:46 Ak bo got ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam tisiik che tononjin ripsetab kaptisisiet: chuto ko werikab Sadok, che salu werikab Lawi, che rikyin Jehovah koboisiechin inendet." 
Ezekiel40:47 Ak kiikwa seremut, koek kakwautik bogol che bo eut tebeesindo, kiaechin komoswek tugul ko ang’wan, ak kimi kaptisisiet taitab got." 
Ezekiel40:48 Kiimutwa anyun anyo keterutab got, ak kiikwa tugatukyet age tugul ne bo keterut, kiek kakwautik mut che bo eut komosi, koek kakwautik mut che bo eut komosin: ak kiek tebeesindab ormarichet kakwautik somok che bo eut komosi koek kakwautik somok komosin." 
Ezekiel40:49 Kiek kakwautik tiptem che bo eut koindab keterut, koek kakwautik taman ak agenge che bo eut tebeesindo; ak kimi tuguk tamanu che kigitiegoti ketogosyin yoto: ak kimi tolochik ole negite tugatugik, kimi age komosi, komi age komosin." 
Ezekiel41:1 Yeityo komutwa anyo hekalut, ak kiikwa tugatugik, kiek kakwautik lo che bo eut tebeesindo eng’ komosi, koek kakwautik lo che bo eut eng’ komosin, ne ki tebeesindab emait." 
Ezekiel41:2 Ak ki kakwautik taman che bo eut tebeesindab ole kibunei kebendi orit; ak komoswekab ole kibunei kebendi orit ko ki kakwautik mut che bo eut eng’ komosi, ak kakwautik mut che bo eut eng’ komosin: ak kiikwa koindanyi, koek kakwautik artam che bo eut, koek tebeesindo kakwautik tiptem che bo eut." 
Ezekiel41:3 Kiwa anyun inendet orit, ak kokwa tugatukyet age tugul ne bo ole kibunei kebendi orit, kiek kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut: ak kiek kakwautik lo che bo eut, ole kibunei kebendi orit; ak kiek kakwautik tisab che bo eut tebeesindab ole kibunei kebendi orit." 
Ezekiel41:4 Ak kiikwa koindanyi, koek kakwautik tiptem che bo eut, koek tebeesindo kakwautik tiptem che bo eut, eng’ taitab goyoto: ak kilenja, Olito ole tilil mising’." 
Ezekiel41:5 Yeityo kokwa inatutab got, koek kakwautik lo che bo eut; ak kiek tebeesindab got age tugul ne mi taban, kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut, che kimitoti oldo tugul eng’ got eng’ komosta age tugul." 
Ezekiel41:6 Ak kimitoti gorik che kigiyab koba barak konyil somok, eng’ baragutab got age tugul ne kimi inat, kiek sosom tugul ko katetatgei; ak kichut gorjoto bo taban inatusiekab got che bo gorik che mengechen, che mi taban eng’ komoswek tugul, si kobiit kotiiegei, si matiiegei inatutab got." 
Ezekiel41:7 Ak kitesogis gorjoto kigiyab kobaraitu koba barak; ko u ye kiyiem got kotes koba barak; amu ye kiyiemei got ko kitesak koba barak eng’ komoswek tugul che bo got: kitesak anyun tebeesindab got kwo barak; kiimuchi chi kotogosta kong’eete got ne tabanu ng’ony agoi got ne tabanu barak kobunei got ne bo kwen. 
Ezekiel41:8 Kiageer kogeny ale tinyei got ole sutot eng’ komoswekyik: kiyamegei lumeiywek che bo gorik che mi inat ak tegat ne bo kakwautik lo che bo eut. 
Ezekiel41:9 Ki kakwautik mut che bo eut nyigisindab inatut ne bo gorik che mi inat che tabanu sang’; ak ole kiga ng’et ko ki oldab gorik che bo inat che ki bo got. 
Ezekiel41:10 Ak ki kakwautik tiptem che bo eut tebeesindo ne bo kwenutab gorjoto mengechen, eng’ komosta age tugul ne bo got." 
Ezekiel41:11 Ak kitokyingei kurgotikab gorjoto bo kwen ole kiga ng’et, kitokyingei kurget age murot ne bo katam, kotokyingei age murot ne bo tai: ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut tebeesindab komosta ne kiga ng’et, eng’ komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ak ki kakwautik tamanwogik tisab che bo eut tebeesindab got ne kitokyindos ak komosta ne kimi taban eng’ komosta ne tokyingei cherongo; ak ki kakwautik mut che bo eut nyigisindab inatutab got eng’ komoswek tugul, ak ki kakwautik tamanwogik sogol che bo eut koindanyi." 
Ezekiel41:13 Kikwa anyun got, koek kakwautik bogol che bo eut koindo; ak kiek koindab komosta ne kimi taban, koboto got ak inatusiekyik, kakwautik bogol che bo eut;" 
Ezekiel41:14 ak kiek kakwautik bogol che bo eut tebeesindab togetab got, koboto che bo komosta ne kimi taban eng’ komostab kong’asis." 
Ezekiel41:15 Ak kiikwa koindab got ne kitokyindos ak komosta ne kimi taban, ne kimi ole bo batai, koboto komoswekyik che kigibendote che kimi komosi ak komosin, koek kakwautik bogol che bo eut; koboto hekalut ne bo orit, ak keterusiekab seremut;" 
Ezekiel41:16 koboto tugatugik, ak tirisiok che regerotin, ak komoswek che kibendote, che kimi komoswek tugul che bo gorikyik che kigiyab koba barak konyil somok, che tokyingei tugagukyet, che kigiliige ketik komoswek tugul, koboch ng’ony agoi tirisiok; kiga kituch anyun tirisiochoto;" 
Ezekiel41:17 agoi kurget barak, agoi got ne bo orit, ak ole bo sang’, ak kobun inatut tugul komosta age tugul orit ak sang’, kobee kakwaet." 
Ezekiel41:18 Kigiwai itonwekab kerubik ak che bo tironik; ak kiga rubatgei tironik ak kerubisiek; ak kitinyei itonda age tugul ne bo kerubit togochik aeng’; 
Ezekiel41:19 kitokyingei anyun toget ne u ne bo chito tiret age, eng’ komosta age, kotokyingei toget ne u ne bo ng’etundo ne neran tiret age eng’ komosta age: kigiyai ko u noto eng’ komoswek tugul che bo got komugul." 
Ezekiel41:20 Kiga kiyai itonwekab kerubisiek ak che bo tironik kong’eete ng’ony agoi baragutab kurget: ki u noto anyun inatutab hekalut. 
Ezekiel41:21 Kitinyei koriosiek ang’wan tugatugikab kurgetab hekalut; ak ki u togetab ole tilil itondab hekalut. 
Ezekiel41:22 Ki bo ketik kapkorosut, ak ki bo kakwautik somok che bo eut koindab tononennyi, ko bo kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut koindanyi; ak ki bo ketik luukwekyik, koboto koindanyi ak inatusiekyik: ak kimwawa kolenja, Ni ko meset ne mi taitab Jehovah." 
Ezekiel41:23 Ak kitinyei hekalut ak ole tilil kereiywek aeng’ che bo kurgotik. 
Ezekiel41:24 Ak kitinyei kereiywot age tugul kebeberwek aeng’, kebeberwek aeng’ che arung’oksei; kitinyei kereiywot agenge kebeberwek aeng’, kotinyei kereiywot age kebeberwek aeng’." 
Ezekiel41:25 Ak kigiwachi kereiywechoto bo hekalut itonwekab kerubisiek ak che bo tironik, ko u che kiga kiwachi inatusiek; ak kimi bambanik che nyigisen eng’ keterut sang’." 
Ezekiel41:26 Ak kimi tirisiok che regerotin ak itonwekab tironik eng’ komosi ak komosin, eng’ komoswekab keterut: ki u noto gorjoto mengechen che kimi inatutab got, ak bambanik che nyigisen." 
Ezekiel42:1 Kiimutwa anyun anyo seremut ne sib kemong’jin, eng’ oret ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam: ak kiimutwa anyo got ne ming’in ne kitokyingei komosta ne mi taban, ne kimi taitab inatut ole tokyingei murot ne bo katam." 
Ezekiel42:2 Ki kakwautik bogol agenge che bo eut koindab gorik che kimi murot ne bo katam, ak ki kakwautik konom tebeesindo." 
Ezekiel42:3 Kimi komoswek aeng’u che kigibendote che kiitorjindos, che ki bo gorik che kigiyab koba barak konyil somok, che kitokyingei kakwautik tiptem che bo eut che bo seremut ne bo orit, ak che kitokyingei ole kigimale koik che bo seremut ne sib kemong’jin." 
Ezekiel42:4 Ak kimi taitab gorichoto ole kigibunoti, ki kakwautik taman che bo eut tebeesindo ngeba orit, ko bo kakwautik bogol agenge che bo eut, koindo; ak kitokyingei kurgotikwak murot ne bo katam." 
Ezekiel42:5 Ki nwagen anyun gorik che kitabanu barak; amu kiibe boroindo komoswek che kigibendote, kosiir gorik che kitabanu ng’ony, ak che bo kwen, che kimi goyoto." 
Ezekiel42:6 Amu kimitoti gorik che kigiyab koba barak, konyil somok, ak kima kotinyei tolochik che u tolochikab seremusiek: ki tenden anyun ne kitabanu barak kosiir ne kitabanu ng’ony ak ne bo kwen, kong’eete ng’ony." 
Ezekiel42:7 Ki kakwautik konom koindab totet ne kitabanu sang’ ole negite gorjoto mengechen, ne tokyingei seremut ne sib kemong’jin eng’ taitab gorjoto mengechen." 
Ezekiel42:8 Amu ki kakwautik konom che bo eut koindab gorjoto kimi seremut ne sib kemong’jin: ak ogeero, ki kakwautik bogol agenge che bo eut che kimi taitab hekalut." 
Ezekiel42:9 Ak kimi kurget eng’ kureretab gorjoto mengechen, eng’ komostab kong’asis ye wendi chi gorjoto kobunei seremut ne sib kemong’jin." 
Ezekiel42:10 Kimi gorik che mengechen totet orit ne bo seremut ne tokyingei kong’asis, ne tokyindos ak komosta ne mi taban eng’ taitab got." 
Ezekiel42:11 Ak ki u oret ne kimi tainywa kergeindab oret ne ki bo gorik che mengechen che kitokyingei murot ne bo katam; kiaechin koindanywa ak tebeesindanywa: ak ki u atebenywa tugul ak kurgotikwak, ole kibunei kebendi sang’." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ak kimi kurget ne ki u kurgotikab gorik che mengechen che kitokyingei murot ne bo tai, eng’ oret meto, oret ne kimi taitab totonoto, ne kitokyingei kong’asis, ye wendi chi orit." 
Ezekiel42:13 Kilenja anyun, Gorik che mengechen che mi murot ne bo katam ak che mi murot ne bo tai, che tokyindos ak komosato mi taban, choto ko gorik che tililen, ole ame tisiik che negite Jehovah tuguk che tililen mising’: konore oloto tuguk che tililen mising’, koboto kagochinoikab busiek, ak kagochinoikab tengekto, ak kagochinoikab chalwokto; amu tilil komosato." 
Ezekiel42:14 Ye ba tisiik orit, ko mamandoi eng’ ole tilil kobendi seremut ne sib kemong’jin, ama konore yoto ngoroikwak che kaboisie; amu tililen ngoroichoto: yeityo kolaach ngoroik alak, si koriktoi ole mi bik." 
Ezekiel42:15 Ak kingo kagoges kakwaetab got ne bo orit, komutwa among’une oret ne bo ormarichet ne tokyingei kong’asis, ak kokwa komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel42:16 Kiikwae tegat ne kikwaise komostab kong’asis, koek tegandanato bogol mut, kiikwae tegandanato komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel42:17 Kiikwa komostab murot ne bo katam, koek tegandanato bogol mut, kiikwae tegandanato komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel42:18 Kiikwa komostab murot ne bo tai, koek tegandanato bogol mut, kiikwae tegandanato." 
Ezekiel42:19 Kiwelelgei kotokyigei komostab cherongo, ak kokwae tegandanato koek bogol mut, kiikwae tegandanato." 
Ezekiel42:20 Kiikwa komoswek ang’wan: kigiyieme inatut, ne koindanyi ko ki kakwautik bogol mut, ak tebeesindanyi ko ki kakwautik bogol mut, si kobiit kooiyo komosta ne tilil ak komosta ne bo bik." 
Ezekiel43:1 Ye ibata komutwa anyo ormarichet, ormarichanato tokyingei kong’asis:" 
Ezekiel43:2 ogeero, kimong’une oretab kong’asis lilindab Kamuktaindetab Israel: ak ki u twegunennyi cheetab beek che chang’: ak kiiluu ng’ony eng’ lilindanyi." 
Ezekiel43:3 Ak ki u itondab lilinato ng’ang’utiet ne kigageer, ko u ng’ang’utiet ne kiageer ye kianyone ang’eme nganaset; ak ki u ng’ang’utichoto ng’ang’utiet ne kiageer eng’ ye negite ainetab Kebar: ak kiabut kot kotiiny toget ng’ony." 
Ezekiel43:4 Ak kinyo go lilindab Jehovah kobun oretab ormarichet ne tokyingei kong’asis. 
Ezekiel43:5 Ak kiganaba Tamirmiriet, ak komutwa anyo seremut ne bo orit; ogeero, kinyi lilindab Jehovah got." 
Ezekiel43:6 Ak kiagas kong’alalwa chi eng’ go; ak kitonon chi eng’ ye ami. 
Ezekiel43:7 Ak kilenja, Ee, weritab chi, yuto ko oldab ng’echerennyu ne bo laitornatet, ole tebe kelyekyuk, ole amenye koigeny eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel: ama komuruoni kogeny gotab Israel kainennyu ne tilil, icheget anan ko laitorinikwak, eng’ kugoinatenywa, ak eng’ muswekab laitorinikwak eng’ komoswekwak che tororen;" 
Ezekiel43:8 ye kingonde tugatukyenywa korikyi tugatukyennyu, ak konde tolochikwak korikyi tolochikyuk, ak kimi totet inegei ne kiibestosech, ane ak ichek; ak kigomuruon kainennyu ne tilil eng’ tugukwak che kiwechei che kiyai: kiagesu anyun ichek eng’ neregekyuk." 
Ezekiel43:9 Ingoisto anyun nguno kugoinatenywa ak muswekab laitorinikwak, kolooitena, si ameny kwenunywa koigeny." 
Ezekiel43:10 Ee, inye weritab chi, iborji goito gotab Israel, si kobiit kolilanso amu tengekwogikwak: ak ingokwa ichek kit ne u." 
Ezekiel43:11 Ak ngot kolilanso amu tuguk tugul che kigoyai, iborji kit ne u got, ak itondanyi, ak ole kibunei kebendi sang’, ak ole kibunei kebendi go, koboto ole u tuguk, ak etanutikyik tugul, ak ole teptoi tugul, ak ng’atutikyik tugul, ak isir kogeerei: si kobiit korib ole u kit komugul, koboto etanutikyik tugul, ak koyai." 
Ezekiel43:12 Nito ko ng’atutietab got: egu ne tilil mising’ eng’ tulwet barak komoswek tugul ole boch. Ogeero, nito ko ng’atutietab got." 
Ezekiel43:13 Chu ko kakwautikab kaptisisiet eng’ kakwautik che bo eut: (kakwautiet ko kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut ak tebeesindab eut:) egu kelut kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut, koek tebeesindo kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut, ak kiek mireiywondennyi ne kigimire, ole bo inchisiek sogol: egu nito anyun kelutab kaptisisiet." 
Ezekiel43:14 Ak egu kakwautik aeng’ che bo eut koboch ng’ony agoi tegeleiywot ne tabanu ng’ony, ak tebeesindo ko kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut; ak egu kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut koboch tegeleiywot ne nwach agoi tegeleiywot ne koi, ak tebeesindo ko kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut." 
Ezekiel43:15 Ak egu kakwautik ang’wan che bo eut kaptisisiet ole tabanu barak; ak koboch ole kibeelse eng’ kaptisisiet ak kwo barak, komitei kuinoik ang’wanu." 
Ezekiel43:16 Ak egu koindab ole kibeelse kakwautik taman ak aeng’ che bo eut, ak kakwautik taman ak aeng’ eng’ tabeesindo, ki aechin komoswekyik tugul ko ang’wan." 
Ezekiel43:17 Ak egu kakwautik taman ak ang’wan che bo eut, koindab tegeleiywot, ak koek taman ak ang’wan tebeesindo agine eng’ komoswekyik ang’wan; ak koek kebeberta kakwautiet ne bo eut, mireiywot ne kigimire; ak koek kakwautiet agenge ne bo eut, kelunnyi, eng’ komoswek tugul: ak kotokyigei kong’asis long’eiywondennyi." 
Ezekiel43:18 Ak kilenja, Ee, weritab chi, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Chu ko ng’atutikab kaptisisiet eng’ betut ne tun kayai ichek, si kogoitoe kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak koise korotik." 
Ezekiel43:19 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Igochini tisiik Lawik che bo iyotetab Sadok, che rikyina si koboisiewa, kirgit ne barnotiot, koek kagochinetab tengekto." 
Ezekiel43:20 Ak itaach korotikyik, si iile kuinoik ang’wan che bo kaptisisiet ak luukwek ang’wan che bo tegeleiywot, koboto mireiywot eng’ komoswek tugul: itilili ko u noto ye iyachini kagaigaet." 
Ezekiel43:21 Ikwerie kogeny kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, si kobeel eng’ ole kiging’at eng’ go, eng’ sang’utab ole tilil." 
Ezekiel43:22 Ak igoite eng’ betut ne bo aeng’ kwesta ne libwob koek kagochinetab tengekto; yeityo koanyiny ichek kaptisisiet ko u ye kaga koanyinye kirgit. 
Ezekiel43:23 Ye kaigesu kaanyinyet, igoite kirgit ne barnotiot ne libwob, koboto mengit ne libwob ne bunu akwet." 
Ezekiel43:24 Ak igetu korik taitab Jehovah, ak koseerji tisiik ichek munyuk, yeityo kogoito ichek koek kagochinet ne kibeelei kigochin Jehovah." 
Ezekiel43:25 Ichobe eng’ betusiek tisab kwesta koek kagochinetab tengekto: chobei kirgit ne barnotiot kogeny, koboto mengit ne bunu akwet, che libwoben tuwai." 
Ezekiel43:26 Yaei ichek kagaigaet agobo kaptisisiet eng’ betusiek tisab koanyinyi; itabani anyun ko u noto. 
Ezekiel43:27 Ak ye kagobata betusiechoto, kobeel anyun tisiik kagochinoikwok che kibeelei, eng’ kaptisisiet, koboto kagochinoikwok che bo kalyet, eng’ betutab sisiit ak kwo tai; si ataachak, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel44:1 Yeityo komutwa aweek abun oretab ormarichet ne sib kemong’jin, ne bo ole tilil, ne tokyingei kong’asis; ak ki kerat ormarichanato." 
Ezekiel44:2 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Kigerei ormarichani, magiyatei, ama bunei chi kowendi orit, amu kagobun Jehovah Kamuktaindetab Israel, kowendi orit; kigerei anyun amu noto." 
Ezekiel44:3 Ago bounindet, kotebe oloto ko u bounindet, si koam amitwogik eng’ taitab Jehovah; wendi orit kobunei oretab keterutab ormarichet, ak komandae oranato." 
Ezekiel44:4 Yeityo komutwa anyo oret ne bo ormarichet ne bo murot ne bo katam eng’ taitab got; ak kiageer, ogeero, kinyi gotab Jehovah lilindab Jehovah: ak kiabut, kot kotiiny toget ng’ony." 
Ezekiel44:5 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Ee, weritab chi, nam komie, ak igeer eng’ konyeguk, ak igase itiguk tuguk tugul che amwaun agobo etanutik tugul che bo gotab Jehovah, ak ng’atutikyik tugul; ak inai komie ole kibetitoi got orit, koboto komosta age tugul ne kimandoe eng’ ole tilil." 
Ezekiel44:6 Ak imwachi ngeleliot, gotab Israel, ilenji, Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ee, okwek gotab Israel, tugukwok tugul che kiwechei, ko ingoyamak," 
Ezekiel44:7 amu kiomutu kipsagarek, che ma kimuratan mugulelwek, ama kimuratan borwek, kotebe oldanyu ole tilil, si komuruon, noto gonnyu, ye kogoitoi amitwogikyuk, mwanik ak korotik, ak kigobut kayomisennyu, si kotesyi tugukwok tugul che kiwechei." 
Ezekiel44:8 Ama orib ng’atutietab tugukyuk che tililen: ago kiondechige okwege ribikab boisiennyu eng’ oldanyu ne tilil. 
Ezekiel44:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole, Mawendi oldanyu ne tilil kipsagarindet age tugul ne ma kimuratan muguleldo, ama kimuratan borto, kipsagarindet age tugul ne mi kwenutab lagokab Israel." 
Ezekiel44:10 Ago ibei tengektanywa Lawik che kigoistoenagei kolooegitu, ye kingobetyo Israel, che kigoba kometa kosub kanamonikwak." 
Ezekiel44:11 Ago egu ichek kiboitinik eng’ oldanyu ne tilil, koripsei eng’ ormarichok che bo got, ak koboisiei eng’ got: enyei kagochinet ne kibeelei ak tiseiywot agobo bik, ak kotononso eng’ taitab bik koboisiechi." 
Ezekiel44:12 Ko u ye kiboisiechin ichek bik eng’ taitab kanamonikwak, ak koek kanagutietab tengekto eng’ gotab Israel; kianamji barak anyun eunnyu atokyi ichek, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ak ibei ichek tengektanywa." 
Ezekiel44:13 Ama rikyina, si koyaiywa boisietab tisiindet, anan korikyi tugukyuk che tililen alak tugul, korikyi tuguk che tililen mising’: ago ibei kalilanenywa, koboto tugukwak che kiwechei che kigoyai." 
Ezekiel44:14 Nganda u noto, ayae ichek koek ribikab ng’atutietab got, amu boisiennyi tugul, ak amu tuguk tugul che kiyaei eng’ orit." 
Ezekiel44:15 Ago bwanei korikyina koboisiewa tisiik Lawik, werikab Sadok, che kiribei boisietab oldanyu ne tilil, ye kingoba lagokab Israel kometa; si kotononso eng’ tainnyu kogona mwanik ak korotik, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah:" 
Ezekiel44:16 bendi oldanyu ne tilil, ak korikyi mesennyu, si koboisiewa, ak korib ng’atutiennyu." 
Ezekiel44:17 Ak ye ba orit kobun ormarichokab seremut ne bo orit, kilaakyin ngoroik che bo katanit; ama ilaachi ichek ngoroikab kororikab kechirek, ye boisiei eng’ seremut ne bo orit, ak eng’ go." 
Ezekiel44:18 Ilaachi chepkuloikab katanit, ak kolaach sirualisiek che bo katanit; mailaachi kiy age tugul ne igochin kong’etyi kaot." 
Ezekiel44:19 Ak ye mandoi kobendi seremut ne sib kemong’jin, seremut ne sib kemong’jin, agoi ole mi bik, koreegu anyun ngoroichoto kaboisie, ak kogonor eng’ gorik che mengechen che tililen, ak kolaach ngoroik alak, si ma itaban bik eng’ ngoroikwak." 
Ezekiel44:20 Maicheru metowekwak, anan kobagakta sumeekwak kogoeegitu; tilei kityo konwagitu." 
Ezekiel44:21 Ama eei tisiindet age tugul divaik ye wendi seremut ne bo orit. 
Ezekiel44:22 Ama ituni mosogik, anan ne kigeon: ago ituni bergeinik che bo iyotetab gotab Israel, anan ko mosoget ne ki bo tisiindet." 
Ezekiel44:23 Ak konet bikyuk kobesyo che tililen ak che ma tililen, ak konet ichek koguiyo tuguk che ma ianyinyotin ak che ianyinyotin." 
Ezekiel44:24 Ak koruokyi che ibeligei; koruokyi ko u kiruogutikyuk: ak korib ng’atutikyuk ak konetisiosiekyuk eng’ igorwekyuk tugul che kiging’at; ak kotaban sabatosiekyuk. 
Ezekiel44:25 Ama rikyin musto si maing’wanitgei: ago imuchi kong’wanitgei amu kwanda anan kamet, anan werit, anan chepto, anan ng’etab kamet, anan chepkamet ne ma kitun." 
Ezekiel44:26 Ak ye kagianyiny, kiityi betusiek tisab." 
Ezekiel44:27 Ak eng’ betut ne wendi ole tilil, seremut ne bo orit, kwo kobois eng’ ole tilil, kogoito kagochinennyi ne bo tengekto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel44:28 Ak konyor borotet; a borotenywa: ak mogochini ichek kit ne namei kobunji eng’ Israel; a nenywa. 
Ezekiel44:29 Amei kagochinetab busiek, ak kagochinetab tengekto, ak kagochinetab chalwokto; ak nenywa kit age tugul ne kitabani eng’ Israel." 
Ezekiel44:30 Ak bunjin tisiik tongoanik tugul che bo tai che bo kiy age tugul, ak kagochinet age tugul ne kinamjin barak ne bo kiy age tugul, che bo kagochinoikwok tugul che kinamjin barak: ogochini kogeny tisiindet makatinikwok che tuonen che bo tai, si kogochi berurto kotebe gong’ung’." 
Ezekiel44:31 Maamei tisiik kiy age tugul ne kamee inegei, anan ne kobarei tiong’ik, ngo tarit anan ngo tiony." 
Ezekiel45:1 Ak ye opche emet eng’ seretab barbarek koek borotet, ogochi Jehovah kagochinet, kebeberta ne tilil ne bo emet: egu koindo tegat elfusiek tiptem ak mut, ak koek tebeesindo elfusiek taman: egu emonoto ne tilil eng’ kiwotennyi tugul eng’ komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel45:2 Bunjin kebebertab emonoto komosta ne tilil ne egu koindo bogol mut, koek tebeesindo bogol mut, aechin komoswek tugul ko ang’wan; ak emotinwekyik che kiyagisie, koegu kakwautik konom che bo eut komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel45:3 Ak eng’ nito kaikwa, ikwa koindo koek elfusiek tiptem ak mut, ak koek tebeesindo elfusiek taman: ak komi oloto ole tilil, ole tilil mising’." 
Ezekiel45:4 Noto ko kebeberta ne tilil ne bo emet, bunjin tisiik, kiboitinikab ole tilil, che rikyin Jehovah koboisiechin; ak kobunji oloto gorikwak, ak kobunji ole tilil komosta ne tilil." 
Ezekiel45:5 Bunjin Lawik kiboitinikab got, koindo ne bo elfusiek tiptem ak mut, ak tebeesindo ne bo elfusiek taman, konamjigei kobunji, koek nganasok che menyei." 
Ezekiel45:6 Ak omarar komosta ne bunjin nganaset koek elfusiek mut tebeesindo, koek koindo elfusiek tiptem ak mut, kotetgei ak kagochinetab kebeberta ne tilil: bunjin got komugul ne bo Israel." 
Ezekiel45:7 Ak kobunji bounindet emet ne mi komosi ak komosi ne bo kagochinet ne tilil ak ne bo emet ne bunjin nganaset, eng’ taitab kagochinet ne tilil, ak eng’ taitab emet ne bunjin nganaset, eng’ ole tokyingei cherongo, ak eng’ ole tokyingei kong’asis: ak aechin koindanyi ak age eng’ kebeberwechoto, koboch kiwotet ne bo cherongo agoi kiwotet ne bo kong’asis." 
Ezekiel45:8 Bunjin inendet emonoto eng’ Israel: ama kousei kogeny bounikyuk bikyuk; ago igochin emet gotab Israel kobee bororiosiekwak. 
Ezekiel45:9 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ingoyamak noto, ee bounikab Israel: oiste koromnatet ak ng’emisiet, ak oyai kiruoget ak imanda; oiste yaakset ne oyaache bikyuk eng’ kimnatet, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel45:10 Oboisie kerutik che aechin che bo iman, ak epah ne bo iman ak debeisiek aeng’ che bo iman." 
Ezekiel45:11 Aechin epah ak debeisiek aeng’, ak debeisiek aeng’ che kanyi tuguk ko kergei ak kebeberta agenge eng’ taman che bo homer, ak epah agenge ko kergei ak kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo homer: egu homer kit ne kigerisie kotugul." 
Ezekiel45:12 Ak yamei sekel agenge ak gerahisiek tiptem: sekelisiek mut koegu sekelisiek mut, sekelisiek taman koegu sekelisiek taman, ak sekelisiek konom ko maneh neng’wong’." 
Ezekiel45:13 Ni ko kagochinet ne ogoitoi; kebeberta agenge eng’ lo ne bo epah eng’ homer ne bo nganok, ak ogoite kebeberta agenge eng’ lo ne bo epah eng’ homer ne bo sairik:" 
Ezekiel45:14 ak kebebertab mwaita ne kiging’at ne bo debeisiek aeng’ che bo mwaita, koegu kebeberta agenge eng’ taman ne bo debeisiek aeng’ che bo kor, choto ko debeisiek tiptem, noto ko homer agenge, amu debeisiek tiptem ko yamei homer:" 
Ezekiel45:15 koboto aruet agenge ne bo akwetab kechirek, ne kileweni eng’ bogol aeng’, ne bunu emet ne bitat ne bo Israel; egu chuto kagochinetab busiek ak kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagochinoikab kalyet, si kobiit koyai kagaigaet agobo ichek, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel45:16 Igoitoi bik tugul che bo emet kagochinoni agobo bounindet eng’ Israel. 
Ezekiel45:17 Ak koek boisietab bounindet kagochinoik che kibeelei, ak kagochinoik che bo busiek, ak kagochinoik che kieei eng’ igorwek, ak eng’ ye kaleel arawet, ak eng’ sabatosiek, eng’ igorwek tugul che kiging’at che bo gotab Israel: chobei inendet kagochinetab tengekto, ak kagochinetab busiek, ak kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak kagochinoik che bo kalyet, si koyai kagaigaet agobo gotab Israel." 
Ezekiel45:18 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Eng’ arawet ne bo tai, eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawanato, igetu kirgit ne libwob ne barnotiot, si ianyiny ole tilil." 
Ezekiel45:19 Ak konam tisiindet korotikab kagochinetab tengekto, ak konde tugatugikab got, ak koiile luukwek ang’wan che bo tegeleiywotab kaptisisiet, ak koiile tugatugikab seremut ne bo orit." 
Ezekiel45:20 Ak iyai ko u noto eng’ betutab tisab ne bo arawet agobo age tugul ne lelei, ak agobo inendet ne abusat: oyae anyun ko u noto kagaigaet agobo got." 
Ezekiel45:21 Eng’ arawet ne bo tai eng’ betutab taman ak ang’wan ne bo arawanato, ochob paska, igorta ne bo betusiek tisab; kiamei makatinik che ma kinde mermerek." 
Ezekiel45:22 Ak chobei eng’ betunoto bounindet kirgit ne bo kagochinetab tengekto, agobo ge ak agobo bik tugul che bo emet." 
Ezekiel45:23 Ak kochopchi Jehovah kagochinet ne kibeelei eng’ betusiek tisab che bo igorta, kirugik tisab ak mengichik tisab che libwoben tugul, eng’ betut age tugul ne bo betusiechoto tisab; ak kwesta ne bo kagochinetab tengekto ne bo betut age tugul." 
Ezekiel45:24 Ak kochob kagochinetab busiek, epah agenge eng’ kirgit agenge, ak epah agenge eng’ mengit agenge, ak hin agenge ne bo mwaita eng’ epah agenge." 
Ezekiel45:25 Yaei inendet ko u nito eng’ arawetab tisab, eng’ betutab taman ak mut ne bo arawanato, eng’ betusiek tisab che bo igorta; yaei ko u noto eng’ kagochinetab tengekto, ak eng’ kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak eng’ kagochinetab busiek ak eng’ mwanik." 
Ezekiel46:1 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kigerei eng’ betusiek lo che bo boisiet ormarichet ne bo seremut ne bo orit, ne tokyingei kong’asis; ak kiyatei eng’ betutab sabato, ak kiyatei eng’ betut ne kaleel arawet." 
Ezekiel46:2 Ak kwo orit bounindet kobunei oret ne bo keterut ne bo ormarichet ne bo sang’, ak kotonone ye negite tugatukyetab ormarichet, ak kochob tisiik kagochinennyi ne kibeelei ak kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet, ak kosa eng’ tugatugikab ormarichet; yeityo komanda: ago magigerei ormarichet agoi koimen." 
Ezekiel46:3 Ak kosa bikab emet eng’ kurgetab ormarichet eng’ taitab Jehovah eng’ sabatosiek, ak eng’ ye kaleel arawet." 
Ezekiel46:4 Ak kagochinet ne kibeelei ne igoitoi bounindet kogochin Jehovah eng’ betutab sabato, ko arek lo che libwoben che bo kechir, koboto mengit ne libwob;" 
Ezekiel46:5 ak kagochinetab busiek che bo epah kobunji mengit agenge, ak kagochinetab busiek kobunjin arekab kechir ko u ye imuchi kogoito, ak kobunjin hin agenge ne bo mwaita, epah agenge." 
Ezekiel46:6 Ak eng’ betut ne kaleel arawet kigoito kirgit ne libwob ne barnotiot; ak arek lo che bo kechir, ak mengit; libwoben tugul:" 
Ezekiel46:7 ak kochob inendet kagochinetab busiek, epah agenge kobunji mengit, ak che bo arek ko u ye imuchi, ak kobunjin hin agenge ne bo mwaita, epah agenge." 
Ezekiel46:8 Ak ye wendi bounindet orit, kobunei oretab keterut ne bo ormarichet, ak komanda kobun oranato." 
Ezekiel46:9 Ago ye bwa bikab emet taitab Jehovah eng’ igorwek che kiging’at, ko inendet ne wendi orit kobunei oret ne bo ormarichetab murot ne bo katam, kowendi kosaei, komandoe oret ne bo ormarichetab murot ne bo tai; ak inendet ne wendi orit kobunei oret ne bo ormarichetab murot ne bo tai, komandoe oret ne bo ormarichetab murot ne bo katam: maweegunegei oretab ormarichet ne kabunei kowendi orit, ago wendi kochuuldos." 
Ezekiel46:10 Ak ye bendi orit, kowendi bounindet koboto ichek, ak ye mandoi, komandoi tugul;" 
Ezekiel46:11 ak eng’ igorwek koboto igorwek che kiging’at, kobunjin kagochinetab busiek ne bo epah agenge, kirgit, ak kobunjin epah agenge, mengit, ak kobunji arekab kechir, ko u ye imuchi kogoito, ak kobunjin hin agenge ne bo mwaita, epah agenge." 
Ezekiel46:12 Ak ye chobei bounindet kagochinetab chamnyet, kagochinet ne kibeelei anan kagochinoikab kalyet koek kagochinetab chamnyet ne igochin Jehovah, keyatyin ormarichet ne tokyingei kong’asis, ak kochob kagochinennyi ne kibeelei koboto kagochinoikyik che bo kalyet, ko u ye yaei eng’ betutab sabato: yeityo komanda; ak ye kagomanda, keger ormarichet." 
Ezekiel46:13 Ak ichobe aruetab kechir ne libwob ne masiirei kenyit agenge koek kagochinet ne kibeelei kigochin Jehovah betut age tugul: ichobe noto karonet age tugul. 
Ezekiel46:14 Ak ichob kagochinetab busiek koboto aruanato bo kechir karonet age tugul, kebeberta agenge eng’ lo ne bo epah, ak kebeberta agenge eng’ somok ne bo hin ne bo mwaita, si keburukto busiek che tambululen; koek kagochinetab busiek ne kigochin Jehovah kotugul eng’ ng’atutiet ne bo agoi." 
Ezekiel46:15 Kichobei anyun ko u noto aruetab kechir, koboto kagochinetab busiek, ak mwaita, karonet age tugul, koek kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul." 
Ezekiel46:16 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ngot kogochi bounindet kagochinet age eng’ werikyik, koegu noto borotetab weroto, bunjin werikyik; bunjin icheget amu borotenywa." 
Ezekiel46:17 Ago ngot kogochi kebebertab borotennyi age eng’ otwogikyik, kobunjin otwogindonoto agoi kenyitab katiaget; si keweekyi bounindet; ago bunjin borotennyi werikyik." 
Ezekiel46:18 Ago maibei bounindet borotetab bik, si korebe ichek tugukwak; igochin borotet werikyik eng’ tugukyik: si ma kiseer bikyuk, kobagakta chi age tugul tugukyik." 
Ezekiel46:19 Kiimutwa anyun abun ole kibunei kebendi orit, ne kimi tabandab ormarichet, anyo gorik che tililen che bo tisiik, che kitokyingei murot ne bo katam: ak ogeero, kimi komosta ole bo batai ne kitokyingei cherongo." 
Ezekiel46:20 Ak kilenja, Olito ole iyoe tisiik kagochinetab chalwokto ak kagochinetab tengekto, ole watane kagochinetab busiek; si ma ib koba seremut ne sib kemong’jin, si koanyiny bik." 
Ezekiel46:21 Yeityo komutwa anyun anyo seremut ne sib kemong’jin, ak komuta abun luukwek ang’wan che bo seremut; ak ogeero, kimi seremut luita age tugul ne bo seremunoto." 
Ezekiel46:22 Kimi seremusiek che mengechen che kiging’ot eng’ luukwechoto ang’wan che bo seremut, che koindanywa ko ki kakwautik artam che bo eut, ak kakwautik sosom che bo eut tebeesindo: kiaechin seremusiechuto ko ang’wan che kimi luukwechoto." 
Ezekiel46:23 Ak kigiteech inatut koyiem seremusiechoto ang’wan, ak kigichob ole kiyoise eng’ kureretab inatusiechoto komoswek tugul." 
Ezekiel46:24 Kilenja anyun, Chuto gorik che kiyoise, ole iyoe kiboitinikab got kagochinoikab bik." 
Ezekiel47:1 Ak kiimutwa aweek anyo kurgetab got; ak ogeero, kimong’une beek kureretab tugatugikab got che kitokyingei kong’asis, amu kitokyingei got kong’asis: ak kimong’une beek kurere, eng’ komostab tai ne bo got, eng’ murot ne bo tai ne bo kaptisisiet." 
Ezekiel47:2 Yeityo komutwa among’ abun oretab ormarichet ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam, ak komuta abun oret ne bo sang’ agoi ormarichet ne bo sang’, abun oretab ormarichet ne tokyingei kong’asis; ak ogeero, kisururtogei beek eng’ komostab tai." 
Ezekiel47:3 Ye kiwa chito kotokyigei kong’asis, kotinyei borowet, kokwa kakwautik elfut agenge che bo eut, ak king’ata abun beek, beek che kiitu kwarinik." 
Ezekiel47:4 Kiikwa kogeny elfut agenge, ak kong’ata abun beek, beek che kiitu kutung’oik. Kiikwa kogeny elfut agenge, ak kong’ata abun beek, beek che kiitu suet." 
Ezekiel47:5 Ye ibata, kokwa elfut agenge; kiek ainet ne ma amuch alandae: amu kitesak beek mising’, beek che yamei kebir, ainet ne magimuchi kelandae." 
Ezekiel47:6 Ak kolenja, Ee, weritab chi, kaigeer nito? Yeityo komutwa ak kong’ata aweek ngegutab ainet." 
Ezekiel47:7 Ye kingaweege anyun, ogeero, kimi ketik che chang’ mising’ ngegutab ainonoto komosi ak komosin." 
Ezekiel47:8 Kilenja anyun, Bendi beechu kotokyingei emet ne mi kong’asis, ak kochortagei koba Araba, ak koba kotokyigei nyanjet; bendi nyanjet beechoto kiging’at komong’; ak kianyiny beekab nyanjet." 
Ezekiel47:9 Ak kosob kiy age tugul ne sobei, ne uuoti, eng’ komosta age tugul ne bunei ainosiechoto; ak biitu njirenik che chang’ mising’: amu kait oloto beechoto, ak kianyiny beekab nyanjet, ak kosob kiy age tugul eng’ ole itei ainet." 
Ezekiel47:10 Ak kotononse ngegut ramikab njirenik: ak koek ole kiitoe regereiywek che kiname njirenik koboch En-gedi agoi En-eglaim; isubi njirenikwak kergeindanywa, ko u njirenikab nyanjet ne o, che chang’ mising’." 
Ezekiel47:11 Ago magianyinyi komoswekyik che mi ng’atatek, ak nyanjosiekyik; kibagaktoi kobunji munyuk." 
Ezekiel47:12 Ak kobit ketit age tugul ne kiamei eng’ ngegutab ainonoto, eng’ komosi ak komosin, ne marestos sogekyik, ama betos logoekyik: ago yiei logoek eng’ arawet age tugul, amu mong’une beekyik ole tilil: ak koek amitwogik logoekyik, ak kianyinyisie sogekyik." 
Ezekiel47:13 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Egu nito kiwotet, ye opcheitoi emet koek borotet, kobee ortinwek taman ak aeng’ che bo Israel: nyoru kebeberwek Josep." 
Ezekiel47:14 Bunjinok nito, kogergeit tugul; emet ne kiayosie ale agochini kwanisiekwok: ak kobunjok emoni koek boroteng’wong’." 
Ezekiel47:15 Ak egu nito kiwotetab emet: eng’ komostab murot ne bo katam, koboch nyanjet ne o, eng’ oret ne wendi Hetlon, agoi ole kimandoe Sedad;" 
Ezekiel47:16 Hamat, Berota, ak Sibraim, ne mi kwenutab kiwotetab Damasko ak kiwotetab Hamat; Haser-hatikon, ne mi ole negite kiwotetab Hauran." 
Ezekiel47:17 Ak koek kiwotet ne bunu nyanjet Hasar-enon ne mi murot ne bo katam, ne bo kiwotetab Damasko, koboto kiwotetab Hamat ne mi murot ne bo katam. Nito ko komostab murot ne bo katam." 
Ezekiel47:18 Ak egu Jordan kiwotetab kong’asis, kwenutab Hauran ak Damasko ak Gilead, ak emetab Israel; okwa koboch kiwotetab murot ne bo katam agoi nyanjet ne mi kong’asis. Nito ko komostab kong’asis." 
Ezekiel47:19 Egu kiwotetab komostab tai koboch Tamar agoi beekab Meribot-kades, agoi kererutab Misri, agoi nyanjet ne o. Nito ko komostab murot ne bo tai." 
Ezekiel47:20 Egu kiwotetab cherongo nyanjet ne o, koboch kiwotetab murot ne bo tai agoi ole kibunei kebendi Hamat. Nito ko cherongo." 
Ezekiel47:21 Opchechinige anyun emonito kobee ortinwekab Israel. 
Ezekiel47:22 Opchei anyun eng’ seretab barbarek koek boroteng’wong’ koboto toek che kitebe kwenung’wong’, che sichei lagok eng’ kwenung’wong’; ak koek ichek eng’ okwek lagok che kigisikyin ga eng’ kwenutab lagokab Israel; nyoru borotet kobotok eng’ kwenutab ortinwekab Israel." 
Ezekiel47:23 Ak eng’ oret age tugul ne katebe toondet, ogochini borotennyi eng’ oloto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel48:1 Chu anyun kainaikab ortinwek: koboch tabandab murot ne bo katam, ole negite oret ne wendi Hetlon agoi ole kibunei kebendi Hamat, Hasar-enon ne mi kiwotetab Damasko, ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam, ne negite Hamat; nyoru kiwotosiekwak eng’ kong’asis ak cherongo; kebeberta agenge ne bo Dan." 
Ezekiel48:2 Ak koboch kiwotetab Dan kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Aser. 
Ezekiel48:3 Ak koboch kiwotetab Aser, kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Naptali." 
Ezekiel48:4 Ak koboch kiwotetab Naptali, kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Manase." 
Ezekiel48:5 Ak koboch kiwotetab Manase kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Epraim. 
Ezekiel48:6 Ak koboch kiwotetab Epraim kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Reuben. 
Ezekiel48:7 Ak koboch kiwotetab Reuben, kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Juda." 
Ezekiel48:8 Ak koboch kiwotetab Juda, kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo, koegu kagochinet ne ogoitoi, tebeesindanyi ko tegat elfusiek tiptem ak mut, ak kotenitu koindanyi agenge eng’ kebeberwechoto, koboch komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo: ak komi ole tilil kwenunnyi." 
Ezekiel48:9 Egu koindab kagochinet ne ogochini Jehovah, tegat elfusiek tiptem ak mut, ak koek tebeesindo elfusiek taman." 
Ezekiel48:10 Ak bunjin ichek, choto ko tisiik, kagochinet ne tilil; egu koindo ne tokyingei murot ne bo katam, elfusiek tiptem ak mut, ak koek tebeesindo, ne tokyingei cherongo, elfusiek taman, ak koek tebeesindo ne tokyingei kong’asis, elfusiek taman, ak koek koindo ne tokyingei murot ne bo tai, elfusiek tiptem ak mut: ak komi ole tilil ne bo Jehovah kwenunywa." 
Ezekiel48:11 Bunjin noto tisiik che kigitaban eng’ werikab Sadok, che kirib ng’atutikyuk; che ma bo kometa ye kingometa lagokab Israel ko u ye kiba Lawik kometa;" 
Ezekiel48:12 ak koek noto eng’ ichek kagochinet ne bunu kagochinetab emet, kit ne tilil mising’, eng’ ole negite kiwotetab Lawik." 
Ezekiel48:13 Ak nyoru Lawik kiwotet ne koindo ko elfusiek tiptem ak mut, ak tebeesindo elfusiek taman, kotorjin ak kiwotetab tisiik: egu koindo tugul elfusiek tiptem ak mut, ak tebeesindo elfusiek taman." 
Ezekiel48:14 Ama aldoi emonoto, anan kowale age, anan kogochi toek tongoanikab emet, amu itabanat emonoto eng’ Jehovah." 
Ezekiel48:15 Ak koboisie bik tugul emet ne kang’et, ne bo kakwautik elfusiek mut eng’ tebeesindo, ak elfusiek tiptem ak mut eng’ koindo, kobunji emonoto nganaset, ak ole kimenyei, ak ole kiyagisie: ak komi nganaset kwenunnyi." 
Ezekiel48:16 Ak chu ko kakwautikyik; egu komostab murot ne bo katam elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut, ak egu komostab murot ne bo tai elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut, ak egu komostab kong’asis, elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut, ak egu komostab cherongo elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut." 
Ezekiel48:17 Ak tinyei nganaset ole kiyagisie; egu ole tokyingei murot ne bo katam bogol aeng’ ak konom, ak egu ole tokyingei murot ne bo tai bogol aeng’ ak konom, ak egu ole tokyingei kong’asis bogol aeng’ ak konom, ak egu ole tokyingei cherongo bogol aeng’ ak konom." 
Ezekiel48:18 Ak aechin koindab ne ng’etu, ak kagochinet ne tilil, egu elfusiek taman kotokyingei kong’asis, ak egu elfusiek taman kotokyigei cherongo: ak koaechin ak kagochinet ne tilil; ak koek ruratennyi amitwogikab ichek che boisiei eng’ nganaset." 
Ezekiel48:19 Ak kobat emonoto ichek che boisiei eng’ nganaset che bunu ortinwek tugul che bo Israel. 
Ezekiel48:20 Egu kagochinet komugul elfusiek tiptem ak mut eng’ koindo ak elfusiek tiptem ak mut eng’ tebeesindo: ogoitoi kagochinet ne tilil ne aechin komoswek tugul ko ang’wan, koboto emet ne bunjin nganaset." 
Ezekiel48:21 Ak kobunji bounindet ne ng’etu, eng’ komosi ak komosin ne bo kagochinet ne tilil, ak ne bo emet ne bunjin nganaset, eng’ taitab elfusiek tiptem ak mut ne bo kagochinet ne tokyingei kiwotetab kong’asis, ak ole tokyingei cherongo eng’ taitab elfusiek tiptem ak mut ne tokyingei kiwotetab cherongo, koaechin ak kebeberwechoto, bunjin emonoto bounindet: ak komi kwenunnyi kagochinet ne tilil ak ole tilil ne bo got." 
Ezekiel48:22 Bunjin kogeny bounindet koboch emetab lawik, ak koboch emet ne bunjin nganaset, ne mi kwenutab emet ne bo bounindet, eng’ kwenutab kiwotetab Juda ak kiwotetab Benjamin." 
Ezekiel48:23 Ak eng’ ortinwek che ng’etunotin: koboch komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Benjamin. 
Ezekiel48:24 Ak koboch kiwotetab Benjamin, kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Simeon." 
Ezekiel48:25 Ak koboch kiwotetab Simeon, kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Isakar." 
Ezekiel48:26 Ak koboch kiwotetab Isakar kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Sebulun. 
Ezekiel48:27 Ak koboch kebeberta ne bo Sebulun, kong’eete komostab kong’asis agoi komostab cherongo; koegu kebeberta agenge ne bo Gad." 
Ezekiel48:28 Ak koboch kiwotetab Gad, eng’ komosta ne tokyingei murot ne bo tai, koitei kiwotet Tamar agoi beekab Meribat-Kades, agoi kererutab Misri, agoi nyanjet ne o." 
Ezekiel48:29 Nito emet ne opchechini ortinwekab Israel eng’ seretab barbarek koek borotenywa, ak chuto ko kebeberwekwak che terjin, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Ezekiel48:30 Ak chu ko ole kimandoe eng’ nganaset; eng’ komostab murot ne bo katam, koegu tegat elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut ngikwa:" 
Ezekiel48:31 Ak kimwaitoe ormarichokab nganaset kainaikab ortinwekab Israel; tokyingei murot ne bo katam ormarichok somogu: ormarichetab Reuben, ko agenge, ormarichetab Juda, ko agenge, ormarichetab Lawi, ko agenge;" 
Ezekiel48:32 ak eng’ komostab kong’asis koegu tegat elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut; ak ormarichok somok: choto ko ormarichetab Josep, ko agenge, ormarichetab Benjamin, ko agenge, ormarichetab Dan, ko agenge." 
Ezekiel48:33 Ak eng’ komostab murot ne bo tai koegu tegat elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut; ak ormarichok somok: ormarichetab Simeon, ko agenge, ormarichetab Isakar, ko agenge, ormarichetab Sebulun, ko agenge;" 
Ezekiel48:34 eng’ komostab cherongo, koegu tegat elfusiek ang’wan ak bogol mut, koboto ormarichokwak somok; ormarichetab Gad, ko agenge, ormarichetab Aser, ko agenge, ormarichetab Naptali, ko agenge." 
Ezekiel48:35 Egu tegat elfusiek taman ak sisiit komoswek tugul: ak keguure kainetab nganasanato koboch betunoto, Mi Jehovah oloto." 
Daniel1:1 Kinyo Nebukadnesar laitoriatab Babulon Jerusalem, ak koyiem eng’ kenyitab somok ne bo laitornatetab Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda." 
Daniel1:2 Ak kiinde Kiptaiyat eutab Nebukadnesar Jeoiakim laitoriatab Juda, koboto tuguk alak che bo gotab Kamuktaindet; ak kiib tuguchoto koba emetab Sinar agoi gotab cheptalelinnyi: ak konde tuguchoto gotab konoraik che bo cheptalelinnyi." 
Daniel1:3 Ak king’alalji laitoriat Aspenas bounindetab kiptainikyik, si komut alak eng’ lagokab Israel, che bo iyotetab laitoriat ak bik che toogunotin;" 
Daniel1:4 neranik che kima kotinyei berut, ak ko kororon, ak ko utotin eng’ ng’omnatet, che ng’omen eng’ naet, ak koguitos ung’otikab ng’omnatet, ak che u choto che kitinyei kamuget kotononso eng’ gotab laitoriat, si kobiit konet laitoriat ichek ng’omnatet ak kutitab Kaldeik." 
Daniel1:5 Ak king’at laitoriat kigochi ichek amitwogikab laitoriat che yamei betut age tugul, koboto che bo divaik che kieei inendet, ak king’at kole kebai kenyisiek somok, si ye ibata kenyisiechoto kotononso eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
Daniel1:6 Kimi anyun eng’ choto eng’ lagokab Juda, Daniel, Hanania, Misael, ak Asaria." 
Daniel1:7 Ak kitochi bounindetab kiptainik ichek kainaik: koguure Daniel Beltesasar, ak koguure Hanania Sadrak, ak koguure Misael Mesak, ak koguure Asaria Abed- nego." 
Daniel1:8 Ago kitil Daniel eng’ muguleldanyi kole si maing’wanitegei amitwogikab laitoriat, anan divaik che kieei laitoriat: kisom anyun bounindetab kiptainik kole si maing’wanitgei." 
Daniel1:9 Kiigochi anyun Kamuktaindet Daniel konyor chamet ak rirenet eng’ taitab bounindetab kiptainik. 
Daniel1:10 Ak kilenji bounindetab kiptainik Daniel, Aiywei kiptiyandennyu laitoriat, ne king’at amitwogikwok ak che oee, si ma keer inendet kole yaach togochikwok kosiir che bo neranik che oaechine. Ogona anyun kobara laitoriat." 
Daniel1:11 Yeityo komwachi Daniel ribindet, ne king’at bounindetab kiptainik koboi Daniel, Hanania, Misael, ak Asaria:" 
Daniel1:12 kolenji, Asomin ale tiem otwogiguk, eng’ betusiek taman; ak ingogonech ngwek keam, ak beek che kieei." 
Daniel1:13 Si igeer anyun togochikyok, ak togochikab neranik che amei amitwogikab laitoriat; ak iyachi otwogiguk ko u ye kegeer." 
Daniel1:14 Kigasyi anyun bounindet ng’olyondonoto, ak kotiem ichek eng’ betusiek taman." 
Daniel1:15 Ak kingogesgei betusiechoto tamanu, kotook togochikwak ko kororon ak ko neriotin kosiir neranik tugul che kiamei amitwogikab laitoriat." 
Daniel1:16 Kiisto anyun ribindet amitwogikwak, ak divaik che kita eei, ak kogochi ngwek." 
Daniel1:17 Ago eng’ atebetab neranichuto ang’wan, ko kiigochi Kamuktaindet naet ak utatiet eng’ kanetetab ge tugul ak ng’omnatet: ak kitinyei Daniel kaguiyet ne bo ng’ang’utik tugul ak karuotitaosiek." 
Daniel1:18 Ak kingogesgei betusiek che king’at laitoriat kole kimut ichek kobwa go, komut bounindetab kiptainik ichek kobwa taitab Nebukadnesar." 
Daniel1:19 Ak king’alal laitoriat ak ichek; ama biit agot agenge eng’ ichek tugul ne u Daniel, Hanania, Misael, ak Asaria: kitononso anyun ichek eng’ taitab laitoriat kotugul." 
Daniel1:20 Ak kigeer anyun laitoriat bichoto kole siirei bik tugul che ng’omen che ng’orsei, ak ng’omotikab kecheik che kimi bounatennyi tugul konyil taman eng’ kit age tugul ne bo ng’omnatet ak naet ne kiga teepse laitoriat bichoto." 
Daniel1:21 Ak kitebi Daniel agoi kenyit ne bo tai ne bo laitoriat Kirus. 
Daniel2:1 Ak eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ne bo laitornatetab Nebukadnesar, koruotyi Nebukadnesar karuotitaosiek; ak kiimak tamirmiriennyi, ak ma inuuch." 
Daniel2:2 King’at anyun laitoriat keguur bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei, ak ng’omotikab kecheik, ak bonik ak Kaldeik si komwachi laitoriat karuotitaosiekyik. Kibwa anyun go ak kotononso eng’ taitab laitoriat." 
Daniel2:3 Ak kilenji laitoriat ichek, koaruotyi karuotitoet, ak iimaaksei tamirmiriennyu komachei konai karuotitaonoto." 
Daniel2:4 Kong’alalji anyun Kaldeik laitoriat eng’ kutitab Suria, kolenji, Ee, laitoriandani, sob agoi: mwawech achek otwogiguk karuotitaonoto, si kiborun kaweeksennyi." 
Daniel2:5 Kiwolji laitoriat Kaldeik kolenji, Bo iman ng’olyot ne kaatil ale: ngot ko moborua karuotitaonoto ak kaweeksennyi, ketonatonok, ak koek gorikwok kapng’atat." 
Daniel2:6 Ago ngot oborua karuotitoet ak kaweeksennyi, onyoru eng’ ane konunoik ak melekwek ak teegisto ne o: oborua anyun karuotitoet, ak kaweeksennyi." 
Daniel2:7 Kiwolji ne bo aeng’ kolenji, Ingomwawech laitoriat achek otwogikyik karuotitaonoto, si kiboru kaweekset." 
Daniel2:8 Kowol laitoriat kole, Angen komie ale omache onyoru boroindo, amu bo iman ng’olondonito kaatil." 
Daniel2:9 Ago ngot ko moborua karuotitoet, komi ng’atutiet agenge ne nyoljinok: amu koochob lembechek ak ng’alek che yaachen si omwa eng’ tainnyu, kot kowalak betusiek: omwawa anyun karuotitaonoto, si anai ale omuchi oborua kaweeksennyi." 
Daniel2:10 Kowol Kaldeik eng’ taitab laitoriat kole, Mami chi ng’ony ne imuchi kobor ng’olyondonoto bo laitoriat: amu mami laitoriat, anan chi ne o, anan ribindet ne kiga koteebe kit ne u noto chi age tugul ne ng’om ne ng’orsei anan ng’omotiotab kecheik anan Kaldeindet." 
Daniel2:11 Ak ko kit ne ma bo kotugul ni kateeb laitoriat, ama mi age ne imuchi koborji laitoriat, kobate cheptalelisiek, che mamenyei ak bik." 
Daniel2:12 Kinerech anyun mising’ laitoriat eng’ neregek che ng’wonen eng’ ng’olyondonito, ak kong’at kebar bik tugul che ng’omen che bo Babulon." 
Daniel2:13 Kigimwaita anyun ng’atutiet kele kebar bik che ng’omen; ak kigicheng’ Daniel ak choronokyik kele kebar. 
Daniel2:14 Kiwol anyun Daniel eng’ naet ak ng’omnatet, kowolji Ariok kiptaiyatab ribikab laitoriat ne kigawa kole kobar bik che ng’omen che bo Babulon;" 
Daniel2:15 kiwolji Daniel Ariok kiptaiyatab laitoriat kolenji, Amu nee si kogoromit ko u ni ng’atutioni bunu laitoriat? Kiborji anyun Ariok Daniel ng’olyondonoto." 
Daniel2:16 Ak kiwa Daniel go, ak kosom laitoriat kole keng’atyi betut, si koborji laitoriat kaweekset." 
Daniel2:17 Kiwa anyun Daniel gonnyi, ak koborji ng’olyondonoto Hanania, Misael ak Asaria, choronokyik:" 
Daniel2:18 si kosom rirenosiek che bo Kamuktaindetab kipsengwert agobo ung’otioni; kole si ma kibar Daniel ak choronokyik koboto bik alak che ng’omen che bo Babulon. 
Daniel2:19 Kiging’ang’ji anyun Daniel ung’otionoto eng’ ng’ang’utiet ne bo kemoi. Kiilos anyun Daniel Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet. 
Daniel2:20 Kiwol Daniel kole, Iberurot kainetab Kamuktaindet koigeny ak koigeny: amu nenyi ng’omnatet ak kamuktaet:" 
Daniel2:21 ak kowalei betusiek ak kenyisiek; istoi laitorinik, ak koeeti laitorinik; igochin ng’omnatet che ng’omen, ak kogochin naet ichek che ingen kaguiyet:" 
Daniel2:22 ng’anyei tuguk che looen ak ko ung’otin: ingen tuguk che mi mesundeito, ak komenyei lapkeiyet koboto inendet." 
Daniel2:23 Aweegun kongoi, ak alosun, ee inye, Kamuktaindetab kwanisiekyuk, ne kiigona ng’omnatet ak kamuget, ak kaiborun nguno kit ne kogimagenen: amu kaiboruech ng’olyotab laitoriat." 
Daniel2:24 Kwo anyun Daniel ole mi Ariok, ne kiga kong’at laitoriat kole kobar bik che ng’omen che bo Babulon: kiwa komwachi ichek ko u ni kole: Amat ibar bik che ng’omen che bo Babulon: imuta ole mi laitoriat, si aborji laitoriat kaweekset." 
Daniel2:25 Komut anyun Ariok Daniel kochaktae kwo taitab laitoriat, ak kolenji, Kaanyoru chi eng’ lagokab bik che kigiluul che bo Juda, ne imuchi koborji laitoriat kaweekset." 
Daniel2:26 Kiwolji laitoriat Daniel, ne kigiguure Beltesaser kolenji, Tos imuchi iborua kit ne kiageer eng’ karuotitoet, ak kaweeksennyi?" 
Daniel2:27 Kowol Daniel eng’ taitab laitoriat, kole, Ung’otiet ne kateeb latoriat ko maimuchi bik che ng’omen, anan ng’omotikab kecheik, anan bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei, anan kipsogeinik, koborji laitoriat;" 
Daniel2:28 ago mi Kamuktaindet kipsengwet ne ng’anyei ung’otik, ak kagoborji inendet laitoriat Nebukadnesar tuguk che tun biitu eng’ betusiek che bo let. Karuotitoeng’ung’ ak ng’ang’utik che kibwa meting’ung’ eng’ itogung’ung’ ko chu:" 
Daniel2:29 ago inye, ee laitoriat, kibwanjin kabwatutiguk eng’ itogung’ung’, agobo tuguk che tun biitu let: ak kagoborun inendet ne ng’anyei ung’otik, tuguk che tun biitu." 
Daniel2:30 Ago eng’ ane, ko ma king’ang’wa ung’otionito amu ng’omnatet age tugul ne atinye kosiir chi age tugul ne sobei, ago si kobiit kiborji laitoriat kaweekset, ak si kobiit inai kabwatutikab muguleldang’ung’." 
Daniel2:31 Koigeer inye, ee laitoriat, kanamwet ne o. Kitonone taing’ung’ kanamwonoto o, ne ko kararan mising’ kakweng’ennyi; ak koimuisiei itondanyi." 
Daniel2:32 Ko bo tahabu ne kararan metitab kanamwonoto, ko bo feda togennyi ak eunekyik, ko bo sugunwet moennyi ak kubesaikyik," 
Daniel2:33 ko bo karnet kelyekyik, ko bo kebebertab keldebesaikyik karnet, ko bo kebeberta age, menet." 
Daniel2:34 Koigeer kot keeb koita ne ma kiebe eunek, ne kokwer keldebesaikab kanamwonoto che ko bo karnet ak menet, ak kotonaton." 
Daniel2:35 Kotonogis anyun tugul; karik, menet, sugunwet, feda, ak tahabu, ak koigei metetek che bo ruanyut ne kiborse; ak koib usonet, kot ko mata kenyorji ui: ak koek tulwet ne o kayato kotuei kanamwet, ak konyi emet komugul." 
Daniel2:36 Karuotitoet nito; ak kimwachini laitoriat kaweeksennyi. 
Daniel2:37 Ee laitoriandani, i laitoriatab laitorinik, ne kogogochi Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet bounatet, kamuget, ak kimnatet ak torornatet;" 
Daniel2:38 ak kigogonin inendet oldo tugul ole menyei bik, ak tiong’ikab timin, ak taritikab barak kobwa eung’ung’ ak kigogonin ibou ichek tugul: inyendet metoto bo tahabu." 
Daniel2:39 Ak ye tun ma imi, kobiit bounatet age ne matenitu neng’ung’; yeityo kobiit bounatet age, ne bo somok, ne bo sugunwet, ne tun bou ng’ony komugul." 
Daniel2:40 Ak kimitu bounatet ne bo ang’wan ko u karnet: amu tonatoni karnet tuguk tugul ak koterter: ak ko u ye nyinyiri karnet chuto tugul, ko u noto tuisiei agine bounatonoto ak konyinyiris." 
Daniel2:41 Ak ko u ye koigeer keldebesaik koboto morik, ne kebebertab menetab cheptereniot ak kebebertab karnet, koegu bounatet ne pcheoksei; ago mi orinnyi kimnatetab karnet, amu koigeer karnet ko burugot ak menet ne boto ng’ung’unyek." 
Daniel2:42 Ak ko u ye ko bo morikab keldebesaik kebebertab karnet, ak kebebertab menet, ko u noto kimitu kebebertab bounatonoto, ak kobutok kebeberta age." 
Daniel2:43 Ak ko u ye koigeer ko burugot karnet ak menet ne boto ng’ung’unyek, koburuchegei ak iyotetab bik; ago manamegei age ak age, ko u ye maburuchegei karnet ak menet." 
Daniel2:44 Ak tun lumdoi Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet eng’ betusiekab laitorinichoto bounatet ne magoi king’em, ama kigochin laitornatanato boror age; ago tuatui ak koges bounatosiechuto tugul, ak tononi koigeny." 
Daniel2:45 Ak ko u ye koigeer ile kogieb koita ne komi tulwet ama eng’ eunek, si kotuatui karnet, sugunwet, menet, feda, ak tahabu; kagoborji Kamuktaindet ne o, laitoriat, tuguk che tun biitu let: ak bo iman karuotitoet, ak kosuldoi kaweeksennyi." 
Daniel2:46 Kobutyi ng’ony anyun laitoriat Nebukadnesar ak kolos Daniel, ak kong’at kole, kigochi kagochinet koboto nyamdutik che anyiny." 
Daniel2:47 Kowolji laitoriat Daniel kolenji, Iman Kamuktaindeng’wong’ ko Kamuktaindet ne bou cheptalelisiek, ak ko Kiptaiyatab laitorinik, ak ng’ang’indetab ung’otik, amu kaimuch ing’any ung’otioni." 
Daniel2:48 Koeet anyun laitoriat Daniel, ak kogochi inendet kagochinoik che eechen, ak kogochi inendet koboi emet komugul ne bo Babulon; ak koek kiruogindet ne o ne bou bik tugul che ng’omen che bo Babulon." 
Daniel2:49 Ak kisom Daniel laitoriat, konde Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego, koboi ng’alekab emetab Babulon: ago kitebe Daniel ormarichetab laitoriat." 
Daniel3:1 Kiitany Nebukadnesar laitoriat kanamwet ne bo tahabu, ne koindab tononennyi ko ki kakwautik tamanwogik lo che bo eut, ko bo tebeesindanyi kakwautik lo che bo eut: kilumda inendet eng’ warengetab Dura, eng’ emetab Babulon." 
Daniel3:2 Yeityo koyokto laitoriat Nebukadnesar kiyum bounik, kandoik, ak kiruogik che tilei ng’alek, ribikab tuguk, bikab kapkiruok, ng’omotikab ng’atutik, koboto tononjinik tugul che bo emotinwek, kobwa katabanetab kanamwet ne kiga lumda laitoriat Nebukadnesar." 
Daniel3:3 Koyumgei anyun bounik, kandoik, ak kiruogik, tilikab ng’alek, ribikab tuguk, bikab kapkiruok, ng’omotikab ng’atutik, koboto tononjinik tugul che bo emotinwek, koyumjigei katabanetab kanamwet ne kiga lumda laitoriat Nebukadnesar; ak kitononso eng’ taitab kanamwet ne kiga lumda Nebukadnesar." 
Daniel3:4 Kimwa anyun ng’alindet ne mwaitoi ng’alek, eng’ kutit ne o, kole, Kaging’atak, ee bichu, bororiosiechu, ak che o bo kutuswek che ter, kele," 
Daniel3:5 eng’ sait age tugul ne kogas cheetab igondit, ndurerut, ketubet, chepkesemit, kibugandet, ndurerut ne o, koboto tienwogik alak tugul, obutyi ng’ony ak olosu kanamwetab tahabu ne kilumda laitoriat Nebukadnesar:" 
Daniel3:6 ak age tugul ne maibutyin ng’ony ak kolos, kewirjin mat ne o, ne lalei mising’, eng’ sainato." 
Daniel3:7 Kingogas anyun bik tugul cheetab igondit, ndurerut, ketubet, chepkesemit, kibugandet, koboto tienwogik alak tugul, kobutyi ng’ony bik tugul, bororiosiek, ak che bo kutuswek che ter, ak kolos kanamwetab tahabu ne kiga kolumda laitoriat Nebukadnesar." 
Daniel3:8 Kirik anyun eng’ sainato Kaldeik alage koib kataamset ne kitaame Yahudik. 
Daniel3:9 Komwachi bichoto laitoriat Nebukadnesar kolenji, Ee laitoriandani, sob agoi." 
Daniel3:10 Ee inye laitoriat, koing’at ng’atutiet ile chi age tugul ne kasei cheetab igondit, ndurerut, ketubet, chepkesemit, kibugandet, ak ndurerut ne o, koboto tienwogik alak tugul, kobutyi ng’ony ak kolos kanamwetab tahabu:" 
Daniel3:11 ak age tugul ne maibutyin ng’ony ak kolos, kewirjin mat ne o ne lalei mising’." 
Daniel3:12 Mitei Yahudik alak che kiinde koboi ng’alekab emetab Babulon, Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego; ma iitin bichuto, ee laitoriat: maotei cheptalelisieguk, ama ilosu kanamwetab tahabu ne koilumde." 
Daniel3:13 King’at anyun Nebukadnesar eng’ koromnatennyi ak neregek che ng’wonen kole kimut Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego. Kigimut anyun bichuto kobwa taitab laitoriat." 
Daniel3:14 Koteebe Nebukadnesar ichek kolenji, Ee, Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego, tos kootil iman ole moote cheptalelinnyu, anan olosu kanamwetab tahabu ne koalumde?" 
Daniel3:15 Ngot ochoboge anyun eng’ sait ne kogas cheetab igondit, ndurerut, ketubet, chepkesemit, kibugandet ak ndurerut ne o, koboto tienwogik alak tugul, obutye ng’ony ak olosu kanamwet ne koayai, komieitu: ago ngot ko molosu, kewirjinok mat ne o ne lalei mising’, eng’ sainato; ak ng’o cheptalelit ne tos soruok eng’ eunnyu?" 
Daniel3:16 Kowolji anyun Sadrak, Mesak ak Abed-nego, laitoriat kolenji, Ee Nebukadnesar, magimage kiy kewolun eng’ ng’olyondoni." 
Daniel3:17 Ngot ko u noto, komuchi Kamuktaindennyo ne keote kosoruech eng’ mat ne o ne lalei mising’; ak kosoruech inendet eng’ eung’ung’, ee laitoriat." 
Daniel3:18 Ago ngot ko ma u noto, ko kanyol inai inye, ee laitoriandani ile, magiote cheptalelisieguk, anan kilosu kanamwetab tahabu ne koilumde." 
Daniel3:19 Konyi anyun neregek che ng’wonen Nebukadnesar, ak kowalak togennyi konerekyin Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego: kong’alal anyun ak kong’at kole kilaal mat ne o kotesak konyil tisab kosiir ye cham kilaali." 
Daniel3:20 Ak king’at bik alak che nyigonen che ki bo lugennyi korat Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego, si kowirji maato o lalei mising’." 
Daniel3:21 Kigiratita anyun bichoto ngoroikwak ak che taae metowekwak, ak ngoroikwak che koen, koboto ngoroikwak alak, ak kigiwirji maata o kolalei mising’." 
Daniel3:22 Kibar anyun liblibenetab maata bichoto kinamei Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego, amu ki korom ng’atutietab laitoriat, ak kilalei maata o mising’." 
Daniel3:23 Ak kiibutyi anyun bichuto somogu, Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego, maata o lalei mising’, ko ratotin." 
Daniel3:24 Kikwong’ anyun laitoriat Nebukadnesar ak kong’eet kochokyi: ak kong’alal kolenji bikyik che bo kapkiruok, Tos, kama kiwirji ma bik somok ko ratotin? Kowolji anyun bichoto laitoriat kolenji, Iman, ee laitoriat." 
Daniel3:25 Kowolji inendet ichek kolenji, Ogeero, ageere bik ang’wan che itiagotin, kobendoti eng’ ma, ama am kiy; ak kergei itondab ne bo ang’wan ak weritab cheptalelisiek." 
Daniel3:26 Korikyi anyun Nebukadnesar ole kibunei kebendi maata o kilalei mising’; ak komwa kole, Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego, okwek otwogikab Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’, omong’u obwa oli. Komong’ anyun Sadrak, Mesak ak Abed-nego eng’ ma." 
Daniel3:27 Ak kogeer bounik, kandoik ak kiruogik, ak bikab kapkiruok che bo laitoriat, ko kagoyumgei, bichuto, kole ma beel mat borwekwak, ama imel mat sumekwak, amawalogis ngoroikwak, ama ng’uu mat eng’ ichek." 
Daniel3:28 Kong’alal anyun Nebukadnesar komwa kole, Iberurot Kamuktaindetab Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego, ne kagoyok malaikaiyandennyi kosor otwogikyik che koimang’u inendet, ak kagowal ng’olyotab laitoriat, ak kogoito borwekwak si maot anan kolos cheptalelit age tugul kobate Kamuktaindenywa inegei." 
Daniel3:29 Kang’at ng’atutiet anyun ale kitonatoni bik alak tugul, bororiet age tugul, ak bikab kutit age tugul, che mwaei kiy age tugul ne ya agobo Kamuktaindetab Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abed-nego; ak keyai gorikwak koek kapng’atat: amu mami cheptalelit ne kimuchi kosor chi ko u ni." 
Daniel3:30 Koeet anyun laitoriat Sadrak, Mesak, ak Abednego, eng’ emetab Babulon." 
Daniel4:1 Kamwachi ane laitoriat Nebukadnesar bik tugul, bororiosiek tugul, ak che bo kutuswek tugul, che menyei ng’ony tugul; alenji, Ingotesak kalyet eng’ okwek." 
Daniel4:2 Kiageer ale mie abor kaborunoik ak kwong’utik che kiyaiywa Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’. 
Daniel4:3 Eechen ne tia kaborunoikyik! Ak kimen ne tia kwong’utikyik! Laitornatennyi ko laitornatet ne bo koigeny, ak ko bo bounatennyi ibinwek tugul." 
Daniel4:4 Kiamuunyi ane Nebukadnesar eng’ gonnyu, ak atalbisi eng’ gonnyu ne bo laitornatet." 
Daniel4:5 Kiaruotyi karuotitoet ne kiimua; ak kiima kabwatutik ak ng’ang’utik che kibwanja ami itogunnyu. 
Daniel4:6 Kiang’at anyun ng’atutiet ale kimut bik tugul che ng’omen che bo Babulon kobwa tainnyu, si kobiit koborua kaweeksetab karuotitoet." 
Daniel4:7 Kibwa anyun bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei, ng’omotikab kecheik, Kaldeik ak kipsogeinik: ak kiamwachi ichek karuotitaonoto; ago ma iborua kaweeksennyi." 
Daniel4:8 Ago eng’ let, konyo Daniel tainnyu, ne kigiguure Beltesasar, ko u kainetab cheptalelinnyu, ne menyei tamirmirietab cheptalelisiek che tililen: ak kiamwachi inendet karuotitaonoto, alenji," 
Daniel4:9 Ee Beltesasar, bounindetab bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei, amu angen ale menyin tamirmirietab cheptalalisiek che tililen, ama mi ung’otiet ne iimin, mwawa anyun ng’ang’utikab karuotitoennyu che kiageer, ak kaweeksennyi." 
Daniel4:10 Ki u chu ng’ang’utik che kibwanja ami itogunnyu; kiageer, ogeero, ketit ne komi kwenutab ng’ony, ak ki o koindab tononennyi." 
Daniel4:11 Kieet ketoto, ak kogimit, ak kiit kipsengwet walinnyi, ak kitook ketoto eng’ tabanwek tugul che bo ng’ony." 
Daniel4:12 Ki kororon sogekyik, ak ki chang’ logoekyik, ak kitinyei amitwogik che yamei bik tugul: kiuure tiong’ikab timin, ak kimeny taritikab barak temenikyik, ak kigibae ketoto bik tugul." 
Daniel4:13 Ak kiageer eng’ ng’ang’utik che kibwanja ami itogunnyu, ak ogeero, kichorgei ribindet ne tilil kobunu kipsengwet." 
Daniel4:14 Kimwa eng’ kutit ne o ko u ni kole, Oeb ketoto, ak oeb temenikyik, otumdum korara sogekyik, ak oseer logoekyik: ingoba tiong’ik eng’ kelunnyi, ak koba taritik eng’ temenikyik." 
Daniel4:15 Ago obagakte musukyennyi eng’ ng’ony, ko miroot eng’ karnet ak sugunwet, eng’ ole mi suswek che ng’orng’or; si kobutyi rewot ak kotebi koboto tiong’ik che agetos:" 
Daniel4:16 ingowalak naennyi si maigei ne bo chi, ak ingigochi inendet naet ne bo tiondo; ak ingoteb ko u noto kot kogesgei betusiek che kiginag’at, konyil tisab." 
Daniel4:17 Bunu kiruogoni ng’atutietab ribik, ak bunu magonato ng’olyotab icheget che tililen: si kobiit konai che soptos kole bou Inendet ne Toror Mising’ bounatetab bik, ak kogochin age tugul ne makyin, ak koeeti bik che nyerotin mising’ koboi." 
Daniel4:18 Kiageer ane laitoriat Nebukadnesar tuguchuto eng’ karuotitoet: ee inye Beltesasar, mwa kaweekset, amu maimuchi bik tugul che ng’omen che bo bounatennyu koborua kaweekset; ago imuchi inye, amu menyin tamirmirietab cheptalelisiek che tililen." 
Daniel4:19 Kitoptoben anyun ne matia Daniel, ne kigiguure Beltesasar, ak kiim inendet kabwatutikyik. Kiwolji laitoriat inendet kolenji, Beltesasar, amatingoiimin karuotitoet, anan ko kaweeksennyi. Kowolji Beltesasar kolenji, Ingobunji karuotitoet ichek che wechin, ak ingobunji kaweeksennyi buniguk." 
Daniel4:20 Ketit ne koigeer ne kobitei ak ko kim, ne itei walinnyi kipsengwet, ak kotoogu eng’ ng’ony tugul;" 
Daniel4:21 ne kororon sogekyik, ak ko chang’ logoekyik, ak kotinyei amitwogik che yamei bik tugul; ne komenyei keluunyi tiong’ikab timin, ak komenyei taritikab barak temenikyik;" 
Daniel4:22 inye noto, ee laitoriandani, ne koieetu ak igimitu: amu kogotesak etunateng’ung’ ak koitei kipsengwet, ak koitei tabanwekab ng’ony bounateng’ung’." 
Daniel4:23 Ak ko u ye kigeer laitoriat ribindet ne tilil kochorugei eng’ kipsengwet ak kole, Oeb ketit ak ong’em; ago obagakte musukyennyi eng’ ng’ony, ko miroot eng’ karnet ak sugunwet, eng’ ole mi suswek che ng’orng’or; si kobutyi rewot, ak kotebi koboto tiong’ikab timin, kot kogesgei betusiek che kiging’at, konyil tisab." 
Daniel4:24 Ni anyun kaweeksennyi, ee laitoriandani, noto ng’atutietab Inendet ne Toror Mising’, ne kanyonji kiptaiyandennyu laitoriat:"
