Daniel4:25 kele kionin iwe eng’ ole mi bik, ak imeny koboto tiong’ikab timin, ak kegonin iaget ko u tuga, ak kobutyin rewot, kot kogesgei betusiek che kiging’at, konyil tisab; agoi inai ile bou Inendet ne Toror Mising’ bounatetab bik, ak kogochin age tugul ne makyin." 
Daniel4:26 Ak ko u ye king’at ichek kebagakta musukyet eng’ ng’ony; inyoru kogeny bounateng’ung’, ye kainai ile bounisiei kipsengwetisiek." 
Daniel4:27 Noto anyun, ee laitoriandani, ingochamak kiruogennyu eng’ inye, ak itabanege tengekwogiguk, ye iyae imanda, ak itabanege yaitwogiguk ye irire kibananok; si kotesak kalyeng’ung’." 
Daniel4:28 Kibwanji laitoriat Nebukadnesar tuguchuto tugul. 
Daniel4:29 Ye kigesgei arawek tamanu ak aeng’ kowendote inendet gotab laitoriat ne bo Babulon. 
Daniel4:30 Kong’alal laitoriat kole, Tos ma Babulon ne o ni, ne kiateech koek ole menyei laitoriat, eng’ kamugetab kimnatennyu ak agobo torornatetab eutunatennyu?" 
Daniel4:31 Kingota kong’alali laitoriat, kotwek kutit ne bunu kipsengwet, kole, Ee laitoriat Nebukadnesar, kagimwaun ng’olyondoni: kele, kaistoenengei bounatet." 
Daniel4:32 Ak kionin eng’ ole mi bik, ak imeny koboto tiong’ikab timin; kigonin iagete ko u tuga, agoi kogesgei betusiek che kiging’at, konyil tisab; agoi inai ile bou Inendet ne Toror Mising’ bounatetab bik, ak kogochin age tugul ne makyin." 
Daniel4:33 Kiisulda kioto sainato eng’ Nebukadnesar: ak kigion eng’ ole mi bik, ak koaget ko u tuga, ak kiibutyi rewot bortanyi, kot koeegitu sumeekyik ko u kororikab kipsichit, ak koigei siokyik che bo taritik." 
Daniel4:34 Ak kingogesgei betusiechoto anyal ane Nebukadnesar kipsengwet, ak koweekyagei naennyu, ak kiaweekyi kongoi Inendet ne Toror Mising, ak alosu ak agonyit inendet ne sobei koigeny; amu bounatennyi ko bounatet ne bo koigeny, ak ko bo laitornatennyi ibinwek tugul:" 
Daniel4:35 ak kiiti bik tugul che menyei ng’ony kele buch: ak koyachin lugetab kipsengwet ko u ye machei, koboto bik che menyei ng’ony: ama mi chi ne imuchi kogirinda eunnyi, anan kolenji, Iyae nee?" 
Daniel4:36 Kiweekyagei eng’ yoto naennyu; amu kiweekyagei etunatennyu ak kororonindanyu amu torornatetab bounatennyu; ak kibwa ole ami kiruogikyuk ak kiptainikyuk; ak kigigimita eng’ bounatennyu, ak kigiteswa etunatet ne kararan mising’." 
Daniel4:37 Alosu anyun ane Nebukadnesar, ak atorori ak agonyiti Laitoriatab kipsengwet; amu bo iman boisionikyik tugul, ak ko bo kiruoget ortinwekyik: ak imuchi koming’in ichek che bendoti eng’ menotet." 
Daniel5:1 Kiyachi laitoriat Belsasar igorta ne o kiptainikyik elfut, ak koeei divaik eng’ taitab bichoto elfut." 
Daniel5:2 Ye kita koeei Belsasar Divaik, kong’at keib terenik che bo tahabu ak che bo feda che kiibu Nebukadnesar kwandanyi eng’ hekalut ne kimi Jerusalem; si kobiit koeeise laitoriat ak kiptainikyik, osotikyik ak chebaigeinikyik." 
Daniel5:3 Kigiib anyun terenik che bo tahabu che kigibune hekalut, gotab Kamuktaindet, ne kimi Jerusalem; ak kieeise laitoriat ak kiptainikyik, osotikyik, ak chebaigeinikyik." 
Daniel5:4 Kiee divaik ak kolos kanamonikab tahabu, ak che bo feda, che bo sugunwet, che bo karik, che bo ketik, ak che bo koik." 
Daniel5:5 Kitook eng’ sainato morikab eutab chito, ak kisir inatutab gotab laitoriat kotokyigei tait: ak kigeer laitoriat eunoto kisirisiei." 
Daniel5:6 Kowalak anyun togetab laitoriat, ak koiim inendet kabwatutikyik; ak kiirigisis ole tuiyechin kowekab suennyi, ak kibirgei kutung’oikyik." 
Daniel5:7 Kiguurso anyun laitoriat eng’ kutit ne o kimut ng’omotikab kecheik, Kaldeik ak kipsogeinik. King’alalji laitoriat bik che ng’omen che bo Babulon, kolenji, Chi age tugul ne somani sirutichu, ak koborua kaweeksennyi, kilaakyin ngoriet ne arus ne birir, ak kilaakyi kaatinnyi sirimdab tahabu, ak koek bounindet ne bo somok eng’ bounatet." 
Daniel5:8 Kibwa anyun bik tugul che ng’omen che bo laitoriat; ago ma imuch kosoman sirutichoto, anan koborji laitoriat kaweekset." 
Daniel5:9 Kiimak mising’ anyun laitoriat Belsasar, ak kiwalak togennyi, ak kiimogis kiptainikyik." 
Daniel5:10 Kinyo anyun chebiosetab gab laitoriat gotab igorta amu ng’alekab laitoriat ak kiptainikyik: king’alal chebiosanato kole, Ee laitoriandani, sob agoi; amatingoiimin kabwatutiguk, anan kowalak togeng’ung’:" 
Daniel5:11 mitei chito eng’ bounateng’ung’ ne menyei tamirmirietab cheptalelisiek che tililen; ak kiginyorji chichoto eng’ betusiekab kwandang’ung’ lapkeiyet ak naet ak ng’omnatet, ne u ng’omnatetab cheptalelisiek: ak kiinde laitoriat Nebukadnesar kwandang’ung’, ne inendet ko laitoriat kwandang’ung’, kiinde inendet koek kiptaiyatab bik che ng’omen che ng’orsei, ng’omotikab kecheik, Kaldeik ak kipsogeinik;" 
Daniel5:12 Amu kiginyorji Daniel tamirmiriet ne mie kot, ak naet, ak kaguiyet, kaweeksetab karuotitaosiek, ak ng’ang’etab ng’alek che ung’otin, ak kaborunetab tuguk che iimi bich, ne kiguure laitoriat Beltesasar. Iyokte anyun keguur Daniel, si kobor inendet kaweekset." 
Daniel5:13 Kigimut anyun Daniel konyo taitab laitoriat. King’alal laitoriat kolenji Daniel, Tos i Daniel, ne i bo lagokab bik che kigiluul che bo Juda, che kiimutu laitoriat kwandanyu eng’ Juda?" 
Daniel5:14 Koagas agobo inye kele menyin tamirmirietab cheptalelisiek, ak kele itinye lapkeiyet ak naet ak ng’omnatet ne siirtoot." 
Daniel5:15 Ak kagimut bik che ng’omen, ng’omotikab kecheik, kobwa tainnyu, si kobiit kosoman sirutichuto, ak koborua kaweeksenywa: ago ma imuch kobor kaweeksetab kioto." 
Daniel5:16 Ago koagas agobo inye kele imuchi iboru kaweeksosiek, ak iboru tuguk che iimi bich: ngot imuchi anyun isoman sirutichuto, ak iborua kaweeksennyi, kilaagun anyun ngoroik che arusen ne birir, ak kilaakyi kaating’ung’ sirimdab tahabu, ak iegu bounindet ne bo somok eng’ bounatet." 
Daniel5:17 Kowolji anyun Daniel laitoriat kolenji, Ingobunjin kagochinoiguk, ak igochi melekweguk chito age; ago asomanjini laitoriat sirutichoto, ak aborjini inendet kaweekset." 
Daniel5:18 Ee laitoriandani, kiigochi Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’ Nebukadnesar kwandang’ung’ bounatet, ak oindo, ak torornatet, ak etunatet:" 
Daniel5:19 kibotanso ak koiyweis eng’ tainnyi bik tugul, bororiosiek tugul, ak che bo kutuswek tugul, amu oindo ne kiigochi inendet: kibarei ne kimachei kobar, ak kibagaktoi kosob ne kimakyin kosob; kiieeti ne kimachei koeet, ak kiiming’ini ne kimachei koming’in." 
Daniel5:20 Ago ye kingoeetgei eng’ muguleldanyi, ak kouuiit tamirmiriennyi koboisie menotet, kechoor eng’ ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, ak kerebe torornatennyi:" 
Daniel5:21 ak kigion kwo eng’ ole mi bik; ak kigiyai naennyi koigei ne bo tiong’ik, ak kimeny koboto sigirokab timin; ak kigibae suswek ko u tuga, ak kiibutyi rewot bortanyi: agoi konai kole bou Kamuktaindet ne Toror Mising’ bounatetab bik, ak kogochin age tugul ne makyin koboi." 
Daniel5:22 Ak ma iming’inge inye werinnyi, ee Belsasar, eng’ muguleldang’ung’, nganda kiingen tuguchuto tugul;" 
Daniel5:23 ago kiietge obelge ak Kiptaiyat ne bo kipsengwet; ak kogeib terenikab gonnyi kobwa taing’ung’, ak kooee divaik, inye ak kiptainiguk, osotiguk ak chebaigeiniguk; ak koilosu kanamonikab feda, ak che bo tahabu, che bo sugunwet, che bo karik, che bo ketik, ak che bo koik, che mageertoi, ama kastoi, amaingen kiy: ama itoror Kamuktaindet ne tinyei kabuseng’ung’ eng’ eunnyi, ak chechik ortinweguk tugul:" 
Daniel5:24 kogiyok anyun eut ne bunu tainnyi, ak kogisir sirutichu." 
Daniel5:25 Chu sirutik che kogisir: MENE, MENE, TEKEL, UPHARSIN." 
Daniel5:26 Ni anyun ko kaweeksetab kiito: MENE; kagoiit Kamuktaindet bounateng’ung’, ak koges." 
Daniel5:27 TEKEL; kagirogendoenen eng’ kit ne kirogendoisie, ak kagegeer kele ma ko i tia." 
Daniel5:28 PERES; kagepchei bounateng’ung’, ak kagigochi Medik ak Persik." 
Daniel5:29 King’at anyun Belsasar ng’atutiet, ak kolaakyi bik Daniel ngoriet ne arus ne birir, ak kolaakyi kaatinnyi sirimdab tahabu, ak komwaita agobo inendet kole, egu bounindet ne bo somok eng’ bounatet." 
Daniel5:30 Kigibar kemounoto Belsasar laitoriatab Kaldeik. 
Daniel5:31 Ak kinam Darius Medindet laitornatet, ko bo olo bo kenyisiek tamanwogik lo ak aeng’." 
Daniel6:1 Kicham Darius konde bounik bogol agenge ak tiptem, koboi bounatet komugul;" 
Daniel6:2 ak kiinde boisiek somok che kandoik koboi ichek, ne ki Daniel age eng’ ichek; si koibei bounik ng’alek koipchin ichek, si mabet kiy ne bo laitoriat." 
Daniel6:3 Kigigonyit anyun Daniel kosiir boisiechoto ak bounik, amu kitinyei tamirmiriet ne mie mising’; ak kiibwat laitoriat kole konde inendet koboi bororiet komugul." 
Daniel6:4 Kicheng’ anyun boisiechoto koboto bounik kochaam Daniel agobo bounatet; ago ma imuch konyorji inendet ng’olyo anan ko lelut; amu ki bo iman inendet, ama kinyorji kiy ne ma litit anan ko lelut." 
Daniel6:5 Kole anyun bichoto, Maginyorjini Danielini kiy ne kigikyine, kobate eng’ ng’atutietab Kamuktaindennyi." 
Daniel6:6 Kiiyumgei anyun eng’ kayanjinet boisiechoto koboto bounik, koyumjigei laitoriat, ak komwachi inendet ko u ni kole, Laitoriandani Darius, sob agoi." 
Daniel6:7 Kogong’alaljigei boisiek tugul che bo bounatet, kiptainik, ak bounik, bikab kapkiruok ak kiruogik, kole kogimit ng’atutiet ne bo kaplaitoriat, ak kong’at ng’atutiet ne kim, kole, age tugul ne somei kiy cheptalelit age tugul anan ko chi eng’ betusiek sosom, kobatenen, inye, ee laitoriat, kewirjin keringetab ng’etunyik." 
Daniel6:8 Igimit anyun ng’atutiet, ee laitoriandani, ak isir kaineng’ung’ eng’ sirutichoto, si ma kiwal, ko u ng’atutietab Medik ak Persik, ne ma walaksei." 
Daniel6:9 Kisir anyun laitoriat Darius kainennyi eng’ sirutichoto, koboto ng’atutiet." 
Daniel6:10 Ak kingonai Daniel kole kagosir laitoriat kainet ko u noto, eng’ sirutichoto, kwo gonnyi; (ki yatotin tirisiok eng’ gonnyi, che tokyingei Jerusalem;) ak kogutuny konyil somok eng’ betut, ak kosa, komwachi kongoi Kamuktaindennyi, ko u ye kocham koyaei." 
Daniel6:11 Kiiyumgei anyun bichoto eng’ kayanjinet, ak konyor Daniel kosaei Kamuktaindennyi ak korirjin." 
Daniel6:12 Kirik anyun bichoto, ak kong’alal eng’ taitab laitoriat agobo ng’atutietab laitoriat, kolenji, Tos kima isir kaineng’ung’ eng’ ng’atutiet ile, chi age tugul ne somei kiy cheptalelit age tugul anan ko chi eng’ betusiek sosom, kobatenen inye, ee laitoriandani, kewirjin keringetab ng’etunyik? Kowol laitoriat kole, Bo iman kiito, ko u ng’atutietab Medik ak Persik, ne ma walaksei." 
Daniel6:13 Kiwol anyun bichoto eng’ taitab laitoriat kole, Maiitin Daniel-inoto ne bo lagokab bik che kigiluul che bo Juda, ee laitoriandani, anan koiit ng’atutiet ne kiisir kaineng’ung’, ago saei konyil somok eng’ betut." 
Daniel6:14 Kingogas anyun laitoriat ng’alechuto, koarogen, ak komach kotiach Daniel: ak kitiem kole kosor inendet agoi kororokto asis." 
Daniel6:15 Kiiyumgei anyun bichoto eng’ kayanjinet koyumjigei laitoriat, ak kolenji laitoriat, Ee laitoriandani, nai ile ng’atutietab Medik ak Persik ko magiwalei ng’atutiet anan etanutik che igimiti laitoriat." 
Daniel6:16 Kong’at anyun laitoriat ng’atutiet, ak kigimut Daniel, ak kewirji keringetab ng’etunyik. King’alalji laitoriat Daniel kolenji, Sorun Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne iote kotugul." 
Daniel6:17 Ak kigiib koita, ak kegere kurgetab keringet; ak king’och laitoriat eng’ ng’oksennyi, koboto ng’oksetab kiptainikyik; si ma kiwal kiy agobo Daniel." 
Daniel6:18 Kiwa anyun laitoriat gonnyi ne bo laitornatet, ak korugutgei kemounoto: ama kiib tugukab tienwogik koba tainnyi: ak am inuuch." 
Daniel6:19 King’eet anyun laitoriat karon mising’, ak kwo kochakta ole mi keringetab ng’etunyik." 
Daniel6:20 Ak kingorikta anyun keringet ole mi Daniel, kowaach laitoriat eng’ arogenet: king’alal laitoriat kolenji Daniel, Ee Daniel, otwogindetab Kamuktaindet ne sobei, tos imuchi Kamuktaindeng’ung’ ne iote kotugul kosorun eng’ ng’etunyik?" 
Daniel6:21 Kolenji anyun Daniel laitoriat, Ee laitoriandani, sob agoi." 
Daniel6:22 Koiyok Kamuktaindennyu malaikaiyandennyi koger kutuswekab ng’etunyik, ama ita kiy: amu ma kinyorja kiy ne ya eng’ tainnyi; ak kogeny, tom ayai kiy ne ya eng’ taing’ung’, ee laitoriandani." 
Daniel6:23 Kibaibait anyun laitoriat mising’, ak kong’at kole kegonob Daniel eng’ keringet. Kigigonob anyun Daniel eng’ keringet, ama kinyor ole koam kiy eng’ bortanyi, amu kiimang’u Kamuktaindennyi." 
Daniel6:24 Ak king’at laitoriat ng’atutiet, ak kigimut bichoto kiitaami Daniel, ak kewirji ichek keringetab ng’etunyik, icheget koboto lagokwak, ak osotikwak; ak kital ng’etunyik ichek, ak kotonaton kowekwak tugul kotom koit keringet orit." 
Daniel6:25 Kisirji anyun laitoriat Darius bik, ak bororiosiek tugul ak che bo kutuswek tugul, che menyei ng’ony komugul; kolenji, Ingotesak kalyet eng’ okwek." 
Daniel6:26 Ang’ate ng’atutiet ale, Ingobotanso bik che mi bounatetab laitornatennyu ak koiyweis eng’ taitab Kamuktaindetab Daniel: amu inendet ko Kamuktaindet ne sobei, ak kotebyei koigeny, ak laitornatennyi ko maging’emei, ak kotebyei bounatennyi agoi kagesunet:" 
Daniel6:27 itiachi ak kosoru, ak koyaei kaborunoik ak kwong’utik eng’ kipsengwet ak ng’ony; inendet ne kogosor Daniel eng’ kimnatetab ng’etunyik." 
Daniel6:28 Kinyor anyun Daniel-inito borotet eng’ laitornatetab Darius, ak eng’ laitornatetab Kirus Persiaindet." 
Daniel7:1 Kiiruotyi Daniel karuotitoet, ak kobwanji metinnyi ng’ang’utik eng’ itogunnyi eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo Belsasar laitoriatab Babulon: kisir anyun ng’alekab karuotitaonoto, ak komwaita ng’alek che eechen che bo karuotitaonoto." 
Daniel7:2 Kimwa Daniel kole, Kiageer eng’ ng’ang’utiennyu kemoi, ogeero, kiusyi nyanjet ne o usonaik ang’wanu che bo kipsengwet." 
Daniel7:3 Ak kitogosune nyanjet tiong’ik ang’wanu che eechen, ki ter age eng’ age." 
Daniel7:4 Ki u ne bo tai ng’etundo, ak kitinyei kebebaik che u che bo kipsichit: kiageer agoi kesul kebebaikyik, ak kigiganab eng’ ng’ony, ak keng’at kotonone kelyek aeng’ ko u chito, ak kigigochi naet ne u ne bo chito." 
Daniel7:5 Ak ogeero, tiondo age, ne bo aeng’ ne u keerit, ak kigiganab kotonone komosak, ak kitinyei karaswek somok eng’ kutinnyi: ak kigimwachi ko u ni, kelenji, Ng’eet, am banyek che chang’." 
Daniel7:6 Kingobata nito, ageer, ak ogeero, tiondo age ne u cheblanget, ne kitinyei eng’ batai kebebaik ang’wan che u che bo taritiet; kitinyei kogeny tionyoto metowek ang’wan; ak kigigochi bounatet." 
Daniel7:7 Kingobata nito, ageer eng’ ng’ang’utik kemoi, ogeero, tiondo ne bo ang’wan ne imuisei ak ko kim, ak kotinyei kimnatet ne siirtoot; ak kitinyei kelek che eechen che bo karik: kiam, ak kotonaton, ak kotiechatiech che king’et: ak ki ter tionyoto eng’ tiong’ik tugul che kiindoune inendet; ak kitinyei kuinoik taman." 
Daniel7:8 Kiabwat mising, agobo kuinoichoto, ak ogeero, kimong’une kuinet age ne ming’in, kuinoichoto, ne kigitutune tainnyi kuinoichoto bo tai somok: ak ogeero, kimi kuinonoto konyek che u che bo chi, ak kutit ne mwaei tuguk che eechen." 
Daniel7:9 Kiageer kot kinde ng’echerokab laitornatet, ak kitebe ng’echeranato inendet ne bo keny: ak ki leelach ngoroikyik ko u teluchi, ak ki u sumeekyik kororik che tililen che bo kechirek; ko bo ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet liblibenosiekab mat, ak ki mat ne lalei cheptirokyik." 
Daniel7:10 Kibiit ainet ne u mat ne kimong’une tainnyi: kiboisiechin inendet elfusiek konyil elfut, ak kitonondos eng’ tainnyi elfusiek tamanu konyil elfusiek taman: kigichob kiruoget, ak kiging’any bukuisiek." 
Daniel7:11 Kiatang’any eng’ betunoto amu ng’alek che eechen che kimwaei kuinonoto; kiageer agoi kebar tionyoto, ak keng’em bortanyi, ak kigoito kebeel eng’ mat." 
Daniel7:12 Ak kigiistoe tiong’ik che king’et, bounatenywa: ago kigitesyi betusiekab sobenywa ak kenyisiek." 
Daniel7:13 Kiageer eng’ ng’ang’utikab kemoi, ogeero, kinyo eng’ bolikab kipsengwet, age ne kergei ak weritab chi, ak kinyo ole mi inendet ne bo keny, ak kigimut inendet korik taitab inendet ne bo keny." 
Daniel7:14 Ak kigigochi inendet bounatet, ak torornatet, ak laitornatet, si koot inendet bik tugul, bororiosiek tugul, ak che bo kutuswek tugul: bounatennyi ko bounatetab koigeny, ne ma igesugei, ak ma tun king’emei laitornatennyi." 
Daniel7:15 Ago kiarogen ane Daniel eng’ tamirmiriennyu, ak kiima ng’ang’utik che kibwa metinnyu." 
Daniel7:16 Kiarikyi age eng’ choto kitonondos eng’ yoto, ak atebe inendet kaguiyetab tuguchuto tugul. Komwawa anyun, ak koborua kaweeksetab tuguchoto." 
Daniel7:17 Tiong’ichuto ang’wan eechen, ko laitorinik ang’wan che tun mong’une ng’ony." 
Daniel7:18 Ago tun taachei bounatet bik che tililen che bo Inendet ne Toror Mising’, ak konam bounatet kobunji ichek koigeny ak koigeny." 
Daniel7:19 Yeityo amach anai kaguiyetab tiondo ne bo ang’wan, ne ki ter eng’ tiong’ichun tugul, ne kiimuisei mising’, ne ki bo kelekyik karik, ak ki bo siokyik sugunwet; ne kiam, ak kotonaton, ak kotiechatiech che king’et;" 
Daniel7:20 ak kiamach anai agobo kuinoik taman che kimi metinnyi, koboto kuinet age ne kimong’, koboto kutit ne kimwaei tuguk che eechen, ne kieet itondanyi kosiir ne bo chun alak." 
Daniel7:21 Kiageer koyai luget kuinonoto koboto bik che tililen, ak koterter kuinonoto ichek;" 
Daniel7:22 agoi konyo inendet ne bo keny, ak koruoch agobo bik che tililen che bo Inendet ne Toror Mising’, ak koit betut ne bunjin bounatet bik che tililen." 
Daniel7:23 Kimwa anyun ko u ni, kole, Egu tionyoto bo angwan bounatet ne bo ang’wan eng’ ng’ony, ne egu ne ter eng’ bounatosiek tugul, ak amei ng’ony komugul, ak kotiekyi ng’ony, ak kotonaton." 
Daniel7:24 Ak eng’ kuinoichuto taman, komong’une bounatonito laitorinik tamanu: ak ye ibata komong’ age ne isubu ichek; ak egu ne ter eng’ che bo tai, ak koterter laitorinik somok." 
Daniel7:25 Ak komwa ng’alek che kirindoi Inendet ne Toror Mising’, ak koiim mising’ bik che tililen che bo Inendet ne Toror Mising’: ak kilen inendet kowal betusiek ak ng’atutik; ak kigochi koboi agoi kobek kenyit, ak kenyisiek, ak kebebertab kenyit." 
Daniel7:26 Ago kichobei kiruoget, ak kerebe bounatennyi, si koges ak kong’em agoi kagesunet." 
Daniel7:27 Ak tun kigochin bikab bik che tililen che bo Inendet ne Toror Mising’, laitornatet ak bounatet, ak oindab laitornatosiek che mi kureretab kipsengwet komugul: laitornatennyi ko laitornatet ne bo koigeny, ak tun otei inendet bounatosiek tugul, ak kogase it." 
Daniel7:28 Igesunegei yuto ng’olyondonoto. Kiima mising’ kabwatutikyuk, ane Daniel, ak kiwalak togennyu: ago kiagonore muguleldanyu ng’olyondonoto." 
Daniel8:1 Kinyonja ane Daniel, ng’ang’utiet ne u ne kiga ageer eng’ tai, eng’ kenyit ne bo somok ne bo laitoriat Belsasar." 
Daniel8:2 Ak kiageer ng’ang’utiet, ak kingageere, ami Susan, nganaset ne o, ne mi emetab Elam; ak kiageer eng’ ng’ang’utionoto ami ole negite ainet Ulai." 
Daniel8:3 Yeityo ayot met, ak ageer, ak ogeero, kitonon eng’ ngegutab ainet mengit ne kitinyei kuinoik aeng’: ak ki koen kuinoichoto aeng’u; ago ki koi age kosiir age, ak kimong’u let noto koi." 
Daniel8:4 Kiageer mengoto kotoortoisiei kotokyigei cherongo, ak murot ne bo katam, ak murot ne bo tai; ama imuch tiong’ik kotononso eng’ tainnyi, ama biit ne kiimuch kosor eng’ eunnyi; ago kiyai ko u ye machei, ak koeetgei." 
Daniel8:5 Ak ye kita abwati, ogeero, komong’ kwesta eng’ cherongo ne kiyom ng’ony komugul, ak kima kotiinyei ng’ony: ak kitinyei kweata kuinet ne toogunot eng’ kwenutab togennyi." 
Daniel8:6 Ak kinyo ole mi mengit ne kitinyei kuinoik aeng’, ne kiageer kotonone ngegutab ainet, ak kilabat kweata kwo korieb mengit eng’ neregekyik che ng’wonen che bo kimnatennyi." 
Daniel8:7 Ak kiageer inendet korikyi mengit, ak konerekyi mising’, ak kokwer mengoto, ak koiri kuinoikyik tuwai; ko mata kosich anyun kimnatet kotonon eng’ tainnyi: ago kiwirta kwo ng’ony, ak kotiech; ama biit chi ne kiimuch kosor mengit eng’ eunnyi." 
Daniel8:8 Ak kieetgei kwesta mising’: ak ye kingo kagogimit, koil kuinet ne o; ak kimong’ kuinoik ang’wanu che toogunotin kotokyigei usonaik ang’wan che bo kipsengwet, kogeer ni ka bo tai." 
Daniel8:9 Ak kimong’une kuinet ne ming’in age eng’ kuinoichoto, ne kieet mising’, kotokyigei murot ne bo tai, ak kong’asis, ak emet ne kararan mising’." 
Daniel8:10 Ak kieet mising’, kot koit ole mi lugetab kipsengwet; ak kiturur kuinonoto alak che bo luget koboto alak eng’ kecheik, ak kotiech." 
Daniel8:11 Ee, kiieetgei, kot koit ole mi bounindetab luget; ak koistoe inendet kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kigibut oldanyi ne tilil." 
Daniel8:12 Ak kigigochi inendet luget koboto kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul amu bistoet; ak kiwirji ng’ony imanda, ak kiyai ko u ye kimach ak konyor borotet." 
Daniel8:13 Kiagas anyun inendet ne tilil kong’alali; ak kiteebe age ne tilil noto kang’alali, kolenji, Tebyei kot kotianit ng’ang’utiet agobo kagochinet ne kibeelei, ak bistoet ne ng’emisiei, si kigoito ole tilil koboto luget ketiechatiech?" 
Daniel8:14 Ak kilenja, kitilili ole tilil ko kagogesgei koskoleng’usiek ak karonusiek elfusiek aeng’ ak bogol somok." 
Daniel8:15 Ak kingo kaageer ane Daniel ng’ang’utionoto, acheng’ anyun ale aguiyo; ak ogeero, kitonon eng’ tainnyu itonda ne u ne bo chi." 
Daniel8:16 Ak kiagas kutitab chito eng’ kwenutab ainet Ulai, ne kiguurso kole, Gabriel, iborji chichi koguiyo ng’ang’utiet." 
Daniel8:17 Kirik anyun ye kiatonone; ak kingoit ole ami, aiyweisie, ak abut kot kotiiny toget ng’ony: ago kilenja, Ee, weritab chi, iguiye anyun; amu bo ng’ang’utionito betusiek che bo let." 
Daniel8:18 Kingota kong’alalwa, anuuch mising’, asieb mo: ago kitwaa ak kong’eeta." 
Daniel8:19 Ak kile, Keero, aborun inai tuguk che tun biitu let che bo neregek: amu bo ng’ang’utionoto betut ne kiging’at ne bo let." 
Daniel8:20 Mengit ne kaigeer ne tinyei kuinoik aeng’ ko laitorinikab Media ak Persia. 
Daniel8:21 Ak kwesta ko laitoriatab emetab Yunanik, ak kuinet ne o ne mi kwenutab togennyi ko laitoriat ne bo tai." 
Daniel8:22 Ak kuinonoto kiil, eng’ ole kitononie choto ang’wanu, ko tun biitune yoto bounatosiek ang’wanu che mong’une bororiet, ago ma eng’ kimnatennyi." 
Daniel8:23 Ak eng’ betusiek che bo let che bo bounatenywa, ye kagoyam bistoetab bistoik, kobiit laitoriat ne tong’ony togoch, ne iguitos ng’alek che ung’otin." 
Daniel8:24 Ak tesoksei kimnatennyi, ago ma eng’ kimnatennyi; ak kong’emis ne kikwong’e, ak konyor borotet ak koyai ko u ye machei: ak kong’em che nyigonen ak bik che tililen." 
Daniel8:25 Ak kogochi kaberberisiet konyor borotet eng’ ng’alsennyi; ak koeetgei eng’ muguleldanyi, ak kong’em che chang’ komi kalyenywa: ak koborie bounindetab bounik; ak ilei inegei ama twa chi." 
Daniel8:26 Ak bo iman ng’ang’utietab koskoleng’usiek ak karonusiek ne kagemwa: ago tuch inye ng’ang’utionoto; amu bo betusiek che chang’ che bwanei. 
Daniel8:27 Ak kiatanui ane Daniel, amian betusiek alak; ye ibata, ang’eet, ak ayai boisietab laitoriat: ak kiakwong’e ng’ang’utionoto, ago ma biit chi ne kiiguiyo." 
Daniel9:1 Ak kenyit ne bo tai ne bo Darius weritab Aasuerus, ne kisalu Medik, ne kiginde koek laitoriat koboi bounatetab Kaldeik;" 
Daniel9:2 eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo laitornatennyi, aguiye ane Daniel eng’ bukuisiek koitetab kenyisiek che kinyonjine ng’olyotab Jehovah maotiot Jeremia, agobo kasuldaetab ng’emisiosiekab Jerusalem, choto ko kenyisiek tamanwogik tisab." 
Daniel9:3 Ak kiatokyige Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindet, ale acheng’ inendet eng’ saet ak somutik, koboto karugutetab ge, ak kalaagetab kuiniok, ak eng’ orek." 
Daniel9:4 Ak kiasa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, ak ang’ang’ji inendet ale, Ee Kiptaiyat, Kamuktaindet ne o ne kiywei, ne ribei kayomiset ak rirenet eng’ ichek che chamei inendet ak koribei ng’atutikyik;" 
Daniel9:5 kigeyai tengekto, kigeyai kit ne imaasat, ak kigeyai kit ne ya kot, ak kigingelelse, kemaste kemete konetisiosieguk ak kiruogutiguk;" 
Daniel9:6 ama kigas it otwogiguk maotik, che king’alalji eng’ kaineng’ung’ laitorinikyok, bounikyok ak kwanisiekyok, ak bik tugul che bo emet." 
Daniel9:7 Ee Kiptaiyat, neng’ung’ imanda, ago nenyo kalilanet, ko u ra; koboto bikab Juda, ak bik che menyei Jerusalem ak Israel tugul, che negit ak che mi ole loo, eng’ emotinwek tugul ole kiionji, amu chalwoktanywa ne kigoyaun." 
Daniel9:8 Ee Kiptaiyat, nenyo kalilanet, koboto laitorinikyok, bounikyok, ak kwanisiekyok, amu kigeyaun tengekto." 
Daniel9:9 Bo Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindennyo rirenosiek ak nyoetab kaat; amu kigingelelji inendet; 
Daniel9:10 ama kigas it kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, kebendate ng’atutikyik, che kiinde tainnyo eng’ otwogikyik maotik." 
Daniel9:11 Ee, kigobistoe Israel tugul ng’atutieng’ung’, komasta, si magas it kuting’ung’: kigerong’jech anyun chubet amu noto, koboto kayosiet ne kigisirji Ng’atutikab Musa otwogindetab Kamuktaindet, amu kigeyachi inendet tengekto." 
Daniel9:12 Ak kigogimit ng’alekyik, che kimwa agobo achek, ak agobo kiruogikyok che kiiruokwech koibwech yaitiet ne o: amu tom keyai eng’ kureret komugul ne bo kipsengwet kit ne kigiyachi Jerusalem." 
Daniel9:13 Kanyonjech yaitioni tugul ko u ye sirat eng’ Ng’atutikab Musa, ago tom kesom chametab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, si kobiit kemete tengekwogikyok, ak kenai ole teptoi imandang’ung’." 
Daniel9:14 Kirib anyun Jehovah yaitiet agoi betut ne kiibwech: amu bo iman Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo eng’ boisionikyik tugul che yaei, ago ma kigas it kutinnyi." 
Daniel9:15 Ara anyun, ee Kiptaiyat Kamuktaindennyo, ne kiimutu biguk eng’ eut ne kim, komong’ eng’ emetab Misri, ak kiisikyige teegisto, ko u rani; kigeyai tengekto, kigeyai kit ne ya kot." 
Daniel9:16 Ee Kiptaiyat, asain ale, ingoistoegei neregeguk, neregeguk che ng’wonen, nganaseng’ung’ Jerusalem, tulweng’ung’ ne tilil, ko u eng’ imandang’ung’ tugul: kigoek Jerusalem koboto biguk, che kichotei eng’ tugul che mitei komoswek tugul, amu tengekwogikyok, ak amu yaitwogikab kwanisiekyok." 
Daniel9:17 Ara anyun, ee Kamuktaindennyo, kas saetab otwogindeng’ung’, ak somutikyik, amu kainetab Kiptaiyat, ak ingoluuchi togeng’ung’ oldang’ung’ ne tilil ne kogoguber." 
Daniel9:18 Ee Kamuktaindennyu, eb it ak igas; tokyi konyeguk, ak igeer banandanyo, ak nganaset ne kimwaitoe kaineng’ung’: amu ma kiibu somutikyok kobwa taing’ung’ amu imandanyo, ago amu rirenosieguk che eechen." 
Daniel9:19 Ee Kiptaiyat, kas; ee Kiptaiyat, nyochi kaat; ee Kiptaiyat, kas ak iyai; amegage; agobo kaineng’ung’, ee Kamuktaindennyu, amu kimwaitoe kaineng’ung’ nganaseng’ung’ ak biguk." 
Daniel9:20 Ak ye kita ang’alali, ak asae, ak ang’anye tengektanyu, ak tengektab bikyuk Israel, ak aibe somennyu kwo taitab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu agobo tulwet ne tilil ne bo Kamuktaindennyu;" 
Daniel9:21 ee, ye kita ang’alali eng’ saet, kotwaa chichoto Gabriel, ne kitirirenu kochogu, ne kiga ageer eng’ tai eng’ ng’ang’utiet, konyo kotwaa eng’ olo bo sait ne kigoitoe kagochinetab koskoleny." 
Daniel9:22 Ak kiiguiyewa, ak kong’alalwa, ak kolenja, Ee Daniel, kanyo si kobiit agonin iegu ne utat eng’ kaguiyet." 
Daniel9:23 Kimong’ ng’atutiet eng’ taunetab somutiguk, ak kanyo amwaun, amu i chamat mising’: ibwat anyun komie ng’olyondoni amu noto, ak iguiye ng’ang’utiet." 
Daniel9:24 Kaging’atyi biguk wigisiek tamanwogik tisab koboto nganaseng’ung’ ne tilil, si kiges bistoet, ak kiges tengekwogik, ak keyai katuiyet agobo tengekto, ak keib imanda ne bo koigeny, ak keng’och ng’ang’utiet ak maoinatet, ak kiil, kitaban ole tilil mising’." 
Daniel9:25 Nai anyun ak iguiye ile koboch ngab komong’ ng’atutiet kele kituur ak keteech Jerusalem, keteekyi inendet ne iilat, bounindet, koegu wigisiek tisab: ak keteech kogeny eng’ wigisiek tamanwogik lo ak aeng’, koboto oret ak keringet ne yiemei nganaset, eng’ betusiekab nyalilda." 
Daniel9:26 Ak ye ibata wigisiek tamanwogik lo ak aeng’ keisto inendet ne iilat ama kotinyei kiy: ak kobwa bikab bounindet kong’em nganaset ak ole tilil; ak nyonei kagesunennyi koboto maranet, ak egu luget agoi let; kigeng’at ng’emisiosiek." 
Daniel9:27 Ak koyomisgei koboto bik che chang’ eng’ kayomiset ne kim ne bo wigit agenge: ak koges tiseiywot ak kagochinetab busiek eng’ kwenutab wigit; ak konyo age ne ibu ng’emisiet eng’ kebepchetab tuguk che kiwechei; ak kerong’ji ng’emindet neregek che kigeng’at, agoi kagesunet." 
Daniel10:1 Kiging’ang’ji Daniel ne kigiguure Beltesasar kiy eng’ kenyit ne bo somok ne bo Kirus laitoriatab Persia; ak ki bo iman kioto, noto ko ki boriet ne o: ak kiiguiyo, ak konyor kaguiyetab ng’ang’utiet." 
Daniel10:2 Kiarir ane Daniel eng’ betusiechoto, wigisiek somok che nyiitotin." 
Daniel10:3 Kima am amitwogik che miach, ama am banyek, amaee divaik, ama aiilge, agoi kogesgei wigisiechoto somogu." 
Daniel10:4 Ak eng’ betutab tiptem ak ang’wan ne bo arawet ne bo tai, ye kiami ngegutab ainet ne o, ne noto ko Hidekel," 
Daniel10:5 ayot met ak atobende, ageer chito ne ilaachi ngoroikab katanit, ne kiga rategei tahabu ne kararan ne bo Upas;" 
Daniel10:6 ki u kogeny bortanyi berulo, ak ki u togennyi kalyelet, ak kiu konyekyik taisiek che bo mat, ak ki u eunekyik ak kelyekyik itondab sugunwet ne sitat, ak ki u twegunetab ng’alekyik twegunetab bik che chang’." 
Daniel10:7 Ak kiageer ng’ang’utiet anege, ane Daniel: amu ma keer ng’ang’utionoto bik che kigimi tugul; ago kibotanso mising’, ak komwei kounygei." 
Daniel10:8 Kiang’etu anyun anege, ak kiageer ng’ang’utionoto o, ak kima kota atinye kimnatet: amu kiwalak kororonindanyu kong’emak, ak ma ng’etwa kimnatet." 
Daniel10:9 Ago kiagas twegunetab ng’alekyik: ak kingagas twegunetab ng’alekyik, anuuch, asieb mo." 
Daniel10:10 Ak ogeero, kitwaa eunnyi ne kinama agutuny ak atebendoe eunekyuk." 
Daniel10:11 Ak kilenja, Ee Daniel, inye chito ne i chamat mising’, iguiye ng’alek che amwaun, ak itonon komie; amu kagiyokwa anyo oli imi: ak kingo kagomwawa ng’olyondonito, atonon abotani." 
Daniel10:12 Kolenja anyun, Ameiyweisie, Daniel; amu kigigasun ng’aleguk koboch betut ne bo tai ye kiimach iguiye eng’ muguleldang’ung’, ak iming’inge eng’ taitab Kamuktaindeng’ung’: ak kanyo amu ng’aleguk." 
Daniel10:13 Ago kiranya bounindetab bounatetab Persia eng’ betusiek tiptem ak agenge: ago keero, kinyo Mikael, age eng’ bounik che eechen kotoreta: ak kiatebe oloto koboto laitorinikab Persia." 
Daniel10:14 Kanyo anyun si kobiit aborun iguiye tuguk che tun bwanjin biguk eng’ betusiek che bo let: amu bo ng’ang’utiet betusiek che chang’. 
Daniel10:15 Ak kingo kagong’alalwa ng’alechuto, ang’uruge ak konamaga kut." 
Daniel10:16 Ak ogeero, kitwa kutinnyu age ne kergei ak werikab bik: ayat kutinnyu anyun, ang’alal, alenji inendet ne kitonon eng’ tainnyu, Ee kiptaiyandennyu, kagobwanja arogenosiekyuk amu ng’ang’utiet, ama ng’etwa kimnatet." 
Daniel10:17 Amu imuktoi ano otwogindetab kiptaiyandaninyu kong’alal ak kiptiyandennyu? Amu ne u ane, ko ko mata kong’etwa kimnatet, ak kagogera tigiis." 
Daniel10:18 Yeityo kotwaa kogeny age ne u chito, ak kiigimita." 
Daniel10:19 Ak kile, Ee inye, chito ne i chamat mising’ ameiywei: ingotebenen kalyet, kimitu, ee kimitu. Ak kingong’alalwa, agimitu anyun, ak kiale, Ingong’alal kiptaiyandennyu; amu kaigimita." 
Daniel10:20 Yeityo kole, Tos ingen ile amu nee si anyonjin? Kaweege anyun si kebarge ak bounindetab Persia: ak ye awe, keero, konyo bounindetab emetab Yunanik." 
Daniel10:21 Ago amwaun kit ne sirat eng’ sirutik che bo iman: ama mi age ne toreta agirinda tuguchuto, kobate Mikael bounindeng’wong’." 
Daniel11:1 Ago kiatonon ane, eng’ kenyit ne bo tai ne bo Darius Medindet, agiil, agimit inendet." 
Daniel11:2 Aborun anyun ne bo iman. Keero, ta kobiitu laitorinik somogu eng’ Persia; ak egu magoriot mising’ ne bo ang’wan kosiir chun tugul: ak ye kagogimit amu magornatosiekyik, kong’eet bik tugul kobargei ak bounatetab emetab Yunanik." 
Daniel11:3 Ak kobiit laitoriat ne kim mising’, ne tun bounisiei eng’ bounatet ne o, ak koyai ko u ye machei." 
Daniel11:4 Ak ye kagobiit, keng’emei laitornatennyi, ak kopcheigei kotokyigei usonaik ang’wan che bo kipsengwet; ago ma tun bunjin iyotennyi, ama isubi ko u bounatennyi ne kibou; amu kitutu laitornatennyi kobunji alak koboto chuto." 
Daniel11:5 Ak tun kimitu laitoriat ne bo murot ne bo tai, koboto age eng’ bounikyik; ak tun kimitu kosiir inendet, ak konyor bounatet; egu bounatennyi bounatet ne o." 
Daniel11:6 Ak ye igesgei kenyisiek, konamgei; ak konyo cheptab laitoriatab murot ne bo tai ole mi laitoriatab murot ne bo katam kochamnyogei: ago mang’etyin cheboto kimnatetab eunnyi; ama tononi laitoriandanato, anan eunnyi; ago kigoitoi cheboto, koboto bik che kiimutu inendet, koboto chito ne kisichei inendet, koboto chito ne kigimiti inendet eng’ betusiechoto." 
Daniel11:7 Ago mong’u age ne bunu temetab tigitikyik ne igeeri inendet, ne nyonei ole mi luget, ak kochut irimetab laitoriat ne bo murot ne bo katam, ak kobargei ak bichoto, ak koterter:" 
Daniel11:8 ak koib kogeny kanamonikwak koboto che kigitanyi, ak terenikwak che miachen che bo feda ak che bo tahabu; koluul koba Misri; ak kotebi kenyisiek alak, ama ibokyi laitoriat ne bo murot ne bo katam." 
Daniel11:9 Ak kwo oldab bounatetab laitoriat ne bo murot ne bo tai, ak koweekyigei emennyi." 
Daniel11:10 Ak koyai luget werikyik, ak koyum tuiyet ne o ne bo lugosiek, che tun bwanei, ak kochwalda koyom emet, ak kobun oloto: ak koweek ak koyai luget, agoi irimennyi." 
Daniel11:11 Ak konerech laitoriatab murot ne bo tai, ak komong’ ak kobargei ak inendet: noto ko laitoriatab murot ne bo katam: ak kochob tuiyet ne o, ak kinde tuiyonoto eunekyik." 
Daniel11:12 Ak ye kagimut tuiyet, koeetgei eng’ muguleldanyi: ak kobar tamanusiekab elfusiek, ago maiterteri." 
Daniel11:13 Ak koweeigei laitoriatab murot ne bo katam, kochob luget ne o kosiir ni ka bo tai; ak konyo ko kagobata betusiek, choto ko kenyisiek alak, koboto luget ne o ak tuguk che chang’." 
Daniel11:14 Ak tun ng’eetos che chang’ eng’ betusiechoto kogirinda laitoriatab murot ne bo tai: ak koeetgei lagokab bik che koromen eng’ biguk si kogimit ng’ang’utiet; ago ibutos. 
Daniel11:15 Konyo anyun laitoriatab murot ne bo katam, ak kowasyi ng’ung’unyek, ak konam nganaset ne ng’otat komie: ak magirindoi lugosiekab murot ne bo tai, anan ko bikyik che kigilewen, ama biitu kimnatet age tugul ne kirindoisie." 
Daniel11:16 Ago inendet ne nyonei kobaregei ak chichoto koyaei ko u ne machei, ama biitu chi ne imuchi kotonon eng’ tainnyi: ak kotonon inendet eng’ emet ne kararan mising’, ak mi eunnyi ng’emisiet." 
Daniel11:17 Ak igiilegei konyo koboto kimnatetab laitornatennyi komugul, ak koyai kasyinet ak inendet; ak koyai ko u ye machei: ak kogochi inendet cheptab kwonyik, si kong’em; ago matononi, ama bunjin." 
Daniel11:18 Ak ye ibata nito, kotokyigei ngegusiek, ak konam che chang’: ago igesu bounindet chotisiet ne kiigoitoi inendet; ee, weekyin inendet chotisiennyi." 
Daniel11:19 Yeityo koweek kotokyi togennyi irimoikab emennyi: ago kinachi ak kobut, ak ma kenyoru." 
Daniel11:20 Ye ibata nito, kobiit ne igeeri inendet ne igochin taagindetab aisurut kobun kwenutab ytorornatet ne bo bounatet: ago king’emei inendet eng’ betusiek che ng’ering’, ma eng’ neregek, anan eng’ luget." 
Daniel11:21 Ak kogeer inendet chito age ne kasasei, ne kima igochi ichek teegistab bounatet: ago tun nyonei eng’ betusiekab kalyet, ak konam bounatet eng’ mwaikutnatet." 
Daniel11:22 Ak keisto ichek eng’ tainnyi eng’ luget ne marani, ak keton; koboto bounindetab kayomisutiet agine." 
Daniel11:23 Ak kobois eng’ ng’alset ye kagobata kasyinet: amu tun togosu ak kogimit, koboto bik che ng’ering’." 
Daniel11:24 Ibokyin komoswek che akwaen che bo emet eng’ betusiekab kalyet; ak koyai kit ne kima yai kwanisiekyik, anan kwanisiekab kwanisiekyik; ak koseerji kwenunywa barunenik ak luulenik, ak tuguk: ee, chobei chobutikyik agobo irimoik, che bo betusiek che kiging’at." 
Daniel11:25 Ak kong’eet kimnatennyi ak nyiganatennyi kobargei ak laitoriatab murot ne bo tai koboto luget ne o; ak koyai luget laitoriatab murot ne bo tai koboto luget ne o mising’ ak ko kim: ago matononi, amu chobei ichek chobutik agobo inendet." 
Daniel11:26 Ee, ng’emei inendet che amei amitwogikyik, ak kochwalda koyom lugennyi emet: ak kobutyo che chang’ ko kagebar." 
Daniel11:27 Ak che u laitorinichuto tuwai, ko tun tokyingei mugulelwekwak koyai yaitiet, ak komwaei lembechek kotebyei eng’ meset agenge: ago maborei; amu ta koitu kagesunet eng’ betut ne kiging’at." 
Daniel11:28 Yeityo koweekyigei emennyi koboto tuguk che chang’; ak kowech muguleldanyi kayomiset ne tilil; ak koyai ko u ye machei, ak koweekyigei emennyi." 
Daniel11:29 Weeksei kogeny eng’ betut ne kiging’at, ak konyo komostab murot ne bo tai; ago ma tun biitu eng’ betusiek che bo let ko u eng’ betusiek che bo tai." 
Daniel11:30 Amu tun bwanjin melisiekab Kitim kobargei ak inendet; arogeni anyun, ak koweeigei, ak konerech kowech kayomiset ne tilil, ak koyai ko u ye machei: ak koweeigei kogeny, ak kocham ichek che baraktoi kayomiset ne tilil." 
Daniel11:31 Ak kotononso lugosiek eng’ komostanyi ak komuruon ole tilil, agot irimet, ak koisto kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak konde kit ne kiwechei ne ng’emisiei." 
Daniel11:32 Ak komaas inendet eng’ mwaikutnatet che yaei yaitio kowechei kayomiset: ago kimegitu bik che ingen Kamuktaindenywa, ak koyai boisionik che kimen che kikwong’e." 
Daniel11:33 Ak konet bik che chang’ bik che ng’omen che mi kwenutab bik: ago kibarei eng’ rotwetab chok, ak eng’ mat, eng’ luulet ak eng’ kamutet, eng’ betusiek che chang’." 
Daniel11:34 Ye kagobutyo anyun, ketoreti eng’ toretet ne matia: ago namegei che chang’ ak ichek eng’ mwaikutnatet." 
Daniel11:35 Ak kobutyo alak che ng’omen eng’ ichek, si kitilil, ak kianyiny, ak keyai koleelagitu, kot koit betut ne bo let: amu ta koitu betut ne kiging’at." 
Daniel11:36 Ak koyai laitoriat ko u ye machei; ak kotororgei ak koeetgei kosiir cheptalelit age tugul, ak komwa tuguk che kikwong’e agobo Kamuktaindet ne bou cheptalelisiek: ak konyor inendet borotet kot kosulda neregek; amu kiyaei noto kigeng’at." 
Daniel11:37 Ama iiti cheptalelisiekab kwanisiekyik, anan ne chamat eng’ kwonyik, ama iiti cheptalelit age tugul ago ieetegei kosiir tugul." 
Daniel11:38 Ago konyiti cheptalelitab irimoik eng’ komostanyi: ak kogonyit cheptalelit ne kima nai kwanisiekyik, kogochi tahabu, ak feda, koboto koik che bo kamanutiet ne o, ak tuguk che kichamei." 
Daniel11:39 Ak konam irimoik che kimen mising’ eng’ toretetab cheptalelit ne ter; tesyin torornatet age tugul ne chamei inendet: ak kogochin inendet ichek koboi che chang’, ak kopchei emet kobunji kagaigaet." 
Daniel11:40 Ak koborio ak inendet laitoriatab murot ne bo tai eng’ betusiek che bo let: ak kobokyi inendet laitoriat ne bo murot ne bo katam ko u kipchurjuriet, koboto karisiekab luget, ak bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek, ak melisiek che chang’; ak kwo kochwalda koyom emotinwek, ak kobun oloto." 
Daniel11:41 Wendi inendet kogeny emet ne kararan, ak kigabui emotinwek che chang’: ago kisoru chu eng’ eunnyi, Edom, ak Moab, ak chu eechen che bo lagokab Amon." 
Daniel11:42 Tokyin eunnyi kogeny emotinwechoto: ama chilili emetab Misri. 
Daniel11:43 Ago bou inendet konoraik che bo tahabu ak che bo feda ak tuguk tugul che bo kamanutiet ne o che bo Misri: ak kosub inendet Libyanik ak Etiopik. 
Daniel11:44 Ago iimi inendet ng’alek che bunu kong’asis ak che bunu murot ne bo katam: ak kwo eng’ neregek che ng’wonen che eechen kwo kong’emis ak kobar che chang’. 
Daniel11:45 Ak koteech emaisiekab gonnyi ne bo laitornatet eng’ kwenutab nyanjet ak tulwet ne tilil ne kararan; ago tun meei, ama toreti chi inendet." 
Daniel12:1 Ak kotonon eng’ betunoto Mikael, bounindet ne o ne toreti lagokab biguk: ak biitu betusiek che bo nyalilda, che kitomo kobiitu koboch ngab kobiit bororiet agoi betunoto: ak kisoru biguk eng’ betusiechoto, age tugul ne kigisirji kainennyi bukuit." 
Daniel12:2 Ak kong’eetyo che chang’ eng’ ichek che kigoruiyo eng’ ng’ung’unyek, bendi alak sobondab koigeny, ak kobendi alak tewernatet ak chotisiet ne bo agoi." 
Daniel12:3 Ak koluu che ng’omen ko u kakweng’et ne bo barak; ak koluu koigeny ak koigeny ko u kecheik ichek che imutyin che chang’ imanda. 
Daniel12:4 Ago tuch ng’alechu, ee Daniel, ak ing’och bukuit agoi betusiek che bo let: tun ruaati che chang’, ak kotesak naet." 
Daniel12:5 Kiageer anyun ane Daniel, ak ogeero, kitononso alak aeng’u, kitonone age ngegutab ainet bitoni, kotonone age ngegutab ainet bitonin." 
Daniel12:6 Ak kiteebe age ne kiilaachi ngoroikab katanit, ne kimi baragutab beekab ainonoto, kolenji, Tianitu si koek kagesunetab kwong’utichu?" 
Daniel12:7 Agas chito ne kiilaachi ngoroikab katanit, ne kimi baragutab beekab ainonoto, ye kinamjin barak eunnyi ne bo tai, ak eunnyi ne bo katam, ak koyosio eng’ inendet ne sobei koigeny, kole kobunjin kenyit, ak kenyisiek ak kebebertab kenyit; ak ye tun kagoges ichek tonet ne tonatoni kimnatetab bik che tililen, kogesgei anyun tuguchuto tugul." 
Daniel12:8 Ak kiagas, ago ma aguiye: yeityo amwa ale, Ee kiptaiyandennyu, egu nee kagesunetab tuguchuto?" 
Daniel12:9 Ak kile, Ui inye Daniel: amu kagituch ng’alechuto ak keng’och kot koit betusiek che bo kagesunet." 
Daniel12:10 Ianyinyegei che chang’, ak koyaegei koleelagitu, ak kotililegei: ago yaei kiptengeginik tengekto; amaiguitos kiptengeginik agot agenge: ago iguitos ichek che ng’omen." 
Daniel12:11 Egu betusiek elfut agenge ak bogol aeng’ ak tamanwogik sogol, koboch betusiek che kiistoi kagochinet ne kibeelei ne bo kotugul, ak kinde kit ne kiwechei ne ng’emisiei." 
Daniel12:12 Iberurot inendet ne igenisiei, ne itei betusiek elfut agenge ak bogol somok ak sosom ak mut." 
Daniel12:13 Ago ui inye oldang’ung’ agoi koit kagesunet: amu imuunyi, ak tun itononi eng’ komostang’ung’, eng’ kagesunetab betusiechoto." 
Hosea1:1 Ni ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kinyonji Hosea weritab Beri, eng’ betusiekab Usia, Jotam, Ahas, ak Hesekia, che ki laitorinikab Juda, ak eng’ betusiekab Jeroboam weritab Joas, laitoriatab Israel." 
Hosea1:2 Ye kingong’alale Jehovah Hosea eng’ tai, kolenji Jehovah Hosea, Ui imutyige chepkugoniot koek osotiondeng’ung’, ak lagokab kugoinatet: amu yaei emet kugoinatet ne o, kometoi Jehovah." 
Hosea1:3 Kiwa anyun kotun Gomer cheptab Diblaim; ak kimanach, ak kisikyi inendet werit." 
Hosea1:4 Ak kilenji Jehovah inendet, Kuure kainennyi Jesreel; amu tomo ne matia, si kayaakta mugetut agobo gorotikab Jesreel, eng’ gotab Jeu, ak agesu bounatetab gotab Israel." 
Hosea1:5 Ak tun airie kwangetab Israel eng’ atebwetab Jesreel eng’ betunoto. 
Hosea1:6 Ak kimanach kogeny, ak kosich chepto. Ak kolenji Jehovah inendet, Kuure kainennyi Lo-ruhama: amu ma arire gotab Israel, anyochini kaat eng’ kiy age tugul." 
Hosea1:7 Ago arire gotab Juda, ak asorune ichek eutab Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, amasoru eng’ kwanget, anan eng’ rotwetab chok, anan eng’ luget, anan eng’ mbartanyisiek, anan eng’ bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek." 
Hosea1:8 Ak kingo kagoluge Lo-ruhama, komanach kogeny, ak kosich werit." 
Hosea1:9 Ak kile Jehovah, Kuure kainennyi Lo-ami: amu ma o bikyuk, amaegu Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Hosea1:10 Ago tenitu lagokab Israel ng’aniek che bo nyanjet, che magimuchi kirogendoe kiy anan kiit; ak eng’ ole kigimwachine icheget kele, Ma o bikyuk, ko tun kilenjin, O werikab Kamuktaindet ne sobei." 
Hosea1:11 Ak kiyum lagokab Juda ak lagokab Israel, ak kolewenjigei kandoindet agenge, ak kotogosta eng’ emonoto: amu egu betut ne o betutab Jesreel." 
Hosea2:1 Omwachi ng’etab kametwagikwok olenji, Ami; ak omwachi chepkametwagikwok olenji, Ruhama." 
Hosea2:2 Ogaigai komet, ogaigai; amu inendet ko ma osotiondennyu, ama a manong’otiondennyu: ak ingometo kugoinatosiekyik che mi togennyi, ak ingometo ibetab ge ne mi tegennyi;" 
Hosea2:3 si mareegune ngoroikyik, ak achuunde kotebi ach ngor, ko u betut ne kigisichei, ak ayai inendet koek ong’atet, ak agochi inendet koigei emet ne yaamat, ak abare melelda:" 
Hosea2:4 ee, marire lagokyik; amu icheget lagokab kugoinatet." 
Hosea2:5 Amu kiyaei kamet kugoinatet: kiyai inendet ne kimanachi ichek, tewernatet: amu kimwa kole, Asuboti chamanikyuk, che kona amitwogikyuk ak beekyuk, koboto kororikyuk che bo kechirek, ak mabutekyuk, mwanikyuk ak tuguk che aee." 
Hosea2:6 Keer anyun-o, ayieme oreng’ung’ katok, ak ang’ot inendet si manyor ortinwekyik." 
Hosea2:7 Ak kosubot chamanikyik, ago manyoru ichek; ak kocheng’ ichek, ago manyoru: yeityo komwa kole, Kaweekyige manong’otiondennyu ne bo tai; amu kiagaigai eng’ betusiechoto kosiir nguno." 
Hosea2:8 Amu ma nai kole ane ne kiagochini bek, ak divaik, ak mwanik, ak atesyi feda ak tahabu, che kiyae Baal." 
Hosea2:9 Aweechi anyun bekyuk eng’ betusiekyik, ak aweech divaikyuk eng’ kenyisiekwak, ak arebe kororikyuk che bo kechirek ak mabutekyuk che kota tugegei." 
Hosea2:10 Ak ang’anye tewernatennyi eng’ taitab chamanikyik, ama biitu chi ne soru inendet eng’ eunnyu." 
Hosea2:11 Ak agesu kogeny boiboiyennyi, igorwekyik, ak betut ne kaleel arawet, ak sabatosiekyik, ak tuiyosiekyik tugul che kiging’at." 
Hosea2:12 Ak ang’em ketikyik che bo sabibuk, ak mogoonikyik, che kigomwa kole, Chu ko tuguk che kialena chamanikyuk: ak ayai tuguchoto koek osnet, ak koam tiong’ikab timin." 
Hosea2:13 Ak aipchi inendet biret agobo betusiekab Baalik, che kobeeljin nyamdutik; ye kilelesanjinegei munaokyik koboto tugukyik che bo lelesta, ak kwo kosubot chamanikyik, ak koutiena, mwaei Jehovah." 
Hosea2:14 Noto anyun, ogeero, agaigai inendet, ak amut inendet kwo ong’atet, ak amwachi ng’alek che agaigae." 
Hosea2:15 Ak agochi inendet mbarenikyik che bo sabibuk eng’ oloto, ak agochi inendet atebwetab Akor, koek kurgetab kamang’unet; ak koyanwa eng’ oloto, ko u eng’ betusiekab ming’inatennyi, ak ko u eng’ betut ne kimong’u kotogosu eng’ emetab Misri." 
Hosea2:16 Ak iguurena eng’ betunoto, Isi, mwaei Jehovah; ama iguurena Baali." 
Hosea2:17 Amu aistoi kainaikab Baalik eng’ kutinnyi, ama kibwati kogeny kainaikwak." 
Hosea2:18 Ak ayai arorutiet eng’ betunoto agobo ichek koboto tiong’ikab timin ak taritikab barak, ak tuguk che ichuutegei ng’ony: ak airi kwanget ak rotwetab chok, ak aiste luget eng’ emet, ak agochi koruiyo eng’ chametab ge." 
Hosea2:19 Ak achob ale atunin koigeny; ee, achobe atunin eng’ imanda, ak eng’ kiruoget, ak eng’ chamnyet ne tala, ak eng’ rirenosiek." 
Hosea2:20 Achobe atunin eng’ imanda: ak inai Jehovah. 
Hosea2:21 Ak tun awolu eng’ betunoto, mwaei Jehovah, awoljini kipsengwetisiek, ak kowolji ichek ng’ony;" 
Hosea2:22 ak kowolji ng’ony bek, ak divaik, ak mwanik; si kowolji choto Jesreel." 
Hosea2:23 Ak agoljige inendet eng’ emet; ak arire inendet ne kima kirire; ak alenji ichek che kima ko bikyuk, O bikyuk; ak kole, I Kamuktaindennyu." 
Hosea3:1 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Ui kogeny ak icham kwondo ne chamat eng’ choruennyi, ak ko chepkugoniot, ko u ye chamei Jehovah lagokab Israel, agot nganda weekyingei cheptalelisiek, ak kochamei makatinikab sabibuk che yaamnyotin." 
Hosea3:2 Kiaal anyun kwonyoto eng’ fedaisiek taman ak mut, ak homer agenge ne bo sairik, ak kebebertab homer ne bo sairik:" 
Hosea3:3 ak kialenji, Itebye ko i nenyu, eng’ betusiek che chang’; meyae kugoinatet, amat iegu osotiotab chi age tugul: si ayai ko u noto agane eng’ inye." 
Hosea3:4 Amu tebyei lagokab Israel betusiek che chang’ ama tinyei laitoriat, ama tinyei bounindet, ama tinyei tiseiywot, ama tinyei toloita, ama tinyei epod anan terapik:" 
Hosea3:5 ye ibata koweek lagokab Israel, ak kocheng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak Daudi laitoriandenywa; ak kobwanji Jehovah ak mieindanyi eng’ kaiyweisiet eng’ betusiek che bo let." 
Hosea4:1 Ogas ng’olyotab Jehovah, okwek lagokab Israel: amu ting’e Jehovah ng’olyot bik che menyei emet, amu mamitei imanit, anan rirenet, anan naet ne bo Kamuktaindet eng’ emet." 
Hosea4:2 Mami kit age kobate chubisiet ak lembechek, ak rumisiet, ak chorset, ak ibetab ge; tesoksei, ak isubegei rumisiet." 
Hosea4:3 Rirei anyun emet, ak nyaluli age tugul ne menyei oloto, koboto tiong’ikab timin ak taritikab barak; ee, kiistoi agichek njirenikab nyanjet." 
Hosea4:4 Ago amat kotiiyo chi eng’ choto, anan koger kong’; amu u biguk ichek che ibeligei ak tisiindet." 
Hosea4:5 Ago ibuti bet, ak obutosi koboto maotiot kemoi; ak abar komet." 
Hosea4:6 Kigeng’em bikyuk amu matinyei naet: amu kiiesie naet, aesioin agane, si ma iegu tisiindet eng’ ane: amu kiiutie ng’atutikab Kamuktaindeng’ung’, autie agane lagoguk." 
Hosea4:7 Ko u ye kitesak, ko u noto kitesak koyaiywa tengekto; awale torornatenywa koek tewernatet." 
Hosea4:8 Baegei ichek tengektab bikyuk, ak koboiboitune yaitienywa." 
Hosea4:9 Ak kit ne u eng’ bik, ko u noto eng’ tisiindet: ak abire ichek amu ortinwekwak, ak ayaakyi boisionikwak." 
Hosea4:10 Ak koamisiei, ama biyong’dos; yaei kugoinatet, ama tesoksei: amu kigometa koepchi it Jehovah." 
Hosea4:11 Istoi kugoinatet ak divaik ak divaik che leelach, kaguiyet." 
Hosea4:12 Somei bikyuk kiruoget eng’ ketik, iborjin ichek siarinywa: amu kiimaas ichek tamirmirietab kugoinatet, ak kigoba koyai kugoinatet, kometo Kamuktaindenywa." 
Hosea4:13 Enyei tiseiywek eng’ tulonok barak, ak kobeelei nyamdutik eng’ tulonok, eng’ kelutab ketik, ak ketik alak che u siliboik, ak ketik alak che ter, amu mie uruenywa: yaei anyun tibikwok kugoinatet, ak koyai murerenikwok ibetab ge." 
Hosea4:14 Mabire tibikwok ye yaei kugoinatet, anan murerenikwok ye yaei ibetab ge; amu mastoi icheget koboto che yaei kugoinatet, ak koenyei tiseiywek koboto chepkugonik: ak kobutyo bik che maiguitos." 
Hosea4:15 Agot ngiyae inye Israel kugoinatet, ko mat koyai Juda; amobwa Gilgal, anan otogoste Bet-aben, anan oyosie ole, Ko u ye sobei Jehovah." 
Hosea4:16 Amu kigongelel Israel, ko u roriat ne uui met; baei Jehovah anyun ichek ko u aruetab kechir eng’ ole baraa." 
Hosea4:17 Kigonamgei Epraim ak kanamonik; bagakte inegei. 
Hosea4:18 Kigomindililitu tugukwak che eei: yaei kugoinatet kotugul; chamei bounikyik tewernatet mising’. 
Hosea4:19 Kagotuch usonet inendet eng’ kebebaikyik; ak ililandos amu tisieywekwak. 
Hosea5:1 Ogas nito, ee okwek tisiik, ak koeb it, okwek gotab Israel, ak ogas komie, ee, gotab laitoriat, amu nyonjinok kiruoget; amu kioegu mestet eng’ Mispa, ak mestet ne u regereiywot ne kiitoi eng’ Tabor." 
Hosea5:2 Kigotes mising’ bistoik barisiet; ago agere kong’ ichek tugul. 
Hosea5:3 Angen Epraim, ama ung’at Israel eng’ ane: amu koiyai kugoinatet inye, ee, Epraim, kigong’wanit Israel." 
Hosea5:4 Machamjin ichek boisionikwak koweekyigei Kamuktaindenywa: amu tinyei tamirmirietab kugoinatet, amaingen Jehovah." 
Hosea5:5 Ak baoriani menotetab Israel eng’ tainnyi: ibutos anyun Israel ak Epraim eng’ tengektanywa; ibuti Juda agine koboto ichek. 
Hosea5:6 Bendi ichek koboto akwotisiekwak che bo kechirek ak che bo tuga, kocheng’ei Jehovah; ago manyoru inendet: kigoistoegei inendet ichek." 
Hosea5:7 Kigoberber Jehovah; amu kigosich lagok che kipsagarek; amei arawet ne kaleel ichek koboto mbarenikwak. 
Hosea5:8 Oguut igondit eng’ Gibea, ak oguut iriaget eng’ Rama: owaach eng’ Bet-aben; eng’ ole bo let eng’ inye, ee Benjamin." 
Hosea5:9 Egu karatia Epraim eng’ betutab keretab kong’: kiaboru eng’ kwenutab bororiosiekab Israel kit ne tun biitu. 
Hosea5:10 U bounikab Juda bik che inaktoe kiwotet: arong’jini ichek neregekyuk ko u beek. 
Hosea5:11 Kisastoe Epraim, kitiekyin ng’ony eng’ kiruoget; amu kichamei kosub ng’atutiet." 
Hosea5:12 A u anyun eng’ Epraim kiptorotiot, ak a u nunatet eng’ gotab Juda." 
Hosea5:13 Kigogeer Epraim miandanyi, ak kogeer Juda ng’otobosiekyik, kwo anyun Epraim Asuria, ak koyokto keguur laitoriat Jareb: ago maimuchi kosoobok, amainyaiywok ng’otobosiekwok." 
Hosea5:14 Amu aigeitu ng’etundo eng’ Epraim, ak aigeitu ng’etundo ne neran eng’ gotab Juda: agereri anendet ak awe; amuti, ama biitu chi ne soru." 
Hosea5:15 Aweekyinige anyun oldanyu, agoi kong’any chalwoktanywa, ak kocheng’a: cheng’a eng’ kagiiletab ge eng’ nyalildanywa." 
Hosea6:1 Obwa, keweekyige Jehovah: amu kigogererech ak konyaech; kigobirech ak inyoech." 
Hosea6:2 Isoobech ye ibata betusiek aeng’u: ak kong’eetech eng’ betut ne bo somok, ak kesopche eng’ tainnyi." 
Hosea6:3 Ongenai anyun, ongetes tai kenai Jehovah; mong’u iman ko u ye eechei: ak nyonjinech ko u ropta, ko u ropta ne bo let ne ibisi ng’ony." 
Hosea6:4 Ee Epraim, ayaun nee? Ee Juda, ayaun nee? Amu u mieindang’wong’ boldet ne bo karon, ak ko u rewot ne sib kobetei." 
Hosea6:5 Kiawai anyun ichek eng’ maotik; kiabare ichek ng’alekab kutinnyu: ak u kiruogutiguk lapkeiyet ne mong’u. 
Hosea6:6 Amu amache rirenetab ge, mamache tiseiywot; ak amache naet konai Kamuktaindet kosiir kagochinoik che kibeelei." 
Hosea6:7 Ago kigobistoe ichek kayomiset ko u Adam: kigoberbera eng’ oloto. 
Hosea6:8 Gilead ko nganasetab ichek che yaei tengekto, kigimuruon eng’ korotik." 
Hosea6:9 Ko u ye sapchin lugosiekab rebik chi, ko u noto kweanetab tisiik, barisioti eng’ oret ne tokyingei Sekem; ee, kigoyai yaitiet." 
Hosea6:10 Kiageer kit ne samis eng’ gotab Israel: mi kugoinatet, Epraim: kiging’wanit Israel." 
Hosea6:11 Ee Juda, mi kogeny kesisiet ne kigeng’atun, ye tun amutu kogeny bikyuk che kigeluul." 
Hosea7:1 Ye kata amache asoob Israel, kotook anyun tengektab Epraim, ak yaitietab Samaria; amu boisie lembechek: ak kwo orit chorindet, ak ng’emisiei lugetab rebik eng’ sang’." 
Hosea7:2 Ama ibwati eng’ mugulelwekwak kole abwati yaitienywa tugul: yiemei ichek anyun boisionikwak; mi tainnyu choto. 
Hosea7:3 Iboiboi laitoriat eng’ yaitienywa, ak koboiboi bounik eng’ lembechekwak." 
Hosea7:4 Ichek tugul ko bik che yaei ibetab ge; u kapkoima ole ilaali beelindetab makatinik; maiyuokyin mat koboch kokwanykwanyi makatiat agoi koguut. 
Hosea7:5 Kieeiso bounik kot kobogityo mising’ eng’ maiyek, eng’ betutab laitoriandennyo; kichuul eunnyi koboto chotik." 
Hosea7:6 Amu kigochob mugulelwekwak koigei kapkoima, kota kosaptoi ichek: ruei beelindetab makatinik kemout komugul; lalei karon ko u mat ne liblibeni." 
Hosea7:7 Beelei bich ichek tugul ko u kapkoima, ak koamei kiruogikwak; kigobutyo laitorinikwak tugul: mami eng’ ichek ne kuura." 
Hosea7:8 Buruchigei Epraim ak bororiosiek; Epraim ko makatiat ne ma kiwechwech. 
Hosea7:9 Kigoam kipsagarek kimnatennyi, ama naei, ee, mi kalwalek alage yu, komi alage yun, eng’ inendet, ama naei." 
Hosea7:10 Ak baoriani menotetab Israel eng’ tainnyi: agot ngo u noto ko ma weekyigei Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, anan kocheng’ inendet eng’ chuto tugul." 
Hosea7:11 U Epraim cheptuget ne berber, ne matinyei kaguiyet: kuurei Misri, bendi Asuria." 
Hosea7:12 Ye ba, aiitochi ichek mestennyu ne u regereiywot; atururu ko u taritikab barak: atigoni, ko u ye kigogas tuiyenywa." 
Hosea7:13 Bwa eng’ ichek! Amu kigoombeniot kometa: ingonyonji ichek ng’emisiet! Amu kigongelelja: agot nganda amache atiach ichek, ko kigomwa kora lembechek agobo ane." 
Hosea7:14 Ama rirja eng’ mugulelwekwak, ago iteitos eng’ itogusiekwak: iyumegei agobo bek ak divaik; ingeleljina." 
Hosea7:15 Agot nganda kianet ichek ak agimit eunekwak, kochobei yaitiet agobo ane." 
Hosea7:16 Weechigei, ago maweekyingei inendet ne mi barak; u kwanget ne ma litit: kibarei bounikwak eng’ rotwetab chok amu neregekab ng’elyebwekwak: egu nito chotisienywa eng’ emetab Misri." 
Hosea8:1 Kuut iriaget. Nyonjin gotab Jehovah ko u kipsichit: amu kigobistoe ichek kayomisennyu, ak kongelelji ng’atutikyuk." 
Hosea8:2 Tun rirjina kole, Kamuktaindennyu, kingenin achek Israel." 
Hosea8:3 Kigometa Israel kit ne ki mie: isubi bunyot inendet. 
Hosea8:4 Kigonde laitorinik, ago ma teebena; kigonde bounik, ama anai: kiyachigei kanamonik eng’ fedaisiekwak ak eng’ tahabusiekwak, si kobiit keisto." 
Hosea8:5 Kigometo moitang’ung’, ee Samaria, kagolalyo neregekyuk agobo ichek: tianitu si koek bik che matinyei tengek?" 
Hosea8:6 Amu kibunu nito Israel; kiyaei musogindet, ama Kamuktaindet: ee, kitonatoni moitab Samaria." 
Hosea8:7 Amu kolei usonet, ak kesei kipchurjuriet: matinyei bek che tonondos; maiitos itikab bek; ngot koiiyo, koamei kipsagarek kotarei." 
Hosea8:8 Kigelugui Israel: mi ichek nguno kwenutab bororiosiek ko u teret ne ma kotilei kiy. 
Hosea8:9 Amu kitogosta koba Asuria, ko u sigiriet ne bo timin ne mi inegei: kial Epraim chamanik." 
Hosea8:10 Ee, agot nganda alei eng’ bororiosiek, ayumi anyun ichek; ak kotoi kong’ering’itu amu lautietab laitoriatab bounik." 
Hosea8:11 Amu kigotes Epraim kapkorosusiek si koyae tengekto, kigoek kapkorosusiechoto tengek eng’ inendet." 
Hosea8:12 Agot nda asirjini inendet ng’atutikyuk eng’ konetisiosiek elfusiek taman, kiiti choto kele tugun che tounen." 
Hosea8:13 Ye enyei ichek tiseiywekab kagochinoikyuk, kogoitoi banyek ak koamei; ago mataachei Jehovah choto: ibwati anyun inendet tengektanywa, ak koiityi biret amu tengekwogikwak; weekyingei Misri." 
Hosea8:14 Amu kigoutie Israel Yaindennyi, ak koteech gorikab laitorinik; ak kigotes Juda nganasok che ng’ototin: ago ayokyini mat nganasokyik, ak kobeel irimoikyik." 
Hosea9:1 Amat ibaibaitu, ee Israel, ko u ye boiboitu bororiosiek; amu kiiyaate kugoinatet imete Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ak kiicham tuguk che kigoigoisie eng’ ruanyut age tugul." 
Hosea9:2 Mabaei ichek ruanyut ne kiborse ak ole kitue sabibuk, ak kobetyi inendet divaik che leelach." 
Hosea9:3 Mamenyei ichek emetab Jehovah; ago weekyingei Epraim Misri, ak koam amitwogik che ma tililen eng’ Asuria." 
Hosea9:4 Marong’jin Jehovah kagochinoikab divaik, amaiboiboi inendet: u tiseiywekwak eng’ ichek amitwogikab bik che rirtos; king’waniti ichek tugul che amei: bo amitwogikwak magenywa; magiibu kobwa gotab Jehovah." 
Hosea9:5 Tos oyae nee eng’ betutab tuiyet ne kiging’at, ak eng’ betutab igortab Jehovah?" 
Hosea9:6 Ogeero, kigoistoegei ng’emisiet, ago iyumi Misri ichek, ak tubei Mempis ichek: bunjin siwek tugukwak che kororon che bo feda: mi katok emaisiekwak." 
Hosea9:7 Kagoit betusiek che kiitu biret, kagoit betusiek che kiyaaktoisie; naei Israel noto: berber maotiot, amei iywek chito ne tinyei tamirmiriet, amu oindab tengektang’ung’, ak amu o bunyondit." 
Hosea9:8 Ki ribindet Epraim koboto Kamuktaindennyu: ago ne u maotiot, komi mestetab taritik ortinwekyik tugul, ak komi bunyondit gotab Kamuktaindennyi." 
Hosea9:9 Kigong’emgei mising’, ko u eng’ betusiekab Gibea: ibwati inendet tengektanywa, iityin biret amu tengekwogikwak." 
Hosea9:10 Kiageer ale u Israel sabibuk eng’ ong’atet; kiageer kwanisiekwok ale u tongoaniatab mogoiywet eng’ kenyinnyi ne bo tai: ago kibwanji Baal-Peor, kotabanjigei kioto samis, ak koek ichek kit ne kiwechei ko u kioto kichamei ichek." 
Hosea9:11 Tirireni torornatetab Epraim ko u taritiet: mabiitu sigisiet, ama mi ne chio, anan ne manachi." 
Hosea9:12 Agot nganda igui lagokwak, agochini kobegune lagok, si mang’et chi: ee, bwa kogeny eng’ ichek ye amete!" 
Hosea9:13 Kigiminji Epraim komasta ne kararan ko u ye kiageer Turo: ago imutyin Epraim lagokyik barindet. 
Hosea9:14 Igochi, ee Jehovah, tos igochini nee? Igochi moet ne rorogu ak kinaik che yaamnyotin." 
Hosea9:15 Mi yaitienywa tugul Gilgal; amu kiawech ichek eng’ oloto: aone ichek koba eng’ gonnyu amu yaitietab boisionikwak: ma achame kogeny; bistoik bounikwak tugul. 
Hosea9:16 Kogibir Epraim, kogoyaam tigitiondenywa, maiyiei logoek: ee, nganda iitos abare kora iyotenywa ne chamat." 
Hosea9:17 Onei Kamuktaindennyu ichek, amu kima kas it inendet: ak koek bik che ombenioti eng’ bororiosiek." 
Hosea10:1 Israel ko ketitab sabibuk ne tuneni kot, ne yiei logoekyik: kigotes inendet kapkorosusiekyik ko u ole te chang’indab logoekyik; kigoyai ichek tolochik che kororon ko u ole te kororonindab emennyi." 
Hosea10:2 Pcheat muguleldanywa; tinyei ng’ogisto: butei Jehovah kapkorosusiekwak, ng’emei tolochikwak." 
Hosea10:3 Mwaei anyun ichek nguno kole, Magitinye laitoriat: amu magiywei Jehovah; ak imuchi laitoriat koyaiywech nee?" 
Hosea10:4 Mwaei ichek ng’alek che bo buch, iyostos eng’ lembechek koyaei arorutik: bitei anyun kiruoget ko u ketit ne ng’wan eng’ mbaret ne ibatat." 
Hosea10:5 Iyweisiei mising’ bik che menyei Samaria amu kanamonikab moekab Bet-aben: amu rirjin bikab emonoto oloto, koboto tisiikyik che kiboiboitune kanamwonoto bo moita amu torornatennyi ne kiga koistoegei." 
Hosea10:6 Kiibei moato kwo Asuria koek kagochinet ne kiipchin laitoriat Jareb: nyoru Epraim tewernatet, ak ililanjin Israel kiruogennyi inegei." 
Hosea10:7 Kiistoi laitoriatab Samaria, ko u ye kiistoi bugat eng’ beek." 
Hosea10:8 King’emei kogeny komoswek che tororen che bo Aben, tengektab Israel: bitos katok ak katablelinik eng’ kapkorosusiekwak; ak kolenji ichek tulonok, Otuchech; ak kolenji tulonok che mengechen, Oluuljech." 
Hosea10:9 Ee Israel, kiiyai tengekto koboch betusiekab Gibea: kitononso eng’ oloto; si manam ichek boriet eng’ Gibea ne baregei ak lagokab tengekto." 
Hosea10:10 Atigoni ichek ye kamach; ak koyumgei bororiosiek koborie, ye kagiratyi ichek bistaosiekwak aeng’." 
Hosea10:11 Epraim ko roriat ne kiginet, ne chamei kobor bek; ago kiasiirte eng’ kaatinnyi ne kararan: aganapchini Epraim chito ne lanyei; ibatisiei Juda, birei Jakobo tindinyekyik." 
Hosea10:12 Ogoljige eng’ imanda, oges eng’ rirenet; obalu mbareng’wong’: amu kait betusiek che kicheng’ei Jehovah, kot konyo ak korobonjok imanda." 
Hosea10:13 Kiobat yaitiet, oges tengekto; kioam logoekab lembechek: amu kiimang’u oreng’ung’, eng’ chang’indab biguk che nyigonen." 
Hosea10:14 Biitu anyun wasetab ge eng’ biguk, ak keng’em irimoiguk tugul, ko u ye king’em Salmon Betarbel eng’ betutab boriet: kigitonaton kamet koboto lagokyik." 
Hosea10:15 Yaiywok anyun Bet-el ko u noto amu yaitieng’wong’ ne o: kibarei laitoriatab Israel ko kairir emet. 
Hosea11:1 Kiachame Israel ko ta ko ming’in, ak kiaguur werinnyu komong’ eng’ Misri." 
Hosea11:2 Kingoguur ichek bichoto, kotes koistoegei: kieng’ji Baalik, ak kibeelji nyamdutik kanamonik che kigiwai." 
Hosea11:3 Ago kianet Epraim kowendot; kiaganabate eng’ eunekyuk; ago kima nai kole kiasoobi ichek. 
Hosea11:4 Kiachuutune ichek boroonikab chi, koboto rogoonikab chamnyet; ak kia u eng’ ichek icheget che istoi chogit eng’ tagilgilikwak, ak kiande amitwogik tainywa." 
Hosea11:5 Maweekyingei inendet emetab Misri; ago egu Asuriaindet laitoriandennyi, amu kiesio ichek koweeigei." 
Hosea11:6 Ak kobutyi rotwetab chok nganasokyik, ak koges temeleiywekyik, ak koam ichek, amu kiruogutikwak." 
Hosea11:7 Kagobegechi bikyuk kochuchuigei kometa: agot ngo kuurso ichek koguurji ichek inendet ne mi barak, ko mabiitu ne itorori inendet." 
Hosea11:8 Amuktoi ano ameten, inye Epraim? Amuktoi ano asorun, inye Israel? Amuktoi ano ayain iige Adma? Amuktoi ano ayain iige Seboim? Kagowalak muguleldanyu, kagorira mo." 
Hosea11:9 Mayae koromnatetab neregekyuk, maweeksei ang’eme Epraim: amu a Kamuktaindet, ma a chi; Inendet ne Tilil ne mi kwenung’ung’: machute nganaset." 
Hosea11:10 Bendoti ichek kosuboti Jehovah, ne boriseni ko u ng’etundo: amu boriseni inendet, ak kobwa lagok kobotanionu kobunu cherongo." 
Hosea11:11 Bwanei kobotanionu ko u taritiet ne mong’une Misri, ak ko u cheptuget ne mong’une emetab Asuria: ak agochi ichek komeny gorikwak, mwaei Jehovah." 
Hosea11:12 Yiemena Epraim lembechek, koyiemena gotab Israel ng’alset: ago bounisiei Juda kora koboto Kamuktaindet, ak koyanat eng’ Inendet ne Tilil." 
Hosea12:1 Baegei Epraim usonet, ak kosuboti usonetab kong’asis: tesei kotugul lembechek ak ng’emisiet; ak koyomisegei koboto Asuria, ak keib mwanik koba Misri." 
Hosea12:2 Ibeligei kogeny Jehovah ak Juda, ak kobir Jakobo ko u ortinwekyik; yaakyin inendet ko u boisionikyik." 
Hosea12:3 Kinam kwariatab ng’etab kamet komi mo; ak kitinyei kimnatet koboto Kamuktaindet ko kagoeet: 
Hosea12:4 ee, kitinyei kimnatet koterter malaikaiyat, ak kiiterter: kirir, ak kosa inendet: kinyorji inendet Bet-el, ak king’alalwech eng’ oloto;" 
Hosea12:5 inendet Jehovah Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek; Jehovah ko kabwatennyi. 
Hosea12:6 Iweekyige anyun Kamuktaindeng’ung’: rib rirenet ak kiruoget, ak igen Kamuktaindeng’ung’ kotugul." 
Hosea12:7 Chemung’araindet inendet, mi eunnyi tuguk che kirogendoisie che bo ng’alset: chamei kosastais." 
Hosea12:8 Ak kimwa Epraim kole, Iman, kaaegu magoriot, kaanyoru magornatet: matun nyoru ichek yaitiet ne ki tengekto, eng’ boisionikyuk tugul." 
Hosea12:9 Ago a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koboch emetab Misri; taagonin kogeny imeny emaisiek, ko u eng’ betusiekab igorta ne kiging’at." 
Hosea12:10 Kiang’alalji maotik, ak kiates ng’ang’utik; ak kiaboisie kalewenaik eng’ boisietab maotik." 
Hosea12:11 Tos tengekto Gilead? Ichek tugul ko tangoita; enyei kirugik eng’ Gilgal: ee, u kapkorosusiekwak karurugutik eng’ mbaret ne ibatat." 
Hosea12:12 Ak kimwechi Jakobo emetab Aram, ak kiotis Israel agobo osotiot, ak kiiyagis si kobiit konyor osotiot." 
Hosea12:13 Ak kiimoong’ Jehovah Israel eng’ emetab Misri eng’ maotiot, ak kiribot maotiot inendet." 
Hosea12:14 Kitagis mising’ Epraim: noto anyun tebe korotikyik inendet, ak koweekyi Kiptaiyandennyi inendet tewernatennyi." 
Hosea13:1 Ye kingong’alal Epraim, kobiit botanet; kiitororgei eng’ Israel: ago kime ye kiingelel eng’ Baal." 
Hosea13:2 Ak yaei nguno ichek tengekto kosiir, ak koyachinegei fedaisiekwak kanamonik che kitanyi, kiyai kanamonik ko u naenywa, bo choto tugul boisietab kitang’ik: mwaei agobo tuguchoto kole, Ingong’utut moek bik che eng’sei." 
Hosea13:3 Kergeitu anyun ak boldetab karon, ak rewot ne sib kobetei, ak ko u metetek che ibei kipchurjuriet eng’ ruanyut ne kiborse, ak ko u iyeto ne mandoe soiyet." 
Hosea13:4 Ago, a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’ koboch emetab Misri: amecheng’jige cheptalelit ne ter, kobatena anege, ama mi yetindet age kobatena." 
Hosea13:5 Kianain eng’ ong’atet, eng’ emetab kemeut ne o." 
Hosea13:6 Kibiyong’so ko u kit ne ki u ole kiagete; kibiyong’so, ak kiitororgei eng’ mugulelwekwak: kigoutiena anyun." 
Hosea13:7 A u anyun eng’ icheget ng’etundo: asapchini eng’ oret ko u cheblanget: 
Hosea13:8 kituitosi ak ichek ko u tiondo ne u keerit ne kagibare arekyik, ak agerer kwambelelietab mugulelwekwak: ak agesu ichek eng’ yoto ko u ng’etundo; tonatoni tiondab timin ichek." 
Hosea13:9 Ng’emisieng’ung’ nito, ee Israel, amu igirindaa, igirindoi toretindeng’ung’." 
Hosea13:10 Mi ano anyun laitoriandeng’ung’, si kobiit kosorun eng’ nganasoguk tugul? Ak mi ano kiruogiguk, che kiimwa ile, Kona laitoriat ak bounik?" 
Hosea13:11 Kiagonin laitoriat eng’ neregekyuk, ak kiaiste eng’ neregekyuk." 
Hosea13:12 Ratat yaitietab Epraim, konorat tengektanyi." 
Hosea13:13 Bwanjin inendet arogenosiek che bo kwondo ne machei kosigis: inendet ko werit ne ma ng’om; amu kait betut ne ma nyoljin ko ta kotebe mo. 
Hosea13:14 Atiachi ichek komong’ eng’ kimnatet ne bo kererit; asoru ichek eng’ meet. Ee meet, mi ano korotweguk? Ee kererit, mi ano ng’emisieng’ung’? Ma awale kabwatutikyuk." 
Hosea13:15 Agot ngo nyor berurto inendet eng’ kwenutab tupchosiekyik, konyonei usonetab kong’asis, togosu kabusetab Jehovah eng’ ong’atet, ak koteny kondanyi ne bo beek, ak koteny kondametunnyi: luulei konoruetab tugukyik tugul." 
Hosea13:16 Ibei Samaria ng’ogistanyi; amu kigongelelji Kamuktaindennyi: ibutos eng’ rotwetab chok; kitonatoni lagokwak, ak kegerer kwonyikwak che tamonosiek." 
Hosea14:1 Ee Israel, weekyige Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’; amu kiibut eng’ tengektang’ung’." 
Hosea14:2 Ib ng’alek, ak iweekyige Jehovah: ilenji inendet: Iste tengekwogik tugul, ak itaach che miach: kigoitoi anyun kagochinetab kutuswekyok ne kata kigoitoi kirugik." 
Hosea14:3 Masoruech Asur; magilanye mbartanyisiek: ama kelenjini kogeny boisionikab eunekyok, O cheptalelisiekyok: amu nyorunenen rirenet ichek che matinyei kwanisiek." 
Hosea14:4 Asoobi kachuchugeng’wong’ bo ge, achame ichek mising’: amu kogoistoegei inendet neregekyuk." 
Hosea14:5 Aigeitu rewot eng’ Israel: yiei inendet ko u taptet ne kararan, ak kowakta tigitikyik ko u Lebanon." 
Hosea14:6 Iwaktoi temenikyik, ak koigei emdit kororonindanyi, ak koigei siptanyi Lebanon." 
Hosea14:7 Weeksei icheget che menyei uruennyi; soptos ko u bek, ak koyiei ko u ketitab sabibuk: igeitu ng’uunennyi ne bo divaikab Lebanon." 
Hosea14:8 Tun mwaei Epraim kole, Ta keting’ege nee kogeny ak kanamonik? Kaawolu, ak ageer inendet: a u biribiret ne tuon; bunwa logoeguk." 
Hosea14:9 Ng’o ne ng’om, si koguiyo tuguchuto? Ng’o ne utat, si konai tuguchoto? Amu lititen ortinwekab Jehovah, ak bendote che bo iman ortinwechoto; ago ibutyin oloto bistoik." 
Joel1:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Joel weritab Petuel, kole," 
Joel1:2 Ogas ng’olyondoni, okwek boisiek, ak oeb it, okwek tugul che omenye emet. Tos kibiit nito eng’ betusiekwok, anan eng’ betusiekab kwanisiekwok?" 
Joel1:3 Omwachi lagokwok agobo nito, ak ingomwachi lagokwok lagokwak, ak komwachi lagokwak ibinda age." 
Joel1:4 Kiam chereng’endet che kiituuch munene; ak kiam tinapchet che kiituuch chereng’endet; ak kiam masaek che kiituuch tinapchet. 
Joel1:5 Ong’eetye okwek kibogitinik, ak oririe; ak owaach, okwek tugul eeikab maiyek, amu maiyek che anyiny; amu kiistoi eng’ kutuswekwok." 
Joel1:6 Amu kagotogos emennyu bororiet ne kim, ne maiitoksei; kelekyik ko kelekab ng’etundo, ak kotinyei kipkermetok che bo ng’etundo ne o." 
Joel1:7 Kagong’em ketinnyu ne bo sabibuk, ak kobach mogoiywennyu: kigobony, ak kowirta; kagoleelagitu temenikyik." 
Joel1:8 Oteeiye ko u bergeiyat ne iyuegei kuniet agobo manong’otiotab ming’inatennyi. 
Joel1:9 Kageisto kagochinetab busiek ak kagochinet ne kieei eng’ gotab Jehovah; rirtos tisiik, kiboitinikab Jehovah." 
Joel1:10 Kagong’emak mbaret, rirei emet; amu kageng’em bek, kagoyaamnyo divaik che leelach, kagorarta mwanik." 
Joel1:11 Olilanse, ee okwek kabatik, oteiye, ee okwek saborikab ketikab sabibuk, agobo nganok ak sairik; amu kagong’emak kesisiet." 
Joel1:12 Kagoyaam ketitab sabibuk, ak kagores mogoiywet, kagoyaam ketitab logoek, koboto tiret agine, ak ketit age ne bo logoek, agot ketik tugul che bo mbar: amu kagores boiboiyet eng’ werikab bik." 
Joel1:13 Ogermenege kuniok, ak oteeiye, okwek tisiik; owaach, okwek kiboitinikab kaptisisiet; obwa, osieb kuniok kemout komugul, okwek kiboitinikab Kamuktaindennyu: amu kagiet kagochinetab busiek ak kagochinet ne kieei eng’ gotab Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Joel1:14 Otaban karugutetab ge, oguur tuiyet ne bo kaming’inetab ge, oyum boisiek koboto bik tugul che menyei emet kobwa gotab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ak orirji Jehovah." 
Joel1:15 Bwa amu betunoto! Amu kagorik betutab Jehovah, ak nyonei ko u ng’emisiet ne bunu Inendet ne bo Kamuktaet." 
Joel1:16 Tos ma kiisto amitwogik kegeerei, ee, koboto boiboiyet, ak kagasetab ge eng’ gotab Kamuktaindennyo?" 
Joel1:17 Nundos keswek eng’ ng’ung’unyekwak; kagong’emogis chogenik, kagebut chogenik; amu kagoyaamnyo bek." 
Joel1:18 Tigendos tiong’ik ne tia! Kaiimgei akwotisiekab tuga, amu mami ole agete; ee, nyalildos akwotisiekab kechirek." 
Joel1:19 Ee Jehovah, arirjinin: amu kagoges mat suswekab ong’atet, ak kagolalyo ketik tugul che bo timin." 
Joel1:20 Ee, isieng’jinin tiong’ikab timin: amu kagotenyo kererusiek ak kagoges mat suswekab ong’atet." 
Joel2:1 Oguut iriaget eng’ Sion, ak owaach eng’ tulwennyu ne tilil; ingobotanso bik tugul che menyei emet: amu nyonei betutab Jehovah, amu kagorik," 
Joel2:2 betutab mesundeito ak tuuindo, betutab bolik ak mesundeito ne nyigis, ko u ye machei korir emet eng’ tulonok; bororiet ne o ak ko kim, ne kitomo kobiitu ne u noto, ama kobiitu ne u ichek kogeny, agoi kenyisiekab ibinwek che chang’." 
Joel2:3 Amisiei mat eng’ tainywa; ak lalei liblibenetab mat eng’ let: u emet mbaretab Eden eng’ tainywa, ak kagoek ong’atet kityo ole bo let; ee, ma biit ne kachilile ichek." 
Joel2:4 U itondanywa itondab mbartanyisiek; ak koruaei ko u bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek. 
Joel2:5 U ruaenywa kirgirenetab karisiekab luget eng’ tulonok barak, ak ko u cheetab liblibenetab mat ne beelei mobek, ko u bik che kimen che tetegei eng’ boriet." 
Joel2:6 Bichiityin bororiosiek eng’ tainywa: walaksei togochikab bik tugul amu kaiyweisiet. 
Joel2:7 Ruaei ko u che nyigonen; lanyei irimet ko u bikab luget; wendi age tugul orennyi kotokyingei tai, bendi kibagenge." 
Joel2:8 Ama toortoi age age; wendi age tugul eng’ orennyi: siarei karik, ama mastoi." 
Joel2:9 Torombenjin nganaset; ruaei eng’ irimet; lanyei kobendi gorik orit; chutei tirisiok ko u chorik. 
Joel2:10 Botani emet eng’ tainywa; botandos kipsengwetisiek: imenitu asista ak arawet, ama koluu kecheik." 
Joel2:11 Ak kotwek Jehovah eng’ taitab lugennyi; amu o kabuureitanyi; amu kim inendet ne yaei ng’olyondennyi kosulda; amu o betutab Jehovah ak komuisei mising’; ng’o ne imuchi komuita? 
Joel2:12 Ago mwaei Jehovah kole, Oweekyage agot nguno eng’ mugulelwekwok tugul, eng’ karugutetab ge, ak eng’ rirek, ak eng’ kateeiyet:" 
Joel2:13 ak ogerer mugulelwekwok, amogerer ngoroikwok, ak oweekyige Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’: amu tinyei mieindo inendet ak ko nyiitat rirenet, masib konerechi, ak tinyei chang’indab rirenet, ak kowalei kabwatutikyik eng’ yaitiet." 
Joel2:14 Ng’o ne ingen ngo tos ma week ak kowal kabwatutikyik, ak kobagakta kaberuret eng’ ole kabunei, agot kagochinetab busiek ak kagochinet ne kieei ne kigochin Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’?" 
Joel2:15 Oguut iriaget eng’ Sion, otaban karugutetab ge, oguur tuiyet ne bo kaming’inetab ge:" 
Joel2:16 oyum bik, oanyiny tuiyet, oyum boisiek, oyum lagok, koboto che chuchuni: ingomong’ sandet eng’ gonnyi ne bo orit, ak ingomong’ agine mureret eng’ gonnyi." 
Joel2:17 Ingoririo tisiik, kiboitinikab Jehovah, eng’ kwenutab keterut ak kaptisisiet, ak ingomwa kole, Ee Jehovah, rire biguk, amegochi boroteng’ung’ kechot, kot koboi bororiosiek ichek: amu nee anyun si komwa bororiosiek kole, Mi ano Kamuktaindenywa?" 
Joel2:18 Kiam ng’etkong’ anyun Jehovah amu emennyi, ak kirire bikyik." 
Joel2:19 Ak kiwolji Jehovah bikyik kolenji, Ogeero, ayokwok bek ak divaik ak mwanik, ak obiyong’se eng’ choto: amayaok kogeny oegu che kichotei eng’ bororiosiek:" 
Joel2:20 ago aistoi kolooit eng’ okwek luget ne bunu murot ne bo katam, ak aone kwo emet ne ong’atet ak ko surkwen, bendi che indoi kotokyingei nyanjet ne mi kong’asis, kobendi che letu nyanjet ne mi cherongo; ak kobul, ak kong’u ne samis, amu kogoyai tuguk che eechen." 
Joel2:21 Ee emoni, ameiywei, igasge ak ibaibaitu, amu kogoyai Jehovah tuguk che eechen." 
Joel2:22 Amoiyweisie, okwek tiong’ikab timin, amu ta kobitos suswek eng’ ong’atet, amu yiei ketit logoekyik, yiei komie mogoiywet ak ketitab sabibuk." 
Joel2:23 Ogasge anyun, okwek lagokab Sion, ak oboiboitu eng’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’: amu konok ropta ne bo tai ko u ye nyolu, ak konu ropta korobonjok, ropta ne bo tai ak ne bo let, ko u eng’ tai." 
Joel2:24 Ak konyi bek ruanyusiek che kiborse, ak kong’irtagei divaik ak mwanik eng’ ole itendenjin." 
Joel2:25 Ak ageeruok che bo kenyisiek che kiam chereng’endet, ak tinapchet, masaek, ak munene, lugennyu ne o ne kiayogu konyo kwenung’wong’." 
Joel2:26 Ak oam che chang’ ak obiyong’se, ak olosu kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ne kiyaiywok tuguk che kikwong’e: ak ma kolilandos bikyuk kogeny." 
Joel2:27 Ak onai ole ami kwenutab Israel, ak onai ole a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, ama mi age: ak ma kolilandos bikyuk kogeny." 
Joel2:28 Ak ye ibata choto, ko tun arong’jini Tamirmiriennyu bik tugul; ak komaoten werikwok ak tibikwok, iruotyin boisiekwok karuotitaosiek, keerei murenikwok ng’ang’utik:" 
Joel2:29 ak arong’ji kogeny Tamirmiriennyu otwogik che murenik ak tibik eng’ betusiechoto. 
Joel2:30 Ak abarte kwong’utik eng’ kipsengwetisiek, ak eng’ ng’ony, korotik, ak mat, ak tolochikab iyeto." 
Joel2:31 Ak koimenit asista, ak koigei korotik arawet, kotom koit betut ne o ne imuisei ne bo Jehovah." 
Joel2:32 Ak tun kisoru age tugul ne kuurei kainetab Jehovah: amu tun mitei che chilildos eng’ tulwetab Sion ak Jerusalem, ko u ye kigomwa Jehovah, ak tun kuurei Jehovah alak eng’ ichek che king’et." 
Joel3:1 Amu, ogeero, tun ayumi bororiosiek tugul eng’ betusiechoto, ak eng’ betunoto, ye tun aweech kogeny che kiga keluul che bo Juda ak Jerusalem," 
Joel3:2 ak amut ichek koba atebwetab Jeosapat; ak aruokyi ichek eng’ oloto amu bikyuk ak amu borotennyu Israel, che kigoseerji bororiosiek, ak kopchei emennyu." 
Joel3:3 Ak kigoser barbarek agobo bikyuk: ak kigogoito ng’etet agobo chepkugoniot, ak kialda chepto agobo divaik, si kobiit koee." 
Joel3:4 Ee Turo, ak Sidon, ak komoswek tugul che bo Pilistia, otile nee eng’ ane? Tos ogeerua kiy ne bo kageeret? Ak ngot ogeerua, aweekwok kioto konyo meting’wong’ eng’ yoto, eng’ chokyinet." 
Joel3:5 Amu ko u ye kioib fedaisiekyuk ak tahabusiekyuk, ak oib tugukyuk che kororon mising’ koba hekalusiekwok;" 
Joel3:6 kioalde kogeny lagokab Juda ak lagokab Jerusalem oaldochi werikab Yunanik, si kobiit omut kolooegitu eng’ kiwotenywa:" 
Joel3:7 ogeero, ang’eeti ichek komong’ eng’ ole kioaldochi, ak aweekwok konyo meting’wong’ kioto ogeerunena;" 
Joel3:8 ak aalde werikwok ak tibikwok koba eutab lagokab Juda, ak koaldochi ichek bikab Sheba, bororiet ne loo: amu kagomwa Jehovah ng’olyondonito." 
Joel3:9 Omwaite ng’olyondoni eng’ bororiosiek; ochob luget: ong’eet bik che nyigonen; ingorik murenik tugul che bo luget, ingotogos." 
Joel3:10 Otany mogomboikwok che bo tuga koek rotokab chok, ak otany chepkesokwok koek ng’otwek: ingomwa ne nyalulat, kole, A kim." 
Joel3:11 Ochogu, obwa, okwek bororiosiek tugul che omi komoswek tugul ak oyumge: ee Jehovah, igochi cheguk che nyigonen kochorgei kobwa yu." 
Joel3:12 Ingong’eetgei bororiosiek, ak kobwa atebwetab Jeosapat: amu atebye eng’ oloto ak aruokyi bororiosiek tugul che mi komoswek tugul." 
Joel3:13 Ogese chepkeswet, amu kagorurio: obwa, otiech; amu kagonyi ole kitue divaik, ing’irtogei eng’ ole itendenjin, amu o yaitienywa." 
Joel3:14 Bik che chang’, bik che chang’ che mi atebwet ne kitile ng’alek! Amu kagorikyi betutab Jehovah atebwet ne kitile ng’alek." 
Joel3:15 Imenitu asista ak arawet, ama koluu kecheik," 
Joel3:16 ak boriseni Jehovah eng’ Sion, ak kotwek eng’ Jerusalem; ak botandos kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony: ago egu Jehovah ole mwechin bikyik, ak koek irimet eng’ lagokab Israel." 
Joel3:17 Onai anyun ole a Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’, amenye Sion tulwennyu ne tilil: tililitu anyun Jerusalem, ama kobunei toek kogeny." 
Joel3:18 Ak saune betunoto divaik che anyiny tulonok, ak rootune chego tulonok che mengechen, ak koroot beek che chang’ eng’ kererusiek tugul che bo Juda; ak komong’ kondametutab beek eng’ gotab Jehovah, ak kobis atebwetab Sitim." 
Joel3:19 Kuberi Misri, ak koek Edom ong’atet ne kigoguber, amu koromnatet ne kigiyachi lagokab Juda, amu kigotumda korotik che matinyei tengek eng’ emenywa." 
Joel3:20 Ago tebyei Juda koigeny, ak kotebyei Jerusalem eng’ ibinwek tugul." 
Joel3:21 Ak aanyiny korotikwak che tom aanyiny: amu menyei Jehovah Sion. 
Amos1:1 Ng’alekab Amos, ne ki agenge eng’ mestowekab Tekoa, che kigeer agobo Israel eng’ betusiekab Usia laitoriatab Juda, ak eng’ betusiekab Jeroboam weritab Joas laitoriatab Israel, eng’ kenyisiek aeng’ kotom kobotan emet." 
Amos1:2 Kimwa kole, Boriseni Jehovah eng’ Sion, ak kotwegu eng’ Jerusalem; ak koririo ole iyagisie mestowek, ak koyaam walitab Karmel." 
Amos1:3 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Damasko amu bistaosiekyik somok, ee agot ang’wan, amu kogobire Gilead tugukab karik che kibore bek:" 
Amos1:4 ago ayokyini mat gotab Hasael, ak kobeel gorikab laitoriat, che ki bo Ben-hadad." 
Amos1:5 Ak airi temeleiywotab Damasko, ak abar ne menyei atebwetab Aben, koboto inendet ne namei siaritab laitornatet, ne bunu gotab Eden: ak keluul bikab Suria, koba Kir, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos1:6 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Gasa amu bistaosiekyik somok, ee agot ang’wan; amu kiimut bik tugul koek luulenik, si kogoito koba Edom:" 
Amos1:7 ago ayokyini mat irimetab Gasa, ak kobeel gorikyik che bo laitoriat:" 
Amos1:8 ak aiste ne menyei Asdod, ak inendet ne namei siaritab Askelon; ak aweech eunnyu aborie Ekron, ak lustos che king’et che bo Pilistik, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Amos1:9 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Turo amu bistaosiekyik somok, ee agot ang’wan; amu kiigoito bik tugul koba Edom, ama ibwat kayomisutiet ne bo che tupcho:" 
Amos1:10 ago ayokyini mat irimetab Turo, ak kobeel gorikyik che bo laitoriat." 
Amos1:11 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Edom, amu bistaosiekyik somok, ee agot ang’wan; amu kione tupchennyi rotwetab chok, ak kiisto rirenetab ge tugul, ak kinerechi mising’ kotugul, ak kigonor neregekyik koigeny:" 
Amos1:12 ago ayokyini mat Teman, ak kobeel gorikab laitoriat eng’ Bosra." 
Amos1:13 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maawechi biret ne abire lagokab Amon amu bistaosiekyik somok, ee agot ang’wan; amu kogogerer kwonyik che tamanosiek che bo Gilead, kole si kobiit kotes kiwotenywa:" 
Amos1:14 ago anaami mat eng’ irimetab Raba, ak kobeel gorikyik che bo laitoriat, koboto waagat eng’ betutab boriet, koboto usonet ne o eng’ betutab kipchurjuriet:" 
Amos1:15 ak keluul laitoriandenywa, inendet koboto bounikyik, mwaei Jehovah."
