Amos2:1 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Moab amu bistaosiekyik somok, ee agot ang’wan; amu kibeel kowekab laitoriatab Edom kot koek orek:" 
Amos2:2 ago ayokyini mat Moab, ak kobeel gorikab laitoriat eng’ Keriot; ak kome Moab eng’ wasetab ge, ak waagat ak cheetab iriaget:" 
Amos2:3 ak aiste kiruogindet eng’ kwenunnyi, ak abar bounikyik tugul koboto inendet, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos2:4 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Juda amu bistaosiekyik somok, ee, agot ang’wan; amu kogoesio ng’atutikab Jehovah, ama rib kayomisutikyik, ak kogogochi lembechekwak ichek komasta, che kiisubi kwanisiekwak:" 
Amos2:5 ago ayokyini mat Juda, ak kobeel gorikab laitoriat eng’ Jerusalem." 
Amos2:6 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Maaweechi biret ne abire Israel amu bistaosiekyik somok, ee agot ang’wan; amu kogoaldae che bo iman feda, ak koaldae che matinyei kiy kweonik:" 
Amos2:7 che isienyi komachei temburiekab emet eng’ metowekab kibananok, ak komaas ortinwekab che taloen: ak koba kwanda ak werinnyi koipgei ak chepto agenge, si kong’wanit kainennyu ne tilil:" 
Amos2:8 ak koruiye ngoroik che kiname besendo eng’ ole negite kapkorosut age tugul, ak koee divaik eng’ gotab Kamuktaindanywa, che kigiibe bik che kigiruokyin." 
Amos2:9 Ago kiabar Amorindet eng’ tainywa, ne kiaechin koindanyi ak taragonik, ak ki kim ko u ketik che uuen; ak kiang’em logoekyik eng’ ole bo barak, ak tigitikyik eng’ ole bo ng’ony." 
Amos2:10 Ak kiamutwak kogeny otogosu eng’ emetab Misri, ak andoiywok kenyisiek artam eng’ ong’atet, si kobiit onam emetab Amorik kobunjok." 
Amos2:11 Ak kiande alak eng’ werikwok koek maotik, ak ande alak eng’ murenikwok koek Nasiritik. Tos ma u noto, ee okwek lagokab Israel? Mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos2:12 Ago koigochi Nasiritik divaik koee; ak ong’at maotik olenji, Amat omaoten." 
Amos2:13 Ogeero, agiichok eng’ ole omi, ko u ye chiilsei karit ne nyiitat ratutikab bek." 
Amos2:14 Ak kobetyi chepchebindo che mweei, amaigimiti che kimen kimnatenywa, ama sorugei ne nyigan:" 
Amos2:15 ama imuchi kotonon inendet ne namei kwanget, ma sorugei inendet ne chepcheb: ama sorugei inendet ne lanyei mbartanyit:" 
Amos2:16 ak komwei ach ngor eng’ betunoto inendet ne nyigan eng’ che nyigonen, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos3:1 Ogas ng’olyondoni kagomwa Jehovah agobo okwek, ee lagokab Israel, agobo got komugul ne bo Israel ne kiamutu kotogos eng’ emetab Misri, kole," 
Amos3:2 Okwege kityo che angen eng’ ortinwek tugul che bo ng’ony: aiitwok anyun biret amu tengekwogikwok tugul. 
Amos3:3 Tos bendat bik aeng’u ngot ko magasyindos? 
Amos3:4 Tos boriseni ng’etundo eng’ osnet ngo ma bar tiondo? Tos boriseni ng’etundo ne neran eng’ kebenennyi ngot ko ma am kiy? 
Amos3:5 Tos ibutyin taritiet mestet ne mi ng’ony eng’ ole mami mestet ne namei inendet? Tos iwir mestet ama twa kiy? 
Amos3:6 Tos kiguutei iriaget eng’ nganaset, ama iyweis bik? Tos nyonjin yaitiet nganaset, ama iyokyi Jehovah?" 
Amos3:7 Iman mayaei kiy Kiptaiyat Jehovah kotom kong’ang’ji ung’otiennyi otwogikyik maotik. 
Amos3:8 Kagoborisen ng’etundo, ng’o ne maiyweisiei? Kagong’alal Kiptaiyat Jehovah, ko ng’o anyun ne mamaoteni?" 
Amos3:9 Omwaite eng’ gorikab laitoriat eng’ Asdod, ak eng’ gorikab laitoriat che mi emetab Misri, ole, Oyumjige tulonokab Samaria, ak ogeer ole te wasetab ge ne o ne mi oloto, ak ole te sastaosiek che mi kwenunnyi." 
Amos3:10 Mwaei Jehovah kole, Amu maingen koyai ne mie, che konori koromnatet ak rebisiet eng’ gorikwak che bo laitoriat." 
Amos3:11 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Biitu bunyot, ne mi komoswek tugul eng’ emet: ak korebenen kimnateng’ung’, ak keng’em goriguk che bo laitoriat." 
Amos3:12 Mwaei anyun Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ko u ye soru mestowot kelyek aeng’ anan motwet ne bo itit eng’ kutitab ng’etundo; kisoru anyun ko u noto lagokab Israel che tebe Samaria eng’ luitab kit ne kilyeldoe, ak eng’ kiplusinik che bo aririt che bo itogut." 
Amos3:13 Ogas okwek, ak obaorianji gotab Jakobo, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek." 
Amos3:14 Amu eng’ betut ne tun aiityini biret Israel amu bistaosiekyik, aiityini kogeny biret kapkorosusiekab Bet-el, ak keisto kuinoikab kapkorosut, ak kobut." 
Amos3:15 Ak abut gotab betusiekab kaititiet koboto ne bo betusiekab lalang’indo; ak keng’em gorik che kigiteege kelekab belek, ak kogesgei gorik che eechen, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos4:1 Ogas ng’olyondoni, okwek tugab Basan, che mitei tulwetab Samaria, che sastoe kibananok, che tiekyin ng’ony che matinyei kiy, che lenjin kiptainikwak, Oibu, kee." 
Amos4:2 Kigoyosio Kiptaiyat Jehovah eng’ tililindanyi, kole, Ogeero, bwanjinok betusiek, che tun imutenok kombok, ak komute chekwok che ng’etu, kombok che kiname njirenik." 
Amos4:3 Ak omande obun komoswek che kibutok eng’ irimet, kotokyigei age tugul tainnyi; ak owirjige Harmon, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos4:4 Obwa Bet-el, si ongelelse; obwa Gilgal, si otes bistoet; ak oibu tiseiywekwok karonet age tugul, ak kebeberwekwok che bo taman eng’ betut age tugul ne bo somok;" 
Amos4:5 ak ogoite korosiotab kongoi ne bo kit ne kaginde mermerek, ak omwaite kagochinoikab chamnyet, ak obarte: amu ochame nito, ee lagokab Israel, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos4:6 Ak koagonok agine iljet eng’ nganasokwok tugul, rartaetab amitwogik eng’ komoswekwok tugul: ago tom oweekyage, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos4:7 Ak kiaetenak kogeny ropta, ye kitomo arawek somogu si koit kesisiet: ak kiagochi korobonji nganaset age, ak aeete ropta nganaset age: kirobonji komosta ne ming’in, ak kiyaam komosta ne ma robonji." 
Amos4:8 Koombeniot anyun nganasok aeng’u anan ko somok koba nganaset age si koee beek, ago ma yam: ago tom oweekyage, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos4:9 Kiabirenok chelalitiet ak uchatet: kiam munene mbarenikwok che chang’ ak mbarenikwok che bo sabibuk, ak mogoonikwok ak emitikwok: ago tom oweekyage, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos4:10 Kiayokwok koroito ko u ni ki bo Misri: kiabar murenikwok eng’ rotwetab chok, ak kiakweri mbartanyisiekwok; ak kiayai bulatetab nganaseng’wong’ kotogos kot koit serunekwok: ago tom oweekyage, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos4:11 Kiang’em agesu alak eng’ okwek, ko u ye king’em Kamuktaindet Sodom ak Gomora koges, ak kio u mecheita ne kaginemune mat: ago tom oweekyage, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos4:12 Ayaun ko u noto anyun, ee Israel: ak amu ayaun anyun ko u nito, choboge anyun otuiye ak Kamuktaindeng’ung’, ee Israel." 
Amos4:13 Amu, keero, inendet ne yaei tulonok, ak koyaei usonet, ak komwachin chi kabwatennyi, inendet ne yaei karonet koimenit, ak kotiechei komoswek che tororen che bo ng’ony; kainennyi ko Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek." 
Amos5:1 Ogas ng’olyondoni amwae eng’ rirek agobo okwek, ee gotab Israel." 
Amos5:2 Kagobut bergeiyatab Israel; ma kong’eetei kogeny: kagewirta eng’ emennyi: mami chi ne ing’eeti. 
Amos5:3 Amu mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni kole: Nganaset ne kocham komandoe bik elfut agenge kong’etyin bogulu, ak ne kocham komandoe bik bogolu kong’etyin tamanu, ng’etyin choto tugul gotab Israel." 
Amos5:4 Amu mwachin Jehovah gotab Israel ko u ni kole, Ocheng’a, si osopche:" 
Amos5:5 amocheng’ Bet-el, anan obe Gilgal, amosiirte obe Beer-seba: amu kiluulei iman Gilgal, ak koek buch Bet-el." 
Amos5:6 Ocheng’ Jehovah si osopche: si ma lal ko u mat eng’ gotab Josep, ak kobeel koges, ama biitu chi ne imisi eng’ Bet-el:" 
Amos5:7 okwek che oweechi kiruoget koek ng’wonet, ak owirjini ng’ony imanda;" 
Amos5:8 ocheng’ inendet ne yaei Koremerik ak Kapsomoguk, ak kowalei uruetab meet koek karonet, ak koyaei betut koek kemoi; inendet ne kuurei nyanjet ak korong’ji ng’ony; Jehovah kainennyi;" 
Amos5:9 ne ipchin che kimen ng’emisiet koche, si konyonji ng’emisiet irimet." 
Amos5:10 Wechei ichek inendet ne kerei kong’ eng’ ormarichet, ak kowechei ichek chito ne mwaei che litit." 
Amos5:11 Amu kiotiechatiech kibananok, ak omage ichek bek eng’ kimnatet: kioteech anyun gorik eng’ koik che kigiwai, ago momenye gorjoto; kiomin mbarenik che kororon che bo sabibuk, ago moee divaikwak." 
Amos5:12 Amu angen ole te chang’indab bistaosiekwok ak ole te oindab tengekwogikwok; okwek che onyalili bik che bo iman, che otaache tuguk che bo kagaigaet, ak omaasi che matinyei kiy eng’ ormarichet si manyor imandanywa." 
Amos5:13 Sisei anyun ne ng’om eng’ betusiek che u choto; amu yaachen betusiechoto. 
Amos5:14 Ocheng’ che miach, amocheng’ yaitiet, si osopche: si koteb kobotok Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, ko u ye omwae." 
Amos5:15 Owech yaitiet, ocham che miach, ak ogimit kiruoget eng’ ormarichet: abere imuchi korire Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, che king’et che bo Josep." 
Amos5:16 Mwaei anyun Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, inendet Kiptaiyat, ko u ni kole: Biitu kateeiyet eng’ ortinwek tugul che baraen; ak komwa eng’ ortinwek tugul kole, Bwa! Bwa! Ak koguur kabatindet konyo korir, ak koguur che ingen koteiyo, koririo." 
Amos5:17 Ak kobiit rirek eng’ mbarenik tugul che bo sabibuk: amu abune kwenung’ung’, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos5:18 Bwa eng’ okwek che omache betutab Jehovah! Amu nee si omache betutab Jehovah? Mesundeito betunoto, ma lapkeiyet;" 
Amos5:19 ko u ye kamwee chito ng’etundo, ak kotuiye tiondo ne u keerit; anan kwo go ak kotiing’e eunnyi inat, ak kosus erenet inendet." 
Amos5:20 Tos maimenitu betutab Jehovah ama lapkeitu? Ee, imenitu mising’ ama mi kaluunet?" 
Amos5:21 Aweche, asase igorwekwok, amabaibaitune tuiyosiekwok che bo kaming’inetab ge." 
Amos5:22 Ee, agot ngogona kagochinoikwok che kibeelei ak kagochinoikwok che bo busiek, ko mataache: amaiiti kagochinoikwok che bo kalyet, che bo che kiyagi che akwaen." 
Amos5:23 Oistoena cheetab tienwogikwok; amu mamache agas anyinyindab kibugandinikwok. 
Amos5:24 Ago ingoroot kiruoget ko u beek, ak ingoroot imanda ko u ainet ne nyiitat beek." 
Amos5:25 Ee gotab Israel, tos kima oibwa tiseiywek ak kagochinoik eng’ ong’atet kenyisiek artam?" 
Amos5:26 Ee, kooibote Sikut laitoriandeng’wong’, ak Kium kanamonikwok, kecheiyatab cheptaleling’wong’, che kioyachige." 
Amos5:27 Agoitook anyun keluulok, kimutak osiir Damasko, mwaei Jehovah, ne kainennyi ko Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek." 
Amos6:1 Bwa eng’ ichek che mi kalyet eng’ Sion, ak eng’ ichek che ribotin che mi tulwetab Samaria, bik che toogunotin che bo che eechen eng’ bororiosiek, che bwanjin gotab Israel!" 
Amos6:2 Osiirte oba Kalne, ak ogeer; ak obe eng’ oloto agoi Hamat ne o: yeityo ochorjige Gat ne bo Pilistik; tos miachen ichek kosiir bounatosiechu? Anan tos o kiwotenywa kosiir neng’wong’?" 
Amos6:3 Okwek che oistoi kolooit betut ne ya, ak oibu ng’echeretab koromnatet korik;" 
Amos6:4 ichek che ruitos eng’ itogusiek che bo kelekab belek, ak koiitogei eng’ tugukwak che kilyeldoe, che amei arekab kechir che bo akwet, ak moek che mi biusiek;" 
Amos6:5 ichek che tieni tienwogik che bo buch eng’ cheetab kibugandet; che chopchingei tuguk che bo tienwogik, ko u Daudi;" 
Amos6:6 che eei divaik eng’ bagulisiek, ak koiilegei mwanik che kororon; ago maarogendos agobo nyalildab Josep." 
Amos6:7 Kiluulei anyun koboto ichek che kisib keluul, ak kogesgei anyun bolatet ne bo boiboiyetab ichek che iitogei." 
Amos6:8 Kigoyosiechigei Kiptaiyat Jehovah, mwaei Jehovah, inendet Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek, kole: Aweche menotetab Jakobo, ak aweche gorikyik che bo laitoriat: asoru anyun nganaset koboto tugul che mi orit." 
Amos6:9 Ak ngot kong’et bik tamanu eng’ got agenge, kobegu." 
Amos6:10 Ak ye sut chi imamet, ne inendet ne beelei, si koib kowek komong’ eng’ go, ak kolenji inendet ne mi komoswek che bo orit che bo got, Tos ta omi ak age? Ak kole inendet, Achicha; kole anyun, Sis; amu magichamwech kemwa kainetab Jehovah." 
Amos6:11 Amu, ogeero, ng’atei Jehovah, kebut got ne o kong’emak, ak kebut got ne ming’in kong’asiagan." 
Amos6:12 Tos ruaei mbartanyisiek eng’ ruandet? Tos ibate chi eik oloto? Ko owal kiruoget koek kit ne ng’wan, ak owal logoek che bo imanda koek ng’wanet:" 
Amos6:13 okwek che oboiboitune kit ne bo buch, che omwae ole, Tos ma kiib eng’ kimnatennyo kuinoik kobunjech?" 
Amos6:14 Amu, ogeero, ang’eeti bororiet obarge, ee, gotab Israel, mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindet ne bo lugosiek; ak konyalilak koboch ole kibunei kebendi Hamat agoi kererut ne bo Araba." 
Amos7:1 Kiiborua Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni: ogeero, kiyai inendet chereng’enyinik ye kibitos tuguk che bo let; ogeero, ki tuguk che bo let che kibitos ye kingo kagobata ng’eetab suswek che bo laitoriat." 
Amos7:2 Ak ye kingo kagoam suswek koges eng’ emet, ale anyun, Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, asain ale, nyochi kaat: tonondoi ano Jakobo? Amu ming’in." 
Amos7:3 Kiwal Jehovah kabwatutikyik agobo nito: mabiitu ko u noto, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos7:4 Kiiborua Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni: ogeero, kiguur Kiptaiyat Jehovah mat kobelisie; ak kibeel riret ne o, ak komach koam emet." 
Amos7:5 Yeityo amwa ale, Ee Kiptaiyat Jehovah, asain ale, Isis; tonondoi ano Jakobo? Amu ming’in." 
Amos7:6 Kiwal Jehovah kabwatutikyik agobo nito: Mabiitu nito agine, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Amos7:7 Kiiborua inendet ko u ni: ogeero, kitonone Kiptaiyat ole negite inatut ne kigilitite borowet, kotinyei eng’ eunnyi borowet ne kilititisie." 
Amos7:8 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Amos, igeere nee? Ak kiale, Ageere borowet ne kilititisie. Kile anyun Kiptaiyat, Keero, andoi borowet ne kilititisie kwenutab bikyuk Israel; ma abune kogeny ole mi ichek:" 
Amos7:9 ak koguber komoswek che tororen che bo Isak, ak kebut oldinwek che tililen che bo Israel; ak ang’eet abar gotab Jeroboam eng’ rotwetab chok." 
Amos7:10 Kiiyokto anyun tisiindet Amasia ne bo Bet-el keguur Jeroboam laitoriatab Israel, kelenji, Kogochaamin Amos eng’ kwenutab gotab Israel: maimuchi emet komuita eng’ ng’alekyik tugul." 
Amos7:11 Amu mwaei Amos ko u ni kole, Kibarei Jeroboam eng’ rotwetab chok, ak keluul iman Israel kimut eng’ emennyi." 
Amos7:12 Kilenji kogeny Amasia Amos, Ee inye, keerindoni, ui mwechi emetab Juda, ak iamisie eng’ oloto, ak imaoten eng’ oloto:" 
Amos7:13 ago mat kota imaoten kogeny eng’ Bet-el: amu oloto ko oldo ne tilil ne bo laitoriat, ak ko gotab laitornatet." 
Amos7:14 Kiwolji anyun Amos Amasia, kolenji, Kima ko a maotiot, ak ki ma ko a weritab maotiot; ago kia mestowot, ak kia saborindetab mogoonik:" 
Amos7:15 ak kiimuta Jehovah ayagisiei, ak kilenja Jehovah, Ui maotenji bikyuk Israel." 
Amos7:16 Kas anyun nguno ng’olyotab Jehovah: Imwae inye ile, Amat imaotenji Israel agobo kiy ne ya, anan imwa ng’olyo agobo gotab Isak." 
Amos7:17 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole: Egu osotiondeng’ung’ chepkugoniot eng’ nganaset, ak kebare rotwetab chok weriguk ak tibiguk, ak kepchee borowet emeng’ung’; ak imee inyendet eng’ emet ne ng’wan, ak keluul iman Israel kimut eng’ emennyi." 
Amos8:1 Kiiborua Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni: ogeero, kitongetab logoek che bo kemeut." 
Amos8:2 Ak kilenja, Amos, igeere nee? Ak kialenji, Ageere kitongetab logoek che bo kemeut. Kilenja anyun Jehovah, Kanyonji kagesunet bikyuk Israel; ma abune kogeny ole mi ichek." 
Amos8:3 Ak koek tienwogik che bo hekalut kateeiyosiek eng’ betunoto, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah: chang’itu muswek; wirtoi muswechoto eng’ komosta age tugul eng’ sisek." 
Amos8:4 Ogas ng’olyondoni, ee okwek che olugui che matinyei kiy, ak che ogochini kibananok che bo emet kobek," 
Amos8:5 olen, Meei au arawet ne kaleel, si kobiit kealde bek? Ak igesugei au sabato, si kobiit kimarte bek? Si keyai epah koming’init, ak keyai sekel koeet, si keyai kaberberisiet eng’ tuguk che kirogendoisie che bo ng’alset;" 
Amos8:6 kole si kobiit keale kibananok feda, ak keale che matinyei kiy kweonik, ak kealde metetekab bek." 
Amos8:7 Kogoyosio Jehovah eng’ telunatetab Jakobo, kole, Magoi autie iman boisionikwak, agot agenge." 
Amos8:8 Tos mabotani emet amu nito, ak korir age tugul ne menyei oloto? Ee, ng’eetei komugul ko u Ainet; ak koiimgei ak koteny kogeny, ko u Ainet ne bo Misri." 
Amos8:9 Ak agochini kororokto asista bet kwen eng’ betunoto, ak agochini emet koimenit eng’ betut ne churat, mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah." 
Amos8:10 Ak awal igorwekwok koek rirek, ak awal tienwogikwok tugul koek kateiyet; ak agochi bik tugul kogermenegei kuniok, ak koam bosta chi tugul; ak ayae noto koek che kirirjin werit ne kigii inegei, ak ayae kagesunennyi koek betut ne ng’wan." 
Amos8:11 Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah kole, Ogeero, bwanei betusiek che ayokyini emet rubet, ma ne bo amitwogik, anan ne bo meleldab beek, ago rubet ne bo kasetab ng’alekab Jehovah." 
Amos8:12 Ak koombeniot kong’eete nyanjet age agoi nyanget age, ak kong’eete murot ne bo katam agoi kong’asis; tun ruaati kobendi komosi ak komosi kocheng’oti ng’olyotab Jehovah, ama tun nyoru." 
Amos8:13 Tun tanuitos bergeinik che kororon ak murenik eng’ betunoto, amu melelda." 
Amos8:14 Icheget che iyostos eng’ tengektab Samaria, kole, Ee Dan, ko u ye sobei Kamuktaindeng’ung’; ak ko u ye sobei oretab Beer-seba; ibutos choto agichek, amagoi ng’eetyo kogeny." 
Amos9:1 Kiageer Kiptaiyat kotonone ole negite kaptisisiet: ak kile, Kwer walisiekab tolochik, kot kotumdumgei tugatugik: yeityo itonaton walisiechoto eng’ metowekab ichek tugul; ak abere rotwetab chok che ng’etu: mamweei agot agenge eng’ ichek, ama chilili agot agenge." 
Amos9:2 Agot ngo bal agoi oldab che kigobek, konemu eunnyu eng’ oloto; agot ngo togosta kipsengwet, achooru eng’ oloto." 
Amos9:3 Agot ngo ung’egei tulwetab Karmel barak, acheng’e ak anemu eng’ oloto; agot ngo ung’enagei eng’ nyanjet orit, ang’ate eng’ oloto erenet, si kosus ichek." 
Amos9:4 Agot ngo luul bunikwak, ang’ate rotwetab chok eng’ oloto, si kobar ichek: ak atokyige ichek aipchi yaitiet, maipchini kit ne mie." 
Amos9:5 Amu Kiptaiyat Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ko inendet ne twaei emet si kochoot, ak koririo tugul che menyei oloto; ak ng’eetei emet komugul ko u Ainet; ak koteny kogeny ko u Ainet ne bo Misri." 
Amos9:6 Inendet ne teechei gorikyik eng’ kipsengwat, ne teechei yiemutiennyi eng’ baragutab ng’ony; inendet ne kuurei nyanjet ak korong’ji ng’ony; Jehovah kainennyi." 
Amos9:7 Tos mou lagokab Etiopik eng’ ane, ee lagokab Israel? Mwaei Jehovah. Tos ma amutu Israel kotogos eng’ emetab Misri, ak amutu Pilistik eng’ Kaptor, ak amutu Suriek eng’ Kir?" 
Amos9:8 Ogeero, keerei konyekab Kiptaiyat Jehovah bounatet ne tinyei tengekto, ak ang’em aiste eng’ ng’ony; kobate mang’eme agesu gotab Jakobo, mwaei Jehovah." 
Amos9:9 Amu, ogeero, ang’ate, ak ases gotab Israel eng’ bororiosiek tugul, ko u ye kisesei bek eng’ kit ne kisesisie, ago maibutyin ng’ony baiywat, agot ne ming’in." 
Amos9:10 Begu eng’ rotwetab chok kiptengeginik tugul che bo bikyuk, che len, Maityinech yaitiet anan konyoruech." 
Amos9:11 Ang’eeti eng’ betunoto emaitab Daudi ne kigobut, ak agerate ole kibutok; ak atuuru karatwekyik, ak ateech koigei ne ki bo betusiek che bo keny." 
Amos9:12 Si kobiit konam ichek bik che king’et che bo Edom, koboto bororiosiek tugul, che kimwaitoe kainennyu, kobunji, mwaei Jehovah ne yaei ng’olyondonito." 
Amos9:13 Ogeero, bwanei betusiek, mwaei Jehovah, che nyo kosiirtoe chito ne ibatisiei kesindet, ak kosiirtoe chito ne tiechei sabibuk kolindet; ak kosaune tulonok divaik che anyiny, ak kochootyo tulonok tugul che mengechen." 
Amos9:14 Ak amutu kogeny bikyuk Israel che kiga keluul, ak koteech nganasok che kiga koek karatwek, ak komeny oloto; ak komin mbarenikab sabibuk, ak koeei divaikab mbarenichato; ak kobatis, ak koam logoekab mbarenichato." 
Amos9:15 Ak amin ichek eng’ emenywa, ama kitutu kogeny eng’ emenywa ne kiagochi, mwaei Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’." 
Obadiah1:1 Ng’ang’utietab Obadia. Mwaei Kiptaiyat Jehovah ko u ni agobo Edom: Kigegas ng’alek che bunu Jehovah, ak kigiyokto tononjinindet kwo oldab bororiosiek, kolenji, Ong’eetye, ong’eetye, kegirinde inendet eng’ luget." 
Obadiah1:2 Keero, kiaming’inin eng’ bororiosiek: kisasin mising’." 
Obadiah1:3 Kigoberberin menotetab muguleldang’ung’, ee inye ne imenye ole kibetak eng’ ruandet, ne toror meng’otennyi; ne mwaei eng’ muguleldanyi kole, Ng’o ne tururwa?" 
Obadiah1:4 Agot ngitiriren iwe barak mising’ ko u kipsichit, agot ngiteech kesweng’ung’ ole mi kecheik, atururun eng’ oloto, mwaei Jehovah." 
Obadiah1:5 Ngot kobwanjin chorik, ngot kobwanjin rebik kemoi, (kebarin ne tia anyun!) Ko tos machorsei kot konyor che yamei? Ngot kobwanjin bik che butei sabibuk, ko tos mabagaktoi turonik?" 
Obadiah1:6 Kisiaktoi ano tugukab Esau! Kicheng’doi ano konoraikyik che ung’otin! 
Obadiah1:7 Kigoonin bik tugul che kionamege kot iit kiwoto: kigong’alin bik che kioting’ege kalyet, ak koterterin; riichin ichek che amei amitwogiguk: matinyei kaguiyet inendet." 
Obadiah1:8 Tos mang’eme bik che ng’omen che bo Edom, eng’ betunoto, mwaei Jehovah, ak ang’em naet eng’ tulwetab Esau?" 
Obadiah1:9 Ak toptobendos mureniguk che nyigonen, ee Teman, si kobiit kebar chi age tugul eng’ tulwetab Esau eng’ barisiet." 
Obadiah1:10 Tuchin tewernatet amu koromnatet ne kiiyachi ng’etab komet Jakobo, ak kebarin ak keisten koigeny." 
Obadiah1:11 Eng’ betut ne kiitononi eng’ bitonin, eng’ betut ne kiibe toek tugukyik, ak kochut kipsagarek ormarichokyik, ak koser barbarek agobo Jerusalem, ko kiige inye age eng’ ichek." 
Obadiah1:12 Ago amat igeer betutab ng’etab komet eng’ betutab tiritindanyi, amebaibaitu eng’ lagokab Juda eng’ betutab ng’emisienywa; anan ing’alal eng’ menotet eng’ betutab bichiindo." 
Obadiah1:13 Amechut ormarichetab bikyuk eng’ betutab nyalildanywa; ee, amegeer usisienywa eng’ betutab nyalildanywa, anan onam tugukwak eng’ betutab nyalildanywa." 
Obadiah1:14 Ametonone ole tuiyechin ortinwek, ile itilde bikyik che chilildos; amegoite bikyik che ng’etu eng’ betutab bichiindo." 
Obadiah1:15 Amu karikyi betutab Jehovah bororiosiek tugul: ko u ye kiiyai keyaun ko u noto; weekyingei meting’ung’ boisioniguk. 
Obadiah1:16 Amu ko u ye kioeeise eng’ tulwennyu ne tilil, eeisei ko u noto kotugul bororiosiek tugul, ee, eeisei, ak koterteriot, ak koigei tuguk che kima komi." 
Obadiah1:17 Ago biitu che chilildos eng’ tulwetab Sion, ak kotililit; ak konam gotab Jakobo tugukab bichoto, kobunji." 
Obadiah1:18 Ak koek gotab Jakobo mat, ak koek gotab Josep liblibenet, ak koek gotab Esau mobek, ak kolalyo eng’ kwenunywa ak kobeel koges: ama ng’etu chi eng’ gotab Esau; amu kagomwa Jehovah ng’olyondonito." 
Obadiah1:19 Ak konam ichek che bo Murot ne to Tai tulwetab Esau kobunji; ak konam ichek che menyei emet ne soi, Pilistik: ak konam emetab Epraim kobunji, ak emetab Samaria: ak konam Benjamin Gilead." 
Obadiah1:20 Ak konam che kiga keluul che bo lugonito bo lagokab Israel che mi kwenutab Kananik, namei ichek kot koit Sarepat; ak namei che kiga keluul che bo Jerusalem, ne mi Separad, nganasok che mi Murot ne bo Tai." 
Obadiah1:21 Ak togosu sorunik tulwetab Sion koruokyi tulwetab Esau; ak kobunji bounatet Jehovah. 
Jonah1:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jona weritab Amitai, kolenji," 
Jonah1:2 Ng’eet, ui Ninebe, nganasanato o, ak ititenji; amu kagotogos yaitienywa tainnyu." 
Jonah1:3 Ago king’eet Jona kolen komwechi Tarsis komwee Jehovah; ak kichortagei kwo Jopa, ak konyor melit ne wendi Tarsis: kiigoito anyun tuguk che yamegei ak banda, ak kolany melinoto, kole koba tugul Tarsis komwee Jehovah." 
Jonah1:4 Ago kiiyokyi Jehovah nyanjet usonet ne o, ak kibiit kipchurjuriet ne o mising’ eng’ nyanjet, kot komach kobutok melit," 
Jonah1:5 kiiyweis anyun kiboitinikab melit, ak korirji chi age tugul cheptalelinnyi; ak kiwirji nyanjet tuguk che kimi melit, kole kowisisit. Ago kiga kwo Jona komoswek che bo orit mising’ che bo melit; ak kiru, konuuch." 
Jonah1:6 Kiwa anyun kiptaiyatab melit ole mi inendet, ak kolenji, I lyon inye chichi irue? Ng’eet, kuur Kamuktaindeng’ung’, tamangab kobwatech Kamuktaindet si ma kibegu." 
Jonah1:7 Ak kilenji age tugul choruennyi, Nyo, ak ongeser barbarek, si kobiit kenai kele kanyonjech yaitioni amu ng’o. Kiser anyun barbarek, ak kobutyi barbariat Jona." 
Jonah1:8 Kimwachi anyun inendet kolenji, Kisomin kele mwawech, bo ng’o yaitioni kanyonjech; nee boisieng’ung’? Ak ibunu ano? Ano emeng’ung’? Ak ano bororieng’ung’?" 
Jonah1:9 Ak kilenji ichek, A Hebranindet, ak aiywei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab kipsengwet, ne kiyai nyanjet ak emet." 
Jonah1:10 Kiiyweis anyun bik mising’, ak kolenji inendet, Nee kiito koiyai? Amu kinai bik kole kamwee Jehovah; amu kiga komwachi ichek." 
Jonah1:11 Koteebe anyun bichoto inendet kolenji, Kiiten nee, si kosis nyanjet? Amu kitesak mising’ wasetab ge ne bo nyanjet." 
Jonah1:12 Ak kilenji ichek, Oganaba, ak owirja nyanjet; si kosis nyanjet: amu angen ale kanyonjok usononi o mising’ amu ane." 
Jonah1:13 Ago kiwaas bichoto beek eng’ kimnatet kolen kokweri melit koweek kwo ngegut; ago ma imuch: amu kitesak mising’ wasetab ge ne bo nyanjet kogirinda ichek. 
Jonah1:14 Kirirji anyun Jehovah kolenji, Kisomin mising’, ee Jehovah, kisomin mising’ kele, amengebegu agobo sobondab chichi, ameityech korotik che matinyei tengek: ee Jehovah, amu kaiyai inye ko u ye kecham." 
Jonah1:15 Koganab anyun Jona, ak kowirji nyanjet: kosis anyun nyanjet eng’ wasetab ge." 
Jonah1:16 Koiywei anyun bichoto Jehovah mising’; ak koeng’ji Jehovah tiseiywot, ak koyosio." 
Jonah1:17 Ak kichob Jehovah njiriot ne o si kobiit kolugui Jona; ak kitebe Jona moetab njiriot betusiek somok ak kemousiek somok. 
Jonah2:1 Kisa anyun Jona Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi komi moetab njiriot," 
Jonah2:2 Ak kile, Kiaguur Jehovah eng’ nyalildanyu, Ak kiwolwa; Kiaguurse ami oldab che kigobek, Ak kiigas kutinnyu." 
Jonah2:3 Amu kiiwirja riret, eng’ kwenutab nyanjosiek, Ak kiyiema maranet; Kigomaluucha beeguk tugul che mildogei ak che somotitogei." 
Jonah2:4 Ak kiamwa ale, Kagewirta si ma igeera; Ago ta atokyinige hekalung’ung’ ne tilil." 
Jonah2:5 Kiyiema beek, agoi sobondanyu; Kiyiema riret; Kirat metinnyu cherungusiek." 
Jonah2:6 Kiachortege agoi kelusiekab tulonok; Kirata ng’ony koboto temeleiywekyik agoi: Ago kiimutu kora sobondanyu komong’ eng’ keringet, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu." 
Jonah2:7 Ye kitanui sobondanyu, abwat anyun Jehovah: Ak kiit ole imi saennyu, agoi hekalung’ung’ ne tilil." 
Jonah2:8 Istoegei rirenenywa bo ge Ichek che isubi atebosiek che ma nyolu che bo lembech. 
Jonah2:9 Ago aeng’un tiseiywot ne amwae kongoi; Ayaagun che kiaarorun. Bo Jehovah yetunet. 
Jonah2:10 Ak king’alalji Jehovah njiriot, ak kiing’ung’ Jona konyo emet." 
Jonah3:1 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Jona ne bo aeng’, kolenji," 
Jonah3:2 Ng’eet, ui Ninebe, nganasanato o, ak iamdachi ng’alek che amwaun." 
Jonah3:3 Kong’eet anyun Jona kwo Ninebe, ko u ng’olyotab Jehovah. Ki nganaset ne o mising’ Ninebe, kibunei chito eng’ betusiek somok." 
Jonah3:4 Ak kitoi Jona kochut nganaset eng’ bandab betut agenge, ak kiititen kole, Tomo betusiek artamu si keng’em Ninebe." 
Jonah3:5 Ak kiiyan bikab Ninebe Kamuktaindet; ak kimwaita karugutetab ge, ak kiilaach kuniok, koboch ne o agoi ne ming’in." 
Jonah3:6 Ak kiit ng’alek oldab laitoriatab Ninebe, ak king’eet eng’ ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet ak koreek ngoriennyi, ak kotugegei kuniok, ak kotebe orek." 
Jonah3:7 Ak kimwaita ak kobarta eng’ Ninebe komugul eng’ ng’atutietab laitoriat ak bikyik che toogunotin, kole, Amat kochamjam kiy chi anan tiony, anan akwetab tuga, anan ko ne bo kechirek: amat koamis, anan koee beek:" 
Jonah3:8 ago ingetuge ichek tugul kuniok, chi ak tiony, ak ingorirji Kamuktaindet eng’ kimnatet: ee, ingoweek chi tugul kometo orennyi ne ya, ak kometo koromnatet ne mi eunekwak." 
Jonah3:9 Ng’o ne ingen ngo tos ma week Kamuktaindet ak kowal kabwatutikyik, ak kometo neregekyik che koromen, si ma kibegu?" 
Jonah3:10 Ak kigeer Kamuktaindet boisionikwak, kole kaweek kometo orenywa ne ya; ak kiwal Kamuktaindet kabwatutikyik agobo yaitiet, ne kiga mwa kole yachin ichek; ak mata koyai." 
Jonah4:1 Ago kima ibaibai Jona ng’olyondonoto agot kitigin, ak kinerech." 
Jonah4:2 Ak kisa Jehovah kole, Asain, ee Jehovah, tos ma ng’olyondonito ne kigamwa ye kingota ami emennyu? Kiamwei anyun achakte awe Tarsis: amu kiangen ale i Kamuktaindet ne bo mieindo, ak ne nyiitat rirenet, ne ma sib konerechi, ak kotinyei chang’indab rirenet, ak iwale kabwatutiguk agobo yaitiet." 
Jonah4:3 Ara anyun, ee Jehovah, asomin mising’ ale, istoena sobondanyu; amu kaigai eng’ ane ame kosiir asob." 
Jonah4:4 Ak kile Jehovah, Tos iyae ne mie nginerech?" 
Jonah4:5 Kiwa anyun Jona sang’utab nganaset, ak koteb ng’ony eng’ komostab kong’asis ne bo nganaset, ak koteekyigei keriet eng’ oloto, ak koteb ng’ony kouure, kot kogeer kit ne biitu eng’ nganaset." 
Jonah4:6 Ak kichob Jehovah Kamuktaindet silangwet, ak kogochi kobit kotuch Jona, si kobiit kouur inendet ak kosor inendet eng’ kaiimennyi bo ge. Kibaibaitune anyun Jona silangwanato mising’." 
Jonah4:7 Ago kingoeech eng’ betut ne bo aeng’, kochob Kamuktaindet kutiet, ak kisus silangwanato, ak kires." 
Jonah4:8 Ak kingochor asista kochob Kamuktaindet usonet ne bunu kong’asis ne imelisiei; ak kibeel asista metitab Jona, kot kotanui, ak kisomjigei kole kome, ak kile, Kaigai eng’ ane ame kosiir asob." 
Jonah4:9 Kilenji Kamuktaindet Jona, Tos iyae ne mie nginerech agobo silangwet? Ak kile, Kayai ne mie nganerechi agoi meet." 
Jonah4:10 Ak kile Jehovah, Kerire silangwet, ne koma iyae, ak ko ma ibiiti; ne kobit kemout agenge, ak kong’emak kemout agenge:" 
Jonah4:11 tos manyoljina arire Ninebe, nganasanato o; ole mi bik che siirei elfusiek bogol ak tiptem che maibestos eunywa ne bo tai ak eunywa ne bo katam; ak komi kogeny tuga che chang’?" 
Micah1:1 Ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kinyonji Mika Morastindet eng’ betusiekab Jotam, Ahas, ak Hesekia, laitorinikab Juda, ne kigeer agobo Samaria ak Jerusalem." 
Micah1:2 Ogas okwek bororiosiek, okwek tugul, oepchi it, ee ng’ony, ak tugul che mi oloto: ak ingoek Kiptaiyat Jehovah baoriat eng’ okwek, Kiptaiyat ne mi hekalunnyi ne tilil." 
Micah1:3 Amu, ogeero, mong’u Jehovah eng’ oldanyi, ak kochorgei, ak kotiech komoswek che tororen che bo ng’ony." 
Micah1:4 Ak kochootyo tulonok eng’ kelyekyik, ak kobetogis atebwosiek, ko u ye chotei temeniet ko kauchi mat, ko u beek che kirandoi eng’ ole keigei." 
Micah1:5 Biitu chuto amu bistoetab Jakobo, ak amu tengekwogikab gotab Israel. Nee bistoetab Jakobo? Tos ma Samaria? Ak nee komoswek che tororen che bo Juda? Tos ma Jerusalem?" 
Micah1:6 Ayae anyun Samaria koek karurugutietab emet, ak koigei ole kiminjin sabibuk: ak atumde koikyik koba atebwet, ak ang’any lumeiywekyik." 
Micah1:7 Ak kebir ketuatui kanamonikyik tugul che kigiwai, ak kebeel melekwekyik tugul, ak ang’em kanamonikyik tugul: amu kiiyumune choto melektab kugoinatet, ak koweekyigei melektab kugoinatet." 
Micah1:8 Ateei ak awaache amu nito, awendi ko kagireegunena ngoroik ak ami ach ngor: ateei ko u lelwek, ak arire ko u tiong’ikab songolik." 
Micah1:9 Amu ma inyaoksei ng’otobosiekyik: amu kagonyo kot koit Juda; itei ormarichetab bikyuk, agoi Jerusalem." 
Micah1:10 Amat imwaite ng’olyondonito eng’ Gat, amat irir agot kitigin: kiamildaege temburiek eng’ Bet-le-Apra." 
Micah1:11 Osiirte, ee okwek bik che omenye Sapir, osiirte omi ach ngor ak kalilanet: tomo komong’ chito ne menyei Saanan; rebenok kateiyetab Bet-esel kinnyi ne tonone." 
Micah1:12 Amu igeni mising’ chito ne menyei Marot kole konyor mieindo: amu kachorjigei yaitiet ormarichetab Jerusalem kobunu Jehovah. 
Micah1:13 Ratyi karitab luget mbartanyit ne chepcheb, ee inye chito ne imenye Lakis: ki taunindetab tengekto inendet ne bo cheptab Sion; amu kiginyorjin bistaosiekab Israel." 
Micah1:14 Igochini anyun Moreset-gat kagochinetab saisere: egu gorikab Aksib kit ne bo ng’alset eng’ laitorinikab Israel. 
Micah1:15 Ta amutun chito ne nyonei konamin ibunji, ee inye ne imenye Maresa: itei torornatetab Israel Adulam." 
Micah1:16 Ingochurin met, ak icheru meting’ung’ agobo lagok che iboiboin: tes bostang’ung’ si koigei ne bo chepsengwet; amu kageluul ichek eng’ ole imi." 
Micah2:1 Bwa eng’ ichek che chobei tengekto ak kotilei eng’ itogusiekwak ole yaitoi yaitiet! Ye kagoeech koyaei, amu tinyei kimnatet koyai." 
Micah2:2 Kasei miat mbarenik, ak koreb; koboto gorik, ak koib: ak kous chito koboto gonnyi, chito koboto tugukyik." 
Micah2:3 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole: Ogeero, achobe yaitiet agobo goi, ne moistoe kaatwekwok anan obendate menotet; amu yaachen betusiechoto." 
Micah2:4 Mwaei eng’ betunoto kalewenet agobo inye, ak korir eng’ rirek che ng’wonen, kole, Kageng’emech kigeswech: walei kebebertab bikyuk: istoena kiito kot koit ano! Pchechin ngelelik mbarenikyok." 
Micah2:5 Menyoru anyun chito ne wirtoi borowet eng’ barbariat eng’ tuiyetab Jehovah. 
Micah2:6 Mwaei ichek kole, Amomaoten. Mamaotenjin ichek chuto: mabetos chotisiosiek." 
Micah2:7 Ee gotab Jakobo, tos kimwae kele, Tos rartaat Tamirmirietab Jehovah? Tos boisionikyik chuto? Tos mayachin ng’alekyuk ne mie inendet ne wendote imanda?" 
Micah2:8 Ago kota koboriena bikyuk ko u bunyot: oreegune ngoriet ne tabanu barak ichek che siirtoi eng’ kalyet, ko u bik che machamei luget." 
Micah2:9 Otimdoi kwonyikab bikyuk koba eng’ gorikwak che kororon; orebe torornatennyu lagokwak agoi. 
Micah2:10 Ong’eetye, ak obe; amu ma olito ole omuung’e: amu muruonindo ne ng’emisiei, ee, ng’emisiet ne ya kot." 
Micah2:11 Ngot komwa lembech chito ne wendoti eng’ usonet ak lembechek, kole, Amaotenun agobo divaik ak maiyek; koegu inendet maotiotab bichu." 
Micah2:12 Ee Jakobo, ayumok iman okwek tugul; ayumi iman che king’et che bo Israel; ayumi ichek ko u kechirekab Bosra: ko u akwetab kechirek eng’ kwenutab ole agete, boldos kot amu chang’indab bik." 
Micah2:13 Kagondoe butindet ichek: kagobutis ak koba agoi ormarichet, ak komandae yoto: kagondoe ichek laitoriandenywa, ak komi tainywa Jehovah." 
Micah3:1 Kiamwa ale, Ogaso, asomok okwek kandoikab Jakobo, ak bounikab gotab Israel: tos manyoljok onai kiruoget?" 
Micah3:2 Che oweche mieindo ak ochame yaitiet; che onemu irirenikwak koboto banyekwak eng’ kowekwak; 
Micah3:3 che amei kogeny banyekab bikyuk; ak koenyei irirenikwak, ak koiri kowekwak: ee, tonatoni, ko u che kindoi teret, ak ko u banyek che kiyoi eng’ saburiet." 
Micah3:4 Ye ibata korirji Jehovah, ago mawoljin: ee, ung’e togennyi ichek eng’ betusiechoto, ko u ye kiyai yaitiet eng’ boisionikwak." 
Micah3:5 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni agobo maotik che igochin bikyuk kolel; che susisiei eng’ kelekwak ak kowaachei kole, Kalyet; ak age tugul ne mabaei ichek kochobei luget agobo inendet:" 
Micah3:6 egu anyun kemout eng’ okwek, si mogeer ng’ang’utiet; ak koimenit eng’ okwek si ma ong’orsei; ak kororokto asista eng’ maotik, ak koimenit betut eng’ ichek." 
Micah3:7 Ak kolilanso keerik, ak kotoptobenso bik che ng’orsei, ee, ak kagonamgei kut tugul: amu mami wolunet ne bunu Kamuktaindet." 
Micah3:8 Ago kanyiia iman kimnatet eng’ Tamirmirietab Jehovah, ak eng’ kiruoget, ak eng’ kamuget, si kobiit amwachi Jakobo bistoennyi, ak amwachi Israel tengektanyi." 
Micah3:9 Asomok anyun ale ogas nito, okwek kandoikab gotab Jakobo, ak bounikab gotab Israel, che oweche kiruoget, ak omaasi imanda tugul." 
Micah3:10 Teege Sion korotik, ak koteege Jerusalem tengekto." 
Micah3:11 Iruochi kandoik amu tuguk che kigoigoisie ak inetisiei tisiik amu melekto, ak kong’orsei maotikyik amu siling’isiek: nganda u noto kotiiegei Jehovah ak kolen, Tos mami Jehovah kwenunnyo? Mami yaitiet ne nyonjinech." 
Micah3:12 Kibati anyun Sion agobo okwek ko u ye kibati mbaret, ak koek Jerusalem karurugutik, ak koigei tulwetab got komoswek che tororen che bo osnet." 
Micah4:1 Ago kigimiti eng’ betusiek che bo let tulwetab gotab Jehovah eng’ tulonok barak, ak kitorori kosiir tulonok che mengechen; ak kotendenji bororiosiek." 
Micah4:2 Ak bendi bororiosiek che chang’ ak komwa kole, Obwa, ketogoste tulwetab Jehovah, ak kebe gotab Kamuktaindetab Jakobo; si konetech ortinwekyik, ak kebendate ortinwekyik: amu mong’une ng’atutik Sion, ak komong’une ng’olyotab Jehovah Jerusalem." 
Micah4:3 Ak koruoksechin bororiosiek che chang’, ak koger kong’ bororiosiek che kimen che mi ole loo; ak kotany rotokwak bo chok koek mogomboik che bo tuga, ak kotany ng’otwekwak koek chepkesok: si ma kobaregei bororiosiek, ama konetegei luget kogeny." 
Micah4:4 Ago tebe chi tugul kelutab ketinnyi ne bo sabibuk, ak mogoiywennyi; ama mi chi ne imui: amu kagomwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ng’olyondonito." 
Micah4:5 Amu wendoti bororiet age tugul eng’ bororiosiek tugul eng’ kainetab cheptalelinnyi, ak kibendote achek kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo koigeny ak koigeny." 
Micah4:6 Mwaei Jehovah kole, Ayumunoti eng’ betunoto inendet ne ing’wali koboto inendet ne kigeon, ak inendet ne kianyalil;" 
Micah4:7 ak ayai inendet ne ing’wali koek ne ng’etunot, ak ayai inendet ne kigetimda kolooit koek bororiet ne kim: ak koboi Jehovah ichek eng’ tulwetab Sion koboch yoto agoi koigeny." 
Micah4:8 Nyonjinin ng’olyondonito, ee inye, teekset ne koi ne bo akwetab kechirek, tulwetab cheptab Sion; ee, nyonei bounateng’ung’ ni ki bo tai, bounatetab cheptab Jerusalem." 
Micah4:9 Amu nee anyun si iwaach? Tos metinye laitoriat, tos kigobet ching’ung’ ne bo kapkiruok, kot konamin ng’woninwek che u che bo kwondo ne machei kosigis?" 
Micah4:10 Ingonamin ng’wanindo, ak igimu, ee cheptab Sion, ko u kwondo ne machei kosigis: amu imandoi anyun nguno eng’ nganaset, ak imeny mbar, ak iwe agoi Babulon; kisorun eng’ oloto; itiachin Jehovah eng’ oloto eng’ eutab buniguk." 
Micah4:11 Kagoyumjingei anyun bororiosiek che chang’ che len, Ingong’wanit, ak ongetang’ang’ji Sion." 
Micah4:12 Ago manaei kabwatutikab Jehovah, ama iguitos kiruogennyi: amu kigoyum ichek ko u ye kiyumjin ratutikab bek ruanyut ne kiborse." 
Micah4:13 Ng’eet ak ibor, ee cheptab Sion: amu ayae kuineng’ung’ koek karnet, ak ayae sioguk koek sugunwet: ak itonaton bororiosiek che chang’: ak itabanji Jehovah kelunoikwak, ak itabanji tugukwak Kiptaiyat ne bo ng’ony komugul." 
Micah5:1 Iyumge anyun, obee kweanaikab luget, ee cheptab kweanaikab luget; kogoyiemech: kwere kirokto matandab kiruogindetab Israel." 
Micah5:2 Ago inye, Bet-lehem Eprata, ne i ming’in eng’ kwenutab elfusiek che bo Juda, mong’unenen age ne nyonjina ne tun egu bounindetab Israel; ne kicham komong’u koboch keny, koboch koigeny." 
Micah5:3 Igoitoi anyun inendet ichek kot koit betut ne sigisiei inendet ne tinyei ng’wanindo: tun weekyingei anyun che king’et che bo tupchosiekyik, lagokab Israel." 
Micah5:4 Ak kotonon kobai akwennyi eng’ kimnatetab Jehovah, eng’ telunatetab kainetab Jehovah Kamuktaindennyi: ak kotebi; amu eetu koboch nguno agoi tabanwekab ng’ony." 
Micah5:5 Egu chichito kalyennyo ye tun kait Asuriaindet emennyo, ak ye tun katiech gorikyok che bo laitoriat, ko tun king’eeti anyun mestowek tisab ak bik sisiit che eechen kobargei ak inendet." 
Micah5:6 Ak kong’em emetab Asuria eng’ rotwetab chok, ak kong’em emetab Nimrod eng’ ole kibunei kebendi oloto; ak kosoruech inendet eng’ Asuriaindet ye tun kait emennyo, ye tun kanyo kotiech orit eng’ kiwotennyo." 
Micah5:7 Ak kotebe bik che king’et che bo Jakobo kwenutab bororiosiek che chang’ ko u rewot ne bunu Jehovah, ko u ropta ne inesyin suswek; ne maigeni chi, anan kogany werikab bik." 
Micah5:8 Ak kotebe bik che king’et che bo Jakobo kwenutab bororiosiek, kwenutab bororiosiek che chang’, ko u ye mi ng’etundo kwenutab tiong’ik che bo osnet, ko u ng’etundo ne neran eng’ kwenutab akwotisiekab kechirek: ne ye bunei kwen kotiegoti ak kotonatoni, ama mi chi ne soru." 
Micah5:9 Ingitoror eung’ung’ eng’ baragutab buniguk, ak ingeisto buniguk tugul." 
Micah5:10 Mwaei Jehovah kole, Tun abare eng’ betunoto mbartanyisieguk eng’ kwenung’ung’, ak ang’em karisieguk che bo luget:" 
Micah5:11 ak abar nganasokab emeng’ung’, ak abut irimoiguk tugul:" 
Micah5:12 ak aiste bonisosiek eng’ eung’ung’; ama inyoru kogeny kipsogeinik: 
Micah5:13 ak aiste eng’ kwenung’ung’ kanamoniguk che kigiwai ak tolochiguk; ak ma ilosu kogeny boisionikab euneguk. 
Micah5:14 Ak atutu Aserik eng’ kwenung’ung’; ak ang’em nganasoguk. 
Micah5:15 Ak ayaaktochi mugetut eng’ neregek ak eng’ neregek che ng’wonen, bororiosiek che kima kas it." 
Micah6:1 Ogas anyun okwek kit ne mwaei Jehovah: Ng’eet oborie eng’ taitab tulonok, ak ingogas tulonok che mengechen kuting’ung’." 
Micah6:2 Ogas, ee okwek tulonok, ng’alek che ting’enok Jehovah, ak okwek lumeiywek che kimen che bo ng’ony: amu ting’e Jehovah bikyik ng’alek, ak machei kong’alal ak Israel." 
Micah6:3 Kiayaiywok nee, ee okwek bikyuk? Ak kiaiimenak nee? Obaorianwa." 
Micah6:4 Amu kiamutun itogosu imong’u eng’ emetab Misri, ak kiatiachin imong’une gotab otwognatet; ak kiayokte Musa, Aron, ak Miriam kondoun." 
Micah6:5 Ee bikyuk, obwat ne kisom Balak laitoriatab Moab, ak kit ne kiwolji Balaam weritab Beor inendet; obwat koboch Sitim agoi Gilgal, si kobiit onai boisionikab iman che bo Jehovah." 
Micah6:6 Anyonundoi ano taitab Jehovah, ak ang’uruge eng’ taitab Kamuktaindet ne toror? Tos anyo tainnyi aibu kagochinoik che kibeelei koboto moek che masiirei kenyit agenge?" 
Micah6:7 Tos baibaitune Jehovah mengichik elfusiek, anan ainosiek elfusiek taman che bo mwanik? Tos agoite taitanyu agobo bistoennyu, agoite iyotetab bortanyu agobo tengektab sobondanyu?" 
Micah6:8 Ee inye chi, kagoborun inendet kit ne mie; ak nee ne magenen Jehovah, kobate iyai imanda, ak icham rirenet, ak iwendote eng’ kaming’inetab ge koboto Kamuktaindeng’ung’?" 
Micah6:9 Kuurei kutitab Jehovah nganaset, ak koiywei ne ng’om kaineng’ung’: ogas kirokto, koboto inendet ne king’atei." 
Micah6:10 Tos ta komi konoraik che bo yaitiet eng’ gotab kiptengekyot, ak kerutiet ne ichuchugat ne kiwechei?" 
Micah6:11 Tos atililitu ngatinye tuguk che kirogendoisie che bo yaitiet, koboto lolet ne mi ratilisiekab ng’alset?" 
Micah6:12 Amu nyiitat koromnatet magorekyik, ak kogomwa lembechek bik che menyei oloto, ak kong’alsei ng’elyebwekwak." 
Micah6:13 Koabirin anyun aginye eng’ ng’otobet ne o, koayain iegu banan amu tengekwogiguk." 
Micah6:14 Iamisiei, amebiyonyi; ak kotebenen kalilaneng’ung’: ak iuu, ago mesoru ne imuti; ak abare rotwetab chok inendet ne imuti." 
Micah6:15 Igolsei, amegese; itue emitik, ago meilege mwanik; itue sabibuk, ago mee divaik." 
Micah6:16 Amu kiorib ng’atutikab Omri, ak boisionik tugul che bo gotab Ahab, ak obendate kiruogutikwak: si kobiit ayain iegu banan, ak ayai bik che menyei oloto koek che kirenyei; ak oib chotisietab bikyuk." 
Micah7:1 Bwa ane! Amu a u yo kagiyum logoekab kemei, a u turonik che bo sabibuk: mami logoek che irurugotin che kimuchi keam; machei sobondanyu tongoaniatab mogoiywet." 
Micah7:2 Kigobet chi ne iywei Jehovah eng’ ng’ony, ama mi agot agenge ne bo iman eng’ bik: saptoi tugul kotumdoi korotik; riichei chi age tugul mestet agobo ng’etab kamet." 
Micah7:3 Igiilegei eng’ eunekwak koyai kit ne ya; somsei bounindet, ak machei kiruogindet kit ne kigoigoisie; ak mwaei chito ne o maget ne ya ne bo sobondanyi: chobei ichek ko u noto." 
Micah7:4 Ne mie eng’ ichek ko u katableliat: ne litit mising’ eng’ ichek ko ya kosiir ng’otwetab katok: kagoit betutab ribiguk, betut ne kiityinin biret; egu anyun kaiimenywa bo ge." 
Micah7:5 Amomang’u choruet, amotiiege kandoindet: rib kurgetab kuting’ung’ eng’ inendet ne ruei eng’ tegeng’ung’." 
Micah7:6 Amu iteweri werit kwanda, borie chepto kamet, borie osotiotab werit korgennyi ne bo yugoi; bunikab chito bikyik." 
Micah7:7 Ago amang’u ane Jehovah; ageni Kamuktaindetab yetunennyu: kasa Kamuktaindennyu," 
Micah7:8 amebaibaitunena, ee bunyondennyu: ye kabut, ang’eete kogeny; ye atebe mesundeito, koegu Jehovah lapkeiyennyu." 
Micah7:9 Amuitoi eng’ neregekab Jehovah, amu kiayachi tengekto; agoi kong’alal agobo ng’olyondennyu, ak koyaiywa kiruoget: tun imutwa among’ ole mi lapkeiyet, ak ageer imandanyi." 
Micah7:10 Yeityo kogeer anyun bunyondennyu, ak kotuch tewernatet inendet; ne kilenja, Mi ano Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’? Keerei konyekyuk inendet; kitiekyin ng’ony anyun inendet ko u ye kitiechei ng’atatek che mi ortinwek." 
Micah7:11 Betut ne kiteechei irimoiguk! Kiistoi kolooit ng’atutiet eng’ betunoto. 
Micah7:12 Bwanjinin ichek eng’ betunoto, kobunu Asuria ak nganasokab Misri, ak koboch Misri agoi Ainet, ak koboch nyanjet agoi nyanjet, ak koboch tulwet agoi tulwet." 
Micah7:13 Nganda u noto koegu emet karatia amu ichek che menyei oloto, amu logoekab boisionikwak." 
Micah7:14 Iyage biguk eng’ kiroktang’ung’, akwetab boroteng’ung’, che meng’isiei ichegei, eng’ osnet ne mi kwenutab Karmel: ingoagetyo eng’ Basan ak Gilead, ko u betusiek che bo keny." 
Micah7:15 Aborjini inendet tuguk che kikwong’e ko u eng’ betusiek che kiimong’u eng’ emetab Misri. 
Micah7:16 Keerei bororiosiek ak kolilanso amu kimnatenywa tugul: kere eunekwak kutuswekwak, ak kotimogis itikwak." 
Micah7:17 Melei ng’ung’unyek ko u erenet; mong’u kobotanionu eng’ komoswekwak che ung’egei ko u tuguk che ichuutegei ng’ony: bwanei eng’ kaiyweisiet ole mi Jehovah Kamuktaindennyo, ak koiyweis amu inye." 
Micah7:18 Ng’o Kamuktaindet ne u inye, ne nyochin kaat bik amu tengekto, ak kosiirtoe bistoetab bik che king’et che bo borotennyi? Magonori neregekyik agoi, amu baibaitune rirenet." 
Micah7:19 Tun weeksei kogeny ak korirenech; tun tiekyin ng’ony tengekwogikyok: ak iwirji tengekwogikwak tugul rirosiekab nyanjet. 
Micah7:20 Iyachini Jakobo imanit, ak iyachi Abraham rirenet, che kigeyosiechi kwanisiekyok eng’ betusiek che bo keny." 
Nahum1:1 Lautietab Ninebe. Bukuitab ng’ang’utietab Nahum Elkosindet. 
Nahum1:2 Jehovah ko Kamuktaindet ne bo ng’etkonda ak koyaaktoi mugetut; yaaktoi Jehovah mugetut, ak ko neregat; yaakyin Jehovah mugetut bunikyik, ak kogonorjin bunikyik neregek." 
Nahum1:3 Ma sib konerechi Jehovah, tinyei kamuget ne o, ama bagaktoi kiptengekyot age tugul: tinyei Jehovah orennyi eng’ kipchujuriet ak eng’ usonet ne o, ak bolik ko temburiekab kelyekyik." 
Nahum1:4 Kere kong’ nyanjet, ak koyaami, ak kotenyi ainosiek tugul: nyaluli Basan, ak Karmel, ak kores taptetab Lebanon." 
Nahum1:5 Botandos tulonok eng’ tainnyi, ak kochootyo tulonok che mengechen; sutoksei ng’ony eng’ tainnyi, ee, ng’ony, ak tugul che menyei oloto." 
Nahum1:6 Ng’o ne imuchi kotonon eng’ taitab neregekyik? Ak ng’o ne imuchi komuita eng’ koromnatetab neregekyik? Kirong’u neregekyik che ng’wonen ko u mat, ak tonatoni inendet ruandosiek." 
Nahum1:7 Mie Jehovah, irimet eng’ betutab nyalilda; ak kongen icheget che imang’u inendet." 
Nahum1:8 Ago igesu komosato eng’ maranet ne o, ak koon bunikyik koba mesundeito." 
Nahum1:9 Ochobe nee ogirindoe Jehovah? Inendet ne iwong’u: ma kobiitu nyalilda ne bo aeng’. 
Nahum1:10 Nganda u ichek katok che king’walgei, ak ko u che bogitos eng’ eeisenywa, kibeelei kogesgei ko u mobek che yaamnyotin." 
Nahum1:11 Kamong’unenen age, ne chobei yaitiet kolen kogirindae Jehovah, ne iruochi yaitiet." 
Nahum1:12 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Agot nganda kimen mising’, ak ko chang’, kebarei ui tugul, ak kobet. Agot nganda kianyalilin, ko ma anyalilin kogeny." 
Nahum1:13 Ak airi choginnyi eng’ kaating’ung’, ak ang’eeti ratutiguk." 
Nahum1:14 Ak kigogon Jehovah ng’atutiet agobo inye, kole, ma keminei kogeny kaineng’ung’: aistoi kanamonik che kigiwai ak che kigitany komong’ eng’ gotab cheptalelisieguk; abale kerering’ung’; amu i sogoran." 
Nahum1:15 Ogeero, mi tulonok kelyekab inendet ne ibu logoiywek che miach, ne mwaitoi kalyet! Rib igorweguk, ee Juda, yai kaarortaosieguk kosulda: amu ma kosiirei kogeny kiptengekyot ole imi: kibarei inendet." 
Nahum2:1 Kagonyo taing’ung’ inendet ne tuisiei: rib irimet, rib oret, kermenege kimnatet, tes kimnateng’ung’ koeet mising’." 
Nahum2:2 Amu ibu Jehovah kogeny telunatetab Jakobo, ko u telunatetab Israel: amu kigoluul ichek luulenik, ak kong’em temenikab ketikwak che bo sabibuk." 
Nahum2:3 Kigesal long’onikab bikyik che kimen kobiriritu, ilaachi bikyik che nyigonen ngoroik che biriren: ilyeldos karikab luget ko u karik eng’ betutab chobennyi bo ge, ak kebarbar ng’otwek mising’." 
Nahum2:4 Kirgirendos karisiekab luget eng’ ortinwek, rusotegei eng’ ortinwek che baroen: u toogunenywa kegenganik, ruaei ko u kalyelyosiek." 
Nahum2:5 Ibwati inendet bikyik che bo teegisto: ichaboitoi kobendi, choktoi kobendi irimet, ak kechob kit ne tektoegei." 
Nahum2:6 Yatotin kurgotikab ainosiek ak kochoot gotab laitoriat. 
Nahum2:7 Kageng’any Husab, kagimut kolooit, ak rirtos tibikyik eng’ kutit ne u ne bo cheptugenik, korabachi tegetikwak." 
Nahum2:8 Ago kigoigei Ninebe tamboiyot koboch keny: ago mweei; len, Otononie, otononie, ago mami ne kusegong’." 
Nahum2:9 Oib barunenikab feda, oib barunenikab tahabu: amu maigesugei tuguk che konorotin, torornatetab tuguk tugul che kororon." 
Nahum2:10 Mami kiy, mi buch, kigoek karatia: chootei muguleldo, ak biregei kutung’oik, ak komi ng’wanindo suenutik tugul, walaksei togochikab ichek tugul." 
Nahum2:11 Mi ano kebenetab ng’etunyik che neranik, ole wendote kirgitab ng’etuny ak ne kotoy, koboto aruetab ng’etundo, ama mi chi ne imui?" 
Nahum2:12 Kitonaton ng’etundo che yamei arekyik, ak kibarji ng’etunyikyik che kotoen, ak konyiit kebenonikyik tiong’ik che kagobar, ak konyiit kebenonikyik banyek che kagotonaton." 
Nahum2:13 Keero, aborienen, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak abeel karisiekyik che bo luget eng’ iyeto, ak kobar rotwetab chok ng’etunyiguk che neranik: ak agesu eng’ ng’ony tiong’iguk che ibare, ama kegasei kogeny kutitab biguk che kiyoktoi." 
Nahum3:1 Bwa nganasetab korotik! Nyiitat lembechek ak rebisiet; maigesugei che kibarei. 
Nahum3:2 Cheetab kipcharitit, ak kirgirenetab karisiek; ak cheetab mbartanyisiek che torombendos, ak cheetab karisiekab luget che torombendos;" 
Nahum3:3 bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek, kalyeletab rotwetab chok, ak ng’otit ne lilei bich; ak chang’indab che kagebar, karurugutiet ne o ne bo muswek: maigesugei muswek; riichei muswekwak ichek:" 
Nahum3:4 amu chang’indab kugoinatosiek che bo chepkugoniot ne kararan, kwondo ne bou bonisiosiek, ne aldoi bororiosiek eng’ kugoinatosiekyik, ak koaldoi bikab or ne bo chi eng’ bonisiosiekyik." 
Nahum3:5 Keero, aborienen, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak ang’anye ngoroiguk kot koit metit; ak aborjin bororiosiek imi ach ngor, ak kaborji bounatosiek tewernateng’ung’." 
Nahum3:6 Ak awirenen tuguk che samis che kiwechei, ak ayain iyaitu, ak andein iegu kit ne kitang’ang’jin." 
Nahum3:7 Ak tun mweenen tugul che keerin, ak kole, Kageng’em Ninebe: ng’o ne rirjin? Anyorjini ano che igoigoin?" 
Nahum3:8 Tos i kaigai isiir No-amon, ne kimi kwenutab ainosiek, ne kitinyei beek che kiyiem; ne ki irimennyi nyanjet, ne ki inatunnyi nyanjet?" 
Nahum3:9 Ki kimnatennyi Etiopia ak Misri, ak kima kotinyei ole boch; ki toretiguk Put ak Lubik." 
Nahum3:10 Ago kigimut, kigiluul: kigitonaton kogeny lagokyik eng’ tabanwekab ortinwek tugul; ak kiser barbarek agobo bikyik che konyitotin, ak kerate sirimwek bikyik tugul che eechen." 
Nahum3:11 Ibogiti aginye, kiunyin; icheng’e aginye irimet amu bunyot." 
Nahum3:12 Igeitu irimoiguk tugul mogoonik che tinyei logoekwak che tongoanik: ngitumdum kobutyin kutitab amindet. 
Nahum3:13 Keero, kwonyik biguk che mi kwenung’ung’; kagiyatyi buniguk ormarichokab emeng’ung’: kagobeel mat temeleiyweguk." 
Nahum3:14 Ram beek che bo betusiek che kiyiemenen, igimit irimoiguk: ui ole mi menet, ak itiech ng’atatiat, ak igimit ole kibeele matabaruk." 
Nahum3:15 Igesun mat eng’ oloto; barin rotwetab chok, igesun ko u tinapchet: chang’itu ko u tinapchet, chang’itu ko u chereng’endet." 
Nahum3:16 Kiites chemung’arainiguk kosiir kecheikab kipsengwet: ng’emisioti tinapchet, yeityo kotiriren kwo." 
Nahum3:17 Te chereng’enyinik biguk che kigilaakyi nariet, ak u talamik che chang’ kiptainiguk che bo luget, che menyei ng’otonok eng’ betutab kaititiet, ak komwei ye kachor asista, ama kinai ole kaba." 
Nahum3:18 Inuuktos mestoweguk, ee laitoriatab Asuria: imuunyi biguk che bo teegisto: kiyestochi biguk tulonok, ama mi chi ne iyumi." 
Nahum3:19 Mami kiy ne isoobi moeng’ung’; ng’wan ng’otobeng’ung’: iraprabi eunek agobo inye tugul che kasei ng’alek agobo inye; amu ng’o ne ma ibutyi yaitieng’ung’ kotugul? 
Habakkuk1:1 Lautiet ne kigeer maotiot Habakuk. 
Habakkuk1:2 Ee Jehovah, aguursei kot kotianit, amegase? Arirjinin amu koromnatet, ago mesoru." 
Habakkuk1:3 Amu nee si iborua tengekto, ak igona ageer kamaaset? Amu mi tainnyu ng’emisiet ak koromnatet: ak komi boriet ak kong’eetei tiyiet." 
Habakkuk1:4 Kigochoriren ng’atutiet amu noto; ama komi kiruoget ne kiruochi: amu yiemei kiptengekyot chito ne bo iman; kiruochi anyun kiruoget kimaasi. 
Habakkuk1:5 Ogeer, okwek kwenutab bororiosiek, ak obwat, ak okwong’ie mising’: amu ayae boisiet eng’ betusiekwok, ne moyani agot ngemwawok." 
Habakkuk1:6 Amu, keero, ang’eeti Kaldeik, bororiet ne korom ne choktoi; che bunei kwenutab emet, si konam meng’otosiek che ma chechuak kobunji." 
Habakkuk1:7 Imuisei ichek, ak kiywei: mong’une icheget kiruogenywa ak tororindanywa." 
Habakkuk1:8 Chepcheben kogeny mbartanyisiekwak kosiir cheblangok, ak ko koromen kosiir suik che bo koskoleny; ak kobortogei bikwak che lanyei mbartanyisiek: ee, bunu bichoto ole loo; tirirendos ko u kipsichit ne choktoi kowendi koamisiei." 
Habakkuk1:9 Bwanei tugul agobo koromnatet; tokyin togochikwak eng’ kimnatet ko u usonetab kong’asis; ak koyumi luulenik ko u ng’aniek. 
Habakkuk1:10 Ee, chotei laitorinik, roriot bounik eng’ inendet: rorechin irimet age tugul; amu iyumi temburiek, ak koib." 
Habakkuk1:11 Iwiktogei ko u usonet, ak kosiirto, ak konam ng’ogisto: inendet ne cheptalelinnyi kimnatennyi." 
Habakkuk1:12 Tos, mebo koigeny, inye, ee Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, Inendet ne Tilil ne nenyu? Magibegu. Ee Jehovah, kiichopchi inendet kiruoget; ak ee inye Ruandet, kiigimit inendet si kobiit kitigon." 
Habakkuk1:13 Inye ne itinye konyek che tililen kot ko mechame igeer yaitiet, amechame igeer kamaaset, amu nee anyun si igeere che yaei kaberberisiet, ak isise ye igeere kiptengekyot kolugui chito ne bo iman kosiir inendet;" 
Habakkuk1:14 ak igochini bik koigei njirenikab nyanjet, koigei tuguk che ichuutegei, che matinyei bounindet?" 
Habakkuk1:15 Name ichek tugul katet ne u kombet, name ichek regereiywondennyi ne kiname njirenik, ak koyumji regereiywondennyi ne o: baibaitu anyun ak kogasgei." 
Habakkuk1:16 Eng’jin anyun regereiywondennyi ne kiname njirenik, ak kobeeljin nyamdutik regereiywondennyi ne o; amu nyorune choto tugukyik che miach, ak amitwogikyik che chang’." 
Habakkuk1:17 Tos tumdoi anyun tuguk che mi regereiywondennyi, ama bagaktoi inendet kobar bororiosiek kotugul?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Atonone oldanyu ole aripse, ak atebe baragutab teekset ne koi, ak atobende si ageer kit ne mwawa inendet, ak kit ne awoljini agobo rirekyuk." 
Habakkuk2:2 Ak kiwolwa Jehovah, kolenja, Sir ng’ang’utiet ak iyai kotook eng’ tuguk che kisirei, si kobiit komuch kosoman chito ne labati." 
Habakkuk2:3 Amu bo ng’ang’utiet betusiek che kiging’at, ak kochoktoi kotokyingei kagesunet, ama mwaei lembech: agot ngogagei, igen inye; amu nyonei iman, maigaegei." 
Habakkuk2:4 Ogeero, kagomen muguleldanyi, ma litit inendet: ago sobei ne bo imanda eng’ kayanennyi." 
Habakkuk2:5 Ee, kaberberindet divaik, ak ko chito ne ichaugei ne matebe ga; ne ibaroi magennyi ko u oldab che kigobek, ak u meet inendet, ak mabiyonyi, ago iyumjingei bororiosiek tugul, ak kobasyigei bik tugul." 
Habakkuk2:6 Tos mamwaei bichuto tugul karagutiet agobo chichito, ak komwaei kalewenet ne sasisiei agobo inendet, ak komwaei kole, Bwa inendet ne tesyingei che ma che chik! Tianitu? Ak bwa inendet ne sutyingei tuguk che kiname besendo!" 
Habakkuk2:7 Tos mang’eetos eng’ chokyinet icheget che susin, ak kogos che iimin, ak iegu barunenikwak?" 
Habakkuk2:8 Amu kiiluul bororiosiek che chang’, luulin aginye bik tugul che ng’etunotin; amu korotikab bik, ak amu koromnatet ne kigiyachi emet, ak nganaset ak bik tugul che menyei oloto." 
Habakkuk2:9 Bwa inendet ne taachei kelunet ne ya agobo gonnyi, si kobiit koteech keswennyi eng’ ole toror, si kobiit kesor eng’ eutab yaitiet!" 
Habakkuk2:10 Kiichob tewernatet agobo gong’ung’, ye kingibar che chang’, ak kiiyachi tengekto sobondang’ung’." 
Habakkuk2:11 Amu tun waachei koita eng’ inatut, ak kowol bambaniat eng’ ketik." 
Habakkuk2:12 Bwa inendet ne teege nganaset korotik, ak kogimite nganaset tengekto!" 
Habakkuk2:13 Ogeero, tos ma bo Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole kobiisiechi bik mat, ak koiimgei bororiosiek buch?" 
Habakkuk2:14 Amu nyiiei ng’ony naetab torornatetab Jehovah, ko u ye nyiiei beek nyanjet." 
Habakkuk2:15 Bwa inendet ne igochin chitab kokwennyi maiyek, inye ne itesyini ng’woneng’ung’, ak igochini kogeny kobogit, si kobiit igeer ichek komi ach ngor." 
Habakkuk2:16 Kanyiin tewernatet ne kata torornatet: ee aginye, si iige ne ma kimuratan: kiweekyinin kikombetab eutab tai ne bo Jehovah, ak kotebe tewernatet ne samis torornateng’ung’." 
Habakkuk2:17 Amu tuchin koromnatet ne kigiyachi Lebanon, koboto barisietab tiong’ik, ne kiigochi ichek koiyweis; amu korotikab bik, ak koromnatet ne kigiyachi emet, koboto nganaset ak bik tugul che menyei oloto." 
Habakkuk2:18 Tilei nee kanamwet ne kigiwai, kot koyai musogindet; ak tilei nee kanamwet ne kitanyi, ak konetindetab lembechek, kot komang’ kitang’indet ne yaei, kot kotany kanamonik che matwegu?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Bwa inendet ne lenjin ketit, Kosu; ak ne lenjin koita ne matwegu, Ng’eet! Tos inetisiei nito? Ogeero, kigiliige tahabu ak feda, ama tinyei kabuset eng’ kwenunnyi, agot kitigin." 
Habakkuk2:20 Ago mi Jehovah hekalunnyi ne tilil: ingosis ng’ony komugul eng’ tainnyi. 
Habakkuk3:1 Saet ne kisa maotiot Habakuk, tiendo ne kiguure Shigionoth ne kitien agobo che kimasta." 
Habakkuk3:2 Ee Jehovah, kiagas ng’aleguk, aiyweisiei: Ee Jehovah, ing’eet boisieng’ung’ eng’ kwenutab kenyisiek; Yai kotook eng’ kwenutab kenyisiek; Ibwat rirenet nginerechi." 
Habakkuk3:3 Kinyo Kamuktaindet eng’ Teman, Kinyo Inendet ne Tilil eng’ tulwetab Paran. Kituch torornatennyi kipsengwetisiek, Ak kinyi ng’ony kalosunennyi." 
Habakkuk3:4 Ki u kakweng’ennyi lapkeiyet; Kimong’une eunnyi lapkeiyet ne u ne bo kelyekab asista: Ak kimi yoto ole kiung’e kamuktaennyi. 
Habakkuk3:5 Kiindoe inendet koroito, Ak kimong’une kelyekyik kalyelet ne u mat." 
Habakkuk3:6 Kitonon ak kokwa ng’ony; Kigeer, ak kotumdum bororiosiek: Ak kiiseerak tulonok che bo koigeny; Kiing’urukso tulonok che bo koigeny; Ki u banwekyik betusiek che bo keny." 
Habakkuk3:7 Kiageer emaisiekab Kusan komi nyalilda: Kibotanso tuguk che kioiye emet che bo Midian. 
Habakkuk3:8 Tos kinerekyi Jehovah ainosiek? Tos kinyo nereknateng’ung’ agobo ainosiek, Anan agobo nyanjet, Kot ilany mbartanyisieguk, Ak ilany karisieguk che bo luget che bo yetunet?" 
Habakkuk3:9 Kigitiach kwangeng’ung’; Ki bo iman ng’olyotab kayosiosiek ne kigiyosiechi bororiosiek. Kiibete emet ainosiek. 
Habakkuk3:10 Kiiyweis tulonok ye kigeerin; Kisiirto usonetab nyanjet; Kitul riret, Ak konamji barak eunekyik." 
Habakkuk3:11 Kitononso asista ak arawet eng’ meng’otenywa, Eng’ lapkeiyetab kipchaboniguk kobendi, Eng’ kaluunetab ng’oting’ung’ ne ilyeli." 
Habakkuk3:12 Kiibun emet ineregoti, Kiibor bororiosiek ko u bek eng’ neregek." 
Habakkuk3:13 Kiimong’u agobo yetunetab biguk, Agobo yetunetab neng’ung’ ne iilat; Kiiguoten kandoindetab gotab kiptengeginik, Ing’anye lumeiywot agoi kaatit." 
Habakkuk3:14 Kiitoore kiplitokyik kandoindetab bikyik che bo luget: Kibwa ko u kipchurjuriet kole koseera: Ki u boiboindanywa che amei kibananok eng’ ung’ot. 
Habakkuk3:15 Kiitiege inye nyanjet mbartanyisieguk, beek che irurugotin che kimen." 
Habakkuk3:16 Kiagas, ak kitilgei moennyu, Kibotan kutinnyu eng’ cheonoto; Kinunio kowekyuk ak kiabotan eng’ ole kiami: Si kobiit amuuny eng’ betutab nyalilda, Ye togosyi noto bik, che ibokyin inendet eng’ kweanaik." 
Habakkuk3:17 Amu ngot ko ma yie mogoiywet, Anan ko ma rurio ketikab sabibuk; Koek buch boisietab emdit, Ama biitu amitwogik eng’ mbarenik; Ak kebar akwotisiekab kechirek eng’ biusiek, Ama komi akwotisiekab tuga eng’ biusiek:" 
Habakkuk3:18 Aboiboitu kora eng’ Jehovah, Aboiboitu eng’ Kamuktaindetab yetunennyu." 
Habakkuk3:19 Kimnatennyu Jehovah Kiptaiyat, Ak yaei kelyekyuk koigei che bo cheptirgichet, Ak komutata eng’ oldinwekyuk che tororen. Bo Ne O eng’ Butik, eng’ kibugandinikyuk che bo inoik." 
Zephaniah1:1 Ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kinyonji Sepania weritab Kusi, weritab Gedalia, weritab Amaria, weritab Hesekia, eng’ betusiekab Josia weritab Amon, laitoriatab Juda." 
Zephaniah1:2 Agesu tuguk tugul eng’ ng’ony, mwaei Jehovah." 
Zephaniah1:3 Agesu chi ak tiony; agesu taritikab barak, ak njirenikab nyanjet, koboto kanagutik ak kiptengeginik; ak abar bik eng’ ng’ony, mwaei Jehovah." 
Zephaniah1:4 Ak atokyini eunnyu Juda, ak bik tugul che menyei Jerusalem; ak abar che king’et che bo Baal eng’ olito, koboto kainetab Kemarik ak tisiik;" 
Zephaniah1:5 ak ichek che ilosu tuguk tugul che bo kipsengwet, eng’ gorik barak; koboto icheget che ilosu, che iyosiechin Jehovah, ak koyostos eng’ kainetab Malkam;" 
Zephaniah1:6 ak ichek che kiweek kometo Jehovah; koboto ichek che ma cheng’ Jehovah, anan koteepse inendet." 
Zephaniah1:7 Sis eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat Jehovah: amu kagorik betutab Jehovah: amu kagochob Jehovah tiseiywot, kagoanyiny toekyik." 
Zephaniah1:8 Ak tun abire eng’ betutab tiseiywotab Jehovah, bounik, werikab laitoriat, koboto ichek tugul che ilaachi ngoroikab toek." 
Zephaniah1:9 Ak abire eng’ betunoto tugul che torombenjin tugatuk, che inyiiti gotab kiptaiyandenywa koromnatet ak ng’alset." 
Zephaniah1:10 Mwaei Jehovah kole, Tun biitu eng’ betunoto waagatab rirek ne bunu ormarichetab njirenik, ak waagat ne bunu kebebertab nganaset, koboto cheet ne o ne bunu tulonok che mengechen." 
Zephaniah1:11 Owaach okwek bik che omenye Maktes, amu kabek chemung’arainik tugul: ak kibarei ichek tugul che kitinyei fedaisiek ng’isiat." 
Zephaniah1:12 Ak asiach Jerusalem eng’ betusiechoto akweng’ate; ak abir bik che kigotepto kimnatenywa ko u divaik che mi ak misigikyik, che mwaei eng’ mugulelwekwak kole, Mayaei Jehovah ne mie, ama yaei yaitiet." 
Zephaniah1:13 Ak keluul magornatenywa, ak koguber gorikwak: ee, teechei gorik, ago mamenyei; ak komin mbarenikab sabibuk, ago maeei divaikwak." 
Zephaniah1:14 Karik betut ne o ne bo Jehovah, negit ak kochogu mising’, agot twegunetab betutab Jehovah; rirei eng’ ng’wanindo eng’ oloto chito ne kim." 
Zephaniah1:15 Egu betunoto betutab neregek, betutab nyalilda ak bichiindo, betutab ng’emisiet ak kubernatet, betutab mesundeito ak tuuindo, betutab bolik ak mesundeito ne nyigis." 
Zephaniah1:16 Betutab iriaget ak waagat, agobo nganasok che ng’ototin, ak irimoik che tororen." 
Zephaniah1:17 Ak aipchi bik bichiindo, kot kobendat ko u bik che koriotin, amu kigoyachi Jehovah tengekto: ak ketumda korotikwak ko u temburiek, ak keranda borwekwak ko u ng’atatek." 
Zephaniah1:18 Ama imuchi fedaisiekwak anan tahabusiekwak kosor ichek eng’ betutab neregekab Jehovah; ago kibeelei emet komugul eng’ matab ng’etkondanyi: igesu, ee, igesu eng’ kamuiset, ichek tugul che menyei emet." 
Zephaniah2:1 Oyumge, ee, oyumge, ee bororiet ne matinyei kalilanet;" 
Zephaniah2:2 kotom kosulda ng’atutiet, kotom kosiirto betut ko u metetek, kotom kobwanjok neregek che koromen che bo Jehovah, kotom konyonjok betutab neregekab Jehovah." 
Zephaniah2:3 Ocheng’ Jehovah, okwek tugul che o taloen che o bo ng’ony, che kigoyai kiruogutikyik; ocheng’ imanda, ocheng’ talasiet: abere tun kiunyok eng’ betutab neregekab Jehovah." 
Zephaniah2:4 Amu tun kimetoi Gasa, ak koek karatia Askelon: kionei Asdod ko katelel asis, ak kitutu Ekron." 
Zephaniah2:5 Bwa bik che menyei ngegut, bororietab Keretik! Borienen ng’olyotab Jehovah, ee Kanan, emetab Pilistik; ang’emin, kot ko ma komi chi ne meng’isiei." 
Zephaniah2:6 Ak koek ngegusiek ole kiyagisie, ak ole mi gorikab mestowek koboto biusiekab akwotisiekab kechirek." 
Zephaniah2:7 Ak kobunji ngegut bik che king’et che bo gotab Juda; iyage akwotisiekwak oloto: ruitos eng’ gorikab Askelon koskoleny; amu rutochin Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak komut ichek kogeny eng’ ole kiga kiluulji." 
Zephaniah2:8 Kiagas chotisietab Moab, ak churisiosiekab lagokab Amon, che kichote bikyuk, ak kochaunegei kiwotenywa." 
Zephaniah2:9 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindetab Israel kole, Ko u ye asobe, koigeitu Moab Sodom, ak koigei lagokab Amon Gomora, bunjin siwek, ak keringonikab munyuk, ak koguber agoi: luulei bikyuk che ng’etu ichek, ak konam bororiennyu ne king’et ichek koek borotenywa." 
Zephaniah2:10 Nyoru nito amu menotenywa, amu kigochot ak kochaunegei bikab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Zephaniah2:11 Egu Jehovah kamuiset eng’ ichek: amu itenyi cheptalelisiek tugul che bo ng’ony; ak kolos bik tugul inendet, ilosu chi age tugul eng’ oldanyi, koboto ngegusiek tugul che bo bororiosiek." 
Zephaniah2:12 Okwek Etiopik, barok rotwennyu bo chok." 
Zephaniah2:13 Ak kochuul eunnyi kotokyi komostab katam, ak kong’em Asuria; ak koyai Ninebe koek karatia, ak koyaam, ko u ong’atet." 
Zephaniah2:14 Ak koruiye akwotisiek kwenunnyi, tiong’ik tugul che bo bororiosiek: ak kotebe chebokibabaa ak chepswererit metowekab tolochikwak: tiendos eng’ tirisiok: tebe kubernatet tugatugik: amu kigong’any tuguk che kigituge taragonik." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ni nganaset ne baibai ne maiiti kiy, ne kimwa eng’ muguleldanyi kole, Ane kityo, mami age kobatena: kagoek karatia ne tia, ole ruitos tiong’ikab timin! Renyei inendet age tugul ne siirtoi, ak kong’wereri." 
Zephaniah3:1 Bwa inendet ne ngeleliot ne kigong’wanit, nganaset ne usisiei!" 
Zephaniah3:2 Kima kas it mwaet; kima taach kotigonet; kima imang’ Jehovah; kima rikyi Kamuktaindennyi. 
Zephaniah3:3 Ng’etunyik che borisendos bounikyik che mi kwenunnyi; suikab koskoleny kiruogikyik; maituuchi kiy agoi koeech. 
Zephaniah3:4 Bik che tangusen ak koberberisiei maotikyik: kigomuruon tisiikyik ole tilil, kigong’em ng’atutik." 
Zephaniah3:5 Bo iman Jehovah ne mi kwenunnyi; mayaei tengekto; ibortoi kiruogennyi karonet age tugul, yaei kosulda; ago maililandos bik che ma bo iman." 
Zephaniah3:6 Kiabar bororiosiek; kigong’emogis irimoikwak che tororen; kiabut ortinwekwak kot ko ma kobunei chi: kigong’emogis nganasokwak, kot ko ma komi chi, kot ko ma komi chi ne menyei." 
Zephaniah3:7 Kiamwa ale, Iywea iman, itaache kotigonet; si ma kiisto meng’otennyi, ko u tugul che kiang’at agobo inendet: ago king’eetyo karon mising’ ak kong’em boisionikwak tugul." 
Zephaniah3:8 Ogena anyun, mwaei Jehovah, kot koit betut ne abarisiei: amu kiatil ale ayumi bororiosiek, ale ayumi bounatosiek, si arong’ji ichek neregekyuk, neregekyuk tugul che koromen; amu kibeelei ng’ony tugul eng’ matab ng’etkondanyu." 
Zephaniah3:9 Amu tun aweekyini anyun bik eng’ betunoto, kutit ne mie, si koguur tugul kainetab Jehovah, si koboisiechi inendet eng’ maget agenge." 
Zephaniah3:10 Tun ibwa kagochinennyu bikyuk che saa, cheptab bikyuk che kigoyesta, kobunu bitonin eng’ ainosiekab Etiopia." 
Zephaniah3:11 Matun ililani eng’ betunoto eng’ boisioniguk tugul, che kiiyaiywa ibistoe: amu tun aistoi komong’ eng’ kwenung’ung’ menotiguk che itororigei, si ma ichauge kogeny eng’ tulwennyu ne tilil." 
Zephaniah3:12 Ago abagachi eng’ kwenung’ung’ bik che kinyalili ak ko kibananok, ak komang’ ichek kainetab Jehovah." 
Zephaniah3:13 Ma koyaei tengekto bik che king’et che bo Israel, ama komwaei lembechek; ama kinyorjin ng’olyot ne bo ng’alset kutuswekwak: amu tun amisiei ak koruiyo, ama biitu chi ne imui ichek." 
Zephaniah3:14 Tien, ee cheptab Sion; waach, ee Israel; igasge ak ibaibaitu eng’ muguleldang’ung’ tugul, ee cheptab Jerusalem." 
Zephaniah3:15 Kagoisto Jehovah kiruogutiguk, kigoon bunyondeng’ung’: mi kwenung’ung’ laitoriatab Israel, inendet Jehovah: ma iywei yaitiet agoi." 
Zephaniah3:16 Kimwachin Jerusalem eng’ betunoto, kelenjin, Ameiywei: ee Sion, amatingochorirenso euneguk." 
Zephaniah3:17 Mi kwenung’ung’ Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’ung’, inendet ne bo kamuktaet, ne soru: boiboitunenen eng’ boiboiyet, sisei eng’ chamnyennyi, boiboitunenen eng’ tiendo." 
Zephaniah3:18 Ayumi ichek che arogendos agobo tuiyet ne bo kaming’inetab ge, che ki chechuk, che kigas nyigisindo eng’ chotisionoto." 
Zephaniah3:19 Keero, aborie eng’ betusiechoto ichek tugul che inyalilin: ak asoru inendet ne ing’wali, ak amutu inendet ne kigion; ak ayae ichek koek kalosunet ak kainet, ne kigoyom ng’ony tugul kalilanenywa." 
Zephaniah3:20 Amutwok eng’ betusiechoto, ak ayumak eng’ betusiechoto: amu ayaok oegu kainet ak kalosunet eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony ye tun amutwok kogeny ogeere eng’ ole kigiluuljok, mwaei Jehovah." 
Haggai1:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Serubabel weritab Sealtiel, bounindetab Juda, ak Josua weritab Jeosadak tisiindet ne o, eng’ maotiot Hagai, eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ne bo laitoriat Darius, eng’ arawet ne bo lo, eng’ betut ne bo tai ne bo arawanato, kolenji," 
Haggai1:2 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Mwaei bichu, kole, Tom koit betusiek che nyoljinech kebwa, betusiek che kiteege gotab Jehovah." 
Haggai1:3 Kinyo anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ maotiot Hagai kole," 
Haggai1:4 Tos betusiek chuto eng’ okwek che omenye gorikwok che kigitete baoinik, kobutot goi?" 
Haggai1:5 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Orib atebosiekwok." 
Haggai1:6 Kiogol che chang’, ago ogese che ng’ering’; oamisiei, ago mobiyong’dosi; oeeisei, ago manyiiok; olaachi ngoroik, ago mami ne lalang’; ak inendet ne nyoru melekto kondoi lolet ne undurot." 
Haggai1:7 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Orib atebosiekwok." 
Haggai1:8 Otogoste tulwet, ak oibu ketik ak oteech goyoto, si abaibaitune noto, ak kiloswa, mwaei Jehovah." 
Haggai1:9 Kiocheng’ che chang’, ak ogeero, kibiit che ng’ering’; ak kingoibu kobwa ga, agutute. Amu nee? Mwae Jehovah ne bo lugosiek. Amu gonnyu ne butot, ago labati chi age tugul gonnyi." 
Haggai1:10 Kigirat kipsengwet anyun amu okwek si magon rewot, ama yiei emet logoekyik." 
Haggai1:11 Ak kiang’at kobiit kemeut eng’ emet, ak eng’ tulonok, ak eng’ bek, ak eng’ divaik, ak eng’ mwanik, ak eng’ tuguk che bitos eng’ ng’ony, ak eng’ bik, ak eng’ tuga, ak eng’ boisionik tugul che bo eunek." 
Haggai1:12 Kigas it anyun Serubabel weritab Sealtiel, ak Josua weritab Jeosadak, tisiindet ne o, koboto bik tugul che king’et, kigas it Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa ak ng’alekab maotiot Hagai, ko u ye kiga koyok Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa inendet, ak kiiyweis bik eng’ taitab Jehovah." 
Haggai1:13 King’alal anyun Hagai, ne kiiyoktoi Jehovah, komwachi bik ng’alekab Jehovah kolenji, Ami kobotok, mwaei Jehovah." 
Haggai1:14 Ak kiichirjir Jehovah tamirmirietab Serubabel weritab Sealtiel bounindetab Juda, koboto tamirmirietab Josua weritab Jeosadak, tisiindet ne o, koboto tamirmirikab bik tugul che king’et; ak kibwa kobois eng’ gotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindenywa," 
Haggai1:15 eng’ betutab tiptem ak ang’wan ne bo arawet, eng’ arawetab lo, eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ne bo laitoriat Darius." 
Haggai2:1 Kinyo ng’olyotab Jehovah eng’ maotiot Hagai, eng’ arawetab tisab, eng’ betutab tiptem ak agenge ne bo arawanato, kole," 
Haggai2:2 Ng’alalji Serubabel weritab Sealtiel, bounindetab Juda, ak Josua weritab Jeosadak tisiindet ne o, koboto bik che king’et, ilenji," 
Haggai2:3 Ng’o eng’ okwek ne king’et ne kigeer goi kotinyei torornatennyi ne bo tai? Ak ogeertoi ano nguno? Tos ma u buch eng’ konyekwok? 
Haggai2:4 Nyiganitu, ee Serubabel, mwaei Jehovah; ak inyiganitu, ee Josua weritab Jeosadak, tisiindet ne o; onyiganitu okwek bik tugul che bo emet, mwaei Jehovah, ak oboisie: amu ami kobotok, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek," 
Haggai2:5 ko u ng’olyot ne kigiyomisyige ye kiobwane eng’ Misri, ak kitebe kwenung’wong’ Tamirmiriennyu: amoiyweisie." 
Haggai2:6 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ta atumdumi kogeny konyil agenge, kipsengwet ak ng’ony ak nyanjet, ak emet, eng’ ne matia." 
Haggai2:7 Ak atumdum bororiosiek tugul, ak kobwa tuguk che chamei bororiosiek tugul, ak anyiit goi torornatet, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Haggai2:8 Chechuk fedaisiek, ak chechuget tahabusiek agichek, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Haggai2:9 Eetu torornatet ne bo let ne bo goi kosiir ne bo tai, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: ak agonu kalyet eng’ yuto, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Haggai2:10 Kinyo ng’olyotab Jehovah, eng’ maotiot Hagai, eng’ betutab tiptem ak ang’wan ne bo arawetab sogol, eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ne bo Darius, kole," 
Haggai2:11 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Oteebe tisiik agobo ng’atutik, olenji," 
Haggai2:12 Ngot koibe chito ngoriennyi banyek che itabanotin, ak kotiiny ngorionoto makatiat, anan sogoriek, anan divaik, anan mwanik, anan amit age tugul, ko tos tililitu? Ak kiwol tisiik kole, Achicha." 
Haggai2:13 Yeityo komwa Hagai kole, Ngot kotiiny chi age tugul ne ng’wan ne kitwa musto, age eng’ tuguchuto, ko tos ng’wanitu? Ak kiwol tisiik kole, Ng’wanitu." 
Haggai2:14 Kowol anyun Hagai kole, U noto bichu ak u noto bororioni eng’ tainnyu, mwaei Jehovah, ak u noto boisiet age tugul ne bo eunekwak; ng’wan kit ne igoitoi eng’ oloto." 
Haggai2:15 Ak asomok anyun nguno, ale obwat koboch betunito ak kwo tai, koboch betut ne kiginde koita agenge baragutab koita age eng’ hekalutab Jehovah:" 
Haggai2:16 eng’ betusiechoto tugul, ye kingwo chi kocheng’ karurugutietab kerutik tiptem, konyoru ne bo kerutik taman kityo; ak kingwo ole kitaage divaik kole koib terenik konom, ko kimi tiptemu ichegei." 
Haggai2:17 Kiabirenok chelalitiet ak uchatet ak koikab ropta eng’ boisionik tugul che bo eunekwok; ago ma oweekyage, mwaei Jehovah." 
Haggai2:18 Asomok ale, obwat, koboch betuni ak kwo tai, koboch betutab tiptem ak ang’wan ne bo arawetab sogol, koboch betut ne kigiluume lumeiywotab hekalutab Jehovah, obwat anyun." 
Haggai2:19 Tos ta komi bek choge? Ee, ma iiyo ketikab sabibuk, anan mogoonik, anan ketikab logoek alak, anan emitik; aberurok anyun koboch betuni." 
Haggai2:20 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Hagai, ne bo aeng’, eng’ betutab tiptem ak ang’wan ne bo arawet, kole," 
Haggai2:21 Ng’alalji Serubabel, bounindetab Juda, ilenji, Atumdumi kipsengwetisiek ak ng’ony:" 
Haggai2:22 ak agabui ng’echeretab laitornatet ne bo bounatosiek, ak ang’eme kimnatetab bounatosiekab bororiosiek; ak agabui karisiek che bo luget, koboto che lanyei; ak kobutyo mbartanyisiek koboto che lanyei, kibarei age tugul eng’ rotwetab chok ne bo tupchennyi." 
Haggai2:23 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, kole, Anamin eng’ betunoto, ee Serubabel, otwogindennyu, weritab Sealtiel, mwaei Jehovah, ak ayain iige ng’okset, mwaei Jehovah: amu kialewenin, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Zechariah1:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Sekaria weritab Berekia weritab Ido, maotiot, eng’ arawetab sisiit eng’ kenyit ne bo aeng’ ne bo Darius, kolenji," 
Zechariah1:2 Kigonerekyi Jehovah mising’ kwanisiekwok. 
Zechariah1:3 Mwachi anyun ichek ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Oweekyage, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, si aweekyoge, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Zechariah1:4 Amoige kwanisiekwok, che kiga ititenji maotik che bo tai, kolenji, Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Oweege anyun nguno omete ortinwekwok che yaach, ak boisionikwok che yaach: ago kima kas ichek, anan koepcha it, mwaei Jehovah." 
Zechariah1:5 Mi ano kwanisiekwok? Ak maotik, tos soptos agoi?" 
Zechariah1:6 Ago tos kima ityi kwanisiekwok ng’alekyuk ak ng’atutikyuk che kiang’at otwogikyuk maotik? Ak kiweek ichek ak kole, Kigoyaiywech Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ye kigaibwat kole yaiywech ko u ortinwekyok, ak ko u boisionikyok." 
Zechariah1:7 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Sekaria weritab Berekia, weritab Ido, maotiot, eng’ betutab tiptem ak ang’wan ne bo arawetab taman ak agenge, ne arawetab Sebat, eng’ kenyitab aeng’ ne bo Darius, kolenji," 
Zechariah1:8 Kiageer kemoi, ak ogeero, chito ne kilanyei mbartanyit ne birir ak kotonone kwenutab ketik che kiguure myrtle eng’ ole bo uruet; ak kimi batennyi mbartanyisiek alage, che biriren, che muruonen, ak che leelachen." 
Zechariah1:9 Kiale anyun, Ee kiptaiyandennyu, nee chu? Ak kilenja malaikaiyat ne king’alalwa, Ta aborun kit ne bo chuto." 
Zechariah1:10 Ak kiwol chito ne kitonone kwenutab ketichato kole, Chuto ko ichek che kiiyokto Jehovah kobunot komoswek tugul che bo ng’ony." 
Zechariah1:11 Ak kiwolji ichek malaikyatab Jehovah ne kitonone kwenutab ketichato kolenji, Kogebunote komoswek tugul che bo ng’ony, ak keero, tebyei ng’ony tugul kosisei, ak komuunyi." 
Zechariah1:12 Kiwol anyun malaikaiyatab Jehovah, kole, Ee Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ta iesioi kot kotianit si irire Jerusalem, ak nganasokab Juda, che kiinerekyi kenyisiechu tamanwogik tisab?" 
Zechariah1:13 Ak kiwolji Jehovah malaikaiyandanato king’alalwa eng’ ng’alek che miach, ng’alek che bo kagaigaet." 
Zechariah1:14 Kilenja anyun malaikaiyandanato king’alalwa, Ititenji inye ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole: Ama ng’etkong’ agobo Jerusalem ak agobo Sion eng’ ng’etkonda ne o." 
Zechariah1:15 Ak anerechi mising’ agobo bororiosiek che imuunyi: amu ye kita anerechi kitigin kityo, kotes icheget nyalilda." 
Zechariah1:16 Mwaei anyun Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kaaweekyige Jerusalem arire; kiteechei gonnyu nganasanato, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak kechuul borowet ne kikwaise, eng’ Jerusalem." 
Zechariah1:17 Ititenji kogeny ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Kibaroi nganasokyuk eng’ kaberuret; ak ta kogoigoi Jehovah Sion ak ta koleweni Jerusalem." 
Zechariah1:18 Ak kiayot met, ak ageer, ogeero, kuinoik ang’wan." 
Zechariah1:19 Ak kiateebe malaikaiyat ne king’alalwa alenji, Nee chu? Ak kiwolwa kolenja, Chu ko kuinoik che kiiyesta Juda, Israel, ak Jerusalem." 
Zechariah1:20 Ak kiiborua Jehovah kitong’ik ang’wan. 
Zechariah1:21 Kiamwa anyun ale, Bwanei chuto koyaei nee? Ak kimwa kole, Chu ko kuinoik che kiiyesta Juda, kot ko mata kobiit chi ne yotei met: ago kabwa chuto si kobiit komu ichek, ak kotimda kuinoikab bororiosiek, che kinamji barak kuinenywa koborie emetab Juda koiyesta." 
Zechariah2:1 Ak kiayot met ak ageer, ogeero, chito ne tinyei eng’ eunnyi borowet ne kikwaise." 
Zechariah2:2 Yeityo ateebe alenji, Iwendi ano? Ak kilenja, Awendi akwai Jerusalem, si kobiit anai ole te tebeesindanyi ak koindanyi." 
Zechariah2:3 Ak ogeero, kiwa malaikaiyandanato king’alalwa, ak kiwa malaikaiyat age kotuiyo ak inendet," 
Zechariah2:4 ak kolenji inendet, Labat, ng’alalji murenoni, ilenji, Kimenyei Jerusalem ko u ye kimenyei nganasok che mengechen che matinyei irimoik, amu chang’indab bik ak tuga che mi." 
Zechariah2:5 Amu mwaei Jehovah kole, Aegu irimet ne bo mat eng’ komoswek tugul, ak aegu torornatet eng’ kwenunnyi." 
Zechariah2:6 Eiye, eiye, omwei eng’ emetab murot ne bo katam, mwaei Jehovah: amu kiaseerak ko u usonaik ang’wan che bo kipsengwet, mwaei Jehovah." 
Zechariah2:7 Ee Sion, soruge inye, ne omeng’isiei ak cheptab Babulon." 
Zechariah2:8 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole, Kagoyokta inendet agobo torornatennyi, awa oldab bororiosiek che kiluulok, amu inendet ne twaok, ko katwa laptetab kondanyi." 
Zechariah2:9 Ogeero, ang’werei ichek, ak koek luulenik eng’ ichek che kiotei ichek: ak onai ole kiiyokwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Zechariah2:10 Tien ak ibaibaitu, ee cheptab Sion: amu, keero, anyone amenye kwenung’ung’, mwaei Jehovah." 
Zechariah2:11 Ak konamgei bororiosiek che chang’ ak Jehovah eng’ betunoto ak koek bikyuk: ak ameny kwenung’ung’, ak inai ile kiiyokwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek anyo ole imi." 
Zechariah2:12 Ak konam Jehovah Juda koek kebebertanyi eng’ emet ne tilil, ak kolewen kogeny Jerusalem." 
Zechariah2:13 Osisye, okwek bik tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah: amu kagong’eet eng’ meng’otennyi ne tilil." 
Zechariah3:1 Ak kiiborua inendet tisiindet ne o Josua kotonone taitab malaikaiyatab Jehovah, ak kotonone agine Setani komostab eunnyi ne bo tai koek ne kirindoi." 
Zechariah3:2 Ak kilenji Jehovah Setani, Ingogeerin kong’ Jehovah, ee Setani; ee, ingogerin kong’ Jehovah ne kilewen Jerusalem: tos ma mecheita nito ne kaginemune ma?" 
Zechariah3:3 Kiilaachi Josua ngoroik che muruonen, ak kitonon eng’ taitab malaikaiyandanato." 
Zechariah3:4 Ak kiwol inendet kolenji ichek che kitonone tainnyi, Oreegune inendet ngoroikyik che muruonen. Ak kimwachi inendet kolenji, Keero, kaistoenen tengektang’ung’, ak alaagun ngoroik che kororon." 
Zechariah3:5 Kiale anyun, Ingogerjine ichek inendet metinnyi chepkulet ne kararan. Kiilaakyi anyun inendet chepkulet ne kararan, ak kolaakyi ngoroik; ak kitonone malaikaiyatab Jehovah ole negite inendet." 
Zechariah3:6 Ak kibaorianji malaikaiyatab Jehovah Josua eng’ kimnatet, kolenji," 
Zechariah3:7 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ngot iwendote ortinwekyuk, ak ngot irib ng’atutikyuk, iruoksechi anyun aginye gonnyu, ak irib seremusiekyuk, ak ayatun ole ibunoti eng’ kwenutab chu tonondos eng’ yuto." 
Zechariah3:8 Kas anyun nguno, ee Josua tisiindet ne o, inye koboto choronoguk che ibuuri eng’ taing’ung’; amu kaborunet bichoto: amu, keero, amutu otwogindennyu ne Temet."
