Zechariah3:9 Amu, ogeero, koita ne kiande taitab Josua; tinyei koita agenge konyek tisab: ogeero, asirjini sirutik koyato eng’ waet, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak aiste tengektab emonoto betunak." 
Zechariah3:10 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, kole, Tun kuurei chi age tugul eng’ okwek chitab kokwennyi, eng’ betunoto, konyo kelutab ketitab sabibuk, ak ne bo mogoiywet." 
Zechariah4:1 Ak kinyo kogeny malaikaiyat ne king’alalwa, ak kong’eeta ko u chito ne king’eeti eng’ ruondanyi." 
Zechariah4:2 Ak kilenja, Igeere nee? Ak kiale, Kaageer, ak keero, keldab tait ne bo tahabu tugul, kotinyei tabennyi eng’ baragunnyi, koboto taisiek tisab che bo keloto bo tait; kitinyei tait age tugul kirondoik tisab che mi baragunnyi:" 
Zechariah4:3 ak kimi emitik aeng’u ye negite tainato, kimi age komostab tai ne bo tabet, komi age komostanyi ne bo katam." 
Zechariah4:4 Ak kiawolji malaikaiyat ne king’alalwa, alenji, Nee chu-o, kiptaiyandennyu?" 
Zechariah4:5 Kowol anyun malaikaiyat ne king’alalwa, kolenja, Tos mengen kit ne bo tuguchu? Ak kiale, Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, mangen." 
Zechariah4:6 Yeityo kowol kolenja, Ni ko ng’olyotab Jehovah ne mwachin Serubabel, kolenjin, Ma eng’ kamuktaet, ama eng’ kimnatet, ago eng’ Tamirmiriennyu, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Zechariah4:7 I ng’o, ee tulwoni o? Iegu warenget eng’ taitab Serubabel: ak konem koita ne bo barak kowaaktos kolen, Mieindo, mieindo, ingotebe baragunnyi." 
Zechariah4:8 Kinyonja kogeny ng’olyotab Jehovah kole," 
Zechariah4:9 Kilumei Serubabel lumeiywotab goi; ak ko eunekyik che igesu kogeny; ak inai ile Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ne kiiyokwa anyo ole omi. 
Zechariah4:10 Amu ng’o ne kigosas betutab tuguk che mengechen? Amu tun boiboitu ichek, ak kogeer kit ne kilititisie eng’ eutab Serubabel, tuguchu tisab, che konyekab Jehovah; bendoti choto eng’ ng’ony komugul." 
Zechariah4:11 Kiawolu anyun alenji inendet, Nee emitichu aeng’u mi komostab tai ne bo keldab tait ak komi komostanyi ne bo katam?" 
Zechariah4:12 Ak kiawolu ne bo aeng’, alenji inendet, Bo nee temenichu aeng’u che bo emitik, che mi ole negite kirondoik aeng’ che bo tahabu, che rong’u mwanik?" 
Zechariah4:13 Ak kiwolwa kolenja, Mengen kit ne bo chuto? Ak kiale, Achicha, kiptaiyandennyu, mangen." 
Zechariah4:14 Kolenja anyun, Chuto ko werik aeng’ che bo mwanik, che tonone ole negite Kiptaiyat ne bo ng’ony komugul." 
Zechariah5:1 Kiayot met anyun kogeny, ak ageer, ak ogeero, bukuit ne mamanat ne tirireni." 
Zechariah5:2 Ak kilenja, Igeere nee? Ak kiawolji alenji, Ageere bukuit ne mamanat ne tirireni; koindanyi ko kakwautik tiptem che bo eut, ak tebeesindanyi ko kakwautik taman che bo eut." 
Zechariah5:3 Kimwawa anyun kolenja, Nito ko chubisiet ne wendi koyomu emet komugul: amu age tugul ne chorsei keistoi eng’ komosi ko u ye mwaei; ak age tugul ne iyostos keistoi eng’ komosin ko u ye mwaei bukuinoto." 
Zechariah5:4 Ayoktoi bukuinoto, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak kochut gotab chorindet, ak kochut gotab chito ne iyostos lembechek eng’ kainennyu: ak kotebe kwenutab gonnyi, ak koges goyoto koboto ketikyik ak koikyik." 
Zechariah5:5 Kiwa anyun malaikaiyat ne king’alalwa, ak kolenja, Yot met anyun ak igeer kioto wendi." 
Zechariah5:6 Ak kiale, Nee noto? Ak kilenja, Nito ko epah ne wendi. Kile kogeny, Ni ko kergeindanywa eng’ emet tugul:" 
Zechariah5:7 (ak ogeero, kiginamji barak talentait ne bo ngosielait:) ak nito ko kwondo ne tebyei ng’ony eng’ epah orit." 
Zechariah5:8 Ak kile, Nito ko Yaitiet; ak kiwirji inendet epah orit: yeityo konde ngosielait ne nyigis kutitab kioto." 
Zechariah5:9 Kiayot met anyun, ak ageer, oreero, kibwa kwonyik aeng’u ak kimi usonet kebebaikwak; kitinyei kebebaik che u kebebaikab chebokibabaa: ak kinamji barak epahinoto eng’ kwenutab ng’ony ak kipsengwet." 
Zechariah5:10 Kialenji anyun malaikaiyat ne king’alalwa, Ibei chu epah kwo ano?" 
Zechariah5:11 Ak kilenja, Kwo koteekyine got eng’ emetab Sinar: ak ye kagochobok, kinde yoto si kotebe oldanyi." 
Zechariah6:1 Kiayot met kogeny, ak ageer, ogeero, kibwa karisiek ang’wanu che bo luget kobunu kwenutab tulonok aeng’; ak ki bo sugunwet tulonochoto." 
Zechariah6:2 Ki biriren mbartanyisiek che bo karit ne bo tai, ak ki tuuen mbartanyisiekab karit ne bo aeng’;" 
Zechariah6:3 ak ki leelach mbartanyisiekab karit ne bo somok; ak ki busienen mbartanyisiekab karit ne bo ang’wan ak ko muruonen. 
Zechariah6:4 Kiawolji anyun malaikaiyat ne king’alalwa, alenji, Nee chu-o, kiptaiyandennyu?" 
Zechariah6:5 Ak kiwol malaikaiyat kolenja, Chuto ko usonaik ang’wan che bo kipsengwet che bendi eng’ ole katonone eng’ taitab Kiptaiyat ne bo ng’ony komugul." 
Zechariah6:6 Wendi karit ne bo mbartanyisiek che tuuen kotokyingei emet ne bo murot ne bo katam; ak kiba che leelachen kosub choto, ak kiba che busienen kotokyigei emet ne bo murot ne bo tai." 
Zechariah6:7 Ak kiba mbartanyisiek che muruonen, ak komach koba kobendate ng’ony tugul: ak kimwa kole, Oba eng’ olito, obendate ng’ony tugul. Kibendat anyun eng’ ng’ony tugul." 
Zechariah6:8 Kiguura anyun, ak kolenja, Keero, kagogaigai tamirmiriennyu ichek che kaba kotokyigei murot ne bo katam eng’ emet ne bo murot ne bo katam." 
Zechariah6:9 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah kolenja," 
Zechariah6:10 Imut bik alak eng’ che kigiluul, che bo Heldai, ak che bo Tobija, ak che bo Jedaia; ak inyo eng’ betunoto, ak iwe agoi gotab Josia weritab Sepania, ole kobunu ichek koyabu Babulon." 
Zechariah6:11 Ee, ibe ichek feda ak tahabu, ak iyae chepkuloik, yeityo igerjine metit Josua weritab Jeosadak, tisiindet ne o;" 
Zechariah6:12 ak imwachi inendet ilenji, Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Keero, chito ne kiguure kainennyi Temet; eetu eng’ oldanyi, ak koteech hekalutab Jehovah:" 
Zechariah6:13 ee, inendet ne teechei hekalutab Jehovah; ak konam torornatet, ak kotebe ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, ak kobounis; ak koek tisiindet eng’ ng’echerennyi ne bo laitornatet, ak kotebe kiruogetab kalyet kwenunywa ichek tuwai." 
Zechariah6:14 Ak kobunjin chepkuloichoto Helem, Tobija, Jedaia, ak Hen weritab Sepania, koek kabwatet eng’ hekalutab Jehovah." 
Zechariah6:15 Ak kobwa ichek che mi ole loo ak koteech hekalutab Jehovah, ak onai ole kiiyokwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek anyo ole omi. Ak isuldoi nito, ngot ogas it eng’ kagiiletab ge kutitab Jehovah Kamuktaindeng’wong’." 
Zechariah7:1 Kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Sekaria, eng’ kenyitab ang’wan ne bo laitoriat Darius, eng’ betut ab ang’wan ne bo arawetab sogol, noto ko Kisleb." 
Zechariah7:2 Kiga koyokto anyun ichek che bo Bet-el Sareser ak Regem-melek, koboto bikwak, koba kosom chamet eng’ Jehovah," 
Zechariah7:3 ak kong’alalji tisiikab gotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak maotik, kolenji, Tos kanyolja arir eng’ arawet ne bo mut, atabange, ko u ye kiayai eng’ kenyisiechu chang’ kot?" 
Zechariah7:4 Kinyonja anyun ng’olyotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kolenja," 
Zechariah7:5 Ng’alalji bik tugul che bo emet, ak tisiik, ilenji, Ye kigorugutge ak oririe eng’ arawetab mut ak ne bo tisab, eng’ kenyisiechoto tamanwogik tisab, ko tos kiorugutge agobo ane, anendet?" 
Zechariah7:6 Ak ye oame, ak ye oee, ko tos moamjinige, ak oeechinige?" 
Zechariah7:7 Tos manyoljok ogas ng’alek che kimwa Jehovah eng’ maotik che bo tai, ye kigimenyei Jerusalem, ak komi berurto, ak nganasokyik che mi komoswekyik tugul, ak ye kigimenyei Murot ne bo Tai ak soito?" 
Zechariah7:8 Ak kinyonji ng’olyotab Jehovah Sekaria kolenji," 
Zechariah7:9 Kamwa Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Oyai kiruoget ne bo iman, ak oyachi chi age tugul eng’ okwek tupchennyi mieindo ak rirenet:" 
Zechariah7:10 amous mosok, anan ne matinyei kwanda, anan ne too, anan ne banan; amat kobwat chi age tugul eng’ okwek yaitiet eng’ muguleldanyi agobo tupchennyi." 
Zechariah7:11 Ago kiesio kogas it, ak kililich tigigoikwak, ak kotim itikwak, si magas." 
Zechariah7:12 Ee, kiiuuiit mugulelwekwak koigei kibargoiyet, si magas ng’atutiet, ak ng’alek che kiga koyok Jehovah ne bo lugosiek eng’ Tamirmiriennyi eng’ eunekab maotik che bo tai: kimong’ anyun neregek che eechen kobunu Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, amu noto." 
Zechariah7:13 Ak ko u ye kingorirji inendet ichek, ama kogas, ko u noto tun rirtos ichek, amagase, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek;" 
Zechariah7:14 ago aiyestoi ichek eng’ kipchurjuriet eng’ bororiosiek tugul che kitomo konai. Kiek anyun emet karatia eng’ let, kot ko mata kobun chi yoto anan koweegegei: amu kiigochi emet ne ki kararan koguber." 
Zechariah8:1 Kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kolenja," 
Zechariah8:2 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ama ng’etkong’ agobo Sion, ng’etkonda ne o, ak ama ng’etkong’ agobo inendet eng’ neregek che ng’wonen mising’." 
Zechariah8:3 Mwaei Jehovah ko u ni kole: Kaaweekyige Sion, ak ameny kwenutab Jerusalem: ak keguure Jerusalem, Nganaset ne bo iman; ak keguure tulwetab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Tulwet ne tilil." 
Zechariah8:4 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ta komenyei boisiek ak chebiosok ortinwekab Jerusalem, kotinyei chi age tugul kiroktanyi amu osindo." 
Zechariah8:5 Ak konyi ortinwek che bo nganaset ng’etik ak tibik che urerendos eng’ ortinwechato. 
Zechariah8:6 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ngot ko bo kwong’et eng’ konyekab bik che ng’etu eng’ bichu eng’ betusiechoto, ko tos ma bo kwong’et agine eng’ konyekyuk? Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Zechariah8:7 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ogeero, asoru bikyuk eng’ emet ne bo kong’asis, ak eng’ emet ne bo cherongo:" 
Zechariah8:8 ak amutu ichek, ak komeny kwenutab Jerusalem; ak koek ichek bikyuk, ak aegu Kamuktaindenywa, eng’ imanit ak eng’ imanda." 
Zechariah8:9 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ingogimegitu eunekwok, okwek che ogase ng’alechu eng’ betusiechu eng’ maotik, che kimi eng’ betut ne kigiluumei lumeiywotab gotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, noto ko hekalut, si keteech." 
Zechariah8:10 Amu kingotom koit betusiechoto ko kima konyoru chi melekto, ak kima keyaaktoi kiy agobo tiony; ak kima komi kalyet eng’ inendet ne mandoi ak eng’ inendet ne nyonei amu bunyot: amu kiagochi chi age tugul koborio ak chitab kokwennyi." 
Zechariah8:11 Ago ma a u eng’ bichu king’et, kit ne kia u eng’ betusiek che bo tai, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Zechariah8:12 Amu tun biitu keswotab kalyet: tun yiei ketitab sabibuk, ak korurio tuguk eng’ emet, ak kogon kipsengwetisiek rewot; ak agochi bik che king’et eng’ bichu konam tuguchu tugul koek borotenywa." 
Zechariah8:13 Ak ko u ye kioegu che chubotin eng’ bororiosiek, ee gotab Juda ak gotab Israel, asoruok anyun, si oegu kaberuret: amoiywei, ago ingogimegitu eunekwok." 
Zechariah8:14 Amu mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Ko u ye kigabwat ayaiywok yaitiet, ye kitacha kwanisiekwok kot anerech, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak kima awal kabwatutikyuk;" 
Zechariah8:15 kaabwat anyun kogeny eng’ betusiechuto ayachi ne mie Jerusalem koboto gotab Juda: amoiywei. 
Zechariah8:16 Chu tuguk che tun oyae; Ingomwachi chi age tugul eng’ okwek chitab kokwennyi imanit; oyai kiruoget ne bo imanit ak kalyet eng’ ormarichokwok: 
Zechariah8:17 amat kobwat chi age tugul eng’ okwek yaitiet eng’ muguleldanyi agobo chitab kokwennyi: amocham kayosiet age tugul ne bo lembech: amu aweche tuguchuto tugul, mwaei Jehovah." 
Zechariah8:18 Ak kinyonja ng’olyotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kolenja," 
Zechariah8:19 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Egu eng’ gotab Juda boiboiyet ak kagasetab ge, ak igorwekab boiboiyet, karugutetab ge ne bo arawetab ang’wan, ak ne bo arawetab mut, ak ne bo arawetab tisab, ak ne bo arawetab taman; ocham anyun imanit ak kalyet." 
Zechariah8:20 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Tun bwanei bororiosiek ak bik che menyei nganasok che chang’: 
Zechariah8:21 ak koba bik che bo nganaset age nganaset age kolenji, Ongechakte kebe kesom chamet eng’ Jehovah, ak kecheng’ Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: awendi agane." 
Zechariah8:22 Ee, bwanei bik che chang’ ak bororiosiek che kimen kocheng’ Jehovah ne bo lugosiek eng’ Jerusalem, ak kosom chamet eng’ Jehovah." 
Zechariah8:23 Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole: Tun namei bik tamanu eng’ betusiechoto, che bunu kutuswek tugul che bo bororiosiek, ngorietab Yahudiot, kolenji, Kibendi tugul koboten, amu kigegas kele mi Kamuktaindet kobotok." 
Zechariah9:1 Lautietab ng’olyotab Jehovah agobo emetab Hadrak, ak egu Damasko ole tebe: amu tokyingei Jehovah bik tugul ak bororiosiek tugul che bo Israel:" 
Zechariah9:2 koboto Hamat agine ne mi kiwotennyi: Turo ak Sidon, amu ng’omen mising’." 
Zechariah9:3 Ak kiteekyigei Turo irimet, ak kiiyum feda ko u temburiek, ak koyum tahabu che kororon ko u ng’atatekab ortinwek." 
Zechariah9:4 Ogeero, onei Kiptaiyat inendet, ak kowirji kimnatennyi nyanjet; ak kebeel." 
Zechariah9:5 Keerei Askelon ak koiyweis; keerei Gasa agine, ak konyor ng’wanindo ne o; ak Ekron agine, amu ililani eng’ kamang’unennyi: ak kobet laitoriat eng’ Gasa, ama kemenyei Askelon." 
Zechariah9:6 Ak komeny chito ne bo sarbuch Asdod, ak agesu menotetab Pilistik." 
Zechariah9:7 Ak aiste korotikyik eng’ kutinnyi, ak aiste tugukyik che kiweechei eng’ kelekyik; ak koek inendet agine ne ng’etu agobo Kamuktaindennyo: ak koigei bounindet eng’ Juda, ak koigei Ekron Jebusindet." 
Zechariah9:8 Ak ameng’isie ayiem gonnyu si agirinda luget, si mabun chi yoto anan koweegegei: ama mi usindet ne bunei kwenunywa agoi: amu kaageer nguno eng’ konyekyuk." 
Zechariah9:9 Baibaitu mising’, ee cheptab Sion; waach, ee cheptab Jerusalem: keero, nyonjinin laitoriandeng’ung’: bo iman inendet, ak kotinyei yetunet; iming’inegei, ak kolong’onu sigiriet, moitab sigiriet ne kirgit." 
Zechariah9:10 Ak ang’em karitab luget eng’ Epraim, koboto mbartanyit eng’ Jerusalem, ak kiges kwangetab boriet; ak komwachi bororiosiek kalyet: ak iboch bounatennyi nyanjet age agoi nyanjet age, ak koboch Ainet agoi tabanwekab ng’ony." 
Zechariah9:11 Ago eng’ inye, ko kiayokte kimonjororiniguk eng’ keringet ne mami beek, amu korotikab kayomiseng’ung’." 
Zechariah9:12 Oweekyige irimet, okwek kimonjororinik che otinye kamang’unet: agot rani amwae ale, ageerun konyil aeng’." 
Zechariah9:13 Amu kiarikyige Juda ko u kwanget, ak agersach Epraim; ak ang’eet weriguk, ee Sion, kobargei ak weriguk, ee, emetab Yunanik, ak ayain iige rotwetab chok ne bo chito ne nyigan." 
Zechariah9:14 Ak kotook Jehovah eng’ baragunywa, ak kwo ne kipchabennyi ko u kalyelet: ak koguut Kiptaiyat Jehovah iriaget, ak kwo koboto kipchurjurinik che bo murot ne bo tai." 
Zechariah9:15 Ak korib Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ichek; ak koges, ak kotiekyi ng’ony koik che kiwirtoe borowet; ak koeeiso, ak kowaakyo ko u che kaee divaik: ak kinyiit ko u tabok, ko u luukwekab kaptisisiet." 
Zechariah9:16 Ak kosor Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa ichek eng’ betunoto ko u akwetab kechirekab bikyik: amu tun kergeitu ak koik che bo chepkulet, ne kinamjin barak mising’ eng’ emennyi." 
Zechariah9:17 Amu o ne tia mieindanyi, ak o ne tia kororonindanyi! Igochin bek murenik konerio, ak kogochin divaik che leelach tibik konerio." 
Zechariah10:1 Osom Jehovah ropta eng’ betusiek che bo ropta ne bo let, Jehovah ne yaei kalyelosiek; si kogochi ichek ropta ne inesi, ak kogochi chi age tugul suswek eng’ emet." 
Zechariah10:2 Amu kigomwa terapik tangoita, ak kigogeer bik che ng’orsei lembechek, ak kigomwa ichek karuotitaosiek che bo lembech, igoigoisiei buch; bendoti ko u kechirek, kinyalili amu matinyei mestowot." 
Zechariah10:3 Anerekyini mestowek, ak abire kwesik: amu karutochi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek akwennyi ne bo kechirek, gotab Juda, ak koyai ichek koigei mbartanyinnyi ne mie eng’ boriet." 
Zechariah10:4 Mong’une inendet koita ne bo luita, mong’une inendet kipchumariat, mong’une inendet kwangetab boriet, mong’une inendet age tugul ne usisiei kibagenge." 
Zechariah10:5 Ak koigei bik che nyigonen, che tiechei bunikwak eng’ ng’atatekab ortinwek eng’ boriet; ak kobargei, amu mi Jehovah koboto ichek: ak kotoptobenso bik che lanyei mbartanyisiek." 
Zechariah10:6 Ak agimit gotab Juda, ak asoru gotab Josep, ak amutu ichek kogeny, amu arire ichek; ak koigei ye kima amete ichek: amu a Jehovah Kamuktaindenywa, ak agas ichek." 
Zechariah10:7 Ak koigei ichek che bo Epraim chito ne nyigan, ak koboiboitu mugulelwekwak ko u che kaeei divaik: ee, keerei lagokwok noto, ak koboiboitu; igasegei mugulelwekwak eng’ Jehovah." 
Zechariah10:8 Aititenjini ichek, ak ayum, amu kiatiach ichek: ak kotesogis ko u ye kiga kotesogis." 
Zechariah10:9 Ak agol ichek eng’ kwenutab bororiosiek; ak kobwata komi emotinwek che looen: ak komeng’is koboto lagokwak, ak koweeigei." 
Zechariah10:10 Amutu ichek kogeny komong’une emetab Misri, ak ayum ichek komong’ eng’ Asuria; ak amutu ichek kobwa emetab Gilead ak Lebanon; ama biitu ole yamei ichek." 
Zechariah10:11 Ak beek che mildogei eng’ nyanjet, ak kotenyo rirosiek tugul che bo Nael: ak kiming’in menotetab Asuria, ak koistogei siaritab Misri." 
Zechariah10:12 Ak agimit ichek eng’ Jehovah; ak kobendate kainennyi, mwaei Jehovah." 
Zechariah11:1 Yat kurgotiguk, ee Lebanon, si kobeel mat taragoniguk." 
Zechariah11:2 Waach, ee biribirioni, amu kagobut tarakwet, amu kageng’em che kororon: owaach, ee ketikab Bason, amu kagolul osnet ne kim." 
Zechariah11:3 Kutitab mestowek che waachei! Amu kageng’em torornatenywa; kutitab ng’etunyik che neran che borisendos! Amu kageng’em menotetab Jordan. 
Zechariah11:4 Kamwa Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu ko u ni kole: Iyage akwetab kechirek che kienyei; 
Zechariah11:5 che enyei bikab kobo, ak kolen, Magitinye tengek; ak komwaei ichek che aldoi, kole, Iberurot Jehovah, amu a magorio: ama rire mestowekwak ichek." 
Zechariah11:6 Amu ma arire kogeny bik che menyei emoni, mwaei Jehovah: ago keero, agoitoi chi tugul kwo eutab chitab kokwennyi, ak agoite kwo eutab laitoriandennyi: ak kobar emet, amasoru ichek eng’ eunywa." 
Zechariah11:7 Kiayage anyun akwetab kechirek che kienyei, kechirek che nyerotin iman. Kiaib anyun kirokwek aeng’; kiaguure age Mieindo, aguure age Ratutik; ak kiayage akwet." 
Zechariah11:8 Ak kiang’em mestowek somok eng’ arawet agenge; amu kigong’et sobondanyu agobo ichek, ak kowecha kogeny sobonwekwak." 
Zechariah11:9 Kiamwa anyun ale, Maayagok: ingome ne meei; ak ingebar ne kibarei; ak ingoam age tugul eng’ che kang’et banyekab age." 
Zechariah11:10 Ak kianam kiroktanyu Mieindo, ak aeb apcheune aeng’, si kobiit abut kayomisennyu ne kigiyomisge koboto bororiosiek tugul." 
Zechariah11:11 Ak kibutok eng’ betunoto: ak kinai anyun che nyerotin che bo akwetab kechirek, che kiepcha it, kole ki ng’olyotab Jehovah noto." 
Zechariah11:12 Ak kialenji ichek, Ngot obwat ole mie, ogona melektanyu; ak ngo ma u noto, ko mat ogona. Kogerua anyun fedaisiek sosom koek melektanyu." 
Zechariah11:13 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Wirji cheptereniot, noto ko alyet ne mie ne kigamanwa. Kiaib anyun fedaisiechoto sosom, ak awirji cheptereniot eng’ gotab Jehovah." 
Zechariah11:14 Yeityo aeb apcheune aeng’ kiroktanyu age, noto Ratutik, si kobiit ang’eti tupchondit ne ting’egei Juda ak Israel." 
Zechariah11:15 Ak kilenja Jehovah, Nam kogeny tugukab mestowot ne berber." 
Zechariah11:16 Amu, keero, ang’eeti mestowot eng’ emoni, ne marutochin che kigeon, ama cheng’ei che kiyesta, anan konya ne kigoil; ama baei ne chamegei, ago amei banyekab che neriotin, ak kobetabet siokwak." 
Zechariah11:17 Bwa mestowot ne matilei kiy ne bagaktoi akwet! Ing’ururi rotwetab chok eunnyi ak kondanyi ne bo tai: yaamei eunnyi, ak kogor kondanyi ne bo tai." 
Zechariah12:1 Lautietab ng’olyotab Jehovah agobo Israel. 
Zechariah12:2 Mwaei Jehovah, ne iitoi kipsengwetisiek, ak kolumei lumeiywotab ng’ony, ak koyaei tamirmirietab chi eng’ oritab chichoto, ko u ni kole: Ogeero, ayae Jerusalem koek kikombet ne bo terteriotet eng’ bik tugul che mi komoswekyik tugul, egu ko u noto eng’ Juda agine eng’ betusiek che kiyiemei Jerusalem." 
Zechariah12:3 Ak ayae Jerusalem eng’ betunoto koek koita ne nyigis ne iimi bik tugul; nyoru berutik che chang’ ichek che kanabi koyato: ak koyumjigei inendet bororiosiek tugul che bo ng’ony. 
Zechariah12:4 Mwaei Jehovah eng’ betunoto kole, Agochini mbartanyit age tugul kokwong’, ak abire iywek chinnyi ne lanyei: ak ayat konyekyuk ageer gotab Juda, ak abire koratet mbartanyit age tugul ne bo bororiosiek." 
Zechariah12:5 Ak komwa bounikab Juda eng’ mugulelwekwak kole, Bik che menyei Jerusalem ko kimnatennyu eng’ Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, Kamuktaindenywa." 
Zechariah12:6 Ayae eng’ betunoto bounikab Juda koigei rokyietab mat ne mi kwenik, ak koigei kegenget ne mi kwenutab ratutikab bek; ak koges bik tugul che mi komoswek tugul che mi eutab tai ak che mi eutab katam: ak komeny Jerusalem kogeny komostanyi, noto ko Jerusalem." 
Zechariah12:7 Sib kosoru Jehovah emaisiekab Juda, si maeet torornatetab gotab Daudi ak torornatetab bik che menyei Jerusalem, kosiir Juda." 
Zechariah12:8 Ribei Jehovah eng’ betunoto bik che menyei Jerusalem; ak koigei ne nyalulat eng’ ichek Daudi eng’ betunoto; ak koigei gotab Daudi Kamuktaindet, ko u malaikaiyatab Jehovah ne mi tainywa." 
Zechariah12:9 Ak acheng’ abar eng’ betunoto bororiosiek tugul che ibokyin Jerusalem. 
Zechariah12:10 Ak arong’ji tamirmirietab mieindo ak ne bo somet gotab Daudi, ak bik che menyei Jerusalem, ak konyala ichek che kitoora: ak kotee agobo inendet ko u ye iteei chi agobo werinnyi ne kigii inegeik ak konyo ng’wanindo agobo inendet, ko u inendet ne mi eng’ ng’wanindo agobo taitanyi." 
Zechariah12:11 Biitu eng’ betunoto kateeiyet ne o eng’ Jerusalem, ne u kateeiyetab Hadadrimon eng’ atebwetab Megidon." 
Zechariah12:12 Ak kote emet, iteei oret age tugul inegei; iteeitos che bo gotab Daudi ichegei, ak koteeiyo osotikwak ichegei; iteeitos che bo gotab Natan ichegei, ak koteeiyo osotikwak ichegei;" 
Zechariah12:13 iteeitos che bo gotab Lawi ichegei, ak koteeiyo osotikwak ichegei; iteeitos che bo gotab Simei ichegei, ak koteeiyo osotikwak ichegei;" 
Zechariah12:14 iteeitos ortinwek tugul che kang’et, iteei oret age tugul inegei, ak koteeiyo osotikwak ichegei." 
Zechariah13:1 Tun kiyatyin gotab Daudi ak bik che menyei Jerusalem, kondametutab beek eng’ betunoto, amu tengekto ak muruonindo." 
Zechariah13:2 Ak mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole, Tun aistoi eng’ betunoto kainaikab kanamonik eng’ emet, ama kibwati kogeny: ak aiste kogeny maotik ak tamirmiriet ne muruon eng’ emet." 
Zechariah13:3 Ak ngot ko tun komaoten age tugul, kolenji anyun kwanda ak kamet che kisichei chichoto, Mesobe; amu imwae lembechek eng’ kainetab Jehovah: ak kotoor inendet kwanda ak kamet che kisichei inendet, ye kamaoten." 
Zechariah13:4 Ak tun ililandos maotik eng’ betunoto, ililani age tugul agobo ng’ang’utiennyi, ye kamaoten; ama kolaachi ngoriet ne sabul si kobiit koberber bik:" 
Zechariah13:5 ago mwaei kole, Ma a maotiot, a kabatindet; amu kigiyaa aek otwogindet koboch ming’inatennyu." 
Zechariah13:6 Ak keteebe kelenji, Bo nee berutichu mi euneguk? Kowol anyun kole, Bo berutichu kaguotenet ne kigiguotena eng’ gotab choronokyuk." 
Zechariah13:7 Ng’eet, ee rotwetab chok, borie mestowondennyu, borie chito ne kimi tuwai, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: bir mestowot, si koiyesta kechirek; ak atokyi eunnyu che mengechen." 
Zechariah13:8 Kiistoi, ak kobek eng’ betunoto eng’ emet komugul, kebeberwek aeng’, mwaei Jehovah; ago kibagakyin oloto kebeberta agenge eng’ somok." 
Zechariah13:9 Ak amut kebeberato bo somok kobun mat, ak atilil ichek ko u ye kitilili feda ak atiem ichek ko u ye kitiemei tahabu: kuurei ichek kainennyu, ak agas ichek: amwae ale, Icheget ko bikyuk; ak kole, Jehovah ko Kamuktaindennyu." 
Zechariah14:1 Ogeero, nyonei betutab Jehovah, ye tun kipcheei baruneniguk eng’ kwenung’ung’." 
Zechariah14:2 Amu tun ayumi bororiosiek tugul kobokyi Jerusalem kobargei; ak kenam nganaset, ak keluul gorik, ak kesuub kwonyik: ak kimut kebebertab nganaset koek luulenik, ama kibarei bik che kang’et eng’ nganaset." 
Zechariah14:3 Yeityo kwo Jehovah, kwo kobargei ak bororiosiechoto, ko u ye kiyaei boriet eng’ betutab luget." 
Zechariah14:4 Ak tun tononie kelyekyik eng’ betunoto tulwetab Emitik, ne mi taitab Jerusalem eng’ komostab kong’asis, ak kobetak kwenutab tulwetab Emitik ole tokyingei kong’asis ak cherongo, ak kobiit eng’ yoto atebwet ne o; ak kwo kebebertab tulwonoto kotokyingei murot ne bo katam, ak kwo kebeberta age kotokyigei murot ne bo tai." 
Zechariah14:5 Ak omwei obun atebwetab tulonokyuk; amu itei atebwetab tulonok Asel: ee, omwei, ko u ye kiomwei ye kibotani ng’ony eng’ betusiekab Usia laitoriatab Juda: ak konyo Jehovah Kamuktaindennyu, komi bik tugul che tililen koboto inendet." 
Zechariah14:6 Ak mailuu lapkeiyet eng’ betunoto amaimenitu: 
Zechariah14:7 ago betut agenge ne naat eng’ Jehovah; ma bet, ama kemoi: ago lapkeitu koskoleny." 
Zechariah14:8 Ak tun mong’une beek che soptos Jerusalem eng’ betunoto; bendi kebeberta age kotokyingei nyanjet ne mi kong’asis, kobendi kebeberta age kotokyingei nyanjet ne mi cherongo: bendi ko u noto eng’ kemei ak iwot." 
Zechariah14:9 Ak koek Jehovah laitoriatab ng’ony komugul: egu agenge Jehovah eng’ betunoto, ak koek agenge kainennyi." 
Zechariah14:10 Kiwalei emet tugul koigei Araba, koboch Geba agoi Rimon murot ne bo tai ne bo Jerusalem; ak kieeti, ak komeny oldanyi, koboch ormarichetab Benjamin, agoi komostab ormarichet ne bo tai, agoi ormarichetab luita, koboch teekset ne koi ne bo Hananel, agoi komoswekab laitoriat ole kitue sabibuk." 
Zechariah14:11 Ak komeny bik oloto, ama komi chubisiet kogeny; ago meng’isiei Jerusalem eng’ chametab ge." 
Zechariah14:12 Ak biitu koroitab ng’ony ne bire Jehovah bik tugul che kibargei ak Jerusalem: nundos borwekwak kota kotonondos, ak konunio konyekwak eng’ kelongonikwak, ak konunio ng’elyebwekwak eng’ kutuswekwak." 
Zechariah14:13 Bunu Jehovah eng’ betunoto wasetab ge ne o, ne nyonei kwenunywa; ak konam age tugul eng’ ichek eutab chitab kokwennyi, ak kobargei inendet ak chitab kokwennyi." 
Zechariah14:14 Ak kobargei Juda agine ak Jerusalem; ak kiyomo magornatosiek che bo bororiosiek tugul, che mi komoswek tugul, tahabu, feda, ak ngoroik, eng’ chang’indo ne o." 
Zechariah14:15 Ak biitu ko u noto, koroito ne bo mbartanyit, ak ne bo nyumbut, ak ne bo tambesiet, ak ne bo sigiriet, ak ne bo tiong’ik tugul che mitei meng’otosiechoto, ko u koroiyoto." 
Zechariah14:16 Ak age tugul ne ng’etu eng’ bororiosiek tugul che kiibokyin Jerusalem, kotogostoi oloto eng’ kenyit age tugul, kolosu Laitoriat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak koyai igorta ne bo keriosiek." 
Zechariah14:17 Ak age tugul ne bo ortinwek tugul che bo ng’ony ne matogostoi Jerusalem kolosu Laitoriat, Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ko manyoru choto ropta." 
Zechariah14:18 Ak ngot ko matogosta oretab gotab Misri, amabwa, ko marobonjin agichek; biitu koroito ne bire Jehovah bororiosiek che matogosta koba koyai igorta ne bo keriosiek." 
Zechariah14:19 Egu nito biretab Misri, ak biretab bororiosiek tugul che matogosta koba igorta ne bo keriosiek." 
Zechariah14:20 Tun kisirjin eng’ betunoto chepchingilokab mbartanyisiek kole, TILIL ENG’ JEHOVAH; igeitu terenik che mi gotab Jehovah tabok che mi taitab kaptisisiet." 
Zechariah14:21 Ee, kitililjin Jehovah ne bo lugosiek teret age tugul eng’ Jerusalem ak eng’ Juda; ak kobwa ichek tugul che eng’sei, koib terenichoto ak koyoise: ama komitei kogeny eng’ betunoto chemung’araindet eng’ gotab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi1:1 Lautietab ng’olyotab Jehovah ne kiigochi Israel eng’ Malaki. 
Malachi1:2 Kiachamak, mwaei Jehovah. Ago omwae ole, Kiichamenech nee? Tos kima ko ng’etab kametab Jakobo Esau? Mwaei Jehovah: ago kiacham Jakobo;" 
Malachi1:3 ago kiawech Esau, ak ayai tulonokyik koguber, ak agochi borotennyi lelwek che bo ong’atet." 
Malachi1:4 Amu mwaei Edom kole, Kigiterterech, ago kiweeksei ak keteech komoswek che kigoek karatwek; mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek ko u ni kole, Tun teechei ichek ago abute: ak koguure bik ichek, Kiwotetab yaitiet, ak koguure, Bik che ting’e Jehovah neregek koigeny." 
Malachi1:5 Ogeere ak ole, Ingotororit Jehovah kosiir kiwotetab Israel." 
Malachi1:6 Teechei werit kwandanyi, ak koteech otwogindet kiptaiyandennyi: ngot ko a kwanda anyun, ko mi ano teegistanyu? Ak ngot ko a kiptaiyat, komi ano kaiyweisiet ne kiywea? Mwawok Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ee tisiik, che osase kainennyu. Ak omwae ole, Kigisas eng’ nee kaineng’ung’?" 
Malachi1:7 Ogoitoi makatinik che muruonen eng’ kaptisisiennyu. Ak omwae ole, Kigimuruonenen nee? Amu omwae ole, Sasat mesetab Jehovah." 
Malachi1:8 Ak ye ogoitoi che koriotin koek tiseiywek, ko tos ma yaitiet noto? Ak ye ogoitoi che ing’waldos ak che miandos, ko tos ma yaitiet noto? Igochi anyun noto bounindeng’ung’; tos baibaitunenen? Anan tos taachin ye keerin? Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi1:9 Asomok anyun ale, osom chametab Kamuktaindet, si kobiit korirenech: bunwok nito: tos taach age eng’ okwek ye keer? Mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi1:10 Kata kaigai nda kami chi eng’ okwek ne kerei kurgotik, si molaal mat eng’ kaptisisiennyu buch! Maabaibai eng’ okwek, agot kitigin, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, amataache kagochinet ne bunu eunekwok." 
Malachi1:11 Amu o kainennyu eng’ Bororiosiek koboch ole chorune asis agoi ole roroktoe; ak kigoitoi eng’ komosta age tugul nyamdutik che kibeelei agobo kainennyu, koboto kagochinet ne tilil: amu o kainennyu, eng’ Bororiosiek, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi1:12 Ago ong’waniti amu omwae ole, Muruon mesetab Jehovah, ak ko sasotin logoekyik, agot amitwogikyik." 
Malachi1:13 Omwae kogeny ole, Ogeero, kaiimetab ge ne tia! Ak ogututae serunek, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek; ak kioibu che kigoam tiondo ak che ing’waldos, ak che miandos; oibu kagochinet ko u noto: tos ataach nito ne bunu eunekwok? Mwaei Jehovah." 
Malachi1:14 Ago chubot kaberberindet, ne tinyei mengit eng’ akwennyi, ak koarorto, yeityo koeng’ji Kiptaiyat kit ne tinyei berutiet: amu a laitoriat ne o, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ak kiywei kainennyu eng’ Bororiosiek." 
Malachi2:1 Ee okwek tisiik, neng’wong’ ng’atutioni." 
Malachi2:2 Ngot ko momache ogas, ak ngot ko momache ogonore mugulelwekwok, si kobiit otoror kainennyu, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, ayokwok anyun chubisiet, ak achub berurwogikwok: ee, kaachub amu mogonore ng’atutionoto mugulelwek." 
Malachi2:3 Ogeero, ang’eme keswek amu okwek, ak alage ng’atatek togochikwok, ng’atatekab kagochinoikwok; ak keistok koboto tuguchoto." 
Malachi2:4 Ak onai ole kiayokwok ng’atutionito, si kotebi kayomisennyu koboto Lawik, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi2:5 Kimi kayomisennyu ne bo sobondo ak kalyet koboto inendet; ak kiagochi tuguchoto inendet si kobiit koiyweis, ak koiywea, ak kogonyit kainennyu." 
Malachi2:6 Kimi kutinnyi ng’atutietab imanit, ama kinyorji kutinnyi kit ne ma bo iman: kigibendate tuwai eng’ kalyet ak eng’ lititindo, ak koweech che chang’ kometo tengekto." 
Malachi2:7 Amu kanyo korib kutitab tisiindet naet, ak kocheng’ bik ng’atutiet eng’ ng’alekyik: amu inendet ko chito ne iyoktoi Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi2:8 Ago kiomaste eng’ oret; kionach che chang’ eng’ ng’atutiet; kiong’em kayomisetab Lawi, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi2:9 Kiayaak anyun ak okwek oegu che kisasei ak ko nyerotin eng’ taitab bik tugul, ko u ye kima orib ortinwekyuk, ago kiotiytii bik eng’ ng’atutik." 
Malachi2:10 Tos magitinye achek tugul kwanda agenge? Tos ma yaech Kamuktaindet agenge? Amu nee si koberberi age tugul eng’ achek tupchennyi, king’waniti kayomisetab kwanisiekyok?" 
Malachi2:11 Kigoyai Juda kaberberisiet, ak kigeyai kit ne kiwechei eng’ Israel ak eng’ Jerusalem; amu kigong’wanit Juda tililindab Jehovah ne chamei, ak kotun cheptab cheptalelit ne ter." 
Malachi2:12 Igesu Jehovah chito ne yachin inendet kiito, inendet ne kosu ak inendet ne wolu, kiistoe ichek emaisiekab Jakobo, koboto inendet ne igoitoi kagochinet, kogochin Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi2:13 Ak ni kit age ne oyae kogeny, otumjini beekab kong’ kaptisisietab Jehovah, eng’ rirek, ak eng’ kateeiyet, kot ko ma koiiti kogeny kagochinet, ama kotaachei eng’ chamnyet che ogochini eng’ eunekwok." 
Malachi2:14 Ago, omwae ole, Kalya? Amu kogoek Jehovah baoriat eng’ kwenung’wong’, inye ak osotiotab ming’inateng’ung’, ne kiiberber, nganda, inendet ko chamaneng’ung’, ak ko osotiotab kayomisutieng’ung’." 
Malachi2:15 Ak tos kima yai inendet koek agenge, nganda kitinyei tamirmiriet ne king’et? Amu nee si koek agenge? Kicheng’ iyotet ne iywei Kamuktaindet. Orib anyun tamirmirikwok, amat koberber chi osotiotab ming’inatennyi." 
Malachi2:16 Amu aweche besiet, mwaei Jehovah, Kamuktaindetab Israel, ak inendet ne tuge ngoriennyi sastaet, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek: orib anyun tamirmirikwok, si moberberisie." 
Malachi2:17 Kooiim Jehovah eng’ ng’alekwok. Ago omwae ole, Kigiime nee? Amu omwae ole, Mie age tugul eng’ taitab Jehovah ne yaei yaitiet ak koboiboitune bichoto: anan mi ano Kamuktaindet ne bo kiruoget?" 
Malachi3:1 Ogeero, ayogu chito nenyu, ne kiyoktoi, ak kochob oret eng’ tainnyu: ak sib konyonei hekalunnyi Kiptaiyat ne ocheng’e; ne chito ne kiyoktoi ne bo arorutiet, ne oboiboitune, ogeero, nyonei, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi3:2 Ago ng’o ne imuchi komuita eng’ betutab nyonunennyi? Ak ng’o ne tononi ye katook? Amu u inendet mat ne kitililisie, ak ko u sabunitab mwetik:" 
Malachi3:3 ak koteb ng’ony ko u kaunindetab feda ak ko katililindet, ak kitilil werikab Lawik, ak kotilil ichek ko u ye kitilili tahabu ak feda; ak kogochi Jehovah kagochinoik eng’ imanda." 
Malachi3:4 Si kochamak anyun kagochinetab Juda ak ne bo Jerusalem eng’ Jehovah ko u eng’ betusiek che bo keny, ak eng’ kenyisiek che bo keny." 
Malachi3:5 Ak arikyok eng’ kiruoget, ak aegu baoriat ne chepcheb agobo bonik, ak agobo che ibegei, ak agobo bik che iyostos eng’ lembechek; ak agobo ichek che sastoe otwogindet ne kisirei eng’ melektanyi, che sastoe mosok, ak ne matinyei kwanda, ak ne imaasi toondet, amaiywea, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi3:6 Amu mawalaksei ane Jehovah, magigeswok anyun, ee okwek werikab Jakobo." 
Malachi3:7 Kiomaste koboch betusiekab kwanisiekwok omete kayomisutikyuk, ama orib. Oweekyage anyun, si aweekyoge, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek. Ago omwae ole, Kiweegundoige ano?" 
Malachi3:8 Tos chorei chi Kamuktaindet? Ago ochora. Ago omwae ole, Kigichorten ano? Kiochor kebeberwekab taman ak kagochinoik." 
Malachi3:9 Kichubok eng’ chubet; amu ochora, agot bororioni komugul." 
Malachi3:10 Oibu kebeberwek tugul che bo taman kobwa choge, si kobiit amitwogik eng’ gonnyu, ak otiema anyun eng’ noto, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, si ogeer ngo mayatwok tirisiokab kipsengwet, ak arong’wok berurto, kot ko ma komi ole ondoi." 
Malachi3:11 Ak ager kong’ ne amisioti amu okwek, si mang’em ruratetab emeng’wong’; ama oosu ketikwok che bo sabibuk kotomo koit betusiek, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi3:12 Ak koguurenok bororiosiek tugul bik che boiboi: amu oegu emet ne kichamei kot, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi3:13 Kigouuegitu ng’alekwok che kiomwa agobo ane, mwaei Jehovah. Ago omwae ole, Nee ne kigemwa agobo inye?" 
Malachi3:14 Kiomwa ole, Matilei kiy ngeot Kamuktaindet: ak tos kelwech nee amu kigerib kayomisutikyik, kigebendate taitab Jehovah ne bo lugosiek keririoti?" 
Malachi3:15 Ak nguno keguure menotik bik che boiboi, ee, kigimiti ichek che yaei yaitiet; ee, tiemei Kamuktaindet ak kochilildos." 
Malachi3:16 King’alaljigei anyun che iywei Jehovah: ak kieb it Jehovah kogas ak kigisir eng’ tainnyi bukuitab kabwatet agobo ichek che iywei Jehovah, ak kobwati kainennyi." 
Malachi3:17 Ak mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek kole, Bunjina ichek, eng’ betut ne ayae ichek koek kinnyu ne nenyu anege; ak arire ichek ko u ye rire chi werinnyi ne boisiechin." 
Malachi3:18 Yeityo oweege ak obesie chito ne bo iman ak kiptengekyot, ak obesie inendet ne otei Kamuktaindet ak ne maotei." 
Malachi4:1 Amu, ogeero, nyonei betut, ne lalei ko u mat ne o, ak koigei mobek menotik tugul, koboto ichek tugul che yaei tengekto: ak kobeel ichek betut ne nyonei, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek, kot ko mang’etyi tigitiot anan ko temet." 
Malachi4:2 Ago okwek che oiywei kainennyu kochorjinok asista ne bo imanda ne ting’e kanyaiset kebebaikyik; ak omande, ourerenote ko u moek che kagiyat." 
Malachi4:3 Ak otiech kiptengeginik; amu egu orek eng’ keldebesaikab kelyekwok eng’ betut ne ayae nito, mwaei Jehovah ne bo lugosiek." 
Malachi4:4 Obwat Ng’atutietab Musa otwogindennyu, ne kiang’at inendet eng’ Horeb agobo Israel tugul, noto ko ng’atutik ak kiruogutik." 
Malachi4:5 Ogeero, ayokwok maotiot Elija kotom konyo betut ne o ne imuisei ne bo Jehovah." 
Malachi4:6 Ak kowal mugulelwekab kwanisiek kotokyigei lagokwak, ak kowal mugulelwekab lagok kotokyigei kwanisiekwak; si manyo abire ng’onyuni chubisiet." 
Matthew1:5 ak kisich Salmon Boas eng’ Rahab; ak kisich Boas Obed eng’ Ruth; ak kisich Obed Jesii; 
Matthew24:15 Ye ogeer anyun kit ne kiwechei ne bo ng’emisiet, ne kimwa maotiot Daniel, kotonone ole tilil (ingoguiyo inendet ne somani)," 
Luke3:25 weritab Matatia, weritab Amos, weritab Nahum, weritab Esli, weritab Nagai," 
Luke3:25 weritab Matatia, weritab Amos, weritab Nahum, weritab Esli, weritab Nagai," 
Acts2:16 ago nito ne kimwaei maotiot Joel; kole," 
Romans9:25 Ko u ye mwaei agine eng’ Hosea kole, Aguure ichek bikyuk, che kima ko bikyuk; Ak aguure inendet chamanet, ne kima ko chamanet." 
James5:11 Ogeero, kiguure che kimuita che boiboen: kiogas agobo muitaetab Job, ak kiogeer kit ne kiyai Kiptaiyat eng’ let, ole nyiitat rirenet Kiptaiyat, ak koriregei."
